Genesis1:1 Eng' taunet, ko ki toi Kamuktaindet koyai kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Genesis1:2 Ki ma komi kiy ng'wony ak ki ma kotinyei itoon age tugul. Ki mi mesundeito paragutap rireet ak ki wendoti Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet eng' paragutap peek. 
Genesis1:3 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ingolapkeiit” ak ki lapkeiit." 
Genesis1:4 Kogeer anyun Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet kole myee, koobeesyo lapkeiyet ak mesundeito." 
Genesis1:5 Ki kuure Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet Peet ak koguure mesundeito Kemoi. Koimen ak koeech, peetuut ne tai." 
Genesis1:6 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ingobiit soet eng' kwenutap peek, si koobeesyo pei ak pei!”" 
Genesis1:7 Koyai Kamuktaindet soet si kobesyee peek che mi kurereetap soet ak che mi paragutap soet. Ak kiyaak ko uu nooto. 
Genesis1:8 Koguure Kamuktaindet soet parak, Kipsengwet. Koimen ak koeech, peetuut ne po aeng'." 
Genesis1:9 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ingoyumjigei peek komosta agenge che mi kurereetap kipsengwet, ak ingotook ng'wonyut ne ma mi pei.” Ak kiyaak ko uu nooto." 
Genesis1:10 Koguure Kamuktaindet emet ne ma mi pei, Ng'wony, ak koguure peek che kagoyumgei, Nyanjosyek. Ki keer anyun Kamuktaindet kole myee." 
Genesis1:11 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ingobiityo tugun eng' ng'wony: keetin alak tugul che po timiin che yiei kesui, ak che po logoi che tinyei kesui ko uu kergeindonywa”, ak kiyaak ko uu nooto." 
Genesis1:12 Ki piityo anyun tuguuk eng' ng'wony, keetiik alak tugul che po timiin che yiei kesweek ko uu kergeindonywa, ak che yiei logoek che tinyei kesweekwak ko uu kergeindonywa. Ak ki keer Kamuktaindet kole myee." 
Genesis1:13 Koimen ak koeech, peetuut ne po somok." 
Genesis1:14 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ingobiit tuguuk che iluu eng' soetap kipsengwet, si kobiit koobeesyo peet ak kemoi, si koek chooto kaboorunoik che po peetuusyek, arawek ak kenyiisyek," 
Genesis1:15 ingoek chooto che iluu eng' soetap kipsengwet si kobiit koluuchi ng'wony.” Ak kiyaak ko uu nooto. 
Genesis1:16 Koyai Kamuktaindet tuguuk aeng' che eecheen che iluu, si kobiit koboi ne oo peet, ak koboi ne ming'in kemoi. Ki yai kecheik ak icheek." 
Genesis1:17 Konde Kamuktaindet chooto soetap kipsengwet si kobiit koluuchi ng'wony," 
Genesis1:18 si koboi peet ak kemoi ak koobeesyo lapkeiyet ak mesundeito. Ki keer Kamuktaindet kole myee. 
Genesis1:19 Koimen ak koeech, peetuut ne po ang'wan." 
Genesis1:20 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ingochang'a ak koek ng'iisyat tuguuk che saptos eng' peek, ak ingotirirenso toriitik eng' paragutap ng'wony ak eng' soet parak.”" 
Genesis1:21 Ki toi Kamuktaindet koyai njireenik che eecheen ak kiy age tugul ne sabei ne wendote peek ko uu kergeindonywa, ak toriit alak tugul che tinyei kebebaik ko uu kergeindonywa. Ak ki keer Kamuktaindet kole myee." 
Genesis1:22 Ki iberuur anyun icheek koleenji, “Oiiye ak otesage onyi peegap nyanjosyek, ak ingotesagis toriitik eng' ng'wony.”" 
Genesis1:23 Koimen ak koeech, peetuut ne po muut." 
Genesis1:24 Komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ingobiit eng' ng'wony tuguuk che saptos ko uu kergeindonywa: kiyagiik, tyong'ik che ichuutegei ng'wony ak tyong'ik alak che po ng'wony ko uu kergeindonywa.” Ak kiyaak ko uu nooto." 
Genesis1:25 Ki yai anyun Kamuktaindet tyong'ik che po ng'wony ko uu kergeindonywa; kiyagiik ko uu kergeindonywa ak tyong'ik tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony ko uu kergeindonywa. Ak ki keer Kamuktaindet kole myee. 
Genesis1:26 Yeityo komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ongeyai chiito eng' itoondanyo, ko uu kergeindanyo. Ingoboi icheek njireenik che mi nyanjosyek, toriitik che mi soet parak, kiyagiik, ng'wony komugul ak tyong'ik tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony.”" 
Genesis1:27 Ki toi anyun Kamuktaindet koyai chiito eng' itoondonyi, ki toi koyai chiito eng' itoondap Kamuktaindet; ki toi koyai muren ak tye." 
Genesis1:28 Ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet icheek ak koleenji, “Oiiye ak otesage si onyi ng'wony ak obou; olaitorane njireenik che po nyanjosyek, toriitik che po parak ak kiy age tugul ne sabei ne wendote ng'wony.”" 
Genesis1:29 Yeityo komwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Ogeero, kaagoonok keetiik alak tugul che po timiin che tinyei kesweek che mi paragutap ng'wony ak keet age tugul ne tinyei logoekyik kesweek, koek amitwogikwok." 
Genesis1:30 Kaagoochi anyun keetiik alak tugul che nyaliileen koek amitwogigap tyony age tugul ne po ng'wony, toriitik alak tugul che po parak, ak kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony ne tinyei kabuusetap saboondo.” Ak kiyaak ko uu nooto." 
Genesis1:31 Ki keer anyun Kamuktaindet tuguuk tugul che kiga koyai kole myachen miising'. Koimen ak koeech, peetuut ne po lo." 
Genesis2:1 Ki kigees anyun yaetap kipsengwet ak ng'wony ak chaang'indonywa tugul. 
Genesis2:2 Ki igees Kamuktaindet eng' peetuutap tisap poisyonikyik che kiga koyai. Ki imuuny eng' peetuunooto po tisap eng' poisyonikyik tugul che kiga koyai. 
Genesis2:3 Ki iberuur anyun Kamuktaindet peetuutap tisap ak kotabaan, amu ki imuuny eng' peetuunooto eng' poisyonikyik tugul che ki toi Kamuktaindet koyai." 
Genesis2:4 Uu ni anyun ole ki kiyaita kipsengwet ak ng'wony eng' peetuunooto, ne ki yai Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Genesis2:5 Ki tomo kobiit keet ne po keeweet eng' ng'wony, ak ki tomo kobiityo keetiik alak tugul che mengeechen che po keeweet, amu ki tomo kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet korobonji ng'wony, ak ki ma komi chii ne iboti ng'wony." 
Genesis2:6 Ago ki mong' peek eng' ng'wony ak koobis ng'wony komugul. 
Genesis2:7 Ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiito eng' ng'ung'unyek, ak kobusyi seruunekyik kabuuset ne po saboondo. Ki ek anyun chiichooto chiito ne sabei." 
Genesis2:8 Ki kool Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet mbareet eng' Eden eng' komostap kong'asiis, ak konde olooto chiichooto ne kiga koyai." 
Genesis2:9 Ak ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kobiit keet age tugul eng' ng'wony ne karaaran eng' keeret ak ne myee eng' ameet. Ki mi eng' kwenutap mbareet keetit ne po saboondo ak keetit ne po naet ne kinae ne myee ak ne ya. 
Genesis2:10 Ki mang'une Eden aineet ne ibisi mbareet; yeityo kopcheigei koek ainoosyek ang'wan. 
Genesis2:11 Kainetap ne po tai ko Pison. Ainooni ko ne yiemei emet komugul ne po Havilah ole mi thahabu ak 
Genesis2:12 myachen thahabu che po emonooto; miitei olooto nyamdutik che ng'uu che kiguure Bedola ak koik che po kamanuut che kiguure Soam. 
Genesis2:13 Kiguure aineet ne po aeng' Gihon; nooto ne yiemei emet komugul ne po Kush. 
Genesis2:14 Kiguure aineet ne po somok Tigris. Ainooni ko ne wendi komostap kong'asiis ne po Assyria. Kiguure aineet ne po ang'wan Yufrets. 
Genesis2:15 Ki imut Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiito kwo kotebee mbareetap Eden si kobiit koseemberi ak koriibei. 
Genesis2:16 Ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiichooto koleenji, “Imuuchi iam logoek che po keetit age tugul ne imache ne mi mbareet;" 
Genesis2:17 ago amat iam che po keetit ne po naet ne kinae ne myee ak ne ya. Amu eng' peetuut ne keam che po keetoto, imee ne matiny.”" 
Genesis2:18 Yeityo komwa Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kole, “Ma myee kotebi chii ineegei; ayachini ne toreti ne kergei ak ineendet.”" 
Genesis2:19 Ara ki yai anyun Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet tyony age tugul ne po ng'wony eng' ng'ung'unyek, ak toriitik alak tugul che po parak, yeityo kokwerichi chiichooto tyong'ichooto kogeer ole tachindoi kainaik. Ak kainet ne kiguure chiichooto kiy age tugul ne sabei, ko ki ek kainennyi nooto." 
Genesis2:20 Ki toochi anyun chiichooto kainai kiyak tugul, toriit che po parak, ak tyong'in alak tugul che po ng'wony. Ago ki ma piit ne toreti chiichooto ne kergei ak ineendet." 
Genesis2:21 Ara ki yai anyun Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiichooto koru rwondo ne nyigiis, ak ye ki inuuchi, konem karaasta agenge, ak kotuge yooto panyeek kogeere karasato." 
Genesis2:22 Ak eng' karasato ki inemune chiichooto, koyai Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet koek kwony ak komutyi chiichooto." 
Genesis2:23 Yeityo komwa anyun chiichooto kole, “Ni anyun nguno ko kaweet ne po kawekyuk, ak panyeek che po panyeegap poortanyu; kiguure kainennyi Kwony, amu kaginemune Muren.”" 
Genesis2:24 Amu nooto anyun, pagaktoi mureno kwandanyi ak kamennyi ak konamgei ak kwondonyi, ak koek icheek poorto agenge." 
Genesis2:25 Ki mi aach ngor tuwai, chiichooto ak kwondonyi, ak ki ma koliilandos." 
Genesis3:1 Ki ng'aaliindet ndaret kosiir tyony age tugul ne po ng'wony ne kiga koyai Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet. Ki leenji anyun kwondo, “Tos, iman ki mwa Kamuktaindet kole, ‘Amat oam logoek che po keetit age tugul ne po mbareet i?’ ”" 
Genesis3:2 Ki leenji kwondo ndaret, “Ki chamwech keam logoek che po keetiigap mbareet;" 
Genesis3:3 ago ki mwa Kamuktaindet kole, ‘Amat oam logoek che po keetit ne mi kwenutap mbareet, amat otwaa, si mobegu.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Koleenji ndaret kwondo, “Mobegu iman!" 
Genesis3:5 Amu ingen Kamuktaindet kole eng' peetuut ne koam che po keetoto, koyatagisyei konyekwok, ak ogergeitu ak Kamuktaindet, onai ne myee ak ne ya.”" 
Genesis3:6 Ye kingo keer anyun kwondo kole myee keetooto eng' ameet, ak ko karaaran eng' koonyek, ak kogoochin chii konyoor utaatyet, kobut anyun logoekyik koam; ak kogoochi manong'otyonnyi, ne ki mi tuwai, ko am agine." 
Genesis3:7 Ki yaatagis anyun konyekwak icheek tuwai ak konai kole mi aach ngor. Ki nabanap anyun sogeegap mogoywet, konapchigei ngoroik che kigermenegei." 
Genesis3:8 Ak ki kas `icheek Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kowendoti eng' mbar ye kiga kogaititit koskoleny, koistoegei ole mi Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ak kounygei eng' keetiik oriit che mi mbar." 
Genesis3:9 Ki kuur anyun `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet chiichooto koleenji, “Imi ano?”" 
Genesis3:10 Kowolji chiichooto koleenji, “Kagas iwendoti eng' mbar ak kaywei amu ami aach ngor ak kaunygei anyun amu nooto.”" 
Genesis3:11 koteebee Kamuktaindet koleenji; “Ng'oo ne kamwaun kole imi aach ngor? Ka iam logoek che po keetooto ki ang'atiin ale amat iam?” 
Genesis3:12 Kowolji chiito koleenji; “Kwonyoo ki igoono ketebi tuwai, ko ineendet ne kagono logoek che po keetit ak ka aam.”" 
Genesis3:13 koteebee `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kwondo koleenji, “Nee ni kaiyai?” Kole kwondo, “Kagoberbera ndaret, ak ka aam.”" 
Genesis3:14 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ndaret, “Amu kaiyai kii, ko kagichubin kosiir kiyagiik tugul ak tyong'ik tugul che po timiin; iichuute moeng'ung' ng'wony ak iame ng'ung'unyek peetuusyek tugul ko tee isabe." 
Genesis3:15 Andoi punyondiit kwenung'wong' inyee ndareet ak kwondo ak kwenutap iyoteng'ung' ak iyotennyi. Tuei ineendet meting'ung' ak isuse aginye kwaryandennyi” 
Genesis3:16 Koleenji anyun `Kamuktaindet kwondo, “Atesun miising' nyaliildang'ung' eng' sigisyeng'ung', isiche lagok eng' ng'wanindo. Inyali manong'otyong'ung' eng' mageng'ung' ak koboun.”" 
Genesis3:17 Yeityo Koleenji Adam, “Amu kegas ng'aleegap kwondong'ung', ak iam che po keetit ne ki ang'atiin ale amat iam, ko kagichup ng'wony agobo inyee; iame che po ng'wony eng' nyaliilda ko tee isabe;" 
Genesis3:18 iiun `ng'wony katook che toorei piich ak che rutei piich, ak iame ingweek alak tugul che po emet." 
Genesis3:19 Iame amitwogik eng' kaotigap togeng'ung' kot koit iweekyigei ng'wony amu ki kinemunenen yooto; amu ii ng'ung'uny, iweekyinigei ng'ung'unyek.”" 
Genesis3:20 Kiguure `Adam kwondonyi Hawa, amu ineendet kametap tugul che saptos." 
Genesis3:21 Ak kinapchi `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet Adam ak kwondonyi ngoroik, ak kolaakyi." 
Genesis3:22 Ak ki mwa `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet kole, “Ogeero! Kagogergeit chiichi ak agenge eng' acheek, ne ingen ne myee ak ne ya.” Ko si mata koyogooito eunnyi kobut che po keetitap saboondo koam ak kosap koigeny," 
Genesis3:23 ko ki imaanda `Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ineendet eng' mbareetap Eden, si kobiit kobat ng'wony ole ki kinemune." 
Genesis3:24 Ki oon anyun chiichooto koomaanda ak konde Kerubik kotebee komostap kong'asiis ne po mbareetap Eden. Yeityo konde rootwetap chok ne ilyeli ne tokyingei komoswek tugul si koriip ooreet ne tokyingei keetitap saboondo. 
Genesis4:1 Ki ituiyogei chiichooto ak kwondonyi Hawa, ak ki manach Hawa kosich Kain. Komwa Hawa kole, “Kaasich muren eng' toretetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Genesis4:2 Ak ki sich kogeny weeriit ne tupcho, Abel. Ki kayagin ne po kechir Abel, ko ki ibati ng'wony Kain" 
Genesis4:3 Kingo pata peetuusyo, koipchi `Kain Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinetap rurotetap mbar." 
Genesis4:4 Ki kwerichi Abel agine iyoteetap tai che akwaen che po akweennyi. Ak ki cham `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abel ak kagachinennyi," 
Genesis4:5 ago ma cham Kain ak kagachinennyi. Ki nereech Kain miising' kot ko siriny togeennyi. 
Genesis4:6 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kain, “Amu nee si inereech inyee? Ak kalya si isiriny togeng'ung'?" 
Genesis4:7 Ngot iyai ne myee, ko tos ma kitaachin? Ago ngo meyai ne myee, ko ruei tengekto eng' kurgat, tokyiningei magennyi, ago magaat anyun ibou.”" 
Genesis4:8 Ki ng'alaalji `Kain ng'eetap kamet Abel. Ak ye kingo ta komi tuwai kewanin, kosetyi `Kain ng'eetap kam Abel ak kobar." 
Genesis4:9 koteebee `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kain anyun koleenji, “Mi ano tupcheng'ung', Abel?” Kowol Kain kole, “Mangen. Tos aa riibindetap tupchennyu?”" 
Genesis4:10 koteebee Kamuktaindet koleenji, “Keyai nee inyee? Riirchino kong'etee ng'wony tuugeetap korotiigap tupcheng'ung'!" 
Genesis4:11 Nguno anyun ko ii chuboot eng' ng'wonyut ne kaiseng'eng' kotaach korotiigap ne otupche kobun euneguk: 
Genesis4:12 si ye ibatii ng'wony, koma iamee kiy. Iegu ne mweoti ak koombenoti eng' ng'wony.”" 
Genesis4:13 Koleenji `Kain Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Oo pirennyu kosiir ne tee ne amuuchi ala!" 
Genesis4:14 Keer anyuno, keona ra eng' ng'wony komugul ak ma atogu eng' taing'ung'. Aegu ne mweoti ak koombenoti eng' ng'wony ak chii age tugul ne kanyoorwo ko paro.”" 
Genesis4:15 Ki ng'at anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Age tugul ne parei Kain keyaakyin mugetuut konyil tisap.” Ak ki imaar anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kain si ma par chii age tugul ne kanyoor." 
Genesis4:16 Ki wo Kain anyun eng' ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kwo komeny emetap Nod ne mi komostap kong'asiis eng' Eden. 
Genesis4:17 Ki ituiyogei Kain ak kwondonyi, kosich Enok. Ki teech nganaseet ne kiguurtoe kainetap weeriinnyi Enok." 
Genesis4:18 Ki sich `Enok Irad; kosich `Irad Meujael; kosich `Meujael Methushael; ak kosich `Methushael Lamek. 
Genesis4:19 Ki itun `Lamek kwonyiik aeng' che kainaikwak ko ki Adah ak Zillah. 
Genesis4:20 Ki sich `Adah Jabel ne ineendet ko kwandap icheeget che kimeng'ooti emaisyek ak koyagi kiyagiik. 
Genesis4:21 Ki kiguure ne tupcho, Jubal; ineendet kwandap icheeget che putei ketubosyek ak ndurerusyek." 
Genesis4:22 Ki sich `Zillah agine Tubal-Kain ne ki kitang'indetap sugunonik ak kariik. Ki kiguure chepkametap Tubal-Kain, Naamah." 
Genesis4:23 Ki mwachi `Lamek chebyosokyik koleenji, “Ogas kutinnyu Adah ak Zillah! Oepchi iit ee ng'aleekyuk, kwonyiigap Lamek. Kaabar chii, muren ne kabiro! Neraneet ne kagoguoteno." 
Genesis4:24 Ngot ko ki kiyaakyi mugetuut Kain konyil tisap, ko agot Lamek keyookyin konyil tamanwogik tisap ak tisap.”" 
Genesis4:25 Ak ye kingo testai komeng'iis Adam ak kwondonyi, kosich weeriit age ne kiguure Seth amu ki le, “Kagono Kamuktaindet iyoteet age koogeere Abel ne ki par Kain.”" 
Genesis4:26 Ki sich Seth agine weeriit ne kiguure Enos. Kong'etee yooto anyun kotoi piik koguur kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Genesis5:1 Ni ko sireet ne po teteetap iyoteetap kap Adam. Eng' peetuut ne ki toi Kamuktaindet koyai chiito, ko ki yai icheek eng' kergeindonyi." 
Genesis5:2 Ki yai icheek, muren ak tye ak koberuur, yeityo kotoochi icheek kainet koguure Adam." 
Genesis5:3 Ki tar Adam kenyiisyek pogol ak sosom kosich weeriit eng' kergeindonyi ak eng' itoondonyi, ak kiguure kainennyi Seth." 
Genesis5:4 Ye kingo kagosich `Adam Seth, kotar kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik." 
Genesis5:5 Ki ilil Adam kotinyei kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak sosom. 
Genesis5:6 Ye kingo tinyei Seth kenyiisyek pogol ak muut, kosich Enosh." 
Genesis5:7 Ki tar Seth kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak tisap ye kingo kagosich Enosh, ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik." 
Genesis5:8 Eng' tugul, ko ki tar Seth kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak taman ak aeng' si kolili." 
Genesis5:9 Kingo po Enosh kenyiisyek tamanwogik sogool, kosich Kenan." 
Genesis5:10 Ki tar Enosh kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak taman ak muut ye kingo kagosich Kenan, ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik." 
Genesis5:11 Ki ilil Enosh ko po kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak muut. 
Genesis5:12 Ki po Kenan kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap kosichei Mahalalel. 
Genesis5:13 Komeng'iis Kenan kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak artam ye kingo kagosich Mahalalel ak kosich weeriik alak ak tiibiik. 
Genesis5:14 Ki ilil Kenan ko po kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak taman. 
Genesis5:15 Kosich `Mahalalel Jared kotinyei kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo ak muut. 
Genesis5:16 Ak ki tebi Mahalalel kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak sosom ye kingo kagosich Jared, ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik." 
Genesis5:17 Ki po Mahalalel kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ak tamanwogik sogool ak muut ye kingo lili. 
Genesis5:18 Kingo po Jared kenyiisyek pogol ak tamanwogik lo ak aeng' kosich Enok. 
Genesis5:19 Eng' kenyiisyek pogol sisiit ye kingo kagosich `Jared Enok, ko ki sich kora weeriik alak ak tiibiik." 
Genesis5:20 Ki ilil Jared ko po kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak tamanwogik lo ak aeng'. 
Genesis5:21 Kingo po Enok kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo ak muut kosich Methuselah. 
Genesis5:22 Ki pendat Enok ak Kamuktaindet eng' kenyiisyek pogol somok ye kingo kagosich Methuselah ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik. 
Genesis5:23 Peetuusyek tugul che po sabeetap Enok ko ki kenyiisyek pogol somok ak tamanwogik lo ak muut. 
Genesis5:24 Kibendoti Enok ak Kamuktaindet; ak ki mata kiro amu ki imut ineendet `Kamuktaindet! 
Genesis5:25 Kingo tinyei Methuselah kenyiisyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak tisap kosich Lamek. 
Genesis5:26 Ki meng'iis Methuselah kenyiisyek pogol tisap ak tamanwogik sisiit ak aeng' ye kingo kagosich Lamek ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik. 
Genesis5:27 Ki ilili Methuselah ko po kenyiisyek pogol sogool ak tamanwogik lo ak sogool. 
Genesis5:28 Ki tar Lamek kenyiisyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak aeng', kosich weeriit." 
Genesis5:29 Kiguure kainennyi Noah, kole, “Ineendet ne igoigoech eng' nyalilwogik che po poisyonikyok che uueen eng' ng'wony ne ki chup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Genesis5:30 Ki meng'iis Lamek kenyiisyek pogol muut ak tamanwogik sogool ak muut ye kingo kagosich Noah, ak ki sich weeriik alak ak tiibiik." 
Genesis5:31 Ki po Lamek kenyiisyek pogol tisap ak tamanwogik tisap ak tisap ye kingo lili. 
Genesis5:32 Ak ye kingo tinyei Noah kenyiisyek pogol muut, kosich Shem, Ham ak Japhet." 
Genesis6:1 Ye kingo toi kotesagis piik eng' ng'wony ak kosich tiibiik," 
Genesis6:2 kogeer anyun `weeriigap Kamuktaindet tiibiichooto po piik kole korooron, komutyigei tugul che ki lewen koek kwonyiikwak." 
Genesis6:3 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ma tebee `Kabuusennyu chii agoi amu ineendet ko poorto. Ko uu nooto anyun, ko egu peetuusyekyik kenyiisyek pogol ak tiptem.”" 
Genesis6:4 Ki miitei Piik che eecheen che uu chemosin ng'wony eng' peetuusyechooto, ye kingo tuiyogei weeriigap Kamuktaindet ak tiibiigap piik ak kosikyi icheek lagok. Lagochooto anyun ko ki ek piik che ki nyigoonen ko po keny, ak ki murenik che ki taagunotiin." 
Genesis6:5 Ki keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, oo miising' tengektap kimugulmet eng' ng'wony, ak kabwaatutik tugul che po muguleldanyi ko tengekto kityo peetuut age tugul." 
Genesis6:6 Ki riir let Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo chii ne ki yai eng' ng'wony, ak ki kas ng'wanindo eng' muguleldanyi." 
Genesis6:7 Ak ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Abare awong'u piik che ki ayai eng' ng'wony komugul; kong'etee chii, kiyagiik, che ichuutegei ng'wony agoi toriit alak tugul che po parak; ki mata myee ayai icheek.”" 
Genesis6:8 Ago ki chamak Noah eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Genesis6:9 Chu isubi ko ooreetap kap Noah. Ki chiito Noah ne po imanda ak kogesunotkei eng' ibindanyi. Kibendoti ineendet ak Kamuktaindet. 
Genesis6:10 Ki sich `Noah weeriik somok; Shem, Ham ak Japhet." 
Genesis6:11 Ak kiga kong'emak emet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ak ki oo puunyoondit eng' ng'wony. 
Genesis6:12 Ki iro Kamuktaindet ng'wony kole ki kong'emak, amu kiga kowelel piik tugul atebosyekwak eng' ng'wony." 
Genesis6:13 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Noah, “Kaabegechi agees piik tugul, amu oo puunyoondit ak ng'emisyet eng' ng'wony amu icheek. Ko uu nooto anyun, ang'eme icheek kobooto ng'wony komugul." 
Genesis6:14 Yachigei moinget ne po keetiigap taragonik; ak ipchei kooriik che mengeechen eng' moinget ak imale manget oriit ak saang'. 
Genesis6:15 Yai moinget ko uu ni: koindonyi ko mitainik pogol ak sosom ak sogool ak tebeesindonyi ko mitainik tiptem ak muut, ak toloitanyi ko mitainik taman ak muut." 
Genesis6:16 Yai ole punu lapkeiyet eng' moinget, ak iyai koek tonon kakwautyet agenge: ak inde kurgennyi tabandap moinget ak ipcheune somok moinget, ne po ng'wony, ne po kween ak ne po parak." 
Genesis6:17 Aipchini ng'wony maraneet ne oo si ang'eme tugul che saptos, age tugul ne tinyei kabuusetap saboondo eng' ng'wony. Asi kobek tugul che mi ng'wony." 
Genesis6:18 Ka agimiit kayomisennyu kobooten, ak inyoo inyee moinget ak weeriiguk ak chebyoseng'ung' ak kwonyiigap weeriiguk." 
Genesis6:19 Ketu alak eng' tuguuk tugul che saptos kobwa moinget oriit, aeng' aeng' che po ooreet age tugul, si iriip kosapcho kobooten, lewen kirgit ak subeen." 
Genesis6:20 Ingobwa kora toriitik ko uu kergeindonywa, kiyagiik ko uu kergeindonywa ak tyong'ik alak tugul che ichuuteegei ng'wony ko uu kergeindonywa, kobwonjin aeng' aeng' che po ooreet age tugul si iriip kosapcho." 
Genesis6:21 Iyum anyun ak iipchigei amitwogik alak tugul che kiamei, si igonor koek amitwogiguk ak chechwaak.”" 
Genesis6:22 Ki yai anyun Noah ko uu nooto; ki yai kiy tugul ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ineendet. 
Genesis7:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Noah, “Ochut moinget inyee ak piigap koong'ung' tugul, amu kaagerin ale eng' ibini, ko iboo imanda eng' tainnyu." 
Genesis7:2 Ketuu tyong'ik alak tugul che tiliileen kobwanune tisap tisap, kiruk ak subeen, ak aeng' aeng' eng' tyong'ik che ma tiliileen, kiruk ak subeen;" 
Genesis7:3 ak che po toriitik che po parak ak icheek, tisap tisap, kipsoiywo ak subeen, si keriip kosapcho iyotennywa eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Genesis7:4 Amu tomo peetuusyek tisabu si ayookyi ropta ng'wony koroobon peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam, ak abar awong'u kiy age tugul ne sabei ne ki ayai eng' ng'wony komugul.”" 
Genesis7:5 Ak ki yai Noah tugul ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. 
Genesis7:6 Kingo po Noah kenyiisyek pogol lo, kobiit maraneet eng' ng'wony." 
Genesis7:7 Ki chut anyun Noah moinget ak weeriikyik, ak chebyosennyi ak kwonyiigap weeriikyik, si kochililye peegap maraneet." 
Genesis7:8 Ki pa moinget anyun tyong'ik che tiliileen ak che ma tiliileen eng' toriitik ak tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony 
Genesis7:9 aeng' aeng' kobooto Noah ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet; ne kiruk ak ne subeen. 
Genesis7:10 Kingo pata anyun peetuusyek tisabu, kobiit peegap maraneet eng' ng'wony." 
Genesis7:11 Eng' kenyiit ne ki ite Noah kenyiisyek pogol lo, eng' arawet ne po aeng', ak eng' peetuutap taman ak tisap, eng' peetuunooto anyun koyatagis kong'iik che kutune peek che po rireet ne oo ak koyatagis peek eng' kipsengwet." 
Genesis7:12 Kirobonji ng'wony peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam. 
Genesis7:13 Ki chut anyun moinget Noah eng' peetuunooto kobooto weeriikyik, Shem, Ham, Japhet, chebyosennyi ak kwonyiik somok che po weeriikyik." 
Genesis7:14 Kichut ak tyony age tugul ko uu kergeindonyi, kiyagiik tugul ko uu kergeindonywa, alak tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony ko uu kergeindonywa, toriit alak tugul ko uu kergeindonywa ak alak tugul che tinyei kebebaik." 
Genesis7:15 Kichut moinget ole mi Noah icheek tugul che saptos ak kotinyei kabuusetap saboondo, kobee aeng' aeng'." 
Genesis7:16 Eng' icheek che kichut, ko ki kiruuk ak subeenwo che po tugul che saptos ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet Noah. Ak kigerchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Noah anyun oriit." 
Genesis7:17 Kimaranee peek ng'wony peetuusyek artam. Kitesak kot koganap `maraneet moinget kwo parak kot kolooit eng' ng'wony. 
Genesis7:18 Kichang'a ak kogimegitu miising' peek eng' ng'wony kot koreresan moinget eng' peek parak. 
Genesis7:19 Ki kimegitu peek miising' eng' ng'wony komugul kot kotuch tuloonook tugul che kooen eng' kurereetap kipsengwet. 
Genesis7:20 Kichaang'it kot kosiir tuloonook, ak ki tuch tuloonook eng' mitainik tisap ak kebeberyat koba parak." 
Genesis7:21 Ak ki pek tuguuk tugul che saptos eng' ng'wony; toriitik, kiyagiik, tyong'ik tugul che po timiin, tyong'ik tugul che uoti eng' ng'wony ak kimugulmet age tugul." 
Genesis7:22 Ki pek tugul che saptos, che tinyei kabuusetap sabeet, che ki mi emet ne yaamaat." 
Genesis7:23 Ki kibar kiwoong' kiy age tugul ne ki sabei ne ki mi emet komugul; kimugulmet, kiyagiik, che ichuutegei ng'wony ak toriit alak tugul che po parak. Ki kibar kigees eng' ng'wony kobatee Noah ak che ki miitei tugul moinget oriit." 
Genesis7:24 Kimaran peechooto kotuch emet peetuusyek pogol ak konom. 
Genesis8:1 Ki ibwaat anyun `Kamuktaindet Noah, tyong'ik che po timiin ak kiyagiik tugul che ki mi tugul eng' moinget. Ak ki iyookyi Kamuktaindet usoonet ne ki usyi ng'wony, ak ki toi koteenyo peek." 
Genesis8:2 Kigerogis kong'iik che kutune peek che po rireet ak che punu peek eng' kipsengwet ak kegirinda ropta eng' soet parak. 
Genesis8:3 Ki testai koteenyo peek eng' ng'wony kot ko kingo kesugei peetuusyek pogolu ak konom, ko kagong'ering'itu miising'." 
Genesis8:4 Ki tonon moinget eng' arawetap tisap, peetuut ne po taman ak tisap eng' tuloonoogap Ararat." 
Genesis8:5 Ki ng'ering'itu peek miising' kot ko eng' arawetap taman peetuut ne po tai, kotook tuloonook." 
Genesis8:6 Ye kingo pata peetuusyek artamu, koyaat Noah tirisyetap moinget" 
Genesis8:7 ak koyookto chepkugit. Ki tirirenot kot koteenyo peek eng' ng'wony. 
Genesis8:8 Ki iyookto cheptuget agine, si kobiit kogeer ngo kagong'ering'itu peek eng' emet komugul." 
Genesis8:9 Ki ma nyoor cheptuget ole namei ak komung'ee amu kita komi peek emet komugul, koit koweekyigei Noah eng' moinget. Ki iyogoito Noah anyun eunnyi si konam konyo moinget oriit." 
Genesis8:10 Kita kotebi peetuusyek alak tisap, yeityo komaanda kogeny cheptugonooto eng' moinget." 
Genesis8:11 Ki week cheptugonooto eng' koskoleny koibune kutinnyi sogoot ne tuon; ak ki nai Noah anyun kole teng'oti peek. 
Genesis8:12 Ki tebi Noah peetuusyek alak tisap, yeityo komaanda cheptugonooto kora; ak mata koweek kogeny." 
Genesis8:13 Kingo po Noah kenyiisyek pogol lo ak agenge eng' arawetap tai, eng' peetuut ne po tai, ko kiteenyo peek anyun eng' emet. Ki isto Noah anyun tuguuk che kiga kisyebe moinget, ak kogeer ak konai kole kagosai emet." 
Genesis8:14 Ki yaam emet eng' arawet ne po aeng', eng' peetuut ne po tiptem ak tisap." 
Genesis8:15 Ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet Noah koleenji," 
Genesis8:16 “Mandee eng' moinget, inyee ak chebyoseng'ung', ak weeriiguk ak kwonyiikwak." 
Genesis8:17 Yaatu komong' tyong'ik tugul che saptos che mi kobooten; toriitik, kiyagiik, ak tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony, si kobiit koba koiiyo, kochang'a ak kotesagis eng' ng'wony.”" 
Genesis8:18 Ki manda anyun Noah ak weeriikyik, ak kwondonyi ak chebyosogap weeriikyik." 
Genesis8:19 Ki manda eng' moinget tyony age tugul, tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony, toriit alak tugul ak tugul che pendote ng'wony ko uu piiteennywa." 
Genesis8:20 Kiteekyi `Noah Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet, ak konam koip eng' tyony age tugul ne tiliil ak eng' toriit age tugul ne tiliil ak kogoito koek konunoik che kibeelei eng' kaptisiisyo." 
Genesis8:21 Kingo ng'uuchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyinyindo kobun kaptisiisyo, kotil ineendet eng' muguleldanyi kole, “Ma achube ng'wony kogeny agobo chii amu yaacheen kabwaatutigap muguleldap chii kobooch koming'in. Ma abare tuguuk tugul che saptos kogeny agoi ko uu ye ki ayai." 
Genesis8:22 Kotee kota komi ng'wony, koma pegu koolset ak kesisyet, kaitityet ak kiptoret, kemeut ak iwot, peet ak kemoi.”" 
Genesis9:1 Ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet Noah ak weeriikyik ak koleenji, “Osigisye ak otesage, ak onyi ng'wony!" 
Genesis9:2 Iyweok ak koarageni tyony age tugul ne po ng'wony agobo okweek; agot toriit alak tugul che po parak, tugul che pendoti kochuutegei eng' ng'wony ak njireenik tugul che po nyanjet; tugul ko kaginde eunekwok." 
Genesis9:3 Egu amitwogikwok kiy age tugul ne sabei ne wendoti; kagoonok tugul ko uu ye kiga agoonok tuguuk che piitos alak tugul che nyalileen. 
Genesis9:4 Ago moam panyeek kobooto saboondonyi ne nooto ko korotiik. 
Genesis9:5 Amagenok ne matiny korotiigap saboonwekwok agobo saboondap chii, eng' tyony age tugul ak eng' chii anan ko eng' ne tupcho." 
Genesis9:6 Chii age tugul ne tumdoi korotiigap chii, ketumdoi chechiik agine; amu eng' itoondonyi ko ki yai `Kamuktaindet chii." 
Genesis9:7 Osigisye ak otesage osigisye kot ochaang'e miising' eng' ng'wony.” 
Genesis9:8 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Noah ak weeriikyik," 
Genesis9:9 “Ogaso! Kaagimiit kayomisenyu kobootok ak kobooto iyoteng'wong' ne piitu let," 
Genesis9:10 ak kobooto kiy age tugul ne sabei ne mi kobootok; eng' toriitik, eng' kiyagiik ak eng' tyong'ik alak tugul che po ng'wony, ko uu ole kimang'undo eng' moinget." 
Genesis9:11 Ak agimiit kayomisennyu kobootok ale, ma kebarei kiwong'u kogeny tugul che saptos eng' peek che po maraneet, ak ma kobiitu maraneet ne ng'emei ng'wony.”" 
Genesis9:12 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet kole, “Kaboorunet ni ne po kayomiset ne kagiyomiskei eng' kwenunnyo, anee ak okweek ak kiy age tugul ne sabei ne mi kobootok agobo ibinwek tugul che pwoonei:" 
Genesis9:13 Kande chemng'isiryennyu poolik parak, si koek kaboorunet ne po kayomiset ne mi kwenunnyoo, anee ak ng'wony." 
Genesis9:14 Ye kabiit poolik eng' parak, ak kotook anyun chemng'isiryet eng' parak," 
Genesis9:15 abwaat anyun kayomisennyu ne mi kwenunnyoo, anee ak okweek ak kiy age tugul ne sabei. Ma kobiitu kogeny peek che marandos che iwong'u tugul che saptos." 
Genesis9:16 Ye took anyun chemng'isiryet eng' poolik, ageer ak abwaat kayomiset ne tebyei agoi koigeny, ne mi kwenutap Kamuktaindet ak kiy age tugul ne sabei ne mi ng'wony.”" 
Genesis9:17 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Noah, “Kaboorunet ni, ne po kayomiset ne kaayai eng' kwenunnyoo anee ak tugul che saptos che mi ng'wony.”" 
Genesis9:18 Weeriigap Noah che ki mong' eng' moinget ko ki Shem, Ham ak Japhet. Ham ko ki kwandap Kanaan." 
Genesis9:19 Chuuto somok ko ki weeriigap Noah, ak ki yom ng'wony komugul iyotennywa." 
Genesis9:20 Ki toi Noah koek kabatindet, ak kimin mbareetap sabibuk." 
Genesis9:21 Ak kie maiyek ak kobogit, ak ki tep aach ngor eng' emainnyi." 
Genesis9:22 Ki keer Ham, kwandap Kanaan, kwandanyi kotebyei aach ngor, ak ki mwachi tupchosyekyik aeng' che ki mi saang'." 
Genesis9:23 Ki ng'eetyo Shem ak Japhet konem sambut, ak komure tigigoikwak icheek tuwai ak kobee patai ak kotuch kwandanywa ne ki mi aach ngor. Kibee patai si ma keer kwandanywa komi aach ngor." 
Genesis9:24 Ye kingo ng'eet anyun Noah eng' pogitennyi, ak konai tuguuk che kagoyachi weeriinnyi ne ming'in," 
Genesis9:25 ak ki le, “Ingochubok Kanaan! Egu otwogindetap otwogik eng' tupchosyekyik.”" 
Genesis9:26 Ak ki le, “Ingoberuurok Shem eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ingoek Kanaan otwogindennyi." 
Genesis9:27 Ingobara `Kamuktaindet Japhet, ak ingomeny koriigap Shem; ak ingoek Kanaan otwogindennyi.”" 
Genesis9:28 Ki tar Noah kenyiisyek alak pogol somok ak konom ye kingo pata maraneet. 
Genesis9:29 Kenyiisyek tugul che ki tar Noah ko pogol sogool ak konom; yeityo koolil. 
Genesis10:1 Chu isubi ko piigap ooreetap weeriigap Noah: Shem, Ham ak Japhet. Ak ki sich icheek weeriik ye kingo pata maraneet." 
Genesis10:2 Weeriigap Japhet ko; Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshek ak Tiras." 
Genesis10:3 Weeriigap Gomer ko; Ashkenas, Riphath ak Togarmah." 
Genesis10:4 Weeriigap Javan ko; Elisha, Tarsis, Kitim ak Dodanik." 
Genesis10:5 Ki kipchechi icheek emotinwek che neegitee nyanjosyek che po pororyosyek eng' emotinwekwak; chii age tugul eng' kutinnyi, ko uu ortinwekwak ak eng' pororyosyekwak." 
Genesis10:6 Weeriigap Ham ko chu: Kush, Misiri, Put ak Kanaan." 
Genesis10:7 Weeriigap Kush ko: Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah ak Sabteka. Weeriigap Raamah ko: Sheba ak Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 Ki sich `Kush Nimrod, ne ineendet ko ki ek chiito ne nyigan eng' ng'wony." 
Genesis10:9 Ki kiplogotyot ne nyigan eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ko uu nooto anyun kemwae keele, “Ko uu Nimrod, kiplogotyot ne nyigan eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Genesis10:10 Taunetap laitornatennyi ko ki Babel, Erek, Akat, ak Kalne eng' emetap Shinar." 
Genesis10:11 Ki manda eng' emonooto kwo Assyria, si koteech Nineveh, ak nganaseetap Rehoboth-ir, Kala," 
Genesis10:12 ak Resen ne mi kwenutap Nineveh ak Kala ne nooto ko nganaseet ne oo. 
Genesis10:13 Ki sich `Misiri Ludik, Anamik, Lehabik, Naptuik," 
Genesis10:14 Patrusik, Kasluhik ak Kaptorik che icheeget kwanisyegap Philistiik." 
Genesis10:15 Ki sich `Kanaan Sidon weeriinnyi ne po tai, ak Het," 
Genesis10:16 ak Jebusik, Amorik, Girgasiik," 
Genesis10:17 Hibiik, Arkiik, Siniik," 
Genesis10:18 Aribadiik, Semariik ak Hamatiik. Kingo pata ko ki uot ooreetap kap Kanaan koyom emet." 
Genesis10:19 Kiwotetap Kanaanik ko ki taunegei Sidon, ak kotokyigei Gerar agoi Gaza, ak kotokyigei Sodom ak Gomorah, Atma ak Seboim, agoi Lasa." 
Genesis10:20 Chuuto ko weeriigap Ham, ko uu ortinwekwak ak kutusweekwak eng' emotinwekwak, ak eng' pororyosyekwak." 
Genesis10:21 Ki sich Shem agine lagok, ineendet ko ki kwandap lagok tugul che po Eber, ng'eetap kamet ne oo eng' Japhet." 
Genesis10:22 Weeriigap Shem chu: Elam, Ashur, Arbaksat, Luk ak Aram." 
Genesis10:23 Weeriigap Aram ko: Us, Hul, Gether ak Mas." 
Genesis10:24 Ak ki sich `Arbaksat Shelah, ak kosich `Shelah Eber." 
Genesis10:25 Ki sich `Eber weeriik aeng', ne kainetap age ko ki Peleg amu ki kipchei ng'wony eng' peetuusyekyik, ak kainetap ng'eetap kamet ko ki Joktan." 
Genesis10:26 Ki sich `Joktan Almodad, Shaleph, Hatsarmaveth, Jerah," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoram, Usal, Diklah," 
Genesis10:28 Obal, Abimael, Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 Opir, Havilah ak Jobab. Chuuto tugul ko ki weeriigap Joktan." 
Genesis10:29 Opir, Havilah ak Jobab. Chuuto tugul ko ki weeriigap Joktan." 
Genesis10:30 Ak ki iboch meng'ootennywa Mesha, kotokyingei Sepharah, tulweetap kong'asiis." 
Genesis10:31 Chuuto anyun weeriigap Shem, ko uu ortinwekwak, kutusweekwak eng' emotinwekwak ak ko uu pororyosyekwak." 
Genesis10:32 Chuuto ko ortinwegap weeriigap Noah, ko uu ibinwekwak ak ko uu pororyosyekwak. Ak eng' chuuto ko kipcheunegei pororyosyek tugul eng' ng'wony ye kingo kagobata maraneet." 
Genesis11:1 Ki ng'alaali ng'wony komugul kutit agenge ak ng'alaalet agenge. 
Genesis11:2 Ak ye kingo ta kobendi kong'etee kong'asiis, konyoor atebweet eng' emetap Shinar, ak ki meny olooto." 
Genesis11:3 Ki ng'alaaljigei anyun icheegei kole, “Ong'eetyee keyai ak kebeel matubaruk kobelogis.” Ki poisyee matubaruk ne kita koik, ak meneet ne kita ng'enda." 
Genesis11:4 Yeityo komwachigei kole, “Obwa keteekyigei nganaseet ak keteech koot ne kooi ne togostoi parak, ne itei kimonjogunnyi parak kipsengwet, si keyaigei keegu che taagunotiin, si mata keyeste eng' ng'wony komugul.”" 
Genesis11:5 Ki choorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo kooro nganaseet ak teekseet ne kooi ne ki togosta kwo parak, ne kiga koteech weeriigap piik." 
Genesis11:6 Ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ogeero, agenge pichu ak ko po tugul kutit agenge, ak kagotoi koyai kiy ne uu ni. Ma mi kiy ne tos etee icheek si ma yai kiy ne machei." 
Genesis11:7 Ongebe, kechoortegei anyun ak kitoiye kutusweekwak si mata kogasyin icheegei eng' ng'alaalet!”" 
Genesis11:8 Ko uu nooto anyun, koiyestaat `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek koyom ng'wony komugul; ak kimeto icheek teekseetap nganaseet." 
Genesis11:9 Ki kiguure nganasanooto Babel, amu ki itoiye yooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutusweek che po ng'wony komugul; ak ki iyeesta `ineendet icheek koyom ng'wony komugul." 
Genesis11:10 Chu isubi komwaiwech agobo ortinwegap Shem; ye kingo po Shem kenyiisyek pogol, ko ki sich Arbaksat eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' kogagobata maraneet." 
Genesis11:11 Ki meng'iis Shem kenyiisyek pogol muut ye kingo kagosich Arbaksat, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
Genesis11:12 Ki meng'iis Arbaksat kenyiisyek sosom ak muut, kosich Shelah." 
Genesis11:13 Ki meng'iis Arbaksat kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak somok ye kingo kagosich Shelah, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
Genesis11:14 Ki meng'iis Shelah kenyiisyek sosom, kosich Eber." 
Genesis11:15 Kotar Shelah kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak somok ye kingo kagosich Eber, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
Genesis11:16 Ki meng'iis Eber kenyiisyek sosom ak ang'wan, kosich Peleg." 
Genesis11:17 Ak ki tar Eber kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak sosom ye kingo kagosich Peleg, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
Genesis11:18 Ki meng'iis Peleg kenyiisyek sosom, kosich Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Ki tar Peleg kenyiisyek pogol aeng' ak sogool ye kingo kagosich Reu, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
Genesis11:20 Ki meng'iis Reu kenyiisyek sosom ak aeng', kosich Serug." 
Genesis11:21 Ak ki tar Reu kenyiisyek pogol aeng' ak tisap ye kingo kagosich Serug, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
Genesis11:22 Ki meng'iis Serug kenyiisyek sosom, kosich Nahor." 
Genesis11:23 Ak ki tar Serug kenyiisyek pogol aeng' ye kingo kagosich Nahor, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
Genesis11:24 Ki meng'iis Nahor kenyiisyek tiptem ak sogool, kosich Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Ak ki tar Nahor kenyiisyek pogol ak taman ak sogool ye kingo kagosich Tera, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
Genesis11:26 Ki meng'iis Tera kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap, kosich Abram, Nahor, ak Haran." 
Genesis11:27 Chu ko ortinwegap Tera; ki sich `Tera Abram, Nahor, ak Haran, kosich `Haran Lot." 
Genesis11:28 Ki me Haran eng' taitap kwandanyi Tera eng' emet ne ki kisikyin, eng' Ur emetap Kaldeik." 
Genesis11:29 Ki itunis Abram ak Nahor. Chebyosetap Abram ko ki kiguure Sarai, ak ne po Nahor keguure Milkah, cheptap Haran, kwanitap Milkah ak Iska." 
Genesis11:30 Ki sonen Sarai; ki ma kotinyei lakwa. 
Genesis11:31 Ki imut `Tera weeriinnyi Abram, ak Lot weeriitap weeriinnyi Haran, ak Sarai kwondap weeriinnyi Abram. Ki pa tugul emetap Ur ne po Kaldeik, koba agoi emetap Kanaan, ak ye kingo it Haran, komeny olooto." 
Genesis11:32 Peetuusyegap sabeetap Tera, ko ki kenyiisyek pogol aeng' ak muut; ak ki me ineendet eng' Haran." 
Genesis12:1 Ki leenji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abram, “Ui inyee eng' emeng'ung', eng' kaptilyonutiguk ak eng' kootap kwandang'ung' agoi emet ne amache aboorun." 
Genesis12:2 Ayain iegu pororyet ne oo, ak aberuurin, ak atoroor kaineng'ung' koeet, si iegu kaberuret." 
Genesis12:3 Aberuuri icheek che iberuurin, ak achube ineendet ne sasin; kiberuuri pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony eng' inyee.”" 
Genesis12:4 Ki wo Abram anyun ko uu ye kiga komwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki wo Lot kobooto ineendet. Ki po Abram kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap ak muut ye kingo mandoi eng' Haran." 
Genesis12:5 Ki imut `Abram chebyosennyi Sarai, kobooto Lot weeriitap ne tupcho, ak tuguukwak tugul che ki tinyei, ak piik che kiga konyoor eng' Haran. Ki manda koba emetap Kanaan ak ki it anyun emonooto." 
Genesis12:6 Ki wo Abram kobun emet kween agoi koit ole mi keetitap Moreh eng' Shekem. Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki mi Kanaanik emonooto. 
Genesis12:7 Ki mong'ji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abram ak koleenji, “Agoochini iyoteng'ung' emoni.” Amu nooto koteekyi Abram kaptisisyet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne kiga mong'ji ineendet." 
Genesis12:8 Kiu kwo eng' olooto kotokyigei emetap tuloonook eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po Bethel, ak koteech emainnyi, si eng' komostap cherongo, ko ki mi Bethel, ko eng' komostap kong'asiis, ko Ai. Ki teekyi kaptisisyet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto, ak ki kuur kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Genesis12:9 Ki u Abram kogeny kotokyigei komostap Murot Tai. 
Genesis12:10 Ki piit rubeet eng' emonooto, ak kichoortagei anyun Abram kotokyigei Misiri, kwo korutoochi olooto amu kieet ak kong'wanit rubeet eng' emet." 
Genesis12:11 Ye ki neegit komong'ji Misiri, koleenji kwondonyi Sarai, “Kaigai, angen ale ii murereet ne karaaran," 
Genesis12:12 ak ye keerin piigap Misiri, ko agoi komwa icheek kole, ‘Kwondonyi ni,’ ak yeityo kobara ak kobagachin." 
Genesis12:13 Kaigai mwaa ile ii tupchennyu, si komyeeit eng' anee agobo inyee, ak kosap saboondanyu amu inyee.”" 
Genesis12:14 Ye kingo it `Abram Misiri, kogeer piigap Misiri kole karaaran Sarai miising'." 
Genesis12:15 Ak ye kingo keer pounigap Pharaoh, kochoi Sarai eng' tainnyi, ak ki kimut anyun ineendet kwo kootap Pharaoh." 
Genesis12:16 Ak ki yachi `Pharaoh Abram ne myee agobo ineendet; kinyoor keechiirek ak tuuga, otwogik che murenik ak che tiibiik, kiruugik ak iyuogigap sigirok, ak tambeesik." 
Genesis12:17 Ago ki pir anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Pharaoh ak piigap koonnyi eng' pirutik che eecheen amu Sarai, kwondap Abram." 
Genesis12:18 Ki kuur Pharaoh anyun Abram ak koleenji, “Nee ni ki iyaiywo? Ki lya si memwaiwo ile Sarai ko kwondong'ung'?" 
Genesis12:19 Ki lya si imwa ile, ‘Ineendet ko tupchennyu?’ Ak ki amutyigei anyun amu nooto aleen koek kwondonyu. Ang'ni kwondong'ung', imut ak iwe!”" 
Genesis12:20 Ki ng'at `Pharaoh piik komut ineendet eng' ooreet kobooto kwondonyi ak tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei. 
Genesis13:1 Ki togosta anyun Abram ak kwondonyi kong'eete Misiri, ak tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei kobooto Lot ak koba Negeb." 
Genesis13:2 Ki mogoryo Abram miising'; ki tinyei tuuga, fedha, ak thahabu." 
Genesis13:3 Ki wo kouuot eng' pandanyi, kong'eete Negeb agoi Bethel, agoi koit kwenutap Bethel ak Ai ole ki mi emennyi eng' tai." 
Genesis13:4 Ak ki testai kwo agoi ole ki mi kaptisisyet ne kigateech eng' tai. Eng' yooto koguur Abram kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Genesis13:5 Ki tinyei Lot agine ne kibendi ak Abram neego, tuuga, ak emaisyek." 
Genesis13:6 Amu ki chaang' tuguukwak, ko ki ma imuuch koyam icheek tuwai komeny emonooto." 
Genesis13:7 Ki piit tiyet eng' mestoweek che ki iyagi kiyagiigap Abram ak che ki iyagi che po Lot. Ki menyei Kanaanik ak Perisik emonooto eng' peetuusyechooto. 
Genesis13:8 Ki leenji anyun `Abram Lot, “Ma myee kota kobiit suryet eng' kwenunnyoo, inyee ak anee, anan eng' kwenutap mestoweek chechuuk ak cheguuk, amu kitupche." 
Genesis13:9 Tos ma paraa emet eng' taing'ung'? Kaigai istegei eng' ole ami. Ngot iwe komostap kaataam, awe komostap tai; anan ngot iwe komostap tai, awe komostap kaataam.”" 
Genesis13:10 Ak kiguskong' Lot kotabendo, ak ki keer atebweetap Jordan komugul kole emet ne tinyei peek eng' olda age tugul ko uu mbareetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu emetap Misiri ne tokyingei komostap Zoar, ye ki tomo kong'em `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sodom ak Gomorah." 
Genesis13:11 Ki lewenjigei anyun Lot atebweet tugul ne po Jordan, ak kibesyo kwo kotokyigei kong'asiis." 
Genesis13:12 Ki meny anyun Abram emetap Kanaan, komeny Lot nganasook che ki mi atebweet, ak ki uot kot koit Sodom." 
Genesis13:13 Ago kiyaachen, ak ko ki kiptengegin miising' piigap Sodom eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Genesis13:14 Kingo kagobesyo Lot ak Abram, koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abram, “Kuskong' ak itobende nguno anyun, keer kong'eete yo imi; kong'eete komostap kaataam agoi komostap tai, kong'eete kong'asiis agoi cherongo," 
Genesis13:15 amu agoonin emet tugul ne igeere kobunjiin ak iyoteng'ung' agoi koigeny. 
Genesis13:16 Ayae lagoguk kochang'a ko uu temburyek che po ng'wony, si ngot komugaksei koiit chii temburyek, ko kaagaa iitoksei lagoguk ak icheek." 
Genesis13:17 Ng'eet, marar kooindap emoni ak tebeesindanyi, amu awendi agoonin kobunjiin.”" 
Genesis13:18 Kiu anyun Abram kwo komeny ye neegitee keetiik che po Mamre, che mi Hebron, ak kiteekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' olooto." 
Genesis14:1 Eng' peetuusyegap Amrapel, laitoryatap Shinar, Ariok, laitoryatap Elasar, Kedolaomer, laitoryatap Elam ak Tidal, laitoryatap Goim," 
Genesis14:2 ko ki pooryo icheek ak Bera, laitoryatap Sodom, Birisa, laitoryatap Gomorah, Sinap, laitoryatap Adma, Semeba, laitoryatap Seboim, ak laitoryatap Bela (nooto ko Zoar)." 
Genesis14:3 Kituyechi chuuto tugul atebweetap Sidim (nooto ko Araraita ne po Munyuk). 
Genesis14:4 Ki oot icheek Kedolaomer kenyiisyek taman ak aeng', ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak somok kongelelso." 
Genesis14:5 Ki nyo Kedolaomer kobooto laitorinik che ki mi ak ineendet, eng' kenyiitap taman ak ang'wan, kobookyi Repaik eng' Asterot-Karnaim, Susik eng' Am, Emik eng' Sabe-Kiriataim," 
Genesis14:6 ak Horik eng' emennywa Seir; emetap tuloonook, agoi El-paran, ne neegitee surkwen." 
Genesis14:7 Yeityo koweek kobwa En-mispet nooto ko Kadesh ak konam kooret tugul ne po Amelegik, ak Amorik ak icheek che ki menyei Hasason-tamar." 
Genesis14:8 Ki manda laitoryatap Sodom, ak laitoryatap Gomorah, ak ne po Adma, kobooto ne po Seboim, ak laitoryatap Bela nooto ko Zoar kotet lugeet koboryo eng' atebweetap Sidim," 
Genesis14:9 ak Kedolaomer, laitoryatap Elam, Tidal, laitoryatap Goim, Amrapel, laitoryatap Sinar, Ariok, laitoryatap Elasar; laitorinik ang'wan eng' laitorinik muut." 
Genesis14:10 Ki nyiitaat keringonigap meneet atebweetap Sidim, ak ye kingo mweitos laitorinigap Sodom ak Gomorah, ko ki rorokyi olooto, ko che kichililso kogimwechi tuloonook parak." 
Genesis14:11 Ak ki ip tuguuk tugul che po Sodom ak che po Gomorah, kobooto amitwogikwak tugul, ak koba pandanywa." 
Genesis14:12 Ki nam ak komut Lot, weeriitap ne tupcho ak Abram agine, ne ki menyei Sodom, kobooto tuguukyik, ak koba." 
Genesis14:13 Ki nyo chii ne kigachilil ak komwachi Abram Hebranindet, ne ki menyei ole neegitee keetiigap Mamre Amorindet, ne tupcho ak Eskol ak Aner che icheeget ko ki pooto che kiting'egei kasyinet ak Abram." 
Genesis14:14 Ye kingo kas Abram kole kagenam ak kemut chiitap ooreennyi, koawen kobooto otwogikyik che po lugeet che ki kisikyin koonnyi, che eng' tugul ko ki pogol somok ak taman ak sisiit, ak korwai koosup agoi Dan." 
Genesis14:15 Eng' kemoi, ko kipchei piikyik `Abram asi kobookyi ak koterteer puunik. Ki isup icheek agoi koit Hoba murot kaataam ne po Damasko." 
Genesis14:16 Ki sar ak koweech tuguuk tugul kobooto chebyosok ak piik. Ki sar Lot ne po ornywa agine ak tuguukyik. 
Genesis14:17 Ki mong' anyun laitoryatap Sodom kotorook ineendet, ye ki weeksei ko kagoterteer Kedolaomer ak laitorinik che ki miitei kobooto ineendet, eng' atebweetap Sabe (nooto ko atebweetap laitoryat)." 
Genesis14:18 Ki ibu Melkisedek laitoryatap Salem magatiinik ak divaik; ineendet ko ki tisiindetap Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising'. 
Genesis14:19 Ak ki iberuur Abram kole, “Iberuuroge Abram eng' Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising' ne ki yai parak kipsengwet ak ng'wony!" 
Genesis14:20 Ingoberuurok Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising', ne kaimut ak konde puuniguk euneguk!” Ak ki igoochi `Abram Melkisedek kebeberta ne po taman ne po kiy tugul." 
Genesis14:21 Ki leenji `laitoryatap Sodom Abram, “Koono piik, ak iip inyee tuguuk kobunjiin.”" 
Genesis14:22 Ki wolji `Abram laitoryatap Sodom koleenji, “Kaaitoochi eunnyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising', ne ki yai parak kipsengwet ak ng'wony," 
Genesis14:23 ale ma name kiy age tugul ne neng'ung', ngo porowet anan ko ineet, si ma tuun imwa ile, ‘Ki ayai Abram koek mogoryo.’" 
Genesis14:24 Ma yani kiy kobatee chooto che ki kaam parnotikyuk, ak motweetap parnotik che kiga kibe tugul, Aner, Eskol ak Mamre. Ingoip icheek kebebertanywa.”" 
Genesis15:1 Ye kingo pata tuguuchu anyun koityi Abram `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'ang'utyet koleenji, “Abram, ameiywei! Aa long'eng'ung' ak oo melektang'ung' miising'.”" 
Genesis15:2 Ak ki wolji Abram kole, “Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ta igoono nee, ago kawe kalilot ama tinye lakwa, ago ineendet ne tuun indii tuguukyuk ko Elieser ne po Damasko?" 
Genesis15:3 Ak ki testai komwa Abram kole, ‘Keer anyuno! Ma igoono iyoteet, ak igere ile agoi kondi otwogindet ne mi koonnyu tuguukyuk.’ ”" 
Genesis15:4 Ak ki ne matyanit, koityi ineendet `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Ma tuun namei tuguuguk chiichi, ago tuun isiche ineendet ne po poortong'ung' ne indii tuguuguk.”" 
Genesis15:5 Ki imaanda ineendet kwo saang' ak koleenji, “Kaigai keero, inyal parak kipsengwet, ak iit kecheik ngot imuuchi.” Ak ki testai koleenji, “Tuun ko tenitu chooto lagoguk.”" 
Genesis15:6 Ki iyan `Abram Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koiityi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet imanda amu nooto." 
Genesis15:7 Yeityo koleenji ineendet, “Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anee ne ki amutun imang'une Ur emetap Kaldeik ak inyoo agoonin emoni kobunjiin.”" 
Genesis15:8 Ak ki wolji Abram koleenji, “Ee, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anae nee ale tuun ko punjino?”" 
Genesis15:9 Kowolji koleenji, “Ibwo rooryat ne po kenyiisyek somok, ng'orooryet ne po kenyiisyek somok, mengit ne po kenyiisyek somok, cheptuget ak aarwetap toriityon.”" 
Genesis15:10 Ki ip anyun Abram chooto tugul, ak kobet yeityo konde motwet age tugul kotoorchigei motwennyi ip kong'et toriitik che mabet." 
Genesis15:11 Ak ye kingo choorgei toriitik cho amei panyeek, komachei koam panyechooto, kogiyon Abram." 
Genesis15:12 Ye kingo roroktoi asiista, koip Abram rwondo ne nyigiis miising', ak kotuch ineendet imenindo ne po arageneet." 
Genesis15:13 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abram, “Iman tuun inae ile, egu lagoguk kiprutoin eng' emet ne ma nenywa, ak tuun ko otei pichooto, ak konyalilso icheek eng' kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan." 
Genesis15:14 Ak tuun arwookyini agine pororyonooto tuun pendi kootei, ak ye ibata nooto, komong'u icheek eng' emonooto kotinyei tuguuk che chaang'." 
Genesis15:15 Ago iwendi inyee eng' kaalyeet ole mi kwanisyeguk, ak ketubin eng' kalilot ne myee." 
Genesis15:16 Tuun ko weeksei yu ibinda ne po ang'wan, amu tomo konender kot koam piik tugul yaityetap Amorik.”" 
Genesis15:17 Ye kingo kagororokto asiista ak ko imenit, kotook tereetap ma ne iyeni ak maat ne liplibeni ko punei kwenutap panyechooto." 
Genesis15:18 Eng' peetuunooto, ko ki iyomiskei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Abram, kole, “Kaagoochi iyoteng'ung' emoni, kong'etee aineetap Misiri agoi aineet ne oo, aineetap Yufrets," 
Genesis15:19 emetap Kenik, Kenisik, Kadmonik," 
Genesis15:20 Hitik, Perisik, Repaik," 
Genesis15:21 Amorik, Kanaanik, Girgasik, ak Jebusik.”" 
Genesis16:1 Ki tomo kosich lakwa Sarai kwondap Abram. Inga no, ko ki tinyei cheptap Misiri ne ki otwogin, ne ki kiguure kainennyi Hagar." 
Genesis16:2 Ak ki leenji anyun `Sarai Abram, “Keero, ki kertaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si ma sigisye! Kaigai, ui kapotwogindennyu ne chepto tamangap anyooru lagok kobun ineendet.” Ak ki iyan Abram soometap Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Kingo kagomeny Abram emetap Kanaan eng' kenyiisyek taman, koomut anyun Sarai kwondap Abram Hagar otwogindennyi ak kogoochi Abram manong'otyonnyi koek osotyonnyi." 
Genesis16:4 Ak ki imut `Abram Hagar, komanach. Kingo keer Hagar kole kagomanach, kosas pounindennyi Sarai." 
Genesis16:5 Koleenji anyun `Sarai Abram, “Ariirtaenen eng' ng'wanindo ne atinye, amu ki agoonin chepto otwogindennyu, ak ye kingo keer kole managaat, koreenya. Ara ingotilwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Genesis16:6 Ago ki wolji `Abram Sarai koleenji, “Keero! Otwogindeng'ung' komi euneguk, yachi ko uu ye igeere ile myee.” Ki usaus anyun `Sarai Hagar kot koit komwei ineendet." 
Genesis16:7 Ki nyoorchi `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hagar ole neegitee kondap peek eng' surkwen, yooto ko ole kutune peek eng' ooreet ne tokyingei Shur." 
Genesis16:8 Kotwekyi koleenji “Hagar, otwogindetap Sarai! Ibunu ano ak iwendi ano?” Ki wolji koleenji, “Kamweune pounindennyu Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Koleenji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Iweekyigei pounindeng'ung' ak iming'injigei eunekyik.”" 
Genesis16:10 Yeityo kotestai koleenji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Atese kochang'a miising' iyoteng'ung', kot koma iitaksei amu chaang'indonywa.”" 
Genesis16:11 Ak ki testai koleenji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Keero, ii tomono, ak tuun isiche weeriit ak iguure kainennyi Ishmael, amu kogogasun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor riireguk." 
Genesis16:12 Tuun kergeitu ineendet ak oloitigeet eng' kwenutap piik. Tokyin eunnyi piik tugul eng' pooryeet, ak tokyin piik tugul eunegap pooryeet ineendet. Ak tuun meng'e ineendet punyondi kwenutap che po ooreenywa tugul.”" 
Genesis16:13 Ak kitoochi kainet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ng'alaaljin ineendet kole “Inyee ko ii Kamuktaindet ne keera” Amu ki mwa kole, “Keero! Kaageer nguno patetap ineendet ne keera ak kota asabe”" 
Genesis16:14 Amu nooto anyun keguure keriingonooto po peek Beer-lahai-roi, ne nooto komiitei kwenutap Kadesh ak Beret." 
Genesis16:15 Ki sikyi `Hagar Abram weeriit, ak kotoochi Abram kainet koguure Ishmael." 
Genesis16:16 Ki po Abram kenyiisyek tamanwogik sisiit ak lo, ye kingo sikyin `Hagar Abram Ishmael." 
Genesis17:1 Ye kingo po Abram kenyiisyek tamanwogik sogool ak sogool, kogimong'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koleenji, “Aa Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet. Wendote tainnyu ak iegu ne ititaat," 
Genesis17:2 si ayai kayomiset eng' kwenunnyoo, inyee ak anee, ak atesin miising' kot.”" 
Genesis17:3 Ak ki ibutyi ng'wony kogutuny Abram, ak ki ng'alaalji Kamuktaindet koleenji," 
Genesis17:4 “Keero, mi anyun kayomisenyu kobooten, ak tuun iegu kwandap pororyosyek che chaang'." 
Genesis17:5 Ma keguurenen kogeny Abram, ago kiguurenen Abraham, amu kayain iegu kwandap pororosyek che chaang'." 
Genesis17:6 Aberuurin eng' iyoteet miising', ak eng' inyee ayae pororyosyek, ak komong'unenen laitorinik." 
Genesis17:7 Ak agimiiti kayomisennyu anee ak inyee, ak iyoteng'ung' ne piitu let ak ibinwekwak tugul, si koek kayomiset ne wendi agoi koigeny, ak aegu Kamuktaindet eng' inyee ak iyoteng'ung'." 
Genesis17:8 Agoonin inyee ak lagoguk che piitu let emoni tugul po Kanaan, ni oo kiprutoin koek neng'wong' koigeny, ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa.”" 
Genesis17:9 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Abraham, “Riip anyun kayomisennyu inyee ak iyoteng'ung', ak eng' ibinwekwak tugul." 
Genesis17:10 Ni ko kayomisennyu ne kanyool oriip eng' kwenunnyoo, inyee ak anee, ak lagoguk che isiche: kiyatitoi ng'eta age tugul eng' okweek." 
Genesis17:11 Kimuratani iriryotap poorwekwok ak egu nooto kaboorunet ne po kayomiset eng' kwenunnyoo, anee ak okweek." 
Genesis17:12 Kiyatitoi ng'eta age tugul eng' okweek ne kagotar peetuusyek sisiit, ng'eta age tugul eng' ibinwekwok tugul ngo ne ki sikyin kooriikwok, anan ko ne ma salwok ne ki kialei eng' toek alak tugul." 
Genesis17:13 Eng' iman ko nyolu keyatita ne kisikyin koong'ung' kobooto ne ki iale robiisyeguk, asi koek kayomisennyu eng' poorwekwok ne tebyei koigeny." 
Genesis17:14 Weeriit age tugul ne ma kimuratan poortonyi, king'etoi eng' piikyik, amu kibut kayomisennyu.”" 
Genesis17:15 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet Abraham koleenji, “Maata iguure kwondong'ung' Sarai; kagoek kainennyi Sarah." 
Genesis17:16 Aberuuri ineendet ak ne siirei, ko kaagoochi ineendet kosigun weeriit. Aberuuri ineendet koek kametap pororyosyek, ak mang'une ineendet laitorinigap piik.”" 
Genesis17:17 Ki ibut kogutuny anyun Abraham, ak korori eng' muguleldanyi ak koteebegei kole, “Tos kisikyi lakwa chii ne tinyei kenyiisyek pogol? Ak tos ta kosich lakwa Sarah agine ne tinyei kenyiisyek tamanwogik sogool?”" 
Genesis17:18 Koleenji `Abraham Kamuktaindet, “Kata myee kosap Ishmael eng' taing'ung'.”" 
Genesis17:19 Ak ki wolji Kamuktaindet koleenji, “Achicha, siguun iman Sarah kaing'ung' weeriit, ak tuun iguure kainennyi Isak. Ayae kayomisennyu kobooto ineendet ak iyotennyi, si koek kayomiset ne wendi agoi koigeny." 
Genesis17:20 Kosupkei ak Ishmael, ko kaagasun ng'aleeguk; keero, aberuuri ineendet ak agoochi iyoteet. Abaroi ineendet miising' ak tuun sichei pounik taman ak aeng' ak ayai koek pororyet ne oo." 
Genesis17:21 Alumdoi kayomisennyu eng' Isak, ineendet ne tuun sigun Sarah eng' peetuusyechuuto kenyiit ne nyoonei.”" 
Genesis17:22 Ye kingo kes ng'alaalet ne ki ng'alaali ak ineendet, kotogosta Kamuktaindet kometo Abraham." 
Genesis17:23 Ki nam anyun Abraham weeriinnyi Ishmael, ak tugul che ki kisikyin koinyi, kobooto tugul che ki kialee robiisyek, muren age tugul ne po koonnyi ak koyatita eng' peetuunooto, ko uu ye ki kamwachi Kamuktaindet." 
Genesis17:24 Ki po Abraham kenyiisyek tamanwogik sogool ak sogool, yooto ye ki ngeyatitoi." 
Genesis17:25 Ak ki po Ishmael weeriinnyi kenyiisyek taman ak somok keyatitoi. 
Genesis17:26 Ki kiyatita peetuunok Abraham ak weeriinnyi Ishmael," 
Genesis17:27 kobooto murenik tugul che po koonnyi, che ki kisikyin koonnyi, ak toek che ki kialee robiisyek." 
Genesis18:1 Kimong'ji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abraham eng' ye neegitee keetiigap Mamre kotebyei eng' kurgeetap emainnyi ko kang'wanit asiista. 
Genesis18:2 Kingo tabendo, kogeer piik somok kotonondos ko kaitoorchigei ineendet. Ye kingo keer, komanda ak kolabat kotorookta kong'etee kurgeetap emainnyi ak ipkogutung'ji icheek." 
Genesis18:3 Ak kile, “Kiptaiyandennyu, ngot ko kaanyooru myeeindo eng' taing'ung', asaain ale amesiirtoe otwogindeng'ung'," 
Genesis18:4 ingeibwok peek tutigin, si oune keelyekwok, ak omuuny eng' keetit keel." 
Genesis18:5 Ya tugul aibwok amitwogik tutigin, si ogimegitu, ak ye ibata otestai eng' pandang'wong', amu kaaoitu uitugul kap otwogindeng'wong'.” Kowol icheek kole, “Yai ko uu ye kaimwa.”" 
Genesis18:6 Ki chaakta anyun Abraham kwo ko ole ki mi Sarah, ak ipkoleenji, “Chokyi ker keruutik somok che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul ak itangwar si ichop magatiinik.”" 
Genesis18:7 Ki labat Abraham ole ki mi tuuga kwo koget kiptoiyot ne myee, ak kogoochi otwogindet ne ki chokyi kochop." 
Genesis18:8 Yeityo konam mwaitap cheego, cheego, ak kiptoiyondonooto kagagechop konde tainnywa, ak kotonon ineendet eng' ole neegitee keetit keel yooto ki amisyei icheek." 
Genesis18:9 Ki teebee `icheek ineendet koleenji, “Mi ano Sarah kwondong'ung'?” Kowolji koleenji, “Mi emait oriit.”" 
Genesis18:10 Koleenji agenge eng' icheek, “Aweekyiningei iman peetuusyek che uu chu eng' kenyiit ne nyoonei, ak keero, sichei `kwondong'ung' Sarah weeriit.” Ki ebei iit Sarah komi kurgeetap emait ne ki mi patai." 
Genesis18:11 Kiga koosegitu Abraham ak Sarah; ki tinyei kenyiisyek che chaang', ak kiga kong'et iyato Sarah." 
Genesis18:12 Kirori anyun Sarah eng' muguleldanyi koleen, “Tos ta abaibaitu ago kogotertera osindo, ak kagoosit agine manong'otyonnyu?”" 
Genesis18:13 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abraham, “Amu nee si korori Sarah koleen, ‘Tos ta amuuchi iman anee asich lakwa ko kaaositu?’" 
Genesis18:14 Tos mi kiy age tugul ne temenee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Aweekyiningei peetuusyek che uu chu eng' kenyiit ne nyoonei, eng' peetuut ne kaachop, ak sichei `Sarah weeriit.”" 
Genesis18:15 Amu ki iywei anyun Sarah, kotiiyo kole, “Ma aroori.” Ak ki leenji, “Achicha; keroori.”" 
Genesis18:16 Ki ng'eetyo anyun pichooto koba eng' yooto, kotokyigei Sodom ko yamisi Abraham." 
Genesis18:17 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Tos aung'e Abraham iman kiit ne amache ayai," 
Genesis18:18 ago tuun egu Abraham ne matiny pororyet ne oo ne tinyei kimnateet, ne kiberuure pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony?" 
Genesis18:19 Amu ki alewen ineendet si komuuch koboi lagokyik ak koonnyi ne tuun piitu, si kobiit koriip ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' yaeet ak kirwoogetap imanda; si kosuldochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abraham kiit ne ki mwa agobo ineendet.”" 
Genesis18:20 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Oo kateiyet agobo Sodom ak Gomorah, ak kosamisen tengekwogikwak miising'." 
Genesis18:21 Achoortaigei anyun nguno asi ageer ngo ki koyai iman ko uu kateiyennywa, ne ki konyoonjo, ak ngo ma uu nooto, anai.”" 
Genesis18:22 Ki week anyun pichooto eng' olooto ak koba kotokyigei Sodom, kita kotonon Abraham eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Genesis18:23 Kiriikyi anyun `Abraham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koteebe koleenji, “Tos iwong'u piik che po iman kobooto che yaacheen?" 
Genesis18:24 Ngot komi piik che po iman konomu eng' nganaseet; ko tos iwong'u ameriree nganaseet agobo pichooto konom che po iman che mi olooto? 
Genesis18:25 Ingolooit eng' inyee, yaeet ne uu ni, ne kebarei che po iman kobooto che yaacheen; si kogergeit che po iman ak che yaacheen. Ingolooit eng' inyee nooto. Tos ma yaei iman Kirwoogindet ne po ng'wonyuni komugul.”" 
Genesis18:26 Kole Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ngot anyoorchi Sodom piik konom che po iman, ariiree anyun olooto tugul amu icheek.”" 
Genesis18:27 Ak ki wolji Abraham kole, “Keero, kaagany ang'alaalji Kiptaiyat, nga aa temburyek ak ko aa oreek kityo." 
Genesis18:28 Tos ngot koma piit piik muutu eng' piik konom che po iman, ko tos ing'em nganaseet komugul amu piik muut che ma mi?” Ak ki le, “Ma ng'eme ngot anyoorchi piik artam ak muut.”" 
Genesis18:29 Kita kong'alaalji kogeny koleenji, “Ngot anyun kenyoorchi artam?” Kowol kole, “Ma yae kiy amu chooto artam.”" 
Genesis18:30 Kole, “Amat konereech Kiptaiyat, si kota ang'alaal. Ngot anyun kenyoorchi sosom.” Kole, “Ma yae kiy, ngot anyoorchi sosom.”" 
Genesis18:31 Kole, “Keero, kaagany ang'alaalji Kiptaiyat. Ngot anyun kenyoorchi tiptem olooto?” Kole, “Ma ng'eme amu chooto tiptem.”" 
Genesis18:32 Kole, “Amat konereech Kiptaiyat, si kota amwa ni kityo. Ngot kenyoorchi taman olooto?” Kole, “Ma ng'eme amu chooto taman.”" 
Genesis18:33 Ye kingo tar anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'alaaldos ak Abraham, kwo pandanyi; ak ki week Abraham kwo kaa." 
Genesis19:1 Ki it anyun malaikaisyechooto aeng'u Sodom eng' koskoleny, ak kitebyei ng'wony Lot eng' ormariichetap nganasanooto. Ye kingo keer Lot icheek, kong'eet kotorookta ak ipkogutung'ji." 
Genesis19:2 Koleenji, “Kasaak ale omosu, obwa anyun kiptainikyuk kootap otwogindeng'wong', ak otebi kemouni komugul, oun keelyek si osip ong'eetyee omuste.” Kowol icheek kole, “Achicha, kitebee saang' kemout komugul.”" 
Genesis19:3 Ki igaigai Lot miising' anyun kot komasta icheek koba koonnyi. Ki yachi ineendet icheek igoorto ak kochopchi magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, si koam." 
Genesis19:4 Ago ye ki tomo koruiyo, kobwa meng'iigap nganasanooto po Sodom koyiem koot; piik tugul neranik ak che oosen kobun komoswek tugul." 
Genesis19:5 Ki kuur `icheek Lot ak koleenji, “Ngorcho piik che ketaach eng' koong'ung' kemouni? Imutwech kobwa saang', si kobiit kenai icheek.”" 
Genesis19:6 Ki manda Lot kwo ole mi icheek eng' kurgat, ak koger kurgeet." 
Genesis19:7 Ak koleenji, “Asaok, che kitupche, amoegu sogoran!" 
Genesis19:8 Ogeero, atinye tiibiikyuk aeng' che pergein. Okany amutwak, si oyachi ko uu ye koroo. Moyachi kiy pichu amu kagobwa koonnyu.”" 
Genesis19:9 Ak ki wol kole, “Istegei!” Kotestai kole, “Ki nyo chiichi ko too, ago inee ni kagomach koek ne irwookwech i! Kimache anyun keyaun ne ya kosiir icheeget.” Ki ibookyi `icheek Lot ak komang'ji kurgeet koleen kobut." 
Genesis19:10 Ago ki iyogoi eunekwak pichu ki mi ko ak kochuut Lot kwo ko, ak koger kurgeet." 
Genesis19:11 Yeityo kobire korateet pichooto ki miitei kurgeetap koot, che mengeechen ak che eecheen, agoi kong'etyo kocheeng'ei kurgeet." 
Genesis19:12 Ki teebee anyun `pichooto Lot koleenji, “Tos itinye chii age eng' yu? Saania, weeriiguk, tiibiiguk, anan chiing'ung' age tugul eng' nganasani? Ngot komi imaande eng' olito." 
Genesis19:13 Kimache keng'em nganasani, amu kogoeet waagaat agobo icheeget eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kagoyakwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor keng'em.”" 
Genesis19:14 Ki manda Lot kwo ak ipkoleenji sanigap tiibiikyik “Ong'eetyee ak omande obe, amu machei kong'em Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganasani.” Ki keer sanichooto ng'aleekyik ko uu tangoi." 
Genesis19:15 Ki ichirchir `malaikaisyek Lot ko kerir emet koleenji, “Ng'eet, imut kwondong'ung' ak tipchuguk aeng' si mobegu eng' kergong'yet ne ityin nganasani.”" 
Genesis19:16 Ki igagei ineendet komanda; amu ki igagei, ko ki nam pichooto eunnyi, eutap kwondonyi ak eunegap tiibiikachik aeng' komaanda eng' nganaseet ak kobagaakta eng' saang' amu ki riiree Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Genesis19:17 Ye kingo kagomaanda, koleenji, “Sarugei, mwei amegus kong' anan itonone ui tugul eng' kewani; mwechi tuloonook parak, ang' puch komeng'etu.”" 
Genesis19:18 Koleenji Lot, “Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu!" 
Genesis19:19 Kairiiree uitugul otwogindeng'ung', ak kotesak aiyebindong'ung' eng' saruunet ne koisarwo si ma abet saboondanyu. Nga no anyun-i, koma muuchi amwechi tuloonook parak si konyoorwo yaityo, ak kogoono ame." 
Genesis19:20 Keero, ang'ni nganaseet ne neegit ak ko ming'in, myee amwechi oliindo si asar saboondanyu.”" 
Genesis19:21 Koleenji ineendet, “Kaagasun ng'olyoondoniito agine ale ma ang'eme nganasanooto kaimwa." 
Genesis19:22 Chaakte, mwechi olooto, amu ma muuchi ayai kiy agoi iit olooto.” Ki kiguure Zoar nganasanooto amu nooto." 
Genesis19:23 Kiga kochoor asiista ye kingo itei Lot Zoar. 
Genesis19:24 Kiroong'ji anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sodom ak Gomorah roptap koik che laldos ak maat ne punu kipsengwet. 
Genesis19:25 Ki peel kong'em nganasochooto, atebweet komugul, piik tugul che ki menyei nganasochooto, ak tuguuk tugul che piitos eng' ng'wony." 
Genesis19:26 Ago kiguskong' kwondap Lot eng' let, ak kiwalak koek tulweet ne ming'in ne po muunyuk." 
Genesis19:27 Ki ng'eet Abraham karon komusta kwo agoi koit ole kigatonone eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; 
Genesis19:28 ak ye kingo tabendo kogeer oliin po Sodom ak Gomorah, ak emet tugul ne po atebweet, kooro iyeto ne po emet kotogostoi ko uu iyetap maat ne oo miising'." 
Genesis19:29 Ak kingo ng'emei Kamuktaindet nganasook che po atebweet, kobwaat Abraham ak komaanda Lot, komandae ng'emisyetap nganasochooto kiga komeng'oot." 
Genesis19:30 Ki manda anyun Lot kotogosta tulweet parak ak tiibiikyik aeng' amu ki iywei komeny Zoar ak ipkomeny kebeneet oriit ak tiibiikyik. 
Genesis19:31 Ki leenji anyun chepto ne oo chepto ne ming'in, “Kagoosit kwandanyo, ak ma mi mureno emoni ne imuuchi kotunech ko uu piteetap ng'wony komugul." 
Genesis19:32 Ngenage kwandanyo kumik si kobiit kobogit ak keruiye ak ineendet, si keriip iyoteet.”" 
Genesis19:33 Ara ki inaga kwandanywa anyun kumik kemounooto ak ki wo ne oo kwo ipkoruiyo ak kwandanyi. Ma nai kwan ye kingo ruitos tuwai, anan ye ki kong'eetei." 
Genesis19:34 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi nooto, koleenji ne oo ne ming'in, “Keero, ko ki ruiye lagat ak abba. Nginage kogeny kumik kemouni po ra si iwe aginye oruiye tuwai, si keriip iyoteet.”" 
Genesis19:35 Ki inaga kumik kwandanywa kogeny kemounooto, ak king'eet anyun ne ming'in, kwo ipkoruiyo ak kwan. Ma nai kora koruitos tuwai, anan kong'eetei." 
Genesis19:36 Ki manach anyun tiipchooto tuwai po Lot komanage kwandanywa. 
Genesis19:37 Ki sich `ne oo weeriit, ak kiguure kainennyi Moab. Ineendet ko kwandap Moabik agoi ra." 
Genesis19:38 Ki sich `chepto ne ming'in agine weeriit, ak kiguure kainennyi Ben-Ami. Ineendet ko kwandap Amonik agoi ra." 
Genesis20:1 Ak kiu Abraham eng' olooto kwo komostap Negeb, kwo komeny kwenutap Kadesh ak Shur, ak komeng'iis ko kiprutoiyo eng' Gerar." 
Genesis20:2 Ki itaam `Abraham Sarah kwondonyi kole, “Ineendet ko tupchennyu.” Ki iyookto anyun Abimelek laitoryatap Gerar kimutyi Sarah." 
Genesis20:3 Ago ki nyoonji `Kamuktaindet Abimelek eng' karwotitoet kemoi koleenji, “Keero, kaimei isabe, kwondo ne kaimutyigei ko kwondap chii.”" 
Genesis20:4 Ago ki tomo koriikyi Abimelek ineendet. Koleenji Kiptaiyat, “Tos ibare agot pororyet ne po iman?" 
Genesis20:5 Tos ma leenjo ineendet, ‘Sarah ko tupchennyu?’ Ak ma mwa agine kwonyooto kole, ‘Ineendet ko tupchennyu?’ Ki ayai ko uu ni eng' muguleldo ne po iman ak eng' eunek che tiliileen.”" 
Genesis20:6 Ak ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' karwotitoet, koleenji, “Wei, angen ale ki iyai ko uu ni eng' muguleldo ne po iman. Agot anee ko ki aeetenen si meyaiywo tengek. Nooto anyun amu nee si ma achamun itwaa ineendet." 
Genesis20:7 Ara anyun imutyi nguno kwonyi chiitap ko po, amu maotyoo inee si kosaun si isap. Ago ngot ko meweekte, inai ile imee ne matiny, inyee, ak tuguuk tugul che itinye.”" 
Genesis20:8 Ki ng'eet anyun Abimelek karon miising' ak koguur otwogikyik tugul. Kotetyi tuguuchooto tugul kochut itiikwak; ak ki aragenso kot miising' pichooto. 
Genesis20:9 Ki kuur anyun `Abimelek Abraham, koteebe koleenji, “Koiyaiywech nee? Ak nee chalwok ne koayaun, kot igesenjo ak laitornatennyu tengegi tee ni? Koiyaiywo tuguuk che ma nyolu keyai.”" 
Genesis20:10 Ak ki leenji `Abimelek Abraham, “Koigeer nee, si iyai kii?”" 
Genesis20:11 Ki le Abraham, “Ki ayai niito amu ki aleen, ma mi olito iman kayweetap Kamuktaindet, ak imuuchi icheek kobara amu kwondanyu." 
Genesis20:12 Ago eng' iman, ineendet ko chepkamennyu, sieetap chebyosennyo; ak ki atun." 
Genesis20:13 Ye kingo kagomoong'wa Kamuktaindet eng' kootap abba, ak kogoono awendot, aleenji anyun ineendet, ‘Rireneng'ung' ni ne tuun iboorwo; imwae eng' komosta age tugul ole kibendi ile, Ineendet ko ng'eetap kamennyu.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Ki igoochi anyun `Abimelek Abraham keechiirek ak tuuga, otwogik che murenik ak che tiibiik, ak koweekyi Abraham Sarah kwondonyi." 
Genesis20:15 Ak ki leenji Abimelek, “Keero, mi taing'ung' emoninyu, meny ole ichame.”" 
Genesis20:16 Ki leenji Sarah, “Keero, kaagoochi ng'eetap kamenng'ung' silingisyek eliphuut agenge, koek chooto che tugun koonyek eng' piik che mi kobooten, ak kagiityin imanda eng' taitap piik tugul.”" 
Genesis20:17 Ki sa anyun `Abraham Kamuktaindet, ak ki isoop `Kamuktaindet Abimelek, ak kwondonyi, ak chebaigeinikyik, ak ki sich lagok." 
Genesis20:18 Amu kiga korat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mootinwek tugul che po kootap Abimelek, amu Sarah kwondap Abraham." 
Genesis21:1 Ki rutoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sarah ko uu ye kiga komwa ak ki yachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye kiga koyomis. 
Genesis21:2 Ki manach Sarah ak ki sikyi Abraham weeriit eng' osindanyi eng' kasarta ne kiga koarorchi Kamuktaindet. 
Genesis21:3 Ki kuure `Abraham weeriinnyi ne ki sikyin Sarah, Isak." 
Genesis21:4 Eng' peetuut ne po sisiit, kogiyatita `Abraham weeriinnyi Isak ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ineendet." 
Genesis21:5 Ki po Abraham kenyiisyek pogol, ye ki ngesikyin ineendet weeriinnyi Isak." 
Genesis21:6 Ki le Sarah, “Kagoono Kamuktaindet aroori; ak age tugul ne kasei ng'olyoondoni kororyei kobooto.”" 
Genesis21:7 Ak kites komwa kole, “Ng'oo ne kita mwachin Abraham koleenjin reryei lagok Sarah? Amu kaasikyi weeriit eng' osindanyi.”" 
Genesis21:8 Ki eet anyun lakweet ak eng' peetuut ne ki kiluge ineendet, koyai Abraham igoorto ne oo." 
Genesis21:9 Ki keer Sarah weeriitap Hagar Chemisiryot ne kiga kosikyi Abraham, kochotisyei." 
Genesis21:10 Ki mwachi anyun `ineendet Abraham koleenji, “Oon chebyosoni otwogin ak weeriinnyi, amu ma namei tuguuk weeriitap chebyosoni otwogin kobooto weeriinnyu Isak.”" 
Genesis21:11 Ki yait miising' kot ng'olyoondoni eng' Abraham agobo weeriinnyi. 
Genesis21:12 Ago ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet Abraham koleenji, “Amegeer ko ya ng'olyoondoni eng' inyee amu weeri, ak amu chebyosoning'ung' otwogin. Kas ng'aleegap Sarah eng' tuguuchooto tugul kamwaun, amu punu Isak ooreetap iyoteng'ung'." 
Genesis21:13 Ak tuun ayae weeriitap chebyosoni otwogin agine koek pororyet amu ineendet ko iyoteng'ung'.” 
Genesis21:14 Ki ng'eet anyun Abraham eng' peetuut ne ki isubi kota ko karon miising' ak ki ip amitwogik ak soteet ne po peek kogoochi Hagar ak lakweet. Ki indochi tigikyennyi tuguuchooto yeityo kounda icheek koba. Ki wo anyun koombenot eng' surkwen ne po Beer-sheba. 
Genesis21:15 Ye kingo keskei peek eng' soteet, kobagaakta lakweet eng' sondiit oriit." 
Genesis21:16 Ki wo kotep ng'wony eng' ye loo kitigin, ye itei kipchabet ngemwokto si ma keer meetap lakweet. Ki tep anyun kotoorchigei ineendet ak kowaach koriir." 
Genesis21:17 Ki kas Kamuktaindet koriirei weerooto ak kiguur malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne mi kipsengwet Hagar, koleenji, “Amin nee, Hagar? Meiywei amu kagogas Kamuktaindet kutitap lakweet eng' ole mi." 
Genesis21:18 Ng'eet ui ing'eet lakweet ak inamate eng' eung'ung', amu tuun ayae ineendet koek pororyet ne oo.”" 
Genesis21:19 Ki yaat Kamuktaindet konyegap kwonyooto ak ki keer keriingetap peek. Ki wo anyun konyiit peek soteet yeityo konaga lakweet. 
Genesis21:20 Ki mi Kamuktaindet kobooto lakweet ak kiner koeet. Ki meng'oot surkwen ak koek mwogindet. 
Genesis21:21 Ki meng'oot ineendet surkwen ne po Paran ak ki cheeng'ji kamet Chemisiryot kotun. 
Genesis21:22 Ki ng'alaalji eng' peetuusyechooto Abimelek ak Pikol, ineendet ne ki kiptaiyatap kiplutotinikyik, Abraham koleenji, “Miitei Kamuktaindet kobooten eng' tuguuk tugul che iyae." 
Genesis21:23 Iyosyeiwo anyun nguno eng' Kamuktaindet si metila let anan eng' weeriinnyu anan eng' mochogoronikyuk, ago ko uu rireenet ne ki ayaun, iyaiywo aginye ko uu nooto, agot eng' emet ole kigeegune too.”" 
Genesis21:24 Ak ki leenji Abraham, “Ayostosi.”" 
Genesis21:25 Kingo kergong' `Abraham Abimelek amu keriingetap peek ne kiga rebe otwogigap Abimelek eng' koroomnateet," 
Genesis21:26 kole Abimelek, “Mangen ineendet ne ki yai kioto. Ki ma imwaiwo ak ki tomo agas ko uu ni kobatee ra.”" 
Genesis21:27 Ki nam anyun Abraham keechiirek ak tuuga kogoochi Abimelek ak ki iyomiskei icheek tuwai. 
Genesis21:28 Ki itabaan anyun Abraham subeenwek tisap che po keechiir koba taban icheegei. 
Genesis21:29 Ak kiteebe `Abimelek Abraham koleenji, “Po nee subeenwechu tisabu po keechiir ketabaan icheegei?”" 
Genesis21:30 Kowol ineendet kole, “Subeenwechu tisap po keechiir, ko myee ikweri eng' eunnyu si koek paornateet eng' anee, koboor kole anee ne ki abale keringoniito po peek.”" 
Genesis21:31 Kiguure yooto anyun Beer-sheba, amu ki iyasyechigei tuwai eng' olooto." 
Genesis21:32 Ki iyomiskei anyun eng' Beer-sheba, ak king'eet Abimelek ak Pikol ne ki kiptaiyatap kiplugotinikyik, koweigei koba emetap Philistiik." 
Genesis21:33 Ki miin Abraham keetit eng' Beer-sheba ak ki kuur eng' olooto kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po Koigeny." 
Genesis21:34 Ak ki ek toondet Abraham eng' emetap Philistik peetuusyek che chaang'. 
Genesis22:1 Kingo pata tuguuchooto, kotyem `Kamuktaindet Abraham, koleenji, “Abraham” ak ki le, “Ami yu.”" 
Genesis22:2 Koleenji, “Imut weeriing'ung', nooto ne ineegei, ne ichame, Isak, ak iwe agoi emetap Moriah, si igoite eng' olooto koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' tulweet age ne tuun amwaun.”" 
Genesis22:3 Ara king'eet Abraham karon miising' komusta, ki iito kiit ne kitebee eng' sigiryennyi si kobiit kolaany, ak ki imut murenik aeng' eng' che ki tinyei, koba kobooto ineendet ak Isak weeriinnyi. Ki pet kweenik che po kagoochinet ne kibeelei, yeityo koba ole kiga koarorchi Kamuktaindet." 
Genesis22:4 Ki tabendo Abraham eng' peetuut ne po somok ak ki keer koronooto kota ko loo. 
Genesis22:5 Yeityo koleenji `Abraham murenjoto chiget, “Otebi eng' yu kobooto sigiryet, ak keebe oliin ak weeri, si kesaa, ak keweigei kogeny.”" 
Genesis22:6 Ki nam Abraham kweenik che po kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak koganapchi Isak weeriinnyi. Ki ip ineendet eng' eunnyi maat ak rotweet ak koba tuwai. 
Genesis22:7 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Isak kwandanyi Abraham, koleenji, “Abba!” Ak ki le, “Ami yu, weeriinnyu.” Ak ki le, “Keero, mi yu maat ak kweenik, ago mi ano aarwetap kechir ne egu kagoochinet ne kibeelei?”" 
Genesis22:8 Ki leenji Abraham, “Weeriinnyu, cheeng'jingei Kamuktaindet aarwetap keechiir ne egu kagoochinet ne kibeelei.” Yeityo koba tuwai." 
Genesis22:9 Ye kingo it koronooto ole kiga koarorchi Kamuktaindet, koteech Abraham kaptisisyet eng' olooto. Kitet kweenik, yeityo korat weeriinnyi Isak, ak konde ineendet kweenik parak eng' kaptisisyet." 
Genesis22:10 Ki iyogoito anyun eunnyi Abraham, konam rotweet koleen kobare weeriinnyi." 
Genesis22:11 Ago kiguur anyun ineendet `malaikayatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet koleenji, “Abraham, Abraham!” Kole, “Ami yu.”" 
Genesis22:12 Koleenji, “Ametwaa lakweet, ameyachi kiy tugul, amu kaanai nguno ale igonyiti Kamuktaindet, amu ma ieteno weeriing'ung', ne weeriing'ung' ne ineegei.”" 
Genesis22:13 Kotabendo Abraham ak koguskong'; ogeero, mengit ne kanam sondiit kuinoikyik. Ki wo anyun Abraham koget mengit ak koeny koek kogoochinet ne kibeelei, kogeere weeriinnyi." 
Genesis22:14 Ak ki kuuree Abraham yooto, “Koonu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor;” ko uu ye kimwaei agoi kora, keele, “Kigonune tulweetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Genesis22:15 Ak ki kuur ne po aeng' `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Abraham eng' kipsengwet," 
Genesis22:16 koleenji, “Kayosyechigei aneege, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu keyai kii, ma ieteno weeriing'ung' ne ineegei." 
Genesis22:17 Eng' kaberuret aberuurin, ak eng' kayabet ayabi iyoteng'ung' kobarait kotenit kecheik che po kipsengwet, ak kotenit ng'aniek che po ngeguutap nyanjet. Tuun nyabani lagoguk kurgeetap puunikwak;" 
Genesis22:18 ak tuun kiberuuri pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony eng' keswondeng'ung'; amu kegas iit kutinnyu.” 
Genesis22:19 Ak ki weigei anyun Abraham kwo ole mi murenjugachiget, ak ki ng'eetyo koba tugul agoi Beer-sheba, ak ki meny Abraham olooto." 
Genesis22:20 Kingo pata tuguuchuuto, kemwachi Abraham keleenji, “Keero, kogosikyi Milkah agine ng'eetap kamenng'ung' Nahor lagok:" 
Genesis22:21 lakweet ne po tai ko Us, ng'eetap kamet ko Bus, Kemuel kwandap Aram;" 
Genesis22:22 Kesed, Haso, Pildas, Jidlap, ak Bethuel.”" 
Genesis22:23 (Ak ki sich `Bethuel Rebeka). Chuuto sisiit ko ki sikyi Milkah Nahor ng'eetap kametap Abraham. 
Genesis22:24 Ak ki sikyi Reuma chebaigeiyandennyi Teba, Gaham, Tahas, ak Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Kenyiisyek che ki tar Sarah kosabei ko pogol ak tiptem ak tisap," 
Genesis23:2 ak ki mechi Kiriath-arba (nooto Hebron), eng' emetap Kanaan. Ki nyo Abraham kote ak koriir agobo Sarah." 
Genesis23:3 Yeityo kong'eet Abraham eng' ole ki mi muusto, ak kong'alaal ak piigap Het, koleenji," 
Genesis23:4 “Aa kiprutoiyo ak ko aa punootyo eng' oling'wong'; ogoono yeto eng' oling'wong' kobunjo eng' ole kitupchin piik atupchi muusto, si ma ageere.”" 
Genesis23:5 Ki wolji `piigap Het Abraham anyun, koleenji," 
Genesis23:6 “Kaseech, kiptaiyandennyu, ii pounindet ne po Kamuktaindet eng' kwenunnyoo. Tupchi muusto kererit ne kelewen eng' kereeriisyekyok. Ma mi chii eng' acheek ne imuuchi koetenen kererinnyi si metupchi muusto.”" 
Genesis23:7 Ki ng'eet ak kong'uruukyi Abraham anyun piigap emetap Het. 
Genesis23:8 Ak ki ng'alaalji `ineendet icheek kole, “Ngo chame atup muusto si ma ageere, ogasa anyun ak osoomwa Epron weeriitap Sohar," 
Genesis23:9 kogoono kebenennyi, ne mi Makpela, eng' kiwotetap mbareennyi. Ingogoono eng' taing'wong' ole kitupchin piik kobunjo eng' kamanuutyet ne yamegei ne po fedha.”" 
Genesis23:10 Ki tebee anyun Epron kwenutap weeriigap Het; ak ki wolji `Epron Kitindet Abraham kogasei weeriigap Het, kobooto tugul che ki mong'ji ormariichetap nganasennyi, koleenji," 
Genesis23:11 “Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, ago kasa, kagoonin mbaranooto kobooto kebeneet ne mi olooto. Kagoonin eng' taitap weeriigap piikyuk; tupchi muusto.”" 
Genesis23:12 Yeityo kong'uruuk Abraham anyun eng' taitap piigap emet. 
Genesis23:13 Ak ki ng'alaal ak Epron, kogasei piigap emet, kole, “Ago ngot icham, ko myee igasa; agoonin kamanuutyet ne yamegei ak mbaranooto; ee, taach anyun, si atupchi muusto oliindo.”" 
Genesis23:14 Ki wolji `Epron Abraham koleenji," 
Genesis23:15 “Kiptaiyandennyu, kasa, kimoitosi nee ak inyee eng' mbareet ne yamegei kamanuutyennyi ak shekelisyek pogol ang'wan che po fedha? Tup muusto.”" 
Genesis23:16 Ki kas anyun Abraham ng'aleegap Epron; ak kigerchi `Abraham Epron robiinik che ki kamwa ineendet eng' taitap piigap Het, chooto ko segelisyegap fedha pogol ang'wan, ko uu che kiboisyei chemung'arainik." 
Genesis23:17 Ki kigamanji anyun komyee Abraham mbareetap Epron, ne ki mi Makpela, ne itoorchingei Mamre, mbareet kobooto kebeneet ne ki mi olooto, ak keetiik tugul che ki mi mbaranooto, che ki kiyieme kiwoteet tugul," 
Genesis23:18 ki kigoochi Abraham kobunji eng' taitap weeriigap Het, ak eng' taitap tugul che ki mong'ji ormariichetap nganasennyi." 
Genesis23:19 Kingo pata chooto kotup `Abraham Sarah kwondonyi eng' kebeneet ne ki mi mbareetap Makpela ne itoorchingei Mamre (ne mi Hebron), eng' emetap Kanaan." 
Genesis23:20 Kigamanji ak kogoochi anyun `piigap Het Abraham mbareet ak kebeneet ne ki mi olooto, koek ole kitupchin piik." 
Genesis24:1 Kiga koosit Abraham; ki neegit kwo kalilot, ak kiga koberuur `Kamuktaindet Abraham eng' tuguuk tugul."
