Genesis24:2 Ak ki leenji `Abraham otwogindennyi, ne oo ne po koonnyi, ne ki pou tuguukyik tugul, “Kaigai inde eung'ung' kubestanyu," 
Genesis24:3 amache iyasye eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po kipsengwet ak ng'wony, ale ametunji weeriinnyu chepto ne po Kanaanik che amenye kwenunnywa." 
Genesis24:4 Ui agoi emennyu, kaptilyonutikyuk, si imutyi kwondo weeriinnyu Isak.”" 
Genesis24:5 Koleenji `otwogindet ineendet, “Imuuch ko meyan chebooto kosubwo agoi emoni. Ara, tos nyolu amut weeriing'ung' emonooto ki ibunu?”" 
Genesis24:6 Koleenji Abraham, “Riipkei, amemut weeriinnyu kwo olooto." 
Genesis24:7 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po kipsengwet, ineendet ne ki imoong'wa eng' kootap abba ak eng' emet ne ki kisikyino, ineendet ne ki ng'alaalwo ak koyasyeiwo, kole, ‘Agoochini lagoguk emoni’; ko iyooktoi `ineendet malaikaiyandennyi kondoun, si imutyi weeriinnyu kwondo eng' oliindo." 
Genesis24:8 Ak ngot koma cham chebooto kosubun, ityagage anyun eng' kayasyoninyu. Agot nga no, ko memut weeriinnyu oliindo.”" 
Genesis24:9 Konde anyun otwogindet eunnyi kubestap Abraham kiptaiyandennyi, ak koyasyechi ineendet agobo nooto." 
Genesis24:10 Ki kwei anyun otwogindonooto tambeesik taman che po kiptaiyandennyi ak kwo, koibei tuguuk tugul che myachen che po kiptaiyandennyi. Ki ng'eet ak kwo agoi Mesopotamia, agoi nganaseetap Nahor." 
Genesis24:11 Ki chop tambeesik kogutung'so eng' saang' ne po nganaseet ole ki neegitee keriingetap peek; ki saisyegap koskoleny ye pendi kobogorisyek kosiile peek. 
Genesis24:12 Ak ki le, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ne po kiptaiyandennyu Abraham, asaain ale iberuuro rani ak iyachi ne myee Abraham kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis24:13 Keero, atononi eng' yu mi kondap peek, ole inyoo kosiile peek tiibiigap piigap nganaseet;" 
Genesis24:14 si ngot kocham chepto ne asoome aleenjini, ‘Ituu tereeng'ung' aee peek,’ ak kowolwo koleenjo, ‘Nganagin iee, ak asiilji tambeesiguk agicheek’ ko ingoek nooto chepto ne ki ilewenji otwogindeng'ung' Isak. Eng' yooto anai ale, kaiyachi ne myee kiptaiyandennyu.”" 
Genesis24:15 Kingo tomo kogeskei ng'alaalennyi, koit Rebeka cheptap Bethuel weeriitap Milkah, kwondap Nahor, ng'eetap kametap Abraham, koibu tereennyi eng' tigikyet." 
Genesis24:16 Ki chepto ne karaaran kot, ak ki pergeiyat ne ki tomo kotuiyo ak muren. Ki choortagei agoi koit kondap peek, konyiit peek tereennyi ak kotogos kogeny." 
Genesis24:17 Ki labat anyun otwogindonooto kotorookta, ak koleenji, “Kaigai inaga peek tutigin aee, chu mi teroning'ung'.”" 
Genesis24:18 Kowolji koleenji, “Nganagin iee, kiptaiyandennyu.” Ki itu tereennyi kochokyi eng' eunnyi, ak konaga koe." 
Genesis24:19 Ye kingo kagonaga peek koe, koleenji, “Kaawe asiilji peek tambeesik ak icheek koe, kot kobiyong'so.”" 
Genesis24:20 Ki chaakta anyun kwo koroong'ji peek moinget kogesyi, ak kolabat si kosiil alak eng' keriinget; ki siilji tambeesikyik tugul." 
Genesis24:21 Ki siis chiichooto ak kochiilji konda komachei konai ngo kagosuldochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pandanyi anan ngo tomo. 
Genesis24:22 Ak ye kingo kagoee peek tambeesik, konam chiichooto peteiyotap thahabu, ne nyigiisindanyi koyamei kebebertap shekel, ak kariik aeng' che po thahabu che po eunek che yamei shekelisyek taman," 
Genesis24:23 ak koteebe kole, “Ii cheptap ng'oo? Kaigai mwaiwo. Tos mi ole kimuuchi keru eng' kootap kwandang'ung'?”" 
Genesis24:24 Koleenji ineendet, “Aa cheptap Bethuel weeriitap Milkah, ne ki sikyi Nahor.”" 
Genesis24:25 Koleenji kogeny, “Ki tinyei mobeek ak amitwogik che chaang' che ki kigonor che po tambeesik, ak mi poroindo ole ruitos toek.”" 
Genesis24:26 Ki ing'uruuk anyun chiichooto ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Genesis24:27 kole, “Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kiptaiyandennyu Abraham, ne ma etee kiptaiyandennyu rireenennyi po kei ak imaninnyi; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki imutwaa eng' ooreet agoi aitu kootap tupchosyegap kiptaiyandennyu.”" 
Genesis24:28 Ki labat anyun chebooto, ak komwachi piik che po kootap kamet ng'aleechooto tugul." 
Genesis24:29 Ki tinyei Rebeka ng'eetap kamet, ne ki kiguure Laban. Ki labat Laban kwo ole mi chiichooto eng' ole mi kondap peek." 
Genesis24:30 Ye kingo keer peteiyot, ak kariik che mi eunegap chepkamet, ak ye kingo kas ng'aleegap Rebeka chepkamet, komwachin ng'aleek che kagamwachi chiichooto, kwo anyun ole mi chiichooto. Ak ogeero, kita kotononi chiichooto eng' ole neegitee tambeesik ye mi kondap peek." 
Genesis24:31 Kwo koleenji, “Nyoo inyee ne iberuurot eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu nee si itonon eng' saang'? Kaachop koot ak ole ruitos tambeesik.”" 
Genesis24:32 Ki wo ko anyun chiichooto. Yeityo kotyach Laban tuguuk che kilau tambeesik, ak kogoochi tambeesik mobeek ak amitwogik che kiga kigonor. Ki inaga peek koune keelyekyik ak che po piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet." 
Genesis24:33 Ak ki kiipchi amitwogik kinde tainnyi, ago ki le, “Ma amisyei agoi amwaiwok ng'olyoot ne kagiyoguneno.” Koleenji, “Mwaa anyun.”" 
Genesis24:34 Komwa anyun kole, “Aa otwogindetap Abraham." 
Genesis24:35 Ki koberuur miising' kot `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu; ak ki kotoroor koeet. Ki kogoochi ineendet `akwotisyek che po keechiirek ak che po tuuga, fedha ak thahabu, otwogik che murenik ak otwogik che tiibiik, tambeesik ak sigiroik." 
Genesis24:36 Ki sikyi kiptaiyandennyu weeriit Sarah kwondonyi ye kingo kagoosit; ak ki kogoochi kiptaiyandennyu weeriinnyi tuguuk tugul che tinyei. 
Genesis24:37 Ak kimakwo kiptaiyandennyu ayosyo kole, ‘Ametunji weeriinnyu cheptap Kanaanik, che amenye emennywa;" 
Genesis24:38 ago ui kootap abba, kaptilyonutikyuk, iwe imutyi weeriinnyu chepto kotun.’" 
Genesis24:39 Ak ki aleenji kiptaiyandennyi, ‘Imuuch ma cham chebooto kosubwo.’" 
Genesis24:40 Ago ki leenjo, ‘Iyogu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne awendotee tainnyi malaikaiyannyi obe tuwai, ak kosuldeun pandang'ung'. Ak iwe imutyi weeriinnyu chepto eng' kaptilyonutikyuk ak eng' kaptilyonutigap abba kotun." 
Genesis24:41 Yeityo anyun ityagage eng' kayosyennyu, ye kaiit kaptilyonutikyuk. Ak ngo ma konin chebooto, ityagage anyun eng' kayosyennyu.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Kaitu rani ye mi kondap peek, ak ale, ‘Ee, Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ne po kiptaiyandennyu Abraham, ngiberuur pandanyu;" 
Genesis24:43 keero, atonone yu neegitee kondap peek. Igoochi kocham chepto ne nyoonei kosiilei peek,’ ak aleenji anyun, ‘Kaigai inaga peek tutigin aee, cho mi tereeng'ung',’" 
Genesis24:44 ak kowolwo kole, ‘Nganagin iee, ak asiilji tambeesiguk ak icheek,’ ko ingoek nooto kwondo ne kagolewenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor weeriitap kiptaiyandennyu.”" 
Genesis24:45 “Ak ye kata ang'alaali eng' muguleldanyu, keero, komong' Rebeka koibu tereennyi eng' tigikyennyi; kochoortagei kwo kondap peek kosiil peek. Aleenji, ‘Kaigai inaga peek aee.’" 
Genesis24:46 Ak kotu tereennyi ne kami tigikyennyi kochokyi, ak koleenjo, ‘Nganagin iee, ak asiilji tambeesiguk ak icheek.’ Aee anyun, ak yeityo konaga tambeesik ak icheek." 
Genesis24:47 Ateebee aleenji, ‘Ii cheptap ng'oo?’ Koleenjo, ‘Aa cheptap Bethuel, weeriitap Nahor, ne ki sikyi Milkah ineendet.’ Ande anyun peteiyot, ak kariik eng' eunekyik." 
Genesis24:48 Ak ang'uruuge asaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak aweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po kiptaiyandennyu Abraham, ne ki indoiywo eng' ooreet ne myee si amutyi weeriinnyi cheptap ng'eetap kametap kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis24:49 Ak nguno anyun ngo cham oyachi kiptaiyandennyu ne myee ak ne po iman, omwaiwo; ak ngo ma uu nooto, omwaiwo si kobiit aweekyigei eutap tai, anan ko ne po kaataam.”" 
Genesis24:50 Kowolji Laban ak Bethuel anyun, koleenji, “Punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoni; ma kimuuchi kemwaun ng'olyoot ne ya anan ne myee." 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka no mi taing'ung', imut ak obe. Ingoek kwondap weeriitap kiptaiyandeng'ung' ko uu ye ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Genesis24:52 Ye kingo kas otwogindetap Abraham ng'aleekwak, kong'uruuk agoi ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Genesis24:53 Ki ip anyun otwogindet tuguuk che po fedha ak che po thahabu, ak ngoroik kogoochi Rebeka. Ki igoochi ng'eetap kamet ak kamet tuguuk che korooron." 
Genesis24:54 Ki amis ak koeeiso ineendet ak piik che ki mi tugul ak koruiyo. Ye kingo ng'eetyo karon kole, “Ochamwo awo ye mi kiptaiyandennyu.”" 
Genesis24:55 Ki le ng'eetap kamet ak kamet, “Ingota kotebi lakwani kobootech peetuusyek che ng'ering', che tee peetuusyek taman; ak ye ibata chooto, kwo.”" 
Genesis24:56 Ago ki mwachi koleenji, “Amata ogaa, amu ki koberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pandanyu; ochamwo awo kapkiptayandennyu.”" 
Genesis24:57 Kole icheek, “Myee keguur lakwanooto, konyo keteebe ineendet.”" 
Genesis24:58 Koguur anyun Rebeka ak nyo koteebe koleenji, “Tos ichame obe ak chiichi?” Kole, “Wei, awendi.”" 
Genesis24:59 Ki chamji anyun Rebeka ng'eetap kamet kwo, kobooto cheplakwennyi, ak otwogindetap Abraham ak piikyik." 
Genesis24:60 Ak ki iberuur `icheek Rebeka, koleenji, “Ne kitupche, egu kametap eliphuusyek konyil eliphuusyek taman, ak konyaban lagoguk kurgotigap che wechei icheeget.”" 
Genesis24:61 Ki ng'eet anyun Rebeka, ak tiibiikyik che otwogik, kolaany tambeesik, koosup chiichooto. Ki imut anyun `otwogindonooto Rebeka ak koba." 
Genesis24:62 Kiga konyo anyun Isak kobun ooreetap Beer-lahai-roi, amu ki menyei ineendet komostap Negeb." 
Genesis24:63 Ye kingo wendoti Isak eng' keeweet koskoleny, kotabendo, ak ki keer tambeesik che pwoonei." 
Genesis24:64 Ak kitabendo Rebeka agine, ak ye kingo keer Isak, kochoorgei eng' tambeesyet," 
Genesis24:65 ak kiteebe otwogindet koleenji, “Ng'oo chiichiin nyoonei eng' kewaniin kotorookwech?” Koleenji otwogindet, “Kiptaiyandennyu nooto.” Ki nam anyun ngoryeet ne ng'eetee metit agoi keelyek kotugegei." 
Genesis24:66 Komwachi otwogindet Isak anyun tuguuk tugul che kiga koyai. 
Genesis24:67 Kingo pata anyun komut `Isak Rebeka kwo emaitap Sarah kamennyi, ak kotun Rebeka koek kwondonyi; ak ki cham ineendet kot. Ki nyoor anyun Isak kagaigaet amu kiga kome kamet." 
Genesis25:1 Ki itun Abraham kwondo age ne kiguure Ketura," 
Genesis25:2 ak ki sikyi Simran, Joksan, Medan, Midian, Isbak, ak Sua." 
Genesis25:3 Ak ki sich `Joksan Sheba ak Dedan. Weeriigap Dedan ko ki Asurik, Letusik ak Leumik." 
Genesis25:4 Weeriigap Midian ko ki: Ephah, Epher, Hanok, Abida ak Eldaa. Chuuto tugul ko ki lagogap Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Ki pogokyi `Abraham Isak tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei. 
Genesis25:6 Ago ye kita kosabei ko ki igoochi weeriigap chebaigeinikyik, kagoochinoik ak koleenji koba koistogei eng' ole mi weeriinnyi Isak, koba emetap kong'asiis." 
Genesis25:7 Kenyiisyek che ki tar Abraham kosabei, ko pogol ak tamanwogik tisap ak muut." 
Genesis25:8 Ki ilil Abraham ko kagoosit miising', ko poiyot ne kiga konyi peetuusyekyik, ak ki kiyum kobooto piikyik." 
Genesis25:9 Kitup ineendet weeriikyik Isak ak Ishmael eng' kebeneetap Makpela ne tokyingei Mamre, ne mi mbareetap Epron, weeriitap Sohar Hitindet," 
Genesis25:10 ne ki alee Abraham piigap Het. Yooto ye ki kitupchi Abraham, ak Sarah kwondonyi." 
Genesis25:11 Kingo kagobata kaliletap Abraham, ko ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet Isak weeriinnyi, ak ki meny Isak ole neegitee keriingetap peek ne kiguure Beer-lahari-roi." 
Genesis25:12 Chu ko ortinwegap Ishmael, weeriitap Abraham, ne ki sikyi Hagar Chemisiryot otwogindetap Sarah," 
Genesis25:13 Chu isubi ko kainaigap weeriigap Ishmael, ko uu kainaikwak ak ko uu ortinwekwak: lakweet ne po tai ne po Ishmael ko Nebaiot; yeityo korup Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 Misma, Duma ak Massah;" 
Genesis25:15 Hadad, Tema, Jetur, Napis, ak Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Chu ko weeriigap Ishmael, ak chu kainaikwak, eng' nganasookwak, ak eng' meng'ootennywa; pounik taman ak aeng' ko uu pororyosyekwak." 
Genesis25:17 Kenyiisyegap Ishmael che ki tar kosabei, ko pogol ak sosom ak tisap. Kingo lil ineendet, ko ki kigonor kobooto piikyik." 
Genesis25:18 Ki meng'oot kobooch Havilah agoi Shur ne tokyingei Misiri, eng' ooreet ne wendi Assyria, ki wo komeny olooto eng' taitap tupchosyekyik tugul." 
Genesis25:19 Chu ko ortinwegap Isak, weeriitap Abraham: kisichei `Abraham Isak." 
Genesis25:20 Ki po Isak kenyiisyek artam ye kingo tuni Rebeka, cheptap Bethuel Syriaindet ne po Padan-aram, chepkametap Laban Syriaindet." 
Genesis25:21 Ki riirchi `Isak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising' agobo kwondonyi, amu kisoon. Ki kasyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor riirekyik ak ki manach Rebeka kwondonyi." 
Genesis25:22 Kingo tomono, kobelgei lagok eng' moennyi; ak ki le, “Ngot ko uu nooto, ko kalya si atep ko uu ni?” Ak ki wo koteebe Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Genesis25:23 Ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Miitei moeng'ung' pororyosyek aeng'u, ak tuun pcheegei pororyosyek chu aeng'u punu moeng'ung'; kimitu pororyet age kosiir age; ak koot ne oo ne ming'in.”" 
Genesis25:24 Ye kingo it anyun peetuunnyi ne po kosigiis, ogeero, ki mi sarameek moennyi." 
Genesis25:25 Ki indoi ne oo, ak kibiriir. Ki sabul poorto tugul ko uu sambut ak kiguure kainennyi Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Kingo pata nooto kesich ng'eetap kamet ne kinamonu kwaryatap Esau; ki kiguure kainennyi Jakobo. Ki po Isak kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo ye kingo sichei kwondonyi lagochooto. 
Genesis25:27 Ki egitu weerchooto, ki kiplogotyot ne ng'oom Esau, chiito ne po timiin. Ago ki chiito Jakobo ne tala ne kimeng'ooti emaisyek." 
Genesis25:28 Ki chamei `Isak Esau, amu ki amei panyeek che ki ibune logeet, ago ki chamei `Rebeka Jakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Ye kingo chobei Jakobo sogoryek, koit Esau kobunu timiin, ko kang'et miising'." 
Genesis25:30 Koleenji anyun `Esau Jakobo, “Kaigai, koono aam amitwogichu piriireen amu kaatanui!” Ki kiguure kainennyi anyun Edom amu nooto." 
Genesis25:31 Koleenji Jakobo, “Aldaiwo korook imandap etunateng'ung' ne po sigeet.”" 
Genesis25:32 Kole Esau, “Keero, neegit ame; tos tilei nee eng' anee etunateet ne po sigeet?”" 
Genesis25:33 Ak ki leenji Jakobo, “Iyosyeiwo rani.” Ak ki iyasyechi anyun ineendet ak ki aldochi Jakobo etunatennyi ne po sigeet." 
Genesis25:34 Yeityo kogoochi `Jakobo Esau magatyat ak sogoryek che kiyoe che kiguure lendil. Ki am ak koe, yeityo kong'eet kwo. Ara ki mata koiit anyun Esau etunatennyi ne po sigeet koek kiy." 
Genesis26:1 Ki piit anyun rubeet eng' emonooto ne teer eng' rubeet ne ki po tai, ne ki mi eng' peetuusyegap Abraham. Ak ki wo Isak kap Abimelek, laitoryatap Philistiik, agoi Gerar." 
Genesis26:2 Yeityo komong'ji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ak koleenji, “Amerekte iwe Misiri; tebee emet neta aboorun." 
Genesis26:3 Egu toondet eng' emoni, ami kobooten, ak aberuurin; amu agoonin inyee, kobooto lagoguk, emotinwechuuto tugul, ak agimiit kayasyoet ne ki ayasyechi kwandang'ung' Abraham." 
Genesis26:4 Abaroi iyoteng'ung' ko uu kecheik che po kipsengwet, ak agoochini iyoteng'ung' emotinwechu tugul. Ak kiberuuri pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony eng' iyoteng'ung';" 
Genesis26:5 amu ki kas iit kutinnyu Abraham, ak ki nam katigonutikyuk ak koriip karureiywekyuk, etanutikyuk ak ng'atuutikyuk.”" 
Genesis26:6 Ki meny anyun Isak Gerar. 
Genesis26:7 Ye kingo teebee piigap olooto agobo kwondonyi, kowol kole, “Ineendet ko chepkamennyu,” amu ki iywei komwa kole, “Osotyondennyu,” amu kileen, “Si ma para piigap emoni agobo Rebeka,” amu ki karaaran kwonyooto." 
Genesis26:8 Ye kingo kagotebee olooto peetuusyek che chaang', koititoe Abimelek, laitoryatap Philistiik, tirisyet, kogeer kole, koboiboegei Isak ak Rebeka kwondonyi." 
Genesis26:9 Ki kuur anyun `Abimelek Isak, nyo koleenji, “Osotyondeng'ung' ni iman. Kilya si imwa ile, ‘Ineendet ko chepkamennyu?’ ” Ak ki leenji `Isak ineendet, “Ki amwae ko uu nooto ale, si ma mei agobo ineendet.”" 
Genesis26:10 Koleenji Abimelek, “Nee ni koiyaiywech? Koteibwech kaimut, amu ko nyumnyum koruiyo chii ak kwondong'ung'.”" 
Genesis26:11 Ki ng'at anyun `Abimelek piik tugul koleenji, “Kibarei chii age tugul ne twaei chiichi anan ko kwondonyi.”" 
Genesis26:12 Ki koolso Isak eng' emonooto ak kinyoor eng' kenyinooto konyil pogol. Ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet," 
Genesis26:13 ak ki ek mogoryo chiito, ak ki testai koeet mogornatennyi, agoi koeet kot." 
Genesis26:14 Ki tinyei akwotisyek che po keechiirek ak che po tuuga, ak piik che chaang' che po koonnyi, kot koam ng'etkong' Philistiik amu ineendet." 
Genesis26:15 Ki ker anyun ak kotime ng'ung'unyek Philistiik peek che po keriingonik tugul, che kiga kobal otwogik eng' peetuusyegap kwandanyi Abraham." 
Genesis26:16 Yeityo koleenji anyun `Abimelek Isak, “Istoeneigei; amu ki ieetu ak igimitu, isiirech.”" 
Genesis26:17 Ki wo Isak eng' olooto, kwo koteech emaisyekyik eng' atebweetap Gerar, ak komeny olooto." 
Genesis26:18 Ki pal Isak kogeny keriingonigap peek che kiga kebal eng' peetuusyegap kwandanyi Abraham; amu kiga kotiim Philistiik ye kingo kagome Abraham. Ak kiguure kainaik che kiga kotoochi kwandanyi. 
Genesis26:19 Ago ye kingo pal otwogigap Isak atebweet, konyoor keriingetap peek che kuutu," 
Genesis26:20 kiboryo mestowegap Gerar ak che po Isak, koleen, “Chechook peechu.” Kiguure keriingonooto po peek Esek, amu ki cham komoitos." 
Genesis26:21 Ye kingo pal keriingetap peek age, kotiyechi nooto agine, ak kiguure nooto Sitna." 
Genesis26:22 Ak kiu eng' olooto, yeityo kwo kobal keriinget age, ak ki ma tiyechi nooto. Ki kuure anyun nooto Rehoboth, ki le, “Kagobaroiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emet nguno, si keichi emoniito.”" 
Genesis26:23 Ki wo eng' olooto kotogosta agoi Beer-sheba. 
Genesis26:24 Ak ki mong'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kemounooto ak koleenji, “Aa Kamuktaindet ne po kwandang'ung' Abraham. Meiywei amu ami kobooten, aberuurin ak abaroi iyoteng'ung' amu otwogindennyu Abraham.”" 
Genesis26:25 Ki teech anyun kaptisisyet eng' olooto ak koguur kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki teech emainnyi eng' olooto, ak ki pal otwogikyik keriingetap peek." 
Genesis26:26 Ki pa kap Isak `Abimelek kobunei Gerar kobooto chorwennyi Ausat, ak Pikol kiptaiyatap lugeennyi." 
Genesis26:27 ki teebee Isak koleenji, “Kobwanjo amu nee, ak owecha, ak ki oonwa eng' oling'wong'?”" 
Genesis26:28 Ki leenji icheek, “Ki kigeer komyee keele, mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten. Ak ki kile, ingobiit kayasyoet eng' kwenunnyoo, acheek ak inyee, ak kiyomiskei" 
Genesis26:29 keele si meyaiywech kiy ne ya, ko uu ye ki ma kitwain, ak ko uu ye ki kiyaun ne myee kityo, ak ki kiuten eng' kaalyeet. Nguno anyun ko ii ne iberuurot eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Genesis26:30 Ki yachi anyun igoorto, ak ki amis ak koeeiso." 
Genesis26:31 Ki ng'eetyo karon miising' koyasyechigei. Yeityo kounda `Isak icheek ak ki pa eng' kaalyeet. 
Genesis26:32 Eng' peetuunooto anyun, kobwa otwogigap Isak, kobwa komwachi agobo keriingetap peek ne kiga kobal, koleenji, “Kagenyooru peek”" 
Genesis26:33 Ak kiguure keriingonooto Siba; nooto anyun, kiguure kainetap nganasanooto Beer-sheba agoi ra." 
Genesis26:34 Kingo po Esau kenyiisyek artam kotun Judit cheptap Beri chiitap pororyetap Hittite, ak Basemath cheptap Elon ne agine kora kosalu pororyetap Hittite." 
Genesis26:35 Ki iimgei anyun Isak ak Rebeka miising' agobo tiipchooto. 
Genesis27:1 Ye kingo kagoosit Isak, ak kiga kogoryo konyekyik kot koma kogeerei kiy, kogiguur Esau weeriinnyi ne oo, ak koleenji, “Weeriinnyu.” Ak ki wol kole, “Ami yu.”" 
Genesis27:2 Koleenji, “Keero, kaaositu, amangen peetuut ne amee." 
Genesis27:3 Kaigai, inam anyun nguno kariguk, motyeng'ung' ak kwangeng'ung', ak iwe kewaniin, iibwa pendap logeet," 
Genesis27:4 ak inyoo ichobwo koanyinyitu ko uu ye achame, yeityo iibwa aam, si koberuurin muguleldanyu kotom amei.”" 
Genesis27:5 Ki kasei anyun Rebeka ye ki ng'alaaljin `Isak weeriinnyi Esau. Ye kingwo Esau logeet kewaniin kocheeng'ji kwandanyi pendap logeet," 
Genesis27:6 kong'alaalsechi `Rebeka weeriinnyi Jakobo, koleenji, “Keero, kaagas kong'alaaldos kwandang'ung' ak ng'eetap kamenng'ung' Esau, koleenjin," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ibwa pendap logeet, ak inyoo ichobwo koanyinyitu, si aam, ak aberuurin eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotom amei.’" 
Genesis27:8 Nooto anyun weeriinnyu, kasa iit, ko uu ye ang'atiin." 
Genesis27:9 Ui nguno ole mi akweet, igetwo aarek aeng' che myachen che po ng'oroor, si ichopchi kwandang'ung' koanyinyitu, ko uu ye chamei." 
Genesis27:10 Si iipchi ineendet, koam, si koberuurin kotom kome.”" 
Genesis27:11 Ago ki leenji `Jakobo kamennyi Rebeka, “Keero, sabul Esau tupchennyu, ago tiliil poortanyu." 
Genesis27:12 Abeere imuuchi kosapsaba abba, ak aegu kaberberindet eng' ineendet ak aipchigei ng'oogisto ama perurto.”" 
Genesis27:13 Koleenji kamet, “Ingobunjo ng'oogistong'ung', weeriinnyu. Kasa iit kityo, ak iwe igetwo.”" 
Genesis27:14 Ki wo anyun ak kogetyi kamet, ne ki chop koanyinyitu, ko uu ye chamei kwandanyi." 
Genesis27:15 Yeityo konam Rebeka ngoroik che korooron che po Esau weeriinnyi ne oo, che ki tinyei eng' ko, ak kolaakyi Jakobo weeriinnyi ne ming'in." 
Genesis27:16 Ak ki ilokyi eunekyik ak kaatinnyi ole-tiliil, magatok che po aaregap ng'oroor." 
Genesis27:17 Ki indochi Jakobo weeriinnyi eunnyi panyechooto anyiny che kiga kochop ak magatyat. 
Genesis27:18 Ki wo anyun ole ki mi kwandanyi, ak koleenji, “Abba!” Kowolji kole, “Ami yu, ago ii ng'oo, weeri?”" 
Genesis27:19 Ki leenji `Jakobo kwandanyi, “Aa Esau weeriing'ung' ne po tai. Kaayai ko uu ye kagemwaiwo. Kaigai ng'eet, tebi ng'wony, am amitwogikyuk che po logeet, si kobiit iberuuro.”" 
Genesis27:20 koteebee `Isak weeriinnyi koleenji, “Nee ni kesip inyooru-o weeriinnyu?” Kowol kole, “Nooto ne kaonwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindeng'ung'.”" 
Genesis27:21 Ki leenji `Isak Jakobo, “Kaigai, nyoo riigu, si asapsabin, weeriinnyu, anai ngo ii weeriinnyu Esau anan ngo ma ii ineendet.”" 
Genesis27:22 Kiriikyi anyun `Jakobo kwandanyi Isak, ak kosapsap ineendet, yeityo kole, “Tuugeet ko po Jakobo ago eunek ko po Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Ki ma inyit ineendet, amu ki sabuuleen eunekyik, ko uu eunegap ng'eetap kamet Esau. Koberuur anyun ineendet." 
Genesis27:24 koteebee koleenji, “Ii weeriinnyu Esau iman?” Kowol kole, “Aa ineendet.”" 
Genesis27:25 Koleenji, “Ibwo koriik anyun, si aam pendo ne kaibwo weeriinnyu, si aberuurin.” Ki ipchi anyun koriik, ak ki am, yeityo koipchi divaik, ak kiee." 
Genesis27:26 Ak ki leenji `kwandanyi Isak, “Nyoo yu neegit anyun, weeriinnyu, si itoroocha.”" 
Genesis27:27 Ki wo anyun koriikta, ak kotorooch. Ak king'uchi siiptap ngoroikyik, ak ki iberuur ineendet kole, “Keero, kergei siiptap weeriinnyu ak ng'uunetap emet ne ki iberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Genesis27:28 Ingogoonin Kamuktaindet rewootap kipsengwet, ak akwaiyetap ng'wony, ak chaang'indap peek ak divaik." 
Genesis27:29 Ingootin pororyosyek, ak ingong'uruukyin pororyosyek. Egu kiptaiyat eng' tupchosyeguk, ak ingong'uruukyin weeriigap kamenng'ung'. Chuboot ineendet ne chubin, ak iberuurot ineendet ne iberuurin!”" 
Genesis27:30 Kingo kagogees Isak kaberuret ne ki iberuuri Jakobo, eng' yooto ko kata kwo Jakobo eng' ye mi kwandanyi, koit ng'eetap kamet Esau kobunu logeet." 
Genesis27:31 Ki chop agine amitwogik che anyinyen, ak koipchi kwandanyi. Ak ki leenji kwandanyi, “Ingong'eet anyun abba, si koam pendo ne kaipchin weeriinnyi, si ko peruro.”" 
Genesis27:32 koteebee anyun kwandanyi Isak koleenji, “Ii ng'oo inyee?” Kowol kole, “Aa weeriing'ung' ne oo, Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Ki potan Isak miising' kot, ak kole, “Ka ng'oo anyun ne kawo logeet ak koibwa, ak kaam kotomo iitu, ak kaaberuur ineendet? Ee, ak koberuurot ineendet.”" 
Genesis27:34 Ye kingo kas Esau ng'aleegap kwan, kowaach eng' waagaat ne oo ak eng' ng'wanindo, ak koleenji kwandanyi, “Iberuuro agane, ee, abba!”" 
Genesis27:35 Koleenji, “Kanyo ng'eetap kamenng'ung' eng' ng'aalseet, nyoo korep perurtang'ung'.”" 
Genesis27:36 Kole Esau, “Tos ki ma kitoochi kainennyi Jakobo komyee? Kagotila let konyil aeng'. Ki rebena imandap etunatetap sigennyu, ak keero, kagorebena nguno perurtanyu.” Kole, “Tos ma itukwa perurto?”" 
Genesis27:37 Kowolji `Isak Esau koleenji, “Kaayai ineendet koek kiptaiyandeng'ung', kaagoochi tupchosyekyik tugul koek otwogikyik ak kaagimiit ineendet eng' peek ak divaik. Ara, tos ta ayaun nee anyun oo weeriinnyu?”" 
Genesis27:38 Koleenji `Esau kwandanyi, “Tos itinye perurto agenge kityo, abba? Iberuuro agenge, ee, abba.” Ki waach anyun Esau ak koriir miising'." 
Genesis27:39 Ki wolji `Isak kwandanyi ineendet koleenji, “Keero, looitu meng'ooteng'ung' eng' akwaiyetap ng'wony, ak eng' rewootap kipsengwet ne punu parak." 
Genesis27:40 Isabe rotweng'ung' po chok, ak iote ng'eetap kamenng'ung'. Ye ityagage, ilelekte pounatennyi koistoegei kaating'ung'.”" 
Genesis27:41 Kiwech Esau anyun Jakobo amu perurto ne ki iberuur kwandanyi, ak ki le Esau eng' muguleldanyi, “Kagoriik peetuusyek che keriirchin abba; ye ibata abar tupchennyu Jakobo.”" 
Genesis27:42 Ye ki ngemwachi Rebeka ng'aleegap Esau weeriinnyi ne oo, koyookto keguur Jakobo weeriinnyi ne ming'in, ak koleenji ineendet, “Keero, igoigoegei Esau ng'eetap kamenng'ung', kobwaatin kole, tuun kobarin." 
Genesis27:43 Eng' nooto anyun weeriinnyu, kas ng'olyoondennyu; ng'eet, mwechi kap Laban weeriit ne kitupche ne menyei Haran," 
Genesis27:44 ak iwe otebi ak ineendet eng' olooto, peetuusyek che ng'ering' agoi kogeskei nereegek che ng'woneen che po ng'eetap komet." 
Genesis27:45 Ye igeskei nereegegap ng'eetap komet eng' inyee ak koutye kiit ne ki iyachi ineendet, ayoogu chii nyo koguurin eng' olooto. Amu nee si obegunena okweek tuwai eng' peetuut agenge?”" 
Genesis27:46 Koleenji anyun `Rebeka Isak, “Ageere kaimetapkei peetuusyechu amu tiibiigap Het. Ngot kotun Jakobo chepto eng' tiibiigap Het che uu tipchu po emoni, kotilei nee saboondanyu?”" 
Genesis28:1 Ki kuur anyun `Isak Jakobo konyo koberuur ineendet ak kotigon koleenji, “Ametun cheptap Kanaan." 
Genesis28:2 Ng'eet ak iwe Padan-aram, kootap Bethuel kwandap iyong'ung', iwe itun chepto eng' tiibiigap Laban ne tupcho ak komet." 
Genesis28:3 Ingoberuurin Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet, ak koberuurin eng' iyoteet ak kobarain, si kobiit iegu tuiyetap piik che chaang'." 
Genesis28:4 Ingogoonin perurto ne po Abraham, inyee ak lagoguk, si kobunjiin emoni iwendote ko ii kiprutoiyot, ne ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet Abraham”" 
Genesis28:5 Ki iyookto anyun `Isak Jakobo kwo, ak ki wo anyun agoi Padan-aram kap Laban, weeriitap Bethuel Syriaindet, ng'eetap kametap Rebeka, kametap Jakobo ak Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Ki keer anyun Esau kole, ki koberuur `Isak Jakobo ak koyookto kwo Padan-aram, kwo kotunis eng' oliindo, ak kingo peruri kotigoni koleenjin, “Ametun cheptap Kanaan,”" 
Genesis28:7 ak ki keer kole kogas iit `Jakobo kwandanyi ak kamennyi, ak kakwo Padan-aram." 
Genesis28:8 Ye kingo keer Esau kole, ma iboiboi kwandanyi Isak tiibiigap Kanaan," 
Genesis28:9 kwo anyun Esau kap Ishmael, kotun Maalat cheptap Ishmael weeriitap Abraham, cheptap kametap Nebaiot koek kwondo age kosyone chuun." 
Genesis28:10 Ki wo Jakobo anyun eng' Beer-sheba, kotokyigei Haran." 
Genesis28:11 Ye kingo it komosta age, koru yooto kemounooto, amu kiga kororokto asiista. Ki nam koitap olooto kotiie met, ak koru konuuch." 
Genesis28:12 Ak ki keer eng' karwotitoet lang'eiywot ne kagitonoon eng' ng'wony, ne itei kipsengwet. Ak ogeero, malaikaisyek che po Kamuktaindet che kitogostae ak kochoorunegei." 
Genesis28:13 Ki tonon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ye neegitee ineendet ak kole, “Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po kwandang'ung' Abraham ak Kamuktaindetap Isak. Agoonin emoni imi, kobooto lagoguk." 
Genesis28:14 Tuun tenitu lagoguk temburyegap ng'wony, ak iyomu cherongo ak kong'asiis, murot kaataam ak murot tai. Kiberuuri ortinwek tugul che po ng'wony eng' inyee ak eng' lagoguk." 
Genesis28:15 Keero, ami kobooten, ak ariibootin eng' oldo tugul ole iwendi, ak tuun amutun inyoo emoni kogeny. Amu ma metoin agoi tuun ayai tugul che kaamwaun.”" 
Genesis28:16 Ki kos anyun Jakobo eng' rwondo ak kole, “Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor olito iman, ago koma anai.”" 
Genesis28:17 Ki iyweis ak kole, “Myee ne tya olito! Ni ko kootap Kamuktaindet iman, ak ko kurgeetap kipsengwet.”" 
Genesis28:18 Ki ng'eet anyun Jakobo karon miising', ak konam koita ne koga tiye metit, ak kolumda koek toloita, yeityo koroong'ji mwaita paragunnyi." 
Genesis28:19 Kitoochi yooto kainet koguure Bethel, ago ki kiguure nganasanooto eng' tai Luz." 
Genesis28:20 Yeityo koyasyo Jakobo kole, “Ngot kotep Kamuktaindet kobooto ak koriibota eng' orani abune, kogoono amitwogik aam ak ngoroik che alaachi," 
Genesis28:21 agoi tuun aweekyigei kootap abba eng' kaalyeet, koek anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu," 
Genesis28:22 ak koek kooi, ne kalumde koek toloita, kootap Kamuktaindet; ak eng' tuguuk tugul che igoono, agoonin ne matiny kebebertap taman.”" 
Genesis29:1 Ki ng'eet anyun Jakobo kwo pandanyi, agoi koit emetap piigap kong'asiis." 
Genesis29:2 Ak ye kingo tabendoi, kogeer keriingetap peek eng' keeweet, ak ki mi akwotisyek somogu che po keechiirek koruitos eng' ole neegitee keriingonooto po peek, amu ki igoigoochi piik akwotisyekwak eng' keriingonooto. Ki oo koita ne ki kigeree keriinget," 
Genesis29:3 ak ki kituiyechin yooto akwotisyek tugul che po keechiirek, ak kimildoi mestoweek koita ne ki kigeree keriinget, si konaga peek keechiirek, ak yeityo koweech koita kwo ole kami kogeree keriinget." 
Genesis29:4 ki teebee anyun Jakobo koleenji, “Obunu ano, tupchosyekyuk?” Ak ki leenji, “Ki po Haran.”" 
Genesis29:5 koteebee icheek koleenji, “Tos ongen Laban weeriitap Nahor?” Kowol kole, “Kingen ineendet.”" 
Genesis29:6 Koleenji, “Chamegei?” Kowol kole icheek, “Chamegei; keero, nyoonei cheptonyi Rael, kogetu keechiirek!”" 
Genesis29:7 Kole, “Ogeero, ta ko peet, ak tomo koyam sait ne kirote tuuga. Onage peek keechiirek, yeityo okweri koba koaget.”" 
Genesis29:8 Kole icheek, “Ma kimuuchi agoi kotuiyo akwotisyek tugul, si kemilda koita eng' keriinget, yeityo kinage peek keechiirek.”" 
Genesis29:9 Ye kingo ta kong'alaaljindos, koit Rael kogetu keechiiregap kwandanyi, amu ineendet ne ki iyagi." 
Genesis29:10 Ak ye kingo keer anyun `Jakobo Rael cheptap Laban tupchetap kamet, kobooto keechiirek che po Laban, tupchetap kamet, koriikta Jakobo komilda koita eng' keriinget, ak kogoigoch akweetap keechiiregap Laban tupchetap kamet." 
Genesis29:11 Kitorooch anyun `Jakobo Rael ak kowaach koriir. 
Genesis29:12 Komwachi `Jakobo Rael koleenji, “Aa tilyetap kwandang'ung' ak aa weeriitap Rebeka.” Ki labat anyun Rael komwachi kwandanyi." 
Genesis29:13 Kingo kas Laban ng'aleegap Jakobo weeriitap chepkamet, kolabat kotorookta ineendet ak konam koue eunekyik ak kotorooch, ak komut kwo koonnyi. Ak ki mwachi `Jakobo Laban ng'aleechu tugul," 
Genesis29:14 ak ki mwachi Laban koleenji, “Angen komyee ale, ii kowekyuk ak panyeekyuk.” Ak ki tebi ak ineendet arawet agenge." 
Genesis29:15 Ki mwachi anyun `Laban Jakobo koleenji, “Tos ioto puch amu ii tilyennyu? Mwaiwo, nee melektang'ung'?”" 
Genesis29:16 Ki tinyei anyun Laban tiibiik aeng'. Ki kiguure ne oo Leah, keguure ne ming'in Rael." 
Genesis29:17 Ki mereeseen koonyek Leah, ak ki tinyei poorto ne karaaran ak togeet ne karaaran Rael." 
Genesis29:18 Ki cham `Jakobo Rael. Koleenji Laban, “Myee aootin kenyiisyek tisap, si atun Rael cheptong'ung' ne ming'in.”" 
Genesis29:19 Kole Laban, “Myee agoonin kosiir ye kata agoochini chii age; tebi kobooto.”" 
Genesis29:20 Ki oot anyun `Jakobo ineendet kenyiisyek tisap agobo Rael, ak ki keer ko uu peetuusyek che ng'ering' chooto, amu chamyet ne kiting'e ineendet." 
Genesis29:21 Yeityo koleenji `Jakobo Laban, “Koono anyun kwondonyu si kobiit kituiyegei, amu kagogeskei peetuusyek.”" 
Genesis29:22 Ki iyum anyun `Laban piik tugul che po yooto, ak koyai igoorto." 
Genesis29:23 Ago ye kingo kagoimen, komutyi `Laban Jakobo cheptonyi Leah, ak ki ituyogei." 
Genesis29:24 Ki igoito `Laban Silba otwogindennyi kogoochi Leah koek otwogindet. 
Genesis29:25 Kingo kagoeech kogeer kole, kaagaa Leah! Koleenji `Jakobo Laban, “Nee ni koiyaiywo? Ki ma aootin agobo Rael? Amu nee si iberbera?”" 
Genesis29:26 Ki le Laban, “Ma piteetap olinyoo kitun ne ming'in kotom kitun ne oo." 
Genesis29:27 Iwong'u peetuusyek tisap che po katunisyeng'ung' ak Leah, si kobiit kegoonin Rael agine, amu otwoknateet ne tuun ioto kenyiisyek alak tisap.”" 
Genesis29:28 Ki yai ko uu nooto Jakobo, kowong' peetuusyechooto tisap, ak ki igoochi `Laban Jakobo cheptonyi Rael koek kwondonyi." 
Genesis29:29 Ki igoito Laban otwogindennyi Bila kogoochi Rael koek otwogindennyi. 
Genesis29:30 Ara ki ituiyogei Jakobo ak Rael agine, ak ki chamei Rael kosiir Leah, ak ki oot `Jakobo Laban kenyiisyek alak tisap." 
Genesis29:31 Ye kingo keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kiwechei Leah, ko ki igoochi anyun ineendet iyoteet, ago kisonen Rael." 
Genesis29:32 Ki manach anyun Leah, kosich weeriit, ak koguuree kainennyi Reuben, amu ki le, “Kagogeer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyalildanyu; nooto anyun imuuch kochama manong'otyonnyu nguno.”" 
Genesis29:33 Ki manach kogeny, kosich weeriit, ak kole, “Amu kagas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor wegeet ne kiwecho, kagogoono weeriit niito agine amu nooto.” Koguure kainennyi Simion." 
Genesis29:34 Ki manach kogeny, kosich weeriit, ak kole, “Ni ne igoochin manong'otyonnyu kenamgei, amu kaasikyi weeriik somok” Ki kiguure kainennyi Lawi amu nooto." 
Genesis29:35 Ki manach kogeny, ak ki sich weeriit ak kole, “Alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' sigoni.” Kiguure kainennyi Judah amu nooto. Ki tebi, mata kosich lakwa." 
Genesis30:1 Ye kingo keer Rael kole mata kosikyi Jakobo lagok, koam ng'etkong' ineendet agobo chepkamet. Koleenji Jakobo, “Kono lagok, ak ngo megono, amee.”" 
Genesis30:2 Ki pa parak nereegegap Jakobo eng' Rael, ak ki leenji, “Tos ko ageeregei Kamuktaindet ne kaetenen iyoteet?”" 
Genesis30:3 Koleenji `Rael Jakobo, “Keero, mi otwogindennyu Bila. Otuiyegei ak ineendet, si kobiit kosigiis ak ki ityon lagok eng' ineendet.”" 
Genesis30:4 Ki igoochi otwogindennyi Bila koek kwondonyi, ak ki ituiyogei Jakobo ak ineendet." 
Genesis30:5 Ki manach anyun Bila, ak ki sikyi Jakobo weeriit." 
Genesis30:6 Kole Rael, “Kagoyaiywo ne myee Kamuktaindet, ak kagogas kutinnyu ak kagogoono weeriit”; Kiguure kainennyi Dan amu nooto." 
Genesis30:7 Ki manach kogeny Bila otwogetap Rael, ak ki sikyi Jakobo weeriit ne po aeng'." 
Genesis30:8 Ak ki le Rael, “Kagibelgei ak chepkamennyu eng' kabeletapkei ne oo, ak kaaterter.” Ki kuure weerooto ki sich kainennyi Naphtali." 
Genesis30:9 Kingo kagogeer Leah kole mata kosich lagok ineendet, konam Silba otwogindennyi kogoochi Jakobo koek kwondonyi." 
Genesis30:10 Ki sikyi Silba otwogindetap Leah Jakobo weeriit. 
Genesis30:11 Ak ki le Leah, “Kagoek saboon ra!” Ak kiguure kainennyi Gad." 
Genesis30:12 Ki sikyi Silba otwogindetap Leah Jakobo weeriit ne po aeng'. 
Genesis30:13 Ki le anyun Leah, “Agasigei! Amu tuun kuureno tiibiik ne igasegei.” Kiguure kainennyi Asher." 
Genesis30:14 Ki wo Reuben eng' peetuusyek che po kesisyetap nganuuk, ak kinyoor tuguuk che uu labotik eng' keeweet, ak ki ipchi kamet Leah. Ki leenji `Rael Leah eng' yooto, “Kaigai igoono tuguuchooto uu labotik, cho kaibu weeriing'ung'.”" 
Genesis30:15 Kowolji Leah koleenji, “Tos igeere ile ma kiy ngirebena manong'otyonnyu, ak imache irebena labotigap weeriinnyu ak icheek?” Kole Rael, “Myee koru koong'ung' rani amu labotigap weeriing'ung'.”" 
Genesis30:16 Ye ki punu Jakobo kewaniin koskoleny kwo Leah kotorookta ak koleenji, “Kanyool inyoo iru koonnyu, amu kaalin eng' labotigap weeriinnyu.” Ki ru anyun koonnyi kemounooto." 
Genesis30:17 Ak ki kas `Kamuktaindet Leah, ak ki manach, ak kosikyi Jakobo weeriit ne po muut." 
Genesis30:18 Ki le anyun Leah, “Kagogoono Kamuktaindet melektanyu, amu ki agoochi manong'otyonnyu otwogindennyu.” Kiguure anyun kainennyi Issakar." 
Genesis30:19 Ki manach Leah kogeny, ak ki sikyi Jakobo weeriit ne po lo." 
Genesis30:20 Ak ki le Leah, “Kagogoono Kamuktaindet kanyiok che myach; kobooch nguno ko kagitebi ak manong'otyondennyu, amu ki asikyi weeriik lo.” Kiguure kainennyi Zebulun." 
Genesis30:21 Kingo pata chooto kosich chepto, ak koguuree kainennyi Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Ki ibwaat `Kamuktaindet Rael, ak ki kas `Kamuktaindet ineendet ak kotyach moennyi." 
Genesis30:23 Ki manach ak kosich weeriit, ak kole, “Kagoistaiwo Kamuktaindet chotisyennyu.”" 
Genesis30:24 Ak kiguure kainennyi Joseph, ak kole, “Ingoteswa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor weeriit age.”" 
Genesis30:25 Ye kingo kagosich `Rael Joseph, koleenji `Jakobo Laban, “Meto awo, si kobiit awechigei agoi emennyu." 
Genesis30:26 Chamwo kwonyiikyuk ak lagokyuk amu ki aootin agobo icheeget, pagaakta awo, amu ingen inyee otwoknateennyu ne ki aootin.”" 
Genesis30:27 Koleenji Laban, “Ngo ki anyooru myeeindo eng' taing'ung', ki ageer komyee ale ki koberuura Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo inyee," 
Genesis30:28 ara mwaiwo melekto ne imache, si agoonin.”" 
Genesis30:29 Ki wolji Jakobo koleenji, “Ingen inyee ole ki aootiten, ak ole uu tuguuk che ki ayagi." 
Genesis30:30 Amu ki itinye che ng'ering' ye kitom aitu, ak ki kotesagis kochang'a; ak ki koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch ngap aitu. Ago nguno anyun, ko tos anyooru kotya si achopchi tuguuk piigap koonnyu?”" 
Genesis30:31 Ki leenji Laban, “Agoonin nee?” Ak ki le Jakobo, “Amegono kiy, ngot iyaiywo kii amache, amuuchi ayagun akwotisyeguk kogeny ak ariip." 
Genesis30:32 Chamwo achut akwotisyeguk tugul rani alewenoti, ak ateer ak atabaan artet age tugul ne ibisia ak ne pusye, ak aarwet age tugul ne tuui, ak ne ibisia, ak ne pusye, eng' ng'oroorek, si koek chooto melektanyu." 
Genesis30:33 Ak tuun paoryanjino imandanyu, ye tuun inyoo agobo melektanyu ne mi taing'ung'. Nginyoorcha ne ma ibisia ak ne ma pusye eng' ng'oroorek, ak ne ma tuui eng' aarek, iit ile ki kichoorei.”" 
Genesis30:34 Ki le Laban, “Keero, ingotep ko uu ye kaimwa.”" 
Genesis30:35 Ak ki itabaan Laban peetuunooto kwesik che keronen ak che pusyenen, ak iyuogik tugul che ibisyonen ak che pusyenen, ak age tugul ne ki tinyei che leelach, ak aarek tugul che tuuen, kokweri kogoochi weeriikyik." 
Genesis30:36 Ak ki wo Laban koistoegei Jakobo ne tee pandap peetuusyek somok, ak ki iyaga Jakobo neego che po Laban che ki ituuch." 
Genesis30:37 Kibut anyun Jakobo korokweek che po keetiik che uu siliboik che tuonen, ak che uu mobonik ak che uu kurinik, ak ki ibony kolegenitu si kotook ole leelachen eng' kirokwechooto." 
Genesis30:38 Ki lumda kirokwechooto ki ibony kotoorchi moingonik eng' ole ee peek neego; ak korisyo ko kabwa nyo koe peek. 
Genesis30:39 Kirisyo neego eng' taitap kirokweek, ak ki iyo neego che keronen ak che ibisyonen ak che pusyenen." 
Genesis30:40 Ki itabaan Jakobo aarek, ak kitokyi neego ole mi che keronen ak tugul che tuuen eng' neegap Laban. Ak ki inde akwotisyekyik oldanywa icheegei, ma ituiyo ak che po Laban." 
Genesis30:41 Eng' ui tugul ye ristos neego che neryootiin, konde Jakobo kirokweek eng' taitap konyegap neego eng' moingonik, si korisyo eng' ye mi kirokweek;" 
Genesis30:42 ago ki ma indochi neego che sogityotiin. Ki punji anyun Laban chooto sogityotiin, ak kobunji Jakobo che neryootiin." 
Genesis30:43 Ara ki ek mogoryo Jakobo miising' ak ki tinyei akwotisyek che chaang', tiibiik ak murenik che otwogik, tambeesik ak sigiroik." 
Genesis31:1 Ki kas anyun Jakobo kong'alaaldos weeriigap Laban koleen, “Ki kokweri Jakobo tugul che po kwandanyo; ak ki konyoor mogornatoni tee ni eng' tuguugap kwandanyo.”" 
Genesis31:2 Ak ki keer `Jakobo togeetap Laban kole ma ko uu atkinye tai. 
Genesis31:3 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo, “Ketitegei, ui emetap kwanisyeguk ole ki kisikyinin, ak ami kobooten.”" 
Genesis31:4 Ki iyookto Jakobo chii kwo kewaniin ole mi akweennyi koguur Rael ak Leah," 
Genesis31:5 ak ipkoleenji, “Ageere ale ma ko uu togeetap kwandang'wong' atkinye tai, ago kigotebi Kamuktaindet ne po abba kobooto." 
Genesis31:6 Ongen ole ki aoot kwandang'wong' eng' kimnateennyu tugul. 
Genesis31:7 Nga ki koberbera kwandang'wong' ak ki kowal melektanyu konyil taman, koma chamji Kamuktaindet koyaiywo ne ya." 
Genesis31:8 Ye kingo mwa kole, ‘Egu melektang'ung' che ibisyonen,’ ko ki iiyo anyun tugul che ibisyonen; ak ye kingo mwa kole, ‘Egu melektang'ung' che keronen,’ ko ki iiyo anyun tugul che keronen." 
Genesis31:9 Ko uu nooto anyun-i, kogigetune `Kamuktaindet kwandang'wong' akweet ak kogoono." 
Genesis31:10 Ak ye kingo machei korisyo neego, ageer eng' karwotitoet kwesik che laanyei neego ak ki keronen, ak che ibisyonen ak che mologonen." 
Genesis31:11 Ki kuura malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet eng' karwotitoet, kole, ‘Jakobo,’ ak ki ale, ‘Ami yu.’" 
Genesis31:12 Kole, ‘Keerote, si inai ile, keronen ak ko ibisyonen ak ko mologonen kwesik tugul, che laanyei neego; amu kaageer chooto tugul che yaun Laban." 
Genesis31:13 Anee Kamuktaindet ne po Bethel, ole ki iroong'jine mwaita toloita ak ki iyasyeunena. Ng'eet anyun, ui eng' emoni, iweege ole ki kisikyinin.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Ki wolji anyun Rael ak Leah koleenji, “Tos miitei kebeberta anan kiy ne kinyooru eng' kootap kwandanyo?" 
Genesis31:15 Tos ma ki itech keele ki po oor age? Ki koaldech ak kigoamenech tuguuk. 
Genesis31:16 Nenyo ak lagokyok mogornatoni ki ibe Kamuktaindet kwandanyo. Ara anyun yai kiy age tugul ne kagomwaun Kamuktaindet.” 
Genesis31:17 Ki ng'eet anyun Jakobo, ak kochop lagokyik ak kwonyiikyik kolaany tambeesik." 
Genesis31:18 Ki kweri akwotisyekyik tugul, ak tuguukyik tugul che kiga koyum, agot akwotisyek che kiga konyoor, che kiga koyum eng' Padan-aram, si kobiit kouto anyun koba kapkwandanyi Isak eng' emetap Kanaan." 
Genesis31:19 Kichoor Rael kanamonigap kwandanyi Laban, ye kigawo Laban kotil koroorigap keechiirekyik." 
Genesis31:20 Ki ng'aal `Jakobo Laban Syrianindet, amu ma mwachi koleenji amache awo, ago ki ung'atkei." 
Genesis31:21 Ki imweito anyun tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei; ak king'eet kolandae aineet, kwo kotokyigei tulweetap Gilead." 
Genesis31:22 Ye ki ngemwachi Laban eng' peetuutap somok keleenji, kogomwei Jakobo," 
Genesis31:23 komut tupchosyekyik, koba kobooto ineendet koosup, ak eng' peetuutap tisap konyoorchi tulweetap Gilead." 
Genesis31:24 Ki nyoonji `Kamuktaindet Laban Syrianindet kemoi eng' karwotitoet koleenji, “Riipkei, amemwachi Jakobo ng'olyoo, ne myee anan ne ya.”" 
Genesis31:25 Ki it anyun Laban ole mi Jakobo. Kiga teech Jakobo emainnyi eng' tulweet. Ki nyo koteech Laban ak tupchosyekyik ak icheek tulweetap Gilead. 
Genesis31:26 Koleenji `Laban Jakobo, “Ki iyai nee kot ing'ala ak iung'anugei, ak imutu tiibiikyuk ko uu luulenik che ki kiname rotwetap chok?" 
Genesis31:27 Kilya si imweu iung'anugei ak ing'ala, ne ma imwaiwo, si kobiit aunden iwe eng' poiboiyet ak tyenwogik, ak sugutit ne ming'in ak ketubet;" 
Genesis31:28 ak ma igang'wa ang'utut weeriikyuk ak tiibiikyuk? Ki iyai eng' perberyo. 
Genesis31:29 Atinye kimnateet ayaiywok ne ya; ago kong'alaalwo Kamuktaindetap kwandang'wong' lagat koleenjo, ‘Riipkei, si memwachi Jakobo kiy ne myee anan ne ya.’" 
Genesis31:30 Ago angen ale koitau panda, amu amin emo agobo kootap kwandang'ung', ago kilya si ichoor kanamonikyuk?”" 
Genesis31:31 Kowolji `Jakobo Laban koleenji, “Amu ki aiyweisye, ale, abeere imuuchi irebena tiibiiguk eng' kimnateet." 
Genesis31:32 Ago meei age tugul ne inyoorchini kanamoniguk. Inyit eng' taitap tupchosyekyok kiy age tugul ne neng'ung' ne atinye si iip.” Amu ki ma nai Jakobo kole kichoor Rael tuguuchooto. 
Genesis31:33 Ki chut anyun Laban emaitap Jakobo, ne po Leah ak emaitap otwogik aeng' che tiibiik ago ma nyoor kanamonichooto. Yeityo komong' eng' emait ne po Leah ak kochut ne po Rael." 
Genesis31:34 Kingo kagoip Rael kanamonichooto konde tuguuk oriit che ki iitoe tambeesik ak kotebee. Ak ki isyach Laban ola tugul kosapsabat eng' emait ago ma nyoor. 
Genesis31:35 Ak ki leenji `Rael kwandanyi, “Amat konereekyo kiptaiyandennyu, amu ma muuchi ang'eet eng' taing'ung'; kanama atebeetap kwonyiik.” Ak ki cheeng' kot, ago ma nyoor kanamonik." 
Genesis31:36 Ki nereech anyun Jakobo ak kobolyo ak Laban. Ki wolji `Jakobo Laban koleenji, “Nee lelutyennyu? Nee chalwoktonyu, kot isubwo ko uu ni eng' nereegek?" 
Genesis31:37 Nga kaisyach ak isapsabate tuguukyuk tugul, ko nee ne po tuguugap koong'ung' ne kenyooru? Nde yu, taitap tupchosyekyuk ak tupchosyeguk, si kobiit kobesyewech acheek tuwai." 
Genesis31:38 Ki atebi kobooten eng' kenyisyechu tiptem; ma oos keechiireguk ak ng'orooreguk, ama aam mengichigap akweeng'ung'." 
Genesis31:39 Ak ki ma aibun ne ki par tyondo kotonaton; ki ageerunenen nenyu. Ki imagena nooto, ngo ne kiga kichoor peet anan ngo ne kiga kichoor kemoi." 
Genesis31:40 Ki atebi ko uu nooto, kibiro kiptoret peet, ak ki para kaitityet kemoi ak ki ma anuuchi." 
Genesis31:41 Ki atebee koong'ung' eng' kenyisyechu tiptem; ki aootin kenyiisyek taman ak ang'wan agobo tiibiiguk aeng', ak ki aootin kenyiisyek lo agobo akwotisyeguk, ak ki iwal melektanyu konyil taman." 
Genesis31:42 Nda ki ma komi kobooto Kamuktaindet ne po abba, Kamuktaindetap Abraham, ak Ineendet ne iywei Isak, ko kiteona awo puch. Kogogeer Kamuktaindet nyalildanyu ak poisyetap eunekyuk, ak kogerin kong' lagat anyun amu nooto.”" 
Genesis31:43 Eng' yooto kowolji `Laban Jakobo koleenji, “Tipchu ko tiibiikyuk, ak lagochu ko lagokyuk, ak akwotisyechu ko akwotisyekyuk, ak tuguuchu tugul igeere ko chechuuk. Ago alyonjini anyun tipchuchuk rani, ak lagokwak che ki kosich?" 
Genesis31:44 Ara anyun, nyoo kiyasyechigei, inyee ak anee; si koek paornateet eng' kwenunnyo, inyee ak anee.”" 
Genesis31:45 Ki nam anyun Jakobo koita kolumda koek toloita. 
Genesis31:46 Ak koleenji Jakobo tupchosyekyik, “Oyum koik,” ak ki iyum koik, yeityo koruruuch; ak ki amis eng' ye neegitee karurugutyonooto po koik." 
Genesis31:47 Ak kiguure Laban yooto Jegar-sahadutha, ago kiguure Jakobo Galeed." 
Genesis31:48 Ki le Laban, “Karurugutyoni ko paornateet eng' kwenunnyoo, inyee ak anee ra.” Ki kiguure anyun kainetap yooto Galeed amu nooto," 
Genesis31:49 ak ki kiguure kogeny Mispa, amu ki le, “Ingoek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor riibindet eng' kwenunnyoo, inyee ak anee, ye ma kigeeregei." 
Genesis31:50 Ngot ko tuun ius tiibiikyuk, anan ngot ko tuun itun kwonyiik alak isyone tiibiikyuk, nga ma mi chii kwenunnyoo, ko paoryat Kamuktaindet eng' kwenunnyoo, inyee ak anee.”" 
Genesis31:51 Yeityo koleenji `Laban Jakobo, “Keer karurugutyoni, keer toloi, ne kaalumde eng' kwenunnyoo, inyee ak anee." 
Genesis31:52 Paoryat karurugutyoni, ak paoryat toloi ale si ma siiru karurugutyoni anyoo ayaun kiy ne ya, ak si mesiiru aginye karurugutyoni ak toloi, inyoo iyaiywo kiy ne ya." 
Genesis31:53 Ingorwookseiywech Kamuktaindetap Abraham, ak Kamuktaindetap Nahor, Kamuktaindetap kwandanywa.” Ak ki iyasyo Jakobo agobo Ineendet ne iywei Isak kwandanyi." 
Genesis31:54 Ki igoito Jakobo tiseiywot eng' tulweet, yeityo koguur tupchosyekyik kobwa koamis. Ki amis ak kiruiyo tulwoonooto eng' lagatunooto." 
Genesis31:55 Ak king'eet Laban karon miising', kong'utut mochogoronikyik ak tiibiikyik ak ki iberuur. Yeityo kwo anyun Laban koweektagei oldanyi." 
Genesis32:1 Ki wo anyun Jakobo pandanyi, ak ki tuiyo ak malaikaisyegap Kamuktaindet," 
Genesis32:2 ak ye kingo keer Jakobo icheek, kole, “Lugeetap Kamuktaindet ni!” Koguure anyun yooto Mahanaim." 
Genesis32:3 Ki iyookto Jakobo piik kondoe ineendet koba ole mi ng'eetap kamet Esau agoi emetap Seir, nooto ko kooretap Edom." 
Genesis32:4 Ki ng'at icheek koleenji, “Omwachi kiptaiyandennyu Esau ko uu ni: Oleenji, Kamwa otwogindeng'ung' Jakobo ko uu ni, ‘Ki aegu toondet eng' kap Laban ak ki atebee olooto agoi ra." 
Genesis32:5 Atinye eiik ak sigiroik, akwotisyek che po neego ak otwogik che murenik ak che tiibiik. Kaayogu anyun nguno inyoo kemwaun inyee kiptaiyandennyu, si kobiit anyoor chameet eng' taing'ung'.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Ak kiweekyigei Jakobo che kiga kiyookto, ak koleenji, “Kogeit ole mi ng'eetap kamenng'ung' Esau ak nyoonei ineendet kotorogun, nyoonei kobooto piik pogol ang'wan.”" 
Genesis32:7 Ki iywei ak koaragen anyun Jakobo miising'.Yeityo kopcheune aeng' piik che ki mi tugul, ak neego, tuuga ak tambeesik," 
Genesis32:8 ak kobwaat kole, “Ngo tuiyo Esau ak che po tai, ak kobar, komuuchi kochililso che po let.”" 
Genesis32:9 Ak ki le Jakobo, “Ee, Kamuktaindet ne po abba Abraham, ak Kamuktaindet ne po abba Isak, Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki imwaiwo ileenjo, ‘Iweekyigei emeng'ung', kaptilyonutiguk, ak ayaun ne myee,’" 
Genesis32:10 ma nyoljino anyoor rireeneng'ung' ne po kei tugul, ak imanit tugul, ne ki iboorchi otwogindeng'ung', amu ki alandae ainooni po Jordan ak kiroktonyu kityo, ak nguno ko kapcheunegei aeng'." 
Genesis32:11 Asaain ale isarwo eng' eutap tupchennyu Esau, amu aiywei ineendet, ale nyoonei inyo kobara, kobooto kamet ak lagok." 
Genesis32:12 Ago ki imwa ile, ‘Ayaun ne myee iman, ak ayae iyoteng'ung' kochang'a ko uu ng'aniegap nyanjet che ma iitoksei amu chaang'.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Ki ru yooto anyun lagatunooto, ak kochop kagoochinet eng' tuguukyik che ki tinyei si kogoochi ng'eetap kamet Esau." 
Genesis32:14 Ki chop iyuogik pogol aeng' che po ng'oroorek kobooto kwesik tiptem, iyuogik pogol aeng' che po keechiirek ak mengichik tiptem," 
Genesis32:15 tambeesik che abaen sosom kobooto moekwak, tuuga iyuogik artam kobooto kiruugik taman ak iyuogik tiptem che po sigiroik ak moek taman che po sigiroik." 
Genesis32:16 Ki igoochi otwogikyik kokweri akweet age tugul ineegei, ak koleenji otwogikyik, “Oba olande ondoena, among' koriikyi akweet age akweet age.”" 
Genesis32:17 Ki ng'at ne po tai, koleenji, “Ye tuiyenen Esau tupchennyu, ak koteebenen kole, ‘Ii po ng'oo? Iwendi ano? Ak po ng'oo chu mi taing'ung'?’" 
Genesis32:18 Ileenji anyun, ‘Po otwogindeng'ung' Jakobo; kagoochinet ne kiyookyin kiptaiyandennyu Esau; ak nyoonei ineendet eng' let.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Ki ng'at ne po aeng', ne po somok ak tugul che isubi akwotisyek, koleenji, “Ye otuiye ak Esau, omwachi ko uu ni oleenji," 
Genesis32:20 ‘Keero, nyoonei eng' let otwogindeng'ung' Jakobo.’ ” Amu ki le, “Amuuchi agaigai eng' kagoochinet ne wendi eng' tainnyu, ye ibata amuuchi ageer togeennyi tamangap kocham kotaacha.”" 
Genesis32:21 Ki indo anyun kagoochinet kolanda ak koru ineendet lagatunooto kobooto piik. 
Genesis32:22 Ki ng'eet kemounooto komut kwonyiikyik tuwai, otwogikyik tuwai che tiibiik ak lagokyik taman ak agenge, agoi kolandae tabartap Jabbok." 
Genesis32:23 Ki imut koba kolandae kererunooto, kobooto tuguukyik che ki tinyei." 
Genesis32:24 Ki ng'et Jakobo ineegei, ak ki piit chiito ne kikwetkei tuwai agoi koeech." 
Genesis32:25 Ye kingo keer kole mata komuuch koterteer, kotwa ole tuiyechin kawegap ngoroet; ak king'ulyel kubestap Jakobo, ye kikwetegei ak ineendet." 
Genesis32:26 Yeityo kole, “Metoo awo, amu machei koeech.” Ago ki leenji Jakobo, “Ma undoin ama iberuuro.”" 
Genesis32:27 Ki teebe anyun koleenji, “Ng'oo kaineng'ung'?” Ak ki leenji, “Kiguureno Jakobo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Kowolji koleenji, “Ma keguurenen Jakobo agoi, ago ka kiguurenen Israel, amu kaobelgei ak Kamuktaindet ak piik ak icheek, ak kaiterteer.”" 
Genesis32:29 ki teebee anyun Jakobo koleenji, “Asaain ale, mwaiwo kaineng'ung'.” Ago ki leenji, “Amu nee si iteebena kainennyu?” Ak ki iberuur ineendet eng' yooto." 
Genesis32:30 Ki kuure anyun Jakobo kainetap yooto Peniel, amu kaager togeetap Kamuktaindet kimni, ak kota asabe." 
Genesis32:31 Kichor asiista ye kilandae Penuel, ak ki ing'woloti amu kubestanyi." 
Genesis32:32 Nooto amu nee si ma amei piigap Israel tigityotap ngoroet kobooch yooto agoi kora; amu kitwa ole tuiyechin kawegap ngoroetap Jakobo eng' tigityotap ngoroet. 
Genesis33:1 Kitabendo Jakobo ak kogeer konyonei Esau kobooto piik pogol ang'wan. Kipchei anyun lagok kopchechi Leah ak Rael, ak otwogichooto aeng'." 
Genesis33:2 Ki chop kondo otwogichooto ak lagokwak, yeityo korup Leah ak lagokyik, kolet eng' tugul Rael ak Joseph." 
Genesis33:3 Ki indoe `ineendet icheek, yeityo kong'uruuk agoi ng'wony konyil tisap, agoi koriikyi ng'eetap kamet." 
Genesis33:4 Ago kilabat Esau kotorookta, ak konam koue euut, kosuup kaatinnyi, kong'utut ak ki riiryo." 
Genesis33:5 Ye kingo tabendo Esau, kogeer kwonyiik ak lagok, ak kiteebe koleenji, “Ng'oo chu omi tugul?” Ak ki le Jakobo, “Lagok che ki igoochi Kamuktaindet otwogindeng'ung' eng' rireenennyi po kei.”" 
Genesis33:6 Ki riik anyun otwogichooto ak lagokwak, ak kobwa kong'uruukso." 
Genesis33:7 Kiriik Leah agine ak lagokyik kobwa kong'uruukso; ak kingo pata koriik Joseph ak Rael, ak kong'uruukso ak icheek." 
Genesis33:8 ki teebee Esau koleenji, “Po nee akwotisyechu tugul kaatuiye?” Koleenji, “Si kobiit anyoor chameet eng' taitap kiptaiyandennyu.”" 
Genesis33:9 Ago ki le Esau, “Atinye che yamo tupchennyu; ingobunjin chooto itinye.”" 
Genesis33:10 Koleenji Jakobo, “Achicha, asaain ale, ngo kaanyooru chameet eng' taing'ung', ko myee itaach chu kagoonin eng' eunnyu; amu kaageer togeng'ung', ko uu ye kigeere togeetap Kamuktaindet, ak ageere anyun ale ibaibai eng' anee." 
Genesis33:11 Asaain ale, taach inyee che kagoonin che kagigetun; amu ki yaiywo Kamuktaindet ne myee, ak amu atinye che yamo.” Ak ki igaigai kot kocham kokweri." 
Genesis33:12 Ak ki le Esau, “Ongenam panda keebe, si andoenen.”" 
Genesis33:13 Ago ki leenji `Jakobo Esau, “Ingen inyee kiptainandennyu, ile mengeechen lagok, tinyei neego aarek ak kotinyei tuuga moek, ngot kekweri eng' peetuut komugul, komuuch kobek akwotisyek tugul." 
Genesis33:14 Asaain kiptaiyandennyu ale, indoena anee otwogindeng'ung', si aree anee komutyo ko uu pandap akweet ak ne po lagok, agoi aitu ole mi kiptaiyandennyu eng' Seir.”" 
Genesis33:15 Koleenji Esau, “Ngabagagun piikyuk alak che mi kobootoo.” Ago ki wol Jakobo kole, “Koyai nee? Ingogaswo kiptaiyandennyu ko uu nooto.”" 
Genesis33:16 Ki week anyun Esau peetuunooto eng' pandanyi agoi Seir. 
Genesis33:17 Ago ki wo Jakobo agoi Sukoth, kwo koteekyigei koot, ak ki teech kaptugusyek; ki kiguure anyun yooto Sukoth." 
Genesis33:18 Ki it Jakobo anyun eng' kaalyeet nganaseetap Shekem, ne miitei emetap Kanaan, ye ki punu Padan-aram; ak kwo koteech emainnyi ole tokyingei nganaseet." 
Genesis33:19 Ak ki al kooret eng' piigap Hamor, kwandap Shekem, eng' silingisyek pogol agenge, ole kigateech emainnyi." 
Genesis33:20 Ki teech kaptisisyet eng' olooto, ak koguure kaptisisyonooto El-eloe-Israel." 
Genesis34:1 Ki wo anyun Dina cheptap Leah, ne ki sikyi Jakobo kwo kogeer tiibiigap emonooto." 
Genesis34:2 Kingo keer Shekem, weeriitap Hamor ne po Hibiik, kirwoogindetap emonooto, konam koosup ineendet, konyeeree ak koteweer." 
Genesis34:3 Ki cham muguleldanyi Dina cheptap Jakobo ak kong'alaalji ineendet kogaigai. 
Genesis34:4 Ki ng'alaalji `Shekem kwandanyi Hamor, koleenji, “Weiywo koito chebooto si kobiit atun.”" 
Genesis34:5 Ye Kingo kas anyun Jakobo kole kagonyeere kong'em chiichooto cheptonyi Dina, ko amu ki iyagisyei weeriikyik eng' kewanin, kogisiis agoi koit icheek." 
Genesis34:6 Ki wo anyun Hamor kwandap Shekem kole kong'alaaljin ak Jakobo agobo nooto. 
Genesis34:7 Kingo week kaa anyun weeriigap Jakobo kobunu kewanin, kogas agobo ng'aleechooto. Ki kas ng'wanindo murenjoto ak kinereekso kot, amu ki yai Shekem abusnat eng' Israel konyeeree cheptap Jakobo; kiit ne teweernat ne ma kichamei keyai." 
Genesis34:8 Ago king'alaalji Hamor icheeget, koleenji, “Machei Shekem weeriinnyu cheptong'wong' miising'. Asoomok ale, ogoochi ineendet kotun." 
Genesis34:9 Myee keegu piik che kigoonegei. Ogoonech tiibiikwok ak otun chechook ak okweek. 
Genesis34:10 Ongemeng'jine, ak mi emoni taing'wong'. Omeng'iisyei ak oyae mung'aaret, ak onyoorchi mogornateet.”" 
Genesis34:11 Ki leenji `Shekem kwandap Dina ak tupchosyegap Dina, “Myee anyoor chameet eng' taing'wong', ak kiy age tugul ne omwaiwo amuuchi agoonok." 
Genesis34:12 Agoonok kanyiok che tee che omache, ak kagoochinoik, ago ogoono chepto atun.”" 
Genesis34:13 Amu kiga ng'em tupchennywa Dina, kogiwolji eng' ng'aalseet `weeriigap Jakobo Shekem kobooto kwandanyi Hamor," 
Genesis34:14 koleenji, “Ma kimuuchi keyai kiit ne uu niito kigoochi chii ne ma kimuratan tupchennyo, amu egu teweernat nooto eng' acheek." 
Genesis34:15 Kimuuchi kechamyechi ak okweek eng' ng'olyoondoni kityo, ngo cham oigei acheek, keyatita muren age tugul eng' okweek." 
Genesis34:16 Eng' nooto anyun kegoonok tiibiikyok, ak kitun tiibiikwok ak icheek, ak kemeny kobootok ak keegu agenge." 
Genesis34:17 Ago ngot ko mogaseech ak ocham keyatitak, kimuti anyun cheptonyo, ak keebe.”" 
Genesis34:18 Ki cham anyun Hamor ak Shekem weeriitap Hamor ng'aleekwak. 
Genesis34:19 Ak ma igagei murenonooto koyai ko uu nooto, amu ki kacham miising' cheptap Jakobo, ak ki kigonyiti ineendet kosiir piik tugul che po kootap kwandanyi." 
Genesis34:20 Ki pa anyun Hamor ak weeriinnyi Shekem ormariichetap nganasennywa, ak kong'alaal ak piigap nganasennywa, koleenjigei," 
Genesis34:21 “Kichamdosi ak pichuuto; eng' nooto anyun, myee komeny emoni, ak koyai mung'aaret eng' olito, amu paraa emoni, yamei icheek. Ongitun tiibiikwak ak kigoochi chechook ak icheek kotun." 
Genesis34:22 Ago imuuchi pichooto kocham komeny kobootech, ak keegu agenge, ngot kechamyechi kiit agenge, nooto ko keyatita muren age tugul eng' acheek, ko uu ye yaatitoi icheek." 
Genesis34:23 Tos ma punjinech akwotisyekwak che po neego ak tuguukwak ak tuukwak tugul? Ongecham ng'olyoondoniito kityo, si komeny kobootech.”" 
Genesis34:24 Ak ki cham ng'aleegap Hamor ak Shekem weeriikyik tugul che kimandae ormariichetap nganasennyi, ak ki kiyatita muren age tugul." 
Genesis34:25 Eng' peetuutap somok ye ki myandos, konam age tugul rotwennyi po chok, eng' weerchooto aeng' po Jakobo, Simion ak Lawi, tupchosyegap Dina, koba nganaseet eng' nyiganateet ak kobar murenik tugul." 
Genesis34:26 Ki par Hamor ak Shekem weeriinnyi eng' rotwetap chok, ak komut Dina eng' kootap Shekem, koba emennywa." 
Genesis34:27 Ki pwa weeriigap Jakobo ole mi piik che kagebar, ak kiluul nganaseet, amu kiga kong'em chepkametinnywa." 
Genesis34:28 Kiluul keechiirekwak, tuukwak, sigirokwak, kiy age tugul ne ki mi nganaseet ak tuguuk che ki mi mbareenik." 
Genesis34:29 Ki iluul kora tuguukwak tugul, lagokwak, kwonyiikwak ak koip tugul agot che ki mi kooriik." 
Genesis34:30 Yeityo koleenji `Jakobo Simion ak Lawi, “Kaoimaa, ak kaogoono aek ne kiwechei eng' piik che menyei emoni, eng' Kanaanik ak Perisik. Acheek kota ko ki ng'ering', ago imuuchi icheek koyumjagei, kobara kowoong'wo kobooto koonnyu.”" 
Genesis34:31 Ago ki le icheek, “Tos kanyoolu koyai tupchennyo koek chepkugonio?”" 
Genesis35:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Jakobo, “Ng'eet, ui togoste Bethel, imeny oliindo, ak iteekyi Kamuktaindet kaptisisyet eng' olooto, ineendet ne ki mong'jin ye ki imwee ng'eetap kamenng'ung' Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Ki mwachi Jakobo anyun piigap koonnyi, ak tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet koleenji, “Olakte kanamonik che mi kwenung'wong' che po pororyosyek alak, oanyinygei ak owal ngoroikwok." 
Genesis35:3 Ong'eetyee anyun, keebe ketogoste Bethel, si awo ateekyi Kamuktaindet kaptisisyet eng' oliindo, ineendet ne ki wolwo eng' peetuutap pichiindanyu ak ki mi kobooto eng' pandanyu.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ki igoochi anyun `pichooto Jakobo kanamonichooto tugul po pororyosyek alak che ki tinyei, ak munaok che ki mi itiikwak, ak ki uny Jakobo chooto eng' keetitap alayet keel ne ki mi Shekem." 
Genesis35:5 Ak ye kibendi anyun, ko ki tebee kamuisetap Kamuktaindet nganasook che ki mi ole neegitee icheeget, ak ma isup icheek weeriigap Jakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Ki it anyun Jakobo Luz (nooto ko Bethel), ne mi emetap Kanaan, ak piik tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet." 
Genesis35:7 Ki teech kaptisisyet eng' olooto, ak koguure olooto El-bet-el, amu yooto ko ye king'aang'jinegei Kamuktaindet, ye kingo mwee ng'eetap kamet." 
Genesis35:8 Ak kime Debora cheplakwetap Rebeka, ak ki kitupchi ole neegitee Bethel, eng' keetit keel ne ki mi olooto. Ki kiguure keetoto Alon-bakut." 
Genesis35:9 Komong'ji `Kamuktaindet Jakobo kogeny, ye ki punu Padan-aram, ak koberuur ineendet." 
Genesis35:10 Koleenji Kamuktaindet, “Kaineng'ung' ko Jakobo; ma keguurenen Jakobo kogeny, ago ngeguurenen Israel.” Ak kiguure kainennyi Israel." 
Genesis35:11 Ak koleenji Kamuktaindet, “Aa Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet. Ii ak itesage, tuun mong'unenen inyee pororyet ak chaang'indap pororyosyek, ak mang'unen laitorinik." 
Genesis35:12 Tuun agoonin emonooto ki agoochi Abraham ak Isak, ak agoochini lagoguk ak icheek che tuun piitu let.”" 
Genesis35:13 Ki wo anyun Kamuktaindet eng' yooto kotogosta eng' ole ki ng'alaale. 
Genesis35:14 Ki lumda Jakobo toloita eng' yooto ki ng'alaale, toloita ne po koita, ak koroong'ji kagoochinet ne po tuguuk che kieei, yeityo koroong'ji mwaita." 
Genesis35:15 Ak kiguure Jakobo kainetap yooto ki ng'alaale ak Kamuktaindet, Bethel." 
Genesis35:16 Ki pa anyun eng' Bethel, ak kingo tomo koit Eprat, koam moet Rael, ak konyoor pichiindo eng' moonooto" 
Genesis35:17 Ye ki machei kosigiis eng' pichiindo, koleenji chebyosetap sigisyo, “Meiywei amu imache isich weeriit age nguno.”" 
Genesis35:18 Ye kingo machei kome Rael, koguuree lakwanooto kainennyi Ben-Oni, ago kiguure `kwandanyi lakwanooto Benjamin." 
Genesis35:19 Ki me Rael, ak ki kitupchi ooreet ne wendi Eprat (yooto ko Bethlehem)." 
Genesis35:20 Ak ki lumda Jakobo toloita eng' kererinnyi, toloatap kereritap Rael ne agoi ra." 
Genesis35:21 Kiu anyun Israel, ak ki teech emainnyi taitap teekseet ne kooi eng' Eder." 
Genesis35:22 Ye kita komenyei Israel emonooto, kwo Reuben koruiyo ak Bila, chebaigeiyatap kwandanyi; ak ki kas Israel ng'olyoondonooto. Ki taman ak aeng' weeriigap Jakobo." 
Genesis35:23 Chu ko weeriigap Leah: ne po tai ko Reuben, (ne oo ne po Jakobo) Simion, Lawi, Judah, Issakar, ak Zebulun." 
Genesis35:24 Chu ko weeriigap Rael: Joseph ak Benjamin. 
Genesis35:25 Chu ko weeriigap Bila, kwondo ne ki otwogindetap Rael: Dan ak Naphtali." 
Genesis35:26 Chu ko weeriigap Silba, kwondo ne ki otwogindetap Leah: Gad ak Asher. Chuuto ko ki weeriigap Jakobo che kisichei eng' Padan-aram." 
Genesis35:27 Ki it anyun Jakobo Mamre, kap Isak kwandanyi, eng' Kiriath-arba (nooto ko Hebron), ole ki cham komenyei Abraham ak Isak ye kita ko toek." 
Genesis35:28 Kenyiisyegap Isak ko ki pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit. 
Genesis35:29 Ki ilil Isak, ak ki kiyum kobooto piikwak, ko poiyo ne kiga koosit miising'. Ak kitup ineendet weeriikyik Esau ak Jakobo." 
Genesis36:1 Chu ko ortinwegap Esau (nooto ko Edom). 
Genesis36:2 Ki itun Esau tiibiigap Kanaan: Adah cheptap Elon Hitindet, Oholibamah cheptap Anah ne ki cheptap Sibeon Hibindet," 
Genesis36:3 ak Basemath cheptap Ishmael, chepkametap Nebaiot." 
Genesis36:4 Ki sikyi Adah Esau Eliphas, ak ki sich `Basemath Reuel." 
Genesis36:5 Ki sich `Oholibamah Jeush, Jalam, ak Kora. Chooto ko weeriigap Esau, che kisichei eng' emetap Kanaan." 
Genesis36:6 Ki imut `Esau kwonyiikyik, weeriikyik, tiibiikyik ak piik tugul che po koonnyi, tuukyik, akwotisyekyik tugul ak tuguukyik tugul, che kiga koyumjigei eng' emetap Kanaan ak kiu kwo emet age kolooit eng' ng'eetap kamet Jakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Amu ki chaang' tuguukwak miising' kot koma imuuch komeng'jin tuwai. Ki ma koyamei icheek tuwai emet ne kibunoti amu akwotisyekwak. 
Genesis36:8 Ki meny anyun Esau tulweetap Seir; Esau ko Edom. 
Genesis36:9 Chu ko ortinwegap Esau, kwandap Edomik eng' tulweetap Seir." 
Genesis36:10 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Esau: Eliphas weeriitap Adah kwondap Esau, Reuel weeriitap Basemath, kwondap Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Weeriigap Eliphas ko ki Teman, Omar, Sepo, Gatam ak Kenas." 
Genesis36:12 Timna ko ki chebaigeiyatap Eliphas weeriitap Esau, ak ki sikyi Eliphas Amelek. Chuuto ko weeriigap Adah ne po Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Chu ko weeriigap Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah ak Missah. Chooto ko ki weeriigap Basemath ne po Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Chu ko ki weeriigap Oholibamah kwondap Esau, cheptap Anah, ne ki cheptap Sibeon: Jeush, Jalam, ak Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Chuuto ko kirwoogigap weeriigap Esau. Weeriigap Eliphas, ne oo ne po Esau: kirwoogindet Teman, kirwoogindet Omar, kirwoogindet Sepo, kirwoogindet Kenas," 
Genesis36:16 kirwoogindet Kora, kirwoogindet Gatam, ak kirwoogindet Amelek. Chuuto ko kirwoogik che kisichei Eliphas eng' emetap Edom, chuuto ko weeriigap Adah." 
Genesis36:17 Chu ko weeriigap Reuel weeriitap Esau: kirwoogindet Nahath, kirwoogindet Zerah, kirwoogindet Shammah, ak kirwoogindet Missah. Chuuto ko kirwoogik che kisichei Reuel eng' emetap Edom, chuuto ko weeriigap Basemath kwondap Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Chu ko weeriigap Oholibamah kwondap Esau: kirwoogindet Jeush, kirwoogindet Jalam, ak kirwoogindet Kora. Chuuto ko kirwoogik che kisichei Oholibamah, kwondap Esau cheptap Anah." 
Genesis36:19 Chuuto ko weeriigap Esau, ineendet ko Edom, ak chuuto ko kirwoogikwak." 
Genesis36:20 Chu ko weeriigap Seir Horindet, che ki menyei emonooto: Lotan, Shobal, Sibeon, Anah," 
Genesis36:21 Dishon, Eser ak Dishan; chuuto ko kirwoogik che ki mang'une Horik, piigap Seir eng' emetap Edom." 
Genesis36:22 Lagogap Lotan ko ki Hori ak Hemam; ak chepkametap Lotan ko ki Timna. 
Genesis36:23 Chu ko lagogap Shobal: Alban, Manahat, Ebal, Sepo ak Onam." 
Genesis36:24 Chu ko lagogap Sibeon: Aja ak Anah; Anah niito ko ne kinyoor kong'igap peek che peelei piich eng' surkwen, ye ki iyagi sigiroigap Sibeon kwandanyi." 
Genesis36:25 Chu ko lagogap Anah: Dishon ak Oholibamah cheptap Anah. 
Genesis36:26 Chu ko lagogap Dishon: Hemdan, Eshban, Itran ak Keran." 
Genesis36:27 Chu ko lagogap Eser: Bilan, Saavan ak Akan." 
Genesis36:28 Chu ko lagogap Dishan: Us ak Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Chuuto ko kirwoogik che ki mang'une Horik; kirwoogindet Lotan, kirwoogindet Shobal, kirwoogindet Sibeon, kirwoogindet Anah," 
Genesis36:30 kirwoogindet Dishon, kirwoogindet Eser, kirwoogindet Dishan; chuuto ko kirwoogik che ki mang'une Horik, ko uu kirwoogikwak eng' emetap Seir." 
Genesis36:31 Chu laitorinik che ki laitorane emetap Edom, ye ki tomo kobiit laitoryat ne pou piigap Israel." 
Genesis36:32 Ki laitorane Edom Bela weeriitap Beor, kainetap nganasennyi ko ki Dinaba." 
Genesis36:33 Ki igeskei Bela, ak ki nam laitornatennyi Jobap weeriitap Zerah ne po Bosra." 
Genesis36:33 Ki igeskei Bela, ak ki nam laitornatennyi Jobap weeriitap Zerah ne po Bosra." 
Genesis36:34 Kingo keskei Jobap, konam laitornatennyi Husam ne po emetap Temanik." 
Genesis36:34 Kingo keskei Jobap, konam laitornatennyi Husam ne po emetap Temanik." 
Genesis36:35 Ak kingo keskei Husam, konam laitornatennyi Hadad weeriitap Bedad, ne ki par Midianik eng' turguitap Moab, ak kainetap nganasennyi ko ki Abit." 
Genesis36:36 Ko ye kingo keskei Hadad, konam laitornatennyi Samlah ne po Masreka." 
Genesis36:37 Ak kingo keskei Samlah, konam Saulo laitornatennyi ne po Rehoboth nganaseet ne neegitee aineet." 
Genesis36:38 Kingo keskei Saulo, konam Baal-hanan weeriitap Akbor laitornatennyi." 
Genesis36:39 Ki igeskei Baal-hanan weeriitap Akbor, ak ki nam Hadar laitornatennyi, ak kainetap nganasennyi ko ki Pau; ak kainetap kwondonyi ko ki Mehetabel cheptap Matred, cheptap Me-sahab." 
Genesis36:40 Chu kainaigap kirwoogik che ki mang'une Esau, ko uu ortinwekwak, ko uu korotinwekwak ak ko uu kainaikwak: kirwoogindet Timna, kirwoogindet Alba, kirwoogindet Jetet," 
Genesis36:41 kirwoogindet Oholibamah, kirwoogindet Elah, kirwoogindet Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 kirwoogindet Kenas, kirwoogindet Teman, kirwoogindet Mibsar," 
Genesis36:43 kirwoogindet Magdiel, kirwoogindet Iram. Chuuto ko kirwoogigap Edom (niito ko Esau kwandap Edomik), ko uu meng'ootennywa eng' emet ne ki nenywa." 
Genesis37:1 Ki meny anyun Jakobo emetap Kanaan ole kitoo kwan. 
Genesis37:2 Chu ortinwegap Jakobo. Kiga koit Joseph kenyiisyek taman ak tisap ye ki iyagoti akweetap kerichek kobooto tupchosyekyik. Ki mi weerooto kobooto weeriigap Bila, ak weeriigap Silba, kwonyiigap kwandanyi, ak ki ibu ineendet ng'aleekwak che yaacheen komwachin kwandanywa." 
Genesis37:3 Ki chamei anyun `Israel Joseph kosiir weeriikyik tugul, amu kisichei ko kagoosit, ak kinapchi ngoryeet ne kooi ne poochin eunek." 
Genesis37:4 Ago ye kingo keer weeriik che tupcho kole chamei kwandanywa ineendet kosiir icheek tugul, kowech miising' kot ko mata kocham kong'alaalji ineendet eng' kaalyeet." 
Genesis37:5 Ki irwotyi Joseph karwotitoet, ak ye kingo mwachi weeriik che tupcho, ko kites icheek kowech ineendet kosiir." 
Genesis37:6 Ki leenji icheek, “Kaigai ogas karwotitaoni koarwotyi:" 
Genesis37:7 Ogeero, ko ki rate peek che mi ak mobeek eng' mbar, ak kong'eetyo peekyuk che koarat kotononso, yeityo koyiem peekwok che koorat peek chechuuk ak kong'uruukyi.”" 
Genesis37:8 Koleenji weeriik che tupcho, “Ileen tos tuun ilaitoranenech? Anan tos tuun iboiywech?” Ki tes anyun kowech ineendet kosiir amu karwotitaosyekyik ak ng'aleekyik." 
Genesis37:9 Ki irwotyi karwotitoet age kogeny, ak komwachi tupchosyekyik koleenji, “Ogeero, koarwotyi kogeny karwotitoet: koing'uruukyoo asiista ak arawet ak kecheik taman ak agenge.”" 
Genesis37:10 Ago ye ki mwachi kwandanyi ak weeriik che tupcho, ko ki kergong' kwandanyi ineendet ak koteebe koleenji, “Nee karwotitaoni koirwotyi? Tos king'uruukyin agoi ng'wony iman agot anee ak kamenng'ung' ak tupchosyeguk?”" 
Genesis37:11 Ki am ng'et kong' anyun tupchosyekyik agobo ineendet, ago kigonor kwandanyi ng'olyoondonooto eng' muguleldanyi." 
Genesis37:12 Ki pa tupchosyekyik koyaga akweetap keechiirek che po kwandanywa eng' Shekem. 
Genesis37:13 Ak ki leenji Israel Joseph, “Tos ma iyagi weeriik che otupche akweet eng' Shekem? Nyoo anyun ayookten iwe ole mi icheeget.” Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Ami yu.”" 
Genesis37:14 Koleenji ineendet, “Ui anyun nguno, igeer ngo chamegei tupchosyeguk kobooto akweet; si inyoo imwaiwo.” Ki iyookto anyun kwo eng' atebweetap Hebron. Ki it Shekem," 
Genesis37:15 ak konyoor chii ne ki cheeng'soti eng' keeweet, ak kiteebe ineendet koleenji, “Icheeng'e nee?”" 
Genesis37:16 Ak ki le, “Acheeng'oti weeriik che kitupche, kaigai mwaiwo ole iyagisye.”" 
Genesis37:17 Koleenji chiichooto, “Kogoba eng' oli, amu ki agas komwaei koleen, Ongebe Dothan.” Ki isup Joseph tupchosyekyik, ak konyoorchi Dothan." 
Genesis37:18 Ki keer icheeget ineendet kota komi ole loo, ak kingo tomo koriik ole mi, kotil ng'aleek ole partoi ineendet." 
Genesis37:19 Ki ng'alaaljigei kole, “Ogeero! Nyoonei chiitap karwotitoet." 
Genesis37:20 Ongebe anyun kebar, si kewiirchi keriinget, ak kemwa keele, Kaam tyondo ne ya, si kegeer kiit ne egu karwotitaosyekyik.”" 
Genesis37:21 Ago ki kas Reuben, ak kosar ineendet eng' eunekwak, koleenji, “Amongebar.”" 
Genesis37:22 Ki leenji Reuben, “Amotumde korotiik. Owiirchi keriingoni mi surkwen, amoyachi kiy ne ya” si kosar ineendet eng' eunekwak, si koweekyi ineendet kwandanyi." 
Genesis37:23 Ye kingo it Joseph anyun ole mi tupchosyekyik, koreegune ineendet ngoryennyi, ngoryonooto kooi ne ki ilaachi." 
Genesis37:24 Ki imut anyun ineendet ak kowiirchi keriinget. Ki ma komi peek keriingonooto. 
Genesis37:25 Ki tebi ng'wony koamis, ak ye kingo tabendo kogeer piigap Ismaelik kobwanei, kobunu Gilead, kobooto tambeesikwak che kilaei tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, ak mwanik che kinyaise, ak tuguuk che uu igomoik, kochoortagei Misiri." 
Genesis37:26 Ki leenji anyun Judah weeriichooto tupcho, “Tos mi kelunet nee ngebar tupchennyo ak keuny korotiikyik?" 
Genesis37:27 Ongebe anyun kealdochi Ismaelik, ago amongeyachi kiy ne ya; amu ineendet ko tupchennyo, ak ko po korotiikyok.” Ak ki kas tupchosyekyik ng'aleekyik." 
Genesis37:28 Ye kingo it yooto chemung'arainik che po Midian, ko ki imoong' icheek Joseph kolong' eng' keriinget, ak koaldochi ineendet Ismaelik eng' chepkondoi tiptem. Ki imut anyun Joseph kwo Misiri." 
Genesis37:29 Ye kingo weigei Reuben kwo ole mi keriinget, ak kogeer kole ki ma komi Joseph keriinget, kogereer ngoroikyik." 
Genesis37:30 Ki weektagei anyun kwo ole mi tupchosyekyik, ak kole, “Ma miitei lakweet; ara, si awo ano anyun?”" 
Genesis37:31 Ki nam icheek ngoryeetap Joseph ak koeny kwesta, ak koilee ngoryeet korotiik," 
Genesis37:32 yeityo koyookto ngoryonooto kooi, keipchi kwandanywa, ak ipkole, “Kaginyooru ngoryoni; inyit anyun ngo ngoryeetap weeriing'ung' anan ma nenyi.”" 
Genesis37:33 Ki inyit ineendet ak kole, “Ngoryeetap weeriinnyu iman! Kagoam ineendet tyondo ne ya. Kagetonaton Joseph iman.”" 
Genesis37:34 Yeityo kogereer Jakobo ngoroikyik, ak kogermenegei kuniet, ak ki riirchi weeriinnyi peetuusyek che chaang'." 
Genesis37:35 Ki ng'eetyo weeriikyik tugul ak tiibiikyik tugul kole kogaigai ineendet, ago kiesyo ineendet kigaigai, ak ki le, “Eng' nooto anyun, ariirchini weeriinnyu agoi ait ye mi che ki kobek.” Ki riirchi anyun kwandanyi ineendet." 
Genesis37:36 Ak ki alda `Midianik Joseph kwo Misiri, koal Potipar, kiboityotap Pharaoh, kiptaiyatap riibiik." 
Genesis38:1 Ki choortagei anyun Judah eng' peetuusyechooto, kwo eng' ole mi tupchosyekyik, agoi ye mi Adulamindet age ne keguure kainennyi Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Ki keer Judah eng' olooto cheptap kanaanindet age ne kiguure kainennyi Sua. Ki itun ak ki ituiyogei ak ineendet. 
Genesis38:3 Ki manach ak ki sich weeriit; ak kiguure kainennyi Er. 
Genesis38:4 Ki manach kogeny, kosich weeriit ak kiguure kainennyi Onan." 
Genesis38:5 Ki sich weeriit kogeny, ak kiguure kainennyi Shelah. Ki mi `Judah Kezib ye ki ngesichei nooto." 
Genesis38:6 Ki itunji Judah Er weeriinnyi ne po tai, kwondo, ne ki kiguure kainennyi Tamar." 
Genesis38:7 Ago ki chii ne sogoran Er eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet taita ne po Judah, ak ki par `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet." 
Genesis38:8 Yeityo koleenji `Judah Onan, “Myee otuiyegei ak kwondap ng'eetap komet, iichi, ilal maatap ng'eetap komet.”" 
Genesis38:9 Ago kingo nai Onan kole, ma kimuuchi ki ityi ineendet lagochooto keele kobunji, ko ye kingo tuiyogei ak kwondap ng'eetap kamet, kotumji kesweegap sigisyo ng'wony, si ma ilaalji maat ng'eetap kamet." 
Genesis38:10 Ago kiyait kioto ki yai eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki par ineendet agine." 
Genesis38:11 Yeityo koleenji anyun `Judah Tamar kwondap weeriinnyi, “Tebee kootap kwandang'ung', ko ii kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot, kot koeet Shelah weeriinnyu” amu ki le, si ma me agine ko uu weeriichun tupcho. Ki wo Tamar anyun kotebee kootap kwandanyi." 
Genesis38:12 Kingo siirto peetuusyek alage kome cheptap Sua, kwondap Judah; ak ki kigaigai Judah, ak ki wo ole miitei piik che tilei koroorigap keechiirekyik eng' Timnah, ineendet kobooto chorwennyi Hira Adulamindet." 
Genesis38:13 Ki kimwachi Tamar keleenji, “Keero, wendi Timnah kwandap manong'otyot king'ung', wendi kotilei koroorigap keechiirekyik.”" 
Genesis38:14 Ki ireek anyun ngoroikyik che po mosoknateet, ak ki ilaach ngoryeet ne kooi, kotugegei, ak kotaegei ngoryonooto, ak ki tebee ormariichetap nganaseet ne kiguure Enaim, ne mi ooreet ne wendi Timnah. Ki keer kole ki koeet Shelah, ak ma kigoochi ineendet kotun." 
Genesis38:15 Ye kingo keer Judah ineendet, koleen abeere chepkugonio, amu ki katuch togeennyi." 
Genesis38:16 Ki wo ole mi eng' ooreet taban ak koleenji, “Kaigai icham kituiyegei,” amu ki ma nai kole ineendet ko kwondo ki po weeriinnyi. Ki leenji, “Igoono nee, si kobiit inyoonjo?”" 
Genesis38:17 Ki le, “Ayoogun aarwetap ng'oroor ne punu akweet.” Ak ki le, “Igono nee koek kayosyeng'ung' agoi iyoogu kegetwo?”" 
Genesis38:18 Ki le Judah, “Nee kayasyoet ne agoonin?” Ki wolji koleenji, “Ng'okseng'ung' ak rogoet ak kiroktong'ung' no iting'e eung'ung'.” Ki igoochi tuguuchooto ak kotuiyogei anyun ak kimanage Tamar ineendet." 
Genesis38:19 Yeityo kong'eet kwo, ak koreek ngoryennyi ne kooi, ak kolaach ngoroikyik che po mosoknateet." 
Genesis38:20 Ye ki iyookto Judah aarwetap ng'oroor koyooktoe eutap chorwennyi Adulamindet, si kobiit koweekyi mosoganooto tuguugap kayosyennyi, ago ki ma nyoor chiichooto ineendet." 
Genesis38:21 Ki teebe anyun Adulamindonooto murenigap olooto, koleenji, “Mi ano chepkugoniot ne ki mi ooreet taban eng' Enaim?” Kowolji icheek koleenji, “Ki ma komi chepkugonio oli kobooch keny.”" 
Genesis38:22 Ki weektagei anyun kwo ole mi Judah ak koleenji, “Ma anyooru ineendet, ak ki le murenigap olooto ak icheek, Ki ma komi chepkugonio olito kobooch keny.”" 
Genesis38:23 Ki le Judah, “Ingobunji ineendet, si ma kiteweerech; keero, kaayooktaenen arwani, ago ma inyooru.”" 
Genesis38:24 Kingo pata peetuusyek che neegit arawek somok, kemwachi Judah keleenji, “Ki koek chepkugonio Tamar kwondap weeriit king'ung'; kot ko nguno, kotinyei moet ne po ibeetapkei.” Ak ki le Judah, “Omutu kebeel.”" 
Genesis38:25 Ye kingo kagimut koyookto kemwachi kwandap manong'otyondennyi keleenji, kole Tamar, “Ki amanage chiitap ko po tuguuchu atinye.” Ak kamwa kole, “Inyit tuguuchu kaigai si inai chiitap ko po: ng'ookset, rogoet ak kirokto.”" 
Genesis38:26 Ki inyit anyun, ak kole, “Po iman kwonyi kosiiro; amu ma agoochi ineendet Shelah weeriinnyu.” Ak ki mata kotuiyogei ak ineendet kogeny." 
Genesis38:27 Ye kingo it peetuutap sigisyet, ogeero, ki mi sarameek moennyi." 
Genesis38:28 Ye kisigisyei, komoong' lakweet age euut, ak ki ratyi chebyosetap sigisyo eunooto porowet ne piriir, ak kole, “Kagondoi niito.”" 
Genesis38:29 Ago ye kingo ketita eunnyi, kesich ng'eetap kamet. Ak ki le chebyosetap sigisyo, “Amu nee si imong'u eng' kimnateet inyegei?” Ki kiguure anyun kainennyi Peres amu nooto." 
Genesis38:30 Ye kingo pata kesich ng'eetap kamet ne tinyei porowet ne piriir eng' euut, ak ki kiguure kainennyi Zerah." 
Genesis39:1 Ki kimut Joseph anyun kochoortagei kwo Misiri, ak ki al ineendet Potipar kiboityotap Pharaoh, kiptaiyatap riibiik, Misirindet, eng' eunegap Ismaelik, che ki imuti ineendet kwo olooto." 
Genesis39:2 Ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Joseph, ak ki ek chiito ne iberuurot, komi kootap kiptaiyandennyi Misirindet." 
Genesis39:3 Ki keer kiptaiyandennyi kole, mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet ak ki iberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk tugul che kiyaei." 
Genesis39:4 Ki chamak anyun Joseph eng' ineendet, ak kiboisyechin ineendet. Ki inde `Potipar ineendet koek riibindetap poisyennyi, ak ki inde tuguukyik tugul eunekyik." 
Genesis39:5 Ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Misirindet amu Joseph kobooch ye kingo Poi koonnyi ak tuguuk tugul che po misirindonooto, ak ki tebee perurtap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei eng' koonnyi ak eng' mbareenikyik." 
Genesis39:6 Ki pagaakyi tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei eunegap Joseph, ak ki ma kota kongen tuguukyik, kobatee amitwogik che ki amei. Ki chiito ne karaaran kot Joseph eng' poortanyi." 
Genesis39:7 Ak ye kingo pata tuguuchuuto, kogeer `kwondap kiptaiyandennyi Joseph, ak koleenji, “Ngeruiye tuwai.”" 
Genesis39:8 Ago ki eesyo ak koleenji kwondap kiptaiyandennyi, “Keero, ma naei kiptaiyandennyu agot tuguukyik che ariibe eng' koonnyi, ak ki konde eunekyuk tugul che tinyei." 
Genesis39:9 Ma mi age agoi ne oo ne siira; ama mi kiy ne etena kobatenen inyee, amu ii kwondonyi. Amuktoi ano anyun ayai tengegi tee ni, ak achalwogenji Kamuktaindet?”" 
Genesis39:10 Agot nganda ki cham kong'alaaljin `kwonyooto Joseph peetuut age tugul, ago ki ma cham kogasyi koruiyo tuwai, anan kotebi icheegei." 
Genesis39:11 Ago ki wo anyun Joseph eng' peetuut age koyai poisyennyi eng' ko, ak ki ma komi mureno age ne po koyooto kobooto ineendet eng' ko." 
Genesis39:12 Ki nam anyun ngoryennyi, ak koleenji, “Ngeruiye tuwai!” Ago ki metoochi Joseph ngoryennyi eutap kwonyooto, ak komwei komanda saang'." 
Genesis39:13 Ye kingo keer kwonyooto kole, kagometoochi ngoryeet eunnyi ak komwei," 
Genesis39:14 koguur anyun murenik che po koonnyi, ak kong'alaalji koleenji, “Ogeero, ki komutwech ineendet Hebranindet kochotech! Kanyo ole ami kole keruiye tuwai, ak kaawaach." 
Genesis39:15 Ye ka ngo kas ineendet awaach eng' kutit ne oo, kometoiywa ngoryennyi ak komwei, komanda saang'.”" 
Genesis39:16 Kigonor ngoryonooto kwonyooto agoi koit kaa kiptaiyatap Joseph," 
Genesis39:17 ak ye kingo it komwachi ng'aleechooto, koleenji, “Konyoonjo kochota otwogindet Hebranindet ne ki imutwech," 
Genesis39:18 ago ye kinga waach eng' kutit ne oo, kometoiywa ngoryennyi ak komwei kwo saang'.”" 
Genesis39:19 Ye kingo kas kiptaiyandennyi ng'aleegap kwondonyi, che ki mwachi koleenji, “Ki yaiywo ko uu ni otwogindeng'ung',” kong'waneegitu nereegekyik." 
Genesis39:20 Ak ki nam Joseph `kiptaiyandennyi ak kotoorchi korgoreet, ole ki kiratyin kimonjororinigap laitoryat, ak ki tebee korgoronooto." 
Genesis39:21 Ago ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Joseph, ak ki riiregei ineendet ak ki igoochi konyoor chameet eng' pounindetap korgoreet." 
Genesis39:22 Ki igoochi pounindetap korgoreet Joseph koboi kimonjororinik tugul che ki mi korgoreet, ak tuguuk tugul che ki kiyaei eng' olooto, ko ineendet ne kiyaei."
