Genesis39:23 Ki ma kota koriibei pounindetap korgoreet kiy age tugul ne kinamu Joseph, amu ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet, ak ki iberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy age tugul ne ki yaei Joseph." 
Genesis40:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu, kochalwogenji riibindetap tuguuk che kieei, ak riibindetap kwang'set, kiptaiyannywa laitoryatap Misiri." 
Genesis40:2 Ak ki nereekyi Pharaoh kiboitiinikyik tuwai, ne oo eng' che riibei tuguuk che kieei, ak ne oo eng' che riibei kwang'set," 
Genesis40:3 ak ki kiger icheeget eng' ole kiga kiratyi Joseph. 
Genesis40:4 Ki inde kiptaiyatap riibiik Joseph koriip icheek, ak ki tebi ko kerotin eng' peetuusyek che matya." 
Genesis40:5 Ki irwotyi tuwai karwotitoet, chii tugul karwotitoennyi eng' kemout agenge, age tugul ko uu weeksetap karwotitoennyi, riibindetap tuguuk che kieei, ak riibindetap kwang'set ne po laitoryatap Misiri, che kiga kiratyi korgoreet." 
Genesis40:6 Ye kingo nyo Joseph karon ole mi icheek, kogeer kole ki tinyei arageneet." 
Genesis40:7 Ki teebe Joseph anyun kiboitinichooto po Pharaoh che ki mi tugul ko ratotiin eng' kootap kiptaiyandennyi, koleenji, “Kalya si oaragense rani?”" 
Genesis40:8 Koleenji icheek ineendet, “Kogirwotyi karwotitoet, ak ma mi chii ne imuuchi koboorwech ole teptoi.” Ak koleenji Joseph, “Tos ma po Kamuktaindet weekset? Kaigai anyun omwaiwo.”" 
Genesis40:9 Ki mwachi anyun riibindet ne oo ne po tuguuk che kieei, Joseph, karwotitoennyi, koleenji, “Keero, komi tainnyu keetitap sabibuk eng' karwotitoennyu," 
Genesis40:10 ak ki tinyei keetoto mooriik somok. Ki uu che ing'atos, ak kiyesyo taaptokyik, ak kii sabibuk che ruryotiin." 
Genesis40:11 Ki mi eunnyu kigombetap Pharaoh, ak ki abut logoechooto, ak abirchi kigombetap Pharaoh, ak ki ande eutap Pharaoh kigombanooto.”" 
Genesis40:12 Koleenji `Joseph ineendet, “Ye kiweech ko uu ni: temenichooto somok ko peetuusyek somok;" 
Genesis40:13 kotomo kobata peetuusyek somogu koeetin Pharaoh, ak koweekyin poisyeng'ung', ak iwe inde eutap Pharaoh kigombennyi, ko uu ye ki cham iyae yu kita ko ii riibindennyi ne po tuguuk che kieei." 
Genesis40:14 Ago myee tuun ibwaata ye tuun kagomyeeit atebeeng'ung', ak irireena anyun, kaigai, ak imwaite eng' kap Pharaoh, si kimaanda eng' kooi." 
Genesis40:15 Amu ki kichoora iman eng' emetap Yahudik, ak ma ayai kiy eng' olito ne yamei ketoorcho keriinget.”" 
Genesis40:16 Kingo keer ne oo eng' riibiik che pou kwang'set kole myee weeksonooto, koleenji Joseph, “Koarwotyi agane komi metinnyu ateruusyek somogu che po magatiinik che leelachen," 
Genesis40:17 ak komiitei ne po parak eng' tugul amitwogik alak tugul che po Pharaoh che kwanyei kwong'ik, ago koam toriitik amitwogik che po ateruunooto komi metinnyu.”" 
Genesis40:18 Ak ki wolji Joseph koleenji, “Ye kiweech ko ni: ateruusyechooto somok ko peetuusyek somok;" 
Genesis40:19 kotom kogeskei peetuusyek somogu kotil Pharaoh meting'ung', ak kosongininin eng' keetit, ak koam toriitik poortang'ung'.”" 
Genesis40:20 Eng' peetuutap somok, koit peetuut ne ki kisige Pharaoh, koyachi igoorto otwogikyik tugul. Ak ki ieet riibindet ne oo ne po tuguuk che kieei, ak ne oo ne po kwang'set eng' otwogikyik." 
Genesis40:21 Ki weekyi anyun ne oo ne po riibiik che po tuguuk che kieei, poisyennyi, ak ki igoochi anyun riibindonooto Pharaoh kigombet konam." 
Genesis40:22 Ago ki isonginin riibindet ne oo ne po kwang'set, ko uu ye kiga koweekyi `Joseph icheek ole teptoi karwotitoet." 
Genesis40:23 Ago ki ma ibwaat `Joseph ne oo ne po tuguuk che kieei, ki utye ineendet." 
Genesis41:1 Ye kingo keskei kenyiisyek aeng'u, korwotyi Pharaoh kotononi eng' ye neegitee aineet." 
Genesis41:2 Ki keer kotogosune tuuga tisabu aineet, che korooron ak ko neryootiin miising', ak ki agete morong'yot." 
Genesis41:3 Yeityo kotogosune aineet tuuga alage tisabu kosubu chugai, che ma korooron ak ki sogityotiin, ak ki tononso eng' ye mi tuuga chuun alage eng' ngeguut." 
Genesis41:4 Ak ki am tuuga che yaacheen ak ko sogityotiin tuuga chuun tisap che myachen che neryootiin. Kosiir anyun Pharaoh eng' yooto. 
Genesis41:5 Ki inuuch kogeny ak ki irwotyi ne po aeng', ki keer komang'une mopchot agenge ne po paiywat itiik tisabu che ruryotiin ak ko korooron." 
Genesis41:6 Ye kingo pata chooto komong' itiik tisabu che po paiywat, che meiyotiin, che ki imel usoonet ne punu kong'asiis." 
Genesis41:7 Ki lugui itichooto po peechooto meiyotiin chuun tisap ruryotiin ak ko neryootiin. Ki siir anyun Pharaoh ak konai kole kaagaa karwotitoet. 
Genesis41:8 Kingo eech karon, koiimgei eng' muguleldanyi, ak ki iyookto keguur Siriik tugul che ng'oomen che po Misiri, che ng'oorsei, ak piik tugul che ng'oomen che ki miitei. Ki tetyi `Pharaoh icheek karwotitoennyi, ago ki ma piit chii ne ki imuuch koguiyechi Pharaoh karwotitaosyekyik." 
Genesis41:9 Yeityo komwachi anyun ne oo eng' riibiigap tuguuk che kieei, `Pharaoh, koleenji, “Kabwaat rani lelutikyuk." 
Genesis41:10 Ye kiga nereekyi Pharaoh otwogikyik, kogera, anee ak ne oo eng' che riibei kwang'set, kogerchech kootap kiptaiyatap riibiik." 
Genesis41:11 Ki kirwootyi karwotitoet acheek tuwai eng' kemout agenge, ak ki kirwootyi chii tugul ko uu weeksetap karwotitoennyi." 
Genesis41:12 Ak ki mi kobootech neraneet age, Hebranindet, otwogindetap kiptaiyatap riibiik. Ki kimwachi, ki iboorwech karwotitaosyekyok ak ki iweech ko uu karwotitoetap chii age tugul." 
Genesis41:13 Ak ki yaak ko uu nooto ki iboorwech; ki iweekyo poisyennyu, ak ki kisonginin nin age.”" 
Genesis41:14 Eng' yooto koyookto anyun Pharaoh keguur Joseph, ak ki kimoong' ineendet eng' keriinget, kechogune. Ki inem tamnet ak kowal ngoroikyik, ak kwo ole mi Pharaoh." 
Genesis41:15 Ki leenji `Pharaoh Joseph, “Koarwotyi karwotitoet, ma piit chii ne koimuuch koweech. Koagas agobo inyee keele, ngigas karwotitoet imuuchi iweech.”" 
Genesis41:16 Ki wolji `Joseph Pharaoh koleenji, “Ma pota anee; igoochin `Kamuktaindet Pharaoh waluunet ne po kaalyeet.”" 
Genesis41:17 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Pharaoh Joseph, koleenji, “Keero, koatononi eng' ngeguutap aineet eng' karwotitoennyu," 
Genesis41:18 ageer anyun kotogosune aineet tuuga tisabu, che neryootiin miising' ak ko korooron; ak koagete morong'yot." 
Genesis41:19 Ki togos tuuga alage tisabu kosubu chugai, che nyalulyotin ak ko yaacheen ak ko sogityotiin, che kitom ageere eng' emetap Misiri komugul che yaacheen che uu chooto." 
Genesis41:20 Ki am tuuga chooto sogityotiin ak ko yaacheen tuuga chuun kabo tai tisap neryootiin," 
Genesis41:21 ago ye kingo kagoam, koma kotook keele kagoam, amu kota ko yaacheen ko uu eng' tai, ak eng' yooto anyun, asiiru." 
Genesis41:22 Koaru ne po aeng' ak koageer eng' karwotitoennyu, komang'une itiik tisabu mopchot agenge, che ruryotiin ak ko myachen." 
Genesis41:23 Yeityo komong' itiik tisabu kosubu chooto che resyotiin ak ko meiyotiin, che ki imel usoonet ne punu kong'asiis." 
Genesis41:24 Ak kolugui itichooto meiyotiin itiik chuun tisap myachen. Kinga mwachi piik che ng'oorsei, koma piit ne koimuuch koboorwo.”" 
Genesis41:25 Yeityo koleenji `Joseph Pharaoh, “Agenge karwotitoetap Pharaoh. Kagoboorchi `Kamuktaindet Pharaoh kiit ne machei si koyai ko neegit." 
Genesis41:26 Tuuga chooto tisap che myachen ko kenyiisyek tisap, ak itichooto tisap myachen ko kenyiisyek tisap; agenge karwotitaoniito." 
Genesis41:27 Tuuga chooto tisap sogityotiin ak ko yaacheen che koisubu chuun ko kenyiisyek tisap, ak kogeny itichooto tisap che ma ruryotiin che ki imel usoonet ne punu kong'asiis, koegu kenyiisyek tisap che po rubeet." 
Genesis41:28 Nooto ko kiit ne kaamwachi Pharaoh. Kagoboorchi `Kamuktaindet Pharaoh kiit ne machei si koyai ko neegit. 
Genesis41:29 Pwoonei kenyiisyek tisabu che po rurateet ne oo eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri. 
Genesis41:30 Ago ye ibata chooto koit kenyiisyek tisabu che po rubeet; ak keutye rurateet eng' emetap Misiri, ak tuun iwong'u emet tugul rubeet." 
Genesis41:31 Ma konaaksei ruratonooto eng' emet amu rubonooto isubu, amu egu rubeet ne ng'waan miising'." 
Genesis41:32 Kogiboorchi anyun Pharaoh karwotitaoniito konyil aeng' amu ki kochobok nooto eng' Kamuktaindet, ak chogune Kamuktaindet kiito kosulda." 
Genesis41:33 “Ara ingocheeng' `Pharaoh chiito ne tinyei naet ne nin ak utaatyet si konde koboi emetap Misiri. 
Genesis41:34 Ingoyai Pharaoh niito, ak ingonde riibiik koriip emet, si kobas kebeberta agenge eng' muut eng' emetap Misiri eng' kenyisyechooto tisap po rurateet." 
Genesis41:35 Ingoyum amitwogik tugul che po kenyisyechooto tisap myachen, che ma koit, ak kogonor peek eng' pounatetap Pharaoh koek amitwogigap nganasook ak ingoriip." 
Genesis41:36 Ak koek amitwogichooto pasanik che ki pasyin emet eng' kenyisyechooto tisap po rubeet, che tuun piitu eng' emetap Misiri, si ma me emet eng' rubeet.”" 
Genesis41:37 Ki myeiit ng'olyoondonooto eng' `Pharaoh ak eng' otwogikyik tugul. 
Genesis41:38 Ki leenji Pharaoh otwogikyik, “Kimuktoi ano kenyooru chiito ne uu chiichi ne tinyei Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet?”" 
Genesis41:39 Ki leenji anyun `Pharaoh Joseph, “Amu kagoboorun Kamuktaindet chooto tugul, ma mi anyun chiito ne tinyei naet ne nin ak utaatyet ko uu inyee." 
Genesis41:40 Inyee ne kebou koonnyu ak ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung' ko kebou piikyuk tugul, kobatee eng' ng'echereetap laitornatet, ko anee ne oo eng' inyee eng' nooto.”" 
Genesis41:41 Ki leenji anyun `Pharaoh Joseph, “Keero, kandein ibou emet komugul ne po Misiri.”" 
Genesis41:42 Ki inem Pharaoh eng' eunnyi peteiyot ne po ng'ookset, ak konde eutap Joseph, ak kolelesonji ineendet eng' ngoroik che korooron che po katanit, ak konde sirimdo ne po thahabu kaatinnyi." 
Genesis41:43 Ak ki igoochi `Pharaoh Joseph kolaany chepkichutinnyi ne po aeng' ne ki tinyei, ak kiboldos piik eng' tainnyi koleen, “Ogutuny!” Ak ki inde ineendet koboi emet komugul ne po Misiri." 
Genesis41:44 Ki leenji kogeny `Pharaoh Joseph, “Aa Pharaoh, ak ma imuuchi chii kochuul eunnyi anan keldanyi eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri ama ichamji.”" 
Genesis41:45 Ki kuure `Pharaoh Joseph Sapenatpanea, ak ki igoochi kotun Asenat cheptap Potipera tisiindet ne po On. Ak kiwendot Joseph kobunoot emetap Misiri." 
Genesis41:46 Ki po Joseph kenyiisyek sosom ye ki tononi eng' taitap Pharaoh, laitoryatap Misiri. Ak ki wo Joseph eng' ole mi Pharaoh, ak ki punoot emet komugul ne po Misiri." 
Genesis41:47 Ki ruryo peek miising' eng' emet eng' kenyisyechooto tisap po piyendo. 
Genesis41:48 Ki iyum amitwogik tugul che po kenyisyechooto tisap che ki mi emetap Misiri, ak ki konoree amitwogichooto nganasook. Ki konor anyun amitwogigap mbareenik che kiga yiem nganaseet age tugul, kogonoree nganasochooto." 
Genesis41:49 Ki iyum anyun Joseph peek che chaang' miising', che tee ng'aniegap nyanjet, kot kometo koitet, amu ki ma kota koiitoksei." 
Genesis41:50 Ki kisikyi Joseph weeriik aeng' kotom koit kenyiitap rubeet, che ki sikyi Asenat, cheptap Potipera, tisiindetap On." 
Genesis41:51 Ki kuure Joseph kainetap ne oo Manasseh, kole, “Amu kagoono Kamuktaindet autye kaimutikyuk tugul, ak koot tugul ne po abba.”" 
Genesis41:52 Ki kuure ne po aeng' Ephraim, kole, “Amu kagoono Kamuktaindet iyoteet eng' emet ne ki anyoorunee nyalilda.”" 
Genesis41:53 Ki igeskei anyun kenyisyechooto tisabu po rurateet eng' emetap Misiri. 
Genesis41:54 Yeityo kotoi anyun kobwa kenyiisyek tisabu che po rubeet ko uu ye ki kamwa Joseph. Ki piit anyun rubeet eng' emotinwek tugul, ago ki mi amitwogik emet komugul ne po Misiri." 
Genesis41:55 Ye kingo am rubeet emetap Misiri komugul koriirchi `piik Pharaoh kosoom amitwogik. Ki leenji `Pharaoh piik tugul che po Misiri, “Oba kap Joseph ak oyai kiit age tugul ne kamwaiwok.”" 
Genesis41:56 Ye kingo yom rubonooto emet komugul, koyaat anyun Joseph chogenik tugul, ak koaldochi Misiriik, ak kieet rubonooto miising' eng' emetap Misiri." 
Genesis41:57 Ki pwa anyun emotinwek tugul kap Joseph eng' Misiri kobwa koal peek; amu kieet rubonooto eng' ng'wony komugul. 
Genesis42:1 Ye kingo kas anyun Jakobo kole miitei peek Misiri, koleenji `ineendet weeriikyik, “Amu nee si ogeeregei kityo?”" 
Genesis42:2 Ak ki leenji, “Koagas keele miitei peek Misiri. Ochoortegei oalwech peek eng' oliindo, si kobiit kesapchee, si ma kibegu.”" 
Genesis42:3 Ki choortagei anyun weeriik tamanu che tupcho ak Joseph koba Misiri, koal peek." 
Genesis42:4 Ago ki ma iyookto `Jakobo Benjamin ng'eetap kametap Joseph, kobooto tupchosyekyik, amu ki le, si ma nyoor kiy ne ya." 
Genesis42:5 Ki pwa anyun weeriigap Israel kobooto che kibwanei koalisyei, amu ki miitei rubeet emetap Kanaan." 
Genesis42:6 Ki pounindet Joseph ne po emet, ak ki ineendet ne ki aldochin peek piik tugul che po emet. Ki pwa anyun tupchosyegap Joseph, ak kong'uruuk eng' tainnyi kotokyi metowekwak ng'wony." 
Genesis42:7 Ak ki keer `Joseph tupchosyekyik ak konyit, ago ki yaigei koigei chii ne ma ingen icheeget, ak kong'alaalji icheeget eng' koroomnateet. Ki teebe koleenji, “Obunu ano?” Ak ki wolji koleenji, “Ki punu emetap Kanaan, kibwane keale amitwogik.”" 
Genesis42:8 Nganda ki nai `Joseph tupchosyekyik, ko ki ma nai `icheek ineendet." 
Genesis42:9 Ki ibwaat kogeny Joseph karwotitaosyek che kiga korwotyi agobo icheek, ak ki leenji, “Oo segeik, kobwa ogeer nyeraatyetap emet.”" 
Genesis42:10 Ki leenji `icheek ineendet, “Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, ago kagibwane acheek otwogiguk keale amitwogik." 
Genesis42:11 Ki weeriigap chiito agenge acheek tugul, ki piik che po iman, ma kisegeik acheek otwogiguk.”" 
Genesis42:12 Ago ki leenji icheek, “Achicha, ago kobwa ogeer nyeraatyetap emoni.”" 
Genesis42:13 Ak ki leenji, “Kitupche acheek otwogiguk ko ki taman ak aeng' ak ko weeriigap chiito agenge ne po Kanaan. Keero, miitei ne ming'in eng' peetuuni kobooto kwandanyo, ak ki kobetito agenge.”" 
Genesis42:14 Ago ki leenji `Joseph icheek, “Nooto anyun ne kamwaiwok aleenjok, oo segeik." 
Genesis42:15 Kimuuchi ketyemenak ng'olyoondoni: ko uu ye sabei Pharaoh, ko momuuchi obe eng' oli, ngo ma nyo yu ng'eetap komet ne ming'in." 
Genesis42:16 Oyookte age eng' okweek, komut ng'eetap komet, ak keratak kot kenai ng'aleekwok ngo mi imanit eng' okweek. Ngo ma uu nooto, ko ko uu ye sabei Pharaoh, ko kaagaa oo segeik.”" 
Genesis42:17 Ak kiger tugul kip agenge peetuusyek somok. 
Genesis42:18 Eng' peetuutap somok koleenji `Joseph icheek, “Oyai ko uu ni si osapche, amu aiywei Kamuktaindet:" 
Genesis42:19 ngo oo piigap iman, kerati agenge eng' okweek, eng' koot ne kogigerchok. Si obe okweek, oip amitwogik amu rubeet ne mi kooriikwok." 
Genesis42:20 Ak omutwaa ng'eetap komet ne ming'in; si kotook ng'aleekwok ngo po iman, si mobegu.” Ak ki yai ko uu nooto." 
Genesis42:21 Ki ng'alaaljigei icheegei kole, “Kagonamech kirwooget iman agobo tupchennyo, amu ki kigeer nyalildap muguleldanyi, ye ki igaigaech, ak ki ma kicham kegasyi; kanyonjech anyun nyalili amu nooto.”" 
Genesis42:22 Ak ki wolji Reuben, koleenji, “Ki ma amwaiwok, aleenjok, amoyachi kiy ne ya lakweet? Ago ki ma ocham ogas. Ogeer anyuno, kiyaachei korotiikyik.”" 
Genesis42:23 Ki ma nai kole kasei Joseph ng'aleekwak, amu ki mi weegindet ne ki iweechi ng'aleekyik." 
Genesis42:24 Ki weigei kotuktoochi patai, ak koriir; yeityo koweleljigei icheeget kogeny kong'alaalji. Ak ki inem Simion eng' kwenunnywa, korat ineendet eng' tainnywa." 
Genesis42:25 Ki ng'at Joseph anyun kinyiit lolotinwekwak peek, ak keeweekyi chii tugul silingisyekyik kinde kinnyi, ak kogoochi amitwogik che po ooreet. Ak ki kiyachi ko uu nooto." 
Genesis42:26 Ki ratyi peechooto chwaget sigirokwak, ak koba." 
Genesis42:27 Ago ye kingo tyach age lolennyi eng' kootap toek, kole kogoochi sigiryennyi amitwogik che konorotiin, kogeer silingisyekyik komi kutitap lolet." 
Genesis42:28 Ak ki leenji weeriik che tupcho, “Kageweech silingisyekyuk, ogeero, miitei iman lolennyu.” Ak ki aragenso, kogeeregei kobotandos, koleen, “Nee ni kayaiywech Kamuktaindet?”" 
Genesis42:29 Ye kingo it anyun icheek kap Jakobo kwandanywa eng' emetap Kanaan, kotetyi ineendet tuguuk tugul che kibiityi eng' ooreet, koleenji," 
Genesis42:30 “Ki ng'alaalwech chiito, ne kiptaiyatap emet, eng' koroomnateet, amu ki leen ki segeik che kisegei emet." 
Genesis42:31 Ago ki kileenji, ‘Ki piik che po iman; ma kisegeik." 
Genesis42:32 Kitupche acheek ko ki taman ak aeng', ki weeriigap kwandanyo; ma mi age, ak mi ne ming'in kobooto kwandanyo eng' emetap Kanaan.’" 
Genesis42:33 Ak ki leenjech chiichooto, kiptaiyat ne po emonooto, ‘Anaenok ni, ngo oo piik che po iman; obagakwo ng'eetap kamenng'ung' age, ak obe oipchi peek piikwok che miitei kaa." 
Genesis42:34 Omutwaa weeriit ne otupche ne ming'in, si anai anyun ale ma oo segeik, ago kaagaa oo piik che po iman. Yeityo agoonok weeriit ne otupche kogeny, ak oyai mung'aaret eng' emet.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Ye kingo abuch lolotinwekwak, ko ki mi chepkondok che po chii tugul lolennyi ko ratotiin. Ye kingo keer icheek kobooto kwandanywa silingisyekwak che ratotiin, koaragenso." 
Genesis42:36 Ak ki leenji Jakobo kwandanywa, “Ki obetena lagokyuk, ma mi Joseph, ak ma mi Simion, ak omache omutena Benjamin agine. Ki kobwanjo anyun tuguuchu tugul.”" 
Genesis42:37 Yeityo koleenji `Reuben kwandanyi, “Tuun ibar weeriikyuk aeng' ngo mamutun ineendet kogeny. Koono kotebee eunekyuk, ak amutun ineendet kogeny.”" 
Genesis42:38 Ago ki le, “Mobendi ochoortoigei kobooto weeriinnyu amu ki kome ng'eetap kamet, ak ineegei kityo ne ng'etunot. Ak ngot konyoor kiy ne ya eng' panda ne obendi, ogoono ariirat agoi tuun amei.”" 
Genesis43:1 King'wanit rubeet miising' eng' emet. 
Genesis43:2 Ak ye kingo kagotar peek che ki ibune Misiri, koleenji kwandanywa, “Oweektegei kogeny, oalwech amitwogik tutigin.”" 
Genesis43:3 Ago ki leenji Judah, “Ki igimgimech chiichooto koleenjech, ‘Momuuchi ogeera togoch ngot ko mobwane ak weeriit ne otupche.’" 
Genesis43:4 Ngot iyooktech kobooto tupchennyo kechoortegei anyun kealun amitwogik. 
Genesis43:5 Ago ngot ko mechamji kwo, koma kichoortoigei, amu kileenjech chiichooto, ‘Ma koi ogeer togeennyu ngot ko mobwa ak weeriit ne otupche.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Ki le Israel, “Amu nee si oyaiywo yaityoni tee ni kot ong'aang'ji chiichooto oleenji ki tinyei weeriit age ne kitupche?”" 
Genesis43:7 Ki le icheek, “Ki kinenech miising' chiichooto atebosyekyok ak ole ki kisikyinech koleen, ‘Ta kosabei kwandang'wong'? Ak otinye weeriit age ne otupche?’ Ki kiwolji ko uu ye kiteep. Tos ki kimuuch kenai keele, mwaiwech koleenjinech, ‘Omutu weeriit ne otupche kochoorgei?’ ”" 
Genesis43:8 Ki leenji `Judah kwandanyi Israel, “Iyogu weeriito keebe tuwai, si keng'eetye keebe, si kobiit kesapchee, ama kibegu, acheek ak inyee, ak lagokyok ak icheek." 
Genesis43:9 Ingobunjo atononji ineendet; ak image ineendet eunnyu. Ngot koma mutuun ineendet inyoo ande taing'ung', kobunjino chalwogoto peetuusyek tugul." 
Genesis43:10 Amu nda ki ma kigagei, ta kigaa keweigei iman ne po aeng' nguno.”" 
Genesis43:11 Yeityo koleenji `kwandanywa Israel icheek, “Ngo uu nooto anyun, oyai ko uu ni: oip tuguuk che myachen miising' che po emet eng' lolotinwekwok, oipchi chiichooto kagoochinoik ko uu mwanik tutigin che kinyaise, kobooto kumyat kitigin, tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, tuguuk che uu igomoik, kobooto tuguuk che uu njuguk ak logoek che kiguure almond." 
Genesis43:12 Oip eng' eunekwok robiinik otes che yamegei ak kamunutyonooto konyil aeng', ak che kiga kiweech eng' kutusweegap lolotinwekwok. Oweekte chooto ak icheek; abeere ki ma nai piik che ki indoi." 
Genesis43:13 Omut weeriit ne otupche agine, ong'eetyee oba kogeny ye mi chiichooto." 
Genesis43:14 Ingorireenak Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet, eng' taitap chiichooto, si kobiit kotyakwok weeriit ne otupche nin linda, ak Benjamin. Ak ngo peteno lagokyuk ko kagobetyo.”" 
Genesis43:15 Ki ip anyun pichooto kagoochinoichooto, ak ki ip robiinik che yamegei ak kamanuutyonooto konyil aeng', ak king'eetyo kobooto Benjamin koba Misiri, ki it anyun olooto ak kitononso eng' taitap Joseph." 
Genesis43:16 Ye kingo keer `Joseph Benjamin komi kobooto icheek, koleenji ne tononjin koonnyi, “Imutu pichoo kobwa ko, ak oeeng'ji ak ochop kiy tugul, amu ki amisyei tugul ak pichooto peet kween.”" 
Genesis43:17 Ki yai chiichooto ko uu ye ki kamwachi Joseph; ak ki imut anyun `chiichooto pichooto kobwa kootap Joseph. 
Genesis43:18 Ak ki iyweis pichooto, amu ki kimut koba kootap Joseph. Ki ile, “Kagimutwech kebwa ko amu chepkondok che ki kiweekte eng' lolotinwekyok yu kiga kibwa tai, si kobiit konyoor ng'olyoot ne igikyinenech, ak kogerchech ko, yeityo koyaech keegu otwogik, kobooto sigirokyok.”" 
Genesis43:19 Kiriikta ye mi chiito ne tononjin kootap Joseph, ak kong'alaalji ineendet eng' ole neegitee kurgeet," 
Genesis43:20 koleenji, “Ee kiptaiyandennyu, ki kichooruge iman eng' panda ne po tai, keal amitwogik," 
Genesis43:21 ak ye ki ngeit anyun kootap toek, kityaach lolotinwekyok, ki mi chepkondogap chii tugul kutitap lolennyi. Ara kagiibu anyun chooto kogeny, ak" 
Genesis43:22 kagiibu kora robiinik alak che ki ale amitwogik. Ma kingen chiito ne ki inde silingisyekyok lolotinwekyok.” 
Genesis43:23 Ki leenji, “Ingotep kaalyeet eng' okweek; amoiyweisye. Ki koonok Kamuktaindeng'wong', Kamuktaindet ne po kwandang'wong', konorwet ne myee ne ung'aat eng' lolotinwekwok, ki ataach silingisyekwok.” Ak ki imutyi Simion komong'." 
Genesis43:24 Ki imut anyun `chiichooto pichooto koba kootap Joseph, ak konaga peek, ak kiuun pichooto keelyekwak, ak ki pae sigirokwak amitwogik che ki konorotiin." 
Genesis43:25 Kichopchi `icheek Joseph kagoochinoik eng' sait ne itune, peet kween, amu ki kas keele tagoi koamisyei eng' olooto." 
Genesis43:26 Ye kingo it Joseph kaa, koipchi `pichooto ineendet kagoochinoik che ki ibu, kobwa ko, ak ki ing'uruuk eng' tainnyi agoi ng'wony." 
Genesis43:27 Ak kiteebe icheeget chametapkei, koleenji, “Chamegei kwandang'wong', poiyondonooto ne ki komwaiwo? Tos ta kosabei?”" 
Genesis43:28 Ki leenji, “Chamegei otwogindeng'ung' kwandanyo. Ta kosabei.” Ak ki ing'uruukyi." 
Genesis43:29 Ak kitabendo Joseph, ak ki keer tupchennyi Benjamin, ng'eetap kamet, ak ki le, “Tupcheng'wong' ne ming'in ni, ni ki komwaiwo?” Ak ki leenji, “Ingorirenen Kamuktaindet, weeri!”" 
Genesis43:30 Ak kichirchiren Joseph, amu kieet emosto eng' muguleldanyi amu ng'eetap kamet, ak ki cheeng' ole wendi koriiree. Ki manda anyun koonnyi ne po oriit, kwo koriir." 
Genesis43:31 Yeityo koun togeennyi ak komong', ak kimuita si ma riir, ak ki le, “Oibu amitwogik.”" 
Genesis43:32 Ki kinde chechiik oldanyi ineegei, ak ki kinde oldanywa chechwaak icheegei, ak che po Misiriik oldanywa icheegei, che ki cham koamisyei kobooto ineendet: amu ki ma kochamei Misiriik koamis tugul ak Yahudik, amu king'wan eng' Misiriik koamjin." 
Genesis43:33 Ki tebee tainnyi weeriit ne po tai ko uu sigennyi, ak ne ming'in ko uu ming'inatennyi, ak ki kwong'yo pichooto." 
Genesis43:34 Ki igoochi pichooto kererutigap amitwogik che ki mi tainnyi, ago kieet kererutyetap Benjamin kosiir che po alak konyil muut. Ak kieeiso ak koboiboitu kobooto ineendet." 
Genesis44:1 Ki ng'at anyun chiito ne kitononjin koonnyi, koleenji, “Inyiit amitwogik lolotinwegap pichu, ko uu che imuuch koip, ak inde chepkondogap chii tugul kutitap lolennyi." 
Genesis44:2 Yeityo inde kigombennyu, nooto po fedha, eng' kutitap loletap toweet, kobooto silingisyekyik che po peek.” Ak ki yai ko uu ng'olyoot ne ki kamwa Joseph." 
Genesis44:3 Ye kingo eech kota ko karon, kounda pichooto koba ak sigirokwak." 
Genesis44:4 Ye kingo kagomanda eng' nganaseet, ye kitom kolooegitu, koleenji `Joseph chiito ne kitononjin koonnyi, “Ng'eet, isup pichooto, ye inyooru ileenji, ‘Amu nee si ogeere yaityet ne myee?" 
Genesis44:5 Tos ma kigombani ne eeise kiptaiyandennyu, ak kong'orse? Koyai ne leluut ngo yai ko uu ni.’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Ye kingo nyoor anyun icheek, komwachi ng'aleechooto." 
Genesis44:7 Ki leenji icheek, “Amu nee si komwa kiptaiyandennyu ng'aleek che uu chooto? Ingolooit eng' otwogiguk si ma yai kiy ne uu nooto!" 
Genesis44:8 Ogeero, robiinik, che ki kinyoorchi kutusweegap lolotinwekyok, kogiweekwok kogeny eng' emetap Kanaan. Kimuktoi ano anyun kechoore kootap kiptaindeng'ung' fedha anan ko thahabu?" 
Genesis44:9 Ingome age tugul eng' acheek otwogiguk ne kenyoorchin kioto, ak keegu acheek otwogigap kiptaiyandennyo.”" 
Genesis44:10 Ak ki le, “Ingotebi ko uu ng'aleeguk. Egu ineendet ne kenyoorchin kioto otwogindennyu, ak ma ki ityinok okweek yaityo.”" 
Genesis44:11 Ki itu chii tugul lolennyi kochokyi, ak kotyach chii tugul nenyi." 
Genesis44:12 Ak ki cheeng', kotaune ne oo, agoi kogesune ne ming'in. Ki kinyoorchi kigombanooto loletap Benjamin." 
Genesis44:13 Kigereer anyun ngoroikwak, ak kiratyi chii tugul tuguukyik sigiryennyi ak koweektagei koba nganaseet." 
Genesis44:14 Ki it anyun Judah ak tupchosyekyik kootap Joseph amu kitom kwo ui, ak ki ibutyi icheek ng'wony eng' tainnyi." 
Genesis44:15 Ki leenji `Joseph icheek, “Nee ni koyai? Tos mongen ole imuuchi kong'orso chiito ne uu anee?”" 
Genesis44:16 Ak ki le Judah, “Tos kimwaun nee anyun, kiptaiyandennyu? Ki ng'alaali keleen nee? Anan tos ki ityindoitech ano imanda? Kagonai Kamuktaindet tengektap otwogiguk, ara kimi yu anyun acheeget, ki otwogigap kiptaiyandennyo, ak ineendet ne kaginyoorchi kigombet agine.”" 
Genesis44:17 Ago ki le, “Ingolooit eng' anee ama yai ko uu nooto! Egu otwogindennyu ineendet ne kaginyoorchi kigombet, ago okweek, ko myee obe eng' kaalyeet kapkwandang'wong'.”" 
Genesis44:18 Yeityo koriikyi anyun `Judah Joseph ak koleenji, “Kaigai kiptaiyandennyu, asoomin ale, chamwo anee otwogindeng'ung' amwaun ng'olyoo, amenereekyo anee, otwogindeng'ung', amu i uu aginye Pharaoh." 
Genesis44:19 Ki iteebenech acheek otwogiguk, kiptaiyandennyu, ile, ‘Otinye kwandang'wong', ak komi weeriit age ne otupche?’" 
Genesis44:20 Ak ki kimwaun inyee, kiptaiyandennyo, keleenjin, ‘Ki tinyei abba, poiyot ne oos, ak kotinyei lakweet ne po osindanyi, neta koming'in. Ki kome ng'eetap kamet, ak mi nooto ineegei ne po kamennywa, ak kochamei `kwandanyi ineendet.’" 
Genesis44:21 Ak ki ileenjech acheek otwogiguk, ‘Omutwaa, kochoorgei ole ami, si kobiit ageer ineendet eng' konyekyuk.’" 
Genesis44:22 Ki kimwaun inyee, kiptaiyandennyo, keele, ‘Ma imuuchi koobeesyo weerooto ak kwandanyi, amu ngot kometo ineendet kwandanyi, ko tos me kwandanyi.’" 
Genesis44:23 Ak ki ileenjech acheek otwogiguk, ‘Ngot ko mobwa ochooruge kobooto weeriit ne otupche ne ming'in ko momuuchi ogeera togoch kogeny.’" 
Genesis44:24 Ye ki ngeit anyun kapotwogindeng'ung' kwandanyu, kemwachi ineendet ng'aleeguk." 
Genesis44:25 Ak kileenjech abba, ‘Oba kogeny oalwech amitwogik tutigin,’" 
Genesis44:26 ki kileenji, ‘Ma kimuuchi kechoortegei, ago ngo mi tupchennyo ne ming'in kobootech kechoortegei anyun keebe, amu ma kimuuchi kegeer chiichooto togoch kobatee kemi ak tupchennyo ne ming'in.’" 
Genesis44:27 Ak kileenjech otwogindeng'ung', kwandanyo, ‘Ongen ole kisikwo kwondonyu weeriik aeng';" 
Genesis44:28 ak kibetena age, ak ki ale, Angen komyee ale kigetonaton, ak kobooch yooto, ko mata tuun ageer." 
Genesis44:29 Ngot omutena niito agine, ak konyoor kiy ne ya, ko kogoono ariirat agoi tuun amei.’" 
Genesis44:30 Nooto anyun, ye ait kapotwogindeng'ung' abba, ama mi weeri kobootech, amu ki namgei saboondanyi ak saboondap weeriito," 
Genesis44:31 komeei anyun abba ye keer kole ma mi lakweet, ak kigoochini `acheek otwogiguk abba, otwogindeng'ung', koriirat agoi tuun kome." 
Genesis44:32 Amu kibunjo anee otwogindeng'ung' lakwaniito, atononjinechi abba, aleenji, ‘Ngot koma mutuun ineendet, ko kabunjo chalwogoto peetuusyek tugul eng' taitap abba.’" 
Genesis44:33 Eng' nooto anyun, asaain ale chamwo atebi aek otwogindeng'ung', inyee kiptaiyandennyu, ageeregei weeri. Ago ingwo weeri kotogosta kobooto tupchosyekyik." 
Genesis44:34 Amu amuktoi ano anyun awo atogosta ye mi abba, ama kimi ak lakweet? Si ma keer yaityet ne tuun nyooru abba.”" 
Genesis45:1 Ki ma imuuch Joseph anyun komuita eng' taitap piik tugul che ki tonondos eng' ole neegitee ineendet. Ki ng'at ak komwa eng' tuugeet ne oo kole, “Omaande chii tugul eng' ole ami.” Ki ma ng'et chii ne ki mi ak Joseph, ye king'aang'jigei `ineendet tupchosyekyik." 
Genesis45:2 Ago ki riir kowaach kot kogas Misiriik, ak ki kas kap Pharaoh ak icheek." 
Genesis45:3 Ak ki leenji `Joseph tupchosyekyik, “Aa Joseph! Tos ta kosabei abba?” Ago ki ma imuuch kowolji tupchosyekyik, amu ki iyweis eng' tainnyi." 
Genesis45:4 Ki leenji anyun `Joseph tupchosyekyik, “Kaigai oriigu yu ami.” Ak kiriikta anyun. Ak ki leenji, “Aa tupcheng'wong' Joseph, ne ki oalde kwo Misiri." 
Genesis45:5 Nooto anyun, ama ta oaragense, anan onereekyigei okweegei eng' okweegei agobo aldaet ne ki oaldocho oli, amu ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet andounenok si kobiit asar piik." 
Genesis45:6 Ki kobiit rubeet eng' emet eng' kenyisyechu aeng', ak ta komi kenyiisyek muutu alage, che ma piitu kabatisyet anan kesisyet." 
Genesis45:7 Ak ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet andounenok, si kobiit ariibwok che ng'etu eng' ng'wony, ak asarwok osapche eng' saruunet ne oo." 
Genesis45:8 Ara anyun, ki ma ko okweek che ki omutwaa anyo oli, ago Kamuktaindet ne ki koyaa aek kwanda eng' Pharaoh, ak aegu kiptaiyatap koonnyi tugul, ak pounindetap emet komugul ne po Misiri." 
Genesis45:9 Ara anyun, ochakte otogoste ole mi abba, ak oleenji, ‘Kamwa ko uu ni weeriing'ung' Joseph, kiyaa Kamuktaindet aek kiptaiyatap Misiri komugul, chooruge nyoo ole ami, amegagei." 
Genesis45:10 Ak inyoo imeny emetap Goshen, si ineegitena, inyee ak lagoguk kobooto mochogoroniguk, kechireguk, tuuga cheguuk ak tuguuk tugul che itinye." 
Genesis45:11 Abain eng' olooto si mebanan, inyee ak koong'ung', ak tugul che itinye; amu ta komi kenyiisyek muutu che pwoonei che po rubeet.’" 
Genesis45:12 Ogeere nguno eng' konyekwok, ak kogeerei Benjamin tupchennyu agine, kole kutinnyu ne ng'alaalwok." 
Genesis45:13 Omwachi abba teegistanyu tugul eng' Misiri, ak tuguuk tugul che kaogeer, ak ochakte omutu abba konyo oli.”" 
Genesis45:14 Yeityo kosuup kaatitap ng'eetap kamet Benjamin, ak koriir, ki riir Benjamin agine komi kaatitap Joseph." 
Genesis45:15 Ak ki ng'utut tupchosyekyik tugul, koriirei. Ak ye ibata nooto kong'alaalji tupchosyekyik ineendet." 
Genesis45:16 Ki kigas ng'aleechooto eng' kootap Pharaoh, keele, “Kagoit tupchosyegap Joseph,” ak ki ibaibai Pharaoh nooto, kobooto otwogikyik." 
Genesis45:17 Ki leenji `Pharaoh Joseph, “Ileenji tupchosyeguk, ‘Oyai ni; oratyi sigirokwok tuguukwok, ak obe, agoi emetap Kanaan." 
Genesis45:18 Omutu kwandang'wong' ak piigap kooriikwok, ak obwa ole ami, si agoonok tuguuk che myach che po emetap Misiri, ak oam akwaiyetap emet.’" 
Genesis45:19 Ara anyun, kaging'atak, ‘Oyai ko uu ni: oip kariisyek che po emetap Misiri amu lagokwok, ak kwonyiikwok, ak obwa, omutu kwandang'wong'." 
Genesis45:20 Ago amobwaat tuguukwok, amu chekwok tuguuk tugul che myachen che po emetap Misiri.’ ”" 
Genesis45:21 Ki yai ko uu nooto weeriigap Israel. Ki igoochi `Joseph icheek kariisyek ko uu ng'atuutyetap Pharaoh, ak kogoochi amitwogik che amoti eng' ooreet." 
Genesis45:22 Ki igoochi chii age tugul ngoroik che kiwalawale alak, ago ki igoochi Benjamin silingisyek pogol somok, ak ngoroik muut che walawali." 
Genesis45:23 Ki iyookyi kwandanyi tuguuk ko uu ni: sigiroik taman che kilae tuguuk che myach che po Misiri, sigiroik che iyuogik taman che kilae peek ak magatiinik ak amitwogik alak che tuun amonu eng' ooreet." 
Genesis45:24 Kimonorisyechi anyun Joseph tupchosyekyik ak ye ki inamei panda, koleenji, “Amonereekyinotegei eng' ooreet.”" 
Genesis45:25 Ki pa anyun kotogosta eng' Misiri agoi koit emetap Kanaan kap Jakobo kwandanywa. 
Genesis45:26 Ak ki mwachi koleenji, “Ta kosabei Joseph! Ak ineendet ko pounindetap emet komugul ne po Misiri.” Ak ki tanui muguleldap Jakobo, amu ma iyan icheeget." 
Genesis45:27 Ago ye ki ngemwachi ng'aleek tugul che po Joseph, che kiga komwachi Joseph weerchooto, ak ye kingo keer Jakobo kariisyek che ki iyook Joseph si kimutee ineendet, kosap muguleldap Jakobo kwandanywa." 
Genesis45:28 Ak ki le Israel, “Yamei ko uu nooto! Ta kosabei weeriinnyu Joseph. Awendi anyun ageere ineendet kotom amei.”" 
Genesis46:1 Ki nam panda anyun Israel kobooto tugul che ki tinyei, ak ye kingo it Beer-sheba kogoochi tiseiywot Kamuktaindet ne po kwandanyi Isak." 
Genesis46:2 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet Israel eng' ng'ang'utik che po kemoi, koleenji, “Jakobo! Jakobo!” Ak ki le, “Ami yu.”" 
Genesis46:3 Koleenji Kamuktaindet, “Aa Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne po kwandang'ung'. Meiywei, ichoortegei iwe Misiri; amu ayain iegu pororyet ne oo eng' olooto." 
Genesis46:4 Achoortoigei agane kobooten awendi Misiri, ak tuun amutun iman itogosu kogeny, ak kotwae Joseph eunnyi konyeguk.”" 
Genesis46:5 Ki ng'eet anyun Jakobo eng' Beer-sheba; ak ki imut `weeriigap Israel kwandanywa Jakobo, ak lagokwak ak kwonyiikwak eng' kariisyek che kiga koyook Pharaoh si kobiit kimute ineendet." 
Genesis46:6 Ki kweri tuukwak, ak ki ip tuguukwak che kiga konyoor eng' emetap Kanaan. Ki it anyun Misiri `Jakobo kobooto lagokyik tugul;" 
Genesis46:7 weeriikyik, tiibiikyik kobooto mochogoronikyik che weeriik ak che tiibiik, ak ki imut lagokyik tugul koba Misiri." 
Genesis46:8 Chu kainaigap piigap Israel, che ki it Misiri, Jakobo ak weeriikyik: Reuben, weeriit ne po tai ne po Jakobo," 
Genesis46:9 ak weeriigap Reuben chu: Hanok, Palu, Hesron ak Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Weeriigap Simion chu: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakin, Sohar ak Shaul weeriitap Chepkanaanindet." 
Genesis46:11 Weeriigap Lawi chu: Gerson, Kohat ak Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Weeriigap Judah chu: Er, Onan, Shelah, Peres ak Zerah. (Ago ki pek Er ak Onan eng' emetap Kanaan). Ak weeriigap Peres ko ki Hesron ak Hamul." 
Genesis46:13 Weeriigap Issakar chu: Tola, Pupa, Job ak Simron." 
Genesis46:13 Weeriigap Issakar chu: Tola, Pupa, Job ak Simron." 
Genesis46:14 Weeriigap Zebulun chu: Zereth, Elon ak Jaleel." 
Genesis46:15 Chuuto ko weeriigap Leah che ki sikyi Leah Jakobo eng' Padan-aram, kobooto cheptonyi Dina. Ki sosom ak somok weeriikyik kobooto tiibiikyik." 
Genesis46:16 Weeriigap Gad chu: Sipion, Hagi, Suni, Esbon, Eri, Arodi ak Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Weeriigap Asher chu: Jimna, Isba, Isbi, Beriah ak Zerah chepkametinnywa. Weeriigap Beriah chu: Heber ak Malkiel." 
Genesis46:18 Chuuto ko weeriigap Silpa ne ki igoochi Laban Leah cheptonyi, ki sikyi Jakobo chooto - ki piik taman ak lo." 
Genesis46:19 Chu weeriigap Rael kwondap Jakobo: Joseph ak Benjamin. 
Genesis46:20 Ki kisikyi Joseph eng' emetap Misiri Manasseh ak Ephraim, che ki sikyi Asenat cheptap Potipera tisiindet ne po On." 
Genesis46:21 Weeriigap Benjamin chu: Bela, Beker, Asbel, Gera, Naaman, Ei, Rosh, Hupim ak Ard." 
Genesis46:22 Chuuto weeriigap Rael che ki sikyi ineendet Jakobo - ki piik taman ak ang'wan. 
Genesis46:23 Weeriitap Dan ko Husim. 
Genesis46:24 Weeriigap Naphtali chu: Jaseel, Guni, Jeser ak Silem." 
Genesis46:25 Chuuto ko weeriigap Bila, ne ki igoochi Laban Rael cheptonyi, ki sikyi Jakobo chuuto - ki piik tisap tugul." 
Genesis46:26 Piik tugul che ki it Misiri kobooto Jakobo, ko ki piik tamanwogik lo ak lo che ki mang'une poortap Jakobo, kobatee kwonyiigap weeriigap Jakobo." 
Genesis46:27 Weeriigap Joseph, che ki kisikyi eng' Misiri, ko ki aeng'. Piik tugul che po kootap Jakobo che ki it Misiri, ko ki tamanwogik tisap." 
Genesis46:28 Ki iyookto `Jakobo Judah kondoe ineendet kwo kap Joseph, koarorchi ooreet ne wendi Goshen, ak ki it anyun emonooto kiguure Goshen." 
Genesis46:29 Ki chop anyun Joseph chepkichutinnyi, ak kwo kotorookta kwandanyi Israel agoi Goshen. Ki iboorchigei Joseph ak kotoroigei, ak koriir eng' kaatinnyi konyil ak konyil." 
Genesis46:30 Ki `leenji Israel Joseph, “Kamee anyun, amu kaageer togeng'ung', kaagaa taisabe kora.”" 
Genesis46:31 Ki leenji Joseph tupchosyekyik, ak piigap kootap kwandanyi, “Katogoste anyun awe amwachi Pharaoh aleenji, ‘Kagobwanjo weeriik che ketupche, ak piigap kootap abba, che ki mi emetap Kanaan." 
Genesis46:32 Pichooto ko kayogik, ak icheeget ko piigap tuuga; ak kaget keechiirekwak, tuukwak ak tuguukwak tugul che tinyei.’" 
Genesis46:33 Ye kuurok anyun Pharaoh, koteebenak kole, ‘Poisyeeng'wong' ko nee?’" 
Genesis46:34 Oleenji, ‘Acheek otwogiguk ko ki piigap tuuga kong'etee ko kimengech agoi kora, acheek, ak kwanisyekyok agicheek’ si kobiit omeny emet ne kiguure Goshen, amu chii age tugul ne iyagisyei ko ng'waan eng' Misiri.”" 
Genesis47:1 Ki wo anyun Joseph komwachi Pharaoh, koleenji, “Kagoit abba ak weeriik che kitupche, ak keechiirekwak, ak tuukwak, ak tuguukwak tugul che tinyei kobunu emetap Kanaan, miitei nguno emetap Goshen.”" 
Genesis47:2 Ki imut weeriik muut eng' weeriik che tupcho, ak kobarta eng' taitap Pharaoh." 
Genesis47:3 ki teebee `Pharaoh weeriik che tupcho ak Joseph koleenji, “Nee poisyeng'wong'?” Ak ki wolji Pharaoh, koleenji, “Acheek otwogiguk ko ki riibiikap kiyagiik, ko uu ye ki uu kwanisyekyok.”" 
Genesis47:4 Ki leenji `icheek Pharaoh, “Kageuchi emoni ko ki toek, amu ma mi ole kiyage akwotisyegap otwogiguk; amu ng'waan rubeet eng' emetap Kanaan. Ara anyun, kaigai chamwech acheek otwogiguk kemeny emetap Goshen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Ak ki ng'alaalji `Pharaoh Joseph, koleenji, “Kagoit oldang'ung' kwandang'ung' ak weeriik che otupche," 
Genesis47:6 mi taing'ung' emoniito po Misiri. Igoochi kwandang'ung' ak weeriik che otupche komeny emet ole karaaran miising' kosiir tugul, ingomeny anyun emetap Goshen. Ak ngot ingen piik eng' icheek che ng'oomen, igoochi koriip tuukyuk.”" 
Genesis47:7 Ki imut anyun `Joseph kwandanyi kwo taitap Pharaoh, ak ki iberuur `Jakobo Pharaoh." 
Genesis47:8 ki teebee `Pharaoh Jakobo, koleenji, “Ata kenyisyeguk?”" 
Genesis47:9 Ak ki wolji `Jakobo Pharaoh, koleenji, “Kenyiisyekyuk che ki atar eng' rutoitanyu ko pogol ak sosom. Ng'ering' ak ko yaacheen kenyiisyekyuk che ki atar, ak ma iit kenyiisyekyuk che ki it kenyiisyegap kwanisyekyuk eng' rutoitonywa.”" 
Genesis47:10 Ki iberuur `Jakobo Pharaoh, yeityo kwo eng' ole ki mi ineendet." 
Genesis47:11 Ki yai anyun Joseph komeng'iis kwandanyi ak weeriik che tupcho, ki igoochi icheek ole punjin eng' emetap Misiri, ole karaaran kosiir tugul eng' emonooto, eng' emetap Rameses, ko uu ye kiga ng'at Pharaoh." 
Genesis47:12 Kibai `Joseph kwandanyi, tupchosyekyik ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandanyi, eng' amitwogik, ko uu ye ki tee lagokwak." 
Genesis47:13 Ki ma kota komi amitwogik eng' emet komugul, amu king'wanit miising' rubeet, ak kinyalul emetap Misiri ak emetap Kanaan amu rubanooto." 
Genesis47:14 Ki iyum Joseph robiinik tugul che ki piit eng' emetap Misiri ak emetap Kanaan che ki koip piik koale peek, ak ki ip fedhaisyechooto kobwa kootap Pharaoh." 
Genesis47:15 Ye kingo keskei robiinik che po emetap Misiri, ak che po emetap Kanaan, kobwonji Misiriik tugul Joseph, ak koleenji, “Koonech amitwogik. Amu nee si kebegu eng' taing'ung'? Amu kogogeskei robiinik.”" 
Genesis47:16 Ak ki leenji Joseph, “Ogoonu tuukwok, si agoonok amitwogik che ogeere tuukwok, ngot ko kogogeskei robiinik.”" 
Genesis47:17 Kigetyi anyun `icheek Joseph tuukwak; ak ki igoochi Joseph amitwogik che ki ale paraisisyek, akwotisyek, tuuga ak sigiroik. Kibae kenyinooto amitwogik che ki ale tuukwak tugul." 
Genesis47:18 Ye kingo keskei kenyinooto, kobwonji ineendet eng' kenyiit ne po aeng', ak koleenji, “Ma kimuuchi keung'e kiptaiyandennyo, keele kogogeskei silingisyekyok tugul, ak ki kobunji tuukyok kiptaiyandennyo. Ma komi kiy ne ng'etunot neta keipchini kiptaiyandennyo, kobatee poorwekyok kityo, ak koratinwekyok." 
Genesis47:19 Amu nee anyun si kebegu eng' taing'ung', acheek ak emennyo? Alech acheek kobooto emennyo, si kenyooru amitwogik, ak kebunji acheek Pharaoh kobooto emennyo keegu otwogikyik. Koonech kesweek, si kesapchee, si ma kibegu, si ma kuber emet.”" 
Genesis47:20 Ki alji anyun `Joseph Pharaoh emet komugul ne po Misiri. Ki alda chii tugul eng' Misiriik mbareennyi, amu kieetyi rubeet icheek, ak ki punji anyun Pharaoh emet." 
Genesis47:21 Ki yai anyun `ineendet piik koek otwogikyik kong'etee tabanda age agoi tabanda age ne po Misiri. 
Genesis47:22 Kobatee emetap tisiik ne ma al ineendet, amu ki cham konyooru tisiik amitwogik chechwaak eng' Pharaoh, si koamei kebebertanywa ne ki igoochin Pharaoh. Ki ma alda anyun emennywa amu nooto." 
Genesis47:23 Ki leenji `Joseph piik anyun, “Ogeero, kaalak rani, okweek ak emeng'wong' obunji Pharaoh. Irochu kesweek, si ogoole mbareenik." 
Genesis47:24 Si ye ogesisye ogoochi Pharaoh kebeberta ne po muut. Ak kobunjook kebeberwek ang'wanu: si koek kesweegap mbareenik ak koek amitwogikwok, che po piigap kooriikwok ak amitwogik che po lagokwok.”" 
Genesis47:25 Ki le icheek, “Kaisaru saboonwekyok. Myee kenyooru chameet eng' taitap kiptaiyandennyo, ak keegu otwogigap Pharaoh.”" 
Genesis47:26 Ki yai anyun Joseph ng'olyoondonooto koek ng'atuutyet eng' emetap Misiri ne mi agoi rani, keele kobunji Pharaoh kebeberta ne po muut, kobatee emetap tisiik ineegei ne ma punjin Pharaoh." 
Genesis47:27 Ki meny anyun `Israel Goshen, eng' emetap Misiri, Ak ki ek mogore eng' olooto, ak ki sigiis ak kotesagis miising'." 
Genesis47:28 Ki meny Jakobo emetap Misiri kenyiisyek taman ak tisap, ak kenyiisyek tugul che ki tar Jakobo kosabei ko ki pogol ak artam ak tisap." 
Genesis47:29 Ye kingo riik anyun peetuusyek che po kalilotetap Israel, koguur anyun weeriinnyi Joseph ak koleenji, “Ngo kaanyooru chameet eng' taing'ung', inde anyun eung'ung' kubestanyu, iyaiywo ne myee, ak ne po iman. Kaigai ametupcha Misiri," 
Genesis47:30 ago ye aru kobooto kwanisyekyuk, isuta amanda eng' Misiri, ak itupcha kereeriisyekwak.” Ak ki le, “Ayae ko uu ye kaimwa.”" 
Genesis47:31 Ak ki le, “Iyosyeiwo.” Ak ki iyasyechi. Yeityo kong'uruuk Israel eng' itogunnyi meto." 
Genesis48:1 Kingo pata tuguuchuuto, koleenji chiito age Joseph, “Keero, myani kwandang'ung'.” Ki wo anyun komut weeriikyik tuwai, Manasseh ak Ephraim." 
Genesis48:2 Ki leenji chiito age Jakobo, “Ineni weeriing'ung' Joseph, nyoonei ole imi,” ak ki igiilgei Israel kong'eet kotebee itoogut." 
Genesis48:3 Ak ki leenji `Jakobo Joseph, “Kimong'jo Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet eng' Luz eng' emetap Kanaan, ak ki iberuura," 
Genesis48:4 ak ki leenjo, ‘Keero, agoonin iyoteet, ak abarain, ak ayain iegu pororyosyek che chaang'. Ak tuun agoochini emoni iyoteet ne piitu let eng' inyee, koek nenywa koigeny.’" 
Genesis48:5 Chechuuk anyun nguno weeriichuguk aeng'u, chu ki kisigun eng' emetap Misiri, ye kitom aitu ole imi; egu chechuuk Ephraim ak Manasseh, ko uu ye chechuuk Reuben ak Simion." 
Genesis48:6 Ago egu cheguuk che tuun isiche let eng' chu; kiguurtoe kainaigap weeriik che tupcho eng' porotennywa. 
Genesis48:7 Ye kita anyoone abunu Padan, korebena meet Rael eng' emetap Kanaan, eng' ooreet ye ma loo kitigin eng' Eprat, ak ki atupchi anyun yooto po ooreetap Eprat (nooto ko Bethlehem).”" 
Genesis48:8 Ye kingo keer `Israel weeriigap Joseph, koteebe koleenji, “Ng'oo chu?”" 
Genesis48:9 Ki leenji Joseph kwandanyi, “Weeriikyuk chu che ki koono Kamuktaindet eng' olito.” Ak ki le, “Kaigai imutwaa kobwa yu, si aberuur.”" 
Genesis48:10 Nguno ko ki neegit kogoryo konyegap Israel amu osindo; ki ma kota komuuchi kogeer kiy komyee. Ak ki imut `Joseph lagochooto koriikyi ineendet ak ki ng'utut, ak koue eunekyik." 
Genesis48:11 Ki leenji `Israel Joseph, “Kama kota abwaati ale ta ageere togeng'ung', ago nguno ko kagoboorwo Kamuktaindet lagoguk ak icheek.”" 
Genesis48:12 Yeityo koisto `Joseph lagochooto eng' kutung'oigap Jakobo ak kong'uruuk ineendet agoi ng'wony. 
Genesis48:13 Ki nam `Joseph icheek tuwai, kiname Ephraim eunnyi ne po tai kotokyi murot kaataam ne po Israel, ak koname Manasseh eunnyi ne po kaataam kotokyi eutap Israel ne po tai, ak komut koriikyi kwandanyi." 
Genesis48:14 Ago ki iito Israel eunnyi ne po tai kogonoor metitap Ephraim, weeriit ne ming'in ak kogonoor eunnyi ne po kaataam metitap Manasseh, ki igonoor eunekyik ko uu nooto, nganda ki weeriit ne po tai Manasseh." 
Genesis48:15 Ki iberuur Joseph, ak kole, “Kamuktaindet ne kibendotee tainnyi kwanisyekyuk Abraham ak Isak, Kamuktaindet ne ki paata atkinye tugul agoi kora," 
Genesis48:16 malaikaiyat ne ki ityaacha eng' yaitwogik tugul, ingoberuur lagochu; ak keguurtoe icheek kainennyu, ak kainaigap kwanisyekyuk ak icheek, Abraham ak Isak; ak ingotesagis kochang'a eng' kwenutap ng'wony.”" 
Genesis48:17 Ye kingo keer Joseph kole kagogonoor kwandanyi eunnyi ne po tai metitap Ephraim, koyait eng' tainnyi, ak ki nam anyun eutap kwandanyi kole koisto eng' metitap Ephraim si konde metitap Manasseh." 
Genesis48:18 Ki leenji `Joseph kwandanyi, “Ma uu nooto, abba! Amu ni ko weeriit ne po tai; igonoor eung'ung' ne po tai metinnyi.”" 
Genesis48:19 Ago ki eesyo kwandanyi, ak kole, “Angen ale uu nooto, weeriinnyu, angen. Egu agine ineendet pororyet, ak tuun eetu. Ago eetu ng'eetap kamet ne ming'in kosiir ineendet ak chaang'aitu lagokyik koegu pororyosyek che chaang'.”" 
Genesis48:20 Ki iberuur anyun icheek peetuunooto, koleen, “Iberuuri Israel piik amu inyee, koleen, ‘Ingoyain Kamuktaindet ogergeitu ak Ephraim ak Manasseh.’ ” Ki nam anyun Ephraim kondoe Manasseh." 
Genesis48:21 Yeityo koleenji `Israel Joseph, “Keero, neegit ame, ago mi Kamuktaindet kobooten ak koweekten kogeny iwe emetap kwanisyeguk." 
Genesis48:22 Kaagoonin nguno Shekem kebeberta agenge ne siirei che po tupchosyeguk, nooto ne ki aluule Amorik eng' rotwennyu po chok ak kwangennyu.”" 
Genesis49:1 Yeityo koguur `Jakobo weeriikyik ak koleenji, “Oyumgei tugul, si kobiit aboorwok tuguuk che tuun pwonjinok eng' peetuusyek che po let." 
Genesis49:2 Oyumgei anyun si ogas, okweek weeriigap Jakobo; Ogas Israel kwandang'wong'." 
Genesis49:3 Inyeendet Reuben ko ii weeriinnyu ne po tai, ii kamugennyu, agoi taunetap kimnateennyu; Etunateet ne po toroorindo, ak etunateet ne po kimnateet." 
Genesis49:4 Iwasegei ko uu peek, menyooru anyun etunateet; Amu ki iwe itoogutap kwandang'ung'." 
Genesis49:5 Tupcho Simion ak Lawi; Kariigap koroomnateet rotonikwak po chok. 
Genesis49:6 Ee, muguleldanyu, amat iwe kapkirwoogennywa; Ee, teegistanyu, amonamge ak tuiyennywa. Amu ki par chii eng' nereegekwak, Ak ki ep kwaryatap eiik eng' kwetyinennywa." 
Genesis49:7 Chuboot nyitatennywa, amu ki pichiien, ak nereegekwak, amu ki koroomen. Apchee icheek eng' Jakobo, ak aiyeste icheek eng' Israel." 
Genesis49:8 Inyeendet Judah ne tuun ilasun tupchosyeguk. Indoi eung'ung' kaatitap puuniguk; ing'uruukyinin weeriigap kwandang'ung' eng' taing'ung'. 
Genesis49:9 Judah ko neraneetap ng'etundo; kaiwe weeriinnyu eng' ole kaibarchi tyondo. Ki ing'uruuk, koribis ko uu ng'etundo, ak ko uu ng'etundo ne nyebuito; ng'oo ne ing'eeti?" 
Genesis49:10 Ma istoegei Judah kirokto ne po pounateet, ak ma petei ne igoitoi ng'atuutik eng' iyotennyi, agoi koit Shiloh; ak kase iit piik tugul ineendet." 
Genesis49:11 Ratyin sigiryennyi keetitap sabibuk, ak ratyin moitap sigiryennyi keetitap sabibuk ne myee kosiir; ki komwete ngoroikyik divaik che po sabibuk, ak komwete che tugegei piik che piriireen che po sabibuk." 
Genesis49:12 Ak kobiriritu konyekyik eng' divaik, ak leelagitu kelekyik eng' cheego." 
Genesis49:13 Tuun menyei Zebulun ngeguutap nyanjet, ak koek kamuung'eetap melisyek. Egu kiwotennyi Sidon." 
Genesis49:14 Sigiryet ne kiim Issakar, ne ribise kwenutap njorusyek che po keechiirek." 
Genesis49:15 Ki keer ole kimuung'e kole myee, ak ki keer emet kole karaaran, ki ing'uruuk si kolaiso, ak koek otwogindet ne poisyei." 
Genesis49:16 Irwookyin Dan piikyik, amu ooreet agenge ineendet eng' Israel." 
Genesis49:17 Egu Dan ereneet eng' ole kibunei, ereneet eng' ooreet, ne susei kwarinigap paraisisyek, si kobut kowee patai chiito ne laanyei." 
Genesis49:18 Ki agen yetuneng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Genesis49:19 Igiichi lugeet Gad, ago igiichi ineendet icheek agoi konam kwaryat." 
Genesis49:20 Ruryotin amitwogik che tuun punu Asher, ak tuun koonu tuguuk che iboiboi laitorinik." 
Genesis49:21 Kenyeleet ne subeendo Naphtali ne kagiunda, ne ng'alaali ng'aleek che myachen." 
Genesis49:22 Josep ko keetit ne yiei kot, ne yiei kot ne mi ye neegitee kondap peek; iwaktoi mooriik kosiirei inaatut." 
Genesis49:23 Kagogoochi ineendet ng'wanindo che mwoktoi kotyek, kamwok ineendet ak kausaus ineendet miising'." 
Genesis49:24 Ago tebye kwangennyi eng' kimnateet, ak ki kimegitu eunekyik, eng' eunegap Ineendet ne Kiim ne po Jakobo, eng' kainetap Mestowot, Koita ne po Israel," 
Genesis49:25 agot eng' Kamuktaindet ne po kwandang'ung', ne tuun toretin, eng' Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet ne tuun iberuurin, eng' perurwogik che po parak kipsengwet, ak perurwogik che mitune rireet, perurwogik che po kinaik, ak che po iyoteet." 
Genesis49:26 Ki kimegitu perurwogigap kwandang'ung' kosiir perurwogigap aguiywogikyuk, agoi ole itei tuloonook che po koigeny. Tebee metitap Joseph perurwogichooto, ak eng' metit parak ne po ineendet ne ki kitabaane tupchosyekyik." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamin ko suiyot ne tonisyei; amei karon che po logeet, ak kopchei koskoleny che kaluul.”" 
Genesis49:28 Chuuto tugul ko ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po Israel, ak chuuto ko ng'aleek che ki mwachi kwandanywa koberuuri icheek, ki iberuur chii tugul ko uu ole teptoi perurtanyi." 
Genesis49:29 Kingo pata anyun, kong'at icheek koleenji, “Neegit kiyuma awo ole mi piikyuk. Otuba kobooto kwanisyekyuk eng' kebeneet ne miitei mbareetap Epron Hitindet," 
Genesis49:30 eng' kebenonooto miitei mbareetap Makpela, ne tokyingei Mamre, eng' emetap Kanaan, ne ki al Abraham kobooto mbaranooto eng' Epron Hitindet, si koek ye mi kereeriisyek." 
Genesis49:31 Ki kitupchi yooto Abraham ak kwondonyi Sarah, ki kitupchi yooto kora Isak ak Rebeka kwondonyi ak icheek, ak ki atupchi Leah yooto agine." 
Genesis49:32 Ki kiale weeriigap Het mbaranooto ak kebenonooto mi yooto.” 
Genesis49:33 Ye kingo kagogees Jakobo ng'atuutik che king'ate weeriikyik, kogetita keelyekyik koba itook, ki ilil anyun ak ki kiyum kobooto piikyik." 
Genesis50:1 Ki ing'uruuk anyun Joseph kotokyigei togeetap kwandanyi, koriirchi ak kong'utut." 
Genesis50:2 Ki ng'at `Joseph otwogikyik chepkerichinik konde kerichek muustap kwandanyi. Ki inde anyun chepkerichinichooto kerichek muustap Israel. 
Genesis50:3 Ki kinde anyun kerichek ak ki igeskei peetuusyek artamu agobo ineendet, amu tenitu chooto peetuusyek che ki cham kindoe piik kerichek. Ak ki riirchi Misiriik ineendet peetuusyek tamanwogik tisap." 
Genesis50:4 Ye kingo kagobata peetuusyek che po riirek, kong'alaalji `Joseph piigap kootap Pharaoh, koleenji, “Ngo ki anyooru chameet eng' taing'wong', ko kaigai omwachi Pharaoh kogas komyee eng' itiikyik, oleenji," 
Genesis50:5 Kimakwo abba ayasyo, ak ki le, ‘Keero, kamei; tupcho kererinnyu ne ki achopchigei eng' emetap Kanaan.’ Ara anyun, kaigai igoono atogosta awo atup abba, si aweigei.”" 
Genesis50:6 Ki leenji Pharaoh, “Ui togoste, itup kwandang'ung', ko uu ye kimagun inee iyasye.”" 
Genesis50:7 Ki togosta anyun Joseph kwo kotup kwandanyi. Ki togosta kobooto ineendet otwogik tugul che po Pharaoh, ak poisyegap koonnyi, poisyek tugul che po emetap Misiri," 
Genesis50:8 ak kootap Joseph komugul, tupchosyekyik ak piigap kootap kwandanyi. Kobatee lagokwak, keechiirekwak ak tuuga che ki ng'et eng' emetap Goshen." 
Genesis50:9 Ki pa kobooto ineendet kariisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek. Ki piik che chaang' kot. 
Genesis50:10 Ye kingo it rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Atad, ne miitei Jordan pitoniin, ko ki iteiyo eng' olooto eng' riirek che ng'woneen che pichiien; ak ki ng'at keriirchi kwandanyi peetuusyek tisap." 
Genesis50:11 Ye kingo keer che menyei emonooto, Kanaanik, riirek eng' rwanyutap Atad, kole, “Eechen riirechu eng' Misiriik.” Ki kiguure anyun yooto Abel-Misiri, ne miitei Jordan pitoniin." 
Genesis50:12 Ki yachi anyun weeriikyik ko uu ye kiga ng'at ineendet icheek. 
Genesis50:13 Kisut poortannyi weeriikyik kwo emetap Kanaan, ak kitupchi kebeneet ne mi mbareetap Makpela, ne ki al Abraham kobooto mbareet eng' Epron Hitindet ne tokyingei Mamre, kobunji ineendet, si koek ye mi kereeriisyek." 
Genesis50:14 Kingo kagotup Joseph kwandanyi, koweektagei kwo Misiri kobooto tupchosyekyik, ak tugul che kiga kotogosta kobooto ineendet, ye kibendi kotubei kwandanyi." 
Genesis50:15 Ye kingo keer weeriik che tupcho ak Joseph kole kagome kwandanywa, kole, “Abeere, imuuchi kowechech Joseph ak kogeerwech yaityet tugul ne kiga kiyachi ineendet.”" 
Genesis50:16 Amu nooto anyun koyookto `icheek chiito kwo kap Joseph, koleenji, “Ki ng'at kwandang'ung' ye ki tomo kome, kole," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Omwachi Joseph oleenji: Kaigai inyochigaat tupchosyeguk amu pistoennywa ak tengektonywa, amu kiyaun yaityet.’ Ara anyun, kisaain keele nyoiywech kaat acheek otwogigap Kamuktaindet ne po kwandang'ung'.” Ak ki riir Joseph ye ki ng'alaaljin `icheeget ineendet." 
Genesis50:18 Ki pa anyun weerchooto tupcho ak icheek kobutyi ng'wony eng' tainnyi, ak koleenji, “Keero, acheek ko ki otwogiguk.”" 
Genesis50:19 Ago ki leenji Joseph, “Amoiywei, tos ageeregei Kamuktaindet?" 
Genesis50:20 Okweek, ko ki oleen ki oyaiywo ne ya, ago ki yai Kamuktaindet komyeeit, si kosulda ko uu rani, si kesar piik che chaang'." 
Genesis50:21 Amata oiywei anyun nguno. Abook kobooto lagokwok.” Ak ki igaigai icheek ak kong'alaalji eng' talasyet. 
Genesis50:22 Ki meny anyun Joseph Misiri, ineendet ak piigap kootap kwandanyi. Ki tar Joseph kenyiisyek pogol ak taman." 
Genesis50:23 Ki keer Joseph lagogap Ephraim agoi ibinda ne po somok, ak ki kigu lagogap Makir weeriitap Manasseh eng' kutung'oigap Joseph." 
Genesis50:24 Ak ki leenji Joseph tupchosyekyik, “Neegit ame; ago rutochinok iman Kamuktaindet, ak komaandak otogoste eng' emoni obe emet ne ki iyasyechi Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo.”" 
Genesis50:25 Ak kimach `Joseph piigap Israel koyasyo kole, “Rutochinok iman Kamuktaindet, ak oip kawekyuk kotogosta koba eng' oli.”" 
Genesis50:26 Kime anyun Joseph, ye kiga kotar kenyiisyek pogol ak taman. Ki kiinde kerichek muustonyi ak kinde moinget eng' olooto po Misiri." 
Exodus1:1 Chu anyun kainaigap weeriigap Israel che ki it Misiri kobooto Jakobo; ki wo chii tugul ak koonnyi: 
Exodus1:2 Reuben, Simion, Lawi ak Judah," 
Exodus1:3 Issakar, Zebulun ak Benjamin," 
Exodus1:4 Dan, Naphtali, Gad ak Asher." 
Exodus1:5 Ki tamanwogik tisap piik tugul che po iyoteetap Jakobo. Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki mi Joseph Misiri. 
Exodus1:6 Ki it anyun kolil Joseph, ak kobek tupchosyekyik tugul ak piik tugul che po ibinooto." 
Exodus1:7 Ak ki sigiis piigap Israel, kotesagis kochang'a kot konyi emet ak kogimegitu kot." 
Exodus1:8 Ki piit anyun laitoryat age ne ki poi Misiri ne ki ma kongen Joseph. 
Exodus1:9 Ki leenji `ineendet piikyik, “Ogeero, chaang' ak ko kiimeen piigap weeriigap Israel kosiirech." 
Exodus1:10 Kanyool anyun keng'ulatiitu si ma tesagis, amu nda piitu pooryeet, konamegei icheek ak puunikyok ak koboryenech, yeityo komweiso eng' emoni.”" 
Exodus1:11 Ki inde anyun kipnyeberainik si kobiit konyaliil icheek eng' otisyet ne ki nyigiis. Ki teech koteekyi Pharaoh ole kigonoree tuguuk; nganasoogap Pitom ak Raamses. 
Exodus1:12 Ago ye kingo tesak kanyaliilet ne ki kinyalil piigap Israel, ko kitesagis ak icheek kosiir, ak konyi emet. Ki iimgei kot Misiriik agobo icheek." 
Exodus1:13 Ki pirto `Misiriik piigap Israel eng' koroomnateet ne oo. 
Exodus1:14 Ki igoochi saboonwekwak kong'woneegitu eng' otwoknateet ne koroom eng' poisyetap meneet ak matubaruuk, ak eng' poisyonik alak tugul che po emet. Eng' otwoknateennywa tugul ne ki ootis, ko ki ootis eng' kanyaliilet." 
Exodus1:15 Ki ng'at anyun `laitoryatap Misiri chebyosogap sigisyo che po Yahudik che ki kiguure Sipra ak Pua," 
Exodus1:16 koleenji; “Ye osigisyechi kwonyiik che po Yahudik ak ngo keer eng' ng'echereetap sigisyo lakweet ne kagisich ole weeriit, obar, ago ngo chepto, omete kosap.”" 
Exodus1:17 Ki iywei chebyosochooto po sigisyo Kamuktaindet, ak ma yai ko uu ye ki kang'at `laitoryat, ak kimeto weeriik kosapcho." 
Exodus1:18 Ki kuur laitoryat chebyosochooto ak koteepse koleenji, “Amu nee si oyai ko uu ni, omete weeriik kosapcho?”" 
Exodus1:19 Kowolji `chebyosochooto Pharaoh koleenji; “Ma kergei kwonyiigap Yahudik ak che po Misiriik. Kiimeen icheek ak isip kosigisyei kotom koitita chebyosetap sigisyo.” 
Exodus1:20 Ki yachi Kamuktaindet ne myee chebyosochooto po sigisyo, ak kitesagis anyun piik ak kogimegitu miising'." 
Exodus1:21 Amu kayweet ne ki iywei chebyosochooto po sigisyo Kamuktaindet, ko ki iberuur Kamuktaindet kooriikwak." 
Exodus1:22 Ki ng'at `Pharaoh piikyik kogeny koleenji; “Owiirchi weeriit age tugul ne kisichei aino ak omete chepto age tugul kosap.” 
Exodus2:1 Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki itunis chiito age ne po pororyetap Lawi, kotun cheptap pororyonooto po Lawi." 
Exodus2:2 Ak ki manach osotyondonooto ak kosich weeriit, ak ye kingo keer kole lakweet ne karaaran, kouny ineendet arawek somok." 
Exodus2:3 Ye ki mata komuuchi kouny kosiir yooto, kocheeng'ji ineendet kitonget ne po mutweek, ak komale lamit ak manget ak konde lakweet oriit. Yeityo konde kouny eng' saoset oriit eng' ngeguutap aineet." 
Exodus2:4 Kitonone chepkamet ye ma loo, si kogeer kiit ne tos yaak eng' lakwanooto." 
Exodus2:5 Ki choortagei cheptap Pharaoh kwo kouungei eng' aino. Ye kibendoti tiibiik eng' tabandap aineet che ki mi kobooto ineendet, kogeer cheptap Pharaoh kitonget eng' saoset oriit ak ki iyookto otwogindennyi kwo koipchi." 
Exodus2:6 Kingo yaat kogeer lakweet ne weeriit koriirei. Kiriree `ineendet lakwanooto ak kole; “Agenge lakwani eng' che po Yahudik.” 
Exodus2:7 ki teebee chepkametap lakwanooto cheptap Pharaoh koleenji; “Tos myee awo aguurun cheplakwet eng' osotigap Yahudik si koriibun lakwaniito?” 
Exodus2:8 Koleenji cheptap Pharaoh; “Ee, Ui iguur.” Ki wo anyun chebooto koguur kametap lakweet." 
Exodus2:9 Ki leenji `cheptap Pharaoh ineendet; “Imut lakwani, ui iiguiywa, si agoonin melektang'ung'.” Ki imut anyun osotyondonooto lakweet ak koriip." 
Exodus2:10 Kingo kagoner ak koeet lakweet, komutyi cheptap Pharaoh ak ki nam koek weeriinnyi. Kiguure kainennyi Musa kole: “Amu ki among'u eng' peek.”" 
Exodus2:11 Eng' peetuusyek alak ye kiga koeet Musa, ko ki wo ole mi tupchosyekyik ak ki keer laisennywa. Ki keer Misirindet kobirei Hebranindet ne ki age eng' piikyik." 
Exodus2:12 Kigusyigong' Musa komosi ak komosi, ak kingo keer kole ma mi chii, kobar misirindonooto ak kotube ng'aniek." 
Exodus2:13 Ki wo kogeny eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ak ki keer kobiregei piik aeng'u che po Yahudik. Koleenji ineendet ne ki kalel, “Amu nee si ibir chiing'wong'?”" 
Exodus2:14 Kowolji koleenji, “Ng'oo ne koindein iegu pounindet ak kirwoogindet irwookwech? Ileen ibara, ko uu ye koibar Misirindet?” Amu niito ko ki iyweis Musa ak ki ibwaat kole, “Kaagaa kogenai niito.”" 
Exodus2:15 Kingo kas Pharaoh ng'olyoondonooto, kocheeng' kobar Musa. Ago ki mwei anyun Musa eng' taitap Pharaoh ak kwo komeny emetap Midian, kotebi eng' ole neegitee keriingetap peek." 
Exodus2:16 Ki pwa tiibiik tisabu che po tisiindet age ne po Midian si kosiil peek konyiit moingonik si kobiit konaga akweetap keechiiregap kwandanywa. 
Exodus2:17 Ak ki pwa mestoweek koon tiipchooto, ago king'eet Musa kotoret ak konaga peek akweet." 
Exodus2:18 Ye kingo it tiipchooto ole mi kwandanywa Reuel, koteebe koleenji, “Ngo sip oweigei rani?”" 
Exodus2:19 Kowol icheek kole; “Katoretech Misirindet eng' eunegap mestoweek, yeityo kosiilwech peek ak konaga akweet.”" 
Exodus2:20 Koleenji icheek; “Mi ano chiichooto? Amu nee si omete? Oguur konyo koamis.” 
Exodus2:21 Ki cham Musa kotebi ak chiichooto, ak ki igoochi `ineendet Musa cheptonyi Ziporah kotun." 
Exodus2:22 Ki sich `Ziporah weeriit, ak kiguure Musa kainennyi Gershom. Amu ki le; “Aa kiprutoiyo eng' emetap pororyosyek alak.”" 
Exodus2:23 Ye kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang', kome laitoryatap Misiri. Ki tigenso eng' ng'wanindo ak koriiryo piigap Israel amu otwoknateet, ak ki ityi riirekwak Kamuktaindet amu otwoknateet." 
Exodus2:24 Ki kas Kamuktaindet tigenoikwak, ak ki ibwaat kayomisennyi ne ki iyomisyi Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Ki keer Kamuktaindet piigap Israel, ak ki nai kiit ne uu." 
Exodus3:1 Eng' pesyo ye ki iyagi Musa akweetap keechiirek che po kapyugoinnyi Jethro, tisiindetap Midian, kokweri koba surkwen komosin, ak ki it tulweetap Kamuktaindet, ne kiguure Horeb." 
Exodus3:2 Eng' yooto, komong'ji ineendet `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maat ne lalei ne ki mang'une kwenutap keetit ne samum. Kingo keer, kogeer kole, ki ma kolalei keetoto kilale maat." 
Exodus3:3 Ak ki le Musa, “Kawe ageer kwang'utyoni tee ni, katepto ano si ma lalei keetit?”" 
Exodus3:4 Ye kingo keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, kawo kogeer, koguur ineendet `Kamuktaindet eng' kwenutap keetit koleenji; “Musa, Musa!” Kole Musa, “Ami yu.”" 
Exodus3:5 Koleenji, “Ameriigu yu, ireegu kweoniguk eng' keelyeguk amu tiliil yooto itonone.”" 
Exodus3:6 Ak ki leenji, “Aa Kamuktaindet ne po kwandang'ung', aa Kamuktaindetap Abraham, aa Kamuktaindetap Isak, aa Kamuktaindetap Jakobo.” Ki uny Musa togeennyi, amu ki iywei kogeer Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus3:7 Ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; “Koageer iman nyalilwogigap piikyuk che mi Misiri, koagas riirekwak amu chemogenik che usausi icheek ak angen ng'wanindanywa." 
Exodus3:8 Kachooruge anyun si kobiit asar icheek eng' eunegap Misiriik, ak amutu icheek kotogos komong' eng' emonooto koba emet ne myee ne paraa. Emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo; emetap Kanaanik, Hitik, Amorik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik." 
Exodus3:9 Ee, kagobwanjo riiregap piigap Israel, ak koageer kanyaliilet ne inyalili icheek `Misiriik." 
Exodus3:10 Nyoo anyun, si ayookten iwe kap Pharaoh, si kobiit imoong'u piikyuk, piigap Israel eng' Misiri.”" 
Exodus3:11 Ago ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet, “Aa ng'oo, ne tos amuuch awo kap Pharaoh, ak among'u piigap Israel eng' Misiri?”" 
Exodus3:12 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ami kobooten iman ak egu ni kaboorunet ne inae ile kayookten: ye kaimoong'u piik eng' Misiri, oboisyechi Kamuktaindet eng' tulwooni.”" 
Exodus3:13 Ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet, “Ye ait ole mi piigap Israel, ak amwachi aleenji, Kagoyokwo Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyekwok Anyoonjok; ak ngo teebena koleenjo, ‘Kiguure ngo kainennyi?’ Aleenjini nee pichooto?”" 
Exodus3:14 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet Musa; “ ‘Aa ne Aa,’ Mwachi piigap Israel ng'olyoondoni, leenji, Kagoyokwo anyoonjok.”" 
Exodus3:15 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Musa kogeny, “Imwachini piigap Israel ng'olyoondoni ileenjini, Kagoyokwo Anyoonjok Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po kwanisyekwok, Kamuktaindetap Abraham, Kamuktaindetap Isak, Kamuktaindetap Jakobo; kainennyu niito agoi koigeny, ak kabwaatennyu niito agoi ibinwek tugul." 
Exodus3:16 Ui, iyum poisyegap Israel, ak ileenji icheek, Ki komong'ja Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyekwok; Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo, koleenjo: Kaanyonjok iman, ak kaageer nooto ne kiyaiywok eng' Misiri." 
Exodus3:17 Ak kaatil ale, Amutwok otogosu omang'une nyalildap Misiri, agoi oit emetap Kanaanik, Hitik, Amorik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik, emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo.”" 
Exodus3:18 Tuun kasei iit kuting'ung' icheek. Eng' yooto, obe kaplaitoryatap Misiri, inyee kobooto poisyegap Israel, ak oleenji, “Kogetuiye ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po Yahudik. Ara anyun, kisaain keele ityaachech keebe pandap peetuusyek somok eng' surkwen, si kobiit kigoochi tiseiywot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Exodus3:19 Angen ale ma chamwok laitoryatap Misiri obe, kobatee eng' euut ne kiim." 
Exodus3:20 Ara achuule eunnyu abiree Misiriik kwang'utik che amache ayai eng' kwenunnywa ak ye ibata chooto kotyachak obe. 
Exodus3:21 Ak agoonok onyooru chameet eng' taitap Misiriik si ye obe, koma tuun obe puch." 
Exodus3:22 Ingosoom anyun kwondo age tugul chiitap kokwennyi, ak eng' ineendet ne tebee koonnyi, tuguuk che po fedha, ak tuguuk che po thahabu, ak ngoroik. Si olaakyi weeriikwok, ak tiibiikwok, ak onyaban anyun tuguugap Misiriik.”" 
Exodus4:1 Ki wolji anyun Musa koleenji, “Ma iyana anan kogas iit kutinnyu pichooto? Amu mwaei koleen, ‘Ma iboorungei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 koteebee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Nee no itinye eng' euut?” Kowol kole; “Kirokto.”" 
Exodus4:3 Koleenji Kamuktaindet, “Wirchi ng'wony.” Ak kingo wiirchi ng'wony kowalak koek ereneet, ak ki mwee Musa." 
Exodus4:4 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa; “Iyogoite eung'ung', ak inam katutyennyi.” Ki iyogoito eunnyi anyun Musa, ak konam, ak kiwalak koek kirokto eng' eunnyi." 
Exodus4:5 “Si kobiit koyan icheek kole, ki iboorungei Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ne po kwanisyekwok Kamuktaindetap Abraham, Kamuktaindetap Isak ak Kamuktaindetap Jakobo.”" 
Exodus4:6 Ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny, “Irooch euut tegeng'ung'.” Kingo rooch eunnyi tegeet ak kocher, ogeero, ki tinyei eunnyi mogondosaik, ak kiwalak koleelit ko uu teluji." 
Exodus4:7 Koleenji Kamuktaindet; “Ketite euut irookte tegeng'ung'.” Ki iweech Musa euut korookto tegeennyi ak ye kingo nem, ko kagomyeeit ko uu yegai." 
Exodus4:8 “Ngo ma kasin, anan ngo ma iyan kaboorunet ne po tai, komuuchi koyan kaboorunet ne po let." 
Exodus4:9 Ago, ngo ma iyan kaboorunoichuuto aeng', anan ngo ma kas kuting'ung', isilu anyun peek eng' aineet ak iroong'ji ng'wony ole yaamaat. Walaksei peechooto kerame aineet koegu korotiik eng' emet ne yaamaat.”" 
Exodus4:10 Ago ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ee, Kiptaiyannyu, mangen ang'alaal kobooch keny agoi raini ing'alaalwo, amu nyigiis ng'eleptanyu ak ko ua kuut.”" 
Exodus4:11 Ak kiteebe `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koleenji; “Ng'oo ne kiyaei kutitap chii? Anan ne yaei chii konamak kuut, anan kotimak, anan si kogeerto, anan kogor? Tos ma anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?" 
Exodus4:12 Ara anyun, tau panda ui, ami kobooten eng' ng'alaaleng'ung', ak aneetiin che kanyool imwa.”" 
Exodus4:13 Ago ki le Musa, “Ee, Kamuktaindet, asaain ale, iyookte chii age ne imache iyookte.”" 
Exodus4:14 Ki koromitu nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa, ak ki leenji, “Tos ma mi ng'eetap komet Aron lawindet? Angen ale imuuchi kong'alaal komyee. Nyoonei ineendet agine kotorogun, ak ye kerin ineendet koboiboitu eng' muguleldanyi." 
Exodus4:15 Ing'alaaljini ineendet ak imwachi ng'aleek che mwaei. Ami anee kobooten eng' ng'alaaleng'ung', ak eng' ng'alaalennyi, ak aneetaak ne kanyool oyai." 
Exodus4:16 Egu ineendet kuting'ung', ng'alaalindet ne ng'alaaljin piik, ak iigei inyee kamuktaindet eng' ineendet." 
Exodus4:17 Ara anyun, ibote inyee kirogi eng' eung'ung' si koek ne iyae kaboorunoik.”" 
Exodus4:18 Kingo pata koweek Musa kwo kap `Jethro; kapyugoinnyi ak koleenji, “Kaigai chamwo awo, aweekyigei ole mi piikyuk eng' Misiri, ageer ngo ta kosaptos.” Ak ki leenji Jethro Musa, “Ui eng' kaalyeet.”" 
Exodus4:19 Kingo ta komiitei Musa oliin po Midian kong'alaalji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Ui, ketitegei Misiri amu ki kobek piik tugul che ki cheeng'ei kobarin.”" 
Exodus4:20 Ki imut Musa osotyonnyi ak weeriikyik ak kolaany sigiryet, yeityo konaam panda koweek kwo emetap Misiri. Ak ki ip anyun Musa kirokto ne po Kamuktaindet eng' eunnyi." 
Exodus4:21 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa; “Ye igetitegei Misiri, iriip ak iyai eng' taitap Pharaoh kwang'utik tugul cho koagoonin kimnateet iyai. Ago auuiiti muguleldanyi, si ma igoochi piik koba." 
Exodus4:22 Ileenjini Pharaoh, ‘Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Weeriinnyu Israel ak ko taitanyu," 
Exodus4:23 ak kaamwaun aleenjin, Igoochi weeriinnyu kwo, si kobiit koboisyeiwo. Ago amu kaiete kwo, abare anyun taitang'ung'.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Ye kita komi kootap toek eng' ooreet kowendi, kotuiye `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak kimach kobar ineendet." 
Exodus4:25 Ki nam anyun Ziporah koita ne ng'atip, koyatitae weeriinnyi ak koting'e iriryot keelyegap Musa. Yeityo kole, “Iman ii manong'otyondennyu ne po korotiik.”" 
Exodus4:26 Ki pagaakta `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. Ak ki le osotyondonooto, “Ii manong'otyot ne po korotiik, amu kamuratanet.”" 
Exodus4:27 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron, “Ui, torookte Musa eng' surkwen.” Ki wo anyun, ak kituiyechi tulweetap Kamuktaindet ak kitorooch ineendet." 
Exodus4:28 Ak ki mwachi `Musa Aron ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kiga koyooktoe, ak kaboorunoik tugul che kiga koyomisyi." 
Exodus4:29 Yetyo koba Musa ak Aron koyum poisyek tugul che po piigap Israel. 
Exodus4:30 Ki mwa anyun Aron ng'aleek tugul che kiga komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, ak ki yai kaboorunoik eng' taitap piik tugul," 
Exodus4:31 ak ki iyan piik. Ak ye kingo kas kole kagonyonji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel, ak kogogeer nyalilwogikwak, kong'uruukso kosa anyun." 
Exodus5:1 Kingo pata chuuto koba Musa ak Aron ak koleenji Pharaoh, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po Israel, kole, ‘Mete piikyuk koba, si kobiit koyaiywo igoorto eng' surkwen.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 koteebee Pharaoh koleenji, “Ng'oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne tos agas iit ng'aleekyik kot achamji Israel koba? Mangen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogeny, ma chamjini Israel koba.”" 
Exodus5:3 Ak ki le icheek, “Kinyonjech Kamuktaindet ne po Yahudik. Kaigai anyun undech keebe pandap peetuusyek somok eng' surkwen, si keeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, tiseiywot, si ma pirenech koroito, anan ko rotwetap chok.”" 
Exodus5:4 Ago ki wolji `laitoryatap Misiri icheek koleenji, “Amu nee si omache otyach piik eng' poisyonikwak inyee Musa ak Aron? Oba ole mi poisyonikwok.”" 
Exodus5:5 Ki le Pharaoh, “Kagochang'a piikwok che mi emet kosiir, nguno ko kaogoochi kometo laisennywa.”" 
Exodus5:6 Eng' peetuut nooto kong'at `Pharaoh kipnyeberainigap piik ak pounik, koleenji," 
Exodus5:7 “Amata ogoochi piik kogeny mobeek che cham koyae matubaruuk. Ingoba icheegei kocheeng'jigei. 
Exodus5:8 Ago obirchini icheek koyai matubaruuk che tee che kocham koyaei eng' kotugul. Amochuchuch kiy eng' chooto. Choriren pichu, nooto amu nee si ko riirtos ak koleen: ‘Koonech keebe keeng'ji tiseiywot Kamuktaindennyo.’" 
Exodus5:9 Otesyi icheek poisyet ne nyigiis, si kobiit koyai asi mata koepchi iit ng'aleek che ma po iman.”" 
Exodus5:10 Ki manda anyun kipnyeberainik ak chemogenikwak, kong'alaalji piik koleenji, “Kamwa ko uu ni Pharaoh kole, ‘Ma agoonok mobeek," 
Exodus5:11 oba okweegei, ocheeng' eng' ole omuuchi onyoorchi, ago ma kichuchuchi kiy eng' poisyeng'wong'.’ ”" 
Exodus5:12 Ki yestaat anyun piik eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri koyumat mobeek che beelee matubaruuk. 
Exodus5:13 Ki ichirchir `kipnyeberainik piik, koleenji, “Owong'u poisyonikwok, che kocham oyae peetuut age tugul, ko uu ye kocham oyae otinye mobeek.”" 
Exodus5:14 Ki kibir anyun kipnyeberainigap piigap Israel, che ki indoi chemogenigap Pharaoh, ak keteebe keleenji, “Amu nee si mowong'u motwetap poisyet ne po amut ak ne po ra, oyai matubaruuk ko uu ye kocham oyae oin kora?”" 
Exodus5:15 Ak ki pa anyun pounigap piigap Israel koriirchi Pharaoh, koleenji, “Amu nee si iyaiywech acheek otwogiguk ko uu ni?" 
Exodus5:16 Ma ki koonech mobeek, ago kibirchinech keyai matubaruuk ak kebirech acheek otwogiguk, ago mi lelutyet piiguk.”" 
Exodus5:17 Ago ki leenji, “Oo choriren, oo choriren; nooto anyun si omwae oleen, ‘Koonech keebe keeng'ji tiseiywot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’" 
Exodus5:18 Ara anyun, oba oyai poisyet. Ma kigoonok mobeek, ak kanyool oibu matubaruuk che yamegei ak che kogimachei.”" 
Exodus5:19 Ki keer pounigap piigap Israel kole tinyei nyalilda, ye ki ngemwachi keleenji, “Mochuchuchi kiy eng' matabarukwok che cham oyae eng' peetuut age tugul.”" 
Exodus5:20 Ye kingo manda icheek eng' kap Pharaoh, kotuiye Musa ak Aron kotonondos eng' ooreet," 
Exodus5:21 ak ki leenji icheek, “Ingogeerok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor korwookwok, amu kaoyaech kesamisitu eng' taitap Pharaoh, ak eng' taitap otwogikyik, kot onde rotwetap chok eunekwak kobarenech.”" 
Exodus5:22 Ak kiweekyigei Musa ye mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koleenji, “Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu nee si iyachi ne ya pichu? Amu nee si iyookwo?" 
Exodus5:23 Amu kobooch ngap anyoo kap Pharaoh ang'alaalji eng' kaineng'ung', ko ki koyachi pichu ne ya, ak tomo isaru piiguk agot kitigin.”" 
Exodus6:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Machei si igeer nguno kiit ne amache ayachi Pharaoh, amu eng' eunyu ne kiim, kogoochin icheek koba, ak koon koba eng' emennyi eng' eunooto kiim.”" 
Exodus6:2 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet Musa koleenji; “Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Exodus6:3 Ki among'ji Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo, ko aa Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet agot nga ki ma naa icheek eng' kainennyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus6:4 Ki agimiit kayomisennyu kobooto icheek, ale agoochi emetap Kanaan, ole ki menyei icheek ko kiprutoin." 
Exodus6:5 Kobooto nooto, ko koagas tigenoigap piigap Israel che mi eunegap Misiriik ko ratotiin, ak kaabwaat kayomisennyu." 
Exodus6:6 Ileenji anyun piigap Israel, ‘Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak among'wok omang'une otetap Misiriik. Asarwok eng' otwoknateet ne oote icheek ak atyachak eng' euut ne chuulaat ak eng' kwang'utik che eecheen che po kirwooget." 
Exodus6:7 Anamok oegu piikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindet eng' okweek, si onai ole Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne imoong'wok omang'une otetap Misiriik." 
Exodus6:8 Ak amutwak obwa emet ne ki aitoochi eunnyu agoochi Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo, ak agoonok kobunjook. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Musa piigap Israel ko uu nooto. Nga no, ko ki ma kas icheek ng'aleekyik amu ng'wanindo ne ki tinyei eng' mugulelwekwak, ak otwoknateet ne ki koroom." 
Exodus6:10 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Exodus6:11 “Mande, ing'alaalji Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri ileenji kochamji piigap Israel komanda eng' emennyi.”" 
Exodus6:12 Ago ki ng'alaal Musa eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ngot koma kasa piigap Israel, ko tos imuuchi kogasta ano Pharaoh ak anee atinye kutit ne palyach?”" 
Exodus6:13 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron agobo piigap Israel ak Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri, ak kong'at icheek koomaanda piigap Israel eng' emetap Misiri." 
Exodus6:14 Chu ko poisyegap kooriigap weeriigap Reuben taitap Israel: Hanok, Palu, Hesron, ak Karmi. Chuuto ko ortinwegap kap Reuben." 
Exodus6:15 Weeriigap Simion ko ki: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakin, Sohar, ak Shaul weeriitap cheptap Kanaan. Chuuto ko ortinwegap kap Simion." 
Exodus6:16 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Lawi ko uu ortinwekwak: Gerson, Kohat, ak Merari; ak kenyiisyegap Lawi kotee kosabei ko ki kenyiisyek pogol ak sosom ak tisap." 
Exodus6:17 Weeriigap Gerson ko ki: Libni ak Shimei, ko uu kooriikwak." 
Exodus6:18 Ak weeriigap Kohat ko ki: Amram, Itshar, Hebron, ak Uzziel. Kenyiisyegap Kohat kotee kosabei ko ki kenyiisyek pogol ak sosom ak somok." 
Exodus6:19 Weeriigap Merari ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Chuuto ko kooriigap Lawiik ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Exodus6:20 Ki itun anyun Amram sengennyi Jokebed, ne ki sikyi Aron ak Musa. Kenyiisyegap Amram kotee kosabei ko ki kenyiisyek pogol ak sosom ak tisap." 
Exodus6:21 Weeriigap Itshar ko: Kora, Nepeg ak Zikri." 
Exodus6:22 Ki weeriigap Uzziel ko Mishael, Elzaphan ak Sitri." 
Exodus6:23 Ki itun `Aron Eliseba, cheptap Aminadab, chepkametap Nason, ne ki sikyi ineendet Nadap, Abiu, Eleazar ak Ithamar." 
Exodus6:24 Weeriigap Kora ko: Asir, Elkanah, ak Abiasap; chuuto ko kooriigap Koraik." 
Exodus6:25 Ak ki itun Eleazar weeriitap Aron age eng' tiibiigap Putiel, ne ki sikyi ineendet Phineas. Chuuto ko poisyegap kooriik che po kwanisyegap Lawiik ko uu kooriikwak." 
Exodus6:26 Ki Aron ak Musa che ki mwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji: “Omoong'u piigap Israel eng' emetap Misiri ko uu lugosyekwak.” 
Exodus6:27 Ki icheeget Musa ak Aron che ki mwachi Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri, komaanda piigap Israel eng' Misiri." 
Exodus6:28 Ak eng' peetuunooto ne ki ng'alaaljin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' emetap Misiri," 
Exodus6:29 kong'alaalji koleenji, “Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Mwachi Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri tuguuk tugul che amwaun.”" 
Exodus6:30 Ago ki mwa Musa eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Atinye kutit ne palyach, imuuchi kogastaa ano Pharaoh?”" 
Exodus7:1 Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji, “Kayain iigei Kamuktaindet eng' Pharaoh, ak koek ng'eetap komet Aron maotyondeng'ung'." 
Exodus7:2 Imwachini ng'eetap komet Aron tuguuk tugul che ang'atiin, si komwachi ineendet Pharaoh kounda piigap Israel komanda eng' emennyi." 
Exodus7:3 Auuiiti muguleldap Pharaoh, ak ates kaboorunoikyuk ak kwang'utikyuk eng' emetap Misiri," 
Exodus7:4 ago ma imuuchi kogasaak Pharaoh, ak eng' nooto anyun, andai eunnyu Misiri, ak among'u lugosyekyuk, piikyuk piigap Israel, komang'une emetap Misiri eng' poisyonik che eecheen che po kirwoogutik." 
Exodus7:5 Ye achuul eunnyu atokyi Misiri, ak among'u piigap Israel eng' kwenunnywa, konai Misiriik kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus7:6 Ki yai anyun Musa ak Aron ko uu nooto, ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus7:7 Kiga koit kenyiisyegap Musa tamanwogik sisiit, ak ki tamanwogik sisiit ak somok kenyiisyegap Aron ye ki ng'alaaljindos icheek ak Pharaoh." 
Exodus7:8 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron, koleenji," 
Exodus7:9 “Ye teebenak Pharaoh kwang'utyet, imwachi inyee Aron anyun konam kiroktonyi ak kowiirchi ng'wony si kobiit koek ereneet eng' taitap Pharaoh.”" 
Exodus7:10 Ko uu nooto ko ki pa Musa ak Aron anyun kap Pharaoh, ak ki yai ko uu ye kiga ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki wiirchi ng'wony Aron kiroktonyi eng' taitap Pharaoh, ak eng' taitap otwogikyik, ak kiwalak koek ereneet." 
Exodus7:11 Ki guur agine Pharaoh piik che tinyei utaatyet ak orgoik. Ak ki yai ak icheek ko uu nooto eng' ng'oorsennywa piigap Misiri che ng'oorsei ak che ng'oomen. 
Exodus7:12 Ki wiirchi chii age tugul eng' icheek kiroktonyi ng'wony ak kiwalogis koek erenook. Ago kilugui kirokto ne po Aron kirokweekwak. 
Exodus7:13 Ki iuit muguleldap Pharaoh, ak ma kas iit icheek ko uu ye kiga komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus7:14 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Uui muguleldap Pharaoh, kaeesyo kounda piik koba." 
Exodus7:15 Ara anyun ui karon kap Pharaoh amu wendi aino. Tonone tabandap aineet si otuiyechi yooto. Ip kirokto nooto kowalak koek ereneet eng' eung'ung'," 
Exodus7:16 ui ak ileenji ineendet, ‘Kagoyokwo Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po Yahudik, ak kale, mete piikyuk koba si kobiit koboisyeiwo eng' surkwen; agoi kora ko tomo igas.’" 
Exodus7:17 Kamwa anyun ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Inae eng' ni ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Keero, akweree kirogi atinye eng' eunnyu peechu mi ainooni, ak kowalogis peek koek korotiik." 
Exodus7:18 Pegu njireenik che mi aineet, ak kobul aineet, ak kowech Misiriik koe peek che punu aineet.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ileenji Aron, ‘Nam kiroktong'ung' ak ichuul eung'ung' itokyi peegap Misiri, ainoosyekwak, kereruusyekwak, tamboinikwak ak togomwekwak tugul che po peek. Piitu korotiik eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri ak eng' tereenigap peek che po keetiik, ak eng' tereenigap peek che po koik.’ ”" 
Exodus7:20 Ki yai Musa ak Aron ko uu ye ki kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kisut kirogoto ak kokweree peek che mi aineet, eng' taitap Pharaoh, ak eng' taitap otwogikyik, ak kiwalogis peek tugul che mi aineet koek korotiik." 
Exodus7:21 Ki pek njireenik che ki mi aineet ak kibul aineet kot ko mata komuuch Misiriik koe peegap aineet, ak ki piit korotiik eng' emet tugul ne po Misiri." 
Exodus7:22 Ago ye kingo yai ko uu nooto eng' ng'oorsennywa ak icheek piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei che po Misiri, kogiuit muguleldap Pharaoh, ak ma kas iit icheek; ko uu ye ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus7:23 Kiweektagei anyun Pharaoh kwo koonnyi, ak ki ma iit ineendet tuguuk che koyaagiis koek kiy." 
Exodus7:24 Kibalaat anyun Misiriik tugul ole neegitee aineet koleen tamangap konyoor peek che eei, amu ki ma imuuch koe peegap aineet." 
Exodus7:25 Ki iwong'kei peetuusyek tisabu kobooch ngap kokwer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aineet. 
Exodus8:1 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ui kap Pharaoh ak ileenji kang'atiin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Mete piikyuk koba, si kobiit koboisyeiwo." 
Exodus8:2 Ngot ietee koba, keero, abiree emeng'ung' komugul mororochik." 
Exodus8:3 Nyiei aineet mororochik, ak kotogosta koba koong'ung', ak koba koot ne irue, agoi itogung'ung', kooriigap otwogiguk ak kooriigap piiguk. Pendi mororochik kapkoimaung'ung', ak tereeniguk che ki chobe magatiinik." 
Exodus8:4 Togostaenen inyee, piiguk ak otwogiguk tugul mororochik.’ ”" 
Exodus8:5 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ileenji Aron, ‘Chuul eung'ung' ne iting'e kirokto itokyi ainoosyek, kereruusyek ak tamboinik, si komong' mororochik komong'ji emetap Misiri.’ ”"
