Exodus8:6 Ki chuul anyun Aron eunnyi kotokyi peegap Misiri, ak ki togos mororochik konyi emetap Misiri." 
Exodus8:7 Ago ki yai piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei eng' ng'oorsennywa ko uu nooto, ak komoong'ji mororochik emetap Misiri." 
Exodus8:8 Ki kuur anyun `Pharaoh Musa ak Aron ak koleenji, “Oriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si koistaena anee ak eng' piikyuk mororochik, ak amete anee piik koba kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywot.”" 
Exodus8:9 Koleenji Musa Pharaoh, “Kagoonin imwa ile auyo ole asaun, ak asachi otwogiguk, ak piiguk kebar mororochik ak koistoenogei eng' korikwok ak kotebee aino kityo.”" 
Exodus8:10 Ak ki wol kole, “Mutai.” Koleenji Musa, “Ingoyaak ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung', si kobiit inai ile ma mi age ne uu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Exodus8:11 Istoenengei mororochik, ak eng' kooriguk, eng' otwogiguk ak eng' piiguk. Ng'etu eng' aino kityo.”" 
Exodus8:12 Ki manda anyun Musa ak Aron eng' kap Pharaoh ak koriirchi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koisto mororochik che kiga ibookyine Pharaoh. 
Exodus8:13 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ng'olyootap Musa ak ki pek mororochik eng' kooriik, eng' kokwotinwek ak eng' emet komugul." 
Exodus8:14 Ak ki kiiyumat keburusyek che chaang', ak ki ibul emet komugul." 
Exodus8:15 Ago kingo keer Pharaoh kole ma komi mororochik, kouiit muguleldanyi ineendet, ak ki ma kas icheek, ko uu ye kiga komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus8:16 Koleenji kogeny `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ileenji Aron, ‘Sut kiroktong'ung' ak ikwere temburyegap emet, si kobiit kowalogis temburyechooto koek isireek eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus8:17 Ki yai inee ko uu nooto. Ki chuul eunnyi Aron ak kokwere kiroktonyi temburyek che po ng'wony, ak ki piit isireek che ki laany piik ak tyong'ik. Ki ek temburyek tugul che po emetap Misiri komugul isireek." 
Exodus8:18 Kityem piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei eng' ng'oorsennywa komong' isireek, ago ki ma imuuch. Ki nam anyun isireechooto piik ak tyong'ik." 
Exodus8:19 Ki mwachi anyun pichooto ng'oomen che ng'oorsei, Pharaoh, koleenji, “Ni ko mornetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki uiit muguleldap Pharaoh, ak ma kas icheek ko uu ye kiga mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus8:20 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ng'eet karon muste ak itonon eng' taitap Pharaoh ye wendi aino ak ileenji ineendet, ‘Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, mete piikyuk koba koboisyeiwo.’" 
Exodus8:21 Ago ngot ko mechamji piikyuk koba, ko ne ma tiny ayoogu kalyang'ik eng' chaang'indo kobwonjin, ak kobwonji otwogiguk ak piiguk, ak kooriguk oriit. Nyiei kalyang'ik kooriigap piigap Misiri, ak nyie ole tonone tugul eng' ng'wony." 
Exodus8:22 Ago abestosi atabaani eng' peetuunooto emetap Goshen ole menyei piikyuk si ma it kalyang'ik olooto ak si kobiit inai inyee ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi emet. 
Exodus8:23 Andai kiwateet kwenutap piikyuk ak piiguk. Piitu kaboorunonooto mutai.” 
Exodus8:24 Ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto; Kichang'a kalyang'ik miising' eng' kootap Pharaoh, ak eng' kooriigap otwogikyik ak king'emak emetap Misiri komugul amu kalyang'ik." 
Exodus8:25 Kiyookto Pharaoh keguur Musa ak Aron, ak koleenji, “Oba eng' emoni po Misiri ibogoochi tiseiywot Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Exodus8:26 Ago ki wolji Musa Koleenji, “Ma nyolu keyai ko uu nooto amu tiseiywek che ma kegoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ko imuuch ko kanaguut eng' Misiriik. Tos ngegoite tiseiywot ne wechei icheek eng' tainnywa, ko tos ma lachech eng' koik?" 
Exodus8:27 Nyolu keebe panda ne po peetuusyek somok eng' surkwen, si kegoochi tiseiywot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ko uu ye kong'atech.”" 
Exodus8:28 Kowol kole Pharaoh, “Agoonok obe pandang'wong' si kobiit ogoochi tiseiywot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' surkwen. Ago mat obe anyun ole loo miising', ak osaaiywo agane.”" 
Exodus8:29 Koleenji Musa, “Keero, kawe eng' ole imi nguno si asa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit koistoenen inyee Pharaoh, otwogiguk ak piiguk kalyang'ik mutai. Ago mat koboisyee kogeny Pharaoh kaberberisyet koetee piik koba kogoochi tiseiywot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus8:30 Ki wo anyun Musa eng' ole mi Pharaoh kwo kosa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Exodus8:31 Ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu saaetap Musa. Ki istoe kalyang'ik Pharaoh, otwogikyik ak piikyik, ma ng'et kalyang' agot agenge." 
Exodus8:32 Nga no, ko ki iuit Pharaoh muguleldanyi kogeny, ak ma meto piik koba." 
Exodus9:1 Ki leenji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ui kap Pharaoh ak ileenji, ‘Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet Kamuktaindet ne po Yahudik kole: igoochi piikyuk koba, koboisyeiwo." 
Exodus9:2 Ago ngot ietee koba ak kota iraany icheek," 
Exodus9:3 keero, nyooru pireetap koroito ne ng'waan ne amei icheek kobun eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiyagiiguk che mi akwot: paraisisyeguk, sigiroiguk, tambeesiguk, tuguuk ak keechiireguk." 
Exodus9:4 Ibestos Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuugap Israel eng' tuugap Misiri si ma me kiy agot agenge eng' tugul che po piigap Israel.’ ” 
Exodus9:5 Ak ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kasarta, ak komwa kole, “Yaei Kamuktaindet kii mutai eng' emet.”" 
Exodus9:6 Ki yai Kamuktaindet kioto eng' peetuut ne ki isubi ak ki pek kiyagiik tugul che po Misiri, ago ma me agot agenge eng' kiyagiigap piigap Israel." 
Exodus9:7 Ki iyookto `Pharaoh piik kooro agobo kiyagiik che po piigap Israel, ak ki ma me agot agenge eng' kiyagiikwak. Ago kiuit muguleldap Pharaoh, ak ma chamji piik koba." 
Exodus9:8 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron, “Oram oreegap maat ne oo, ak ingoseerchi Musa parak eng' taitap Pharaoh." 
Exodus9:9 Egu chooto temburyek che puspus eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri, ak koek ondirik che mong'u kobwandos eng' piik ak eng' tyong'ik eng' emetap Misiri komugul.”" 
Exodus9:10 Ki ip anyun icheek oreegap maat ne oo, ak koba kotononso eng' taitap Pharaoh, yeityo koseerchi Musa parak ak ki ek ondirik che mong'u kobwandos eng' piik ak eng' tyong'ik." 
Exodus9:11 Ak ki ma imuuch kotononso piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei eng' taitap Musa, amu ondirichooto. Ki nam ondirik piik che ng'oomen che ng'oorsei ak icheek ko uu Misiriik." 
Exodus9:12 Ago, agot nga chooto tugul, ko ki iuit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldap Pharaoh, ak ki ma kas ko uu ye kiga komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus9:13 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ng'eet, muste karon, ak iwe itonon eng' taitap Pharaoh, ak ileenji, ‘Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet Kamuktaindet ne po Yahudik kole mete piikyuk koba asi koboisyeiwo." 
Exodus9:14 Amu ayookyini korotwek che ng'woneen muguleldang'ung', otwogiguk, ak piiguk, si kobiit inai ile ma mi age ne uu anee eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Exodus9:15 Amu kata achuule eunnyu abariin ak piiguk eng' koroito, ak ta kageisten ibet eng' ng'wony," 
Exodus9:16 ago kaachamun isap, si kobiit aboorun kimnateennyu, ak kemwaita kainennyu konaak eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Exodus9:17 Ta ilasugei iraanye piikyuk, ak tomo igoochi koba?" 
Exodus9:18 Amu nooto anyun, agoonu mutai kotee ni asiis koroobon koigap ropta che eecheen, che tomo kegeerei eng' Misiri ole kigoi." 
Exodus9:19 Iyookte anyun, keget kiyagiiguk kobwa, ak tugul che itinye che miitei akwot amu choorchingei koigap ropta ak parei kobek chii age tugul ak tyony age tugul ne mi timiin, ngot koma kiget anan kimut konyo kaa.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Ineendet ne ki iywei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' otwogigap Pharaoh ko ki imweito otwogikyik ak akwotisyekyik koba kooriik. 
Exodus9:21 Ago ineendet ne ki ma iit ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kiy, ko kemetoi otwogikyik ak akwotisyekyik eng' timiin." 
Exodus9:22 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Chuul eung'ung' anyun tokyi kipsengwet, si kobiit koigap ropta eng' emetap Misiri komugul, kobir piik, tyong'ik ak kiy age tugul ne piitei eng' ng'wony ak eng' emetap Misiri komugul.”" 
Exodus9:23 Ki chuul anyun Musa kiroktonyi kotokyi kipsengwet, ak ki iyook Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuleet ak koigap ropta ak kochoorgei maat konyo ng'wony. Ak ki isurur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigap ropta koroong'ji emetap Misiri." 
Exodus9:24 Ki piit anyun koigap ropta kobooto maat ne ki ilyeli eng' kimnateet ne oo kot, ne ki tomo kobiitu eng' emetap Misiri komugul kong'etee ngo ek poror." 
Exodus9:25 Ki pir koigap ropta tugul che ki mi timiin eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri, piich ak tyong'in; kibir kiy age tugul ne piitei eng' ng'wony ak koiri keet age tugul ne po timiin." 
Exodus9:26 Emetap Goshen ineegei, ole ki mi piigap Israel, ole ma it koigap ropta." 
Exodus9:27 Eng' yooto anyun, ko ki iyookto Pharaoh keguur Musa ak Aron ak koleenji, “Kaayai tengekto eng' niito; po imanda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago aa kiptengekyo kobooto piikyuk." 
Exodus9:28 Osaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kagoyam tuleennyi ak koik; agoonok anee obe, amat ogagei.”" 
Exodus9:29 Koleenji Musa ineendet, “Ye kaamande eng' nganaseet, eng' yooto anyun asutyi eunekyuk Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kosiis tuleet, ak kong'et koiyat, ak kobiit inai ile po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony." 
Exodus9:30 Ago angen ale, ne uu inyee ak otwogiguk, kotom oiywei Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet.”" 
Exodus9:31 Ki kibir minutik alak che ki kiguure mabuteek ak baale amu kigaba met baale ak kiga yesyo taaptogap mabuteek. 
Exodus9:32 Ago ki ma kibir nganuuk ak peek alak che kiguure kusemet amu ki tomo koeegitu. 
Exodus9:33 Ki manda Musa eng' nganaseet kwo eng' ole mi Pharaoh. Yeityo koitoochi eunekyik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki siis tuleet ak kong'et koiyat; ak mata korobonji ng'wony." 
Exodus9:34 Ye kingo keer Pharaoh kole ma komi ropta ak koigap ropta ak tuleet, kogetyigei koyai tengekto ak kongelel ineendet ak otwogikyik." 
Exodus9:35 Ko uu ye kiga komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa, kogiuit muguleldap Pharaoh, ak ma igoochi piigap Israel koba." 
Exodus10:1 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ui kap Pharaoh. Amu kaauit anee muguleldanyi, ak mugulelwegap otwogikyik, si kobiit abarta kaboorunoichu eng' kwenunnywa." 
Exodus10:2 Si kobiit omwa kogas lagokwak ak mochogorenikwok ole ki aite Misiriik koek che perber, ak kaboorunoikyuk che ki ayai eng' kwenunnywa, si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus10:3 Ki pa anyun Musa ak Aron kap Pharaoh, ak koleenji; “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po Yahudik, ‘Ieesyoi agoi au si iming'inigei eng' tainnyu? Mete piikyuk koba, koba koboisyeiwo." 
Exodus10:4 Keero, ngieesye imete piikyuk koba, ayookyini mutai chereng'endet emeng'ung'." 
Exodus10:5 Tuchei emet, kot ko mata komuuch chii kogeer ng'wonyut. Amei tuguuk tugul che ng'etunotiin, che kong'etune koigap ropta, ak koam keet age tugul agot chooto katoi ko piityo kogeny eng' emet." 
Exodus10:6 Nyiei kooriguk, kooriigap otwogiguk ak che po Misiriik tugul. Chaang'itu ne ki tomo kogeerei kwanisyeguk anan aguiywogiguk, kobooch peetuut ye kingo piit agoi ra.’ ” Ak kiwelelgei kwo eng' ole mi Pharaoh." 
Exodus10:7 koteebee otwogikyik Pharaoh koleenji, “Egu mesteet chiichi eng' acheek kot kotyanit? Igoochi piik koba, koba koboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa. Tos tomo inai ile kogome Misiri?”" 
Exodus10:8 Eng' nooto anyun, ko ki kimutyi Musa ak Aron Pharaoh kogeny, ak ki leenji `ineendet icheek, “Oba, oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'. Ago anyun ngorcho che pendi?”" 
Exodus10:9 Kowolji Musa koleenji, “Kibendi kobooto neranikyok, ak poisyekyok, ak weeriikyok, ak tiibiikyok. Kikwerye neekyok ak tuukyok amu kanyool keyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor igoorto.”" 
Exodus10:10 Ak ki `leenji ineendet icheek, “Ingotep iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootok ngot achamwok obe kobooto lagokwok. Tagunoot keele otinye mageet ne ya." 
Exodus10:11 Ma uu nooto. Ma chamwok omut lagokwak. Oba okweegei murenik, obe oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu nooto ne omache.” Ak ki kioon Musa ak Aron komong' eng' ole mi Pharaoh." 
Exodus10:12 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Chuul tokyi eung'ung' emetap Misiri si kobwa chereng'enyinik kotogos emetap Misiri, kotogos koam keet age tugul ne tuon ne po emet. Koam agot tugul che kong'etune koigap ropta.”" 
Exodus10:13 Kochuul anyun Musa eunnyi ak kotokyi kiroktonyi emetap Misiri. Kogoon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor usoonet ne punu kong'asiis kousyi emet peetuunooto komugul, ak kemout komugul, ak kingo eech, koip usoonetap kong'asiis chereng'endet." 
Exodus10:14 Ki togos chereng'endet kobookyi emet komugul ne po Misiri, ak ki ru eng' ng'wonyutap emet tugul ne po Misiri. Ki koroomen kot ak ki tomo kobiitu chereng'endet ne uu nooto, ama kobiitu kogeny ne uu nooto." 
Exodus10:15 Amu ki tuch emet komugul, kot koimenit. Ki am keet age tugul ne tuon ne mi emet, ak logoek tugul che po keetiik che ki ng'etune koigap ropta. Ki ma ng'et keet age tugul ne nyaliil, anan keet age tugul ne tuon ne mi timiin, eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri." 
Exodus10:16 Ki iyookto anyun Pharaoh keguur Musa ak Aron eng' chokyinet, ak koleenji, “Kaayachi tengekto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak kaayaiywok okweek." 
Exodus10:17 Nooto anyun, asaain ale nyoiywo kaat amu tengektonyu niito ineegei, ak osaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', koistoena meoni kityo.”" 
Exodus10:18 Ki wo eng' ole mi Pharaoh, kwo kosa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus10:19 Ki wol Kamuktaindet ne Toroor usoonet ne kiim miising' kousune cherongo, ne ki ip chereng'endet, ak koon kwo Araraita ne Piriir ak ki ma ng'et chereng'endet agot agenge eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri." 
Exodus10:20 Ago ki iuit `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldo ne po Pharaoh, kouiit si ma meto piigap Israel koba." 
Exodus10:21 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Chuul eung'ung' tokyi kipsengwet, si kobiit mesundeito eng' emetap Misiri, mesundeito ne kitung'dung'yoti.”" 
Exodus10:22 Ki chuul anyun Musa eunnyi kotokyi kipsengwet, ak ki piit mesundeito ne oo miising' eng' emet komugul ne po Misiri eng' peetuusyek somok." 
Exodus10:23 Ki ma imuuch chii kogeer chii eng' Misirik, ak ki ma ng'eet chii eng' ye tebee eng' peetuusyechooto somok. Ago kilapkeen meng'otosyek tugul che po piigap Israel." 
Exodus10:24 Ki kuur `Pharaoh Musa yeityo koleenji, “Oba, oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Omut lagokwok kobootok ago omete neekwok ak tuukwok kotebi.”" 
Exodus10:25 Ago ki leenji Musa, “Kanyool kora ichamwech che kienyei ak kagoochinoik che kibeelei, si kobiit keeng'ji tiseiywot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Exodus10:26 Kikwerye akwotisyekyok ak icheek. Ma ng'etu agot agenge. Amu chooto che kekwerye si keboisyechine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo amu ma kingen kiit ne kanyool keboisyechine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi tuun keit olooto.”" 
Exodus10:27 Ago ki iuit `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldap Pharaoh, ak ki ma chamji inee Pharaoh icheek koba." 
Exodus10:28 Ki leenji Pharaoh Musa, “Pet eng' ole ami, ak iriipkei, ama ta igeera togoch kogeny, amu imee eng' peetuut ne igeere togeennyu.”" 
Exodus10:29 Kowolji Musa agine koleenji, “Kaimwa komyee; ma ageerin togoch kogeny.”" 
Exodus11:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Kang'et koroito agenge neta aipchini Pharaoh ak Misiriik, ak ye ibata kochamwok obe eng' olito. Ye kagochamwok obe, koonok omande ne matiny." 
Exodus11:2 Mwachi anyun piik kogas komyee ileenji kosoom chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi tuguuk che po fedha ak che po thahabu.” 
Exodus11:3 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun piik konyoor chameet eng' Misiriik. Ne siirei nooto, ko kitagunoot miising' Musa eng' emetap Misiri eng' taitap otwogigap Pharaoh ak eng' taitap piik." 
Exodus11:4 Ki leenji `Musa Pharaoh, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: alabuli Misiri ko neegit kemoi kween." 
Exodus11:5 Pegu anyun kiboretook tugul eng' emetap Misiri kobooch taita ne po Pharaoh ne tebee ng'echereetap pounateet agoi taita ne po kwondo ne otwogindet ne ng'aisei. Agot kirgit age tugul ne twatei tyony age tugul, kobegu." 
Exodus11:6 Piitu kateiyet ne oo ne kitom kobiitu eng' emetap Misiri komugul ak ma kobiitu ne uu nooto kogeny. 
Exodus11:7 Ago eng' piigap Israel koma mi agot seset ne imuuchi koseng'eng'ji chii anan tyony. Si kobiit onai ole ibestos `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiriik ak Israel. 
Exodus11:8 Yeityo kochoorgei anyun otwogichuguk kobwa ole ami ak kong'uruukso eng' tainnyu eng' konyit ne oo, koleen, ‘Mande inyee ak piik tugul che isubin.’ Ye ibata nooto, awe amande anyun.” Kingo pata kwo Musa eng' ole mi Pharaoh eng' nereegek che laldos." 
Exodus11:9 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Eesyoi Pharaoh kogasak, asi kobiit kotesagis kochang'a kwang'utikyuk eng' emetap Misiri.”" 
Exodus11:10 Nganda ki yai Musa ak Aron kwang'utichuuto tugul eng' taitap Pharaoh, ko ki iuit `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldap Pharaoh ak ki ma chamji piigap Israel koba eng' emennyi." 
Exodus12:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron eng' emetap Misiri, koleenji," 
Exodus12:2 “Egu eng' okweek arawani taunetap arawek ak koek arawet ne po tai eng' kenyiit. 
Exodus12:3 Omwachi tuiyet komugul ne po Israel oleenji eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawani, konam chii age tugul eng' koot age tugul aarwet ko uu ole tee kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Exodus12:4 Ngo ng'ering' piik eng' kapchii ne ma imuuchi koam arwanooto, konyolu anyun koyomogei ak chiitap kokwennyi ko uu koitetap piik. Yeityo kolewen aarwet koiityin chii age tugul che tee che imuuchi koam." 
Exodus12:5 Egu arweng'wong' mengit ne libwoop ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Oleweni arwanooto eng' keechiirek anan ko ng'oroorek. 
Exodus12:6 Yeityo otabaan agoi koit peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawaniito, si koeny anyun piigap Israel aarekwak eng' koskoleng'utap peetuunooto." 
Exodus12:7 Ingonam icheek anyun korotiik ak koilee tugatugik tuwai ak rateiywotap tugatuk eng' koot age tugul ne ki ame arwanooto. 
Exodus12:8 Amei kemounooto panyechooto kagibeel eng' ma, koamdoi magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek kobooto ingweek che ng'woneen." 
Exodus12:9 Amoam ko tuonen, amat oyo agot kitigin eng' peek, ago obeele eng' ma metit, keelyek ak tuguugap ke." 
Exodus12:10 Ne siirei nooto ko mat kong'et agot kitigin kot koeekyi. Ago ne kang'et agoi koeech obeel eng' ma. 
Exodus12:11 Oame anyun ko kaoratkei, ko kaolaach kweonikwok, oting'e eunekwok kirokweek ak oam ochokyini. Niito ko paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus12:12 Amu eng' kemounooto, abunoti kwenutap emetap Misiri, ak abar kiboretook tugul eng' emonooto, che po piik ak che po tai tyong'ik ak arwookyi kamuktaik tugul che po Misiri. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus12:13 Egu anyun korotichooto ko oile tugatugik kaboorunet eng' okweek eng' kooriikwok ole omi. Ye ageer korotiik asiirtoenok ak ma ityinok koroato konyo kong'emak ye abare emetap Misiri," 
Exodus12:14 Egu peetuuniito peetuutap kabwaatet eng' okweek. Oriip kobunji igoorto ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oyai igoorito koek ng'atuutyet eng' ibinwekwok tugul agoi koigeny. 
Exodus12:15 Oam magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek peetuusyek tisap. Oistoi eng' peetuut ne tai mermereek eng' kooriikwok. Amu king'etoi age tugul eng' Israel ne kaam magatiinik che mi mermereek eng' kong'etee peetuut ne po tai agoi ne po tisap. 
Exodus12:16 Peetuut ne po tai ak ne po tisap ko egu eng' okweek peetuutap kayumetapkei ne itabaanat ne tiliil. Ma kiyaei poisyo age tugul eng' peetuusyechooto, kobatee kochop chii age tugul amitwogik che amei." 
Exodus12:17 Oriip igoori po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek amu ki eng' peetuuni ne ki among'u lugosyekwok komang'une emetap Misiri. Amu nooto anyun oriip ak oyai igoori eng' peetuuniito eng' ibinwekwok tugul ak koek ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny. 
Exodus12:18 Oame anyun magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' arawet ne po tai eng' koskoleng'utap peetuutap taman ak ang'wan agoi koskoleng'utap peetuutap tiptem ak agenge. 
Exodus12:19 Ma kinyoorchin kooriikwok mermereek eng' peetuusyechooto tisap: King'etoi eng' Israel age tugul ne amei ne kaginde mermereek, ngo ne kiprutoiyo anan ko ne ki kisikyin emoniito." 
Exodus12:20 Moame kiy age tugul ne kaginde mermereek. Oame magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul.” 
Exodus12:21 Ki kuur anyun `Musa poisyek tugul che po Israel ak koleenji, “Oba olewenote eng' akweetap keechiirek kobeate kapchii ak oeeny koek tiseiywotap paska." 
Exodus12:22 Onam ratuutyetap keetiik che kiguure husop, ak orooch korotiik che mi taabeet ak oise korotichooto rateiywotap tugatuk ak tugatugik tuwai. Amat komanda chii saang' agoi koeech." 
Exodus12:23 Amu nyoo kosiirtoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kowendi kobarei taiywegap Misiriik. Ye keer korotiik eng' rateiywotap tugatuk ak eng' tugatugik tuwai eng' kooriikwok, kosiirto ineendet eng' kurganooto ak ma chamjin ng'emindet komong' nyoo kobaraak." 
Exodus12:24 Oriibe anyun ng'olyoondoni koek ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' inyee ak weeriiguk. 
Exodus12:25 Ak ye tuun oit emet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki koaror oriip anyun igoorito. 
Exodus12:26 Ye tuun teebenak lagokwok, kole, ‘Po nee igoorito?’" 
Exodus12:27 Oleenji anyun icheek, ‘Tiseiywot ni ne po paska ne kigonyite Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kisiirtoe kooriigap piigap Israel ak kosar eng' Misiri ye kingo parei Misiriik.’ ” Ak ki ing'uruukso piik kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus12:28 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel koyai ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron. 
Exodus12:29 Kingo it kemoi kween, kobar Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiboretook tugul eng' emetap Misiri kobooch taita ne po Pharaoh agoi taita ne po luulenet ne ki rataat eng' korgoreet ak tugul che kitwatei tyong'ik." 
Exodus12:30 Ki ng'eet anyun Pharaoh kemoi kobooto otwogikyik tugul ak Misiriik tugul. Ki piit kateiyet ne oo eng' Misiri amu ki ma ng'et koot agot agenge ne ki ma mee chii. 
Exodus12:31 Eng' kemounooto, ko ki iyookto Pharaoh keguur Musa ak Aron koleenji, “Ong'eetyee ak obe eng' oldap piikyuk okweek kobooto piigap Israel. Oba, oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki omwa." 
Exodus12:32 Okweri keechiirekwok ak tuukwok ak obe, ak oberuura agane.”" 
Exodus12:33 Ki ichirchir `Misiriik piik kochaakta komanda eng' emet, amu ki le, “Ngo mobe kebegu tugul.”" 
Exodus12:34 Ki nam anyun piik magatiinik che tuonen che tomo kinde mermereek ak tereenikwak che kikwang'e ak ye kingo kagorate ngoroikwak, konde tigigoikwak kola." 
Exodus12:35 Ki yai piigap Israel ko uu ng'olyootap Musa, ki soom Misiriik tuguugap fedha ak thahabu ak ngoroik." 
Exodus12:36 Ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiriik kocham Yahudik, ak ki igoochi kiy age tugul ne ki soom. Amu nooto, ko ki nyaban anyun Yahudik tuguugap Misiriik." 
Exodus12:37 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel kong'eetyee Rameses agoi koit Sukoth. Ki neegit murenik eliphuusyek pogol lo che ki pendi eng' keelyek, koma ki itito kwonyiik ak lagok." 
Exodus12:38 Ki pa kobooto icheeget tuiyet ne oo ne po piik alak tugul che teerchiin; kobooto keechiirek ak tuuga che chaang'. 
Exodus12:39 Ki peel magatiinik che tuonen che mengeechen che ki ma kinde mermereek che ki ibune Misiri. Ki ma kinde mermereek amu ki kioon eng' Misiri ak ki mata komuuch konyoor poroindo ne chopchinegei amitwogik alak tugul. 
Exodus12:40 Kiga kotebi anyun piigap Israel eng' Misiri kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak sosom. 
Exodus12:41 Kingo pata kenyisyechooto pogol ang'wan ak sosom, komanda eng' peetuunooto lugoosyek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emetap Misiri." 
Exodus12:42 Kemounooto ki riip Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kosar piigap Israel, ko egu kemout ne kanyool kibwaate Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki imut icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri. Niito ko kemoutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ibwaati piigap Israel tugul eng' ibinwekwak tugul." 
Exodus12:43 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron, “Che isubu ko ng'atuutik che po paska: Ma amei too ne ma agenge eng' piigap Israel," 
Exodus12:44 ago otwogindet ne po chii age tugul ne ki kiale silingisyek ne kigeyatita, kechamji koam." 
Exodus12:45 Ma amei punootyot anan otwogindet ne nyooru melekto. 
Exodus12:46 Kiame koot agenge; amat oip peeny komanda saang' agot kitigin. Amat oiri kawet age tugul. 
Exodus12:47 Kanyool anyun koyai ko uu nooto Israel komugul. 
Exodus12:48 Ago ngo rutochin kiprutoiyot ne machei koboiboenji paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko kanyool kimuratan muren age tugul ne mi kobooto ineendet. Yeityo koriikyi anyun eng' yooto ak koriip, ak kogergeit ak ne ki kisikyi emeng'wong'. Ago among' koam chii age tugul ne ma kiyatita." 
Exodus12:49 Ng'atuutyet niito ko agenge ak kogergei eng' ne ki kisikyin emeng'wong' ak eng' ne toondet ne rutochinok.” 
Exodus12:50 Ki yai piigap Israel tugul ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron. 
Exodus12:51 Ak ki imaanda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto piigap Israel eng' emetap Misiri eng' lugosyekwak. 
Exodus13:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa," 
Exodus13:2 “Itabaanwa kiboretook tugul. Punjino age tugul ne yaatei iyoteet eng' piigap Israel, eng' piik ak eng' che po tai eng' tyong'ik.”" 
Exodus13:3 Yeityo koleenji `Musa piik, “Obwaat anyun peetuuni ki omang'une Misiri kootap otwoknateet. Amu ki imoong'wok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateetap eunnyi omang'une olooto. Eng' peetuuni anyun koma ki amei magatiinik che kaginde mermereek." 
Exodus13:4 Omandoi rani eng' arawetap Abib. 
Exodus13:5 Ye kagomutak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor oit emetap Kanaanik, Hitik, Amorik, Hibik ak ne po Jebusik; emet ne ki iyasyechi `ineendet kwanisyeguk kole tuun koonok emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo. Amu nooto anyun, kanyoolu oriip ak oyai igoorita eng' kenyiit age tugul eng' arawaniito." 
Exodus13:6 Oame magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' peetuusyek tisap ak koek igoortap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuutap tisap. 
Exodus13:7 Ki amei eng' peetuusyechooto tugul tisap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek. Amat kenyoorchi chii magatiinik che ki kinde mermereek ak amat kobiitune emeng'ung' komugul mermereek. 
Exodus13:8 Tuun anyun imwachini weeriing'ung' eng' peetuunooto ileenjini, ‘Ayae niito amu kiit ne ki yaiywo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye ki among'u eng' Misiri.’" 
Exodus13:9 Ak tuun egu nooto kaboorunet eng' eung'ung' ak koek kabwaatet ne mi kwenutap konyeguk si kobiit kotebee ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kuting'ung'. Amu ki imoong'wok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor omang'une Misiri eng' euut ne kiim. 
Exodus13:10 Ara anyun oyai igoori eng' peetuunnyi ne ki king'atyi eng' kenyiit age tugul. 
Exodus13:11 “Ye tuun iitak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emetap Kanaanik ko uu ye ki iyasyeun ak kwanisyeguk kole koonok," 
Exodus13:12 itabaan anyun kobunji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tugul che yaatei iyoteet. Ak che po tai tyong'ik ko punjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Exodus13:13 Ityachi ne twatei sigiryet, ityage aarwetap keechiir, ago ngo metyach iirye kaatinyi. Ityachi taita age tugul eng' weeriiguk." 
Exodus13:14 Ye tuun teebenen weeriing'ung' eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei, koleenjin, ‘Amu nee si keyai ko uu niito?’ Ileenji anyun, ‘Ki imoong'wech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Misiri eng' kootap otwoknateet, eng' euut ne kiim." 
Exodus13:15 Ak ye kingo etenech Pharaoh keebe, kobar anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor taita age tugul eng' emetap Misiri, che po piik ak che kitwatei tyong'ik. Ara anyun aeng'jini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tugul che yaatei iyoteet, che kiruugik. Ago atyachi weeriikyuk tugul che yaatei iyoteet.’" 
Exodus13:16 Egu niito kaboorunet eng' eung'ung' ak koek ratuutik che kirate anook eng' turyetap togeng'ung'. Amu ki imutwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' euut ne kiim kemang'une Misiri.” 
Exodus13:17 Kingo kagounda `Pharaoh piik koba, koma indochi `Kamuktaindet icheek kobun ooreet ne punei emetap Philistik, nganda ki neegit. Amu ki le Kamuktaindet, “Si ma iyweis piik ye keer lugeet, ak komach koweekyigei Misiri.”" 
Exodus13:18 Ago ki indochinot `Kamuktaindet piik kobun surkwen ne tokyingei Araraita ne Piriir. Ki togosta anyun piigap Israel komanda eng' emetap Misiri ko kagolaach kariik. 
Exodus13:19 Ki ip `Musa kawegap Joseph. Amu kiga kogimgim `ineendet piigap Israel koyasyo koleenji, “Ye tuun kanyonjok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iman kosarwok, oip kawekyuk obendi otogostoi eng' oli.”" 
Exodus13:20 Ki inam anyun pandanywa kong'eetyee Sukoth, ak ki pa komuung'e Etam eng' ole poochin surkwen." 
Exodus13:21 Ki indoe icheek `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' toloitap pooldet peet, ak kondochi icheek kemoi eng' toloitap maat, kokweng'ji; si kobiit komuuch koba peet ak kemoi." 
Exodus13:22 Ki ma isto ineendet eng' taitap piik toloitap pooldet peet, ama isto toloata po maat kemoi." 
Exodus14:1 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa," 
Exodus14:2 “Mwachi lagogap Israel koweek komuung'e taitap Pi-hairot kwenutap Migdol ak nyanjet ole itoorchingei Baal-sepon ak komuung'e yooto neegitee nyanjet. 
Exodus14:3 Amu tuun mwaei Pharaoh agobo piigap Israel koleen, ‘Ki kobetyo eng' emet ak ki kogeer surkwen icheek.’" 
Exodus14:4 Eng' yooto kogeny auuiiti muguleldap Pharaoh si koosup icheek ak anyoorunee teegisto Pharaoh ak lugeennyi tugul si konai Misiriik kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ki yai anyun piigap Israel ko uu nooto. 
Exodus14:5 Ki ngemwachi laitoryatap Misiri keleenji, “Kogoba komweiso piik,” kogiwalak muguleldanyi ak kowalagis mugulelwegap otwogikyik agobo piigap Israel ak ki ibwaat icheek kole, “Nee kii kogeyai, kot kechamji Yahudik koba kometo otwoknateet ne kootech?”" 
Exodus14:6 Ki chop anyun chepkichutitap paraisiit ak komut asigarikyik che po lugeet. 
Exodus14:7 Ki ip kariisyegap paraisisyek che po lugeet pogol lo che ki kilewen ak kariisyegap paraisisyek che po lugeet alak che po Misiri kotinyei age tugul kiptainikwak che ki pou. 
Exodus14:8 Ki iuit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldap Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri ak ki isup piigap Israel che kimondoi eng' kimnateet ne oo. 
Exodus14:9 Ki isup `Misiriik icheek ak paraisisyek tugul, kariisyek che po Pharaoh, piikyik che ki laanyei paraisisyek ak lugeennyi. Ki namji icheek ole ki imuung'ee eng' ye neegit nyanjet, koriikyin Pi-hairot ole tokyingei Baal-sepon." 
Exodus14:10 Ye kingo riikta Pharaoh, kotabendo piigap Israel ak ki keer kobwanei Misiriik kosubu icheek. Ki toi koyweis miising' ak koriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus14:11 Ki ing'ung'ung'ji `icheek Musa ak koleenji, “Tos ki imutwech kebekyi surkwoni amu ki ma komi kereeriisyek Misiri? Amu nee si iyaiywech ko uu ni, imoong'wech eng' Misiri?" 
Exodus14:12 Tos ma ki kimwaun eng' Misiri keleenjin, ‘Pagaaktech keoot Misiriik?’ Amu kita kaigai keoot Misiriik kosiir kebekyi surkwen.”" 
Exodus14:13 Ago ki wolji `Musa piik koleenji, “Amoiywei, ogany kityo si ogeer yetunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne yaiywok rani. Amu ma ogeere kogeny misirichu ogeere rani." 
Exodus14:14 Yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet lugeet agobo okweek; osisye okweek.” 
Exodus14:15 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Amu nee si iriircho? Ileenji piigap Israel koba kotestai." 
Exodus14:16 Namji parak kiroktong'ung' ak ichuul eung'ung' itokyi nyanjet, si kopcheak kobun aeng' ak kobun piigap Israel kwenutap nyanjet, ng'wonyut ole yaamaat." 
Exodus14:17 Auuiiti aneendet mugulelwegap Misiriik, si koosup icheek ak anyoorunee teegisto Pharaoh, lugeennyi tugul, kariisyekyik ak piikyik che ketei paraisisyek." 
Exodus14:18 Ye kaanyoorunee teegisto Pharaoh, kariisyekyik, ak piikyik che ketei paraisisyek, konai Misiriik kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus14:19 Ki wo anyun let malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne ki indoe piigap Israel ak ki wo kora toloitap pooldet ne ki mi tainnywa ak kotonone let. 
Exodus14:20 Kitonone kwenutap lugeetap Misiriik ak tuiyetap Israel. Kingo imen, kooluu poldanooto kookweng'ji piigap Israel, ak ki mi mesundeito komostap Misiriik; ki ma riikyin lugeetap Misiriik ak tuiyetap piigap Israel eng' kemout komugul." 
Exodus14:21 Ki chuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi nyanjet ak ki iyook Kamuktaindet usoonet ne punu kong'asiis kous kemout komugul koobeesyo peek si kobiit emet ne yaamaat; ak kipcheigei peek. 
Exodus14:22 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel kobun emet ne yaamaat eng' kwenutap nyanjet. Kitoten peek eng' komostap tai ak eng' komostap kaataam. 
Exodus14:23 Ki isup `Misiriik icheek kochoorchigei kwenutap nyanjet; paraisisyek tugul che po Pharaoh ak kariisyekyik ak piikyik che ketei paraisisyek. 
Exodus14:24 Eng' riipseet ne po karon, kogeerot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lugeetap Misiri, kogeerunee toloitap maat ak ne po pooldet ak kogochi lugeetap Misiriik koaragenso." 
Exodus14:25 Kichun keelyegap kariisyekwak ak kong'onng'onio kot ko ye ki kwerye ko uueen. Kole anyun Misiriik, “Ongemwee Yahudik amu yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lugeet agobo icheek konyo kobarech acheek.”" 
Exodus14:26 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Chuul eung'ung' tokyi nyanjet si kobiit koweigei peek kotuch Misiriik kobooto kariisyekwak ak piikwak che laanyei mbatanyisyek.”" 
Exodus14:27 Ki chuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi nyanjet ak ki weigei peek kotuiyo ko uu yegonye ko kaeech. Ki mweiso Misiriik ye kingo keer peek kotokyingei icheeget ago kitoorchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiriik kwenutap nyanjet. 
Exodus14:28 Ki weigei peek komaaluuch kariisyek, piik che ketei paraisisyek ak lugeet tugul ne po Pharaoh ne ki isubi icheek kobendi nyanjet. Ki ma ng'et agot agenge eng' icheek." 
Exodus14:29 Ago ki pun piigap Israel ng'wonyut ne yaamaat eng' kwenutap nyanjet ko katoten peek eng' komosi ak komosi. 
Exodus14:30 Ki sar eng' peetuunooto anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' eunegap Misiriik ak ki keer `Israel Misiriik ko kagobek komi ngeguutap nyanjet. 
Exodus14:31 Ki keer Israel poisyet ne kiim ne ki yachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiriik. Ki iywei anyun `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koyan `icheek ineendet ak Musa otwogindennyi. 
Exodus15:1 Ki tyen tyeni Musa kobooto piigap Israel kotyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Atyenjini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki ibelis eng' kabelisyet ne toroor miising'. Ki wiirchi araraita paraisiit kobooto chiito ne kibunei." 
Exodus15:2 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kimnateennyu ak tyendanyu, ak yetunennyu. Niito Kamuktaindennyu ak alasu ineendet; Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne po abba, atoroori ineendet." 
Exodus15:3 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ko ne po lugeet. Kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Exodus15:4 Ki wiirchi araraita kariisyegap Pharaoh kobooto lugeennyi. Ki imaluuch Araraita ne Piriir kiptainikyik che ki lewen. 
Exodus15:5 Ki tuch icheek rirosyek ak kirorokta koba rirosyek ko uu koita. 
Exodus15:6 Eung'ung' ne po tai, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko konyitot eng' kimnateet, Eung'ung' ne po tai, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko nyinyiri puunik kotonatonagis." 
Exodus15:7 Iluuli icheek che ng'eetyinin eng' ooindap telunateng'ung'. Iyooktoi nereegeguk; peelei icheek kowong'kei ko uu mobeek. 
Exodus15:8 Ki iyumgei peek amu kimnateetap kabuuset ne po seruneguk; kitononso peek kotooten; kinamgei peek kouegitu eng' araraita kween. 
Exodus15:9 Ki le puunyoot, Asubi, aname ak apchei che kagiluul, ak kobiyong'e magennyu icheek. Ang'usu rotwennyu po chok, ak kobar eunnyu icheek." 
Exodus15:10 Ki iusyi eng' usooneng'ung', ak ki tuch `araraita icheek. Kirorokyi peek che kiimeen oriit ko uu ngosyelait." 
Exodus15:11 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tos ngoro ne uu inyee eng' kamuktaik? Tos ng'oo ne uu inyee, ne konyitot eng' tiliilindo, ne kiywei eng' kalasunet, ne yaei kwang'utik?" 
Exodus15:12 Ki ichuul eung'ung' ne po tai ak kilugui `ng'wony icheek. 
Exodus15:13 Ki indochi inyee eng' rireeneng'ung' piik che ki ityaach komanda; ki indochi icheek eng' kimnateng'ung' koba oldang'ung' ne tiliil. 
Exodus15:14 Ki kas pororyosyek alage, ak kibotanso; kinyoor ng'wanindo che menyei Philistia." 
Exodus15:15 Ki tang'any anyun kirwoogik che po Edom; potandos che kiimeen che po Moabik; kachootyo tugul che menyei Kanaan. 
Exodus15:16 Kanam icheek kamuiset ak kaiyweisyet; eng' etunatetap eung'ung', ko siisyo ko uu koita; agoi kolanda piiguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi kolanda piik che ki ial." 
Exodus15:17 Imutu icheek komong' ak inde icheek kominogis eng' tulweetap poroteng'ung', komosta ne ki ichopchigei si imeny, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ole-Tiliil, ee Kamuktaindet, ne ki kogimit eung'ung'." 
Exodus15:18 Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny ak koigeny.” 
Exodus15:19 Kingo pa paraisisyek che po Pharaoh nyanjet kobooto kariisyekyik ak piikyik che ketei paraisisyek ko ki iweech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peegap nyanjet kogeny kotuch icheek; ago kibun piigap Israel emet ne yaamaat eng' kwenutap nyanjet. 
Exodus15:20 Ki nam anyun Miriam kwondo ne maotyoo, chepkametap Aron, sugutit ne ming'in eng' eunnyi ak ki isup `ineendet kwonyiik tugul che ki ibei sugutisyek che mengeechen kotyenoti." 
Exodus15:21 Ki wolji Miriam koleenji, “Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki ibelis eng' kabelisyet ne toroor miising'; ki kiwiirchi nyanjet paraisiit kobooto ne ki laanyei.”" 
Exodus15:22 Ki indochi `Musa Yahudik koba eng' Araraita ne Piriir ak ki it surkwen ne po Sur. Ki pa pandap peetuusyek somok eng' surkwen ak ki ma nyoor peek. 
Exodus15:23 Kingo it Marah, koma komuuch koe peegap Marah amu king'woneen. Ki kiguure anyun kainennyi Marah amu nooto." 
Exodus15:24 Ki ing'unyng'ung'ji `piik Musa, koleenji, “Ki ee nee?”" 
Exodus15:25 Ki riirchi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki iboorchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet keetit. Ki nam keetoto yeityo kowiirchi peek ak ki anyinyitu. Kichopchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' olooto ng'atuutyet ak kirwooget kotyeme icheeget: 
Exodus15:26 ak ki le, “Ngot igas iman kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', iyai ne po iman eng' tainnyi, iepchji iit ng'atuutikyik ak isup katigonutikyik tugul, koma koonin myan age tugul ne ki agoochi Misiriik, amu anee ko aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne asaabin.”" 
Exodus15:27 Ki it anyun icheek ole kiguure Elim, ole ki mi kong'igap peek tamanu ak aeng' ak tiironigap sosik tamanwogik tisap; ak ki imuung'ee icheek ole neegitee peechooto." 
Exodus16:1 Ki inam anyun pandanywa kong'eetyee Elim, ak ki it tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel surkwen ne po Sin ne mi kwenutap Elim ak Sinai. Ki it olooto eng' peetuutap taman ak muut ne po arawetap aeng' kobooch ye kingo mong' eng' emetap Misiri." 
Exodus16:2 Ki ing'unyng'ung'ji tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel Musa ak Aron eng' surkwen. 
Exodus16:3 Ki leenji `piigap Israel icheek, “Kita kaigai kebegu eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emetap Misiri ye ki kitebee ole neegitee tereenigap panyeek ye ki kiamisyei kot kebiyong'se, ago ki omoong'wech kebwa surkwenini si obare rubeet tuiyoni komugul.”" 
Exodus16:4 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa anyun, “Aroong'wok amitwogik che punu kipsengwet. Pendi piik peetuut age tugul koyumi che yamei peetuut si kobiit atyem icheek anai ngo muuchi koosup ng'atuutyennyu." 
Exodus16:5 Eng' peetuut ne po lo, ye chobei icheek amitwogichooto che kaip kobwa ko, konyilee aeng' eng' che po kotugul.”" 
Exodus16:6 Ki leenji `Musa ak `Aron piigap Israel tugul, “Onae koskoleny ole ki imutwak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor omang'une emetap Misiri," 
Exodus16:7 ak ogeer karon telunatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kasei ineendet kang'unyng'unyeng'wong' ne ong'unyng'ung'jini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Acheek anyun ko king'o si ong'unyng'ung'jech?” 
Exodus16:8 Ki le Musa, “Koonok anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor panyeek oam koskoleny, ak koonok karon magatiinik oam obiye amu kasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kang'unyng'unyeng'wong' ne ong'unyng'ung'jini ineendet. Acheek ko king'o? Ma acheek che ong'unyng'ung'jini ago ong'unyng'ung'jini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus16:9 Ki leenji `Musa Aron, “Ileenji tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel, ‘Obwa oriikyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kogogas kang'unyng'unyeng'wong'.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Ak ye kita kong'alaaljin `Aron tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel, kitabendo kotokyigei surkwen ak ki took eng' pooldet liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus16:11 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Exodus16:12 “Kaagas kang'unyng'unyetap piigap Israel. Mwachi ileenji, ‘Oame panyeek koskoleny ak oam obiye magatiinik karon si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Ki pwa taok koskoleny konyi nganaseet ak ki ibut rewoot karon koyiem nganaseet. 
Exodus16:14 Ye kingo togosta rewoot ne koga ibut, kotook eng' surkwen tuguuk che mengeechen che tertereen komi ng'wony che uu chepkoset." 
Exodus16:15 Ye kingo keer piigap Israel tuguuchooto, koteebegei icheegei, kole, “Nee tuguuchuuto?” Amu ki ma nai tuguuchooto. Ak ki leenji Musa, “Amitwogik chuuto che kagoonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor oam." 
Exodus16:16 Niito kiit ne kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Ingoyum chii tugul che yamei koam. Yamei chii tugul che po kerebet ne kiguure omer; ingoipchi chii age tugul che yamei koitetap piikyik che mi koonnyi.’ ”" 
Exodus16:17 Ki yai ko uu nooto piigap Israel ak ki iyum alak che chaang', koyum alage che ng'ering'." 
Exodus16:18 Ye kingo ker eng' kerebet, koma siirto che po ineendet ne kagaiyum che chaang', ak ki ma ng'ering'itu che po ineendet ne kagaiyum che ng'ering'. Ki iyum chii tugul che yamei koam." 
Exodus16:19 Ki leenji `Musa icheek, “Amat kotuuch chii agoi koeech.”" 
Exodus16:20 Ago ki ma kas iit alage eng' icheek kiit ne kimwachin Musa. Ki ituuch kotep kot koeech ak ki am kuutik ak ki pulyo. Ki nereekyi anyun `Musa pichooto. 
Exodus16:21 Ki iyumi karonet age tugul che yamei koam chii tugul ak kingo ng'wanit asiis kochootyo. 
Exodus16:22 Ki iyum eng' peetuut ne po lo che tee che cham koyumi konyil aeng': kereboonik aeng' chii tugul. Ak ki pa pounik tugul che po tuiyet komwachi Musa. 
Exodus16:23 Ki leenji `Musa icheek, “Nooto ko kiit ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘mutai ko kamuung'et, sabato ne itabaanat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Obeel che omache obeel, ak oyoi che omache oyoi ak ogonorchigei che kang'et kobunji mutai.’ ”" 
Exodus16:24 Ki konor kobunji mutai ko uu ye ki mwachi Musa, ak ki ma pulyo ama ki nyoorchi kuutik." 
Exodus16:25 Ki le Musa, “Oam chooto rani; amu sabato ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani, monyoorchini rani emet." 
Exodus16:26 Oyumi eng' peetuusyek lo; ago eng' peetuutap tisap ko sabato, ma piitu eng' peetuunooto.”" 
Exodus16:27 Ki pa alage eng' peetuutap tisap koleen koyumat, ago ma nyoor." 
Exodus16:28 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Oeesyoi osup ng'atuutikyuk ak kayomisutikyuk kot kotyanit?" 
Exodus16:29 Onai ole kagoonok anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor sabato; eng' nooto anyun agoonok amitwogik eng' peetuutap lo che yamei peetuusyek aeng'; ingotebee chii tugul oldanyi, amat kwo ui eng' peetuutap tisap.”" 
Exodus16:30 Ki imuuny anyun piik eng' peetuutap tisap. 
Exodus16:31 Ki kuure kootap Israel amitwogichooto Mana: ki kergei tuguuchooto ak peek che mubere che leelach ak ki chamu magatiinik che mengeechen che ki kikwanda kumyat. 
Exodus16:32 Ki le Musa, “Niito kiit ne kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Kinyiit kerebet agenge tuguuchooto, kegonorchi ibinwekwok che piitu let si kobiit kogeer amitwogichooto che ki abaenak eng' surkwen ye ki among'wok omang'une emetap Misiri.”" 
Exodus16:33 Ki leenji `Musa Aron, “Inemu tereet ne ming'in, inyiit mana che yamei kerebet agenge ak igonor eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kegonorchi ibinwek che piitu let.”" 
Exodus16:34 Ki igonor anyun Aron eng' taitap paornateet kole keriip ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Exodus16:35 Ki am piigap Israel mana kenyiisyek artam agoi koit emet ne menyei piik. Ki am mana agoi koit kiwotosyegap emetap Kanaan. 
Exodus16:36 Kerebonooto kigeree mana ne kiguure omer ko aechin ak kebebertap taman ne po epah. 
Exodus17:1 Ki inam panda anyun tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel kong'eetyee surkwen ne po Sin, ko uu ye king'atei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Eng' let ko ki it Rephidim ak komuung'so, nganda ki ma komi peek olooto che eei piik." 
Exodus17:2 Amu nooto, ko ki polyo piik kobolji Musa koleenji, “Inagech peek kee.” Ak ki leenji `Musa icheek, “Amu nee si oboljo? Amu nee si otyem Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
Exodus17:3 Ki am piik melelda eng' olooto, ak ki ing'unyng'ung'ji `icheek Musa ak koleenji, “Kilya si imutwech acheek, lagokyok ak akwotisyekyok kemang'une Misiri ak inyoo ibarenech melelda?”" 
Exodus17:4 Ki riirchi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Alyonji pichu? Neegit kolacha!”" 
Exodus17:5 Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji, “Ui indoe piik ak imut poisyegap Israel alak. Ip kiroktong'ung' ne ki ikwere aineet." 
Exodus17:6 Atonone taing'ung' eng' yooto po rwandet eng' Horeb. Ikwere rwandanooto komang'une peek si kobiit koe piik.” Ki yai anyun Musa ko uu nooto eng' taitap poisyegap Israel. 
Exodus17:7 Ak ki kuure yooto Masa ak Meriba, amu polatetap `piigap Israel che ki tyem Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleen, “Tos iman mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootech?”" 
Exodus17:8 Ki pwa anyun Amelek nyoo kobaregei ak Israel eng' Rephidim. 
Exodus17:9 Ki leenji `Musa Joshua, “Lewenwech piik, ak obe obargei ak Amelek. Awendi atononi mutai eng' tulweet parak, atinye eng' eunyu kirokto ne po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Exodus17:9 Ki leenji `Musa Joshua, “Lewenwech piik, ak obe obargei ak Amelek. Awendi atononi mutai eng' tulweet parak, atinye eng' eunyu kirokto ne po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Exodus17:10 Ki yai anyun Joshua ko uu ye kiga komwachi Musa ak ki wo kobargei ak Amelek. Ki togosta anyun Musa tulweet parak kobooto Aron ak Hur. 
Exodus17:10 Ki yai anyun Joshua ko uu ye kiga komwachi Musa ak ki wo kobargei ak Amelek. Ki togosta anyun Musa tulweet parak kobooto Aron ak Hur. 
Exodus17:11 Ki yaak ko uu ni: ye kingo namji Musa parak eunnyi koterteeris Israel, ak ye kingo tu koterteeris Amelek." 
Exodus17:12 Kingo ng'etyo anyun eunegap Musa, konam Aron ak Hur koita kondechi kotebee ineendet, yeityo konam eunekyik kotononso; ki nam age eutap tai, konam age murot kaataam konamji parak. Kitononso eunegap Musa agoi kororokto asiis." 
Exodus17:13 Ki iterteer anyun `Joshua Amelek ak piikyik eng' rotwetap chok. 
Exodus17:13 Ki iterteer anyun `Joshua Amelek ak piikyik eng' rotwetap chok. 
Exodus17:14 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Sirchi ng'aleechu bukuit si koek ne kibwaatee, somanji Joshua kogas, amu abuuktoi kabwaatetap Amelek kobet eng' kurereetap kipsengwet." 
Exodus17:14 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Sirchi ng'aleechu bukuit si koek ne kibwaatee, somanji Joshua kogas, amu abuuktoi kabwaatetap Amelek kobet eng' kurereetap kipsengwet." 
Exodus17:15 Ki teech Musa kaptisisyet, ak koguure yooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne iterteerwa.”" 
Exodus17:16 Ak ki le, “Kagoyosyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koyai lugeet ak Amelek eng' ibinwek tugul.”" 
Exodus18:1 Ki kas anyun Jethro tisiindetap Midian, kabyugoitap Musa agobo tugul che ki koyachi `Kamuktaindet Musa ak piikyik Israel. Ki kas ole ki imutunda `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel komang'une Misiri." 
Exodus18:2 Ki imut anyun `Jethro Ziporah, osotyotap Musa amu kiga koweekta Musa ineendet kwo," 
Exodus18:3 ak weeriikyik aeng'. Ki kiguure age Gerson, amu ki le, “Ki aegunote kiprutoiyo eng' emetap pororyosyek alak”," 
Exodus18:4 ak ki kiguure age Elieser; amu ki le, “Ki ek toretindennyu Kamuktaindet ne po abba ak kisarwo eng' rotwetap chok ne po Pharaoh.”" 
Exodus18:5 Ki wo anyun Jethro kobooto weeriigap Musa ak osotyonnyi ole ki mi Musa eng' surkwen komuunyi eng' tulweetap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus18:6 Ki iyookto ineendet keleenji Musa, “Kaaitu oling'ung' anee Jethro kabyugoing'ung' kobooto osotyondeng'ung' ak weeriikyik aeng'.”" 
Exodus18:7 Ki manda anyun Musa kwo kotorookta kapyugoinnyi. Ki ing'uruuk ak kotoroochkei ak kiteebegei chametapkei yeityo komanda koba emait oriit. 
Exodus18:8 Ki mwachi Musa anyun kapyugoinnyi tuguuk tugul che ki koyachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Pharaoh ak Misiriik agobo Israel, ak nyalilwogik tugul che kinyoor eng' ooreet ak ole kisaruundo icheek `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus18:9 Ki paibait Jethro amu myeeindo tugul ne kiga koyachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel kosar icheek komang'une eunegap Misiriik. 
Exodus18:10 Ki le Jethro, “Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kisarwok eng' eunegap Misiriik ak eng' eutap Pharaoh, ne ki sar piik komang'une pounatetap Misiriik." 
Exodus18:11 Angen nguno anyun ale oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir kamuktaik tugul. Amu ki sar piik eng' eunegap Misiriik che ki yachi pichooto kiit ne ya eng' menoteet.” 
Exodus18:12 Eng' yooto anyun konam Jethro kabyugoitap Musa kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak tiseiywot ak koeng'ji Kamuktaindet. Ki nyo Aron kobooto poisyek tugul che po Israel koamis ak kabyugoitap Musa eng' taitap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus18:13 Eng' karonet ne po aeng', kotep ng'wony Musa korwooksechi piik. Ki tononso piik eng' ole mi Musa kong'etee karon agoi koimen." 
Exodus18:14 Ye kingo keer kabyugoitap Musa tuguuk tugul che ki yachin `Musa piik, koteebe koleenji, “Nee ni iyachini piik? Amu nee si itebi inyegei ak kotonondos piik tugul ko kayiemin kobooch karon agoi koimen?”" 
Exodus18:15 Kowolji `Musa kapyugoinnyi koleenji, “Amu pwonjino piik si koteepse Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus18:16 Ye tinyei ng'olyoo kobwonjino, ak abesyechini chii tugul ak chiitap kokwennyi. Aneeti icheek konai kaneetisyosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ng'atuutikyik.”" 
Exodus18:17 Koleenji anyun `kapyugoinnyi Musa, “Ma myee kii iyae." 
Exodus18:18 Iwong'ugei kimnateng'ung' inyee ak ne po pichu omiitei tugul. Amu siirei kimnateng'ung' niito ago memuuchi iyai inyegei. 
Exodus18:19 Kas anyun ng'olyoondennyu aboorun kiit ne iyae ak ingotep Kamuktaindet kobooten. Myee iegu ne ing'alaaljini Kamuktaindet ne kata piik ak iipchi Kamuktaindet ng'aleekwak. 
Exodus18:20 Ineet icheek kaneetisyosyek, ng'atuutik ak iboorchi ooreet ne kanyolji koosup ak poisyet ne kanyolji koyai." 
Exodus18:21 Nyolu kogeny ilewenote eng' piik tugul piik che kiimeen, che iywei Kamuktaindet, piigap imanit che wechei tuguugap asoya. Inde icheek koboi piik koek pounigap eliphuusyek, che po pogolwogik, che po konomusyek ak che po tamanusyek." 
Exodus18:22 Ingoek icheek kirwoogik che irwookyin piik eng' peetuusyek tugul ak koibun ng'olyoot age tugul ne uui. Ago ingobesyechi icheek ng'olyoo age tugul ne ming'in, si kobiit konyamnyumun amu kogesen tugul." 
Exodus18:23 Ngot iyai kiito anyun ak ngo ng'atin Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto, imuuch anyun itonon ak koba pichu tugul ak icheek oldanywa eng' kaalyeet.”" 
Exodus18:24 Ki kas anyun Musa ng'aleegap kapyugoinnyi ak ki yai chooto tugul kamwachi ineendet. 
Exodus18:25 Ki lewenot piik che kiimeen eng' Israel tugul ak konde koboi piik koek pounik che po eliphuusyek, che po pogolwogik, che po konomusyek ak che po tamanusyek." 
Exodus18:26 Ki irwookyin `icheek piik eng' peetuusyek tugul. Ki ipchi Musa ng'aleek che uueen ago ki ibesyechi icheek ng'olyoo age tugul ne ming'in. 
Exodus18:27 Yeityo kochamji anyun `Musa kapyugoinnyi kwo. Ki wo anyun pandanyi agoi emennyi. 
Exodus19:1 Ki it anyun piigap Israel surkwen ne po Sinai eng' arawet ne po somok kobooch ngap komanda eng' emetap Misiri. 
Exodus19:2 Kingo kagoba eng' Rephidim ak koit surkwen ne po Sinai, komuung'so eng' olooto ak kotebee ye kigatokyigei tulweet." 
Exodus19:3 Ki togosta Musa kwo ole mi Kamuktaindet ak kiguur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' tulweet koleenji, “Mwachi ko uu ni kootap Jakobo, ak imwachi piigap Israel ileenji," 
Exodus19:4 ‘Ki ogeer kiit ne ki ayachi Misiriik ak ko uu ye ki agesenenak kebebaigap kipsichinik amutwak obwanjo. 
Exodus19:5 Eng' nooto anyun, ngot ogas iit kutinnyu iman ak oriip kayomisennyu, oegu anyun iman eng' anee chamanikyuk che itabaanatiin eng' piik tugul, amu nenyu ng'wony komugul." 
Exodus19:6 Oegu eng' anee laitornatetap tisiik ak pororyet ne itabaanat. Chuuto ng'aleek che iwendi imwachini piigap Israel.’ ” 
Exodus19:7 Ki nyo anyun Musa koguur poisyegap pichooto ak kotetyi icheek ng'aleechooto tugul che ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. 
Exodus19:8 Ki wol piik tugul eng' kibagenge kole, “Kiyae chooto tugul kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ki ipchi anyun `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleegap piik," 
Exodus19:9 ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Anyoonjinin iman eng' pooldet ne tuui si kobiit kogas piik ye ang'alaalun ak koyanin agoi.” Kingo mwachi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleegap piik," 
Exodus19:10 koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, “Chortegei ui ole mi piik ianyiny icheek ra ak mutai ak ingomwet ngoroikwak." 
Exodus19:11 Ingochopkei agobo peetuut ne po somok: amu choorchingei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tulweetap Sinai eng' peetuutap somok eng' taitap piik tugul. 
Exodus19:12 Tilji piik ole iboch ak ileenji; ‘Oriipkei si motogoste tulweet anan otwaa kiwotennyi. Kibarei age tugul ne tiinyei tulweet. 
Exodus19:13 Ma kitiinyei eng' euut chii ne katiny kobatee kilage koik anan kemwok. Ama sabei age tugul, ngo tyony anan chii. Ye ki kuut igonditap kuinetap mengit kochulyo kotogos icheeget kobwa tulweet.’ ”" 
Exodus19:14 Ki choortagei Musa anyun kwo ole mi piik, kwo koanyiny icheeget ak kimwet icheek ngoroikwak." 
Exodus19:15 Ki leenji piik, “Ochopkei ogen peetuutap somok amat koriikyi chii kobogoryo.”" 
Exodus19:16 Eng' peetuutap somok anyun, ko kaeech kobiit tuloosyek ak kalyelosyek. Ki ilaach `pooldet ne tuui tulweet ak ki mi cheetap iryageet ne cheei kot. Kibotanso piik tugul che ki mi nganaseet." 
Exodus19:17 Ki indochi `Musa piik ak komuut komong' eng' nganaseet koba kotuiyo ak Kamuktaindet. Ki pa anyun piik kotononie tulweet keel. 
Exodus19:18 Ki iyeni tulweet komugul ne po Sinai amu kichoorchigei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tulwoonooto eng' maat. Ki togosta iyetanyi ne uu ne po maat ne oo kot ak ki potan tulweet miising'. 
Exodus19:19 Kingo tesak cheetap iryageet kwo parak miising', kotwek Musa ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' tuugeet." 
Exodus19:20 Kichoorchigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tulweetap Sinai parak ak kiguur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa kwo tulweet parak, ak kitogosta Musa." 
Exodus19:21 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ui choortegei iteechi piik si ma put kiwateet kogeer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kobek che chaang'." 
Exodus19:22 Ingoanyinygei tisiik ak icheek che riikyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si ma par icheek.” 
Exodus19:23 Ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ma chamdaat eng' piik kotogos tulwooniito po Sinai, amu ki iteiywech ileenjech, ‘Onde kiwateet tulweet ak otabaan.’ ”" 
Exodus19:24 Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koleenji, “Ui choortegei si otogosu ak Aron. Ago amat kobut piik ak tisiik kiwateet kotogos ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si ma par `ineendet icheek.”" 
Exodus19:25 Ki choortagei anyun Musa kwo ole mi piik, kwo komwachi." 
Exodus20:1 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet ng'aleechu tugul kole," 
Exodus20:2 “Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne ki imutun imang'une emetap Misiri, kootap otwoknateet." 
Exodus20:3 Amecheeng'jigei cheptalelisyek che teer, kobatena aneege." 
Exodus20:4 Ameyachigei kanamwet anan itoondap kiy age tugul ne mi parak kipsengwet anan ne mi ng'wony anan ne mi nyanjet ng'wony oriit; 
Exodus20:5 ameng'uruukyi anan ioot icheek, amu anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko aa Kamuktaindet ne ama ng'etkong'. Ageerchini lagok tengektap kwanisyekwak agoi ibindap somok ak ne po ang'wan eng' icheek che wecho." 
Exodus20:6 Ago ariiree eliphuusyek eng' icheek che chama ak kosubi ng'atuutikyuk. 
Exodus20:7 Amemwa kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' tangoi. Amu iityin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'oogisto ne mwaei kainennyi eng' tangoi. 
Exodus20:8 Ibwaat peetuutap sabato, iriip itabaan." 
Exodus20:9 Iboisyee peetuusyek lo ak iyai poisyoniguk tugul," 
Exodus20:10 ago peetuutap tisap ko sabato ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Ameyai poisyo eng' peetuunooto inyee anan weeriing'ung' anan cheptong'ung', anan otwogindeng'ung' ne muren anan otwogindeng'ung' ne tye anan tuguuk anan toondeng'ung' ne miitei kurgotiguk." 
Exodus20:11 Amu ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kipsengwet ak ng'wony, nyanjet ak tuguuk tugul che mi oriitinnywa eng' peetuusyek lo ak komuuny eng' peetuutap tisap. Ki iberuur anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuutap sabato amu nooto ak kotabaan." 
Exodus20:12 Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung' si kochang'a peetuusyeguk eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Exodus20:13 Amerumisye. 
Exodus20:14 Amoipkei. 
Exodus20:15 Amechoorse. 
Exodus20:16 Amebaoryanji chiitap kokweng'ung' eng' lembech. 
Exodus20:17 Amegase myat kootap chiitap kokweng'ung'. Amegase myat osotyotap chiitap kokweng'ung' anan otwogindennyi ne muren anan otwogindennyi ne tye anan eitonyi anan sigiryennyi anan kiy age tugul ne po chiitap kokweng'ung'.” 
Exodus20:18 Ye kingo keer piik tugul kalyelosyek ak tulweet ne ki iyeni, ak kogas tuleetap ilotik ak cheetap iryageet, kobotanso eng' arageneet ak kotononso eng' ole loo." 
Exodus20:19 Ak ki leenji `icheek Musa, “Ng'alaalwech inyee si kegasin, ago amengong'alaalwech Kamuktaindet, amu ngot ko ng'alaalwech ineendet kebeguu.”" 
Exodus20:20 Koleenji `Musa piik, “Amoiywei, amu kanyo Kamuktaindennyo kotyemak si kotebee taing'wong' kaiyweisyennyi ne oiywei ineendet asi moyai tengek.”" 
Exodus20:21 Kitononso piik anyun eng' ole loo ak kiriikta Musa ole mi Kamuktaindet eng' pooldet ne tuui. 
Exodus20:22 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, ‘Kaogeerchigei okweegei ole, kaang'alaalwok kong'etee kipsengwet." 
Exodus20:23 Amat oyachigei kanamonik otesena che po fedha, anan kanamonik che po thahabu." 
Exodus20:24 Teekwo kaptisyet ne po ng'ung'unyek ak ieng'wo eng' kaptisisyonooto kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei ak kagoochinoiguk che po kaalyeet, keechiireguk ak tuguuk. Anyoonjinin ak aberuurin eng' komosta age tugul ole andoi kainennyu kibwaate." 
Exodus20:25 Ngimache iteekwo kaptisisyet ne po koik, ko meteege koik che ki kiwai amu ngiwai, ko keng'wanit." 
Exodus20:26 Ametogoste iwe kaptisisyennyu ibune lang'eiywot si mewe aach ngor.’ ” 
Exodus21:1 Chu anyun ng'atuutik che indechini tainnywa: 
Exodus21:2 Ngial otwogindet ne Hebranindet, koboisyeun kenyiisyek lo, ak eng' kenyiitap tisap kowendi puch kotyagat." 
Exodus21:3 Ngo ki nyonei ineegei, komandoi ineegei. Ago ngo kiga kotunis komandoi ak osotyonnyi." 
Exodus21:4 Ago ngo ki igoochin kiptaiyandennyi osotyot ak kosikyi weeriik anan ko tiibiik, kobunjiin osotyondonooto ak lagokyik kiptaiyandennyi ak komanda chiichooto ineegei." 
Exodus21:5 Ngo mwa ineegei eng' chamennyi otwogindet kole achame anee kiptaiyandennyu, osotyondennyu ak lagokyuk, ma mandoi nganda atyagat," 
Exodus21:6 komut anyun kiptaiyandennyi chiichooto kwo taitap Kamuktaindet. Yeityo kimut konyo kurgat anan tugatukyetap kurgeet ak kobarbar itinnyi kiptaiyandennyi eng' kateet si koot ineendet agoi. 
Exodus21:7 Ngo alda chii cheptonyi koek otwogindet koma mandoi chebooto ko uu otwogik che muren. 
Exodus21:8 Ngo ma ibaibai chebooto kiptaiyandennyi ne ki lewen kole si tuun koek osotyonnyi, kochamda koek ne ityagat. Ma tinyei kimnateet kiptaiyandennyi koalda kwo pororyosyek alak amu king'al ineendet." 
Exodus21:9 Ngo koochi weeriinnyi koek osotyonnyi, koyachin chebooto ko uu ye yachin tiibiikyik." 
Exodus21:10 Ngo syon, ko mat kochuchuch amitwogikyik anan ngoroikyik anan ko uu ye nyoljin osotik." 
Exodus21:11 Ngo ma yachi ineendet tuguuchooto somok, komuuchi osotyondonooto kwo puch ama melekto age tugul." 
Exodus21:12 Ineendet ne pirei chii kot kome, kebarei ne matiny." 
Exodus21:13 Ago chii ne kama koyaei ko kwetyin, ago ki yaak eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet, achopchini ole imuuchi komwechi." 
Exodus21:14 Ngosetyi chii chiitap kokwennyi ak kobar ineendet eng' ng'aalseet, ko agot ngo mwechi kaptisisyennyu, omong'u ineendet si kebar." 
Exodus21:15 Ineendet ne pirei kwan anan kamet, kebarei ne matiny." 
Exodus21:16 Ineendet ne choorei chii ak koalda anan ngenamji komi eunekyik, kebarei iman." 
Exodus21:17 Ineendet ne sasei kwan anan kamet, kebarei iman." 
Exodus21:18 “Ngo pooryo piik ak kewire age koita, anan ngo luch ama ta kome, ago iguotenot ne mang'etei eng' itogunnyi," 
Exodus21:19 ak ngot kong'eet kowendot kotebenoti kiroktonyi, keunda anyun ne kibirei. Ago nganda kiuundoi, kogoochin tuguuk che yamei peetuusyekyik che kibetyo puch ak konya ineendet komyee agoi kosap." 
Exodus21:20 “Ngo pir chii otwogindennyi ne muren anan ne tye eng' kirokto kot komechi eunekyik, kigeerchin chiichooto yaityennyi ne matiny." 
Exodus21:21 Ago ngot koeekyi peetuut agenge anan ko aeng' ama me, koma kigeerchin kiy, amu kiga al ineendet." 
Exodus21:22 “Ngo pooryo piik kot kokwer osotyot ne tomono ak kororok moet ama koam kiy osotyondonooto, kogeerchin ineendet ne kalel che yamegei ak che machei manong'otyotap osotyondonooto. Igoitoi ko uu ye kamwa kirwoogik." 
Exodus21:23 Ago ngo yaak kiy ne ya, kigeeri saboondo eng' saboondo," 
Exodus21:24 konda eng' konda, keldet eng' keldet, euut eng' euut, keeldo eng' keeldo," 
Exodus21:25 peelset eng' peelset, kaguotenet eng' kaguotenet, pireet eng' pireet." 
Exodus21:26 “Ngo kwer chii kondap otwogindennyi ne muren anan ne tye, kot kotui, kounda kwo kotyagat amu kondanyi." 
Exodus21:27 Ngo kwer keldetap otwogindennyi ne muren anan otwogindennyi ne tye kot kochun, kounda kwo kotyagat amu keldennyi." 
Exodus21:28 “Ngo toor kirgit muren anan kobogoryo ak kome, kelachei kirgootok iman ak ma ki amei panyeekyik. Ma ki ityin anyun chiitap ko po kirgooto leluut age tugul." 
Exodus21:29 Ago ngo kocham kobarei piich kirgooto ak kigemwachi chiitap ko po ama koger ineendet, ago kabar muren anan kobogoryo, kelachei kirgooto ak kebar chiitap ko po agine." 
Exodus21:30 Ago ngemage ineendet kagerutyet kotyagegei, kogoito anyun nooto kityage saboondanyi ko uu ye magaat." 
Exodus21:31 Kiyae ko uu kirwoogoniito ngo ki par kirgooto weeriit anan ko chepto. 
Exodus21:32 Ngo toor kirgit otwogindet ne muren anan otwogindet ne tye, kogoitoi chiitap ko po kirgit shekelisyek sosom che po fedha, kogoochin kiptaiyannywa ak kelach kirgooto kebar." 
Exodus21:33 “Ngo yaat chii keriinget anan ngo pal keriing' ama koger ak kororokyi tany anan sigiryo," 
Exodus21:34 kogeeri chiichooto po keriinget, ak kogoochi chiitap ko po tuguuchooto silingisyek, ak kobunji nooto kagome chiitap ko po keriinget." 
Exodus21:35 “Ngo par kirgit kirgitap chiito age kot kome, kealdoi nooto sabei ak kopchei pichooto po kiruugik tuguuk che kagialdae ak kopchei panyeegap nooto kame." 
Exodus21:36 Ago ngot kingen keele ki cham kobarisyei kirgooto, ama koger chiitap ko po, kowale kirgooto kirgit age ak kobunji ineendet panyeegap nooto kame.”" 
Exodus22:1 “Ngo choor chii tany anan keechiir ak koeeny anan koalda, kogoonu tuuga muut kogeere tanyata anan ko keechiirek ang'wan kogeere keechiiryonooto." 
Exodus22:2 Ngenam choorindet kobutisyei komachei kochoorso ak kebar, koma mi tengektap korotiik eng' ineendet ne kabarei." 
Exodus22:3 Ago ngebar ineendet ko kagochor asiis, komiitei tengektap korotiik eng' ineendet ne kabarei. Nyoljin choorindonooto kogeer che yamei, ngo ma tinyei kiy kealdoi ineendet amu choorsennyi." 
Exodus22:4 Ngenyoorchi eunnyi kioto kachoor kota kosabei, ngo tany anan ngo sigiryo anan ngo keechiir, kogeeri konyil aeng'." 
Exodus22:5 “Ngo yage chiito tennyi mbareetap chiito age anan ko mbareet ne po sabibuk, kogeerchin chiitap ko po mbareet tuguukyik che myachen che po mbareennyi, ak logoegap keetikyik che korooron." 
Exodus22:6 “Ngo lal maat ak konam ng'ootweet si kobeel peek che mi mbar anan ko peek che iyumotiin anan kobeel mbareet, kogeeri iman chiito ne kainaami maat aseenet ne kagon maata." 
Exodus22:7 “Ngo koochi chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi chepkondok anan tuguuk kogonorchi ak kechoor eng' kootap chiichooto, ak ngenam choorindet, kogeeri choorindonooto konyil aeng'." 
Exodus22:8 Ago ngo ma ki nam choorindet, konyonei anyun chiitap ko po koot taitap Kamuktaindet si kobiit kotook ngo ki nam tuguugap chiitap kokwennyi." 
Exodus22:9 “Ngot komi tiyet age tugul agobo kiy age tugul; ngo ne po tany anan sigiryo anan keechiir anan ne po ingor anan kiy age tugul ne ki pet ak komaiytos piik aeng'u koleen age tugul, ‘Ineni,’ keibu anyun ng'aleekwak kobwa taitap kirwoogik. Ineendet ne mwaei kirwoogik kole tinyei leluut, kogeerchin chiitap kokwennyi konyil aeng'." 
Exodus22:10 “Ngomanaakyi chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi sigiryet anan eito anan keechiir anan tany age tugul, ak ngo me anan ngo myan anan ngekweri ama keer chii," 
Exodus22:11 kotebee kayosyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenutap pichooto tuwai, si koboor iman kole ma choor tuguugap chiitap kokwennyi; ak koyan agine chiitap ko po, ak ma kigeeri kiy." 
Exodus22:12 Ago ngot ko ki kichoor iman, kogeerchin chiitap ko po che yamei." 
Exodus22:13 Ngot ko ki nam tyony kotonaton, ingoip anyun tanyata nyoo koek paornateet. Ma koonu kiy kogeere nooto ki kibar." 
Exodus22:14 “Ngosoom chii chiitap kokwennyi kiy koboisyee, ak ngo ng'emak anan ngo me ama mi chiitap ko po, kogeere age iman." 
Exodus22:15 Ago ngo ki mi chiitap ko po, koma kigeeri. Ngo ki kikweri kobois si kigoito melekto, ko yamegei ak melekto kityo." 
Exodus22:16 “Ngo kaigai `chii pergeiyat ne tomo keyachi koito ak koruiyo ak ineendet, ko kogandoi tuguuk si kobiit kotun." 
Exodus22:17 Ngo eesyo kwandap pergeiyandanooto eng' kimnateet, kogoitoi tuguuk che aechin ak che kigandoe pergeinik." 
Exodus22:18 “Amemete poonindet kosap. 
Exodus22:19 “Kibarei age tugul ne ruitos ak tyony. 
Exodus22:20 “Chii age tugul ne eeng'jin tiseiywot kamuktain age tugul ne ma Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, keng'emei kiwong'u." 
Exodus22:21 “Ameyachi ne ya too anan inyaliil. Amu ki oo toek ak okweek eng' emetap Misiri. 
Exodus22:22 Ameus kwony age tugul ne kagosiirtoe manong'otyonnyi anan lakwa ne ma tinyei sigiik. 
Exodus22:23 Ngius icheek eng' kiy age tugul ak koriircho, agasyini iman riirekwak," 
Exodus22:24 ak kolaany parak nereegekyuk ak abarenak rotwetap chok, si koek mosoogik osotikwok ak koek ponoon lagokwok." 
Exodus22:25 “Ngi pesenji piikyuk robiinik, che kibananook che mi kobooten, komat iyaach amemage icheek keljinet." 
Exodus22:26 Nginame pesendo ngoryeetap chiitap kokweng'ung', iweekyini kotom kororokto asiista," 
Exodus22:27 amu nooto kityo ngoryeet ne tugegei. Tos tugegei nee koruei? Ngo riircho agasyini amu atinye rireenet. 
Exodus22:28 “Amat isas Kamuktaindet. Amat ichup pounindetap piiguk. 
Exodus22:29 “Amegagei si igoitoi kobun chaang'indap tuguuguk ak eng' che kieei. Igoono taitang'ung' ne weeriit. 
Exodus22:30 Yai ko uu nooto eng' tuguuk ak icheek ak eng' keechiireguk. Igoochi kotebi ak kamet peetuusyek tisap ak igoono eng' peetuut ne po sisiit. 
Exodus22:31 Oegu piigap tiliilindo eng' anee. Eng' nooto anyun, ko amoam panyeek alak tugul che kabar tyong'in eng' timiin. Owiirchini sesenik.”" 
Exodus23:1 “Amemwaate ng'aleek che po lembech. Amonamge ak kiptengekyot iegu paoryat ne ma po iman. 
Exodus23:2 Amesup tuiyet iwe iyai kiy ne ya. Ye ibaoryan eng' kapkirwook ko matonamgei ak tuiyet ibaoryan lembech, imaas kirwooget." 
Exodus23:3 Ametiytiy kibanania eng' ng'aleekyik. 
Exodus23:4 “Nginyooru tetap punyondeng'ung' anan sigiryennyi ne petoti, ikwerichi." 
Exodus23:5 Nginyooru sigiryetap ne wechin ko kagobut amu tuguuk che laei, nganda kama imache itoret, ko kanyool itoret ing'eet sigiryonooto." 
Exodus23:6 “Amat imaas kirwoogetap kibananiandeng'ung' eng' kirwoogutikyik. 
Exodus23:7 Istegei looitu eng' kirwoogutik che kirwookyin chii eng' lembech; amebar che ma tinyei yaityo ak che po imanda, amu ma ityinii imanda chii ne yae tengegito." 
Exodus23:8 Ametaach tuguuk che po asoya, amu tuchei konunoik icheeget che ng'oomen ak kogunuuri ng'aleegap che po imanda." 
Exodus23:9 “Amenyaliil toondet amu ongen ole teptoi muguleldap toondet amu ki oo toek eng' emetap Misiri. 
Exodus23:10 “Igoole mbareeng'ung' kenyiisyek lo ak iges ruratennyi," 
Exodus23:11 ago mete eng' kenyiit ne po tisap kotep komuuny. Niito ko si kobiit konyoor turoonik kibananogap piiguk, ak koam tyong'igap timiin che ituuchi pichooto. Iyae ko uu nooto eng' mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk ak eng' mbareeng'ung' ne po keetiigap mseituni che punu mwanik." 
Exodus23:12 “Yai poisyeng'ung' eng' peetuusyek lo ak imuuny eng' peetuutap tisap. Iyae niito si kobiit komuuny eitang'ung' ak sigiryeng'ung' ak konyoor kamuung'et weeriitap otwogindeng'ung' ne tye ak toondet. 
Exodus23:13 Riip tuguuk tugul che kaamwaun. Amat imwa kainaigap kamuktaik, amat kegasyi kutinng'ung'." 
Exodus23:14 “Iyaiywo igoorto konyil somok eng' kenyiit age tugul. 
Exodus23:15 Yai igoortap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek. Iame eng' peetuusyek tisap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek ko uu ye ki ang'atiin eng' peetuut ne ki kiaror eng' arawetap Abib; amu arawanooto ne ki omang'une Misiri. Amat konyo chii tainnyu ak euut puch. 
Exodus23:16 Riip igoorto ne po kesisyet eng' tongoanigap minutikyik che igooljini mbar. Riip kora igoortap peetuusyek che kiyumune tuguugap mbar eng' kagesunetap kenyiit, ye iyumi tuguugap poisyeng'ung' eng' mbar." 
Exodus23:17 Pwoonei taitap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor murenik tugul konyil somok eng' kenyiit agenge. 
Exodus23:18 “Ameibu korotiigap tiseiywondennyu kobooto magatiinik che kaginde mermereek. Amengoeekyi mwanigap igoortanyu. 
Exodus23:19 “Kanyool iibu tuguuk che po tai eng' tongoanik che po emeng'ung' kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. “Ameyoe aarwet cheegap kamet. 
Exodus23:20 “Ayooktoi anyun malaikaiyat kondoenak koriibootok eng' ooreet ak komutaak obe ole ki achop. 
Exodus23:21 Oriipkei eng' tainnyi ak ogas iit ng'aleekyik; ama ta obistoe ineendet. Amu ma nyochin kaat pistoeng'wong' amu mi kainennyu eng' ineendet. 
Exodus23:22 Ago ngigas iit ng'aleekyik, ak iyai tugul che amwaun, aegu anyun puunyootap puuniguk, ak aegu usiindetap che usin." 
Exodus23:23 Amu wendi malaikaiyandennyu kondoenen, komutin iwe ole mi Amorik, Hitik, Perisik, Kanaanik, Hibik ak Jebusik ak aiste icheek awong'u." 
Exodus23:24 Amat isaa kanamonikwak, anan ioot, anan isup poisyonikwak. Ago oluul kot koma ng'et kiy ak obut kotonogis tolochikwak." 
Exodus23:25 Oboisyeiwo anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', si koberuur amitwogiguk ak peeguk, ak aiste myanwogik eng' kwenung'ung'." 
Exodus23:26 Ma piitu ne rorogu moet anan ne oosu anan ne soneni eng' emeng'ung'. Ayae kosulda koitetap peetuusyeguk. 
Exodus23:27 “Ayooktoi kamuisennyu kondoenen ak anyaliil piik tugul che mi ole iite ak ayai puuniguk tugul komweenen. 
Exodus23:28 Ayooktoi kaaraamyet kondoenen kwo koon Hibik, Kanaanik ak Hitik, koba eng' taing'ung'." 
Exodus23:29 Maone icheek koba eng' taing'ung' eng' kenyiit agenge, si ma kuber emet ak kotesagis tyong'igap timiin ak koiimak." 
Exodus23:30 Ago aoone komutya koba eng' taing'ung' agoi itesage ak inyaban emet. 
Exodus23:31 Andoi kiwoteng'ung' koboochit Araraita ne Piriir agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian ak koboochit surkwen agoi aineet. Amu andoi piigap emonooto eunekwok, si ioon icheek koba eng' taing'ung'." 
Exodus23:32 Amoyai arorut ak icheek, anan agot eng' kanamonikwak." 
Exodus23:33 Amat komeny emeng'ung' si ma koonin iyaiywo tengek. Amu imuuch ioot kamuktaikwak koek nooto iman mesteet eng' inyee.” 
Exodus24:1 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Otogosu ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee, Aron, Nadap, Abiu ak poisyek tamanwogik tisap che po Israel. Ye neegit oitu ole ami, ong'uruukyo osaa." 
Exodus24:2 Nyoonei Musa ineegei koriikyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ma riigu icheek ak mat kotogos chii kobooto ineendet.”" 
Exodus24:3 Ki nyo anyun Musa komwachi piik ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kirwoogutik tugul, ak ki wol piik tugul eng' kutit agenge kole, “Kiyae ng'aleechooto tugul kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus24:4 Ki sir Musa ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak king'eet karon ko tuui ak koteech kaptisisyet eng' tulweet keel. Kiteeche koik tolochik taman ak aeng' ko uu ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po Israel. 
Exodus24:5 Yeityo koyookto murenik che neran che po piigap Israel kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kieng'ji tuuga Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek tiseiywegap kaalyeet. 
Exodus24:6 Kisiil Musa korotiik kebeber, konde taabook che mengeechen, ak koisotee che kiganget kaptisisyet." 
Exodus24:7 Yeityo konam kitabuutap arorutyet ak kosomanji piik kogas, ak ki le icheek, “Kigase iit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak keyae chooto tugul kamwa.”" 
Exodus24:8 Kingo pata konam Musa korotiik ak koisote piik komwae koleen, “Chu korotiigap arorutyet ne kagoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootok eng' ng'aleechu tugul.”" 
Exodus24:9 Ki togosta anyun Musa ak Aron, Nadap, Abiu ak poisyek tamanwogik tisap che po Israel." 
Exodus24:10 Ki keer anyun icheek Kamuktaindet ne po Israel. Ki mi keelyekyik keel koita ne keguure sapphire ne uu sengwetyet eng' tiliilindanyi. 
Exodus24:11 Nga ki keer icheek kondoigap Israel Kamuktaindet, koma twa ineendet icheek eng' eunnyi. Ago ki amis ak koe eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus24:12 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Musa, “Togosu oli ami eng' tulweet ak itebee olito, si agoonin koik che lebeleen che ki asirchi ng'atuutik ak kayomisutik si kobiit ineete piik.”" 
Exodus24:13 Ki ng'eet anyun Musa ak Joshua kiboityondennyi, ak ye ibata kotogosta Musa kwo tulweetap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus24:13 Ki ng'eet anyun Musa ak Joshua kiboityondennyi, ak ye ibata kotogosta Musa kwo tulweetap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus24:14 Ki leenji poisyek, “Otebi eng' yu, ogenech agoi keeweege kogeny ole omi: ‘Ogeero, mi Aron ak Hur kobootok. Ingonyo ole mi icheek chii age tugul ne tinyei ng'olyoo.’ ”" 
Exodus24:15 Ki togosta anyun Musa kwo tulweet ak ki tuch `pooldet tulweet. 
Exodus24:16 Ki tebee liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tulweetap Sinai ak ki tuch `pooldet tulwoonooto peetuusyek lo. Eng' peetuutap tisap koguur `Kamuktaindet Musa eng' pooldet oriit. 
Exodus24:17 Ki uu itoondap liilindap Kamuktaindet maat ne peelei kowong'u eng' tulweet parak ko uu ye kigeerei piigap Israel. 
Exodus24:18 Ki wo Musa pooldet oriit ak kotogosta tulweet. Ki tebee ineendet tulweet peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam. 
Exodus25:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Exodus25:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel koibwa konunoik. Iname konunoichooto kobun chii age tugul ne ichirchirchin muguleldanyi kogoon konunoikyuk.” 
Exodus25:3 Chu konunoik che itaache eng' icheek: thahabu, fedha ak sugunonik," 
Exodus25:4 angook che buluu, che arusen ne piriir ak che piriireen, katanit ne karaaran ak che kiyae koroorigap ng'oroorek;" 
Exodus25:5 ak magatogap mengichik che ki kisal kobiriritu, kobooto magatogap mengichigap peek ak keetiik che uu chebitoik," 
Exodus25:6 mwaitap kiit ne ikweng'sei, tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny che po mwaita ne kiilegei, che po nyamdutik che kibeelei," 
Exodus25:7 koik che kiguure soam, koik che kitetyin ephod ak ngoryeet age ne kilaakyin tegeet." 
Exodus25:8 Ko uu nooto kora, ko ingoteekwo ole-tiliil si ameny kwenunnywa." 
Exodus25:9 Oyai ole teptoi emaitap Kamuktaindet ak ole teptoi tuguuk tugul che kindoi oriit ko uu ye aboorun. 
Exodus25:10 Ingoyai piigap Israel moinget eng' keetiigap chebitoik, ne koindonyi ko sendimita pogol ak taman. Tebeesindanyi ko sendimita tamanwogik lo ak lo. Ingoek kooindap tononennyi sendimita tamanwogik lo ak lo." 
Exodus25:11 Iliige thahabu che tiliileen oriit ak parak ak itegele tegeleiywotap thahabu iyieme paragunnyi tugul. 
Exodus25:12 Itang'ji peteinik ang'wan che po thahabu ak inde peteinichooto luuita age tugul ne po moinget ole po keel. Indoi aeng' komosta age, inde aeng' komosta age." 
Exodus25:13 Iyae keetiik che kiname che po chebitoik ak iliige thahabu. 
Exodus25:14 Yeityo irookte keetichooto peteinik che mi tabanwegap moinget si koek che kitandane moingonooto. 
Exodus25:15 Tebee keetichooto peteinigap moinget, ama kicheru eng' yooto." 
Exodus25:16 Ak inde `paornateet ne agoonin moingonooto oriit. 
Exodus25:17 Yeityo iyai kerwennyi ne po rireenet ne po thahabu che tiliileen; ne koindonyi ko sendimita pogol agenge ak taman ak tebeesindanyi ko tamanwogik lo ak lo. 
Exodus25:18 Iyae kora kerubisyek aeng' eng' thahabu che kitaanyi eng' tabanwek aeng' che po kerwetap rireenet. 
Exodus25:19 Yai kerubit age kotebee tabanda age ak inde age kotabon komosta age. Kinamdos kerwet ne po rireenet ak kerubit eng' tabanda age tugul. 
Exodus25:20 Itoorchingei togoochigap kerubisyek ak ko koegitu kebebaikwak koba parak, si kouure kebebaikwak kerwetap rireenet ak kotoorchigei togoochikwak, ko keerei kerwetap rireenet." 
Exodus25:21 Inde kerwanooto po rireenet paragutap moinget ak inde moinget oriit paornateet ne tuun agoonin. 
Exodus25:22 Yeityo ketuiye ak inyee eng' olooto ak keng'alaal kobooten ko katebee kerwanooto po rireenet parak, ami kwenutap kerubisyek aeng' che mi paragutap moingetap paornateet ak amwaun tuguuk tugul che ang'atiin agobo piigap Israel." 
Exodus25:23 Iyae meset eng' keetiigap chebitoik. Koindonyi ko sendimita sosom ak sisiit, tebeesindanyi ko sendimita artam ak ang'wan ak ko sendimita tamanwogik lo ak lo kooindap tononennyi." 
Exodus25:24 Iliige thahabu che tiliileen ak itegele tegeleiywotap thahabu iyieme paragunnyi tugul. 
Exodus25:25 Chop tegeleiywot ne sendimita tamanwogik lo ak lo tebeesindanyi koyiem kioto ak iyai tegeleiywotap thahabu koyiem tabanwekyik tugul kotegel. 
Exodus25:26 Yachi peteinik ang'wan che po thahabu ak inde peteinichooto luukwek ang'wan, ole mi keelyekyik ang'wanu." 
Exodus25:27 Ingoriikyi peteinichooto tegeleiywot koek che chutei keetiik che ki ibe meset. 
Exodus25:28 Yai keetiik che po chebitoik ak iliige thahabu si kobiit keibe meset. 
Exodus25:29 Itaany thahabu che tiliileen iyai koek taabookyik, kechigosyekyik, kigombokyik ak tageiywekyik che kiroong'jine tuguuk." 
Exodus25:30 Inde magatiinik che itabaanatiin meset kotebee tainnyu kotugul. 
Exodus25:31 Ak iyai keldap tait eng' thahabu che tiliileen. Iyae thahabu che kitaanyi keloto, kelunnyi ak toloitanyi; kigombokyik, mulonokyik, ak taaptokyik ak kiropchindos chooto tugul koek kiy agenge." 
Exodus25:32 Sachei anyun mooriik koek lo eng' toloita nooto; sachei mooriik somogu eng' komosta age ne po keloto ak sachei mooriik somogu ko uu nooto eng' komosin. 
Exodus25:33 Tinyei temeet ne po komosta age kigombok somok che ki kiyai koigei taaptook che kiguure almond ak mulwet ak taapteet. Kotinyei ko uu nooto temeet ne po komosta nin age kigombok somok che ki kiyai koigei taptochooto kiguure almond ak mulwet ak taapteet. Kergeitu anyun eng' mooriik tugul lo che sage keloto komugul. 
Exodus25:34 Ak miitei ole po toloita ineendet kigombok ang'wan che ki kiyai kogergeit ak taaptogap almond kobooto mulonokyik ak tapokyik. 
Exodus25:35 Eng' ye kisage mooriik aeng'u, komi keel yooto mulwet ne ki kituiye koek kiy agenge. Mitoti anyun ko uu nooto eng' olda age tugul ole kisage mooriik tugul ko lo eng' keldap tait." 
Exodus25:36 Namegei mulonokwak ak mooriikwak koek kiy agenge. Kitang'e kioto komugul thahabu che tiliileen. 
Exodus25:37 Yeityo iyai taisyekyik tisap ak inam si kobiit kokweny ole mi. 
Exodus25:38 Yae kora thahabu che tiliileen kanameiywondennyi ak taabookyik che mengeechen. 
Exodus25:39 Iyae tainooto ak tuguuchuuto tugul thahabu che tiliileen che po keruutik sosom ak muut. 
Exodus25:40 Riip si iyai tugul ko uu kergeindenywa ne ki kiboorun eng' tulweet. 
Exodus26:1 Ne siirei nooto anyun, ko teech emaitap Kamuktaindet iteeche angook taman che ki kinabee katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet eng' che buluu. Ngo lelesan anyun angoonochooto nabiindet ne ng'oom kochooronji kerubisyek." 
Exodus26:2 Koindap angeet age tugul ko mitainik taman ak aeng' ak tebeesindo ko mitainik aeng'. Aechindos angoochooto tugul. 
Exodus26:3 Kiropchindos angook muut ak keropchin angook alak muut ak icheek. 
Exodus26:4 Napchi pelelutik che buluu eng' tabandap angeet age eng' ole kurmanat ak eng' ole kagituiyechi. Iyae ko uu nooto eng' tabandap angeet age ne tabanu parak eng' ole kagituiye ne po aeng'. 
Exodus26:5 Napchi angeet age pelelutik konom ak inapchi pelelutik konom eng' tabandap angeet ne po aeng' eng' ole kagituiyechi; tokyindos pelelutik tugul. 
Exodus26:6 Iyae kariik konom che po thahabu che kiname angook si ituiye angook karichooto si koek agenge emaitap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus26:7 Nap angook taman ak agenge inabe koroorigap ng'oroorek koek emait ne kituge emaitap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus26:8 Koindap angeet age tugul ko mitaitinik taman ak somok ak mitainik aeng' tebeesindap age tugul. Aechindos anyun angoonochooto tugul tamanu ak agenge. 
Exodus26:9 Ituiye angook muut koek agenge ak ituiye alak lo koek agenge ak icheek yeityo iliich anganooto po lo eng' ole kimandoe eng' emait. 
Exodus26:10 Yeityo iyachi pelelutik konom eng' tabandap angeet age ne tabanu parak eng' ole kituiyechin ak iyachi pelelutik konom eng' tabandap angeet ne po aeng' eng' ole kituiyechin.
