Exodus26:11 Ne rupei iyai kariik konom che po sugunonik ak irooch karichooto pelelutik si ituiye emait koek agenge. 
Exodus26:12 Kebeberta ne kang'etune ngetunenigap angoogap emait, kosonginine patetap emaitap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus26:13 Ko kebeberwek che ng'etune komoswek tuwai eng' kooindap angoogap emait, ko ingosongininso eng' komosi ak komosi si kobiit kotuch emaitap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus26:14 Inabe muiywegap mengichigap keechiirek che ki kisal kobiriritu si ketuge emait ak inap muiywegap mengichigap peek kotabon parak. 
Exodus26:15 Iyae pagoinik che tonondos che po keetiigap chebitoik kobunji emaitap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus26:16 Iyae koek mitainik sisiit kooindap pagoiyot, tebeesindap pagoiyot age tugul ko sendimita tamanwogik lo ak lo." 
Exodus26:17 Iyae pagoiyot age tugul konyoor ng'elyebwek aeng' che ki ituiyogei; yai ko uu nooto eng' pagoinik tugul che po emaitap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus26:18 Yai pagoinigap emaitap Kamuktaindet che itei tiptem ak inde ole tokyingei murot tai," 
Exodus26:19 ak ibarbar fedha isikyi kong'iik artam si koobeesyo kapkelyenutap pagoinichooto tiptem, chutei ng'elyebwek aeng'u che po pagoiyot agenge kong'iik aeng' che mi kapkelyen. Chutei ko uu nooto ng'elyebwek aeng'u che po pagoiyot age kong'iik aeng' che mi kapkelyen," 
Exodus26:20 ak che po komosta age ne po koot ole tokyingei murot kaataam, inde pagoinik tiptem," 
Exodus26:21 ak kong'iikwak artam che po fedha, kong'iik aeng' eng' kapkelyenutap pagoiyot age tugul." 
Exodus26:22 Yai anyun pagoinik lo kobunji koot patai ole tokyingei cherongo. 
Exodus26:23 Yeityo iyai pagoinik aeng' kobunji luukwek che po ko che mi patai. 
Exodus26:24 Terchindos aeng' kobooch ng'wony agoi parak ago kituiye tugul peteiyot eng' parak. Kiyaei ko uu nooto eng' tuwai kindoi luukwek aeng'. 
Exodus26:25 Egu chooto anyun pagoinik sisiit ak kong'iikwak che po fedha taman ak lo: kong'iik aeng' eng' kapkelyenutap pagoiyot agenge ak kong'iik aeng' eng' kapkelyenutap pagoiyot age. 
Exodus26:26 Ak iyai eng' chebitoik keetiik che uu rateiywek; iyae muut che po pagoinik che po komosta agenge ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet," 
Exodus26:27 ak rateiywek muut che po pagoinik che po komosta age ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet ak rateiywek muut che po pagoinik che po komosta age ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet ne mi patai ole tokyingei cherongo. 
Exodus26:28 Ingobochit tabanda age agoi tabanda age rateiywot ne po kween ne muroksei ne mi kwenutap pagoinichooto. 
Exodus26:29 Iliige thahabu pagoinik ak iyai peteinikwak che po thahabu koek chooto ole kirooktoi rateiywek ak iliige rateiywechooto thahabu. 
Exodus26:30 Ingotonon anyun koyooto ko uu ye ki king'at ak kiboorun eng' tulweet. 
Exodus26:31 Iyae angeet ne ki kioiye emaitap Kamuktaindet ne buluu ak ne aruus ne piriir, ne piriir ak katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet. Kinapchin anganooto kerubisyek che poisyetap laindet ne ng'oom." 
Exodus26:32 Isonginine lumeiywek ang'wan che po keetiigap chebitoik che kiliige thahabu; po thahabu ireusyekwak ak tonone lumeiywechooto kong'iik ang'wan che po fedha che ki kibal. 
Exodus26:33 Isonginine anganooto kapkelyenutap kariik che kiname angook ak iibu moinget ne po paornateet inde koot ne po oriit ne tilate angeet, si kopcheiywok anganooto ole-tiliil ak ole-tiliil miising'." 
Exodus26:34 Inde kerwet ne po rireenet moinget ne po paornateet eng' ole-tiliil miising'. 
Exodus26:35 Inde meset koot ne sip kemong'jin, angeet ne ki kioiye koot ak inde keldap tait kotoorchin ak meset eng' komostap murot tai eng' koot. Yeityo inde meset ole tokyingei murot kaataam." 
Exodus26:36 Nap angeet ne kigeree kurgeetap emait. Inabe ngoryoniito ne buluu, ne aruus ne piriir, ne piriir, ak katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet, poisyetap chiito ne nabei kondai lelesta." 
Exodus26:37 Yeityo iyachi ngoryonooto lumeiywek muut che po keetiigap chebitoik ak iliige thahabu ak punjin thahabu ireusyekwak. Itang'ji eng' sugunwet kong'iik muut che kilolonda. 
Exodus27:1 “Teech kaptisisyet eng' keetiigap chebitoik koek koindo mitainik aeng' ak robo ak koek tebeesindo mitainik aeng' ak robo. Aechin komoswek tugul ang'wanu che po kaptisisyonooto ak ingoek koindo ne po tononennyi mitait agenge ak robo. 
Exodus27:2 Iyae kuinoikyik eng' luukwekyik ang'wan: itaanyi inoichooto konomnyo ak kaptisisyet koek kiy agenge ak iliige sugunwet. 
Exodus27:3 Min tereenikyik che ki ibe oreek ak kechigosyekyik che eecheen, taabookyik che mengeechen, kariik che sogotiin ak taabookyik alak che ki ibe maat. Yae tuguuchu tugul sugunonik." 
Exodus27:4 Yeityo iyai kora sugunonik che kiregeri ak inde sugunonichooto kagireger peteinik ang'wan eng' luukwekyik ang'wan. 
Exodus27:5 Inde karnanooto kagireger kapkelyenutap mireiywot ne yiemei kaptisisyet komosta ole po keel si komuurmuur kaptisisyet. 
Exodus27:6 Yachi kaptisisyet keetiik che ki ibe; chooto ko keetiigap chebitoik ak iliige sugunwet. 
Exodus27:7 Kirooktoi keetichooto peteinik ak tebee keetichooto komoswek aeng' che po kaptisisyet si kobiit keibe. 
Exodus27:8 Itete pagoinik koek moinget eng' kaptisisyonooto: ingoyai piik ko uu ye ko ki porun eng' tulweet. 
Exodus27:9 “Iyae seremut ne ng'ootaat ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet. Eng' ole tokyingei murot tai, kindoi angook che uu emait ne po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet ne yamei mitainik artam ak ang'wan ko uu kooindap seremut eng' komosta agenge." 
Exodus27:10 Egu tiptem lumeiywek che po sugunonik che keratyin ngoroichooto ak kong'iikwak tiptem che po sugunonik che tononie, agobo fedha ireusyegap lumeiywek." 
Exodus27:11 Uu nooto koindo agine eng' komostap murot kaataam, king'ote angook che uu emait che yamei mitainik artam ak ang'wan ak egu tiptem lumeiywekwak che po sugunonik, po fedha ireusyegap lumeiywek kobooto rateiywekwak che kituiye." 
Exodus27:12 Eng' tebeesindap seremut eng' komostap cherongo, ing'ote angook che uu emait che yamei mitainik tiptem ak aeng'. Egu taman lumeiywekwak ak kong'iikwak taman che tononie." 
Exodus27:13 Ingoek mitainik tiptem ak aeng' tebeesindo ne po seremut ne tokyingei kong'asiis," 
Exodus27:14 koek mitainik lo ak kebeberyat angook che uu emait che po komosta age ak lumeiywekwak somok ak kong'iikwak somok che tononie. 
Exodus27:15 Ingoek che po komosta age angook che yamei mitainik lo ak kebeberyat kobooto lumeiywekwak somok ak kong'iikwak somok che tononie. 
Exodus27:16 Iyae koek angook che po ormariichet ne po seremut mitainik lo iyae che buluu, che arusen ne piriir, che piriireen ak katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet, indoi chiito ne nabei lelesta. Ingoek lumeiywek ang'wan ak kong'iikwak ang'wan che tononie." 
Exodus27:17 Po fedha rateiywek che keratote lumeiywek tugul che yiemei seremut, po fedha ireusyekwak ak po sugunonik kong'iikwak che tononie." 
Exodus27:18 Iteeche koek kooindap seremut mitainik artam ak ang'wan, koek tebeesindo mitainik tiptem ak aeng' ak ingoek tononet mitainik aeng' ak robo che po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet ak ingobunji sugunonik kong'iik che tononie." 
Exodus27:19 Ingobunji sugunonik tuguuk tugul che keboisyee eng' poisyetap emaitap Kamuktaindet, tigongenikyik tugul ak tigongenik tugul che po seremut." 
Exodus27:20 “Ng'at piigap Israel koibun mwaita ne tiliil ne po mseituni ne ki kitui si kobunji kiit ne ikweng'sei si kobiit kolal tait kotugul. 
Exodus27:21 Ingochobei Aron ak weeriikyik lapkeiyonooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'etee koskoleny agoi karon eng' emait ne kituiyechin eng' ole sip kemong'jin eng' angeet ne iyoitos emaitap Kamuktaindet, ne mi tai eng' paornateet. Egu ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' ibinwekwak tugul agobo piigap Israel." 
Exodus28:1 “Imutu anyun Aron ng'eetap komet konyo ole ami kobooto weeriikyik, kobwa eng' ole mi piigap Israel, si kobiit koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet. Icheeget che imutu ko; Aron ak weeriikyik, Nadap, Abiu, Eleazar ak Ithamar." 
Exodus28:2 Napchi Aron ng'eetap komet ngoroik che itabaanatiin che po teegisto ak korooronindo. 
Exodus28:3 Yeityo ing'alaalji tugul che tinyei muguleldo ne po kaguiyet, che ki anyiit kabuusetap ng'omnateet, si konap ngoroik che po Aron si kobiit kitabaan ineendet koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet." 
Exodus28:4 Chu angook che nabei icheek: ngoryeet ne kilaakyin tegeet, ephod, ngoryeet ne kooi, ak age ne kooi miising' ne ki kilelesan, naaryeet ak pireneet. Ilaachi Aron ng'eetap komet ak weeriikyik ngoroichuuto itabaanatiin si koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet." 
Exodus28:5 Ingoboisyee icheek usiisyek che ililii, che buluu, che arusen ne piriir ak che piriireen kobooto katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet." 
Exodus28:6 “Yae icheek ephod eng' thahabu che buluu, eng' che arusen ne piriir, eng' che piriireen ak eng' katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet." 
Exodus28:7 Tinyei eng' tigigoik kebeberwek che ituitos ngoroichooto tuwai koek ngoryeet agenge. 
Exodus28:8 Ak ki kinap pireneet eng' ng'omnateet ki tuiyo kogergeit ak ephod si kerategei. Kinabe thahabu, buluu, che arusen ne piriir, che piriireen ak katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet." 
Exodus28:9 “Nam koik aeng' che kiguure soam ak iwachi eng' sireet kainaigap piigap Israel ko uu ortinwekwak; 
Exodus28:10 sirchi koita age kainaik lo, ak kainaik lo che kang'et isirchi koita age." 
Exodus28:11 Sirchi koichooto aeng' kainaigap piigap Israel, eng' poisyetap waindetap koik, ko uu waet ne po ng'ookset ak inde koichooto thahabu che ki kitogul konam koik." 
Exodus28:12 Yeityo inde koichooto aeng' tigigoigap ephod si koek koichooto kabwaatet agobo piigap Israel. Ingoibot Aron kainaikwak eng' tigigoikyik aeng' eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kabwaatet. 
Exodus28:13 Iyae tuguuk che togulotin eng' thahabu," 
Exodus28:14 ak sirimoik aeng' che po thahabu che tiliileen. Ilet koigei rogoonik ak iratyi sirimwechooto kagilet tuguuchooto togulotin. 
Exodus28:15 “Nap eng' poisyetap nabiindet ne ng'oom, ngoryonooto po tegeet ne po kirwooget, inabe kogergeit ak ephod eng' thahabu ne buluu, ne aruus ne piriir, ne piriir ak eng' katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet." 
Exodus28:16 Ingoaechin koindo ak tebeesindo ko kagiliich. Ingoek kakwautyennyi olo po sendimita tiptem ak aeng' eng' koindo ak eng' tebeesindo. 
Exodus28:17 Inde ngoryonooto koik che tetotin eng' ortinwekwak ang'wan. Inde ooreet ne po tai sardio, topasio ak bareqet," 
Exodus28:18 ak inde ooreet ne po aeng' sumaragdo, sapphire ak yaholom." 
Exodus28:19 Eng' ooreet ne po somok inde huakinto, sebu ak ametusto." 
Exodus28:20 Eng' ooreet ne po ang'wan inde berulo, soam ak jasipi. Kitetyin koichooto kelongonigap thahabu." 
Exodus28:21 Egu koichooto taman ak aeng' ko uu kainaigap piigap Israel. Pendi ko uu kainaikwak ko uu ye kiwaei ng'ookset, tinyei koita age tugul kainennyi ak ko pee ortinwek taman ak aeng'." 
Exodus28:22 Napchi ngoryonooto po tegeet sirimwek che uu rogoonik che po thahabu che tiliileen che ki kilet ko uu rogoet. 
Exodus28:23 Napchi kora peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak inde peteinichooto aeng' tabanwegap luukwek aeng' che po ngoryonooto po tegeet. 
Exodus28:24 Yeityo inde sirimwechooto aeng' po thahabu che ki kilet peteinik aeng' che mi tabanwek aeng' che po ngoryonooto po tegeet. 
Exodus28:25 Nam anyun komoswechuun alak aeng' che po sirimwechooto aeng' ki kilet ak irooch kelongonik aeng' che ki kitogul yeityo ituiye ak ephod eng' komostap tigigoik ole tabanu tai. 
Exodus28:26 Chop peteinik aeng' che po thahabu yeityo inapchji ngoryonooto po tegeet eng' komostap luukwek aeng' eng' tabanwekyik che tabanu komostap oriit eng' ephod keel. 
Exodus28:27 Chop anyun peteinik aeng' che po thahabu inapchi tuguuchooto tigigoigap ngoryonooto kiguure ephod eng' komostap kapkelyen ole tabanu tai eng' ole neegitee ye ki kituiye, eng' paragutap pirenonooto po ephod ne ki kinap eng' ng'omnateet." 
Exodus28:28 Igiichi icheek ngoryeetap tegeet eng' peteinikyik koratyin ak peteinigap ephod, korate rogoet ne buluu si kotebee paragutap pireneet ne po ephod ne ki kila eng' ng'omnateet, si ma peesyo ngoryeetap tegeet ak ephod." 
Exodus28:29 Ye mandoi Aron ole-tiliil, koibe kainaigap piigap Israel ngoryonooto po tegeet ne po kirwooget eng' muguleldanyi si koek kabwaatet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul." 
Exodus28:30 Inde ngoryonooto po tegeet ne po kirwooget Urim ak Tumim si kotebee chooto muguleldap Aron ye mandoi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Eng' nooto anyun koibei Aron kirwoogetap piigap Israel eng' muguleldanyi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul. 
Exodus28:31 “Inabe ngoryeet ne kiroochigei ne po ephod ne ki kisal konyalilit ne ais kityo. 
Exodus28:32 Ak inap ole kirooktoi metit eng' kwenunnyi ak igurman kaatit ko uu poisyetap laindet ak ko uu ye kichobei ngoroigap lugeet si ma kereer. 
Exodus28:33 Napchi ngoryonooto tabandap keel logoek che buluu, che arusen ne piriir, che piriireen, koyiem tabandap kapkelyen tugul ak itilate cheptingiloogap thahabu kot kotuiyo." 
Exodus28:34 Indoi twolyot ne po thahabu yeityo inde logoiyandanooto korupkei ak itilate ko uu nooto korubatkei agoi tabandap ngoryeet komugul. 
Exodus28:35 Ak ingolaach Aron si koboisyee ak kegas cheetap cheptingilinichooto ye wendi ole-tiliil eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ye mong'u si ma me." 
Exodus28:36 “Itaany kora thahabu che tiliileen kolebelitu ak iwai eng' paragunnywa waet ne uu ne po ng'ookset, ile, Tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus28:37 Iratee rogoet ne buluu si kotebee naaryeet chepkulet ak kotebee naaryeet ole po togoch. 
Exodus28:38 Tebee togeetap Aron ak koibot Aron tengektap tuguuk che tiliileen, che itabaani piigap Israel eng' kagoochinoikwak tugul che tiliileen. Ak kotebee nooto togeetap Aron kotugul si kobiit kochamogis eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus28:39 Inapchini Aron ngoryeet ne kooi eng' katanit ne karaaran ak inde lelesta ak inap ko uu nooto naaryeet ne po katanit ne karaaran ak inap pireneet. 
Exodus28:40 “Eng' weeriigap Aron inapchini ngoroik che kooen, pirenaik ak chepkuloik che mengeechen che po teegisto ak kororindo." 
Exodus28:41 Yeityo ilaakyi ng'eetap komet Aron tuguuchooto ak weeriikyik ak icheek ak iil, ak itoroorchi icheek poisyetap tiliilindo itabaan, si kobiit koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet." 
Exodus28:42 Inapchini icheek sulwalisyek che ng'ete suet agoi kubesoik che po katanit si kobiit kotuge aach ngorinnywa. 
Exodus28:43 Ilaachi Aron ak weeriikyik tuguuchooto ye pendi emaitap oriit, anan ye riikyin kapkorosuut si kobiit kobois eng' ole-tiliil si ma nam icheek tengekto, ak kobek. Egu niito ng'atuutyet eng' ineendet ak eng' iyotennyi ne piitu let." 
Exodus29:1 “Ni kiit ne iyachini icheek ianyinyi, si kobiit koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet: iname kirgit agenge ne neran ak mengichik aeng' che libwoben," 
Exodus29:2 kobooto magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, magatiinik che mengeechen che ki kikwang'da mwaiita, magatiinik che tertereen che kigi iilee mwaita ak ichobe peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che po nganuuk." 
Exodus29:3 Indoi ateruut agenge ak iibune ateruunooto yeityo igetu kirgit kobooto mengichichooto aeng'. 
Exodus29:4 Imutu Aron ak weeriikyik kobwa kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin ak iun icheek eng' peek. 
Exodus29:5 Nam ngoroik ak ilaakyi Aron ngoryeet ne kooi, ak ngoryeet ne ki kilelesane ephod, ephod ineendet ak ngoryeetap tegeet. Kermenee ineendet `pireneet ne po ephod ne ki kinap eng' ng'omnateet." 
Exodus29:6 Kerchinee metinnyi naaryeet ak iratyi kuutweet ne tiliil ne po thahabu paragutap naryonooto. 
Exodus29:7 Yeityo inam mwaita ne ki ilse iroong'ji metinnyi ak iil ineendet. 
Exodus29:8 “Imutu weeriikyik ak icheek ak ilaakyi ngoroik che kooen. 
Exodus29:9 Yeityo igermen Aron ak weeriikyik eng' pirenaik ak igerchinee metowekwak chepkuloik che mengeechen. Si konam poisyonooto po tiseinateet eng' ng'atuutyet ne po agoi. Itoroorchi anyun Aron ak weeriikyik poisyonooto po tiliilindo. 
Exodus29:10 “Ketu anyun kirgit konyo taitap emait ne kituiyechin. Ingogonoor Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak metitap kirgooto. 
Exodus29:11 Yeityo ieny kirgooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin. 
Exodus29:12 Taach korotiigap kirgooto ak iilee tolochigap kaptisisyet eng' morneng'ung' yeityo iroong'ji korotichooto tugul kaptisisyet keel. 
Exodus29:13 Put mwanik tugul che ki ilaach moet ak kwambelelyet ne tuchei kooet, soromok tuwai, mwanik che mi soromochooto ak ibeel chooto eng' kaptisisyet." 
Exodus29:14 Ki peel eng' maat panyeegap kirgooto, muitonyi ak eiyandennyi eng' saang'utap nganaseet. Nooto ko kagoochinet ne po tengekto." 
Exodus29:15 “Nam mengit agenge agine, ak kogonoor Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak metitap mengoto." 
Exodus29:16 Eeny mengit ak itaach korotiikyik ak iisote kaptisisyet. 
Exodus29:17 Yeityo itonaton panyeegap mengoto, ak iun tuguugap ke tugul ak keelyekyik ak ituiye ak panyechooto kagetonaton kobooto metinnyi." 
Exodus29:18 Beel mengoto komugul eng' kaptisisyet: niito ko kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; nyamdutyet ne anyiny, kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat." 
Exodus29:19 “Nam mengit ne po aeng', si kogonoor Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak metitap mengoto." 
Exodus29:20 Eeny anyun mengoto ak itaach korotiik che iilee walisyegap itigap tai che po Aron ak weeriikyik, ak eng' morik che eecheen che po eunekwak che po tai ak eng' morik che eecheen che po keelyekwak che po tai. Yeityo iisote korotiik che kang'et komoswek tugul eng' kaptisisyet." 
Exodus29:21 Ye ibata inam korotiik che mi kaptisisyet parak ak mwaita ne kiilse, ak iise Aron ak ngoroikyik, ak iise weeriikyik ak ngoroikwak. Si kitabaan ineendet ak ngoroikyik, ak weeriikyik ak ngoroikwak." 
Exodus29:22 “Inemune mengit mwanikyik, mwanigap saruryet, mwanik che ki ilaach moet, kwambelelyet ne po kooet ak soromok tuwai, kobooto sunetikwak ak kubesto ne po tai, amu niito ko mengit ne po poisyetap katabaanet." 
Exodus29:23 Eng' ateruut ole mi magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, inemu; magatyat agenge komugul, magatyat ne ming'in ne kagiilee mwaita ak magatyat agenge ne terter ne mi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus29:24 Yeityo inde chooto tugul eunegap Aron ak eunegap weeriikyik ak iongoi inyee koek kagoochinet ne kiruuri eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Exodus29:25 Icheru tuguuchooto eng' eunekwak ak ibeel eng' kaptisisyet eng' paragutap kagoochinet ne kibeelei, koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Niito ko kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat." 
Exodus29:26 “Iip tagateet ne po mengitap poisyet ne po katabaanet ne po Aron, ak iongoi koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si koek nooto kebebertang'ung'." 
Exodus29:27 Itabaan tagateet ne po kagoochinet ne kiongoi ak kubesto ne po kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak, ne kiongoi ak ne kinamjin parak che po mengoto po poisyetap katabaanet agobo Aron ak weeriikyik." 
Exodus29:28 Punjin chooto Aron ak weeriikyik koek ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' piigap Israel, amu niito kebebertap kagoochinet ne kagitabaan, ak koek nooto kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak ne punu lagogap Israel eng' tiseiywegap kagoochinoikwak che po kaalyeet. Niito anyun ko kagoochinennywa ne kagitabaanji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus29:29 “Tuun punjin weeriikyik ngoroichooto itabaanatiin che po Aron, ilaachi icheek si ki ili kitoroorchin poisyonooto tiliil." 
Exodus29:30 Ilaachi ngoroichooto peetuusyek tisap, weerooto tuun namjin Aron tisiisyet ye mandoi emait ne kituiyechin si koboisyei eng' ole-tiliil." 
Exodus29:31 “Nam mengit ne po poisyetap katabaanet si iyo panyeekyik eng' ole ki kitiliil," 
Exodus29:32 ak koam Aron ak weeriikyik panyeegap mengoto ak magatiinik che mi ateruut eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin. 
Exodus29:33 Amei icheegei tuguuchooto che kiyae kagaigaet, ak kinde poisyetap tiliilindo, ak kitabaan icheek. Ago amat koam toondet amu tiliileen tuguuchooto." 
Exodus29:34 Ngo ng'et panyeek che po nooto ki kitabaanji poisyetap katabaanet anan eng' magatiinik, ak ngo tebi kot koeech, ibeel anyun eng' ma tugul che kong'et; amat keam amu tiliileen." 
Exodus29:35 “Yachi Aron anyun ak weeriikyik ko uu tugul che kang'atiin. Inde icheek poisyonooto tiliil eng' peetuusyek tisap. 
Exodus29:36 Igoitoi inyee peetuut age tugul kirgit ne neran ne po kagoochinet ne po tengekto kobunji kagaigaet. Ianyinyi kaptisisyet ye iyachini kagaigaet agobo ineendet. Yeityo iil ianyiny. 
Exodus29:37 Iyae kagaigaet agobo kaptisisyet eng' peetuusyek tisap ak itiliil. Si kotiliilit kaptisisyet miising', ak kanyool kotiliilit kiy age tugul ne twaei kaptisisyet." 
Exodus29:38 “Chu che igoitoi eng' kaptisiisyo; igoitoi peetuut age tugul aarek aeng' che mengichik che po keechiir che ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kiit ne po agoi. 
Exodus29:39 Igoite aarwet age karon ak igoite aarwet ne po aeng' koskoleny. 
Exodus29:40 Itesyini aarwet age keruutyet agenge ne po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che kagiburukto litait agenge ne po mwaita ne pitunee tuisyet, ak litait agenge ne po divaik koek kagoochinet ne kirong'u." 
Exodus29:41 Igoite aarwet age koskoleny ak iyachi ko uu kagoochinetap peek ni kabo karon ak ko uu kagoochinennyi ne kirong'u, koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny, kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne punei maat." 
Exodus29:42 Egu nooto kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul eng' ibinwekwok tugul eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' ole kituiyechini ak inyee si ang'alaalun eng' olooto." 
Exodus29:43 Kituiyechini yooto ak piigap Israel ak itiliili toroornatennyu yooto. 
Exodus29:44 Atiliilii emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet. Atabaani Aron ak weeriikyik ak icheek si koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet. 
Exodus29:45 Amenye kwenutap piigap Israel ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa. 
Exodus29:46 Ak konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ne ki among'u eng' emetap Misiri, si kobiit ameny kwenunnywa. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa." 
Exodus30:1 “Iyae anyun kaptisisyet ole kibeelee nyamdutik iyae keetiigap chebitoik. 
Exodus30:2 Ingoek koindonyi ak tebeesindanyi sendimita artam ak muut. Aechindos koindo ak tebeesindo. Koindap tononennyi ko egu sendimita tamanwogik sogool. Namegei kapkorosuut ak kuinoikyik koegu kiit agenge. 
Exodus30:3 Iliige thahabu che tiliileen paragunnyi ak komoswekyik tugul ak kuinoikyik. Yeityo itaany tegeleiywotap thahabu iyieme. 
Exodus30:4 Itaany peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak inde tuguuchooto koobeesyo tegeleiywot keel eng' tegeet ne po komosi ak ne po komosin, iyachi komoswek tuwai si koek ole kiroochi keetiik che ki ibe." 
Exodus30:5 Yae keetichooto ki ibe keetiigap chebitoik ak iliige thahabu. 
Exodus30:6 Indoi kaptisisyonooto taitap angeet ne ioitos koot, ye neegitee moingetap paornateet ne miitei taitap kerwet ne po rireenet ne mi paragutap paornateet ole kituiyechini ak inyee." 
Exodus30:7 Peelei Aron nyamdutik che po tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny eng' olooto eng' karonet age tugul ye chobei taisyek," 
Exodus30:8 ak peelei ineendet ye inaami taisyek koskoleny, koek nyamdutyet ne kibeelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ibinwekwok tugul." 
Exodus30:9 Amobeele olooto nyamdutik che teer anan tiseiywek che kibeelei anan che po peek. Amoroong'ji yooto kagoochinoik alak tugul che kiee. 
Exodus30:10 Ingoyai Aron kagaigaet eng' kuinoigap kaptisisyonooto konyil agenge eng' kenyiit age tugul. Yaei kagaigaet eng' korotiigap kagoochinetap tengekto ne po kagaigaet konyil agenge eng' kenyiit age tugul eng' ibinwekwok tugul. Nooto ne tiliil miising' eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” 
Exodus30:11 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Exodus30:12 “Ye iit piigap Israel ko uu eng' koiitennywa, ko eng' yooto anyun kogoochi chii tugul `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiit ne ityage saboondanyi si ma piit koroito eng' kwenunnywa ye iiti icheek." 
Exodus30:13 Chu che koonu icheek: koonu chii age tugul kebebertap chepkondok ko uu chepkondogap ole-tiliil, ye siirtoi kowendi ole mi che kagiit. Egu kebebertap fedhaisyechooto kagoochinet ne punjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus30:14 Igoochin chii age tugul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet, ne siirtoi kowendi ole mi che kagiit, che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak che siirei chooto." 
Exodus30:15 Ingogon che kergei mogoryot kibananiat, koonu tugul kebebertap chepkondok, ye igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet si oyai kagaigaet ne po saboonwekwok." 
Exodus30:16 Taach fedha che po kagaigaet eng' piigap Israel ak igoite kobunji poisyetap emaitap tuiyet. Si koek nooto kabwaatet agobo piigap Israel eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si koyai kagaigaet agobo saboonwekwok.” 
Exodus30:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Exodus30:18 “Yai karait agine ne po sugunwet ak iyae sugunwet ng'echerennyi si kiuunse. Inde kwenutap Emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet ak iroong'ji peek. 
Exodus30:19 Si koune Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak ak keelyekwak. 
Exodus30:20 Iunegei icheek ye mandoi emait ne kituiyechin si ma pek anan ye riikyin kaptisisyet si kobois ye peelei kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat. 
Exodus30:21 Iuni anyun eunekwak ak keelyekwak si ma pek, ak koek ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' icheek, eng' ineendet ak eng' iyotennyi eng' ibinwekwak tugul.”" 
Exodus30:22 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa kogeny koleenji," 
Exodus30:23 “Inemunote tuguuk che myachen kosiir, tuguuk che uu igomoik, keruutik lo ne po kumyat, keruutik somok ne po kinamon che anyiny, keruutik somok ne po kalamus che anyiny," 
Exodus30:24 ak keruutik lo che po kasia, ko uu che po ole-tiliil ak litaisyek ang'wan ne po mwaitap mseituni." 
Exodus30:25 Yeityo ichop tuguuchooto koburugogis koek mwaita ne tiliil ne ki iilse ne ng'uu ne anyiny ne poisyetap ng'amotyot ne puruchi tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny. Egu mwaita ne tiliil ne ki iilse. 
Exodus30:26 Iil emait ne kituiyechin eng' mwaita ak moinget ne po paornateet," 
Exodus30:27 ak meset ak tuguukyik tugul, keldap tait ak tuguukyik, kaptisisyet ne kibeelee nyamdutik," 
Exodus30:28 ak kaptisisyet ne kibeelee tiseiywot ak tuguukyik tugul ak taabeet ak kelunnyi. 
Exodus30:29 Itabaan anyun tuguuchooto si kotiliiliitu miising', ak kanyool kotiliilit age tugul ne twaei tuguuchooto." 
Exodus30:30 Iil Aron ak weeriikyik, ianyiny, si koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet." 
Exodus30:31 Ak ing'alaalji piigap Israel ileenji, ‘Egu mwai eng' anee ne tiliil ne ki ilse eng' ibinwekwok tugul." 
Exodus30:32 Ma kiroong'jin poortap chii age tugul mwai, amoyai mwai age ne uu niito. Amu tiliil niito ak egu ne tiliil eng' okweek." 
Exodus30:33 Chii age tugul ne puruchi mwai age tugul koigei niito anan chii age tugul ne iilee mwaiita toondet, king'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Inemunote tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, natab, shekelet, kelbena; tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny kobooto tuguuk che nyamdut che tiliileen: ingoaechin tugul eng' karagendoet agenge." 
Exodus30:35 Iyae eng' chooto nyamdutik, tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, ne poisyetap ng'omnateet ne puruchi tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny che kitestoi muunyuk che tiliileen che ki kitabaan." 
Exodus30:36 Yeityo itui alak eng' chooto komengegitu ak inde chooto taitap paornateet eng' emait ne kituiyechin, ole kituiyechini ak inyee. Egu ne tiliil miising' eng' okweek." 
Exodus30:37 Amat oyachigei nyamdutik alak tugul che kergei ak chuuto. Egu ne tiliil eng' inyee ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Exodus30:38 Ngo yai chii age tugul alak che uu chooto kole kogas ng'uunennyi, king'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik.”" 
Exodus31:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Exodus31:2 “Keero, ki aguur Bezalel weeriitap Uri weeriitap Hur ne po ooreetap Judah," 
Exodus31:3 ak kaanyiit ineendet Kabuuset ne po Kamuktaindet, ng'omnateet, kaguiyet ak naet, konai ole teptoi poisyet age tugul ne po musoknateet." 
Exodus31:4 Imuuchi inee koyai poisyonigap musoknateet ne kiboisyee thahabu, fedha, ak sugunonik," 
Exodus31:5 ak waetap koik che kitetyin kelongonik, keetiik ak poisyet age tugul ne po musoknateet." 
Exodus31:6 Ak asi kotoret ineendet, ko kaalewen anee Aholiab weeriitap Aisamak ne po ooreetap Dan, ak kaande ng'omnateet mugulelwegap tugul che tinyei kaguiyet si kobiit koyai icheek tugul che kaang'atiin:" 
Exodus31:7 emait ne kituiyechin, moingetap paornateet, kerwet ne po rireenet ne mi paragunnyi ak tuguuk tugul che mi Emainooto;" 
Exodus31:8 meset ak tuguukyik, keeldo ne tiliil ne po tait ak tuguukyik tugul ak kaptisisyet ne kibeelee nyamdutik," 
Exodus31:9 kaptisisyet ne po tiseiywek che kibeelei ak tuguukyik tugul ak taabeet kobooto ng'echerennyi ne tebee," 
Exodus31:10 ngoroik che kisalei kogororonitu che itabaanatiin che po Aron tisiindet ak ngoroigap weeriikyik si koboisyee eng' tisiisyet; 
Exodus31:11 ak mwaita ne ki iilse ak nyamdutigap tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny che po ole-tiliil. Yaei anyun icheek ko uu tugul che kaang'atiin.” 
Exodus31:12 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Exodus31:13 “Ng'alaalji piigap Israel ileenji, ‘Oriip sabatosyekyuk komyee. Amu niito kaboorunet eng' kwenunnyo anee ak okweek eng' ibinwekwok tugul, si kobiit onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atabaanok." 
Exodus31:14 Nooto anyun oriip sabato amu itabaanat eng' okweek. Kibarei iman age tugul ne imurwooni.’ ” Ago king'etoi eng' piikyik chii age tugul ne yaei poisyet age tugul eng' peetuunooto. 
Exodus31:15 Kiyaei poisyet peetuusyek lo, ago peetuutap tisap ko sabato ne po kamuung'et ne tiliil ne itabaanat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kibarei iman chii age tugul ne yaei poisyet age tugul eng' peetuutap sabato." 
Exodus31:16 Eng' nooto anyun ko kanyool koriip piigap Israel sabato ak kotabaan eng' ibinwekwak tugul koek arorutyet ne po koigeny. 
Exodus31:17 Kaboorunet niito eng' kwenunnyu ak piigap Israel ne po agoi, amu ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kipsengwet ak ng'wony eng' peetuusyek lo ak eng' peetuut ne po tisap ko ki imuuny kotalbis." 
Exodus31:18 Ye kingo kagogees Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'alaalet ne ki ng'alaali ak Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai, kogoochi Musa koik aeng' che lebeleen che po paornateet che ki kisire mornetap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus32:1 Ye kingo keer piik kole kagogagei Musa eng' tulweet ama choorgei, kotuiyechi ole mi Aron ak koleenji, “Ng'eet yaiywech kanamonik che pendi kondoi eng' acheek, amu ma kingen kiit ne kinyoor Musa-iniito, chiichooto ki imutwech kemang'une emetap Misiri.”" 
Exodus32:2 Koleenji `Aron pichooto, “Ocherunee munaogap thahabu osotikwok, weeriikwok ak tiibiikwok che tinyei eng' itiik ak oibwa.”" 
Exodus32:3 Ki icher piik tugul anyun munaok tugul che po thahabu che ki mi itiikwak ak koipchi Aron. 
Exodus32:4 Kitaach tuguuchooto kobunu eunekwak. Yeityo kobeel kochotyo ak kochop eng' karnet ne kiboisyee kotany kanamwet ne po moita. Ak ki mwa piik eng' poiboiyet kole, “Kanamoniguk chu, inyee Israel, che ki imutun imang'une emetap Misiri!”" 
Exodus32:5 Ye kingo keer Aron poiboiyennywa, koteech kaptisisyet eng' taitap kanamwonooto ak komwaita kole, “Egu igoorto ne oo mutai eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus32:6 Ki ng'eetyo karon miising' eng' peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto ak kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei. Ki ip kagoochinoigap kaalyeet, ak ki tep ng'wony piik koamis, koeeiso ak kong'eetyo kourerenso." 
Exodus32:7 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji, “Ui, choortegei; amu kagong'emgei piiguk che ki imutu komang'une emetap Misiri." 
Exodus32:8 Kagosip komasta kometo ooreet ne kiga ang'atyi. Kagoyachigei kanamwet ne po moita ne ki kitaany, ak kogutung'ji, ak kagoeng'ji tiseiywot, ak koleen, ‘Kanamoniguk chu, inyee Israel, che ki imutun imang'une emetap Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Ki testai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'alaalji Musa ak koleenji, “Koageer ale, uueen kaat pichu." 
Exodus32:10 Pagaakta anyun, si kolaany parak nereegekyuk agobo icheek ak awong'u pichuuto. Yeityo ayain inyee iegu pororyet ne oo.”" 
Exodus32:11 Ki igaigai `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi, koleenji, “Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu nee si kolalyo nereegeguk agobo piiguk che ki imutu komang'une emetap Misiri eng' kimnateet ne oo ak eng' euut ne kiim?" 
Exodus32:12 Amu nee si komwa tuun Misiriik kole, ‘Kiga imutyin icheek yaityet kole si kobar eng' tuloonook, ak kowong' kobetyo eng' ng'wony?’ Ketite nereegeguk che laldos ak iwal kii ya koistoegei piiguk." 
Exodus32:13 Ibwaat Abraham, Isak, ak Israel, otwogiguk che ki iyasyechi inyegei, ileenji, ‘Abaroi iyoteng'wong' kotenit kecheigap kipsengwet ak agoochini iyoteng'wong' emoni komugul ne ki amwaiwok ak kobunji icheek koigeny.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Ki wol anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik agobo yaityonooto ki kamwa kole yachin piikyik. 
Exodus32:15 Ki weigei Musa kochoortagei eng' tulweet, koibe eunnyi koik aeng' che lebeleen che po paornateet. Ki siraatiin koichooto komoswek tuwai, amu kiga kisir tai ak patai." 
Exodus32:16 Ki poisyetap Kamuktaindet koichooto ak siruutichooto ko ki siruutigap Kamuktaindet che ki kagisir kewai eng' koichooto. 
Exodus32:17 Ye kingo kas Joshua polatetap piik koboldos, koleenji Musa, “Mi polatetap pooryeet nganaseet.”" 
Exodus32:17 Ye kingo kas Joshua polatetap piik koboldos, koleenji Musa, “Mi polatetap pooryeet nganaseet.”" 
Exodus32:18 Ago ki le Musa, “Ma po kutinooto icheeget che poldos amu kagoterteeris ama po che poldos amu kagiterter, ago po polatonooto agase icheeget che tyendos.”" 
Exodus32:19 Ye kingo riik nganaseet ak kogeer kanamwetap moita ak ureryet, konereech miising' Musa. Ki wiirta anyun koichooto ki tinyei eng' eunekyik, kotui eng' tulweet keel." 
Exodus32:20 Ki nam kanamwonooto po moita ne kiga kotany, ak kobeel eng' ma, yeityo kong'a kotambululitu ak koseerchi peek parak ak kobirchi piigap Israel koe." 
Exodus32:21 Ki leenji `Musa Aron, “Nee ne kiyaun pichu kot iipchi icheek tengegi oo tee ni?”" 
Exodus32:22 Kowol Aron kole, “Amat konereech miising' kiptaiyandennyu, ingen inyee pichu ile ki kotokyigei yaityet." 
Exodus32:23 Amu ki leenjo, ‘Yaiywech kanamonik, che pendi kondoenech, amu Musa-iniito, chiito ne ki imutwech kemang'une emetap Misiri koma kingen kiit ne kinyoor.’" 
Exodus32:24 Ara ki aleenji icheek, ‘Ingocher chii age tugul thahabu che tinyei, ak kogoono.’ Ki awirchi ma, ak ki mong' moi.”" 
Exodus32:25 Ye kingo keer Musa kole kabistoe piik, amu ki igoochi `Aron icheek kobistoe si koek che kireenyei eng' kwenutap puunikwak," 
Exodus32:26 kotonon anyun eng' ormariichetap nganaseet ak kole, “Ingonyo age tugul ole ami ne mi komostap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ak ki pwanji ineendet tugul che po ooreetap Lawi." 
Exodus32:27 Yeityo koleenji `ineendet icheek, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, ‘Ingorat chii age tugul rotwennyi po chok ak ingwo chii tugul komosi ak komosi kobun kwenutap kurgeet age agoi kurgeet age, eng' nganaseet komugul, ak kobar chii tugul ne tupcho, chorwennyi ak chiitap kokwennyi.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Ki yai weeriigap Lawi ko uu ng'olyootap Musa. Ki pek piik peetuunooto che itei eliphuusyek somok. 
Exodus32:29 Ak ki le Musa, “Kaotabaanjigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani chii tugul ne ma namegei ak weeriinnyi anan ne tupcho, si kogoonok ineendet perurto rani.”" 
Exodus32:30 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi, koleenji `Musa piik, “Ki oyai tengekto ne oo. Katogoste anyun nguno awe ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tamangap ayai kagaigaet agobo tengektong'wong'.”" 
Exodus32:31 Kiweekyigei `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koleenji, “Pwo! Ki yai pichu tengekto ne oo miising', ak ki koyachigei kanamwet ne po thahabu." 
Exodus32:32 Ago ngot icham, nguno, inyochigaat tengektonywa. Ngo ma uu nooto, asoomin ale iistaa eng' bukuing'ung' ne ki isir.”" 
Exodus32:33 Ago ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Aistoi eng' bukuinnyu age tugul ne ki koyaiywo tengekto." 
Exodus32:34 Ui anyun nguno, indochi piik koba kot koit ole ki amwaun. Keero, indoun malaikaiyandennyu. Agot nganda uu nooto, ko eng' peetuut ne arwookyini, arwookyini amu tengektonywa.”" 
Exodus32:35 Ki pir anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik amu ki ilas kanamwetap moita ne ki yai Aron. 
Exodus33:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Oba otogoste eng' oli, inyee ak piik che ki imutu komang'une emetap Misiri agoi oit emet ne ki ayosyechi Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo ale agoochini iyotennywa." 
Exodus33:2 Ayooktoi malaikaiyat kondoenak, ak aoon komanda Kanaanik, Amorik, Hitik, Perisik, Hibik ak Jebusik." 
Exodus33:3 Ara oba agoi emonooto ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo. Ago ma togostoi kobootok amu oo piik che uueen kaat, si ma paraak owong'uge eng' ooreet.”" 
Exodus33:4 Kingo kas piik ng'aleechooto yaacheen, koriiryo ak ki ma ilaach chii tuguugap lele." 
Exodus33:5 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, oo piik che uueen kaat, ngot awe atogoste kobootok ko ne matya, abarook ageeswok. Ara anyun oreegu tuguukwok che po lele si kobiit ageer kiit ne ayaiywok.”" 
Exodus33:6 Ki ireek piigap Israel tuguukwak tugul che po lele kong'etee tulweetap Horeb ak kwo tai. 
Exodus33:7 Kibiteetap Musa koip emait ak koteech eng' ye loo eng' saang'utap nganaseet. Kiguure emainooto, Emait ne kituiyechin. Chii age tugul ne ki chamei kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kogiwendi emainooto kituiyechin ne ki mi saang'utap nganaseet." 
Exodus33:8 Ye kingo manda Musa kwo ole mi Emait, kong'eetyo piik tugul kotononso, chii age tugul eng' kurgeetap emainnyi ak kogeerot Musa kowendi agoi kochut Emainooto oriit." 
Exodus33:9 Ye kingo chut `Musa Emainooto, ko kichoorugei pooldet, konyonei kotonone kurgeetap Emait ak kong'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Ye kingo keer piik toloata po pooldet kotonone kurgeetap Emait, kong'eetyo tugul ak kong'uruukso, chii age tugul eng' kurgeetap emainnyi." 
Exodus33:11 Ki ng'alaaljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Musa kimni, ko uu ye ng'alaaljindos chii ak chorwennyi. Kingo pata ko ki weeksei kogeny kowendi nganaseet. Ago king'etu eng' Emainooto kiboityondennyi ne neran, nooto ko Joshua weeriitap Nun." 
Exodus33:11 Ki ng'alaaljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Musa kimni, ko uu ye ng'alaaljindos chii ak chorwennyi. Kingo pata ko ki weeksei kogeny kowendi nganaseet. Ago king'etu eng' Emainooto kiboityondennyi ne neran, nooto ko Joshua weeriitap Nun." 
Exodus33:12 Ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor “Keero, kemwaiwo, ileenjo, ‘Imut pichu kotogosta,’ ago tomo imwaiwo chiito ne iyoogu keebe tuwai. Nganda kaimwa ile, ‘Ingen kainenyu ak kaanyooru chameet eng' taing'ung'.’" 
Exodus33:13 Ara anyun asoomin ale, ngo kaanyooru chameet eng' taing'ung' iman, iboorwo nguno ortinweguk si kobiit anain ak anyooru chameet eng' taing'ung' ak ibwaat inyee ile pororyoni ko piiguk.”" 
Exodus33:14 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet, “Kibendi tuwai ak agoonin kamuung'et.”" 
Exodus33:15 Ki leenji Musa, “Ngo ma kibendi tuwai, ko memutech keebe eng' oli." 
Exodus33:16 Amu kinae nee nguno keele, kaanyooru chameet eng' taing'ung' ak piiguk? Tos ma amu kibendi kobooten ne yaech keegu che itabaanatiin, anee ak piiguk eng' piik tugul che mi ng'wony?”" 
Exodus33:17 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ayae anee ng'olyoondoni kesoom. Amu kenyooru chameet eng' tainnyu ak angen kaineng'ung'.”" 
Exodus33:18 Kole Musa, “Asaain ale, Iboorwo liilindang'ung'.”" 
Exodus33:19 Kowolji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Achamdoi myeeindonyu tugul kosiirtoe taing'ung' ak amwaite kainenyu eng' taing'ung'. Ayachini ne myee ne amache ayachi ne myee ak aboorchi rireenetapkei ineendet ne yamei aboorchi rireenetapkei." 
Exodus33:20 Memuuchi igeer togeennyu, amu ma keera chii ak kosap.”" 
Exodus33:21 Yeityo kole Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Keero, miitei oli neegiteena oldo ole imuuchi itonone eng' rwandet parak," 
Exodus33:22 ak ye siirtoi liilindanyu, andein rwandet ole petaat, ak atugenen eunnyu agoi asiirte." 
Exodus33:23 Yeityo aiste eunnyu ak igeer patennyu, ago megeere togeennyu.”" 
Exodus34:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Pet koik aeng' che lebeleen ko uu che po tai, ak asirchi ng'aleek che ki mi koik che po tai che ki itui." 
Exodus34:2 Chopkei karon ak imusu tulweetap Sinai, ak inyoo tainnyu eng' tulweet parak." 
Exodus34:3 Amat otogosu ak chii age tugul, amat kegeerchi chii age tugul tulweet komugul. Amat koagete keechiirek anan tuuga ole neegitee tulwoonooto.”" 
Exodus34:4 Ki pet anyun `Musa koik aeng' che lebeleen ko uu che po tai, ak kong'eet karon kotogosta kwo tulweetap Sinai ko uu ye kiga kong'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, ki ibei eng' eunnyi koichooto aeng'." 
Exodus34:5 Ki choorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pooldet ak kotonon kobooto ineendet eng' yooto ak komwa kainennyi, “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus34:6 Ki pun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tainnyi ak komwaita kole, “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne nyiitaat rireenet ak myeeindo, ma sip konereechi ak nyiitaat talasyet ak imanit," 
Exodus34:7 ne italachingei eliphuusyek, ne nyochin kaat piik tengekto ak pistoet ak chalwokto, ma pagaaktoi kiptengekyot age tugul. Igeerchin lagok tengektap kwanisyekwak ak eng' lagogap lagokwak agoi ibindap somok ak ne po ang'wan.”" 
Exodus34:8 Kichirchiren Musa kong'uruuk agoi ng'wony, kolas Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus34:9 Yeityo komwa kole, “Ngo kaanyooru nguno chameet eng' taing'ung', Ee Kiptaiyat, asaain ale ingocham Kiptaiyat keebe tugul amu uueen kaat pichu. Nyoiywech kaat tengekwogikyok ak chalwogikyok ak inamech keegu poroteng'ung'.”" 
Exodus34:10 Kowol Kamuktaindet kole, “Keero, kaayai arorutyet. Ayae kwang'utik eng' taitap piiguk tugul, che kitom keyaei eng' ng'wony komugul anan eng' pororyet age tugul. Keerei piik tugul che imi kwenunnywa poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kiit ne ki iywei ne ayae eng' inyee." 
Exodus34:11 Riip anyun chuuto kang'atiin rani. Keero, aoone komanda eng' taing'ung' Amorik, Kanaanik, Hitik, Perisik, Hibik ak Jebusik.”" 
Exodus34:12 “Riipkei, si meyai arorutyet ak piik che menyei emonooto iwendi si ma ek mesteet eng' kwenung'wong'." 
Exodus34:13 Ago obut kapkorosusyekwak. Otuatui kanamonikwak kotonogis ak oluul Aserikwak," 
Exodus34:14 among'urukyi kamuktain age tugul. Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kainennyi ko ng'etkong', ineendet Kamuktaindet ne amei ng'etkong'.”" 
Exodus34:15 “Oriipkei si moyai arorut kobooto piik che menyei emonooto, amu ye ipkei icheek ak kanamonikwak ak koeng'ji tiseiywot kamuktaikwak koguurin age iam che po tiseiywondennyi." 
Exodus34:16 Ak ye itunji weeriiguk tiibiikwak, ko tiibiikwak chooto ibegei ak kanamonikwak, kochuuti iman weeriikwok koosup kanamonikwak.”" 
Exodus34:17 “Ameyachigei kanamonik che kitaanyi.” 
Exodus34:18 “Kanyool iriip igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek. Iame magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' peetuusyek tisap ko uu ye ki ang'atiin eng' peetuusyek che ki kiaror eng' arawetap Abib. Amu ki omong'u eng' Misiri eng' arawanooto. 
Exodus34:19 Chechuuk tugul che yaatei iyoteet ak tugul che twati tuuga ak keechiirek, che kiruugik ak mengichik." 
Exodus34:20 Ityachi ne twatei sigiryet ityage aarwet. Ngo metyach, iiri kaatit. Ityachi weeriiguk tugul che po tai. Ma nyoonei chii oli ami ak euut puch." 
Exodus34:21 “Yai poisyet peetuusyek lo, ago imuuny eng' peetuutap tisap. Imuuny eng' peetuusyegap kabatisyet ak eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet." 
Exodus34:22 Riip igoortap wigisyek, nooto ko tongoanigap nganuuk ak igoortap peetuusyek che kiyumune tuguugap mbar, kogesugei kenyiit." 
Exodus34:23 Pwoonei mureniguk taitap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po Israel, konyil somok eng' kenyiit." 
Exodus34:24 Amu aoone pororyosyek eng' taing'ung' ak abaroi kiwotosyeguk. Ak ma piitu chii age tugul ne machei emeng'ung', ye itogostoi iwendi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' konyil somok eng' kenyiit." 
Exodus34:25 “Amegoite korotiigap tiseiywondennyu kobooto magatyat ne kaginde mermereek. Amat kong'et kot koeech tiseiywotap igoortap paska. 
Exodus34:26 Ibu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', tuguuk che po tai eng' tongoaniguk che po emeng'ung'. Ameyoe aarwet cheegap kamet.”" 
Exodus34:27 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Sir ng'aleechu, amu kagiyomiske ak inyee kobooto Israel, ko uu ole teptoi ng'aleechu.”" 
Exodus34:28 Ki tebi Musa ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam. Ma am amit ama ee pei. Ki sirchi ng'aleegap arorutyet; ng'atuutik taman koichooto lebeleen. 
Exodus34:29 Ye kingo choorgei Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai koibu koik aeng' che po paornateet eng' eunnyi, koma nai inee kole iluu iriryotap togeennyi amu kigang'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ineendet." 
Exodus34:30 Ye kingo keer `Aron ak `lagok tugul che po Israel Musa, ogeero, kilildoi togeennyi, ak ki iywei icheek koriikyi ineendet." 
Exodus34:31 Ki kuur `Musa icheek ak kiweektagei Aron ak pounik tugul che po tuiyet ole mi ineendet ak ki ng'alaalji `Musa icheek. 
Exodus34:32 Eng' let koriikyi lagok tugul che po Israel, ak ki mwachi icheek ng'atuutik tugul che kiga komwachi `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' tulweetap Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Ye kingo kagogees Musa ng'alaalennyi kobooto icheek, kotuge togeennyi kitambaet." 
Exodus34:34 Ago ki ireegu Musa kitambaanooto ye kingo mandoi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kowendi kong'alaaldos ak ineendet agoi komong'. Ago ye kingo mong' konyo kong'alaal ak piigap Israel, komwachi che ki king'at," 
Exodus34:35 ak ki keer piigap Israel togeetap Musa kole iluu iriryotap togeennyi. Kituge anyun Musa togeennyi kitaambaet kogeny agoi komanda kwo kong'alaal ak Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus35:1 Ki iyum `Musa tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel ak koleenji, “Chu ng'aleek che kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, oyai." 
Exodus35:2 Kiyaei poisyet peetuusyek lo, ago peetuutap tisap koegu peetuut ne itabaanat eng' okweek, sabato ne po kamuung'et ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kibarei chii age tugul ne yaei poisyet peetuunooto." 
Exodus35:3 Amat olaal ma age tugul eng' meng'otosyekwok eng' peetuutap sabato.” 
Exodus35:4 Ki ng'alaalji Musa tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel koleenji, “Niito ko kiit ne kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole," 
Exodus35:5 Oip eng' kwenung'wong' kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Chii age tugul ne tinyei muguleldo ne chamei, ko ingoip, kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: thahabu, fedha ak sugunonik," 
Exodus35:6 angook che buluu, che arusen ne piriir, che piriireen, katanit ne karaaran ak koroorigap ng'oroorek," 
Exodus35:7 magatogap mengichik che ki kisal kobiriritu, magatogap mengichigap peek ak keetiigap chebitoik." 
Exodus35:8 Kobooto mwaitap kiit ne ikweng'sei, tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny che po mwaita ne ki ilse ak che po nyamdutik che kibeelei che ng'uu ne anyiny," 
Exodus35:9 koik che kiguure soam, koik che kitetei che po ephod ak che po ngoryeetap tegeet." 
Exodus35:10 “Ingonyo chii age tugul eng' okweek ne tinyei muguleldo ne po kaguiyet, si koyai tugul che ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Exodus35:11 emaitap Kamuktaindet, ak emainnyi ne kituge, kariikyik che kiname angook, pagoinikyik, rateiywekyik, lumeiywekyik ak kong'iikyik che tonone;" 
Exodus35:12 moinget ak keetikyik che ki ibe, kerwet ne po rireenet ak angeet ne kioiye;" 
Exodus35:13 meset ak keetikyik che ki ibe, tuguukyik tugul ak magatiinik che itabaanatiin;" 
Exodus35:14 keldap tait agine ne po kiit ne ikweng'sei ak tuguukyik, taisyekyik ak mwaitap kioto ikweng'sei;" 
Exodus35:15 kapkorosuut ne kibeelee nyamdutik ak keetikyik che ki ibe, mwaita ne ki ilse, nyamdutik che kibeelei che ng'uu ne anyiny ak ngoryeet ne po kurgeet ne po koot ne sip kemong'jin," 
Exodus35:16 kaptisisyet ne kibeelee kagoochinoik ak sugunwennyi ne ki kireger, keetikyik che ki ibe ak tuguukyik tugul, taabeet ak ng'echerennyi ne tebee," 
Exodus35:17 kobooto angook che kisonginindos, che po seremut, lumeiywekyik, kong'iikwak che tononie ak ngoryeetap kurgeetap seremut;" 
Exodus35:18 tigongenik che po koot, tigongenigap seremut ak poroonikwak;" 
Exodus35:19 ngoroik che ki kisal kogororonitu si keboisyee eng' ole-tiliil, ngoroik che itabaanatiin che po tisiindet Aron ak ngoroigap weeriikyik, che poisyei eng' tisiisyet.”" 
Exodus35:20 Ki pa tuiyetap piigap Israel komugul eng' taitap Musa. 
Exodus35:21 Ki nyo age tugul ne ki ichirchir muguleldanyi, ak age tugul ne ki igiil muguleldanyi kogoon, ki ip kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che po poisyetap emait ne kituiyechin, che po poisyennyi tugul ak che po ngoroik che itabaanatiin." 
Exodus35:22 Ki pwa murenik ak kwonyiik, icheeget che ki cham mugulelwekwak. Ki ip peteinigap seruunek, munaokwak, peteinik che po ng'ookset ak sonoegap kaatit; ki po chooto tugul thahabu. Ki igoochi chii tugul anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che po thahabu." 
Exodus35:23 Ki ip chii tugul ne ki tinyei angook che buluu, che arusen ne piriir, che piriireen ak che po katanit ne karaaran, koroorik che po ng'oroorek, magatogap mengichik che ki kisal kobiriritu ak magatogap mengichigap peek." 
Exodus35:24 Chii age tugul ne ki kon kagoochinoik che po fedha ak che po sugunonik, ko ki punji chooto kagoochinetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ko chii age tugul ne ki tinyei keetiigap chebitoik, ko ki ip chooto kobunji poisyet." 
Exodus35:25 Ki ilet anyun rogoonik kobogorisyek tugul che tinyei ng'omnateet, yeityo koip che ki ilet, che po che buluu, che arusen ne ais, che piriireen ak che po katanit ne karaaran." 
Exodus35:26 Ki ilet koroorigap ng'oroorek kobogorisyek tugul che ki ichirchir mugulelwekwak eng' ng'omnateet. 
Exodus35:27 Ki ip pounik koik che kiguure soam, koik che kitetyin ephod ak che kitetyin ngoryeetap tegeet;" 
Exodus35:28 tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, mwaita ne po kiit ne ikweng'sei, mwaita ne ki ilse ak che po nyamdutik che kibeelei che ng'uu ne anyiny." 
Exodus35:29 Ki ipchi `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che po chamyet; muren age tugul ak kobogoryo age tugul che ki igiil mugulelwekwak koip tuguuk che po poisyonooto tugul, che kiga ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor keyai eng' Musa." 
Exodus35:30 Ki leenji `Musa piigap Israel, “Ogeero, kagoguur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Bezalel, komwa kainennyi, ineendet ne weeriitap Uri weeriitap Hur ne po ooreetap Judah;" 
Exodus35:31 ak kagonyiit ineendet Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, eng' ng'omnateet, kaguiyet, ak naet, si konai ole teptoi poisyet age tugul ne po musoknateet." 
Exodus35:32 Si kobiit konai ole choptoi poisyonigap musoknateet koboisyee thahabu, fedha ak sugunonik," 
Exodus35:33 kowai koik che kitetyin kelongonik, ak koyai keetiik kobois eng' poisyet tugul ne po musoknateet." 
Exodus35:34 Ki inde ng'omnateet muguleldanyi si komuuch koneet ineendet kobooto Aholiab, weeriitap Aisamak ne po ooreetap Dan." 
Exodus35:35 Ki konyiit `ineendet ng'omnateet mugulelwekwak, si koyai poisyet tugul ne po musoknateet, ne po waindet, ne po laindet ne ng'oom, ne po nabiindet ne nabei kondai lelesta eng' che buluu, eng' che arusen ne piriir, eng' che piriireen ak eng' katanit ne karaaran. Agot ne po regerindet, agot ne po icheek che yaei poisyet age tugul ak ne po icheeget che ibwaati ole choptoi poisyetap musoknateet.”" 
Exodus36:1 Ingobois anyun Bezalel, Aholiab ak chii age tugul ne tinyei naet ne nin, ne ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor naet ne nin ak kaguiyet, si kobiit konai koyai poisyet tugul ne po ole-tiliil ko uu tugul che kiga ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Exodus36:2 Ki kuur `Musa Bezalel, Aholiab ak chii age tugul ne tinyei kaguiyet, ne kiga kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'omnateet, agot age tugul ne ki ichirchi muguleldanyi koyai poisyonooto." 
Exodus36:3 Kitaach icheek kagoochinoik tugul eng' Musa che kiga koip piigap Israel keyae poisyetap ole-tiliil. Ki ipchi kogeny karonet age tugul kagoochinoik alak che po chamyet. 
Exodus36:4 Ara ki pwa anyun piik tugul che ng'oomen nyoo koyai poisyet tugul ne po ole-tiliil. 
Exodus36:5 Ki ng'alaalji `icheek Musa koleenji, “Ko koip piik tuguuk che siirei che kimachei eng' poisyet ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor keyai.”" 
Exodus36:6 Ki ng'at Musa anyun kemwaitaat eng' nganaseet komugul keele, “Amata koip chii age tugul, mureno anan kobogoryo, kiy age tugul ne kagoochinetap ole-tiliil.” Ara ki kieetee anyun piik si mata koip kogeny," 
Exodus36:7 amu kiga koyam keyae poisyonooto tuguuk che kiga keip kot kosiirto. 
Exodus36:8 Ki yai chii age tugul ne ng'oom eng' icheek che poisyei, koot, koyae angook taman che po katanit ne karaaran, ne ki kila, ak che buluu, kobooto che arusen ne piriir ak che piriireen, konapchi angook kerubisyek, ne poisyetap nabiindet ne nabei kondai lelesta." 
Exodus36:9 Ki mitainik taman ak aeng' kooindap angeet age tugul ak mitainik aeng' tebeesindap angeet age tugul. Ki aechin angoochooto tugul. 
Exodus36:10 Kiropchindos angook muut ak kiropchindos chuun alak muut ak icheek, ko uu nooto." 
Exodus36:11 Kinapchi ineendet pelelutik che buluu eng' tabandap angeet age eng' ole kurmanat, eng' ye tuiyechin. Ki yachi ko uu nooto eng' tabandap angeet ne po aeng', ne tabanu parak eng' ole ki kituiye ne po aeng'." 
Exodus36:12 Kinapchi angeet age pelelutik konom, ak kinapchi pelelutik konom eng' tabandap angeet ne po aeng', eng' ole ki kituiye ne po aeng', tabandap angeet ne po aeng', ago kitokyindos pelelutik." 
Exodus36:13 Yeityo koyai kariik konom che po thahabu che kiname angook, si kotuiyo angoochooto aeng' asi koek agenge anyun emaitap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus36:14 Yeityo koyai angook taman ak agenge koyae koroorigap ng'oroorek koek emait ne tuge emaitap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus36:15 Ki mitainik taman ak somok kooindap angeet age tugul, ak tebeesindo ko ki mitainik aeng'; ki aechin angoochooto tugul tamanu ak agenge." 
Exodus36:16 Ki ituiyo angook muut koek agenge icheegei ak ki ituiyo angook lo kogeny koek agenge icheegei. 
Exodus36:17 Kinapchi pelelutik konom tabandap angeet age ne tabanu parak, eng' ole ki kituiye, ak kinapchi pelelutik konom tabandap angeet eng' ole ki kituiye ne po aeng'." 
Exodus36:18 Ki itaany kariik che kiname angook konom che po sugunonik che ituiye emait koek agenge. 
Exodus36:19 Yeityo konap magatogap mengichik che ki kisal kobiriritu, si ketuge emait ak konap magatok che po mengichigap peek kotabon parak." 
Exodus36:20 Ki yai pagoinik che tonondos che po keetiigap chebitoik kobunji emaitap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus36:21 Koindap pagoiyot age tugul ko ki mitainik ang'wan, ak ki ek tebeesindap pagoiyot age tugul sendimita tamanwogik lo." 
Exodus36:22 Ki tinyei pagoiyot age tugul ng'elyebwek aeng' che ki tuiyo. Ki yai ko uu nooto pagoinik tugul che po koot. 
Exodus36:23 Ki yai pagoinik che po koot, ak konde chooto tiptem kotabon murot tai." 
Exodus36:24 Kibarbar fedha kosikyi kong'iik artam, si kotabon kapkelyenutap pagoinichooto tiptem; chutei ng'elyebwek aeng'u che po pagoiyot agenge, kong'iik aeng' che mi kapkelyen. Chutei ko uu nooto ng'elyebwek aeng'u che po pagoiyot age, kong'iik aeng' che mi kapkelyen." 
Exodus36:25 Eng' komosta age ne po aeng' ne po emaitap Kamuktaindet, ne tokyingei murot kaataam, kondai pagoinik tiptem," 
Exodus36:26 ak kong'ichooto artam che po fedha, kong'iik aeng' eng' kapkelyenutap pagoiyot age." 
Exodus36:27 Ki yai anyun pagoinik lo kobunji emaitap Kamuktaindet patai, ole tokyingei cherongo." 
Exodus36:28 Ki yai kogeny pagoinik aeng' kobunji luukwek che po koot che mi patai. 
Exodus36:29 Ki kitwakyin aeng' kobooch ng'wony agoi parak, ak kituiye tugul peteiyot. Ki yachi ko uu nooto pagoinichooto tuwai che po luukwek aeng'." 
Exodus36:30 Ki mi pagoinik sisiitu, ak kong'iikwak che po fedha, taman ak lo; kong'iik aeng' eng' kapkelyenutap pagoiyot age tugul." 
Exodus36:31 Ki yai keetiigap chebitoik koek rateiywek; ki yai pagoinik muut che po komosta agenge ne po koot," 
Exodus36:32 ak rateiywek muut che po pagoinik che po komosta age ne po koot, ak rateiywek muut che po pagoinik che po komosta age ne po koot, ne mi patai, ole tokyingei cherongo." 
Exodus36:33 Ki yai rateiywotap kween kwo kong'etee taban agoi taban, eng' kwenutap pagoinik chuun alak." 
Exodus36:34 Ki iliige thahabu pagoinik, ak ki yai peteinikwak che po thahabu koek chooto ole kiroochi rateiywek. Ki ilige kora rateiywechooto thahabu." 
Exodus36:35 Ki yai angeet ne kioiye koot eng' ne buluu, ak ne aruus ne piriir, ne piriir ak eng' katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet. Ki yai anganooto kobooto kerubisyek che poisyetap laindet ne ng'oom." 
Exodus36:36 Ki yachi angoonochooto lumeiywek ang'wan che po chebitoik ak koliige thahabu. Ki po thahabu ireusyekwak; ak ki itang'ji kong'iik ang'wan che po fedha che ki kibarbar. 
Exodus36:37 Kinap angeet ne po kurgeetap Emait, ne po ne buluu, ne aruus ne piriir, ne piriir ak ne po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet, poisyetap chiito ne nabei kondai lelesta," 
Exodus36:38 ak lumeiywekwak muut ak ireusyekwak. Ki iliige thahabu metowegap lumeiywek, kobooto rateiywekwak che kituiye, ak kong'iikwak muut ko ki po sugunonik." 
Exodus37:1 Ki yai Bezalel moinget eng' keetiigap chebitoik, ne ki mitainik pogol ak taman koindonyi, mitainik tamanwogik lo ak lo tebeesindanyi ak mitainik tamanwogik lo ak lo tononennyi." 
Exodus37:2 Ki iliige thahabu che tiliileen oriit ak saang' ak kitegele tegeleiywotap thahabu koyieme paragunnyi tugul. 
Exodus37:3 Ki itang'ji peteinik ang'wan che po thahabu luukwekwak ang'wan. Ki inde aeng' komosta age ak aeng' eng' komosta age. 
Exodus37:4 Ki yai keetiik che ki ibe che po chebitoik ak koliige thahabu. 
Exodus37:5 Ki irooch keetichooto peteinik che miitei tabanwegap moinget, si keibe." 
Exodus37:6 Ki yai kerwetap rireenet eng' thahabu che tiliileen. Koindonyi kogi sendimita pogol ak taman ak tebeesindanyi kogi sendimita tamanwogik lo ak lo. 
Exodus37:7 Yeityo koyai kerubisyek aeng' eng' thahabu che kitaanyi, eng' tabanwek aeng' che po kerwetap rireenet." 
Exodus37:8 Ki tebee kerubit age komosi, kotebee age komosin. Inaamdos kerwetap rireenet ak kerubisyek eng' tabanwekyik tuwai." 
Exodus37:9 Kiiito kerubisyek kebebaikwak koba parak, kotuch kerwetap rireenet eng' kebebaikwak, ak kotoorchin togoochikwak, ing'ururi togoochigap kerubisyechooto kerwetap rireenet." 
Exodus37:10 Ki yai meset eng' keetiigap chebitoik, ne koindonyi ko ki mitainik tamanwogik sisiit ak tebeesindanyi ko ki mitainik artam ak ang'wan. Tononennyi ko ki mitainik tamanwogik lo ak lo." 
Exodus37:11 Ki iliige thahabu che tiliileen ak ki yachi tegeleiywotap thahabu kotegele, koyieme paragunnyi tugul." 
Exodus37:12 Ki yachi tegeleiywot ne yamei mitainik tamanwogik tisap ak muut tebeesindanyi koyiem kioto ak ki yai tegeleiywotap thahabu koyieme tabanwekyik tugul. 
Exodus37:13 Ki itang'ji peteinik ang'wan che po thahabu ak ki inde peteinichooto luukwek ang'wan eng' komoswegap keelyekyik ang'wan. 
Exodus37:14 Ki mi peteinichooto ole neegitee tegeleiywot, ole chutei keetiik che keibe meset." 
Exodus37:15 Ki yai keetichooto eng' keetiigap chebitoik ak koliige thahabu, si keibe meset." 
Exodus37:16 Ki yai kora eng' thahabu che tiliileen tuguuk che ki mi meset parak, taabookyik, kechigosyekyik ak tageiywekyik ak kigombokyik che kiroong'jine tuguuk." 
Exodus37:17 Ki itaany kogeny tait eng' thahabu che tiliileen. Kiyae keloto po tait thahabu che kitaanyi, kelunnyi ak toloitanyi. Kigombokyik, mulonokyik ak taaptokyik, koginamdos chooto tugul ko kiit agenge." 
Exodus37:18 Kisage mooriik lo toloita nooto, kosage mooriik somogu komostanyi age ne po keloto, ak kosage mooriik somogu ko uu nooto komostanin age." 
Exodus37:19 Ki tinyei temeet agenge kigombok somok che ki kiyai koigei taaptook che kiguure almond, ak mulwet ak taapteet. Ki tinyei ko uu nooto temeet age ne po komosta age kigombok somok che ki kiyai koigei taptochooto kiguure almond, ak mulwet ak taapteet: ko uu nooto eng' mooriik tugul lo che sachei eng' kioto." 
Exodus37:20 Ki miitei ole po toloita ineendet kigombok ang'wanu che ki kiyai kogergeit ak taaptogap almond, kobooto mulonokyik ak taaptokyik." 
Exodus37:21 Eng' komaswechooto tugul lo ye kigasage mooriik aeng'u, ko ki mi keel mulwet, ne ki kituiye koek kiy agenge." 
Exodus37:22 Ki namgei mulonokwak ak mooriikwak, koek kiy agenge ak ki kitang'e kioto komugul thahabu che tiliileen." 
Exodus37:23 Ki yai taisyekyik koek tisap koyae thahabu che tiliileen, kobooto kanameiywondennyi ak taabookyik che mengeechen." 
Exodus37:24 Ki yai kioto eng' thahabu che yamei keruutik sosom ak muut kobooto tuguukyik tugul. 
Exodus37:25 Ki yai kapkorosuut ole kibeelee nyamdutik koyae keetiigap chebitoik. Ki mitainik artam ak muut koindonyi ak ki mitainik artam ak muut tebeesindanyi, ak ki mitainik tamanwogik sogool tononennyi. Kiga namgei kapkorosuut ak kuinoikyik koek kiy agenge." 
Exodus37:26 Ki iliige thahabu che tiliileen, paragunnyi ak komoswekyik tugul kotuiyo ak kuinoikyik, yeityo kotany tegeleiywotap thahabu koyieme." 
Exodus37:27 Ki itaany peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak ki inde tuguuchooto kotabon tegeleiywot keel eng' tegeet, eng' komoswekyik tuwai, si kobiit kirooch keetiik che ki ibe," 
Exodus37:28 Ki yai keetiik che ki ibe, eng' keetiigap chebitoik ak koliige thahabu." 
Exodus37:29 Ki chop mwaita ne tiliil ne ki ilse, ak nyamdutik che tiliileen che kibeelei che po tuguuchooto anyinyen che ng'uu ne anyiny, ne poisyetap ng'amotyot ne puruchi tuguuk che ng'uu ne karaaran." 
Exodus38:1 Ki yai kaptisisyet ole kibeelee tiseiywot eng' keetiigap chebitoik. Ki achin koindonyi ak tebeesindannyi ko mitainik aeng' ak robo eng' mitainik aeng' ak robo ak tononennyi kogimitait agenge ak robo. 
Exodus38:2 Ki yai kosikyi kuinoik eng' luukwekyik ang'wan, ki kitaany kuinoikyik konamgei ak kioto, ak ki iliige sugunwet." 
Exodus38:3 Ki itaany tuguuk tugul che po kaptisisyet, tereenik, kechigok che eecheen, taabook che mengeechen, kariik che kirutunee panyeek ak taabook che ki ibe maat. Ki itaany tuguukyik tugul eng' sugunwet." 
Exodus38:4 Ki yachi kaptisyet sugunonik che kiregeri, eng' kapkelyenutap mireiywot ne yiemei kaptisisyet keel, si komuurmuur kioto." 
Exodus38:5 Ki itang'ji peteinik ang'wan luukwek ang'wan che po kioto po sugunwet ne ki kireger, si kirooch keetiik che ki ibe." 
Exodus38:6 Ki yai keetichooto eng' chebitoik ak koliige sugunwet. 
Exodus38:7 Ki irooch keetichooto peteinik oriit che mi komoswegap kaptisisyet si kobiit ketandane. Ki yai kioto koek moinget oriit. 
Exodus38:8 Ki itaany taabeet ne po sugunwet, ak kiyae sugunwet ng'echerennyi ne tebee, kobun kioisyek che ki keeregei kwonyiik che kiboisyei eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Exodus38:9 Ne rubei, ko ki yai seremut ne ng'ootaat ne ki po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet. Angook che tabanu murot tai ko ki mitainik artam ak ang'wan koindo," 
Exodus38:10 ki tiptem lumeiywekwak ak ki tiptem kong'iikwak che po sugunonik che tononie. Ki po fedha ireusyegap lumeiywek kobooto rateiywekwak che kituiye. 
Exodus38:11 Ki mi angook murot kaataam che yamei mitainik artam ak ang'wan ak lumeiywekwak tiptem ak kong'iikwak che tononie tiptem che po sugunonik. Ki po fedha ireusyek che po lumeiywek kobooto rateiywekwak che kituiye. 
Exodus38:12 Eng' komosta ne tokyingei cherongo, ko ki mi angook che yamei mitainik tiptem ak aeng', lumeiywekwak taman ak kong'iikwak che tononie taman. Ki po fedha ireusyegap lumeiywek kobooto rateiywekwak che kituiye." 
Exodus38:13 Kitabanu komostap kong'asiis angook che yamei mitainik tiptem ak aeng'. 
Exodus38:14 Ki mitainik lo ak kebeberyat angook che po kurgeet komosta age ak ki tinyei lumeiywekwak somok, ak kong'iikwak somok," 
Exodus38:15 ak ki iliige nooto komosta ne po aeng'. Ki mi kurgeet ne po seremut komosi ak komosi angook che yamei mitainik lo ak kebeberyat, lumeiywekwak somok ak kong'iikwak somok." 
Exodus38:16 Angook tugul che kiyiemei seremut ko ki po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet. 
Exodus38:17 Ki po sugung'iik che kitononie lumeiywek, ak ki po fedha ireusyek che po lumeiywek kobooto rateiywekwak che kituiye. Ki tuge fedha metowegap lumeiywechooto. Rateiywek che ki kituiyote lumeiywek tugul che po seremut ko ki po fedha." 
Exodus38:18 Ki nap nabiindet konde lelesta angeet ne po kurgeetap seremunooto ng'ootaat eng' che buluu, eng' che arusen ne piriir, eng' che piriireen ak eng' katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet. Ki ek koindonyi mitainik sogool ak ki po mitainik aeng' tononennyi ak tebeesindanyi ko uu angoogap seremut." 
Exodus38:19 Ki po sugunonik lumeiywekwak ang'wanu ak kong'iikwak ang'wan che tononie. Ki po fedha ireusyekwak ak ki kituge fedha metowegap lumeiywekwak ak rateiywekwak che kiga kituiyote. 
Exodus38:20 Ki po sugunonik tigongenik tugul che po emaitap Kamuktaindet ak tigongenik tugul che yiemei seremut. 
Exodus38:21 Koitetap tuguuk che po emaitap Kamuktaindet anyun chu, agot kootap paornateet ko uu ye ki kiit ko uu ng'atuutyetap Musa, kobunji poisyetap Lawiik eng' eutap Ithamar, weeriitap Aron tisiindet." 
Exodus38:22 Ak ki yai Bezalel, weeriitap Uri, weeriitap Hur, ne po ooreetap Judah tuguuk tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus38:23 Ki mi ak ineendet Aholiab weeriitap Aisamak, ne po ooreetap Dan, musogindet, laindet ne ng'oom, ak ko nabiindet ne nabei koindoi lelesta, eng' che buluu, eng' che arusen ne piriir, eng' che piriireen ak eng' katanit ne karaaran." 
Exodus38:24 Ki ek thahabu tugul che ki kiboisyee eng' poisyet tugul ne po ole-tiliil, agot thahabu che po kagoochinet, keruutik pogol sisiit ak tamanwogik tisap ak tisap ak kramuisyek pogol somok, chooto ko uu eng' kereetap tuguugap ole-tiliil." 
Exodus38:25 Fedhaisyegap icheeget che ki kiit che po tuiyet, ko ki yamei keruutik eliphuusyek somok ak taman ak tisap ak kramuisyek pogol tisap ak konom, chooto ko uu eng' kereetap tuguugap ole-tiliil." 
Exodus38:26 Ki kon chii tugul beka, ko uu kereetap tuguugap ole-tiliil, eng' chii age tugul ne ki siirtoi kowendi ole mi che kagiit eng' murenik tugul, che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak koba tai; murenik eliphuusyek pogol lo ak somok ak pogol muut ak konom." 
Exodus38:27 Keruutik eliphuusyek somok che po fedha ko ki kitaanyi kobwa kong'iik che uu kelongonik che po ole-tiliil ak kong'iik pogol che tononie lumeiywegap angeet ne ki kioiye koot, yamegei konda agenge ak keruutik sosom." 
Exodus38:28 Ki itaany keruutik taman ak tisap ak kramuisyek tamanwogik tisap ak muut koek ireusyek che po lumeiywek ak kotuge fedha metowekwak ak koyachi rateiywek che ki kituiyote. 
Exodus38:29 Kiyamei keruutik eliphuusyek aeng' pogol agenge ak tiptem ak ang'wan che po sugunwet ne po kagoochinet. 
Exodus38:30 Ki itaany chuuto Bezalel koek kong'iik che po kurgeet che tononie lumeiywegap emait ne kituiyechin, kaptisisyet ne ki kitang'e sugunwet, karnennyi ne ki kireger eng' sugunonik, tuguuk tugul che po kaptisisyet," 
Exodus38:31 kong'iik che tononie lumeiywegap seremut, tigongenik tugul che po koot ak tigongenik tugul che yiemei seremut." 
Exodus39:1 Ki yai pichooto ngoroik che ki kisal kogororonitu eng' tuguuk che buluu, che arusen ne piriir ak eng' che piriireen, si keboisyee eng' ole-tiliil. Kinapchi `icheek Aron ngoroik che itabaanatiin ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Ki yai Ephod ne po thahabu, eng' rangiik che buluu, che arusen ne piriir, che piriireen ak eng' katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet." 
Exodus39:3 Ki itaany thahabu koterteeritu yeityo korar koigei tapsinok, si kobiit kochuljulot eng' che buluu, eng' che arusen ne piriir, eng' che piriireen ak eng' katanit ne karaaran, nooto poisyetap laindet ne ng'oom." 
Exodus39:4 Kinapchi kioto kebeberwegap tigigoik, che ki kiropchin koek agenge. Ki kituiyo eng' luukwekyik aeng'." 
Exodus39:5 Ole kiga kiyaita pireneet, kogiu ole ki kiyaita ephod keyae thahabu, che buluu, che arusen ne piriir, che piriireen ak che po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Ki wai koik che kiguure soam, che ki kindeat thahabu che ki kitogul, si konam. Ki kisirchi koichooto kainaigap piigap Israel kogergeit ak waet ne po ng'ookset." 
Exodus39:7 Ki inde koichooto ephod ole po tigigoik, koek koigap kabwaatet agobo piigap Israel; ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Ki yai ngoryeetap tegeet, poisyetap musogindet ne ng'oom, ko uu poisyetap ephod, eng' thahabu ak eng' che buluu, eng' che arusen ne piriir, eng' che piriireen ak katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet." 
Exodus39:9 Ki aechin tebeesindo ak koindo ak ki kiliich ngoryonooto po tegeet koek aeng'. Ki ek koindonyi ak tebeesindannyi olo po sendimita tiptem ak aeng' eng' tiptem ak aeng' ko kagiliich. 
Exodus39:10 Kitetyi kioto ortinwek ang'wan che po koik che po kamanuut. Ki inde ooreet ne po tai sardio, topasio ak bareqet." 
Exodus39:11 Konde ooreet ne po aeng', sumaragdo, sapphire ak yaholom." 
Exodus39:12 Eng' ooreet ne po somok ko ki inde, huakinto, sebu ak ametusto." 
Exodus39:13 Ooreet ne po ang'wan ko ki inde, berulo, soam ak jasipi. Ki kiroogot koichooto kelongonigap thahabu che ki kitogul." 
Exodus39:14 Kite koichooto kainaigap piigap Israel. Ki taman ak aeng', ko uu kainaikwak, ko uu waetap ng'ookset. Ki kisirchi koita age tugul kainennyi, kobee ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po piigap Israel." 
Exodus39:15 Kinapchi ngoryonooto po tegeet sirimwek che uu rogoonik che po thahabu che tiliileen, che ki kilet." 
Exodus39:16 Kitagul thahabu koek morik aeng', ak ki yai peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak konde peteinichooto tabanwegap luukwek aeng' che po ngoryonooto po tegeet." 
Exodus39:17 Ki irookto sirimwechooto aeng' po thahabu che ki kilet peteinichooto aeng' che mi tabanwegap luukwek aeng', che po ngoryonooto po tegeet." 
Exodus39:18 Ki nam komoswechuun alak aeng' che po sirimwechooto aeng' ki kilet ak korooch kelongonik aeng' che ki kitagul, yeityo kotuiyo ak ephod eng' komostap tigigoik ole tabanu tai." 
Exodus39:19 Ki yai peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak konapchi ngoryonooto po tegeet ole po luukwek aeng', eng' tabanwekyik che tabanu komostap oriit eng' ephod keel." 
Exodus39:20 Ki yai peteinik aeng' che po thahabu ak konapchi tuguuchooto tigigoigap ephod eng' ole po keel, ole tabanu tai eng' ole neegitee ye ki kituiye, eng' paragutap pirenonooto po ephod, ne ki kinap eng' ng'omnateet." 
Exodus39:21 Ki igiich icheek ngoryeetap tegeet eng' peteinikyik, koratyin ak peteinigap ephod, korate rogoet ne buluu, si kotebee paragutap pireneet ne ki kila eng' ng'omnateet, si ma peesyo ngoryeetap tegeet ak ephod; ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Kinap ngoryeet ne kiroochegei, ne po ephod, ne ki kisal konyalilit ne ais tugul, ne poisyetap laindet," 
Exodus39:23 ak kinap ngoryonooto kween ole chutei metit, ko uu ye kichobei ngoryeet ne po lugeet ak ki kigurman kong'ata si ma kereer." 
Exodus39:24 Kinapchi ngoryonooto tabandap keel logoek che buluu, che arusen ne piriir, che piriireen ak che po katanit ne ki kila." 
Exodus39:25 Ki itaany cheptingilook che po thahabu che tiliileen, ak ki ing'olate cheptingilochooto logoek, koyiem kelutap ngoryeet," 
Exodus39:26 ye ki inde cheptingilyet, ko ki inde logoiyat korupkei ak kirubatkei ko uu nooto agoi, eng' tabandap ngoryeet komugul, si keboisyee; ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Kinap ngoroik che kooen che po katanit ne karaaran che ki kila kobunji Aron ak weeriikyik," 
Exodus39:28 ak chepkulet ne po katanit ne karaaran, chepkuloik che myachen che mengeechen che po katanit ne karaaran, sulwalisyek che po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet," 
Exodus39:29 ak pireneet ne po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kileet, ne po che buluu, che arusen ne piriir ak che piriireen, nooto poisyetap nabiindet ne ng'oom; ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Ki itaany naaryeet ne tiliil, eng' thahabu che korooron ak ki sirchi siruutik kogergeit ak waet ne po ng'ookset kole, “Tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Exodus39:31 Kiratyi rogoet ne buluu, kotebee chepkulet ole po togoch, ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Ki igeskei anyun poisyonik tugul che po kootap emait ne kituiyechin. Ak ki yai piigap Israel ko uu tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Exodus39:33 Yeityo koipchi `icheek emaitap Kamuktaindet Musa, ne Emait, ak tuguukyik tugul ak kariikyik che kiname angook, pagoinikyik, rateiywekyik, lumeiywekyik, kong'iikwak che tononie," 
Exodus39:34 emaitap magatogap mengichik, che ki kisal kobiriritu, emait ne po magatogap mengichigap peek ak angeet ne kioiye koot oriit," 
Exodus39:35 moingetap paornateet, keetiikyik che ki ibe, ak kerwetap rireenet," 
Exodus39:36 meset ak tuguukyik tugul ak magatiinik che itabaanatiin," 
Exodus39:37 keeldo ne tiliil ne po tait kobooto taisyekyik, agot taisyek che kitetei komyee ak tuguukyik tugul, ak mwanigap kiit ne ikweng'sei," 
Exodus39:38 kapkorosutap thahabu, mwaita ne ki ilse, nyamdutik che kibeelei che ng'uu ne anyiny, ak angeet ne kisonginine kurgeetap Emait," 
Exodus39:39 kaptisisyetap sugunwet, karnennyi ne ki kireger eng' sugunonik, keetiikyik che ki ibe ak tuguukyik tugul, taabeet ne kiuunse ak ng'echerennyi," 
Exodus39:40 angook che songinindos che po serumut ak lumeiywekyik ak kong'iikwak che tononi, angeet ne po kurgeetap seremut, rogoonikyik, tigongenikyik ak tuguuk tugul che po poisyetap emaitap Kamuktaindet, che po emait ne kituiyechin," 
Exodus39:41 ak ngoroik che ki kisal kogororonitu si keboisyee eng' ole-tiliil, ngoroik che itabaanatiin che po tisiindet Aron ak ngoroigap weeriikyik, si kobiit kobois eng' tisiisyet." 
Exodus39:42 Ki yai anyun piigap Israel poisyet tugul ne ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Kigeerot Musa poisyonichooto tugul, ak ki keer kole kiga koyai kogees anyun pichooto ko uu ye ki kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ara ki iberuur anyun `Musa icheek." 
Exodus40:1 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Exodus40:2 “Lumde koyooto po emait ne kituiyechin eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawet ne po tai. 
Exodus40:3 Inde moingetap paornateet koot oriit ak ituch eng' ngoryonooto kioiye koot. 
Exodus40:4 Yeityo iibu meset inde ko ak itet komyee tuguuk che tebee paragunnyi ak iibu keldap tait, inde ko ak inaam taisyek." 
Exodus40:5 Inde kapkorosuut ne po thahabu ne kibeelee nyamdutik eng' taitap moingetap paornateet, ak isonginin angeet eng' kurgeetap emaitap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus40:6 Inde kaptisisyet ne kibeelee tiseiywot taitap kurgeetap koyooto po emait ne kituiyechin. 
Exodus40:7 Inde taabeet ne kiuunse kwenutap emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet ak iroong'ji peek kioto. 
Exodus40:8 Lumde ng'ootweetap seremut kot kotuiyo ak isonginin angeet kurgeetap seremut. 
Exodus40:9 “Iipe mwanik che ki ilse ak iil emaitap Kamuktaindet ak tuguuk tugul che mi oriit; itabaan ak tuguukyik tugul, si kotiliilit." 
Exodus40:10 Yeityo iil kaptisisyet ne kibeelee tiseiywot ak tuguukyik tugul; itiliil kaptisisyet, si kotiliilit miising'." 
Exodus40:11 Iil taabeet ne kiuunse ak ng'echerennyi ak itabaan. 
Exodus40:12 “Imutu Aron ak weeriikyik kobwa kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin ak iune peek. 
Exodus40:13 Yeityo ilaakyi Aron ngoroik che ki kitabaan ak iil ineendet ak itabaan, si kobiit koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet." 
Exodus40:14 Imutu weeriikyik ak ilaakyi ngoroik che kooen," 
Exodus40:15 ak iil icheek ko uu ye ki iil kwandanywa, si kobiit koboisyeiwo eng' tisiisyet. Egu kailsennywa ne ki ili icheek tiseinateet ne po agoi eng' ibinwekwak tugul.”" 
Exodus40:16 Ki yai anyun Musa ko uu nooto, ko uu tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet." 
Exodus40:17 Ki kilumda anyun koyooto eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' eng' arawet ne tai eng' peetuut ne po tai. 
Exodus40:18 Ki lumda Musa anyun koot, ki iteepto kong'iikwak che tononie, ki lumda pagoinikyik, ki irooch rateiywekyik ak kolumda lumeiywekyik." 
Exodus40:19 Yeityo koiito anyun emait eng' emaitap Kamuktaindet parak ak kotuge angook alak koliich, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus40:20 Yeityo koip paornateet konde moinget oriit, ki irooch moinget keetiik che ki ibe ak ki iteepto kerwetap rireenet eng' paragutap moinget." 
Exodus40:21 Kingo pata, koip ineendet moinget kwo ko oriit ak kosonginin angeet ne kioiye emaitap Kamuktaindet, si koteekta moingetap paornateet, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus40:22 Ki inde meset emaitap Kamuktaindet ne kituiyechin, kotobon murot kaataam, eng' emaitap Kamuktaindet ne sip kemong'jin." 
Exodus40:23 Kitet magatiinik eng' meset eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus40:24 Ki inde keldap tait emait ne kituiyechin, kotoorchin ak meset, kotobon murot tai eng' emaitap Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus40:25 Ki inaam taisyek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus40:26 Ki inde kapkorosuut ne po thahabu emaitap Kamuktaindet ne kituiyechin eng' koyooto sip kemong'jin," 
Exodus40:27 ak kibeelee kapkorosunooto nyamdutik che po tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus40:28 Yeityo kosonginin angeet eng' kurgeetap emaitap Kamuktaindet. 
Exodus40:29 Ki inde kaptisisyet ne kibeelee tiseiywot eng' kurgeetap emaitap Kamuktaindet ne po emait ne kituiyechin. Ki igoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak ne po peek, eng' kaptisisyonooto, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus40:30 Ki inde taabeet ne kiuunse kwenutap emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet ak koroong'ji peek oriit, si kiuunse." 
Exodus40:31 Ki iun Musa ak Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak ak keelyekwak eng' kioto. 
Exodus40:32 Ki iuni ko uu nooto ye kichutei emait ne kituiyechin oriit ak ye kimachei koriikyi kaptisisyet, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Exodus40:33 Ki lumda ng'ootweetap seremut koyiem koot ak kaptisisyet ak konde angeet kurgeetap seremut. Ki iges anyun Musa poisyonooto. 
Exodus40:34 Ki nyo kotuch anyun pooldet emait ne kituiyechin ak ki nyi emait `liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Exodus40:35 Ki ma imuuch Musa kochut emait ne kituiyechin amu kigatebee pooldet paragutap koyooto ak kiganyi emaitap Kamuktaindet liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Exodus40:36 Ye kingo naam kotogosta pooldet eng' koyooto, konaam koba anyun piigap Israel ko uu nooto eng' panwekwak tugul." 
Exodus40:37 Ago ye kingo ma togosta pooldet, ko ki ma kobendi ui agoi peetuut ne togostoi poldanooto." 
Exodus40:38 Amu kiteben poldetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emaitap Kamuktaindet parak peet, ak ki mi maat poldanooto kemoi, kogigeerei emaitap Kamuktaindet komugul ne po Israel eng' panwekwak tugul." 
Leviticus1:1 Ki kuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak kong'alaalji eng' emait ne kituiyechin, koleenji," 
Leviticus1:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, ‘Ye igoitoi chii age tugul eng' okweek kagoochinet kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kogoitoi che po akwotisyek, che po tuuga ak che po neego.’" 
Leviticus1:3 “Ngo kagoochinennyi ko po tiseiywot ne kibeelei ne po tuuga, kogoitoi kirgit ne libwoop. Ingokweri kwo emait ne kituiyechin si kochamak eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus1:4 Ingogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinonooto kibeelei si ketaach nooto ak keyai kagaigaet agobo ineendet. 
Leviticus1:5 Yeityo koeeny kirgooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ingoip korotiik tisiik, weeriigap Aron, ak koisote kaptisisyet komoswek tugul, che mi ole neegitee kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus1:6 Ak koeeny ineendet kagoochinonooto kibeelei, yeityo kosach panyechooto kobiit kebeberwekyik." 
Leviticus1:7 Ingonde maat kaptisisyet weeriigap Aron tisiindet ak kotetyi kweenik ma. 
Leviticus1:8 Ye ibata kotet panyechooto kagesach tisiik, weeriigap Aron. Ingotet metit ak mwanikyik eng' kweenik parak che mi maat ne mi kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus1:9 Ago ingoun eng' peek tuguugap ke kobooto keelyekyik ak kobeel tisiindet kirgooto komugul eng' kaptisisyet. Niito ko tiseiywot ne kibeelei, kagoochinet ne punei maat, nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus1:10 “Ngo po kagoochinennyi ne kibeelei neego che po keechiirek anan che po ng'oroorek ko ingogoitoi mengit anan kwesta ne libwoop. 
Leviticus1:11 Ingoeeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kaptisisyet ole tokyingei murot kaataam. Ye ibata koisote tisiik weeriigap Aron korotiik kaptisisyet komoswek tugul. 
Leviticus1:12 Ingosach anyun ineendet panyeek kobiit kebeberwekyik, kobooto metitap artanooto ak mwanikyik. Yeityo kotet tisiik tuguuchooto eng' kweenik parak che lalei ne mi kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus1:13 Ago ingoun tuguugap ke ak keelyek eng' peek. Ingogoito tisiindet panyeek tugul ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyet. Niito ko kagoochinet ne kibeelei, kagoochinet ne punei maat, nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus1:14 “Ngo po toriitik kagoochinennyi ne kebeelei ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ingogoito anyun cheptugenik anan ko aaregap cheptuget."
