Leviticus1:15 Yeityo koip tisiindet konyo kaptisisyet ak koiiny kaatinnyi kong'et metit. Ingobeel eng' kaptisisyet ak kochiilji korotiikyik tabandap kaptisisyet. 
Leviticus1:16 Ingonem kebonjorennyi ak tuguukyik ak kowiirchi kaptisisyet taban ole tokyingei kong'asiis, olooto olemi oreek." 
Leviticus1:17 Yeityo kogereer kopcheune aeng' kebebaikyik amat koobeesyo. Ingobeel tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet eng' kweenik che mi ma. Niito kagoochinet ne kigoitoi kebeel, kagoochinet ne punei maat, nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Leviticus2:1 Ye igoitoi chii age tugul kagoochinet ne po peek che igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ingoek kagoochinennyi peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul. Ingoroong'ji mwaita peechooto ng'ootiin tambulul, ak konde tuguuk che nyamdut ak icheek." 
Leviticus2:2 Yeityo koipchi ineendet weeriigap Aron tisiik. Muguti tisiindet anyun chooto konyiti euut kobooto mwaitanyi ak tuguuk che nyamdut tugul, si kobeel tisiindet koek kebeberta eng' nooto kigoitoi eng' kaptisisyet, kagoochinet ne punei maat, nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus2:3 Che kang'et eng' kagoochinet ne po peechooto ng'ootiin tambulul, kobunji Aron ak weeriikyik. Niito ko tiliil miising' kot kosiir eng' kagoochinoik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che punei maat." 
Leviticus2:4 “Ye igoitoi inyee kagoochinetap peek che kibeelee eng' ma, igoitoi magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek che po peek che kaging'a che tambulul che kagiburukto mwaita anan magatiinik che tertereen che kagiilee mwaita che ma kinde mermereek." 
Leviticus2:5 Ngo kagoochineng'ung' ko kagoochinet ne po peek che kagibeel eng' kirambenit, ko ingoek che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambululeen che kagiburukto mwaita, che ma kinde mermereek." 
Leviticus2:6 Itiloti komengegitu, ak iroong'ji mwaita; nooto kagoochinet ne po peek." 
Leviticus2:7 Ngo po peek kagoochineng'ung' che kagibeel eng' taabeetap karnet, kechobei peek che ng'ootiin che tambululeen che kagiburukto mwaita." 
Leviticus2:8 Ara ipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinetap peek che kagechop eng' tuguuchuuto, si keipchi tisiindet ak koip ineendet kwo kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus2:9 Yeityo konem tisiindet che po kabwaatet eng' kagoochinonooto po peek, ak kobeel nooto eng' kaptisisyet, kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ne nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus2:10 Kagoochinetap peek che kang'et ko punjin Aron ak weeriikyik. Niito ko tiliil miising' kot kosiir, eng' kagoochinoik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che punei maat." 
Leviticus2:11 “Amat onde mermereek kagoochinet age tugul ne po peek ne ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu mobeele mermereek anan kumyat age tugul, koek kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobunei maat." 
Leviticus2:12 Ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koek kagoochinetap tongoanik. Ago amat keip koba kaptisisyet koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny." 
Leviticus2:13 Inde muunyuk kagoochineng'ung' age tugul ne po peek; amengorartae kagoochinetap peek muunyuk che po kayomisetap Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Igoitoi muunyuk kobooto kagoochinoiguk tugul. 
Leviticus2:14 “Ngigoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinetap peek che po tongoanik, igoitoi che po tongoaniguk che punu itigap peek che kaginde ma, peek che neryootiin, che kagitui." 
Leviticus2:15 Rong'ji mwaita ak inde tuguuk che nyamdut; niito ko kagoochinet ne po peek. 
Leviticus2:16 Ingobeel tisiindet kabwaatet ne po nooto, kebebertap peekyik che kagitui, ak kebebertap mwaitanyi, kobooto tuguuk che nyamdut tugul. Niito kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat." 
Leviticus3:1 “Ngo kagoochinennyi ko tiseiywotap kaalyeet, ko ingogoitoi ne po tuuga; ngo kirgit anan ko rooryat, kogoitoi ne libwoop eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus3:2 Ye ibata kogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinennyi ak koeeny eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, yeityo koisot tisiik weeriigap Aron kaptisisyet komoswek tugul eng' korotiik." 
Leviticus3:3 Igoitoi ineendet eng' tiseiywotap kaalyeet kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat: mwanik che ki ilaach moet ak sunetik tugul che po moo," 
Leviticus3:4 soromokyik tuwai kobooto mwanikwak, che mi ole neegitee sugulumdo ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet, ingoisto chooto kobooto soromok." 
Leviticus3:5 Yeityo kobeel weeriigap Aron chooto eng' kaptisisyet; ingonde paragutap tiseiywot ne kibeelei, ne mi kweenik che mi ma. Niito kagoochinet ne punei maat, nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus3:6 “Ngo po neego kagoochinennyi ne po tiseiywotap kaalyeet ne ipchin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ngo mengit anan kwesta anan ko subeendo, kogoitoi ne libwoop." 
Leviticus3:7 Ngo koitoi mengit koek kagoochinennyi, kogoitoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Leviticus3:8 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinennyi ak koeeny eng' taitap emait ne kituiyechin, yeityo koitos weeriigap Aron kaptisisyet komoswek tugul eng' korotiik." 
Leviticus3:9 Ngo koitoi che po tiseiywotap kaalyeet koek kagoochinet ne punei maat ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ingogoito mwanikyik ak saruryennyi komugul, kogatil kogees eng' kipkitit, ak mwanik che ki ilaach moet, ak sunetik tugul che po moo," 
Leviticus3:10 soromok tuwai, ak mwanik che ki ilaach soromochooto, che mi ole neegitee kipkitit, ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet, ingonem chooto kobooto soromok." 
Leviticus3:11 Peelei chooto tisiindet eng' kaptisisyet koek amitwogigap kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunei maat. 
Leviticus3:12 “Ngo po ng'orooryet kagoochinennyi, kogoitoi anyun eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Leviticus3:13 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitap ng'orooryanooto, yeityo koeeny eng' taitap emait ne kituiyechin, ak koisote weeriigap Aron kaptisisyet korotiik komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus3:14 Eng' chooto kogoochin `ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne punei maat; mwanik che ki ilaach moet, sunetik tugul che po moo," 
Leviticus3:15 soromok tuwai ak mwanik che ki ilaach soromochooto che mi ole neegitee kipkitit ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet kobooto soromok. 
Leviticus3:16 Ak kobeel tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet; amitwogigap kagoochinet chuuto, che punei maat, koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny. Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mwanik tugul." 
Leviticus3:17 Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' ibinwekwok tugul eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul, ale amat oam mwanik ak korotiik.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus4:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Chu ng'atuutik agobo ye kayai chii age tugul tengek ama eng' kwetyinet, eng' kiy age tugul ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole amat oyai:" 
Leviticus4:3 Ngo yai tengekto tisiindet ne ki kiil kot koipchi piik ng'oogisto, ko ingogoito anyun kirgit ne neran ne libwoop kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinetap tengektanyi ne kogoyai." 
Leviticus4:4 Ingoget kirgooto konyo kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogonoor eunnyi metitap kirgooto, yeityo koeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus4:5 Taachei tisiindet ne ki kiil korotiigap kirgooto ak koip kobwa oriit ne po emait ne kituiyechin," 
Leviticus4:6 yeityo korooch mornennyi korotiik ak koisisye korotichooto konyil tisap eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' taitap angeet ne ioitos koot ne po ole-tiliil." 
Leviticus4:7 Ye ibata konde tisiindet alak eng' korotichooto kuinoigap kapkorosuut ne po nyamdutik che ng'uu ne anyiny che kibeelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nooto mi emait ne kituiyechin. Ingotumji ineendet korotiik tugul che po kirgooto kaptisisyet keel ne kibeelee kagoochinoik, ne miitei kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus4:8 Ingobut mwanik tugul che po kirgooto po kagoochinetap tengekto, mwanik che ki ilaach moet ak sunetik tugul che po moo," 
Leviticus4:9 kobooto soromok tuwai, mwanik che ki ilaach moet che mi ole neegitee sugulumdo ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet kobooto soromok." 
Leviticus4:10 Putei mwanichooto ko uu ye kibutei che po kirgit ne tiseiywotap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Yeityo kobeel tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet ne kibeelee kagoochinoik. 
Leviticus4:11 Ago muitap kirgooto ak panyeekyik tugul kobooto metinnyi, keelyekyik, tuguukyik po ke ak eiyandennyi," 
Leviticus4:12 nooto kirgooto komugul, ko ingoip kwo komosta ne tiliil eng' saang'utap nganaseet ole kitumjin oreek ak kobeel eng' kweenik parak che mi ma. Kibeelee ole kitumjin oreek." 
Leviticus4:13 “Ngo lel tuiyet komugul ne po Israel ak koung'ak lelutyonooto eng' taitap tuiyet, ak ngo ki yai icheek kiy age tugul ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole amat oyai, ko kagonam icheek tengekto." 
Leviticus4:14 Ye kagonaak lelutyonooto kayai, kogoitoi anyun tuiyet kirgit ne neran koek kagoochinet ne po tengekto, yeityo koget konyo taitap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus4:15 Ingogonoor poisyegap tuiyet eunekwak metitap kirgooto, yeityo kebar kirgooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus4:16 Ye ibata koip tisiindet ne ki kiil korotiigap kirgooto kobwa oriit ne po emait ne kituiyechin," 
Leviticus4:17 ak korooch mornennyi korotiik ak koisisye eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyil tisap, eng' taitap anganooto ki kioiye koot." 
Leviticus4:18 Yeityo konde korotichooto alak kuinoigap kapkorosuut ne miitei taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emait ne kituiyechin. Roong'jin korotiik tugul kelutap kaptisisyet ne kibeelee kagoochinoik ne miitei kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin. 
Leviticus4:19 Putei mwanikyik tugul ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyet," 
Leviticus4:20 ak koyachi kirgooto ko uu ye ki yachi kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto. Eng' niito anyun koyae tisiindet kagaigaet agobo icheek ak kenyochigaat. 
Leviticus4:21 Ingola ineendet kirgit kwo saang'utap nganaseet ak kobeel ko uu ye kigabeel kirgit ne po tai. Niito ko kagoochinetap tengekto ne po tuiyet. 
Leviticus4:22 “Ye kalel pounindet, koyai ama nai kiy age tugul ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi kole matkeyai, ak konam ineendet tengekto," 
Leviticus4:23 ak ngiboorchi ineendet tengektanyi ne ki yai, koget kwesta ne libwoop kobunji kagoochinennyi." 
Leviticus4:24 Ingogonoor eunnyi metitap kwesta ak koeeny eng' ole kieng'e kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Niito kagoochinetap tengekto. 
Leviticus4:25 Yeityo konam tisiindet korotichooto po kagoochinetap tengekto, eng' mornennyi ak koiilate kuinoigap kaptisisyet ne po kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak koroong'ji korotiikyik kelutap kaptisisyet ne kibeelee kagoochinoik." 
Leviticus4:26 Ak kobeel mwanikyik tugul eng' kaptisisyet, ko uu ye kiyachin mwanigap tiseiywot ne po kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Yaei kagaigaet ko uu niito tisiindet agobo ineendet amu tengektanyi, ak kenyochigaat." 
Leviticus4:27 “Ngo lel chii age tugul ne po tuiyet, kong'em kiy age tugul ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole amat oyai, ak konam tengekto," 
Leviticus4:28 ak ngiboorchi ineendet tengektanyi ne koyai, koget anyun ng'orooryet koek kagoochinennyi, iyuoget ne libwoop kobunji tengektanyi ne koyai." 
Leviticus4:29 Yeityo kogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinonooto po tengekto ak koeeny eng' ye kigoitoe kagoochinoik che kibeelei. 
Leviticus4:30 Ye ibata konam tisiindet korotiigap artanooto eng' mornennyi ak koiilate kuinoigap kaptisisyet ne po kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak koroong'ji korotiik tugul che po artanooto kelutap kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus4:31 Ak kobut mwanikyik tugul ko uu ye kibutei mwanigap tiseiywot ne po kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Yeityo kobeel tisiindet eng' kaptisisyet koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet ak kenyochigaat. 
Leviticus4:32 “Ngo kagoochinennyi ne po tengekto ko keechiiryet, ko ingoget subeendo ne libwoop," 
Leviticus4:33 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitap kagoochinonooto po tengekto, ak koeeny koek kagoochinetap tengekto eng' ole kieng'e kagoochinoik che kibeelei." 
Leviticus4:34 Yeityo konam tisiindet korotichooto po kagoochinetap tengekto, eng' mornennyi, ak koiilate kuinoigap kaptisisyet ne po kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak koroong'ji korotiikyik tugul kelutap kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus4:35 Ak kobut mwanikyik tugul ko uu ye kibutei mwanigap keechiiryet ne po tiseiywotap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Ingobeel tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet ak konde paragutap kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che punei maat. Eng' niito, koyaei tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet amu tengektanyi ne koyai, ak kenyochigaat.”" 
Leviticus5:1 “Ngo yai chii age tugul tengek, amu kagas ng'olyootap kayasyoet ak koek paoryat; ngo ki keer anan konai ama kong'aany, koibei anyun tengektanyi." 
Leviticus5:2 Anan ngo twa chii age tugul kiy age tugul ne ng'waan ne kame, anan panyeegap tyong'igap timiin che ng'woneen anan panyeegap tuuga ak tuguuk che ichuutegei ng'wony che ng'woneen, nganda kaung'ak eng' ineendet, komurwoniitu, ak namei ineendet anyun tengekto." 
Leviticus5:3 Anan ngo twa murwoonindap chii, murwoonindo age tugul ne imurwooni chii, nganda kaung'ak eng' ineendet, ko ye nai kioto konam anyun ineendet tengekto." 
Leviticus5:4 Anan ngo yosyo chii eng' kutinnyi kosartae, koyai kiy ne ya anan ne myee, kayasyoet age tugul ne iyastos chii kosartae, nganda ung'aat eng' ineendet, ko ye nai kioto konam ineendet anyun tengekto eng' age eng' tuguuchooto." 
Leviticus5:5 Ye kagonam chii age tugul tengekto eng' age eng' tuguuchooto, kong'aany anyun tengektanyi ne kogoyai," 
Leviticus5:6 ak koip kagoochinetap chalwoktanyi, koipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai, subeendo ne punu akweet, ngo aarwetap keechiir anan ko ne po ng'oroor koek kagoochinetap tengekto; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet amu tengektanyi." 
Leviticus5:7 “Ago ngo ma imuuchi koal aarwet ne punu akweet, koip anyun cheptugenik aeng' anan ko aarek aeng' che po toriitik, koipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinennyi ne po chalwogoto kogoyai. Po age kagoochinetap tengekto, ko po age kagoochinet ne kibeelei." 
Leviticus5:8 Ingoipchi chooto tisiindet, ne igoitoi korook kagoochinet ne po tengekto. Iinyi kaatit ago mapcheune aeng'," 
Leviticus5:9 ak koisee korotiigap kagoochinetap tengekto tabandap kaptisisyet, ak kosochi korotiik che kang'et kaptisisyet keel. Niito kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Leviticus5:10 Yeityo kogoito ne po aeng' koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ko uu ye ki king'at, ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai, ak kenyochigaat." 
Leviticus5:11 “Ago ngo ma imuuchi koal cheptugenik aeng' anan ko aarek aeng' che po toriitik, koip anyun kagoochinennyi ne po tengektanyi ne kogoyai, koip keruutyet agenge ne po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul koek kagoochinetap tengekto. Amat konde mwaita anan tuguuk che nyamdut, amu niito ko kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Leviticus5:12 Ak koipchi tisiindet, si komugut tisiindonooto peechooto ng'ootiin konyi euut si koek kabwaatet ne po chooto ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyet, eng' paragutap kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che punei maat. Niito kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Leviticus5:13 Yaei anyun tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet amu tengektanyi ne koyai eng' age tugul eng' chooto, ak kenyochigaat. Punjin tisiindet che kang'et koek kagoochinetap peek.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus5:15 “Ngo yai chii age tugul chalwokto, lelutyet ne koma kokwetyin, eng' tuguuk che itabaanatiin che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kokwerichi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinetap chalwoktanyi, mengit ne libwoop eng' akweetap keechiirek, ne po kamanuutyet ne irogendochini eng' shekelisyek che po fedha, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Nooto ko kagoochinetap chalwokto." 
Leviticus5:16 Igeeri nooto king'em, ne po kiit ne ki kitabaan ak kotesyi kebeberta agenge eng' muut, kogoochi tisiindet. Yaei tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet eng' mengoto po kagoochinetap chalwokto, ak kenyochigaat." 
Leviticus5:17 “Ngo yai chii age tugul tengek ago nganda kama kongen, koyai kiy age tugul eng' tuguuchooto ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole amat keyai, konamei anyun ineendet tengekto ui tugul, ak ibei tengektanyi." 
Leviticus5:18 Ketu anyun mengit ne libwoop ne punu akweetap keechiirek kogetyi tisiindet, ko uu kamanuutyet ne irogendochini, si koek kagoochinetap chalwokto. Yae tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet amu lelutyet nooto ki yai ama eng' kwetyinet, ak kenyochigaat." 
Leviticus5:19 Niito kagoochinetap chalwokto; ki konam ineendet iman chalwokto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” 
Leviticus6:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus6:2 “Ngo yai chii age tugul tengek, koleelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kaiberber chiitap kokwennyi eng' tuguuk che kigoochin kogonor, anan eng' kamanisyet, anan eng' rebisyet, anan ngo sastae chiitap kokwennyi," 
Leviticus6:3 anan ngo nyoor kiy ne ki pet ak komwa lembech, anan koyasyo eng' lembech, anan ngo yai chii age tugul eng' chuuto, koyaei tengek." 
Leviticus6:4 Ngo kagoyai chii anyun tengek ak konam ineendet lelutyet, koweektoi nooto kirep anan kiy ne ki ip eng' sastaet, anan kiy ne ki kigoochi kogonor, anan kiy ne kinyoor ne kiga kobet," 
Leviticus6:5 anan kiy age tugul ne ki iyasyo eng' lembech agobo kioto. Ingoweekta kogeesta ak kotesyi kebeberta agenge eng' muut, kogoochi chiitap ko po tuguuchooto eng' peetuunooto namei lelutyet." 
Leviticus6:6 Ye ibata nooto, kogetyi tisiindet mengit ne libwoop ne punu akweetap keechiirek, asi kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochineennyi ne po chalwokto, ko uu kaamanutyet ne irogendochin koek kagoochinetap chalwok." 
Leviticus6:7 Yae tisiindet tisiisyet agobo ineendet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kenyochin kaat eng' kiy age tugul ne koyaei si konamei lelutyet.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus6:9 “Ng'at Aron ak weeriikyik ileenji: ni ng'atuutyetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei; ingotebee ma eng' kaptisisyet kagoochinonooto kigoitoi kebeel kemout komugul agoi koeech, ak ingolal maatap kaptisisyet agoi." 
Leviticus6:10 Ingolaach tisiindet ngoryennyi ne po tisiisyet, ak ingolaach ngoroigap kaptisisyet che po oriit, ak koram oreegap maat ne kagibeele kagoochinet eng' kaptisisyet, ak konde ole neegitee kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus6:11 Yeityo koreek ngoroikyik ak kolaach ngoroik alak, ak koip oreek komanda koba ole-tiliil eng' saang'utap nganaseet." 
Leviticus6:12 Kiriibei maat ne mi kaptisisyet si ma me, lalei agoi, ak iywokyin tisiindet kweenik ma karonet age tugul ak kotet komyee kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' paragutap tuguuchooto, ak yeityo kobeel eng' olooto mwanigap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet." 
Leviticus6:13 Ingoriip maat kolal kotugul eng' kaptisisyet, amat kemeto kome.”" 
Leviticus6:14 “Ni ko ng'atuutyetap kagoochinetap peek; igoitoi weeriigap Aron eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' tai ne po kaptisisyonooto." 
Leviticus6:15 Kimuguti konyi euut eng' peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che po kagoochinetap peek ak eng' mwanik kobooto tuguuk che nyamdut tugul che miitei kagoochinetap peek parak, yeityo kobeel eng' kaptisisyonooto koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny ak koek nooto kabwaatet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus6:16 Amei Aron ak weeriikyik che kong'etune chooto. Kiamei ama kinde mermereek eng' komosta ne tiliil; amei eng' seremutap emait ne kituiyechin. 
Leviticus6:17 Ma kibeelei kobooto mermereek; kaagoite nooto koek kebebertanywa eng' kagoochinoikyuk kobun maat; tiliil niito miising'; uu kagoochinetap tengekto, ak uu kagoochinetap chalwok." 
Leviticus6:18 Amei chooto age tugul ne muren eng' lagogap Aron ak koek nooto ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' ibinwekwok eng' kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kigoochin kobun maat. Kiy age tugul ne tiinyei ko tiliilitu.” 
Leviticus6:19 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus6:20 “Ni kagoochinetap Aron ak weeriikyik, ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuut ne ki ili ineendet. Egu niito kagoochinet ne po kotugul; keruutyet agenge ne po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul kigoitoi kebeberta age karon ak kigoito niin age koskoleny." 
Leviticus6:21 Kibeelei kobooto mwaita eng' kirambenit, ak ye kagotuiyo komyee ak mwaita, iibu konyo ko. Igoite kagoochinetap peek che kagebeel ketonaton koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus6:22 Ko uu nooto, kogoitoi kagoochinonooto tisiindet ne ki kiil eng' weeriikyik kogeer ineendet. Kibeeljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tugul kigesyin ko uu eng' ng'atuutyet ne wendi agoi koigeny." 
Leviticus6:23 Kibeelei kogeskei kagoochinet age tugul ne po peegap tisiindet; ma ki amei.” 
Leviticus6:24 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus6:25 “Mwachi Aron ak weeriikyik ileenji, ni ng'atuutyet ne po kagoochinetap tengekto: kieng'e kagoochinetap tengekto taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' ole kieng'e kagoochinet ne kibeelei; Tiliil nooto miising'." 
Leviticus6:26 Tisiindet ne igoitoi kagoochinetap tengek ko amei kebeber eng' nooto. Ki amei eng' komosta ne itabaanat eng' seremutap emait ne kituiyechin. 
Leviticus6:27 Tiliilitu kiy age tugul ne tiinyei panyechooto. Ngosachi korotiigap kioto ngor age tugul, imwet ngoryonooto anyun eng' komosta ne tiliil." 
Leviticus6:28 Kituei tereet ne kagiyoe panyechooto. Ngo kagiyoe tereetap sugunwet, kesitei ak kechurukta eng' peek." 
Leviticus6:29 Amei age tugul ne muren eng' tisiik, panyechooto; tiliil niito miising'." 
Leviticus6:30 Ma ki amei kagoochinet age tugul ne po tengek ne kagiip korotiikyik kobwa emait ne kituiyechin keyaei kagaigaet eng' ole-tiliil; kibeelei eng' ma.” 
Leviticus7:1 “Ni ng'atuutyet agobo kagoochinetap chalwok. Tiliil niito miising'. 
Leviticus7:2 Ki eng'e kagoochinet agobo chalwok ole kieng'e kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak keise korotiikyik kaptisisyet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus7:3 Igoitoi tisiindet eng' panyechooto mwanikyik tugul; cho po saruryet, mwanik che ki ilaach moet," 
Leviticus7:4 soromok tuwai ak mwanik che ki ilaach soromochooto che mi ole neegitee kipkitit ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet kobooto soromok. 
Leviticus7:5 Peelei tisiindet chooto eng' kaptisisyet koek kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun maat. Niito kagoochinetap chalwok. 
Leviticus7:6 Amei mureno age tugul eng' tisiik panyechooto; ki amei eng' komosta ne tiliil. Tiliil niito miising'. 
Leviticus7:7 Uu kagoochinetap tengek kagoochinetap chalwok, agenge ng'atuutyennywa. Punjin chooto tisiindet ne tisiisyei agobo tuguuchooto." 
Leviticus7:8 Tisiindet ne igoitoi kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po chii age tugul, kobunjiin ineendet muitap kagoochinonooto kibeelei." 
Leviticus7:9 Punjin tisiindet ne igoitoi kagoochinet. Punjin ineendet kagoochinet age tugul ne po peek che kibeelei eng' ma ak che kigelei eng' taabeet ak che kigelei eng' kirambenit. 
Leviticus7:10 Kagoochinet age tugul ne po peek, ne kiburuktoi mwai anan ko yaamaat, ko punjin weeriigap Aron tugul ak pcheei icheek koaechin." 
Leviticus7:11 “Ni ng'atuutyetap tiseiywotap kagoochinoik agobo kaalyeet ne igoochin `chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Leviticus7:12 Ngo koitoi chii kagoitoet agobo kongoi, kogoitoi kobooto magatiinik che mengeechen che ma kinde mermereek ak kekwang'da mwaita, magatiinik che tertereen che ma kinde mermereek che ka ki ilee mwaita, ak magatinigap peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che ka kikwang'da mwaita si kotangusitu." 
Leviticus7:13 Igoitoi kagoochinennyi kobooto magatiinik che mengeechen che kaginde mermereek, kobooto tiseiywotap kagoochinoikyik che po kaalyeet agobo kongoi." 
Leviticus7:14 Igoitoi magatyat agenge eng' chooto kobun kagoochinet age tugul, koek kagoochinet ne kitoroore Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, punjin magatyandanooto tisiindet ne piitee korotiigap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet." 
Leviticus7:15 Ki amei panyeegap tiseiywot ne po kagoochinet agobo kaalyeet eng' peetuunooto kegoitoi, mat ketuuch agot kitigin kot koeekyi." 
Leviticus7:16 Ago, ngo kagoochinetap kongoi, anan kagoochinet eng' chameet, keamei eng' peetuunooto ka kigoitoi, ak keamei eng' peetuutap aeng' che kong'et eng' chooto." 
Leviticus7:17 Ago che kong'etune panyeegap tiseiywot kot koit peetuutap somok, kebeelei eng' ma." 
Leviticus7:18 Ngot koam chii panyeegap tiseiywot ne po kagoochinet agobo kaalyeet eng' peetuutap somok koma iyanaat ak ma ki ityin ineendet ne igoitoi. Ki iti keele kagong'wanit ak ibei tengektanyi chiito ne amei chooto. 
Leviticus7:19 “Ma ki amei panyeek che katiiny kiy age tugul ne ng'waan; kibeelei eng' ma. Ak panyeek tugul che ma twa kiy, ko amei chii age tugul ne tiliil." 
Leviticus7:20 Ago chii ne amei panyeegap tiseiywotap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotinyei murwoonindo, king'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus7:21 Ye katiiny chii age tugul kiy ne ng'waan, ngo murwoonindap chii, anan tyony ne ng'waan, anan kiy age tugul ne ng'waan, yeityo koam panyeegap tiseiywotap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, king'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus7:23 “Mwachi piigap Israel ileenji, ‘Amat oam mwanik alak tugul che po kiruk anan keechiir anan ko ng'oroor.’" 
Leviticus7:24 Kimuuchi keboisyee eng' poisyon alak mwaitap ne kameei ineegei anan ko mwaitap ne katon tyong'in, ago amat oam." 
Leviticus7:25 Ngot koam chii age tugul mwaitap tyony ne igoitoi piik koek kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun maat, king'etoi eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus7:26 Amat oam korotiik alak tugul, ngo che po toriit anan che po tyony eng' meng'otosyekwok ui tugul." 
Leviticus7:27 King'etoi eng' piikyik chii age tugul ne amei korotiik.” 
Leviticus7:28 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus7:29 “Mwachi piigap Israel ileenji: ‘Ineendet ne igoitoi tiseiywotap kagoochinoikyik che po kaalyeet kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koipchin ineendet kagoochinennyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’" 
Leviticus7:30 Ibu ineendet eng' eunekyik kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun maat. Ibu mwanik kobooto tagateet si keongoi tagateet koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Leviticus7:31 Peelei tisiindet mwanik eng' kaptisisyet, ak punjin Aron ak weeriikyik tagateet." 
Leviticus7:32 Ogoochi tisiindet chaatit ne po komostap tai koek kagoochinet ne punu tiseiywegap kagoochinoikwok che po kaalyeet. 
Leviticus7:33 Ineendet eng' weeriigap Aron ne igoitoi korotiigap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet ak mwanik, ko ibei chaatit ne po komostap tai koek kebebertanyi." 
Leviticus7:34 Kaataach eng' piigap Israel kagoochinetap tagateet ne kiongoi, ak kagoochinetap chaatit kobunu tiseiywek che po kagoochinoikwak che po kaalyeet. Kaagoochi Aron tisiindet ak weeriikyik tuguuchooto, kobunu piigap Israel koek ng'atuutyet ne wendi agoi koigeny." 
Leviticus7:35 Niito kebebertap Aron ak weeriikyik che punu kagoochinoik che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobun maat. Ki kitabaanji icheek kong'etee peetuut ne ki kindoi koboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tisiisyet." 
Leviticus7:36 Chuuto che ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kigoochi icheek ko kagiil, koek kebebertanywa eng' piigap Israel agoi koigeny eng' ibinwekwak tugul.”" 
Leviticus7:37 Chuuto ng'atuutigap kagoochinet ne kibeelei, kagoochinetap peek, kagoochinetap tengek, kagoochinetap chalwok, ne po katabaanet ak ne po tiseiywotap kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet," 
Leviticus7:38 che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai eng' peetuut ye king'atei ineendet piigap Israel kole kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoikwak, eng' surkwen ne po Sinai." 
Leviticus8:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus8:2 “Imut Aron ak weeriikyik, ak iip ngoroik ak mwaita ne ki ilse, ketu kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengek ak mengichik aeng', ak iibu ateruut ne mi magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek," 
Leviticus8:3 yeityo iyum tuiyet komugul eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin.” 
Leviticus8:4 Ki yai Musa anyun ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki iyumjigei tuiyet kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus8:5 Ki leenji `Musa tuiyet, “Ni ko kiit ne kogong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole keyai.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Ki imut `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik ak koun icheek eng' peek. 
Leviticus8:7 Ki ilaakyi ineendet Aron ngoryeet ne kooi ak koratyi pireneet ak kolaakyi kora ngoryeet age ne kooi ak ephod, ak korate pireneet ephod ne ki kinap eng' ng'omnateet, ak kogige ephod mosibinooto." 
Leviticus8:8 Ki ilaakyi ineendet ngoryeetap tegeet ak konde ngoryonooto Urim ak Tumim. 
Leviticus8:9 Ki igonor naaryeet metitap Aron ak konde komostap togoch kiit ne tiliil ne po thahabu, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Leviticus8:10 Yeityo konam `Musa mwaita ne ki ilse ak koiil koot kobooto tuguuk tugul che ki miitei ko, ak kotabaan." 
Leviticus8:11 Ki ise mwaiata kapkorosuut konyil tisap, ak koiil kapkorosuut, tuguukyik tugul, ak taabeet kobooto kelunnyi si kotabaan tuguuchooto." 
Leviticus8:12 Kiroong'ji mwaita ne ki ilse metitap Aron ak koiil si kotabaan ineendet. 
Leviticus8:13 Ki imut `Musa weeriigap Aron ak kolaakyi ngoroik che kooen. Kiratyi icheek mosibisyek ak kolakyi metowekwak chepkuloik che mengeechen, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Leviticus8:14 Kingo pata, koget kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto ak ki igonoor Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak metitap kirgooto po kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Leviticus8:15 Ki eeny `Musa kirgooto ak kotaach korotiik, yeityo koile korotichooto kuinoigap kaptisisyet eng' mornennyi. Ki ianyiny kaptisisyet, ak kotumji korotiik kaptisisyet keel ak kotabaan, koyai tisiisyet agobo nooto." 
Leviticus8:16 Kibut `Musa mwanik tugul che po moo ak kwambelelyet ne miitei kooet, soromok tuwai ak mwanikwak, ak kobeel chooto eng' kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus8:17 Ki peel kirgit kobooto muitonyi, panyeekyik ak eiyandennyi eng' saang'utap nganaseet, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Leviticus8:18 Ki kweri mengitap kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak kogonoor Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak metitap mengoto." 
Leviticus8:19 Ki eeny ak koisee `Musa korotiik kaptisisyet komoswek tugul. 
Leviticus8:20 Kitil `Musa mengoto kosach, yeityo kobeel metit kobooto kebeberwechooto ak mwanik." 
Leviticus8:21 Ki iun eng' peek tuguugap moo ak keelyek, ak kobeel mengoto komugul eng' kaptisisyet. Ki kagoochinet nooto ne kibeelei koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny, kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun maat, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Leviticus8:22 Ki kweri mengitap aeng', mengit ne po poisyetap katabaanet ak ki igonoor Aron ak weeriikyik eunekwak metitap mengoto." 
Leviticus8:23 Ki eeny `Musa mengoto ak kotaach korotiik, ak koilee walitap ititap tai ne po Aron, mornet ne oo ne po eunnyi ne po tai ak mornet ne oo ne po keldanyi ne po tai." 
Leviticus8:24 Ki imut `Musa kora weeriigap Aron ak konde korotiik walitap itiikwak che po tai, morik che eecheen che po eunekwak che po tai, ak morik che eecheen che po keelyekwak che po tai. Ki ise `Musa korotiik kaptisisyet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus8:25 Kibut mwanik, konem saruryet, sunetik tugul che po moo, kwambelelyetap kooet, soromok tuwai ak mwanikwak, ak chaatit ne po komostap tai." 
Leviticus8:26 Ki inem magatyat agenge ne ming'in ne ma kinde mermereek, magatyat ne ming'in ne ko ki ilee mwaita, ak magatyat agenge ne terter eng' ateruut ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek ne ki miitei taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogonoor chooto mwaita parak ak eng' chaatit parak ne po tai." 
Leviticus8:27 Ki inde chooto tugul eunegap Aron ak eunegap weeriikyik, ak koongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi." 
Leviticus8:28 Ki inem `Musa tuguuchooto eng' eunekwak ak koip kobeel eng' kaptisisyet eng' paragutap kagoochinet ne kibeelei. Ki ek che itabaanatiin, koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny. Ki kagoochinet kobun maat, ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus8:29 Ki ip `Musa tagateet ak koongoi koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki kebebertap Musa nooto eng' mengoto po poisyetap katabaanet, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Leviticus8:30 Ki inem Musa kebebertap mwaata ki ilse ak kebebertap korotiik che ki mi kaptisisyet ak koisee Aron ak ngoroikyik, ak weeriikyik ak ngoroikwak. Ki ianyiny Aron ak ngoroikyik, weeriikyik ak ngoroikwak." 
Leviticus8:31 Ki leenji `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik, “Oyoi panyeek eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, ak oam eng' olooto kobooto magatiinik che mi ateruut ne ki kitabaanji poisyetap katabaanet, ko uu ye ki ang'at, ale, ‘Amei Aron ak weeriikyik.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Obeel eng' ma panyeek ak magatiinik che kang'et. 
Leviticus8:33 Momandoi eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin eng' peetuusyek tisap agoi kosulda peetuusyekwok che kitabaananenok, amu ibei peetuusyek tisap katabaaneng'wong'." 
Leviticus8:34 Tuguuk che kageyai rani, ko uu nooto kagong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor keyai, si keyai tisiisyet agobo okweek." 
Leviticus8:35 Otebee kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin peetuusyek tisap, peet ak kemoi oriibe katigonutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si mobegu amu ko uu nooto, ko kaging'ata.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Ki yai anyun Aron ak weeriikyik tuguuk tugul che ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun Musa. 
Leviticus9:1 Eng' peetuutap sisiit, koguur `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik kobooto poisyegap Israel," 
Leviticus9:2 ak koleenji Aron, “Kweri kirgit ne ming'in ne libwoop koek kagoochinetap tengekto ak mengit ne libwoop koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak igoite eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus9:3 Ng'alaalji piigap Israel ileenji, ‘Okweri kwesta koek kagoochinet ne po tengekto, moita ak aarwetap keechiir che ma siirei kenyiit agenge tuwai ak ko che libwoben kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei," 
Leviticus9:4 kirgit ak mengit kobunji kagoochinoigap kaalyeet che kienyei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kagoochinetap peek che kagiburukto mwaita amu mong'jinok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani.’ ”" 
Leviticus9:5 Kiget icheek chooto ki kang'at Musa kobwa taitap emait ne kituiyechin, ak ki pwa tuiyet komugul koriik ak kotononso eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus9:6 Ki mwa Musa kole, “Ni kiit ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole oyai, si komong'jok liilindanyi.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Ki leenji `Musa Aron, “Ui kaptisisyet ak igoite kagoochineng'ung' ne po tengekto, kagoochineng'ung' ne kibeelei, ak iyachigei tisiisyet ak iyachi piik ak icheek. Igoite kagoochinet ne po piik ak iyai tisiisyet agobo icheek, ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Ki wo Aron kaptisisyet ak koeeny moita ne po kagoochinetap tengekto ne nenyi. 
Leviticus9:9 Ki igoochi weeriikyik ineeendet korotiik. Ki irookta mornennyi korotiik ak koiilate kuinoigap kaptisisyet, ak kotumji korotiik che ng'etunotiin kaptisisyet keel." 
Leviticus9:10 Ki peel mwanik kobooto soromok, ak kwambelelyet ne mi kooet ne po kagoochinetap tengekto eng' kaptisisyet, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Ki peel eng' ma panyeek ak muito eng' saang'utap nganaseet. 
Leviticus9:12 Yeityo koeeny kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak ki ip weeriikyik korotiik koba ole mi Aron, ak ki isote kaptisyet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus9:13 Ki ipchi `icheek ineendet kagoochinet ne kibeelei, kogoitoi eng' kebeberwek kobooto metit ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus9:14 Ki iun tuguugap moo ak keelyek, ak kobeel eng' paragutap kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus9:15 Ki igoito kora Aron kagoochinetap piik, ak ki kweri kwesta ne po kagoochinetap tengekto ne po piik. Ki eeny ak kogoito agobo tengekto ko uu ni kabo tai." 
Leviticus9:16 Ki ip kagoochinet ne kibeelei, kogoito ko uu ye ki king'at." 
Leviticus9:17 Ki ip kagoochinetap peek, komugut konyi euut ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyonooto kobooto kagoochinet ne kibeelei karon agine." 
Leviticus9:18 Ki eeny kirgit kobooto mengit, ak tiseiywotap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet che po piik. Ki ip weeriigap Aron korotiik kogoochi ineendet ak ki ise kaptisisyet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus9:19 Ago mwanigap kirgit ak che po mengit; che po saruryennyi, che ki ilaach moet ak soromok, ak che po kwambelelyet ne po kooet;" 
Leviticus9:20 ki igonoor `icheek mwanichooto tagatok, ak ki peel Aron eng' kaptisisyet." 
Leviticus9:21 Ki ongoi `Aron tagatok ak chaatit ne po komostap tai koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki ng'at Musa." 
Leviticus9:22 Ki iito Aron eunekyik kotokyi ole mi piik ak koberuur icheek, yeityo kochoorgei ko kagogoito kagoochinetap tengekto, kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet." 
Leviticus9:23 Ki pa Musa ak Aron emait ne kituiyechin, yeityo komong' ak koberuur piik, ak komong'ji liilindap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik tugul." 
Leviticus9:24 Ak ki mong' maat kobunu taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kobeel kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak mwanik eng' kaptisisyet. Ye kingo keer piik tugul, kowokyo eng' poiboiyet, ak kobutyo kot kotiiny togoochikwak ng'wony." 
Leviticus10:1 King'etyo anyun weeriigap Aron, Nadap ak Abiu, konam chii tugul tereennyi ak konde maat oriit, yeityo konde oriit nyamdutik che kibeelei; ak ki igoito icheek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maat ne teer ne ki ma ng'at ineendet." 
Leviticus10:2 Ki mong' anyun maat ne ki pun taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kobeel icheek, ak ki pek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus10:3 Ki leenji Musa anyun Aron, “Ni kiit ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Eng' icheek che riikyino aegu ne tiliil, ak eng' taitap piik tugul anyooru toroornatet.’ ” Ak ki siis Aron." 
Leviticus10:4 Ki kuur anyun `Musa Mishael ak Elzaphan, weeriigap Uzziel chiitap ooreetap Aron, ak koleenji, “Obwa oriigu, osut tupchosyekwok komanda eng' ole-tiliil koba saang'utap nganaseet.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Ki pwa anyun pichooto ak kosut icheek, kotinyei ngoroikwak che kooen koba saang'utap nganaseet, ko uu ye ki kamwa Musa." 
Leviticus10:6 Ki leenji `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik, Eleazar ak Ithamar, “Amat oyat metowekwok ak amogereer ngoroikwok, si obegu ak konereekyi ineendet tuiyet komugul. Ago ingoriiryo tupchosyekwok, koot komugul ne po Israel amu maat ne kagoyook Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus10:7 Amomande eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, si obegu; amu otinye okweek mwaitap kailset ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ak ki yai icheek ko uu ki mwa Musa." 
Leviticus10:8 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron koleenji," 
Leviticus10:9 “Amat iee divain anan maiyo alak tugul inyee ak weeriiguk ye obendi emait ne kituiyechin, si mobegu. Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' ibinwekwok tugul." 
Leviticus10:10 Obeesye anyun che itabaanatiin ak che ma itabaanatiin, che ng'woneen ak che tiliileen." 
Leviticus10:11 Oneet piigap Israel ng'atuutik tugul che ki komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' Musa.” 
Leviticus10:12 Ki leenji `Musa Aron ak weeriikyik che ki ng'et, Eleazar ak Ithamar, “Oip kagoochinetap peek che kang'etune kagoochinoik che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kobun maat, ak oam koma kinde mermereek eng' ole neegitee kaptisisyet, amu tiliileen miising'." 
Leviticus10:13 Oame eng' ole-tiliil, amu kebebertang'ung' niito ak weeriiguk, eng' kagoochinoik che punei maat che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki king'ata ko uu nooto." 
Leviticus10:14 Ago omuuchi oam inyee ak weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk eng' komosta ne tiliil tagateet ne kiongoi ak chaatit ne kinamjin parak; amu kagigonnin chooto koek kebebertang'ung' ak lagoguk eng' tiseiywegap kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet eng' piigap Israel. 
Leviticus10:15 Ibu `icheek chaatit ne kinamjin parak ak tagateet ne kiongoi kobooto kagoochinoik che punei maat che po mwanik ak koongoi koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, yeityo kobunjiin ak weeriiguk koek ng'atuutyet ne wendi agoi koigeny, ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Ki cheeng' anyun Musa miising' ng'orooryet ne po kagoochinetap tengekto, ak ki nai kole kiga kebeel! Ki nereekyi `Eleazar ak Ithamar weeriigap Aron che ki ng'et, ak koteebe icheek koleenji," 
Leviticus10:17 “Amu nee si moam kagoochinetap tengekto eng' ole-tiliil? Amu tiliil miising' kot; kagogoonok ineendet nooto koip tengektap tuiyet, si koyai kagaigaet agobo icheek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus10:18 Ko uu ye ma ki ip korotiikyik kobwa ole itabaanat oriit, kaganyol anyun oam eng' ole-tiliil oriit ko uu ye kagang'atak.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Ak ki leenji `Aron Musa, “Keero, kabwa rani nyoo kogoitoi kagoochinennywa ne po tengekto ak kagoochinennywa ne kibeelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kagobwanjo anyun tugun che uu chu. Nda kagaam kagoochinetap tengekto rani, ko tos, kata myee nooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Ak ye kingo kas Musa nooto, komyeeit eng' ineendet." 
Leviticus11:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji: 
Leviticus11:2 “Omwachi piigap Israel oleenji: Chu tyong'ik che oame eng' tyong'ik tugul che miitei ng'wony. 
Leviticus11:3 Oame age tugul ne pcheotin siyok ak ko petotin komyee ak che itari paroi. 
Leviticus11:4 Ago moame chu eng' icheek che itari paroi anan eng' icheek che pcheotin siyok: tambeesik, amu itari paroi ago ma pcheotin siyok; ng'waan eng' okweek nooto." 
Leviticus11:5 Keneryet, amu itari paroi ago ma pcheotin siyok; ng'waan eng' okweek nooto." 
Leviticus11:6 Kiplengwet, amu itari paroi ago ma pcheotin siyok; ng'waan eng' okweek nooto." 
Leviticus11:7 Tooreet, amu pcheotin siyok ak ko petotin, ago ma itari paroi; ng'waan eng' okweek nooto." 
Leviticus11:8 Amat oam panyeekwak, amat otwaa ne kome eng' tyong'ichooto; ng'woneen eng' okweek chooto.”" 
Leviticus11:9 “Omuuchi oam age tugul ne tinyei kebebaik ak peerik eng' tugul che mi peek, ngo eng' nyanjosyek anan ko ainoosyek." 
Leviticus11:10 Ago tugul che ma tinyei kebebaik ak peerik eng' nyanjosyek anan ainoosyek, eng' tugul che pendote peek ak tyong'in tugul che saptos eng' peek, chooto ko che kiwechei eng' okweek." 
Leviticus11:11 Ingoek chooto che kiwechei eng' okweek, mat oam panyeekwak ak che kabek eng' tyong'ichooto ko egu che kiwechei." 
Leviticus11:12 Age tugul ne ma tinyei kebebaik ak peerik eng' peek, ko egu nooto ne kiwechei eng' okweek." 
Leviticus11:13 “Chu eng' toriitik che ma ki amei ak che kiwechei: kipsiichit, motonda, chelogomyet," 
Leviticus11:14 chesirereet, keeret ak che kergei ak chooto;" 
Leviticus11:15 chepkugit age tugul ak che kergei; 
Leviticus11:16 tyondap songolik, sugurut; toriityon ne leel ne po nyanjet, ak keeret age ak che kergei," 
Leviticus11:17 sugurut ne ming'in, toriityon ne po nyanjet, sugurut ne oo," 
Leviticus11:18 sugurut ne tinyei kuinoik, chebo kibabaa, chepsengwet," 
Leviticus11:19 kong'onyot, ak alak che kergei ak chelogomyet, chesululit ak reresyet." 
Leviticus11:20 “Egu che kiwechei eng' okweek chooto tugul che tinyei kebebaik ak kong'onioti eng' ng'wony. 
Leviticus11:21 Ago omuuchi oam chu, eng' tyong'ik tugul che po kebebaik che pendote keelyek ang'wan: che tinyei keelyek che kooen che toroombene." 
Leviticus11:22 Eng' chooto tugul omuuchi oam chu: chereng'endet ak alak che po ooreennyi, talamwet ne kiguure kimekwan ak che po ooreennyi, keteryat ak che po ooreennyi, ak talamwet ak che po ooreennyi." 
Leviticus11:23 Ago egu che kiwechei eng' okweek alak tugul che tinyei kebebaik che ing'oniote keelyek ang'wan. 
Leviticus11:24 “Omurwoniitu eng' tuguuchooto; ak age tugul ne twaei poortap tyonyooto kagome ko murwoniitu agoi koimen. 
Leviticus11:25 Age tugul ne ibei kebebertap poortap tyonyooto kagome komwetei ngoroikyik ak ko murwoniitu agoi koimen. 
Leviticus11:26 Ng'waan eng' okweek tyony age tugul ne pcheotin siyok, ak koma petotin komyee, ak ne ma itari paroi, ak age tugul ne twaei chooto ko murwoniitu." 
Leviticus11:27 Alak tugul che pendote mugungonikwak, eng' tyong'ik tugul che pendote keelyek tugul ang'wan, ko ng'woneen chooto eng' okweek; age tugul ne twaei poortap tyonyooto kame ko murwoniitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus11:28 Ingomwet ngoroikyik ne ibei poortap tyonyooto kame, ko murwoniitu agoi koimen; ng'woneen chooto eng' okweek." 
Leviticus11:29 “Ng'woneen eng' okweek chu eng' che ichuutegei ng'wony: kungundo, muryat ne ming'in, ak ne kergei ak mororochet," 
Leviticus11:30 ne po ooreetap chepswererit, nyirityet, chebenetyet, kimng'elyegut ak pung'ung'wet." 
Leviticus11:31 Chuuto che ng'woneen eng' okweek eng' tugul che ichuutegei, age tugul ne twaei ne kagome eng' chooto ko murwoniitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus11:32 Ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne ibutyin ne kagome eng' chooto, ngo kiy age tugul ne ki kiyae keetiik, anan ngor, anan mui, anan kuniet, kiy age tugul ne kiboisyee; nyolu kirooch peek ak murwoniitu agoi koimen, yeityo anyun koanyinyak." 
Leviticus11:33 Ngo putyi age tugul eng' chooto tereetap ng'ung'unyek oriit, ko ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne mi oriit, ak nyolu otui teronooto." 
Leviticus11:34 Ng'woneegitu amitwogik alak tugul che kechobe peegap teronooto, ak ng'woneegitu tuguuk tugul che kiee che mi teronooto." 
Leviticus11:35 Ak kiy age tugul ne ibutyin kebebertap poorto ne po tyondo ne kagome ko ng'wanitu. Ngo kapkoimaut, anan tereenik, kituei chooto amu ng'woneen. Ng'woneegitu chooto eng' okweek." 
Leviticus11:36 Ago konda ne kutune peek anan keriinget ne mi peek ko tiliiliitu, ago ne twaei poortap tyondo ne kame ko murwoniitu." 
Leviticus11:37 Ngo putyi peny age tugul ne po tyonyooto kame kesweek che ki koolei, ko anyinyen." 
Leviticus11:38 Ago nginur keswechooto ak kobutyi peny age tugul ne po tyony ne kame, ko ng'wanitu eng' okweek." 
Leviticus11:39 “Ngo me tyony age tugul ne oame, ko ineendet ne twaei poortap tyonyooto ko murwoniitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus11:40 Ak ne amei panyeegap nooto kame ko ingomwet ngoroikyik ak murwoniitu agoi koimen. Ingomwet ngoroik ne ibei tyonyooto kame ak murwoon ineendet agoi koimen. 
Leviticus11:41 “Egu eng' okweek ne kiwechei kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony; ma ki amei. 
Leviticus11:42 Kiy age tugul ne ichuute moet ng'wony ak ne punei keelyek ang'wan, anan age tugul ne tinyei keelyek che chaang', chooto tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony ko moam amu kiwechei." 
Leviticus11:43 Among'wanitkei eng' kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony, amomurwongei eng' icheek si konamak murwoonindo." 
Leviticus11:44 Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', otabaangei anyun ak oegu che tiliileen amu aa tiliil. Amomurwongei eng' kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony." 
Leviticus11:45 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki amutwak otogosu omang'une emetap Misiri, aek Kamuktaindeng'wong'; otiliiliitu anyun amu aa tiliil.”" 
Leviticus11:46 Ni ng'atuutyet anyun agobo tyong'in, toriit, kiy age tugul ne sabei ne wendoti eng' pei ak kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony;" 
Leviticus11:47 si kobiit koobeesyo che ng'woneen ak che ma ng'woneen, che saptos che ki amei ak che saptos che ma ki amei." 
Leviticus12:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus12:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel ileenji: Ngo manach kwony age tugul ak kosich weeriit, komi eng' murwoonindo eng' peetuusyek tisap. Murwoniitu ko uu eng' peetuusyegap myandanyi ne po arawet age tugul." 
Leviticus12:3 Ak eng' peetuut ne po sisiit kimuratani iriryotap poortap weerooto. 
Leviticus12:4 Ingotebee kwonyooto korotiigap katiliilennyi peetuusyek sosom ak somok. Matwaei ineendet kiy age tugul ne itabaanat, ama mong'u ole-tiliil agoi kogeskei peetuusyek che kitiliile ineendet." 
Leviticus12:5 Ago ngo sich chepto, komurwoniitu peetuusyek taman ak ang'wan, ko uu eng' peetuusyegap myandanyi. Ak tebyei eng' korotiigap katiliilennyi peetuusyek tamanwogik lo ak lo." 
Leviticus12:6 “Ye kagogeskei peetuusyegap katiliilennyi, agobo weeriit, anan ko chepto, koipchi tisiindet eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin aarwetap keechiir ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak aarwetap toriit, anan cheptuget koek kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Leviticus12:7 Igoitoi ineendet chooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo kwonyooto, ak kitiliil amu pandap korotiikyik. Po ng'atuutyoni ineendet ne sigisyei, ngo kagisich weeriit, anan ko chepto." 
Leviticus12:8 “Ngo ma imuuchi koal kwonyooto aarwetap keechiir, konam anyun cheptugenik aeng', anan ko aarek aeng' che po toriitik, po age kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak po age kagoochinet ne po tengekto; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet, ak kotiliilit.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji," 
Leviticus13:2 “Ngoobwa iriryotap poortap chii, anan ngo piit moet ne kayaam, anan ole ibwanat ne uu ngosyat, ak koek koroito ne po mogondos eng' iriryotap poortanyi, kimut anyun kwo ole mi Aron tisiindet anan ko age eng' weeriikyik che tisiik." 
Leviticus13:3 Keerei tisiindonooto koroyooto miitei iriryotap poorto ak ngo kogowalak koroorik che mi koroyooto koleelagitu ak ngo kogororokto moanooto kwo oriit, ko kagoek koroito ne po mogondos. Ye kagogeer tisiindet komwaita anyun kole murwoon chiichooto." 
Leviticus13:4 Ago ngo leel ngosyat ne mi iriryotap poortanyi, ak ma lolondoot, ak ngo mawalak koroorikyik koleelagitu, kogerchi ui anyun tisiindet eng' peetuusyek tisap ineendet ne tinyei koroyooto." 
Leviticus13:5 Keerei tisiindet ineendet eng' peetuut ne po tisap, ngo keer kole ta ko uu yegonye koroyooto ak ma konenderi eng' iriryot, kogerchi ui anyun tisiindet ineendet peetuusyek tisap alak." 
Leviticus13:6 Keerei tisiindet ineendet kogeny eng' peetuut ne po tisap, ngo machei kola ak ma konenderi koroito eng' iriryot, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole kagotiliilit chiichi; kaagaa moet ne kayaam. Mwetei ineendet ngoroikyik, ak koek ne tiliil." 
Leviticus13:7 Ago ngo nender moet eng' iriryot ye kagoboorchigei tisiindet agobo katiliilennyi, konyolu koboorchigei tisiindet kogeny." 
Leviticus13:8 Keerei tisiindet, ak ngo keer kole kagonender moet eng' iriryot, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole murwoon ineendet; mogondos chuuto." 
Leviticus13:9 “Ye kagonam chii myandap mogondos, kimutyi ineendet anyun tisiindet." 
Leviticus13:10 Keerei anyun tisiindet, ak ngo leel ole ibwanat eng' iriryot ak kogowalak koroorik koleelagitu, ak kotook panyeek eng' ye koibwanat," 
Leviticus13:11 ko mogondos che ki koamei keny iriryotap poortanyi, komwaita tisiindet kole murwoon chiichito. Ma keerei tisiindet ineendet, amu murwoon." 
Leviticus13:12 Ngo mang'une mogondosaik ola tugul eng' iriryonnyi, ak koyom poorto tugul ne po ineendet ne tinyei koroito, kobooch metinnyi agoi keelyekyik, ne tee ne imuuchi kogeer tisiindet;" 
Leviticus13:13 kogeer anyun tisiindet, ngo kogoyom mogondosaik poortanyi tugul, komwaita anyun kole tiliil chiichito tinyei koroito, amu kogowalak poorto tugul koleelit, tiliil ineendet." 
Leviticus13:14 Ago ye katook panyeek ko uu yegonye, ko murwoon ineendet." 
Leviticus13:15 Keerei tisiindet panyechooto ak komwaita kole murwoon chiichito. Murwooneen panyeechooto taagu, amu niito ko mogondos." 
Leviticus13:16 Ago ngo walak panyeek kogeny koleelagitu, konyo ineendet anyun ole mi tisiindet;" 
Leviticus13:17 ak kogeer tisiindet ineendet, ak ngo kagowalak koroito koleelit, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole tiliil ineendet ne tinyei koroito. Tiliil anyun ineendet." 
Leviticus13:18 “Ngo pitunee iriryotap poorto ondiryet, ne kiga kosap," 
Leviticus13:19 ak ngo pitunee ole kami ondiryet kibwondo ne leel, anan ngosyat ne taagu ne leel ne machei ko piriir, koboorchi anyun tisiindet." 
Leviticus13:20 Keerei tisiindet, ngo keer kole lolondoot eng' poorto ak kowalak koroorikyik koleelagitu, komwaita tisiindet kole murwoon ineendet. Niito koroito ne po mogondos ne kogomang'une ondiryet." 
Leviticus13:21 Ago ngo keer tisiindet kole ma mi koroorik che leelach, ama lolondoot eng' iriryot, ago ma taagu miising', kogerchi ui anyun tisiindet ineendet peetuusyek tisap." 
Leviticus13:22 Ngo nenderi eng' iriryot, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole murwoon ineendet; amu korot ne ya niito." 
Leviticus13:23 Ago ngo matesak ngosiandanooto konender, ko kaagaa perutyetap ondiryet; komwaita tisiindet kole tiliil ineendet." 
Leviticus13:24 “Anan ye tinyei chii ole kalal eng' iriryot ak kotook panyeekyik eng' olooto kalal, ak koigei yooto ngosyat ne leel ne piriir anan ko ne leel," 
Leviticus13:25 kogeer anyun tisiindet kioto. Ngo kogowalak koroorik koleelagitu ak ko lolondoot, ko mogondos nooto ne kogomang'une ole kolal. Mwaitoi anyun tisiindet kole murwoon ineendet, amu koroito ne po mogondos niito." 
Leviticus13:26 Ago ngo keer tisiindet kole ma mi koroorik che leelach ngosiandanooto ak ma lolondoot eng' iriryot ak ma taagu miising', kogerchi ui anyun tisiindet ineendet peetuusyek tisap." 
Leviticus13:27 Ak kogeer tisiindet ineendet kogeny eng' peetuut ne po tisap, ak ngo nenderi eng' iriryot, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole murwoon chiichito, amu niito koroito ne po mogondos." 
Leviticus13:28 Ago ngo matesak ngosiandanooto konender eng' iriryot, ama taagu miising', ko kabwanetap ole kolal, ak komwaita anyun tisiindet kole tiliil chiichi, amu niito ko perutyet kityo eng' ole kolal." 
Leviticus13:29 “Ye tinyei mureno anan kobogoryo koroito eng' metit anan ko eng' tamnet," 
Leviticus13:30 kogeer anyun tisiindet koroyooto. Ak ngo keer ko lolondoot eng' iriryot, ak miitei korooryet ne talelyo ak ko tenden, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole murwoon chiichi; moet niito ne uu kacheet, mogondos ne po metit anan ko tamnet." 
Leviticus13:31 Ago ngo keer tisiindet moanooto uu kacheet kole ma lolondoot eng' iriryot, ama mi koroorik che tuuen, kogerchi ui anyun tisiindet peetuusyek tisap ineendet ne tinyei koroyooto yaamei." 
Leviticus13:32 Ak kogeer tisiindet koroyooto eng' peetuut ne po tisap, ngo ma tesoksei moanooto, ama mi koroorik che talelyonen, ak ngo ma lolondoot moanooto eng' iriryot," 
Leviticus13:33 kicherchi anyun metit, ago ma icheru ineendet ole mi kacheet. Keerei tisiindet eng' peetuusyek alak tisap chiichooto tinyei kacheet," 
Leviticus13:34 ak eng' peetuut ne po tisap kogeer tisiindet moanooto. Ngo ma tesoksei moet eng' iriryot, ama lolondoot eng' yooto, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole tiliil ineendet. Ak komwet ngoroikyik, ak kotiliilit." 
Leviticus13:35 Ago ngo tesak moet eng' iriryot ko kagobata katiliilennyi," 
Leviticus13:36 kogeer anyun tisiindet ineendet. Ngo tesoksei moet eng' iriryot, koma cheeng'ei anyun tisiindet koroorik che talelyonen, amu murwoon ineendet." 
Leviticus13:37 Ago ngo keer kole ma tesoksei kachaanooto ak kooro kole kogobityo koroorik che tuuen eng' yooto, kagosap kioto, kagotiliilok ineendet; ak komwaita tisiindet kole tiliil ineendet." 
Leviticus13:38 “Ye tinyei mureno anan kobogoryo ole ibwanat ne uu ngosenik eng' iriryotap poortanyi, ngosen che leelach," 
Leviticus13:39 kogeer anyun tisiindet, ak ngo ma leelachen miising' ngosenichooto eng' iriryotap poorwekwak; ko kaagaa tisonok kityo che komang'une iriryot; tiliil anyun ineendet." 
Leviticus13:40 “Ngo pek suumeek eng' metitap chii, ko chii ne po poosto, ko tiliil ineendet." 
Leviticus13:41 Ak ngo pek suumeek eng' met ole po togoch, kotinyei poosto eng' togoch, ko tiliil ineendet." 
Leviticus13:42 Ago ngo miitei myando ne ibooru leelindo ne piriir eng' poosto anan eng' togoch, nooto ko mogondosaik che komang'une poostonyi anan ko togeennyi." 
Leviticus13:43 Kogeer anyun tisiindet ineendet, ak ngo leel ne piriir myando ne ibwanat eng' poostonyi, anan ko eng' togeennyi, ko uu ye taagu mogondosaik eng' iriryotap poorto," 
Leviticus13:44 ko ineendet ko chii ne po mogondos ak ko murwoon. Mwaitoi anyun tisiindet kole murwoon chiichi, amu mi koroto metinnyi." 
Leviticus13:45 “Ilachei ne tinyei mogondosaik ngoroik che kibetak, ak kiyaatei metinnyi, tuchei kutit ye po parak ak koboloti kowachei koleen, ‘Aa ng'waan, aa ng'waan!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Murwoniitu ineendet peetuusyek tugul kotee koamei myanooto. Meng'iisyei ineegei; meng'ootennyi ko saang'utap nganaseet. 
Leviticus13:47 “Kiboorchin tisiindet ngoryeet ne mi koroitap mogondosaik, ngo po ngoryonooto koroorigap keechiirek, anan ngo po katanit," 
Leviticus13:48 anan ngo mitune usiisyek che ki kitoor anan che ki kimur, che po katanit, anan ngo che po koroorigap keechiirek, ngo magateet, anan eng' kiy age tugul ne kiyae magateet," 
Leviticus13:49 ngo machei konyaliil anan ngo machei kobiriir koroyooto eng' ngoryeet, anan eng' magateet, anan eng' usiisyek che ki kitoore anan che ki kimure, anan eng' kiy age tugul ne ki kiyae magateet; niito ko koroito ne po mogondos." 
Leviticus13:50 Ak kogeer tisiindet koroyooto, ak kogonor kioto tinyei koroito eng' peetuusyek tisap." 
Leviticus13:51 Keerei koroyooto eng' peetuut ne po tisap, ak ngo nenderi koroito eng' ngoryeet, ngo mitune usiisyek che ki kitoore anan che ki kimure, anan eng' magateet ne kiboisyee eng' kiy age tugul, ko mogondosaik che ng'emisyei; ng'waan kioto." 
Leviticus13:52 Peelei ngoryonooto anyun eng' ma, ngo po usiisyek che ki kitoor anan che ki kimur, ngo che po koroorigap keechiirek anan ngo che po katanit, anan kiy age tugul ne po magateet, ne tinyei koroito, amu nooto ko mogondosaik che ng'emisyei." 
Leviticus13:53 “Ngo keer tisiindet kole ma tesaksei koroyooto eng' ngoryeet, ngo eng' usiisyek che ki kitoor anan che ki kimur, anan eng' kiy age tugul ne po magateet," 
Leviticus13:54 kong'at anyun tisiindet kole kemwet kioto tinyei koroito, ak kogonor kioto eng' peetuusyek tisap alak," 
Leviticus13:55 ak kogeer tisiindet, ko kagiundo koroyooto. Ak ngo mawalak koroyooto eng' saleiywekyik, amainenderi koroyooto, ko ng'waan anyun; ibeel eng' ma. Ng'emindet nooto, ngo mitune churateet oriit anan saang'." 
Leviticus13:56 “Ak ngo keer tisiindet kole ma kotaagu komyee koroyooto ko kagemwet, kogereer ole mi koroyooto koisto eng' ngoryeet anan eng' magateet anan eng' usiisyek che ki kitoore anan che ki kimure;" 
Leviticus13:57 ak ngo ta ko taagu eng' ngoryeet, eng' usiisyek che ki kitoore anan che ki kimure, anan eng' kiy age tugul ne po magateet, ko koroito ne inenderi, ibeelei anyun kioto tinyei koroito eng' ma." 
Leviticus13:58 Ago ngo kogobagaakta koroito ngoryeet, ngo ne po usiisyek che ki kitoor anan che ki kimur, anan kiy age tugul ne po magateet ne imwete, kemwet anyun ne po aeng', ak ko tiliilit.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Ni ng'atuutyet ne po koroitap mogondosaik ne mi ngoryeetap koroorigap keechiirek anan ko ne po katanit, anan eng' usiisyek che ki kitoore anan che ki kimure, anan eng' kiy age tugul ne po magateet, komwaita anyun kole tiliil, anan komwaita kole ng'waan." 
Leviticus14:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus14:2 “Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po chiito ne tinyei mogondosaik eng' peetuut ne po katiliilennyi. Kimutyin ineendet tisiindet," 
Leviticus14:3 mandoi tisiindet eng' nganaseet ak kogeer ineendet. Ngo kogosap koroitap mogondosaik eng' chiichooto komyani," 
Leviticus14:4 kong'at anyun tisiindet keip toriitik aeng' che tiliileen che saptos agobo ineendet ne kitiliili, kobooto keetitap taragonik, ngoryeet ne piriir ak husop." 
Leviticus14:5 Ak kong'at tisiindet kole kobar toriityon age eng' tereet ne po ng'ung'unyek, eng' paragutap peek che rootei." 
Leviticus14:6 Namei tisiindet toriityon ne sabei ak keetitap taragonik, ngoryeet ne piriir ak husop, ak korooch chooto tugul kobooto toriityon ne sabei, korotiigap toriityanooto kagibar eng' paragutap peek che rootei." 
Leviticus14:7 Ak koisee ineendet ne kitiliili eng' mogondosaik konyil tisap, ak komwaita kole tiliil. Yeityo kounda toriityanooto sabei kwo kewanin." 
Leviticus14:8 Mwetei ngoroikyik anyun chiichooto kitiliili, ak konem suumeekyik tugul, yeityo kouungei eng' peek, ak kotiliilit. Ye ibata nooto konyo nganaseet oriit, ak kotebee saang'utap emainnyi peetuusyek tisap." 
Leviticus14:9 Eng' peetuutap tisap konem suumeekyik tugul eng' metinnyi ak tamnennyi ak koroorigap koonyek. Inemu agot koroorikyik tugul, ak komwet ngoroikyik, ak kouungei, ak kotiliilit ineendet." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ak konam eng' peetuut ne po sisiit aarek aeng' che mengichik che libwoben, ak aarwetap keechiir, subeendo ne libwoop, ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, ak kebebertap somok ne po litaiyat che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul, koek kagoochinetap peek, che ki kiburukto mwaita, ak taabeet ne ming'in ne po mwaita." 
Leviticus14:11 Igoitoi tisiindet ne itiliili ineendet, chiichooto kitiliili ak tuguuchooto, eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus14:12 Ak konam tisiindet mengit agenge eng' areechooto po keechiir, kogoito koek kagoochinetap chalwokto, kobooto taabeet ne ming'in ne po mwaita, koongoi tuguuchooto koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus14:13 Enyei anyun mengoto ming'in eng' komosta ne kieng'e kagoochinetap tengekto ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei, eng' ole-tiliil. Amu ko uu ye punjin kagoochinetap tengekto tisiindet, ko uu nooto punjin ineendet kagoochinetap chalwokto; kogoochinet nooto ne Tiliil miising' kosiir." 
Leviticus14:14 Namei tisiindet korotiik alak eng' che po kagoochinetap chalwokto, ak konde walitap itit ne po tai ne po ineendet ne kitiliili, ak eng' mornet ne oo ne po eutap tai, ak eng' mornet ne oo ne po keldanyi ne po tai." 
Leviticus14:15 Yeityo konem tisiindet mwanik alak che mi taabeet, ak koroong'ji rubeitap eunnyi ne po kaataam," 
Leviticus14:16 ak korooch tisiindet mornennyi ne po tai mwaata mi eunnyi ne po kaataam, ak koisisye mwaata eng' mornennyi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyil tisap." 
Leviticus14:17 Ak mwaita ne kang'etune eutap tisiindet konde walitap itit ne po tai ne po ineendet ne kitiliili, ak eng' mornet ne oo ne po eunnyi ne po tai, ak eng' mornet ne oo ne po keldanyi ne po tai, eng' paragutap korotiigap kagoochinet ne po chalwokto." 
Leviticus14:18 Yeityo koroong'ji mwaita ne kang'etune euut metitap ineendet ne kitiliili, ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus14:19 Igoitoi tisiindet kagoochinetap tengekto, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo ineendet ne kitiliili amu murwoonindanyi. Ye ibata koeny kagoochinet ne kibeelei," 
Leviticus14:20 ak kogoito kagoochinetap peek eng' kaptisisyet, ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet, ak kotiliilit." 
Leviticus14:21 “Ago ngo kibanania, amaimuuchi konyoor che yamegei ak kioto, kokweri anyun mengit agenge ne ming'in koek kagoochinet ne po chalwokto ne kiongoi, si koyai kagaigaet agobo ineendet, ak kiloit agenge ne po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che kagiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek, ak taabeet ne ming'in ne po mwaita." 
Leviticus14:22 Ibu kora cheptugenik aeng', anan aarek aeng' che po toriitik, ko uu ye imuuchi konyoor, ak kobunji age kagoochinetap tengekto, kobunji age kagoochinet ne kibeelei." 
Leviticus14:23 Ingoipchi ineendet tisiindet tuguuchooto eng' peetuut ne po sisiit, kobunji katiliilennyi, eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus14:24 Ak konam tisiindet aarwetap keechiir ne po kagoochinetap chalwokto, ak taabeetap mwaita, ak koongoi chooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi." 
Leviticus14:25 Yeityo koeny arwanooto po kagoochinetap chalwokto, ak ingoip tisiindet alak eng' korotiigap kagoochinetap chalwokto, ak konde walitap itit ne po tai ne po ineendet ne kitiliili, ak eng' mornet ne oo ne po eunnyi ne po tai, ak eng' mornet ne po keldanyi ne po tai." 
Leviticus14:26 Ak koroong'ji tisiindet mwanik alak rubeitap eunnyi ne po kaataam," 
Leviticus14:27 ak koisisye eng' mornennyi ne po tai mwanik alak che mi eunnyi ne po kaataam konyil tisap eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Leviticus14:28 Ak konde tisiindet mwanichooto alak che mi eunnyi, walitap ititap tai ne po ineendet ne kitiliili, ak eng' mornet ne oo ne po eunnyi ne po tai, ak eng' mornet ne oo ne po keldanyi ne po tai, eng' paragutap korotiigap kagoochinet ne po chalwokto." 
Leviticus14:29 Yeityo koroong'ji tisiindet mwanik che kang'etune eunnyi, metitap ineendet ne kitiliili, si koyai kagaigaet agobo ineendet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus14:30 Ye ibata kogoito agenge eng' cheptugenik, anan aarwet agenge ne po toriitik, ko uu ye imuuchi konyoor;" 
Leviticus14:31 agot ko uu ye imuuchi konyoor, kobunji age kagoochinetap tengekto, ak kobunji age kagoochinet ne kibeelei, kobooto kagoochinetap peek. Yae tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet ne kitiliili eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus14:32 Niito ng'atuutyet ne po ineendet ne miitei koroitap mogondosaik oriitinnyi, ne ma imuuchi konyoor che yamei kitiliile.”" 
Leviticus14:33 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron, koleenji," 
Leviticus14:34 “Ye oit emetap Kanaan, ne agoonok kobunjook, ak ande koroitap mogondos koot age eng' emet ne punjinok," 
Leviticus14:35 konyo anyun chiitap koyooto konyo komwachi tisiindet, koleenji miitei koroito koot." 
Leviticus14:36 Kong'at anyun tisiindet kimaanda tuguuk tugul eng' ko, kotomo kwo ko tisiindet kogeer koroyooto, si mang'woneegitu tuguuk tugul che mi koyooto. Yeityo anyun kwo ko tisiindet kogeerot koot." 
Leviticus14:37 Keerei koroito, ngot komi koroito inatusyegap koot, ak ngo mitoti kelongonik che machei ko nyalileen ak che machei ko piriireen, ak ngo lolondootin kosiir tooteet," 
Leviticus14:38 komanda anyun tisiindet eng' koyooto agoi kurgat ak koger koyooto peetuusyek tisap. 
Leviticus14:39 Ak konyo tisiindet kogeny eng' peetuut ne po tisap, nyoo kogeer, ak ngo keer ko tesoksei koroyooto eng' inatusyegap koot," 
Leviticus14:40 kong'at anyun tisiindet, kicher koik che tinyei koroito, ak kewiirchi komosta ne ya eng' saang'utap nganaseet." 
Leviticus14:41 Ng'atei ineendet keng'oing'oi koot komoswek tugul eng' koot oriit, ak kotumji pichooto taartaarik che king'oing'oe koyooto saang'utap nganaseet komosta ne ya." 
Leviticus14:42 Yeityo koip koik alak, konde ole kami koik chugai, ak konam ineendet taartaarik alak, komale koot." 
Leviticus14:43 “Ngo mong' koroito kogeny kotook eng' koot, ko kagoip koik koba saang', ak ko kagong'oing'oi ineendet koot, ak ko kagemal," 
Leviticus14:44 konyo anyun tisiindet ko konyo kogeer, ak ngo katesak koroito eng' koot, ko mogondosaik che ng'emisyei eng' ko; ng'waan anyun koyooto." 
Leviticus14:45 Ingobut koyooto, koikyik, ak keetiikyik, ak taartaarik tugul che po koyooto, ak koip chooto koba komosta ne ya eng' saang'utap nganaseet." 
Leviticus14:46 Ak kogeny, ngwo chii koyooto kota ko kerat koot, kong'wanitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus14:47 Mwetei ngoroikyik ne karu koyooto ak ineendet ne kaamisye koyooto. 
Leviticus14:48 “Ago ngwo ko tisiindet ak kogeer ko matesak koroito eng' koyooto ko kagemal, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, tiliil koot, amu kagosap koot eng' koroyooto." 
Leviticus14:49 Asi ki anyiny koyooto, konamei anyun ineendet toriitik aeng', keetitap taragonik, ngoryeet ne piriir ak husop." 
Leviticus14:50 Parei toriityon age eng' tereetap ng'ung'unyek eng' paragutap peek che rootei," 
Leviticus14:51 ak konam keetitap taragonik, husop, ngoryeet ne piriir, kobooto toriityon ne sabei, ak korooch tuguuchooto korotiigap toriityon ne kagebar, ak eng' peek che rootei, ak koisee koot konyil tisap." 
Leviticus14:52 Ianyinyi anyun koot eng' korotiik che po toriityanooto, eng' peechooto rootei, eng' toriityanooto sabei, eng' keetitap taragonik, eng' husop ak eng' ngoryeet ne piriir." 
Leviticus14:53 Ago ingounda anyun toriityon ne sabei kotiriren komanda eng' nganaseet kwo kewanin. Yaei anyun ko uu nooto kagaigaet agobo koot, ak kotiliilit.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Ni ng'atuutyet ne po koroito age tugul ne po mogondosaik, ne po kacheet," 
Leviticus14:55 ne po ngoryeet ne tinyei mogondosaik, ak ne po koot," 
Leviticus14:56 ole ibwansei, ole yaamaat moet ak ole ibwanat ne uu ngosyat;" 
Leviticus14:57 si kenae ye murwonen ak ye tiliileen. Niito ng'atuutyetap mogondosaik. 
Leviticus15:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron, koleenji," 
Leviticus15:2 “Omwachi piigap Israel, oleenji, Ye tinyei chii kusereet eng' poortanyi, komurwoniit anyun amu kuseroonooto." 
Leviticus15:3 Ak ni murwoonindanyi ne po kuseroonooto: agot ngomandoi tuguuchooto eng' poortanyi anan ngo kerak, ko murwoonindanyi nooto." 
Leviticus15:4 Ng'wanitu itoogut age tugul ne rue ineendet ne tinyei kusereet, ak ko ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne tebee." 
Leviticus15:5 Ak mwetei chii age tugul ngoryennyi ne twaei itogunnyi, ak kouungei eng' peek, ak murwoniitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:6 Mwetei ngoroikyik, ak kouungei eng' peek ineendet ne tebee kiy age tugul ne katebee chiichooto tinyei kusereet, ak komurwoniit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:7 Mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne twaei poortap chiichooto tinyei kusereet, ak kouungei eng' peek, ak komurwoniitu ineendet agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:8 Ak ngo ng'utyi ne tinyei kuseroonooto chiito ne tiliil; komwetei anyun ngoroikyik, ak kouungei eng' peek, ak komurwoniit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:9 Ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne ki itoi, si kotebee chiichooto tinyei kuseroonooto." 
Leviticus15:10 Ago murwoniitu agoi koimen chii age tugul ne twaei kiy age tugul ne mi ole tebee. Ak mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne ibei tuguuchooto, ak kouungei eng' peek, ak komurwoniit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:11 Mwetei ngoroikyik chii age tugul ne katwa nooto ne tinyei kuseroonooto, ago katomo koun eunekyik, ak kouungei, ak komurwoniit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:12 Ak kituei tereet ne ki kiyai eng' ng'ung'unyek ne katwa chiichooto tinyei kusereet, ak kiuuni eng' peek kiit age tugul ne ki kiyae keetit." 
Leviticus15:13 “Ye sap chiichooto eng' myanooto po kusereet, koiityigei peetuusyek tisap che po kaanyinyennyi, ak komwet ngoroikyik, ak koun poortanyi eng' peek che rootei, ak kotiliilit." 
Leviticus15:14 Ak kocheeng'jigei eng' peetuut ne po sisiit cheptugenik aeng', anan aarek aeng' che po toriitik, ak konyo taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, kwo kogoochi tisiindet," 
Leviticus15:15 ak kogoito tisiindet chooto kobunji age kagoochinetap tengekto, kobunji age kagoochinet ne kibeelei. Yae tisiindet kagaigaet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo ineendet amu kuserennyi." 
Leviticus15:16 “Ngo rwotito chii age tugul, ak komanda kesweegap iyoteet eng' poortanyi, kouungei anyun poorto tugul eng' peek, ak komurwoniit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:17 Ak kemwet ngoryeet age tugul, ak kiuun muito age tugul, ne katiiny keswechooto, ak komurwoniit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:18 Ak ngo tuiyogei muren ak kwony ak komaanda kesweegap iyoteet, konyolu kouungei icheek tuwai, ak komurwoniitu tuwai agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:19 “Ngo tyech ng'wony kobogoryondo, ak konai kole, kaagaa peetuunnyi ne po arawet, kotebee murwoonindanyi peetuusyek tisap; ak komurwoniit agoi koimen age tugul ne twaei ineendet." 
Leviticus15:20 Ak ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne syebei eng' murwoonindanyi, ak komurwoniit kiy age tugul ne tebee." 
Leviticus15:21 Kanyool anyun komwet ngoroikyik chii age tugul ne twaei itogunnyi, ak kouungei, ak komurwoniit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:22 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik chii age tugul ne twaei kiy age tugul ne katebee kobogoryondonooto, ak kouungei ak komurwoniit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:23 Ngo mi tuguuchooto itoogut, anan ko eng' kiy age tugul ne kateebe kobogoryondonooto, ye katwa ineendet kioto, komurwoniitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:24 Ngo ruiyo chii age tugul ak kobogoryondonooto, ak kotiiny ineendet simwegap kobogoryondonooto, komurwoniitu peetuusyek tisap chiichooto, ak kong'waniit itoogut age tugul ne karue." 
Leviticus15:25 “Ngo pwoonei korotiik eng' kobogoryot eng' peetuusyek che chaang' che ma eng' peetuusyek che kitabaane, anan ngo siir peetuusyek che po katabaanennyi kobwanei, ko peetuusyechooto tugul che pwoonei korotiik che po simwo eng' ineendet kogergeitu ak peetuusyek che kitabaani: murwoon ineendet." 
Leviticus15:26 Kergeitu itoogut age tugul ne rue eng' peetuusyek che mang'une korotiik ak itoogutap peetuusyegap katabaanennyi. Murwoniitu kiy age tugul ne tebee ko uu murwoonindap katabaanennyi. 
Leviticus15:27 Murwoniitu age tugul ne twaei tuguuchooto, ak mwetei ngoroikyik, ak kouungei, ak murwoniitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:28 Ago ngo kagogeskei mandaetap simwekyik, koiityigei anyun peetuusyek tisap, ak tiliiliitu ye kagobata chooto." 
Leviticus15:29 Eng' peetuut ne po sisiit konamjigei cheptugenik aeng', anan aarek aeng' che po cheptugenik, ak koipchi tisiindet, agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus15:30 Ak kogoito tisiindet age kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto, age kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu mandaetap simwekyik." 
Leviticus15:31 “Ara anyun otabaani piigap Israel ko uu nooto agobo simwekwak, si ma pek kotinyei simwo, ye imurwon koonnyu ne miitei kwenunnywa.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Po ng'atuutyoni ineendet ne tinyei kusereet, ak ineendet ne mandoe kesweegap iyoteet, ak murwoniitu amu nooto." 
Leviticus15:33 Po kora kobogoryot ne kitabaani amu simwekyik, muren ne tinyei kusereet, po muren, ak ko po kobogoryo, ak ko po ineendet ne ruitos ak kobogoryo ne ma tiliil." 
Leviticus16:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, ye kingo pata meetap weeriik aeng' che po Aron, ye kingo riikyi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Leviticus16:2 koleenji, “Mwachi Aron ng'eetap komet, si ma nyoonei atkai tugul ole-tiliil oriit ne po angeet ne ki kioiye koot, eng' taitap kerwetap rireenet ne mi moinget parak; si ma me. Amu among'u eng' pooldet eng' paragutap kerwetap rireenet." 
Leviticus16:3 Nyoonei Aron ole tiliil ak kirgit ne neran kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto, ak mengit kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei." 
Leviticus16:4 Ingolaach ngoryeet ne kooi ne itabaanat ne po katanit, ak ingolaach sulwalisyek che po katanit, ak korategei pireneet ne po katanit ak kilaakyi chepkulet ne po katanit: chooto ngoroik che itabaanatiin. Iuni poortanyi eng' peek, si kolaachi ngoroichooto." 
Leviticus16:5 Ak koget eng' tuiyetap piigap Israel kwesik aeng' kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto, ak mengit agenge kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei." 
Leviticus16:6 “Igoitoi Aron kirgit kai, ni ko po kagoochinetap tengekto, ne nenyi ineegei, ak koyachjigei kagaigaet, ak koonnyi." 
Leviticus16:7 Yeityo kokweri kwesichooto aeng', ak konde taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus16:8 Iseri Aron parbareek agobo kwesichooto aeng'; punjin age Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobunjin age Asasel." 
Leviticus16:9 Yeityo kogoito Aron kwesta ne kagobutyi parbaryat, kobunji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogoito koek kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Leviticus16:10 Ago kwesta ne kagobutyi parbaryat ne po Asasel, kinde taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosabei, si keyai kagaigaet agobo ineendet, si keonda kwo surkwen kobunji Asasel." 
Leviticus16:11 “Yeityo kogoito Aron eito ne po kagoochinetap tengekto, ne nenyi ineegei, ak koyachigei kagaigaet, ak koonnyi, ak koeny kirgooto po kagoochinetap tengekto ne nenyi ineegei." 
Leviticus16:12 Ak konem tereet ne nyiitaat ng'etetyot ne punu maatap kaptisisyet ne mi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ko nyiitaat eunekyik nyamdutik che ng'uu ne anyiny che ki kitui komengegitu, ak koip koba koot ne po oriit, ne ki kioiye angeet." 
Leviticus16:13 Indoi ineendet nyamdutik ma, eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit kotuch iyeto ne po nyamdutik kerwetap rireenet ne mi paragutap paornateet, si ma me." 
Leviticus16:14 Ak konem korotiik alak che po kirgooto, ak koisee eng' mornennyi kerwetap rireenet ole tokyingei kong'asiis; ak koisisye korotiik eng' taitap kerwetap rireenet eng' mornennyi konyil tisap." 
Leviticus16:15 “Yeityo koeny kwesta ne po kagoochinetap tengekto, ne po piik, ak koip korotiigap kweata koba koot ne po oriit ne ki kioiye angeet, ak koyachi korotichooto kiit ne koyachi korotiik che po kirgit, ak koisee kerwetap rireenet, ak taitap kerwetap rireenet." 
Leviticus16:16 Yaei anyun kagaigaet agobo ole-tiliil, amu murwoonindap piigap Israel, ak pistoennywa, agot tengekwogikwak tugul. Ak koyachi ko uu nooto emait ne kituiyechin, ne meng'iisyei kobooto icheek eng' kwenutap murwoonindanywa." 
Leviticus16:17 Amat kobiit chii ne mi emait ne kituiyechin, ye wendi tisiindet ineendet si koyai kagaigaet eng' ole-tiliil, agoi komong' saang', ko kagoyachigei kagaigaet, ak koonnyi, ak tuiyet komugul ne po Israel." 
Leviticus16:18 Yeityo komanda saang', kwo ole mi kaptisisyet ne mi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo nooto; ak konam korotiik alak che po kirgit, ak che po kwesta, koilee kuinoigap kaptisisyet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus16:19 Ak koisee korotiik kaptisisyet eng' mornennyi konyil tisap, ak koanyiny, ak kotiliil koistoe murwoonindap piigap Israel." 
Leviticus16:20 “Ye kagogees kagaigaetap ole-tiliil, ak emait ne kituiyechin, ak kaptisisyet, kogoito anyun kwesta ne sabei," 
Leviticus16:21 ak kogonoor Aron eunekyik tuwai metitap kweata sabei, kong'aany tengekwogik tugul che po piigap Israel, ak pistoennywa tugul, kong'ururi artanooto; ak kogesenji chooto metitap kweata, ak kogoochi chiito ne kagochopkei kokweri kwo surkwen;" 
Leviticus16:22 ak kogesen anyun kweata tengekwogikwak tugul koba emet ole ma menyei chii, ak kounda artet kwo eng' olooto po surkwen." 
Leviticus16:23 “Yeityo konyo Aron agoi emait ne kituiyechin, ak koreek ngoroigap katanit che kailaagoti ineendet si kowendi ole-tiliil, ak kobagaakta eng' olooto." 
Leviticus16:24 Ak kouungei eng' komosta ne tiliil, ak kolaach ngoroikyik, yeityo komong' saang', ak kogoito kagoochinennyi ne kibeelei ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po piik, ak koyachigei kagaigaet ak koyachi piik." 
Leviticus16:25 Peelei mwanik eng' kaptisisyet, che po kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Leviticus16:26 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne kweryei kwesta ne punjin Asasel, ak kouungei. Ye ibata konyo nganaseet oriit." 
Leviticus16:27 Ak keip koba saang'utap nganaseet kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto, ak ng'orooryet ne po kagoochinetap tengekto che kagiip korotiikwak si keyai kagaigaet eng' ole-tiliil, ak kobeel muiywekwak eng' ma, panyeekwak ak eiyannywa." 
Leviticus16:28 Mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne kabeelei tuguuchooto ak kouungei. Ye ibata, konyo nganaseet oriit." 
Leviticus16:29 “Ak punjin koigeny kaneetisyoni eng' okweek: oming'inge eng' arawetap tisap, eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawanooto, amat oyai poisyet age tugul, ineendet ne ki sikyin kaa, anan punootyot ne mi kobootok." 
Leviticus16:30 Amu kiyaiywok kagaigaet peetuunooto, kitiliilok, ak otiliiliitu anyun eng' tengekwogikwok eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus16:31 Peetuunooto ko sabato ne po kamuung'et eng' okweek, ak oming'inigei. Niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny." 
Leviticus16:32 Ak koyai kagaigaet tisiindet ne ki ili, ne kitoroorchin poisyetap tiliilindo, ne igeeri kwandanyi, ak kolaach ngoroigap katanit, ngoroichooto itabaanatiin," 
Leviticus16:33 Yae kagaigaet agobo koot ne tiliil, kagaigaet agobo emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisyet, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo tisiik ak piik tugul che po tuiyet." 
Leviticus16:34 Egu niito anyun ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' okweek, keyai kagaigaet agobo piigap Israel konyil agenge eng' kenyiit, amu tengekwogikwak tugul.” Ki yai anyun ineendet ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Leviticus17:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus17:2 “Mwachi Aron, weeriikyik ak lagok tugul che po Israel, ileenji, Ni ng'atuutyet ne kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole," 
Leviticus17:3 Chii age tugul ne po kootap Israel ne enyei kirgit, anan ne enyei aarwetap keechiir, anan ng'orooryet, eng' nganaseet, anan ne kagieng'ji saang'utap nganaseet," 
Leviticus17:4 ama ket konyo kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, si kogoito koek kagoochinet ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki ityin chiichooto korotiik. Kagotumda korotiik, ak king'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus17:5 Niito ko si kobiit koget piigap Israel tiseiywekwak che kata enyei eng' kewanin, kobwa ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, agoi ole mi tisiindet, ak koeny chooto koek tiseiywegap kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus17:6 Ak koisee tisiindet korotiik kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, ak kobeel mwanik koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus17:7 Si mata koeng'ji oik tiseiywekwak kogeny, che kocham kosuboti koibegei tugul. Egu ng'olyoondoni ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' icheek eng' ibinwekwak tugul." 
Leviticus17:8 “Ak ileenji icheek, Chii age tugul ne po kootap Israel, anan ne po punootik che mi kobooto icheek, ne igoitoi kagoochinet ne kibeelei anan tiseiywot,"
