Leviticus17:9 ama ket agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, si kobiit koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, king'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus17:10 “Ngo am korotiik alak tugul chii age tugul ne po kootap Israel, anan ne po punootik che tebyei kobootok, ko wechei togeennyu ineendet ne amei korotiik, ak ang'etoi ineendet eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus17:11 Amu mi saboondap poorto korotiik. Ki agoonok korotichooto oyachinegei kagaigaet eng' kaptisiisyo amu saboonwekwok. Amu korotiik che yaei kagaigaet agobo saboondo. 
Leviticus17:12 Ki amwachi anyun piigap Israel amu nooto aleenji, Amat koam chii eng' okweek korotiik, amat koam agine punootyot age tugul ne mi kobootok, korotichooto." 
Leviticus17:13 “Ngo par chii age tugul ne po piigap Israel, anan eng' punootik che mi kobooto icheek, tyony age tugul anan toriityon age tugul ne ki amei, kotumda korotiikyik, ak kotuge ng'ung'unyek." 
Leviticus17:14 Amu korotiik ko saboondo ne po poorto komugul, ak agenge korotiik ak saboondap poorto. Nooto anyun, ki aleenji piigap Israel, Amatata oam korotiik alak tugul che po poorto age tugul, amu saboondap poorto age tugul korotiikyik. King'etoi age tugul ne amei." 
Leviticus17:15 “Ak chii age tugul ne amei kiy ne kame ineegei, anan ne kabar tyong'ik kotonaton, ngo chii ne ki sikyin kaa anan punootyot, ingomwet anyun ngoroikyik, ak kouungei, ak komurwoniit agoi koimen; yeityo anyun koanyinyit." 
Leviticus17:16 Ago ngo ma mwet, anan ngo ma iungei, kotebee ineendet anyun tengektanyi.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus18:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenji, Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus18:3 Amat oyai tuguuk che kiyaei emetap Misiri, ole ki omenye, amat oyai poisyonigap emetap Kanaan, ole amutok ak amat obendate kaneetisyosyekwak." 
Leviticus18:4 Oyai kirwoogutikyuk ak oriip ng'atuutikyuk, obendate chooto. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus18:5 Oriip anyun ng'atuutikyuk ak kirwoogutikyuk: amu ngo yai chiito chooto, kosabei eng' chooto. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus18:6 “Amat koriikyi age tugul eng' okweek tilyennyi kong'aany aach ngorinnyi. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Leviticus18:7 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap kwandang'ung', oruiye ak kwondonyi, amu ineendet ko komet; amat ing'aany aach ngorinnyi." 
Leviticus18:8 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap osotyotap kwandang'ung'; amu nooto aach ngoritap kwandang'ung'. 
Leviticus18:9 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap chepkomet, cheptap kwandang'ung', anan cheptap kamenng'ung', ngo ki kisikyin kaa, anan olda age." 
Leviticus18:10 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap cheptap weeriing'ung', anan cheptap cheptong'ung'; amu aach ngorinnywa ko neng'ung'." 
Leviticus18:11 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap cheptap osotyotap kwandang'ung', ne ki sichei kwandang'ung', ineendet ko chepkomet." 
Leviticus18:12 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap isengeng'ung'; amu ineendet ko kwondo ne neegit ne tilya, ne po kwandang'ung'." 
Leviticus18:13 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap chepkametap kamenng'ung'; amu ineendet ko kwondo ne neegit ne tilya, ne po kamenng'ung'." 
Leviticus18:14 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap ng'eetap kametap kwandang'ung', amat iriikyi osotyonnyi; amu kamenng'ung'." 
Leviticus18:15 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap osotyotap weeriing'ung'; amu osotyotap weeriing'ung'; amat ing'aany aach ngorinnyi. 
Leviticus18:16 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap imbomurtang'ung'; amu aach ngoritap ng'eetap kamenng'ung'. 
Leviticus18:17 Amat ing'aany aach ngoritap kobogoryo ak cheptonyi; amemut cheptap weeriinnyi, anan cheptap cheptonyi sip ing'aany aach ngorinnyi; amu icheeget ko tiibiik che tilyonut che neegityin; sogornateet nooto." 
Leviticus18:18 Amat imutyige chepkametap osotyondeng'ung', si inyaar osotyondeng'ung', si ing'aany aach ngorinnyi, kobooto nin age kota kosabei." 
Leviticus18:19 “Amat iriikyi kobogoryo ing'aany aach ngorinnyi, kota kotinyei murwoonindap simwekyik che po arawet." 
Leviticus18:20 Amat oipkei ak osotyotap chiitap kokweng'ung', omurwongei ak ineendet." 
Leviticus18:21 “Amegoite iyoteng'ung' ibeelji Molek, ak amereeny kainetap Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus18:22 “Amoruiye ak muren ko uu ye ruitos chii ak osotyo; etan nooto. 
Leviticus18:23 Amoruiye ak tyony age tugul si imurwongei. Amat koruiyo kobogoryondo ak tyony; sogornat nooto. 
Leviticus18:24 “Amat omurwongei eng' alak tugul eng' chuuto, amu ki imurwonegei chuuto tugul pororyosyek che ki aoon eng' taing'wong'." 
Leviticus18:25 Ki komurwoniit emet ak aiityini tengekto amu nooto, ak ki ing'ung'da emet piikyik." 
Leviticus18:26 Ago oriip anyun ng'atuutikyuk ak kirwoogutikyuk amu nooto, amat oyai age tugul eng' tuguuchu samis; agot ne ki kisikyin kaa anan ne punootyo ne mi kobootok," 
Leviticus18:27 (amu ki yai piigap emoni chooto tugul samisen, che ki menyei olito keny, ak king'wanit emet)," 
Leviticus18:28 si ma ing'ung'dak ak okweek emet, ye omurwon, ko uu ye ki ing'ung'da pororyosyek che ki mi kotom oitu." 
Leviticus18:29 Amu king'etoi eng' piikwak chii age tugul ne yaei kiy age tugul eng' tuguuchu samis. 
Leviticus18:30 Oriip anyun katigonutikyuk amu nooto, si moyai age tugul eng' pitonwechu samis, che ki kiyaei kotom oitu, si momurwonegei chooto. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus19:2 “Mwachi tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel, ileenji, Oegu che tiliileen, amu aa tiliil anee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus19:3 Ingoiywei chii age tugul kamennyi, ak kwandanyi, ak oriip sabatosyekyuk. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus19:4 Amat omaste osup tuguuk che ma tilei kiy, amoyachigei kanamonik che po kariik che kitaanyi. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus19:5 “Ak ye ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywot ne po kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet, ogoite anyun si kobiit ketaachak." 
Leviticus19:6 Ki amei eng' peetuunooto ogoitoi, ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng', ak ngo ng'et kiy agoi peetuut ne po somok, kebeel anyun chooto eng' ma." 
Leviticus19:7 Egu kiit ne kiwechei ngot keam agot kitigin eng' peetuut ne po somok; ma kitaachei," 
Leviticus19:8 ak ibei tengektanyi chii age tugul ne amei, amu kareeny kioto tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. King'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus19:9 “Ye ogesisye eng' emeng'wong', ko mat iges igeesu luukwegap mbareeng'ung', amat iyumate turoonik." 
Leviticus19:10 Ak ameturote mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk, amat ikwei logoek che kagobutyi ng'wony; pagakyi chooto kibananook ak toek. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus19:11 “Amochoorse, amoberberisye, amomwachigei lembech." 
Leviticus19:12 Amoyosyechigei eng' kainennyu eng' lembech, agoi ireeny kainetap Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus19:13 “Amesastae chiitap kokweng'ung', anan irebe kiy. Amat inamdegei melektap otwogindet kot koeech." 
Leviticus19:14 Amat isas chii ne miing'at, amende kiy ne riichei piich taitap ne koraat, ago iywei Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus19:15 “Amat oyai ne ma po iman eng' kirwooget; ametiytiy kibananook anan igonyit che eecheen; ago irwookyi chiitap kokweng'ung' eng' imanda. 
Leviticus19:16 Amewe komosi ak komosi ichaamate piiguk. Ameuny ne kabar chiitap kokweng'ung'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Leviticus19:17 “Amewech ne otupche eng' muguleldang'ung', kergong' iman chiitap kokweng'ung', si ma namin tengekto amu ineendet." 
Leviticus19:18 Ameyaakyi mugetuut anan isus ng'al agobo lagogap piiguk, ago cham chiitap kokweng'ung' ko uu ye ichamegei. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus19:19 “Oriip ng'atuutikyuk. Amengorie tuuga cheguuk alage che teer che ma tuuga. Amegol mbareeng'ung' kesweek aeng' che teerchiin. Amelaach ngoryeet ne ki kiyae usiisyek che teerchiin. 
Leviticus19:20 “Age tugul ne ruitos ak chepto ne otwogindet, ne ki kiamji koito, ne tomo kityaach anan kechamji kwo, kirwookyin tuwai. Ma kibarei, amu ki tomo kityaach chebooto." 
Leviticus19:21 Ago ketu chiichooto kagoochinennyi ne po chalwokto konyo ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, egu mengit nooto, ne kagoochinetap chalwokto." 
Leviticus19:22 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ineendet, kobooto mengoto po kagoochinetap chalwokto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai; ak kenyochigaat amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai." 
Leviticus19:23 “Ye oit emonooto ak ye kaomiin keetiik alak tugul che kiamei, oiit anyun logoekwak ole etaatin; egu eng' okweek che eetaatin eng' kenyiisyek somok; ma ki amei." 
Leviticus19:24 Ago ki anyinyi logoekwak tugul eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan, si kobiit kilasune Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus19:25 Ak oam logoekwak eng' kenyiit ne po muut, si kobiit koiiywok logoek alak. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus19:26 “Amat oam kiy age tugul kobooto korotiikyik. Amoboisyee ponisyet anan ong'oorse. 
Leviticus19:27 Amobior metowekwok, ameng'em tabanwegap tamneng'ung'." 
Leviticus19:28 Amotil poorwekwok agobo piik che pegu, amobeel saremik alak tugul. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus19:29 “Amegoite cheptong'ung' koyait koek chepkugonio, si ma isup emet kugoinatet ak konyi emet tengekto." 
Leviticus19:30 Oriip sabatosyekyuk, ak ogonyit koonnyu ne tiliil. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus19:31 “Amobe ye mi che poisyee oik anan pooniik; amocheeng'ate, si ma ing'wanitak. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus19:32 “Tononji ne tinyei kalwalek ak igonyit poiyo, ak iywei Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus19:33 “Ameyachi ne ya toondet ne mi kobooten eng' emeng'wong'. 
Leviticus19:34 Igeitu toondet ne meng'iisyei kobootok ak ne kisikyin kaa, cham ineendet ko uu ye ichamegei; amu ki oo toek eng' emetap Misiri. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus19:35 “Amoyai ne ma po iman eng' kirwooget anan ye okwai eng' koindo, anan ye ogere eng' nyigiisindo, anan eng' karogutik che po tuguuk che pei." 
Leviticus19:36 Oboisyee kerutik che aechin ak koik che kigerisye eng' nyigiisindo che po iman: epah ak hin che po iman. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne ki amutwak omang'une emetap Misiri. 
Leviticus19:37 Kanyool anyun osup ng'atuutikyuk tugul ak kirwoogutikyuk tugul, ak oyai. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus20:2 “Ileenji piigap Israel, Chii age tugul ne igoochin lagokyik Molek, ngo age eng' piigap Israel anan age eng' punootik che meng'iisyei eng' Israel, kebarei chiichooto iman. Lachei piigap emet eng' koik." 
Leviticus20:3 Wechei togeennyu chiichooto ak ang'etoi eng' piikyik; amu koigoochi ineendet lagokyik Molek si komurwon koonnyu ne tiliil, ak koreeny kainennyu ne tiliil." 
Leviticus20:4 Ak ngo yaigei piigap emet ko uu yo ma keer chiichooto, kouny, ye kagogoito lagokyik kogoochi Molek, ama kobar," 
Leviticus20:5 eng' yooto anyun aboorchi chiichooto nereegegap togeennyu ak piigap koonnyi. Ak ang'etoi ineendet eng' piikwak, ak tugul che isubi koyaei ibeetapkei kobooto ineendet, che yaei ibeetapkei ak Molek." 
Leviticus20:6 “Aboorchini nereegegap togeennyu chiito ne mastoi kosubi ne poisyee oik ak pooniik, ne isubi koyaei ibeetapkei kobooto icheek, ak ang'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus20:7 Otabaange anyun, oegu che tiliileen; amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus20:8 Oriip ng'atuutikyuk ak oyai. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atabaanok. 
Leviticus20:9 Amu kibarei chii age tugul ne sasei kwan anan kamet. Amu kasas kwandanyi ak kamennyi, ko tebee ineendet korotiikyik." 
Leviticus20:10 “Chiito ne ibegei ak osotyotap chiito age, agot ne ibegei ak osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi, kebarei iman chiichooto ak osotyondonooto." 
Leviticus20:11 Chiito ne ruitos ak osotyotap kwandanyi, ko kang'aany aach ngoritap kwandanyi; kibarei iman tuwai, ak tebee korotiikwak icheek." 
Leviticus20:12 Ngo ruiyo chii ak osotyotap weeriinnyi, kebarei iman tuwai. Kagoyai ng'emisyet; tebee korotiikwak icheek." 
Leviticus20:13 Ngo ruiyo mureno ak muren, ko uu ye ruitos ak kobogorisyek, kagoyai tuwai kiit ne samis. Kibarei iman, ak tebee icheek korotiikwak." 
Leviticus20:14 Ngo tun chii chepto kobooto kamet, ko sogornateet nooto. Kibeelei icheeget eng' maat, chiichooto ak chuun aeng', si ma piitune ng'oogisto kwenung'wong'." 
Leviticus20:15 Ngo ruiyo chii ak tyony, kebarei iman chiichooto, ak obar tyonyooto agine." 
Leviticus20:16 Ngo riikyi kobogoryondo tyony age tugul ak koruiyo tuwai, kebarei anyun kobogoryondonooto ak tyonyooto, ak tebee korotiikwak icheek." 
Leviticus20:17 “Ngomut chii chepkamet, cheptap kwandanyi, anan cheptap kamet, ak kogeer aach ngorinnyi, ak kogeer chebooto aach ngoritap murenonooto ko teweernateet nooto. King'etoi icheek tuwai eng' taitap lagogap piikwak, amu kagong'aany aach ngoritap chepkamet, ak ibei ineendet tengektanyi." 
Leviticus20:18 Ngo ruiyo chii ak kobogoryo ne katyech ng'wony, ak kong'aany poortanyi, ko kagong'aany ole rootune korotiik ak kang'aany agine kobogoryondonooto ole rootune korotiikyik. King'etoi icheek tuwai eng' piikwak." 
Leviticus20:19 Amat ing'aany poortap chepkametap kamenng'ung', anan isengeng'ung', amu kagong'aany poortap tilyonutik che neegit. Ibei icheek tengektonywa." 
Leviticus20:20 Ngo ruiyo chii ak osotyotap imamet ko kagong'aany poortap imamet. Ibei icheek tengektonywa; pegu ama sich lagok. 
Leviticus20:21 Ngo ipkei chii ak osotyotap ng'eetap kamet ko murwoonindo nooto; kagong'aany poortap ng'eetap kamet. Pegu ama sich lagok. 
Leviticus20:22 “Oriip anyun ng'atuutikyuk tugul amu nooto, ak kirwoogutikyuk tugul, ak oyai, si ma ing'ung'dak emet ole amutok omeny." 
Leviticus20:23 Amobendate pitonwegap pororyet ne aoone eng' taing'wong'. Amu ki yai icheek tuguuchuuto tugul, ak ki awech anyun icheek amu nooto." 
Leviticus20:24 Ago ki amwaiwok aleenjok, ‘Onyabani emennywa, ak agoonok kobunjook emonooto nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo.’ Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ne ki atabaanenak pororyosyek." 
Leviticus20:25 Obeesye anyun tyong'ik che anyiny ak che ng'woneen, ak toriitik che anyiny ak che ng'woneen. Amogoochi saboonwekwok koek che kiwechei amu tyong'ik anan toriitik, anan kiy age tugul ne wendote ng'wony, che kitabaanenak amu ng'woneen." 
Leviticus20:26 Oegu che tiliileen eng' anee, amu aa tiliil anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki atabaanenak pororyosyek, si oegu chechuuk." 
Leviticus20:27 “Kibarei iman ne poisyee oik, ne muren anan ne kwony, anan chii ne poonin. Kilachei icheek eng' koik, ak tebee korotiikwak icheek.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Mwachi tisiik weeriigap Aron, ileenji icheek, Amat komurwongei chii eng' chii ne kame eng' piikyik," 
Leviticus21:2 kobatee eng' tilyonutikyik che neegit, kamet, kwandanyi, weeriinnyi, cheptonyi, ng'eetap kamet," 
Leviticus21:3 ak eng' chepkamet ne pergeiya, ne po tilyet ne neegit ne tomo kotun chii, imuuchi komurwongei amu chepkamet." 
Leviticus21:4 Amat komurwongei, amu ineendet ko chiito ne tagunoot eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus21:5 Amat kocher metowekwak anan tabanwegap tamnokwak, anan kotilatil poorwekwak." 
Leviticus21:6 Egu che tiliileen eng' Kamuktaindennywa, amat koreeny kainetap Kamuktaindennywa. Amu igoitoi icheek kagoochinoik che punei maat, che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, chooto amitwogigap Kamuktaindennywa. Egu anyun icheek che tiliileen amu nooto." 
Leviticus21:7 Amat kotun chepkugonio anan ne murwoon. Amat kotun osotyot ne ki oon manong'otyondennyi, amu tiliil ineendet eng' Kamuktaindennyi." 
Leviticus21:8 Itiliil ineendet anyun amu nooto, amu ineendet ne igoitoi amitwogigap Kamuktaindeng'ung'; ingotiliilit anyun ineendet eng' inyee, amu anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atiliilok, ko aa tiliil." 
Leviticus21:9 Ak ngo murwongei cheptap tisiindet age tugul, komurwongei ineegei eng' kugoinatet, ko kagomurwon kwandanyi, kebeelei eng' ma." 
Leviticus21:10 “Ineendet ne tisiindet ne oo eng' che tupcho, ne ki kiroong'ji mwaita ne ki ilse metinnyi ne ki kitabaan kolaach ngoroik, ko mat koyaat metinnyi, anan kogereer ngoroikyik." 
Leviticus21:11 Amat kwo ole miitei muusto, anan komurwongei amu kwan anan kamet." 
Leviticus21:12 Amat komanda eng' ole-tiliil anan komurwon ole-tiliil ne po Kamuktaindennyi, amu mi metinnyi mwaitap katabaanet ne ki ilse ne po Kamuktaindennyi. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus21:13 Ingotun anyun chepto ne pergeiya. 
Leviticus21:14 Amat kotun kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot anan ne kigeon, anan kobogoryo ne murwoon, anan chepkugonio. Ago ingotun pergeiyat eng' piikyik," 
Leviticus21:15 amat konyerat iyotennyi eng' piikyik. Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atiliilii ineendet.” 
Leviticus21:16 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus21:17 “Mwachi Aron ileenji, amat koriikta koipchi Kamuktaindennyi amitwogikyik, chii age tugul eng' iyoteng'ung' ne ma libwoop, eng' ibinwekwak tugul." 
Leviticus21:18 Amu ma riiktoi chii age tugul ne ma libwoop, ne koraat, ne ing'wali, anan ne tinyei serut ne lebel, anan ne ki kotesak kiy age tugul eng' poortanyi," 
Leviticus21:19 anan ne ki il keeldo, anan ne ki il euut," 
Leviticus21:20 anan ne kibalbut, anan ne kiring'ak poortanyi, anan ne tinyei teta eng' konda, anan ne tinyei kochek, anan ne tinyei mook che ki koyaamyo, anan ne ki koyesyo kitikyik." 
Leviticus21:21 Amat koriikta chii ne ma libwoop ne po lagogap Aron tisiindet, kwo kogoito kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che punei maat, amu ma libwoop, ma riigu nyoo kogoitoi amitwogigap Kamuktaindennyi." 
Leviticus21:22 Amei ineendet amitwogigap Kamuktaindennyi chooto tiliileen miising' ak eng' chooto tiliileen. 
Leviticus21:23 Ago ma wendi ineendet angeet oriit ne ki kioiye koot, anan koriikyi kapkorosuut, amu ma libwoop; si mat komurwon oldinwekyuk che tiliileen, amu anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atabaani oldinwechooto.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Ki mwachi anyun Musa ko uu nooto Aron ak weeriikyik ak piigap Israel tugul. 
Leviticus22:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus22:2 “Ileenji Aron ak weeriikyik, kotabaanegei tuguuk che tiliileen che po piigap Israel, che itabaanwa, si ma reeny kainennyu ne tiliil. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus22:3 Ileenji, King'etoi eng' tainnyu chii age tugul ne po iyoteng'wong' tugul eng' ibinekwok tugul, ne riikyin tuguuk che tiliileen, che itabaanjin piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotinyei murwoonindanyi. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus22:4 Amat koam tuguuk che tiliileen chii age tugul eng' lagogap Aron ne tinyei mogondos, anan ne tinyei ole mandae tugun, agoi kotiliilit. Age tugul ne twaei ne kigonyoor simwo amu muusto, anan chiito ne mandae kesweegap iyoteet," 
Leviticus22:5 anan age tugul ne twaei ne ichuutegei ng'wony, ne ing'waniti chii, anan chii ne imuuchi kong'waniit ineendet, eng' murwoonindo age tugul ne tinyei," 
Leviticus22:6 ng'wanitu agoi koimen ne twaei age eng' chooto, ak ma amei tuguuk che tiliileen ngot ko tomo kouungei." 
Leviticus22:7 Ye karorokto asiis, koanyinyit, ak yeityo koam tuguuk che tiliileen, amu amitwogichooto." 
Leviticus22:8 Amat koam panyeegap tyong'ik che pegu icheegei, anan che tonatoni tyong'ik, si mat kong'wanitkei eng' chooto. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus22:9 Riibei anyun katigonutikyuk, si ma nam icheek tengektap tuguuchooto, ak kobekyi tuguuchooto ngo reeny. Anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atabaani icheek." 
Leviticus22:10 “Ma amei kipsagarin age tugul tuguuk che tiliileen. Ma amei punootyot ne po tisiindet, anan otwogindet ne nyooru melekto," 
Leviticus22:11 ago ngo al tisiindet chii, koale silingisyekyik, koamei nooto tuguuchooto, ak che kisikyin koonnyi, amei chooto amitwogikyik." 
Leviticus22:12 Ngo tun cheptap tisiindet kipsagarin, koma amei chebooto kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak, ne po tuguuk che tiliileen." 
Leviticus22:13 Ago ngo kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot cheptap tisiindet, anan ngo ki oon manong'otyot, ama sich lakwa, ak koweektagei kootap kwandanyi, ko uu ye kita koming'in, koamei ineendet amitwogigap kwandanyi. Ago ma amei toondet age tugul chooto." 
Leviticus22:14 Ak ngo am chii age tugul tuguuk che tiliileen koma nai, kotesyin chooto anyun kebebertap muut, ak kogoochi tisiindet kioto tiliil." 
Leviticus22:15 Amat koreeny tisiik tuguuk che tiliileen che po piigap Israel, che igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor;" 
Leviticus22:16 si konyoor ng'oogisto; ye amei tuguukwak che tiliileen. Amu anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atiliilii icheek.” 
Leviticus22:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus22:18 “Mwachi Aron ak weeriikyik ak piigap Israel tugul, ileenji icheek, Age tugul ne po kootap Israel, anan che punootik eng' Israel, ne igoitoi kagoochinennyi, ngo po kagoochinonooto age tugul eng' arorutikwak, anan ko age tugul eng' kagoochinoikwak che po chamyet ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei," 
Leviticus22:19 si kobiit ketaachak, ogoitoi kagoochinet ne kirgit ne libwoop eng' tuuga, anan eng' keechiirek, anan eng' ng'oroorek." 
Leviticus22:20 Ago amat ogoite ne ma libwoop, amu ma kitaachei nooto agobo okweek." 
Leviticus22:21 Ak chii age tugul ne igoitoi tiseiywot ne po kagoochinoigap kaalyeet kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit koyai kosulda nooto ne kiga koaror, anan kagoochinetap chamyet ne po tuuga, anan ko ne po keechiirek, kanyool koek ne ititaat si kobiit ketaach; ne ma piitune perutyet age tugul." 
Leviticus22:22 Amat ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne koraat, anan ne kigoil, anan ne kigonyoor peruut, anan ne rootei tugun, anan ne tinyei kochek, anan ne tinyei kacheet, amoyai koek kagoochinet ne punei maat eng' kaptisisyet, keele kigoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chooto." 
Leviticus22:23 Imuuchi igoite koek kagoochinetap chamyet kirgit anan aarwetap keechiir ne tinyei tuguuk che uu kunduenik, anan kebeberta ne ma mi eng' poortanyi; ago ma kitaachei ngo po kiit ne ki kiaror." 
Leviticus22:24 Amat ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki kibir kitik, anan ne ki kitui, anan ne kigong'etyo, anan ne ki kitil; amat oyai ko uu nooto eng' emeng'wong'." 
Leviticus22:25 Amotaach eng' eutap kipsagarin amitwogigap Kamuktaindeng'wong', alak tugul eng' chuuto, ole si ogoite. Amu mi ng'emisyennywa icheek, tinyei perutik, ma kitaachei chooto agobo okweek.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus22:27 “Ye kagii kirgit, anan keechiiryet, anan ng'orooryet, kotebyei ak kamet peetuusyek tisap, ak eng' peetuut ne po sisiit ak kwo tai, ketaachei koek kagoochinet ne punei ma ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus22:28 Ago amat oeny teta ne rooryat anan keechiiryet ne kotoy, kobooto moitanyi anan arwennyi peetuunak." 
Leviticus22:29 Ak ye oeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywotap kongoi, oeng'ji si kobiit ketaachak." 
Leviticus22:30 Ki amei eng' peetuunooto, motuuch kiy kot koeekyi. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus22:31 “Ara oriip anyun ng'atuutikyuk amu nooto ak oyai. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Leviticus22:32 Amoreeny kainennyu ne tiliil, ago kitabaana eng' piigap Israel. Anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atabaanok," 
Leviticus22:33 ne ki amutwak omang'une emetap Misiri, si aek Kamuktaindeng'wong'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus23:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Igorwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki king'at keele omwaite koek kayumosyegapkei che itabaanatiin, chooto igoorwekyuk che ki king'at." 
Leviticus23:3 Kiyaei poisyet peetuusyek lo, ago peetuutap tisap ko sabato ne kimuung'e; kayumetapkei ne itabaanat. Amat oyai poisyo age tugul, nooto ko sabato eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul." 
Leviticus23:4 “Chu igoorwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki king'at, kayumosyegapkei che itabaanatiin, che omwaitoi eng' peetuusyekwak che ki king'at.”" 
Leviticus23:5 “Eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawet ne po tai, eng' koskoleny, ko paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus23:6 Egu igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' peetuutap taman ak muut ne po arawanooto. Oame magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek peetuusyek tisap." 
Leviticus23:7 Egu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuut ne po tai; amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot. 
Leviticus23:8 Ago ogoite kagoochinet ne punei maat ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' peetuusyek tisap. Egu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuut ne po tisap; amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot eng' peetuunooto.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus23:10 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Ye oit emet ne agoonok, ak ogesisye eng' olooto, eng' yooto anyun oipchi tisiindet peek che togoanik che po kesisyeng'wong'." 
Leviticus23:11 Koongoi anyun ineendet peechooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit ketaach agobo okweek; ongoi tisiindet chooto eng' peetuut ne po aeng', ko kagobata sabato." 
Leviticus23:12 Ak eng' peetuunooto oongoi okweek peek, ogoite anyun mengit ne libwoop ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus23:13 Ak egu kagoochinennyi ne po peek kiloinik aeng' che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che kagiburukto mwaita, kagoochinet ne punei maat kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny. Ak egu kagoochinennyi ne kieei, divaik, che yamei litaiyat agenge." 
Leviticus23:14 Amat oam magatya anan peek che kigelei, anan mesiisek agoi koit peetuuniito, agoi oibu kagoochinet ne po Kamuktaindeng'wong'. Niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' ibinwekwok tugul eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul." 
Leviticus23:15 “Oiityigei kong'etee peetuut ne po aeng' ko kagobata sabato, kobooch peetuut ne kioibu peek che po kagoochinet ne kiongoi; egu sabatoisyek tisap che nyiitootiin." 
Leviticus23:16 Oiit peetuusyek konom agoi peetuut ne po aeng' ko kagobata sabato ne po tisap, ak ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne leel ne po peek." 
Leviticus23:17 Oibu eng' meng'otosyekwok magatiinik aeng' che kiongoi che kichoben kiloinik aeng' che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul, che kibeeldoi mermereek, koek tongoanik che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus23:18 Ak ogoite kobooto magatiinik aarek tisap che libwoben che po keechiir che ma siirei kenyiit agenge ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengichik aeng'. Egu kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooto kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei, kagoochinet ne punei maat, ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus23:19 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ak koek aarek aeng' che mengichik che ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji tiseiywotap kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet." 
Leviticus23:20 Ak koongoi tisiindet chooto kobooto magatiinik che po tongoanik koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooto mengichichooto aeng'. Tiliilitu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu tisiindet." 
Leviticus23:21 Oititen eng' peetuunooto; piitu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' okweek; amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot. Niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul eng' ibinwekwok tugul. 
Leviticus23:22 “Ye ogesisye eng' emeng'wong', ko mat iges igeesu luukwegap mbareeng'ung', anan iyumate turoonigap kesisyeng'ung'. Pagakyi kibananook ak che toek. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus23:24 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Egu kamuung'et eng' okweek, peetuut ne po tai eng' arawetap tisap, kabwaatet ne po kuutetap iryagook, kayumetapkei ne itabaanat." 
Leviticus23:25 Amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot ak ogoite kagoochinet ne punei maat kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” 
Leviticus23:26 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus23:27 “Ago egu peetuutap kagaigaet eng' peetuutap taman eng' arawaniito po tisap. Egu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' okweek, ne oming'inge, ak ogoite kagoochinet ne punei maat ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus23:28 Amat oyai poisyo age tugul eng' peetuunooto, amu peetuutap kagaigaet, si keyai kagaigaet amu okweek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus23:29 Amu chii age tugul ne ma iming'inegei eng' peetuunooto, king'etoi eng' piikyik." 
Leviticus23:30 Chii age tugul ne yaei poisyet age tugul eng' peetuunooto, ang'eme chiichooto aistoe piikyik." 
Leviticus23:31 Amat oyai poisyo age tugul. Niito ko ng'atuutyet eng' ibinwekwok tugul eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul. 
Leviticus23:32 Egu sabato ne po kamuung'et eng' okweek ak oming'inge. Oriip sabato neng'wong' peetuut ne po sogool ne po arawet, kobooch koskoleny agoi koskoleny.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus23:34 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Egu igoortap keryosyek peetuusyek tisap eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap taman ak muut ne po arawaniito po tisap." 
Leviticus23:35 Egu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuut ne po tai, amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot." 
Leviticus23:36 Ogoitoi kagoochinet ne punei maat, ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' peetuusyek tisap. Egu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' okweek eng' peetuut ne po sisiit, ak ogoitoi kagoochinet ne punei maat, ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tuiyet ne po kaming'inetapkei niito; amat oyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot." 
Leviticus23:37 “Chuuto igoorwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki king'at, che omwaitoi ole, kayumosyegapkei che itabaanatiin, si ogoite kagoochinet ne punei maat ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinet ne po peek, tiseiywot ak kagoochinoik che kieei; kigoitoi kagoochinet age tugul eng' peetuunnyi." 
Leviticus23:38 Konunoichu kosiirei che po sabatoisyek che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kosiirei kagoochinoikwok che ki oaroorte tugul ak kagoochinoikwok tugul che po chamyet, che ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus23:39 “Ago ye kaoyum ruroteetap emet eng' peetuutap taman ak muut, ne po arawetap tisap, oriip koek igoortap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tisap. Kitere kamuung'et eng' peetuut ne po tai ak kitere kamuung'et eng' peetuut ne po sisiit." 
Leviticus23:40 Obutyigei eng' peetuut ne po tai logoegap keetiik che korooron, mooriigap tiironigap sosik ak mooriigap keetiik che nyigiisen, ak keetiik che piityee kereruusyek, ak oboiboitu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' peetuusyek tisap." 
Leviticus23:41 Oriip nooto koek igoortap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tisap eng' kenyiit. Niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' ibinwekwok; oriip anyun igoorata eng' arawetap tisap. 
Leviticus23:42 Omenye keryosyek peetuusyek tisap, ak menyei keryosyechooto tugul che salu Israel," 
Leviticus23:43 si kobiit konai ibinwekwok che piitu let kole, ki agoochi piigap Israel komeny keryosyek, ye ki amutu icheek komang'une emetap Misiri. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Ki mwachi anyun Musa piigap Israel igoorwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki king'at. 
Leviticus24:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus24:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel koibun mwanigap mseituni che tiliileen che ki kitui agobo lapkeiyet, si kolaal tait kotugul." 
Leviticus24:3 Chobei Aron tait eng' saang'utap angeet ne ki kioiye koot, ne po paornateet, eng' emait ne kituiyechin, kong'etee koskoleny agoi karon kotugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' ibinwekwok tugul." 
Leviticus24:4 Chobei ineendet taisyek eng' keldap tait ne tiliil eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul. 
Leviticus24:5 “Inemu peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul kiloinik taman ak aeng' ak ibeel magatiinik taman ak aeng'. Yamei magatyat agenge kiloinik aeng'. 
Leviticus24:6 Ak itet koek ortinwek aeng', kobee lo lo, eng' meset ne tiliil eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus24:7 Ak inde ooreet age tugul tuguuk che tiliileen che nyamdut, si kobiit koek kabwaatet eng' magatinichooto, kagoochinet ne punei maat ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus24:8 Tetei ineendet kioto eng' sabato age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; nooto ko amu piigap Israel, koek kayomiset ne po koigeny." 
Leviticus24:9 Punjin Aron ak weeriikyik, ak amei eng' ole-tiliil, amu tiliil miising' eng' ineendet eng' kagoochinoik che punei maat che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Ki manda ye mi piigap Israel weeriitap kobogoryotap Israel, ne ki Misirindet kwandanyi, ak kiboryo weerooto po kobogoryotap Israel ak chiitap Israel eng' nganaseet," 
Leviticus24:11 ki sas ak kochup Kainet weerooto po kobogoryotap Israel. Ak ki imut `icheek ineendet kwo ole mi Musa. Ki kiguure kainetap kamet Selomit, cheptap Dibri, ne po ooreetap Dan." 
Leviticus24:12 Ak kiger `icheek ineendet, koganyis kot konai kiit ne punu kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo ineendet." 
Leviticus24:13 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus24:14 “Imoong'u ineendet ne kosasiis kwo saang'utap nganaseet; ak ingogonoor eunekwak metinnyi icheek tugul che kogasei kosasisyei, ak kolage koik tuiyet komugul ineendet." 
Leviticus24:15 Ak imwachi piigap Israel ileenji, Ibei tengektanyi age tugul ne sasei Kamuktaindennyi." 
Leviticus24:16 Ineendet ne chubei kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebarei iman. Lage koik iman tuiyet komugul chiichooto; ngo punootyo anan ne kisikyin kaa, kibarei ye kachup kainet." 
Leviticus24:17 Kibarei iman chii age tugul ne parei chiito age. 
Leviticus24:18 Igeeri age ineendet ne kabar ne po akweet; saboondo eng' saboondo. 
Leviticus24:19 Ngo nde chiito peruut chiitap kokwennyi, ko uu ye ki yai, kiyachin ineendet ko uu nooto;" 
Leviticus24:20 moet eng' moet, konda eng' konda, keldet eng' keldet. Ko uu ye kagonde chiito age perutyet, kigeerchin ko uu nooto agine." 
Leviticus24:21 Ineendet ne parei ne po akweet kogeeri age, ak kebarei chiito ne parei chii." 
Leviticus24:22 Egu agenge ng'atuutyeng'wong', kergeitu ne punootyo ak ne salwok. Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Ara ki ng'alaalji `Musa piigap Israel ak ki imut `icheek chiichooto kisasisyei kwo saang'utap nganaseet ak kelage ineendet koik. Ki yai anyun piigap Israel ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Leviticus25:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai koleenji," 
Leviticus25:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Ye oit emet ne agoonok, koriip anyun `emet sabato agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus25:3 Igoole mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk kenyiisyek lo, ak isabor keetiigap logoeguk eng' kenyiisyek lo, ak iyum ruratennyi kobwa kaa;" 
Leviticus25:4 ago egu sabato eng' kenyiit ne po tisap ne imuunyi emet, sabato ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amat igol mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk anan isabor keetiigap logoeguk." 
Leviticus25:5 Amat iges kolgeinik che po mbareeng'ung', amat ibut sabibuk che po keetiiguk che po logoek che ma kisabor. Ak egu kenyiit ne imuunyi emet." 
Leviticus25:6 Ago egu ruroteetap emet eng' sabatonooto amitwogikwok; cheguuk, po otwogindeng'ung', ak otwogindeng'ung' ne tye ak po otwogindet ne nyooru melekto ak punootyot ne mi kobooten," 
Leviticus25:7 ak ko po akweeng'ung' ak tyong'ik che mi emeng'ung', ruratennyi tugul amitwogikwak." 
Leviticus25:8 “Iityigei sabatoisyek tisap che po kenyiisyek, chooto ko kenyiisyek tisap konyil tisap, koek eng' inyee peetuusyegap sabatoisyek tisap che po kenyiisyek, chooto ko kenyiisyek artam ak sogool." 
Leviticus25:9 Yeityo iguut iryageet ne cheei miising', eng' peetuutap taman eng' arawetap tisap; oguute iryageet koyom emeng'wong' komugul eng' peetuutap kagaigaet." 
Leviticus25:10 Ak otabaan kenyiit ne po konom, ak omwaite eng' emet komugul katyagetap tugul che meng'iisyei. Egu jubilii eng' okweek. Wendi chii tugul ole ki nenyi, ak koweekyigei chii tugul oldap piikyik." 
Leviticus25:11 Egu jubilii eng' okweek kenyinooto po konom. Mogolse anan oges kolgeinik eng' olooto, amat obut logoegap keetiik che ma kisabor." 
Leviticus25:12 Amu jubilii, egu ne tiliil eng' okweek. Oame ruratennyi che punu mbar." 
Leviticus25:13 “Ak oweekyigei chii tugul ole ki nenyi eng' kenyini po jubilii. 
Leviticus25:14 Ngialdochi kiy chiitap kokweng'ung' anan ngial kiy eng' chiitap kokweng'ung', ko matoyachigei ne ya, okweegei eng' okweegei." 
Leviticus25:15 Iale chiitap kokweng'ung' ne yamegei ak koitetap kenyiisyek, ko kagobata jubilii, ak ingoaldaun che yamegei ak koitetap kenyiisyek che po kesisyet." 
Leviticus25:16 Itese alyennyi ko uu chaang'indap kenyiisyek ak ichuchuch alyennyi ko uu ng'ering'indap kenyiisyek, amu aldaun ne yamegei ak kesisyet." 
Leviticus25:17 Ago amoyachigei ne ya, okweegei eng' okweegei; ago iywei Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus25:18 “Amu nooto anyun, oriip ng'atuutikyuk ak oyai kirwoogutikyuk, si omeny emet eng' kaalyeet." 
Leviticus25:19 Ak kooi `emet logoek ak oam obiye, ak omeny olooto eng' kaalyeet." 
Leviticus25:20 Ak ngot ole, ‘Ki ame nee eng' kenyiitap tisap, Ogeero, ma ki koolsei, ama kigese tuguukyok?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Ang'ate anyun perurtanyu eng' okweek eng' kenyiit ne po lo, koruryo che yamei kenyiisyek somok." 
Leviticus25:22 Ye ogoolse eng' kenyiitap sisiit, oame logoek che konorotiin che po keny, agoi kenyiitap sogool, oame che po keny agoi koruryo kogeny." 
Leviticus25:23 “Ma ki aldoi emonooto agoi, amu nenyu emet; amu oo toek ak kiprutoinik kobooto eng' emonooto." 
Leviticus25:24 Ogoite katyaget ne po emet, eng' emeng'wong' komugul." 
Leviticus25:25 “Ngo ek panan ne otupche ak koalda kebebertap oldanyi, konyo anyun ne tilyennyi ne neegit, konyo kotyach nooto ki alda tupchennyi." 
Leviticus25:26 Ngo ma tinyei chiito chii ne ityaachi, ak ngoboor, ak kotinyei che yamei kotyagegei," 
Leviticus25:27 ingoiit anyun kenyiisyek kobooch ngap koalda, ak koweekyi chiito ne kiga aldochi, che kang'etune; yeityo koweekyigei olooto ki nenyi." 
Leviticus25:28 Ago ngo ma imuuch kotyakyigei, kotebee nooto eutap ineendet ne kiga al, agoi koit kenyiitap jubilii. Ak nyolu komaanda alindet koronooto eng' eunnyi eng' kenyinooto po jubilii ak kobunji chiichooto ki po." 
Leviticus25:29 “Ngo alda chii koot ne ki menyei ne mi nganaseet ne ki kiyieme irimeet, komuuchi kotyach eng' kenyiit ne isubi nooto ki aldae. Ki chamjin kotyach eng' kenyinooto komugul." 
Leviticus25:30 Ngo ma kityaach eng' kenyinooto komugul, kobunji koyooto miitei nganaseet ne ki king'ot, ineendet ne ki alei, agoi, eng' ibinwekyik tugul; ma kityaachi nooto eng' kenyiitap jubilii." 
Leviticus25:31 Ago ki iti kooriik che mi nganasook che ma kiyieme irimeet, kogergeit ak mbareenik che po emet. Kimuuchi kityaach chooto, mandoi chooto eng' kenyiitap jubilii." 
Leviticus25:32 Ago imuuchi Lawiik kotyach nganasookwak, ak kooriik che mi nganasook che chechwaak, eng' peetuut age tugul." 
Leviticus25:33 Ak ngo tyach chiito age ne po Lawiik, komandoi anyun koyooto ki kialda, kobooto nganaseet ne nenyi, eng' kenyiitap jubilii; amu chechwaget kooriik che mi nganasoogap Lawiik eng' kwenutap piigap Israel." 
Leviticus25:34 Ago amat kealda emet ole agete tuukwak che po nganasookwak, amu chechwaak agoi.”" 
Leviticus25:35 “Ngo ek kibanania tupcheng'ung' ama sich kiy ne toretegei, ko myee itoret anyun ineendet ak otebi tuwai ko uu toondet anan punootyot." 
Leviticus25:36 Amat image ineendet kelunet anan che tesatiin. Ago iywei Kamuktaindeng'ung', si kotebi tupcheng'ung' kobooten." 
Leviticus25:37 Amegoochi siling'isyeguk ile si inyoorunee che siirtoot, anan igoochi amitwogiguk ile si kotesak." 
Leviticus25:38 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ne ki amutwak omang'une emetap Misiri, si agoonok emetap Kanaan, ak aegu Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus25:39 “Ngo ek kibanania tupcheng'ung' ne mi kobooten, ak kochamdagei ial ineendet, ko megoochi ineendet kootin ko uu otwogin." 
Leviticus25:40 Ingotebi kobooten ko uu otwogindet ne nyooru melekto anan ko uu punootyot. Ak kootin agoi kenyiitap jubilii. 
Leviticus25:41 Yeityo anyun komanda eng' oldang'ung', ineendet kobooto lagokyik, ak koweekyigei oldap piigap ooreenywa, koweekyigei ole mi tuguugap kwanisyekyik." 
Leviticus25:42 Amu icheek ko otwogikyuk, che ki amutu komang'une emetap Misiri; ma ki aldoi anyun icheeget ko uu otwogik." 
Leviticus25:43 Amat ibou ineendet eng' kimnateet ne koroom, ago iywei Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Leviticus25:44 Ago eng' ng'olyootap otwogiguk che murenik ak che tiibiik, che ta inyooru, che po pororyosyek che kiyiemak, oale chooto." 
Leviticus25:45 Oale eng' lagogap punootik che meng'iisyei eng' kwenung'wong', ak eng' piikwak che mi kobootok che ki kisikyin emeng'wong', egu anyun icheek chekwoget." 
Leviticus25:46 Ak oyai chooto koek poroteetap lagokwok, che piitu let, si konam kobunji. Onyoorunee icheek otwogikwok agoi, ago amobou eng' kimnateet ne koroom tupchosyekwok, piigap Israel, okweegei eng' okweegei." 
Leviticus25:47 “Ngot koek mogoryo ne kipsagarin anan punootyo ne mi kobooten, ak konam pananda tupcheng'ung' ne mi kobooto ineendet, ak kochamdagei koal kipsagarindonooto anan punootyondonooto mi kobooten, anan ne salu kesweegap ooreet ne po chiichooto," 
Leviticus25:48 kimuuchi kityaach kogeny ye kagialda; imuuchi kotyach age eng' tupchosyekyik. 
Leviticus25:49 Imuuchi kotyach ineendet chiitap ooreennyi anan weeriitap ne po ooreennyi, anan tilyet age tugul ne neegit ne po ooreennyi, anan ngo ek mogoryo komuuchi kotyachkei." 
Leviticus25:50 Koiit tuwai kobooto chiichooto ki alei ineendet kobooch kenyiit ne ki aldaegei agoi kenyiitap jubilii. Ak kotenit che ki kialdae ineendet koitetap kenyiisyek; tebyei kobooto ineendet che yamegei ak peetuusyegap otwogindet ne nyooru melekto eng' otisyennyi. 
Leviticus25:51 Ngo ta komi kenyiisyek che chaang', koweekyi silingisyek che yamei katyagennyi eng' silingisyek che kiga kiale ineendet." 
Leviticus25:52 Ak ngo ta komi kenyiisyek che ng'ering' kityo si koit kenyiitap jubilii, koiit anyun tuwai, ak koweekyi silingisyek che yamei kenyiisyek che po katyagennyi." 
Leviticus25:53 Ngo tebi kobooto ineendet ko uu otwogindet ne nyooru melekto eng' kenyiit agoi kenyiit; amat koboi ineendet eng' kimnateet ne koroom eng' taing'ung'. 
Leviticus25:54 Ago ngo ma kityaach chiichooto eng' ortinwechooto, komanda anyun kwo eng' kenyiitap jubilii, ineendet kobooto lagokyik." 
Leviticus25:55 Amu otwogikyuk piigap Israel; icheeget otwogikyuk che ki amutu komang'une emetap Misiri. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'. 
Leviticus26:1 “Amat koyachigei tuguuk che ma tilei kiy, amat olumdochigei kanamwet ne ki kiwai, anan toloita, amat onde koita ne ki kiwai eng' emeng'wong', ogutung'ji. Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Leviticus26:2 Oriip sabatosyekyuk, ak ogonyit koonnyu ne tiliil. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus26:3 “Ngo pendate kaneetisyosyekyuk ak oriip ng'atuutikyuk, ak oyai," 
Leviticus26:4 agoonok anyun ropta eng' peetuusyekyik, ak koii emet, ak koii keetiigap mbar logoekwak." 
Leviticus26:5 Yamei kesuutik che obore, agoi koit ruroteetap keetiigap logoek, ak itei ruroteetap logoek koolset. Ak oam amitwogikwok kot obiye, ak omeny emeng'wong' eng' kaalyeet." 
Leviticus26:6 Ak agoonu kaalyeet eng' emet ak oruiye, ama piitu ne imuok. Abeeti tyong'ik eng' emeng'wong', ama punei emeng'wong' rotwetap chok." 
Leviticus26:7 Oone puunikwok ak kobutyo eng' taing'wong' eng' rotwetap chok. 
Leviticus26:8 Oonei piikwok muutu piik pogol, ak koon piikwok pogolu eliphuusyek taman. Ibutos eng' rotwetap chok eng' taing'wong' puunikwok." 
Leviticus26:9 Atokyinok agane togeennyu ak agoonok iyoteet, atesak ak agimiit kayomisennyu kobootok." 
Leviticus26:10 Oam anyun tuguuk che konorotiin che po keny, ak omoong'u che po keny si kobiit ole ondoi che ogese." 
Leviticus26:11 Ak ande koonnyu kwenung'wong', ama wechok saboondanyu." 
Leviticus26:12 Awendotee kwenung'wong' ak aegu Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak oegu piikyuk." 
Leviticus26:13 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ne ki amutwak omong'u eng' emetap Misiri, si mata oegu otwogikwak. Ak ki airii keetiigap choging'wong' ak ang'eetak obe komyee." 
Leviticus26:14 “Ago ngo mogasa iit, amoyai ng'atuutichooto tugul," 
Leviticus26:15 ak ngot oeesye kaneetisyosyekyuk, ak kowech saboonwekwok kirwoogutikyuk, kot ko moyai ng'atuutikyuk tugul, obut kayomisennyu," 
Leviticus26:16 ayaiywok ni agane: ang'ate kamuiset konyonjok, chebuonit ak eseet, che ng'emei koonyek, ak kogoochi saboondo kosagit. Ogoole kesweekwok puch, amu amei puunikwok." 
Leviticus26:17 Aboorwok nereegekyuk, ak kebaraak eng' taitap puunikwok. Poiywok che wechok, ak omwei ko maonok chii." 
Leviticus26:18 Ago ngo mogasa iit eng' tuguuchuuto, abirok anyun konyil tisap kosiir amu tengekwogikwok." 
Leviticus26:19 Airie anyun menoteetap kimnateng'ung', ak ayai kipsengwet neng'wong' koigei karnet ak koigei emeng'wong' sugunwet." 
Leviticus26:20 Oboisyee puch kimnateeng'wong', amu ma koonu emeng'wong' rurateet, ak ma iitos keetiigap emet logoekwak." 
Leviticus26:21 “Ngo testai oeesya, amogasa iit, aibwok korotwek konyil tisap kosiir, ko uu tengekwogikwok." 
Leviticus26:22 Ayoogu tyong'ik che po timiin kobwa kwenung'wong', che pwoonei korebenok lagokwok ak kobar tuukwok; ak koyaak ong'ering'itu ak koek kipkuberet ortinwekwok." 
Leviticus26:23 “Ngot ko amu kergong'yani komocham owekyogei, ago ngot otestai oeesya," 
Leviticus26:24 aeesyok anyun ak okweek ak abirok anyun aneendet konyil tisap amu tengekwogikwok. 
Leviticus26:25 Aibwok rotwetap chok ne yaakwok mugetuut ne po kayomiset. Ye oyumjigei nganasookwok, ayookwok koroito konyo kweng'wong' ak kindeak eunegap puunikwok." 
Leviticus26:26 Ye atil amitwogikwok kong'ering'itu, kobeel anyun kobogorisyek tamanu amitwogikwok eng' kapkoimaut agenge, ak kebimanwak amitwogikwok eng' ratilit. Oamisyei amobiyonyi." 
Leviticus26:27 “Ak ngo mogasa iit eng' tuguuchu tugul, ago otila let," 
Leviticus26:28 atilok let anyun eng' pandanyu eng' nereegek che pichiien, ak abirok agane konyil tisap amu tengekwogikwok." 
Leviticus26:29 Ak oam panyeegap poorwegap weeriikwok ak che po tiibiikwok. 
Leviticus26:30 Ang'eme awong'u komoswekwok che torooreen ak aluul kanamonikwok che po asiista, ak awirchi muuswekwok ole mi muuswegap kanamonikwok, ak kowechok saboondanyu." 
Leviticus26:31 Ayae nganasookwok koek karotwek, ak ayai oldinwekwok che tiliileen koek kipkuberet, ma achame kong'ucha anyinyindap nyamdutikwok." 
Leviticus26:32 Ak ayai emet koek surkwen ak kokwong'yo puunikwok che menyei olooto. 
Leviticus26:33 Ak aiyestochok pororyosyek alak, ak ang'usu rotwetap chok kosubok. Koguber anyun emeng'wong', ak koek karotwek nganasookwok." 
Leviticus26:34 “Yeityo kobaibaitune anyun emet sabatoisyekyik, eng' peetuusyechooto ko kuberot, omi emetap puunikwok; komuuny anyun emet, ak kobaibait eng' sabatoisyekyik." 
Leviticus26:35 Imuunyi emet kota ko kuberot, eng' kamuung'onooto ki ma nyoor eng' sabatosyekwok, ye ki omenye olooto." 
Leviticus26:36 Ak eng' icheeget che ng'etu eng' okweek, ayookyini mugulelwekwak kaiyweisyet eng' emotinwegap puunikwak, ak koon icheek cheetap sogoot ne ibei usoonet, ak komwei icheek ko uu chii ne mwee rotwetap chok, ak kobutyoti ye maonei chii." 
Leviticus26:37 Koriichkei icheegei eng' icheegei, ko uu eng' taitap rotwetap chok, ye ma mi ne oonei. Monyooru anyun kimnateet ne otononie eng' taitap puunikwok." 
Leviticus26:38 Eng' let olusyi pororyosyek ak koluguak emetap puunikwok. 
Leviticus26:39 Ak ichuchui che ng'etu eng' okweek eng' tengekwogikwak eng' emotinwegap puunikwok; ak kogeny amu tengekwogigap kwanisyekwak kochuchui ko uu icheek. 
Leviticus26:40 “Ago ngot kong'aany tengekwogikwak, ak che po kwanisyekwak eng' kachiliilutikwak che ki yaiywo icheek, ak kogeny amu kitila let," 
Leviticus26:41 ak ki atil let agane icheek, ak amutu icheek kobwa emetap puunikwak. Ngo ming'ingei anyun mugulelwekwak che ma imuratanotiin ak kotaach piretap tengekwogikwak," 
Leviticus26:42 abwaat anyun kayomisennyu ne ki ayomisyi Jakobo; kayomisennyu agine ne kayomisyi Isak ak abwaat agine kayomisennyu ne ki ayomisyi Abraham, ak abwaat emet." 
Leviticus26:43 “Ak kometo icheek emet ak kobaibait eng' sabatoisyekyik, ye tebyei emonooto ko kuberot koma mi icheek, ak kotaach piretap tengekwogikwak, amu ki eesyo kirwoogutikyuk, ak ki wech saboonwekwak kaneetisyosyekyuk." 
Leviticus26:44 Agot nganda uu chooto tugul, ye mi emetap puunikwak, koma eesyoi icheek, amaweche, amang'eme awong'u ak ma pute kayomisennyu kobooto icheek. Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa." 
Leviticus26:45 Ago abwaati amu icheek kayomiset ne ki ayomisyi poisyekwak che ki among'u eng' emetap Misiri kogeeronu pororyosyek, si aek Kamuktaindennywa. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Chu anyun kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik ak ng'atuutik che ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak piigap Israel eng' tulweetap Sinai eng' Musa. 
Leviticus27:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Leviticus27:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin icheek, Ye yaei chii kaarorunet, kogoito chii kobunji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak komach kogoito alyetap kamanuutyetap chiichooto," 
Leviticus27:3 itaune kamanuutyeng'ung' ne irogendochini; murenik che po kong'etee kenyiisyek tiptem agoi che po kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo, ingoek kamanuutyeng'ung' ne irogendochini shekelisyek konom che po fedha, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil." 
Leviticus27:4 Ak ngo kobogoryo, koegu kamanuutyeng'ung' shekelisyek sosom." 
Leviticus27:5 Ngo po kenyiisyek muut agoi kenyiisyek tiptem, koegu anyun kamanuutyeng'ung' shekelisyek tiptem eng' muren ak shekelisyek taman eng' kobogoryo." 
Leviticus27:6 Ngo po arawet agenge agoi kenyiisyek muut, koegu anyun kamanuutyeng'ung' shekelisyek muut che po fedha eng' muren, ak shekelisyek somok che po fedha eng' ne tye." 
Leviticus27:7 Ngo po kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo ak kwo tai, ngo muren koegu kamanuutyeng'ung' shekelisyek taman ak muut, ak kobogoryo koegu shekelisyek taman." 
Leviticus27:8 Ngo panan chiichooto kosiir kamanuutyeng'ung', kinde ineendet taitap tisiindet si komwa tisiindet che kimage; mwaei tisiindet che kimage chiichooto kayai kaarorunet ak kogoito ko uu kamugennyi." 
Leviticus27:9 “Ngogoito piik kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ngo ne po akweet, tugul che po chooto che igoochin chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko tiliileen." 
Leviticus27:10 Amat kowal chii, kowale ne ya ne myee, anan ne myee eng' ne ya; ago ngot kowal tuguuchooto po akweet, kowale `age age ko tiliileen tuwai, nooto ak ne kiwale." 
Leviticus27:11 “Ngo tyony age tugul ne ng'waan, ne ma kigoitoi koek kagoochinet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, konde anyun tyonyooto taitap tisiindet," 
Leviticus27:12 koiit tisiindet anyun ole tee, ngo myee anan ngo ya, ko uu ye kaiit tisiindet, kotebyei ko uu nooto." 
Leviticus27:13 Ago ngo machei iman kotyach tyonyooto, kotesyi anyun kamanuutyennyi kebeberta agenge eng' muut." 
Leviticus27:14 “Ye itabaani chii koonnyi koek ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koiit anyun tisiindet kogeer ngo myee anan ngo ya. Ko uu ye kaiit tisiindet, kotep ko uu nooto." 
Leviticus27:15 Ngo machei kotyach koonnyi chiichooto koitabaani, kotes anyun kebeberta agenge eng' muut ne po kamanuutyeng'ung', si kobunji ineendet koot." 
Leviticus27:16 “Ngo tabaanji chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebebertap mbareennyi, kotenitu anyun kamanuutyeng'ung' kolsetap mbaranooto; ki iti kolsetap homer agenge ne po baale eng' shekelisyek konom che po fedha." 
Leviticus27:17 Ngo tabaan mbareennyi kobooch kenyiitap jubilii, kotebyei ko uu kamanuutyeng'ung' ne irogendochini." 
Leviticus27:18 Ago ngo tabaan ineendet mbareennyi ko kagosiirto jubilii, koiti tisiindet anyun ineendet silingisyek ko uu kenyiisyek che kang'et agoi koit kenyiitap jubilii, ak keetil eng' kamanuutyeng'ung'." 
Leviticus27:19 Ak ngo tyach iman mbareet ineendet ne ki itabaani, kotesyi anyun kebeberta agenge eng' muut ne po kamanuutyeng'ung' ne irogendochini, ak kobunji ineendet iman." 
Leviticus27:20 Ago ngo ma ityaach ineendet mbaranooto, anan ngo ki koaldochi chiito age mbaranooto, koma kityaachi agoi." 
Leviticus27:21 Tiliilitu mbaranooto eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye mandoi eng' jubilii, ko uu mbareet ne ki kitabaan; punjin tisiindet." 
Leviticus27:22 “Ngo tabaanji chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mbareet ne ki koal, ne ma mbareet ne ki nenyi," 
Leviticus27:23 koiityi anyun tisiindet ineendet ole tenitu kamanuutyetap mbaranooto agoi kenyiitap jubilii, ak kogoon ineendet eng' peetuunooto kamanuutyet, koek kiy ne ki kitabaanji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus27:24 Kiweekyin mbaranooto chiito ne ki kiale eng' kenyiitap jubilii, ineendet ne ki nenyi mbareet." 
Leviticus27:25 Ak uu kamanuutiguk tugul shekelisyek che po ole-tiliil: tinyei shekel agenge gerahisyek tiptem. 
Leviticus27:26 “Che kitwatei eng' che kiyagi, che ki kiyai koek che po kiboretook che punjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, chooto icheegei che ma itabaani chii; po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kirgit anan ne keechiiryet." 
Leviticus27:27 Ngo po tyong'ik che ng'woneen, kotyach anyun ineendet ko uu kamanuutyet ne irogendochini, ak kotesyi kebeberta agenge eng' muut ne po nooto. Ngo ma kityaachi kealdoi ko uu kamanuutyeng'ung'." 
Leviticus27:28 “Ago ma ki aldoi, ama kityaachi kiit ne itabaanat ne itabaanjin chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tuguukyik tugul che tinyei, ngo po chii anan tyony, anan ne po mbareet ne nenyi. Tiliil miising' eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy age tugul ne kitabaani." 
Leviticus27:29 Ma kityaachi chii tugul ne kagi tabaanji ng'emisyet, ne itabaani piik; kibarei nooto iman." 
Leviticus27:30 “Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebeberwegap taman che po emet, ngo kesweek che po emet anan logoegap keetiik; itabaanatiin eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Leviticus27:31 Ngo machei chii kotyach alak eng' kebebertanyi ne po taman, kotes kebeberta agenge eng' muut." 
Leviticus27:32 Kebeberwek tugul che po taman che po tuuga anan neego, age tugul ne punei kurereetap kirokto kitabaanji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne po taman eng' chooto." 
Leviticus27:33 Amat kogilgilye ngo myee anan ngo ya, amat kowal; ak ngot kowal, kobunji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuwai, nooto ak ne kiwale; ama kityaachi.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Chuuto anyun ng'atuutik che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa agobo piigap Israel eng' tulweetap Sinai. 
Numbers1:1 Eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' eng' arawet ne po aeng' eng' peetuut ne po tai, ngap komong' piigap Israel eng' emetap Misiri, ko ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' surkwen ne po Sinai eng' emait ne kituiyechin ak koleenji:" 
Numbers1:2 “Iit tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. Sir ko uu koitetap kainaik, muren age tugul agenge agenge." 
Numbers1:3 Oiit ak Aron murenik tugul che imuuchi koba lugeet eng' Israel koosup pcheutigap lugosyekwak, kobooch che ki kotar kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai." 
Numbers1:4 Ak mi kobootok chiitap ooreet age tugul, age tugul ne oo eng' kootap kwanisyekyik." 
Numbers1:5 Chu kainaigap murenik che tonondos kobootok si kotoretook: Eng' ooreetap Reuben ko Elisur weeriitap Sedeur; 
Numbers1:6 Eng' ooreetap Simion ko Selumiel weeriitap Surisadai; 
Numbers1:7 Eng' ooreetap Judah ko Nason weeriitap Aminadab; 
Numbers1:8 Eng' ooreetap Issakar ko Natanel weeriitap Suar; 
Numbers1:9 Eng' ooreetap Zebulun ko Eliap weeriitap Helon; 
Numbers1:10 Eng' lagogap Joseph: eng' che po Ephraim ko Elisama weeriitap Amihud; eng' che po Manasseh ko Gamaliel weeriitap Pedasur; 
Numbers1:11 Eng' ooreetap Benjamin ko Abidan weeriitap Gideoni; 
Numbers1:12 Eng' ooreetap Dan ko Aieser weeriitap Amisadai; 
Numbers1:13 Eng' ooreetap Asher ko Pagiel weeriitap Okran; 
Numbers1:14 Eng' ooreetap Gad ko Eliasap weeriitap Deuel; 
Numbers1:15 Eng' ooreetap Naphtali ko Aira weeriitap Enan.” 
Numbers1:16 Chuuto che ki kikwei eng' tuiyet, pounik che po ortinwegap kwanisyekwak; icheek che kigandoigap eliphuusyek che po Israel." 
Numbers1:17 Ki imut anyun `Musa ak `Aron murenichooto kagemwa kainaikwak," 
Numbers1:18 ak ki iyum `Musa ak `Aron tuiyet komugul kotuiyo eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap aeng'. Kisirgei piik ko uu ortinwekwak eng' kooriigap kwanisyekwak, chii age tugul eng' kainaikwak kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, agenge agenge." 
Numbers1:19 Ki iit anyun Musa icheek eng' surkwen ne po Sinai ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers1:20 Eng' ooreetap Reuben weeriit ne po tai ne po Israel, ko ki kiit murenik tugul che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai. Ki kiit tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko uu koitetap kainaikwak agenge agenge, ko uu ibinwekwak, ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:21 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Reuben ko ki murenik eliphuusyek artam ak lo ak pogol muut. 
Numbers1:22 Eng' ooreetap Simion, ko ki kiit murenik tugul che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, kosupkei ak kainaikwak agenge agenge, ko uu ibinwekwak, ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:23 Icheek che ki kiit eng' che po ooreetap Simion ko ki eliphuusyek konom ak sogool ak pogol somok. 
Numbers1:24 Eng' ooreetap Gad, ko ki kiit murenik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet kosupkei ak kainaikwak, agenge agenge, ko uu ibinwekwak, ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:25 Icheek tugul che ki kiit eng' che po ooreetap Gad ko ki eliphuusyek artam ak muut ak pogol lo ak konom. 
Numbers1:26 Eng' ooreetap Judah, ko ki kiit tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, kosupkei ak kainaikwak, ko uu ibinwekwak, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:27 Piik che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Judah ko ki eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap ak ang'wan ak pogol lo. 
Numbers1:28 Eng' ooreetap Issakar, ko ki kiit tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko uu ole tee kainaikwak, kosupkei ak ibinwekwak, ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:29 Piik tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Issakar ko ki eliphuusyek konom ak ang'wan ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers1:30 Eng' ooreetap Zebulun, ko ki kiit tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko uu ole tee kainaikwak, kosupkei ak ibinwekwak, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:31 Che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Zebulun, ko ki piik eliphuusyek konom ak tisap ak pogol ang'wan." 
Numbers1:32 Eng' ooreetap Joseph, che salu ooreetap Ephraim, ko ki kiit piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko uu ole tee kainaikwak, kosupkei ak ibinwekwak, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:33 Che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Ephraim ko ki eliphuusyek artam ak pogol muut. 
Numbers1:34 Eng' ooreetap Manasseh, ko ki kiit piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko uu ole tee kainaikwak, kosupkei ak ibinwekwak, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:35 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Manasseh ko ki eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng' ak pogol aeng'. 
Numbers1:36 Eng' ooreetap Benjamin, ko ki kiit piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko uu ole tee kainaikwak, kosupkei ak ibinwekwak, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:37 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Benjamin ko ki eliphuusyek sosom ak muut ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers1:38 Eng' ooreetap Dan, ko ki kiit piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko uu ole tee kainaikwak, kosupkei ak ibinwekwak, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:39 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Dan ko ki eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak aeng' ak pogol tisap. 
Numbers1:40 Eng' ooreetap Asher, ko ki kiit piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko uu ole tee kainaikwak, kosupkei ak ibinwekwak, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:41 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Asher ko ki eliphuusyek artam ak agenge ak pogol muut. 
Numbers1:42 Eng' ooreetap Naphtali, ko ki kiit piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet, ko ole tee kainaikwak, kosupkei ak ibinwekwak, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers1:43 Tugul che ki kiit eng' icheek che po ooreetap Naphtali ko ki eliphuusyek konom ak somok ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers1:44 Chuuto piik che ki iit Musa ak Aron ak pounik taman ak aeng' che po Israel kobunu age tugul kootap kwanisyekyik. 
Numbers1:45 Piik tugul che ki kiit kosupkei ak koorigap kwanisyekwak, icheek tugul che ki imuuchi koba lugeet eng' Israel, kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai," 
Numbers1:46 ko ki ek tugul eliphuusyek pogol lo ak somok ak pogol muut ak konom. 
Numbers1:47 Ago ki ma kiit anyun Lawiik kosupkei ak pororyetap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers1:48 Kigamwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers1:49 “Amat iit ooreetap Lawi iitite piigap Israel," 
Numbers1:50 ago inde Lawiik koboi kootap paornateet, tuguuk che mi oriit ak tuguukyik tugul; icheek che ibei koyooto ak tuguukyik che mi oriit. Riibei koyooto ak komeny koyiem yooto." 
Numbers1:51 Ye kimachei kisiipto koot kwo tai, ko Lawiik che putei; ak ye kimachei kitonon koot, ko Lawiik che lumei. Chii age tugul ne ma po ooreetap Lawiik ne riikyin koot, kebarei." 
Numbers1:52 Teptos anyun piigap Israel eng' pitonwek, kosupkei ak lugosyekwak; chii tugul ak kwanennyi eng' ole mi songolyennyi." 
Numbers1:53 Ago menyei koyiemei Lawiik kootap paornateet si manyonji nereeknateet tuiyetap piigap Israel; riibei Lawiik kootap paornateet.” 
Numbers1:54 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto piigap Israel, ko uu ye ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers2:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji," 
Numbers2:2 “Ingoteech chii age tugul eng' piigap Israel ole miitei songolyennyi, kobooto itoondap meng'ootetap kooriik che po kwanisyekwak. Ingoteech emaisyekwak koyiem ak kotokyigei emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers2:3 “Ingoteech komostap kong'asiis ole charunee asiista icheeget che iboortoi songolyetap nganaseetap Judah kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Ingoek Nason weeriitap Aminadab pounindetap piigap Judah," 
Numbers2:4 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap ak ang'wan ak pogol lo. 
Numbers2:5 Che teechei korupkei ko che po ooreetap Issakar, ak ingoek Nethanel weeriitap Suar pounindetap lagogap Issakar," 
Numbers2:6 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek konom ak ang'wan ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers2:7 Yeityo koosup pororyetap Zebulun, ak egu Eliap weeriitap Helon pounindetap lagogap Zebulun," 
Numbers2:8 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek konom ak tisap ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers2:9 Ki ek tugul che ki kiit che po nganaseetap Judah eliphuusyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak lo ak pogol ang'wan kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Icheeget che tau panda. 
Numbers2:10 “Tebee kweanet ne po nganaseetap Reuben komostap murot tai, kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Egu Elisur weeriitap Sedeur pounindetap lagogap Reuben," 
Numbers2:11 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek artam ak lo ak pogol muut. 
Numbers2:12 Che teechei korupkei ko che po ooreetap Simion. Egu Selumiel weeriitap Surisadai pounindetap lagogap Simion," 
Numbers2:13 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek konom ak sogool ak pogol somok. 
Numbers2:14 Yeityo koosup pororyetap Gad; egu Eliasap weeriitap Reuel pounindetap lagogap Gad," 
Numbers2:15 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek artam ak muut ak pogol lo ak konom. 
Numbers2:16 Icheek tugul che ki kiit che po nganaseetap Reuben ko eliphuusyek pogol ak konom ak agenge ak pogol ang'wan ak konom, kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Pendi icheeget koegu che po aeng'." 
Numbers2:17 “Wendi emait ne kituiyechin kobooto kweanetap Lawiik eng' kwenutap chuun alak; ko uu ye teechei emaisyekwak, ko pendi ko uu nooto eng' panda ak tebee age tugul komostanyi, ole mi kweanennywa." 
Numbers2:18 “Tebee kweanet ne po nganaseetap Ephraim cherongo kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Egu Elisama weeriitap Amihud pounindetap lagogap Ephraim," 
Numbers2:19 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek artam ak pogol muut. 
Numbers2:20 Ne rubei ineendet ko pororyetap Manasseh. Egu Gamaliel weeriitap Pedasur pounindetap lagogap Manasseh," 
Numbers2:21 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng' ak pogol aeng'. 
Numbers2:22 Yeityo koosup pororyetap Benjamin. Egu Abidan weeriitap Gideoni pounindetap lagogap Benjamin," 
Numbers2:23 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek sosom ak muut ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers2:24 Icheek tugul che ki kiit eng' nganaseetap Ephraim ko eliphuusyek pogol ak sisiit ak pogol agenge, kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Pendi icheeget koegu che po somok." 
Numbers2:25 “Tebee kweanet ne po nganaseetap Dan murot kaataam, kosupkei ak lugosyekwak. Egu Aieser weeriitap Amisadai pounindetap lagogap Dan," 
Numbers2:26 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak aeng' ak pogol tisap. 
Numbers2:27 Che teechei korupkei ak ineendet ko che po pororyetap Asher. Egu Pagiel weeriitap Okran pounindetap lagogap Asher," 
Numbers2:28 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek artam ak agenge ak pogol muut. 
Numbers2:29 Yeityo koosup che po pororyetap Naphtali. Egu Aira weeriitap Enan pounindetap lagogap Naphtali," 
Numbers2:30 ak koitetap lugeennyi ko eliphuusyek konom ak somok ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers2:31 Icheek tugul che ki kiit che po nganaseetap Dan ko eliphuusyek pogol ak konom ak tisap ak pogol lo. Pendi icheeget koletu, ko uu kweanennywa.”" 
Numbers2:32 Chuuto anyun che ki kiit eng' piigap Israel ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. Che ki kiit tugul che po nganasook kosupkei ak lugosyekwak ko ki eliphuusyek pogol lo ak somok ak pogol muut ak konom. 
Numbers2:33 Ago ki ma ki itito Lawiik piigap Israel, ko uu ye ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers2:34 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto piigap Israel, ko uu ye ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. Ki teech emaisyekwak kosupkei ak kweanennywa. Ak ki pa ko uu nooto tugul, ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers3:1 Chu ortinwegap Aron ak Musa eng' peetuut ne ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' tulweetap Sinai. 
Numbers3:2 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Aron: Nadap ne po tai, Abiu, Eleazar ak Ithamar." 
Numbers3:3 Chooto ko kainaigap weeriigap Aron, tisiik che ki kiil ak kitabaan si koyai tisiisyet." 
Numbers3:4 Ago ki pek Nadap ak Abiu koma tinyei lagok eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' surkwen ne po Sinai, ye kingo koito maat ne teer eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki yai anyun Eleazar ak Ithamar tisiisyet eng' taitap kwandanywa Aron." 
Numbers3:5 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers3:6 “Imutu ooreetap Lawiik kobwa icheek taitap Aron tisiindet, si kotoret ineendet eng' poisyet." 
Numbers3:7 Ingoyai icheek poisyetap Aron, ak poisyetap tuiyet komugul eng' taitap emait ne kituiyechin ye yaei poisyet ne po koot." 
Numbers3:8 Ingoriip icheek tuguuk tugul che po emait ne kituiyechin oriit; ak ye yaei poisyet ne po koot koyaei poisyet ne kata yaei piigap Israel. 
Numbers3:9 Igoochi `Aron ak `weeriikyik Lawiik si kotoret poisyet; Lawiik ko piigap Israel che ki kigoochi Aron iman. 
Numbers3:10 Inde Aron ak weeriikyik si koriip tisiisyet, ak chii age tugul ne kipsagariin ne riikyin, kebarei.”" 
Numbers3:11 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers3:12 “Keero! Aneendet ne ki anam Lawiik eng' kwenutap piigap Israel si ageere weeriik che po tai che yaatei iyoteet eng' piigap Israel. Punjino Lawiik," 
Numbers3:13 amu chechuuk weeriik tugul che po tai. Eng' peetuut ne ki abar weeriik tugul che po tai eng' emetap Misiri, ko ki atabaanjigei tugul che po tai eng' Israel, eng' piik ak eng' che twatei kiyagiik; egu chechuuk chooto. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Numbers3:14 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' surkwen ne po Sinai koleenji," 
Numbers3:15 “Iit lagogap Lawiik ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak ko uu ortinwekwak. Iit weeriik tugul kobooch che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai.” 
Numbers3:16 Ki iit Musa anyun icheek ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ng'at ineendet. 
Numbers3:17 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Lawi: Gerson, Kohat ak Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Chu ko kainaigap weeriigap Gerson ko uu kooriikwak: Libni ak Shimei. 
Numbers3:19 Weeriigap Kohat ko uu ortinwekwak ko ki: Amram, Ishar, Hebron ak Uzziel." 
Numbers3:20 Weeriigap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Chuuto ortinwegap Lawiik ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers3:21 Koorigap Libnik ak Simeik ko iyoteetap Gerson; chuuto ko ki kooriigap Gershonik. 
Numbers3:22 Ki ek tugul che ki kiit, kobooch che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai murenik eliphuusyek tisap ak pogol muut." 
Numbers3:23 Ingoteech che po kooriigap Gershonik kootap tuiyet patai eng' komostap cherongo," 
Numbers3:24 ak koek Eliasap weeriitap Lael pounindetap Gershonik eng' kootap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers3:25 Ingoriip weeriigap Gerson eng' emait ne kituiyechin, koot, emait ak tuguukyik che kituge, ak angeet ne kigeree kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers3:26 angook che king'ote seremut, angeet ne kigeree kurgeetap seremut ne neegitee koot ak kaptisisyet, ak poroonikyik che po poisyennywa tugul." 
Numbers3:27 Koorigap Amramik, Isarik, Hebronik ak Usyelik, ko iyoteetap Kohat; icheeget ko kooriigap Kohatik." 
Numbers3:28 Ki ek tugul kobooch che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai murenik eliphuusyek sisiit ak pogol lo; chuuto che ki riibei poisyetap ole-tiliil. 
Numbers3:29 Ingoteech weeriigap Kohat murot tai ne po koot," 
Numbers3:30 ak koek Elizaphan weeriitap Uzziel pounindetap kooriigap Kohatik eng' kootap kwandanywa. 
Numbers3:31 Ingoriip icheek moinget, meset, keldap tait, kapkorosusyek, tuguuk che poisyee icheek eng' ole-tiliil, angeet ne kioiye koot ak poisyennyi tugul." 
Numbers3:32 Ingoek Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet ne oo eng' pounigap Lawiik, ak koriip icheeget che riibei poisyetap ole-tiliil." 
Numbers3:33 Koorigap Malik ak Musik ko iyoteetap Merari; icheeget kooriigap Merari. 
Numbers3:34 Ki ek tugul kobooch che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai murenik eliphuusyek lo ak pogol aeng'. 
Numbers3:35 Ingoboi Suriel weeriitap Abiail koot ne po kwanisyegap kooriigap Merari. Ingoteech icheek komostap murot kaataam ne po koot. 
Numbers3:36 Ki kigoochi weeriigap Merari koriip poisyetap pagoinik che po koot, rateiywek, lumeiywek ak kelongonikyik che tononie ak kiy age tugul ne namegei ak poisyonikyik tugul," 
Numbers3:37 ak lumeiywek che yiemei seremut, kelongonikwak che tononie, tigongenikwak ak poroonikwak." 
Numbers3:38 Musa ak Aron ak weeriikyik che teechei komostap kong'asiis ne po koot, ole charunee asiista eng' taitap emait ne kituiyechin. Riibei icheek poisyetap ole-tiliil agobo poisyetap piigap Israel; ak chii age tugul ne kipsagariin ne riikyin kebarei." 
Numbers3:39 Ki ek tugul murenik che ki iit Musa ak Aron che po Lawiik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng'. Ki kiit che po kong'etee arawet agenge ak kwo tai, ko uu kooriikwak ak ko uu eng' ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers3:40 Ki leenji kogeny `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Iit weeriik tugul eng' piigap Israel che po tai eng' sigeet, che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai, ak itet kainaikwak." 
Numbers3:41 Itabaanwo Lawiik kobunjo, kewale tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel, ak che twatei kiyagiik che po Lawiik kewale che twatei kiyagiik che po piigap Israel; aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Numbers3:42 Ki iit anyun Musa weeriik tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. 
Numbers3:43 Ki ek weeriik tugul che po tai che ki kiit, kong'etee che po arawet agenge ak kwo tai, murenik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng' ak pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik tisap ak somok ko uu koitetap kainaik." 
Numbers3:44 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers3:45 “Nam Lawiik ak iwalee weeriik tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel ak inam kiyagigap Lawiik iwalee kiyagigap piigap Israel ak punjino Lawiik. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers3:46 Eng' katyagetap weeriik che po tai che po piigap Israel chooto pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik tisap ak somok che siirei Lawiik," 
Numbers3:47 iitoche eng' chii tugul shekelisyek muut, ko uu koitetap ole-tiliil." 
Numbers3:48 Igoochini Aron ak weeriikyik shekelisyek che po chooto siirtootiin che kityage pichooto.” 
Numbers3:49 Kitaach anyun Musa shekelisyek che po katyaget kobun icheek che ki chaang' kosiir che ki ityaach Lawiik. 
Numbers3:50 Kitaach eng' kiboretogap piigap Israel shekelisyechooto eliphuut agenge ak pogol somok ak tamanwogik lo ak muut, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil." 
Numbers3:51 Ki igoochi anyun Musa shekelisyechooto po katyaget Aron ak weeriikyik, ko uu ye ki kang'at ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers4:1 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji," 
Numbers4:2 “Iit weeriigap Kohat icheegei eng' lagogap Lawiik ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers4:3 Iit piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi che po kenyiisyek konom; tugul che imuuchi poisyet, si kobiit koyai poisyet eng' emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers4:4 Poisyetap weeriigap Kohat eng' emait ne kituiyechin ko koriip tuguuk che tiliileen kosiir. 
Numbers4:5 “Ye katoi piik panda, koba ko Aron ak weeriikyik kocher anyun angeet ne kioiye koot konyo ng'wony ak kotuge anganooto moingetap paornateet," 
Numbers4:6 ak kooliige magatogap mengichigap-pei, ak kotuge angeet ne buluu, yeityo korooch keetiikyik che ki ibe." 
Numbers4:7 “Ingoitoe pichooto angeet ne buluu meset ne po magatiinik che po kabartaet ak konde paragunnyi taabook, kechigosyek, tageiywek ak kigombok che kiroong'jine tuguuk ak tebee paragunnyi magatinigap kotugul." 
Numbers4:8 Yeityo kotuge tuguuchooto angeet ne piriir ak koliige magatogap mengichigap-pei, ak korooch keetiikyik che ki ibe." 
Numbers4:9 “Ingonam icheek angeet ne buluu ak kotuge keldap tait ak taisyekyik, kanameiywonnyi ak taabookyik che mengeechen, tuguukyik tugul che po mwanik, che kindae mwanik." 
Numbers4:10 Ara ingonde tuguuchooto magateet oriit ne po mengitap-pei, ak konde keetiik che ki ibe." 
Numbers4:11 “Ne isubi koitoe angeet ne buluu kapkorosuut ne po thahabu ak koliige magatogap mengichigap peek, yeityo korooch keetiikyik che ki ibe." 
Numbers4:12 Ingonam icheek tuguuk tugul che po poisyet che kiboisyee eng' ole-tiliil ak koliige angeet ne buluu, kotuge tuguuchooto magatogap mengichigap peek ak konde keetiik che ki ibe." 
Numbers4:13 Ingoram anyun oreek eng' kaptisisyet ak kotumda ak koitoe paragunnyi angeet ne aruus ne piriir. 
Numbers4:14 Yeityo konde paragunnyi tuguukyik tugul che kiboisyee eng' kaptisisyonooto, tereenik, kariik che sogotiin, kechigosyek che eecheen ak taabook che mengeechen. Ingotuge tuguuchooto tugul magatogap mengichigap peek ak korooch keetiikyik che ki ibe." 
Numbers4:15 Ye kagogees Aron ak weeriikyik poisyet ne po tuugeetap ole-tiliil ak tuguuk tugul che po ole-tiliil, ak ye kotoi nganaseet panda, ko ingobwa anyun weeriigap Kohat koip; ago amat kotwa kiy eng' tuguuk che tiliileen si ma pek icheek. Tuguuchuuto che laei anyun weeriigap Kohat eng' emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers4:16 Poisyetap Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet ko koriip mwaitap tait, nyamdutik che kibeelei, kagoochinetap peek che po kotugul ak mwanik che kiilse. Yaei riipseet tugul ne po koot ak tuguuk tugul che mi oriit kobooto ole-tiliil ak tuguukyik.”" 
Numbers4:17 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji," 
Numbers4:18 “Among' kobet koniinda ooreetap kooriigap Kohatik eng' Lawiik. 
Numbers4:19 Ara oyachi ko uu ni si kosapcho amabek icheek ye riikyin tuguuk che tiliileen miising' kosiir: pendi ko Aron ak weeriikyik ak koboorchi chii age tugul eng' icheek poisyennyi ak tuguuk che laei. 
Numbers4:20 Ago amat ochamji Kohatik koba ko kogeer ole-tiliil agot kitigin, si ma pek icheek.”" 
Numbers4:21 Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers4:22 “Iit weeriigap Gerson ak icheek ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Numbers4:23 Iiti murenik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi konom che pendi ko koboisyei eng' emait ne kituiyechin. 
Numbers4:24 Ni poisyet ne po kooriigap Gershonik ye poisyei ak ye laisei: 
Numbers4:25 ibei icheek angook che po koot, emait ne kituiyechin, kobooto kitambaok che kituge, angoogap mengichigap peek che tabanu paragunnyi ak kitambaok che kigeree kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers4:26 Ibei angook che uu emait che kiyieme seremut, angeet ne po ye kibunei eng' ormariichetap seremut ne yiemei koot ak kaptisisyet, poroonikwak ak tuguuk tugul che po poisyennywa. Nyolu koyai pichooto kiy age tugul ne po poisyetap tuguuchooto." 
Numbers4:27 Pou Aron ak weeriikyik poisyonik tugul che yaei weeriigap Gershonik, ngo eng' laisennywa anan ko eng' poisyennywa tugul. Ooboorchi ak ong'at anyun icheek eng' tuguuk tugul ole iptoi laisennywa." 
Numbers4:28 Niito poisyet ne po kooriigap weeriigap Gershonik eng' emait ne kituiyechin. Pou poisyennywa Ithamar weeriitap Aron tisiindet. 
Numbers4:29 “Iit weeriigap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers4:30 Iiti murenik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi konom, chii age tugul ne imuuchi koyai poisyetap eng' emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers4:31 Ni ng'atuutyetap laisennywa ko uu poisyennywa tugul eng' emait ne kituiyechin. Laei icheek pagoinik che po koot, rateiywekyik, lumeiywekyik ak kelongonikyik che tononie," 
Numbers4:32 ak lumeiywek che yiemei seremut kotuiyo, kelongonikwak, tigongenikwak, poroonikwak kobooto tuguukwak tugul ak poisyennywa. Ooboorchi chii age tugul kainetap kiit ne laei." 
Numbers4:33 Niito poisyet ne po kooriigap weeriigap Merari ko uu poisyennywa tugul eng' emait ne kituiyechin ak pou icheek Ithamar weeriitap Aron tisiindet.” 
Numbers4:34 Ki iit anyun Musa ak Aron ak pounigap tuiyet weeriigap Kohatik ko uu ortinwekwak ak kooriigap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers4:35 Tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi che po kenyiisyek konom, ak age tugul ne ki imuuchi koyai poisyet eng' emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers4:36 ko ki ek eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol tisap ak konom. 
Numbers4:37 Chu che ki kiit eng' kooriigap Kohatik, tugul che kiboisyei eng' emait ne kituiyechin, che ki iit Musa ak Aron, ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa." 
Numbers4:38 Ki kiit che po weeriigap Gerson ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers4:39 Piik tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi che po kenyiisyek konom che ki pwa kobois eng' emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers4:40 kaitennywa ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' pogol lo ak sosom. 
Numbers4:41 Chu koitetap kooriigap weeriigap Gerson, che kiboisyei eng' emait ne kituiyechin. Ki iit Musa ak Aron ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers4:42 Ki kiit che po ortinwegap weeriigap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers4:43 Tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi konom, che pendi si kobois eng' emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers4:44 ko uu kooriikwak, ko ki ek eliphuusyek somok ak pogol aeng'." 
Numbers4:45 Chuuto icheek che ki kiit che po kooriigap weeriigap Merari. Ki iit Musa ak Aron icheek ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa. 
Numbers4:46 Chooto Lawiik tugul che ki iit Musa ak Aron ak pounigap Israel ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers4:47 Tugul kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom agoi che po kenyiisyek konom, chii age tugul ne imuuchi kobois ak kola tuguuk agobo emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers4:48 ko ki ek eliphuusyek sisiit ak pogol muut ak tamanwogik sisiit. 
Numbers4:49 Ki kiit chii tugul ko uu poisyennyi ak ko uu laisennyi konamgei ak ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa. Ki kiit anyun icheek ko uu nooto, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers5:1 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji,"
