Numbers5:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel koisto age tugul ne tinyei mogondosaik eng' nganaseet, age tugul ne tinyei kusereet, ak age tugul ne kaing'wanitkei amu katiiny muusto." 
Numbers5:3 Oiste koba saang'utap nganaseet chooto tugul che murenik ak kwonyiik; ma nyolu komurwon nganasennywa, ole amenye eng' kwenunnywa.”" 
Numbers5:4 Ki yai piigap Israel ko uu nooto; ki isto icheek koba saang'utap nganaseet. Ki yai ko uu nooto anyun piigap Israel ko uu ye ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Numbers5:5 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers5:6 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin: Ye kachalwogenji muren anan ko kwony chii age tugul, koleelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, konamei ng'oogisto chiichooto," 
Numbers5:7 ak nyolu kong'aany ng'oogisto ne koyai, ak igoitoi kiy ne yamegei ak ng'oogisooto ak kotesyi kebebertap muut, yeityo kogoochi chiichooto kichalwogenji." 
Numbers5:8 Ago ngo ma tinyei chiichooto chiito ne tilya ne kimuuchi keeweekyi tuguuchooto po ng'oogisto, ko tuguuchooto kiyaaktoe ng'oogisto kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kigoochin Kiptaiyat si kobiit kobunji tisiindet kobooto mengitap kagaigaet ne kiyachine ineendet kagaigaet." 
Numbers5:9 Punjin tisiindet kagoochinoik tugul che tiliileen che po piigap Israel che igoochin icheek ineendet. 
Numbers5:10 Ak punjin tisiindet tuguuk che itabaanatiin; punjin ineendet kiy age tugul ne igoochin chii.” 
Numbers5:11 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers5:12 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Ngo kesesen osotyotap chii, ak koek kateweerin eng' manong'otyonnyi," 
Numbers5:13 ak ngot koipkei ak chii ak koung'ak kioto eng' manong'otyondennyi, ko kagomurwonitkei ineendet nganda ma piit chii ne paoryanjin anan chii ne ki namji yautyonooto." 
Numbers5:14 Ngot koam ng'etkong' chiichooto eng' saboondanyi ak konereech agobo osotyonnyi amu koimurwongei anan ngo nyoor kang'unyet chiichooto eng' saboondanyi ak konereech agobo osotyonnyi nganda ma imurwongei osotyondonooto," 
Numbers5:15 komutyin anyun chiichooto osotyonnyi tisiindet ak koip kagoochinennyi agobo osotyondonooto. Ibu ineendet kererutik che po peegap sairi che ng'ootiin. Ma roong'jin ineendet mwaita anan konde tuguuk che nyamdut, amu niito ko kagoochinetap peek che po ng'etkonda, kagoochinetap kabwaatet ne kibwaatee tengekto." 
Numbers5:16 “Imutu anyun `tisiindet osotyondonooto koriik ak konde taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers5:17 Yeityo konam tisiindet peek che tiliileen eng' taabeet ne ki kiyae ng'ung'unyek ak komugut ng'ung'unyek che mi koot ng'wony ak konde peechooto. 
Numbers5:18 Ye kagonde tisiindet kwonyooto taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotyach suumeekyik ak konde eunnyi kagoochinetap peek che po kabwaatet, peechooto po kagoochinetap ng'etkong'. Ak eng' yooto kotinyei tisiindet peek eng' eunnyi che po ng'wanindo che ibu chubisyet." 
Numbers5:19 Yeityo komwachi tisiindet kwonyooto koyasyo kole: Ngo ma oipkei ak chii anan ngo ma igesesenote imi pounatetap manong'otyondeng'ung', ityagage anyun eng' peechu po ng'wanindo che ibu chubisyet." 
Numbers5:20 Ago ngo ki igesesen iman, imang'une pounatetap manong'otyondeng'ung', ak ngo ki imurwongei ak ki oipkei ak chii age ne ma manong'otyondeng'ung'," 
Numbers5:21 ko ngo mwachi anyun tisiindet kwonyooto koyasyo kayasyoet ne po chubisyet, ak koleenji tisiindet ineendet, Ingoyain Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu ne chuboot ak ne iteweerat eng' piiguk ye yaei ineendet konun ak kosoonen moeng'ung'." 
Numbers5:22 Ingochut peechu ibu chubisyet agutaniguk ak kosoonen ak konun moeng'ung'. Wolu kwonyooto kole, ‘Uu nooto, uu nooto.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Ye ibata ko sirchin tisiindet chubisyosyechuuto kitabuut ak koundo koba peegap ng'wanindo. 
Numbers5:24 Igoochin kwonyooto koe peechooto po chubisyo, ak pendi peechooto poortanyi ak kogoochi ng'wanindo." 
Numbers5:25 Inemu tisiindet kagoochinetap peek che po ng'etkong' eng' eutap kwonyooto ak koongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koip kobwa kaptisisyet." 
Numbers5:26 Muguti tisiindet kagoochinonooto po peek konyi euut koek kabwaatet ak kobeel eng' kaptisisyet, ak ye ibata kogoochi kwonyooto peek koe." 
Numbers5:27 Ye kagogoochi koe peechooto, kobiitu anyun ko uu ni, ngo koimurwongei kwonyooto ak ngo ko koteweer manong'otyondennyi, koba anyun poortanyi peechooto ibu chubisyet ak kogacho ng'wanindo; kosooneni ak konun moennyi ak koek ne chuboot ineendet eng' piikyik." 
Numbers5:28 Ago ngot kotom komurwongei kwonyooto ak ko tiliil, kotyagat anyun ak komuuchi komanach." 
Numbers5:29 “Niito ng'atuutyetap ng'etkonda ye kagesesen osotyot ye mi pounatetap manong'otyondennyi ak komurwongei," 
Numbers5:30 anan ye kaam chii ng'etkong' eng' saboondanyi ak konereech agobo osotyonnyi. Imutu `manong'otyonnyi ineendet taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koyachi tisiindet ng'atuutyoniito tugul. 
Numbers5:31 Ago ma nyooru chiichooto yaityo, ago ibei kwonyooto yaityennyi.”" 
Numbers6:1 Ki ng'alaalji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers6:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Ye kayai chii ne muren anan ko ne kwony kayasyoet, kayasyetap Nasiritindet, kotabaanjigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Numbers6:3 ko ingoistoegei divaik ak maiyek. Amat koe peek alak tugul che mindilil che po divaik anan ko maiyek alak tugul. Amat koe peegap sabibuk anan koam sabibuk che tuonen anan che yamyotiin. 
Numbers6:4 Eng' peetuusyekyik tugul che po katabaanennyi kotee kota ko Nasaretindet, ko monyolu koam kiy age tugul ne punu sabibuk, kong'etee tenderigap logoechooto agoi peerik." 
Numbers6:5 “Amat kocher metinnyi eng' peetuusyekyik tugul che po kayosyennyi ne po katabaanet, agoi kogeskei peetuusyechooto che itabaanjinegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ingotiliilit anyun ineendet ak ingobiityo suumeekyik koechegitu." 
Numbers6:6 Amat koriikyi muusto eng' peetuusyechooto tugul che itabaanjinegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers6:7 Amat kong'wanitkei agobo kwan anan kamet anan ng'eetap kamet anan chepkamet ye kabek icheek, amu mi metinnyi katabaanennyi po kei ne itabaanjigei Kamuktaindet." 
Numbers6:8 Tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po katabaanennyi. 
Numbers6:9 “Ak ngo me chii eng' chokyinet eng' ole neegitee ineendet, ak koomurwon metitap katabaanennyi, ko ingocher anyun metinnyi eng' peetuut ne ki anyinyi ineendet, nooto peetuutap tisap." 
Numbers6:10 Ak eng' peetuutap sisiit koipchi tisiindet cheptugenik aeng' anan ko aarek aeng' che po toriitik koba kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin. 
Numbers6:11 Igoitoi tisiindet age kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto ak kobunji age kagoochinet ne kibeelei, yeityo koyai kagaigaet agobo ineendet amu konam tengekto agobo ne kome. Itiliili anyun metit peetuunooto." 
Numbers6:12 Ingotabaanji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyegap katabaanennyi, ak koget mengit ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kagoochinetap chalwok. Ago petos puch peetuusyek che ki po tai amu ki kimurwon katabaanennyi." 
Numbers6:13 “Ni ng'atuutyetap Nasiritindet, ye kagogeskei peetuusyegap katabaanennyi. Kimutu konyo kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers6:14 yeityo kogoochi kagoochinennyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge ne libwoop koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei, subeendo agenge ne libwoop ne po keechiir ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto ak mengit agenge ne libwoop kobunji kagoochinoigap kaalyeet." 
Numbers6:15 Igoitoi kogeny kerebet ne oo ne mi magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, magatiinik che mengeechen che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che ki kiburukto mwaita, magatiinik che tertereen che ma kinde mermereek che ki kiilee mwaita, kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei." 
Numbers6:16 “Igoitoi tisiindet tuguuchooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogoito kagoochinet ne po tengekto ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei. 
Numbers6:17 Igoitoi mengit koek tiseiywot ne po kagoochinetap kaalyeet kobooto kebebertap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, ak kogoito kagoochinetap peek ne po nooto kobooto kagoochinet ne kieei." 
Numbers6:18 Inemu Nasaretindonooto metinnyi ne po katabaanennyi eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin ak koip sumeechooto konde maat ne kibeelee tiseiywegap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. 
Numbers6:19 “Yeityo konem tisiindet kusto ne kagiyo ne po mengit ak konem eng' kerebet magatyat agenge ne ming'in ne ma kinde mermereek ak magatyat agenge ne terter ne ma kinde mermereek, ak konde tuguuchooto eunegap Nasiritindet ye kagonem metit agobo katabaanennyi." 
Numbers6:20 Yeityo koongoi tisiindet chooto koek kagoochinoik che kiongoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; tiliileen chooto ak punjin tisiindet kobooto tagateet ne kiongoi ak chaatit ne kigoitoi. Ye ibata nooto anyun, komuuch Nasiritindet koe divaik." 
Numbers6:21 “Ni ng'atuutyetap Nasiritindet ne yae kayasyaennyi. Kagoochinennyi ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko nyolu kosupkei ak katabaanennyi, kobooto tuguuk alak che imuuchi konyoor. Kosupkei ak kayosyet ne ka yai, ko nyolu koyai, kosubi ng'atuutyet ne po katabaanennyi.”" 
Numbers6:22 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers6:23 “Mwachi Aron ak weeriikyik ileenji Koberuur piigap Israel ko uu ni," 
Numbers6:24 ‘Ingoberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koriibin; 
Numbers6:25 Ingokwenyin lapkeiyetap togeetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak korirenen. 
Numbers6:26 Ingotokyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor togeennyi ak kogoonin kaalyeet.’ 
Numbers6:27 “Indoi kainennyu piigap Israel, ak aberuur icheek.”" 
Numbers7:1 Kingo kagolumda Musa koot, koiil ak kotabaan kobooto tuguukyik tugul. Ki iil ak kotabaan kora kaptisisyet ak tuguukyik tugul," 
Numbers7:2 yeityo kogoito kagoochinoik, pounigap Israel, che eecheen eng' kooriigap kwanisyekwak che ki pou ortinwekwak, chuuto che kitononjin icheeget che ki kiiti." 
Numbers7:3 Ki ip pounichooto kagoochinoikwak kobwa taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kariisyek lo che tugootiin, eiik taman ak aeng', kariit agenge koyop pounik aeng' ak kiget pounindet age tugul eito agenge. Ki igoito chooto eng' taitap koot." 
Numbers7:4 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers7:5 “Taach tuguuchooto eng' icheek si kobiit kobunji poisyetap emait ne kituiyechin. Igoochi Lawiik tuguuchooto, ak ipchechi chii age tugul eng' icheek ko uu poisyennyi.”" 
Numbers7:6 Ara kitaach Musa kariisyek ak eiik ak kogoochi Lawiik. 
Numbers7:7 Ki igoochi weeriigap Gerson kariisyek aeng' ak eiik ang'wan, ko uu poisyennywa." 
Numbers7:8 Ki igoochi weeriigap Merari kariisyek ang'wan ak eiik sisiit, ko uu poisyennywa, kotononjin icheek Ithamar weeriitap Aron tisiindet." 
Numbers7:9 Ago ma igoochi kiy weeriigap Kohat amu ki nenywa poisyetap ole-tiliil; ki ibe tuguuchooto tigigoikwak. 
Numbers7:10 Ki igoito pounik kagoochinoik agobo katabaanetap kaptisisyet eng' peetuut ne ki kiile, ki igoito chooto eng' taitap kaptisisyet." 
Numbers7:11 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ingogoito pounindet age tugul eng' peetuunnyi kagoochinennyi agobo katabaanetap kaptisisyet.”" 
Numbers7:12 Eng' peetuut ne po tai, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Nason weeriitap Aminadab ne po ooreetap Judah." 
Numbers7:13 Kagoochinnyi ko ki sanit agenge ne po fedha, ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil, kinyiitotin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:14 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman ne nyiitaat nyamdutik; 
Numbers7:15 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, mengit age ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:16 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:17 ak tiseiywot ne po kagoochinetap kaalyeet ko eiik aeng', mengichik muut, kwesik muut, ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Nason weeriitap Aminadab." 
Numbers7:18 Ki igoito eng' peetuut ne po aeng' kagoochinennyi Nethanel weeriitap Suar, pounindetap Issakar ko uu ni:" 
Numbers7:19 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil; ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinet ne po peek;" 
Numbers7:20 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman ne nyiitaat nyamdutik; 
Numbers7:21 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:22 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:23 ak tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet ko eiik aeng', mengichik muut, kwesik muut, ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Nethanel weeriitap Suar." 
Numbers7:24 Eng' peetuut ne po somok, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Eliap weeriitap Helon, pounindetap lagogap Zebulun." 
Numbers7:25 Kagoochinennyi kogisanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:26 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman ne nyiitaat nyamdutik; 
Numbers7:27 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:28 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:29 ak tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet, ko ki eiik aeng', mengichik muut, kwesik muut, ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Eliap weeriitap Helon." 
Numbers7:30 Eng' peetuut ne po ang'wan, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Elisur weeriitap Sedeur, pounindetap lagogap Reuben." 
Numbers7:31 Kagoochinennyi kogisanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisabu, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:32 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:33 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:34 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:35 ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet, eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut, mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Elisur weeriitap Sedeur." 
Numbers7:36 Eng' peetuut ne po muut, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Selumiel weeriitap Surisadai pounindetap lagogap Simion." 
Numbers7:37 Kagoochinennyi kogi sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:38 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:39 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:40 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:41 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Selumiel weeriitap Surisadai." 
Numbers7:42 Eng' peetuut ne po lo, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Eliasap weeriitap Deuel, pounindetap lagogap Gad." 
Numbers7:43 Kagoochinennyi kogi sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul, che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:44 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:45 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:46 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:47 ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Eliasap weeriitap Deuel." 
Numbers7:48 Eng' peetuut ne po tisap, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Elisama weeriitap Amihud, pounindetap lagogap Ephraim ko uu ni:" 
Numbers7:49 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:50 ak nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:51 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:52 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:53 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Elisama weeriitap Amihud." 
Numbers7:54 Eng' peetuut ne po sisiit, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Gamaliel weeriitap Pedasur, pounindetap lagogap Manasseh ko uu ni:" 
Numbers7:55 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:56 ak nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:57 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:58 ak kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:59 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Gamaliel weeriitap Pedasur." 
Numbers7:60 Eng' peetuut ne po sogool, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Abidan weeriitap Gideoni, pounindetap lagogap Benjamin ko uu ni:" 
Numbers7:61 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:62 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:63 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:64 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinet ne po tengekto; 
Numbers7:65 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Abidan weeriitap Gideoni." 
Numbers7:66 Eng' peetuut ne po taman, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Aieser weeriitap Amisadai, pounindetap lagogap Dan ko uu ni:" 
Numbers7:67 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:68 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:69 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:70 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinet ne po tengekto; 
Numbers7:71 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet, eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Aieser weeriitap Amisadai." 
Numbers7:72 Eng' peetuut ne po taman ak agenge, ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Pagiel weeriitap Okran pounindetap lagogap Asher ko uu ni:" 
Numbers7:73 sanit agenge ne po fedha ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha, ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:74 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:75 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge ak mengit ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:76 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:77 ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Pagiel weeriitap Okran." 
Numbers7:78 Eng' peetuut ne po taman ak aeng', ko ki igoito kagoochinennyi Aira weeriitap Enan, pounindetap lagogap Naphtali ko uu ni:" 
Numbers7:79 sanit agenge ne po fedha, ne yamei nyigiisindanyi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom, ak taabeet agenge ne po fedha ne yamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki nyiitootiin tuguuchooto tuwai peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek;" 
Numbers7:80 nyigiisindap gramit agenge ne po thahabu, ne yamei shekelisyek taman, ne nyiitaat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:81 kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:82 kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto; 
Numbers7:83 ak ki po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet eiik aeng'u, mengichik muut, kwesik muut ak mengichik muut che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik che ki po Aira weeriitap Enan." 
Numbers7:84 Chuuto kagoochinoik che po pounigap Israel agobo katabaanet ne po kaptisisyet, niito eng' peetuut ne ki ili: sanisyek taman ak aeng' che po fedha, taabook taman ak aeng' che po fedha ak nyigiisindap gramisyek taman ak aeng' che po thahabu." 
Numbers7:85 Nyigiisindap sanit age tugul kogi shekelisyek pogol ak sosom ak kiyamei shekelisyek tamanwogik tisap taabeet age tugul. Ki ek tugul shekelisyek eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol ang'wan, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil." 
Numbers7:86 Ki ek nyigiisindap gramisyek taman ak aeng' che po thahabu, che nyiitootiin nyamdutik, shekelisyek taman age tugul, ko uu shekel ne po ole-tiliil. Ki po shekelisyek pogol agenge ak tiptem nyigiisindap gramisyek tugul che po thahabu." 
Numbers7:87 Ki ek tuuga tugul che po kagoochinet ne kibeelei, kiruugik taman ak aeng', mengichik taman ak aeng' ak mengichik taman ak aeng' che ma siirei kenyiit agenge, ak kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kwesik taman ak aeng' che po kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Numbers7:88 Ki ek anyun tuuga tugul che po tiseiywotap kagoochinetap kaalyeet kiruugik tiptem ak ang'wan, mengichik tamanwogik lo ak mengichik tamanwogik lo che ma siirei kenyiit agenge. Chooto kagoochinoik agobo katabaanetap kaptisisyet, ye kingo kagiil." 
Numbers7:89 Ye kingwo Musa emait ne kituiyechin kwo kong'alaal ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kogas anyun kutit kong'alaaljin ineendet komang'une paragutap kerwetap rireenet ne ki miitei moingetap paornateet; ki mang'une kwenutap kerubisyechooto aeng', ak ki ng'alaalji ineendet." 
Numbers8:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers8:2 “Mwachi Aron ileenji, ‘Ye iinam taisyek tisap, ko ingokweng'so anyun taisyechooto eng' taitap keldap kiit ne ikweng'sei.’ ”" 
Numbers8:3 Ki yai anyun Aron ko uu nooto; ki inaam taisyekyik si kobiit kokweng'so eng' taitap keldap tait, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers8:4 Ki uu ni yaetap keldap tainooto: ki kiyae thahabu che ki kitaany, kobooch keel agoi taaptokyik. Ki kiyai keldap tait ko uu itoondo nooto ne kiga koboorchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers8:5 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers8:6 “Iste Lawiik eng' kwenutap piigap Israel ak ianyiny icheek. 
Numbers8:7 Yachi ko uu ni ye ianyinyi icheek: ise peek che po kagaigaet, ingocher koroorik che mi poorwekwak tugul ak ingomwet ngoroikwak, ak koek icheek anyun che kagoanyinygei." 
Numbers8:8 Yeityo koget icheek kirgit ne neran ak kagoochinennyi ne po peek che ng'ootiin che tambuluul che ki kiburukto mwaita, ak igetu kirgit age ne neran kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Numbers8:9 Imutu Lawiik kobwa taitap emait ne kituiyechin ak iyum tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel. 
Numbers8:10 Imutu Lawiik kobwa taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogonoor `piigap Israel eunekwak icheek. 
Numbers8:11 Yeityo kogoito Aron Lawiik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi agobo piigap Israel, si kobiit kochobok icheek koyai poisyet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers8:12 Ye ibata, kogonoor `Lawiik eunekwak metowegap kirugichooto, igoite inyee age kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto ak kobunji age kagoochinet ne kibeelei si koyai kagaigaet agobo Lawiik." 
Numbers8:13 “Ye imut Lawiik koba taitap Aron ak taitap weeriikyik, igoochi `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi." 
Numbers8:14 Ko uu nooto anyun, iibesye Lawiik eng' kwenutap piigap Israel, ak kobunjo icheek." 
Numbers8:15 Ye kaianyiny icheek ak igoite koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi, koba anyun ko ak koyai poisyet eng' emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers8:16 Amu ki kigoono icheek inne eng' piigap Israel, ko ki anam chooto kobunjo kewale tugul che yaatei iyoteet, chooto ko weeriik che po tai eng' piigap Israel tugul." 
Numbers8:17 Amu chechuuk tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel, ngo chii anan che twatei che kiyagi. Ki atabaan icheek eng' peetuut ne ki abar weeriik tugul che po tai eng' emetap Misiri." 
Numbers8:18 Ak ki anam Lawiik kobunjo awale weeriik tugul che po tai eng' piigap Israel. 
Numbers8:19 Eng' piigap Israel, ko ki agoite Lawiik kobunji Aron ak weeriikyik, koek che itabaanatiin si koyai poisyet eng' emait ne kituiyechin ne kata piigap Israel, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo icheek, si ma piit koroito eng' piigap Israel ye riikyin ole-tiliil.”" 
Numbers8:20 Ki yai ko uu nooto anyun Musa, Aron ak tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel, kotabaan Lawiik; ko uu tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers8:21 Ki ianyinygei anyun Lawiik ak kimwet ngoroikwak. Ki igoito anyun Aron icheek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kiongoi ak ki yai kagaigaet agobo icheek koanyiny. 
Numbers8:22 Ye kingo pata nooto, koba ko Lawiik koyai poisyennywa eng' emait ne kituiyechin eng' taitap Aron ak weeriikyik. Ki yachi icheek anyun Lawiik ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers8:23 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers8:24 “Po arorutichu Lawiik: kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ak kwo tai kobendi ko koyai poisyet ne po emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers8:25 ago ye kagoit kenyiisyekwak konom kobagaakta poisyonooto ak ma koboisyee agoi. 
Numbers8:26 Ago toreti kotononjin riipseet kobooto che tupcho eng' emait ne kituiyechin, nganda ma kotinyei icheek poisyo. Iyachini anyun Lawiik ko uu nooto agobo poisyetap riipsosyekwak.”" 
Numbers9:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' surkwen ne po Sinai eng' kenyiitap aeng' eng' arawet ne po tai kobooch ngap komong' icheek eng' emetap Misiri koleenji," 
Numbers9:2 “Ingoriip anyun piigap Israel paska eng' peetuut ne ki king'at. 
Numbers9:3 Oriibe niito eng' koskoleny ne po peetuutap taman ak ang'wan eng' arawani, oriibe ko uu ng'atuutikyik ak ko uu kirwoogutikyik tugul.”" 
Numbers9:4 Ki mwachi anyun `Musa piigap Israel koriip paska. 
Numbers9:5 Ara ki riip icheek paska eng' arawet ne po tai, eng' koskoleny ne po peetuutap taman ak ang'wan eng' surkwen ne po Sinai. Ki yai anyun piigap Israel ko uu tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers9:6 Ago ki miitei piik alage che ki ma imuuch koriip paska eng' peetuunooto amu ki ing'wanitkei agobo muustap chiito. Ki pwa anyun taitap Musa ak Aron eng' peetuunooto," 
Numbers9:7 ak ki leenji `pichooto ineendet, “Ki ng'woneen amu muustap chiito. Amu nee si keetenech kigoite kagoochinetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto piigap Israel eng' peetuut ne ki king'at?”" 
Numbers9:8 Ak ki leenji `Musa icheek, “Ogany si kobiit agas kiit ne ng'atei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek.”" 
Numbers9:9 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers9:10 “Mwachi piigap Israel, ileenji, Ngo ng'wanit chii age tugul eng' okweek anan eng' ibinwekwok agobo muusto anan ngo mi rutoito ole loo komuuchi koboiboiyenji paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers9:11 Ingoriip icheek paska nooto eng' koskoleny ne po peetuutap taman ak ang'wan eng' arawet ne po aeng'. Amei icheek magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek ak ingweek che ng'woneen. 
Numbers9:12 Amat kotuuch kot koeekyi anan koiri kowet, riibei icheek ko uu ng'atuutyet komugul ne po paska." 
Numbers9:13 Ago chiito ne tiliil ne ma miitei rutoito ama riip paska, king'etoi eng' piikyik, amu ma igoito kagoochinetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunnyi ne ki king'at. Ibei chiichooto ineegei kergong'yet ne nyoljin tengektanyi." 
Numbers9:14 “Ak ngo mi chii ne punootyon ne meng'iisyei eng' kwenung'wong' ak komachei koriip paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko nyolu koyai ko uu ng'atuutyetap paska ak ko uu ye ki kiaror. Egu ng'atuutyet agenge eng' chii ne punootyot ak eng' ineendet ne po emoniito.”" 
Numbers9:15 Eng' peetuunooto ne ki kilumdae koyooto, nooto emaitap paornateet, ko ki tuch pooldet koot. Kong'eete koskoleny agoi koeech ko ki mi poldanooto paragutap koot ak ki kergeit ak maat poldanooto." 
Numbers9:16 Ki uu nooto kotugul; ki tuch pooldet koyooto ak kitaagu poldanooto ko uu maat kemoi. 
Numbers9:17 Ye ki ngetogosta parak pooldet eng' Emainooto, koba anyun piigap Israel; ak ole katonone pooldet koteech yooto piigap Israel." 
Numbers9:18 Kibendi piigap Israel eng' ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki meng'iisyei kora eng' ng'atuutyennyi. Ki meng'iisyei icheek peetuusyek tugul kotee kotebee pooldet koyooto." 
Numbers9:19 Ye kingo tebee pooldet koot peetuusyek che chaang', koriip anyun piigap Israel ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama pendi." 
Numbers9:20 Ak ye katebee pooldet koyooto peetuusyek che ng'ering', komeng'iis anyun pichooto ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki pa ko uu ng'atuutyennyi." 
Numbers9:21 Ki peetuusyek alak kotebee pooldet koyooto koskoleny agoi karon. Ak ki ngetogostae pooldet karon, koba anyun. Ye ki ngetogostae poldanooto, ngo peet anan kemoi, koba anyun pichooto." 
Numbers9:22 Kingo tebee pooldet paragutap koot, ngo peetuusyek aeng' anan arawa anan kenyiit, komiitei koyooto, kotebi anyun piigap Israel komeng'iis, ama pendi ui; ago ye ki ngetogostae, koba anyun." 
Numbers9:23 Ki meng'iisyei eng' ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko ki pendi eng' ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kiriibooti ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa. 
Numbers10:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers10:2 “Yachigei igondisyek aeng'; yae che po fedha che kitaanyi si iboisyee tuguuchooto ye iguure tuiyet ak eng' panwegap nganasook. 
Numbers10:3 Ak ye kuut icheek tuguuchooto tuwai koyumjigei tuiyet komugul ole imi, eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers10:4 Ak ngo kuut igoondit agenge, koyumjigei anyun ole imi pounik, kandoigap eliphusyegap Israel." 
Numbers10:5 Ye oguut ne po waagaat, kotoi panda anyun nganasook che menyei komostap kong'asiis." 
Numbers10:6 Ak ye oguut ne po waagaatap aeng', kotoi panda anyun nganasook che menyei komostap murot tai. Kuutetap waagaat ne uu nooto ko kaboorunet ye tau pandanywa." 
Numbers10:7 Ago ye machei koyumgei tuiyet, oguut anyun igondisyek, ago amoguut ne uu ne po waagaat." 
Numbers10:8 Kuutei weeriigap Aron, tisiik, igondisyek, ak egu tuguuchooto eng' okweek ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' ibinwekwok tugul." 
Numbers10:9 “Ye obe lugeet eng' emeng'wong' obaregei ak puunyoot ne usook, oguut anyun igondisyechooto po waagaat, si kibwaatak anyun eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ak kesorwok eng' puunikwok." 
Numbers10:10 Eng' peetuut ne po kaagaaseng'wong' po kei ak eng' igoorwekwok che ki king'at, ye leeldos arawekwok oguut anyun igondisyek eng' paragutap kagoochinoikwok che kibeelei ak eng' paragutap tiseiywek che po kagoochinoikwok che po kaalyeet. Egu chooto kabwaatet eng' okweek eng' taitap Kamuktaindeng'wong'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Numbers10:11 Eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' arawetap aeng' eng' peetuut ne po tiptem, ketogostae pooldet eng' kootap paornateet." 
Numbers10:12 Ki inam anyun piigap Israel panwekwak koba eng' surkwen ne po Sinai, ak ki tonon pooldet eng' surkwen ne po Paran." 
Numbers10:13 Ki toi anyun pandanywa ne po tai ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa. 
Numbers10:14 Ak ki indo songolyetap nganaseet ne po lagogap Judah kosupkei ak pcheutigap lugosyekwak, ak ki pou Nason weeriitap Aminadab." 
Numbers10:15 Ki pou Nethanel weeriitap Suar lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Issakar. 
Numbers10:16 Ak ki pou Eliap weeriitap Elon lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Zebulun. 
Numbers10:17 Ki kibut anyun koot yeityo kotoi koba weeriigap Gerson ak weeriigap Merari, kolaei koyooto." 
Numbers10:18 Ki toi panda nganaseetap Reuben koosup songolyennywa kosupkei ak pcheutigap lugosyekwak, ak ki pou Elisur weeriitap Sedeur." 
Numbers10:19 Ki pou Selumiel weeriitap Surisadai lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Simion. 
Numbers10:20 Ak ki pou Eliasap weeriitap Deuel lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Gad. 
Numbers10:21 Ki toi anyun koba Kohatik kolaei tuguuk che tiliileen, ak kiga kitonon koot kotomo koit icheek." 
Numbers10:22 Ki toi panda nganaseetap lagogap Ephraim kosupkei ak pcheutigap lugosyekwak kosubi songolyennywa, ak ki pou Elisama weeriitap Amihud." 
Numbers10:23 Ak ki pou Gamaliel weeriitap Pedasur lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Manasseh. 
Numbers10:24 Ki pou anyun Abidan weeriitap Gideoni lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Benjamin. 
Numbers10:25 Ne kiletu eng' nganasook tugul, ne ki toi panda ko nganaseetap lagogap Dan kosubi songolyennywa kosupkei ak pcheutigap lugosyekwak, ak ki pou Aieser weeriitap Amisadai." 
Numbers10:26 Ki pou Pagiel weeriitap Okran lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Asher. 
Numbers10:27 Ak ki pou Aira weeriitap Enan lugeetap ooreet ne po lagogap Naphtali. 
Numbers10:28 Ki uu nooto anyun panwegap piigap Israel ko uu lugosyekwak, ye kingo yaptogei icheek." 
Numbers10:29 Ki leenji `Musa Hobap weeriitap Reuel Midianindet, kapyugoinnyi, “Kibendi ole ki iarorwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Agoonok.’ Ongebe tugul ak kiyaun ne myee, amu ki komwa ne myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel.”" 
Numbers10:30 Ki wol ineendet kole, “Ma wendi; ago kaweekyigei emennyu ole mi piikyuk.”" 
Numbers10:31 Ago ki leenji Musa, “Asaain ale amebagaachech amu ingen inyee ole machei kotepto meng'ootennyo eng' surkwen, ak iegu konyekyok." 
Numbers10:32 Ngot keebe tugul, ko kiy age tugul ne myee ne yaiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, keyaun chooto agacheek.”" 
Numbers10:33 Ara ki toi icheek panda ne po peetuusyek somok kong'etye tulweetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki indoe icheek moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pandap peetuusyek somok, kocheeng'jinoti ole imuung'ee." 
Numbers10:34 Ki mi paragunnywa poldetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peet ye kingo toi panda eng' nganaseet. 
Numbers10:35 Atkai tugul ye kingwo tai moinget, kole anyun Musa, “Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ingoiyesta puuniguk ak ingomwei eng' taing'ung' che wechin.”" 
Numbers10:36 Ak ye kingo tonon, kole ineendet, “Weekyigei, Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ole mi eliphuusyek ng'iisyat che po Israel.”" 
Numbers11:1 Ki toi anyun piik kong'unyng'uny ak komwaei che yaach kogasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ye kingo kas ineendet ko kotoigei nereegekyik. Ara ki lal maatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwenunnywa ak ki peel ole po tabanwegap nganaseet." 
Numbers11:2 Ki riirchi anyun `piik Musa ak ki sa `ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogesunotkei maat. 
Numbers11:3 Ara ki kiguure yooto Tabera, amu ki lal maatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwenunnywa." 
Numbers11:4 Ki mi piich alak che chaang' che teerchiin che ki mi kwenutap piigap Israel ak ki sich mageet ne ya pichuuto. Ki riiryo piigap Israel ak icheek kogeny kole, “Ng'oo ne koonech panyeek keam?" 
Numbers11:5 Ki ibwaati njireenik che ki kiame puch eng' Misiri, ingweek, logoek che kigureen melon, kitunguk che eecheen ak che mengeechen ak kitunguk che ng'woneen." 
Numbers11:6 Ago tinyei saboonwekyok munyasta; ma mi kiy age tugul ne kigeeree kobatee mana chu.” 
Numbers11:7 Ki kergei mana ak peek che mubere che leelach ak ki uu itoondanywa kiit ne kiguure bedola. 
Numbers11:8 Kibendoti piik kokweoti, si koip kobwa kong'a eng' koita anan kotui eng' kenusyek, yeityo koyo eng' tereenik ak kochop kobwa magatiinik. Ki chamu amitwok che kagichobei mwaita ne karaaran." 
Numbers11:9 Ye kingo putyi rewoot nganaseet kemoi, kobwanei mana ak rewondonooto." 
Numbers11:10 Ki kas Musa koriirtos piik eng' kooriikwak, chii age tugul eng' kurgeetap emainnyi. Ki toi konereech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising'; ak ki iimak Musa agine." 
Numbers11:11 Ak ki leenji `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Amu nee si iyachi ne ya otwogindeng'ung'? Amu nee si ma nyooru chameet eng' taing'ung', kot igesenjo mileetap pichu tugul?" 
Numbers11:12 Tos anee ne ki asiche pichu tugul? Tos anee ne ki asich kot ileenjo, ‘Kesene tegeng'ung', ko uu ye keseni kwan lakweet ne reryei,’ ile amut koba emet ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyekwak?" 
Numbers11:13 Anyoorchini ano panyeek che agoochini pichu tugul? Amu riirchino koleen, ‘Koonech panyeek, keam.’" 
Numbers11:14 Ma muuchi aneege agesen pichu; amu nyigiis kot eng' anee. 
Numbers11:15 Ngot iyaiywo ko uu ni, asaain ale ibara. Ngo ki anyooru chameet eng' taing'ung', ko mata igoono ageer nyalildanyu.”" 
Numbers11:16 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Iyumwa poisyek tamanwogik tisap che po Israel, che ingen ile icheeget ko poisyek ak pounikwak. Imutu icheek kobwa emait ne kituiyechin si kobiit kotononso kobooten eng' olooto." 
Numbers11:17 Achoorugei anyoone keng'alaal ak inyee eng' olooto, ak anemunenen kebebertap kabuuset ne miten inyee ak ande pichooto. Yeityo kogesen icheek mileetap piik kobooten si ma igeseni inyegei.”" 
Numbers11:18 Ileenji piik, “Oanyinygei agobo mutai, si oam panyeek; amu ki oriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, oleen, ‘Ng'oo ne koonech panyeek keam? Amu ki kigoigoi kemi Misiri.’ Koonok anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor panyeek amu nooto, si oam." 
Numbers11:19 Moame eng' peetuut agenge, anan eng' peetuusyek aeng', anan eng' peetuusyek muut, anan eng' peetuusyek taman, anan eng' peetuusyek tiptem," 
Numbers11:20 ago oame eng' arawet komugul, agoi kong'uchok kot owech. Amu ki oeesye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi kwenung'wong', ak oriirchi ole, ‘Kilya si kemong'u eng' Misiri?’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Ago ki le Musa, “Pichu ami kwenunnywa ko eliphuusyek pogol lo che murenik che punei keelyek; ak kaile igoochini panyeek si koam eng' arawet agenge." 
Numbers11:22 Tos kieng'ji keechiirek ak tuuga si koyam icheek? Anan kiyumi ngirenik tugul che mi nyanjet si koyam icheek?” 
Numbers11:23 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Tos nwach eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Igeere nguno ingosuldoi anan ngo mesuldoi ng'olyoondennyu agobo inyee.”" 
Numbers11:24 Ki manda anyun Musa kwo saang' komwachi piik ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki iyum murenik tamanwogik tisap eng' poisyegap pichooto ak kotet eng' ole neegitee Emait. 
Numbers11:25 Ki choorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pooldet ak kong'alaalji Musa, ak ki nam kebebertap kabuuset ne ki mi ineendet konde poisyechooto tamanwogik tisap. Ye kingo tebee icheek kabuuset komaotenso agobo ng'aleek che pwoonei. Ago mata tuun koyai ko uu nooto kogeny." 
Numbers11:26 Ki kang'et piik aeng'u eng' nganaseet; ki kiguure age Eldad, keguure age Medad. Ki nyoonji icheek kabuuset nganda ki ma pa ole mi emait, ago kibooto pichooto icheeget che kiga kisir. Ki toi komaoten eng' nganaseet." 
Numbers11:27 Ak kilabat murenet age ne neran kwo komwachi Musa koleenji, “Maoteni agobo ng'aleek che pwoonei Eldad ak Medad eng' nganaseet.”" 
Numbers11:28 Ki wol Joshua weeriitap Nun, kiboityotap Musa, ne agenge eng' murenjoto kineran, koleenji, “Musa, kiptaiyandennyu, kergong' icheek!”" 
Numbers11:28 Ki wol Joshua weeriitap Nun, kiboityotap Musa, ne agenge eng' murenjoto kineran, koleenji, “Musa, kiptaiyandennyu, kergong' icheek!”" 
Numbers11:29 Ago ki leenji `Musa ineendet, “Kaamin ng'et kong' agobo anee? Myee nda egu maotik piik tugul che po `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak myee nda indoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kabuusennyi ne Tiliil kotebee icheek!”" 
Numbers11:30 Kiweektagei anyun Musa ak poisyegap Israel nganaseet. 
Numbers11:31 Ki us anyun usoonet ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki ip taok eng' nyanjet ak ki unda taochooto kobutyi nganaseet, ole yamei pandap peetuut agenge ngeng'eete komosi agoi komosin ngeyiem nganaseet. Ki tirirendos taochooto ne yamei mitait agenge kong'etee ng'wony." 
Numbers11:32 Ki ng'eetyo piik peetuunooto komugul, kemounooto komugul ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng' komugul koba koyum taochooto. Ineendet ne ki iyum che ng'ering' ko kiyamei kilo eliphuut agenge. Ki ma pichooto taochooto koyieme nganaseet." 
Numbers11:33 Ye kingo ta komi panyechooto kutusweekwak, kotom kolugui, konereech miising' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo piik, ak ki pare `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek koroito ne ki eet kot." 
Numbers11:34 Ko uu nooto ko ki kiguuree yooto Kibrot-hataaba, amu ki kitupchi olooto piik che ki kipkesinik." 
Numbers11:35 Ki pa piik eng' Kibrot-hataaba agoi koit Haserot ak ki meny olooto. 
Numbers12:1 Kichaam anyun `Miriam ak `Aron Musa amu kobogoryotap Kush ne ki itun; amu ki itun Chepkusyot. 
Numbers12:2 Ki le icheek, “Tos ng'alaali Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Musa ineegei? Tos ma ng'alaalwech agacheek?” Ak ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleechooto." 
Numbers12:3 Ago ki chii ne tala miising' Musa kosiir piik tugul che ki mi ng'wony. 
Numbers12:4 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' yooto Musa, Aron ak Miriam, “Omong'u saang' okweek somogu, obwa emait ne kituiyechin.” Ak ki mong' saang' tugul ko somok." 
Numbers12:5 Ki choorgei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' toloitap pooldet ak kotonone kurgeetap Emait. Ki kuur Aron ak Miriam ak ki pwa icheek tuwai. 
Numbers12:6 Ki leenji anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ogas anyun ng'aleekyuk: Ngo mi maotyot kwenung'wong', aboorchinigei anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'ang'utyet, ang'alaaljini eng' karwotitoet." 
Numbers12:7 Ma uu nooto eng' kiboityondennyu Musa; po iman ineendet eng' koonnyu komugul. 
Numbers12:8 Ki ng'alaaljindos ak ineendet kimni, ma eng' kalewenaik; ak kogeerei ineendet itoondap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kilya anyun si moiywei ochaam kiboityondennyu Musa?”" 
Numbers12:9 Ki toi anyun konereech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo icheek, yeityo kwo." 
Numbers12:10 Ye kingo togosta parak pooldet eng' Emait, ogeero, ki am mogondosaik Miriam, kileelit poortanyi ko uu teluji. Ak ye kingo kusyi kong' Aron, kogeer Miriam kotinyei mogondosaik." 
Numbers12:11 Ki leenji anyun `Aron Musa, “Ee, kiptaiyandennyu, asaain ale amat iityech yaityet agobo tengekto ne kageyai acheek eng' abusnateet." 
Numbers12:12 Asaain ale amat koigei ineendet ne kagome, ne neegit konun poortanyi kotom kesich komong' eng' moetap kamet.”" 
Numbers12:13 Ki riirchi anyun `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor asaain ale isoop ineendet.”" 
Numbers12:14 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Nda kagang'utyi kwandanyi togeet, ko tos kama komurwon peetuusyek tisap? Ingegerchi ineendet saang'utap nganaseet peetuusyek tisap, ak ye ibata kimut kogeny konyo kaa.”" 
Numbers12:15 Ki kigerchi anyun Miriam saang'utap nganaseet peetuusyek tisap. Ki ma testai piik eng' pandanywa agoi kimut Miriam kogeny konyo kaa. 
Numbers12:16 Kingo pata nooto koba piik eng' Haserot, ak koba koteech surkwen ne po Paran." 
Numbers13:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers13:2 “Iyookte murenik koba kosegei emetap Kanaan ne agoochini piigap Israel. Oyooktoi chiito agenge ne kandoindet eng' icheek kwanisyekwak eng' ooreet age tugul ne po.” 
Numbers13:3 Ki iyookto anyun `Musa pichooto eng' surkwen ne po Paran ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Icheeget tugul ko ki kandoik eng' piigap Israel. 
Numbers13:4 Ki chu kainaikwak: Eng' ooreetap Reuben ko ki Samua weeriitap Sakur. 
Numbers13:5 Eng' ooreetap Simion ko ki Sapat weeriitap Hori. 
Numbers13:6 Eng' ooreetap Judah ko ki Kaleb weeriitap Jepune. 
Numbers13:7 Eng' ooreetap Issakar ko ki Igal weeriitap Joseph. 
Numbers13:8 Eng' ooreetap Ephraim ko ki Hoshea weeriitap Nun. 
Numbers13:9 Eng' ooreetap Benjamin, ko ki Palti weeriitap Rapu." 
Numbers13:10 Eng' ooreetap Zebulun ko ki Gadiel weeriitap Sodi. 
Numbers13:11 Eng' ooreetap Joseph ne po ooreetap Manasseh ko ki Gadi weeriitap Susi. 
Numbers13:12 Eng' ooreetap Dan ko ki Amiel weeriitap Gemali. 
Numbers13:13 Eng' ooreetap Asher ko ki Setur weeriitap Mikael. 
Numbers13:14 Eng' ooreetap Naphtali ko ki Nabi weeriitap Bopsi. 
Numbers13:15 Ak eng' ooreetap Gad ko ki Geuel weeriitap Maki. 
Numbers13:16 Chooto kainaigap murenik che ki iyookto Musa koba kosegei emet. (Ak kiguure Musa Hoshea weeriitap Nun, Joshua.)" 
Numbers13:16 Chooto kainaigap murenik che ki iyookto Musa koba kosegei emet. (Ak kiguure Musa Hoshea weeriitap Nun, Joshua.)" 
Numbers13:17 Ki iyookto anyun Musa koba kosegei emetap Kanaan. Ki leenji anyun pichooto, “Obun ooreet ne wendi murot tai, otogoste tuloonook." 
Numbers13:18 Ogeer emet kiit ne uu ak piik che menyei olooto, ngo kiimeen anan ngo nyalulyotin, ngo ng'ering' anan ngo chaang'." 
Numbers13:19 Ogeer ole uu emet ne menyei pichooto, ngo karaaran anan ngo ya. Uu nee nganasook che menyei? Tos ng'ootaatiin anan ma tinyei irimoik?" 
Numbers13:20 Ogeer kogeny kiit ne uu emet, ngo akwai anan ngo kemgem, ak ngo mi keetiik anan ngo ma mi. Onyiganitu anyun ak oibu logoegap emonooto.” Eng' peetuusyechooto, ko ki neegit koruryo sabibuk che po tai." 
Numbers13:21 Ki togosta anyun pichooto koba kosegei emet kong'etee surkwen ne po Sin agoi Rehob, kot koit ye kibunei kebendi Lebo-hamath." 
Numbers13:22 Ki pa anyun kotogostae murot tai agoi koit Hebron. Olooto ole ki menye Ahiman, Sesai, ak Talmai, chooto lagogap Anok. (Kigageteech Hebron kenyiisyek tisap kotom keteech Zoan ne mi Misiri.)" 
Numbers13:23 Ye kingo it atebweetap Eskol, ko kitil temeet agenge ne tinyei logoegap sabibuk ak ki inde keetit si kobiit kotiny kaat piik aeng'u. Ki ip logoegap mogoonik ak logoek alak ak icheek." 
Numbers13:24 Ki kiguure olooto atebweetap Eskol amu logoek che kitil piigap Israel eng' olooto. 
Numbers13:25 Kingo keskei peetuusyek artamu, koweek eng' segeetap emet." 
Numbers13:26 Ki pwa anyun agoi ole mi Musa ak Aron ak tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel eng' surkwen ne po Paran, yooto ko Kadesh. Ki ipchi anyun `segeichooto icheek ak tuiyet komugul ng'aleek ak koboorchi logoegap emonooto." 
Numbers13:27 Ki mwachi `pichooto Musa koleenji, “Kigeit emet ne ki iyooktech keebe, ak eng' iman ko nyiitaat cheego, kumyat ak logoek; chu anyun logoegap emonooto." 
Numbers13:28 Ago kiimeen piik che menyei emonooto, ng'ootaatiin nganasook ak ko eecheen miising'. Kobooto nooto, ko ki kigeer eng' olooto lagogap Anak." 
Numbers13:29 Menyei Amelegik komostap murot tai; komenyei tuloonook Hitik, Jebusik ak Amorik, ak komenyei Kanaanik ngeguutyet ne po araraitap Mediterenian ak atebweetap Jordan.”" 
Numbers13:30 Ki mwachi anyun `Kaleb piik kosiisyo eng' taitap Musa ak koleenji, “Ongetogoste nguno keluul emet, amu kimuuchi kiterteer.”" 
Numbers13:31 Ago ki le piik che kiga togosta koba kobooto ineendet, “Ma kimuuchi keebe kebargei ak pichooto, amu kiimeen kosiirech.”" 
Numbers13:32 Ak ki ipchi piigap Israel ng'aleek che yaacheen agobo emonooto kiga segei. Ki le icheek, “Amei piikyik emonooto ki kibun kesegei. Ak ko kooen miising' piik tugul che ki kigeer eng' olooto." 
Numbers13:33 Ki kigeerchi olooto Nepilik, (weeriigap Anak, che ki punu Nepilik.) Ki kiuu talamik ye kingi rogegei pichooto ak ki kiuu nooto eng' tainnywa.”" 
Numbers14:1 Kiwaach anyun tuiyet komugul koriiryo ak ki iteiyo kemout komugul. 
Numbers14:2 Ki ing'unyng'ung'ji piigap Israel tugul Musa ak Aron ak koleenji, “Ki kaigai nda kiga kibekyi emetap Misiri! Anan nda kebekyi ong'atani!" 
Numbers14:3 Amu nee si komutwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebwa emoni, si kobiit kebarech eng' rotwetap chok? Ak koek osotikyok ak lagokyok luulenik. Tos ma kaigai keeweekyigei Misiri?”" 
Numbers14:4 Ki ng'alaaljigei anyun icheegei kole, “Ongelewen kiptaiyat si keweigei Misiri.”" 
Numbers14:5 Ki ing'uruukso anyun Musa ak Aron kot kotiiny togoochikwak ng'wony eng' taitap piik tugul che po tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel. 
Numbers14:6 Ki pet ngoroikwak Joshua weeriitap Nun ak Kaleb weeriitap Jepune; chuuto tuwai ko ki mi kobooto icheek che kigaba kosegei emet," 
Numbers14:6 Ki pet ngoroikwak Joshua weeriitap Nun ak Kaleb weeriitap Jepune; chuuto tuwai ko ki mi kobooto icheek che kigaba kosegei emet," 
Numbers14:7 ak ki ng'alaalji tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel koleenji, “Emonooto ki kibunate kesegei ko karaaran miising' kosiir." 
Numbers14:8 Ngot kobaibai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' acheek, komutech anyun keebe emonooto ak kogoonech emonooto nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo." 
Numbers14:9 Ago kaigai amongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anan oiywei piigap emet, amu uu amitwogik icheek eng' acheek. Kigeistoe icheek urwetap toreteet ak mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootech, amoiywei icheek.”" 
Numbers14:10 Ago kimwae tuiyet komugul kole kelach icheek eng' koik. Ki took ak komong'ji piigap Israel tugul liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emait ne kituiyechin. 
Numbers14:11 Ak kiteebe `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji, “Renya pichu kot kotyanit? Ma iyana agoi au, agot nganda ki ayai kaboorunoichooto tugul eng' kwenunnywa?" 
Numbers14:12 Abare koroito ak aistoegei icheek, ak ayaaiin iegu pororyet ne oo ne kiim kosiir icheek.”" 
Numbers14:13 Ki leenji anyun `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Kasei anyun Misiriik agobo ng'olyoondoniito ki imutu pichuuto kotogos eng' kwenunnywa eng' kimnateng'ung'," 
Numbers14:14 komwachi piigap emoniito. Ki kogas icheek kole imi inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenutap pichu. Amu itaagu inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kimni, tonone poldeng'ung' paragunnywa ak indoe icheek eng' toloitap pooldet peet ak eng' toloitap maat kemoi." 
Numbers14:15 Ngot ibar pichu kibagenge, komwa anyun pororyosyek che ki kogas agobo ng'aleeguk kole," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Ki kobarchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pichooto surkwen amu ki ma imuuch ineendet komut icheek koba emet ne kiga koyasyechi.’ 
Numbers14:17 Asaain anyun nguno ale, ingoeet kimnateetap Kiptaiyat ko uu ye kaimwa ile," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Ma sip konereechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko nyiitaat rireenet, ne nyochin kaat tengekto ak pistoet ama nyochin kaat puch kiptengekyot; ago iityin lagok agobo tengektap kwanisyekwak agoi ibinda ne po somok ak ne po ang'wan.’" 
Numbers14:19 Asaain ale nyochi kaat anyun pichu tengektonywa ko uu ooindap rireeneng'ung' ak ko uu ye ki inyochigaat pichu kobooch Misiri agoi kora.” 
Numbers14:20 Ki wol Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ka anyochi kaat icheek ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Numbers14:21 Ago iman, ko uu ye asabe ak ko uu ye tuun nyiei ng'wony komugul toroorindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Numbers14:22 koma mi agot agenge eng' pichu tugul che ki kogeer toroorindanyu ak kaboorunoikyuk che ki ayai eng' Misiri ak eng' surkwen. Ko uu ye ki kotyema konyil taman, ama epchi iit kutinnyu," 
Numbers14:23 koma keerei iman emonooto ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwak. Ama keerei age tugul eng' icheek che kisasa. 
Numbers14:24 Kobatee kiboityondennyu Kaleb amu ki tinyei sabeet age ak ki isuba eng' kagesunatetapkei, amuti ineendet kwo emonooto kigawo ak kobunji iyotennyi." 
Numbers14:25 Amu menyei atebweet Amelegik ak Kanaanik, ko oweigei anyun mutai ak obe surkwen otokyigei ooreet ne wendi Nyanjet ne Piriir.”" 
Numbers14:26 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji," 
Numbers14:27 “Amuitoi eng' tuiyoni ya ne ing'unyng'ung'jino kot kotyanit? Koagas kang'unyng'unyetap piigap Israel che ing'unyng'ung'jino. 
Numbers14:28 Ileenji icheek, Kale Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ‘Ko uu ye asabe ak ko uu ye kaomwaiwo agas eng' itiikyuk, ayaiywok anyun ko uu nooto:" 
Numbers14:29 Obekyini ong'atani tugul che ki kiit eng' okweek, kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai che ki kong'unyng'ung'ja," 
Numbers14:30 mooite emonooto iman ne ki ayosyechigei ale agoonok omeny olooto, kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune ak Joshua weeriitap Nun, chooto icheegei kityo che itei." 
Numbers14:30 mooite emonooto iman ne ki ayosyechigei ale agoonok omeny olooto, kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune ak Joshua weeriitap Nun, chooto icheegei kityo che itei." 
Numbers14:31 Ago amuti lagokwok che ki ole egu luulenik koba emonooto, si konai icheek emet ne ki oeesye." 
Numbers14:32 Ago okweek, obekyini ong'atani." 
Numbers14:33 Iyogisyote lagokwok eng' ong'atani kenyiisyek artam ak koibot kugoinateng'wong' agoi kigees ne po let eng' okweek koek muuswek eng' surkwen. 
Numbers14:34 Ko uu koitetap peetuusyek che ki otar eng' segeetap emet, chooto peetuusyek artam, ko peetuut age tugul ko kenyiit, oiboti anyun tengekwogikwok kenyiisyek artam si kobiit onai ye aistoenok kayomisutyennyu.’" 
Numbers14:35 Kaamwa anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kaayosyechi ale ayachini chuuto tugul tuiyoni ya ne katila let. Igesyingei icheek ong'atani, pekyin icheek olito.”" 
Numbers14:36 Ki pek pichooto che ki iyookto Musa koba kosegei emet, che ki week, che ki pwa kogoochi piik kong'unyng'ung'ji ineendet, amu ng'aleek che yaach che ki ip agobo emonooto." 
Numbers14:37 Ki pek icheek ki ip ng'aleek che yaach agobo emet ko ki pek tugul eng' koroito eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers14:38 Ago ki ng'et Joshua weeriitap Nun ak Kaleb weeriitap Jepune, eng' piik che kigaba kosegei emet." 
Numbers14:38 Ago ki ng'et Joshua weeriitap Nun ak Kaleb weeriitap Jepune, eng' piik che kigaba kosegei emet." 
Numbers14:39 Ye kingo mwachi `Musa piigap Israel ng'aleechuuto tugul, koriiryo icheek miising'." 
Numbers14:40 Ki ng'eetyo anyun karon miising' ak kotogosta agoi tulweet parak koleen, “Kimi yu, kagibe ketogoste ole ki komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu kogeyai tengekto.”" 
Numbers14:41 Ago ki leenji Musa, “Amu nee si obistoe ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Amu ma isuldoi ng'olyoot ngeyai ne uu nooto." 
Numbers14:42 Amat otogoste amu ma mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootok, si ma parak koterteerak eng' puunikwok." 
Numbers14:43 Amu mi taing'wong' eng' olooto Amelegik ak Kanaanik. Amu ki oweegei let ama osup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma mi anyun ineendet kobootok ak ki parok eng' rotwetap chok.”" 
Numbers14:44 Agot nga uu nooto, ko ki ma kas iit icheek, ago ki pa kin icheek agoi tulweet parak. Ki ma kiip moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nganaseet ak ki ma wo Musa agine." 
Numbers14:45 Ki choorgei anyun Amelegik ak Kanaanik che ki menyei tulwoonooto ak ki par icheek ak ki oon agoi koit Horma. 
Numbers15:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers15:2 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Ye oit emetap ne agoonok koek meng'otosyekwok;" 
Numbers15:3 ak omach ochopchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne punei maat, ngo kagoochinet ne kibeelei anan tiseiywot, si kobiit ogesu kayasyoet anan kagoochinet ne po chamyet anan eng' igoorwek che ki king'at, si oyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyamdutyet ne anyiny ne po tuuga anan ko ne po neego," 
Numbers15:4 ko ingogoito anyun ineendet ne igoitoi kagoochinennyi kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kagoochinet ne po peek; chooto ko keruutyet agenge ne po peek che kaging'a che tambululeen che ki kiburukto litait agenge ne po mwaita." 
Numbers15:5 Ingoito anyun litait agenge ne po divaik kobunji kagoochinet ne kieei, chop chooto kobooto kagoochinet ne kibeelei anan ko tiseiywot, si kigoito kobooto aarwet age tugul ne po keechiir." 
Numbers15:6 Ngo mengit, ichop kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin keruutik aeng' che ki kiburukto mwaita ne po litait agenge ak kebeberyat," 
Numbers15:7 ak igoite kagoochinet ne kieei ne po litait agenge ak kebeberyat ne po divaik koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers15:8 Ye ichop kirgit ne ming'in koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei anan ko ne po tiseiywot, si kobiit igeesu kayasyoet anan ko che po kagoochinoigap kaalyeet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Numbers15:9 ingogoito anyun kobooto kirgooto kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin che po keruutik somok che ki kiburukto mwaita ne po litaisyek aeng'. 
Numbers15:10 Ak igoite divaik che po litaisyek aeng' koek kagoochinet ne kieei, ne punei maat koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers15:11 “Kiyachin ko uu nooto kirgit age tugul, mengit age tugul, aarwet age tugul ne po keechiir ne mengit anan aarwetap ng'oroor." 
Numbers15:12 Oyachini age tugul ko uu koiitennywa, ko uu koitet ne ochobe." 
Numbers15:13 Yaei ko uu nooto tugul che salu kaa, ye igoitoi kagoochinet ne punei maat kobunji nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers15:14 Ak ngo mi kipsagarin kobootok anan chii age tugul ne mi kobootok eng' ibinwekwok tugul ak komach kogoito kagoochinet ne punei maat kobunji nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koyaei agine ko uu ye oyae." 
Numbers15:15 Agenge ng'atuutyet ne po chii age tugul eng' okweek agot eng' kiprutoiyot ne meng'iisyei kobootok, ng'atuutyet ne tebyei agoi eng' ibinwekwok tugul. Ko uu ole oteptoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotebyei ko uu nooto agine kiprutoiyot." 
Numbers15:16 Egu ng'atuutyet agenge ak kirwooget agenge eng' okweek ak eng' chii ne punootyot ne mi kobootok.” 
Numbers15:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers15:18 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, Ye oit emet ne amutok," 
Numbers15:19 ak ye oam amitwogigap emonooto, ogoitoi kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak, kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers15:20 Ogoitoi magatyat ne ming'in kobunji kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak eng' magatinikwok che po tai, ogoitoi ko uu nooto ko uu ye oyae agobo rwanyut ne kiboorsee." 
Numbers15:21 Ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor magatyandeng'wong' ne po tai koek kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak eng' ibinwekwok tugul. 
Numbers15:22 “Ak ye oleel, amoriip ng'atuutichu tugul ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa," 
Numbers15:23 tugul che king'ataak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa kobooch ye kigon ng'atuutik agoi ibinwekwok tugul. 
Numbers15:24 Ko ngo lel chii ama nai tuiyet, kogoitoi anyun tuiyet komugul kirgit ne neran kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinennyi ne kieei ko uu ng'atuutyet. Igoitoi kora tuiyet kwesta agenge ne po kagoochinet agobo tengekto." 
Numbers15:25 Ingoyai anyun tisiindet kagaigaet agobo tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel, ak kenyochigaat amu ko lelutyennywa koma eng' kwetyinet, ak kagoget kagoochinennywa ne punei maat ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nooto kagoochinennywa ne po tengekto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers15:26 Ak kenyochigaat tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel kobooto toondet ne meng'iisyei eng' kwenunnywa, amu ki yai lelutyonooto piik tugul amengen." 
Numbers15:27 “Ago ngo lel chii age tugul amaingen, kogoito anyun subeendap ng'oroor ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kagoochinet agobo tengekto." 
Numbers15:28 Ingoyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo chiichooto lelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne kayai tengekto amaingen, ak kenyochigaat ineendet." 
Numbers15:29 Ng'atuutyoni agenge koboisye eng' okweek kogergeit eng' chiito ne kalel kiy age tugul amaingen, eng' piigap Israel ak eng' toondet ne meng'iisyei eng' kwenunnywa." 
Numbers15:30 “Ago chiito ne yaei kiy age tugul kokwetyin, ngo neng'wong' anan kipsagarin, ko kachup `chiichooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak nyolu king'etoi chiichooto eng' piikyik." 
Numbers15:31 Amu kasas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kagobut ng'atuutyennyi, king'etoi chiichooto kobet. Tebee ineendet tengektanyi.”" 
Numbers15:32 Ak ye kita komi piigap Israel surkwen, konyoor chiito koyumoti kweenik eng' peetuutap sabato." 
Numbers15:33 Ki imut piik che kinyooru chiichooto koyumi kweenik kwo ole mi Musa ak Aron, agoi ole mi tuiyet komugul," 
Numbers15:34 ak kigerchi ineendet ko amu kitom kemwa kiit ne ki itoi chiichooto. 
Numbers15:35 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Kibarei chiichooto iman. Ingolach tuiyet komugul eng' koik eng' saang'utap nganaseet.”" 
Numbers15:36 Ara ki imut `tuiyet komugul ineendet kwo saang'utap nganaseet ak kolage koik agoi kome, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers15:38 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin konapchigei tuguuk che uu sawoik eng' tabanwegap ngoroikwak eng' ibinwek tugul ak kogurmane usiit ne buluu paragutap sawoichooto mi tabanda age tugul. 
Numbers15:39 Egu anyun sawoiyot eng' okweek ne ogeere ak obwaat ng'atuutik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oyai, si mosup kiit ne machei mugulelwekwok ak konyekwok, che ki cham osubi oibegei." 
Numbers15:40 Si kobiit obwaat ak oyai ng'atuutikyuk tugul ak oegu che tiliileen eng' Kamuktaindeng'wong'. 
Numbers15:41 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ne ki imoong'wok omang'une emetap Misiri, si aek Kamuktaindeng'wong'. Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Numbers16:1 Ki iyum piik anyun `Kora weeriitap Itshar, weeriitap Kohat weeriitap Lawi, kobooto Datan ak Abiram weeriigap Eliap, ak On weeriitap Phelet, weeriigap Reuben," 
Numbers16:2 ak kong'eetyo kongelelso eng' taitap Musa kobooto piigap Israel alak. Ki mi kobooto icheeget pounik, piik che taagunotiin pogol aeng' ak konom che po tuiyet che ki kiguur kobwa ole katuiyechi piik." 
Numbers16:3 Ki iyumgei icheegei si kobiit kotil let Musa ak Aron, ak koleenji icheek, “Otoroorigei kot kotyanit! Tuiyoni komugul ko tiliil, ak chii age tugul ko tiliil, ak mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenunnywa. Amu nee anyun si otoroorgei osiir tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
Numbers16:4 Ye kingo kas Musa ng'olyoondonooto, kong'uruuk kot koit ng'wony togeennyi eng' kaimetapkei." 
Numbers16:5 Yeityo komwachi Kora ak piikyik koleenji, “Ibooru Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mutai karon che chechiik ak ne tiliil. Ineendet ne kaguur kwo ole mi ineendet, koriikyi, ko nooto ne leweni." 
Numbers16:6 Inyee Kora, ak piiguk tugul, oyai ko uu ni: oip tereenik okweek," 
Numbers16:7 onde mastinwek tereenichooto oriit ak onde mutai karon nyamdutik che kibeelei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tiliil anyun chiichooto leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kaoeetkei okweek weeriigap Lawi.” 
Numbers16:8 Ki leenji `Musa Kora, “Ogas anyun, okweek weeriigap Lawi!" 
Numbers16:9 Tos ogeere ole ming'in ng'olyoondoni eng' okweek amu ki itabaanak Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel eng' tuiyetap Israel, si komutak ooriikyi ineendet, si oyai poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak otononse eng' taitap tuiyet oboisyechi icheek?" 
Numbers16:10 Ki komutwak ooriigu ak tupchosyeguk tugul weeriigap Lawi. Tos omache tiseinateet agine? 
Numbers16:11 Koyumgei anyun inyee oegu agenge ak piiguk otil let Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Aron ko ng'oo kot ong'unyng'ung'ji?” 
Numbers16:12 Ki iyookto `Musa chiito keguur Datan ak Abiram weeriigap Eliap. Ago ki le, “Ma kibwane!" 
Numbers16:13 Tos igeere ile kiy ne ming'in ye ki imutwech ketogosu eng' emet ne kinyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo si ibarchech ong'atani? Ak nguno imache iegu pounindet, iboiywech-i?" 
Numbers16:14 Kosiir nooto koma imutyech emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo ama igoonech poroteetap mbareenik ak che po sabibuk. Tos ngiroo ko ki piik acheek che king'ale? Ma kibwane!” 
Numbers16:15 Ki nereech Musa miising' ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Amecham kagoochinennywa! Tom aibe agot sigirit agenge, ak tomo alelji chii agenge eng' icheek.”" 
Numbers16:16 Yeityo koleenji `Musa Kora, “Obwa taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mutai, inyee ak piiguk tugul kobooto Aron agine." 
Numbers16:17 Ingoip chii tugul tereennyi ak konde nyamdutik che kibeelei, yeityo koip chii tugul tereennyi konyo taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tereenichooto tugul, ko pogol aeng' ak konom. Ak iibu tereeng'ung' inyee ak Aron, chii tugul ak tereennyi.”" 
Numbers16:18 Ki ip anyun chii tugul tereennyi ak konde maat oriit, yeityo konde tuguuk che kibeelei maat parak, ak kotonon kobooto Musa ak Aron eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers16:19 Ye kita koiyumi `Kora tuiyet komugul kotil let icheek eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, komong' liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tait tuiyet tugul." 
Numbers16:20 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji," 
Numbers16:21 “Otabaanegei tuiyoni okweek si kobiit awong' icheek.” 
Numbers16:22 Ago ki ing'uruukso icheek kot kotiiny togoochikwak ng'wony ak kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne po saboonwegap piik tugul, tos inereekyini tuiyet komugul ngo yai chiito agenge tengekto?”" 
Numbers16:23 Ak ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers16:24 “Mwachi tuiyet ileenji, ‘Oistoegei meng'ootetap Kora ak Datan ak Abiram.’ ”" 
Numbers16:25 Ki ng'eet Musa kwo kap Datan ak Abiram ak ki isup ineendet poisyegap Israel. 
Numbers16:26 Ki mwachi tuiyet koleenji, “Asaok ale oistoegei emaisyegap kiptengeginichu! Amat otwaa kiy age tugul nenywa si ma kiwong'wok eng' tengekwogikwak.”" 
Numbers16:27 Ki istogei anyun icheek eng' komosta age tugul ne po meng'ootetap Kora, Datan ak Abiram. Ki pwa saang' Datan ak Abiram ak kotononso eng' kurgeetap emaisyekwak kobooto osotikwak ak weeriikwak ak lagokwak." 
Numbers16:28 Ki le Musa, “Onae ni ole ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ayai poisyonichu tugul, ak ma ayai eng' magennyu." 
Numbers16:29 Ngot kobek pichu ko uu ye pegu piik tugul anan ngot keyachi icheek ko uu ye kiyachin piik tugul ko kaagaa ma iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers16:30 Ago ngot koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy ne taunen, ak koyaat ng'wony kutinnyi, ak kolugui icheek kobooto tuguukwak tugul ak kochoortagei keriinget kosaptos, onai anyun ole ki sas `pichu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Numbers16:31 Ak kingo kagomwa ng'aleechooto tugul kogees, kobetak ng'wony ye ki mi." 
Numbers16:32 Ki yaat ng'wony kutinnyi kolugui icheek ak piikwak, kobooto piik tugul che kiga namgei ak Kora ak tuguukwak tugul." 
Numbers16:33 Ki pa keriinget kosaptos pichooto ak icheeget che ki mi tugul. Ki tuch `ng'wony icheek ak ki lusyo anyun eng' tuiyet. 
Numbers16:34 Ki mweiso anyun Yahudik tugul che ki mi ole neegitee icheek ye kingo kas kateennywa, amu ki le, “Si ma luguech ng'wony agacheek!”" 
Numbers16:35 Ki mong' maat anyun eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki peel pichooto pogol aeng' ak konom che ki igoitoi nyamdutik che kibeelei. 
Numbers16:36 Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers16:37 “Mwachin Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet koisto tereenik eng' maat ak iwas maat eng' olooto, amu tiliileen tereenichooto." 
Numbers16:38 Ara agobo tereenigap kiptengeginik che kogorwookyigei icheegei kot kobek, ko ingitaany anyun kolebelitu si ketuge kaptisisyet, amu ki igoito tuguuchooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ara tiliileen anyun amu nooto. Si koek chooto kaboorunet eng' piigap Israel.”" 
Numbers16:39 Ki ip anyun Eleazar tereenichooto po sugunonik, che kiga kogoito icheeget che ki kibeel, ak ki kitaany tuguuchooto si ketuge kaptisisyet." 
Numbers16:40 Ki ek nooto kabwaatet eng' piigap Israel si ma riik toondet ne ma po ooreetap Aron, nyoo kobeel nyamdutik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si ma igei Kora ak piikyik. Ki yaak chooto ko uu ye ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' Musa." 
Numbers16:41 Ago ki ing'unyng'ung'ji Musa ak Aron `tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel eng' peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto kole, “Koobar piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Numbers16:42 Ak ye kingo kagoyumgei tuiyet, si kotil let Musa ak Aron, kogiguskong' icheek ak kogeer ole mi Emait ne Ketuiyechin, kooro kole, ki tuch pooldet emainooto, ak ki took liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers16:43 Ak ki pa Musa ak Aron taitap emait ne kituiyechin. 
Numbers16:44 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers16:45 “Oistoegei tuiyoni, si kobiit awong' icheek.” Ak ki ing'uruuk kot kotiiny togeennyi ng'wony." 
Numbers16:46 Yeityo koleenji `Musa Aron, “Ip tereeng'ung' ak inde maat ne punu kaptisisyet tereet oriit ak inde nyamdutik paragunnyi yeityo iip ichaaktae kwo ole miitei tuiyet si iyachi kagaigaet. Amu kagobun nereegek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kagotoigei koroito.”" 
Numbers16:47 Ki ip anyun Aron tereennyi ko uu ye kagamwa Musa ak kilabat kwo kwenutap tuiyet. Kooro kole, kagotoigei koroito eng' piik. Ki peel anyun nyamdutik ak koyachi kagaigaet piik." 
Numbers16:48 Ki tonon eng' kwenutap che kagobek ak che saptos, ak ki siis koroito." 
Numbers16:49 Icheek che ki pek eng' koroito, ko ki eliphuusyek taman ak ang'wan ak pogol tisap, koma ki itito che ki pek amu ng'aleegap Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Yeityo koweek anyun Aron kwo ole mi Musa agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, amu kiga kosiis koroito." 
Numbers17:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers17:2 “Ng'alaalji piigap Israel ak iibune kirokweek taman ak aeng': kirokto agenge eng' koot age tugul ne po kwanisyekwak eng' pounikwak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. Sirchi kainetap chii age tugul kiroktonyi. 
Numbers17:3 Sirchi kainetap Aron kirokto ne po Lawi, amu punjin kirokto agenge pounindet age tugul ne po kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers17:4 Yeityo igonor kirokwechooto eng' emait ne kituiyechin eng' taitap paornateet, ole kituiyechini ak okweek." 
Numbers17:5 Yeityo kong'at kirokto ne po chiito ne aleweni, ak awong'u eng' tainnyu kang'unyng'unyet ne ing'unyng'ung'jinok piigap Israel.”" 
Numbers17:6 Ara ki ng'alaalji `Musa piigap Israel, ak ki igoochi pounikwak tugul ineendet kirokweek taman ak aeng', kirokto agenge eng' pounindet age tugul ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak, ak ki miitei kirokto ne po Aron kobooto chechwaak." 
Numbers17:7 Ki igonor Musa kirokwechooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emaitap paornateet. 
Numbers17:8 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi, kwo Musa emaitap paornateet oriit, ak kooro kole, kogong'at kirokto ne po Aron ne po ooreetap Lawi, ak koyesyo taaptook, ak kogoi lagoek che ruryotiin che kiguure almond." 
Numbers17:9 Ki ip anyun Musa kirokweek tugul kobunu taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si konde taitap piigap Israel tugul. Ki keer, ak ki inem chii age tugul kiroktonyi." 
Numbers17:10 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Ketite kirokto ne po Aron kwo taitap paornateet, si kegonor koek kaboorunet eng' piik ngelelik, si kobiit iwong'u kang'unyng'unyennywa ne ing'unyng'ung'jino, si ma pek.”" 
Numbers17:11 Ki yai anyun Musa ko uu nooto, ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers17:12 Ki mwachi `piigap Israel Musa koleenji, “Keero, kagibegu, kagelusye, kagelusye tugul!" 
Numbers17:13 Meei chii age tugul ne riikyin kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos kiwong'ugei acheek tugul?” 
Numbers18:1 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron, “Oibe tengektap ole-tiliil, inyee ak weeriiguk ak kootap kwanisyeguk. Oibe okweegei tengektap tiseinateng'wong', inyee ak weeriiguk." 
Numbers18:2 Ara imutu koriik tupchosyeguk ak icheek che po ooreetap Lawi, ooreetap kwandang'ung', si kobiit onamgei ak icheeget ak koboisyeun. Ago otebee taitap Emait ne po Paornateet, inyee ak weeriiguk." 
Numbers18:3 Ak koriip icheek ng'atuutyeng'ung' ak ng'atuutyet ne po Emait komugul. Ago amat keriikyi tuguuk che po ole-tiliil anan kapkorosuut, si ma pek icheek, anan ko okweek." 
Numbers18:4 Kiyomenen pichooto si koriip icheek ng'atuutyetap emait ne kituiyechin ak agobo poisyet tugul ne po Emait. Ak amat koriikyok toondet age tugul. 
Numbers18:5 Oriip oyai ng'atuutyetap ole-tiliil ak ng'atuutyetap kapkorosuut, si mata kobiit nereegek kogeny agobo piigap Israel." 
Numbers18:6 Kaatabaan anee tupchosyekwok Lawiik eng' piigap Israel koek icheek kagoochinet eng' okweek. Kigoochin icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobois eng' emait ne kituiyechin. 
Numbers18:7 Oriip inyee ak weeriiguk tiseinateng'wong' agobo kiy age tugul ne po kapkorosuut ak che po chooto mi oriit eng' angeet ne ki kioye, ak oboisyee. Kagoonok tiseinateet koek poisyetap konunet. Kibarei too age tugul ne riikyin.”" 
Numbers18:8 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron, “Kaagoonin riipseet ne po konunoikyuk che kinamjin parak, tuguuk tugul che itabaanatiin che po piigap Israel. Kaagoonin inyee ak weeriiguk tuguuchooto, amu kailset, koek ng'atuutyet ne po agoi." 
Numbers18:9 Egu cheguuk tuguuchooto eng' che tiliileen miising', che kita kibeelei: kiy age tugul ne koonu icheek, che ibwo, ngo kagoochinennywa age tugul ne po peek, konunennywa age tugul ne po tengekto, anan agot age tugul ne po kachililutyet, ko punjinin inyee ak weeriiguk." 
Numbers18:10 Iame tuguuchooto eng' ole-tiliil. Amei age tugul ne muren; egu ne tiliil eng' inyee. 
Numbers18:11 “Neng'ung' ni agine: kagoochinennywa ne kinamjin parak ne po konunenywa eng' kagoochinoikwak tugul che kiongoi che po piigap Israel. Kaagoonin chooto kobooto weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk, ko uu ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny. Amei chii age tugul ne po koong'ung' ne ma ng'waan." 
Numbers18:12 “Kaagoonin tongoanikwak tugul che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tugul che myachen che po mwanik, divaik tugul che korooron che po kesisyetap sabibuk, ak che po peek che myachen." 
Numbers18:13 Punjinin tongoanik che po tuguuk tugul che mi emennywa, che ipchin `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amei age tugul ne ma ng'waan ne po koong'ung'." 
Numbers18:14 Punjinin kiy age tugul ne itabaanat eng' Israel. 
Numbers18:15 “Punjinin age tugul ne yaatei iyoteet, eng' piik ak eng' che kiyagi, che igoochin `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago ityaachi iman che po tai eng' sigeet eng' piik, ak ityaachi che twatei che ng'woneen eng' che kiyagi." 
Numbers18:16 Chooto che kityaachi eng' icheeget, ko che po kobooch arawet agenge ak kwo tai. Ityachi ko uu kamanuutyet ne igerchini koek fedhaisyegap shekelisyek muut, ko uu kereetap ole-tiliil (nooto ko gerahisyek tiptem)." 
Numbers18:17 Ago amat ityaach ne twatei teta, keechiiryet ak ng'orooryet; tiliileen chooto. Iise kaptisisyet korotiikwak; ak ibeel mwanikwak koek kagoochinet ne punei maat, koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers18:18 Ak kobunjiin panyeekwak, ko uu ye neng'ung' tagateet ne keongoi; ak chaatit ne po komostap tai." 
Numbers18:19 “Kaagoonin kobooto weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk kagoochinoik tugul che kinamjin parak che po tuguuk che tiliileen, che igoochin `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny. Niito anyun kayomisetap muunyuk ne po koigeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' inyee ak eng' iyoteng'ung'.”" 
Numbers18:20 Ki leenji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Aron, “Menyooru poroteet eng' emennywa, amenyooru kebeberta age tugul eng' kwenunnywa. Anee kebebertang'ung' ak poroteng'ung' eng' kwenutap piigap Israel.”" 
Numbers18:21 “Kaagoochi lagogap Lawi kebeberwek tugul che po taman eng' Israel koek porotennywa, kogeere poisyennywa ne yaei, nooto poisyetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers18:22 Kobooch nguno ko mariikyin piigap Israel emait ne kituiyechin, si ma nyoor tengekto, ak kobek." 
Numbers18:23 Ago yaei Lawiik poisyetap emait ne kituiyechin, ak koip tengektonywa. Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' ibinwekwok tugul. Ago ma nyooru poroteet icheek eng' piigap Israel." 
Numbers18:24 Amu kaagoochi Lawiik koek porotennywa kebebertap taman ne po piigap Israel, ne igoochin icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak. Kaamwachi anyun icheek aleenji, ma nyooru icheek poroteet eng' kwenutap piigap Israel.”" 
Numbers18:25 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers18:26 “Mwachi kogeny Lawiik ileenji: Ye otaach kebeberwegap taman eng' piigap Israel, chooto kaagoonok kobunu icheek; koek poroteng'wong', ogoite anyun kebebertap taman eng' kebeberato koek kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak, kobunji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers18:27 Ki ityok kagoochineng'wong' ne kinamjin parak, ko uu ye ki iti peek che po rwanyut ne kiboorsee ak ko uu nyiietap ole kitue sabibuk." 
Numbers18:28 Ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak okweek ko uu nooto kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak ne po kebeberwekwok tugul che po taman, che otaache eng' piigap Israel. Ogoochi eng' chooto kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Aron tisiindet." 
Numbers18:29 Ogoitoi kagoochinet age tugul ne kinamjin parak ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' konunoikwok tugul, eng' chooto myachen, koek kebebertanyi ne ki kitabaan." 
Numbers18:30 Mwachi anyun icheek amu nooto ileenji: Ye onamjini parak eng' chooto myachen, ki ityin anyun Lawiik ko uu ye ki iti rurateet eng' rwanyut ne kiboorsee ak ko uu ye ki iti rurateet eng' ole kitue sabibuk." 
Numbers18:31 Oam chooto eng' komoswek tugul, okweek ak piigap kooriikwok; amu chooto melekwekwok che po poisyeng'wong' eng' emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers18:32 Moibe tengekto eng' nooto, ye kaonamji parak che myachen eng' chooto, ak mong'wanit tuguuk che tiliileen che po piigap Israel, si mobegu.”" 
Numbers19:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron koleenji," 
Numbers19:2 “Kaneetisyet ni ne po ng'atuutyet ne ki kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Mwachi piigap Israel kogetun rooryat ne piriir ne ma tinyei peruut, ne libwoop ne tomo kerat." 
Numbers19:3 Igoochi Eleazar tisiindet, kokweri kwo saang'utap nganaseet ak koeny chiito eng' tainnyi." 
Numbers19:4 “Ak korooch Eleazar mornennyi korotiigap rooryandanooto, ak koisisye korotichooto konyil tisap kotokyi taitap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers19:5 Ingebeel `chiito rooryandanooto eng' tainnyi; kobooto muitonyi, panyeekyik, korotiikyik ak eiyandennyi." 
Numbers19:6 Ak konam tisiindet tarakwet, husop ak ngoryeet ne piriir kowiirchi maat ne kagibeele rooryat." 
Numbers19:7 Yeityo komwet tisiindet ngoroikyik ak kouungei eng' peek. Ye ibata konyo nganaseet, ak murwoniitu ineendet agoi koimen." 
Numbers19:8 Mwetei ngoroikyik agine ineendet ne peelei rooryandanooto, ak kouungei, ak murwoniitu agoi koimen." 
Numbers19:9 Ingoyum anyun oreegap rooryandanooto chiito ne ma ng'waan, ak konde saang'utap nganaseet eng' komosta ne tiliil. Ak kegonorchi chooto tuiyetap piigap Israel koek peegap katabaanet. Niito kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Numbers19:10 Mwetei ngoroikyik ne iyumi orechooto ak komurwoniit agoi koimen. Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po koigeny eng' piigap Israel ak toondet ne meng'iisyei eng' kwenunnywa. 
Numbers19:11 “Murwoniitu peetuusyek tisap ineendet ne twaei muusto ne po chii age tugul. 
Numbers19:12 Ianyinyegei peechooto ineendet eng' peetuutap somok ak eng' peetuutap tisap, ak kotiliilit. Ago ngot ko meanyinygei eng' peetuutap somok ak eng' peetuutap tisap, koma tiliiliitu." 
Numbers19:13 Imurwoni kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor age tugul ne twaei muustap chii age tugul ne kame, ama ianyinygei, king'etoi anyun chiichooto eng' Israel. Amu ma ki ise peegap katabaanet, murwoon anyun ineendet, ak ta komi murwoonindanyi ineendet." 
Numbers19:14 “Ng'atuutyet ni ne po chii ne kame eng' emait oriit: murwoniitu eng' peetuusyek tisap chii age tugul ne wendi emainooto oriit ak age tugul ne mi emait. 
Numbers19:15 Ng'waan kiy age tugul ne yaataat; ne ma ki rat kiit ne kigeree. 
Numbers19:16 Age tugul ne twaei eng' kewanin chii ne ko ki par eng' rotwetap chok, anan muusto, anan kowetap chiito, anan ko kererit, ko murwoniitu peetuusyek tisap."
