Numbers19:17 “Agobo ineendet ne murwoon ko ingoip icheek oreegap kagoochinet ne kagebeel ne po tengekto, ak kotesyi orechooto mi tereet peek che rootei." 
Numbers19:18 Ak konam anyun chiito ne ki kianyiny husop ak korooch peechooto, ak koisee emait, tuguuk tugul, piik che komi olooto, ineendet ne kotwa kowet, ne ko ki par, muusto, anan ko kererit." 
Numbers19:19 Ak kois chiito ne ki kianyiny, ineendet ne murwoon, eng' peetuutap somok ak eng' peetuutap tisap, ak koanyiny ineendet eng' peetuutap tisap. Ingomwet ngoroikyik ak kouungei, ak koanyinyit ko kaimen." 
Numbers19:20 “Ak chiito ne murwoon, ne ma ianyinygei, keistoi chiichooto eng' kwenutap tuiyet, amu kagong'wanit ole-tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ma ki ise ineendet peek che po katabaanet, murwoon ineendet." 
Numbers19:21 Egu ng'atuutyet ne po agoi eng' icheek. Mwetei ngoroikyik ineendet ne isisye peegap katabaanet, ak ineendet ne twaei peechooto po katabaanet ko murwoniitu agoi koimen." 
Numbers19:22 Ng'wanitu kiy age tugul ne twaei chiichooto murwoon, ak ineendet ne twaei kioto ko murwoniitu agoi koimen.”" 
Numbers20:1 Ki iit tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel surkwen ne po Sin eng' arawet ne po tai, ak kitebee icheek Kadesh. Ye kita komi olooto, kogime Miriam, ak ki kitup eng' olooto." 
Numbers20:2 Ki ma nyoor anyun piik peek ak ki iyumgei icheek ak kobolji Musa ak Aron. 
Numbers20:3 Kibolyo piik ak Musa, komwaei koleen, “Nda kiga kibegu ye kibegu tupchosyekyok eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Numbers20:4 Amu nee si omutu tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobwa ong'atani? Tos ki omutwech si kobiit kebegu eng' oli; ak tuukyok? 
Numbers20:5 Amu nee si omoong'wech ketogosu eng' Misiri, omutwech kebwa oli ya? Kooret ne ma pitye peek, anan logoegap mogoonik, anan sabibuk, anan logoek che eecheen, ama mi peek che keei.”" 
Numbers20:6 Ki pa Musa ak Aron eng' ole mi tuiyet agoi kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin. Ki ing'uruukso kot kotiiny togoochikwak ng'wony ak komong'ji `liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek. 
Numbers20:7 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers20:8 “Nam kirokto, ak iyum tuiyet, inyee ak Aron, ng'eetap kamenng'ung'. Yeityo ong'alaalji rwandet kogeerei icheek, si kogoon peekyik. Imoong'u peek eng' rwandet ak igoochi icheek; si inage koe tuiyet ak tuukwak.”" 
Numbers20:9 Ki inem anyun `Musa kirokto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki ng'at ineendet." 
Numbers20:10 Ki iyum `Musa ak `Aron tuiyet kotuiyo eng' taitap rwandet, ak koleenji, “Ogas anyun nguno okweek ngelelichu, tos kimoong'wok peek eng' rwandani?”" 
Numbers20:11 Ki namji anyun Musa eunnyi parak ak kokwer rwandet eng' kiroktonyi konyil aeng'. Ki isururgei peek che chaang', ak kiee tuiyet ak tuukwak." 
Numbers20:12 Ago ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron, “Moiti tuiyoni emet ne ki agoochi, amu ma oyana ogonyita eng' taitap piigap Israel.”" 
Numbers20:13 Po peechu Meribah, amu kiboryo `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki ibarta tiliilindanyi eng' tainnywa." 
Numbers20:14 Ki iyookto `Musa piik eng' Kadesh koba kaplaitoryatap Edom, koleenji, “Kale tupcheng'ung' Israel: Ingen nyalilwogik tugul che ki konyoorwech," 
Numbers20:15 ko uu ye kichoortagei kwanisyekyok koba Misiri, ki kimeny Misiri kenyiisyek che chaang', ak kiyaiywech Misiriik ne ya ak kwanisyekyok." 
Numbers20:16 Kingeriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogas riirekyok ak ki iyook malaikaiyat konyo komutwech kemang'une Misiri. Ki mi nguno Kadesh, nganaseet ne mi kiwoteng'ung' taban." 
Numbers20:17 Kaigai igoonech kebun emeng'ung'. Ma kibune mbar anan mbareenigap sabibuk, ak ma kiee peek che po keriingonik. Kibune ooreet ne oo kityo ne po laitoryat, ma kimastoi kebendi tai anan kaataam, agoi kesiir kiwoteng'ung'.”" 
Numbers20:18 Ago ki leenji `Edom, “Mebune emennyu, si ma abookyin ak rotwetap chok.”" 
Numbers20:19 Ki leenji piigap Israel, “Kibune ooreet ne oo, ak ngee peeguk, acheek ak tuukyok, agoonu anyun alyet ne yamegei. Koono kityo abun eng' keelyekyuk, mayae kiy.”" 
Numbers20:20 Ago ki le, “Mebune.” Ak ki mong' Edom kobooto piik che chaang', konyo kobargei ak ineendet eng' kimnateet." 
Numbers20:21 Ki eetee anyun `Edom Israel kobun kiwotennyi; ak ki weigei anyun Israel kobagaakta ineendet. 
Numbers20:22 Ki pa eng' Kadesh, ak ki it tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel tulweetap Hor." 
Numbers20:23 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron eng' tulweetap Hor, eng' kiwotetap emetap Edom koleenji," 
Numbers20:24 “Tuun kiyumi Aron kobooto piikyik; ma itei emet ne ki agoochi piigap Israel amu ki obistoe ng'olyoondennyu eng' peegap Meribah. 
Numbers20:25 Imutu Aron ak weeriinnyi Eleazar, kobwa tulweetap Hor;" 
Numbers20:26 ireegune Aron ngoroikyik, ak ilaakyi Eleazar weeriinnyi. Ago kiyumi Aron kobooto piikyik, ak komechi olooto.”" 
Numbers20:27 Ki yai anyun Musa ko uu ye kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ki togosta koba tulweetap Hor kogeeroti tuiyet komugul. 
Numbers20:28 Ki ireegune `Musa Aron ngoroikyik ak kolaakyi weeriinnyi Eleazar, ak ki mechi Aron olooto, tulweet parak. Ki choorgei Musa ak Eleazar eng' tulweet." 
Numbers20:29 Ye kingo keer tuiyet komugul kole kagome Aron, koriirchi Aron koot tugul ne po Israel peetuusyek sosom." 
Numbers21:1 Ki kas laitoryatap Arad kanaanindet ne ki menyei murot tai, kole, pwoonei Yahudik kobunu ooreetap Atarim, ki wo ak ki parge ak Israel, ak kiluul alak eng' Yahudik." 
Numbers21:2 Ki iyasyechi `Yahudik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji, “Ngot igoono pichu, ang'eme awong'u nganasookwak.”" 
Numbers21:3 Ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleegap Yahudik, ak ki igoochi Kanaanik. King'em kowong' icheek kobooto nganasookwak. Ki kiguure anyun yooto Horma." 
Numbers21:4 Ki pa anyun eng' tulweetap Hor kobun ooreetap Araraita ne Piriir, koyiem emetap Edom. Ago kichootyo mugulelwegap piik amu ooreet." 
Numbers21:5 Ki ing'unyng'ung'ji anyun `piik Kamuktaindet kobooto Musa, kole, “Kilya si omutwech kemang'une Misiri kebwa kebekyi surkwen? Amu ma mi amitwogik anan peek, ak wechei saboonwekyok amitwogichu tertereen.”" 
Numbers21:6 Ki iyookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pichooto erenook che ng'woneen susennywa ko uu maat. Kisus piik ak ki pek piik che chaang' che po Israel. 
Numbers21:7 Ki pa `piik kap Musa koleenji, “Kogeyai tengekto amu ko king'unyng'ung'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten. Saa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si koistoenech erenochu.” Ara kisaachi `Musa piik." 
Numbers21:8 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Itaany ereneet ne uu maat ak inde keetit ne itononi; ak ye keer chii age tugul ne kagesus, kosap.”" 
Numbers21:9 Ki itaany anyun `Musa ereneet ne po sugunwet ak ki inde keetit ak kootonon. Ngo sus ereneet chii age tugul, ak konyal erenanooto po sugunwet, kosap." 
Numbers21:10 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel, ak komuung'e Obot." 
Numbers21:11 Ki pa eng' Obot agoi komuung'e Iye-abarim ne mi surkwen ne tokyingei Moab, komostap kong'asiis." 
Numbers21:12 Ki pa eng' olooto, ak komuung'e atebweetap Sered." 
Numbers21:13 Ki pa eng' olooto, ak komuung'e Arnon pitoniin, ne mi surkwen ne punu kiwotetap Amorik. Amu Arnon kiwotetap Moabik, kwenutap Moabik ak Amorik." 
Numbers21:14 Siraat eng' kitabuutap Lugosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu nooto, “Ne ki yai eng' Araraita ne Piriir, ak atebwosyegap Arnon," 
Numbers21:15 ak eng' atebwosyek che choorchingei ole menyei Ar, ne mi ole neegitee kiwotetap Moab.”" 
Numbers21:16 Ak ki pa eng' olooto agoi Beer, nooto keriingetap peek ne ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji, “Iyum piik, si anaga peek.”" 
Numbers21:17 Kityen anyun Yahudik tyeni: “Kuutu peek, ee keriingoni! Otyenji!" 
Numbers21:18 Keriinget ne kibalei che taagunotiin, kobooto ne igoitoi ng'atuutik che konyitotiin kotinyei kirokto ne po kirwooget ak kirokto ne po pounatet.” Ak ki pa eng' surkwen agoi Matana." 
Numbers21:19 Ki pa eng' Matana agoi Nahaliel, ak ki pa eng' Nahaliel agoi Bamot." 
Numbers21:20 Ki pa eng' Bamot agoi atebweet ne mi mbareetap Moab, agoi tulweet parak ne po Piska, ne ing'ururi surkwen." 
Numbers21:21 Ki iyookto `Yahudik piik koba kap Sihon laitoryatap Amorik koleenji," 
Numbers21:22 “Chamwo abun emeng'ung'. Ma kimastoi kebendi mbareenik, anan mbareenigap sabibuk, ama kiee peegap keriingonik. Kibune ooreet ne oo ne po laitoryat; agoi kesiir kiwoteng'ung'.”" 
Numbers21:23 Ago ma chamji `Sihon piigap Israel kobun kiwotennyi. Ago ki iyum `Sihon piikyik tugul ak koba kobargei ak piigap Israel eng' surkwen, ki pargei ak icheek eng' Jahas." 
Numbers21:24 Ki par `Israel ineendet eng' rotwetap chok ak konam emennyi kobooch Arnon agoi Jabbok, agoi kiwotetap piigap Ammon; amu king'ootaat kiwotetap piigap Ammon." 
Numbers21:25 Kiluul piigap Israel nganasochooto tugul, ak ki meny Yahudik nganasook tugul che po Amorik, eng' Hesbon, ak eng' nganasookyik tugul." 
Numbers21:26 Amu Hesbon ko ki nganaseetap Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, ne kiga kobargei ak laitoryatap Moab ne ki po tai ak kirebe emennyi komugul ne ki mi eunnyi agoi Arnon." 
Numbers21:27 Mwaei eng' nooto anyun icheek eng' kalewenaik kole, “Obwa Hesbon keteech; ingeteech nganaseetap Sihon ak kigimit." 
Numbers21:28 Amu kamandae maat Hesbon, kamandae liplibenetap maat nganaseetap Sihon. Kagobeel Ar ne po Moab, ak kiptainik che po ole toroor che po Arnon." 
Numbers21:29 Pwo! Inyee Moab! Kaolusye, okweek piigap Kemos! Kagogoito weeriikyik che kichililso kogoochi Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, ak tiibiikyik koek luulenik, kogoochi Sihon, laitoryatap Amorik." 
Numbers21:30 Kagolus, Hesbon agoi Dibon. Kageng'em agoi Nopa, ne itei Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Ara ki meny anyun Yahudik emetap Amorik. 
Numbers21:32 Ki iyookto `Musa piik kosegei Jaser, ak ki iluul nganasookyik ak ki oon Amorik che ki mi olooto." 
Numbers21:33 Ki week anyun kotogosta kobun ooreetap Bashan. Ki manda anyun Og laitoryatap Bashan ak piikyik tugul, kwo kobargei ak icheek eng' Edrei." 
Numbers21:34 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Meiywei ineendet, amu kaande ineendet eung'ung' kobooto piikyik tugul, ak emennyi. Iyachini ineendet ko uu ye ki iyachi Sihon laitoryatap Amorik ne ki menyei Hesbon.”" 
Numbers21:35 Ki par anyun `icheek ineendet kobooto weeriikyik ak piikyik tugul, kot koma ng'etyi `ineendet chii agot agenge. Ak ki punji icheek emennyi." 
Numbers22:1 Ki pa anyun piigap Israel, koba komuung'e warengetap Moab, Jordan pitoniin ole neegitee Jeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Ki keer Balak weeriitap Sipor tuguuk tugul che ki yachi Yahudik Amorik. 
Numbers22:3 Ki iywei `Moabik pichooto miising' amu ki chaang'; ak kitoptobenso Moabik amu piigap Israel. 
Numbers22:4 Ki leenji `Moabik poisyegap Midian, “Amei tuiyoni tuguuk tugul che neegiteenech, ko uu ye amei tuuga susweegap timiin.” Ara king'eet anyun Balak weeriitap Sipor, ne ki laitoryatap Moab eng' peetuusyechooto," 
Numbers22:5 ak ki iyookto piik koba kap Balaam weeriitap Beor, ne ki menyei Petor ne neegitee Yufrets nooto emetap piigap pororyennyi. Ki pa koguur ineendet koleenji, “Keero, mi yu piik che ki punu Misiri; yomu icheek emet, ak menyei ole neegiteena." 
Numbers22:6 Asaain anyun nguno ale, nyoo chubwa pichooto, amu kiimeen kosiiro. Tamangap amuuch aterteer ak aoon koba eng' emoni; Amu angen ale ne iberuuri kiberuuri, ak ne ichube ko chuboot.”" 
Numbers22:7 Ara ki pa anyun poisyegap Moab ak che po Midian koibei eng' eunekwak kagoochinoigap ng'oorset. Ki it kap Balaam, ak ki mwachi ng'aleegap Balak." 
Numbers22:8 Ki leenji `Balaam pichooto, “Oruiye yu kemouni, si aibwok ng'aleek, ko uu ye machei komwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ara ki tebi pounigap Moab kobooto Balaam." 
Numbers22:9 Ki nyoonji `Kamuktaindet Balaam, nyoo koteebe koleenji, “Ng'oo pichu omi tugul?”" 
Numbers22:10 Ak ki wolji `Balaam Kamuktaindet kole, “Kagoyook piik `Balak weeriitap Sipor, laitoryatap Moab, kobwa oldanyu koleenjo," 
Numbers22:11 ‘Kayom emet piik che ki punu Misiri; ara anyun, nyoo chubwa icheek tamangap amuuch kebargei ak icheek, ak aoon komanda eng' emet.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Balaam, “Amat obe ak icheeget. Amat ichup pichooto, amu iberuurotin icheek.”" 
Numbers22:13 Ki ng'eet Balaam karon, ak koleenji pounigap Balak, “Oba emeng'wong', amu kaetena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor keebe ak okweek.”" 
Numbers22:14 Ara king'eetyo pounigap Moab koba ole mi Balak ak koleenji, “Kaeesyo Balaam kebwa tugul.”" 
Numbers22:15 Ki iyookto Balak kogeny pounik alak che chaang' che siirei, ak ko che konyitotiin kosiir che po tai." 
Numbers22:16 Ki it kap Balam, kobwa koleenji, “Kale Balak weeriitap Sipor, Kaigai ameng' kogerin kiy si menyo ole ami;" 
Numbers22:17 amu aeetin inyooru teegisto ne oo, ak ayai kiy age tugul ne imwaiwo. Asaain anyun ale, nyoo chubwa pichu.”" 
Numbers22:18 Ago ki wolji `Balaam otwogigap Balak koleenji, “Agot ngo koono Balak fedha ak thahabu che nyiei koonnyi, koma muuchi asiir ye pooch ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu, si ma chuchuch anan ates che kamwa ineendet." 
Numbers22:19 Asoomok anyun ale, otebee yu kemouni agine, si kobiit anai ne mwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne siirei chooto.”" 
Numbers22:20 Ki nyoonji `Kamuktaindet Balaam kemoi, konyo koleenji, “Ngo kabwa pichu koguurin, ing'eet ak obe tugul, ago iyae kityo ng'olyoot ne amwaun.”" 
Numbers22:21 Ara king'eet Balaam karon, koiito kiit ne tebee eng' sigiryennyi, ak ki pa ak pounigap Moab." 
Numbers22:22 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki wo, ak ki tonon malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ooreet koek ne kirindoi ineendet. Ak ye kibunei sigiryennyi kobooto otwogikyik aeng'," 
Numbers22:23 kogigeer sigiryet malakaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotononi eng' ooreet, ak kiting'e eunnyi rotwetap chok ne kaging'us. Ki wo taban sigiryet kometo ooreet, kwo timiin; ak kibir `Balaam sigiryet kole koweekyi ooreet." 
Numbers22:24 Ki tonon malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ooreet ne mariich eng' mbareenigap sabibuk, ole ng'ootaat komosi ak komosi." 
Numbers22:25 Ye ki keer sigiryet malakaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki rus inaatut, ak kirusee keldap Balaam inaatut. Ak kibir sigiryet kogeny." 
Numbers22:26 Ki inakta malakaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwo tai, ak kitonone ye mariich, ye ki ma kimuuchi keeweekyigei komostap tai anan kaataam." 
Numbers22:27 Ye ki keer sigiryet malakaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki ru komi Balam parak; ak kites konereech Balaam, ak kibir sigiryet eng' kiroktonyi." 
Numbers22:28 Ak ki yaat `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutitap sigiryet kotwek, ak ki leenji Balaam, “Kayaun nee, si ibira konyil chu somok?”" 
Numbers22:29 Ak ki leenji `Balaam sigiryet, “Amu kechota! Nda katinye rotweet, ta kaabarin.”" 
Numbers22:30 Ki wolji `sigiryet Balaam koleenji, “Tos ma aa sigiryeng'ung', ne ki ilaanye kobooch keny agoi kora? Tos ki cham ayaun ko uu ni atkinye tugul?” Ak ki leenji, “Achicha.”" 
Numbers22:31 Ki yaat anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyegap Balaam, ak ki keer malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotononi eng' ooreet, kotinyei eunnyi rotwetap chok ne kaging'us. Ak ki ing'uruuk, kobutyi ng'wony." 
Numbers22:32 Ki leenji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Amu nee si ibir sigiryeng'ung' konyil chu somok? Keero, kanyo aegu kirindoindeng'ung', amu imaasat oreng'ung' eng' tainnyu." 
Numbers22:33 Kageera sigiryet, ak kwo taban eng' tainnyu konyil chuuto somok. Nda kamawo taban koistoenagei ta kaabarin iman ak amete sigiryet kosap.”" 
Numbers22:34 Ki leenji `Balaam malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Kaayai tengekto, amu kama angen ale itononi eng' ooreet si kobiit igirinda. Ara anyun, ngo mechame, ko myee aweek.”" 
Numbers22:35 Ago ki leenji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Balaam, “Oba ak pichooto, ago imwae ng'olyoot ne amwaun kityo.” Ki pa anyun Balaam kobooto pounigap Balak." 
Numbers22:36 Kingo kas Balak kole kagonyo Balaam, kwo kotorookta ineendet eng' nganaseetap Moab ne mi kiwotetap Arnon, ne miitei tabandap kiwotonooto." 
Numbers22:37 Ki leenji `Balak Balaam, “Tos kiga ma agimgimin, aguurin? Amu nee si menyo ole ami? Tos ma muuchi aeetin iman inyooru teegisto?”" 
Numbers22:38 Ki wolji `Balaam Balak koleenji, “Kaanyonjin nguno, ago tos atinye kamuget agot kitigin amwa kiy age tugul? Amwae ng'olyoot ne indoi Kamuktaindet kutinnyu.”" 
Numbers22:39 Ki pa anyun Balaam ak Balak, ak ki it Kiriath-husot." 
Numbers22:40 Ki eeny Balak tuuga ak keechiirek, ak ki iyookyi Balaam ak pounik che ki mi kobooto ineendet." 
Numbers22:41 Kingo kagoeech, komut `Balak Balaam kotogosta kwo ole mi oldinwek che torooreen che po Baal, ak ki keer eng' olooto ole poochin kebebertap piik." 
Numbers23:1 Ki leenji `Balaam Balak, “Teekwa eng' yu kaptisisyosyek tisap, ak ichobwa kiruugik tisap ak mengichik tisap.”" 
Numbers23:2 Ki yai Balak ko uu ye ki kamwa Balaam, ak ki igoito icheek tuwai kirgit ak mengit eng' kaptisisyet age tugul." 
Numbers23:3 Yeityo koleenji `Balaam Balak, “Tonone ye mi kagoochineng'ung' ne kebeelei si awo; tamangap kotorookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak amwaun anyun kiy age tugul ne kaiboorwo ineendet.” Ak ki wo tulweet parak ye lapkei." 
Numbers23:4 Ki tuiyo Kamuktaindet ak Balaam, ak koleenji, “Kaachop kaptisisyosyek tisap ak kaagoite kirgit ak mengit eng' kaptisisyet age tugul.”" 
Numbers23:5 Ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoot kutitap Balaam, ak kole, “Weekyigei Balak, ak ing'alaal ko uu ni.”" 
Numbers23:6 Ara `week Balam ole mi Balak, ak kitononi eng' ole mi kagoochinennyi ne kebeelei, ineendet, kobooto pounik tugul che po Moab." 
Numbers23:7 Ki toi Balaam kalewenennyi kole, “Ki imutwaa Balak eng' Aram, Laitoryatap Moab ne punu tuloonoogap kong'asiis. Kole, ‘Nyoo, chubwa Jakobo, nyoo, nereekyi Israel.’" 
Numbers23:8 Achuptoi ano ne ma chup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak anereekyindoi ano ne ma nereekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? 
Numbers23:9 Amu ageere Israel ami rwandosyek parak, Ak ageere ineendet ami tuloonook. Pichu ko piik che meng'iisyei icheegei, ak ma ki ititoi pororyosyek alak." 
Numbers23:10 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koiit chaang'indap Jakobo, anan ng'oo ne imuuchi koiit kebebertap agenge eng' ang'wan ne po Israel? Ingaame meetap che po iman, ak ingogergeit kagesunennyu ak nenyinet!”" 
Numbers23:11 Ki leenji `Balak Balaam, “Keyaiywo nee? Ki amutun inyoo ichubwa puunikyuk, ak keero, kaiberuur icheek miising'!”" 
Numbers23:12 Ki wolji koleenji, “Tos manyolja ariip amwa ne indoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutinnyu?”" 
Numbers23:13 Ki leenji anyun `Balak ineendet, “Asaain ale, nyoo keebe oldo age ole imuuchi igeer pichooto, si igeer ole pooch kityo, ole memuuchi igeer icheek tugul; ak ichubwa anyun icheek eng' olooto.”" 
Numbers23:14 Ara ki imut ineendet anyun agoi koit kooretap Sopim eng' tulweet parak ne kiguure Piska. Ki teech kaptisisyosyek tisap, ak ki igoito kirgit ak mengit eng' kaptisisyet age tugul." 
Numbers23:15 Ki leenji `Balaam Balak, “Tonone yu mi kagoochineng'ung' ne kebeelei, ye kituitosi ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' oliin.”" 
Numbers23:16 Ki torook `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Balaam ak konde ng'olyoot kutinnyi ak koleenji, “Weekyigei ole mi Balak ak ing'alaal ko uu ni.”" 
Numbers23:17 Ki wo anyun ole mi ineendet, ak kitononi eng' ole neegitee kagoochinennyi ne kibeelei, kobooto pounigap Moab. ki teebee Balak koleenji, “Kale nee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
Numbers23:18 Ak ki mwa kalewenennyi kole, “Ng'eet, Balak, ak igas; epcha iit, inyee weeriitap Sipor." 
Numbers23:19 Ma chiito Kamuktaindet, kot komwa lembech, anan weeriitap chii, kot kowal kabwaatutikyik. Tos kagomwa, ak ma yaei? Anan kagomwa, ama yaei kosulda?" 
Numbers23:20 Keero, kaataach ng'atuutyet aberuur, kagoberuur, ak ma muuchi aweech." 
Numbers23:21 Tomo kogeerchi Jakobo tengekto, ama keerchi Israel kiy ne imaasat. Mi kobooto ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi, ak mi cheetap laitoryat kwenunnywa." 
Numbers23:22 Ki imutu Kamuktaindet icheek eng' Misiri, tinyei kimnateet ne uu ne po soet." 
Numbers23:23 Ma mi iman pondit ne kimuuchi kebane Jakobo, ama mi ng'oorset ne kimuuchi keng'ore Israel. Kimwaei nguno agobo Jakobo ak Israel, keele, ‘Ki yai ne tya Kamuktaindet!’" 
Numbers23:24 Keero, kang'eetyo piik ko uu ng'etundo ne subeendo, ak tononi ineendet ko uu ng'etundo. Maruei agoi koam che po logennyi, ak koe korotiigap ne kabar.”" 
Numbers23:25 Ki leenji `Balak Balam, “Amat ichup anan iberuur agot kitigin!”" 
Numbers23:26 Ago ki wolji `Balaam Balak, koleenji, “Tos ma amwaun aleenjin, kanyool ayai tugul che mwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
Numbers23:27 Ki leenji `Balak Balaam, “Nyoo anyun amutin komosta age, tamangap kocham Kamuktaindet ichubwa pichooto eng' olooto.”" 
Numbers23:28 Ki imut anyun `Balak Balaam agoi tulweetap Peor parak, ne ing'ururi surkwen." 
Numbers23:29 Ki leenji `Balaam Balak, “Teekwa eng' oli kaptisisyosyek tisap, ak ichobwa kiruugik tisap ak mengichik tisap.”" 
Numbers23:30 Ki yai anyun Balak ko uu ye kagamwa Balaam, ak ki igoito kirgit ak mengit eng' kaptisisyet age tugul." 
Numbers24:1 Ki keer anyun Balaam kole chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koberuur Yahudik, ak ma wo ko uu atkai tai, kwo kocheeng' ponitwogik, ago kitokyigei surkwen." 
Numbers24:2 Kitabendo anyun Balaam ak ki keer Yahudik komeng'iisyei ko katetkei ko uu ortinwekwak. Ki nyoonji Kabuusetap `Kamuktaindet ineendet," 
Numbers24:3 ak kigetyigei kalewenennyi, ak kole: “Kale Balaam weeriitap Beor, kale chiito ne kitugotin konyekyik," 
Numbers24:4 kale ineendet ne kasei ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet, ne keerei ng'ang'utyetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, ineendet ne kobutyi ng'wony, ko kayatagis konyekyik." 
Numbers24:5 Ee Jakobo, korooron ne tya emaisyeguk, ee Israel, korooron ne tya kooriguk!" 
Numbers24:6 Kauitogei ko uu atebwosyek, ko uu mbareenik che mi ngeguusyegap aineet, ko uu keetiik che kiguure ahalim che kimin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu taragonik che neegitee peek." 
Numbers24:7 Rootune peek tereenikyik, ak tebune iyotennyi peek che chaang', eetu laitoryandennyi kosiir Agag, ak kieeti laitornatennyi." 
Numbers24:8 Ki imutu Kamuktaindet komong' eng' Misiri, tinyei kimnateet ne uu ne po soet. Lugui pororyosyek che puunikyik, tonatoni kawekwak komengegitu, ak mwogei icheek kosore eng' kipchabonikyik." 
Numbers24:9 Kiribis, koru ko uu ng'etundo, ko uu ng'etundo ne subeendo, ng'oo ne ing'eeti? Iberuurot age tugul ne iberuurin, ak chuboot age tugul ne chubin!”" 
Numbers24:10 Ki nereech kot Balak agobo Balaam. Ki irabaach eunekyik ak ki leenji Balaam, “Ki aguurin inyoo ichup puunikyuk, keero, kaiberuur icheek iman miising' konyil chu somok." 
Numbers24:11 Ara mwei ui oldang'ung' nguno! Ki aleen si aeetin inyooru teegisto ne oo, ago keero, kietenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor teegisooto.”" 
Numbers24:12 Ki leenji `Balaam Balak, “Tos ki ma amwachi piiguk che ki iyoogu aleenji," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Agot ngo koono Balak fedha ak thahabu che nyiei koonnyi, koma muuchi asiir ye pooch ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ayai ne myee anan ayai ne ya eng' magennyu; ne mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko nooto ne amwae?’" 
Numbers24:14 “Kawe nguno ole mi piikyuk, ago nyoo anyun amwaun kiit ne itoi `pichu piiguk eng' peetuusyek che po let.”" 
Numbers24:15 Ak kigetyigei kalewenennyi ak kole, “Kale Balaam weeriitap Beor, kale chiito ne kitugotin konyekyik," 
Numbers24:16 mwaei ineendet ne kasei ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet, ne ingen ng'omnatetap Ne Toroor Miising', ne keerei ng'ang'utyetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, ak kobutyi ng'wony, ko kayaatogis konyekyik:" 
Numbers24:17 Ageere ineendet, ago ma nguno; ageere, ago ma neegit. Tuun mang'une taboiyat Jakobo, ak ng'eetei kirokto ne po pounateet eng' Israel. Ak kokwer luukwegap Moab kogees, ak kotui weeriik tugul che po icheeget che wasegei." 
Numbers24:18 Kiluulei Edom, kiluulei Seir agine che kibuunikyik, ye yaei Yahudik eng' kimnateet." 
Numbers24:19 Laitorani ne mang'une Jakobo, ak kong'em che ki ng'et eng' nganaseet.”" 
Numbers24:20 Yeityo kogeer `Balaam Amelegik, ak komwa kalewenennyi, kole: “Po tai Amelegik eng' pororyosyek, ago kitindinyi kobetyo eng' kagesunennyi.”" 
Numbers24:21 Yeityo kogeer `ineendet Kenindet, ak komwa kalewenennyi, kole: “Kiim ole imenye, ak mi kesweng'ung' rwandet." 
Numbers24:22 Ago kibeeti Kenik, agoi komutin Ashur iegu luulen.”" 
Numbers24:23 Ki mwa kalewenennyi kogeny, kole, “Pwo! Ng'oo ne imuuchi kosap ye yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nooto?" 
Numbers24:24 Punu melisyek ngeguutap Kitim, ak konyaliil Ashur, ak Eber, ak nyooru agine ng'emisyet.”" 
Numbers24:25 Ki ng'eet anyun Balaam kwo oldanyi, ak ki wo Balak agine ooreennyi." 
Numbers25:1 Ye kita komenyei `Israel Shitim, ko ki toi murenik koipkei ak tiibiigap Moabik," 
Numbers25:2 ak kiguur `tiipchooto piik koba ole kigoochine kanamonikwak tiseiywek. Ki amis piik ak kogutung'ji kanamonik. 
Numbers25:3 Ara ki namgei Israel ak Baal ne po Peor. Ak kinereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel. 
Numbers25:4 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Nam pounik tugul che po piik, ak igartaat icheek kolalei asiis eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si koistoegei Israel nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Numbers25:5 Ak ki leenji `Musa kirwoogigap Israel, “Obar chii age tugul eng' okweek ne kogonamgei ak Baal ne po Peor.”" 
Numbers25:6 Eng' yooto, ko ki nyo age eng' Yahudik komutu kwony ne po Midianik konyo koonnyi eng' taitap Musa ak eng' taitap tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel, ye kita koriirtos eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers25:7 Ye kingo keer Phineas weeriitap Eleazar, weeriitap Aron tisiindet, kong'eet eng' kwenutap tuiyet ak konam ng'otit eng' eunnyi" 
Numbers25:8 ak koosup Yahudyondonooto agoi emait. Kitoore ng'otit icheek tuwai kosore moetap chiichooto po Israel ak kwonyooto agine. Ki siis anyun koroito eng' piigap Israel. 
Numbers25:9 Eng' yooto che ki pek eng' koroyooto, ko piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan." 
Numbers25:10 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers25:11 “Kagoisto Phineas weeriitap Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet, nereegekyuk eng' piigap Israel, amu ki tinyei ng'etkonda agobo tengek eng' icheek amu anee, mata anyun awong'u piigap Israel eng' ng'etkondanyu." 
Numbers25:12 Amu niito, ko mwachi anyun ineendet ileenji kaagoochi kayomisennyu ne po kaalyeet." 
Numbers25:13 Kayai kayomiset ne po tiseinateet ne po koigeny eng' ineendet ak eng' iyotennyi ne piitu let. Amu ki tinyei pekyinet agobo Kamuktaindet ak kagoyachi kagaigaet piigap Israel.” 
Numbers25:14 Ki kiguure chiichooto po Israel ki kibar kobooto kwony ne po Midianik, Shimri weeriitap Salu, ki pounindetap kootap kwanisyek eng' ooreetap Simion." 
Numbers25:15 Ak kainetap kwonyooto po Midianik ki kibar, ko ki Kosbi, chepo Sur, ki kandoindetap kootap kwanisyek eng' Midian." 
Numbers25:16 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers25:17 “Inyalil Midianik ak ibar iwong'u icheek," 
Numbers25:18 amu iimok eng' kaberberisyennywa, ne king'alenak eng' ng'olyootap Peor ak eng' ng'olyootap Kosbi, cheptap pounindetap Midian, chepkamennywa, ne ki kibar eng' peetuutap koroito amu ng'olyootap Peor.”" 
Numbers26:1 Kingo pata koroyooto, komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Eleazar weeriitap Aron tisiindet koleenji," 
Numbers26:2 “Oit piigap Israel ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak, kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che imuuchi koba lugeet eng' Israel.”" 
Numbers26:3 Ki mwachi `Musa ak Eleazar icheek eng' warengetap Moab ole neegitee Jordan ole po Jeriko, koleenji," 
Numbers26:4 “Oiit piik kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.” Chu piigap Israel che ki mang'une emetap Misiri:" 
Numbers26:5 Reuben, weeriit ne po tai ne po Israel. Weeriikyik ko chu: Hanok, che ooreetap Hanogik, che po Palu, che ooreetap Paluik;" 
Numbers26:6 Hesron, che ooreetap Hesronik, che po Karmi, che ooreetap Karmik." 
Numbers26:7 Che ki kiit eng' ortinwegap piigap Reuben ko ki ek tugul eliphuusyek artam ak somok ak pogol tisap ak sosom. 
Numbers26:8 Weeriitap Palu ko ki Eliap. 
Numbers26:9 Weeriigap Eliap chu: Nemuel, Datan, ak Abiram. Chooto Datan ak Abiram che ki kiguur che po tuiyet, che kibortos kobooto Musa ak Aron eng' tuiyetap Kora, ye kingo ngelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers26:10 Ki yaat `ng'wony kutinnyi ak kolugui icheek kobooto Kora, ye ki pek kogeny kasubikwak peetuunooto kogabeel maat piik pogol aeng' ak konom. Ak ki ek icheek kaboorunet ne po kateunet." 
Numbers26:11 Nganda ki ma pek weeriigap Kora. 
Numbers26:12 Weeriigap Simion chu ko uu ortinwekwak: Nemuel, che ooreetap Nemuelik; che po Jamin, che ooreetap Jaminik; che po Jakin, che ooreetap Jakinik;" 
Numbers26:13 che po Zerah, che ooreetap Zeraik; ak Saulo, che ooreetap Saulik." 
Numbers26:14 Chuuto ortinwegap piigap Simion, ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng' ak pogol aeng'." 
Numbers26:15 Weeriigap Gad ko uu ortinwekwak ko chu: che po Sepon, che ooreetap Seponik; che po Hagik, che ooreetap Hagitik; che po Suni, che ooreetap Sunitik;" 
Numbers26:16 che po Osni, che ooreetap Osnik; che po Eri, che ooreetap Eritik;" 
Numbers26:17 che po Arod, che ooreetap Arodik; che po Areli, che ooreetap Arelitik." 
Numbers26:18 Chuuto ortinwegap weeriigap Gad; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek artam ak pogol muut. 
Numbers26:19 Weeriigap Judah chu: Er ak Onan, ago ki pekyi icheek emetap Kanaan." 
Numbers26:20 Weeriigap Judah ko uu ortinwekwak ko ki: che po Shelah, che ooreetap Shelahnik; che po Peres, che ooreetap Peresik; che po Zerah, che ooreetap Seraik." 
Numbers26:21 Weeriigap Peres ko ki: Hesron, che ooreetap Hesronik; che po Hamul, che ooreetap Hamulik." 
Numbers26:22 Chuuto ortinwegap Judah; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap ak lo ak pogol muut. 
Numbers26:23 Weeriigap Issakar ko uu ortinwekwak chu: Tola, che ooreetap Tolaitik; che po Pua, che ooreetap Punitik;" 
Numbers26:24 che po Jasub, che ooreetap Jasubik; che po Simron, che ooreetap Simronik." 
Numbers26:25 Chuuto ortinwegap Issakar, ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak ang'wan ak pogol somok." 
Numbers26:26 Weeriigap Zebulun chu ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Sered, che ooreetap Seredik; che po Elon, che ooreetap Elonik; che po Jaleel, che ooreetap Jaleelik." 
Numbers26:27 Chuuto ortinwegap Sebulunik; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak pogol muut. 
Numbers26:28 Weeriigap Joseph chu ko uu ortinwekwak: Manasseh ak Ephraim. 
Numbers26:29 Weeriigap Manasseh chu: che po Makir, che ooreetap Makirik; ak ki sich `Makir Gilead; che po Gilead, che ooreetap Gileadik." 
Numbers26:30 Weeriigap Gilead chu: Ieser, che ooreetap Iesrik; che po Helek, che ooreetap Helegik;" 
Numbers26:31 Asriel, che ooreetap Asrielik; che po Shekem, che ooreetap Shekemik;" 
Numbers26:32 ak Shemida, che ooreetap Shemidaik; Hepher, che ooreetap Hepherik." 
Numbers26:33 Ak ki ma kotinyei weeriik Zelophehad weeriitap Hepher, kobatee tiibiik icheegei. Kainaigap tiibiigap Zelophehad ko ki: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah ak Tirzah." 
Numbers26:34 Chuuto ortinwegap Manasseh; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek konom ak aeng' ak pogol tisap. 
Numbers26:35 Weeriigap Ephraim ko uu ortinwekwak chu: che po Sutela, che ooreetap Sutelaik; che po Beker, che ooreetap Bekerik; che po Tahan, che ooreetap Tahanik." 
Numbers26:36 Ak chu weeriigap Sutela: che po Eran, che ooreetap Eranik." 
Numbers26:37 Chuuto ortinwegap weeriigap Ephraim; ki ek icheek eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng' ak pogol muut. Chuuto weeriigap Joseph ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Numbers26:38 Weeriigap Benjamin chu ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Bela, che ooreetap Belaik; che po Asbel, che ooreetap Asbelik; che po Ahiram, che ooreetap Ahiramik;" 
Numbers26:39 che po Sepupam, che ooreetap Supamik; che po Hupam, che ooreetap Hupamik." 
Numbers26:40 Ard ak Naaman ko ki weeriigap Bela: che po Ard, che ooreetap Ardik; che po Naaman, che ooreetap Naamanik." 
Numbers26:41 Chooto ko weeriigap Benjamin ko uu ortinwekwak; ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek artam ak muut ak pogol lo. 
Numbers26:42 Weeriigap Dan chu ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Suham, che ooreetap Suhamik; chuuto ko ortinwegap Dan ko uu tilyonutikwak." 
Numbers26:43 Ki ek tugul che po Suhamik eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak ang'wan ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers26:44 Weeriigap Asher chu ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Imnah, che ooreetap Imnahik; che po Isbi, che ooreetap Isbik; che po Beriah, che ooreetap Beriaik." 
Numbers26:45 Che po weeriigap Beriah: che po Heber, che ooreetap Heberik; che po Malkiel, che ooreetap Malkielik." 
Numbers26:46 Ak kainetap cheptap Asher ko ki Zerah. 
Numbers26:47 Chooto ortinwegap Asher che ki kiit; ki ek icheek eliphuusyek konom ak somok ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers26:48 Weeriigap Naphtali ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Jaseel, che ooreetap Jaseelik, che po Guni, che ooreetap Gunik;" 
Numbers26:49 che po Jeser, che ooreetap Jeserik; che po Silem, che ooreetap Silemik." 
Numbers26:50 Chooto ko ortinwegap Naphtali ko uu tilyonutikwak che ki ek icheek tugul eliphuusyek artam ak muut ak pogol ang'wan. 
Numbers26:51 Ki ek eliphuusyek pogol lo ak agenge ak pogol tisap ak sosom chooto che ki kiit eng' piigap Israel. 
Numbers26:52 Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers26:53 “Kipchechin emet chuuto koek poroteet ko uu koitetap kainaik. 
Numbers26:54 Che kasiirto koiitennywa itesyini poroteet, ak che matyanit koiitennywa igoochini poroteet ne ming'in. Kigoochin chii tugul porotennyi, ko uu koitetap piikyik che ki kiit." 
Numbers26:55 Ago kipcheei emet eng' seretap parbareek. Nyabani age tugul ko uu kainaigap ortinwegap kwanisyekwak. 
Numbers26:56 Kipchechin porotennywa ko uu ole teptoi seretap parbareek eng' che chaang' ak eng' che ng'ering'.” 
Numbers26:57 Chu che ki kiit eng' Lawiik ko uu ortinwekwak: che po Gerson, che ooreetap Gershonik; che po Kohat, che ooreetap Kohatik; che po Merari, che ooreetap Merarik." 
Numbers26:58 Chuuto ortinwegap Lawiik: kootap Libnitik, kootap Hebronik, kootap Malik, kootap Musik, ak kootap Koraik. Ak ki sich `Kohat Amram." 
Numbers26:59 Ak kainetap osotyotap Amram ko ki Jokebed, cheptap Lawi ne ki kisikyi Lawi eng' Misiri. Ki sikyi `Jokebed Amram Aron ak Musa ak Miriam chepkamennywa." 
Numbers26:60 Aron ko ki kwandap Nadap, Abihu, Eleazar ak Ithamar." 
Numbers26:61 Ago ki pek Nadap ak Abihu ye ki igoitoi kogoochinet eng' maat ne teer eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers26:62 Muren age tugul kobooch ne po arawet agenge ak kwo tai che ki kiit, ko ki ek eliphuusyek tiptem ak somok. Ki ma ki itito pichooto piigap Israel amu ki ma kigoochi icheek poroteet eng' kwenutap piigap Israel." 
Numbers26:63 Chuuto che ki iit Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet ye ki iti piigap Israel eng' warengetap Moab eng' ole neegitee Jordan eng' Jeriko. 
Numbers26:64 Ago eng' chuuto, ko ki ma komi chii agot agenge eng' icheek ye ki iti Musa ak Aron tisiindet piigap Israel eng' surkwen ne po Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Amu ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo icheek kole, “Pekyin icheek iman ong'atani.” Ak ki ma ng'et chii agot agenge eng' icheek kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune ak Joshua weeriitap Nun." 
Numbers26:65 Amu ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo icheek kole, “Pekyin icheek iman ong'atani.” Ak ki ma ng'et chii agot agenge eng' icheek kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune ak Joshua weeriitap Nun." 
Numbers27:1 Ki pa koriikta anyun tiibiigap Zelophehad weeriitap Hepher, weeriitap Gilead, weeriitap Makir, weeriitap Manasseh, ne ki po ortinwegap Manasseh weeriitap Joseph. Kainaigap tiibiichooto ko ki Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah ak Tirzah." 
Numbers27:2 Ki pa icheek kotononso eng' taitap Musa, Eleazar tisiindet, kirwoogik, ak tuiyet komugul eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin, ak kole," 
Numbers27:3 “Kimechi surkwen kwandanyo. Ki ma ko pooto ineendet tuiyetap Kora ne ki iyumgei icheegei si kotil let Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago kime ineegei amu tengektanyi, ak ki ma kotinyei weeriik." 
Numbers27:4 Amu nee si keisto kainetap kwandanyo eng' ooreennyi amu ki ma kotinyei weeriit? Ogoonech poroteet kobooto tupchosyegap kwandanyo.” 
Numbers27:5 Ara ki ip anyun Musa ng'aleekwak koba taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Numbers27:6 Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers27:7 “Kamwa iman tiibiigap Zelophehad. Igoochini iman tiipchooto poroteet kobunji kobooto tupchosyegap kwandanywa, ak igoochi poroteetap kwandanywa kobunji." 
Numbers27:8 Yeityo imwachi piigap Israel ileenji, Ngo me chii ama tinyei weeriit ogoochi cheptonyi porotennyi kobunji." 
Numbers27:9 Ak ngo ma tinyei chepto agine, ogoochi anyun tupchosyekyik tuguukyik." 
Numbers27:10 Ak ngo ma tinyei che tupcho, ogoochi anyun tupchosyegap kwandanyi tuguukyik." 
Numbers27:11 Ago ngo ma tinyei `kwandanyi che tupcho, ogoochi anyun porotennyi chii ne tilya ne neegit ne po ooreennyi kobunji. Egu ng'olyoondoni ng'atuutyet ne po kirwooget eng' piigap Israel, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa.”" 
Numbers27:12 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Togosu tulwooniito po Abarim, si itoben emet ne ki agoochi piigap Israel." 
Numbers27:13 Ak ye kaigeer, kiyumin aginye iwe ole mi piiguk, ko uu ye ki kiyum ng'eetap kamenng'ung' Aron." 
Numbers27:14 Amu ki ongelelji ng'olyoondennyu okweek tuwai eng' surkwen ne po Sin, eng' pooryeet ne ki piit eng' tuiyet, ama ogonyita eng' ole po peek kogeerei icheek.” (Chooto peegap Meribah che po Kadesh eng' surkwen ne po Sin.)" 
Numbers27:15 Ki mwachi `Musa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji," 
Numbers27:16 “Ingolewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap saboonwegap piik tugul, chiito ne imuuchi koboi tuiyet," 
Numbers27:17 ne imuuchi komuti koba saang', ak komutu kobwa kaa, si ma igei tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor keechiirek che ma tinyei mestowot.”" 
Numbers27:18 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Imutu Joshua, weeriitap Nun, chiito ne tinyei Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak igonoor eung'ung' ineendet," 
Numbers27:18 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Imutu Joshua, weeriitap Nun, chiito ne tinyei Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak igonoor eung'ung' ineendet," 
Numbers27:19 yeityo inde ineendet taitap Eleazar tisiindet kobooto tuiyet komugul ak ing'at ineendet eng' tainnywa. 
Numbers27:20 Ak inde ineendet kebebertap teegistang'ung', si kobiit kogas iit ineendet tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel." 
Numbers27:21 Ingotonon ineendet eng' taitap Eleazar tisiindet, si koteepchi ineendet kandoiset eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kirwoogetap Urim. Eng' ng'olyoondennyi ko mandoi ak kaweeksei ineendet ak piigap Israel, agot tuiyet komugul.”" 
Numbers27:22 Ki yai Musa ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. Ki imut Joshua kotonon eng' taitap Eleazar tisiindet ak eng' taitap tuiyet komugul. 
Numbers27:22 Ki yai Musa ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. Ki imut Joshua kotonon eng' taitap Eleazar tisiindet ak eng' taitap tuiyet komugul. 
Numbers27:23 Yeityo kogonoor Musa eunekyik ineendet ak kong'at ineendet, ko uu ye ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa." 
Numbers28:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers28:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel ileenji: ‘Oriip si ogoono eng' peetuusyekwok che nyoljin, kagoochinennyu, amitwogikyuk che po kagoochinoikyuk che punei maat, koek nyamdutik che anyiny eng' anee.’" 
Numbers28:3 Ileenji icheek: Ni kagoochinet ne punei maat ne ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; aarek aeng' che libwoben che mengichik che ma siirei kenyiit agenge, kobunji kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul eng' peetuut age tugul." 
Numbers28:4 Igoitoi aarwet agenge karon ak igoite age koskoleny," 
Numbers28:5 kobooto keruutyet agenge ne po peek che ng'ootiin, kobunji kagoochinetap peek, che kiburuktoi mwaita ne kituei ne yamei litait agenge." 
Numbers28:6 Nooto kagoochinet ne kibeelei peetuut age tugul ne ki king'at eng' tulweetap Sinai koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny, kagoochinet ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne punei maat." 
Numbers28:7 Ingoek kagoochinennyi ne keei litait agenge eng' aarwet ne mengit age tugul. Oroong'jini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ole-tiliil kagoochinonooto kieei che ng'woneen. 
Numbers28:8 Igoite aarwet ne mengit age koskoleny, ko uu kagoochinetap peek ak che kieei che igoitoi karon, igoitoi anyun kagoochinonooto punei maat, koek nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers28:9 “Igoite aarek aeng', che mengichik, che libwoben, che ma siirei kenyiit agenge eng' peetuutap sabato, kobooto keruutik aeng' che po peek che ng'ootiin, kobunji kagoochinetap peek, che kiburuktoi mwaita kobooto kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers28:10 Niito kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' sabato age tugul, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul, kobooto kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers28:11 “Eng' taunetap arawet age tugul, ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne kibeelei: kiruugik aeng' che mengeechen, mengit agenge ak aarek tisap che mengichik che libwoben, che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers28:12 Kobooto keruutik somok che po peek che ng'ootiin, che kiburuktoi mwaita, kobunji kagoochinetap peek eng' kiruk age tugul; ogoitoi keruutik aeng' che po peek che ng'ootiin kobunji kagoochinetap peek, che kiburuktoi mwaita eng' mengit agenge," 
Numbers28:13 eng' aarwetap keechiir age tugul, ogoite keruutyet agenge ne po peek che ng'ootiin, che kiburuktoi mwaita koek kagoochinetap peek. Niito kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny, kagoochinet kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne punei maat." 
Numbers28:14 Ingoek kagoochinoikwak che keei litaisyek aeng' che po divaik eng' kiruk age tugul, litait agenge ak kebeberyat eng' mengit age tugul, ak litait agenge eng' aarwet ne mengit age tugul. Niito kagoochinet ne kebeelei ne po arawetap age tugul eng' kenyiit." 
Numbers28:15 Kigoitoi nooto ketesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul kobooto kagoochinet ne kieei, kwesta agenge kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers28:16 “Piitu paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' arawet ne po tai, eng' peetuut ne po taman ak ang'wan." 
Numbers28:17 Ak egu igoorto eng' peetuut ne po taman ak muut ne po arawaniito. Ki amei magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' peetuusyek tisap. 
Numbers28:18 Piitu kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuut ne po tai; amoyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot. 
Numbers28:19 Ago ogoite kagoochinet ne punei maat, kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kiruugik aeng' che neran, mengit agenge ak aarek tisap che mengichik che ma siirei kenyiit agenge, egu che libwoben eng' okweek." 
Numbers28:20 Kagoochinennywa ne po peek che ng'ootiin, che kiburuktoi mwaita: ogoitoi keruutik somok eng' kirgit agenge, ak keruutik aeng' eng' mengit," 
Numbers28:21 ak igoitoi keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto tisap. 
Numbers28:22 Ak koek kwesta agenge kagoochinetap tengekto, si keyaunenok kagaigaet." 
Numbers28:23 Ogoitoi chuuto otesyini kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po karon, eng' kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul." 
Numbers28:24 Ogoitoi ko uu nooto eng' peetuut age tugul, eng' peetuusyek tisap, amitwogik che po kagoochinet ne punei maat, ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kigoitoi nooto ketesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul, kobooto kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers28:25 Ingoek kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuutap tisap; amoyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot. 
Numbers28:26 “Kogeny ye ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' peetuutap tongoanik, kagoochinet ne po peek che leelachen eng' igoortang'wong' ne po wigisyek, onyooru kayumetapkei ne itabaanat; amoyai poisyo age tugul ne po otwoknot." 
Numbers28:27 Ogoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kiruugik aeng' che neran, mengit ak aarek tisap che mengichik che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers28:28 Kagoochinennywa ne po peek che ng'ootiin che kiburuktoi mwaita, keruutik somok eng' kiruk age tugul, ak keruutik aeng' eng' mengit," 
Numbers28:29 ak keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto tisap," 
Numbers28:30 kobooto kwesta agenge, ne kiyaunenok kaigaigaet." 
Numbers28:31 Ogoitoi che kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul, kagoochinennyi ne po peek kobooto kagoochinoikwak che kieei. Egu che libwoben eng' okweek." 
Numbers29:1 “Eng' arawet ne po tisap, eng' peetuut ne po tai, onyooru kayumetapkei ne itabaanat. Amoyai poit age tugul ne po otwoknot. Egu peetuunooto ne kiguutei igondisyek eng' okweek." 
Numbers29:2 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny: kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge ak aarek tisap che mengichik che libwoben che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers29:3 Ogoochi kobooto kagoochinennywa ne po peek che ng'ootiin che kiburuktoi mwaita, keruutik somok eng' kirgit, keruutik aeng' eng' mengit," 
Numbers29:4 ak keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto tisap," 
Numbers29:5 ak kwesta agenge kobunji kagoochinetap tengekto, si keyaunenok kagaigaet." 
Numbers29:6 Ogoitoi che kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po arawet ne kaleel ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul, kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei, ko uu ng'atuutyennywa. Ingoek kagoochinoik che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne punei maat, nyamdutyet ne anyiny." 
Numbers29:7 “Ak onyooru kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawetap tisap, Orugutkei ak amoyai poit age tugul." 
Numbers29:8 Ago ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny: kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge ak aarek tisap che mengichik che ma siirei kenyiit agenge, egu che libwoben eng' okweek." 
Numbers29:9 Kagoochinennywa ne igoitoi koek kagoochinet ne po peek che ng'ootiin che kiburuktoi mwaita, keruutik somok eng' kirgit, keruutik aeng' eng' mengit," 
Numbers29:10 ak keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto tisap. 
Numbers29:11 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge ne po kagoochinetap tengekto. Kitesyin chooto kagoochinetap tengekto ne po kaigaigaet ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei. 
Numbers29:12 “Ak onyooru kayumetapkei ne itabaanat eng' peetuutap taman ak muut eng' arawetap tisap, amoyai poit age tugul ne po otwoknot. Oriipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor igoorto eng' peetuusyek tisap." 
Numbers29:13 Ogoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne punei maat, ne po nyamdutyet ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kiruugik taman ak somok che neran, mengichik aeng' ak aarek che mengichik taman ak ang'wan che ma siirei kenyiit agenge, egu che libwoben." 
Numbers29:14 Kobooto kagoochinennywa eng' kirgit age tugul eng' kirugichooto taman ak somok ogoitoi kagoochinet ne po peek che ng'ootiin che kiburuktoi mwaita keruutik somok, keruutik aeng' eng' mengit age tugul eng' mengichooto aeng'," 
Numbers29:15 ak keruutyet agenge eng' aarwet age tugul eng' areechooto taman ak ang'wan. 
Numbers29:16 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:17 “Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ogoite kiruugik taman ak aeng' che neran, mengichik aeng' ak aarek taman ak ang'wan che mengichik che libwoben che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers29:18 Kobooto kirugichooto, mengichik ak che po aarek, ogoite kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei ko uu koiitennywa ak ko uu ng'atuutyet." 
Numbers29:19 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek, ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei." 
Numbers29:20 “Eng' peetuut ne po somok ogoite kiruugik taman ak agenge, mengichik aeng' ak aarek taman ak ang'wan che mengichik che libwoben che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers29:21 Kobooto kirugichooto, mengichik ak aarek, ogoite kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei ko uu koiitennywa ak ko uu ng'atuutyet." 
Numbers29:22 Ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:23 “Eng' peetuut ne po ang'wan ogoite kiruugik taman, mengichik aeng', aarek taman ak ang'wan che mengichik che libwoben che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers29:24 Ogoitoi kobooto kirugichooto, mengichik, ak aarek, kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei ko uu koiitennywa ak ko uu ng'atuutyet." 
Numbers29:25 Ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:26 “Eng' peetuut ne po muut ogoitoi kiruugik sogool, mengichik aeng' ak aarek taman ak ang'wan che mengichik che libwoben che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers29:27 Ogoitoi kobooto kirugichooto, mengichik, ak aarek, kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei ko uu koiitennywa ak ko uu ng'atuutyet." 
Numbers29:28 Ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:29 “Eng' peetuut ne po lo, ogoitoi kiruugik sisiit, mengichik aeng' ak aarek taman ak ang'wan che mengichik che libwoben che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers29:30 Ogoitoi kobooto kirugichooto, mengichik ak aarek, kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei ko uu koiitennywa ak ko uu ng'atuutyet." 
Numbers29:31 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei." 
Numbers29:32 “Eng' peetuutap tisap, ogoite kiruugik tisap, mengichik aeng' ak aarek taman ak ang'wan che mengichik che libwoben che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers29:33 Ogoitoi kobooto kirugichooto, mengichik ak aarek, kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei, ko uu koiitennywa ak ko uu ng'atuutyet." 
Numbers29:34 Ogoitoi kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:35 “Eng' peetuut ne po sisiit oyai tuiyetap kaming'inetapkei, amoyai poit age tugul." 
Numbers29:36 Ogoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ne punei maat koek nyamdutyet ne ng'uu ne anyiny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kirgit agenge, mengit agenge ak aarek tisap che mengichik che libwoben che ma siirei kenyiit agenge." 
Numbers29:37 Kobooto kagoochinoik che po kirgit, mengit ak che po aarek, ogoite kagoochinennywa ne po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei ak pendi ko uu koiitennywa ak ko uu ng'atuutyet." 
Numbers29:38 Ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagoochinetap tengekto, ne kitesyin kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul kobooto ak kagoochinennyi ne po peek ak kagoochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:39 “Ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chuuto eng' igoorwekwok che ki king'at. Chuuto che kitesyin kaarortaosyekwok ak kagoochinoikwok che ogoitoi eng' chamyet, kagoochinoikwok che kibeelei, kagoochinoikwok che po peek, kagoochinoikwok che kieei ak kagoochinoikwok che po kaalyeet.”" 
Numbers29:40 Ki mwachi anyun `Musa piigap Israel ko uu tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. 
Numbers30:1 Ki mwachi `Musa pounigap ortinwegap piigap Israel koleenji: “Ni kiit ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: 
Numbers30:2 “Ye iarorchi `chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy, anan ngo yosyo korate saboondanyi ng'atuutyet, amat kowal ng'olyoondennyi ago koyai ko uu tugul che ki mwa eng' kutinnyi." 
Numbers30:3 “Ye iarorchi kobogoryondo neta ko neran Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy ak korategei ng'atuutyet, ye ta komi kootap kwandanyi," 
Numbers30:4 ak kogas kwandanyi kaarortaennyi anan ratuutyennyi ne korate saboondanyi ago ma mwa kiy, kogimegitu anyun kaarortaosyekyik ak kogimit ratuutyet age tugul ne korate saboondanyi." 
Numbers30:5 Ago ngo etee kwandanyi eng' peetuut ne kagas koma tonondos kaarortaosyekyik agot agenge anan ratuutikyik che korate saboondanyi, ak ko nyochi kaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kieetee kwandanyi." 
Numbers30:6 Ngitun kobogoryondonooto kota komiitei eng' ineendet kaarortaosyekyik, anan ngo kisartae ng'olyoo eng' kutinnyi ne korate saboondanyi." 
Numbers30:7 “Ak kogas manong'otyondennyi, ak kosiis koma mwochi kiy ineendet, kotononso anyun kaarortaosyekyik ak ratuutik che kiga rate saboondanyi." 
Numbers30:8 Ago ngo etee manong'otyondennyi eng' peetuut ne kagas, kowal anyun chiichooto kaarortaetap kobogoryondonooto ne kotinyei koek puch anan ng'olyoot ne kosartae, ne koga rate saboondanyi, ak ko nyochi kaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers30:9 Ago kaarortaetap kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot anan ko ne po ineendet ne ki kibesyo ak manong'otyot, kotononi amu ineendet, ma kibutei." 
Numbers30:10 “Ngo aror ineendet komi kootap manong'otyondennyi anan korat saboondanyi eng' ratuutyetap kayasyoet," 
Numbers30:11 ak kogas manong'otyondennyi ago ma mwa kiy, ama koete, kotononso anyun kaarortaosyekyik tugul ak ratuutyet age tugul ne kirate saboondanyi." 
Numbers30:12 Ago ngo wal manong'otyondennyi tuguuchooto koek puch eng' peetuut ne ki kas, koma tononi anyun kiy age tugul ne mang'une kutinnyi agobo kaarortaosyekyik. Ki yai manong'otyondennyi tuguuchooto koek puch ak ko nyochi kaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers30:13 Imuuchi kogimit manong'otyot anan koyai koek puch kaarortaet age tugul anan kayasyoet age tugul ne ratisyei ne inyalili saboondo. 
Numbers30:14 Ago ngo siis manong'otyondennyi eng' ineendet peetuut age tugul, kogimiti anyun kaarortaosyekyik tugul anan ko ratuutikyik tugul che miitei ineendet. Ki kogimit tuguuchooto amu ki siis, ma etee kwonyooto eng' peetuut ne ki kas." 
Numbers30:15 Ago ngo put koek puch ko kagogas ye kagobataita kasaryan, koip anyun ineendet tengektap kwonyooto.”" 
Numbers30:16 Chuuto ng'atuutik che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, che po chii ak osotyonnyi ak che po chepto ak kwandanyi, ye ta ne neran chebooto, eng' kootap kwandanyi." 
Numbers31:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers31:2 “Yaakyi mugetuut Midianik amu piigap Israel. Ye ibata nooto kiyumin iwe ole mi piiguk.” 
Numbers31:3 Ki mwachi anyun `Musa piik koleenji, “Ingolaach murenik alak eng' okweek kariik, si koba kobargei ak Midianik, koyai yaaktaetap mugetuut ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Midian." 
Numbers31:4 Oyookte eliphuut eng' ooreet age tugul, eng' ortinwek tugul che po Israel koba lugeet.”" 
Numbers31:5 Ara ki kikwei murenik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che tinyei kariigap lugeet; eliphuut agenge agenge kobun ooreet age tugul eng' eliphusyegap Israel. 
Numbers31:6 Ak ki iyookto `Musa icheek, eliphuut agenge agenge kobun ooreet age tugul koba lugeet kobooto Phineas weeriitap Eleazar tisiindet, koba tugul koibei tuguugap ole-tiliil ak igondisyek che kiguutei eng' waagaat." 
Numbers31:7 Ki pargei ak Midianik, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak ki par muren age tugul." 
Numbers31:8 Ki par kobooto piik chuun alak laitorinik muut che po Midian: Ebi, Rekem, Sur, Hur ak Reba. Ki par agine Balaam weeriitap Beor eng' rotwetap chok." 
Numbers31:9 Ki iluul `piigap Israel kwonyiigap Midianik, lagokwak, tuukwak tugul, neekwak tugul ak tuguukwak tugul." 
Numbers31:10 Ki peel nganasookwak tugul ole menyei ak meng'otosyekwak tugul. 
Numbers31:11 Ki ip tuguuk tugul che ki kiluul eng' piik ak eng' tyong'ik," 
Numbers31:12 ki imut luulenik, akwotisyek ak tuguukwak kobwa ole mi Musa, Eleazar tisiindet ak tuiyetap piigap Israel, agoi nganaseet ne miitei warengetap Moab, ne neegitee Jordan eng' Jeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Ki pa Musa, Eleazar tisiindet ak kirwoogik tugul che po tuiyet kotorookta icheek eng' saang'utap nganaseet." 
Numbers31:14 Ki nereekyi `Musa kandoigap lugeet, kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak kiptainigap pogolusyek, che ki punu poisyetap lugeet." 
Numbers31:15 Ak kiteebe `Musa icheek koleenji, “Koobagaakte kobogorisyek tugul kosapcho?" 
Numbers31:16 Icheeget chuuto che ki isup ng'olyootap Balaam ak ki igoochi piigap Israel koleelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'olyootap Peor, ak ki piit koroito eng' tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu nooto." 
Numbers31:17 Ara anyun obar weeriit age tugul eng' lagok ak obar kwony age tugul ne ki koruiyo ak muren. 
Numbers31:18 Ago oriip kosapcho kobunjook tiibiik tugul che tomo koruiyo ak muren. 
Numbers31:19 Chii age tugul ne kogobar chii anan chii age tugul ne kogotwa muustap ne ko ki parei, ko ingotebi saang'utap nganaseet peetuusyek tisap. Oanyinygei anyun okweek ak luulenikwok eng' peetuutap somok ak eng' peetuutap tisap." 
Numbers31:20 Ak otiliil ngoryeet age tugul, kiy age tugul ne ki kiyae muito anan poisyet age tugul ne po koroorigap ng'oroorek, anan tuguuk tugul che ki kiyae keetiik.”" 
Numbers31:21 Ki leenji `Eleazar tisiindet murenigap lugeet che ki pa pooryeet, “Niito ng'atuutyet ne po karureiywot ne ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers31:22 Thahabu, fedha, sugunonik, karnook, kibatinik, ngosyelait," 
Numbers31:23 ak kiy age tugul ne ma chootei eng' maat obeel anyun chooto eng' ma si kotiliiliitu. Ago kitiliili kora eng' peek che po katabaanet. Ak onde peek tuguuk tugul che chotoos eng' maat. 
Numbers31:24 Eng' peetuutap tisap omwet ngoroikwok ak oanyinyitu. Ye ibata obwa nganaseet oriit.” 
Numbers31:25 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers31:26 “Iit luulenik tugul che ki kenam, che piik ak che kiyagi, inyee ak tisiindet Eleazar ak pounigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po tuiyet." 
Numbers31:27 Opcheune che ki oluul kebeberwek aeng', punjin kebeberta age murenigap lugeet, che kigaba pooryeet, kobunji age tuiyet komugul." 
Numbers31:28 Yeityo inemu aisuruut ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' murenigap lugeet che ki pa pooryeet. Agenge eng' pogol muut, eng' piik, tuuga, sigiroik ak eng' keechiirek." 
Numbers31:29 Onemune chooto kebebertanywa ak igoochi tisiindet Eleazar, koek kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers31:30 Inemu eng' kebebertap piigap Israel, agenge eng' konom, eng' piik, eng' tuuga, eng' sigiroik, eng' neego anan eng' akwotisyek alak ak igoochi chooto Lawiik, che riibei poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Numbers31:31 Ki yai Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Numbers31:32 Ak che ki ng'at eng' che ki nam murenigap lugeet, ko ki keechiirek eliphuusyek pogol lo ak tamanwogik tisap ak muut," 
Numbers31:33 eng' tuuga ko ki eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap ak aeng'," 
Numbers31:34 sigiroik ko ki eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak agenge," 
Numbers31:35 ak kobogorisyek che ki tomo koruiyo ak muren ko ki eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng' tugul. 
Numbers31:36 Koitetap kebeberta, nooto po piik che ki kaba lugeet, ko ki keechiirek eliphuusyek pogol somok ak sosom ak tisap ak pogol muut," 
Numbers31:37 ak aisuruutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po kechirechooto ko ki pogol lo ak tamanwogik tisap ak muut. 
Numbers31:38 Ki ek che po tuuga eliphuusyek sosom ak lo, ak aisuruutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chooto ko ki tamanwogik tisap ak aeng'." 
Numbers31:39 Sigiroik ko ki eliphuusyek sosom ak pogol muut ak aisuruutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chooto ko ki tamanwogik lo ak agenge. 
Numbers31:40 Ki ek piik eliphuusyek taman ak lo ak aisuruutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chooto po piik ko sosom ak aeng'. 
Numbers31:41 Ki igoochi `Musa Eleazar tisiindet kebeberta, kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers31:42 Ak eng' kebebertap piigap Israel, ne ki itabaan Musa eng' kebeberta ne ki po murenik che ki yai lugeet," 
Numbers31:43 ko ki ek keechiirek eliphuusyek pogol somok ak sosom ak tisap ak pogol muut," 
Numbers31:44 che po tuuga ko eliphuusyek sosom ak lo," 
Numbers31:45 sigiroik ko eliphuusyek sosom ak pogol muut," 
Numbers31:46 ak piik eliphuusyek taman ak lo. 
Numbers31:47 Ki inem Musa eng' kebebertap piigap Israel, agenge eng' konom, eng' piik ak akwotisyek, ak kogoochi Lawiik che ki riibei poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Numbers31:48 Ak ki pwa ole mi Musa `kandoik che po eliphuusyek che ki yai lugeet, kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak kiptainigap pogolusyek," 
Numbers31:49 ak kole, “Kagiit `acheek otwogiguk murenigap lugeet che ki pou, ak ma pet agot agenge eng' acheek." 
Numbers31:50 Ara kageibu koek kagoochinetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiit ne konyoor chii age tugul, eng' tuguugap thahabu, mugurek che po keelyek, kariik che po eunek, peteinik che po ng'ookset, munaok ak sonoek, si koyaiywech kagaigaet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Numbers31:51 Kitaach anyun Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet thahabu che po tuguuchooto eng' icheek, agot tuguuk tugul che ki kitaany." 
Numbers31:52 Thahabu tugul che po kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak che ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che po kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak che po kiptainik che po pogolusyek ko ki keruutik pogol aeng' nyigiisandanyi." 
Numbers31:53 (Ki ipchigei chii tugul eng' murenigap lugeet tuguuk che ki kiluul.) 
Numbers31:54 Ak kitaach Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet thahabu eng' kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak che po pogolusyek, ak koip kobwa emait ne kituiyechin, koek ne kibwaatee piigap Israel eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers32:1 Ki tinyei akwotisyek che chaang' miising' lagogap Reuben ak lagogap Gad. Ye kingo keer emetap Jaser ak emetap Gilead kole emet ne nyoljin akwotisyek," 
Numbers32:2 kobwa lagogap Gad ak lagogap Reuben kong'alaalji Musa ak Eleazar tisiindet ak pounigap tuiyet, koleenji," 
Numbers32:3 “Emotinwegap Ataroth, Dibon, Jaser, Nimra, Hesbon, Eleale, Sebam, Nebo, ak Beon," 
Numbers32:4 emonooto ki par Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap tuiyetap Israel, ko emet ne nyoljin akwotisyek, ak tinyei otwogiguk akwotisyek." 
Numbers32:5 Ngo koginyooru chameet eng' taing'ung', ko nyolu kigoochi emoniito otwogiguk kobunji; amemutech kelandae Jordan.”" 
Numbers32:6 Ki leenji `Musa lagogap Gad ak lagogap Reuben, “Tos otebi okweek yu ye pendi tupchosyekwok lugeet?" 
Numbers32:7 Amu nee si omu piigap Israel si ma landa koba emet ne ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? 
Numbers32:8 Ki yai kwanisyekwok ko uu nooto, ye kinga yookte eng' Kadesh-barnea koba kosegei emet." 
Numbers32:9 Amu ye kingo pa atebweetap Eskol, ak kogeer emet, komu piigap Israel kole si ma pa emet ne kiga kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers32:10 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto, ak ki iyasyo kole," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Amu ma isubwo icheek eng' kagesunatetapkei, koma mi iman eng' piik che ki punu Misiri kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak kwo tai ne imuuchi kogeer emet ne ki ayosyechi Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo.’" 
Numbers32:12 Kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Kenisindet ak Joshua weeriitap Nun, amu ki isup icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kagesunatetapkei." 
Numbers32:12 Kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Kenisindet ak Joshua weeriitap Nun, amu ki isup icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kagesunatetapkei." 
Numbers32:13 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel, ak ki igoochi icheek koombeniot eng' surkwen eng' kenyiisyek artam agoi kowong'kei ibinda tugul ne ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers32:14 Ara oyaei nguno ko uu ye ki yai kwanisyekwok, oegu kiptengeginik che tesoksei, otes nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Israel." 
Numbers32:15 Amu ngo maste omete ineendet, kobagaaktoi ineendet icheek kogeny eng' surkwen, ak ong'em pichu tugul.”" 
Numbers32:16 Ki pwa icheek ole mi ineendet ak kole, “King'ote piusyegap tuukyok eng' olito ak keteekyi lagokyok nganasook." 
Numbers32:17 Ki chobootiin acheek kilaach kariik keebe kindoe piigap Israel agoi kiit icheek oldanywa. Ak komeny lagokyok nganasook che ng'ootaatiin, koriibotin icheek eng' piigap emet." 
Numbers32:18 Ma kiweeksei kebendi kaa agoi konyoor chii tugul eng' piigap Israel porotennyi. 
Numbers32:19 Amu ma kinyabani kobooto icheek eng' pitoniindo po Jordan anan oliin po tai, amu mi porotennyo Jordan pitoni tokyingei kong'asiis.”" 
Numbers32:20 Ki leenji `Musa icheek, “Ngo yai ko uu niito, olaach kariik obe lugeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Numbers32:21 ak ngwo mureno age tugul ne kagolaach kariik kolandae Jordan eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koon puunikyik eng' tainnyi," 
Numbers32:22 ak kiterteer pichooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, oweegei anyun ak oegu che ma tinyei tengek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anan eng' Israel ak kobunjook emoni eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Numbers32:23 Ago ngot ko moyai ko uu nooto, ko kaoyai tengekto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak onai anyun ole ng'ang'dook tengektong'wong'." 
Numbers32:24 Oteekyi nganasook lagokwok ak ong'otyi keechiirekwok piusyek, ak oyai nooto kamang'une kuting'wong'.”" 
Numbers32:25 Ki mwachi `lagogap Gad ak `lagogap Reuben Musa koleenji, “Yaei otwogiguk ko uu ye keng'atech kiptaiyandennyo." 
Numbers32:26 Tebee nganasoogap Gilead lagokyok, osotikyok, tuukyok ak che kiyagi tugul," 
Numbers32:27 ago landoi otwogiguk, mureno age tugul ne kagolaach kariik che po lugeet, kobendi pooryeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye kamwa kiptaiyandennyo.”" 
Numbers32:28 Ki iyomis anyun `Musa Eleazar tisiindet, Joshua weeriitap Nun ak kandoigap kooriik che po kwanisyegap ortinwegap piigap Israel, agobo pichooto." 
Numbers32:28 Ki iyomis anyun `Musa Eleazar tisiindet, Joshua weeriitap Nun ak kandoigap kooriik che po kwanisyegap ortinwegap piigap Israel, agobo pichooto." 
Numbers32:29 Ki leenji `Musa icheek, “Ngo landae tugul Jordan kobooto lagogap Gad ak lagogap Reuben, chii tugul ne kagolaach kariigap lugeet, si kwo pooryeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kiterteer emet eng' taing'wong', ogoochi anyun icheek emetap Gilead kobunji." 
Numbers32:30 Ago ngo ma cham olande tugul kotinyei kariik, konyooru icheek poroteet kobootok eng' emetap Kanaan.”" 
Numbers32:31 Ki wolji lagogap Gad ak lagogap Reuben koleenji, “Kiyae ko uu ye kamwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor otwogikyik." 
Numbers32:32 Kilandoi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kebendi emetap Kanaan ketinye kariik, ak ng'etu eng' Jordan pitoni, che punjinech che po porotennyo.”" 
Numbers32:33 Ki igoochi `Musa icheek, chooto lagogap Gad, lagogap Reuben ak kebebertap ooreetap Manasseh weeriitap Joseph, laitornatetap Sihon laitoryatap Amorik ak laitornatetap Og laitoryatap Bashan, emet ko uu nganasookwak kobooto ole poochin kiwotosyekwak, agot nganasoogap emet che ki yiem." 
Numbers32:34 Ki teech kogeny lagogap Gad Dibon, Ataroth, Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 Atrot-sopan, Jaser Jogbea," 
Numbers32:36 Beth-nimra ak Beth-haran, nganasook che ng'ootaatiin ak piusyek che po keechiirek." 
Numbers32:37 Ki teech kogeny lagogap Reuben Hesbon, Eleale ak Kiriataim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo ak Baal-meon (ki kiwal kainaikwak), ak Sibma. Ak kitoochi kainaik alak nganasook che ki teech." 
Numbers32:39 Ki pa lagogap Makir weeriitap Manasseh Gilead. Ki nam ak koon komaanda Amorik che ki mi olooto. 
Numbers32:40 Ki igoochi `Musa Makir weeriitap Manasseh, Gilead ak ki meny olooto." 
Numbers32:41 Ki wo Jair weeriitap Manasseh konam nganasookwak, ak kotoochi kainaik alak koguure Habot-jair." 
Numbers32:42 Ak ki wo Noba konam Kenat kobooto nganasookyik che mengeechen, ak kiguure yooto Noba, koguurtoe kainennyi." 
Numbers33:1 Chu panwegap piigap Israel, ye kingo manda eng' emetap Misiri eng' lugosyekwak kondochin Musa ak Aron." 
Numbers33:2 Ki sir Musa agobo mandaennywa ye kingo naam panwekwak ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki uu chu panwekwak ko uu mandaennywa. 
Numbers33:3 Ki pa anyun kong'eetyee Rameses eng' arawet ne po tai, peetuutap taman ak muut, kimanda piigap Israel eng' peetuut ne ki isubi paska eng' eutap kimnateet kogeeroti Misiriik tugul," 
Numbers33:4 kota kotubei Misiriik weeriikwak tugul che po tai, che kiga kobar Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwenunnywa. Ki irwookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamuktaikwak ak icheek." 
Numbers33:5 Ki pa piigap Israel eng' Rameses ak koba komuung'e Sukoth. 
Numbers33:6 Ki pa eng' Sukoth ak komuung'e Etam ne mi ole pooch surkwen. 
Numbers33:7 Ak ki pa eng' Etam, koweigei agoi Pi-hairot, ne toorchindos ak Baal-sepon, ak ki imuung'ee taitap Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Ki pa eng' Pi-Hairot, ak ki pun kwenutap nyanjet agoi surkwen. Ye kingo kagoba pandap peetuusyek somok eng' surkwen ne po Etam, ak komuung'e Marah." 
Numbers33:9 Ki pa eng' Marah ak kiit Elim. Ki mi Elim kong'igap peek tamanu ak aeng' ak tiironigap sosik tamanwogik tisap; ak ki imuung'ee icheek olooto. 
Numbers33:10 Ki pa eng' Elim ak komuung'e ole neegitee Araraita ne Piriir. 
Numbers33:11 Ki pa eng' Araraita ne Piriir ak ki imuung'ee surkwen ne po Sin. 
Numbers33:12 Ki pa eng' surkwen ne po Sin ak komuung'e Dobka. 
Numbers33:13 Ak ki pa eng' Dobka, yeityo komuuny eng' Alus." 
Numbers33:14 Ki pa eng' Alus ak komuung'e Rephidim, ole ki ma komi peek che eei piik." 
Numbers33:15 Ki pa eng' Rephidim ak ki imuung'ee surkwen ne po Sinai. 
Numbers33:16 Ki pa eng' surkwen ne po Sinai ak ki imuuny eng' Kibrot-hataaba. 
Numbers33:17 Ak ki pa eng' Kibrot-hataaba, ak komuung'e Haserot." 
Numbers33:18 Ki pa eng' Haserot ak komuung'e Ritma. 
Numbers33:19 Ki pa kogeny eng' Ritma ak ki imuung'ee Rimon-peres. 
Numbers33:20 Ak ki pa eng' Rimon-peres kot komuung'e Libna. 
Numbers33:21 Kingo pa eng' Libna ko ki imuung'ee Risa. 
Numbers33:22 Ki pa eng' Risa ak ki imuung'ee Kehelata. 
Numbers33:23 Ki pa eng' Kehelata ak ki imuung'ee tulweetap Seper. 
Numbers33:24 Ki pa eng' tulweetap Seper ak ki imuuny eng' Harada. 
Numbers33:25 Ki pa eng' Harada ak ki imuuny eng' Makelot. 
Numbers33:26 Ki pa eng' Makelot ak ki imuuny eng' Tahat. 
Numbers33:27 Ki pa anyun eng' Tahat ak ki imuuny eng' Tera. 
Numbers33:28 Ki pa eng' Tera ak ki imuuny eng' Mitka. 
Numbers33:29 Ki pa kogeny eng' Mitka ak komuuny eng' Hasmona. 
Numbers33:30 Ki pa eng' Hasmona ak ki imuung'ee Moserot. 
Numbers33:31 Ki pa eng' Moserot ak ki imuung'ee Bene-jaakan. 
Numbers33:32 Ki pa eng' Bene-jaakan ak ki imuung'ee Horagidgad. 
Numbers33:33 Ki pa anyun eng' Horagidgad ak ki imuung'ee Jotbata. 
Numbers33:34 Ki pa icheek eng' Jotbata ak ki imuung'ee Abrona. 
Numbers33:35 Ki pa eng' Abrona ak ki imuung'ee Esion-geber. 
Numbers33:36 Ki pa eng' Esion-geber ak ki imuung'ee surkwen ne po Sin (nooto Kadesh). 
Numbers33:37 Ki pa eng' Kadesh ak ki imuung'ee tulweetap Hor, ole poochin kiwotetap emetap Edom." 
Numbers33:38 Ki togosta anyun Aron tisiindet tulweetap Hor, eng' ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki mechi olooto eng' kenyiitap artam kobooch ngap komang'une piigap Israel emetap Misiri eng' arawetap muut, eng' peetuut ne po tai eng' arawanooto." 
Numbers33:39 Kiga kotar Aron kenyiisyek pogol ak tiptem ak somok ye kingo meei eng' tulweetap Hor. 
Numbers33:40 Ki kas anyun laitoryatap Arad kanaanindet ne ki menyei murot tai eng' emetap Kanaan, kole pwoonei piigap Israel." 
Numbers33:41 Ki pa icheek eng' tulweetap Hor ak komuung'e Salmona. 
Numbers33:42 Ki pa eng' Salmona ak ki imuung'ee Bunon. 
Numbers33:43 Ki pa eng' Bunon ak ki imuung'ee Obot. 
Numbers33:44 Ki pa eng' Obot ak ki imuung'ee Iyeabarim, eng' kiwotetap Moab." 
Numbers33:45 Ki pa eng' Iyim ak ki imuung'ee Dibon-gad. 
Numbers33:46 Ki pa eng' Dibon-gad ak ki imuung'ee Almon-diblataim. 
Numbers33:47 Ki pa eng' Almon-diblataim ak ki imuung'ee tuloonoogap Abarim, ole tokyingei Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Ki pa eng' tuloonoogap Abarim ak ki imuung'ee warengetap Moab ole neegitee Jordan eng' Jeriko. 
Numbers33:49 Ak ki imuung'ee ole neegitee Jordan, kobooch Bet Jesimot ak Abel Shitim, eng' warengetap Moab." 
Numbers33:50 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' warengetap Moab, ole neegit Jordan eng' Jeriko koleenji," 
Numbers33:51 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin: Ye olandoe Jordan obe emetap Kanaan," 
Numbers33:52 oon anyun piik tugul che menyei emonooto koba eng' taing'wong'. Ong'em koikwak che saaei, ong'em kanamonikwak che ki kitaanyi ak obut oldinwekwak tugul che torooreen." 
Numbers33:53 Yeityo onam emet kobunjook ak omeny, amu ki agoonok emonooto kobunjook." 
Numbers33:54 Opchechigei emonooto onyabani eng' seretap parbareek ko uu ortinwekwok. Ogoochini che chaang' poroteet ne oo ak ogoochini che ng'ering' poroteet ne ming'in. Oldo tugul ole kaibutyi parbaryatap chii koek nenyi nooto. Onyabani ko uu pororyosyegap kwanisyekwok. 
Numbers33:55 Ago ngo moon piik che menyei emet koba eng' taing'wong', kogergeitu eng' konyekwok ak tuguuk che toorei piich ak katook eng' karaaswekwok ak konyaliilak eng' emet ne omenye." 
Numbers33:56 Ak tuun ayaiywok okweek ko uu ye ki abwaati ale ayachini icheek.” 
Numbers34:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers34:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel ileenji: Ye oit emetap Kanaan, niito emet ne onyooru koek poroteng'wong', kibooru kiwotosyekyik ko uu ni:" 
Numbers34:3 Komostang'wong' ne po murot tai kong'etee surkwen ne po Sin korop tabandap Edom. Kiwoteng'wong' ne po murot tai kong'etee tabandap Araraita ne po Munyuk ne tokyingei kong'asiis. 
Numbers34:4 Ak koweigei kiwoteng'wong' kotokyigei murot tai eng' ole kitogostoe kebendi Akrabbim, ak kwo agoi Sin. Itei kiwotosyekyik komostap murot tai ne po Kadesh-barnea yeityo kwo kotokyigei Haser-adar agoi koit Asmon." 
Numbers34:5 Yeityo koweigei kiwateet kong'etee Asmon agoi kererutap Misiri ak koboochit kiwotosyekyik Nyanjet ne po Mediterenian. 
Numbers34:6 “Egu Nyanjetap Mediterenian kiwoteng'wong' ne mi cherongo. 
Numbers34:7 “Kiwoteng'wong' ne po murot kaataam ko ni: kong'etee Nyanjetap Mediterenian, oaroroti agoi tulweetap Hor," 
Numbers34:8 ak kobooch tulweetap Hor, oaroroti agoi ye kimandoe kebendi Lebo-hamath, ak poochitu kiwotennyi Sedad," 
Numbers34:9 ak itei kiwateet Sipron ak poochitu tabanwekyik Hasarenan. Niito kiwoteng'wong' ne po murot kaataam. 
Numbers34:10 “Yeityo oarorote kiwoteng'wong' ne po komostap kong'asiis kobooch Hasar-enan agoi Sepam. 
Numbers34:11 Chortagei kiwateet kong'etee Sepam agoi Ribla, eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po Ain. Chortagei kiwateet kora agoi koit tabandap Nyanjetap Galilaya eng' komostap kong'asiis." 
Numbers34:12 Ingochoortagei anyun kiwateet koosup Jordan agoi koit tabanwekyik Araraita ne po Munyuk. Egu niito emeng'wong' ko uu kiwotosyekyik che yiemei tugul.” 
Numbers34:13 Ki ng'at `Musa piigap Israel koleenji, “Niito emet ne onyabani eng' parbareek, ne kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kigoochi ortinwek sogool ak kebeberta ne po ooreet age." 
Numbers34:14 Amu ki kotaach porotennywa ooreetap lagogap Reuben, ooreetap lagogap Gad, ak ki kotaach porotennywa kebebertap ooreetap Manasseh chii age tugul ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
Numbers34:15 Ki kotaach porotennywa ortinwechooto aeng'u ak kebeber eng' Jordan pitoni eng' Jeriko ole tokyingei kong'asiis.” 
Numbers34:16 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers34:17 “Chu kainaigap piik che pcheiywok emet koek poroteng'wong': Eleazar tisiindet ak Joshua weeriitap Nun. 
Numbers34:17 “Chu kainaigap piik che pcheiywok emet koek poroteng'wong': Eleazar tisiindet ak Joshua weeriitap Nun. 
Numbers34:18 Ak olewen pounindet ne po ooreet age tugul, si kopchei emet koek poroteet." 
Numbers34:19 Kainaigap pichooto chu: Eng' ooreetap Judah, ko Kaleb weeriitap Jepune." 
Numbers34:20 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Simion, ko Semuel weeriitap Amihud." 
Numbers34:21 Eng' ooreetap Benjamin, ko Eliad weeriitap Kislon." 
Numbers34:22 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Dan, ko pounindet Buki weeriitap Jogli." 
Numbers34:23 Eng' lagogap Joseph, eng' ooreetap lagogap Manasseh, ko Pounindet Haniel weeriitap Ephod." 
Numbers34:24 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Ephraim, ko pounindet Kemuel weeriitap Siptan." 
Numbers34:25 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Zebulun, ko pounindet Elizaphan weeriitap Parnak." 
Numbers34:26 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Issakar ko pounindet Paltiel weeriitap Asan. 
Numbers34:27 Eng' ooreetap lagogap Asher, ko pounindet Aihud weeriitap Selomi." 
Numbers34:28 Ak eng' ooreetap lagogap Naphtali, ko pounindet Pedael weeriitap Amihud.”" 
Numbers34:29 Chuuto piik che ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kopchechi emetap Kanaan piigap Israel koek porotennywa. 
Numbers35:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa eng' warengetap Moab ole neegitee Jordan eng' ole po Jeriko, koleenji," 
Numbers35:2 “Ng'at piigap Israel kogoochi Lawiik nganasook eng' porotennywa si komeny, kobooto ole agete tuuga eng' emotinwek che kiyiem nganasook." 
Numbers35:3 Ingomeny icheek nganasochooto ak koek olooto ole agete tuukwak, akwotisyek ak tugul che kiyagi." 
Numbers35:4 Emet olooto agete, che ogoochini Lawiik, chooto yiemei komoswek tugul ko egu mitainik pogol ang'wan ak konom kong'etee irimeetap nganaseet." 
Numbers35:5 Okwae kogergeitu eng' komoswek tugul koek mitainik pogol sogool, eng' nganaseet ole tokyingei kong'asiis, komostap murot tai, komostap cherongo ak eng' murot kaataam, kokwen nganaseet. Egu eng' icheek ole agete tuuga eng' nganasook." 
Numbers35:6 Ogoochini Lawiik nganasook lo che kimwechin, egu chooto che ogoitoi si komwechi ne karumis eng' lelset. Ne siire, otesyi icheek nganasook alak artam ak aeng'." 
Numbers35:7 Nganasook tugul che ogoochini Lawiik, ko egu artam ak sisiit kobooto emotinwekwak chugai iagisyee." 
Numbers35:8 Ak eng' nganasochooto ogoitoi eng' che po piigap Israel, onemu anyun che chaang' eng' che tinyei che chaang' ak onemu che ng'ering' eng' che tinyei che ng'ering'. Ingogoochi age tugul Lawiik ko uu ole tee porotennyi ne kinyoor.”" 
Numbers35:9 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koleenji," 
Numbers35:10 “Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin: Ye olandoe Jordan obe emetap Kanaan," 
Numbers35:11 otabaanjigei nganasook alak eng' chooto koek nganasook che omwechini si kobiit komwechi olooto age tugul ne karumis eng' lelset. 
Numbers35:12 Egu nganasochooto che omwechini si ma nyoorwok ne yaaktoi mugetuut, si ma kibar ne karumis agoi kotonon eng' taitap tuiyet kirwookyi." 
Numbers35:13 Ak nganasochooto lo ogoitoi, koegu nganasook che kimwechin." 
Numbers35:14 Ogoitoi nganasook somok eng' Jordan pitoniin ak ogoite nganasook somok eng' emetap Kanaan, koek nganasook che kimwechin." 
Numbers35:15 Egu nganasochooto lou ole mwechin piigap Israel, anan ne toondet ak punootyot ne mi kwenunnywa. Ingomwechi olooto age tugul ne parei chii eng' lelset." 
Numbers35:16 “Ago ngo kikwere karnet ak kogoon aseenet ko rumin chiichooto, ak ki parei rumindonooto iman." 
Numbers35:17 Ngo ki wiiree koita ne yamei kobar chii, ak kome nooto kagiwir, ko rumin ineendet. Kibarei rumindonooto iman." 
Numbers35:18 Anan ngo kikwere keetit ne yamei kobar chii, ak kome ne kagikwer, ko rumiindet ineendet. Kibarei rumindonooto iman." 
Numbers35:19 Parei yaaktaindetap mugetuut rumindonooto. Ngo tuiyo ak ineendet, kobar." 
Numbers35:20 “Ak ngo toorta amu wegeet anan ngo wiir eng' kiy ak kobar kome," 
Numbers35:21 anan ngo rabach eng' puunyoondit, ak kobar kome, kebarei iman ineendet ne kerabagisyei; rumin chiichooto. Parei yaaktaindetap mugetuut agobo korotiik rumindonooto ye katuiyo ak ineendet." 
Numbers35:22 “Ago ngo toorta eng' yooto ama eng' puunyoondit, anan kowiire kiy age tugul ama sapchi," 
Numbers35:23 anan kowiir eng' koita ne yamei kobar chii ama keer ineendet ak kome, ak kotee ko kamago punyondennyi ak kama komachei koyachi ne ya," 
Numbers35:24 korwooch anyun tuiyet agobo parindonooto ak yaaktaindetap mugetuut agobo korotiik ko uu ole teptoi kirwoogutichu. 
Numbers35:25 Myee kosar tuiyet rumindonooto eng' eutap yaaktaindetap mugetuut agobo korotiik ak koweekyi icheek ineendet nganasennyi ole kiga mwechi. Ingomeny olooto agoi kome tisiindet ne oo ne ki kiile mwaita ne tiliil. 
Numbers35:26 Ago ngot kosiir rumindonooto kiwotetap nganasennyi ne kiga mwechi," 
Numbers35:27 ak konyoorchi ineendet yaaktaindetap mugetuut agobo korotiik saang'utap nganasennyi ne kimwechin, ak kobar ineendet parindet, koma namei ineendet ne kayaaktoi mugetuut ng'oogistap korotiik." 
Numbers35:28 Amu kata nyoljin kotebee nganasennyi ne kimwechin agoi kome tisiindet ne oo. Ago ye kagome tisiindet ne oo koweekyigei anyun rumiindet emennyi. 
Numbers35:29 “Egu tuguuchuuto ng'atuutyetap kirwooget eng' okweek eng' ibinwekwok tugul ak eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul. 
Numbers35:30 “Eng' ng'olyoo age tugul agobo ne parei chii, ko ng'aleegap paorinik che koonu kagikyinet ngo kibarei rumindonooto. Ago ma ki parei chii eng' paornateetap chiito agenge." 
Numbers35:31 “Amotaach kiy ne kityage saboondap rumiindet ne irwookyinot konyoor meet; ki parei ineendet iman. 
Numbers35:32 Amotaach kiy ne kityage chii ne kamwechi nganasennyi ne kimwechin, ne mache koweek si kobiit konyo komeng'iis eng' emet kotomo komee tisiindet ne oo."
