Numbers35:33 Amomurwon anyun emet ne omi. Amu imurwoni emet korotiik. Ak ma mi kiy ne ki anyinyee emet amu korotiik che kitumjigei kobatee korotiigap ineendet ne kitumda korotichooto. 
Numbers35:34 Ameng'wanit anyun emet ne omenye, ne atebee agane; amu anee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, atebee kwenutap piigap Israel.”" 
Numbers36:1 Ki pwa anyun che eecheen eng' kooriigap kwanisyek che po ooreetap lagogap Gilead, weeriitap Makir, weeriitap Manasseh ne agenge eng' ortinwegap weeriigap Joseph, nyoo kong'alaal eng' taitap Musa ak pounik, che eecheen eng' kooriigap kwanisyek che po piigap Israel." 
Numbers36:2 Ki le icheek: “Ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu kole, kogoochi emet piigap Israel eng' seretap parbareek koek poroteet. Ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu kogoochi tiibiigap Zelophehad tupchennyo, poroteetap kwandanywa." 
Numbers36:3 Ara anyun ngot kotun icheek weeriigap pororyosyek alak che po piigap Israel, keisto anyun porotennywa eng' poroteetap kwanisyekyok ak ketesyi poretetap ooreet ne ituni icheek. Eng' niito ki istoi anyun parbaryatap porotennyo." 
Numbers36:4 Ye iit kenyiitap Jublii ne po piigap Israel, ketesyi anyun porotennywa poroteetap ooreet ne punjin icheek, ak ki istoi anyun porotennywa eng' poroteetap ooreetap kwanisyekyok.”" 
Numbers36:5 Ara ki ng'at `Musa piigap Israel ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Kamwa iman ooreetap weeriigap Joseph." 
Numbers36:6 Kang'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoni agobo tiibiigap Zelophehad, kole ingotun icheek che machei; ago ingotun che po kootap ooreetap kwandanywa ineegei," 
Numbers36:7 si ma kiuto poroteet age tugul ne po piigap Israel, kong'etee ooreet age kwo ooreet age; amu kanyool konamgei chii tugul eng' piigap Israel ak poroteetap ooreetap kwanisyekyik." 
Numbers36:8 Chepto age tugul ne punjin poroteet eng' pororyet age tugul ne po piigap Israel, kitunjin kootap ooreetap pororyetap kwandanyi, si kobiit konam chii age tugul eng' piigap Israel poroteetap kwanisyekyik." 
Numbers36:9 Ma kimuuchi kiuto poroteet age tugul kong'etee pororyet age agoi age, namjingei age tugul eng' pororyosyegap piigap Israel porotennyi kobunji.”" 
Numbers36:10 Ki yai tiibiigap Zelophehad ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Numbers36:11 Tipchooto po Zelophehad; Mahlah, Tirzah, Hoglah, Milkah ak Noah, ko ki itun weeriigap tupchosyegap kwandanywa." 
Numbers36:12 Ko uu ye ki kitunji icheek ortinwegap weeriigap Manasseh weeriitap Joseph, ko ki tebee porotennywa pororyetap ooreetap kwandanywa." 
Numbers36:13 Chuuto anyun ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel eng' Musa eng' warengetap Moab ole neegitee Jordan eng' Jeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Chu ng'aleek che ki mwachi `Musa Yahudik tugul komi surkwen eng' Jordan pitoniin. Yooto ko Arabah ne tokyingei Suph, kwenutap nganaseetap Paran eng' komosta age ak nganasoogap Tophel, Laban, Haseroth ak Di-sahab eng' komosta age." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Imuuch kotar peetuusyek taman ak agenge panda ne kebendi kong'etee Horeb eng' ooreet ne punei tulweetap Seir agoi Kadesh-barnea. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Eng' peetuutap tai ne po arawetap taman ak agenge, eng' kenyiitap artam, komwachi `Musa piigap Israel ng'atuutik tugul che kiga kong'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet kole asi kogoochi icheek." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Ki mwachin `Musa Yahudik ng'atuutichuuto ye kingo kagoterteer Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, ne ki menyei Hesbon ak Og laitoryatap Bashan, ne ki menyei Astarot eng' Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Eng' Jordan pitoniin eng' emetap Moab, ko ki toi anyun Musa koboor ng'atuutyoni. Kole:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 Ki mwaiwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo eng' Horeb kole, Kogoyam peetuusyek che ki omeny tulwooni." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Otau pandang'wong', ak obe emet ne po tuloonoogap Amorik; oba oldinwek tugul che neegitee olooto eng' Arabah, emetap tuloonook, warenget komostap murot tai ak ole neegitee ngeguut, emetap Kanaanik ak Lebanon agoi ainonooto oo po Yufrets." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ogeero, kande emet taing'wong'; omong'ji anyun onam kobunjook emet ne ki iyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyekwok, Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo kole igoochin icheek ak iyotennywa ne piitu let." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Ki leenji `Musa piik, “Ki amwaiwok kota kemi tulweetap Sinai aleenjok ma muuchi agesenaak aneege." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Ki kotesaak `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak oo sere rani ko uu kecheigap kipsengwet." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Ingotesaak `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwok konyil eliphuut kosiir koiiteng'wong' ne po nguno ak ingoberuurook ko uu ye ki koarorwok!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Amuktoi ano aneege agesen kaimutikwok, lautikwok ak suryosyekwok?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Olewenjigei piik che ng'oomen che tinyei utaatyet ne nin ak ko che taagunotiin kobun ortinwekwok si agoochi kondoiywok. 
Deuteronomy1:14 Ki owolwo oleenjo, ‘Myee kioto kemwaiwech keyai.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ki anam anyun kandoigap ortinwekwok, piik che utaatiin ak ko taagunotiin, ak agoochi icheek kondoikwok koek kiptainigap eliphuusyek, kiptainigap pogolusyek, kiptainigap konomusyek ak kiptainigap tamanusyek ak pounik ko uu ortinwekwok.”" 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Ki ang'at kirwoogikwok peetuunooto aleenji, ‘Ogasyi ng'aleek tupchosyekwok, orwookyi eng' imanda chii ak ne tupcho; ak toondet ne mi kobootok." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Amotiytiy piik eng' kirwooget; ago ogasyi ne ming'in ak ne oo kogergeit. Amoiywei togoch ne po chii amu po kirwooget Kamuktaindet. Ng'olyoot ne katemenak oibwa si agas.’ 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ki ang'ataak eng' peetuunooto agobo tuguuk tugul che kanyool oyai.” 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Ki kibe eng' Horeb kebune surkwen nooto oo tugul ak ko oo kamuiset. Ki kibunu ooreet ne po emetap tuloonook ne po Amorik ko uu ye king'atech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo ak ki kipwa agoi Kadesh-barnea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ki aleenjok anyun, ‘Kaoitu emetap tuloonook ne po Amorik ne koonech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo," 
Deuteronomy1:21 ak kagonde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emet taing'ung'. Ara togoste anyun nam kobunjiin ko uu ye kimwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyeguk, ameiywei anan iaragen.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Ak ko ki obwa tugul ole ami oleenjo, ‘Ongiyookte piik kondoenech koba kosegeiywech emet, si kobwa komwaiwech ole teptoi ooreet ne kebune ketogostoi ak nganasook che ki ite.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ki ibaibaa kioto komyee ak ki alewen anyun murenik taman ak aeng' eng' okweek, agenge eng' ooreet age tugul." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Ki pa kotogosta tulweet ak ki it atebweetap Eskol ak ki segei `icheek olooto 
Deuteronomy1:25 ak kobut logoegap emonooto koibwech. Ki ibwech ng'aleek ak icheek komwa kole, Myee emonooto koonech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo.”" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Ago ki ma ocham otogoste olooto, ago ki obistoe ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Ki ong'unyng'ung'se eng' emaisyekwok ole, ‘Ki imoong'wech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emetap Misiri amu kiwechech, si kobiit kondeech eunegap Amorik kobarech." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Ki togostoi kebendi ano anyun? Ago kagoochi tupchosyekyok mugulelwekyok kochootyo ye ka ngo leenjech eecheen piik ak ko kooen kosiirech, ak ko eecheen nganasook ak ki kiteech irimosyekwak kot koit kipsengwet, ne siirei nooto ko ki kigeerchi olooto weeriigap Anagik.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Ki aleenjok anyun, “Among' komuok anan oiywei icheek." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Yaei pooryeet agobo okweek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne indoenok ko uu tugul che kiyaiywok eng' Misiri," 
Deuteronomy1:31 ak eng' surkwen ole ki igeer ile kigesenunenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ko uu ye keseni chii weeriinnyi, eng' ortinwek tugul che ki obunu agoi oitu olito." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ago ma oyan Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' ng'olyoondoni," 
Deuteronomy1:33 ineendet ne ki indoenak eng' ooreet si kocheeng'wok ole oteeche emaisyekwok si koboorwok eng' maat ooreet ne obendi kemoi ak eng' pooldet peet. 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Ak ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tweguunetap ng'aleekwok ak kinereech ak koyasyo kole," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Ma keerei iman agot agenge eng' pichu po ibini ya emet ne karaaran ne ki ayosye ale agoochini kwanisyekwok," 
Deuteronomy1:36 kobatee Kaleb weeriitap Jepune. Agoochini ineendet kobooto lagokyik emonooto kityech. Amu ki isup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kagesunatetapkei.’ 
Deuteronomy1:37 Ki nereekyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu okweek kole: ‘memandoi aginye olooto," 
Deuteronomy1:38 ak ko itei Joshua weeriitap Nun ineendet ne tononi eng' taing'ung'. Ara anyun igimit ineendet amu igoochin `ineendet Israel konyaban emonooto. 
Deuteronomy1:38 ak ko itei Joshua weeriitap Nun ineendet ne tononi eng' taing'ung'. Ara anyun igimit ineendet amu igoochin `ineendet Israel konyaban emonooto. 
Deuteronomy1:39 Ak itei olooto lagokwok che mengech che ki omwa ole egu luulenik ak lagokwok che nguno koma ingen ne myee anan ne ya. Eng' iman ko chooto che itei olooto ak agoochini icheek emet kobunji. 
Deuteronomy1:40 Ago oweege okweek ak onam pandang'wong' agoi omande surkwen eng' ooreet ne wendi Nyanjet ne Piriir.’ 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Ki owolwo anyun oleenjo, ‘Kigeyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto. Ara anyun kibendi keyai pooryeet, ko uu tugul che king'atech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo.’ Ki rat chii tugul kariikyik che po lugeet ak ki osartae obe tulweet." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Ago ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ileenji, ‘Amat otogoste anan oyai pooryeet, amu ma mi anee kwenung'wong', si ma kibaraak eng' taitap puunikwok.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ki ang'alaalwok anyun ko uu nooto, ak ki ma ogas, ago ki ongelelji ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' menoteet ak ki otogoste tulweet." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Kimong'jok Amorik che ki menyei tulwoonooto, nyoo koonak ko uu ye oonei piich segemik ak ki iterteeraak ochoorchinigei Seir agoi Horma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Ki oweege oriirye eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ma kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor riirekwok ama epchok iit." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Ki otebee anyun Kadesh peetuusyek che chaang' che tee peetuusyek che ki otar eng' yooto. 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Ki kiweege anyun kenam pandanyo keebe surkwen eng' ooreet ne wendi Araraita ne Piriir, ko uu ye kimwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki kimuut tulweetap Seir peetuusyek che chaang'." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Eng' let komwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘kogoyam peetuusyek che ki omuut tulwooni. Ara anyun oweege oba murot kaataam.’ 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ng'at piik ileenji, kanyool obun kiwotetap tupchosyekwok lagogap Esau che menyei Seir. Nga iyweok," 
Deuteronomy2:5 ko oriipkei miising' anyun si momoiye kiy ak icheeget, amu ma koi agoonok emennywa, agot ne yamei kotyech keeldo. Amu ki agoochi Esau tulweetap Seir kobunji." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Oale icheeget amitwogik eng' fedha si oam, ak oale kogeny icheeget peek eng' fedha si oee." 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Amu ki koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' poisyet tugul ne po euneguk. Ki konai pandang'ung' eng' ong'atani oo. Ki imi kobooten Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kenyisyechu artam ak ma rarun kiy. 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Ki kirop anyun kiwotetap tupchosyekyok lagogap Esau che menyei Seir kebun ooreetap Arabah ne wegegei Elath ak Esiongeber ak ki kiweege kebun ooreetap surkwen ne po Moab. 
Deuteronomy2:9 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Ameiim Moab anan iborye icheeget eng' lugeet, amu ma koonin emennyi kobunjiin; amu ki agoochi lagogap Lot emetap Ar kobunji.’" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Ki menyei Emik olooto keny, piik che kiimeen ak ko chaang', ak ko kooen, ko uu Anagik." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Ki iti icheeget keele Repaik, ko uu Anagik: ago kuure `Moabik icheek Emik." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Ak ki menyei Horik ak icheek keny Seir, ak ko ki isubu lagogap Esau pichooto. Ki par koisto eng' tainnywa ak komeny olooto kogeer icheek ko uu ye ki yai Yahudik eng' emennywa ne ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Kileenjech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Ong'eetyee anyun, olandae kererutap Sered.’ Ki kilandae anyun kererunooto." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kobooch ngap keng'eetye eng' Kadesh-barnea, agoi kelandae kererutap Sered, ko ki kenyiisyek sosom ak sisiit. Kiga kogeskei ibinda tugul ne po murenigap lugeet eng' nganaseet ko uu ye ki iyosyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ki kirindoi icheek eutap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobar icheek eng' nganaseet kot kogeskei tugul. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Kingo kagobek piik tugul che po lugeet kowong'kei," 
Deuteronomy2:17 koleenjo `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Isiirtoe rani Ar kiwotetap Moab," 
Deuteronomy2:19 ak ye iriikte ole neegitee lagogap Amonik, ko meiim anan omoiye kiy ak pichooto, amu ma koonin emetap lagogap Amonik kobunjiin, amu ki agoochi lagogap Lot kobunji.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Ki iti keele po emonooto agine Repaik. Ki menyei Repaik keny olooto. Kuuree Amonik pichooto Samsumik. 
Deuteronomy2:21 Piik che eecheen ak ko chaang' ak ko kooen, ko uu Anagik. Ki par `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' tainnywa ak ki pwa yooto ak komeny kogeer icheek," 
Deuteronomy2:22 ko uu ye ki yachi lagogap Esau, che ki menyei Seir, ye kingo par Horik eng' tainnywa. Ki pwa icheek komeny olooto kogeer pichooto agoi ra." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ki pwa Kaptorik che ki punu Kaptor kobwa kobar Abik che ki menyei kestonik agoi Gaza ak komeny olooto kogeer icheek.) 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Yeityo kong'atech `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun koleenjech, ‘Onam pandang'wong' olandae atebweetap Arnon. Kande eung'ung' Sihon Amorindet laitoryatap Hesbon, kobooto emennyi. Tau anyun nam kobunjiin ak iyai lugeet ak ineendet." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Atau ra agoochini koiywein ak koaragenso agobo inyee piik che miitei kurereet tugul ne po kipsengwet komugul che ta kogasei ng'aleeguk. Potandos ak konyoor ng'wanindo amu inyee.’ ” 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Ki ayookte piik koba eng' surkwen ne po Kedemot koba kap Sihon laitoryatap Hesbon koip ng'aleek che po kaalyeet, koleenji," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Chamwo abun emeng'ung'. Abune ooreet ne oo kityo, ma mastoi eutap tai anan murot kaataam." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Koono amitwogik che aame aal ak aal peek che aee. Chamwo kityo awo asiirto," 
Deuteronomy2:29 ko uu ye ki chamwo lagogap Esau che menyei Seir ak Moabik che menyei Ar agoi alandae Jordan awo emet ne koonech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Ago ki ma chamwech Sihon laitoryatap Hesbon kebun oldanyi, amu ki iuit muguleldonyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', kot koma chamdagei si kondeun ineendet eung'ung' ko uu rani." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Katau anyun ande taing'ung' Sihon ak emennyi. Tau anyun nam si inyaban emennyi.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Kimong'jech anyun Sihon ineendet ak piikyik tugul, kobwa koyai lugeet eng' Jahas." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Kigoon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo ineendet eng' tainnyo ak ki kibar ineendet, weeriikyik ak piikyik tugul." 
Deuteronomy2:34 `Ki kinam nganasookyik tugul eng' peetuunooto ak `keng'em nganaseet age tugul ne ki kimenyei, kobooto kobogorisyek ak lagok. Ma kimete agot agenge ne ki ng'et." 
Deuteronomy2:35 `Ki kiluul tuuga kobunjech kobooto tuguuk che ki mi nganasook che kiga kenam. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kobooch Aroer ne mi tabandap atebweetap Arnon, ak nganaseet ne mi atebweet agoi Gilead, ko ki ma piit nganaseet ne ki kimiit kosiirech. Kigoon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo tugul eng' tainnyo." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Ago kobatee emetap lagogap Amonik ne ki ma iriikyi komoswek tugul che po aineetap Jabbok, ak nganasook che po emetap tuloonook ak oldo tugul ne kietenech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo.”" 
Deuteronomy3:1 `Kingeweege anyun `ketogoste ooreet ne wendi Bashan, kobokyech Og laitoryatap Bashan ak piikyik tugul konyo koyai lugeet eng' Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Meiywei Og, amu kaande ineendet, piikyik ak emennyi tugul eung'ung', asi iyachi ineendet ko uu ye ki iyachi Sihon laitoryatap Amorik ne ki menyei Hesbon.”" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Ki indewech eunekyok anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo Og laitoryatap Bashan ak piikyik tugul ak `ki kibar kot koma ng'et chii agot agenge." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ki kiluul nganasookyik tugul eng' peetuusyechooto ak ki ma piit nganaseet agot agenge ne ma kiluul. Eng' tugul ko nganasook tamanwogik lo eng' emet komugul ne po Argob nooto ki laitorani Og ne po Bashan. 
Deuteronomy3:5 Kiga king'ote nganasochuuto tugul irimosyek che kooen ak ki tinyei kurgotik, ak temeleiywek. Ki mi kora nganasook che chaang' miising' che ki ma king'ot." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Ki king'em anyun kiwong'u, ko uu ye ki king'em Sihon laitoryatap Hesbon. Ki king'em nganaseet age tugul ne ki kimenyei ak ki kibar: piik, kwonyiik kobooto ak lagok." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Ago ki kiluul kobunjech tuuga tugul ak tuguuk che ki mi nganasook. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Ki kirep emet eng' peetuusyechooto eng' eunegap laitorinik aeng' che po Amorik che ki mi Jordan pitoniin. Yuto ko kobooch atebweetap Arnon agoi tulweetap Hermon," 
Deuteronomy3:9 ne kuure Sidonik Hermon Sirion ak kuure Amorik tulwoonooto Senir. 
Deuteronomy3:10 Kiga kiluul nganasook tugul che po warenget, Gilead komugul, Bashan komugul agoi Saleka ak Edrei, nganasoogap laitornatetap Og eng' Bashan." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Amu ki ng'et Og ineegei, laitoryatap Bashan, ne po che ki ng'et eng' Repaik; ogeero, ki po karnet itogunnyi; tos ma mi itogunooto Rabbah ne po lagogap Ammon? Ki futisyek taman ak somok koindonyi ak ki mitainik futisyek lo tebeesindanyi, ko uu kakwautyetap chiito.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Kingenam emonooto kobunjech eng' peetuusyechooto kobooch Aroer, ne neegitee atebweetap Arnon, kebebertap emetap tuloonook ne po Gilead ak nganasookyik, agoochi piigap Reuben ak che po Gad." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ki agoochi kebeberta age ne po emetap Gilead ak Bashan komugul ne ki laitorani Og ak emet tugul ne po Argob agot Bashan komugul ooreetap Manasseh. (Kiguure nooto emetap Repaik. 
Deuteronomy3:14 Kiluul Jair weeriitap Manasseh emet komugul ne po Argob, agoi kiwotetap Gesurik ak Maakatik ak kiguure chooto ak Bashan Habot-Jair agoi ra.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ki agoochi Makir emetap Gilead. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Ak ki agoochi piigap Reuben ak piigap Gad kobooch Gilead agoi atebweetap Arnon kwenutap atebweet ak kiwotennyi agoi aineetap Jabbok, nooto kiwotetap lagogap Ammon." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Ki agoochi kobooto Arabah ak Jordan kobooto kiwotennyi kobooch Kineret agoi araraita ne miitei Arabah ak Araraitap Munyuk ne miitei kelutap Piska ole tokyingei kong'asiis. 
Deuteronomy3:18 Eng' peetuunooto ko ki ang'ataak aleenjok, “Ki kogoonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' emoni kobunjook: olande ko kaolaach kariik ondoe tupchosyekwok piigap Israel, okweek tugul che po lugeet." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Ago ingotebi eng' nganasookwok che ki agoonok osotikwok, lagokwok ak tuukwok (amu angen ale otinye tuuga che chaang'.)" 
Deuteronomy3:20 Otoret tupchosyekwok agoi kogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamuung'et ko uu okweek ak konyaban icheek emet ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' Jordan pitoniin. Ye kagoyaak ko uu nooto, oweege anyun chii tugul ole miitei tuguukyik che ki agoonok.”" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Kingo pata ang'at Joshua peetuunooto aleenji, “Ki igeer eng' konyeguk tuguuk tugul che ki yachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' laitorinichuuto aeng'. Yachin anyun ko uu nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatosyek tugul che mi ole iwendi." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Kingo pata ang'at Joshua peetuunooto aleenji, “Ki igeer eng' konyeguk tuguuk tugul che ki yachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' laitorinichuuto aeng'. Yachin anyun ko uu nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatosyek tugul che mi ole iwendi." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Amoiywei icheek, amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne yaei lugeet agobo okweek.”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 Ki asaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto aleenji," 
Deuteronomy3:24 “Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kaitau iboorchi kiboityondeng'ung' etunateng'ung' ak eung'ung' ne kiim. Amu ma mi kamuktain age kipsengwet anan ng'wony ne imuuchi koyai ko uu poisyoniguk ak ko uu poisyoniguk che kiimeen?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Kasain ale ichamwo alanda awo ageer emet ne karaaran ne mi Jordan pitoniin, tulwoonooto karaaran ak Lebanon.”" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Ago kinereekyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek ak ma kaswa. Amu ki leenjo, ‘Ingoyamin; amata ing'alaalwo kogeny agobo ng'olyoondoniito." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Togoste Piska parak ak tooben komostap cherongo, murot kaataam ak murot tai. Keer kora ole tokyingei kong'asiis, ak igeerote eng' konyeguk, amu melandoe Jordanini." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ago ng'at Joshua, igiil ineendet ak igimit, amu ineendet ne landoi kondoe pichu ak kogoochi konyaban emet neta igeere.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ago ng'at Joshua, igiil ineendet ak igimit, amu ineendet ne landoi kondoe pichu ak kogoochi konyaban emet neta igeere.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy3:29 `Ki kitebee anyun atebweet ne tokyingei Beth-peor. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Ki testai Musa kong'alaal ak ki le ara anyun, ee Israel, oepchi iit ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik, che aneetook si kobiit oyai si osapche ak obe onam kobunjook emet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwok." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Amotesyi kiy ng'olyoot ne ang'atook anan ochuchuch alak, si kobiit oriip ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' che ang'atook." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Ki kogeer konyekwok tuguuk che ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Baal-peor. Amu ki kobar Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kwenung'ung' piik tugul che ki isup Baal-peor. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Ago okweek che ki onamgei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kosabei ra age tugul eng' okweek. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Ki aneetak ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik ko uu ye king'ata Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu, si kobiit oyai chooto eng' emet ne obendi oname." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Oriip anyun ak oyai, amu ng'omnateng'wong' niito ak naeng'wong' eng' taitap pororyosyek che tuun kasei ng'atuutichu tugul ak kole, “Tinyei utaatyet iman pororyoni oo ak kotinyei naet ne nin!”" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Amu ngoro pororyet ne oo ne tinyei kamuktain ne neegitee icheek ko uu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ne neegiteenech ui tugul ye kiguure ineendet?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ak tos ngoro pororyet ne oo ne tinyei etanutik ak kirwoogutik che po imanda ko uu ng'atuutichu tugul che kande taing'wong' peetuuni? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Riipkei anyun, ak iriip saboondang'ung' eng' kagiiletapkei, si meutye tuguuk che ki keer konyeguk ak si ma manda eng' muguleldang'ung' eng' peetuusyeguk tugul che po sabeeng'ung'; agoi ineet lagoguk tuguuchuuto ak mochogoroniguk." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Eng' peetuut ne ki itonone taitap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' Horeb, ye ki leenjo `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Iyumwa piik ak agoochi kogas ng'aleekyuk si koneetkei koiywea eng' peetuusyekwak tugul komi ng'wony ak si koneet lagokwak." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Ki obwa oriigu otononse eng' tulweet keel ye kingo lalei maat eng' tulweet agoi kipsengwet kween, kobooto mesundeito, pooldet ak imenindo ne oo." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Ak ki ng'alaalwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komi kwenutap maat: ki ogas tweguunetap ng'aleek ak kutit kityo, ago ki ma ogeer itoondo." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Kimwaiwok anyun kayomisennyi ne king'ataak oyai, ng'atuutichu taman che ki sirchi koik aeng' che lebeleen." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Ak king'ata Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto aneetaak ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik, si kobiit oyai eng' emet ne obendi oname kobunjook." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Oriipkei anyun miising'; amu ki ma ogeer itoon age tugul eng' peetuut ki ng'alaalwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Horeb eng' maat. 
Deuteronomy4:16 Ama mong'emgei oyachigei kanamwet eng' kergeindap kiy age tugul: Eng' itoondap muren anan kwony," 
Deuteronomy4:17 anan itoondap tyony age tugul ne mi ng'wony, anan itoondap toriit age tugul ne tirireni eng' parak." 
Deuteronomy4:18 Anan itoondap kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng'wony, anan itoondap njiryot age tugul ne mi peek che mi ng'wony oriit." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Riipkei anyun si ma ye inyal parak, igeer asiista ak arawet ak kecheik, agot chaang'indo tugul che mi kipsengwet, kochuutin iwe isaa tuguuchooto ak ioot tuguuchooto ki kopchechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' pororyosyek tugul che mi kurereetap kipsengwet." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ago konamak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak komutwak omang'une maatap karnet eng' Misiri oegu piigap porotennyi ko uu rani." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Kobooto nooto, koginereekyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek, ak ki iyasyo kole, melandoe Jordan ameite emonooto karaaran ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', inyee Israel inyaban." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ago amechini anee emoni, malandoe Jordan ago olandoi okweek oname emonooto karaaran." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Oriipkei anyun si moutye kayomisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ne ki yai kobootok, oyai kanamwet eng' kergeindap kiy age tugul ne kietenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko maat ne iwong'u ak kotinyei ng'et kong'. 
Deuteronomy4:25 Ye tuun kaomeng'iisye eng' emet ak osich lagok ak mochogoronik, ak ngo namgei ak oyai kanamwet eng' kergeindap kiy age tugul, ak oyai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' otach ineendet," 
Deuteronomy4:26 ko kaaguur kipsengwet ak ng'wony kobaoryanjin peetuuni, ale osip olustosi owong'ugei eng' emet ne obendi olandoe Jordan oname kobunjook. Ma chaang'aitu peetuusyekwok eng' olooto ago king'emok owong'ugei." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Iiyestaak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor oyomu pororyosyek ak ong'etu che ng'ering' eng' pororyosyek ole imutok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Deuteronomy4:28 Ak oot kanamonik che poisyetap eunegap piik, che po keetiik ak koik ak ko che ma keerei kiy ama kastoi ama amisyei anan kong'uto." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Ago ngo cheeng' eng' olooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', onyooru ineendet ngo cheeng' eng' muguleldang'wong' tugul ak eng' saboondang'wong' tugul." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ak ye imiitei nyalilda, ak kobwonjin tuguuchu tugul, iweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' anyun eng' peetuusyek che po let, ak igas kutinnyi." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po rireenet ma metoin, anan kowong'un anan koutye kayomisetap kwanisyeguk ne ki iyasyechi." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Teep anyun nguno agobo peetuusyek che ki kosiirto che kisip kondounenen kobooch ngap kotoi Kamuktaindet koyai chii eng' ng'wony, kobooch tabanda age ne po kipsengwet agoi tabanda age, teep ngo ki kobiit kiit age ne oo ne uu ni anan ngo kigegasei?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Tos ki kogasei piik ole kigoi kutitap Kamuktaindet kong'alaali eng' kwenutap maat ko uu ye ki igas ak kosapcho? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Anan kityem Kamuktaindet au komutyigei pororyet eng' pororyet age, eng' tyemuutik, eng' kaboorunoik, eng' kwang'utik, eng' pooryeet ak eng' euut ne kiim ne chuulaat eng' kamuisosyek che eecheen ko uu tugul che kiyaiywok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' Misiri eng' taitap konyekwok?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ki kiboorun inyee si kobiit inai ile Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma mi age kobatee ineendet ineegei." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Ki koonin igas kutinnyi ne mang'une kipsengwet si kobiit kogerin kong' ak ki koonin igeer maannyi ne oo eng' ng'wony. Ki igas ng'aleekyik komang'une kwenutap maat. 
Deuteronomy4:37 Amu ki chamei kwanisyeguk, kolewen anyun ineendet iyotennywa ne piitu let ak komoong'un eng' Misiri komi kobooten eng' kimnateennyi ne oo." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Ki oon pororyosyek eng' taing'ung' che eecheen ak ko kiimeen kosiirin si komutun imong'u olito, kogoonin emennywa koek poroteng'ung' ko uu peetuuni." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Nai anyun rani ak igonor eng' muguleldang'ung' ile, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' parak kipsengwet ak eng' ng'wony oriit; ma mi age." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Riip anyun kaneetisyosyekyik ak ng'atuutikyik che `kang'atiin rani si komyeeit eng' inyee, kobooto lagoguk che piitu let ak kochang'a peetuusyeguk eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koigeny." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Ki itabaan anyun Musa nganasook somok eng' Jordan pitoniin ole po kong'asiis," 
Deuteronomy4:42 si komwechi olooto rumiindet, ne kabar chiitap kokwennyi eng' lelset ne ki ma kochurchin. Ki imuuchi kosap ineendet ne kamwechi age eng' nganasochooto." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Nganasochooto ko Beser eng' surkwen eng' emetap warenget kobunji piigap Reuben, Ramot eng' Gilead kobunji piigap Gad ak Golan eng' Bashan kobunji piigap Manasseh." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ni ng'atuutyet ne ki inde Musa taitap piigap Israel. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Chuuto kora paornatosyek, kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik che ki mwachi `Musa piigap Israel ye kingo kagomang'une Misiri," 
Deuteronomy4:46 komiitei Jordan pitoniin eng' atebweet ne tokyingei Beth-peor, emetap Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, ne ki menyei Hesbon ne kibar `Musa ak piigap Israel ye kingo kagomong' icheek eng' Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Ki nam emennyi kobunji ak emetap Og laitoryatap Bashan. Laitorinichooto aeng' che po Amorik che ki menyei Jordan pitoniin eng' komostap kong'asiis; 
Deuteronomy4:48 kobooch Aroer, ne mi tabandap atebweetap Arnon, agoi tulweet ne po Siyon (kainet age ne po tulweetap Hermon)" 
Deuteronomy4:49 Kobooto Arabah tugul ne mi Jordan pitoniin eng' komostap kong'asiis agoi nyanjet ne mi Arabah ne miitei Piska keel. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Ak ki kuur `Musa Israel tugul, ak koleenji, “Ogas anyun, ee Israel kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik che amwaiwok rani. Ogas eng' itiikwok si kobiit oneetkei ak oriip oyai.”" 
Deuteronomy5:2 Ki yai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo kayomiset kobootech eng' Horeb." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Ki ma yai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kayomisoniito ak kwanisyekyok ago ki yai kobootech acheek tugul che ki mi kesaptosi rani. 
Deuteronomy5:4 Ki ng'alaalwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kimni eng' tulweet eng' maat," 
Deuteronomy5:5 ki atonon eng' kwenung'wong' ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto si aboorwok ng'olyoonnyi amu ki oiyweisye amu maat, ak ki ma otogoste tulweet ak koleenjok," 
Deuteronomy5:6 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ne ki among'un eng' emetap Misiri eng' kootap otwoknateet." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Amecheeng'jigei kamuktaik alak kobatena aneege. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Ameyachigei kanamwet anan itoondap kiy age tugul ne mi parak kipsengwet anan ne mi ng'wony oriit anan ne mi peek eng' ng'wony oriit. 
Deuteronomy5:9 Ameng'uruukyi anan ioot. Amu anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko aa Kamuktaindet ne amei ng'etkong'. Ageerchini lagok tengektap kwanisyekwak agoi ibinda ne po somok ak ne po ang'wan eng' icheek che wecho." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Ago ariiree eliphuusyek eng' icheek che chama che isubi ng'atuutikyuk. 
Deuteronomy5:11 Amemwa kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' tangoi, amu iityin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'oogisto ne mwaei kainennyi eng' tangoi." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Riip peetuutap sabato, itabaan ko uu ye king'atin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Iboisyei eng' peetuusyek lo ak iyai poisyoniguk tugul. 
Deuteronomy5:14 Ago peetuutap tisap ko sabato ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Ameyai poisyet peetuunooto inyee, anan weeriing'ung' anan cheptong'ung', anan otwogeng'ung' ne muren anan ne tye, anan eitang'ung' anan sigiryeng'ung', anan tuguuk anan toondeng'ung' ne mi kurgotiguk; si komuuny otwogeng'ung' ne muren ak ne tye ko uu inyee." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Meutye ile ki ii otwoget eng' emetap Misiri ago ki imoong'un Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' olooto eng' euut ne kiim ak eng' euut ne chuulaat. King'atin anyun eng' nooto `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iriip peetuutap sabato. 
Deuteronomy5:16 Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung', ko uu ye king'atin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', si kochang'a peetuusyeguk ak komyeeit eng' inyee eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Amerumisye. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Amoipkei. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Amechoorse. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Amebaoryanji chiitap kokweng'ung' eng' lembech. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Amegase myat osotyotap chiitap kokweng'ung', anan imakyigei kootap chiitap kokweng'ung' anan emennyi, anan otwogennyi ne muren anan ne tye, anan eitonyi anan sigiryennyi, anan kiy age tugul ne po chiitap kokweng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuiyeng'wong' komugul ng'aleechuuto tugul eng' maat ak pooldet eng' tulweet ak eng' imenindo ne oo. Ki mwachi eng' kutit ne oo ak ki ma tes alak. Yeityo kosirchi koik aeng' che lebeleen ak kogoono. 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Kingo kas kutit ne ki mang'une mesundeito ye kilalei tulweet, oriikyo anyun kobooto pounigap ortinwekwok ak poisyekwok," 
Deuteronomy5:24 ak kole, ‘Ogeero, kaiboorwech `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo liilindanyi ak etunatennyi ak kagegas kutinnyi komang'une maat. Kagenai rani keele ng'alaaljindos Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak chii ak kosap." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Kalya anyun si kebegu? Amu iwong'wech mai oo. Ngot kegas kogeny kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo kebegu." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Chii ng'oo eng' piik tugul ne ki kas kutitap Kamuktaindet ne sabei kong'alaali eng' maat ko uu ye ki kigas ak kosap? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Riikte inyee si igas tugul che mwaei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo. Yeityo inyoo imwaiwech tugul che mwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo si kegas ak keyai.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Ki kas iman `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleekwok yooto ki ong'alaalwo ak koleenjo, ‘Kaagas ng'aleegap pichu che kagomwaun. Myachen tugul che kamwa." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Kata myee anyun nda tinyei kotugul muguleldo ne uu nooto si koiywea ak koriip ng'atuutikyuk tugul si komyeeit eng' icheek ak eng' lagokwak agoi. 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ui anyun ileenji, Oweekyigei emaisyekwok.’" 
Deuteronomy5:31 Ago tonon inyee eng' yu ami si amwaun tugul: kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik, che ineeti koyai eng' emet ne agoochini konyaban.”" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Oriip anyun si oyai ko uu ye king'ataak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'; amomaste obe tai anan kaataam. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Obun ortinwek tugul che king'ataak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', si osapche ak komyeeit eng' okweek ak kochang'a peetuusyekwok eng' emet ne oname kobunjook.”" 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ni anyun ng'atuutyet, kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik che ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kineetak, si kobiit oyai ng'atuutichu eng' emet ne olang'jini oname kobunjook," 
Deuteronomy6:2 si kobiit igonyit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', inyee ak weeriing'ung' ak mochogoreng'ung' eng' peetuusyeguk tugul kotee isabe. Ak iriip kaneetisyosyekyik tugul ak ng'atuutikyik che ang'atiin, si kochang'a peetuusyeguk." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Ogas anyun ee Israel, oriip ogeer ole koyai si komyeeityin ak otesage eng' emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo ko uu ye ki iarorun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyeguk." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Ogaso ee Israel! Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo, ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agenge;" 
Deuteronomy6:5 ak cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' muguleldang'ung' tugul, eng' saboondang'ung' tugul ak eng' kimnateng'ung' tugul." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ingotebee muguleldang'ung' ng'aleechu `kang'atiin rani. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Ineet lagoguk eng' kagiiletapkei: ng'alaale ye itebye ng'wony eng' koong'ung', ye iwendi eng' ooreet, ye irue ak ye ing'eete." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Ratyi eung'ung' si koek kaboorunet ak koek ratuutik che kirate anook eng' turyetap togeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Sirchi tugatugigap kurgeetap koong'ung', ak ormariichoguk." 
Deuteronomy6:10 Ak ye kagomutin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iwe emet ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyeguk Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo kole koonin nganasook che eecheen ak ko myachen, che ki ma iteeche" 
Deuteronomy6:11 ak kooriik che nyiitootiin tuguuk tugul che myachen che ki ma inyiiti, keriingonik che po peek che ki ma ibale, mbareenigap sabibuk ak mseituni che ki ma imiine, ak ye iam ak ibiye," 
Deuteronomy6:12 iriipkei anyun si meutye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki imutun imang'une emetap Misiri eng' kootap otwoknateet. 
Deuteronomy6:13 Iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', oot ineendet ak iyasye eng' kainennyi." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Amosup kanamonik agot che po pororyosyek che neegiteenok," 
Deuteronomy6:14 Amosup kanamonik agot che po pororyosyek che neegiteenok," 
Deuteronomy6:15 amu tinyei ng'etkong' `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne mi kwenung'ung'. Amu ngo sup, kolaldos nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' inyee ak kowong'un eng' ng'wony." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Amotyem Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko uu ye ki otyem eng' Massah. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Oriip eng' kagiiletapkei ng'atuutik, paornatosyek, ak kaneetisyosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' che king'atin." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Yai ne po iman ak ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si komyeeit eng' inyee ye iwe inam kobunjiin emet ne myee ne ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyeguk 
Deuteronomy6:19 kole, oonei puuniguk tugul eng' taing'ung' ko uu ye ki komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Ye tuun teebenen weeriing'ung' kole po nee paornatosyek, kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutichu king'ataak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Ileenji anyun weeriing'ung', ki kiotwogigap Pharaoh eng' Misiri, ak ki imoong'wech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Misiri eng' euut ne kiim." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Kegeerei, ko ki ibarta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che eecheen, che pichiien, che kibiree Misiri ak Pharaoh kobooto piikyik tugul." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Ki imutwech eng' olooto kebwa olito si kogoonech emet ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyekyok. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Ki ng'atech anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor keyai kaneetisyosyechu tugul, kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo si ketepte myeeindo kotugul, si koriibech kesapchee ko uu ra." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Egu anyun imanda eng' acheek ngigiilgei keyai ng'atuutyoni tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo ko uu ye king'atech." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Ye kagoiitin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emet ne iwendi iname kobunjiin ak koon pororyosyek che chaang' eng' taing'ung', che chooto ko Hitik, Girgasik, Amorik, Kanaanik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik, pororyosyek tisap che eecheen ak ko kiimeen kosiirin," 
Deuteronomy7:2 ak ye kagoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inam icheek, ko nyolu ibar iwong'u. Amoarorchigei kiy kobooto icheek anan iriiree." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Amogangei, amegoochi cheptong'ung' weeriinnyi anan itunji weeriing'ung' cheptonyi." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Amu tuun imaasi weeriing'ung' si ma isuba, ak koot kanamonik, ak eng' nooto anyun, konereech miising' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' okweek ak kong'emin kochokyin." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ago oyachi ko uu ni; obut kapkorosusyekwak, otonaton tolochikwak, oep lumeiywegap Aserik ak obeel kanamonikwak." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Ii pororyet ne itabaanat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Ki lewenin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' pororyosyek tugul che mi ng'wony iegu pororyet ne nenyi ineegei. 
Deuteronomy7:7 Ki ma chamaak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kolewenook amu ki ochaang' kosiir piik alak, ki chamaak nganda ki ong'ering' kosiir piik tugul." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Ago amu ki chamaak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koriip kayasyoet ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyekwok, komoong'wok anyun ineendet eng' euut ne kiim ak kotyachak eng' kootap otwoknateet, eng' eutap Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Nai anyun ile Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne po imanda, ne riibei kayomiset ak rireenet eng' icheek che chamei ineendet ak koriibei ng'atuutikyik agoi ibindap eliphuut." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Yaakyin mugetuut kong'emei che wechei ineendet ne matiny: ma igaigei eng' ne wechei, igeerchin kimni." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Riip anyun ak iyai ng'atuutik, kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik che kang'atiin rani." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Ye ogas kirwoogutichu, oriip ak oyai, si koriip anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kayomiset ak rireenet eng' inyee ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyeguk." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Chamin, iberuurin ak kotesin ochaang'e. Iberuuri iyoteng'ung', ruroteetap emeng'ung', peeguk, peegap logoeguk, mwaniguk, ak kaberuretap tuuga ak che po keechiireguk eng' emet ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyeguk kole koonin." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Kiberuurin kosiir piik tugul; ma piitu ne soneni ne muren anan ne kobogoryo eng' okweek anan eng' tuukwok. 
Deuteronomy7:15 Istoenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myanwogik tugul, ak ma koonin korotwek che yaach che ki igeer eng' Misiri, ago igoochin tugul che wechin." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Ing'eme iwong'u pororyosyek tugul che koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Amat iriiree icheek anan ioot kanamonikwak, amu egu mesteet eng' inyee nooto." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Imuuch imwa eng' muguleldang'ung' ile chaang' pororyosyechu kosiiro, ara aondoi ano." 
Deuteronomy7:18 Meiywei pichooto; ibwaat miising' ne ki yachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' Pharaoh ak Misiri komugul. 
Deuteronomy7:19 Ki igeer eng' konyeguk tyemuutik, kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che eecheen ak euut ne kiim ne chuulaat, che ki imoong'unenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Yachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko uu nooto pororyosyek tugul che iywei." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ne siirei chooto, koyookyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' icheek kaaraamik agoi kowong'kei che kang'et kounyegei eng' taing'ung'." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Among' komuok, amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne mi kobootok, ko Kamuktaindet ne oo ak ko po kwong'eet." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Oone ko mutyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' pororyosyechooto eng' taing'ung'. Ma kichamun ibar iwong'u tugul eng' kasarta agenge ndabuch ko chang'achin tyong'igap timiin. 
Deuteronomy7:23 Ago koonin icheek `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' taing'ung', ak kobarei icheeget eng' pareet ne oo, agoi kowong'kei." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Indoi laitorinikwak euneguk, ak ibeet kainennywa eng' kurereetap kipsengwet. Ma piitu chii ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taing'ung'; ibare kowong'kei." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Obeel kanamonigap kamuktaikwak, amat igase myat fedha anan thahabu che mi kanamonichooto, anan iipchigei si ma riichin amu wechei nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Ameip kiit ne kiwechei kwo koong'ung', ndabuch iegu ne istoot ko uu kioto. Wech miising' ak ieesye kioto amu ki kitabaan kobunji ng'emeet." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Oriip oyai ng'atuutyet komugul ne kang'atiin rani si osapche ak otesage, ak obe onam emet ne ki iyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyekwok." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Ibwaat ooreet komugul ne ki komutunenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' surkwen kenyisyechu artam, koming'inin ak kotyemin si konai kiit ne mi muguleldang'ung', ngichame anan ko mechame iriip ng'atuutikyik." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Ki iming'inin, ki koonin koamin rubeet ak kibaenen mana che ki ma inai, amanai kwanisyeguk. Ki yai niito si kogoonin inai ile ma sabei chii eng' amdit kityo, ago sabei eng' kiy age tugul ne mang'une kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Ki ma osegitu ngoroiguk che ki ilaachi anan koobwanso keelyeguk eng' kenyisyechooto artam. 
Deuteronomy8:5 Iguiye eng' muguleldang'ung' ile, ko uu ye kerei kong' chii weeriinnyi, ko itigonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Riip anyun ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ibun ortinwekyik ak iywei ineendet." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Imutin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iit emet ne karaaran, emetap kereruusyek che mi peek ak komi kong'igap peek ak keriingonik che kutune peek eng' atebwosyek ak eng' tuloonook." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Imutyiin emetap nganuuk ak baale, emetap keetiigap sabibuk, mogoonik ak logoek alak che eecheen, emetap mseituni, che po mwanik ak kumyat," 
Deuteronomy8:9 emet ne iamisyei, ne ma piitu rubeet ama rarun kiy eng' olooto, emet ne koikyik ko kariik, ak kebaalen tuloonookyik sugunonik." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ye kaiamisye ibiye, ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' amu emet ne myee ne kagoonin." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Riipkei anyun si meutye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak imete ng'atuutikyik, kirwoogutikyik ak kaneetisyosyechooto kang'atiin rani." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ye kaiamisye ibiye ak iteech kooriik che korooron ak imeny," 
Deuteronomy8:13 ak ye katesagis tuguuk ak keechiireguk, fedhaisyeguk ak thahabu, ak kotesagis tuguuk tugul che itinye." 
Deuteronomy8:14 Memeen anyun ak iutye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne ki imutun imang'une emetap Misiri eng' kootap otwoknateet," 
Deuteronomy8:15 ne ki indoun eng' surkwen ne oo, ole oo arageneet ak komi erenook che ng'woneen ak tagolik, emetap melelda ole ma mi peek. Ki inagin peek komang'une rwandet ne uui.”" 
Deuteronomy8:16 Kibaenen mana eng' surkwen che ki ma nai kwanisyeguk, si koming'inin ak kotyemin. Kiyaun ne myee eng' let," 
Deuteronomy8:17 si mele eng' muguleldang'ung', “Kagoono kimnateennyu ak kamugetap eunnyu mogornatoni.”" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Ago ibwaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' amu ineendet ne koonin kimnateet ne inyoorunee mogornateet, si kogimit kayomisennyi ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyeguk, ko uu ye yaei rani." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Ngot iutye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ak isup kanamonik ioot ak igutung'ji, abaoryani agobo okweek rani ale olustosi ne matiny." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Olustosi okweek ko uu pororyosyek che ng'emei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taing'wong', amu ma ocham ogas kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Ogas, ee Israel! Ilandoi rani eng' Jordan iwendi iluuli pororyosyek che eecheen ak ko kiimeen kosiirin, ak nganasook che eecheen che ki king'ote irimosyek che itei parak." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Iluuli piik che eecheen ak ko kooen, weeriigap Anagik che ingen, che ki igase kemwaei keeleen ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taitap weeriigap Anak?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Nai anyun rani ile, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko landoi kondoenen ko uu maat ne oo ne liblibeni. Ng'emei pichooto ak kogoochi konyeratitu eng' taing'ung' si iluul ak ing'em ichokyi ko uu ye kimwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Ye kagoon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' taing'ung', ko mat imwa eng' muguleldang'ung'ile ki imutwaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogoono emoni kobunjo amu imandanyu. Oone Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyechu eng' taing'ung' amu sogornatennywa." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ma eng' imandang'ung' anan atebeeng'ung' ne myee, ne kagoonin inam emennywa. Ago oonei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' pororyosyechu eng' taing'ung' amu sogornatennywa, si kobiit kogimit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoot ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyeguk Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Nai anyun ile ma koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emoni myee kobunjiin amu imandang'ung'; amu okweek ko oo piich che uueen metowoi. 
Deuteronomy9:7 Ibwaat ameutyee tagisyet ne ki itach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' surkwen, ki ongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch peetuut omong'u eng' emetap Misiri agoi oitu yu." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Ki otach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Horeb, kot konereech komach kobaraak." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Kinga togoste tulweet ibataach koik che lebeleen, che chooto ko koigap kayomiset ne ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootok, ko ki atebi eng' tulweet peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam, ak ma am amit amaee pei." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koichooto aeng' che lebeleen che ki kisir eng' mornetap Kamuktaindet. Ki kisirchi koichooto ng'aleek tugul che kimwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tulweet, komang'une maat eng' peetuutap tuiyet." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ye kingo pata peetuusyechooto artamu ak kemousyek artam, kogoono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koichooto aeng' po kayomiset." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ng'eet choortegei ak ichakte, amu kagongelelso piiguk che ki imutuu eng' Misiri. Ko matyanit, ko kagomasta eng' ooreet ne ki ang'at ak koyachigei kanamwet ne kitaanyi.”" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Ki ng'alaalwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny kole kaageer pichu ale piich che uueen metowoi," 
Deuteronomy9:14 meto si awong' icheek, abukto kainennywa eng' kurereetap kipsengwet, ak ayain iegu pororyet ne kiim ak ko oo kosiir icheek." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Ki aweege anyun, achoorugei eng' tulweet ye kita kolalei maat, atinye koichooto aeng' po kayomiset eng' eunekyuk tuwai." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ogeero, ki ageer ale ki oyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' tengekto amu ki otang'jigei itoondap moita. Ki omaste ochakte omete ooreet ne king'ataak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ki anam koichooto tuwai ak awirte atui eng' taing'wong' ogeere. 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ki abutyi ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyek artam ko uu ye ki ayai eng' tai. Ma aam amit anan aee pei amu tengektong'wong' tugul ne ki oyai. Ki oyai ne ya eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor otach ineendet. 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ki aiywei nereegek ak nyitatet ne ng'waan ne kinereekyok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komachei kobaraak. Ago kigasa iit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto agine. 
Deuteronomy9:20 Ki nereekyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising' Aron komachei kobar, ago ki asaa agobo Aron eng' yooto agine." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Ki aip anyun tengegoto ng'wong' po kanamwetap moita ne kiga oyai ak abeel. Ki atui komengegitu ak ang'aa agoi kotambululitu, yeityo aroong'ji kereruut ne rootune tulweet." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Ki otach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny, eng' Tabera, eng' Massah ak eng' Kibrot-hataaba." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Ye kingo yootok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Kadesh-barnea koleenjok, otogoste onam emet ne ki agoonok, obistoe nooto kang'atak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ama oyan ineendet anan ogas iit kutinnyi." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Ki ongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch peetuut ne ki anaak. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Ki abutyi ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyechooto artam ak kemousyechooto artam amu ki kale Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iwong'wok. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ki asaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aleenji, ‘Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amewong'u piiguk che poroteng'ung', che ki itaach eng' etunateng'ung', che ki imong'u eng' Misiri eng' euut ne kiim." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Amat igeer uuindap met ne po pichu anan yaityennywa, anan tengektonywa. Ago ibwaat kiboitiniguk Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Ngot ibar iwong'u, koleen emet ne ki imoong'unenech ma imuuch Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komut icheek koit emet ne ki iarorchi, ak amu wechei, ko ki imong' si kobiit kobar icheek eng' surkwen." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Icheeget ko piiguk ak ko poroteng'ung' che ki imoong'u eng' kimnateng'ung' ne oo, ak eng' eung'ung' ne chuulaat.’" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Ki leenjo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto, ‘Wai koik aeng' che lebeleen che uu cho ki po tai, ak itogosu oli ami eng' tulweet, inyoo iyai moingetap keetiik." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Asirchini koichooto ng'aleek cho ki mi koik che ki po tai cho ki itue, yeityo inde koichooto lebeleen moinget oriit.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Ki ayai anyun moinget eng' keetiigap chebitoik ak awai koik aeng' che lebeleen che uu cho ki po tai yeityo atogoste tulweet aibe koichooto aeng' eng' eunnyu. 
Deuteronomy10:4 Ki sir anyun kosirchi koichooto lebeleen ko uu eng' tai, ng'atuutik taman chooto kiga mwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tulweet komang'une maat eng' peetuutap tuiyet, ak yeityo kogoono." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Ki aweege anyun achorugei eng' tulweet ak ande koichooto moinget ne kiga ayai, ak mi olooto ko uu ye king'ata Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 Ki pa piigap Israel eng' Berot Bene-jaakan agoi koit Mosera. Kime Aron ak ki kitupchi olooto. Ki yai Eleazar weeriinnyi tisiisyet kogeer ineendet. 
Deuteronomy10:7 Ki testai koba eng' olooto agoi Gudgoda, yeityo koba eng' Gudgoda agoi Jotbata emet ne mi kereruusyek." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Eng' peetuusyechooto, ko ki itabaan Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ooreetap Lawi, koip moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotononso eng' tainnyi, koboisyechi ineendet ak koberuur piik eng' kainennyi agoi ra." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ko uu nooto, koma nyooru Lawi anyun kebeberta anan poroteet kobooto tupchosyekyik. Porotennyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki mwachi ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Ki atebi eng' tulweet peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam ko uu eng' tai, ak kigasa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto kogeny, ak ki mata komach kowong'un." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ng'eet indochi piik si koba konam emet ne ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwak ale agoochini.”" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Ara anyun Israel, nee ne magenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', kobatee iywei ineendet kamuktaindeng'ung', iwendote ortinwekyik tugul, icham ineendet ak ioot Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' muguleldang'ung' tugul ak eng' saboondang'ung' tugul," 
Deuteronomy10:13 ak iriip ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kaneetisyosyekyik, che kaang'atiin rani si komyeeit eng' inyee." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kipsengwet ak kipsengwet ne po kipsengwet, ng'wony ak tugul che miitei." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Ago ki paibait Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwanisyeguk ki cham icheek ak kolewen iyotennywa ne piitu let, ne chooto ko okweek eng' piik tugul, ko uu rani." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Omuratan mugulelwekwok anyun, amoegu piich che uueen metowoi." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Amu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko Kamuktaindet ne siirei kamuktaik ak ko Kiptaiyatap kiptainik, Kamuktaindet ne oo ne po kamuktaet ak kwong'eet, ne ma tiytiy piik ak koma namei asoya." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Ineendet ne yachin imanda ne ma tinyei sigiik ak kwony age tugul ne kagosiirtoe manong'otyonnyi, ak kochamei toondet, igoochin amitwogik ak ngoroik." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Ocham anyun toek amu ki oo toek eng' emetap Misiri. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Iywei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak iboisyechi ineendet. Onamgei ak ineendet ak iyasye eng' kainennyi. 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ineendet kalasuneng'ung' ak ko Kamuktaindeng'ung', ne kiyaun tuguuchu eecheen po kwong'eet che ki igeer eng' konyeguk." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Ki piik tamanwogik tisap kwanisyeguk ye kichoortogei kobendi Misiri, ago kagoyain Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' itenitu kecheigap parak soet eng' chaang'indo.”" 
Deuteronomy11:1 Cham anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak iriip kotigonennyi, kaneetisyosyekyik, kirwoogutikyik ak ng'atuutikyik kotugul." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Onai niito ra, amu ma ng'alaaljini lagokwok che tomo konai ak tomo kogeer katigonetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', etunatennyi, kamuktaennyi ak eunnyi ne chuulaat," 
Deuteronomy11:3 kaboorunoikyik ak poisyonikyik che ki yachi Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri ak emennyi komugul eng' kwenutap Misiri. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Kiit ne ki yachi lugeetap Misiri, paraisisyekwak ak kariisyekwak, ko uu ye ki igoochi komaaluuch peegap Araraita ne Piriir ye ki isubwok, ak ki iwong' `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek ko uu nooto agoi rani." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Ma lagokwok che ki iro kiit ne kiyaiywok eng' surkwen agoi oitu yuto," 
Deuteronomy11:6 ak kiit ne ki yachi Datan ak Abiram weeriigap Eliap, weeriitap Reuben, koyaat ng'wony kutinnyi ak kolugui kobooto piikwak, emaisyekwak, tuguuk tugul che saptos che ki kweryoti icheek eng' kwenutap Israel tugul." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Ago ki kogeer konyekwok poisyonik tugul che eecheen che ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Oriip anyun ng'atuutyet komugul ne kaang'atak rani si ogimegitu ak oit emet ne obendi oname kobunjook. 
Deuteronomy11:9 Si kobiit kochang'a peetuusyekwok eng' emonooto, ne ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyekwok kole igoochin icheek ak iyotennywa ne piitu let, emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Amu ma uu emet ne obendi oname kobunjook emetap Misiri ne ki obunu ole ki igoole kesweguk ak ki ibisisye keeldong'ung' ko uu kabungui. 
Deuteronomy11:11 Ago emet ne olang'jini omenye, kotinyei tuloonook ak tembwosyek ne eei peek che po roptap kipsengwet." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Riibei emonooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ko keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emonooto kobooch taunetap kenyiit agoi kogeskei kenyiit. 
Deuteronomy11:13 Ngot ogas iit eng' kagiiletapkei ng'atuutikyuk che kang'atak rani ak ngo cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' oboisyechi ineendet eng' mugulelwekwok tugul ak eng' saboonwekwok tugul," 
Deuteronomy11:14 agoonok anyun ropta ne po emeng'wong' eng' peetuusyekyik, roptap iwotkuut ak ne igeesunegei, si iges peeguk, divaiguk ak mwaniguk." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Agoonu susweek che po tuguuk eng' emeng'ung', ak iamisyei ibiye." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Oriipkei anyun si ma kiberber mugulelwekwok, ak omaste oot kanamonik ak ogutung'ji." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Ngo yai ko uu nooto, kolaldos nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' okweek ak koger kipsengwet, si mogoroboni, si ma koiyei emet, ak osip obegu eng' emet ne karaaran ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Ogonoree anyun ng'aleechuchuk mugulelwekwok ak saboonwekwok ak oratyi eunekwok koek kaboorunet, ak koek ratuutik che kirate anook eng' turyetap togoochikwok." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Oneet lagokwok chooto ye ong'alaaldosi, ye itebye eng' koong'ung', ye iwendoti, ye irue ak ye ing'eete." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Sirchi tugatugigap koong'ung', ak ormariichoguk," 
Deuteronomy11:21 si ko uu ye ta komi kipsengwet ak ng'wony, ko tesoksei ko uu nooto peetuusyekwok ak peetuusyegap lagokwok eng' emet ne ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyekwok kole igoochin." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Amu ngo riip eng' kagiiletapkei ng'atuutyoni komugul kaang'atak rani, oyai, ocham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', obendate ortinwekyik tugul ak onamge ak ineendet," 
Deuteronomy11:23 koon anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyechu tugul eng' taing'wong' ak oluul pororyosyek che eecheen che kiimeen kosiirok. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Punjinok oldo tugul ole katyech keelyekwok. Egu kiwoteng'wong' kobooch surkwen ak Lebanon ak kobooch aineetap Yufrets agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian nooto tokyingei ole roroktoe asiista. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Ma piitu chii ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taing'wong'. Igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' koiyweak ak kogonyitok emet komugul ne otyeche ko uu ye ki mwaiwok. 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Kande taing'wong' rani kaberuret ak chubisyet: 
Deuteronomy11:27 egu kaberuret ngo kas ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' che kaang'atak rani. 
Deuteronomy11:28 Ago egu chubisyet ngo mogas ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ngo maste eng' ooreet ne kaang'atak rani, osup kanamonik che tomo onai." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Ak ye tuun kagoitin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emet ne iname kobunjiin, inde kaberuret tulweetap Gerizim ak inde chubisyet tulweetap Ebal." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Tos ma mi chooto Jordan pitoniin, ole tokyingei ole roroktoe asiista eng' emetap Kanaanik che menyei Arabah ole tokyingei Gilgal ole neegitee keetiigap Moreh?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Amu olandae Jordan obendi oname emet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', kobunjook ak omeny olooto." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Oriip anyun ak oyai kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik tugul che kande taing'wong' rani. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Chu kirwoogutik ak atebosyek che tuun oriibe oyae eng' emet ne ki koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyeguk, kobunjiin kotee osaptosi eng' ng'wony." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Ong'em anyun ak owong'u oldinwek tugul ole kioote kanamonikwak pororyosyek che oluule. Ong'em oldinwek chooto tugul che mi tuloonook che kooen, che mi legemosyek ak che mi keetiik che tuonen keel." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Obut kapkorosusyekwak ak otonaton tolochikwak ak obeel lumeiwegap Aserik. Oluul kanamonikwak che ki kiwai, ong'em ak obet kainennywa eng' olooto." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Amoyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko uu ye yachin icheek kamuktaikwak. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Ocheeng' anyun ole menyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' ole leweni ineendet eng' ortinwekwok tugul kole konde kainennyi. Yooto ye nyolu obe," 
Deuteronomy12:6 oibe kagoochinoikwok che kibeelei, tiseiywekwok, kebeberwekwok, kagoochinetap eunekwok ne kinamjin parak, kaarortaosyekwok, kagoochinoigap chamyet ak che twatei tuukwok ak keechiirekwok." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Oamisye eng' olooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', okweek ak piikwok kibagenge, oboiboitune tugul che kiberuurwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Amat oyai tuguuk ko uu ye kiyae rani ko uu ye keerei chii age tugul kochamei," 
Deuteronomy12:9 amu tomo oit kamuung'et ak poroteet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Ago ye kaolande eng' Jordan obe omeny emet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' onyaban ak kogoonok kamuung'et eng' puunikwok tugul che mi komoswek tugul, si omeng'iisyei eng' kaalyeet." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Egu anyun ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' konde kainennyi kotebee, ole oibe koba tugul che ang'atook; kagoochinoikwok che kibeelei, tiseiywekwok, kebeberwekwok, kagoochinetap eunekwok ne kinamjin parak ak kaarortaosyekwok tugul che oarorchini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Oboiboitu eng' olooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', okweek kobooto weeriikwok, tiibiikwok, otwogikwok che murenik kobooto otwogikwok che tiibiik ak Lawindet ne mi kurgotikwok, amu ma tinyei ineendet kebeberta anan poroteet kobootok." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Riipkei si megoite kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei eng' oldo tugul ole igeere," 
Deuteronomy12:14 ago eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' age ne po ortinweguk, igoite eng' kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei ak iyai eng' olooto tugul che ang'atiin." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Ago imuuchi ieny ak iam panyeek eng' ole imenye ko uu ye machei muguleldang'ung', ko uu kaberuretap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne ki kogoonin. Imuuchi koam ne ng'waan ak ne ma ng'waan ko ye ki ame kenyeleet anan teweretyot." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Ago amat oam korotiik, ago otumji ng'wony ko uu peek." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Amat oam eng' kurgotikwok kebebertap peeguk, anan ne po divaiguk anan ne po mwaniguk anan che twatei tuguuk anan che po keechiireguk anan kaarortaosyeguk alak tugul che iarortoi anan kagoochinoiguk che po chamyet anan kagoochinetap eunekwok ne kinamjin parak." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Ago iame tuguuchooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inyee, weeriing'ung', cheptong'ung' ak otwogeng'ung' ne muren ak ne tye ak Lawindet ne mi kurgotiguk. Ak ibaibaitu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kiy age tugul ne iyae euneguk." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Riipkei amebagaakte Lawindet ko tee isabe eng' emeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Ye katesun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kiwoteet ko uu ye ki iarorun, ak ile, ‘Amache aam panyeek, amu machei saboondanyu panyeek,’ imuuchi iam panyeek che tee che machei saboondang'ung'." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ngot ko loo eng' inyee ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' konde kainennyi, ieny anyun che po akweeng'ung' ak che po keechiireguk che ki kogoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki ang'atiin ak iam eng' kurgotiguk, ko uu ye machei saboondang'ung'." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Ko uu ye ki amei kenyeleet ak teweretyot iam anyun ko uu nooto. Amei che ng'woneen ak che ma ng'woneen. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kobatee amat iam korotiik. Amu saboondo korotiik ara anyun meam saboondo kobooto panyeek. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Amat iam, ago tumji ng'wony ko uu peek." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Amat iam si komyeeit eng' inyee ak eng' lagoguk che piitu let ye iyae nooto myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Deuteronomy12:26 Koek kityo iibe tuguuguk che tiliileen che itinye, ak kaarortaosyeguk ak iwe ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Deuteronomy12:27 ak igoite kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei, panyeek kobooto korotiik eng' kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Iroong'jin korotiigap tiseiyweguk kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' yeityo iam panyeek." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Riip ak iepchi iit ng'aleechu tugul che kang'atiin si komyeeit eng' inyee ak eng' lagoguk che piitu let agoi koigeny, ye iyae ne myee ak ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Ye tuun ing'eto eng' taing'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' pororyosyek che iwendi inam si kobunjiin chooto, ye inam ak imeny emennywa," 
Deuteronomy12:30 iriipkei anyun si ma riichin ak isup icheek, kogageng'em pichooto eng' taing'ung': ye iteep agobo kanamonikwak ile, ‘Ootitoi ano pororyosyechu kanamonikwak? Amache ayai agane ko uu nooto.’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Ameyachi ko uu nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Amu kiy age tugul ne wegot eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne wechei ineendet, ko ki yachi ko uu nooto icheek kanamonikwak, amu peelei agot weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak kobeeljin kanamonikwak." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Oriip kiy age tugul ne ang'atook oyai. Amat otes anan ichuchuch. 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ngo piit maotyondo anan karwotitoindo ak koboorun tartet anan kaboorunet," 
Deuteronomy13:2 koyaak tartanooto anan kaboorunonooto ne kimwaun kole, ‘Ongisup kanamonik che ki ma ongen, ak oot chooto,’" 
Deuteronomy13:3 ko meepchi iit ng'aleegap maotyondonooto anan karwotitoindonooto. Amu tyemok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' si konai ngo chame Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' mugulelwekwok ak eng' saboonwekwok. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Obendate osup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', oiywei ineendet ak oriip ng'atuutikyik ogas iit kutinnyi ak oboisyechi ak onamge ak ineendet." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kibarei maotyondonooto anan karwotitoindonooto amu kamwa kiit ne ibeeti piik kobagaakta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ne ki imutwok omang'une emetap Misiri, ne ki ityaachak eng' kootap otwoknateet. Kibarei ineendet amu katyem kole komaasin eng' ooreet ne king'atin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' iwendote. Iste anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Ngo kaigain eng' ung'oot ng'eetap kamenng'ung' anan weeriing'ung' anan cheptong'ung' anan osotyondeng'ung' ne ichame anan chorweng'ung' ne ichame ko uu ye ichame saboondang'ung' koleenjin, ‘Ngebe keoot kanamonik alak’ che ki ma ingen inyee anan kwanisyeguk," 
Deuteronomy13:7 kanamonigap pororyosyek che mi tabanwekwok, che neegiteenen anan che looenen kobooch tabanda age ne po ng'wony agoi tabanda age," 
Deuteronomy13:8 Ko ameyanji anan igasyi. Ama, ye igeer, iriiree anan ibagaakte anan iuny." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Ago par anyun ineendet iman. Ngo sip kobar ineendet eung'ung' ak ye ibata kobar piik tugul. 
Deuteronomy13:10 Lach eng' koik kot kome amu ki cheeng'ei komaasin imete Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne ki imutun imang'une emetap Misiri eng' kootap otwoknateet. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Ye iyai ko uu niito, kogas Yahudik tugul ak koiyweis si mata koyai sogornateet ne uu niito kogeny eng' kwenung'ung'." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Ngigas keng'alaale age eng' nganasoguk ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' imeny keleen," 
Deuteronomy13:13 Kamang'une kwenung'ung' piik alak che yaach, ak koba komaas piik che menyei nganasennywa koleenji, ‘Ongebe keoot kamuktaik che mongen,’" 
Deuteronomy13:14 igililjigei anyun ak iteep anyun ak icheeng' igin, igiiljigei. Ngo imanit ko uu nooto ng'olyoondonooto, keele kogeyai kiit ne kiwechei eng' kwenung'ung'," 
Deuteronomy13:15 ibar iwong'u anyun piigap nganasanooto, tuuga ak tuguuk tugul che miitei olooto eng' rotwetap chok." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Iyumji tuguukyik tugul kwenutap ooreetap nganasanooto ak ibeel nganaseet ak tuguukyik tugul kogeskei, ibeelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak koek tulwo koigeny ago ma keteechei kogeny." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Amenam eng' eung'ung' kiy age tugul ne kigeisto, si koweek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobagaach nereegekyik che koroomen ak korirenen, kochamin ak kobarain, ko uu ye ki koyasyechi kwanisyeguk." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Ye iepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak iriip ng'atuutikyik tugul che kang'atiin rani, iyai nooto po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Oo lagogap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong': amowat poorwekwok anan amotuumet agobo chii ne kame. 
Deuteronomy14:2 Amu ii pororyet ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ki kolewenin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu pororyennyi ne itabaanat kosiir pororyosyek tugul che mi ng'wony. 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Amat iam kiy age tugul ne kiwechei. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Chu tyong'ik che oame: teta, keechiiryet, ng'orooryet," 
Deuteronomy14:5 ak che uu teweretyot, kenyeleet ak chemnyogoset, ng'ororyetap timiin ak kiplelgutyet ak kenyeleet ak sitwet." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Ome tyony age tugul ne pcheotin siyok, che kipcheunegei aeng' ne itori paroi eng' tyong'ik." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ago amat oam chu eng' che itori paroi anan che petotin siyok: tambeesyet, kiplengwet keneryet, amu itori paroi ago ma pcheotin siyok; ng'woneen eng' okweek." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Moam tooreet amu petotin siyok ago ma itari paroi; ng'waan nooto eng' okweek: Amat oam panyeekwak, amotwaa ye kame." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Chu che oame eng' che mi peek: oam age tugul ne tinyei kebebaik ak peerik. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Ago matoam age tugul ne ma tinyei kebebaik ak peerik; ng'waan nooto eng' okweek. 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Omuuchi oam toriitik alak tugul che myachen. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ago amat oam chu: kipsiichit, motonda ak chelogomyet;" 
Deuteronomy14:13 chepkupkupchyet ak chesirereet, keeret ak tugul che kergei." 
Deuteronomy14:14 Amat oam chepkuginik ak tugul che kergei; 
Deuteronomy14:15 tyondap songolik, keeretap kemoi, toriityon ne leel ne po nyanjet ak keeret ak che kergei." 
Deuteronomy14:16 Ma ki amei sugurut ne ming'in anan sugurut ne oo sugurut ne tinyei kuinoik; 
Deuteronomy14:17 chebo kibabaa, chepsengwet ak toriityon ne po nyanjet;" 
Deuteronomy14:18 kong'onyot, chelogomyet ak che kergei, ak chesululit ak reresyet." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Ng'woneen eng' okweek tuguuk tugul che ing'onioti che tinyei kebebaik: ma ki amei. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Omuuchi oam toriitik alak tugul che myachen. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Amat oam ne kame ineegei. Imuuchi igoochi kiprutoiyot ne mi kurgotiguk koam anan ialdochi toondet: amu ii pororyet ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Amat iyoe aarwetap ng'oroor cheegap kamet. 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Igoite iman kebebertap taman ne po iyoteet tugul ne po kesweguk che piitu eng' mbar kenyiit age tugul. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Iamisyei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', eng' ole leweni konde kainennyi komeny olooto, kebebertap taman ne po peeguk, divaiguk, mwaniguk ak che twatei akweeng'ung' ak keechiireguk, si ineetkei iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kotugul." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Ye tuun iberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' me muuchi iip kebeberwechooto ak kouit panda eng' inyee amu loo eng' olooto ki lewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' konde kainennyi," 
Deuteronomy14:25 ialde anyun iwal koek chepkondok ak irat si iip eng' eung'ung' ak iwe komosta ne leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy14:26 Ye iit olooto, iale fedhaisyechooto kiit age tugul ne machei muguleldang'ung' ngo tuuga anan keechiirek anan divaik anan maiyek anan kiy age tugul ne machei saboondang'ung'. Yeityo iam eng' olooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ibaibaitu, inyee ak piigap koong'ung'." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Amebagaakte Lawindet ne mi kurgotiguk; amu ma tinyei kebeberta anan poroteet kobooten. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Ye igeskei kenyiit age tugul ne po somok inemu kebeberwegap taman che po rurateng'ung' tugul eng' kenyinooto ak igonoree oldang'ung'," 
Deuteronomy14:29 si konyo Lawindet amu ma tinyei kebeberta anan poroteet kobooten. Nyoonei kora toondet ak ne ma tinyei sigiik, ak mosogichooto mi kurgotiguk nyoo koamis ak kobiyong'so, si koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' poisyet tugul ne po euneguk." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Ye igeskei kenyiit age tugul ne po tisap ichop katyaget. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ak uu ni katyagonooto: ingobagaakta age tugul ne yaaksei tugul che ki kobesendochi chiitap kokwennyi, amat koyaach chiitap kokwennyi anan ne tupcho. Amu kagemwaita katyaknatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Imuuchi iyaach punootyot, ago ityaach kiy age tugul ne neng'ung' ne tinyei ne otupche." 
Deuteronomy15:4 “Ma piitunenen kibananook, amu iberuurin iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emet ne koonin imeny koek poroteng'ung'," 
Deuteronomy15:5 ngigiilgei igas kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak igeer iman ile keyai ng'atuutichuuto tugul kang'atiin rani. 
Deuteronomy15:6 Amu iberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko uu ye ki iarorun ak ibesendochi pororyosyek che chaang', ago mebeseni. Ibou pororyosyek che chaang', ama poun." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Ngo mi kibanania kwenung'wong' ne po tupchosyeguk eng' nganaseet age ne mi age eng' kurgotiguk ne mi emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko mat iuuiit muguleldang'ung', anan imumut eung'ung' eng' ne otupche ne kibanania." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Ago ng'aang'ji eung'ung' iman, igoochi kobesen che yamei rerunaikyik che tee che machei." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Riipkei si ma piitune muguleldang'ung' kabwaatutyet ne ya, ile, ‘Kagoneegitit kenyiitap tisap, kenyinooto po katyaget.’ Mekany koyait kondang'ung' eng' ne otupche ne panan, kot ko megoochi kiy. Imuuchi koriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo inyee ak koek nooto tengekto eng' inyee." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Igoochi ineendet anyun iman, amat koyait muguleldang'ung' ye igoochini. Amu iberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' ng'olyoondoni eng' poisyoniguk tugul ak eng' tuguuk tugul che iyae euneguk." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Amu ma petos kibananook eng' emet agoi, ko kaang'atiin anyun ale, ‘Kanyool ing'aang'ji eung'ung' iman tupcheng'ung' ak cheguuk che tinyei nyalilda ak kibananoguk eng' emeng'ung'.’" 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Ngealdaun tupcheng'ung' Hebranindet ne muren anan ne kwondo ak koboisyeun kenyiisyek lo, imete anyun kwo eng' oldang'ung' eng' kenyiitap tisap." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ak ye kaityaach, ko mat igany kwo puch," 
Deuteronomy15:14 igoochi eng' aiyebindo che po keechiireguk ak che po rwanyung'ung' ak che po ole kitue sabibuguk. Igoochi anyun ko uu ye ki koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy15:15 Ibwaat ile ki ii otwogin eng' emetap Misiri ak ki ityaachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung': kang'atiin anyun agobo ng'olyoondoni rani amu nooto. 
Deuteronomy15:16 Ago ngo leenjin, ‘Ma wendi eng' oldang'ung',’ amu chamin kobooto koong'ung' ak ko amu paibai ye mi kobooten," 
Deuteronomy15:17 inam kateet anyun irute itinnyi itisyi kurgeet ak koek otwogindeng'ung' koigeny. Yachi ko uu nooto agine otwogindeng'ung' ne tye. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Amat kouiit eng' inyee ye kemete kwo eng' oldang'ung', amu uu poisyennyi, ne kiboisyeun eng' kenyiisyek lo, poisyetap otwogik aeng' che nyooru melekto, ak koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' tugul che iyae." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Itabaanji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eiik tugul che twatei tuuga ak mengichik ak kwesik che twatei neego. Ameboisyee eitang'ung' ne kitwatei anan itil koroorigap mengit ne kitwatei. 
Deuteronomy15:20 Iame chooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inyee ak piigap koong'ung', eng' kenyiit age tugul eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Ngo ma libwoop, ngo ng'wali anan ngo koraat, anan ngo tinyei peruut age tugul ne ya, ko matyeng'ji nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Iame eng' kurgotiguk ak koamei che ng'woneen ak che ma ng'woneen kogergeit, ko uu kenyeleet ak ko uu teweretyot." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kobatee amat iam korotiikyik; tumji chooto ng'wony ko uu peek. 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Riip arawetap Abib ak iyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' paska. Amu ki imoong'une `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' Misiri kemoi eng' arawetap Abib. 
Deuteronomy16:2 Igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' tiseiywot ne po paska eng' keechiirek ak eng' tuuga eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotebee kainennyi. 
Deuteronomy16:3 Ameam magatiinik che ki kinde mermereek. Am eng' peetuusyek tisap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, chooto magatinigap nyalilda; amu ki imang'une emetap Misiri eng' kagirgiret si ibwaat peetuut ne ki imang'une emetap Misiri kotee isabe." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Amat kegeerchin mermereek eng' komosweguk tugul eng' peetuusyek tisap, amat koeekyi panyeek che igoitoi koek kagoochinet eng' peetuut ne po tai koskoleny." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Amat ieny che po paska eng' komosta age tugul ne po kurgotiguk ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'," 
Deuteronomy16:6 kobatee eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kotebee kainennyi, ieny eng' olooto che po paska koskoleny, ye machei kororokto asiista eng' peetuut ne ki imong'u eng' Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Iiyo anyun si iam eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' yeityo iweege karon iwe ole mi emaisyeguk. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Am peetuusyek lo magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek ak koek eng' peetuutap tisap tuiyetap kaming'inetapkei eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ne ma kiyae poisyo age tugul eng' peetuunooto." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Iityigei wigisyek tisap. Iit wigisyechooto tisap kobooch peetuut ne ketau iges peek. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Ye ibata wigisyechooto, iriipchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' igoorto ne po wigisyek eng' kagoochinet ne kigoitoi eng' chamyet ne igoochini, che tee che ki iberuurun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Ibaibaitu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inyee, weeriing'ung', cheptong'ung', otwogindeng'ung' ne muren ak ne tye, Lawindet ne mi kurgotiguk, toondet, ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget, che mi kobooten eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kotebee kainennyi." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Nyolu ibwaat ile ki ii otwogindet eng' Misiri ak riip anyun kaneetisyosyechu ak iyai. 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Ye kaiyum tuguuk che punu rwanyung'ung' ak che punu ole kitue sabibuguk, iyai igoortap kooriik eng' peetuusyek tisap." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Paibaitu eng' igoortang'ung', inyee ak weeriing'ung' ak cheptong'ung', otwogeng'ung' ne muren ak ne tye, Lawindet, toondet, ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget che mi nganasooguk." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Riipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' igoorto eng' peetuusyek tisap eng' ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu iberuurun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' tuguuk tugul che inyooru, ak poisyonik tugul che po euneguk ak ibaibaitu miising'." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Ingobwa mureniguk tugul taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' konyil somok eng' kenyiit eng' ole leweni ineendet eng' igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, eng' igoortap wigisyek ak eng' igoortap keryosyek. Amat kobwa taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak euut puch." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Ingogoito chii age tugul ko uu ye imuuchi, ne tee kaberuretap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne kigoonin." 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Inde kirwoogik ak pounik kurgotiguk tugul che koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko uu ortinweguk si korwookyi piik eng' kirwooget ne po imanda. 
Deuteronomy16:19 Amemaas kirwooget. Ametiytiy piik anan itaach che po kagaigaet, amu kerei konyegap che tinyei utaatyet tuguuk che po kagaigaet, ak kogunuuri ng'aleegap che po imanda." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Isup che po imanda kityo, si isap ak inyaban emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Amat iminji keetit age tugul ne po Asera ole neegitee kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne tuun iteekyinigei. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Amat iteech toloiwagap kanamonik, amu wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'."
