Deuteronomy17:1 “Ameeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eito anan keechiiryet ne tinyei peruut, anan kiy age tugul ne ya amu wechei nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Ngo pitunee kwenung'ung' eng' kurgotiguk alak tugul che koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' chii ne muren anan ne kwony, ne yaei ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobistoe arorutyennyi," 
Deuteronomy17:3 ak kwo koot kanamonik kogutung'ji anan asiista anan arawet anan age tugul ne po chaang'indap kipsengwet ne ma ang'at," 
Deuteronomy17:4 ak kemwaun, isyach anyun eng' kagiiletapkei. Ngo po iman nooto ak ko uu nooto kioto keele kiyaei nooto ne kiwechei eng' Israel," 
Deuteronomy17:5 imutu anyun murenonooto anan kwonyooto ne kayai kioto ya konyo kurgotiguk si ilach eng' koik kot kome. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Kibarei chiichooto eng' ng'aleegap paorinik aeng' anan ko somok ama ki parei eng' paornateetap chiito agenge. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Ingosip kolach paorinichooto yeityo kolach anyun piik tugul. Iste anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'. 
Deuteronomy17:8 Ngo piit ng'olyoot ne uui eng' kirwooget ne temeneen, ne po korotiik eng' korotiik anan ng'olyoot eng' ng'olyoot, anan pireet eng' pireet, che kaek kabeletapkei eng' kurgotiguk, ing'eet anyun, iwe ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung';" 
Deuteronomy17:9 ak inyoo ole mi tisiik Lawiik, ak kirwoogindet ne mi eng' peetuusyechooto yeityo iteep si koboorun icheeget ole teptoi kirwooget." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Iyae anyun kiy age tugul ne kamwaun ak che iboorun eng' komosta ne leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak igeer iman ile keyai ko uu tugul che ineetin," 
Deuteronomy17:11 Ye kagoweny ko uu ng'olyootap ng'atuutyet ne ineetin pichooto ak ko uu kirwooget ne mwaun, iyai anyun ko uu nooto. Amemaste eng' kirwooget ne iboorun iwe eutap tai anan kaataam." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Chii age tugul ne yae kiy eng' menoteet ak koeesyo kogas ng'aleegap tisiindet ne tononi koboisyei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' anan kirwoogindet, komeei si iiste yaityet eng' Israel." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Ak kogas piik tugul, ak koywei, si mata koyai chii kiy eng' menoteet kogeny.”" 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Ye kaiit emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak inam kobunjiin ak imeny ak ile, ‘Kande laitoryat koboiywa, ko uu pororyosyek tugul che mi komoswekyuk,’" 
Deuteronomy17:15 inde anyun ineendet ne leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Inde age eng' tupchosyeguk koek laitoryat ne poun. Amat inde punootyot ko poun ne ma ne otupche. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Ago amat kotesyigei paraisisyek anan kogoochi piik koweektagei Misiri si kotesigei paraisisyek. Amu kimwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Amata oweektage oranooto kogeny.’" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Amat kotes osotik si ma kuskong' muguleldanyi, anan kotesyigei fedha ak thahabu che chaang'." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Ye kagotebee ng'echereetap laitornatennyi, kosirchi tisiik ng'atuutyoni konde bukuit koosup." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ngo tepto ak kosoman ko tee kosabei, si koneetkei koywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi, koriip ak koyai ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni ak kaneetisyosyechu." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Amat koeetkei eng' muguleldanyi kosiir tupchosyekyik anan ak komasta kometo ng'atuutyet, kwo eutap tai anan ne po kaataam, si kobiit kochang'a peetuusyekyik eng' laitornatennyi eng' ineendet ak eng' lagokyik eng' kwenutap Israel.”" 
Deuteronomy18:1 Ki ng'alaalji Musa piigap Israel Koleenji, “Ma nyooru kebeberta anan poroteet kobooto Israel tisiik, ooreet komugul ne po Lawi. Amei kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che punei maat kigoochin ak porotennyi." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Ma nyooru poroteet eng' tupchosyekwak amu porotennywa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki mwachi. 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Ni melektap tisiik eng' che koonu piik eng' tiseiywegap icheeget che igoitoi eito anan keechiir: kusto ak tagilgilik tuwai ak moet. 
Deuteronomy18:4 Igoochi ineendet tongoanigap peeguk, divaiguk, mwaniguk ak koroorik che po tai che po keechiireguk." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Amu kalewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ineendet eng' ortinweguk tugul kobois eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ak weeriikyik koigeny. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Ngo pun Lawindet kurgotiguk alak tugul eng' Israel, komong' eng' ole menyei eng' chamyennyi tugul ne po saboondanyi ak kwo ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Deuteronomy18:7 ko ingobois anyun eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi ko uu ye yaei tupchosyekyik tugul; Lawiik che tonondos eng' olooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Ingoam kebeberwek che aechin kobooto che nyoorunee aldaetap tuguuk che po kwandanyi. 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Ye kaiit emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko meneetkei iyai che yaacheen che yaei pororyosyechooto." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Amat kobiit eng' okweek ne igoitoi weeriinnyi anan cheptonyi kobun maat anan ne poisyee ng'oorset anan sageiywek anan ne isagisyei anan poonindet," 
Deuteronomy18:11 anan ne abusisyei anan ne ng'alaali ak oik anan poonindet anan ne ng'alaali ak che ki kobek. 
Deuteronomy18:12 Amu wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chii age tugul ne yaei tuguuchooto. Oone Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' icheek eng' taing'ung' amu tuguuchu wechei. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Egu ne ititaat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy18:14 “Amu pororyosyechu tuun iluule, koyani che poisyee sogeinateet ak che ng'oorsei. Ago ma chamun inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iyai chooto." 
Deuteronomy18:15 “Tuun ing'eetun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' maotyot eng' che otupche ak eng' kwenung'ung' ne uu anee. 
Deuteronomy18:16 Ara anyun ogas iit ineendet. Niito ko kosupkei ak tugul che ki imach eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' peetuutap tuiyet eng' Horeb ile, ‘Amat kota agas kogeny kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu anan kota ageer mai oo kogeny si ma mei.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Kamwa komyee chooto kamwa." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ang'eetyini anyun maotyot eng' tupchosyekwak ne uu inyee ak ande ng'aleekyuk kutinnyin, ak komwachi icheek tugul che ang'ate ineendet." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ak age tugul ne ma machei kogas ng'aleekyuk che tuun mwaei eng' kainennyu ko tuun ateebee ineendet. 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ago maotyot ne mwaei ng'olyoo eng' menoteetapkei eng' kainennyu ne ma ang'at ineendet komwa anan ne ng'alaali eng' kainaigap kamuktaik alak komeei.’ ” 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Ak ngile eng' muguleldang'ung', ‘Kinae nee ng'olyoot ne ma mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Ye kang'alaal maotyot eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ngo mayaak kioto anan kosulda, ko nooto ne ma mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago kamwa maotyot eng' menoteet. Ara anyun amat iywei ineendet.”" 
Deuteronomy19:1 Ye kagoon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyek che nenywa emenooto koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak inam imeny nganasookwak ak kooriikwak," 
Deuteronomy19:2 itabaanjigei anyun nganasook somok eng' kwenutap emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobunjiin. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Chopchigei ooreet ak ipchei kiwotosyegap emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobunjiin koek kebeberwek somok, si komuuch komwechi chii age tugul ne karumis." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ni ng'olyootap chiito ne karumis: ineendet ne kabar chiitap kokwennyi ne ki ma kowechei eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto ama nai," 
Deuteronomy19:5 ko uu ye kawo chiito timiin koep keetit kobooto chiitap kokwennyi ak ye kasut aiywet komachei koep keetit ak kochun aiywet eng' kungit kochililji chiitap kokwennyi ak kome, ko ingomwechi anyun age eng' nganasochooto si kosap." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Asi ma amu loo orte koosup ne igeeri korotiik kota kolaldos nereegekyik ak konam ak kokwer kome, nga ki ma konyaaljin meet amu ki ma kowechei ineendet eng' tai." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Kang'atiin anyun amu nooto ale, “Itabaanjigei nganasook somok.”" 
Deuteronomy19:8 Ak ngo paraun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kiwoteng'ung' ko uu ye ki koyasyechi kwanisyeguk ak kogoonin emet komugul ne ki iarorchi kwanisyeguk kole igoochin. 
Deuteronomy19:9 Ngiriip ng'atuutyoni komugul ne kang'atiin rani ak iyai icham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ak iwendote ortinwekyik kotugul, ites anyun nganasook alak somok, kobooto chooto somok." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Si ma kitumda korotiik che ma tinyei tengek eng' emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet si ma namin korotichooto. 
Deuteronomy19:11 Ago ngo wech chii chiitap kokwennyi, ak kosapchi, kong'eetyi ak kokwer kome, komwechi nganaseet age eng' chuuto," 
Deuteronomy19:12 koyookto anyun poisyek che po nganasennyi kimut eng' olooto kamwechi nyoo konde eutap ne yaaktoi korotiik si kobar. 
Deuteronomy19:13 Ama ye igeer, iriiree. Ago iste korotiik che ma tinyei tengek eng' Israel si komyeeit eng' inyee." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Amenaktae kiwotetap chiitap kokweng'ung' ne ki indoi piik che po keny, eng' poroteng'ung' ne inyabani eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobunjiin." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Amat kobaoryanji chii paoryat agenge eng' tengek age tugul anan eng' chalwok age tugul, eng' leluut age tugul ne kayai. Ago ki kimiti ng'olyoot eng' ng'aleegap paorinik aeng' anan ko somok." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Ngo ng'eet paoryat ne ma po iman kobaoryanji chii age tugul agobo yaityet," 
Deuteronomy19:17 ingotononso anyun icheek tuwai chooto ibelegei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' taitap tisiik ak kirwoogik che mi eng' peetuusyechooto." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Asi kogin kirwoogik ko ki iljigei. Ngo ma po iman paoryat amu kabaoryanji ne tupcho eng' lembech," 
Deuteronomy19:19 oyachi anyun ko uu ye kata machei koyachi ne tupcho. Iste ko uu nooto anyun yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Ak kogas che kong'et ak koiyweis si mata koyai yaityet ne uu nooto eng' kwenung'ung' kogeny. 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ama ye igeer, iriiree. Amu kigeere `saboondo saboondo, konda eng' konda, keldet eng' keldet, euut eng' euut ak keeldo eng' keeldo." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Ye iwe obargei ak puuniguk ak iroo kotinyei paraisisyek, kariisyek ak piik che chaang' kosiirok, ko mat iywei. Amu mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne ki imutun imong'u eng' emetap Misiri kobooten." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Ye neegit iyai lugeet, koriik anyun tisiindet ak kong'alaalji piik koleenji," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Ogaso, ee Israel koriikyi rani lugeet obargei ak pounikwok amogoochi mugulelwekwok kotanuiso, amoiywei anan obotanse, among' komuok pichooto." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Amu wendi kobootok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' koyae pooryeet agobo okweek eng' puunikwok ak kosarwok.’ 
Deuteronomy20:5 Ye ibata, kong'alaalji piik `kandoik koleenji, ‘Tos mi chii ne kateech ko ne leel ama igoochi Kamuktaindet? Ngo mi, ko ingoweek kwo koonnyi si ma me eng' pooryeet ak kogoochi chiito age Kamuktaindet koonnyi." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Tos mi chii ne kimin mbareetap sabibuk ak tomo kobut logoekyik? Ngo mi ko ingoweek kwo koonnyi si ma me eng' pooryeet ak koboisyee chiito age logoekyik. 
Deuteronomy20:7 Tos mi chii ne ki kigoochi chepto ak tomo kotun? Ngo mi, ko ingoweek kwo koonnyi si ma me eng' pooryeet ak kotun chiito age chebooto.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Ingong'alaalji `kandoik piik kogeny koleenji, “Ng'oo ne nyogoor ne machei kotanui? Ingoweek kwo koonnyi, si ma chootyo mugulelwegap tupchosyekyik ko uu nenyi.”" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Ak ye kagogees kandoik ng'aleekwak eng' piik, kokwai anyun `kandoichooto kiptainigap lugoosyek kondochi piik." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Ye ibookyi nganaseet ne obaregei tuwai, iteebe korook piigap olooto ngo chamei koyai kaalyeet kobooten." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ak ngo waluun kole ma chamei koyai kaalyeet eng' kwenung'ung' ak icheeget ak koyatun kurgotikwak, koegu anyun piik tugul che po nganasanooto otwogiguk ak kootin." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ngo ma cham koyai kaalyeet kobooten ago komach koyai lugeet kobooten, iyiem anyun nganasanooto." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Ye kagondeun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' nganasanooto euneguk, ibar anyun muren age tugul ne mi olooto eng' rotwetap chok." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Ago luul kobunjiin kwony age tugul, lagok, tuuga ak tugul che mi nganaseet kobooto tuguuk tugul che mi olooto. Yeityo iam tuguugap puuniguk che kagoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Iyachini ko uu nooto nganasook tugul che looen miising' eng' inyee che ma nganasoogap pororyosyechu. 
Deuteronomy20:16 Ago eng' nganasook che po pororyosyechu che koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet, ko memete kiy age tugul ne mi yooto kosap," 
Deuteronomy20:17 ago iwong'u kot koma ng'et; Hitik, Amorik, Kanaanik, Perisik, Hibik ak Jebusik ko uu ye ki kong'atin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Si ma ineetin isup iyai tuguukwak tugul che kiwechei, che ki koyachi kanamonikwak. Ngo yai ko uu nooto ko kochalwogenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Ye kaiyiem nganaseet peetuusyek che chaang', imache ibar iluul, ko mat iep keetiikyik ing'em. Amu imuuchi iam che po keetichooto. Ameluul anyun, amu tos chii keetitap timiin ne tos iyiem?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Ago keetiik che ingen ile ma ki amei, iluul anyun keetichooto ing'em ak ing'ote irimeet nganasanooto obaregei agoi koluul.”" 
Deuteronomy21:1 Ngo piit muusto eng' timiin ne ki kibarei eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobunjiin ama ki nai ne kibarei," 
Deuteronomy21:2 Ko ingomanda anyun poisyeguk ak kirwoogiguk ak kobiman kong'etee ole mi muusto agoi nganasook che mi komoswek tugul. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Ingokweri anyun poisyegap nganaseet ne neegitee muusto rooryat ne punu akweet ne tomo kobois ak ko ne tomo keratyi chogit," 
Deuteronomy21:4 kwo atebweet ne roote peek ne tomo kibat anan kegol ak koiiny kaatitap rooryandanooto eng' atebwonooto. 
Deuteronomy21:5 Yeityo koriikta yooto tisiik weeriigap Lawi. Amu chooto che ki lewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koboisyechi ak koberuuris eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak tebyei ko uu ng'olyoonnywa kiit age tugul ne kagimoitos ak pireet age tugul. 
Deuteronomy21:6 Yeityo koun eunekwak poisyek tugul che po nganasanooto neegitee muusto eng' paragutap rooryandanooto kagiiny kaatit eng' atebweet. 
Deuteronomy21:7 Ak komwa kole, “Ma tumda eunekyok korotichu ama keer konyekyok ne kobare." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nyochi kaat piiguk Israel che ki ityaach, amengotebee kwenutap piiguk Israel korotiik che ma tinyei tengek. Ak kobiit nyoetap kaat amu tengektap korotiik.”" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Ye keyai ne nyolu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, iste ko uu nooto anyun korotiik che ma tinyei tengek eng' kwenung'ung'." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Ye kewe obargei ak puuniguk ak konde euneguk `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak imut koek luulenik," 
Deuteronomy21:11 ak ngigeer eng' kwenutap luulenichooto kwondo ne karaaran ak imach ineendet imutyigei koek osotyondeng'ung'," 
Deuteronomy21:12 imut anyun kwo koong'ung', konem metinnyi ak korar siyookyik" 
Deuteronomy21:13 ak kolakta ngoroik che ki kiluuldoi. Ye kagotebee koong'ung' anyun ak kagoriirchi kwandanyi ak kamennyi arawet agenge komugul, iwe ole mi iegu manong'otyondennyi ak koek ineendet osotyondeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Ngo mecham ineendet imete kwo ole machei. Ago amat ialde eng' silingisyek, ameyachi ko uu ye iyachini otwogindet amu koinyeeree ineendet." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Ngo tinyei chii osotik aeng' ak kochamei age ko usei age ago ngo ki kosikyi lagok tuwai; chamaneet ak chepkinyaryat; ago ngo kisip kosich ne sasei weeriit," 
Deuteronomy21:16 ko eng' peetuut ne pchechin chiichooto weeriikyik tuguukyik, ko matkogachi koeet weeriitap chamaneet kosiir weerooto oo kisichei osotyot ne ma ki chamei." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Kanyool koyani kole weeriit ne oo weeriitap ne ma chamei ak kogochi ineendet kebeberwek aeng' eng' tugul che tinyei. Amu ineendet taunetap kimnateennyi chechiik tuguuk che nyoljin weeriit ne oo. 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Ngo tinyei chii weeriit ne uui met ak ko ngelelyo ne ma kase iit kutitap kwan anan kamet, agot ngo tigoon koma kase iit;" 
Deuteronomy21:19 konam anyun kwandanyi ak kamennyi, ak komutyi poisyegap nganasennyi agoi ormariichetap oldanyi," 
Deuteronomy21:20 ak koleenji poisyegap nganasennyi, ‘Uui met weeriinnyo ak ko ngelelyo ma kaseech iit: kipkeiya ak ko kibogityo.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Ye Ibata kolage koik murenik tugul che po nganasennyi agoi kome. Iste anyun yaityet ko uu nooto eng' kwenung'ung' si kogas Israel tugul ak koywei. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Ngo yai chii tengekto ne nyoljin meet ak kebar ak isonginin eng' keetit," 
Deuteronomy21:23 ko mat kotebee muusto keetit parak agoi koeech, ago kanyool itup eng' peetuunooto. Amu chuboot eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kigartati. Si meng'wanit inyee emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet.”" 
Deuteronomy22:1 Ama ye igeer tetap ne otupche anan keechiiryennyi kobetoti iung'egei, ago kwerichi iman ne otupche." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Ngo ma neegitenen ne otupche anan ngo mengen ineendet, igetu anyun konyo koong'ung' ak kotebee oldang'ung' agoi kocheeng'an ne otupche ak iweekyi." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Yai ko uu nooto eng' sigiryennyi, eng' ngoryennyi ak yai ko uu nooto anyun eng' kiy age tugul ne kabet ne po tupcheng'ung' ago kainyooru ago ameuny." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Ama ye igeer sigiryetap tupcheng'ung' anan tennyi ne kagobut eng' ooreet taban iung'egei. Kanyool itoret kong'eet. 
Deuteronomy22:5 Amat kolaach kobogoryondo che po murenik anan kolaach mureno ngoryeet ne po kobogoryo. Amu age tugul ne yaei tuguuchuuto ko wegot eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy22:6 Ngigeer keswetap toriityon eng' ooreet, eng' keet age tugul anan eng' ng'wony komi aarek anan koik ak kosyebei kamet aarek anan koik, ko mat iip kamet kobooto aarek." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Ago kanyool imete kamet kwo, ago imuuchi iipchigei aarek si komyeeit eng' inyee, ak kochang'a peetuusyeguk." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Ye iteech koot ne leel, itegel koot parak iyiem kotuiyo si meipchi koong'ung' korotiik, ngo chirkwin chii eng' olooto." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Ameminji mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk kesweek che po ortinwek aeng' che teerchiin, si ma ki istoenen tugul; kesweek che ki igol ak ruroteetap mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Ameratyine eito ak sigiryet ye ibati mbareet. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Amelaach ngoryeet ne ki kiburuch koroorigap keechiirek ak katanit. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Napchi sawoinik ngoryeeng'ung' ne itugegei eng' tabanwekyik ang'wan. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Ngo tun chii osotyot ak kwo ole mi ak kowech," 
Deuteronomy22:14 ak komwaita ng'aleegap teweernateet agobo ineendet, kotaam eng' ng'aleek che yaach kole, “Ki atun osotyondoni ak ye kinga riikyi koma keer pergeinatennyi.”" 
Deuteronomy22:15 Koipchi anyun kwandap chebooto ak kamet poisyek eng' ormariichetap nganaseet tuguuk che ibooru pergeinatetap chebooto. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Yeityo koleenji kwanitap chebooto poisyek, “Ki agoochi murenoni cheptonyu kotun ago kowech, ma cham." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Ne siirei nooto ko ki koteweer kole, ‘Ma keerchi cheptong'ung' tuguuk che ibooru pergeinateet ago chu tuguuk che ibooru pergeinatetap cheptonyu.’ Yeityo koiito ngoryeet eng' taitap poisyegap nganaseet." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Ingonam anyun poisyegap nganasanooto murenonooto kotigon," 
Deuteronomy22:19 ak komage ineendet shekelisyek pogol che po fedha, si kogoochi kwandap chebooto, amu ki itaam eng' ng'aleek che yaach pergeiyat ne po Israel ak egu osotyonnyi. Ma imuuchi kobagaakta eng' peetuusyekyik tugul." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Ago ngo po iman ng'olyoondoniito keele ma ki nyoorchi chebooto tuguuk che ibooru pergeinateet," 
Deuteronomy22:21 kimut anyun chebooto agoi kurgeetap kootap kwandanyi ak kolage ineendet koik murenigap nganasennyi kot kome. Amu ki yai abusnateet eng' Israel, amu ki yai kugoinatet eng' kootap kwandanyi. Iste anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Nginyooru chii ne ibegei ak kwondo ne ki kitunji chiito age, kebarei tuwai; chiichooto kobooto kwonyooto. Iste anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' Israel." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Ngo mi chepto ne pergeiyat ne kigeyachi koito ak konyoorchi chii nganaseet ak koruiyo ak ineendet," 
Deuteronomy22:24 omutu tuwai kobwa kurgeetap nganaseet ak olage koik kobek: chebooto amu ma waach ago kimi nganaseet ak murenonooto amu kagoteweer osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi. Iste anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'. 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Ago ngo nyoor mureno chepto eng' timiin, nooto ki keyachi koito ak kosuup koipkei, kebarei murenonooto ineegei." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Ago meite kiy chebooto amu ma tinyei tengekto ne nyoljin meet. Amu uu chiito ne kang'eetyi chiitap kokwennyi ak kobar, ko uu nooto agine ng'olyoondoniito." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Amu ki nyoorchi timiin ak ki waach chebooto kiga keyachi koito ama piit chii ne ki sar. 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Ngo nyoor mureno chepto ne pergeiyat ne tomo kigoochi chii ak kosuup ak koruiyo tuwai ak kenyoor," 
Deuteronomy22:29 ko ingogoochi murenonooto karuiyo tuwai kwandap chebooto shekelisyek konom che po fedha. Ma imuuchi kobagaakta agoi, ago egu osotyonnyi amu koiteweer." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Amat konam chii osotyotap kwandanyi anan kong'aany aach ngoritap kwandanyi. 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne ki kitui kitik anan ne ki kitil toriityennyi. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne po sarbuch. Amat komanda tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi ibinda ne po taman. 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Amonindet anan Moabindet. Agot agoi eng' ibinda ne po taman, ko mat komanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor age tugul eng' tilyonutikwak agoi koigeny." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Amu ki ma torogunenok icheek magatiinik ak peek ye ki omangune Misiri, ago ki al Balaam weeriitap Beor konyo eng' Petor ne mi Mesopotamia nyoo kochupin." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Nga ki yai ko uu nooto ko ki ma kasyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' Balaam, ago ki iweech `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' chubisyet koek kaberuret, amu ki chamin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Amat icheeng' kalyennywa anan porotennywa eng' peetuusyeguk tugul koigeny. 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Amewech Edomindet amu ineendet ko ng'eetap kamet. Amewech Misirindet amu ki ii toondet eng' emennyi. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Ingomanda ole mi tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lagokwak che sichei eng' ibinda ne po somok. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Ye kebokte nganaseet obargei ak puuniguk, iriibegei anyun yaityet age tugul." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Ngo mi chii age tugul eng' okweek ne murwoon amu rwondo ne ya kemoi, komanda anyun kwo saang'utap nganaseet, amat konyo nganaseet oriit." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Ago ingouungei koskoleny ak ye kagororokta asiista konyo nganaseet oriit. 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Nyolu agine itinye ole imasyini eng' saang'utap nganaseet," 
Deuteronomy23:13 ak ko myee itinye kiit ne uu mogombet kobooto kariguk si ye imache imaste ibaale ole imasyini ak ye kaigeesu itup. 
Deuteronomy23:14 Amu wendote `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kwenutap nganaseng'ung' kosaruun ak koon puuniguk eng' taing'ung'. Amu niito, ko ingotiliilit anyun nganaseng'ung' si ma keerchin kiy ne ma tiliil eng' inyee ak koweek kometen." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Amat iweekyi otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi ne kimweune. 
Deuteronomy23:16 Ingomeny kobooten eng' kwenung'ung' eng' ole leweni eng' age ne po kurgotiguk ole machei, amat ius." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Amat kobiit chepkugonio eng' tiibiigap Israel anan eng' weeriigap Israel. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Ameibu melektap chepkugoniot anan che ki ale seset kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kaarorunet age tugul. Amu wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' chooto tuwai. 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Amebesendochi tupcheng'ung' ile tuun inyoorunee keljinet, ngo eng' pesendap silingisyek, amitwogik anan eng' pesendap kiy age tugul ne kibesendoi si kenyoorunee keljinet." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Imuuchi ibesendochi punootyot si tuun inyoorunee keljinet. Ago mebesendochi ne otupche ile tuun inyoorunee keljinet, si koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' tuguuk tugul che iyae eng' eung'ung' eng' emet ne iwendi iname.”" 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Ye iarorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kaarorunet ko mat igaegei, amu magenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kioto iman; si ma ek tengekto eng' inyee." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ago ngo ma iarorchi kiy koma egu tengek eng' inyee. 
Deuteronomy23:23 Riip iyai ne kemwa eng' kuting'ung' ko uu ye ki arorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kagoochinetap chamyet ne kaiaroru eng' kuting'ung'.” 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Ye iwe mbareetap sabibuk ne po chiitap kokweng'ung' iam anyun logoek agoi ibiye ko uu ye imache. Ago amat inde kitong'eng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy23:25 Ye iwe mbareetap chiitap kokweng'ung' ne mi peek imuuchi ibach peek, ago amenamji chepkeswet ile iges peegap chiitap kokweng'ung'.”" 
Deuteronomy24:1 Ngo tunis mureno ama nyoor osotyonnyi chameet eng' tainnyi amu kageerchi chiichooto kiy ne ya kwonyooto, kosirchi anyun sireetap peesyet konde eunnyi ak koon eng' koonnyi." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Ak ye kagomanda kwonyooto eng' kootap chiichooto, komuuchi koek osotyotap chiito age." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Ngo wech ineendet manong'otyot ne po let ak kosirchi sireetap peesyet ak konde eunnyi yeityo koon eng' koonnyi anan ngo me manong'otyot ne po let ne ki itun ineendet," 
Deuteronomy24:4 ko mat komut manong'otyondennyi ni ki po tai ne ki oonei ineendet kole koek osotyonnyi kogeny amu ki king'wanit ak ko wegot yautyet ne uu nooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amat igoochi emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet koyai tengek. 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Ye kagotunis chiito, ko matkwo lugeet anan kiim eng' poit age tugul. Ago ing'otebi eng' kaa kenyiit agenge si kobiit kobaibai osotyonnyi ne kogotun.”" 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Amat koip chii koitap pai anan isyet kobunji kaarorunet: amu ngo nam ko uu nooto ko uu yo kabunji ineendet saboondap chiitap ko po.” 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Ngenyoor chii ne kachoor tupchennyi age ne po piigap Israel ak koyachi ko uu otwogin anan koalda, ko ingome anyun choorindonooto. Iste ko uu nooto anyun yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'.”" 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Riipkei eng' koroitap mogondosaik, riip komyee eng' kagiiletapkei ak iyai ko uu tugul che ineetin tisiik Lawiik. Ko uu ye ki ang'at icheek, oriip anyun si oyai ko uu nooto." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Ibwaat kiit ne ki ita `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' Miriam, eng' ooreet ye ki omong'u eng' Misiri.”" 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Ye ibesendochi chiitap kokweng'ung' kiy age tugul, ko mat iwe koonnyi inemu kiit ne iname pesendo." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Ago tonone saang' inyee ne iyaaksei, si koibun konyo saang' kiit ne iname pesendo." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ak ngo kibanania chiichooto, komat iru itinye kinnyi ne iname pesendo." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Iweekyi kinnyi ko karorokto asiista si kobiit kotugegei ye ruei ak koberuurin ak koek nooto imanda eng' inyee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.” 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Amesastae otwogindet ne nyooru melekto ne kibanania ne nyalili, ngo age eng' che otupche anan ngo po punootik che mi emeng'ung' eng' kurgotiguk." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Igoochi ineendet melektanyi eng' peetuunnyi ne po melekto. Ameng' kororokto asiista kotom igoochi amu kibanania ak imang'u chooto. Si ma riirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo inyee ak koek tengekto eng' inyee.” 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Ma kibarei kwanisyek amu lagok anan kebar lagok amu kwanisyek. Ago ki parei chii age tugul ineegei agobo tengektanyi.” 
Deuteronomy24:17 Amemaas kirwoogetap toondet anan ne ma tinyei sigiik anan iname pesendo ngoryeetap mosoget. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Ago ibwaat ile ki ii otwogin eng' Misiri ak ki ityaachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' olooto. Kang'atiin anyun amu nooto ale iyai kiito. 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Ye igesisye eng' mbareeng'ung' ak iutye ratuutigap peek eng' mbar, ko mat iweege iwe iibu. Ingobunji toondet, ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget: si kobiit koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' tuguuk tugul che iname eung'ung'." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Ye itui logoegap emitiguk ko megetyinotegei iturote eng' mooriik. Ago ingobunji toondet, ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Ye ibute logoegap mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk, ko megetyigei iturote. Lakte kobunji toondet, ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Ak ibwaat ile ki ii otwogindet eng' emetap Misiri: kang'atiin anyun eng' nooto ale iyai ng'olyoondoniito.” 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Ngopiit tiyet eng' piik ak kobwa kapkirwook korwookyi kirwoogik; ko ngo iityi imanda anyun ne po imanda ak kogikyi ne ya; 
Deuteronomy25:2 ak ngo keer kirwoogindet kole nyoljin chiichooto ya pireet, komwachi koru ng'wony si kebir eng' tainnyi ko uu koitet ne yamegei ak yaityennyi." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Imuuchi kobir pirutik artam amat kotes. Amu ngo siir chooto ak kebir pirutik che chaang', ko egu tupcheng'ung' ne sasaat eng' inyee.”" 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Amerat kutitap eito ye tyechei peek koboorei.” 
Deuteronomy25:5 Ngo meng'jindos che tupcho ak ngo me age ama sich weeriit, ko mat kotun chii ne po saang' ne kamee manong'otyot: ingondi ne tupcho ak koek manong'otyondennyi ak komutyigei koek osotyonnyi ak koyachi kwonyooto ne kota yachin ng'eetap kamet." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ingetoochi weeriit ne po tai ne isip kosichei kwonyooto kainetap ng'eetap kam ne kime si ma purburenok kainennyi eng' Israel. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Ak ngo ma machei chiichooto kondi osotyotap ng'eetap kamet, ingowo anyun nooto po ng'eetap kam ole mi poisyek eng' ormariich koleenji, “Kaeesyo pamuru kotononji ne tupcho kainennyi eng' Israel, kaeesyo koyaiywo ne nyoljin tupchetap manong'otyonnyu." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Yeityo koguur poisyegap nganasennyi chiichooto kong'alaalsechi. Ak ngo tonon kole, ‘Ma chame andi.’" 
Deuteronomy25:9 Kwo osotyotap ng'eetap kamet eng' taitap poisyek, ak kocher kweiyotap chiichooto ak kong'utyi togeennyi; ak kowol mosoganooto kole, ingeyachi ko uu nooto chiito ne eesyoi kolal maatap ng'eetap kamet.”" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Ak keguure kainennyi eng' Israel, “Kootap ineendet ne ki kityage kweiyot.”" 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Ngo pirgei piik ak kwo osotyotap age kosar manong'otyondennyi eng' ne pirei ak kosapchi konam kitik," 
Deuteronomy25:12 itil anyun eunnyi amat iriiree.” 
Deuteronomy25:13 Amat inde loleng'ung' ratilisyek che teerchiin, ne oo ak ne ming'in." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Ametepte eng' koong'ung' tuguuk che teerchiin che kigeree peek; ne oo ak ne ming'in. 
Deuteronomy25:15 “Ago tepte ratilit ne nyolu ne po imanda ak itepte kiit ne kigeree peek ne nyolu ne po imanda. Si kochang'a peetuusyeguk eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Amu wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' tugul che yaei tuguuk che uu chooto tugul che yaei che ma po iman.” 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Ibwaat kiit ne kimwaun Amelek eng' ooreet ye ki obunu Misiri; 
Deuteronomy25:18 ko uu ye kinyoorchin ooreet ak kobar piiguk che ki mi let tugul che kinyalulyotin che kiletu ye ki neegit itanui ak ye kiga ing'et miising'. Ama iywei Amelek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ye tuun kagogoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kamuung'et eng' puuniguk tugul che mi komosweguk tugul, eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteng'ung' kobunjiin, ko mat iutye ibukte anyun kabwaatetap Amelek eng' kurereetap kipsengwet.”" 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Ye kaiit emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' koek poroteet kobunjiin ak imeny olooto," 
Deuteronomy26:2 inam anyun eng' tongoanik tugul che po logoek che po emet che iibu eng' emeng'ung' ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak inde kitonget yeityo iip koba ole leweni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kondai kainennyi. 
Deuteronomy26:3 Iwendi anyun ole mi tisiindet ne mi eng' peetuusyechooto ak ileenji, ‘Aboorchini rani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' aleenjini, kaitu emet ne ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyekyok kole koonech.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Yeityo koip tisiindet kitonget eng' eung'ung' ak konde taitap kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Ak iwolu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ile, ‘Ki Syrianindet abba ne kiuoti ne kichoortagei kwo Misiri ak komeny olooto ak ye kimatyanit koek ineendet pororyet ne oo eng' olooto, kochang'a ak kogimegiitu miising'." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Kingo yaiywech ne ya Misiriik, konyalilech ak koratyech poisyet ne nyigiis," 
Deuteronomy26:7 keriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekyok ak ki kas kutinnyo. Ki keer nyalildanyo ak pirtoennyo pogei ak sastaet ne ki kisastaenech." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Ara ki imoong'wech anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Misiri, eng' euut ne kiim, eng' euut ne chuulaat, eng' kamuiset ne oo ak eng' kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Ki komutwech keitu olito ak ki koonech emoni nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo. 
Deuteronomy26:10 Nguno anyun ko kaibu tongoanik che po logoek che po emet ne ki igoono inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ Yeityo inde ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ilasu Ineendet. 
Deuteronomy26:11 Ak ibaibaitu eng' myeeindo tugul ne kigoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' inyee ak koong'ung' Lawindet ak toondet ne mi kwenung'ung'. 
Deuteronomy26:12 Ye kainemu iges kebeberwek che po taman che po kebeberwegap rurateng'ung' eng' kenyiit ne po somok, nooto kenyiit ne kigoitoe kebeberta igoochi chooto anyun Lawindet, toondet, ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget, si koamis eng' kurgotiguk kobiyong'so." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Yeityo imwa eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ile, ‘Kaanemu eng' koonnyu tuguuk che itabaanatiin agoochi agine Lawindet, toondet, ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget, ko uu ng'atuutyeng'ung' tugul ne ki ing'ata. Ma abistoe ng'atuutiguk alak tugul, ama autye." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Ma aam tuguuchooto eng' riirekyuk ama aiste alak eng' chooto aboisyee eng' poisyet ne ma tiliil, ama agoite amu che ki kobek, ago ki agas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu ak ki ayai ko uu tugul che ki ing'ata." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Keer anyun ng'wony eng' meng'ooteng'ung' ne tiliil, eng' kipsengwet ak iberuur piiguk Israel ak emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo ne ki igoonech ko uu ye ki iyasyechi kwanisyekyok.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Kang'atiin rani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iyai kaneetisyosyechu ak kirwoogutichu. Riip anyun ak iyai eng' muguleldang'ung' komugul ak eng' saboondang'ung' komugul. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Keng'aany rani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ile, ineendet ko Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ile kanyool iwendote ortinwekyik ak iriip kaneetisyosyekyik, ng'atuutikyik kirwoogutikyik ak igas iit kutinnyi." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Kang'aany Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani kole, ii pororyet ne ki kitabaanin iegu nenyi, ko uu ye ki iarorun ak si kobiit iriip ng'atuutikyik tugul," 
Deuteronomy26:19 ak koyain itororitu isiir pororyosyek tugul che ki yai ineendet, eng' kalasunet ak kainet ak teegisto, si iegu pororyet ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko uu ye ki mwa.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Ki ng'at anyun `Musa ak poisyegap Israel piik koleenji, “Oriip ng'atuutik tugul che kang'atak rani." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Ak eng' peetuut ne olandoe Jordan obendi emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', itononsechigei koik che eecheen, ak imal." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Yeityo isirchi koichooto ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni ye kailande Jordan, si kobiit iit emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ko uu ye ki iarorun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyeguk." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ye kailandae Jordan, ilumde koichooto ang'atiin rani eng' tulweetap Ebal ak imal." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Iteekyi eng' olooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kaptisisyet ne po koik che ma kiyae karna. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Teekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kaptisisyet eng' koik che ma kiwai yeityo igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' olooto," 
Deuteronomy27:7 ak ieny kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet ak iamisye eng' olooto. Si ibaibaitu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy27:8 Yeityo anyun isirchi ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni koichooto kotook komyee.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Yeityo komwachi `Musa ak tisiik che Lawiik Yahudik tugul koleenji, “Siis ep iit, ee Israel, kaoegu rani chiitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ara anyun kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak iyai ng'atuutikyik ak kaneetisyosyekyik che kaang'atiin ra.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Ki ng'at anyun `Musa piik peetuunooto koleenji," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Tonondos Simion, Lawi, Judah, Issakar, Joseph ak Benjamin eng' tulweetap Gerizim si koberuur piik ye kaolandae Jordan." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ak ko tonondos Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan ak Naphtali eng' tulweetap Ebal agobo chubisyet," 
Deuteronomy27:14 ak kowol Lawiik koleenji piik tugul che po Israel eng' kutit ne oo kole," 
Deuteronomy27:15 “Chuboot ne yaei kanamwet ne wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nooto ne kiwaei anan kiy ne kitaanyi eng' musoknateet ak kelumda eng' ung'oot.” Ak kowol piik tugul kole, Amen!" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “Chuboot chii ne sasei kwanda anan kamet.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “Chuboot chii ne inaktoe kiwotetap chiitap kokwennyi.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “Chuboot chii ne ibeeti ne koraat.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “Chuboot chii ne imaasi kirwoogetap ne toondet ak ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “Chuboot chii ne ibegei ak osotyotap kwandanyi; amu kang'aany aach ngoryeetap kwandanyi.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “Chuboot chii ne ibegei ak tyony age tugul.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “Chuboot chii ne ibegei ak chepkamet ne cheptap kwandanyi anan ne cheptap kamet.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “Chuboot chii ne ibegei ak korgetap yugoi.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “Chuboot chii ne pirei chiitap kokwennyi eng' ung'oot.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “Chuboot chii ne taachei melekto si kobar chii ne ma tinyei tengek.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “Chuboot chii ne ma igimit ng'aleegap ng'atuutyoni koyai.” Ak kole piik tugul, “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Ago ngiepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' kagiiletapkei, iriip ng'atuutikyik tugul che kaang'atiin rani, koeetin anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' isiir pororyosyek tugul che mi ng'wony." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Pwonjinin kaberurosyechu tugul ak koityin ngiepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Kiberuurin eng' nganaseet kiberuurin eng' mbar. 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Kiberuuri iyoteng'ung', iyoteetap emeng'ung' ak iyoteetap akwotisyeguk, ne po tuguuk ak aaregap keechiireguk." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Kiberuuri kitongeng'ung' ak tereeng'ung' ne kikwong'e peek. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Kiberuurin ye imong'u ak kiberuurin ye imandoi saang'. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Igoitoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puuniguk che ng'eetyinin kiterteer eng' taing'ung'. Ipookyinin eng' ooreet agenge, ago mwee ortinwek tisap eng' taing'ung'." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Ng'atei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor perurto konyonjin eng' chogeniguk ak eng' tugul che iyai eng' eung'ung' ak iberuurin eng' emet ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Ngiriip ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', iwendote ortinwekyik, kogimitin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu pororyennyi ne tiliil ko uu ye ki iyasyeun." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Ye keer pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony kole kiguurtoenen kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koiywein." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Iyabin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ibaraitu iegu ne nyiitaat myeeindo, eng' iyoteng'ung', eng' iyoteetap akwotisyeguk ak eng' iyoteetap koreng'ung' eng' emet ne ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyeguk kole koonin." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Amu yaatun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konorwennyi ne karaaran nooto ko kipsengwet korobonji emeng'ung' eng' peetuusyekyik ak koberuur poisyonik tugul che po euneguk. Ibesendochini pororyosyek che chaang' ago mebeseni. 
Deuteronomy28:13 Yain Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu metit ago meegu katutyet ak iegu ne mi parak kityo ago meegu ne mi ng'wony, ngiepchi iit ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' che ang'atiin rani, iriip ak iyai," 
Deuteronomy28:14 ne meistoegei ng'olyoo age tugul ne ang'atiin rani, iwe tai anan kaataam isup kanamonik ioot." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Ago ngo meepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iriip ak iyai ko uu ng'atuutikyik tugul ak kaneetisyosyekyik che ang'atiin rani, kobwonjin anyun ak koityin chubisyosyechu tugul:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Kichubin eng' nganaseet ak kichubin eng' mbar. 
Deuteronomy28:17 Kichubei kitongeng'ung' ak tereeng'ung' ne kikwonge peek. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Kichubei iyoteng'ung', iyoteetap emeng'ung', ak ne po tuguuk ak aaregap keechiireguk." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Kichubin ye imong'u ak kichubin ye imandoi saang'. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Iyogun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chubisyet, nyalilda ak kereetap kong' eng' tugul che iyae euneguk agoi kong'emin ak agoi ilus ichakte, amu yaityetap poisyoniguk ne kigoonin ibagaakta." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koroito konamin agoi kowong'un eng' emet ne iwendi iname kobunjiin. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Pirin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chebuonit, maat ne mi poorto, kabwanet, maat ne ng'waan, rotwetap chok ak chelalityet, ak uchatet; onotin chooto agoi ilus." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Yamei ko aiegeitu sugunwet kipsengwet ne mi paragung'ung' ak kogergeitu ak karnet ng'wony ne ityeche. 
Deuteronomy28:24 Yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor roptap emeng'ung' koek temburyek ak ng'ung'unyek ak kochoorchiningei chooto eng' kipsengwet agoi igeesuge. 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Igoitoin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koterteerin puuniguk. Ibookyini eng' ooreet agenge ak imwee eng' tainnywa eng' ortinwek tisap ak konaatiin laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony. 
Deuteronomy28:26 Ak koek muustong'ung' amditap toriitik tugul che po parak ak tyong'ik che po ng'wony. Ma piitu chii ne iyestoi. 
Deuteronomy28:27 Pirenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ondirik che po Misiri ak kabwondo, kochek ak simbiryek che ma kimuuchi kisoobun." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Pirenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iywek, korateet ak kaiyweisyet ne po muguleldo." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Iwendi isabsabisyoti peet kween ko uu ye sabsabisyoti kipkoraatyat eng' mesundeito, ama kiberuurin eng' ortinweguk. Kinyaliilin kityo ak kerebenen tuguuguk kotugul ama piitu ne saruun." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Ituni osotyot ak koipkei ak chiito age. Iteeche koot, amemenye. Imiine mbareetap sabibuk, amebute logoekwak." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Kienyei eitang'ung' igeere ameame panyeekyik. Kirebenen sigiryeng'ung' eng' koroomnateet igeere, ama kiweegun. Kigoochin keechiireguk puuniguk ama piitu chii ne saruun." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Kigoochin pororyet age weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk, ak keerei konyeguk ak koamjin emo icheek peetuut komugul, ametinye kimnateet eng' eung'ung'." 
Deuteronomy28:33 “Amei pororyet ne mengen logoegap emeng'ung' ak poisyoniguk tugul. Kinyaliilin ak ketyekyinin ng'wony kotugul," 
Deuteronomy28:34 agoi koamin iywek amu tugul che igeere eng' konyeguk. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Pirei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutung'oiguk ak keelyeguk eng' ondirik che ng'woneen che ma kimuuchi kisoobun, kobooch keldebesyet agoi metit parak." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Imutin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto laitoryandeng'ung' ne tuun indoi koboun agoi iit pororyet ne mengen inyee anan kwanisyeguk, ak ioot kanamonik che po keetiik ak koik eng' olooto." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Ak iegu kwang'utyet, kalewenet ak atindyot, eng' kwenutap piik tugul ole imutyinin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Iibe kesweek che chaang' mbar ago igese che ng'ering'; amu tarei chereng'endet. 
Deuteronomy28:39 Imiine mbareenigap sabibuk ak isemberi ago mee divaikyik anan ibut logoek, amu amei kuutik." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Itinye mseituni eng' kiwotosyeguk tugul, ago meilegei mwanikwak, amu iroroi logoekwak che po emitiguk." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Isiche weeriik ak tiibiik ago ma egu cheguuk, amu kiluulei." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Punjin chereng'endet keetiiguk tugul ak ruroteetap emeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Tororitu toondet ne mi kwenung'ung' kosiirin; ak iming'initu miising'. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Pesendoun ineendet ago mebesendochini. Egu ineendet metit ak iegu katutyet. 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Pwonjinin anyun chubisyosyechu tugul, koonaatiin agoi konamin ak kong'emin. Amu ma iepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iriip ng'atuutikyik ak kaneetisyosyekyik che king'atin" 
Deuteronomy28:46 Tebenen chooto koek kaboorunet ak kwang'utyet, ak kotebee iyoteng'ung' agoi koigeny." 
Deuteronomy28:47 “Amu meboisyechini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' poiboiyet, ak eng' kagasetapkei ne po muguleldo amu chaang'indap tuguuk tugul." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Iote anyun puuniguk che imutun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'eetyin eng' rubeet, eng' melelda, eng' aach ngorit ak eng' rerunetap tuguuk tugul. Indoi chogitap karnet kaating'ung' agoi kobarin." 
Deuteronomy28:49 “Imutun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyet ne punu ole loo eng' tabandap ng'wony ne megase ng'aleekwak konyo ko uu ye tirireni kipsiichit inyoo koboryenen 
Deuteronomy28:50 pororyet ne koroom igeere ne meiiti chii ne oos ama riiree lakwa. 
Deuteronomy28:51 Amei iyoteetap tuguuk ak ruroteetap emeng'ung', agoi kowong'un. Ma pagaagun peek anan divaik anan mwanik anan iyoteetap tuguuk anan aaregap keechiireguk, agoi kolusin." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Yiemin eng' kurgotiguk tugul agoi koluulyo irimoiguk che kooen che ng'ootaatiin che imang'u eng' emeng'ung' komugul. Yiemin eng' kurgotiguk tugul eng' emeng'ung' komugul ne ki kogoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy28:53 Eng' pichiindo ne ibu yiemet ne yiemin puuniguk, iame iyoteng'ung', panyeegap weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk che ki koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'" 
Deuteronomy28:54 Keere kong' ne ya chiito ne ko kiptalbisyo ak ko ng'arng'ar moo ne mi kwenung'wong' ng'eetap kamet ak osotyonnyi ne chamei ak lagokyik che kang'et," 
Deuteronomy28:55 kot koma chamei kobutyi chii age tugul eng' icheek panyeegap lagokyik che amei, amu ma ng'etyi kiy ineendet; amu yiemet ak pichiindo ne ibun puuniguk eng' kurgotiguk tugul." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Agot kwony ne mi kwenung'wong' ne cheptalbisyo ak ko ng'arng'ar moo ne ma chamei kotyegaat ng'wony amu talbistanyi ak ng'arng'arindap moo, ko keere kong' ne ya manong'otyondennyi ne chamei, weeriinnyi ak cheptonyi;" 
Deuteronomy28:57 ak eng' sindaryet ne sichei ineendet ak eng' lagokyik che sichei. Amei eng' ung'oot amu pananda amu kamuutetap nganaseet ak amu rubeet amu keret ne kerei kurgotiguk puuniguk. 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Ngo meriip iyai ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni che ki kisirchi kitabuuni, si kobiit igonyit kainani po teegisto, kainet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung';" 
Deuteronomy28:59 koyai anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor korotweguk koek che kikwong'ee ak korotwegap iyoteng'ung', korotwek che eecheen, che tebyei keny ak myanwogik che yaacheen, che tebyei keny." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Iweekyinin myanwogik tugul che po Misiri che ki iywei ak konamin. 
Deuteronomy28:61 Kogeny ko ibun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myando age tugul ak koroito age tugul ne ma ki sirchi bukuitap ng'atuutyoni, agoi kiwong'un." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Si ong'etu che ng'ering' eng' che ki aechin chaang'indang'wong' ak kecheigap kipsengwet. Amu ki ma iepchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy28:63 Ko uu ye ki paibait Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' okweek koyaiywok ne myee ak kotesak, ko uu nooto ko poiboitu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' okweek kolusak, kowong'wok ak kitutok eng' emet ne iwendi iname kobunjiin." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Ak koiyestak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor obe pororyosyek tugul, kobooch tabanda age ne po ng'wony agoi tabanda age. Iote kanamonik eng' olooto che po keetiik ak che po koik, che mengen inyee anan kwanisyeguk." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Amenyooru kamuung'et eng' pororyosyechooto, menyooru ole imuung'ee keeldong'ung'. Ago koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto muguleldo ne rugrugeni, koonyek che kortos ak muguleldo ne ichuchui." 
Deuteronomy28:66 “Menae ole teptoi sabeeng'ung' ak iyweisyei kemoi ak peet ak menae ole itei saboondang'ung'. 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ileen karon, ‘Kata kaigai nda ka koskoleny nguno!’ Ak ile koskoleny, ‘Kata kaigai nda kaeech.’ Amu kaiyweisyetap muguleldang'ung' ne iyweisyei ak amu tuguuk che keerei konyeguk che tuun igeere." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Ak koweekyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiri kogeny eng' melisyek, eng' ooreet ne ki amwaun, ale, ‘Ma igeere kogeny.’ Oaldochinigei puunikwok eng' olooto oegu otwogik che murenik ak che kobogorisyek, ago ma piitu chii ne alok.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Chu ng'aleegap kayomiset ne ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa koyai kobooto piigap Israel eng' emetap Moabik, kotese kayomiset ne ki iyomiskei ak icheek eng' Horeb." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Ki kuur `Musa Yahudik tugul ak koleenji, “Ki ogeer tugul che ki yachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Pharaoh, otwogikyik tugul, ak emennyi tugul eng' emetap Misiri eng' taing'wong'." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Ki keer konyeguk tyemuutik che eecheen, kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che eecheen." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Ago kitom kogoonok `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldo ne oguiye anan koonyek che ogeere anan itiik che ogase, agoi rani." 
Deuteronomy29:5 “Ki andoiywok eng' kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen. Eng' kenyiisyek chooto tugul koma osegitu ngoroik che olaachi ama osegitu kweoniguk eng' kelyekwok. 
Deuteronomy29:6 Ma oam magatiinik ama oee divaik anan maiyek: si kobiit onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'. 
Deuteronomy29:7 Ak ye kingo itu oli, kobokyech Sihon laitoryatap Hesbon ak Og laitoryatap Bashan ak ki kibar laitorinichooto," 
Deuteronomy29:8 ak ki kinam emennywa ak ki kigoochi piigap Reuben, che po Gad ak kebebertap ooreetap Manasseh koek poroteet." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Oriip anyun ng'aleegap kayomisoni ak oyai, si kiberuurok eng' tugul che oyae." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Otonondosi ra okweek tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', kandoigap ortinwekwok, poisyek ak kiptainikwok agot murenik tugul che po Israel," 
Deuteronomy29:11 lagokwok, osotikwok, ak toondeng'wong' ne miitei nganasokwok kobooch ne murmuri kweniguk agoi ne siilei peeguk." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Si kobiit oarorchigei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ak kayosyennyi, ne yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kobooten rani." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Si kogimitin rani iegu pororyennyi ak koek Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko uu ye kimwaun ak ko uu ye ki iyasyechi kwanisyeguk, Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Ma yamisok okweegei eng' kayomisoni ak kayasyoni," 
Deuteronomy29:15 ago kobooto ineendet agine ne ma mi kobootech rani. 
Deuteronomy29:16 Amu ongen ole ki kiteptoi eng' emetap Misiri ak ole ki kibwanunde eng' kwenutap pororyosyek che ki obun kwenunnywa. 
Deuteronomy29:17 Ki ogeer tuguukwak che kiwechei ak kanamonikwak, keetiik ak koik, fedha ak thahabu, che ki mi kwenunnywa." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Si ma piit chii eng' okweek mureno anan kwondo, anan kapchii, anan ooreet, ne mastoi muguleldanyi rani kobagaakta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo kwo koot kanamonigap pororyosyechooto si ma piit eng' okweek tigityotap ng'wanindo ak ng'wonet." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ye kas ng'aleegap chubisyoni, koberuurgei eng' muguleldanyi kole, atebye eng' kaalyeet agot ngawendoti eng' ngelelnatetap muguleldanyu; tesei melelda pogitet." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Ma metoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiichooto ago iyenjin chiichooto nereegek ak ng'etkonda che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kotebee chiichooto chubisyoni tugul ne ki kisirchi kitabuuni ak kobukto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kainennyi eng' kurereetap kipsengwet. 
Deuteronomy29:21 Ibesye anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiichooto ortinwek tugul che po Israel kobunji yaityet, ko uu chubisyosyek tugul che po kayomiset ne ki kisirchi bukuiniito po Ng'atuutik." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Yeityo kogeer ibinda ne piitu, lagokwok che piitu let eng' okweek ak toondet ne punu emet ne loo, korotwek che po emonooto ak myanwogik che ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komionso." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Keerei kole ki kowalak emet komugul koek tuguuk che laldos ak muunyuk, kot koma kegolei ama koiyei ama kobite suswo. Kergeitu ak ng'emisyetap Sodom ak Gomorah, Adma ak Seboim che king'em `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kowong' eng' nereegekyik ak eng' nyitatennyi." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Teebegei anyun pororyosyek tugul koleen, ‘Amu nee si koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni emoni? Ibooru nee mai po nereegechu ng'woneen?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Kole anyun piik, ‘Amu ki pagaakta kayomisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak ne ki yai kobooto icheek ye ki imutu komong' eng' emetap Misiri." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Ki pa koot kanamonik ak kogutung'ji che ki ma kongen ak che ki ma chamji ineendet. 
Deuteronomy29:27 Ki lal anyun nereeknatetap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu nooto agobo emoni ak koipchi chubisyosyek tugul che ki kisirchi bukuini. 
Deuteronomy29:28 Ki itut `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek komong' eng' emennywa eng' nereegek, eng' nyitatet ak eng' ng'wanindo ak koonji emet age ko uu rani.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy29:29 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo tuguugap ung'oot: ago chechook ak lagokyok koigeny tuguuk che ng'ang'atiin, si kobiit keyai ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Ye pwaanjin anyun tuguuchu tugul ki ande taing'ung'; perurto ak chubisyet, ak ingibwaat anyun eng' kwenutap pororyosyek tugul ole ki koonjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'," 
Deuteronomy30:2 ak ngiweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', igas iit kutinnyi ko uu tugul che kang'atiin rani inyee ak lagoguk eng' muguleldang'ung' komugul eng' saboondang'ung' komugul," 
Deuteronomy30:3 kowal anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' luuleet ne ki kiluulin ak korirenen ak koweek koyumin eng' pororyosyek tugul ole ki iyestoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Deuteronomy30:4 Ngo mi che ki iyestoochi tabanwegap kipsengwet, koyumin ak komutun eng' olooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Imutyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' emet ne ki po kwanisyeguk si kobunjiin ak koyaun ne myee, kotesin ichaang'itu isiir kwanisyeguk." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Imuratani `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' muguleldang'ung' ak mugulelwegap iyoteng'ung', si icham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' muguleldang'ung' komugul ak eng' saboondang'ung' komugul si isap." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Indoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' chubisyosyechu tugul puuniguk ak eng' icheek che wechin che kiusin. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Ak iweege igas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak iyai ng'atuutikyik tugul che ang'atiin rani. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Yain `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iegu ne tinyei chaang'indap perurto eng' poisyonik tugul che po euneguk, eng' iyoteng'ung', eng' iyoteetap tuguuk ak eng' ruroteetap emeng'ung'. Amu tuun poiboitunenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny koyaun ne myee, ko uu ye kibaibaitune kwanisyeguk," 
Deuteronomy30:10 ngigas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', iriip ng'atuutikyik ak kaneetisyosyekyik che siraatiin eng' bukuini po Ng'atuutyet. Pabaitunenen ngiweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' muguleldang'ung' komugul ak eng' saboondang'ung' komugul." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Amu ma uui miising' eng' inyee ng'atuutyoni kaang'atiin rani ama loo. 
Deuteronomy30:12 Ma mi kipsengwet ne imuuch iteep ile, Ng'oo ne togostoiywech kipsengwet si koibwech ak kogoonech kegas si keyai?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Ama mi nyanjet pitoniin ne tos imwa ile, ‘Ng'oo ne landoi eng' nyanjet si koibwech ak kogoonech kegas si kobiit keyai?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Ago neegiteenen ng'olyoondoni miising', miitei kuting'ung' ak muguleldang'ung' si kobiit iyai." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Keero, kande rani taing'ung' saboondo ak myeeindo, meet ak yaityet." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Amu kaang'atiin rani ale icham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iwendote ortinwekyik, iriip ng'atuutikyik ak kaneetisyosyekyik ak kirwoogutikyik si isap itesage, si koberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' emet ne iwendi iname." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Ago ngo masta muguleldang'ung' amecham igas, ago ngichuutin iwe isaa kanamonik ak ioot," 
Deuteronomy30:18 aboorwok rani ale olustosi iman ak koma chaang'itu peetuusyekwok eng' emet ole olang'jini eng' Jordan iwendi inam. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Kaaguur kipsengwet ak ng'wony kobaoryanjok rani ale, kande taing'ung' saboondo ak meet, kaberuret ak chubisyet. Lewen saboondo anyun, si isap, inyee ak iyoteng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', kas iit kutinnyi ak onamgei ak ineendet. Amu ineendet saboondang'ung' ak kooindap peetuusyeguk, si kobiit imeny emet ne ki iyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyeguk Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo kogoochi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Ki wo Musa anyun komwachi Yahudik tugul ng'aleechu. 
Deuteronomy31:2 Koleenji, “Kobooch ra ko kenyiisyekyuk ko pogol ak tiptem. Ma amuuchi amanda ak among'u. Kogeny, ko ki koleenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Melandoe Jordan-ini.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ineendet ne landoi kondoenen si kobar pororyosyechu mi taing'ung' ak inam icheek. Landoi Joshua kondoenen ko uu ye ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Deuteronomy31:3 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ineendet ne landoi kondoenen si kobar pororyosyechu mi taing'ung' ak inam icheek. Landoi Joshua kondoenen ko uu ye ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Deuteronomy31:4 Yachin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyechu ko uu ye ki yachi Sihon ak Og, laitorinigap Amorik ak emennywa che king'em." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Indewok `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunekwok eng' taing'wong' ak oyachi pichooto ko uu ng'atuutyet komugul ne ki ang'ataak. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Ogimegitu, onyiganitu, amoiywei anan oaragense amu icheek. Amu wendi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobooten ago ma metoin ineendet ama pagaaktoin.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Yeityo koguur `Musa Joshua, ak koleenji eng' taitap Yahudik tugul, “Kimitu, nyiganitu. Amu obendi kobooto pichu oite emet ne ki iyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyekwok kole igoochin ak igoochini icheek konyaban." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Yeityo koguur `Musa Joshua, ak koleenji eng' taitap Yahudik tugul, “Kimitu, nyiganitu. Amu obendi kobooto pichu oite emet ne ki iyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwanisyekwok kole igoochin ak igoochini icheek konyaban." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne indoenen ak mi kobooten, amemetoin, ama pagaaktoin ameiywei anan iaragen.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Ki sir anyun `Musa ng'atuutyoni ak kogoochi tisiik weeriigap Lawiik che ki ibei moinget ne po arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak poisyek tugul che po Israel. 
Deuteronomy31:10 Yeityo kong'at `Musa pichooto koleenji, “Kenyiit age tugul ne igeesunegei kenyiitap tisap eng' peetuut ne ki king'at ne po kenyiit ne po katyaget eng' igoorto ne po keryosyek," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ye kabwa Israel tugul koboorgei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' ole tuun leweni, isoman anyun ng'atuutyoni eng' taitap Israel tugul kogas." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Iyum piik, murenik, kwonyiik, lagok ak toondeng'ung' ne mi kurgotiguk, si kobiit kogas ak koneetkei si koywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ak koriip koyai ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Oyai niito si kogas lagokwak che tomo konai ak koneetkei koywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' peetuusyek tugul kotee osaptosi eng' emet ne olandoe Jordan obendi oname.” 
Deuteronomy31:14 Ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `Musa, “Keero, kagoriik peetuut ne imee. Ara kuur Joshua anyun ak obe otononse eng' emait ne kituiyechin, si ang'at ineendet.” Ki pa anyun Musa ak Joshua, kotononso eng' emaitap tuiyet." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `Musa, “Keero, kagoriik peetuut ne imee. Ara kuur Joshua anyun ak obe otononse eng' emait ne kituiyechin, si ang'at ineendet.” Ki pa anyun Musa ak Joshua, kotononso eng' emaitap tuiyet." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Ak ki took Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Emait eng' toloitap pooldet. Kitonone toloitap pooldet kurgeetap Emait. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa, “Keero, neegit si iru kobooto kwanisyeguk. Ago ye iru, kong'eetyo pichu koibotkei ak kanamonik che po pororyosyek alak che po emet ole pendi kotebee kwenunnywa, kobagaakta ak kobut kayomisennyu ne ki kiyomiske ak icheek." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Ye ai ko uu nooto kolalei anyun nereeknatennyu eng' peetuunooto agobo icheek ak abagaakte, auny togeennyu ak kiwong' icheek. Pwaanjin icheek yaitwogik ak nyalilwogik che chaang' ak kole eng' peetuunooto, ‘Tos ma pwanjech yaitwogichu amu ma mi Kamuktaindennyo kobootech?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Aunye iman togeennyu peetuunooto amu yaitwogik tugul che ki yai amu kaweektagei koot kanamonik.” 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Osirchigei anyun nguno tyeni, si ineet piigap Israel. Inde kutusweekwak si koek paoryandennyu tyeni agobo piigap Israel." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Amu ye kaamut koit emet ne ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwak, nooto nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo ak ye kagoamis kobiyong'so ak koneryo, koweektagei anyun ole mi kanamonik koba koot, kosasa ak kobut kayomisennyu." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Ye tuun kagobwonji yaitwogik che chaang' ak nyalilwogik, kobaoryan anyun tyeni eng' tainnywa ko uu paoryat. Amu ma utye iyotennywa eng' kutusweekwak. Amu agot nguno angen kabwaatutikwak che ibwaati, kotom amut koba emet ne ki ayosyechi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Ki sir anyun `Musa tyeni peetuunooto ak koneet piigap Israel. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ki igoochi anyun Joshua weeriitap Nun ng'atuutyet ak koleenji, “Kimitu, nyiganitu. Amu imuti piigap Israel koba emet ne ki ayosyechi ak ami kobooten.”" 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ki igoochi anyun Joshua weeriitap Nun ng'atuutyet ak koleenji, “Kimitu, nyiganitu. Amu imuti piigap Israel koba emet ne ki ayosyechi ak ami kobooten.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Ak ye kingo kagosir kogees `Musa ng'aleegap ng'atuutyoni eng' bukuit," 
Deuteronomy31:25 kong'at `Musa Lawiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Oip bukuini po ng'atuutik ak onde ole neegitee moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', si kotebee olooto koek paoryat agobo inyee." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Amu angen ngelelnateng'ung' ak uuindap kaating'ung'. Ogeero, kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kota asabe ami kobootok peetuuni. Oyae anyun ne tya ye kaamei?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Oyumwa poisyek tugul che po ortinwekwok ak kiptainikwok kobwa yu ami si amwachi ng'aleechu koba itiikwak, aguur kipsengwet ak ng'wony kobaoryan agobo icheek." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Amu angen ale ye kaamei ong'emge miising' kot, omastoi eng' ooreet ne ki ang'ataak ak koityok yaityet eng' peetuusyek che po let. Amu omache oyai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor otach ineendet amu poisyonigap eunekwok.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Kityenji anyun `Musa tuiyet komugul ne po Israel ng'aleegap tyeni tugul ak ki kas icheek komyee. 
Deuteronomy32:1 Oebit, ee okweek kipsengwet, si kobiit ang'alaal; ingogas ng'wony ng'aleegap kutinnyu." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Rong'ugei kaneetisyennyu ko uu ropta, ak kosoi ng'aleekyuk ko uu rewoot, ko uu ropta ne inesyin susweek che ng'orng'or, ak ko uu ropta ne robonjin susweegap timiin:" 
Deuteronomy32:3 Amu amwaitoi kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Oiityi etunateet Kamuktaindennyo. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Rwandet ineendet, ititaat poisyennyi, amu imanda ortinwekyik tugul. Kamuktaindet ne po imanit ne ma tinyei yaityo, po imanda ineendet ak kosuldaat." 
Deuteronomy32:5 King'emgei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kalilano eng' icheek amu ma ko lagokyik icheeget; icheek ko pororyet ne ngelelyo ago mastaat. 
Deuteronomy32:6 Tos kongoi ne ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ni, okweek piik che oo abusotiin che ma oo ng'oomen? Tos ma kwandang'ung' ne ki koonin sabeet? Tos ma ineendet ne ki yain ak kogimitin?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Ibwaat peetuusyek che po keny, ak iruchi kenyiisyegap ibinwegap tai. Teebe kwandang'ung' si koboorun. Teebe poisyeguk si komwaun." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Ye ki igoochi `Ne Toroor Miising' pororyosyek porotennywa, ye kipcheei weeriigap piik, ki inde kiwotosyegap piik ko uu koitetap piigap Israel." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Amu piikyik kebebertap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; porotennyi Jakobo. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Kinyoorchi ineendet surkwen, eng' surkwen ne imuisei ne ma mi kiy. Kiyiem ak koriip icheek ki riip `ineendet icheek ko uu laptetap kondanyi." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Ko uu ye ing'eeti kipsiichit aarekyik, ne wendote paragutap lagokyik koriibei, ne uitoi kebebaikyik, konam icheek, ak kogesene kebebaikyik." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei ne ki indochi ineendet, ak ma piit kamuktain ne po pororyosyek alak kobooto ineendet." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Ki igoochi kolaany oldinwek che sutotin che po ng'wony; ki am ruroteetap mbareet. Ki igoochi kochuchun kumyat eng' rwandet, kobooto mwanik eng' rwandet ne uui." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Kibae icheek mwaitap cheego ne po akweet, ak cheegap keechiirek, kobooto mwanigap aaregap keechiir. Ki igoochi icheek mengichigap Bashan ak ng'oroorek, kobooto mwanigap nganuuk che myachen. Ki eei divaik che anyiny, che kiyae peegap sabibuk." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Ago kiner Jesurun, ak kotyaris, kiner, kinyigiisitu ak koakwait eng' amitwogik. Yeityo kobagaakta anyun Kamuktaindet ne ki yai icheeget, ak kosas Rwandetap ne yetunennyi." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Ki igoochi koam ng'etkonda amu kamuktaik che teer, kitach eng' kanamonik che kiwechei." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Ki eng'ji tiseiywek oik, che ma Kamuktaindet, kamuktaik che ki ma kongen, che ki piitu let, Che ki ma koywei kwanisyekwok." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Mebwaati Rwandet ne kwandang'ung', Ki iutye Kamuktaindet ne kisichin." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Ki keer anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kinereech, Amu taagetap ne kitach weeriikyik ak tiibiikyik." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Ak ki le, “Aung'e togeennyu, Ageere ole teptoi kagesunennywa; Amu icheek ko ibinda ne imaasat miising'. Lagok che ma tinyei kayaneet." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Ki koono ng'etkonda eng' otetap che ma Kamuktaindet; Kitacha eng' tangoitanywa: Ara anyun nguno ko kagoochi icheek ng'etkonda eng' che ma poror; Atache icheek eng' pororyet ne abusat. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Amu kalal maat ne po nereegekyuk, ak lalei agoi keriinget ne loo miising', si kobeel ng'wony kobooto ruratennyi, ak kobeel ole tonone tuloonook." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Atesyini yaitwogik; Ak amwoge icheek kipchabonikyuk: 
Deuteronomy32:24 Sagitos eng' rubeet, Kibeelei eng' maat ne koroom, ak ng'emisyet ne ng'waan. Ayookyini kelegap tyong'ik, kobooto ng'wonetap che ichuutegei ng'wony che po temburyek." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Eng' ole po saang', korebisyei rotwetap chok, ak eng' ko, kobiitu kamuiset; Parei muren ak pergeiyat, Ne chuchuni ak chiito ne po kalwalek.”" 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ki ale, “Aiyestochini ole loo, agoochini kogeskei kabwaatennywa eng' piik." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Nda ki ma aiywei tagisyetap puunyoot, Si ma ibwaat puunikwak perberyo, ak komwa kole, ‘Kagotororit eunnyo, ak ma yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chooto tugul.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Amu icheek ko pororyet ne ma tinyei korwooch, Ama tinyei kaguiyet." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Nda ka utaatiin, ta konaei niito, Ak kobwaat kagesunennywa!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Kotos imuktoi ano koon `chii agenge eliphuut, ak koon `piik aeng'u eliphuusyek taman, nda ki ma alda `Ruandennywa icheek, ak kogoito `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Amu ma uu rwandennywa rwandennyo, ak kongen ak icheek puunikyok kole uu nooto." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Amu ketinnywa ne po sabibuk kobunu keetitap Sodom, ne punu mbareenigap Gomorah; murmuri piich sabibukwak, ak ko ng'woneen sabibukwak." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Uu `divaikwak ng'wonetap maswetisyek, ng'wonet ne koroom ne po erenook." 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Tos ma konorotiin eng' oldanyu chuuto, Ki king'ooch kobooto konoraikyuk?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Nenyu mugetuut ak kageeret. Neegit peetuut ne kagochabaita keelyekwak: Karik peetuutap nyalildanywa, ak chogu tuguuk che pwaanjin icheek." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Eng' iman ko irwookyinechin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik, ak koriir moo agobo otwogikyik, ye keer kole kagowandagei kimnateennywa, Ama mi ne kong'et ne rataat anan ne ma rataat." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Yeityo koteep kole, ‘Mi ano kanamonikwak, rwandet ne ki imang'u?’" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Mi ano nguno kamuktaichooto ki amei mwanigap tiseiywekwak, che kieei divaik che po kagoochinennywa ne kieei? Ingong'eetyo chooto kotoretook, Ingoek icheek che omwechini." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Ogeer anyun nguno ole anee, ko aa ineendet iman, Ma mi kamuktain, ami aneege. Abare ak asoobi; Ki aguoten ak ki anyaa: Ak ma mi ne imuuchi kosar eng' eunnyu." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Amu kanamji eunnyu kipsengwet, Ak ale, ‘Ko uu ye asabe koigeny," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ngalit rotwennyu po chok ne ilyeli, ak konam eunnyu kirwooget, ayaakyini mugetuut puunikyuk, ageerchini che wecho." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Agoochini kipchabonikyuk kobogite korotiik, ak koam panyeek rotwennyu ne po chok; kobooto korotiigap che ki kibar ak che ki kiluul, eng' metowegap kandoigap puunik.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Oboiboitu okweek pororyosyek, kobooto piikyik: amu yaaktoi mugetuut che po korotiigap otwogikyik, yaakyin mugetuut puunikyik, Ak koyai kagaigaet agobo emennyi ak piikyik.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Ki nyo anyun Musa ak Hoshea weeriitap Nun ak komwachi piik ng'aleek tugul che po tyeni kogas eng' itiikwak. 
Deuteronomy32:45 Ye kingo kes `Musa ng'aleechu tugul che komwachin Israel tugul," 
Deuteronomy32:46 koleenji, “Onde mugulelwekwok ng'aleechu tugul kabaoryanwok ra; che tuun ong'ate lagokwok koriip koyai ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutyoni." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Amu ma tangoi eng' okweek ni ak ko saboondang'wong'. Otese peetuusyekwok eng' emet ole obendi olandoe Jordan oname kobunjook amu niito.” 
Deuteronomy32:48 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa peetuunooto, koleenji," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Togoste tulwooni po Abarim, agoi tulweetap Nebo ne mi emetap Moab, ne tokyingei Jeriko, si igeer emetap Kanaan ne agoochini piigap Israel kobunji." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Si imechi tulweet ole itogosyini ak kiyumin kobooto piiguk, ko uu ye ki mechi Aron ng'eetap kamenng'ung' tulweetap Hor ak ki kiyum kobooto piikyik." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Amu ki ongelelja eng' kwenutap piigap Israel eng' peegap Meribah ne po Kadesh eng' surkwen ne po Sin; amu ki ma ogonyita eng' kwenutap piigap Israel. 
Deuteronomy32:52 Igeere emet eng' taing'ung', ago meite olooto, emenooto ne agoochini piigap Israel.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ni kaberuret ne ki iberuur `Musa chiitap Kamuktaindet piigap Israel kotom kome: 
Deuteronomy33:2 Ki toi komwa kole, “Ki nyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Sinai, king'eet eng' Seir amu icheek. Ki iluu eng' tulweetap Paran, Ki nyo eng' tamanusyegap eliphusyegap che tiliileen: ki mi eunnyi ne po tai ng'atuutyet ne uu maat eng' icheek." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Ee, ichame pororyosyeguk; mi eung'ung' piikyik tugul che tiliileen. Ing'uruukyin ole po keelyeguk, ak taachei age tugul eng' ng'aleeguk." 
Deuteronomy33:4 King'atwech `Musa ng'atuutyet, poroteetap tuiyetap Jakobo," 
Deuteronomy33:5 Ki ek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitoryat eng' Jesurun, Ye kingo yumjigei pounigap piik, ak ye kingo yumjigei ortinwek tugul che po Israel.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Ki mwa ni anyun Musa agobo Reuben: “Ingosap Reuben, ma meei; Ago ingong'ering'itu piikyik.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ni kaberuretap Judah: ki le, “Kas ee `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutitap Judah, Imutu ineendet konyo ole mi piikyik. Igimiit si kosargei eng' eunnyi. Ak iegu toretindennyi eng' puunikyik.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ki mwa ni `Musa agobo Lawi, “Ki igoochi Tumim neng'ung' ak Urim neng'ung', kiboityong'ung' ne tiliil, Ne ki ityem eng' Massah, Ak ki oborye ak ineendet eng' peegap Meribah;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 Ne ki mwa agobo kwandanyi ak kamennyi kole, ‘Ma ageer ineendet’; Ama nai che tupcho, Ama nai lagokyik: Amu ki isup icheek ng'olyoondeng'ung', Ak ki riip kayomiseng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Ineeti Jakobo kirwoogutiguk, Ak koneeti Israel ng'atuutyeng'ung': Indoi taing'ung' nyamdutik che kibeelei, Ak konde kagoochinet ne kibeelei komugul kaptisisyeng'ung'." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, iberuur tuguukyik, Ak itaach poisyonigap eunekyik. Pir suenutigap icheeget che ng'eetyin, Ak che po icheeget che wechei ineendet si ma ng'eetyo kogeny.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ki le agobo Benjamin, “Meng'iisyei chamaneetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kaalyeet eng' ye neegitee ineendet. Tuchei peet komugul, Ak komenyei kwenutap tigigoikyik.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ak ki le agobo Joseph, “Iberuurot eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emennyi; Amu tuguuk che korooron kot che po roptap kipsengwet, ak amu rewoot ak rireet ne mi kurere." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ingiberuur eng' tuguuk che korooron kot che po logoegap asiista, ak tuguuk che korooron kot che po ruroteetap arawek." 
Deuteronomy33:15 Ingiberuur eng' tuguuk che eecheen miising' che po tuloonoogap keny, ak tuguuk che korooron che po tuloonook che mengeechen che po koigeny." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Iberuurot amu tuguuk che korooron che po ng'wony ak nyiennyi, ak mageet ne myee ne po ineendet ne ki menyei sondiit. Ingonyonji metitap Joseph perurto, ak eng' metitap ineendet ne ki kitabaane tupchosyekyik." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Twateiyot ne punu kirginnyi kotinyei toroornatet; ak kuinoikyik ko kuinoigap soet. Toortoe chooto pororyosyek tugul agoi ole poochin ng'wony. Chooto tamanusyegap eliphusyegap Ephraim, ak chooto eliphuusyek che po Manasseh.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Yeityo kole Musa agobo Zebulun, “Paibaitu, ee Zebulun, eng' mandaeng'ung'; Ee, ingotunen Issakar, eng' emaisyek." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Kuurei icheek pororyosyek kobwa tulweet, si kogoito eng' olooto tiseiywek che po imanda. Amu chuchuni icheek chaang'indap nyanjosyek, ak konoraik che ung'ootiin che po ng'aniek.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Kingo tar kole agobo Gad, “Iberuurot ineendet ne ibaroi Gad, meng'iisyei ineendet ko uu ng'etundo ne kotoy. Pachei euut, ee, ak metit parak." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Ki lewenjigei kebeberta ne po tai, amu ki kigonor eng' olooto kebebertap ne igoitoi ng'atuutik. Ki nyo kobooto pounigap piik, ki yai imandap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kirwoogutikyik eng' Israel.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Yeityo kole agobo Dan, “Aarwetap ng'etundo Dan. Torombenoti kobunu Bashan.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ye rup komwa ni agobo Naphtali kole, “Ee Naphtali ne ki ibiye chameet, ak ne nyiitaat kaberuretap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ingobunjin cherongo ak murot tai.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ak ki le agobo Asher, “Ingiberuurchi Asher lagok; ingochamak ineendet eng' che tupcho, ak ingorooch keldanyi mwaita." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Egu kweoniguk kariik ak sugunonik, ak tebyei kimnateng'ung' ko uu peetuusyeguk.”" 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Ee Jesurun, ma mi ne uu Kamuktaindet, ne laanyei kipsengwet si kotoretin, ak laanyei parak eng' telunatennyi." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Meng'ateng'ung' Kamuktaindet ne po koigeny, ak kanabin eunek che po koigeny. Toortoi puunik eng' taing'ung'. Ineendet ne leen, ‘Ng'em icheeget.’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Meng'iisyei anyun Israel eng' kaalyeet, Kondap peek ne po Jakobo ineegei. Eng' emet ne po peek ak divaik. Ee, isau kipsengwetisyekyik rewoot." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Ee Israel, igasigei: Ogergei ak ng'oo, pororyet ne ki sar Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ineendet ne long'eet ne toretin, ak ko rotweng'ung' po chok, ne po telunateng'ung'! Yaigei puuniguk koigei che kase iit, si ityech oldinwekwak che sutotin.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Kingo pata, kotogosta anyun `Musa eng' warengetap Moab, kwo tulweetap Nebo agoi paragutap Piska, ne tokyingei Jeriko. Ki iboorchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet emet komugul ne po Gilead, agoi Dan," 
Deuteronomy34:2 Naphtali komugul, emetap Ephraim ak Manasseh ak emet komugul ne po Judah agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian ne mi cherongo." 
Deuteronomy34:3 Ki iboorchi murot tai ak warenget ne po atebweet ne po Jeriko, nganaseet ne mi tiironigap sosik agoi Zoar." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Yeityo koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Emoni ne ki ayosyechi Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo aleenji, ‘Agoochini iyoteng'ung'.’ Kaagoonin anyun igeer eng' konyeguk ago melandoi oliindo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Ki me anyun `Musa kiboityotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto eng' emetap Moab ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Deuteronomy34:6 Ak ki tupchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa atebweet eng' emetap Moab ole tokyingei Beth-peor. Ago ama mi chii ne ingen kererinnyi agoi rani. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Kiga kotar `Musa kenyiisyek pogol ak tiptem ye kimeei. Ki ma Kor ama igeskei kimnateennyi. 
Deuteronomy34:8 Ki riirchi piigap Israel Musa eng' warengetap Moab peetuusyek sosom. Ki igeskei anyun peetuusyegap kateiyet ak riirek agobo Musa. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ki nyiitaat Joshua weeriitap Nun muguleldo ne po utaatyet. Amu kiga kogonoor Musa eunekyik ineendet. Ki kas iit anyun lagogap `Israel ineendet ak ki yai ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ki nyiitaat Joshua weeriitap Nun muguleldo ne po utaatyet. Amu kiga kogonoor Musa eunekyik ineendet. Ki kas iit anyun lagogap `Israel ineendet ak ki yai ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Deuteronomy34:10 Tomo kobiit eng' Israel maotyot ne uu Musa ne ki nai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kimni; 
Deuteronomy34:11 eng' kaboorunoik tugul, ak kwang'utik, che ki iyooktoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koyai eng' emetap Misiri, eng' Pharaoh, eng' otwogikyik tugul ak eng' emennyi komugul;" 
Deuteronomy34:12 Eng' euut komugul ne kiim ak kamuiset komugul ne oo, ko ki yai Musa eng' taitap Israel tugul." 
Joshua1:1 Kingo kagome `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kong'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua weeriitap Nun kiboityotap Musa koleenji," 
Joshua1:2 “Kogome otwogindennyu Musa. Ara ng'eet anyun nguno inyee ak pichu tugul, olandae ainooni po Jordan, ak obe emet ne agoochini icheeget, piigap Israel." 
Joshua1:3 Komosta age tugul ole katyech keelyekwok, ko kaagoonok ko uu ye ki amwachi Musa." 
Joshua1:4 Kobooch surkwen ak Lebanon agoi aineet ne oo, nooto ko aineet ne po Yufrets, emet komugul ne po Hitik agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian ne tokyingei cherongo ko egu koreng'wong'." 
Joshua1:5 Ma piitu chii ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taing'ung' peetuusyek tugul kotee isabe. Ko uu ye ki ami kobooto Musa, ko uu nooto ami kobooten. Ma meteen anan abagaakteen." 
Joshua1:6 Kimitu ak inyiganitu amu igoochini pichu konam emet ne ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwak ale agoochini. 
Joshua1:7 Kimitu ak inyiganitu miising', keer iman ile keyai ko uu ng'atuutik tugul che king'atin otwogindennyu Musa. Amemaste iwe eutap tai anan ko murot kaataam si kobiit kiberuurin miising' eng' oldo age tugul ole iwendi." 
Joshua1:8 Amat komanda bukuini po ng'atuutik eng' kuting'ung', ago ibwaat peet ak kemoi si iriip ak iyai ko uu tugul che ki kisirchi bukuiniito. Ngiriip, iyaei anyun oreng'ung' kotunen ak kiberuurin miising'." 
Joshua1:9 Tos ma anee ne ki ang'atiin? Kimitu ak inyiganitu. Meiywei anan itoptoben amu mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobooten eng' ui tugul ole iwendi.” 
Joshua1:10 Ki ng'at anyun `Joshua kiptainigap piik koleenji," 
Joshua1:11 “Obun kwenutap nganaseet ak ong'at piik oleenji, ‘Ochop amitwogik, amu kotom kogeskei peetuusyek somogu, olandoe Jordan si onam emet ne koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kobunjook.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Ki ng'alaalji `Joshua ooreetap Reuben, ooreetap Gad ak kebebertap ooreetap Manasseh koleenji," 
Joshua1:13 “Obwaat ng'olyoot ne ki ng'ataak `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kamuung'et ak koonok emoni.’"
