Joshua1:14 Tebee osotikwok, lagokwok ak kiyagiik emet ne ki koonok Musa eng' Jordan pitoniin. Ago olandoi okweek nyigoonik tugul ondoe tupchosyekwok ko kaolaach kariik si otoret icheek." 
Joshua1:15 Otoret icheek agoi kogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tupchosyekwok kamuung'et ko uu okweek, agoi konam ak icheek emet ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'. Ye ibata oweege obwa emeng'wong' ak onam kobunjook, emet ne ki koonok Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jordan pitoniin ole chorunee asiista.”" 
Joshua1:16 Kowolji `icheek Joshua koleenji, “Kiyae chooto tugul keng'atech, ak kibendi olda age tugul ole keyooktech keebe." 
Joshua1:17 Ko uu ye ki kigase iit Musa eng' tuguuk tugul, kegasin iit aginye ko uu nooto. Ingotep kityo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobooten, ko uu ye ki mi kobooto Musa." 
Joshua1:18 Chii age tugul ne kabisto chooto ing'ate, ama kas iit ng'aleeguk, kiy age tugul ne keng'at, kebarei. Kimitu ak inyiganitu miising'.”" 
Joshua2:1 Ki iyookto Joshua weeriitap Nun piik aeng' eng' Shitim koba eng' ung'oot kosegei emet. Ki ng'at icheek koleenji, “Oba ogeer emet komugul, miising' ko Jeriko.” Ki pa anyun icheek ak ki it kootap chepkugoniot ne kigainennyi ko Rahab ak koruiyo yooto." 
Joshua2:2 Ki kimwachi laitoryatap Jeriko keleenji, “Keero, kait emoni kemouni piigap Israel, kobwa kosegei emet.”" 
Joshua2:3 Ki iyookto `laitoryat piik koba koleenji Rahab “Imong'u kobwa saang' pichoo ko kabwa koong'ung', amu kobwa si kosegei emet komugul.”" 
Joshua2:4 Ago ki imut kwonyooto pichooto aeng' kouny yeityo kole, “Ee, kobwanjo iman pichooto, ago komaanai ole kobunu." 
Joshua2:5 Kongoimen, ko kait sait ne kigeree ormariichet, ko komanda pichooto. Ole koba pichooto ko mangen, osup ochakte, amu omuuchi onam.”" 
Joshua2:6 Kiga komut `ineendet icheek koba koot parak ak kotuge mobegap mabuteek che kiga kotet komyee eng' koot. 
Joshua2:7 Ki pa anyun pichooto koosup icheek eng' ooreet kotokyigei Jordan kot koit tabarwek ole kilandoe. Ak ne matyanit ko kata kobendi pichooto ki isubi icheek, keger ormariichet." 
Joshua2:8 Ye kitom koruiyo segeik, kotogosta kwonyooto kwo ole mi icheek eng' koot parak," 
Joshua2:9 ak koleenji, “Angen ale ki koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emoni, ak ki koityech arageneet agobo okweek, ak komeyo mugulelwegap meng'iigap emoni tugul eng' taing'wong'." 
Joshua2:10 Kigegas ole ki iyaamnda `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Araraita ne Piriir eng' taing'wong' ye ki obwane obunu Misiri, ak kiit ne ki oite laitorinik aeng' che po Amorik, icheeget Sihon ak Og che ki mi Jordan pitoniin che ki obar ogesu." 
Joshua2:11 Ye ki ngegas agobo nooto, kogimeiyo mugulelwekyok ak ki mata komi nyiganateet eng' chii age tugul amu okweek. Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko iman Kamuktaindet eng' parak kipsengwet ak eng' ng'wony." 
Joshua2:12 Asaok nguno ale, oyosyeiwo eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye kayaiywok ne myee ko tuun oyachi ne myee ak okweek kootap abba. Ogoono kaboorunet ne po iman," 
Joshua2:13 amat obar kwandanyu ak kamennyu, tupchosyekyuk che weeriik ak che tiibiik kobooto tuguukwak tugul, ak osaru saboonwekyok eng' meet.”" 
Joshua2:14 Koleenji `pichooto ineendet, “Igeeri saboonwekwok saboonwekyok! Ngot ko mong'ande poisyoninyo, ko ye tuun koonech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emet, keyaun ne myee ak ne po iman.”" 
Joshua2:15 Ki choortae anyun icheek rogoet kobun tirisyet. Amu ki mi koonnyi irimeetap nganaseet parak ak ki menyei irimonooto parak. 
Joshua2:16 Ki leenji icheek, “Oba tulweet si ma nyoorwok piik che cheeng'otok. Ounygei eng' yooto peetuusyek somok agoi koweek piik che cheeng'otok. Ye ibata obe anyun pandang'wong'.”" 
Joshua2:17 Ki leenji `pichooto ineendet, “Manamech ng'oogistap kayasyoning'ung' ni kesimjech kiyasyeun." 
Joshua2:18 Keero, ye ki itu emoni iratyi porowoni piriir tirisyet ne kechoortaenech, ak iyum kobwa koong'ung' kwandang'ung' kamenng'ung', tupchosyeguk ak piiguk tugul che po kootap kwandang'ung'." 
Joshua2:19 Ngomanda chii age tugul eng' kurgeetap koong'ung' kwo ooreet, kotebee korotiikyik metinnyi, ak ma namech ng'oogisto. Ago ngot kotwa chii eng' acheek chii age tugul ne mi kobooten eng' ko, kotebee korotiikyik metowekyok." 
Joshua2:20 Ago ngot ing'ande poisyoninyo koma namech ng'oogistap kayosyeng'ung' ne kesimjech kiyasyeun.” 
Joshua2:21 Kowol ineendet, “Ingoyaak ko uu ng'aleekwok.” Ak kiunda koba ak koba icheek pandanywa. Ak kiratyi anyun porowet ne piriir tirisyet." 
Joshua2:22 Ki pa anyun pichooto agoi tulweet ak kotebee olooto peetuusyek somok, agoi koweek pichooto ki isuubi icheek. Ki cheeng'at pichooto ki isubi icheek eng' ooreet tugul ago ma nyoor." 
Joshua2:23 Ki week anyun pichooto aeng'u kochoorgei eng' tulweet. Ki pa kolanda, koba kot koit ole mi Joshua weeriitap Nun; ak ki mwachi ineendet tuguuk tugul che kagoityi icheek." 
Joshua2:24 Ak ki leenji `pichooto Joshua, “Iman ki konde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emet tugul eunekyok, ak ko ne siirei nooto, kobegu kowoi piigap emonooto eng' tainnyo.”" 
Joshua3:1 Kong'eet anyun Joshua karon miising', ak koba eng' Shitim agoi koit Jordan, `ineendet ak piigap Israel tugul. Kiruiyo yooto kotom kolanda." 
Joshua3:2 Kingo pata peetuusyek somogu, koba kiptainik kobun kwenutap nganaseet" 
Joshua3:3 ak kong'at piik koleenji, “Ye ogeer moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak Lawiik che tisiik koibei, ong'eetyee anyun eng' ole omi ak osup." 
Joshua3:4 Osup si kobiit onai ooreet ne nyoljinok obun, amu tomo obune orani. Ago oloochiine ak moinget eng' olo po mitainik eliphuut agenge; amoriikyi.”" 
Joshua3:5 Ki leenji `Joshua piik, “Oanyinygei okweek; amu yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwang'utik mutai eng' kwenung'wong'.”" 
Joshua3:6 Ki ng'alaalji `Joshua tisiik koleenji, “Oganap moingetap arorutyet ak oip olande ondoe piik.” Koip anyun moingetap arorutyet ak koba kondoe piik." 
Joshua3:7 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua, “Atau rani atoroorin eng' taitap Israel tugul, si kobiit konai icheek kole ami kobooten ko uu ye ki ami kobooto Musa." 
Joshua3:8 Ng'at tisiik che ibei moingetap arorutyet ileenji, ‘Ye oit ngeguutap peegap Jordan, otononse.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Koleenji anyun `Joshua piigap Israel, “Obwa yu si ogas ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Joshua3:10 Ki testai Joshua kole, “Onae eng' ni ole mi kwenung'wong' Kamuktaindet ne sabei, ak oonei ineendet eng' taing'wong' ne matiny Kanaanik, Hitik, Hibik, Perisik, Girgasik, Amorik ak Jebusik." 
Joshua3:11 Ogeero, choorchingei Jordan moingetap arorutyetap Kiptaiyat ne po ng'wony komugul kondoenak kolandoi." 
Joshua3:12 Olewen anyun piik taman ak aeng' eng' ortinwegap Israel, chiito agenge eng' ooreet age tugul." 
Joshua3:13 Ye tononie keelyegap tisiik che ibei moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kiptaiyatap ng'wony komugul peegap Jordan, kopcheigei ak kotononso peek che punu meto kototen.”" 
Joshua3:14 Ye kingo ng'eetyo piik eng' emaisyekwak koba kolandae Jordan, ko ki indoe tisiik che ibei moingetap arorutyet." 
Joshua3:15 Ago ye kingo it Jordan che ki ibei moinget ak kingo tyech tabandap peek, (kinyiie peek aineetap Jordan kot kosiir ngeguusyekyik tugul eng' peetuusyek tugul che po kesisyet)" 
Joshua3:16 kotononso anyun peek che punu meto koba parak. Kitoten eng' ole loo eng' Adam, nganaseet ne neegitee Zarethan, ko peek che kichoortagei kobendi araraitap Arabah, nooto po Munyuk, ko ki igestagei. Ki ilanda anyun piik kolong'ji ole tokyingei Jeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Kitononso tisiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ole yaamaat eng' kwenutap Jordan, ye kilondoi Israel tugul, ak ki landa agoi kogestagei pororyet tugul eng' ole yaamaat." 
Joshua4:1 Ye kingo kagolanda pororyet tugul eng' Jordan, kong'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji," 
Joshua4:2 “Olewen anyun murenik taman ak aeng' eng' piik, chii agenge agenge kobun oor age tugul," 
Joshua4:3 ak ong'at icheek oleenji, ‘Okwei koik taman ak aeng' eng' kwenutap Jordan ole katononie keelyegap tisiik, ak oip onde ng'wony eng' ole ip omuung'e oruitosi kemouni.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Ki kuur `Joshua pichooto taman ak aeng', che kiga kolewen eng' piigap Israel kobun ooreet age tugul," 
Joshua4:5 ak koleenji, “Oba ondoe moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kot oit kwenutap Jordan. Ingoip chii age tugul eng' okweek koita eng' tigikyennyi ko uu koitetap ortinwegap piigap Israel," 
Joshua4:6 si kobiit koek niito kaboorunet eng' kwenung'wong'. Ye tuun teebenak lagokwok eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei kole, ‘Ibooru nee koichu?’" 
Joshua4:7 Oleenji amu kipcheigei peegap Jordan eng' taitap moingetap arorutyet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ye kilong'une moingonooto Jordan, kotononso peegap ainanooto kototen. Egu koichu anyun kabwaatet eng' piigap Israel koigeny.”" 
Joshua4:8 Ki yai anyun piigap Israel ko uu ye ki ng'at `Joshua. Ki kwei koik taman ak aeng' eng' kwenutap Jordan, ko uu che ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua, che tee koitetap ortinwegap piigap Israel. Ki ip kot koit ole ki pa koruiyo, ak konde ng'wony eng' olooto." 
Joshua4:9 Ki iruruuch anyun Joshua koichooto taman ak aeng' eng' kwenutap Jordan eng' ole kitonone keelyegap tisiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyet; ak mi olooto agoi ra. 
Joshua4:10 Kitonone kwenutap Jordan tisiik che ki ibei moinget agoi kobata tuguuk tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua komwachi piik, ko uu tugul che ki ng'at `Musa Joshua. Ki igirgir piik kolanda," 
Joshua4:11 ak kingo kagolanda piik tugul kogestagei, kolanda anyun moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto tisiik, kogeerei piik tugul." 
Joshua4:12 Ki landa piigap Israel kondoe weeriigap Reuben, weeriigap Gad ak kebebertap ooreetap Manasseh, kolaachi kariik ko uu ye ki kamwachi `Musa icheek." 
Joshua4:13 Ki landa piik olo po eliphuusyek artam che po lugeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi warengetap Jeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Ki itoroor `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua eng' peetuunooto eng' taitap Israel tugul. Ki iywei `ineendet piigap Israel eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi, ko uu ye ki iywei Musa." 
Joshua4:15 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji," 
Joshua4:16 “Ng'at tisiik che ibei moingetap paornateet kotogos eng' Jordan.” 
Joshua4:17 Ki ng'at anyun `Joshua tisiik koleenji, “Otogosu eng' Jordan.”" 
Joshua4:18 Ye kingo togos tisiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jordan, ak kotyech emet ne yaamaat, koweekyigei peegap Jordan komostanywa ak kosiir ngeguusyekyik tugul ko uu eng' tai." 
Joshua4:19 Ki togos piik eng' Jordan eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawetap tai ak koteech emaisyek eng' Gilgal, kong'asiis ne po kiwotetap Jeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Ki iruruuch Joshua koichooto taman ak aeng' eng' Gilgal, chooto ki ibune Jordan." 
Joshua4:21 Ki ng'alaalji piigap Israel koleenji, “Ye tuun teebee lagokwok kwanisyekwak eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei koleenji ibooru nee koichu," 
Joshua4:22 oarorchi icheek konai kole kilong'une Israel Jordan yu ko kagoyaam 
Joshua4:23 amu ki yai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' Araraita ne Piriir koyaam eng' tainnyo agoi kelong'u," 
Joshua4:24 si kobiit konai piik tugul che po ng'wony kole kiim eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' koigeny.” 
Joshua5:1 Ye kingo kas laitorinik tugul che po Amorik che ki mi komostap cherongo eng' Jordan, ak laitorinik tugul che po Kanaanik che ki neegitee nyanjetap Mediterenian kole ki yai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aineetap Jordan koyaam eng' taitap piigap Israel kot kolandae, kobek mugulelwekwak kot ko mata kong'et nyiganateet eng' icheek amu piigap Israel." 
Joshua5:2 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua eng' peetuusyechooto koleenji, “Yai rotoogap sengwetoik che uueen, ak imuratan kogeny piigap Israel.”" 
Joshua5:3 Ki yai anyun `Joshua rotoogap sengwetoik ak koyatita piigap Israel eng' tulweetap Kamuratanet. 
Joshua5:4 Kiit ne ki igoochi Joshua koyatitais ko ni; murenik tugul che ki mang'une Misiri, tugul che ki po lugeet, ko ki pek eng' surkwen eng' ooreet ye kingo kagomong' eng' Misiri." 
Joshua5:5 Nganda kiga kiyatita piik tugul che kigamong' eng' olooto, ko tugul che ki kisikyi surkwen eng' ooreet ye ki mong'u eng' Misiri ko kitom keyatita." 
Joshua5:6 Ki pendat piigap Israel kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen kot kobek pororyet tugul. Ki pek murenigap lugeet che ki mang'une Misiri amu ma kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kiga koyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kole ma chamjin kogeer emet ne kiga koyasyechi kogoochi kwanisyekwak, emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo." 
Joshua5:7 Ki imuratan `Joshua lagokwak si kogeer icheek, amu ki tomo kimuratan; ki ma kimuratan eng' ooreet." 
Joshua5:8 Kingo kagimuratan pororyet tugul, kotebee komoswekwak eng' nganaseet agoi koyam komong'." 
Joshua5:9 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji, “Kamilde aistaenok rani teweernatetap Misiri.” Ki kiguure anyun yooto Gilgal agoi ra." 
Joshua5:10 Ki teech piigap Israel emaisyekwak eng' Gilgal, ak koyai paska koskoleny eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawet eng' warengetap Jeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Eng' peetuunooto ne ki isubi paska, ko ki am piigap Israel kesuutigap emet che po kenyiit, magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek ak peek che kagigeel." 
Joshua5:12 Kitilak mana eng' peetuunooto ki iamei kesuutigap emonooto che po kenyiit. Mata konyoor kogeny piigap Israel mana; ki am eng' kenyinooto amitwogigap emetap Kanaan. 
Joshua5:13 Ye ki neegit koit Joshua Jeriko, ko kitabendo ak ki keer kotononi chiito ko katokyigei ineendet kotinyei rotwetap chok eng' eunnyi ne kang'us. Ki wo Joshua ole miitei ineendet ak koteebe koleenji, “Ii nenyo anan ii po puunikyok?”" 
Joshua5:14 Kowol chiichooto kole, “Achicha, kaanyo nguno aegu kiptaiyatap lugeet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ki ing'uruuk Joshua kot koit ng'wony togeennyi kolas ak koleenji, “Imwachini nee otwogindeng'ung', ee kiptaiyandennyu?”" 
Joshua5:15 Ki mwachi `kiptaiyat ne po lugeetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji, “Icheru kweoniguk eng' keelyeguk, amu tiliil yo itonone.” Ak ki yai Joshua ko uu nooto." 
Joshua6:1 Kiga kiger Jeriko kot amu piigap Israel. Ki ma komandoi chii anan kochut oriit. 
Joshua6:2 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji, “Keero, kande eung'ung' Jeriko, laitoryandennyi ak murenikyik che po lugeet." 
Joshua6:3 Oyiem nganaseet; murenik tugul che po lugeet omuuti nganaseet konyil agenge. Oyae ko uu nooto eng' peetuusyek lo. 
Joshua6:4 Ngo ip tisiik tisabu igondisyek tisap che po kuinoigap mengichik eng' taitap moinget. Eng' peetuut ne po tisap, omuut nganaseet konyil tisap ak koguut tisiik igondisyek." 
Joshua6:5 Ye ogas cheetap igoondit ko kagoguut tisiik koek keny, kowaakyo piik tugul waagaat ne oo, ak koluul irimeetap nganaseet kwo ng'wony ak kwo chii age tugul kotogosta kotoorchigei ye kageer.”" 
Joshua6:6 Ki kuur `Joshua weeriitap Nun tisiik koleenji, “Oip moingetap arorutyet, ak ingoip tisiik tisabu igondisyek tisap che po kuinoigap mengichik kondoe moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Joshua6:7 Kong'at piik koleenji, “Oba ak oyiem nganaseet ak ingondoe murenik che ilaachi kariik moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Joshua6:8 Ko uu ye ki mwachi `Joshua piik, ko ki pa tisiik tisabu che ki ibei igondisyek tisap che po kuinoigap mengichik kondo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koguutei igondisyek, ak kosubi eng' let moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joshua6:9 Ki indoe murenik che ki ilaachi kariik tisiik che kiguutei igondisyek, ak kosubu piik che kiletu moinget, koguutoti tisiik igondisyek ak kobendi." 
Joshua6:10 Ki ng'at `Joshua piik koleenji, “Amat owaach anan otwegu, anan komang'une ng'olyoo kutiswekwok kot koit peetuut ne aleenjok owaach, owaach anyun.”" 
Joshua6:11 Ki ip anyun moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kimuute nganaseet konyil agenge, ak ye ibata, kobwa kemoi nganaseet koruiyo." 
Joshua6:12 Ki ng'eet Joshua karon miising', ak koip tisiik moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joshua6:13 Ki pa ko uu nooto kotugul tisiik tisabu che ki ibei igondisyek tisap che po kuinoigap mengichik kondoe moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koguutei igondisyek. Ki indoe icheek murenik che ki ilaachi kariik ak ki isup piik che kiletu moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koguutoti tisiik igondisyek ak kobendi. 
Joshua6:14 Kiyiem nganaseet peetuut ne po aeng' konyil agenge, yeityo koweektagei koba nganaseet; ak ki yai ko uu nooto peetuusyek lo." 
Joshua6:15 Eng' peetuut ne po tisap, kong'eetyo karon miising' ko kairir emet, ak komuut nganaseet konyil tisap. Peetuunooto kityo ne kiyiem nganaseet konyil tisap." 
Joshua6:16 Eng' ne po tisap koguutei tisiik igondisyek, koleenji `Joshua piik, “Owaach anyun amu kagogoonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganasani!" 
Joshua6:17 Nganaseet ak tugul che mi oriitinnyi kitabaanjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. King'emei kobatee Rahab chepkugoniot ak tugul che mi koonnyi amu kiuny piik che ki kiyogu. 
Joshua6:18 Oriipkei okweeget eng' kiy ne itabaanat si ma ye kaotabaan, kota onam kogeny si oyai nganaseetap Israel koek ne chuboot ak koityi nyalil." 
Joshua6:19 Ago fedhaisyek, thahabu tugul ak tuguuk tugul che po sugunonik ak che po kariik ko kitabaanjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak keipu chooto kobwa ole kigonoree tuguugap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Joshua6:20 Ki waakyo piik ak koguut tisiik igondisyek. Kingo kas piik cheetap igoondit, kowaakyo eng' waagaat ne oo. Eng' yooto kogiluul irimeet koobutyi ng'wony ak ki laany piik koba nganaseet oriit. Ki wo chii tugul tai kotoorchigei ye kageerei ak konyaban." 
Joshua6:21 Kibaree rotwetap chok tugul che ki mi nganaseet kogees: murenik ak kwonyiik, ne ming'in ak ne oos, tany, keechiir ak sigiryo." 
Joshua6:22 Ki leenji `Joshua pichooto aeng' che kigaba kosegei emet, “Oba kootap chepkugoniot ak oomutu komong' tugul che mi koonnyi ak tugul che tinyei ko uu ye ki oyosyechi.”" 
Joshua6:23 Ki pa ko anyun murenjoto aeng' segeik, ak koomut Rahab komong' kobooto kwandanyi, kamennyi, tupchosyekyik ak tugul che ki tinyei; ki imut komong' saang' tilyonutikyik tugul ak icheek. Ki pa ak kotebee saang'utap nganaseetap Israel." 
Joshua6:24 Ye kingobata, kobeel nganaseet kobooto tuguuk tugul che ki mi oriit. Ago tuguugap fedhaisyek, thahabu, tuguuk che po sugunonik ak che po kariik ko ki inde ole kigonoree tuguugap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joshua6:25 Ki pagaach `Joshua Rahab chepkugoniot kosap, kobooto piigap kootap kwandanyi ak tugul che ki tinyei. Ki meng'iis icheek ak Israel agoi ra amu kiuny piik che kigaiyookto Joshua koba kosegei Jeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Ki ng'at `Joshua icheek koyastos kole: “Chuboot eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chii ne ng'eetei koteechei nganasani po Jeriko! Age tugul ne lumei lumeiywondennyi, ko mee taaitanyi, ak age tugul ne lumdoi kurgennyi, ko mee toweennyi.”" 
Joshua6:27 Ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Joshua, ak ki yom emet komugul kalasunennyi." 
Joshua7:1 Ago ki yai chalwok piigap Israel agobo tuguuk che itabaanatiin. Ki ip Akan weeriitap Karmi, weeriitap Sabdi, weeriitap Zerah ne po pororyetap Judah tuguuk alak eng' che itabaanatiin. Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo piigap Israel." 
Joshua7:2 Ki iyookto `Joshua piik eng' Jeriko koba Ai, ne neegitee Beth-aben eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po Bethel komwachi koleenji, “Oba ak osegei emonooto.” Ak ki pa anyun piik kosegei Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Ki week ole ki mi Joshua ak koleenji, “Ng'ering' pichooto, ara amat koba piik tugul. Ingoba piik olo po eliphuusyek aeng' anan ko somok koba kobar Ai.”" 
Joshua7:4 Ki pa piik olo po eliphuusyek somok, ago kimweiso komweune piigap Ai." 
Joshua7:5 Kibaris piigap Ai kobar piigap Israel, piik olo po sosom ak lo ak koon eng' ormariichet kot koit Sebarik, ak kobarat korektoi. Kimeiyo miising' kot mugulelwegap piik." 
Joshua7:6 Kigereer Joshua ngoroikyik ak kong'uruuk kot koit ng'wony togeennyi, ak konde temburyek metowekwak, ineendet ak poisyegap Israel eng' taitap moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koskoleny." 
Joshua7:7 Ki le Joshua, “Pwo, wee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Amu nee si imutu pichu kolong'une Jordan, igoochech eunegap Amorik kelusye? Kita kaigai kemeny Jordan pitoniin!" 
Joshua7:8 Ee Kiptaiyat, amwae nee anyun ye kagomweune Israel puunikwak!" 
Joshua7:9 Tuun kasei Kanaanik ak tugul che menyei emet agobo kiito, koyiemech ak kotil kainennyo kobet eng' ng'wony. Tos iite nee kaineng'ung' ne oo?”" 
Joshua7:10 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua, “Ng'eet! Amu nee si ibutyi ng'wony ing'uruuge ko uu ni?" 
Joshua7:11 Kogoyai Israel tengekto, ee kogobistoe kayomisennyu ne kiga ang'at ak kogoip tuguuk eng' che itabaanatiin, kogochoorso, koberberis ak kogonde ole mi tuguukwak." 
Joshua7:12 Nooto anyun amu nee si ma imuuchi piigap Israel kotononso eng' taitap puunikwak, komweune puunikwak amu kagoek che chubootiin. Ma ami kobootok kogeny ngot ko mong'em eng' kwenung'wong' tuguuchooto itabaanatiin." 
Joshua7:13 Ng'eet ianyiny piik ak ileenji, Oanyinygei agobo mutai, amu kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, ‘Mi tuguuk che itabaanatiin kwenung'ung', ee Israel. Memuuchi itonone taitap puuniguk agoi oiste chooto itabaanatiin eng' kwenung'wong'." 
Joshua7:14 Kimutwok karon oriigu kobee pororyosyekwok. Pororyet ne namei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koriigu kobeen ortinwekwak. Ak ooreet ne namei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koriigu kobeen kooriikwak, ak koot ne kanam `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koriigu chiito agenge agenge." 
Joshua7:15 Chii ne kinyoorchin kiit ne itabaanat, kebeelei eng' maat kobooto tuguuk tugul che tinyei amu kobistoe kayomisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak amu koyai abusnateet eng' Israel.’ ”" 
Joshua7:16 Kong'eet anyun `Joshua karon miising' ak komut Israel koriik kobee pororyosyekwak, ak ki kinam pororyetap Judah." 
Joshua7:17 Ki imut `ineendet ortinwegap Judah koriik ak ki kinam ooreetap Seraik. Ki imut ooreetap Seraik koriik konyonune chiito agenge agenge ak ki kinam Sabdi. 
Joshua7:18 Ki imut koonnyi konyonune chiito agenge agenge ak ki kinam Akan, weeriitap Karmi, weeriitap Sabdi, weeriitap Zerah, ne po pororyetap Judah." 
Joshua7:19 Koleenji Joshua Akan, “Weeriinnyu asaain ale, igoochi toroornatet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel. Ng'aang'ji ineendet ak imwaiwo nguno kiit ne koiyai, mat iung'ena.”" 
Joshua7:20 Ki wolji `Akan Joshua koleenji, “Eng' iman ko koayachi chalwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ak koayai ko uu ni ak ko uu ni." 
Joshua7:21 Kinga keer eng' tuguuk che ki kiluul ngoryeet ne karaaran ne po Babilon ak shekelisyek pogol aeng' che po fedha, ak thahabu ne nyigiisindanyi ko shekelisyek konom, agase myat anyun ak aip. Ung'ootiin tuguuchooto eng' ng'wony eng' kwenutap emainnyu ak ko tabanu ng'wony fedha eng' tuguuchooto.”" 
Joshua7:22 Ki iyookto anyun `Joshua piik, ak ki rwai koba emait; ak ogeero kiung'otin eng' emainnyi ak kitabanu fedha ng'wony." 
Joshua7:23 Ki inem eng' kwenutap emait ak koipchi Joshua, ak piigap Israel tugul. Ki inde ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joshua7:24 Yeityo konam `Joshua ak Israel tugul Akan weeriitap Zerah kobooto fedha, ngoryeet ak thahabu, weeriikyik, tiibiikyik, tuukyik, sigirokyik, keechiirekyik, emainnyi ak tugul che ki tinyei ak komut koba atebweetap Akor." 
Joshua7:25 Ki leenji Joshua, “Amu nee si inyalilech? Inyaliilin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani.” Ak kilach Israel tugul ineendet eng' koik; ki peel eng' maat ak kolach eng' koik." 
Joshua7:26 Ki iruruuch koik eng' paragunnyi ak mi koichooto agoi ra. Ki istogei anyun nereegek eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki kiguure anyun yooto atebweetap Akor agoi ra. 
Joshua8:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji, “Meiywei anan komein mugulelel, ago imut piik tugul che po lugeet ak ong'eetyee otogoste Ai. Keero, kaande eung'ung' laitoryatap Ai kobooto piikyik, nganasennyi ak emennyi." 
Joshua8:2 Iyachini Ai ak laitoryandennyi ko uu ye ki iyachi Jeriko ak laitoryandennyi. Ago tuguukyik ak tuukyik che kiluulei, oipchinigei kobunjook koek parunenik. Ng'at anyun piik koribisyo eng' ole po nganaseet let.”" 
Joshua8:3 Ki ng'eet anyun Joshua ak piik tugul che po lugeet koba kobookyi Ai. Ki lewen `Joshua piik eliphuusyek sosom, murenik che kiimeen che nyigoonen ak koyookto koba kemoi." 
Joshua8:4 Ak kong'at icheek koleenji, “Ogas komyee; oribistosi si obookyi nganaseet, eng' nganaseet ole po let; amat olooegitu miising' eng' nganasanooto, ago ochoboge okweek tugul." 
Joshua8:5 Ariikyini nganaseet anee ak piik tugul che mi kobooto, ak ye mong' kobokyech, ko uu eng' tai, kemwei eng' tainnywa." 
Joshua8:6 Mongu icheek koonwech kot kirete eng' nganaseet, amu mwaei koleen, ‘Kamweenech, ko uu yuginye.’ Ye kimwei ko uu nooto eng' tainnywa;" 
Joshua8:7 ong'eetyee eng' ribiseet ak onam nganaseet, amu indoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eunekwok." 
Joshua8:8 Ye kaonam nganaseet, obeel; oyaei ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ogeero, kaang'atak”" 
Joshua8:9 Ki iyookto anyun `Joshua icheek koba; ak ki pa koribisyo kotebee kwenutap Bethel ak Ai, komostap cherongo ne po Ai; ago ki ru Joshua ole mi piik kemounooto." 
Joshua8:10 Ki ng'eet Joshua karon miising' ak koyum piik, kitogosta ineendet ak poisyegap Israel kondoe piik koba Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Ki togosta piik tugul che po lugeet che ki mi kobooto ineendet ak ki pa koriikta ole pooch nganaseet ak koba koteekso eng' murot kaataam ne po Ai, ki mi atebweet kwenunnyi ak Ai." 
Joshua8:12 Ki imut piik `Joshua olo po eliphuusyek muut, ak konde koribisyo eng' kwenutap Bethel ak Ai eng' komostap cherongo ne po nganaseet." 
Joshua8:13 Ki inde piik anyun kotebi ko uu nooto, lugeet tugul ne ki mi murot kaataam ne po nganaseet ak piikwak tugul che kiribistos che ki mi komostap cherongo ne po nganaseet. Ki wo Joshua kemounooto kot koit kwenutap atebweet." 
Joshua8:14 Ye kingo keer laitoryatap Ai kochirchiren, kong'eetyo karon miising' ak komanda piigap nganaseet koba kobargei ak Israel, ineendet ak piikyik tugul eng' sait ne kiga kichop, eng' ole tokyingei Arabah. Ago ki ma nai kole mi piik che ribistos si kobookyi ineendet eng' nganaseet let." 
Joshua8:15 Ak ki yaigei Joshua ak Israel tugul ko uu yo kagiterter eng' tainnywa, ak ki mwei kobun ooreetap surkwen." 
Joshua8:16 Ak ki kiguur piik tugul che ki mi nganaseet koba koon icheek, ak ye ki oone `icheek Joshua ko ki kireto icheek kolooegitu eng' nganaseet." 
Joshua8:17 Ki ma komi chii ne ki ng'et eng' Ai anan ko Bethel, ne ki ma wo koon Israel. Ak ki pagaach nganaseet ko seng'eng'at yeityo koon Israel." 
Joshua8:18 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua, “Tokyi Ai ng'otit ne itinye eng' euut, amu andoi eung'ung' nganasaniito.” Ak kitokyi Joshua ng'otit ne ki tinyei eng' eunnyi nganaseet." 
Joshua8:19 Ye kingo tokyi Joshua ng'otit nganaseet, kong'eetyo pichu karibistos eng' chokyinet eng' ole kiribisye ak korwai kotokyigei yooto. Ki pa ak konam nganaseet ak kobeel kochokyi." 
Joshua8:20 Ye kingo kuskong' piigap Ai, kogeer eng' kwong'eet kotogostoi iyeto kowendi parak eng' nganaseet. Ki mata kosich kimnateet komwechi komosi anan ko komosi, amu ki week pichu kamwee kobendi surkwen koweekyigei kobookyi pichu kaonu." 
Joshua8:21 Ye kingo keer Joshua ak Israel tugul kole kagonam nganaseet pichu karibistos ak kogeer kotogostoi iyeto eng' nganaseet, koweek anyun ak kobar piigap Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Ki pwa ak icheek che ki mi nganaseet kobargei ak pichooto; kotebee anyun kwenutap `Israel piigap Ai; ki mi alak komosi, komi alak komosi. Ki par `piigap Israel icheek kot koma ituuch agot agenge ne ki ng'et anan kochilil." 
Joshua8:23 Ago ki nam laitoryatap Ai kosabei ak komutyi Joshua. 
Joshua8:24 Kingo kagogees Israel pareetap piik tugul che ki menyei Ai eng' warenget eng' surkwen ole ki oonee icheek, ak kingo kagobutyo tugul eng' rotwetap chok kot kogeskei, koweektagei anyun Israel tugul koba Ai, ak koba kobare Ai rotwetap chok." 
Joshua8:25 Murenik ak kwonyiik tugul che ki kibar eng' piigap Ai eng' peetuunooto ko ki eliphuusyek taman ak aeng'. 
Joshua8:26 Amu ma aruny Joshua eunnyi ne kigaiito koname ng'otit agoi kobar kogees piik tugul che ki menyei Ai. 
Joshua8:27 Ki kweri Israel tuuga ak parunenigap nganasanooto kobunji ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki kang'at Joshua. 
Joshua8:28 Ki peel Joshua Ai ak koyai koek tulwo ne tebyei agoi, ki ek karaatya ne mi agoi ra." 
Joshua8:29 Ki isonginin laitoryatap Ai eng' keetit kot koimen. Kingo rorokta asiista, kong'at `Joshua kechoor muustonyi eng' keetit konyo ng'wony, ak kowiirchi ole kichutei eng' kurgeetap nganaseet. Ak korurukyi yooto karurugutyet ne oo ne po koik, ne mi agoi ra." 
Joshua8:30 Kiteekyi anyun `Joshua Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kaptisisyet eng' tulweetap Ebal," 
Joshua8:31 ko uu ye ki kang'at `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel ak ko uu ye ki kisir eng' bukuitap ng'atuutigap Musa, kaptisisyetap koik che ma kiwai, che mawai chii eng' karna. Ki igoochi eng' yooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak kieng'ji kagoochinoigap kaalyeet." 
Joshua8:32 Ak eng' yooto, eng' taitap piigap Israel, ko kisir Joshua kosirchi koik ng'atuutigap Musa, che kigagesir." 
Joshua8:33 Kitononso Israel tugul, ne toondet ak ne ki kisikyi kaa, kobooto poisyekwak ak kiptainikwak ak kirwoogikwak, eng' moinget komosi ak komosi eng' taitap tisiik Lawiik, kotoorchindos ak che ibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki imii kebeber taitap tulweetap Gerizim, komi kebeber taitap tulweetap Ebal, ko uu ye ki kang'at Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor korook, kole kiberuure piigap Israel." 
Joshua8:34 Ye ibata kosoman Joshua ng'aleek tugul che po ng'atuutik, kaberuret ak chubisyet, ko uu tugul che ki kisir eng' bukuitap ng'atuutik." 
Joshua8:35 Ma mi ng'olyoo eng' ng'aleek tugul che ki ng'at Musa ne masoman Joshua eng' taitap tuiyet tugul ne po Israel, komi kwonyiik, lagok ak toek che ki mi kwenunnywa." 
Joshua9:1 Ye kingo kas laitorinik tugul (laitorinigap Hitik, Amorik, Kanaanik, Perisik, Hibik, kobooto Jebusik) che ki mi Jordan pitoniin, emetap tuloonook, ak warenget, ak ngeguut tugul ne po araraitap Mediterenian ne mi tai eng' Lebanon," 
Joshua9:2 koyumgei kobargei ak Joshua ak Israel. 
Joshua9:3 Ago kingo kas piigap Gibeon kiit ne ki kayachi `Joshua Jeriko ak Ai," 
Joshua9:4 koyai ng'aalseet ak icheek: ki pa koigei piik che kiyooktoi, ki ip kuniok che oosen eng' sigirokwak, lolotinwegap divaik che oosen che ki kogereer ak ko che kigenabanap." 
Joshua9:5 Ki ilaach kweonik che ki koosegitu che kigeginogin ak kolaach ngoroik che oosen. Magatiinik tugul che ki amitwogikwak ko kiga koyaamyo ak ko kiga koucho. 
Joshua9:6 Ki pa ole mi Joshua eng' nganaseet eng' Gilgal, ak komwachi ineendet ak piigap Israel koleenji, “Ki punu emet ne loo, ara anyun ongeyai arorutyet ak okweek.”" 
Joshua9:7 Koleenji piigap Israel Hibik, “Kale ng'oo momenye kwenunnyo, kimuktoi ano keyai arorutyet ak okweek?”" 
Joshua9:8 Koleenji `icheek Joshua, “Ki otwogiguk.” koteebee `Joshua icheek koleenji, “Oo ng'oo? Ak obunu ano?”" 
Joshua9:9 Kowol kole, “Punu otwogiguk emet ne loo kot amu kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'; amu kigegas etunatennyi ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai eng' Misiri," 
Joshua9:10 ak tuguuk tugul che ki yachi laitorinik aeng' che po Amorik che ki mi Jordan pitoniin, Sihon laitoryatap Hesbon ak Og laitoryatap Bashan ne ki mi Astarot." 
Joshua9:11 Kimwaiwech poisyekyok ak tugul che menyei emennyo kole, Oip amitwogik che po panda; obe otorookte Israel ak oleenji, ‘Ki otwogikwok, obwa anyun si keyai arorutyet ak okweek.’" 
Joshua9:12 Ki kiibu magatinichuchok eng' kooriikyok kota komi ma eng' peetuut ne ki king'eetosi kebwane oling'wong', ago nguno ko ki koyaamyo ak koucho." 
Joshua9:13 Kileelach lolotinwechu kiga kinyiit divaik ak ko nguno ko ki kogereeris. Ki koosegitu ngoroikyok ak kweonikyok amu panda ne kooi kot.” 
Joshua9:14 Ki am icheek amitwogigap pichooto ama teep ng'olyoo kobun kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Joshua9:15 Ki yai Joshua ak icheeget kayanjinetap kaalyeet, ak koarorto kobagaakta pichooto kosapcho, ak ki igimit pounigap tuiyet eng' kayosyet." 
Joshua9:16 Ago kingo pata peetuusyek somogu ko kagoyai arorutyet ak icheek, kogas keele kaagaa ki piigap kokwennywa ak komenyei kwenunnywa." 
Joshua9:17 Ki pa piigap Israel ak koit nganasoogap pichooto eng' peetuutap somok. Nganasokwak ko ki Gibeon, Kepira, Beerot ak Kiriath-Jearim." 
Joshua9:18 Ago ma par `piigap Israel icheek, amu kiga koyasyechi pounigap tuiyet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel. Ki ing'unyng'uny tuiyet komugul agobo pounik." 
Joshua9:19 Ago ki leenji pounik tugul tuiyet komugul, “Ki kiyasyechi icheek eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ara anyun ma kimuuchi ketwa icheek." 
Joshua9:20 Kiyachini ko uu ni; kibagaaktoi kosapcho, si ma ityeech nereegek amu kayasyoet ne ki kiyasyechi.”" 
Joshua9:21 Ki leenji `pounik icheek, “Obagaach kosapcho.” Ki ek anyun pichooto che petei kweenik ak koramjin peek tuiyet komugul ko uu ye ki kamwachi pounik." 
Joshua9:22 Ki iyookto anyun Joshua keguur icheek, ak ki ng'alaalji koleenji, “Amu nee si ong'alech ole, ‘Kimenye ole loo miising' eng' okweek,’ ago kaagaa omenye kwenunnyo?" 
Joshua9:23 Ara anyun oo chubootiin, amagoi petyo eng' okweek che otwogik che petei kweenik ak che ramei peek che po kootap Kamuktaindennyu.”" 
Joshua9:24 Ki wolji `icheek Joshua koleenji, “Amu ki kimwaiwech acheek otwogiguk iman ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' otwogindennyi Musa kogoonok emet tugul ak kobar eng' taing'wong' piik tugul che menyei emoni. Ki kiyai anyun niito amu ki kiaragen miising' agobo saboonwekyok amu okweek." 
Joshua9:25 Ki mi anyun nguno euneguk. Iyaiywech ko uu ye igeere ile myee eng' inyee.” 
Joshua9:26 Ki yachi anyun ko uu nooto, kosar eng' eunegap piigap Israel, ak ma ki par icheek." 
Joshua9:27 Ki yai `Joshua icheek eng' peetuunooto koek che petei kweenik ak koramjin peek tuiyet ak kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ole leweni ineendet, ak mi ko uu nooto agoi ra." 
Joshua10:1 Kingo kas Adoni-sedek laitoryatap Jerusalem kole ki konam Joshua Ai ak kong'em kogees; ko kogoyachi Ai ak laitoryandennyi ko uu ye kigayachi Jeriko ak laitoryandennyi, ak ko uu ye ki yai kaalyeet piigap Gibeon ak Israel ak komi kwenunnywa." 
Joshua10:2 Ki iywei miising' amu ki nganaseet ne oo Gibeon, ko uu age eng' nganasoogap kaplaitoryat, ak amu ki oo kosiir Ai ak ko ki kiimeen murenik tugul che po nganasanooto." 
Joshua10:3 Ki iyookto anyun Adoni-sedek laitoryatap Jerusalem, ng'olyoo koyookyi Hoam laitoryatap Hebron, Piram laitoryatap Jarmut, Japia laitoryatap Lakish ak Debir laitoryatap Eglon koleenji," 
Joshua10:4 “Otogosu oldanyu obwa otoreta si kibookyin Gibeon, amu ki koyai kaalyeet ak Joshua ak piigap Israel.”" 
Joshua10:5 Ki iyumgei anyun laitorinik muutu che po Amorik: laitoryatap Jerusalem, laitoryatap Hebron, laitoryatap Jarmut, laitoryatap Lakish ak laitoryatap Eglon ak kotogosta. Ki togosta icheek ak lugosyekwak tugul ak koteech taitap Gibeon ak kobookyi nganasanooto." 
Joshua10:6 Ki iyookto `piigap Gibeon Joshua eng' nganaseet eng' Gilgal, koleenji, “Amebagaakte otwogiguk; nyoo togosu ichogu ak isarwech! Toretech amu kagoyumjeigei laitorinik tugul che po Amorik che menyei emetap tuloonook.”" 
Joshua10:7 Ki togosta anyun Joshua eng' Gilgal ak piik tugul che po lugeet, kobooto murenik tugul che kiimeen che nyigoonen." 
Joshua10:8 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua, “Meiywei icheek, amu kande icheek euneguk. Ma mi chii eng' icheek ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taing'ung'.”" 
Joshua10:9 Kiche anyun Joshua icheek, amu kiga kotogosta eng' Gilgal kemout komugul." 
Joshua10:10 Ki iyeesta `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' taitap Israel ak kobar icheek eng' pareet ne oo eng' Gibeon. Ak koon icheek kobun ooreet ne togostoi Beth-horon ak kobarat kot koit Aseka ak Makeda. 
Joshua10:11 Ye ki mwee eng' taitap Israel, ye kichoortaegei Beth-horon, kowiir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' koik che eecheen che punu kipsengwet kot koit Aseka, ak ki pek icheek; ki chaang' che ki pek eng' koigap ropta kosiir che ki par piigap Israel eng' rotwetap chok." 
Joshua10:12 Eng' peetuut ne ki igoito Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Amorik kogoochin piigap Israel, koleenji `Joshua Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap piigap Israel, “Ee Asiisi, tonon eng' Gibeon, ee Arawet, telel eng' atebweetap Aijalon.”" 
Joshua10:13 Ki tonon asiista ak kosiis arawet, kot koyaaktochigei mugetuut pororyet eng' puunikwak. Tos ma ki sirchi niito bukuitap Jasar? Ki tonon asiista mata kwo eng' kwenutap kipsengwet, ak mata kwo kochaakta kororokto ne tee peetuut komugul." 
Joshua10:14 Kitom kobiitu peetuut ne uu nooto eng' tai amata kobiit eng' let ne ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutitap chii. Amu ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lugeet agobo Israel. 
Joshua10:15 Ki week Joshua anyun kobooto Israel tugul koba nganaseet eng' Gilgal. 
Joshua10:16 Kimwei anyun laitorinichooto muutu ak kounygei eng' kebeneet eng' Makeda. 
Joshua10:17 Ki kimwachi Joshua keleenji, “Kagenyoor laitorinichooto muut kounyegei eng' kebeneet eng' Makeda.”" 
Joshua10:18 Kole Joshua, “Omilji koik che eecheen kurgeetap kebeneet ak onde piik yooto koriip." 
Joshua10:19 Amat otebi okweeget, oon puunikwok ak obar che mi let, amat ochamji koba nganasookwak oriit. Amu kagonde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' icheek eunekwok.”" 
Joshua10:20 Kingo kagobar Joshua ak piigap Israel icheek kogees eng' pareet ne oo miising' kot koek tutigin che ki ng'et ak koba nganasook che ng'ootaatiin. 
Joshua10:21 Ki week anyun piik tugul eng' kaalyeet koba nganaseet ole mi Joshua eng' Makeda. Ma piit chii ne kitwek komwa ng'olyoo ne ya agobo piigap Israel. 
Joshua10:22 Komwa Joshua anyun kole, “Oyat kurgeetap kebeneet, ak omutwaa laitorinichooto muut.”" 
Joshua10:23 Ki yai ko uu nooto, ak ki imutyi ineendet laitorinichooto muut; laitoryatap Jerusalem, laitoryatap Hebron, laitoryatap Jarmut, laitoryatap Lakish ak laitoryatap Eglon." 
Joshua10:24 Kingo kagomut laitorinichooto kagomutyi Joshua, koguur `Joshua murenik tugul che po Israel ak komwachi pounigap lugeet che kigaba kobooto ineendet koleenji, “Obwa oriigu onde keelyekwok kaatwegap laitorinichu.” Kobwa anyun koriik ak konde keelyekwak kaatwegap pichooto." 
Joshua10:25 Koleenji `Joshua icheek, “Amoiywei anan otoptoben, ogimegitu ak onyiganitu amu yachin ko uu nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puunikwok tugul che obaregei.”" 
Joshua10:26 Ye ibata, kokweerot `Joshua icheek ak kobar ak kosonginine keetiik muut. Ki tebee keetiik kosonginindos agoi koimen." 
Joshua10:27 Ye kimachei kororokto asiista, kogoon Joshua ng'atuutyet kechoor eng' keetiik kobwa ng'wony ak kowiirchi kebeneet ole kigaung'egei, ak konde koik che eecheen kurgeetap kebeneet, ne mi agoi ra." 
Joshua10:28 Ki nam `Joshua Makeda peetuunooto, ak ki par kobooto laitoryandennyi eng' rotwetap chok, ak kobar kowong' tugul che ki mi oriit. Ki ma pagaakta agot agenge. Ak ki yachi laitoryatap Makeda ko uu ye kigayachi laitoryatap Jeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Ak kisiirto Joshua eng' Makeda ak Israel tugul koba Libna ak kobookyi olooto. 
Joshua10:30 Ki igoito Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganasanooto agine kobooto laitoryandennyi konde eunegap Israel. Ki par nganasanooto ak piik tugul che ki mi oriit eng' rotwetap chok. Ki ma pagaakta agot agenge eng' oriit. Ak ki yachi laitoryandennyi ko uu ye kigayachi laitoryatap Jeriko. 
Joshua10:31 Ki pa Joshua ak Israel tugul eng' Libna koba Lakish; ki teech taitap nganasanooto ak kobargei. 
Joshua10:32 Ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Lakish eunegap Israel ak ki nam eng' peetuut ne po aeng'. Ki par kobooto piik tugul che ki mi oriit eng' rotwetap chok, ko uu tugul che kigayachi Libna." 
Joshua10:33 Kigatogos Horam laitoryatap Gezer koleen kotoret Lakish, ago ki par `Joshua ineendet kobooto piikyik, ak ma pagakyi agot agenge." 
Joshua10:34 Ki isiptogei Joshua eng' Lakish kobooto Israel tugul koba Eglon ak koteech taitap nganasanooto, ak kobargei." 
Joshua10:35 Ki nam eng' peetuunooto ak kobar eng' rotwetap chok piik tugul che ki mi oriit. Ki par kogeskei eng' peetuunooto, ko uu tugul che kigayachi Lakish." 
Joshua10:36 Ki togosta Joshua ak Israel tugul eng' Eglon koba Hebron ak ki par olooto. 
Joshua10:37 Ki nam ak kobar eng' rotwetap chok piik tugul che ki mi oriit kobooto laitoryandennyi ak nganasookyik tugul, ma pagaakta agot agenge. Ko uu tugul che kigayachi Eglon, koging'em kogees kobooto piik tugul che ki mi oriit." 
Joshua10:38 Ki week anyun Joshua kobooto Israel tugul koba Debir ak kobar olooto. 
Joshua10:39 Ak ki nam kobooto laitoryandennyi ak nganasookyik tugul ak kobar eng' rotwetap chok ak piik tugul che ki mi oriit kowong'. Ma pagaakta agot agenge. Ki yachi Debir ak laitoryandennyi ko uu ye kigayachi Hebron kobooto laitoryandennyi, ak ko uu ye kigayachi Libna agine ak laitoryandennyi." 
Joshua10:40 Ki par anyun Joshua emet tugul; emetap tuloonook, komostap murot tai, warenget ak chepkeigeusyek kobooto laitorinikwak tugul. Ma pagaakta kong'et agot agenge. Ki par kogees tugul che ki tinyei kabuuset, ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Joshua10:41 Ki par `Joshua icheek kobooch Kadesh-barnea agoi Gaza ak emet komugul ne po Goshen agoi Gibeon. 
Joshua10:42 Ki nam `Joshua laitorinichooto tugul ak emotinwekwak eng' peetuusyechooto, amu ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel lugeet agobo Israel." 
Joshua10:43 Kiweektagei Joshua kobooto Israel tugul koba nganaseet eng' Gilgal. 
Joshua11:1 Ye kingo kas Jabin laitoryatap Hasor agobo niito, koyookto ng'olyoo kwo kap Jobap laitoryatap Madon, kap laitoryatap Simron, kap laitoryatap Aksap," 
Joshua11:1 Ye kingo kas Jabin laitoryatap Hasor agobo niito, koyookto ng'olyoo kwo kap Jobap laitoryatap Madon, kap laitoryatap Simron, kap laitoryatap Aksap," 
Joshua11:2 ak koyookto kwo kap laitorinik che ki mi murot kaataam ne po emetap tuloonook, ak eng' Arabah murot tai ne po Kinnereth, ak eng' warenget kobooto che ki mi Napoth-dor eng' cherongo." 
Joshua11:3 Ki iyookyi ng'olyoo kora Kanaanik eng' kong'asiis, ak eng' cherongo kobooto Amorik, Hitik, Perisik, Jebusik eng' emetap tuloonook ak Hibik eng' Hermon keel eng' emetap Mispa." 
Joshua11:4 Ki pwa komong' anyun icheeget ak lugosyekwak tugul. King'iisyat icheek kobooto paraisisyekwak ak kariisyek ko uu ng'aniek che mi ngeguutap nyanjet eng' chaang'indo. 
Joshua11:5 Ki tuiyo laitorinichuuto tugul ak kobwa koteech komosta agenge eng' ye neegitee peegap Merom si kobargei ak Israel. 
Joshua11:6 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua, “Meiywei icheek, amu mutai ko tee ni asiis agoitoi icheek tugul kebar eng' taitap Israel. Iebe kwarinigap paraisisyekwak ak ibeel kariisyekwak eng' maat.”" 
Joshua11:7 Konyo anyun `Joshua kobooto piikyik tugul che po lugeet eng' ye neegitee peegap Merom ak kobookyi icheek. 
Joshua11:8 Ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunegap Israel, si kobar ak koon kot koit Sidon ne oo ak Misrepot-maim agoi atebweetap Mispe ole tokyingei kong'asiis. Ki par icheek kowong' kot koma ng'et agot agenge." 
Joshua11:9 Ki yachi `Joshua icheek ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki ep kwarinigap paraisisyekwak yeityo kobeel kariisyekwak eng' maat. 
Joshua11:10 Ki week `Joshua eng' ak konam Hasor ak kobar laitoryandennyi eng' rotwetap chok. Ki ne oo Hasor eng' tai eng' laitornatosyechooto tugul. 
Joshua11:11 Ki par piik tugul che ki mi nganasanooto eng' rotwetap chok kobar kogees; ma ng'et agot agenge, ak kobeel Hasor eng' maat." 
Joshua11:12 Ki nam Joshua nganasook tugul che po laitorinichooto ak laitorinikwak tugul; ak kobar kooges icheek eng' rotwetap chok ko uu ye ki kang'at `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Joshua11:13 Ago ki ma peel `Israel nganasook che kitonondos eng' tuloonookwak kobatee Hasor kityo ne ki peel Joshua. 
Joshua11:14 Ki ip Israel tuguuk tugul che po nganasochuuto ak kokweri tuuga koek chechwaak. Ki par chii age tugul eng' rotwetap chok, kot kogees icheek, ama pagaakta agot agenge kota ko sabei." 
Joshua11:15 Ko uu ye ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa otwogindennyi, koging'at `Musa Joshua ko uu nooto, ak ki yai `Joshua ko uu nooto. Ma pagaakta kiy age tugul ne ma yai eng' tuguuk tugul che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Joshua11:16 Ki nam anyun Joshua emet komugul: emetap tuloonook, Murot tugul ne po Tai, emet tugul ne po Goshen, warenget, Arabah, emetap tuloonook ne po Israel ak warengetap emonooto." 
Joshua11:17 Ki nam kora kobooch tulweetap Halak ne tokyingei Seir agoi Baal-gad eng' atebweetap Lebanon eng' Hermon keel. Ki nam laitorinikwak tugul, ak kokweerot kobar." 
Joshua11:18 Ki yai Joshua lugeet eng' peetuusyek che chaang' kobooto laitorinichooto. 
Joshua11:19 Ma piit nganaseet agot agenge ne ki yai kaalyeet ak piigap Israel kobatee Hibik che ki menyei Gibeon. Ki nam chooto tugul eng' pooryeet. 
Joshua11:20 Ki ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki iuit mugulelwekwak si kobargei ak Israel eng' lugeet, si kong'em icheek kogees, ak ma kiriree icheek, ago si kobiit kong'em icheek kogees ko uu ye ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
Joshua11:21 Ki nyo Joshua eng' peetuusyechooto kobar Anagik kowong' eng' emetap tuloonook, ak eng' emotinwegap Hebron, Debir, Anap, eng' emet tugul ne po tuloonoogap Judah ak eng' emet tugul ne po tuloonoogap Israel. Ki par `Joshua icheek kogeskei kobooto nganasookwak." 
Joshua11:22 Ma ng'et agot agenge Anagichooto eng' emetap piigap Israel; kobatee king'etune Gaza, Gath ak Ashdod kityo." 
Joshua11:23 Ki nam anyun Joshua emet komugul, ko uu tugul che ki kamwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. Ki igoochi `Joshua emonooto Israel koek porotennywa ko uu pcheutigap pororyosyekwak. Ki imuuny anyun emet eng' pooryeet." 
Joshua12:1 Chu ko laitorinigap emonooto che ki par `piigap Israel ak konam emennywa kobunji; eng' Jordan pitoniin ole tokyingei kong'asiis, kobooch atebweetap Arnon kot koit tulweetap Hermon kobooto Arabah tugul ne tokyingei kong'asiis:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihon laitoryatap Amorik ne ki menyei Hesbon, ak ki pou Aroer ne mi tabandap atebweetap Arnon, ak kobooch kwenutap atebweet kot koit aineetap Jabbok, ne kiwotetap lagogap Ammon, ni ko kebebertap Gilead." 
Joshua12:3 Ki pou kora Arabah agoi nyanjetap Kinnereth kong'asiis kot koit nyanjetap Arabah ne nooto Araraitap Munyuk, ne tokyingei kong'asiis ooreet ne wendi Beth-Jesimoth ak eng' murot tai eng' chepkeigeusyegap Piska keel," 
Joshua12:4 ak Laitoryat Og ne po Bashan, ne po che ki ng'etune Repaik, che ki menyei Astarot ak Edrei." 
Joshua12:5 Ki pounisyei ineendet eng' tulweetap Hermon, Saleka ak Bashan komugul kot koit kiwotetap Gesurik, Maakatik ak kebeberta ne po Gilead kiwotetap Sihon laitoryatap Hesbon." 
Joshua12:6 Ki par `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak `piigap Israel icheek. Ak kogoochi `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emonooto piigap Reuben ak che po Gad ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh kobunji. 
Joshua12:7 Chuuto laitorinigap emonooto che ki par `Joshua ak piigap Israel eng' Jordan pitoniin ole tokyingei cherongo, kobooch Baal-gad eng' atebweetap Lebanon kot koit tulweetap Halak, ne togostoi agoi Seir (ak ki igoochi `Joshua emonooto pororyosyegap Israel kobunji ko uu pcheutikwak:" 
Joshua12:8 emetap tuloonook, warenget, Arabah, chepkeigeusyek, surkwen, murot tai, Hitik, Amorik, Kanaanik, Perisik, Hibik ak Jebusik):" 
Joshua12:9 laitoryatap Jeriko agenge, laitoryatap Ai, ne neegitee Bethel agenge;" 
Joshua12:10 laitoryatap Jerusalem agenge, laitoryatap Hebron agenge;" 
Joshua12:11 laitoryatap Jarmut agenge, laitoryatap Lakish agenge;" 
Joshua12:12 laitoryatap Eglon agenge, laitoryatap Gezer agenge;" 
Joshua12:13 laitoryatap Debir agenge, laitoryatap Geder agenge;" 
Joshua12:14 laitoryatap Horma agenge, laitoryatap Arad agenge;" 
Joshua12:15 laitoryatap Libna agenge, laitoryatap Adulam agenge;" 
Joshua12:16 laitoryatap Makeda agenge, laitoryatap Bethel agenge;" 
Joshua12:17 laitoryatap Tappuah agenge, laitoryatap Hepher agenge;" 
Joshua12:18 laitoryatap Apek agenge, laitoryatap Lasaron agenge;" 
Joshua12:19 laitoryatap Madon agenge, laitoryatap Hasor agenge;" 
Joshua12:20 laitoryatap Simron-meron agenge, laitoryatap Aksap agenge;" 
Joshua12:21 laitoryatap Taanak agenge, laitoryatap Megiddo agenge;" 
Joshua12:22 laitoryatap Kedesh agenge, laitoryatap Jokneam eng' Karmel agenge;" 
Joshua12:23 laitoryatap Dor ne ki mi Dor parak agenge, laitoryatap Goim eng' Gilgal agenge," 
Joshua12:24 ak laitoryatap Tirzah agenge. Ki ek laitorinichooto tugul sosom ak agenge. 
Joshua13:1 Kiga koosit Joshua amu kiga kotar kenyiisyek che chaang'. Ak ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Kaiositu ak itinye kenyiisyek che chaang', ago ta kong'etunot emet ne oo ne nyolu kenam." 
Joshua13:2 Ni emet ne ta ko ng'etunot: komoswek tugul che po Philistiik ak che po Gesurik," 
Joshua13:3 kiityin keele po `Kanaanik koroniito kobooch Sihor ne mi murot tai ne po Misiri, kot koit kiwotetap Ekron eng' murot kaataam. Ki po kiptainik muut che po Philistiik: Gasaik, Asdodik, Askelonik, Gitik, Ekronik ak Abik," 
Joshua13:4 eng' murot tai, emet tugul ne po Kanaanik, Meara ne po Sidonik, kot koit Apek, agoi kiwotetap Amorik," 
Joshua13:5 ak emetap Gebalik, Lebanon tugul, ne tokyingei ole charunee asiista, kobooch Baal-gad eng' tulweetap Hermon keel kot koit ole kimandoe kebendi Lebo-hamath." 
Joshua13:6 Piik tugul che menyei emetap tuloonook kong'etee Lebanon kot koit Misrepotmaim agot Sidonik tugul, aoone icheek koba eng' taitap piigap Israel. Ago igoochi emoni Israel koek porotennywa ko uu ye ki ang'atiin." 
Joshua13:7 Pchechi anyun pororyosyechuuto sogool ak kebebertap eng' che po Manasseh.” 
Joshua13:8 Ki sich porotennywa piigap Reuben ak che po Gad kobooto ne kigaigoochi Musa eng' Jordan pitoniin tokyingei kong'asiis, ko uu ye ki igoochi `icheek Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Joshua13:9 kobooch Aroer, ne mi tabandap atebweetap Arnon, ak nganaseet ne mi kwenutap atebwonooto ak warenget tugul ne po Medeba agoi Dibon," 
Joshua13:10 nganasook tugul che po Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, ne ki laitorani eng' Hesbon, agoi kiwotetap lagogap Ammon," 
Joshua13:11 Gilead ak kiwotetap Gesurik ak Maakatik ak tulweet tugul ne po Hermon ak Bashan tugul agoi Saleka," 
Joshua13:12 laitornatet tugul ne po Og eng' Bashan, ne ki laitorani eng' Astarot ak Edrei (ineendet ko agenge eng' Repaik che ki ng'et); kiga kobar chuuto `Musa ak koon." 
Joshua13:13 Ago maon piigap Israel Gesurik anan ko Maakatik. Ki meny Gesurik ak Maakatik kwenutap Israel agoi ra. 
Joshua13:14 Pororyetap Lawiik kityo ne ma igoochi poroteet, amu porotennywa kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, che kigoitoi kobun maat ko uu ye ki mwachi ineendet." 
Joshua13:15 Ki igoochi `Musa pororyetap lagogap Reuben ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Joshua13:16 Ki pooch kiwotennywa Aroer ne mi tabandap atebweetap Arnon ak nganaseet ne mi kwenutap atebweet kobooto warenget tugul ne neegitee Medeba 
Joshua13:17 ak Hesbon ak nganasookyik tugul che mi warenget; Dibon ak Bamotbaal ak Beth-baal-meon," 
Joshua13:18 ak Jahas, Kedemot, Mepaat," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriataim, Sibma ak Seret-sahar eng' tulweetap atebweet," 
Joshua13:20 Beth-peor, chepkeigeusyegap Piska ak Beth-Jesimoth;" 
Joshua13:21 Nganasook tugul che po warenget, laitornatet tugul ne po Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, ne ki laitorani eng' Hesbon ne ki par `Musa kobooto kirwoogigap Midian ak Ebi, Rekem, Sur, Hur ak Reba pounigap Sihon che ki menyei emonooto." 
Joshua13:22 Ki par `piigap Israel Balaam agine weeriitap Beor orgoiyot eng' rotwetap chok. 
Joshua13:23 Kiwotetap lagogap Reuben ko ki Jordan ak tabandanyi. Niito poroteetap lagogap Reuben ko uu ortinwekwak, nganasookwak che eecheen ak che mengeechen." 
Joshua13:24 Ki igoochi `Musa pororyetap Gad, ko uu ortinwekwak." 
Joshua13:25 Kiwotennywa ko ki Jaser, nganasook tugul che po Gilead ak kebebertap emetap lagogap Ammon, agoi Aroer ne mi taitap Rabbah," 
Joshua13:26 kobooch Hesbon kot koit Ramat-mispe ak Betonim. Kobooch Mahanaim kot koit kiwotetap Debir," 
Joshua13:27 ak eng' atebweet, Beth-aram, Beth-nimra ak Sukoth kobooto Sapon nooto ne ki ng'et eng' laitornatetap Sihon laitoryatap Hesbon ne ki Jordan kiwotennyi kot koit ole pooch tabandap araraita ne po Kineret Jordan pitoniin ole tokyingei kong'asiis." 
Joshua13:28 Niito ko poroteetap lagogap Gad ko uu ortinwekwak, nganasookwak che eecheen ak che mengeechen." 
Joshua13:29 Ki igoochi `Musa kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh poroteet. Ki punji icheek kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Joshua13:30 Kiboch kiwotennywa Mahanaim, Bashan tugul, laitornatet tugul ne po Og laitoryatap Bashan ak nganasook tugul che po Jair che mi Bashan, nganasook che eecheen tamanwogik lo." 
Joshua13:31 Kibooto kebebertap Gilead, Astarot, Edrei, nganasook che eecheen che po laitornatetap Og eng' Bashan. Ki punji chuuto lagogap Makir weeriitap Manasseh kebebertap lagogap Makir ko uu ortinwekwak." 
Joshua13:32 Chuuto ko porotosyek che kipchei `Musa eng' warengosyegap Moab Jordan pitoniin eng' Jeriko ne tokyingei kong'asiis. 
Joshua13:33 Ago ma igoochi `Musa pororyetap Lawiik poroteet age tugul. Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko porotennywa ko uu ye ki kamwachi icheek." 
Joshua14:1 Chu ko porotosyek che kinyoor piigap Israel eng' emetap Kanaan che kipchechi icheek `Eleazar tisiindet, ak Joshua weeriitap Nun kobooto kandoigap kooriik che po pororyosyegap piigap Israel." 
Joshua14:2 Ki pchei kosube parbareegap porotennywa ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa agobo pororyosyechooto sogool ak kebeberyat. 
Joshua14:3 Kiga kogoochi `Musa poroteet pororyosyechooto aeng' ak kebeberyat eng' Jordan pitoniin. Ma igoochi `Lawiik poroteet age tugul eng' kwenunnywa. 
Joshua14:4 Ki pororyosyek aeng' lagogap Joseph, chooto ko ki Manasseh ak Ephraim. Ma kigoochi Lawiik kebeberta eng' emonooto kobatee nganasook che ki meny kobooto korotinwek che agete kiyaagikwak." 
Joshua14:5 Kipchei emet piigap Israel ko uu ye ki kang'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa. 
Joshua14:6 Ki riikta piigap Judah ole ki mi Joshua eng' Gilgal. Ki mwachi `Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Kenisindet ineendet koleenji, “Ingen kiit ne ki mwa `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komwachi Musa chiitap Kamuktaindet agobo anee ak inyee eng' Kadesh-barnea." 
Joshua14:7 Ki abo kenyiisyek artam ye ki iyookwo `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Kadesh-barnea anyo asegei emet. Ki aipchi ineendet ng'olyoot ko uu ye ki mi muguleldanyu. 
Joshua14:8 Ki igoochi tupchosyekyuk che ki kitogostoi tugul mugulelwegap piik komeiyo, ago ki asup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu eng' kagesunatetapkei." 
Joshua14:9 Ki iyasyo anyun Musa peetuunooto kole, ‘Egu poroteng'ung' ak ko punjin inyee ak lagoguk koigeny emet ne ka tyech keelyeguk amu ki isup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu eng' kagesunatetapkei.’" 
Joshua14:10 Ko uu nooto anyun, ko ki koriibo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor asap ko uu ye ki mwa. Kenyiisyek artam ak muut kobooch peetuut ne ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ng'olyoondoni, ye kingo ta kobendoti Israel eng' surkwen ak ang'ni nguno atinye kenyiisyek tamanwogik sisiit ak muut!" 
Joshua14:11 Ta atinye kimnateet rani ko uu eng' atkinye koyooktaa Musa. Kiit ne ki uu kimnateennyu eng' peetuunooto, ko uu nooto kimnateennyu nguno, ta amuuchi awo lugeet ak aweege." 
Joshua14:12 Ara anyun, konoo tulwooni ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto. Ki igas eng' peetuunooto ile ki mi Anagik olooto ak nganasook che eecheen che ng'ootaatiin. Imuuch komi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto, si aoon koba ko uu ye ki mwa ineendet.”" 
Joshua14:13 Ki iberuur `Joshua ineendet ak kogoochi Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Hebron koek porotennyi. 
Joshua14:14 Ki ek anyun `Hebron poroteetap Kaleb weeriitap Jepune Kenisindet agoi ra, amu ki isup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel eng' kagesunatetapkei." 
Joshua14:15 Kainetap Hebron eng' tai ko ki Kiriath-arba. Ki chiito ne oo Arba kosiir tugul eng' Anagik. Ki imuuny emet eng' lugeet. 
Joshua15:1 Kebeberta ne ki ibutyi pororyetap lagogap Judah, ko uu ortinwekwak, ko kiwootetap Edom agoi surkwen ne po Sin ne tokyingei tabanda ne po murot tai." 
Joshua15:2 Kibochit kiwotennywa ne po murot tai tabandap Araraitap Munyuk, kot koit nyanjet ne kiluktogei kotokyigei murot tai." 
Joshua15:3 Wendi kotokyigei murot tai ne po Akrabbim ak kosiirto kot koit Sin, ak kotogosta kwo murot tai ne po Kadesh-barnea, ak kosiirto agoi koit Hesron, ak kotogosta kwo Adar, ak koweek kora konyo Karka." 
Joshua15:4 Ki siirto kwo Asmon ak kwo komandae aineetap Misiri ak kwo kiwotonooto agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian. Egu nooto kiwoteng'wong' ne po murot tai. 
Joshua15:5 Kiwotet eng' kong'asiis ko ki itei Araraitap Munyuk agoi Jordan. Kiwotetap kebeberta ne po murot kaataam, kotaune tabandap nyanjet ye mang'une Jordan;" 
Joshua15:6 ak kwo kiwoteet kot koit Beth-hogla ak kosiirto kobun murot kaataam ne po Beth-araba, ak kwo kot koit Koita ne po Boan weeriitap Reuben." 
Joshua15:7 Kong'eetee yooto, kwo kiwoteet kot koit Debir kobunu atebweetap Akor ak kotokyigei murot kaataam kwo Gilgal, kotoorchigei ole kitogostoe kebendi Adumim, ne mi murot tai ne po aineet. Kong'eetee yooto, kosiirto kiwoteet kot koit peegap En-semes, ak kwo agoi En-rogelo." 
Joshua15:8 Kwo kotestai kiwoteet agoi atebweetap weeriitap Hinom, eng' tabandap Jebusindet murot tai, ne nooto ko Jerusalem ak kwo agoi tulweet parak ne ikweeni atebweetap Hinom eng' cherongo, murot kaataam ne po atebweetap Repaik." 
Joshua15:9 Kong'eetee tulweet parak, kowegaak kiwoteet kot koit kondap peegap Neptoa ak kwo agoi nganasoogap tulweetap Epron, yeityo kowegaak kiwoteet kotokyigei Baala, ne nooto ko Kiriath-Jearim." 
Joshua15:10 Kong'eete Baala kotokyigei kiwotet cherongo agoi tulweetap Seir ak kosiirto kwo tabandap tulweetap Jearim eng' murot kaataam, ne nooto ko Kesalon ak kotokyigei Beth-shemesh, yeityo kosiirto kwo agoi Timnah." 
Joshua15:11 Ki manda kiwoteet kora ak kwo tabandap Ekron murot kaataam, yeityo kowegaak kiwoteet agoi Sikeron, ak kosiirto agoi tulweetap Baala. Yeityo kwo komanda agoi Jabneel ak kwo kiwoteet agoi komong'ji nyanjetap Mediterenian." 
Joshua15:12 Kiwotet ne po cherongo, ko kitabaandap nyanjetap Mediterenian." 
Joshua15:13 Ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua, ko ki kigoochi Kaleb weeriitap Jepune kebeberyan eng' kwenutap lagogap Judah nooto ko Kiriath-arba nooto ko Hebron. (Arba ko ki kwandap Anak.)" 
Joshua15:14 Ki oon Kaleb eng' olooto weeriik somok che po Anak: Sheshai, Ahiman ak Talmai, lagogap Anak." 
Joshua15:15 Kong'eetee yooto kotogosta kwo kobargei ak che ki menyei Debir. Kainetap Debir eng' tai ko ki Kiriath-sepher. 
Joshua15:16 Ki mwa Kaleb kole, “Ineendet ne ibookyin Kiriath-sepher ak konam, agoochini Achsah cheptonyu kotun.”" 
Joshua15:17 Ki nam Othniel weeriitap Kenas ng'eetap kametap Kaleb nganasanooto, ak ki igoochi ineendet Achsah cheptonyi kotun." 
Joshua15:18 Kingo nyo kwonyooto ole mi ineendet, komwachi Othniel eng' kagiiletapkei kosoom kwandanyi kooret. Ye ki choorugei eng' sigiryennyi koteebe Kaleb koleenji, “Imache nee?”" 
Joshua15:19 Kowol kole, “Koono konunotyon, amu ki indea emetap Negeb, koono kong'igap peek ak icheek.” Ki igoochi anyun kong'igap peek che po meto ak che mi ole rektoot." 
Joshua15:20 Ni ko poroteetap pororyetap Judah ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Joshua15:21 Nganasook che mi tabandap pororyetap Judah eng' ole tokyingei kiwotetap Edom eng' murot tai: ko ki Kabseel, Eder ak Jagur." 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona ak Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedesh, Hasor ak Itnan," 
Joshua15:24 Ziph, Telem ak Bealoth," 
Joshua15:25 Hasor-hadata, Keryot-hesron (nooto ko Hasor)," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Shema ak Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Hasar-gada, Hesmon ak Beth-pelet," 
Joshua15:28 Hasar-sual, Beer-sheba ak Bisiotia," 
Joshua15:29 Bala, Iim ak Esem," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad, Chesil ak Horma," 
Joshua15:31 Ziklag, Madmana ak Sansana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaot, Silim, Ain ak Rimon. Nganasochooto tugul ko ki tiptem ak sogool kobooto kokwatinwekwak." 
Joshua15:33 Eng' warenget, Estaol, Sora ak Asna," 
Joshua15:34 Sanoa, En-ganim, Tappuah ak Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmut, Adulam, Soko ak Aseka," 
Joshua15:36 Saaraim, Aditaim, Gedera ak Gederotaim. Ki nganasook taman ak ang'wan kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:37 Senan, Hadasa ak Migdalgad," 
Joshua15:38 Dilan, Mispe ak Jokteel," 
Joshua15:39 Lakish, Boskat ak Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 Kabon, Lamam ak Kitlis," 
Joshua15:41 Gederoth, Beth-dagon, Naamah ak Makeda. Tugul ko nganasook taman ak lo kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:42 Libna, Eter ak Asan," 
Joshua15:43 Ipta, Asna ak Nesip," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Aksip ak Maresha. Tugul ko nganasook sogool kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:45 Ki kigoochi Ekron kobooto nganasookyik ak kokwotinwekyik; 
Joshua15:46 kobooch Ekron agoi nyanjet, tugul che ki mi ole neegitee Ashdod kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:47 Ashdod, nganasookyik ak kokwotinwekyik, Gaza, nganasookyik ak kokwotinwekyik agoi aineetap Misiri, ak nyanjetap Mediterenian ak kiwotennyi." 
Joshua15:48 Ak eng' emet ne mi tuloonook: Samir, Jatir ak Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana ak Kiriath-sana, nooto ko Debir," 
Joshua15:50 Anap, Estemo ak Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Goshen, Holon ak Gilo; nganasook taman ak agenge kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:52 Arab, Duma ak Esan," 
Joshua15:53 Janim, Beth-tapua ak Apeka," 
Joshua15:54 Humta, Kiriath-arba nooto ko Hebron ak Sior; nganasook sogool ak kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:55 Maon, Karmel, Ziph, Juta," 
Joshua15:56 Jezreel, Jokdeam, Sanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibea ak Timnah; nganasook taman kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:58 Halul, Beth-zur, Geder." 
Joshua15:59 Maarat, Beth-anot ak Eltekon; nganasook lo tugul kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriath-baal nooto ko Kiriath-Jearim, ak Rabbah; nganasook aeng' kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:61 Eng' surkwen: Beth-araba, Midin, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibsan, Nganaseetap Munyuk ak En-gedi; nganasook lo kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua15:63 Ki ma imuuch piigap Judah koon Jebusik che ki menyei Jerusalem; ara ki meny Jebusik ak piigap Judah eng' Jerusalem agoi ra. 
Joshua16:1 Kebeberta ne ki ibutyi eng' parbaryat lagogap Joseph kotaune Jordan eng' Jeriko eng' kong'asiis agoi surkwen, ak kotogosta eng' Jeriko kobun emetap tuloonook kwo Bethel." 
Joshua16:2 Ki wo komanda eng' Bethel kwo komong'ji Luz ak kosiirto kot koit kooretap Arikik eng' Ataroth. 
Joshua16:3 Ak kwo kochoortagei kotokyigei cherongo agoi kooretap Japhletik, kot koit kooretap ole rektoot ne po Beth-horon ak kotokyigei Gezer ak komong'ji nyanjetap Mediterenian." 
Joshua16:4 Ki nam anyun lagogap Joseph, chooto Manasseh ak Ephraim porotennywa." 
Joshua16:5 Kooretap lagogap Ephraim ko uu ortinwekwak ko uu ni; kiwotetap koorennywa kong'etee kong'asiis ne po Ataroth-addar kot koit Beth-horon parak," 
Joshua16:6 ak kwo kiwoteet kot koit araraitap Mediterenian. Eng' murot kaataam kowendi kiwoteet kong'etee Mikmethath agoi kong'asiis ne po Taanath-shiloh kosiirto kotogosta agoi kong'asiis ne po Janoah. 
Joshua16:7 Kong'eete Janoah kochoortagei kwo Ataroth ak Naarah koit Jeriko ak kwo kot komong'ji Jordan. 
Joshua16:8 Eng' cherongo, kogiwo kiwoteet kong'etee Tappuah kot koit aineetap Kanah ak komong'ji nyanjetap Mediterenian. Niito anyun ko poroteetap pororyetap lagogap Ephraim ko uu ortinwekwak," 
Joshua16:9 kobooto nganasook tugul ak kokwotinwekwak che ki kitabaanji Ephraim ak lagokyik eng' kwenutap poroteetap lagogap Manasseh. 
Joshua16:10 Ago ma imuuch `icheek ko oon Kanaanik che ki menyei Gezer. Ki meny anyun Kanaanik kwenutap Ephraim agoi rani ak ki ek otwogik che yaei poisyonigap otwoknateet. 
Joshua17:1 Ni ko kebeberta ne ki ibutyi eng' parbaryat pororyetap Manasseh; amu kitaita ne po Joseph. Ko uu Makir, ne kitaita ne po Manasseh, kwandap Gilead, ko amu kichii ne po lugeet, ko ki kigoochi ineendet Gilead ak Bashan." 
Joshua17:2 Ki punji lagogap Manasseh che ki ng'et, ko uu ortinwekwak, chooto lagogap Abiezer, lagogap Helek, lagogap Asriel, lagogap Shekem, lagogap Hepher ak lagogap Shemida. Chooto murenik che po iyoteetap Manasseh weeriitap Joseph, ko uu ortinwekwak." 
Joshua17:3 Kimasich weeriik Zelophehad weeriitap Hepher, weeriitap Gilead weeriitap Makir weeriitap Manasseh, ago tiibiik icheegei; ak chu kainaigap tiibiikyik: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah ak Tirzah." 
Joshua17:4 Ki pwa icheek tait ne po Eleazar tisiindet, Joshua weeriitap Nun ak pounik, koleen, “Ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa kogoonech poroteet eng' kwenutap tupchosyekyok.” Ara ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki igoochi `Joshua icheek poroteet eng' kwenutap tupchosyegap kwandanywa." 
Joshua17:5 Ki sich Manasseh kebeberwek taman koma pooto emetap Gilead ak Bashan, ne mi Jordan pitoniin," 
Joshua17:6 amu ki tinyei tiibiigap Manasseh poroteet kobooto weeriikyik. Ak ki punji emetap Gilead weeriigap Manasseh che ki ng'et. 
Joshua17:7 Kiwotetap Manasseh kong'etee Asher kot koit Mikmethath, ne neegitee Shekem. Ki testai kiwoteet kwo komostap tai, kotokyigei ole menyei piigap En-tapua." 
Joshua17:8 Ki po Manasseh emetap Tappuah, ago Tappuah ne mi kiwotetap Manasseh ko ki po lagogap Ephraim." 
Joshua17:9 Kichoortage kiwoteet kwo aineetap Kanah. Nganasochooto mi komostap tai kobunjiin Ephraim koek che kaginemu eng' nganasoogap Manasseh. Kiwotetap Manasseh komi komostap kaataam ne po aineet ak kwo komong'ji nyanjetap Mediterenian. 
Joshua17:10 Po Ephraim ne mi komostap tai, ak ne mi komostap kaataam ko po Manasseh, kobooto nyanjetap Mediterenian koek kiwotennyi. Ki it Asher eng' murot kaataam agoi Issakar eng' kong'asiis." 
Joshua17:11 Eng' Issakar ak eng' Asher, ko ki tinyei Manasseh chu; Beth-shean ak nganasookyik, Ibleam kobooto nganasookyik, che ki menyei Dor ak nganasookyik ak che ki menyei Endor kobooto nganasookyik. Ki tinyei kora che ki menyei Taanak kobooto nganasookyik, che ki menyei Megiddo kobooto nganasookyik ak kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po Nabat." 
Joshua17:12 Ago ki ma imuuch lagogap Manasseh koon piik che ki menyei nganasochooto. Amu kigamach Kanaanik komeng'iis eng' emonooto," 
Joshua17:13 ko ye kiga kogimegitu piigap Israel, konde Kanaanik koyai poisyonigap otwoknateet ama oon icheek." 
Joshua17:14 Ki ng'alaalji `lagogap Joseph Joshua koleenji, “Amu nee si igoono parbaryat agenge, kebeberta agenge koek poroteet ak ingen ile aa pororyet ne oo amu ki koberuura Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi rani?”" 
Joshua17:15 Ak ki leenji Joshua icheek, “Ngot ko ii pororyet ne oo, itogoste iwe timiin ak ibatyigei oldo eng' emetap Perisik ak ne po Repaik, amu mariich emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim eng' inyee.”" 
Joshua17:16 Ki mwa `lagogap Joseph kole, “Mayamech emetap tuloonook ak kotinyei kariisyegap kariik Kanaanik tugul che menyei emetap atebweet, icheek che mi Beth-shean ak nganasookyik ak icheek che menyei atebweetap Jezreel.”" 
Joshua17:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Joshua kootap Joseph che Ephraim ak Manasseh koleenji, “Ii pororyet ne oo ak itinye kimnateet, mesiche parbaryat agenge kityo," 
Joshua17:18 ago punjinin emetap tuloonook, amu nganda timdo, iswache ak punjinin ole pooch. Amu ioone Kanaanik koba, nganda tinyei kariisyegap kariik ak nganda kiimeen.”" 
Joshua18:1 Ki iyumgei tuiyet tugul ne po piigap Israel eng' Shiloh ak koteech eng' olooto emait ne kituiyechin. Ki iterteerat anyun emonooto eng' tainnywa. 
Joshua18:2 Ki ng'et eng' piigap Israel pororyosyek tisabu che kitom kopchei porotennywa. 
Joshua18:3 Ara anyun ki leenji `Joshua piigap Israel, “Ogaigei kot kotyanit si onam emet ne ki koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwok?" 
Joshua18:4 Olewenjigei piik somok eng' pororyet age tugul, si ayookto icheek kong'eetyo kobendat eng' emet asi kosiir ole teptoi porotennywa yeityo kobwa ole ami." 
Joshua18:5 Ngo pchei koek kebeberwek tisap, ko katebee Judah kiwotennyi eng' murot tai ak ko katebee Joseph kiwotennywa eng' murot kaataam." 
Joshua18:6 Osir emonooto koek kebeberwek tisap yeityo oibwa siranooto, si aserchinewok parbareek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Joshua18:7 Amu ma tinyei Lawiik kebeberta eng' kwenung'wong', amu tiseinatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko porotennywa, ak kigosich Gad ak Reuben ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh porotennywa, eng' Jordan pitoniin po kong'asiis, ne ki igoochi `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Joshua18:8 Ara anyun king'eetyo piik ak koba; ak ki iyomis `Joshua piik che kigaba kosiir oleteptoi emet koleenji, “Oba obun emet ak osir oleteptoi yeityo obwa kogeny ole ami, si aserchinewok parbareek eng' yu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Shiloh.”" 
Joshua18:9 Ki pa anyun pichooto kobun emet ak kosirchi bukuit kobee nganasook koek kebeberwek tisap yeityo kobwa ole mi Joshua eng' nganaseet eng' Shiloh. 
Joshua18:10 Ak ki iser `Joshua parbareek agobo icheek eng' Shiloh eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Ak kipchechi `Joshua emet piigap Israel ko uu pcheutikwak eng' olooto. 
Joshua18:11 Ki piit kuraitap pororyetap lagogap Benjamin ko uu ortinwekwak. Ak ki wo kiwotetap parbaryannywa, kwenutap lagogap Judah ak lagogap Joseph." 
Joshua18:12 King'eete kiwotennywa ne po komostap kaataam Jordan ak kitogosta kiwotennywa kobun tabandap Jeriko eng' murot kaataam ak kotogosta kobun emetap tuloonook kotokyigei cherongo. Kimong'ji kiwotennywa surkwen ne po Beth-aben. 
Joshua18:13 Ki wo kiwoteet eng' olooto agoi Luz, agoi tabandap Luz (nooto ko Bethel), kotokyingei murot tai yeityo kochoortagei kiwoteet kot koit Ataroth-addar, kobun tulweet ne mi komostap tai ne po Beth-horon ne mi ole rektoot." 
Joshua18:14 Yeityo keetil kiwoteet keyiem komostap cherongo ole tokyingei murot tai kong'etee tulweet ne mi taitap Beth-horon ne tokyingei murot tai komong'ji kiwotennyi Kiriath-baal (nooto ko Kiriath-Jearim) nganaseetap lagogap Judah: niito ko ki komostap cherongo. 
Joshua18:15 King'eete murot tai tabandap Kiriath-Jearim, ak kwo kiwoteet kotokyigei cherongo komong'ji kondap peegap Neptoa." 
Joshua18:16 Yeityo kochoortagei kiwoteet agoi tabandap tulweet ne mi taitap atebweetap weeriitap Hinom, ne mi atebweetap Repaik ne tokyingei murot kaataam. Ki choortagei kwo atebweetap Hinom, kot koit tabandap Jebusindet ne tokyingei murot tai ak kochoortagei kwo En-rogelo." 
Joshua18:17 Yeityo kiwech kobun murot kaataam, komong'ji En-semes, kwo Gelilot, ne tokyindos ak ole kitogostoe kebendi Adumim ak kochoortagei agoi koitap Boan weeriitap Reuben," 
Joshua18:18 ak kosiirto kobun tabanda ne tokyingei Arabah murot kaataam ak kochoortagei kot koit Arabah. 
Joshua18:19 Yeityo kwo kiwoteet kobun tabandap Beth-hogla kotokyigei murot kaataam ak komong'ji ole kiluktoegei peek murot kaataam ne po Araraita ne po Munyuk eng' murot tai ye pooch Jordan: niito ko ki kiwootet ne po murot tai. 
Joshua18:20 Ki Jordan kiwotennyi eng' komostap kong'asiis. Niito ko ki poroteetap lagogap Benjamin ko uu kiwotosyekyik che ki imut komoswek tugul ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Joshua18:21 Nganasoogap pororyetap lagogap Benjamin ko uu ortinwekwak ko ki Jeriko, Beth-hogla, ak Emek-kesis;" 
Joshua18:22 Beth-araba, Semaraim ak Bethel;" 
Joshua18:23 Abim, Para ak Ophrah;" 
Joshua18:24 Keparamoni, Opni ak Geba; nganasook taman ak aeng' kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon, Ramah ak Beerot," 
Joshua18:26 Mispe, Kepira ak Motsa," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, Irpeel ak Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 Shelah, Elep ak Jebusindet (nooto ko Jerusalem), Gibeat ak Kiryat. Nganasook taman ak ang'wan kobooto kokwotinwekwak. Niito ko poroteetap lagogap Benjamin ko uu ortinwekwak." 
Joshua19:1 Ki mong' parparyatap aeng' kobutyi pororyetap lagogap Simion ko uu ortinwekwak. Ki imii porotennywa kwenutap poroteetap lagogap Judah. 
Joshua19:2 Kigebeberta ne po porotennywa Beer-sheba, Sheba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Hasarsual, Bala, Esem," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolat, Betul, Horma," 
Joshua19:5 Ziklag, Beth-markabot, Hasar-susa," 
Joshua19:6 Beth-lebaot ak Saruen. Tugul kogi nganasook taman ak somok kobooto kokwotinwekwak. 
Joshua19:7 Ain, Rimon, Eter ak Asan, nganasook ang'wan kobooto kokwotinwek," 
Joshua19:8 ak kokwotinwek tugul che ki yiem nganasochuuto agoi Balat-Beer, Ramah ne po murot tai. Ki poroteet ne po pororyetap lagogap Simion ko uu ortinwekwak." 
Joshua19:9 Ki pun poroteetap lagogap Simion kebeberta ne po lagogap Judah; ki amu ki oo kebeberta ne po Judah kosiir, ko ki sich anyun lagogap Simion poroteet eng' kwenutap porotennywa." 
Joshua19:10 Ki mong' parparyatap somok kobutyi lagogap Zebulun ko uu ortinwekwak. Kiwotetap porotennywa kogiwo agoi Sarid," 
Joshua19:11 ak kotogosta kotokyigei cherongo kot koit Marala ak kotiny Dabeset, yeityo kwo agoi kotiny aineet ne mi taitap Jokneam." 
Joshua19:12 Kong'eetee Sarid, koweek kotokyigei kong'asiis ak kwo kot koit kiwotetap Kislot-tabor. Kimong'ji Daberat ak kotogosta kwo Japia." 
Joshua19:13 Kisiirto kong'etee yooto kotokyigei kong'asiis kwo Get-eper agoi Et-kasin, ak ki wo kot koit Rimon ak komurok kotokyigei Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Kiyiemak kiwoteet eng' murot kaataam kwo Hannathon ak kobekyi atebweetap Ipta-el," 
Joshua19:15 Katat, Naalal, Simron, Idala ak Bethlehem; nganasook taman ak aeng' kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua19:16 Ni ko poroteetap lagogap Zebulun ko uu ortinwekwak; nganasochu kobooto kokwotinwekwak. 
Joshua19:17 Ki mong' parparyatap ang'wan ne po lagogap Issakar ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Joshua19:18 Ki it kiwotennywa Jezreel, Kesulot, Sunem," 
Joshua19:19 Aparaim, Shion, Anaarat," 
Joshua19:20 Rabit, Kision, Ebes," 
Joshua19:21 Remet, En-ganim, En-hada agoi Beth-pases." 
Joshua19:22 Kitiiny kora kiwoteet Tabor, Saasuma ak Beth-shemesh, ak komong'ji Jordan; nganasook taman ak lo kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua19:23 Ni ko poroteet ne po pororyetap lagogap Issakar ko uu ortinwekwak; kokwatinwek kobooto nganasookwak che mengeechen. 
Joshua19:24 Ki mong' paraparyatap muut kobutyi pororyetap lagogap Asher ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Joshua19:25 Ki kiwotennywa Helkat, Ali, Beten, Aksap," 
Joshua19:26 Alamelek, Amad ak Misal ak eng' cherongo ko tiiny Karmel ak Sihor-libnat." 
Joshua19:27 Kong'eetee yooto koweek kotokyigei kong'asiis ak kwo agoi Beth-dagon, ak ko tiiny Zebulun, atebweetap Ipta-el ak kotokyigei murot kaataam kwo Beth-emek ak Neiel, yetyo komong'ji Kabul eng' murot kaataam," 
Joshua19:28 ak Hebron, Rehob, Haman ak Kanah agoi koit Sidon ne oo." 
Joshua19:29 Eng' yooto koweegak kiwoteet kwo Ramah ak koit nganaseetap Tyro ne ki king'ot, yeityo koweek kwo Hosah ak kobekyi nyanjetap Mediterenian eng' emetap Aksip," 
Joshua19:30 Uma, Apek ak Rehob. Ki nganasook tiptem ak aeng' kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua19:31 Ni ko poroteet ne po pororyetap lagogap Asher ko uu ortinwekwak; nganasochu ak kokwotinwekwak. 
Joshua19:32 Ki mong' parparyat ne po lo kobutyi lagogap Naphtali ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Joshua19:33 King'eete kiwotennywa Helep, eng' keetit ne ki mi Saananim, Adaminekeb ak Jabneel agoi Lakum ak komong'ji Jordan." 
Joshua19:34 Eng' yooto koweek kiwoteet kotokyigei cherongo kwo Asnot-tabor, Hukok ak kwo kotiiny Zebulun eng' murot tai ak Asher eng' cherongo, ak Judah eng' kong'asi, eng' Jordan." 
Joshua19:35 Nganasook che kiga king'ot ko Sidim, Ser, Amat, Rakat, Kineret," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Ramah, Hasor," 
Joshua19:37 Kedesh, Edrei, En-hasor," 
Joshua19:38 Iron, Migdal-el, Horem, Beth-anat ak Beth-shemesh; nganasook taman ak sogool kobooto kokwotinwekwak." 
Joshua19:39 Ni ko poroteet ne po pororyetap lagogap Naphtali ko uu ortinwekwak; nganasook kobooto kokwotinwekwak. 
Joshua19:40 Ki mong' parparyat ne po tisap kobutyi pororyetap lagogap Dan ko uu ortinwekwak. 
Joshua19:41 Kiwotetap porotennywa ko ki Sora, Estaol, Ir-semes," 
Joshua19:42 Saalabin, Aijalon, Itla," 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timnah, Ekron," 
Joshua19:44 Elteke, Gibeton, Baalat," 
Joshua19:45 Jeud, Bene-berak, Gat-rimon," 
Joshua19:46 Mejarkon ak Rakon, kobooto kiwoteet ne tokyingei Joppa." 
Joshua19:47 Ye ki ngerebee koreet lagogap Dan, koba kotogosta kobargei ak Lesem. Ki iluul ak kobar icheek eng' rotwetap chok, ak konam emet kobunji, yeityo komeny olooto ak koguure Lesem ak Dan koguurtoe kainetap Dan kwandanywa." 
Joshua19:48 Ni ko poroteet ne po pororyetap Dan ko uu ortinwekwak; nganasochu ak kokwotinwekwak. 
Joshua19:49 Kingo kes anyun kopchee takwegap emet ko porotosyek, kogoochi `piigap Israel Joshua weeriitap Nun poroteet eng' kwenunnywa." 
Joshua19:50 Ki igoochi nganaseetap Timnatsera eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim ne kigasoom ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki teech nganasanato ak komeny." 
Joshua19:51 Chu porotosyek che kipchei eng' parbarek tisiindet Eleazar ak Joshua weeriitap Nun kobooto che eecheen eng' kooriigap kwanisyek che po pororyosyegap piigap Israel. Kipchei eng' Shiloh koek poroteet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin. Ki iges anyun pcheetap emet. 
Joshua20:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua koleenji," 
Joshua20:2 Mwachi piigap Israel leenjin, “Otabaan nganasook che kimwechin, ko uu ye ki amwachi Musa." 
Joshua20:3 Mwechin rumiindet age tugul ne kalel ko manai ak koek eng' okweek ole kimwechin keungei ineendet ne yaaktoi korotiik. 
Joshua20:4 Mwechin `rumindonooto age eng' nganasochooto yeityo kotonon eng' kurgeetap nganaseet ak komwa ng'aleekyik kogas poisyegap nganasanooto. Ye ibata, komut kwo nganaseet oriit ak kogoochi ui ak komeny eng' kwenunnywa." 
Joshua20:5 Ngot koon ineendet ne yaaktoi korotiik koma igoitoi poisyek rumindonooto kwo eunekyik, amu ki par chiitap kokwennyi eng' lelet ak ki ma kowechei ineendet eng' tai." 
Joshua20:6 Myee anyun komeny nganasanooto agoi kwo kotonon eng' taitap tuiyet si kirwookyi. Menye olooto kot kome tisiindet ne oo ne mi eng' peetuusyechooto. Ye me tisiindonooto, koweektagei anyun rumindonooto kwo nganasennyi ne kimweune agoi koonnyi.”" 
Joshua20:7 Amu nooto anyun, ko ki itabaan Kedesh eng' Galilaya eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Naphtali, Shekem eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim ak Kiriath-arba (nooto ko Hebron) eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Judah." 
Joshua20:8 Eng' Jordan pitoniin eng' Jeriko ne tokyingei kong'asiis, ko ki itabaan Beser eng' surkwen eng' warengetap pororyetap Reuben, Ramot eng' Gilead eng' pororyetap Gad ak Golan eng' Bashan eng' pororyetap Manasseh." 
Joshua20:9 Chuuto kogi nganasook che ki kitabaanji lagok tugul che po Israel ak che po punootyot ne menyei kwenunnywa. Ki kiitabaan keele si komwechi olooto chii age tugul ne kabar chii ama nai si ma me eng' eutap ne yaaktoi korotiik kot kotonon eng' taitap tuiyet. 
Joshua21:1 Kingo pata, kobwa kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po Lawiik koriik ole mi Eleazar tisiindet, Joshua weeriitap Nun ak kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po pororyosyegap piigap Israel." 
Joshua21:2 Ki ng'alaalji icheek eng' Shiloh eng' emetap Kanaan, koleenji, “Ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' eutap Musa kole kegoonech nganasook kemeny kobooto emotinwekwak ole agete tuuga." 
Joshua21:3 Ak ki igoochi `piigap Israel Lawiik eng' porotennywa ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nganasochu, kobooto emotinwekwak.”" 
Joshua21:4 King'eyai kurainik, komong' korook che po ooreetap Kohatik. Ki sich lagogap Aron tisiindet che po ooreetap Kohat nganasook taman ak somok kobun pororyetap Judah, pororyetap Simion ak pororyetap Benjamin." 
Joshua21:5 Ki sich eng' kuraitap lagogap Kohat che ki ng'et nganasook taman eng' ortinwegap pororyosyegap Ephraim, Dan ak eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh." 
Joshua21:6 Ki sich eng' kurait lagogap Gerson nganasook taman ak somok eng' ortinwegap ooreetap Issakar, Asher, Naphtali ak eng' kebebertap ooreetap pororyetap Manasseh eng' Bashan." 
Joshua21:7 Ki sich eng' kurait lagogap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak nganasook taman ak aeng' eng' pororyetap Reuben, Gad ak eng' pororyetap Zebulun." 
Joshua21:8 Ki igoochi anyun eng' kurait `piigap Israel Lawiik nganasochooto kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' eutap Musa. 
Joshua21:9 Ki igoito eng' pororyetap lagogap Judah ak eng' pororyetap lagogap Simion nganasochu kagimwa eng' yu eng' kainaik: 
Joshua21:10 Ki punji chooto lagogap Aron che po ortinwegap Kohatik che ki po lagogap Lawi: amu ki nenywa kuraitap tai. 
Joshua21:11 Ki igoochi Kiriath-arba kwandap Anak (nooto ko Hebron) eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Judah kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye che kiyiem. 
Joshua21:12 Ago ki igoochi Kaleb weeriitap Jepune korotinwegap nganaseet kobunji kobooto kokwotinwekwak.
