Joshua21:13 Ki igoochi icheek `lagogap Aron tisiindet Hebron kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, nooto kogi nganaseet ne mwechin rumiindet ak Libna kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:14 ak Jatir kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, ak Estomoa kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye." 
Joshua21:15 Holon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Debir kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:16 ak Ain kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Juta kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Beth-shemesh ak emotinwekyik. Nganasook sogool eng' pororyosyechuuto aeng'." 
Joshua21:17 Eng' pororyetap Benjamin, ko ki Gibeon kobooto emotinwekyik, Geba kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:18 Anatoth kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Almon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan. 
Joshua21:19 Nganasook tugul che po lagogap Aron, tisiik, ko ki taman ak somok kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye." 
Joshua21:20 Ak ki sich ortinwegap lagogap Kohat, Lawiik, che icheek che ki ng'et eng' lagogap Kohatik, nganasoogap kurainnywa eng' pororyetap Ephraim." 
Joshua21:21 Ki igoochi icheek Shekem kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim, nooto kogi nganaseet ne mwechin rumiindet ak Gezer kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye." 
Joshua21:22 Ak Kibasaim kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Beth-horon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan. 
Joshua21:23 Eng' pororyetap Dan, ko ki Elteke kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Gibeton kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Gat-rimon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan. 
Joshua21:25 Ak eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, ko ki Taanak kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Gat-rimon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye; nganasook aeng'." 
Joshua21:26 Nganasook tugul che po ortinwegap lagogap Kohat che ki ng'et ko ki taman kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye. 
Joshua21:27 Ki igoochi lagogap Gerson eng' ortinwegap Lawiik eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, Golan eng' Bashan kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, nooto kogi nganaseet ne mwechin rumiindet ak Be-estera kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, chooto ko nganasook aeng'." 
Joshua21:28 Eng' pororyetap Issakar ko ki Kision kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Daberat kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmut kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak En-ganim kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye; nganasook ang'wan. 
Joshua21:30 Eng' pororyetap Asher, ko ki Misal kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Abdon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:31 Elkat kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Rehob kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, chooto ko nganasook ang'wan." 
Joshua21:32 Ak eng' pororyetap Naphtali, ko ki Kedesh eng' Galilaya kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, nooto kogi nganaseet ne mwechin rumiindet, ak Amot-dor kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Kartan kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook somok." 
Joshua21:33 Nganasook tugul che po Gershonik ko uu ortinwekwak, ko ki taman ak somok kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye." 
Joshua21:34 Ki igoochi ortinwegap lagogap Merari che icheek che ki ng'et eng' Lawiik eng' pororyetap Zebulun, Jokneam kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Karta kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Naalal kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Chooto ko nganasook ang'wan." 
Joshua21:36 Eng' pororyetap Reuben, ko ki Beser kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Jahas kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemot kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye ak Mepaat kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan. 
Joshua21:38 Eng' pororyetap Gad, ko ki Ramot eng' Gilead kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, nooto kogi nganaseet ne mwechin rumiindet, Mahanaim kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye," 
Joshua21:39 ak Hesbon kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, Jaser kobooto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye. Tugul ko nganasook ang'wan." 
Joshua21:40 Chuuto tugul kogi nganasoogap lagogap Merari ko uu ortinwekwak kobooto che ki ng'et eng' ortinwegap Lawiik; ak kurainnywa kogi nganasook taman ak aeng'. 
Joshua21:41 Nganasook tugul che po Lawiik eng' kwenutap emetap piigap Israel kogi nganasook artam ak sisiit kobooto emotinwekwak che kiyagisye. 
Joshua21:42 Ki tinyei age tugul eng' nganasochuuto emotinwekyik che kiyagisye che kiyiem ak ki uu nooto eng' nganasochuuto tugul. 
Joshua21:43 Ki igoochi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel emet tugul ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyekwak kole tuun igoochin ak ki nam kobunji ak komeny," 
Joshua21:44 ak ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kamuung'et eng' komoswek tugul, ko uu tugul che ki iyasyechi kwanisyekwak, ak ma piit chii eng' puunikwak tugul ne ki imuuch kotonon eng' tainnywa. Ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puunikwak tugul eunekwak." 
Joshua21:45 Ki isulda ng'aleek tugul che myach che kiga komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Israel, ma pet ng'olyoo agot agenge ne myee." 
Joshua22:1 Ki kuur anyun `Joshua piigap Reuben, che po Gad ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh," 
Joshua22:2 ak koleenji icheek, “Ki oriip tuguuk tugul che king'ataak `Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki ogas iit kutinnyu eng' tugul che ki ang'ataak." 
Joshua22:3 Ma omete tupchosyekwok eng' peetuusyechu chaang' agoi peetuuni ago ki oriip kayomisetap ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'. 
Joshua22:4 Ak nguno ko kagogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' tupchosyekwok kamuung'et ko uu ye ki mwachi. Oweeige anyun nguno ak obe emaisyekwok agoi emet ne kibunjok ne ki koonok Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jordan pitoniin. 
Joshua22:5 Ago oriipkei miising' oyai kayomisutyet ak ng'atuutyet che king'ataak Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ocham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ak obendate ortinwekyik tugul ak oriip ng'atuutikyik onamge ak ineendet ak oot eng' mugulelwekwok tugul ak saboonwekwok tugul.”" 
Joshua22:6 Ki iberuur anyun `Joshua icheek ak koleenji koba, ak ki pa emaisyekwak." 
Joshua22:7 Kiga kogoochi `Musa kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh poroteet eng' Bashan: ak ki igoochi `Joshua kebeberta age ne po pororyonooto poroteet eng' kwenutap tupchosyekwak eng' Jordan pitoniin ole tokyingei cherongo. Ak kingo machei `Joshua komwachi icheek koba emaisyekwak koberuur," 
Joshua22:8 ak kong'alaalji koleenji, “Oweeige emaisyekwok ak mogornateet ne oo, tuuga che chaang', fedha, thahabu, sugunonik, kariik ak ngoroik che chaang' miising'. Opchei parunenichuuto ki po puunikwok kobooto tupchosyekwok.”" 
Joshua22:9 Ki week anyun lagogap Reuben, lagogap Gad ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, koba eng' ole mi piigap Israel komanda eng' Shiloh, ne mi emetap Kanaan koba emetap Gilead, emet ne nenywa, ne kiga konam kobunji ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' eutap Musa." 
Joshua22:10 Ye kingo it emet ne neegit Jordan, ne mi emetap Kanaan, lagogap Reuben, Gad ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, koteech kaptisisyet ne oo ne taagu eng' olooto, eng' ye po Jordan." 
Joshua22:11 Kingo kas piigap Israel kemwaei koleen kogoteech kaptisisyet lagogap Reuben, lagogap Gad ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh eng' taitap emetap Kanaan, eng' kooret ne neegit Jordan, eng' komosta ne po piigap Israel," 
Joshua22:12 koyumgei tuiyet komugul ne po piigap Israel eng' Shiloh kole koba kobargei ak pichooto. 
Joshua22:13 Ki iyookto piigap Israel piik che ki indochin Phineas weeriitap Eleazar tisiindet koba emetap Gilead ole mi lagogap Reuben, Gad, ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh." 
Joshua22:14 Ki mi kobooto Phineas pounik tamanu; kobunu pounindet age tugul kootap kwanisyek eng' pororyetap age tugul ne po pororyosyegap Israel ak age tugul ko ki ne oo eng' kootap kwanisyekwak eng' eliphusyegap Israel. 
Joshua22:15 Ki pwa anyun ole mi lagogap Reuben, lagogap Gad ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh eng' emetap Gilead ak kong'alaalji koleenji," 
Joshua22:16 “Kamwa ko uu ni tuiyet komugul ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Nee chalwogi kooyachi Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel, kot omaste rani eng' kasubet ne osubi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kooteekyigei kaptisisyet ak ongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani?’" 
Joshua22:17 Tos mayamech tengektap Peor ne tomo kitiliilgei eng' tengegoto agoi ra, nganda ki nyoonji koroito tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?" 
Joshua22:18 Ago kaomaste rani eng' kasubet ne osubi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Amu kaongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani, ko mutai konereekyin ineendet tuiyet komugul ne po Israel." 
Joshua22:19 Ago ngo ma ianyinyat emet ne neng'wong', olande emet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole menyei kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak obwa onam emet eng' kwenunnyo kobunjook. Amat ongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anan ongeleljech oteekyigei kaptisisyet age ne ma kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Joshua22:20 Tos ki ma ibutyi nereegek tuiyet komugul ne po Israel amu ki yai Akan weeriitap Zerah chalwokto eng' kiit ne ki itabaanat ak tos kimalus chiichooto ineegei eng' tengektanyi?” 
Joshua22:21 Ki wol anyun lagogap Reuben, Gad ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh ak kong'alaalji kandoigap eliphusyegap Israel koleenji," 
Joshua22:22 “Ingen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne pou kamuktaik, ak ta konaei Israel agine, ngot ko eng' ngelelnateet anan ngot ko eng' kachililutyet ne kagichililji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, (ko mat isarwech rani,)" 
Joshua22:23 keteekyigei kaptisisyet kemaste eng' kasubet ne kisubi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anan ngot kemache kigoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei anan ngot ko kagoochinetap peek anan ngot kigoite korosegap kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet ko ingoyaakta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei. 
Joshua22:24 Anan ngot ko ki kiyai kii eng' riibetapkei agobo kiy keele, Ma nai chii ngot ko tuun ng'alaaljin lagokwok lagokyok eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei kole, ‘Oting'egei nee ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel?’" 
Joshua22:25 Amu ki yai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jordan koek kiwotennyo ak okweek lagogap Reuben ak lagogap Gad. Motinye kebeberta eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koyai anyun lagokwok lagokyok kobagaakta kayweet ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joshua22:26 Nooto anyun ko kogimwa keele, Ongechoboge keteekyigei kaptisisyet ne ma po kagoochinoik che kibeelei anan ko tiseiywek," 
Joshua22:27 ago si koek paornateet eng' kwenunnyo acheek ak okweek ak eng' kwenutap ibinwek che piitu let eng' acheek si kobiit keyai poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tainnyi eng' kagoochinoikyok che kibeelei ak eng' tiseiywekyok ak eng' kagoochinoikyok che po kaalyeet, si ma tuun leenji lagokwok lagokyok eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei, Motinye kebeberta eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joshua22:28 Amu nooto, ko ki kimwa anyun keele, ‘Ye tuun kamwaiwech ko uu nooto anan komwachi ibinwekyok eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei, kemwa anyun keele, Ogeer kergeindap kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki yai kwanisyekyok ne ma po kagoochinoik che kibeelei ama po tiseiywek ago paornateet eng' kwenunnyo acheek ak okweek." 
Joshua22:29 Ingolooit eng' acheek ama kingelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama kimaste rani eng' kasubet ne kisubi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kot keteech kaptisisyet ne po kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak ko po kagoochinoigap peek anan ko ne po tiseiywek, age ne ma kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo ne mi taitap koonnyi.’ ”" 
Joshua22:30 Kingo kas Phineas tisiindet, pounigap tuiyet ak kandoigap eliphusyegap Israel che ki mi kobooto ineendet ng'aleek che ki mwa lagogap Reuben, Gad ak lagogap Manasseh, kobaibai icheek miising'." 
Joshua22:31 Ki wolji Phineas weeriitap Eleazar tisiindet lagogap Reuben, lagogap Gad ak lagogap Manasseh, Kaginai rani keele mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenunnyo, amu mata ochalwogenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kiito. Kaosaru anyun piigap Israel eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joshua22:32 Eng' yooto koweek Phineas weeriitap Eleazar tisiindet kobooto pounik eng' ole mi lagogap Reuben, ak lagogap Gad ak koba eng' Gilead agoi emetap Kanaan ole mi piigap Israel, koipchi icheek ng'aleek kogeny." 
Joshua22:33 Ki ibaibai kioto piigap Israel, ak ki ilas piigap Israel Kamuktaindet, amata komwa kogeny kole koba kobargei ak icheek kong'em emet ne ki menyei lagogap Reuben ak lagogap Gad." 
Joshua22:34 Ki kuure anyun lagogap Reuben ak lagogap Gad kaptisisyonooto Ed, amu ki le, “Niito ko paornateet eng' kwenunnyo ne kagimwa keele Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet.”" 
Joshua23:1 Kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang' ye kingo kagogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel kamuung'et eng' puunikwak tugul eng' komoswek tugul, ye kiga koosit Joshua ko kagotar kenyiisyek che chaang'," 
Joshua23:2 koguur anyun `Joshua Israel tugul, poisyekwak, kandoikwak, kirwoogikwak ak kiptainikwak yeityo koleenji icheek, “Kaaositu ak ki kochang'a kenyiisyekyuk." 
Joshua23:3 Ki ogeer tuguuk tugul che ki koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' pororyosyechu tugul amu okweek, amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ineendet ne ki yai lugeet agobo okweek." 
Joshua23:4 Ki apcheiywok pororyosyechu kang'et koek poroteetap ortinwekwok kobooch Jordan, kobooto pororyosyek tugul che ki abar agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian ne tokyingei kong'asiis." 
Joshua23:5 Timdoi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' icheek eng' taing'wong' ak koon si ma ogeere; ak onam emennywa kobunjook, ko uu ye kimwaiwok `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Joshua23:6 Onyiganitu anyun miising' si oriip ak oyai tuguuk tugul che ki kisir eng' bukuitap Ng'atuutik ne po Musa, si momaste oistoegei tuguuchooto obe eutap tai anan ko ne po kaataam," 
Joshua23:7 si mobe kwenutap pororyosyechu chuuto kong'et eng' kwenung'wong' anan omwa kainaigap kanamonikwak anan oyosye eng' icheek anan oot anan ogutung'ji. 
Joshua23:8 Ago onamge ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko uu ye ki oyai agoi ra. 
Joshua23:9 Amu ki koon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taing'wong' pororyosyek che eecheen ak ko kiimeen. Ago ma piit chii ne ki tonon eng' taing'wong' agoi ra. 
Joshua23:10 Oone chiito agenge eng' okweek eliphuut amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne yaei lugeet agobo okweek ko uu ye kimwaiwok. 
Joshua23:11 Oriipkei anyun miising' si ocham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'. 
Joshua23:12 Amu ngot ochuchuigei obe let eng' kiy age tugul ak onamge ak pororyosyechuuto ki ng'et eng' kwenung'wong', otunge ak icheek ak obe ole mi ak kobwa ole omi," 
Joshua23:13 onai komyee ole ma koonei kogeny Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' pororyosyechuuto eng' taing'wong', ago egu mesteet ak kiit ne riichei piich eng' okweek ak kipchoritiit eng' karasaikwok ak katook eng' konyekwok, kot kotun olusye eng' emoni karaaran ki koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Joshua23:14 “Awendi anyun rani ooreet ne pendi piik tugul che po ng'wony. Ongen eng' mugulelwekwok tugul ak eng' saboonwekwok tugul, ole ma pet ng'olyoo agot agenge eng' tuguuk tugul che myachen che ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' agobo okweek. Ago ki isulda chooto tugul eng' okweek ama pet kiy agot agenge eng' chooto." 
Joshua23:15 Ago onai anyun ole, ko uu ye ki pwanjok tuguuk tugul che myachen che kimwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', koibwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto, tuguuk tugul che yaacheen agoi kogeswok eng' emoni karaaran ki koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Joshua23:16 “Ngo ngelelji kayomisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ne king'ataak ak obe oot kanamonik ak ogutung'ji, kolaldos anyun nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek ak ochakte obegu, owong'ugei eng' emoni karaaran kigogoonok ineendet.”" 
Joshua24:1 Ki iyum anyun `Joshua pororyosyek tugul che po Israel koba Shekem, ak koguur poisyegap Israel, pounikwak, kirwoogikwak ak kiptainikwak. Ki pwa anyun ak kotononso eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
Joshua24:2 Yeityo kong'alaal `Joshua ak koleenji piik tugul, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, Ki menyei kwanisyekwok keny aineet pitoniin; che icheeget ko Tera kwandap Abraham ak kwandap Nahor ak kiotei kanamonik." 
Joshua24:3 Ki amutu kwandang'wong' Abraham eng' aineet pitoniin ak amutate eng' emet tugul ne po Kanaan ak ates iyotennyi agoochi Isak. 
Joshua24:4 Ki agoochi `Isak Jakobo ak Esau, ak ki agoochi `Esau tulweetap Seir kobunji ak ko ki rekto Jakobo ak lagokyik koba Misiri." 
Joshua24:5 Ki ayookte `Musa ak Aron, ak abire Misiri korotwek ko uu kiit ne ki ayai eng' kwenunnywa, ak ye ibata amutwak omong'u." 
Joshua24:6 Yeityo anyun amutu kwanisyekwok komang'une Misiri ak ki obwa agoi nyanjet. Ki oon Misiriik kwanisyekwok eng' kariisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek kot koit Araraita ne Piriir. 
Joshua24:7 Kingo riirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konde mesundeito kwenung'wong' ak Misiriik ak koip nyanjet komaaluuch icheek ak kotuch. Ki keer iman konyekwok kiit ne ki ayai eng' Misiri. Eng' let ko ki omeny surkwen peetuusyek che chaang'. 
Joshua24:8 Yeityo amutwak oitu emetap Amorik che ki menyei Jordan pitoniin. Ki yai lugeet ak okweek ak ki ande icheeget eunekwok ak ki onam emennywa kobunjook, ak ki abar icheek eng' taing'wong'." 
Joshua24:9 Ki ng'eet anyun Balak weeriitap Sipor laitoryatap Moab ak kobargei ak Israel. Ki iyookto ineendet keguur Balaam weeriitap Beor konyo kochubok. 
Joshua24:10 Ago ma acham agas ng'aleegap Balaam. Eng' nooto anyun, nganda ki uu nooto, ko ki iberuurok, ak ki asarwok anyun eng' eunnyi." 
Joshua24:11 Ki olong'une `Jordan obwa Jeriko ak ki yai lugeet ak okweek piigap Jeriko, Amorik, Perisik, Kanaanik, Hitik, Girgasik, Hibik ak Jebusik, ak ki ande icheek eunekwok." 
Joshua24:12 Ki ayookte kaaraamyet kondoenak eng' taing'wong' ne ki oon laitorinichooto aeng' po Amorik; ma eng' rotweng'ung' po chok anan kwangeng'ung'. 
Joshua24:13 Ki agoonok emet ne kimaoyai kiy, nganasook omeny che kimaoteeche; oame che po mbareenigap sabibuk ak che po mseituni che ki ma omiine." 
Joshua24:14 “Oiywei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oboisyechi ineendet eng' muguleldo ne ma tinyei keniisyet ak eng' imanit. Oiste kanamonik che kiotei kwanisyekwok eng' aineet pitoniin ak eng' Misiri, ak oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joshua24:15 Ago ngot ogeere ko ya oboisyechini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, olewen rani ne oboisyechini; ngo kanamonik che kiotei kwanisyekwok eng' aineet pitoniin anan kanamonigap Amorik che omenye emennywa; ago aboisyechini anee ak koonnyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Joshua24:16 Ki wol pichooto kole, “Achicha, Ma kibagaaktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak keoot kanamonik." 
Joshua24:17 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ko ineendet ne ki imutwech ak kwanisyekyok kemang'une emetap Misiri eng' kootap otwoknateet ak ko ineendet ne ki yai kaboorunoichu kieechen eng' tainnyo ak koriibonwech eng' ooreet tugul ne ki kibunu ak eng' kwenutap piik tugul che ki kibunu kwenunnywa." 
Joshua24:18 Ki oon `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik tugul koba eng' tainnyo, chooto Amorik che ki menyei emoniito. Nooto anyun kiboisyechini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agacheek, amu ineendet ko Kamuktaindennyo.”" 
Joshua24:19 Koleenji `Joshua piik, “Momuuchi oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne tiliil. Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne amei ng'etkong'; ma nyoiywok kaat eng' pistoeng'wong' anan ko eng' tengekwogikwok." 
Joshua24:20 Ngot omete Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oot kamuktaik che too, koweeksei anyun ak koyaiywok ne ya ak kogeswok, ago kiga koyaiywok ne myee.”" 
Joshua24:21 Ak ki leenji `piik Joshua, “Achicha, kiboisyechini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Joshua24:22 Ak ki leenji `Joshua piik, “Oo paorinik che obaoryanjinigei ole kaolewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, oboisyechi ineendet.” Ak ki mwa kole, “Ki paorinik.”" 
Joshua24:23 Ara anyun, oiste kanamonik che too che mi kwenung'wong' ak otokyi mugulelwekwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Joshua24:24 Koleenji `piik Joshua, “Kiboisyechini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo ak kegas iit kutinnyi.”" 
Joshua24:25 Koyomiskei `Joshua anyun ak pichooto peetuunooto, ak koyachi ng'atuutyet ak kayomisutyet eng' Shekem." 
Joshua24:26 Ki sir ng'aleechuuto `Joshua eng' bukuitap ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet. Ki inem koita ne oo ak konde kotonon eng' keetitap alayet keel ne ki mi ye po ole-tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Joshua24:27 Yeityo komwachi `Joshua piik tugul koleenji, “Ee, egu kooi paoryat agobo acheek. Amu kagogas ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kimwaiwech, ko egu anyun paoryat agobo okweek, si moeesye Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Joshua24:28 Ki leenji anyun Joshua piik koba, ak ki wo chii tugul ye mi porotennyi." 
Joshua24:29 Kingo pata tuguuchuuto, kome Joshua weeriitap Nun otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko po kenyiisyek pogol ak taman." 
Joshua24:30 Kitup `icheek ineendet anyun eng' kiwotetap porotennyi eng' Timnat-sera ne mi emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim, eng' murot kaataam ne po tulweetap Gaas." 
Joshua24:31 Kiboisyechi Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Joshua ak eng' peetuusyek tugul che po poisyek che kita komi ko kagome Joshua, che ki ingen poisyet tugul ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiga koyai agobo Israel." 
Joshua24:32 Kitup icheek kawegap Joseph eng' Shekem che ki ibu piigap Israel eng' Misiri eng' kebebertap emet ne kigaal Jakobo eng' weeriigap Hamor kwandap Shekem eng' fedhaisyek pogol, ak ki ek chooto poroteetap lagogap Joseph." 
Joshua24:33 Kime agine Eleazar weeriitap Aron, ak kitup `icheek ineendet eng' tulweetap Phineas weeriinnyi, ne kiga kigoochi ineendet eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim." 
Judges1:1 Kingo pata meetap Joshua, koteepse `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ng'oo ne tai ne togostoi si kobargei ak Kanaanik agobo acheek?”" 
Judges1:1 Kingo pata meetap Joshua, koteepse `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ng'oo ne tai ne togostoi si kobargei ak Kanaanik agobo acheek?”" 
Judges1:2 Kole Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Judah ne togostoi. Ogeero, kande emonooto eunnyi.”" 
Judges1:3 Ki leenji `Judah tupchennyi Simion, “Ngetogoste tuwai si kobiit kebargei ak Kanaanik che menye emet ne ki kigoono; si tuun keebe tuwai agane emeng'ung'.” Koba anyun Simion ak ineendet." 
Judges1:4 Ki togosta anyun Judah ak ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunekwak Kanaanik ak Perisik. Ki par piik eliphuusyek taman eng' Besek. 
Judges1:5 Ki nyoor `icheek Adoni-besek eng' Besek, ak ki ibookyi ineendet ak koterteer Kanaanik ak Perisik." 
Judges1:6 Ki mwei Adoni-besek; ago ki oon ineendet ak ki nam ak kotil moriikyik che eecheen che po eunek ak che po keelyek. 
Judges1:7 Ki mwa Adoni-besek kole, “Ki iyum amitwogik eng' kurereetap mesennyu laitorinik tamanwogik tisabu che kiga kitil morikwak che eecheen che po eunek ak che po keelyek; ko uu ye ki ayai, ko kayaiywo Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto.” Ki imut `icheek ineendet kwo Jerusalem, ak ki mechi olooto." 
Judges1:8 Ki ibookyi `lagogap Judah Jerusalem ak konam. Kibare rotwetap chok ak kobeel nganaseet eng' maat. 
Judges1:9 Kingo pata, kochoortagei lagogap Judah kobargei ak Kanaanik che ki menyei emetap tuloonook, murot tai ak eng' warenget." 
Judges1:10 Kibargei Judah kora ak Kanaanik che ki menyei Hebron, ne ki kiguure eng' tai Kiriath-arba, ak ki par Sesai, Ahiman ak Talmai." 
Judges1:11 Ki wo eng' yooto kobargei ak piik che ki menyei Debir. Kainetap Debir eng' tai ko ki Kiriath-sepher. 
Judges1:12 Ki mwa Kaleb kole, “Ineendet ne parei Kiriath-sepher ak konam, agoochini Achsah cheptonyu kotun.”" 
Judges1:13 Ki nam nganaseet Othniel weeriitap Kenas, ng'eetap kamet ne ming'in ne po Kaleb. Ki igoochi anyun `Kaleb Othniel cheptonyi Achsah koek kwondonyi." 
Judges1:14 Kingo nyo Achsah ole mi Othniel, kogaigai ineendet kosoom kwandanyi kooret. Ye kingo choorugei Achsah eng' sigiryennyi, koteebe `Kaleb ineendet koleenji, “Imache nee?”" 
Judges1:15 Kole ineendet, “Koono kaberuret; amu ki igoono emet ne po Murot Tai, ko koono kora kong'igap peek ak icheek.” Ki igoochi Kaleb ineendet kong'igap peek che mi ole togostaat ak che mi ole rektoot." 
Judges1:16 Ki togosta lagogap Kenindet, kabyugoitap Musa, komanda eng' nganaseetap sosik kobooto lagogap Judah ak koba surkwen ne po Judah eng' Murot Tai ne po Arad, ak koba komeng'iis ak pichooto." 
Judges1:17 Ki pa Judah ak Simion ng'eetap kamet, ak koterteer Kanaanik che ki menyei Sepat, ak king'em kogees. Ak ki kiguure kainetap nganasanooto Horma." 
Judges1:18 Ki nam Judah nganasoogap Gasar, che po Askelon ak che po Ekron kobooto kiwotosyekwak." 
Judges1:19 Ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Judah, ak ki nam emetap tuloonook. Ki ma imuuch koon piik che ki menyei atebweet, amu ki tinyei kariisyegap kariik." 
Judges1:20 Ki kigoochi Kaleb Hebron ko uu ye ki kamwa Musa, ak ki oon eng' olooto weeriik somok che po Anak." 
Judges1:21 Ma oon `lagogap Benjamin Jebusik che ki menyei Jerusalem; ko uu nooto, kogimeng'iis Jebusik kobooto lagogap Benjamin eng' Jerusalem agoi ra." 
Judges1:22 Ki pa kotogosta che po kootap Joseph ak icheek kobargei ak Bethel, ak ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto icheek." 
Judges1:23 Ki iyookto che po kootap Joseph piik koba kosegei Bethel. Kainetap nganasanooto eng' tai ko ki Luz. 
Judges1:24 Kingo keer segeik chiito ne ki mang'une nganaseet, koleenji, “Kisoomin iboorwech ole kibunei kebendi nganaseet oriit si tuun kerirenen.”" 
Judges1:25 Ki iboorchi ole kibunei kechutei nganaseet ak ki par nganaseet eng' rotwetap chok. Ki pagaakta chiichooto ak koonnyi tugul kobechigei. 
Judges1:26 Ki wo chiichooto emetap Hitik ak koteech nganaseet, yeityo koguure kainetap nganasanooto Luz, ne kainennyi agoi ra." 
Judges1:27 Ma oon Manasseh meng'iigap Beth-shean ak nganasookyik, Taanak ak nganasookyik, Dor ak nganasookyik, Ibleam ak nganasookyik anan meng'iigap Megiddo ak nganasookyik, ago ki testai Kanaanik komeny emonooto." 
Judges1:28 Kingo kagogimegitu Israel, konde Kanaanik koyai poisyonigap otwoknateet, ama oon icheek kogestagei." 
Judges1:29 Ma oon Ephraim agine Kanaanik che ki menyei Gezer, ak ki testai Kanaanik komeny kwenunnywa." 
Judges1:30 Ma oon Zebulun piik che ki menyei Kitron anan che ki menyei Naalal. Ki testai Kanaanik komeny kwenunnywa ak koek che yaei poisyetap otwoknateet. 
Judges1:31 Ma oon Asher piik che ki menyei Ako, che po Sidon, che po Alap, che po Aksip, che po Helba, che po Aphik anan ko che po Rehob." 
Judges1:32 Ago kimeng'iis Aserik eng' kwenutap Kanaanik che ki menyei emonooto, amu kimaon icheek." 
Judges1:33 Ma oon Naphtali meng'iigap Beth-shemesh, anan ko che ki menyei Beth-anat, ago ki meny kwenutap Kanaanik che po emonooto. Ki ek piik che ki menyei Beth-shemesh ak che po Beth-anat che yaei poisyonigap otwoknateet." 
Judges1:34 Ki toorta `Amorik lagogap Dan koweekyi emetap tuloonook, ak ma chamji korek kobwa atebweet." 
Judges1:35 Kimach Amorik komeny tulweetap Heres eng' Aijalon, ak eng' Saalbim, ago ki iterteeris kootap Joseph, ak ko konam pichooto koyai poisyonigap otwoknateet." 
Judges1:36 Ki wo kiwotetap Amorik kong'etee ole togosyin Akrabbim kot koit Shelah ak kotogosta. 
Judges2:1 Ki togos malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Gilgal konyo Bochim ak kole, “Ki amutwak otogosu eng' Misiri, obwa emet ne ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwok. Ki amwa ale, ‘Ma koi abut kayomisennyu ne ki kiarorchigei ak okweek." 
Judges2:2 Eng' kebebertang'wong' ko mat oyai arorut ak piik che menyei emoni. Obut kapkorosusyekwak.’ Ago ma ogas iit kutinnyu. Nee ni ka oyai? 
Judges2:3 Ki amwa ale ma oone icheek koba eng' taing'wong', ago egu che inyalilok, ak koek kanamonikwak mestonok eng' okweek.”" 
Judges2:4 Kingo kagomwachi malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleechu lagok tugul che po Israel, kowaakyo ak koriiryo miising'." 
Judges2:5 Ak kiguure yooto Bochim, ak eng' yooto koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Judges2:6 Kingo kagoleenji `Joshua piik koba, kwo chii tugul eng' piigap Israel ole mi porotennyi ak konam emet." 
Judges2:6 Kingo kagoleenji `Joshua piik koba, kwo chii tugul eng' piigap Israel ole mi porotennyi ak konam emet." 
Judges2:7 Kiboisyechi `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Joshua, ak eng' peetuusyek tugul che po poisyek che kita komi ko kagome Joshua, che kiga kogeer poisyet tugul ne oo ne ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koyachi piigap Israel." 
Judges2:7 Kiboisyechi `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Joshua, ak eng' peetuusyek tugul che po poisyek che kita komi ko kagome Joshua, che kiga kogeer poisyet tugul ne oo ne ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koyachi piigap Israel." 
Judges2:8 Kime Joshua weeriitap Nun otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko po kenyiisyek pogol ak taman. 
Judges2:8 Kime Joshua weeriitap Nun otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko po kenyiisyek pogol ak taman. 
Judges2:9 Kitup `icheek ineendet eng' kiwotetap emennyi eng' Timnat-heres, eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim, eng' murot kaataam ne po tulweetap Gaas." 
Judges2:10 Ki pek ak icheek tugul che po ibinato ak ki kiyumji kapkwanisyekwak. Ki piit ibinda age eng' let ne ki ma kongen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anan ko poisyet ne kiga koyai ineendet agobo Israel." 
Judges2:11 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koot Baalik. 
Judges2:12 Ki meto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, ne ki imut icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri, ak koosup kamuktaik alak, che po piik che ki menyei komoswekwak tugul, ak kong'uruukyi kanamonichooto. Kitach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kot konereech." 
Judges2:13 Ki meto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koot Baal ak Astarot." 
Judges2:14 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel, ak ki inde icheek eunegap piik che kiluul icheek. Ki aldochi eunegap puunik che kiluul icheek kot ko ki mata komuuchi kotononso eng' taitap puunikwak." 
Judges2:15 Komosta age tugul ole ki pa icheek, ko ki mi eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kogoochi kiterteer, ko uu ye kiga koyasyechi `ineendet icheek, ak kinyalilso miising'." 
Judges2:16 Ki ing'eetyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kirwoogik, che ki sar eng' eunegap piik che kiluul icheek." 
Judges2:17 Nga no, koma kas iit icheek kirwoogikwak kora. Ki isubot kamuktaik alak koibotkei ak kong'uruuk eng' tainnywa. Kimasta kochaakta kobagaakta ooreet ne kibunei kwanisyekwak, che kigase iit ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma yai icheeget ko uu nooto." 
Judges2:18 Kingo ng'eetyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogik, ko ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto kirwoogindet, ak kosar icheek eng' eunegap puunikwak eng' peetuusyek tugul che po kirwoogindonooto. Ki riiree Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tigenennywa ak eng' icheek che ki inyalili ak koimi." 
Judges2:19 Ago kingo me kirwoogindet, koweigei let ak koyai tuguuk che yaach kosiir kwanisyekwak, kosubi kamuktaik alak, kootei ak kong'uruukyin. Ma siisyo eng' poisyonikwak anan eng' ooreetap ngelelnatennywa." 
Judges2:20 Ki nereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel ak komwa kole, “Amu ki kobistoe pororyoni kayomisennyu ne ki ang'at kwanisyekwak, ama kas iit kutinnyu," 
Judges2:21 koma aoone eng' tainnywa age tugul eng' pororyosyek che ki pagaakta Joshua ye kingo kagome. 
Judges2:21 koma aoone eng' tainnywa age tugul eng' pororyosyek che ki pagaakta Joshua ye kingo kagome. 
Judges2:22 Aboisyee icheek atyemee Israel si ageer ngot komuuchi koriip kobendatee iman ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki riip kwanisyekwak.” 
Judges2:23 Ki pagaakta anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyechooto, ma oon kochaakta, ama inde icheek eutap Joshua." 
Judges2:23 Ki pagaakta anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyechooto, ma oon kochaakta, ama inde icheek eutap Joshua." 
Judges3:1 Chu pororyosyek che ki pagaakta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit kotyeme Israel tugul chooto ki ma nai agobo lugosyegap Kanaan," 
Judges3:2 (si kobiit konai agobo lugeet ibinwegap piigap Israel, che ki tomo konai agobo lugeet eng' tai):" 
Judges3:3 icheek ko ki kiptainik muut che po Philistiik, Kanaanik tugul, Sidonik ak Hibik che ki menyei tulweetap Lebanon, kobooch tulweetap Baal-hermon agoi Lebo-Hamath." 
Judges3:4 Ki kibagaakta icheek si kobiit ketyeme Israel, si kobiit konai ngo kase iit ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ki ng'at kwanisyekwak eng' eutap Musa." 
Judges3:5 Ara ki meny piigap Israel kwenutap Kanaanik, Hitik, Amorik, Perisik, Hibik ak Jebusik." 
Judges3:6 Ki imut tiibiikwak koek osotikwak, ak ki igoochi tiibiikwak kotun weeriikwak ak ki oot kamuktaikwak." 
Judges3:7 Ki yai ne ya piigap Israel eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koutye ineendet kamuktaindennywa ak koot Baalik ak Aserot." 
Judges3:8 Nooto anyun kinereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel, ak ki alda icheek koba eunegap Kusan-risataim laitoryatap Mesopotamia. Ki oot anyun piigap Israel Kusan-risataim kenyiisyek sisiit." 
Judges3:9 Ye kingo riirchi `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kong'eetyi icheek yetindet, ne ki sar icheek, nooto ko Othniel weeriitap Kenas ng'eetap kamet ne ming'in ne po Kaleb." 
Judges3:10 Ki nyoonji ineendet Kabuuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki irwookyi Israel ak ki wo lugeet. Ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyi Kusan-risataim laitoryatap Mesopotamia ak ki iterteer Othniel ineendet." 
Judges3:11 Ak ki imuuny emet kenyiisyek artam. Ak ki me Othniel weeriitap Kenas. 
Judges3:12 Ki yai ne ya piigap Israel kogeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki igimit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Eglon laitoryatap Moab kobargei ak Israel, amu ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Judges3:13 Ki iyum Elgon lagogap Ammon ak Amelek kobwa kobar Israel, kiluul icheek ak konam nganaseetap sosik." 
Judges3:14 Ki oot piigap Israel Eglon laitoryatap Moabik kenyiisyek taman ak sisiit. 
Judges3:15 Ago ye kingo riirchi piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kong'eetyi `ineendet icheek yetindet, nooto ko Ehud weeriitap Gera, Benjaminindet, chiito ne ki po kaataam. Ki iyooktoe ineendet piigap Israel kagoochinet koyookyi Eglon laitoryatap Moab." 
Judges3:16 Ki itang'jigei Ehud rotwetap chok ne ng'atiben komoswek tuwai, ne aechin ak kakwautyet agenge ne po euut. Kiratyi kubestanyi ne po tai kotabon ngoryennyi oriit." 
Judges3:17 Ki ipchi `ineendet kagoochinonooto Eglon laitoryatap Moab. Ki chiito ne neraat miising' Eglon. 
Judges3:18 Ye kingo kagogoito kagoochinonooto, koleenji pichooto che ki ibu kagoochinet koba." 
Judges3:19 Ago ki week ineendet eng' ole ki mi kanamonik eng' ole neegitee Gilgal, ak komwa kole, “Atinye ng'olyootap ung'oot ne kagiyogunena, ee laitoryat.” Ak ki le, “Osisye!” Ak kimanda piik tugul che ki mi tainnyi." 
Judges3:20 Ki nyo Ehud ole mi ineendet; ye kitebyei ineegei eng' koonnyi ne ki uuree. Ak ki le Ehud, “Atinye ng'aleek che aibun kobun Kamuktaindet.” Kong'eet anyun eng' ng'echerennyi." 
Judges3:21 Ki iyogoito eunnyi ne po kaataam Ehud ak konem rotwetap chok eng' kubestanyi ne po tai ak kotoor moennyi. 
Judges3:22 Ki wo rotweet oriit kobooto kungit; ak ki tuch sundet rotwonooto, amu ma ng'us rotweet eng' moennyi ak kimandae patai." 
Judges3:23 Ki manda anyun Ehud kwo serem ak koger kurgotik, kogerchi ineendet ko ak kotemel." 
Judges3:24 Ye kingo kagomanda, kobwa otwogikyik ak kogeer kurgotigap koot ko temelotin. Ki ibwaat kole, “Imuuch kogawo kotoretkei eng' koonnyi ne kiuure.”" 
Judges3:25 Ki igenis anyun kot kolilaanso. Kingo keer icheek kole ma yaat ineendet kurgotigap koot, ko ki inem anyun yaateiwot ak koyaat. Ogeero, kiga kobutyi ng'wony kiptaiyannywa kome." 
Judges3:26 Ki chilil Ehud ye kita koogenisyei icheek ak kwo kosiirtoe kanamonik, ak komwechi Seira." 
Judges3:27 Kingo it Ehud emennyi, koguut igoondit, kochoortagei piigap Israel kobooto ineendet eng' emetap tuloonook, komi ineendet kondoe." 
Judges3:28 Ki leenji icheek, “Osubwo! Amu kagonde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunekwok puunikwok Moabik.” Ki choortagei koosup ineendet koba konam tabarwegap Jordan korebe Moabik, ama chamji chii kolanda." 
Judges3:29 Ki par icheek eng' peetuunooto murenik olo po eliphuusyek taman che po Moab, tugul che ki kiimeen ak che ki nyigoonen, ama chilil agot agenge." 
Judges3:30 Ki kiterteer Moab peetuunooto eng' eutap Israel. Ak ki imuuny emet eng' kenyiisyek tamanwogik sisiit. 
Judges3:31 Kingo pata ineendet kobiit Shamgar weeriitap Anat ne ki par murenik pogol lo che po Philistiik eng' kiplitwet. Ki sar ineendet agine Israel. 
Judges4:1 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet kogeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye kingo kagome Ehud. 
Judges4:2 Ki alda `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek koba eunegap Jabin laitoryatap Kanaan, ne ki laitorani eng' Hasor. Ki indochin lugeennyi Sisera, ne ki menyei Haroset ne po Pororyosyek." 
Judges4:3 Ki riirchi anyun `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki tinyei kariisyegap kariik pogol sogool, ak kiga konyaliil piigap Israel eng' kimnateet eng' kenyiisyek tiptem." 
Judges4:4 Eng' peetuusyechooto, ko kirwoogindetap Israel Debora maotyot, kwondap Lapidot." 
Judges4:5 Ki tebee tiiretap Debora keel eng' kwenutap Ramah ak Bethel eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim. Ki cham kotogosu piigap Israel ole mi ineendet kobwanei kirwooget. 
Judges4:6 Ki iyookto ineendet kole keguur Barak weeriitap Abinoam eng' Kedes-naptali ak koleenji, “Tos ma ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, ‘Ui iriikyi tulweetap Tabor, ak imutu eliphuusyek taman kobun piigap Naphtali ak che po Zebulun?" 
Judges4:7 Amutun Sisera kandoindet ne po lugeetap Jabin, konyo si otuye eng' aineetap Kison kobooto karisyekyik ak piikyik che chaang'; andoi ineendet euneguk.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Kowolji Barak kole, “Ngot kebendi tuwai, awendi. Ago ngot koma kibendi tuwai, koma wendi.”" 
Judges4:9 Kole, “Kibendi tuwai iman. Ago panda ne iwendi, koma siinyoorchigei inyee teegisto amu indoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sisera eunegap kwony.” Ki ng'eet Debora koba Kedesh ak Barak." 
Judges4:10 Ki kuur `Barak Zebulun ak Naphtali kobwa Kedesh. Ki togosta koba kiplugotinik eliphuusyek tamanu koosup ineendet, ak ki wo Debora agine kobooto ineendet." 
Judges4:11 Kiga kotabaanegei Heber Kenindet, Kenik chuun alak, che echegeet ko lagogap Hobap kabyugoitap Musa, ak kwo koteech emainnyi eng' ole mi keetit eng' Saananim, ye neegitee Kedesh." 
Judges4:12 Ye ki ngemwachi Sisera keleenji kowa Barak weeriitap Abinoam kotogosta tulweetap Tabor," 
Judges4:13 koyum kariisyekyik tugul, kariisyegap kariik pogol sogool ak piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet, kong'etee Haroset, agoi aineetap Kison." 
Judges4:14 Koleenji Debora Barak, “Ng'eet! Ni peetuut ne indoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sisera eung'ung'. Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kondoun.” Ki wo anyun Barak kochoortagei eng' tulweetap Tabor, kobooto kiplugotinik eliphuusyek taman kosubi ineendet." 
Judges4:15 Ki iseer `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sisera kobooto kariisyekyik tugul ak lugeennyi tugul eng' rotwetap chok eng' taitap Barak. Ki choorgei Sisera eng' chepkichutinnyi ak komwei eng' keeldo. 
Judges4:16 Ki oon Barak kariisyek kobooto lugeet kot koit Haroset. Ki pek lugeet komugul ne po Sisera eng' rotwetap chok kot koma ng'et chii. 
Judges4:17 Ki mwei Sisera kobun keeldo, agoi koit emaitap Jael osotyotap Heber Kenindet amu ki ting'egei kaalyeet Jabin laitoryatap Hasor ak kootap Heber Kenindet." 
Judges4:18 Ki manda Jael kotorookto Sisera ak koleenji ineendet, “Nyoo ko, kiptaiyandennyu. Nyoo ole ami, ameiywei!” Ki wo ole mi eng' emait, ak kituge ngoryeet." 
Judges4:19 Yeityo koleenji, “Asoomin ale inaga peek tutigin aee, amu ama melel.” Ki yaat soteetap cheego ak konaga kolu yeityo kotuch." 
Judges4:20 Ki leenji chiichooto ineendet, “Tonon eng' kurgeetap emait si ye nyo chii age tugul ak koteebenen kole, ‘Mi chii yu?’ Ileenji, ‘Achicha.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Ki inem Jael osotyotap Heber tigongyotap emait ak kiriswet ak kwo kosapchi yeityo kotoree tigongyondonooto mwaitap kondanyi kot komanda kwo kotoor ng'wonyut; ki ruei ineendet miising' amu ki kang'et, ak kime." 
Judges4:22 Ye kingo ta koonei `Barak Sisera, komong' Jael kotorook ineendet ak koleenji, “Nyoo aboorun chiito ne icheeng'e.” Ki nyo ye ki mi ineendet ak konyoor koruei Sisera ko kagome, ak ki mi tigongyot mwaitap kondanyi." 
Judges4:23 Eng' peetuunooto anyun, ko ki iterteer `Kamuktaindet Jabin laitoryatap Kanaan eng' taitap piigap Israel." 
Judges4:24 Kong'eete peetuunooto, ko ki kimiit eutap `piigap Israel koterteer Jabin laitoryatap Kanaan, kot kobar kowong' ineendet." 
Judges5:1 Eng' peetuunooto, ko kityenso anyun Debora ak Barak weeriitap Abinoam koleen," 
Judges5:2 “Amu ki indo kandoik eng' Israel, amu ki igoitogei piik ak icheek eng' chamyet. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Judges5:3 Ogas, okweek laitorinik! Oep iit, okweek pounik! Atyenjini anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Atyenjini kalasunet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Judges5:4 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ki imande eng' Seir, ye ki imande eng' kooretap Edom, kobotan ng'wony ak koroobon kipsengwet, ee, kosooi poolik peek." 
Judges5:5 Ki root tuloonook kotendeen eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nooto po Tulweetap Sinai, eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Judges5:6 Eng' peetuusyegap Shamgar weeriitap Anat, eng' peetuusyegap Jael, ko ki ma kobunei chii ortinwek che eecheen, ak kibunoti kiprutoinik ortinwegap taban." 
Judges5:7 Kimatagomi pounik eng' Israel, ki igeskei kot ang'eet anee Debora, ang'eet anee kamet eng' Israel!" 
Judges5:8 Ki lewen kamuktaik alak, kobiit lugeet eng' kurgotik. Tos kige keerei long'eet anan ko ng'otit eng' piik eliphuusyek artam eng' Israel?" 
Judges5:9 Tokyingei muguleldanyu pounigap Israel, che ki igoitogei eng' chamyet eng' kwenutap piik. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Judges5:10 Omwaite okweek che obune sigiroik che leelach, che otebee ngoroik che ki itoi che po kamanuutyet ne oo, ak okweek che obendoti eng' ooreet." 
Judges5:11 Eng' cheetap putiik, eng' komoswek che kirame peek, yooto ye mwaitoe poisyonigap imanda che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, poisyonigap imanda che po pounatennyi eng' Israel. Yeityo korekto piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koba kot koit ormariichok." 
Judges5:12 Ng'eet, ng'eet, Debora! Ng'eet, ng'eet, tyen! Ng'eet, ee Barak, imut luuleniguk che ki iluul, inyee weeriitap Abinoam." 
Judges5:13 Yeityo kochoorgei che ki ng'et che po piik che taagunotiin, ki choorgei piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo ineendet, si kobargei ak che nyigoonen." 
Judges5:14 Kimang'une Ephraim che salu Amelek; kosubun, inyee Benjamin, che otupche. Ki pun Makir pounik, ak ki pun Zebulun icheek che tindoi kirokto ne po kandoindet ne oo ne po lugeet." 
Judges5:15 Ki mi pounigap Issakar kobooto Debora; kiit ne ki uu Issakar, ko ki yai nooto Barak agine; kirwoochi atebweet koosubi keelyekyik. Eng' ortinwegap Reuben ko ki mi kasiagutik che eecheen che po muguleldo." 
Judges5:16 Ki lya si itebee kwenutap piusyegap keechiirek, si igas kuutetap ndurerusyek che kiguutyin akwotisyek? Eng' ortinwegap Reuben ko ki mi kasiagutik che eecheen che po muguleldo." 
Judges5:17 Ki meny Gilead Jordan pitoniin, ak Dan, ko kilya si kotebee melisyek? Ki tep Asher kosisyigei eng' ngeguutap nyanjet, komeny ole neegitee luukwegap peekyik." 
Judges5:18 Zebulun ko ki piik che ki inde saboonwekwak ng'oiyonditap meet, ak ki yai Naphtali agine eng' oldinwek che torooreen che po emet." 
Judges5:19 Ki pwa laitorinik, koyai lugeet; ki pargei ak laitorinigap Kanaan; eng' Taanak ole neegitee peegap Megiddo, ma ip kelunoi alak tugul che po fedha." 
Judges5:20 Ki yai kecheik lugeet kong'etee kipsengwet, eng' ortinwekwak che torooreen ko ki pargei ak Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Kila icheek aineetap Kison, ainonooto po keny, aineetap Kison. Ee saboondanyun, ui tai eng' kimnateet!" 
Judges5:22 Ak kityech ng'wony keelyegap paraisisyek; kobooto toroombenet, toroombenetap keelyegap che kiimeen." 
Judges5:23 Ochup Meros, mwaei malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ochup eng' chubeet ne ng'waan piik che menyei olooto, amu ma pwa kotoret Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotoret Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo che kiimeen." 
Judges5:24 Egu Jael ne iberuuroti eng' kwonyiik, osotyotap Heber Kenindet, eng' kwonyiik che menyei emait ko egu ne iberuurot." 
Judges5:25 Ki soom peek, ago ki inage cheego; ki ipchi mwaitap cheego eng' taabeet ne po teegisto." 
Judges5:26 Ki inem tigongyot, ak kiname eunnyi ne po tai kiriswetap musogindet; ak kokwere Sisera kiriswonooto, kikwer kotui metinnyi, kitoor ak konyarnyar mwaitap kondanyi." 
Judges5:27 Eng' keelyekyik kogiluul, koru kochulak; eng' keelyekyik kogiluul, koru kosiis; ole kiluuljigei, ko ki ru anyun kome." 
Judges5:28 Ki itito eng' tirisia, kotabendo, ak ki riir kametap Sisera eng' tirisyetap segengeisyek kole, ‘Amu nee si kogagei chepkichutinnyi ma sip konyo? Amu nee si kogagei cheetap keelyegap kariisyekyik?’" 
Judges5:29 Ki wolji kwonyiikyik che ng'oomen kole iman, kawoljigei ineendet teebutyet," 
Judges5:30 Tos tomo konyoor ak kopchei parunenik? Chepto agenge anan tiibiik aeng' ko punjin chii agenge; punjin Sisera, parunenigap saleiywek che teer. Parunenigap saleiywek che teer che po nabutigap lelesta, che po saleiywek aeng' che teer che po nabutigap lelesta eng' kaatwegap luulenik kobunjo." 
Judges5:31 Ingobek kowong'kei puuniguk tugul, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ago ingoigei che chamei ineendet asiista, ye charu eng' kimnateennyi!” Ki piit kaalyeet anyun eng' emet kenyiisyek artam." 
Judges6:1 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunegap Midian kenyiisyek tisap. 
Judges6:2 Ak ki iterteer eutap `Midian Israel. Ki paljigei piigap Israel keriingonik eng' tuloonook, kebenonik ak kiyachigei irimoik amu Midian." 
Judges6:3 Ye kingo kagogolso Israel, kotogos anyun Midianik, ak Amelegik ak piigap kong'asiis, kobwa kobargei ak icheek." 
Judges6:4 Kibwane konyo koteech emennywa ak kong'em ruroteetap emet, agoi koit Gaza, ama ituuch amitwogik eng' Israel, keechiir, anan ko tany anan ko sigiryo." 
Judges6:5 Amu ki pwa kotogos ak tuukwak ak emaisyekwak, ak ki mong' ko uu chereng'enyinik eng' chaang'indo; ki ma ko iitoksei icheek ak tambeesikwak; ak ki pwa kong'em emet." 
Judges6:6 Ara kinyoor Israel nyalilda ne oo amu Midianik, ak ki riirchi piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Judges6:7 Ak ye kingo riirchi piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu Midianik," 
Judges6:8 koyookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek maotyot. Ki mwachi koleenji, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, ‘Ki amutwak otogosu eng' Misiri ak amutwak omang'une kootap otwoknateet." 
Judges6:9 Ki atyachak eng' eutap Misiriik, ak eng' eutap tugul che ki inyaliilak, ak ki aoon icheek koba eng' taing'wong', ak agoonok emennywa.’" 
Judges6:10 Ki aleenjok, ‘Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'; moiywei kamuktaigap Amorik, che omenye emennywa.’ Ago ma ogas iit kutinnyu.”" 
Judges6:11 Ki nyo malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kotebee keetitap alayet keel ne ki mi Ophrah, ne ki po Joash Abiesrindet. Kituei weeriinnyi Gideon nganuuk eng' ole kitue sabibuk, si kobiit kouny nganuchooto eng' Midianik." 
Judges6:12 Ak ki mong'ji ineendet malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koleenji, “Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten, inyee chiito ne ii kiim ak ko ii nyigan!”" 
Judges6:13 Ak ki leenji `Gideon ineendet, “Ee, Kiptaiyandennyu, ngot komi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootech, ko amu nee si kobwanjech tuguuchu tugul? Mi ano poisyonikyik tugul che po kwong'eet che kimwaiwech kwanisyekyok, koleenjech, ‘Tos ki ma imutwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ketogosu eng' Misiri?’ Ago ki kobagaktech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kondaech eunegap Midianik.”" 
Judges6:14 Ak kigusyi kong' `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ak koleenji, “Ui eng' kimnatoning'ung', ak isaru Israel eng' eutap Midianik. Tos ma ayookten?”" 
Judges6:15 Koleenji Gideon, “Ee, Kiptaiyat, asaruunee nee Israel? Keero, ooreennyo ko ponoon kosiir tugul che po Manasseh ak ko aa ne ming'in eng' tugul eng' kootap kwandanyu.”" 
Judges6:16 Ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ami kobooten iman ak ibare Midianik ko uu yo chiito agenge icheek.”" 
Judges6:17 Ki leenji Gideon, “Ngot ko kaanyooru chameet eng' taing'ung', iboorwo anyun kaboorunet ile inyee ne ing'alaalwo." 
Judges6:18 Asaain ale amat iwe eng' yu agoi anyo ole imi, ak aibu kagoochinennyu ak ande taing'ung'.” Ak ki le, “Atebye kot iitu kogeny.”" 
Judges6:19 Ki wo anyun Gideon koonnyi, ak kochop aarwetap ng'oroor, ak magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek che po peek che ng'ootiin keruutik tiptem. Ki inde panyeek kerebet, ak ki inde suuteek tereet ak koipchi ineendet eng' keetitap alayet keel, kwo kogoochi." 
Judges6:20 Ki leenji malaikaiyatap `Kamuktaindet ineendet, “Inemu panyeek ak magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, ak igonoor kooi ak irong'u suuteek.” Ak ki yai ko uu nooto." 
Judges6:21 Ki iyogoito malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor walitap kirokto ne ki tinyei eng' eunnyi ak kotwae panyechooto ak magatinichooto ma kinde mermereek. Ki togosta maat eng' koyata ak kobeel panyeek ak magatinichooto ma kinde mermereek. Yeityo kobetito kwo malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tainnyi ne mata kogeer. 
Judges6:22 Ak ki keer Gideon kole kaagaa ineendet ko malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki le ineendet, “Pwo! Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Kaageer malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kimni.”" 
Judges6:23 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, “Ingotep kaalyeet kobooten! Meiywei, memee.”" 
Judges6:24 Koteekyi Gideon anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' yooto, ak koguure “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kaalyeet.” Miitei agoi kora eng' Ophrah ne po Abiesrik." 
Judges6:25 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet kemounooto, “Kweri kirgitap kwandang'ung', kirgitap aeng' ne po kenyiisyek tisap, ak ibut kapkorosutap Baal ne tinyei kwandang'ung' ak iluul Asera ne neegitee kapkorosunooto." 
Judges6:26 Yeityo iteekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kaptisisyet eng' paragutap irimoniito, kotetak komyee, ak ikweri kirgit ne po aeng' ak igoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei kobooto kweenigap Asera che iebe.”" 
Judges6:27 Ki imut anyun Gideon piik taman eng' otwogikyik ak koyai ko uu ye kamwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu ki iywei piigap kootap kwandanyi ak piigap nganaseet, koma imuuch anyun koyai peet, koyai kemoi." 
Judges6:28 Ye kingo ng'eetyo piigap nganaseet kota ko karon inne, ogeero, ko kiga kebut kapkorosutap Baal, ak kiga kiluul Asera ne kineegite kapkorosuut ak kiga kigoito kirgit ne po aeng' eng' kaptisisyet ne kiga kiteech." 
Judges6:29 Koleenjigei, “Ng'oo ne koyaei kii?” Ak ye kingo kin ak koteebat, konai kole, koyaei kiito Gideon weeriitap Joash." 
Judges6:30 Koleenji piigap nganaseet Joash, “Imutu weeriing'ung' komong', kebar; amu kabut kapkorosutap Baal ak koep Asera ne komi yooto.”" 
Judges6:31 Ago ki leenji Joash piik tugul che ki ibeligei ak ineendet, “Ong'alaali otoreti Baal? Anan osaru ineendet? Ne ng'alaali agobo ineendet ko myee kebar kota ko karon. Ngot ko kamuktain ineendet, ko ingong'alaal kotoretkei, amu kogoluul chiito kapkorosunnyi.”" 
Judges6:32 Koguure anyun ineendet eng' peetuunooto Jerubaal, kole, “Ingong'alaal Baal korwookyi ineendet,” amu kobut kapkorosunnyi." 
Judges6:33 Ki iyumgei anyun Midianik tugul ak Amelegik ak piigap kong'asiis, ak kolong' koteech atebweetap Jezreel." 
Judges6:34 Ago ki nyoonji Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gideon; ak ki kuut igoondit ak ki iyumgei Abiesrik koosup ineendet. 
Judges6:35 Ki iyookto piik koba Manasseh komugul, ak ki iyumgei ak icheek koosup ineendet. Ki iyookto piik alak koba Asher, Zebulun ak Naphtali, ak ki togos kotorook icheek." 
Judges6:36 Ki leenji `Gideon Kamuktaindet, “Ngot isaru Israel eng' eunnyu ko uu ye ki imwa," 
Judges6:37 keero, andoi koroorigap keechiirek rwanyut ne kiboorsee. Ngot konam rewoot koroorik icheegei ak ko yaamaat ng'wonyut tugul anai anyun ale isaru Israel eng' eunnyu, ko uu ye ki imwa.”" 
Judges6:38 Ak ki ek ko uu nooto. Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' koging'eet kota ko karon miising', ak koruruny koroorik, ak koiiny komong' peegap rewoot kot konyi taabeet." 
Judges6:39 Ki leenji `Gideon Kamuktaindet, “Amat kolalyo nereegeguk agobo anee, kota amwa ni kityo. Asaain ale chamwo atyem koroorik konyil agenge kogeny. Ingosaiyo koroorik icheegei ak ingobiit rewoot eng' ng'wonyut tugul.”" 
Judges6:40 Ara ki yai Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto kemounooto. Ki saiyo koroorik icheegei ak ki piit rewoot eng' ng'wonyut tugul. 
Judges7:1 Ki ng'eet anyun karon miising' Jerubaal, ineendet ko Gideon, kobooto piigap lugeet tugul che ki mi ak ineendet ak koteech ole neegitee kondap peek ne po Harok. Ki mi piigap lugeet che po Midian murot kaataam ne po pichooto, eng' atebweet ole neegitee tulweetap Moreh." 
Judges7:2 Ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gideon, “Chaang' piik che mi kobooten ne ma muuchi ande Midianik eunekwak, si ma menjo Israel kole, ‘Kasarwo eunnyu.’" 
Judges7:3 Ui anyun nguno, imwaite kogas piik, ileenji, Age tugul ne nyogoor ak kobotani ko ingoweek kwo eng' tulweetap Gilead.” Ak ki week piik eliphuusyek tiptemu ak aeng', ak ki ng'et eliphuusyek tamanu." 
Judges7:4 Ago ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gideon, “Ta ko chaang' piik, Imutu kobwa ole mi peek si atyemun icheek eng' yooto. Si age tugul ne amwaun aleenjinin, ‘Obendi ak ni, obe ak nooto,’ ak age tugul ne amwaun aleenjinin, ‘Mobendi ak ni, koma wendi nooto.’ ”" 
Judges7:5 Komut anyun piik kobwa ye mi peek. Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gideon, “Age tugul ne labei peek eng' ng'eleptanyi ko uu ye labei seset, itabaan nooto; ko uu nooto agine age tugul ne kutunyi si koe peek.”" 
Judges7:6 Ak koitetap icheek che kilabune peek eunekwak kobwa kutit, ko ki piik pogol somok. Ago kigutung'so piik chuun alak koe peek." 
Judges7:7 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gideon, “Asarwok eng' pichooto pogol somok che kalap peek, ak ande Midianik euneguk. Ago ingoba piik tugul, ingowo chii tugul oldanyi.”" 
Judges7:8 Koip anyun piik amitwogik eng' eunekwak ak igondisyekwak. Ki mwachi `ineendet piigap Israel tugul koba, kwo chii tugul emainnyi, ago ki raany piik pogol somok. Ki mi piigap lugeet che po Midian eng' atebweet ng'wony eng' ole ki mi Gideon." 
Judges7:9 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet kemounooto, “Ng'eet, choortegei nganaseet; amu kaande eung'ung'." 
Judges7:10 Ago ngot iywei iwe, obe ak otwogindeng'ung' Pura ochoortegei tuwai nganaseet." 
Judges7:11 Ui ak igas kiit ne mwaei icheek; ak ye ibata inyiganitu ak ichoortegei ibookyi nganaseet.” Ki choortagei anyun ak otwogindennyi Pura agoi koit ole pooch piik che ki mi nganaseet che tinyei kariik. 
Judges7:12 Kiga ruiyo Midianik, Amelegik ak piigap kong'asiis tugul eng' atebweet koigei chereng'enyinik eng' chaang'indo ak ki ma koitoksei, ki tee tambeesikwak ng'aniegap ngeguutap nyanjet eng' chaang'indo." 
Judges7:13 Kingo it Gideon yooto, ko ki mi chiito ne ki mwachi chorwennyi karwotitoet koleenji, “Keero, koarwotyi karwotitoet: koibutyi magatyat ne ming'in ne po baale nganaseetap Midian ak kororokyi emait, yeityo kokwer koluul ak kogabui koru eng' ng'wony.”" 
Judges7:14 Ki wolji chorwennyi koleenji, “Niito koma kiit age kobatee rotwetap chok ne po Gideon weeriitap Joash, chiitap Israel. Kagonde Kamuktaindet Midian ak lugeet tugul eunekyik.”" 
Judges7:15 Ye kingo kas Gideon mwaunetap karwotitaonooto ak weegennyi, kong'uruuk kosa; ak ki wo koweektagei nganaseetap Israel ak komwa kole, “Ong'eetyee, amu kagonde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunekwok lugeetap Midian.”" 
Judges7:16 Kipchei Gideon anyun pichooto pogol somok koek kweanaik somok. Ki igoochi age tugul eng' icheek igoondit, tereet ne ma mi kiy, kobooto kegengetap maat ne mi tereet age tugul." 
Judges7:17 Ki leenji icheek, “Ogeera, ak oyai ko uu ye ayae. Ye kaait ye pooch nganaseet, ko uu ye ayae, oyai ak okweek ko uu nooto." 
Judges7:18 Ye aguut igoondit, anee ak piik tugul che mi kobooto, oguut anyun ak okweek igondisyek eng' komosta age tugul ne po nganaseet tugul ak omwa ole, ‘Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Gideon.’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Ki it anyun Gideon ak pichooto pogol che ki mi kobooto ineendet, ole pooch nganaseet eng' taunetap riipseet ne po kemoi kween, ye kata kewale riipseet. Ki kuut igondisyek ak kotui tereenik che ki mi eunekwak." 
Judges7:20 Ki kuut kweanaichooto somogu igondisyek, ak kotui tereenik. Kiname eunegap kaataam kegenganigap maat ak konam igondisyek eng' eunekwak che po tai si koguut; ak kiwaach kole, “Rotwetap chok ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ne po Gideon.”" 
Judges7:21 Ak ki tonon chii tugul eng' komostanyi ko kayiem nganaseet. Ak ki rwai lugeet tugul che ki mi nganaseet oriit, ak kowaakyo icheek ye ki mwee." 
Judges7:22 Ye ki kiguute igondisyechooto pogol somok, kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobar chii age tugul chiito ne kaonei eng' nganaseet tugul. Kimwei lugeet kot koit Beth-sita kotokyigei Serera, agoi kiwotetap Abel-meolah ole neegitee Tabat." 
Judges7:23 Ki iyumgei murenigap Israel kobun Naphtali, Asher ak Manasseh tugul ak koon Midianik." 
Judges7:24 Ki iyookto `Gideon piik koba emet komugul ne po tuloonoogap Ephraim koleenji, “Ochoorugei, kebargei ak Midian, ak onam kebeberwek che mi peek agoi Beth-bara ak Jordan.” Ki iyumgei anyun murenik tugul che po Ephraim ak konam kebeberwek che mi peek tugul kot koit Beth-bara agot Jordan." 
Judges7:25 Ki nam `icheek pounik aeng' che po Midian, Oreb ak Seeb. Ak ki par Oreb eng' rwandetap Oreb, ak kobarchi Seeb ole kitue sabibuk eng' Seeb, ak ko oon Midianik. Ak ki ip `icheek metitap Oreb ak ne po Seeb koipchi Gideon eng' Jordan pitoniin." 
Judges8:1 Ki mwachi piigap Ephraim ineendet koleenji, “Amu nee si iyaiywech ko uu ni, si meguurech ye ki iwendi obargei ak Midian?” Ak kibolji `icheek ineendet miising'." 
Judges8:2 Ago ki leenji ineendet, “Koayai nee ne siirei ne kooyai okweek? Tos ma kaigai turetap sabibugap Ephraim kosiir kesisyetap Abiezer?" 
Judges8:3 Kogonde Kamuktaindet eunekwok pounigap Midianik, Oreb ak Seeb. Nee ne kotamuuchi ayai ne siirei ne kooyai okweek?” Ye kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto, kogeskei anyun nereegekwak agobo ineendet." 
Judges8:4 Ki it Gideon kobooto murenik pogol somok Jordan ak kolanda. Nganda kiga kong'etyo icheek, ko ki testai koonei puunikwak." 
Judges8:5 Ara ki leenji piigap Sukoth, “Kaigai ogoochi magatiinik piik che isubwo, amu kagong'etyo ak aoone Seba ak Salmuna, laitorinigap Midian.”" 
Judges8:6 Ago ki wol pounigap Sukoth kole, “Tos mi eunegap Seba ak Salmuna eung'ung' nguno, kot kigoochi magatiinik lugeeng'ung'?”" 
Judges8:7 Ak ki le Gideon, “Nooto anyun, ye kagonde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunekyuk Seba ak Salmuna, abaache anyun poorwekwok eng' katogap surkwen ak katook che rutei piich.”" 
Judges8:8 Ki togosta anyun eng' olooto kwo Penuel, ak kong'alaalji pichooto ko uu nooto. Ak ki wolji ineendet piigap Penuel ko uu ye kiga wolji piigap Sukoth." 
Judges8:9 Ak ki mwachi piigap Penuel koleenji, “Ye aweigei eng' kaalyeet, anyoone aluuli teeksoni kooi.”" 
Judges8:10 Ki mi Seba ak Salmuna Karkor kobooto lugosyekwak, olo po piik eliphuusyek taman ak muut, tugul che ki ng'et eng' lugeet tugul ne po piigap kong'asiis. Amu kiga kobek piik eliphuusyek pogol agenge ak tiptem eng' icheek che ki tinyei kariigap lugeet." 
Judges8:11 Ak kitogosta Gideon kobun ooreetap piik che ki menyei emaisyek eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po Noba ak Jogbea, ki ibookyi ak ki par lugeet amu ki mi icheek eng' kaalyeet." 
Judges8:12 Ki mwei Seba ak Salmuna. Ki oon `ineendet icheek; ki nam laitorinichooto aeng' po Midian koek piik che ratotiin, Seba ak Salmuna, ak ye kingo kagenam koaragen miising' lugonooto tugul." 
Judges8:13 Kingo pata pooryeet kogiweek Gideon weeriitap Joash eng' lugeet kobun ole kitogostoe ne po Heres. 
Judges8:14 Ki nam anyun muren age ne po piigap Sukoth ak koteepse. Ki sirchi ineendet kainaigap pounik ak poisyegap nganaseet Sukoth, ki piik tamanwogik tisap ak tisap tugul." 
Judges8:15 Ki nyo ineendet ole mi piigap Sukoth ak koleenji, “Ogeero, Seba ak Salmuna, che ki ororecha agobo icheek, ole, ‘Tos mi eunegap Seba ak Salmuna eung'ung' nguno, kot kigoochi magatiinik piiguk che kagong'etyo?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Ki nam anyun poisyegap nganaseet ak koip katogap surkwen ak katook che rutei piich, ak kobaage piigap Sukoth koneete icheek." 
Judges8:17 Ki iluul teeksonooto kooi po Penuel ak kobar piigap nganasanooto. 
Judges8:18 Koleenji anyun Seba ak Salmuna, “Ki piik che uu nee che ki obar eng' Tabor?” Ki wol icheek kole, “Kiit ne iu inyee, ko ki uu nooto ak icheek; ki kergei age tugul eng' icheek ak lagogap laitoryat.”" 
Judges8:19 Ki le ineendet, “Kitupchosyekyuk, weeriigap kamennyu; ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko nda ki kobagakte kosapcho, ko kama kota abarook.”" 
Judges8:20 Ki leenji anyun taaitanyi Jeter, “Ng'eet ak ibar icheek!” Ago ma ng'us rotwennyi po chok nerananooto; amu ki iywei, amu kita ko ming'in." 
Judges8:21 Yeityo komwa Seba ak Salmuna kole, “Ng'eet parech! Amu ko uu kiit ne uu mureno, ko uu nooto kimnateennyi.” Ara king'eet Gideon ak kobar Seba ak Salmuna, ak konem kariigap lelesta che ki mi kaatwegap tambeesikwak." 
Judges8:22 Yeityo komwachi piigap Israel Gideon koleenji, “Poiywech inyee, ak weeriing'ung', ak weeriitap weeriing'ung' agine, amu koisarwech eng' eutap Midianik.”" 
Judges8:23 Ago ki leenji Gideon icheek, “Maboiywok, ama poiywok weeriinnyu. Poiywok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Judges8:24 Ak ki leenji Gideon icheek, “Amagenok teebutyet, ale kogoono chii tugul munaogap itiik eng' parunenik.” (Amu ki tinyei munaogap thahabu che po itiik, amu ki Ismaelik.)" 
Judges8:25 Ak ki wol icheek kole, “Kigoonu eng' chamyet.” Ak ki iito ngoryeet, ak kowiirchi chii tugul munaogap itiik che po parunenik." 
Judges8:26 Ki ek nyigiisindap munaogap itiik che po thahabu, che kiga soom ineendet, keruutik tiptem; koma ki it kariigap lelesta, kariik alak che po kaatit, ngoroik che arusen ne piriir che ki ilaachi laitorinigap Midian ak nyororosyek che ki mi kaatwegap tambeesik." 
Judges8:27 Ki yai Gideon ephod eng' tuguuchooto, ak ki inde nganasennyi, eng' Ophrah. Ki isup Israel tugul kioto koyaat ibeetapkei, ak ki ek kioto mesteet eng' Gideon ak eng' koonnyi." 
Judges8:28 Ki kiterteer anyun Midian eng' taitap piigap Israel, mata koyotkei met agoi. Ak ki mi kaalyeet emet eng' kenyiisyek artam kotee kosabe Gideon." 
Judges8:29 Ara ki wo Jerubaal nooto Gideon weeriitap Joash komeny koonnyi. 
Judges8:30 Ki tinyei Gideon weeriik tamanwogik tisap che kisichei, amu ki tinyei osotik che chaang'." 
Judges8:31 Ki sikyi weeriit agine chebaigeiyandennyi ne ki miitei Shekem, ak kiguure kainennyi Abimelek." 
Judges8:32 Ki ilil Gideon weeriitap Joash, ak ki kitupchi kereritap Joash kwandanyi eng' Ophrah ne po Abiesrik." 
Judges8:33 Ak ye kingo pata meetap Gideon, koweek kogeny piigap Israel, koibotkei ak Baalik, ak koyai Baal-berit koek kamuktaindennywa." 
Judges8:34 Ak ma ibwaat piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ne ki sar icheek eng' eunegap puunikwak tugul che ki mi komosta age tugul." 
Judges8:35 Ak mata koriiree kootap Jerubaal, ne ineendet ko Gideon, ko uu myeeindo tugul ne kiga koyachi Israel." 
Judges9:1 Ki wo Shekem Abimelek weeriitap Jerubaal ye mi kapimamet ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandap kamennyi ak kong'alaalji icheek koleenji," 
Judges9:2 “Kaigai omwachi piik tugul che po Shekem kogas: Nee ne myee eng' okweek: koboiywok weeriik tugul che po Jerubaal chooto tamanwogik tisabu anan poiywok chiito agenge? Obwaat kogeny ole aa kawekwok ak ko aa panyeekwok.” 
Judges9:3 Ara ki mwachi imamosyekyik piik tugul che po Shekem ng'aleechooto kogas, ak kimach mugulelwekwak koosup Abimelek, amu ki mwa kole, “Ineendet ko ne kitupche.”" 
Judges9:4 Ki igoochi `pichooto ineendet fedhaisyek tamanwogik tisap eng' kootap Baal-berit, che ki igaigae `Abimelek piik che yaach, che njaamik, che ki isup ineendet." 
Judges9:5 Ki wo anyun kootap kwandanyi eng' Ophrah, ak kibarchi koita agenge tupchosyekyik, weeriigap Jerubaal, chooto tamanwogik tisap. Ago kichilil Jotham weeriit ne ming'in ne po Jerubaal, amu kiunygei." 
Judges9:6 Ki iyumgei anyun piik tugul che po Shekem ak che po kootap Milo ak koba koyai Abimelek koek laitoryat, eng' ole neegitee keetit ne oo ne po toloita ne ki mi Shekem." 
Judges9:7 Ye ki ngemwachi Jotham, kogiwo kotogosta agoi kotonon eng' tulweet parak ne po Gerizim ak kowaach eng' kutit ne oo kole: “Ogasa, okweek pounigap Shekem, si kobiit kogasak Kamuktaindet!" 
Judges9:8 Ki pa peetuut age keetiik koiil age koek laitoryat ne pou icheek. Ki leenji keetitap mseituni, ‘Laitoran eng' acheek!’" 
Judges9:9 Ago ki leenji `mseituni icheek, ‘Tos abagaakte akwaiyennyu, ne kigonyite kamuktaik ak piik, ak awe atumdumotegei eng' paragutap keetiik?’" 
Judges9:10 Yeityo koleenji `keetiik mogoywet, ‘Nyoo ilaitoran eng' acheek!’" 
Judges9:11 Ago ki leenji `mogoywet icheek, ‘Tos abagaakte anyinyindanyu, ak logoekyuk che myach, awe atumdumotegei eng' paragutap keetiik?’" 
Judges9:12 Ki leenji keetiik anyun keetitap sabibuk, ‘Nyoo ilaitoran eng' acheek!’" 
Judges9:13 Ki wol keetitap sabibuk kole, ‘Tos, abagaakte yaetap divaik, che iboiboi kamuktaik ak piik, ak awe atumdumotegei eng' paragutap keetiik?’" 
Judges9:14 Yeityo koleenji `keetiik tugul keetit ne ming'in ne po katook, ‘Nyoo ilaitoran eng' acheek!’" 
Judges9:15 Ak ki leenji `keetoto ming'in keetiik, ‘Ngot iman oiila aek laitoryat eng' okweek, obwa anyun ak omang'u urwennyu. Ago ngo ma uu nooto, ko ingomang'une maat keetit ne ming'in, ak kobeel taragonigap Lebanon kogees.’ ”" 
Judges9:16 “Nooto anyun nguno ngo ki oyai ne po iman ak ne litit, ye ki oyai Abimelek koek laitoryat, ak ngot ko ki oyachi ne myee Jerubaal ak koonnyi, ak ki oyachi ineendet ko uu ye nyoljin poisyonigap eunekyik," 
Judges9:17 amu ki yai lugeet abba agobo okweek, ki ma iit saboondanyi ak kisarwok eng' eutap Midian," 
Judges9:18 ago kong'eetyi kootap abba ra ak obar weeriikyik, piik tamanwogik tisap eng' koita agenge, yeityo oyai Abimelek, weeriitap otwogindennyi ne chepto koek laitoryat eng' piigap Shekem, amu ineendet ko ne otupche" 
Judges9:19 ngot ko ki oyachi Jerubaal ne po iman ak ne litit kobooto koonnyi rani, oboiboitu anyun eng' Abimelek ak ingobaibait agine eng' okweek." 
Judges9:20 Ngot koma uu nooto, ko ingomong' maat eng' Abimelek ak kobeel pounigap Shekem kogees, kobooto kootap Milo; ak ingomong' maat eng' pounigap Shekem ak eng' kootap Milo, yeityo kobeel Abimelek kogees.”" 
Judges9:21 Yeityo kolabat Jotham komwei kwo Beer, ak komeny ineendet olooto, amu ki iywei Abimelek ng'eetap kamet." 
Judges9:22 Ki ek pounindet Abimelek eng' Israel kenyiisyek somok. 
Judges9:23 Ki iyookyi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tamirmiryet ne ya kwenutap Abimelek ak piigap Shekem, ak ki iberber piigap Shekem Abimelek." 
Judges9:24 Ki yaak niito si kobiit koityi kolgolyet Abimelek ak piigap Shekem ko uu ye ki yachi weeriigap Jerubaal tamanwogik tisap, si kotebee korotiikwak paragutap Abimelek ne ki parei icheek, ak paragutap piigap Shekem che ki igimit eunekyik si kobar weeriik che tupcho." 
Judges9:25 Ki inde `piigap Shekem murenik che ki ribistos koriibei ineendet eng' tuloonook parak, ak kirebee icheek tuguuk piik tugul che kibunei oranooto; ak ki kimwachi Abimelek." 
Judges9:26 Ak ki nyo Gaal weeriitap Ebed kobooto tupchosyekyik kolanda koba komeny Shekem. Ki iyan ineendet piigap Shekem. 
Judges9:27 Ki pa mbareennywa kobut sabibuk ak kotui, ak koyai igoorto. Yeityo koba kootap kamuktaindennywa, koamis ak koeisei ak kochup Abimelek." 
Judges9:28 Ki le Gaal weeriitap Ebed, “Ng'oo Abimelek, ak ki ng'oo acheek che kebo Shekem, kot keoot ineendet? Weeriitap Jerubaal ak Sebul kiptaiyandennyi ko oote piigap Hamor kwandap Shekem. Ago amu nee si keoot ineendet?" 
Judges9:29 Ak nda kami pichu eunnyu, ta kaiste Abimelek. Ki leenji Abimelek, ‘Tes lugeeng'ung' ak imong'u.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Ak kingo kas Sebul pounindetap nganaseet ng'aleegap Gaal weeriitap Ebed, konereech miising'." 
Judges9:31 Ki iyookto piik koba kap Abimelek eng' ng'aalseet, koleenji, “Keero, kabwa Shekem, Gaal weeriitap Ebed ak tupchosyekyik, machei kochaamji piigap nganaseet si kobookyin." 
Judges9:32 Ng'eet nguno anyun kemoi, inyee ak piik che mi kobooten ak oribisye ogong'isye eng' mbar;" 
Judges9:33 ak mutai karon, ko kata kochor asiista isip ing'eet ak ibookyi nganaseet. Ye kamong' ineendet kobooto piik che mi tugul kobookyin, iyachi anyun icheek kiit age tugul ko uu ye kenyooru poroindo.”" 
Judges9:34 Ki ng'eet anyun Abimelek kemoi ak piik tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet ak kiribisyo icheek agobo Shekem eng' kweanaik ang'wan. 
Judges9:35 Ye kimando Gaal weeriitap Ebed ak kotonon eng' ole kibunei eng' kurgeetap nganaseet koging'eet anyun Abimelek ak piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet eng' ole koga ribisye. 
Judges9:36 Kingo keer `Gaal piik koleenji Sebul, “Keero, choorugei piik eng' tuloonook parak!” Ak ki leenji Sebul ineendet, “Igeere urwetap tuloonook ko uu piik.”" 
Judges9:37 Ago ki mwa Gaal kogeny kole, “Keero, choorugei piik eng' kwenutap emet, ak nyoonei kweanet agenge kobunu ooreetap keetitap Meonenim.”" 
Judges9:38 Koleenji anyun `Sebul ineendet, “Mi ano kuting'ung' nguno, ne koimwa ile, ‘Ng'oo Abimelek kot keoot ineendet?’ Tos chu koma piik che koisase? Mande anyun nguno ak obargei ak icheek.”" 
Judges9:39 Komanda Gaal kondoe piigap Shekem ak kobargei ak Abimelek. 
Judges9:40 Ara ki oon `Abimelek ineendet ak ki mwei eng' tainnyi. Ki ibutyo che chaang' che ki kiguoten, kot koit ole kibunei eng' kurgeet." 
Judges9:41 Ki meny anyun Abimelek Aruma, ak ki oon Sebul Gaal ak tupchosyekyik komanda, si ma meny Shekem." 
Judges9:42 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi, ko kagoba piik mbar, kemwachi Abimelek agobo niito." 
Judges9:43 Ki imut `ineendet piik, kopcheune kweanaik somok ak koribisyo eng' mbar. Kingo keer piik komong'u saang' eng' nganaseet, kong'eet kobookyi icheek ak kobar." 
Judges9:44 Ye kingo rwaei Abimelek ak kweanaik che ki mi kobooto ineendet koba tai ak kotononso eng' ye kibunei eng' kurgeetap nganaseet, ko ki rwai kweanaichooto alage aeng'u kobookyi che ki mi mbar ak ki par icheek." 
Judges9:45 Kibargei Abimelek ak nganasanooto peetuut komugul; ak ki nam nganaseet ak ki par piik che ki mi oriit. Kibut nganaseet ak koseerchi olooto muunyuk. 
Judges9:46 Kingo kas piik tugul che po teekseet ne kooi ne po Shekem agobo ng'olyoondonooto, ko ki pa icheek irimeet oriit ne po kootap Elberit." 
Judges9:47 Ki kimwachi Abimelek keleenji, kagoyumgei piik tugul che po teekseet ne kooi ne po Shekem." 
Judges9:48 Ki togosta anyun Abimelek tulweetap Salmon, kobooto piikyik tugul, ak ki nam Abimelek aiywet koebe temetap keetit ak konam kotiiny kaat. Ki mwachi piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet koleenji, “Kiit ne kogeer ayai, oyai ochokyi ko uu ye kayai.”" 
Judges9:49 Ara ki ep chii tugul temennyi ne po keetit ak koosup Abimelek, ak konde temenichooto irimeet, ak kobeel irimonooto komi piik oriit. Ki pek anyun ak icheek piik tugul che po teeksonooto kooi ne po Shekem, che itei eliphuut agenge murenik ak kwonyiik." 
Judges9:50 Yeityo kwo Abimelek Tebes, ak koteech kotoorchi Tebes, ak konam." 
Judges9:51 Ago ki miitei irimeet ne kiim eng' nganasanooto, ak kimwechi olooto murenik tugul ak kwonyiik kobooto icheek tugul che po nganaseet. Kigerchigei icheek koot oriit ak kotogosta kwo koot parak." 
Judges9:52 Ki nyo Abimelek teeksonooto kooi ak kobargei ak pichooto, ak ki wo koriikyi kurgeetap teeksonooto kooi kole kobeel." 
Judges9:53 Kitururchi kobogoryot age metitap Abimelek isyet ak kitui metinnyi. 
Judges9:54 Ki kuur kochokyi Abimelek muren age ne ki ipchin kariik, koleenji, “Ng'usu rotweet ak ibara, si male piik, ‘Kabar anee, kobogoryondo.’ ” Ak kitoor ineendet murenonooto, ak kime." 
Judges9:55 Kingo keer piigap Israel kole kagome Abimelek, kwo chii tugul oldanyi." 
Judges9:56 Ki yaakta mugetuut anyun Kamuktaindet agobo tengektap Abimelek ne ki yachi kwandanyi, ye ki par tupchosyekyik tamanwogik tisap." 
Judges9:57 Ki yaaktechi Kamuktaindet mugetuut piigap Shekem agobo tengekto tugul ne ki yai. Ki nyoonji anyun icheek chubetap Jotham weeriitap Jerubaal. 
Judges10:1 Kingo pata peetuusyegap Abimelek kong'eet Tola weeriitap Pua, weeriitap Dodo, chiitap Issakar, kosar Israel. Ki menyei ineendet Samir eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim." 
Judges10:2 Ki irwookyi Israel kenyiisyek tiptem ak somok, kime anyun ineendet ak ki kitupchi Samir." 
Judges10:3 Kingo pata peetuusyegap Tola, kong'eet Jair, Gileadindet. Ki irwookyi Israel kenyiisyek tiptem ak aeng'." 
Judges10:4 Ki tinyei weeriik sosom che ki laanyei moek sosom che po sigiroik, ak ki tinyei nganasook sosom che kiguure Habot-jair agoi ra, che mi emetap Gilead." 
Judges10:5 Kime anyun Jair ak ki kitupchi Kamon. 
Judges10:6 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet kogeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki oot `icheek Baalik ak Astarot, ak kanamonigap Syria ak che po Sidonik, kanamonigap Moab ak che po Amonik ak che po Philistiik. Ki meto `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak mata koot ineendet." 
Judges10:7 Ki nereech kot anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel ak ki aldochi `icheek eunegap Philistiik ak eunegap lagogap Ammon. 
Judges10:8 Ki iim ak konyaliil piigap Israel kenyinooto. Ak ki inyaliil piigap Israel, chooto tugul che ki mi Jordan pitoniin eng' emetap Amorik, ne mi Gilead, eng' kenyiisyek taman ak sisiit." 
Judges10:9 Kilandae Jordan lagogap Ammon koba kobargei ak Judah, Benjamin ak kootap Ephraim. Ki kinyaliil anyun Israel miising'." 
Judges10:10 Ki riirchi `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji, “Ki keyaun tengekto, amu kigemete Kamuktaindennyo ak kigeot Baalik.”" 
Judges10:11 Ak ki mwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel, koleenji, “Tos ki ma asarwok eng' Misiriik, Amorik, Amonik ak eng' Philistiik?" 
Judges10:12 Ye ki inyaliilak ak icheek Sidonik, Amelegik ak Maonik, ko ki oriircho ak asarwok eng' eunekwak." 
Judges10:13 Ago ki ometa ak oot kanamonik. Nooto anyun, ma asarwok kogeny." 
Judges10:14 Oba oriirchi kamuktaik che ki olewen! Ingosarwok icheek eng' peetuutap nyalildang'wong'.” 
Judges10:15 Ki leenji `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Kigeyai tengekto. Yaiywech kiit age tugul ne igeere ile nyolu, ago kisaain kityo keele isarwech peetuuni.”" 
Judges10:16 Ki isto anyun kanamonik che too eng' kwenunnywa ak koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki iimak saboondanyi amu nyalildap Israel. 
Judges10:17 Ki iyumgei anyun lagogap Ammon ak koba koteech Gilead. Ki iyumgei piigap Israel ak icheek ak koteech Mispa. 
Judges10:18 Kimwachigei piik, pounigap Gilead, kole, “Ng'oo ne tau kobaregei ak lagogap Ammon? Egu ineendet ne oo eng' tugul che menyei Gilead.”" 
Judges11:1 Ki nyiganeet ne kiim ak ko po lugeet Jephta Gileadindet. Ki sich `Gilead Jephta ago kamennyi ko ki chepkugoniot. 
Judges11:2 Ki sich `osotyotap Gilead weeriik, ak kingo kagoeegitu weeriichooto, koon Jephta kwo komanda, koleenji ineendet, “Mesiche kiy eng' kootap abba, amu ii weeriitap kwondo age.”" 
Judges11:3 Komwei anyun Jephta eng' ole mi tupchosyekyik, ak kwo komeny emetap Tob. Eng' peetuusyek che matya ko ki iyumjigei Jephta piik che njaamik, ak ki isubot kobendat kobooto ineendet." 
Judges11:4 Kingo pata peetuusyek alak, koyai lugeet lagogap Ammon ak Israel." 
Judges11:5 Kingo yai lugeet lagogap Ammon ak Israel, koba poisyegap Gilead komut Jephta eng' emetap Tob." 
Judges11:6 Ki leenji `icheek Jephta, “Nyoo egu kiptaiyandennyo, si kobiit kebarge ak lagogap Ammon.”" 
Judges11:7 Ago ki leenji `Jephta poisyegap Gilead, “Tos ki ma owecha, ak oona eng' kootap abba? Amu nee anyun si obwanjo ye otinye nyalilda?”" 
Judges11:8 Ki leenji `poisyegap Gilead Jephta, “Kagiweekyinge kogeny amu nooto, si kobiit keebe tugul kobooten, kebarge ak lagogap Ammon, si iegu pounindennyo ne ibou piik tugul che menyei Gilead.”" 
Judges11:9 Ki leenji `Jephta poisyegap Gilead, “Ngot omuta kaa kogeny kebarge ak lagogap Ammon, ak ngot kogoon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor katerteerisyet agobo icheek eng' tainnyu, aegu pounindeng'wong'?”" 
Judges11:10 Ak ki leenji poisyegap Gilead Jephta, “Egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paoryat eng' kwenunnyo, kiyae iman ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'.”" 
Judges11:11 Ki wo Jephta anyun kobooto poisyegap Gilead, ak ki yai `piik ineendet koek pounindet ak kiptaiyat ne pou icheek. Ki mwa Jephta ng'aleekyik tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Mispa." 
Judges11:12 Ki iyookto `Jephta piik koba kaplaitoryatap lagogap Ammon, koleenji, “Iting'ena nee, kot inyoonjo iyai lugeet ak emennyu?”" 
Judges11:13 Ki wolji laitoryatap lagogap Ammon piik che kiga iyookto Jephta, koleenji, “Amu ki ip Israel emennyu, ye kitogosu kobunu Misiri, kobooch Arnon agoi Jabbok, kot koit Jordan, ara weekwa anyun emotinwechooto eng' kaalyeet.”" 
Judges11:14 Ak ki iyookto `Jephta piik kogeny koba kaplaitoryatap lagogap Ammon: 
Judges11:15 ak ki pa komwa pichooto kole, Kamwa Jephta kole: “Ma ip Israel emetap Moab, anan ko emetap lagogap Ammon." 
Judges11:16 Ye kitogosu Israel eng' Misiri, kobwa kobun surkwen agoi Araraita ne Piriir ak ki pwa agoi Kadesh," 
Judges11:17 koyookto anyun `Israel piik koba kaplaitoryatap Edom koleenji, ‘Kaigai chamwo abun emeng'ung', ago ma cham laitoryatap Edom.’ Ak ki iyookto piik ko uu nooto koba kaplaitoryatap Moab, ago ma cham; ak ki meny Israel Kadesh." 
Judges11:18 Yeityo kobun surkwen, koyiem icheek emetap Edom ak emetap Moab. Ki pun icheek kong'asiis ne po emetap Moab ak koteech Arnon pitoniin. Ago ma siir icheek kiwotetap Moab, amu aineetap Arnon ko ki kiwotetap Moab." 
Judges11:19 Ki iyookto Israel piik koba kap Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, ne ki pou Hesbon. Ki leenji `Israel ineendet: Kaigai, ichamwech kebun emeng'ung', keebe oldanyo." 
Judges11:20 Ago ma iyan Laitoryat Sihon kobun Israel kiwotennyi. Ki iyum Sihon piikyik tugul ak koteech Jahas, ak kobargei ak Israel." 
Judges11:21 Ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, Sihon ak piikyik tugul eutap Israel, ak ki par icheek. Konam anyun Israel emet tugul ne po Amorik kobunji, icheeget che ki menyei emonooto." 
Judges11:22 Ki nam kiwoteet tugul ne po Amorik kobunji, kobooch aineetap Arnon agoi aineetap Jabbok, ak kobooch surkwen agoi Jordan." 
Judges11:23 Ki oon anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel Amorik koba eng' taitap piikyik Israel. Imuuchi anyun inyee inam kobunjiin?" 
Judges11:24 Tos meibe kobunjiin ne kigoonin Kemos kamuktaindeng'ung'? Nooto anyun, age tugul ne oonei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo eng' tainnyo, kename chooto kobunjech." 
Judges11:25 Tos ii kaigai inyee eng' kiy age tugul isiir Balak weeriitap Sipor, laitoryatap Moab? Tos kiboryo ak Israel? Tos ki yachi `inee icheek lugeet?" 
Judges11:26 Ye kita komenyei Israel Hesbon ak nganasookyik, Aroer ak nganasookyik ak eng' nganasook tugul che mi tabandap Aineetap Arnon eng' kenyiisyek pogol somok, kolya si moip eng' peetuusyechooto?" 
Judges11:27 Tom ayaun anee tengek, ago keyai ne ya iyaiywo lugeet. Ingoek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogindet, ne koonu kirwooget rani eng' kwenutap piigap Israel ak lagogap Ammon.”" 
Judges11:28 Ago ma kas laitoryatap lagogap Ammon ng'aleek che ki iyookyi Jephta ineendet. 
Judges11:29 Ki nyoonji anyun `Kabuuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jephta, ak kilandae Gilead ak Manasseh, kilandae Mispa ne po Gilead, ak kong'etee Mispa ne po Gilead kwo kolanda kot koit ole mi lagogap Ammon." 
Judges11:30 Ak ki yai Jephta kaarortaet koarorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ngot inde iman eunekyuk lagogap Ammon," 
Judges11:31 ko kiy age tugul ne torookwo eng' kurgennyu, ye tuun aweeksei eng' kaalyeet, abunu ole mi lagogap Ammon, kobunjin kiyooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si agoito koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei.”" 
Judges11:32 Ki landa anyun Jephta kwo ole mi lagogap Ammon, kobargei ak icheek; ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunekyik." 
Judges11:33 Ak ki par icheek, kong'etee Aroer kot koit Minit, nganasook tiptem, kot koit Abel-keramim, ki par eng' pareet ne oo kot. Ki kiterteer anyun lagogap Ammon eng' taitap piigap Israel." 
Judges11:34 Ye ki nyo koweeksei Jephta koonnyi eng' Mispa, ogeero, ki mong' cheptonyi kotorook ineendet kotinyei sugutisyek che mengeechen kotyenonu. Ki lakweennyi nooto ne ineegei, amu ki ma kotinyei weeriit anan chepto age." 
Judges11:35 Kingo keer ineendet, kobet ngoroikyik ak kole, “Pwo! Cheptonyu! Kegoono anyeratit, ak ii age eng' che inyalila amu koang'aang'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutinnyu, ama aweechigei let.”" 
Judges11:36 Koleenji `lakwanooto ineendet, “Abba, koing'aang'ji kuting'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ara yaiywo ko uu kiit ne kobun kuting'ung', amu kogoyaaktaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugetuut eng' puuniguk, eng' lagogap Ammon.”"
