Judges11:37 Kotestai koleenji kwandanyi, “Ingeyaiywo ng'olyoondoni: chamwo atebi aneege arawek aeng', si kobiit awo anee ak choronokyuk tuloonook parak ak ariirchi pergeinatennyu.”" 
Judges11:38 Ak ki wol kole, “Ui.” Ak ki leenji kwo arawek aeng'. Ki wo anyun, ineendet ak choronokyik, ak koriirchi pergeinatennyi eng' tuloonook." 
Judges11:39 Kingo keskei arawek aeng'u, koweektagei ole mi kwandanyi, ak ki yachi ineendet ko uu kaarortaennyi ne kiga koaror. Ak ki tomo kotuiyo ak muren. Ara ki ek niito piteet eng' Israel," 
Judges11:40 keele, pendi tiibiigap Israel kenyiit age tugul koyaei kabwaatet agobo cheptap Jephta Gileadindet eng' peetuusyek ang'wan eng' kenyiit age tugul." 
Judges12:1 Ki iyumgei piigap Ephraim ak koba kotokyigei murot kaataam. Ki mwachi `icheek Jephta koleenji, “Amu nee si ilande obargei ak lagogap Ammon, ama imwaiwech keebe tugul? Kibeeldoin koong'ung'.”" 
Judges12:2 Ak ki wolji `Jephta icheek koleenji, “Ki kitinye anee ak piikyuk pooryeet ne oo ak lagogap Ammon, ak ye ki aguurok koma osarwo eng' eunnywa." 
Judges12:3 Ak ye ki ageer ale ma osarwo, ande saboondanyu ng'oiyondit, alande kebargei ak lagogap Ammon, ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunnyu. Ara amu nee anyun si obwanjo rani, oboryena?”" 
Judges12:4 Yeityo koyum `Jephta piik tugul che po Gilead ak kobargei ak Ephraim. Ki par piigap Gilead Ephraim, amu ki le, “Okweek Gileadik ko ki omweune Ephraim, che omi kwenutap Ephraim, ak kwenutap Manasseh.”" 
Judges12:5 Ki nam Gileadik tabarwegap Jordan, koger Ephraimik. Ak ye mwa che kimweune Ephraim, kole, “Chamwo alanda,” koleenji ineendet piigap Gilead, “Ii Ephraimindet?” Ye le, “Achicha,”" 
Judges12:6 koteebe koleenjin, “Mwaa le ‘Shiboleth’; koleen, ‘Siboleth’; ” amu ki ma komuuchi komwa komyee. Kenamei anyun inee ak kebar sainooto eng' tabarwegap Jordan. Ki pek eng' peetuunooto Ephraimik eliphuusyek artamu ak aeng'." 
Judges12:7 Ki irwookyi `Jephta Israel kenyiisyek lo. Yeityo kome Jephta Gileadindet, ak ki kitupchi nganaseet age ne po Gilead." 
Judges12:8 Kingo pata Jephta korwookyi Ibsan ne po Bethlehem Israel. 
Judges12:9 Ki tinyei weeriik sosom ak tiibiik sosom che ki igoito kitunoot eng' komoswek alak, ak ki imutyi weeriikyik tiibiik sosom che po komoswek alak. Ak ki irwookyi Israel kenyiisyek tisap." 
Judges12:10 Kime Ibsan ak ki kitupchi Bethlehem. 
Judges12:11 Kingo pata ineendet, korwookyi Elon Sebulunindet Israel. Ki irwookyi Israel kenyiisyek taman." 
Judges12:12 Kime Elon Sebulunindet agine ak ki kitupchi Aijalon eng' emetap Zebulun. 
Judges12:13 Kingo pata Elon, korwookyi Abdon weeriitap Hilel Piratonindet Israel." 
Judges12:14 Ki tinyei weeriik artam ak weeriik sosom che po weeriikyik che ki laanyei moek tamanwogik tisap che po sigiroik. Ki irwookyi Israel kenyiisyek sisiit. 
Judges12:15 Kime Abdon weeriitap Hilel Piratonindet ak ki kitupchi Piraton eng' emetap Ephraim, eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Amelegik." 
Judges13:1 Ki yai piigap Israel yaityet kogeny eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eutap Philistiik kenyiisyek artam." 
Judges13:2 Ak ki miitei chiito age ne po Sora, ne po pororyetap Dan, ne ki kiguure kainennyi Manoa. Kisoon osotyonnyi, ma sigis." 
Judges13:3 Kimong'ji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwonyooto ak koleenji, “Keero, ii soon, ma isigisye, ago imanachi ak isich weeriit." 
Judges13:4 Nooto anyun, asoomin ale iriipkei, amee divaik anan ko maiyek, ameam kiy age tugul ne murwoon." 
Judges13:5 Amu imanachi iman ak isich weeriit. Ma kicheru suumeekyik, amu egu lakwanooto Nasiritindet ne po Kamuktaindet kobooch komi moo. Ak kotoi ineendet kosar Israel eng' eunegap Philistiik.”" 
Judges13:6 Ki wo anyun kwonyooto ak komwachi manong'otyondennyi koleenji, “Kanyoonjo chiitap Kamuktaindet ak ka uu itoondanyi itoondap malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet, ne imuisei miising'. Ma ateebee ole kabunu, ama mwaiwo agine kainennyi." 
Judges13:7 Ago kaleenjo ineendet, ‘Imanachi ak isich weeriit. Amee divaik anan ko maiyek, anan iam kiy age tugul ne murwoon amu egu lakwanooto Nasiritindet ne po Kamuktaindet kobooch komi moo agoi peetuutap meennyi.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Ki sa anyun `Manoa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Asaain, ee Kamuktaindet, ingonyo kogeny chiichooto po Kamuktaindet ne kogeyogu konyo ole ki mi koneetech kiit ne kiyachin lakwanooto kisichei.”" 
Judges13:9 Ki kas Kamuktaindet kutitap Manoa, ak ki nyoonji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ole ki mi kwondo kogeny ye kitebyei eng' mbar. Ago ki ma komi Manoa manong'otyondennyi kobooto ineendet." 
Judges13:10 Kichaakta anyun kwonyooto, kolabat ak komwachi manong'otyondennyi, koleenji, “Keero! Kagomong'ja kogeny chiichi kinyonjino yuginye.”" 
Judges13:11 Ki ng'eet anyun Manoa ak koosup osotyonnyi koit ole mi chiichooto ak koleenji ineendet, “Inyee chiichi ki ng'alaaljin kwonyi?” Ak ki le, “Aa ineendet.”" 
Judges13:12 Ak ki le Manoa, “Ingosulda ng'aleeguk. Tuun teptoi ano lakwanooto ak egu nee poisyennyi?”" 
Judges13:13 Koleenji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Manoa, Ingoriipkei kwondo eng' tugul che ki amwachi." 
Judges13:14 Matkoam kiy age tugul ne punu keetitap sabibuk, amechamji koe divaik anan ko maiyek, amat koam kiy age tugul ne murwoon. Ingoriibegei ineendet chooto tugul che ki amwachi." 
Judges13:15 Ki mwachi `Manoa malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Asoomin ichamwech kota keraanyin, si kobiit kechobuun aarwetap ng'oroor.”" 
Judges13:16 Koleenji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Manoa, “Matiny keraanya, koma ame amitwogiguk. Ngot imache ichop kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ko nyolu igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Amu ki ma nai Manoa kole ki malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Judges13:17 koleenji `Manoa malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Kiguurenen ng'oo si kobiit kegonyitin ye isulda ng'aleeguk?”" 
Judges13:18 Kowolji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Kalya si iteebena kainennyu, ago kainaniito ko po kwang'ut?”" 
Judges13:19 Ki ip anyun Manoa arwanooto kobooto kagoochinetap peek, ak kogoito eng' koita parak kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki yai malaikaiyandanooto kwang'ut kogerei Manoa kobooto osotyonnyi," 
Judges13:20 amu ye ki togostoi liplibenetap maat kotokyigei kipsengwet eng' kaptisisyet, kotogostae malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor liplibenonooto po maat ne po kaptisisyet. Ye kingo keer niito Manoa kobooto osotyonnyi, ko ki ing'uruukso icheek kot kotiiny ng'wony togoochikwak." 
Judges13:21 Kingo pata niito ko ki mata komong'ji kogeny `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Manoa anan ko osotyonnyi. Konai anyun Manoa kole ineendet ko ki malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Judges13:22 Koleenji `Manoa osotyonnyi, “Kibegu iman, amu kagegeer Kamuktaindet.”" 
Judges13:23 Ago ki leenji osotyonnyi, “Nda kamachei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobarech, ta kama kotaachei kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinetap peek eng' eunekyok. Ta kama koboorwech tuguuchu tugul ak ta kama komwaiwech tuguuk che uu chuuto.”" 
Judges13:24 Ki sich kwonyooto weeriit ak koguuree kainennyi Samson. Ki eet lakweet ak ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. 
Judges13:25 Ki toi Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobois eng' ineendet eng' Maane-dan, kwenutap Sora ak Estaol." 
Judges14:1 Ki choortagei Samson eng' peetuut age kwo Timnah ak ki keer eng' olooto chepto agenge eng' tiibiigap Philistiik. 
Judges14:2 Ak ki togos ineendet, konyo komwachi kwanda ak kamet, koleenji, “Kaageer chepto eng' Timnah eng' tiibiigap Philistiik. Ara anyun omutwaa atun.”" 
Judges14:3 Ki leenji `kwandanyi ak `kamennyi ineendet, “Tos ma mi chepto eng' tiibiigap tupchosyeguk, anan ko eng' piikyok tugul, kot iwe itun ne po Philistiik che ma kimuratan?” Ago ki leenji Samson kwandanyi, “Omutwaa, amu achame kot.”" 
Judges14:4 Ki ma nai kwandanyi ak kamennyi kole punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondonooto; amu ki cheeng'ei poroindo ne yachine lugeet Philistiik. Ki pou Philistiik Israel eng' peetuusyechooto. 
Judges14:5 Ki choortagei anyun Samson, kobooto kwandanyi ak kamennyi, koba Timnah, ak kiit mbareenigap sabibuk che po Timnah, ki keer ineendet ng'etundo ne neran ne kiborisenjin ineendet." 
Judges14:6 Ki nyoonji ineendet `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet, ak ki kereer ng'etunyooto ko uu ye imuuchi kogereer aarwetap ng'oroor koma tinyei kiy eng' euut. Ago ma mwachi kwanda anan ko kamet kiit ne kayai." 
Judges14:7 Ki choortagei anyun kwo kong'alaalji kwonyooto, ak ki ibaibai kwonyooto Samson kot." 
Judges14:8 Ak ye matyanit kogiweek kwo komut kotun. Ki wo taban kogeer poortap ng'etunyooto ki kabar ak ki mi segemik kebomborwetap ng'etunyooto, ak kumyat." 
Judges14:9 Ki inem eng' eunekyik ak kwo koamat ye kitese tai kowendi. Ki it ole mi kwandanyi ak kamennyi ak ki igoochi ak ki am ak icheek. Ago ma mwachi koleenji kaanemune kumyat kebomborwetap ng'etundo. 
Judges14:10 Ki choortagei kwandanyi kwo ole mi kwonyooto, ak ki yai Samson igoorto eng' olooto ko uu ye ki cham koyaei murenik ko uu nooto." 
Judges14:11 Ak ye kingo keer `Philistiik ineendet komut choronok sosom kotep kobooto ineendet. 
Judges14:12 Ki mwachi `Samson icheek koleenji, “Ogany amwaiwok tangochet. Ngot omuuchi omwaiwo eng' peetuusyek tisap che po igoorto, ak onai kiit ne ibooru, agoonok anyun ngoroik sosom che po katanit ak ngoroik sosom che kiwalawali." 
Judges14:13 Ago ngot ko momuuchi omwaiwo, ogoono anyun okweek ngoroik sosom che po katanit, ak ngoroik sosom che kiwalwali.” Ak ki leenji `icheek ineendet, “Mwa tangocheng'ung', si kegas.”" 
Judges14:14 Ara ki leenji `ineendet icheek, “Ki mang'une amindet amitwogik, ak ki mang'une ne kiim anyinyindo.” Ago ki ma imuuch icheek koboor tangochonooto eng' peetuusyek somok." 
Judges14:15 Eng' peetuutap tisap, koleenji `icheek kwondap Samson, “Igaigai manong'otyondeng'ung' si kobiit komwaiwech tangochet, si ma kibeelin ak kootap kwandang'ung'. Kooguurech si ogoonech pananda? Ma uu nooto?”" 
Judges14:16 Ki riir ne po Samson eng' tainnyi, koleenji, “Iwecha kityo, ak mechama. Ki imwachi tangochet lagogap piikyuk, ama imwaiwo.” Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Keero, tomo amwachi kwandanyu anan ko kamennyu. Amu nee anyun si amwaun inyee?”" 
Judges14:17 Ki riir eng' tainnyi peetuusyek tisap eng' peetuusyechooto po igoortanywa. Amu kiim Samson, kot ko eng' peetuut ne po tisap ko ki mwachi waluunet ineendet, yeityo komwachi `ineendet tangochonooto lagogap piikyik." 
Judges14:18 Ki mwachi piigap nganaseet ineendet eng' peetuutap tisap kotom kororokto asiista koleenji: “Mi nee ne anyiny kosiir kumyat? Ak nee ne kiim kosiir ng'etundo?” Ak ki leenji `ineendet icheek, “Nda ki ma obatisye rooryandennyu, ta monai kiit ne ibooru tangochennyu.”" 
Judges14:19 Ki nyoonji ineendet `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet, ak kichoortagei kwo Askelon, ki par piik sosom che po pichooto ak koip parunenikwak ak ki igoochi ngoroik che kiwalawali, icheek che ki iboor tangochonooto. Ak kinereech kot ineendet ak kitogosta kwo kootap kwandanyi." 
Judges14:20 Ago ki kigoito ne po Samson kigoochi chiito ne ki cham kobendoti tuwai, ne kiga koyai koek chorwennyi." 
Judges15:1 Ago kingo pata peetuusyek alak, eng' peetuusyegap kesisyetap nganuuk, korutoochi Samson osotyonnyi, kogetyin aarwetap ng'oroor. Ki le ineendet, “Awendi ko ole mi osotyondennyu.” Ago ma chamji ineendet kwo ko kwandap osotyondonooto." 
Judges15:2 Ki le kwandap osotyondonooto, “Ki aleen ki iwech ineendet iman; nooto anyun, ki agoite ineendet kotun chorweng'ung'. Tos ma karaaran chepkamet ne ming'in kosiir ineendet? Asoomin ale imut nooto ne kata imuti ineendet.”" 
Judges15:3 Ki leenji `Samson icheek, “Masiche leluut rani eng' Philistiik ye ayachi yaityet.”" 
Judges15:4 Ara ki wo Samson ak konam lelwek pogol somok, ki nam kegenganik ak ki chop lelwek kotuktoochi patai, koratyi anyun kegenget katutaichooto aeng' eng' alak tugul." 
Judges15:5 Kingo kagonde maat kegenganichooto kounda koba ole mi peegap Philistiik che tomo koges, ak kobeel peek che ki kiyum kotononso ak che tomo keges, kobooto mbareenigap mseituni ak icheek." 
Judges15:6 Koteep anyun Philistiik, kole, “Ng'oo ne kayai kii?” Ak ki le icheek, “Samson, sandetap Timnaindet, amu kirebe osotyonnyi ak kogoochi chorwennyi.” Ki togosta anyun Philistiik, ak kobeel osotyondonooto ak kwandanyi eng' maat." 
Judges15:7 Koleenji `Samson icheek, “Ngot ko koayai ko uu ni, ayaaktochinigei mugetuut iman eng' okweek, ak ye ibata, asiis.”" 
Judges15:8 Ki par icheek komugus eng' pareet ne oo. Yeityo kochoortagei kwo komeny ole kibetak eng' rwandetap Etam. 
Judges15:9 Ki togosta anyun Philistiik ak koteech Judah, ak koyom komoswegap Lei." 
Judges15:10 Ki le piigap Judah, “Amu nee si otogosu obokyech?” Ak ki le, “Kagitogosu kebwa kerat Samson, keyachi ineendet ko uu ye koyaiywech.”" 
Judges15:11 Ki choortagei anyun piik eliphuusyek somogu che po Judah koba ole kibetak eng' rwandetap Etam, ak koleenji Samson, “Mengen ile poiywech Philistiik? Nee anyun kii koiyaiywech?” Ak ki leenji icheek, “Ko uu ye ki yaiywo ko ki ayachi icheek ko uu nooto.”" 
Judges15:12 Ak ki leenji `icheek ineendet, “Kagichooruge kebwa keratin, si kobiit kigoiten iwe eutap Philistiik.” Ak ki leenji Samson, “Oyosyeiwo, ole mobara okweeget.”" 
Judges15:13 Ki mwachi ineendet koleenji, “Achicha, kibwane keratin kityo ak kigoiten iwe eunekwak; ago ma kibarin, iman.” Kirate anyun rogoosyek aeng' che leelach, ak komut kotogos eng' rwandet." 
Judges15:14 Kingo it Lei, kowaakyo Philistiik ko katuiyo ak ineendet. Ki nyoonji ineendet `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet ak ki igei rogoosyek che ki mi eunekyik, katanit ne kabeel maat, ak ki ibutyo eng' eunekyik tuguuk che kiga kirate." 
Judges15:15 Ki nyoor anyun kowetap tagilgilyetap sigiryet ne tomo koyaam, ki inem ak kobare piik eliphuut." 
Judges15:16 Ak ki le Samson, “Eng' kowetap tagilgilyetap sigiryet, karurugutik eng' karurugutik, eng' kowetap tagilgilyetap sigiryet ko kabar piik eliphuut.”" 
Judges15:17 Kingo kagogees ng'alaalanooto, kowiirta kowonooto po tagilgilyet ne kami eunnyi; ak ki kiguure yooto Ramat-lei." 
Judges15:18 Ak ye ki ame melelda ne oo, kogiguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji, “Kaigoonu saruunoni oo eng' eutap otwogindeng'ung'; ak nguno, amee eng' melelda, si abutyi eutap che ma kimuratan.”" 
Judges15:19 Ago ki pet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole ki mi keriinget eng' Lei ak ki mang'une peek yooto; ak kingo kagoee koweek Kabuusennyi kogeny, ak kisop. Ki kiguure kainetap yooto anyun En-hakore, ne miitei Lei agoi rani." 
Judges15:20 Ki irwookyi `Samson Israel kenyiisyek tiptem eng' peetuusyegap Philistiik. 
Judges16:1 Eng' peetuut age kogiwo Samson Gaza, ak kogeer eng' olooto chepkugoniot ak kotuiyogei ak ineendet." 
Judges16:2 Ki kimwachi Gasik keleenji, “Kagonyo Samson oli.” Ak kiyiem ineendet ak kiribisyo koriip kemout komugul eng' kurgeetap nganaseet. Kisiisyo kemout komugul koleen, “Ingotebi agoi koeech, si kebar ineendet.”" 
Judges16:3 Ki ru Samson agoi kemoi kween, ak king'eet kemoi kween, ak ki nam kurgotigap ormariichetap nganaseet, kobooto tugatugikyik aeng', kotut kobooto temeleiywot ak kotiiny kaat yeityo koip kot koit tulweet parak ne tokyingei Hebron." 
Judges16:4 Kingo pata nooto kocham `Samson kwondo age ne ki mi atebweetap Sorek, ne ki kiguure kainennyi Delila." 
Judges16:5 Ki togos kiptainigap Philistiik kobwa ole mi kwonyooto ak koleenji ineendet, “Igaigai ineendet, si inai ole mi kimnatoninyi oo, ak ole kimuuchi kiterterte ineendet, si kobiit kerat ineendet kinyalil; si kogoonin age tugul eng' acheek fedhaisyek pogolusyek taman ak agenge.”" 
Judges16:6 Ki leenji anyun `Delila Samson, “Asoomin ale mwaiwo ole mi kimnatoning'ung' oo, ak kimuuchi keratenen nee si kinyaliilin.”" 
Judges16:7 Ki wolji `Samson ineendet kole, “Ngot keratena inoik tisap che ta ko lelach, che tomo koyaamyo, anyaluli anyun ak aigei chii tugul.”" 
Judges16:8 Ki ipchi anyun `kiptainigap Philistiik osotyondonooto inoik tisap che ta ko leelach, che tomo koyaamyo, ak korate ineendet inoichooto." 
Judges16:9 Ki tinyei piik che ki riibei che ki mi koot ne po oriit. Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Kabwonjin Philistiik, Samson!” Ak king'eti ineendet inoichooto, ko uu ye ng'etos katanisyek ye katiiny maat. Ara ki ma naak anyun ung'ootyetap kimnateennyi." 
Judges16:10 Ki leenji anyun `Delila Samson, “Keero, kaichota ak imwaiwo lembech. Asoomin anyun ale imwaiwo kimuuchi keratenen nee.”" 
Judges16:11 Ki leenji ineendet, “Ngot keratena rogoosyek che leelachen che tomo keyae kiy, anyaluli anyun ak aigei chii tugul.”" 
Judges16:12 Konam anyun Delila rogoosyek che leelach, ak korate ak koleenji, “Kabwonjin Philistiik, Samson!” Ak ki mi piik che ki riibei eng' koot ne po oriit. Ago king'eti eng' eunekyik ko uu ye king'etyei ineet." 
Judges16:13 Ki leenji `Delila Samson, “Agoi nguno ichota kora ak imwaiwo lembech. Mwaiwo anyun kimuuchi keratenen nee.” Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Ngot ilet kaletutichu tisap po suumeekyuk eng' kiit ne kiletisye.”" 
Judges16:14 Kiratyi sumeechooto tigongyot ak koleenji, “Kabwonjin Philistiik, Samson!” Kisiir anyun eng' rwondanyi, ak ki itut tigongyotap kimurtoiyot kobooto kiit ne kiletisye." 
Judges16:15 Ki leenji `kwonyooto ineendet, “Imuktoi ano imwa ile, ‘Achamin,’ ama mi muguleldang'ung' kobooto? Koichota konyil chuuto somok, ama imwaiwo ole mi kimnatoning'ung' oo.”" 
Judges16:16 Ak kingo kagoiim peetuusyek che chaang' eng' ng'aleekyik, ak kobirchin, kong'et anyun saboondanyi agoi kome mugulel." 
Judges16:17 Ara ki mwachi tugul che ki mi muguleldanyi koleenji, “Tomo kicher metinnyu ole kigoi; amu ki aegu Nasaretindetap Kamuktaindet kobooch ami moetap kamennyu. Ngot kicher metinnyu, kowendi anyun kimnateennyu eng' anee, anyaluli ak aigei chii tugul.”" 
Judges16:18 Kingo keer Delila kole kagomwachi ineendet tugul che ki mi muguleldanyi, koyookto keguur kiptainigap Philistiik, koleenji, “Obwa otogosu anyun ra, amu kagomwaiwo tugul che mi muguleldanyi.” Ki togos anyun kiptainigap Philistiik kobwonji kwonyooto koibu fedhaisyek." 
Judges16:19 Ki igoochi `kwonyooto Samson koru eng' kutung'oikyik, ak kiguur chiito age konyo kocher kaletutichooto tisap po suumeekyik. Ki toi kwonyooto konyaliil ineendet amu kiga kwo kimnateennyi eng' ineendet." 
Judges16:20 Ki le Delila, “Kabwonjin Philistiik, Samson!” Kisiir eng' rwondanyi ak kole, “Amandoi ko uu ye cham ayae kotugul, awo aleileigei.” Ago ki ma nai kole kagometo `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet." 
Judges16:21 Ki nam `Philistiik ineendet ak kobol konyekyik ak ki imut ineendet kwo Gaza. Kirate ineendet sirimwegap sugunonik, ak koyai ineendet kong'aiso eng' korgoreet." 
Judges16:22 Ago ki piityo suumeekyik kogeny ye kingo kagicher. 
Judges16:23 Ki iyumgei `kiptainigap Philistiik koboiboitu ak kogoochi korosyot ne oo Dagon kamuktaindennywa. Amu ki mwa kole, “Kagonde `kamuktaindennyo Samson punyondennyo eunekyok.”" 
Judges16:24 Kingo keer `piik ineendet, ko ki ilas kamuktaindennywa, kole, “Kagonde eunekyok `kamuktaindennyo punyondennyo ak ko ng'emindetap emennyo, ne ki kobarenech piik che chaang'.”" 
Judges16:25 Ak kingo kaskei mugulelwekwak, kole, “Oguur Samson konyo kourerenwech.” Ak kiguur Samson komong' eng' korgoreet, ak kiureren eng' tainnywa. Ki inde `icheek ineendet kwenutap tolochik." 
Judges16:26 Ki leenji `Samson lakweet ne kinamoti euut, “Metoo asabsap tolochik che tonone koot, si atiegei.”" 
Judges16:27 Ki nyiitaat piik koyooto: ki mi yooto kiptainik tugul che po Philistiik, ak ki mi koot parak murenik ak kwonyiik olo po eliphuusyek somok che kigeerei Samson kourereni." 
Judges16:28 Ki kuur `Samson Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asaain ale ibwaata ak igimita ra kityo, ee Kamuktaindet, si ayaaktochigei mugetuut eng' Philistiik agobo konyekyuk tuwai.”" 
Judges16:29 Ki nam anyun Samson tolochik aeng' che kitonone koot, ak kotiegei, ki name age eutap tai, koname age murot kaataam." 
Judges16:30 Ki le Samson, “Pagaakta ame kobooto Philistiik!” Ki ing'uruuk eng' kimnateennyi tugul, ak kiluulji koyooto kiptainik kobooto piik tugul che ki miitei oriit. Ki par eng' peetuutap meennyi piik che kisiirei che ki par kota kosabei." 
Judges16:31 Kingo pata kochoorgei anyun tupchosyekyik ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandanyi ak kosut ineendet. Ki imut ak kola kotupchi ineendet kwenutap Sora ak Estaol eng' ole kitupchin piik, ne po Manoa kwandanyi. Ki irwookyi `ineendet Israel kenyiisyek tiptem." 
Judges17:1 Ki mi chiito age ne po emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim, ne ki kiguure kainennyi Mikah." 
Judges17:2 Ki leenji kamennyi, “Atinye robiinik eliphuut agenge ak pogol agenge che ki kiibenen ak ki ichubisye agobo chooto agase eng' itiikyuk, keero, atinye anee ne ki aip.” Ak ki le kamennyi, “Iberuurot weeriinnyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Judges17:3 Ki weekyi kamennyi fedhaisyechooto eliphuut agenge ak pogol, ak ki le kamet, “Katabaanji iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor silingisyechu eng' eunnyu agobo weeriinnyu, si kobiit koyae kanamwet ne kiwaei ak kanamwet ne kitaanyi. Kaweegun anyun amu nooto.”" 
Judges17:4 Ak ye ki weekyi kamennyi fedhaisyechooto, konam kamet pogol aeng' ak kogoochi kitang'indet ne ki yai kanamwet ne kiwaei ak ne kitaanyi eng' fedhaisyechooto, ak ki tebee tuguuchooto kootap Mikah." 
Judges17:5 Ki tinyei chiichito kiguure Mikah kootap kanamonik, ak ki yai ephod ak terapik, ak ki itabaan age eng' weeriikyik, koek tisiindennyi." 
Judges17:6 Ki ma komi peetuusyechooto laitoryat eng' Israel. Kiyaei chii tugul ko uu ye keerei eng' konyekyik kole myee. 
Judges17:7 Ki mi mureno age ne ki punu Beth-lehem-juda, ne po ooreetap Judah, ne ki Lawindet, ak ki meny olooto koek toondet." 
Judges17:8 Ak ki wo chiichooto eng' nganasanooto, eng' Beth-lehem-juda, kwo kotebee ole kanyoorchi oldo koek toondet. Ki it emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim kootap Mikah, eng' pandanyi." 
Judges17:9 Ki leenji Mikah, “Ibunu ano?” Kowol kole, “Aa Lawindet ne po Beth-lehem-juda, awendi ko aa toondet acheeng'oti ole amenye.”" 
Judges17:10 Ak ki leenji Mikah ineendet, “Ngemeny tuwai, si iegu kwanda eng' anee ak ko tisiindet, ak agoonin fedhaisyek taman eng' kenyiit, ngoroik ak amitwogiguk.” Kwo ko anyun Lawindet." 
Judges17:11 Ki cham Lawindet anyun komeny ak chiichooto, ak ki igei murenonooto age eng' weeriikyik." 
Judges17:12 Ki itabaan anyun `Mikah Lawindonooto koek tisiindennyi ak ki tebee kootap Mikah. 
Judges17:13 Kole anyun Mikah, “Angen nguno ale yaiywo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne myee, amu atinye Lawindet ne tisiindennyu.”" 
Judges18:1 Ki ma komi laitoryat Israel peetuusyechooto. Ak eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki cheeng'jigei pororyetap Danik ole menyei; amu agoi peetuusyechooto ko kitom konyoor porotennywa eng' ortinwegap Israel. 
Judges18:2 Ki iyookto `lagogap Dan piik muut eng' ooreenywa, che kibunu koiitennywa tugul, che nyigoonen, che ki punu Sora ak Estaol, koba kosegei emet komarar. Ak ki leenji, “Oba, omarar emet.” Ak ki it emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim, agoi kootap Mikah, ak kiruiyo yooto." 
Judges18:3 Kingo mi ye neegitee kootap Mikah, konai kutitap murenonooto Lawindet. Kimasta koba yooto ak koleenji, “Ki imutun ng'oo inyoo yu? Iyae nee eng' oli? Itinye nee eng' yu?”" 
Judges18:4 Ki leenji `ineendet icheek, “Ki koyaiywo Mikah ko uu ni ak ni, ki koono ayachi poisyet, ak ki aegu tisiindennyi.”" 
Judges18:5 Ki leenji `icheek ineendet, “Kisoomin keele, teebwech ng'omnateet eng' Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kenai ngo mi kaberuret eng' pandanyo.”" 
Judges18:6 Ki leenji tisiindonooto icheek, “Oba eng' kaalyeet. Miitei taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ooreet ne obune.”" 
Judges18:7 Ki pa anyun pichooto muutu, agoi koit Lais. Ki keer piik che ki mi yooto, kole meng'iisyei eng' kaalyeet, ko uu piteetap Sidonik, kosistos ak kotebyei eng' kaalyeet. Amu ki ma komi chii eng' emet ne ki nenyi pounateet, ne ki imuuchi koger kong' eng' kiy tugul, ak ki looen eng' Sidonik ak ki ma koting'egei kiy ak chii age tugul." 
Judges18:8 Yeityo kobwa ole mi tupchosyekwak eng' Sora ak Estaol. Ki mwachi icheek tupchosyekwak koleenji, “Otinye ng'al nee?”" 
Judges18:9 Ak ki le, “Ong'eetyee keebe kebarge ak icheek, amu kogegeer emet, ak karaaran miising'. Ta osiistosi? Amochorirense, ago oba ochut emet ak onam." 
Judges18:10 Ye oit olooto, onyooru piik che mi eng' kaalyeet, ak oo emet. Ki konde Kamuktaindet eung'wong' emonooto; ole ma mi kiy ne rartaat eng' kiy age tugul ne mi ng'wony.”" 
Judges18:11 Ki pa anyun eng' olooto piik pogolusyek lo, che ilaachi kariik, che po ooreetap Danik, eng' Sora ak eng' Estaol." 
Judges18:12 Ki togosta icheek ak koteech Kiriath-Jearim, eng' Judah. Nooto anyun ne mi Kiriath-Jearim patai kogiguure icheek Maanedan agoi ra." 
Judges18:13 Ki pun yooto kot koit emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim, agoi koit kootap Mikah." 
Judges18:14 Yeityo kowol pichooto muutu che ki pa kosegei emetap Lais, ak koleenji tupchosyekwak, “Ongen okweek ole miitei koorchu ephod, terapik, ak kanamwet ne ki kiwai, ak ne ki kitaany? Obwaat anyun nguno kiit ne kanyool oyai.”" 
Judges18:15 Ara ki wo yooto, ak ki it kootap murenonooto Lawindet, nooto kootap Mikah, ak kiteebe ineendet agobo chamennyi pogei." 
Judges18:16 Kitononso eng' ye neegitee ye kibunei eng' ormariich pichooto pogolusyek lo che ki po lagogap Dan, kolaachi kariik." 
Judges18:17 Ki togosta murenjoto muutu che kigaba kosegei emet, ak ki pa ko eng' olooto, ak ki ip kanamwonooto ki kiwai, ephod, terapik ak kanamwonooto ki kitaany. Ki tonon tisiindet eng' ye neegitee ye kibunei eng' ormariich kobooto pichooto pogolusyek lo kolaachi kariik." 
Judges18:18 Kingo kagoba pichuuto kootap Mikah ak koip kanamwet ne ki kiwai, ephod, terapik ak kanamwet ne ki kitaany, komwachi tisiindet koleenji, “Oyae nee?”" 
Judges18:19 Ki leenji `icheek ineendet, “Siis, kere kutit eung'ung', ak inyoo keebe tugul, ak iegu kwandanyo ak tisiindet. Tos myee eng' inyee iegu tisiindetap kootap chiito agenge, anan iegu tisiindetap pororyet ak ooreet eng' Israel?”" 
Judges18:20 Ki paibait muguleldap tisiindonooto, ak ki ip ephod, terapik ak kanamwonooto ki kiwai, ak kwo kwenutap piik." 
Judges18:21 Ki week anyun icheek, ak kigany kondo lagok ak tuuga ak tuguuk." 
Judges18:22 Kingo kagoba ole machei ko loo kitigin eng' kootap Mikah, koyumgei murenik che ki mi kooriik che neegitee kootap Mikah, ak koon lagogap Dan." 
Judges18:23 Ak kiwaage `icheek lagogap Dan. Ak kiguskong' ak koleenji Mikah, “Kaamin nee, kot inyoo kobooto pichu tee chu?”" 
Judges18:24 Ak ki wol kole, “Kaorep kanamonikyuk che ki ayai, ak koomut tisiindet ak kaobe. Ta atinye nee anyun? Ara omwaiwo eng' nee ole ‘Amin nee?’ ”" 
Judges18:25 Ak ki leenji `lagogap Dan ineendet, “Amengegas kuting'ung' eng' kwenunnyo, si ma parin piik che nereektos, ak ibeet saboondang'ung', kobooto saboonwegap piigap koong'ung'.”" 
Judges18:26 Ak ki pa anyun lagogap Dan. Kingo keer Mikah kole kiimeen eng' ineendet, koweek kwo kaa." 
Judges18:27 Ki ip tuguuchooto kiyaei Mikah, ak komut tisiindet ne ki tinyei ak ki pa koit Lais, agoi ole mi piik che kisistos ak kotebyei eng' kaalyeet, ak ki par eng' rotwetap chok, ak ki peel nganaseet." 
Judges18:28 Ki ma piit saruunindet, amu ki loo eng' Sidon ak ki ma koting'egei kiy ak chii age tugul. Ki mi nganasanooto atebweet ne neegitee Beth-rehob. Ki teech nganaseet ak komeny olooto." 
Judges18:29 Kiguure icheek nganasanooto Dan, komwaitae Dan kwandanywa, ne kiga kisikyi Israel. Ago ki kainetap nganasanooto eng' tai ko ki Lais." 
Judges18:30 Kilumdochigei `lagogap Dan kanamwet ne ki kiwai kotonon. Ki ek tisiigap pororyetap Danik, Jonathan weeriitap Gershom, weeriitap Musa, ineendet ak weeriikyik agoi peetuut ne ki kiluule emet." 
Judges18:31 Ki lumda anyun kotonon kanamwet ne ki kiwai ne po Mikah ne kiyaei ineendet, eng' peetuusyek tugul ye ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet Shiloh." 
Judges19:1 Ak eng' peetuusyechooto, ye ki ma komi laitoryat Israel, ki mi Lawindet age ne ki menyei komosin eng' emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim, ne ki imutyigei chebaigeiyat eng' Beth-lehem-juda." 
Judges19:2 Ki yai kugoinatet chebaigeiyandennyi kosas ineendet, ak ki pagaakta ineendet kwo kootap kwandanyi eng' Beth-lehem-juda, ak ki tebee olooto arawek ang'wan." 
Judges19:3 Ki ng'eet manong'otyondennyi koosup ineendet, kwo kong'alaalji ineendet eng' chamyet, komut ineendet kogeny, komi ineendet ak otwogindennyi, ak sigiroik aeng'. Ki imut ineendet kwo kootap kwandanyi. Kingo keer kwandap kwonyooto chiichooto, kobaibait amu katuiyo ak ineendet." 
Judges19:4 Kimach kapyugoinnyi, ne kwandap kwonyooto, kota kobeni, ak ki tebi kobooto ineendet egosyek somok. Ki amis anyun ak koeeiso ak koruiyo yooto." 
Judges19:5 Ak eng' peetuutap ang'wan, kong'eetyo karon inne, ak king'eet kole kwo. Ki mwachi kwandap kwonyooto sandennyi, koleenji, “Igaigai muguleldang'ung' eng' magatyat kitigin, yeityo obe.”" 
Judges19:6 Ki tebi ng'wony ak ki amis ak koeeiso icheek tuwai. Ak ki leenji kwandap kwonyooto chiichooto, “Asoomin ale, cham itebi kemout komugul, ak ingobaibait muguleldang'ung'.”" 
Judges19:7 Kingo ng'eet chiichooto kole kwo, ko ki igaigai kapyugoinnyi, ak ki ru yooto kogeny." 
Judges19:8 Ki ng'eet karon miising' eng' peetuut ne po muut kole kwo, ak ki le kwandap kwonyooto, “Asoomin ale, igaigai muguleldang'ung', ak otebi agoi koskoleny.” Ak ki amis icheek tuwai." 
Judges19:9 Kingo ng'eet chiichooto kole kwo, ineendet ak chebaigeiyandennyi ak otwogindennyi, koleenji ineendet kapyugoinnyi kwandap kwonyooto, “Keero, amu machei koimen, asoomin ale tebi kemout komugul. Machei kogeskei peetuut, ru yuto, si kobaibait muguleldang'ung', si imuste karon miising', iwe kaa.”" 
Judges19:10 Ago ma cham chiichooto kotebi kemounooto, ago king'eet ak kwo, agoi koit ole tokyingei Jebus (nooto ko Jerusalem). Ki tinyei sigiroik aeng' che kiga kiito, ki mi agine chebaigeiyandennyi kobooto ineendet." 
Judges19:11 Kingo mi ye neegitee Jebus, koimen, ak ki leenji otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi, “Asoomin ale nyoo kemaste keebe nganaseetap Jebusik, ak keruiye yooto.”" 
Judges19:12 Ago ki leenji kiptaiyandennyi, “Ma kimastoi kebendi nganaseetap toondet, ne ma po piigap Israel, ago kisiirtoi kebendi Gibea.”" 
Judges19:13 Ki leenji otwogindennyi, “Nyoo keriikyi yeto age eng' chu, si keruiye Gibea anan ko Ramah.”" 
Judges19:14 Kisiirto anyun koba pandanywa ak kirorokta asiista kota kobendi ko neegit koit Gibea, ne po Benjamin." 
Judges19:15 Ki masta icheek koba olooto, koba koruiyo Gibea. Ki wo oriit, ak kotebi ng'wony eng' ooreetap nganaseet, amu ma piit chii ne ki imut icheek koba koonnyi koruiyo." 
Judges19:16 Ki nyo poiyot age ne ki punu poisyennyi eng' mbar koskoleny. Ki po chiichooto emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim, ak ki meny Gibea koek toondet. Ki piik che ki menyei Gibea ko Benjaminik." 
Judges19:17 Ye kitabendo inee kogeer kiprutoiyot eng' ooreetap nganaseet, ak ki le poiyondonooto, “Iwendi ano ak ibunu ano?”" 
Judges19:18 Ki wol ineendet kole, “Kibunu Beth-lehem-juda ak kesiirtoi kebendi emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim komosin. Aa po olooto, ak awendi nguno kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ama mi chii ne imuta koonnyi." 
Judges19:19 Ago ki tinyei mobeek ak amitwogik che ki kigonor che po sigirokyok. Atinye magatyat ak divaik, che yamech anee, otwogindet ne chepto ak murenoni mi kobooton. Ma mi kiy age tugul ne rartaat.”" 
Judges19:20 Ki le poiyondonooto, “Ingotep kaalyeet kobooten! Ingobunjo tuguuk tugul che imache, koek kityo, mat iru ooreet.”" 
Judges19:21 Komut anyun kwo koonnyi ak kogoochi sigiroik amitwogik. Ki iun keelyekwak, ak ki amis ak koeeiso." 
Judges19:22 Ye kita koboiboi mugulelwekwak, ogeero, ki pwa murenigap nganasanooto, weeriigap Belial, koyiem koot ak kobir kurgeet. Ki ng'alaalji `icheek poiyondonooto, chiitap ko po koot, koleenji, “Imoong'u chiichi kanyo koong'ung', si kobiit kesuup.”" 
Judges19:23 Ki manda anyun chiichooto po koot, kwo ole mi icheek ak koleenji, “Achicha, tupchosyekyuk, asoomok ale, amoyai tengekto ne tee ni. Amu kanyo chiichi koonnyu, amoyai sogornatani." 
Judges19:24 Ogeero, mi yu cheptonyu ne pergeiya ak chebaigeiyatap chiichi. Ochamwon amutwok icheek kobwa saang' nguno, si omut ak oyachi icheek ko uu ye ogeere ole myee, ago amat oyachi chiichi sogornatani uu ni.”" 
Judges19:25 Ago ma cham pichooto kogasyi ineendet ng'aleek. Ki nam anyun chiichooto chebaigeiyandennyi ak komutyi icheek eng' saang'. Kisuup kwonyooto ak koteweer ineendet agoi koeech. Kingo machei koeech, kobagaakta kwo." 
Judges19:26 Ki nyo anyun kwonyooto ko kairir emet, ak kobutyi kurgeetap kootap chiichooto ole ki mi kiptaiyandennyi, kot koeech." 
Judges19:27 Ki ng'eet kiptaiyandennyi karon, koyaat kurgotigap koot, komanda koleen kwo pandanyi. Ogeero, kogobutyi kurgeetap koot chebaigeiyandennyi, komi eunekyik tugatuk." 
Judges19:28 Ki leenji ineendet, “Ng'eet keebe.” Ago ma wol kiy. Kiganapchi anyun sigiryet ak king'eet kwo oldanyi." 
Judges19:29 Kingo kakwo koonnyi oriit, konem rotweet, ak konam chebaigeiyandennyi ak kopcheapchei koek kebeberwek taman ak aeng'. Yeityo koyookto kebeberwechooto koba komoswek tugul che po Israel." 
Judges19:30 Ki mwa tugul che ki keer kole, “Kitom kobiitu poisyet ne uu ni kobooch ngap komong' piigap Israel, eng' emetap Misiri agoi ra. Obwaat, orwooch agobo kiito, ak omwa ne kaotil.”" 
Judges20:1 Ki manda anyun piigap Israel tugul, kobooch Dan agoi Beer-sheba, kobooto emetap Gilead, ak ki iyumgei tuiyet koigei chiichak, ki iyumgei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Mispa." 
Judges20:2 Ki iyomechigei tuiyet taitap Kamuktaindet, kirwoogik tugul che punu pororyosyek tugul che po Israel, piik eliphuusyek pogol ang'wan che punei keelyek, che tinyei rotoogap chok." 
Judges20:3 (Ki kas anyun lagogap Benjamin kole kagotogosta piigap Israel koba Mispa.) Ak ki le piigap Israel, “Omwaiwech, ki piitunda ano tengegi?”" 
Judges20:4 Ak ki wol Lawindet manong'otyotap kwonyooto ki kibarei kole, “Ki anyoo Gibea ne po Benjamin, anee ak chebaigeiyandennyu ale keru yooto." 
Judges20:5 Ki ng'eetyo piigap Gibea kobwa koyiem koot ne ki ami kemoi. Ki machei kole kobara aneendet, ak kisuup chebaigeiyandennyu agoi kome." 
Judges20:6 Ki anam chebaigeiyandennyu ak aton, ak ayookte keip koba emet tugul ne poroteetap Israel, amu ki koyai tengekto ak abusnateet eng' Israel." 
Judges20:7 Ogeero, okweek piigap Israel, okweek tugul, omwa, ak orwooch kiit ne nyolu.”" 
Judges20:8 Ki ng'eetyo piik tugul koigei chiichak kole, “Ma wendi koweechigei chii age tugul eng' acheek emainnyi, anan koonnyi." 
Judges20:9 Ago nguno ko ni kiit ne keyachini Gibea: kitogostoi kebendi yooto eng' seretap parbareek. 
Judges20:10 Kinemu murenik taman eng' pogolut age tugul eng' pororyosyek tugul che po Israel, pogolut eng' eliphuut age tugul ak kinemu eliphuut eng' eliphuusyek taman, koba koipchi piik amitwogik, si ye iit Gibea ne po Benjamin koyai ko uu abusnateet tugul ne ki yai icheek eng' Israel.”" 
Judges20:11 Koyumjigei anyun tugul che po Israel nganasanooto, konamgei icheek koek agenge." 
Judges20:12 Ki iyookto `ortinwegap Israel piik koba komoswek tugul eng' ooreetap Benjamin, kole, “Nee tengegi kogobiit eng' kwenung'wong'?" 
Judges20:13 Omong'u anyun pichooto yaacheen, weeriigap Belial, che mi Gibea, si kobiit kebar ak keiste yaityet eng' Israel.” Ago ma cham Benjamin kogas ng'aleegap tupchosyekwak piigap Israel." 
Judges20:14 Ki iyumgei lagogap Benjamin che ki mang'une nganasook, koyumjigei Gibea ak koba kobargei ak piigap Israel." 
Judges20:15 Ki kiit lagogap Benjamin peetuunooto che ki mang'une nganasook, koek murenik eliphuusyek tiptem ak lo che tinyei rotoogap chok, ama ki itito piik che ki menyei Gibea, che ki ek murenik pogol tisap che ki kilewen." 
Judges20:16 Eng' kwenutap pichuuto tugul che ki kilewen ko ki mi murenik pogolwogik tisabu che po kaataam, che ki imuuchi age tugul kowiirtae porowet koita kowiir sumeiyot, ama ichilili." 
Judges20:17 Ki ek murenigap Israel tugul che po lugeet eliphuusyek pogol ang'wan che ki kiit ama pooto Benjamin. Chuuto tugul ko ki murenigap lugeet. 
Judges20:18 Ki ng'eetyo piigap Israel kotogosta Bethel, ole kiteebe Kamuktaindet kiit ne kanyool koyai. Ak ki le, “Ng'oo ne sip kotogostoi koba kobargei ak lagogap Benjamin?” Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Judah ne indoi.”" 
Judges20:19 Ki ng'eetyo anyun piigap Israel karon, ak koteech ye tokyingei Gibea." 
Judges20:20 Ki manda piigap Israel kobargei ak Benjamin, ak kitet lugeet kotokyigei icheek eng' Gibea." 
Judges20:21 Ki mong' lagogap Benjamin eng' Gibea ak ki par eng' peetuunooto murenik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng' kobutyi ng'wony che po Yahudik. 
Judges20:22 Ki igimitkei piik, murenigap Israel, ak kotet lugeet kogeny eng' yu ki paregei eng' tai." 
Judges20:23 (Ki togosta piigap Israel koba koriiryo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koskoleny, ak ki teebe `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Awe kogeny ayai lugeet ak lagogap Benjamin tupchennyu?” Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Togoste obargei ak ineendet.”)" 
Judges20:24 Ki riikyi `piigap Israel lagogap Benjamin eng' peetuut ne po aeng'. 
Judges20:25 Ki manda Benjamin eng' Gibea ak kobargei ak icheek eng' peetuut ne po aeng', ak ki par kogeny murenik eliphuusyek taman ak sisiit kobutyi ng'wony; ki tinyei chuuto tugul rotoogap chok." 
Judges20:26 Yeityo kotogosta lagok tugul che po Israel, ak piik tugul agoi koit Bethel. Ki riiryo, ak kotebi ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak korugutkei peetuunooto agoi koskoleny, ak ki igoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Judges20:27 Ak kiteebe `piigap Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, (amu ki mi olooto moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet eng' peetuusyechooto," 
Judges20:28 ak kitonone taitap moingonooto Phineas, weeriitap Eleazar, weeriitap Aron, eng' peetuusyechooto,) koleenji, “Ta awe kogeny kebarge ak lagogap Benjamin tupchennyu, anan atebi?” Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Togoste, amu andoi ineendet eung'ung' mutai.”" 
Judges20:29 Ara ki inde Israel piik che ribistos koyiem Gibea koriip. 
Judges20:30 Ki togosta Israel koba kobargei ak lagogap Benjamin eng' peetuut ne po somok, ak kotetkei kobargei ak Gibea ko uu peetuusyechuun alak." 
Judges20:31 Ki manda lagogap Benjamin kobookyi pichooto, ak ki kireto koba ole loo eng' nganaseet. Ki toi kowiir ak kobar eng' pichooto ko uu peetuusyechuun alak, olo po piik sosom che po Israel, eng' ortinwek che eecheen. Kiwendi age Bethel, kowendi age Gibea, eng' mbareenik." 
Judges20:32 Ki mwa lagogap Benjamin kole, “Kagibar eng' tainnyo ko uu eng' tai.” Ago ki le piigap Israel, “Ongemwee, ak kirete koba eng' nganaseet koba ortinwek che eecheen.”" 
Judges20:33 Ki ng'eetyo piik tugul che po Israel eng' komostanywa ak koba kotetkei eng' Baal-tamar. Ki mong' eng' komostanywa piik che kiribistos che po Israel, eng' Maaregeba." 
Judges20:34 Ki pwa kobargei ak Gibea, murenik eliphuusyek tamanu che ki kilewen eng' Israel tugul, ak king'wanit pooryeet. Ago ki ma nai kole neegit yaityet eng' icheek." 
Judges20:35 Ki par `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Benjamin eng' taitap Israel. Ki par piigap Israel eng' peetuunooto murenik eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut ak pogol che po Benjamin. Ki tinyei chuuto tugul rotoogap chok. 
Judges20:36 Ki keer lagogap Benjamin anyun kole kagebar. Amu ki istochigei piigap Israel Benjamin, amu ki imang'u piik che kiribistos koriipsei, che kiga konde icheek koriip Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Kichaakta piik che karibistos korwai Gibea. Ki iseergei pichooto, ak kobar nganaseet tugul eng' rotwetap chok." 
Judges20:38 Ki mi kaboorunet ne kiga kichop eng' kwenutap piigap Israel ak piik che kiribistos keele konaam iyeto ne oo kotogosta eng' nganaseet," 
Judges20:39 ko nyolu koweek anyun murenigap Israel eng' pooryeet. Ki toi Benjamin kowiir ak kobar murenigap Israel olo po piik sosom, amu ki le “Kagibar iman, ko uu eng' pooryeet ne po tai.”" 
Judges20:40 Ago kingo toi kotogosta iyeto ne uu toloita eng' nganaseet, kogeer let Benjamin, ak ogeero, ki togostoi maat eng' nganaseet kowendi parak." 
Judges20:41 Ki week anyun piigap Israel ak ki kwong'yo piigap Benjamin, amu ki keer kole kanyonji yaityet." 
Judges20:42 Ki mweiso anyun icheek eng' taitap piigap Israel kotuktoochi patai, koba ooreetap surkwen, ago ki kibarat icheek; ak ki par pichooto eng' kwenunnywa piik che ki mang'une nganasook." 
Judges20:43 Ki yiem `icheek Benjaminik konde kween, ki oon ak kotyegaat eng' ole imuung'ee kot koit ole tokyingei Gibea ole charunee asiista." 
Judges20:44 Ki pek piik eliphuusyek tamanu ak sisiit che po Benjamin, chuuto tugul ko ki murenik che nyigoonen." 
Judges20:45 Ki week ak komweiso kotokyigei surkwen kot koit rwandetap Rimon. Ak kikweat piik eliphuusyek muut eng' icheek, eng' ortinwek che eecheen. Ki oon kot koit Gidom ak ki par piik eliphuusyek aeng' eng' icheek." 
Judges20:46 Ki pek anyun eng' peetuunooto piik eliphuusyek tiptemu ak muut che po Benjamin che ki tinyei rotoogap chok, chuuto tugul ko ki murenik che nyigoonen." 
Judges20:47 Ago ki week piik pogolwogik lo, komwei kotokyigei surkwen kot koit rwandetap Rimon, ki meny rwandetap Rimon oriit arawek ang'wan." 
Judges20:48 Ki weekyigei kogeny piigap Israel lagogap Benjamin ak kobar eng' rotwetap chok, nganaseet komugul, tuuga ak tugul che kinyoor. Ak ki peel kogeny nganasook tugul che kinyoor." 
Judges21:1 Kiga koyasyo piigap Israel eng' Mispa, kole, “Ma igoochin chii eng' acheek cheptonyi Benjamin kotun.”" 
Judges21:2 Ki pwa piik Bethel ak kotep ng'wony eng' yooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet kot koit koskoleny, ak kowaach, ak koriiryo ne ng'waan." 
Judges21:3 Ak kole, “Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, amu nee si kobiit kii eng' Israel, kot koma komi rani ooreet age eng' Israel?”" 
Judges21:4 Ak ki eng' mutai kong'eetyo piik kota ko karon, ak koteech kaptisisyet eng' yooto, ak kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet." 
Judges21:5 Ki le piigap Israel, “Mi ng'oo eng' ortinwek tugul che po Israel ne ma nyo kotogos tuiyet ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?” Amu kiga yai kayasyoet ne oo agobo ineendet ne ma nyo kotogos ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Mispa, kole, “Kibarei ineendet iman.”" 
Judges21:6 Ago ki sich riirge piigap Israel agobo Benjamin tupchennywa, ak ki mwa kole, “Mi ooreet agenge ne kagobet ra eng' Israel." 
Judges21:7 Kiyae nee si konyoor osotik icheek che kong'et, amu ki kiyasye eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor keele ma kigoochini icheek tiibiikyok kotun?”" 
Judges21:8 Ak ki le icheek, “Ng'oo ne po ortinwek eng' Israel ne ma nyo kotogos ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Mispa?” Ak ogeero, Ki ma nyo chii agot agenge nganaseet ne ki punu Jabes-gilead konyo tuiyet." 
Judges21:9 Amu ye kingo kagiit piik, ogeero, ki ma komi chii eng' piik che ki menyei Jabes-gilead." 
Judges21:10 Ara ki iyookto `tuiyet piik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che po che nyigoonen eng' tugul, ak kong'at icheek koleenji, “Oba obar eng' rotwetap chok piik che menyei Jabes-gilead, kobooto kwonyiik ak lagok." 
Judges21:11 Kiit ne obendi oyae ko ni; obare ogesu muren age tugul ak kwony age tugul ne ki koruiyo ak muren.” 
Judges21:12 Ki nyoor eng' piik che ki menyei Jabes-gilead pergeinik pogol ang'wan che neranik, che ki tomo konai muren, ak ki imut icheek kobwa nganaseet eng' Shiloh, ne mi emetap Kanaan." 
Judges21:13 Ki iyookto tuiyet komugul piik koba kong'alaalji lagogap Benjamin che ki mi rwandetap Rimon oriit, ak komwachi icheek kaalyeet." 
Judges21:14 Ki week Benjamin eng' peetuusyechooto; ak ki igoochi icheek kwonyiik che ki sar kosapcho eng' che po kwonyiigap Jabes-gilead; ago ki ma yam icheek. 
Judges21:15 Ki aragenso piik agobo Benjamin amu ki koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koyaatak oldo age eng' ortinwegap Israel. 
Judges21:16 Ki le anyun poisyegap tuiyet, “Ki yai nee si konyoor osotik icheek che kong'et, amu ki kibar kwonyiik eng' Benjamin?”" 
Judges21:17 Ak ki le icheek, “Ne matiny konyolu kobiit poroteet eng' icheek che kichililso che po Benjamin, si ma pet ooreet age eng' Israel." 
Judges21:18 Ago ma kimuuchi kigoochi icheek osotik eng' tiibiikyok.” Amu kiga koyasyo piigap Israel, kole, “Chuboot ne igoochin osotyot Benjamin.”" 
Judges21:19 Ak ki le icheek, “Ogeero, miitei igoortap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiit age tugul eng' Shiloh, ne miitei murot kaataam ne po Bethel, eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po ooreet ne oo ne togostoi eng' Bethel kowendi Shekem, ak eng' murot tai ne po Lebanon.”" 
Judges21:20 Ak ki ng'at lagogap Benjamin, koleenji, “Oba, oribisye eng' mbareenigap sabibuk," 
Judges21:21 ak ogeer, ngot komong' tiibiigap Shiloh kobwa kourerenso eng' ureryosyek, omong'u anyun eng' mbareenigap sabibuk, konam chii tugul osotyonnyi eng' tiibiigap Shiloh, kobwa emetap Benjamin." 
Judges21:22 Ak ye pwa kwanisyekwak anan ko tupchosyekwak koboljech, keleenji anyun, ‘Ogoonech icheek eng' myeeindo, amu ma kimutu chii tugul eng' acheek osotyonnyi eng' pooryeet, ama ogoochi okweek icheek. Amu nda ki koyai ko uu nooto, ta otinye tengekto.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Ki yai ko uu nooto lagogap Benjamin, ak ki imutyigei osotik, che tee koiitennywa, eng' che kiuerendos che ki imut. Ki pa koweektagei ole kimi porotennywa, ak ki teech nganasook ak komeny." 
Judges21:24 Ki pa piigap Israel eng' peetuusyechooto, kwo chii tugul pororyennyi ak ole kimi ooreennyi, kimanda eng' yooto chii tugul kwo ole mi porotennyi." 
Judges21:25 Ki ma komi laitoryat Israel eng' peetuusyechooto. Kiyaei chii tugul ko uu ye kigeerei kole myee. 
Ruth1:1 Eng' peetuusyek che ki irwoochi kirwoogik, ko ki piit rubeet eng' emet. Ki wo chii ne po Bethlehem eng' Judah kwo komeny emetap Moab, ineendet ak osotyonnyi kobooto weeriikyik aeng'." 
Ruth1:2 Kainetap chiichooto ko ki Elimelek, ko osotyonnyi ko ki Naomi, ak weeriichooto aeng' ko ki Malon ak Kilion, che icheeget ko ki Epratik kobun Bethlehem eng' Judah. Ki it emetap Moab ak kotebee olooto." 
Ruth1:3 Ki me Elimelek manong'otyotap Naomi ak ki ng'et Naomi ak weeriikyik aeng'. 
Ruth1:4 Ki itun `weerchooto osotik eng' kwonyiigap Moab ne kainetap age ko ki Orpa, ko age ko ki Ruth. Ki meny olooto olo po kenyiisyek taman." 
Ruth1:5 Ki pek ak icheek Malon ak Kilion, ak ki ng'et Naomi ineegei ama lagokyik aeng' anan manong'otyondennyi." 
Ruth1:6 Ki ng'eet ineendet anyun kobooto kwonyiigap weeriikyik komachei koweektagei eng' emetap Moab, amu kiga kogas komi emetap Moab kole ki korutoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik ak kogoochi amitwogik." 
Ruth1:7 Ki wo eng' komosta ne ki mi ak osotigap weeriikyik aeng', ak koba pandanywa koweektagei emetap Judah." 
Ruth1:8 Ki leenji `Naomi osotichooto aeng' po weeriikyik, “Ingoweektagei age tugul kwo kootap kamennyi ak ingoyaiywok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne myee ko uu ye ki oyachi che ki kobek ak ko uu ye ki oyaiywo." 
Ruth1:9 Ingogoonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor onyooru kaalyeet, konyoor age tugul eng' okweek eng' kootap manong'otyondennyi.” Ki ng'utut icheek, ak ki waakyo koriiryo." 
Ruth1:10 Koleenji `icheek ineendet, “Achicha, ki weeksei kebendi tugul ole mi piiguk.”" 
Ruth1:11 Koleenji Naomi, “Obechigei tiibiikyuk. Amu nee si keebe tugul? Ta asiche weeriik alak che imuuchi koek manong'otaikwok?" 
Ruth1:12 Oba tiibiikyuk, obechigei amu koaositu ak koma kituno. Agot ndata abwaati ale ta komi kamang'unet, ak asich manong'otyot kemouni ak anyooru weeriik," 
Ruth1:13 ko tos ogen kot koechegitu? Tos otebii koma kitunook? Achicha tiibiikyuk! Ki kong'wanit miising' eng' anee kosiirook, amu ki konyaliila eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Ruth1:14 Ki testai kowaakyo icheek. Inga ki ng'utut `Orpa korgennyi po yugoi kosaiseret, ko ki nam `Ruth ak komeitoochi." 
Ruth1:15 Koleenji `Naomi Ruth, “Keero, kagoweek kwondap pomurtang'ung' kwo ole mi piikyik ak kamuktaindennyi. Weektegei aginye! Isup ne po pomurtang'ung'.”" 
Ruth1:16 Ago ki wolji Ruth koleenji, “Amegimnjo ile abagachin anan ile aweek matkebe tuwai! Ole kewe, awendi, ak ole itebee atebee agane. Egu piiguk piikyuk, ak egu Kamuktaindeng'ung' Kamuktaindennyu." 
Ruth1:17 Ole imechini, amechini, ak ketupchino yooto. Ingoyaiywo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto, ak kotes kosiir, kobatee meet ineegei ne ibestoseech anee ak inyee.”" 
Ruth1:18 Kingo keer Naomi kole kiga kobegechi koba tuwai, ko mata komwachi kiy ineendet." 
Ruth1:19 Ki pa anyun tuwai kot koit Bethlehem. Kingo it Bethlehem, komong' nganaseet komugul eng' poiboiyet ak kole kwonyiik, “Naomi niito iman?”" 
Ruth1:20 Koleenji `ineendet icheek, “Moguureno Naomi (chebaibai)! Oguureno Marah (chepnereekya), amu ki koyaiywo ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet kiit ne ng'waan." 
Ruth1:21 Ki awendi ko aa nyiitaat, ak kogomutwaa `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaa ami puch. Amu nee si oguureno Chebaibai ko ki kobaoryan Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogikyo, ak konyaliila Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet?”" 
Ruth1:22 Ki week anyun Naomi eng' emetap Moab kobooto Ruth cheptap Moab osotyotap weeriinnyi. Ki it Bethlehem ko katoygei kesisyetap baale. 
Ruth2:1 Ki tinyei `Naomi chiitap ooreetap manong'otyonnyi, chii ne oo ne mogoryo, ne po ooreetap Elimelek, ak kainennyi ko ki Boaz." 
Ruth2:2 Ak ki leenji `Ruth chemoabindet Naomi, “Ngawo mbar si aturot peek che kameto kesiik. Amang'u ale anyooru ineendet ne imuuch koriirena.” Koleenji Naomi, “Ui, cheptonyu.”" 
Ruth2:3 Ki wo anyun Ruth mbar ak koturisyot kosubi piik che kesisyei. Ki it keljiinennyi, ye kingo it kebebertap mbareet ne po Boaz, nooto ki po ooreetap Elimelek." 
Ruth2:4 Ki it anyun koit Boaz kobunu Bethlehem, ak kogat kesiik koleenji, “Ingotep Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootok.” Kowolji `icheek ineendet kole, “Ingoberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Ruth2:5 koteebeee `Boaz otwogindennyi ne kitononjin piik che kesisyei koleenji, “Po kap ng'oo chebi?”" 
Ruth2:6 Kowolji `otwogindet ne kitononjin piik che kesisyei koleenji, “Ineendet ko cheptap Moab ne kibwanei ak Naomi ye kingo weeksei eng' emetap Moab." 
Ruth2:7 Koleenjo ineendet, ‘Kaigai, chamwo aturisyot ak ayumate peek eng' kwenutap ratuutigap peek, asubi piik che kesisyei.’ Kait ak koturis kong'etee karon agoi nguno ne ma imuny kot koek nguno ne kaimuny kitigin.”" 
Ruth2:8 Koleenji `Boaz Ruth, “Kas anyuno cheptonyu! Amat iwe iturisyote eng' mbareet age, anan isiirte eng' yu, ago tebi ineegite kwonyiik." 
Ruth2:9 Tokyi konyeguk kogeer mbareet ne kesei icheeget, ak iwe isup icheek. Kaang'at murenik aleenji mat kotwain. Ye amin melel, iwe iee peek che kagoramji tereenik murenichooto.”" 
Ruth2:10 Ki ing'uruuk Ruth kot kotiiny ng'wony togeennyi eng' teegis, ak koleenji chiichooto, “Amu nee si anyoor myeeindo eng' taing'ung' kot ibwaata anee ne aa too?”" 
Ruth2:11 Kowolji `Boaz ineendet koleenji, “Kogemwaiwo tuguuk tugul che ki iyachi korgeng'ung' po yugoi kobooch ngo me manong'otyong'ung', ak ko uu ye ki ibagaakte kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung' kobooto emet ne ki kisikyinin, ak inyoo ole mi piik che ki ma ingen eng' tai." 
Ruth2:12 Ingoyaagun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poisyeng'ung', ingogoonin melekto ne nyiitaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne ki inyoo imwechi kebebaikyik!”" 
Ruth2:13 Koleenji Ruth, “Inganyoor myeeindo eng' taing'ung' kiptaiyandennyu, amu kaigaigaa ak amu kaing'alaalji cheptong'ung' ne otwogin eng' chamyet, agot nganda ma uu age eng' tiibiiguk che otwogik.”" 
Ruth2:14 Kingo it saitap amitwogik, koleenji `Boaz ineendet, “Nyoo putul amitwogichu, ak iamde kererutyeng'ung' siki.” Ki tebi Ruth anyun ak kesiik ak ki igoochi Boaz peek che kagigeel. Ki am kobiyo kot kong'et katuganik." 
Ruth2:15 Kingo kang'eet kwo koturisyot, kong'at `Boaz parnotikyik koleenji, “Ingoturot chebi agot eng' kwenutap ratuutik ago mo kerong'." 
Ruth2:16 Ong'usyi metoweegap peek eng' ratuutik, ak ometoochi kotur amoger kong' ineendet.”" 
Ruth2:17 Kiturisyot anyun Ruth eng' mbar agoi koskoleny. Kiboor che kagoturot, ak ki olo po keruutik tiptem." 
Ruth2:18 Kila koip turoonik kwo nganaseet ak koboorchi korgennyi po yugoi che tee che kagotur. Ki ipchi amitwogik che kigaituuch ko kagobiyo, ak kogoochi ineendet." 
Ruth2:19 koteebeee Naomi koleenji, “Keturee ano ra turoonichu techu? Keturee mbareetap ng'oo? Iberuurot ineendet ne kanain.” Komwochi `Ruth Naomi koleenji kaboisyei eng' mbareetap chiito ne kiguure Boaz." 
Ruth2:20 Koleenji `Naomi osotyondonooto ki po weeriinnyi, “Ingoberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Boaz! Ma metoi rireenennyi eng' che saptos ak che ki kobek.” Kotestai kora koleenji, “Chiichooto ko chiitap ooreennyo ne neegit.”" 
Ruth2:21 Kole Ruth, “Wei, kamwaiwo kole atebee ole neegitee parnotikyik agoi kotar kogosori peek.”" 
Ruth2:22 Koleenji `Naomi Ruth, “Cheptonyu, kaigai obe ak otwogik che kwonyiik si ma iimin piik eng' mbareet age.”" 
Ruth2:23 Ki tebi kobois anyun ak otwogik che kwonyiik agoi kegosor baale ak nganuuk, ak komeng'iis kobooto korgennyi po yugoi." 
Ruth3:1 Ki leenji `Naomi korgennyi po yugoi, “Cheptonyu, tos ma cheeng'un anee ole imuung'ee, si komyeeit eng' inyee?" 
Ruth3:2 Tos ma po ooreennyo Boaz, ne ki omi ak tiibiikyik? Keero, iruri baale kooi kemoi eng' rwanyut ne kiboorsee." 
Ruth3:3 Iungei nguno ak iilgei, ak ilaach ngoroiguk, yeityo iwe olooto mi rwanyut; ago amat iboorchigei ineendet kot kooges amisyet ak eiset." 
Ruth3:4 Ye kagoru, igeer ye karu; iwe anyun ak ing'aany keelyekyik ak iru yooto; si komwaun kiit ne kanyool iyai.”" 
Ruth3:5 Ki leenji `Ruth Naomi, “Ayae chooto tugul kemwa.”" 
Ruth3:6 Ki choortagei anyun kwo ole mi rwanyut, kwo koyai tugul che kamwachi korgennyi po yugoi." 
Ruth3:7 Ye kingo kagoamis Boaz ak koe ak kobaibait muguleldanyi, kwo koru ye pooch karurugutyetap peek. Ki nyo Ruth mutyo ak kong'aany keelyekyik, ak koru yooto." 
Ruth3:8 Ak kingo ek kemoi kween kosiir chiichooto eng' rwondo, ak koweigei ak eng' yooto konai kole kiruei kwony eng' keelyekyik." 
Ruth3:9 Ki le ineendet, “Ii ng'oo?” Ak ki wol kole, “Aa Ruth cheptong'ung' ne otwoget. Tugee cheptong'ung' ne otwoget ngoryeeng'ung' amu ii chiitap ooreet ne neegit.”" 
Ruth3:10 Ki le chiichooto, “Ingoberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, cheptonyu, kaibooru myeeindo ne oo eng' let kosiir eng' taunet, amu ma isup murenik che mengech, ngo che ponoon anan ngo che mogore." 
Ruth3:11 Nooto anyun cheptonyu, meiywei; ayaun tugul chooto kemwa, amu ingen nganaseet tugul ne po piikyuk kole, ii kwondo ne tinyei atebeet ne nyolunot." 
Ruth3:12 Iman aa chiitap ooreet ne neegit, ago miitei chiito age neta koneegit kosiiro." 
Ruth3:13 Tebi kemouni, ak ngot koyaun chiichooto mutai karon nooto nyolunot eng' chiitap ooreet, ko myee nooto, ko ingoyai nooto nyolunot eng' chiitap ooreet. Ago ngot koma yaun nooto nyolunot eng' chiitap ooreet, ayai anyun nooto nyolunot eng' chiitap ooreet, ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ru anyun agoi koeech.”" 
Ruth3:14 Ki ru eng' keelyekyik agoi koeech, ak king'eet kotomo kinyit chii. Amu ki le Boaz, “Amengonai chii kole konyo kwony rwanyut.”" 
Ruth3:15 Ki leenji, “Ibu ngoryono ilaachi ak itaach.” Ak kingo yai ko uu nooto, ko kigerchi keruutik lo che po baale, ak kogesenji. Ki wo Boaz koweektagei nganaseet." 
Ruth3:16 Kingo it Ruth ole mi korgennyi po yugoi, koteebe koleenji, “Ko uu nee ng'aleek cheptonyu?” Ak ki mwachi ineendet tuguuk tugul che koyachi chiichooto." 
Ruth3:17 Ak ki le, “Kagono kerutichu lo po baale; amu ki le, ‘Amewe puch ole mi korgeng'ung' po yugoi.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Ki le anyun, “Muitee cheptonyu, kot inai kiit ne egu ng'aleechooto. Amu ma imuunyi agoi koyai kioto chiichooto rani kosulda.”" 
Ruth4:1 Kingo togosta Boaz kwo ormariichetap nganaseet ak kotep ng'wony eng' yooto, ko ki nyo kobun yooto chiichooto po ooreet ne neegit nooto ki mwaei Boaz. Ak ki leenji, “Nyoo yu ornyo, ak itep ng'wony.” Ki wo anyun chiichooto ak kotep ng'wony." 
Ruth4:2 Ki kuur `Boaz poisyek taman che po nganaseet ak koleenji, “Obuur eng' yu.” Kobuur anyun icheek." 
Ruth4:3 Ki leenji anyun `Boaz chiitap ooreet ne neegit, “Aldoi Naomi ne ki koweek eng' emetap Moab kooret ne ki po tupchennyo Elimelek." 
Ruth4:4 Koabwaat amwaun ale ial koronooto eng' taitap pichu ibuuri eng' yu, ak eng' taitap poisyegap piikyuk. Ngot imach ityaach, ityaach; ago ngot ko memach ityaach, imwaiwo si anai. Amu ma mi age ne ityaachi kobatenen; ak arubin.” Ak ki wol kole, “Atyachi.”" 
Ruth4:5 Ki testai kole Boaz, “Eng' peetuut ne ialeen koronooto Naomi, ko ialeen Ruth chemoabindet agine, osotyotap ne ki kome, si kobiit ilaalji maat ne ki kome eng' porotennyi.”" 
Ruth4:6 Ki le chiichooto po ooreet ne neegit, “Ma muuchi atyakyigei, ngayai ko uu nooto amuuch ang'em porotennyu. Ip imandap katyaget ne kata atyachi kobunjiin; amu ma muuchi atyach.”" 
Ruth4:7 Ki uu ni piteet ne ki mi Israel agobo katyaget ak agobo waleet: si ki kimiit kayanjinet, ko ki icheru chiito kweiyondennyi ak kogoochi chiitap kokwennyi. Ki piteetap paornateet eng' Israel nooto." 
Ruth4:8 Koleenji anyun `Boaz chiichooto po ooreet ne neegit, “Aljigei.” Ak ki icher kweiyondennyi." 
Ruth4:9 Ki leenji `Boaz poisyek ak piik tugul, “Oo paorinik ra, ole kaal eng' eutap Naomi, tuguuk tugul che ki po Elimelek, ak tuguuk tugul che ki po Kilion ak che ki po Malon." 
Ruth4:10 Kogeny, ko kaal Ruth chemoabindet ne ki osotyotap Malon, koek osotyonnyu, si kobiit alaalji maat eng' porotennyi ineendet ne kime, si ma pet kainennyi eng' tupchosyekyik ak eng' kurgeetap oldanyi. Oo paorinik rani.”" 
Ruth4:11 Ki le anyun piik tugul che ki mi ormariichet kobooto poisyek, “Ki paorinik. Ingoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwondo ne kanyo koong'ung' koigei Rael ak Leah, chooto aeng' che ki teech kootap Israel. Iegu ne nyolu eng' Ephratah ak iegu ne tagunoot eng' Bethlehem." 
Ruth4:12 Ak eng' kesweek che tuun koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwonyi, ko ingogergeit koong'ung' ak kootap Peres ne ki sikyi `Tamar Judah.”" 
Ruth4:13 Ki imut anyun `Boaz Ruth ak ki ek osotyonnyi. Ki ituiyogei ak ineendet ak ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komanach, ak kosich weeriit." 
Ruth4:14 Ki leenji `kwonyiik Naomi, “Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ma pagakten eng' peetuuni ametinye chiitap ooreet ne neegit koalin. Ingotook kainennyi eng' Israel!" 
Ruth4:15 Egu ineendet ne weegun saboondang'ung' ak koek ne riibin eng' osindang'ung'; amu osotyotap weeriing'ung', ne chamin, ne kaigai eng' inyee kosiir weeriik tisap, ko kasich lakweet.”" 
Ruth4:16 Ki nam `Naomi lakweet ak kotiny eng' tegeennyi, ak ki ek ineendet cheplakwet." 
Ruth4:17 Ki toochi kainet kwonyiigap kokwet, kole, “Kogesikyi Naomi weeriit.” Ki kuure kainennyi Obed. Ineendet kwandap Jesse, kwandap Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Chu anyun ko ortinwegap Peres: ki sich `Peres Hesron," 
Ruth4:19 kosich `Hesron Ram ak kosich `Ram Aminadab," 
Ruth4:20 ki sich `Aminadab Nason, kosich `Nason Salmon," 
Ruth4:21 ki sich `Salmon Boaz, kosich `Boaz Obed," 
Ruth4:22 ki sich `Obed Jesse ak kosich Jesse Daudi. 
1Samuel1:1 Ki mi chii ne ki kiguure Elkanah ne po Ramataim ne ki po Suphim ne po emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim. Ki weeriitap Jeroham, weeriitap Elihu, weeriitap Tohu, weeriitap Suph Ephraimindet." 
1Samuel1:2 Ki tinyei osotik aeng'; kainetap age ko ki Hannah ak kainetap age ko ki Peninnah. Ki tinyei Peninnah lagok ago ki ma kotinyei Hannah lakwa. 
1Samuel1:3 Ki cham kotogostoi chiichooto eng' nganasennyi eng' kenyiit age tugul kowendi kosaaei ak kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek tiseiywek eng' Shiloh. Ki mi yooto weeriik aeng' che po Eli, Hopni ak Phineas, icheeget che ki tisiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel1:4 Kingo it peetuut ne igoitoi Elkanah tiseiywek, ko ki igoochin kebeberwek Peninnah osotyonnyi, weeriikyik tugul ak tiibiikyik," 
1Samuel1:5 ago ki igoochin Hannah kebeberwek aeng' amu ki chamei `Elkanah ineendet nga kiga rat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor moennyi. 
1Samuel1:6 Kitach `syennyi ineendet kole si kogereer met amu kiga rat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor moennyi. 
1Samuel1:7 Ki testai ko uu nooto Elkanah eng' kenyiit age tugul, ak ye kitogostoi Hannah kowendi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotestai kotaach `ineendet kwonyooto. Ki igooch koriir anyun, ak ma amis." 
1Samuel1:8 Ki leenji `Elkanah manong'otyondennyi, “Hannah, iriirchini nee? Amu nee si meamisyei? Amu nee si koarageni muguleldang'ung'? Tos ma aa kaigai eng' inyee kosiir weeriik taman?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Ki ng'eet anyun Hannah ye kingo kagoamis ak koeeiso eng' Shiloh. Ki tisiindet Eli ne kitebyei eng' ye po tugatukyetap kurgeet ne po hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel1:10 Eng' ng'wanindo ne ki tinyei eng' saboondanyi ko ki sa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' riirek ak eng' ng'wanindo. 
1Samuel1:11 Ki yai kayasyoet kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ngot igeer nyalildap cheptong'ung' ne otwoget ak ibwaata ak ko meutye cheptong'ung' ne otwoget, ak igoochi weeriit, agoochini anyun weeroto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyekyik tugul kotee kosabei, ama kicheru suumeekyik.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Ye kita kosaaei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kogeer Eli kutinnyi." 
1Samuel1:13 Ki ng'alaali Hannah eng' muguleldanyi. Kitwau kutinnyi kityo ago ki ma kegasei tweguunennyi. Eng' nooto, kobwaat anyun Eli kole aleen kabogit." 
1Samuel1:14 Koleenji Eli, “Ibogiti kot kotyanit? Iste divaiguk.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Ago ki wol Hannah kole, “Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, aa kwony ne iimat kot. Maee divaik anan ko maiyek, ago katyach saboondanyu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel1:16 Meit cheptong'ung' ne otwoget ile chii puch. Amu koang'alaal agoi rani eng' chaang'indap kang'unyng'unyennyu ak choteet ne kichoto ak ketacha.” 
1Samuel1:17 Ki wol anyun Eli kole, “Ui eng' kaalyeet; ak ingogoonin Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel soomeng'ung' ne kesoom ineendet.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Kole Hannah, “Ingonyoor otwogeng'ung' myeeindo eng' taing'ung'.” Ki wo anyun kwonyooto ak koamis, amata konyoor kaimetapkei kogeny." 
1Samuel1:19 Eng' peetuut ne ki rubei, kong'eetyo anyun karon miising' kap Elkanah ak kogutung'so eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, yeityo koweek agoi koonnywa eng' Ramah. Ki tuiyo Elkanah ak Hannah osotyonnyi ak ki ibwaat `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwonyooto." 
1Samuel1:20 Ki manach anyun Hannah ak kosich weeriit. Kiguure kainennyi Samuel koleen, “Amu ki asoom ineendet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Ki togosta Elkanah kobooto koonnyi tugul kwo kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywotap kenyiit age tugul ak koyaakta kaarortoennyi. 
1Samuel1:22 Ago ma togosta Hannah, amu ki leenji manong'otyondennyi, “Ma wendi kot aluge lakweet, si amut kwo taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwo kotebee olooto agoi.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Ki mwachi `Elkanah manong'otyondennyi koleenji, “Yai ko uu ye igeere ile myee, tebi kot iluge lakweet ago ingogimiit `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondennyi.” Ki tep anyun kwonyooto kochuchun lakweennyi ne ki weeriit kot koluge." 
1Samuel1:24 Ye kingo kagoluge ak ye kita ko ming'in lakwanooto, komut ineendet kwo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Shiloh. Ki kweri kiruugik somok ak koip kiloinik taman che po peek che ng'ootiin kobooto soteet agenge ne po divaik." 
1Samuel1:25 Ki eeny kirgit ak komutyi Eli lakweet. 
1Samuel1:26 Ak ki mwa kwonyooto kole, “Ee kiptaiyandennyu, ko uu ye isabe, ko aa kwonyo kitononi eng' yu kimi, asaae Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel1:27 Lakwani ne ki asoome ak kigogoono `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor soomennyu ne ki asoom ineendet. 
1Samuel1:28 Nooto anyun, kaagoochi ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kotee kosabei, ko ki agoochi `ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ak ki itoroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' yooto." 
1Samuel2:1 Ak ki sa Hannah kole: “Igasegei muguleldanyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kagotesak kimnateennyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Arorechini puunikyuk, amu abaibai eng' yetuneng'ung'." 
1Samuel2:2 Ma mi ne tiliil ko uu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma mi age kobatenen; ama mi rwandet ne uu Kamuktaindennyo." 
1Samuel2:3 Among'alaal eng' menoteet, anan komang'une kutusweekwok lasetapkei. Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet ne po naet tugul, eng' ineendet ko naaksei ole uu poisyonik." 
1Samuel2:4 Ildos kwangogap piik che nyigoonen, ak kermenotin eng' kimnateet icheeget che ki kiinach." 
1Samuel2:5 Icheeget che ki piyong'otiin, ko aldagei si konyoor amitwogik, ko che ki amei rubeet kobiyong'otiin. Ineendet ne soon ko kigosich tisap, ago ineendet ne tinyei lagok che chaang' ko nyaluli." 
1Samuel2:6 Parei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kosaabi. Choortoi koba kererit ak komutu kotogos. 
1Samuel2:7 Ibanani `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chii ak komogornoni. Iming'ini ak koeeti. 
1Samuel2:8 Ing'eeti kibananook komang'une temburyek, ak ko kanabu eng' kapng'atat che ma tinyei kiy, si kogoochi kotebi ak pounik, ak kosich ng'echereetap toroornatet. Amu po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tolochigap ng'wony, ak ki konde ng'wony kotonone chooto." 
1Samuel2:9 Riibei keelyegap piik che iywei ineendet, ago yaei kiptengeginik kolusyo eng' imenindo. Amu ma eng' kimnon si kobelis chii." 
1Samuel2:10 Ki ng'emei che ibeligei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; tuljin icheek ko uu ilat ne ng'eete kipsengwet. Irwookyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony komugul; igoochin kimnateet laitoryandennyi, ak kogoochi kabelisyet nenyi ne iilaat.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Kingo pata, kwo Elkanah kaa eng' Ramah, ak kong'et lakweet koboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap tisiindet Eli." 
1Samuel2:12 Weeriigap Eli ko kingelelik; ki ma kotinyei kaiyweisyo agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel2:13 Kingo koito chii tiseiywot ko uu piteetap tisiik eng' piik, ko ki iyooktoi icheek otwogindetap tisiindet ye kita kiyoi panyeek, kotinyei eng' euut karnet ne ki sagunegei somok ne ki rutune panyeek," 
1Samuel2:14 si korookta karnanooto tereet oriit anan kibiriget anan saburyet anan ko tereetap ng'ung'unyek si koipchigei `tisiindet panyeek tugul che kainem karnanooto. Ki yachin ko uu nooto piigap Israel tugul eng' Shiloh che kibwanei yooto. 
1Samuel2:15 Kingo tomo kobeel mwaita, konyo otwogindetap tisiindet ak koleenji chiito ne kieng'sei, “Koonu pendo ne kiwatanjin tisiindet, amu ma ibei pendo ne kagiyo ne igoonu, kobatee ne tuon.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Ngot koleenji `chiito ineendet, “Ingobeelak sunetik korook, yeityo iip che tee che imache,” kowolu anyun koleen, “Achicha, koono nguno ngot ko megoono aibe eng' kimnateet.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Ki oo miising' tengektap murenjooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki it kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko tugun che ma kiy." 
1Samuel2:18 Nga ki lakwa Samuel, ko ki poisyei ineendet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kolaachi ephod ne po katanit." 
1Samuel2:19 Eng' kenyiit age tugul koginapchin kamet ngoryeet ne ming'in ak koipchi ineendet ye kibendi ak manong'otyondennyi kogoitoi tiseiywegap kenyiit age tugul. 
1Samuel2:20 Ki iberuur `Eli Elkanah ak osotyonnyi, koleen, “Ingogoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iyoteet eng' kwonyi kogeer nooto ki isoom ak igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Yeityo koba kaa." 
1Samuel2:21 Ki rutoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hannah ak kingo manach, kosich weeriik somok ak tiibiik aeng'. Ak kieet lakweet Samuel eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel2:22 Nga kiga koosit Eli miising', ko ki kas tuguuk tugul che kiyachin weeriikyik Israel tugul, ak ko uu ye ki ibegei ak kwonyiik che kiboisyei eng' kurgeetap emait ne kituiyechin." 
1Samuel2:23 Ki leenji icheek, “Amu nee si oyai tuguuk che uu cho? Agase eng' pichu tugul poisyonikwok che yaacheen." 
1Samuel2:24 Achicha, weeriikyuk; ma myee atepto ne agase komwaati piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel2:25 Ngot koyachi chii chiito age tengek, korwookyin Kamuktaindet. Ago ngot koyachi chii tengek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ng'oo ne saaei agobo ineendet?” Ago ki ma kas ng'aleegap kwandanywa, amu kimachei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobar icheek." 
1Samuel2:26 Ki eet anyun lakwanooto Samuel ak ki chamat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak eng' piik ak icheek. 
1Samuel2:27 Ki nyoonji `chiitap Kamuktaindet Eli ak koleenji, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, ‘Tos ki ma ang'aang'jigei kootap kwandang'ung' ye ki miitei Misiri eng' kootap Pharaoh?" 
1Samuel2:28 Ak ki alewen ineendet eng' pororyosyek tugul che po Israel koek tisiindennyu, kotogosta ole mi kapkorosunnyu, kwo kobeel nyamdutik ak kolaach ephod eng' tainnyu? Tos ma ki agoochi kootap kwandang'ung' kagoochinoik tugul che po Yahudik che kigoitoi kobun maat?" 
1Samuel2:29 Amu nee anyun si otyar tiseiywekyuk ak kagoochinoikyuk che ki ang'at eng' meng'ootennyu? Amu nee si igonyit weeriiguk kosiiro ak oneryee kagoochinoik che eecheen eng' tugul che po piikyuk Israel?’ 
1Samuel2:30 Nooto anyun mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, ‘Ki amwa iman ale, wendoti eng' tainnyu koong'ung' ak kootap kwandang'ung' koigeny.’ Ago kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nguno kole, ‘Ingolooit eng' anee!’ Icheek che konyita, agonyiti, ago icheeget che ma iita kole aa kiy, kesasei." 
1Samuel2:31 Keero pwoonei peetuusyek che atile eung'ung' ak eutap kootap kwandang'ung' kot koma piit poiyo eng' koong'ung'. 
1Samuel2:32 Iimigei ye igeere mogornateet tugul ne igoochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel, ak ma piitu poiyo eng' koong'ung' agoi." 
1Samuel2:33 Ak chiing'ung' ne ma istoi anee eng' kapkorosunnyu koegu ne igeesu konyeguk ak kogoochi arageneet muguleldang'ung'. Pegu iyoteet tugul ne po koong'ung' kota ko neran. 
1Samuel2:34 Ak egu ni kaboorunet ne tuun nyoonjin weeriiguk aeng' Hopni ak Phineas; pegu tuwai eng' peetuut agenge. 
1Samuel2:35 Ak ang'eetyigei tisiindet ne kiyani ne tuun yaei kiit ne mi muguleldanyu ak eng' kabwaatutikyuk ak ateekyi ineendet koot ne kiim, ak kowendote taitap nenyu ne iilaat koigeny." 
1Samuel2:36 Tuun nyoonei age tugul ne kang'et eng' koong'ung' konyo kong'uruukyi ineendet si konyoor fedhaiyat ak magatyat ak kole, ‘Asoomin ale indea aek age eng' poisyonigap tisiik si aam agot magatyat kitigin.’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 Ki poisyechin lakwanooto `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap Eli. Ki ma kota kegasei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyechooto, ak ki ma komi ng'ang'utyet ne taagu." 
1Samuel3:2 Ye kingo ru Eli peetuut age eng' oldanyi, kigatoi kogoryo konyekyik ak ki ma kogeerei kiy," 
1Samuel3:3 ye kitom kome tait ne po Kamuktaindet, ak ko kagoru Samuel eng' hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ole ki mi moingetap Kamuktaindet," 
1Samuel3:4 koguur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel, ak ki le, “Ami yu.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Ak kilabat ole mi Eli ak koleenji, “Ami yu, amu keguura.” Koleenji Eli, “Ma aguurin, ui ru.” Ak ki wo koru." 
1Samuel3:6 Ki kuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny kole, “Samuel!” Ki ng'eet Samuel kogeny ak kwo ole mi Eli, koleenji, “Ami yu amu keguura.” Ki wolji Eli koleenji, “Ma aguurin, weeriinnyu, weegen, ui ru.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Kitom konai `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kitom keng'aang'ji ineendet ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel3:8 Ki kuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel kogeny ne po somok. Ak king'eet kwo ole mi Eli ak koleenji, “Ami yu amu keguura.” Eng' yooto anyun, konai Eli kole kaguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lakwanooto." 
1Samuel3:9 Koleenji anyun `Eli Samuel, “Ui iru, ak ngot koguurin kogeny, imwa ile, ‘Ng'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ebei iit otwogindeng'ung'.’ ” Kwo anyun Samuel koru eng' oldanyi." 
1Samuel3:10 Ki nyo `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kotonon, koguur ko uu tai, kole, “Samuel! Samuel!” Ak ki wol Samuel kole, “Ng'alaal amu ebei iit otwogindeng'ung'.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel, “Ayae kiit eng' Israel ne tang'anyee chii age tugul ne kasei." 
1Samuel3:12 Eng' peetuunooto ayachini Eli tuguuk tugul che ki amwa agobo koonnyi, kobooch taunet agoi let." 
1Samuel3:13 Ki amwachi aleenji arwookyini koonnyi koigeny amu tengekto ne ki ingen amu ki ipchigei `weeriikyik chubisyet ama kergong'. 
1Samuel3:14 Nooto anyun ki ayosye agobo kootap Eli ale, ma kitisei tengektap kootap Eli eng' tiseiywot anan ko eng' kagoochinoik agoi.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Ki ru anyun Samuel agoi koeech, yeityo koyaat kurgotigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki iywei Samuel koboorchi Eli ng'ang'utyonooto." 
1Samuel3:16 Ki kuur `Eli Samuel ak koleenji, “Weeriinnyu Samuel.” Ak ki le, “Ami yu.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Ak kiteepsee Eli kole, “Nee kiit ne komwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Asoomin ale ameung'ena ng'olyoondonooto. Ingoyaun Kamuktaindet ak ngo yaun ne siirei nooto, ngot iung'ena kiy age tugul eng' tuguuk tugul che komwaun ineendet.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Ki mwachi anyun Samuel kiy age tugul, ak ma ung'e kiy ineendet. Ak ki le Eli, “Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ingoyai ko uu ye keerei kole myee.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Ki eet Samuel ak ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet, ak ki ma komi kiy eng' ng'aleek che kiga komwa Samuel ne ma isulda." 
1Samuel3:20 Kobooch Dan agoi Beer-sheba ko ki nai Israel tugul kole Samuel iman ko maotyotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel3:21 Ak ki testai koboorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Shiloh: king'aang'jigei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel eng' Shiloh kobun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel4:1 Ki ityi ng'olyootap `Samuel Israel tugul. Ki manda Israel anyun koba kobargei ak Philistiik. Ki teech Yahudik emainnywa eng' ole neegitee Eben-haezer, koteech Philistiik nenywa eng' Apek." 
1Samuel4:2 Ki tetkei Philistiik si kobargei ak Israel. Ye kingo tuiyo lugeet, ko ki iterteer `Philistiik Israel. Ki par piigap lugeet che po Israel olo po eliphuusyek ang'wan eng' koronooto." 
1Samuel4:3 Ye kingo it piigap lugeetap Israel nganaseet, koteep poisyegap Israel kole, “Amu nee si kobarech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani eng' taitap Philistiik? Ongeibu moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Shiloh konyo kwenunnyo si kosarwech eng' eunegap puunikyok.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Ki kiyookto anyun piik koba Shiloh, ak ki ip eng' yooto moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ne tebee kerubisyek. Ki imi yooto anyun Hopni ak Phineas, weeriichooto aeng'u po Eli kobooto moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel4:5 Ye kingo it moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseet, kowaach Israel tugul eng' waagaat ne oo kot kochei emet." 
1Samuel4:6 Kingo kas Philistiik polatetap waagaat, koteebegei koleenjigei, “Ngu po nee waagaandani oo eng' nganaseetap Yahudik?” Kingo nai Philistiik kole kagoit moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseet," 
1Samuel4:7 koywei amu ki le, “Kanyo kamuktaindet nganaseet.” Kotestai kole, “Pwo eng' acheek! Amu tomo kobiitu kiit ne uu ni kobooch keny." 
1Samuel4:8 Pwo acheek! Ng'oo ne sarwech eng' kamuktaichu kiimeen? Chu ko kamuktaik cho ki parei Misiriik koboree korotwo alak tugul eng' surkwen. 
1Samuel4:9 Ogimegitu ak oegu murenik, ee okweek Philistiik si moegu otwogigap Yahudik ko uu ye ki otwogikwok icheek. Onyiganiitu ko uu muren anyun ak oyai lugeet.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Ki yai Philistiik lugeet ak koterteer Israel, ak ki mwei chii age tugul komwechi emainnyi. Ki piit pareet ne oo miising' amu ki pek kiplugotiniigap Israel eliphuusyek sosomu che punei keelyek." 
1Samuel4:11 Ki kiip moingetap Kamuktaindet ak kebar Hopni ak Phineas, weeriichooto aeng' po Eli." 
1Samuel4:12 Ki labat chii ne po ooreetap Benjamin eng' ole kimi lugeet peetuunooto agoi Shiloh ko kagogereer ngoroikyik ak komi ng'ung'unyek metinnyi. 
1Samuel4:13 Ye kingo it, ko ki tebee `Eli ng'echerennyi eng' tabandap ooreet koriipsei, amu kibotani muguleldanyi agobo moingetap Kamuktaindet. Kingo it chiichooto nganaseet ak komwa ng'aleechooto, kowaach nganaseet tugul." 
1Samuel4:14 Kingo kas `Eli polatetap riirek koteep kole, “Po nee polatoni wasegei piik?” Ki wo chiichooto kochaakta ak komwachi Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Ki po Eli kenyiisyek tamanwogik sogool ak sisiit, ak kiga kogor ne ki mata komuuchi kogeer kiy." 
1Samuel4:16 Ki mwachi `chiichooto Eli koleenji, “Aa ineendet ne kabunu ole mi lugeet; kaamweu eng' ole mi lugeet.” Koteepse anyun Eli koleenji, “Kalya o, weeriinnyu?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Kowol ineendet ne ki ibu ng'aleek kole, “Kagomwei Israel eng' taitap Philistiik ak kagobiit pareet ne oo eng' piik. Kagobek ak icheek weeriiguk tuwai, Hopni ak Phineas, ak kageip moingetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Kingo mwa agobo moingetap Kamuktaindet, koobut Eli kobun patai eng' ng'echerennyi eng' tabandap ormariichet. Ki ng'et kaatinnyi ak kome, amu ki chii ne kiga koosit ak konyigiis kot. Kiga koek kirwoogindetap Israel kenyiisyek artam." 
1Samuel4:19 Ki tomono osotyotap Phineas weeriitap Eli ak ki neegit kosigiis. Ye kingo kas ng'aleek keele kageip moingetap Kamuktaindet, ak kagome kwandap manong'otyondennyi kobooto manong'otyondennyi, konyoonji ineendet ng'wanindap sigisyo. Ki ing'uruuk anyun si kosigiis amu ki nyoonji ng'wanindap sigisyo ne oo." 
1Samuel4:20 Ye ki neegit kome, komwachi kwonyiik che kitoreti ineendet koleenji, “Meiywei, amu kesich weeriit.” Ago ma wol kiy anan koepchi iit ng'aleechooto." 
1Samuel4:21 Kiguure lakwanooto Ikabod koboor kole kagoistogei toroornatet eng' Israel, amu kageip moingetap Kamuktaindet, ak amu meetap kwandap manong'otyondennyi ak ne po manong'otyondennyi." 
1Samuel4:22 Ki mwa kole, “Kagoistogei toroornatet eng' Israel; amu kageip moingetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Kingo luul Philistiik moingetap Kamuktaindet, koip eng' Eben-haezer kwo Ashdod." 
1Samuel5:2 Ki ip Philistiik moingonooto po Kamuktaindet ak konde kootap Dagon, ole neegitee Dagon." 
1Samuel5:3 Ye kingo ng'eetyo piigap Ashdod karon miising' eng' peetuutap aeng' ko kiga koluul Dagon kosyep moo eng' taitap moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki ing'eet Dagon ak konde komostanyi kogeny. 
1Samuel5:4 Ago ye kingo ng'eetyo karon miising' eng' peetuutap somok, ko kogoluul Dagon kogeny kosyep moo eng' taitap moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kiga kong'et metitap Dagon kobooto eunekyik tuwai, ak ki ruei eng' kurgat. Ki ng'eet ineegei poorto komugul." 
1Samuel5:5 Nooto anyun amu nee si agoi ra ko matyechei kurgeetap Dagon eng' Ashdod tisiigap Dagon ak tugul che chutei hekaluutap Dagon. 
1Samuel5:6 Kinyigiisyi `eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Ashdod ak kogoochi icheek koaragenso ak kobire myando ne ibwansei Ashdod komugul ak kiwotosyekyik. 
1Samuel5:7 Kingo keer piigap Ashdod tuguuk che ki yaagiis, kole, “Ma kotebyei moingetap Kamuktaindetap Israel kobootech amu kagong'wanit eunnyi eng' acheek ak eng' Dagon kamuktaindennyo.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Ki iyookto che kiyooktoi kole kiyum kiptainik tugul che po Philistiik kobwa ole mi icheek ak koleenji, “Kilyonjini moingetap Kamuktaindetap Israel?” Kowol kole, “Ngeip moingetap Kamuktaindetap Israel kot koit Gath.” Ki ip anyun moingetap Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
1Samuel5:9 Ago ye kingo kagoip, konyaliil `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganasanooto eng' kanyaliilet ne oo miising'. Ki pir piik che mengech ak che eecheen che po nganaseet ak ki mang'une icheek myando ne ibwansei." 
1Samuel5:10 Ki iyookto moingetap Kamuktaindet kwo Ekron. Kingo it moingetap Kamuktaindet Ekron, kowaach Ekronik kole, “Kagoibwech moingetap Kamuktaindetap Israel konyo kobarech ak piikyok.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Ki iyookto ak icheek che kiyooktoi ak koyum kiptainik tugul che po Philistiik kotuiyo ak kole, “Oiste moingetap Kamuktaindetap Israel kwo si ma parech ak piikyok.” Amu ki piit kanyaliilet ne po meet eng' nganaseet komugul ak konyigiisyi miising' eutap Kamuktaindet olooto." 
1Samuel5:12 Piik che ma pek ko ki kibiree myando ne ibwansei; kitogosta kipsengwet riiregap nganaseet. 
1Samuel6:1 Ki tebee moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emetap Philistiik arawek tisap. 
1Samuel6:2 Ki kuur anyun Philistiik tisiik ak che ng'oorsei ak koleenji, “Ki itoi nee moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Oboorwech ole kiweektoitoi kwo oldanyi.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Ak ki wol kole, “Ngot oweekte moingetap Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko matoweekte puch, ago matiny kilya oweektochini ineendet kobooto kagoochinetap chalwokto. Ngo yai ko uu nooto kisoobok, ak kong'ang'wogei ineendet, ngo ma uu nooto koma istogei eunnyi eng' okweek.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Koteep anyun kole, “Nee kagoochinetap chalwokto ne kiweekyini ineendet?” Kowol tisiik kole “Kabwanutik muut che po thahabu ak mureek muut che po thahabu, ko uu koitetap kiptainigap Philistiik, amu ki mong'jok koroito agenge okweek tugul kobooto kiptainikwok." 
1Samuel6:5 Nooto anyun, oyai itoonwegap kabwanutikwok ak itoonwegap murekwok che ng'emei emet, si kobiit otoroor Kamuktaindetap Israel tamangap ko tustus eunnyi eng' okweek ak eng' kanamonikwok ak eng' emeng'wong'." 
1Samuel6:6 Amu nee anyun si ouiit mugulelwekwok ko uu ye ki iuit Misiriik ak Pharaoh mugulelwekwak? Kingo kagoyai tuguuk eng' kwong'eet eng' kwenunnywa, ko tos ma chamji pichooto koba, ak ki pa?" 
1Samuel6:7 Oyai anyun chepkichutit ne leel ak onam tuuga aeng' che aboen che tomo kerat; oratyi chepkichutinooto tuchaata, ago oget moekwak kobwa kaa." 
1Samuel6:8 Oip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak onde chepkichutit; ak onde sandugut ne mi tabandanyi, tuguugap thahabu che oweektochini koek kagoochinetap chalwokto ak oyookte kwo."
