1Samuel6:9 Ak ogeer; ngot kotogosta kobun kiwotennyi kowendi Beth-shemesh, ko kaagaa ko ineendet ne kiyaiywech yaityoni oo. Ago ngot koma pun, kenai anyun keele ma eunnyi ne kobirech ago kaagaa kiy ne koityech puch.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Ki yai pichooto ko uu nooto. Ki ket tuuga aeng' che aboen ak koratyi chepkichutit ak koger moekwak eng' kaa. 
1Samuel6:11 Yeityo konde moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chepkichutit ak sandugut ne mi mureek che po thahabu ak itoonwegap kabwanutikwak che ki kiyai. 
1Samuel6:12 Ki pun tuuga chooto ooreet ne litit ne wendi Beth-shemesh. Ki pun ooreet ne oo koutyoti ama masta koba eutap tai anan ko ne po kaataam ak ki isup kiptainigap Philistiik kot koit kiwotetap Beth-shemesh. 
1Samuel6:13 Kigesei nganuukwak piigap Beth-shemesh eng' atebweet. Kitobendo ak kogeer moinget, ak kiboiboitu kot ko kageer." 
1Samuel6:14 Ki it chepkichutinooto mbareetap Joshua ne po Beth-shemesh, ak ki tonon eng' yooto, eng' ole ki mi koita ne oo. Ki pet keetiigap chepkichutinooto ak kogoito tuuga chooto koek kagoochinet ne kibeeljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel6:14 Ki it chepkichutinooto mbareetap Joshua ne po Beth-shemesh, ak ki tonon eng' yooto, eng' ole ki mi koita ne oo. Ki pet keetiigap chepkichutinooto ak kogoito tuuga chooto koek kagoochinet ne kibeeljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel6:15 Ki inem `Lawiik moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak sandugut ne ki mi yooto ne ki mi tuguuk che po thahabu oriit ak konde paragutap koyato oo. Ki igoito piigap Beth-shemesh kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywot eng' peetuunooto. 
1Samuel6:16 Kingo kagogeer kiptainik muutu che po Philistiik tuguuchooto, koweek koba Ekron peetuunooto." 
1Samuel6:17 Chu ko kabwanutik che ki kiyae thahabu che kiweektoochi `Philistiik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek kagoochinetap chalwokto: po agenge Ashdod, ko po agenge Gaza, po agenge Askelon, ko po agenge Gath, ak ko po agenge Ekron." 
1Samuel6:18 Ki iyookto kora mureek che ki kiyae thahabu, ko uu koitetap nganasook tugul che po Philistiik che ki po kiptainik muut, che ki po nganasook che ng'ootaatiin ak nganasook che mengeechen eng' emet. Koyato oo, ne ki kinde moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotonone, komi agoi rani kooretap Joshua ne po Beth-shemesh." 
1Samuel6:18 Ki iyookto kora mureek che ki kiyae thahabu, ko uu koitetap nganasook tugul che po Philistiik che ki po kiptainik muut, che ki po nganasook che ng'ootaatiin ak nganasook che mengeechen eng' emet. Koyato oo, ne ki kinde moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotonone, komi agoi rani kooretap Joshua ne po Beth-shemesh." 
1Samuel6:19 Ki pir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Beth-shemesh amu ki it moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeer oriit. Ki par `ineendet piik tamanwogik tisap eng' pichooto ak piik eliphuusyek konom. Ki riiryo piik amu ki par `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik eng' pareet ne oo. 
1Samuel6:20 Ki le piigap Beth-shemesh, “Ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindani tiliil? Ak togostoi eng' olinnyo kowendi ole mi ng'oo?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Ki iyookto piik koba ole mi meng'iigap Kiriath-Jearim koleenji, “Kagoip Philistiik moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo oli, ara obwa ochooruge ak oip kotogosta kwo oling'wong'.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Ki pwa anyun piigap Kiriath-Jearim ak koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotogosta. Ki ip kwo kootap Abinadab eng' tulweet ak kotabaan `Eleazar weeriinnyi si koriip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel7:2 Kichaang'it peetuusyek kobooch ngo tebee moinget Kiriath-Jearim; ki ek kenyiisyek tiptem, ak ki riirchi koot tugul ne po Israel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel7:3 Ki leenji `Samuel koot tugul ne po Israel, “Ngot oweekyinigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' mugulelwekwok tugul, ko nyolu oiste kamuktaik che pororyosyek alak ak Astarot eng' kwenung'wong' ak otokyi mugulelwekwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oot ineendet ineegei, si kosarwok eng' eunegap Philistiik.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Ki isto anyun `piigap Israel Baalik ak Astarot ak koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei. 
1Samuel7:5 Ki le Samuel, “Oyumji Israel tugul Mispa, si kobiit asaiywok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Ki iyumjigei tugul Mispa ak kiram peek ak kotumda eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki irugutkei peetuunooto ak komwa eng' yooto kole, kigeyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto. Ki irwookyi anyun `Samuel piigap Israel eng' Mispa." 
1Samuel7:7 Kingo kas Philistiik kole koiyumgei piigap Israel eng' Mispa, koba kiptainigap Philistiik kotogosta kobargei ak Israel. Ak kingo kas piigap Israel, koywei Philistiik." 
1Samuel7:8 Ki leenji `piigap Israel Samuel, “Amebagaakte iriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo agobo acheek, si kosarwech eng' eunegap Philistiik.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Ki nam Samuel aarwetap keechiir ne reryei ak kogoito komugul koek kagoochinet ne kibeeljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki riirchi `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. 
1Samuel7:10 Ye kingo ta kogoitoi Samuel kagoochinet ne kibeelei, koriik Philistiik kobwa kobargei ak Israel. Ago kitulji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Philistiik eng' tuleet ne oo peetuunooto ak konyaliil icheek ak ki kibar eng' taitap Israel." 
1Samuel7:11 Ki manda piigap Israel eng' Mispa koba koon Philistiik ak kobarat agoi koit Beth-ka keel. 
1Samuel7:12 Ki nam `Samuel koita konde kwenutap Mispa ak Sen, ak koguuree kainennyi Eben-haezer kole, “Agoi nguno ko ki kotoretech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Ki kiterteer anyun Philistiik, ak matagai kobwa kogeny kosiir kiwotetap Israel. Ki kirinda `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Philistiik eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Samuel." 
1Samuel7:14 Ki kiweekyi Israel nganasook che kiga koibe Philistiik, kobooch Ekron kot koit Gath, ak ki iweek Israel kiwotennyi eng' eutap Philistiik. Ki piit kaalyeet eng' kwenutap Israel ak Amorik." 
1Samuel7:15 Ki irwookyi `Samuel Israel eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi. 
1Samuel7:16 Kiwendi eng' kenyiit age tugul komuutoti Bethel, Gilgal ak Mispa, ak ki irwookyi Israel eng' komoswechooto tugul." 
1Samuel7:17 Kiweekyingei Ramah, amu kimi koonnyi yooto ak ki irwookyi Israel eng' olooto, ak kiteekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' yooto." 
1Samuel8:1 Kingo osit Samuel, konde weeriikyik koek kirwoogik che pou Israel." 
1Samuel8:2 Kainetap taaitanyi ko ki Joel, ne po aeng' ko ki Abijah. Ki kirwoogik tuwai eng' Beer-sheba." 
1Samuel8:2 Kainetap taaitanyi ko ki Joel, ne po aeng' ko ki Abijah. Ki kirwoogik tuwai eng' Beer-sheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Ma pendate weeriikyik ortinwekyik, ago kimasta kosup mogornateet eng' ooreet ne ya. Kitaach asoya ak komaas kirwooget." 
1Samuel8:4 Ki iyumgei anyun poisyek tugul che po Israel ak kobwa ole mi Samuel eng' Ramah," 
1Samuel8:5 ak koleenji ineendet, “Keero, kaiositu, ama pendote weeriiguk ortinweguk. Ara anyun cheeng'wech laitoryat ne irwokwech ko uu pororyosyek tugul.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Ki ma paibait Samuel kingo mwa icheek kole, “Koonech laitoryat ne irwokwech.” Ki sa `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
1Samuel8:7 ak koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel, “Kas ng'aleegap piik agobo tuguuk tugul che kamwaun, amu ma inyee ne kaeesyo ago kaeesyo anee kole ma egu laitoryat eng' icheek." 
1Samuel8:8 Ko uu poisyonik tugul che ki koyai icheek kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu kotogos eng' Misiri kot koit ra, kobagaaktoa ak kootot kamuktaik alak, koyaun aginye ko uu nooto." 
1Samuel8:9 Kasyi anyun ng'aleekwak, ago iteechi komyee ak iboorchi kiit ne uu laitoryat ne tuun laitorane icheek.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Ki mwachi `Samuel pichooto kisoomei eng' ineendet laitoryat ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel8:11 Ki le, “Uu ni laitoryat ne tuun laitoranenok: namei weeriikwok ak kolewenjigei kotononji kariisyekyik koek che laanyei paraisisyekyik ak korwai kondoe kariisyekyik;" 
1Samuel8:12 ak kolewenjigei icheeget koek kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak kiptainigap konomusyek, ak kobat mbareenikyik alage, ak koges peekyik ak kotany kariikyik che po lugeet ak tuguugap kariisyekyik." 
1Samuel8:13 Namei tiibiikwok koek che yaei nyamdutik, ak koek che kwanyei ak che peelei magatiinik." 
1Samuel8:14 Rebenak mbareenikwok ak mbareenikwok che po sabibuk ak che po mseituni che korooron eng' tugul ak kogoochi otwogikyik. 
1Samuel8:15 Ibei kebeberta agenge eng' taman ne po kesweekwok ak ne po mbareenikwok che po sabibuk si kogoochi kiboitiinikyik ak otwogikyik. 
1Samuel8:16 Ak korebenak otwogikwok che murenik, otwogikwok che tiibiik, neranikwok che korooron ak sigirokwok yeityo konde koyai poisyonikyik." 
1Samuel8:17 Ibei kora kebeberta agenge eng' taman ne po keechiirekwok ak oegu okweek otwogikyik. 
1Samuel8:18 Ak oriirye eng' peetuunooto amu laitoryandeng'wong' ne olewenjinigei, ago mawolwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Ago ki eesyo piik kogas kateunetap Samuel, ak ki le, “Achicha, kimache laitoryat ne poiywech," 
1Samuel8:20 si keigei ak acheek pororyosyek tugul ak si korwookwech laitoryandennyo ak komandoi kondoenech koyaiywech lugosyekyok.” 
1Samuel8:21 Kingo kas Samuel ng'aleek tugul che po piik, ko ki ipchi komwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleechooto." 
1Samuel8:22 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel, “Kasyi ng'aleekwak ak icheeng'ji icheek laitoryat.” Koleenji `Samuel piigap Israel, “Ingwo chii tugul nganasennyi.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Ki mi chii ne ki tagunoot ak ko kiim ne po ooreetap Benjamin ne kainennyi ko ki Kish weeriitap Abiel, weeriitap Seror, weeriitap Bekorat, weeriitap Apia, weeriitap Benjaminindet." 
1Samuel9:2 Ki tinyei weeriit ne ki kiguure kainennyi Saulo, neraneet ne karaaran. Ki ma komi chii ne karaaran kosiir ineendet eng' piigap Israel! Ki kooi kosiir chii tugul." 
1Samuel9:3 Eng' pesyo ko kibetyo sigiroigap Kish kwandap Saulo. Ki leenji `Kish weeriinnyi Saulo, “Imut agenge eng' otwogik ak obe ocheeng' sigiroik.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Ki pa kobun emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim ak emetap Salisa, ago ma nyoor. Ki pa kora kobun emetap Saalim ago ki ma komi olooto. Koba kogeny kobun emetap piigap Benjamin ago ma nyoor." 
1Samuel9:5 Kingo it emetap Suph, koleenji `Saulo otwogindennyi ne ki mi tuwai, “Myee keeweege, nda puch ko pagaachi kwandanyu kobwaati agobo sigiroik ak konam kogererchech met.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Koleenji otwogindet, “Keero, miitei nganasani chiitap Kamuktaindet, ak ineendet ko chiito ne kigonyiti, ak ko tuguuk tugul che mwaei kosuldoi iman. Ngebe anyun yooto tamangap komuuch komwaiwech agobo pandanyo ne kibendi.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Koleenji `Saulo otwogindennyi, “Ngot keebe keipchini nee chiichooto? Kagogeskei amitwogik eng' tuguuk che ko ki ibune, ama mi kagoochinet ne keipchini chiichooto po Kamuktaindet. Nee ne ketinye?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Kowolji `otwogindonooto Saulo kogeny koleenji, “Atinye eng' eunnyu kebeberta agenge eng' ang'wan ne po shekelitap fedha. Agoochini nooto chiitap Kamuktaindet si komwaiwech agobo pandanyo.”" 
1Samuel9:9 (Kingwo chii keny eng' Israel kwo koteebe Kamuktaindet ng'olyoo, komwaei kole, “Obwa keebe kapkeerindet” amu ineendet ne kiguure maotyot nguno, ko ki kiguuren keny keerindet.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Koleenji anyun `Saulo otwogindennyi, “Kemwa kiit ne myee, nyoo keebe.” Koba anyun nganaseet ole ki mi chiitap Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel9:11 Ye kingo togostoi kobendi nganaseet, konyoor tiibiin che kibendi koramei peek. koteebee koleenji, “Mi keerindet yu?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Kowolji tiipchooto koleenji, “Ee, mi taing'ung'. Chaakte amu kata koitu nganaseet nguno ak amu tinyei piik ra tiseiywot eng' kapkoros." 
1Samuel9:13 Ne po oititoi kityo nganaseet, onyooru ineendet eng' yooto kotomo kotogosta kapkoros koamis. Ma amisyei piik kot koit ineendet, amu ineendet ne iberuuri tiseiywot ak ye ibata koamis piik che kagiguur. Otogoste anyun nguno, amu onyooru ineendet eng' sainiito.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Ki togosta anyun koba nganaseet ak ye kingo chut nganaseet oriit, komong' Samuel ak kotokyigei icheek konyonei kowendi kapkoros." 
1Samuel9:15 Eng' peetuut kotomo koit Saulo, ko kiga kong'aang'ji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel koleenji," 
1Samuel9:16 “Koteni asiis mutai, ayoogun chii ne punu emetap Benjamin, si iil koek pounindetap piikyuk Israel. Saru piikyuk eng' eunegap Philistiik amu ko ageer piikyuk ak ko kogoityo riirekwak.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Kingo keer `Samuel Saulo, koleenji ineendet `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Chiichi chiito ne koamwaun aleenjinin pou piikyuk.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Ki wo Saulo ole kimi Samuel eng' ormariichet oriit ak koleenji, “Mwaiwo kaigai ole mi kootap keerindet.”" 
1Samuel9:19 Kowolji `Samuel Saulo koleenji, “Aa keerindonooto, togoste indoenan, ui kapkoros, amu ki amisyei tugul ak okweek ra, ak karon abagaakteen iwe ak amwaun tuguuk tugul che mi muguleldang'ung'." 
1Samuel9:20 Ko sigiroiguk che kogobetyot peetuusyek somok che kogosiirto, ko mata ibwaat amu kogenyoor. Tos tokyingei ng'oo mageet tugul ne po Israel, ne ma inyee ak kootap kwandang'ung' tugul?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Kowol Saulo kole, “Aa Benjaminindet, ne po pororyet ne ming'in eng' pororyosyek tugul che po Israel, ak ooreennyo ko ne ming'in eng' ortinwek tugul che po pororyetap Benjamin. Amu nee anyun si ing'alaalwo ko uu ni?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Ki imut anyun `Samuel Saulo ak otwogindennyi koba kootap toek ak kogoochi kotebee ole tagunoot kosiir tugul eng' kwenutap che kiga kiguur che ki olo po piik sosom. 
1Samuel9:23 Ki leenji `Samuel kwang'indet, “Ibu kebeberta ne kagagoonin ak kagamwaun aleenjin konor.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Ki inem kwang'indonooto kubesto ak che ki mi paragutap peenyooto yeityo konde taitap Saulo. Kole Samuel, “Che kagigonorun, ko kaginde taing'ung'. Am, amu kagigonorun kot koit sait ne koging'at, si oam ak pichu kaguur.” Ki amis anyun Saulo ak Samuel eng' peetuunooto." 
1Samuel9:25 Ki choorgei eng' kapkoros ak koba nganaseet, koba kong'alaal ak Saulo eng' koot parak." 
1Samuel9:26 Kingo kairir emet, koguur `Samuel Saulo eng' koot parak koleenji, “Ng'eet si atyachin iwe.” Ki ng'eet anyun Saulo, yeityo komanda tuwai ineendet ak Samuel koba saang'." 
1Samuel9:27 Kingo choortogei eng' ye pooch nganaseet, koleenji `Samuel Saulo, “Mwachi otwogindeng'ung' kondo”, ak ki indo, “Ago tonon inyee nguno si amwaun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet igas.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Ki inem anyun Samuel chuboitap mwaita ak koroong'ji metinnyi, yeityo kong'utut ineendet ak koleenji, “Tos ma kagoiilin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu pounindet ne po piikyik?" 
1Samuel10:2 Ye iwe rani eng' yu, inyooru piik aeng' eng' ole po kereritap Rael eng' kiwotetap Benjamin eng' Selsa, ak komwaun pichooto kole, Kigenyoor sigirocho kigewe icheeng'ate. Kogobagaach kwandang'ung' kabwaatetap sigiroik ak kobwaataak koleen, ‘Ayae nee agobo weeriinnyu?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Iwendi tai eng' yooto kot iit keetitap Tabor, ak ko nyoorun eng' yooto piik somogu kotogosyin ye mi Kamuktaindet eng' Bethel, ko kanabi age aarek somok che po ng'oroor, koibei age magatiinik somok ak koibei age soteetap divaik." 
1Samuel10:4 “Igatin ak kogoonin magatiinik aeng' che itaache kobun eunnywa. 
1Samuel10:5 Ye ibata, iwe itestai agoi iit tulweetap Kamuktaindet ole mi kiplugotinigap Philistiik. Ye iit nganaseet, ituiye maotik che kaiyumgei kochoorugei eng' kapkoros kotinyei kibugandet, sugutit ne ming'in, ndurerut ak ketubet eng' tainnywa komaotenonu." 
1Samuel10:6 Nyonjinin Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet, ak imaoten kobooto icheek ak kewalin iegu chiito age." 
1Samuel10:7 Ye pwaanjin kaboorunoichu, iyai ko uu ye kenyooru poroindo, amu miitei Kamuktaindet kobooten." 
1Samuel10:8 Yeityo ichoortegei indoena iwe Gilgal amu achoorugei ole imi, anyoo agoite kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak aeeny tiseiywek che kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet. Igenisye peetuusyek tisap agoi aitu ole imi si aboorun kiit ne iyae.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Ye kingo welelgei kwo eng' ole mi Samuel, kogoochi `Kamuktaindet ineendet muguleldo age. Ki isulda anyun kaboorunoichooto tugul eng' peetuunooto." 
1Samuel10:10 Kingo it tulweet, kotuiye ineendet maotik che kigaiyumgei, ak ki nyoonji ineendet Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet eng' kimnateet, ak ki maoten eng' kwenunnywa." 
1Samuel10:11 Ye kingo keer piik tugul che ki ingen ineendet eng' tai komaoteni ak maotik, koleenjigei, “Nee ni kogonyonji weeriitap Kish? Tos agenge Saulo eng' maotik?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Kowol chii age eng' yooto kole, “Ng'oo kwandanywa?” Nooto anyun si ki piit kalewenet keele, “Tos pooto Saulo agine maotik?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Ye kingo kagogees komaoteni, konyo kochut kapkoros." 
1Samuel10:14 ki teebee `imametap Saulo ineendet ak otwogindennyi koleenji, “Kigobe ano?” Kowol kole, “Kiga kibe kecheeng'ate sigiroik, ak ye ki ngegeer keele mata kobiit, kebwa ole mi Samuel.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Komwa `imametap Saulo kole, “Kaigai mwaiwo kiit ne komwaun Samuel.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Koleenji `Saulo imamennyi, “Kimwaiwech komyee kole ki kenyoor sigiroik.” Ma mwachi agobo ng'aleegap laitornatet, che ki kamwachi Samuel." 
1Samuel10:17 Ki kuur `Samuel piik koyumgei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Mispa," 
1Samuel10:18 yeityo koleenji piigap Israel, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, ‘Ki amutu Israel kotogos eng' Misiri, ak asarwok eng' eunegap Misiriik, ak eng' eunegap laitornatosyek tugul che kiusok.’" 
1Samuel10:19 Ago kaoeesye ra Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne ineendet ko sarwok eng' pichiinwekwok ak nyalilwogikwok tugul. Komwa ole, ‘Achicha, itoroorwech laitoryat koboiywech.’ Obwa anyun taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor obwanune pororyosyekwok ak ortinwekwok.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Ki imut anyun `Samuel pororyet age tugul eng' che po Israel koriik ak eng' parbaryat kenam pororyetap Benjamin. 
1Samuel10:21 Ak ki imut pororyetap Benjamin koriik kobwanune ortinwekwak ak ki kinam ooreetap Matirik. Eng' let ko ki kinam Saulo weeriitap Kish. Ago ye ki ngecheeng' ineendet, koma kinyoor." 
1Samuel10:22 Koteebse `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun kogeny koleenji, “Ta komi chii neta konyonei yu? Kowol `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Wei kaung'egei kurubet.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Ki rwai piik koba komut ineendet eng' olooto, ak ye kingo tonon eng' kwenutap piik, ko ki koit kosiir chii tugul kong'etee tigigoikyik ak kotogosta." 
1Samuel10:24 Koleenji `Samwel piik tugul, “Ogeere ineendet ne kogolewen `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ole ma mi ne kergei ak ineendet eng' piik tugul?” Komwa piik tugul eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Ingwo keny laitoryat!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Komwachi `Samuel piik maguutik ak poisyonigap laitornatet. Yeityo kosirchi bukuit ak konde taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kingo pata komwachi `Samuel piik tugul koba. Ki wo chii tugul koonnyi. 
1Samuel10:26 Ki wo Saulo agine koonnyi eng' Gibea ak ki pa ak murenik che nyigoonen che kiga twa Kamuktaindet mugulelwekwak. 
1Samuel10:27 Ago ki mwa abusanik alage kole, “Sarundoech ano chiichi?” Ki sas ineendet ama ipchi kagoochinoik. Ki siis Saulo ko uu yo ma mage kiy." 
1Samuel11:1 Ki togos Nahas Amonindet ak konam Jabes-gilead. Ki le `piik tugul che po Jabes Nahas, “Ongiyomiske si keotin.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Ak ki leenji `Nahas Amonindet icheek, “Ayae arorutyonooto kobootok eng' ng'olyoondoni ale kebalu konyekwok tugul che po tai si ande koek teweernateet eng' Israel tugul.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Koleenji `poisyegap Jabes ineendet, “Koonech peetuusyek tisap si kiyookte piik koba kiwotosyek tugul che po Israel si ngot koma piit chii ne sarwech kemong'u kebwa olo imi.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Kingo it anyun piik che kiga kiyookto Gibea ne po Saulo ak komwachi piik ng'aleechuuto kogas, kowaach piik tugul ak koriiryo." 
1Samuel11:5 Ogeero, kinyonei Saulo kobunu mbar kosubu eiik; ak kiteep kole, “Kaam nee piik si koriiryo?” Ak ki mwachi ineendet agobo ng'aleegap piigap Jabes." 
1Samuel11:6 Ye kingo kas ng'aleechooto, konyonji ineendet Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet eng' kimnateet, ak ki nereekyi ineendet kot." 
1Samuel11:7 Ki nam eiik aeng' che po chogit ak kotonaton yeityo koyooktoe piik koba komoswek tugul che po Israel koleenji, “Chii age tugul ne mamong'u kosubu Saulo ak Samuel, keyachin eikyik ko uu niito.” Ki ibutyi piik kamuisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki mong' koigei chiichak." 
1Samuel11:8 Ki iit icheek eng' Besek ak ki ek piigap Israel eliphuusyek pogol somok, koek piigap Judah eliphuusyek sosom." 
1Samuel11:9 Ki leenji pichooto kiga kiyok chu kiga pwa, “Omwachini piigap Jabes-gilead ko uu ni, oleenjini, ‘Tuun mutai ko kang'wanit asiista, onyooru saruunet.’ ” Ki pwa pichooto kiga kiyookto ak komwachi piigap Jabes, ak kiboiboitu." 
1Samuel11:10 Ki leenji anyun `piigap Jabes Amonik, “Kigonugei kebwane mutai ole omi si oyaiywech tuguuk tugul che ogeere ole myee eng' okweek.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Kingo eech kopcheune `Saulo piik kweanaik somok. Ki it kwenutap nganaseet eng' riipseet ne po karon ak kobar Amonik kot kong'wanit asiis. Kiyesta che kiga ng'et kot ko mata kenyoor che mi aeng' eng' komosta agenge. 
1Samuel11:12 Ak ki leenji `piik Samuel, “Ng'oo ni kileen, Tos poiywech Saulo? Imutu pichooto si kebar.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Ago ki le Saulo, “Ma kibarei chii agot agenge eng' peetuuni! Amu kagoyai rani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor saruunet eng' Israel.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Ki leenji `Samuel piik, “Obwa keebe Gilgal keebe kigimit laitornatet eng' yooto.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Ara ki pa piik tugul Gilgal, ak eng' olooto Gilgal koyai Saulo koek laitoryat eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki eeny eng' olooto tiseiywek che po kagoochinoigap kaalyeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki yai igoortap poiboyet ne oo Saulo ak piik tugul che po Israel eng' olooto." 
1Samuel12:1 Ki leenji `Samuel Israel tugul, “Ki agas ng'aleekwok eng' tuguuk tugul che ki omwaiwo, ak ki acheeng'wok laitoryat ne poiywok." 
1Samuel12:2 Kobooch ra, ko egu laitoryat kandoindeng'wong'. Kaositu anee ak ko koabunji kalwal, ak nga no, komi weeriikyuk kobootok. Ki aegu kandoindeng'wong' kobooch ming'inatennyu agoi peetuuni." 
1Samuel12:3 Ang'ni anee! Obaoryanjo yaityo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak eng' taitap nenyi ne iilaat. Ki arebee ng'oo tennyi? Anan ki arebee ng'oo sigiryennyi? Anan ki aberber ng'oo? Ki aus ng'oo? Anan ki anam eng' eutap ng'oo tugun che po asoya si atuge konyekyuk? Ngo mi aweekwok.” 
1Samuel12:4 Kowol piik kole, “Ma iberberech anan iuseech, ak tomo inam eng' eutap chii kiy age tugul.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Kowolji Samuel kole, “Paoryat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek, ak paoryat nenyi ne ki kiil eng' peetuuni, keele ma onyooru kiy eng' eunnyu.” Kowol piik kole, “Paoryat ineendet.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Komwachi `Samuel piik koleenji, “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ne ki leweni Musa ak Aron, ak komut kwanisyekwok kotogos eng' emetap Misiri." 
1Samuel12:7 Otononie anyun nguno si kobiit ateiywok eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo poisyonik tugul che po imanda che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kiyaiywok ak kwanisyekwok. 
1Samuel12:8 “Ye kingo nyo Jakobo Misiri, ak koriirchi `kwanisyekwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koyook `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa ak Aron che ki imong' kwanisyekwok eng' Misiri ak kogoochi komeny olito." 
1Samuel12:9 Ago kiutye `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ne ki aldochi icheek eutap Sisera kiptaiyatap lugeetap Hasor, ak koaldochi kora eutap Philistiik, ak eutap laitoryatap Moab si kobargei ak icheek." 
1Samuel12:10 Ki riirchi `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, ‘Ki kiplelutiin, amu kigebagaakte Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak keoot Baalik ak Astarot. Sarwech anyun nguno eng' eutap puunikyok si keotin.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Ki iyook `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeru-baal, Bedan, Jephta ak Samuel ak kosarwok eng' eunegap puunikwok eng' komosta age tugul ak ki omeng'iisye eng' kaalyeet." 
1Samuel12:12 Ago ye kingo keer `Nahas laitoryatap lagogap Ammon konyonjook obargei, oleenjo, ‘Achicha, agoi kenyooru laitoryat ne poiywech nga Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko laitoryandeng'wong'.’" 
1Samuel12:13 Wei, kagolewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun laitoryat koboiywok! Ang'ni anyun laitoryat ne kaolewen, nooto ne kaosoom." 
1Samuel12:14 Ngot oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak oot ineendet, ogas iit kutinnyi, amobistoe ng'atuutyennyi, ak ngot oegu okweek ak laitoryat ne poiywok kasubiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', komyeeitu anyun eng' okweek." 
1Samuel12:15 Ago ngot ko mogas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak obistoe ng'atuutyennyi, konyalilok anyun eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki inyaliil kwanisyekwok." 
1Samuel12:16 Ara anyun otononse si ogeer kitap kwang'utyet ne machei koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ogeere. 
1Samuel12:17 Kasarta ne po kesisyetap nganuuk ni. Aguure Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si koyook tuleet ak ropta, si onai ak ogeer ole oo tengektong'wong' ne ki oyai eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki osoomjigei laitoryat.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Ki kuur anyun `Samuel Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki iyook `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto tuleet ak ropta. Ki iywei piik tugul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Samuel miising'." 
1Samuel12:19 Koleenji `piik tugul Samuel, “Saa igaigai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' agobo otwogiguk si ma kibegu, amu kogetesyi tengekwogikyok tugul yaityoni, kesoomjigei laitoryat.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Kowolji `Samuel piik koleenji, “Amoiywei, ki oyai iman yaityoni tugul, ago amomaste obagaach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago oot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' mugulelwekwok tugul." 
1Samuel12:21 Momaste osup tuguugap puch che ma imuuchi kotoret kiy anan kosar amu puch. 
1Samuel12:22 Kosupkei ak kainennyi ne oo, koma pagaaktoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik amu ki cham ineendet koyaak oegu piikyik." 
1Samuel12:23 Eng' anee, ko ingolooit ayachi tengek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak abagaakte asaiywok; atesetai aneetook eng' ooreet ne myee ak ne nyolu." 
1Samuel12:24 Ne siirei tugul, ko oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kityo ak oot ineendet eng' imanit, eng' mugulelwekwok tugul, ak obwaat olete tuguuk che eecheen che ki koyaiywok." 
1Samuel12:25 Amu ngot otestai eng' yaityenng'wong', kigeswok okweek ak laitoryandeng'wong'.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Kiga kotar Saulo kenyiisyek (sosom) ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek aeng' eng' Israel." 
1Samuel13:2 Ki lewenjigei `Saulo murenik eliphuusyek somok che po Israel. Ki mi eliphuusyek aeng'u eng' chooto kobooto Saulo eng' Mikmas ak eng' tulweetap Bethel ak kimi eliphuut agenge kobooto Jonathan eng' Gibea ne po Benjamin. Ki iyookto kiplugotinik che kiga ng'et koba kaa. 
1Samuel13:3 King'em `Jonathan irimeetap kiplugotinigap Philistiik ne ki miitei Geba ak ki kas Philistiik agobo niito. Ki ng'at Saulo keguut iryageet eng' emet tugul, koleen, “Ingogas Yahudik.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Ki kas Israel tugul kole kogobar `Saulo irimeetap kiplugotinigap Philistiik ak kole ki koek Israel ne kiwechei eng' Philistiik. Ki iyumgei piik koosup Saulo koba Gilgal. 
1Samuel13:5 Ki iyumgei Philistiik si kobargei ak Israel kotinyei kariisyek eliphuusyek sosom ak piik eliphuusyek lo che ketei paraisisyek, kobooto piik che tee ng'aniegap ngeguutap nyanjet eng' chaang'indo. Ki togos koteech Mikmas ne tokyingei kong'asiis eng' Beth-aben." 
1Samuel13:6 Kingo keer piigap Israel kole mi eng' pichiindo, (amu kinyalilso piik,) kounykei anyun eng' kebenonik, eng' sondisyek, eng' rwandosyek, eng' keriingonik ak eng' keriingonik alak che mengeechen." 
1Samuel13:7 Kiga kolandae Jordan Yahudik alage koba emetap Gad ak Gilead. Ago kita komi Saulo Gilgal, ak ki isup piik tugul ineendet kobotanioti." 
1Samuel13:8 Kingo kenis peetuusyek tisap, koma nyo `Samuel Gilgal ko uu ye kiga ng'at, ko kiyesta piik anyun koba eng' ole mi ineendet." 
1Samuel13:9 Kole Saulo, “Oibwa kagoochinet ne kibeelei konyo yu kobooto kagoochinoigap kaalyeet.” Ak ki igoito kagoochinonooto kibeelei." 
1Samuel13:10 Eng' sainooto ki igeesune kagoitoetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei, koit Samuel, ak kimanda Saulo kotorookta ineendet kole kwo kogat." 
1Samuel13:11 Ago ki le Samuel, “Nee ni kaiyai?” Kowol Saulo kole, “Kageer piik ale kaiyesta koba; ak ma inyoo eng' kasarta che kiga king'at, ak kogagoyumgei Philistiik eng' Mikmas." 
1Samuel13:12 Abwaat anyun ale chorugei Philistiik nguno kobwanei ole ami eng' Gilgal kotom asoom chametap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, andegei anyun agoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Koleenji `Samuel Saulo, “Keyai eng' perberyo ama iriip ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne king'atin, amu kata igimiti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornateng'ung' eng' Israel koigeny." 
1Samuel13:14 Ago nguno koma kotebyei laitornateng'ung' agoi. Kagocheeng'jigei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne iboiboi muguleldanyi, ak kagonde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiichooto koek pounindet ne pou piikyik amu ma iriip ng'olyoot ne king'atin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Ki ng'eet Samuel ak kwo kotogosta eng' Gilgal agoi Gibea ne po Benjamin. Ki it `Saulo kiplugotinik che ki ng'et kobooto ineendet, koek murenik olo po pogol lo." 
1Samuel13:16 Ki tebee Saulo ak Jonathan weeriinnyi ak kiplugotinik che ki mi ak ineendet Geba ne po Benjamin, ago ki teech Philistiik Mikmas." 
1Samuel13:17 Ki mong' luulik eng' nganaseetap Philistiik kopcheunegei somok. Ki pun kweanet age ooreet ne wendi Ophrah agoi emetap Saulo," 
1Samuel13:18 kobun kweanet age ooreet ne wendi Beth-horon, ak ki pun kweanet ne po let ooreet ne punei kiwoteet ne ing'ururi atebweetap Seboim kotokyigei surkwen." 
1Samuel13:19 Ki ma komiitei kitang'indet emet komugul ne po Israel. Ki iywei Philistiik kole imuuch koyachigei Yahudik rotoogap chok anan ng'otwek. 
1Samuel13:20 Ki choortagei Yahudik tugul kobendi ole mi Philistiik, si kolit chii tugul mogombennyi, rotwennyi, aiywennyi ak marunnyi," 
1Samuel13:21 Ki kigoito kebeberta aeng' eng' somok che po shekel eng' marusyek, rotonik, umaisyek, aonok ak ne lite kiplitok kobunji ne ki tinyei liteito ne kilitisye." 
1Samuel13:22 Ki ma piit eng' peetuutap lugeet rotwetap chok anan ko ng'otit eng' eutap chii age tugul ne ki mi kobooto Saulo ak Jonathan, nga ki tinyei Saulo ak Jonathan weeriinnyi chechwaak." 
1Samuel13:23 Ak kimanda lugeetap Philistiik koba ole kibunei eng' Mikmas. 
1Samuel14:1 Eng' peetuut age, koleenji `Jonathan weeriitap Saulo muren age ne ki cham koipchin kariikyik, “Nyoo keebe kelande ole mi lugeetap Philistiik.” Ago ki ma mwachi Jonathan kwandanyi." 
1Samuel14:2 Ki tebee Saulo tabandap Gibea eng' keetit keel ne po logoek ne mi Migron. Ki olo po pogol lo murenik che ki mi ak ineendet. 
1Samuel14:3 Ki mi olooto Ahija, weeriitap Ahitub, ng'eetap kametap Ikabod, weeriitap Phineas, weeriitap Eli, tisiindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Shiloh, kolaachi ephod. Ago ki ma nai kiplugotinik kole kakwo Jonathan." 
1Samuel14:4 Ki mi rwandet ne ng'atip komosi, komi age komosin eng' kwenutap kererchosyek che kimachei Jonathan kobun kolanda kwo ole mi lugeetap Philistiik. Kainetap age ko ki Boses ak kainetap age ko ki Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Kiga tonon rwandet age eng' murot kaataam ne po taitap Mikmas, kotonon age eng' murot tai eng' taitap Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Ki leenji `Jonathan murenooto ki ipchin kariikyik che po lugeet, “Nyoo kelande keebe ole mi lugeetap chu ma kimuratan, abeere imuuchi kotoretech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ma mi kiy ne etee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosar eng' che chaang' anan ko eng' che ng'ering'.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Koleenji `chiito ne ki ipchin kariik, “Yai tuguuk tugul che mi muguleldang'ung'. Welelgei, keero, ami kobooten ko uu eng' muguleldang'ung'.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Yeityo koleenji Jonathan, “Nyoo anyun, kilandoi kebendi ole mi pichooto ak kiboorchigei." 
1Samuel14:9 Ngot komwaiwech kole, ‘Otebi kot kebwa ole omi.’ Ketonondosi anyun eng' oldanyo ma kitogostoi ole mi icheek." 
1Samuel14:10 Ago ngot koleenjech, ‘Otogosu ole kimi.’ Ketogoste anyun, amu kagonde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunekyok ak egu niito kaboorunet eng' acheek.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Ki iboorchigei anyun icheek tuwai lugeetap Philistiik. Ak ki le Philistiik, “Ogeero, kamong' Yahudik eng' keriingonik ole koga ung'egei.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Ki leenji `piigap lugonooto Jonathan kobooto chiito ne ki ipchin kariik, “Otogosu ole kimi si kiboorwok kiy.” Koleenji `Jonathan chiichooto ki ipchin kariik, “Togosu isubwo, amu kagonde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eunegap Israel.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Ki wo Jonathan kolaany eng' eunek ak keelyek ak ki isubi ineendet chiichooto ki ipchin kariik. Ki ibutyo Philistiik eng' taitap Jonathan ak ki parat icheek eng' let chiito ne ki ipchinoti kariik. 
1Samuel14:14 Eng' paronooto po tai ko ki par Jonathan ak chiito ne ki ipchin kariik piik olo po tiptem eng' kooret ne po kebebertap ekait. 
1Samuel14:15 Ki piit potanet eng' nganaseet, eng' emet ak eng' piik tugul. Ki potan lugeet kobooto luulik ak icheek; ak ki potan ng'wony, kot koit kobiit potanet ne oo miising'." 
1Samuel14:16 Ki keer riibiigap Saulo eng' Gibea ne po Benjamin; ogeero, chaang'indo, kibetyo ak koyestoi koba komosi ak komosi." 
1Samuel14:17 Koleenji anyun `Saulo piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet, “Oiit piik nguno ak ogeer chiito ne kakwo eng' acheek.” Ye kingo kagoit, ko ki ma komi Jonathan ak chiito ne ki ipchinoti kariik." 
1Samuel14:18 Koleenji `Saulo Ahija, “Ibu moingetap Kamuktaindet konyo yu.” Amu kimi moingetap Kamuktaindet kobooto piigap Israel eng' peetuusyechooto." 
1Samuel14:19 Ye kita kong'alaaljin `Saulo tisiindet, koeet polateet kotesak eng' nganaseetap Philistiik. Amu nooto anyun koleenji `Saulo tisiindet, “Iste eung'ung'.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Ki iyumgei piik tugul che ki mi ak Saulo ak koba pooryeet. Ki nyoor Philistiik komi eng' wasetapkei ak ki par chii tugul chiito ne kitokyigei, ak kieet miising' parisyet." 
1Samuel14:21 Ki week Yahudik che ki mi kobooto Philistiik ko uu ye ki uu eng' tai, che kiga togosta kobooto icheeget koba nganaseet, kobun korotinwek che kiga yiem. Ki namgei chooto ak icheek kobooto Yahudik che ki mi kobooto Saulo ak Jonathan." 
1Samuel14:22 Ye kingo kas piik tugul che po Israel che kiga unygei eng' emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim kole kamwei Philistiik, kochut lugeet ak koon ak icheek Philistiik." 
1Samuel14:23 Kosar anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' peetuunooto; ak ki landa lugeet kwo Beth-aben. 
1Samuel14:24 Ki iimak kiplugotinigap Israel eng' peetuunooto. Ko uu ye kiga konde Saulo kotebee kayasyoet kiplugotinik kole, “Chuboot chiito ne amei amit age tugul kotom koit koskoleny, si asich ayooktochigei mugetuut eng' puunikyuk.” Ma chamcham anyun chii age tugul amit eng' pichooto." 
1Samuel14:25 Ki pa piik tugul timiin, ak ki mi kumyat ng'wony." 
1Samuel14:26 Ye kingo it piik timiin, kooro kosou kumyat, ago ma inde chii kuut eng' eunnyi; amu ki iywei icheek kayasyoet." 
1Samuel14:27 Ago ki tomo kogas Jonathan kole kigong'at kwandannyi piik eng' kayasyoet. Ki iyogoito anyun kirokto ne ki mi eunnyi, ak kotooree masamek yeityo konde kutit, ak kiyatagis konyekyik." 
1Samuel14:28 Kowol anyun age eng' piik kole, “Ki ng'at kwandang'ung' piik eng' kayasyoet ak eng' kimnateet kole, ‘Chuboot chiito ne amei amitwogik eng' peetuuni.’ ” Ak kiga kong'etyo piik kot." 
1Samuel14:29 Ki le Jonathan anyun, “Kigoiim emet abba. Ogeerchingei anyun ole kayatitagei konyekyuk ye kachamcham kitigin eng' kumyandani." 
1Samuel14:30 Kotam nee nda kagaam piik tuguugap puunikwak che kanyoor ko uu ye machei? Kata piitu pareet ne oo eng' Philistiik.” 
1Samuel14:31 Ki par Philistiik eng' peetuunooto kobooch Mikmas agoi Aijalon, ak kiga koam rubeet piik miising'." 
1Samuel14:32 Ki rwochi piik tuguuk che ki nyaban; ak ki nam keechiirek ak tuuga kobooto moek ak koeny eng' yooto ak ki am piik panyechooto kobooto korotiik. 
1Samuel14:33 Ye ki ngemwachi Saulo keleenji, “Keero, yachin `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto amu amei panyeek kobooto korotiik.” Kowol ineendet kole, “Kaoyai ng'aalseet, omilwa koito ne oo konyo yu ami.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Ak ki le Saulo, “Oyestee oba kwenutap piik ak oleenji kogetwo chii tugul eitonyi, ak kogetwo chii tugul keechiiryennyi yeityo koeny eng' yu ak koam, si moyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto ye oame kobooto korotiik.” Kiget chii age tugul eitonyi konyo kemounooto yeityo koeny eng' yooto." 
1Samuel14:35 Kiteekyi anyun `Saulo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet; nooto ko ki kaptisisyet ne po tai ne kiteekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel14:36 Ak ki le Saulo, “Ongechoortegei kisup Philistiik kembouni ak kenyabane tuguuk kot koeech, amat ongebagaach chii agot agenge eng' icheek kosap.” Kowol icheek kole, “Yai kiit age tugul ne igeere ile myee eng' inyee.” Ago ki mwa tisiindet kole, “Ongeriigu yu keriikyi Kamuktaindet.”" 
1Samuel14:37 ki teebee `Saulo Kamuktaindet kiit ne yaei kole, “Achoortegei asup Philistiik? Tos indoi icheek eutap Israel?” Ago ma wolji ineendet eng' peetuunooto." 
1Samuel14:38 Ki le anyun Saulo, “Oriigu yu okweek pounik tugul che po piik, si kegeer ole kabiitunda tengegi rani." 
1Samuel14:39 Amu ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne saru Israel, ko agot ngo Jonathan weeriinnyu, komeei iman.” Ago ma piit chii eng' piik tugul ne ki wolji ineendet." 
1Samuel14:40 Yeityo komwachi `Saulo Israel tugul koleenji, “Otebee komosta agenge ak ketebee ak Jonathan weeriinnyu komosta age.” Ki mwachi anyun `piik Saulo koleenji, “Yai kiit ne igeere ile myee eng' inyee.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Ki le anyun Saulo “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, lyon si kotom iwolji kiboityong'ung' ra? Ngot komi anee lelutyoni anan komi weeriinnyun Jonathan, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindetap Israel, ibooru eng' Urim, ago ngot komi lelutyoni piiguk Israel, ibooru eng' Thummim.” Ak ki kinam Jonathan ak Saulo eng' parbaryat ago kichililso piik." 
1Samuel14:42 Ak ki le Saulo, “Oseer parbareek nguno agobo anee ak Jonathan weeriinnyu.” Kingi seer, kenam Jonathan." 
1Samuel14:43 Ki leenji anyun `Saulo Jonathan, “Mwaiwo kiit ne koiyai.” Ak ki mwachi Jonathan ineendet koleenji, “Koachamcham iman kumyat kitigin eng' walitap kirokto ne komi eunnyu. Achoboot nguno ame.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Kole `Saulo, “Ingoyai Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto ak koyai kotes kora, amu agoi imee iman, Jonathan!”" 
1Samuel14:45 Ago ki leenji `piik Saulo, “Tos meei Jonathan, ne koyai yetunoni oo eng' Israel? Achicha, ma uu nooto. Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma ibutyin ng'wony agot agenge eng' suumeegap metinnyi, amu kabois ak Kamuktaindet rani.” Ki sar piik anyun Jonathan si ma me." 
1Samuel14:46 Ki togosta anyun Saulo ko mata koosup Philistiik, ak ki week Philistiik oldanywa." 
1Samuel14:47 Kingo kagonam anyun Saulo laitornatet eng' Israel, kobargei ak puunikyik tugul eng' komosta age tugul. Kibargei ak piigap Moab, piigap Ammon, piigap Edom, piigap Philistiik ak laitorinigap Soba. Ki iterteer icheek eng' komosta age tugul ole kiweleljigei." 
1Samuel14:48 Ki yai eng' nyiganateet ak ki par Amelegik ak kosar Israel eng' eunegap icheek che kiga koluul. 
1Samuel14:49 Weeriigap Saulo anyun ko ki Jonathan, Isbi ak Malkisua. Kainaigap tiibiikyik tuwai ko ki chu: taita ko ki kiguuree Merap ak kainetap ne ming'in ko Mikal." 
1Samuel14:50 Kainetap osotyotap Saulo ko ki Ainoam cheptap Ahimaaz. Kiptaiyatap lugeennyi ko ki kiguuree Abner weeriitap Ner, nooto ne ki imametap Saulo." 
1Samuel14:51 Kwandap Saulo ko ki Kish, ak Ner kwandap Abner ko ki weeriitap Abiel." 
1Samuel14:52 Eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Saulo, ko ki piit lugeet ne koroom agobo Philistiik, kot ko kingo keer `Saulo chii age tugul ne kiim, anan ko chii age tugul ne nyigan, komuti ineendet kotebee oldanyi." 
1Samuel15:1 Ak ki leenji `Samuel Saulo, “Ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyo aiiliin iegu laitoryatap piikyik si ibou Israel. Ara kas anyun ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!”" 
1Samuel15:2 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, “Kaabwaat kiit ne ki yachi `Amelek Israel, ye ki kirinda ineendet eng' ooreet ye kitogosu eng' Misiri." 
1Samuel15:3 Ui anyun nguno ibookyi Amelek ak ing'em igeesu tuguuk tugul che tinyei. Amat ibagaakte chii, ago par muren ak kwony, lakwa ak ne reryei, teta ak keechiiryet, tambeesyet ak sigiryet!”" 
1Samuel15:4 Ki kuur anyun `Saulo piik ak koiit icheek eng' Telaim: piik eliphuusyek pogol aeng' che punei keelyek ak piik eliphuusyek taman che po Judah. 
1Samuel15:5 Ki wo `Saulo kot koit nganaseetap Amelek ak koribis eng' atebweet. 
1Samuel15:6 Ki mwachi `Saulo Kenik koleenji, “Oba oistegei, ochoortegei oistoegei Amelegik, si ma paraak kobooto icheek. Amu ki oriree lagok tugul che po Israel, ye kitogosu komong'u eng' Misiri.” Koistogei anyun Kenik eng' Amelegik." 
1Samuel15:7 Ki par anyun `Saulo Amelegik kobooch Havilah agoi Sur, ne neegit Misiri." 
1Samuel15:8 Ki nam Agag laitoryatap Amelegik kosabei; ak kobar piik tugul kogees eng' rotwetap chok. 
1Samuel15:9 Ago ki pagaach Agag `Saulo ak `piik ak keechiirek che korooron eng' tugul, kobooto tuuga che akwaen ak aaregap keechiir kobooto tuguuk tugul che ki myachen, ama cham kobar kogees. Ago king'em kiit age tugul ne kisasei ak ne ma kiy kogees." 
1Samuel15:10 Ki ityi anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `Samuel koleenji," 
1Samuel15:11 “Ki ma ta myee aeet Saulo koek laitoryat. Amu kagoweektagei let mata kosuba, ama yai ng'atuutikyuk.” Ki nereech anyun Samuel ak koriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kemout komugul." 
1Samuel15:12 Ki ng'eet Samuel karon miising' kwo kotuiyo ak Saulo. Ki kimwachi Samuel keleenji kanyo Saulo Karmel ak koteekyigei kiit ne kibwaatee ineendet, yeityo kowendot kwo kosiirto kochoortagei Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:13 Ye kingo nyo Samuel ole mi Saulo, koleenji `Saulo ineendet, “Ingoberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koayai ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Ak ki le Samuel, “Po nee anyun kautoni po keechiirek agase eng' itiikyuk ak kautetap tuuga ne agase?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Kole Saulo, “Koget piik kechirechooto ak tuuga chooto eng' Amelegik, amu kobagaakta piik keechiirek ak tuuga che korooron eng' tugul, si koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ago ko ki par kigesu che kong'et.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Komwachi anyun `Samuel Saulo koleenji, “Kany amwaun kiit ne kamwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kemouni.” Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Mwa inyee.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Ki mwa Samuel kole, “Nganda ki iming'in ye ki igeeregei, ko ki ma kieetin iegu kandoindetap pororyosyegap Israel? Ki iilin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu laitoryat eng' Israel," 
1Samuel15:18 ak ki iyookten Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iwe panda ak kole, ‘Ui ak ibar Amelegik kiptengeginicho igeesu, ak obargei ak icheek kot kogeskei.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Amu nee anyun si me kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago kelabatyi parunenik ak iyai kiit ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Koleenji `Saulo Samuel, “Ee, koagas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koawe ooreet ne koiyookto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor awe ak koamutu Agag laitoryatap Amelegik ak koabar Amelegik kogeskei." 
1Samuel15:21 Ago koget piik parunenik, keechiirek ak tuuga chooto che korooron che ko kitabaan, si keeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' Gilgal.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Ak ki mwa Samuel kole, “Tos, ting'ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poiboiyet ne oo kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak tiseiywot, ko uu ye ting'ee kasetap iit ne po ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Keero, siirei kasetap iit tiseiywot ak siirei kasetap iit mwanigap mengichik." 
1Samuel15:23 Amu kergei ngelelnateet ak tengektap ponisyet ak kergei uuindap met ak chalwokto ak saaetap kanamonik. Amu koieesye ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko kagoeesyen aginye si mata iegu laitoryat.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Ak ki mwachi `Saulo Samuel koleenji, “Koayai tengekto amu koabistoe ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ng'aleeguk. Amu koaiywei piik ak agas iit kutinnywa." 
1Samuel15:25 Ara asaain anyun nguno ale, nyoiywo kaat tengektonyu, ak ingeweigei tuwai, si kobiit agutung'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Ak ki mwachi `Samuel Saulo koleenji, “Ma kiweeksei ak inyee, amu koieesye ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko kagoeesyen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma iegu laitoryat eng' Israel.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Ye kingo welelgei Samuel kwo, konam Saulo tabandap ngoryennyi; ak kigereer." 
1Samuel15:28 Ki mwachi `Samuel ineendet koleenji, “Kagogereerenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatetap Israel rani, ak kogoochi chiitap kokweng'ung' ne kaigai eng' inyee." 
1Samuel15:29 Ma mwaei lembech Kimnateetap Israel ama sigu; amu ineendet koma chiito si kowalak.” 
1Samuel15:30 Komwa Saulo kole, “Koayai tengekto, ago asaain kora ale konyita nguno eng' taitap poisyegap piikyuk ak eng' Israel ak ingeweigei tuwai, si agutung'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Koweek anyun Samuel koosup Saulo ak ki kutung'ji `Saulo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel15:32 Yeityo komwa Samuel kole, “Omutwaa Agag laitoryatap Amelegik konyo yu.” Ki nyo anyun Agag kobaibai ak kobwaati koleen, “Eng' iman ni ko ng'wanindap meet.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Ago ki mwa Samuel kole, “Ko uu ye ki yachi rotweng'ung' po chok kobogorisyek kobetyi lagok, koegu kamenng'ung' agine ne ma tinyei lakwa eng' kobogorisyek.” Ak kimurmur `Samuel Agag kotonaton eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:34 Yeityo kwo anyun Samuel Ramah, ak kitogosta Saulo koonnyi eng' Gibea ne po Saulo." 
1Samuel15:35 Ak ki mata konyo kogeny Samuel kogeer Saulo agoi peetuutap meennyi. Nga no ko ki riirchi `Samuel Saulo; amu ki riir let Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kiga koyai Saulo koek laitoryat koboi Israel. 
1Samuel16:1 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel koleenji, “Iriirchini Saulo kot kotyanit, ko uu ye koaeesye ineendet koek laitoryat eng' Israel? Inde mwaita laleng'ung' konyi ak itau panda iwe. Ayooktoin iwe kap Jesse Bethlehemindet, amu kaalewenjigei laitoryat eng' weeriikyik.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Ki mwa Samuel kole, “Awetitoi ano? Ngot kogas Saulo, kobara.” Koleenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Kweri rooryat, ak imwa ile, ‘Kanyo aeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Kuur Jesse konyo ole itisisye si aboorun kiit ne iyae, yeityo iilwa chiito ne amwaun.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Ki yai Samuel kioto ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kingo it Bethlehem, kotorook ineendet poisyegap nganaseet kobotanionu. ki teebee ineendet koleenji, “Inyone eng' kaalyeet?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Ak ki le, “Ee, anyoone eng' kaalyeet, kanyo aeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Otabaange anyun ak obwa keebe ole atisisye.” Ak ki itabaan Jesse ak weeriikyik ak koguur icheek kobwa ole tisiisyee." 
1Samuel16:6 Kingo it kogeer Eliap ak ki ibwaat kole, “Miitei iman ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tainnyi.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Ago ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Samuel, “Amat igeer togeennyi anan ko kooindap tononennyi, amu kaeesye ineendet. Ma keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye keerei piik. Keerei piik itoondo, ago keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldo.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Koguur anyun `Jesse Abinadab ak koleenji kosiirto eng' taitap Samuel. Ago ki le Samuel, “Ma lewen agine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor niito.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Yeityo koleenji Jesse Shammah kosiirto. Ago ki le, “Agot niito koma lewen agine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Ki leenji `Jesse weeriikyik tisap kosiirto eng' taitap Samuel. Ago ki leenji `Samuel Jesse, “Ma lewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor age eng' chuuto.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Ki leenji `Samuel Jesse, “Mi yu lagoguk tugul?” Ak ki le, “Ta komi ne ming'in ne iyagi keechiirek.” Koleenji `Samuel Jesse, “Iyookte chiito kwo komut ineendet, amu ma kitebyei ng'wony agoi koit.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Ki iyookto chiito, ak ki imut ineendet. Ki piriir, ak ki tinyei koonyek che korooron, ak ki karaaran. Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ng'eet, iil ineendet, amu ineendet niito.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Konem anyun Samuel lalet ne ki mi mwaita ak koiil ineendet eng' kwenutap tupchosyekyik. Ki nyoonji `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi eng' kimnateet kobooch peetuunooto agoi. Kingo pata, kong'eet anyun Samuel ak kwo Ramah." 
1Samuel16:14 Kiga kwo Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Saulo, ak ki inyaliil ineendet tamirmiryet ne ya ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel16:15 Ki mwachi `otwogikyik Saulo koleenji, “Keero, imuin tamirmiryet ne ya ne punu Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel16:16 Ingong'at kiptaiyandennyo otwogikyik che mi tainnyi kocheeng' chiito ne putiin ketubet. Asi ye nyoonji tamirmiryet ne ya ne punu Kamuktaindet kobut ketubet eng' eunnyi si isap.” 
1Samuel16:17 Koleenji `Saulo otwogikyik, “Ocheeng'wo chiito ne ingen kobut ketubet komyee ak omutwaa ineendet.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Ki wolji anyun age eng' murenjoto chiget koleenji, “Ki ageer weeriit age ne po Jesse Bethlehemindet, ne putiin, chii ne kiim ne tinyei nyiganateet ak ko chiitap lugeet, ng'oom eng' ng'alaalet, inender ko chii ne karaaran ak komi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Koyookto anyun `Saulo piik koba kap Jesse, koba koleenji, “Iyookwo Daudi weeriing'ung' ne iyagi keechiirek.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Ki chop `Jesse sigiryet ak koganapchi amitwogik, soteet ne mi divaik ak aarwetap ng'oroor ak koyooktoe Daudi weeriinnyi koipchi Saulo." 
1Samuel16:21 Ki it `Daudi kap Saulo ak koboisyechi ineendet. Ki cham `Saulo ineendet miising' ak ki yai koek chiito ne ipchin kariikyik. 
1Samuel16:22 Ki iyookto `Saulo chiito kwo kap Jesse koleenji, “Asoomin ale chamji Daudi koboisyewo amu kogonyoor chameet eng' anee.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Ye kanyonji Saulo `tamirmiryet ne ya ne punu Kamuktaindet, ko ki inemu Daudi ketubet ak kobut, kogaigait Saulo ak komyeeit kogeny ak kwo eng' ineendet tamirmiryet ne ya." 
1Samuel17:1 Ki iyum anyun Philistiik lugosyekwak koba lugeet, ak ki iyumgei eng' Soko ne po Judah, ak ki teech kwenutap Soko ak Aseka eng' Epes-damin." 
1Samuel17:2 Ki iyumgei piigap Israel kobooto Saulo ak ki teech atebweetap Elah ak kotet lugeet si kobargei ak Philistiik. 
1Samuel17:3 Kitonone `Philistiik tulweet komosta age, kotonone `Israel tulweet komosta age, ak kimi atebweet kwenunnywa." 
1Samuel17:4 Ki mong' nyiganeet age eng' nganaseetap Philistiik ne ki kiguure Goliat ne po Gath. Ki koindonyi ko ki olo po mitainik somok. 
1Samuel17:5 Ki tinyei kuutweet ne po sugunwet eng' metinnyi ak ki ilaachi ngoryeet ne po kariik. Nyigiisindap ngoryonooto ko ki shekelisyek eliphuusyek muut che po sugunonik. 
1Samuel17:6 Ki tinyei kariigap sugunonik eng' keelyekyik ak ndiritap sugunwet eng' patennyi. 
1Samuel17:7 Ki kergei irumetap ndirinnyi ak keetit ne taachin usiisyek chiito ne nabisyei. Nyigiisindap meleitap ng'otinnyi ko ki shekelisyek pogol lo che po kariik, ak kiwendi chiito ne ki ipchin long'eet kondoe ineendet." 
1Samuel17:8 Ki tonon ak kotwekyi lugosyegap Israel eng' kutit ne oo koleenji, “Amu nee si omang'u otet lugeeng'wong'? Ma aa Philistindet, ko oo otwogigap Saulo? Olewenjigei chiito, ak ongochoorgei konyoonjo." 
1Samuel17:9 Ngot komuuch kebarge tuwai ak kobara keegu anyun otwogikwok. Ago ngot aterteer ineendet ak abar, oegu anyun otwogikyok ak ootech.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Ki le Philistindonooto, “Areenye lugosyegap Israel ra, ogoono chiito si kobiit kebarge.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Kingo kas Saulo ak Israel tugul ng'aleechooto po Philistindet, kotoptobenso ak koiyweis miising'." 
1Samuel17:12 Daudi ko ki weeriitap Epratindetap Beth-lehem-juda ne ki kainennyi ko Jesse. Ki tinyei weeriik sisiit, ak eng' peetuusyegap Saulo ko kiga koosit ineendet." 
1Samuel17:13 Kigaba lugeet weeriik che eecheen somogu che po Jesse koosup Saulo. Kainaigap weeriichooto somok che kigaba lugeet ko kitaita Eliap, ne rubei ineendet ko ki Abinadab ak ne po somok ko Shammah." 
1Samuel17:14 Ki ne ming'in Daudi. Kiga isup Saulo chooto eecheen somogu. 
1Samuel17:15 Kiwendi `Daudi kap Saulo ak koweeksei koyagi keechiiregap kwandanyi eng' Bethlehem. 
1Samuel17:16 Eng' peetuusyek artam, ko kiriigu Philistindonooto karon ak koskoleny koboorugei." 
1Samuel17:17 Pesyet age, koleenji `Jesse weeriinnyi Daudi, “Nam ip chaaktae kiloinik taman che po peek che kagigeel ak magatinichu taman, ipchi tupchosyeguk eng' ole mi lugoosyek." 
1Samuel17:18 Ipchi kora mugunichu taman po cheego kiptaiyannywa ak igeer chametapkei ne po tupchosyeguk yeityo iibu waluunennywa.” 
1Samuel17:19 Ki mi Saulo ak icheek kobooto piik tugul che po Israel atebweetap Elah, kobaregei ak Philistiik." 
1Samuel17:20 Ki ng'eet `Daudi karon miising' ak kobagakyi keechiirek riibindet yeityo kwo ko uu ye kiga ng'at Jesse koibei tuguuchooto. Ki it ole mi kariisyek ye kiwaachei lugeet agobo pooryeet komachei komanda koba koyai lugeet. 
1Samuel17:21 Kitet lugeet Israel ak Philistiik kotoorchingei lugoosyek tuwai. 
1Samuel17:22 Ki pagaakyi Daudi tuguukyik riibindetap tuguuk ak kolabat ye mi lugeet kwo kogat weeriik che tupcho. 
1Samuel17:23 Ye kita kong'alaaldos ak icheek kotogos nyiganeet, Philistindet ne po Gath ne kainennyi ko ki Goliat komang'une kweanaigap Philistiik ak komwa ng'aleek che cham komwaei ak ki kas Daudi." 
1Samuel17:24 Kingo keer piik tugul che po `Israel chiichooto, koiywei kot ak komwee ineendet." 
1Samuel17:25 Ki le piigap Israel, “Kaogeer chiichi katogos? Katogosu iman konyo koreenyei Israel. Chii ne parei ineendet, kogoochin laitoryat mogornateet ne oo ak kogoochi cheptonyi kotun ak kotyach kootap kwandanyi eng' Israel.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Ki ng'alaalji `Daudi piik che kitonondos eng' ye mi ineendet koleenji, “Kiyachin nee chiito ne parei Philistindoni ak koisto teweernatani eng' Israel? Amu ng'oo Philistindoni ma kimuratan kot koreeny lugosyegap Kamuktaindet ne sabei?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Ki wolji `pichooto ineendet ko uu ni koleenji, “Kiyachin ko uu nooto chiito ne parei ineendet.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Kingo kas Eliap ng'eetap kamet ne oo kong'alaaljin pichooto, konereech miising' agobo Daudi ak koleenji, “Amu nee si ichooruge? Kebagakyi ng'oo keechiirechooto ng'ering' eng' surkwen? Angen menateng'ung' ak yaityetap muguleldang'ung' amu kechooruge inyoo igeer lugeet.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Ak ki le Daudi, “Kawech nee nguno? Tos ma mi kiy ne po pani?”" 
1Samuel17:30 Kiwelelgei kotokyigei chiito age ak komwa ko uu atkai. Ki wolji `piik ineendet kogeny ko uu tai. 
1Samuel17:31 Ye ki ngegas ng'aleek che ki mwa Daudi, keba kemwachi Saulo ak kiyookto chii koguur ineendet." 
1Samuel17:32 Kingo it koleenji `Daudi Saulo, “Amat kome chii mugulel agobo ineendet; wendi otwogindeng'ung' kobaregei ak Philistindoniito.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Koleenji `Saulo Daudi, “Memuuchi iwe obargei ak Philistindoniito, amu ta ko ii ming'in ak ineendet ko chiitap lugeet kobooch ming'inatennyi.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Ki leenji `Daudi Saulo, “Ki iyagi otwogindeng'ung' keechiiregap kwandanyi ak ko ye kingo nyo ng'etundo anan ko tyony age ne kergei ak keerit konam aarwetap keechiir eng' akweet," 
1Samuel17:35 awe asu, ak abar ak asaru eng' kutinnyi. Kingo ng'eet kole kobara anam tamnet yeityo akwer ak abar." 
1Samuel17:36 Ki par otwogindeng'ung' tyong'ichooto tuwai, ng'etundo ak magalaluut. Igeitu anyun Philistindoniito ma kimuratan age eng' icheek, amu kogoreeny lugosyegap Kamuktaindet ne sabei." 
1Samuel17:37 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kisarwo eng' siyoogap ng'etundo ak eng' siyoogap tyonyooto, kosarwo eng' eutap Philistindoni.” Koleenji `Saulo Daudi, “Ui ak mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Ki ilaakyi `Saulo Daudi ngoryennyi ne po lugeet, ak kogerchine metit kuutweetap sugunwet ak ki ilaakyi ngoryeetap kariik." 
1Samuel17:39 Kiratyi Daudi ngoryennyi rotwennyi po chok yeityo kotyem kole kwo amu kitom kotyemei. Ki leenji `Daudi Saulo, “Ma muuchi aip tuguuchu, amu tomo atyeme.” Ara ki ireek Daudi tuguuchooto." 
1Samuel17:40 Ki nam kiroktonyi ak kokwechigei kibargoinik muut eng' kereruut ak konde loletap mestoweek ne ki tinyei, nooto ko ki suberennyi, ak komi eunnyi chemasindaryet, ne ki wiirtoe koita, koriikyi anyun Philistindet." 
1Samuel17:41 Ki nyo Philistindet koriikyi Daudi ak ki indoe ineendet chiito ne ki ipchin long'eet. 
1Samuel17:42 Ak kingo keerot Philistindet ola tugul, kogeer Daudi ak kosas, amu kita ko ming'in ak ki piriir, ak kotinyei togeet ne karaaran." 
1Samuel17:43 Koleenji `Philistindet Daudi, “Tos aa seset kot inyoonjo ak kirokweek?” Ak ki chup Philistindonooto Daudi eng' kanamonikyik." 
1Samuel17:44 Ki leenji `Philistindet Daudi, “Nyoo ole ami si kobiit agoochi poortang'ung' toriitigap parak ak tyong'igap timiin.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Koleenji `Daudi Philistindonooto, “Kenyoonjo ak rotwetap chok, ng'otit ak ndirit, ago anyoonjinin eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap lugosyegap Israel ne koireeny." 
1Samuel17:46 Indein rani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyu. Awirin abariin ak atil meting'ung' yeityo agoochi rani muuswegap lugeetap Philistiik toriitik che po parak, ak tyong'igap timiin che po ng'wony, si kobiit konai ng'wony tugul kole mi Kamuktaindet Israel." 
1Samuel17:47 Nae tuiyoni tugul kole, ma saruunee chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rotwetap chok ak ng'otit, amu po lugeet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak indeok eunekyok.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Kingo ng'eet Philistindet konyo koriik, kotorook Daudi, kochaakta Daudi, kolabat kotokyigei ole mi lugeet kotorookta Philistindet." 
1Samuel17:49 Ki irooch Daudi euut lolennyi ak konem koita konde chemasindaryet ak kowiir Philistindet kokwer turyetap togeet. Kichut koita togeet oriit ak ki ibut kondoe met. 
1Samuel17:50 Ki iterteer anyun `Daudi Philistindet eng' chemasindaryanooto ak koita, ki wiir Philistindet kobar ineendet. Ago ki ma komi rootwo ne po chok eutap Daudi." 
1Samuel17:51 Ki labat anyun Daudi ak kotonone Philistindet, konam rotwetap Philistindonooto kong'us eng' choget ak kobar ak koebe kaatit kong'et. Kingo keer Philistiik kole kagome nyiganennywa, komwei." 
1Samuel17:52 Ki ng'eetyo piigap Israel ak che po Judah ak kowaach yeityo koon Philistiik agoi koit Gath, agoi kurgotigap Ekron. Ki ibutyot eng' ooreet ne wendi Saaraim Philistiik che ki kiguoten agoi Gath ak Ekron." 
1Samuel17:53 Kingo week piigap Israel eng' oneet ne ki oonei Philistiik, konyaban nganasennywa." 
1Samuel17:54 Ki ip Daudi metitap Philistindonooto konyo Jerusalem, ak kigonoree emainnyi kariigap Philistindet." 
1Samuel17:55 Kingo keer `Saulo Daudi kowendi kobaregei ak Philistindet, koteebe Abner ne ki kiptaiyatap lugeet koleenji, “Abner, po kap ng'oo weeri?” Kole Abner, “Ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung' ee laitoryat, ko mangen.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Ak ki le laitoryat, “Teep ole po weeriito.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Ye kingo weeksei Daudi kobunu pareetap Philistindet, konam Abner ineendet ak komut kwo taitap Saulo kotinyei metitap Philistindet eng' eunnyi." 
1Samuel17:58 Kingo it koteebe Saulo koleenji, “Ii po kap ng'oo weeri?” Ak ki wolji Daudi koleenji, “Aa weeriitap otwogindeng'ung' Jesse, Bethlehemindet.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Ye kingo kagogees Daudi kong'alaaljindos ak Saulo, konamgei saboondap Jonathan ak saboondap Daudi. Ki cham `Jonathan ineendet ko uu saboondanyi." 
1Samuel18:2 Kong'eetee peetuunooto, komut ineendet `Saulo, mata kochamji kwo kaa, kootap kwandanyi kogeny." 
1Samuel18:3 Ki iyomiskei anyun Jonathan ak Daudi, amu ki cham Jonathan ineendet ko uu saboondanyi." 
1Samuel18:4 Ki ireek Jonathan ngoryennyi ne po parak ne ki ilaachi ak kogoochi Daudi kobooto ngoryennyi ne kooi, rotwennyi ne po chok, kwangennyi ak pirenennyi." 
1Samuel18:5 Ki wo Daudi oldo age tugul ole ki iyookto Saulo, ak ki tebi eng' ng'omnateet. Ki inde `Saulo ineendet koboi murenigap lugeet ak ki myeeit kioto eng' taitap piik tugul, ak eng' taitap otwogigap Saulo ak icheek." 
1Samuel18:6 Ye kingo pwanei icheek koweeksei Daudi kobunu pareetap Philistindet, komong' kwonyiik eng' nganasook tugul che po Israel kotyenonu ak kourereni kotorogu Laitoryat Saulo ak kobirei sugutisyek che mengeechen kobooto tuguuk che kibutei eng' poiboiyet." 
1Samuel18:7 Kityendos kwonyichooto kourerendos koleen, “Ki par Saulo eliphusyekyik, kobar Daudi tamanusyegap eliphusyekyik.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Ki nereech Saulo kot. Ma ibaibai ineendet mwaonooto ak ki mwa kole, “Kagoiityi Daudi tamanusyegap eliphuusyek ak koiitya eliphuusyek kityo. Nee age ne kang'et ne nyooru kobatee laitornatet?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Kobooch peetuunooto agoi, ko kigeerote kong' ne ya `Saulo Daudi." 
1Samuel18:10 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto, konyonji Saulo `tamirmiryet ne ya eng' kimnateet ne ki punu Kamuktaindet. Ki ng'alaal eng' ko ko uu chii ne amei iywek, ak kibut Daudi ketubet eng' eunnyi ko uu ye ki cham koyaei peetuut age tugul. Ki tinyei Saulo ng'otit eng' eunnyi." 
1Samuel18:11 Ki toorta ng'otinooto Saulo kotokyi Daudi, amu ki le, “Atoore Daudi kosore koit inaat.” Ago kichilil Daudi eng' tainnyi konyil aeng'." 
1Samuel18:12 Ki iywei `Saulo Daudi, amu ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet, ak kiga kobagaakta Saulo." 
1Samuel18:13 Ki isto Saulo anyun ineendet eng' ole mi, ak ki inde ineendet koek kiptaiyatap eliphuut. Ago ki indochi icheek Daudi ye kimandoi ak koweeksei." 
1Samuel18:14 Ki tebi Daudi eng' ng'omnateet eng' ortinwekyik tugul ak ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet. 
1Samuel18:15 Kingo keer Saulo kotebyei Daudi eng' ng'omnateet ne oo, koywei ineendet." 
1Samuel18:16 Ago ki cham `Israel tugul ak `Judah Daudi, amu ki indochi icheeget ye kimandoi ak koweeksei." 
1Samuel18:17 Ki leenji `Saulo Daudi, “Oroni cheptonyu ne oo Merap, agoonin ineendet itun. Egu kityo nyiganennyu, ak iyai lugosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Amu ki le Saulo, “Ma mache kotwa eunekyuk ineendet, ago ingobar ineendet eunegap Philistiik.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Ak ki leenji `Daudi Saulo, “Aa ng'oo ak nee saboondanyu, anan ko ooreetap abba eng' Israel kot aegu saani eng' kaplaitoryat?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Ago eng' peetuut ne kita kigoochin Daudi Merap cheptap Saulo, kigoochi Adriel Meolatindet kotun." 
1Samuel18:20 Ago ki cham `Mikal cheptap Saulo Daudi. ki ngemwachi Saulo ko ki ibaibai ng'olyoondonooto ineendet. 
1Samuel18:21 Ki ibwaat anyun Saulo kole, “Agoochini ineendet Mikal si kobiit koek mesteet eng' Daudi, ak si kobiit kobar ineendet eutap Philistiik.” Ki mwachi anyun `Saulo Daudi koleenji ne po aeng', “Itinye kasartap aeng' iegu sandanaa eng' anee.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Ki ng'at `Saulo otwogikyik koleenji, “Ong'alaal ak Daudi eng' ung'oot oleenji, ‘Keero, paibai laitoryat eng' inyee ak kochamin otwogikyik tugul,’ nooto anyun ko myee iegu saania eng' kaplaitoryat.”" 
1Samuel18:23 Ki mwachi anyun `otwogigap Saulo Daudi ng'aleechooto kogas. Ago ki mwa Daudi kole, “Ogeere ko kiit ne ming'in eng' okweek koek chii sandetap kaplaitoryat ago anee ko aa chii ne panan ne sasaat?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Ki mwachi anyun otwogikyik `Saulo koleenji, “Kang'alaal Daudi ko uu ni.”" 
1Samuel18:25 Kole Saulo, “Omwachini Daudi ko uu ni oleenjini, ‘Ma machei laitoryat kanyiok alak tugul, ago machei irirenik pogol che po Philistiik, si kobiit keyaaktoochi mugetuut puunigap laitoryat.’ ” Ki kabwaatutyetap Saulo kome Daudi eng' eunegap Philistiik." 
1Samuel18:26 Kingo mwachi `otwogikyik Daudi ng'aleechuuto, kobaibait komyee Daudi koek sandanaa eng' kaplaitoryat. Kotom kogeskei peetuusyechooto," 
1Samuel18:27 kong'eet `Daudi kwo kobooto piikyik kobar Philistiik piik pogol aeng'. Ki ip Daudi irirenikwak ak kogoochi laitoryat irirenichooto tugul si koek saania eng' kaplaitoryat. Ko uu nooto anyun, ko ki igoochi Saulo ineendet Mikal cheptonyi kotun." 
1Samuel18:28 Kingo keer ak konai Saulo kole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Daudi, ak ki cham ineendet Mikal cheptonyi," 
1Samuel18:29 kotes koiywei Daudi. Ki ek Saulo puunyootap Daudi peetuut age tugul. 
1Samuel18:30 Ki manda anyun pounigap Philistiik, ak ye ki cham komandoi, kotebi Daudi eng' ng'omnateet kosiir otwogik tugul che po Saulo, ak ki kigonyit kainennyi miising'." 
1Samuel19:1 Ki ng'alaalji `Saulo Jonathan weeriinnyi kobooto otwogikyik tugul koleenji kobar Daudi. 
1Samuel19:2 Ago ki paibai miising' Jonathan weeriitap Saulo agobo Daudi. Ara ki mwachi `Jonathan Daudi koleenji, “Cheeng'ei abbannyu Saulo kobarin. Nooto anyun asaain miising' ale, riipkei karon ak itebi eng' ung'oot iunyge." 
1Samuel19:3 Amandai ak awe atonon eng' ye neegitee abba eng' keeweet eng' ole imi ak keng'alaal ak ineendet agobo inyee. Ngot ageer kiy amwaun.” 
1Samuel19:4 Ki ng'alaalji `Jonathan Saulo kwandanyi ak kochoi Daudi koleenji, “Amat koyachi tengek laitoryat otwogindennyi Daudi, amu ma yaun tengek ak amu kagomyagitu miising' poisyonikyik che kogoyaun." 
1Samuel19:5 Ma iit saboondanyi ak kogobar Philistindet ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunet ne oo agobo Israel tugul. Ki igeer kioto aginye ak ki ibaibaitu, amu nee anyun si iyachi tengek korotiik che ma tinyei tengek, ibar Daudi puch?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Ki kas `Saulo ng'olyootap Jonathan, ak koyasyo Saulo kole, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma ki parei ineendet.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Ki kuur anyun `Jonathan Daudi ak komwachi ineendet tuguuchooto tugul. Ki imut `Jonathan Daudi kwo ole mi Saulo ak ki tebee tainnyi ko uu eng' tai. 
1Samuel19:8 Ki piit lugeet kogeny, ak kimanda Daudi kwo kobargei ak Philistiik. Ki par icheek eng' pareet ne oo kot komweiso eng' tainnyi." 
1Samuel19:9 Ago ki nyoonji Saulo `tamirmiryet ne ya ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye kitebyei eng' koonnyi kotinyei ng'otit eng' eunnyi. Kibutei Daudi kibugandet eng' eunnyi. 
1Samuel19:10 Kileen Saulo kotoor Daudi eng' ng'otit kosoree inaat, ago kichilil eng' taitap Saulo, ak kitoor inaatut eng' ng'otit. Kochilil Daudi ak komwei kemounooto." 
1Samuel19:11 Ki iyookto `Saulo piik koba kootap Daudi koriip ineendet kole si kobar ineendet karon. Ki mwachi Daudi `Mikal osotyonnyi koleenji, “Ngot ko mesaru saboondang'ung' kemouni kebarin mutai.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Ki choorta anyun `Mikal Daudi kwo ng'wony kobun tirisyet, ak ki mwei kochilil." 
1Samuel19:13 Ki nam `Mikal kanamwet ak komogon eng' itoogut ak kotichine metit mutoit ne po koroorigap ng'oroorek yeityo kotuge ngoroik. 
1Samuel19:14 Ye kingo yookto `Saulo piik koba konam Daudi, komwa kwondonyi kole, “Myani.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Ki iyookto `Saulo pichooto koba kogeer Daudi ak koleenji, “Omutwaa konyo eng' itogunnyi si abar.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Kingo pwa ko pichooto, konyoor komi kanamwet itook ak komi metinnyi mutoinotap koroorigap ng'oroorek." 
1Samuel19:17 Ki leenji `Saulo Mikal, “Amu nee si igena ko uu ni ak ichuunde punyondennyu kwo kot ko nguno ko kagochilil?” Kowolji `Mikal Saulo koleenji “Ki leenjo, pagaakta awo. Kalya si imach abariin?”" 
1Samuel19:18 Kimwei anyun Daudi, kochilil ak kwo ole mi Samuel eng' Ramah. Ki wo komwachi tuguuk tugul che ki yachi ineendet Saulo. Yeityo koba tuwai ak Samuel koba komeny Naiot." 
1Samuel19:19 Ki kimwachi Saulo keleenji, “Keero, miitei Daudi Naiot eng' Ramah.”" 
1Samuel19:20 Ara anyun ki iyookto `Saulo piik koba konam Daudi, ak kingo keer tuiyetap maotik komaotendos ng'aleek, kotononi Samuel kondochin icheek, konyonji `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet piigap Saulo ak komaotenso ak icheek." 
1Samuel19:21 ki ngemwachi Saulo ng'aleechooto, koyookto piik alak ago ki maotenso ak icheek. Ki iyookto `Saulo piik ne po somok ak ki maotenso ak icheek." 
1Samuel19:22 Ki wo ineendet agine Ramah kot koit ole mi keriinget ne oo ne po peek ne miitei Seku. Kiteep kole, “Mi ano Samuel ak Daudi?” Ak ki le chiito age, “Mi Naiot eng' Ramah.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Ki wo olooto po Naiot eng' Ramah, ak ki nyoonji ineendet agine Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, ak ki wo komaotenot kot koit Naiot eng' Ramah." 
1Samuel19:24 Ki ireek ngoroikyik ak komaoten agine eng' taitap Samuel. Ki ru aach ngor peetuunooto tugul ak kemounooto tugul. Nooto anyun kimwaei keleen, “Tos age Saulo agine eng' maotik?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Kimwei Daudi eng' Naiot eng' Ramah ak kwo komwa eng' taitap Jonathan kole, “Ki ayai nee? Nee tengektonyu? Nee chalwoktanyu eng' taitap kwandang'ung' si kocheeng'ei saboondanyu?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Koleenji Jonathan, “Ingolooit nooto, memee; keero, ma yaei abba kiy ne oo anan ne ming'in, ama iboorwo. Amu nee si koung'ena Abba kiito? Ma uu nooto.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Ak ki iyasyo Daudi kogeny kole, “Ingen kwandang'ung' komyee kole ichamoo; nooto amu nee asi koleenjigei, ‘Amat konai Jonathan kiito si ma aragen.’ Ago iman ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung' agine, komi kakwautyet agenge kityo eng' kwenunnyu ak meet.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Koleenji anyun `Jonathan Daudi, “Kiit age tugul ne machei saboondang'ung', ayaun kioto.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Ki leenji `Daudi Jonathan, “Leelei arawet mutai ago magaat atebi ak laitoryat eng' amisyet. Kaigai chamwo awo si aunygei eng' timiin agoi peetuutap somok koskoleny." 
1Samuel20:6 Ngot kogeer kwandang'ung' kole ma mi, imwachi anyun ileenji, ‘Kosooma Daudi miising' kole achamji kolabat kwo Bethlehem nganasennyi. Amu mi olooto tiseiywotap kenyiit age tugul ne po ooreenywa tugul.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Ngot komwa kole, ‘Myee,’ konyooru anyun otwogindeng'ung' kaalyeet, ago ngot konereech, inai anyun ile kagotil kole yaei kiit ne ya." 
1Samuel20:8 Eng' nooto anyun iyachi ne myee otwogindeng'ung'; amu ki iyachi otwogindeng'ung' arorutyet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten: ago ngot atinye tengekto, ibara inyeendet, amu kalya si imutyo kwandang'ung'?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Ki le Jonathan, “Ingolooit eng' inyee, amu nda angen ale kagotil Abba kole koyaun kiit ne ya, ko tos ma mwaun?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Koleenji anyun `Daudi Jonathan, “Ng'oo ne mwaiwo ngot kogowolun kwandang'ung' eng' koroomnateet?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Koleenji `Jonathan Daudi, “Nyoo keebe turguin.” Ara ki pa tuwai anyun turguin." 
1Samuel20:12 Ki leenji `Jonathan Daudi, “Ingoek paoryat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ye ateebee Abba mutai koteni asiis anan eng' peetuutap somok, ngot komi ng'olyoo ne myee agobo Daudi, ko tos mayogun ak aboorun?" 
1Samuel20:13 Ingoyachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jonathan ko uu nooto ak kosiir, ngot kochamei abba koyaun ne ya, ama amwaun. Amwaun si kobiit iwe eng' kaalyeet. Ingotebi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten ko uu ye ki mi kobooto abba." 
1Samuel20:14 Ngo ta asabe, iboorwo myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ye amei," 
1Samuel20:15 ko meiste myeeindong'ung' eng' koonnyu koigeny. Achicha meiste agot ye kagoisto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puunik alak tugul che po Daudi eng' ng'wony. 
1Samuel20:16 Ki yai anyun `Jonathan arorutyet kobooto kootap Daudi kole, Tuun mage Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kioto eunegap puunigap Daudi.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Ki iyasyechi `Jonathan Daudi ne po aeng', amu chamyet ne oo ne kiting'e ineendet, amu ki chamei ineendet ko uu ye ki chamei saboondanyi." 
1Samuel20:18 Ki leenji anyun `Jonathan ineendet, “Leelei arawet mutai. Kigeerei keele memi, amu mi ng'echereeng'ung' puch." 
1Samuel20:19 Ye kaibeni peetuusyek somok, ichoortegei ichakte iit ole kigeung'egei ye ki kimwaei ng'aleechooto yeityo itebee ole neegitee koitap Esel." 
1Samuel20:20 Amwoge tabandanyi eng' kipchabonik somok; ko uu ye kamwoge kiy. 
1Samuel20:21 Yeityo ayoogu muren aleenji, Ui cheeng' kipchabonik. Ngot amwachi murenonooto aleenji, Keero, miitei kipchabonik komosi, iyum, inyoo anyun, amu ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko miitei kaalyeet eng' inyee, ama mi ng'oiyondit." 
1Samuel20:22 Ago ngot amwachi weerooto aleenji, Miitei komosin kipchabonik, iwe, amu kamwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iwe." 
1Samuel20:23 Ak agobo ng'aleek chu kagagimwa inyee ak anee, ko keero, mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenunnyo.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Ki unygei Daudi anyun eng' turguin, ak kingo leel arawet, kotep ng'wony laitoryat koamis." 
1Samuel20:25 Ki tebee laitoryat ng'echerennyi ko uu peetuusyek alak eng' ng'echereet ne kineegite inaat: ak ki tonon Jonathan, ak ki tebee Abner ole neegitee Saulo, ago kimi puch komostap Daudi." 
1Samuel20:26 Ago ki ma mwa ng'olyoo age tugul peetuunooto Saulo. Amu ki ibwaat kole, “Kagonyonji kiy ineendet; ma tiliil ineendet; iman ma tiliil ineendet.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ko kagoleel arawet, kogimi puch komostap Daudi. ki teebee `Saulo Jonathan weeriinnyi koleenji, “Amu nee si ma nyo weeriitap Jesse amisyet amut ak raini?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Kowolji `Jonathan Saulo koleenji, “Kosoom Daudi kwo Bethlehem" 
1Samuel20:29 kole, ‘Asoomin ale chamwo awo, amu enyei piigap ooreennyo tiseiywot eng' nganaseet ak kong'ata weeriit ne ketupche awo. Nguno anyun ko ngot iyanwo eng' myeeindong'ung', asoomin ale chamwo awo ageer che kitupche.’ Nooto anyun amu nee si ma nyo meseetap laitoryat.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Ki nereekyi anyun `Saulo Jonathan ochei, ak komwachi ineendet koleenji, “Weeri po kwondo ne imaasat ak ko ngelelyot! Tos mangen ale ki ilewen weeriitap Jesse, ne egu kalilaneng'ung' ak koegu kalilanetap aach ngoryeet ne po kamenng'ung'?" 
1Samuel20:31 Amu kotee kota kosabei weeriitap Jesse eng' ng'wony, koma ki kimiitin anan ki kimiit laitornateng'ung'. Iyookte anyun kimutwaa ineendet, amu meei iman.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Kowolji `Jonathan kwandanyi Saulo koleenji, “Kibarei amu nee? Koyai nee?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Kitoor `Saulo ineendet eng' ng'otit koleen kobar. Konae nooto anyun Jonathan kole kogotil kwandanyi kobar Daudi. 
1Samuel20:34 Kong'eet anyun Jonathan eng' meset eng' nereegek che ng'woneen. Ma amis eng' peetuutap aeng' ne po arawet, amu ki arageni agobo Daudi, amu ki iteweer kwandanyi." 
1Samuel20:35 Ki eng' karon, kwo Jonathan turguin eng' sait ne kiga ng'at Daudi. Ki pendi ak weero ne neran." 
1Samuel20:36 Ak ki leenji weeroto ming'in, “Labat si icheeng' kipchabonik che amwoktoi.” Ak ye kilabati lakwanooto, komwokto kipchabet kondoe ineendet." 
1Samuel20:37 Kingo it lakwanooto ole ki mi kipchabet ne kiga mwokto Jonathan, koguur `Jonathan lakwanooto koleenji, “Ta komi tai kipchabet!”" 
1Samuel20:38 Ki kuur `Jonathan weeroto koleenji, “Chaakte labat, mat igagei.” Ki iyum weeroto po Jonathan kipchabonik yeityo konyo ole mi kiptaiyandennyi." 
1Samuel20:39 Ago ki ma nai kiy age tugul. Jonathan ak Daudi icheegei che ki ingen ng'aleechooto. 
1Samuel20:40 Ki igoochi Jonathan kariikyik lakwanatonyi ak koleenji, “Ui, ip tuguuchu koba nganaseet.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Kingwo weerooto, kong'eet Daudi eng' ole tokyingei murot tai ak kong'uruuk kotiing'e togeennyi ng'wony. Ki ing'uruuk konyil somok, yeityo kotorochkei icheek ak koriiryo, ak kitesak miising' riiregap Daudi." 
1Samuel20:42 Ki leenji `Jonathan Daudi, “Ui eng' kaalyeet, amu ko uu ye kagiyosye tuwai eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paoryat eng' kwenunnyo anee ak inyee ak eng' kwenutap iyotennyu ak iyoteng'ung' koigeny.” Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi kwo, ak ki wo Jonathan nganaseet." 
1Samuel21:1 Ki wo anyun Daudi Nob kap Ahimelek tisiindet. Ki nyo Ahimelek kotorook Daudi kobotanonu ak koleenji, “Amu nee si imi inyegei? Amu nee si ma mi chii kobooten?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Kowolji `Daudi Ahimelek tisiindet koleenji, “Kang'ata laitoryat komwaiwo ng'olyoo kole, Mat igany konai chii agobo ng'olyoondoniito kayooktochin, anan agobo kiit ne kang'atiin. Agobo murenik che cham kemi tugul, ko kang'at icheek koba uiya." 
1Samuel21:3 Ara itinye nee anyun nguno eng' eung'ung'? Koono magatiinik muut anan ko kiit age tugul ne itinye.” 
1Samuel21:4 Ago ki wolji `tisiindonooto Daudi koleenji, “Ma mi magatiinik che ma itabaanatiin, kobatee magatiinik che tiliileen. Agoonin ngot ko koitabaangei murenjoto eng' kwonyiik.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Kowolji `Daudi tisiindonooto koleenji, “Eng' iman, ko kitabaanenech kwonyiik eng' peetuusyechu somok, ko uu uitugul ye cham awendi lugeet. Ngot kocham kotabaanotiin tuguugap murenik agot eng' pandap peetuusyek tugul, ko tos anyun itabaanatiin tuguukwak ne tya ra?”" 
1Samuel21:6 Kogoochi anyun `tisiindet ineendet magatiinik che itabaanatiin, amu ki ma komi magatiinik alage kobatee magatiinik che itabaanatiin, che ki kinemu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki kinemu si kinde magatiinik che kabunu ma eng' peetuut ne kagiisto che kami." 
1Samuel21:7 Ki mi yooto chiito age ne po otwogigap Saulo eng' peetuunooto ne ki kiraany kotebi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kainennyi ko ki Doeg, Edomindet. Ineendet ko ki ne oo eng' mestowegap Saulo." 
1Samuel21:8 Ki teebe `Daudi Ahimelek koleenji, “Metinye eng' yu ng'otit anan ko rotwetap chok eng' eung'ung'? Ma aibu rotwennyu anan ko kariikyuk, amu komachei poisyetap laitoryat kechokyi.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Kowol tisiindonooto kole, “Mi yu rotwetap chok ne po Goliat Philistindoni ki ibare eng' atebweetap Elah. Ki kitaae angeet ak miitei eng' patetap ephod. Ngot imache iip nooto, iip, amu ma mi age yu kobatee nooto.” Kole `Daudi, “Ma mi age ne kergei, koono nooto.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Ki ng'eet anyun `Daudi komwei peetuunooto amu ki iywei Saulo ak kwo kap Akis laitoryatap Gath. 
1Samuel21:11 Ago ki leenji `otwogikyik Akis, Tos ma Daudi niito laitoryatap emet? Tos ki ma tyenjigei icheek agobo ineendet eng' ureryosyek kole, “Ki par `Saulo eliphusyekyik, Kobar `Daudi tamanusyegap eliphuusyek?”" 
1Samuel21:12 Kigonor `Daudi ng'aleechuuto eng' muguleldanyi; ak ki iywei `Akis laitoryatap Gath Daudi miising'. 
1Samuel21:13 Ara ki wal atebeennyi eng' tainnywa ak ki yaigei koigei kibiywet eng' eunekwak, ak kisirasir kurgotigap ormariichet ak kobagaakta meninek kochoortaegei tamnennyi." 
1Samuel21:14 Ki leenji anyun `Akis otwogikyik, “Ogeero, ogeere ole kibiywo chiichi! Amu nee anyun si omutwaa?" 
1Samuel21:15 Tos korerwo kibionik kot omutwaa chiichi konyo koiiywen eng' tainnyu? Tos nyolu konyo chiichi koonnyu?” 
1Samuel22:1 Ki wo `Daudi anyun eng' olooto kochilil kwo kebeneetap Adulam. Kingo kas tupchosyekyik ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandanyi, kochoortagei koba ole mi." 
1Samuel22:2 Ki iyumjigei ineendet chii age tugul ne kinyalili, age tugul ne ki tinyei pesen ak age tugul ne ki tinyei ng'wanindo eng' muguleldanyi, ak ki ek ineendet kiptaiyannywa. Ki mi ak ineendet murenik olo po pogol ang'wan." 
1Samuel22:3 Ki wo eng' olooto `Daudi kwo Mispe ne po Moab ak koleenji laitoryatap Moab, “Asoomin ale chamji abba ak kamennyu kobwa otebi tugul agoi anai kiit ne yaiywo Kamuktaindet.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Ki imut icheek kobwa taitap laitoryatap Moab, ak kimeng'iis ak ineendet eng' peetuusyek tugul che ki mi Daudi kebeneet." 
1Samuel22:5 Ago ki leenji maotyot `Gad Daudi, “Amat itebee kebeneet, ng'et ak iwe emetap Judah.” Ara ki wo anyun Daudi ak ki it timdap Heret." 
1Samuel22:6 Ki kas `Saulo anyun kole ki kenyoor Daudi kobooto murenik che mi ak ineendet. Kitepchei ng'wony `Saulo eng' Gibea eng' keetit keel eng' Ramah, kotinyei ng'otit eng' eunnyi ak kitonondos otwogikyik eng' ye neegitee ineendet." 
1Samuel22:7 Ki leenji `Saulo otwogichooto kitonondos, “Ogas nguno okweek Benjaminik. Tos igoochi weeriitap Jesse chii age tugul eng' okweek mbareenik ak mbareenigap sabibuk? Tos yaak okweek tugul oegu kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak kiptainigap pogolwogik," 
1Samuel22:8 kot ko kochaama okweek tugul? Ma mi agot agenge eng' okweek ne ng'ang'wa ye yaei arorutyet weeriinnyu ak weeriitap Jesse, ama mi chii eng' okweek ne rireena anan ko ne ng'ang'wa kole kogong'eet weeriinnyu otwogindennyu kosuryena, kosapcha, ko uu rani?”" 
1Samuel22:9 Eng' yooto, kowol anyun `Doeg Edomindet ne kitononi eng' ye neegitee otwogigap Saulo kole, “Ki ageer weeriitap Jesse konyonei Nob, ole mi Ahimelek weeriitap Ahitub." 
1Samuel22:10 Kiteepsechi Ahimelek eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo ineendet yeityo kogoochi amitwogik ak rotwetap chok ne ki po Goliat Philistindet.” 
1Samuel22:11 Ki iyookto anyun laitoryat keguur tisiindet Ahimelek, weeriitap Ahitub ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandanyi che ki tisiik che ki mi Not, ak ki pwa icheek tugul ole mi laitoryat." 
1Samuel22:12 Ki le `Saulo, “Kas nguno inyee weeriitap Ahitub.” Ak ki wol kole, “Ami yu, kiptaiyandennyu.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Ki mwachi `Saulo ineendet koleenji, “Amu nee si ochaama inyee ak weeriitap Jesse, ki igoochi ineendet magatiinik, ak rotwetap chok, ki iteebsechi ineendet eng' Kamuktaindet si kong'eetya koboryena, kosapcha, ko uu rani?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Kowolji anyun `Ahimelek laitoryat koleenji, “Ago ng'oo eng' otwogiguk tugul ne po iman ko uu Daudi ne sandanaa eng' laitoryat, ne ki kinem kwo kapkirwoogeng'ung' ak ko konyitot eng' koong'ung'?" 
1Samuel22:15 Tos katau rani ateepsechi ineendet eng' Kamuktaindet? Ingolooit eng' anee, amat koiityi laitoryat kiy age tugul otwogindennyi anan koot tugul ne po abba. Amu ma ingen otwogindeng'ung' agobo ng'aleechu tugul che ng'ering' anan ngo che chaang'.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Ago ki le laitoryat, “Imee iman inyee Ahimelek ak piik tugul che po kootap kwandang'ung'.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Yeityo koleenji `laitoryat riibiik che kitonondos eng' ye neegitee ineendet, “Owelelgei ak obar tisiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ting'egei icheek yamdaet ak Daudi, amu ki ingen kole ki mwei ama ng'ang'wa.” Ago ma cham otwogigap laitoryat kochuul eunekwak kobar tisiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel22:18 Eng' yooto, koleenji Laitoryat Doeg, “Welelgei inyee, ak ibar tisiik.” Kiwelelgei anyun Doeg Edomindet ak kobar tisiik. Ki par eng' peetuunooto piik tamanwogik sisiit ak muut che ki ilaachi ephod ne po katanit." 
1Samuel22:19 Ki par kora Nob nganaseetap tisiik eng' rotwetap chok; murenik ak kwonyiik, lagok ak che reryei, ak tuuga kobooto sigiroik ak keechiirek." 
1Samuel22:20 Kichilil age eng' weeriigap Ahimelek weeriitap Ahitub, ne ki kiguure Abiathar ak komwei koosup Daudi."
