1Samuel22:21 Ki mwachi `Abiathar Daudi koleenji, “Kogobar Saulo tisiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel22:22 Ki leenji `Daudi Abiathar, “Kiganai eng' peetuunooto, ye kimi yooto Doeg Edomindet ale mwachin iman Saulo. Koaipchi meet piik tugul che po kootap kwandang'ung'." 
1Samuel22:23 Tebi kobooto, ameiyweisye, amu ineendet ne cheeng'ei saboondanyu kocheeng'ei saboondang'ung'. Ngemi tuwai ko ii riiboot.”" 
1Samuel23:1 ki ngemwachi Daudi keleenji, “Paregei Philistiik ak Keila ak kochoorei tuguuk eng' rwanyut ne kiboorsee,”" 
1Samuel23:2 koteebe anyun Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Tos myee awo abar Philistichuuto?” Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi, “Ui ak ibar Philistiik ak isaru Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Ago ki leenji `piikyik Daudi, “Ngot kiyweisyei eng' olito po Judah, ko siirei ne tya anyun ngot keebe Keila kebarge ak lugosyegap Philistiik?”" 
1Samuel23:4 koteebee anyun Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny, ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koleenji, “Ng'eet, choortegei Keila, amu andoi Philistiik euneguk.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Ki wo `Daudi Keila kobooto piikyik kobargei ak Philistiik. Kiluul tuukwak ak kobar piik eng' pareet ne oo. Ki sar anyun `Daudi piigap Keila. 
1Samuel23:6 Kingo mwechi Abiathar weeriitap Ahimelek Daudi eng' Keila, kochoorgei kotinyei ephod eng' eunnyi." 
1Samuel23:7 ki ngemwachi Saulo keleenji, “Kogonyo `Daudi Keila,” kole, “Kagonde Kamuktaindet ineendet eunnyu, amu kagegerchi oriit, amu ki wo nganaseet ne tinyei ormariichok ak temeleiywek.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Ki kuur anyun `Saulo piik tugul kochoortagei koba lugeet eng' Keila, koba koyiem Daudi ak piikyik." 
1Samuel23:9 Ago ki nai Daudi kole chobei `Saulo yaityet agobo ineendet. Ki leenji Abiathar tisiindet, “Ibu ephod konyo yu.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Yeityo komwa Daudi kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kagogas iman otwogindeng'ung' kole, machei konyo `Saulo Keila, konyo kobar nganaseet agobo anee." 
1Samuel23:11 Tos indea piigap Keila eunnyi? Chorugei Saulo, ko uu ye kagogas otwogindeng'ung'? Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, asoomin miising' ale, mwachi otwogindeng'ung'.” Kowol Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Chorugei.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Kotep `Daudi anyun kole, “Tos indea anee ak piikyuk eutap Saulo piigap Keila?” Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Indein.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi kobooto piikyik che ki olo po pogol lo ak koba eng' Keila, koba oldo tugul ole ki imuuch koba. ki ngemwachi Saulo keleenji ki komwei Daudi eng' Keila, ko mata kwo." 
1Samuel23:14 Ki tebee `Daudi irimoik eng' surkwen ak ki tebee emetap tuloonook eng' surkwen ne po Ziph. Ki cheeng'ei `Saulo ineendet eng' peetuut age tugul, ago ma inde `Kamuktaindet ineendet eunnyi." 
1Samuel23:15 Kingo mi Daudi surkwen ne po Ziph eng' timiin, konai anyun kole kagonyo saang' Saulo kocheeng' saboondanyi." 
1Samuel23:16 Ki ng'eet Jonathan weeriitap Saulo ak kwo ole mi Daudi eng' timiin kogimit ineendet eng' Kamuktaindet. 
1Samuel23:17 Ki leenji ineendet, “Meiywei, amu ma nyoorun eutap kwandanyu Saulo, ak iegu laitoryat eng' Israel, ak aegu ne rubin. Agot Saulo kwandanyu kongen nooto agine.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Ki iyomiskei tuwai eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki tebee Daudi timiin ak ko ki wo Jonathan koonnyi. 
1Samuel23:19 Ki pa anyun `Sipik kotogosta ole mi Saulo eng' Gibea koba koleenji, “Tos ma unyegei Daudi eng' olinnyo eng' irimoik che mi timiin eng' tulweetap Hakila, ne mi murot tai ne po surkwen?" 
1Samuel23:20 Ara anyun, ee laitoryandani nyoo choorugei ko uu mageet tugul ne po saboondang'ung', poisyennyo koginde ineendet eutap laitoryat.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Kowol `Saulo kole, “Ingoberuurok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu kaorireena." 
1Samuel23:22 Asoomok anyun ale oba ocheeng' komyee si ogeer ak onai ole mi, onai ineendet ne keerei ineendet eng' olooto, amu ki kimwaiwo keele poisyee ng'aalseet." 
1Samuel23:23 Ogeer anyun ak onai komoswek tugul ole ung'egei yeityo obwa kogeny yu ami oibu ng'aleek che po iman, si keebe tugul. Ngot komi emoni, acheeng'oti eng' eliphuusyek tugul che po Judah.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Ki ng'eetyo koba Ziph kondoe Saulo, ago kimi Daudi ak piikyik surkwen ne po Maon eng' Arabah murot tai ne po surkwen." 
1Samuel23:25 Ki pa Saulo ak piikyik koba kocheeng' ineendet. Ak ki ngemwachi Daudi, kochoortagei anyun kwo ole mi rwandet, ak ki tebee surkwen ne po Maon. Kingo kas Saulo, kwo koosup Daudi eng' surkwen ne po Maon." 
1Samuel23:26 Ak ki pun Saulo tulweet komosi, ak ki pun Daudi ak piikyik tulweet komosin. Kichaakta Daudi komwei amu ki iywei Saulo, amu kiyiem `Saulo ak piikyik Daudi kobooto piikyik kole konam." 
1Samuel23:27 Ago ki nyo chii komwachi Saulo koleenji, “Nyoo chogu, amu kagopookyi emet Philistiik.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Ki week anyun `Saulo mata koosup Daudi ak ki wo kobargei ak Philistiik. Kiguure yooto anyun Sela-hamalekot. 
1Samuel23:29 Ak kitogosta Daudi eng' yooto kwo komeny irimoigap En-gedi. 
1Samuel24:1 Ye kingo kagoweek `Saulo eng' kasubet ne ki isubi Philistiik, kemwachi keleenji, “Miitei Daudi surkwen ne po En-gedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Kingo kas ko uu nooto Saulo konam murenik eliphuusyek somok che ki kilewen eng' Israel tugul, koba kocheeng' Daudi ak piikyik eng' rwandosyegap sitok." 
1Samuel24:3 Ki it ole mi piusyegap keechiirek eng' ooreet eng' ole ki mi kebeneet. Ki wo Saulo oriit ak kotoretkei. Ki mi Daudi ak piikyik kebenooto oriit miising'. 
1Samuel24:4 Ak ki leenji `piikyik Daudi, “Eng' iman ko peetuut ni ne kimwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Andai punyondeng'ung' eung'ung', si iyachi kiit ne igeere ile myee eng' inyee.’ ” Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi kosapta ak kotil tabandap ngoryeetap Saulo eng' ung'oot." 
1Samuel24:5 Eng' let kogas Daudi ng'wanindo eng' muguleldanyi, amu kagotil tabandap ngoryeetap Saulo." 
1Samuel24:6 Ki leenji piikyik, “Ingolooit eng' anee eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si ma yachi kiptaiyandennyu ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kiy ne uu ni si ma chuul eunnyu ayachi kiy ne ya, amu ineendet ko ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Ki eetee anyun `Daudi piikyik ng'aleechuuto ama chamji kong'eetyo kobar Saulo. Ki ng'eet Saulo kwo eng' kebeneet ak kwo pandanyi. 
1Samuel24:8 Yeityo kong'eet Daudi agine ak kwo eng' kebeneet ak komwachi Saulo eng' kutit ne oo, koleenji, “Kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat.” Kingo kuskong' Saulo, kong'uruuk Daudi kot kotiiny togeennyi ng'wony, kogutung'ji." 
1Samuel24:9 Koleenji `Daudi Saulo, “Amu nee si igas ng'aleegap piik, che mwaei kole, ‘Cheeng'ei Daudi koyaun kiy ne ya?’" 
1Samuel24:10 Kaigeer eng' konyeguk rani ile kaindein Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyu eng' kebeneet. Kamwaiwo piik alage kole abariin, ago karirenen, ak kamwa ale, machuule eunnyu abare kiptaiyandennyu, amu ineendet ko ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel24:11 Kogeny, ee, keero abba keer walitap ngoryeeng'ung' ne mi eunnyu! Katil walitap ngoryeeng'ung' ak ma abariin, nai anyun ak igeer ile ma tinye yaityet anan ko pistoet eng' eunekyuk ak tomo ayaun tengek agot nganda icheeng'e saboondanyu ibar." 
1Samuel24:12 Ingooiyech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ingoyooktoiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugetuut eng' inyee, ago ma parin eunnyu." 
1Samuel24:13 Ko uu ye mwaei kalewenetap piik che po keny, kole, ‘Punu sogornateet sogoranik,’ ago ma parin eunnyu." 
1Samuel24:14 Kamong' saang' laitoryatap Israel koon ng'oo? Ioone ng'oo? Ioone seset ne ki kome, anan kimityat?" 
1Samuel24:15 Ingoek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogindet, kotil kirwooget eng' kwenunnyo, anee ak inyee, kogeer, kong'alaal agobo anee ak kosarwo eng' eung'ung'.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Kingo kagogees `Daudi ng'aleechooto kimwachin Saulo, komwa ineendet kole, “Kuting'ung' niito weeriinnyu Daudi?” Ak kiwaach Saulo eng' kutit ne oo." 
1Samuel24:17 Ki mwachi `laitoryat Daudi koleenji, “Ii po iman isiira, amu kaiyaiywo ne myee, ago ki ayaun ne ya." 
1Samuel24:18 Kaibarte rani ile kaiyaiywo ne myee, amu ko uu ye kaindea Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eung'ung', koma ibara." 
1Samuel24:19 Amu tos ngot konyoor chii punyondennyi, kobagaaktoi kwo kochamegei? Nooto anyun ingogoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myeeindo agobo nooto keyaiywo rani." 
1Samuel24:20 Nguno anyun, angen ale iegu laitoryat iman ak ki kimiti laitornatetap Israel eng' eung'ung'." 
1Samuel24:21 Iyosyeiwo anyun eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ile, meistoi iyotennyu che piitu let eng' anee ak ile megesu kainennyu eng' kootap abba.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Ara anyun ki iyasyechi `Daudi Saulo. Yeityo kwo Saulo kaa, ago kitogosta Daudi ak piikyik koba irimeet." 
1Samuel25:1 Kime Samuel, ak ki iyumgei Israel tugul ak koba koriirchi ineendet yeityo kotupchi ineendet koonnyi eng' Ramah. Ki ng'eet Daudi ak kochoortagei kwo surkwen ne po Paran." 
1Samuel25:2 Ki mi chii Maon ne ki mi tuguukyik Karmel. Ki chii ne ki tagunoot chiichooto ak ki tinyei keechiirek eliphuusyek somok ak ng'oroorek eliphuut agenge, ak kitilei koroorigap keechiirekyik eng' Karmel." 
1Samuel25:3 Kainetap chiichooto ko ki Nabal, ak kainetap osotyonnyi ko ki Abigail. Ki ng'oom osotyondonooto ak ko ki tinyei itoondo ne karaaran, ago ki uui met manong'otyonnyi ak ki yaach poisyonikyik. Ki po chiichi ooreetap Kaleb." 
1Samuel25:4 Kingo mi `Daudi surkwen, kogas keele tilei Nabal koroorigap keechiirekyik." 
1Samuel25:5 Ara ki iyookto anyun `Daudi murenik taman koleenji, “Otogoste Karmel ak obe ole mi Nabal ak ogat ineendet eng' kainennyu," 
1Samuel25:6 yeityo omwachi ineendet ne meng'iisyei eng' kaberuret oleenji, ‘Ingotep kaalyeet kobooten, kobooto koong'ung' ak tugul che itinye." 
1Samuel25:7 Kaagas keele itinye piik che tilei koroorigap keechiirek; kogotebi mestoweguk kobootech ama ki yachi kiy ne ya, anan kobetyi icheek kiy age tugul eng' peetuusyek tugul ye kimi Karmel." 
1Samuel25:8 Teebe murenjotoguget si komwaun. Ingonyoor anyun chameet murechuchuk eng' taing'ung', amu kagibwa eng' peetuut ne myee. Asoomin anyun ale, igoochi otwogiguk ak weeriing'ung' Daudi kiy age tugul ne itinye.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Ye kingo it murenjoto po Daudi, komwachi Nabal ng'aleechooto tugul eng' kainetap Daudi yeityo kosiisyo." 
1Samuel25:10 Ki wolji `Nabal otwogigap Daudi koleenji, “Daudi ko ng'oo? Ak weeriitap Jesse ko ng'oo? Chaang' otwogik peetuusyechu che mwee kiptaiyannywa." 
1Samuel25:11 Amu nee si anam amitwogikyuk, peekyuk, ak panyeek che kaeng'ji piikyuk che tilei koroorigap keechiirek ak agoochi piich che mangen ole punu?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Kiwelelgei anyun murenjoto po Daudi ak koweektagei ak koba komwachi ineendet ng'aleechuuto tugul. 
1Samuel25:13 Koleenji `Daudi piikyik, “Ingorat chii tugul rotwennyi po chok.” Ki rat chii tugul rotwennyi po chok ak ki rat Daudi agine rotwennyi po chok ak kotogosta murenik olo po pogol ang'wan koosup Daudi. Ago ki tebi murenik pogolwogik aeng'u koriip tuguuk." 
1Samuel25:14 Ago ki mwachi age eng' murenjoto Abigail osotyotap Nabal koleenji, “Ki iyook `Daudi piik kobwa eng' surkwen nyoo kogat kiptaiyandennyo ago ki nereekyi ineendet icheek." 
1Samuel25:15 Ago kiyaiywech ne myee kot pichooto ama amenech kiy, ama petwech kiy ye kita kemi tugul ye ki kimi kewanin." 
1Samuel25:16 Ki ek icheek ng'ootwennyo kemoi ak peet eng' peetuusyek tugul ye ki kimiitei tugul ak icheek kiyagi keechiirek. 
1Samuel25:17 Nai anyun ak ibwaat kiit ne iyae, amu kigetilji yaityet kiptaiyandennyo ak koonnyi tugul. Amu ineendet ko chii ne ya, ne uui met ak ma imuuchi chii kotwekyi.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Kichirchiren anyun Abigail ak konam magatiinik pogol aeng' ak sotonik aeng' che po divaik, ak keechiirek muut che kageeny che chobootiin, keruutik muut che nyiitootiin peek che kagegel, mooriik pogol che mi sabibuk che yamyotiin ak magatiinik pogol aeng' che po mogoonik ak koratyi sigiroik." 
1Samuel25:19 Yeityo koleenji piikyik, “Oba ondoena, anyoone asubwok.” Ago ki ma mwachi manong'otyondennyi Nabal." 
1Samuel25:20 Ye kita kobunei sigiryennyi, kochoortagei kobun ole ma taagu eng' tulweet, ko ki choorugei Daudi ak piikyik kotoorchingei ineendet ak kituiye icheek." 
1Samuel25:21 Kigale `Daudi, “Kaagaa ki ariip puch iman tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei chiichi eng' surkwen kot koma pet kiy eng' tuguukyik tugul, ak kagoweekwa yaityet eng' ne myee." 
1Samuel25:22 Ingoyachi Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto puunigap Daudi ak kotes koosir ngot abagaakte kiy age tugul ne nenyi mutai kaeech agot lakweet agenge ne ng'etet.” 
1Samuel25:23 Ye kingo keer `Abigail Daudi, kochoorgei eng' chokyinet eng' sigiryennyi ak kobutyi taitap Daudi, kong'uruuk kotiing'e togeet ng'wony." 
1Samuel25:24 Ki ibutyi keelyekyik ak koleenji, “Ingobunjo yaityoni kiptaiyandennyu, ingobunjo Asaain ale, chamji cheptong'ung' ne otwoget kong'alaal igas ak igasyi cheptong'ung' ne otwoget ng'aleekyik." 
1Samuel25:25 Asaain kiptaiyandennyu ale mat iit kipyaitwani ile kiy, amu ko uu kiit ne uu kainennyi, ko uu nooto ineendet. Kainennyi ko Nabal, ak tinyei abusnateet. Ma ageer anee cheptong'ung' ne otwogindet murenjoto po kiptaiyandennyu che kigeyagu." 
1Samuel25:26 Ara anyun kiptaiyandennyu, ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung', ak ko uu ye kietenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si metumde korotiik, si meyaaktochigei mugetuut eng' eung'ung', ko ingoigei puuniguk Nabal ak icheek che cheeng'jin yaityet kiptaiyandennyu." 
1Samuel25:27 Ingigoochi kagoochinoni kaipchin otwogindeng'ung' kiptaiyandennyu, ingigoochi murenik che isuboti kiptaiyandennyu." 
1Samuel25:28 Asaain ale nyochi kaat cheptong'ung' ne otwogindet lelutyennyi, amu igimiti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iman kootap kiptaiyandennyu, amu yaei kiptaiyandennyu lugosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama kinyoorchinin yaityet eng' peetuusyeguk tugul." 
1Samuel25:29 Nganda ng'eetei chii konaatiin ak kocheeng' saboondang'ung', ko ki kiratyi saboondap kiptaiyandennyu ratuutyetap saboondo kobooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ak wiirtoi ineendet saboondap puuniguk, ko uu ye ki wiirtoe loletap chemasindaryet." 
1Samuel25:30 Ye kagoyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu ko uu myeeindo tugul ne kimwaitaenen ak kondein iegu pounindetap Israel," 
1Samuel25:31 koma egu niito arageneet eng' inyee, ama egu kanagutyetap muguleldo eng' kiptaiyandennyu, ngot ko ki itumde korotiik puch, anan ngot ko ki koyaaktochigei mugetuut kiptaiyandennyu. Ak ye tuun kagoyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu kiit ne myee, ibwaat anyun cheptong'ung' ne otwogindet.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Ki leenji `Daudi Abigail, “Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel ne kaiyogun rani itorookwo." 
1Samuel25:33 Iberuurot ng'omnateng'ung', ak iberuurot inyee ne kaietena rani si ma tumde korotiik, amayaaktochigei mugetuut eng' eunnyu." 
1Samuel25:34 Amu iman, ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel ne kaetena si ma yaun kiit ne ya, nda ma ichogu itorookwo, ta kama kong'etyin Nabal agot lakweet agenge ne ng'etet mutai kaeech.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Yeityo kotaach anyun `Daudi tuguuk che kiga ipchi ineendet osotyondonooto, ak ye rook koleenji `Daudi ineendet, “Togoste ui kaa eng' kaalyeet, keero, kaagasun ak achamun ng'aleeguk.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Kingo it Abigail ole mi Nabal, ko ki tinyei ineendet igoorto ne uu igoortap laitoryat eng' koonnyi, ak ki paibai muguleldap Nabal amu kiga pogit kot. Ma mwachi kiy Abigail, ne ming'in anan ko ne oo agoi koeech." 
1Samuel25:37 Eng' karon ko kogasap Nabal, kogabek maiyek komwachi `osotyonnyi ineendet tuguuchuuto tugul ak kime muguleldanyi ak koigei ineendet koita." 
1Samuel25:38 Kingo keskei olo po peetuusyek taman, kobir Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Nabal, ak kime." 
1Samuel25:39 Ye kingo kas `Daudi kole kagome Nabal kole, “Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki korwookyinewa Nabal agobo chubeet ne ki chubo ak kieetee otwogindennyi yaityet. Ki weekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor metitap Nabal yaityennyi ne ki yai.” Yeityo koyookto `Daudi keng'alaalji Abigail si komut koek osotyonnyi." 
1Samuel25:40 Kingo it otwogigap Daudi ole mi Abigail eng' Karmel, kong'alaalji koleenji, “Kagoyokwech Daudi kebwa ole imi, si kimutin iegu osotyonnyi.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Ki ng'eet anyun ak kong'uruuk kotiing'e togeennyi ng'wony ak kole, “Otwogindet cheptong'ung' ne otwogindet ne iuni keelyegap otwogigap kiptaiyandennyu.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Kichirchiren Abigail ak kong'eet ak kolaany sigiryet kobooto tiibiik muut che ki tinyei che ki isup ineendet ak kwo koosup piigap Daudi ak ki ek osotyonnyi. 
1Samuel25:43 Ki imut `Daudi agine Ainoam ne po Jezreel ak ki ek tuwai osotikyik. 
1Samuel25:44 Kiga kogoochi `Saulo Mikal cheptonyi, ne ki osotyotap Daudi Palti weeriitap Lais ne ki po Galim." 
1Samuel26:1 Ki pwa Sipik ole mi Saulo eng' Gibea ak koleenji, “Tos ma unyegei Daudi eng' tulweetap Hakilah ne tokyingei surkwen?”" 
1Samuel26:2 Kong'eet anyun `Saulo kochoortagei kwo surkwen ne po Ziph komi ak murenik eliphuusyek somok che po Israel che ki kilewen, koba kocheeng'at Daudi eng' surkwen ne po Ziph." 
1Samuel26:3 Ki teech `Saulo emanyii eng' tulweetap Hakilah ne tokyingei surkwen ole ne neegitee ooreet. Ago ki tebee Daudi nenyi eng' surkwen ak ki keer kole kogosup `ineendet Saulo konyo surkwen. 
1Samuel26:4 Ki iyookto anyun `Daudi segeik ak ki inai komyee kole kogonyo Saulo. 
1Samuel26:5 Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi ak kwo ole kiga teech Saulo. Ki keer Daudi ole kiruee Saulo kobooto Abner weeriitap Ner ne ki kiptaiyatap lugeennyi. Kiruee `Saulo kwenutap kariisyek ak ki teech piik koyiem ineendet. 
1Samuel26:6 ki teebee anyun `Daudi Ahimelek Hitindet ak Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah, ng'etap kametap Joab koleenji, “Ng'oo ne nyoonei si kechoortegei tuwai ole mi Saulo?” Kole Abisai, “Kichoortoigei tuwai.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Ki it anyun Daudi ak Abisai kemoi ole mi piik, ak ogeero, kiruee `Saulo kwenutap kariisyek, ko lumdaat ng'otinnyi eng' ye neegitee metinnyi, ak kiruei Abner kobooto piik ko kayiem ineendet." 
1Samuel26:8 Koleenji anyun `Abisai Daudi, “Kagonde Kamuktaindet eung'ung' punyondeng'ung' rani, ara anyun, asoomin ale chamwo atoor ineendet eng' ng'otit, atoore agenge kosore ak matoore kogeny asakyini.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Ago ki leenji `Daudi Abisai, “Amebar, amu ng'oo ne imuuchi kochuul eunnyi ak kobar ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama nyoor ng'oogisto?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Yeityo kole `Daudi, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobarei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet anan koityi peetuunnyi ne meei anan kwo lugeet kwo komechi olooto." 
1Samuel26:11 Ingolooit eng' anee eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si ma chuul eunnyu abar ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago asoomin ale ip ng'otit ne mi ye neegitee metinnyi kobooto soteetap peek yeityo keebe.” 
1Samuel26:12 Ki ip anyun `Daudi ng'otit ak soteetap peek che ki mi ye neegitee metitap Saulo, ak ki pa ama keer chii anan konai. Ma kos chii age tugul, amu ki ruitos tugul amu ki ibutyi icheek rwondo ne nyigiis ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Samuel26:13 Yeityo kwo Daudi pitoniin ak kotonon eng' tulweet parak eng' ole loo. Ki loochin kot. 
1Samuel26:14 Kitwekyi `Daudi piik kobooto Abner weeriitap Ner, koleenji, “Tos mewoluu kiy Abner?” Ak ki wol Abner kole, “Ii ng'oo inyee nooto itwekyini laitoryat?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Ak ki leenji `Daudi Abner, “Tos ma ii muren? Ak tos ng'oo ne kergei ak inyee eng' Israel? Amu nee anyun si meriip kiptaiyandeng'ung' laitoryat? Konyo chii eng' piik konyo kobar lairtoryat kiptaiyandeng'ung'." 
1Samuel26:16 Ma myee kii koiyai. Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, konyaaljinok obegu, amu ma oriip kiptaiyandeng'wong', ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ocheeng' oroo. Mi ano ng'otitap laitoryat ak soteetap peek cho komi ye neegitee metinnyi?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Kingo nai `Saulo kutitap Daudi, kole, “Kuting'ung' nooto inyee weeriinnyu Daudi?” Kowol Daudi kole, “Ee, kutinnyu nooto kiptaiyandennyu, ee, laitoryat." 
1Samuel26:18 Amu nee si kosubot `kiptaiyandennyu otwogindennyi? Koayai nee? Anan nee yaityet ne mi eunekyuk? 
1Samuel26:19 Nooto anyun asoomin ale, ingogas `kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat ng'aleegap otwogindennyi. Ngot ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ing'eetin iyaiywo ne ya, ko ingotaach ineendet kagoochinet. Ago ngot ko weeriigap piik, ko ingoek icheek che chubootiin eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu kagoona icheek rani si ma ki namgei ak pororyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleen, ‘Ui ioot kamuktaik alak.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Ara anyun, amat kotumjigei ng'wony korotiikyuk eng' ole looe ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kanyo laitoryatap Israel kocheeng' kimityat ko uu ye cheeng'ei chiito taiywet eng' tuloonook.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Kole anyun Saulo, “Kaayai tengek. Weeigei weeriinnyu Daudi, ma ayaun kiy ne ya kogeny. Amu kabunji kamanuut ne oo rani saboondanyu eng' taing'ung'. Kaayai perberyo ak ko kaalel miising'.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Ki wol Daudi kole, “Keer ng'otit o, ee laitoryat! Ingonyo anyun age eng' murenik pitoni si koip." 
1Samuel26:23 Yaakyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chii age tugul imandanyi ak myeeindonyi; amu kagondein `ineendet eunnyu rani ago ma acham achuul eunnyu abar ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Samuel26:24 Kogeny, kaariree rani saboondang'ung' amu tinyei kamanuutyet ne oo eng' tainnyu, ko uu nooto anyun ingosich agine saboondanyu kamanuutyet ne oo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ingosarwo ineendet eng' nyalilda tugul.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Koleenji anyun `Saulo Daudi, “Ingiberuurin weeriinnyu Daudi; ta iyae tuguuk che eecheen ak ibelisyei iman.” Kwo anyun Daudi pandanyi ak ki week Saulo kwo oldanyi." 
1Samuel27:1 Ki mwa Daudi eng' muguleldanyi kole, “Tatun amechini eunegap Saulo. Ma mi kiy ne myee kosiir amwechi emetap Philistiik, si kogeskei kamang'unetap Saulo, si ma kocheeng'a kogeny eng' kiwotosyek tugul che po Israel, ak achilile eunekyik.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Ara king'eet `Daudi kolanda ak piik pogol lo che ki mi kobooto ineendet kot koit ole mi Akis weeriitap Maok laitoryatap Gath. 
1Samuel27:3 Ki tebi Daudi ak Akis eng' Gath kobooto piikyik. Ki tebi chii age tugul ak piigap koonnyi agot Daudi ak osotikyik aeng', Ainoam Jesreelyot, ak Abigail Chepkarmelyot ineendet ne ki osotyotap Nabal." 
1Samuel27:4 ki ngemwachi `Saulo keleenji, kogomwechi Daudi Gath, ko mata kocheeng'at ineendet kogeny." 
1Samuel27:5 Ki leenji `Daudi Akis, “Ngot ko koanyooru myeeindo eng' taing'ung', ko ingogoono oldo eng' age eng' nganasoogap emoni, si kobiit ameny olooto. Amu kalya si komeny otwogindeng'ung' nganaseetap laitoryat kobooten?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Ara ki igoochi anyun Akis ineendet Ziklag eng' peetuunooto. Nooto anyun ki punji Ziklag laitorinigap Judah agoi ra. 
1Samuel27:7 Ki meny `Daudi emetap Philistiik peetuusyek che itei kenyiit agenge ak arawek ang'wan. 
1Samuel27:8 Ki togosta anyun `Daudi ak piikyik kobookyi Gesurik, Girsik ak Amelegik, amu chooto ko ki piik che ki menyei emonooto, piik che ki po keny, eng' ooreet ne kibunei kebendi Sur agoi emetap Misiri." 
1Samuel27:9 Ki par `Daudi emonooto, ama pagaakta muren anan kwony kosap. Ki nyaban keechiirek, tuuga, sigiroik, tambeesik ak ngoroik ak koweek kwo kap Akis." 
1Samuel27:10 ki teebee Akis koleenji, “Kobar ano ra?” Ak ki le Daudi, “Kagibar murot tai ne po Judah, kobooto murot tai ne po Jeramelik ak murot tai ne po Kenik.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Ma pagaakta Daudi muren anan kwony kosap, si ma imut koba Gath amu ki le, “Si ma mwaitech kole, ‘Ki yai ko uu nooto Daudi ak kiyaei ko uu nooto eng' pitennyi eng' peetuusyek tugul che ki meny emetap Philistiik.’ ”" 
1Samuel27:12 Ki iyan Akis ng'aleegap Daudi kole, “Kagogoochi piikyik Israel kowech ineendet miising', nooto anyun egu otwogindennyu agoi.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Ki iyum Philistiik lugosyekwak eng' peetuusyechooto koba lugeet kobargei ak Israel. Ki leenji `Akis Daudi, “Nai komyee ile kibendi tuwai lugeet kobooto mureniguk.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Kowolji `Daudi Akis koleenji, “Nooto anyun, inae kiit ne yaei otwogindeng'ung'.” Koleenji `Akis Daudi, “Nooto anyun, ayain iegu ne iriibwa metinnyu agoi.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Eng' kasarata, ko kiga kome Samuel ak kiga koriirchi Israel tugul ineendet ak kotupchi ineendet Ramah, nganasennyi. Kiga koon `Saulo che kiboisyee oik ak chepsogeinik eng' emet." 
1Samuel28:4 Ki iyumgei `Philistiik ak koba koteech Sunem, ak ki iyum `Saulo Israel tugul ak koteech Gilboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Kingo keer `Saulo lugeetap Philistiik, koywei ak ki rukrugen muguleldanyi miising'." 
1Samuel28:6 Ye kingo leen koteebe `Saulo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma kowolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' karwotitaosyek anan eng' Urim, anan eng' maotik." 
1Samuel28:7 Koleenji anyun `Saulo otwogikyik, “Ocheeng'wo kwondo ne poisyee oik, si awo ole mi ineendet ak ateepse.” Ak ki wolji `otwogikyik ineendet, “Mi kwony agenge En-dor ne ng'oorsei.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Kiwalgei `Saulo kolaach ngoroik alak yeityo kwo ineendet kobooto piik aeng' ak ki it kemoi ole ki mi kwonyooto. Ki leenji `Saulo kwonyooto, “Asoomin ale ng'oorsewa eng' oindet ak imutwaa kotogos chii age tugul ne amwaun kainennyi.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Koleenji `kwonyooto ineendet, “Ingen inyee kiit ne ki koyai `Saulo koisto eng' emet icheeget che poisyee oik, ak chepsogeinik. Amu nee si iriich saboondanyu, igoono ame?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Ki iyasyechi `Saulo ineendet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma mi pireet ne inyooru agobo kiito.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Ki le anyun `kwonyooto, “Ng'oo ne imache amutun kotogos?” Ak ki le, “Imutwaa Samuel kotogos.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Kingo keer `kwonyooto Samuel, kowaach eng' kutit ne oo ak komwachi Saulo koleenji, “Amu nee si igena? Ii Saulo inyee.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Koleenji `laitoryat ineendet, “Meiywei, igeere nee?” Ak ki leenji `kwonyooto Saulo, “Ageere kamuktain ne togosu eng' ng'wony.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Koteebe `Saulo ineendet koleenji, “Tinyei itoondo nee?” Kowol kole, “Poiyot ne togosu ne ilaachi ngoryeet.” Konai Saulo kole Samuel nooto, ak ki ing'uruuk kot kotiiny togeennyi ng'wony kogutung'ji." 
1Samuel28:15 Ki mwachi `Samuel Saulo koleenji, “Amu nee si iima imutwaa atogos?” Kowolji `Saulo koleenji, “Atinye nyalilda ne ng'waan amu kabwa Philistiik kebarge ak ki kometa Kamuktaindet, ama kowolwo kiy eng' maotik anan eng' karwotitaosyek. Nooto anyun kaguurin si kobiit iboorwo kiit ne ayae.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Koleenji `Samuel, “Amu nee si iteebena ago ki kometen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koek punyondeng'ung'?" 
1Samuel28:17 Kigoboisyechigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki mwa eng' anee. Ki kobetenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatet ak kogoochi chiitap kokweng'ung' Daudi. 
1Samuel28:18 Amu ma igas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ama isuldochi nereegekyik che koroomen eng' Amelek, ko kayaun anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kii rani amu nooto." 
1Samuel28:19 Kogeny, kondai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eunegap Philistiik kobooten aginye. Omite mutai kobooto, inyee ak weeriiguk; ak kogeny kondoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lugeetap Israel eunegap Philistiik.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Ki ibutyi ng'wony Saulo anyun kogutuny, ak ki aragen miising' amu ng'aleegap Samuel. Ki ma kota kotinyei kimnateet, amu ki ma amis eng' peetuut komugul anan kemout komugul." 
1Samuel28:21 Kingo nyo `kwonyooto ole mi Saulo ak kogeer kole tinyei arageneet ne oo, koleenji ineendet, “Kagas cheptong'ung' ne otwogindet ng'aleeguk ak kaande saboondanyu eunnyu, ak kaayai ng'aleek che kemwaiwo." 
1Samuel28:22 Asoomin anyun ale, igas ng'aleegap cheptong'ung' ne otwoget, ak chamwo aibun amitwogik tutigin ande taing'ung', iam, si kobiit isich kimnateet eng' pandang'ung'.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Ago ki eesyo Saulo ak kole, “Ma ame.” Ago kingo pirchi ineendet otwogikyik ak kwonyooto, kogas ng'aleekwak. Ki ng'eet eng' ng'wony ak kotebee itoogut." 
1Samuel28:24 Ki tinyei kwonyooto eng' ko moita ne neraat. Ara kichaakta kwo koeny. Ki inem peek ak kokwany ak kobeel magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek. 
1Samuel28:25 Yeityo koip amitwogichooto ak kogoochi Saulo ak otwogikyik koam. Ki am icheek yeityo kong'eetyo ak koba pandanywa kemounooto. 
1Samuel29:1 Ki iyumji anyun `Philistiik lugosyekwak tugul Apek: ak ki teech Israel ye neegitee kondap peek ne mi Jezreel. 
1Samuel29:2 Kingo pendi kiptainigap Philistiik, kobee pogolwogik ak eliphuusyek, kogiletu Daudi ak piikyik kobooto Akis." 
1Samuel29:3 Kiteep `pounigap Philistiik kole, “Yaei nee Hebranichu?” Ak ki wolji `Akis pounigap Philistiik koleenji, “Niito ko Daudi niito otwogindetap Saulo laitoryatap Israel, ne mi kobooto eng' peetuusyechu anan eng' kenyisyechu, ak tomo anyooru leluut eng' ineendet.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Ago ki nereekyi `ineendet pounigap Philistiik. Ki leenji pounigap Philistiik ineendet, “Ileenji chiichi koweek, koweektagei oldanyi ole ki iboorchi amat kochoortagei kwo lugeet kobootech si ma ek punyondennyo eng' ole mi lugeet, Nee ne igoochin konamgei ak kiptaiyandennyi? Tos ma eng' metowegap pichu?" 
1Samuel29:5 Tos ma Daudi niito, ne kityenjingei icheek agobo ineendet eng' ureryosyek kole, ‘Ki par `Saulo eliphuusyek, kobar `Daudi tamanusyegap eliphuusyek.’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Ara ki kuur anyun `Akis Daudi ak koleenji, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki itebi eng' imanda ak myee eng' tainnyu mandaeng'ung' ak nyonuneng'ung' kobooto eng' lugeet. Amu tomo anyoorchin yaityet kobooch inyoo ole ami agoi rani, agot nganda uu nooto, koma chamin kiptainik." 
1Samuel29:7 Ara anyun weektegei, ui eng' kaalyeet si megoochi kiptainigap Philistiik konereekso.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Ago ki leenji `Daudi Akis, “Koayai nee? Ak koinyoorchi nee otwogindeng'ung' kobooch ye ki ami taing'ung' agoi rani, si ma we kebarge ak puunigap kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Kowolji `Akis Daudi koleenji, “Angen ale ii myee eng' tainnyu ko uu malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet, ago kagomwa pounigap Philistiik kole, ‘Ma kibendi tugul lugeet kobooto ineendet.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Nooto anyun, muste karon kobooto otwogigap kiptaiyandeng'ung' che koobwane tugul: ak ye ong'eetyee karon ko kaeech ko kalapkeit, obe.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Ki ng'eet anyun `Daudi karon miising' ak piikyik, si koba karon koweektagei emetap Philistiik, ak kitogosta Philistiik koba Jezreel." 
1Samuel30:1 Kingo it `Daudi ak piikyik Ziklag eng' peetuutap somok, ko kiga kopookyi Amelegik murot tai ak Ziklag ak kiga kobar Ziklag ak kobeel eng' maat;" 
1Samuel30:2 Kiga koluul kwonyiik che ki mi yooto, che mengech ak che eecheen. Ma par chii age tugul ago kiluul ak koba." 
1Samuel30:3 Kingo it `Daudi ak piikyik nganaseet, ko kiga kebeel ak keluul osotikwak, weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak." 
1Samuel30:4 Kiwaach `Daudi ak piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet, ak koriiryo kot koma komuuchi koriiryo." 
1Samuel30:5 Kiga kiluul osotigap Daudi tuwai, Ainoam Jesreelyot ak Abigail ne ki osotyotap Nabal Karmelindet." 
1Samuel30:6 Ki iimgei miising' `Daudi, amu ki mwa piik kole kilache ineendet eng' koik, amu ki aragenso saboonwegap piik tugul ak ki aragen chii age tugul agobo weeriikyik ak tiibiikyik, ago ki igimitkei Daudi eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi." 
1Samuel30:7 Ki leenji `Daudi Abiathar tisiindet, weeriitap Ahimelek, “Asoomin iibwo ephod konyo yu.”" 
1Samuel30:8 Kingo ip koteebe `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Tos ngot asup lugoni, aname?” Kowolji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Isup, amu iname iman, ak ne matiny isaru tuguuk tugul.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Ki wo `Daudi anyun, kobooto murenik pogol lo che ki mi kobooto ineendet, kot koit kererutap Besor, ole kiga tebee piik che kigang'et." 
1Samuel30:10 Ago ki isup `Daudi pichooto kobooto murenik pogol ang'wan. Amu ki tebi piik pogolwogik aeng'u che ki ma imuuchi kolandae kererutap Besor amu kiga kong'etyo miising'. 
1Samuel30:11 Ki nyoor `pichooto Misirindet eng' keeweet ak ki imutyi Daudi. Ki igoochi amitwogik ak ki am ak ki inaga peek koe. 
1Samuel30:12 Yeityo kogoochi magatyat ne ming'in ne po mogoonik ak mooriik aeng' che po sabibuk che yamyotiin. Kingo kagoam kosap, amu ki ma am kiy anan koe peek eng' peetuusyek somok ak kemousyek somok." 
1Samuel30:13 ki teebee `Daudi ineendet koleenji, “Ii po kap ng'oo? Ak ibunu ano?” Ki wol kole, “Aa muren ne po Misiri ak aa otwogindetap Amelegindet. Ki pagaakta kiptaiyandennyu amu ki amyan eng' peetuusyechu somok." 
1Samuel30:14 Kiga kibookyi murot tai ne po Keretik, kap Judah ak kap Kaleb ne mi murot tai ak ki kibeel Ziklag eng' maat.”" 
1Samuel30:15 koteebee `Daudi ineendet koleenji, “Tos ichame imuta ole mi lugonooto?” Kowol kole, “Iyosyeiwo eng' Kamuktaindet ile mebara anan indea eunegap kiptaiyandennyu, si amutin ole mi lugonooto.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Ye kingo kagomut kochoortagei, ko kiga koyom pichooto ola tugul eng' emet, koamisyei ak koeisei. Ki urerendos amu parunenik che chaang' che kiga luul eng' emetap Philistiik ak eng' emetap Judah." 
1Samuel30:17 Ki par `Daudi icheek kobooch ko karatarat agoi koskoleng'utap peetuut ne po aeng', ama chilil chii agot agenge, kobatee murenik pogol ang'wan che ki laany tambeesik ak komwei." 
1Samuel30:18 Ki sar `Daudi tugul che kiga luul Amelegik. Ki sar `Daudi kora osotikyik tuwai. 
1Samuel30:19 Ki ma petee kiy icheek, ngo ne ming'in anan ko ne oo, ngo weeriik anan ko tiibiik anan ko parunenik anan ko kiy age tugul ne kiga ip, ko ki ip Daudi tugul koweek." 
1Samuel30:20 Ki kweri `Daudi akwotisyek tugul che po keechiirek ak che po tuuga, che ki kweri murenik kondoe tuuga alak ak koleen, “Chuuto ko parunenigap Daudi.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Ki it anyun Daudi ole ki mi murenjoto pogolwogik aeng'u, che kiga kong'etyo miising' kot ko mata komuuch koosup Daudi, che kiga mwechi ak kotebee kererutap Besor. Ki pa kotorookta Daudi ak piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet. Kingo riikyi `Daudi pichooto, kogat icheek." 
1Samuel30:22 Ago ki wol anyun piik tugul che yaacheen, ak che uueen metowoi eng' piik che kigaba ak Daudi kole, “Ma kigoochini icheek kiy age tugul eng' parunenik che kagiweegu amu ki ma kibe tugul, kobatee kityo kigoochin chii tugul osotyonnyi ak lagokyik, si komut ak koba.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Ago ki le `Daudi, “Amat oyai ko uu nooto che kitupche eng' tuguuk che kogoonech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne koriibech, ak koinde eunekyok lugoni koibookyinech." 
1Samuel30:24 Ng'oo ne kasok eng' ng'aleechu? Amu ko uu ole tenitu kebebertap ne wendi lugeet, kotenitu nooto kebebertap ne tebyei koriibei tuguuk, pcheei koaechin.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Ki ek ko uu nooto kobooch peetuunooto agoi. Ki yai koek ng'atuutyet ak kayomiset agobo Israel agoi rani. 
1Samuel30:26 Kingo nyo `Daudi Ziklag, koyookyi parunenik poisyegap Judah, icheeget che ki choronokyik ak kole, “Kagoochineng'wong' ne po parunenigap puunigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Ki iyookyi che ki mi Bethel, che ki mi Ramot ne po murot tai, che ki mi Jatir," 
1Samuel30:28 che ki mi Aroer, che ki mi Sipmot, che ki mi Estemoa;" 
1Samuel30:29 che ki mi Rakal, che ki mi nganasoogap Jerameelik, che ki mi nganasoogap Kenik," 
1Samuel30:30 che ki mi Horma, che ki mi Korasan, che ki mi Atak," 
1Samuel30:31 ak che ki mi Hebron ak komoswek tugul che ki cham koitei Daudi ak murenikyik. 
1Samuel31:1 Ki pargei anyun Philistiik ak Israel; ak kimweiso murenigap Israel eng' taitap Philistiik ak kebar kobutyo eng' tulweetap Gilboa. 
1Samuel31:2 Ki oon `Philistiik miising' Saulo ak weeriikyik. Kingo riikyi, kobar Jonathan, Abinadab ak Malkisua, weeriichooto po Saulo." 
1Samuel31:3 Ki koromit pooryeet miising' eng' Saulo, ak kingo oon ineendet mwogik, koriich ak konyaliil." 
1Samuel31:4 Eng' yooto, koleenji anyun `Saulo chiito ne ki ipchin kariikyik, “Ng'usu rotweng'ung' po chok ak itoorena, si ma pwa pichu ma kimuratan, kotoora, ak kogengeniena.” Ago ma cham chiito ne ki ipchin kariikyik, amu ki iywei kot. Ara ki inem anyun Saulo rotwennyi po chok ak kobutyi." 
1Samuel31:5 Kingo keer chiito ne ki ipchin kariik kole, kagome Saulo, kobutyi agine rotwennyi po chok, ak kime kobooto ineendet." 
1Samuel31:6 Ki me anyun Saulo, kobooto weeriikyik somok, ak chiito ne ki ipchin kariikyik ak piikyik tugul, eng' peetuunak." 
1Samuel31:7 Kingo keer piigap Israel che ki mi atebweet komosin ak icheek che ki mi Jordan pitoniin, kole kagomweiso piigap Israel ak kagome Saulo ak weeriikyik, kobagaakta nganasook ak komwei. Ak ki pwa Philistiik komeng'iis." 
1Samuel31:8 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi nooto, ye kingo pwa Philistiik kobut piik che kiga kibar, konyoor Saulo ak weeriikyik somok ko kagobek eng' tulweetap Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Kitil metinnyi ak koreegune kariikyik, yeityo koyookto kemwaita eng' emetap Philistiik komoswek tugul, keip ng'aleechooto koba kootap kanamonikwak ak koipchi piik." 
1Samuel31:10 Ki inde kariikyik kootap Astarot ak koratyi muustonyi inaatutap Beth-san. 
1Samuel31:11 Kingo kas piik che ki menyei Jabes-gilead agobo kiit ne ki yachi `Philistiik Saulo," 
1Samuel31:12 kong'eetyo murenik tugul che nyigoonen ak koba eng' kemout komugul. Ki inem muustap Saulo ak muuswegap weeriikyik eng' inaatutap Beth-san ak koba kot koit Jabes ak kobeel eng' olooto muuswechooto. 
1Samuel31:13 Yeityo koip kawekwak ak kotupchi keetit keel eng' Jabes, ak korugutkei peetuusyek tisap." 
2Samuel1:1 Kingo pata meetap Saulo, ko kagoweek Daudi kobunu pareetap Amelegik, kobeni Daudi peetuusyek aeng' eng' Ziklag." 
2Samuel1:2 Eng' peetuutap somok, konyo chiito kobun nganaseet ne ki mi Saulo, ko kereerotiin ngoroikyik ak komi ng'ung'unyek metinnyi. Ye kingo it ole mi Daudi, kobutyi ng'wony ak kogutuny koganyit laitoryat." 
2Samuel1:3 Ki teebee `Daudi ineendet koleenji, “Ibunu ano?” Ak ki wol kole, “Koachilili eng' kambitap Israel.”" 
2Samuel1:4 koteebee `Daudi ineendet koleenji, “Kitepto ano ng'aleek? Kanyool iman imwaiwo.” Ki wol kole, “Kimweiso piik eng' lugeet ak kogeny ko ki ibutyot piik che chaang' ak kobek. Ki kome agine Saulo ak Jonathan weeriinnyi.”" 
2Samuel1:5 koteebee `Daudi murenonooto kimwachin ineendet koleenji, “Inae nee ile ki kome Saulo ak Jonathan weeriinnyi?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Koleenji murenenooto Daudi, “Ye kita ami tulweetap Gilboa, ko ki mi Saulo ko katiegei ng'otinnyi. Ki oonei ineendet miising' `kariisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek." 
2Samuel1:7 Ye kingo welelgei, kogeero ak kotwekwo ak ki awolji aleenji, ‘Ami yu.’" 
2Samuel1:8 koteebeena koleenjo, ‘Ii ng'oo?’ Ak ki awolji aleenji, ‘Aa Amelegin.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Ak ki leenjo, ‘Asoomin ale itononeno eng' yu ami ak ibara amu kagotirityo nga ta asabe.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ki atonone anyun ineendet eng' yooto ki miitei ak abar, amu ki anai eng' iman ale ma komuuchi kosap ko kagobut. Ki anemu kuutweetap laitornatet ne ki mi metinnyi ak karnet ne ki mi eunnyi, ak kaaibu kobwa yu aipchi kiptaiyandennyu.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Ki nam anyun `Daudi ngoroikyik kogereer. Ki yai ko uu nooto piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet yooto. 
2Samuel1:12 Ki iteiyo ak koriiryo ak korugutkei agoi koskoleny agobo Saulo, Jonathan weeriinnyi, agobo piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kootap Israel che ki pek eng' rotoogap chok." 
2Samuel1:13 Ki teebee `Daudi murenonooto ki mwachin ineendet ng'aleechooto koleenji, “Ii po kap ng'oo?” Ak ki wol kole, “Aa weeriitap punootyot, Amelegindet.”" 
2Samuel1:14 koteebee anyun `Daudi ineendet koleenji, “Kolya si meiywei ichuul eung'ung' ibar ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Kingo pata, koguur `Daudi age eng' murenik ak koleenji, “Riikte, ibar ineendet.” Ak ki ep ineendet koobut ak kome." 
2Samuel1:16 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi ineendet, “Ingotebee korotiguk meting'ung' amu kagobaoryan kuting'ung' korwogun kole, ‘Ki abar ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Ki riirchi `Daudi Saulo ak Jonathan weeriinnyi eng' riirechu," 
2Samuel1:18 ak ki mwachi icheek koneet piigap Judah tyendap kwanget, (ki kisirchi bukuitap Jasar):" 
2Samuel1:19 Ee Israel, ki kibar toroornateng'ung' eng' komosweguk che torooreen! Ki ibututa ano che kiimeen!" 
2Samuel1:20 Mat omwaite eng' Gath, mat obarte eng' ortinwegap Askelon; si ma poiboitu tiibiigap Philistiik, si ma iloskei tiibiigap che ma kimuratan." 
2Samuel1:21 Okweek tuloonoogap Gilboa, Mat kobiitunenak rewoot anan ropta anan mbareenik che mbareenigap kagoochinoik: Amu ki kiwiirta eng' teweernateet long'eetap ineendet ne kiim eng' olooto, Long'eetap Saulo, ne ma koilaat eng' mwaita." 
2Samuel1:22 Eng' korotiigap che ki kibar, eng' mwanigap che kiimeen, koma week let kwangetap Jonathan, ama week puch rotwetap chok ne po Saulo." 
2Samuel1:23 Ki korooron Saulo ak Jonathan, ak ki chamaatiin eng' saboonwekwak, Ak ma pesyo eng' sabeennywa anan eng' meennywa; Ki chepcheben kosiir kipsichinik, Ki kiimeen kosiir ng'etuunyik." 
2Samuel1:24 Okweek tiibiigap Israel, oriirye agobo Saulo, ineendet ne ki ilaakwok ngoroik che piriireen che po poiboiyet, ne ki inde lelestap thahabu ngoroikwok." 
2Samuel1:25 Ki ibututa ano che kiimeen eng' kwenutap pooryeet! Ki kibar Jonathan eng' komosweguk che torooreen. 
2Samuel1:26 Aarageni amu inyee, tupchennyu Jonathan: Ki igoono abaibait miising': Ki po kwong'eet chamyeng'ung' ne ki ichama, ki siirei chamyetap kwonyiik." 
2Samuel1:27 Ki ibututa ano che kiimeen, ki petyo kariigap lugeet!" 
2Samuel2:1 Kingo pata tuguuchuuto koteebe `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Atogoste awe age eng' nganasoogap Judah?” Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koleenji, “Togoste.” koteebee `Daudi koleenji, “Atogoste awe ano?” Ak ki leenji, “Ui Hebron.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Kotogosta anyun `Daudi olooto kobooto osotikyik aeng', Ainoam Jesreelyot ak Abigail ne ki osotyotap Nabal Karmelindet." 
2Samuel2:3 Ki imut `Daudi piikyik che ki mi kobooto ineendet kotogosta, ak ki wo chii tugul ak piigap koonnyi, ak komeny nganasoogap Hebron." 
2Samuel2:4 Ki pwa piigap Judah kobwa koiil Daudi eng' olooto koek laitoryatap kootap Judah. Ki ngemwachi Daudi keleenji ki piigap Jabes-gilead che ki tubei Saulo," 
2Samuel2:5 koyookto `Daudi piik koba oldap piigap Jabes-gilead koleenji icheek, “Ingoberuurok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki oboorchi myeini kiptaiyandeng'wong', nooto ko Saulo otup ineendet." 
2Samuel2:6 Ingoboorwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogoonok myeeindo ak imanit, ak ayaakwok agane myeiniito amu ki oyai kiito." 
2Samuel2:7 Ingogimegitu anyun eunekwok ak oegu che nyigoonen, amu kogome Saulo kiptaiyandeng'wong', ak kogoiila kootap Judah aek laitoryat eng' icheek.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Kiga komut Abner weeriitap Ner, ne ki kiptaiyatap lugeetap Saulo, Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo kolanda Mahanaim." 
2Samuel2:9 Ki inde ineendet koek laitoryat koboi Gilead, Ashurik, Jezreel, Ephraim, Benjamin ak koboi Israel tugul." 
2Samuel2:10 (Ki po Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo kenyiisyek artam ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek aeng'.) Ago ki isup `kootap Judah Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Ak peetuusyek che ki laitoran Daudi eng' Hebron eng' kootap Judah ko ki kenyiisyek tisap ak arawek lo. 
2Samuel2:12 Ki pa Abner weeriitap Ner ak otwogigap Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo kong'etee Mahanaim koba Gibeon. 
2Samuel2:13 Ki pa ak icheek Joab weeriitap Zeruiah ak otwogigap Daudi ak kituiyechi ak Abner tamboiyotap Gibeon. Ki ibuure alak tamboiyot komosi, kobuure alak tamboiyot komosin." 
2Samuel2:14 Ki leenji `Abner Joab, “Asoomin ale ingong'eetyo murenik kourerenso eng' tainnyo.” Kowol Joab kole, “Ingong'eetyo.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Ki ng'eetyo anyun koba ak ki kiit; ki taman ak aeng' che po Benjamin ak che po Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo, ak ki taman ak aeng' che po otwogigap Daudi." 
2Samuel2:16 Ki nam age tugul metitap age ak kotoorgei karasaik eng' rotoogap chok, ak ki ibutyo tuwai. Ki kiguure yooto anyun Helkat-hasurim ne miitei Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:17 Kiga koromit pooryeet miising' eng' peetuunooto ak ki kiterteer Abner kobooto piigap Israel eng' taitap otwogigap Daudi. 
2Samuel2:18 Ki mi yooto weeriik somogu che po Zeruiah: Joab, Abisai ak Asahel. Ki chepchep Asahel ko uu cheptirgichet." 
2Samuel2:19 Ki oon `Asahel Abner. Ma masta kwo eutap tai anan ko murot kaataam ye ki oonei Abner. 
2Samuel2:20 Kiguskong' Abner ak koteebe koleenji, “Tos inyee ni Asahel?” Kowol kole, “Anee.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Ak ki leenji `Abner ineendet, “Ui taban, eutap tai anan ko ne po kaataam ak inam age eng' murenjo yeityo irebe kariikyik.” Ago ma cham Asahel komasta kobagaakta ineendet." 
2Samuel2:22 Ak ki leenji `Abner Asahel kogeny, “Ui taban, mata isubwo, amu nee si imach atoorin kosorenen? Si kota amukta ano anyun ageer togeetap Joab ng'eetap kamenng'ung'?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Ago kingo eesyo komasta, kotoor anyun `Abner ineendet moet eng' chileiywotap ng'otit kosore. Ki ibut eng' yooto ak komechi yooto. Kitononso anyun tugul che ki it yooto kigebutyi Asahel ak kome." 
2Samuel2:24 Ago ki oon `Joab ak Abisai Abner. Ye kingo roroktoi asiista, koit tulweetap Ama, ne mi taitap Gia eng' ooreet ne wendi surkwen ne po Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:25 Ki iyumgei lagogap Benjamin konamgei ak Abner koek lugeet agenge yeityo kotononso eng' tulweet parak. 
2Samuel2:26 Ki kuur `Abner Joab koleenji, “Tos parisyei rotweet agoi? Mengen ile egu ng'wanindo eng' let? Tyanitu si imwachi piik koweek ko mata koosup che tupcho?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Kowol kole Joab, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet, ko nda kama ing'alaal ta kagoba piik iman atkai karon, ta kama kosubi chii tugul tupchennyi.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Ki kuut anyun Joab iryageet ak kitononso piik tugul, mata koon Israel kogeny anan kota koboryo kogeny." 
2Samuel2:29 Ki pa Abner ak piikyik kemounooto tugul kobun Arabah ak kilandae Jordan kobun tugul Pitron ak ki it Mahanaim. 
2Samuel2:30 Ki week anyun Joab ma ta koosup Abner. Kingo kagoyum piik tugul, ko ki petyotiin eng' otwogigap Daudi piik tamanu ak sogool kobooto Asahel." 
2Samuel2:31 Ago kiga kobar otwogigap Daudi che po Benjamin ak murenigap Abner kot kobek piik pogolwogik somogu ak tamanwogik lo. 
2Samuel2:32 Kila `icheek Asahel ak kotupchi kereritap kwandanyi ne ki miitei Bethlehem. Yeityo koba Joab ak piikyik kemout tugul ak kieekyi eng' Hebron. 
2Samuel3:1 Ki piit pooryeet eng' peetuusyek che chaang' eng' kootap Saulo ak kootap Daudi. Ki kimiit Daudi kotesak, ago kinyalul kimnateetap kootap Saulo kwo let." 
2Samuel3:2 Ki kisikyi `Daudi weeriik eng' Hebron; Taaitanyi ko ki Amnon, ne kisiche Ainoam Jesreelyot." 
2Samuel3:3 Weeriinnyi ne po aeng' ko ki Kileap, ne kisichei Abigail ne ki osotyotap Nabal Karmelindet. Ne po somok ko ki Absalom ne kisichei Maaka cheptap Talmai laitoryatap Gesur." 
2Samuel3:4 Ne po ang'wan ko ki Adonijah weeriitap Haggith ak ne po muut ko ki Shepatiah weeriitap Abital. 
2Samuel3:5 Ne po lo ko ki Itream ne kisichei Eglah osotyotap Daudi. Ki kisikyi chuuto Daudi eng' Hebron. 
2Samuel3:6 Ye kibortos kootap Saulo ak kootap Daudi, ko kitechkei Abner kogimit eng' kootap Saulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Ki tinyei `Saulo chebaigeiyat ne ki kiguure kainennyi Rispa, cheptap Aia. Ki teebee `Ishbosheth Abner koleenji, “Amu nee si obaigei ak chebaigeiyatap abba?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Ki nereech anyun miising' `Abner amu ng'aleegap Ishbosheth, ak kowol kole, “Tos Aa metitap seseetap Judah? Ago rani aboorchini myeeindo kootap Saulo kwandang'ung', tupchosyekyik ak choronokyik ak ma andein eutap Daudi, ago kerwokwo rani ile kalel agobo kwonyi." 
2Samuel3:9 Ingoyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto Abner, ak kotes ngot koma yachi anee Daudi ko uu ye ki iyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet." 
2Samuel3:10 Autoi laitornatet eng' kootap Saulo ak alumde ng'echereetap Daudi kolaitoran eng' Israel ak Judah kobooch Dan agoi Beer-sheba.” 
2Samuel3:11 Ki mata komuuch kowolji Abner ng'olyoot age, amu ki iywei ineendet." 
2Samuel3:12 Yeityo koyookto piik `Abner koba kap Daudi ne kita wendi ineendet koleenji, “Po ng'oo emet? Ngeyai tuwai arorutyet kiyomegei, mi eunnyu kobooten si amutun Israel tugul kobwa ole imi.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Kowol `Daudi kole, “Myee, ayae arorutyet kobooten, ago kiit agenge ne amagenen, ko megeere togeennyu agoi imutu korook Mikal cheptap Saulo ye inyone igeera.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Yeityo koyookto `Daudi piik koba kap Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo koleenji, “Koono osotyondennyu Mikal ne ki anyoonune koito irirenik pogol che po Philistiik.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Ara ki iyookto Ishbosheth piik koba komutune manong'otyondennyi; nooto ko Paltiel weeriitap Lais. 
2Samuel3:16 Ki pa ak monong'otyondennyi koriiroti manong'otyondennyi kosubi kwonyooto kot koit Baurim. Eng' yooto po Baurim, koleenji anyun `Abner monong'otyonooto, “Ui, iweektegei.” Ak ki week." 
2Samuel3:17 Ki ng'alaal Abner ak poisyegap Israel kole, “Ki ocheeng' koek laitoryandeng'wong' Daudi eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto." 
2Samuel3:18 Ara anyun oyai, amu ki komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Daudi kole, ‘Asaru piikyuk Israel eng' otwogindennyu Daudi eng' eunegap Philistiik ak eng' eunegap puunikwak tugul.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Ki ng'alaalji `Abner Benjamin agine kogas. Yeityo kogeny kwo Abner komwachi Daudi kogas eng' Hebron tuguuk tugul che kigeerei Israel ak kootap Benjamin tugul kole nyolu. 
2Samuel3:20 Kigoit anyun `Abner ole mi Daudi eng' Hebron, kobooto piik tiptem, koyachi igoorto `Daudi Abner kobooto murenjoto ki mi kobooto ineendet." 
2Samuel3:21 Ki leenji `Abner Daudi, “Ang'eete awendi ak ayumji Israel tugul kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat si kobiit koyai arorutyet kobooten, ak si kobiit ilaitorane che machei muguleldang'ung'.” Eng' let kosaiseret `Daudi Abner, ak ki wo eng' kaalyeet." 
2Samuel3:22 Ki pwanei eng' sainooto otwogigap Daudi ak Joab kobunu lugeet ak ki ibu parunenik che chaang'. Ago king'oitu koma mi Abner kobooto Daudi eng' Hebron, amu kiga komwachi `Daudi ineendet kwo eng' kaalyeet." 
2Samuel3:23 Kingo it Joab ak lugeet tugul ne ki mi ak ineendet, kemwachi Joab keleenji, “Kanyo Abner weeriitap Ner ole mi laitoryat ak kagoleenji kwo, ak kakwo eng' kaalyeet.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Konyo anyun `Joab ole mi laitoryat ak koleenji, “Nee ne kaiyai? Kanyo Abner oldang'ung' ak amu nee si iunde kwo ak kakwo iman?" 
2Samuel3:25 Ingen inyee Abner weeriitap Ner ile kanyo koberberin si konai mandaeng'ung' ak nyonuneng'ung' ak konai tuguuk tugul che iyae.” 
2Samuel3:26 Kingo mong' Joab eng' kap Daudi, koyookto piik koosup Abner ak koweech ineendet eng' keriingetap peek ne po Sira, ago ki ma nai Daudi." 
2Samuel3:27 Kingo kagoweek Abner konyo Hebron, komut Joab ineendet kwo taban agoi kwenutap ormariichet, kwo kong'alaalji mutyo ak kitoor ineendet moet eng' yooto ak kime agobo korotiigap Asahel ng'eetap kamet." 
2Samuel3:28 Kingo kas `Daudi eng' let, komwa kole, “Ma tinye anee ng'oogisto ak laitornatennyu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny eng' korotiigap Abner weeriitap Ner." 
2Samuel3:29 Ingotebee metitap Joab ak kotebee kootap kwandanyi tugul. Amat kobet eng' kootap Joab chii ne tinyei kusereet anan ne tinyei mogondos anan ne tebenoti kirokto anan ne kibarei eng' rotwetap chok anan ko ne ma tinyei amitwogik.” 
2Samuel3:30 (Ki par anyun `Joab ak Abisai ng'eetap kamet, Abner, amu kiga kobar Abner Asahel weeriit ne tupcho, eng' Gibeon eng' lugeet.)" 
2Samuel3:31 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi Joab kobooto piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet, “Ogereer ngoroikwok ak ogermenegei kuniok yeityo oteiye eng' taitap Abner.” Ak ki isubi Daudi kiit ne ki kisute." 
2Samuel3:32 Kitupchi Abner Hebron, ak kiwaach laitoryat eng' kutit ne oo ak koriir eng' kereritap Abner. Ki riiryo kora piik tugul." 
2Samuel3:33 Ki riir laitoryat agobo Abner kole; Konyolji Abner kome ko uu ye meei chiito ne abusat? 
2Samuel3:34 Ki ma ko ratotiin euneguk, ak ki ma ki rat keelyeguk eng' mugurek. Ko uu ye ibutyin chiito taitap lagogap yaityet, ko koibut anyun ko uu nooto. Ak ki riiryo piik tugul kogeny agobo ineendet." 
2Samuel3:35 Yeityo kobwa piik tugul komwachi Daudi koamis ye kita ko peet. Ago ki iyasyo Daudi kole, “Ingoyaiywo Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto ak kotes koosir, ngot achamcham amitwogik anan ko kiy age agoi kororokto asiista.”" 
2Samuel3:36 Ki keer piik tugul kioto, ak ki ibaibai icheek; amu kiit age tugul ne ki yai laitoryat, ko ki ibaibai piik tugul." 
2Samuel3:37 Ki nai anyun piik tugul ak Israel tugul eng' peetuunooto kole, ki ma kobooto laitoryat pareetap Abner weeriitap Ner." 
2Samuel3:38 Yeityo koleenji laitoryat otwogikyik, “Mongen ole kaibut rani pounindet ak ko chiito ne oo eng' Israel?" 
2Samuel3:39 Aa nyalulat rani, agot nganda aa laitoryat ne ki kiil, ak temena pichu, weeriigap Zeruiah. Ingoyaakyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaindetap yaityet ko uu yaityennyi.”" 
2Samuel4:1 Kingo kas Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo kole kogome Abner eng' Hebron, konyalul ak ki aragenso Yahudik tugul." 
2Samuel4:2 Nguno anyun ko ki tinyei weeriitap Saulo murenik aeng' che ki kiptainigap kweanaigap lugeet. Ki kiguure kainetap age Baanah, keguure ne po age Regap, weeriigap Rimon Berotindet, ne po lagogap Benjamin: (amu ki ityin Berot agine Benjamin:" 
2Samuel4:3 ak kimwechi Berotik Gitaim ak ki pa koek punootik eng' olooto agoi ra.) 
2Samuel4:4 Ki tinyei Jonathan weeriitap Saulo weeriit ne kimeiyotiin keelyek. Ki po kenyiisyek muut ineendet ye ki itu ng'aleegap Saulo ak Jonathan eng' Jezreel ak kiganap cheplakwet ak komwei. Ye ki chooktoi komwei cheplakwanooto, kobut lakweet ak kiyaagitu keelyek. Ki kiguure kainennyi Mephibosheth." 
2Samuel4:5 Ki pa weeriigap Rimon Berotindet, Regap ak Baanah kot koit kootap Is-bonet ye ki imunyi peet kween ko kang'wanit asiista." 
2Samuel4:6 Ki pa kwenutap koot, ko uu piich che kimachei koip nganuuk ak kitoor moennyi. Kichililso Regap ak Baanah, ng'eetap kamet." 
2Samuel4:7 Kigaba icheek ak kingo it ko anyun, konyoor koruei eng' itogunnyi eng' koot ne kirue, kokwer ak kobar, yeityo kotil metit ak koip ak koba kobun ooreetap Arabah kemout komugul." 
2Samuel4:8 Ki ip metoto po Ishbosheth koipchi Daudi eng' Hebron ak koleenji laitoryat, “Metitap Ishbosheth weeriitap Saulo punyondeng'ung' ne ki cheeng'ei saboondang'ung'; ak kagoyaaktoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugetuut rani kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat eng' Saulo ak iyotennyi.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Ki wolji `Daudi Regap ak Baanah ng'eetap kamet, weeriigap Rimon Berotindet koleenji, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki kotyach saboondanyu eng' nyalilda tugul," 
2Samuel4:10 ye kingo mwaiwo chiito age kole, ‘kogome Saulo,’ koleen kaip logoiywek che myach, anam ineendet ak abar eng' Ziklag nooto ko melekto ne ki agoochi ineendet agobo logoiywekyik." 
2Samuel4:11 Siirei ne tya ye kabar piik che yaacheen chiito ne po iman eng' koonnyi komi itogunnyi, ko tos ma mage korotiikyik eunekwok ak aistook eng' ng'wony?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Ara anyun ki ng'at `Daudi murenikyik ak ki par icheek. Kitil eunekwak ak keelyekwak ak kosonginin eng' ole neegitee tamboiyot ne mi Hebron. Ago ki ip metitap Ishbosheth ak kotupchi kereritap Abner eng' Hebron. 
2Samuel5:1 Ki pwa anyun pororyosyek tugul che po Israel ole mi Daudi eng' Hebron ak komwachi koleenji, “Keero, acheek anyun ko ki koweguk ak poortang'ung'." 
2Samuel5:2 Eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto ye ki laitoryat Saulo ne kiboiywech, ko inyee ne ki indochini Israel ye kimandoi ak komang'u eng' lugoosyek tugul. Ak ki leenjin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Ibae piikyuk Israel ak iegu pounindetap Israel.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Ki pwa anyun poisyek tugul che po Israel ole mi laitoryat eng' Hebron; ak ki yai `Laitoryat Daudi arorutyet kobooto icheek eng' Hebron eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki iil `icheek Daudi koek laitoryat koboi Israel." 
2Samuel5:4 Ki po Daudi kenyiisyek sosom ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek artam." 
2Samuel5:5 Ki laitoran eng' Hebron kobou Judah kenyiisyek tisap ak arawek lo, ak ki laitoran eng' Jerusalem kenyiisyek sosom ak somok kobou Israel tugul ak Judah." 
2Samuel5:6 Yeityo kwo laitoryat ak piikyik kobookchi Jerusalem. Ki ibwaati `Jebusik che ki menyei emonooto koleen ma imuuch Daudi kobar icheeget. Ara ki mwachi `icheek Daudi koleenji, “Me muuchi inyoo ko nganasennyo. Agot kipkoratinik ak che ing'waldos ko kerin si menyo ko.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Ago ki nam Daudi irimeetap Zion, nooto ko nganaseetap Daudi." 
2Samuel5:8 Eng' peetuunooto kole `Daudi, “Chii age tugul ne parei Jebusik, ko ingotogosta kwo kereruutap peek si kwo kobar che ing'waldos ak kipkoratinik che puunigap Daudi.” Nooto amu nee si kimwaei keleen, “Ma imuuchi kobwa ko kipkoratinik ak che ing'waldos.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Ki meny anyun `Daudi irimonooto ak koguure nganaseetap Daudi. Ki teech `ineendet komoswek tugul kong'etee Milo agoi oriit. 
2Samuel5:10 Ki eet Daudi kotesak amu ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap lugoosyek, kobooto ineendet." 
2Samuel5:11 Ki iyookto `Iram laitoryatap Tyro piik koba kap Daudi koibei taragonik, kobooto musogik ak che waei koik, che kiteekyi koot Daudi." 
2Samuel5:12 Ak ki nai Daudi kole kigogimiit `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koek laitoryat ne pou Israel, ki nai kora kole ki kotoroor ineendet laitornatennyi agobo piikyik Israel." 
2Samuel5:13 Kingwo Daudi eng' Hebron, komutyigei chebaigeinik alak ak osotik alak eng' Jerusalem, ak ki kisikyi Daudi weeriik ak tiibiik alak." 
2Samuel5:14 Chu ko kainaigap che ki kisikyi ineendet eng' Jerusalem; Shamua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibar, Elishua, Nepeg, Japhia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliada ak Eliphelet." 
2Samuel5:17 Kingo kas Philistiik kole ki kiil Daudi koek laitoryat koboi Israel, kotogosta tugul koba kocheeng' Daudi, ago ki kas Daudi ak kichoortagei kwo irimeet." 
2Samuel5:18 Kingo pwa Philistiik ak koyom atebweetap Repaim," 
2Samuel5:19 koteebe `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Awe kebargei ak Philistiik? Tos indoi icheek eunnyu?” Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi, “Togoste, amu andoi iman Philistiik eung'ung'.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Ki it `Daudi Baal-perasim ak ki par icheek eng' yooto. Ki le, “Kagotui Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puunikyuk eng' tainnyu, ko uu mogoochek.” Kiguure anyun yooto Baal-perasim." 
2Samuel5:21 Ki pagaakta kanamonikwak Philistiik eng' yooto ak ki ip Daudi ak piikyik. 
2Samuel5:22 Ki togos Philistiik kogeny ne po aeng' ak koyom atebweetap Repaim. 
2Samuel5:23 Ak ye kingo teebee `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kowolji koleenji ineendet, “Metogoste, ago alagu patennywa ak iyem yeityo ibookyi icheek eng' ye itoorchingei keetiigap logoek." 
2Samuel5:24 Ye igas cheetap panda eng' keetichooto po logoek parak, ing'eet ichakte, amu kagondoenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobar lugeetap Philistiik.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Ara ki yai Daudi ko uu nooto ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki par `ineendet Philistiik kobooch Geba agoi koit Gezer." 
2Samuel6:1 Ki iyum `Daudi kogeny murenik eliphuusyek sosom che po Israel che ki kilewen. 
2Samuel6:2 Ki ng'eet Daudi ak kwo kobooto piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet eng' Baale Judah koba koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne ki kimwaitae kainet, kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ne tebee kerubisyek." 
2Samuel6:3 Ki inde icheek moingetap Kamuktaindet chepkichutit ne leel ak koip konyo eng' kootap Abinadab ne ki mi tulweet. Ki kweri weeriigap Abinadab Uzzah ak Ahio, chepkichutinooto leel." 
2Samuel6:4 Ki ip konyo eng' kootap Abinadab ne ki mi tulweet, kobooto moingetap Kamuktaindet. Ki indoe Ahio moingonooto." 
2Samuel6:5 Kiboiboitu Daudi ak koot tugul ne po Israel eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobutei kibugandisyek tugul, kobooto ketubosyek, kibugandinik che ki kiyae keetiigap piribiryet, sugutisyek che mengeechen, ndurerusyek ak eng' sanisyek che cheeitos." 
2Samuel6:6 Kingo it icheek rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Nakon, koyogooito Uzzah eunnyi kotokyi moingetap Kamuktaindet ak konam amu kiterteryot eiik." 
2Samuel6:7 Eng' yooto, konereech miising' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Uzzah, ak kibir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' yooto amu lelutyennyi. Kimechi yooto kimi moingetap Kamuktaindet." 
2Samuel6:8 Ki ma cham Daudi, amu ki par Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Uzzah. Ara kiguure yooto Peres-usa agoi ra." 
2Samuel6:9 Ki iywei `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuunooto, ak ki mwa kole, “Imuktoi ano moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo ole ami?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Ara ma cham Daudi anyun koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo ole mi ineendet eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ago ki ip `ineendet kwo taban, kwo kootap Obed-edom Getindet." 
2Samuel6:11 Ki tebee moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Obed-edom Getindet arawek somok, ak ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Obed-edom, ak koonnyi tugul." 
2Samuel6:12 Ki kimwachi Daudi keleenji, “Kigoberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Obed-edom, ak tuguukyik tugul, amu moingetap Kamuktaindet.” Ara ki wo `Daudi koip moingetap Kamuktaindet eng' poiboiyet eng' kootap Obed-edom kotogos konyo nganaseetap Daudi." 
2Samuel6:13 Kingo kagoba mitainik lo icheeget che ki ibei moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koeny eito ne pungus ak age ne akwai." 
2Samuel6:14 Kogagermenegei `Daudi ephod ne po katanit, koureren eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateennyi tugul." 
2Samuel6:15 Ki ibu anyun `Daudi ak koot tugul ne po Israel moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotyenonu ak koguutonu iryagook. 
2Samuel6:16 Kingo it moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseetap Daudi, koiit eng' tirisia Mikal cheptap Saulo. Kingo keer `ineendet Laitoryat Daudi kotwoltwoli ak kourereni eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kosas ineendet eng' muguleldanyi." 
2Samuel6:17 Ki ip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo ko, ak konde oldanyi eng' kwenutap emait ne kiga koteekyi Daudi. Yeityo kogoito `Daudi kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Samuel6:18 Kingo kagogees Daudi kagoitoetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet, koberuur piik eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
2Samuel6:19 Kipchechi magatyat, pendo ak magatyatap sabibuk che yamyotiin piik tugul eng' tuiyet tugul ne po Israel, murenik ak kwonyiik. Ki igoochi chii age tugul yeityo kwo chii tugul koonnyi." 
2Samuel6:20 Ye kingo week Daudi koberuur piigap koonnyi, konyo saang' Mikal cheptap Saulo kotorook Daudi ak koleenji, “Ka itoroorot ne tya laitoryatap Israel rani, ne kang'aanygei eng' taitap otwogikyik che tiibiik, ko uu kiptangoiya ne ng'aanyegei ama ililani!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Koleenji `Daudi Mikal, “Kagaureren eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki lewena asiir kwandang'ung' ak asiir koonnyi tugul, kondea aek pounindet eng' piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, aboi Israel. Nooto anyun, aurereni eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Samuel6:22 Iman, ak ta kesasa kosiir niito, ak ageeregei aegu ne ming'in. Ko agobo tiibiicho otwogik che kemwa, koteecha icheeget.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Ak ma sich Mikal cheptap Saulo lakwa agoi peetuutap meennyi. 
2Samuel7:1 Ye kingo meny laitoryat koonnyi ak kogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet kamuung'et eng' puunikyik tugul che ki mi eng' komoswek tugul," 
2Samuel7:2 koleenji `laitoryat Nathan maotyot, “Keero, amenye kootap taragonik, ago menyei moingetap Kamuktaindet emait oriit.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Koleenji `Nathan laitoryat, “Ui, ak iyai tugul che mi muguleldang'ung', amu mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Ak ki ityi Nathan ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kemounooto, koleenji," 
2Samuel7:5 “Ui imwachi otwogindennyu Daudi ileenji, ‘Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos inyee ne teekwo koot ne amenye?" 
2Samuel7:6 Amu tomo amenye ko kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu piigap Israel eng' Misiri agoi peetuuni, ago ki ameng'ootee emait ak kootap moinget." 
2Samuel7:7 Eng' komoswek tugul ole ki awendotee ak lagok tugul che po Israel, ko tos ki ateebee kandoigap ortinwegap Israel che ki ang'at koriip piikyuk Israel aleenji, Amu nee si ma oteekwo koot ne po taragonik?" 
2Samuel7:8 Ara anyun, imwachini otwogindennyu Daudi ileenjini, kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, Ki amutun eng' piutap keechiirek, eng' kayagetap keechiirek, si kobiit iegu pounindet eng' piikyuk ibou Israel." 
2Samuel7:9 Ki atebi kobooten eng' oldo tugul ole ki iwe ak ki aiste puuniguk tugul eng' taing'ung'. Aeeti kaineng'ung', ko uu kainetap piik che eecheen eng' ng'wony." 
2Samuel7:10 Alewenjini yeto piikyuk Israel ak amiine icheek, si kobiit komeny yetanywa. Ma kiutoi kogeny anan konyaliil icheek `lagogap yaityet kogeny ko uu eng' tai," 
2Samuel7:11 kobooch peetuut ne ki ang'at kirwoogik koboi piikyuk Israel, agoonin imuuny eng' puuniguk tugul. Ak mwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny kole teegun koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Samuel7:12 Ye igeskei peetuusyeguk ak oruiye ak kwanisyeguk, ang'eet iyoteng'ung' ne piitu let ne punu poortang'ung', ak agimiit laitornatennyi." 
2Samuel7:13 Tuun teekyin koot ineendet kainennyu ak agimiit ng'echereetap laitornatennyi koigeny. 
2Samuel7:14 Aegu kwandanyi ak koek weeriinnyu. Ngot koyai inee tengek, atigoone kirokto ne po piik ak pirutigap lagogap piik." 
2Samuel7:15 Ago ma istoegei ineendet rireenennyu ko uu ye ki arebee Saulo, ineendet ne ki aiste eng' taing'ung'." 
2Samuel7:16 Ki kimiiti koong'ung' ak laitornateng'ung' koigeny eng' taing'ung'. Ki kimiiti ng'echereetap laitornateng'ung' agoi koigeny.’ ” 
2Samuel7:17 Ki ng'alaalji `Nathan Daudi ko uu ole teptoi ng'aleechooto tugul ak ko uu ng'ang'utyoni tugul. 
2Samuel7:18 Kingo pata, kwo ko laitoryat, kwo kotebi ng'wony eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yeityo kole, “Aa ng'oo, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak nee koonnyu kot imutwaa agoi ra?" 
2Samuel7:19 Ko uu yo kiy niito ne ming'in eng' taing'ung' ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko kaing'alaal kogeny agobo kootap otwogindeng'ung' eng' peetuusyek che chaang' che pwoonei. Uu ni piteetap kimugulmet, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
2Samuel7:20 Nee age neta komuuchi Daudi komwaun? Amu ingen inyee otwogindeng'ung', ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Samuel7:21 Amu kaiyai etunatoni tugul agobo ng'olyoondeng'ung' ak ko uu muguleldang'ung' inyegei, si kobiit igoochi otwogindeng'ung' konai." 
2Samuel7:22 Ii oo amu nooto, ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, amu ma mi ne ogerge, ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatenen, ko uu eng' tugul che kigegas eng' itiikyok." 
2Samuel7:23 Ngoro pororyet ne kergei ak piiguk Israel ne ki wo Kamuktaindet kotyakyigei koek piikyik ak koyachigei kainet? Ngoro pororyet ne ki yachi tuguuk che eecheen agobo okweek ak tuguuk che po kamuiset agobo emeng'ung' eng' taitap piiguk? Icheek che ki ityaach eng' Misiri koek cheguuk, ak eng' pororyosyek ak kamuktaikwak?" 
2Samuel7:24 Ki igimityigei piiguk Israel koek piiguk koigeny; ak ki iegu inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa. 
2Samuel7:25 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, igimit koigeny ng'olyoot ne kaimwa agobo otwogindeng'ung', ak agobo koonnyi ak iyai ko uu ye kemwa." 
2Samuel7:26 Ingitoroor kaineng'ung' koigeny keele, ‘Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko Kamuktaindet ne pou Israel.’ Ak ki kimiti koigeny kootap otwogindeng'ung' Daudi eng' taing'ung'." 
2Samuel7:27 Amu ki ing'aang'ji inyee otwogindeng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ileenji ‘Ateegun koot.’ Kanyiganit anyun otwogindeng'ung' eng' muguleldanyi kosaain saaoni." 
2Samuel7:28 Ara anyun, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ii Kamuktaindet, iman ng'aleeguk ak kaiyomisyi otwogindeng'ung' kii myee." 
2Samuel7:29 Ingobaibain iberuur kootap otwogindeng'ung' si kobiit kotep koigeny eng' taing'ung'. Amu kaimwa inyee, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ingoek ne iberuurot koigeny kootap otwogindeng'ung' eng' kaberureng'ung'.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Kingo pata niito, kobar `Daudi Philistiik ak koterteer icheek, ak korep `Daudi Metegama eng' eunegap Philistiik." 
2Samuel8:2 Ki iterteer ak kobar Moab. Ki ng'at icheek koruiyo eng' ng'wony yeityo kokwa icheek eng' porowet ak kokwa icheeget eng' porowet. Ki kibar kobek piik eng' uitugul ye ite kakwaindap poroonik aeng', ago ki chamji kosapcho che mi uitugul ole ite porowet ne po somok. Ara anyun ki ek Moabik otwogigap Daudi ak ki ip kagoochinoik." 
2Samuel8:3 Ki par kogeny `Daudi Hadadeser weeriitap Rehob, laitoryatap Soba, ye kiwendi koweechi pounatennyi kogeny eng' aineet." 
2Samuel8:4 Kiluule `Daudi ineendet murenikyik eliphuut agenge ak pogol tisap che ki laanyei paraisisyek ak eliphuusyek tiptem che kibunei keelyek. Ki ep Daudi kutung'oigap paraisisyek tugul che ki ichuuti kariisyek, ago ki ituuch eng' chooto che yamei kariisyek pogol." 
2Samuel8:5 Kingo pwa piigap Syria che menyei Damasko kotoret Hadadeser laitoryatap Soba, kobar Daudi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng' eng' piigap Syria." 
2Samuel8:6 Ki inde anyun Daudi irimosyek Syria ne po Damasko. Ki ek piigap Syria otwogigap Daudi ak ki ip kagoochinoik. Ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi katerteeret eng' komosta age tugul ne ki wo. 
2Samuel8:7 Ki ip `Daudi long'onigap thahabu che ki tinyei otwogigap Hadadeser ak ki ip kobwa Jerusalem. 
2Samuel8:8 Ki ip Laitoryat `Daudi sugunonik che chaang' miising' eng' Beta ak eng' Berotai, nganasoogap Hadadeser." 
2Samuel8:9 Kingo kas `Toi laitoryatap Hamath kole kogobar `Daudi lugeet tugul ne po Hadadeser," 
2Samuel8:10 koyookto anyun `Toi Joram weeriinnyi kwo kaplaitoryat Daudi, kwo kogat ineendet ak koberuur, amu kiga kobargei ak Hadadeser ak ki par ineendet, amu ki pargei Hadadeser ak Toi. Ki ip Joram tereenigap fedha, tereenigap thahabu ak tereenigap sugunonik." 
2Samuel8:11 Ki itabaanji `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuchuuto ak icheek, kobooto fedha ak thahabu che kiga kotabaan eng' pororyosyek tugul che kiga koterteer," 
2Samuel8:12 che po Syria, che po Moab, che po lagogap Ammon, che po Philistiik, che po Amelek ak che parunenigap Hadadeser weeriitap Rehob laitoryatap Soba." 
2Samuel8:13 Ki eet kainetap Daudi ye ki weeksei kobunu pareet ne ki parei piigap Syria eng' Atebweetap Munyuk, ole ki pare murenik eliphuusyek taman ak sisiit." 
2Samuel8:14 Ki inde irimosyek Edom komugul, ak ki ek Edomik tugul otwogigap Daudi. Ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi katerteeret eng' komosta age tugul ne ki wo." 
2Samuel8:15 Ak ki laitoran Daudi eng' Israel tugul; ak ki irwookyi Daudi piikyik tugul eng' lititindo ak iman. 
2Samuel8:16 Ki pou Joab weeriitap Zeruiah lugeet, ak ko ki siriindetap tuguuk che piitu, Jehoshaphat weeriitap Ahilud." 
2Samuel8:17 Ki tisiik Zadok weeriitap Ahitub ak Ahimelek weeriitap Abiathar, ko ki siriindet Seraiah." 
2Samuel8:18 Ki pou Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada Keretik ak Peletik ak ki tisiik weeriigap Daudi. 
2Samuel9:1 Eng' peetuut age, kotep Daudi kole, “Tos mi chii ne ki ng'et eng' kootap Saulo, si kobiit ayachi ne myee amu Jonathan?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Ki mi eng' kootap Saulo otwogindet ne ki kiguure kainennyi Siba ak ki kiguur kwo ole mi Daudi. ki teebee anyun `laitoryat ineendet koleenji, “Ii Siba?” Ak ki wol kole, “Aa ineendet, anee otwogindeng'ung'.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Yeityo koteebe laitoryat koleenji, “Tos ta komi chii eng' kootap Saulo, si kobiit ayachi ineendet myeeindap Kamuktaindet?” Ak ki leenji Siba laitoryat, “Ta komi weeriitap Jonathan ne yaacheen keelyekyik.”" 
2Samuel9:4 koteebee `laitoryat ineendet koleenji, “Mi ano?” Ak ki leenji `Siba laitoryat, “Keero, mi kootap Makir weeriitap Amiel, eng' Lo-debar.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Ki iyookto anyun `Daudi kimut ineendet konyo eng' kootap Makir weeriitap Amiel eng' Lo-debar. 
2Samuel9:6 Ki nyo ole mi Daudi `Mephibosheth, weeriitap Jonathan weeriitap Saulo ak kobutyi ng'wony kogutung'ji. Ki kuur `Daudi koleenji, “Mephibosheth.” Ak ki wol kole, “Keer otwogindeng'ung'!”" 
2Samuel9:7 Ki leenji anyun `Daudi ineendet, “Meiywei; amu ayaun ne myee iman agobo Jonathan kwandang'ung', ak iamisye mesennyu kotugul.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Ki ing'uruuk Mephibosheth ak kole, “Nee otwogindeng'ung' kot igeer seset ne ki kome ko uu anee?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Ki kuur anyun `laitoryat Siba otwogindetap Saulo, ak koleenji ineendet, “Kaagoochi weeriitap kiptaiyandeng'ung' tuguuk tugul che ki po Saulo ak koonnyi tugul." 
2Samuel9:10 Ibatyi emet inyee, weeriiguk ak otwogiguk, ak iibu peek kobwa ko, si kobiit konyoor weeriitap kiptaiyandeng'ung' amitwogik che amei. Ago amisye mesennyu kotugul Mephibosheth weeriitap kiptaiyandeng'ung'.” Ki tinyei `Siba weeriik taman ak muut ak otwogik tiptem." 
2Samuel9:11 Ki wolji anyun `Siba laitoryat koleenji, “Ayae ko uu tugul che ng'ata kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat anee otwogindennyi.” Ago ki le laitoryat, “Amisye mesennyu Mephibosheth ko uu age eng' weeriigap laitoryat.”" 
2Samuel9:12 Ki tinyei `Mephibosheth weeriit ne ming'in, ne ki kiguure kainennyi Mikah. Ak piik tugul che ki menyei kootap Siba ko ki otwogigap Mephibosheth." 
2Samuel9:13 Ki meny anyun Mephibosheth Jerusalem; amu ki amisye kotugul meesetap laitoryat, ak ki ing'wali eng' keelyekyik tuwai." 
2Samuel10:1 Kingo pata niito, kome laitoryatap lagogap Ammon, ak ki laitoran Hanun weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Samuel10:2 Ki le anyun `Daudi, “Ayachini ne myee Hanun weeriitap Nahas, ko uu ye ki yaiywo ne myee kwandanyi.” Ara anyun ki iyookto `Daudi piik koba kogaigai ineendet amu kwandanyi. Ago kingo it otwogigap Daudi emetap lagogap Ammon," 
2Samuel10:3 koleenji `pounigap Hanun kiptaiyannywa, “Ibwaati ile konyiti Daudi kwandang'ung', kot koyogun kagoigoik? Ma iyook Daudi otwogikyik kobwa oldang'ung' kosyach nganaseet, kosegei ak kobar?”" 
2Samuel10:4 Ki nam anyun Hanun otwogigap Daudi, ak konem kebeber eng' tamnokwak, ak kotil ngoroikwak komut kwenut koboochit ngorook yeityo kounda icheek koba." 
2Samuel10:5 ki ngemwachi Daudi ng'olyoondonooto, koyookto piik kotorookta icheeget si komwachi koleenji, “Otebi eng' Jeriko ak ye tuun piityo tamnokwok, obwa,” amu ki ililandos pichooto miising'." 
2Samuel10:6 Kingo keer lagogap Ammon kole kagoyaagitu icheeget eng' Daudi, koyookto keguur piigap Syria che menyei Beth-rehob ak piigap Syria che menyei Soba, si konyoor melekto murenik eliphuusyek tiptemu che punei keelyek, kobooto Laitoryat Maaka ak murenik eliphuut ak murenik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che po Tob." 
2Samuel10:7 Kingo kas `Daudi, koyookto Joab ak lugeet tugul ne po murenik che kiimeen." 
2Samuel10:8 Ki pwa lagogap Ammon ak kotet lugeet eng' ye kibunei eng' ormariich. Ki mi icheegei piigap Syria che menyei Soba, ak che po Rehob ak murenigap Tob ak che po Maaka, eng' warenget." 
2Samuel10:9 Kingo keer Joab kole kagetet lugeet agobo ineendet eng' tai ak let, kokwei murenik che ki kilewen che po Israel ak kotet si kobargei ak piigap Syria." 
2Samuel10:10 Ki inde piik che kiga ng'et, eutap Abisai, ng'eetap kamet, ak kitet icheek si kobargei ak lagogap Ammon." 
2Samuel10:11 Yeityo kole, “Ngot kogimegitu piigap Syria koterteera, itoreta, ago ngot kogimegitu lagogap Ammon koterteerin, anyoo atoretiin." 
2Samuel10:12 Nyiganitu ak ingeegu murenik agobo piikyok ak nganasoogap Kamuktaindennyo, ak ingoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye keerei kole myee.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Kingo riikta anyun Joab ak murenik che ki mi ak ineendet koba lugeet kobargei ak piigap Syria, komwee `icheek ineendet." 
2Samuel10:14 Kingo keer lagogap Ammon kole kagomwei piigap Syria, komwei ak icheek eng' taitap Abisai ak ki pa nganaseet. Ki week Joab anyun eng' ole kimi lagogap Ammon, kobwa Jerusalem." 
2Samuel10:15 Kingo keer piigap Syria kole kagiterter icheek eng' taitap Israel, koyumgei." 
2Samuel10:16 Ak ki iyookto Hadareser kimut piigap Syria che ki mi aineet pitoniin, ak ki pwa Helam kobooto Sobak kiptaiyatap lugeetap Hadareser kondoune." 
2Samuel10:17 Ki ngemwachi Daudi, koyum Israel tugul, yeityo kolandae Jordan ak koba Helam. Kitetkei piigap Syria kotokyigei Daudi ak kobargei ak ineendet." 
2Samuel10:18 Ki mwee `piigap Syria Israel kogeny, ak ki par `Daudi piigap Syria pogol tisap che po kariisyek ak murenik eliphuusyek artam che ki laanyei paraisisyek ak ki par Sobak kiptaiyatap lugeennywa komechi yooto." 
2Samuel10:19 Kingo keer laitorinik tugul che ki otwogigap Hadareser kole kagiterter icheek eng' taitap Israel, koyai kaalyeet ak Israel, ak koot icheek. Koiywei anyun piigap Syria kota kotoret lagogap Ammon kogeny." 
2Samuel11:1 Kingo it kasartap kenyiit ne cham kobee laitorinik lugeet, koyookto `Daudi Joab kobooto otwogikyik ak Israel tugul kobar lagogap Ammon. Kiyiem lugeetap Israel Rabbah. Ago ki tebi Daudi eng' Jerusalem." 
2Samuel11:2 Kingo it koskoleny eng' pesyet age, kong'eet `Daudi eng' itogunnyi ak kowendote kootap laitoryat parak. Ye kingo mi parak, kogeer kwony ne ki karaaran kot kounegei." 
2Samuel11:3 Ki iyookto `Daudi piik koteep agobo kwonyooto. Ak ki le age, “Niito ko Bathsheba cheptap Eliam, nooto ne osotyotap Uriah Hitindet”" 
2Samuel11:4 Ki iyookto anyun `Daudi piik koba kimut, ak ki nyo ole mi ineendet ak kiruiyo ak ineendet; (amu kiga koanyinygei eng' murwoonindanyi.) Yeityo koweektagei kwo koonnyi." 
2Samuel11:5 Ki manach kwonyooto, ak ki iyookto kemwachi Daudi agobo nooto." 
2Samuel11:6 Ara anyun ki iyookto `Daudi chii kwo ole mi Joab, koleenji, “Iyookwo Uriah Hitindet.” Ak ki iyookto `Joab Uriah kwo ole mi Daudi." 
2Samuel11:7 Kingo it Uriah ole mi ineendet, koteebe `Daudi ineendet agobo Joab, ak ole chamdogei piik ak ole ki uu lugeet." 
2Samuel11:8 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi Uriah, “Chortegei, ui koong'ung' ak iun keelyeguk.” Ki wo Uriah eng' kootap laitoryat, ak ki kisube ineendet amitwogik che ki punu laitoryat." 
2Samuel11:9 Ago ki ru Uriah kurgeetap kootap laitoryat kobooto otwogik tugul che po kiptaiyandennyi, ma choortagei kwo koonnyi." 
2Samuel11:10 Ak kingo kagomwachi `icheek Daudi koleenji, “Ma choortagei Uriah kwo koonnyi,” koleenji `Daudi Uriah, “Kama ibunu panda? Amu nee anyun si mechoortegei iwe koong'ung'?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Kowolji `Uriah Daudi koleenji, “Tebee `keryosyek moinget ak Israel ak Judah, ak menyei keeweet kiptaiyandennyu Joab ak otwogigap kiptaiyandennyu. Tos awetitoi ano anyun anee koonnyu, aamisye ak aeeise ak keruiye ak osotyondennyu? Ko uu ye isabe ak ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung', ma yae kioto.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Koleenji `Daudi Uriah, “Peni olito rani ak mutai achamun iwe.” Kibeni anyun Uriah Jerusalem peetuunooto, ak peetuut ne ki isubi nooto." 
2Samuel11:13 Ak kingo kuur `Daudi ineendet, koamis ak koeiso eng' tainnyi; ki igoochi koe kot kobogit. Ki wo komanda koskoleny kwo koru eng' itogunnyi kobooto otwogigap kiptaiyandennyi, ago ma choortagei kwo koonnyi." 
2Samuel11:14 Kingo kagoeech, kosirchi `Daudi parweet Joab, ak koyooktoe Uriah." 
2Samuel11:15 Ki sir eng' parwaanooto kole, “Onde Uriah tai eng' lugeet ne ng'waan miising', ak ochuchuigei obagaakte ineendet si kobiit kebar kome.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Ak kingo ta koriibei Joab nganaseet, konde Uriah komosta ne ki mi murenik che nyigoonen." 
2Samuel11:17 Ak kimanda piigap nganaseet koba kobargei ak Joab. Ki pek piik alak eng' icheek, eng' otwogigap Daudi, ak kime Uriah Hitindet agine." 
2Samuel11:18 Ki iyookto anyun Joab kemwachi Daudi tuguuk tugul agobo lugeet. 
2Samuel11:19 Ki ng'at chiito ne kiga iyookto koleenji, “Ye kaimwachi laitoryat tuguuk tugul agobo lugeet kogeskei," 
2Samuel11:20 ko ngot konereech laitoryat ak koleenjin, Amu nee si ooriikyi nganaseet obargei? Kama ongen ole imuuchi komwogok eng' irimeet?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ng'oo ne ki par Abimelek weeriitap Jerubeset? Ki ma wiiree kwondo age ineendet isyet eng' irimeet, ak ki mechi Tebes? Amu nee anyun si ooriikyi irimeet? Ile, Ki kome otwogindeng'ung' Uriah Hitindet agine.”" 
2Samuel11:22 Ki wo anyun ne ki kiyookto ak kiit ak koboorchi Daudi tuguuk tugul che kiga iyooktoe Joab ineendet. 
2Samuel11:23 Ki leenji `chiichooto Daudi, “Ki iterteerech pichooto, ki imong'jech eng' keeweet ak ki kibarategei kot koit ye kibunei eng' ormariichet." 
2Samuel11:24 Kimwok `mwoogik otwogiguk eng' irimeet; ak ki pek alak eng' otwogigap laitoryat, ak kime agine otwogindeng'ung' Uriah Hitindet.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Koleenji `Daudi chiichooto kagiyogu, “Imwachini Joab ko uu ni ileenjini, Ameng' koiimin ng'olyoondoni, amu parei rotwetap chok age ko uu ye parei age. Igimiit lugeeng'ung' kota kogimit, si kobargei ak nganaseet ak oterteer, ak icheer ineendet.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Kingo kas osotyotap Uriah kole kogome manong'otyondennyi, koote agobo ineendet." 
2Samuel11:27 Ak kingo pata kateet, koyookto `Daudi kimut konyo koonnyi, ak ki ek osotyonnyi ak ki sikyi ng'etet. Ago ma cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kioto ki yai Daudi." 
2Samuel12:1 Ki iyookto `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Nathan kwo ole mi Daudi. Ak ye kingo nyo ole mi ineendet koleenji, “Kimi piik aeng'u nganaseet agenge. Ki mogoryot age, ko ki kibananiat age." 
2Samuel12:2 Ki tinyei ne ki mogoryot akwotisyek che chaang' miising' che po keechiirek ak tuuga. 
2Samuel12:3 Ago ki ma kotinyei kiy ne ki kibananiat, kobatee subeendo agenge ne ming'in ne po keechiir ne kiga al ak kogu. Ki eegitu tuwai ak lagokyik. Ki amei amitwogikyik, kiee kigombennyi ak korue tegeennyi. Ki uu eng' ineendet cheptonyi." 
2Samuel12:4 Ki nyo anyun kiprutoiyo kap mogoryondonooto, ak ma cham konam ne po akweennyi ne po keechiirek ak ne po akweetap tuukyik koeng'ji chiichooto kisiirtoi ne kiga nyoonji ineendet, ago ki nam aarwetap kibananiandanooto, ak koeng'ji chiichooto kiga nyoonji ineendet.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Ki nereekyi miising' `Daudi chiichooto ak ki leenji Nathan, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, konyaaljin chiichooto ki yai kioto kome," 
2Samuel12:6 ak koyook arwanooto konyil ang'wan amu ki yai kiito ak amu ki ma kotinyei rireenet.”
