2Samuel12:7 Koleenji `Nathan Daudi, “Ii chiichooto. Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, Ki aiiliin iegu laitoryat ibou Israel, ak ki asaruun eng' eutap Saulo." 
2Samuel12:8 Ki agoonin kootap kiptaiyandeng'ung' ak ki agoonin osotigap kiptaiyandeng'ung' kobwa tegeng'ung' ak agoonin kootap Israel ak ne po Judah. Nda kiga ng'ering'itu chooto, ta ki atesun tuguuk alak ak alak." 
2Samuel12:9 Amu nee anyun si isas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iyai kiit ne ya eng' tainnyi? Koibar Uriah Hitindet eng' rotwetap chok, ibare ineendet rotwetap chok ne po lagogap Ammon, yeityo imutu osotyonnyi koek osotyondeng'ung'." 
2Samuel12:10 Nguno anyun, komagoi istogei rotwetap chok eng' koong'ung' amu koisasa ak koimutu osotyotap Uriah Hitindet koek osotyondeng'ung'." 
2Samuel12:11 Kamwa anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Keero, ang'eetun yaityet eng' koong'ung' ak arebenen osotiguk igeeroti, ak agoochi icheek chiitap kokweng'ung' ak koruiyo ak osotiguk kooluu asiista." 
2Samuel12:12 Koiyai eng' ung'oot, ago ayae kiito eng' taitap Israel tugul, ak kogeerei asiis.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Koleenji `Daudi Nathan, “Koayachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto.” Kowolji `Nathan Daudi koleenji, “Kagoisto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agine tengektong'ung'; memee." 
2Samuel12:14 Ago amu kaigoochi eng' yaityoni puunigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poroindo ne oo kochubis, komeei iman agine lakweet ne tuun kisigun.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Kingo kakwo Nathan koonnyi, kobir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lakweet ne kiga sikyi Daudi osotyotap Uriah, ak kimyan kot." 
2Samuel12:16 Ki sa `Daudi Kamuktaindet agobo lakwanooto. Ki irugutkei Daudi ak ki wo ko, kwo koru ng'wony kemout komugul." 
2Samuel12:17 Ki ng'eetyo poisyegap koonnyi kotononio eng' ye mi ineendet koleen kong'eet ineendet, ago ma cham ak ma cham koamis ak icheeget." 
2Samuel12:18 Eng' peetuut ne po tisap, kome lakweet. Ki iywei otwogigap Daudi komwachi ineendet koleenji kagome lakweet, amu ki le, “Ogeero, ngot ko ye kota kosabei lakweet, ko koging'alaalji ineendet ama cham kogas ng'aleekyok, kobirtogei anyun ne tya ngot keleenji kagome lakweet?”" 
2Samuel12:19 Ago kingo keer Daudi kochaamjingei otwogikyik, konai Daudi kole kagome. Ki teebee `Daudi otwogikyik, koleenji, “Kagome lakweet i?” Ak ki wol kole, “Kagome.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi eng' ng'wony kwo koun kei, koiilgei ak kolaach ngoroik alak, yeityo konyo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosa. Kingo tar kosaaei, kwo koonnyi ak king'yemach amitwogik, kindochi tainnyi ak ki am." 
2Samuel12:21 Ki leenji anyun `otwogikyik, “Nee kii koiyai? Koirugutigei ak iriire agobo lakweet yu kota kosabei, ago ko ngo me, ing'eet ak iamisye.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Ki wol kole, “Ko ngo ta kosabei lakweet, ko koarugutigei ak ariire amu koaleen tamangap koriirena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kosap lakweet?" 
2Samuel12:23 Ago nguno ko kagome, kota arugutyigei nee? Ta amuuchi aweech kosap kogeny? Ta awendi ole mi ineendet, ago ma weeksei ineendet konyonei oli ami.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Ki igaigai `Daudi Bathsheba osotyonnyi yeityo kwo ole mi ineendet kotuiyogei. Ki sich weeriit ak koguuree kainennyi Solomon. Amu ki cham `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet," 
2Samuel12:25 ko ki iyooktoe ng'aleek Nathan maotyot, keguure kainennyi Jedidia." 
2Samuel12:26 Kibargei `Joab ak Rabbah ne po lagogap Ammon, ak kiluul nganaseetap kaplaitoryat." 
2Samuel12:27 Ki iyookto `Joab piik koba ole mi Daudi komwachi koleenji, “Kogebargei ak Rabbah, ak koaluul nganaseetap peek." 
2Samuel12:28 Ara anyun, iyum piik che ng'etunotiin, teech ye tokyingei nganaseet ak inam si ma anam anee nganaseet ak kemwaitae kainennyu.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Ki iyum `Daudi piik tugul yeityo koba Rabbah kobargei ak nganasanooto ak koluul. 
2Samuel12:30 Ki inemune laitoryannywa naaryeetap laitornatet, ne kinyigiisindanyi ko ki talendait agenge ne po thahabu, ne ki kinde koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo ak ki kigerchine `Daudi metit. Ki ip komong' parunenik che chaang' miising' che po nganaseet." 
2Samuel12:31 Ak ki imut piik che ki mi oriit komong', ak konde icheek koboisyee musumenosyek, kariik che kiburburenisye ak aonogap kariik, ak kobirchi kobois eng' ole kibeelee matubaruuk. Ki yachi ko uu nooto nganasook tugul che po lagogap Ammon. Yeityo koweek Daudi ak piik tugul koba Jerusalem." 
2Samuel13:1 Ki tinyei Absalom weeriitap Daudi chepkamet ne karaaran, ne ki kiguure Tamar. Ki cham `Amnon weeriitap Daudi Tamar." 
2Samuel13:2 Ki iimgei Amnon kot komyan amu chepkametinnyi Tamar, amu ki pergeiyat, ak ki keer Amnon kouuit koyachi kiy age tugul ineendet." 
2Samuel13:3 Nguno anyun ko ki tinyei Amnon chorweet, ne kainennyi ko ki Jonadab, weeriitap Simea, ng'eetap kametap Daudi. Ki chii ne ng'aaliin miising' Jonadab." 
2Samuel13:4 ki teebee `Jonadab Amnon koleenji, “Kolya o, weeriitap laitoryat, si isagiti peetuut age tugul?” Kowolji `Amnon ineendet koleenji, “Koacham ak amache Tamar chepkametap tupchennyu Absalom.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Koleenji `Jonadab ineendet, “Ui ru eng' itogung'ung' ak iigei chiito ne myani, si ye nyo kwandang'ung' kogeerin, ileenji, Asoomin ale konyo tupchennyu Tamar nyoo kogoono amitwogik aam ak kochobwa amitwogik eng' tainnyu, si kobiit ageer yeityo kogoono eng' eunnyi aam.”" 
2Samuel13:6 Ara ki ru anyun Amnon, koigei chiito ne myani. Kingo nyo laitoryat kogeer ineendet, koleenji Amnon laitoryat, “Asoomin ale konyo tupchennyu Tamar ak kochobwa magatiinik aeng' ageere si kobiit kogoono eng' eunnyi aam.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Koyookto anyun Daudi keguur Tamar eng' kaa ak koleenji, “Ui kootap ng'eetap kamenng'ung' Amnon si ichopchi amitwogik.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Ko uu nooto anyun, kogiwo Tamar kootap ng'eetap kamet Amnon ne kiruei. Ki nam peek che kagitesyi peek ak kokwanykwany yeityo kochop magatiinik eng' tainnyi ak kobeel." 
2Samuel13:9 Yeityo konam taabeetap karnet ak koluluk eng' tainnyi kogoochi, ago ki eesyo koam. Ki le `Amnon, “Ingomanda piik tugul eng' yu ami.” Ak kimanda chii tugul eng' ye ki mi ineendet." 
2Samuel13:10 Ki leenji `Amnon Tamar, “Ibu amitwogik kobwa kooi arue si kobiit igoono eng' eung'ung' aam.” Ki ip Tamar magatiinik che kagochop, koip koba koyooto koipchi ng'eetap kamet Amnon." 
2Samuel13:11 Ago ye kingo kagoip magatinichooto koba ye neegitee ineendet si koam, kosuup ineendet ak koleenji, “Nyoo keruiye tuwai, tupchennyu.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Ak ki wolji `Tamar koleenji, “Achicha, tupchennyu, amesuuba, amu ma mi kiy ne uu no ne nyolu keyai eng' Israel; ameyai yaityoni." 
2Samuel13:13 Si awo ano anyun anee eng' teweernatennyu? Ak iigei inyee age eng' che yaacheen che abusotiin eng' Israel. Ara anyun, asoomin ale ng'alaalji laitoryat; amu maetenen abunjin.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Ago ma cham kogas ng'aleekyik, ago amu ki kiim kosiir chebooto, ko kisuup ak koruiyo ak ineendet." 
2Samuel13:15 Kingo pata kosas `Amnon ineendet eng' saset ne oo miising', amu kieet weget ne kiwech ineendet kosiir chamyet ne kiga chame ineendet. Ki leenji `Amnon ineendet, “Ng'eet, ui.”" 
2Samuel13:16 Kowol Tamar koleenji ineendet, “Ma uu nooto, amu ya yaityoni oo keonena kosiir kiit ne kaiyaiywo.” Ago ma cham kogas ng'aleekyik." 
2Samuel13:17 Yeityo koguur otwogindet ne kiboisyechin konyo ole mi ak koleenji, “Imaande kwonyi kwo eng' yu ami, ak itemel kurgeet ko kagomanda.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Ki ilaachi chebooto ngoryeet ne kooi, amu ki cham kolaachi tiibiigap laitoryat che pergeinik ngoroik che uu chooto. Ki imut anyun otwogindennyi ineendet konyo saang' ak kotemel kurgeet ko kagomong' konyo saang'." 
2Samuel13:19 Ki inde Tamar oreek metinnyi ak kogereer ngoryennyi ne kooi ne ki ilaachi. Kinamatkei met ak kwo koriiroti eng' kutit ne oo. 
2Samuel13:20 Ki leenji `Absalom ng'eetap kametap Tamar ineendet, “Koomi ak Amnon ng'eetap kamenng'ung'? Siis nguno anyun, tupchennyu; ineendet ko ng'eetap kamenng'ung'. Mende kiito muguleldang'ung'.” Ki tebi Tamar anyun ineegei eng' kootap ng'eetap kamet Absalom." 
2Samuel13:21 Ago kingo kas Laitoryat `Daudi tuguuchuuto tugul, konereech miising'." 
2Samuel13:22 Ma mwachi `Absalom Amnon kiy ne myee anan ko ne ya. Ki sas `Absalom Amnon, amu kiga suup chepkamennyi Tamar." 
2Samuel13:23 Ye kingo siirto kenyiisyek aeng'u, ko ki mi Absalom ak piik che kitilei koroorigap keechiirek eng' Baal-hasor ne mi ye neegitee Ephraim, ak kiguur Absalom weeriik tugul che po laitoryat." 
2Samuel13:24 Ki wo Absalom ole mi laitoryat ak koleenji, “Keero, tinyei otwogindeng'ung' piik che tilei koroorigap keechiirek. Ara asoomin ale ingoba laitoryat ak otwogikyik kobooto otwogindeng'ung'.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Kowolji `laitoryat Absalom koleenji, “Achicha, weeriinnyu, ma myee keebe tugul, si ma kigoonin nyigiisindo. Ki igaigai ineendet,” ago nganda ma cham kwo, ko ki iberuur ineendet." 
2Samuel13:26 Ki soom anyun Absalom kole, “Ngot ko mewendi, asoomin ale keebe kobooto Amnon tupchennyu.” Ki teebee `laitoryat ineendet koleenji, “Amu nee si imache obe tuwai?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Ago ki igaigai `Absalom ineendet, kochamji Amnon ak weeriik tugul che po laitoryat koba kobooto ineendet." 
2Samuel13:28 Ki ng'at `Absalom otwogik koleenji, “Ye kagobaibait muguleldap Amnon eng' maiyek, ko ye aleenjok, ‘Okwer Amnon,’ obar anyun ineendet matoiywei. Ma anee ne kang'atak? Ogimegitu ak onyiganitu.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Ki yachi `otwogigap Absalom Amnon ko uu ye kiga ng'at Absalom. Ki ng'eetyo anyun weeriik tugul che po laitoryat kolaany chii tugul nyumbunnyi ak komwei. 
2Samuel13:30 Ye kita kobendi eng' ooreet, koit ng'aleek ole kimi Daudi keele, kagobar `Absalom weeriik tugul che po laitoryat, ak ma ng'et agot agenge eng' icheek." 
2Samuel13:31 Ki ng'eet anyun laitoryat kogereer ngoroikyik ak koru eng' ng'wony. Ki tononso otwogikyik tugul eng' ole mi ineendet ko kagogereer ngoroikwak. 
2Samuel13:32 Ki wol Jonadab weeriitap Simea, ng'eetap kametap Daudi kole, “Mat kobwaat kiptaiyandennyu kole kagebar weeriigap laitoryat tugul, amu Amnon ineegei ne kame. Amu kiga kotil niito eng' ng'atuutyetap Absalom kobooch peetuut ne kigasuup Amnon chepkamennyi Tamar." 
2Samuel13:33 Nooto anyun, amat konde kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat kii muguleldanyi, kobwaat kole kagobek weeriik tugul che po laitoryat. Amnon ineegei ne kame.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Kimwei Absalom. Ak kitabendo murenet age ne kiriipsei, ak kingo keer, kogeer kobwanei piik che chaang' kobunu ooreetap tegeiyat ne ki mi let eng' ineendet." 
2Samuel13:35 Ki leenji `Jonadab laitoryat, “Keero, kagobwa weeriigap laitoryat, ko uu ye kamwa otwogindeng'ung' ko uu nooto.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Kingo kagogees ng'alaalet, koit weeriigap laitoryat ak kowaakyo ak kooteeiyo. Ki ite laitoryat agine ak otwogikyik tugul eng' kateet ne oo." 
2Samuel13:37 Ago ki mwei Absalom kwo ole mi Talmai weeriitap Amiur laitoryatap Gesur. Ki riirchi `Daudi weeriinnyi peetuut age tugul. 
2Samuel13:38 Kimwei anyun Absalom kwo Gesur ak ki tebee olooto kenyiisyek somok. 
2Samuel13:39 Ak kimach miising' Laitoryat Daudi kwo ole mi Absalom, amu kiga konyoor kagaigaet agobo Amnon, amu kiga kome." 
2Samuel14:1 Ki nai Joab weeriitap Zeruiah kole tokyingei kabwaatutigap muguleldap Laitoryat Absalom. 
2Samuel14:2 Ara anyun ki iyookto `Joab keguur kwondo ne utaat eng' Tekoa yeityo koleenji, “Asaain ale iyaigei ogergeitu ak chiito ne riirei. Ilaach ngoroigap riirek, amat iilegei mwaita, ago ogergeitu ak kwondo ne ki koriir keny agobo chiito ne kime." 
2Samuel14:3 Yeityo iwe kaplaitoryat ak ing'alaalji ko uu ni.” Ki inde anyun Joab ng'aleek kutitap kwonyooto. 
2Samuel14:4 Ara anyun ki wo kwonyotok po Tekoa kaplaitoryat, ak ye kingo ng'alaaljin laitoryat, kobutyi ng'wony koting'e togeennyi ng'wony, kogutung'ji ak kole, “Toreto, ee laitoryat.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Ki teebee `laitoryat ineendet koleenji, “Amin nee?” Ak ki wolji koleenji, “Aa kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot iman. Ki kome manong'otyondennyu." 
2Samuel14:6 Ak ki tinyei otwogindeng'ung' weeriik aeng', ak kiboryo tuwai eng' timiin, ama piit chii ne ki ibesyo icheek ak kikwer `age age ak kobar." 
2Samuel14:7 Ki ng'eetyo koot komugul koborye otwogindeng'ung' ak ki le, ‘Koonu ineendet ne kobar ng'eetap kamet si kobiit kebar ineendet agobo saboondap ng'eetap kamennyi nooto kobar, si kebar agine ne kata namei tuguuk, si komis mannyu ne kong'et, ama ituukyi manong'otyondennyu kainet anan ko ne ng'etu eng' ng'wony.’ ”" 
2Samuel14:8 Ki leenji `laitoryat kwonyooto, “Ui koong'ung', si ang'at keyaun ng'aleechooto.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Ago ki leenji kwonyooto po Tekoa laitoryat, “Kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat, ingotebena tengegi ak kotebee kootap abba, ak ingoek ne ma tinyei ng'oogisto laitoryat ak ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Kowol laitoryat kole, “Chii age tugul ne mwaun ng'olyoo imutwaa, si mata kotwain kogeny.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Yeityo komwa kwonyooto kole, “Asoomin ale ingobwaat `laitoryat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', si mata kobaris ne yaaktoi korotiik, si ma par weeriinnyu.” Ak ki le laitoryat, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma ibutyin ng'wony agot sumeiyot agenge ne po weeriing'ung'.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Kole anyun kwonyooto, “Asoomin ale chamji cheptong'ung' ne otwogindet komwachi ng'olyoot kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat.” Ak ki le, “Mwa.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Ki le kwonyooto, “Kilya si ibwaat kiit ne uu no agobo piigap Kamuktaindet? Amu ngo mwa laitoryat ng'olyoot ne uu ni, ko kaigei chii ne tinyei ng'oogisto, amu ma imut laitoryat konyo kaa nenyi ne ki kioon." 
2Samuel14:14 Amu nyoljinech kebegu ne matiny ak ki uu peek che kagitumji ng'wony, che ma kimuuchi keram kogeny. Ama istoi `Kamuktaindet saboondo, ago chobei ooreet si mata koigei ne ki kioon ne ki king'eeto." 
2Samuel14:15 Nooto anyun kaanyo amwachi ng'olyoondoni kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, amu ki imua piik. Ki ale anee otwogindeng'ung' ne chepto, ‘Ang'alaaljini laitoryat, abeere imuuchi laitoryat koyachi otwogindennyi soomennyi.’" 
2Samuel14:16 Amu kasei laitoryat ak kosarwo anee otwogindennyi eng' eutap chiito ne machei kobara ak weeriinnyu koistoenech poroteetap Kamuktaindet. 
2Samuel14:17 Amwa anyun anee otwogindeng'ung' ale, ‘Asoomin ale, ingomyeeit ng'olyootap kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat. Iguitos kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat kiit ne myee ak ne ya ko uu malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ingotep Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobooten.’ ”" 
2Samuel14:18 Ki wolji anyun laitoryat kwonyooto koleenji, “Asoomin ale, ameung'ena kiy age tugul ne ateebenen.” Ak ki wol kwonyooto kole, “Ingong'alaal kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat nguno.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Koteebee laitoryat koleenji, “Tos omi ak Joab eng' ng'aleechu tugul?” Kowol kwonyooto kole, “Ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung', kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ma mi chii ne imuuchi komasta kwo eutap tai anan kwo murot kaataam eng' kiy age tugul ne kagomwa kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat. Amu kong'ata otwogindeng'ung' Joab, ak komwaiwo anee otwogindeng'ung' ng'aleechuuto tugul." 
2Samuel14:20 Ki yai otwogindeng'ung' Joab kiito, si kobiit kewal kiit ne uu ng'olyoondoniito. Tinyei kiptaiyandennyu utaatyet ne uu utaatyetap malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet, konai tuguuk tugul che mi ng'wony.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Ki leenji anyun `laitoryat Joab, “Keer anyuno, ayae kioto. Ui anyun, imutu nerananooto Absalom.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Ki ibutyi ng'wony Joab, kong'uruuk ak koberuur laitoryat. Ki le Joab, “Kagonai otwogindeng'ung' rani kole kaanyooru myeeindo eng' taing'ung', kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat, amu kagoyachi laitoryat otwogindennyi soomennyi.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Ki ng'eet anyun Joab kwo Gesur, kwo komut Absalom konyo Jerusalem." 
2Samuel14:24 Ago ki le laitoryat, “Amat konyo kogeero togoch, ago ingowo koonnyi.” Kwo anyun Absalom koonnyi, ama keer laitoryat togoch." 
2Samuel14:25 Ki ma komi eng' Israel tugul chiito ne ki kilasu eng' korooronindo ko uu Absalom. Ki ma kotinyei perutyet kong'etee keldebesyet agoi metinnyi parak. 
2Samuel14:26 Kingo nem metinnyi, amu ki inemu suumeekyik eng' kagesunetap kenyiit age tugul, amu kinyigiisen eng' ineendet, ko ki ngebiman suumeekyik ko ki egu keruutik pogol aeng' ak kiy, eng' ratilitap laitoryat." 
2Samuel14:27 Ki kisikyi Absalom weeriik somok ak chepto agenge, ne ki kiguure kainennyi Tamar, ak ki chepto ne karaaran kot." 
2Samuel14:28 Ki tebee Absalom kenyiisyek aeng' Jerusalem koma keerei laitoryat togoch. 
2Samuel14:29 Ki iyookto anyun Absalom keguur Joab, si kobiit koyookto kwo kaplaitoryat, ago ma cham konyo ole mi ineendet. Ki iyookto kogeny ne po aeng', ago ma cham konyo." 
2Samuel14:30 Ki leenji anyun Absalom otwogikyik, “Ogeero, neegitee mbareetap Joab mbareennyu, ak tinyei baale eng' mbaranooto. Oba obeel.” Ak ki peel otwogigap Absalom mbaranooto." 
2Samuel14:31 Kong'eet anyun `Joab ak konyo ole mi Absalom eng' koonnyi, ak koteebe ineendet koleenji, “Amu nee si kobeel otwogiguk mbareennyu?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Ak ki wolji `Absalom Joab koleenji, “Koaguurin ale, nyoo yu si kobiit ayookten iwe kaplaitoryat, ileenji, Amu nee si anyo eng' Gesur? Kita myee atebee olooto agoi. Chamwo anyun nguno ageer togeetap laitoryat. Nguno anyun, ngot atinye tengekto, kobara.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Ki nyo anyun `Joab kaplaitoryat ak komwachi; ak kingo kageguur Absalom, konyo anyun kaplaitoryat ak kong'uruuk kot kotiiny togeennyi ng'wony eng' taitap laitoryat. Ki ng'utut `Laitoryat Absalom." 
2Samuel15:1 Kingo pata ni, kochopchigei Absalom chepkichutit kobooto paraisisyek, ak murenik konom che rwae kondoe ineendet." 
2Samuel15:2 Ki ng'eetei Absalom karon miising' ak kotonon eng' ye neegitee ormariichet. Ak kingo tinyei chii age tugul ng'olyoo ne ibei kwo kaplaitoryat kirwookyinechi, koguurei Absalom konyo ye mi ineendet ak koleenji, “Ii po nganaseet ingiro?” Ak kole, “Po otwogindeng'ung' age eng' pororyosyegap Israel.”" 
2Samuel15:3 Yeityo koleenji Absalom ineendet, “Keero, myach ng'aleeguk ak ko lititen, ago ma mi chii ne ki inde laitoryat kogasun.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Ki le kogeny Absalom, “Oiye, nda kiga kiyaa aek kirwoogindet eng' emet, ko ngo nyo ole ami chii age tugul ne tinyei ng'olyoo anan kirwooget, ayachini imanda!”" 
2Samuel15:5 Kingo riikyi chii age tugul kwo kong'uruuk eng' tainnyi, koyogooito eunnyi, konam ineendet ak kotorooch." 
2Samuel15:6 Ki yachi Absalom ko uu nooto Israel tugul che ki pendi kaplaitoryat agobo kirwooget, ak ki chamak ko uu nooto anyun Absalom mugulelwegap piigap Israel." 
2Samuel15:7 Kingo keskei kenyiisyek ang'wanu, koleenji `Absalom laitoryat, “Kaigai ichamwo awo agoito kaarortaennyu, ne ki aaroorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Hebron." 
2Samuel15:8 Amu ki aaroorte anee otwogindeng'ung' ye kita ami Gesur eng' Syria ale, ‘Ngot koweektaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny iman awo Jerusalem, aboisyechini anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:9 Kingo leenji laitoryat ineendet, “Ui eng' kaalyeet,” kong'eet anyun ak kwo Hebron." 
2Samuel15:10 Ago ki iyookto Absalom segeik koba pororyosyek tugul che po Israel, koleenji, “Eng' sait ne kogas iryageet, omwa ole, Laitorani Absalom eng' Hebron.”" 
2Samuel15:11 Ki pa piik pogolwogik aeng'u eng' Jerusalem kobooto Absalom che kiga kiguur ak ki pa eng' perberindanywa komengen kiy. 
2Samuel15:12 Ki iyookto Absalom keguur Ahitopel Gilonindet, toretindetap Daudi eng' nganasennyi, Gilo, ye ki igoitoi tiseiywot. Kitesak chaamset, amu kitesaksei piik che namegei ak Absalom." 
2Samuel15:13 Ki nyo chiito kap Daudi ne ki ibu ng'aleek, ak koleenji, “Mi mugulelwegap piigap Israel ak Absalom.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Ak ki leenji `Daudi otwogikyik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet eng' Jerusalem, “Ong'eetyee, kanyool kemwei, amu ngo ma uu nooto, koma mi chii ne chilili eng' Absalom. Ongechaakte, si ma nyoorwech nguno ak koibwech yaityet ak kobar nganaseet eng' rotwetap chok.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Kowolji `otwogik laitoryat koleenji, “Ki chobootiin acheek otwogiguk keyai kiit age tugul ne kalewen kiptaiyandennyo laitoryat.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Ki manda laitoryat ak ki isup ineendet `piik tugul che po koonnyi. Ago ki pagaakta laitoryat chebaigeinik taman koriip kootap laitornatet. 
2Samuel15:17 Ki manda laitoryat anyun ak ki isup ineendet `piik tugul, ago ki tebi kitigin eng' koot ne mi tabanuutap nganaseet." 
2Samuel15:18 Ki pa otwogikyik tugul kobun ye neegitee ineendet. Ki indoe ineendet Keretik, Peletik tugul ak Gitik che ki murenik pogol lo che ki isubu ineendet kobunu Gath." 
2Samuel15:19 Yeityo koleenji laitoryat Itai Gitindet, “Amu nee si inyoo keebe tugul aginye? Weektegei, ui otebi ak Laitoryat Absalom. Ii punootyo inyee ne ki kionun eng' oldang'ung', ara weektegei ui oldang'ung'." 
2Samuel15:20 Amu koiitu amut, tos myee amutatin ketogostoi ak kerektoi? Amu awendi ole kamach. Weege anyun ak iweech tupchosyeguk, ak ingotep kobooten rireenet ak imanit.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Ago ki wolji `Itai laitoryat koleenji, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko uu ye sabei kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ko oldo tugul ole mi kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ami olooto agane iman, anee otwogindeng'ung' ngo eng' meet anan eng' sabeet.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Koleenji `Daudi Itai, “Ui lande.” Ki landa anyun Itai Gitindet ak piikyik tugul kobooto lagok tugul che ki mi ak ineendet." 
2Samuel15:23 Ki waach emet komugul eng' kutit ne oo yooto ki pendi kolondoi, ak ki landae laitoryat kererutap Kidron ak piik tugul kotokyingei surkwen." 
2Samuel15:24 Ki mi Zadok agine kobooto Lawiik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet koibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet. Ki itu, konde ng'wony moingetap Kamuktaindet, yeityo kogoito Abiathar kagoochinoik agoi komanda piik tugul eng' nganaseet." 
2Samuel15:25 Yeityo koleenji `laitoryat Zadok, “Oweekte moingetap Kamuktaindet koweek kwo nganaseet. Ngot anyooru chameet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko tuun komutwaa kogeny ineendet ak koboorwo moingonooto ak ole tebee." 
2Samuel15:26 Ago ngot komwa kole, Ma abaibai eng' inyee, ami yu, ingoyaiywo ko uu ye keerei kole myee.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Ki mwachi anyun laitoryat kogeny Zadok tisiindet koleenji, “Tos ma ii keerindet? Weektegei nganaseet eng' kaalyeet ak weeriiguk tuwai; Ahimaaz weeriing'ung', ak Jonathan weeriitap Abiathar." 
2Samuel15:28 Atebee ole kilandoe kebendi surkwen, agoi agas ng'olyoo eng' inyee ne imwaiwo.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Ki ip anyun Zadok ak Abiathar moingetap Kamuktaindet kogeny kwo Jerusalem, ak ki pa kotebee olooto." 
2Samuel15:30 Ki togosta Daudi kobun ooreet ne kitogostoe kebendi tulweetap mseituni koriiroti. Kiga tuchkei met ago ma tinyei kweonik. Kituchkei met chii age tugul eng' piik tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet ak kotogostoi, koriiryoti." 
2Samuel15:31 Ak ki kimwachi Daudi keleenji, “Mi Ahitopel kobooto njaamigap Absalom.” Ak ki sa Daudi kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asoomin ale, wal kirwoogetap Ahitopel koek perberyo.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Kingo it `Daudi tulweet parak ole ki cham kilasune Kamuktaindet, ko ki nyo Hushai Arkindet kotorook ineendet, ko kagogereer ngoryennyi ak komi ng'ung'unyek metinnyi." 
2Samuel15:33 Ki leenji `Daudi ineendet, “Ngot inyone keebe tuwai iegu mileet eng' anee." 
2Samuel15:34 Ago ngot iweege iwe nganaseet ak ileenji Absalom, ‘Aegu otwogindeng'ung', ee laitoryat ko uu ye ki aa otwogindetap kwandang'ung' eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto, aegu anyun nguno otwogindeng'ung'.’ Eng' yooto anyun, iterteerwa kirwoogetap Ahitopel." 
2Samuel15:35 Tos ma mi kobooten tisiik, Zadok ak Abiathar? Ko ye igase ng'olyoo age tugul ne punu kootap laitoryat, imwachi Zadok ak Abiathar, tisiik." 
2Samuel15:36 Tinyei icheek eng' yooto weeriikwak aeng', Ahimaaz weeriitap Zadok ak Jonathan weeriitap Abiathar. Ara oyogune icheek kiy age tugul ne ogase.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Ki it anyun nganaseet Hushai chorweetap Daudi ye kingo itei Absalom Jerusalem. 
2Samuel16:1 Kingo kagosiir `Daudi tulweet parak kitigin, ko ki tuiyo ak ineendet Siba otwogindetap Mephibosheth, kogetu sigiroik aeng' che kiga kiito koibei magatiinik pogol aeng', mooriik pogol agenge che po sabibuk che yamyotiin, logoek pogol agenge che po kemei ak soteetap divaik." 
2Samuel16:2 Ki teebee `laitoryat Siba koleenji, “Po nee tuguuchu?” Kowol Siba kole, “Sigiroik ko chelaanyei piigap kootap laitoryat, ko po murenik magatiinik, logoechu po kemei, ko che amei ak divaik ko si koe piik che katanuiso eng' surkwen.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Koteebee `laitoryat Siba koleenji, “Mi ano weeriitap kiptaiyandeng'ung'?” Koleenji `Siba laitoryat, “Kotebi eng' Jerusalem, amu ki le, ‘Kono rani kootap Israel laitornatetap abba.’ ”" 
2Samuel16:4 Yeityo koleenji `laitoryat Siba, “Cheguuk tuguuk tugul che po Mephibosheth.” Yeityo kole `Siba, “Agutunyi, inganyoor chameet eng' taing'ung', kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Kingo it `laitoryat Daudi Baurim, komong' eng' olooto chiito ne po ooreetap kap Saulo ne ki kiguure kainennyi Shimei, weeriitap Gera. Ki mong' ineendet kochubisyonu." 
2Samuel16:6 Kilach `ineendet Daudi ak otwogikyik eng' koik nga kimi piik tugul che nyigoonen eunnyi ne po tai ak eunnyi ne po kaataam. 
2Samuel16:7 Ki mwa Shimei ye kichubisyei kole, “Ui, ui inyee tartaindonep koroti, kiptengekyondoni ya." 
2Samuel16:8 Kagoweekyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor korotiik tugul che po kootap Saulo, ne ki ilaitoran igeer ineendet, ak kagonde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatetap eutap weeriing'ung' Absalom. Keero, kaginamin eng' yaityeng'ung', amu ii tartain ne po koroti.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Ki teebee anyun `Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah laitoryat koleenji, “Amu nee si kochup kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat sesoni ki kome? Asoomin ale ichamwo alanda awo atil metinnyi.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Koleenji `laitoryat, “Kiting'egei nee ak okweek, weeriigap Zeruiah? Amu chubisyei, Ngot ko amu kamwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koleenji, ‘Chup Daudi,’ ko ng'oo anyun ne mwaei kole, ‘Amu nee si iyai ko uu no?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi Abisai, kobooto otwogikyik tugul, “Ngot ko cheeng'ei saboondanyu weeriinnyu ne ki punu poortanyu, ko tam nee anyun Benjaminindoni. Omete ineegei, ak ongochubis, ngot ko kagong'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koyai ko uu nooto." 
2Samuel16:12 Abeere keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaityet ne kagiyaiywo, ak igeerwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne myee agobo chubisyoni kagichubo rani.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Ki pa anyun Daudi ak piikyik pandanywa: ki wo Shimei korob tulweet kotoorchigei ineendet, kochubisyoti, kolachei ineendet eng' koik ak koseerchin temburyek." 
2Samuel16:14 Ki it laitoryat ak piik tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet ko kang'etyo kot, ak ki imuuny eng' yooto." 
2Samuel16:15 Eng' kasarata ko ki it Jerusalem `Absalom ak piik tugul, murenigap Israel ak kimi Ahitopel ak ineendet." 
2Samuel16:16 Kingo it Hushai Arkindet, chorweetap Daudi, ole mi Absalom koleenji `Hushai Absalom, “Ingosap laitoryat, ingosap laitoryat.”" 
2Samuel16:17 Ago kiteebe `Absalom Hushai koleenji, “Tos myeeindong'ung' niito ne iyachini chorweng'ung'? Amu nee si mobe ak chorweng'ung'?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Kowolji `Hushai Absalom koleenji, “Achicha, abunjini ineendet ne kolewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, pichu ak murenik tugul che po Israel, ak kitebyei ak ineendet." 
2Samuel16:19 Kogeny, aboisyechini ng'oo? Ne ma eng' taitap weeriinnyi? Ko uu ye ki aboisye eng' taitap kwandang'ung', aboisyei ko uu nooto eng' taing'ung'.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Koleenji anyun `Absalom Ahitopel, “Mwaa kiit ne kiyae.”" 
2Samuel16:21 Koleenji `Ahitopel Absalom, “Obaigei ak chebaigeinigap kwandang'ung' che ki pagaakta koriip kootap laitornatet. Ye kas Israel tugul kole ii puunyootap kwandang'ung', kogimegitu che omi tugul.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Ara ki teekyi anyun `icheek Absalom emait eng' paragutap koot, ak ki ipkei Absalom ak chebaigeinigap kwandanyi kogeerei Israel tugul." 
2Samuel16:23 Eng' peetuusyechooto anyun, ko ki uu kirwoogetap Ahitopel ne ki irwoochi, kirwoogetap chii ne teebei eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet. Ki uu nooto anyun kirwoogutik tugul che po Ahitopel eng' Daudi ak eng' Absalom." 
2Samuel17:1 Ki leenji `Ahitopel Absalom kogeny, “Chamwo alewen murenik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng', ak ang'eet asup Daudi kemouni." 
2Samuel17:2 Si ache kota ko ng'etat koma imuuchi koyai kiy, ak amuu, ak komwei piik tugul che mi kobooto ineendet. Si abar laitoryat ineegei," 
2Samuel17:3 ak amutun piik tugul. Uu meetap chiichooto icheeng'e, ye keeweech piik tugul, ak kotebi piik tugul eng' kaalyeet.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Ki ibaibai Absalom ng'olyoondonooto, kobooto poisyek tugul che po Israel." 
2Samuel17:5 Yeityo komwa `Absalom kole, “Oguur Hushai Arkindet agine konyo si kegas kiit ne mwaei agine.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Kingo it Hushai ole mi Absalom, komwachi Absalom ineendet koleenji, “Kamwa ko uu ni Ahitopel. Ara ki yai ko uu ye kamwa? Ngo ma uu nooto, imwa inyee ng'olyoong'ung'.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Ki leenji `Hushai Absalom, “Ma myee ng'olyoot ne kamwa Ahitopel ra.”" 
2Samuel17:8 Ki le kogeny Hushai, “Ingen kwandang'ung' ak piikyik ile piik che nyigoonen ak tinyei ng'wanindo eng' kabwaatutikwak ko uu magalaluut ne kagirebe aarekyik eng' timiin. Ne siirei ko kwandang'ung' ko chiitap lugeet; ma koi ruiyo ak piik." 
2Samuel17:9 Agot nguno ko kogiuny eng' keriinget, anan ko eng' komosta age. Si ye kagobek alak eng' icheek korook, ko age tugul ne kagas komwa kole, ‘Mi parisyet eng' kwenutap piik che isubi Absalom.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Agot ineendet ne nyigan, ne uu muguleldanyi muguleldap ng'etundo, kochootei kogesugei, amu ingen Israel tugul kole chiito ne nyigan kwandang'ung' ak icheek che mi ak ineendet ko piik che nyigoonen." 
2Samuel17:11 Ago arwoochi aleen, ingoyumjingei Israel tugul, kobooch Dan agoi Beer-sheba, kotenit ng'aniek che miitei ngeguutap araraita eng' chaang'indo, si iwe lugeet inyeendet." 
2Samuel17:12 Si keche ineendet eng' komosta ne kaginyoorchi ak kibutyi ineendet ko uu ye ibutyin rewoot ng'wony. Ma kituuchi agot agenge eng' ineendet ak piik tugul che mi kobooto ineendet. 
2Samuel17:13 Ak kogeny, ngwo nganaseet, koibu Israel anyun rogoosyek kobwa nganasanooto, yeityo kong'us kwo aineet kot koma ng'et koita agenge ne ming'in eng' olooto.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Kole anyun Absalom ak piik tugul che po Israel, Karaaran kirwoogetap Hushai Arkindet kosiir kirwoogetap Ahitopel. Amu kiga til Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koterteer kirwooget ne myee ne po Ahitopel, si kobiit koipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaityet Absalom." 
2Samuel17:15 Ki leenji anyun `Hushai Zadok ak Abiathar tisiik, Kamwachi Ahitopel ko uu ni ak ko uu ni Absalom ak poisyegap Israel, ago kamwa ko uu ni ak ko uu ni." 
2Samuel17:16 Ara anyun oyookte ng'olyoot ochokyi ak omwachi Daudi oleenji, “Amat irue kemouni eng' ole kilandoe kebendi surkwen, ago myee olande ui tugul, si ma kigees laitoryat ak piik tugul che mi ak ineendet.”" 
2Samuel17:17 Ki tebi Jonathan ak Ahimaaz eng' ole neegitee En-rogelo. Ki cham kowendi chepto ne otwogindet komwachin icheek ng'aleek, ak ki pendi komwachin Laitoryat Daudi, amu ki ma komachei kogeer chii icheek kobendi nganaseet." 
2Samuel17:18 Ago ki keer icheek ng'etet age, ak kwo komwachi Absalom. Ki pa tuwai kochaakta ak kiit kootap chiito age eng' Baurim. Ki tinyei chiichooto keriingetap peek eng' kurgennyi, ak ki pa kochoortagei keringonooto oriit." 
2Samuel17:19 Ki nam osotyonnyi kerwet ak kogeree kutitap keriingonooto ak komae nganuuk che kagibor paragunnyi, ak ma ki nai." 
2Samuel17:20 Ki pwa otwogigap Absalom ole mi kwonyooto eng' koyooto ak kingo teebee koleenji, “Mi ano Ahimaaz ak Jonathan?” Koleenji kwonyooto icheek, “Kagoba kolandae kereruut ne mi peek.” Kingo kagocheeng', amaimuuchi konyoor icheek, koweek koba Jerusalem." 
2Samuel17:21 Kingo kagoba icheek, komong' eng' keriingonooto po peek ak koba komwachi Laitoryat Daudi koleenji, “Ong'eetyee ak olande eng' peek, ochaakte, amu kagotil ko uu ni ak ko uu ni Ahitopel agobo okweek.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Ki ng'eet anyun Daudi ak piik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet ak kolandae Jordan. Kingo choru asiista, ko ki ma kota komi agot agenge eng' icheek ne ki tomo kolanda eng' Jordan." 
2Samuel17:23 Kingo keer Ahitopel kole mata koosup chii kirwoogennyi, koiito sigiryennyi ak kong'eet kwo kaa, kot koit nganasennyi. Kirarchi keet piigap koonnyi yeityo kwo kogeetkei, ak kime. Ara ki kitupchi poortanyi kereritap kwandanyi." 
2Samuel17:24 Ki it `Daudi Mahanaim, ak ki landa Absalom eng' Jordan ineendet ak murenik tugul che po Israel kobooto ineendet." 
2Samuel17:25 Kiga kolewen `Absalom Amasa koboi lugeet kogeer Joab. Amasa ko ki weeriitap chiito ne kainennyi ko ki Itra Yahudyot, ne ki koipkei ak Abigail cheptap Nahas, chepkametap Zeruiah kametap Joab." 
2Samuel17:26 Ki teech Israel ak Absalom emetap Gilead. 
2Samuel17:27 Kingo it `Daudi Mahanaim, koip Sobi weeriitap Nahas ne po Rabbah ne po lagogap Ammon, Makir weeriitap Amiel ne po Lo-debar, Barsilai Gileadindet ne po Rogelim," 
2Samuel17:28 itogusyek, taabook, tereenik, nganuuk, ak baale, peek ak peek che ng'ootin, magandek, sogoryek, igobek" 
2Samuel17:29 kobooto kumyat, mwaitap cheego ak keechiirek ak mugunigap cheego, koipchi Daudi ak piik che ki mi kobooto ineendet, koam. Amu ki le, “Amei rubeet piik, ng'etyotiin ak koamei melelda eng' surkwen.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Ki iit `Daudi piik che ki mi ak ineendet ak konde kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak kiptainigap pogolwogik koboi icheek. 
2Samuel18:2 Ak kipchei Daudi lugeet kobee kweanaik somok: ki inde Joab kondochi kebeberta agenge eng' somok. Konde Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah, ng'eetap kametap Joab, kondochi kebeberta agenge eng' somok ak ki inde Itai Gitindet kondochi kebeberta agenge eng' somok. Yeityo koleenji `laitoryat piik, “Awendi agane iman kobootok.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Ago ki le piik, “Mewendi, amu ngot kemwei, koma magenech kiy, anan ngot kobek kebeberta agenge eng' acheek, koma magenech kiy, ago oaechine ak piik eliphuusyek taman eng' acheek. Nooto anyun, myee ichoboge si itoretech eng' nganaseet.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Koleenji `laitoryat icheek, “Kiit ne ogeere okweek ole nyolu, ayae nooto.” Ara anyun kitonone laitoryat ormariichet taban, ak kimanda piik kobee pogolwogik ak eliphuusyek." 
2Samuel18:5 Ki ng'at `laitoryat Joab ak Abisai ak Itai koleenji, “Oriree nerananooto Absalom agobo anee.” Ak ki kas piik tugul ye king'atei `laitoryat kiptainik tugul agobo Absalom." 
2Samuel18:6 Ki manda anyun piik koba kobargei ak Israel eng' keeweet, ak kimi pooryeet eng' timdap Ephraim." 
2Samuel18:7 Ki par otwogigap Daudi piigap Israel eng' yooto, ak ki piit parisyet ne oo eng' olooto eng' peetuunooto ne po piik eliphuusyek tiptem." 
2Samuel18:8 Kiyom emet tugul lugonooto, ak kibar timiin piik eng' peetuunooto che siirei che ki kibare rotwetap chok." 
2Samuel18:9 Ki chunji `Absalom otwogigap Daudi. Kibunei Absalom nyumbunnyi, ak kingo chut nyumbut mooriik che kichang'a che po keetitap alayet ne oo, konam metitap Absalom keetoto ak kisonginin. Ki wo anyun nyumbut ne ki punoti kosiirto." 
2Samuel18:10 Kingo keer chiito age, komwachi Joab koleenji, “Kageer Absalom kosonginini eng' keetitap alayet.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Koleenji `Joab chiichooto kimwachin ineendet, “Nee ni, Keroo ineendet? Kalya si metoor ineendet eng' yooto kosore kokwer ng'wonyut? Ak ta kaagoonin fedhaisyek taman ak pireneet.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Ago ki leenji `chiichooto Joab, “Agot ndaname fedhaisyek eliphuut eng' eunnyu, ko matwae kora weeriitap laitoryat eng' eunnyu. Amu king'atin laitoryat ak Abisai ak Itai kegase kole, ‘Oriipkei, si ma twa chii nerananooto Absalom.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Nda kagaayachi saboondanyi ko uu nooto, ang'aalse (ama mi ng'olyoo ne ung'aksei eng' laitoryat), ko kata iistoenage inyee.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Kole anyun Joab, “Ma myee kigagei ne tee ni ak inyee.” Ki nam ng'otwek somok ak kotoor muguleldap Absalom, ye kita kosabei eng' keetoto." 
2Samuel18:15 Ak kiyiem ineendet murenik tamanu, che ki ipchin `Joab kariikyik ak kotoor Absalom, kobar." 
2Samuel18:16 Yeityo koguut `Joab iryageet ak ki week piik kobagaakta ooreet ne ki oone Israel, amu ki eetee Joab piik." 
2Samuel18:17 Kisut Absalom ak kowiirchi keriinget ne oo eng' timiin ak korurukyi ineendet karurugutyet ne oo ne po koik. Kimwei Israel tugul, kwo age tugul emainnyi." 
2Samuel18:18 Ye kita kosabei Absalom, ko kiga koteekyigei kiit ne uu toloita eng' atebweetap laitorya. Amu ki le, “Ma tinyei weeriit ne kibwaatee kainennyu.” Kimwaitae kioto kainennyi, ak ki kiguure toloitap Absalom agoi ra." 
2Samuel18:19 Ki le anyun Ahimaaz weeriitap Zadok, “Ingalabat, aipchi laitoryat ng'aleek, aleenji kagoyaaktochigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugetuut eng' puunikyik.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Ago ki leenji `Joab ineendet, “Meibe ng'aleek ra, ago iibe ng'aleek peetuut age. Meibe ng'olyoo age tugul peetuuni, amu kagome weeriitap laitoryat.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Yeityo koleenji `Joab Kusindet, “Ui mwachi laitoryat tuguuk che kaigeer.” Ki ing'uruuk Kusindet eng' taitap Joab, ak kolabat." 
2Samuel18:22 Koleenji anyun Ahimaaz, weeriitap Zadok Joab kogeny, “Agot nda piitu kiy age tugul, asoomin ale, chamwo agane alabat asup Kusindet.” Ago kiteebe Joab koleenji, “Amu nee si imache ilabat o, weeriinnyu, ago mesiche melek agobo ng'aleechooto?”" 
2Samuel18:23 Ago ki le, “Agot nda piitu kiy age tugul, alabati.” Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Labat.” Ki labat anyun Ahimaaz kobun ooreetap Warenget ak ki wo kondoe Kusindet." 
2Samuel18:24 Ki tebee Daudi kwenutap ormariichok aeng', ak kitogosta riibindet kwo ormariichet parak kot koit irimeet. Kingo tabendoi kogeer, chiito ne labatu ineegei." 
2Samuel18:25 Ki kuurso riibindet ak komwachi laitoryat. Kole laitoryat, “Ngot ko ineegei, kotinyei ng'aleek che miyach.” Kingo teseitai kolabot koriik," 
2Samuel18:26 kogeer riibindet chiito age kolabotu, ak kiguur riibindet, riibindetap ormariichet ak koleenji, “Labotu chiito age ineegei.” Kole laitoryat, “Agot agine koibu ng'aleek che myach.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Ki le riibindet, “Ageere ko kergei labatetap ne indou ak labatetap Ahimaaz weeriitap Zadok.” Ak ki le laitoryat, “Ineendet ko chii ne myee, ak ibu ng'aleek che myach.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ki kuurso Ahimaaz ak koleenji laitoryat, “Chamegei kiy tugul.” Ki ing'uruuk eng' taitap laitoryat kot kotiiny togeennyi ng'wony ak kole, “Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne kaigoito piik che koleen kobargei ak kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Ki teebee laitoryat kole, “Chamegei nerananooto Absalom?” Ak ki wol Ahimaaz kole, “Kangoyogu Joab otwogindetap laitoryat, anee otwogindeng'ung', ageer wasetapkei ne oo, ago manai kiit ne kabo.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Ki leenji laitoryat, “Ui taban ak itonon eng' yu.” Ak ki wo taban ak kotonon." 
2Samuel18:31 Ki it Kusindet ak kole, “Kas ng'aleek che po kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, amu kayooktoun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani mugetuut eng' tugul che koga ng'eetyo kole obargei.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Ki teebe `laitoryat Kusindet koleenji, “Chamegei nerananooto Absalom?” Ak ki wolji Kusindet kole, “Ingoigei puunigap kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ak piik tugul che ng'eetyinin kole kobarin, kiit ne kaigei nerananooto.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Ki aragen miising' laitoryat ak kitogosta kwo koot oriit ne mi ormariichet parak ak koriir. Kingo wendi koleenoti, “Ooi weeriinnyu Absalom, weeriinnyu, weeriinnyu Absalom! Kata kaigai ame ne kata inyee, Ooi Absalom, weeriinnyu, weeriinnyu!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Ki kimwachi Joab keleenji, “Riirei laitoryat ak kotei agobo Absalom.”" 
2Samuel19:2 Kiwalak katerteerisyet eng' peetuunooto koek kateiyet eng' piik tugul, amu ki kas piik kemwaei peetuunooto keele, Arageni laitoryat agobo weeriinnyi." 
2Samuel19:3 Ki pa piik nganaseet peetuunooto koung'ategei, ko uu ye ung'ootegei piik che ililandos, ye mweitos eng' lugeet." 
2Samuel19:4 Ki tuch `laitoryat togeennyi, ak ki ite laitoryat eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Ooi weeriinnyu Absalom, ooi Absalom, weeriinnyu, weeriinnyu!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Ki nyo Joab kochut ko ole kimi laitoryat ak koleenji, “Kegoochi togoochigap otwogiguk tugul eng' peetuuni kolilaanso, che kasar saboondang'ung' rani ak saboonwegap weeriiguk, tiibiiguk, saboonwegap osotiguk ak saboonwegap chebaigeiniguk," 
2Samuel19:6 amu ichame icheek che wechin ak iweche icheek che chamin. Kebaarte rani ile ma kiy eng' inyee pounik ak otwogik, amu kaageer rani ale nda ko kasap Absalom ak kebegu acheek tugul rani, ko kata iboiboin miising'." 
2Samuel19:7 Ng'eet anyun, mande ak ing'alaalji otwogiguk, igaigai. Amu ayostosi eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ale, ngot ko memande ko mang'etun chii kemouni. Yaitu nooto eng' inyee kosiir yaityet tugul ne kigonyonjin kobooch ming'inateng'ung' agoi nguno.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Ara king'eet anyun laitoryat ak kotebee ormariichet. Ki kimwachi piik tugul keleenji, “Ogeero, tebyei ng'wony laitoryat eng' ormariich”; ak ki pwa tugul taitap laitoryat. Kiga komwei Israel, kwo chii tugul emainnyi." 
2Samuel19:9 Ki piit suryet eng' piik tugul eng' pororyosyek tugul che po Israel kole, “Kisarwech laitoryat eng' puunikyok, ak kisarwech eng' eunegap Philistiik. Ago nguno ko ki komwei ineendet eng' emet komwee Absalom." 
2Samuel19:10 Ak kogome eng' lugeet Absalom ne kiga kiiil koboiywech. Ara anyun amu nee si momwa kiy agobo kimut laitoryat koweek?” 
2Samuel19:11 Ki iyookto anyun `laitoryat Daudi ng'aleek koba kap Sadok ak Abiathar che ki tisiik keleenji, “Omwachi poisyegap Judah oleenji, ‘Amu nee si oegu che po let eng' kamutunetap laitoryat koweek konyo koonnyi? Kogobwonji laitoryat ng'aleegap Israel tugul keele, kimut ineendet konyo koonnyi." 
2Samuel19:12 Oo tupchosyekyuk, oo kawekyuk ak panyeekyuk, amu nee anyun si oegu che po let eng' kamutunetap laitoryat koweek?’" 
2Samuel19:13 Oleenji Amasa, ‘Tos ma ii kowekyuk ak panyeekyuk? Ingoyaiywo Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto ak kotes kosiir, ngot ko meegu kiptaiyatap lugeet eng' tainnyu kotugul igeer Joab.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Kiwelel mugulelwegap piik tugul che po Judah, ko uu ne po chiito agenge, ak ki iyookto kemwachi laitoryat keleenji, “Myee iweigei kobooto otwogiguk tugul.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Ki week anyun laitoryat, konyo Jordan. Ki nyo `Judah Gilgal, kotorook laitoryat, komut kolong'une Jordan." 
2Samuel19:16 Kichook Shimei weeriitap Gera, Benjaminindet, ne ki po Baurim kochoorgei kobooto piigap Judah kotorook Laitoryat Daudi." 
2Samuel19:17 Ki mi kobooto ineendet piik eliphuut agenge che po Benjamin ak Siba otwogindetap kootap Saulo, weeriikyik taman ak muut ak otwogikyik tiptem ak kolandae Jordan eng' taitap laitoryat." 
2Samuel19:18 Ki landa kolandae ole kilondoe si komut piigap kootap laitoryat kolong', ak koyai kiit ne kigeerei kole myee. Ki ibutyi ng'wony Shimei weeriitap Gera eng' taitap laitoryat ko kagolong' eng' Jordan," 
2Samuel19:19 ak koleenji laitoryat, “Amat koiitya tengekto kiptaiyandennyu anan ibwaat kii kiga yai otwogindeng'ung' komaasak eng' peetuuni kimandoi kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat eng' Jerusalem. Myee ma nam laitoryat kioto eng' muguleldanyi." 
2Samuel19:20 Amu ingen otwogindeng'ung' kole ki koyai tengekto. Nooto anyun, kanyo rani andou eng' piik tugul che po kootap Joseph achooruge atorogu kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Ago ki wol Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah, kole, “Tos manyalu kebar Shimei agobo kiito, amu ki chup ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Ago ki wol `Daudi kole, “Kiting'egei nee ak okweek weeriigap Zeruiah kot oegu puunik eng' anee rani? Tos kibarei chii rani eng' Israel? Tos mangen ale, aa laitoryat rani ne pou Israel?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Ara ki leenji `laitoryat Shimei, “Memee.” Ak ki iyasyechi laitoryat ineendet." 
2Samuel19:24 Ki choorgei Mephibosheth weeriitap Saulo agine kotorook laitoryat. Ki mata kotil siyoogap keelyekyik anan kocher tamnennyi, anan komwet ngoroikyik kobooch peetuut ne kigawo laitoryat agoi peetuut ne ki weeksei kaa eng' kaalyeet." 
2Samuel19:25 Kingo nyo Jerusalem kogat laitoryat, koleenji `laitoryat ineendet, “Amu nee o, Mephibosheth si mecham keebe tuwai?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Ak ki wol kole, “Kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat, amu ang'wali anee otwogindeng'ung', ko ki aleenji otwogindennyu Siba, ‘Iitoiwo sigiryet si kobiit alaany keebe ak laitoryat,’ ago ki iberbera ineendet." 
2Samuel19:27 Ki komwaitaena lembech anee otwogindeng'ung' eng' kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat. Ago uu `kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet, yai anyun kiit ne igeere ile myee." 
2Samuel19:28 Amu ki uu koot tugul ne po kwandanyu piik che ki kobek eng' taitap kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ago ki inde otwogindeng'ung' kwenutap icheeget che amisye meseng'ung'. Ara anyun tos atinye imanda nee anyun kot kota ariirchi laitoryat?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Koleenji `laitoryat ineendet, “Amu nee si kota ing'alaale tuguuguk? Kang'at ale, opchei kooret ak Siba.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Ak ki leenji Mephibosheth laitoryat, “Ingoip ineendet tugul amu ki koweek kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat eng' kaalyeet konyo koonnyi.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Ki choortagei `Barsilai Gileadindet eng' Rogelim; kwo Jordan kobooto laitoryat, si komut ineendet kolandae Jordan." 
2Samuel19:32 Kiga koosit miising' Barsilai, ki po kenyiisyek tamanwogik sisiit. Kichopchin laitoryat amitwogik ye kimi Mahanaim, amu ki chiito ne tagunoot." 
2Samuel19:33 Ki leenji `laitoryat Barsilai, “Ngelande keebe keamisye tuwai eng' Jerusalem.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Ago ki wolji `Barsilai laitoryat koleenji, “Ata peetuusyek che po kenyiisyegap saboondanyu kot ketogoste ak laitoryat keebe Jerusalem?" 
2Samuel19:35 Aa po rani kenyiisyek tamanwogik sisiit. Tos ta amuuchi abesyo ne myee ak ne ya? Ta komuuchi otwogindeng'ung' kogas kiit ne chamu tuguuk che aame anan ko che aee? Ta amuuchi agas cheetap murenik che tyendos ak kwonyiik che tyendos? Amu nee anyun si kota koek mileet otwogindeng'ung' kogeny, eng' kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat?" 
2Samuel19:36 Landoi otwogindeng'ung' eng' Jordan kityo, kobooto laitoryat, ago amu nee si koyookwo laitoryat melekto ne uu nooto?”" 
2Samuel19:37 Asoomin ale, ngaweek anee otwogindeng'ung' kogeny awo amechi nganasennyu, ye neegitee kereritap kwandanyu ak kamennyu. Ago oroni otwogindeng'ung' Kimham, ingolanda kobooto kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat ak iyachi ineendet kiit ne igeere ile myee eng' inyee." 
2Samuel19:38 Ki wol `laitoryat kole, “Kilandoi ak Kimham ak ayachi ineendet kiit ne ageere ale myee eng' inyee, ak kiit age tugul ne imageno, ayaun kioto.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Kilandae piik tugul Jordan, ak ki landa laitoryat. Ki ng'utut Laitoryat Barsilai ak koberuur, ak kiweektagei kwo oldanyi." 
2Samuel19:40 Kingo landa anyun laitoryat kwo Gilgal, kolanda Kimham agine ak ineendet. Ki imut `piik tugul che po Judah laitoryat kolong' ak kebebertap piigap Israel." 
2Samuel19:41 Yeityo kobwonji laitoryat `piik tugul che po Israel, ak koleenji ineendet, “Amu nee si kochoorin tupchosyekyok piigap Judah ak komutin kobooto koong'ung' ilong'une Jordan kobooto piik tugul che po Daudi?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Yeityo kowolji piik tugul che po Judah piigap Israel koleenji, “Ki kiyai niito amu chiitap ooreet ne neegit laitoryat eng' acheek. Amu nee anyun si onereech agobo ng'olyoondonooto? Tos ki kiam tuguugap laitoryat? Anan ki koonech konunet age tugul?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Kowolji `piigap Israel piigap Judah koleenji, “Ki tinyei kebeberwek taman eng' laitoryat, ne siirei ketinye kebeberta ne oo eng' Daudi kosiirok. Ara anyun amu nee anyun si osasech, si moteebenech kotom omutu laitoryandennyo?” Ago ki koromitu waluunetap piigap Judah kosiir ng'aleegap piigap Israel." 
2Samuel20:1 Ki piit eng' yooto chii ne ya ne kainennyi ko ki Sheba weeriitap Bikri, Benjaminindet. Ki kuut iryageet ak kole, “Ma ki tinyei kebeberta eng' Daudi, ama ki tinyei poroteet eng' weeriitap Jesse. Ingwo chii tugul emaisyekyik, ee Israel.”" 
2Samuel20:2 Kotogosta anyun piik tugul che po Israel, mata koosup Daudi, ki isup Sheba weeriitap Bikri. Ago ki namgei piigap Judah ak laitoryannywa kobooch Jordan agoi Jerusalem." 
2Samuel20:3 Ye kingo nyo `Daudi koonnyi eng' Jerusalem, konam kwonyichugiche taman, chebaigeinikyik chu kiga pagaakta koriip koot, ak konde riibiik koriip icheek kotebee koot oriit. Kibai, ago mata kwo ole mi icheek koipkei ak icheek. Ki kirat anyun agoi peetuutap meennywa, kotep koek mosoogik." 
2Samuel20:4 Ki leenji anyun laitoryat Amasa, “Kuurwa murenigap Judah koyumgei eng' peetuusyek somok ak inyoo aginye.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Kingwo Amasa koguur piigap Judah kotuiyo kogagei kosiir ye kiga ng'at laitoryat ineendet. 
2Samuel20:6 Koleenji `Daudi Abisai, “Yaiywech yaityet Sheba weeriitap Bikri nguno kosiir ne ki yai Absalom. Imut anyun otwogigap kiptaiyandeng'ung' ak isup ineendet, si ma namjigei nganasook che ng'ootaatiin ak kochilil si mata kegeer.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Ara anyun ki isup ineendet piigap Joab ak Keretik ak Peletik ak piik tugul che nyigoonen. Ki pa eng' Jerusalem koosup Sheba weeriitap Bikri. 
2Samuel20:8 Kingo riikyi koita ne oo ne mi Gibeon, konyo Amasa kotorook icheek. Kiga rat Joab kariikyik che po lugeet che kiga ilaach ak ki tinyei pireneet ak rotwetap chok ne kiga ratyi suennyi komi choget. Ye kiwendi, kochun rotweet." 
2Samuel20:9 Ki leenji `Joab Amasa, “Tos ichamegei, tupchennyu?” Ki nam Joab tamnetap Amasa eng' eunnyi ne po tai ko uu yo machei kong'utut ineendet." 
2Samuel20:10 Ago ma keer Amasa rotwetap chok ne ki tinyei Joab eng' eunnyi. Kitoor anyun Joab moetap Amasa eng' rotwonooto ak kitumdagei agutanikyik koba ng'wony. Nga ki mata kotoor ineendet kogeny, kogime Amasa. Yeityo koosup Joab ak Abisai ng'eetap kamet, Sheba weeriitap Bikri." 
2Samuel20:11 Ki tonon eng' ye neegitee ineendet age eng' murenigap Joab ak kole, “Ineendet ne chamei Joab ak ineendet ne po Daudi, koosup Joab.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Kimildoegei Amasa korotiikyik eng' kwenutap ooreet ne oo. Ye kingo keer chiichooto kole ngo iit chii tugul yooto kotonon, kola Amasa koistogei eng' oranooto oo kwo keeweet ak kotuge ngoryeet." 
2Samuel20:13 Kingo kageisto eng' oranooto oo, koba piik tugul koosup Joab, koon Sheba weeriitap Bikri." 
2Samuel20:14 Ki pun Sheba pororyosyek tugul che po Israel agoi koit Abel Beth-maaka ak ole mi Berik tugul che kiga iyumgei ak koba ak icheek koosup ineendet. 
2Samuel20:15 Ki pwa lugeet tugul ne ki mi ak Joab ak koyiem Sheba eng' Abel ne po Beth-maaka. Ki iyum ng'ung'unyek koek tulwo konamgei ak nganaseet ak ki tonon konamgei ak irimeet. Ki ryep irimeet piik tugul che ki mi ak Joab koluul kwo ng'wony. 
2Samuel20:16 Ki kuurso eng' kutit ne oo anyun kwondo age ne utaat eng' nganasanooto kole, “Ogaso, ogaso, asoomok ale oleenji Joab konyo koriik yu, si kobiit ang'alaalji.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Kingo nyo ye mi kwonyooto, ak koteebe kwonyooto koleenji, “Ii joab?” Kowolji koleenji, “Aa ineendet.” Koleenji anyun ineendet, “Kas ng'aleegap cheptong'ung' ne otwogindet.” Ak ki wol kole, “Agase.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Yeityo komwa kwonyooto kole, “Ki cham kemwaei keny keele, ‘Ingoteeb icheek eng' Abel,’ ak kigees anyun ng'aleechooto." 
2Samuel20:19 Aa po icheek che po kaalyeet ak che po iman eng' Israel. Icheeng'e ibar nganaseet ne kamet eng' Israel. Amu nee si imache ilugui poroteetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?” 
2Samuel20:20 Ki wol `Joab kole, “Ingolooit, ingolooit eng' anee, si ma lugui anan abar." 
2Samuel20:21 Ma uu nooto ng'olyoondonooto, kimach Sheba weeriitap Bikri, chiito ne po emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim, kobar laitoryat ineendet Daudi. Ara ogoonu ineendet ineegei, si awo eng' nganaseet.” Koleenji kwonyooto Joab, “Keero, ki wiirun metinnyi kosiir irimeet.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Kwo anyun kwonyooto eng' utotyennyi ole mi piik tugul. Ak kitil icheek metitap Sheba weeriitap Bikri yeityo kowiir konyo saang' ole mi Joab. Ki kuut anyun Joab iryageet, ak koba eng' nganaseet, kwo chii tugul emainnyi. Ak ki week Joab kwo Jerusalem ole mi laitoryat." 
2Samuel20:23 Kiboi Joab lugeet tugul ne po Israel, koboi Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada Keretik ak Peletik." 
2Samuel20:24 Kiboi Adoram aisuruut ak ki siriindetap tuguuk che piitu Jehoshaphat weeriitap Ahilud. 
2Samuel20:25 Ki siriindet Seva ak ki tisiik Zadok ak Abiathar. 
2Samuel20:26 Ko ki tisiindetap Daudi agine Ira Jairindet. 
2Samuel21:1 Ki piit rubeet eng' peetuusyegap Daudi, eng' kenyiisyek somok che ki isubegei. Kingo cheeng' `Daudi togetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole Kamuktaindet ne Toroor “Po Saulo ak koonnyi ne po korotiik ng'olyoondoni, amu ki par Gibeonik.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Ki kuur `laitoryat Gibeonik ak koleenji; (ki ma ko po Gibeonik piigap Israel, ago ki po piik che ki ng'etune Amorik. Nga kiga koyasyechi icheek `piigap Israel kole maborei, ko kiga kotyem Saulo kobar icheek kogiiljingei piigap Israel ak Judah.)" 
2Samuel21:3 Ki leenji `Daudi anyun Gibeonik, “Ayaiywok nee? Ak ayai kagaigao nee si kobiit oberuur poroteetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Koleenji `Gibeonik ineendet, “Ma ng'olyootap fedha anan ko thahabu eng' kwenunnyo acheek ak Saulo, anan ko koonnyi. Ak ma potech kebar chii age tugul eng' Israel.” Ago ki le Daudi, “Kiit ne omwae ayaiywok kioto.”" 
2Samuel21:5 Koleenji `icheek laitoryat, “Chiichi ki igeswech ak ne kichobei kegirindech kole kebarech kot koma king'etu eng' kiwoteet age tugul ne po Israel;" 
2Samuel21:6 ingegoonech weeriikyik tisap si kigartatyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Gibea ne po Saulo, ne ki lewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ak ki le laitoryat, “Agoonu icheek.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Ago ki riiree laitoryat Mephibosheth weeriitap Jonathan, weeriitap Saulo, amu kayosyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mi kwenunnywa; kwenutap Daudi ak Jonathan weeriitap Saulo." 
2Samuel21:8 Ago ki nam laitoryat weeriik tuwai che po Rispa cheptap Aia, che kiga sikyi Saulo, Armoni ak Mephibosheth ak weeriik muut che po Mikal cheptap Saulo, che kiga sikyi Adriel weeriitap Barsilai Meolatindet," 
2Samuel21:9 ak konde eunegap Gibeonik ak ki igartaat icheek eng' tulweet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki pek tugul ko tisap kibagenge. Ki kibar icheek eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet, eng' peetuusyek che po tai eng' taunetap kesisyetap baale." 
2Samuel21:10 Ki inem Rispa cheptap Aia kuniok ak kotochigei eng' rwandet, kobooch taunetap kesisyet agoi korobonji ropta ne punu kipsengwet. Ma chamji toriitik kobutyi muuswekwak peet anan kobwa tyong'igap timiin kemoi." 
2Samuel21:11 ki ngemwachi Daudi kiit ne koyai Rispa cheptap Aia, chebaigeiyatap Saulo," 
2Samuel21:12 kwo koip kawegap Saulo ak kawegap Jonathan weeriinnyi eng' piigap Jabes-gilead, che kiga choor eng' ooreetap Beth-san, ole kiga igartate Philistiik eng' peetuut ne kibarei `Philistiik Saulo eng' Gilboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Ki ip kawegap Saulo ak kawegap Jonathan weeriinnyi kotogos ak koyum kawegap icheeget che kiga kigartaat. 
2Samuel21:14 Kitup anyun kawegap Saulo ak che po Jonathan weeriinnyi eng' emetap Benjamin eng' Shelah, eng' kereritap Kish kwandanyi, ak ki yai tuguuk tugul che ki ng'at laitoryat. Kingo pata chooto kogasyi Kamuktaindet icheek riirek agobo emet." 
2Samuel21:15 Ki piit lugeet kogeny eng' Philistiik ak Israel, ak king'eet kichoortagei Daudi ak otwogikyik, koba kobargei ak Philistiik." 
2Samuel21:16 Kileen Isbi-benok ne ki po weeriigap piik chemosinik ak ko ne kinyigiisindap ng'otinnyi ko ki keruutik somok ak kebeber che po sugunwet, ak kiga rat rotwetap chok ne leel kole kobar Daudi." 
2Samuel21:17 Ago kitoret Daudi Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah. Kikwer Philistindet kobar, yeityo koyasyechi `piigap Daudi ineendet koleenji, “Ma kebendi tugul kogeny lugeet ak inyee, si memis taitap Israel.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Kingo pata niito, kobiit lugeet kogeny ak Philistiik eng' Gob. Ki par eng' yooto `Sibeikai Husatindet Shaaph, ne ki po weeriigap piik chemosinik." 
2Samuel21:19 Ki piit kogeny lugeet ak Philistiik eng' Gob, ak ki par Elanan weeriitap Jaareoregim Bethlehemindet Goliat Gitindet, ne ki kergei irumetap ndirinnyi ak keetit ne taachin usiisyek chiito ne nabisyei." 
2Samuel21:20 Ki piit lugeet kogeny eng' Gath, ole ki mi chiito ne kooi kot, ne ki tinyei morik lo eng' euut age tugul, ak ki tinyei morik lo eng' keeldo age tugul, ki tiptem ak ang'wan tugul. Ki isichei chiichooto agine chiito chemosit." 
2Samuel21:21 Ye kingo reeny Israel, kobar ineendet Jonathan weeriitap Shimei ng'eetap kametap Daudi." 
2Samuel21:22 Ki kisikyi pichooto ang'wan chiito chemosit eng' Gath, ak ki par Daudi ak otwogikyik pichooto." 
2Samuel22:1 Kityenji `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleegap tyeni eng' peetuut ne kigasar `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' eunegap puunikyik tugul ak eng' eutap Saulo. 
2Samuel22:2 Kityen kole, “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rwandennyu, irimennyu ak saruunindennyu." 
2Samuel22:3 Kamuktaindet ko rwandennyu, ne amang'u. Long'ennyu ak kuinetap yetunennyu, teeksennyu ne kooi ak ole amwechini, yetindennyu ne sarwo eng' koroomnateet." 
2Samuel22:4 Aguure Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne nyoljin kilas, si kesarwo eng' puunikyuk." 
2Samuel22:5 Ki yiema peek che mildogei che po meet, ki koono maranosyegap yaityet aiyweis." 
2Samuel22:6 Ki yiema poroonigap Olemi Che ki kobek; kichea mestonogap meet. 
2Samuel22:7 Ki aguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pichiindanyu, ee, ki aguur Kamuktaindennyu; Ki kas kutinnyu eng' hekalunnyi, ak ki it riirekyuk itiikyik." 
2Samuel22:8 Ki kirgiren ng'wony anyun ak ki potan, ki twagei lumeiywegap kipsengwet, ak kotumdumgei amu kinereech." 
2Samuel22:9 Ki togosta iyeto ne ki mang'une seruunekyik; ki peelso maat ne ki mang'une kutinnyi. Kilalyo nesek eng' maata. 
2Samuel22:10 Ki im kipsengwet ak kochoorgei ineendet. Ki mi mesundeito ne oo kurereetap keelyekyik. 
2Samuel22:11 Ki laany kerubindet ak kotiriren; ee, ki took eng' kebebaigap usoonet." 
2Samuel22:12 Ki yai mesundeito koek emaisyekyik che mi komoswekyik tugul, kayumetapkei ne po peek, poolik che tuuen che po parak." 
2Samuel22:13 Kilalyo nesek eng' kaluunet ne ki mi tainnyi. 
2Samuel22:14 Kitul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet, ak kitwek Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'." 
2Samuel22:15 Kimwokto kipchabonik ak koiyesta puunik; kigon kalyeleet ak koiyesta icheek. 
2Samuel22:16 Ki took anyun kereruusyegap nyanjet, king'ang'agis lumeiywegap ng'wony, eng' kereetap kong' ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' cheetap kabuusetap seruunekyik." 
2Samuel22:17 Ki iyogoigei eng' parak ak koganaba; ki ichuutwa among' eng' peek che chaang'. 
2Samuel22:18 Kisarwo eng' punyondennyu ne kiim, eng' icheeget che kiwecha, amu ki kiimeen kosiiro." 
2Samuel22:19 Kichea eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu, ago ki ek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atiegei." 
2Samuel22:20 Ki imuta amanda awo ole paraa; kisarwo amu ki paibait eng' anee. 
2Samuel22:21 Ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu imandanyu; ki koono ko uu tiliilindap eunekyuk. 
2Samuel22:22 Amu ki ariip ortinwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma abagaakte Kamuktaindennyu asup oor ne ya." 
2Samuel22:23 Mi tainnyu kirwoogutikyik tugul, ak ma aistoegei kaneetisyosyekyik." 
2Samuel22:24 Ki aititaat agane eng' tainnyi, ak ki ariipkei si ma nama tengekto." 
2Samuel22:25 Ki koono anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu imandanyu; ko uu tiliilindanyu eng' tainnyi. 
2Samuel22:26 Eng' che tinyei rireenetapkei ii po rireenetapkei; ak eng' chiito ne igeesunotke iboortoigei ile ii igeesunotke. 
2Samuel22:27 Eng' che tiliileen iboortoigei ile ii tiliil, ak eng' che mastoi, obortosi." 
2Samuel22:28 Isaru che nyerootiin, ago igeere che mendos si kobiit iming'in." 
2Samuel22:29 Ii tainnyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ikwenyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mesundeitonyu. 
2Samuel22:30 Eng' amuuchi aiyestoi lugeet eng' inyee, eng' Kamuktaindennyu atorombeni asiire irimeet." 
2Samuel22:31 Ititaat ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki konaak ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ineendet long'eetap icheeget tugul che imang'u ineendet." 
2Samuel22:32 Amu tos ng'oo Kamuktaindet, kobatee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak tos ng'oo rwandet, kobatee Kamuktaindennyo?" 
2Samuel22:33 Kamuktaindet ne koono kimnateet, irimennyu ne kiim ak ko ne yao aek ne igeesunotke eng' ooreennyu." 
2Samuel22:34 Yaei ineendet keelyekyuk koigei che po kenyeleet, nama atonon eng' komoswekyuk che torooreen." 
2Samuel22:35 Ineeti eunekyuk koyai lugeet; si kong'i eunekyuk kwanget ne po sugunwet. 
2Samuel22:36 Ki igoono long'eetap yetuneng'ung' agine; ak ki koeeta talasyeng'ung'. 
2Samuel22:37 Ki ibaraiywa kakwautikyuk, ama ichabaita keelyekyuk." 
2Samuel22:38 Ki asup puunikyuk ak abar; ak ma aweigei agoi kogeskei. 
2Samuel22:39 Ki awong'u icheek, ak atui kot koma komuuchi kong'eetyo. Ee, kagobutyi icheek keelyekyuk keel." 
2Samuel22:40 Ki iratwa kimnateet ne po lugeet; ki iterteerwa aboi che king'eetya. 
2Samuel22:41 Ki iwelel puunikyuk kotuktocha patai, si kobiit agees icheek che wecho." 
2Samuel22:42 Ki riiryo, ago ki ma piit ne ki sar icheek; ki riirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ki ma wolji." 
2Samuel22:43 Ki atonaton anyun icheek komengegitu koigei temburyegap ng'wony, ki atyech ko uu ng'atateek che mi ortinwek ak aiyeste." 
2Samuel22:44 Ki isarwo aginye eng' pooryosyegap piikyuk; ki iriibo aek metitap pororyosyek, tuun ota piik che tomo anai." 
2Samuel22:45 Tuun kasa iit weeriigap punootyot, ye kas agobo anee, eng' yooto kogasa iit." 
2Samuel22:46 Pegunoti toek kowandogei, ak komong' eng' ole ung'egei kobotandos." 
2Samuel22:47 Sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ilasunoot rwandennyu, ak ingotororit Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap rwandetap yetunennyu," 
2Samuel22:48 Kamuktaindet ne yaaktoiywo mugetuut, ineendet ne iming'ini piik kogasa iit," 
2Samuel22:49 ineendet ne imutwaa amang'une puunikyuk. Ee, itoroora asiir icheek che ng'eetyina; isarwo eng' chiito ne koroom." 
2Samuel22:50 Aweegun kongoi anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kwenutap pororyosyek, ak atyenji kaineng'ung' kalasunoik." 
2Samuel22:51 Igoochin laitoryandennyi saruunet ne oo; ak koboorchin nenyi ne iilaat chamyennyi ne tala, Daudi ak iyotennyi agoi koigeny.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Chu anyun ko ng'aleek che po let che po Daudi. Ng'alaalutigap Daudi weeriitap Jesse, Chuuto ng'aleegap chiito ne ki itoroor Kamuktaindet, ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindetap Jakobo, ne chamat ne po tyenwogigap Israel." 
2Samuel23:2 Ki ng'alaalena Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki mi ng'olyoondennyi ng'elyeptanyu." 
2Samuel23:3 Ki ng'alaal Kamuktaindetap Israel, ki ng'alaalwo Rwandetap Israel kole: “Ineendet ne pou piik eng' imanda, ko ingoboi eng' kaiyweisyetap Kamuktaindet," 
2Samuel23:4 ko kergeitu ak lapkeiyet ne po karon, ye charu asiista eng' karonet ne lapkei, ye piitos susweek che ng'orng'oren, eng' kaluunet ne lapkei ko kamoen ropta.”" 
2Samuel23:5 Tos ma uu nooto iman koonnyu eng' Kamuktaindet? Tos ma ki koyomiswa kayomiset ne po koigeny, ne ki kichop eng' tuguuk tugul ak ko ne lumdaat? Amu nooto ko yetunennyu tugul ak ko magennyu tugul, Agot ngo ma yai kotesak." 
2Samuel23:6 Ago kergeitu tugul che ma iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak katook che ki wiirtoi, amu ma namaksei eng' euut." 
2Samuel23:7 Ago chiito ne namei ko kanyool kotinyei kariik ak irumetap ng'otit; kibeelei eng' maat kogeskei eng' komostanywa. 
2Samuel23:8 Chu ko kainaigap murenik che nyigoonen che ki tinyei Daudi: Joseb-basebet Takemonindet, ne oo eng' kiptainik somok. Ineendet ne kibar piik pogol sisiit eng' ng'otinnyi peetuunak." 
2Samuel23:9 Rubeiywnnyi eng' che kirubei ineendet ko ki Eleazar weeriitap Dodai weeriitap Ahoindet. Ineendet ko ki agenge eng' murenichooto somok nyigoonen che ki mi ak Daudi ye kichotei Philistiik che kiga iyumgei eng' yooto agobo lugeet ak kiga koba murenigap Israel. 
2Samuel23:10 Ki ng'eet kobar Philistiik kot kong'et eunnyi ak koyaam eunnyi koyaamji rotwetap chok. Ki iyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor katerteeret ne oo peetuunooto. Ak ki week piik kityo koosup ineendet koba konyaban tuguuk. 
2Samuel23:11 Ne rubei ineendet ko ki Shammah weeriitap Agee Hararindet. Kingo yumgei Philistiik koek lugeet, eng' ole ki mi mbareet ne mi sogorik che chaang', komwee piigap Israel icheek." 
2Samuel23:12 Ago ki tonon Shammah eng' kwenutap mbaranooto, koeet mbareet ak ki par Philistiik ak ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor katerteeret ne oo." 
2Samuel23:13 Ki choortagei somogu eng' pounik che eecheen sosom, ak koba ole mi Daudi eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet agoi kebeneetap Adulam ak kiga teech lugeetap Philistiik atebweetap Repaim." 
2Samuel23:14 Eng' kasarata, ko ki mi `Daudi irimeet ak kimi lugeetap Philistiik Bethlehem." 
2Samuel23:15 Ki am melelda `Daudi ak ki le, “Oiye, inaga ng'oo peegap keriingetap peek ne mi Bethlehem ne neegitee ormariichet, aee”" 
2Samuel23:16 Kichut lugeetap Philistiik `murenjoto nyigoonen somogu, koba koram peek eng' keriingonooto po peek ne mi Bethlehem, ne ki mi ye neegitee ormariichet yeityo koipchi Daudi. Ago ma cham koe, kitumda eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Samuel23:17 Ki le, “Ingolooit eng' anee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si ma yai kii. Tos ma korotiigap piik che kachut ng'oiyondit saboonwekwak?” Ma cham anyun koe amu nooto. Chuuto anyun tuguuk che ki yai pichooto somogu nyigoonen." 
2Samuel23:18 Ki ne oo eng' chooto somok Abisai ng'eetap kametap Joab weeriitap Zeruiah ak ki nam ng'otinnyi ak kobar piik pogol somok ak ki took kainennyi eng' murenjoto somok. 
2Samuel23:19 Tos ma ineendet ne ki tinyei teegisto miising' eng' chooto somok? Ki kiyai ineendet anyun koek kiptaiyannywa, ago ma ityi chugai somok po tai." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada, weeriit ne nyigan ne punu Kabseel, ineendet ne ki yai poisyonik che eecheen: ki par weeriik aeng' che po Ariel che po Moab; kichoortagei kogeny kwo kobar ng'etundo eng' kwenutap keriinget eng' peetuusyegap teluji;" 
2Samuel23:21 ak ki par Misirindet murenet ne karaaran. Nga ki tinyei misirindonooto ng'otit eng' eunnyi, ko ki choortagei kwo ole mi ineendet ak kirokto yeityo kong'us ng'otit eng' eutap misirindonooto ak kobare ng'otinnyi." 
2Samuel23:22 Ki yai tuguuchuuto Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada ak ki took kainennyi eng' murenjoto somok nyigoonen. 
2Samuel23:23 Ki sich teegisto kosiir chooto somok, ago ma ityi chugai somok po tai. Ki inde `Daudi ineendet koboi riibiikyik." 
2Samuel23:24 Alak eng' chooto sosom ko ki: Asahel ng'eetap kametap Joab, Elanan weeriitap Dodo ne po Bethlehem," 
2Samuel23:25 Shammah Harodindet, Elika Harodindet," 
2Samuel23:26 Heles Paltindet, Ira weeriitap Ikes Tekoindet," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiezer Anatotindet, Mebunai Husatindet," 
2Samuel23:28 Salmon Aoindet, Maarai Netopatindet," 
2Samuel23:29 Heleb weeriitap Baanah Netopatindet, Itai weeriitap Ribai ne po Gibea ne po lagogap Benjamin," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaiah Piratonindet, Idai ne po ainoosyegap Gaas," 
2Samuel23:31 Abi-albon Arbatindet, Asmabet Baharumindet," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba Saalbonindet, weeriigap Jasen, Jonathan;" 
2Samuel23:33 Shammah Hararindet, Aiam weeriitap Sarar Ararindet," 
2Samuel23:34 Eliphelet weeriitap Aasbai, weeriitap Maakatindet, Eliam weeriitap Ahitopel Gilonindet," 
2Samuel23:35 Hesro Karmelindet, Paarai Arbindet," 
2Samuel23:36 Igal weeriitap Nathan ne po Soba, Bani Gadindet," 
2Samuel23:37 Selek Amonindet, Naarai Beerotindet, ne ki ipchin kariik Joab weeriitap Zeruiah," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira Itrindet, Gareb Itrindet ak" 
2Samuel23:39 Uriah Hitindet. Ki sosom ak tisap pichooto tugul. 
2Samuel24:1 Ki nereech kot kogeny Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel, ak king'eetyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi kosich kabwaatet ne ya agobo icheek. Ki leenji anyun “Ui, iit Israel ak Judah.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Ak ki leenji `laitoryat Joab kiptaiyatap lugeet ne ki mi ak ineendet, “Ui punoote pororyosyek tugul che po Israel, kobooch Dan agoi Beer-sheba ak oiit piik si kobiit anai ole tee koiitennywa.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Ago ki leenji `Joab laitoryat, “Ingotes piik `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ingotenit kiit ne tee konyil pogol ak ingogeer kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ago amu nee si komachei koyai kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat kii?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Ago ki iterteer ng'olyootap laitoryat Joab ak ki iterteer kiptainigap lugeet. Ki pa Joab ak kiptainigap lugeet eng' ole mi laitoryat, koba koiit piigap Israel." 
2Samuel24:5 Kilandae Jordan ak komung'yo eng' Aroer, komostap tai ne po nganaseet ne mi kwenutap atebweetap Gad kotokyigei Jaser," 
2Samuel24:6 yeityo kobwa Gilead ak emetap Tatim-hodsi. Ki pwa Dan-jan ak koyiemat agoi Sidon. 
2Samuel24:7 Yeityo kobwa irimeetap Tyro agoi nganasook tugul che po Hibik ak che po Kanaanik. Ki manda koba murot tai ne po Judah eng' Beer-sheba. 
2Samuel24:8 Kingo kagobunoot anyun emet tugul kobwa Jerusalem ko kaigeskei arawek sogoolu ak peetuusyek tiptem kobooch ngo pa. 
2Samuel24:9 Ki igoochi Joab laitoryat kiit ne tee koitetap piik. Ki mi Israel murenik eliphuusyek pogolwogik sisiitu che nyigoonen che po rotoogap chok ak ki ek che po Judah murenik eliphuusyek pogol muut. 
2Samuel24:10 Ki aragen miising' Daudi eng' muguleldanyi ye kingo kagoiit piik. Ki leenji anyun `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ki ayai tengekto ne oo eng' kioto koayai, ago asoomin ale iste anyun tengektap otwogindeng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki ayai eng' perberyo ne oo.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Kingo ng'eet Daudi karon, koityi ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Gad, keerindetap Daudi, koleenji," 
2Samuel24:12 “Ui imwachi Daudi ileenji, kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Kagoonin tuguuk somok ak lewen agenge eng' chooto, si kobiit ayaun.”" 
2Samuel24:13 Ki nyo anyun Gad ole mi Daudi ak komwachi ineendet koleenji, “Myee koamin rubeet kenyiisyek tisap eng' emeng'ung'? Anan imweote eng' arawek somok eng' taitap puuniguk koonotin? Anan piit koroitap ng'wony eng' emeng'ung' peetuusyek somok? Lewen anyun nguno ak imwaa kiit ne awoljini ineendet ne kaiyokwo.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Ki leenji `Daudi Gad, “Ami eng' pichiindo ne oo, ngabutyi eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu chaang' rireenosyekyik, ago ameng' abutyi eutap chii.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Ki iyookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun koroitap ng'wony Israel, kong'etee karon agoi sait ne ki king'at ak ki pek piik eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisabu kobooch Dan agoi Beer-sheba." 
2Samuel24:16 Ye kingo tokyi malaikaiyat eunnyi Jerusalem kole kobar, kowal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik agobo yaityonooto ak koleenji malaikaiyandonooto kibarei piik, “Kagoyam, ingosiis eung'ung'.” Ki mi malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole neegitee rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Arauna Jebusindet." 
2Samuel24:17 Ye kingo keer `Daudi malaikaiyat ne kibarei piik, kong'alaalji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `ineendet koleenji, “Keero, ki ayai tengekto, ki amaste, ago ki yai nee keechiirechu? Asaain ale, ingobira eung'ung' ak ingobir kootap kwandanyu.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Ki nyo `Gad peetuunooto ole mi Daudi koleenji ineendet, “Togoste, iteekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Arauna Jebusindet.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Ara ki togosta anyun `Daudi ko uu ye ki mwa Gad ko uu ye kiga ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Samuel24:20 Kingo tabendo `Arauna, kogeer laitoryat ak otwogikyik kobwanei kotokyingei ineendet; kwo Arauna ak kong'uruuk eng' taitap laitoryat kot kotiiny togeet ng'wony." 
2Samuel24:21 Yeityo kole `Arauna, “Kalya si konyo kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat ole mi otwogindennyi?” Ak ki le Daudi, “Kanyo aa alenen rwanyut ne kiboorsee, si kobiit ateekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet, si kobiit keraany koroitap ng'wony kosiis si ma kobarei piik.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Koleenji `Arauna Daudi, “Ingoip kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat ak kogoita kiit ne keerei kole myee eng' ineendet. Keero mi yu eiik che po kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak tuguuk che kiboorsee ak chogisyegap tuuga che egu kweenik." 
2Samuel24:23 Ee laitoryat, kaigoochi Arauna chuuto tugul laitoryat.” Koleenji kogeny `Arauna laitoryat, “Ingotaachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Ago ki leenji `laitoryat Arauna, “Achicha, aalenen iman eng' alyet. Ma koochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu kagoochinoik che kibeelei che ma agoite kiy.” Ki al anyun Daudi rwanyunooto kiboorsee kobooto tuuga eng' shekelisyek konom che po fedha." 
2Samuel24:25 Ki teekyi `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' yooto ak kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Ki kasyi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek riirek agobo emet ak ki kiraany koroitap ng'wony kosiis eng' Israel. 
1Kings1:1 Kiga koosit anyun Laitoryat Daudi; kiga kotar kenyiisyek che chaang', ak nganda ki tuch `icheek ineendet eng' ngoroik, koma kas lalang'yo." 
1Kings1:2 Ki leenji `otwogikyik ineendet, “Ingecheeng'ji pergeiya laitoryat kiptaiyandennyu neta ko ming'in, si koriip ak kobois eng' taitap laitoryat, ak ingorue tegeng'ung', si kogas laitoryat kiptaiyandennyu lalang'yo.”" 
1Kings1:3 Kocheeng' anyun chepto ne karaaran eng' komoswek tugul che po Israel, ak kinyoor ak komutyi `laitoryat Chepsunamindet ne ki kiguure Abishag." 
1Kings1:4 Ki karaaran chebooto miising' ak ki riip laitoryat ak koboisyechi ineendet. Agot ingano, koma ituiyogei laitoryat ak ineendet." 
1Kings1:5 Ki ietkei Adonijah weeriitap Haggith kole, “Aegu laitoryat!” Ko uu nooto ko ki chopchigei kariisyek ak paraisisyek che laanyei, ak piik konom che rwaei kondoe ineendet." 
1Kings1:6 Ago ma polji `ineendet kwandanyi eng' peetuut age tugul anan koteebe kole, “Amu nee si iyai ko uu niito?” Ki muren ne karaaran kot agine ak kirubu Absalom." 
1Kings1:7 Ki ng'alaal ineendet ak Joab weeriitap Zeruiah kobooto Abiathar tisiindet, ak ki igongei icheek kotoret ineendet." 
1Kings1:8 Ago ki ma iyan kotoret Zadok tisiindet, Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada, maotyot Nathan, Shimei, Rei ak piigap Daudi che kinyigoonen." 
1Kings1:9 Ki eny Adonijah keechiirek, tuuga ak che akwaen eng' ole neegitee koitap Zoheleth, ne mi ole neegitee En-rogel. Ki kuur tupchosyekyik tugul, weeriigap laitoryat ak piik tugul che po Judah che otwogigap laitoryat." 
1Kings1:10 Maguur ineendet maotyot Nathan anan Benaiah, anan piik che nyigoonen agot Solomon ng'eetap kamet." 
1Kings1:11 Komwachi anyun `Nathan Bathsheba kametap Solomon koleenji, “Tom igas keele laitorani Adonijah weeriitap Haggith, amaingen Daudi kiptaiyandennyi?" 
1Kings1:12 Nyoo anyun, asoomin ale aneetiin kiy, si kobiit isaru saboondang'ung' ak saboondap weeriing'ung' Solomon." 
1Kings1:13 Ui ko ole mi Daudi ak ileenji ineendet, Tos ki ma iyasyechi inyee kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat, otwogindeng'ung' ne chepto, ileenji, ‘Laitorani iman Solomon weeriing'ung' ko kaamei ak tebee ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet? Amu nee anyun si kolaitoran Adonijah?’" 
1Kings1:14 Ak ye ta ong'alaali ak laitoryat, asubun anyo ko agane ak agimiit ng'aleeguk.”" 
1Kings1:15 Ki wo anyun Bathsheba agoi ko oriit ole mi laitoryat; kiga koosit laitoryat miising' ak kiboisyechin ineendet Abishag Chepsunamindet. 
1Kings1:16 Ki ing'uruuk Bathsheba kogutung'ji laitoryat. Ak kiteebe laitoryat koleenji, “Imache nee?”" 
1Kings1:17 Ak ki wolji laitoryat koleenji, “Ki iyasye inyee kiptaiyandennyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', iyasyechi otwogindeng'ung' ne chepto ileenji, ‘Laitorani iman Solomon weeriing'ung' ko kaameei ak tebee ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet.’" 
1Kings1:18 Ago nguno ko laitorani Adonijah, amengen inyee kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat." 
1Kings1:19 Kagoeeny ineendet tuuga, che akwaen ak keechiirek ng'iisyat, ak koguur weeriik tugul che po laitoryat, Abiathar tisiindet kobooto Joab kiptaiyatap lugeet, ago ma kuur Solomon otwogindeng'ung'." 
1Kings1:20 Keerin konyegap Israel tugul inyee laitoryat kiptaiyandennyu, imwachi ne namei ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat." 
1Kings1:21 Anan ngot koma uu nooto, ko ye kagoru kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat kobooto kwanisyekyik, kiitech anee ak weeriinnyu Solomon keegu ngelelik.”" 
1Kings1:22 Ye kita kong'alaali ak laitoryat, konyo ko maotyot Nathan" 
1Kings1:23 ak ki kimwachi laitoryat keleenji, “Keero, mi yu maotyot Nathan.” Ak kingo nyo ineendet taitap laitoryat, kong'uruuk eng' taitap laitoryat kot kotiing'e togeennyi ng'wony ak kole," 
1Kings1:24 “Kiptaiyandennyu ee laitoryat, ki imwa ile tuun laitorani Adonijah ko keemee ak kotebee ng'echereeng'ung' ne po laitornatet?" 
1Kings1:25 Kachoortagei rani ak koeny tuuga ak che akwaen ak keechiirek ng'iisyat, ak kagoguur weeriik tugul che po laitoryat, kiptainigap lugeet ak Abiathar tisiindet. Keero, amisyei ak koeisei eng' tainnyi, ak koleen, ‘Iwe keny Laitoryat Adonijah!’" 
1Kings1:26 Ago, ma kuuro agot anee otwogindeng'ung', Zadok tisiindet, Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada ak otwogindeng'ung' Solomon." 
1Kings1:27 Tos ki yai kii kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ama ibooru ineendet ne tebee ng'echeretap kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat ko kagome?”" 
1Kings1:28 Kowol anyun Laitoryat Daudi kole, “Oguurwa Bathsheba.” Ak ki nyo ineendet taitap laitoryat ak kotonon eng' tainnyi." 
1Kings1:29 Ki iyasyo laitoryat kole, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki kotyach saboondanyu komang'une ng'oiyondit tugul," 
1Kings1:30 ko uu ye ki ayosyeun iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel ale laitorani iman Solomon weeriing'ung' ko kaamee, ak kotebee ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet kogeero; ayae ko uu nooto kora rani.”" 
1Kings1:31 Ki ing'uruuk anyun Bathsheba kotiing'e togeet ng'wony kogutung'ji laitoryat ak kole, “Ingwo keny laitoryat kiptaiyandennyu Daudi!”" 
1Kings1:32 Kole Laitoryat Daudi, “Oguurwa Zadok tisiindet, maotyot Nathan ak Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada.” Ki pwa taitap laitoryat ak" 
1Kings1:33 ki leenji `laitoryat icheek, “Omut otwogigap kiptaiyandeng'wong' ak ogoochi Solomon weeriinnyu kolaany nyumbunnyu, ak omutu kochoorgei konyo Gihon." 
1Kings1:34 Ingoiil ineendet eng' olooto Zadok tisiindet ak maotyot Nathan koek laitoryat ne pou Israel. Oguut iryageet ak oleen, ‘Ingwo keny Laitoryat Solomon!’" 
1Kings1:35 Yeityo otogosu osubu ineendet inyoo kotebee ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet, amu egu laitoryat kogeera. Kaatoroor ineendet koek pounindet ne pou Israel ak Judah.”" 
1Kings1:36 Ki wolji Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada laitoryat koleenji, “Sere! Ingomwa agine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ko uu nooto." 
1Kings1:37 Ko uu ye ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ko ingotep kobooto Solomon agine, ak koyai ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet koeet kosiir ne po kiptaiyandennyu Laitoryat Daudi.”" 
1Kings1:38 Ki choortagei anyun Zadok tisiindet, ak Nathan maotyot, ak Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada, kobooto Keretik ak Peletik, ak kolaany Solomon nyumbutap Laitoryat Daudi, ak yeityo komut ineendet kwo Gihon." 
1Kings1:39 Ki inem Zadok tisiindet laletap mwaita eng' Emait ak koiil Solomon. Ki kuut icheek iryageet ak kuguurso piik tugul koleen, “Ingwo keny Laitoryat Solomon!”" 
1Kings1:40 Ki pwa piik tugul komutu ineendet ak kogutonu ndurerusyek. Ak kiboiboitu eng' poiboiyet ne oo kot ko regregen emet amu cheennywa. 
1Kings1:41 Ki kas Adonijah ak toekyik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet ye kingo kagogees amisyet. Kingo kas Joab cheetap iryageet koteep kole, “Po nee polatoni kawo parak eng' nganaseet?”" 
1Kings1:42 Ye kita kong'alaali, koit Jonathan weeriitap Abiathar tisiindet, ak koleenji `Adonijah ineendet, “Nyoo ko, amu ii chii ne nyigan ak iibu logoiywek che myach.”" 
1Kings1:43 Ak ki wolji `Jonathan Adonijah koleenji, “Achicha ma uu nooto! Kagoyai `kiptaiyandennyo Laitoryat Daudi Solomon koek laitoryat." 
1Kings1:44 Kagoyookto `laitoryat Zadok tisiindet, ak maotyot Nathan, ak Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada, kobooto Keretik ak Peletik koba ak ineendet, ak kagoochi ineendet kolaany nyumbutap laitoryat." 
1Kings1:45 Kagoiil Zadok tisiindet ak maotyot Nathan Solomon koek laitoryat eng' Gihon. Togosu eng' olooto kogasanugei kot ko kagululen nganaseet kogeny. Nooto polateet ne kogase. 
1Kings1:46 Ne siirei nooto, ko tebee Solomon ng'echereetap laitornatetap pounateet." 
1Kings1:47 Ak kogeny-i, ko kabwa otwogigap laitoryat koberuur laitoryat kiptaiyandennyo Daudi, koleen, ‘Ingoyai kamuktaindeng'ung' kainetap Solomon kogararanit kosiir neng'ung', ak koyai ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet koeet kosiir neng'ung!’ Ak ki ing'uruuk laitoryat eng' ng'echerennyi." 
1Kings1:48 Ak kogeny, ko kamwa laitoryat kole, ‘Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne kagonde chiito kotebee ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet eng' peetuuni kogeerei konyekyuk.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Ki aragenso toegap Adonijah tugul ak kong'eetyo koba; ki wo chii tugul ooreennyi. 
1Kings1:50 Eng' kayweisyet ne ki iywei `Adonijah Solomon, koging'eet ak kwo konam kuinoigap kaptisisyet." 
1Kings1:51 Ki kimwachi Solomon keleenji, “Keero! Iywei `Adonijah Laitoryat Solomon ak kagonam kuinoigap kaptisisyet ak koleen, ‘Ingoyosyeiwo Laitoryat Solomon rani kole ma parei otwogindennyi eng' rotwetap chok.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 Kole Solomon, “Ngot koboorgei koek chiito ne myee, koma ibutyin ng'wony agot agenge eng' suumeekyik ng'wony. Ago ngot kenyoorchi ineendet yaityet, komeei.”" 
1Kings1:53 Ki iyookto anyun Laitoryat Solomon keemut ineendet konyo kochoorgei eng' kaptisisyet. Ak ki nyo ak kogutung'ji Laitoryat Solomon. Ki leenji `Solomon ineendet, “Ui koong'ung'.”" 
1Kings2:1 Ki irik anyun peetuusyek che po kaliletap Daudi, ak ki ng'at weeriinnyi Solomon koleenji," 
1Kings2:2 “Neegit awo ole pendi piik tugul che po ng'wony. Kimitu anyun ak iegu muren.
