1Kings14:23 Amu kiteekyigei ak icheek komoswek che torooreen, tolochik ak Aserik eng' tulweet age tugul ne kooi ak eng' keetit keel eng' keetit age tugul ne tuon." 
1Kings14:24 Ki mi sodomik ak icheek, ak ki yai tuguuk tugul che kiwechei che po pororyosyek che kiga koon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap piigap Israel." 
1Kings14:25 Eng' kenyiitap muut ne po Laitoryat Rehoboam, ko ki togos Sisak laitoryatap Misiri konyo kobookyi Jerusalem." 
1Kings14:26 Ki ip konoraigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto konoraigap kootap laitoryat. Ki ip tugul, kobooto long'onik tugul che po thahabu che ki yai Solomon." 
1Kings14:27 Ki yai Rehoboam long'onik che po sugunonik kogeere chooto, ak kogoochi kiptainigap riibiik che ki riibei kurgeetap kootap laitoryat." 
1Kings14:28 Ye kiwendi laitoryat kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki ibei riibindet long'onichooto, yeityo koweech kobwa kootap riibiik." 
1Kings14:29 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Rehoboam, ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ko tos ma ki sirchi kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah?" 
1Kings14:30 Ki cham komi lugeet eng' kwenutap Rehoboam ak Jeroboam kotugul. 
1Kings14:31 Ki ru anyun Rehoboam kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi kobooto kwanisyekyik. Ki kiguure kamet Naamah cheptap Amonik. Ak ki laitoran Abijam weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
1Kings15:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Abijam eng' Judah eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po Laitoryat Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat. 
1Kings15:2 Ki laitoran kenyiisyek somok eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Maaka cheptap Abisalom. 
1Kings15:3 Kiwendote tengekwogik tugul che po kwandanyi che kiga sip koyai eng' ineendet. Ki ma kogesunotkei muguleldanyi eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi, ko uu muguleldap Daudi kwandanyi." 
1Kings15:4 Ago ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi ineendet tait eng' Jerusalem agobo Daudi, konde weeriinnyi ye me ineendet, ak kogimit Jerusalem." 
1Kings15:5 Amu ki yai Daudi ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama masta eng' kiy age tugul ne ki ng'at ineendet, eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi, kobatee eng' ng'olyootap Uriah Hitindet." 
1Kings15:6 Ki cham komi lugeet eng' kwenutap Rehoboam ak Jeroboam eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi. 
1Kings15:7 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Abijam ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ko tos ma ki sirchi kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah? Ak kimi lugeet eng' kwenutap Abijam ak Jeroboam." 
1Kings15:8 Ak ki ru Abijam kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi. Ki laitoran weeriinnyi Asa kogeer ineendet." 
1Kings15:9 Ki toi kolaitoran Asa eng' Judah eng' kenyiitap tiptem ne po laitornatetap Jeroboam eng' Israel. 
1Kings15:10 Ki laitoran kenyiisyek artam ak agenge eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Maaka cheptap Abisalom. 
1Kings15:11 Ki yai Asa ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki yai Daudi kwandanyi." 
1Kings15:12 Ki isto sodomik eng' emet ak ki isto kanamonik tugul che kiga koyai kwanisyekyik. 
1Kings15:13 Ki isto agine kamennyi Maaka eng' laitornatet, amu kiga yachi Asera kanamwet ne kiwechei. Kibut Asa kanamwanooto ak kobeel eng' kererutap Kidron." 
1Kings15:14 Nganda ma ki isto komoswek che torooreen, ko ki ititaat muguleldap Asa eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyekyik tugul." 
1Kings15:15 Ki ip tuguuk che kiga kotabaan kwandanyi ak che kiga kotabaan ineendet che po fedha, thahabu ak tereenik kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Kings15:16 Ki cham komi lugeet eng' kwenutap Asa ak Baasha laitoryatap Israel eng' peetuusyekwak tugul. 
1Kings15:17 Ki togosta Baasha laitoryatap Israel kwo kobargei ak Judah, ak koteech Ramah, si ma chamji chii age tugul komanda anan konyo oriit kap Asa laitoryatap Judah." 
1Kings15:18 Konam anyun Asa fedha ak thahabu tugul che kiga ng'et eng' konoraigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak konoraigap kootap laitoryat. Konde anyun eunegap otwogik ak ki iyookyi Laitoryat Asa tuguuchooto Ben-Hadad weeriitap Tabrimon, weeriitap Hesion, laitoryatap Syria, ne ki menyei Damasko, koleenji," 
1Kings15:19 “Mi kasyinet kwenunnyo, inyee ak anee, ko uu ye kimi kwenutap kwandanyu ak kwandang'ung'. Keero, kaayogun kagoochinetap fedha ak thahabu, ui put kasyinet ne oting'egei ak Baasha laitoryatap Israel, si kobiit koistoenagei.”" 
1Kings15:20 Ki kas iit `Ben-Hadad Laitoryat Asa ak koyookto kiptainik che po lugosyekyik koba kobargei ak nganasoogap Israel. Ki par Ijon, Dan, Abel ne po Beth-maaka, ak Kinnereth tugul, kobooto emet tugul ne po Naphtali." 
1Kings15:21 Kingo kas Baasha ng'olyoondonooto, ko mata koteech Ramah, ak ki wo komeny Tirzah." 
1Kings15:22 Komwaita anyun Laitoryat Asa eng' Judah tugul, ma kituuch chii ak ki ip koigap Ramah, ak keetiik che ki mi yooto, che kiga koteekse Baasha. Kiteege Laitoryat Asa Geba ne po Benjamin, ak Mispa." 
1Kings15:23 Poisyonik tugul che ng'etunotiin che po Asa, kimnateennyi tugul, tuguuk tugul che ki yai ak nganasook che ki teech, kotos ma ki sirchi kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah? Eng' peetuusyegap osindanyi, ko ki nam myando keelyekyik." 
1Kings15:24 Ki ru Asa kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitup kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi kwandanyi. Ak ki laitoran Jehoshaphat weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
1Kings15:25 Ki toi kolaitoran Nadap weeriitap Jeroboam eng' Israel eng' kenyiitap aeng' ne po Asa laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran eng' Israel kenyiisyek aeng'." 
1Kings15:26 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kowendote ortinwegap kwandanyi ak tengektanyi, ne ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings15:27 Ak kichaam ineendet Baasha weeriitap Ahija, ne po kootap Issakar. Ye kiga yiem Nadap ak Israel tugul Gibeton ne ki po Philistiik, ko ki ibookyi Baasha ak kobar ineendet eng' olooto." 
1Kings15:28 Ki par Baasha ineendet eng' kenyiitap somok ne po Asa laitoryatap Judah, ak kolaitoran kogeer ineendet." 
1Kings15:29 Kingo kata koek laitoryat, kobar koot tugul ne po Jeroboam. Ma ituukyi Jeroboam agot agenge ne kisop, agoi kobar ineendet kogees: ko uu mwaetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki mwa eng' otwogindennyi Ahija Silonindet," 
1Kings15:30 amu tengekwogigap Jeroboam che ki yai, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto, ak amu taget ne kitach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, si konereech." 
1Kings15:31 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Nadap, ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, koma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
1Kings15:32 Ki cham komi lugeet eng' kwenutap Asa ak Baasha laitoryatap Israel eng' peetuusyekwak tugul. 
1Kings15:33 Kitau Baasha weeriitap Ahija kolaitorani eng' Israel eng' Tirzah eng' kenyiitap somok ne po Asa laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak ang'wan." 
1Kings15:34 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kowendote ortinwegap Jeroboam ak tengektanyi, ne ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings16:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jehu weeriitap Hanani agobo Baasha koleenji: 
1Kings16:2 “Ko uu ye ki atoroorin imang'une temburyek ak ayain iegu pounindetap piikyuk Israel, ak koiwendote ortinwegap Jeroboam, ak koigoochi piikyuk koyai tengekto, kotacha eng' tengekwogikwak anereech." 
1Kings16:3 Abuuktoi nguno anyun Baasha ageestoi ak koonnyi, ak ayai koong'ung' koigei kootap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat." 
1Kings16:4 Ineendet ne po kap Baasha ne mechin nganaseet, koamei sesenik, ak ineendet ne mechin timiin, koamei toriitik che po parak.”" 
1Kings16:5 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Baasha, tuguuk che ki yai ak kimnateennyi, koma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
1Kings16:6 Ki ru Baasha ak kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitupchi Tirzah. Ki laitoran Elah weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
1Kings16:7 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny maotyot Jehu weeriitap Hanani agobo Baasha ak koonnyi, amu yaityet tugul ne ki yai eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotach ineendet eng' poisyonigap eunekyik kot konereech, amu ki igei kootap Jeroboam ak amu ki par ineendet." 
1Kings16:8 Kitau Elah weeriitap Baasha kolaitorani eng' Israel, eng' Tirzah; eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak lo ne po Asa laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek aeng'." 
1Kings16:9 Kichaam ineendet otwogindennyi Shimri, kiptaiyatap kebebertap kariisyekyik. Ki mi Tirzah, koeisei kot ko kiga kobogit eng' kootap Arsa, ne ki pou koot eng' Tirzah." 
1Kings16:10 Ki wo ko Shimri kokwer ineendet ak kobar, eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak tisap ne po Asa laitoryatap Judah. Ak ki laitoran kogeer ineendet." 
1Kings16:11 Kingo toi kolaitoran, ko kata kotebee ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet, kobar kootap Baasha tugul. Ma ituukyi ineendet lakweet agot agenge ne weeriit, ngo ne po tilyonutikyik anan ko ne po choronokyik." 
1Kings16:12 Ki par anyun Shimri koot tugul ne po Baasha, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa agobo Baasha eng' maotyot Jehu." 
1Kings16:13 Amu tengekwogik tugul che po Baasha, ak tengekwogigap Elah weeriinnyi, che ki yai, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto, kotach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel konereech, eng' poisyonikwak che po puch." 
1Kings16:14 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Elah, ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, koma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
1Kings16:15 Ki laitoran Shimri peetuusyek tisap eng' Tirzah, eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak tisap, ne po Asa laitoryatap Judah. Ak kiga teech piik kotokyingei Gibeton, ne ki po Philistik." 
1Kings16:16 Kingo kas pichooto kimi nganaseet keleen, kogochaamso Shimri, ak kogobar laitoryat, koyai anyun Israel tugul Omri, kiptaiyatap lugeet, koek laitoryatap Israel, eng' peetuunooto eng' nganaseet." 
1Kings16:17 Ki wo anyun Omri kotogosta eng' Gibeton, kobooto Israel tugul ak koyiem Tirzah." 
1Kings16:18 Kingo keer Shimri kole kagenam nganaseet, kwo irimeet oriit ne po kootap laitoryat, ak kobeeldagei kootap laitoryat. Ara kime ineendet," 
1Kings16:19 amu tengekwogikyik che ki yai, koyai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kowendate ortinwegap Jeroboam, ak tengektanyi ne ki yai, kobeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings16:20 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Shimri, chaamsennyi ne kichaamso, koma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
1Kings16:21 Kopcheiyo anyun piigap Israel koek kebeberwek aeng'. Ki isup Tibni weeriitap Ginat piik kebeber, koyai ineendet koek laitoryat, ak ki isup Omri kebeberta age." 
1Kings16:22 Ago ki iterteer piik che kiga isup Omri piik che kiga isup Tibni weeriitap Ginat. Ara kime anyun Tibni ak kolaitoran Omri. 
1Kings16:23 Ki toi Omri kolaitoran eng' Israel eng' kenyiitap sosom ak agenge ne po Asa laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'. Ki laitoran kenyiisyek lo eng' Tirzah." 
1Kings16:24 Ki al tulweetap Samaria ne po Semer eng' eliphuusyek lo che po fedha, ak ki teech nganaseet eng' tulwoonooto. Kiguure nganasanooto Samaria, komwaitae kainetap Semer, chiito ne ki po tulwoonooto." 
1Kings16:25 Ki yai Omri ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki yai yaityet kosiir piik tugul che ki indoune ineendet." 
1Kings16:26 Amu kiwendote ortinwek tugul che po Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat ak tengekwogikyik che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto, kotach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel konereech, eng' poisyonikwak che po puch." 
1Kings16:27 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Omri che ki yai ak kimnateennyi ne ki iboor, koma kisir eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
1Kings16:28 Koru anyun Omri ak kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi Samaria. Ki laitoran Ahab weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
1Kings16:29 Ki toi kolaitoran Ahab weeriitap Omri eng' Israel, eng' kenyiitap sosom ak sisiit, ne po Asa laitoryatap Judah. Ki laitoran Ahab weeriitap Omri eng' Israel eng' Samaria kenyiisyek tiptem ak aeng'." 
1Kings16:30 Ki yai Ahab weeriitap Omri yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir piik tugul che ki indoune ineendet. 
1Kings16:31 Ki keer ineendet ko ki it ne ming'in kowendote tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat ak kwo anyun kotun Jesebel cheptap Etbaal laitoryatap Sidonik, ak kwo koot Baal ak kogutung'ji." 
1Kings16:32 Kiteekyi Baal kapkorosuut eng' kootap Baal, ne kiga teech eng' Samaria." 
1Kings16:33 Ki yai Ahab Asera ak ki yai tuguuk alak kotes kotach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, konereech, kosiir laitorinik tugul che po Israel che ki indoune ineendet." 
1Kings16:34 Ki teech Hiel Bethelindet Jeriko eng' peetuusyekyik. Kilume lumeiywondennyi meetap Abiram taaitanyi, ak kolumda ormariichokyik eng' meetap weeriinnyi Segub toweennyi, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' Joshua weeriitap Nun." 
1Kings16:34 Ki teech Hiel Bethelindet Jeriko eng' peetuusyekyik. Kilume lumeiywondennyi meetap Abiram taaitanyi, ak kolumda ormariichokyik eng' meetap weeriinnyi Segub toweennyi, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' Joshua weeriitap Nun." 
1Kings17:1 Ki leenji `Elijah Tisbinindet ne ki po piik che ki menyei Gilead Ahab, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne atonone tainnyi, koma piitu rewoot anan ko ropta kenyisyechu, kobatee ko uu ng'olyoondennyu.”" 
1Kings17:2 Ki nyoonji ineendet ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji," 
1Kings17:3 “Ui eng' yu, itokyigei komostap kong'asiis ak iunyge eng' kererutap Kerit, ne tokyingei Jordan." 
1Kings17:4 Si iee peegap kererunooto, ak kaang'at chepkuginik kobain eng' yooto.”" 
1Kings17:5 Kwo anyun ak koyai ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ki wo ak komeny ye neegitee kererutap Kerit, ne tokyingei Jordan." 
1Kings17:6 Ki ipchi ineendet magatiinik ak panyeek chepkuginik karon ak koipchi magatiinik ak panyeek koskoleny, ak kiee peegap kererunooto." 
1Kings17:7 Ak ki eng' peetuusyek che matya koteeny kererunooto, amu ki mata koroobon emet." 
1Kings17:8 Ki nyoonji ineendet ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji," 
1Kings17:9 “Ng'eet ak iwe Sarepat ne po Sidon ak imeny olooto. Kaang'at mosoget eng' olooto kobain.” 
1Kings17:10 Kong'eet anyun ak kwo Sarepat. Kingo it ormariichetap nganaseet, ko ki mi yooto kwondo koyumi kweenik. Ki kuur ineendet ak koleenji, “Asoomin ale ibwo peek eng' tereet ne ming'in, aee.”" 
1Kings17:11 Ak ye kita kowendi koibu, koguur ineendet, koleenji, “Asoomin ale, ibwo magatyat kitigin eng' eung'ung'.”" 
1Kings17:12 Ki leenji, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', koma tinye magatyat, kobatee peek che ng'ootiin che po euut che mi tereet, ak mwaita kitigin ne mi soteet ne ming'in. Abute kweenik aeng', si kekwang'jinegei ak weeriinnyu, si keam, ak kebegu.”" 
1Kings17:13 Ki leenji `Elijah ineendet, “Meiywei. Ui ak iyai ko uu ye kaimwa. Ago kwang'wa korook magatyat kitigin ak iibwa komong', yeityo okwang'jigei ak weeriing'ung'." 
1Kings17:14 Amu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel ko uu ni, kole: ‘Ma igeesugei peek che ng'ootiin eng' teronooto anan kobek mwaita eng' sotonooto ming'in, kot koit peetuut ne iyookyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ropta ng'wony.’ ”" 
1Kings17:15 Ki wo koyai ko uu mwaetap Elijah. Ki am amitwogik kwonyooto ak piikyik kobooto Elijah eng' peetuusyek che chaang'. 
1Kings17:16 Ma igeskei peek che ng'ootiin eng' tereet anan kobek mwaita eng' soteet ne ming'in, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' Elijah." 
1Kings17:17 Kingo pata tuguuchu, komyan lakweetap kwonyooto, ne ineendet ko chebyoset ne po koot; ak ki koromit myanooto, kot koma kobusi." 
1Kings17:18 Ki leenji `ineendet Elijah, “Kiting'egei nee ak inyee, chiitap Kamuktaindet? Koinyo oli ami si kong'ang'ak tengektonyu, ak ibar weeriinnyu?”" 
1Kings17:19 Ak ki mwachi koleenji, “Koono weeriing'ung'.” Ak kitaach `Elijah lakweet eng' tegetap mosogonooto, ak koganap, ak komut kwo koot age ne mi parak, ole ki menyei, ak komogonji itogunnyi." 
1Kings17:20 Ki riirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, keipchi kogeny yaityet mosogani ami koonnyi, ibare weeriinnyi?”" 
1Kings17:21 Ak ki iitoegei lakweet konyil somok, ak koriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, asaain ale, ingoweekyigei lakwani saboondanyi kogeny!”" 
1Kings17:22 Ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutitap Elijah, ak kiweekyigei lakweet saboondanyi kogeny, ak kisop." 
1Kings17:23 Kiganap Elijah lakweet, ak komut kochoorgei eng' koyooto konyo koot ne po ng'wony, ak kogoochi kamet. Ki le Elijah, “Keero, sabei weeriing'ung'!”" 
1Kings17:24 Ki leenji `kwonyooto Elijah, “Kaanai nguno ale ii chiitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko po iman ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi kuting'ung'.”" 
1Kings18:1 Kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang', konyonji ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Elijah, eng' kenyiitap somok, koleenji, “Ui iboorchigei Ahab, si ayookyi ng'wony ropta.”" 
1Kings18:2 Ara ki wo Elijah koboorchigei Ahab. Ki o rubeet miising' eng' Samaria. 
1Kings18:3 Ak kiguur Ahab Obadiah, ne ki pou koonnyi. (Ki iywei Obadiah miising' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Kings18:3 Ak kiguur Ahab Obadiah, ne ki pou koonnyi. (Ki iywei Obadiah miising' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Kings18:4 Ye kiga par Jesebel maotigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, komut Obadiah maotik pogol, ak kouny kobeate konom eng' kebeneet, ak kobae icheek magatiinik ak peek.)" 
1Kings18:4 Ye kiga par Jesebel maotigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, komut Obadiah maotik pogol, ak kouny kobeate konom eng' kebeneet, ak kobae icheek magatiinik ak peek.)" 
1Kings18:5 Ki leenji `Ahab Obadiah, “Ui pun emet, ui kondametusyek tugul che po peek, ak kereruusyek tugul. Tamangap kenyooru susweek ak kesaru paraisisyek ak nyumbusyek kosapcho, si ma pegunenech tuguuk tugul che kiyagi.”" 
1Kings18:5 Ki leenji `Ahab Obadiah, “Ui pun emet, ui kondametusyek tugul che po peek, ak kereruusyek tugul. Tamangap kenyooru susweek ak kesaru paraisisyek ak nyumbusyek kosapcho, si ma pegunenech tuguuk tugul che kiyagi.”" 
1Kings18:6 Kopchechigei anyun emet si kobun kogeerot; kwo Ahab ooreet age ineegei, kwo Obadiah ooreet age ineegei." 
1Kings18:6 Kopchechigei anyun emet si kobun kogeerot; kwo Ahab ooreet age ineegei, kwo Obadiah ooreet age ineegei." 
1Kings18:7 Kingo mi ooreet Obadiah, kotuiye Elijah. Ki inyit ineendet ak kobutyi ng'wony ak kole, “Inyee niito, kiptaiyandennyu Elijah?”" 
1Kings18:7 Kingo mi ooreet Obadiah, kotuiye Elijah. Ki inyit ineendet ak kobutyi ng'wony ak kole, “Inyee niito, kiptaiyandennyu Elijah?”" 
1Kings18:8 Ki wolji koleenji, “Ee Anee! Ui mwachi kiptaiyandeng'ung', ileenji, ‘Keero, mi yu Elijah.’ ”" 
1Kings18:9 Ak ki le, “Nee tengek ne koayai, si imach inde otwogindeng'ung' eutap Ahab, kobaran?" 
1Kings18:10 Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', koma mi pororyet anan ko laitornatet, ne tomo koyookto piik kiptaiyandennyu koba kocheeng'in. Ak ngo mwa kole, ‘Ma mi oli’, koleenjin pororyonooto anan ko laitornatanooto koyasyo kole, ‘ma keerin.’" 
1Kings18:11 Ak ileen nguno, Ui, mwachi kiptaiyandeng'ung' ileenji, ‘Keero, mi yu Elijah.’" 
1Kings18:12 Ye awe eng' yu imi, komutin Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole mangen. Ye awe amwachi Ahab, amanyo konyoorun, kobara. Ago anee otwogindeng'ung', aiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch ko aa ming'in." 
1Kings18:13 Tos ma kimwaun inyee kiptaiyandennyu kiit ne ki ayai ye kingo par Jesebel maotigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, keele ki auny piik pogol che po maotigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobeate konom eng' kebeneet age tugul ak abai icheek eng' magatiinik ak peek?" 
1Kings18:14 Ak imwae nguno ile, Ui mwachi kiptaiyandeng'ung', ileenji, ‘Keero, mi yu Elijah si kobara.’ ”" 
1Kings18:15 Ki le Elijah, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ne atonone tainnyi, aboorchinigei iman ineendet rani.”" 
1Kings18:16 Ara ki wo anyun Obadiah kotuiyo ak Ahab ak komwachi ineendet, ak ki wo Ahab kotuiyo ak Elijah." 
1Kings18:16 Ara ki wo anyun Obadiah kotuiyo ak Ahab ak komwachi ineendet, ak ki wo Ahab kotuiyo ak Elijah." 
1Kings18:17 Kingo keer `Ahab Elijah, koleenji `Ahab ineendet, “Inyee ni chiichi, ki inyaliil Israel?”" 
1Kings18:18 Ak ki wol Elijah kole, “Ma anyaliil Israel, inyee ne ki inyaliil, ak kootap kwandang'ung', amu ki omete ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki osup Baal." 
1Kings18:19 Iyookte anyun nguno kiyumwa Israel tugul kobwa tulweetap Karmel, kobooto maotigap Baal pogol ang'wan ak konom, ak maotigap Asera pogol ang'wan, che amisye meesetap Jesebel.”" 
1Kings18:20 Koguur anyun `Ahab piigap Israel tugul ak koyum maotik tugul koba tulweetap Karmel. 
1Kings18:21 Ki nyo Elijah koriikyi piik tugul ak koleenji, “Otebee kabwaatutik aeng' kot kotyanit? Ngot ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet, osup ineendet; ago ngot ko Baal, osup anyun ineendet.” Ak ma wolji `piik ineendet ng'olyoo." 
1Kings18:22 Koleenji anyun Elijah piik, “Anee, aneege kityo, maotyotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne aa ng'etunot; ago maotigap Baal ko pogol ang'wan ak konom." 
1Kings18:23 Ingogoonech anyun icheek kiruugik aeng'; ak ingolewenjigei kirgit agenge, ak kotonaton komengegitu, ak konde paragutap kweenik, amat konde maat kotobon ng'wony. Aeenye kirgit age ak ande paragutap kweenik, amandoi maat kotobon ng'wony." 
1Kings18:24 Yeityo oguur kainetap kanamweng'wong', ak aguur agine kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak Kamuktaindet ne wolu eng' maat, koek nooto Kamuktaindet.” Ak ki wol piik tugul kole, “Kemwa ne myee.”" 
1Kings18:25 Ki leenji `Elijah maotigap Baal, “Olewenjigei kirgit agenge ak osip oeny, amu oo chaang'; ak oguur kainetap kanamweng'wong', ago monde maat kotobon ng'wony.”" 
1Kings18:26 Ara ki nam kirgit ne kiga kigoochi ak koeny, ak koguur kainetap Baal kong'etee karon kot koit peet kween, koleen, “Ee Baal, kaseech!” Ago ki ma piit tweguuno, anan kobiit waluuno age tugul. Ak ki toroombenso komuut kapkorosuut ne kiga kiyai." 
1Kings18:27 Ak ki eng' peet kween, kochot Elijah icheek, koleenji, “Owaach inne! Amu ineendet ko kamuktain! Abeere ibwaati tuguuk, anan ko kawo ui, anan komi rutoi, anan abeere inuuchi, ak kanyool king'eet.”" 
1Kings18:28 Ara kiwaach eng' kutit ne oo ak kotilgei eng' rotonik ak ng'otwek, ko uu piteennywa, kot kochagirirta korotiik." 
1Kings18:29 Kingo week asiis komaotenso agoi sait ne kigoitoe kagoochinet; ago ki ma piit tweguuno, anan ko chii age tugul ne wolu, anan ko chii age tugul ne kasei." 
1Kings18:30 Ki leenji `Elijah piik tugul, “Oriigu ole ami.” Kiriikta anyun piik tugul ole mi ineendet. Yeityo koteech kogeny kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiga kobutok." 
1Kings18:31 Ki nam Elijah koik taman ak aeng', ko uu koitetap ortinwegap weeriigap Jakobo, ne ki nyoonji ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji, “Egu kaineng'ung' Israel.”" 
1Kings18:32 Kiteege kaptisisyet koichooto eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki pal keriinget koyieme kaptisisyet, ne yamegei ak keruutik aeng' che po kesweek." 
1Kings18:33 Ki inde kweenik kotet ak kotonaton kirgooto, ak konde paragutap kweenik. Ak ki le, “Onde peek tereenik ang'wan, ak oroong'ji kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak kweenik.”" 
1Kings18:34 Ak ki le, “Oroong'ji kogeny ne po aeng',” ak kiroong'ji kogeny ne po aeng'. Ak ki le, “Oroong'ji kogeny ne po somok,” ak kiroong'ji ne po somok." 
1Kings18:35 Ki itenden peek koyiem kaptisisyet, ak ki inde peek keriinget agine konyi." 
1Kings18:36 Ak eng' sait ne kigoitoe kagoochinet, konyo maotyot Elijah koriik, ak kosa kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Abraham, Isak, ak Israel, ingonaak rani keele ii Kamuktaindet eng' Israel, ak aa otwogindeng'ung' ak konaak keele kayai tuguuchuuto tugul eng' ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
1Kings18:37 Kasa, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kasa, si kobiit konai pichu kole, inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ii Kamuktaindet, ak koiweech mugulelwekwak koweekyinge kogeny.”" 
1Kings18:38 Kochoorgei anyun maatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kobeel kagoochinet ne kibeelei, kogees, ak kweenik, koik, ng'ung'unyek ak kobeel peek che ki mi keriinget kobek." 
1Kings18:39 Kingo keer piik tugul, kobutyi ng'wony ak kole, “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet!”" 
1Kings18:40 Ki leenji `Elijah icheek, “Onam maotigap Baal; amat ongochilil agot agenge!” Ki nam anyun icheek, ak komut `Elijah kochoorchigei kererutap Kison, ak kobarchi yooto." 
1Kings18:41 Ak ki leenji `Elijah Ahab, “Togoste, iamisye ak ieeise, amu agase tuleetap ropta ne oo.”" 
1Kings18:42 Ki togosta anyun Ahab kwo koamis ak koeeiso. Ki togosta Elijah kwo Karmel parak, ki ing'uruuk ak konde metinnyi kwenutap kutung'oikyik." 
1Kings18:43 Koleenji otwogindennyi, “Togoste nguno, igeer yuun po nyanjet.” Ak kitogosta, ak kogeer, ak kole, “Ma mi kiy.” Ak ki le, “Ui kogeny konyiil tisap.”" 
1Kings18:44 Ak eng' panda ne po tisap, kole, “Keero, ng'eetei pooldet eng' nyanjet ne ming'in ne tee eutap chiito.” Ak ki le Elijah, “Togoste ileenji Ahab, ‘Chopkei, ak ichoortegei si ma kerin ropta.’ ”" 
1Kings18:45 Ne matyanit, kotuuit kipsengwet eng' poolik, ak usoonet, ak ki roobon ropta ne oo. Ak ki laany chepkichutit Ahab, kwo Jezreel." 
1Kings18:46 Ki mi eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Elijah, ak ki kermengei, ak kolabat kondoe Ahab kwo ole kimandoe kebendi Jezreel." 
1Kings19:1 Ki mwachi anyun `Ahab Jesebel tuguuk tugul che kayai Elijah, kobooto ole kabarta maotik eng' rotwetap chok." 
1Kings19:2 Koyookto anyun `Jesebel chiito kwo ole mi Elijah, koleenji, “Ingoyaiywo kanamonik ko uu nooto, ak kotes koosir, ngot koma yai saboondang'ung' koigei saboondap age eng' icheek mutai ko neegit saini.”" 
1Kings19:3 Kingo keer ko uu nooto, kong'eet Elijah kwo komweito saboondanyi. Kingo it Beer-sheba ne po Judah, kobagaakta otwogindennyi eng' olooto." 
1Kings19:4 Ago ki wo ineendet pandap peetuut agenge kochut surkwen. Ki it ole mi keetiigap junipa, ak kotebi ng'wony eng' keetoto keel. Ki soom eng' yooto kole kome, ak ki le, “Kogoyam! Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ip saboondanyu nguno. Ma aa myee anee asiir kwanisyekyuk.”" 
1Kings19:5 Ki ru ak konuuch eng' keetit keel ne kiguure junipa. Ne matya konyo malaikaiyat kotwa ineendet ak koleenji, “Ng'eet, amisye.”" 
1Kings19:6 Ki keer ola tugul, ak ogeero, kimi ye neegitee metinnyi magatyat ne kiga kibeel eng' maatap nesek, ak tereetap peek. Ki amis ak koe peek ak koru kogeny." 
1Kings19:7 Ki nyo malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny ne po aeng', ak kotwa ineendet ak koleenji, “Ng'eet, amisye, amu oo miising' panda eng' inyee.”" 
1Kings19:8 Ki ng'eet ak koamis ak koe peek. Kiwee kimnateetap amitwogichooto peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam, kot koit Horeb tulweetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Kings19:9 Ki it kebeneet ne mi yooto, ak koru yooto. Ki nyoonji ineendet ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koleenji, “Iyae nee eng' yu, Elijah?”" 
1Kings19:10 Ki le ineendet, “Ki koama ng'etkong' miising' agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap lugoosyek, amu ki kobagakta piigap Israel kayomiseng'ung', kobut kaptisisyosyeguk ak kobar maotiguk eng' rotwetap chok. Ki ang'etu anee, aneege; ak nguno ko cheeng'ei icheek saboondanyu kobar.”" 
1Kings19:11 Ak ki le, “Mande, ak iwe itonone tulweet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ak ogeero, kisiirto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki pet tuloonook usoonet ne oo, ne kiim, ak kotuatui rwandosyek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago ki ma komi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor usoononooto. Kingo pata usoonet kobiit potaneetap ng'wony, ago ki ma komi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor potanonooto po ng'wony." 
1Kings19:12 Kingo pata potanet kobiit maat, ago ki ma komi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maata. Kingo pata maat kobiit tuugeet ne ming'in ne kitwegu mutyo." 
1Kings19:13 Kingo kas Elijah kotuch togeennyi eng' ngoryennyi, ak kotonon eng' ye kichutei kebendi kebeneet. Ki nyoonji ineendet kutit, koleenji, “Iyae nee eng' yu, Elijah?”" 
1Kings19:14 Ki le ineendet, “Ki koama ng'etkong' miising' agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, amu ki kobagakta piigap Israel kayomiseng'ung', kobut kaptisisyosyeguk ak kobar maotiguk eng' rotwetap chok. Ki ang'etu anee aneege, ak nguno ko cheeng'ei icheek saboondanyu kobar.”" 
1Kings19:15 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, “Ui, ketitegei, pun surkwen ne po Damasko. Ak ye iit, iil Hazael koek laitoryat eng' Syria." 
1Kings19:16 Iil Jehu weeriitap Nimshi koek laitoryat eng' Israel, ak iil Elisha weeriitap Sapat ne po Abel-meolah koek maotyot kogeerin." 
1Kings19:17 Ineendet ne chilili eng' rotwetap chok ne po Hazael, kobarei Jehu, ak ineendet ne chilili eng' rotwetap chok ne po Jehu kobarei Elisha." 
1Kings19:18 Ago atuukyinigei eliphuusyek tisap eng' Israel, kutung'oik tugul che tomo kogutung'ji Baal, ak kutit age tugul ne tomo kong'utut ineendet.”" 
1Kings19:19 Kwo anyun eng' yooto, ak kinyoor Elisha weeriitap Sapat, ne ki ibatisye eiik tiptem ak ang'wan, che po chogit eng' tainnyi, ak ki kweryei ineendet che po chogitap taman ak aeng', ne po let. Ki wo Elijah ye mi ineendet ak kowiirchi ineendet ngoryennyi." 
1Kings19:20 Ki pagaakta ineendet eiik ak kilabat koosup Elijah, ak koleenji, “Asoomin ale, chamwo awo ang'utut abba ak kamennyu agoochi saisere, yeityo asubun.” Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Ui, ketitegei, amu kayaun nee?”" 
1Kings19:21 Ara ki week Elisha, mata koosup ineendet ak konam eiik aeng' che po chogit, ak koyoe panyeekwak tuguuk che kiboisyee eiik, ak kogoochi piik, ak ki am icheek. Kingo pata kong'eet, ak kwo koosup Elijah, koboisyechi ineendet." 
1Kings20:1 Ki iyum Ben-Hadad laitoryatap Syria lugeennyi tugul ak ki mi kobooto ineendet laitorinik sosomu ak aeng', ak paraisisyek ak kariisyek, kitogosta kwo koyiem nganasanooto po Samaria ak kobargei." 
1Kings20:2 Ki iyookto piik koba kap Ahab laitoryatap Israel, agoi nganaseet ak koleenji ineendet, “Kamwa Ben-Hadad ko uu ni, kole:" 
1Kings20:3 ‘Chechuuk fedhaisyeguk ak thahabusyeguk, chechuuk ak icheek osotiguk che korooron miising' kobooto lagoguk.’ ”" 
1Kings20:4 Ki wol laitoryatap Israel kole, “Ko uu mwaeng'ung', kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat. Aa neng'ung', kobooto tuguuk tugul che atinye.”" 
1Kings20:5 Ki pwa pichooto kogeny ak koleenji, “Kamwa Ben-Hadad kole: ‘Koayogu piik iman kobwa oldang'ung', ale, igoono fedhaisyeguk ak thahabusyeguk, osotiguk ak lagoguk." 
1Kings20:6 Ago ayoogun otwogikyuk kobwa oldang'ung' mutai ko neegit saini, nyoo kocheeng'so eng' koong'ung' ak kooriigap otwogiguk, ak konam kiit age tugul ne igeere ko karaaran, ak koip.’ ”" 
1Kings20:7 Koguur anyun laitoryatap Israel poisyek tugul che po emet, ak koleenji, “Asoomok ale, obwaat ak ogeer ole cheeng'doi chiichi yaityet! Amu koiyook piik komach osotikyuk, lagokyuk, kobooto fedhaisyekyuk ak thahabusyekyuk, amaete.”" 
1Kings20:8 Ki leenji poisyek tugul ak piik tugul ineendet, “Amat igas, anan icham.”" 
1Kings20:9 Ki leenji anyun pichooto po Ben-Hadad, “Oba omwachi kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, oleenji, Ayaei tuguuk tugul che kigeyogu eng' tai kemwachi otwogindeng'ung', ago ma muuchi ayai kii.” Ki pa anyun pichooto kiga kiyok, ak koipchi ineendet ng'olyoot kogeny." 
1Kings20:10 Ki iyookto `Ben-Hadad piik koba oldanyi, koleenji, “Ingoyaiywo kamuktaik ko uu nooto, ak kotes koosir, ngot koyam temburyegap Samaria komugutat eng' eunekwak piik che isubwo.”" 
1Kings20:11 Ki wol laitoryatap Israel kole, “Oleenji ineendet: Amat kochoigei ineendet ne kermenegei kariik, ko uu ineendet ne ireegu kariik.”" 
1Kings20:12 Kingo kas Ben-Hadad ng'aleechuuto, koeisei, ineendet ak laitorinik, komi emaisyek, komwachi otwogikyik, koleenji: “Otetkei!” Kotetkei anyun kobookyi nganaseet." 
1Kings20:13 Ne matyanit koginyo maotyot ole mi Ahab laitoryatap Israel, ak kole, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos kaigeer tuiyoni oo? Keero, andoi eung'ung' rani si inai ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Kings20:14 Ak ki le Ahab, “Eng' toretetap ng'oo?” Ak ki le, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kole: ‘Eng' eunegap murenik che po pounigap emotinwek.’ ” Kole anyun, “Ng'oo ne tau pooryeet?” Ak ki wol kole, “Inyee!”" 
1Kings20:15 Koyum anyun neranik che po emotinwek, ak ki ek pogol aeng' ak sosom ak aeng'. Kingo pata koyum piik tugul, lagok tugul che po Israel, ki eliphuusyek tisap." 
1Kings20:16 Ki manda peet kween. Ago kieisei Ben-Hadad ak laitorinik sosom ak aeng' che kitoret ineendet kot ko kiga kobogit eng' emaisyek oriit. 
1Kings20:17 Ki indo murenigap pounigap emotinwek. Ki iyook Ben-Hadad piik koba kotabendo ak ki mwachi pichooto ineendet koleenji, “Pwoonei piik che punu Samaria.”" 
1Kings20:18 Ki le ineendet, “Ngot kobwanei komachei kaalyeet, onam; ak ngot kobwanei lugeet, onam kora.”" 
1Kings20:19 Komanda anyun pichooto eng' nganaseet, murenigap pounigap emotinwek ak lugeet ne ki isubi icheek." 
1Kings20:20 Ak ki par chii age tugul chiito; ki mwei piigap Syria ak ki oon Israel icheek. Kichilil Ben-Hadad laitoryatap Syria eng' paraisiit kobooto piik che ki laanyei paraisisyek. 
1Kings20:21 Ki manda laitoryatap Israel, ak kobar paraisisyek ak kariisyek, ak kobar piigap Syria eng' pareet ne oo." 
1Kings20:22 Ki nyo maotyot ole mi laitoryatap Israel ak koleenji, “Ui igimitkei, ak ibwaat ak igeer kiit ne iyae, amu nyoonei laitoryatap Syria kotogosu obargei, ko kabek kenyini.”" 
1Kings20:23 Ki leenji otwogigap laitoryatap Syria ineendet, “Kamuktaindennywa ko kamuktaindetap tuloonook. Ki kiimeen anyun icheek kosiirech amu nooto. Ago ongebarge ak icheek eng' warenget, ak kegimegitu iman kesiir icheek." 
1Kings20:24 Yai kii: iste laitorinik, chii age tugul eng' ye kami, ak inde kiptainik kogeer icheek." 
1Kings20:25 Iit ak ineet lugeeng'ung' kogeny, che tee che kogebarenen, iger paraisiit eng' paraisiit, chepkichutit eng' chepkichutit; si ngot kebarge ak icheek eng' warenget, kegimegitu iman kesiir icheek.” Ki kasyi icheek ng'aleekwak ak ki yai ko uu nooto." 
1Kings20:26 Kingo keskei kenyiit, koyum `Ben-Hadad piigap Syria, ak kotogosta kwo Apek, kobargei ak Israel." 
1Kings20:27 Ki iyumgei ak icheek piigap Israel ak kigoochi amitwogik, ak kobokto kobargei ak pichooto. Ki teech nganaseet eng' tainnywa koigei akwotisyek aeng' che tutigin che po aaregap ng'oroor; ago ki nyi piigap Syria emet." 
1Kings20:28 Ki nyo chiitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koriik ak kong'alaalji laitoryatap Israel, kole, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole: ‘Amu komwa piigap Syria kole, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kamuktaindetap tuloonook, ma kamuktaindetap atebwosyek, andoi anyun eung'ung' tuiyoni oo tugul, si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Ki teech kotokyin ak komeng'iis eng' peetuusyek tisap. Ak eng' peetuutap tisap kotuiyogei lugoosyek ak ki par `piigap Israel eng' peetuut agenge piigap Syria eliphuusyek pogol che ki punei keelyek. 
1Kings20:30 Ago ki mweiso che ki ng'et koba nganaseetap Apek, ak ki luulji inaatut piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak tisap che kiga ng'et. Ak ki mwei Ben-Hadad kwo nganaseet, kwo koot ne po oriit." 
1Kings20:31 Ki leenji `otwogikyik ineendet, “Keero, kigegas keele laitorinigap kootap Israel ko laitorinik che tinyei rireenetapkei. Kisoomin anyun keele kilaach kuniok kegermenegei, ak kinde rogoosyek metowekyok, ak kemande keebe ole mi laitoryatap Israel. Tamangap kosar saboondang'ung'.”" 
1Kings20:32 Kogermenengei anyun kuniok ak konde rogoosyek metowekwak, ak kobwa ole mi laitoryatap Israel, ak koleenji, “Kamwa otwogindeng'ung' Ben-Hadad kole: ‘Asaain ale, pagaakta asap.’ ” Ak ki le, “Ta kosabei? Ineendet ko tupchennyu.”" 
1Kings20:33 Kogeer pichooto komyee, si kosip konai ngo kimwaei iman; ak ki mwa pichooto kole, “Ng'eetap komet Ben-Hadad.” Kole anyun, “Oba omutu ineendet.” Komong' anyun Ben-Hadad konyo ole mi ineendet, ak ki leenji kolong' chepkichutit parak." 
1Kings20:34 Ki leenji Ben-Hadad ineendet, “Aweegun nganasook che kiga ibe kwandanyu kwandang'ung'; ak iyachinigei ortinwek eng' Damasko, ko uu ye ki yai kwandanyu eng' Samaria.” Ak ki mwa Ahab kole, “Achundoin iwe eng' kayomisoni.” Koyomiskei anyun ak ineendet ak kochunda kwo." 
1Kings20:35 Ki leenji chiito age ne po weeriigap maotik chiitap kokwennyi eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Asoomin ale, pira.” Ak ki eesyo chiichooto kobir ineendet." 
1Kings20:36 Koleenji ineendet anyun, “Amu ma igas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko keero, ne po iwendi kityo eng' yu ami, kobarin ng'etundo.” Ak kingo kata kwo, eng' yooto kotuiyo ak ng'etundo ak kobar ineendet." 
1Kings20:37 Yeityo konyoor chiito age, ak koleenji, “Asoomin ale pira.” Ki pir anyun chiichooto ineendet ak koguoten." 
1Kings20:38 Kwo anyun maotyondonooto, ak koriip laitoryat eng' ooreet, ak kowalgei koek age, kotuge togeennyi angeennyi ne kere metit." 
1Kings20:39 Ye kisiirtoi laitoryat, koguur `ineendet laitoryat koleenji, “Ki wo otwogindeng'ung' kwenutap lugeet, ak keero, kiwelelgei chiito kwo taban, ak komutwaa chiito, ak kole, Riip chiichi. Ngot kobiit kiy kot kochilil, kogeeri saboondang'ung' saboondanyi, anan iyoogu kebeberwek eliphuusyek somok che po fedha." 
1Kings20:40 Ye kichirchireni otwogindeng'ung', koboisyei kowendi yu ak kowendi yu, kochilil.” Ak ki leenji `laitoryatap Israel ineendet, “Egu ko uu nooto kirwoogeng'ung'. Kaitil inyegei ko uu nooto.”" 
1Kings20:41 Ki inem angeennyi ne kere metit, eng' togeennyi kochokyi, ak ki nai laitoryatap Israel ineendet kole ki po ineendet maotik." 
1Kings20:42 Ki leenji ineendet, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole: ‘Amu koichunde eng' eung'ung' chiito ne koga atabaanji ng'emisyet, kogeeri anyun saboondang'ung' saboondanyi, ak kogeer piiguk piikyik.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Ki wo anyun laitoryatap Israel koonnyi eng' muguleldo ne nyigiis, ak konereechi, ki week koit Samaria." 
1Kings21:1 Kingobata tuguuchooto, ko ki tinyei Nabot Jesreelindet mbareetap sabibuk, ne ki mi Jezreel, ne riikyin kootap Ahab laitoryatap Samaria." 
1Kings21:2 Ki mwachi `Ahab Nabot, koleenji, “Koono mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk, ayai koek kabungut, amu neegitee koonnyu. Ageerunenen mbareet age ne po sabibuk ne karaaran kosiir niito, anan ngot igeere komyee eng' inyee, agoonin kamanuutyennyi eng' silingisyek.”" 
1Kings21:3 Ago ki leenji `Nabot Ahab, “Ma chamwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoonin poroteetap kwanisyekyuk.”" 
1Kings21:4 Ki nyo Ahab koonnyi eng' muguleldo ne nyigiis, ak konereechi amu ng'olyoot ne kamwachi Nabot Jesreelindet, amu kiga leenji, “Ma koonin poroteetap kwanisyekyuk.” Ki ru eng' itogunnyi, kolit oliin ak koeesyo koamis." 
1Kings21:5 Ki nyo Jesebel kwondonyi ole mi ineendet ak koleenji, “Amu nee si koma paibai saboondang'ung' ko uu ni, kot ko memache iamisye?”" 
1Kings21:6 Ki leenji ineendet, “Amu kamwachi Nabot Jesreelindet aleenji, ‘Koono mbareeng'ung' ne po sabibuk aal eng' silingisyek, anan ngot igeere ko myee eng' inyee, agoonin mbareet age ne po sabibuk kewale.’ Ago kawol kole, ‘Ma koonin mbareennyu ne po sabibuk.’ ”" 
1Kings21:7 Ki leenji `Jesebel osotyonnyi ineendet, “Tos ibou nguno pororyetap Israel? Ng'eet ak iamisye! Ingobaibait muguleldang'ung'. Agoonin mbareetap sabibuk ne po Nabot Jesreelindet.”" 
1Kings21:8 Kosir anyun paronok eng' kainetap Ahab, ak kong'ooch eng' ng'ooksetap Ahab, ak koyookyi paronochooto poisyek ak piik che taagunotiin che ki mi nganasennyi che kimeng'jindos ak Nabot." 
1Kings21:9 Ki sir eng' paronochooto kole, “Omwaite karugutetapkei ak onde Nabot taitap piik." 
1Kings21:10 Onde piik aeng' tainnyi, weeriigap Belial, ak ongobaoryan kotaam ineendet, kole, ‘Kechup inyee Kamuktaindet ak laitoryat.’ Yeityo omut ineendet kwo saang', ak olach eng' koik, kome.”" 
1Kings21:11 Ki yai piigap nganasennyi kobooto poisyek ak piik che taagunotiin che ki menyei nganasennyi, ko uu ye kiga iyookyi parweet Jesebel, ko uu ye kiga sir eng' paronok che kiga iyookyi icheek." 
1Kings21:12 Kimwaita karugutetapkei ak konde Nabot taitap piik. 
1Kings21:13 Ki pwa ko piik aeng'u, weeriigap Belial, ak kotebi ng'wony eng' tainnyi. Kibaoryan kotaam ineendet, pichooto po Belial, kogen agobo Nabot eng' taitap piik, kole, “Kachup Nabot Kamuktaindet ak laitoryat.” Komut anyun ineendet komaanda eng' nganaseet ak kolach ineendet eng' koik, kome." 
1Kings21:14 Ki kiyookto anyun kemwachi Jesebel keleenji, “Kagelach Nabot eng' koik, ak kagome.”" 
1Kings21:15 Kingo kas Jesebel kole, kagelach Nabot eng' koik ak kagome, koleenji `Jesebel Ahab, “Ng'eet, nam mbareetap sabibuk ne po Nabot Jesreelindet kobunjiin, ni kietei kogoonin ial eng' silingisyek. Ma kosabei ineendet, ago kagome.”" 
1Kings21:16 Kingo kas Ahab kole kagome Nabot, kong'eet ak korekto kwo mbareetap sabibuk ne po Nabot Jesreelindet, kwo konam kobunji." 
1Kings21:17 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Elijah Tisbindet, koleenji:" 
1Kings21:18 “Ng'eet choortegei otuiye ak Ahab laitoryatap Israel, ne menyei Samaria. Mi ineendet mbareetap sabibuk ne po Nabot ole kachoorchigei kwo konam kobunji." 
1Kings21:19 Ing'alaalji ineendet ileenji, ‘Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole: Kaibar ak kenam kobunjiin?’ Ak imwachi ileenji, ‘Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole: Ole kimele sesenik korotiigap Nabot, komele yooto sesenik korotiguk ak icheek.’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Ki leenji `Ahab Elijah, “Kainyoorwo, punyondennyu?” Ki wol kole, “Ee, kaanyoorun! Amu kaialdegei iyai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Kings21:21 ‘Aibun yaityet, ak abukten ibet, ak aiste eng' kap Ahab lakweet age tugul ne weeriit, ak ineendet ne kerat kobooto ne ityagat eng' Israel." 
1Kings21:22 Ayae koong'ung' kogergeit ak kootap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, ak kogergeit ak kootap Baasha weeriitap Ahija, amu taget ne kiitacha anereech ak igoochi Israel koyai tengekto.’" 
1Kings21:23 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Jesebel agine, kole: ‘Amei sesenik Jesebel eng' ye neegitee irimeetap Jezreel." 
1Kings21:24 Amei sesenik ineendet ne po kap Ahab ne meei eng' nganaseet ak ne meei eng' timiin koamei toriitik che po parak.’ ” 
1Kings21:25 (Ago kitom kobiit age ne ki igei Ahab ne ki aldagei koyai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki ing'eetyin Jesebel osotyonnyi." 
1Kings21:26 Ki yai tuguuk che kiwechei miising' eng' kasubetap kanamonik, ko uu tuguuk tugul che kiyaei Amorik, che ki oon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap piigap Israel.)" 
1Kings21:27 Kingo kas Ahab ng'aleechooto, kogereer ngoroikyik, kolaach kuniet ak korugutkei. Kisyep kuniet ak koming'ingei." 
1Kings21:28 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Elijah Tisbindet, koleenji:" 
1Kings21:29 “Igeere ole iming'indogei Ahab eng' tainnyu? Amu iming'inegei eng' tainnyu, koma ibu yaityet eng' peetuusyekyik; ago aipchini yaityet koonnyi eng' peetuusyegap weeriinnyi.”" 
1Kings22:1 Ki tebi Syria ak Israel koma mi lugeet kwenunnywa eng' kasartap kenyiisyek somok. 
1Kings22:2 Ak eng' kenyiitap somok, kochoorgei Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah konyo kaplaitoryatap Israel." 
1Kings22:3 Ki leenji `laitoryatap Israel otwogikyik, “Ongen ole nenyo Ramot-Gilead, kitebye, ama kibendi kerebe eng' eunegap laitoryatap Syria?”" 
1Kings22:4 ki teebee `ineendet Jehoshaphat koleenji, “Ichame keebe tuwai kebarge ak Ramot-Gilead?” Ki wolji `Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Israel kole, “Auu kiit ne iuu, uu piikyuk piiguk ak uu paraisisyekyuk paraisisyeguk.”" 
1Kings22:5 Ki leenji `Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Israel, “Asoomin ale teep eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani.”" 
1Kings22:6 Koyum anyun laitoryatap Israel maotik, olo po piik pogol ang'wan, ak koteebe koleenji icheek, “Awe kebarge ak Ramot-Gilead, anan atebi?” Ki leenji, “Togoste! Amu indoi Kiptaiyat eutap laitoryat.”" 
1Kings22:7 Ago ki le Jehoshaphat, “Tos ma mi maotyotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor age yu si keteepse ineendet?”" 
1Kings22:8 Ki leenji laitoryatap Israel Jehoshaphat, “Ta komi chiito agenge ne kimuuchi keteepse eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Mikaia weeriitap Imla. Ago aweche ineendet, amu ma maoteni tuguuk che myachen agobo anee, kobatee yaityet.” Ak ki le Jehoshaphat, “Amat komwa laitoryat ko uu no.”" 
1Kings22:9 Ki kuur anyun laitoryatap Israel kiptaiyat age ak koleenji, “Ui imutu Mikaia weeriitap Imla ichogune!”" 
1Kings22:10 Kiga tebee laitoryatap Israel ak Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah ng'echerokwak che po laitornatet, kolaachi ngoroikwak che po laitornatet, eng' ole paraa eng' ormariichetap Samaria; ak ki maoteni maotik tugul eng' tainnywa." 
1Kings22:11 Kiyachigei Zedekiah weeriitap Kenaana kuinoigap kariik, ak kole, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole: ‘Itoortae chuuto piigap Syria, kot kogeskei.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 Kimaotenso maotik tugul ko uu nooto ak icheek, kole, “Togoste Ramot-Gilead, ak iboor! Amu indoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganasanooto eutap laitoryat.”" 
1Kings22:13 Ki ng'alaalji ineendet, chiito ne kiga kiyookto koguur Mikaia, koleenji, “Keero, kamwachi maotik ng'aleek che myach laitoryat eng' kutit agenge. Asoomin ale, ingoigei ng'olyoondeng'ung' ng'olyootap age eng' icheek, ak ing'alaal ng'aleek che myach.”" 
1Kings22:14 Ago ki le Mikaia, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki it ne mwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amwae nooto.”" 
1Kings22:15 Kingo it ineendet ole mi laitoryat, koleenji `laitoryat ineendet, “Mikaia, kibe Ramot-Gilead kebarge, anan ki tebi?” Ak ki wolji ineendet koleenji, “Togoste ak iboor, ak indoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganasanooto eutap laitoryat!”" 
1Kings22:16 Ki leenji laitoryat, “Ayosyeun konyil ata ale, amat imwaiwo kiy age kobatee imanit eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
1Kings22:17 Ki le Mikaia, “Ki ageer Israel tugul ko kaiyesta eng' tuloonook ko uu keechiirek che ma tinyei mestowot. Ak ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Ma tinyei chuuto kiptaiyat; ingoweek chii tugul kwo koonnyi eng' kaalyeet.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Ki leenji `laitoryatap Israel Jehoshaphat, “Kamamwaun ale, ma maoteni tuguuk che myach agobo anee, kobatee yaityet?”" 
1Kings22:19 Ki testai Mikaia kole, “Kas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ki ageer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotebyei eng' ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet, ak kitononi lugeet tugul ne po kipsengwet eng' eunnyi ne po tai ak ne po kaataam." 
1Kings22:20 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Ng'oo ne iberberi Ahab, si kwo kotogosta ak kome eng' Ramot-gilead?’ Ki mwa age ko uu ni, komwa age ko uu ni." 
1Kings22:21 Yeityo komong' tamirmiryo age ak kotonon eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kole, ‘Anee ne aberberi.’" 
1Kings22:22 Ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koleenji, ‘Iberbertoi ano?’ Ak ki le, ‘Awendi ak aegu tamirmir ne kenisyei eng' kutusweegap maotikyik tugul.’ Ak ki mwa ineendet kole, ‘Iberberi ineendet ak iterteer; ui anyun ak iyai ko uu nooto.’" 
1Kings22:23 Ara anyun, keero, kainde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tamirmir ne kenisyei kutusweegap maotichuguk tugul. Kagomwa anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaityet agobo inyee.”" 
1Kings22:24 Koriik anyun Zedekiah weeriitap Kenaana, ak korabach Mikaia matanda, ak koleenji, “Kabun ano Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak konyo kong'alaalun?”" 
1Kings22:25 Ki le Mikaia, “Keero, igeere eng' peetuunooto, tuun iwendi koot ne po oriit iunyegei.”" 
1Kings22:26 Ki mwa laitoryatap Israel kole, “Onam Mikaia ak oweekte omutyi Ammon pounindetap nganaseet ak Joash weeriitap laitoryat,”" 
1Kings22:27 ak koleenji, “ ‘Kamwa laitoryat ko uu ni, kole: Onde chiichi korgoreet, obae ineendet amitwogigap nyalilda ak peegap nyalilda agoi aweigei eng' kaalyeet.’ ”" 
1Kings22:28 Ki leenji Mikaia, “Ngot iweigei iman eng' kaalyeet, ko kaagaa ma ng'alaalena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ak kites kole, “Ogas okweek piik tugul.”" 
1Kings22:29 Ki togosta anyun laitoryatap Israel ak Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah koba Ramot-gilead. 
1Kings22:30 Ki leenji laitoryatap Israel Jehoshaphat, “Awalegei aegu age, ak awe lugeet, ago ilaach inyee ngoroiguk che po laitornatet.” Kowalgei anyun laitoryatap Israel koek age, ak kwo lugeet." 
1Kings22:31 Kiga ng'at laitoryatap Syria kiptainik sosom ak aeng' che po kariisyekyik, koleenji, “Amat obargei ak ne ming'in anan ko ne oo, kobatee laitoryatap Israel ineegei.”" 
1Kings22:32 Kingo keer kiptainichooto po kariisyek Jehoshaphat, kole, “Iman, niito laitoryatap Israel.” Ko uu nooto kogiwelelgei kobargei ak ineendet; ak kiwaach anyun Jehoshaphat." 
1Kings22:33 Ago kingo keer kiptainigap kariisyek kole ma laitoryatap Israel ni, koweek, mata koosup ineendet." 
1Kings22:34 King'i chiito age kwangennyi kosapsapchi, ak kityech laitoryatap Israel ole tuiyechin kariikyik che ki ilaachi. Ki leenji anyun chiito ne kweryei chepkichutinnyi, “Imuta amanda eng' ole mi lugeet; amu kagiguotena miising'.”" 
1Kings22:35 Kitesak lugeet peetuunooto, ak ki kiti laitoryat eng' chepkichutinnyi kotokyigei piigap Syria. Ki itenden korotiik eng' mook koba kobun kelutap chepkichutit, ak kime ineendet koskoleny." 
1Kings22:36 Ki piit waagaat eng' lugeet komugul komachei kororokto asiista, keele, “Ingwo chii tugul nganasennyi, ak kwo chii tugul emennyi!”" 
1Kings22:37 Kingo me anyun laitoryat ko ki kisut konyo Samaria, ak ki tup icheek ineendet eng' olooto." 
1Kings22:38 Ki iuun piik chepkichutit eng' tamboiyotap Samaria; ak ki meel sesenik korotiikyik, ak ki iuunegei yooto chepkugonik, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa." 
1Kings22:39 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Ahab ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, kootap kelegap peeleek ne ki teech, ak nganasook tugul che ki teech, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
1Kings22:40 Koru anyun Ahab ak kwanisyekyik. Ki laitoran Ahasia weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
1Kings22:41 Ki toi kolaitoran Jehoshaphat weeriitap Asa eng' Judah eng' kenyiitap ang'wan ne po Ahab laitoryatap Israel. 
1Kings22:42 Ki po Jehoshaphat kenyiisyek sosom ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani. Ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Hasubah cheptap Sili. 
1Kings22:43 Kiwendote ortinwek tugul che po Asa kwandanyi; ma masta eng' ortinwechooto, ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Nganda ki ma kiisto komoswek che torooreen, ak kita koenyei piik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswechooto torooreen." 
1Kings22:44 Ki yai kaalyeet Jehoshaphat ak laitoryatap Israel. 
1Kings22:45 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jehoshaphat, ak kimnateennyi ne ki iboor, ak ole kiyaita lugoosyek, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah?" 
1Kings22:46 Ki isto eng' emet sodomik che kiga ng'et eng' peetuusyegap kwandanyi Asa. 
1Kings22:47 Ki ma komi laitoryanda Edom; ki pou emet chiito ne kirubei laitoryat. 
1Kings22:48 Ki yai Jehoshaphat melisyegap Taris si koba Opir koip thahabu, ago ma pa; amu kibutok melisyechooto eng' Esion-geber." 
1Kings22:49 Koleenji anyun `Ahasia weeriitap Ahab Jehoshaphat, “Chamji otwogikyuk koba ak otwogiguk eng' melisyek.” Ago ma cham Jehoshaphat." 
1Kings22:50 Ki ru Jehoshaphat ak kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi ole ki kitupchi kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi kwandanyi. Ki laitoran Jehoram weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
1Kings22:51 Ki toi kolaitoran Ahasia weeriitap Ahab eng' Israel eng' Samaria, eng' kenyiitap taman ak tisap ne po Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek aeng' eng' Israel." 
1Kings22:52 Ki yai ineendet yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kowendote ortinwegap kwandanyi, ak ortinwegap kamennyi ak ortinwegap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, ne ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings22:53 Ki oot ak kogutung'ji Baal, ak kotach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, konereech, ko uu tuguuk tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi." 
2Kings1:1 Kingo kagome Ahab kongelelji `Moab Israel. 
2Kings1:2 Kirorok Ahasia eng' tirisyetap koonnyi ne po parak ne ki mi Samaria ak kimyan. Ki iyookto piik ak koleenji, “Oba, oteebe Baal-sebub kanamwetap Ekron ngo tos asap eng' myani.”" 
2Kings1:3 Ago ki leenji malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Elijah Tisbindet, “Ng'eet ak iwe otuiye ak piik che kaiyookto laitoryatap Samaria, ak ileenji icheek, ‘Si obe oteepse Baal-sebub kanamwetap Ekron, ko amu ma mi Kamuktaindet Israel?’" 
2Kings1:4 Ara anyun, kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Mechooruge eng' itogung'ung' ne irue, ago imee iman.’ ” Ak ki wo Elijah." 
2Kings1:5 Kingo week pichooto koba oldanyi, koteebe icheek koleenji, “Kalya si oweege?”" 
2Kings1:6 Ki leenji ineendet, “Konyo chiito kotuiyenech ak koleenjech, ‘Oba oweege ole mi laitoryat ne kaiyokwok, ak oleenji ineendet, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Si iyookte piik koba koteepse Baal-sebub kanamwetap Ekron, ko amu ma mi Kamuktaindet Israel? Nooto anyun, mechooruge anyun eng' itoogut, ago imee iman.’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Ki leenji icheek, “Ka chii ne uu nee chiichooto katuiyenok, ak komwaiwok ng'aleechuuto?”" 
2Kings1:8 Ki wolji koleenji, “Ka chiito ne sabul ak karategei pireneet eng' suennyi.” Ki le laitoryat, “Ineendet ko Elijah Tisbindet.”" 
2Kings1:9 Koyooktoochi anyun `laitoryat kiptaiyat kobooto piikyik konom. Ki togosta kwo ole mi ineendet, ak kitebyei ng'wony Elijah eng' tulweet parak. Ak ki mwachi ineendet koleenji, “Ee, chiitap Kamuktaindet, kole laitoryat, ‘Choruge!’ ”" 
2Kings1:10 Ki wolji `Elijah kiptaiyatap pichooto konom, koleenji, “Ngot ko aa chiitap Kamuktaindet, kochoorgei maat eng' kipsengwet, ak kobeelin kobooto piiguk konom.” Ki choorgei anyun maat eng' kipsengwet ak kobeel ineendet ak piikyik konom." 
2Kings1:11 Ki iyookyi ineendet kogeny kiptaiyat age ak piikyik konom. Ki wolji ineendet koleenji, “Ee, chiitap Kamuktaindet, kamwa laitoryat kole, ‘Chogu chooruge!’ ”" 
2Kings1:12 Ak ki wolji `Elijah icheek koleenji, “Ngot ko aa chiitap Kamuktaindet, kochoorgei maat eng' kipsengwet ak kobeelin kobooto piiguk konom.” Ki choorgei anyun maatap Kamuktaindet eng' kipsengwet ak kobeel ineendet ak piikyik konom." 
2Kings1:13 Ki iyookto kogeny kiptaiyat ne po somok kobooto piikyik konom. Ki togosta kiptaiyatap somok ne pou konom ak konyo kogutuny eng' taitap Elijah, ak kosaisai ineendet, koleenji, “Ee chiitap Kamuktaindet, asaain ale, ingobunji kamanuut ne oo, saboondanyu ak saboonwegap otwogichuguk konom eng' taing'ung'!" 
2Kings1:14 Keero, kachoorgei maat eng' kipsengwet ak kobeel kiptainichu kabo tai tuwai kobooto piikwak konom che po age tugul. Ago nguno asoomin ale ingobunji saboondanyu kamanuut ne oo eng' taing'ung'.”" 
2Kings1:15 Ki leenji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Elijah, “Orektee tuwai ak ineendet; amat iywei ineendet.” Ara king'eet korekta tuwai ak ineendet agoi ole mi laitoryat." 
2Kings1:16 Ki leenji ineendet, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole: ‘Ko uu ye keyookte piik koba koteepse Baal-sebub kanamwetap Ekron, ko amu ma mi Kamuktaindet eng' Israel ne iteepse eng' ng'olyoondennyi? Nooto anyun, mechooruge eng' itogung'ung', ago imee iman.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Ara kime anyun ineendet ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki kamwa Elijah. Amu ki ma kotinyei weeriit ko ki toi kolaitoran Jehoram kogeer ineendet eng' kenyiitap aeng' ne po Jehoram weeriitap Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah. 
2Kings1:18 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Ahasia che ki yai, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
2Kings2:1 Ye ki machei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komut Elijah eng' kipchurchuryet kwo kipsengwet, ko ki pendi eng' ooreet komandoi eng' Gilgal Elijah ak Elisha." 
2Kings2:2 Ki leenji `Elijah Elisha, “Asoomin ale, tebi eng' yu; amu kagoyookta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor awo agoi Bethel.” Ago ki le Elisha, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung', koma metoin.” Kochoortagei anyun Bethel." 
2Kings2:3 Ki mong' weeriigap maotik che ki mi Bethel, kobwa ole mi Elisha, ak koleenji ineendet, “Ingen ile imuti ra Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandeng'ung' si ma ko kiptaiyandeng'ung'?” Ak ki le, “Ee, angen; osisye okweek.”" 
2Kings2:4 Ki leenji `Elijah Elisha, “Asoomin ale tebi eng' yu; amu kagoyookta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor awo Jeriko.” Ak ki le, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung', koma metoin.” Ki it anyun tuwai Jeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Ki pwa koriik ole mi Elisha, weeriigap maotik che ki mi Jeriko, ak koleenji ineendet, “Ingen ile imuti ra Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandeng'ung' si ma ko kiptaiyandeng'ung'?” Ak ki wol kole, “Ee, angen; osisye okweek.”" 
2Kings2:6 Ki leenji `Elijah ineendet, “Asoomin ale, tebi eng' yu; amu kagoyookta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor awo Jordan.” Ak ki le, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung', koma metoin.” Ki pa anyun tuwai." 
2Kings2:7 Ki isup murenik konomu che po weeriigap maotik, ak kotononso eng' ole loo kitigin; ak kitononso icheek aeng'u eng' ye neegitee Jordan." 
2Kings2:8 Ki ireek Elijah ngoryennyi ak kotaa, ak kokwere peek, kipcheiyo peek koba komosi ak komosi, ak ki landa tuwai eng' ole yaamaat." 
2Kings2:9 Kingo landa, koleenji `Elijah Elisha, “Soom kiit ne imache ayaun, kotomo kimuta eng' ole imi.” Ak ki le Elisha, “Asoomin ale, ingotebena kebebertap muguleldong'ung' konyil aeng'.”" 
2Kings2:10 Ak ki le, “Kesoom kiit ne uui, ago ngigeera ye kimuta awo eng' ole imi, kobiitu ko uu nooto eng' inyee; ago ngot koma uu nooto, koma piitu nooto.”" 
2Kings2:11 Ye kita kobendi anyun, kong'alaaloti, ko ki piit chepkichutit ne po maat ak paraisisyek che po maat, che ki ibesyo icheek tuwai; ak ki wo Elijah kipsengwet eng' kipchurchuryet." 
2Kings2:12 Ki keer Elisha ak kowaach kole, “Abba! Abba! Karisyegap Israel ak piik che laanyei paraisisyechooto!” Ak ki mata kogeer ineendet kogeny. Ki nam ngoroikyik, ak kogereer kopcheune aeng'." 
2Kings2:13 Ki nam kogeny ngoryeetap Elijah ne ki ibute ineendet ak koweektagei kwo kotonone ngeguutap Jordan. 
2Kings2:14 Ki nam ngoryeetap Elijah ne ki ibute ineendet ak kokwere peek ak kole, “Mi ano Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Elijah?” Kingo kagokwer peek, kopcheiyo koba komosi ak komosi, ak ki landa Elisha." 
2Kings2:15 Kingo keer weeriigap maotik che ki mi Jeriko ko katokyigei ineendet, kole, “Tebee `sabeetap Elijah Elisha.” Ak ki pa kotorookta ineendet ak kong'uruuk kot koit ng'wony eng' tainnyi." 
2Kings2:16 Ak ki leenji icheek ineendet, “Keero, mi kobooto otwogiguk piik konomu che kiimeen; kisoomin keele, ingoba kocheeng' kiptaiyandeng'ung'. Tamangap ko kagomut ineendet Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotogosta, ak kowiirchi tuloonook parak, anan ko atebwosyek.” Ak ki le, “Amat oyookte.”" 
2Kings2:17 Ago kingo simji ineendet agoi kolilaan, komwa kole, “Oyookte.” Koyookta anyun murenik konom, ak ki cheeng'at eng' peetuusyek somok, ama nyoor ineendet." 
2Kings2:18 Kingo week ole mi ineendet, ole ki tebee eng' Jeriko; koleenji ineendet icheek, “Ki ma mwaiwok aleenjok, Amat obe?”" 
2Kings2:19 Ki leenji piigap nganaseet Elisha, “Keero, karaaran ole mi nganasani, ko uu ye keerei kiptaiyandennyu, ago yaacheen peek, ama rurtos tuguuk eng' emet.”" 
2Kings2:20 Ak ki le, “Oibwa soteet ne leel, ak onde oriit muunyuk.” Ak ki ipchi ineendet." 
2Kings2:21 Ki manda kwo kondametutap peek, ak kowiirchi oriit muunyuk, ak kole, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Kaasoop peechu; ma kobiitu meet anan osunateet eng' olooto.’ ”" 
2Kings2:22 Ki kisoop anyun peechooto agoi ra, ko uu ng'olyootap Elisha ne ki mwa." 
2Kings2:23 Ki togosta eng' olooto kwo Bethel. Ye kita kotogostoi eng' ooreet, komong' weeriik che mengeechen eng' nganaseet ak kowit ineendet, koleenji, “Togoste inyee kipchurmet! Togoste, inyee kipchurmet!”" 
2Kings2:24 Kiguskong' ak kogeer icheek, ak kochup icheek eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki mong' magalaluusyek aeng'u che kogonik ak koton artam ak aeng' eng' weerchooto." 
2Kings2:25 Ak ki wo eng' yooto agoi tulweetap Karmel, ak koweek eng' yooto kwo Samaria." 
2Kings3:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Jehoram weeriitap Ahab eng' Israel eng' Samaria eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'." 
2Kings3:2 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ma yai ko uu kwandanyi anan ko uu kamennyi; amu ki isto toloitap Baal ne kiga yai kwandanyi." 
2Kings3:3 Nganda uu nooto ko ki nam ineendet tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto; ma istoegei." 
2Kings3:4 Ki tinyei Mesha laitoryatap Moab keechiirek, ak ki igoochi laitoryatap Israel koroorigap aaregap keechiir eliphuusyek pogol, kobooto che po mengichik eliphuusyek pogol." 
2Kings3:5 Ago kingo me Ahab, kongelelji laitoryatap Moab laitoryatap Israel." 
2Kings3:6 Ki manda anyun Laitoryat Jehoram eng' Samaria eng' peetuusyechooto, ak koyum Israel tugul." 
2Kings3:7 Ki iyookto chiito kwo kap Jehoshapat laitoryatap Judah, koleenji, “Koingelelja laitoryatap Moab. Tos ichame keebe tuwai Moab keebe kebar?” Ak ki le, “Achame ketogoste! Auu kiit ne iuu, uu piikyuk piiguk, ak uu paraisisyekyuk paraisisyeguk.”" 
2Kings3:8 Ak ki le, “Ki togostoe ooreet ne punei ano?” Ak ki wol kole, “Ki togostoe ooreetap surkwen ne po Edom.”" 
2Kings3:9 Ki pa anyun laitoryatap Israel kobooto laitoryatap Judah ak ne po Edom. Ye kiyiem emet eng' pandap peetuusyek tisap ko ki it koror peek. Ki ma komi peek che eei lugeet anan ko tuuga che ki kweryei icheeget. 
2Kings3:10 Ki le laitoryatap Israel, “Pwo eng' acheek! Amu kogoguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitorinichu somok kibagenge konde eunegap Moab.”" 
2Kings3:11 Ago ki le Jehoshaphat, “Ma mi yu maotyotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, keteepse eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet?” Ki wol chiito age eng' otwogigap laitoryatap Israel kole, “Mi yu Elisha weeriitap Sapat, ne kigerchin peek Elijah.”" 
2Kings3:12 Ki le Jehoshaphat, “Mi ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet.” Kochoortagei anyun laitoryatap Israel ak Jehoshaphat kobooto laitoryatap Edom koba ole mi ineendet." 
2Kings3:13 Ki leenji `Elisha laitoryatap Israel, “Kiting'egei nee ak inyee? Ui ole mi maotigap kwandang'ung' ak maotigap kamenng'ung'.” Ak ki leenji laitoryatap Israel ineendet, “Achicha! Amu kogoguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitorinichu somok kibagenge, konde eunegap Moab.”" 
2Kings3:14 Ki le Elisha, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ne atonone tainnyi, ko nda kama agonyiti Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah amu mi yu, ko kama kota agusyinin kong' iman, anan ageerin." 
2Kings3:15 Ago imutwaa nguno putindet.” Ak kingo put chiichooto kibugandet, konyonji ineendet eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings3:16 Ak ki le, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Obal kererchosyek che chaang' eng' tembwoni.’" 
2Kings3:17 Amu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Mogeere usoonet anan ogeer ropta, ago nyiei peek tembwonin, ak oee okweek, tuukwok ak tyong'ikwok.’" 
2Kings3:18 Ago ni ko ki it ne ming'in eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu indoi kogeny Moabik eunekwok." 
2Kings3:19 Obare nganaseet age tugul ne ng'ootaat ak nganaseet age tugul ne karaaran. Oluul keetit age tugul ne myee, oger kondametusyek tugul che po peek ak ong'em eng' koik kooret age tugul ne myee.”" 
2Kings3:20 Ak ki eng' karon eng' olo po sait ne kigoitoe kagoochinet, ko ki pwa peek che kibunei ooreetap Edom, ak ki nyi emet peek." 
2Kings3:21 Kingo kas anyun Moabik tugul kole, kotogos laitorinik kobwa kobargei ak icheek, koyumgei tugul che ki imuuchi kolaach kariik, agoi che eecheen, ak koba kotononso eng' kiwoto." 
2Kings3:22 Ki ng'eetyo karon inne ak kiga iluuchi asiista peek, ak ki keer Moabik peek, ko kabiriritu ko uu korotiik." 
2Kings3:23 Ki le icheek, “Korotik chuun! Kogebar laitorinik iman, ak kogobar chii tugul chorwennyi. Ara anyun, Moabichu, onam parunenik!”" 
2Kings3:24 Ago kingo it nganaseetap Israel, kong'eetyo Israel kobar Moabik, kot komwei eng' tainnywa. Ki pa anyun kochut emet kobarat Moabik." 
2Kings3:25 Kibut nganasook, ak ki wiirchi chii age tugul koitanyi kooret age tugul ne myee, konyiit koik. Kiger kondametusyek tugul che po peek ak koluul keetiik tugul che myachen. Eng' let kotuuch Kir-hareset ineegei kobooto koik che po yooto, ago kiyiem nganasanooto piik che ki wiirtoi koik, ak kobookyi olooto kobar." 
2Kings3:26 Kingo keer laitoryatap Moab kole kagogoromji pooryeet ineendet, komut murenik pogol tisap che tinyei rotonik, kole kourur lugeet kwo ole mi laitoryatap Edom, ago ma imuuch." 
2Kings3:27 Ki nam anyun taaitanyi ne kita tuun namei laitornatennyi kogeeri ineendet ak kogoito koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' inaatut parak. Ki piit nereegek che eecheen agobo Israel; ak ki pa eng' ole mi ineendet, koweektagei emennywa." 
2Kings4:1 Ki riirchi Elisha kwondo age ne po osotigap weeriigap maotik, koleenji, “Ki kome otwogindeng'ung' manong'otyondennyu, ak ingen ile ki iywei otwogindeng'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kagonyo pesendoindet komachei komut lagokyuk aeng' koba koek otwogik.”" 
2Kings4:2 Ki leenji `Elisha ineendet, “Imache ayaun nee? Mwaiwo, itinye nee eng' ko?” Ki le ineendet, “Ma tinyei kiy age tugul eng' ko otwogindeng'ung' ne chepto, kobatee soteetap mwaita.”" 
2Kings4:3 Kole anyun Elisha, “Ui soomjigei tereenik eng' piiguk tugul che po kokweng'ung', tereenik che ma mi kiy, amat isoom che ng'ering'." 
2Kings4:4 Yeityo iwe ko ak igerchigei ko kobooto weeriiguk. Rong'ji mwaata tereenichooto tugul, ak ne kagonyi, iiste kwo taban.”" 
2Kings4:5 Kwo anyun ineendet ak kogerchigei ko kobooto weeriikyik. Ki ipchi `icheek ineendet tereenik ak kiroong'ji. 
2Kings4:6 Kingo nyi tereenik tugul, koleenji weeriinnyi, “Ibwa tereet age.” Ago ki leenji ineendet, “Ma komi tereet age.” Ki siis anyun mwaita mata korong'kei." 
2Kings4:7 Konyo anyun komwachi chiitap Kamuktaindet. Ak ki le chiichooto, “Ui alde mwanichooto, si iyaaktae pesendang'ung', ak iboisyee che kang'et ak weeriiguk.”" 
2Kings4:8 Ki wo Elisha Sunem peetuut age, ole ki mi kwondo ne tagunoot, ak kibirchi ineendet koamis. Ak peetuut age tugul ye kibunei yooto, ko ki cham kowendi koyooto koamisyei." 
2Kings4:9 Ki leenji ineendet manong'otyondennyi, “Keero, ageere ale ni ko chiito ne tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet, ne cham kosiirtoi eng' olinyo kotugul." 
2Kings4:10 Asoomin ale, ngechopchi koot ne ming'in kogakta koonnyo, si kindochi itoogut ak meset, ng'echereet ak kiit ne tebee tait. Ye kanyo anyun koonnyo, kotebee yooto.”" 
2Kings4:11 Eng' peetuut age ye ki nyo yooto, kogiwo koonnyi ne kiga kechopchi eng' parak ak koru." 
2Kings4:12 Ki leenji Elisha Geasi otwogindennyi, “Guur Chepsunamindoni.” Kingo kagoguur konyo kwonyooto kotonon eng' tainnyi." 
2Kings4:13 Ki leenji otwogindennyi, “Ileenji kwonyi, ‘Keero, kaitoretech miising' eng' toretoni tugul tee ni, imache keyaun nee? Imache kesomun kiy eng' laitoryat anan eng' kiptaiyatap lugeet?’ ” Ak ki wolji koleenji, “Amenye kwenutap piikyuk.”" 
2Kings4:14 Ki le anyun Elisha, “Ki yachi nee anyun?” Ak ki wol Geasi kole, “Ma tinyei weeriit iman, ak oos manong'otyondennyi.”" 
2Kings4:15 Ak ki le, “Guur ineendet.” Ki kiguur ineendet ak konyo kotonon eng' kurgat." 
2Kings4:16 Ki le Elisha, “Tuun kapkora eng' kenyiit ne nyoonei, itinye weeriit.” Ak ki le, “Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, inyee chiitap Kamuktaindet, amat imwachi lembech otwogindeng'ung' ne chepto!”" 
2Kings4:17 Ago ki manach kwonyooto, ak ki sich weeriit eng' peetuunooto, ko kait kenyiit, ko uu ye ki kamwachi Elisha ineendet." 
2Kings4:18 Ak kingo eet lakwanooto, koba ak kwandanyi peetuut age ole mi piik che kesisyei." 
2Kings4:19 Ki leenji `lakwanooto kwandanyi, “Metinnyu! Metinnyu!” Ki leenji `kwandanyi otwogindennyi, “Imutyi kamet.”" 
2Kings4:20 Kingo kagonam ineendet ak komutyi kamet, kotiny kamet agoi kotonon asiis, ak kime." 
2Kings4:21 Ki togosta kwo komogonji ineendet itoogutap chiitap Kamuktaindet, yeityo kogerchi ineendet ko ak komanda." 
2Kings4:22 Ki kuur manong'otyondennyi koleenji, “Asoomin ale iyookwo age eng' otwogik koget sigiryet, si alabat ole mi chiitap Kamuktaindet ak aweege.”" 
2Kings4:23 Ki le manong'otyondennyi, “Amu nee si iwe ole mi ineendet ra? Ama peetuut ne kaleel arawet anan ko sabato.” Ak ki le, “Ma ya.”" 
2Kings4:24 Ki iito anyun sigiryet ak koleenji otwogindennyi, “Kweri, keebe; mat iwe mutyo, kobatee ye kamwaun.”" 
2Kings4:25 Ki wo anyun, ak ki it ole mi chiitap Kamuktaindet eng' tulweetap Karmel. Ak kingo keer chiitap Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' ole loo, koleenji Geasi otwogindennyi, “Keero! Niin ko Chepsunamindet!" 
2Kings4:26 Labat torookte, ak ileenji, ‘Ichamegei? Chamegei manong'otyondeng'ung'? Chamegei lakweet?’ ” Ak ki wol kole, “Chamegei.”" 
2Kings4:27 Kingo it ole miitei chiitap Kamuktaindet eng' tulweet, konam keelyekyik. Ki nyo Geasi koriik konyo koleen kotoorta ineendet, ago ki le chiitap Kamuktaindet, “Mete! Amu tinyei ng'wanindo eng' muguleldanyi, ak kagoung'ena `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ma mwaiwo.”" 
2Kings4:28 Yeityo komwa kole, “Tos kigamage weeriit kiptaiyandennyu? Ki ma amwa ale: Matigeno?”" 
2Kings4:29 Koleenji anyun `Elisha Geasi, “Kermenge, nam kiroktonyu eng' eung'ung' ak iwe. Ngot ituiye chii, ko mat igat, ak ngot kogatin chii, ko mat iwolji. Ui igonoor kiroktonyu togeetap lakweet.”" 
2Kings4:30 Ki le kametap lakweet, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ko uu ye sabei saboondang'ung', koma pagaaktoin.” Ki ng'eet anyun Elisha, koosup ineendet." 
2Kings4:31 Ki wo Geasi kondoe icheek ak kogonoor kirokto togeetap lakweet, ago ma piit tweguuno, anan kaseet. Koweek anyun kotorookta ineendet ak koleenji, “Tom kong'eet lakweet.”" 
2Kings4:32 Kingo nyo ko Elisha, kogeer ko kagome lakweet ak kaginde itogunnyi." 
2Kings4:33 Kwo ko anyun, ak kogerchigei ko icheek aeng'u, ak kosa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings4:34 Ki togosta ak korue lakweet, kotiing'e kutinnyi kutitap lakweet, kotiing'e konyekyik konyegap lakweet, ak kotiing'e eunekyik chechiget. Ye ki iitoegei paragutap lakweet, ki toi kolalang'it poortap lakweet." 
2Kings4:35 Koweek anyun Elisha, ak kowendot eng' ko, ak kotogosta, ak koiitoegei ineendet kogeny. Ki iryon lakweet konyil tisap ak kogos." 
2Kings4:36 Ki kuur anyun Geasi koleenji, “Guur Chepsunamindet.” Koguur anyun ineendet. Kingo nyo ko ole mi Elisha, koleenji Elisha, “Kanap weeriing'ung'.”" 
2Kings4:37 Kwo ko anyun, ak kobutyi keelyekyik ak kong'uruuk kot koit ng'wony. Ki kanap weeriinnyi ak kwo komanda." 
2Kings4:38 Ki week `Elisha Gilgal ak k imi rubeet olooto; ki tebyei weeriigap maotik eng' tainnyi. Ki leenji otwogindennyi, “Kotkot tereet ne oo ak iyachi weeriigap maotik sogoryek.”" 
2Kings4:39 Ki wo age mbar kwo kobut ingweek ak kinyoor keetitap motondoronik. Kibut motondoronigap keetoto, kot konyiit ngoryeet, ak konyo komurmurchi tereet ne mi sogoryek, ago ki ma nai kole nee chooto." 
2Kings4:40 Ki kirong' anyun kobwa ng'wony si koam piik. Ak ye ki amei sogoryechooto, kowaakyo icheek kole, “Ee chiitap Kamuktaindet, mi meet tereet oriit!” Ak mata komuuch koam tuguuchooto." 
2Kings4:41 Ago ki le ineendet, “Oibu peek che ng'ootiin.” Kiroong'ji tereet ak ki mwa kole, “Orong'u si koam piik.” Ak ki mata kobiit kiy ne ya eng' tereet." 
2Kings4:42 Ki nyo chiito age eng' Baal-salisa, koipchi chiitap Kamuktaindet magatinigap tongoanik, magatiinik tiptem che po baale kobooto mesiisegap peek eng' lolennyi. Ak ki le, “Igoochi piik koam.”" 
2Kings4:43 Ki le otwogindennyi, “He! Andoi amitwogichu taitap piik pogol?” Ago ki le, “Igoochi piik koam. Amu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Amei kot kotuuch.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Konde anyun tainnywa, ak ki amis kot kotuuch, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings5:1 Naaman ko ki kiptaiyatap lugeet, ki chiito ne oo ak ko konyitot, eng' taitap kiptaiyandennyi, laitoryatap Syria. Kiga kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Syria katerteeret eng' ineendet. Ki chiito ineendet kogeny ne kiim ak ko nyigan, ago ki tinyei mogondosaik." 
2Kings5:2 Ki pa piigap Syria koset emetap Israel kobee kweanaik ak kiluul chepto ne ming'in, ak kiboisyechin chebooto kwondap Naaman." 
2Kings5:3 Ki leenji lakwanooto kwonyooto, “Nda mi kiptaiyandennyu ole mi maotyot ne mi Samaria, ta kagosoop ineendet eng' mogondosaikyik.”" 
2Kings5:4 Ki wo chiito age ko ak komwachi kiptaiyandennyi, koleenji, “Kamwa ni ak ni chepto ne punu emetap Israel.”" 
2Kings5:5 Ki le laitoryatap Syria, “Ara, ui olooto, si ayookyi parweet laitoryatap Israel.” Ki wo anyun ak koip talendaisyek taman che po fedha, ak thahabusyek eliphuusyek lo, ak ngoroik taman che kiwalawali." 
2Kings5:6 Ki ipchi parweet laitoryatap Israel, koleenji, “Ye iit oldang'ung' parwaani, ko kaayogu Naaman otwogindennyu, si kobiit isoop ineendet eng' mogondosaikyik.”" 
2Kings5:7 Kingo kagosoman parwaanooto laitoryatap Israel, kogereer ngoroikyik ak kole, “Tos aa Kamuktaindet, ne abare ak asoobi, si koyookwo chiichi chiito konyo asoop eng' mogondosaikyik? Ago asoomin ale ibwaat ak igeer ole cheeng'doi suryet eng' anee!”" 
2Kings5:8 Kingo kas Elisha chiitap Kamuktaindet, kole kagereer laitoryatap Israel ngoroikyik, koyookto chiito kwo kaplaitoryat koleenji, “Amu nee si igereer ngoroiguk? Ingonyo oli ami si konai kole mi maotyot Israel.”" 
2Kings5:9 Konyo anyun Naaman ak paraisisyekyik ak kariisyekyik, inyoo kotonon eng' kurgeetap kootap Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Ki iyookto Elisha chiito kwo ole mi ineendet, kwo koleenji, “Ui iunge eng' Jordan konyil tisap, ak weekyiningei kogeny poortang'ung', ak itiliiliitu.”" 
2Kings5:11 Ago kinereech Naaman, ak kwo ak kole, “Kaleen, mong'u saang' iman ole ami, ak kotonon ak koguur kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi, ak kosapsabe eunnyi ole ama, ak kosoop mogondosaik." 
2Kings5:12 Tos ma koigoi Abana ak Parpar, ainoosyegap Damasko, kosiir peek tugul che po Israel? Tos koma ta amuuchi aunegei chooto ak atiliiliitu?” Koweek anyun, ak kwo konereechi miising'." 
2Kings5:13 Ki pwa otwogikyik koriik ak kong'alaalji, koleenji, “Abba, nda kagaleenjin maotyot iyai kiit age ne oo, ta kama iyae? Ko kamyeeit ne tya ngo leenjin, Iunge si itiliiliitu!”" 
2Kings5:14 Kochoortagei anyun kwo kochut peek konyil tisap eng' Jordan, ko uu mwaetap chiitap Kamuktaindet. Ki week poortanyi kowalak koigei poortap lakweet ne ming'in, ak kitiliiliit." 
2Kings5:15 Ki week kwo ole mi chiitap Kamuktaindet, ineendet ak piikyik tugul che ki mi ak ineendet, ak ki nyo ak kotonon eng' tainnyi: ak kole, “Kaanai anyun nguno, ale ma mi Kamuktaindet eng' ng'wony tugul, kobatee eng' Israel. Ara asaain nguno anyun ale, taach konunet eng' otwogindeng'ung'.”" 
2Kings5:16 Ago ki mwa kole, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne atonone tainnyi, ko mataache kiy.” Ak nganda kibirchi ineendet koip, ko ki eesyo." 
2Kings5:17 Ki mwa Naaman kole, “Ngot ko mata icham, asaain ale ngigoochi otwogindeng'ung' ng'ung'unyek che yamei kola nyumbusyek aeng'u; amu kobooch nguno koma kogoochin otwogindeng'ung' kagoochinet ne kibeelei, anan ko tiseiywot, kanamonik, koek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei." 
2Kings5:18 Ingonyochi kaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor otwogindeng'ung' eng' kii: Ye wendi kiptaiyandennyu kootap Rimon kosaaei eng' yooto, kotiegei eunnyu, ak ang'uruuge eng' kootap Rimon, ye ang'uruuge eng' kootap Rimon, ko ingoyochi kaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor otwogindeng'ung' eng' kiito.”" 
2Kings5:19 Ki leenji ineendet, “Ui eng' kaalyeet.” Kwo anyun eng' ye ki mi ineendet ne ma looit." 
2Kings5:20 Ago ki le Geasi otwogindetap Elisha chiitap Kamuktaindet, “Keero, kabagakyi kiptaiyandennyu Naaman Syrianindet, amataach eng' eunnyi tuguuk che kaibu. Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, alabati asubi ineendet ak aibe ineendet tuguuk alak.”" 
2Kings5:21 Kosup anyun Geasi Naaman. Kingo keer Naaman chiito kolabatu kosubu ineendet, kochoorgei eng' chepkichutit kotorookta ineendet ak koleenji, “Kaalyeet?”" 
2Kings5:22 Ak ki le, “Kaalyeet! Kaiyokwo kiptaiyandennyu, kole, Kagoit oldanyu murenik aeng'u che po weeriigap maotik, che punu emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim. Asoomin ale, igoochi icheek keruutik sosom che po fedha ak ngoroik aeng' che kiwalawali.”" 
2Kings5:23 Ki le Naaman, “Iyan iip keruutik tamanwogik lo ak sisiit che po fedha,” ak kibirchi ineendet ak koratyi chooto po fedha eng' ratuutik aeng', ak ngoroik aeng' che kiwalawali, ak kogoochi otwogikyik aeng' koipchi; ak ki ip kondoe ineendet." 
2Kings5:24 Kingo it tulweet, konam ineendet tuguuchooto eng' eunegap otwogichooto, ak kwo kogonor eng' ko. Ak ki mwachi pichooto koba yeityo koba icheek." 
2Kings5:25 Ago ki wo ineendet ko, ak kotonon eng' taitap kiptaiyandennyi. Ak ki leenji Elisha ineendet, “Ibunu ano, Geasi?” Ak ki le ineendet, “Kamawo ui otwogindeng'ung'.”" 
2Kings5:26 Ago ki leenji `Elisha ineendet, “Kama obe ak muguleldanyu ye kaweeksei chiichigai eng' chepkichutinnyi kotorogun? Tos peetuusyechu ko che kitaage fedha, anan ketaage ngoroik, mbareenigap mseituni, mbareenigap sabibuk, keechiirek ak tuuga, anan otwogik che murenik ak che tiibiik?" 
2Kings5:27 Namin anyun mogondosigap Naaman ak iyoteng'ung' koigeny.” Ki manda anyun eng' ye ki mi ineendet ko kagonam mogondosaik, koleelit ko uu teluji." 
2Kings6:1 Ki leenji `weeriigap maotik Elisha, “Yu ki menye eng' taing'ung' ko mariich miising' eng' acheek." 
2Kings6:2 Kisoome keele chamwech keebe Jordan, ak koep chii age tugul keetit, keteekyigei olooto ole ki menye.” Ak ki wol kole, “Oba.”" 
2Kings6:3 Ki le chiito age, “Asoomin ale, iyan oba ak otwogiguk.” Ak ki wol kole, “Kibendi.”" 
2Kings6:4 Koba anyun kobooto icheek. Ak kingo it Jordan, koep keetiik." 
2Kings6:5 Ago ye kingo ta koluuli age keetit, korarach aiywet kobutyi peek. Kiwaach kole, “Ee, Kiptaiyandennyu! Amu kogisoomei.”" 
2Kings6:6 Ki le chiitap Kamuktaindet, “Karorokyi ano?” Ak ki iboorchi ye karorokyi. Ki ep ineendet keetit ak kowiirchi yooto ak ki igoochi keetoto aiywet kotogos." 
2Kings6:7 Ak ki leenji, “Inemu.” Koyogooito anyun eunnyi ak konem." 
2Kings6:8 Kibargei laitoryatap Syria ak Israel. Kingo pata ko ki irwooch ak otwogikyik kole, “Egu nganasennyu yegile ak yugile.”" 
2Kings6:9 Ki iyookto chiitap Kamuktaindet chiito kwo kaplaitoryatap Israel, koleenji, “Riipkei, mebun korono, amu pwoonei yooto piigap Syria.”" 
2Kings6:10 Ki iyookto laitoryatap Israel piik koba ole ki kamwachi ineendet chiitap Kamuktaindet ak koteechi agobo yooto. Ki sargei anyun, ma wo yooto, ma agenge kityo ak ko konyil aeng'." 
2Kings6:11 Kiiimak miising' muguleldap laitoryatap Syria agobo kioto. Ki kuur otwogikyik ak koleenji, “Ochame omwaiwo chiito eng' acheek ne chamdos ak laitoryatap Israel?”" 
2Kings6:12 Ki le age eng' otwogikyik, “Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat. Mwachin Elisha maotyot ne mi Israel laitoryatap Israel ng'aleek che imwae eng' koong'ung' oriit ne irue.”" 
2Kings6:13 Ak ki le, “Oba ogeer ole mi ineendet, si ayookto chiito komut ineendet.” Ak ki kimwachi ineendet keleenji, “Mi ineendet Dothan.”" 
2Kings6:14 Koyookto anyun ineendet paraisisyek ak kariisyek kobooto lugeet ne oo koba olooto. Ki it kemoi ak koyiem nganaseet. 
2Kings6:15 Kingo ng'eet otwogindetap chiitap Kamuktaindet karon inne, kole komanda, kogeer komi lugeet ne pooto paraisisyek ak kariisyek ko kiga yiem nganaseet. Ki leenji otwogindennyi ineendet, “Ee, Kiptaiyandennyu! Kiyae nee?”" 
2Kings6:16 Ak ki wol kole, “Meiywei, amu chaang' che mi kobootech kosiir che mi ak icheeget.”" 
2Kings6:17 Ak ki sa Elisha kole, “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asaain ale, yaat konyekyik, si kobiit kogeer.” Ki yaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyegap nerananooto; ak ki keer: ki nyiitaat tulweet paraisisyek ak kariisyek che po maat che kiga yiem Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Kingo choorgei piigap Syria ole mi ineendet, kosa Elisha Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Asaain ale pire pichu korateet.” Ara kibiree icheek korateet ko uu ng'olyootap Elisha." 
2Kings6:19 Ki leenji `Elisha icheek, “Ma ooreet ni, ama nganasanooto. Osubwo, si amutak ole mi chiito ne ocheeng'e.” Ak ki imut icheek koba Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Kingo it Samaria, kole Elisha, “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, yaat konyegap pichu si kobiit kogeer.” Ak ki yaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyekwak, ak ki keer kole kimi kwenutap Samaria." 
2Kings6:21 Kingo keer laitoryatap Israel koleenji Elisha, “Abba, abar icheek? Abar icheek?”" 
2Kings6:22 Ki wol kole, “Mat ibar icheek. Tos ibare che kailuul eng' rotweng'ung' ne po chok ak kwangeng'ung'? Igoochi amitwogik ak peek, si koamis ak koeeiso, yeityo koba ye mi kiptaiyannywa.”" 
2Kings6:23 Kichopchi icheek anyun amitwogik che chaang'; ak ye kingo kagoamis ak koeeiso, kochunda koba, ak ki pa ye mi kiptaiyannywa. Ak matagai kobwa kobookyi lugosyegap Syria kogeny emetap Israel." 
2Kings6:24 Kingo pata chooto, koyum Ben-Hadad laitoryatap Syria lugeennyi tugul, ak kotogosta koyiem Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Ki piit rubeet ne oo eng' Samaria; ak kiyiem nganasanooto kot kealdae metitap sigiryet keruutyet agenge che po fedha, ak kealdae kebeberta agenge eng' ang'wan ne po kibabet ne po soroegap cheptugenik, fedhaisyek muut." 
2Kings6:26 Ye kisiirtoi laitoryatap Israel eng' inaatut parak, koriikyi ineendet kwondo age koleenji, “Toreto, kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat!”"
