2Kings6:27 Ki le laitoryat, “Ngot ko matoretin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, atoretitoin ano? Eng' ole kiboorsee, anan ole kitue sabibuk?”" 
2Kings6:28 Ki leenji laitoryat ineendet, “Amin nee?” Ak ki wol kole, “Koleenjo kwonyi, ‘Koonu weeriing'ung' keam ra, si keam weeriinnyu mutai.’" 
2Kings6:29 Ki iyo anyun, ak keam ineendet. Ki aleenji ineendet eng' peetuutap aeng', Koonu weeriing'ung', keam, ago kiga kouny weeriinnyi.”" 
2Kings6:30 Ak kingo kas laitoryat ng'aleegap kwonyooto, kogereer ngoroikyik. Ye kiwendote irimeet parak, kogigeer piik, ak ki ilaagoti kuniok." 
2Kings6:31 Yeityo komwa kole, “Ingoyaiywo Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto ak kotes koosir, ngot kotebi metitap Elisha weeriitap Sapat rani!”" 
2Kings6:32 Ago kitebyei Elisha eng' koonnyi kobooto poisyek. Ki iyookto laitoryat chiito kwo, ago kingo tomo koit chiito ne kagiyok, ole mi ineendet, koleenji poisyek, “Ogeere ole kagoyok weeri po rumiindet chiito konyo kotil metinnyu? Ye iit chiito ne kagiyok, oger kurgeet, ak onam kereiywot kouiit. Tos mongen ole isubu kiptaiyandennyi ineendet?”" 
2Kings6:33 Ye kita kong'alaali ak icheeget, koit ole mi ineendet chiito ne kagiyok. Ki mwa kole, “Keero, po yaityoni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kota agen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kolya?”" 
2Kings7:1 Ki mwa Elisha kole, “Ogas okweek ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole, Ki aldoe mutai saini keruutik muut che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul shekelit agenge, ak kealdoe keruutik taman che po baale shekelit agenge, eng' ormariichetap Samaria.”" 
2Kings7:2 Kowolji anyun kiptaiyat ne kitiegei eunnyi laitoryat chiitap Kamuktaindet, koleenji, “Ogeero, ngot koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tirisyok eng' kipsengwet, ko tos piit kioto?” Ak ki le Elisha, “Keero, igeere eng' konyeguk, ago meame tuguuchooto.”" 
2Kings7:3 Ki mi piik ang'wanu che ki tinyei mogondosaik ole kibunei eng' ormariichet: ak ki leenjigei, “Amu nee si ketebee yu kot kebegu?" 
2Kings7:4 Ngot kemwa keele, ‘kibendi nganaseet,’ komi rubeet nganaseet ak kibegu eng' yooto. Ak ngot ketebi eng' yu kesisye, kebegu kora. Ara anyun obwa keebe ye mi lugeetap piigap Syria. Ngot kobagaaktech, kesaptosi; ak ngot kobarech, kebegu.”" 
2Kings7:5 Ki ng'eetyo karon kota ko mirmir ak koba nganaseetap piigap Syria. Kingo it tabandap nganaseetap piigap Syria, konyoor koma komi chii yooto." 
2Kings7:6 Amu ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Syria kogas cheetap kariisyek ak cheetap paraisisyek ko uu cheetap lugeet ne oo: ki leenjigei anyun, “Ogeero, kagogoochi tuguuk laitoryatap Israel laitorinigap Hitik ak che po Misiriik, si kobwa kobarech!”" 
2Kings7:7 Komwei anyun kota komirmir ak kobagaakta emaisyekwak, paraisisyekwak ak sigirokwak. Ki pagaakta nganaseet ko uu kiit ne ki uu ak komwei kosar saboonwekwak." 
2Kings7:8 Kingo it pichooto ki tinyei mogondosaik tabandap nganaseet kogiba emait age oriit. Ki amis ak koeeiso, ak koip fedha, thahabu ak ngoroik, ak koba kouny. Ki week icheek koba emait age ak koip tuguuk eng' yooto agine, ak koba kouny." 
2Kings7:9 Yeityo komwachigei kole, “Ma myee ni kagiyai. Kagisisye ak ko peetuuni ko peetuutap logoiywek che myach. Ngot kegany kot koeech, konamech pireet. Ara anyun obwa keebe kemwachi piigap kaplaitoryat.”" 
2Kings7:10 Ki pa anyun ak koguur riibindetap nganaseet ak komwachi icheek koleenji, “Kagibe nganaseetap piigap Syria, ak kama komi chii yooto, anan ko tweguunetap chiito, ago ka ratotiin paraisisyek ak sigiroik, ak ko uu emaisyek kiit ne ko uu.”" 
2Kings7:11 Ki kuur anyun riibiik alak, ak ki mwachi piigap kaplaitoryat eng' ko." 
2Kings7:12 Ki ng'eet laitoryat kemoi ak koleenji otwogikyik, “Aboorwok kiit ne kogoyaiywech piigap Syria. Ingen kole amech rubeet; koba anyun eng' nganaseet kounygei eng' timiin kole, ‘Si ye mong' eng' nganaseet, kenam, ak keebe nganaseet.’ ”" 
2Kings7:13 Ki wol age eng' otwogikyik kole, “Asoomin ale, ingoba piik alak ak paraisisyek muut che ta ko ng'etunotiin, che mi nganaseet, (ogeero, tee chaang'indo tugul ne po Israel che ng'etunotiin eng' nganaseet; ogeero, tee chaang'indo tugul ne po Israel che ki kogeskei). Ara ongiyookte piik kogeer si kobiit kenai.”" 
2Kings7:14 Konam anyun kariisyek aeng' ak paraisisyek. Ki iyookto `laitoryat piik koosup lugeetap piigap Syria koleenji, “Oba ogeerote.”" 
2Kings7:15 Ki isup agoi koit Jordan, ki nyiitaat ooreet ngoroik ak tereenik, che ki wiirtooti piigap Syria korwaei. Ak ki week pichooto kiga kiyookto komwachi laitoryat." 
2Kings7:16 Ki manda piik koba konam tuguugap nganaseetap piigap Syria. Ki kialdae anyun keruutik muut che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambululeen shekelit agenge, ak ki kialdae keruutik taman che po baale shekelit agenge, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings7:17 Ki ng'at anyun `laitoryat kiptaiyatap lugeet ne kitiegei ineendet eunnyi, koriip ormariichet. Kityech `piik ineendet eng' ormariichet ak kime ko uu ye ki kamwa chiitap Kamuktaindet, ne ki kamwa ye kiga nyo laitoryat ole mi ineendet." 
2Kings7:18 Ye kingo kagong'alaalji chiitap Kamuktaindet laitoryat, koleenji, “Ki aldoe keruutik taman che po baale shekelit agenge, ak ki aldoe keruutik muut che po peek che ng'ootiin che tambululeen shekelit agenge mutai olo po saini eng' ormariichetap Samaria.”" 
2Kings7:19 Ki wolji kiptaiyandanooto chiitap Kamuktaindet koleenji, “Keero, agot ingoyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tirisyok eng' kipsengwet, ko tos piit kiy ne uu nooto?” Ak ki le, “Igeere eng' konyeguk, ago meame tuguuchooto.”" 
2Kings7:20 Ki yaak ko uu nooto eng' ineendet; amu kityech `piik ineendet eng' ormariichet kome. 
2Kings8:1 Kiga ng'alaalji Elisha kwonyi kiga ing'eetyi weeriinnyi, koleenji, “Ng'eet ak obe ak piigap koong'ung', omeny oldo tugul ole ochame, amu kagoguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rubeet. Nyoonei rubeet emet kenyiisyek tisap.”" 
2Kings8:2 Ki ng'eet kwonyooto ak koyai ko uu ng'olyootap chiitap Kamuktaindet. Ki pa ak koonnyi ak komeny emetap Philistiik kenyiisyek tisap. 
2Kings8:3 Kingo keskei kenyiisyek tisap, koweek kwonyooto eng' emetap Philistiik ak ki wo koriirchi laitoryat agobo koonnyi ak korennyi." 
2Kings8:4 Ki ng'alaalji `laitoryat Geasi otwogindetap chiitap Kamuktaindet, koleenji, “Asoomin ale, mwaiwo tuguuk tugul che eecheen che ki koyai Elisha.”" 
2Kings8:5 Kingo ta komwachin ineendet laitoryat ole ki isaapto kogeny lakweet ne kiga kome, kochun anyun kwonyi ki king'eetyin weeriinnyi koriirchi laitoryat agobo koonnyi ak korennyi. Ak ki le Geasi, “Kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoryat, kwonyooto ni, ak weeriinnyi ni ne ki ing'eeti Elisha.”" 
2Kings8:6 Ak kingo teebee laitoryat kwonyooto, komwachi ineendet. Kong'atyi anyun laitoryat ineendet kiptaiyat, koleenji, “Ui weekyi ineendet tuguuk tugul che ki chechiik, ak logoek tugul che po mbareet kobooch peetuut ne kiwendi eng' emoni, agoi ra.”" 
2Kings8:7 Ki nyo `Elisha Damasko, ak kimyani Ben-Hadad laitoryatap Syria. Ki kimwachi keleenji, “Konyo oli chiitap Kamuktaindet.”" 
2Kings8:8 Ki leenji laitoryat Hazael, “Ip kagoochinet ak iwe itorookte chiitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak iteepse Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ineendet, ileenji, ‘Asabe eng' myani?’ ”" 
2Kings8:9 Kwo anyun Hazael, kotorookta ineendet ak koip kagoochinet ne po kiit age tugul ne myee ne po Damasko, che yamei kola tambeesik artamu. Ki nyo kotonon eng' tainnyi, ak kole, “Kagoyokwo weeriing'ung' Ben-Hadad laitoryatap Syria, anyo oldang'ung', kole, ‘Tos asap eng' myani?’ ”" 
2Kings8:10 Ki leenji Elisha ineendet, “Ui ileenji ineendet, Isabe iman; nganda kagoboorwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole meei ineendet iman.”" 
2Kings8:11 Kitokyi ineendet togeennyi konjurur inne, kot kolilaan ineendet. Ki riir anyun chiitap Kamuktaindet." 
2Kings8:12 Ki le Hazael, “Amu nee si iriir, kiptaiyandennyu?” Ak ki wol kole, “Amu angen yaityet ne tuun iyachini piigap Israel. Tuun ibeele irimoikwak che kiimeen, ibare weeriikwak eng' rotoogap chok, ibirte manyurunikwak, kotonak, ak igereer kwonyiikwak che tamonosyek.”" 
2Kings8:13 Ki le Hazael, “Nee otwogindeng'ung', ne seset kityo, kot koyai kii oo?” Ak ki wol Elisha kole, “Kigoboorwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, iegu laitoryat eng' Syria.”" 
2Kings8:14 Kwo anyun eng' ole ki mi Elisha, ak koit ye mi kiptaiyandennyi. Ki teebe ineendet koleenji, “Kalenjin nee Elisha?” Ak ki mwachi koleenji, “Kaleenjo isabe iman.”" 
2Kings8:15 Ak ki eng' karon, konem angeet ne kiitoi eng' itoogut parak, korookto peek ak kotuge togeennyi agoi kome. Ki laitoran Hazael kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings8:16 Ki toi kolaitoran Jehoram weeriitap Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap muut ne po Joram weeriitap Ahab laitoryatap Israel, ye ki Laitoryat Jehoshaphat ne po Judah." 
2Kings8:17 Ki po kenyiisyek sosom ak aeng' ineendet ye kingo tau kolaitorani ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek sisiit eng' Jerusalem. 
2Kings8:18 Kiwendote ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel, koyai ko uu kootap Ahab: amu ki cheptap Ahab osotyonnyi. Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings8:19 Ago ma cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobar Judah, amu otwogindennyi Daudi, ko uu ye ki iarorchi kogoochi ineendet tait ne po lagokyik peetuusyek tugul." 
2Kings8:20 Ki ingelelji Edom Judah eng' peetuusyekyik, ak ki lewenjigei Edom laitoryat ne pou icheek." 
2Kings8:21 Ki landa anyun Joram kwo Sair, kobooto kariisyekyik tugul. Ki ng'eet kemoi ak kobar Edomik che ki kayiem ineendet, kobooto kiptainigap kariisyek, ak ki mweiso piik koba emaisyekwak." 
2Kings8:22 Kongelelji anyun Edom Judah agoi ra. Ak kingelel agine Libna eng' peetuusyechooto. 
2Kings8:23 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Joram, ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah?" 
2Kings8:24 Ki ru Joram ak kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitup kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ak ki laitoran Ahasia weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings8:25 Ki toi kolaitoran Ahasia weeriitap Jehoram laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap taman ak aeng' ne po Joram weeriitap Ahab laitoryatap Israel. 
2Kings8:26 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak aeng' Ahasia ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiit agenge eng' Jerusalem. Ak kainetap kamet ko ki Athaliah cheptap Omri laitoryatap Israel." 
2Kings8:27 Kiwendote ortinwegap kootap Ahab, ak koyai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye kiga yai kootap Ahab, amu kisandetap kap Ahab." 
2Kings8:28 Ki pa ak Joram weeriitap Ahab kobargei ak Hazael laitoryatap Syria eng' Ramoth-gilead. Ki iguoten piigap Syria Joram. 
2Kings8:29 Ki week Laitoryat Joram konyo kinya eng' Jezreel eng' mook che kitoor piigap Syria ineendet eng' Ramah, ye ki paregei ak Hazael laitoryatap Syria. Ki choortagei Ahasia weeriitap Jehoram laitoryatap Judah kwo kogeer Joram weeriitap Ahab eng' Jezreel, amu kimyani." 
2Kings9:1 Ki kuur maotyot Elisha age eng' weeriigap maotik, ak koleenji ineendet, “Kermenge, ak iip lalani po mwaita, ak iwe Ramoth-gilead." 
2Kings9:2 Ak ye iit yooto, icheeng' Jehu weeriitap Jehoshaphat weeriitap Nimshi. Ye iwe ko, ileenji kong'eet eng' kwenutap tupchosyekyik, ak imut ineendet kwo koot ne po oriit." 
2Kings9:3 Yeityo inemu laletap mwaita, ak iroong'ji mwaita metinnyi, ak ileenji, ‘Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kaaiilin iegu laitoryat eng' Israel,’ yeityo iyat kurgeet, ak imwei, amat igagei.”" 
2Kings9:4 Kwo anyun Ramoth-gilead murenonooto, ne ki maotyot." 
2Kings9:5 Kingo it olooto konyoorta kiptainigap lugeet kotebyei; ak ki le, “Atinye ng'olyoot ne kagiyogunena, ee kiptaiyat.” Ak ki le Jehu, “Kagiyookyi ng'oo eng' acheek tugul?” Ak ki le, “Kagiyogun, ee kiptaiyat.”" 
2Kings9:6 Ki ng'eet anyun kwo ko, ak kiroong'ji mwaita metinnyi, ak koleenji ineendet, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: ‘Kaaiilin iegu laitoryat eng' piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, chooto ko Israel." 
2Kings9:7 Ibare kootap Ahab kiptaiyandeng'ung', si kobiit ayaakta mugetuut eng' korotiigap otwogikyuk maotik, ak eng' korotiigap otwogigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tugul, eng' eutap Jesebel." 
2Kings9:8 Amu igeesugei koot komugul ne po Ahab. Abare weeriit age tugul ne po Ahab, kobooto ineendet ne kerat ak ineendet ne ityagat eng' Israel." 
2Kings9:9 Ayae kootap Ahab koigei kootap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, ak ne po Baasha weeriitap Ahija." 
2Kings9:10 Ak amei sesenik Jesebel eng' kooretap Jezreel, ak ma piitu chii ne tubei ineendet.’ ” Ak ki yaat kurgeet, ak komwei." 
2Kings9:11 Ki nyo anyun Jehu ole ki mi otwogigap kiptaiyandennyi. ki teebee age ineendet koleenji, “Kaalyeet? Kanyonjin kibiywoni amu nee?” Ak ki leenji icheek, “Ongen chiichooto, ak kiit ne uu ng'alaalennyi.”" 
2Kings9:12 Ki le icheek, “Lembech! Mwaiwech anyun nguno!” Ak ki le Jehu, “Kang'alaalwo ko uu ni ak ko uu ni. Kole ineendet, ‘Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kaaiilin iegu laitoryat eng' Israel.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Ki chirchirenso konam chii tugul ngoryennyi ak koito kotobon ng'wony eng' ineendet eng' ole po paragutap lang'eiywot ne po koot. Ki kuut iryageet ak kole, “Laitoryat Jehu!”" 
2Kings9:14 Kochaam anyun Jehu weeriitap Jehoshaphat weeriitap Nimshi, Joram. (Kiriibei Joram ineendet ak Israel tugul Ramoth-gilead, amu Hazael laitoryatap Syria:" 
2Kings9:15 ago kiga week Laitoryat Joram kwo kinya eng' Jezreel eng' mook che kiga toor ineendet piigap Syria, ye ki paregei ak Hazael laitoryatap Syria.) Ki mwa Jehu kole, “Ngot kogiit ne obwaati ni, ko mat ogany kwo chii kochilil eng' nganaseet, kwo komwaita eng' Jezreel.”" 
2Kings9:16 Kolaany anyun Jehu chepkichutit, kwo Jezreel, amu kiruei Joram eng' olooto. Kiga choorgei Ahasia agine laitoryatap Judah kogeer Joram." 
2Kings9:17 Ye kitonone riibindet eng' teekseet ne kooi ne po Jezreel, ko kitoben Jehu ak kweanennyi kobwanei, ak ki le, “Ageere kobwanei piik.” Ak ki le Joram, “Nam chiito ne laanyei paraisiit ak iyookte kotorookta, ak ingowo koleenji, ‘Obwane eng' kaalyeet?’ ”" 
2Kings9:18 Kwo anyun chiito kobun paraisiit, kotorookta icheek, ak koleenji, “Kamwa laitoryat ko uu ni, kole: ‘Obwane eng' kaalyeet?’ ” Ki le Jehu, “Image nee kaalyeet? Nyoo ui let.” Kimwaita riibindonooto kole, “Kait chiito ne kagagiyookto ole mi icheek, ago ma week.”" 
2Kings9:19 Ki iyookto chiitap aeng' kobun paraisiit. Kingo it ye ki mi icheek komwachi koleenji, “Kamwa laitoryat kole: ‘Tos kaalyeet?’ ” Ki wol Jehu kole, “Image nee kaalyeet? Nyoo ui let.”" 
2Kings9:20 Ak ki mwaita riibindet kogeny kole, “Kait ole mi icheek, ago ma week. Kergei kweryennyi ak kweryetap Jehu weeriitap Nimshi; amu kweryei eng' koroomnateet.”" 
2Kings9:21 Ki le Joram, “Ochoboge.” Kochop anyun chepkichutinnyi. Ak kingo manda Joram laitoryatap Israel ak Ahasia laitoryatap Judah, komi chii tugul chepkichutinnyi, kogiba kotorookta Jehu, ak ki nyoorchi ineendet kooretap Nabot Jesreelindet." 
2Kings9:22 Kingo keer Joram Jehu, komwa kole, “Kaalyeet oo Jehu?” Ak ki wol kole, “Kaalyeet ne po nee, kota ko oo ibeetapkei ne po komet Jesebel ak ponisyosyekyik?”" 
2Kings9:23 Kiweech Joram eunekyik ak komwei, koleenji Ahasia, “Pwo! Mi ng'wektaet, wee Ahasia!”" 
2Kings9:24 King'i Jehu kwangennyi eng' kimnateennyi tugul ak komwok Joram kokwer kwenutap tigigoikyik. Ki isore kipchabet muguleldanyi ak ki ibutyi chepkichutinnyi. 
2Kings9:25 Koleenji anyun Jehu Bidka kiptaiyatap lugeennyi, “Sut ak iwiirchi kooretap Nabot Jesreelindet. Ibwaat ile, ye ki kibendi tuwai kisubi Ahab kwandanyi, ko ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor milani ineendet;" 
2Kings9:26 kole, Koageer iman amut korotiigap Nabot ak korotiigap weeriikyik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ayaagun eng' mbarani, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ara anyun wiirchi ineendet mbaranooto; ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
2Kings9:27 Kingo keer Ahasia laitoryatap Judah kioto, komwei kobun ooreet ne wendi koot ne mi mbar (Beth-hagan). Ki oon Jehu ineendet ak kole, “Obar ineendet agine eng' chepkichutit!” Ki kibar ineendet eng' ole kitogostoe eng' Gur ye neegitee Ibleam. Kimwechi Megiddo ak komechi yooto." 
2Kings9:28 Kisut ineendet otwogikyik eng' chepkichutit kwo Jerusalem, ak kotup ineendet eng' kererinnyi kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi." 
2Kings9:29 Ki toi kolaitoran Ahasia eng' Judah eng' kenyiitap taman ak agenge ne po Joram weeriitap Ahab. 
2Kings9:30 Ki it anyun Jehu Jezreel. Kingo kas Jesebel, kosal konyekyik ak kolelesonji metinnyi yeityo koitito eng' tirisyet." 
2Kings9:31 Ak ye kinyonei Jehu eng' ormariich, kole, “Tos kenyon eng' kaalyeet, inyee Shimri, rumindetap kiptaiyandeng'ung'?”" 
2Kings9:32 Ki inyal Jehu tirisyet ak kole, “Ng'oo ne mi komostanyu? Ng'oo?” Kigeerei ineendet `piik aeng'u anan somok che ki kiptainik." 
2Kings9:33 Ak ki le Jehu, “Owiiru!” Kowiir anyun ineendet konyo ng'wony ak ki iseegei korotiikyik inaatut ak paraisisyek; ak kityechatyech Jehu ineendet." 
2Kings9:34 Ye kingo nyo ko, koamis ak koeeiso. Yeityo kole, “Oriip kwonyito chuboot, si otup ineendet, amu ineendet ko cheptap laitoryat.”" 
2Kings9:35 Ki pa koleen kotup ineendet, ago ki ma nyoor ineendet kobatee terta, keelyekyik ak rubeiywegap eunekyik." 
2Kings9:36 Kobwa ko anyun kogeny ak komwachi ineendet. Ak ki le, “Ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nooto, ne ki mwa eng' otwogindennyi Elijah Tisbindet, kole, Amei sesenik poortap Jesebel eng' kooretap Jezreel." 
2Kings9:37 Kergeitu ak ng'atateek muustap Jesebel eng' mbareet eng' kooretap Jezreel; kot koma komwaei piik kole, ‘Jesebel ni.’ ”" 
2Kings10:1 Ki tinyei Ahab weeriik tamanwogik tisap eng' Samaria. Ki sir anyun Jehu paronok ak koyookto koba Samaria, koyookyi pounigap Jezreel, poisyek ak che kibaei weeriigap Ahab ko mengeechen, koleenji:" 
2Kings10:2 “Ne po koitu oldang'wong' parwaani, amu mi weeriigap kiptaiyandeng'wong' kobootok, ak otinye kariisyek ak paraisisyek, nganaseet ne ng'ootaat ak kariik che po lugeet:" 
2Kings10:3 olewen ne myee, ne yamegei eng' weeriigap kiptaiyandeng'wong', onde ineendet kotebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po kwandanyi, ak oyai lugeet agobo kootap kiptaiyandeng'wong'.”" 
2Kings10:4 Ago ki aragenso miising', ak kole, “Tos ma tononso laitorinik aeng'u eng' tainnyi! Kitonondoi ano acheek?”" 
2Kings10:5 Ki iyookyi ineendet ne ki pou koot komugul, ne ki pou nganaseet, kobooto poisyek ak icheek, ak che kibaei lagochooto, koyookyi ng'olyoot Jehu, koleenji, “Ki otwogiguk ak kiyae tuguuk tugul che imwaiwech. Ma kiyae chiito age koek laitoryat. Yai kiit ne igeere ile myee.”" 
2Kings10:6 Kosirchi anyun icheek kogeny parweet, ne po aeng', koleenji, “Ngot omi komostanyu, ak ogase iit ng'aleekyuk, otil metowegap pichooto weeriigap kiptaiyandeng'wong', ak obwa ole ami eng' Jezreel, mutai koteni asiis.” Ki mi weeriichooto po laitoryat tamanwogik tisabu kobooto piik che taagunotiin che po nganaseet, che kibaei icheek ko mengeechen." 
2Kings10:7 Kingo it parweet oldanywa, konam weeriigap laitoryat ak kobar, piik tamanwogik tisap ak konde metowekwak kitongok, ak koyooktoochi ineendet eng' Jezreel." 
2Kings10:8 Ki nyo chiito ne ki kiyogu ak komwachi ineendet koleenji, “Kageip metowegap weeriigap laitoryat.” Ak ki le, “Onde ng'wony eng' ole kibunei kebendi nganaseet, koek karurugutik aeng', agoi karon.”" 
2Kings10:9 Ki eng' karon, komanda ak kotonon ak koleenji piik tugul, “Oo po iman, ogeero, ki achaam kiptaiyandennyu ak abar ineendet. Ago ng'oo ne kobar chu tugul?" 
2Kings10:10 Onai anyun nguno ole ma petei kiy eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo kootap Ahab. Kagoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiit ne ki mwa eng' otwogindennyi Elijah.”" 
2Kings10:11 Ki par anyun Jehu tugul che ki kong'et che po kootap Ahab eng' Jezreel, kobooto piikyik tugul che eecheen, choronokyik ak tisiikyik, ma ituukyi ineendet chii agot agenge." 
2Kings10:12 Ki ng'eet anyun Jehu kwo Samaria. Ak ye kimi koot ne kitile koroorigap keechiirek, ne po mestoweek, eng' ooreet," 
2Kings10:13 kotuiye Jehu che tupcho ak Ahasia laitoryatap Judah. ki teebee icheek koleenji, “Oo ng'oo?” Ak ki wol kole, “Kitupchosyegap Ahasia. Kichoortoigei kigati lagogap laitoryat ak lagogap kwondap laitoryat.”" 
2Kings10:14 Ki mwa ineendet kole, “Onam!” Ki nam anyun icheek ak kobar eng' keriinget ne po koot ne kitilisye, piik artam ak aeng'. Ma pagaakta agot agenge eng' icheek." 
2Kings10:15 Ye kingo kakwo eng' yooto, kotuiyo ak Jehonadap weeriitap Regap kotorogu ineendet. Ki igat ineendet ak koleenji, “Myee muguleldang'ung', ko uu ye myee muguleldanyu eng' neng'ung'?” Ak ki wol Jehonadap kole, “Ee myee.” Kole Jehu “Ngot ko uu nooto, igoono euut.” Ak ki igoochi ineendet euut; ak ki nam Jehu kwo chepkichutit oriit." 
2Kings10:16 Ki mwa kole, “Ngebe tuwai, igeer kagiilennyu pogei agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Kogoochi anyun kobun chepkichutinnyi." 
2Kings10:17 Kingo it Samaria, kobar piik tugul che kiga ng'etyi Ahab eng' Samaria, agoi kogees ineendet ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki mwachi Elijah." 
2Kings10:18 Ki iyum anyun Jehu piik tugul ak koleenji, “Ki oot Ahab Baal kitigin; ago otei Jehu miising'!" 
2Kings10:19 Oguurwa anyun maotik tugul che po Baal, piik tugul che saaei ineendet ak tisiikyik tugul, among' kong'et agot agenge, amu atinye tiseiywot ne oo ne aeng'jini Baal. Chii age tugul ne ng'etu, koma sabei.” Ago ki yai Jehu ko uu nooto kong'aalsei, komachei kobar piik che saaei Baal." 
2Kings10:20 Ki le Jehu, “Ong'at tuiyetap Baal ne po kaming'inetapkei!”" 
2Kings10:21 Ki iyookto Jehu piik koba komoswek tugul eng' Israel keguur tugul che saaei Baal, ak ma ng'et chii ne ma nyo. Ki pwa tugul ak ki nyi kootap Baal kong'etee komosi agoi komosin." 
2Kings10:22 Ki leenji chiito ne riibei ole kigonoree ngoroik, “Inemji ngoroik piik tugul che saaei Baal.” Ak ki inemji icheek ngoroik." 
2Kings10:23 Ki pa kootap Baal, Jehu ak Jehonadap weeriitap Regap; ak koleenji Jehu piik che ki saaei Baal, “Ocheeng' ogeer ngo mi yu kobootok chii age tugul eng' otwogigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobatee piik che saaei Baal icheegei.”" 
2Kings10:24 Ara ki pa ko kogoito tiseiywek ak kagoochinoik che kibeelei. Kiga kochop Jehu piik tamanwogik sisiit eng' saang', ak koleenji, “Ngot kochilil chii age tugul ne amutu konyo eunekwok, ko ineendet ne kaunda kochilil, kogeeri saboondanyi ineendet.”" 
2Kings10:25 Kingo kes eng' yooto kagoitoetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei, koleenji Jehu riibiik ak kiptainigap lugeet, “Oba ko ak obar icheek tugul. Among' kochilil agot agenge!” Ki par icheek eng' rotwetap chok; ak ki wiir riibiik ak kiptainigap lugeet muuswek komong' saang'. Ki pa nganaseetap kootap Baal." 
2Kings10:26 Ki ip tolochik che ki mi kootap Baal, komong' ak kobeel." 
2Kings10:27 Ki iluul toloitap Baal ak kobut kootap Baal, ak koyai koek koot ne kimasyin, agoi ra." 
2Kings10:28 Kobut anyun Jehu Baal eng' Israel. 
2Kings10:29 Ago ma istoegei Jehu kasubetap tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, ne ki igoochi Israel koyai tengekto, chooto ko ki moegap thahabu che ki mi Bethel ak che ki mi Dan." 
2Kings10:30 Ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jehu, “Amu ki iyai ne myee eng' yaetap imanda ne myee eng' tainnyu, ak iyachi kootap Ahab ko uu tuguuk tugul che ki mi muguleldanyu, tebee anyun weeriiguk ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Israel, agoi ibindap ang'wan.”" 
2Kings10:31 Ago ma mage kiy Jehu kowendote ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, eng' muguleldanyi tugul. Ma istoegei tengekwogigap Jeroboam, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings10:32 Ki toi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyechooto kotil Israel kong'ering'itu. Ki par `Hazael icheek eng' kiwotosyek tugul che po Israel," 
2Kings10:33 kong'etee Jordan komostap kong'asiis, emet tugul ne po Gilead, Gadik, Reubenik ak ne po Manasik. Kong'eete Aroer ne mi ole po atebweetap Arnon, chooto ko Gilead ak Bashan." 
2Kings10:34 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jehu, tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ak kimnateennyi tugul, tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
2Kings10:35 Kiruiyo Jehu ak kwanisyekyik. Ki kitup ineendet eng' Samaria. Ak ki laitoran Jehoahas weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Kings10:36 Ki laitoran Jehu koboi Israel eng' Samaria ko ki kenyiisyek tiptem ak sisiit. 
2Kings11:1 Kingo keer Athaliah kametap Ahasia kole kagome weeriinnyi, kong'eet ak kobar anyun iyoteet tugul ne po kaplaitoryat." 
2Kings11:2 Ago kichor Jeoseba cheptap Laitoryat Joram, chepkametap Ahasia, Joash weeriitap Ahasia, ak komut ineendet ak cheplakwet eng' ole mi weeriigap laitoryat che ki kibarei, kwo koung'e icheek koot oriit ne kirue, si ma nyoor Athaliah, ak kobar." 
2Kings11:3 Ki tebi ak ineendet, kounyegei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kenyiisyek lo. Ak ki laitoran Athaliah koboi emet." 
2Kings11:4 Ki iyookto `Jehoiada chiito eng' kenyiitap tisap kwo koguur kiptainik che pou pogolwogigap Kariitik, ak che po riibiik, koguur icheek kobwa ole mi ineendet eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki iyomiskei kobooto icheek, ak koleenji koyasyo eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, yeityo koboorchi icheek weeriitap laitoryat." 
2Kings11:5 Ki ng'at icheek koleenji, “Ni kiit ne oyae: Egu kebeberta agenge eng' somok eng' okweek, che obwane sabato, riibiigap riipseet eng' kootap laitoryat." 
2Kings11:6 Ingotebee kebeberta agenge eng' somok, ormariichetap Sur. Kotebee kebeberta agenge eng' somok patetap riibiik. Oriibe anyun riipseetap koot ko uu nooto, ak oegu ng'ootweet." 
2Kings11:7 Ak riipsei kweanaik aeng'u eng' okweek, tugul che omandoi eng' sabato, eng' riipseetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koyiemei laitoryat." 
2Kings11:8 Oyieme laitoryat, kotinyei chii tugul kariikyik eng' eunnyi. Ineendet ne nyoonei ole mi pichooto, kebarei. Otebi ak laitoryat ye wendi komandoi saang', ak ye nyoonei ko.”" 
2Kings11:9 Ki yai anyun kiptainik che pou pogolwogik ko uu tuguuk tugul che ki ng'at Jehoiada tisiindet. Ki imut chii age tugul piikyik, che kibwanei eng' sabato, kobooto che kimandoi eng' sabato. Ki pwa ole mi Jehoiada tisiindet." 
2Kings11:10 Ki igoochi tisiindet kiptainik che pou pogolwogik, ng'otwek ak long'onik che ki po Laitoryat Daudi, che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings11:11 Ki tonondos riibiik, kotinyei chii tugul kariik eng' eunnyi, kong'etee komostap tai ne po koot agoi komostap kaataam, kobun ole neegitee kaptisisyet ak ole neegitee koot, koyiem laitoryat." 
2Kings11:12 Komut anyun weeriitap laitoryat komong', ak kolaakyi naaryeetap laitornatet, ak kogoochi paornateet. Ki yai ineendet koek laitoryat, ak koiil ineendet, yeityo koraprap eunekwak ak kole, “Ingosap keny laitoryat!”" 
2Kings11:13 Kingo kas Athaliah polatetap riibiik ak piik, konyo ole ki mi piik eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings11:14 Ak ki keer, kitononi laitoryat eng' ye neegitee toloita, ko uu ye ki piteet, ak kimi kiptainik ak piik che kuutei iryagook ole neegitee laitoryat. Kiboiboitu piik tugul che po emet ak koguut iryagook. Kogereer anyun Athaliah ngoroikyik ak kowaach kole, “Chaamset! Chaamset!”" 
2Kings11:15 Ki ng'at `Jehoiada tisiindet kiptainigap pogolwogik che pou lugeet, koleenji, “Omaande ineendet kobun kwenutap piik; ak kibarei eng' rotwetap chok, chiito ne isubi ineendet. Amat kebar ineendet eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
2Kings11:16 Koistochigei anyun ineendet; ak ki pun Athaliah ooreet ne punei paraisisyek kobendi kootap laitoryat, ak ki kibarchi ineendet yooto." 
2Kings11:17 Ki yai Jehoiada arorutyet eng' kwenutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak laitoryat ak piik kole egu icheek piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak eng' kwenutap laitoryat agine ak piik. 
2Kings11:18 Ki pa piik tugul che po emet kootap Baal ak kobut koluul. Kibut kapkorosusyekyik ak kanamonikyik kotonaton inne, ak kobar Matan tisiindetap Baal eng' taitap kapkorosusyek. Ak ki lewen tisiindet pounik koriip kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings11:19 Ki imut kiptainik che po pogolwogik, ak Kariitik, ak riibiik, piik tugul che po emet, kobooto laitoryat kochoorgei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobun ooreetap ormariichetap riibiik agoi kootap laitoryat. Ak ki tebee ng'echereetap pounateet ne po laitorinik." 
2Kings11:20 Kiboiboitu anyun piik tugul che po emet, ak ki siis nganaseet. Ak ki par Athaliah eng' rotwetap chok eng' kootap laitoryat." 
2Kings11:21 Ki toi kolaitoran Jehoas ko po kenyiisyek tisap. 
2Kings12:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Jehoas eng' kenyiitap tisap ne po Jehu, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek artam eng' Jerusalem. Kainetap kamennyi ko ki Sibia ne po Beer-sheba." 
2Kings12:2 Ki yai Jehoas ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyekyik tugul koneeti Jehoiada tisiindet ineendet. 
2Kings12:3 Ago ki ma kiisto komoswek che torooreen; kita koenyei piik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen. 
2Kings12:4 Ki leenji Jehoas tisiik, “Ingoip tisiik fedhaisyek tugul che po tuguuk che itabaanatiin che ki ibu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak fedhaisyek che kiboisyee, fedhaisyek che po piik che tee che yamei koitetap chii age tugul, ak fedhaisyek tugul che kaibwaat chii eng' muguleldanyi kole koip kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
2Kings12:5 koip tisiichooto, tisiindet age tugul eng' chiito ne ingenge; si koteech ole ki kobutok eng' koot, komosta age tugul ole mi ole putot.”" 
2Kings12:6 Ago kingo itei kenyiitap tiptem ak somok ne po Laitoryat Jehoas, ko ki tomo koteech tisiik ole kiga kobutok eng' koot." 
2Kings12:7 Koguur anyun Laitoryat Jehoas tisiindet Jehoiada, kobooto tisiik alak, ak koleenji icheek, “Amu nee si moteeche ole ki kobutok eng' koot? Nooto anyun, amata oip fedhaisyek eng' che ongenge, ogoite keyae ole ki kobutok eng' koot.”" 
2Kings12:8 Ki iyan tisiik kole ma koibei fedhaisyek eng' piik, ama teechei ole ki kobutok eng' koot." 
2Kings12:9 Ago ki nam Jehoiada moinget ak korut kereiywondennyi, ak konde taban eng' kaptisisyet, eng' komostap tai kebendi ko eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki inde moingonooto tisiik che ki riibei kurgeet, robiinik tugul che ki kiibu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings12:10 Kingo keer kole kagochang'a robiinik eng' moinget, kotogos siriindetap laitoryat ak tisiindet ne oo konde ratuutik ak koiit kogeer kiit ne tee fedhaisyechooto kimi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings12:11 Yeityo kigoochi fedhaisyechooto kiga kigaman, piik che poisyei, che riibei kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kopchechi musogik ak teegik, che kiyaei kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
2Kings12:12 piik che teekse koik, che waei koik. Ki al icheek pagoinik ak koik che kweaotin che kiteege ole kiga kobutok eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak tuguuk tugul che ki kiip keteege koot." 
2Kings12:13 Ago robiinik che ki kiip kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koma kiboisyee ki ale kigombogap fedha, magasisyek che kitile ole lalei eng' taisyek, taabook, igondisyek, tereenik alak tugul che po thahabu anan ko tereenigap fedha;" 
2Kings12:14 amu ki igoochi chooto icheek che ki yai poisyet, ak koteege kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings12:15 Ago ma iit kobooto pichooto, ki igoochin robiinik konam si kogoochi piik che yaei poisyet, amu kiboisyee imanda." 
2Kings12:16 Ki ma keibu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor robiinik che po kagoochinoigap chalwogik, ak che po kagoochinoigap tengekto; ki po tisiik." 
2Kings12:17 Ki wo kotogosta anyun Hazael laitoryatap Syria kwo kobargei ak Gath ak ki nam nganasanooto. Kitokyigei Hazael kobookyi Jerusalem. 
2Kings12:18 Ki nam Jehoas laitoryatap Judah tuguuk tugul che itabaanatiin che kiga itabaan Jehoshaphat, ak Jehoram, ak Ahasia, kwanisyekyik, laitorinigap Judah, ak tuguukyik che itabaanatiin, ak thahabusyek tugul che ki mi konoraigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak che po kootap laitoryat, ak koyookyi Hazael laitoryatap Syria: ak ki wo anyun kometo Jerusalem." 
2Kings12:19 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Joash, ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah?" 
2Kings12:20 Ki ng'eetyo otwogikyik kochaam ineendet, ak ki par Joash eng' kootap Milo, eng' ooreet ne choortoegei Sila." 
2Kings12:21 Ki par ineendet otwogikyik Josakar weeriitap Simeat, ak Jeosabad weeriitap Somer. Kime ak kitup ineendet kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ki laitoran Amasia weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings13:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Jehoahas weeriitap Jehu eng' Israel eng' Samaria, eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak somok, ne po Joash weeriitap Ahasia laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak tisap." 
2Kings13:2 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koosup tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto. Ma istoegei ineendet tengekwogichooto." 
2Kings13:3 Ak kinereech kot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel, ki inde icheek eutap Hazael laitoryatap Syria ak ne po eutap Ben-Hadad weeriitap Hazael, peetuusyek tugul." 
2Kings13:4 Ki riirchi Jehoahas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki kasyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, amu ki keer nyalildap Israel, ole ki inyalildoi laitoryatap Syria." 
2Kings13:5 (Ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel yetindet, kot komanda eng' eutap piigap Syria. Ara ki meny piigap Israel emaisyekwak, ko uu eng' tai." 
2Kings13:6 Ago ma istoegei tengekwogigap kootap Jeroboam, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto, kibendotee tengekwogichooto. Ki tebee Samaria Asera agine.)" 
2Kings13:7 Amu ma ituukyi kiy piigap Jehoahas, kobatee piik konom che ketei paraisisyek, kariisyek taman ak piik eliphuusyek taman che punei keelyek. Kiga kobar laitoryatap Syria icheek, ak koyai koigei meteteek che mi ole kiboorsee." 
2Kings13:8 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jehoahas, ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ak kimnateennyi, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
2Kings13:9 Ki ru Jehoahas kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitup ineendet eng' Samaria. Ki laitoran Joash weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Kings13:10 Ki toi kolaitoran Jehoas weeriitap Jehoahas eng' Israel eng' Samaria, eng' kenyiitap sosom ak tisap ne po Joash laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo." 
2Kings13:11 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma istoegei tengekwogik tugul che po Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto; ago kiwendate tengekwogichooto." 
2Kings13:12 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Joash, tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ak kimnateennyi ne kibaregei ak Amasia laitoryatap Judah, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
2Kings13:13 Ki ru Joash kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak ki tebee Jeroboam ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet. Ki kitupchi Joash Samaria kobooto laitorinigap Israel." 
2Kings13:14 Ki nam Elisha myando ne kibar ineendet. Ki choorgei Joash laitoryatap Israel konyo ole mi ineendet ak koriir agobo ineendet ak kole, “Abba! Abba! Kariitap Israel ak piik che laanyei paraisisyekyik!”" 
2Kings13:15 Ki leenji Elisha ineendet, “Nam kwanget ak kipchabonik!” Konam anyun ineendet kwanget ak kipchabonik." 
2Kings13:16 Ki leenji laitoryatap Israel, “Kersach” ak kigersach. Ak ki igonoor Elisha eunekyik eunegap laitoryat." 
2Kings13:17 Ki leenji, “Yaat tirisyet ne tokyingei kong'asiis”, ak ki yaat. Ak ki le Elisha, “Mwokte” ak kimwokto. Ak ki mwa Elisha kole, “Kipchabetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po katerteeret, kipchabetap katerteeret ne iterteere piigap Syria. Ibare piigap Syria eng' Apek, kot igeesu icheek.”" 
2Kings13:18 Ki leenji, “Nam kipchabonik”, ak ki nam. Ak ki leenji laitoryatap Israel, “Kwer ng'wony.” Ki kwer konyil somok ak kobagaach." 
2Kings13:19 Ki nereekyi `chiitap Kamuktaindet ineendet, koleenji, “Kaganyooljin ikwer konyil muut anan ko lo, ko kata ibare piigap Syria kot igeesu. Ago nguno ibare piigap Syria konyil somok kityo.”" 
2Kings13:20 Kime Elisha ak ki kitup ineendet. Ak ki ibok lugosyegap Moabik kobwa emet eng' taunetap kenyiit. 
2Kings13:21 Ak ki keer lugeet ye ki tubei icheek chiito, ak ki wiirchi chiichooto kereritap Elisha. Kingo tiiny chiichooto kawegap Elisha, kosap ak kong'eet." 
2Kings13:22 Ki inyaliil Hazael laitoryatap Syria Israel eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Jehoahas. 
2Kings13:23 Ago ki iboorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myeeindonyi icheek, koriiree ak kogonyit icheek, amu kayomisennyi ne ki iyomiskei ak Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo. Ma cham kobar anan koon icheek eng' tainnyi agoi rani." 
2Kings13:24 Kome anyun Hazael laitoryatap Syria, ak ki laitoran Ben-Hadad weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings13:25 Ki iweek anyun Jehoas weeriitap Jehoahas nganasook eng' eutap Ben-Hadad weeriitap Hazael che kiga ip eng' eutap Jehoahas kwandanyi eng' lugeet. Ki iterteer Joash ineendet konyil somok, ak ki iweech nganasoogap Israel." 
2Kings14:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Amasia weeriitap Joash laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap aeng' ne po Joash weeriitap Jehoahas laitoryatap Israel. 
2Kings14:2 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak sogool eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Jeoadin ne po Jerusalem." 
2Kings14:3 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ma igei Daudi kwandanyi. Ki yai ko uu tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi Joash." 
2Kings14:4 Ago ki ma kiisto komoswek che torooreen. Kita koenyei piik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen. 
2Kings14:5 Ak ye ki kata ki kimiit pounateet eng' eunnyi, kobar otwogikyik che kiga par laitoryat, nooto kwandanyi." 
2Kings14:6 Ago ma par lagogap rumichooto, ko uu ye ki kisir eng' bukuitap Ng'atuutyetap Musa, ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kole: “Ma kibarei kwanisyek amu lagok, anan kebar lagok amu kwanisyek; ago ki parei chii age tugul agobo tengektanyi.”" 
2Kings14:7 Ki par piigap Edom eliphuusyek taman eng' Atebweetap Munyuk, ak konam Shelah eng' lugeet, ak koguuree kainennyi Joktel agoi ra." 
2Kings14:8 Kiyookto anyun Amasia piik koba kap Jeoas, weeriitap Jehoahas weeriitap Jehu, laitoryatap Israel, koleenji, “Nyoo ketuiye kegeerge togoch.”" 
2Kings14:9 Ago ki iyookyi piik Jehoas laitoryatap Israel Amasia laitoryatap Judah koleenji, “Ki iyookto ng'olyoot kateet ne rutei piich ne ki mi Lebanon koyookyi tarakwet ne ki mi Lebanon, koleenji, ‘Igoochi cheptong'ung' weeriinnyu kotun.’ Ak kisiirto tyondo ne po timiin ne ki mi Lebanon ak kotyech katanooto rutei piich." 
2Kings14:10 Ki ibar iman Edom, ak ki kotoroorin muguleldang'ung'. Paibaitune nooto anyun, ak itebee koong'ung'! Amu nee si icheeng'jigei nyalilda, si ibut, inyee kobooto Judah?”" 
2Kings14:11 Ago ma cham Amasia kogas. Kotogosta anyun Jehoas laitoryatap Israel; ak kigeergei ineendet ak Amasia laitoryatap Judah togoch eng' Beth-shemesh ne po Judah. 
2Kings14:12 Ki kiterteer Judah eng' taitap Israel, ak ki mwei chii tugul kwo emainnyi." 
2Kings14:13 Ki imut Jehoas laitoryatap Israel Amasia laitoryatap Judah, weeriitap Jehoas weeriitap Ahasia, eng' Beth-shemesh, ak koit Jerusalem, ak kobut irimeet ne po Jerusalem kobooch ormariichetap Ephraim agoi ormariichetap luuita, ye neegit mitainik pogol aeng'." 
2Kings14:14 Ki ip thahabu tugul ak fedha, kobooto tuguuk tugul che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak konoraik che ki mi kootap laitoryat, kobooto luulenik ak icheek, yeityo koweek kwo Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jehoas che ki yai, kimnateennyi, ak ole kibartagei ak Amasia laitoryatap Judah, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
2Kings14:16 Ki ru Jehoas kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitup eng' Samaria kobooto laitorinigap Israel. Ak ki laitoran Jeroboam weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Kings14:17 Kita kosap Amasia weeriitap Jehoas laitoryatap Judah kenyiisyek taman ak muut kingo pata meetap Jehoas weeriitap Jehoahas laitoryatap Israel. 
2Kings14:18 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Amasia, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah?" 
2Kings14:19 Kichaam `icheeget ineendet eng' Jerusalem; ak ki mwei kwo Lakish, ago ki iyookto icheek piik koosup ineendet koba Lakish, ak kobar ineendet eng' olooto." 
2Kings14:20 Kilaune ineendet paraisisyek ak ki kitupchi Jerusalem kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. 
2Kings14:21 Ki nam piik tugul che po Judah Azariah, ne ki po kenyiisyek taman ak lo, ak koyai ineendet koek laitoryat kogeer kwandanyi Amasia." 
2Kings14:22 Ki teech Elath, koweekyi Judah ko kagoru laitoryat kobooto kwanisyekyik." 
2Kings14:23 Ki toi kolaitoran Jeroboam weeriitap Joash laitoryatap Israel eng' Samaria, eng' kenyiitap taman ak muut kobooch kolaitoran Amasia weeriitap Joash eng' Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek artam ak agenge." 
2Kings14:24 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ma istoegei tengekwogik tugul che po Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings14:25 Ki weech ineendet kiwotetap Israel kobooch ye kibunei kebendi Lebo-hamath agoi nyanjetap Arabah, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne ki mwa eng' otwogindennyi Jona maotyot, weeriitap Amitai, ne ki po Gat-heper." 
2Kings14:26 Amu ki keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyalildap Israel, kole ng'waan kot, amu ki ma komi chii ne kiga kiger anan ko ne ityagat; ki ma komi toretindet Israel." 
2Kings14:27 Ak ma mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ibuktoi kainetap Israel eng' kurereetap kipsengwet, ago ki sar icheek eng' Jeroboam weeriitap Joash." 
2Kings14:28 Poisyonik tugul che po Jeroboam, ak tuguuk tugul che ki yai, kimnateennyi, ole kiyaita lugeet, ak ole ki iweegundo Damasko ak Hamath ne ki po Judah, koweekyi Israel, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
2Kings14:29 Ki ru Jeroboam kobooto kwanisyekyik, chooto ko laitorinigap Israel. Ak ki laitoran Zekariah weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings15:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Azariah weeriitap Amasia laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak tisap kobooch kolaitoran Jeroboam eng' Israel. 
2Kings15:2 Ki po kenyiisyek taman ak lo ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek konom ak aeng' eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Jekolia ne po Jerusalem." 
2Kings15:3 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu tugul che ki yai kwandanyi Amasia." 
2Kings15:4 Ago ki ma kiisto komoswek che torooreen; kita koenyei piik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswechooto. 
2Kings15:5 Ki pir Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitoryat, ak ki nam mogondosaik agoi peetuutap meennyi, ak ki meny koot ne itabaanat. Ki pou koot Jotham weeriitap laitoryat, korwookyin piik eng' emet." 
2Kings15:6 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Azariah, ak tugul che ki yai, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah?" 
2Kings15:7 Ki ru Azariah kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitup kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ak ki laitoran Jotham weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Kings15:8 Ki laitoran Zekariah weeriitap Jeroboam eng' Israel eng' Samaria arawek lo eng' kenyiitap sosom ak sisiit kobooch kolaitoran Azariah eng' Judah. 
2Kings15:9 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki yai kwanisyekyik. Ma istoegei tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings15:10 Kichaam ineendet Shallum weeriitap Jabes, ak kikwer kobar ineendet eng' taitap piik, ak kolaitoran kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings15:11 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Zekariah, ko ki kisir eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel." 
2Kings15:12 Niito ko ng'olyoot ne ki mwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jehu, koleenji, “Tebee weeriiguk ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Israel agoi ibinda ne po ang'wan.” Ak kiyaak ko uu nooto." 
2Kings15:13 Ki toi kolaitoran Shallum weeriitap Jabes eng' kenyiitap sosom ak sogool kobooch kolaitoran Uzziah eng' Judah. Ak ki laitoran arawet agenge eng' Samaria. 
2Kings15:14 Ki togosta Menaem weeriitap Gadi eng' Tirzah, ak ki it Samaria, ak kikwer kobar Shallum weeriitap Jabes eng' Samaria ak kolaitoran kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings15:15 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Shallum, ak chaamsennyi ne ki yai, ko siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel." 
2Kings15:16 Ki par anyun Menaem Tiphsah, ak piik tugul che ki menyei yooto, ak kiwotosyekyik kobooch Tirzah, amu ma yaatyi ineendet. Kigereer kwonyiik tugul che tamonosyek che ki mi yooto." 
2Kings15:17 Ki toi Menaem weeriitap Gadi kolaitoran eng' Israel eng' kenyiitap sosom ak sogool ne po Azariah laitoryatap Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman eng' Samaria." 
2Kings15:18 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma istoegei tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat eng' peetuusyekyik tugul, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings15:19 Kiseet Pul laitoryatap Assyria koleen kobar emet; ak ki igoochi Menaem Pul keruutik eliphuusyek sosom ak tisap che po fedha, si kobiit kotoret Pul ineendet kogimit laitornatet eng' eunnyi." 
2Kings15:20 Kirep Menaem fedhaisyek eng' Israel, che po piik tugul che eecheen che mogoreek, ki ibe chii tugul shekelisyek konom, fedha nusu kilo, si kobiit kogoochi laitoryatap Assyria. Ki week anyun laitoryatap Assyria, ma tebi eng' emonooto." 
2Kings15:21 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Menaem, tuguuk tugul che ki yai, tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel?" 
2Kings15:22 Ki ru Menaem kobooto kwanisyekyik. Ak ki laitoran Pekaia weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Kings15:23 Ki toi kolaitoran Pekaia weeriitap Menaem eng' Israel eng' Samaria, eng' kenyiitap konom ko po kolaitoran Azariah eng' Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek aeng'." 
2Kings15:24 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ma istoegei tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings15:25 Kichaam ineendet Pekah weeriitap Remaliah, kiptaiyandennyi ne po lugeet, ak kobar eng' Samaria, eng' irimeetap kootap laitoryat kobooto Argob ak Arie, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet `piik konomu che po Gileadik. Ki par ak kolaitoran kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings15:26 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Pekaia, tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ko siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel." 
2Kings15:27 Ki toi kolaitoran Pekah weeriitap Remaliah eng' Israel eng' Samaria, eng' kenyiitap konom ak aeng' kobooch kolaitoran Azariah eng' Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem." 
2Kings15:28 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ma istoegei ineendet tengekwogigap Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, che ki ibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings15:29 Ki nyo Tiglat-peleser laitoryatap Assyria eng' peetuusyegap Pekah laitoryatap Israel ak ki nam Ijon, Abel ne po Beth-maaka, Janoah, Kedesh, Hasor, kobooto Gilead, Galilaya, ak emet tugul ne po Naphtali ak kiluul icheek komut koba Assyria." 
2Kings15:30 Kichaam Hoshea weeriitap Elah Pekah weeriitap Remaliah, ak kibar kobar ineendet ak kolaitoran kogeer ineendet, eng' kenyiitap tiptem kobooch kolaitoran Jotham weeriitap Uzziah." 
2Kings15:31 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Pekah, tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ko siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Israel." 
2Kings15:32 Ki toi kolaitoran Jotham weeriitap Uzziah laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap aeng' kobooch kolaitoran Pekah weeriitap Remaliah eng' Israel. 
2Kings15:33 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani. Ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Jerusha cheptap Zadok. 
2Kings15:34 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki yai ko uu tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi Uzziah." 
2Kings15:35 Agos ma ki isto komoswek che torooreen; kita koenyei piik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen. Ki teech ineendet ormariichetap meto ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Kings15:36 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jotham, tuguuk tugul che ki yai, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek che po laitorinigap Judah?" 
2Kings15:37 Ki toi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyechooto koyookyi Rezin laitoryatap Syria ak Pekah weeriitap Remaliah, kobargei ak Judah." 
2Kings15:38 Ki ru Jotham ak kwanisyekyik ak ki kitup eng' nganaseetap Daudi kwandanyi. Ak ki laitoran Ahaz weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Kings16:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Ahaz weeriitap Jotham laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap taman ak tisap kobooch kolaitoran Pekah weeriitap Remaliah. 
2Kings16:2 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem Ahaz ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo eng' Jerusalem. Ki ma yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi, ko uu ye ki yai Daudi kwandanyi." 
2Kings16:3 Ago ki wendotee ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel, ee, ak kogoito weeriinnyi kobun maat, ko uu tuguuk che kiwechei che po pororyosyek, che ki oon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koba eng' taitap piigap Israel." 
2Kings16:4 Ki enyei ineendet tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen, eng' tuloonook ak eng' kelutap keetit age tugul ne tuon." 
2Kings16:5 Konyo anyun Jerusalem Rezin laitoryatap Syria kobooto Pekah weeriitap Remaliah kobookyi kobargei ak Jeusalem, kiyiem Ahaz, ago ki ma imuuch koterteer ineendet." 
2Kings16:6 Eng' peetuusyechooto kogiweekyi Rezin laitoryatap Syria piigap Syria nganaseetap Elath, ak ki oon Yahudik eng' Elath. Ki pwa piigap Syria Elath ak komeny olooto agoi ra." 
2Kings16:7 Ki iyookto anyun Ahaz piik koba kap Tiglat-peleser laitoryatap Assyria, koleenji, “Aa otwogindeng'ung' ak ko aa weeriing'ung'. Togosu, sarwo eng' eutap laitoryatap Syria ak eng' eutap laitoryatap Israel, che machei kobookyo.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ak ki nam Ahaz fedha ak thahabu che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ki mi konoraigap kootap laitoryat ak koyookyi laitoryatap Assyria koek kagoochinet." 
2Kings16:9 Ki kasyi ineendet laitoryatap Assyria, ak kitogosta kobookyi Damasko. Ki nam ak koluul piigap yooto komut koba Kir ak kobar Rezin." 
2Kings16:10 Ki wo Laitoryat Ahaz Damasko kotorookto Tiglat-peleser laitoryatap Assyria ak ki keer kaptisisyet ne ki mi Damasko. Ki iboorchi Laitoryat Ahaz Urija tisiindet kiit ne uu kaptisisyonooto, kergeindanyi ak ole uu musoknatennyi tugul." 
2Kings16:11 Ki teech Urija tisiindet kaptisisyet, ko uu tugul che kiga koboorchi Laitoryat Ahaz eng' Damasko, ak ki teech anyun kotar kotom koit Laitoryat Ahaz eng' Damasko." 
2Kings16:12 Kingo it laitoryat kobunu Damasko, kogeer kaptisisyet, koriikyi anyun laitoryat yooto, ak kogoitoe kagoochinoik." 
2Kings16:13 Ki peel kagoochinennyi ne kibeelei ak kagoochinennyi ne po peek che ng'ootiin, ak koroong'ji kagoochinennyi ne kieei, ak koisee kaptisisyet korotiigap kagoochinoikyik che po kaalyeet." 
2Kings16:14 Ki ip kaptisisyetap sugunwet ne ki mi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo eng' taitap koot, komong' eng' kwenutap kaptisisyennyi ak kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak konde komostap murot kaataam ne po kaptisisyennyi." 
2Kings16:15 Ki ng'at anyun Laitoryat Ahaz Urija tisiindet, koleenji, “Peel kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po karon eng' kaptisisyet ne oo, ak kagoochinet ne po koskoleny ne po peek, ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po laitoryat, ak kagoochinennyi ne po peek, kobooto kagoochinennywa ne kibeelei ne po piik tugul che po emet, ak kagoochinoikwak che po peek, ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei. Iise kaptisisyonooto korotiik tugul che po kagoochinennywa ne kibeelei, ak korotiik tugul che po tiseiywek. Ago kaptisisyetap sugunwet, kobunjino nooto si ateepse.”" 
2Kings16:16 Ki yai ko uu nooto Urija tisiindet, ko uu tugul che ki ng'at Laitoryat Ahaz." 
2Kings16:17 Ki til Laitoryat Ahaz tabanwegap ng'echerok ak koisto taabeet ne oo eng' kwenutap tuguuchooto. Ki inem nyanjet ne ki mi paragutap eigap sugunonik, konyo ng'wony, ak konde paragutap koik che ki kitet." 
2Kings16:18 Ki wal ooreet ne kerat ne po sabato ne kiga kiyai eng' ko, ak ole mandoe laitoryat eng' ole po saang', ki iweech kotokyi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu laitoryatap Assyria." 
2Kings16:19 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che ki yai Ahaz, tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah?" 
2Kings16:20 Ki ru Ahaz ak ki kitup kobooto kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ki laitoran Hezekiah weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Kings17:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Hoshea weeriitap Elah eng' Samaria eng' Israel, eng' kenyiitap taman ak aeng' kobooch kolaitoran Ahaz eng' Judah, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek sogool." 
2Kings17:2 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ma ko uu laitorinigap Israel che ki indoune ineendet." 
2Kings17:3 Ki togos Shalmaneser laitoryatap Assyria kobargei ak ineendet, ak ki ek Hoshea otwogindennyi ak ki ipchi ineendet kagoochinoik." 
2Kings17:4 Ak ki nai laitoryatap Assyria kole chaamsei Hoshea, amu kiga koyookto piik koba kap So laitoryatap Misiri, ama igoochi kagoochinet laitoryatap Assyria, ko uu ye ki cham koyaei kenyiit age tugul. Eng' nooto anyun koger ineendet laitoryatap Assyria, ak korat eng' korgoreet." 
2Kings17:5 Yeityo kotogos laitoryatap Assyria konyo kowendot eng' emet komugul ak kitogosta kwo Samaria, ak kiyiem olooto kenyiisyek somok." 
2Kings17:6 Ki nam laitoryatap Assyria Samaria, eng' kenyiitap sogool ne po Hoshea ak komut Israel koba Assyria. Ki imut icheek kwo konde komeny Hala ak Habor, eng' aineetap Gosan ak nganasoogap Medes." 
2Kings17:7 Ki yaak ko uu nooto, amu kiga yachi piigap Israel tengekto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ne ki imutu icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri, komang'une eutap Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri, Kiga koywei icheek kanamonik," 
2Kings17:8 ak kobendatee ng'atuutigap pororyosyek, che kigaon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koba eng' taitap piigap Israel, ak eng' taitap laitorinigap Israel che kiga yai icheek." 
2Kings17:9 Ki yai piigap Israel eng' ung'oot tuguuk che ma lititen koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ak kiteekyigei komoswek che torooreen eng' nganasookwak tugul, kobooch teekseet ne kooi ne po riibiik kot koit nganaseet ne ng'ootaat." 
2Kings17:10 Ki lumda tolochik ak Aserik eng' tulweet age tugul ne kooi, ak eng' kelutap keetit age tugul ne tuon." 
2Kings17:11 Kibeelee yooto nyamdutik eng' komoswek tugul che torooreen, ko uu ye kiyaei pororyosyek che ki oon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tainnywa. Ki yai tuguuk che yaacheen kotach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konereech." 
2Kings17:12 Ki oot kanamonik, che ki kamwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji, “Amat oyai kiito.”" 
2Kings17:13 Ago kibaoryan Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kora agobo Israel, ak agobo Judah, eng' maotyot age tugul, ak keerindet age tugul koleenji, “Oweege eng' ortinwekwok che yaacheen, ak oriip ng'atuutikyuk ak kayomisutikyuk, ko uu Ng'atuutyet tugul ne ki ang'at kwanisyekwok, ak che ki ayookwok eng' eunegap otwogikyuk maotik.”" 
2Kings17:14 Ago ma cham kogas kora, ago ki iuit kaatiswekwak ko uu kwanisyekwak, che ki ma iyan Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa." 
2Kings17:15 Ki eesyo ng'atuutikyik ak kayomisennyi ne ki iyomiskei ak kwanisyekwak, ak paornatosyekyik che kibaoryan agobo icheek. Ki isup icheek tuguuk che po puch ak ki ek puch. Ki isup pororyosyek che kiga yiem icheek, che kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek agobo pichooto, koleenji, “Amat oyai ko uu ye yaei icheeget.”" 
2Kings17:16 Ki meto icheek ng'atuutik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ak koyachigei moek aeng' che po kanamonik che ki kitany ak ki yai Asera. Kigutung'ji icheek tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet, ak koot Baal." 
2Kings17:17 Ki igoito weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak kobun maat. Kiboisyee ng'oorset ak ponisosyek ak koaldagei koyai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotach ineendet konereech." 
2Kings17:18 Ki nereekyi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel miising', ak kong'eeto icheek eng' tainnyi. Ma ng'et agot agenge kobatee ooreetap Judah ineegei." 
2Kings17:19 Ma riip agine Judah ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ago kibendatee kaneetisyosyegap Israel che ki yai." 
2Kings17:20 Ki eesyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kesweek tugul che po Israel; ki inyaliil icheek ak konde eunegap piik che kiluul icheek, agoi kong'eeto icheek koba eng' tainnyi." 
2Kings17:21 Ye kibut Israel eng' kootap Daudi, ko ki yai Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat koek laitoryat. Ki imaas Jeroboam Israel si ma isup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogoochi icheek koyai tengekto ne oo." 
2Kings17:22 Kibendate piigap Israel tengekwogik tugul che po Jeroboam che ki yai; ma istoegei," 
2Kings17:23 agoi kong'eeto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' tainnyi, ko uu ye ki mwa eng' otwogikyik tugul, maotik. Ki kiluul anyun Israel kimut eng' emennywa koba emetap Assyria agoi ra." 
2Kings17:24 Ki imut `laitoryatap Assyria piik eng' Babilon, Kuta, Aba, Hamath ak Separbaim ak konde icheek nganasoogap Samaria kogeer piigap Israel. Ki punji icheek Samaria ak komeny nganasookyik." 
2Kings17:25 Ye ki toi komeny olooto, ko ki ma koywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki iyookyi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek ng'etuunyik, che kibar alak eng' icheek." 
2Kings17:26 Komwachi anyun laitoryatap Assyria, koleenji, “Ma ingen pororyosyechu koimutu inyoo inde nganasoogap Samaria kiit ne uu kamuktaindetap emonooto. Eng' nooto anyun, ko kogoyokyi icheek ng'etuunyik, ak parei icheek, amu ma ingen kiit ne uu kamuktaindetap emonooto.”" 
2Kings17:27 Kong'at anyun laitoryatap Assyria kole, “Omut age eng' tisiik che ki omutu eng' olooto kwo komeny olooto ak koneet icheek agobo kiit ne uu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap emonooto.”" 
2Kings17:28 Ki nyo anyun age eng' tisiik che kiga kimut koba eng' Samaria, ak konyo komeny Bethel, ak koneet icheek ole kanyool kogonyitito Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings17:29 Ago kiga yai pororyet age tugul kanamonikwak, ak konde kooriigap komoswek che torooreen che kiga teech Samarik, pororyet age tugul eng' nganasookwak che ki menyei." 
2Kings17:30 Ki yai piigap Babilon Sukot-benot, koyai piigap Kut Nergal, koyai Hamath Asima," 
2Kings17:31 ki yai Abik Nibas ak Tartak, ak ki peel Separbaik lagokwak kobeelji Adramelek ak Anamelek kanamonigap Separbaim." 
2Kings17:32 Koiywei icheek anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kolewenjigei eng' pichooto tisiik che po komoswek che torooreen, che kieng'jin tiseiywek eng' kooriigap komoswek che torooreen." 
2Kings17:33 Ki iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ago kiote kora kanamonikwak, ko uu ye ki iyweitoi pororyosyek eng' ole ki kiuune icheek kobwa." 
2Kings17:34 Yaei kora ko uu atebosyek che ki po tai agoi ra. Ma iywei `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amaisubi kaneetisyosyekwak, anan ko katigonutikwak, anan ng'atuutyet, anan kayomiset, che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lagogap Jakobo, ne kiguure ineendet Israel." 
2Kings17:35 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koyomiset ak icheeget, ki ng'at icheek koleenji, “Amoiywei kanamonik, anan ong'uruukyi, anan oot, anan oeng'ji tiseiywot." 
2Kings17:36 Ago oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki imutwak otogosu eng' emetap Misiri eng' kimnateet ne oo, eng' euut ne chuulaat, ong'uruukyi ineendet ak oeng'ji tiseiywot." 
2Kings17:37 Oriip oyai eng' peetuusyek tugul agoi, kaneetisyosyek ak katigonutik, ng'atuutyet ak kayomiset, che kisirwak. Amat oiywei kanamonik." 
2Kings17:38 Amat outye kayomiset ne ki kiyomiske kobootok, anan oiywei kanamonik." 
2Kings17:39 Ago oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'; ineendet ne sarwok eng' eunegap puunikwok tugul.” 
2Kings17:40 Ago ma kas, ki yai ko uu atebosyekwak che ki po tai." 
2Kings17:41 Ki iywei anyun pororyosyechuuto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kootei kanamonikwak che ki kiwai. Ki yai ko uu nooto lagokwak, ak lagogap lagokwak, ki yai ko uu kwanisyekwak, agoi ra." 
2Kings18:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Hezekiah weeriitap Ahaz laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap somok kobooch kolaitoran Hosea weeriitap Elah eng' Israel. 
2Kings18:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Hezekiah weeriitap Ahaz laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap somok kobooch kolaitoran Hosea weeriitap Elah eng' Israel. 
2Kings18:2 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak sogool eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Abi cheptap Zekariah." 
2Kings18:3 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu tugul che kiga yai Daudi kwandanyi." 
2Kings18:4 Ki isto komoswek che torooreen, kibut tolochik ak koluul tolochigap Asera. Kitui ereneetap sugunwet ne kiyaei Musa, ne kiguure Nehustan. Amu kibeeljin nyamdutik piigap Israel agoi peetuusyechooto." 
2Kings18:5 Ki imong' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel. Ki mata kobiit age kogeny eng' laitorinik tugul che po Judah ne kergei ak ineendet, anan ko eng' che ki po tai eng' ineendet." 
2Kings18:6 Amu ki namgei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma masta eng' kasubetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ki riip ng'atuutikyik, che ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa." 
2Kings18:7 Ak ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet; kibor eng' komosta age tugul ne ki wo. Ki ingelelji laitoryatap Assyria, ma oot ineendet." 
2Kings18:8 Ki par Philistiik kot koit Gaza ak kiwotosyekyik, kobooch teekseet ne kooi ne po riibiik agoi nganaseet ne ng'ootaat." 
2Kings18:9 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan ne po Hezekiah, ne ki kenyiitap tisap ne po Hoshea weeriitap Elah, laitoryatap Israel, kotogos Shalmaneser laitoryatap Assyria, kobookyi Samaria, ak koyiem." 
2Kings18:10 Ak kingo pata kenyiisyek somogu, konam nganasanooto. Ki kinam Samaria eng' kenyiitap lo ne po Hezekiah, ne ki kenyiitap sogool ne po Hoshea laitoryatap Israel." 
2Kings18:11 Ki imut `laitoryatap Assyria Israel koba Assyria, ak ki wo konde Hala ak Habor, aineetap Gosan ak nganasoogap Medes." 
2Kings18:12 Amu ki ma kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ago ki pistoe kayomisennyi, chooto tugul kiga ng'at Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma cham kogas anan koyai." 
2Kings18:13 Ki togos Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria eng' kenyiitap taman ak ang'wan ne po laitoryat Hezekiah, kobar nganasook tugul che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah ak konam." 
2Kings18:14 Ki iyookto Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah chiito kwo kaplaitoryatap Assyria eng' Lakish, koleenji, “Ki alel. Ui weektegei eng' oldanyu. Kiit age tugul ne igesenwo, alae.” Ak king'atyi laitoryatap Assyria Hezekiah, laitoryatap Judah keruutik eliphuusyek taman ak agenge che po fedha ak keruutik eliphuut agenge che po thahabu." 
2Kings18:15 Ki igoochi `Hezekiah ineendet fedhaisyek tugul che ki mi eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' konoraigap kootap laitoryat." 
2Kings18:16 Ki inem Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto thahabu eng' kereiywegap kurgotik ak eng' tolochik che kiga koliige Hezekiah kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogoochi laitoryatap Assyria." 
2Kings18:17 Ki iyookto laitoryatap Assyria Tartan ak Rab-saris ak Rabsake eng' Lakish kobooto lugeet ne oo, koba kaplaitoryat Hezekiah eng' Jerusalem. Ak kitogosta ak koit Jerusalem. Ak kingo it, koba kotononie kererchetap tamboiyot ne po meto, ne mi ooreet ne oo ne po kooretap mwetindet." 
2Kings18:18 Kingo kuur laitoryat, komong' Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah, konyo ole mi pichooto, ne ki pou koot, kobooto Sebna siriindet, ak Joah weeriitap Asaph siriindetap tuguuk che piitu." 
2Kings18:19 Ki leenji `Rabsake icheek, “Oleenji Hezekiah, ‘Kamwa ko uu ni laitoryat ne oo, laitoryatap Assyria, kole: Nee kamang'unoni imang'u?’" 
2Kings18:20 Ing'alaali ile, mi kirwooget ak kimnateetap lugeet, ago ng'aleegap puch. Ara ng'oo ne imang'u, si ingelelja?" 
2Kings18:21 Keero, imang'u kirokto ne po tegandani chisot, nooto ko Misiri: ne ngo tiegei chii, kotoorei eunnyi, kwo oriit! Uu nooto Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri eng' icheek tugul che imang'u ineendet. ”" 
2Kings18:22 Ago ngot oleenjo: “Kimang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo,” koma ineendet, ne ki isto Hezekiah komoswekyik che torooreen ak kapkorosusyekyik, ak koleenji Judah ak Jerusalem, “Osae eng' taitap kaptisisyoni eng' Jerusalem”?" 
2Kings18:23 Ara asoomin anyun nguno ale, igoochi kiptaiyandennyu laitoryatap Assyria kiit ne ibooru kayasyoet, si agoonin paraisisyek eliphuusyek aeng', ngot imuuchi eng' komostang'ung' inde piik che laanyei paraisisyechooto." 
2Kings18:24 Imuktoi ano anyun iweech togeetap kiptaiyat agenge ne ming'in eng' otwogik tugul che po kiptaiyandennyu, ak imang'u Misiri amu kariisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek?" 
2Kings18:25 Ara anyun, kanyo koma kimi ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyo abar oli, ang'em? Koleenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Togoste par emoni, ak ing'em.”" 
2Kings18:26 Koleenji anyun Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah, ak Sebna, ak Joah, Rabsake, “Asoomin ale, ng'alaalji otwogiguk eng' kutitap Syria; amu kigase. Mating'alaalwech eng' kutitap Yahudik, kogasei piik che mi irimeet parak.”" 
2Kings18:27 Ago ki leenji `Rabsake icheek, “Kagoyokwo kiptaiyandennyu anyo ye mi kiptaiyandeng'ung', ak oldang'ung', si kobiit amwa ng'aleechu? Tos ma iyookwo anyo ye mi pichu iburi eng' irimeet parak, si koam ng'atateekwak ak koe peekwak kobootok?”" 
2Kings18:28 Yeityo kotonon Rabsake ak komwa eng' kutit ne oo eng' kutitap Yahudik ak kong'alaal kole, “Ogas okweek ng'olyootap laitoryat ne oo, laitoryatap Assyria!" 
2Kings18:29 Kamwa laitoryat kole, Among' koberberak Hezekiah, amu ma imuuchi kosarwok eng' eunnyi." 
2Kings18:30 Among' kogoonok Hezekiah omang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Sarwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iman, ak ma kigoochin nganasanio laitoryatap Assyria." 
2Kings18:31 Amat ogas ng'aleegap Hezekiah. Kamwa ko uu ni laitoryatap Assyria, kole: Oyai kaalyeet kobooto ak omong'u obwa ole ami. Yeityo koam chii tugul che po sabibukyik ak che po mogoywennyi ak koe chii tugul che po peegap keriingennyi," 
2Kings18:32 agoi anyo amutak obe emet ne kergei ak emeng'wong', emetap peek ak divaik, emetap amitwogik ak mbareenigap sabibuk, emetap mwanigap mseituni ak kumyat, si kobiit osapche, amobegu. Amogas Hezekiah, ye igoigook, kole, ‘Sarwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’" 
2Kings18:33 Tos ki kobiit eng' kamuktaigap pororyosyek ne ki sar emennyi eng' eutap laitoryatap Assyria? 
2Kings18:34 Mi ano kamuktaigap Hamath, ak che po Arpad? Mi ano kamuktaigap Separbaim, Hena ak Iba? Tos ki sar chooto Samarik eng' eunnyu?" 
2Kings18:35 Ng'oo eng' kamuktaik tugul che po emotinwek, che ki kosar emennywa eng' eunnyu, kot kosar `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jerusalem eng' eunnyu?”" 
2Kings18:36 Ago ki siisyo piik, ma wolji ineendet ng'olyoo, amu kiga ng'at laitoryat kole, “Amat owolji kiy.”" 
2Kings18:37 Ki pa anyun Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah ne ki pou koot, ak Sebna, siriindet, kobooto Joah weeriitap Asaph siriindetap tuguuk che piitu, ole mi Hezekiah ko kagogereer ngoroikwak, kobwa komwachi ineendet ng'aleegap Rabsake." 
2Kings19:1 Ak kingo kas Laitoryat Hezekiah, kogereer ngoroikyik, kotugegei kuniok ak kwo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings19:2 Ki iyookto Eliakim, ne ki pou koonnyi, ak Sebna siriindet, ak poisyegap tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaiah maotyot, weeriitap Amos." 
2Kings19:2 Ki iyookto Eliakim, ne ki pou koonnyi, ak Sebna siriindet, ak poisyegap tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaiah maotyot, weeriitap Amos." 
2Kings19:2 Ki iyookto Eliakim, ne ki pou koonnyi, ak Sebna siriindet, ak poisyegap tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaiah maotyot, weeriitap Amos." 
2Kings19:3 Ki leenji ineendet, “Kamwa Hezekiah kole: Peetuuni ko peetuutap nyalilda, kereetap kong' ak chubisyet, amu kait kesich lagok, ama mi kimnateet ne kesige." 
2Kings19:4 Abeere imuuchi kogas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ng'aleek tugul che po Rabsake, ne kagoyok `laitoryatap Assyria kiptaiyandennyi, konyo kochot Kamuktaindet ne sabei, ak koger kong' ng'aleek che kagas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Ara anyun saa agobo piik che ng'etunotiin.”" 
2Kings19:5 Kobwa anyun otwogigap Laitoryat Hezekiah ole mi Isaiah. 
2Kings19:5 Kobwa anyun otwogigap Laitoryat Hezekiah ole mi Isaiah. 
2Kings19:6 Ki leenji `Isaiah icheek, “Omwachini kiptaiyandeng'wong' ko uu ni, oleenjini, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Meiywei ng'aleek che kegas, che kachubena otwogigap laitoryatap Assyria." 
2Kings19:6 Ki leenji `Isaiah icheek, “Omwachini kiptaiyandeng'wong' ko uu ni, oleenjini, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Meiywei ng'aleek che kegas, che kachubena otwogigap laitoryatap Assyria." 
2Kings19:7 Keero! Andoi ineendet chesawil, si ko kas ng'aleegap piik, koweek kwo emennyi, ak agoite kebar eng' rotwetap chok eng' emennyi.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Kingo kas Rabsake kole kikwa laitoryatap Assyria eng' Lakish, kogiweek anyun ak koitita kobaregei laitoryat ak Libna." 
2Kings19:9 Kingo kas kemwaei agobo Tiraka laitoryatap Kush, keele, nyoonei kobarge ak ineendet, koyookto piik kogeny koba kap Hezekiah, koleenji:" 
2Kings19:10 “Omwachini Hezekiah, laitoryatap Judah, oleenjini: Amengoberberin Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne imang'u, koleenjin, ‘Ma kigoitoi Jerusalem kwo eutap laitoryatap Assyria.’" 
2Kings19:11 Ki igas iman kiit ne ki koyachi laitorinigap Assyria emotinwek tugul, eng' ng'emet ne king'em icheek kogees. Tos kisaruun inyee?" 
2Kings19:12 Tos ki sar icheek `kamuktaigap pororyosyek che ki par kwanisyekyuk, Gosan, Haran, Resep, ak lagogap Eden che ki mi Telasar?" 
2Kings19:13 Mi ano laitoryatap Hamath, laitoryatap Arpad, ak laitoryatap nganaseetap Separbaim, anan ne po Hena, ak Iba?”" 
2Kings19:14 Ki nam Hezekiah parweet eng' eutap piik che kiga kiyok ak kosoman. Ki togosta Hezekiah kwo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koiito parwaanooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Kings19:15 Ak ki sa Hezekiah eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne tebee kerubisyek, ii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor inyee inyegei, ne po laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony. Ki iyai kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
2Kings19:16 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ep iit ak igas, yaat konyeguk ak igeer, kas ng'aleegap Sennacherib, che kaiyogune chiito konyo kochot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne sabei." 
2Kings19:17 Iman, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki kobar laitorinigap Assyria pororyosyek ak emotinwekwak kowechawech." 
2Kings19:18 Ki kowiirchi ma kanamonikwak ak king'em anyun tuguuchooto. Ki ma ko kamuktaik, ago ki keetiik ak koik, che poisyetap eunegap piik." 
2Kings19:19 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, asaain ale sarwech eng' eunnyi, si konai laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony kole ii Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, inyee inyegei.”" 
2Kings19:20 Ki iyookto anyun Isaiah weeriitap Amos chiito kwo kap Hezekiah, koleenji, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, ‘Ko uu ye kaisaa agobo Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria, ko kaagasin.’" 
2Kings19:20 Ki iyookto anyun Isaiah weeriitap Amos chiito kwo kap Hezekiah, koleenji, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, ‘Ko uu ye kaisaa agobo Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria, ko kaagasin.’" 
2Kings19:20 Ki iyookto anyun Isaiah weeriitap Amos chiito kwo kap Hezekiah, koleenji, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, ‘Ko uu ye kaisaa agobo Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria, ko kaagasin.’" 
2Kings19:21 Ni ng'olyoot ne kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo ineendet: Kasasin pergeiyat cheptap Zion, kororechin ak kochotin. Kagolelech metinnyi cheptap Jerusalem eng' inyee." 
2Kings19:22 Ng'oo ne ki ichot ak ichup? Ng'oo ne ki ibolji? Ak ng'oo ne injururi? Nooto ko Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel! 
2Kings19:23 Koichot Kiptaiyat eng' piiguk che koiyoogu, koile: Anyoone kot aitu paragutap tuloonook kobooto chaang'indap kariisyekyuk, kot aitu oriit eng' Lebanon. Aluuli taragonikyik che kooen, ak piribirinikyik che korooron. Achute komosta ne ki menyei oriit inne, timdap mbareennyi ne rurei." 
2Kings19:24 Ki abal che ki ma angen, ak aee peek eng' olooto, eng' keldebesaigap keelyekyuk, ateeny anyun ainoosyek tugul che po Misiri." 
2Kings19:25 ‘Tom igas ole ki ayaite eng' keny? Ki ayai eng' peetuusyek che po keny nooto kaasulde nguno, si kobiit ibut nganasook che ng'ootaatiin koek karurugutik che ki king'em.’" 
2Kings19:26 Ki ek anyun piikwak, che tinyei kimnateet ne ming'in, ki meiyo mugulelwekwak ak kokwong'yo. Ki igei susweegap keeweet, ak koigei sogeek che ng'orng'or, ki igei susweek che mi kooriik parak, ak ko uu peek che kilalyo kotom koeegitu." 
2Kings19:27 Ago angen kabuureng'ung', mandaeng'ung' ak nyonuneng'ung' ne inyone ko, ak nereegeguk che koroomen agobo anee." 
2Kings19:28 Amu nereegeguk che koroomen agobo anee, ak amu kogoit itiikyuk loseng'ung' pogei, andoi anyun kombet serung'ung', ak ande karnennyu kuting'ung'. Aweechin anyun ibun ooreet ne ki ibunu.”" 
2Kings19:29 Yeityo komwachi `Isaiah laitoryat Hezekiah “Egu ni kaboorunet ne kiboorun: oame eng' kenyini che piitos icheegei, ak oam eng' kenyiitap aeng' che syegune chooto. Eng' kenyiitap somok, ogol ak oges ak omin keetiigap sabibuk, ak oam logoekwak." 
2Kings19:29 Yeityo komwachi `Isaiah laitoryat Hezekiah “Egu ni kaboorunet ne kiboorun: oame eng' kenyini che piitos icheegei, ak oam eng' kenyiitap aeng' che syegune chooto. Eng' kenyiitap somok, ogol ak oges ak omin keetiigap sabibuk, ak oam logoekwak." 
2Kings19:30 Ak iywoktogei kobendi ng'wony tigitigap che ng'etu eng' kootap Judah ak koiyo logoek eng' parak. 
2Kings19:31 Amu mandoi eng' Jerusalem che kang'et, ak chilildos eng' tulweetap Zion. Yaei niito kagiiletapkei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings19:32 “Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo laitoryatap Assyria, kole, ‘Ma itu ineendet nganasani, ama mwogei yooto eng' kipchabet, ama nyoonei tainnyi kotinyei long'eet, ama wasyin ng'ung'unyek." 
2Kings19:33 Weegegei ooreet ne ki punu, ama itu nganasani,’ mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings19:34 ‘Amu ariibe nganasani, asaru, agobo anee ak agobo Daudi otwogindennyu.’ ”" 
2Kings19:35 Ki manda malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kemounooto ak kobar piik eliphuusyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak muut eng' nganaseetap piigap Assyria. Kingo ng'eetyo piik karon, ko ki muuswek tugul, che kogobek." 
2Kings19:36 Kwo anyun Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria, koweek ak kwo komeny Nineveh." 
2Kings19:37 Ak ye kita kosaaei eng' kootap Nisrok kanamwennyi, kobar ineendet Adramelek ak Sareser eng' rotwetap chok, ak ki mwei koba emetap Ararat. Ak ki laitoran Esarhaddon weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Kings20:1 Kimyan Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto kot ko neegit kome. Ki nyoonji maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos, ak koleenji ineendet, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Rarchi keet piigap koong'ung'; amu imee, mesabe.”" 
2Kings20:1 Kimyan Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto kot ko neegit kome. Ki nyoonji maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos, ak koleenji ineendet, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Rarchi keet piigap koong'ung'; amu imee, mesabe.”" 
2Kings20:1 Kimyan Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto kot ko neegit kome. Ki nyoonji maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos, ak koleenji ineendet, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Rarchi keet piigap koong'ung'; amu imee, mesabe.”" 
2Kings20:2 Kowelel anyun togeennyi kogeer inaat, ak kosa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole," 
2Kings20:3 “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asaain ale, ibwaat ole ki atepte eng' imanda eng' taing'ung', ak eng' muguleldo ne ititaat, ak ayai ne myee eng' taing'ung'.” Ak ki riir Hezekiah eng' ng'wanindo." 
2Kings20:4 Ak ye ki tomo koit Isaiah kwenutap nganaseet, konyonji ineendet ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji," 
2Kings20:4 Ak ye ki tomo koit Isaiah kwenutap nganaseet, konyonji ineendet ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji," 
2Kings20:5 “Weege kogeny, ak ileenji Hezekiah pounindetap piikyuk, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwandang'ung' Daudi, kole: Kaagas saaeng'ung', kaageer peeguk po kong'; ara asaabin anyun. Itogostoi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap somok." 
2Kings20:6 Atesyini peetuusyeguk kenyiisyek taman ak muut. Ak asaruun kobooto nganasani eng' eunegap laitoryatap Assyria. Ariibe nganasani agobo anee, ak agobo otwogindennyu Daudi.”" 
2Kings20:7 Ki le Isaiah, “Oibu magatyat ne po logoegap mogoonik.” Koip anyun ak konde ole ki mi myando ne uu ondiryet, ak kisop." 
2Kings20:7 Ki le Isaiah, “Oibu magatyat ne po logoegap mogoonik.” Koip anyun ak konde ole ki mi myando ne uu ondiryet, ak kisop." 
2Kings20:8 Ki leenji `Hezekiah Isaiah, “Nee kaboorunet ne ibooru kole isooba Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si atogosta kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap somok?”" 
2Kings20:8 Ki leenji `Hezekiah Isaiah, “Nee kaboorunet ne ibooru kole isooba Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si atogosta kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap somok?”" 
2Kings20:9 Ki mwa Isaiah kole, “Egu kii kaboorunet ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne iboorun kole yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiit ne kamwa: Wo urwet tai tilutik taman, anan wo let tilutik taman?”" 
2Kings20:9 Ki mwa Isaiah kole, “Egu kii kaboorunet ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne iboorun kole yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiit ne kamwa: Wo urwet tai tilutik taman, anan wo let tilutik taman?”" 
2Kings20:10 Ki mwa Hezekiah kole, “Kiit ne nyumnyum eng' urwet kwo tai tilutik taman, achicha. Ingoweek urwet kwo let tilutik taman.”" 
2Kings20:11 Ki riirchi maotyot `Isaiah Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak kiweech urwet kwo let tilutik taman, eng' che kiga korekto eng' kiit ne kirogendoe saisyek ne po Ahaz." 
2Kings20:11 Ki riirchi maotyot `Isaiah Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak kiweech urwet kwo let tilutik taman, eng' che kiga korekto eng' kiit ne kirogendoe saisyek ne po Ahaz." 
2Kings20:12 Ki iyookyi Berodak-baladan weeriitap Baladan, laitoryatap Babilon, paronok ak kagoochinet Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto, amu kiga kogas kole ki komyan Hezekiah." 
2Kings20:13 Ki kas Hezekiah icheek, ak koboorchi icheek koot tugul ne po tuguukyik che po kamanuutyet ne oo, fedha, thahabu, nyamdutik, mwanik che po kamanuutyet ne oo, kootap kariikyik che po lugeet ak tuguuk tugul che ki mi ole mi konoraikyik. Ma ng'et kiy eng' koonnyi anan ko pounatennyi tugul ne ma iboorchi Hezekiah icheek." 
2Kings20:14 Ki nyo anyun Isaiah maotyot ole mi Laitoryat Hezekiah ak koleenji, “Kale nee pichu? Ak kobwanei oldang'ung' kobunu ano?” Ak ki le Hezekiah, “Kabunu emet ne loo, kobunu Babilon.”" 
2Kings20:14 Ki nyo anyun Isaiah maotyot ole mi Laitoryat Hezekiah ak koleenji, “Kale nee pichu? Ak kobwanei oldang'ung' kobunu ano?” Ak ki le Hezekiah, “Kabunu emet ne loo, kobunu Babilon.”" 
2Kings20:15 Ak ki le ineendet, “Kagogeer nee eng' koong'ung'?” Ak kowol Hezekiah kole, “Kagogeer tuguuk tugul che mi koonnyu, ma ng'et kiy eng' konoraikyuk ne ma aboorchi.”" 
2Kings20:16 Ki leenji Isaiah Hezekiah, “Kas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
2Kings20:16 Ki leenji Isaiah Hezekiah, “Kas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
2Kings20:17 Keero, pwoonei peetuusyek, che tuun ki ibei tuguuk tugul che mi koong'ung' koba Babilon, ak tuguuk tugul che ki konor kwanisyeguk agoi ra. Ma mi kiy ne ng'etu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Kings20:18 Tuun kimuti alak eng' weeriiguk che mong'unenen, che isiche, ak koba koek icheek che ki kimooch eng' kootap laitoryatap Babilon.”" 
2Kings20:19 Koleenji anyun `Hezekiah Isaiah, “Myee ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kemwa.” Komwa kogeny kole, “Tos ma myee kotep ko uu nooto, katai komi kaalyeet ak imanda eng' peetuusyekyuk?”" 
2Kings20:19 Koleenji anyun `Hezekiah Isaiah, “Myee ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kemwa.” Komwa kogeny kole, “Tos ma myee kotep ko uu nooto, katai komi kaalyeet ak imanda eng' peetuusyekyuk?”" 
2Kings20:20 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Hezekiah, kimnateennyi tugul, ole kiyaita tamboiyot ak kererchet ak koip peek koba nganaseet, ko tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyek ne po laitorinigap Judah?" 
2Kings20:21 Ki ru Hezekiah kobooto kwanisyekyik. Ak ki laitoran Manasseh weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Kings21:1 Ki po kenyiisyek taman ak aeng' Manasseh ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek konom ak muut eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Hepsi-ba." 
2Kings21:2 Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koosup tuguuk che kiwechei che po pororyosyek, che ki oon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap piigap Israel." 
2Kings21:3 Amu ki teech kogeny komoswek che torooreen che kiga kobut Hezekiah kwandanyi; kiteekyi Baal kapkorosusyek ak koyai Asera ko uu ye kiga yai Ahab laitoryatap Israel. Kigutung'ji ineendet tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet ak koot. 
2Kings21:4 Ki teech kapkorosusyek eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo koyooto kole, “Andoi kainennyu Jerusalem.”" 
2Kings21:5 Kiteekyi kapkorosusyek tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet eng' seremusyek tuwai che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Kings21:6 Ki igoito weeriinnyi kobun maat, king'orso ak koboisyee ponisyet, ak kobois kobooto piik che poisyee oik ak pooniik. Ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotach ineendet konereech." 
2Kings21:7 Ki inde kanamwet ne ki kiwai ne po Asera koot ne ki kamwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi ak weeriinnyi Solomon, koleenji, “Andoi kainennyu koigeny koi ak Jerusalem, ne ki alewen eng' ortinwek tugul che po Israel."
