1Chronicles12:28 ak Zadok, neraneet ne ki kiim ak ko nyigan, ak kiptainik tiptem ak aeng' che po kootap kwandanyi." 
1Chronicles12:29 Che po lagogap Benjamin, tupchosyegap Saulo ko ki eliphuusyek somok, amu kita konamegei kebeberta ne oo ne po pichooto ak kootap Saulo agoi peetuunooto." 
1Chronicles12:30 Che po lagogap Ephraim, ko ki piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak sisiit, che kiimeen che nyigoonen, piik che taagunotiin eng' kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
1Chronicles12:31 Che po kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, ko ki eliphuusyek taman ak sisiit che kiga kimwa eng' kainaik, si kobwa koyai Daudi koek laitoryat." 
1Chronicles12:32 Che po lagogap Issakar, che ki iguitos agobo peetuusyek, che ki ingen kiit ne kanyool koyai Israel ko ki pogol aeng' kandoikwak, ak kigase iit icheek tupchosyekwak tugul." 
1Chronicles12:33 Che po Zebulun, ko ki ek eliphuusyek konom che ki imuuchi komanda koba lugeet, che ingen koborisye kariik alak tugul che po lugeet, che ki imuuchi kong'at lugeet, ak ki tinyei muguleldo ne pekyinot." 
1Chronicles12:34 Che po Naphtali, ko ki kiptainik eliphuut agenge, ak ki mi kobooto icheeget, piik eliphuusyek sosomu ak tisap che ki tinyei long'onik ak ng'otwek." 
1Chronicles12:35 Che po Danik, che ki imuuchi kotet lugeet, ko ki eliphuusyek tiptem ak sisiit ak pogol lo." 
1Chronicles12:36 Che po Asher, che ki imuuchi komanda koba lugeet, che ki imuuchi kotet lugeet, ko ki eliphuusyek artam." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ak eng' pitoniin eng' Jordan, ne po piigap Reuben, piigap Gad ak ne po kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, che ki tinyei kariik alak tugul che po pooryeet che yaei lugeet, ko ki mi piik eliphuusyek pogolu agenge ak tiptem." 
1Chronicles12:38 Ki pwa Hebron chuuto tugul eng' muguleldo ne ititaat che icheeget ko piigap lugeet, che ki imuuchi kong'eet lugeet. Ki pwa icheek yooto si koyai Daudi koek laitoryat koboi Israel tugul. Piik tugul che ki ng'et ak icheek che po Israel ko ki tinyei mageet agenge koyai Daudi koek laitoryat." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ki tebi icheek eng' yooto ak Daudi peetuusyek somok, koamisyei ak koeisei, amu kiga chopchi tuguuk tupchosyekwak." 
1Chronicles12:40 Ak icheek che ki neegitee pichooto, kobooch Issakar Zebulun ak Naphtali, ko ki ip amitwogik eng' sigiroik ak tambeesik, ak eng' nyumbusyek, ak eiik. Ki mi amitwogik che po peek che ng'ootiin, magatiinik che po mogoonik, mooriik che mi logoek che po sabibuk che yamyotiin, divaik, mwanik, eiik ak keechiirek che chaang', amu ki mi poiboiyet Israel." 
1Chronicles13:1 Ki inaisechigei Daudi ak kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak che po pogolusyek, ak kandoindet age tugul." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ki leenji Daudi tuiyet tugul ne po Israel, “Ngot ogeere ole myee eng' okweek, ak ngot kobunu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ogany kiyookte tupchosyekyok che kang'et eng' komosta age tugul ne mi emet tugul ne po Israel, kobooto Tisiik ak Lawiik che mi ak icheek nganasookwak che tinyei ole kiyagisye.Ongiyookte koyumgei ak kobwa ole kimi." 
1Chronicles13:3 Ongeibu kogeny moingetap Kamuktaindennyo konyo ole kimi, amu ki ma kimage kiy moingonooto eng' peetuusyegap Saulo.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Ki iyan tuiyet tugul kole yaei ko uu nooto, amu ki myeiit kioto eng' taitap piik tugul." 
1Chronicles13:5 Koyum anyun Daudi tuiyet tugul ne po Israel, kobooch Sihor aineetap Misiri kot koit ole kimandoe Lebo-hamath, koip moingetap Kamuktaindet eng' Kiriath-Jearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Ki togosta Daudi kobooto Israel tugul koba Baala yooto ko Kiriath-Jearim, ne ki po Judah, koip eng' olooto moingetap Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne tebee kerubisyek, ne kimwaitoe kainanooto." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ki ibune moingetap Kamuktaindet chepkichutit ne kita ko leel, komong' eng' kootap Abinadab. Ki kweri chepkichutinooto Uzzah ak Ahio." 
1Chronicles13:8 Ki ureren Daudi kobooto Israel tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet eng' kimnateennywa tugul, eng' tyenwogik, ketubosyek, kibugandinik, sugutisyek che mengeechen, sanisyek che po sugunonik che kibirei ak iryagook." 
1Chronicles13:9 Kingo it rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Kidon, koyogooito eunnyi Uzzah kole koti moinget amu kiterteryot eiik." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ki nereekyi kot `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Uzzah ak ki par ineendet amu ki iyogoito eunnyi konam moinget. Kime eng' yooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet. 
1Chronicles13:11 Ki nereech kot Daudi amu ki par eng' nereegek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Uzzah. Ak kiguure yooto Peres-usa agoi ra. 
1Chronicles13:12 Ki iywei `Daudi Kamuktaindet peetuunooto ak kole, “Amuktoi ano aip moingetap Kamuktaindet konyo kaa ole ami?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Mata koip anyun Daudi moinget kwo oldanyi eng' nganasennyi, ago ki imaas kwo kootap Obed-edom Gitindet." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ki tebi moingetap Kamuktaindet eng' kap Obed-edom arawek somok, ak ki iberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Obed-edom ak tuguuk tugul che ki tinyei." 
1Chronicles14:1 Ki iyookto `Hiram laitoryatap Tyro piik koba kap Daudi koipchi taragonik; kiyookyi piik che waei koik ak musogigap pagoinik koba koteekyi ineendet koot. 
1Chronicles14:2 Ak ki nai Daudi kole kogogimiit `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet koek laitoryatap Israel amu ki kitoroor laitornatennyi, amu piikyik Israel." 
1Chronicles14:3 Ki itun Daudi osotik alak eng' Jerusalem, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik alak." 
1Chronicles14:4 Chu ko kainaigap lagok che kisichei eng' Jerusalem: Samua, Sobap, Nathan, Solomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibar, Elisua, Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nepeg, Japia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama, Beeliada ak Eliphelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Kingo kas Philistiik kole kogiil Daudi koek laitoryatap Israel tugul, kotogosta Philistiik koba kocheeng' Daudi, ak ki kas Daudi ak kwo kobargei ak icheek." 
1Chronicles14:9 Kiga kobwa Philistiik kobookyi atebweetap Repaim. 
1Chronicles14:10 ki teebee Daudi Kamuktaindet koleenji, “Atogoste awe kebarge ak Philistiik? Tos inde eunnyu icheek?” Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, “Togoste, amu andoi icheek eung'ung'.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Kotogos anyun kobwa Baal-perasim, ak ki parchi `Daudi icheek yooto. Ki le ineendet, “Kagoiyesta Kamuktaindet puunikyuk eng' eunnyu, ko uu peek che iyestoi.” Koguure anyun kainetap koronooto Baal-perasim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Kiga pagage olooto kanamonikwak, ak ki ng'at Daudi kebel, ak ki kibeel eng' maat." 
1Chronicles14:13 Kita kobookyi kogeny atebwonooto Philistiik. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ak kiteebe Daudi kogeny Kamuktaindet, ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ineendet, “Amat itogoste isup icheek, ui taban si ichee icheek eng' ye itoorchingei keetiigap logoek." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ak ye igas cheetap panda eng' keetichooto po logoek parak, iwe anyun obargei, amu kagondoenen Kamuktaindet kwo kobar lugeetap Philistiik.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Ki yai Daudi ko uu ye ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ineendet; ki par lugeetap Philistiik kobooch Gibeon agoi Gezer. 
1Chronicles14:17 Ki yom emotinwek tugul tagunatetap Daudi ak ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyek tugul koywei ineendet. 
1Chronicles15:1 Ki teekyigei Daudi kooriik eng' nganaseetap Daudi, ki chop ole tebee moingetap Kamuktaindet ak kolumdochi moingonooto emait." 
1Chronicles15:2 Yeityo kong'at Daudi kole, “Ma nyolu koip chii age tugul moingetap Kamuktaindet kobatee Lawiik icheegei, amu ki kolewen `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ak koboisyechi ineendet koigeny.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Ki iyum `Daudi Israel tugul eng' Jerusalem si koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotogos konyo komostanyi ne kiga kochopchi ineendet. 
1Chronicles15:4 Ki iyum `ineendet weeriigap Aron kobooto Lawiik: 
1Chronicles15:5 che po weeriigap Kohat, ne oo ko ki Uriel, ak tupchosyekyik pogol ak tiptem;" 
1Chronicles15:6 che po weeriigap Merari, ne oo ko ki Asaiah, ak tupchosyekyik pogol aeng' ak tiptem;" 
1Chronicles15:7 che po weeriigap Gershom, ne oo ko ki Joel, ak tupchosyekyik pogol ak sosom;" 
1Chronicles15:7 che po weeriigap Gershom, ne oo ko ki Joel, ak tupchosyekyik pogol ak sosom;" 
1Chronicles15:8 che po weeriigap Elizaphan, ne oo ko ki Semaiah, ak tupchosyekyik pogol aeng';" 
1Chronicles15:9 che po weeriigap Hebron, ne oo ko ki Eliel, ak tupchosyekyik tamanwogik sisiit;" 
1Chronicles15:10 che po weeriigap Uzziel, ne oo ko ki Aminadab, ak tupchosyekyik pogol ak taman ak aeng'." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ki kuur `Daudi tisiik Zadok ak Abiathar, ak koguur Lawiik: Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Semaiah, Eliel ak Aminadab." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ki kuur `Daudi tisiik Zadok ak Abiathar, ak koguur Lawiik: Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Semaiah, Eliel ak Aminadab." 
1Chronicles15:12 Ki leenji icheek, “Oo kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po Lawiik. Otiliilgei okweek ak tupchosyekwok si oibu moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kotogos konyo komosta ne koachopchi." 
1Chronicles15:13 Amu ki ma oip okweek yuginye, kobar anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, chiito eng' acheek amu ki ma ki cheeng' ineendet ko uu ye ki king'at.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Ki itiliilgei anyun Tisiik ak Lawiik si koip moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kotogos." 
1Chronicles15:15 Ki ip lagogap Lawiik moingetap Kamuktaindet eng' tigigoikwak eng' keetiik che ki ibe, ko uu ye kiga ng'at Musa ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles15:16 Ki mwachi Daudi che eecheen che po Lawiik kolewen tupchosyekwak tyeniik, ak tuguuk che kibutei, che chooto ko kibugandinik, ketubosyek sanisyek che po sugunonik che kibirei kebut kocheiyo miising', ak kotyenso eng' kagasetapkei." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ki lewen anyun `Lawiik Herman weeriitap Joel; ak eng' tupchosyekyik, kolewen Asaph weeriitap Berekiah; ak eng' weeriigap Merari tupchosyekwak, kolewen Ethan weeriitap Kusaia;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Ki lewen anyun `Lawiik Herman weeriitap Joel; ak eng' tupchosyekyik, kolewen Asaph weeriitap Berekiah; ak eng' weeriigap Merari tupchosyekwak, kolewen Ethan weeriitap Kusaia;" 
1Chronicles15:18 ak ki mi kobooto icheek tupchosyekwak che kirubei icheek eng' etunateet: Zekariah, Ben, Jaasyel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Uni, Eliap, Benaiah, Maseia, Matitia, Elipeleu, Mikneia, Obed-edom ak Jeiel riibiigap kurgotik." 
1Chronicles15:19 Tyeniik anyun ko ki Herman, Asaph, ak Ethan, che ki tinyei sanisyegap sugunonik che kibirei kocheiyo miising';" 
1Chronicles15:20 kobooto Zekariah, Asyel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Uni, Eliap, Maaseia ak Benaiah, che ki tinyei kibugandinik che po cheetap Alamot," 
1Chronicles15:21 ak Matitia, Elipeleu, Mikneia, Obed-edom, Jeiel ak Azaziah che kibutei ketubosyek che po cheetap Seminit, si kondochi." 
1Chronicles15:22 Ki pou Kenania, ne oo eng' Lawiik, tyenwogik; ki ineeti piik tyendo, amu ki utaat ineendet." 
1Chronicles15:23 Ki riibiigap kurgeetap ole ki mi moinget Berekiah ak Elkanah. 
1Chronicles15:24 Ki kuut iryagook eng' taitap moingetap Kamuktaindet tisiik: Sebania, Josapat, Nethanel, Amashai, Zekariah, Benaiah ak Elieser. Ki riibiigap kurgeetap ole ki mi moinget Obed-edom ak Jeia." 
1Chronicles15:25 Ki wo anyun Daudi kobooto poisyegap Israel ak kiptainik che ki pou eliphuusyek, koba koip eng' kagasetapkei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotogos eng' kootap Obed-edom." 
1Chronicles15:26 Kingo kagotoret `Kamuktaindet Lawiik che ki ibei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koeny kiruugik tisap ak mengichik tisap." 
1Chronicles15:27 Ki ilaachi Daudi ngoryeet ne po katanit ne karaaran, kobooto Lawiik tugul che ki ibei moinget, ak tyeniik, ak Kenania kandoindetap tyeniik. Ki ilaachi kora Daudi ephod ne po katanit." 
1Chronicles15:28 Koip anyun `Israel tugul moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotogos kogasanugei eng' tuugeet ne oo, ak koguutonu iryagook, ak kobironu sanisyek che po sugunonik, ak kobutonu kibugandinik ak ketubosyek." 
1Chronicles15:29 Kingo it `moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseetap Daudi, koiitito Mikal cheptap Saulo eng' tirisia, kogeer Daudi kourereni ak kogasigei; ki sas ineendet eng' muguleldanyi." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ki ip anyun moingetap Kamuktaindet ak konde kwenutap emait ne kiga teekyi Daudi ak ki igoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet. 
1Chronicles16:2 Kingo kagogees Daudi kogoitoetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet, koberuur piik eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles16:3 Yeityo kogoochi chii age tugul ne po Israel, ne muren ak kwony, magatyat, pendo kitigin ak magatyatap sabibuk che yamyotiin." 
1Chronicles16:4 Ki lewen alak eng' Lawiik kobois eng' taitap moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koyai kabwaatet, komwachin kongoi, ak kolasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel;" 
1Chronicles16:5 Chooto ko ki chu: ki ne oo Asaph, korubei Zekariah, ak Jeiel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Matitia, Eliap, Benaiah, Obed-edom ak Jeiel. Kibutei icheek kibugandinik ak ketubosyek; kibirei Asaph sanisyek che po sugunonik kocheiyo miising';" 
1Chronicles16:6 ak kiguutei kotugul iryagook tisiik Benaiah ak Jahasyel eng' taitap moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet. 
1Chronicles16:7 Ki ng'at ne po tai anyun Daudi eng' peetuunooto Asaph ak tupchosyekyik kole kewekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi. 
1Chronicles16:8 Oweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, oguur kainennyi; ongonaak poisyonikyik eng' piik tugul." 
1Chronicles16:9 Otyenji, otyenji kalasunoik; ong'alaale poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Olasunegei kainennyi ne tiliil; ingoboiboitu mugulelwegap icheek che cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
1Chronicles16:11 Ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kimnateennyi; ocheeng' togeennyi kotugul. 
1Chronicles16:12 Obwaat poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee che ki koyai; kwang'utikyik ak kirwoogutigap kutinnyi," 
1Chronicles16:13 ee okweek kesweegap Israel kiboityondennyi, okweek lagogap Jakobo, chechiik che kigelewen." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo; miitei kirwoogutikyik ng'wony komugul." 
1Chronicles16:15 Ibwaate kayomisennyi koigeny, ng'olyoot ne king'atyi ibinwek eliphuut." 
1Chronicles16:16 Arorutyet ne ki yai kobooto Abraham, ak kayosyennyi ne ki iyasyechi Isak." 
1Chronicles16:17 Ki igimityi Jakobo nooto koek ng'atuutyet, ki igimityi Israel koek kayomiset ne po koigeny," 
1Chronicles16:18 koleenji, “Agoonin emetap Kanaan, koek kebebertap poroteng'ung'.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Ye kita ko oo piik che ng'ering', ee ki oo ng'ering' miising', ak ki oo toek eng' olooto." 
1Chronicles16:20 Kibendat icheek kobunoot pororyet age agoi pororyet age, kobooch laitornatet age agoi age." 
1Chronicles16:21 Ki ma chamji chii koyachi icheek ne ya; ee amu icheek, ko ki kergong' laitorinik:" 
1Chronicles16:22 Kole, “Amat otwaa chechuuk che iilaatin, amoyachi ne ya maotikyuk.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ng'wony komugul; omwaite yetunennyi eng' peetuut age tugul." 
1Chronicles16:24 Omwaite toroornatennyi eng' pororyosyek, poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee eng' piik tugul." 
1Chronicles16:25 Amu oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nyolu kilas ineendet miising'; kanyool kiywei ineendet kosiir kamuktaik tugul." 
1Chronicles16:26 Amu kamuktaik tugul che po piik koma tilei kiy; ago kiyaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kipsengwet. 
1Chronicles16:27 Mi tainnyi teegisto ak etunateet; mi oldanyi kimnateet ak kagasetapkei. 
1Chronicles16:28 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek tilyonutigap pororyosyek, ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor toroornatet ak kimnateet." 
1Chronicles16:29 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor toroornatet ne nyoljin kainennyi; Oibu kagoochinet, ak obwa tainnyi; ogutung'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' karaaranindap tiliilindo." 
1Chronicles16:30 Potan eng' tainnyi, ng'wony komugul! Ki kigimit ng'wony si ma ng'eigei." 
1Chronicles16:31 Ingogaskei kipsengwet, ingobaibait ng'wony! Ingomwa eng' pororyosyek, kole “Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Ingomoror nyanjet, ak tuguuk che nyiitaat olooto! Ingogaskei mbareenik, kobooto tugul che mi olooto!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Si kotyenso anyun eng' poiboiyet keetiik che mi timiin eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu nyoonei ineendet korwookyin ng'wony." 
1Chronicles16:34 Oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi, amu myee ineendet; amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
1Chronicles16:35 Omwa ole, “Sarwech, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap yetunennyo, iyumech ak isarwech kemong'u eng' pororyosyek, si kobiit keeweekyi kongoi kaineng'ung' ne tiliil, ak kigaaskei eng' kalasuneng'ung'.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kobooch koigeny agoi koigeny! Ki mwa piik tugul kole, “Amen, ilasunoot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Ki pagaach anyun Asaph ak tupchosyekyik eng' yooto, eng' taitap moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit kobois eng' yooto peetuusyek tugul ko uu ye yamegei ak poisyetap peetuut age tugul." 
1Chronicles16:38 Ki pagaach kora Obed-edom kobooto tupchosyekwak, piik tamanwogik lo ak sisiit kobois eng' olooto; Obed-edom weeriitap Jeduthun ak Hosah ko ki riibiigap kurgeet." 
1Chronicles16:39 Ki pagaach Daudi Zadok tisiindet ak tupchosyekyik tisiik, eng' taitap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' komosta ne toroor ne ki mi Gibeon," 
1Chronicles16:40 si kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' kaptisisyetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei kotugul, karon ak koskoleny, ko uu tugul che ki kisirchi Ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che king'atyi Israel." 
1Chronicles16:41 Ki mi kobooto icheek Herman ak Jeduthun ak che kiga ng'et tugul che ki kilewen, che ki kimwa eng' kainaikwak, koweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Ki mi kobooto icheek Herman ak Jeduthun che ki tinyei iryagook ak sanisyek che po sugunonik che kibirei, che po icheek che pirei kocheiyo miising', ak tuguuk che kibutei che po tyenwogigap Kamuktaindet. Ki tebee weeriigap Jeduthun ormariich." 
1Chronicles16:43 Ki pa piik tugul, ki wo chii tugul koonnyi, ak ki week Daudi agine kwo koberuur koonnyi." 
1Chronicles17:1 Ye ki menyei Daudi koonnyi, koleenji `ineendet maotyot Nathan, “Keero, amenye kootap keetiigap taragonik, ago menyei moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emait oriit.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Ki leenji `Nathan Daudi, “Yai tuguuk tugul che mi muguleldang'ung', amu mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Ak eng' kemounooto konyonji ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet Nathan koleenji 
1Chronicles17:4 ui ileenji Daudi otwogindennyu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Meteekwo koot ne amenye. 
1Chronicles17:5 Tomo ameny koot kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu Israel kotogos, agoi ra; ago ki ameng'oote emait ak koot ne kituiyechin." 
1Chronicles17:6 Eng' komoswek tugul che ki awendotee kobooto Israel, ko tos ki amwachi ng'olyoo age eng' kirwoogigap Israel, che ki ang'at kobai piikyuk aleenji amu nee si moteekwo koot ne po taragonik?”" 
1Chronicles17:7 Nooto anyun imwachini otwogindennyu Daudi ileenjini, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ki amutun eng' piutap keechiirek, ye ki isuboti keechiirek, si iegu pounindet eng' piikyuk Israel." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ki atebi kobooten eng' komosta age tugul ne ki iwe ak ki aiste puuniguk eng' taing'ung'. Nguno ayaun kainet ne uu kainaigap piik che eecheen che mi ng'wony. 
1Chronicles17:9 Alewenjini oldo piikyuk Israel ak amiine icheek si kobiit komeny oldanywa, ama kiutoi kogeny. Ma kota kobare `icheek lagogap yaityet kogeny, ko uu tai" 
1Chronicles17:10 ak kobooch peetuut ne ki ang'ate kirwoogik koboi piikyuk Israel. Ak aterteeri puuniguk tugul. Kogeny amwaun ale teegun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koot. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ye igeskei peetuusyeguk ak iwe ole mi kwanisyeguk, ang'eet iyoteng'ung', agenge eng' weeriiguk, ak agimiit laitornatennyi." 
1Chronicles17:12 Teekwa `ineendet koot, ak agimiiti ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet koigeny." 
1Chronicles17:13 Aegu kwandanyi, ak koek weeriinnyu. Ma istoe ineendet rireenennyu ko uu ye ki aistoe ineendet ne ki indounenen." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ago andoi ineendet kotebee koonnyu ak kotebee laitornatennyu koigeny; ak ki kimiti ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet koigeny.” 
1Chronicles17:15 Ki mwachi `Nathan Daudi ko uu ng'aleechuuto tugul, ak ko uu ng'ang'utyoni tugul." 
1Chronicles17:16 Yeityo kwo ko Laitoryat Daudi, ak kotebi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kole: “Aa ng'oo, ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ak nee koonnyu, kot imutwaa agoi ra?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ee Kamuktaindet, ki ek niito kiit ne ming'in eng' taing'ung', ago kaing'alaal agobo kootap otwogindeng'ung' eng' peetuusyek che chaang' che pwoonei, ak kaiita eng' koitetap chiito ne po toroornatet, ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet." 
1Chronicles17:18 Nee age neta komuuchi Daudi komwaun agobo teegisto ne ki yachi otwogindeng'ung'? Amu ingen otwogindeng'ung'. 
1Chronicles17:19 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kaiyai etunatoni tugul agobo otwogindeng'ung', ak ko uu muguleldang'ung' inyegei, si ibarte tuguuchu eecheen tugul konaak." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma mi age ne ogerge, ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatenen, ko uu eng' tugul che kigegas eng' itiikyok." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ak ngoro pororyet ne kergei ak piiguk Israel, che ki wo Kamuktaindet kotyakyigei koek piikyik, si iyachigei kainet eng' tuguuk che eecheen ak tuguuk che po kamuiset, ye ki ioon pororyosyek eng' taitap piiguk, che ki ityaach eng' Misiri?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Amu ki iyai piiguk Israel koek piiguk koigeny, ak ki iegu `inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa.”" 
1Chronicles17:23 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ingogimiit koigeny ng'olyoot ne ki imwa agobo otwogindeng'ung' ak agobo koonnyi, ak iyai ko uu ye kaimwa." 
1Chronicles17:24 Ingogimiit kaineng'ung', ak kotororit koigeny keele, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel, ineendet Kamuktaindet eng' Israel! Ki kimiiti kootap Daudi otwogindeng'ung' eng' taing'ung'." 
1Chronicles17:25 Amu ki ing'aang'ji otwogindeng'ung', ee Kamuktaindennyu, ile iteekyini ineendet koot. Ara kanyiganit anyun otwogindeng'ung' kosa eng' taing'ung'." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ii Kamuktaindet! Kaiyomisyi otwogindeng'ung' kii myee." 
1Chronicles17:27 Nguno anyun, kebaibaitu iberuur kootap otwogindeng'ung', si kobiit kotep koigeny eng' taing'ung'; amu kaiberuur inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ii iberuurot koigeny." 
1Chronicles18:1 Kingo pata niito, kobar Daudi Philistiik ak koterteer icheek, ak kirebe Philistiik Gath ak nganasookyik." 
1Chronicles18:2 Ki iterteer kora Moab, ki ek Moabik otwogigap Daudi ak koip kagoochinoik." 
1Chronicles18:3 Ne siire nooto kogibar Daudi Hadareser laitoryatap Soba eng' Hamath, ye kingo wendi kogimiti pounatennyi eng' ole neegitee aineetap Yufrets." 
1Chronicles18:4 Kirebe Daudi ineendet kariisyek eliphuut, murenik eliphuusyek tisap che ki laanyei paraisisyek, ak che kibunei keelyek eliphuusyek tiptem. Ki ep Daudi kutung'oigap paraisisyek, ago ki ituuch eng' chooto che yamei kariisyek pogol." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ki par `Daudi piigap Syria che menyei Damasko piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng', che kibwonei kole kotoret Hadareser laitoryatap Soba." 
1Chronicles18:6 Ki inde anyun Daudi riibiik Syria ne po Damasko, ki ek piigap Syria otwogigap Daudi, ak ki ip kagoochinoik. Ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi katerteeret eng' komosta age tugul ne ki wo." 
1Chronicles18:7 Ki ip Daudi long'onigap thahabu che ki tinyei otwogigap Hadareser kobwa Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles18:8 Ki ip Daudi sugunonik che chaang' eng' Tibat ak Kun, nganasoogap Hadareser, che kiyae Solomon nyanjet ne po sugunwet, tolochik ak tuguuk che po sugunonik." 
1Chronicles18:9 Kingo kas Tou laitoryatap Hamath kole kogobar Daudi lugeet tugul ne po Hadareser laitoryat ne po Soba," 
1Chronicles18:10 koyookto Hadoram weeriinnyi kwo kaplaitoryat Daudi, kwo kogat ineendet ak koberuur, amu kiga pargei ak Hadareser ak kobar ineendet. Kiga kobargei Hadareser ak Tou konyil che chaang'. Ki tinyei Hadoram tereenik alak tugul che po thahabu ak fedha ak sugunonik." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ki itabaanji Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuchuuto ak icheek, kobooto fedha ak thahabu che ki ibune pororyosyek tugul: eng' Edom ak Moab, eng' lagogap Ammon ak eng' Philistiik, ak eng' Amelek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Ki par kogeny Abisai weeriitap Zeruiah piigap Edom eliphuusyek taman ak sisiit eng' Atebweetap Munyuk. 
1Chronicles18:13 Ki inde riibiik Edom, ak ki ek Edomik tugul otwogigap Daudi. Ki igoch Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi katerteeret eng' komosta age tugul ne ki wo." 
1Chronicles18:14 Ki laitoran Daudi eng' Israel tugul; ki irwookyi piikyik tugul eng' lititindo ak iman. 
1Chronicles18:15 Ki pou Joab weeriitap Zeruiah lugeet; ak kisiriindetap tuguuk che piitu Jehoshaphat weeriitap Ahilud. 
1Chronicles18:16 Ki tisiik Zadok weeriitap Ahitub ak Abimelek weeriitap Abiathar; ak ki siriindet Sabsa; 
1Chronicles18:17 ki pou Benaiah weeriitap Jehoiada Keretik ak Peletik; ak ki che eecheen weeriigap Daudi che ki tebee ye neegitee laitoryat. 
1Chronicles19:1 Kingo pata niito, kome Nahas laitoryatap lagogap Ammon, ak ki laitoran weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
1Chronicles19:2 Ki le Daudi, “Ayachini ne myee Hanun weeriitap Nahas, amu ki yaiywo ne myee kwandanyi.” Ki iyookto anyun Daudi piik koba kogaigai ineendet, amu kwandanyi. Ak ki it otwogigap Daudi emetap lagogap Ammon kap Hanun, koba kogaigai ineendet." 
1Chronicles19:3 Ago ki leenji pounigap lagogap Ammon Hanun, “Ibwaati ile konyiti Daudi kwandang'ung', kot koyogun kagoigoik? Tos ma pwa otwogikyik kobwa ole imi, kosyach, kosegei ak kobar emet?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ki nam anyun Hanun otwogigap Daudi, konem tamnokwak, kotil ngoroikwak komut kwenut koboochit ngorook, ak kounda koba." 
1Chronicles19:5 Koba anyun piik alak, komwachi Daudi kiit ne ko ki yachi pichooto. Ki iyookto piik kotorookta, amu kiga konyoor teweernateet pichooto miising'. Ki leenji laitoryat, “Otebi eng' Jeriko agoi kobiityo tamnokwok, ye ibata, obwa.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Kingo keer lagogap Ammon kole kagoyaagitu icheeget eng' Daudi, koyookto Hanun ak lagogap Ammon talendaisyek eliphuut agenge che po fedha koale kariisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek eng' Mesopotamia, ak Aram-maaka ak Soba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Koaljigei anyun kariisyek eliphuusyek sosom ak aeng', kobooto laitoryatap Maaka ak piikyik, che ki pwa koteech taitap Medeba. Ak ki iyumgei lagogap Ammon komong' eng' nganasookwak, kobwa koyai lugeet." 
1Chronicles19:8 Kingo kas Daudi, koyookto Joab ak lugeet tugul ne po murenik che kiimeen." 
1Chronicles19:9 Ki pwa lagogap Ammon ak kotet lugeet eng' ormariichetap nganaseet ak ko ki mi laitorinik icheegei warenget che kiga pwa. 
1Chronicles19:10 Kingo keer Joab kole kagetet lugeet agobo ineendet eng' tai ak let, kokwei murenik che ki kilewen che po Israel, ak kotet kobargei ak piigap Syria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Ki inde piik che kiga ng'et, eutap Abisai, ng'eetap kamet, kotetkei icheek si kobargei ak lagogap Ammon." 
1Chronicles19:12 Ki le Joab, “Ngot kogimegitu piigap Syria koterteera, itoreta; ago ngot kogimegitu lagogap Ammon koterteerin, atoretiin." 
1Chronicles19:13 Nyiganitu, ngeegu murenik agobo piikyok, ak nganasoogap Kamuktaindennyo. Ingoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye keerei kole myee.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Kiriikta anyun Joab ak murenik che ki mi ak ineendet koba lugeet kobargei ak piigap Syria, ak ki mwee ineendet." 
1Chronicles19:15 Kingo keer lagogap Ammon kole kagomwei piigap Syria, komwei ak icheek eng' taitap Abisai ng'eetap kametap Joab, ak ki pa nganaseet. Ki nyo anyun Joab Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Kingo keer piigap Syria kole kagiterter icheek eng' taitap Israel, koyookto piik, koba koguur piigap Syria che ki mi aineet pitoniin, kobooto Sopak kiptaiyatap lugeetap Hadareser ne ki indoe icheek." 
1Chronicles19:17 ki ngemwachi Daudi agobo niito, koyum Israel tugul ak kilandae Jordan, kiche icheek ak kotet lugeet kobargei ak icheek. Kitet anyun Daudi lugeennyi si kobargei ak piigap Syria, ki yai icheek lugeet ak ineendet." 
1Chronicles19:18 Ago ki mwee piigap Syria Israel, ak ki par `Daudi piigap Syria eliphuusyek tisap che po kariisyek, murenik eliphuusyek artam che punei keelyek. Ki par kora Sopak kiptaiyatap lugeet." 
1Chronicles19:19 Kingo keer otwogigap Hadareser kole kagiterter icheek eng' taitap Israel, koyai kaalyeet ak Daudi ak koot ineendet. Ara mata kocham piigap Syria kotoret lagogap Ammon kogeny agoi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ak ye ki neegit kogeskei kenyiit, eng' peetuusyek che ki cham kobendi laitorinik lugeet, komut Joab nyigoonigap lugeet. King'em emetap lagogap Ammon ak kobwa koyiem Rabbah. Ago ki tebi Daudi eng' Jerusalem. Ak ki par Joab Rabbah, kowong'." 
1Chronicles20:2 Ki inem Daudi naaryeetap laitoryannywa eng' metinnyi, ak ki keer kole yamegei ak keruutik sosom ak muut che po thahabu, ak kimi koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo eng' oriit; ak ki kigerchine metit Daudi. Ki ip parunenik che chaang' kot che po nganaseet komong'." 
1Chronicles20:3 Ak ki imut piik che ki mi nganaseet komong', ki igoochi icheek kobois komurmure musumenosyek ak kariik che kiburburene mbareenik ak aonok. Ak ki yachi Daudi ko uu nooto nganasook tugul che po lagogap Ammon. Ki week anyun Daudi ak piik tugul koba Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles20:4 Kingo pata niito, kong'eet pooryeet eng' Gezer kobargei ak Philistiik. Ak ki par Sibekai Husatindet Sipai, agenge eng' weeriigap chiito chemosit, ak ki kiterteer pichooto." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ki piit kogeny lugeet ak Philistiik, ak ki par Elanan weeriitap Jair Lami ng'eetap kametap Goliat Gitindet, ne ki kergei irumetap ndirinnyi ak keetit ne oo ne taachin usiisyek chiito ne nabisyei." 
1Chronicles20:6 Ki piit lugeet kogeny eng' Gath, ole ki mi chiito ne kooi kot, ne ki tinyei morik tiptem ak ang'wan, ki lo eng' euut age tugul, ak ki lo eng' keeldo age tugul; ak ki kisige agine chiito chemosit." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ak ye kingo reeny ineendet Israel, kobar Jonathan weeriitap Simea ng'eetap kametap Daudi." 
1Chronicles20:8 Ki kisikyi pichuuto chiito chemosit eng' Gath, ak ki par Daudi ak otwogikyik pichooto." 
1Chronicles21:1 Ki ng'eet Setani kogirinda Israel, ak ki igoochi Daudi koiit Israel." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ki leenji Daudi Joab ak pounigap piik, “Oba ak oiit Israel kong'etee Beer-sheba agoi Dan, yeityo obwa omwaiwo si anai koiitennywa.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Ki wol Joab kole, “Ingotes `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik konyil che tee koiitennywa pogol! Ago kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, tos icheek tugul koma otwogigap kiptaiyandennyu? Amu nee si komach kiptaiyandennyu kii? Amu nee si komachei ineendet kong'eetyi `tengekto Israel?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Ago ki iterteer ng'olyootap laitoryat Joab. Kwo anyun Joab amu nooto, kochut emet tugul ne po Israel, agoi Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Ki nyo Joab kogoochi Daudi kiit ne tee koitetap piik. Ki ek Israel tugul murenik millionit agenge ak eliphuusyek pogol che ki po rotoogap chok. Ki ek che po Judah eliphuusyek pogol ang'wan ak tamanwogik tisap. 
1Chronicles21:6 Ago ma ki itito Lawiik ak Benjamin, amu ki ek ng'olyootap laitoryat kiit ne kiwechei eng' Joab." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ma cham Kamuktaindet kiito; kibir anyun Israel. 
1Chronicles21:8 Ki leenji Daudi Kamuktaindet, “Ki ayai tengekto ne oo, amu ki ayai kii. Ago nguno asoomin ale iste tengektap otwogindeng'ung', amu ki ayai eng' perberyo ne oo.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Ki mwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gad keerindetap Daudi, koleenji," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Ui mwachi Daudi ileenji, ‘Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kagoonin tuguuk somok; lewen agenge eng' chooto, si kobiit ayaun.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Konyo anyun Gad ole mi Daudi, ak koleenji ineendet, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Lewen ne imache:" 
1Chronicles21:12 kenyiisyek somok che po rubeet, kobarin puuniguk arawek somok, ye imwee koonotin puuniguk eng' rotweet, anan ko peetuusyek somok che po rotwetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nooto ko koroitap ng'wony ne nyoonei emet, kobarisyoti malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kiwotosyek tugul che po Israel.’ Ibwaat anyun nguno kiit ne awoljini ineendet ne koiyookwo.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Ki leenji Daudi Gad, “Ami eng' pichiindo ne oo. Ngabutyi eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu eecheen miising' rireenosyekyik; ameng' abutyi eutap chii.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Koyokyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun koroitap ng'wony Israel, ak ki pek murenik eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisabu che po Israel." 
1Chronicles21:15 Ak ki iyookto Kamuktaindet malaikaiyat kwo kobar Jerusalem. Ago ye ki neegit kobar, kogeer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kowal kabwaatennyi agobo yaityonooto, ak koleenji malaikaiyat ne ki parisyei, “Kagoyam! Pagakte!” Ak kitonone malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole neegit rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Ornan Jebusindet." 
1Chronicles21:16 Ki ing'eet metit Daudi ak ki keer malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotononi eng' kwenutap ng'wony ak kipsengwet, kotinyei rotwetap chok ne kaging'us eng' eunnyi, ak kong'werere Jerusalem. Kobutyi ng'wony anyun Daudi ak poisyek kotooree togoochikwak ng'wony, kolaachi kuniok." 
1Chronicles21:17 Ki leenji Daudi Kamuktaindet, “Koma ko anee ne kong'atei ki iit piik? Aneendet ne koayai tengekto ak ayai kiit ne ya miising'. Ago koyai nee kechirechu? Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, asaain ale, ingobira eung'ung' ak kootap kwandanyu, ago matkebir piiguk eng' koroito.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Ki ng'at anyun `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Gad kwo koleenji Daudi, kotogosta kwo koteekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Ornan Jebusindet." 
1Chronicles21:19 Kotogosta Daudi anyun eng' ng'olyootap Gad, ne kamwa eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles21:20 Ye kiborei Ornan nganuuk kogiwelelgei ineendet ak ki keer malaikaiyat; ak kiunygei weeriikyik ang'wanu che ki mi ak ineendet. 
1Chronicles21:21 Ak kingo nyoonei Daudi ole mi Ornan, kotabendo Ornan kogeer Daudi, kwo komanda eng' rwanyunooto kiboorsee ak kong'uruuk eng' taitap Daudi kot kotiiny togeet ng'wony." 
1Chronicles21:22 Koleenji anyun Daudi Ornan, “Koono komosita iborse, si ateekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' yuto si kosiis koroito, mata kobar piik. Igoono eng' alyet ne yamegei.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Ki leenji `Ornan Daudi, “Ip, kobunjiin! Ingoyai kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat kiit ne keerei kole myee. Keero, agoonin eik koek kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak agoonin tuguuk che kiboorsee koek kweenik, ak agoonin nganuuk koek kagoochinetap peek; kagoonin tugul.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Ago ki leenji `Laitoryat Daudi Ornan, “Achicha, aalen alyet ne yamegei iman. Ma ibe king'ung' ak agoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anan agoite kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne ma aal.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Kogoochi anyun Daudi Ornan shekelisyek pogol lo che po thahabu ngegaman, koale olooto." 
1Chronicles21:26 Kiteekyi Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaptisisyet eng' yooto, ak ki igoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet. Ki sa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki wolji ineendet eng' kipsengwet eng' maat ne kichoorchigei kaptisisyet ne po kagoochinet ne kibeelei." 
1Chronicles21:27 Ki ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor malaikaiyat; ak kiger rotwennyi eng' choget. 
1Chronicles21:28 Kingo keer anyun Daudi eng' sainooto kole kagowolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Ornan Jebusindet, koeny kagoochinoik eng' yooto." 
1Chronicles21:29 Amu kimi eng' peetuusyechooto kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiteechei Musa eng' surkwen, kobooto kaptisisyetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei komosta ne toroor eng' Gibeon." 
1Chronicles21:30 Ago ki ma imuuch Daudi kwo taitap kaptisisyonooto kwo koteepse Kamuktaindet, amu ki iyweisyei amu rotwetap chok ne po malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles22:1 Ki le anyun Daudi, “Ni ko kootap Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ak ni ko kaptisisyetap kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ne po Israel.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Ki ng'at Daudi kiyum punootik che ki mi emetap Israel, ak ki inde musogik che waei koik kowai koik si keteege kootap Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles22:3 Ki chop Daudi kariik ng'iisyat koek kipchumarisyek che po kereiywegap ormariichok, ak che po ole kituiyechin; kobooto sugunonik ng'iisyat che ma iitoksei." 
1Chronicles22:4 Ki chop kora taragonik che ma iitoksei, amu ki ipchi piigap Sidon ak che po Tyro Daudi taragonik ng'iisyat." 
1Chronicles22:5 Ki le Daudi, “Ta ko ming'in weeriinnyu Solomon, ak ko etyet, ak nyolu kogararanit miising' koot ne keteekyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, konyoor tagunateet ak toroornatet eng' emotinwek tugul. Ko uu nooto anyun achopchini tuguuk koyooto.” Kochop anyun Daudi tuguuk ng'iisyat kotom kome." 
1Chronicles22:6 Ki kuur weeriinnyi Solomon anyun ak kong'at ineendet koteekyi koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
1Chronicles22:7 Ki leenji `Daudi Solomon weeriinnyi, “Kimi muguleldanyu ateekyi koot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu." 
1Chronicles22:8 Ago ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo: ‘Ki itumde korotiik che chaang' miising', ak iyai lugoosyek che eecheen. Meteekyini koot kainennyu, amu ki itumde korotiik che chaang' eng' ng'wony eng' tainnyu." 
1Chronicles22:9 Keero, tuun kisigun weeriit, ne egu chiitap kamuung'et, ak agoochini ineendet kamuung'et eng' puunikyik tugul che mi komoswek tugul. Tuun kiguure kainennyi Solomon, ak agoochi Israel kaalyeet ak kamuung'et eng' peetuusyekyik." 
1Chronicles22:10 Teekyin ineendet koot kainennyu. Egu ineendet weeriinnyu, ak aegu kwandanyi. Ak agimiit ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po pounatennyi eng' Israel koigeny.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Ara anyun, weeriinnyu, ingotep Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten, ak iboor ak iteech kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko uu ye ki komwa agobo inyee." 
1Chronicles22:12 Ingogoonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaguiyet ak naet, ak kogoonin ng'atuutyet agobo Israel, si kobiit iriip ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
1Chronicles22:13 Ibore anyun, ngot iriip ak iyai kosupkei ak ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik che ki iyomis `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Musa agobo Israel. Kimitu ak nyiganitu. Meiywei anan itoptoben." 
1Chronicles22:14 Keer anyuno, ki achopchi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanyu talendaisyek eliphuusyek pogol che po thahabu, ak talendaisyek milonit agenge che po fedha; kobooto sugunonik ak kariik che ma iitoksei, amu ng'iisyat. Ki achop keetiik ak icheek ak koik. Ak imuuchi kota ites alak." 
1Chronicles22:15 Itinye kogeny kiboitiinik che chaang' kot, waigap koik ak che poisyee koik ak keetiik, ak piik tugul che ng'oomen eng' poisyet age tugul," 
1Chronicles22:16 ma iitoksei thahabu ak fedha, sugunonik ak kariik. Ng'eet anyun poisye, ak ingotep Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooten.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Ki ng'at kogeny `Daudi pounik tugul che po Israel kotoret weeriinnyi Solomon, koleenji," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Tos ma mi kobootok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'? Ak ma koonok kamuung'et eng' komoswek tugul? Amu ki inde eunnyu piik che menyei emoni, ak ki kiterteer emet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' taitap piikyik." 
1Chronicles22:19 Ara anyun, ochop mugulelwekwok ak saboonwekwok, ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'. Ong'eetyee anyun, oteech ole-tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', si oibu moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak tuguuk che tiliileen che po Kamuktaindet, kobwa koot ne kiteekyin kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Ye kiga koosit Daudi ak kiga kochang'a peetuusyekyik, ko ki yai Solomon weeriinnyi koek laitoryat koboi Israel." 
1Chronicles23:2 Ki iyum pounik tugul che po Israel, kobooto Tisiik ak Lawiik." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ki kiit Lawiik kobooch che po kenyiisyek sosom ak che siirei, ki ek koiitennywa eliphuusyek sosom ak sisiit, ko kagiit chiito agenge agenge." 
1Chronicles23:4 Ki tononjin poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eliphuusyek tiptemu ak ang'wan eng' pichooto; ak ki eliphuusyek lo kiptainik ak kirwoogik. 
1Chronicles23:5 Ki eliphuusyek ang'wan riibiigap kurgotik ak ki ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eliphuusyek ang'wanu eng' kibugandinik che ki ayae anee, si kilasune Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles23:6 Kipchei `Daudi icheek, kopchechi poisyonik kobee weeriigap Lawi: Gerson, Kohat, ak Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Che po Gerson ko ki Ladan ak Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Weeriigap Ladan: ne oo ko ki Jehiel, Setam ak Joel, ki somok tugul." 
1Chronicles23:8 Weeriigap Ladan: ne oo ko ki Jehiel, Setam ak Joel, ki somok tugul." 
1Chronicles23:9 Weeriigap Shimei ko ki: Selomot, Hasyel, ak Haran, piik somok. Chuuto ko ki kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po Ladan." 
1Chronicles23:10 Ak weeriigap Shimei ko ki: Jahat, Sina, Jeush, ak Beriah. Chuuto ang'wan ko ki weeriigap Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Ki ne oo Jahat ak ne po aeng' ko Sia, ago ki ma kotinyei weeriik che chaang' Jeush ak Beriah; koek anyun icheek koot agenge ne po kwanisyek." 
1Chronicles23:12 Weeriigap Kohat ko ki: Amram, Itshar, Hebron ak Uzziel, piik ang'wan." 
1Chronicles23:13 Weeriigap Amram ko ki: Aron ak Musa. Ki kitabaan Aron, ineendet ak weeriikyik koigeny, si kotabaan ineendet tuguuk che tiliileen miising', si kobeelei nyamdutik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koboisyechi ineendet ak koberuuris eng' kainennyi koigeny." 
1Chronicles23:14 Ago ki kiitito weeriigap Musa chiitap Kamuktaindet, ooreetap Lawi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Weeriigap Musa ko ki: Gershom ak Elieser. 
1Chronicles23:16 Ne ki oo eng' weeriigap Gershom ko ki Sebuel. 
1Chronicles23:17 Ki tinyei `Elieser Reabia, weeriit ne ki ineegei, ago ki sich `Reabia weeriik chaang' miising'." 
1Chronicles23:18 Weeriigap Itshar: ne oo ko ki Selomit. 
1Chronicles23:19 Weeriigap Hebron: ne oo ko ki Jeria, ne po aeng' ko Amariah, ne po somok ko Jahasyel, ak ne po ang'wan ko Jekameam." 
1Chronicles23:20 Weeriigap Uzziel: ne oo ko ki Mikah, ak ne po aeng' ko Isia." 
1Chronicles23:21 Weeriigap Merari ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Weeriigap Mali ko ki: Eleazar ak Kish. 
1Chronicles23:22 Kime Eleazar ama sich weeriik, ki sich tiibiik kityo: ak ki itun icheek tupchosyekwak weeriigap Kish." 
1Chronicles23:23 Weeriigap Musi ko ki: Mali, Eder, ak Jerimoth, ki somok." 
1Chronicles23:24 Chuuto ko ki weeriigap Lawi ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak, kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyegap icheeget che ki kiit, kobee koitetap kainaik, ko kagiit chiito agenge agenge, kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak che siirei che ki yai poisyetap otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles23:25 Amu ki le Daudi, “Kogogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel piikyik kamuung'et ak menyei ineendet Jerusalem koigeny," 
1Chronicles23:26 ma koiboti Lawiik koot ne kituiyechin kobooto tuguukyik tugul che po poisyennyi. 
1Chronicles23:27 Amu ki kiit weeriigap Lawi eng' ng'aleegap Daudi che po let, kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak che siirei." 
1Chronicles23:28 Amu kiboisyennywa koboisyechi weeriigap Aron agobo poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' seremusyek, ak eng' kooriik che po oriit, ak eng' kaanyinyetap tuguuk tugul che tiliileen, poisyetap otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet;" 
1Chronicles23:29 agobo magatinigap kabartaet ak icheek, ak peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul che po kagoochinetap peek, ngo che po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek anan che kigelei eng' taabeet, anan che kinuuri, ak eng' tuguuk alak tugul che kigerisye ak che teerchiin eng' ooindo.”" 
1Chronicles23:30 Ki tonondos karonet age tugul koweekyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi ak kolasu ineendet, ak ko uu nooto agine koskoleny," 
1Chronicles23:31 ak kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik tugul che kibeelei eng' sabatoisyek ak ye kaleel arawet, ak eng' igoorwek che ki king'at, eng' koiitennywa ko uu ng'atuutyet ne ki king'at agobo icheek, eng' peetuusyek tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles23:32 Si koriipso eng' riipseetap emait ne kituiyechin, ak riipseetap ole-tiliil, ak riipseetap weeriigap Aron tupchosyekwak, agobo otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ki chu pcheutigap weeriigap Aron. Weeriigap Aron ko ki: Nadap, Abiu, Eleazar, ak Ithamar." 
1Chronicles24:2 Ago ki pek Nadap ak Abiu kotom kome kwandanywa, ama sich lagok. Kibois anyun Eleazar ak Ithamar eng' tiseinateet." 
1Chronicles24:3 Ak kipchei Daudi ak Zadok, eng' weeriigap Eleazar, ak Ahimelek, eng' weeriigap Ithamar, kopchei icheek ko uu koiitennywa eng' poisyennywa." 
1Chronicles24:4 Kibiitune pounik che chaang' weeriigap Eleazar kosiir che po weeriigap Ithamar; ki kipchei ko uu ni: ki ek taman ak lo che po weeriigap Eleazar kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek ak ki ek sisiit che po weeriigap Ithamar ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak. 
1Chronicles24:5 Ki kipchei anyun ko uu ni eng' parbareek, chu ak chu kogergeit; amu kimi pounik che po ole-tiliil, ak pounik che po Kamuktaindet, ki po tuwai weeriigap Eleazar ak weeriigap Ithamar." 
1Chronicles24:6 Ki kigoochi Semaiah weeriitap Nethanel, ne ki po Lawiik, koek siriindet, ne sirisyei icheek eng' taitap laitoryat, pounik, Zadok tisiindet, Ahimelek weeriitap Abiathar, kobooto kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po Tisiik ak che po Lawiik. Ki kinam koot age ne po kwanisyek kobunji Eleazar, kenam age kobunji Ithamar." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ki mong' parbaryat ne po tai kobunji Jehoiarib, kobunji ne po aeng' Jedaiah." 
1Chronicles24:8 Ki punji ne po somok Harim, kobunji ne po ang'wan Seorim." 
1Chronicles24:9 Ki punji ne po muut Malkija, kobunji ne po lo Mijamin." 
1Chronicles24:10 Ki punji ne po tisap Hakos, kobunji ne po sisiit Abijah." 
1Chronicles24:11 Ki punji ne po sogool Jeshua, kobunji ne po taman Shekaneiah." 
1Chronicles24:12 Ki punji ne po taman ak agenge Eliasib, kobunji ne po taman ak aeng' Jakim." 
1Chronicles24:13 Ki punji ne po taman ak somok Hupa, kobunji ne po taman ak ang'wan Jesebeap." 
1Chronicles24:14 Ki punji ne po taman ak muut Bilga, kobunji ne po taman ak lo Imer." 
1Chronicles24:15 Ki punji ne po taman ak tisap Hesir, kobunji ne po taman ak sisiit Hapises." 
1Chronicles24:16 Ki punji ne po taman ak sogool Petaia, kobunji ne po tiptem Jeskel." 
1Chronicles24:17 Ki punji ne po tiptem ak agenge Jakin, kobunji ne po tiptem ak aeng' Gamul." 
1Chronicles24:18 Ki punji ne po tiptem ak somok Delaiah, kobunji ne po tiptem ak ang'wan Maasia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Niito ko ki koitennywa eng' poisyennywa, kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ng'atuutyet ne ki kigoochi icheek eng' kwandanywa Aron, ko uu ye kiga ng'at ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
1Chronicles24:20 Chu che kiga ng'et che po weeriigap Lawi: che po weeriigap Amram, ko ki Subael ak che po weeriigap Subael, ko ki Jedaiah." 
1Chronicles24:21 Che po Reabia: che po weeriigap Reabia, ko ki Isia ne oo." 
1Chronicles24:22 Che po Isarik, ko ki Selomot ak che po weeriigap Selomot, ko ki Jahat." 
1Chronicles24:23 Weeriigap Hebron ko ki Jeria ne oo, Amariah ne po aeng', Jahasyel ne po somok ak Jekameam ne po ang'wan." 
1Chronicles24:24 Weeriigap Uzziel ko ki Mikah ak che po weeriigap Mikah ko ki Samir. 
1Chronicles24:25 Ng'eetap kametap Mikah ko ki Isia. Kandoindet eng' weeriigap Isia ko ki Zekariah. 
1Chronicles24:26 Eng' weeriigap Merari ko ki Mali ak Musi, ak eng' weeriigap Jaasia ko ki Beno." 
1Chronicles24:27 Eng' weeriigap Merari che ki sich Jaasia, ko ki Beno, Soham, Sakur, ak Ibri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Che po Mali ko ki Eleazar, ne ki ma sich weeriik." 
1Chronicles24:29 Eng' che po Kish kandoindet ko ki Jerameel. 
1Chronicles24:30 Eng' weeriigap Musi ko ki: Mali, Eder, ak Jerimoth. Chuuto ko ki weeriigap Lawiik ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak." 
1Chronicles24:31 Kiser chuuto ak icheek parbareek ko uu tupchosyekwak weeriigap Aron eng' taitap Laitoryat Daudi, Zadok, Ahimelek, ak kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po Tisiik ak che po Lawiik. Ki kiyai kooriigap kwanisyegap che eecheen eng' icheek kogergeit ak che po tupchennyi ne ming'in." 
1Chronicles25:1 Ki itabaan kogeny Daudi ak kiptainigap lugeet alak eng' weeriigap Asaph, che po Herman, ak che po Jeduthun, kotaabanji poisyet, si komaotenso eng' ketubosyek, kibugandinik ak sanisyek che po sugunonik che kibirei. Koitetap icheeget che kiyaei poisyet ko uu otisyennywa ko:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Che po weeriigap Asaph ko ki Sakur, Joseph, Netania, ak Asarela. Kiboisye icheek ko ki indochin kwandanywa, Asaph, ne ki maoteni, ko uu ng'atuutyetap laitoryat." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ki sich Jeduthun weeriik chooto ko: Gedalia, Seri, Jesaia, Shimei, Hasabia, ak Matitia, lo; che ki indochin kwandanywa Jeduthun kobutei ketubet, che ki maoteni, kimwaei kongoi ak kolasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles25:4 Weeriigap Herman ko ki: Bukia, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Sebuel, Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliata, Gidalti, Romamti-eser, Josbekasa, Maloti, Hotir, ak Maasiot." 
1Chronicles25:5 Chuuto tugul ko ki weeriigap Herman keerindetap laitoryat eng' ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet, konamji parak kuinet. Ak ki igoochi Kamuktaindet Herman weeriik taman ak ang'wan ak tiibiik somok." 
1Chronicles25:6 Ki pou chuuto tugul kwandanywa si kotyenso eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotinyei sanisyek che po sugunonik che kibirei, ak ketubosyek, agobo otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet. King'atei laitoryat Asaph, Jeduthun ak Herman." 
1Chronicles25:7 Ki ek koitetap chooto kobooto tupchosyekwak che ki kineet eng' tyenwogik kotyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, pogol aeng' tamanwogik sisiit ak sisiit." 
1Chronicles25:8 Kiseer parbareek agobo poisyonikwak, kogergeit tugul, che mengeechen ak che eecheen, kaneetindet ak ne kineeti." 
1Chronicles25:9 Ki mong' parbaryat ne po tai, kobunji Joseph agobo Asaph. Ki punji ne po aeng' Gedalia; ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik kobooto tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:10 Ki punji ne po somok Sakur, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik kobooto tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:11 Ki punji ne po ang'wan Isri, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:12 Ki punji ne po muut Netania, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:13 Ki punji ne po lo Bukia, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:14 Ki punji ne po tisap Jesarela, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:15 Ki punji ne po sisiit Jesaia, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:16 Ki punji ne po sogool Mattaniah, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:17 Ki punji ne po taman Shimei, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:18 Ki punji ne po taman ak agenge Asarel, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:19 Ki punji ne po taman ak aeng' Asabia, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:20 Ki punji ne po taman ak somok Subael, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:21 Ki punji ne po taman ak ang'wan Matitia, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:22 Ki punji ne po taman ak muut Jeremot, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:23 Ki punji ne po taman ak lo Hananiah, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:24 Ki punji ne po taman ak tisap Josbekasa, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:25 Ki punji ne po taman ak sisiit Hanani, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:26 Ki punji ne po taman ak sogool Maloti, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:27 Ki punji ne po tiptem Eliata, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:28 Ki punji ne po tiptem ak agenge Hotir, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:29 Ki punji ne po tiptem ak aeng' Gidalti, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:30 Ki punji ne po tiptem ak somok Maasiot, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles25:31 Ki punji ne po tiptem ak ang'wan Romamti-eser, ki taman ak aeng' weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles26:1 Pcheutigap riibiigap kurgotik che kiwoljinge ko: che po Koraik ko ki: Meselemya weeriitap Kore, che po weeriigap Asaph." 
1Chronicles26:2 Ki tinyei weeriik Meselemya, Zekariah taita, Jediael ne po aeng', Sebadia ne po somok, Jatniel ne po ang'wan," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elam ne po muut, Jeohanan ne po lo, ak Eliehenai ne po tisap." 
1Chronicles26:4 Ki tinyei weeriik Obed-edom; Semaiah taita, Jeosabad ne po aeng', Joah ne po somok, ak Sakar ne po ang'wan, Nethanel ne po muut." 
1Chronicles26:5 Amiel ne po lo, Issakar ne po tisap, Peuletai ne po sisiit. Ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet ineendet." 
1Chronicles26:6 Ki kisikyi weeriik Semaiah agine, che ki pou kootap kwandanywa; amu ki piik che kiimeen che nyigoonen." 
1Chronicles26:7 Weeriigap Semaiah ko ki: Otni, Repael, Obed, ak Elsabad. Ki piik che ki nyigoonen tupchosyekwak, Elihu ak Semakia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Chuuto tugul ko ki weeriigap Obed-edom, piik che kiimeen eng' otisyennywa kobooto weeriikwak ak tupchosyekwak, ki piik tamanwogik lo ak aeng' tugul." 
1Chronicles26:9 Ki tinyei Meselemya weeriik ak che tupcho, piik che nyigoonen, taman ak sisiit." 
1Chronicles26:10 Ki tinyei Hosah agine, ne po lagogap Merari, weeriik; ki ne oo Shimri, (nganda ki ma ko taita ineendet, ko ki yai kwandanyi ineendet koek ne oo;)" 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkiah ne po aeng', Tebalia ne po somok, Zekariah ne po ang'wan. Ki taman ak somok weeriik tugul che po Hosah kobooto tupchosyekyik." 
1Chronicles26:12 Ki mi eng' chuuto pcheutigap piik che ki riibei kurgeet, piik che eecheen, kotinyei riipsosyek che uu che po tupchosyekwak, si kobois eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles26:13 Kiseer parbareek kogergeit, piik che mengeechen ak che eecheen, kobee kooriigap kwanisyekwak, agobo ormariichet age tugul." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ki punji parbaryat ne kitokyigei kong'asiis Selemya. Yeityo koseer parbareek agobo Zekariah weeriinnyi, ne ki kirwoogindet ne ng'oom; ak ki mong' parbaryandennyi kotokyigei murot kaataam." 
1Chronicles26:15 Ki po Obed-edom ne kitokyigei murot tai, ak ki punji weeriikyik koot ne kigonoree tuguuk." 
1Chronicles26:16 Ki punji Supim ak Hosah ne kitokyigei cherongo, ole neegitee ormariichetap Saleket, eng' ole kitogostoe, kotokyindos riibiik." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ki mi Lawiik lo komostap kong'asiis, komi ang'wanu komostap murot kaataam peetuut age tugul, komi komostap murot tai ang'wanu peetuut age tugul, ak ki aeng' aeng' che po koot ne kigonoree tuguuk." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ki mi piik ang'wanu ye kitogostoe eng' Parbar, komostap cherongo, komi aeng' Parbar." 
1Chronicles26:19 Chuuto ko ki pcheutigap riibiigap kurgotik eng' weeriigap Koraik, ak weeriigap Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Ak eng' Lawiik, ko ki riibei Ahija tuguuk che po ole kigonoree tuguuk che po kootap Kamuktaindet, kobooto tuguuk che itabaanatiin." 
1Chronicles26:21 Weeriigap Ladan: weeriigap Gershonik che po Ladan, kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po Ladan Gersonindet, ko Jeieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Weeriigap Jeieli ko ki: Setam ak Joel ng'eetap kamet, ak ki pou icheek ole kigonoree tuguugap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles26:22 Weeriigap Jeieli ko ki: Setam ak Joel ng'eetap kamet, ak ki pou icheek ole kigonoree tuguugap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles26:23 Che po Amramik, che po Isarik, che po Hebronik, che po Usyelik:" 
1Chronicles26:24 ak ki pou Sebuel weeriitap Gershom, weeriitap Musa, ole kigonoree tuguuk." 
1Chronicles26:25 Ak tupchosyekyik eng' ooreetap Elieser: ki sich `Elieser Reabia weeriinnyi, Jesaia weeriinnyi, Joram weeriinnyi, Zikri weeriinnyi, ak Selomot weeriinnyi." 
1Chronicles26:26 Ki pou Selomot ak tupchosyekyik ole kigonoree tuguuk tugul che itabaanatiin, che kiga kotabaan Laitoryat Daudi, kobooto kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek, kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak che po pogolwogik, ak kiptainigap lugeet." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ki itabaan kebeberyat eng' tuguuk che ki kibooru eng' lugoosyek, si keteege ole ki kobutok eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles26:28 Ki pou Selomot ak tupchosyekyik tuguuk tugul che kiga kotabaan Samuel keerindet, ak Saulo weeriitap Kish, ak Abner weeriitap Ner, ak Joab weeriitap Zeruiah." 
1Chronicles26:29 Eng' che po Isarik kogiyaei Kenania ak weeriikyik poisyonigap saang' che po Israel, koek kiptainik ak kirwoogik." 
1Chronicles26:30 Eng' Hebronik, kogiriibei Asabia ak tupchosyekyik, icheeget piik che nyigoonen, piik eliphuut agenge ak pogol tisap, Israel eng' Jordan pitoniin komostap cherongo; agobo poisyonik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak otisyetap laitoryat." 
1Chronicles26:31 Eng' che po Hebronik, ko ki Jerija ne oo, ko uu ibinwekwak ak eng' kooriigap kwanisyek. Ki kicheeng' pichooto eng' kenyiitap artam ne po laitornatetap Daudi, ak ki piit eng' icheek piik che kiimeen che nyigoonen eng' Jaser ne po Gilead." 
1Chronicles26:32 Ki ek tupchosyegap Jerija, piik che nyigoonen, eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol tisap, kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek, che ki inde Laitoryat Daudi koboi piigap Reuben, ak Gadik, ak kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, agobo kiy age tugul ne tokyingei Kamuktaindet ak ng'aleegap laitoryat." 
1Chronicles27:1 Ki ek piigap Israel, ko uu koiitennywa, kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek ak kiptainigap eliphuusyek, che po pogolwogik, kiptainikwak che kiboisyechin laitoryat, eng' ng'olyoot age tugul ne po riipsosyek che kibwanei ak kobendi eng' arawet age tugul ne po kenyiit tugul, ko ki piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan che po riipseet age tugul." 
1Chronicles27:2 Ki pou riipseet ne po tai ne po arawet ne po tai Jasobeam weeriitap Sabdiel. Ki mi riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptemu ak ang'wan. 
1Chronicles27:3 Ki po lagogap Peres, ne oo eng' kiptainik tugul che po lugeet ne po arawet ne po tai." 
1Chronicles27:4 Ki pou riipseet ne po arawet ne po aeng' Dodai Ahoindet, ak riipsennyi; ak ki Miklot pounindet. Ki tinyei piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan eng' riipsennyi." 
1Chronicles27:5 Ki kiptaiyat ne po somok ne po lugeet eng' arawetap somok ko Benaiah, weeriitap Jehoiada, tisiindet ne oo. Ki tinyei piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan eng' riipsennyi." 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaia-ini ko ki chiito ne nyigan eng' piik sosom, ak ki pou pichooto sosom. Ki mi eng' riipsennyi weeriinnyi Amisabad." 
1Chronicles27:7 Ki Asahel ng'eetap kametap Joab kiptaiyat ne po ang'wan eng' arawet ne po ang'wan, ak kirubei ineendet Sebadia weeriinnyi. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan." 
1Chronicles27:8 Ki Samut Israindet kiptaiyat ne po muut eng' arawetap muut. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan. 
1Chronicles27:9 Ki Ira weeriitap Ikes Tekoindet kiptaiyat ne po lo eng' arawet ne po lo. Ki tinyei piik eng' riipsennyi eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan. 
1Chronicles27:10 Ki Heles Pelonindet, ne po weeriigap Ephraim, kiptaiyat ne po tisap eng' arawet ne po tisap. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan." 
1Chronicles27:11 Ki Sibekai Husatindet ne po Seraik, kiptaiyat ne po sisiit eng' arawet ne po sisiit. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan." 
1Chronicles27:12 Ki Abiezer Anatotindet ne po Benjaminik, kiptaiyat ne po sogool eng' arawetap sogool. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan." 
1Chronicles27:13 Ki Maarai Netopatindet ne po Seraik, kiptaiyat ne po taman eng' arawet ne po taman. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan." 
1Chronicles27:14 Ki Benaiah Piratonindet ne po lagogap Ephraim, kiptaiyat ne po taman ak agenge eng' arawetap taman ak agenge. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan." 
1Chronicles27:15 Ki Heldai Netopatindet ne po Othniel kiptaiyat ne po taman ak aeng' eng' arawetap taman ak aeng'. Ki tinyei eng' riipsennyi piik eliphuusyek tiptem ak ang'wan. 
1Chronicles27:16 Ki chu pounigap pororyosyegap Israel: ki Elieser weeriitap Zikri ne po piigap Reuben; eng' piigap Simion, ko ki Shepatiah weeriitap Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 eng' kap Lawi, ko ki Asabia weeriitap Kemuel; eng' kap Aron, ko ki Zadok," 
1Chronicles27:18 eng' kap Judah, ko ki Elihu, age eng' tupchosyegap Daudi; eng' kap Issakar, ko ki Omri weeriitap Mikael;" 
1Chronicles27:19 eng' kap Zebulun, ko ki Ismaia weeriitap Obadiah; eng' kap Naptali, ko ki Jeremot weeriitap Asriel;" 
1Chronicles27:19 eng' kap Zebulun, ko ki Ismaia weeriitap Obadiah; eng' kap Naptali, ko ki Jeremot weeriitap Asriel;" 
1Chronicles27:20 eng' lagogap Ephraim ko ki Hoshea weeriitap Azaziah; eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, ko ki Joel weeriitap Pedaiah;" 
1Chronicles27:20 eng' lagogap Ephraim ko ki Hoshea weeriitap Azaziah; eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, ko ki Joel weeriitap Pedaiah;" 
1Chronicles27:21 eng' kebebertap pororyetap Manasseh, eng' Gilead, ko ki Ido weeriitap Zekariah; eng' kap Benjamin, ko ki Jaasyel weeriitap Abner;" 
1Chronicles27:22 eng' kap Dan, ko ki Asarel weeriitap Jeroham. Chuuto ko ki kiptainigap pororyosyegap Israel." 
1Chronicles27:23 Ago ki ma iit Daudi che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak koba ng'wony, amu ki kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole atese Israel kotenit kecheigap kipsengwet." 
1Chronicles27:24 Ki toi Joab weeriitap Zeruiah koiit, ago ma iges; ki piit nereegek eng' Israel agobo koitoniito, ama ki sirchi koitonooto teteetap ateptap peetuusyek ne po Laitoryat Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Ki pou ole kigonoree tuguugap laitoryat Asmabet weeriitap Adiel. Ki pou Jonathan weeriitap Uzziah ole kigonoree tuguugap mbareenik, eng' nganasook, eng' nganasook che mengeechen ak eng' irimosyek." 
1Chronicles27:26 Ki pou Isri weeriitap Kelub icheek che kiyaei poisyetap mbar, ne po kabatisyetap emet." 
1Chronicles27:27 Ki pou Shimei Ramatindet mbareenigap sabibuk. Ki pou Sabdi Sipmindet ruroteetap mbareenigap sabibuk che ki konori. 
1Chronicles27:28 Ki pou Baal-hanan Gederindet keetiigap mseituni ak mogoonik che ki mi emet ne soi. Ki pou Joash ole kigonoree mwanik. 
1Chronicles27:29 Ki pou Sitrai Sharonindet akwotisyek che ki agetoos eng' Sharon. Ki pou Sapat weeriitap Adlai akwotisyek che ki mi atebwosyek. 
1Chronicles27:30 Ki pou Obil Ismaelindet tambeesik, ak ki pou Jedeia Meronotindet sigiroik." 
1Chronicles27:31 Ki pou Jasiis Hagrindet akwotisyegap keechiirek. Chuuto tugul ko ki pounigap tuguugap Laitoryat Daudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Ki kirwoogindet Jonathan weeriitap ng'eetap kametap Daudi, ki chiito ne iguitos tugun ak ko siriindet. Ki mi Jehiel weeriitap Akmoni kobooto weeriigap laitoryat." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ki kirwoogindet Ahitopel ne po kaplaitoryat. Ki chorweetap laitoryat, Hisai Arkindet." 
1Chronicles27:34 Ki rubei Jehoiada weeriitap Benaiah ak Abiathar, Ahitopel. Ki kiptaiyatap lugeetap laitoryat Joab." 
1Chronicles28:1 Ki iyum `Daudi pounik tugul che po Israel eng' Jerusalem, kobooto pounigap ortinwek, kiptainigap kweanaik che kiboisyechin laitoryat eng' riipseet, kiptainigap eliphuusyek, kiptainigap pogolwogik ak pounik che ki pou tuguuk tugul che po laitoryat, ak che po weeriikyik, kobooto kiptainik, piik tugul che kiimeen ak che nyigoonen." 
1Chronicles28:2 Ki tonon anyun Laitoryat Daudi ak kole, “Ogasa, tupchosyekyuk ak piikyuk. Ki mi muguleldanyu ateech koot ne imuung'ee moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ng'echereet ne tebee keelyegap Kamuktaindennyo, ak ki achop tuguuk che po teekseet.”" 
1Chronicles28:3 Ago ki leenjo Kamuktaindet, “Meteekyini koot kainennyu, amu ii chiitap lugeet ak ki itumde korotiik.”" 
1Chronicles28:4 Ago ki lewena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, eng' koot komugul ne po kwandanyu aek laitoryat eng' Israel koigeny. Ki lewen Judah koek pounindet, ak ki paibait eng' anee, eng' kootap Judah, ne kootap kwandanyu, ak eng' weeriigap kwandanyu; ak koyaa aek laitoryat eng' Israel tugul." 
1Chronicles28:5 Ki lewen Solomon weeriinnyu eng' weeriikyuk tugul, (amu kigogoono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor weeriik che chaang',) kotebee ng'echereetap laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koboi Israel." 
1Chronicles28:6 Ki mwaiwo kole, “Teechei Solomon weeriing'ung' koonnyu ak seremusyekyuk, amu ki alewen ineendet koek weeriinnyu, ak aegu kwandanyi." 
1Chronicles28:7 Agimiiti laitornatennyi koigeny, ngot koyai kotugul ng'atuutikyuk ak kirwoogutikyuk, ko uu rani.”" 
1Chronicles28:8 “Ara anyun nguno, eng' taitap Israel tugul, tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogasei Kamuktaindennyo: Oriip ak ocheeng' ng'atuutik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', si kobunjook emoni karaaran ak obagakyi lagokwok koek porotennywa koigeny." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Nai anyun inyee Solomon weeriinnyu, Kamuktaindetap kwandang'ung', ak iboisyechi ineendet eng' muguleldo ne ititaat, ak eng' kabwaatutik che tinyei chameet, amu isyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugulelwek tugul ak koguitos kabwaatutik tugul che po metit. Ngot icheeng' ineendet, inyooru; ago ngot imete ineendet, kowiirtoin koigeny." 
1Chronicles28:10 Riipkei anyun; amu ki kolewenin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iteech koot ne po ole-tiliil. Kimitu anyun ak iteech.” 
1Chronicles28:11 Yeityo kogoochi `Daudi Solomon weeriinnyi kergeindap keterut, ak ne po kooriik che tilaatiin, ne po ole kigonoree tuguuk, ne po kooriik che po parak, ne po kooriik che po oriit ak ne po kerwetap rireenet." 
1Chronicles28:12 Ki igoochi ineendet kergeindap tuguuk tugul che ki iboorchi agobo seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kooriik tugul che ki kiyieme, che po ole kigonorisye eng' kootap Kamuktaindet, kobooto che po ole kigonoree tuguuk che itabaanatiin." 
1Chronicles28:13 Ki igoochi kogeny pcheutigap riipsosyegap Tisiik ak Lawiik, ne po poisyet tugul ne po otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ne po tuguuk tugul che kiboisyee eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles28:14 Ki igoochi karagendoetap thahabu ngebiman ne po tuguuk che po thahabu, ak tuguuk che po poisyet age tugul, ak karagendoetap fedha che po tuguuk tugul che po fedha ngebiman, che po tuguuk tugul che po poisyet age tugul." 
1Chronicles28:15 Ki igoochi kogeny ole tee thahabu che po keelyegap tait, che po taisyekyik ngebiman ak che po keeldo age tugul ne po tait, ole tee tuguuk che po fedha che po tait age tugul ak taisyekyik, keeldo age tugul ne po fedha ngebiman, ko uu poisyetap keeldo age tugul ne po tait," 
1Chronicles28:16 ak thahabu ngebiman che po mesosyegap magatinigap kabartaet che po meset age tugul; ak fedha che po mesosyegap fedha; 
1Chronicles28:17 ak kariik che kirutunee panyeek, ak taabook, ak kigombok, che po thahabu che tiliileen tugul: ak che po taaboogap thahabu ngebiman, ko po taabeet age tugul; ak che po taaboogap fedha ngebiman, ko po taabeet age tugul;" 
1Chronicles28:18 ak thahabu che tiliileen ngebiman che po kapkorosuut ne kibeelee nyamdutik. Ki igoochi kora thahabu che po kergeindap chepkichutit, chooto kerubisyek che kiuito kebebaikwak si kouur moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles28:19 Ki kigoono aguiyo chuuto tugul eng' siruutik kobun eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, poisyonik tugul che po kergeini." 
1Chronicles28:20 Ki leenji `Daudi Solomon weeriinnyi, “Kimitu nyiganitu, ak iyai poisyet. Meiywei anan itoptoben, amu mi kobooten Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ineendet Kamuktaindennyu. Mabagaaktoin anan kometen agoi kogeskei poisyet tugul ne po otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
1Chronicles28:21 Keero, mi riipsosyegap Tisiik ak Lawiik agobo otisyet tugul ne po kootap Kamuktaindet, ak mi kobooten eng' poisyet age tugul chii age tugul ne chamei ak ko utaat, agobo otisyet age tugul. Kase iit ng'atuutyeng'ung' komyee kiptainik ak piik tugul.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Ki leenji `Laitoryat Daudi tuiyet tugul, “Ta ko ming'in Solomon weeriinnyu, ne ki lewen ineegei Kamuktaindet, ak kota ko etyet, ak ko oo poisyet; amu koyooto po laitoryat koma po chiito, po Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ki achop anyun eng' kimnateennyu tugul, thahabu agobo tuguugap thahabu, che po kootap Kamuktaindennyu, fedha agobo tuguugap fedha, sugunonik agobo tuguugap sugunonik, kariik agobo tuguugap kariik ak keetiik agobo tuguugap keetiik; koik che kiguure soam, ak koik che kitetei, kindoi kotabon ng'wony, che po saleiywek che teerchiin, koik alak tugul che po kamanuutyet ne oo, ak koik ng'iisyat che leelach." 
1Chronicles29:3 Kogeny, amu ki acham miising' kootap Kamuktaindennyu, ko uu ye atinye tuguukyuk che po thahabu ak fedha, agoochini kootap Kamuktaindennyu, che siirei tuguuk tugul che ki achopchi koot ne tiliil;" 
1Chronicles29:4 talendaisyek eliphuusyek somok che po thahabu, che po thahabu che po Opir, ak talendaisyek eliphuusyek tisap che po fedha che tiliileen, che kiliige inatusyegap kooriik," 
1Chronicles29:5 che po thahabu agobo tuguugap thahabu, ak che po fedha agobo tuguugap fedha, ak che po poisyet age tugul che yaei musogik. Ng'oo anyun ne chamei kotabaanjigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuuni?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Ki igoito anyun eng' chamyet pounigap kooriigap kwanisyek, ak pounigap ortinwegap Israel, ak kiptainigap eliphuusyek, ak che po pogolwogik, kobooto pounik che ki pou poisyetap laitoryat." 
1Chronicles29:7 Ki igoito agobo otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet talendaisyek eliphuusyek muut che po thahabu kobooto kebeberwek che mengeechen eliphuusyek taman che po thahabu, talendaisyek che po fedha eliphuusyek taman, talendaisyek eliphuusyek taman ak sisiit che po sugunonik, ak che po kariik talendaisyek eliphuusyek pogol." 
1Chronicles29:8 Chii age tugul eng' icheek ne ki tinyei koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo, ko ki igoito kinde ole kigonoree tuguugap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koba eutap Jehiel Gersonindet." 
1Chronicles29:9 Ki poiboitu anyun piik, amu ki igoito eng' chamyet, amu ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' muguleldo ne igesunotkei. Ki paibait agine Laitoryat Daudi eng' poiboiyet ne oo." 
1Chronicles29:10 Ki ilas anyun `Daudi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap tuiyet tugul, ak ki le, “Iberuurot inyee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kwandanyo, koigeny ak koigeny." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, neng'ung' ooindo ak kamuktaet, ak toroornatet ak katerteeret ak etunateet, amu cheguuk tuguuk tugul che mi kipsengwet ak che mi ng'wony. Neng'ung' ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatet, ii toroorot ak ii metitap tugul." 
1Chronicles29:12 Punun mogornatosyek ak teegisto, ak ibou tugul. Mi eung'ung' kimnateet ak kamuktaet, inyee ne ieeti ak igoochini tugul kimnateet." 
1Chronicles29:13 Ara anyun, Kamuktaindennyo, kimwaun kongoi, ak kilasu kaineng'ung' ne po toroornatet." 
1Chronicles29:14 Ago aa ng'oo anee, ak nee piikyuk, kot kimuuch kigoite eng' chamyet ko uu ni? Punun tuguuk tugul, ak kagigoonin tuguuguk." 
1Chronicles29:15 Amu ki toek eng' taing'ung', ak ki kiprutoinik, ko uu ye ki uu kwanisyekyok tugul. Uu peetuusyekyok eng' ng'wony urwet, ama mi ne tebyei agoi." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, punu eung'ung' tuguuchuuto tugul kogechop si keteegunenen koot ne po kaineng'ung' ne tiliil, cheguuk tugul." 
1Chronicles29:17 Angen, ee Kamuktaindennyu ale, ityeme muguleldo, ak ibaibai eng' ne po iman. Ki agoonin tuguuchuuto tugul eng' chamyet ak lititindap muguleldanyu. Ak kaageer nguno eng' poiboiyet piiguk che mi yu kogoonin eng' chamyet." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Abraham, ak ko po Isak, ak ko po Israel, kwanisyekyok, riip ng'olyoondoniito koigeny eng' kabwaatutik che ibwaati mugulelwegap piiguk, ak ichopchigei mugulelwekwak." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ak igoochi weeriinnyu Solomon muguleldo ne ititaat, si koriip ng'atuutiguk, paornatosyeguk ak kaneetisyosyeguk, koyai chuuto tugul, ak koteech kootap laitoryat, ne ki achopchi tuguuchuuto.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Yeityo koleenji `Daudi tuiyet tugul, “Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'.” Ak ki ilas tuiyet komugul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, ki ing'uruuk ak kogutung'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak laitoryat." 
1Chronicles29:21 Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ko ki eeny tiseiywek koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei, eiik eliphuut, mengichik eliphuut ak aaregap keechiir eliphuut, kobooto kagoochinoikwak che kieei, ak koroseek ng'iisyat che po Israel tugul." 
1Chronicles29:22 Ki amis ak koeeiso icheek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto eng' kagasetapkei ne oo. Ki yai Solomon weeriitap Daudi koek laitoryat kogeny, ak koiil ineendet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek pounindet ak koiil Zadok koek tisiindet." 
1Chronicles29:23 Ki tebee anyun Solomon ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek laitoryat, kogeer Daudi kwandanyi. Kibor ineendet ak ki kas iit Israel tugul ineendet." 
1Chronicles29:24 Ki kas iit pounik tugul ak piik che kiimeen, kobooto weeriik tugul che po Laitoryat Daudi, Laitoryat Solomon." 
1Chronicles29:25 Ki ieet `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Solomon miising' eng' taitap Israel tugul, ak kogoochi ineendet etunatetap laitornatet ne kitom kigoochi laitoryat age tugul eng' Israel ne ki indoune ineendet." 
1Chronicles29:26 Ki laitoran Daudi anyun weeriitap Jesse eng' Israel tugul. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ki laitoran eng' Israel kenyiisyek artam; ki laitoran eng' Hebron kenyiisyek tisap ak kolaitoran eng' Jerusalem kenyiisyek sosom ak somok. 
1Chronicles29:28 Ki ilil, ko kagoyam peetuusyekyik, mogornatosyek ak teegisto. Ki laitoran Solomon weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
1Chronicles29:29 Ak poisyonigap Laitoryat Daudi, che po tai ak che po let, ko siraatiin eng' kitabuutap Samuel keerindet, ak kitabuutap Nathan maotyot ak eng' kitabuutap Gad keerindet," 
1Chronicles29:30 kobooto laitornatennyi tugul ak kimnateennyi, ak peetuusyegap sabeennyi, ak che po Israel, ak che po laitornatosyek tugul che po emotinwek." 
2Chronicles1:1 Ki kimiit Solomon weeriitap Daudi eng' laitornatennyi, ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi kobooto ineendet ak ki ieet miising' ineendet." 
2Chronicles1:2 Ki ng'alaalji `Solomon Israel tugul, kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak che po pogolwogik, kirwoogik ak pounindet age tugul eng' Israel tugul ak kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek." 
2Chronicles1:3 Ki wo anyun Solomon kobooto tuiyet tugul, komosta ne toroor eng' Gibeon, amu ki mi yooto emait ne kituiyechin ne po Kamuktaindet, ne kiga teech Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' surkwen." 
2Chronicles1:4 Kiga koip `Daudi moingetap Kamuktaindet kotogos eng' Kiriath-Jearim konyo ole kiga kochopchi Daudi: amu kiga koteekyi emait eng' Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles1:5 Ki mi yooto kaptisisyet ne po sugunwet ne kiyaei Bezalel weeriitap Uri, weeriitap Hur, ne ki miitei taitap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki pa Solomon ak tuiyet ole mi." 
2Chronicles1:6 Ki togosta Solomon kwo ole miitei kaptisisyet ne po sugunwet, ne ki miitei emait ne kituiyechin, eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei eliphuut." 
2Chronicles1:7 King'aang'jigei anyun `Kamuktaindet Solomon kemounooto ak koleenji, “Soom kiit ne imache agoonin.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Ki leenji `Solomon Kamuktaindet, “Ki iyachi myeeindo ne oo kwandanyu Daudi ak kiyaa aek laitoryat ageer ineendet." 
2Chronicles1:9 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ingogimiit kayomiset ne ki iyomisyi kwandanyu Daudi, amu koiyaa aek laitoryat aboi piik che tee chaang'indo temburyek eng' ng'wony." 
2Chronicles1:10 Koono anyun utaatyet ak naet, si amuuch amanda ak anyo eng' taitap pichu, amu ng'oo ne imuuchi korwookyi pichuguk chaang' ko uu ni?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Solomon, “Amu ki mi ng'olyoondoniito muguleldang'ung', ama isoom mogornatosyek ak chaang'indap tuguuk, anan ko teegisto, anan kebar icheeget che wechin, ama isoom isap keny ago kesoomjigei utaatyet ak naet, si kobiit irwookyi piikyuk, che ki andein iegu laitoryat ibou," 
2Chronicles1:12 kagegoonin anyun utaatyet ak naet. Ak agoonin mogornatosyek, chaang'indap tuguuk ak teegisto, che tomo konyoor laitorinik che ki kondounenen, amaa kobiitu age ne nyooru ko uu nooto.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Konyo anyun Solomon eng' komosato toroor ne ki mi Gibeon, eng' taitap emait ne kituiyechin, konyo Jerusalem. Ak ki laitoran ineendet eng' Israel." 
2Chronicles1:14 Ki iyum Solomon kariisyegap lugeet ak piik che ketei paraisisyek; ki tinyei kariisyek eliphuut agenge ak pogol ang'wan ak piik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che ketei paraisisyek, ki inde nganasoogap kariisyek ak ole mi laitoryat eng' Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles1:15 Ki yai laitoryat fedha ak thahabu eng' Jerusalem kot kotenit koik, ak ki yai taragonik kotenit mogoonik che mi emet ne soi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Ki kigetune Misiri paraisisyek che ki tinyei Solomon; ki alei chemung'arainigap laitoryat kobee akwotisyek. 
2Chronicles1:17 Ki ale chepkichutit eng' Misiri shekelisyek pogol lo che po fedha, ak paraisiit ne yamei pogol agenge ak konom. Kigetyi ko uu nooto laitorinik tugul che po Hitik ak che po Syria." 
2Chronicles2:1 Ki pegechi anyun Solomon koteekyi koot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koot ne po pounatennyi. 
2Chronicles2:2 Ki iit Solomon piik eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap che laisei, piik eliphuusyek tamanwogik sisiit che waei koik eng' tuloonook ak piik eliphuusyek somok ak pogol lo che tononjin." 
2Chronicles2:3 Ki iyookto Solomon koba kap Huram laitoryatap Tyro, keleenji, “Yaiywo agane ko uu ye ki iyachi abba Daudi, ye ki iyookyi ineendet taragonik koteege koonnyi ne menyei." 
2Chronicles2:4 Keero, ateekyini koot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu si atabaanji ineendet ak abeel eng' tainnyi nyamdutigap tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, kobunji magatinigap kabartaet che po kotugul ak kagoochinoik che kibeelei karon ak koskoleny, eng' sabatoisyek, ak eng' ye kaleel arawet, ak eng' igoorwek che ki king'at che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu. Po koigeny niito eng' Israel." 
2Chronicles2:5 Oo koot ne ateeche, amu oo Kamuktaindennyu kosiir kamuktaik tugul." 
2Chronicles2:6 Ago ng'oo anyun ne imuuchi koteekyi ineendet koot, ngo mayamei ineendet kipsengwet, kipsengwet ne po parak miising'? Aa ng'oo anyun, kot ateekyi koot, kobatee kebeelji nyamdutik eng' tainnyi?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ara anyun, iyookwo chiito ne ng'oom ne imuuchi koyai poisyetap thahabu, ak ne po fedha, ak ne po sugunonik, ak ne po kariik, ak ne ingen konap ngoroik che arusen ne piriir, ak che piriireen, ak che buluu, ak piik che utaatiin eng' waet age tugul, ngo nyo kotebi ak piik che ng'oomen che mi kobooto eng' Judah ak eng' Jerusalem, che ki kochop abba Daudi." 
2Chronicles2:8 Iyookwo kogeny keetiigap taragonik, piribirinik, ak keetiigap almug che po Lebanon, amu angen ale ng'oomen otwogiguk eng' ebetap keetiigap Lebanon. Tuun mi otwogikyuk ak otwogiguk," 
2Chronicles2:9 si kochobwa keetiik che chaang' miising', amu koot ne neegit ateech ko oo ak ko po kwong'eet." 
2Chronicles2:10 Agoochini otwogiguk piik che ebei keetiik, nganuuk che kigetui, tanisyek pogol aeng' che po nganuuk che ki kibor, tanisyek pogol aeng' che po baale, ak divaik che yamegei ak litaisyek eliphuusyek pogol ang'wan, ak mwanik che yamegei ak litaisyek eliphuusyek pogol ang'wan.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Kowolji anyun Huram laitoryatap Tyro eng' parweet ne ki iyookyi Solomon, koleenji: “Amu chamei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik, ko ki indein iegu laitoryat ibou icheek." 
2Chronicles2:12 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne ki yai kipsengwet ak ng'wony! Ne Ki kogoochi Laitoryat Daudi weeriit ne ng'oom, ne ki kigoochi kaguiyet ak naet, si kobiit koteekyi koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koot ne po pounatennyi." 
2Chronicles2:13 Kaayogu anyun chiito ne utaat, ne ki kigoochi kaguiyet, ne po Huram kwandanyu," 
2Chronicles2:14 weeriitap kwondo ne po tiibiigap Dan ak ki po Tyro kwandanyi. Tinyei ineendet utaatyet ne imuuchi koyai poisyetap thahabu ak fedha, sugunonik ak kariik, ne po koik ak ne po keetiik, ak ne po ngoroik che arusen ne piriir, ak che buluu, ak ne po katanit ne karaaran, ak ne po che piriireen. Ingen kowai waet age tugul ak koyai kiit age tugul ne kaibwaat. Igoochi ineendet kobois kobooto piiguk che ng'oomen, ak kobooto piik che ng'oomen che po kiptaiyandennyu Daudi kwandang'ung'." 
2Chronicles2:15 Ingoyokyi anyun `kiptaiyandennyu otwogikyik nganuuk, ak baale, ak mwanik, ak divaik, che ki mwa," 
2Chronicles2:16 si keep keetiik che tee che imache eng' Lebanon ak kiyogun ko ratotiin kobun peek eng' nyanjetap Mediterenian agoi Joppa. Yeityo iip eng' yooto kotogosta koba Jerusalem.” 
2Chronicles2:17 Ki iit Solomon toek tugul che ki mi emetap Israel, eng' koitonooto kiiti kwandanyi Daudi, ak ki ek tugul piik eliphuusyek pogol ak konom ak somok ak pogol lo." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ki inde piik eliphuusyek tamanwogik tisap che laisei, ak eliphuusyek tamanwogik sisiit che waei koik eng' tuloonook, ak piik che tononjin poisyet eliphuusyek somok ak pogol lo che igoochin piik poisyet."
