2Chronicles3:1 Ki toi anyun Solomon koteech kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jerusalem eng' tulweetap Moriah, ole ki mong'jine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwandanyi Daudi, ki chop ineendet eng' ole ki ng'at Daudi, eng' rwanyut ne kiboorsee ne po Ornan Jebusindet." 
2Chronicles3:2 Ki toi koteekso eng' kenyiitap ang'wan ne po laitornatennyi, arawet ne po aeng' eng' peetuutap aeng'." 
2Chronicles3:3 Chu anyun lumeiywek che ki lumda Solomon agobo teekseetap kootap Kamuktaindet. Ki ek koindo mitainik tiptem ak tisap ak ki ek tebeesindo mitainik sogool. 
2Chronicles3:4 Ki aechin tebeesindap koot ak kooindap keterut ne ki mi taitap koot, ki mitainik sogool, ak ki ek kooindap tononennyi mitainik konom ak ang'wan. Ki iliige thahabu che tiliileen komostap oriit." 
2Chronicles3:5 Kitetee koot ne oo keetiigap piribirinik che ki iliige thahabu che korooron ak kiwachinot itoonwegap tiironigap sosik ak nyororosyek. 
2Chronicles3:6 Ak kilelesonji koot eng' koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo si kogararanit. Ak thahabu che kiboisyee ko ki punu Parbaim. 
2Chronicles3:7 Ki iliige kogeny thahabu koot, kimurtoinik, tugatugik, inatusyek, kereiywegap kurgotikyik, ak kiwachi inatusyek itoonwegap karubisyek." 
2Chronicles3:8 Ki teech koot ne tiliil miising'. Ki aechin tebeesindap koot ak koindonyi, ki ek mitainik sogool. Ki iliigote thahabu che korooron, che ki itei tanisyek tiptem." 
2Chronicles3:9 Ki ek nyigiisindap kipchumarisyek shekelisyek konom che po thahabu. Ak ki iliige thahabu kooriik che po parak. 
2Chronicles3:10 Ki inde itoonwek aeng' che po kerubisyek koot ne tiliil miising' ak koliige thahabu. 
2Chronicles3:11 Ki ek mitainik sogool kooindap kebebaigap kerubisyek tuwai. Koindap kebepchet agenge ko ki mitainik aeng' ak robo, ak ki itei inaatutap koot, ak ki mitainik aeng' ak robo kebepchet age, ak kitiinyegei kebepchetap kerubit age ak ne po age." 
2Chronicles3:12 Ak ki mitainik aeng' ak robo kebepchetap kerubit age, ak ki itei inaatutap koot, ak ki mitainik aeng' ak robo kebepchet age agine, kotiinyegei ak kebepchetap kerubit age." 
2Chronicles3:13 Kiga uitogei kebebaigap kerubisyechuuto tuwai koit mitainik sogool. Ki tonondos eng' keelyekwak ak kiga tokyigei togoochikwak koot. 
2Chronicles3:14 Kinap angeet ne kioiye koot, che buluu ak che arusen ne piriir, ak che piriireen ak katanit ne karaaran, ak kinapchi chooto kerubisyek." 
2Chronicles3:15 Ak ki yai kogeny tolochik aeng' eng' taitap koot, che po mitainik taman ak lo kooindap tononennyi, ak ki mitainik aeng' ak robo, metit age tugul ne ki mi tuguuchooto parak." 
2Chronicles3:16 Ki yai nyororosyek eng' koot ne po oriit, ak konde paragusyegap tolochik. Ki yai kora itoonwegap logoek pogol agenge ak koiywachi paragutap sirimwechooto." 
2Chronicles3:17 Ki lumda tolochichooto eng' taitap Hekaluut, ki lumda age eng' komostap tai ak kolumda age eng' komostap kaataam. Kiguure ne ki mi komostap tai Jakin ak koguure ne ki mi komostap kaataam Boaz." 
2Chronicles4:1 Ki yai kogeny kaptisisyetap sugunonik, ki mitainik sogool koindonyi, ko mitainik sogool tebeesindanyi, ak ki mitainik ang'wan ak kebeberyat kooindap tononennyi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Ki yai nyanjet ne kitanyi ne po mitainik ang'wan ak kebeberyat, kong'etee taban agoi taban, ne ki kitainganat, ak ki mitainik aeng' ak robo kooindap tononennyi; ak kimi mireiywot ne po mitainik taman ak somok ak nusu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ak kimi itoonwegap eiik ng'wonyutap mireiywot, che kiyiem kotuiyo, che po mitainik ang'wan ak nusu, che kiyiemei nyanjanooto. Ki aeng' eichooto, che ki kitanyi, ye ki kitanyi nyanjet." 
2Chronicles4:4 Kiga tonone nyanjanooto itoonwegap eiik, taman ak aeng', kogeerei somogu murot kaataam, kogeerei somogu cherongo, kogeerei somogu murot tai, kogeerei somogu kong'asiis: ak kitonone paragunnywa nyanjanooto, ak ki keer sugulumwekwak oriit." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ak ki aechin tebeesindanyi ak nyigiisindap euut; ak ki kiyai mireiywondennyi kogergeit ak mireiywotap kigombet, ko uu taapteet ne kaiye: ak kiyamegei ak debeisyek eliphuusyek lo." 
2Chronicles4:6 Ak ki yai taabook taman che eecheen, ak ki inde muut komostap eutap tai, ak ki inde muut komostap murot kaataam, si kiuunse; ki kiuune chooto tuguuk che po kagoochinoik che kibeelei: ago ki po nyanjet tisiik si kounegei." 
2Chronicles4:7 Ak ki yai keelyek taman che po tait eng' thahabu ko uu ng'atuutyet ne ki king'at agobo tuguuchooto; ak ki inde Hekaluut oriit, ki inde muut komostap eutap tai, konde muut komostap murot kaataam." 
2Chronicles4:8 Ak ki yai kogeny mesosyek taman, ak konde Hekaluut, ki inde muut komostap eutap tai, konde muut komostap murot kaataam. Ak ki yai taabook pogol che mengeechen che po thahabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Ak ki yai kogeny seremutap tisiik, ak seremut ne oo, ak kereiywek che po seremut, ak koliige sugunonik kereiywegap kurgotikwak." 
2Chronicles4:10 Ak ki inde nyanjanooto komostap tai, kogeer kong'asiis, kotokyigei murot tai." 
2Chronicles4:11 Ak ki yai Huram tereenik, ak kechigosyek che eecheen, ak taabook che mengeechen. Ki iges anyun Huram poisyet ne ki yachi laitoryat Solomon eng' kootap Kamuktaindet:" 
2Chronicles4:12 tolochik aeng', ak pagulisyek, ak metowek aeng' che ki mi paragutap tolochichooto; ak karichooto aeng' regerotiin, kotuch pagulisyechooto aeng' che ki mi paragutap tolochik;" 
2Chronicles4:13 ak itoonwegap logoek pogol ang'wan che po karichooto aeng' regerotiin; ortinwek aeng' che po logoek che po karnet age tugul ne ki kireger, kotuch pagulisyechooto aeng' po metowek che ki mi paragutap tolochik." 
2Chronicles4:14 Ki yai kogeny ng'echerok ak taabookwak che eecheen, che ki mi ng'echerochooto," 
2Chronicles4:15 nyanjanooto agenge, ak itoonwegap eiik taman ak aeng' che ki mi kurereetap nyanjanooto." 
2Chronicles4:16 Ak ki yai kwandap Huram tereenik ak icheek, ak kechigosyek che eecheen, ak kariik che kirutunee panyeek, ak tuguukyik tugul, koyachi Laitoryat Solomon kobunji kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kiyae sugunonik che sitatiin." 
2Chronicles4:17 Ki yai laitoryat tuguuchooto eng' Atebweetap Jordan, eng' ole mi meneet eng' kwenutap Sukoth ak Sereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Ki yai anyun Solomon tuguuchuuto tugul eng' chaang'indo: amu ma imuuch chii konai nyigiisindap sugunonik. 
2Chronicles4:19 Ak ki yai Solomon tuguuk tugul che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet, kapkorosutap thahabu, ak mesosyek che ki tebee magatiinik che itabaanatiin;" 
2Chronicles4:20 kiyae thahabu che tiliileen keelyegap taisyek kobooto taisyekwak, si kobiit kolaldos eng' taitap koot ne po oriit, ko uu ye ki king'at;" 
2Chronicles4:21 ak kiyae thahabu, thahabu ne ma purugot ak kiy, taaptook, ak taisyek, ak kanameiywek;" 
2Chronicles4:22 ak magasisyek, che tilei ole lalei eng' taisyek, ak taabook che mengeechen, ak kechigosyek, ak tereenik che ki ibe maat, kiyae chooto thahabu che tiliileen: ak ki po thahabu ole ki kibunei kebendi ko, ak kereiywegap kurgotikyik che po oriit che po ole-tiliil miising', ak kereiywegap kurgotigap koot, nooto Hekaluut." 
2Chronicles5:1 Ki igeskei anyun ko uu nooto poisyet tugul ne ki yai Solomon agobo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki ip Solomon tuguuk che kiga kotabaan Daudi kwandanyi kobwa ko, che po fedha, thahabu ak tuguuk che kiboisyee ak konde ole kigonoree konoraik che po kootap Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles5:2 Ki iyum anyun `Solomon poisyek che po Israel ak kandoik tugul che po ortinwek, pounik che po kwanisyegap piigap Israel, kobwa Jerusalem, kotogosune moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nganaseetap Daudi, nooto ko Zion." 
2Chronicles5:3 Ki iyumgei piik tugul che po Israel eng' ole kimi laitoryat eng' igoorto, ne ki mi eng' arawetap tisap." 
2Chronicles5:4 Kingo pwa poisyek tugul che po Israel, ko ki konop Lawiik moinget," 
2Chronicles5:5 ak ki ip icheek moinget, emait ne kituiyechin ak tereenik tugul che tiliileen che ki mi Emait; ki ip chooto kotogos Tisiik ak Lawiik." 
2Chronicles5:6 Ki iyumjigei taitap moinget Laitoryat Solomon ak tuiyet tugul ne po Israel, ak kieny keechiirek ak eiik che ki ma kimuuchi kerar anan kiit eng' chaang'indo." 
2Chronicles5:7 Ki ip tisiik anyun moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyo ole tebee eng' koot ne po oriit, ole-tiliil miising', kurereetap kebebaigap kerubisyek." 
2Chronicles5:8 Kiga iito kerubisyek kebebaikwak kouur ole mi moinget ak ki tuch kerubisyek moinget ak keetiikyik che ki ibe. 
2Chronicles5:9 Kigooen keetichooto miising', ak kitaagu walisyekwak eng' moinget eng' taitap koot ne po oriit, ago ki ma ko taagu eng' ole po saang': mi yooto agoi ra." 
2Chronicles5:10 Ki ma komi kiy moinget oriit kobatee koik aeng' che lebeleen che ki indoi Musa eng' Horeb, ye kiyaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor arorutyet ak piigap Israel, ye kiga komong' eng' Misiri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Ak kingo mong' tisiik eng' ole-tiliil, (amu kiga kotiliilgei tisiik tugul che ki mi yooto, koma riip kweanaikwak." 
2Chronicles5:12 Kitononso Lawiik tugul ak icheek che kityenik, chooto ko Asaph, Herman, Jeduthun ak weeriikwak kobooto tupchosyekwak eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po kaptisisyet, kolaachi katanisyek che korooron ak kibirei sanisyegap sugunonik, kibugandinik ak ketubosyek. Ki mi kobooto icheek tisiik pogolu ak tiptem che kuutei iryagook.)" 
2Chronicles5:13 Ki iyomogei piik che kuutei iryagook ak tyeniik kibagenge, ak kotyen ko uu cheet agenge, kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak komwachin kongoi. Kityenso icheek eng' kutit ne oo kobooto iryagook, sanisyegap sugunonik ak tuguuk alak che kityene, kolasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kotyeni koleen: “Amu myee ineendet; po koigeny rireenennyi.” Eng' yooto anyun, koginyi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pooldet," 
2Chronicles5:14 kot ko mata komuuch tisiik kotononso kobois amu poldanooto, amu ki nyi liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles6:1 Ki ng'alaal anyun Solomon kole, “Ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, menyei ineendet poolik che nyigiisen." 
2Chronicles6:2 Kaateegun koot ne imenye, komostang'ung' ne imenye koigeny.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Kiwelelgei laitoryat ak koberuur tuiyet tugul ne po Israel: ak ki tonon tuiyet tugul ne po Israel. 
2Chronicles6:4 Ki le ineendet, “Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ye kagoyai eng' eunnyi kosulda ne ki ng'alaalji eng' kutinnyi abba Daudi kole," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu piikyuk eng' emetap Misiri, ko malewen nganas eng' ortinwek tugul che po Israel ateech koot si kobiit kotebee yooto kainennyu; amalewen chii age tugul koek pounindet koboi piikyuk Israel." 
2Chronicles6:6 Ago ki alewen Jerusalem si kobiit kotebee yooto kainennyu, ak ki alewen Daudi koboi piikyuk Israel.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 “Kimach eng' muguleldannyi abba Daudi kole koteekyi koot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
2Chronicles6:8 Ago ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwandanyu Daudi, ‘Amu kimi muguleldang'ung' iteekyi koot kainennyu, ko ki iyai kiit ne myee ibwaat ko uu nooto eng' muguleldang'ung'." 
2Chronicles6:9 Nganda uu nooto, koma inyee ne teechei koyooto, ago weeriing'ung' ne mang'une poortang'ung', ineendet ne teekyin kainennyu koot.’ ”" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Kagoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondennyi ne ki mwa. Ki abiitu ageer kwandanyu Daudi ak nguno atebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Israel, ko uu ye ki iaror Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak koateekyi koot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ki ande yooto moinget, ne mi oriit arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki yai ak piigap Israel.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Ki tonon ineendet eng' taitap kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' taitap tuiyet tugul ne po Israel ak kochuul eunekyik." 
2Chronicles6:13 Kiga yai Solomon eng' sugunwet ole kitororit, koindonyi ak tebeesindanyi ko ki aechin ak ki mitainik aeng' ak robo, ak kooindap tononennyi kogimitait agenge ak robo, yeityo konde kwenutap seremut. Kitonone yooto yeityo kogutuny eng' taitap tuiyet tugul ne po Israel ak kochuul eunekyik kotokyigei kipsengwet." 
2Chronicles6:14 Ki sa ineendet kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ma mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor age ne uu inyee, eng' kipsengwet anan eng' ng'wony, ne riibei kayomiset ak rireenet ak otwogiguk, che pendote taing'ung' eng' mugulelwekwak tugul." 
2Chronicles6:15 Ki isuldochi otwogindeng'ung' abba Daudi kiit ne ki iyomisyi ineendet; ee ki imwa eng' kuting'ung' ak kaiyai kosulda eng' kamugeng'ung', ko uu kiit ne uu rani." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, isuldochi otwogindeng'ung' abba Daudi kiit ne ki iyomisyi, ileenji, ‘Ma petenen chiito ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Israel eng' tainnyu, ngot koriip lagoguk ortinwekwak, kobendatee ng'atuutyennyu, ko uu ye ki iwendote tainnyu.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ingogimiit ng'olyoondeng'ung' ne ki imwachi otwogindeng'ung' Daudi.”" 
2Chronicles6:18 Ago tos menyei Kamuktaindet ak piik iman eng' ng'wony? Keero, ma yamin kipsengwet itebee, anan kipsengwet ne po parak miising', ko ming'in ne tya anyun kooi koateech!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Ago konyit saaetap otwogindeng'ung' ak soomennyi, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu, kas riirek ak saaet ne saaei otwogindeng'ung' eng' taing'ung'." 
2Chronicles6:20 Ingogeer konyeguk kooi peet ak kemoi, kogeer komosta ne ki imwa ile indoi kaineng'ung'. Kas saaet ne saaei otwogindeng'ung' kotokyingei komosi." 
2Chronicles6:21 Ak igas soomutigap otwogindeng'ung' ak piiguk Israel, ye saaei kotokyingei yuto. Ee kas anyun eng' ole imenye eng' kipsengwet; ak ye igas, inyochi kaat." 
2Chronicles6:22 Ngot koleelji chii chiitap kokwennyi ak kebirchi ineendet koyasyo ak konyo koyasyo eng' taitap kaptisisyeng'ung' eng' kooi," 
2Chronicles6:23 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet ak iyai. Ye irwooksechi otwogiguk, iyaakyi mugetuut ineendet ne kalel ak inde kotebee metinnyi ortinwekyik. Iityi imanda ineendet ne po iman, igoochi ko uu imandanyi." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Ngot kebar piiguk Israel eng' taitap puunik, amu ki koyaun tengekto ak koweek kogeny ak kong'aany kaineng'ung', kosa ak koriiryo eng' taing'ung' eng' kooi," 
2Chronicles6:25 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet, ak inyochi kaat piiguk Israel eng' tengektonywa, ak imutu icheek kogeny kobwa emet ne ki igoochi icheek ak kwanisyekwak." 
2Chronicles6:26 Ye kerak kipsengwet ak kobet ropta amu ki koyaun icheek tengekto, ko ngot kosa kotokyigei komosi, kong'aany kaineng'ung', ak koweek eng' tengektonywa, ye inyaliil icheek," 
2Chronicles6:27 kaigai kas anyun eng' kipsengwet, ak inyochi kaat otwogiguk eng' tengektonywa, ak ne po piiguk Israel. Ineet icheek ooreet ne myee ne nyolu kobendatee, ak iyookyi ropta emeng'ung' ne ki igoochi piiguk koek porotennywa.”" 
2Chronicles6:28 “Ngot kobiit rubeet anan ko koroito eng' emet. Ngot kobiit chelalityet, ngo kameiyo peek, anan ko uchatet, ngo maiywa peek, anan chereng'endet anan ko kutyet, ngot koyiem icheek puunikwak eng' emetap nganasookwak, anan kobiit koroito age tugul anan ko myando age tugul," 
2Chronicles6:29 ko saaet anan ko soomet age tugul ne kasoom chii age tugul, anan ko ne kasoom piiguk tugul che po Israel, ne naei chii age tugul myandanyi ak aragenennyi, ak kochuul eunekyik kotokyi kooi," 
2Chronicles6:30 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet oldang'ung' ole imenye, ak inyochi kaat ak iyaakyi chii age tugul ko uu ortinwekyik tugul, ko uu ye ingen muguleldanyi, amu inyee inyegei ne ingen mugulelwegap weeriigap piik" 
2Chronicles6:31 si kobiit koiywein ak kobendatee ortinweguk kotee kosaptos eng' emet ne ki igoochi kwanisyekyok.” 
2Chronicles6:32 “Ak eng' chiito ne po pororyosyek, ne ma po piiguk Israel, ngo nyo eng' emet ne loo agobo kaineng'ung' ne oo, ak agobo eung'ung' ne kiim, ak eung'ung' ne chuulaat, ye pwa ak kosa kotokyigei kooi," 
2Chronicles6:33 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet eng' oldang'ung' ole imenye, ak iyai ko uu tuguuk tugul che kaguurchin chiichooto po pororyosyek, si kobiit konai kaineng'ung' piik tugul che po ng'wony ak koiywein, ko uu ye iywein piiguk Israel, ak si kobiit konai kole kooi ki ateech kemwaitoe kaineng'ung'.”" 
2Chronicles6:34 “Ngot koba piiguk kobargei ak puunikwak, eng' ooreet age tugul ne keyooktoe, ak kosaain kotokyigei nganasani ki ilewen ak kooi koateekyi kaineng'ung'," 
2Chronicles6:35 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet saaennywa ak soomennywa, ak iyachi icheek kiit ne machei.”" 
2Chronicles6:36 “Ngot koyaun tengek, amu ma mi chii ne ma yaei tengek, ak inereekyi ak igoochi icheek puunikwak koluul icheek komut koba emet ne loo anan ko ne neegit;" 
2Chronicles6:37 ago ngot kobwaatkei eng' emet ne ki kimut koek luulenik ak kosik, ak koriirchin eng' emet ne ki kiluulji icheek, kole, ‘Kigeyai tengekto, ki keyai kiit ne imaasat, ki keyai kiit ne ya kot’;" 
2Chronicles6:38 ngot koweekyingei eng' mugulelwekwak tugul ak eng' saboonwekwak tugul eng' emet ne ki kiluulji icheek, ole ki kimut icheek koek luulenik ak kosa kotokyigei emennywa ne ki igoochi kwanisyekwak, ak nganaseet ne ki ilewen, ak koot ne koateekyi kaineng'ung';" 
2Chronicles6:39 igas anyun eng' kipsengwet eng' oldang'ung' ole imenye, saaennywa ak soomutikwak, iyachi anyun icheek kiit ne machei ak inyochi kaat piiguk che ki koyaun tengekto.”" 
2Chronicles6:40 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindennyu, asaain ale, ingogeer konyeguk ak ingogas itiiguk saaet ne ki saaei eng' yuto." 
2Chronicles6:41 “Ara anyun, ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, nyoo oli imuung'ee, inyee ak moingetap kimnateng'ung'. Ingolaach tisiiguk yetunet, ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ak ingoboiboitu piiguk che tiliileen eng' myeeindo." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ameiste togeetap neng'ung' ne iilaat. Ibwaat rireenosyegap Daudi otwogindeng'ung'.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Ye kingo kes Solomon saaet, kochoorgei maat eng' kipsengwet ak kobeel kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak koroseek, ak ki nyi koot liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles7:2 Ko uu ye kiganyi liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki ma imuuch tisiik koba koot oriit." 
2Chronicles7:3 Ye kigeerei lagok tugul che po Israel kochoorugei maat ak kotebee liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paragutap koot, ak ki ing'uruugis icheek kot koit ng'wony togoochikwak eng' ye ki kitetyi koik, ak kolas ak komwachi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Amu myee ineendet, amu po koigeny rireenennyi.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Kogoito anyun laitoryat kobooto piik tugul tiseiywek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles7:5 Ki igoito Laitoryat Solomon tiseiywek che po eiik eliphuusyek tiptem ak aeng' ak keechiirek eliphuusyek pogol ak tiptem. Ara ki itabaan anyun laitoryat ak piik tugul kootap Kamuktaindet. 
2Chronicles7:6 Kitononso anyun tisiik kobee poisyonikwak; ki yai ko uu nooto Lawiik ak icheek che ki tinyei kibungandinigap tyenwogik che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che kiga koyai Daudi laitoryat che kimwachine kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kityenso kole “Amu po koigeny rireenennyi,” ko uu ye ki ng'at `Daudi icheek eng' otisyennywa. Kiguutei iryagook tisiik eng' tainnywa, ak kitononso Israel tugul." 
2Chronicles7:7 Kogeny ki itiliil Solomon kwenutap seremut ne ki mi taitap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki igoito eng' yooto kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak mwanik che po kagoochinoigap kaalyeet, amu ki ma koyamei kaptisisyetap sugunwet ne kiga koyai Solomon kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinet ne po peek ak mwanik." 
2Chronicles7:8 Eng' peetuusyechooto kogiyai anyun Solomon igoorto peetuusyek tisap, kobooto Israel tugul, tuiyet ne oo miising' che ki pwa kong'etee ye kibunei kebendi Lebo-hamath agoi aineetap Misiri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Eng' peetuutap sisiit, kogiyai tuiyetap kaming'inetapkei; amu kiga koyai katabaanetap kaptisisyet eng' peetuusyek tisap ak igoorto peetuusyek tisap." 
2Chronicles7:10 Eng' peetuutap tiptem ak somok ne po arawetap tisap ko ki mwachi piik koba emaisyekwak, eng' poiboiyet ak kagasetapkei ne po muguleldo amu myeeindo ne ki yachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi ak Solomon ak Israel piikyik." 
2Chronicles7:11 Kogees anyun Solomon kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kootap laitoryat. Ak ki yai Solomon eng' aiyebindo tuguuk tugul che ki ibwaat ineendet eng' muguleldanyi, koyai eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak eng' koonnyi." 
2Chronicles7:12 Kimong'ji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Solomon kemoi ak koleenji ineendet, “Kaagas saaeng'ung', ak kaalewenjigei yuto koek kootap tiseiywek." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ngot ager kipsengwet si ma robon, anan ngot ang'at chereng'endet koam emet, anan ayookyi koroito piikyuk," 
2Chronicles7:14 ngot koming'ingei piikyuk che kemwaitoe kainennyu, kosa, kocheeng'a ak kolakta ortinwekwak che po yaityet, agas anyun eng' kipsengwet; ak anyochi kaat eng' tengektonywa ak asoop emennywa." 
2Chronicles7:15 Kogeer anyun konyekyuk ak kogas itiikyuk saaet ne ki saaei eng' yuto. 
2Chronicles7:16 Amu kaalewen kooi ak atabaan si kobiit kotebee kainennyu olooto koigeny. Ak tebee yuto konyekyuk ak muguleldanyu kotugul. 
2Chronicles7:17 Ak ngot iwendote inyee tainnyu ko uu ye kiwendote Daudi kwandang'ung', iyai ko uu tuguuk tugul che kaang'atiin ak iriip ng'atuutikyuk ak kirwoogutikyuk," 
2Chronicles7:18 agimiit anyun ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po pounateng'ung', ko uu ye ki ayai arorutyet ak Daudi kwandang'ung' aleenji, ‘Ma petenen chiito ne egu pounindet eng' Israel.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 Ago ngot omaaste, ak olakte kaneetisyosyekyuk ak ng'atuutikyuk che ki ande taing'wong', obe oot kanamonik ak ogutung'ji," 
2Chronicles7:20 atutu anyun icheek eng' emennyu ne ki agoochi; ak awirte kooi eng' tainnyu ne ki atabaanji kainennyu, ak ayai koek kalewenet ak atindyot eng' pororyosyek tugul." 
2Chronicles7:21 Ak kwong'ei age tugul ne siirei yuto, agobo kooi oo tee ni, ak kole, ‘Amu nee si koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni emoni ak kooi?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Yeityo kowol kole, ‘Amu kimeto `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, ne ki imut icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri ak konamgei ak kanamonik, kogutung'ji ak koot icheek: nooto anyun ki ipchi `ineendet icheek yaityoni tugul.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Kingo kagogeskei kenyiisyek tiptemu, ne eng' chuuto ko kiteege Solomon kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koonnyi," 
2Chronicles8:2 ki teech Solomon nganasook che kiga kogoochi `Huram ineendet ak kogoochi piigap Israel komeny olooto. 
2Chronicles8:3 Ki wo Solomon kobookyi Hamat-seba ak koterteer olooto. 
2Chronicles8:4 Ki teech Tadmor eng' surkwen ak nganasook tugul che kigonoree tuguuk eng' Hamath. 
2Chronicles8:5 Ki teech kogeny Beth-horon ne po meto ak Beth-horon ne rektoot, nganasook che ng'ootaatiin, che ki tinyei irimoik, ormariichok, ak temeleiywek," 
2Chronicles8:6 ak Baalat, ak nganasook tugul che kigonorisye, ak nganasook tugul che po kariisyekyik ak nganasoogap piik che laanyei paraisisyekyik, ak tuguuk tugul che po magennyi che ki cham Solomon koteech eng' Jerusalem, eng' Lebanon ak eng' emet tugul ne po pounatennyi." 
2Chronicles8:7 Piik tugul che ki ng'et eng' Hitik, Amorik, Perisik, Hibik ak Jebusik che ki ma ko po Israel," 
2Chronicles8:8 che kiga ng'et eng' emet, che ki ma par piigap Israel kogees, koging'at Solomon kelewen piik eng' lagogap pichooto koek otwogik agoi rani." 
2Chronicles8:9 Ago eng' piigap Israel, ko ki ma yai Solomon icheek koek otwogik che yaei poisyennyi. Ki igoochi icheek koek murenigap lugeet, koek che eecheen eng' kiptainikyik, pounigap kariisyekyik ak murenikyik che ki laanyei paraisisyekyik." 
2Chronicles8:10 Chu ko ki kiptainik che eecheen che po Laitoryat Solomon, piik pogol aeng' ak konom, che ki pou piik." 
2Chronicles8:11 Ki imut `Solomon cheptap Pharaoh kotogos eng' nganaseetap Daudi konyo koot ne kiga koteekyi ineendet: amu ki le, “Ma menyei osotyondennyu kootap Daudi laitoryatap Israel, amu tiliileen komoswek che ki nyo moingetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotebee.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Ki igoochi anyun `Solomon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne kiga koteech eng' taitap keterut," 
2Chronicles8:13 ko uu ye yamei poisyetap peetuut age tugul, kogoitoi ko uu ng'atuutyetap Musa, eng' sabatoisyek, eng' ye kaleel arawet, ak eng' igoorwek che ki king'at, konyil somok eng' kenyiit, igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, igoortap wigisyek ak igoortap keryosyek." 
2Chronicles8:14 Ko uu ng'atuutyetap Daudi kwandanyi koging'at riipsosyegap tisiik eng' otisyennywa, ak Lawiik koyai poisyonikwak si kolasu ak koboisyei kobooto tisiik ko uu ye yamei poisyetap peetuut age tugul. Ki ng'at riibiigap kurgeet ak icheek koyai riipsosyekwak eng' kurgeet age tugul; amu kiga ng'at Daudi chiitap Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto." 
2Chronicles8:15 Ki ma meto ng'atuutyetap laitoryat ne ki ng'at Tisiik ak Lawiik agobo ng'olyoot age tugul, anan agobo konoraik." 
2Chronicles8:16 Ara kichobok anyun poisyetap Solomon kobooch peetuut ne ki kilume lumeiywotap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi kogeskei. Ki igeskei anyun poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles8:17 Yeityo kwo Solomon Esion-geber ak Elot, che mi ngeguutap emetap Edom." 
2Chronicles8:18 Ki iyookyi Huram melisyek ineendet koyooktoe otwogikyik, ak otwogik che ingen agobo nyanjet. Ki pwa icheek Opir kobooto otwogigap Solomon, ki ip eng' olooto talendaisyek che po thahabu pogol ang'wan ak konom, koipchi Laitoryat Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:1 Kingo kas laitoryatap Sheba ne ki kwony kalasunetap Solomon, ko ki nyo Jerusalem konyo kotyem Solomon eng' teebutik che uueen. Ki nyo kobooto piik che chaang' ak tambeesik che ibei tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, thahabu che chaang' ak koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo. Kingo it ole mi Solomon kong'alaal ak ineendet agobo tuguuk tugul che ki mi muguleldanyi." 
2Chronicles9:2 Ki wolji `Solomon ineendet teebutikyik tugul; ak ki ma komi kiy age tugul ne ki ma nai Solomon anan ne kitemenee kowolji ineendet. 
2Chronicles9:3 Kingo kagogeer laitoryandanooto po Sheba utaatyetap Solomon, kobooto koot ne kiga teech," 
2Chronicles9:4 amitwogik che mi mesennyi, ole teptoi otwogikyik, tononet ne tononjin poisyet kiboitiinikyik komi eng' ngoroikwak, piikyik ak icheek che ipchin tuguuk che eei eng' ngoroikwak ak kagoochinoikyik che kibeelei che ki igoitoi eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kogeskei anyun kimnateennyi." 
2Chronicles9:5 Ara ki leenji `kwonyooto laitoryat, “Po iman ng'aleechu ki agase eng' emennyu agobo poisyoniguk ak agobo utaatyeng'ung'." 
2Chronicles9:6 Ago ki ma ayan ng'aleekwak kot kotee anyo ageerchigei eng' konyekyuk. Abeere ki ma kimwaiwo agot kebebertap ooindap utaatyeng'ung'; isiire kalasunoni ki agase. 
2Chronicles9:7 Poiboi piiguk! Poiboi otwogichuguk, chu tonondos eng' taing'ung' kotugul ak kogasei utaatyeng'ung'!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ne ki paibait eng' inyee ak kondein ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet iegu laitoryatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'. Amu ki cham `Kamuktaindeng'ung' Israel ak kogimit icheek koigeny, kondein anyun iegu laitoryat ibou icheek iyai kirwooget ak imanda.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Ki igoochi `kwonyooto laitoryat talendaisyek pogol ak tiptem che po thahabu, kobooto tuguuk ng'iisyat che ng'uu ne anyiny ak koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo. Ki ma piit nyamdutik che uu chooto ki igoochi `laitoryandanooto po Sheba Laitoryat Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:10 Ki ip ak icheek otwogigap Huram ak otwogigap Solomon thahabu eng' Opir, ak keetiigap almug ak koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo." 
2Chronicles9:11 Kiboisyee laitoryat keetichooto po almug koyae ole kitogostoe eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak eng' kootap laitoryat; kiyae kora ketubosyek ak kibugandinik che po tyeniik. Kitomo kogeerei chii tuguuk che uu chooto eng' emetap Judah. 
2Chronicles9:12 Kosupkei ak nooto, ko ki igoochi agine `Laitoryat Solomon laitoryandanooto po Sheba kiy age tugul ne kimach, ak kiy age tugul ne ki soom koma pooto tuguuk che kiga ipchi kwonyoto Solomon. Kiweektagei anyun kwo emennyi kobooto otwogikyik." 
2Chronicles9:13 Ki ek nyigiisindap thahabu che ki kiipchi Solomon eng' kenyiit agenge tanisyek eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut," 
2Chronicles9:14 ama pooto che ki ibu piik che aldooti ak che ki ibu chemung'arainik, ak ki ip laitorinik tugul che po Arabia ak pounigap emet, thahabu ak fedha, koipchi Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:15 Ki yai Laitoryat Solomon, long'onik che eecheen pogol aeng' che po thahabu che ki kitany; ki kiyae long'eet agenge ne oo keruutik tisap che po thahabu che ki kitany." 
2Chronicles9:16 Ki yai long'onik che mengeechen pogol somok che po thahabu che ki kitany; ki kiyae long'eet agenge keruutik somok che po thahabu. Kigonoree laitoryat long'onichooto Kootap Osnetap Lebanon. 
2Chronicles9:17 Ki yai kogeny laitoryat ng'echereet ne oo ne po laitornatet eng' kelegap peeleek ak koliige thahabu che tiliileen. 
2Chronicles9:18 Ki mi lang'eiywot ne tinyei tuguuk lo che kityegoti ketogosyin ng'echereetap laitornatet, kobooto ng'echereet ne tebee keelyek ne ki po thahabu, ne kiga kiratyi ng'echereetap laitornatet, ak kimi keetiik komosi ak komosi che tiegei eunek, ak itoonwek aeng' che po ng'etuunyik eng' komosi ak komosi eng' ye neegitee keetichooto kitiie eunek." 
2Chronicles9:19 Ki tonondos itoonwek tamanu ak aeng' che po ng'etuunyik eng' komoswek tuwai eng' tuguuchooto lo kityegoti ketogostoi. Ki ma komi age ne kergei ak nooto ne ki kiyai eng' laitornatet age tugul. 
2Chronicles9:20 Ki po thahabu tuguuk tugul che kieise Laitoryat Solomon, ak tuguuk tugul che ki kiboisyee eng' Kootap Osnetap Lebanon ko ki po thahabu che tiliileen; ki ma ko kiy fedha eng' peetuusyegap Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:21 Amu ki tinyei laitoryat melisyek che ki pendi Tarsis kobooto otwogigap Huram, ki ibu melisyek che po Tarsis konyil agenge eng' kenyiisyek somok, thahabu, fedha, kelegap peeleek, tisook ak toriitik che kiguure tausi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Ki siir anyun Laitoryat Solomon laitorinik tugul che po ng'wony eng' mogornatosyek ak utaatyet. 
2Chronicles9:23 Ki cheeng' laitorinik tugul che po ng'wony kogeer Solomon kole kogas utotyennyi, ne ki inde Kamuktaindet muguleldanyi." 
2Chronicles9:24 Ki ip chii tugul kagoochinennyi, tuguugap fedha ak tuguugap thahabu, ngoroik, kariigap lugeet, nyamdutik, ak paraisisyek, ak nyumbusyek, koitet ne ki kigoonu eng' kenyiit age tugul." 
2Chronicles9:25 Ki tinyei Solomon kooriik eliphuusyek ang'wan che po paraisisyek ak kariisyek, ak piik eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che po paraisisyek, che ki inde nganasoogap kariisyek ak che ki mi ole mi laitoryat eng' Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles9:26 Ki pou laitorinik tugul kobooch Aineetap Yufrets agoi emetap Philistiik, ak agoi kiwotetap Misiri." 
2Chronicles9:27 Ki yai laitoryat fedha eng' Jerusalem koigei koik, ak ki yai eng' chaang'indo taragonik koigei mogoonik che mi emet ne soi." 
2Chronicles9:28 Ki kigetyi Solomon paraisisyek eng' Misiri, ak eng' emotinwek tugul." 
2Chronicles9:29 Poisyonigap Solomon che kang'et, che po tai ak che po let, tos ma ki sirchi kitabuutap ng'aleegap maotyot Nathan, ak eng' maonateetap Ahija Silonindet, ak eng' ng'ang'utigap keerindet Ido agobo Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Ki laitoran Solomon eng' Jerusalem koboi Israel tugul kenyiisyek artam. 
2Chronicles9:31 Ki ru Solomon kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi kwandanyi. Ak ki laitoran Rehoboam weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Chronicles10:1 Ki wo Rehoboam Shekem, amu kigabwa Israel tugul Shekem, konde ineendet koek laitoryat." 
2Chronicles10:2 Kingo kas Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat agobo nooto, (amu kimi Misiri, ole kiga mwechi komwee Laitoryat Solomon,) koweek Jeroboam eng' Misiri." 
2Chronicles10:3 Ki iyookto keguur ineendet; ak ki nyo Jeroboam kobooto Israel tugul, ak kong'alaalji Rehoboam, koleenji," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Ki yai kwandang'ung' choginnyo kouiit. Ara anyun, yai kowisisiit otisyet ne uui ne ki po kwandang'ung', ak iyai kowisisiit choginnyi ne nyigiis ne ki indeech, si kobiit keotin.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Ki leenji icheek, “Obwa kogeny ole ami koga ibata peetuusyek somogu.” Koba anyun piik." 
2Chronicles10:6 Kong'alaal Laitoryat Rehoboam ak poisyek, che ki cham kotonondos eng' taitap Solomon kwandanyi, ye kita kosabei, koleenji, “Nee ng'olyoot ne omwaiwo ne awoljini pichu?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ki mwachi koleenji, “Ngot iegu chii ne myee eng' pichu ak ibaibai icheek, ak imwachi ng'aleek che myach, koegu anyun icheek otwogiguk koigeny.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Ago ki pagaakta ng'aleegap poisyek, che ki mwachi ineendet ak kong'alaal ak neranik che kinerchindos tugul che kitonondos eng' tainnyi." 
2Chronicles10:9 Ki leenji icheek, “Nee ng'olyoot ne omwae okweek, si kobiit kewolji pichu kong'alaalwo koleenjo, yai kowisisiit chogit, ne ki indeech kwandang'ung?”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Ki wolji neranik che kinerchindos ak ineendet koleenji, “Imwachini ko uu ni pichu kong'alaalun, koleenjinin, ‘Ki yai kwandang'ung' choginnyo konyigiisit, ago yaiywech kowisisiit’; imwachini ko uu ni, ileenjini, ‘Nyigiis mornennyu ne ming'in ne po euut kosiir suetap abba." 
2Chronicles10:11 Nguno anyun, ko uu ye ki koonok abba chogit ne nyigiis, atese choging'wong'. Ki itigonenok abba kipcharitisyek, ago atigoonenok melmelwek.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Kobwa anyun Jeroboam ak piik tugul ole mi Rehoboam eng' peetuutap somok, ko uu ye kiga ng'at laitoryat, kole, “Obwa eng' peetuutap somok.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Ki wolji laitoryat icheek eng' koroomnateet. Ki meto Laitoryat Rehoboam ng'aleegap poisyek," 
2Chronicles10:14 ak kong'alaalji icheek ko uu ye ki kamwachi neranik, koleenji, “Ki yai abba choging'wong' konyigiisit, ago atese; ki itigonenok abba kipcharitisyek, ago atigoonenok melmelwek.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Ara ki ma kasyi anyun laitoryat pichooto, amu ki kiit ne ki punu Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kogimit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondennyi, ne ki mwa eng' Ahija Silonindet komwachi Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat." 
2Chronicles10:16 Kingo keer Israel tugul kole mata kogasyi laitoryat icheek, kowolji piik laitoryat, koleenji, “Nee kebeberta ne ketinye eng' Daudi? Ama ki tinyei poroteet eng' weeriitap Jesse. Ingwo chii tugul emainnyi, ee Israel! Riip koong'ung' anyun, Daudi.” Ki pa Israel tugul anyun emaisyekwak." 
2Chronicles10:17 Ago ki laitoran Rehoboam eng' piigap Israel che ki menyei nganasoogap Judah. 
2Chronicles10:18 Ki iyookto anyun `Rehoboam Hadoram, ne ki pou aisuruut; ak kilach piigap Israel ineendet eng' koik, kome. Kichaakta anyun Laitoryat Rehoboam kolaany chepkichutinnyi komwei kwo Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles10:19 Ara ki ingelelji anyun Israel kootap Daudi agoi ra. 
2Chronicles11:1 Kingo it `Rehoboam Jerusalem, koyum murenik eliphuusyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit che po lugeet, che ki kilewen eng' kootap Judah ak kootap Benjamin si kobargei ak Israel ak koweekyi laitornatet Rehoboam." 
2Chronicles11:2 Ago ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Semaiah chiitap Kamuktaindet, koleenji" 
2Chronicles11:3 ng'alaalji Rehoboam weeriitap Solomon, laitoryatap Judah, kobooto Israel tugul eng' Judah ak Benjamin, ileenji," 
2Chronicles11:4 kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole: “Amobe otogoste anan obargei ak tupchosyekwok. Ingoweek chii tugul kwo koonnyi, amu punwa kii.” Kogas anyun icheek ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koweek mata koba kobargei ak Jeroboam." 
2Chronicles11:5 Ki meny `Rehoboam Jerusalem, ak koteech eng' Judah nganasook che kiriibegei." 
2Chronicles11:6 Ki teech Bethlehem, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Beth-zur, Soko, Adulam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gath, Maresha, Ziph," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim, Lakish, Aseka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Sora, Aijalon ak Hebron. Chuuto nganasook che ng'ootaatiin che mi Judah ak Benjamin." 
2Chronicles11:11 Ki kimiit irimoik, ak konde kiptainik koriip, ak kogonoree amitwogik, mwanik ak divaik." 
2Chronicles11:12 Ki inde nganaseet age tugul long'onik ak ng'otwek, ak kogimit miising'. Ara ki punji ineendet Judah ak Benjamin." 
2Chronicles11:13 Ki pwanji kotoret ineendet `Tisiik ak `Lawiik che ki mi Israel tugul, komong' eng' kiwotosyekwak tugul." 
2Chronicles11:14 Amu ki pagaakta Lawiik emotinwekwak che kiyagisye ak tuguukwak, ak kobwa Judah ak Jerusalem, amu ki oon Jeroboam ak weeriikyik icheek, si ma yai tisiisyet koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles11:15 Ki lewenjigei tisiik che po komoswek che torooreen, ak che po oik, ak che po moek che kiga koyai." 
2Chronicles11:16 Ki pwa Jerusalem, piik alak eng' ortinwek tugul che po Israel, icheek che kiga igiilgei eng' mugulelwekwak kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, koosup pichooto, kobwa koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak." 
2Chronicles11:17 Ki igimit anyun laitornatetap Judah, ak kogimit Rehoboam weeriitap Solomon eng' kenyiisyek somok, amu kibendate ortinwegap Daudi ak Solomon eng' kenyiisyek somok." 
2Chronicles11:18 Ki itun `Rehoboam Maalat cheptap Jerimoth weeriitap Daudi, ak Abiail cheptap Eliap weeriitap Jesse." 
2Chronicles11:19 Ki sikyi ineendet weeriik: Jeush, Semaria ak Saham." 
2Chronicles11:20 Yeityo kotun Maaka cheptap Absalom, ak ki sikyi ineendet Abijah, Atai, Shisha ak Selomit." 
2Chronicles11:21 Ki cham Rehoboam Maaka cheptap Absalom kosiir osotikyik tugul ak chebaigeiniyik (amu ki itun osotik taman ak sisiit ak chebaigeinik tamanwogik lo, ak ki sich weeriik tiptem ak sisiit ak tiibiik tamanwogik lo)." 
2Chronicles11:22 Ki inde Rehoboam Abijah weeriitap Maaka koek ne oo, koboi tupchosyekyik, amu kimach konde ineendet koek laitoryat." 
2Chronicles11:23 Ki yai eng' ng'omnateet, kopcheita weeriikyik tugul koyom emotinwek tugul che po Judah ak Benjamin, koba nganaseet age tugul ne ng'ootaat. Ki igoochi icheek amitwogik che chaang' kot ak kocheeng'ji icheek osotik che chaang'." 
2Chronicles12:1 Kingo kagigimit pounatetap Rehoboam ak kogimit agine, kometo ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet ak Israel tugul." 
2Chronicles12:2 Ak amu kiga kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko ki togos Sisak laitoryatap Misiri konyo kobar Jerusalem eng' kenyiit ne po muut ne po Laitoryat Rehoboam. 
2Chronicles12:3 Ki tinyei ineendet kariisyek eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak piik eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo che ketei paraisisyek. Ki ma ko iitoksei piik che kigabwa kobooto ineendet eng' Misiri: piigap Libya, Sukik ak Ethiopik." 
2Chronicles12:4 Ki nam nganasook che ng'ootaatiin che ki po Judah ak kobwa Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles12:5 Ki nyo `maotyot Semaiah kap Reoboam, ak pounigap Judah, che kiga koyumjigei Jerusalem, komwee Sisak, ak koleenji icheek, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole, ‘Ki ometa, eng' nooto ko kabagakyok anyun agane eutap Sisak.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Ki iming'ingei anyun pounigap Israel kobooto laitoryat, ak ki le, “Po iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Kingo keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kagoming'ingei, konyonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Semaiah, koleenji: “Kagoming'ingei icheek, ma abare, ago asaru kitigin, ak ma keroong'jin Jerusalem nereegekyuk eng' eutap Sisak." 
2Chronicles12:8 Ago egu icheek otwogikyik, si kobiit konai poisyennyu ak poisyetap laitornatosyek emotinwek.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Ki togos anyun Sisak laitoryatap Misiri kobar Jerusalem, ak koip konoraigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak konoraigap kootap laitoryat: ki ip tugul, ki ip kogeny long'onik che po thahabu che kiga yai Solomon." 
2Chronicles12:10 Ki yai Laitoryat Rehoboam long'onik che po sugunonik kogeere chooto, ak kogoochi kiptainigap riibiik koriip, che ki riibei kurgeetap kootap laitoryat." 
2Chronicles12:11 Ak eng' peetuut age tugul ne kanyo laitoryat kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobwa riibiik koip, yeityo koweekta koba kootap riibiik." 
2Chronicles12:12 Kingo ming'ingei, koistoegei nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, si ma par ineendet kowong'. Ak kogeny, ki miitei Judah tuguuk che myach." 
2Chronicles12:13 Ki igimitkei anyun Laitoryat Rehoboam eng' Jerusalem ak kolaitoran. Ki po kenyiisyek artam ak agenge Rehoboam ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak tisap eng' Jerusalem, nganasanooto kiga kolewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ortinwek tugul che po Israel, konde kainennyi olooto. Ki kiguure kamet Naamah Jebamonindet." 
2Chronicles12:14 Ki yai yaityet, amu ma igiilgei kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' muguleldanyi." 
2Chronicles12:15 Ak poisyonigap Rehoboam, che po tai ak che po let, tos ma kisir eng' ng'aleegap Semaiah maotyot ak che po Ido keerindet, kobee tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto? Ki mi lugoosyek kwenutap Rehoboam ak Jeroboam kotugul." 
2Chronicles12:16 Ki ru Rehoboam kobooto kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi. Ak ki laitoran Abijah weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Chronicles13:1 Ki toi kolaitoran Abijah eng' Judah eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po laitornatetap Jeroboam. 
2Chronicles13:2 Ki laitoran kenyiisyek somok eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Mikaia cheptap Uriel ne po Gibea. Ki tinyei lugeet Abijah ak Jeroboam eng' kwenunnywa. 
2Chronicles13:3 Kitet lugeet Abijah kobooto lugeetap murenik che nyigoonen che po lugeet, murenik eliphuusyek pogol ang'wan che ki kilewen, kitet agine Jeroboam lugeet kotinyei murenik eliphuusyek pogol sisiit, che ki kilewen, piik che kiimeen, che nyigoonen, kobargei ak ineendet." 
2Chronicles13:4 Ki tonon anyun Abijah eng' tulweetap Semaraim ne mi emetap tuloonook ne po Ephraim, ak kole, “Ogasa, ee Jeroboam ak Israel tugul!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Tos manyoljok onai ole ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel `Daudi pounateet koboi Israel koigeny ak weeriikyik eng' kayomisetap muunyuk?”" 
2Chronicles13:6 Ago king'eet Jeroboam weeriitap Nebat, otwogindetap Solomon weeriitap Daudi, kongelelji kiptaiyandennyi." 
2Chronicles13:7 Ki iyumjigei ineendet piik che yaach weeriigap Belial che ki igimitkei kobargei ak Rehoboam weeriitap Solomon, ye kita ko ming'in Rehoboam ak kotinyei riirge, ak ma imuuch kogirinda icheek." 
2Chronicles13:8 “Ak nguno oleen omuuchi ogirinde laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi eunegap weeriigap Daudi, ak oo tuiyet ne oo, ak otinye moek che po thahabu che ki itang'wok Jeroboam koek kanamonik." 
2Chronicles13:9 Tos ma oonu tisiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, weeriigap Aron, ak Lawiik, ak olewenjigei tisiik, osubi pitonwegap piigap emotinwek alak? Si age tugul ne nyoonei koanyinyegei kirgit anan mengichik tisap, koegu nooto tisiindetap tuguuk che ma tilei kiy." 
2Chronicles13:10 Ago Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindennyo acheek, ak tomo kebagaakte ineendet. Ki tinyei tisiik che poisyechin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, weeriigap Aron, ak Lawiik che yaei poisyennywa." 
2Chronicles13:11 Peeljin `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak nyamdutik che ng'uu ne anyiny, karonet age tugul ak koskoleng'ut age tugul, tetei magatiinik che itabaanatiin eng' meset ne tiliil, ak keldap tait ne po thahabu kobooto taisyekyik, si kolal koskoleng'ut age tugul; amu kiriibe acheek poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ago ki omete ineendet." 
2Chronicles13:12 Ogeero, mi Kamuktaindet kobootech, kondoiywech, ak tisiikyik che tinyei iryagook che po waagaat si koguutwak ne po waagaat. Ee piigap Israel, amat obargei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwok; amu mo poore.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Ago ki chop Jeroboam piik kobwa koribisyo eng' let, ki mi icheek taitap Judah ak kimi let che kiribistos." 
2Chronicles13:14 Ak kingo keer piigap Judah let, kogeer komi lugeet tainnywa ak let. Ki riirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki kuut tisiik iryagook," 
2Chronicles13:15 ak kowaach anyun piigap Judah. Ak ye kita kowaachei piigap Judah, kobar Kamuktaindet Jeroboam ak Israel tugul eng' taitap Abijah ak Judah." 
2Chronicles13:16 Kimwei piigap Israel eng' taitap Judah, ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet icheek eunekwak." 
2Chronicles13:17 Ki par `Abijah ak piikyik icheek eng' pareet ne oo; kobek anyun piik che ki kilewen eliphuusyek pogol muut. 
2Chronicles13:18 Ki kiming'in ko uu nooto piigap Israel eng' peetuusyechooto, ak ki iterteeris lagogap Judah amu kitiegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak." 
2Chronicles13:19 Ki oon `Abijah Jeroboam, ak korebe ineendet nganasook, Bethel ak nganasookyik, Jesana ak nganasookyik ak Epron ak nganasookyik." 
2Chronicles13:20 Mata konyoor kimnateet kogeny Jeroboam eng' peetuusyegap Abijah. Ki par `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. 
2Chronicles13:21 Ago kitesak Abijah kogimit. Ki itun osotik taman ak ang'wan, ak ki sich weeriik tiptem ak aeng' ak tiibiik taman ak lo." 
2Chronicles13:22 Ki kisirchi poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Abijah, ak ortinwekyik, ak ng'aleekyik, kitabuutap maotyot Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Ki ru anyun Abijah kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi, ak ki laitoran Asa weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. Ki nyoor emet kaalyeet kenyiisyek taman eng' peetuusyekyik." 
2Chronicles14:2 Ki yai Asa ne myee ak ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi. 
2Chronicles14:3 Ki isto kapkorosusyek che teer, ak komoswek che torooreen, kibut tolochik ak koep Aserik." 
2Chronicles14:4 Ki ng'at Judah kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, ak koyai ng'atuutik ak kayomisutik." 
2Chronicles14:5 Ki isto kogeny eng' nganasook tugul che po Judah komoswek che torooreen ak ole kibeeljine kanamonik kagoochinoik; ak ki tinyei kaalyeet laitornatet eng' tainnyi. 
2Chronicles14:6 Ki teech nganasook che ng'ootaatiin eng' Judah. Ki mi kaalyeet emet ak ki ma kotinyei lugeet eng' kenyisyechooto, amu kiga kogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet kamuung'et." 
2Chronicles14:7 Ki mwachi piigap Judah koleenji, “Ongeteech nganasochu, ak kiyieme irimoik ak teeksosyek che kooen, ormariichok ak temeleiywek; ta komi emet tainnyo amu kigecheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo; kigecheeng' ineendet ak ki kogoonech kamuung'et eng' komosta age tugul.” Ara kiteekso anyun ak koboor." 
2Chronicles14:8 Ki tinyei Asa lugeet ne po piik eliphuusyek pogol somok che po Judah che ki tinyei long'onik ak ng'otwek, ak piik ki eliphuusyek pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik sisiit che po Benjamin, che ki tinyei long'onik ak kwangok. Ki piik che kiimeen che nyigoonen chuuto tugul." 
2Chronicles14:9 Ki nyo kobargei ak icheek `Zerah Ethiopiaindet, kotinyei lugeet ne po piik millionit agenge ak kariisyek pogol somok; ak ki it Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Ki wo anyun Asa kotorookta ineendet ak kitet lugeet eng' atebweetap Sepata ne mi Maresha. 
2Chronicles14:11 Ki riirchi `Asa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi, kole, “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma mi age kobatenen ne imuuchi kotoretis eng' kwenutap ne kiim ak ne ma tinyei kimnateet: toretech, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo; amu kimang'un, ak kagibwa kebarge ak tuiyoni eng' kaineng'ung'. Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ii Kamuktaindennyo; amat koterteerin chii.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Kobar anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Ethiopik eng' taitap Asa ak eng' taitap Judah. Kimwei Ethiopik," 
2Chronicles14:13 ak ki oon Asa ak piik che ki mi tugul agoi Gerar. Ki pek Ethiopik che chaang' ne mata komuuch kosargei; amu ki kibar eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' taitap lugeennyi. Ki ip piigap Judah parunenik che chaang'." 
2Chronicles14:14 Ki par nganasook tugul che ki mi ole neegitee Gerar, amu ki nyoonji icheek kamuisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki nam icheek tuguuk eng' nganasook tugul; amu kimi parunenik che chaang' nganasochooto." 
2Chronicles14:15 Ki par kogeny kaptugusyek, ak kokweri keechiirek ng'iisyat ak tambeesik. Yeityo koweek koba Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles15:1 Ki nyoonji `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Azariah weeriitap Obed," 
2Chronicles15:2 ak ki wo kotorookta Asa, koleenji, “Ogasa okweek, inyee Asa ak Judah tugul ak Benjamin! Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootok koteen otebye ak ineendet. Ye ocheeng' ineendet, onyooru, ago ngot omete ineendet, kometook." 
2Chronicles15:3 Kiga kotebee Israel egosyek che chaang' ama tinyei Kamuktaindet ne po iman, ama tinyei tisiindet ne ineetisyei, ama tinyei ng'atuutik." 
2Chronicles15:4 Ago kingo weekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, eng' nyalildanywa, ak kocheeng' ineendet, konyoor ineendet." 
2Chronicles15:5 Ki ma komi kaalyeet eng' peetuusyechooto eng' ineendet ne mandoi anan ko eng' ineendet ne nyoonei ko, ago ki tinyei kaimutik icheek tugul che ki menyei emotinwechooto." 
2Chronicles15:6 Kibargei, kobar pororyet age pororyet age, ak kobar nganaseet age nganaseet age: amu ki inyaliil Kamuktaindet icheek eng' nyalilowogik tugul." 
2Chronicles15:7 Ago ogimegitu, among' kochorirenso eunekwok, amu onyooru melekto eng' poisyonikwok.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Kingo kas Asa ng'aleechuuto, ak maonateetap maotyot Obed, konyiganit, ak koisto tuguuk che kiwechei eng' emet tugul ne po Judah ak Benjamin, ak eng' nganasook che kiga korep eng' emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim. Ak ki teech kogeny kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki mi taitap keterutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles15:9 Ki iyum `inee Judah tugul ak Benjamin, ak punootik che ki mi kobooto icheek, che po Ephraim, che po Manasseh ak che po Simion. Ki pwanji ineendet `piik che chaang' miising' kobun Israel, ye kingo keer kole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi kobooto ineendet." 
2Chronicles15:10 Koyumgei anyun eng' Jerusalem eng' kenyiitap taman ak muut eng' arawetap somok ne po laitornatetap Asa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Ki eng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywek eng' peetuunooto, che po parunenik che kigetu, eiik pogol tisap ak keechiirek eliphuusyek tisap." 
2Chronicles15:12 Ki yai arorutyet kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, eng' mugulelwekwak tugul ak eng' saboonwekwak tugul," 
2Chronicles15:13 ak kole, “Age tugul ne ma chamei kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kebarei ngo ming'in anan ko oo, ngo muren anan ko kwony.”" 
2Chronicles15:14 Ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komwa eng' kutit ne oo, ak eng' waagaat, ak eng' iryagook, ak eng' igondisyek." 
2Chronicles15:15 Kiboiboitu Judah tugul amu kayasyonooto; amu kigayosyo eng' mugulelwekwak tugul, ak kocheeng' ineendet eng' magennywa tugul, ak kinyoor ineendet. Ki igoochi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kamuung'et eng' tabanwekwak tugul." 
2Chronicles15:16 Ki isto `Asa kamennyi Maaka agine, si mata koek laitoryat ne kwondo, amu kiga koyai kanamwet ne kiwechei ne po Asera. Kibut Asa kanamwennyi ak kotui koek temburyek, ak kobeel eng' ole neegitee kererutap Kidron." 
2Chronicles15:17 Ago ki ma kiisto komoswek che torooreen eng' Israel. Nganda ki uu nooto ko ki igeesunotkei muguleldap Asa eng' peetuusyekyik tugul. 
2Chronicles15:18 Ki ip kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet tuguuk che kigaitabaan kwandanyi kobooto che kiga kotabaan ineendet: fedha, thahabu ak tereenik." 
2Chronicles15:19 Ki mata kobiit lugeet kogeny agoi kenyiitap sosom ak muut ne po laitornatetap Asa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Eng' kenyiitap sosom ak lo ne po laitornatetap Asa, kogiwo Baasha laitoryatap Israel kobargei ak Judah, ak koteech Ramah si mata kochamji chii komanda anan konyo oriit ole mi Asa laitoryatap Judah." 
2Chronicles16:2 Ki inem anyun `Asa fedha ak thahabu eng' ole kigonoree tuguugap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kootap laitoryat, ak koyookyi Ben-Hadad laitoryatap Syria, ne ki menyei Damasko, koleenji," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Miitei kasyinet kwenunnyo, anee ak inyee, ko uu ye kimi kwenutap kwandanyu ak kwandang'ung'. Keero, kaayogun fedha ak thahabu; ui put kasyinet ne oting'egei ak Baasha laitoryatap Israel, si kwo koistoenagei.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Ki kasyi anyun `Ben-Hadad laitoryat Asa ng'aleekyik, ak koyookto kiptainigap lugosyekyik koba kobar nganasoogap Israel. Ki par Ijon, Dan, Abel-maim ak nganasook tugul che po Naphtali che ki kigonoree tuguuk." 
2Chronicles16:5 Kingo kas Baasha, ko mata koteech Ramah, kobagaakta poisyennyi ne kiyaei." 
2Chronicles16:6 Ki imut anyun laitoryat `Asa Judah tugul, ak koba koip koik che po Ramah, kobooto keetiik, che kiga teekse Baasha. Kiboisyee chooto koteege Geba ak Mispa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Ki nyo eng' peetuusyechooto Hanani keerindet ole mi Asa laitoryatap Judah, ak koleenji, “Amu koitiegei laitoryatap Syria, ma itiegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ko kachililso anyun lugeetap laitoryatap Syria eng' eung'ung' amu nooto." 
2Chronicles16:8 Tos ki ma ko lugeet ne oo Ethiopik ak piigap Libya, che ki tinyei kariisyek ak piik che chaang' miising' che ki laanyei paraisisyek? Ko amu ki itiegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki inde ineendet icheek eung'ung'." 
2Chronicles16:9 Amu pendoti konyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'wony komugul, koboortogei kole kiim agobo icheeget che ititaatiin mugulelwekwak eng' tainnyi. Koiyai kioto eng' perberyo; amu kobooch nguno ko kenyooru lugoosyek agoi.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Ki nereekyi anyun Asa miising' keerindet, kot konde ineendet korgoreet. Eng' peetuusyechooto, ko ki inam kous Asa piik alak eng' pichooto." 
2Chronicles16:11 Poisyonigap Asa, kobooch che po tai agoi che po let, ko ki kisirchi kitabuutap laitorinigap Judah ak Israel." 
2Chronicles16:12 Eng' kenyiitap sosom ak sogool ne po laitornatennyi, ko ki nam Asa myando keelyekyik ak kieet miising' myandanyi. Agot eng' myandanyi koma cheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ki cheeng' toreteet eng' chepkerichinik." 
2Chronicles16:13 Ki ru Asa ak kwanisyekyik, ak kime eng' kenyiitap artam ak agenge ne po laitornatennyi." 
2Chronicles16:14 Ki kitup ineendet eng' kererit ne kiga kowachigei eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ki kinde itoogut ne ki nyiitaat nyamdutik che anyiny, ak tuguuk alak che teerchiin che ki kichop eng' ng'omnatetap chepkerichinik: ak ki kibeelji tuguuk che chaang' miising'." 
2Chronicles17:1 Ki laitoran weeriinnyi Jehoshaphat kogeer ineendet ak kogimitkei kobargei ak Israel. 
2Chronicles17:2 Ki inde lugoosyek nganasook tugul che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah, ak konde riibiik emetap Judah, ak nganasoogap Ephraim, che kiga rep kwandanyi Asa." 
2Chronicles17:3 Ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Jehoshaphat amu kiwendote ortinwek che po tai che po kwandanyi Daudi. Ki ma cheeng' `ineendet Baalik," 
2Chronicles17:4 ago ki cheeng' Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap kwandanyi ak kowendote ng'atuutikyik, ama isup tuguuk che ki yai Israel." 
2Chronicles17:5 Ki igimit anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatet eng' eunnyi. Ki ipchi piik tugul che po `Judah Jehoshaphat kagoochinoik, ak ki tinyei mogornateet eng' chaang'indo ak teegisto." 
2Chronicles17:6 Ki itoroorok muguleldanyi eng' ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogeny, ki isto komoswek che torooreen ak Aserik kobetyo eng' Judah." 
2Chronicles17:7 Eng' kenyiitap somok ne po laitornatennyi, ko ki iyookto pounikyik, chooto ko ki Benail, Obadiah, Zekariah, Nethanel ak Mikaia, koba koneetisyot eng' nganasoogap Judah." 
2Chronicles17:7 Eng' kenyiitap somok ne po laitornatennyi, ko ki iyookto pounikyik, chooto ko ki Benail, Obadiah, Zekariah, Nethanel ak Mikaia, koba koneetisyot eng' nganasoogap Judah." 
2Chronicles17:8 Ki mi kobooto icheek Lawiik, chooto ko Semaiah, Netania, Sebadia, Asahel, Semiramot, Jeonatan, Adonijah, Tobija ak Tobadonija, ak tisiik che ki mi kobooto icheek ko Elisama ak Jehoram." 
2Chronicles17:9 Ki ineetisyot eng' Judah, kotinyei bukuitap Ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kibendate nganasook tugul che po Judah ak koneetisyot eng' kwenutap piik." 
2Chronicles17:10 Ki ibutyi `kamuisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatosyek tugul che po emotinwek che ki mi tabanwegap Judah, kot ko mata kobookyi Jehoshaphat." 
2Chronicles17:11 Ki ipchi Philistiik alak Jehoshaphat kagoochinoik ak fedha koek aisuruut, kigetyi Arabuuk ak icheek akwotisyegap keechiirek, mengichik eliphuusyek tisap ak pogol tisap, ak kwesik eliphuusyek tisap ak pogol tisap." 
2Chronicles17:12 Kitesak Jehoshaphat koeet miising'. Ki teech irimoik ak nganasook che kigonoree tuguuk eng' Judah. 
2Chronicles17:13 Ki tinyei poisyonik che chaang' eng' nganasoogap Judah; kobooto piigap lugeet, che kiimeen che nyigoonen, eng' Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles17:14 Chu kaitosyekwak ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak: che po kap Judah, che ki kiptainigap eliphuusyek ko ki Adna ne ki kiptaiyat, ak ki tinyei piik che kiimeen che nyigoonen eliphuusyek pogol somok." 
2Chronicles17:15 Ne kirubei ineendet ko ki Jeohanan ne ki kiptaiyat, ak ki tinyei piik eliphuusyek pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik sisiit," 
2Chronicles17:16 kirubei ineendet Amasia weeriitap Zikri, ne ki igoochigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chamyet, ak ki tinyei piik che kiimeen che nyigoonen eliphuusyek pogol aeng'." 
2Chronicles17:17 Eng' che po kap Benjamin ko ki Eliada ne kiim ak ko nyigan, ak ki tinyei piik eliphuusyek pogol aeng' che ki tinyei kwangok ak long'onik," 
2Chronicles17:18 ak kirubei ineendet Jeosabad ne ki tinyei piik eliphuusyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit che ki chobootiin koyai lugeet. 
2Chronicles17:19 Chuuto ko che kiboisyechin laitoryat, koma ki itito che ki inde laitoryat nganasook che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah tugul." 
2Chronicles18:1 Ki tinyei Jehoshaphat mogornatosyek eng' chaang'indo ak teegisto ak kigaangei ak Ahab. 
2Chronicles18:2 Kingo siirto kenyiisyek alage kochoortagei kap Ahab eng' Samaria. Ki eng'ji Ahab ineendet keechiirek ak tuuga che chaang' miising', kobooto piik che ki mi ak ineendet ak kogaigai ineendet kwo kotogosta kobookyi Ramoth-gilead." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ki leenji `Ahab laitoryatap Israel Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah, “Ichame keebe tuwai Ramoth-gilead?” Ak ki wolji Jehoshaphat koleenji, “Auu kiit ne iuu, ak uu piikyuk piiguk. Ki mi kobooten eng' lugoni.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Ago ki leenji `Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Israel, “Asoomin ale, teep eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rani.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Ara ki iyum anyun laitoryatap Israel maotik pogol ang'wan, ak koleenji icheek, “Kibe kebargei ak Ramoth-gilead, anan atebi?” Ak ki leenji, “Togoste, amu indoi Kamuktaindet eutap laitoryat.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Ago ki le Jehoshaphat, “Tos ma mi maotyotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor age yu, si keteepse ineendet?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Ki leenji `laitoryatap Israel Jehoshaphat, “Ta komi chiito age ne kimuuchi keteepse eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet ko Mikaia weeriitap Imla, ago aweche amu ma maoteni tuguuk che myachen agobo anee, kobatee yaityet kotugul.” Ki le Jehoshaphat, “Amat komwa laitoryat ko uu no.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Ki kuur anyun laitoryatap Israel kiptaiyat age, ak koleenji, “Ui imutu ichogune Mikaia weeriitap Imla.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Kiga tebee laitoryatap Israel ak Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah chii tugul ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet, kolaachi ngoroikwak che po laitornatet, ak ki tebi eng' ole paraa eng' ole kibunei eng' ormariichetap Samaria; ak ki maoteni maotik tugul eng' tainnywa." 
2Chronicles18:10 Kiyachigei Zedekiah weeriitap Kenaana kuinoigap kariik, ak kole, “Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Itoortae chuuto piigap Syria, kot kowong'kei.”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Kimaotenso maotik tugul ko uu nooto ak icheek, kole, “Togoste Ramoth-gilead ak iboor, amu indoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganasanooto eutap laitoryat.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Ki ng'alaalji ineendet `chiito ne kiga kiyookto koguur Mikaia, koleenji, “Keero, kachamak eng' laitoryat ng'aleegap maotik che kamwachi eng' kasyinet agenge. Asoomin ale, ingoigei anyun ng'olyoondeng'ung' ng'olyootap age eng' icheek, ng'alaal ng'aleek che myach.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Ago ki le Mikaia, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki it ne mwaei Kamuktaindennyu, amwae nooto.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Kingo it ineendet ole mi laitoryat, koleenji laitoryat ineendet, “Mikaia, kibe Ramot-gilead, anan atebi?” Ki le ineendet, “Otogoste ak oboor; ak kindo eunekwok pichooto.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Ki leenji `laitoryat ineendet, “Ayosyeun konyil ata ale, amat imwaiwo kiy age kobatee imanda eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Ki le Mikaia, “Ki ageer Israel tugul ko kaiyesta eng' tuloonook, ko uu keechiirek che ma tinyei mestowot, ak ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ‘Ma tinyei chuuto kiptaiyat; ingoweek chii tugul kwo koonnyi eng' kaalyeet.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Ki leenji `laitoryatap Israel Jehoshaphat, “Kama amwaun ale, ma maoteni ineendet tuguuk che myachen agobo anee, kobatee yaityet?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Ki leenji Mikaia, “Ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ki ageer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotebyei eng' ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet, ak kitononi lugeet tugul ne po kipsengwet eng' eunnyi ne po tai ak ne po kaataam." 
2Chronicles18:19 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Ng'oo ne iberberi Ahab laitoryatap Israel, si kwo kotogosta ak kome eng' Ramoth-gilead?’ Ki mwa age ko uu ni, komwa age ko uu ni." 
2Chronicles18:20 Ki mong' tamirmiryo ak kotonon eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kole, ‘Awendi aberberi.’ Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, ‘Iberbertoi ano?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Ak ki le, ‘Awendi ak aegu tamirmir ne kenisyei eng' kutusweegap maotikyik tugul.’ Ak ki mwa ineendet kole, ‘Iberberi ineendet ak iterteer; ui anyun ak iyai ko uu nooto.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 Ara anyun, keero, kagonde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tamirmir ne kenisyei kutusweegap maotichuguk tugul; ak kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaityet agobo inyee.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Ki riik anyun Zedekiah weeriitap Kenaana, ak korabach Mikaia matanda, ak koleenji, “Kabun ano Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak konyo kong'alaalun?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Ak ki le Mikaia, “Igeere eng' peetuunooto ye tuun iwendi koot ne po oriit iunyegei.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Ki le laitoryatap Israel, “Onam Mikaia ak oweekte omutyi Ammon pounindetap nganaseet ak Joash weeriitap laitoryat." 
2Chronicles18:26 Oleenji kamwa laitoryat kole, ‘Onde chiichi korgoreet, ak obae amitwogigap nyalilda ak peegap nyalilda, agoi aweege eng' kaalyeet.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Ak ki le Mikaia, “Ngot iweege iman eng' kaalyeet, ko kaagaa ma ng'alaalena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ak ki testai kole, “Ogas okweek piik tugul!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Ara kitogosta anyun laitoryatap Israel ak Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah koba Ramot-gilead. 
2Chronicles18:29 Ki leenji `laitoryatap Israel Jehoshaphat, “Awalegei aegu age ak awe lugeet, ago ilaach inyee ngoroik che po laitornatet.” Kowalgei anyun laitoryatap Israel koek age ak koba lugeet." 
2Chronicles18:30 Kiga ng'at `laitoryatap Syria kiptainigap kariisyekyik, koleenji, “Amat obargei ak ne ming'in anan ko ne oo, kobatee laitoryatap Israel ineegei.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Kingo keer kiptainichooto po kariisyek Jehoshaphat, komwa kole, “Niito ko laitoryatap Israel.” Ara kiweekyigei anyun kole kobargei ak ineendet; ago kiwaach Jehoshaphat, ak kitoret `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. Ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet icheek kobagaakta ineendet." 
2Chronicles18:32 Kingo keer kiptainigap kariisyek kole ma laitoryatap Israel ni, koweek, mata koosup ineendet." 
2Chronicles18:33 King'i chiito age kwangennyi komwok kosapsapchi ak kityech laitoryatap Israel ole tuiyechin kariikyik che ki ilaachi. Ki leenji anyun chiito ne kweriei chepkichutinnyi, “Imuta amanda eng' oli mi lugeet, amu kagiguotena miising'.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Kitesak lugeet peetuunooto, ak kitiigei laitoryatap Israel eng' chepkichutinnyi kotokyigei piigap Syria agoi koskoleny. Ye kingo neegit kororokto asiista, kome ineendet." 
2Chronicles19:1 Ki week Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah kwo koonnyi eng' Jerusalem eng' kaalyeet. 
2Chronicles19:2 Ki wo Jehu weeriitap Hanani keerindet, kotorookta ineendet ak koleenji Laitoryat Jehoshaphat, “Tos yamin itoret kiptengekyot ak icham che wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Amu kiito, ko pwonjinin nereegek che punu taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles19:3 Nganda uu nooto ko ki kigeerchin tuguuk che myachen, amu ki iste Aserot eng' emet ak ki igiil muguleldang'ung' icheeng' Kamuktaindet.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Ki meny `Jehoshaphat Jerusalem, ak kiwendot kogeny eng' kwenutap piik kobooch Beer-sheba agoi emetap tuloonoogap Ephraim, ak komut icheek koweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak." 
2Chronicles19:5 Ki inde kirwoogik emet, eng' nganaseet age tugul eng' nganasook tugul che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah." 
2Chronicles19:6 Ki leenji kirwoogichooto, “Obwaat kiit ne oyae, amu morwoochi agobo chii ago orwoochi agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, mi ineendet kobootok ye oyae kirwooget." 
2Chronicles19:7 Ingotebenok anyun kaiyweisyet ne oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, oriip ak oyai, amu ma mi tengekto eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo anan ko tiytiyetap piik, ama taachei konunoik che kigoigoisye.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Ki inde kogeny `Jehoshaphat Jerusalem alak eng' Lawiik ak tisiik, ak alak che po kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyegap Israel, agobo kirwoogetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak agobo tuguuk che kamoiyo. Ak ki week koba Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles19:9 Ki ng'at icheek koleenji: “Oyai ko uu niito eng' kaiyweisyet ne oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' imanda ak eng' muguleldo ne ititaat." 
2Chronicles19:10 Eng' peetuut age tugul ne kaityok ng'olyootap chii age tugul ne punu tupchosyekwok che menyei nganasookwak, agobo korotiik eng' korotiik, ak agobo ng'atuutik ak kayomisutik, kaneetisyosyek ak kirwoogutik, oteechi, si ma nam icheek tengekto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak konyonjok nereeknateet, okweek ak tupchosyekwok. Oyai niito, si ma namak tengekto." 
2Chronicles19:11 Keero, poiywok Amariah tisiindet ne oo eng' tuguuk tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak koboiywok Sebadia weeriitap Ishmael, pounindetap kootap Judah eng' tuguuk tugul che po laitoryat, ak egu Lawiik kiptainik eng' taing'wong'. Oboisye eng' nyiganateet, ak kotebi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ineendet ne yaei ne myee.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Kingo pata niito, kobwa kobargei ak Jehoshaphat piigap Moab ak piigap Ammon, ak alak eng' Amonik." 
2Chronicles20:2 Ki pwa piik alak komwachi Jehoshaphat, koleenji, “Ipookyinin tuiyet ne oo ne punu nyanjet pitoniin eng' Syria; ak mi Hasason-tamar (nooto ko En-gedi).”" 
2Chronicles20:3 Ki iyweis anyun Jehoshaphat, ak ko ki ilgei kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak komwaita karugutetapkei eng' Judah tugul." 
2Chronicles20:4 Ki iyumgei Judah tugul kocheeng' toreteet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki pwa eng' nganasook tugul che po Judah kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles20:5 Ki tonon anyun Jehoshaphat eng' tuiyetap Judah ak ne po Israel, eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' taitap seremut ne leel," 
2Chronicles20:6 ak ki le, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekyok, tos ma ii Kamuktaindet eng' kipsengwet? Tos ma ii pounindet ne pou laitornatosyek tugul che po pororyosyek? Mi eung'ung' kimnateet ak kamuktaet, ne ma mi ne imuuchi kogirinden." 
2Chronicles20:7 Tos ma ioon inyee, ee Kamuktaindennyo, piik che ki menyei emoni eng' taitap piiguk Israel, ak igoochi kobunji iyoteetap Abraham chorweng'ung' koigeny?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Ki meny icheek olito, ak ki koteegun ole-tiliil agobo kaineng'ung', koleen," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Ngot konyonjech yaityet, rotwetap chok, kirwooget, anan koroito anan rubeet, ketononie eng' taitap kooi, ak eng' taing'ung', amu mi kaineng'ung' kooi, ak keriirchin eng' nyalilwogikyok, ak igaseech ak isarwech.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 Keer nguno anyuno, lagogap Ammon, Moab ak che po tulweetap Seir, che ki ma ichamji Israel kobookyi ye kingo pwanei komong'u eng' emetap Misiri, ago kirop taban, ama par." 
2Chronicles20:11 Keer anyuno, ole kagogeerundawech, kobwa komaandech eng' poroteng'ung', ne ki igoonech kobunjech." 
2Chronicles20:12 Ee Kamuktaindennyo, merwookyini? Amu ma ki tinyei kamuget kebarge ak tuiyoni oo kagobokyech. Ma kingen kiit ne kiyaei, ago inyalin konyekyok.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Kitononso Judah tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooto manyurunikwak, osotikwak ak lagokwak." 
2Chronicles20:14 Ki nyoonji anyun Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jaasyel weeriitap Zekariah, weeriitap Benaiah, weeriitap Jeiel, weeriitap Mattaniah, Lawindet, ne po weeriigap Asaph, eng' kwenutap tuiyet." 
2Chronicles20:15 Ki le ineendet, “Oeb iit okweek tugul kap Judah ak che omenye Jerusalem, kobooten inyee Laitoryat Jehoshaphat: kamwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole: ‘Amoiywei anan oaragense amu lugoni oo; amu ma neng'wong' lugeet, ago po Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles20:16 Orektee mutai obargei ak icheek. Togosu icheek eng' tegeiyetap Sis; ak onyoorchini ye igeesunegei atebweet, taitap surkwen ne po Jeruel." 
2Chronicles20:17 Ma okweek che oyae lugoni. Otetkei, otononse, si ogeer yetunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi kobootok, ee Judah ak Jerusalem. Amoiyweisye, anan oaragense. Oba opookyi icheek mutai; amu mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootok.’ ”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Ki ing'uruuk anyun Jehoshaphat kot kotiiny togeet ng'wony, ak kap Judah tugul ak piigap Jerusalem ak ki ibutyi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles20:19 Kitononso Lawiik, ak che po lagogap Kohatik, ak che po lagogap Koraik, kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, eng' kutit ne oo miising'." 
2Chronicles20:20 Ki ng'eetyo karon miising', komusta surkwen ne po Tekoa. Ye kingo ta kobendi, kotonon Jehoshaphat ak kole, “Ogasa, ee Judah, ak che omenye Jerusalem! Oyan Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', si kobiit ogimegitu; oyan maotikyik, si oboor.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Kingo kagong'alaal ak piik, kolewen che tyenjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kolasu ineendet eng' karaaranindap tiliilindo, komandoi kondoe lugeet, koleen, “Oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi, amu po koigeny rireenennyi.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Kingo toi kotyenso ak kolasu, konde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik che ribistos si kobargei ak lagogap Ammon, ak Moab, ak tulweetap Seir, che ki kobwonji kobookyi Judah; ak ki kibar." 
2Chronicles20:23 Amu kitononso lagogap Ammon ak Moab kobargei ak che ki menyei tulweetap Seir, kobar kogees ak kong'em. Ye kingo kagogees che ki menyei Seir, kotoret chii tugul kobar chiito ne kami tuwai." 
2Chronicles20:24 Kingo it piigap Judah teekseet ne kooi ne kiriipse eng' surkwen, kotoben piik che chaang'; ak kiga kobutyo koek muuswek, ak ki ma komi agot agenge ne kichilil." 
2Chronicles20:25 Kingo nyo Jehoshaphat kobooto piikyik konam tuguuk, konyoor eng' kwenunnywa tuguuk ng'iisyat che po mogornateet ak ngoroik, tuguuk che po kamanuutik che eecheen, che kibut eng' pichooto koipchigei, che kitemenee kola. Ki tar peetuutap somok koibei parunenichooto, amu ki chaang' kot." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ki iyumjigei atebweetap Beraka eng' peetuutap ang'wan; amu eng' olooto ko ki ilas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki kiguure anyun kainetap yooto Atebweetap Beraka, agoi ra." 
2Chronicles20:27 Ki week tugul che po Judah ak Jerusalem, kondoe Jehoshaphat, kobendi Jerusalem eng' poiboiyet, amu ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek koboiboitu amu puunikwak." 
2Chronicles20:28 Ki pwa Jerusalem kobutonu kibugandinik ak ketubosyek, ak koguutonu iryagook kot koit kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles20:29 Ki nam kaiyweisyet ne iywei Kamuktaindet laitornatosyek tugul che po emotinwek, ye kingo kas kole ki par Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puunigap Israel." 
2Chronicles20:30 Ki imuuny anyun pounatetap Jehoshaphat, amu ki igoochi Kamuktaindennyi kamuung'et eng' tabanwek tugul." 
2Chronicles20:31 Ara ki laitoran Jehoshaphat eng' Judah. Ki po kenyiisyek sosom ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut eng' Jerusalem. Kainetap kamennyi ko ki Hasubah cheptap Sili." 
2Chronicles20:32 Kiwendote ortinwegap kwandanyi Asa ak ma masta kometo, ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles20:33 Ago ma ki isto komoswek che torooreen; ki tomo kogiil piik mugulelwekwak kotokyi Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak. 
2Chronicles20:34 Ki kisirchi poisyonigap Jehoshaphat che ng'etunotiin, che po tai ak che po let, kitabuutap Jehu weeriitap Hanani, ki kisirchi chooto kitabuutap laitorinigap Israel." 
2Chronicles20:35 Kingo pata niito konamgei Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Judah ak Ahasia laitoryatap Israel, ki yai Ahasia ne ya miising'." 
2Chronicles20:36 Ki namgei ak ineendet si kobiit koteech melisyek koba Tarsis; ak ki teech melisyechooto eng' Esion-geber. 
2Chronicles20:37 Ki maoten Elieser weeriitap Dodabahu ne po Maresha agobo Jehoshaphat, kole, “Amu koonamge ak Ahasia, ko kagong'em Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poisyoniguk.” Kibutok anyun melisyek ak ki mata komuuch koba Tarsis." 
2Chronicles21:1 Ki ru Jehoshaphat ak kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi ole ki kitupchi kwanisyekyik eng' nganaseetap Daudi. Ki laitoran anyun Jehoram weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Chronicles21:2 Ki tinyei ineendet weeriik alak che tupcho, weeriigap Jehoshaphat chooto ko: Azariah, Jehiel, Zekariah, Azariah, Mikael ak Shepatiah. Chuuto tugul ko ki weeriigap Jehoshaphat laitoryatap Israel." 
2Chronicles21:3 Ki igoochi `kwandanywa icheek kagoochinoik che eecheen, che po fedha, che po thahabu ak che po tuguuk che po kamanuutyet ne oo, kobooto nganasook che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah; ago ki igoochi `ineendet laitornatet Jehoram amu ki taita." 
2Chronicles21:4 Kingo kagonam Jehoram pounatetap kwandanyi ak kogimitkei, kobar tupchosyekyik tugul eng' rotwetap chok ak alak che po pounigap Israel." 
2Chronicles21:5 Ki po Jehoram kenyiisyek sosom ak aeng' ye ki tau kolaitorani ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek sisiit eng' Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles21:6 Kiwendote ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel, ko uu ye ki yai kootap Ahab, amu ki itun cheptap Ahab. Ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles21:7 Agot nganda ki uu nooto koma cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'em kootap Daudi amu kayomiset ne kiga koyomisyi Daudi, ak ko uu ye ki iarorchi ineendet ak lagokyik kole igoochin ineendet tait koigeny." 
2Chronicles21:8 Ki ingelelji `Edomik pounatetap Judah eng' peetuusyekyik ak ki ieetyigei laitoryat ne pou icheek. 
2Chronicles21:9 Ki wo anyun Jehoram kolanda kobooto kiptainikyik kotinyei kariisyekyik tugul. Ki ng'eet kemoi ak kobookyi Edomik che kigayiem ineendet kobooto kiptainigap kariisyek. 
2Chronicles21:10 Ki ingelel anyun Edomik kobagaakta pounatetap Judah agoi rani. Ki ingelel agine Libna eng' peetuusyechooto, amu kiga kometo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekyik." 
2Chronicles21:11 Ma nooto kityo, ago ki teech kogeny komoswek che torooreen eng' tuloonoogap Judah, ak koyai che ki menyei Jerusalem koibotkei, ak kobeet Judah." 
2Chronicles21:12 Ki nyoonji ineendet parweet ne ki punu maotyot Elijah, koleenji, “Kamwa ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Daudi kwandang'ung', kole: Amu ma iwendote ortinwegap Jehoshaphat kwandang'ung' anan ortinwegap Asa laitoryatap Judah," 
2Chronicles21:13 ago ki iwendote ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel, ak ki igoochi Judah ak che menyei Jerusalem koyai ibeetapkei, ko uu ye ki yai kootap Ahab. Ki ibar kogeny tupchosyeguk che po kootap kwandang'ung', che kigoigoi kosiirin," 
2Chronicles21:14 ara anyun, parei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piiguk, lagoguk, osotiguk ak tuguuguk tugul, eng' koroito ne oo." 
2Chronicles21:15 Inyooru myando ne oo eng' moet, agoi komong' agutaniguk eng' myanooto, peetuut age tugul.”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Ki ing'eet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nereeknatetap Philistik ak ne po Arabuuk che menyei ole neegitee Ethiopik kobargei ak Jehoram. 
2Chronicles21:17 Ki togos icheek kobookyi Judah, ak kobut koba oriit ak koip tuguuk tugul che kinyoor eng' kootap laitoryat, kiluul weeriikyik ak icheek, ak osotikyik kot koma ng'etyi weeriit agot agenge, kobatee Jehoahas, weeriit ne ming'in eng' tugul." 
2Chronicles21:18 Kingo pata chuuto tugul, kobir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' myando eng' agutanikyik ne ma inyaaksei." 
2Chronicles21:19 Kingo pata kenyiisyek aeng'u komong' agutanikyik amu myandanyi, ak kime eng' myanwogik che ng'woneen. Ma peelji piikyik kiy ineendet, ko uu ye ki kibeelji kwanisyekyik." 
2Chronicles21:20 Ki po kenyiisyek sosom ak aeng' ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran eng' Jerusalem kenyiisyek sisiit. Kime anyun, koma komachei chii ineendet ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi, ago ma eng' kereeriisyegap laitorinik." 
2Chronicles22:1 Ki inde piik che ki menyei Jerusalem Ahasia weeriinnyi ne ming'in koek laitoryat kogeer ineendet: amu ki par kweanet ne kigabwa nganaseet kobooto Arabuuk, weeriik tugul che eecheen. Ara ki laitoran anyun Ahasia weeriitap Jehoram eng' Judah." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ki po kenyiisyek artam ak aeng' Ahasia ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiit agenge eng' Jerusalem. Kainetap kamennyi ko ki Athaliah cheptap Omri. 
2Chronicles22:3 Kiwendote agine ortinwegap kootap Ahab, amu ki ek kamennyi kaneetindennyi ne ki ineet ineendet koyai ne ya." 
2Chronicles22:4 Ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki yai kootap Ahab; amu ki kaneetikyik che ki ineeti ineendet, kingo kagome kwandanyi, agoi ng'emisyennyi." 
2Chronicles22:5 Ki isup kaneetisyennywa, ak koba ak Jehoram weeriitap Ahab laitoryatap Israel kobargei ak Hazael laitoryatap Syria eng' Ramoth-gilead. Ki iguoten `piigap Syria Joram." 
2Chronicles22:6 Ki week konyo kinya eng' Jezreel, mook che ki kitoor eng' Ramah, ye ki paregei ak Hazael laitoryatap Syria. Ak kichoortagei Azariah weeriitap Jehoram laitoryatap Judah kwo kogeer Jehoram weeriitap Ahab eng' Jezreel, amu kimyani." 
2Chronicles22:7 Ki punu Kamuktaindet ng'emisyetap Ahasia, amu ki wo ole mi Joram. Kingo it ineendet, koba ak Jehoram kobargei ak Jehu weeriitap Nimshi ne kiga koiil Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit kobar kootap Ahab kogees." 
2Chronicles22:8 Ye kita korwookyin Jehu kootap Ahab, konyoor pounigap Judah ak weeriigap tupchosyegap Ahasia, che kiboisyechin Ahasia, ak ki par icheek." 
2Chronicles22:9 Ki cheeng' Ahasia, ak ki nam ineendet ye ki ung'egei eng' Samaria. Ki kimutyi Jehu ak ki par ineendet. Kitup `icheek ineendet, amu ki le “Ineendet ko weeriitap Jehoshaphat, ne ki cheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' muguleldanyi tugul.” Ak ma sich kootap Ahasia kimnateet konam laitornatet." 
2Chronicles22:10 Kingo keer Athaliah kametap Ahasia kole ki kome weeriinnyi, kong'eet ak kobar iyoteet tugul ne po kaplaitoryat ne po kootap Judah." 
2Chronicles22:11 Ago ki imut komweito Jehoshabeat, cheptap laitoryat, Joash weeriitap Ahasia, kochoor ineendet komut eng' ole mi weeriigap laitoryat, chu ki kibarei, ak konde ineendet ak cheplakwet koot ne kiruei eng' koot oriit. Kouny anyun ineendet `Jehoshabeat cheptap Laitoryat Jehoram, osotyotap Jehoiada tisiindet, amu ki chepkametap Ahasia, si ma par Athaliah." 
2Chronicles22:12 Ki tebi kobooto icheek ko ung'aat eng' kootap Kamuktaindet kenyiisyek lo, ye ki laitorani Athaliah eng' emet." 
2Chronicles23:1 Ki nyoor nyiganateet Jehoiada eng' kenyiitap tisap, ak ki yai koyomiset ak kiptainigap pogolusyek, Azariah weeriitap Jeroham, Ishmael weeriitap Jeohanan, Azariah weeriitap Obed, Maaseia weeriitap Adaiah, ak Elisapat weeriitap Zikri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Kibendat icheek koyom Judah komugul, ak koyum Lawiik eng' nganasook tugul che po Judah kobooto kandoigap kwanisyegap Israel, ak ki pwa Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles23:3 Ak ki iyomiskei ak laitoryat tuiyet komugul eng' kootap Kamuktaindet. Ak ki leenji, “Ingolaitoran weeriitap laitoryat, ko uu ye ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo weeriigap Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Ni kiit ne oyae: egu riibiigap kurgotik kebeberta agenge eng' somok eng' okweek, che pwoonei eng' peetuutap sabato, che po Tisiik ak Lawiik;" 
2Chronicles23:5 kotebee kebeberta agenge eng' somok kootap laitoryat; kotebee kebeberta agenge eng' somok kurgeetap lumeiywot: ak ingotebee piik tugul seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles23:6 Ago amochamji chii konyo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobatee tisiik, ak Lawiik che otisyei; pwoonei icheeget amu tiliileen: ago riibei piik tugul riipseetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles23:7 Si koyiem Lawiik laitoryat, kotinyei chii tugul kariikyik eng' eunnyi ak chii age tugul ne nyoonei ko, kebarei: ak otebi ak laitoryat ye nyoonei ko ak ye mandoi.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Koyai anyun Lawiik ak Judah tugul kiit ne kang'at icheek Jehoiada tisiindet: komut chii tugul piikyik, piik che pwoonei eng' sabato, ak che kimandoi eng' sabato; amu ma pagaakta Jehoiada tisiindet riipsosyechooto." 
2Chronicles23:9 Ak ki igoochi Jehoiada tisiindet kiptainigap pogolwogik ng'otwek, ak long'onik che mengeechen, ak long'onik che eecheen, che ki po Laitoryat Daudi, che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles23:10 Ak kitet piik tugul, kotinyei chii tugul kariikyik eng' eunekyik, kobooch komostap tai ne po koot agoi komostap kaataam ne po koyooto, ye neegitee kaptisisyet, ak koot, koyiem laitoryat." 
2Chronicles23:11 Komong' anyun weeriitap laitoryat, ak kolaakyi naaryeet, ak kogoochi paornateet, ak konde ineendet koek laitoryat: ak ki iil Jehoiada ak weeriikyik, ineendet; ak kole ingosap laitoryat."
