2Chronicles23:12 Ak kingo kas Athaliah polatetap piik che rwaoti ak kolasu laitoryat, konyo ole mi piik eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
2Chronicles23:13 Ak ki keerot, ogeero, ki tononi laitoryat eng' ole neegitee toloitanyi eng' ye kibunei kebendi oriit, komi kiptainik ak iryagook ye mi laitoryat; ak kiboiboitu piik tugul che po emet, ak koguutei iryagook; kibutei ak icheek tyeniik kibugandinik, ak kondochin tyendap kalasunet. Kogereer anyun Athaliah ngoroikyik, ak kole, “Chaamset! Chaamset!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Komut anyun Jehoiada tisiindet kiptainigap pogolwogik, kobwa saang', che kiga kinde koboi lugeet, koleenji, “Omaande ineendet eng' kwenutap piik; ak kibarei eng' rotwetap chok chiito ne isubi ineendet.” Amu ki le tisiindet, “Amobarchi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Koistochigei anyun icheek ineendet; ak ki wo ye kichutei ormariichetap paraisiit ne po kootap laitoryat; ak ki parchi yooto. 
2Chronicles23:16 Koyomiskei anyun Jehoiada ak piik tugul, ak laitoryat, kole koek piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles23:17 Ak ki pa piik tugul kootap Baal, kobut, ak kobut kapkorosusyekyik, ak kotuatui kanamonikyik, ak kobar Matan tisiindetap Baal eng' taitap kapkorosusyek." 
2Chronicles23:18 Ak ki ng'at Jehoiada poisyonigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koboi tisiik, Lawiik, che kiga kopchei Daudi eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kogoitoi kagoochinoik che kibeelei che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki kisir eng' ng'atuutigap Musa, si koboiboitu ak kotyendos, ko uu ng'atuutyetap Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Ak ki inde riibiik kurgotigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si ma wo ko chii age tugul ne ma tiliil eng' kiy age tugul." 
2Chronicles23:20 Ak ki nam kiptainigap pogolwogik, ak piik che taagunotiin, ak pounigap piik, kobooto piik tugul che po emet, si komut laitoryat kochoorgei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak ki pun ormariichet ne toroor kot koit kootap laitoryat, ak konde laitoryat kotebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po pounateet." 
2Chronicles23:21 Koboiboitu anyun piik tugul che po emet, ak ki siis nganaseet: ak ki par Athaliah eng' rotwetap chok." 
2Chronicles24:1 Ki po Joash kenyiisyek tisap ye ki tau kolaitorani; ki laitoran kenyiisyek artam eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Sibia, ne po Beer-sheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Ki yai Joash ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Jehoiada tisiindet. 
2Chronicles24:3 Ak ki itunji Jehoiada ineendet osotik aeng', ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik." 
2Chronicles24:4 Kingo pata chooto komach Joash koteech kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole kiga kobutok. 
2Chronicles24:5 Ki iyum Tisiik ak Lawiik ak koleenji, “Oba nganasoogap Judah ak oyumate Israel tugul fedhaisyek che kiteege kogeny kootap Kamuktaindeng'wong', eng' kenyiit age tugul, oyai niito eng' chokyinet.” Ago ki ma yai Lawiik ko uu nooto." 
2Chronicles24:6 Koguur anyun `laitoryat tisiindet ne oo Jehoiada, ak koleenji, “Amu nee si memwachi Lawiik koyumat eng' Judah ak Jerusalem aisuruut ne ki ng'at Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak tuiyetap Israel, agobo emaitap paornateet?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Amu ki kobut weeriigap Athaliah, kwonyooto sogoran kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogoochi Baalik tuguuk tugul che kiga kitabaanji kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
2Chronicles24:8 Kong'at anyun laitoryat, ak ki yai moinget, ak konde kurgeet saang' ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles24:9 Ki kimwaita eng' Judah ak Jerusalem keipchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aisuruut ne ki ng'at Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet eng' surkwen agobo Israel. 
2Chronicles24:10 Kiboiboitu pounik tugul ak piik tugul, ak ki ip aisurunooto konde moinget agoi konyiit." 
2Chronicles24:11 Ak kingo kagoip Lawiik moinget konyo kootap laitoryat, ko ngo keer kole chaang' fedhaisyek eng' oriit, konyo siriindetap laitoryat ak kiboityotap tisiindet ne oo ak korong' fedhaisyek eng' moinget, ak koip moinget koweekta kwo ye kami. Ki yai ko uu nooto peetuut age tugul, ak ki iyum fedhaisyek che chaang'." 
2Chronicles24:12 Ki igoochi `laitoryat ak `Jehoiada fedhaisyechooto piik che kitononjin poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki sir `icheek musogigap koik ak che po pagoinik si koteech kogeny kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ole kiga kobutok, ak ki igoochi kogeny kitang'igap kariik ak che po sugunonik, si kogetyi kogeny kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles24:13 Kobois anyun kiboitiinik, ak ki yai poisyonooto kosulda, ak ki lumda kootap Kamuktaindet ko uu ye ki uu, ak kogimit." 
2Chronicles24:14 Kingo kagogees, koipchi `icheek laitoryat ak Jehoiada fedhaisyek che kiga ng'et; chuuto che ki kiyae tuguuk che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che chooto ko ki tuguuk che ki kiotisye, che ki kigoitoisye, kechigosyek ak tuguuk che po thahabu ak che po fedha. Ki igoitoi kotugul kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Jehoiada." 
2Chronicles24:15 Ago ki oosit Jehoiada ko uu ye kiga kochang'a peetuusyekyik, ak ki ilil; kiga kotar ineendet kenyiisyek pogol ak sosom ye kingo meei." 
2Chronicles24:16 Ak ki kitupchi ineendet nganaseetap Daudi kobooto laitorinik, amu ki yai ne myee eng' Israel, eng' Kamuktaindet ak koonnyi." 
2Chronicles24:17 Kingo kagome Jehoiada kobwa pounigap Judah ak kogutung'ji laitoryat. Kogasyi anyun laitoryat ng'aleekwak. 
2Chronicles24:18 Kometo anyun kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, ak koot Aserik ak kanamonik. Ki nyoonji anyun nereegek Judah ak Jerusalem agobo ng'oogiswechuchwak." 
2Chronicles24:19 Agos ki iyookyi icheek maotik kole komut icheek koweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kibaoryan kogirinda icheek, ago ma cham kogas." 
2Chronicles24:20 Ki nyoonji `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zekariah weeriitap Jehoiada tisiindet; ki tonon eng' ole toroor ak koleenji piik, “Kale Kamuktaindet: Amu nee si obistoe ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si mobor? Amu ki omete Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko kagometook ak okweek.”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Ago kichaam ineendet ak kolage koik eng' ng'atuutyetap laitoryat eng' seremutap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles24:22 Nooto anyun, ma ibwaat Laitoryat Joash myeeindo ne kiga koyachi Jehoiada kwandanyi, ago ki par weeriinnyi. Ak kingo meei, komwa kole, “Ingogeer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kioto, ak koyaakta.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Ak kingo keskei kenyiit, kotogos lugeetap piigap Syria kobookyi Joash. Ki it icheek Judah ak Jerusalem, ak ki par pounik tugul che po piik. Ki iyookyi parunenik tugul laitoryatap Damasko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Nganda ki nyo lugeetap piigap Syria komut kweanet ne ming'in, ko ki inde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunekwak lugeet ne oo miising', amu kiga kometo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak. Ki irwookyi anyun Joash." 
2Chronicles24:25 Ye kingo pa icheek, kobagaach ineendet koguotenot, kochaam ineendet otwogikyik amu korotiigap weeriigap Jehoiada tisiindet, ak ki parchi itogunnyi. Kitupchi ineendet nganaseetap Daudi, ago ma tupchi ineendet kereeriisyegap laitorinik." 
2Chronicles24:26 Ak chu ko icheek che kichaam ineendet: Sabad weeriitap Simeat Jebamonindet, ak Jeosabad weeriitap Simirit chemoabindet." 
2Chronicles24:27 Ogeero, ki kisir agobo weeriikyik, ak ooindap milosyek che ki kigesenji ineendet ak teekseetap kootap Kamuktaindet, eng' ng'aleegap bukuitap laitorinik. Ak ki laitoran Amasia weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Chronicles25:1 Ki po Amasia kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak sogool eng' Jerusalem. Kainetap kamennyi ko ki Jehoadan ne po Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles25:2 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ma eng' muguleldo ne ititaat." 
2Chronicles25:3 Kingo kagogimiit laitornatennyi, kobar otwogikyik che ki par kwandanyi laitoryat." 
2Chronicles25:4 Ago ma par lagokwak, ki yai ko uu ye ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutik che mi bukuitap Musa, ko uu ye kiga ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Mabegu kwanisyek agobo lagok, anan kobek lagok agobo kwanisyekwak; ago meei chii tugul agobo tengektanyi.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Kogeny, ko ki iyum Amasia piigap Judah, ak kotet icheek kobee kooriigap kwanisyekwak, kondochin kiptainigap eliphuusyek ak kiptainigap pogolwogik Judah tugul ak Benjamin: ak kiit icheek kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak che siirei, ak ki ek piik eliphuusyek pogol somok che ki kilewen, che imuuchi koba lugeet, che ki imuuchi konam ng'otwek ak long'onik." 
2Chronicles25:6 Ki sir kogeny piik eliphuusyek pogol che kiimeen ak ko nyigoonen eng' Israel eng' talendaisyek pogol che po fedha. 
2Chronicles25:7 Ago ki nyo chiitap Kamuktaindet ole mi, ak koleenji, “Ee laitoryat, amobe kobooto lugeetap Israel; amu ma mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto Israel, chooto ko lagok tugul che po Ephraim." 
2Chronicles25:8 Ago ngot imache iwe, iwe, inyiganitu, igimitu eng' lugeet: wiirtoin Kamuktaindet eng' taitap puunyoot; amu tinyei Kamuktaindet kimnateet kotoret, ak kotinyei kimnateet kowiirta.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Ak ki leenji `Amasia chiitap Kamuktaindet, Ara si kelyonji talendaisyek pogol che ki agoochi lugeetap Israel? Kowol anyun chiitap Kamuktaindet kole imuuchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogoonin che siirei chuuto miising'." 
2Chronicles25:10 Koweekta anyun Amasia icheek, nooto ko lugeet ne kiga nyo oldanyi, ne ki punu Ephraim, koweek koba kaa: kolalyo anyun nereegekwak kot agobo Judah, ak ki week koba kaa eng' nereegek che ng'woneen." 
2Chronicles25:11 Konyiganit anyun Amasia, ak kondochi piikyik, kwo Atebweetap Munyuk, ak kobar che po lagogap Seir eliphuusyek taman." 
2Chronicles25:12 Ak kiluul `lagogap Judah piik alak eliphuusyek taman, ak komut kobwa paragutap rwandet, ak kotoorta eng' rwandanooto parak, ak kitonogis tugul." 
2Chronicles25:13 Ago ki par piigap lugeet che kiweektoi Amasia kole amaba tugul lugeet, nganasoogap Judah kobooch Samaria kot koit Beth-horon, ki par piik eliphuusyek somok, ak koip parunenik che chaang'." 
2Chronicles25:14 Ak kingo punu Amasia pareetap Edomik, koip kanamonigap lagogap Seir, ak kolumda koek kanamonikyik, ak kong'uruukyi icheek eng' tainnywa, ak kobeelji nyamdutik." 
2Chronicles25:15 Kolalyo anyun nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Amasia, ak koyookyi maotyot ne ki mwachi ineendet koleenji, “Amu nee si icheeng' kanamonigap piik, che tomo kosar piikwak eng' eung'ung'?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Ak ye kita kong'alaaldos ak ineendet, koleenji laitoryat, Tos kogindein iegu kirwoogindetap laitoryat? Muite; amu nee si imache kebarin? Kimuita anyun maotyot, ak ki le, Angen ale, kagotil Kamuktaindet kole kong'emin, amu kaiyai ni, ama igas ng'aleekyuk." 
2Chronicles25:17 Korwooch anyun Amasia laitoryatap Judah, ak ki iyookto piik koba kap Joash weeriitap Jehoahas weeriitap Jehu laitoryatap Israel, koleenji, Nyoo ketuiye kegeerge togoch." 
2Chronicles25:18 Ak ki iyookyi Joash laitoryatap Israel piik Amasia laitoryatap Judah, koleenji, “Ki iyookto ng'olyoot kateet ne rutei piich ne ki mi Lebanon koyookyi tarakwet ne ki mi Lebanon, koleenji igoochi cheptong'ung' weeriinnyu kotun: ak kisiirto tyondo ne po timiin ne ki mi Lebanon, ak kotyech katanooto rutei piich.”" 
2Chronicles25:19 Imwae ile, Keero, ki ibar Edom; ak itoroorin muguleldang'ung' si ilasuge: tebee koong'ung'; amu nee si icheeng'jigei nyalilda, si ibut inyee, kobooto Judah?" 
2Chronicles25:20 Ago ma cham Amasia kogas; amu ki punu Kamuktaindet kioto, si kobiit konde icheek eunegap puunikwak, amu ki cheeng' kanamonigap Edom." 
2Chronicles25:21 Ki togosta anyun Joash laitoryatap Israel; ak kigeergei ineendet ak Amasia laitoryatap Judah togoch eng' Beth-shemesh, ne po Judah." 
2Chronicles25:22 Ak ki kiterteer Judah eng' taitap Israel; ak ki mwei chii tugul kwo emainnyi. 
2Chronicles25:23 Ak ki imut Joash laitoryatap Israel Amasia laitoryatap Judah weeriitap Joash weeriitap Jehoahas, eng' Beth-shemesh, ak komut ineendet konyo Jerusalem, ak kobut irimeet ne po Jerusalem kobooch ormariichetap Ephraim agoi ormariichetap luuita, mitainik pogol ang'wan che po euut." 
2Chronicles25:24 Ak ki ip thahabu tugul ak fedha, ak tuguuk tugul che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet kobooto Obed-edom, ak konoraik che po kootap laitoryat, kobooto luulenik ak icheek, ak ki week kwo Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Ak kita kosap Amasia weeriitap Joash laitoryatap Judah kenyiisyek taman ak muut kingo pata meetap Joash weeriitap Jehoahas laitoryatap Israel. 
2Chronicles25:26 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Amasia, che po tai ak che po let, ogeero, tos ma siraatiin eng' kitabuutap laitorinigap Judah ak Israel?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Kichaam `piik Amasia eng' Jerusalem, kobooch ngap komasta kobagaakta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki mwei kwo Lakish: ago ki iyookto piik koosup ineendet koba Lakish, ak kobar ineendet eng' olooto." 
2Chronicles25:28 Ak kilaune ineendet paraisisyek, ak kotupchi nganaseetap Judah kobooto kwanisyekyik." 
2Chronicles26:1 Yeityo konam piik tugul che po Judah Uzziah ne ki po kenyiisyek taman ak lo, ak koeet ineendet koek laitoryat kogeer kwandanyi Amasia." 
2Chronicles26:2 Ki teech Elot ak koweekyi Judah, ko kagoru laitoryat kobooto kwanisyekyik." 
2Chronicles26:3 Ki po Uzziah kenyiisyek taman ak lo ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek konom ak aeng' eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamet Jekilia ne po Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles26:4 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu tugul che ki yai kwandanyi Amasia." 
2Chronicles26:5 Ki igiil muguleldanyi kocheeng' Kamuktaindet eng' peetuusyegap Zekariah, ne ki tinyei kaguiyet agobo ng'ang'utyetap Kamuktaindet; ak eng' peetuusyek tugul che ki cheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki iberuur `Kamuktaindet ineendet." 
2Chronicles26:6 Ki wo anyun kobargei ak Philistiik, ak kobut irimeetap Gath, ak irimeetap Jabne ak irimeetap Ashdod; ak ki teech nganasook eng' Ashdod ak eng' kwenutap Philistiik." 
2Chronicles26:7 Kitoret `Kamuktaindet ineendet kobargei ak Philistiik, ak kobargei ak Arabuuk che ki menyei Gur-baal, kobooto Meunik." 
2Chronicles26:8 Ki igoochi Amonik Uzziah kagoochinoik, ak ki yom kainennyi agoi kiwotosyegap Misiri; amu kitesak kimnateennyi kot." 
2Chronicles26:9 Kogeny, ko ki teech Uzziah teeksosyek che kooen eng' Jerusalem eng' ormariichetap luuita, ak eng' ormariichetap atebweet, ak eng' ole weegegei irimeet, ak kogimit." 
2Chronicles26:10 Ak ki teech teeksosyek che kooen eng' surkwen, ak ki pal keriingonik che chaang' che po peek, amu ki tinyei tuuga che chaang'; eng' emet ne soi agine, ak eng' warenget. Ki tinyei kabotik ak che riibei logoegap sabibuk eng' tuloonook ak eng' mbareenik che rurtos miising'; amu ki chamei kabatisyet." 
2Chronicles26:11 Ki tinyei kogeny Uzziah lugeet ne po piigap pooryeet, che kigaba paretapkei eng' kweanaik ko uu koiitennywa ne kiiti Jeiel siriindet ak Maaseia pounindet, kondochin Hananiah, ne ki agenge eng' kiptainigap laitoryat." 
2Chronicles26:12 Koitet komugul ne po kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek, piik che kiimeen ak ko nyigoonen, ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol lo." 
2Chronicles26:13 Ki mi eunekwak kiplugotinik che ineetatin eliphuusyek pogol somok ak tisap ak pogol muut, che ki yai lugeet eng' kimnateet ne oo, si kotoret laitoryat kobargei ak puunik." 
2Chronicles26:14 Kichopchi Uzziah lugeet tugul, long'onik, ng'otwek, kutonook, kariigap tegeet, kwangok ak koik che ki wiirtoe porowet." 
2Chronicles26:15 Ak ki yai injinisyek eng' Jerusalem, che ki toi koyai piik che ng'oomen, kotebee teeksosyek che kooen ak irimoik, che kimwoktoe kipchabonik ak ki wiirtoe koik che eecheen. Ak ki yom ole loo kainennyi, amu ki kitoret miising' kot kogimit." 
2Chronicles26:16 Ago ye kingo kagogimiit, koloskei eng' muguleldanyi kot koyai ne ya, ak ki ingelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi; amu ki wo Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobeel nyamdutik eng' kapkorosutap nyamdutik." 
2Chronicles26:17 Ki wo Azariah tisiindet koosup ineendet, kobooto tisiik che nyigoonen tamanwogik sisiit che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwo ko." 
2Chronicles26:18 Ki kirinda Uzziah laitoryat ak koleenji, “Manyoljin, Uzziah, ibeelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyamdutik, ago nyoljin tisiik weeriigap Aron, che ki kitabaan kobeel nyamdutik. Mande eng' ole-tiliil; amu kengelel; ma egu teegisto niito eng' inyee ne punu Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Ki nereech anyun Uzziah. Ki tinyei ineendet tereet eng' eunnyi ne kibeelee nyamdutik; ak ye kinereekyin tisiik, komang'une mogondosaik togeennyi eng' taitap tisiik eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' ye neegitee kapkorosutap nyamdutik." 
2Chronicles26:20 Ye ki keer Azariah tisiindet ne oo, ak tisiik tugul, kogeer ko kagomang'une mogondosaik togeennyi. Ki oon ineendet eng' yooto kochokyi, ak kichaakta agine komanda, amu kiga kobir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet." 
2Chronicles26:21 Ki am mogondosaik Uzziah laitoryat agoi peetuutap meennyi, ak ki meny koot ne itabaanat, amu ki tinyei mogondosaik; amu ki kiistoe ineendet kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki pou Jotham weeriinnyi piigap kootap laitoryat, korwookyin piigap emet." 
2Chronicles26:22 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Uzziah, che po tai ak che po let, ko kisir maotyot Isaiah, weeriitap Amos." 
2Chronicles26:22 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Uzziah, che po tai ak che po let, ko kisir maotyot Isaiah, weeriitap Amos." 
2Chronicles26:22 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Uzziah, che po tai ak che po let, ko kisir maotyot Isaiah, weeriitap Amos." 
2Chronicles26:23 Koru anyun Uzziah ak kwanisyekyik; ak ki kitup ineendet ak kwanisyekyik, eng' kooretap kereeriisyegap laitorinik; amu ki le, “Tinyei mogondosaik.” Ki laitoran Jotham kogeer ineendet." 
2Chronicles27:1 Ki po Jotham kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Jerusha cheptap Zadok. 
2Chronicles27:2 Ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi Uzziah: ago ki ma wo Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Nganda uu nooto, ko ki testai koyai piik yaitwogik." 
2Chronicles27:3 Ki teech kurgeet ne po meto eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki yai poisyetap teekseet ne oo eng' inaatutap Ophel." 
2Chronicles27:4 Ki teech kogeny nganasook eng' emetap tuloonook che po Judah, ak ki teech irimoik ak teeksosyek che kooen eng' osnosyek." 
2Chronicles27:5 Kibargei Jotham ak laitoryatap `lagogap Ammon, ak koterteer icheek. Ak ki igoochi lagogap Ammon ineendet eng' kenyinooto talendaisyek pogol che po fedha, ak keruutik eliphuusyek taman che po nganuuk, ak keruutik eliphuusyek taman che po baale. Ki igoochi ko uu nooto lagogap Ammon ineendet eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' ak ne po somok." 
2Chronicles27:6 Ki kimiit anyun Jotham amu ki chop ortinwekyik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi. 
2Chronicles27:7 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jotham, ak lugosyekyik tugul, ak ortinwekyik tugul, ko siraatiin eng' kitabuutap laitorinigap Israel ak che po Judah." 
2Chronicles27:8 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani, ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo eng' Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles27:9 Ki ru Jotham ak kwanisyekyik ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Daudi. Ak ki laitoran Ahaz weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet. 
2Chronicles28:1 Ki po Ahaz kenyiisyek tiptem ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak lo eng' Jerusalem. Ki ma yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu Daudi kwandanyi." 
2Chronicles28:2 Ago kiwendote ortinwegap laitorinigap Israel, ak ki itang'ji kogeny Baalik kanamonik." 
2Chronicles28:3 Ki peel kogeny nyamdutik eng' atebweetap weeriitap Hinom ak kobeel lagokyik eng' maat, ko uu tuguuk che kiwechei che po pororyosyek, che kigaon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap piigap Israel." 
2Chronicles28:4 Ak kieny tiseiywek ak kobeel nyamdutik eng' komoswek che torooreen, eng' tuloonook ak eng' kelutap keetit age tugul ne tuon." 
2Chronicles28:5 Ki inde Ahaz anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi eutap laitoryatap Syria, ak ki iterteer ineendet ak komut tuiyet ne oo ne po piikyik koek luulenik ak komut koba Damasko. Ki kinde ineendet kogeny eunegap laitoryatap Israel, ne ki iterteer ineendet eng' pareet ne oo." 
2Chronicles28:6 Ki par Pekah weeriitap Remaliah piik eng' Judah eliphuusyek pogol agenge ak tiptem eng' peetuut agenge, che ki piik che nyigoonen chooto tugul, amu kimeto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak." 
2Chronicles28:7 Ak ki par Zikri, chiito ne kiim, ne po Ephraim, Maaseia weeriitap laitoryat, Asrikam pounindetap koot, ak Elkanah ne kirubei laitoryat." 
2Chronicles28:8 Kiluul piigap Israel tupchosyekwak eliphuusyek pogol aeng', kwonyiik, weeriik ak tiibiik; ak ki ip parunenik che chaang' eng' icheek koba Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Ago kimi maotyotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor olooto, ne ki kiguure Oded; ak ki wo kotorookta lugeet ne kinyonei Samaria, ak koleenji icheek, “Amu ki nereekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwok Judah, ko no koinde icheek eunekwok, ak kaobar icheek eng' nereegek che ng'woneen che kagoit kipsengwet." 
2Chronicles28:10 Ak nguno omache oyai lagogap Judah ak Jerusalem che murenik ak che kwonyiik koek otwogikwok. Ago motinye okweek kachiliilutik che ki ochiliilji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'? 
2Chronicles28:11 Ogasa anyun, oweech luulenik che kaoluul eng' tupchosyekwok, amu mi paragung'wong' nereegek che ng'woneen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Yeityo kotononso alak eng' kandoigap lagogap Ephraim, Azariah weeriitap Johanan, Berekiah weeriitap Meshillemoth, Jehizkiah weeriitap Shallum ak Amasa weeriitap Hadlai, kogirinda pichooto ki punu lugeet," 
2Chronicles28:13 ak koleenji icheek, “Momuuchi omutu luulenik kobwa olito: amu omache oyai kiit ne ibwech kachiliilutyet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit otes tengekwogikyok ak kachiliilutik: amu eecheen kachiliilutikyok, ak miitei nereegek che ng'woneen agobo Israel.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Ara ki pagaakta anyun murenigap luuget luulenik ak parunenik eng' taitap pounik ak tuiyet tugul. 
2Chronicles28:15 Ki ng'eetyo anyun piik che ki kimwa kainaikwak ak komut luulenik, ak ki nam tuguuk che kibooru ak kolaaksechine piik tugul che ki mi aach ngor. Ki ilaaksechi icheek ak kolaakyi kweonik, kibai ak konaga koe, ak koiil icheek; ak komute tugul che nyalulyotin sigiroik, komut kobwa Jeriko, nganaseetap tiironigap sosik, agoi ole mi tupchosyekwak, ak koweek anyun koba Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Ki iyookto eng' peetuusyechooto `Laitoryat Ahaz piik koba kaplaitorinigap Assyria kotoret ineendet. 
2Chronicles28:17 Amu kigabwa kogeny Edomik kobookyi ak koterteer Judah, ak komut luulenik." 
2Chronicles28:18 Kiga kobookyi ak icheek Philistiik nganasook che po atebweet, ak che po Judah murot tai. Kiga nam ak komeny Beth-shemesh, Aijalon, Gederoth, Soko kobooto nganasookyik, Timnah kobooto nganasookyik, ak Gimso agine kobooto nganasookyik." 
2Chronicles28:19 Amu ki iming'in `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Judah agobo Ahaz laitoryatap Israel, amu ki yai atebosyegap teweernateet eng' Judah, ak kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising'." 
2Chronicles28:20 Ak ki nyoonji ineendet `Tilgath-pilneser laitoryatap Assyria, ak konyaliil ineendet, ma igimit." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ki inem Ahaz kebeberta ne ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ne ki mi kootap laitoryat ak ne po pounik, ak kogoochi laitoryatap Assyria; ago ma toret nooto ineendet." 
2Chronicles28:22 Ak kites kosiir kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyegap nyalildanyi, laitoryandaniito Ahaz." 
2Chronicles28:23 Amu kieng'ji tiseiywek kamuktaigap Damasko, che kibar ineendet; ak ki le, “Amu toreti kamuktaigap laitorinigap Syria icheek, aeng'jini anyun agane icheek, si kobiit kotoreta.” Ago ki ek chooto che king'em ineendet ak Israel tugul." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ki iyum Ahaz tereenigap kootap Kamuktaindet, ak kotui tereenichooto po kootap Kamuktaindet. Kiger kurgotigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koteekyigei kapkorosusyek eng' luuita age tugul ne po Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles28:25 Ak ki yai komoswek che torooreen eng' nganaseet age tugul ne po Judah, si kobeeljine nyamdutik kamuktaik, ak kotach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekyik, konereech." 
2Chronicles28:26 Ak poisyonikyik che ng'etunotiin, ak ortinwekyik tugul, che po tai ak che po let, ko siraatiin eng' kitabuutap laitorinigap Judah ak Israel." 
2Chronicles28:27 Ak ki ru Ahaz kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitupchi nganaseetap Jerusalem, ago ma kisut kwo kereeriisyegap laitorinigap Israel. Ki laitoran Hezekiah weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Chronicles29:1 Ki tau Hezekiah kolaitorani ko po kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek tiptem ak sogool eng' Jerusalem. Ki kiguure kamennyi Abijah cheptap Zekariah. 
2Chronicles29:2 Ak ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu tugul che ki yai Daudi kwandanyi." 
2Chronicles29:3 Ki yaat kurgotigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po laitornatennyi, eng' arawet ne po tai, ak koteech kogeny ole kiga kobutok." 
2Chronicles29:4 Ki imut Tisiik ak Lawiik kobwa ko, ak koyumji icheek komosta ne paraa eng' kong'asiis," 
2Chronicles29:5 ak koleenji, “Ogas, okweek Lawiik; oanyinyge, ak oanyiny kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekyok, ak omaande tuguugap simdo eng' ole-tiliil." 
2Chronicles29:6 Amu ki kochiliil kwanisyekyok ak koyai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo, ak ki kometo ineendet ak kowelelgei kometo ole menyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotuktoochi patai." 
2Chronicles29:7 Kigoger kurgotigap keterut, ak komis taisyek, mata kobeel nyamdutik anan kogoito tiseiywek che kibeelei eng' ole-tiliil, kogoochi Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
2Chronicles29:8 Ki nyoonji anyun nereegegap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Judah ak Jerusalem, ak ki igoito icheek ketoortaat koba komosi ak komosi, koek kwang'utyet, ak koek che kireenyei ko uu ye ogeere eng' konyekwok." 
2Chronicles29:9 Kigebar kwanisyekyok eng' rotoogap chok, ak kigeluul weeriikyok ak tiibiikyok ak osotikyok amu niito." 
2Chronicles29:10 Ara anyun, mi muguleldanyu kiyomiske ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, si keistoenech nereegekyik che koroomen." 
2Chronicles29:11 Weeriikyuk, amata oegu che ma igiilegei, amu ki lewenok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor otonone tainnyi, oboisyechi ineendet ak oegu kiboitiinikyik, ak obeel nyamdutik.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Ki ng'eetyo anyun Lawiik, Mahath weeriitap Amashai, ak Joel weeriitap Azariah, eng' weeriigap Kohatik; ak eng' weeriigap Merari, Kish weeriitap Abdi, ak Azariah weeriitap Jehallelel; ak eng' Gershonik, Joah weeriitap Zimmah, ak Eden weeriitap Joah;" 
2Chronicles29:12 Ki ng'eetyo anyun Lawiik, Mahath weeriitap Amashai, ak Joel weeriitap Azariah, eng' weeriigap Kohatik; ak eng' weeriigap Merari, Kish weeriitap Abdi, ak Azariah weeriitap Jehallelel; ak eng' Gershonik, Joah weeriitap Zimmah, ak Eden weeriitap Joah;" 
2Chronicles29:13 ak eng' weeriigap Elizaphan, Shimri ak Jeuel; ak eng' weeriigap Asaph, Zekariah ak Mattaniah;" 
2Chronicles29:14 ak eng' weeriigap Herman, Jehuel ak Shimei; ak eng' weeriigap Jeduthun, Semaiah ak Uzziel." 
2Chronicles29:15 Ki iyum tupchosyekwak ak koanyinygei, ak koba ko kotiliil kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ng'atuutyetap laitoryat, kosuubi ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles29:16 Ki pa tisiik komosta ne po oriit miising' eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koba kotiliil, ak komaanda tugul che po simdo che kiganyoorchi Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koip koba seremutap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki nam Lawiik ak koip koba timiin ak kowiirchi kererutap Kidron." 
2Chronicles29:17 Ki toi anyun koanyinyis eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawet ne po tai, ak ki pwa eng' peetuut ne po sisiit ne po arawet, keterutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki ianyiny kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyek sisiit, ak ki iges eng' peetuutap taman ak lo eng' arawanooto po tai." 
2Chronicles29:18 Ki pa anyun ole mi Hezekiah laitoryat eng' ko ak koleenji, “Kagitiliil koot tugul ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kaptisisyet ne po kagoochinoik che kibeelei kobooto tereenikyik tugul, ak meesetap magatinigap kabartaet kobooto tuguukyik tugul." 
2Chronicles29:19 Kogechop ak ki anyiny tuguuk tugul che kiga wiirta Laitoryat Ahaz eng' laitornatennyi ye kiga kobistoe; keero, mi taitap kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Ki ng'eet anyun Hezekiah laitoryat karon inne ak koyum pounigap nganaseet ak kotogosta kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles29:21 Kiget kiruugik tisap, mengichik tisap, aaregap keechiir tisap ak kwesik tisap koek kagoochinetap tengekto ne po laitornatet ak ne po ole-tiliil ak ne po Judah. Ki ng'at `ineendet tisiichooto ko weeriigap Aron kogoito chooto eng' kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles29:22 Ki eeny anyun kiruugik, ak kotaach tisiik korotiik, ak koisee kaptisisyet; kieny mengichik ak koisee korotiik kaptisisyet; ak kieny aaregap keechiir ak koisee korotiik kaptisisyet." 
2Chronicles29:23 Kiget kwesigap kagoochinetap tengekto koriik taitap laitoryat ak tuiyet; ak ki igonoor eunekwak paragunnywa. 
2Chronicles29:24 Ki eeny anyun tisiik ak ki igoito korotiikwak eng' kaptisisyet koek kagoochinetap tengekto, si koyai kagaigaet agobo Israel tugul; ko uu ye ki ng'at laitoryat kole kigoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinetap tengekto agobo Israel tugul." 
2Chronicles29:25 Ki inde Lawiik kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotinyei sanisyegap sugunonik che kibirei, kibugandinik ak ketubosyek, ko uu ng'atuutyetap Daudi, ak ne po Gad keerindetap laitoryat, ak maotyot Nathan; amu ki punu ng'atuutyonooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotikyik." 
2Chronicles29:26 Ara kitononso Lawiik kotinyei kibugandinigap Daudi, kotinyei tisiik iryagook." 
2Chronicles29:27 Ki ng'at Hezekiah kigoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' kaptisisyet. Ak ki ngetoi kigoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ketoi tyendap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agine, ak iryagook kobooto kibugandinigap Daudi laitoryatap Israel." 
2Chronicles29:28 Ki ing'uruukso tuiyet tugul, ak kotyenso tyeniik, ak koguut iryagook piik che kuutei; ki yai ko uu nooto agoi kogeskei kagoochinet ne ki kibeelei." 
2Chronicles29:29 Kingo kagogees kagoitoet tugul, kong'uruuk laitoryat kobooto tugul che ki mi ak ineendet ak kolas." 
2Chronicles29:30 Ki ng'at kogeny `Laitoryat Hezekiah ak `pounik, Lawiik kotyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kalasunoik eng' ng'aleegap Daudi ak che po Asaph keerindet. Ara kityen kalasunoik eng' kagasetapkei, ak ki ing'uruukso ak kolas." 
2Chronicles29:31 Yeityo kowol Hezekiah kole, “Amu kaotabaanjigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, oriigu oibu tiseiywek ak kagoochinoigap kongoi kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ki ip tuiyet tiseiywek ak kagoochinoigap kongoi; ak tugul che ki chamei eng' mugulelwekwak ko ki ip kagoochinoik che kibeelei." 
2Chronicles29:32 Ak ki ek koitetap kagoochinoik che kibeelei che kiget tuiyet, kiruugik tamanwogik tisap, mengichik pogol ak aaregap keechiir pogol aeng'; ki po chooto tugul kagoochinoik che kibeeljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles29:33 Ki ek tuguuk che ki kitabaan eiik pogol lo ak keechiirek eliphuusyek somok. 
2Chronicles29:34 Ago king'ering' tisiik kot koma imuuch koeny kagoochinoik tugul che kibeelei; kotoret anyun Lawiik tupchosyekwak, kot kogeskei poisyonooto, ak agoi koanyinygei tisiik; amu ki lititen mugulelwegap Lawiik che ki chamei koanyinygei kosiir tisiik." 
2Chronicles29:35 Ak ki chaang' kogeny kagoochinoik che kibeelei, kobooto mwanigap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet, kobooto kagoochinoigap tuguuk che kieei che po kagoochinet age tugul ne kibeelei. Ki kitet anyun otisyet eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles29:36 Ak ki paibait Hezekiah, kobooto piik tugul, amu otisyonooto kiga chopchi `Kamuktaindet piik; amu kiyaak ng'olyoondonooto eng' yooto." 
2Chronicles30:1 Ki iyookto anyun Hezekiah keguur Israel tugul ak Judah, ak ki sirchi paronok Ephraim ak Manasseh, kole kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jerusalem, koboiboiyenji paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
2Chronicles30:2 Amu kiga komwa laitoryat kobooto pounik ak tuiyet tugul eng' Jerusalem, kole koriip paska eng' arawet ne po aeng'." 
2Chronicles30:3 Ki ma imuuch koyai eng' peetuusyechooto, amu kitom koyam tisiik che kiga koanyinygei, anan koyumjigei piik Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:4 Ak ki myeiit kioto eng' taitap laitoryat ak tuiyet tugul. 
2Chronicles30:5 Kogimit anyun ng'atuutyet kole kemwaita eng' Israel tugul, kobooch Beer-sheba agoi Dan, kole kobwa koboiboiyenji paska ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel eng' Jerusalem; amu ki tomo koriibei piik che chaang' ko uu nooto ko uu ye ki kisir." 
2Chronicles30:6 Ki ip anyun piik che kiga kiyookto, paronok che ki punu laitoryat ak pounikyik, koba Israel tugul ak Judah, ko uu ng'atuutyetap laitoryat, koleenji, “Okweek piigap Israel, oweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Abraham, Isak ak Israel, si komuuch ineendet koweekyigei piik che ki ng'et, che kichililso eng' okweek eng' eunegap laitorinigap Assyria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Amoigei kwanisyekwok ak tupchosyekwok, che ki ingelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, kot kobagaakta icheek koek che kikwong'ee, ko uu ye ogeere." 
2Chronicles30:8 Amoegu anyun che uui kaat, ko uu ye ki uu kwanisyekwok; ago ogoochigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak obe oldanyi ole-tiliil, ne ki kotabaan kobunji koigeny. Oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', si koistoenogei nereegekyik che koroomen." 
2Chronicles30:9 Amu ngo weekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kosichei tupchosyekwok ak lagokwok rireenet eng' taitap icheeget che kiluul icheek, ak koweek kogeny kobwa emoni. Amu tinyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' myeeindo ak rireenet, ama ituktochinok patai ngot oweekyigei ineendet.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Ki pun anyun piik che kiga kiyookto nganaseet age tugul eng' emetap Ephraim ak Manasseh, agoi Zebulun; ago kirorechi, kochot icheek, ak kochurachur." 
2Chronicles30:11 Agos ki iming'ingei alak che po Asher, Manasseh ak Zebulun ak kobwa Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:12 Ki mi kogeny eutap Kamuktaindet Judah si kogoochi icheek muguleldo agenge koyai ng'atuutyetap laitoryat ak pounik eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles30:13 Ki iyumjigei Jerusalem tuiyet ne ki oo kot si koriip igoortap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' arawetap aeng'. 
2Chronicles30:14 Kong'eetyo anyun ak koisto kaptisisyosyek che ki mi Jerusalem, ak kapkorosusyek tugul che po nyamdutik ak kowiirchi kererutap Kidron." 
2Chronicles30:15 Ki eeny anyun aarwetap paska eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan eng' arawetap aeng'. Ki ililanso Tisiik ak Lawiik, ak koanyinygei ak ki ip kagoochinoik che kibeelei kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles30:16 Ak ki tononso eng' komostanywa ko uu ye kiga king'at, ko uu Ng'atuutyetap Musa chiitap Kamuktaindet; ki isisye tisiik korotiik che kitaachei eng' eunegap Lawiik." 
2Chronicles30:17 Amu kimi che chaang' eng' tuiyet che kitom koanyinygei; ko uu nooto anyun ko ki poisyetap Lawiik koeng'ji paska chiito age tugul ne ki ma ko tiliil, koanyinyji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles30:18 Amu kitom koanyinygei che chaang' eng' pichooto, che chaang' che ki po Ephraim, che po Manasseh, che po Issakar, ak che po Zebulun, ago ki am paska ama ko uu ye ki kisir. Amu kiga sa Hezekiah agobo icheek kole, “Ingonyochi kaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne myee chii age tugul," 
2Chronicles30:19 ne chobei muguleldanyi kocheeng' Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekyik, agot ngo tomo ki anyiny ko uu kaanyinyetap ole-tiliil.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Ki kasyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hezekiah ak kosoop piik. 
2Chronicles30:21 Ak ki riip piigap Israel che ki mi Jerusalem igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek peetuusyek tisap eng' kagasetapkei ne oo; ak ki ilas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Lawiik ak tisiik peetuut age tugul, kotyenjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kibugandinik che cheitos miising'." 
2Chronicles30:22 Kicheer anyun `Hezekiah Lawiik tugul che ki ineetatin eng' otisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Koamis anyun eng' igoorto tugul eng' peetuusyek tisap, kogoitoi tiseiywek che po kaalyeet, ak komwachin kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak." 
2Chronicles30:23 Ki chamyechi anyun tuiyet komugul kole kota koriip igoorto peetuusyek alak tisap; ak ki riip peetuusyek alak tisap eng' kagasetapkei. 
2Chronicles30:24 Amu ki igoochi `Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah tuiyet kiruugik eliphuut ak keechiirek eliphuusyek tisap koek kagoochinoik; ak ki igoochi pounik tuiyet kiruugik eliphuut ak keechiirek eliphuusyek taman. Ki ianyinygei anyun tisiik eng' chaang'indo. 
2Chronicles30:25 Kiboiboitu tuiyet komugul ne po Judah, kobooto Tisiik ak Lawiik ak tuiyet tugul ne ki punu Israel, ak toek che ki punu emetap Israel ak che ki menyei Judah." 
2Chronicles30:26 Ki piit poiboiyet ne oo anyun eng' Jerusalem, amu kobooch eng' peetuusyegap Solomon weeriitap Daudi laitoryatap Israel ko ki tomo kobiit kiit ne uu nooto eng' Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:27 Ki ng'eetyo anyun Tisiik ak Lawiik ak koberuur piik; ak ki kigas kutinnywa, ak kitogosta saaennywa kwo oldanyi ne tiliil eng' kipsengwet." 
2Chronicles31:1 Kingo kagogeskei chuuto tugul, koba nganasoogap Judah Israel tugul che ki mi koba kobut tolochik, koep Aserik ak kobut komoswek che torooreen ak kapkorosusyek eng' Judah tugul ak Benjamin, eng' Ephraim ak Manasseh, kot kong'em kogees tugul. Ki week anyun lagok tugul che po Israel koba nganasookwak, kwo chii tugul ole mi tuguukyik." 
2Chronicles31:2 Kipchei Hezekiah riipsosyegap Tisiik ak Lawiik kobee riipsosyekwak, chii tugul ko uu poisyennyi, Tisiik ak Lawiik agobo kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet, kootis eng' ormariichogap nganaseetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koweekta kongoi ak kolas." 
2Chronicles31:3 Ki ng'at laitoryat agine kebeberta ne po tuguukyik koek kagoochinoik che kibeelei, kagoochinoik che kibeelei karon ak koskoleny, kagoochinoik che kibeelei che po sabatoisyek, che po ye kaleel arawet, ak che po igoorwek che ki king'at, ko uu ye ki kisir eng' ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles31:4 Ki ng'at kogeny piik che ki menyei Jerusalem kogoito kebeberta ne punjin Tisiik ak Lawiik, si kobiit kogoochigei ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ak kingo kasak ng'atuutyet eng' emet, kogoito piigap Israel eng' chaang'indo tongoanigap peek, che po divaik, mwanik, kumyat, ak che po rurateet tugul ne po emet; ak ki ip kebebertap taman ne po tuguuk tugul eng' chaang'indo." 
2Chronicles31:6 Ak ki ip ak icheek piigap Israel ak Judah che ki menyei nganasoogap Judah, kebebertap taman ne po eiik ak keechiirek, ak kebebertap taman ne po tuguuk tugul che itabaanatiin che kiga kigoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ak ki iyumat." 
2Chronicles31:7 Ki toi koyumat eng' arawetap somok, ak kogees eng' arawetap tisap." 
2Chronicles31:8 Kingo nyo Hezekiah ak pounik ak kogeer kayumanik, kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak piikyik Israel." 
2Chronicles31:9 Ki teebee anyun `Hezekiah Tisiik ak Lawiik agobo kayumanichooto. 
2Chronicles31:10 Ki wolji Azariah tisiindet ne oo ne po kootap Zadok koleenji, “Kobooch ngap kotoi piik koip kagoochinoik kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki kiamisye koyamech ak ki kituch che chaang': amu ki koberuur `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik; ak che kong'et ko chu chaang'.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Ki ng'at anyun Hezekiah kechop kooriik che mengeechen eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki chop. 
2Chronicles31:12 Koip anyun kobwa ko eng' kayaneet, kagoochinoik, kebeberwegap taman ak tuguuk che itabaanatiin. Ki pounindet Konaniah Lawindet ne ki pou icheek, ak ki ne po aeng' Semei ng'eetap kamet." 
2Chronicles31:13 Ak Jehiel, Azaziah, Nahath, Asahel, Jerimoth, Josabad, Eliel, Ismachiah, Mahath, ak Benaiah, ko ki riibiik che ki indochin Konaniah ak Shimei ng'eetap kamet, ko uu ye ki ng'at Laitoryat Hezekiah, ak Azariah pounindetap kootap Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles31:14 Ki pou Kore weeriitap Imnah Lawindet, ne ki riibindetap kurgeet ne mi kong'asiis, kagoochinoigap chamyet che po Kamuktaindet, si kopcheita, kagoochinoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kinamjin parak, kobooto tuguuk che tiliileen miising'." 
2Chronicles31:15 Kirubei ineendet Eden, Miniamin, Jeshua, Semaiah, Amariah, ak Shekaneiah eng' nganasoogap tisiik, eng' poisyennywa ne ki kigoochi si kogoochi tupchosyekwak kobee riipsosyekwak, kogoochi che eecheen ak che mengech kogergeit," 
2Chronicles31:16 koma pooto icheek che ki kiit kobee tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto che po murenik, kobooch che po kenyiisyek somok ak che siirei, age tugul ne kiwendi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye yamegei ak poisyetap peetuut age tugul, eng' otisyennywa eng' poisyennywa, kobee riipsosyekwak." 
2Chronicles31:17 Ki kiyai koitet ne po tisiik ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekwak; chooto po Lawiik che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak che siirei ko uu poisyennywa, kobee riipsosyekwak." 
2Chronicles31:18 Ki kiit tisiik kobooto lagokwak che mengeechen, osotikwak, weeriikwak, ak tiibiikwak eng' tuiyet komugul kobee ibinwek che ki kosiirto; amu ki yai ne myee ye ki itabaanigei eng' poisyennywa." 
2Chronicles31:19 Ak uu nooto agine eng' weeriigap Aron, tisiik, che ki menyei mbareenigap emotinwek che kiyagisye che po nganasookwak, eng' nganaseet age tugul, piik ko uu kainaikwak koginyol kopchechi murenik tugul che po tisiik ak chii age tugul eng' che po Lawiik che ki kiit kobee tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto." 
2Chronicles31:20 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto Hezekiah eng' Judah komugul; ki yai ne myee ak ne litit ak ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi. 
2Chronicles31:21 Ak eng' poisyet age tugul ne ki toi koyai eng' otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet, ak eng' ko uu ng'atuutik ak eng' kayomisutik, kocheeng' Kamuktaindennyi, kogiyai eng' muguleldanyi komugul, ak kibor." 
2Chronicles32:1 Kingo pata tuguuchooto tugul ki yai Hezekiah eng' iman, konyo Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria ak kochut Judah eng' kimnateet. Ki teech koyiem nganasook che ng'ootaatiin, kobwaati koleen konam kobunji." 
2Chronicles32:2 Kingo keer Hezekiah kole kagonyo Sennacherib, ak kobegechinot kobar Jerusalem," 
2Chronicles32:3 kong'alaaljiin ak pounikyik ak kiplugotinik che kiimeen agobo si koger peek eng' kondametusyek che ki mi saang'utap nganaseet; ak kitoret pichooto ineendet. 
2Chronicles32:4 Koyumgei anyun piik che chaang', ak koger kondametusyek tugul ak kereruut ne kirootei eng' kwenutap emet, kole, “Amu nee si kobwa laitorinigap Assyria, ak konyoor peek eng' chaang'indo?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Kibegeechi koteech irimeet tugul ne kiga kobutok ak ki teech teeksosyek che kooen eng' paragunnyi. Ki teech irimeet age ne tobonu saang'eng' ni Kai ak kogiimit Milo eng' nganaseetap Daudi, ak ki yai kariik ak long'onik che chaang'." 
2Chronicles32:6 Ki inde kiptainigap lugeet koboi piik, ak koyum icheek kobwa ole mi ineendet eng' ole paraa eng' ormariichetap nganaseet ak kocheer icheek koleenji," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Ogimegitu ak onyiganitu. Amoiyweisye anan otoptobense amu laitoryatap Assyria ak tuiyet tugul ne mi kobooto ineendet; amu mi ne oo kobootech kosiir ne mi ak ineendet. 
2Chronicles32:8 Mi kobooto ineendet kityo euut ne po poorto; ago mi kobootech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo, kotoretech ak koyai lugosyekyok.” Ak kinyoor piik nyiganateet eng' ng'aleegap Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah." 
2Chronicles32:9 Kingo pata niito, ye kimi Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria ole neegitee Lakish kobooto lugeennyi tugul koyookto otwogikyik koba Jerusalem, kap Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah ak kap Judah tugul che ki mi Jerusalem, koleenji," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Kamwa ko uu ni Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria kole: Omang'u nee, ngo tebyei ak ogeere ko kageyiemak eng' Jerusalem?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Ye mwaei Hezekiah kole, ‘Sarwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo eng' eutap laitoryatap Assyria,’ ko igoigook iman ineendet si kogoitook obegu eng' rubeet ak melelda." 
2Chronicles32:12 Tos ma Hezekiah niito ne ki isto komoswek che torooreen ak kapkorosusyekyik, ak kong'atei Judah ak Jerusalem koleenjin, ‘Osae eng' kapkorosuut agenge, ak obeel nyamdutik eng' yooto?’" 
2Chronicles32:13 Tos mongen kiit ne ki kiyachi anee ak kwanisyekyuk pororyosyek tugul che po emotinwek? Tos ki imuuchi kamuktaigap pororyosyek che po emotinwek kosar emennywa eng' oor age tugul eng' eunnyu? 
2Chronicles32:14 Ng'oo eng' kamuktaik tugul che po pororyosyechooto che ki par kwanisyekyuk kogees ne ki imuuch kosar piikyik eng' eunnyu, kot ole imuuchi Kamuktaindeng'wong' kosarwok eng' eunnyu?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Nooto anyun among' koberberak Hezekiah anan kogaigaak eng' oor ne uu ni. Matoyan ineendet amu ma mi kamuktain ne po poror age tugul, anan laitornatet age tugul ne ki imuuch kosar piikyik eng' eunnyu anan eng' eunegap kwanisyekyuk. Tos imuktoi ano anyun kamuktaindeng'wong' kosarwok eng' eunnyu?”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Ki tes otwogikyik kong'alaal che yaach agobo Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ak otwogindennyi Hezekiah. 
2Chronicles32:17 Ki sir kogeny paronok kole kochurachur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ak komwa che yaach agobo ineendet, kole, “Ko uu ye ma sar kamuktaigap pororyosyegap emotinwek piikwak eng' eunnyu, koma saru agine Kamuktaindetap Hezekiah piikyik eng' eunnyu.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Kiwaage pichooto piigap Jerusalem che ki mi irimeet parak eng' waagaat ne oo, eng' kutitap Yahudik, kole komu icheek ak koim tamangap koaragenso, si komuuch konam nganaseet." 
2Chronicles32:19 Ki ng'alaal agobo Kamuktaindetap Jerusalem koyanie kanamonigap piik che po ng'wony, che poisyonigap eunegap piik." 
2Chronicles32:20 Ki sa Laitoryat Hezekiah ak maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos koriirchi kipsengwet agobo niito. 
2Chronicles32:20 Ki sa Laitoryat Hezekiah ak maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos koriirchi kipsengwet agobo niito. 
2Chronicles32:20 Ki sa Laitoryat Hezekiah ak maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos koriirchi kipsengwet agobo niito. 
2Chronicles32:21 Ak ki iyookto `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor malaikaiyat ne ki par murenik tugul che kiimeen che nyigoonen ak kandoik ak kiptainik eng' nganaseet ne po laitoryatap Assyria. Ki week anyun ineendet eng' kalilanet kwo emennyi. Kingo it kootap kanamwennyi, kobar lagokyik ineendet eng' yooto eng' rotwetap chok." 
2Chronicles32:22 Ki sar anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hezekiah ak piik che ki menyei Jerusalem, eng' eutap Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria ak eng' eunegap puunikyik tugul, ak koriip icheek eng' komosta age tugul." 
2Chronicles32:23 Ki ipchi piik che chaang' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik kobwa Jerusalem, ak ki ipchi Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah tuguuk che po kamanuutyet, kot kotoroorok ineendet eng' pororyosyek tugul kobooch peetuunooto agoi." 
2Chronicles32:24 Kimyan Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto ak ki neegit kome. Ki sa `ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki wolji ineendet ak kogoochi kaboorunet." 
2Chronicles32:25 Ago ma yai Hezekiah ko uu ye kiga kiyachi ne myee; amu kiimeen. Ki nyoonji anyun nereeknateet ineendet ak Judah ak Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles32:26 Ago ki iming'ingei Hezekiah kometo menoteetap muguleldanyi, ineendet ak piik che ki menyei Jerusalem, ak ki ma nyoonji nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' peetuusyegap Hezekiah." 
2Chronicles32:27 Ki tinyei Hezekiah mogornatosyek che chaang' miising' ak teegisto; ak kichopchigei ole kigonoree fedha, thahabu, koik che po kamanuutyet, tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, long'onik ak tuguuk che korooron che teerchiin;" 
2Chronicles32:28 chogenik che po peek che karuryo, divaik ak mwanik; ak kooriigap tuuga tugul che teerchiin, ak piusyegap akwotisyegap keechiirek." 
2Chronicles32:29 Kichopchigei nganasook, ak ki tinyei akwotisyegap keechiirek ak che po tuuga eng' chaang'indo; amu kiga kogoochi Kamuktaindet tuguuk ng'iisyat." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekiah niito ne ki imaas peegap kondametut ne mi meto eng' Gihon, ak koip eng' ooreet ne litit korek kobwa komostap cherongo ne po nganaseetap Daudi. Ak kibor Hezekiah eng' poisyonikyik tugul." 
2Chronicles32:31 Ago eng' ng'aleegap piik che ki iyook pounigap Babilon, che ki pwa koteepse agobo kwang'utyet ne kiyaak eng' emet, ko ki pagaakta `Kamuktaindet ineendet, kotyem si konai tuguuk tugul che ki mi muguleldanyi." 
2Chronicles32:32 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Hezekiah, ak poisyonikyik che myach, ko siraatiin eng' ng'ang'utyetap maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos, eng' kitabuutap laitorinigap Judah ak Israel." 
2Chronicles32:32 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Hezekiah, ak poisyonikyik che myach, ko siraatiin eng' ng'ang'utyetap maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos, eng' kitabuutap laitorinigap Judah ak Israel." 
2Chronicles32:32 Poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Hezekiah, ak poisyonikyik che myach, ko siraatiin eng' ng'ang'utyetap maotyot Isaiah weeriitap Amos, eng' kitabuutap laitorinigap Judah ak Israel." 
2Chronicles32:33 Ki ru Hezekiah kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitupchi ole kitogostoe kebendi kereeriisyegap weeriigap Daudi; ak kigonyit ineendet Judah tugul ak piik che ki menyei Jerusalem eng' meennyi. Ak ki laitoran Manasseh weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Chronicles33:1 Ki po Manasseh kenyiisyek taman ak aeng' ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek konom ak muut eng' Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles33:2 Ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kosuubi tuguuk che kiwechei che po pororyosyek che kigaon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap piigap Israel." 
2Chronicles33:3 Ki teech komoswek che torooreen che kiga kobut kwandanyi Hezekiah, kiteekyi Baalik kapkorosusyek ak koyai Aserot. Kigutung'ji tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet ak koot chooto." 
2Chronicles33:4 Ki teech kapkorosusyek eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo nooto kole, “Tebee kainennyu Jerusalem koigeny.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Ak kiteekyi kapkorosusyek tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet, eng' seremusyechooto aeng' che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles33:6 Ak ki igoito kogeny lagokyik kobun maat eng' atebweetap weeriitap Hinom: ak king'orso ak ki isogis, ak ki yai ponisyet, ak ki ng'alaal ak che poisyee oik ak pooniik: ki yai yaityet ne oo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotach ineendet konereech." 
2Chronicles33:7 Ak ki inde kiit ne ki kiwai ne po kanamwet ne ki yai ineendet, kootap Kamuktaindet, ne ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet Daudi ak Solomon weeriinnyi, agobo koyooto, koleenji, “Andoi kainennyu koigeny kooi, ak Jerusalem, ne ki alewen eng' ortinwek tugul che po Israel:" 
2Chronicles33:8 amaistoi kogeny keldap Israel eng' emet ne ki aaroorchi kwanisyekwak: ngot koriip koyai tugul che ki ang'at icheek eng' Musa, ng'atuutik tugul ak etanutik ak kayomisutik.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Ak ki igoochi anyun Manasseh Judah ak piik che ki menyei Jerusalem, koyai tengekto kot koyai yaityet kosiir pororyosyek che king'em Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap piigap Israel." 
2Chronicles33:10 Ak ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Manasseh ak piikyik; ago ki ma mage kiy. 
2Chronicles33:11 Komutyi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kiptainigap lugeet ne po laitoryatap Assyria che ki imut Manasseh ko rataat eng' nyororosyek ak mugurek, ak komut ineendet kwo Babilon." 
2Chronicles33:12 Ak kingo mi eng' nyalilda kosa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi, ak koming'ingei miising' eng' taitap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekyik." 
2Chronicles33:13 Ak ki sa, ak ki kigasyi; ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor soomennyi, ak ki imut ineendet kogeny konyo Jerusalem ole mi laitornatennyi. Konai anyun Manasseh kole Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles33:14 Kingo pata niito koteech irimeet ne po saang' ne po nganaseetap Daudi eng' komostap cherongo ne po Gihon, eng' atebweet, eng' ole kichutei eng' ormariichetap njireenik; ak kiyiem Ophel, ak koteech kogoit miising'; ak ki inde kiptainik che nyigoonen nganasook tugul che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah." 
2Chronicles33:15 Ak ki isto kanamonik che too ak kanamwet ne ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kapkorosusyek tugul che kiga koteech eng' tulweetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' Jerusalem, ak kowiirchi saang'utap nganaseet." 
2Chronicles33:16 Ak ki teech kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogoitoe yooto tiseiywegap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet ak che po kongoi, ak kong'at Judah koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
2Chronicles33:17 Agos kita koeny piik tiseiywek eng' komoswek che torooreen, ago kieng'jine yooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa kityo." 
2Chronicles33:18 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Manasseh, ak saaet ne ki sa Kamuktaindennyi, ak ng'aleegap keerik che ki ng'alaalji ineendet eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ogeero, siraatiin kobooto poisyonigap laitorinigap Israel." 
2Chronicles33:19 Ki kisirchi agine saaennyi, ak ole kigasyindo Kamuktaindet, ak tengektanyi tugul ak kachiliilutyennyi, ak komoswek ole ki teech komoswek che torooreen, ak kolumda Aserik ak kanamonik che ki kiwai, ye ki tomo koming'ingei; ogeero, siraatiin chooto eng' kitabuutap ateptap peetuusyegap Hosai." 
2Chronicles33:20 Ki ru anyun Manasseh kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak ki kitup eng' koonnyi: ak ki laitoran weeriinnyi Ammon kogeer ineendet." 
2Chronicles33:21 Ki po Ammon kenyiisyek tiptem ak aeng' ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek aeng' eng' Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles33:22 Ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki yai kwandanyi Manasseh: ak kieng'ji Ammon tiseiywek kanamonik tugul che ki kiwai che kiga koyai kwandanyi Manasseh, ak koot." 
2Chronicles33:23 Ak ki ma iming'ingei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye ki iming'ingei kwandanyi Manasseh; ago kites Ammon koyai chalwokto miising' kosiir. 
2Chronicles33:24 Ak kichaam ineendet otwogikyik, ak kobar ineendet eng' koonnyi." 
2Chronicles33:25 Ak ki par piigap emonooto pichooto tugul kichaam laitoryat Ammon; ak ki ieet piigap emet Josiah weeriinnyi koek laitoryat kogeer ineendet. 
2Chronicles34:1 Ki po Josiah kenyiisyek sisiit ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek sosom ak agenge eng' Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles34:2 Ak ki yai ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kiwendote ortinwegap Daudi kwandanyi, ama masta kwo eutap tai anan ne po kaataam." 
2Chronicles34:3 Amu eng' kenyiitap sisiit ne po laitornatennyi, ye kita ko ming'in, kotoi kocheeng' Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Daudi kwandanyi: ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak aeng' kotoi kotiliil Judah ak Jerusalem koisto komoswek che torooreen, ak Aserik, ak kanamonik che ki kiwai ak kanamonik che ki kitany." 
2Chronicles34:4 Ak kibut kapkorosusyegap Baalik eng' tainnyi; ak koluul kanamonik che po asiista che ki miitei paragunnywa; ak kituatui Aserik, ak kanamonik che ki kiwai ak kanamonik che ki kitany, ak kong'a koek temburyek ak koseerchi kereeriisyegap icheeget che kieng'ji." 
2Chronicles34:5 Ak ki peel kawegap tisiik eng' kapkorosusyekwak, ak kotiliil Judah ak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:6 Ak ki yachi ko uu nooto nganasoogap Manasseh ak Ephraim, ak Simion, agoi Naphtali, ak komoswek tugul che po karatwekwak." 
2Chronicles34:7 Ak kibut kapkorosusyek, ak kong'a Aserik ak kanamonik che ki kiwai ak kanamonik che ki kitany, koek temburyek, ak koluul kanamonik tugul che po asiista eng' emet komugul ne po Israel, yeityo koweek Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:8 Ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po laitornatennyi, ye kiga kotiliil emet ak koot, koyookto anyun Sapan weeriitap Asalia, ak Maaseia pounindetap nganaseet, ak Joah weeriitap Joahas siriindetap tuguuk che piitu, koteech ole ki kobutok eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi." 
2Chronicles34:9 Ak ki pwa ole mi Hilkiah, tisiindet ne oo, ak kogoochi fedhaisyek che ki kiibu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet, che kiga koyum Lawiik, riibiigap kurgeet, che ki kiyumune Manasseh ak Ephraim, ak Israel tugul che ki kong'et, ak che po Judah tugul ak Benjamin ak che po piik che ki menyei Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:10 Ak ki igoochi kiboitiinik che kitononjin kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki igoito kiboitiinik che kiboisyei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit kechobe ak keteege ole kiga kobutok eng' koot; 
2Chronicles34:11 ki igoochi musogik ak teegik, koale koik che kigewai, ak pagoinik che ki kituiyote, ak che kiyae pambanigap kooriik che kiga kobut laitorinigap Judah." 
2Chronicles34:12 Ak ki yai pichooto poisyet koek piik che kiyani: ak kandoigap pichooto ko ki Jahat ak Obadiah, Lawiik eng' weeriigap Merari; ak Zekariah ak Mesulam eng' weeriigap Kohat, che ki ichirchiri poisyet: ak Lawiik alak, che ki utaatiin eng' putetap kibugandinik." 
2Chronicles34:12 Ak ki yai pichooto poisyet koek piik che kiyani: ak kandoigap pichooto ko ki Jahat ak Obadiah, Lawiik eng' weeriigap Merari; ak Zekariah ak Mesulam eng' weeriigap Kohat, che ki ichirchiri poisyet: ak Lawiik alak, che ki utaatiin eng' putetap kibugandinik." 
2Chronicles34:13 Ak ki pou kogeny piik che kilaei milosyek, ak ki ichirchiri tugul che kiyaei poisyet age tugul: ak kimi Lawiik che ki Siriik ak kiptainik ak riibiigap kurgotik." 
2Chronicles34:14 Ak ye kingo nem fedhaisyek che kiga kiip kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, konyoor Hilkiah tisiindet bukuitap Ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki koonu Musa." 
2Chronicles34:15 Ak ki wolji Hilkiah Sapan siriindet, koleenji, “Kaanyooru bukuitap Ng'atuutik eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki igoochi Hilkiah Sapan bukuinooto." 
2Chronicles34:16 Ak ki ipchi Sapan laitoryat bukuinooto, ak ki leenji laitoryat kogeny, Yaei otwogiguk kiit age tugul ne kemwachi." 
2Chronicles34:17 Ak ki koip fedhaisyek tugul che ki kinyoorchi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogochi riibiik, ak kiboitiinik.”" 
2Chronicles34:18 Ak ki mwachi Sapan siriindet laitoryat koleenji, “Kagoono Hilkiah tisiindet bukuit.” Ak kisooman Sapan bukuinooto eng' taitap laitoryat." 
2Chronicles34:19 Ak kingo kas laitoryat ng'aleegap ng'atuutichooto, kobet ngoroikyik." 
2Chronicles34:20 Ak ki ng'at laitoryat Hilkiah, ak Aikam weeriitap Sapan, ak Abdon weeriitap Mikah, ak Sapan siriindet, ak Asaiah otwogindetap laitoryat, koleenji," 
2Chronicles34:21 Oba oteebunena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak agobo piik che ki ng'et eng' Israel ak Judah, agobo ng'aleegap bukuit ne kogenyoor: amu oo nereeknatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne roong'jinech, amu ma riip kwanisyekyok ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koyai ko uu tugul che ki kisirchi bukuini." 
2Chronicles34:22 Ki pa anyun Hilkiah ak icheek che ki iyookto laitoryat, kap Hulda chebyoset ne maotyot, osotyotap Shallum weeriitap Tokat, weeriitap Hasra, riibindetap ngoroik; (ki menyei Jerusalem nganaseet ne po aeng';) ak komwachi ko uu nooto." 
2Chronicles34:23 Ak ki leenji icheek, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel ko uu ni, kole, “Omwachi chiito ne kaiyokwok obwa ole ami, oleenji," 
2Chronicles34:24 kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni, kole, ‘Ogeero, aipchini yaityet yuto, ak icheek che menyei olito, chubisyosyek tugul che ki kisirchi bukuit ne kagesoman eng' taitap laitoryatap Judah:" 
2Chronicles34:25 amu ki kometa, ak ki kobeelji nyamdutik kanamonik, si kobiit kotacha anereech eng' poisyonik tugul che po eunekwak; nooto anyun, karoong'jigei nereegekyuk yuto, ama kimisi." 
2Chronicles34:26 Ago oleenji laitoryatap Judah, ne kagoyokwok obwa oteepse Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel ko uu ni, kole: Eng' ng'aleechooto kaigas," 
2Chronicles34:27 amu kitangus muguleldang'ung', ak ki iming'ingei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ye kegas ng'aleekyik che nereekyin yuto, ak piik che menyei olito, ak iming'inigei eng' tainnyu, ak igereer ngoroiguk, ak iriir eng' tainnyu; ko kaagasun agane, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles34:28 Keero, ayumin iwe ole mi kwanisyeguk, ak iwe kerering'ung' eng' kaalyeet, ama keerei konyeguk yaityet tugul ne aipchini koroni, kobooto piik che menyei. Ak ki ipchin laitoryat ng'olyoot kogeny.’ ”" 
2Chronicles34:29 Koyookto anyun laitoryat kiyum poisyek tugul che po Judah ak Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles34:30 Ak kitogosta laitoryat kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooto piik tugul che po Judah ak piik che ki menyei Jerusalem, ak tisiik, ak Lawiik, ak piik tugul, che eecheen ak che mengeechen: ak kosoman ng'aleek tugul che po bukuitap arorutyet ne ki kinyooru eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles34:31 Ak ki tonon laitoryat eng' komostanyi, ak koyai arorutyet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koosup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koriip ng'atuutikyik, ak paornatosyekyik, ak kayomisutikyik, eng' muguleldanyi tugul, ak eng' saboondanyi tugul, koosup ng'aleegap arorutyet che ki kisirchi bukuini." 
2Chronicles34:32 Ak ki ng'at piik tugul che ki mi Jerusalem ak Benjamin kotononso koyan ng'aleechooto. Ak ki yai che ki menyei Jerusalem ko uu kayomisetap Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak." 
2Chronicles34:33 Ak ki isto Josiah tuguuk tugul che kiwechei eng' emotinwek tugul che po Israel, ak kong'at piik tugul che po Israel kootis, koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa. Ma meto pichooto koosup Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, eng' peetuusyekyik tugul." 
2Chronicles35:1 Ak kiriipchi `Josiah Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paska eng' Jerusalem; ak kieny aarwetap paska eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawet ne po tai. 
2Chronicles35:2 Ak ki inde tiisik riipsosyekwak, ak ko ki il icheek eng' otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
2Chronicles35:3 Ak ki leenji Lawiik che ki ineeti Israel tugul, che kitiliileen eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Onde moinget ne tiliil koot ne ki teech Solomon weeriitap Daudi laitoryatap Israel; ma koegu mileet ne mi tigigoikwok: oot anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak piikyik Israel." 
2Chronicles35:4 Ak ochopkei obee kooriigap kwanisyekwok ko uu riipsosyekwok, ko uu siruutigap Daudi laitoryatap Israel, ak siruutigap Solomon, weeriinnyi." 
2Chronicles35:5 Ak otononse eng' ole-tiliil ko uu ole ki kipcheita kooriigap kwanisyek che po tupchosyekwok lagogap piik, ak ingobunji age tugul kebebertap kootap kwanisyegap Lawiik." 
2Chronicles35:6 Ak oeny aarwetap paska ak oanyinyge, ochopchji tupchosyekwok, koyai ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ng'at eng' Musa." 
2Chronicles35:7 Ak ki igoochi `Josiah piik, che po akweetap keechiirek, aaregap keechiir ak che po ng'oroorek, kobunji chooto tugul che po kagoochinoigap Paska, kogoochi piik tugul che ki mi yooto; ki ek tugul eliphuusyek sosom, ak kiruugik eliphuusyek somok: ki po laitoryat chuuto." 
2Chronicles35:8 Ak ki igoochi pounikyik piik ak tisiik, ak Lawiik, kagoochinetap chamyet. Ki igoochi Hilkiah ak Zekariah ak Jehiel, che pounigap kootap Kamuktaindet, kogoochi tisiik, tuuga eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol lo, ak eiik pogol somok koek kagoochinoigap paska." 
2Chronicles35:9 Ak ki igoochi Konaniah, ak Semaiah ak Nethanel, tupchosyekyik, ak Hasabia, Jeiel, ak Josabad, che eecheen eng' Lawiik, kogoochi Lawiik, tuuga eliphuusyek muut, ak eiik pogol muut, koek kagoochinoigap paska." 
2Chronicles35:10 Kochobok anyun otisyet ak kotononso tisiik eng' komostanywa, ak Lawiik eng' riipsosyekwak, ko uu ng'atuutyetap laitoryat." 
2Chronicles35:11 Ak kieny aarwetap paska, ak ki isisye tisiik korotiik che kitaachei eng' eunegap Lawiik, ak kieny Lawiik tiseiywechooto." 
2Chronicles35:12 Ak ki isto kagoochinoik che kibeelei, si kobiit kogoito, ko uu ole ki kipcheita kooriigap kwanisyegap lagogap piik, kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye siraat eng' bukuitap Musa. Ak ki yachi ko uu nooto eiik." 
2Chronicles35:13 Ak ki peel aarwetap paska eng' maat ko uu kayomiset: ak ki iyo kagoochinoik che tiliileen eng' tereenik, ak saburyonik, ak taaboogap kariik, ak koipchi lagok tugul che po piik kochaaktae." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ye ibata kochopchigei ak tisiik; amu kichirchirendos tisiik weeriigap Aron kogoitoi kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak mwanik agoi kemoi: kichopchigei anyun Lawiik, ak tisiik, weeriigap Aron." 
2Chronicles35:15 Ak kimi komostanywa tyeniik weeriigap Asaph, ko uu ng'atuutyetap Daudi, ak Asaph, Herman, ak Jeduthun keerindetap laitoryat; ak kimi riibiik ormariichet age tugul; ki ma ko nyoljin kobagaakta poisyennywa, amu kichopchin Lawiik tupchosyekwak tugul." 
2Chronicles35:16 Kichobok anyun otisyet tugul ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto, si koriip paska, ak kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ng'atuutyetap Laitoryat Josiah." 
2Chronicles35:17 Ki riip piigap Israel che ki mi yooto, paska, eng' peetuusyechooto, ak koriip igoortap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek eng' peetuusyek tisap." 
2Chronicles35:18 Ak kitom kobiit paska age kobooch peetuusyegap maotyot Samuel ne kergei ak nooto ki kiriip eng' Israel; ama riip age tugul eng' laitorinigap Israel ne uu nooto koyai Josiah, ak tisiik, ak Lawiik, ak Judah tugul ak Israel che ki mi yooto, ak piik che ki menyei Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles35:19 Ki kiriip paskainooto eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po laitornatetap Josiah. 
2Chronicles35:20 Kingo pata chooto tugul ko kagochop Josiah Hekaluut, kotogos Neko laitoryatap Misiri kobargei ak Karkemish ye neegitee Yufrets: ak ki wo Josiah kobargei ak ineendet." 
2Chronicles35:21 Ago ki iyookto Neko piik koba ole mi ineendet, koleenji, “Kiting'egei nee ak inyee, laitoryatap Judah? Ma pookyin inyee, peetuuni, ago abookyini koot ne ating'ee pooryeet; ak kang'ata Kamuktaindet achokyi: pagakte, amegirinde Kamuktaindet ne mi kobooto, si ma parin ineendet.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Ago ki ma cham Josiah kobagaakta ineendet, ago kiwalgei koek age si kobiit kobargei ak ineendet, ama kas ng'aleegap Neko che ki punu kutitap Kamuktaindet, ak ki nyo kobargei eng' atebweetap Megiddo." 
2Chronicles35:23 Ak kimwok mwogik Laitoryat Josiah; ak ki leenji laitoryat otwogikyik, Omuta; amu kagiguotena miising'." 
2Chronicles35:24 Komut anyun otwogikyik ineendet eng' chepkichutit, ak konde ineendet chepkichutit ne po aeng' ne ki tinyei, ak ki imut ineendet konyo Jerusalem; ak kime ak ki kitupchi kereeriisyegap kwanisyekyik. Ak ki riirchi Josiah Judah tugul ak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles35:25 Ak ki riir Jeremiah agobo Josiah: ak ki riirchi Josiah tyeniik tugul che murenik ak kwonyiik, eng' riirekwak agoi kora; ak ki yachi icheek kayomiset eng' Israel: ak ogeero, siraatiin eng' bukuitap riirek." 
2Chronicles35:25 Ak ki riir Jeremiah agobo Josiah: ak ki riirchi Josiah tyeniik tugul che murenik ak kwonyiik, eng' riirekwak agoi kora; ak ki yachi icheek kayomiset eng' Israel: ak ogeero, siraatiin eng' bukuitap riirek." 
2Chronicles35:26 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Josiah, ak poisyonikyik che myach, ko uu che siraatiin eng' bukuitap Ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
2Chronicles35:27 ak poisyonikyik, che po tai ak che po let, ogeero, siraatiin eng' kitabuutap laitorinigap Israel ak Judah." 
2Chronicles36:1 Ki ieet anyun `piigap emet Jehoahas weeriitap Josiah koek laitoryat eng' Jerusalem kogeer kwandanyi. 
2Chronicles36:2 Ki po Jehoahas kenyiisyek tiptem ak somok ye ki tau kolaitorani: ak ki laitoran arawek somok eng' Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles36:3 Ak kiriibe laitornatennyi laitoryatap Misiri eng' Jerusalem, ak kimage emet talendaisyek pogol che po fedha ak talendait agenge ne po thahabu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Ak ki ieet laitoryatap Misiri ng'eetap kamet Eliakim koboi Judah ak Jerusalem, ak kiweech kainennyi koguure Jehoiakim. Ak ki imut Neko ng'eetap kamet Jehoahas kwo Misiri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Ki po Jehoiakim kenyiisyek tiptem ak muut ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak agenge eng' Jerusalem; ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi. 
2Chronicles36:6 Ki togos Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon konyo kobargei ak ineendet, ak kirate ineendet mugurek, komut kwo Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:7 Ki ip kogeny Nebukadnezar tereenigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koba Babilon, ak konde hekalunnyi eng' Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:8 Ak poisyonik che ng'etunotiin che po Jehoiakim, ak tuguuk che kiwechei che ki yai, ak tuguuk che yaach che ki kinyoorchi ineendet, ogeero, siraatiin eng' kitabuutap laitorinigap Israel ak Judah: ak ki laitoran Jehoiakin weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
2Chronicles36:9 Ki po Jehoiakin kenyiisyek sisiit ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran arawek somok ak peetuusyek taman eng' Jerusalem: ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles36:10 Ak ye kingo keskei kenyiit koyook Laitoryat Nebukadnezar piik komut ineendet konyo Babilon, kobooto tereenik che korooron che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki ieet Zedekiah ng'eetap kamet koek laitoryat koboi Judah ak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:11 Ki po Zedekiah kenyiisyek tiptem ak agenge ye ki tau kolaitorani: ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak agenge eng' Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles36:12 Ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi; ki ma iming'injigei maotyot Jeremiah ye ki ng'alaal ng'aleek che punu kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles36:12 Ak ki yai ne ya eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi; ki ma iming'injigei maotyot Jeremiah ye ki ng'alaal ng'aleek che punu kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
2Chronicles36:13 Ak ki ingelelji kogeny Laitoryat Nebukadnezar, ne ki kabirchi koyasyo eng' Kamuktaindet: ago ki iuit kaatinnyi ak muguleldanyi, ma weekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
2Chronicles36:14 Ki ingelelso kogeny miising' tisiik tugul che eecheen, ak piik, koosup tuguuk tugul che kiwechei che po pororyosyek; ak ki imurwon kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiga kotabaan eng' Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:15 Ak ki iyooktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwak, piikyik, komusta koba ole mi icheek; amu ki riiree piikyik, ak ole menyei ineendet." 
2Chronicles36:16 Ago ki reeny pichooto ki iyooktoi Kamuktaindet, ak ki sas ng'aleekyik, kogengenie maotikyik, agoi konereekyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik, kot koma komi kiit ne kinyae." 
2Chronicles36:17 Komutyi anyun icheeget laitoryatap Kaldeik, ne ki nyo kobar neranikwak eng' rotwetap chok, eng' kootap oldanywa ne tiliil, ama riiree muren anan tye, poiyot anan ne neegit koolil: ki inde tugul eunnyi." 
2Chronicles36:18 Ak ki ip anyun tuguuk tugul che po kootap Kamuktaindet, che eecheen ak che mengeechen, ak konoraigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak konoraigap laitoryat, ak che po pounikyik, ki ip tugul koba Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:19 Ak ki peel kootap Kamuktaindet, ak kobut irimeetap Jerusalem, ak kobeel kooriik tugul che po laitoryat, ak kong'em tuguuk tugul che korooron che ki mi koorchooto." 
2Chronicles36:20 Ak ki imut koba Babilon che kiga chililye rotwetap chok; ak ki ek otwogikyik ak che po weeriikyik agoi laitornatetap Persia: 
2Chronicles36:21 si kosulda ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' kutitap Jeremiah, agoi kogasegei emet sabatoisyekyik: amu ki riip sabatoisyekyik eng' peetuusyechooto ki ma komenyei chii, kot kosulda kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap." 
2Chronicles36:21 si kosulda ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' kutitap Jeremiah, agoi kogasegei emet sabatoisyekyik: amu ki riip sabatoisyekyik eng' peetuusyechooto ki ma komenyei chii, kot kosulda kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap." 
2Chronicles36:22 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, si kobiit kosulda ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' kutitap Jeremiah, kochirchir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, si komwaita eng' laitornatennyi tugul, ak kosiirta kogeny, kole" 
2Chronicles36:22 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, si kobiit kosulda ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' kutitap Jeremiah, kochirchir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, si komwaita eng' laitornatennyi tugul, ak kosiirta kogeny, kole" 
2Chronicles36:23 kamwa ko uu ni Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, kole, “Ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet, laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony; ak king'ata ateekyi koot eng' Jerusalem, ne mi Judah. Ingotogosta age tugul eng' okweek che oo po piikyik tugul, ak ingotep Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi kobooto chiichooto.”" 
Ezra1:1 Eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, si kobiit kosulda ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' kutitap Jeremiah, ko ki ichirchir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Cyrus laitoryatap Persia komwaita eng' laitornatennyi tugul ak kosiir kole:" 
Ezra1:1 Eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, si kobiit kosulda ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mwa eng' kutitap Jeremiah, ko ki ichirchir `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Cyrus laitoryatap Persia komwaita eng' laitornatennyi tugul ak kosiir kole:" 
Ezra1:2 “Kamwa ko uu ni Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, ‘Ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony, ak kagong'ata ateekyi koot eng' Jerusalem ne mi Judah." 
Ezra1:3 Ingotogosta Jerusalem ne mi Judah age tugul eng' okweek che oo piikyik, ak ingotep Kamuktaindennyi kobooto ineendet. Ingwo koteekyi koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel (ineendet ko Kamuktaindet) ne mi Jerusalem." 
Ezra1:4 Ak chii age tugul ne kang'et eng' oldo tugul ole menyei, ko ingotoret piigap oldanyi chiichooto eng' fedha, thahabu, tuguuk ak tuuga kobooto kagoochinoik che po chamyet agobo kootap Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem.’ ”" 
Ezra1:5 Ki ng'eetyo anyun che eecheen eng' kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek che po Judah ak Benjamin ak tisiik, kobooto Lawiik, ak tugul che ki ing'eet Kamuktaindet saboonwekwak kotogosta koba koteech kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi Jerusalem." 
Ezra1:6 Ki igoochi tugul che ki mi ak icheek tuguuk che po fedha, thahabu, kobooto tuguuk che toretegei, tuuga ak tuguuk che po kamanuutyet ne oo, kobooto kagoochinoik tugul che kiga kigoochi eng' chamyet." 
Ezra1:7 Ne siirei ko ki inem Laitoryat Cyrus tuguuk che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che kiga koip Nebukadnezar eng' Jerusalem ipkonde kootap kanamonikyik." 
Ezra1:8 Ki ip chooto Cyrus laitoryatap Persia eng' eutap Mitredat konorindet ak koiityi Sesbasar, pounindetap Judah." 
Ezra1:9 Chu ko koitetap tuguuchooto: taabook sosom che po thahabu, taabook eliphuut che po fedha ak rotonik tiptem ak sogool;" 
Ezra1:10 taabook sosom che mengeechen che po thahabu, ak taabook alak che mengeechen pogol ang'wan ak taman che po fedha ak tereenik alak eliphuut agenge." 
Ezra1:11 Tereenik tugul che po thahabu ak fedha, ko ki ek eliphuusyek muut ak pogol ang'wan. Ki ip Sesbasar chuuto tugul kotogos, ye ki kimutu luulenik kotogos kobunu Babilon kobwa Jerusalem." 
Ezra2:1 Chu anyun ko piigap emonooto che kiga togos kobunu ole kiga kiluulji, che kiga iluul Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon koba Babilon; che kiweegis koba Jerusalem ak Judah, kwo chii tugul nganasennyi." 
Ezra2:2 Kigabwa icheek kobooto Zerubabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaia, Mordekai, Bilsan, Mispar, Bigbai, Reum ak Baanah. Koitetap murenigap piigap Israel:" 
Ezra2:2 Kigabwa icheek kobooto Zerubabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaia, Mordekai, Bilsan, Mispar, Bigbai, Reum ak Baanah. Koitetap murenigap piigap Israel:" 
Ezra2:3 Lagogap Paros ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol ak tamanwogik tisap ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:4 Lagogap Shepatiah ko ki pogol somok ak tamanwogik tisap ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:5 Lagogap Ara ko ki pogol tisap ak tamanwogik tisap ak muut. 
Ezra2:6 Lagogap Pahat-moap, eng' lagogap Jeshua ak Joab, ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol sisiit ak taman ak aeng'." 
Ezra2:7 Lagogap Elam ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak konom ak ang'wan. 
Ezra2:8 Lagogap Satu ko ki pogol sogool ak artam ak muut. 
Ezra2:9 Lagogap Sakai ko ki pogol tisap ak tamanwogik lo. 
Ezra2:10 Lagogap Bani ko ki pogol lo ak artam ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:11 Lagogap Bebai ko ki pogol lo ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:12 Lagogap Askad ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak tiptem ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:13 Lagogap Adonikam ko ki pogol lo ak tamanwogik lo ak lo. 
Ezra2:14 Lagogap Bigbai ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak konom ak lo. 
Ezra2:15 Lagogap Adin ko ki pogol ang'wan ak konom ak ang'wan. 
Ezra2:16 Lagogap Ater, che po Hezekiah, ko ki tamanwogik sogool ak sisiit." 
Ezra2:17 Lagogap Besai ko ki pogol somok ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:18 Lagogap Jora ko ki pogol agenge ak taman ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:19 Lagogap Asum ko ki pogol aeng' ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:20 Lagogap Gibar ko ki tamanwogik sogool ak muut. 
Ezra2:21 Lagogap Bethlehem ko ki pogol agenge ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:22 Murenigap Netopa ko ki konom ak lo. 
Ezra2:23 Murenigap Anatoth ko ki pogol agenge ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Ezra2:24 Lagogap Asmabet ko ki artam ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:25 Lagogap Kiriath-arim, Kepira, ak Beerot, ko ki pogol tisap ak artam ak somok." 
Ezra2:26 Lagogap Ramah ak Geba ko ki pogol lo ak tiptem ak agenge. 
Ezra2:27 Murenigap Mikmas ko ki pogol agenge ak tiptem ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:28 Murenigap Bethel ak Ai ko ki pogol aeng' ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:29 Lagogap Nebo ko ki konom ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:30 Lagogap Magbis ko ki pogol agenge ak konom ak lo. 
Ezra2:31 Lagogap Elam age, ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak konom ak ang'wan." 
Ezra2:32 Lagogap Harim ko ki pogol somok ak tiptem. 
Ezra2:33 Lagogap Lod, Hadid, ak Ono, ko ki pogol tisap ak tiptem ak muut." 
Ezra2:34 Lagogap Jeriko ko ki pogol somok ak artam ak muut. 
Ezra2:35 Lagogap Senaa ko ki eliphuusyek somok ak pogol lo ak sosom. 
Ezra2:36 Tisiik: lagogap Jedaiah, che po kootap Jeshua, ko ki pogol sogool ak tamanwogik tisap ak somok." 
Ezra2:37 Lagogap Imer ko ki eliphuut agenge ak konom ak aeng'. 
Ezra2:38 Lagogap Pasur ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak artam ak tisap. 
Ezra2:39 Lagogap Harim ko ki eliphuut agenge ak taman ak tisap. 
Ezra2:40 Lawiik: lagogap Jeshua ak Kadmiel, che po lagogap Hodabiah, ko ki tamanwogik tisap ak ang'wan." 
Ezra2:41 Tyeniik: lagogap Asaph ko ki pogol agenge ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Ezra2:42 Lagogap riibiigap kurgotik: lagogap Shallum, lagogap Ater, lagogap Talmon, lagogap Akub, lagogap Hatita, lagogap Sobai, ki ek tugul pogol agenge ak sosom ak sogool." 
Ezra2:43 Otwogigap Hekaluut: lagogap Siha, lagogap Hasupa, lagogap Tabaot;" 
Ezra2:44 lagogap Keros, lagogap Siaa, lagogap Padon;" 
Ezra2:45 lagogap Lebana, lagogap Hagaba, lagogap Akub;" 
Ezra2:46 lagogap Hagap, lagogap Samlai, lagogap Hanan;" 
Ezra2:47 lagogap Gidel, lagogap Gahar, lagogap Reaiah;" 
Ezra2:48 lagogap Rezin, lagogap Nekoda, lagogap Gasam;" 
Ezra2:49 lagogap Uzzah, lagogap Pasea, lagogap Besai;" 
Ezra2:50 lagogap Asna, lagogap Meunik, lagogap Nepisik;" 
Ezra2:51 lagogap Bakbuk, lagogap Hakupa, lagogap Harur;" 
Ezra2:52 lagogap Baslut; lagogap Meida, lagogap Harsa;" 
Ezra2:53 lagogap Barkos, lagogap Sisera, lagogap Tema;" 
Ezra2:54 lagogap Nesia, lagogap Hatipa." 
Ezra2:55 Lagogap otwogigap Solomon: lagogap Sotai, lagogap Hasoperet, lagogap Peruda;" 
Ezra2:56 lagogap Jaala, lagogap Darkon, lagogap Gidel;" 
Ezra2:57 lagogap Shepatiah, lagogap Hatil, lagogap Pokereth-hasebaim, lagogap Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Otwogigap Hekaluut tugul ak lagogap otwogigap Solomon, ko ki pogol somok ak tamanwogik sogool ak aeng'." 
Ezra2:59 Chu ko che ki togosta eng' Tel-mela, Tel-harsa, Kerub, Adan ak Imer. Ago ki ma imuuch koboor kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak iyotennywa, ngo ki po Israel." 
Ezra2:60 Lagogap Delaiah, lagogap Tobia, lagogap Nekoda, ko ki ek pogol lo ak konom ak aeng'." 
Ezra2:61 Ak che po lagogap tisiik: Lagogap Habaia, lagogap Hakos, lagogap Barsilai, ne ki itun osotyot ne po tiibiigap Barsilai Gileadindet ak ki kimwaitae kainennywa." 
Ezra2:62 Ki cheeng' chuuto kiit ne ki kisirchi kainaikwak, kobee tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto, ago ma kinyoor: amu nooto ki kiit koek che ng'woneen ak ki kiistoe tiseinateet." 
Ezra2:63 Ak ki leenji Tirsata icheek, ma nyooljin koam tuguuk che tiliileen miising', kot kobiit tisiindet ne tinyei Urim ak Tumim." 
Ezra2:64 Ki ek tuiyet tugul eliphuusyek artam ak aeng' ak pogol somok ak tamanwogik lo," 
Ezra2:65 koma pooto otwogikwak che murenik ak che tiibiik, ki ek chooto eliphuusyek tisap ak pogol somok ak sosom ak tisap. Ki tinyei tyeniik che murenik ak kwonyiik pogol aeng'." 
Ezra2:66 Paraisisyekwak ko ki pogol tisap ak sosom ak lo. Nyumbokwak ko ki pogol aeng' ak artam ak muut; 
Ezra2:67 tambeesikwak ko ki pogol ang'wan ak sosom ak muut. Sigiroik ko ki eliphuusyek lo ak pogol tisap ak tiptem. 
Ezra2:68 Kingo pwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi Jerusalem, kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek, kogoito tuguuk eng' chamyet si keteege kootap Kamuktaindet eng' ole kimi."
