Ezra2:69 Ki igoito ko uu kamugennywa, darkoni eliphuusyek tamanwogik lo ak agenge che po thahabu, ratilisyek eliphuusyek muut che po fedha ak ngoroik pogol agenge che po tisiik koba ole kigonoree tuguuk." 
Ezra2:70 Ki meny anyun nganasookwak tisiik, Lawiik, piik alak, tyeniik, riibiigap kurgotik, otwogigap Hekaluut ak Israel tugul eng' nganasookwak." 
Ezra3:1 Kingo it arawetap tisap ye kiga komeng'iis piigap Israel eng' nganasookwak, koyumjigei piik Jerusalem ko uu chiichak." 
Ezra3:2 Yeityo kotonon anyun `Jeshua weeriitap Josadak ak tupchosyekyik tisiik, kobooto Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel, ak tupchosyekyik, ak koteech kaptisisyet ne po Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel, si kogoitoe kagoochinoik che kibeelei ko uu ye siraat eng' Ng'atuutyetap Musa chiitap Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra3:3 Nga ki tinyei; amu ki tinyei kaiyweisyet amu piigap emotinwek alak, ko ki inde kaptisisyet ole tebee ak kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei, karon ak koskoleny eng' kaptisisyonooto." 
Ezra3:4 Ki riip igoorto ne po keryosyek, ko uu ye siraat ak kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' peetuut age tugul kobee koiitennywa, ko uu kayomiset ak ko uu ye yamei poisyetap peetuut age tugul." 
Ezra3:5 Ye kingo pata kogoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul, kagoochinoik che po ye kaleel arawet, che po igoorwek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki king'at, che ki kitabaan ak che po chii tugul ne ki igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinetap chamyet." 
Ezra3:6 Kitau kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik che kibeelei eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap tisap, nga ki tomo kelumda lumeiywegap Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezra3:7 Ki igoochi kogeny fedhaisyek musogigap koik, ak che po pagoinik, ak kogoochi piigap Sidon ak che po Tyro amitwogik, che kieei ak mwanik, si kobiit koip taragonik eng' Lebanon kobwa nyanjetap Mediterenian, agoi Joppa, ko uu ye kiga koyanji Cyrus laitoryatap Persia." 
Ezra3:8 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' ngap koit kootap Kamuktaindet eng' Jerusalem, kotoi Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel ak Jeshua weeriitap Josadak kobooto tupchosyekwak (tugul che tisiik, Lawiik ak luulenik tugul che kiga week Jerusalem) poisyet. Ki inde Lawiik, kobooch che po kenyiisyek tiptem ak che siirei, koriip poisyet ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezra3:9 Ki tonon anyun Jeshua kobooto weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik, Kadmiel ak weeriikyik, weeriigap Judah, komi tugul koriip kiboitiinik eng' kootap Kamuktaindet: weeriigap Henadad, kobooto weeriikwak ak tupchosyekwak Lawiik." 
Ezra3:10 Kingo lumda teegik lumeiywotap Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, konam poisyennywa tisiik ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kolaachi ngoroikwak che po tiseinateet ak kotinyei iryagook, kobooto Lawiik weeriigap Asaph che ki tinyei sanisyegap sugunonik che kibirei, ko uu ng'atuutyetap Daudi laitoryatap Israel." 
Ezra3:11 Kiwoljingei kotyeni kolasu ak komwachin kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleen, “Amu myee ineendet, amu po koigeny rireenennyi eng' Israel.” Ak ki waakyo piik tugul eng' waagaat ne oo ye ki ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu kiga kelumda lumeiywotap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezra3:12 Ago ki riiryo eng' kutit ne oo tisiik che chaang' ak Lawiik ak kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek, poisyek chooto kiga keer koot ne ki po tai, ye ki ngelumdoi lumeiywotap koiito eng' tainnywa, ak ki waakyo alak eng' poiboiyet." 
Ezra3:13 Ki ma mata komuuch piik koobeesyo waagaat ne po poiboiyet ak ne po riiregap piik, amu ki waakyo piik eng' waagaat ne oo, ak ki it waagandanooto ole loo." 
Ezra4:1 Kingo kas anyun puunigap Judah ak Benjamin kole kateekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel Hekaluut, luulenik," 
Ezra4:2 koriikta anyun ole mi Zerubabel ak kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek, ak koleenji icheek, “Ongeteech tugul, amu kicheeng'e Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko uu okweek, ak keeng'jini ineendet tiseiywek kobooch peetuusyegap Esarhaddon laitoryatap Assyria ne ki imutwech kebwa olito.”" 
Ezra4:3 Ago ki leenji icheek `Zerubabel kobooto Jeshua ak kandoik tugul che po kooriigap kwanisyek che po Israel, “Ma kiting'egei yamdao ak okweek keteech tugul kootap Kamuktaindennyo. Ago kiteekyini acheegei `koot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ye king'atech laitoryat Cyrus laitoryatap Persia.”" 
Ezra4:4 Ki yai anyun `piigap emonooto piigap Judah komeiyo mugulelwogik ak koim icheek eng' teekseet. 
Ezra4:5 Ki igoochi `asoya kandoik che pcheu melekto, si kogirinda icheek kowal magennywa koek puch eng' peetuusyek tugul che po Cyrus laitoryatap Persia, agoi koit laitornatetap Darius laitoryatap Persia." 
Ezra4:6 Eng' taunetap laitornatetap Aasuerus, kosiir pichooto kataamset agobo piik che ki menyei Judah ak Jerusalem." 
Ezra4:7 Ak eng' peetuusyegap Artaserses kosirchi parweet Bislam, Mitredat Tabeel, kobooto choronokwak tugul, kosirchi Artaserses laitoryandanooto po Persia. Ki kisire parwaanooto siruutigap Syria ak kemwae kutitap Syria." 
Ezra4:8 Ki sir anyun parweet Reum pounindetap kirwooget ak Simsai siriindet, kosirchi Laitoryat Artaserses, kotaam Jerusalem ko uu ni:" 
Ezra4:9 Ki sir anyun Reum pounindetap kirwooget ak Simsai siriindet, kobooto choronokwak tugul, Dinaik, Aparsakitik, Tarpelik, Aparsik, Arkebik, Babilonik, Susankik, Deaik ak Elamik," 
Ezra4:10 ak pororyosyek alak che ki imutu Osnaper ne oo ak ko tagunoot, kolong' kobwa nganaseetap Samaria ak emet ne mi aineet pitoniin." 
Ezra4:11 Chu anyun ng'aleek che po parwaanooto ki kiyooktochin Laitoryat Artaserses: “Kigotiin acheek otwogiguk che kemi pitoni. 
Ezra4:12 Ingonaak eng' laitoryat kole Yahudik chooto kobunu oldang'ung' ko kogoitwech ak kogoit Jerusalem ak koteechei kogeny nganasanooto ya ago ngelelyo. Teechei kogeny irimoik ak lumeiywot ne kiga kobutok. 
Ezra4:13 Ingonaak nguno eng' laitoryat kole ngot koteech nganasani ak kogees irimoikyik, koma kogoitoi konunoik, kodi, anan aisuruutap tuguuk alak tugul ak eng' let, kong'em mogornateetap pounatet." 
Ezra4:14 Ara anyun, amu ki ame munyugap kootap laitoryat, koma nyoljinech kegeer keng'emjin laitoryat teegisto. Ara kagiyogu parwaani anyun amu nooto kiboorchi laitoryat," 
Ezra4:15 si kobiit kecheeng' eng' bukuit ne po ng'aleegap peetuusyegap kwanisyeguk. Inyooru eng' bukuinooto po ng'aleegap peetuusyek ak inai ile ngelelyo nganasani ak koiimi laitorinik ak emotinwek, ak kigong'eet chaamset kobooch keny. Nooto anyun amu ne si keng'em nganasaniito." 
Ezra4:16 Kiboorchini anyun laitoryat keleenjini, ngot keteech nganasani ak kigees irimoik, kobooru nooto kole, ma itinye kebeberta eng' aineet pitoni.”" 
Ezra4:17 Ki iyookyi anyun laitoryat waluunet Reum pounindetap kirwooget ak Simsai siriindet ak choronokwak tugul che ki menyei Samaria, ak emet tugul ne mi aineet pitoniin kole ingotep kaalyeet ko uu nooto." 
Ezra4:18 Parweet ne ki kooyokwech ko kagesomannywa komyee eng' tainnyu. 
Ezra4:19 Koang'at ak kogecheeng', ak koginyoor keele kobooch keny ko ki kongelelji `nganasaniito laitorinik ak ki kobiitune ngelelnateet ak chaamset." 
Ezra4:20 Ki miitei kogeny laitorinik che ki kiimeen che ki pou Jerusalem che ki pou emet tugul ne mi aineet pitoniin ak ki kigoochin konunoik, kodi, ak aisuruutap tuguuk." 
Ezra4:21 Ong'at anyun kiit ne igoochin pichooto kosiisyo, si mata koteech nganasani agoi tuun ang'at." 
Ezra4:22 Oriipkei anyun si mogaegei ng'olyoondonooto. Amu nee si kotesak ng'emisyet ne inyalili laitorinik? 
Ezra4:23 Kingo kagesoman ng'aleegap parweetap Laitoryat Artaserses eng' taitap Reum ak Simsai siriindet ak choronokwak, kochaakta Jerusalem ole mi Yahudik, kwo kong'at icheek eng' koroomnateet ak kimnateet kobagaakta poisyet." 
Ezra4:24 Ki tonon anyun poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem agoi kenyiit ne po aeng' ne po laitornatetap Darius laitoryatap Persia. 
Ezra5:1 Kingo maoten maotichu; maotyot Haggai ak Zekariah weeriitap Ido, komaotenji Yahudik che ki mi Judah ak Jerusalem eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel," 
Ezra5:1 Kingo maoten maotichu; maotyot Haggai ak Zekariah weeriitap Ido, komaotenji Yahudik che ki mi Judah ak Jerusalem eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel," 
Ezra5:2 kong'eet anyun Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel ak Jeshua weeriitap Josadak ak kotoi koteech kootap Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem. Ki mi kobooto icheek maotigap Kamuktaindet kotoreti. 
Ezra5:3 Ki pwanji icheek eng' peetuusyechooto Tatenai ne ki pounindet eng' aineet pitoniin, Setar-bosenai ak choronokwak ak koteebe icheek koleenji, “King'ataak ng'oo ogetyigei teekseetap kooi ak ogesu inatuni?”" 
Ezra5:4 Kotep kogeny kole, “Ng'oo kainaigap piik che teechei kooi?”" 
Ezra5:5 Ago ki riip konyegap Kamuktaindennywa poisyegap Yahudik ak ma mwachi icheek kobagaach poisyonooto. Ki riip kot koit ng'olyoot kap Darius ak keeweech waluunet eng' parweet agobo ng'olyoondoniito. 
Ezra5:6 Chu ng'aleegap parweet ne ki iyookto Tatenai pounindet ne po aineet pitoniin, Setar-bosenai ak choronokyik Aparsakitik, che ki mi aineet pitoniin, koyookyi Laitoryat Darius." 
Ezra5:7 Ki iyookyi ineendet parweet, ne ki kisir ko uu ni: Kisirchini Laitoryat Darius, taach chametapkei." 
Ezra5:8 Myee konaak eng' laitoryat kole ki kibe emetap Judah agoi kootap Kamuktaindet ne oo, ne kiteechee koik che eecheen ak kindoi pagoinik inatusyek; wendi tai poisyoni eng' kagiiletapkei ak koberuurot eng' eunekwak." 
Ezra5:9 Ki kiteebe anyun poisyechooto, keleenji, “King'ataak ng'oo ogetyigei teekseetap kooi ak ogesu inatuni?”" 
Ezra5:10 Ki kiteebe kainaikwak kogeny si kobiit kiboorun, si kimuuch kesir kainaigap piik che ki indochin icheek." 
Ezra5:11 Ak kiwolwech anyun, kole, “Ki otwogigap Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet ak ng'wony, ak kiteeche kogeny koot ne kiga keteech eng' kenyisyechu chaang' ki kosiirto ne kiteechei laitoryat ne oo ne po Israel ak kogees." 
Ezra5:12 Ago kingo kagotach `kwanisyekyok Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet kot konereech, konde icheek eutap Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon, Kaldeindet ne king'em kooi ak komut piik koba Babilon." 
Ezra5:13 Ago eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Cyrus laitoryatap Babilon, kong'at Laitoryat Cyrus keteech kooi po Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra5:14 Ki inem Laitoryat Cyrus eng' hekaluutap Babilon, tereenigap thahabu ak che po fedha ak icheek che po kootap Kamuktaindet, che kiga ip Nebukadnezar eng' Hekaluut ne ki mi Jerusalem kobwa hekaluutap Babilon ak ki kigoochi chiito age ne kiguure Sesbasar ne kiga koeet ineendet koek pounindet," 
Ezra5:15 ak ki leenji ineendet, ‘Ip tereenichu ak iwe Hekaluut ne mi Jerusalem ak ingeteech kootap Kamuktaindet eng' ole kimi yeginye.’" 
Ezra5:16 Ki nyo anyun Sesbasar niito ak kolum lumeiywegap kootap Kamuktaindet ne miitei Jerusalem. Kobooch peetuusyechooto agoi ra, keteechei kora, ago tomo kogeskei." 
Ezra5:17 Ara anyun, ngot kogeer laitoryat kole myee, kecheeng' eng' koot ne kigonoree tuguugap laitoryat, ne mi olooto po Babilon, si kegeer ngo uu nooto, ngo ki ng'at Laitoryat Cyrus keteech koiito po Kamuktaindet eng' Jerusalem. Ingoyokwech laitoryat ng'olyoot komwaiwech kiit ne chamei eng' ng'olyoondoniito.”" 
Ezra6:1 Ki ng'at anyun Laitoryat Darius ak ki kicheeng' koot ne po bukuisyek ole ki kigonoree tuguuk eng' Babilon. 
Ezra6:2 Ak ki kinyoorchi kitabuut Ekbatana eng' kootap laitoryat ne mi emetap Media, ne ki kisir ko uu ni koek kabwaatet:" 
Ezra6:3 Eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po Laitoryat Cyrus, koyai Cyrus ng'atuutyet agobo kootap Kamuktaindet eng' Jerusalem kole ngeteech koot, ole kigoitoe tiseiywek, ak kelumda lumeiywekyik kouegitu; ingoek kooindap tononennyi mitainik tamanwogik lo che po euut ak tebeesindanyi mitainik tamanwogik lo che po euut," 
Ezra6:4 kobooto ortinwek somok che po koik che eecheen, ak ooreet agenge ne po pagoinik che leelach. Ingobun kootap laitoryat tuguuk che keyaaktoe tuguuchooto." 
Ezra6:5 Kora ko ingeweekta kogeny tereenik che po thahabu ak che po fedha che po kootap Kamuktaindet, che kiga ip Nebukadnezar eng' Hekaluut ne ki mi Jerusalem kobwa Babilon. Ingeip kogeny koba Hekaluut ne mi Jerusalem ak inde kiit age tugul komostanyi ak inde kotebee kootap Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra6:6 Ki ng'at Laitoryat kole; “Ara oistegei anyun inyee Tatenai pounindetap aineet pitoniin, Setar-bosenai ak choronoguk Aparsakitik che mi aineet pitoniin." 
Ezra6:7 Oistoegei poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet, ingoteech pounindetap Yahudik kobooto poisyegap Yahudik koyooto po Kamuktaindet eng' ole ki mi ye kinye.”" 
Ezra6:8 Kang'at kogeny agobo kiit ne oyachini poisyechooto po Yahudik agobo teekseetap koiito po Kamuktaindet. Kigoochin pichooto eng' kagiiletapkei tuguuk che kiyaaktoi che po laitoryat che tuguugap aisuruut eng' aineet pitoniin, si ma ki kirinda icheek." 
Ezra6:9 Tuguuk che makyingei ko uu kiruugik che mengeechen, mengichik, aaregap keechiir, koek kagoochinoik che kibeeljin Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet ak nganuuk, muunyuk, divaik, ak mwanik, ko uu eng' ng'olyootap tisiik che mi Jerusalem; ingigoochi icheek peetuut age tugul amat keele ma mi," 
Ezra6:10 si kobiit kogoochi Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet korosegap nyamdutik che anyiny ak kosa agobo saboondap laitoryat ak weeriikyik. 
Ezra6:11 Kang'at kogeny ale, chii age tugul ne walei ng'olyoondoniito ko ingeng'us pambaniat eng' koonnyi ak keganapchi ineendet ak keratyi keetoto ak keyai koonnyi koek kapng'atat agobo niito." 
Ezra6:12 Ngo par Kamuktaindet ne ki inde kainennyi komeny olooto, laitorinik tugul ak piik tugul che iitoi eunekwak kole kowal ng'olyoondonooto ak kong'em kootap Kamuktaindet ne miitei Jerusalem. Kaang'at anee Darius. Ara ingoyaak ng'atuutyoniito eng' kagiiletapkei tugul." 
Ezra6:13 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto kochokyi Tatenai pounindetap aineet pitoniin kobooto Setar-bosenai ak choronokwak, amu kiga koyookto piik Laitoryat Darius." 
Ezra6:14 Kiteekso anyun poisyegap Yahudik ak koboor eng' maonateetap maotyot Haggai ak Zekariah weeriitap Ido. Kiteekso ak ki iges ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel ak ko uu ng'atuutyetap Cyrus, Darius ak Artaserses laitoryatap Persia." 
Ezra6:14 Kiteekso anyun poisyegap Yahudik ak koboor eng' maonateetap maotyot Haggai ak Zekariah weeriitap Ido. Kiteekso ak ki iges ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel ak ko uu ng'atuutyetap Cyrus, Darius ak Artaserses laitoryatap Persia." 
Ezra6:15 Ki kigees anyun koyooto eng' peetuut ne po somok eng' arawetap Adar ne ki po kenyiit ne po lo eng' laitornatetap Laitoryat Darius. 
Ezra6:16 Ki itabaan koyooto po Kamuktaindet eng' poiboiyet piigap Israel, tisiik kobooto Lawiik ak piik tugul che ki luulenik che ki weeksei." 
Ezra6:17 Ki igoito kiruugik pogol agenge, mengichik pogol aeng', aaregap keechiir pogol ang'wan eng' peetuutap katabaanetap koyooto po Kamuktaindet. Ak ki igoito kwesik taman ak aeng' koek kagoochinetap tengekto agobo Israel tugul kobee koitetap ortinwegap Israel." 
Ezra6:18 Ki inde `icheek tisiik ko uu pcheutikwak ak Lawiik ko uu riipsosyekwak agobo otisyetap Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem, ko uu ye siraat eng' bukuitap Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Ki riip anyun paska `lagogap luulenik eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawet ne po tai. 
Ezra6:20 Amu kiga koanyinygei Tisiik ak Lawiik, kitiliileen tugul. Ki eeny aarwetap paska agobo lagok tugul che po luulenik ak agobo tupchosyekwak tisiik, ak agobo icheeget." 
Ezra6:21 Ki am paska piigap Israel che ki weeksei kobunu ole kiga kiluulji ak tugul che kiga istoegei simdap pororyosyegap emonooto, kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Ezra6:22 Kiboiboitu eng' poiboiyet ne oo, koboiboenji igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek peetuusyek tisap, amu ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek koboiboitu ak ki wal muguleldap laitoryatap Assyria kotokyigei icheek si kogimit icheek eng' poisyetap kootap Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Ezra7:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu eng' laitornatetap Artaserses laitoryatap Persia, ko ki mi Ezrah weeriitap Seraiah, weeriitap Azariah, weeriitap Hilkiah," 
Ezra7:2 weeriitap Shallum, weeriitap Zadok, weeriitap Ahitub," 
Ezra7:3 weeriitap Amariah, weeriitap Azariah, weeriitap Meraiot," 
Ezra7:4 weeriitap Seraiah, weeriitap Usi, weeriitap Buki," 
Ezra7:5 weeriitap Abisua, weeriitap Phineas, weeriitap Eleazar, weeriitap Aron tisiindet ne oo." 
Ezra7:6 Ki togosta anyun Ezrah niito eng' Babilon. Ki siriindet ne ng'oom eng' ng'atuutigap Musa che kiga kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel. Ki chamji laitoryat soomennyi tugul, ko uu ye kimi eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi paragunnyi." 
Ezra7:7 Ki togosta alak che po piigap Israel ak che po tisiik, Lawiik, tyeniik, kobooto riibiigap kurgotik ak otwogigap Hekaluut kobwa Jerusalem, eng' kenyiit ne po tisap ne po Laitoryat Artaserses." 
Ezra7:8 Ki it `Ezra Jerusalem eng' arawet ne po muut ne ki kenyiit ne po tisap ne po laitoryat. 
Ezra7:9 Ki katoi kotogos eng' Babilon eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawet ne po tai ak eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap muut, koit Jerusalem ko uu ye ki mi ak ineendet euut ne myee ne po Kamuktaindennyi." 
Ezra7:10 Amu kiga kogiilgei eng' muguleldanyi Ezrah kocheeng' ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koyai ak koneet kayomisutik ak kirwoogutik eng' Israel." 
Ezra7:11 Chu ng'aleegap parweet ne ki igoochi `Laitoryat Artaserses Ezrah tisiindet, ne kora ko siriindetap ng'aleegap ng'atuutik che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kayomisutik che ki igoochi Israel:" 
Ezra7:12 Anee Artaserses, laitoryatap laitorinik, asirchini Ezrah tisiindet, siriindetap ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet ne ititaat; Taach chametapkei." 
Ezra7:13 Kang'at ale, Oba tugul, piigap pororyetap Israel kobooto tisiikwak ak Lawiik che mi laitornatennyu, che chamei koba Jerusalem eng' magennywa." 
Ezra7:14 Amu kagoyookten laitoryat ak kirwoogikyik tisap iwe iteep agobo Judah ak Jerusalem ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne mi kobooten. 
Ezra7:15 Ne siirei, iip fedha ak thahabu che ki igoochi eng' chamyet `laitoryat ak kirwoogikyik Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne mi meng'ootennyi Jerusalem." 
Ezra7:16 Ip kobooto fedha tugul ak thahabu che inyoorchini emet tugul ne po Babilon, kobooto kagoochinet ne po chamyet ne po piik ak ne po tisiik, kogoitoi eng' chamyet agobo kootap Kamuktaindennywa ne mi Jerusalem." 
Ezra7:17 Myee anyun iale fedhaisyechu, kiruugik, mengichik, aaregap keechiir, kobooto kagoochinoikwak che po peek ak kagoochinoikwak che kieei ak igoite chooto eng' kaptisisyetap kootap Kamuktaindeng'wong' ne mi Jerusalem." 
Ezra7:18 Kiit age tugul ne ogeere inyee ak tupchosyeguk ole myee oyae fedhaisyek tugul che kang'et ak thahabu, oyae ko uu mageetap Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Ezra7:19 Igoite eng' taitap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Jerusalem tereenik che kigoonin agobo otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Ezra7:20 Kiit age tugul neta kemakyin kootap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne kanyool igoite, igoite eng' tuguuk che konorotiin che po kootap laitoryat." 
Ezra7:21 Ang'ate anee, Laitoryat Artaserses konoriik tugul che po tuguuk che mi aineet pitoniin ale kiit age tugul neta komagenok Ezrah tisiindet, siriindetap ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet, keyai eng' kagiiletapkei," 
Ezra7:22 kot koit talendaisyek pogol che po fedha, keruutik pogol che po nganuuk, divaik che yamegei ak debeisyek pogol aeng', mwanik che yamegei ak debeisyek pogol aeng', ak muunyuk che ma ki mwa ole tee." 
Ezra7:23 Kiit age tugul ne ng'atei Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet, koyaak ko uu nooto agobo kootap Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet ang' dabuch nyoonji nereeknateet pounatetap laitoryat ak weeriikyik." 
Ezra7:24 Kiboorwok kogeny keele, ma chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik kogoito kodi anan aisuruut anan ko aisuruut ne po tuguuk, age tugul eng' tisiik, Lawiik, tyeniik, riibiigap kurgotik ak otwogigap Hekaluut anan ko otwogigap kootap Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra7:25 Lewen inyee Ezrah ko uu utaatyetap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne mi eung'ung', kirwoogik ak pounik che imuuchi koboi piik tugul che mi aineet pitoniin, icheek tugul che ingen ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak oneet ineendet ne ma ingen." 
Ezra7:26 Age tugul ne ma chamei koyai ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ng'atuutigap laitoryat, kirwookyi iman ak konyoor pireet; ngo ne po meet anan ngo ne po kang'etoet, ngo kerebe tuguuk anan ngo ratisyet." 
Ezra7:27 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekyok, ne ki inde ng'olyoot ne uu ni muguleldap laitoryat, si kochop kogararanit kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi Jerusalem," 
Ezra7:28 ne kigoiitwa ak anee rireenet eng' taitap laitoryat ak kirwoogikyik ak eng' taitap pounik tugul che kiimeen che po laitoryat. Ak ki anyiganitu amu ki mi kobooto eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu ak kiayum eng' Israel piik che taagunotiin ketogoste tugul. 
Ezra8:1 Chu ko kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak tetuutigap ibinwekwak che ki kosiirto che ki kitogosu tugul eng' Babilon eng' peetuusyegap laitornatetap Laitoryat Artaserses: 
Ezra8:2 Eng' weeriigap Phineas, ko Gershom; eng' weeriigap Ithamar, ko Daniel; eng' weeriigap Daudi, ko Hatus." 
Ezra8:2 Eng' weeriigap Phineas, ko Gershom; eng' weeriigap Ithamar, ko Daniel; eng' weeriigap Daudi, ko Hatus." 
Ezra8:3 Eng' weeriigap Shekaneiah, eng' weeriigap Paros, ko Zekariah, ak ki kiitito ineendet murenik pogol ak konom eng' tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto." 
Ezra8:4 Eng' weeriigap Pahat-moap, ko Eliehoenai weeriitap Seraiah, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik pogolwogik aeng'u." 
Ezra8:5 Eng' weeriigap Shekaneiah ko weeriitap Jahasyel, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik pogolwogik somogu." 
Ezra8:6 Eng' weeriigap Adin, ko Ebed weeriitap Jonathan, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik konomu." 
Ezra8:7 Eng' weeriigap Elam, ko Jesaia weeriitap Athaliah, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik tamanwogik tisabu." 
Ezra8:8 Eng' weeriigap Shepatiah, ko Sebadia weeriitap Mikael, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik tamanwogik sisiitu." 
Ezra8:9 Eng' weeriigap Joab, ko Obadiah weeriitap Jehiel, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik pogolwogik aeng'u ak taman ak sisiit." 
Ezra8:9 Eng' weeriigap Joab, ko Obadiah weeriitap Jehiel, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik pogolwogik aeng'u ak taman ak sisiit." 
Ezra8:10 Eng' weeriigap Selomit, ko weeriitap Josipia, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik pogolut agenge ak tamanwogik lo." 
Ezra8:11 Eng' weeriigap Bebai, ko Zekariah weeriitap Bebai; ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik tiptemu ak sisiit." 
Ezra8:12 Eng' weeriigap Askad, ko Johanan weeriitap Hakatan, ak ki mi kobooto ineendet murenik pogolut agenge ak taman." 
Ezra8:13 Eng' weeriigap Adonikam, che po let, ak chu kainaikwak, Eliphelet, Jeuel ak Semaiah, ak ki mi kobooto icheek murenik tamanwogik lo." 
Ezra8:14 Ak eng' weeriigap Bigbai, ko Utai ak Zabud. Ki mi kobooto icheek murenik tamanwogik tisabu." 
Ezra8:15 Ki ayumji icheek aineet ne rootyin Ahaba. Ki kitebee yooto peetuusyek somok ak ki ageerote piik ak tisiik ak ma anyooru weeriigap Lawi. 
Ezra8:16 Ki ayookte anyun keguur Elieser, Ariel, Semaiah, Elnatan, Jarib, Elnatan, Nathan, Zekariah ak Mesulam, piik che eecheen, kobooto Joiarib ak Elnatan, che ki kaneetik," 
Ezra8:17 ayookte icheek koba kap Ido ne ki oo eng' ole kiguure Kasipia. Ki amwachi kiit ne kanyool komwachi Ido ak tupchosyekyik otwogigap Hekaluut eng' komosato po Kasipia, si komutwech kiboitiinik che po kootap Kamuktaindennyo." 
Ezra8:18 Amu kimi kobootech euut ne myee ne po Kamuktaindennyo, komutwech chiito ne tinyei naet, ne po weeriigap Mali, weeriitap Lawi, weeriitap Israel ak Serebia, kobooto weeriikyik ak tupchosyekyik taman ak sisiit," 
Ezra8:19 ak Hasabia ak ki mi kobooto ineendet Jesaia ne po weeriigap Merari tupchosyekyik ak weeriikwak, tiptem." 
Ezra8:20 Eng' otwogigap Hekaluut che kiga konde Daudi ak pounik agobo otisyetap Lawiik, ko ki kiguur otwogik pogol aeng' ak tiptem, tugul eng' kainaikwak." 
Ezra8:21 Yeityo ang'at anyun karugutetapkei, eng' aineetap Ahaba, si kobiit kiming'inge eng' taitap Kamuktaindennyo, kecheeng' eng' ineendet ooreet ne litit, eng' acheek ak lagokyok ak ne po tuguukyok tugul." 
Ezra8:22 Amu ki alilan asoom laitoryat kweanet ne po kiplugotinik ak piik che ketei paraisisyek si kotoretech kegirindee puunik che mi ooreet. Amu kiga kemwachi laitoryat keleenji, “Mi eutap Kamuktaindennyo kobooto icheek tugul che cheeng'ei ineendet, koyachi ne myee, ago kirindoi kimnateennyi ak nereeknatennyi piik tugul che metoi ineendet.”" 
Ezra8:23 Ki kirugutkei anyun ak kesaa Kamuktaindennyo agobo niito ak kigaswech. 
Ezra8:24 Ki atabaan anyun taman ak aeng' che eecheen eng' tisiik, icheeget ko ki Serebia ak Hasabia ak ki mi kobooto icheek tamanu eng' tupchosyekwak," 
Ezra8:25 ak ki agerchi icheek fedha, thahabu, tereenik ak kagoochinetap kootap Kamuktaindennyo che kiga kogoon laitoryat ak kirwoogikyik, pounikyik ak Israel tugul che ki mi yooto." 
Ezra8:26 Ki agerchi icheek talendaisyek pogol lo ak konom che po fedha ak tuguuk che po fedha che yamei talendaisyek pogol ak thahabu che yamei talendaisyek pogol," 
Ezra8:27 ak taabook tiptem che po thahabu, che yamei keruutik sisiit ak kebeberyat, ak tereenik aeng' che po sugunonik, che myachen, che liilei piich che tinyei kamanuutyet ne uu ne po thahabu." 
Ezra8:28 Yeityo aleenji icheek, “Oo tiliileen eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko tiliileen tereenik ak fedha ak thahabu ko kagoochinoigap chamyet che kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwok." 
Ezra8:29 Oriipse ak oriip tuguuchooto agoi obiman eng' kooriik che po oriit eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap che eecheen eng' tisiik, Lawiik ak pounik che po kooriigap kwanisyekwok che po Israel eng' Jerusalem.”" 
Ezra8:30 Kitaach anyun Tisiik ak Lawiik nyigiisindap fedha ak thahabu ak tereenik, si koip kobwa Jerusalem kootap Kamuktaindennyo." 
Ezra8:31 Eng' peetuutap taman ak aeng' ne po arawet ne po tai, keng'etye anyun eng' aineetap Ahaba ak keebe Jerusalem. Ki mi kobootech eutap Kamuktaindennyo ak kisarwech eng' eutap puunyoot ak ne kisapchinech eng' ooreet." 
Ezra8:32 Kingeitu Jerusalem, ketebee yooto peetuusyek somok." 
Ezra8:33 Eng' peetuut ne po ang'wan ko ki kiger fedha ak thahabu ak tereenik eng' kootap Kamuktaindennyo, ki kigoochi Meremot weeriitap Uriah tisiindet. Ki mi kobooto ineendet Eleazar weeriitap Phineas, ak ki mi kobooto icheek Josabad weeriitap Jeshua, ak Noahdia weeriitap Binui, Lawiik." 
Ezra8:34 Ki kiit tuguuk tugul ak keger, ak ki kisir ole kite nyigiisindo eng' peetuunooto." 
Ezra8:35 Ki igoito lagogap luulenik, che ki weeksei eng' ole ki kiluulji, kagoochinoik che kibeelei kogoochi Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel; kiruugik taman ak aeng' agobo Israel tugul, mengichik tamanwogik sogool ak lo, aaregap kechir tamanwogik tisap ak tisap, kwesik taman ak aeng', koek kagoochinetap tengekto. Ki ek chuuto tugul kagoochinet ne kibeeljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezra8:36 Ki igoochi kora ng'atuutigap laitoryat kandoik che po kaplaitoryat ak pounik che ki mi aineet pitoniin, ak kitoret piik ak kootap Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra9:1 Kingo kagoyaak tuguuchu, kobwonjo kandoik ak koleenjo, “Ma itabaanegei piigap Israel ak Tisiik ak Lawiik piigap emotinwek; yaei tuguuk che kiwechei che po Kanaanik, Hitik, Perisik, Jebusik, Amonik, Moabik, Misiriik ak Amorik." 
Ezra9:2 Amu ki kotun tiibiikwak, kotunji weeriikwak kot koburuigei keswoot ne tiliil ak piigap emotinwek, ee, che ki indochin pistooniito ko ki kandoik ak pounik.”" 
Ezra9:3 Ak kinga kas ng'olyoondoni, abet ngoryennyu ne po oriit ak ne po parak, ak ang'ei sumeekyuk ak atut tamnennyu yeityo atebi ng'wony akwong'." 
Ezra9:4 Ki iyumjagei anyun chii age tugul ne kibotani agobo ng'aleegap Kamuktaindetap Israel, agobo pistoetap che kiga kiluul. Ki atebi ng'wony akwong' kot koit kagoitoetap kagoochinetap koskoleny." 
Ezra9:5 Yeityo ang'eet eng' kaming'inennyu pogei ye ki kigoitoi kagoochinetap koskoleny, ko kaabet ngoryennyu ne po oriit ak ne po parak. Ki agutuny ak aitoochi eunekyuk Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu," 
Ezra9:6 ak ale, “Ee Kamuktaindennyu, alilani miising' ak kagowalak togeennyu kot koma muuch anyalin, inyee Kamuktaindennyu, amu kogotesak tengekwogikyok kot ko maluuchech ak ki koeet ng'oogistonyo kot koit kipsengwet." 
Ezra9:7 Ki keegu kiptengegiinik miising' kobooch peetuusyegap kwanisyekyok agoi rani, ak ki kindeech eunegap laitorinik che po emotinwek agobo tengekwogikyok acheek, laitorinikyok ak tisiikyok, kebarech eng' rotwetap chok, keluulech, ng'emisyet ak kalilanet, ko uu rani." 
Ezra9:8 Kagiboorwech anyun nguno eng' poroini ming'in myeeindo ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, kot kotuukwech alak kochililso ak kogoonech tigongyot eng' oldanyi ne tiliil, si kokweng'wech konyekyok Kamuktaindennyo ak kogoonech kasoobet ne ming'in eng' ratisyennyo." 
Ezra9:9 Nga ki otwogik, koma pagakyech Kamuktaindennyo otwoknatennyo, ago ki ityech rireenet eng' taitap laitorinigap Persia, si kogoonech kasoobet, si kelumda kootap Kamuktaindennyo ak keteech ole Ki kong'emak eng' koyooto ak kegoonech irimeet eng' Judah ak Jerusalem.”" 
Ezra9:10 Ara anyun, ee, Kamuktaindennyo, ta kemwae nee kogeny? Amu kigemete ng'atuutiguk," 
Ezra9:11 che kigeng'at eng' otwogiguk maotik, ile, “Ma tiliil emet ne obendi oname kobunjook, amu simwegap piik che po emotinwek, eng' tuguukwak che kiwechei che ki konyiit ng'wanindanywa emet kong'etee tabanda age agoi tabanda age." 
Ezra9:12 Amogoochi anyun tiibiikwok weeriikwak, anan kotun weeriikwok tiibiikwak anan ocheeng' kalyennywa anan ko porotennywa koigeny, si kobiit ogimegitu ak oam ruroteetap emet ak obagakyi lagokwok koek porotennywa koigeny." 
Ezra9:13 Kigobwanjech chooto tugul amu poisyonikyok che yaach ak ng'oogistonyo ne oo. Amu ma ibirech inyee Kamuktaindennyo ko uu ye yamegei ak tengekwogikyok, ak ki igoonech chu ng'etunotiin," 
Ezra9:14 ko tos kibut kogeny ng'atuutiguk ak kenamge ak piik che yaei tuguuchu kiwechei? Tos menereekyinech kot igeswech kot koma mi che ng'etu anan che chilildos? 
Ezra9:15 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ii po iman, amu ki piik che kigeng'etu, che kichililso, ko uu rani. Ki mi taing'ung' eng' ng'oogistonyo, amu ma mi ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taing'ung' amu niito.”" 
Ezra10:1 Ye kita kosaaei Ezrah ak kong'aanyei chalwogik, koriirei ak kowiirchingei ng'wony eng' taitap kootap Kamuktaindet, koyumjigei ineendet tuiyet ne oo miising' ne ki punu Israel, ne po murenik ak kwonyiik ak lagok. Ki riiryo piik ak icheek eng' ng'wanindo." 
Ezra10:2 Ak ki wolji Shekaneiah weeriitap Jehiel, weeriitap Elam, Ezrah koleenji, “Ki kichililji Kamuktaindennyo ak ki kitun tiibiik che salu saang' che po piigap emoni, ago mi nguno kamang'unet agobo Israel agobo ng'olyoondoniito." 
Ezra10:3 Ongiyomiske anyun ak Kamuktaindennyo keiste osotik tugul ak lagok che kisichei osotichooto ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung' inyee kiptaiyandennyu ak ne po icheeget che kabotanso amu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindennyo ak ingoyaak ko uu ng'atuutyet. 
Ezra10:4 Ng'eet anyun; amu neng'ung' ng'olyoondoniito ak kimi, kobooten ara nyiganitu ak iyai.”" 
Ezra10:5 Kong'eet anyun Ezrah ak kong'at che eecheen eng' tisiik, Lawiik ak Israel tugul, koyasyo kole yaei ko uu ng'olyoondoniito. Ara ki iyasyo anyun." 
Ezra10:6 Kong'eet anyun Ezrah eng' taitap kootap Kamuktaindet ak kwo koot ne po oriit ne po Jeohanan weeriitap Eliasib. Kingo it yooto, koma koamis anan koe peek, amu kirirei agobo kachililutyetap icheek che kiga kiluul." 
Ezra10:7 Kimwaita eng' Judah tugul ak Jerusalem, komwachi lagok tugul che po piik che kiga kiluul si kobiit koyumjigei Jerusalem." 
Ezra10:8 Age tugul ne ma nyo ko kagobata peetuusyek somogu, ko uu ng'olyootap pounik ak poisyek, kerebe tuguukyik tugul ak kitabaane tuiyetap pichooto kiga kiluul." 
Ezra10:9 Ki iyumjigei anyun Jerusalem `piik tugul che po Judah ak Benjamin kotomo kogeskei peetuusyek somogu. Ki arawetap sogool eng' peetuutap tiptem ne po arawanooto, ak ki tebee piik tugul komosta ne paraa eng' taitap kootap Kamuktaindet kobotandos agobo ng'olyoondonooto ak ropta ne oo." 
Ezra10:10 Yeityo kotonon anyun Ezrah tisiindet ak koleenji icheek, “Ki ochiliil ak ki otun tiibiik che salu saang' ak otes ng'oogistap Israel." 
Ezra10:11 Ong'aang'ji anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kwanisyekwok ak oyai kiit ne chamei. Otabaanegei piigap emet ak kwonyiik che toek.”" 
Ezra10:12 Ki wol anyun tuiyet tugul eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Ko uu ye kaimwa agobo acheek, konyaaljinech keyai." 
Ezra10:13 Chaang' piik che mi yu ak nguno ko peetuusyegap ropta ne oo. Ma kimuuchi ketononse eng' saang', ago ma poisyetap peetuut agenge niito anan aeng', amu ki kichiliil miising' eng' kiito." 
Ezra10:14 Ingelewen anyun pounikyok agobo tuiyet tugul ak ingobwa icheek tugul che mi nganasookyok che ki itun tiibiik che toek. Ingobwa eng' peetuusyek che king'atei ak Ingobwa kobooto icheek poisyegap nganaseet age tugul ak kirwoogikyik agoi koistoeneigei nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindennyo, kot keisto poisyoniito.”" 
Ezra10:15 Jonathan weeriitap Asahel ak Jaseia weeriitap Tikba icheegei che kitononso kogirinda ng'olyoondoniito, ak kitoret icheek Mesulam ak Sabetai Lawindet." 
Ezra10:16 Ki yai ko uu nooto lagogap piik che kiga kiluul. Ki kitabaan tisiindet Ezrah kobooto kandoik alak che po kooriigap kwanisyek kobee kooriigap kwanisyekwak ak icheek tugul ko uu kainaikwak ak ki tebi ng'wony eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap taman kogin ng'aleechooto. 
Ezra10:17 Ki iges eng' peetuut ne po tai eng' arawet ne po tai ng'aleek tugul che po murenik che kiga kotun tiibiik che toek. 
Ezra10:18 Ki piit eng' weeriigap tisiik che kiga kotun tiibiik che toek: eng' weeriigap Jeshua, weeriitap Josedak ak tupchosyekyik, ko ki Maaseia, Elieser, Jarib, ak Gedalia." 
Ezra10:19 Ki iyasyo icheek kole istoi osotikwak, ak amu ki tinyei tengekto, ko ki igoito mengit ne po akweet kobunji tengektonywa." 
Ezra10:20 Eng' weeriigap Imer ko ki Hanani ak Sebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Eng' weeriigap Harim ko ki Maaseia, Elijah, Semaiah, Jehiel ak Uzziah." 
Ezra10:22 Eng' weeriigap Pasur ko ki Elioenai, Maaseia, Ishmael, Nethanel, Josabad ak Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Eng' Lawiik ko ki Josabad, Shimei, Kelaia (ineendet Kelita), Petaia, Judah ak Elieser." 
Ezra10:24 Eng' tyeniik ko ki Eliasib, ak eng' riibiigap kurgotik ko ki Shallum, Telem ak Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Eng' Israel, eng' weeriigap Paros ko ki Ramya, Isia, Malkija, Mijamin, Eleazar, Malkija ak Benaiah." 
Ezra10:26 Eng' weeriigap Elam ko ki Mattaniah, Zekariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremot ak Elijah." 
Ezra10:27 Eng' weeriigap Satu ko ki Elioenai, Eliasib, Mattaniah, Jeremot, Sabad ak Asisa." 
Ezra10:28 Eng' weeriigap Bebai ko ki Jeohanan, Hananiah, Sabai, Atlai." 
Ezra10:29 Eng' weeriigap Bani ko ki Mesulam, Maluk, Adaiah, Jasub, Seal ak Jeremot." 
Ezra10:30 Eng' weeriigap Pahat-moap ko ki Adna, Kelal, Benaiah, Maaseia, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binui ak Manasseh." 
Ezra10:31 Eng' weeriigap Harim ko ki Elieser, Isija, Malkija, Semaiah, Shimeon;" 
Ezra10:32 Benjamin, Maluk, Semaria." 
Ezra10:33 Eng' weeriigap Asum ko ki Matenai, Matata, Sabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh ak Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Eng' weeriigap Bani ko ki Madai, Amram ak Uel," 
Ezra10:35 Benaiah, Bedeia, Kelui;" 
Ezra10:36 Bania, Meremot, Eliasib;" 
Ezra10:37 Mattaniah, Matenai, Jaasu;" 
Ezra10:38 Bani, Binui, Shimei;" 
Ezra10:39 Selemya, Nathan, Adaiah;" 
Ezra10:40 Maknadebai, Sasai, Sarai;" 
Ezra10:41 Asarel, Selemya, Semaria;" 
Ezra10:42 Shallum, Amariah ak Joseph." 
Ezra10:43 Eng' weeriigap Nebo ko ki Jeiel, Matitia, Sabad, Sebina, Ido, Joel ak Benaiah." 
Ezra10:43 Eng' weeriigap Nebo ko ki Jeiel, Matitia, Sabad, Sebina, Ido, Joel ak Benaiah." 
Ezra10:44 Kiga kotun `chuuto tugul tiibiik che toek ak ki tinyei alak osotik che kiga kosikyi lagok. 
Nehemiah1:1 Che isubi ko ng'aleegap Nehemiah weeriitap Hakalia: Eng' arawetap Kisleb eng' kenyiitap tiptem, ye ki ami Susa eng' kaplaitoryat," 
Nehemiah1:2 konyo Hanani, age eng' tupchosyekyuk ak piik alak che ki punu Judah. Ki ateebee icheek agobo Yahudik che kiga kochililso, che ki ng'et eng' che kiga keluul, ak ateebee kora agobo Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah1:3 Kimwaiwo icheek kole, “Tinyei nyalilda ne oo ak churisyet eng' emonooto piik che ki ng'et eng' che kiga keluul. Ki kobutok agine irimeetap Jerusalem ak ki kebeel ormariichokyik.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Ye kinga kas ng'aleechuuto, atep ng'wony ariir ak aaragen eng' peetuusyek alak, ki arugutkei ak asaa eng' taitap Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet." 
Nehemiah1:5 Yeityo ale; “Asaain, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet, Kamuktaindet ne oo ne po kwong'eet, ne riibei arorutyet ak rireenet eng' icheeget che chamei ineendet ak koriibei ng'atuutikyik:" 
Nehemiah1:6 ingoep iit itiiguk ak koyatagis konyeguk, si kobiit igas saaetap otwogindeng'ung' ne asaain eng' saini, peet ak kemoi, agobo piigap Israel otwogiguk, ye ang'aanye tengekwogigap piigap Israel, che kigeyaun. Ee, ki ayai tengekto kobooto kootap kwandanyu." 
Nehemiah1:7 Ki keyaun ne ya miising', ama ki riip ng'atuutik anan kayomisutik anan kirwoogutik che ki ing'at otwogindeng'ung' Musa." 
Nehemiah1:8 Asaain ale, ibwaat ng'olyoot ne ki ing'at otwogindeng'ung' Musa, ileenji, ‘Ngot obistoe aiyestook obe ye mi pororyosyek," 
Nehemiah1:9 ago ngot oweekyage, oriip ng'atuutikyuk ak oyai, ko agot ngo ki kiyestochok tabandap kipsengwet, ayumi kobwa eng' olooto ak amutu kobwa ole ki alewen ande kainennyu kotebee.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 Ara anyun chuuto ko otwogiguk ak ko piiguk, che ki ityaach eng' kamuktaeng'ung' ne oo ak eng' eung'ung' ne kiim." 
Nehemiah1:11 Asaain, ee Kiptaiyat, ale, ingoepchi iit iting'ung' saaetap otwogindeng'ung' ak saaetap otwogiguk che igaasegei koywei kaineng'ung'. Asaain ale, igoochi otwogindeng'ung' koboor eng' peetuuni ak igoochi ineendet rireenet eng' taitap chiichi.” (Eng' peetuusyechooto, kogio ne ipchin laitoryat kigombet.)" 
Nehemiah2:1 Eng' arawetap Nisan, eng' kenyiitap tiptem ne po Laitoryat Artaserses, anemu divaik che ki mi tainnyi ak agoochi laitoryat. Amu kitom aarageni eng' tainnyi," 
Nehemiah2:2 koteebena laitoryat koleenjo, “Amu nee si komi arageneet togeng'ung', ago memyani? Niito koma kiit age ago arageneetap muguleldo.” Kingo mwaiwo ko uu nooto, aaragen anyun miising'." 
Nehemiah2:3 Ki aleenji laitoryat, “Ingosap laitoryat koigeny. Kalya si ma aaragen togeennyu ago ki koek karaatya nganaseet ye mi kereeriisyegap kwanisyekyuk ak ki kolalyo ormariichokyik?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Komwaiwo anyun laitoryat koleenjo, “Nee ne isoome?” Ki asaa anyun Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet," 
Nehemiah2:5 yeityo aleenji laitoryat, “Ngo cham laitoryat ak ngo kagonyoor otwogindeng'ung' chameet eng' taing'ung', iyookto anyun awo Judah agoi nganaseetap kereeriisyegap kwanisyekyuk si kobiit ateech.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Ak kiteebena laitoryat koleenjo, (kimi osotyonnyi ak ineendet,) “Po peetuusyek ata pandang'ung', ak iweeksei au?” Ki cham anyun laitoryat koyookta, ak ki amwachi peetuusyek che awendi." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ki amwachi kogeny laitoryat aleenji, “Ngo cham laitoryat, ingegoono paronok che po pounik che mi aineet pitoniin, si kochamwo asiirto agoi ait Judah." 
Nehemiah2:8 Ingogoono parweet ne kisirchin Asaph riibindetap timdap laitoryat, si kogoono keetiik ayae pagoinigap kurgotik che po irimeet ne ki namgei ak koot, che po irimeetap nganaseet ak che po koot ne awendi.” Ki koono laitoryat ko uu nooto, amu kimi euut ne myee ne po Kamuktaindennyu kobooto." 
Nehemiah2:9 Ki ait anyun ye mi pounik che ki mi aineet pitoniin, ak agoochi icheek paronogap laitoryat. Ki iyookto laitoryat kiptainigap lugeet ak piik che ketei paraisisyek kobooton." 
Nehemiah2:10 Kingo kas ng'aleechu `Sanbalat Horonindet ak Tobia otwogindet ne Amonindet, kogas icheek ng'wanindo ne oo amu kanyo chiito si kobiit kocheeng'ji piigap Israel sabeet ne myee." 
Nehemiah2:11 Ki ait anyun Jerusalem ak ki atebee yooto peetuusyek somok. 
Nehemiah2:12 Ki ang'eet kemoi anee ak piik che ng'ering' che ki mi kobooto, amamwachi chii age tugul kiit ne ki inde Kamuktaindennyu muguleldanyu ayachi Jerusalem. Ki ma komi tyony age tugul kobooto, kobatee ne ki abune." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ki amande kemoi eng' ormariichet ne po atebweet, ne tokyingei kondap peek ne po maswetit, agoi ormariichetap kiptangasyat ak ki atoben irimoigap Jerusalem che kiga kobutok ak ormariichook che kiga kolalyo." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ki awe anyun ormariichetap kondap peek agoi tamboiyotap laitoryat, ago ki ma piit ole punei tyondo ne ki abunoti." 
Nehemiah2:15 Ki atogoste anyun kemoi abun tabandap kereruut ak atoben amarar irimeet, yeityo aweege anyoo abunu ormariichet ne po atebweet ak aweege." 
Nehemiah2:16 Ki ma nai pounik ole kigawe anan kiit ne ki ayai, amu kitom amwachi Yahudik anan ko tisiik anan ko piik che taagunotiin anan ko pounik anan ko che kiboisyei." 
Nehemiah2:17 Yeityo aleenji, “Ogeere nyalili kimi, ko uu Jerusalem ak ormariichokyik che ki kolalyo ak koek karaatya. Ara obwa anyun keteech kogeny irimeetap Jerusalem, si mata keegu che kichoosei.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Ki amwachi kora icheek agobo euut ne myee ne po Kamuktaindennyu ne ki mi kobooto, ak ki amwachi kogeny ng'aleegap laitoryat che kiga komwaiwo. Ki wol icheek kole, ongeng'eetyee keteekse. Ki igimitkei anyun eng' poisyet ne myee." 
Nehemiah2:19 Ago kingo kas Sanbalat Horonindet, ak Tobia otwogindet ne Amonindet, ak Gesem Arabuindet, kororechech, kochotech ak kosasech ak kole, “Nee kii oyae? Ongeleljini laitoryat?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Ki awolji anyun icheek aleenji, koonech Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet kabelisyet; nooto anyun king'eetosi acheek otwogikyik ak keteech irimeet, ago okweek, ko motinye kebeberya neng'wong' anan kiy ne oyaache eng' Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah3:1 Ki ng'eet anyun Eliasib tisiindet ne oo kobooto tupchosyekyik tisiik ak koteech ormariichetap keechiirek. Ki ianyiny ak konde kurgotikyik. Ki ianyiny ak koteech kogeny agoi teekseet ne kooi ne po Hamea kot koit teekseet ne kooi ne po Hananel. 
Nehemiah3:2 Kiteeksei korubei ineendet piigap Jeriko, ak che kiteeksei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Sakur weeriitap Imri." 
Nehemiah3:3 Ki teech weeriigap Hasenaa ormariichet ne po njireenik. Ki inde tugatugigap kurgotik, konde kereiywekyik, poldiinikyik che ki kiige, ak temeleiywekyik." 
Nehemiah3:4 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Meremot weeriitap Uriah, weeriitap Hakos, ak che korubei icheek ko ki Mesulam weeriitap Berekiah, weeriitap Mesesabel. Che kirubei `icheek ko ki Zadok weeriitap Baanah." 
Nehemiah3:5 Che kirubei ko ki Tekoitik, ago ma machuuljigei piikwak che taagunotiin poisyetap kiptaiyannywa." 
Nehemiah3:6 Ki teech kogeny ormariichet ne po keny Joiada weeriitap Pasea ak Mesulam weeriitap Besodeia. Ki inde tugatugigap kurgotikyik, kereiywekyik, poldiinikyik che ki kiige ak temeleiywekyik." 
Nehemiah3:7 Ne kirubei icheek ko ki Melatia Gibeonindet, ak Jadon Meronotindet, piigap Gibeon ak che po Mispa, piik che po ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po pounindet ne mi aineet pitoniin." 
Nehemiah3:8 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Uzziel weeriitap Haraia, kitang'igap thahabu. Ne kirubei ineendet ko ki Hananiah purugindetap tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny ak ki igimit Jerusalem agoi irimeet ne tebees." 
Nehemiah3:9 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Repaiah weeriitap Hur ne pounindetap kebebertap kooretap Jerusalem. 
Nehemiah3:10 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Jedaiah weeriitap Harumap, ole tokyingei koonnyi. Kirubei ineendet Hatus weeriitap Hasabneia." 
Nehemiah3:11 Kiteechei kebeberta age Malkija weeriitap Harim, ak Hasub weeriitap Pahat-moap kobooto teekseet ne kooi ne po mastinwek." 
Nehemiah3:12 Ki teech kogeny korubei icheek Shallum weeriitap Haloes, pounindetap kebebertap kooretap Jerusalem, ineendet ak tiibiikyik." 
Nehemiah3:13 Ki teech kogeny Hanun kobooto piik che ki menyei Sanoa ormariichet ne po atebweet. Ki teech icheek ak konde kereiywekyik, poldiinikyik che ki kiige ak temeleiywekyik. Ki teech irimeet ne po mitainik olo po pogol ang'wan agoi ormariichetap kiptangasyat." 
Nehemiah3:14 Ki teech kogeny ormariichetap kiptangasyat Malkija weeriitap Regap, pounindetap kooretap Beth-hakerem. Ye kingo teech, konde kereiywekyik, poldiinikyik che ki kiige ak temeleiywekyik." 
Nehemiah3:15 Ki teech kogeny ormariichetap kondap peek Shallum weeriitap Kolhose, pounindetap kooretap Mispa. Ye kingo teech, kotuch, konde kereiywekyik, poldiinikyik che ki kiige ak temeleiywekyik. Ki teech irimeet ne po tamboiyotap Shelah ole neegitee seremutap kaplaitoryat, agoi lang'eiywot ne kichoortoegei kebendi nganaseetap Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Nehemiah weeriitap Asbuk pounindetap kebebertap kooretap Beth-zur, agoi ole tokyingei kereeriisyegap Daudi, agoi tamboiyot ne ki kibal ak agoi kootap piik che nyigoonen." 
Nehemiah3:17 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Lawiik, Reum, weeriitap Bani, ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Hasabia, pounindetap kebebertap kooretap Keila, agobo korennyi." 
Nehemiah3:18 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko kitupchosyekwak, Babai weeriitap Henadad, pounindetap kebebertap kooretap Keila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Eser weeriitap Jeshua, pounindetap Mispa, kebeberta age ne tokyingei ole kitogostoe agoi keit ole kigonoree kariigap lugeet eng' ole weegegei irimeet." 
Nehemiah3:20 Ne kirubei ko ki Baruk weeriitap Sabai ne ki teech kogeny eng' kagiiletapkei kebeberta age kobooch ole weegegei irimeet agoi kurgeetap kootap Eliasib tisiindet ne oo. 
Nehemiah3:21 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei ineendet ko ki Meremot weeriitap Uriah weeriitap Akos, kobooch kurgeetap kootap Eliasib agoi ole pooch kootap Eliasib." 
Nehemiah3:22 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko kitisiik, piigap Warenget." 
Nehemiah3:23 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Benjamin ak Hasub ole tokyingei koonnywa. Che kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Azariah weeriitap Maaseia weeriitap Anania ole neegitee koonnyi. 
Nehemiah3:24 Ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei ineendet ko ki Binui weeriitap Henadad, kobooch kootap Azariah kot koit ole weegegei irimeet agoi luuita." 
Nehemiah3:25 Ki teech kogeny Palal weeriitap Usai ole tokyingei ole weegegei irimeet ak teekseet ne kooi ne ki ichumda eng' koot ne po parak ne po kootap laitoryat ne neegitee seremutap riibiik. Ki teech kogeny korup ineendet Pedaiah weeriitap Paros. 
Nehemiah3:26 (Ki menyei otwogigap Hekaluut Ophel, agoi komosta ole tokyingei ormariichetap peek ole po kong'asiis ak teekseet ne kooi ne ki ichumda.)" 
Nehemiah3:27 Che kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei ineendet ko ki Tekoitik che tokyingei teekseet ne kooi ne ki ichumda agoi irimeetap Ophel. 
Nehemiah3:28 Ki teech kogeny tisiik paragutap ormariichetap paraisiit; kiteechei age tugul ne tokyingei koonnyi. 
Nehemiah3:29 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei icheek ko ki Zadok weeriitap Imer kotokyingei koonnyi, ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Semaiah weeriitap Shekaneiah, riibindetap ormariichet ne po kong'asiis." 
Nehemiah3:30 Ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei ineendet ko ki Hananiah weeriitap Selemya ak Hanun weeriit ne po lo ne po Salap. Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Mesulam weeriitap Berekiah kotokyingei koonnyi ne po oriit. 
Nehemiah3:31 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ineendet ko ki Malkija ne ki age eng' kitang'igap thahabu kot koit kootap otwogigap Hekaluut ak ne po chemung'arainik, kotokyingei ormariichetap Hamikad kot koit ole kitogostoe eng' luuita." 
Nehemiah3:32 Ki teech kogeny kitang'igap thahabu ak chemung'arainik kwenutap ole kitogostoe eng' luuita ak ormariichetap keechiirek. 
Nehemiah4:1 Ago ye kingo kas Sanbalat kole kiteechei irimeet, konereech. Kinyit ineendet miising' ak kochot Yahudik," 
Nehemiah4:2 ak ki ng'alaal eng' taitap tupchosyekyik ak lugeetap Samaria kole, “Yaei nee anyun Yahudichu nyalulyotin? Tos igimitigei? Tos igoitoi koroseek? Tos igeesu eng' peetuut agenge? Tos ing'eeti koik komang'une karurugutigap pusagaryek che ki kolalyo?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Ki mi ak ineendet Tobia Amonindet ak ki le, “Agot nooto teechei, ko ngot kolaany lelwot kobutei irimennywa ne po koik.”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Kas ee Kamuktaindennyo amu kisasech. Iweekyi icheek churisyennywa kotebee metowekwak ak igoite icheek keluul koba emet ne kiluuljin. 
Nehemiah4:5 Amat ketuch tengektonywa, amat kibukto ng'oogistonywa eng' taing'ung' amu ki kotachin eng' taitap teegik." 
Nehemiah4:6 Ki kiteech anyun irimeet; ak ki kituiyo irimeet tugul kot koit kebeberta ne po kooindap tononennyi amu ki tinyei piik mugulelwek che chamei poisyet. 
Nehemiah4:7 Ago kingo kas Sanbalat, Tobia, Arabuuk ak Amonik kobooto Asdodik kole wendi tai teekseet ne keteechei irimoigap Jerusalem che kiga kobutok ak kole kityemei ole kiga koundur, konereekso miising'." 
Nehemiah4:8 Ki irwooch tugul kibagenge kole kobwa ak kobargei ak Jerusalem ak kong'eet pooryeet eng' yooto. 
Nehemiah4:9 Ago ki kisaa Kamuktaindennyo ak ki kinde riibiik koriipso peet ak kemoi amu icheek. 
Nehemiah4:10 Ki toi piigap Judah kong'unyng'ung'so ak kole, “Kagogeskei kimnateetap che laei tuguuk ak ta komiitei pusagaryek che chaang' kot koma kimuuchi keteech irimeet.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Ak kileen ak icheek puunikyok, “Ye tomo konai icheek anan kogeer kiit ne tesetai, ko kageit kwenunnywa, kebar icheek ak keger poisyet kotonon.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Kingo pwa Yahudik che ki menyei ole neegitee icheek, komwaiwech konyil taman eng' komoswek tugul kole, “Kanyool oweekyeigei.”" 
Nehemiah4:13 Ki ande anyun piik komoswek che rektoot eng' irimeet patai eng' ole ma mi kiy, ande kobee ortinwekwak kotinyei rotonikwak po chok, ng'otwekwak ak kwangokwak." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ak ye ki ageer ole uu, ang'eet ak aleenji piik che taagunotiin, pounik ak piik tugul, “Amoiywei icheek. Obwaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne oo ak ko po kamuiset ak oyai lugeet agobo tupchosyekwok, weeriikwok, tiibiikwok, osotikwok ak kooriikwok.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Kingo kas puunikyok kole kigegas kiito ak ki kowal Kamuktaindet kirwoogennywa koek puch, keeweekyigei anyun tugul irimeet, kwo chii tugul poisyennyi." 
Nehemiah4:16 Kobooch peetuunooto ak kwo tai, kogiyai poisyet kebebertap otwogikyuk, konamei kebeberta age ng'otwek, long'ik kobooto kwangok ak ngoroik che po kariik. Kitabanu let pounik che po koot komugul ne po Judah" 
Nehemiah4:17 che kiteechei irimeet, ak che kilaei tuguuk, koginamjingei icheegei, koyai chii poisyet eng' euut age, koname euut age kariikyik," 
Nehemiah4:18 ak eng' teegik, ko ki tinyei chii tugul rotwennyi po chok ne kiga rat, asi koteeksei. Ak kimi ye neegiteena ne kuutei iryageet." 
Nehemiah4:19 Ki aleenji piik che taagunotiin ak pounik kobooto piik tugul, “Oo poisyet ak ko paraa, ak kagisirarchine eng' irimeet, keloochine." 
Nehemiah4:20 Oldo tugul ole kogasyi iryageet, oyumjeigei eng' yooto. Yaiywech lugeet Kamuktaindennyo.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Ki kiyai anyun poisyet kobooch ko kachor asiista agoi kogatook kecheik, ak ki nam kebeberta age ne po pichooto ng'otwek." 
Nehemiah4:22 Ki aleenji piik anyun eng' peetuunooto, “Ingotebee chii age tugul kobooto otwogindennyi Jerusalem oriit, asi koek riibiikyok che riipsei kemoi ak komuuchi kobois peet.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Eng' kasarata, ko ki ma kiregu ngoroikyok; anee, anan tupchosyekyuk anan otwogikyuk anan piik che kiriipsei che ki isubwo; ki wo chii age tugul ak kariikyik agoi aineet." 
Nehemiah5:1 Ki piit riirek che ng'woneen eng' piik ak eng' osotikwak agobo tupchosyekwak Yahudik. 
Nehemiah5:2 Amu kimi che ki mwa kole ki chaang' acheek kobooto weeriikyok ak tiibiikyok: ongecheeng'jige peek, si kobiit keam ak kesapche." 
Nehemiah5:3 Ki mi alak kogeny che ki mwa kole kigoitoi mbareenikyok, ak mbareenikyok che po sabibuk, ak kooriikyok si kotononwech, si kiyan kegoonech peek amu rubeet." 
Nehemiah5:4 Ki mi alak kogeny che ki mwa kole kogiarorte mbareenikyok, ak mbareenikyok che po sabibuk kotononwech kebesene fedhaisyek si kobiit kigoite aisuruut ne po laitoryat." 
Nehemiah5:5 Ago kergei anyun poorwekyok ak che po tupchosyekyok, lagokyok ko kergei ak lagokwak: ak ogeero, kimutu weeriikyok ak tiibiikyok kobwa ratisyet si koek otwogik, ak kagimutu tiibiikyok alak kobwa ratisyet: ama ki tinyei kimnateet keesye kioto; amu tinyei piik alak mbareenikyok ak mbareenikyok che po sabibuk." 
Nehemiah5:6 Ak ki anereech miising' kinga kas riirekwak ak ng'aleechuuto. 
Nehemiah5:7 Ki abwaat anyun aneege, ak ki kitiiye ak piik che taagunotiin ak pounik, ak aleenji icheek, “Omage keljinet ne siirei ne nyolu, chii age tugul tupchennyi.” Ak ki ayai tuiyet ne oo kegirindae icheek." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ak ki aleenji icheek, ko uu kiit ne tee kamugennyo, ko kogityaach tupchosyekyok Yahudik che kiga kialdochi pororyosyek; ak tos oaldoi tupchosyekwok si tuun oaldawech icheek? Kosiisyo anyun, ma sich kiy ne wolu." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ki amwa kogeny ale kiit ne oyae koma myee. Tos ma nyoljinok obendate kaiyweisyetap Kamuktaindennyo si kogiring'da chotisyetap pororyosyek che puunikyok? 
Nehemiah5:10 Ak ki kibesendochi `icheek fedhaisyek ak peek ko uu nooto, anee, tupchosyekyuk ak otwogikyuk si kesich keljinet. Asoomok ale kemete poisyonep keljinet." 
Nehemiah5:11 Asoomok oweekyi icheek rani mbareenikwak, mbareenikwak che po mseituni, ak kooriikwak, ak oweekyi kogeny kebeberta agenge eng' pogol ne po fedhaisyek, ak ne po peek, ak divaik, ak mwanik, che ki omage icheek." 
Nehemiah5:12 Komwa anyun kole, kiweekyini icheek, ama kemage kiy icheek; kiyae anyun ko uu nooto, ko uu ye kemwa. Ki aguur anyun tisiik, ang'at koyasyo kole koyai ko uu kayomisutyoni." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ki aleglekte kogeny ngoryennyu ale, “Ingoleglekta ko uu nooto Kamuktaindet chii age tugul komong' eng' koonnyi ak eng' poisyennyi ne ma yai kayomisutyoni; ingeleglekta ko uu nooto kot koma kotinyei kiy.” Ak ki mwa piik tugul che po tuiyet kole, “Ee ingoyaak ko uu nooto,” ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki yai piik ko uu kayomisutyoni." 
Nehemiah5:14 Kogeny kobooch peetuut ne ki kindea aek pounindennywa eng' emetap Judah, kong'etee kenyiitap tiptem agoi kenyiitap sosom ak aeng' ne po Laitoryat Artaserses ko ki ek chooto kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'; ki ma kiam ak tupchosyekyuk amitwogigap pounindet." 
Nehemiah5:15 Ago ki igoochi mileet piik pounik che po tai che ki indounena, ak ki ibe icheek magatiinik ak divaik, koma pooto shekelisyek artam che po fedha; ee, kiboi agot otwogikwak piik: ago ki ma ayai anyun ko uu nooto, amu kaiyweisyet ne aiywei Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ee, ki awe tai kogeny eng' poisyetap irimoni, ama ki al kooret age tugul; ak ki iyumjigei yuto otwogikyuk tugul si kobois." 
Nehemiah5:17 Ki amisye kogeny mesennyu Yahudik ak pounik, murenik pogol ak konom, koma pooto icheek che ki pwa ole ki kimi, che ki mong'u eng' pororyosyek che kiyiemech." 
Nehemiah5:18 Che kiga kichop agobo peetuut agenge ko ki eito agenge ak keechiirek lo che ki kilewen; ak ki kichobwa ngogaik, ak ki kichop divaik alak tugul konyil agenge eng' peetuusyek taman; agot eng' chuuto tugul koma amach amitwogigap pounindet amu ki oo otwoknateet eng' pichu." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ibwaata, ee Kamuktaindennyu, eng' tuguuk che myach, amu tugul che ki ayachi pichu." 
Nehemiah6:1 Ak ki ngemwachi anyun Sanbalat, Tobia, Gesem Arabuindet ak puunikyok alak keleenji, ki ateech irimeet, ak ma komi ole putot, (ago eng' peetuunooto ko kitom ande kereiywek che po ormariichok;)" 
Nehemiah6:2 koyook Sanbalat ak Gesem ng'olyo koleenjo, “Nyoo ketuiyechi nganaseet age eng' nganasook che mi warengetap Ono.” Ago ki ibwaati kole koyaiywo ne ya." 
Nehemiah6:3 Ki ayookyi piik icheek koba koleenji, “Ayae poisyet ne oo, ara anyun ma muuchi achoorge. Tos amu nee si kotonon poisyet ko kachooruge anyoo ole omi?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Ki iyook ng'olyoo ko uu nooto konyil ang'wan, ak ki awolji icheek ko uu nooto kogeny." 
Nehemiah6:5 Eng' ne po muut, koyookwo Sanbalat otwogindennyi koip eng' eunnyi parweet ne yaataat," 
Nehemiah6:6 ne ki kisir keele mwaat eng' pororyosyek ak komwaei Gasmu ko uu nooto kole inyee ak Yahudik ko ongelel. Ara nooto ne koonok oteech irimeet, ak ne siirei ko mwaat keele imache iegu laitoryannywa." 
Nehemiah6:7 Ki ilewen kogeny maotik si kobiit komwaita ng'aleek agobo inyee eng' Jerusalem kole mi laitoryat Judah. Nae anyun laitoryat ng'aleechuuto. Ara anyun nyoo si kirwooch tugul. 
Nehemiah6:8 Ki ayooktoochi chiito kwo koleenji, “Ma kiyaei tuguuk che uu che kemwa; ago iibwaati chooto inyegei eng' muguleldang'ung'.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Kita machei pichooto tugul komuech, amu ki ibwaati kole, “Nyaluldos eunekwak eng' poisyet, si ma yaak.” Ago ki agimiit anyun eunekyuk." 
Nehemiah6:10 Eng' pesyo ko ki awe kootap Semaiah weeriitap Delaiah, weeriitap Mehetabel, ne ki rataat ak ki le, “Ongetuiyechi kootap Kamuktaindet, eng' Hekaluut oriit ak ongeger kurgotigap Hekaluut, amu pwoonei icheek kobarin, ee, pwoonei kemoi kobarin.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Ago ki ale, “Tos nyolu komwei chii ne uu anee? Ak mi ng'oo ne uu anee, ne machei kwo Hekaluut kosar saboondanyi? Ma wendi oriit.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Ki anai iman ale ki ma iyook ineendet Kamuktaindet, ago ki yai maonatoni kole kogirindaa. Kigasir ineendet Tobia ak Sanbalat si kogoochi melekto." 
Nehemiah6:13 Kiga kisir ineendet anyun si konyoor melekto amu ng'olyoondoni kole si aiyweis ak ayai ko uu nooto, ayai tengekto, si kosich ng'aleek che yaach che mwaitoi, kole kotaama." 
Nehemiah6:14 “Ibwaat, ee Kamuktaindennyu, Tobia ak Sanbalat ko uu poisyonichuchwak ak ibwaat kogeny Noahdia chebyoset ne ki maotyot ak maotik tugul chooto che kityemei komua.”" 
Nehemiah6:15 Ki kigees anyun irimeet eng' peetuutap tiptem ak muut ne po arawetap Elul. Ki ek peetuusyek tugul konom ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah6:16 Kingo kas puunikyok tugul, koiyweis pororyosyek tugul che kigayiemech ak kosaskei amu ki nai kole poisyoni kogiyaei Kamuktaindennyo." 
Nehemiah6:17 Ki iyookto kogeny eng' peetuusyechooto piik che taagunotiin che po Judah, paronok che chaang' koba kap Tobia ak kinyoor ak icheek paronogap Tobia." 
Nehemiah6:18 Amu kimi che chaang' eng' Judah che kiga koyasyechi ineendet, amu kisandetap Shekaneiah weeriitap Ara, ak kiga itun weeriinnyi Jeohanan cheptap Mesulam weeriitap Berekiah." 
Nehemiah6:19 Ki ng'alaal kogeny agobo poisyonikyik che myach eng' tainnyu, ak ki ipchi ng'aleekyuk ineendet. Ki iyook Tobia paronok kole komua." 
Nehemiah7:1 Ye kingo kageteech irimeet ak ande kereiywegap kurgotik, koga kelewen riibiik, tyeniik ak Lawiik," 
Nehemiah7:2 alewen anyun tupchennyu Hanani ak Hananiah pounindetap irimeet koboi Jerusalem, amu ki chiito ne kiyani ak ki iywei Kamuktaindet kosiir che chaang'." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ki aleenji icheek, “Amat keyat ormariichogap Jerusalem kot kong'wanit asiis. Ye ta kotonondos koriipsei, ko myee koger icheek ormariichok ak otemel ak olewen riibiik eng' piik che menyei Jerusalem, chii age tugul eng' riipsennyi, ak koriip chii age tugul ole tokyingei koonnyi.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Ki tebees anyun nganaseet ak ko paraa, ago king'ering' piik che ki mi oriit, ak ki tomo keteech kooriik." 
Nehemiah7:5 Ki inde Kamuktaindennyo muguleldanyu ale ayum piik che taagunotiin ak pounik, kobooto piik, si kobiit ki it kobee tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto. Ki anyooru kitabuutap tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto ne po icheek che kisip kotogos, ak anyooru ko siraatiin eng' bukuinooto:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Chuuto piigap emet, che kiga kotogos kobunu ole kiga kiluulji. Chuuto che kiga luul Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon, che ki week kobwa Jerusalem ak Judah, ko uu ye ki wo chii tugul nganasennyi:" 
Nehemiah7:7 che kigabwa kobooto Zerubabel ak Jeshua, Nehemiah, Azariah, Raamya, Nahamani, Mordekai, Bilsan, Misperet, Bigbai, Nehum ak Baanah. Koitetap murenigap piigap Israel:" 
Nehemiah7:8 lagogap Paros ko ki piik eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol ak tamanwogik tisap ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:9 Lagogap Shepatiah ko ki pogol somok ak tamanwogik tisap ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:10 Lagogap Ara ko ki pogol lo ak konom ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:11 Lagogap Pahat-moap, eng' lagogap Jeshua ak Joab, ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol sisiit ak taman ak sisiit." 
Nehemiah7:12 Lagogap Elam ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak konom ak ang'wan. 
Nehemiah7:13 Lagogap Satu ko ki pogol sisiit ak artam ak muut. 
Nehemiah7:14 Lagogap Sakai ko ki pogol tisap ak tamanwogik lo. 
Nehemiah7:15 Lagogap Binui ko ki pogol lo ak artam ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:16 Lagogap Bebai ko ki pogol lo ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:17 Lagogap Askad ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak pogol somok ak tiptem ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:18 Lagogap Adonikam ko ki pogol lo ak tamanwogik lo ak tisap. 
Nehemiah7:19 Lagogap Bigbai ko ki eliphuusyek aeng' ak tamanwogik lo ak tisap. 
Nehemiah7:20 Lagogap Adin ko ki pogol lo ak konom ak muut. 
Nehemiah7:21 Lagogap Ater, che po Hezekiah, ko ki tamanwogik sogool ak sisiit." 
Nehemiah7:22 Lagogap Hasum ko ki pogol somok ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:23 Lagogap Besai ko ki pogol somok ak tiptem ak ang'wan. 
Nehemiah7:24 Lagogap Harip ko ki pogol ak taman ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:25 Lagogap Gibeon ko ki tamanwogik sogool ak muut. 
Nehemiah7:26 Piigap Bethlehem ak Netopa ko ki pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:27 Piigap Anatoth ko ki pogol ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:28 Piigap Bet-asmabet ko ki artam ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:29 Piigap Kiriath-Jearim, Kepira ak Beerot ko ki pogol tisap ak artam ak somok." 
Nehemiah7:30 Lagogap Ramah ak Geba ko ki pogol lo ak tiptem ak agenge. 
Nehemiah7:31 Piigap Mikmas ko ki pogol ak tiptem ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:32 Piigap Bethel ak Ai ko ki pogol ak tiptem ak somok. 
Nehemiah7:33 Piigap Nebo age ko ki konom ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:34 Lagogap Elam age ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak konom ak ang'wan. 
Nehemiah7:35 Lagogap Harim ko ki pogol somok ak tiptem. 
Nehemiah7:36 Lagogap Jeriko ko ki pogol somok ak artam ak muut. 
Nehemiah7:37 Lagogap Lod, Hadid, ak Ono, ko ki pogol tisap ak tiptem ak agenge." 
Nehemiah7:38 Lagogap Senaa ko ki eliphuusyek somok ak pogol sogool ak sosom. 
Nehemiah7:39 Tisiik: lagogap Jedaiah, che po kootap Jeshua, ko ki pogol sogool ak tamanwogik tisap ak somok." 
Nehemiah7:40 Lagogap Imer ko ki piik eliphuut agenge ak konom ak aeng'. 
Nehemiah7:41 Lagogap Pasur ko ki eliphuut agenge ak pogol aeng' ak artam ak tisap. 
Nehemiah7:42 Lagogap Harim ko ki eliphuut agenge ak taman ak tisap. 
Nehemiah7:43 Lawiik: lagogap Jeshua, che po Kadmiel, eng' lagogap Odeba ko ki tamanwogik tisap ak ang'wan." 
Nehemiah7:44 Tyeniik: lagogap Asaph ko ki pogol ak artam ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:45 Riibiigap kurgotik: lagogap Shallum, lagogap Ater, lagogap Talmon, lagogap Akub, lagogap Hatita, lagogap Sobai, ko ki pogol ak sosom ak sisiit." 
Nehemiah7:46 Otwogigap Hekaluut: lagogap Siha, lagogap Hasupa, lagogap Tabaot;" 
Nehemiah7:47 lagogap Keros, lagogap Sia, lagogap Padon;" 
Nehemiah7:48 lagogap Lebana, lagogap Hagaba, lagogap Salmai;" 
Nehemiah7:49 lagogap Hanan, lagogap Gidel, lagogap Gahar;" 
Nehemiah7:50 lagogap Reaiah, lagogap Rezin, lagogap Nekoda;" 
Nehemiah7:51 lagogap Gasam, lagogap Uzzah, lagogap Pasea;" 
Nehemiah7:52 lagogap Besai, lagogap Meunik, lagogap Neprusesik;" 
Nehemiah7:53 lagogap Bakbuk, lagogap Hakupa, lagogap Harur;" 
Nehemiah7:54 lagogap Baslit, lagogap Meida, lagogap Harsa;" 
Nehemiah7:55 lagogap Barkos, lagogap Sisera, lagogap Tema;" 
Nehemiah7:56 lagogap Nesia, ak lagogap Hatipa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Lagogap otwogigap Solomon: lagogap Sotai, lagogap Soperet, lagogap Perida;" 
Nehemiah7:58 lagogap Jaala, lagogap Darkon, lagogap Gidel;" 
Nehemiah7:59 lagogap Shepatiah, lagogap Hatil, lagogap Pokereth-hasebaim ak lagogap Ammon." 
Nehemiah7:60 Otwogigap Hekaluut tugul ak lagogap otwogigap Solomon, ko ki ek pogol somok ak tamanwogik sogool ak aeng'." 
Nehemiah7:61 Chu anyun che ki togos eng' Tel-mela, Tel-harsa, Kerub, Adon ak Imer; ago ki ma imuuch koboor kooriigap kwanisyekwak anan iyotennywa, ngo ki po Israel:" 
Nehemiah7:62 lagogap Delaiah, lagogap Tobia, lagogap Nekoda, ko ki pogol lo ak artam ak aeng'." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ak eng' tisiik: lagogap Hobaia, lagogap Hakos, lagogap Barsilai, ne ki itun chepto age eng' tiibiigap Barsilai Gileadindet ak ki kimwaitae kainennywa." 
Nehemiah7:64 Ki cheeng' chuuto kiit ne ki kisirchi kainaikwak, kobee tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto, ago ki ma nyoor: amu nooto anyun ki kiit keele ng'woneen ak ki kiistoe tiseinateet." 
Nehemiah7:65 Ki ng'at `Tirsata icheek kole manyolji koam tuguuk che tiliileen miising', kot kobiit tisiindet ne tinyei Urim ak Tumim." 
Nehemiah7:66 Ki ek tuiyet tugul eliphuusyek artam ak aeng' ak pogol somok ak tamanwogik lo," 
Nehemiah7:67 koma pooto otwogikwak che murenik ak che tiibiik, ki ek chooto eliphuusyek tisap ak pogol somok ak sosom ak tisap. Ki tinyei tyeniik che murenik ak kwonyiik pogol aeng' ak artam ak muut." 
Nehemiah7:68 Paraisisyekwak ko ki pogol tisap ak sosom ak lo, nyumbokwak ko ki pogol aeng' ak artam ak muut," 
Nehemiah7:69 tambeesik ko ki pogol ang'wan ak sosom ak muut ak sigiroik ko ki eliphuusyek lo ak pogol tisap ak tiptem. 
Nehemiah7:70 Kigon alak eng' kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek tuguugap poisyet. Kigon `Tirsata keruutik sisiit che po thahabu, taabook konom, ngoroigap tisiik pogol muut ak sosom, keip koba ole kigonoree tuguuk." 
Nehemiah7:71 Ak kigon kandoik alak che po kooriigap kwanisyek Keruutik pogol agenge ak tamanwogik lo ak sisiit che po thahabu ak keruutik eliphuut agenge pogol aeng' ak konom che po fedha, keip koba ole kigonoree tuguuk che po poisyet." 
Nehemiah7:72 Konunoigap piik tugul ko ki keruutik pogol agenge ak tamanwogik lo ak sisiit che po thahabu, ak keruutik pogol agenge ak artam che po fedha ak ngoroik tamanwogik lo ak tisap che po tisiik." 
Nehemiah7:73 Ki meny anyun nganasookwak tisiik, Lawiik, riibiigap kurgotik, tyeniik, piik alak, otwogigap Hekaluut ak Israel tugul. Kingo it arawet ne po tisap, ko ki mi piigap Israel nganasookwak." 
Nehemiah8:1 Ki iyumgei piik tugul ko uu chiichak eng' komosta ne paraa ne ki mi taitap ormariichetap peek. Ki leenji `pichooto Ezrah siriindet koip kitabuutap ng'atuutigap Musa, che kiga kong'atyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel." 
Nehemiah8:1 Ki iyumgei piik tugul ko uu chiichak eng' komosta ne paraa ne ki mi taitap ormariichetap peek. Ki leenji `pichooto Ezrah siriindet koip kitabuutap ng'atuutigap Musa, che kiga kong'atyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel." 
Nehemiah8:2 Eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap tisap, koip anyun `Ezra tisiindet Ng'atuutik kobwa taitap tuiyet ne ki mi murenik ak kwonyiik kobooto piik tugul che ki imuuchi kogas ak koguiyo." 
Nehemiah8:2 Eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawetap tisap, koip anyun `Ezra tisiindet Ng'atuutik kobwa taitap tuiyet ne ki mi murenik ak kwonyiik kobooto piik tugul che ki imuuchi kogas ak koguiyo." 
Nehemiah8:3 Kisoman ng'atuutichooto eng' taitap komosta ne paraa ne ki miitei taitap ormariichetap peek, kobooch karon agoi peet kween eng' taitap murenik ak kwonyiik, kobooto che ki imuuchi koguiyo. Ki epchi iit anyun piik tugul kitabuutap Ng'atuutik." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ki tonon Ezrah siriindet eng' komosta ne ki kiteege keetiik kotororit, ne kiga kiyachi poisyonooto. Ki tonondos eng' ye neegitee ineendet eng' komostap eunnyi ne po tai, Matitia, Shema, Anaia, Uriah, Hilkiah ak Maaseia. Kitonondos eng' komostap eunnyi ne po kaataam, Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkija, Hasum, Hasbadana, Zekariah ak Mesulam." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ki tonon Ezrah siriindet eng' komosta ne ki kiteege keetiik kotororit, ne kiga kiyachi poisyonooto. Ki tonondos eng' ye neegitee ineendet eng' komostap eunnyi ne po tai, Matitia, Shema, Anaia, Uriah, Hilkiah ak Maaseia. Kitonondos eng' komostap eunnyi ne po kaataam, Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkija, Hasum, Hasbadana, Zekariah ak Mesulam." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ki ng'aany `Ezra bukuinooto eng' taitap piik tugul (amu kimi ye toroor kosiir piik) ak kingo ng'aany bukuinooto kotononso piik tugul. 
Nehemiah8:5 Ki ng'aany `Ezra bukuinooto eng' taitap piik tugul (amu kimi ye toroor kosiir piik) ak kingo ng'aany bukuinooto kotononso piik tugul. 
Nehemiah8:6 Ki ilas `Ezra Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne oo ak ki wol piik tugul kole, “Amen, Ngo yaak ko uu nooto” konamjin parak eunekwak. Ak ki ing'uruukso kot kotiing'e togoochikwak ng'wony kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ki ilas `Ezra Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne oo ak ki wol piik tugul kole, “Amen, Ngo yaak ko uu nooto” konamjin parak eunekwak. Ak ki ing'uruukso kot kotiing'e togoochikwak ng'wony kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Nehemiah8:7 Kitooret piik koguiyo Ng'atuutik Lawiik: Jeshua, Bani, Serebia, Jamin, Akub, Sabetai, Hodia, Maaseia, Kelita, Azariah, Josabad, Hanan, Pelaiah, ak kitononso piik eng' komostanywa." 
Nehemiah8:8 Kisoman eng' bukuit kogasak komyee ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet, ak ki iarorchi, si koguiyo somanonooto." 
Nehemiah8:9 Ak ki leenji piik tugul `Nehemiah, ne ki pounindet ak Ezrah tisiindet ak ko siriindet kobooto Lawiik che ki ineeti piik, “Tiliil peetuuni eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindeng'wong', amoteeye anan oriirye.” Amu ki riirtos piik tugul, ye kigase ng'aleegap Ng'atuutik." 
Nehemiah8:9 Ak ki leenji piik tugul `Nehemiah, ne ki pounindet ak Ezrah tisiindet ak ko siriindet kobooto Lawiik che ki ineeti piik, “Tiliil peetuuni eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindeng'wong', amoteeye anan oriirye.” Amu ki riirtos piik tugul, ye kigase ng'aleegap Ng'atuutik." 
Nehemiah8:10 Koleenji icheek `Nehemiah, “Oba, oam che akwaen ak oee che anyiny ak oyookyi kebeberwek ineendet ne ma kichopchi kiy, amu tiliil peetuuni eng' Kiptaiyandennyo. Amoaragense, amu kimnateeng'wong' poiboiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Ki igaigai anyun `Lawiik piik tugul koleenji, “Osisye, amu tiliil peetuuni, amoaragense.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Ki pa piik tugul koamis, koeiso ak koyookto kebeberwek ak koboiboitu miising' amu kiga koguiyo ng'aleek che kiga kimwachi icheek." 
Nehemiah8:13 Eng' peetuut ne po aeng', koyumgei kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyegap piik tugul, Tisiik ak Lawiik, koyumjigei Ezrah siriindet, si kobiit koepchi iit ng'aleegap Ng'atuutik." 
Nehemiah8:13 Eng' peetuut ne po aeng', koyumgei kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyegap piik tugul, Tisiik ak Lawiik, koyumjigei Ezrah siriindet, si kobiit koepchi iit ng'aleegap Ng'atuutik." 
Nehemiah8:14 Ki nyoor kole ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutik ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Musa kole, kanyool komeny piigap Israel keryosyek eng' igoorto ne po arawetap tisap," 
Nehemiah8:15 ak kora kobarta ak komwaita icheek eng' nganasookwak tugul ak eng' Jerusalem kole, “Oba tulweet ak oibu mooriigap mseituni, che po mooriigap mseituni che po timiin, momonik, sosik ak mooriigap keetiik che nyigiisen, si keteege keryosyek, ko uu ye siraat.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Ki pa anyun piik, koip tuguuchooto ak koteekyinegei keryosyek, ki teech chii age tugul paragutap koonnyi, eng' seremusyekwak, eng' seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindet, eng' komosta ne paraa eng' ormariichetap peek ak eng' komosta ne paraa eng' ormariichetap Ephraim." 
Nehemiah8:17 Kiteekyigei keryosyek tuiyet tugul ne po piik che ki weeksei che kiga kiluul ak komeny keryosyechooto, amu kitom koyai piigap Israel ko uu nooto kobooch peetuusyegap Jeshua weeriitap Nun, ak ki piit poiboiyet ne oo." 
Nehemiah8:18 Kisoman kogeny peetuut age tugul bukuit ne po Ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet, kobooch peetuut ne po tai agoi peetuut ne po let. Ki yai igoorto peetuusyek tisap, ak eng' peetuutap sisiit koyai tuiyetap kaming'inetapkei, ko uu ye ki king'at." 
Nehemiah9:1 Ki iyumgei anyun Yahudik eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawanooto ak korugutkei, kolaachi kuniok ak kogeiilegei ng'ung'unyek." 
Nehemiah9:2 Ki itabaanegei `iyoteetap Israel toek tugul yeityo kotononso kong'aany tengekwogikwak ak tengekwogigap kwanisyekwak. 
Nehemiah9:3 Kitononso eng' komostanywa, kosoman bukuitap Ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennywa eng' kebeberta agenge ne po ang'wan ne po peetuut. Ki ng'aany tengekwogikwak eng' kebeberta age ne po ang'wan ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennywa." 
Nehemiah9:4 Yeityo kotononso eng' lang'eiywotap Lawiik: Jeshua, Bani, Kadmiel, Sebania, Buni, Serebia, Bani ak Kenani. Kowaakyo eng' kutit ne oo, kowaakyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennywa." 
Nehemiah9:5 Yeityo komwa Lawiik: Jeshua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hasabeneia, Serebia, Hodia, Sebania ak Petaia kole, “Otononie ak olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindeng'wong' kobooch koigeny agoi koigeny.” Ingoberuurok kaineng'ung' ne po toroornatet, ne itoroorot kosiir kaberuret tugul ak kalasunet." 
Nehemiah9:6 Ii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee inyegei; ki iyai kipsengwet, kipsengwet ne po kipsengwet kobooto tuguukwak tugul, ng'wony ak tuguuk tugul che mi olooto, nyanjosyek ak tuguuk tugul che miitei, ak iriibe tuguuchooto tugul ak kolasun lugeet tugul ne po kipsengwet." 
Nehemiah9:7 Ii Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ne ki ilewen Abram ak imutu ineendet komong' eng' Ur ne po Kaldeik ak igoochi ineendet kainet iguure Abraham." 
Nehemiah9:8 Ki igeer ile po iman muguleldanyi eng' taing'ung', ak oyomiskei ak ineendet igoochi ineendet emetap kanaanindet, Hitindet, Amorindet, Perisindet, Jebusindet ak Girgasindet, igoochi emonooto iyotennyi ak kaiyai ng'aleeguk kosulda, amu ii po iman." 
Nehemiah9:9 Ki igeer nyalilwogigap kwanisyekyok eng' Misiri, ak ki igas riirekwak eng' ye neegitee Araraita ne Piriir." 
Nehemiah9:10 Ki ibarte kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik eng' Pharaoh, ak otwogikyik tugul ak piik tugul che po emennyi, amu ki ingen ile ki inyaliil icheek eng' menoteet. Ki igoochigei kainet, nooto ne mi agoi rani." 
Nehemiah9:11 Ki ipchei nyanjet eng' tainnywa, si kobun icheek kwenutap nyanjet eng' emet ne yaamaat. Ki itoorchi piik che ki isubu icheek rirosyek, ko uu ye ki wiirchin koita peek che kiimeen." 
Nehemiah9:12 Ki indochi icheek kogeny peet eng' toloitap pooldet, ak indochi icheek kemoi eng' toloitap maat, kokweng'ji ooreet ne kanyool kobun." 
Nehemiah9:13 Ki ichoorchigei kogeny tulweetap Sinai, ak ing'alaalji icheek imi kipsengwet, ak igoochi icheek kirwoogutik che lititen, ng'atuutik che po iman, katigonutik che myach ak kayomisutik." 
Nehemiah9:14 Ki iboorchi icheek konai sabatoing'ung' ne tiliil ak ing'atyi icheek ng'atuutik ak katigonutik ak Ng'atuutyet, eng' eutap Musa otwogindeng'ung'," 
Nehemiah9:15 Eng' rubennywa, kogiigoochi amitwogik che punu kipsengwet, ak imoong'u peek eng' rwandet agobo icheek, amu meleldanywa, yeityo ing'at icheek koba konam emet kobunji, emet ne kiga iitoochi eung'ung' igoochi." 
Nehemiah9:16 Ago kiboisye icheek ak kwanisyekyok menoteet ak kouiit kaatinnywa ama kas iit ng'atuutiguk. 
Nehemiah9:17 Ki eesyo icheek kogas iit, amata kobwaat kwang'utiguk che ki iyai eng' kwenunnywa, ago ki iuiit kaatinnywa. Eng' ngelelnatennywa kogilewen kiptaiyannywa komut icheek koweekyigei otwoknateet eng' Misiri. Ago ii Kamuktaindet ne ichoboot inyochi kaat, ii myee ak itinye riirge, ii Kamuktaindet ne ma sip konereechi, ak itinye rireenet ne oo, ama imete icheek." 
Nehemiah9:18 Ee, agot ye kingo kagoyachigei moita ne kitanyi, ak komwa kole ni ko Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne ki imutun imong'u eng' Misiri, anan ye kingo yai tagisyosyek che eecheen," 
Nehemiah9:19 koma imete icheek eng' surkwen amu rireenosyeguk che chaang'. Ma istoegei paragunnywa peet toloitap pooldet si kondochi icheek eng' ooreet. Ama istoegei icheek toloita ne po maat kemoi, si koboorchi icheek lapkeiyet ak ooreet ne kanyool kobun." 
Nehemiah9:20 Ki igoochi kogeny icheek Kabuuseng'ung' ne myee koneet, ama ietee icheek koam mana, ak inage peek amu meleldanywa." 
Nehemiah9:21 Ee, ki ibai icheek eng' surkwen kenyiisyek artam, ki ma rarchi kiy icheek; ma osegitu ngoroikwak, ama ibwanso keelyekwak." 
Nehemiah9:22 Ki igoochi kogeny icheek laitornatosyek ak pororyosyek che ki ipchechi icheek kobee kebeberwekwak. Ki nam icheek anyun emetap Sihon, emetap laitoryatap Hesbon ak emetap Og laitoryatap Bashan kobunji." 
Nehemiah9:23 Kogeny, ko ki ites lagokwak kotenit kecheigap kipsengwet ak imutu icheek kobwa emonooto kiga ileenji kwanisyekwak koba konam kobunji." 
Nehemiah9:24 Ki pa anyun lagochooto ak konam emet kobunji, ak iterteer eng' tainnywa piigap emonooto. Chooto ko ki Kanaanik ak inde icheek eunekwak kobooto laitorinikwak ak piigap emet, si koyachi icheek ko uu ye machei." 
Nehemiah9:25 Ki nam `icheek nganasook che ng'ootaatiin, emet ne akwai, kooriik che nyiitootiin tuguuk tugul che myachen, ak keriingonik che ki kibal, mbareenigap sabibuk, mbareenigap mseituni ak keetiik ng'iisyat che po logoek. Ki am anyun ak kibiyong'so. Kineryo ak ki igaskei eng' myeeindong'ung' ne oo." 
Nehemiah9:26 Ago ma kasin iit ak ki ingeleljin. Ki wiirta Ng'atuutiguk kotuktoochi patai ak kobar maotiguk che kibaoryanji, icheek kole koweech icheek kobwanjin, ak koyai tagisyosyek che eecheen." 
Nehemiah9:27 Nooto anyun, ki inde icheek eunegap puunikwak, che kiim icheek. Ago eng' peetuusyegap nyalildanywa, koriirchin. Ki igas eng' kipsengwet, ak ko uu eng' rireenosyeguk che chaang', ko ki igoochi icheek saruunik che ki sar icheek eng' eunegap puunikwak." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ago kingo kagomuuny, koyai yaityet kogeny eng' taing'ung'. Ki ibagakyi anyun eunegap puunikwak, si kobiit koboi icheek. Ago ye kingo week ak koriirchin, igas eng' kipsengwet, ak ki isaru icheek konyil che chaang' ko uu rireenosyeguk." 
Nehemiah9:29 Ki ibaoryanji icheek itigon, ile imutyi kogeny Ng'atuutyeng'ung', ago kiboisyee icheek menoteet, ama kas iit ng'atuutiguk, ago ki yai tengekto kongelelji kirwoogutiguk (che ngot koriip chii age tugul kosabe). Kilit oliin ak kouiit kaatinnywa ama cham kogas." 
Nehemiah9:30 Ki imuitoochi icheek eng' kenyiisyek che chaang'. Ki iteechine icheek Kabuuseng'ung' kobun maotiguk, ago ma cham kogas. Ara ki inde anyun icheek eunegap piigap emotinwek." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ago eng' rireenosyeguk che chaang' koma igeesu icheek anan imete, amu ii Kamuktaindet ne po myeeindo, ak itinye rireenet ne oo." 
Nehemiah9:32 Ara anyun Kamuktaindennyo ne oo ne po kamuktaet, ak ko Kamuktaindet ne po kwong'eet, ne riibei arorutyet ak rireenetapkei, amat igeer ile kiy ne ming'in, ng'wanindo tugul ne kaityech ak laitorinikyok, pounikyok, tisiikyok, maotikyok, kwanisyekyok ak piiguk tugul kobooch eng' peetuusyegap laitorinigap Assyria agoi rani." 
Nehemiah9:33 Ago ii po iman eng' tuguuk tugul che ki kobwanjech, amu ki iyai ne po iman, ago ki keyai ne ya:" 
Nehemiah9:34 ama riip laitorinikyok kobooto pounikyok, tisiikyok anan kwanisyekyok Ng'atuutyeng'ung', ama kas iit ng'atuutiguk ak paornatosyeguk che ki ibaoryan agobo icheek." 
Nehemiah9:35 Amu ma otin eng' laitornatennywa ak eng' myeeindong'ung' ne oo ne ki igoochi ak eng' emet ne paraa ak ko akwai ne ki igoochi eng' tainnywa ama meto poisyonikwak che yaacheen. 
Nehemiah9:36 Keero, ki otwogik rani ak eng' emet ne ki igoochi kwanisyekyok koam logoekyik ak myeeindonyi. Keero, ki otwogik eng' emoniito." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ak rurei emoniito miising' korurchin laitorinik che ki inde koboiywech amu tengekwogikyok. Tinyei kogeny kimnateet koboi poorwekyok, kobooto tuukyok, ko uu ye machei ak kimi pichiindo ne oo." 
Nehemiah9:38 Agot eng' chooto tugul ko kagiyai arorutyet ne kiim, ak keesir, ak kong'ooch pounikyok ak Lawikyok ak tisiikyok." 
Nehemiah10:1 Chu anyun che king'ooch: Pouninindet Nehemiah, weeriitap Hakalia ak Zedekiah," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pasur, Amariah, Malkija," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatus, Sebania, Maluk," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harim, Meremot, Obadiah," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harim, Meremot, Obadiah," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Gineton, Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Gineton, Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulam, Abijah, Mijamin," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maasia, Bilgai ak Semaiah: ki tisiik chuuto tugul." 
Nehemiah10:9 Lawiik ko ki: Jeshua, weeriitap Asania, Binui ne po weeriigap Henadad, Kadmiel," 
Nehemiah10:10 ak tupchosyekwak, Sebania, Hodia, Kelita, Pelaiah, Hanan," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mikah, Rehob, Hasabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Sakur, Serebia, Sebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia, Bani ak Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Kandoigap piik ko ki: Paros, Pahat-moap, Elam, Satu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Askad, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonijah, Bigbai, Adin," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ater, Hezekiah, Ashur," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia, Asum, Besai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Arib, Anatoth, Nobai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magpias, Mesulam, Hesir," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mesesabel, Zadok, Jadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatiah, Anan, Anaia," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoshea, Hananiah, Hasub," 
Nehemiah10:24 Haloes, Pila, Sobek," 
Nehemiah10:25 Reum, Hasabna, Maaseia," 
Nehemiah10:26 ak Ahia, Hanan, Anan," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluk, Harim ak Baanah." 
Nehemiah10:28 Piik chuun alak: tisiik, Lawiik, riibiigap kurgotik, tyeniik, otwogigap Hekaluut ak tugul che kiga kotabaanegei piigap emotinwek, kotabaanjigei Ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet kobooto osotikwak, weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak, chii tugul ne ki tinyei naet ak kaguiyet,"
