Nehemiah10:29 koginamgei ak tupchosyekwak, piikwak che taagunotiin ak ki iyasyo eng' chubisyet ak kayasyoet, kole kobendatee ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet che ki kigoon eng' Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet. Ki iyasyo koriip ak koyai kayomisutik tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kiptaiyandennyo, kobooto kirwoogutikyik ak katigonutikyik." 
Nehemiah10:30 Ki le ma kigoochini tiibiikyok piigap emet anan kotun weeriikyok tiibiikwak. 
Nehemiah10:31 Ak ngot koip piigap emet, tuguuk che ki aldoi anan ko amitwogik eng' peetuutap sabato kole koalda, koma ki ale eng' peetuutap sabato anan ko eng' peetuut ne itabaanat. Ki metoi kenyiitap tisap ak kemete yaaksetap pesendo age tugul." 
Nehemiah10:32 Ki kiyachigei anyun ng'atuutik keele kigoite eng' kenyiit age tugul kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po shekel kobunji otisyetap kootap Kamuktaindennyo," 
Nehemiah10:33 che po magatinigap kabartaet, che po kagoochinet ne po kotugul ne po peek, kagoochinet ne po kotugul ne kibeelei, che po sabatoisyek ak che po ye kaleel arawet, che po igoorwek che ki king'at, che po tuguuk che itabaanatiin ak che po kagoochinoigap tengekto, si keyachine Israel kagaigaet ak che po poisyet tugul ne po kootap Kamuktaindennyo." 
Nehemiah10:34 Ki kiseer acheek parbareek, kobooto tisiik, Lawiik ak piik, agobo kagoochinetap kweenik, si kobiit keip kobwa kootap Kamuktaindennyo, ko uu kooriigap kwanisyekyok, eng' peetuusyek che ki king'at eng' kenyiit age tugul, si kebeel eng' kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ko uu ye siraat eng' Ng'atuutik." 
Nehemiah10:35 Ki kimwa kora keele keibu tongoanigap mbareenikyok ak tongoanigap logoek tugul che po keetiik alak tugul eng' kenyiit age tugul kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Nehemiah10:36 Ko uu ye siraat eng' Ng'atuutik, kimutu kogeny kiboretook che po weeriikyok ak kegetu che twatei tuukyok, ak che po akwotisyekyok, che po akwotisyegap keechiirekyok kobwa kootap Kamuktaindennyo, ole mi tisiik che poisyei eng' kootap Kamuktaindennyo." 
Nehemiah10:37 Ki ibuu magatiinik che tuonen che po tongoanik, kagoochinoikyok che kinamjin parak, logoegap keetiik alak tugul, divaik ak mwanik kobwa ole mi tisiik agoi kooriik che po oriit che po kootap Kamuktaindennyo. Ki ipchini Lawiik kebeberwegap taman che po tuguugap mbareenikyok, amu iyumi Lawiik kebeberwegap taman che po kabatisyennyo eng' nganasook tugul." 
Nehemiah10:38 Ak magaat komi tisiindet weeriitap Aron kobooto Lawiik, ye iyumi Lawiik kebeberwegap taman. Ibu Lawiik kebebertap taman ne po kebeberwegap taman kobwa kootap Kamuktaindennyo; ibu agoi kooriik che po oriit che kigonoree tuguuk." 
Nehemiah10:39 Ibu anyun piigap Israel ak lagogap Lawi kagoochinet ne kinamjin parak ne po peek, ne po divaik ak mwanik, kobwa kooriik che po oriit, ole mi tuguuk che po ole-tiliil ak tebee tisiik che poisyei, riibiigap kurgotik ak tyeniik. Ma kibagaaktoi kootap Kamuktaindennyo." 
Nehemiah11:1 Ki meny anyun Jerusalem `kandoigap piik, ak ki iseer parbareek piik che ki ng'et si komut kebeberta agenge eng' taman ne po piik komeny Jerusalem, nganaseet ne tiliil ak kebeberwek sogool eng' taman ne po piik, komeny nganasook alak." 
Nehemiah11:2 Ki iberuur piik murenik tugul che ki igoitogei eng' chamyet komeny Jerusalem. 
Nehemiah11:3 Chu ko piik che eecheen che po emotinwek che ki meny Jerusalem, ago ki meny chii tugul komostanyi eng' nganasoogap Judah eng' nganasookwak, chooto ko ki Israel, tisiik, Lawiik, otwogigap Hekaluut ak lagogap otwogigap Solomon." 
Nehemiah11:4 Ak ki meny Jerusalem alak eng' lagogap Judah ak eng' lagogap Benjamin. Che po lagogap Judah ko ki Ataia weeriitap Uzziah, weeriitap Zekariah, weeriitap Amariah, weeriitap Shepatiah, weeriitap Mahalalel, ne po lagogap Peres;" 
Nehemiah11:5 ak Maaseia weeriitap Baruk, weeriitap Kolhose, weeriitap Hasaia, weeriitap Adaiah, weeriitap Joiarib, weeriitap Zekariah, weeriitap Silonindet." 
Nehemiah11:6 Ki ek weeriik tugul che po Peres che ki menyei Jerusalem pogol ang'wan ak tamanwogik lo ak sisiit, murenik che nyigoonen." 
Nehemiah11:7 Eng' weeriigap Benjamin: Salu weeriitap Mesulam, weeriitap Joed, weeriitap Pedaiah, weeriitap Kolaia, weeriitap Maaseia, weeriitap Itiel, weeriitap Jesaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Kirubei ineendet Gabia, Salai. Ki piik pogol sogool ak tiptem ak sisiit." 
Nehemiah11:9 Ki pounindennywa Joel weeriitap Zikri, ak ki ne po aeng' ne ki pou nganaseet Judah weeriitap Hasenuah." 
Nehemiah11:9 Ki pounindennywa Joel weeriitap Zikri, ak ki ne po aeng' ne ki pou nganaseet Judah weeriitap Hasenuah." 
Nehemiah11:10 Che po tisiik ko ki: Jedaiah weeriitap Joiarib, Jakin," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraiah weeriitap Hilkiah, weeriitap Mesulam, weeriitap Zadok, weeriitap Meraiot, weeriitap Ahitub, pounindetap kootap Kamuktaindet," 
Nehemiah11:12 ak tupchosyekwak che ki yai poisyetap koot, ko ki piik pogol sisiit ak tiptem ak aeng'; ak Adaiah weeriitap Jeroham, weeriitap Pelalia, weeriitap Amsi, weeriitap Zekariah, weeriitap Pasur, weeriitap Malkija," 
Nehemiah11:13 ak tupchosyekyik, che eecheen che po kooriigap kwanisyek, ko ki piik pogol aeng' ak artam ak aeng'. Amashai weeriitap Asarel, weeriitap Asai, weeriitap Meshillemoth, weeriitap Imer," 
Nehemiah11:14 ak tupchosyekwak, murenik che kiimeen che nyigoonen, ko ki pogol ak tiptem ak sisiit, ak ki pounindennywa Sabdiel, weeriitap Hagedolim." 
Nehemiah11:15 Che po Lawiik ko ki Semaiah weeriitap Hasub, weeriitap Asrikam, weeriitap Hasabia, weeriitap Buni," 
Nehemiah11:16 ak Sabetai, Josabad, che po che eecheen eng' Lawiik, che ki pou poisyetap saang' ne po kootap Kamuktaindet," 
Nehemiah11:17 ak Mattaniah weeriitap Mikah, weeriitap Sabdi, weeriitap Asaph, ne ki ne oo ne ki tau komwaei kongoi eng' saaet, Bakbukia, ne po aeng' eng' tupchosyekyik ak Abda weeriitap Samua, weeriitap Galal, weeriitap Jeduthun." 
Nehemiah11:18 Lawiik tugul che ki mi nganaseet ne tiliil ko ki pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik sisiit ak ang'wan. 
Nehemiah11:19 Kogeny, kibogol ak tamanwogik tisap ak aeng' riibiigap kurgotik, chooto ko ki: Akub, Talmon ak tupchosyekwak tugul che kiriipsei eng' ormariichok." 
Nehemiah11:20 Ak che ki ng'et che po Israel, eng' Tisiik ak Lawiik, ko ki mi nganasook tugul che po Judah, chii age tugul eng' ole mi porotennyi." 
Nehemiah11:21 Ago ki meny otwogigap Hekaluut Ophel. Ki pou otwogichooto po Hekaluut Siha ak Gispa. 
Nehemiah11:22 Ki pounindetap Lawiik eng' Jerusalem Usi weeriitap Bani, weeriitap Hasabia, weeriitap Mattaniah, weeriitap Mikah, ne po weeriigap Asaph, tyeniik, che ki pou poisyet ne po kootap Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah11:23 Amu kimi ng'atuutyet ne king'atyi icheek laitoryat, ak tuguuk che ki kichopchi tyeniik, che yamei peetuut age tugul." 
Nehemiah11:24 Petaia weeriitap Mesesabel, ne po lagogap Zerah weeriitap Judah, ko kitoretindetap laitoryat eng' ng'aleek tugul che po piik." 
Nehemiah11:25 Eng' nganasook kobooto mbareenikwak, kogimenyei alak eng' lagogap Judah, Kiriath-arba ak nganasookyik, eng' Dibon ak nganasookyik, eng' Jekabseel ak nganasookyik," 
Nehemiah11:26 eng' Jeshua, eng' Molada ak Beth-pelet," 
Nehemiah11:27 ak eng' Hasar-sual, eng' Beer-sheba ak nganasookyik," 
Nehemiah11:28 eng' Ziklag, eng' Mekono ak nganasookyik," 
Nehemiah11:29 eng' En-rimon, eng' Sora, eng' Jarmut," 
Nehemiah11:30 Sanoa ak Adulam ak nganasookwak, Lakish ak mbareenikyik, Aseka ak nganasookyik. Ki meny anyun kobooch Beer-sheba agoi atebweetap Hinom." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ki meny lagogap Benjamin ak icheek kobooch Geba ak kwo tai, eng' Mikmas ak Ahija, ak eng' Bethel ak nganasookyik;" 
Nehemiah11:32 eng' Anatoth, Nob, Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hasor, Ramah, Gitaim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadid, Seboim, Nebalat," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod ak Ono ak atebweetap musogik. 
Nehemiah11:36 Ki iyomogei ak Benjamin, Lawiik alage che po Judah." 
Nehemiah12:1 Chu anyun ko Tisiik ak Lawiik che kitogosta kobooto Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel ak Jeshua: Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezrah," 
Nehemiah12:1 Chu anyun ko Tisiik ak Lawiik che kitogosta kobooto Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel ak Jeshua: Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezrah," 
Nehemiah12:1 Chu anyun ko Tisiik ak Lawiik che kitogosta kobooto Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel ak Jeshua: Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezrah," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amariah, Maluk, Hatus," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekaneiah, Reum, Meremot," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginetoi, Abijah," 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamin, Maadia, Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaiah, Joiarib, Jedaiah," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amok, Hilkiah, Jedaiah. Chuuto ko ki che eecheen eng' tisiik ak che po tupchosyekwak eng' peetuusyegap Jeshua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Lawiik ko ki: Jeshua, Binui, Kadmiel, Serebia, Judah, ak Mattaniah ne ki pou kagoitoetap kongoi, ineendet kobooto tupchosyekyik." 
Nehemiah12:9 Kitokyindos ak icheeget eng' riipsosyekwak tupchosyekwak Bakbukia ak Uno. 
Nehemiah12:10 Ki sich `Jeshua Joiakim ak kosich Joiakim Eliasib, kosich Eliasib Joiada," 
Nehemiah12:11 kosich Joiada Jonathan, kosich Jonathan Jadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Eng' peetuusyegap Joiakim, ko ki kandoigap kooriigap tisiik chu: ne po Seraiah ko Meraia, ne po Jeremiah ko Hananiah," 
Nehemiah12:12 Eng' peetuusyegap Joiakim, ko ki kandoigap kooriigap tisiik chu: ne po Seraiah ko Meraia, ne po Jeremiah ko Hananiah," 
Nehemiah12:13 ne po Ezrah ko Mesulam, ne po Amariah ko Jeohanan;" 
Nehemiah12:13 ne po Ezrah ko Mesulam, ne po Amariah ko Jeohanan;" 
Nehemiah12:14 ne po Maluki ko Jonathan, ne po Zephaniah ko Joseph," 
Nehemiah12:14 ne po Maluki ko Jonathan, ne po Zephaniah ko Joseph," 
Nehemiah12:15 ne po Harim ko Adna, ne po Meraiot ko Helkai," 
Nehemiah12:16 ne po Ido ko Zekariah, ne po Gineton ko Mesulam;" 
Nehemiah12:17 ne po Abijah ko Zikri, ne po Miniamin, ne po Moadia ko Piltai," 
Nehemiah12:18 ne po Bilga ko Samua, ne po Semaiah ko Jeonatan," 
Nehemiah12:19 ne po Joiarib ko Matenai, ne po Jedaiah ko Usi," 
Nehemiah12:20 ne po Salai ko Kalai, ne po Amok ko Eber," 
Nehemiah12:21 ne po Hilkai ko Hasabia, ne po Jedaiah ko Nethanel." 
Nehemiah12:22 Kandoigap Lawiik che ki kisir eng' peetuusyegap koek kandoigap kooriikwak ko, Eliasib, Joiada, Johanan ak Jadua. Ki kisir tisiik ak icheek eng' laitornatetap Darius Persianindet." 
Nehemiah12:23 Ki kisirchi bukuitap ateptap peetuusyek, weeriigap Lawiik, kandoigap kooriigap kwanisyek, agoi peetuusyegap Johanan weeriitap Eliasib." 
Nehemiah12:24 Ki che eecheen che po Lawiik ko ki Hasabia, Serebia ak Jeshua weeriitap Kadmiel kobooto tupchosyekwak che kitokyindos ak icheeget, si kolas ak komwaei kongoi, kowaljingei ko uu eng' ng'atuutyetap Daudi chiitap Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah12:25 Che ki riibiigap kurgotik ko: Mattaniah, Bakbukia, Obadiah, Mesulam, Talmon ak Akub. Chuuto che kiriipsei eng' chogenigap ormariichok." 
Nehemiah12:25 Che ki riibiigap kurgotik ko: Mattaniah, Bakbukia, Obadiah, Mesulam, Talmon ak Akub. Chuuto che kiriipsei eng' chogenigap ormariichok." 
Nehemiah12:26 Ki mi chuuto eng' peetuusyegap Joiakim weeriitap Jeshua, weeriitap Josadak, eng' peetuusyegap Nehemiah pounindet ak eng' peetuusyegap Ezrah tisiindet ak ko siriindet." 
Nehemiah12:26 Ki mi chuuto eng' peetuusyegap Joiakim weeriitap Jeshua, weeriitap Josadak, eng' peetuusyegap Nehemiah pounindet ak eng' peetuusyegap Ezrah tisiindet ak ko siriindet." 
Nehemiah12:27 Eng' peetuut ne ki kitabaane irimeetap Jerusalem, ko ki kicheeng' Lawiik eng' komoswekwak tugul ak kimut kobwa Jerusalem si koyai katabaanisyet eng' poiboiyet, kobooto mwaetap kongoi, eng' tyendo ak eng' sanisyegap sugunonik che kibirei, kibugandinik ak eng' ketubosyek." 
Nehemiah12:28 Ki iyumgei ak icheek weeriigap tyeniik kobunu warenget ne kiyiem Jerusalem ak nganasoogap Netopatik. 
Nehemiah12:29 Ki pun kogeny Beth-gilgal ak mbareenigap Geba ak Asmabet. Amu kiga koteekyigei tyeniik nganasook koyiem Jerusalem. 
Nehemiah12:30 Ye kingo kagoanyinygei Tisiik ak Lawiik, koanyiny anyun piik, ormariichok ak irimeet." 
Nehemiah12:31 Yeityo amutu pounigap Judah kobwa irimeet parak ak alewen kweanaik aeng' che eecheen che mwaei kongoi ak koba kotendeen. Ki wo kweanet agenge komostap eutap tai kobun irimeet kotokyigei ormariichetap ng'atateek. 
Nehemiah12:32 Ki isup icheek Hosaia ak kebebertap pounigap Judah," 
Nehemiah12:33 ak Azariah, Ezrah, Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:33 ak Azariah, Ezrah, Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:34 Judah, Benjamin, Semaiah, Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah12:34 Judah, Benjamin, Semaiah, Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah12:35 ak alak eng' weeriigap tisiik kotinyei iryagook. Chooto ko Zekariah weeriitap Jonathan, weeriitap Semaiah, weeriitap Mattaniah, weeriitap Mikaia, weeriitap Sakur, weeriitap Asaph," 
Nehemiah12:36 ak tupchosyekyik, Semaiah, Asarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah ak Hanani, kotinyei kibugandinik che po Daudi chiitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki indoe icheek Ezrah siriindet." 
Nehemiah12:36 ak tupchosyekyik, Semaiah, Asarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah ak Hanani, kotinyei kibugandinik che po Daudi chiitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak ki indoe icheek Ezrah siriindet." 
Nehemiah12:37 Ki togostae ye neegitee ormariichetap kondametut, ak koba panda ne litit, kobun lang'eiywotap nganaseetap Daudi eng' ye kitogostoe eng' irimeet, kosiir kootap Daudi kot koit ormariichetap peek eng' komostap kong'asiis." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ak ki wo kweanet age ne po pichooto che kimwaei kongoi, kotorookta icheek ak ki asup icheek, kobooto kebeberta ne po piik eng' irimeet parak kobun teekseet ne kooi parak ne po mastinwek che eecheen agoi irimeet ne tebees." 
Nehemiah12:39 Ki pun paragutap ormariichetap Ephraim ak ormariichet ne oos, ormariichetap njireenik, teekseet ne kooi ne po Hananel ak teekseet ne kooi ne po Hamea, agoi ormariichetap keechiirek. Kitononso icheek eng' ormariichetap riibiik." 
Nehemiah12:40 Ki tononso anyun kweanaichooto tuwai che po icheeget che kimwaei kongoi eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ak ki kimi tugul ak icheek kobooto kebeberta ne po pounik," 
Nehemiah12:41 tisiik, Eliakim, Maaseia, Miniamin, Mikaia, Elioenai, Zekariah, ak Hananiah, che ki tinyei iryagook," 
Nehemiah12:42 ak Maaseia, Semaiah, Eleazar, Usi, Jeohanan, Malkija, Elam ak Eser. Kityeni tyeniik eng' kutit ne oo, kondochin Jesraia kandoindennywa." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ak ki igoito peetuunooto tiseiywek che eecheen ak koboiboitu, amu ki igoochi Kamuktaindet icheek koboiboitu eng' poiboiyet ne oo. Kiboiboitu ak icheek kwonyiik ak lagok, kot kegasune poiboiyetap Jerusalem ole loo." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ki kilewen eng' peetuunooto piik koriip kooriik che po oriit ole kigonoree tuguuk, kagoochinoik che kinamjin parak, tongoanik ak kebeberwegap taman. Kiyumji koorchooto kobee mbareenik che po nganasook, kebeberwek che ki king'at eng' ng'atuutyet kobunji Tisiik ak Lawiik, amu ki paibait Judah agobo Tisiik ak Lawiik che kiboisyei." 
Nehemiah12:45 Kitononji riipseetap Kamuktaindennywa ak riipseetap kaanyinyet. Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto tyeniik ak riibiik ko uu ng'atuutyetap Daudi ak ne po Solomon weeriinnyi. 
Nehemiah12:46 Amu kobooch peetuusyegap Daudi ak Asaph, ko ki mi chiito ne oo ne po tyeniik ak kimi tyenwogigap kalasunet ak kagoitoetap kongoi ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah12:47 Ara anyun ki igoito `Israel tugul kebeberwegap tyeniik ak che po riibiigap kurgotik eng' peetuusyegap Zerubabel ak eng' peetuusyegap Nehemiah, ko uu che yamei peetuut age tugul. Ki itabaanji `piik Lawiik, ak ki itabaanji `Lawiik ak icheek weeriigap Aron." 
Nehemiah13:1 Kingesoman eng' peetuunooto bukuitap Musa kogas piik, ko ki kinyoor ng'aleek che ki kisir keele machutei Amonindet ak Moabindet tuiyetap Kamuktaindet koigeny," 
Nehemiah13:2 amu ki ma toroogune piigap Israel amitwogik ak peek. Machutei amu ki igoochi Balaam melekto kogirinda icheek ak kochupto icheek, ago ki wal Kamuktaindennyo chubisyet koek kaberuret." 
Nehemiah13:3 Kingo kas icheek Ng'atuutyet, koisto tuiyet tugul piik che salu pororyosyek alak komang'une Yahudik." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ye ki tomo koyaak ng'olyoondoniito, ko kiga kochop Eliasib tisiindet ne kiga kilewen koboi kooriik che po oriit che po koot ne oo ne po Kamuktaindennyo. Kichopchi ineendet Tobia ne kitilyanut" 
Nehemiah13:5 koot ne ki kigonoree kobooch keny kagoochinoik che po peek che ng'ootiin, tuguuk che nyamdut, tereenik, kebeberwegap taman che po peek, che po divaik ak che po mwanichooto ki mwa ng'atuutik kole kigoochi Lawiik, tyeniik ak riibiigap kurgotik, ak kagoochinoigap tisiik." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ago eng' peetuusyechooto tugul kitesei tai ng'aleechu, ko ki ma ami Jerusalem, amu kigawe kaplaitoryat eng' kenyiitap sosom ak aeng' ne po Artaserses laitoryatap Babilon, ak kingo pata peetuusyek alak asoom laitoryat kochamwo awo." 
Nehemiah13:7 Ki anyoo Jerusalem ak agas yaityet ne kiga koyai Eliasib agobo Tobia, amu kichopchi ineendet koot ne po oriit eng' seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ki koono niito aaragen miising'. Ki awirte anyun komanda eng' koyooto po oriit tuguuk tugul che po kootap Tobia. 
Nehemiah13:9 Yeityo ang'at kitiliil koorichooto po oriit. Ki aip kogeny tuguugap kootap Kamuktaindet koba yooto, kobooto kagoochinoigap peek che ng'ootiin ak tuguuk che nyamdut." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ki anai ale ma kigoochi Lawiik kebeberwekwak, amu nooto anyun, ko kiga komwei age tugul kwo mbareennyi eng' Lawiik ak tyeniik che kiyaei poisyet." 
Nehemiah13:11 Ki ager kong' anyun pounik aleenji, “Amu nee si kebagaakta kootap Kamuktaindet?” Ak ki ayum tugul che kiga komweiso ak ande icheek komostanywa." 
Nehemiah13:12 Ki ip anyun Judah tugul kebeberwegap taman che po peek ak che po divaik ak che po mwanik, konde ole kigonoree tuguuk." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ki ande riibiik koriip ole kigonoree tuguuk, Selemya tisiindet, Zadok siriindet, ak eng' Lawiik ko Pedaiah. Kirubei icheek Hanan weeriitap Sakur, weeriitap Mattaniah amu ki kiit keele piik che kiyani ak ki poisyennywa ko kopchechi tupchosyekwak tuguuk." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ibwaata, ee Kamuktaindennyu agobo ng'olyoondoniito, amat ibuch poisyonikyuk che myach che ki ayai agobo kootap Kamuktaindennyu ak poisyonikyik." 
Nehemiah13:15 Ki ageer eng' peetuusyechooto eng' Judah alak che kityechei sabibuk eng' ole kituisye eng' peetuutap sabato, koibu ratuutigap peek che karatyi sigiroik. Ki yai ko uu nooto eng' divaik, sabibuk, logoegap mogoonik ak lautik alak tugul che ki ibu kobwa Jerusalem eng' peetuutap sabato. Ki ager kong' icheek eng' peetuunooto mat koalda amitwogik." 
Nehemiah13:16 Kimenyei olooto piigap Tyro ak icheek che ki ibu njireenik ak tuguuk alak tugul che po mung'aaret, si koaldochi lagogap Judah eng' peetuutap sabato eng' Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah13:17 Yeityo ager kong' piik che taagunotiin che po Judah, aleenji icheek, “Nee yaityoni oyae, ong'eme peetuutap sabato?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Tos ki ma yai ko uu nooto kwanisyekwok ak tos ki ma ibwech Kamuktaindennyo yaityoni tugul ak nganasani? Ang'ni ra koipchi Israel nereegek che siirei eng' ng'emetap sabato.” 
Nehemiah13:19 Ye kingo mach koimen eng' ormariichogap Jerusalem ye kitom koit sabato, ang'at keger ormariichok ak ang'at ale ma kiyatei kot kogeskei sabato. Ki ande otwogikyuk alak koriip ormariichok si ma ki ip konyo oriit lautyet age tugul eng' peetuutap sabato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Ki tebee anyun saang'utap Jerusalem konyil agenge anan aeng' chemung'arainik ak che aldoi tuguuk alak tugul che po mung'aaret. 
Nehemiah13:21 Ki awagee icheek aleenji, “Amu nee si otebee ole neegitee irimeet? Ngot kota oyai ko uu no kogeny, anamok.” Kobooch peetuunooto ko mata kobwa icheek eng' peetuutap sabato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ki ang'at Lawiik koanyinygei ak kobwa koriip ormariichok, kotabaan peetuutap sabato. “Ibwaata, ee Kamuktaindennyu, agobo ng'olyoondoniito agine, ak iriirena ko uu ooindap rireeneng'ung'.”" 
Nehemiah13:23 Ki ageer kogeny eng' peetuusyechooto Yahudik che kiga kotun tiibiigap Ashdod, che po Ammon ak che po Moab." 
Nehemiah13:24 Ki ng'alaali kebeber eng' lagokwak ng'aleegap Asdodik anan ko kutusweegap pororyennywa amu ki ma komuuchi kong'alaal kutitap Yahudik. 
Nehemiah13:25 Ki ager kong' icheek ak achup, abir alak eng' icheek ak ang'ei sumekwak, yeityo abirchi icheek koyasyo eng' Kamuktaindet aleenji, “Amat ogoochi tiibiikwok weeriikwak anan otunji weeriikwok tiibiikwak anan otun okweeget." 
Nehemiah13:26 Tos ki ma yai tengek Solomon laitoryatap Israel eng' tuguuchu? Nganda ki ma komi laitoryat ne uu ineendet eng' pororyosyek che chaang' ak ki chamat eng' Kamuktaindennyi, ak ki inde `Kamuktaindet ineendet koek laitoryat koboi Israel tugul; ko ki igoochi tiibiigap pororyosyek alak ineendet koyai tengekto." 
Nehemiah13:27 Tos kigasak iit anyun ak keyai yaityoni oo tugul, kingelelji Kamuktaindennyo kitun tiibiigap pororyosyek alak?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Ki saania eng' kap Sanbalat Horonindet age eng' weeriigap Joiada, weeriitap Eliasib tisiindet ne oo. Ki aoon anyun ineendet kwo eng' ole ami." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ibwaat icheek, ee Kamuktaindennyu, amu ki kong'waniit tiseinateet, ak kayomisutyetap tiseinateet ak ne po Lawiik." 
Nehemiah13:30 Ki aanyiny Tisiik ak Lawiik anyun eng' piigap pororyosyek tugul, ak ang'at poisyonikwak si koyai age tugul poisyennyi." 
Nehemiah13:31 Ki ang'at tuguuk che po kagoochinetap kweenik ak che po tongoanik keip eng' peetuusyek che ki king'at. Ibwaata, ee Kamuktaindennyu eng' tuguuk che myach." 
Job1:1 Ki mi chii eng' emetap Us ne ki kiguure Job. Ki igeesunotkei ineendet ak ko po iman. Ki iywei Kamuktaindet ak koistoegei yaityo. 
Job1:2 Ki kisikyi weeriik tisap ak tiibiik somok. 
Job1:3 Ki tinyei keechiirek eliphuusyek tisap, tambeesik eliphuusyek somok, eigap chogit eliphuut agenge ak sigiroik che iyuogik pogol muut ak kiboitiinik che chaang'. Ki mogoryo anyun chiichooto miising' kosiir piik tugul che po kong'asiis." 
Job1:4 Ak ki pendi weeriikyik kootap age tugul eng' peetuut ne ki kichopchi, ak ki iyooktoi keguur chepkametisyekwak somok kobwa koamis ak koeiso kobooto icheek." 
Job1:5 Ye kingo keskei peetuusyekwak che po igoorto, ko ki iyooktoi `Job icheek ki anyiny. King'eetei karon miising' ak kogoito kagoochinoik che kibeelei ko uu koitetap icheek tugul kobwaati koleen, “Abeere kogoyai weeriikyuk tengek ak koeesyo Kamuktaindet eng' mugulelwekwak.” Ki yaei Job ko uu nooto kotugul." 
Job1:6 Ki mi anyun peetuut ye kibwanei weeriigap Kamuktaindet kotonondos eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki nyo agine Setani kobooto icheek. 
Job1:7 ki teebee anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani koleenji, “Ibunu ano?” Ak ki wolji `Setani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Abunu ole awendotee ak ole abunotii eng' ng'wony.”" 
Job1:8 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani, “Tos ko igeer otwogindennyu Job, amu ma mi ne kergei ak ineendet eng' ng'wony? Ititaat ak ko po iman inee, iywei Kamuktaindet ak koistoegei yaityo.”" 
Job1:9 Kowolji anyun `Setani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Tos iywei `Job Kamuktaindet puch?" 
Job1:10 Tos ma iyieme ng'ootweet ineendet kobooto koonnyi, ak tuguuk tugul che tinyei eng' komosta age tugul? Ki iberuur poisyonigap eunekyik ak ki kotesak tuguukyik eng' emet." 
Job1:11 Chuul ibak eung'ung' ak itwa tuguuk tugul che tinyei si iroo ngo ma eesyeen eng' taing'ung'.” 
Job1:12 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani, “Keer anyuno, mi tuguuk tugul che tinyei `Job eung'ung', kobatee kityo ametwaa ineendet.” Ki wo anyun Setani eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Job1:13 Eng' peetuut age ye ki amisyei ak koeei divaik weeriikyik ak tiibiikyik eng' kootap weeriit ne oo ne tupcho," 
Job1:14 koit ole ki mi Job `chii ne kiga kiyook ak koleenji, “Kaibatisyei eiik ak koagetos sigiroik eng' ole neegitee yooto," 
Job1:15 koseet anyun piigap Sabe ak kokweri akwotisyechooto. Kagobar otwogik eng' rotwetap chok; kachilil aneege, kanyo amwaun.”" 
Job1:16 Ye kita kong'alaali, koit agine age ak kole, “Kachoorgei maatap Kamuktaindet eng' kipsengwet ak kagobeel keechiirek ak otwogik kogees, ak kachilil aneege, kanyo amwaun.”" 
Job1:17 Ye kita kong'alaali, koit agine age ak kole, “Kachop Kaldeik kweanaik somok yeityo kobook kobwa kokweri tambeesik. Kabar otwogik eng' rotwetap chok ak kaachilil aneege, ak kaanyo amwaun.”" 
Job1:18 Ye kita kong'alaali, koit agine age ak kole, “Koamisyei ak koeei divaik weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk eng' kootap weeriit ne tupcho." 
Job1:19 Ak matyanit kous usoonet ne oo kobunu surkwen ak koryep luukwek ang'wan che po koot koluulji murenik ak kagobek, ak kaachilil aneege, kanyo amwaun.”" 
Job1:20 Ki ng'eet anyun Job ak kobet ngoryennyi ne po parak ak kocher metinnyi yeityo kobutyi ng'wony kosa. 
Job1:21 Ak ki le, “Ki kisicho aach ngor, ak aweeksei aach ngor. Ki koonu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kagoweech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Iberuurot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Job1:22 Ma yai Job tengek eng' chuuto tugul anan koiityi Kamuktaindet yaityo. 
Job2:1 Ki mi kogeny peetuut ye kibwanei weeriigap Kamuktaindet kotonondos eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki nyo agine Setani kobooto icheek, ak kotonon eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Job2:2 Ki teebee `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani koleenji, “Ibunu ano?” Ak ki wolji `Setani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Abunu ole awendotee ak ole abunoti eng' ng'wony.”" 
Job2:3 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani, “Tos ko igeer otwogindennyu Job, amu ma mi ne kergei ak ineendet eng' ng'wony? Ititaat ak ko po iman inee, iywei Kamuktaindet ak koistoegei yaityo. Nganda ki ibea si ang'em ineendet puch, ko riibei kora `inee imandanyi.”" 
Job2:4 Ki wolji `Setani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Kigeeree `iriryot iriryot; igoitoi chii tuguukyik tugul agobo saboondanyi." 
Job2:5 Chuul ibak eung'ung' nguno ak itwaa kawekyik ak panyeekyik, si iroo ngo ma eesyen ineendet.”" 
Job2:6 Koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani, “Keero anyuno, mi ineendet eung'ung'; ituch kityo saboondanyi.”" 
Job2:7 Kwo anyun Setani eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kobiree Job ondirik che ng'woneen kobooch keldebesyennyi agoi metit parak. 
Job2:8 Ki inem anyun Job rokyet ak kong'irireegei kotebee oreek. 
Job2:9 Ki leenji `osotyonnyi Job, “Ta iriibe kora imandang'ung'? Eesye Kamuktaindet si imei.”" 
Job2:10 Ago ki leenji `Job ineendet, “Ing'alaali ko uu ye ng'alaaldos kwonyiik che perber. Tos kinyoor che myach eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ama kinyooru che yaach?” Eng' chuuto tugul koma mwa `Job tengek eng' kutinnyi." 
Job2:11 Kingo kas anyun choronok somogu che po Job, agobo yaityoni tugul ki nyoonji ineendet, konyo age tugul kobunu oldanyi. Ki icheeget ko ki: Eliphas Temanindet, Bildad Suindet ak Zophar Naamatindet. Ki iyomiskei tugul kobwa koriirchi Job ak kogaigai ineendet." 
Job2:12 Ye kingo tooben `icheek ineendet eng' ye loo ama inyit ineendet, kowaakyo eng' kutit ne oo ak koriiryo. Ki pet age tugul ngoryennyi ne po parak ak koseerta temburyek koba parak kororokyi metowekwak." 
Job2:13 Ki tebee ng'wony anyun ak ineendet peetuusyek tisap ak kemousyek tisap, ak ki ma twekyi age tugul ineendet amu ki keer kole oo miising' ng'wanindanyi." 
Job3:1 Kingo pata chuuto kotwek Job ak kochup peetuutap sigeennyi. 
Job3:2 Ki mwa Job kole; 
Job3:3 “Ingobet peetuut ne ki kisigeno, ak kemout ne ki mwa kole, ‘Kagimanach weeriit.’" 
Job3:4 Ingoimenit peetuunooto! Amat komage kiy Kamuktaindet eng' parak, anan koluuchi lapkeiyet peetuunooto." 
Job3:5 Ingonam peetuunooto `mesundeito ak imenindo kobunji. Ingotebee `pooldet peetuunooto, ingomu peetuunooto `imenindap peetuut tugul." 
Job3:6 Ingonam `mesundeito kemounooto. Amat kogaskei peetuunooto eng' peetuusyek che po kenyiit, amat ki itito peetuusyegap arawek." 
Job3:7 Ee, ingoek karaatya kemounooto, amat kobiit eng' yooto tweguunet ne po poiboiyo." 
Job3:8 Ingochup peetuunooto `icheek che chubei peetuut, che chobootiin kong'eet tyondo ne oo ne po peek ne uu ting'ong'et." 
Job3:9 Ingoimenitu kecheik che po ye karatarat; ingocheeng' lapkeiyet, amanyoor, amat kogeer peetuunooto ye machei koorir emet." 
Job3:10 Amu ki ma rat moetap iyoteetap kamennyu, anan koung'e konyekyuk nyalilda." 
Job3:11 Amu nee si ki ma ameei ami moo? Amu nee si ma ameei ko kagisicha? 
Job3:12 Kilya si kotoroocha kutung'oik, anan kinaik kot areri?" 
Job3:13 Amu kita arue ak asiis; kita anuuchi, yeityo amuuny" 
Job3:14 kobooto laitorinik ak kirwoogik che po ng'wony che ki teekyigei komoswek che ki koguber," 
Job3:15 anan kobooto pounik che ki tinyei thahabu, che ki inyiit kooriikwak fedha." 
Job3:16 Kitagaigai nda kiga ki oswo si ma piitu, ko uu manyurunik che ma keer lapkeiyet." 
Job3:17 Olooto koma iimi sogoranik, ak olooto ko imuunyi che ng'etyotiin." 
Job3:18 Eng' olooto ko imuunyi che ratotiin; ma kasei agot kutitap kayagindet. 
Job3:19 Mi olooto ne ming'in ak ne oo, ak ityagat otwogindet eng' kiptaiyandennyi." 
Job3:20 Amu nee si kigoochi lapkeiyet ne mi eng' nyalilda, ak kigoochi saboondo ne mi ng'wanindo eng' muguleldo," 
Job3:21 che igeni meet, ago ma nyoonei; ak kobaalei kocheeng'ei kosiir konoraik che ung'ootiin," 
Job3:22 che poiboitu miising', ak kogasegei ye kanyoor kererit?" 
Job3:23 Amu nee si kigoochin lapkeiyet chii ne ung'aat ooreennyi, ak koyiemee `Kamuktaindet ineendet ng'ootweet?" 
Job3:24 Amu nyoonei aragenennyu kotom aamisye, ak korong'ugei tigenoikyuk ko uu peek." 
Job3:25 Kiit ne ki aiywei ko kanyoonjo, kioto koono aaragen ko nooto ne nyoonjino." 
Job3:26 Ma tinyei talbis, anan sisyinetapkei, ma tinye kamuung'et, ago nyoonei nyalilda kityo.”" 
Job4:1 Ki wol anyun Eliphas Temanindet kole," 
Job4:2 ngot kotyem chii kong'alaalun, ko tos ki imin? Ago ng'oo ne imuuchi kosiis ama ng'alaal?" 
Job4:3 Keero, ki ineet che chaang', ak ki igimit eunek che nyalulyotin." 
Job4:4 Ki kogonop `ng'aleeguk ineendet ne ki ibuti, ak ki igimit kutung'oik che nyalulyotin." 
Job4:5 Ago kagoityin kiito nguno, ak itanui, katwain kiito, ak ketoptoben." 
Job4:6 Tos ma kaiyweisyet ne iywei Kamuktaindet nyiganateng'ung', ak imanda ne po ortinweguk kamang'uneng'ung'?" 
Job4:7 Ibwaat nguno, ng'oo ne ma tinyei leluut ne kilus? Anan mi ano che po iman che ki kebagaakta?" 
Job4:8 Ko uu ye ki aroo, icheeget che koolei tengekto ak komiinei nyalilda, kogesei anyun chooto." 
Job4:9 Petos eng' kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, ak kigeesu eng' usetap nereegekyik." 
Job4:10 Porisenetap ng'etundo, ak tuugeetap ng'etundo ne koroom, ak kelegap ng'etuunyik che neran ko ildos." 
Job4:11 Meei ng'etundo ne kiim amu ma wo logeet, ak kiyestoi aaregap ng'etundo ne kotoy." 
Job4:12 Ki nyo anyun ng'olyoo eng' ung'oot, ki kas itinnyu chaameet." 
Job4:13 Eng' kabwaatet ne po ng'ang'utigap kemoi, ye kagonyonji piik rwondo ne nyigiis," 
Job4:14 konyoonjo kaiyweisyet ak potanet, ne ki igoochi kawekyuk kobotanso." 
Job4:15 Ki siirtoena tamirmiryo, ak ki tononso suumeegap poortanyu." 
Job4:16 Ki tonon tamirmiryo, ago ma amuuch aguiyo kiit ne ki uu. Ki mi itoondo taitap konyekyuk; ki mi siisek ak ki agas kutit komwaei koleen," 
Job4:17 tos po iman chii, ne ma tebyei koigeny, kosiir Kamuktaindet? Tos tiliil chiito kosiir Yaindennyi?" 
Job4:18 Ma imaang'u ineendet agot otwogikyik, ak iityin malaikaisyek perberyo;" 
Job4:19 ko tos siirei ne tya icheeget che menyei kooriigap menet, che ki kilumda eng' ng'ung'unyek, che kinyinyiri ko uu ye kinyinyirtoi taburburyet!" 
Job4:20 King'emang'emi kong'etee karon agoi koskoleny, lustos agoi ama iiti chii." 
Job4:21 Kituti rogoetap emainnywa eng' oriitinnywa, ak pegu icheek ama tinyei utaatyet." 
Job5:1 “Kuurse anyun; tos mi ne wolu? Iwendi kap ng'oo eng' che tiliileen? 
Job5:2 Parei nereegek chiito ne perber, ak parei ng'etkonda chiito ne perber." 
Job5:3 Ki ageer kolumdogei chiito ne perber, ago ki achup eng' yooto meng'ootennyi." 
Job5:4 Mi lagokwak iman ole mi ng'oiyondit, kagigiikyi ormariichet, ama mi chii ne saru icheek." 
Job5:5 Amei peekwak kogesu che amei rubeet, ak konemu agot che mi katook, ak iseng'eng'at mesteet agobo tuguukwak." 
Job5:6 Amu ma mang'une nyalilda ng'wonyut, marutune ng'wony kaimetapkei;" 
Job5:7 Ago kisikyin chiito kaimetapkei, ko uu ye iteri leldetap maat." 
Job5:8 Nda ka anee, ta acheeng'e Kamuktaindet, ak aipchi Kamuktaindet ng'olyoondennyu." 
Job5:9 Ineendet ne yaei tuguuk che eecheen che ma isiagaksei, tuguuk che kikwong'ee che ma iitoksei." 
Job5:10 Igoochin `ropta ng'wony, ak koyookyin `peek mbareenik." 
Job5:11 Ieeti che nyerootiin; ak kotoroori che tigendos eng' riirek kotebee ole riiboot. 
Job5:12 Ng'emei chobutigap piik che ng'aalik, kot koma komuuchi eunekwak koyai tuguuk che po kagilennywa pogei." 
Job5:13 Namei che utaatiin eng' ng'ulaatyetap ng'aalseennywa, ak sip kong'emaksei kirwoogutigap che imaasotin." 
Job5:14 Nyoonjin `icheek mesundeito peet, ak kotung'dung'yoti peet kween ko uu kemoi." 
Job5:15 Ago saru ne panani eng' rotwetap chok ne po kutinnywa, saru eng' eutap ne kiim." 
Job5:16 Tinyei anyun kibananiat kamang'unet, ak konamak kuut yautik che ma po imanda." 
Job5:17 Paibai chii ne nyooru kergong'yet kobun `Kamuktaindet; amesas anyun katigonetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet. 
Job5:18 Amu iguoteni ak konya, kwerei ak kosoobi eunekyik." 
Job5:19 Saruun eng' nyalilwogik lo; ee, matwain yaityet agot eng' tisap." 
Job5:20 Ityachin eng' rubeet si ma parin, ak kotyachin eng' lugeet eng' kimnateetap rotwetap chok." 
Job5:21 Ki unyin eng' piretap ng'elyepta, ameiywei ng'emisyet ye kanyo." 
Job5:22 Irorechini ng'emisyet ak rubeet, ameiywei tyong'igap ng'wony che koroomen." 
Job5:23 Amu onamegei ak koigap warenget, ak oting'egei kaalyeet ak tyong'igap timiin." 
Job5:24 Inae ile mi kaalyeet emaing'ung', irutochini piung'ung' ama kiy ne petei." 
Job5:25 Inae ile chaang'aitu iyoteng'ung' ak kotenit lagoguk susweegap ng'wony. 
Job5:26 Iwendi kerering'ung' eng' kalilet ko uu peek che ki kiyum kotononso eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet. 
Job5:27 Keero, kagisyach niito, ak uu nooto. Kas, ak inai si komyeeit eng' inyee.”" 
Job6:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole 
Job6:2 ee, kata myee nda ka kipiman nereegekyuk, ak kepiman nyalildanyu eng' ratilit!" 
Job6:3 Amu nyigisitu kosiir ng'aniek che po nyanjosyek. Kasartae anyun ng'aleekyuk. 
Job6:4 Mi oriitinnyu kipchabonigap ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, kae saboondanyu ng'wanindanywa; katetkei kamuisosyegap Kamuktaindet agobo anee." 
Job6:5 Tos iteei oloitigeet ye tinyei susweek, anan iuti eito ye tinyei amitwogik?" 
Job6:6 Tos ki amei kiit ne ma chamu kiy ama kinde muunyuk? Anan tos chamu kiy kebeberta ne leel ne po mayaiyat? 
Job6:7 Eesyoi saboondanyu kotwa che uu chooto; uu amitwogik che samis eng' anee. 
Job6:8 Ee, nda ki chamwo soomennyu ne asoome, ak kogoono Kamuktaindet kiit ne amache miising'," 
Job6:9 agot nda chamei Kamuktaindet korurunya, kochuul eunnyi ak koistoo!" 
Job6:10 Ta kaanyooru anyun kagaigaet; ta kaabaibaitu eng' ng'wanindo ne ma pagaaktoi chii; amu ma atiiye ng'aleegap Ineendet ne Tiliil. 
Job6:11 Nee kimnateennyu si kobiit agen? Ak nee kagesunennyu si kobiit amuita? 
Job6:12 Tos uu kimnateennyu kimnateetap koik? Anan po poortanyu sugunwet? 
Job6:13 Tos ma amu ma tinye anee toreteet eng' oriitinnyu, ak ki kiistoena ng'omnateet kolooit eng' anee?" 
Job6:14 Icheeget che eeteen chorweet rireenet, ko kabagaakta ineendet kaiyweisyetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Job6:15 Ki koyai tupchosyekyuk kaberberisyet ko uu kereruut, ko uu peegap kereruusyek che teng'dos." 
Job6:16 Che katuuegitu amu koigap ropta, ak ole ung'egei teluji." 
Job6:17 Ak ye kalalang'it kobetyo, eng' kemeut, kobetyo eng' oldanywa." 
Job6:18 Mastoi che rutoe ooreenywa, togostoi kobendi surkwen, ak kolusyo." 
Job6:19 Ki keer kiprutoinigap Tema, ki igen icheek kweanaigap Sheba." 
Job6:20 Ki ililanso amu kiga komong'; ki pwa yooto, ak kitoptobenso." 
Job6:21 Amu oo puch nguno; ogeere kamuiset ak oiyweisye. 
Job6:22 Tos ki amwa ale, koono konunet? Anan ale, koono asoya eng' tuguukwok?" 
Job6:23 Anan ale osarwo eng' eutap puunyoot? Anan ki ale otyacha eng' eutap usiik? 
Job6:24 Oneeta, si asiis; ak ogoono aguiyo lelutyennyu." 
Job6:25 Kiimeen ne tya ng'aleegap imanda! Ago kertoi kong' ano tiiyeng'wong'? 
Job6:26 Oleen ogere kong' ng'aleek? Uu usoonet ng'alaalutigap ineendet ne ki kogeskei kamang'unennyi. 
Job6:27 Omache oseer parbareek agobo ne ma tinyei sigiik, anan oyae mung'aaret chorweng'wong'." 
Job6:28 Ago nguno anyun, kaigai kusyo kong', amu ma mwaiwok iman lembech eng' taing'wong'." 
Job6:29 Asaak ale, oweege amat kobiit keniisyet; oweege nguno, po iman ng'olyoondennyu." 
Job6:30 Tos mi keniisyet ng'elyeptanyu? Tos ma muuchi abesyo tuguugap yaityet? 
Job7:1 “Tos ma uueen peetuusyegap chii eng' ng'wony? Tos ma kergei peetuusyekyik ak che po otwogin? 
Job7:2 Kergei ak otwogindet ne machei miising' urwet, ak ko uu otwogindet ne igeni melektanyi," 
Job7:3 ko kagigoono anyun arawek che po puch kobunjo, ak kagigoono kemousyegap ng'etatet." 
Job7:4 Ye arue, amwae aleen, ‘Ang'eete au?’ Ago kooi kemout; aweiweechigei agoi koorir emet." 
Job7:5 Kagilaakyi poortanyu kuutik ak mogooronigap temburyek; laei poortanyu, ak konenderi kogeny." 
Job7:6 Choktoi peetuusyekyuk kosiir cheraanit ne kinabisye, ak kosiirtoi ama mi kamang'unet." 
Job7:7 Ee, ibwaat ile sabeennyu ko usoonet; ma keerei kogeny che myach konyekyuk." 
Job7:8 Ineendet ne keera, koma kogeero kogeny; keera konyeguk, koma ami." 
Job7:9 Ko uu pooldet ne igeesugei ak kobetito, uu nooto ineendet ne wendi ye mi che ki kobek, ma kotogosu kogeny." 
Job7:10 Ma koweekyingei kogeny koonnyi, ama konaei `oldanyi kogeny ineendet." 
Job7:11 Nooto anyun, ma koi ager kutinnyu; ang'alaali eng' ng'wanindap saboondanyu, ang'unyng'unyi eng' ng'wanindap saboondanyu." 
Job7:12 Tos aa nyanjet anan masweetit, kot iriibo?" 
Job7:13 Ye amwa ale, ‘Igoigo itogunnyu, ak konyumnyumwa tigenennyu kiit ne alyeldoe,’" 
Job7:14 igoono arageneet eng' karwotitaosyek, ak imua eng' ng'ang'utik" 
Job7:15 kot kolewen saboondanyu kagetetapkei, ak meet kosiir poriinyu." 
Job7:16 Aweche sabeennyu; ma mache asap agoi. Oiye pagaakta, amu puch peetuusyekyuk." 
Job7:17 Nee piich, kot ieet, kot icham icheek," 
Job7:18 kot irutoochi icheek karonet age tugul, ak ityem icheek eng' sait age tugul?" 
Job7:19 Tos megus kong' igeer komosta niin, ak ibagaakta si alugui ng'ulekyuk?" 
Job7:20 Ngot ko ki ayai tengek, ko ayaun nee, ee inyee, riibindetap piik? Amu nee si indea aek kiit ne imwoge? Amu nee si kaegu mileet eng' inyee?" 
Job7:21 Amu nee si tomo inyoiywa kaat agobo pistoennyu ak iiste tengektonyu? Nguno anyun, arue eng' temburyek, icheeng'a, ago menyoorwa.”" 
Job8:1 Ki wol anyun Bildad Suindet kole," 
Job8:2 “Imwae tuguuchuuto kot kotyanit, ak ko kergei ng'aleeguk ak usoonet ne kiim?" 
Job8:3 Tos igunuuri `Kamuktaindet kirwooget? Anan imaasi Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet imanda? 
Job8:4 Ngot ko ki koyachi `lagoguk ineendet tengekto, ko kigonde `ineendet icheek eutap pistoennywa." 
Job8:5 Ngot icheeng' Kamuktaindet eng' kagiiletapkei, ak isoom Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet," 
Job8:6 ngot ko ii tiliil ak ko ii litit, ko ne matiny, ko riibiin iman, ak koweekyin oldap meng'ooteng'ung'." 
Job8:7 Ak nganda ki ming'in tauneng'ung', kota kotesaksei miising' kagesuneng'ung'." 
Job8:8 Asaain anyun ale, chigil agobo ibinwek che ki kosiirto, ak inde kamanuut che kinyoor kwanisyekwak." 
Job8:9 Amu ki po acheek amut ak ma kingen kiy, amu peetuusyekyok eng' ng'wony ko urwo." 
Job8:10 Tos ma ineetin ak komwaun, ak komwa ng'aleek che punu kaguiyennywa?" 
Job8:11 Tos imuuchi koeet mutwot ama mi nyanyawet? Tos imuuchi kobiit mutwot ama mi peek? 
Job8:12 Yeta konyaliil ak kotom ketil, ko korestos ko mares sogo age tugul." 
Job8:13 Uu chooto ortinwek che po `tugul che utye Kamuktaindet; petei kamang'unetap chiito ne ma po iman. 
Job8:14 Ng'emaksei kamang'unennyi, ak uu kamang'unennyi kootap kiproroktet." 
Job8:15 Tiegei koonnyi, ago ma tononi; namjingei yooto, ago ma tebyei." 
Job8:16 Nyalilitu eng' peetuusyegap asiista, ak waitoigei mooriikyik koyomu mbareet." 
Job8:17 Taachingei tigitikyik karurugutyetap koik; keerei komostap koik. 
Job8:18 Ngot keng'em eng' komostanyi, koeesyo ineendet ak kole, ‘Tom ageerin.’" 
Job8:19 Keero, ni ko poiboiyetap ooreennyi, ak piitos alage eng' ng'wony." 
Job8:20 Keero, ma eesyoi Kamuktaindet chiito ne ititaat, ama tiyei yaigap yaityo." 
Job8:21 Inyiiti kuting'ung' roryot ak konyiit kuting'ung' poiboiyet. 
Job8:22 Kilaakyin kalilanet icheeget che wechin; ama komi emaitap kiptengeginik.” 
Job9:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole," 
Job9:2 angen iman ale uu nooto. Ago imuktoi ano chiito koek ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet? 
Job9:3 Ngot kochamei chiichooto kobelgei ak ineendet, koma imuuchi kowolji agot ng'olyoot eng' eliphuut." 
Job9:4 Utaat ineendet eng' muguleldo, ak kotinyei kimnateet ne oo. Ng'oo ne ki kouitkei eng' tainnyi, ak koboor?" 
Job9:5 Ineendet ne iutoi tuloonook ama naei icheek, ye igabui icheek eng' nereegekyik;" 
Job9:6 ne kitumdumi ng'wonyut koistogei eng' komostanyi, ak kobotanso tolochikyik." 
Job9:7 Ne ng'atei asiista si ma chor; ak ko ng'oochei kecheik. 
Job9:8 Ineendet ineegei ne iitoi kipsengwet, ak kotyechei peek che mildogei che po nyanjet." 
Job9:9 Ineendet ne yaei kecheik che uu tyondo, kapsomoguk ak koremerik, ak kooriik che mi murot tai." 
Job9:10 Ineendet ne yaei tuguuk che eecheen che ma kiguitos, ee, tuguuk che kikwong'ee che ma iitoksei." 
Job9:11 Ye punei ye neegiteena, koma keere ineendet; siirtoi kogeny, amanyiti." 
Job9:12 Keero, namei ak ng'oo ne eetee? Ng'oo ne mwachin koleenjin, iyae nee?" 
Job9:13 Ma istoi Kamuktaindet nereegekyik; ing'uruuksei toretigap Rahab eng' keelyekyik. 
Job9:14 Amuuchi anee awoljindo ano? Alewendoi ano ng'aleekyuk che kimwae ak ineendet? 
Job9:15 Ne agot ngo aa po iman, ko mawoljini ineendet; asaisai punyondennyu." 
Job9:16 Nda ki kaguur ak kowolwo; ta mayani ale kita kasei kutinnyu. 
Job9:17 Amu tuena usoonet ne oo, ak kotesei mookyuk puch." 
Job9:18 Ma chamwo abuus, ago inyiita ng'wanindo." 
Job9:19 Ngeng'alaal agobo kabeletapkei, ko kiim inee, ak ngot ko kiy ne po kirwook, ko ng'oo ne chobwa peetuut?" 
Job9:20 Agot ngo po iman, korwookwo kutinnyu; agot ngo aa ititaat, kobaoryanjino kole aa ne imaasat." 
Job9:21 Nga aa ititaat, koma iitigei; asase sabeennyu." 
Job9:22 Agenge tugul; nooto amwae anyun ale, ng'emei ne ititaat ak ne kiptengekyo." 
Job9:23 Ngot kobaris pireet kochokyi, kororechin anyun tyemisyetap che ma tinyei leluut." 
Job9:24 Ki kinde ng'wonyuni eunegap kiptengeginik; tuchei togoochigap kirwoogikyik. Ngot koma ineendet, ko ng'oo anyun?" 
Job9:25 Ruaei peetuusyekyuk kosiir ne labatindet; mweei, ma keerei kiit ne myee." 
Job9:26 Kagosiirto ko uu melisyek che rwaei; ko uu kipsiichit ne choorchingei tyondo ne machei kobar. 
Job9:27 Ngot amwa ale, autye kang'unyng'unyennyu, amete aragenennyu ak abaibaitu." 
Job9:28 Aiywei aragenosyekyuk tugul, angen ale meityina ile ma tinye leluut." 
Job9:29 Kirwookwo, amu nee anyun si aiimge puch?" 
Job9:30 Agot ngaunegei peegap teluji, ak atiliil eunekyuk miising'," 
Job9:31 Agot ngo uu nooto iwiirchino keriinget, ak kowecho agot ngoroikyuk." 
Job9:32 Amu ineendet koma chii, ko uu anee ne awoljini, kot ketuiye kibagenge eng' kirwooget." 
Job9:33 Amu ma mi ne ioitoseech, si kobiit kogonoorech eunekyik acheek tuwai." 
Job9:34 Ingoistoena kiroktonyi, amat komua kamuisennyi," 
Job9:35 si ang'alaal anyun, amaiywei ineendet, Amu anee angen ale ma uu nooto." 
Job10:1 Aweche sabeennyu; amwaitoi kang'unyng'unyennyu, amasise; ang'alaali eng' ng'wanindap saboondanyu." 
Job10:2 Aleenjini Kamuktaindet: Amerwookwo; iboorwo anyun kiit ne kagoonin kibelgei. 
Job10:3 Tos myee iusisye, ak isas poisyetap euneguk, ak igaigai kirwoogetap kiptengeginik?" 
Job10:4 Tos itinye koonyek che po kipkosabei? Tos igeere ko uu ye keerei kimugulmet? 
Job10:5 Tos kergei peetuusyeguk ak peetuusyegap chii, anan uu kenyisyeguk peetuusyegap chii," 
Job10:6 kot icheeng' tengektonyu, ak isyach chalwoktanyu," 
Job10:7 agot ngingen ile ma aa chii ne ya, ama mi ne imuuchi kosar eng' eung'ung'?" 
Job10:8 Kiyaa euneguk ak komimia. Nguno anyun ko tos igeesua inyee? 
Job10:9 Ibwaat anyun ile ki imimia ko uu meneet; ara tos igetyina ng'ung'unyek kogeny? 
Job10:10 Tos ma iroong'wa ko uu cheego, ak iyaa aegei mwaitap cheego?" 
Job10:11 Ki ilaakwa iriryot ak panyeek, ak ituiyoo eng' kawek ak inoik." 
Job10:12 Ki igoono sabeet ak chamyet ne oo, ak ki koriip `riipseng'ung' saboondanyu." 
Job10:13 Ago ki iung'ee tuguuchooto muguleldang'ung'; angen ale mi niito kobooten. 
Job10:14 Ngot ayai tengek, igeera, amenyoiywa kaat agobo tengektonyu." 
Job10:15 Ngot ko aa ya, pwo eng' anee! Agot ngo aa po iman, koma ng'eti metinnyu, amu kagonyia kalilanet ak ageere nyalildanyu." 
Job10:16 Ngot ang'eet metinnyu, isapchino ko uu ng'etundo; ak iboorwogei kogeny eng' kwong'eet." 
Job10:17 Ileelityina paoriniguk, ak ites nereegeguk agobo anee; iyookyina kiplugotinik che tomo kobwonjino." 
Job10:18 “Kilya anyun si icham kesicho? Kita kaigai ame, si ma keera kong' ne po chii." 
Job10:19 Aiegeitu chii ne ma piit, kita kimutena moet awo kererit." 
Job10:20 Tos ma ng'ering' peetuusyekyuk? Siis anyun ak ibagaakta, si anyoor kagaigaet kitigin," 
Job10:21 kotom awe ole ma aweeksei, emetap mesundeito ak urwetap meet," 
Job10:22 emetap imenindo ne oo, ne uu mesundeito; ne po urwetap meet ak ma tinyei ng'atuut age tugul, ole uu lapkeiyet mesundeito.”" 
Job11:1 Ki wol anyun Zophar Naamatindet kole 
Job11:2 tos ma nyoljin kewol ng'aleechu chaang'? Tos ki ityin imanda chii ne chaang' ng'ala? 
Job11:3 Tos igoochin piik kosiisyo kachaunasyeguk pogei? Ye ichotisyei, ko tos ma mi ne koonin ililan?" 
Job11:4 Amu imwae ile, tiliileen kaneetisyosyekyuk, ak aa tiliil eng' taing'ung'." 
Job11:5 Kata myee kong'alaal Kamuktaindet, ak kong'alaal kogirinden," 
Job11:6 ak koboorun ung'ootik che po utaatyet, amu utaatyet ko tinyei kebeberwek che chaang'. Nai anyun ile ma magenen Kamuktaindet ne tee ne yamegei ak yaitwogiguk." 
Job11:7 “Tos imuuchi inyooru Kamuktaindet ngisyach? Tos imuuchi inyooru ole poochin Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet? 
Job11:8 Toroor kosiir kipsengwet, imuuchi iyai nee? Loo kosiir ye mi che ki kobek; nee ne imuuchi inai?" 
Job11:9 Kakwautyennyi ko kooi kosiir ng'wony, ak ko tebees kosiir nyanjet." 
Job11:10 Ngot kosiirto inee, ak kogeris, ak kuguurso keba kirwooget, ko ng'oo ne imuuchi kogirinda ineendet?" 
Job11:11 Ingen `ineendet piik che ma tilei kiy; ye keerei ineendet tengekto, ko tos ma mage kiy?" 
Job11:12 Ago ma tinyei kaguiyet chiito ne ma tilei kiy, kisichei chii ko uu moitap oloitigeet." 
Job11:13 Ngot ichop muguleldang'ung' kolititiit, ak iitoochi ineendet euneguk," 
Job11:14 ngo mi tengekto eung'ung', iwiirte kolooit, ameng' komeny emaisyeguk kiy ne ma po imanda." 
Job11:15 Ngiyai ko uu nooto, itokyi anyun parak togeng'ung' koma mi tisya; ee, igimitu, ameiyweisyei." 
Job11:16 Iutye nyalildang'ung', ibwaati ko uu peek che ki kosiirto." 
Job11:17 Lapkeitu sabeeng'ung' kosiir peet kween; agot ngo mi mesundeito kogergeitu ak karon. 
Job11:18 Ak itebi eng' nyiganateet, amu mi kamang'unet; iriiboksei, ak imuuny eng' chametapkei." 
Job11:19 Irue anyun, ama piitu ne imuin; ee, cheeng'in che chaang' agobo toreteeng'ung'." 
Job11:20 Ago keroksei konyegap kiptengeginik, petyin icheeget ooreet ne mwee, ak kamang'unennywa ko kabuset ne po let.”" 
Job12:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole 
Job12:2 iman, okweek ko oo piik, ak pegu utaatyet kobootok." 
Job12:3 Ago anyun atinye kaguiyet agane, ko uu okweek; ma aa nyeraat eng' okweek. Tos ng'oo ne ma ingen tuguuk che uu chuuto?" 
Job12:4 Auu chiito ne rorechin piigap kokwennyi; ne kiguur Kamuktaindet, ak kowolwo ineendet, chii ne kirorechin, nga po iman ak ko ititaat." 
Job12:5 Sasei nyaliil chii ne tebyei eng' kaalyeet; eng' ineendet ko kigechopchi nyaliilda icheek che ichabaitoi keelyekwak. 
Job12:6 Poorei emaisyegap choriik, ak riibootin che tachei Kamuktaindet; che ibootee eunekwak kamuktaindennywa." 
Job12:7 Teebee tyong'ik, si koneetin; anan teebee toriitik che po parak, si komwaun;" 
Job12:8 ng'alaalji ng'wony, si koneetin, anan igany komwaun njireenigap nyanjet." 
Job12:9 Ng'oo ne ma naei eng' chuuto tugul, kole eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki yai niito?" 
Job12:10 Mi eunnyi saboondap kiy age tugul ne sabei, ak kabuusetap piik tugul." 
Job12:11 Tos matyemei itit ng'aleek, ko uu ye chamchami kutit amitwogik?" 
Job12:12 Tos ma mi utaatyet kobooto poisyek che oosen? Ak tos ma piitu kaguiyet eng' chaang'indap peetuusyek? 
Job12:13 Mi utaatyet ak kamuktaet kobooto ineendet; tinyei kirwooget ak naet. 
Job12:14 Putei, ama kimuuchi keteech kogeny; kerei chii, ama mi ne yaatei." 
Job12:15 Ngot koeet peek, koteeng'dos; ak ngo yook kogeny, konyiei emet kosiir." 
Job12:16 Mi kobooto ineendet kimnateet ak utaatyet; nenyi ne kiberberi ak kaberberindet. 
Job12:17 Imuti kirwoogik aach ngor koloegitu, ak yaei `ineendet icheek koek che perber." 
Job12:18 Ityachi ratuutyetap laitorinik, ak kermenee `pireneet suenutikwak." 
Job12:19 Imuti tisiik ko luulenik, ak kogabui che ki imeen." 
Job12:20 Istoi tweguunetap che kiyani, ak koistoi kaguiyetap poisyek." 
Job12:21 Rong'jin pounik sasisyet, ak kotyachi kariigap che kiimeen." 
Job12:22 Nyooru tuguuk che ung'ootiin eng' mesundeito, ak koibu urwetap meet konyo lapkeiyet." 
Job12:23 Ieetu pororyosyek, ak kong'emei icheek; ibaraiti pororyosyek, ak iseeri icheek." 
Job12:24 Ibee `kaguiyet pounigap piik che po ng'wony, ak igoochin ko ombeniot eng' surkwen ole ma mi ooreet." 
Job12:25 Tung'dung'yoti eng' mesundeito ama tinyei lapkeiyet, ak kogoochin icheek koterteeryot ko uu chiito ne kabogit." 
Job13:1 Ki kogeer konyekyuk chuuto tugul, ki kogas itinnyu ak koguiyo." 
Job13:2 Kiit ne ongen, angen agane; ma aa nyeraat eng' okweek." 
Job13:3 Iman amache ang'alaalji Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, ak amache keng'alaaljine ak Kamuktaindet." 
Job13:4 Ago okweek, ko oo kitang'igap lembechek, okweek tugul ko oo chepkerichinik che ma tilei kiy." 
Job13:5 Kata myee osisye miising'! Si koek niito utaatyeng'wong'. 
Job13:6 Ogas anyun ng'aleekyuk che amwae, ak oepchi iit riiregap kutinnyu." 
Job13:7 Tos omwae che ma po iman agobo Kamuktaindet, ak ong'alaal eng' ng'aalseet agobo ineendet?" 
Job13:8 Tos otiytiy ineendet? Tos obeligei ak Kamuktaindet? 
Job13:9 Tos myeiit eng' okweek ye isyachak? Anan oberberi ineendet ko uu ye kiberberi chii? 
Job13:10 Kerok kong' iman, ngot otiytiy piik eng' ung'oot." 
Job13:11 Tos ma koonin etunatennyi iywei? Ak kobutyin kaiyweisyennyi? 
Job13:12 Ng'aleekwok che kibwaati ko kalewenaigap oreek, irimosyekwok ko irimosyek che po meneet." 
Job13:13 Osisye, obagaakta aneege, si kobiit ang'alaal, Ak ingobwanjo che machei kobwanjo." 
Job13:14 Tos aname poortanyu kelekyuk, ak ande saboondanyu eunnyu?" 
Job13:15 Agot ngo para, kota ageni ineendet: ago agimiiti ortinwekyuk eng' tainnyi." 
Job13:16 Egu niito agine yetunennyu; amu ma nyoonei tainnyi chiito ne ya. 
Job13:17 Ogas ng'aleekyuk eng' kagiiletapkei, ak ingotebee itiikwok mwaoninnyu." 
Job13:18 Ogeer anyuno, koachop kiit ne atoorchinigei; angen ale aa po iman." 
Job13:19 Ng'oo ineendet ne kibeligei tuwai? Amu asise ak amee. 
Job13:20 Iyaiywo kityo tuguuk aeng', si ma ung'enengei:" 
Job13:21 Istoena eung'ung' kolooit eng' anee; amat komua kamuiseng'ung'. 
Job13:22 Kuurse anyun, si awol; anan ichamwo ang'alaal ak iwolwoo." 
Job13:23 Ata ng'oogiswekyuk ak tengekwogikyuk? Koono anai pistoennyu ak tengektonyu. 
Job13:24 Amu nee anyun si iuny togeng'ung', ak iita ile aa punyondeng'ung'?" 
Job13:25 Tos inyalili sogoot ne ibei usoonet? Ak isubi mobeek che yamyotiin? 
Job13:26 Amu ki isir ng'aleek che ng'woneen agobo anee, ak igoono tengekwogigap ming'inatennyu anam kobunjo." 
Job13:27 Iratyini keelyekyuk temeleiywek ak igeer ortinwekyuk tugul; isire kiwoteet ole poochin keelyekyuk. 
Job13:28 Ara igeesugei chii ko uu kiit ne kigonun, ko uu ngoryeet ne ki am kuutik." 
Job14:1 Ng'ering' peetuusyegap chii, inee ne sichei kwony, ak chaang' nyalilwogikyik." 
Job14:2 Piitei ko uu taapteet ak kores; labati ko uu urwet ama tononi. 
Job14:3 Tos igeere chii ne uu nooto? Tos imuta keebe tuwai kapkirwook? 
Job14:4 Ng'oo ne imuuchi komoong'une ne anyiny ole ng'waan? Ma mi, agot agenge." 
Job14:5 Amu ki ing'at peetuusyegap chii, ak mi koitetap arawekyik kobooten, ak ki inde kiwotosyekyik che ma imuuchi kosiir." 
Job14:6 Ituktoochi patai ineendet anyun, si kobiit komuuny, agoi peetuunnyi, ko uu otwogindet ne ki kisir." 
Job14:7 Amu mi kamang'unet agobo keetit; ngot kiluul, kobiitei kogeny, ak ma siisei temennyi ne ng'arng'ar." 
Job14:8 Agot ngo osegitu tigitikyik eng' ng'ung'unyek, ak konun keetit eng' ng'wony," 
Job14:9 ago ing'ati ko kagas anyinyindap peek, ak kowakta mooriik ko uu keetit ne ing'ati." 
Job14:10 Ago igeesugei chii, ak kobek, ee, wendi ano chii koga kogeskei?" 
Job14:11 Ko uu ye teng'dos peegap nyanjet, ak ko uu ye teenyei aineet agine ak koyaam," 
Job14:12 ko uu nooto anyun, ruei chii, ama kong'eetei; agoi koma komi kipsengwet, koma ng'etos, ama king'eeti kong'eetyo eng' rwondanywa." 
Job14:13 Ee, kata myee iunya eng' ye mi che ki kobek, iriibo eng' ole ung'aat kot kosiirto nereegeguk, ak ilewenwa peetuut, ak ibwaata!" 
Job14:14 Tos ngo mee chii, kota kosabei kogeny? Ta ageni peetuusyek tugul che po lugeennyu, kot konyo katyagennyu." 
Job14:15 Iguursei, ak awolun; ak itinye mageet agobo poisyetap euneguk." 
Job14:16 Ago iiti nguno kakwautikyuk, tos megeere tengektonyu?" 
Job14:17 Ki kigerchi lolet pistoennyu, ak irate tengektonyu." 
Job14:18 “Ago iman, ngo put tulweet kobetei, ak ki istoe rwandet komostanyi." 
Job14:19 Ko uu ye amei `peek koik, ak ko uu ye ibei `mogoochek temburyegap ng'wony, ing'eme kamang'unetap chii ko uu nooto." 
Job14:20 Iterteeri ineendet agoi kosiirto, iwale itoondanyi ak iiste." 
Job14:21 Nyooru weeriikyik teegisto, ama naei; ak kiming'ini, ago ma naei." 
Job14:22 Ago tinyei ng'wanindo poortanyi, ak riirei saboondanyi.”" 
Job15:1 Ki wol anyun Eliphas Temanindet kole 
Job15:2 tos nyolu kowol chii ne utaat eng' naet ne po puch? Anan konyiit moennyi usoonet ne po kong'asiis? 
Job15:3 Tos nyolu korwooch eng' ng'aleek che ma tilei kiy, anan eng' ng'aleek che ma yaei kiy ne myee?" 
Job15:4 Ago imetoi kaiyweetap Kamuktaindet, ak igirindoi saaet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
Job15:5 Amu ineeti tengektong'ung' kuting'ung', ak ileweni ng'elyeptap ng'aaliindet." 
Job15:6 Irwoogun kuting'ung', ma anee; paoryanjinin kuting'ung' kogirindoin." 
Job15:7 Tos inyee chiito ne kisip kesich? Anan kisip kesichin kotom kobiit tuloonook? 
Job15:8 Tos ki igas kirwoogutigap ung'oot che po Kamuktaindet? Ak iityinige inyegei utaatyet? 
Job15:9 Nee ne ingen ne ma kingen? Nee kaguiyet ne itinye ne ma ki tinyei? 
Job15:10 Ki mi ak poisyek che po kalwalek ak che ki koosegitu miising', che oosen miising' kosiir kwandang'ung'." 
Job15:11 Tos nyerootiin kagaigaosyegap Kamuktaindet eng' inyee, anan ma kiy eng' inyee ng'olyootap mutyonet?" 
Job15:12 Amu nee si kobeetin muguleldang'ung', ak amu nee si komismis konyeguk," 
Job15:13 kot iwal muguleldong'ung' kongelelji Kamuktaindet, ak icham komang'une kuting'ung' ng'aleek che uu chooto?" 
Job15:14 Nee chii, kot kotiliilit? Ak nee ineendet ne sichei kwondo kot kiit keele po imanda?" 
Job15:15 Ngo ma imang'u Kamuktaindet piikyik che tiliileen; ak ngo ma tiliileen kipsengwet eng' tainnyi," 
Job15:16 kotam nee ineendet ne kewechei ak ko samis, chii ne eei tengekto ko uu peek!" 
Job15:17 Kasa anyun asi aboorun, ak amwaun tuguuk che ki ageer," 
Job15:18 che kimwau piik che ng'oomen, ama uny kiy kobun kwanisyekwak." 
Job15:19 Che ki kigoochi emet icheegei, ama mi too ne kibunei kwenunnywa." 
Job15:20 Kasei ng'wanindo kiptengekyot eng' peetuusyekyik tugul, kenyiisyek tugul che ki kigonorchi usiindet." 
Job15:21 Mi itiikyik tuugeetap kamuisosyek; ibookyin ineendet `luulindet eng' peetuusyekyik che po poroteet. 
Job15:22 Ma iyani kole weeksei eng' mesundeito, ak igeni rotwetap chok ineendet." 
Job15:23 Ombenoti kocheeng'oti amitwogik ak koleen, mi ano? Ingen ineendet kole kagoriikyi peetuut ne po mesundeito." 
Job15:24 Imui nyalilda ak ng'wanindo; iterteeri `icheek ineendet, ko uu laitoryat ne choboot agobo lugeet." 
Job15:25 Amu kigochuul ineendet eunnyi kogirinda Kamuktaindet, komenjin Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Job15:26 Labatyin ineendet eng' kaatit ne uui, eng' ugutigap long'onikyik." 
Job15:27 Amu ki kotuch togeennyi nerateennyi, ak koakwaitu suenutikyik." 
Job15:28 Ki komeny nganasook che ki koguber, eng' kooriik che ma menyei chii, che neegit koek karatwek." 
Job15:29 Ma egu mogoryo ama tebyei tuguukyik, ama rurtos tuguukyik." 
Job15:30 Ma istoegei mesundeito; iyami liplibenetap maat mooriikyik, ak wendi ineendet eng' kabuusetap kutinnyi." 
Job15:31 Amat komong' tuguugap puch, koberberegei: amu egu melektanyi tangoita." 
Job15:32 Isuldoi kotom koit peetuunnyi, ama tuonitu temennyi." 
Job15:33 Itumdumi sabibuk che tomo koruryo ko uu keetiigap sabibuk, ak kowiirta taptennyi ko uu mseituni." 
Job15:34 Amu egu soon tuiyetap che ma iywei Kamuktaindet, ak peelei maat emaisyek che mi asoya." 
Job15:35 Manachi yaityet ak kosich tengekto, ak kochop moennywa ng'aalseet." 
Job16:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole," 
Job16:2 “Ki agas tuguuk che chaang' che uu chooto; okweek tugul ko oo kagoigoik che otese nyalilda. 
Job16:3 Tos tinyei ng'aleegap puch ole igeesunegei? Anan nee ne kaiimin kot irang'u ng'al che chaang'? 
Job16:4 Amuuchi ang'alaal agane ko uu okweek, nda ka saboonwekwok ko saboondanyu; ta kamuuchi atuiyo ng'aleek agirindaenak, ak alelech metinnyu agobo okweek." 
Job16:5 Kata agimiitok eng' kutinnyu, ak kata tisei ng'wanindang'wong' kagaigaetap kutinnyu." 
Job16:6 Agot ngang'alaali, koma kitisei ng'wanindanyu; ak agot ngamuite, ko kagimuung'wa eng' nee?" 
Job16:7 Kago koono nguno Kamuktaindet ang'et; ak kaigoochi koonnyu tugul koguber. 
Job16:8 Kaigiicha miising', nooto ne paoryanjino; ng'eetyina sagitennyu, kobaoryanjino kimni agobo tengekwogikyuk." 
Job16:9 Kagogereera inee eng' nereegekyik ak kousa, kagosusya kelek ak kagonjurura punyondennyu." 
Job16:10 Kagoyatya kuut ak kororecho icheek; kagorabacha eng' chotisyet, iyumjinagei che chaang' kogirindaa." 
Job16:11 Igoochino `Kamuktaindet piik che yaacheen, ak kotoortacha eunegap kiptengeginik." 
Job16:12 Ki amuunyi, ak ki iria; kagonama kaatit ak kowiirta konyaknyagana. Kagondea kogeny aek kiit ne mwogei;" 
Job16:13 yiema mwogikyik. Petei suennyu, ama riiree; roong'jin ng'wony kipsegetetyennyu." 
Job16:14 Kagoiria konyil che chaang'; labatyina ko uu chiito chemosit. 
Job16:15 Kaanapchi kuniok poortanyu, ak kaande kuinennyu ng'wony." 
Job16:16 Kagong'emak togeennyu eng' riirek, ak mi urwetap meet irirenigap konyekyuk." 
Job16:17 Agot ngo ma mi koroomnateet eunekyuk, ak ko tiliil saaennyu." 
Job16:18 Ee ng'wony, ametuch korotiikyuk, amegoochi riirekyuk ole imuung'ee." 
Job16:19 Agot nguno, komi paoryandennyu kipsengwet, mi parak ineendet ne paoryanjino." 
Job16:20 Sasa choronokyuk: roong'jin konyekyuk peegap kong' Kamuktaindet. 
Job16:21 Kata myee nda kang'alaali chii ne kata anee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ko uu ye yaei chii agobo chiitap kokwennyi!" 
Job16:22 Amu ye kagosiirto kenyiisyek che ng'ering', awe ooreet ne ma aweeksei.”" 
Job17:1 “Kago keskei saboondanyu, kagobek peetuusyekyuk, choboot kererit agobo anee." 
Job17:2 Iman mi kobooto che chotisyei, keerei konyekyuk tagisyennywa." 
Job17:3 Koono kiit ne po kayasyoet, egu inyee ne itononwo. Ng'oo age ne kenamegei euun?" 
Job17:4 Amu keuny muguleldanywa si ma iguiyo; metoroori anyun icheek amu nooto. 
Job17:5 Ineendet ne igoitoi choronokyik agobo kelunet, ko kortos konyegap lagokyik." 
Job17:6 Kagoyaa aek kalewenet eng' piik; ak kaaegu ne kiwechei ne keerei piik tugul. 
Job17:7 Kagoimenitu konyekyuk amu arageneet, ak uu kebeberwekyuk tugul urwet." 
Job17:8 Kwong'dos piik che po iman agobo niito, ng'eetei ne ma tinyei leluut kogirinda piik che yaacheen." 
Job17:9 Agot ngo uu nooto kowendi ne po iman eng' ooreennyi, ak ineendet ne tinyei eunek che tiliileen kotesaksei kogimitu kosiir." 
Job17:10 Ago oweeige okweek tugul, obwa nguno, amanyooru anee chii ne ng'oom eng' kwenung'wong'." 
Job17:11 Kagosiirto peetuusyekyuk, kagobutogis chobutikyuk, agot kabwaatutigap muguleldanyu." 
Job17:12 Walei icheek kemout koek peet; leen, ‘Neegityin lapkeiyet ak mesundeito.’" 
Job17:13 Imuuch acheeng' ye mi che ki kobek koek koonnyu, ak aiite kiit ne arue eng' mesundeito." 
Job17:14 Ngot aleenji ng'emisyet, ‘Ii kwandanyu,’ Aleenji kuutyet, ‘Ii kamennyu’ anan ‘Ii chepkamennyu,’" 
Job17:15 komi ano anyun kamang'unennyu? Keerei ng'oo anyun kamang'unennyu? 
Job17:16 Tos chortogei agoi temeleiywegap ye mi che ki kobek? Tos kibe tuwai ole mi temburyek?” 
Job18:1 Ki wol anyun `Bildad Suindet kole," 
Job18:2 “Oriiche mestetap ng'aleek kot kotyanit? Obwaat, ye ibata keng'alaal." 
Job18:3 Amu nee si kiitech keele ki tyong'ik, keng'woneegitu eng' taing'ung'?" 
Job18:4 Imuuchi igereer suumeeguk eng' nereegek, ago tos kimetoi ng'wony agobo inyee? Anan tos yai nooto keistoi rwandet eng' komostanyi?" 
Job18:5 Ki misi lapkeiyetap kiptengegeginik, ama kokweng'sei liplibenetap maannyi." 
Job18:6 Imenitu lapkeiyet eng' emainnyi, ak ki misi tainnyi ne mi paragunnyi." 
Job18:7 Kisagiti tyegutigap kimnateennyi, ak kowiirtoi ineendet kirwoogennyi." 
Job18:8 Amu ki kowiirchi keelyekyik ineendet mesteet ne uu regereiywot, ak wendote mestonok che ki kituch." 
Job18:9 Namei mesteetap porowet kwaryandennyi, ak namei ineendet mesteet ne po kariik." 
Job18:10 Kagiuny eng' ng'wony mesteetap rogoet agobo ineendet, ak keriinget ne kagiuny eng' ooreet agobo ineendet." 
Job18:11 Igoochin kamuisosyek ineendet koiyweis eng' komosta age tugul, ak koonat ineendet kot koriich." 
Job18:12 Amei rubeet kimnateennyi, ak choboot nyalilda konach ineendet." 
Job18:13 Amei kebeberwegap poortanyi, amei taita ne po meet, kebeberwekyik." 
Job18:14 Kitutu ineendet eng' emainnyi ne ki imang'u; Ak kimutyi laitoryatap kamuisosyek. 
Job18:15 Menyei emainnyi kiit ne ma nenyi: Kiseere meng'ootennyi koik che laldos. 
Job18:16 Yaamdos tigitikyik eng' oriit, ak keep temennyi eng' parak." 
Job18:17 Lusei kabwaatennyi eng' ng'wony, ama nyooru kaina eng' ooreet." 
Job18:18 Ki oonei eng' ole mi lapkeiyet kwo mesundeito, ak keoon eng' ng'wony." 
Job18:19 Ma nyooru `ineendet weeriit anan mochogoret eng' piikyik, ama ng'etyin chii eng' ole menyei." 
Job18:20 Kwong'dos eng' peetuunnyi icheeget che piitu let, ko uu ye ki iyweis che ki indou." 
Job18:21 Uu nooto iman meng'otosyegap che ma po iman, ak niito ko komostap ineendet ne ma ingen Kamuktaindet.”" 
Job19:1 Ki wol anyun Job kole," 
Job19:2 “Onyaliilii saboondanyu agoi kotyanit, ak otonatonena ng'aleek agoi au?" 
Job19:3 Ka ochota konyil taman. Nyolu olilanse amu oyaiywo eng' koroomnateet. 
Job19:4 Ngo ki alel iman, kotebena lelutyennyu." 
Job19:5 Ngot oeetkei agobo anee, ak orwookwo agobo chotisyennyu." 
Job19:6 Onai anyun ole kagogabua Kamuktaindet, ak koyiemena regereiywondennyi." 
Job19:7 Ogeero, ariire amu koroomnateet, ago ma kigasa; ariire agobo toreteet, ago ma mi kirwooget." 
Job19:8 Kago ng'oot ooreennyu kot koma muuchi abun, ak kagonde mesundeito ortinwekyuk." 
Job19:9 Kago reegunena toroornatennyu, ak kagoreegunena naaryeet ne po laitornatet." 
Job19:10 Kagotua eng' komosta age tugul, ak ma ami. Ak kagotut kamang'unennyu ko uu keetit." 
Job19:11 Kagolalyo kogeny nereegekyik agobo anee, ak kagoiita kole aa age eng' puunikyik." 
Job19:12 Pwoonei kweanaikyik che po lugeet kobookyino, ak komeng'iis komuut emainnyu." 
Job19:13 Kagoistoena tupchosyekyuk kolooena, Ak ki kobesyena miising' piik che ki ngenge." 
Job19:14 Kagobagaakta tilyonutikyuk, ak koutyeno choronokyuk che angen komyee." 
Job19:15 Kagoiita piik che menyei koonnyu ak otwogikyuk che tiibiik aige too: Aa kipsagarin eng' tainnywa. 
Job19:16 Aguure otwogindennyu, ama wolwo kiy, Agot ngagaigai miising'." 
Job19:17 Kagoek kabusennyu kiy ne too eng' kwondanyu, ak kagoek soomennyu agine kiy ne too eng' lagogap kamennyu." 
Job19:18 Saso agot lagok che mengech, ngang'eet, kong'alaal kawekwa kuut." 
Job19:19 Wecha choronokyuk che ko ki chamdosi miising', ak wecho che ki achame." 
Job19:20 Namegei kawekyuk ak iriryonnyu ak panyeekyuk, kachilile ui kitigin." 
Job19:21 Orirena, orirena, ee choronokyuk, amu kagotwaa eutap Kamuktaindet." 
Job19:22 Amu nee si ousa ko uu Kamuktaindet, ama yamak panyeekyuk?" 
Job19:23 Ee, kata myee kesir ng'aleekyuk nguno! Ee, kata myee kesirchi bukuit!" 
Job19:24 Kesire kalamitap karnet ak ngosyelait, ki kisirchi rwandet agoi koigeny!" 
Job19:25 Ago angen ale sabei Katyagindennyu, ak tuun tonone ng'wony eng' peetuut ne po let." 
Job19:26 Ak ye kagong'emak iriryondennyu ko uu ni, ageere Kamuktaindet koma ami eng' poortanyu;" 
Job19:27 Ne tuun ageere kimni, ak keerei konyekyuk ineendet, ma keerei age. Ichuchui saboondanyu eng' oriitinnyu." 
Job19:28 Ngot omwa ole, Ki ustoi ano ineendet! Amu ki kenyoorcha kiit ne punu ng'olyoondoniito;" 
Job19:29 Oiywei rotwetap chok, amu ibu nereegek pireet ne po rotwetap chok, si kobiit onai ole mi kirwooget.”" 
Job20:1 Kowol anyun Zophar Naamatindet kole," 
Job20:2 “Koono kabwaatutikyuk waluunet, amu ng'olyootap chirchirto ne atinye." 
Job20:3 Ka agas kereetap kong' ne kagoono alilan, ak wolwo naennyu." 
Job20:4 Tos ki tom iguiye niito kobooch keny, kobooch nginde chiito ng'wony," 
Job20:5 ile, nwach poiboiyetap kiptengeginik, ak po sait ne ming'in kagasetapkei ne po ne ma iywei Kamuktaindet?" 
Job20:6 Agot ngo togosta etunatennyi kipsengwet, ak koit metinnyi poolik," 
Job20:7 kolusei koigeny ko uu ng'atateekyik. Teebei che ki kogeer ineendet kole, ‘Mi ano?’" 
Job20:8 Siirtoi ko uu karwotitoet, ama kenyooru. Ee, ki oonei ko uu ng'ang'utyetap kemoi." 
Job20:9 Ma kogeerei kogeny konda ne kiga kogeer ineendet, ama kogeerei ineendet komostanyi kogeny." 
Job20:10 Cheeng'ei lagokyik chameet eng' kibananook, ak koweech eunekyik mogornatennyi." 
Job20:11 Nyiitaat kawekyik ming'inatennyi, ago ruitos ak ineendet eng' temburyek." 
Job20:12 Nganda anyiny tengekto eng' kutinnyi, nganda unyei eng' ng'elyeptanyi," 
Job20:13 nganda riiree ama chamjin kwo, ago riibei eng' kutinnyi," 
Job20:14 ago walaksei amitwogikyik eng' moennyi, egu ng'wonetap erenook eng' oriitinnyi." 
Job20:15 Ki kolugui mogornatosyek ak kong'ung'u kogeny; tumdoi Kamuktaindet chooto eng' moennyi. 
Job20:16 Chuchuni ng'wonetap erenook; parei ineendet `ng'elyeptap ereneet. 
Job20:17 Ma keerei ainoosyek, anan ko kereruusyek che rootei che po kumyat ak mwanigap cheego." 
Job20:18 Iweegu tuguuk che ki kobirtochigei eng' poisyet, ak malugui. Ma paibaitu ko uu eng' tuguuk che ki konor." 
Job20:19 Amu ki inyaliil kibananook ak kometo, ki korep koot eng' koroomnateet, ak ma teechei kogeny." 
Job20:20 Amu ki ma nai kamuung'et eng' oriitinnyi, ma saru kiy age tugul ne iboiboi ineendet." 
Job20:21 Ma ng'et kiy ne ki ma am. Nooto anyun, ma tebyei mogornatennyi." 
Job20:22 Pichiityin eng' chaang'indap tuguukyik, ityin ineendet eutap age tugul ne nyalili." 
Job20:23 Ye machei konyiit moennyi, kowiire `Kamuktaindet ineendet nereegekyik che koroomen, ak koyookyi `Kamuktaindet ineendet nereegekyik ko uu ropta, ye amisyei." 
Job20:24 Nga mwee `icheek kariigap lugeet, kotooree ineendet `kwangetap sugunwet kosore." 
Job20:25 Ng'usu, ak komong' eng' poortanyi, ak mang'une kipsegetetyennyi walit ne liilei piich; mi paragunnyi kamuisosyek." 
Job20:26 Kagigonorchi mesundeito tuguukyik che korooron; peelei ineendet maat ne maguutei chii, peelei che ng'etunotiin eng' emainnyi." 
Job20:27 Ng'aanyei kipsengwet tengektanyi, ak kong'eet ng'wony kogirinda ineendet." 
Job20:28 Istogei mogornateetap koonnyi, iseeroksei eng' peetuutap nereegekyik." 
Job20:29 Niito kebeberta ne po kiptengekyot, ne punu Kamuktaindet, ak poroteet ne ki lewenji `Kamuktaindet ineendet.”" 
Job21:1 Kowol anyun Job kole," 
Job21:2 “Oepchi iit komyee ng'alaalennyu; ak ingoek niito kagaigaeng'wong'. 
Job21:3 Ogang'wa, si ang'alaal agane, ak ye kaang'alaal, ochotisye." 
Job21:4 Tos ariir anee agobo chii? Ak amu nee si ma egu chii ne ma muitoi? 
Job21:5 Ogeera, si okwong'ye, ak onam kutusweekwok." 
Job21:6 Agot ye abwaat tuguuk che ki ityo, aarageni, aarageni ak abootan." 
Job21:7 Amu nee si kosaptos kiptengeginik, koosegitu, ee, kogimegitu ak kotesaksei?" 
Job21:8 Kimegitu iyotennywa eng' tainnywa, ak kogimegitu lagokwak kogeerei." 
Job21:9 Mi kaalyeet kooriikwak, ama mi kaiyweisyet, ama mi kirokto ne po Kamuktaindet paragunnywa." 
Job21:10 Riisyei kirginnywa, ama mi kaiyweisyet: Iytos tuukwak, ama oosu." 
Job21:11 Imaandoi lagokwak ko uu akweetap keechiirek, ak urerendos lagokwak." 
Job21:12 Tyendos eng' sugutit ak ketubet, ak koboiboitu eng' cheetap ndurerut," 
Job21:13 Poisyee peetuusyekwak eng' poroteet, ak ne matyanit kochoorchigei ye mi che ki kobek." 
Job21:14 Ago ki leenji Kamuktaindet, ‘Istoeneige. Amu ma kimache kenai ortinweguk." 
Job21:15 Ng'oo Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, kot koet? Ak nee kelunet ne kesiche ngot kesaa ineendet?’" 
Job21:16 Ogeero, manamu icheeget porotennywa. Looena kirwoogetap kiptengeginik." 
Job21:17 Kimisi tait ne po kiptengeginik konyil ata? Kot konyonji icheeget pichiindanywa? Kot kopcheita Kamuktaindet aragenosyek eng' nereegekyik? 
Job21:18 Ak koigei icheek mobeek eng' taitap usoonet, ak koigei meteteek che ibei usoonet ne oo?" 
Job21:19 Oleen konorchin Kamuktaindet lagogap chiichooto tengektanyi. Ago aleen, ingogeerchigei, si kobiit konai." 
Job21:20 Ingogeer konyekyik ng'emisyennyi, ak ingoee nereegegap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Job21:21 Amu igoochin koonnyi ineendet poiboiyo nee ye kagobata ineendet, ye kitil koitetap arawekyik eng' kwenet?" 
Job21:22 Tos ineeti chii Kamuktaindet naet? Amu irwookyin che torooreen. 
Job21:23 Meei age ko nyiitaat kimnateennyi, kotinyei kaalyeet ne oo ak komuunyi:" 
Job21:24 Nyiitootiin kinaikyik cheego, tuonen mwanigap kawekyik." 
Job21:25 Meei age eng' ng'wanindap saboondo, Ama chamchami kiy ne myee." 
Job21:26 Kergei tugul, ruitos eng' ng'ung'unyek. Ak tuchei kuutik icheek." 
Job21:27 Ogeero, angen kabwaatutikwok, ak chobutik che obwaati eng' ooreet ne ya agobo anee." 
Job21:28 Amu oleen, ‘Mi ano kootap pounindet? Ak mi ano emait ne ki menyei kiptengeginik?’" 
Job21:29 Tos ma oteebe icheek che siirtoi? Amongen kaboorunaikwak? 
Job21:30 Ole, ki kigonorchi chiito ne ya peetuutap pichiindo? Ole, kimuti eng' peetuutap nereegek?" 
Job21:31 Ng'oo ne mwaitoi ooreennyi eng' tainnyi? Ak ng'oo ne yaakyin ineendet kiit ne kayai? 
Job21:32 Nganda uu nooto kelaei kwo kererit, ak koriip kererit." 
Job21:33 Anyinyitu eng' ineendet mogooroonigap atebweet, ak isubi piik tugul ineendet, ko uu che ki kondoe ineendet che ma iitoksei." 
Job21:34 Omuktoi ano anyun ogaigaa puch, amu mi lembechek kityo waluunoikwok?”" 
Job22:1 Kowol anyun Eliphas Temanindet kole," 
Job22:2 tos imuuchi chii kotoret Kamuktaindet? Toretigei iman ineendet ne ng'oom. 
Job22:3 Tos poiboitu Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet ngeele ii po iman? Anan tos nyooru ineendet kelunet amu iyae ortinweguk koek che ititaatiin? 
Job22:4 Tos kerin kong' amu kaiyweisyet ne iywei ineendet, kot obe tuwai kirwooget?" 
Job22:5 Tos ma oo tengektong'ung'? Ama tinyei tengekwogiguk ole igeesunegei. 
Job22:6 Amu ki iyasyechi puch ne otupche, ak ireegune ngoroikwak che mi aach ngor." 
Job22:7 Ki ma inage peek ne kang'et, ak ki imelel amitwogik ne amei rubeet." 
Job22:8 Ago ki po emet chiito ne nyigan; Ak ki meny olooto chiito ne tinyei teegisto. 
Job22:9 Ki ioon mosoogik koba ak euut puch, ak kigeiri eunegap che ma tinyei kwanisyek." 
Job22:10 Kayiemin anyun mestonok, ak inyaliilin kaiyweisyet ne kacheein." 
Job22:11 Anan mesundeito, kot koma imuuchi igeerte. Ak komaluuchin chaang'indap peek." 
Job22:12 Tos ma mi Kamuktaindet ole toroor eng' kipsengwet? Ak keero, toroorindap kecheik, ile, mi parak ne tya!" 
Job22:13 Ak imwae ile, Ingen nee Kamuktaindet? Tos imuuchi korwooch eng' mesundeito ne oo?" 
Job22:14 Tuchei ineendet poolik che eecheen, si ma keerto; Ak wendoti eng' yiemutyetap kipsengwet." 
Job22:15 Isubi ooreet ne po keny ne kityech piik che yaacheen? 
Job22:16 Che ki king'us kotom kogeskei peetuusyekwak, che ki kitumda lumeiywekwak ko uu peegap kereruut:" 
Job22:17 Che ki leenji Kamuktaindet, Istoeneige; Ak, Nee ne imuuchi koyaiywech Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet?" 
Job22:18 Ago ki inyiit ineendet kooriikwak tuguuk che myach: Ago loo eng' anee kirwoogetap kiptengeginik. 
Job22:19 Keerei nooto che po iman, ak koboiboitu; Ak rorechin icheek che ma tinyei leluut kogengenie:" 
Job22:20 Koleen, Kigeisto iman icheek che kileen kogirindech, ak ki koges maat icheek che kiga ng'et." 
Job22:21 Onaiye anyun ak ineendet ak itebee kaalyeet: Si konyonjin kiit ne myee. 
Job22:22 Asaain ale, taach ng'atuutyet ne punu kutinnyi, ak igonoree muguleldang'ung' ng'aleekyik." 
Job22:23 Ngot iweekyigei Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, keteechin; Ngot iiste tengekto kolooit eng' emaisyeguk." 
Job22:24 Ak igonor konoraiguk eng' ng'ung'unyek, ak igonor thahabu che po Opir eng' koik che po kereruusyek;" 
Job22:25 Ak koek Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet konorweng'ung', ak koek fedha ne po kamanuutyet ne oo eng' inyee." 
Job22:26 Ibaibaegei anyun Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, Ak inyal Kamuktaindet." 
Job22:27 Isa anyun ineendet ak kogasin: Ak iyaakte arorutiguk. 
Job22:28 Ing'ate kogeny kiy, ak ki kimitun; Ak koluuchi lapkeiyet ortinweguk." 
Job22:29 Ye kiwiirchin ng'wony, imwa ile ta ang'eete; ak kosaru che iming'inegei." 
Job22:30 Saru agot ineendet ne ma po iman: Ee, kisaru amu tiliilindap euneguk." 
Job23:1 Kowol anyun Job kole," 
Job23:2 kang'wanit rani kang'unyng'unyennyu. Nyigiis pirennyu kosiir tigenennyu. 
Job23:3 Kata myee nda kangen ole anyoorchini ineendet, si kobiit ait ole mi ng'echerennyi!" 
Job23:4 Ta achobe ng'olyoondennyu eng' tainnyi, Ak anyiit kutinnyu tiiyasyek." 
Job23:5 Si anae ng'aleek che wolwo, ak aguiye kiit ne mwaiwo ineendet." 
Job23:6 Tos kibeligei eng' ooindap kamuktaennyi? Achicha; epchino iit. 
Job23:7 Imuuchi ne po iman kong'alaaljin ak ineendet eng' olooto. Si kesarwo koigeny eng' ineendet ne irwokwo. 
Job23:8 Ogeero awendi tai, ago ma mi ineendet, ak aweechigei let, ago ma muuchi ageer ineendet." 
Job23:9 Awendi murot kaataam ole poisyee, ago ma muuchi ageer ineendet. Ung'egei komostap tai, si ma muuch ageer ineendet." 
Job23:10 Ago ingen ineendet ooreet ne abune, ye kagotyema, among'u aige thahabu." 
Job23:11 Kagonamgei keldanyu ak tyegutikyik; Kaasup ooreennyi, ama amaste." 
Job23:12 Ma aweege let amete ng'atuutyetap kutinnyi; Kaagonor ng'aleek che punu kutinnyi kosiir amitwogik che nyoljino. 
Job23:13 Ne siirei, koma walaksei kabwaatutikyik eng' anee, ak tos ng'oo ne imuuchi kowal ineendet? Ak kiit ne machei saboondanyi koyai, koyaei nooto." 
Job23:14 Amu yaei ineendet nooto kageng'atwa. Ak mi tuguuk che chaang' che uu chooto kobooto ineendet. 
Job23:15 Anyalili anyun eng' tainnyi; Ye abwaat, aiywei ineendet." 
Job23:16 Amu kagogoochi `Kamuktaindet muguleldanyu kotanui, ak kagonyalila Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Job23:17 Amu ki ma kiistoo kotom kobiit mesundeito, Ama tuch ineendet mesundeito ne oo eng' tainnyu." 
Job24:1 “Amu nee si ma konor Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet peetuusyek? Ak amu nee si ma keer peetuusyekyik icheek che ingen ineendet? 
Job24:2 Mi che istoi kiwotosyek. Rebei icheek eng' kimnateet akwotisyegap keechiirek, ak koyaga." 
Job24:3 Kweryei icheek sigiryetap che ma tinyei sigiik, namei eitap mosoget agobo pesendo." 
Job24:4 Imaasi che panandos; ung'egei uwak kibananogap ng'wony. 
Job24:5 Pendi icheek poisyennywa ko uu oloitigeet eng' surkwen, kocheeng'oti amitwogik. Igoochin `surkwen icheek amitwogik agobo lagokwak." 
Job24:6 Kesei amitwogikwak eng' mbar, ak koturoti logoegap kiptengeginik." 
Job24:7 Ruitos aach ngor kemout komugul, ama tinyei kiit ne tugegei eng' kaitityet." 
Job24:8 Inesyin roptap tuloonook icheek, ak ure rwandet amu ma tinyei ole ume." 
Job24:9 Mi che ng'use kinaik che ma tinyei kwanisyek, ak konamei tuguugap kibananook agobo pesendo." 
Job24:10 Kot kobendat aach ngor, nga amei rubeet, kebirchin koibot ratuutigap peek." 
Job24:11 Che yaei mwanik eng' oriititap inatusyegap pichuuto, ago ma kichamjin kochamcham mwayato. Ak nga amei melel, kotyechei ole kitue sabibuk, ama ei." 
Job24:12 Tigendos piik eng' nganaseet ne chaang' piik, ak koriirtos saboonwegap piik che ki kiguoten, Ago ma iityi Kamuktaindet perberyet." 
Job24:13 Chuuto ko che po icheek che ingeleljin lapkeiyet. Ma naei ortinwekyik, Ama tebee ortinwekyik." 
Job24:14 Ng'eetei rumiindet ko kaeech kobar kibananook ak che ma tinyei kiy, ak uu ineendet choorindet kemoi." 
Job24:15 Igeni kondap ne ibegei ko ratarat, koleen, ‘Mageera chii.’ Walei togeennyi." 
Job24:16 Yaatei kooriik kemoi, ak kerchingei ko peet. Ma naei lapkeiyet." 
Job24:17 Amu karon eng' icheek tugul ko uu urwetap meet; Amu ingen kamuisosyegap urwetap meet. 
Job24:18 Labatee ineendet paragutap peek; Chuboot kebebertanywa eng' ng'wony. Ma punei ooreetap mbareenigap sabibuk. 
Job24:19 Istoi kemeut ak kiptoret peegap teluji: Uu nooto, istoi ye mi che ki kobek che ki koyai tengekto." 
Job24:20 Utye moet ne kisichei ineendet. Amei kuutik ineendet eng' anyinyindo. Ma kibwaati kogeny, ak keiri ne ma po iman ko uu keetit." 
Job24:21 Amei ineendet ne soon, che ma yachin ne myee mosoget." 
Job24:22 Ichuuti che kiimeen ak icheek eng' kamugennyi: Ng'eetei, ama tinyei chii kamang'unetap sabeet." 
Job24:23 Igoochin Kamuktaindet icheek kotebee ole mi kaalyeet, ak komuung'e yooto. Ak komi konyekyik ortinwekwak." 
Job24:24 Kitoroori, ak ne matyanit, kobetyo; Ee, kiming'ini anyun, keistoi eng' ooreet ko uu alak tugul. Kitilei ko uu ye kigesei peek." 
Job24:25 Ak ngot koma uu nooto anyun, ko ng'oo ne mwaei kole aa kiplembechwa, ak kowal ng'aleekyuk koek che ma tilei kiy?”" 
Job25:1 Kowol anyun Bildad Suindet kole 
Job25:2 pounateet ak kaiyweisyet ko po Kamuktaindet. Yaei kaalyeet eng' komoswekyik che torooreen. 
Job25:3 Tos iitoksei lugosyekyik? Ak ng'oo ne ma iluuchin lapkeiyennyi? 
Job25:4 Imuktoi ano anyun chii koek ne po iman eng' taitap Kamuktaindet? Ak tiliilitundoi ano ineendet ne ki sich kwony? 
Job25:5 Ngot ko agot arawet koma tinyei kaluunet, ama tiliileen kecheik eng' tainnyi," 
Job25:6 kotam nee anyun chiito, ne ineendet ko kuut! Ak weeriitap chii ne kuut!" 
Job26:1 Kowol anyun Job kole," 
Job26:2 ketoretite ano chii ne ma tinyei kamuget! Kesaruunde ano eutap ineendet ne ma tinyei kimnateet! 
Job26:3 Ketigonde ano ineendet ne ma tinyei utaatyet, ak imwaite naet ne po iman eng' chaang'indo!" 
Job26:4 Kamwaun ng'oo ng'aleechu? Ak po ng'oo naet ne ki mong'unenen? 
Job26:5 Potandos icheek che ki kobek che mi peek oriit ak che menyei olooto. 
Job26:6 Mi puch ye mi che ki kobek eng' tainnyi, ama tinyei Ng'emisyet kiit ne kitugee." 
Job26:7 Iitoi murot kaataam ole ma mi kiy, ak kosonginin ng'wonyut eng' ole ma mi kiy." 
Job26:8 Ratei peek eng' polikyik che eecheen; Ama petoksei pooldet eng' kurereetap peechooto. 
Job26:9 Unyei togeetap arawet, ak koiitochi poldennyi paragutap arawanooto." 
Job26:10 Ki inde kiwoteet koyiem nyanjosyek, ki inde ole pcheegei lapkeiyet ak mesundeito." 
Job26:11 Potandos tolochigap kipsengwet ak ko kwong'dos eng' kerennyi po kong'. 
Job26:12 Wasei nyanjet eng' kamuktaennyi, Toorei Rahab kosore eng' kaguiyennyi." 
Job26:13 Ki lelesonjine kipsengwet kabuusennyi; kotoor eunnyi ereneet ne chepchep. 
Job26:14 Chuuto kogiwotosyegap ortinwekyik, ago ming'in ne tya chaamset ne kegase agobo ineendet! Ago iguitos ng'oo tuleetap kamuktaennyi?" 
Job27:1 Kigetyigei kogeny `Job kalewenennyi ak komwa kole: 
Job27:2 ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet, ne ki istoena imandanyu, ak ko uu ye sabei Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, ne kigonyalil saboondanyu," 
Job27:3 kotee kota kochamegei saboondanyu eng' oriitinnyu, ak mi Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet seruunekyuk;" 
Job27:4 Iman, koma mwaei kutinnyu ne ma po iman, anan komwa ng'elyeptanyu ng'aalseet." 
Job27:5 Achicha, ma iityinok imanda; ma metoi imandanyu agoi ameei." 
Job27:6 Aname imandanyu kouiit, machundoi; ma kera kong' muguleldanyu ko ta asabe." 
Job27:7 Ingogergeit punyondennyu ak kiptengekyot, ak ingoigei ineendet ne ng'eetyina, chiito ne ma po iman." 
Job27:8 Nee kamang'unetap chii ne ma iywei Kamuktaindet, agot ngo sikyigei kelunet, ye isto Kamuktaindet saboondanyi?" 
Job27:9 Tos kasei Kamuktaindet riirekyik, ye kanyonji ineendet nyalilda?" 
Job27:10 Tos ibaibaegei Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, ak koguur Kamuktaindet eng' peetuusyek tugul?" 
Job27:11 Aneetook agobo eutap Kamuktaindet, ma unyei kiit ne tinyei Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Job27:12 Ki ogeer nooto okweek tugul, amu nee anyun si oegu che ma tilei kiy agot kitigin?" 
Job27:13 Niito ko kebebertap kiptengekyot eng' Kamuktaindet, ak poroteetap usiik, che taachei eng' Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet," 
Job27:14 nga tesatiin lagokyik, kobunjiin rotwetap chok; Ama yamei amitwogik lagokyik." 
Job27:15 Che kang'etune ineendet, ketubei eng' meet, ama riirtos mosoogikyik." 
Job27:16 Agot ngobas fedhaisyek ko uu temburyek, ak kochop ngoroik ko uu meneet."
