Job27:17 Imuuchi kochop, ago ilaachi piigap iman, ak kopchechigei fedhaisyechooto piik che ma tinyei leluut." 
Job27:18 Teechei koonnyi ko uu ne po kiproroktet, Ak ko uu keryet ne teechei riibindet." 
Job27:19 Ruei ko mogoryo, ago ma kiyumi; Kosu, ago ma komi." 
Job27:20 Namei ineendet kamuisosyek ko uu peek, Chorei ineendet usoonet ne oo kemoi." 
Job27:21 Ibei ineendet usoonet ne po kong'asiis, ak kwo, ak kobukto ineendet kwo eng' oldanyi." 
Job27:22 Amu wiirei `Kamuktaindet ineendet ama riiree. Machei komwee eunnyi. 
Job27:23 Iraprabi piik eunekwak agobo ineendet, Ak koon ineendet eng' oldanyi." 
Job28:1 “Iman, miitei keriinget ne kebalune fedha, ak komostap thahabu che itiliili icheek." 
Job28:2 Kibalune kariik ng'wony, Ak kitang'unee sugunonik koik." 
Job28:3 Chobei chiito lapkeiyet eng' mesundeito, isyachi kot koit ole pooch eng' ole loo, ye cheeng'e koik eng' mesundeito ne oo." 
Job28:4 Palei keriinget ole looe ole menyei piik. Utye icheeget che siirtoi; Igartatotiin icheeget eng' ole looe piik, ak kosonginindos kobendi komosi ak komosi." 
Job28:5 Mang'une `ng'wony amitwogigap ng'wony, ago walaksei ole po oriit kogeerei parak ko uu ye walei maat." 
Job28:6 Ingen chiito kocheeng' koigap komostap sapphire, ak koik che tinyei ng'ung'unyegap thahabu." 
Job28:7 Ma naei oranooto toriityon ne parisyei, Ak tomo kogeer matonda oranooto:" 
Job28:8 Tom kotyech yooto tyong'ik che menot, ak tomo kobun yooto ng'etundo ne koroom." 
Job28:9 Iyogoitoi eunnyi si kotwaei rwandet ne uui, igabui tuloonook." 
Job28:10 Petei ole punei peek eng' rwandosyek; Ak kogeerei kondanyi kiit age tugul ne po kamanuutyet. 
Job28:11 Kerei ainoosyek si maroot, ak imoong'u kiit ne ung'aat konyo lapkeiyet." 
Job28:12 Ago kinyoorchin ano utaatyet? Ak menyei ano komostap kaguiyet? 
Job28:13 Ma naei chii alyetap nooto, amu ma kinyoorchin emetap piik che saptos." 
Job28:14 Leen rireet, ‘Ma mi oldanyu,’ ak leen nyanjet, ‘Ma mi oldanyu.’" 
Job28:15 Ma kimuuchi keale thahabu, ama kigeere fedha koek kamanuutyennyi." 
Job28:16 Ma kimuuchi kiroge thahabu che po Opir, ama kimuuchi kiroge soam che po kamanuutyet ne oo, anan ko sapphire." 
Job28:17 Ma kimuuchi ki aechine ng'omnateet thahabu ak klasit. Ama kiwale tuguuk che po thahabu che korooron. 
Job28:18 Ma kimwaei tuguuk che piriireen che mi ngeguut anan sonoek che korooron. Ee, alyetap utaatyet kosiirei ne po peninim." 
Job28:19 Ma ki aechindos ak topasio ne po Kush, Ama kirogendoi thahabu che tiliileen." 
Job28:20 Punu ano anyun utaatyet? Ak menyei ano komostap kaguiyet? 
Job28:21 Amu ki kiung'e konyegap tuguuk che saptos, ak keung'e toriitik che po parak." 
Job28:22 Leen Ng'emisyet ak Meet, ‘Kigegas eng' itiikyok ng'aleek che kimwaoti agobo ng'omnatanooto.’" 
Job28:23 Ingen Kamuktaindet ooreennyi, ak ingen oldanyi." 
Job28:24 Amu keerei ineendet ole poochin ng'wony, ak keerei kureret komugul ne po kipsengwet;" 
Job28:25 Si kogoochi usoonet nyigiisindo, Ee, ikwai peek eng' kakwautyet." 
Job28:26 Ye kingo yai ng'atuutyetap ropta, ak koyai ooreetap kalyeleetap tuleet:" 
Job28:27 Kogeer anyun ak komwaita; Ki igimit, ee, ak kosyach." 
Job28:28 Ak ki mwachi chiito, koleenji, ‘Ogeero, ngiywei Kiptaiyat, ko utaatyet nooto; Ak ngeistoegei yaityet, ko kaguiyet nooto.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Ak kigetyigei Job kogeny kalewenennyi kole," 
Job29:2 “Kata kaigai nda ka uu kiit ne ki auu eng' arawek che po keny, Eng' peetuusyek che kiriibo Kamuktaindet;" 
Job29:3 Ye ki iluuchin tainnyi metinnyu, ak ki awendotee mesundeito eng' lapkeiyennyi." 
Job29:4 Ko uu ye ki auu eng' peetuusyegap neratennyu, ye kimi ung'ootyetap Kamuktaindet emainnyu," 
Job29:5 ye kita komi kobooto Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, ak ye kimi lagokyuk kobooto." 
Job29:6 Ye ki kiuune tyegutikyuk mwaitap cheego, ak kiroong'wa rwandet ainoosyegap mwanik!" 
Job29:7 Chooto peetuusyek che ki awendi agoi ormariichetap nganaseet, Ye ki achobe ng'echerennyu eng' ooreet ne oo." 
Job29:8 Kigeera murenik ak kounygei, ak king'eetya che oosen kotononso." 
Job29:9 Kisiisyo pounik, ak konam kutusweekwak." 
Job29:10 Ki ma twek piik che taagunotiin, ak kinamak kuut." 
Job29:11 Amu ye ki ngegasa, kiberuura, ak ye ki ngegeera, kebaoryanjo." 
Job29:12 Amu ki asaru kibananiat ne kirirei, ak ne ki ma kotinyei kwanda agine, ne ki ma kotinyei chii ne toreti." 
Job29:13 Ki nyoonjo kaberuretap ineendet ne kimachei kolus: Ak ki agoochi muguleldap mosoget kotyen eng' poiboiyet. 
Job29:14 Ki alaach imanda ak kitucha. Ki uu imandanyu ngoryeet ne po teegisto ak chepkuletap toroornatet. 
Job29:15 Ki aegu konyegap kipkoraatyat, ak aegu keelyegap ne salamwo." 
Job29:16 Ki aegu kwandap che ma tinyei kiy: Ak ki asyaach kirwoogetap ineendet ne ki ma angen. 
Job29:17 Ak ki airii tagilgiligap piik che ma po iman, ak ang'usu eng' keelyekyik kiit ne kimachei kobar." 
Job29:18 Ki ale anyun, ‘Amechini koonnyu, ak ates peetuusyekyuk kochang'a ko uu ng'aniek." 
Job29:19 Iwaktoi tigitikyuk kobendi peek, ak kotebee rewoot temennyu kemout komugul:" 
Job29:20 Ta ko leel toroornatennyu ne mita, ak kileeliti kwangennyu eng' eunnyu.’" 
Job29:21 Ki epcha iit piik, ak koogenis kosiisyo si kobiit kogas katigonutikyuk." 
Job29:22 Kingo kaang'alaal, ko mata kotwek, Ak ki ibis icheek `ng'aleekyuk." 
Job29:23 Ak ki igeno ko uu ye igeni ropta; Ak ki iseng'eng'so miising' ko uu ye igeni ropta ne po let. 
Job29:24 King'a ng'erechi icheek, koma iyani, ak ma kirinda icheek lapkeiyetap togeennyu." 
Job29:25 Ki alewenji ooreenywa, ak atebi aegu kirwoogindet, ak ameny ko uu laitoryat ne mi lugeet, Ko uu chiito ne igoigoi che riirtos.”" 
Job30:1 Ago rorechino nguno che mengeechen eng' anee, icheek che ki asas kwanisyekwak ne ki ma amuuchi agot atuiyo icheek ak sesenigap akweennyu." 
Job30:2 Ee, kelwo nee anyun, eng' kimnateetap eunekwak? Piik che ki kobetyo kimnatosyekwak." 
Job30:3 Sogityotin eng' pananda ak rubeet. Amei ng'ung'unyek che yamyotiin, eng' ole mi mesundeitap pananda ak ng'emisyet." 
Job30:4 Putei sogegap keetitap muunyuk eng' ole neegitee timdo; ak amitwogikwak tigitigap junipa. 
Job30:5 Ki oonei koba eng' kwenutap piik, kiwaage icheek ko uu ye kiwaage choorindet." 
Job30:6 Kanyool komeny ole petotin eng' kereruusyek che yamyotiin, ak keriingonigap ng'wony ak che po rwandosyek." 
Job30:7 Iteitos eng' timiin ko uu sigiroik, iyumjigei kelutap keetiik che uu siwek." 
Job30:8 Icheeget ko lagogap piik che abusotiin, ee lagogap piik che iteweerotin. Ki kibiroot koba eng' emet." 
Job30:9 Kaaegu nguno tyendanywa, ee, kaaegu kalewenet eng' icheek." 
Job30:10 Wecha, itabaanenagei, ak sing'iljino togoch." 
Job30:11 Amu ki kotyach porowennyi ak konyalila, ki ireek eng' tainnyu kiit ne rang'egei." 
Job30:12 Ng'eetos eng' eunnyu ne po tai piik che yaacheen; ak kotoorta keelyekyuk koba taban, ak kobookyo eng' ortinwekwak che po ng'emisyet." 
Job30:13 Ng'emei ooreennyu ak kotesei nyalildanyu, piik che ma tinyei toretin." 
Job30:14 Pwonjino eng' ole kiundur kobarait: Miljinagei eng' ole kigoguber. 
Job30:15 Kagiweekyo kamuisosyek, oone teegistanyu ko uu ye onsei usoonet; Ak kagosiirto chamennyu pogei ko uu pooldet." 
Job30:16 Katumdagei anyun saboondanyu, kagonama peetuusyegap nyalilda." 
Job30:17 Kitoorei kawekyuk kemoi, ama siisei ng'wanindo ne nyea." 
Job30:18 Kang'emak ngoryennyu amu kimnateet ne oo ne po myandanyu. Igiicha ko uu kaatitap ngoryennyu. 
Job30:19 Kagowiircha ng'atateek, ak kaige temburyek ak oreek." 
Job30:20 Ariirchinin, amewolwo: Atononi, ago memage kiy igeera." 
Job30:21 Kaigoromitu eng' anee. Iusena kimnateetap eung'ung'. 
Job30:22 Iganapchino usoonet ak igoono alaany; Iwirtoto eng' usoonet ne oo. 
Job30:23 Ak angen ale imutyina meet, imutyina koot ne ki kichopchi piik tugul che saptos." 
Job30:24 Eng' Iman koma tokyin chii eunnyi karaita ne ki korurugok, ye mi eng' ng'emisyennyi ak kowaachei agobo tuguuchuuto." 
Job30:25 Tos ma ariir agobo ineendet ne ki mi nyalilda? Tos ma aragen saboondanyu agobo che ma tinyei kiy? 
Job30:26 Ye kinga cheeng' ne myee, konyo yaityet, ye ki ageni lapkeiyet, konyo mesundeito." 
Job30:27 Lalei moennyu, ama siisei; kabwanjo peetuusyegap nyalilda." 
Job30:28 Ariiroti, ma keere asiista; atononi eng' tuiyet ak ariir amache toreteet." 
Job30:29 Aa tupchetap lelwek, ak aa chorweetap tyong'igap songolik." 
Job30:30 Tuui iriryondennyu ak kosinditi, ak laldos kawekyuk eng' maat." 
Job30:31 Kawalak cheetap ketubennyu koek riirek. Ak kawalak cheetap ndurerunnyu koek cheetap icheeget che riirtos. 
Job31:1 Ki kiyomiske ak konyekyuk; si ma keer pergeiyat. 
Job31:2 Nee kebebertanyu ne punu Kamuktaindet eng' parak, ak tos nee porotennyu ne punu parak ne po Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet?" 
Job31:3 Tos ma ityin nyalilda che ma po iman, ak ng'emisyet eng' yaigap tengek?" 
Job31:4 Tos ma keerei ortinwekyuk, ak koiti kakwautikyuk tugul?" 
Job31:5 Ngot ko ki awendotee tangoita, ak kochaakta keldanyu kwo ole mi ng'aalseet," 
Job31:6 Ko ngegera anyun eng' karagendoet ne po iman, si kobiit konai Kamuktaindet imandanyu." 
Job31:7 Ngot ko kagomasta kakwaennyu, ak koosup muguleldanyu konyekyuk, ak ngot ko kagonam tisyet age tugul eunekyuk," 
Job31:8 ko myee agoolso anyun ak ingoam chiito age; Ee, ingitut peegap mbareennyu." 
Job31:9 Ngot ko ki kochuut kwony muguleldanyu, ak ki aribis eng' kurgeetap chiitap kokwennyu," 
Job31:10 ko ingong'aisechi anyun osotyondennyu chiito age, ak ingong'uruukyi alage ineendet." 
Job31:11 Amu kasetap myat ko tengekto ne oo, Tengek nooto ne nyoljin korwookyi kirwoogik." 
Job31:12 Amu nooto ko maat ne igeesu agoi Ng'emisyet, ak kotut ruratennyu tugul." 
Job31:13 Ngot ko ki asas ng'olyootap otwogindennyu ne muren anan ne tye, ye ki kitiytosi ak icheek:" 
Job31:14 Ko tos ayaei nee anyun ye kang'eet Kamuktaindet? Ak ye nyo koteepso, awoljini nee?" 
Job31:15 Ineendet ne kiyaa eng' moet, ko tos ma Ineendet ne kiyaei chiichooto agine? Tos ma Ineendet ne kimimiech eng' moet?" 
Job31:16 Tos ki amelel kibananook magennywa, anan tos ki agoochi konyegap mosoget kong'etyo?" 
Job31:17 Anan tos ki aam kererutyennyu aneege, ak tomo koam ne ma tinyei sigiik?" 
Job31:18 Achicha, ki koner ineendet kemi tuwai kobooch ko aa ming'in, ko uu ye mi ak kwanda, ak ki aegu kandoindetap mosoganooto kobooch ngap kesicho." 
Job31:19 Ngot ko ki ageer chii age tugul kobetei amu ma tinyei ngoroik, anan ageer che nyalildos koma tinyei kiy ne tugegei," 
Job31:20 ngot koma iberuuro suenutikyik, ak ngot koma nyoor lalang'indo eng' koroorigap keechiirekyuk," 
Job31:21 ngot ko ki anamji parak eunnyu agirinde ne ma tinyei sigiik, amu ki ageer toreteennyu eng' ormariich," 
Job31:22 ko ingobut anyun tigikyennyu eng' puita, ingeiri eunnyu kichun." 
Job31:23 Amu ki kamuiset eng' anee nyalilda ne punu Kamuktaindet, amamuuch ayai kiy amu telunatennyi." 
Job31:24 Ngot ko ki amang'u thahabu, ak aleenji thahabu che korooron, inyee ne amang'un," 
Job31:25 ngot ko ki abaibaitu amu oo mogornatennyu, ak amu kiga konyoor eunnyu tuguuk che chaang'," 
Job31:26 ak ngot ko ki ageer asiista ye ki iluu, anan arawet ye kiwendoti eng' kaluunet," 
Job31:27 kot ki kigaigai muguleldanyu eng' ung'oot, kot kong'utut kutinnyu eunnyu," 
Job31:28 ko myee koek niito agine tengekto ne irwookyin kirwoogik: Amu ta kiga amwachi lembech Kamuktaindet ne mi parak. 
Job31:29 Ngot ko ki abaibaitu eng' ng'emisyetap ineendet ne wecho, anan aeetkei ye kinyoor yaityet ineendet," 
Job31:30 achicha, ma achamji kutinnyu koyai tengekto asoom eng' chubisyet saboondanyi." 
Job31:31 Ngot koma mwa piigap emainnyu kole ng'oo ne imuuchi konyoor chii ne ma piyonyi panyeegap Job? 
Job31:32 Ma ru toondet ooreet, amu ki ayaatyi kurgotikyuk kiprutoiyot." 
Job31:33 Ngot ko ki atuch pistoennyu ko uu ye yaei alak, atuch tengektonyu eng' tegeennyu," 
Job31:34 amu ki aiywei tuiyet ne oo, ak ki imua sasisyetap piik eng' kooriikwak, kot asiis, amawe saang'-" 
Job31:35 ee, kata myee nda katinye chii ne kasa! Mi yu siruutyennyu ne po ng'ookset, ingowolwo Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet. Ak atinye kataamset ne ki sirei punyondennyu!" 
Job31:36 Iman, kata alae eng' tigikyennyu, ak kata aratyinige ko uu naaryeet." 
Job31:37 Kata amwachini ineendet koitetap kakwautikyuk, kata ariikyini ineendet ko uu pounindet." 
Job31:38 Ngo waagena emennyu, ak koriiryo kibagenge ole ki kibat," 
Job31:39 ngot ko ki aam logoekyik ama aal, anan agoochi piigap ko po kobeet saboonwekwak," 
Job31:40 ko ingobiityo anyun katook che rutei piich kogeer nganuuk, ak kogeer timdo baale. Kagogeskei ng'aleegap Job." 
Job32:1 Kosiisyo anyun pichooto somogu, mata kowolji kiy Job, amu kigeerei Job eng' kabwaatutikyik kole po iman ineendet." 
Job32:2 Ki nereech anyun kot Elihu weeriitap Barakel Busindet, ne po ooreetap Ram. Ki nereekyi kot Job amu ki iityigei imanda ne kata iityin Kamuktaindet." 
Job32:3 Ki nereech kogeny kot agobo choronokyik somok, amu ki ma nyoor icheek kiit ne woljin Job, ago ki igikyi ineendet." 
Job32:4 Kiga igen Elihu kong'alaalji `icheek Job amu ki eecheen eng' kenyiisyek icheeget kosiir ineendet. 
Job32:5 Ye kingo keer Elihu kole ma nyoor pichooto somogu kiit ne wolu, konereech kot." 
Job32:6 Kowol anyun Elihu weeriitap Barakel Busindet kole aa neran, ago okweek ko oo poisyek che eecheen eng' kenyiisyek miising'. Ko uu nooto anyun ko koasiis, ma agany aboorwok kabwaatennyu." 
Job32:7 Koale, nyoljin poisyek che eecheen kong'alaal, ak nyoljin chaang'indap kenyiisyek koneet utaatyet." 
Job32:8 Ago mi `kabuuset chiito, igoochin kabuusetap `Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet icheek kaguiyet." 
Job32:9 Ma kotugul che oosen ko utaatiin, ama che oosen che iguitos kirwooget." 
Job32:10 Amwae anyun ale ogasa; si aboor agane ole abwaatitai. 
Job32:11 Koageni ng'aleekwok, koaepchini iit ng'aleekwok, ye koocheeng'e kiit ne omwae." 
Job32:12 Koaepchok iit, ak ogeero, ma piit chii ne koiterteer Job, anan ne kowol ng'aleekyik eng' okweek." 
Job32:13 Oriipkei si momwa ole kageegu che utaatiin. Ne iterteeri ko Kamuktaindet, ma chii." 
Job32:14 Amu ma tokyo ng'aleekyik, amawoljini ineendet kiy eng' ng'aleekwok." 
Job32:15 Kwong'dos icheek, mata kowol kiy. Ma tinyei ng'olyoot ne mwaei." 
Job32:16 Tos kanyool agen, amu ma ng'alaaldos, amu tonondos kosistos, ama kowolu kiy?" 
Job32:17 Awolu agane kebebertanyu, abooru agane kabwaatennyu." 
Job32:18 Amu kigonyiia ng'aleek; igiila kabuuset ne atinye. 
Job32:19 Ogeero, uu moennyu divaik che ma tinyei ole mandoe; kergei ak sotonik che leelach che machei koyesyo." 
Job32:20 Ang'alaali, si kobiit asap, ayaate kutinnyu ak awolu." 
Job32:21 Asaok ale, amogoono atiytiy chii age tugul; amagoochini chii age tugul kainaik che ilasunegei puch." 
Job32:22 Amu mangen agoito kainaik che kilasunegei puch; si ma istoa Yaindennyu kochokyo. 
Job33:1 “Ago asaain anyun Job ale, igas ng'aleekyuk, ak iepchi iit ng'aleekyuk tugul." 
Job33:2 Neegit anyun ang'alaal, twegu ng'elyeptanyu eng' kutinnyu." 
Job33:3 Ibooru `ng'aleekyuk imandap muguleldanyu; ak mwaei kutinnyu tuguuk che po iman, che ingen." 
Job33:4 Ki koyaa kabuuset ne po Kamuktaindet, koono asap kabuusetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Job33:5 Ngimuuchi, iwolwoo; tonon, tetwa ng'aleeguk komyee." 
Job33:6 Kiit ne iuu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, auu nooto agane; ki kiyaena agane meneet." 
Job33:7 Mat kogoonin kamuisennyu iyweisye, ama nyigiisyinin eunnyu." 
Job33:8 Iman, kaing'alaal agase, ak kaagas ng'aleeguk komwaei koleen," 
Job33:9 ‘Aa tiliil, ma tinye kachililut; ma tinyei leluut, ama mi tengek eng' anee." 
Job33:10 Nyoorchino tuguuk che irwogunena, iita aek punyondennyi." 
Job33:11 Indoi keelyekyuk temeleiywek, keerei ortinwekyuk tugul.’" 
Job33:12 Awolun, me po iman eng' ng'olyoondoni; amu oo Kamuktaindet kosiir chiito." 
Job33:13 Amu nee si oborye ineendet? Ago ma tetyin chii ng'aleekyik agot agenge. 
Job33:14 Amu ng'alaali Kamuktaindet konyil agenge, ee, konyil aeng', agot ngo ma naei chii." 
Job33:15 Eng' karwotitoet, eng' ng'ang'utyet ne po kemoi, ye nyoonjin piik rwondo ne nyigiis, ye inuuktos eng' itook." 
Job33:16 Yaatei anyun itigap piik, ak kong'ooch kaneetisyennywa," 
Job33:17 si kobiit koisto chiito eng' kiit ne tokyingei, ak koung'e chiito menoteet." 
Job33:18 Riibei saboondanyi si ma ibutyi kererit, ak koriibei sabeennyi si ma par rotwetap chok." 
Job33:19 Kitigone kogeny ng'wanindo eng' itogunnyi, ak pooryeet ne mi kotugul eng' kawekyik." 
Job33:20 Kot kowech `sabeennyi amitwogik, ak kowech `saboondanyi amitwogik che anyinyen." 
Job33:21 Sagiiti poortanyi, kot koma kegeerei; ak kotook kawekyik che ki ma ko taagu." 
Job33:22 Ee, riikyin saboondanyi keriinget, ak koriikyi sabeennyi ng'emiik." 
Job33:23 Ngot komi malaikaiyat kobooto ineendet, kaweegindetap ng'aleek, agenge eng' eliphuut, si koboorchi chiito kiit ne po iman," 
Job33:24 koriiree ineendet anyun, ak kole, ‘Saru ineendet si ma rorokyi Keriinget, kaanyooru katyaget." 
Job33:25 Ng'arng'aritu poortanyi kosiir ne po lakweet, ak koweekyingei peetuusyegap ming'inatennyi.’" 
Job33:26 Saaei Kamuktaindet ak kogasyi ineendet; kot konyo tainnyi eng' poiboiyet, ak koweekyi chiito imandanyi." 
Job33:27 Tyeni eng' taitap piik ak kole ki ayai tengekto, ak amaas kiit ne ki po iman, ama kelwo kiy." 
Job33:28 Kigosar saboondanyu si ma wo kererit, ak kogeer saboondanyu lapkeiyet." 
Job33:29 Yaei Kamuktaindet tuguuchuuto tugul, yaei konyil aeng' konyil somok koyachin chiito," 
Job33:30 si koweech saboondanyi komang'une Keriinget, si kobiit kogeer lapkeiyetap saboondo." 
Job33:31 Keer komyee, ee Job, kasa; siis, si ang'alaal." 
Job33:32 Ngitinye kiy age tugul ne imwae, iwolwoo; ng'alaal, amu amache aiityin imanda." 
Job33:33 Ngo ma uu nooto, igaswa; siis, si aneetiin utaatyet.”" 
Job34:1 Ki testai `Elihu kole," 
Job34:2 “Ogas ng'aleekyuk, okweek pichu utaatiin, ak oepcha iit okweek che otinye naet." 
Job34:3 Amu tyemei itit ng'aleek, ko uu ye chamchami kutit amitwogik." 
Job34:4 Ongelewenjige kiit ne po iman, ongenai acheeget kiit ne myee." 
Job34:5 Amu kamwa Job kole, ‘A po iman, ak kigoistoena Kamuktaindet che nyoljino." 
Job34:6 Nganda a po iman ko ki kiita keele aa kiplembechwa, ma inyaaksei moennyu, agot ngo ma tinye kachililut.’" 
Job34:7 Ngoro chii ne uu Job, ng'oo ne eei sasisyet ko uu peek?" 
Job34:8 Ne wendoti kobooto yaigap tengekto, ak kowendoti ak piik che yaach." 
Job34:9 Amu ki komwa kole, ‘Ma keljin kiy chiito kobaibaegei Kamuktaindet.’" 
Job34:10 Ogas anyun amu nooto, pichu otinye naet, ingolooit eng' Kamuktaindet keele imuuchi koyai yaityet. Ak ingolooit eng' Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, keele koyai tengekto." 
Job34:11 Amu yaakyin chiito ko uu poisyonikyik, ak kogoochi chii age tugul konyoor ko uu ortinwekyik." 
Job34:12 Ee, iman, ma yaei `Kamuktaindet kiy ne ya, ama imaasi kirwooget Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Job34:13 Ng'oo ne ki ng'at ineendet si koriip ng'wony? Anan ng'oo ne ki inde ineendet ng'wony komugul ole tebee? 
Job34:14 Ngot komach Kamuktaindet koweekyigei saboondo ak kabuusetap chiichooto," 
Job34:15 kobegu anyun piik tugul kibagenge, ak koweekyingei chiito ng'ung'unyek." 
Job34:16 Ngot itinye anyun kaguiyet igas niito. Epchi iit ng'aleekyuk. 
Job34:17 Tos imuuchi kobounis ineendet ne wechei imanda? Ak tos igikyini inyee ineendet ne po iman ak ko kiim? 
Job34:18 Ng'oo ne leenji laitoryat, ‘Ii ya!’ Anan keleenji piik che taagunotiin, ‘Oo yaacheen!’" 
Job34:19 Kotam nee anyun eng' ineendet ne ma konyiti pounik, ne ma keerei mogoreek kosiir kibananook? Amu poisyonigap eunekyik icheek tugul." 
Job34:20 Pegu eng' ye matya, agot kemoi kween. Potandos piik ak kosiirto, ak ki istoi che kiimeen ama eng' eutap chii." 
Job34:21 Amu keerei konyekyik ortinwegap chii, ak kogeerei panwekyik tugul." 
Job34:22 Ma mi mesundeito, anan urwetap meet, ne imuuchi koung'egei yaigap tengekto." 
Job34:23 Amu ma nyooljin ineendet kota kobwaat chiito, kole nyoljin kwo taitap Kamuktaindet eng' kirwooget." 
Job34:24 Tonatoni piik che kiimeen eng' ortinwek che ma naoksei, ak konde alak kogeer icheeget." 
Job34:25 Nae anyun poisyonikwak, ak kogabui kemoi, si kobiit keng'em icheek." 
Job34:26 Pirei icheek amu yaitwogikwak, ye keerei piik alak," 
Job34:27 amu kimasta, ma isup ineendet, ama ibwaat age tugul eng' ortinwekyik." 
Job34:28 Kot kogoochi riiregap kibananook koit ole mi ineendet, ak ki kas riiregap che kinyaliili." 
Job34:29 Ye kasiis ineendet, ko ng'oo anyun ne igikyin ineendet? Ak ye uny togeennyi, ko ng'oo ne imuuchi kogeer? Ngo yachi poror anan ko chii, ko kergei." 
Job34:30 Ma igoochin kolaitoran chiito ne ma iywei Kamuktaindet, si ma piit chii ne riichei piik." 
Job34:31 Tos amu nee si ma mwachi chii age tugul Kamuktaindet, koleenji, ‘Ka amuite eng' katigonet, ma ayae leluut kogeny," 
Job34:32 Ineeta che ma keere; ngot ko ki ayai tengekto, koma yae kogeny.’" 
Job34:33 Tos piitu yaakyinennyi ko uu ye ichame amu ieesyoi? Amu kanyool ilewen, ma anee, ara mwaa anyun che ingen." 
Job34:34 Leenjino piik che tinyei naet, ee, chii age tugul ne utaat ne kasa, komwaei koleen," 
Job34:35 ng'alaali Job koma tinyei naet, ama mi ng'omnateet ng'aleekyik." 
Job34:36 Kata myee ketyem Job agoi let, amu kergei waluunennyi ak ne po piik che yaacheen." 
Job34:37 Amu tesyin ngelelnateet tengektanyi, iraprabi eunekyik eng' kwenunnyo, ak kotesei ng'aleekyik kogirinda Kamuktaindet.”" 
Job35:1 Kowol kogeny Elihu kole," 
Job35:2 “Tos ileen imandang'ung' niito, anan imwae ile, ‘Siirei imandanyu ne po Kamuktaindet,’" 
Job35:3 ye iteebe ile, ‘Nee kelunet ne inyooru?’ Anan, ‘Nee kelunet ne anyooru ne siirei nda kagayai tengekto?’" 
Job35:4 Awolun anyun, kobooto choronoguk." 
Job35:5 Inyal kipsengwet ak igeer; keer poolik, che mi parak kosiirin." 
Job35:6 Ngot ko keiyai tengek, ko keyachi nee ineendet? Ak ngot ko tesoksei pistaosyeguk, ko keyachi nee ineendet?" 
Job35:7 Ngot ii po iman, igoochini nee ineendet? Anan taachei nee eng' eung'ung'?" 
Job35:8 Imuuchi kogoochi yaityeng'ung' ng'wanindo kipkosabei age; ak imuuchi imandang'ung' kogoochi keljinet kipkosabei age. 
Job35:9 Riirtos amu chaang'indap usiisyosyek; Riirtos komachei toreteet amu eutap ineendet ne tinyei kamuget. 
Job35:10 Ago ma mi ne mwaei kole, ‘Mi ano Kamuktaindet Yaindennyu, ne koonu tyenwogik kemoi," 
Job35:11 Ne ineetech kosiir tyong'igap ng'wony, ak kong'omitech kosiir toriitigap parak?’" 
Job35:12 Riirtos anyun, ago ma mi ne woljin kiy, amu menoteetap piik che yaach." 
Job35:13 Iman ma kasei Kamuktaindet tangoita, ama iiti Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Job35:14 Kotam nee ye imwae ileen ma keere ineendet, mi ng'aleek tainnyi ak igeni." 
Job35:15 Ne siirei, ko amu ma nyo ineendet eng' nereegekyik, ama iiti menoteet miising'." 
Job35:16 Ko yaat anyun Job kutinnyi komwa ng'aleegap puch; Tesei ng'aleek che ma tinyei naet.” 
Job36:1 Kitestai Elihu eng' ng'alaalennyi ak komwa kole," 
Job36:2 “Kang'wa kitigin, si aboorun; amu ta atinye ng'olyoot ne amwae ne kata mwaei Kamuktaindet." 
Job36:3 Aibune naennyu ole loo, si aiityi imanda Yaindennyu." 
Job36:4 Amu ma lembech ng'aleekyuk iman: Mi kobooten ineendet ne ititaat eng' naet. 
Job36:5 Iman, po kamuget Kamuktaindet ama sasei chii tugul; tinyei kamuget eng' kimnateetap kaguiyet." 
Job36:6 Ma riibei sabeetap che yaacheen, ago igoochin che kinyaliili imandanywa." 
Job36:7 Ma istoe konyekyik piik che po iman: ago indoi icheek kotebi koigeny kobooto laitorinik eng' ng'echeretap laitornatet, ak kitoroori icheek." 
Job36:8 Ak ngot keerat eng' mugurek, ak keeratee poroonigap nyalilda," 
Job36:9 Koboorchi anyun icheek poisyennywa, ak pistaosyekwak, icheeget che ki yai teng'ek eng' menoteet." 
Job36:10 Yaatei kogeny itiikwak si kogas kaneetisyet, ak kong'at kole kometo icheek eng' tengekto." 
Job36:11 Ngot kogas iit ineendet ak koot, koboisyee peetuusyekwak eng' kaberuret, ak koboisyee kenyiisyekwak eng' poiboiyet." 
Job36:12 Ago ngot koma kas iit, kolustos eng' rotwetap chok, ak kobek ama tinyei naet." 
Job36:13 Ago icheek che ma iywei Kamuktaindet eng' muguleldo, kogonorchingei nereegek. Ma riirtos kosoomei toreteet ye kabir `ineendet icheek." 
Job36:14 Pegu ye ta ko neran, ak lustos saboonwekwak kobooto che ng'woneen." 
Job36:15 Ago saru che kinyaliili eng' nyalildanywa, ak koyaat itiikwak eng' usiisyennywa." 
Job36:16 Ee, imutun imang'une pichiindo; Inyo ole paraa, ole ma mi tiritindo, kot iit ole kindoi meseng'ung' konyiie mwanik." 
Job36:17 Ago kagonyiin kirwoogutigap chii ne ya; Namin kirwooget ak imanda. 
Job36:18 Amu mi nereegek, iriipkei si ma ichuutin talbistang'ung'; Anan komaasin ooindap asoya." 
Job36:19 Tos yamin mogornatosyeguk, kot ko menyooru pichiindo, anan yamin kimnatosyek tugul che po kamugeng'ung'?" 
Job36:20 Amat imach kemout, ye ki istoi piik eng' komostanywa." 
Job36:21 Riipkei, amemage kiy tengekto, amu ki ilewen niito kosiir nyalilda." 
Job36:22 Keero, tororitu Kamuktaindet eng' kamugennyi: Ng'oo kaneetindet ne uu ineendet?" 
Job36:23 Ng'oo ne kigong'at ooreennyi? Anan ng'oo ne imuuchi komwa kole, ‘Keyai ne ma po iman?’" 
Job36:24 Ibwaat itoroor poisyennyi, ne ki kotyenji piik." 
Job36:25 Kagogeer piik tugul nooto; Keerei piik eng' ole loo. 
Job36:26 Oo Kamuktaindet, ama kinae ineendet; ma naaksei koitetap kenyiisyekyik." 
Job36:27 Amu ichuuti ineendet peek eng' kibungwerennyi, che rong'ugei eng' ropta ak koroot." 
Job36:28 Che rong'u poolik, si korobonji piik ropta ne oo." 
Job36:29 Tos imuuchi chii koguiyo kaiyestaetap poolik, ak tuloosyegap meng'ootennyi?" 
Job36:30 Keer, ole iitoitoi kalyeleet koyiem ineendet; ak tuchei nyanjet ole po ng'wony." 
Job36:31 Amu irwookyinee piik chuuto; ak koonu amitwogik eng' chaang'indo. 
Job36:32 Tugee `eunekyik kalyeleet; ak kong'at ole kwere. 
Job36:33 Mwaitoi `tuleet ineendet, ibooru tuuga usoonet ne nyoonei.”" 
Job37:1 Potani muguleldanyu agobo niito kora, pirei eng' komostanyi." 
Job37:2 Ogas anyun cheetap tuugeennyi, Ak cheet ne mang'une kutinnyi." 
Job37:3 Iyooktoi kwo kureret tugul ne po kipsengwet, ak koyooktoi kalyelennyi koyom ole poochin ng'wony." 
Job37:4 Ye ibata kotugul; kotul eng' tuugeetap etunatennyi, ak magerei `ineendet icheek ye kagigas tuugeennyi." 
Job37:5 Tulei Kamuktaindet eng' tuugeennyi eng' kwong'eet; Yaei tuguuk che eecheen, che ma kimuuchi kiguiye." 
Job37:6 Amu leenjin teluji, obutyi ng'wony, mwachin ko uu nooto ropta ne inesi, ak roptanyi ne kiim." 
Job37:7 Eng' kasarata, ko ratei eutap chii age tugul; Si kobiit konai piik tugul che kiyaei." 
Job37:8 Pendii anyun tyong'ik ole ung'egei, Ak kotebi eng' kebenonikwak." 
Job37:9 Punu usoonet ne oo kooriigap murot tai: Kobun kaitityet murot kaataam. 
Job37:10 Koonu kabuusetap Kamuktaindet peek che ki kogau: Ak kogau chaang'indap peek. 
Job37:11 Igoochin ineendet pooldet ne nyigiis peek; Iitoi poldetap kalyelennyi. 
Job37:12 Weleligei eng' kandoisyennyi, si kobiit koyai kiit age tugul ne kang'atyi icheek, eng' ng'wonyut ne ki menyei." 
Job37:13 Ngo po katigonet, anan ngo po emennyi, anan ngo po rireenet, kogoonu ui tugul." 
Job37:14 Kas ng'olyoondoni, ee Job: Tonon, ak ibwaat poisyonigap Kamuktaindet che kikwong'ee." 
Job37:15 Tos ingen inyee ole ng'atitoi Kamuktaindet icheek, ale ng'atitoi kokweny kalyeleetap poldennyi kooluu?" 
Job37:16 Tos ingen ole songinindoi poolik, poisyonik che kekwong'ee, che po ineendet ne ititaat eng' naet?" 
Job37:17 Lalang'en miising' ngoroiguk, ye kasiis emet eng' usoonet ne po murot tai?" 
Job37:18 Tos imuuchi iite sengwetyet kobooto ineendet, ne kiim ko uu kioit ne ki kichoot si kitanyi?" 
Job37:19 Ineetech kiit ne kimwachini ineendet; Amu ma kimuuchi ketet ng'aleekyok amu mesundeito. 
Job37:20 Tos kimwachin ineendet keleenjin, amache ang'alaal? Anan tos mach chiito kelugui?" 
Job37:21 Ma keerei anyun piik lapkeiyetap asiista ne iluu eng' sengwetisyek, ye isto usoonet poolik ak kotiliil icheek." 
Job37:22 Punu murot kaataam kakweng'et ne uu thahabu. Tinyei Kamuktaindet etunateet ne kiywei. 
Job37:23 Ma kimuuchi kegeer Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet; tinyei telunateet eng' kamuktaet: Ma inyalilisyei eng' kirwooget ak eng' imanda ne oo. 
Job37:24 Iywei anyun `piik ineendet; ma tiytiy age tugul ne utaat eng' muguleldo. 
Job38:1 Ki wolji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job eng' kipchurchuryet, koleenji," 
Job38:2 “Ng'oo niito indoi kirwooget mesundeito, eng' ng'aleek che ma tinyei naet?" 
Job38:3 Kermengei anyun nguno ko uu muren; amu ating'enen ng'olyoo, ak ko nyolu iwolwoo." 
Job38:4 Ki imi ano ye ki andoi lumeiywegap ng'wony? Mwau anyun, ngot iguitosi." 
Job38:5 Mwaiwo ile ng'oo ne king'atei kakwautikyik, ngot ingen? Anan ng'oo ne kiito porowet eng' paragunnyi?" 
Job38:6 Ki kiratyi ano lumeiywekyik? Anan ng'oo ne ki inde koitanyi ne po luuita; 
Job38:7 ye kityenso kecheigap karon kibagenge, ak kotyendos weeriik tugul che po Kamuktaindet eng' poiboiyet?" 
Job38:8 Anan ng'oo ne kigeree `kurgotik nyanjet, ye kimaran ko uu che punu moet;" 
Job38:9 ye ki ayai pooldet koek ngoryennyi, ak ayachi mesundeito ne nyigiis koek ngoryeetap lakwandit," 
Job38:10 ak ang'atyi ng'atuutyennyu, ak ande temeleiywek ak kurgotik," 
Job38:11 ak ale, ‘Ibochitu yu, mesiire; ak kirang'e yu peeguk che mildogei eng' menoteet?’" 
Job38:12 Tos ki ing'at karonet kobooch ngo piit peetuusyeguk, ak igoochi egonet konai komostanyi;" 
Job38:13 si kobiit konam ole poochin ng'wony, ak kitumdum che yaacheen komong' eng' yooto?" 
Job38:14 Kiwalei ko uu meneet ye king'oochi; ak kotononso tuguuk tugul ko uu ngoryeet. 
Job38:15 Ki etee piik che yaacheen lapkeiyennywa, ak keiri euut ne itorooregei." 
Job38:16 Tos ki ichut kondametusyegap nyanjet? Anan ki iwendote komoswek che ung'ootiin che po rireet? 
Job38:17 Tos ki kibooruun ormariichogap meet? Anan tos ki igeer kurgotigap urwetap meet? 
Job38:18 Tos ki inai tebeesindap ng'wony? Mwau, ngot ingen tugul." 
Job38:19 Mi ano ooreet ne wendi ole menyei lapkeiyet, ak mi ano komostap mesundeito;" 
Job38:20 si kobiit iip kot koit kiwotennyi, ak iguiye ortinwek che pendi koonnyi?" 
Job38:21 Ingen iman, amu kiga kesichin, ak ko chaang' koitetap peetuusyeguk!" 
Job38:22 Tos ki ichut ole kigonoree teluji, anan ki igeer ole kigonoree koigap ropta," 
Job38:23 che ki agonorchi peetuutap nyalilda, ak agonorchi peetuutap pooryeet ak lugeet?" 
Job38:24 Kipcheune ano lapkeiyet, anan kiseerunee ano usoonetap kong'asiis eng' ng'wony?" 
Job38:25 Ng'oo ne ki pet ooreetap maraneet, anan ooreet ne punei kalyeleetap tuleet," 
Job38:26 si kogoochi korobonji emet ole ma mi chii; ak korobonji surkwen ole ma mi chii," 
Job38:27 si kobiyo emet ne karaatya ne kigoguber, ak kogoochi susweek che ng'orng'or kobiityo?" 
Job38:28 Tos tinyei ropta kwanda? Anan ng'oo ne ki sich rewoot ne sau? 
Job38:29 Ki punu moetap ng'oo peek che ki kogau? Ak ng'oo ne ki sich chepkoset ne punu kipsengwet? 
Job38:30 Uueen peek ko uu koita, ak ki konamogis paragutap rireet." 
Job38:31 Tos imuuchi irat karurugutigap Koremerik, anan ityaach ratuutigap Kapsomoguk?" 
Job38:32 Tos imuuchi indochi Masarot eng' peetuusyekwak? Anan tos imuuchi indochi kecheik magalaluut ak lagokyik? 
Job38:33 Tos ingen ng'atuutik che ki king'atyi kipsengwet? Tos imuuchi igimit pounatap taboik eng' ng'wony? 
Job38:34 Tos imuuchi koit kuting'ung' poolik, si kotuchin peek che chaang'?" 
Job38:35 Tos imuuchi iyookte kalyelosyek si koba, Ak koleenjin, ‘Ki mi yu?’" 
Job38:36 Ng'oo ne ki inde utaatyet kebeberwek che po oriit? Anan ng'oo ne ki igoochi kaguiyet kundit? 
Job38:37 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koiit poolik eng' utaatyet? Ng'oo ne tumu chuboinigap kipsengwet," 
Job38:38 Ye kayumgei temburyek koek tulwo, ak konamgei mogooroonik kouegitu?" 
Job38:39 Tos ilogotenjini ng'etuny ne kotoy? Anan ibai neranigap ng'etuunyik kobiyong'so," 
Job38:40 ye ribistos eng' kebenonikwak, ak kounygei eng' ole ma taagu si kosapta?" 
Job38:41 Ng'oo ne paei chepkugit, ye riirchin areekyik Kamuktaindet, ak koombenoti amu ma tinyei che amei?”" 
Job39:1 “Tos ingen peetuusyek che ye iytos sitok? Anan igeere ye iytos kenyelok? 
Job39:2 Imuuchi iit arawek che tarei? Anan ingen peetuusyek ye iytos? 
Job39:3 Ing'uruuktos, si koiiyo eng' aarekwak, ak kogees ng'waninwekwak." 
Job39:4 Tebee chametapkei aarekwak, eegitu eng' kewanin; pendi, ama weeksei kogeny." 
Job39:5 Ng'oo ne ki ityaach sigiryet ne po timiin? Anan ng'oo ne ki ityaach ratuutigap oloitigeet? 
Job39:6 Che ki agoochi komeny surkwen, ak koek ole menyei emetap muunyuk." 
Job39:7 Sasei polatetap nganaseet, ama kasei waagetap chiito ne kweryei." 
Job39:8 Agetye parautyetap tuloonook, ak kocheeng'oti kiy age tugul ne tuon." 
Job39:9 Tos cham soet koboisyeun? Anan tos tebee ole neegitee piung'ung'? 
Job39:10 Tos imuuchi iratyi soet mogombet? Anan tos piruun mbareet ne kaibat? 
Job39:11 Tos imang'u ineendet, amu oo kimnateennyi? Anan tos ibagakyi poisyeng'ung'?" 
Job39:12 Tos imang'u ineendet, ile koibun kesweguk kobwa kaa, ak koyumji peek ole kiboorsee?" 
Job39:13 Paibai tyondap songol kobirobirto kebebaikyik eng' lelesta; nganda ma imuuchi kotirirenot eng' parak. 
Job39:14 Amu metechin mayaikyik ng'ung'unyek parak, si kolalang'e temburyek," 
Job39:15 ak koutye kole tuei keeldo, anan kotyech tyondap timiin." 
Job39:16 Koromjin lagokyik ko uu yo ma chechiik; agot ngo ek puch poisyennyi, koma arageni;" 
Job39:17 amu ki eetee Kamuktaindet utaatyet, ama igoochi kaguiyet." 
Job39:18 Ago ye ing'eet met kolabat, kororechin niito anyun paraisiit ak chiito ne laanyei." 
Job39:19 Tos igoochini paraisiit kimnateet? Anan ilaakyini kaatinnyi masek che usausi? 
Job39:20 Tos inyee ne igoochini ineendet kotoromben ko uu chereng'endet? Imui piich toroornatetap waagaatap seruunekyik. 
Job39:21 Kutei atebweet, ak kobaibait eng' kimnateennyi; torooktoi piik che ilaachi kariik." 
Job39:22 Chotei kaiyweisyet, ama arageni; ama mwee rotwetap chok." 
Job39:23 Poljin ineendet motyetap kipchabonik, kobooto ng'otit ne ilyeli ak ndirit." 
Job39:24 Lugui emet eng' koroomnateet ak nereegek; ama teleli eng' cheetap iryageet. 
Job39:25 Sait age tugul ye cheei iryageet, komwa kole, ‘Haa!’ Kasei siiptap lugeet kota komi ole loo, polatetap kiptainik, ak waagaat." 
Job39:26 Tos tirirene keeret utaatyeng'ung', ak kotokyigei kebebaikyik murot tai?" 
Job39:27 Tos tirirene kipsiichit ng'atuutyeng'ung', ak koteech keswennyi eng' parak?" 
Job39:28 Menyei rwandet, ak tinyei ole rue eng' olooto, tebee serutap koita, ak irimeet." 
Job39:29 Segei eng' yooto tyondanyi; toobeni konyekyik ole loo. 
Job39:30 Chuchuni lagokyik ak icheek korotiik; ak ole mi muuswek, komi yooto agine.”" 
Job40:1 Ki wolji kogeny `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job koleenji," 
Job40:2 “Tos imache inyee ne imesesi obelegei ak Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet? Ingowol chuuto ineendet ne tiitos ak Kamuktaindet.” 
Job40:3 Kowolji anyun `Job Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji," 
Job40:4 “Keero, ma aa kiy; awolun nee? Kagonama kuut." 
Job40:5 Ki amwa konyil agenge, ama awolu kogeny; Ee, ki amwa konyil aeng', ago ma atese.”" 
Job40:6 Kowolji anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job eng' kipchurchuryet, koleenji," 
Job40:7 “Kermenge ko uu muren; amagenen ng'olyoo, ak imwaiwo." 
Job40:8 Tos iwale kirwoogennyu koek puch? Tos irwokwo, si kobiit kiityin imanda?" 
Job40:9 Anan itinye euut ne uu ne po Kamuktaindet? Ak imuuchi itul eng' tuugeet ko uu ineendet? 
Job40:10 Ilaakyigei anyun telunateet ak etunateet; ilaakyigei teegisto ak korooronindo. 
Job40:11 Rong'u nereegeguk che ing'irtogei, ak igeer age tugul ne meenei, ak inyerat." 
Job40:12 Keer age tugul ne meenei ak iming'iin, ak ityekyi ng'wony kiptengeginik eng' ole tononee." 
Job40:13 Ung'e temburyek kibagenge; tuch togoochikwak eng' ole ung'aat. 
Job40:14 Si abarten ale, kagaimuuchi eung'ung' ne po tai kosaruun." 
Job40:15 Keer anyun magasta ne ki ayai ko uu ye ki ayain, ageti ko uu teta." 
Job40:16 Keer anyun, mi kimnateennyi suennyi, mi kamugennyi inoigap moennyi." 
Job40:17 Pirabirtoi saruryennyi ko uu tarakwet; king'walgei tigitigap chotikyik. 
Job40:18 Uu kawekyik kariik che kiimeen che po sugunwet; uu karaaswekyik temeleiywegap kariik. 
Job40:19 Po tai ineendet eng' poisyonik che eecheen che po Kamuktaindet; ineendet ne ki yai tyonyooto, ko ineegei ne imuuchi kobar eng' rotwetap chok." 
Job40:20 Iman paei ineendet tuloonook; ole urerense tyong'ik tugul che po kewanin. 
Job40:21 Rue keetit keel ye mi urwet, eng' saoset oriit, ak nyanyawet." 
Job40:22 Iuuri ineendet keetiik; yiemei ineendet keetiigap kereruusyek. 
Job40:23 Agot ngo nyi peek aineet kot kong'irtagei, koma potani; menegei, agot ngo itu peegap Jordan kutinnyi." 
Job40:24 Tos imuuchi chii konam tyonyooto ye riipsei, anan kotooree serunnyi kateet?”" 
Job41:1 “Tos imuuchi ing'usune ting'ong'et kombetap njireenik? Anan iratee `porowet ng'elyeptanyi? 
Job41:2 Tos imuuchi inde rogoet serunnyi? Anan itoore tagilgilyennyi kombet? 
Job41:3 Tos saisain konyil che chaang'? Anan tos ng'alaalun ng'aleek che tangus? 
Job41:4 Tos oyomiske ak ineendet, si kobiit inam kootin agoi?" 
Job41:5 Tos iurerenji ko uu toriityon? Anan tos irat kobunji tiibiiguk? 
Job41:6 Tos imuuch ko aldaat che namei njireenik? Tos kipchechi ineendet chemung'arainik? 
Job41:7 Tos imuuchi inyiit iriryondennyi kibitinoik, anan inyiit metinnyi ng'otwek che kitoore njireenik?" 
Job41:8 Ngot konam ineendet eung'ung', ibwaati lugeet, ama iyae ko uu nooto kogeny." 
Job41:9 Keero, puch kamang'unet ne kimang'u ineendet; tos ma ibutyin chiito ng'wony ne kageer ineendet?" 
Job41:10 Ma mi ne koroom ne kanyei kong'eet. Ng'oo anyun ineendet ne imuuchi kotonone tainnyu? 
Job41:11 Ng'oo ne kisip kogoono, si aweekyi? Chechuuk tuguuk tugul che mi kureretap kipsengwet." 
Job41:12 Ma siisei agobo kebeberwekyik, anan agobo kimnateennyi ne oo, anan karaaranindanyi." 
Job41:13 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koreegune ngoryennyi ne po parak? Ng'oo ne riikyin kotinyei karnet ne kagilikyin aeng' ne kiratyin kutit? 
Job41:14 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koyaat kurgotigap togeennyi? Ki yiem kamuiset kelekyik. 
Job41:15 Perikyik che kiimeen ko menatennyi. Ki namgei ko uu ng'ookset. 
Job41:16 Rikyindos miising', kot koma chutei usoonet." 
Job41:17 Ki namgei; Ki tiinygei, kot koma kimuuchi kibesyo." 
Job41:18 Ilyeli karyonennyi, ak uu konyekyik chorunetap asiista." 
Job41:19 Mang'une kutinnyi kegenganigap mastinwek, ak iteri maat." 
Job41:20 Mang'une iyeto seruunekyik, ko uu tereet ne kuutu ak mutweek che laldos." 
Job41:21 Inaami kabusennyi nesek, mang'une kutinnyi liplibenetap maat." 
Job41:22 Mi kimnateet kaatinnyi, ak urereni kamuiset eng' tainnyi." 
Job41:23 Ki namgei tagalosyekyik tugul; Ki igiigei ak ma kimuuchi keisto. 
Job41:24 Uui muguleldanyi ko uu koita, ee, uu koitap pai ne tabanu ng'wony." 
Job41:25 Ye kang'eet, koiyweis che kiimeen. Mee mugulel amu kaiyweisyet." 
Job41:26 Ngo leen chii koep, koma tilei kiy, anan kotoor ng'otit anan kochut kipchabet anan kotoor ng'otit ne ng'atip." 
Job41:27 Iiti karnet ko uu susweek, ak sugunonik ko uu keetiik che ki konunio." 
Job41:28 Ma mwee kipchabet; Uu `koik che kewirtoe porowet mobeek. 
Job41:29 Uu `rungusyek mobeek eng' ineendet; rorechin ndirit ne kitooree. 
Job41:30 Uu moennyi rokyonik che ng'atiben; iitoi eng' ng'atateek tuguuk che kiboorsee. 
Job41:31 Igoochin rireet kowaskei ko uu tereet ne mi ma; yaei nyanjet koigei mwaita. 
Job41:32 Leelitu ole kabunei. Meen chiito kaek rireet kalwalek. 
Job41:33 Ma mi ne kergei ak ineendet eng' ng'wony, ne ki kiyai, ne ma iyweisyei." 
Job41:34 Keerei kiit age tugul ne toroor; laitoryat ineendet ne pou menotik tugul.” 
Job42:1 Kowolji anyun `Job Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji," 
Job42:2 “Angen ale imuuchi iyai tuguuk tugul. Ama kimuuchi kegirinda mageng'ung'. 
Job42:3 Keteep ile, ‘ng'oo ni unyei kirwooget ama tinyei naet? Nooto anyun ki amwa che ki ma aguiye, Tuguuk che po kwang'ut eng' anee, che ki ma angen." 
Job42:4 Asaain ale kaswa, si ang'alaal; ating'enen ng'olyoo, ak wolwo.’" 
Job42:5 Ki agasin kityo kibiit; ago ageerin nguno," 
Job42:6 Kasaskei anyun amu nooto, kasigu eng' temburyek ak oreek.”" 
Job42:7 Ak kingo kagomwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job ng'aleechuuto, koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Eliphas Temanindet, “Kaanereekyin inyee ak choronoguk tuwai; amu ma omwa kiit ne po iman agobo anee, ko uu ye kamwa otwogindennyu Job." 
Job42:8 Onam anyun kiruugik tisap, mengichik tisap ak okweri koba kap Job otwogindennyu, yeityo ogoitochigei koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei; si kosaiywok Job otwogindennyu. Amu kachamji, si ma yaiywok ko uu abusnateng'wong'; amu tomo omwa kiit ne po iman agobo anee, ko uu ye komwa otwogindennyu Job.”" 
Job42:9 Ki pa anyun Eliphas Temanindet, Bildad Suindet ak Sopa Naamatindet, koyai ko uu ye ki ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak kitaach `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job." 
Job42:10 Kowal anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ratetap Job, ye kingo sa agobo choronokyik. Ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Job konyil aeng' kosiir che ki tinyei eng' tai." 
Job42:11 Kobwa weeriik tugul che tupcho, chepkametwagik tugul ak piik tugul che ki ingengei ak koamisye koonnyi kobooto ineendet. Ki riirchi ak kogaigai ineendet agobo yaityet tugul ne ki ipchi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet. Ki igoochi chii age tugul fedhaiyat ak kogoochi chii age tugul peteitap thahabu." 
Job42:12 Ki iberuur anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyek che po let che po Job kosiir peetuusyekyik che po tai, amu ki tinyei keechiirek eliphuusyek taman ak ang'wan, tambeesik eliphuusyek lo, eiik eliphuusyek aeng' che po chogit ak iyuogik eliphuut che po sigiroik." 
Job42:13 Ki tinyei kogeny weeriik tisap ak tiibiik somok. 
Job42:14 Ak kiguure kainetap ne po tai, Jemima, koguure ne po aeng', Kesia ak koguure ne po somok, Keren-hapuk." 
Job42:15 Ak ki ma komiitei emet tugul kwonyiik che korooron kosiir tiibiigap Job, ak ki igoochi kwandanywa icheek poroteet kobooto weeriik che tupcho." 
Job42:16 Ak kingo pata niito kotar Job kenyiisyek pogol agenge ak artam. Ki keer weeriikyik ak weeriigap weeriikyik, agoi ibinda ne po ang'wan." 
Job42:17 Ki ilil anyun Job, kotinyei kenyiisyek che chaang'." 
Psalms1:1 Iberuurot chii ne ma namei ng'aleegap piik che yaacheen, ama tononee ooreetap kiptengeginik, ama tebee ng'echereetap saasiik." 
Psalms1:2 Ago paibaitune ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kobwaatoti ng'atuutyennyi peet ak kemoi. 
Psalms1:3 Kergeitu ineendet ak keetit ne ki kiminji ole neegitee ainoosyek, ne yiei logoekyik eng' peetuusyekyik, ama restos sogekyik. Iberuurokse kiy age tugul ne yaei." 
Psalms1:4 Ma uu nooto che yaacheen; ago kergei icheek ak meteteek che ibei usoonet. 
Psalms1:5 Eng' nooto anyun ma tonondos che yaacheen eng' kirwooget, ama tonondos kiptengeginik eng' tuiyetap che po imanda." 
Psalms1:6 Amu ingen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ooreetap che po imanda; ago petei ooreetap kiptengeginik. 
Psalms2:1 Amu nee si koyumgei pororyosyek ak koboldos? Amu nee si kobwaatoti piik tuguuk che ma namegei ak kiy? 
Psalms2:2 Tetegei laitorinigap ng'wony, ak irwoochi pounik che kagotuiyo, agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak nenyi ne iilaat." 
Psalms2:3 Mwaei icheek kole, “Ongeng'eti tuguukwak che ratiisye, ak kewiirte poroonikwak eng' oldanyo.”" 
Psalms2:4 Roryei ineendet ne tebyei eng' kipsengwet; ak kochot `Kiptaiyat icheek. 
Psalms2:5 Ak kong'alaalji anyun eng' nereegekyik, ak konyaliil icheek eng' nereegekyik che ng'woneen, kole," 
Psalms2:6 “Kande laitoryandennyu `Zion tulweennyu ne tiliil.” 
Psalms2:7 Abartoi ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet. Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ii weeriinnyu; kaasichin rani." 
Psalms2:8 Sooma, si agoonin pororyosyek koek poroteng'ung', ak agoonin ole poochin ng'wony kobunjiin." 
Psalms2:9 Itue icheek `kirokto ne po karnet; ak ituatui icheek ko uu rokyetap cheptereniot.” 
Psalms2:10 Nooto anyun, osich utaatyet, okweek laitorinik; oneetkei, okweek kirwoogigap ng'wony." 
Psalms2:11 Oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kaiyweisyet; ak oboiboitu eng' potanet. 
Psalms2:12 Oming'inityigei weeriit si ma nereech, ak olusye eng' ooreet, amu imuuchi konereech miising' eng' chokyinet. Iberuurotin icheek tugul che imang'u ineendet." 
Psalms3:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kagotesak puunikyuk ne tya! Chaang' ne tya che ng'eetyina!" 
Psalms3:2 Miitei che chaang' che mwaei agobo saboondanyu, koleen, “Ma tinyei chiichi yetunet eng' Kamuktaindet.”" 
Psalms3:3 Ago inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ii long'eet ne mi komoswek tugul eng' anee; ii teegistanyu ak ii tiindetap metinnyu." 
Psalms3:4 Ariirchini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kutinnyu, ak ki wolwo eng' tulweennyi ne tiliil." 
Psalms3:5 Ki alyelde eng' ng'wony ak anuuch, ki agosu kogeny, amu ki igimita Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms3:6 Ma ywei piik tamanusyegap eliphuusyek, che kayiema kotokyagei eng' komoswek tugul." 
Psalms3:7 Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Sarwo, ee Kamuktaindennyu! Amu ki irabaach matang'wegap puunikyuk tugul; ki iri kelegap kiptengeginik." 
Psalms3:8 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunet; ingotebee perurtang'ung' piiguk. 
Psalms4:1 Wolwo ye aguurin, ee Kamuktaindet ne po imandanyu! Ki indea parautyet ye ki atinye nyalilda; rireena ak igaswa saaennyu." 
Psalms4:2 Ee okweek, weeriigap piik, owale teegistanyu koek teweernateet kot kotyanit? Agoi au ochame ng'aleek che ma namegei ak kiy, ak ocheeng'e lembechek?" 
Psalms4:3 Ago onai ni ole ki kotabaanjigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne po iman; kasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye aguure ineendet. 
Psalms4:4 Eng' nereegekwok ko moyai tengek; ye omi itook, ong'alaaljigei eng' mugulelwekwok ak osisye." 
Psalms4:5 Ogoite tiseiywek che po imanda, ak omang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms4:6 Mwaei che chaang' kole, “Ng'oo ne iboorwech kiy ne myee? Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tokyech lapkeiyetap togeng'ung'!”" 
Psalms4:7 Ki inde muguleldanyu kaagaasetapkei, kosiir ne tinyei icheek ye katesak peekwak ak divaikwak." 
Psalms4:8 Alyeldoi ak anuuchi eng' kaalyeet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee inyegei ne igoono ameng'iis eng' chametapkei." 
Psalms5:1 Epchi iit ng'aleekyuk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ruchi kabwaatutikyuk." 
Psalms5:2 Kas ye atwegu ariire, Laitoryandennyu ak ko Kamuktaindennyu, amu inyee ne asaae." 
Psalms5:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, igase kutinnyu karon; atetuun saaennyu karon, ak ageni iwolwoo." 
Psalms5:4 Ma ii Kamuktaindet ne ibaibaitune yaityo; ama tebee oldang'ung' yaityo. 
Psalms5:5 Ma tonondos eng' taing'ung' menotik; iweche yaigap yaityet tugul. 
Psalms5:6 Ing'eme che mwaei lembechek; wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tumdaindetap korotiik ak ng'aaliindet. 
Psalms5:7 Ago anee, eng' chaang'indap rireeng'ung' pogei, anyoone koong'ung'; eng' kaiyweisyeng'ung' agutunyi atokyinige hekalung'ung' ne tiliil." 
Psalms5:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, indoiywa eng' imandang'ung', amu puunikyuk che sapchino; ilitiit oreng'ung' eng' tainnyu." 
Psalms5:9 Ma mi lititindo eng' kutusweekwak; tengek kityo mugulelwekwak. Kererit ne yaataat mookwekwak; ak lasei piich eng' ng'elyebwekwak. 
Psalms5:10 Iityi icheek tengekto, ee Kamuktaindet; ingobutyo icheek eng' kirwoogutikwak. Oon icheek eng' chaang'indap pistoennywa, amu ki ingeleljin." 
Psalms5:11 Ago ingoboiboitu icheek tugul che imang'un, Ingotyenso eng' poiboiyet icheek agoi, amu iriibe icheek. Ingoboiboitu ak icheek eng' inyee che chamei kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms5:12 Amu inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iberuuri chiito ne po imanda; iyieme ineendet chamyeng'ung' ko uu long'eet. 
Psalms6:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, megera kong' eng' nereegeguk, anan itigoono eng' nyitateng'ung' ne ng'waan." 
Psalms6:2 Rireena, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu aa nyalulat; ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, isooba, amu nyalildos kawekyuk." 
Psalms6:3 Nyalili agine saboondanyu miising', ee inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tyanitu?" 
Psalms6:4 Iweege, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, saru saboondanyu; sarwo amu chamyeng'ung' ne tala." 
Psalms6:5 Ma mi chii ne ibwaatin eng' ye mi meet. Mwaun ng'oo kongoi eng' ye mi che ki kobek? 
Psalms6:6 Kaang'et eng' tigenoikyuk; marane peegap kong' itogunnyu kemout age tugul; sachin peekyuk po kong' ole arue. 
Psalms6:7 Machei kong'emogis konyekyuk amu arageneet; kagoosegitu amu puunikyuk tugul. 
Psalms6:8 Oistoenage, okweek tugul yaigap tengekto! Amu kagogas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuugeetap riirekyuk." 
Psalms6:9 Kagogas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor soomsennyu; taachei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor saaennyu. 
Psalms6:10 Ililandos puunikyuk tugul ak konyalildos miising'; weechegei let ak kolilaanso eng' yooto. 
Psalms7:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, inyee ne amang'un; sarwo eng' icheek tugul che onwo, ak ieta." 
Psalms7:2 Si ma kereer saboondanyu ko uu ng'etundo, si ma tonaton, ama mi chii ne sarwo." 
Psalms7:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, ngo ki ayai ni, ngo mi tengek eunekyuk," 
Psalms7:4 ngo ki ayaakyi yaityo ne ki kimi tuwai eng' kaalyeet, anan ki arebee kiy punyondennyu ko mangen," 
Psalms7:5 ko ingoon anyun puunyoot saboondanyu kot konam; ingotyekyi ng'wony saboondanyu, ak konde temburyek teegistanyu." 
Psalms7:6 Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' nereegeguk, tonon kirinde koroomnatetap nereegegap puunikyuk. Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet, ki ing'at kirwooget." 
Psalms7:7 Ingoyiemin tuiyetap pororyosyek, ak iweege parak ibou icheek." 
Psalms7:8 Ibesyechin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyek; irwookseiywa, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu imandanyu, ak ko uu kagesunatennyu pogei." 
Psalms7:9 Ingowong'kei tengektap kiptengeginik, ago igimit ne po imanda. Ee Kamuktaindet ne po imanda, inyee ne isyachi kabwaatutik ak mugulelwek." 
Psalms7:10 Long'ennyu Kamuktaindet, ne saru che po iman eng' mugulelwek." 
Psalms7:11 Kamuktaindet ko kirwoogindet ne po iman, Kamuktaindet ne nereekyin kiptengeginik kotugul." 
Psalms7:12 Ngot ko masik chii, kolitei Kamuktaindet rotwennyi po chok; kagoriich ak kong'i kwangennyi." 
Psalms7:13 Ki kochop kariikyik che kiimeen, yaei kipchabonikyik che po maat." 
Psalms7:14 Ogeero ole manaktoi `icheek yaityet, ee, kogomanach yaityet, ak kosich lembeita." 
Psalms7:15 Kogochop keriinget, kot kobal, kogobutyi keriingonooto kobaalei." 
Psalms7:16 Weekyingei metinnyi yaityennyi; ak kobutyi paragutap metinnyi koroomnatennyi. 
Psalms7:17 Aweekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi ko uu imandanyi; ak atyenjini kalasunet kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'." 
Psalms8:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kiptaiyandennyo, konyitot ne tya kaineng'ung' eng' ng'wony komugul! Ki inde telunateng'ung' kipsengwet." 
Psalms8:2 Ki ing'at kimnateet kobun kutusweegap lagok ak che reritos, ki inde irimeet amu puuniguk, si iger kong' puunyoot kosiis ak ne yaaktoi mugetuut." 
Psalms8:3 Ye ageere kipsengwetisyeguk, poisyonigap euneguk, arawet ak kecheik che ki ichop," 
Psalms8:4 ale, nee chii anyun, ne tos ibwaat, anan weeriitap chii, ne tos irutoochi?" 
Psalms8:5 Ki iyai ineendet koming'init kitigin eng' Kamuktaindet, ak ilaakyi ineendet kuutweet ne po toroornatet ak teegisto." 
Psalms8:6 Ki igoochi ineendet koboi poisyonigap euneguk; ki inde tuguuk tugul keldebesaigap keelyekyik kogas iit: 
Psalms8:7 keechiirek tugul ak tuuga tugul, ak tyong'ik che po timiin;" 
Psalms8:8 toriitik che mi parak, njireenik che po nyanjet, ak alak tugul che pendote ortinwegap nyanjosyek." 
Psalms8:9 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kiptaiyandennyo, konyitot ne tya kaineng'ung' eng' ng'wony komugul!" 
Psalms9:1 Aweekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi eng' muguleldanyu tugul; aboortoi kwang'utiguk tugul. 
Psalms9:2 Abaibaitu ak agasigei eng' inyee; atyenjini kalasunet kaineng'ung', ee, inyee Ne Toroor Miising'." 
Psalms9:3 Ye kaweek let puunikyuk, ibutos ak kolusyo eng' taing'ung'." 
Psalms9:4 Amu ki iyai kirwoogennyu ak ng'aleekyuk; ki itebee ng'echereetap laitornatet, irwooch anyun eng' iman." 
Psalms9:5 Ki iger kong' pororyosyek, ak ki ing'em kiptengeginik, ki ibukte kainennywa koigeny agoi koigeny." 
Psalms9:6 Ki igeskei kobetito puunik koek karatwek koigeny; ki ing'em nganasookwak, ki kogeskei kabwaatet ne kibwaatee icheeget." 
Psalms9:7 Ago laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny; Ki kochopchi ng'echerennyi po laitornatet kirwooget. 
Psalms9:8 Irwookyin ineendet ng'wony eng' imanda, ibesyechin piik kirwooget eng' imanda." 
Psalms9:9 Egu `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor irimeetap ne kiusei, irimeet eng' peetuusyegap nyalilda." 
Psalms9:10 Ak imang'un icheek che ingen kaineng'ung', amu inyee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma imete che cheeng'in." 
Psalms9:11 Otyenji kalasunet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne menyei Zion. Omwaite poisyonikyik eng' kwenutap piik. 
Psalms9:12 Amu ibwaati icheek ne yaaktoi mugetuut agobo korotiik; ma utye riiregap kibananook. 
Psalms9:13 Rireena, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Keer nyalildanyu ne punu icheek che wecho, inyee ne itogosuneno eng' kurgotigap meet," 
Psalms9:14 si kobiit abarta kalasuneng'ung' tugul; ak eng' kurgotigap cheptap Zion, agasegei yetuneng'ung'." 
Psalms9:15 Kagororokyi pororyosyek keriinget ne ki palei; kagonam keelyekwak mesteet ne kiga uny icheek. 
Psalms9:16 Kigoboorgei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki korwooch inee; ki konam kiptengekyot poisyetap eunekyik. [Higgaion. Selah]" 
Psalms9:17 Weechegei kiptengeginik kobendi ye mi meet, agot pororyosyek tugul che utye Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms9:18 Ago ma kiutye kotugul kibananook, ama petei koigeny kamang'unetap che nyalildos." 
Psalms9:19 Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Amat ichamji piik koterteeris. Ingirwooksechi pororyosyek eng' taing'ung'." 
Psalms9:20 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, imu icheek; ingonai pororyosyek kole icheek ko piik kityo." 
Psalms10:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu nee si itonone ole loo? Kalya si iunykei eng' peetuusyegap nyalilda?" 
Psalms10:2 Inyalili `kiptengeginik che menoot kibananook eng' koroomnateet; ingonam icheek mestonok che ki kobwaat. 
Psalms10:3 Ilasunegei kiptengekyot mageetap muguleldanyi, icheeget che kipkeinik agobo kelunet ko chubei ak kosasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms10:4 Leen kiptengekyot eng' menatennyi, “Ma mage kiy Kamuktaindet;” leen eng' kabwaatutikyik tugul, “Ma mi Kamuktaindet.”" 
Psalms10:5 Ortinwekyik ko poorei kotugul; mi parak kirwoogutiguk, ma ityin kogeer; ak sasei `ineendet puunikyik tugul." 
Psalms10:6 Leen eng' muguleldanyi, “Ma istaa chii; ma anyooru anee yaityet eng' ibinwek tugul.”" 
Psalms10:7 Nyiitaat kutinnyi chubisyet ak ng'aalseet ak sastaet; miitei ng'elyeptanyi mastaet ak yaityet. 
Psalms10:8 Tebee ole ung'egei eng' nganasook; parei che ma tinyei ng'oogi eng' komoswek che ung'ootiin. Sapchin konyekyik ineendet ne nyeraat; 
Psalms10:9 saptoi eng' ole ung'aat ko uu ng'etundo eng' kebenennyi; sapchin kole si konam kibananook; namei kibananiat eng' mestennyi ak kochuut. 
Psalms10:10 Ribisi, ing'uruuksei, ak kobutyo che nyalildos amu chechiik che kiimeen." 
Psalms10:11 Leen eng' muguleldanyi, “Ko koutye Kamuktaindet; unyei togeennyi, ma keerei agoi.”" 
Psalms10:12 Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ee Kamuktaindet, namji parak eung'ung'; ameutyee che kiusei." 
Psalms10:13 Amu nee si kosas `kiptengekyot Kamuktaindet? Ak koleen eng' muguleldanyi, “Memage kiy”?" 
Psalms10:14 Ago igeertoi inyee; igeere inyee mastaet ak tagisyet, si ibou eng' eung'ung'. Tienengei ne nyeraat; ki iegu toretindetap ne ma tinyei sigiik." 
Psalms10:15 Irii eutap kiptengekyot; cheeng' tengektap ne ya kot koma komi. 
Psalms10:16 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Laitoryat koigeny ak koigeny; ki ko petyo pororyosyek eng' emennyi. 
Psalms10:17 Ki igas inyee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, mageetap che talaen; ichobe mugulelwekwak ak igoochini itiiguk kogas." 
Psalms10:18 Ibesyechini ne ma tinyei sigiik ak ne kisastae, si mata komuiso kogeny chii ne po ng'wony." 
Psalms11:1 Amang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; teptoi ano si oleenji saboondanyu: “Tiriren ko uu toriityon agoi tuloonook," 
Psalms11:2 ogeero, kariich kwanget kiptengeginik; kagersach kipchabonikwak, si kobiit komwok ne po iman eng' ole imen." 
Psalms11:3 Ngot keng'em lumeiywek, komuuchi koyai nee ne po imanda?”" 
Psalms11:4 Miitei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor hekalunnyi ne tiliil, miitei kipsengwet ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Toobeni konyekyik, keerei konyekyik weeriigap piik." 
Psalms11:5 Tyemei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiitap imanda; ak wechei saboondanyi kiptengekyot ak ineendet ne chamei koroomnateet. 
Psalms11:6 Robonjin `inee kiptengeginik ng'etetyotap maat ak tuguuk che laldos; egu `usoonet ne peelsei kebebertap kigombennywa. 
Psalms11:7 Po imanda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak chamei imanda; keerei `che po iman togeennyi. 
Psalms12:1 Saru, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ma komi chiitap iman; kagobetyo kayanik eng' kwenutap weeriigap piik." 
Psalms12:2 Ng'alaaljingei tangoita, chii tugul ak chiitap kokwennyi; ng'alaali chemwaigutnateet ak eng' muguleldo ne pesyot aeng'." 
Psalms12:3 Ibeeti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutusweek tugul che ng'alaali chemwaigutnateet, ak ng'elyepta age tugul ne lasegei." 
Psalms12:4 Che ki le, “Kiterteeri eng' ng'elyebwekyok; ki tinyei kutusweek, ng'oo ne poiywech?”" 
Psalms12:5 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: “Amu sastaetap kibananook, amu tigenetap che panandos, ang'eete nguno, agoochini kotebi riibetapkei, nooto ne machei miising'.”" 
Psalms12:6 Tiliileen ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ko uu fedha ne kityemei eng' maat ne oo, ne kitiliili konyil tisap." 
Psalms12:7 Riibech, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, riibech acheek eng' ibini agoi koigeny." 
Psalms12:8 Pendi kiptengeginik komoswek tugul, ye eetu yaityet eng' kwenutap piik." 
Psalms13:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, iutyeno agoi au? Agoi koigeny? Iung'ena togeng'ung' kot kotyanit?" 
Psalms13:2 Agereeri met eng' saboondanyu kot kotyanit, komi arageneet muguleldanyu kotugul? Eetu punyondennyu eng' anee kot kotyanit?" 
Psalms13:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, keer si iwolwoo. Ikweny konyekyuk, si ma ru rwondap meet;" 
Psalms13:4 si ma mwa punyondennyu kole, “Kaaterter ineendet!” Si ma poiboitu puunikyuk eng' kabutennyu." 
Psalms13:5 Ago ki amang'u rireeneng'ung'; igaseegei muguleldanyu yetuneng'ung'. 
Psalms13:6 Atyenjini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki yaiywo ne myee eng' aiyebindo." 
Psalms14:1 Ki komwa ne perber eng' muguleldanyi, kole, “Ma mi Kamuktaindet.” Kigong'emogis, ak koyai yautik che kiwechei; ma mi ne yaei ne myee." 
Psalms14:2 Keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet weeriigap piik, kole kogeer ngo mi ne utaat, ne cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms14:3 Ki komasta tugul, ki kosamisitu tugul; ma mi ne yaei ne myee agot agenge." 
Psalms14:4 Ma tinyei kaguiyet yaigap tengekto? Amei piikyuk ko uu ye amei amitwogik, ama kuurei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms14:5 Ki iyweis miising' eng' olooto, amu mi Kamuktaindet kobooto ibindap che po imanda." 
Psalms14:6 Ki oteweer ng'aleegap kibananiat, ago Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole mwechin ineendet." 
Psalms14:7 Kita myee nda kiga pun yetunetap Israel Zion! Ye tuun iweechi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik che ki kiluul, kogaskei anyun Jakobo ak koboiboitu Israel." 
Psalms15:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ng'oo ne nyoljin kotebee koong'ung'? Ng'oo ne tos meny tulweeng'ung' ne tiliil?" 
Psalms15:2 Ineendet ne wendoti eng' lititindo ak koyaei imanda, ak komwaei imanit eng' muguleldanyi;" 
Psalms15:3 ne ma itaami chii eng' ng'elyeptanyi, ama yachin ne ya chorwennyi, ama mwaitoe ne ya chiitap kokwennyi;" 
Psalms15:4 ne sasei ineendet ne eesyoot, ago konyiti icheek che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ma walei kayosyennyi matiny kanyoor nyalil;" 
Psalms15:5 ne ma pesendoi fedhaisyekyik si kosige che siirtoot, ama taachei tuguugap kagoigoisyet agobo ne ma tinyei tengek. Ineendet ne yaei tuguuchuuto, koma ki istoi agoi." 
Psalms16:1 Riibo, ee Kamuktaindet; amu amang'un." 
Psalms16:2 Kaaleenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ii Kiptaiyandennyu; ma tinye myeein age kobatenen inyee.”" 
Psalms16:3 Ago eng' che tiliileen che mi ng'wony, chooto ko che tagunoot, che mi poiboiyennyu tugul eng' icheek." 
Psalms16:4 Icheeget che leweni kamuktain age ko tesoksei nyalilwogikwak; ma tumdoi anee kagoochinoikwak che kieei che po korotiik, anan amwa kainaikwak eng' kutinnyu." 
Psalms16:5 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kebebertap porotennyu ak ne po kigombennyu; iname parbaryandennyu. 
Psalms16:6 Kagokwaiywa komoswek che myachen; ee, atinye poroteet ne myee." 
Psalms16:7 Alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ing'omita; ee, ineeta muguleldanyu agot kemoi." 
Psalms16:8 Kande Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tainnyu peetuusyek tugul; amu mi ineendet eunnyu ne po tai, ma ki istaa." 
Psalms16:9 Paibai muguleldanyu amu nooto, ak kogasegei saboondanyu; tebyei poortanyu agine eng' chametapkei." 
Psalms16:10 Memetoi saboondanyu eng' ye mi meet; amechamjini kogeer neng'ung' ne tiliil nunet. 
Psalms16:11 Iboorwo ooreetap saboondo; mi kagasetapkei taing'ung' ne nyiitaat, mi eung'ung' ne po tai che kechamei agoi koigeny." 
Psalms17:1 Kas imanda, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, epchi iit riirekyuk; ingogas iting'ung' saaennyu, ne ma mang'une kutitap ng'aalseet." 
Psalms17:2 Ingomong' kirwoogennyu eng' ole imi; ingogeer konyeguk tugul che nyolunotin. 
Psalms17:3 Ki ityem muguleldanyu; ki inyoonjo kemoi, ki isyacha, ama inyoorcha kiy; ki abekyi ale ma mwaei kutinnyu pistoet." 
Psalms17:4 Ago eng' poisyonigap piik, ko ki ariipkei amu ng'olyoot ne punu kuting'ung', si masup ortinwegap rebiik." 
Psalms17:5 Ki konamgei tyegutikyuk ak ortinweguk, ama ichabaita keelyekyuk." 
Psalms17:6 Kaguurin, amu iwolwoo, ee Kamuktaindet; epcha iit, kas ng'alaalennyu." 
Psalms17:7 Ibooru chamyeng'ung' ne tala ne kikwong'ee, inyee ne isaru icheek che imang'un, eng' puunikwak eng' eung'ung' ne po tai." 
Psalms17:8 Riibo ko uu laptetap konda, ung'ena urwetap kebebaiguk," 
Psalms17:9 si ma twaa kiptengeginik che usa, puunikyuk che koroomen che ki yiema." 
Psalms17:10 Kager icheeget mugulelwekwak agobo riirge; ng'alaale menoteet kutusweekwak. 
Psalms17:11 Kagoalachech komoswek tugul; kagochiiljech kong' si kowiirchech ng'wony. 
Psalms17:12 Kergei ineendet ak ng'etundo ne machei kochumji kiit ne amei, uu neraneetap ng'etundo ne ribisi eng' komoswek che ung'ootiin." 
Psalms17:13 Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, torookte, wiirchi ng'wony, saru saboondanyu eng' kiptengekyot, eng' rotweng'ung' po chok." 
Psalms17:14 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' eung'ung' isarwo eng' piik, eng' piik che po ng'wony, che ting'ee kebebertanywa sabooni. Che inyiiti `inyee mootinwekwak konoraiguk, tinyei icheek lagok che yamei, ak pagaakyin tuguukwak lagokwak." 
Psalms17:15 Ago ageere anee togeng'ung' eng' imanda; abiyonyi itoondong'ung' ye ang'eete. 
Psalms18:1 Achamin, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kimnateennyu." 
Psalms18:2 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko rwandennyu, irimennyu ak saruunindennyu; Kamuktaindennyu, rwandennyu ne kiim, amang'u ineendet; long'ennyu, kuinetap yetunennyu ak teeksennyu ne kooi." 
Psalms18:3 Aguure Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne nyoljin kilas, si kesarwo eng' puunikyuk." 
Psalms18:4 Ki alachan poroonigap meet, ak ki imua maraneetap yaityet." 
Psalms18:5 Ki yiema poroonigap ye mi che ki kobek, kichea mestonogap meet." 
Psalms18:6 Eng' pichiindanyu ko ki aguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki ariirchi Kamuktaindennyu ale kotoreta. Ki kas kutinnyu eng' hekalunnyi, ak kiit itiikyik riirekyuk." 
Psalms18:7 Ki kirgiren ng'wony anyun ak kobotan, kitwagei lumeiywegap tuloonook, ak kotumdumgei, amu kinereech." 
Psalms18:8 Ki togostae iyeto seruunekyik, ak kibeelso maat ne ki mang'une kutinnyi; kilalyo nesek eng' maata." 
Psalms18:9 Ki im kipsengwet ak icheek, ak kochoorgei ineendet; kimi mesundeito ne oo kururetap keelyekyik." 
Psalms18:10 Ki laany kerubindet, ak kotiriren; kitiriren anyun kochaakta eng' kebebaigap usoonet." 
Psalms18:11 Ki yai mesundeito koek emainnyi ne mi komoswekyik tugul, imenindap peek, poolik che tuuen che po parak." 
Psalms18:12 Eng' kaluunet ne ki mi tainnyi, ko ki pun polikyik che tuuen, koigap ropta ak ng'etetyot." 
Psalms18:13 Kitul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet, ak kitwek Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising', kobiit koigap ropta ak ng'etetyot." 
Psalms18:14 Ki iyookto kipchabonikyik, ak koiyesta; ki ilyelyo kalyelosyek ng'iisyat, ak konyaliil icheek." 
Psalms18:15 Ki took anyun kereruusyegap peek, ak king'ang'agis lumeiywegap ng'wony, ye ki iger kong' inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' cheetap kabuusetap seruneguk." 
Psalms18:16 Ki iyook eunnyi eng' parak, ak koganaba; ki ichuutwa among' eng' peek che chaang'." 
Psalms18:17 Kisarwo eng' punyondennyu ne kiim, ak eng' icheeget che kiwecha; amu ki kiimeen kosiiro." 
Psalms18:18 Kichea eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu, ago ki ek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atiegei." 
Psalms18:19 Ki imuta amanda awo ole paraa; kisarwo, amu ki paibait eng' anee." 
Psalms18:20 Ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu imandanyu; ki koono ko uu tiliilindap eunekyuk. 
Psalms18:21 Amu ki ariip ortinwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ma abagaakte Kamuktaindennyu eng' oor ne ya." 
Psalms18:22 Amu kimi tainnyu kirwoogutikyik tugul, ak ki ma aiste kaneetisyosyekyik." 
Psalms18:23 Ki ageesunotkei eng' tainnyi, ak ki ariipkei si ma nama tengekto." 
Psalms18:24 Ki koono anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu imandanyu, ko uu tiliilindap eunekyuk eng' tainnyi." 
Psalms18:25 Eng' che tinyei rireenetapkei ii po rireenetapkei; ak eng' chiito ne ititaat ibartoige ile ii ititaat. 
Psalms18:26 Eng' che tiliileen ibartoige ile ii tiliil, ak eng' che mastoi, obortosi." 
Psalms18:27 Amu isaru che nyerootiin, ago iming'ini che mendos." 
Psalms18:28 Amu inaami tainnyu; ikweng'wa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu mesundeitonyu. 
Psalms18:29 Amu aiyestoi lugeet eng' inyee; eng' Kamuktaindennyu atorombeni asiire irimeet. 
Psalms18:30 Ititaat ooreetap Kamuktaindet; naat ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Ineendet long'eetap icheeget tugul che imang'u. 
Psalms18:31 Amu tos ng'oo Kamuktaindet, kobatee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak tos ng'oo rwandet, kobatee Kamuktaindennyo?" 
Psalms18:32 Ineendet Kamuktaindet ne ratwa kimnateet, ak koyaei ooreennyu koek ne ititaat." 
Psalms18:33 Yaei ineendet keelyekyuk koigei che po kenyeleet, ak nama atonon eng' komoswekyuk che sutotin." 
Psalms18:34 Ineeti eunekyuk koyai lugeet, si kong'i eunekyuk kwanget ne po sugunwet." 
Psalms18:35 Ki igoono long'eetap yetuneng'ung' agine; ki kotiia eung'ung' ne po tai, ak ki koeeta talasyeng'ung'." 
Psalms18:36 Ki ibaraiywa kakwautikyuk, ama ichabaita keelyekyuk." 
Psalms18:37 Aoone puunikyuk agoi anam: amaweechigei agoi kowong'kei. 
Psalms18:38 Atue kot koma komuuchi kong'eetyo; ibutyin icheek keelyekyuk keel. 
Psalms18:39 Amu ki iratwa kimnateet ne po lugeet; ki iterteerwa aboi che king'eetya. 
Psalms18:40 Ki iwelel puunikyuk kotuktocha patai, si kobiit awong' icheek che wecho." 
Psalms18:41 Ki riiryo, ago ki ma piit ne ki sar; ki riirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago ki ma wolji." 
Psalms18:42 Ki atonaton eng' nooto komengegitu koigei temburyek che ibei usoonet; ki awaste ko uu ng'atateek che mi ortinwek. 
Psalms18:43 Ki isarwo eng' pooryosyegap piik; ki igoono aek metitap pororyosyek. Tuun ota piik che tomo anai. 
Psalms18:44 Ye kas agobo anee, eng' yooto kogasa iit; tuun kasa iit toek eng' ng'aalseet." 
Psalms18:45 Pegunoti toek kowandogei, ak komong' eng' ole ung'egei kobotandos." 
Psalms18:46 Sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Iberuurot rwandennyu, ingotororit Kamuktaindet ne po yetunennyu." 
Psalms18:47 Kamuktaindet ne yaaktoiywo mugetuut, ak yaei piik kogasa iit." 
Psalms18:48 Sarwo ineendet eng' puunikyuk; ee, itoroora asiir icheek che ng'eetyina, isarwo eng' chiito ne koroom." 
Psalms18:49 Eng' niito aweegun kongoi anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kwenutap pororyosyek, ak atyenji kaineng'ung' kalasunoik." 
Psalms18:50 Igoochin laitoryandennyi saruunet ne oo; ak koboorchin nenyi ne iilaat chamyennyi ne tala, Daudi ak iyotennyi agoi koigeny." 
Psalms19:1 Mwaitoi kipsengwet liilindap Kamuktaindet; ibartoi soet poisyonigap eunekyik. 
Psalms19:2 Mwachin `peetuut peetuut age ng'olyoot, iboorchin `kemout kemout age naet." 
Psalms19:3 Ma mi ng'alaalet anan ng'aleek; ma kigasei tweguunennywa. 
Psalms19:4 Itei kutinnywa ng'wony komugul, ak itei ng'aleekwak ole poochin ng'wony. Ki inde emait eng' chooto agobo asiista," 
Psalms19:5 ko uu sandet ne mang'une koonnyi, ak kobaibai ko uu chii ne kiim ne labati eng' kabeletapkei." 
Psalms19:6 Itei chorunennyi tabandap kipsengwet, ak itei yiemutyennyi tabanwegap kipsengwet; ma mi kiy ne ung'egei maannyi." 
Psalms19:7 Ititaat ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koweechi saboondo. Po iman paornateetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, igoochin utaatyet chii ne yetyet." 
Psalms19:8 Lititen kaneetisyosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, iboiboi muguleldo. Tiliil ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, indoi lapkeiyet koonyek." 
Psalms19:9 Tiliil kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotebyei koigeny. Po iman kirwoogutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak tinyei imanda tugul." 
Psalms19:10 Chooto che kemachei kosiir thahabu, kosiir thahabu che chaang' che tiliileen. Siirei anyinyindanywa kumyat, siirei kumyat ak masamek." 
Psalms19:11 Kogeny eng' chooto kitigoni otwogeng'ung'; miitei melekto ne oo ngeriip chooto. 
Psalms19:12 Ng'oo ne imuuchi koguiyo lelutikyik? Itiliila eng' tuguuk che ung'ootiin. 
Psalms19:13 Keer otwogeng'ung' si ma yai tuguuk che po menoteet; amegoochi koboiywa. Si aek ne ititaat, si atyagak eng' pistoet ne oo." 
Psalms19:14 Ng'aleegap kutinnyu ak kabwaatutigap muguleldanyu, ko ingochamak eng' taing'ung' ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, rwandennyu ak ko katyagindennyu." 
Psalms20:1 Ingowolun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap nyalilda; ingoeetin kainetap Kamuktaindetap Jakobo. 
Psalms20:2 Ingoyogun toreteet eng' Hekaluut, ak kotiin kobunu Zion." 
Psalms20:3 Ingobwaat kagoochinoiguk tugul, ak ingocham tiseiyweguk che kibeelei." 
Psalms20:4 Ingogoonin ko uu ye machei muguleldang'ung', ak ingosuldaun ruchinaiguk tugul." 
Psalms20:5 Kigasegei acheek yetuneng'ung', ak kinamjini parak songolikyok eng' kainetap Kamuktaindennyo. Ingosuldaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor soomutiguk tugul." 
Psalms20:6 Angen nguno ale saru Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nenyi ne iilaat; woljin ineendet kobun kipsengwet nenyi tiliil eng' eunnyi ne po tai kogoochin katerteerisyosyek che eecheen. 
Psalms20:7 Imang'u alak kariisyegap lugeet ak alak paraisisyek; ago kibwaati acheek kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms20:8 Terteryote icheek ak kobutyo, ago acheek ko kageng'eetye, ketononse." 
Psalms20:9 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, saru laitoryat; ak iwolwech ye kiguursei." 
Psalms21:1 Poiboitu laitoryat eng' kimnateng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, poiboitu ne tya eng' yetuneng'ung'!" 
Psalms21:2 Ki igoochi kiit ne machei muguleldanyi, ama ietee kiit ne kosoom." 
Psalms21:3 Amu isip igoochini kaberuroigap myeeindo; igerchinee metit naaryeetap thahabu ne karaaran. 
Psalms21:4 Kisoomin saboondo, ak ki igoochi; agot chaang'indap peetuusyek che pendi koigeny ak koigeny." 
Psalms21:5 Oo telunatennyi eng' yetuneng'ung'; ilaakyini teegisto ak etunateet. 
Psalms21:6 Amu iyae ineendet koek perurto agoi koigeny; igoochini kogaskei eng' poiboiyetap togeng'ung'. 
Psalms21:7 Amu imang'u `laitoryat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak amu chamyet ne tala ne po Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' koma ki istoi ineendet." 
Psalms21:8 Nyooru eung'ung' puuniguk tugul; nyooru eung'ung' ne po tai icheeget che wechin. 
Psalms21:9 Iwong'u icheek eng' maat ne ng'eteteni eng' peetuutap nereegeguk. Lugui `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' nyitatennyi, ak kobeel maat icheek kogees." 
Psalms21:10 Tuun ing'eme logoekwak iiste eng' ng'wony, kobooto iyotennywa eng' kwenutap weeriigap piik." 
Psalms21:11 Agot ngo chop icheek koyaun yaityo; agot ye ibwaat koyai ne ya, koma koi imuuch icheek koyai." 
Psalms21:12 Amu iweechi icheek kotuktochin patai, igeresach kipchaboniguk si itokyi icheek." 
Psalms21:13 Tororitu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kimnateng'ung'! Tuun ketyen ak kilasu kimnateng'ung'." 
Psalms22:1 Kamuktaindennyu, Kamuktaindennyu, amu nee si ibagaakta? Amu nee si ilooena, ametoreta, amu nee si ilooitune ng'aleegap tigenennyu?" 
Psalms22:2 Ee Kamuktaindennyu, ariire peet ago mewolu; ak eng' kemoi, amasise." 
Psalms22:3 Ago ii tiliil, inyee ne imenye kalasunoigap Israel." 
Psalms22:4 Ki imang'un kwanisyekyok; ki imang'un ak ki isaru. 
Psalms22:5 Ki riirchin ak kinyoor saruunet; ki imang'un ak ki ma ililanso. 
Psalms22:6 Ago anee ko aa kutyet, ma aa chii; anee ne kirosyin eng' piik, ak ne sasaat eng' piik." 
Psalms22:7 Rorechino tugul che keera; ak kochota eng' kutit, kolelechi metowek, koleen," 
Psalms22:8 tiegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; si kosaruun; ingosar ineendet, ko uu ye paibai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ineendet." 
Psalms22:9 Ago inyee ne ki imoong'wa eng' moetap kamennyu; inyee ne ki igoono amang'un ye ki achuchuni. 
Psalms22:10 Ki kiwiircha oldang'ung' kobooch ami moo; kobooch ami moetap kamennyu, ko ii Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms22:11 Amelooitena; amu neegit nyalilda; ak ma mi ne toreton. 
Psalms22:12 Kagoyiema kiruugik che chaang'; kagoyiema kiruugik che koroomen che po Bashan. 
Psalms22:13 Kagoseng'eng'ja, ko uu ng'etundo ne kombori ak koboriseni." 
Psalms22:14 Kagitumda ko uu peek, ak kagong'ulyelis kawekyuk tugul; uu muguleldanyu masamek; ak kochootyo eng' moennyu." 
Psalms22:15 Kagoyaam kimnateennyu ko uu rokyet; ak kanamgei ng'elyeptanyu ak tagilgilyet; ak kaimutya temburyegap meet. 
Psalms22:16 Amu kagoyiema sesenik; kagogercha ooreet tuiyetap kiptengeginik. Katoor eunekyuk ak keelyekyuk. 
Psalms22:17 Amuuchi aiit kawekyuk tugul; keera ak konjurura. 
Psalms22:18 Pchechingei ngoroikyuk, ak serei parbareek agobo ngoryennyu." 
Psalms22:19 Ago inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amelooitena! Ee kimnateennyu, chogu toreto!" 
Psalms22:20 Saru saboondanyu eng' rotwetap chok, saru chamanennyu eng' kimnateetap seset." 
Psalms22:21 Sarwo eng' kutitap ng'etundo; ee, kaiwolwo eng' kuinoigap soenik." 
Psalms22:22 Amwachini kaineng'ung' tupchosyekyuk; alasun eng' kwenutap tuiyet: 
Psalms22:23 Okweek che ogonyiti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, olasu ineendet! Okweek tugul che oo iyoteetap Jakobo, otoroor ineendet; oiywei ineendet okweek tugul iyoteetap Israel!" 
Psalms22:24 Amu ki ma sas anan kowech nyalildap ne kinyaliili; ama ung'e togeennyi ineendet; ago ki kas ye kingo riirchi ineendet. 
Psalms22:25 Inyee ne alasu eng' kwenutap tuiyet ne oo; agoitoi che ki aaroorte eng' taitap icheek che iywei ineendet. 
Psalms22:26 Amisyei che talaen ak kobiyong'so; ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che cheeng'ei ineendet. Ingosapcho mugulelwekwok koigeny! 
Psalms22:27 Tuun ibwaati Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole poochin ng'wony tugul ak koweekyigei ineendet; tuun kutung'jinin inyee ortinwek tugul che po pororyosyek. 
Psalms22:28 Amu po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitornatet; ak pou ineendet pororyosyek. 
Psalms22:29 Tuun amisyei tugul che neryootiin che po ng'wony, ak kolasu; ak tuun ing'uruukyin ineendet tugul che pendi temburyek, agot ineendet ne ma tuun imuuchi koriip saboondanyi kosap." 
Psalms22:30 Tuun poisyechin ineendet iyoteet; ki ityin Kiptaiyat eng' ibinwek," 
Psalms22:31 pwoonei kobartoi imandanyi eng' piik che tuun kisichei, keele, ineendet ne ki yai." 
Psalms23:1 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mestowondennyu, mararwo kiy." 
Psalms23:2 Koono arue ole mi susweek che nyalileen; indoiywa awo ole mi peegap kaalyeet," 
Psalms23:3 isoobi saboondanyu. Indoiywa abun ortinwegap imanda agobo kainennyi. 
Psalms23:4 Ee, agot ngabune atebweet ne po urwetap meet, koma ywei yaityo; amu imi kobooto; igaigaa kiroktong'ung' ak siaring'ung'." 
Psalms23:5 Ichobwoo amitwogik aamis eng' meset eng' ole mi puunikyuk; kaiilee metinnyu mwaita; kagonyi kigombennyu kot kong'irtagei. 
Psalms23:6 Isubota iman myeeindo ak chamyet ne tala peetuusyek tugul kotee asabe, ak atebee kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny." 
Psalms24:1 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony ak tugul che nyiitaat olooto; ng'wony, ak che menyei olooto;" 
Psalms24:2 amu ineendet ne ki lumdoi ng'wony eng' nyanjosyek, ak kogimit eng' ainoosyek." 
Psalms24:3 Ng'oo ne togostoi tulweetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak ng'oo ne tononi eng' oldanyi ne tiliil? 
Psalms24:4 Ineendet ne tiliileen eunek ak ko tiliil muguleldanyi, ne ma lasyingei saboondanyi tuguugap yaityo, ama iyastos eng' ng'aalseet." 
Psalms24:5 Taachei ineendet kaberuret eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak imanda eng' Kamuktaindetap yetunennyi." 
Psalms24:6 Niito ibinda ne cheeng'ei ineendet, ne cheeng'ei togeng'ung', ee Kamuktaindetap Jakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Ong'eet met, okweek kurgotik; ong'eet met, okweek kurgotik che po koigeny, si konyo oriit Laitoryatap teegisto." 
Psalms24:8 Ng'oo Laitoryatap teegisto? Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiim ne po kamuktaet, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po kamuktaet eng' lugeet." 
Psalms24:9 Ong'eet met, okweek kurgotik; ee, ong'eet met, kurgotik che po koigeny, si konyo ko Laitoryatap teegisto." 
Psalms24:10 Ng'oo Laitoryandani po teegisto? Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Ineendet Laitoryatap teegisto." 
Psalms25:1 Atokyinin saboondanyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms25:2 Ee Kamuktaindennyu, ki amang'un; amegoono alilan; amegoochi puunikyuk kogasenagei." 
Psalms25:3 Ee, amegoochi kolilaan ne igenin; ililandos icheek che ng'aalsei puch." 
Psalms25:4 Iboorwo ortinweguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ineeta ole ibune." 
Psalms25:5 Indoiywa eng' imaning'ung' ak ineeta, amu ii Kamuktaindetap yetunennyu; ageniin peetuut komugul." 
Psalms25:6 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ibwaat rireenosyeguk ak chamyeng'ung' ne tala; amu ki mi kobooch keny." 
Psalms25:7 Amebwaat tengekwogik anan pistoennyu che po ming'inatennyu; ibwaata ko uu chamyeng'ung' ne tala, amu myeeindong'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms25:8 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko myee ak ko po iman, eng' nooto anyun ineeti ineendet kiptengeginik eng' ooreet." 
Psalms25:9 Indochin che talaen eng' kirwooget; ak ineeti che talaen ooreennyi. 
Psalms25:10 Chamyet ne tala ortinwek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko po imanit, eng' icheek che riibei kayomisennyi ak paornatosyekyik." 
Psalms25:11 Amu kaineng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyoiywa kaat tengektonyu, amu oo." 
Psalms25:12 Ng'oo anyun, chii ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ineeti `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' oor ne leweni." 
Psalms25:13 Tebyei saboondanyi eng' poroteet, ak konyaban iyotennyi emet." 
Psalms25:14 Miitei ung'ootyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto icheek che iywei ineendet; ak koboorchi icheek arorutyennyi. 
Psalms25:15 Tokyingei konyekyuk Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul; amu inemu keelyekyuk eng' mesteet. 
Psalms25:16 Iweekyage ak irireena, amu ami aneege ak anyalili." 
Psalms25:17 Katesak nyalilwogik che po muguleldanyu; imaanda eng' pichiinwekyuk. 
Psalms25:18 Keer nyalildanyu ak aragenennyu; ak nyoiywo kaat tengekwogikyuk tugul. 
Psalms25:19 Keer puunikyuk amu chaang'; ak kowecho eng' wegeet ne koroom. 
Psalms25:20 Riip saboondanyu, ak isarwo; ameng' alilan, amu amang'un." 
Psalms25:21 Ingoriibo kagesunatetapkei ak imanda, amu ageniin." 
Psalms25:22 Ee Kamuktaindet, ityaach Israel, eng' nyalilwogikyik tugul." 
Psalms26:1 Ibesyeiwo, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki awendotee kagesunatennyu pogei, ki amang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amachuchuige." 
Psalms26:2 Isyacha, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ityema; tyem kabwaatutikyuk ak muguleldanyu." 
Psalms26:3 Amu mi tainnyu chamyeng'ung' ne tala, ak ki awendotee imaning'ung'." 
Psalms26:4 Tomo ketebi ak piik che iberberisyei; ama kinamegei ak ng'aalik. 
Psalms26:5 Aweche tuiyetap che yaei yaityo, ama kitebye ak kiptengeginik." 
Psalms26:6 Auni eunekyuk amu ma tiinya lelutyo, si amuut kaptisisyeng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Psalms26:7 si atyen tyendap kongoi kogasak, ak ang'alaalee poisyoniguk tugul che kikwong'ee." 
Psalms26:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, achame meng'ootetap koong'ung', ole menyei teegistang'ung'." 
Psalms26:9 Ameistaa kobooto kiptengeginik, anan saboondanyu kobooto rumiik," 
Psalms26:10 mi eunekwak kolgolyet, ak nyiitootiin eunekwak che po tai tuguuk che kigoigoisye." 
Psalms26:11 Ago anee, awendotee kagesunatennyu pogei; ityaacha, ak irireenage." 
Psalms26:12 Tononee keldanyu ole myee: alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tuiyosyek. 
Psalms27:1 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko lapkeiyennyu ak yetunennyu; tos aiywei ng'oo? Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kimnateetap saboondanyu; aiywei ng'oo? 
Psalms27:2 Ye ki chea che yaei yaityo, kole koam poortanyu, puunikyuk ak usiikyuk, ko ki kinach icheek ak ki ibutyo." 
Psalms27:3 Agot ngo yiema lugeet, ko manyogoritu muguleldanyu; ngo ng'eetya pooryeet, atese tai kora anyiganitu." 
Psalms27:4 Ki amage kiit agenge Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nooto ne acheeng'e: ale atebee kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyek tugul kotee asabe, si ageer karaaranindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak abwaati eng' hekalunnyi." 
Psalms27:5 Amu ung'ena koonnyi eng' peetuutap nyalilda; ee, ung'ena emainnyi eng' ole ung'aat, ak ko kanapchino rwandet parak." 
Psalms27:6 Ak koeeta nguno agee puunikyuk che yiema. Agoitoi koroseek che po kagasetapkei eng' emainnyi; atyeni ak alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.
