Psalms27:7 Kasa, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ariire, rireena ak iwolwoo." 
Psalms27:8 Ye ki le muguleldanyu, “Ocheeng' togeennyu!” Acheeng'e togeng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms27:9 Ameung'ena togeng'ung'. Ameiste kiboityondeng'ung' eng' nereegek; inyee ne ki iegu toretindennyu. Ameona, amemeta, ee Kamuktaindetap yetunennyu." 
Psalms27:10 Agot ngo ki kometa abba ak kamennyu, konama Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms27:11 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineeta oreng'ung', ak imutena ooreet ne litit, amu puunikyuk." 
Psalms27:12 Amegocha mageetap puunikyuk; amu kong'eetya paorinik che po lembech, che mang'une kutusweekwak kolgolyet ko uu kabuuset." 
Psalms27:13 Kaayan ale ageere myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' emetap piik che saptos." 
Psalms27:14 Igen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Kimitu ak ingonyiganit muguleldang'ung'! Ee, igen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms28:1 Aguurin, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ameger itiiguk, rwandennyu, eng' komostanyu, amu, ngot isiis eng' anee, aige icheek che pendi keriinget." 
Psalms28:2 Kas soomutikyuk, ye ariirchinin, ye anamjini parak eunekyuk atokyini oldang'ung' ne tiliil." 
Psalms28:3 Amewiirta kobooto kiptengeginik, anan kobooto che yaei yaityo; che mwachingei kaalyeet ak piigap kokwet, ago tinyei suryet eng' mugulelwekwak." 
Psalms28:4 Igoochi ko uu poisyonikwak, ko uu ole tee yaetap yautikwak. Igoochi ko uu poisyetap eunekwak; yookyi che nyoljin." 
Psalms28:5 Amu ma mage kiy poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anan poisyetap eunekyik, putei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek ama koteechei kogeny." 
Psalms28:6 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki kogaswa soomutikyuk." 
Psalms28:7 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kimnateennyu ak long'ennyu; imang'u muguleldanyu ineendet. Kigetoreta ak igasegei muguleldanyu miising'; alasu ineendet eng' tyendanyu. 
Psalms28:8 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kimnateetap piikyik; ineendet irimeetap yetunetap nenyinet ne ki kiil. 
Psalms28:9 Saru piiguk, ak iberuur poroteng'ung'; pai icheek, ak imutate agoi koigeny." 
Psalms29:1 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee okweek weeriigap che kiimeen, ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor teegisto ak kimnateet." 
Psalms29:2 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor teegisto ne nyoljin kainennyi; ogutung'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' telunatetap tiliilindo. 
Psalms29:3 Miitei tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyanjosyek; tulei Kamuktaindetap teegisto, nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne mi paragutap peek che chaang'." 
Psalms29:4 Tinyei kimnateet tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; nyiitaat `etunateet tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms29:5 Iriei `tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor taragonik; tonatoni `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor taragonik che po Lebanon. 
Psalms29:6 Igoochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuloonoogap Lebanon kotorombenso ko uu moita; ak tulweetap Sirion, ko uu moitap soet." 
Psalms29:7 Petei tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laletap maat. 
Psalms29:8 Itumdumi tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor surkwen; itumdumi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor surkwen ne po Kadesh. 
Psalms29:9 Igoochin tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kenyelok koiiyo, ak chorori keetiigap timiin; ak mwaei age tugul ne mi hekalunnyi kole, “Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Toroornatet!”" 
Psalms29:10 Tebee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maraneet ko uu laitoryat; tebyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kolaitorani koigeny. 
Psalms29:11 Igoochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik kimnateet! Ingoberuuri `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik eng' kaalyeet! 
Psalms30:1 Alasun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki ieeta, ama igoochi puunikyuk kogasenagei." 
Psalms30:2 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, ki ariirchin, ak ki isooba." 
Psalms30:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki imoong'u saboondanyu eng' ye mi meet; ki igoono asap, si ma we keriinget." 
Psalms30:4 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kalasunet, okweek che oo chechiik che tiliileen, oweekyi kongoi kainennyi ne tiliil." 
Psalms30:5 Tebyei nereegekyik ne matya; ichuldos chametap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' sabeetap chii. Mi riirek kemout, ago piitu poiboiyet karon." 
Psalms30:6 Ak ki ale eng' perurtanyu, “Ma kiistaa.”" 
Psalms30:7 Eng' chameng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ki igoono atonon ko uu tulweet ne kiim. Ago ye ki iuny togeng'ung'; ko ki aiyweisye." 
Psalms30:8 Ki ariirchin, inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki ariirchin ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Psalms30:9 “Itinyei keljino nee ye kaamei, ye kaawe keriinget? Ilasun temburyek? Tos imuuchi kobarta imandang'ung'?" 
Psalms30:10 Kas, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak rirenagei; egu toretindennyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!”" 
Psalms30:11 Ki iwal kateennyu koek ureryet; ki ireegunena kuniet, ak ilaakwa poiboiyet." 
Psalms30:12 Si kobiit kolasun saboondanyun ama siisei. Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu, aweegun kongoi koigeny." 
Psalms31:1 Amang'un inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ameng' alilan agoi; sarwo eng' imandang'ung'." 
Psalms31:2 Epcha iit, sarwo chokyi! Egu rwandet ne kiim eng' anee, irimet ne kiim ne sarwo." 
Psalms31:3 Amu inyee ko ii rwandennyu ak irimennyu; eng' nooto anyun indoiywa ak imutata amu kaineng'ung'. 
Psalms31:4 Imaanda eng' mesteet ne ki kiriich agobo anee eng' ung'oot; amu inyee ko ii ole amwechini. 
Psalms31:5 Kande saboondanyu eung'ung'. Ki ityaacha, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee Kamuktaindet ne po imanit." 
Psalms31:6 Aweche icheek che isubi atebosyek che ma nyolu che po lembech; ago amang'u anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms31:7 Agasigei ak abaibaitu eng' rireeneng'ung', amu ki igeer nyalildanyu; ki inai saboondanyu eng' peetuusyegap nyalilda." 
Psalms31:8 Ama ichamde konama eutap puunyoot; ki icham kotonone keelyekyuk ole paraa. 
Psalms31:9 Rireena, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ami nyalilda; machei kobek konyekyuk amu arageneet, kobooto saboondanyu ak poortanyu." 
Psalms31:10 Kagowong'kei peetuusyekyuk amu arageneet, ak kenyiisyekyuk eng' tigenet. Kagorerwo kimnateet amu tengektonyu, ak kagoosegitu kawekyuk." 
Psalms31:11 Kaegu ne iteweerat amu puunikyuk tugul, ne siirei ko piigap kokwennyu. Ki aegu kiit ne kiywei agot eng' piik che kogingengei; kimweena che kigeera eng' ooreet." 
Psalms31:12 Kigeutyeno ko uu chii ne ki kome; ki aige tereet ne kigoiye. 
Psalms31:13 Ki agas kataamsetap che chaang', ki koyiema kamuiset. Ye ki ituiyogei korwooch agobo anee, ye ki cheeng'ei ooreet ne parena." 
Psalms31:14 Ago ki amang'un inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki ale, “Inyee ko ii Kamuktaindennyu.”" 
Psalms31:15 Miitei peetuusyekyuk eung'ung'; sarwo eng' eunegap puunikyuk, ak eng' icheek che onwo." 
Psalms31:16 Ingokweny togeng'ung' kiboityondeng'ung'. Sarwo eng' chamyeng'ung' ne tala. 
Psalms31:17 Ameng' alilan, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kaaguurin; ingolilanso kiptengeginik, ingosiisyo icheek eng' ye mi meet." 
Psalms31:18 Ingonamak kuut kiplembechonik; che itaami che po imanda eng' menoteet, eng' kachaunetapkei ak sasisyet." 
Psalms31:19 Ee, oo ne tya myeeindong'ung', ne ki igonorchi icheek che iywein! Ne ki iyachi icheek che imang'un eng' taitap weeriigap piik!" 
Psalms31:20 Iung'e icheek ole imi ole ung'aat si ma ityi chaamsetap piik. Iunye icheek eng' ung'oot eng' emait si ma nyoor polateet ne po ng'aleek. 
Psalms31:21 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki koboorwo chamyennyi ne tala ne kikwong'ee eng' nganaseet ne kiim." 
Psalms31:22 Ago ki amwa eng' sartaet ale, “Kigeistaa eng' taing'ung'.” Ago ki igas soomutikyuk, ye ki ariirchin." 
Psalms31:23 Ocham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek piikyik tugul che tiliileen! Riibei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che iyani, ago yaakyin eng' chaang'indo ne poisyee menoteet." 
Psalms31:24 Ogimegitu, ak ingonyiganitu mugulelwekwok, okweek tugul che ogeni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms32:1 Igasatkei ne kigenyochi kaat pistoennyi, ne kigetuch chalwoktanyi." 
Psalms32:2 Paibai miising' chii ne ma iityin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto, ama komi ng'aalseet muguleldanyi." 
Psalms32:3 Ye ki asise, koosegitu kawekyuk, amu tigenennyu peetuut komugul." 
Psalms32:4 Amu kichiila eung'ung' peet ak kemoi. Ki yaam poortanyu ko uu ye kabiit kemeut. 
Psalms32:5 Ki amwaun chalwoktanyu, ak ma aung'enen tengektonyu; ki ale, “Ang'aang'jini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pistaosyekyuk;” ak ki inyoiywa kaat chalwoktap tengektonyu." 
Psalms32:6 Ara anyun, ingosain chii age tugul ne tiliil ye ta komuuchi konyoorun. Iman ye kagong'irtagei peek che po kirwooget, koma itei ole mi ineendet." 
Psalms32:7 Inyee ko ii oldanyu ole aung'egei; iriibo inyee si ma nyoorwo nyalilda. Iyiemena tyenwogigap yetunet. 
Psalms32:8 Atigoonin ak aneetiin eng' ooreet ne ibune. Ageerotin ak ang'omitin. 
Psalms32:9 Amoige paraisiit, anan nyumbut, che ma tinyei kaguiyet, che tinyei kariik eng' kutusweek, ak anook che kirang'e, ngo ma uu nooto koma riikyin." 
Psalms32:10 Nyooru ng'waninwogik che chaang' kiptengekyot, ago kimuute rireenetapkei ne imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms32:11 Ogaaskei ak oboiboitu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek che oo po imanda! Otyen eng' poiboiyet, okweek tugul che oo po iman eng' mugulelwekwok!" 
Psalms33:1 Oboiboitu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek che oo po imanda! Nyoljin kalasunet che po iman." 
Psalms33:2 Oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi eng' ketubet; otyenji kalasunoik eng' kibugandet ne tinyei inoik taman. 
Psalms33:3 Otyenji tyendo ne leel; obut komyee si kogasak tyendo. 
Psalms33:4 Amu po iman ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak yaei poisyonikyik tugul eng' imanda. 
Psalms33:5 Chamei ineendet imanda ak kirwooget, nyiitaat ng'wony chamyet ne tala ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms33:6 Ki kiyai kipsengwet eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak chaang'indonywa tugul eng' kabuusetap kutinnyi." 
Psalms33:7 Iyumi peegap nyanjet koigei tulwo; ak konoree rirosyek chogenik. 
Psalms33:8 Ingoiywei ng'wony tugul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ingobotanso piik tugul che menyei ng'wony, amu ineendet." 
Psalms33:9 Amu ki mwa, ak ki yaak; ki ng'at, ak ki tonon." 
Psalms33:10 Walei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ruchinaigap pororyosyek koek puch; yaei kabwaatutigap piik koek che ma tilei kiy. 
Psalms33:11 Tonondos ruchinaigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny, ak kabwaatutigap muguleldanyi eng' ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms33:12 Iberuurot pororyet ne Kamuktaindennywa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; piik che ki kolewen koek porotennyi! 
Psalms33:13 Ing'ururi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet, keerei ineendet weeriik tugul che po piik." 
Psalms33:14 Keeroti eng' ole menyei piik tugul che mi ng'wony. 
Psalms33:15 Ineendet ne yaei mugulelwekwak tugul, ak koruchin poisyonikwak tugul." 
Psalms33:16 Ma mi laitoryat ne saruunegei chaang'indap lugeet; ma kisaru ne nyigan eng' kimnateet ne oo. 
Psalms33:17 Ki it puch paraisiit ne po lugeet eng' katerteeret; ama saru chii eng' kimnateennyi ne oo. 
Psalms33:18 Ogeero, keerei konyegap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek che iywei ineendet, icheeget che igeni rireenennyi," 
Psalms33:19 si kosar saboonwekwak eng' meet, ak koriip kosapcho eng' rubeet." 
Psalms33:20 Igeni saboonwekyok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet toretindennyo ak long'ennyo." 
Psalms33:21 Ee poiboitu mugulelwekyok eng' ineendet, amu ki kimang'u kainennyi ne tiliil." 
Psalms33:22 Ingotebenech rireeneng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ki kigenin." 
Psalms34:1 Alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul; tebee kutinnyu kalasunennyi kotugul. 
Psalms34:2 Ilasugei saboondanyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kasei nooto che talaen ak kogaskei. 
Psalms34:3 Ongilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek ak anee, ongitoroor tugul kainennyi." 
Psalms34:4 Ki acheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki wolwo, ak kisarwo eng' kaiyweisyosyekyuk tugul." 
Psalms34:5 Inyal ineendet si inyooru kakweng'et; si ma nyoor kalilanet togoochikwak agoi. 
Psalms34:6 Ki riir kimnyalilyandani, ak ki kasyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki sar ineendet eng' nyalilwogikyik tugul." 
Psalms34:7 Menyei malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komoswek tugul che po icheeget che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kosaru icheek." 
Psalms34:8 Ochamcham anyun si onai ole myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Paibai miising' chiito ne imang'u ineendet! 
Psalms34:9 Oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek piikyik che tiliileen, amu ma rarchin kiy icheek che iywei ineendet." 
Psalms34:10 Rarchin kirugigap ng'etuunyik ak koamei rubeet; ago ma rarchin kiy age tugul ne myee icheeget che cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms34:11 Obwa lagochu, ogasa, si aneetaak kaiyweisyet ne oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms34:12 Ng'oo chii ne machei kosap keny, ak kochamei peetuusyek che chaang' si kogeer ne myee?" 
Psalms34:13 Riip ng'elyeptang'ung' eng' yaityo, ak kuting'ung' si ma mwa ng'aalseet." 
Psalms34:14 Istoegei yaityo, ak iyai ne myee; cheeng' kaalyeet, ak isup." 
Psalms34:15 Tokyingei konyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che po imanda, ak kasei itiikyik riirekwak." 
Psalms34:16 Ago kirindoi togeetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che yaei yaityo, si koisto kabwaatennywa eng' ng'wony." 
Psalms34:17 Ye ki riiryo che po iman, ko ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki sar icheek eng' nyalilwogikwak tugul." 
Psalms34:18 Neegitee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheeget che ilyotiin mugulelwekwak, ak kosaru icheek che ki konyeratitu mugulelwekwak." 
Psalms34:19 Chaang' nyalilwogigap ne po imanda; ago saru `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' chooto tugul. 
Psalms34:20 Riibei kawekyik tugul, ma ilei agot agenge." 
Psalms34:21 Parei yaitwogik sogoranik; ak kirwookyin che wechei ne po imanda. 
Psalms34:22 Ityachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor saboonwegap kiboitiinikyik; ak ma kirwookyin agot agenge ne imang'u ineendet. 
Psalms35:1 Obargei, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak icheeget che kibaregei; yai lugeet ak icheeget che yaiywo lugeet." 
Psalms35:2 Nam long'eet ak torgochet, ak itonon itoreta!" 
Psalms35:3 Ng'usu ng'otit, ak iger ooreetap icheeget che onwo. Ileenji saboondanyu, “Aa yetuneng'ung'!”" 
Psalms35:4 Ingolilanso ak koteweerogis che cheeng'ei saboondanyu! Ingoweektagei let ak kotoptobenso icheeget che cheeng'ei koyaiywo ne ya. 
Psalms35:5 Ingogergeit ak meteteek che ibei usoonet, ak koon malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms35:6 Ingoimen ooreenywa ak kochabait, ak koon `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek!" 
Psalms35:7 Amu ki uny mestennywa puch agobo anee eng' keriinget, ki palji puch saboondanyu keriinget." 
Psalms35:8 Ingoche ineendet `ng'emisyet! Ak ingonam ineendet mesteet ne ki unyei; ingororokyi olooto eng' ng'emisyonooto! 
Psalms35:9 Yeityo kobaibait saboondanyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak paibaitu eng' yetunennyi." 
Psalms35:10 Leen kawekyuk tugul, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ng'oo ne ogerge, ne saru ne nyalili eng' ineendet ne kiim kosiir, ne saru ne nyalili ak ne ma tinyei kiy eng' ineendet ne rebei tuguukyik?”" 
Psalms35:11 Ng'eetos paorinigap lembech; ak teebena tuguuk che mangen. 
Psalms35:12 Yaakwo yaityet eng' ne myee, kot kogoochi saboondanyu kobanan." 
Psalms35:13 Ago ye kingo myandos icheek ko ki alaachi kuniok; ki aming'in saboondanyu eng' karugutet. Ki asaa ang'uruuksei," 
Psalms35:14 ko uu yo ariirchini chorwa anan weeriit ne kitupche. Ki cham awendoti ak ki ang'uruuge ariir, ko uu ne iteei agobo kamet." 
Psalms35:15 Ago ki poiboitu ye ki ang'wali ak ki iyumgei. Ki iyumjagei kipreprebiinik, ak ki ma anai; ki pacha ama siistos." 
Psalms35:16 Ki ichota icheek miising', ki sus kelek agobo anee." 
Psalms35:17 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, igeere kot kotyanit? Saru saboondanyu eng' ng'emisyennywa, saru saboondanyu eng' ng'etuunyik." 
Psalms35:18 Aweegun kongoi eng' tuiyet ne oo; alasun eng' ole mi piik che chaang'. 
Psalms35:19 Amegoochi koboiboitunena puunikyuk puch, anan komismis koonyek che wecho puch." 
Psalms35:20 Amu ma ng'alaali che po kaalyeet, ago cheeng'ei ng'aleegap ng'aalseet agobo icheek che talaen che po emet." 
Psalms35:21 Ki iseng'eng'ja icheek miising'; ki le, “Haa, haa! Kagegeer!”" 
Psalms35:22 Kaigeer inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amesiis! Ee, Kiptaiyat, amelooitena!" 
Psalms35:23 Ng'eet, keer si irwooksewa, agobo ng'aleekyuk, inyee Kamuktaindennyu ak ko Kiptaiyandennyu." 
Psalms35:24 Irwooksewa, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, ko uu imandang'ung'; amegoochi icheek koboiboitunena." 
Psalms35:25 Amegoochi komwa eng' mugulelwekwak, kole, “Haa, kogisuldae ne kogimache!” Amechamji kole, “Kagelugui!”" 
Psalms35:26 Ingolilanso ak kotoptobenso che poiboi ye kanyoorwo kiy ne ya! Ingilaakyi kalilanet ak teweernateet che ilasunenogei. 
Psalms35:27 Ingotyen eng' poiboiyet ak kogaskei icheek che machei imandanyu. Ingomwa icheek kotugul kole, “Ingitoroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne poiboitune kaalyeetap kiboityondennyi!”" 
Psalms35:28 Yeityo kong'alaale anyun ng'elyeptanyu imandang'ung', ak kalasuneng'ung' peet komugul." 
Psalms36:1 Ng'alaaljin `yaityet pistoindet eng' muguleldanyi, kole ma mi kaiyweisyetap Kamuktaindet eng' konyekyik." 
Psalms36:2 Amu ilasugei ineendet, leen, ma kinyooru tengektanyi ak kewech." 
Psalms36:3 Ng'aleegap kutinnyi ko tengekto ak ng'aalseet; ma komage kiy kong'omit anan koyai ne myee. 
Psalms36:4 Ruchin tengekto eng' itogunnyi; indogei ooreet ne ma myee; ama wechei yaityet. 
Psalms36:5 Itei chamyeng'ung' ne tala kipsengwet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak itei parak imandang'ung'." 
Psalms36:6 Kergei imandang'ung' ak tuloonoogap Kamuktaindet; kergei kirwoogutiguk ak rireet ne oo; ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee ne iriibe chii ak tyony." 
Psalms36:7 Karaaran ne tya chamyeng'ung' ne tala, ee Kamuktaindet! Mwechin anyun weeriigap piik urwetap kebebaiguk." 
Psalms36:8 Piyong'dos eng' akwaiyetap koong'ung'; ak igoochini koee che po aineetap poiboindang'ung'. 
Psalms36:9 Amu mi oldang'ung' kondap peegap saboon; eng' lapkeiyeng'ung' kegeere lapkeiyet. 
Psalms36:10 Ingotepto chamyeng'ung' ne tala icheek che ingenin; ak ingotepto yetuneng'ung' che po iman eng' mugulelwek. 
Psalms36:11 Ameng' koit ole ami keelyegap menotik, amechamji koistaa eunegap kiptengeginik." 
Psalms36:12 Olooto ole ki kobutyi che yaei tengekto; kigetimda, ak ma komuuchi kong'eetyo." 
Psalms37:1 Ameng' konyitin che yaei yaityo, amat koamin ng'etkong' agobo che yaei tengekto." 
Psalms37:2 Amu ma tenitu ketil ko uu susweek, ak koresyo ko uu susweek che ng'orng'or." 
Psalms37:3 Imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak iyai ne myee; meng'iisye eng' emet, ak isup imanda." 
Psalms37:4 Paibaitune Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kogoonin soomutigap muguleldang'ung'." 
Psalms37:5 Igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kondochi pandang'ung'; imang'u ineendet si kosuldaun ne imache. 
Psalms37:6 Yaei imandang'ung' kotook ko uu lapkeiyet, ak yaei kirwoogutiguk kooluu ko uu peet kween." 
Psalms37:7 Imuuny eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak igen ineendet eng' muitaet; ameng' konyitin chii ne peruri eng' ooreennyi, chiito ne isuldoe ng'aalseet." 
Psalms37:8 Mete nereeknateet, ak iistoegei nereegek che ng'woneen. Ameiimegei, amu ibu nooto yaityet." 
Psalms37:9 Amu kiwong'u che yaei yaityo, ago namei emet che igeni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms37:10 Amu tomo kitigin, si ma komi kiptengekyot; tuun icheeng'e ole komi, ago ma komi." 
Psalms37:11 Ago namei emet che talaen; ak kogaaskei eng' kaalyeet ne oo. 
Psalms37:12 Chobei `kiptengekyot yaityet agobo ne po imanda, ak susei kelek agobo ineendet." 
Psalms37:13 Rorechin `Kiptaiyat ineendet, amu keerei kole nyoonei peetuunnyi." 
Psalms37:14 Kang'us kiptengeginik rotonikwak po chok, ak kariich kwangokwak; si kowiirchi ng'wony ne nyalili ak ne ma tinyei kiy, ak kobar icheek che tebyei eng' iman." 
Psalms37:15 Toorei rotonikwak po chok mugulelwekwak, ak koilyo kwangokwak." 
Psalms37:16 Kaigai che ng'ering' che tinyei ne po imanda kosiir chaang'indap che po kiptengeginik. 
Psalms37:17 Amu ildos eunegap kiptengeginik: ago tiyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che po imanda. 
Psalms37:18 Ingen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuusyegap che ititaatiin, ak po koigeny porotennywa." 
Psalms37:19 Ma nyooru kalilanet eng' peetuusyek che yaacheen, ak kobiyong'so eng' peetuusyegap rubeet." 
Psalms37:20 Ago lustos che ma po iman, ak kogergeit puunigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak susweek che korooron che po keeweet; iwong'ugei; ee iwong'ugei ko uu iyeto." 
Psalms37:21 Chiito ne ma po iman kobesenisyei, ama yaagu: ago poisyee ne po imanda aiyebindo, ak kogoitoi kotugul." 
Psalms37:22 Amu che ki koberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobunjin emet; ago che ki kochup kiwong'u." 
Psalms37:23 Chobei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole punooti chii, ak paibaitu eng' atebeennyi." 
Psalms37:24 Agot ngo terteryot, koma itei ng'wony, amu namoti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyi." 
Psalms37:25 Ki aa ming'in ak ka aoositu nguno, ago tomo ageer kemeto ne po imanda, ak ma keer kosoomoti `lagokyik amitwogik." 
Psalms37:26 Igoitoi kotugul eng' aiyebindo, ak kobesendoi, ak egu lagokyik kaberuret." 
Psalms37:27 Itabaanegei yaityo, ak iyai ne myee; ak imeng'iisye koigeny." 
Psalms37:28 Amu chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor imanda, ama pagaktoi chechiget che iyanotin. Riibootin che po imanda koigeny, ago kiwong'u kesweegap kiptengeginik." 
Psalms37:29 Namei emet che po imanda, ak komeny olooto koigeny." 
Psalms37:30 Ng'alaali eng' utaatyet ne po iman ak mwaei ng'elyeptanyi imanda. 
Psalms37:31 Miitei muguleldanyi ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindennyi; ma ichabaitoi eng' kakwautikyik. 
Psalms37:32 Sapchin kiptengekyot chii ne po imanda, ak cheeng'ei kobar ineendet." 
Psalms37:33 Ago ma metochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eutap kiptengekyot, anan ko kiikyi ye irwookyin." 
Psalms37:34 Igen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak isup ooreennyi, ak koeetin inam emet; ye kiwong'u kiptengeginik igeere." 
Psalms37:35 Ki ageer kiptengekyot ne tinyei pounateet ne oo, ak kotuneni ko uu keetit ne tuon ne piitei eng' emennyi." 
Psalms37:36 Ki abun yooto peetuusyek alak, ak keero, ki ma kota komi; ee, ki acheeng', ago ma anyooru." 
Psalms37:37 Riip chiito ne ititaat, ak igeer chiito ne po iman; amu kagesunetap chiichooto ko kaalyeet." 
Psalms37:38 Ago ki parei pistoik kibagenge; kagesunetap kiptengeginik ko ng'emisyet. 
Psalms37:39 Punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunetap che po imanda; ineendet irimennywa eng' peetuutap nyalilda. 
Psalms37:40 Toreti `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek ak kosaru; saru icheek eng' kiptengeginik, ak koeetei, amu kimwechi ineendet." 
Psalms38:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amegera kong' eng' nereegeguk; ameneeta eng' nereegeguk che koroomen." 
Psalms38:2 Amu ki komwogo kipchaboniguk, ak irurunyo eung'ung' miising'." 
Psalms38:3 Ma kosabei poortanyu amu nereegeguk; ama komi kamuung'et kawekyuk amu tengektonyu. 
Psalms38:4 Amu kagomaluucha tengekwogikyuk; kagotemena ko uu mileet ne nyigiis. 
Psalms38:5 Kagosamisitu mookyuk ak kogonunio, amu abusnatennyu." 
Psalms38:6 Kaarigage ak ang'uruuksei miising'; ariiroti peet komugul. 
Psalms38:7 Amu nyiitaat ng'wanindo suennyu; ama kosabei poortanyu. 
Psalms38:8 Kanyaratitu ak kagonyanya poortanyu; atigeni amu nyalildap muguleldanyu. 
Psalms38:9 Ee Kiptaiyat, mi taing'ung' magennyu tugul; ama ung'aat tigenennyu eng' inyee." 
Psalms38:10 Rukrugeni muguleldanyu, kogobetwa kimnateennyu; kogomanda agine lapkeiyet eng' konyekyuk." 
Psalms38:11 Tonondos eng' ole loo che chama ak choronokyuk si ma riikyi nyalildanyu; ak tonondos eng' ole loo tilyonutikyuk ak icheek. 
Psalms38:12 Chobei mestonok kole konama icheeget che cheeng'ei saboondanyu; mwaei yaitwogik icheeget che cheeng'ei koyaiywo ne ya, ak kobwaatoti ng'aalsosyek peet komugul." 
Psalms38:13 Ago aa uu chii ne miing'at, ne ma kastoi, aa uu ne namaat kuut, ne ma twegu." 
Psalms38:14 Ee, aa uu chiito ne ma kastoi, ne ma tinyei ng'olyoo ne saruunegei." 
Psalms38:15 Amu amang'un inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; inyee ne iwolu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms38:16 Asaae ale, si ma poiboitunena; ye kagochabaita keldanyu, kolasunenogei." 
Psalms38:17 Amu neegit aterteryot, ak mi aragenennyu tainnyu kotugul." 
Psalms38:18 Ang'aanye tengektonyu; aarageni amu chalwoktanyu. 
Psalms38:19 Saptos komyee puunikyuk, ak ko kiimeen; ak kagotesagis icheek che wecho puch." 
Psalms38:20 Kaek puunikyuk che yaaktoi yaityet eng' ne myee, amu asubi kiit ne myee." 
Psalms38:21 Mebagaakta, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ee Kamuktaindennyu, amelooitena." 
Psalms38:22 Chogu toreto, ee Kiptaiyat, yetunennyu." 
Psalms39:1 Ki amwa ale, ariibe ortinwekyuk, si ma mwa `ng'elyeptanyu tengek. Ageree kutinnyu `karnet, ye ta komi tainnyu kiptengeginik." 
Psalms39:2 Kinamak kutinnyu ak ki asiis, ki asiisigei ak ma walak kiy; ak kitesak aragenennyu," 
Psalms39:3 ak eng' oriitinnyu ko king'eetyi `maat muguleldanyu. Ye kita abwaatoti, kolal maat; yeityo amwa eng' ng'elyeptanyu ale:" 
Psalms39:4 “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, chamwo anai kagesunennyu, ak ole pooch peetuusyekyuk, ak kiit ne tuun egu; chamwo anai ole uu chaktaetap sabeennyu." 
Psalms39:5 Keero, ki iroge peetuusyekyuk tebeesindap euut; ama tilei kiy eng' inyee kenyiisyekyuk kotee asabe. Iman, agot nda myee ne tya chii age tugul, ko puch.”" 
Psalms39:6 Iman wendoti chii age tugul ko uu urwet ne siirtoi; iman iimegei pichooto puch; iyumi tuguuk, ama naei ne tuun punjin." 
Psalms39:7 Ara nguno anyun, ee Kiptaiyat, ta ageni nee? Inyee iman kamang'unennyu." 
Psalms39:8 Ityacha eng' pistaosyekyuk tugul. Ameng' aek ne iteweeri abusanik. 
Psalms39:9 Kinamak kutinnyu ak ki asiis; ma atwegu, amu inyee ne ki iyae." 
Psalms39:10 Iistoena pireeng'ung'; kaiwong'wa kweretap eung'ung'. 
Psalms39:11 Ye itigoni chii eng' kereetap kong' amu tengekto, iistoi karaaranindanyi ko uu ye amei kiptorotyot. Iman, puch chii tugul." 
Psalms39:12 Kas saaennyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; epchi iit riirekyuk; amat isiis igeere peekyuk po kong'. Amu aa kiprutoiyot kobooten, aa punootyot ko uu ye ki punootik kwanisyekyuk tugul." 
Psalms39:13 Undaa, si anyoor kimnateet kogeny, kotom asiirte eng' yu, ama ami kogeny." 
Psalms40:1 Ki aagen miising' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki epcha iit, kogas riirekyuk." 
Psalms40:2 Ki kanabwa kora amang'une keriinget ne kiywei, eng' ng'atatyat ne meneet. Ki nama atonon eng' rwandet, ak ki igimit ole abunoti." 
Psalms40:3 Kagonde kutinnyu tyendo ne leel, nooto kalasunet eng' Kamuktaindennyo. Keerei che chaang' ak koywei, ak komang' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms40:4 Paibai miising' chiito ne imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ma tiytiy menotik, ama weekyingei lembechek." 
Psalms40:5 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu, ki iyai poisyonik che chaang' che kikwong'ee, kabwaatutik che ibwaate agobo acheek; koma kimuuchi ketetun. Ngot ale amwaita ak ang'alaalee, ko chaang' miising' kot koma kimuuchi kiit." 
Psalms40:6 Mebaibaitune tiseiywot ak kagoochinet, memache kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinet ne po tengekto; ago ki iyat itiikyuk si agasin." 
Psalms40:7 Amwa anyun ale, “Keero, kaanyo; ki kisir agobo anee eng' bukuit ne ki kimaman." 
Psalms40:8 Abaibai ayai mageng'ung', ee Kamuktaindennyu, miitei ng'atuutyeng'ung' muguleldanyu.”" 
Psalms40:9 Ki aamde logoiywegap poiboiyet che po katyaknateet eng' tuiyet ne oo; keero, tomo ager kutinnyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ingen inyee." 
Psalms40:10 Ki ma uny imandang'ung' eng' muguleldanyu; ki abarte imandang'ung' ak yetuneng'ung'; ki ma uny chamyeng'ung' ne tala ak imaning'ung' eng' tuiyet ne oo. 
Psalms40:11 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amemelela rireenosyeguk che po chamyet. Ingoriibo chamyeng'ung' ne tala ak imaning'ung' peetuusyek tugul." 
Psalms40:12 Amu ki koyiema yaitwogik che ma kimuuchi kiit, kigonyoorwo tengekwogikyuk kot koma amuuchi ageer kiy; chaang' kosiir suumeegap metinnyu, ak kogonyeratit muguleldanyu." 
Psalms40:13 Cham, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ieta! Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, chogu toreto." 
Psalms40:14 Ingolilanso ak kotoptobenso icheek che cheeng'ei kong'em saboondanyu. Ingolit oliin ak kolilaanso che poiboi ye anyalili. 
Psalms40:15 Ingoek ponoon amu teweernatennywa che leenjino, “Haa, Haa!”" 
Psalms40:16 Ago ingogaskei ak koboiboitu tugul che cheeng'in. Ingomwa tugul che chamei yetuneng'ung' kotugul kole, “Ingotororit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!”" 
Psalms40:17 Anee, aa nyalili, ama tinyei kiy; ago ibwaata Kiptaiyat. Ii toretindennyu ak ko ii yetindennyu; amegagei, ee Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms41:1 Paibai miising' ineendet ne ibwaati che nyerootiin; saru `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' peetuutap nyalilda. 
Psalms41:2 Riibei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ak kogoochin kosap, ak kobaibait eng' emet; Ak amegoochi puunikyik koboi ineendet." 
Psalms41:3 Tiiei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ye myani eng' itogunnyi; isoobi eng' myanwekyik tugul. 
Psalms41:4 Ki amwa ale, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, rirenagei; isoop saboondanyu, amu ki ayaun tengekto.”" 
Psalms41:5 Mwaitaena puunikyuk yaityo koleen, “Meei auyo, ak petei kainennyi au?”" 
Psalms41:6 Ak ngo pwa kogeera, kong'alaali lembechek; iyumi mugulelwekwak yaityo agobo anee, ak ye kagomanda, komwaitaat." 
Psalms41:7 Chaamjingei ng'aleek agobo anee, tugul che wecho; ibwaati icheek koyaak che yaach agobo anee." 
Psalms41:8 Mwaei koleen, “Ki konam kiy ne ya ineendet, ak kagoru ama kong'eetei kogeny.”" 
Psalms41:9 Agot chorwennyu ne ki kichamdosi, ne ki amang'u, ne ki abae, ko kagong'eetyo kole koyaiywo ne ya." 
Psalms41:10 Ago rireena, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ing'eeta, si ayaakyi mugetuut." 
Psalms41:11 Kaanai eng' ni ale iboiboitunena, amu ma orenena punyondennyu." 
Psalms41:12 Ak itia eng' kagesunatennyu pogei, ak igoono atonon eng' taing'ung' koigeny." 
Psalms41:13 Ingitoroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kobooch keny agoi koigeny. Amen, ak Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Ko uu ye isyenyi teweretyot agobo kereruusyegap peek, kosyenyi ko uu nooto saboondanyu agobo inyee, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms42:2 Amei saboondanyu melelda agobo Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne sabei. Auiyo ye anyoone tainnyi si ageer togeetap Kamuktaindet?" 
Psalms42:3 Kaek peekyuk po kong' amitwogikyuk che po peet ak kemoi, ye teebena icheek peetuut komugul koleen, “Mi ano Kamuktaindeng'ung'?”" 
Psalms42:4 Abwaati tuguuchu, ak ang'aanye saboondanyu eng' oriitinnyu, ko uu ye ki kibe ak tuiyet, ak andochi koba kootap Kamuktaindet, eng' kutit ne po poiboiyet ak kalasunet, kobooto tuiyet ne kiriibei peetuutap igoorto." 
Psalms42:5 Amu nee si ing'uruuge, ee saboondanyu? Amu nee si iimge eng' anee? Imang'u Kamuktaindet; amu ta alasu ineendet amu yetunet ye mi ineendet kobooto." 
Psalms42:6 Ing'uruuksei saboondanyu eng' anee; eng' nooto anyun abwaatin, ee Kamuktaindennyu, eng' emetap Jordan ak eng' Hermon tugul, ak tulweetap Mizar." 
Psalms42:7 Kuurei `rireet rireet age eng' cheetap peeguk che isururtoi. Ki komaluucha peeguk tugul che mildogei ak che somotitogei. 
Psalms42:8 Ng'atei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pet chamyennyi ne tala, ak mi kobooto tyendanyi kemoi, nooto saaet eng' Kamuktaindetap saboondanyu." 
Psalms42:9 Aleenjini Kamuktaindet ne rwandennyu, “Amu nee si iutyeno? Amu nee si awo ariiroti amu kanyaliiletap puunyoot?”" 
Psalms42:10 Ko uu ye toorei rotweet kawekyuk; ko sasa puunikyuk, ak koteebena kotugul kole, “Mi ano Kamuktaindeng'ung'?”" 
Psalms42:11 Amu nee si ing'uruuge, ee saboondanyu? Amu nee si iimige eng' anee? Imang'u Kamuktaindet; amu ta alasu ineendet, ineendet toretindennyu ak Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms43:1 Ibesyeiwo ng'aleekyuk, ee Kamuktaindet, ak itononwo eng' pororyet ne ma po iman; sarwo eng' chiito ne ng'aalsei ak ne ma po iman." 
Psalms43:2 Ii Kamuktaindet nooto ne amwechini; amu nee anyun si ibagaakta? Amu nee si awo ariiroti amu kanyaliiletap puunyoot? 
Psalms43:3 Iyookte lapkeiyeng'ung' ak imaning'ung'; ingondoiywa chooto; ingomuta agoi tulweeng'ung' ne tiliil, ak meng'otosyeguk." 
Psalms43:4 Awendi anyun kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet, ole mi Kamuktaindet ne poiboiyennyu ne siirtoot. Alasun eng' ketubet, ee Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms43:5 Amu nee si ing'uruuge, ee saboondanyu? Amu nee si iimige eng' anee? Imang'u Kamuktaindet; amu ta alasu ineendet, ineendet toretindennyu ak Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms44:1 Kigegas eng' itiikyok, ee Kamuktaindet, ki komwaiwech kwanisyekyok, poisyosyek che ki iyai eng' peetuusyekwak che ki po keny:" 
Psalms44:2 Keele, eng' eung'ung' ko ki ioon pororyosyek, ak ki igoochi cheguuk komeny olooto; ki inyaliil inyee piik, ago icheeget cheguuk ko ki ityaach." 
Psalms44:3 Amu ma nam emet eng' rotonikwak po chok, ama sar icheek `eunekwak; ago eung'ung' ineegei ne po tai, ak lapkeiyetap togeng'ung', ko ki icham icheek." 
Psalms44:4 Ii Laitoryandennyu ak Kamuktaindennyu; iyookyi Jakobo saruunet. 
Psalms44:5 Kiterteeri puunikyok eng' inyee; ak eng' kaineng'ung' ketyeche che machei kong'eetyeech. 
Psalms44:6 Ma kwangennyu ne amang'u, ama rotwennyu po chok ne sarwo." 
Psalms44:7 Ago inyee ne ki isarwech eng' puunikyok, ak ki igoochi kolilaanso che wechech." 
Psalms44:8 Kilasunegei Kamuktaindet peetuut komugul, ak kiweekyini kongoi kaineng'ung' koigeny." 
Psalms44:9 Ago kaibagaaktech ak kaigoonech kililanse; ama iwe inyee kobooto lugosyekyok. 
Psalms44:10 Kegoonech kemwee puunikyok, ak kanyabanjigei che wechech tuguuk che luulei." 
Psalms44:11 Keyaech kegergeitu ak keechiirek che kienyei; ak ki iyestech kebe ye mi pororyosyek. 
Psalms44:12 Ialdoi piiguk puch, ama tesun kiy icheek." 
Psalms44:13 Kegoonech keegu che iteweeri piikyok che po kok, sasech ak kororechinech icheeget che mi komoswekyok." 
Psalms44:14 Kegoonech keegu kalewenet eng' kwenutap pororyosyek, ak kolelegoti piik metowek agobo acheek." 
Psalms44:15 Mi tainnyu teweernateet peetuut komugul, ak kagotuch togeennyu kalilanet," 
Psalms44:16 amu kutitap ineendet ne rosu ak kochubisyei, amu puunyoot ak ne yaaktoi mugetuut." 
Psalms44:17 Kabwanjech chuuto tugul; ago tomo keutyenen, anan keboisyee kayomiseng'ung' eng' lembechek." 
Psalms44:18 Tomo keweekyigei let eng' mugulelwekyok, anan kemaste kemete oreng'ung'," 
Psalms44:19 Nga uu nooto ko ki ibirech miising' eng' kwenutap suik, ak ki itugenech mesundeito ne oo." 
Psalms44:20 Ngo ki kageutye kainetap Kamuktaindennyo, anan ketokyi eunekyok kamuktain age;" 
Psalms44:21 ko tos ma cheeng'ei konai Kamuktaindet niito? Amu ingen inee ung'ootigap muguleldo. 
Psalms44:22 Kibarech peetuut komugul agobo inyee; ak ki iitech ko uu keechiirek che po eng'seet. 
Psalms44:23 Ng'eet, ee Kiptaiyat, amu nee si iru? Ng'eet, amebagaaktech agoi." 
Psalms44:24 Amu nee si iuny togeng'ung', ak iutye nyalildanyo ak sastaennyo?" 
Psalms44:25 Kagong'uruukso anyun saboonwekyok kotokyigei temburyek; kanamjigei `mootinwekyok ng'wony. 
Psalms44:26 Ng'eet, toretech! Ityachech amu chamyeng'ung' ne tala." 
Psalms45:1 Ing'irtogei tuguuk che myach eng' muguleldanyu; amwaitoi eng' kaitosyegap tyendo agobo laitoryat; kergei ng'elyeptanyu ak kalametap siriindet ne ng'oom. 
Psalms45:2 Isiire weeriigap piik eng' korooronindo; kiroong'jin kuting'ung' myeeindo; eng' nooto anyun ki koberuurin Kamuktaindet koigeny. 
Psalms45:3 Rat rotweng'ung' po chok, inyee ne kiim, kobooto konding'ung' ak etunateng'ung'." 
Psalms45:4 Eng' etunateng'ung' iwendote eng' katerteerisyet, agobo imanit ak iriip imanda. Ak ineetin eung'ung' ne po tai poisyosyek che imuisei." 
Psalms45:5 Ng'atiben kipchaboniguk; eng' mugulelwegap puunigap laitoryat; ak kobutyin piik keelyeguk. 
Psalms45:6 Ee Kamuktaindet, tebyei koigeny ak koigeny ng'echereeng'ung' ne po laitornatet. Kirokto ne po pounateng'ung' ko kirokto ne po imanda." 
Psalms45:7 Ichame imanda ak iweche tengekto. Eng' nooto anyun, ki koiilin Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' mwaita ne po poiboiyet kosiir siritoiguk." 
Psalms45:8 Ng'uu ngoroiguk tugul nyamdutyet ne po tuguuk che uu igomoik, ak ahalot ak kasia; ki ibaibain eng' kibugandinigap inoik che mi kooriigap laitorinik che ki kilelesanjine kelegap peeleek." 
Psalms45:9 Mi tiibiigap laitorinik kobooto kwonyiik che konyitotiin; tononi osotyotap laitoryat eng' eung'ung' ne po tai kolaachi tuguugap thahabu che punu Opir. 
Psalms45:10 Kas, ee chebi, ak iruchi, ak iep iit; utye piiguk ak piigap kootap kwandang'ung'," 
Psalms45:11 ak kocham anyun laitoryat karaaranindang'ung'. Amu ineendet ko kiptaiyandeng'ung'; igutung'ji anyun ineendet. 
Psalms45:12 Tuun cheeng'ei chamet piigap Tyro kotinyei konunoik; ak kosaisain mogoreek. 
Psalms45:13 Tinyei cheptap laitoryat teegisto miising' eng' ko; ki kinapchi ngoroikyik thahabu. 
Psalms45:14 Kimutyin laitoryat kolaachi ngoroik che ki kinde lelesta, kimutu pergeinik che choronokyik che isubu ineendet, kimutu kobwa oldang'ung'." 
Psalms45:15 Kimutu eng' kagasetapkei ak poiboiyet, agoi koba kootap laitoryat oriit." 
Psalms45:16 Ee laitoryat, isiche lagok che chaang' pounisyei icheek ne kata kwanisyeguk, iyae weeriiguk koek pounik eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms45:17 Ayae kaineng'ung' koek ne kibwaati eng' ibinwek tugul; ak kolasun pororyosyek koigeny ak koigeny eng' nooto. 
Psalms46:1 Kamuktaindet ole kemwechini ak kimnateennyo, toretindet ne neegit ye mi nyalilda." 
Psalms46:2 Ma kiyweisyei anyun amu nooto, agot nda walak ng'wony, agot nda pendi tuloonook kwenutap nyanjosyek;" 
Psalms46:3 agot nda tulei peekwak ak kowasegei, agot nda koroomit potanetap tuloonook." 
Psalms46:4 Mi aineet, ne kereruusyekyik ko iboiboi nganaseetap Kamuktaindet, meng'ootet ne tiliil ne po Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'." 
Psalms46:5 Mi Kamuktaindet kwenutap nganaseet, ama ki istoi; toreti Kamuktaindet yooto ye kaeech." 
Psalms46:6 Kibolyo pororyosyek, ak kiwaskei laitornatosyek; kitwek ineendet ak kichoot ng'wony." 
Psalms46:7 Mi kobootech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek; Kamuktaindetap Jakobo ole kemwechini. 
Psalms46:8 Obwa si ogeer poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ogeer tuguuk che kikwong'ee che ki yai ineendet eng' ng'wony." 
Psalms46:9 Igeesu `inee lugoosyek eng' ng'wony; iriei kwanget, ak iriei ng'otit; ak peelei long'onik eng' maat." 
Psalms46:10 “Osisye ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet! Kitoroora eng' kwenutap pororyosyek, kitoroora eng' ng'wony.”" 
Psalms46:11 Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kobootech; Kamuktaindetap Jakobo ko ole kimwechini. 
Psalms47:1 Oraprap eunekwok, okweek piik tugul; ooren eng' Kamuktaindet eng' cheetap katerteeret." 
Psalms47:2 Amu po kwong'et Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Inee Ne Toroor Miising'; Ineendet ko Laitoryat ne oo ne pou ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms47:3 Iterteerwech `ineendet piik si kebou, Ak koterteerwech pororyosyek eng' keelyekyok." 
Psalms47:4 Lewenwech ineendet porotennyo, inee ko telunatetap Jakobo ne ki chamei." 
Psalms47:5 Ki togosta Kamuktaindet eng' tuleet, ki togosta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak cheetap iryageet." 
Psalms47:6 Otyenji Kamuktaindet eng' kalasunoik, otyen kalasunoik; otyenji Laitoryandennyo eng' kalasunoik, otyen kalasunoik." 
Psalms47:7 Otyenjin Kamuktaindet kalasunoik eng' tyendo ne ki kisir amu ineendet ko laitoryatap ng'wony komugul. 
Psalms47:8 Pou `Kamuktaindet pororyosyek; tebee Kamuktaindet ng'echerennyi ne tiliil ne po laitornatet. 
Psalms47:9 Kagoyumgei kirwoogigap piik koek piigap Kamuktaindet ne po Abraham, amu long'osyegap ng'wony ko po Kamuktaindet; itoroorot inee miising'." 
Psalms48:1 Oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kanyool kilas miising' eng' nganaseennyi ak eng' tulweennyi ne tiliil." 
Psalms48:2 Mi tulweetap Zion ole karaaran ak ole tagunoot niito poiboindap ng'wony komugul, tokyingei murot kaataam, nganaseetap Laitoryat ne oo." 
Psalms48:3 Eng' kooriik che eecheen che po nganasanooto ko kigoboorgei Kamuktaindet koek ole kimwechin. 
Psalms48:4 Ogeero, ki koyumgei laitorinik, ki pa tugul kibagenge." 
Psalms48:5 Kingo keer nganasanooto, ko kitang'aang'ji; ki toptobenso, ak ki pa kochaakta." 
Psalms48:6 Ki potanso eng' olooto; ki nyoor ng'wanindo ko uu kwondo ne machei kosigiis. 
Psalms48:7 Ibute melisyek che po Tarsis eng' usoonet ne punu kong'asiis. 
Psalms48:8 Ko uu ye ki kigas ko kage keer eng' nganaseetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, eng' nganaseetap Kamuktaindennyo; ne igimiti Kamuktaindet koigeny." 
Psalms48:9 Ki kibwaat agobo chamyeng'ung' ne tala, ee Kamuktaindet, eng' hekalung'ung' oriit." 
Psalms48:10 Ko uu ole teptoi kaineng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet, ko uu nooto kalasuneng'ung' agoi ole poochin ng'wony. Nyiitaat imanda eung'ung' ne po tai." 
Psalms48:11 Ingogaskei tulweetap Zion, ingoboiboitu piigap Judah, amu kirwoogutiguk." 
Psalms48:12 Obendatee Zion, omuut, oiit teeksosyek che kooen." 
Psalms48:13 Obwaat komyee irimoikyik, obwaat kooriikyik che eecheen; si kobiit omwachi ibinda ne piitu let, oleenji:" 
Psalms48:14 “Kamuktaindet niito ko Kamuktaindennyo koigeny ak koigeny. Egu ineendet kandoindennyo koigeny.” 
Psalms49:1 Ogas ni, okweek piik tugul; oep iit, okweek tugul che omenye ng'wony;" 
Psalms49:2 che ma taagunotiin ak che taagunotiin, tuwai, mogoryot ak kibananiat." 
Psalms49:3 Ng'alaale kutinnyu utaatyet; po kaguiyet kabwaatutigap muguleldanyu. 
Psalms49:4 Aepchini iit kalewenet; ak ang'aany mwaennyu ne po ung'oot eng' tyendap ketubet. 
Psalms49:5 Amu nee si aiyweis eng' peetuusyegap kaimutik, ye yiema tengekto ne po puunikyuk?" 
Psalms49:6 Icheeget che imang'u tuguukwak, ak kolasunegei chaang'indap mogornatosyekwak." 
Psalms49:7 Ma mi eng' icheek ne imuuchi kotyach ng'eetap kamet eng' oor age tugul, ago temenee kogoochi Kamuktaindet kiit ne kityage ineendet;" 
Psalms49:8 amu pichiy kiit ne kityage saboonwekwak, ak kanyool kebagaakta agoi" 
Psalms49:9 si kobiit kosap ineendet agoi, si ma keer ng'emisyet." 
Psalms49:10 Keerei ineendet kole pegu che utaatiin, ak pegu tuwai che perber ak koseng'eng'inik, ak kobagakyi piik alak tuguukwak." 
Psalms49:11 Kereeriisyekwak ko kooriikwak koigeny, meng'otosyekwak eng' ibinwek tugul; nganda kuurtoe emotinwekwak kainaikwak." 
Psalms49:12 Ma tebyei chii agoi eng' teegistanyi; uu tyong'ik che pegu. 
Psalms49:13 Ityin niito che mi perberyo oriinnywa; niito kagesunetap icheeget che chamei tuguuk che piitune ng'alaalutikwak. 
Psalms49:14 Ki kichopchi icheek ye mi meet ko uu keechiirek; egu `meet mestowonnywa. Tetoi icheek kochute kererit; nunei itoondanywa eng' olooto, ak punjin icheeget ye mi meet." 
Psalms49:15 Ago ityaachi `Kamuktaindet saboondanyu komang'une kimnateetap meet, amu taacha inee." 
Psalms49:16 Meiywei ye kagigoochi chii mogornateet, ye katesak konditap koonnyi." 
Psalms49:17 Amu ma ibei kiy ye mee; ma choortagei teegistanyi kosubi ineendet. 
Psalms49:18 Agot nga ki iberuuri saboondanyi ye kita kosabei, ak kolasun piik, ye iyachinigei ne myee," 
Psalms49:19 wendi ibindap kwanisyekyik; ama kogeerei icheek lapkeiyet koigeny. 
Psalms49:20 Chiito ne tinyei teegisto, ama tinyei ng'omnateet ko kergei ak tyong'ik che pegu." 
Psalms50:1 Katwek Ne po Kamuktaet, inee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, ak kaguur ng'wony kobooch ko kachor asiis agoi kororokto." 
Psalms50:2 Eng' Zion, komi korooronindo ne ititaat, kamong' Kamuktaindet kooluu." 
Psalms50:3 Nyoonei Kamuktaindennyo, ama siisei: mi tainnyi maat ne peelei kowong'u, ak komuut ineendet usoonet ne oo." 
Psalms50:4 Kuurei `inee parak kipsengwet ak ng'wony, si kobiit korwookyi piikyik:" 
Psalms50:5 “Oyumja piikyuk che tiliileen; chooto che ki kiyomiske ak icheek eng' tiseiywek!” 
Psalms50:6 Mwaitoi kipsengwet imandanyi; amu Kamuktaindet ineendet ko kirwoogindet. 
Psalms50:7 Oep iit, ee piikyuk, si ang'alaal; ee Israel, si abaoryanun. Aa Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Psalms50:8 Ma kerin kong' agobo tiseiyweguk; ak mi tainnyu kagoochinoiguk che kebeelei kotugul. 
Psalms50:9 Ma kwerye tany eng' kaptugung'ung', anan kwesta eng' akwotisyeguk." 
Psalms50:10 Amu nenyu tyony age tugul ne po timiin, ak tuuga che miitei tuloonook eliphuut." 
Psalms50:11 Angen toriitik tugul che miitei tuloonook, ak chechuuk tyong'igap warenget." 
Psalms50:12 Nda ama rubeet, koma mwaun, amu nenyu ng'wony, ak tuguukyik che nyiitaat olooto." 
Psalms50:13 Tos aame panyeegap kirugiguk, anan aee korotiigap ng'oroorek?" 
Psalms50:14 Igoochi Kamuktaindet korosyotap kongoi; ak yaakyi Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' arorutiguk. 
Psalms50:15 Kuura eng' peetuutap nyalilda; asi asaruun, ak iloswa." 
Psalms50:16 Ago leenjin `Kamuktaindet kiptengekyot, atinye imanda nee, si imwaimwae ng'atuutikyuk, ak ing'alaalatee arorutyennyu?" 
Psalms50:17 Amu inyee ne iweche atep ne myee, ak ituktochini patai ng'aleekyuk." 
Psalms50:18 Ye ki igeer choorindet, ochamyechi tuwai, ak itinye yamdaet ak che ibegei." 
Psalms50:19 Ichamjini kuting'ung' komwa yaityet, ak chobei ng'elyeptang'ung' ng'aalseet." 
Psalms50:20 Itebye ak ichaame ng'eetap kamenng'ung'; itaami weeriitap komet. 
Psalms50:21 Ki iyai tuguuchuuto ak ki asiis; ki ileen ki kerge ak inyee. Ago agerin kong' nguno, ak atete tugul eng' taing'ung'." 
Psalms50:22 “Ara anyun obwaat chuuto, okweek che outye Kamuktaindet, si ma tonak, ama piitu chii ne sarwok." 
Psalms50:23 Age tugul ne igoitoi korosyotap kongoi ko nooto ne iloswa; ak ineendet ne chobei atebeennyi komyee aboorchini yetunetap Kamuktaindet.” 
Psalms51:1 Rirenage, ee Kamuktaindet, ko uu chamyeng'ung' ne tala; tindiny pistoennyu ko uu chaang'indap rireenosyeguk." 
Psalms51:2 Iundoena inne tengektonyu, ak itiliilo eng' ng'oogistonyu." 
Psalms51:3 Amu ang'aanye pistautikyuk; ak mi tainnyu ng'oogistonyu kotugul. 
Psalms51:4 Ki ayaun tengekto inyeendet inyegei, ak ki ayai ne ya eng' taing'ung'. Ki ityin imanda ye ing'alaali, ak kotook lititindang'ung' ye irwoochi." 
Psalms51:5 Keero, ki kisikta tengekto; ak kimanakta kamennyu chalwok." 
Psalms51:6 Keero, imache imanit eng' kebeberwek che po oriit; ko uu nooto ineeta utaatyet eng' ole ung'aat." 
Psalms51:7 Iunena husop, si atiliilit; iuna, si atiliilit kosiir teluji." 
Psalms51:8 Koono agas kagasetapkei ak poiboiyet; si koboiboitu kawek che ki iri. 
Psalms51:9 Ung'e togeng'ung' ng'oogiswekyuk, ak itindiny tengekwogikyuk tugul." 
Psalms51:10 Yaiywo muguleldo ne tiliil, ee Kamuktaindet; ak iyai saboondanyu koleelit ak iywokyi eng' oriit." 
Psalms51:11 Ametortaa eng' ole imi; ameistoena Kabuuseng'ung' ne Tiliil. 
Psalms51:12 Weekwa poiboiyetap yetuneng'ung'; ak inama atonon eng' muguleldo ne chamei. 
Psalms51:13 Yeityo aneet anyun pistoik ortinweguk; ak koweekyingei kiptengeginik. 
Psalms51:14 Sarwo eng' ng'oogistap korotiik, ee Kamuktaindet, inyee Kamuktaindetap yetunennyu, ak kotyen kogasak kutinnyu agobo imandang'ung'." 
Psalms51:15 Yaat kutinnyu, ee Kiptaiyat; ak komwaita kutinnyu kalasuneng'ung'." 
Psalms51:16 Amu mebaibaitune tiseiywot; ta kagoonin. Mebaibaitune agot kagoochinoik che kibeelei. 
Psalms51:17 Korosegap Kamuktaindet ko Kabuuset ne kigoil; ee Kamuktaindet, mesase muguleldo ne kigoil ak kotinyei siguunet." 
Psalms51:18 Yachi ne myee Zion ko uu ye ichame; teech kogeny irimoigap Jerusalem. 
Psalms51:19 Ibaibaitune anyun tiseiywek che po iman, eng' kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei komugul; igoitoi anyun `icheek kiruugik eng' kaptisisyeng'ung'." 
Psalms52:1 Amu nee si ilasuge eng' yaityet, ee inyee chii ne koroom, agobo yaityet ne kiyachin che iywei Kamuktaindet? Peetuut komugul ko" 
Psalms52:2 chobei ng'elyeptang'ung' tengekto. Kergei ng'elyeptang'ung' ak rotweet ne ng'atip, poisyei eng' ng'aalseet." 
Psalms52:3 Ichame yaityet kosiir ne myee; ak ichame lembech kosiir ye imwae imanda. 
Psalms52:4 Ichame ng'aleek tugul che ng'emei piich, ee inyee, ng'elyepta ne ng'aalsei." 
Psalms52:5 Ng'emin Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto koigeny, istoin, ak kong'usun eng' meng'ooteng'ung', ak kotutin eng' emetap che saptos." 
Psalms52:6 Keerei che po imanda, ak koywei, ak kororechi ineendet kole," 
Psalms52:7 “Ogeero, niito chiito ne ki ma cham koek kimnateennyi Kamuktaindet; ago ki imang' chaang'indap mogornatosyekyik, ak ki igimitkei eng' tengektanyi.”" 
Psalms52:8 Ago anee, agergeitu ak mseituni ne tuon ne piitei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet. Amang'u rireenetap Kamuktaindet koigeny ak koigeny." 
Psalms52:9 Aweegun kongoi agoi, amu che ki iyai inyee. Eng' taitap piiguk che po iman amwaitoi kaineng'ung', amu myee niito." 
Psalms53:1 Mwaei che perber eng' mugulelwekwak kole, “Ma mi Kamuktaindet.” Ng'emotin icheek, yaei poisyonik che kiwechei; ma mi ne yaei ne myee." 
Psalms53:2 Ing'ururi Kamuktaindet eng' kipsengwet weeriigap piik, kole kogeer ngo mi ne utaat, ne cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms53:3 Ki koweektagei let age tugul eng' icheek; kigosamisitu tugul; ma mi ne yaei ne myee, achicha, ma mi agot agenge." 
Psalms53:4 Tos ma tinyei naet yaigap yaityo, che amei piikyuk ko uu ye amei amitwogik, ama kuurei Kamuktaindet?" 
Psalms53:5 Tebee icheek arageneet ne oo eng' olooto, eng' arageneet ne tomo kobiitu. Isersere `Kamuktaindet kawegap ineendet ne setyinin; ki koochin icheek kolilaanso, amu ki koeesyo `Kamuktaindet icheek." 
Psalms53:6 Kita myee nda kiga pun yetunetap Israel `Zion! Ye tuun weech Kamuktaindet ole uu piikyik, ko poiboitu anyun Jakobo; ak kogaskei Israel." 
Psalms54:1 Sarwo, ee Kamuktaindet, eng' kaineng'ung', ak ibesyeiwo eng' kimnateng'ung'." 
Psalms54:2 Kas saaennyu, ee Kamuktaindet; epchi iit ng'aleegap kutinnyu." 
Psalms54:3 Amu kang'eetya toek che machei kogirinda, amu kogocheeng' icheek che koroomen saboondanyu; ma cham icheek konde Kamuktaindet tainnywa." 
Psalms54:4 Ogeero, toretindennyu Kamuktaindet; Kiptaiyat ko riibiindetap saboondanyu." 
Psalms54:5 Yaakyin `inee yaityet puunikyuk; eng' imaning'ung', ing'em icheek." 
Psalms54:6 Agoonin korosyot ne po chamyet; aweechi kongoi, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu myee niito." 
Psalms54:7 Amu ki kosarwo eng' nyalilda tugul; ak kogeer konyekyuk kiit ne ki amache eng' puunikyuk. 
Psalms55:1 Epchi iit saaennyu, ee Kamuktaindet; ameung'egei soomsennyu." 
Psalms55:2 Kaswa, ak iwolwoo; aiimigei amamuunyi eng' kabwaatutikyuk." 
Psalms55:3 Atigeni agobo polateetap puunyoot, amu suryetap kiptengekyot. Inyalilo icheek che yae tengekto, ak wecho eng' nereegek." 
Psalms55:4 Tinyei ng'wanindo ne oo muguleldanyu; ak kagobutya kamuisosyegap meet. 
Psalms55:5 Kago pwanjo kaiyweisyet ak potanet, ak kagotucha arageneet." 
Psalms55:6 Ak ki ale, “Pwo! Nda kaa tinye kebebaik ko uu cheptuget! Ta kaa tiriren ak awe amuuny;" 
Psalms55:7 iman, ta ki awe ole loo, ak ameny surkwen." 
Psalms55:8 Ta ki asip amwechi ole aung'egei eng' usoonet ne koroom ak kipchurchuryet.” 
Psalms55:9 Ng'em, ee Kiptaiyat, ak itoiye ng'elyebwekwak; amu koageer koroomnateet ak pooryeet eng' nganaseet." 
Psalms55:10 Yiemei irimosyek peet ak kemoi; mi kwenutap nganaseet tengekto ak wasetapkei. 
Psalms55:11 Mi ng'emisyet kwenunnyi; suryet ak ng'aalseet koma istoegei ortinwekyik. 
Psalms55:12 Amu ki ma ko puunyoot ne kirosya, nda ki puunyoot ta ki amuitoi; nda ineendet ne kiwecha ne ki ilasunenogei, ta ki aung'egei ineendet." 
Psalms55:13 Ago ki inyee ne ki aechine, chorwennyu, ak ne kingenge." 
Psalms55:14 Ki king'alaaljige eng' ng'aleek che anyiny, ak ki kibe kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto tuiyet." 
Psalms55:15 Ingoche meet icheek, ak ingororokyi keriinget kosaptos; amu miitei yaitwogik kooriikwak ak kwenunnywa." 
Psalms55:16 Ago aguure anee Kamuktaindet; ak kosarwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms55:17 Atigeni ak ariire, koskoleny, ak karon, ak peet kween, si kogas ineendet kutinnyu." 
Psalms55:18 Ityachi saboondanyu eng' kaalyeet eng' lugeet ne ki machei kogirindaa, amu ki chaang' icheek che kibeligei." 
Psalms55:19 Kamuktaindet, ineendet ne ki laitorani kobooch keny, ko kasei, ak kowolji icheek, piik che ma walaksei, ama konyiti Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms55:20 Ki koiito eunekyik kole konam chorwennyi, ki kosamis kayomisennyi." 
Psalms55:21 Ng'aleekyik ko korooron kosiir mwaitap cheego, ago muguleldanyi ko tetaat lugeet. Tangusen ng'aleekyik kosiir mwaita, ago ki rotoogap chok che kaging'us." 
Psalms55:22 Ituuchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyigiisindang'ung', si kotiin; ma koi cham ineendet keisto ne po imanda." 
Psalms55:23 Ago inyee, ee Kamuktaindet, irorogu icheeget koba keriingetap ng'emisyet, rumiik ak ng'aalik ma tarei icheek kebebertap peetuusyekwak. Ago anee amang'un inyee." 
Psalms56:1 Rireena, ee Kamuktaindet, amu ibookya piik; inyalila, kousa peet komugul." 
Psalms56:2 Ibookya puunikyuk eng' peetuut komugul; chaang' che poryeno eng' menoteet. 
Psalms56:3 Ee Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising', ye aiyweisyei, amang'un." 
Psalms56:4 Eng' Kamuktaindet, ne alasu ng'olyoondennyi; Kamuktaindet ne amang'u, ma yweisyei. Imuuchi ko itaa nee chii?" 
Psalms56:5 Walei ng'aleekyuk koyaagitu peet komugul; tokyino yaityet eng' kabwaatutikwak. 
Psalms56:6 Iyumigei ak kounyegei, riiboti kakwautikyuk, ko uu ye kigosetyi saboondanyu." 
Psalms56:7 Tos chililso eng' tengekto? Iluul piik eng' nereegeguk, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms56:8 Iiti ombenennyu; inde peekyuk po kong' soteng'ung'. Tos ma mi chooto bukuing'ung'? 
Psalms56:9 Weekyigei let puunikyuk eng' peetuut ne aguursei. Angen niito ale, mi Kamuktaindet komostanyu." 
Psalms56:10 Amang'u Kamuktaindet ak alasu ng'olyoondennyi. Amang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak alasu ng'olyoondennyi. 
Psalms56:11 Kamuktaindet ne amang'u, ma yweisyei. Tos imuuchi koita nee chii?" 
Psalms56:12 Miitei paragunnyu kayosyautiguk, ee Kamuktaindet; agoonin inyee konunoigap kongoi." 
Psalms56:13 Amu ki isaru saboondanyu eng' meet, ak keelyekyuk si ma put, si awendotee taitap Kamuktaindet eng' lapkeiyetap saboondo." 
Psalms57:1 Rireena, ee Kamuktaindet, rireena; amu mwechinin saboondanyu. Amwechini urwetap kebebaiguk, agoi kosiirto nyalilwogichu." 
Psalms57:2 Ariirchini Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising'; Ineendet Kamuktaindet ne isuldaiwo tuguuk tugul. 
Psalms57:3 Iyogu toretet eng' kipsengwet ak kosarwo, ye reenya ne machei kolugua. Iyogu Kamuktaindet rireenennyi ak imaninnyi." 
Psalms57:4 Miitei saboondanyu kwenutap ng'etuunyik; arue kwenutap icheek che miitei maat, agot weeriigap piik, che kelekwak ko ng'otwek ak kipchabonik, ak ng'elyebwekwak ko rotonik che ng'atiben." 
Psalms57:5 Tororitu, ee Kamuktaindet, isiir kipsengwet. Ingoeet teegistang'ung' eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms57:6 Kagoriich mesteet si konam keelyekyuk; kagong'uruuk saboondanyu. Kagobal icheek keriinget eng' tainnyu, kagororokyi icheeget olooto." 
Psalms57:7 Igiilotkei muguleldanyu, ee Kamuktaindet, igiilotkei muguleldanyu. Atyeni, ee atyeni kalasunoik." 
Psalms57:8 Ng'eet, ee saboondanyu! Ng'eet, ee kibugandet ak ketubet! Ang'eete ko kairir emet!" 
Psalms57:9 Aweegun kongoi, ee Kiptaiyat, eng' kwenutap piik; atyenun kalasunoik eng' kwenutap pororyosyek." 
Psalms57:10 Amu oo rireeneng'ung' agoi kipsengwet, ak itei imaning'ung' poolik parak." 
Psalms57:11 Tororitu, ee Kamuktaindet, isiir kipsengwet. Ingoeet teegistang'ung' eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms58:1 Tos omwae imanda okweek pounik? Tos orwookyini eng' imanda weeriigap piik? 
Psalms58:2 Oyae yaitwogik eng' mugulelwekwok; ak oyachini ng'wony koroomnateet eng' eunekwok. 
Psalms58:3 Petyotiin kiptengeginik kobooch komi moo, mastoi ak komwaei lembechek kobooch ko kagisich." 
Psalms58:4 Ng'wonennywa ko uu ng'wonetap ndaret; kergei icheek ak ereneet ne ma kastoi, ne timei itiikyik," 
Psalms58:5 ne ma epchin iit kutitap piik che kuurei erenook eng' kagaigaet, matiny kaguur eng' ng'omnateet." 
Psalms58:6 Ee Kamuktaindet, iri kelekwak, icheru, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kelek che eecheen che po ng'etuunyik che neran!" 
Psalms58:7 Ingochootyo koigei peek che rootei; ingoigei icheek susweek che kityekyin ng'wony ak kotonogis. 
Psalms58:8 Ingoigei kimng'elyegut ne chootei kowong'ugei, ingoigei kwondo ne karorok moet, ne ma keer asiis." 
Psalms58:9 Kotom kogas tereenikwok maatap katok, Istoi ineendet icheek eng' kipchurchuryet, che tuonen ak che laldos kogergeit." 
Psalms58:10 Paibai ne po imanda ye keerei yaaktaetap mugetuut; iune keelyekyik korotiigap kiptengeginik. 
Psalms58:11 Si komwa piik kole, “Miitei iman melekto ne po chiito ne po imanda; mi iman Kamuktaindet ne irwoochi eng' ng'wony.”" 
Psalms59:1 Ee Kamuktaindennyu, sarwo eng' puunikyuk; ieeta asiir icheek che ng'eetyina." 
Psalms59:2 Sarwo eng' yaigap tengekto, ak isarwo eng' piik che chamei kotumda korotiik." 
Psalms59:3 Amu, keero, ratei icheek ooreet agobo saboondanyu; kagoyumjagei che kiimeen. Ma amu pistoennyu, anan tengektonyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Psalms59:4 rwaei icheek kochobegei ma amu lelutyennyu. Ng'eet inyee, toreto, ak igeer!" 
Psalms59:5 Inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ng'eet ibookyi pororyosyek; amat iriiree pistoik alak tugul che yaach." 
Psalms59:6 Weeksei icheek koskoleny, ikwari ko uu seset, ak pendi koyiemei nganaseet." 
Psalms59:7 Keero, ing'irugei ng'aleek eng' kutusweekwak; miitei rotonik kutusweekwak. Amu mwaei kole, “Ng'oo ne kasei?”" 
Psalms59:8 Ago irorechini inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ireenye pororyosyek. 
Psalms59:9 Ee kimnateennyu, ageniin; amu inyee Kamuktaindet, ko irimennyu ne kooi." 
Psalms59:10 Indoena Kamuktaindennyu ne po rireenet, tuun chamwo Kamuktaindet ageer magennyu eng' puunikyuk." 
Psalms59:11 Amebar icheek, si ma utye piikyuk; iyeste pichooto eng' kimnateng'ung', ak ichooru, ee Kiptaiyat long'ennyo." 
Psalms59:12 Ingenam icheek eng' menatennywa, amu tengektap kutusweekwak, ak ng'aleegap ng'elyebwekwak, amu chubisyet ak lembechek che mwaei." 
Psalms59:13 Iwong'u icheek eng' nereegek, iwong'u anyun, kot koma komi! Si konai piik kole pounisyei Kamuktaindet eng' Jakobo, agoi ole poochin ng'wony." 
Psalms59:14 Ingoweechkei icheek koskoleny, ingokwaryo ko uu seset, ak ingoba koyiem nganaseet." 
Psalms59:15 Ombenoti kocheeng'oti amitwogik, ak kong'unyng'ung'so kemout komugul ngo ma piyong'so." 
Psalms59:16 Ago atyeni agobo kimnateng'ung'; atyeni agobo rireeneng'ung' karon. Amu inyee ko ki ii irimennyu ne kooi, ak ole amwechini eng' peetuutap pichiindo." 
Psalms59:17 Ee kimnateennyu, atyenun inyee kalasunoik; amu inyee, Kamuktaindet, ko irimennyu ne kooi, Kamuktaindet ne irireenage." 
Psalms60:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, ki iwiirtech ak ki iyestech; ki inereech; ee iweechech kogeny." 
Psalms60:2 Ki itumdum emet ak ki ibet; isoop ole ki kobetak amu potani. 
Psalms60:3 Ki iboorchi piiguk tuguuk che nyigiisen; ki igoonech kee divaik che kibogiti. 
Psalms60:4 Ki igoochi che iywein songolyet, si kobiit kobarta amu imanda." 
Psalms60:5 Si kesar chamaniguk, saru eng' eung'ung' ne po tai ak iwolwech." 
Psalms60:6 Kigotwek Kamuktaindet eng' tiliilindanyi; kole, “Agasigei ye apchee Shekem, ak akwaa atebweetap Sukoth." 
Psalms60:7 Nenyu Gilead, ak nenyu Manasseh; Ephraim agine ko kimnateetap metinnyu, Judah ko kiroktonyu ne po laitornatet." 
Psalms60:8 Moab ko karait ne aunegei; awirchini kweiyonnyu Edom. ooren inyee Philistia amu anee.” 
Psalms60:9 Imuta ng'oo awo nganaseet ne kiim? Indoiywa ng'oo agoi Edom? 
Psalms60:10 Tos ma inyee ne ki iwiirtech, ee Kamuktaindet? Ama iwe inyee kobooto lugosyekyok, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms60:11 Koonech toreteet kegirindae puunyoot, amu ma tilei kiy toretetap chii." 
Psalms60:12 Kiterteerisyei eng' nyiganateet eng' Kamuktaindet, amu ineendet ne tyekyin ng'wony puunikyok." 
Psalms61:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, kaswa riirekyuk, epchi iit saaennyu." 
Psalms61:2 Aguurin eng' tabandap ng'wony, ye kagotanui muguleldanyu. Imutya rwandet ne kooi kosiiro," 
Psalms61:3 amu inyee ko ii ole amwechini, ii koot ne kooi ne kiim ole aung'egei eng' puunik." 
Psalms61:4 Amenye koong'ung' koigeny, amweu aung'egei kebebaiguk." 
Psalms61:5 Amu inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne ki igas kaarortaosyekyuk, ki igoono poroteetap icheeget che konyiti kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms61:6 Itesyini laitoryat peetuusyek; tarei kenyiisyekyik ibinwek che chaang'. 
Psalms61:7 Tebee taitap Kamuktaindet koigeny, chop si koriip ineendet chamyet ne tala ak imanit." 
Psalms61:8 Si atyenji kaineng'ung' kalasunet koigeny, si kobiit agoito peetuut age tugul che ki aaroorte." 
Psalms62:1 Igeni Kamuktaindet kityo saboondanyu, punu yetunennyu ineendet." 
Psalms62:2 Ineendet ineegei rwandennyu ak yetunennyu, ineendet ko irimennyu ne kooi; ma ki istoa miising'." 
Psalms62:3 Opookyini chii kot kotyanit, ole si kobiit obar ineendet, okweek tugul, ko uu inaatut ne kogoimom, ak ko uu ng'ootweet ne neegit koluul?" 
Psalms62:4 Irwoochi kityo komachei kotoorta ineendet amu telunatennyi; poiboi eng' lembechek. Iberuuri eng' kutusweekwak, ago sasisyei eng' mugulelwekwak." 
Psalms62:5 Ee saboondanyu, igen Kamuktaindet kityo; amu punu kamang'unennyu ineendet." 
Psalms62:6 Ineendet ineegei rwandennyu ak yetunennyu, irimennyu ne kooi ineendet; ma ki istoa." 
Psalms62:7 Tinyei Kamuktaindet yetunennyu ak toroornatennyu; rwandetap kimnateennyu ak ole amwechini ko Kamuktaindet. 
Psalms62:8 Ee okweek pichu, omang'u ineendet kotugul; oroong'ji mugulelwekwok ineendet, Kamuktaindet ole kemwechini." 
Psalms62:9 Iman puch piik che nyerootiin, ak kiplembechonik piik che taagunotiin. Ma ing'eeti kiit ne kigeeree nyigiisindo, wisisen icheek tugul kosiir kabuuset." 
Psalms62:10 Amomang'u sastaet, amomene rebisyet; ngo tesak mogornatosyek ko mat otiegei." 
Psalms62:11 Kitwek Kamuktaindet konyil agenge, ki agas nooto konyil aeng': ale po kimnateet Kamuktaindet;" 
Psalms62:12 Ee Kiptaiyat, neng'ung' rireenet agine; amu inyee ne iyaakyini chii tugul ko uu poisyennyi." 
Psalms63:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, inyee ko ii Kamuktaindennyu; acheeng'in eng' kagiiletapkei; Amei melelda saboondanyu amu machin, machin kot poortanyu, eng' emet ne yaamaat ne po ng'etatet, ole ma mi peek." 
Psalms63:2 Ara uu nooto koageerin eng' ole-tiliil, si ageer kimnateng'ung' ak toroornateng'ung'." 
Psalms63:3 Amu myee chamyeng'ung' ne tala kosiir saboondo; ilasun anyun kutinnyu. 
Psalms63:4 Ara anyun alasun kota asabe; anamjini parak eunekyuk amu kaineng'ung'. 
Psalms63:5 Piyonyi saboondanyu eng' igoorto ak akwaiyet; ak ilasun kutinnyu eng' poiboiyet," 
Psalms63:6 ye abwaatin ami itogunnyu, ak abwaatin eng' saisyegap kemoi;" 
Psalms63:7 amu ki iegu toretindennyu, abaibai anyun eng' urwetap kebebaiguk." 
Psalms63:8 Isubotin saboondanyu miising'; nama eung'ung' ne po tai. 
Psalms63:9 Ago pendi ng'wony oriit, che cheeng'ei kong'em saboondanyu." 
Psalms63:10 Kigoitoi kobek eng' kimnateetap rotwetap chok, ak kobunji lelwek." 
Psalms63:11 Ago paibai laitoryat eng' Kamuktaindet; igasegei age tugul ne iyastos eng' ineendet; amu kigerei kutusweegap kiplembechonik. 
Psalms64:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, kas kutinnyu, eng' riirekyuk; riip saboondanyu si ma ywei kamuisetap puunyoot." 
Psalms64:2 Unya eng' kirwoogutigap ung'oot che po che yaei tengekto; si ma nyoorwo wasetapkei ne po kiptengeginik. 
Psalms64:3 Che kagolit ng'elyebwekwak ko uu rotoogap chok, ak komwokto kipchabonikwak, chooto ng'aleek che ng'woneen." 
Psalms64:4 Si komwok eng' ung'oot ne ititaat, ak kosip komwok ineendet, amaiywei." 
Psalms64:5 Kicheergei eng' mageet ne ya; kichaamjigei kouny mestonok, ki le, “Ng'oo ne imuuchi kogeer icheek?”" 
Psalms64:6 Cheeng'oti tengekwogik; mwaei icheek kole, “Kogeyai eng' kagiiletapkei kosulda cheeng'sennyo.” Po ung'oot miising', kabwaatetap chiito age tugul, kobooto muguleldanyi!" 
Psalms64:7 Ago mwogei Kamuktaindet icheek; ak koguoten eng' yooto. 
Psalms64:8 Amu ng'aleegap ng'elyebwekwak komaasi icheek; ak tugul che keerei icheek kolelechi metowek. 
Psalms64:9 Yeityo koiyweis piik tugul; ak komwaita poisyetap Kamuktaindet, ak korwoochi eng' ng'omnateet agobo poisyennyi." 
Psalms64:10 Ingobaibait ne po imanda eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak konyoor ole mwechin eng' ineendet. Ingogaskei tugul che po iman eng' mugulelwek!" 
Psalms65:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, igenin kalasunet eng' Zion, ak keyaei che ki kiarorun." 
Psalms65:2 Ee inyee ne kasei saaet, pwonjinin piik tugul." 
Psalms65:3 Katemena tengekwogik, inyee ne iundoi pistaosyekyok." 
Psalms65:4 Paibai miising' chiito ne ileweni, ak imuti koriikyin, Si kobiit komeny seremusyeguk: Ak kebiye myeeindap koong'ung', Ole tiliil eng' hekalung'ung'." 
Psalms65:5 Ak iwolwech eng' imanda eng' tuguuk che imuisei, Ee Kamuktaindetap yetunennyo; Inyee ko ii kamang'unetap komoswek tugul che po ng'wony, Ak ne po icheek che mi nyanjet ne loo:" 
Psalms65:6 Ne iuuiiti tuloonook eng' kimnateennyi; Ak korategei eng' kamuktaet: 
Psalms65:7 Ne igoochin tuleetap nyanjosyek kosiis, tuleetap peek che mildogei, Ak polatetap piik." 
Psalms65:8 Ak koiyweisyei che menyei ole loo miising' amu kaboorunoiguk: Igoochini koboiboitu ole charunee asiis ak ole roroktoe. 
Psalms65:9 Irutochini ng'wony, ak inagi peek, Ak iakwai miising'; Nyiitaat peek aineetap Kamuktaindet: Ichopchini piik peek, ko kaichop ng'wony." 
Psalms65:10 Inyiiti peek ole kigereer eng' ng'wony, komarane; Iripribi komoswekyik che sutotin: Itangusi eng' ropta ne inesi; Iberuuri tuguukyik che piitos." 
Psalms65:11 Inyiiti kenyiit myeeindong'ung'; Ak sau akwaiyet eng' ortinweguk. 
Psalms65:12 Sachin chooto kewosyegap surkwen: Ak kirate tuloonook poiboiyet. 
Psalms65:13 Nyiitootiin kewosyek keechiirek; Ak nyiitootiin peek atebwosyek; Igasegei amu poiboi ak kotyendos. 
Psalms66:1 Otyenji Kamuktaindet eng' poiboiyet, ng'wony komugul:" 
Psalms66:2 Otyen toroornatetap kainennyi; Otoroor kalasunennyi. 
Psalms66:3 Oleenji Kamuktaindet, Po kamuiset ne tya poisyoniguk! Iming'injiningei puuniguk amu etunatetap kimnateng'ung'." 
Psalms66:4 Tuun ilasun ng'wony komugul, Ak kotyenun; Tyenjin kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms66:5 Obwa, ogeer poisyonigap Kamuktaindet; Po kamuiset poisyonik che yachin ineendet weeriigap piik." 
Psalms66:6 Ki wol nyanjet koek emet ne yaamaat: Kilandae aineet kobunei keelyek. Ki kiboiboitu eng' ineendet eng' olooto. 
Psalms66:7 Laitorani koigeny eng' kamuktaennyi; Keerei konyekyik pororyosyek: Amat koeetkei ngelelik. 
Psalms66:8 Olasu Kamuktaindennyo, okweek piik, Ak ongogasak kutitap kalasunennyi:" 
Psalms66:9 Ne riibei saboonwekyok kosapcho, Ak ne ma chamdoi keisto keelyekyok." 
Psalms66:10 Ee Kamuktaindet, kiityemech inyee: Ki ityemech, ko uu ye kityeme maat fedha." 
Psalms66:11 Ki imutyech mesteet ne uu regereiywot; Ki iratyi suenutikyok nyalilda ne oo. 
Psalms66:12 Ki igoochi piik kotyech metowekyok; Ki kibun maat ak peek; Ago ki imutwech kebwa ole tunenot. 
Psalms66:13 Anyoone koong'ung' aibu kagoochinoik che kibeelei, Ayaagun tuguuk che ki aaroorun," 
Psalms66:14 Chooto che ki mwa ng'elyeptanyu, ak che ki komwa kutinnyu, ye ki ami nyalilda." 
Psalms66:15 Ago kagoochinoik che kibeelei che akwaen, Kobooto nyamdutigap mengichik; Agoitoi kiruugik kobooto kwesik." 
Psalms66:16 Obwa, ogas, okweek tugul che oiywei Kamuktaindet, Si amwaita tuguuk che ki yachi saboondanyu." 
Psalms66:17 Ki ariirchi eng' kutinnyu, Ak ki alasu ineendet eng' ng'elyeptanyu." 
Psalms66:18 Ye abwaat tengekto eng' muguleldanyu, koma kaswa Kiptaiyat." 
Psalms66:19 Ago iman kogogas Kamuktaindet; ki koepchi iit tweguunetap saaennyu. 
Psalms66:20 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet, ne ki ma timda saaennyu, ak ki ma istoena rireenennyi." 
Psalms67:1 Ingorirenech Kamuktaindet, ak koberuurech, ak kotokyech togeennyi kokwenyech;" 
Psalms67:2 si konaak oreng'ung' eng' ng'wony, ak yetuneng'ung' eng' pororyosyek tugul." 
Psalms67:3 Ingolasun piik, ee Kamuktaindet; Ingolasun piik tugul." 
Psalms67:4 Ingoboiboitu pororyosyek ak kotyenso eng' poiboiyet: Amu irwookyini piik eng' imanda, Ak indochi pororyosyek eng' ng'wony." 
Psalms67:5 Ingolasun piik, ee Kamuktaindet; Ingolasun piik tugul." 
Psalms67:6 Kigogon ng'wony iyotennyi: Iberuurech Kamuktaindet, ineendet Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms67:7 Iberuurech Kamuktaindet; Ak kogonyit ineendet komoswek tugul che po ng'wony. 
Psalms68:1 Ingong'eet Kamuktaindet, ingoiyesta puunikyik; Ak ingomwei eng' tainnyi che wechei ineendet." 
Psalms68:2 Iyeste icheek ko uu ye kiyestoi iyeto: Ko uu ye chootei temeniet eng' ye neegitee maat, Ko uu nooto ingolusyo kiptengeginik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms68:3 Ago ingoboiboitu che po imanda; ingogaskei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet: Ee, ingoboiboitu eng' kagasetapkei." 
Psalms68:4 Otyenji Kamuktaindet, olasu kainennyi; ochopchi ooreet ne oo ineendet ne punei ong'atosyek, ko uu ne laanyei paraisiit. Kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ogaaskei eng' tainnyi." 
Psalms68:5 Kwandap che ma tinyei sigiik, ak ne tononjin mosoogik, Ko Kamuktaindet eng' koonnyi ne tiliil." 
Psalms68:6 Igoochin Kamuktaindet che mi icheegei komeng'jin ak alak: Imutyin kimonjororinik poroteet: Ago menyei pistoik emet ne yaamaat. 
Psalms68:7 Ee Kamuktaindet, ye kinga imande indoe piiguk, Ye kiityegoti surkwen," 
Psalms68:8 Kobotan ng'wony, Ak kororok kipsengwet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet: Kobotan Sinai nooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Psalms68:9 Ee Kamuktaindet, ki iyoogu ropta ne oo, ak ki igimit poroteng'ung' ye ki tinyei ng'etatet." 
Psalms68:10 Ki meny olooto tuiyeng'ung'; ee Kamuktaindet, ki ichopchi che po myeeindong'ung' kibananook." 
Psalms68:11 Igoitoi Kiptaiyat ng'olyoot: Oo lugeetap kobogorisyek che mwaitoi ng'aleek. 
Psalms68:12 Mweei laitorinigap lugoosyek, mweei: Ak kopchei kwondo ne ng'etu eng' kaa parunenik," 
Psalms68:13 Agot ngirue piusyegap keechiirek, ko uu kebebaigap cheptuget ne ki kituge fedha, Ak koroorikyik che ki kiile thahabu che talelyonen." 
Psalms68:14 Ye ki iyeesta Ne po Kamuktaet laitorinik eng' olooto, Ko ki uu ye ibuti teluji eng' Salmon." 
Psalms68:15 Tulweetap Kamuktaindet ko tulweetap Bashan; Tinyei tulweetap Bashan walisyek che kooen. 
Psalms68:16 Amu nee si koamak ng'etkong', okweek tuloonook che kooen, Agobo tulweet ne ki komach Kamuktaindet komeny? Ee, menyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor olooto koigeny." 
Psalms68:17 Karisyegap Kamuktaindet ko eliphuusyek tiptem, agot eliphuusyek ak eliphuusyek: Mi Kiptaiyat kwenunnywa, eng' Sinai, eng' Ole-Tiliil." 
Psalms68:18 Ki itogoste parak, ki imut luulenik che ki iluul; Ki itaach piik koek kagoochinoik, Ee, agot ngelelik ak icheek, si kobiit komeng'iis Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms68:19 Iberuurot Kiptaiyat, ne ibei peetuut age tugul milennyo, Kamuktaindet ineendet ko yetunennyo." 
Psalms68:20 Kamuktaindet eng' acheek ko Kamuktaindet ne po saruunet; po Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ortinwek che kechilile eng' meet. 
Psalms68:21 Ago tuei Kamuktaindet metowegap puunikyik, Metitap chiito ne wendote tengektanyi." 
Psalms68:22 Ki le Kiptaiyat, Amutu kogeny eng' Bashan, Amutu kogeny komang'une rirosyegap nyanjet:" 
Psalms68:23 Si kobiit irooch keeldong'ung' korotiik, Si konyoor ng'elyeptap seseniguk kebebertanyi eng' puunik." 
Psalms68:24 Ki kogeer icheek panweguk, ee Kamuktaindet, Panwegap Kamuktaindennyu, Laitoryandennyu, agoi ole-tiliil." 
Psalms68:25 Ki indo tyeniik, ak ki isubu che kibutei kibugandinik, kimi kween kootap Kor che kibirei sugutisyek che mengeechen." 
Psalms68:26 Olasu Kamuktaindet eng' tuiyosyek, Olasu Kiptaiyat, che ko po kondametutap Israel." 
Psalms68:27 Miitei Benjamin ne ming'in, pounindennywa, Miitei pounigap Judah ak tuiyennywa, Pounigap Zebulun, pounigap Naphtali." 
Psalms68:28 Ki kong'at Kamuktaindeng'ung' kimnateng'ung': Igimiit, ee Kamuktaindet, nooto ne ki iyai agobo acheek." 
Psalms68:29 Ibun laitorinik kagoochinoik Amu hekalung'ung' eng' Jerusalem. 
Psalms68:30 Kergong' tyondap timiin ne mi mutweek, Chaang'indap kiruugik, ak moegap piik, Koming'inonugei age tugul koibu fedha; Kigoiyesta `ineendet piik che chamei pooryeet." 
Psalms68:31 Tuun mang'une pounik Misiri; Iyogoochin Kush eunekyik Kamuktaindet kochokyin. 
Psalms68:32 Otyenji Kamuktaindet, okweek laitornatosyegap ng'wony; Otyenji Kiptaiyat kalasunoik;" 
Psalms68:33 Ineendet ne laanyei kipsengwetisyegap kipsengwet, chooto po keny; Ogeero, twegu eng' kutinnyi, kutit ne kiim." 
Psalms68:34 Ingobunji kimnateet Kamuktaindet: Mi telunatennyi Israel, Ak mi kimnateennyi paragusyek." 
Psalms68:35 Ee Kamuktaindet, kiywein eng' oldinweguk che tiliileen: Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne igoochin piikyik kimnateet ak kamuktaet. Iberuurot Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms69:1 Sarwo, ee Kamuktaindet; amu kagoityon peek che mache komaluucha kaatit." 
Psalms69:2 Karorokyi ng'atatyat ne oo, ama mi ole ketonone; kaitu ye mi rireetap peek, ole katucha maranosyek." 
Psalms69:3 Koang'et eng' riirekyuk; kagoyaam moktanyu: Kago imenitu konyekyuk ye ta ageni Kamuktaindennyu. 
Psalms69:4 Chaang' kosiir suumeekyuk che wecho puch; Kiimeen puunikyuk che mwaei lembech che machei kobara: Ak ki agoite chooto che ki ma arebee chii. 
Psalms69:5 Ee Kamuktaindet, ingen inyee perberindanyu; Ak ma ung'ootiin tengekwogikyuk eng' inyee." 
Psalms69:6 Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, amat kolilaanso che igenin amu anee: Ee Kamuktaindet ne po Israel, amat koteweerogis agobo anee icheeget che cheeng'in." 
Psalms69:7 Amu ki aegu ne kirosyin agobo inyee: Ki kotuch togeennyu kalilanet. 
Psalms69:8 Ki aegu too eng' che kitupche, ak ki aegu kipsagarin eng' lagogap chebyoset ne kisicha." 
Psalms69:9 Amu ki ama ng'etkondap koong'ung'; Ak ki kobwonjo rosyinetap icheeget che rosyinin. 
Psalms69:10 Ak ye ki ariire, aming'init saboondanyu eng' karugutetapkei, ko kirosya icheek agobo nooto." 
Psalms69:11 Ye ki alaagoti kuniet, aegu kalewenet eng' icheek." 
Psalms69:12 Ng'alaali agobo anee che tebyei eng' ormariich; Ak ki aegu tyendap kibogitinik. 
Psalms69:13 Ago anee, asaain, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' peetuut ne chamaksei: Ee Kamuktaindet, eng' chaang'indap rireeneng'ung', Wolwo eng' imandap yetuneng'ung'." 
Psalms69:14 Sarwo eng' ng'atatyat, si ma lugua: meto achilil eng' icheeget che wecho, ak eng' rireetap peek." 
Psalms69:15 Amengosuta mogoochek, ak amengolugua rireet; amengoger kutinnyi keriinget kota ami oriit." 
Psalms69:16 Wolwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu myee chamyeng'ung' ne tala: Iweekyage ko uu chaang'indap rireenosyeguk." 
Psalms69:17 Ak ameung'e togeng'ung' kiboityondeng'ung'; Chokyi wolwo, amu ami tiritindo." 
Psalms69:18 Rikyi saboondanyu, ak ityaach: Sarwo amu puunikyuk." 
Psalms69:19 Ingen rosyinet ne kirosyina, ak kalilanennyu, ak teweernatennyu: Miitei taing'ung' puunikyuk tugul." 
Psalms69:20 Kogoiri muguleldanyu rosyinet; ak aa rumot: Ak ki agen che tinyei rireenet, ago ki ma piit; Ak che imuuchi kogaigai chii, ago ma anyooru." 
Psalms69:21 Ki koono tuguuk che ng'woneen koek amitwogik; Ak ye ki ama melel konaga siki aee. 
Psalms69:22 Ingoek mesteet meesennywa ne mi tainnywa; Ak ingoek mesteet ye mi icheek eng' kaalyeet. 
Psalms69:23 Ingoimenitu konyekwak, si ma keer kiy; Ak igoochi kobotanso suenutikwak kotugul." 
Psalms69:24 Rong'ji icheek nyitateng'ung', Ak ingonam icheek koroomindap nereegeguk," 
Psalms69:25 Ingoguber ole menyei; Amat komeny chii emaisyekwak. 
Psalms69:26 Amu usei icheek ineendet ne ki ibir; Ak komwaoti agobo arageneetap icheek che ki iguoten. 
Psalms69:27 Tesyi tengekto age tengektonywa: Ak amat kobwonji icheek imandang'ung'. 
Psalms69:28 Ingibukto icheek eng' bukuitap saboon, Amat kesir kobooto che po imanda." 
Psalms69:29 Ago aa kibananiat ak atinye arageneet: Ingotoroora yetuneng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms69:30 Alasu kainetap Kamuktaindet eng' tyendo, Ak amwae kongoi atoroori ineendet." 
Psalms69:31 Ak kobaibai nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir eito, Anan kirgit ne tinyei kuinoik ak siyok." 
Psalms69:32 Kagogeer che talaen, ak kogaskei: Ingosapcho mugulelwekwok, okweek che ocheeng'e Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms69:33 Amu kasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ponondos, Ak masasei kimonjororinikyik." 
Psalms69:34 Ingolas ineendet kipsengwet ak ng'wony, Nyanjosyek, ak tuguuk tugul che pendote olooto." 
Psalms69:35 Amu saru Kamuktaindet Zion, ak koteech nganasoogap Judah; Ak komeny icheek olooto, kobunji." 
Psalms69:36 Nyabani ak icheek kesweegap otwogikyik olooto, ak komeny olooto icheek che chamei kainennyi." 
Psalms70:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, sarwo; chokyi toreto, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms70:2 Ingolilanso ak koteweerogis che cheeng'ei saboondanyu. Ingoweektagei let ak koteweerogis che poiboi amu ng'wanindanyu. 
Psalms70:3 Ingeweekta koba let amu teweernatennywa. Che leen, Haa, Haa." 
Psalms70:4 Ingoboiboitu icheek tugul che cheeng'in, ak kogaskei eng' inyee. Ak ingomwa kotugul icheek che chamei yetuneng'ung', Kole, Ingitoroor Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms70:5 Ago anee ko aa panan ak ma tinye kiy; Chogu ole ami, ee Kamuktaindet: Ii toretindennyu ak ko ii saruunindennyu; Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amegagei." 
Psalms71:1 Amang'un, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amegoono alilan agoi." 
Psalms71:2 Sarwo eng' imandang'ung', ak ieta; epcha iit ak isarwo." 
Psalms71:3 Egu eng' anee rwandet ne amenye, ole awendi kotugul: Ki igoonu ng'atuutyet kosarwo; Amu ii rwandennyu, ak ko ii irimennyu." 
Psalms71:4 Koono achilil, ee Kamuktaindennyu, eng' eutap kiptengekyot, eng' eutap chiito ne ma po imanda, ak ne kolgol." 
Psalms71:5 Amu inyee ne ageniin, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ii kamang'unennyu kobooch ko aa ming'in." 
Psalms71:6 Ki atienengei kong'etee ko kagisicho; Inyee ne ki imoong'wa eng' moetap iyoonyu ne kisicho. Neng'ung' kalasunennyu kotugul. 
Psalms71:7 Auu kwang'utyet eng' che chaang'; ago inyee ko ii ole amwechini ne kiim. 
Psalms71:8 Nyiei kutinnyu kalasuneng'ung', kobooto teegistang'ung' peetuut komugul." 
Psalms71:9 Amewiirta ye tuun kaaositu; amebagaaktaa ye kagobet kimnateennyu. 
Psalms71:10 Amu ng'alaalena puunikyuk; ak irwoochi icheek che sapchin saboondanyu," 
Psalms71:11 leen icheek, “Ki kobagaakta `Kamuktaindet ineendet; oon ak onam ineendet; amu ma mi ne saru.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ee Kamuktaindet, amelooena: Ee, Kamuktaindennyu, chogu toreto." 
Psalms71:13 Ingolilanso ak kobetyo che puunigap saboondanyu; Ingotuch icheek rosyinet ak teweernateet che cheeng'ei koyaiywo ne ya. 
Psalms71:14 Ago amang'u kotugul, Ak atese alasun kosiir." 
Psalms71:15 Mwaitoi kutinnyu imandang'ung', Ak yetuneng'ung' peetuut komugul; Amu mangen ole tee chooto." 
Psalms71:16 Anyoone kobooto poisyonik che kiimeen che po Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Amwae imandang'ung', ne neng'ung' inyegei." 
Psalms71:17 Ee Kamuktaindet, ki ineeta kobooch ko aa ming'in; ak ki amwaite agoi nguno poisyoniguk che po kwong'eet." 
Psalms71:18 Ee, ye tuun kaaositu, asich kalwalek, ko mebagaakta, ee Kamuktaindet; agoi amwachi kimnateng'ung' ibinda ne nyoonei, amwachi kamuktaeng'ung' age tugul ne piitu." 
Psalms71:19 Toroor agine imandang'ung' miising', ee Kamuktaindet; Inyee ne ki iyai tuguuk che eecheen, Ee Kamuktaindet, ng'oo ne ogerge?" 
Psalms71:20 Inyee ne ki iboorwech nyalilwogik che chaang' che koroomen, ta isoobech kogeny, Ak tuun imoong'wech kemang'une oriit miising' ne po ng'wony." 
Psalms71:21 Tes etunatennyu, Ak iweeige kogeny igaigaa." 
Psalms71:22 Alasun agane eng' kibugandet, agobo imandang'ung', ee Kamuktaindennyu; atyenun kalasunoik eng' ketubet, ee Inyee ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Psalms71:23 Paibaitu kutinnyu miising' ye atyenun kalasunoik; Ak paibaitu saboondanyu, ne ki ityaach inyee." 
Psalms71:24 Ng'alaali ng'elyeptanyu agobo imandang'ung' peetuut komugul: Amu ililandos, ak koteweeroksei, icheek che cheeng'jino yaityet." 
Psalms72:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, igoochi laitoryat kirwoogutiguk, Ak igoochi imandang'ung' weeriitap laitoryat." 
Psalms72:2 Irwookyin piiguk eng' imanda, Ak kobesyechi kibananoguk." 
Psalms72:3 Ipchin tuloonook piiguk kaalyeet, Ak ipchin tuloonook che mengeechen piiguk imanda." 
Psalms72:4 Irwooksechin kibananogap piik, Ak kosaru lagogap che nyalildos, Ak kotonaton usiindet." 
Psalms72:5 Iywein icheek kota komi asiista, Ak kotee komi arawet, eng' ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms72:6 Chorugei ineendet ko uu ropta ne choorchingei malelyet: Ko uu ropta ne inesyin ng'wony. 
Psalms72:7 Eng' peetuusyekyik konyooru ne po imanda perurto; Ak chaang'indap kaalyeet agoi koma komi arawet. 
Psalms72:8 Laitorani ineendet kobooch nyanjet agoi nyanjet age, Ak kobooch aineet agoi ole poochin ng'wony." 
Psalms72:9 Ing'uruukyin ineendet icheek che menyei surkwen; Ak komel temburyek puunikyik. 
Psalms72:10 Ibu kagoochinoik laitorinigap Tarsus ak che po ngeguusyek; Igoitoi kagoochinoik laitorinigap Sheba ak Seba. 
Psalms72:11 Ee, ibutyin keelyekyik laitorinik tugul: Otei ineendet pororyosyek tugul." 
Psalms72:12 Amu saru ne nyalili ye kariir; Ak kibananiat, ne ma tinyei toretin." 
Psalms72:13 Riire kibananiat ak ne nyalili, Ak kosaru saboonwegap che nyalildos." 
Psalms72:14 Ityachi saboonwekwak eng' usiisyet ak koroomnateet; Ak punjin kamanuut korotiikwak eng' tainnyi: 
Psalms72:15 Ak saptos icheek; ak kigoochi ineendet thahabu ne po Sheba: Ak saaei piik kotugul agobo ineendet; Iberuuri ineendet peetuut komugul. 
Psalms72:16 Ak tuun piitu chaang'indap peek eng' ng'wony eng' tuloonook parak; Ak itumdumegei logoekyik ko uu Lebanon: Ak tunendos icheek che po nganaseet ko uu susweek che po ng'wony. 
Psalms72:17 Tebyei kainennyi koigeny; Tebyei kainennyi kota komi asiista: Ak kiberuuri piik eng' ineendet; Ak kuure pororyosyek tugul ne paibai. 
Psalms72:18 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet, Kamuktaindetap Israel, Ne ineegei ne yaei tuguuk che po kwong'eet:" 
Psalms72:19 Ak iberuurot kainennyi ne tinyei toroornatet agoi koigeny; Ak ingonyi ng'wony komugul toroornatennyi. Amen, ak Amen." 
Psalms72:20 Kagogeskei saautigap Daudi weeriitap Jesse.
