Psalms73:1 Iman, myee Kamuktaindet eng' Israel, eng' icheeget che tiliileen mugulelwek." 
Psalms73:2 Ago eng' anee ko ki neegit komasta keelyekyuk; ki neegit kochabaita kakwautikyuk. 
Psalms73:3 Amu ki ama ng'etkong' agobo che mendos, ye kinga keer kaalyeetap kiptengeginik." 
Psalms73:4 Amu ma nyooru ng'wanindo; chamegei poorwekwak, ak ko kiimeen." 
Psalms73:5 Ma tinyei icheeget nyalilwogik ko uu piik alak; Ama nyooru pireet ko uu piik alak. 
Psalms73:6 Eng' nooto anyun uu menoteet sirimdo ne mi kaatwekwak; katuch icheek koroomnateet ko uu ngoryeet. 
Psalms73:7 Ibwanotin konyekwak eng' nerateet: tinyei tuguuk che siirei che machei mugulelwekwak. 
Psalms73:8 Chotisyei, ak mwaei sastaet eng' tengekto: ng'alaaldos eng' katorooretapkei." 
Psalms73:9 Kigotoroor kutusweekwak agobo kipsengwet, ak kobendote ng'elyebwekwak ng'wony." 
Psalms73:10 Eng' nooto anyun, weeksei piikyik oli: ak lugui icheek peek che nyiitootiin." 
Psalms73:11 Ak koleen icheek, “Nae nee Kamuktaindet? Tos miitei naet eng' Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'?”" 
Psalms73:12 Ogeero, kiptengeginik chuuto; miitei icheeget kotugul eng' kaalyeet; tesoksei eng' mogornatosyek." 
Psalms73:13 Iman ki atiliil muguleldanyu puch, Ak ki aune eunekyuk libwobindo puch;" 
Psalms73:14 Amu kaanyooru pireet eng' peetuut komugul, Ak kitigoono karonet age tugul." 
Psalms73:15 Nda ki kamwa ale ang'alaali ko uu ni, Keero, ta kiga aberber ibindap lagoguk." 
Psalms73:16 Ye kinga cheeng' ole amuuchi anaita niito, Kotemena;" 
Psalms73:17 Agoi among'ji kap Kamuktaindet ole-tiliil, Anai anyun ole poochin kagesunennywa." 
Psalms73:18 Iman igoochini kotebee icheek komoswek che chaboen: Ak iwiirchini icheek ng'wony koba ng'emisyet. 
Psalms73:19 Katepto ano kot kosip kong'emogis icheek eng' chokyinet; kagowong'kei eng' kamuisosyek. 
Psalms73:20 Uu karwotitoet ye kagos chiito; Ko uu nooto, ee Kiptaiyat, ye ing'eet inyee, isase itoondanywa." 
Psalms73:21 King'wanit muguleldanyu, Ak ki kitoor saboondanyu:" 
Psalms73:22 Ki aa abusat, amangen kiy; ki auu tyondo eng' taing'ung'." 
Psalms73:23 Agot nga uu nooto ami kobooten kotugul: Ki inam eunnyu ne po tai. 
Psalms73:24 Inyee ne indoiywa eng' ruchineng'ung', Ak eng' let itaacha anyo ye mi liilindo." 
Psalms73:25 Ng'oo ne atinye eng' kipsengwet ne ma inyee? Ama mi age ne amache eng' ng'wony kosiirin. 
Psalms73:26 Ichuchui poortanyu ak muguleldanyu: Ago Kamuktaindet kimnateetap muguleldanyu ak kebebertanyu koigeny. 
Psalms73:27 Amu keero, petos icheeget che looen eng' inyee: Amu ki ing'em icheek tugul che ki isup ibeetapkei koistoenengei." 
Psalms73:28 Ago myee eng' anee ariikyi Kamuktaindet: Ki acham koek Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole amwechini, Si kobiit amwaita poisyoniguk tugul." 
Psalms74:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, amu nee si iwiirtech agoi? Amu nee si koiyenji nereegeguk keechiiregap akweeng'ung'?" 
Psalms74:2 Ibwaat tuiyeng'ung' ne ki ial keny, Ne ki ityaach koek pororyetap poroteng'ung'; Tulweetap Zion ole ki imeny." 
Psalms74:3 Iyogoochi keeldong'ung' ole Ki kong'emak koigeny, Yaityet tugul ne ki koyai puunyoot eng' ole-tiliil." 
Psalms74:4 Kogoborisenso puuniguk eng' kwenutap tuiyeng'ung'; Ki konde songolikwak koek kaboorunoik. 
Psalms74:5 Ki uu icheek piik Che namjin parak aonok, komachei koep keetiigap sondiit." 
Psalms74:6 Ago putei icheek nguno aonok ak kirisonok poisyennyi tugul ne kagiwai. 
Psalms74:7 Kigobeel oldang'ung' ne tiliil; Ki koyai ole menyei kaineng'ung' kong'wanit agoi ng'wony. 
Psalms74:8 Ki le eng' mugulelwekwak, Ongeng'em kowong'kei tugul: Kigobeel kapkorosusyek tugul che po Kamuktaindet eng' emet." 
Psalms74:9 Ma kigeere kaboorunoikyok; Ma komi maotyondo; Ama mi kwenunnyo age tugul ne ingen kole tyanitu. 
Psalms74:10 Ee Kamuktaindet, rosu puunyoot kot kotyanit? Tos chubei puunyoot kaineng'ung' agoi koigeny?" 
Psalms74:11 Kalya si iweekte eung'ung', eung'ung' ne po tai? Inemu eng' tegeng'ung', ak iwong'u icheek." 
Psalms74:12 Ago Kamuktaindet ko Laitoryandennyu kobooch keny, Ne yaei yetunet eng' kwenutap ng'wony." 
Psalms74:13 Ki ipchei inyee nyanjet eng' kimnateng'ung': Ki iri metowegap cheluguinik eng' peek. 
Psalms74:14 Ki iri kotonogis metowegap tyong'ik che eecheen che po peek, che uu ting'ong'ok, Ki igoite koek amditap piik che menyei surkwen." 
Psalms74:15 Ki igereer kong'igap peek ak ainoosyek: Ki iteenyi ainoosyek che kirootei agoi. 
Psalms74:16 Neng'ung' peetuut, ak neng'ung' kemout agine: Ki ichop tuguuk che iluu, ak asiista." 
Psalms74:17 Ki ipchei kiwotosyek tugul che po ng'wony: Ki iyai kemeut ak iwot. 
Psalms74:18 Ibwaat niito, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ile, ki kogerin kong' puunyoot, ak ki chup piik che abusotiin kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms74:19 Ee, amegoochi saboondap cheptugeng'ung' tyondap timiin: Ameutyee koigeny saboonwegap piiguk che nyalildos." 
Psalms74:20 Ibwaat kayomiset: Amu nyiitaat komoswek che imenen che po ng'wony, ole menyei che koroomen." 
Psalms74:21 Amengoweek kolilaananu ne tinyei usiisyet; Ingolas kaineng'ung' che nyalildos ak che ma tinyei kiy. 
Psalms74:22 Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet, ibesyechigei ng'aleeguk: Ibwaat ole kertoin kong' eng' peetuut komugul, chiito ne abusat." 
Psalms74:23 Ameutyee ng'aleegap puuniguk: Togostoi kotugul polatetap icheeget che ng'eetyinin. 
Psalms75:1 Kiweegun kongoi, ee Kamuktaindet; kiweegun kongoi, amu neegit kaineng'ung': mwaitoi piik kwang'utiguk." 
Psalms75:2 Ye kanyooru poroindo ne choboot, arwooch eng' imanda." 
Psalms75:3 Kigochoot ng'wony kobooto chechiik tugul che menyei olooto, ki alum tolochikyik." 
Psalms75:4 Ki aleenji che mendos, Amomenie: Ak ki aleenji che yaacheen, Amotoroor kuineng'wong':" 
Psalms75:5 Amotoroor miising' kuineng'wong'; Among'alaal eng' menoteet. 
Psalms75:6 Amu ma punu katorooret kong'asiis, anan cherongo, Ama punu murot tai." 
Psalms75:7 Ago kirwoogindet Kamuktaindet: Iming'ini age, ak koeeti age." 
Psalms75:8 Amu miitei kigombet eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kuutu divaik; Ak ki kiburuch che chaang' che teerchiin, ak korong'u ineendet chooto: Iman, irurunyi misigiikwak kiptengeginik tugul che po ng'wony ak koeei." 
Psalms75:9 Ago amwaitoi anee koigeny, Atyenjini kalasunoik Kamuktaindetap Jakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Atile kuinoigap kiptengeginik; Ago eegitu kuinoigap che po imanda. 
Psalms76:1 Naat Kamuktaindet eng' Judah: Oo kainennyi eng' Israel. 
Psalms76:2 Miitei koonnyi Salem, Ak miitei Zion ole menyei." 
Psalms76:3 Ki iri eng' olooto kipchabonik che po kwanget; Long'eet ak rotwetap chok, ak lugeet." 
Psalms76:4 Iluu ak itinye telunateet kosiir tuloonoogap che luulsei. 
Psalms76:5 Kogeluul che nyigoonen, kogoruiyo konuukso; Ak ma mi eng' piik che kiimeen ne kinyoor eunekwak." 
Psalms76:6 Ee Kamuktaindetap Jakobo, inuuktos kariisyek ak paraisisyek Amu kereng'ung' po kong'." 
Psalms76:7 Kanyool kiywein inyeendet, inyee; Ak ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taing'ung' ko kenereech?" 
Psalms76:8 Ki imwau kirwooget kogasak kobun kipsengwet; Ki iyweis emet, ak ki siis," 
Psalms76:9 Ye kingo ng'eet Kamuktaindet korwooch, kosar tugul che talaen che po ng'wony." 
Psalms76:10 Iman ilasun nereegegap piik: Irategei nereegek che kang'et. 
Psalms76:11 Oarorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak oyaakyi: Ingoipchi kagoochinoik, icheeget che mi ole neegitee ineendet, ineendet ne nyoljin kiywei." 
Psalms76:12 Tilei ineendet saboonwegap pounik: Imui ineendet laitorinigap ng'wony. 
Psalms77:1 Ariirchini Kamuktaindet; Ee, ariirchini Kamuktaindet eng' kutinnyu, si koepcha iit." 
Psalms77:2 Ki acheeng' Kiptaiyat eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu: Ki aiite eunnyu kemoi, ama amuuny; Ki eesyo saboondanyu kigaigai." 
Psalms77:3 Abwaati Kamuktaindet, ak atigeni: Abwaatoti, ak kotanui saboondanyu." 
Psalms77:4 Iname konyekyuk kogos: Aiimigei kot koma muuchi ang'alaal. 
Psalms77:5 Koabwaat peetuusyek che po keny. Kenyiisyek che ki kobunji keny miising'. 
Psalms77:6 Abwaati tyendanyu kemoi: Ang'alaali ak muguleldanyu; Ak kogosyach saboondanyu eng' kagiiletapkei. 
Psalms77:7 Tos toortaisyei Kiptaiyat agoi? Tos mata kobaibait kogeny? 
Psalms77:8 Tos ki kogeskei rireenennyi koigeny? Tos ma kosuldoi arorutyennyi koigeny? 
Psalms77:9 Tos kigoutye Kamuktaindet rireenennyi? Anan ki kogeer nereegekyik rireenennyi ne tala? 
Psalms77:10 Ak ki ale, kaimennyu niito; abwaati ale ki kowalak euut ne po tai ne po Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'." 
Psalms77:11 Abwaati poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Ak abwaati kwang'utiguk che po keny. 
Psalms77:12 Abwaatoti agine tuguuk che ki iyai, Ak ang'alaalote poisyoniguk." 
Psalms77:13 Ee Kamuktaindet, mi oreng'ung' ole-tiliil: Ng'oo kamuktain ne oo ne kergei ak Kiptaiyat?" 
Psalms77:14 Inyeendet Kamuktaindet ne iyae kwang'utik: Ki ibarte kimnateng'ung' eng' kwenutap pororyosyek. 
Psalms77:15 Ki ityaach piiguk eng' eung'ung', Weeriigap Jakobo ak Joseph." 
Psalms77:16 Kigeerin peek, ee Kamuktaindet; Kigeerin peek ak ki iyweis: Kibotanso ak icheek rirosyek." 
Psalms77:17 Kirong' poolik peek; Kibiitune cheet parak: Ak ki iyeesta kipchaboniguk. 
Psalms77:18 Ki mi tuugeetap tuleeng'ung' kipchurchuryet; ki ikweny ng'wony `kalyelosyek: ki potan ng'wony ak kotumdumgei. 
Psalms77:19 Ki mi oreng'ung' nyanjet, Ak kimi ortinweguk peek che kiimeen, Ak ki ma naak tyegutiguk." 
Psalms77:20 Ki imut piiguk ko uu akweetap keechiirek, Eng' eutap Musa ak Aron." 
Psalms78:1 Oepchi iit ng'atuutyennyu, ee piikyuk: Otokyi itiikwok ng'aleegap kutinnyu." 
Psalms78:2 Ayaate kutinnyu eng' kalewenet; Amwae ng'aleek che ung'ootiin che po keny: 
Psalms78:3 Che kigegas ak kenai, Ak ki komwaiwech kwanisyekyok." 
Psalms78:4 Ma kiung'e chooto lagokwak, Kimwachini ibinda ne nyoonei kalasunoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ak kimnateennyi, ak kwang'utikyik che ki koyai." 
Psalms78:5 Amu ki igimit paornateet eng' Jakobo, Ak ki inde ng'atuutyet eng' Israel, Ne ki ng'at kwanisyekyok, kole, Konet lagokwak:" 
Psalms78:6 Si konai chooto ibinda ne piitu, agot lagok che tuun kisichei; Che tuun ng'eetos ak komwachi lagokwak:" 
Psalms78:7 Si konde kamang'unennywa eng' Kamuktaindet, Si ma utye poisyonigap Kamuktaindet, Ago si koriip ng'atuutikyik:" 
Psalms78:8 Ak si ma tuun igei kwanisyekwak, Ibinda ne uui met ak ko ngelelyo; Ibinda ne ki ma chop mugulelwekwak, Ak che ki ma litititu saboonwekwak eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms78:9 Kiweektagei let lagogap Ephraim eng' peetuutap lugeet, Kotinyei kariik ak koiboti kwangok." 
Psalms78:10 Ki ma riip kayomisetap Kamuktaindet, Ak ki eesyo kobendatee ng'atuutyennyi:" 
Psalms78:11 Ak kiutye tuguukyik che kiga yai, Ak kwang'utikyik che kiga koboorchi icheek." 
Psalms78:12 Ki yai ineendet tuguuk che po kwong'eet eng' taitap kwanisyekwak, Eng' emetap Misiri, eng' tembwetap Zoan." 
Psalms78:13 Kipcheune aeng' nyanjet, ak kogoochi kolandae; Ak ki igoochi peek kototenso konamgei." 
Psalms78:14 Ki indochi eng' pooldet peet, Ak ki indochi kemout komugul eng' lapkeiyetap maat." 
Psalms78:15 Kitui rwandosyek eng' surkwen, Ak ki inaga peek che chaang' ko uu che punu rirosyek." 
Psalms78:16 Ki imang'une rwandet peek che rootei, Ak ki igoochi peek kosururgei ko uu ainoosyek." 
Psalms78:17 Ago kites icheek koyachi ineendet tengekto, kongelelji Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' eng' emet ne yaamaat." 
Psalms78:18 Ak kityem Kamuktaindet eng' mugulelwekwak Eng' soometap amitwogik eng' kasennywa po myat. 
Psalms78:19 Ee, kichaam Kamuktaindet; Ki le, Tos imuuchi Kamuktaindet kochobwech amitwogik eng' surkwen?" 
Psalms78:20 Ogeero, kikwer ineendet rwandet, ak kisururgei peek, Konyi ainoosyek kot kong'irtagei; Tos imuuchi kogoonech magatiinik ak icheek? Anan imuuchi kogoonech panyeek?" 
Psalms78:21 Ki kas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun, ak kinereech: Ak ki lal maat agobo Jakobo, Ak kitogosta nereegek agobo Israel;" 
Psalms78:22 Amu ki ma iyan pichooto Kamuktaindet, Ama imang' yetunennyi." 
Psalms78:23 Ago ki ng'at poolik eng' parak, Ak ki yaat kurgotigap kipsengwet," 
Psalms78:24 Ak kiroong'ji mana si koam, Ak ki igoochi peegap kipsengwet." 
Psalms78:25 Ki am piik amitwogigap che kiimeen: Ki iyookyi amitwogik kobiyong'so. 
Psalms78:26 Ki igoochi usoonetap kong'asiis kous eng' kipsengwet: Ak ki indochi usoonet ne po murot tai eng' kimnateennyi. 
Psalms78:27 Kiroong'ji icheek panyeek che tee temburyek, Ak toriitik che po kebebaik che tee ng'aniegap nyanjosyek:" 
Psalms78:28 Ak ki igoochi kobutyi kwenutap nganasennywa, Komoswek tugul che po meng'otosyekwak." 
Psalms78:29 Ki amis anyun, ak kibiyong'so kot; Ak ki igoochi che kigasei myat." 
Psalms78:30 Ago ki ma igeskei magennywa, Ak ye kita komi panyeek kutusweekwak," 
Psalms78:31 Konyonji eng' yooto nereegegap Kamuktaindet, Ak kobar che neryootiin alak eng' icheek, Ak kokwer neranigap Israel kobar." 
Psalms78:32 Agot nganda kinyoor chooto tugul ko kita koyai tengekto, Ak ki ma iyan poisyonikyik che po kwong'eet." 
Psalms78:33 Ki iwong' anyun peetuusyekwak kobetyo puch, Ak kenyiisyekwak eng' kamuiset." 
Psalms78:34 Ye kingo par icheek, kocheeng' anyun icheek ineendet: Ak ki week kocheeng' Kamuktaindet eng' kagiiletapkei." 
Psalms78:35 Ki ibwaat icheek kole Kamuktaindet ko rwandennywa, ak kole katyagindennywa Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising'." 
Psalms78:36 Ago ki iberber ineendet eng' kutusweekwak, Ak komwachi lembechek eng' ng'elyebwekwak." 
Psalms78:37 Amu ki ma ko lititen mugulelwekwak eng' ineendet, Ak ki ma ek che kiyani agobo kayomisennyi." 
Psalms78:38 Ago kinyochi kaat tengektonywa amu ki nyiitaat ineendet rireenetapkei, ak ki ma par icheek: Ee, kiweekta nereegekyik konyil che chaang', Ama ing'eet nereegekyik tugul." 
Psalms78:39 Ak ki ibwaat kole icheeget ko poorto kityo: Usoonet ne siirtoi, ama weeksei kogeny." 
Psalms78:40 Ak kingelelji ineendet konyil ata eng' surkwen, Ak ki igoochi arageneet eng' surkwen!" 
Psalms78:41 Ak ki week kogeny kotyem Kamuktaindet, Ak kitach Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Psalms78:42 Ma ibwaat eunnyi, Anan peetuut ne ki ityaach icheek eng' puunyoot." 
Psalms78:43 Ko uu ye ki yai kaboorunoikyik eng' Misiri, Ak kwang'utikyik eng' tembwetap Zoan;" 
Psalms78:44 Ak ki wal peegap ainoosyekwak koek korotiik, Agot kereruusyek ak icheek, kot koma ko eeoksei." 
Psalms78:45 Ki iyookto kalyang'ik koba kwenunnywa, che kisus icheek; Ak mororochik che king'em icheek." 
Psalms78:46 Ak ki igoochi koam tinapchet ruratennywa, Ak ki igoochi chereng'endet koam poisyonikwak." 
Psalms78:47 King'eme koigap ropta sabibukwak, Ak king'eme chepkoset mogoonikwak." 
Psalms78:48 Ak kibiree koiyat tuukwak, Ak ki am ilet akweennywa po keechiir." 
Psalms78:49 Ki wiirchi icheek koroomnatetap nereegekyik, Nereegek, ng'wanindo ak nyalilda, Ak ki iyookyi kweanetap malaikaisyek che ibei yaityet." 
Psalms78:50 Ki yachi nereegekyik ooreet; Ak ki ma riiree saboonwekwak eng' meet, Ago ki igoochi saboonwekwak koroito:" 
Psalms78:51 Ak ki par kiboretook tugul eng' Misiri, Ki par taunetap kimnateennywa eng' emaisyegap Ham:" 
Psalms78:52 Ago ki indochi piikyik ko uu keechiirek, Ak ki imut ko uu akweetap keechiirek eng' surkwen." 
Psalms78:53 Ki indochi eng' kaalyeet, si ma iyweis: Ago ki tuch nyanjet puunikwak." 
Psalms78:54 Ak ki imut agoi koit kiwotetap oldanyi ole-tiliil, Agoi tulwooni, ne kiga ale eunnyi ne po tai." 
Psalms78:55 Ki oon pororyosyek eng' tainnywa, Ak kipchechi icheek emonooto eng' kiwotosyek koek porotennywa, Ak ki igoochi ortinwegap Israel komeny emaisyekwak." 
Psalms78:56 Ago kityem ak kongelelji Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising', ak ki ma riip paornatosyekyik." 
Psalms78:57 Ak kiweektagei let, koosup ng'aalseet ko uu kwanisyekwak: Ki kiweekta koba taban ko uu kwanget ne ma litit." 
Psalms78:58 Kitach ineendet kot konereech eng' oldinwekwak che sutotin, Ak ki igoochi ineendet ng'etkonda eng' kanamonikwak che ki kiwai." 
Psalms78:59 Ye kingo kas Kamuktaindet niito konereech, Ak kiwech Israel miising':" 
Psalms78:60 Ak kimeto anyun Hekaluut ne ki mi Shiloh, Emait ne ki inde kwenutap piik;" 
Psalms78:61 Ak ki igoito kimnateennyi keluul, Ak ki inde karaaranindanyi eutap puunyoot." 
Psalms78:62 Ki igoito piikyik ak icheek kebare rotwetap chok; Ak ki nereekyi porotennyi. 
Psalms78:63 Ki par maat weeriikwak; Ama kityenji tiibiikwak tyendap katunisyet. 
Psalms78:64 Ki kibare tisiikwak rotwetap chok; Ak ki ma iteiyo mosoogikwak. 
Psalms78:65 Ki ng'eet anyun Kiptaiyat ko uu ne karuei, Ko uu chiito ne kiim ne parori amu maiyek." 
Psalms78:66 Ak ki parat puunikyik koweektagei let: Ak ki igoochi kolilaanso agoi. 
Psalms78:67 Ak ki eesyo emaitap Joseph, Ak ki ma lewen ooreetap Ephraim;" 
Psalms78:68 Ago ki lewen ooreetap Judah, Tulweetap Zion ne ki cham." 
Psalms78:69 Ak ki teech oldanyi ne tiliil koigei ole sutot, Koigei ng'wonyut ne kigogimiit ineendet koigeny." 
Psalms78:70 Ki lewen Daudi agine kiboityondennyi, Ak ki imutune piusyegap keechiirek:" 
Psalms78:71 Ye ki isubu keechiirek che aboen, Ki imut ineendet si kobiit kobai kap Jakobo che piikyik, ak Israel che porotennyi." 
Psalms78:72 Kibai anyun icheek ko uu kagesunatetapkei ne po muguleldanyi; Ak ki indochi eng' utaatyetap eunekyik. 
Psalms79:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, kagomong'ji poroteng'ung' pororyosyek; Kagomurwon hekalung'ung' ne tiliil; Kagoyai Jerusalem koegunoot karurugutik." 
Psalms79:2 Kigogoochi muuswegap kiboitiniguk toriitigap parak koam, Ki igoochi tyong'igap timiin koam poorwegap piiguk che tiliileen." 
Psalms79:3 Kitumjinot Jerusalem korotiigap piiguk ko uu peek; Ak ki ma piit chii ne kitup icheek. 
Psalms79:4 Kigeegu che iteweerotin eng' piik che neegiteenech, Saseech ak kororechinech anyun, che mi komoswekyok tugul." 
Psalms79:5 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tyanitu, tos inereechi agoi? Tos lalei ng'etkondang'ung' ko uu maat?" 
Psalms79:6 Rong'ji nereegeguk pororyosyek che ma ingenin, Ak laitornatosyek che maguurei kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms79:7 Amu kigoam Jakobo, Ak ki koyai koek karaita ole menyei." 
Psalms79:8 Amebwaat iityech tengekwogigap kwanisyekyok: Ingosip kondoenech rireenosyeguk: Amu kigenyeratitu miising'. 
Psalms79:9 Toretech, ee Kamuktaindetap yetunennyo, amu toroornatetap kaineng'ung'; Sarwech, ak iunde tengekwogikyok, amu kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms79:10 Amu nee si koleen pororyosyek, Mi ano Kamuktaindennywa? Ingonaak eng' pororyosyek eng' tainnyo Yaaktaetap korotiik che po kiboitiniguk che ki kitumda." 
Psalms79:11 Ingonyo taing'ung' tigenetap kimonjororyot; Riip inyee eng' ooindap kimnateng'ung' che kagitoorchi meet; 
Psalms79:12 Ak iyaakyi pororyosyek che neegiteenech konyil tisap eng' tegetikwak Kerennywa po kong', ne kigerin kong', inyee, ee Kiptaiyat." 
Psalms79:13 Ak acheek anyun, che ki piiguk ak keechiiregap akweeng'ung', Kemwaun kongoi koigeny: Ak kimwaitoi kalasuneng'ung' eng' ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms80:1 Ep iit, ee Mestowotap Israel, Inyee ne indochini Joseph ko uu akweetap keechiirek; Iluu, inyee ne itebee kerubisyek." 
Psalms80:2 Ing'eet kimnateng'ung' eng' taitap Ephraim, ak Benjamin, ak Manasseh, ak inyoo isarwech." 
Psalms80:3 Ee Kamuktaindet, weektech kogeny; ak ingokweng'is togeng'ung', si kesarwech." 
Psalms80:4 Ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek, inereekyini saaetap piiguk kot kotyanit?" 
Psalms80:5 Ki ibae icheek amitwogigap peegap kong', ak ki inage peegap kong' koee eng' kerutyet ne oo." 
Psalms80:6 Iyaech keegu che moitoseech pororyosyek che neegiteenech: ak roritos puunikyok icheegei eng' icheegei. 
Psalms80:7 Ee Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, weektech; Ak ingokweng'is togeng'ung', si kesarwech." 
Psalms80:8 Ki ibu inyee sabibuk eng' Misiri: ki ioon pororyosyek, ak imin sabibunooto." 
Psalms80:9 Kisip ichopchi poroindo, Ak ki pa ng'wony oriit tigitikyik, ak koyom emet." 
Psalms80:10 Ki iuur urwennyi tuloonook, Ak ki kergei mooriikyik ak taragonigap Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms80:11 Ki iwaakta mooriikyik kot koit nyanjetap Mediterenian, Ak kong'atos che ng'orng'or kot koit aineet." 
Psalms80:12 Amu nee si ibut ng'otonokyik, Si kobut age tugul ne siirtoi logoekyik?" 
Psalms80:13 Ng'emei icheek toret ne punu timiin, Ak koamei tyong'igap warenget." 
Psalms80:14 Kisaain, acheek ee Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, keele, iweege: Keer oli eng' kipsengwet, ak igeer, ak irutoochi sabibuniito," 
Psalms80:15 Ak keetit ne ki imiine eung'ung' ne po tai, Ak temeet ne ki igimityige." 
Psalms80:16 Kigebeel eng' maat, ak kigeep: Lustos eng' kereetap kong' ne po togeng'ung'." 
Psalms80:17 Ingotebee eung'ung' chiitap eung'ung' ne po tai, Eng' weeriitap chii ne ki igimityige." 
Psalms80:18 Si ma kegetyinige let kemetoin: Isoobech, si keguur kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms80:19 Ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek, weektech kogeny; Ingokweng'is togeng'ung', si kesarwech." 
Psalms81:1 Otyenji Kamuktaindet eng' kutit ne oo, ineendet kimnateennyo; otyenji Kamuktaindetap Jakobo eng' poiboiyet." 
Psalms81:2 Otyen tyendap kalasunet, ak obir sugutit ne ming'in, ketubet ne tinyei cheet ne rurei, ak kibugandet." 
Psalms81:3 Oguut iryageet ko kaleel arawet, ye kagoeet arawet, eng' peetuunnyo ne po igoorto ne oo." 
Psalms81:4 Amu ng'atuutyet niito eng' Israel, kirwoogetap Kamuktaindetap Jakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Ki ng'at niito koek paornateet eng' Joseph, ye kingo manda eng' emetap Misiri, ole ki agase kutit ne ma anai." 
Psalms81:6 Ki aistoe tigikyennyi mileet: ki kiistoe eunekyik kitongok. 
Psalms81:7 Ki iguurse eng' nyalilda, ak ki asaruun; Ak ki awolun eng' ole ung'aat ne po tuleet; Ki atyemin eng' ole mi peegap Meribah." 
Psalms81:8 Ogas, okweek piikyuk, si abaoryanwok: Ee Israel, ndechame iepcha iit!" 
Psalms81:9 Amat kobiitunenen kanamwet ne too; Anan igutung'ji kamuktain age tugul ne po pororyosyek alak. 
Psalms81:10 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', Ne ki amutun itogosu eng' emetap Misiri: Iseng'eng'e, si anyiit kuting'ung'." 
Psalms81:11 Ago ki ma epchi iit kutinnyu piikyuk; Ak ki ma ko magena kiy Israel. 
Psalms81:12 Ki aunde anyun koba eng' uuindap mugulelwekwak, Si kobendatee kirwoogutikwak." 
Psalms81:13 Pwo! Nda kiga epcha iit piikyuk, Ee, nda kiga cham Israel kobendatee ortinwekyuk!" 
Psalms81:14 Ta kasip aterteerchi puunikwak, Ak aluukyi eunnyu usiikwak." 
Psalms81:15 Yaegei koek che kase iit icheeget che wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ago kata teptoi peetuusyekwak koigeny. 
Psalms81:16 Kata pae icheek nganuuk che neryootiin kosiir: Ak kata abaenen kumyat ne punu rwandet kot ibiye. 
Psalms82:1 Tononi Kamuktaindet eng' tuiyet ne oo ne po kipsengwet; irwoochi Kamuktaindet eng' kwenutap kamuktaik. 
Psalms82:2 Orwoochi kirwooget ne ma po iman kot kotyanit, ak ogonyiti kiptengeginik?" 
Psalms82:3 Orwooksechinechi ne panan ak ne ma tinyei sigiik: Oyachi ne po iman che kinyaliili ak ponoonik. 
Psalms82:4 Osaru kibananiat ak ne ma tinyei kiy: Osaru icheek eng' eunegap kiptengeginik. 
Psalms82:5 Ma ingen kiy, ama iguitos kiy; Pendi komosi ak komosi eng' mesundeito: Kibotanso lumeiywek tugul che po ng'wony." 
Psalms82:6 Ki amwa ale, “Oo kamuktaik, ak okweek tugul ko oo weeriigap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising';" 
Psalms82:7 nganda uu nooto, obegu ko uu piik, ak obutosi ko uu age eng' pounik.”" 
Psalms82:8 Ee Kamuktaindet, ng'eet, irwooksechi ng'wony: Amu tuun egu pororyosyek tugul poroteng'ung'." 
Psalms83:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, amesiis: amesiis, amemuuny, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms83:2 Amu, keero, poldos puuniguk, ak kagoyot metowekwak icheeget che wechin." 
Psalms83:3 Kagotuiyogei si korwooch kirwooget ne ya agobo piiguk, ak ko tetei ng'aalseet agobo cheguuk che ung'ootiin." 
Psalms83:4 Ki kole icheek, “Obwa, keng'eti si mata koek pororyet: si ma kibwaati kainetap Israel kogeny.”" 
Psalms83:5 Amu kigong'alaaljigei ak kogasyin; Yaei icheek arorutyet si kogirinden: 
Psalms83:6 Emaisyegap Edom ak Ismaelik; Moab, ak Hagarenik;" 
Psalms83:7 Gebal, ak Ammon, ak Amelek; Philistia, kobooto icheek che menyei Tyro:" 
Psalms83:8 Kanamgei agine Assyria kobooto icheek; Kogotoret lagogap Lot. 
Psalms83:9 Yachi icheek ko uu ye ki iyachi Midian; Ko uu ye ki iyachi Sisera, ak Jabin, eng' aineet Kison:" 
Psalms83:10 Che ki pekyi En-dor; Ki ek ng'atateek che po ng'wony. 
Psalms83:11 Yachi piikwak che taagunotiin kogergeit ak Oreb ak Seeb; Ee, yachi pounikwak tugul kogergeit ak Seba ak Salmuna:" 
Psalms83:12 Che ki mwa kole, ongenam kobunjech Meng'otosyegap Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms83:13 Ee Kamuktaindennyu, yai icheek koek temburyek che arureni; Ko uu meteteek che ibei usoonet." 
Psalms83:14 Ko uu maat ne peelei timiin, Ak ko uu liplibenet ne peelei tuloonook;" 
Psalms83:15 Oon icheek anyun eng' kipchurchuryeng'ung', Ak imu icheek eng' usooneng'ung' ne kiim." 
Psalms83:16 Inyiit teweernateet togoochikwak; Si kobiit kocheeng' kaineng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms83:17 Ingolilanso ak koiyweis koigeny; Ee, ingoteweerogis ak kolusyo:" 
Psalms83:18 Si kobiit konai kole inyeendet inyegei ne kaineng'ung' ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Inyee ko ii Ne Toroor Miising' ne pou ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms84:1 Korooron ne tya kooriguk, Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek!" 
Psalms84:2 Amei emo saboondanyu, ee, machei kotanui agobo seremusyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Tyenjin muguleldanyu ak poortanyu, Kamuktaindet ne sabei." 
Psalms84:3 Kagonyoor chepkelembut koot, Ak kagonyoor kibiswet keswet, ole iichin, Agot eng' kaptisisyosyeguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Laitoryandennyu ak ko Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms84:4 Poiboen icheek che menyei koong'ung': Ilasun kotugul. 
Psalms84:5 Paibai chii ne mi kimnateennyi eng' inyee; Ineendet ne mi muguleldanyi ortinwek che paroen che pendi Zion. 
Psalms84:6 Ye punei icheek atebweetap Riirek koyai koek kong'igap peek; Ilaakyin perurwogik ropta ne po tai. 
Psalms84:7 Pendi kong'etee kimnateet agoi kimnateet, Taagu age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet eng' Zion." 
Psalms84:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, kas saaennyu, Ep iit, Kamuktaindetap Jakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Keer, ee Kamuktaindet ne I long'ennyo, Ak igeer togeetap neng'ung' ne iilaat." 
Psalms84:10 Myee peetuut agenge ne atebee seremusyeguk kosiir eliphuut. Achame ariip kurgeetap kootap Kamuktaindennyu, Kosiir ameny emaisyegap kiptengeginik." 
Psalms84:11 Amu Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ko uu asiista ak long'eet: Koonu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myeeindo ak teegisto: Maete icheek che pendoti eng' imanda kiy age tugul ne myee. 
Psalms84:12 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Paibai chii ne imang'un." 
Psalms85:1 Ki iriree emeng'ung', inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki iweegu Jakobo konyo eng' ole kiga luul ineendet." 
Psalms85:2 Ki inyochi kaat piiguk eng' tengekwogikwak, ki ituch tengektonywa tugul." 
Psalms85:3 Ki iste nereegeguk tugul: Ki ituktoochi patai koroomnatetap nereegeguk. 
Psalms85:4 Weekyeige, Kamuktaindetap yetunennyo. Ak ingosiisyo nereegeguk che tokyineigei." 
Psalms85:5 Tos inereekyinech agoi? Tos isube nereegeguk ibinwek tugul? 
Psalms85:6 Tos ma isoobech kogeny, si kobiit koboiboitunenen piiguk?" 
Psalms85:7 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, iboorwech rireeneng'ung', ak igoonech yetuneng'ung'." 
Psalms85:8 Nan agas kiit ne mwaei Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu mwachin kaalyeet piikyik, chechiik che tiliileen; ago amat kota koweekyigei perberyo." 
Psalms85:9 Iman neegitee yetunennyi icheek che iywei ineendet; Si komeny telunateet emennyo. 
Psalms85:10 Katuiyo rireenet ak imanda; Kang'ututkei imanda ak kaalyeet. 
Psalms85:11 Kabiitune imanda ng'wony; Ak ing'ururi ng'wony imanda eng' kipsengwet. 
Psalms85:12 Ee, koonu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne myee; Ak koiyiei emennyo ruratennyi." 
Psalms85:13 Wendi imanda kondoe ineendet; ak kochopchin ooreet kakwautikyik. 
Psalms86:1 Ing'uruuge kasa, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak iwolwoo; Amu aa kibanania ama tinye kiy." 
Psalms86:2 Riip saboondanyu; amu aa chii ne po iman: Ee inyee Kamuktaindennyu, saru kiboityondeng'ung' ne imang'un." 
Psalms86:3 Rireena, ee Kiptaiyat; Amu ariirchinin peet komugul." 
Psalms86:4 Ibaibai saboondap kiboityondeng'ung'; Amu atokyinin saboondanyu, ee Kiptaiyat." 
Psalms86:5 Amu ii myee inyee Kiptaiyat, ak ii choboot inyochi kaat, Ak itinye chaang'indap rireenetapkei eng' icheek che kuurin." 
Psalms86:6 Kaswa saaennyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Epchi iit kutitap soomutikyuk." 
Psalms86:7 Aguurin eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu; Amu iwolwoo. 
Psalms86:8 Ma mi ne uu inyee eng' kamuktaik, ee Kiptaiyat; Ama mi poisyonik alak che uu cheguuk." 
Psalms86:9 Tuun pwoonei pororyosyek tugul che ki iyae Ak kogutung'so eng' taing'ung', ee Kiptaiyat; Ak kotoroor icheek kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms86:10 Amu ii oo, ak iyae kwang'utik; Ii Kamuktaindet inyegei." 
Psalms86:11 Ineeta oreng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; si awendotee imandang'ung': Ituiye muguleldanyu si koywei kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms86:12 Alasun, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindennyu, eng' muguleldanyu komugul; Ak atoroori kaineng'ung' koigeny." 
Psalms86:13 Amu oo rireeneng'ung' eng' anee; Ak ki isaru saboondanyu eng' keriinget ne loo miising'. 
Psalms86:14 Ee Kamuktaindet, kagong'eetya menotik, Kogocheeng' saboondanyu tuiyetap sogoranik, Ak ma ibwaatin icheek." 
Psalms86:15 Ago inyee, ee Kiptaiyat, ko ii Kamuktaindet ne nyiitaat rireenet ak ko po myeeindo, Ne ma sip konereechi, ne tinyei chaang'indap rireenetapkei ak imanit." 
Psalms86:16 Weekyage, ak irireena; Igoochi kimnateng'ung' kiboityondeng'ung', Ak isaru weeriitap otwogindeng'ung' ne tye." 
Psalms86:17 Yaiywo kaboorunet ne po myeeindo: Si kogeer che wecho ak kolilaanso, Amu kaitoreta, inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kaigaigaa." 
Psalms87:1 Mi lumeiywondennyi tuloonook che tiliileen. 
Psalms87:2 Chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kurgotigap Zion Kosiir meng'otosyek tugul che po Jakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Kimwaitaenen tuguugap teegisto, Ee inyee nganaseetap Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms87:4 Amwae kainetap Rahab ak Babilon eng' icheek che ingeno: Ogeer Philistia, ak Tyro, kobooto Kush; Ki kisikyin chiichi olooto." 
Psalms87:5 Ee, kimwaei agobo Zion keele, “Ki kisikyin olooto chiichi ak chiichoo;” ak igimiti Ne Toroor Miising' ineendet." 
Psalms87:6 Tuun iiti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye sirei piik, kole Ki kisikyin chiichi olooto." 
Psalms87:7 Mwaei icheek che tyeni ak icheeget che urerendos kole, Miitei oldang'ung' kong'iikyuk tugul che po peek." 
Psalms88:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap yetunennyu, Kaariir eng' taing'ung' peet ak kemoi:" 
Psalms88:2 Ingonyo saaennyu oldang'ung'; Epchi iit riirekyuk: 
Psalms88:3 Amu nyiitaat nyalilwogik saboondanyu, Ak kagoriikta saboondanyu ye mi meet." 
Psalms88:4 Kagiitita che choorchingei keriinget; Auu chii ne ma tinyei toreto: 
Psalms88:5 Ki kiwiircha ye mi che ki kobek, Ko uu che kigebar, che ruitos eng' kererit, Che ma ibwaati inyee kogeny; Ak kigeisto eng' eung'ung'." 
Psalms88:6 Kaindea keriinget ne loo miising', Eng' oldinwegap mesundeito, eng' rirosyek." 
Psalms88:7 Irurunya nereegeguk, Ak kainyalila eng' peeguk tugul che mildogei." 
Psalms88:8 Kaistoena che kingenge kolooegitu; kaiyaa aek ne wegot eng' icheek. Kigegera ak ma amuuchi among' saang'. 
Psalms88:9 Kagochuchuiso konyekyuk amu nyalilda: Aguurin peetuut age tugul, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kaayogaun eunekyuk." 
Psalms88:10 Tos iboorchi kwang'utik piik che ki kobek? Tos ng'eetyo che ki kobek si kolasun? 
Psalms88:11 Tos kiboortoi chamyeng'ung' ne tala eng' kererit? Anan imandang'ung' eng' ye mi ng'emisyet? 
Psalms88:12 Tos naaksei kwang'utiguk eng' mesundeito? Tos naaksei imandang'ung' eng' emet ne po piik che ki keutye? 
Psalms88:13 Ago ki ariirchin, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ak nyoonei saaennyu karon oldang'ung'." 
Psalms88:14 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu nee si ioon saboondanyu? Amu nee si iung'ena togeng'ung'?" 
Psalms88:15 Ki kinyalila kobooch koa ming'in agoi ra, ak neegit ame: Atoptobeni ye amuitoi agobo kamuisosyeguk." 
Psalms88:16 Katucha nereegeguk che laldos; Kagowong'wa kamuisosyeguk. 
Psalms88:17 Ki pwa koyiema ko uu peek peetuut komugul; Ki yiema komoswek tugul. 
Psalms88:18 Ki istoena chamaneet ak chorweet, Ak miitei mesundeito icheek che ingeno." 
Psalms89:1 Atyeni agobo rireenetapkei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koigeny: Aboortoi eng' kutinnyu imandang'ung' eng' ibinwek tugul. 
Psalms89:2 Amu ki ale, Teegoksei koigeny rireenetapkei. Igimiit imandang'ung' eng' kipsengwet." 
Psalms89:3 Ki imwa ile, “Ki kiyomiske ak nenyu ne ki alewen, ki ayosyechi Daudi kiboityondennyu aleenji:" 
Psalms89:4 ‘Agimiiti kesweguk koigeny, ak agimiiti ng'echereeng'ung' ne po laitornatet agoi ibinwek tugul.’ ”" 
Psalms89:5 Ilasu kipsengwet kwang'utiguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Ak ilasu agine imandang'ung' eng' tuiyetap che tiliileen." 
Psalms89:6 Amu mi ng'oo eng' parak ne kirogendoe Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Tos mi ng'oo eng' weeriigap che kiimeen ne kergei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Psalms89:7 Ineendet Kamuktaindet ne kiywei miising' eng' tuiyetap che tiliileen, Ne kiywei kosiir tugul che kiyiem ineendet?" 
Psalms89:8 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, Ng'oo ne po kamuktaet ko uu inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak yiemin imandang'ung'." 
Psalms89:9 Inyee ne ibou wasetapkei ne po nyanjet: Ye kang'eet mildaennyi pogei igeregong' kosiis. 
Psalms89:10 Ki ituatui Rahab ko uu ne kagebar. Ki iyeste puuniguk eng' eutap kimnateng'ung'. 
Psalms89:11 Cheguuk kipsengwet ak ng'wony agine: Inyee ne ki iyai ng'wony ak che nyiitaat olooto. 
Psalms89:12 Ki itau iyai murot kaataam ak murot tai: Tyendos eng' poiboiyet Tabor ak Hermon eng' kaineng'ung'. 
Psalms89:13 Itinye euut ne po kamuktaet: Kiim eung'ung', ak toroor eung'ung' ne po tai." 
Psalms89:14 Ole tebee ng'echereeng'ung' ne po pounateet ko imanda ak kirwooget: Indoenen rireenetapkei ak imanit. 
Psalms89:15 Poiboen piik che ingen tyendap poiboiyet: Pendote icheek lapkeiyetap togeng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms89:16 Igasegei peetuut komugul eng' kaineng'ung': Ak kitoroori icheek eng' imandang'ung'. 
Psalms89:17 Amu inyee karaaranindap kimnateennywa: Ak kitoroori kuinennyo eng' chameng'ung'. 
Psalms89:18 Amu po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor long'ennyo; Ak po Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel laitoryandennyo. 
Psalms89:19 Ki ing'alaalji anyun cheguuk che tiliileen eng' ng'ang'utik, Ak ileenjini, Kaalaakyi toreteet ineendet ne nyigan; Ki atoroor ne ki kilewen eng' piik." 
Psalms89:20 Ki anyooru Daudi kiboityondennyu; Ki aiile ineendet mwaitanyu ne tiliil: 
Psalms89:21 Ne tuun kimitu eunnyu eng' ineendet; Igimiiti agine eunnyu ineendet. 
Psalms89:22 Ma imuuchi puunyoot koyachi ineendet kiy ne ya; Anan konyaliil weeriitap yaityet ineendet. 
Psalms89:23 Atuatui puunikyik eng' tainnyi, Ak abir che wechei ineendet." 
Psalms89:24 Ak tebyei kobooto ineendet imandanyu ak rireenennyu; Ak tororitu kuinennyi eng' kainennyu. 
Psalms89:25 Agoochini eunnyi koboi nyanjet, Ak koboi ainoosyek eunnyi ne po tai." 
Psalms89:26 Riirchino koleen, Ii abba inyee, Kamuktaindennyu, ak rwandetap yetunennyu." 
Psalms89:27 Ayae ineendet koek taaitanyu, Koeet kosiir laitorinik tugul che po ng'wony." 
Psalms89:28 Agonorchini rireenennyu koigeny, Ak tononi eng' kimnateet kayomisennyu kobooto ineendet." 
Psalms89:29 Achamjini iyotennyi agine kotebi koigeny. Ak ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet ko uu peetuusyegap kipsengwet. 
Psalms89:30 Ago ngo pagaakta lagokyik ng'atuutyennyu, Ak ngo ma pendatee kirwoogutikyuk;" 
Psalms89:31 Ngot kobut kaneetisyosyekyuk, ak ngo ma riip ng'atuutikyuk;" 
Psalms89:32 atigoone anyun pistoennywa kirokto, ak atigoone tengektonywa pirutik." 
Psalms89:33 Ago ma istoi rireenennyu kot kogestagei eng' ineendet, Amayae koek puch imandanyu." 
Psalms89:34 Mabute kayomisennyu, Amawale kiit ne ki mang'une kutinnyu." 
Psalms89:35 Ki ayosye konyil agenge eng' tiliilindanyu; Ale, Ma perberi Daudi;" 
Psalms89:36 Tebyei iyotennyi koigeny, Ak ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet ko uu asiista eng' tainnyu." 
Psalms89:37 Ki kimiti koigeny ko uu arawet, Ak ko uu paornateet ne po iman ne mi parak." 
Psalms89:38 Ago kiitimde ak ieesye, Ki inereekyi neng'ung' ne iilaat." 
Psalms89:39 Ki isas kayomiset ne po kiboityondeng'ung'; ak ki ing'wanit naaryeennyi ne po laitornatet kot iwiirchi ng'wony. 
Psalms89:40 Ki ibut ng'otonokyik tugul; Ki iluul irimoikyik. 
Psalms89:41 Rebe ineendet tuguukyik piik che siirtoi: Ki koek ne iteweerat eng' piigap kokwennyi. 
Psalms89:42 Ki itoroor eutap tai ne po puunikyik; Ki igoochi puunikyik tugul koboiboitu. 
Psalms89:43 Ee, ki iweekyi let ng'atiibiindap rotwennyi ne po chok, Ama igoochi kobelis eng' lugeet." 
Psalms89:44 Ki iunde tiliilindanyi kogeskei. Ak ki iwiirchi ng'wony ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet. 
Psalms89:45 Ki itil kong'ering'itu peetuusyegap ming'inatennyi; Ki ilaakyi ineendet teweernateet. 
Psalms89:46 Iunyegei kot kotyanit, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Laldos nereegeguk ko uu maat kot kotyanit?" 
Psalms89:47 Ee, ibwaat ole tee nwagindap peetuusyekyuk: Ki itau iyai weeriik tugul che po piik koek puch agobo nee?" 
Psalms89:48 Tos ng'oo chii ne sabei ne ma keerei meet, Ne tos sar saboondanyi eng' kimnateetap meet?" 
Psalms89:49 Ee, Kiptaiyat, mi ano rireenosyeguk che po keny, Che ki iyasyechi Daudi eng' imandang'ung'?" 
Psalms89:50 Ibwaat, ee Kiptaiyat, sastaet ne po kiboitiniguk; Ko uu ye aiboti eng' tegeennyu kereetap kong' ne po piik tugul che chaang';" 
Psalms89:51 Nooto ne ki kogerisye kong' puuniguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Che ki kogerate kong' kakwautigap neng'ung' ne iilaat." 
Psalms89:52 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koigeny. Amen, ak Amen." 
Psalms90:1 Ee Kiptaiyat, ki iegu ole ki menye Eng' ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms90:2 Ye kitom kobiit tuloonook, Anan ye kitom iyai emet ak ng'wonyut, Ii Kamuktaindet, kobooch keny agoi koigeny." 
Psalms90:3 Iweektoi chiito kwo temburyek; Ak ileen, “Oweege, okweek weeriigap piik.”" 
Psalms90:4 Amu kergei kenyiisyek eliphuut eng' taing'ung' Ak amut ne kogosiirto, Ak ko uu riipseet ne po kemoi." 
Psalms90:5 Imuti koba ko uu mogoochek; uu icheek kanuuget: Uu icheek karon susweek che piitos. 
Psalms90:6 Ing'atos karon, ak koeegitu; Kitemei koskoleny, ak koresyo." 
Psalms90:7 Amu kagiwong'wech eng' nereegeguk, Ak ki aragendosi eng' nyitateng'ung'." 
Psalms90:8 Ki inde tengekwogikyok taing'ung', Ak ki inde tengekwogikyok che ung'ootiin lapkeiyetap togeng'ung'." 
Psalms90:9 Amu ki kosiirto peetuusyekyok tugul eng' nereegeguk: Kiwong'u acheek kenyiisyekyok ko uu atindyot ne ki kimwa. 
Psalms90:10 Peetuusyegap kenyiisyekyok koitei kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap, Ago eng' che kiimeen koitei tamanwogik sisiit; Ago menatennywa ko nyalilda ak arageneet; Amu choktoi ko uu nooto, ak keebe kesiirte." 
Psalms90:11 Ng'oo ne ingen kimnateetap nereegeguk, Ak nereegeguk che ng'woneen, ko uu ye nyoljin kiywein?" 
Psalms90:12 Ineetech anyun kiit peetuusyekyok, Si kobiit kesich muguleldo ne po utaatyet." 
Psalms90:13 Weeguge, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; tyanitu? Ak irireegei kiboitiniguk." 
Psalms90:14 Ee, paech kebiye eng' rireeneng'ung' karon; Si kobiit keboiboitu ak kigaskei eng' peetuusyekyok tugul." 
Psalms90:15 Ibaibaech eng' peetuusyek che tee che ki inyalilech, Che tee kenyiisyek che ki kigeer yaityet." 
Psalms90:16 Ingotook poisyoniguk eng' kiboitiniguk, Ak telunateng'ung' eng' lagokwak." 
Psalms90:17 Ak ingotebenech karaaranindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo: Ak igimitwech poisyonigap eunekyok; Ee, igimit poisyonigap eunekyok." 
Psalms91:1 Ineendet ne menyei ole ung'aat ne po Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' Kotebee nooto urwetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet. 
Psalms91:2 Amwae agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ale, Ineendet ole amwechini ak ko irimennyu; Kamuktaindennyu ne amang'u." 
Psalms91:3 Amu saruun eng' mesteetap namindetap toriitik, Ak eng' koroito ne parisyei." 
Psalms91:4 Tugenen koroorikyik, Ak inyooru ole imwechini eng' kebebaikyik: Imandanyi ko long'eet ak ne kiteektoegei." 
Psalms91:5 Meiywei kamuisetap kemoi, Anan kipchabet ne kimwoktoi peet;" 
Psalms91:6 Anan koroito ne wendoti eng' mesundeito, Anan ng'emisyet ne parisyei peet." 
Psalms91:7 Ibutos eliphuut eng' ole neegiteenen, Ak ibutos eliphuusyek tamanu eng' ole neegitee eung'ung' ne po tai; Ago mariikyinin." 
Psalms91:8 Ago igeere eng' konyeguk, Igeere melektap kiptengeginik." 
Psalms91:9 Amu inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ii ole amwechini! Ki iyai Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' koek meng'ooteng'ung';" 
Psalms91:10 Ma nyoorun yaityet age tugul, Mariikyin koong'ung' koroito age tugul." 
Psalms91:11 Amu iyomisi malaikaisyekyik koriibin, Si koriibin eng' ortinweguk tugul." 
Psalms91:12 Kanabin eng' eunekwak, Si marus koita keeldong'ung'." 
Psalms91:13 Ityeche ng'etundo ak ereneet: Ityeche eng' keelyeguk ng'etundo ne neran ak cheluguit. 
Psalms91:14 Amu kigochama, asaru eng' nooto anyun: Atoroori ineendet, amu ki konai kainennyu." 
Psalms91:15 Kuura, ak aitenji; kitebyei tuwai eng' nyalilda, asaru ineendet ak agoonyit." 
Psalms91:16 Agoochini ineendet kosap kenyiisyek che chaang', Ak aboorchini yetunennyu." 
Psalms92:1 Kiit ne myee ko keeweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ak ketyenji kaineng'ung' eng' kalasunoik, ee inyee Ne Toroor Miising':" 
Psalms92:2 Kibarta chamyeng'ung' ne tala karon, Ak imandang'ung' lagatut age tugul," 
Psalms92:3 Eng' kibugandet ne tinyei inoik taman, ak kibugandet age; Kobooto ketubet ne cheei miising'." 
Psalms92:4 Amu ki ibaibaa, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' poisyeng'ung': Agasigei eng' poisyonigap euneguk." 
Psalms92:5 Eechen ne tya poisyoniguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ma tinyei ole poochin kabwaatutiguk." 
Psalms92:6 Ma ingen chiito ne uu tyony; Ama iguitos ne perber; 
Psalms92:7 Ye kaeegitu kiptengeginik ko uu susweek, Ak ye kanyoor perurto yaigap tengekto; Ko si keng'em agoi koigeny:" 
Psalms92:8 Ago inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, imi parak agoi koigeny." 
Psalms92:9 Amu, keero, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, puuniguk, Amu, keero, lustos puuniguk. Kiyestooti yaigap tengekto tugul." 
Psalms92:10 Ago kiitoroor kuinennyu ko uu kuinetap soet: Kagiilena mwaita ne karaaran. 
Psalms92:11 Kogogeer konyekyuk ak icheek magennyu eng' puunikyuk, Ak kogogas itiikyuk magennyu eng' yaigap yaityo che setyina." 
Psalms92:12 Sabei ne po imanda ko uu tiiret: piitei ko uu tarakwetap Lebanon. 
Psalms92:13 Icheeget che ki kiminji kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Koeegitu eng' seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindennyo. 
Psalms92:14 Ta koiitos agot ko kagoosegitu; Tuonitu amu peek che eei, ak kotunendos:" 
Psalms92:15 Si kobiit kobarta kole po iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Ineendet rwandennyu, ama mi kiy ne ma po iman eng' ineendet." 
Psalms93:1 Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ilaagat eng' telunateet; Ilaagat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kigermenegei kimnateet: Ki kigimit ng'wony, si ma ng'eigei." 
Psalms93:2 Ki kigimit ng'echereeng'ung' ne po laitornatet kobooch keny: Ki imi kobooch keny agoi. 
Psalms93:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tuldos ainoosyek, Kigong'eet ainoosyek tuleennywa; Ing'eeti maranosyek mildaennywa pogei." 
Psalms93:4 Kiim Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' parak, Kosiir tuleetap peek che chaang', Kosiir mildaetapkei ne kiim ne po nyanjet." 
Psalms93:5 Lumdootin paornatosyeguk: Nyoljin koong'ung' tiliilindo, Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi koigeny." 
Psalms94:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee Kamuktaindet ne po yaaktaetap mugetuut, Iluu, inyee Kamuktaindet ne po yaaktaetap mugetuut." 
Psalms94:2 Ng'eet, inyee kirwoogindetap ng'wony: Igeerchi menotik ko uu ye nyoljin." 
Psalms94:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tyanitu, Iterteerisyei kiptengeginik kot kotyanit?" 
Psalms94:4 Ng'alaalati icheek ng'aleek che chaang', ng'alaale menoteet: Ilasugei yaik tugul che po tengekto." 
Psalms94:5 Tuatui icheek piiguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ak konyalili icheek poroteng'ung'." 
Psalms94:6 Parei mosoget ak toondet, Ak rumei che ma tinyei sigiik." 
Psalms94:7 Ak koleen, Ma keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ama mage kiy Kamuktaindetap Jakobo." 
Psalms94:8 Obwaat, okweek che o koseng'eng'inik eng' kwenutap piik: Ak okweek che oo perberen, ong'omegitu auyo?" 
Psalms94:9 Tos ineendet ne kiyaei itit, koma kastoi? Tos ineendet ne kiyaei koonyek, koma keertoi?" 
Psalms94:10 Tos ma itigoni ineendet ne kere kong' pororyosyek, Ne ineendet ne ineeti piik naet?" 
Psalms94:11 Ingen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutigap chii, Kole puch." 
Psalms94:12 Igasegei chii ne igeregong', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ak ineeti eng' ng'atuutiguk;" 
Psalms94:13 Si kobiit imuung'ji eng' peetuusyegap nyalilda, Agoi kebalji keriinget kiptengeginik." 
Psalms94:14 Amu ma toortai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik, Ama metoi porotennyi." 
Psalms94:15 Amu weekyingei kirwooget imanda: Ak kosubi nooto tugul che po iman eng' mugulelwekwak. 
Psalms94:16 Tos ng'oo ne ng'eetei kotoreta eng' yaigap yaityo? Tos ng'oo ne tononi kotoreta eng' kiptengeginik? 
Psalms94:17 Nda ki ma ek toreteennyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ta kiga kochaakta saboondanyu komeny ye mi siisek." 
Psalms94:18 Ye kinga le, Ichaboitoi keldanyu, Kotiia rireeneng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms94:19 Eng' chaang'indap kabwaatutik che mi oriitinnyu koboiboi kagaigaosyeguk saboondanyu. 
Psalms94:20 Tinyei yamdaet nee ng'echereetap pounatetap tengekwogik ak inyee, Ne chobei yaitwogik eng' ng'atuutik?" 
Psalms94:21 Iyumigei agobo saboondap ne po iman, Ak korwookyi korotiik che ma tinyei tengek." 
Psalms94:22 Ago ki koek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor irimennyu ne kooi; Ak Kamuktaindennyu rwandet ne amwechini. 
Psalms94:23 Ak ki koweekyi icheek tengektonywa, Ak koisto icheek amu tengektonywa; Ak kowong' icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms95:1 Obwa, ongetyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ongetyenji rwandetap yetunennyo eng' kutitap poiboiyet." 
Psalms95:2 Ongebwa tainnyi keeweekyi kongoi, Ongetyenji ineendet eng' kutitap poiboiyet eng' tyenwogigap kalasunet." 
Psalms95:3 Amu Kamuktaindet ne oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ineendet laitoryat ne oo ne siirei kamuktaik tugul." 
Psalms95:4 Mi eunnyi komoswegap oriit che po ng'wony; Ak chechiik ak icheek walisyegap tuloonook. 
Psalms95:5 Nenyi nyanjet, ineendet ne kiyaei; Ak kiyaei eunekyik emet ne yaamaat." 
Psalms95:6 Obwa kilasu, ak king'uruukyi; Ongegutung'se eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Yaindennyo:" 
Psalms95:7 Amu ineendet Kamuktaindennyo, Ak ki piik che po akweennyi, keechiiregap eunnyi, Ee, kata myee ngo kas okweek kutinnyi rani!" 
Psalms95:8 Amat ouiit mugulelwekwok, ko uu eng' Meribah, Ko uu eng' peetuutap Massah eng' surkwen:" 
Psalms95:9 Ye kiyoma kwanisyekwok, Kotyema, ak ki keer poisyennyu." 
Psalms95:10 Ki aaragen kenyiisyek artam eng' ibinooto, Ak ki ale, Icheeget ko piik che mastoi eng' mugulelwekwak, Ak tomo konai ortinwekyuk:" 
Psalms95:11 Ki ayosye anyun eng' nereegekyuk, Ale, Ma itei icheek kamuung'ennyu." 
Psalms96:1 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tyendo ne leel: Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms96:2 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, oberuur kainennyi; Obarte yetunennyi eng' peetuut agoi peetuut." 
Psalms96:3 Omwaite toroornatennyi eng' pororyosyek, Ak poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee eng' piik tugul." 
Psalms96:4 Amu oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nyolu kilas ineendet miising': Kanyool kiywei ineendet kosiir kamuktaik tugul." 
Psalms96:5 Amu kamuktaik tugul che po piik koma tilei kiy: Ago kiyaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kipsengwet. 
Psalms96:6 Mi tainnyi teegisto ak etunateet: Mi koonnyi ne tiliil kimnateet ak korooronindo. 
Psalms96:7 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek tilyonutigap piik, Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor toroornatet ak kimnateet." 
Psalms96:8 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor toroornatet ne nyoljin kainennyi: Oibu kagoochinet, ak obwa seremusyekyik." 
Psalms96:9 Ogutung'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' karaaranindap tiliilindo: Potan eng' tainnyi, ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms96:10 Omwa eng' pororyosyek ole, Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ki kigimit ng'wony si ma ng'eigei: Irwookyin piik eng' imanda." 
Psalms96:11 Ingogaskei kipsengwet, ak ingobaibait ng'wony; Ingomoror nyanjet, ak tuguuk che nyiitaat olooto;" 
Psalms96:12 Ingogaskei mbareenik, kobooto tugul che mi olooto; Si kotyenso anyun eng' poiboiyet keetiik tugul che mi timiin;" 
Psalms96:13 Eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu nyoonei: Amu nyoonei korwookyin ng'wony, Irwookyin ng'wony eng' imanda, Ak korwookyin piik eng' imandanyi." 
Psalms97:1 Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ingobaibait ng'wony; ingogaskei emotinwek che chaang' che mi ngeguusyek. 
Psalms97:2 Yiemei ineendet poolik ak mesundeito: Ole tebee ng'echerennyi ne po pounateet ko imanda ak kirwooget. 
Psalms97:3 Indoi maat eng' ineendet, Ak peelei puunikyik eng' komoswek tugul." 
Psalms97:4 Ki ikwenyi ng'wony ilotikyik; Ki keer emet, ak kobotan." 
Psalms97:5 Kichootyo tuloonook eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu temeniet, Eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne po ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms97:6 Iboortoi kipsengwet imandanyi, Ak ki kogeer piik tugul toroornatennyi." 
Psalms97:7 Ingolilanso tugul che otei kanamonik che ki kiwai, Che lasegei tuguuk che ma tilei kiy: Ogutung'ji ineendet, okweek kamuktaik tugul." 
Psalms97:8 Ki kas Zion, ak ki igaskei, Ak kiboiboitu tiibiigap Judah; Amu kirwoogutiguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms97:9 Amu inyee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ii toroor miising' eng' ng'wony komugul: Ki itororitu miising' isiir kamuktaik tugul." 
Psalms97:10 Ee okweek che ochame Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, owech yaityet; riibei saboonwegap chechiik che tiliileen; saru icheek eng' eutap kiptengeginik." 
Psalms97:11 Kigooljin lapkeiyet che po iman, Ak ki kooljin kagasetapkei che po iman eng' mugulelwek." 
Psalms97:12 Ogaaskei eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor okweek che oo po iman; Oweekyi kongoi kainennyi ne tiliil. 
Psalms98:1 Ee, otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tyendo ne leel; Amu ki koyai tuguuk che kikwong'ee: Ki yachi yetunet ineendet eunnyi ne po tai, eunnyi ne tiliil." 
Psalms98:2 Kigobarta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunennyi: Kigong'aany imandanyi eng' taitap pororyosyek. 
Psalms98:3 Kigobwaat rireenennyi ak imandanyi eng' kootap Israel: Ki kogeer tabanwek tugul che po ng'wony yetunetap Kamuktaindennyo. 
Psalms98:4 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kutitap poiboiyet, ng'wony komugul: Oong'et tyendo, ak otyen eng' poiboiyet, ee, otyen kalasunoik." 
Psalms98:5 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kalasunoik eng' ketubet; Eng' ketubet, ak eng' kutitap kalasunet." 
Psalms98:6 Eng' igondisyek, ak cheetap iryageet Otyen eng' kutitap poiboiyet eng' taitap laitoryat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms98:7 Ingomoror nyanjet, ak tuguuk che nyiitaat olooto; Ng'wony, ak icheeget che menyei olooto;" 
Psalms98:8 Ingoraprap eunekwak ainoosyek; Ingotyenso tuloonook kibagenge eng' poiboiyet; 
Psalms98:9 Eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu nyoonei korwookyin ng'wony: Tuun irwookyin ng'wony eng' imanda, Ak korwookyi piik eng' iman." 
Psalms99:1 Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ingobotanso piik: Tebee ineendet paragutap kerubik; ingobotan ng'wony. 
Psalms99:2 Oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion; Ak toroor ineendet kosiir piik tugul. 
Psalms99:3 Ingolas icheek kaineng'ung' ne oo ne imuisei. Tiliil ineendet. 
Psalms99:4 Chamei kimnateetap laitoryat kirwooget; Igimiiti imanda, Iyae kirwooget ak imanda eng' Jakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Otoroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, Ak ogutung'ji eng' ng'echereetap keelyekyik keel: Tiliil ineendet." 
Psalms99:6 Musa ak Aron eng' tisiikyik, Ak Samuel kobooto icheeget che kuurei kainennyi; Ki kuur icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ki wolji." 
Psalms99:7 Ki ng'alaalji icheek eng' toloitap pooldet: Ki riip paornatosyekyik, ak kaneetisyet ne ki igoochi." 
Psalms99:8 Iwoljini icheek, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo: Ki Kamuktaindet ne ki inyochini kaat, Agot nganda ki iyaakyi mugetuut agobo poisyonikwak." 
Psalms99:9 Otoroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, Ak ogutung'ji eng' tulweennyi ne tiliil; Amu tiliil Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms100:1 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kutitap poiboiyet, okweek emotinwek tugul." 
Psalms100:2 Oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kagasetapkei; obwa tainnyi otyenonu. 
Psalms100:3 Onai ole Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet. Ineendet ne kiyaech, ak ki chechiik; ki piikyik, ak ki keechiiregap akweennyi." 
Psalms100:4 Oba kurgotikyik kobooto mwaetap kongoi, ak obe seremusyekyik olasunoti. Oweekyi kongoi ineendet, ak oberuur kainennyi." 
Psalms100:5 Amu myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; tebyei rireenennyi koigeny, ak imandanyi eng' ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms101:1 Atyeni agobo rireenet ak kirwooget, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, atyenun kalasunoik." 
Psalms101:2 Atebye komyee eng' ng'omnateet eng' ooreet ne ititaat. Ee, inyonjino au? Awendotee muguleldo ne ititaat eng' koonnyu." 
Psalms101:3 Mandoi anee taitap konyekyuk kiy age tugul ne ya. Aweche poisyetap icheeget che mastoi; ma nama nooto. 
Psalms101:4 Istoenage muguleldo ne mastaat; ma mage kiy anai kiy age tugul ne ya. 
Psalms101:5 Ang'eme age tugul ne chaamoti chiitap kokwennyu eng' ung'oot; ma muitochini menotyo, chiito ne meenei muguleldanyi." 
Psalms101:6 Keerei konyekyuk piik che po iman eng' emet, si komeny icheek kobooton; ineendet ne wendoti eng' ooreet ne ititaat, koboisyeiwo nooto." 
Psalms101:7 Ma menyei koonnyu ineendet ne yaei ng'aalseet; ma kimiitu eng' tainnyu ineendet ne mwaei lembech. 
Psalms101:8 Ang'eme karonet age tugul kiptengeginik tugul che po emet; si kobiit aisto yaik tugul che po tengekto eng' nganaseetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms102:1 Kas saaennyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ingobwonjin riirekyuk." 
Psalms102:2 Ameung'ena togeng'ung' eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu! Epcha iit; wolwo chokyi eng' peetuut ne aguursei. 
Psalms102:3 Petos peetuusyekyuk ko uu iyeto, ak kibeelei kawekyuk ko uu kegenget." 
Psalms102:4 Kagebir muguleldanyu ko uu susweek ak kagores; ak autye agot aam amitwogikyuk. 
Psalms102:5 Amu tuugeetap tigenennyu ko kanamgei kawekyuk ak panyeek. 
Psalms102:6 Aa uu chebo kibabaa ne po surkwen; kaige anee sugurut ne po surkwen. 
Psalms102:7 Ariipsei, ak kaaegu ne kergei ak toriityon ne mi ineegei koot parak." 
Psalms102:8 Rosyina puunikyuk peetuut komugul; icheeget che wecho miising' ko poisyee kainennyu ko chubisyee. 
Psalms102:9 Aame oreek koek amitwogik, ak ki aburuch tuguukyuk che aee kobooto peegap kong'," 
Psalms102:10 amu koroomindap nereegeguk ak nyitateng'ung'; amu ki iganaba ak iwiirta. 
Psalms102:11 Uu peetuusyekyuk urwet ne iyaptagei; ak ki ares ko uu susweek. 
Psalms102:12 Ago inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ilaitorani koigeny; tebyei kabwaatetap kaineng'ung' agoi ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms102:13 Ing'eete ak iriiree Zion, amu kagoyam keriree, ee, kagoit peetuut ne ki kichopchi." 
Psalms102:14 Amu poiboitu kiboitiniguk eng' koikyik, ak ko riiree temburyekyik." 
Psalms102:15 Iywei anyun pororyosyek kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koywei laitorinik tugul che po ng'wony toroornateng'ung'." 
Psalms102:16 Teechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion, taagu inee eng' toroornatennyi." 
Psalms102:17 Kagogas saaetap kibananiat, ama sas saaennywa." 
Psalms102:18 Ngesir niito agobo ibinda ne tuun piitu; si kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `piik che tuun ki sichei. 
Psalms102:19 Ki kogeer ineendet olito po ng'wony eng' toroorindap oldanyi ne tiliil; ki keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony eng' kipsengwet," 
Psalms102:20 si kogas tigenetap kimonjororyot; si kotyach icheek che kigechopchi meet; 
Psalms102:21 si kobarta piik kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion, ak kalasunennyi eng' Jerusalem;" 
Psalms102:22 Ye kagoyumgei piik, ak laitornatosyek, si koboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms102:23 Ki yai kimnateennyu konyalul eng' ooreet; kitil peetuusyekyuk konwagitu. 
Psalms102:24 Ki ale, “Ee Kamuktaindennyu, amemuta eng' kwenutap peetuusyekyuk. Tebyei kenyisyeguk agoi ibinwek tugul.”" 
Psalms102:25 Ki iyai ole tonone ng'wony keny, ak poisyetap euneguk kipsengwet." 
Psalms102:26 Petos icheek, ago itebye inyee agoi; osegitu icheek tugul ko uu ngoryeet. Ak iwale icheek ko uu ngoryeet, ak kowalogis." 
Psalms102:27 Ago ii uu nooto inyee agoi, ama tinyei kenyisyeguk ole igeesunegei." 
Psalms102:28 Tebyei ko riibotin lagogap kiboitiniguk, ak kimitu iyotennywa eng' taing'ung'." 
Psalms103:1 Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee saboondanyu, ak ingolas kainennyi ne tiliil tugul che mi oriitinnyu." 
Psalms103:2 Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee saboondanyu, ameutyee konunoikyik tugul." 
Psalms103:3 Ineendet ne nyoun kaat tengekwogiguk tugul; ak kosaabin eng' myanwogiguk tugul," 
Psalms103:4 ineendet ne ityaachi saboondang'ung' eng' ye mi ng'emisyet; ak kolaagun kuutweetap chamyet ne tala ak rireenosyek," 
Psalms103:5 ne koonin tuguuk che myach kot koyamin si kiweegun ming'inateng'ung' ko uu kipsiichit. 
Psalms103:6 Yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poisyonigap imanda, ak kirwoogutik agobo tugul che kisastae." 
Psalms103:7 Ki iboorchi Musa ortinwekyik, ki iboorchi lagogap Israel poisyonikyik." 
Psalms103:8 Nyiitaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rireenet ak ko po myeeindo, ma sip konereechi ak tinyei rireenet ne oo." 
Psalms103:9 Ma kerei kong' kotugul, ama konori nereegekyik agoi." 
Psalms103:10 Tom koyaiywech ko uu ye nyoljin chalwogikyok, ama igeerwech ko uu tengekwogikyok." 
Psalms103:11 Amu ko uu ye toroor kipsengwet eng' ng'wony, ko uu nooto rireenennyi eng' icheek che iywei ineendet." 
Psalms103:12 Ko uu ye loochin kong'asiis ak cherongo, ko uu nooto kigoistoenech chalwogikyok kolooegitu." 
Psalms103:13 Ko uu ye riiree kwanda lagokyik, ko uu nooto riiree `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek che iywei ineendet." 
Psalms103:14 Amu ingen poorwekyok; ibwaati ineendet kole kitemburyek. 
Psalms103:15 Ago chiito, ko uu peetuusyekyik susweek; tuneni ko uu taapteet ne po kewanin;" 
Psalms103:16 amu punei yooto usoonet, ak kobetito taptanooto; ama kongen oldanyi kogeny." 
Psalms103:17 Ago tebyei rireenetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny ak koigeny eng' icheek che iywei ineendet, ak imandanyi eng' lagogap lagok," 
Psalms103:18 eng' icheek che riibei kayomisennyi, ak kobwaati koyai ng'atuutikyik." 
Psalms103:19 Kigogimiit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet eng' kipsengwet; ak pou laitornatennyi tugul. 
Psalms103:20 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek malaikaisyekyik; okweek che oo kiimeen eng' kamuktaet, che osuldoi ng'olyoondennyi, che oepchini iit tuugeetap ng'olyoondennyi." 
Psalms103:21 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek lugosyekyik tugul, okweek che oo kiboitiinikyik, che oyae magennyi." 
Psalms103:22 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek poisyonikyik tugul, eng' komoswek tugul ole pou ineendet. Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee saboondanyu." 
Psalms104:1 Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee saboondanyu. Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyu, ii oo miising'. Ilaachi teegisto ak etunateet." 
Psalms104:2 Inyee ne itugegei lapkeiyet ko uu ngoryeet; iitoi kipsengwet ko uu ngoryeet," 
Psalms104:3 Ineendet ne indoi kimurtoinigap kooriikyik peek parak, ineendet ne yaei poolik koek chepkichutinnyi, ne wendote kebebaigap usoonet:" 
Psalms104:4 ineendet ne yaei usoonaik koek chechiik che kiyooktoi, ne yaei kiboitiinikyik koek maat ne liplibeni." 
Psalms104:5 Ki ilumda lumeiywek che tonone ng'wony, si ma ki isto agoi koigeny." 
Psalms104:6 Ki ilaakyi ng'wony rireet ko uu ngoryeet; ki imaluuchi peek tuloonook. 
Psalms104:7 Ki mweiso icheek eng' kereng'ung' po kong', ki chaakta eng' cheetap tuleeng'ung'." 
Psalms104:8 Ki togosta tuloonook, ak ki choorchigei atebwosyek, agoi koit ole ki ichopchi." 
Psalms104:9 Ki inde kiwoteet si ma siir, si ma week kogeny kotuch ng'wony." 
Psalms104:10 Iyooktoi kong'igap peek korootyi atebwosyek; chokyogoni eng' tuloonook: 
Psalms104:11 Inagi peek tyondo age tugul ne po timiin; imise sigirogap timiin meleldanywa. 
Psalms104:12 Menyei toriitik che po parak ngeguusyekwak, tyendos eng' mooriikap keetiik." 
Psalms104:13 Ibise peek tuloonook eng' kooriikyik; piyonyi ng'wony logoegap poisyoniguk. 
Psalms104:14 Ibiityin tuuga susweek, ak ingweek si koboisyee chiito, si komoong' amitwogik eng' ng'wony:" 
Psalms104:15 ak divaik che iboiboi muguleldap chiito, ak mwaita ne itilyali togeennyi, ak amitwogik che igimiti muguleldap chii." 
Psalms104:16 Piyonyi peek keetiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; taragonigap Lebanon, che ki komiin." 
Psalms104:17 Ole teechei kesonokwak `toriitik; kootap cheptalamyat piribiryet. 
Psalms104:18 Po tuloonook che kooen ng'oroorek che po timiin; rwandosyek ko ole mwechin kenerok. 
Psalms104:19 Ki inde arawet si koboor peetuusyek; ingen asiista ole roroktae. 
Psalms104:20 Iyae mesundeito, ak koek kemoi, eng' nooto anyun, koguiguiyon tyony age tugul ne po timiin komong'." 
Psalms104:21 Pooriseni neranigap ng'etuunyik ye mi logeennywa, ak cheeng'ei amitwogikwak eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms104:22 Ye chor asiista komwei, ak koruiyo eng' kebenonikwak." 
Psalms104:23 Wendi chiito poisyennyi kwo kobois agoi koimen. 
Psalms104:24 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, chaang' ne tya poisyoniguk! Ki iyai tugul eng' utaatyet; nyiitaat ng'wony mogornatosyeguk." 
Psalms104:25 Mi oliin nyanjet, ne oo ak ko tebees, ole mi tuguuk che ichuutegei che ma iitoksei, tyong'ik che mengeechen ak che eecheen." 
Psalms104:26 Pendi olooto melisyek, mi olooto tyondo ne oo ne po peek, ne uu ting'ong'et, ne ki iyai kourerene olooto." 
Psalms104:27 Igenin chuuto tugul, si igoochi amitwogikwak eng' peetuusyekwak." 
Psalms104:28 Iyumi icheek chooto che igoochini; ing'aanye eung'ung' ak piyang'dos icheek tuguuk che myach. 
Psalms104:29 Ye keuny togeng'ung', kotoptobenso; ye inemu kabusennywa, kobegu icheek, ak koweektagei temburyekwak." 
Psalms104:30 Iyooktoi Kabuuseng'ung' ne Tiliil, si keyai kobiit, kosapcho; ak ichobe itoondap emet koleelit kogeny." 
Psalms104:31 Ingotep toroorindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny; Ingobaibait Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' poisyonikyik. 
Psalms104:32 Potani ng'wony ye kageer ineendet; twaei tuloonook ak koiyenso. 
Psalms104:33 Atyenjini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotee asabe; atyenjini Kamuktaindennyu kalasunet kota asabe. 
Psalms104:34 Ingochamagis kabwaatutikyuk eng' ineendet; agasigei eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms104:35 Ingiwong' kiptengeginik eng' ng'wony, ak ingobetyo che yaacheen agoi. Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee saboondanyu. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms105:1 Oweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, oguur kainennyi; ongonaak poisyonikyik eng' piik." 
Psalms105:2 Otyenji, otyenji kalasunoik; ong'alaale poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee." 
Psalms105:3 Olasunegei kainennyi ne tiliil; ingoboiboitu mugulelwegap icheek che cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms105:4 Ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kimnateennyi; ocheeng' togeennyi kotugul. 
Psalms105:5 Obwaat poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee che ki koyai, kwang'utikyik, ak kirwoogutigap kutinnyi," 
Psalms105:6 ee okweek, kesweegap Abraham kiboityondennyi, okweek lagogap Jakobo, chechiik che kigelewen." 
Psalms105:7 Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, miitei kirwoogutikyik ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms105:8 Ibwaati kayomisennyi koigeny, ng'olyoot ne ki ng'at agobo ibinwek eliphuut." 
Psalms105:9 Ne ki yai kobooto Abraham, ak kayasyoet ne ki iyasyechi Isak," 
Psalms105:10 ak ki igimityi Jakobo nooto koek ng'atuutyet, ki igimityi Israel koek kayomiset ne po koigeny," 
Psalms105:11 koleenji, “Agoonin emetap Kanaan, koek kebebertap poroteng'ung'.”" 
Psalms105:12 Ye kita ko ng'ering' pichooto, ki ng'ering' miising' ak ki toek icheek eng' olooto." 
Psalms105:13 Ki pendat kobunoot pororyet age agoi pororyet age; ki pun laitornatet age koba ye mi piik alak. 
Psalms105:14 Ki ma chamji chii koyachi icheek ne ya; ee, ki kergong' laitorinik amu icheek," 
Psalms105:15 kole, “Amat otwaa chechuuk che iilaatin, amoyachi ne ya maotikyuk.”" 
Psalms105:16 Ak ki kuur rubeet konyonji emet, ak ki til amitwogik tugul kong'ering'itu." 
Psalms105:17 Ki iyookto chii kondoe icheek; ki kialda Joseph koek otwogin. 
Psalms105:18 Ki igoochi ng'wanindo keelyekyik eng' mugurek, ki kinde ineendet ye mi karnook;" 
Psalms105:19 agoi peetuut ne ki isulda ng'olyoondennyi, ki tyem `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet." 
Psalms105:20 Ki iyookto laitoryat kityaach ineendet; agot pounindetap piik ko ki unda kwo. 
Psalms105:21 Ki inde ineendet koek kiptaiyatap koonnyi, ak pounindetap tuguukyik tugul;" 
Psalms105:22 si korat pounikyik ko uu ye machei, ak koneet poisyekyik utaatyet." 
Psalms105:23 Ki nyo Israel agine Misiri; ak ki uchi `Jakobo emetap Ham. 
Psalms105:24 Ak ki tes piikyik miising', ak kogimit icheek kosiir puunikwak." 
Psalms105:25 Ki wal mugulelwekwak kowech piikyik, si kong'aal kiboitiinikyik." 
Psalms105:26 Ki iyookto Musa kiboityondennyi, ak Aron ne kiga kolewen." 
Psalms105:27 Ki inde kwenunnywa kaboorunoikyik, ak kwang'utikyik eng' emetap Ham." 
Psalms105:28 Ki iyookto mesundeito, ak ki igoochi koimenit; ak ki ma ingelelji `icheek ng'aleekyik." 
Psalms105:29 Ki wal peekwak koek korotiik, ak kobar njireenikwak." 
Psalms105:30 Ki yom mororochik emennywa, eng' kooriigap laitorinikwak." 
Psalms105:31 Ki twek, ak ki pwa kalyang'ik ng'iisyat, ak isireek eng' kiwotosyekwak tugul." 
Psalms105:32 Ki igoochi koik ne kata ropta, ak maat ne liplibeni eng' emennywa." 
Psalms105:33 Ki pir keetiikwak ak icheek che po sabibuk ak mogoonikwak; ak ki iri keetiigap kiwotosyekwak. 
Psalms105:34 Ki twek, ak ki nyo chereng'endet, ak tinapchet, che ma iitoksei;" 
Psalms105:35 ak ki am sogoot age tugul ne po emennywa, ak ki am logoegap mbareenikwak." 
Psalms105:36 Ki par kiboretook tugul eng' emennywa, taunetap kimnateennywa." 
Psalms105:37 Ak ki imong' icheek koibei fedha ak thahabu, ak ki ma komi chii ne nyalulat agot agenge eng' pororyosyekyik." 
Psalms105:38 Ki paibait Misiri ye kingo pa; amu kiga konyoor kaiyweisyet amu icheek. 
Psalms105:39 Ki iito pooldet koek ne tuge; ak maat si kogoochi pichooto lapkeiyet kemoi. 
Psalms105:40 Ki soom ak ki igoochi toriitik che taok, ak kibae icheek amitwogigap kipsengwet kobiyo." 
Psalms105:41 Ki yaat rwandet, ak kisururgei peek; ki root eng' komoswek che yamyotiin ko uu aineet." 
Psalms105:42 Amu ki ibwaat ng'olyoondennyi ne tiliil, ak Abraham kiboityondennyi." 
Psalms105:43 Ak ki imut piikyik komong' eng' poiboiyet, ak chechiik che kigelewen kotyenonu." 
Psalms105:44 Ak ki igoochi icheek emotinwegap pororyosyek, ak ki nam poisyonigap piik kobunji;" 
Psalms105:45 si kobiit koriip kaneetisyosyekyik, ak koosup ng'atuutikyik. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms106:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ee, oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi; amu myee ineendet; amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms106:2 Ng'oo ne imuuchi komwa poisyonigap kamuktaet, che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anan ne imuuchi komwaita kalasunennyi tugul?" 
Psalms106:3 Poiboen icheek che riibei kirwooget, ak ineendet ne yaei imanda peetuusyek tugul." 
Psalms106:4 Ibwaata, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' chameet ne ichame piiguk; ee, rutocha eng' yetuneng'ung';" 
Psalms106:5 si ageer poroteetap cheguuk che kigelewen, si abaibait eng' kaagaasetapkei ne po pororyeng'ung', si aloske kobooto poroteng'ung'." 
Psalms106:6 Kigechalwogense kobooto kwanisyekyok, ki keyai tengekto, ki keyai ne ya kot." 
Psalms106:7 Ma iguiyo kwanisyekyok kwang'utiguk eng' Misiri; ma ibwaat chaang'indap rireenosyeguk; ago ki ingelelji Ne Toroor Miising' eng' ye neegit nyanjet, nooto Nyanjet ne Piriir." 
Psalms106:8 Ago ki sar icheek amu kainennyi, si kobiit konaak kimnateennyi ne po kamuktaet." 
Psalms106:9 Ki kergong' Araraita ne Piriir agine, ak ki yaam; ki indochi anyun kobun rirosyek, ko uu ye punei surkwen." 
Psalms106:10 Ak ki sar icheek eng' eutap ineendet ne kiwechei icheek, ak ki ityaach icheek eng' eutap puunyoot." 
Psalms106:11 Ak ki imaluuch peek puunikwak; ma ng'et agot agenge eng' icheek. 
Psalms106:12 Ki iyan anyun ng'aleekyik; ki tyen kalasunennyi. 
Psalms106:13 Ne matyanit koutye poisyonikyik; ma ingen ng'olyoondennyi. 
Psalms106:14 Ago kinyoor mageet ne oo eng' surkwen, ak ki tyem Kamuktaindet eng' turguito." 
Psalms106:15 Ak ki igoochi kiit ne ki soom; ago ki igoochi kosogityo saboonwekwak. 
Psalms106:16 Ki am ng'etkong' icheek agobo Musa agine eng' nganaseet, kobooto Aron ne tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms106:17 Ki yaatak ng'wony ak kilugui Datan, ak ki tuch kweanetap Abiram." 
Psalms106:18 Ak ki lal maat eng' kwenunnywa; ak ki peel maat pichooto yaacheen. 
Psalms106:19 Ki itany itoondap moita eng' Horeb, ak ki kutung'ji kanamwet ne ki kitanyi." 
Psalms106:20 Ki wal anyun telunatennywa kogergeit ak eito ne ageti. 
Psalms106:21 Ki iutye Kamuktaindet, yetindennywa, ne kiga koyai tuguuk che eecheen eng' Misiri," 
Psalms106:22 Poisyonik che kikwong'ee eng' emetap Ham, ak tuguuk che imuisei eng' ole po Araraita ne Piriir." 
Psalms106:23 Ki mwa anyun kole ng'emei ineendet icheek amu nooto, nda ki ma tonon Musa, nenyi ne ki kilewen eng' tainnyi kota oiyo, koweekta nereegekyik, si ma par icheek." 
Psalms106:24 Ee, ki sas icheek emet ne karaaran, ma iyan ng'olyoondennyi." 
Psalms106:25 Ki ing'unyng'ung'so eng' emaisyekwak, ama epchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms106:26 Ki namji parak anyun eunnyi amu nooto, kole kotoorta kobutyo eng' surkwen," 
Psalms106:27 ak koiyestaat iyotennywa koyom pororyosyek, ak koiyesta icheek eng' emotinwek." 
Psalms106:28 Ki namgei icheek ak Baal-peor, Ak ki am koroseek che ki kieng'jin che ki kobek." 
Psalms106:29 Kitach ineendet kot konereech amu poisyonikwak; ak king'eet koroito eng' kwenunnywa. 
Psalms106:30 Ki tonon anyun Phineas, korwooch: ak ki kigirinda koroito." 
Psalms106:31 Ak ki kiit nooto koek imanda eng' ineendet, agoi ibinwek tugul koigeny." 
Psalms106:32 Kitach ineendet kogeny eng' peegap Meribah, kot koyait nooto eng' Musa amu icheek;" 
Psalms106:33 amu ki igoochi icheek koimak inee eng' muguleldanyi, ak ki ng'alaal kosartae eng' kutinnyi." 
Psalms106:34 Ma par pororyosyek, ko uu ye kiga ng'at `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek." 
Psalms106:35 Ago kiburuchkei kobooto pororyosyek, ak ki ineetkei poisyonikwak." 
Psalms106:36 Ki oot icheek kanamonikwak, che ki ek mesteet eng' icheek." 
Psalms106:37 Ki igoito weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak koek tiseiywek che ki koochin oik. 
Psalms106:38 Kitumda korotiik che ma tinyei tengek, korotiigap weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak, che ki igoochi kanamonigap Kanaan koek tiseiywek; ak ki king'wanit emet eng' korotiik." 
Psalms106:39 Ki murwoniitu anyun eng' poisyonikwak, ak ki yai ibeetapkei eng' poisyonikwak." 
Psalms106:40 Ki nereekyi kot anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik. ak ki wech porotennyi. 
Psalms106:41 Ki igoito icheek koba eunegap pororyosyek; ak kiboi icheek che kiwechei. 
Psalms106:42 Ki inyaliil icheek puunikwak, ak ki kimut icheek kogas iit eng' eunegap pichooto." 
Psalms106:43 Ki sar icheek konyil che chaang', ago ki ek ngelelik eng' ng'olyoonnywa, ak ki kiyai konyeratitu eng' tengektonywa." 
Psalms106:44 Ago ki keer pichiindanywa, ye kingo kas riirekwak." 
Psalms106:45 Ak ki ibwaat kayomisennyi ne kigayomisyi icheek, ak ki riiree icheek ko uu chaang'indap rireenosyekyik." 
Psalms106:46 Ki igoochi piik tugul che kiluulei icheek, koriirge." 
Psalms106:47 Sarwech, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ak iyumech, kemang'une pororyosyek, si kobiit keeweekyi kongoi kaineng'ung' ne tiliil, ak kilasuge eng' kalasuneng'ung'." 
Psalms106:48 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kobooch koigeny agoi koigeny. Ak ingomwa piik tugul kole, “Amen!” Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms107:1 Oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi; amu myee ineendet: Amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms107:2 Ingomwa ko uu nooto che ki kotyach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ki kotyach eng' eutap puunyoot," 
Psalms107:3 ak ki iyum komong' eng' emotinwek, kobun kong'asiis ak cherongo, murot ne po kaataam ak murot tai." 
Psalms107:4 Ki ombenoti eng' surkwen eng' turguito, ki ma nyoor nganaseet ne menyei." 
Psalms107:5 Ki amoti rubeet ak melelda, kitanuiso saboonwekwak." 
Psalms107:6 Ki riirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanywa, ak ki sar icheek komang'une pichiinwekwak." 
Psalms107:7 Ki indochi agine eng' ooreet ne litit, si kobiit koba nganaseet ne menyei." 
Psalms107:8 Myee kolas `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu myeeindonyi, ak amu poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee, che yachin weeriigap piik!" 
Psalms107:9 Amu igoochin kobiyo saboondo ne tinyei emosto, ak inyiityin myeeindo saboondo ne amei rubeet." 
Psalms107:10 Icheek che kitebee mesundeito ak urwetap meet, ko ratotiin eng' nyalilda ak kariik;" 
Psalms107:11 amu ki ingelelji ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet, ak ki sas katigonutigap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'." 
Psalms107:12 Eng' nooto anyun ki iming'in Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugulelwekwak eng' poisyet ne kibirtoegei, ki ibutyo, ak ki ma piit ne kitoret." 
Psalms107:13 Ki riirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanywa, ak ki sar icheek komang'une pichiinwekwak." 
Psalms107:14 Ki imoong'une mesundeito ak urwetap meet, ak kong'eti tuguukwak che ki kirate." 
Psalms107:15 Myee kolas `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu myeeindonyi, ak amu poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee, che yachin weeriigap piik!" 
Psalms107:16 Amu ki put kereiywegap sugunonik che po ormariichok, ak kitil temeleiywegap kariik." 
Psalms107:17 Ki nyalili che perber amu pistoennywa, ak amu tengekwogikwak;" 
Psalms107:18 wechei saboonwekwak amit age tugul, ak riikyin kurgotigap meet." 
Psalms107:19 Koriirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanywa, ak kosar icheek komang'une pichiinwekwak." 
Psalms107:20 Iyooktoi ng'olyoondennyi, kosoop icheek, ak kosar icheek eng' ng'emisyosyekwak." 
Psalms107:21 Myee kolas `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu myeeindonyi, ak amu poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee, che yachin weeriigap piik!" 
Psalms107:22 Ak ingogoito korosegap kongoi, ak komwaita poisyonikyik eng' tyendo." 
Psalms107:23 Icheek che choorchingei nyanjet eng' melisyek, che poisyei eng' peek che chaang'." 
Psalms107:24 Keerei chuuto poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kwang'utikyik eng' rireet." 
Psalms107:25 Amu ng'atei ak kong'eeti kipchurchuryet, ne namjin parak mildaennyi pogei ne po peek." 
Psalms107:26 Togostoi kipsengwet, ak kochorchingei kogeny ye mi rirosyek: chootos saboonwekwak amu nyalilda." 
Psalms107:27 Iyongooti ak koterteeryoti ko uu chii ne kagobogit, ak kokwalilendos." 
Psalms107:28 Koriirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' nyalildanywa, ak komoong' icheek eng' pichiinwekwak." 
Psalms107:29 Igoochin anyun kipchurchuryet kosiis, ak kosiisyo peek che mildogei." 
Psalms107:30 Koboiboitu anyun amu kagomuung'do; ak komut agoi koit ole machei komuung'e. 
Psalms107:31 Myee kolas `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu myeeindonyi, ak amu poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee, che yachin weeriigap piik!" 
Psalms107:32 Ingolas icheek ineendet eng' tuiyetap piik, ak kolas ineendet kobooto poisyek eng' kabuureitonywa." 
Psalms107:33 Walei ainoosyek koek surkwen, ak kong'igap peek koek emet ne yaamaat." 
Psalms107:34 Walei emet ne iyiot koek surkwen ne po muunyuk, amu sogornatetap icheeget che menyei olooto." 
Psalms107:35 Walei surkwen koek tamboiyot, ak emet ne yaamaat koek kong'igap peek." 
Psalms107:36 Ak igoochin komeny olooto che amei rubeet, si kochop nganaseet ne menyei;" 
Psalms107:37 Ak kogool mbareenik, ak komiin keetiigap sabibuk, ak koges ruratennywa." 
Psalms107:38 Iberuuri anyun icheek, si kotesagis miising'; ama chamjin tuukwak kong'ering'itu." 
Psalms107:39 Ak kogeny, kichuchuchi ak kinyeroti eng' usiisyet, ak nyalilda, ak arageneet." 
Psalms107:40 Renyei pounik, ak kogoochi koombeniot eng' surkwen, ole ma mi ooreet." 
Psalms107:41 Ago itoroori ne panani si ma nyoor usiisyet, ak koyai kapchii koek akweetap keechiirek." 
Psalms107:42 Keerei che po iman ak kogaskei; ak konamak kuut tengekto tugul. 
Psalms107:43 Epchin iit ne utaat tuguuchuuto, ak kobwaatoti rireenosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms108:1 Igiilotkei muguleldanyu, ee Kamuktaindet, atyeni, ee atyeni kalasunoik, agot eng' toroornatennyu." 
Psalms108:2 Ong'eetyee, kibugandet ak ketubet! Ang'eete aneendet karon miising'." 
Psalms108:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, aweegun kongoi eng' kwenutap piik; ak atyenun kalasunoik eng' kwenutap pororyosyek." 
Psalms108:4 Amu oo rireeneng'ung' kosiir kipsengwet, ak itei imandang'ung' poolik." 
Psalms108:5 Tororitu, ee Kamuktaindet, isiir kipsengwet: ak ingotororit toroornateng'ung' kosiir ng'wony komugul." 
Psalms108:6 Si kesar chamaniguk, saru eng' eung'ung' ne po tai ak iwolwech." 
Psalms108:7 Kigotwek Kamuktaindet eng' oldanyi ole-tiliil: “Agasigei ye apchee Shekem, ak akwaa atebweetap Sukoth." 
Psalms108:8 Nenyu Gilead, ak nenyu Manasseh; Ephraim agine kimnateetap metinnyu; Judah ko kiroktonyu ne po laitornatet." 
Psalms108:9 Moab ko tereet ne aunegei; awirchini kweiyondennyu Edom; aorene Philistia.” 
Psalms108:10 Imuta ng'oo awo nganaseet ne ng'ootaat? Indoiywa ng'oo agoi Edom? 
Psalms108:11 Tos ma iwiirtech inyee, ee Kamuktaindet? Ama iwe, ee Kamuktaindet, kobooto lugosyekyok." 
Psalms108:12 Koonech toreteet kegirindae puunyoot: amu ma tilei kiy toretetap chii. 
Psalms108:13 Kiyae tuguuk che kiimeen eng' Kamuktaindet: amu ineendet ne tyekyin ng'wony puunikyok. 
Psalms109:1 Amesiis, ee Kamuktaindet ne po kalasunennyu." 
Psalms109:2 Amu kaiseng'eng'ja kiptengekyot ak ng'aaliindet, kagong'alaalwo eng' kutit ne po lembech." 
Psalms109:3 Koyiemena ng'aleek che po wegeet, ak koboryena puch." 
Psalms109:4 Ki achame ago ki ek puunikyuk, nga uu no asaae agobo icheek." 
Psalms109:5 Ak ki igeerwo ne ya eng' ne myee, ak ki igeerwo wegeet eng' chamyennyu." 
Psalms109:6 Inde chiito ne ya koboi ineendet; ak ingotonone puunyoot eunnyi ne po tai. 
Psalms109:7 Ingonam ineendet tengekto ye kirwookyin; ak ingowalak saaennyi koek tengekto. 
Psalms109:8 Ingong'ering'itu peetuusyekyik; ak ingonam age poisyennyi. 
Psalms109:9 Ingoek lagokyik che ma kotinyei kwanda, ak ingoek osotyonnyi ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot." 
Psalms109:10 Ingoombenot lagokyik, kosoomsot; ak ingocheeng'ate amitwogikwak surkwen." 
Psalms109:11 Ingorebe yaagindet tuguuk tugul che tinyei; ak ingoluul toek poisyennyi. 
Psalms109:12 Amat kobiit chii ne riiree ineendet; amat kobiit ne riiree lagokyik che ma kotinyei kwanda. 
Psalms109:13 Ingogeskei iyotennyi; ak ingobugok kainennywa eng' ibinda ne isubu. 
Psalms109:14 Ingobwaatak tengektap kwanisyekyik eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amat kibukto tengektap kamet. 
Psalms109:15 Ingotebee taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul, si kobiit koisto kabwaatennywa eng' ng'wony." 
Psalms109:16 Amu ma ibwaat kobarta rireenet, ago kius kibananiat ne ma tinyei kiy, ak ne ilot muguleldo, si kobiit kobar." 
Psalms109:17 Ki cham ineendet chubisyet, ak ki nyoonji; ak ki ma paibaitune kaberuret, ak kilooit eng' ineendet." 
Psalms109:18 Ki ilaach chubisyet ko uu ngoryennyi, ak kichut oriitinnyi ko uu peek, ak kichut kawekyik ko uu mwaita." 
Psalms109:19 Ingoek eng' ineendet ngoryeet ne tugegei, ak pireneet ne rategei kotugul." 
Psalms109:20 Niito melektap puunikyuk ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ne po icheek che mwaei ne ya agobo saboondanyu." 
Psalms109:21 Ago poisye inyee agobo anee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kiptaiyandennyu, amu kaineng'ung'; amu myee rireeneng'ung', sarwo anyun." 
Psalms109:22 Amu aa ne nyalili, amaleli kiy, ak iguotenot muguleldanyu oriit." 
Psalms109:23 Ki abetite ko uu urwet ne petei: ki onota ko uu chereng'endet. 
Psalms109:24 Nyalulyotin kutung'oikyuk amu karugutetapkei; ak kagosagit poortanyu. 
Psalms109:25 Kaegu ne kirasyin eng' icheek; ye keera, kobarbar metowekwak." 
Psalms109:26 Toreto, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu; sarwo ko uu rireeneng'ung'." 
Psalms109:27 Si kobiit konai kole niito ko eung'ung'; ak konai kole inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki iyai. 
Psalms109:28 Ingochubis, ago iberuur inyee. Ye ng'eetyo, kolilaanso, ago paibai otwogindeng'ung'." 
Psalms109:29 Ingilaakyi teweernateet puunikyuk, ak ingotugegei icheegei teweernatennywa ko uu ngoryeet ne kiturturi." 
Psalms109:30 Aweekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi ne oo eng' kutinnyu; alasu ineendet eng' tuiyet. 
Psalms109:31 Amu tonone eutap tai ne po ineendet ne panani, si kosar ineendet eng' icheek che irwookyin saboondanyi." 
Psalms110:1 Kaleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptaiyandennyu, “Tebee eunnyu ne po tai, agoi ayai puuniguk koek ng'echereetap keelyeguk.”" 
Psalms110:2 Iyooktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirokto ne po kimnateng'ung' eng' Zion. Pou inyee eng' kwenutap puuniguk. 
Psalms110:3 Chamdogei piiguk eng' peetuutap kimnateng'ung': eng' karaaranindap tiliilindo, ye machei koeech. Itinye rewootap ming'inateng'ung'." 
Psalms110:4 Ki koyosyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama walei, kole, “Ii tisiindet koigeny ko uu kiit ne ki uu Melkisedek.”" 
Psalms110:5 Mi Kiptaiyat eung'ung' ne po tai; tuun tyechatyechi laitorinik eng' peetuutap nereegekyik. 
Psalms110:6 Tuun irwookyin pororyosyek, inyiiti emotinwek muuswek. Tuun kwerei metowek eng' emotinwek che chaang'." 
Psalms110:7 Eei ineendet peegap aineet eng' ooreet; yotei met anyun amu nooto.
