Psalms111:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Aweekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi eng' muguleldanyu komugul, eng' kapkirwoogetap che po iman, ak eng' tuiyet." 
Psalms111:2 Eechen poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che cheeng'ei icheek tugul che poiboitune." 
Psalms111:3 Poisyennyi ko teegisto ak etunateet; ak tebyei imandanyi koigeny. 
Psalms111:4 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor poisyonikyik che kikwong'ee si kibwaataat; po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor myeeindo ak ko nyiitaat rireenet. 
Psalms111:5 Kigogoochi amitwogik che iywei ineendet; ibwaati kayomisennyi kotugul. 
Psalms111:6 Ki koboorchi piikyik kimnateetap poisyonikyik, ye ki igoochi konyaban pororyosyek." 
Psalms111:7 Poisyonigap eunekyik ko imanda ak kirwooget; isuldootiin kaneetisyosyekyik tugul. 
Psalms111:8 Ki kigimit kotebi koigeny ak koigeny, kiyaei eng' imanda ak lititindo." 
Psalms111:9 Ki koyokyi piikyik katyaget; kigong'at kayomisennyi kobunji koigeny. Tiliil ak kiywei kainennyi. 
Psalms111:10 Kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko taunetap utaatyet; tinyei kaguiyet ne myee icheek tugul che yaei chooto. Tebyei koigeny kalasunennyi. 
Psalms112:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Paibai chii ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne poiboitune miising' ng'atuutikyik." 
Psalms112:2 Tuun kimitu iyotennyi eng' ng'wony; kiberuuri ooreetap che po iman. 
Psalms112:3 Mi koonnyi mogornateet ak perurwogik; ak tebyei imandanyi koigeny. 
Psalms112:4 Ng'eetei lapkeiyet eng' mesundeito koluuchin che po iman; tinyei myeeindo, nyiitaat rireenet ak po iman." 
Psalms112:5 Myee eng' chiito ne poisyei eng' myeeindo ak kobesendoi; chobei ng'aleekyik eng' imanda. 
Psalms112:6 Amu ma koi kiisto; kibwaati ne po iman koigeny. 
Psalms112:7 Ma iywei ineendet ng'aleek che yaacheen; igiilotkei muguleldanyi, komang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms112:8 Lumdaat muguleldanyi, ama tinyei kaiyweisyet, agoi kogeer magennyi eng' puunikyik." 
Psalms112:9 Kigoseerseer, Ki kogoochi che ma tinyei kiy; tebyei imandanyi koigeny; kitoroori kuinennyi eng' teegisto." 
Psalms112:10 Keerei kiptengekyot, ak koaragen; nyeei kelekyik ak kochoot, petei mageetap kiptengeginik." 
Psalms113:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Olasu, okweek che oboisyechini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, olasu kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms113:2 Iberuurot kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch nguno agoi koigeny. 
Psalms113:3 Kobooch ko kachor asiis agoi kororokto nyolu kilas kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms113:4 Toroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pororyosyek tugul, ak toroor etunatennyi kosiir kipsengwet." 
Psalms113:5 Ng'oo ne kergei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo? Tebee inee ole toroor," 
Psalms113:6 keerei ng'wony keerei kipsengwet ak ng'wony? 
Psalms113:7 Ing'eeti kibananiat komang'une temburyek, ak koganabune kapng'atat che ma tinyei kiy," 
Psalms113:8 si kogoochi kotebi ak pounik, agot pounigap piikyik." 
Psalms113:9 Igoochin ne soon koriip koot, ak koek kamet ne paibai ne po lagok. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms114:1 Ye kingo manda Israel eng' Misiri, kootap Jakobo eng' piik che ng'alaale kutit ne teer;" 
Psalms114:2 koek Judah oldanyi ne tiliil, ak koek Israel pounatennyi." 
Psalms114:3 Ki keer nyanjet ineendet ak ki mwei; ki kiweekta Jordan kwo let. 
Psalms114:4 Ki toroombenso tuloonook ko uu mengichik, ak ki toroombenso tuloonook che mengeechen ko uu aaregap keechiir." 
Psalms114:5 Amin nee, ee nyanjani kot imwei? Amin nee, inyee Jordan kot iweeige let?" 
Psalms114:6 Okweek tuloonook, kalya si otorombenote ko uu mengichik? Ak okweek tuloonook che mengeechen kot otorombenote ko uu aaregap keechiir?" 
Psalms114:7 Potan, inyee ng'wony eng' taitap Kiptaiyat, eng' taitap Kamuktaindetap Jakobo," 
Psalms114:8 ne ki wal rwandet koek tamboiyot, ak rwandet ne uui koek ole isururunee peek." 
Psalms115:1 Amegoonech, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amegoonech telunateet, ago igoochi kaineng'ung', amu rireeneng'ung' ak imandang'ung'." 
Psalms115:2 Amu nee si komwa pororyosyek kole, “Mi ano Kamuktaindennywa nguno?”" 
Psalms115:3 Miitei Kamuktaindennyo kipsengwet; yaei ineendet kiy age tugul ne machei. 
Psalms115:4 Po fedha ak thahabu kanamonikwak, poisyetap eunegap piik." 
Psalms115:5 Tinyei kutusweek, ago ma twegu; tinyei koonyek, ago ma keertoi." 
Psalms115:6 Tinyei itiik, ago ma kastoi; tinyei seruunek, ago ma ing'utoi." 
Psalms115:7 Tinyei eunek, ago ma namei kiy; tinyei keelyek, ago ma pendoti; ama ng'alaale mookwekwak." 
Psalms115:8 Kergeitu icheeget che kiyaei ak tuguuchooto; uu nooto age tugul ne imang'u chooto. 
Psalms115:9 Ee Israel, imang'u inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ineendet toretindennywa ak long'ennywa." 
Psalms115:10 Ee kootap Aron, omang'u okweek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ineendet toretindennywa ak long'ennywa." 
Psalms115:11 Okweek che oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, omang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet toretindennywa ak long'ennywa." 
Psalms115:12 Kigobwaatech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; iberuurech; iberuuri kootap Israel, iberuuri kootap Aron." 
Psalms115:13 Iberuuri icheek che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che mengech ak che eech." 
Psalms115:14 Ingoyabak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor obaraitu, okweek ak lagokwok." 
Psalms115:15 Oberuurotin eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki yai kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Psalms115:16 kipsengwet ko kipsengwet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. ago ki igoochi ng'wony weeriigap piik. 
Psalms115:17 Ma ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki kobek, anan age tugul ne choorchingei ye mi siisek." 
Psalms115:18 Ago kilasu acheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch nguno agoi koigeny. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! 
Psalms116:1 Achame Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu ki kogas tweguunennyi ak soomutikyuk. 
Psalms116:2 Ki koepcha iit, amu nooto aguure ineendet anyun kota asabe." 
Psalms116:3 Ki yiema poroonigap meet, ak ki nama ng'waninwegap ye mi che ki kobek; ki anyooru nyalilda ak arageneet." 
Psalms116:4 Ki aguur anyun kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asaain ale, sarwo saboondanyu.”" 
Psalms116:5 Po myeeindo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko po imanda; tinyei rireenetapkei Kamuktaindennyo. 
Psalms116:6 Riibei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che nyerootiin; ki kinyerata, ago ki sarwo ineendet." 
Psalms116:7 Iweekyigei kamuung'eng'ung', ee saboondanyu; amu kagoyaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' aiyebindo." 
Psalms116:8 Amu ki isaru saboondanyu eng' meet, ak konyekyuk eng' peegap kong', ak keelyekyuk si ma put." 
Psalms116:9 Awendotee taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emotinwegap che saptos. 
Psalms116:10 Ki atinye kayanet, agot ye ki amwa ale: “Ki kinyalila miising';”" 
Psalms116:11 ki amwa eng' sartaet ale: “Kiplembechonik piik tugul.” 
Psalms116:12 Aweekyini nee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu konunoikyik tugul che koono? 
Psalms116:13 Aname kigombetap yetunet, ak aguure kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms116:14 Agoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki aaroorchi, ee, agoochini eng' taitap piikyik tugul." 
Psalms116:15 Kiit ne siirtoot miising' eng' korooronindo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko meetap chechiik che tiliileen. 
Psalms116:16 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, aa kiboityondeng'ung' iman; aa kiboityondeng'ung', aa weeriitap otwogeng'ung' ne tye; ki ityaach ratuutikyuk." 
Psalms116:17 Agoonin korosyot ne po kongoi, ak aguur kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms116:18 Agoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chooto che ki aaroorchi, ee, agoochini eng' taitap piikyik tugul," 
Psalms116:19 eng' seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kwenung'ung', ee Jerusalem. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms117:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek pororyosyek tugul! Ogonyit ineendet, okweek piik tugul!" 
Psalms117:2 Amu oo rireenennyi eng' acheek; ak tebyei koigeny imandap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! 
Psalms118:1 Omwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi; amu myee ineendet; amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms118:2 Ingomwa Israel kole, “Tebyei rireenennyi koigeny.”" 
Psalms118:3 Ingomwa kootap Aron nguno kole, “Tebyei rireenennyi koigeny.”" 
Psalms118:4 Ingomwa nguno icheek che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Tebyei rireenennyi koigeny.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ki aguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pichiindanyu; ki wolwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kondea ole paraa. 
Psalms118:6 Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komostanyu; ma yweisyei. Imuuchi koyaiywo nee chii? 
Psalms118:7 Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komostanyu si ko toreto; ageere anyun eng' nyiganateet chooto che wecho. 
Psalms118:8 Kaigai kimang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir kimang'u chii. 
Psalms118:9 Kaigai kimang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir kimang'u pounik. 
Psalms118:10 Ki yiema pororyosyek tugul; ang'eetoi icheek eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms118:11 Ki yiema; ee, ki yiema; ang'eetoi icheek eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms118:12 Ki yiema ko uu segemik; ki pek ko uu maatap katok; ang'eetoi icheek eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms118:13 Ki iokta inyee ile abut, ago ki toreto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms118:14 Kimnateennyu ak tyendanyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kagoek yetunennyu. 
Psalms118:15 Miitei emaisyegap che po iman kutitap poiboiyet ak yetunet: “Yaei eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che kiimeen. 
Psalms118:16 Itoroorot eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Yaei eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che kiimeen.” 
Psalms118:17 Ma mee, ago asabe, ak amwaitoi poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms118:18 Ki pira Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising', ago ma igoito ame." 
Psalms118:19 Oyatwa kurgotigap imanda, si awa oriit ak amwachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi." 
Psalms118:20 Ni ko kurgeetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; punei che po iman. 
Psalms118:21 Amwaun kongoi, amu ki iwolwoo, ak kaiegu yetunennyu." 
Psalms118:22 Koita ne ki eesyo teegik, kaek nooto metitap luuita." 
Psalms118:23 Punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoni; kwang'utyet nooto eng' konyekyok. 
Psalms118:24 Ni peetuut ne ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kiboiboi ak kigasegei nooto. 
Psalms118:25 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kisaain keele, sarwech nguno: ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kisaain iyoogu poroteet." 
Psalms118:26 Iberuurot ineendet ne nyoonei eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kagiberuurok acheek eng' kaberuret ne punu kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms118:27 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet, ak kagogoonech lapkeiyet. Orat tiseiywot eng' poroonik, oratyi kuinoigap kaptisisyet." 
Psalms118:28 Ii Kamuktaindennyu, ak amwaun kongoi; ii Kamuktaindennyu, atoroorin." 
Psalms118:29 Omwachi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu myee ineendet, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms119:1 Poiboen che ititaatiin eng' ooreet, che pendote ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms119:2 Poiboen icheek che riibei paornatosyekyik, che cheeng'ei ineendet eng' muguleldo komugul," 
Psalms119:3 ma yaei icheek che ma po iman; ago pendote ortinwekyik. 
Psalms119:4 Ki ing'at kaneetisyosyeguk, ile kisup eng' kagiiletapkei." 
Psalms119:5 Ee, kata myee nda ka kiimeen ortinwekyuk si kobiit asup ng'atuutiguk!" 
Psalms119:6 Si ma lilan, ye ariibe komyee ng'atuutiguk tugul." 
Psalms119:7 Amwaun kongoi eng' lititindap muguleldo, ye aneetigei kirogutiguk che po iman." 
Psalms119:8 Asubi ng'atuutiguk; amebagaaktaa agoi. 
Psalms119:9 Itiliile nee mureno ooreennyi? Kogas iit, ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:10 Ki acheeng'in eng' muguleldanyu tugul; amegoono alooitune ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:11 Kaagonoree muguleldanyu ng'olyoondeng'ung'. si ma yaun tengek. 
Psalms119:12 Iberuurot inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ineeta ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:13 Ki amwaite eng' kutinnyu kirwoogutik tugul che punu kuting'ung'. 
Psalms119:14 Ki abaibaitune ooreetap paornatosyeguk, ko uu ye abaibai eng' mogornatosyek tugul." 
Psalms119:15 Abwaatati kaneetisyosyeguk ak ariibe ortinweguk. 
Psalms119:16 Abaibaitu eng' ng'atuutiguk; ma utye ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:17 Yachi kiboityondeng'ung' eng' aiyebindo, si kobiit asap ak ariip ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:18 Yaat konyekyuk, si kobiit ageer tuguuk che kikwong'ee eng' ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:19 Aa kiprutoiyo eng' ng'wony; ameung'ena ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:20 Tonoksei saboondanyu amu emosto ne tinyei kotugul eng' kirwoogutiguk. 
Psalms119:21 Ki iger kong' menotik che chubootiin, che looitune ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:22 Istoena chotisyet ak sasisyet; amu ki ariip paornatosyeguk. 
Psalms119:23 Ki tebi pounik kochaama: ago ki ibwaati kiboityondeng'ung' ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:24 Poiboiyennyu paornatosyeguk ak che ing'omita. 
Psalms119:25 Namegei saboondanyu ak temburyek; isooba inyee ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:26 Ki abooru ortinwekyuk, ak ki iwolwoo; ineeta ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:27 Koono aguiyo ooreetap kaneetisyosyeguk, si abwaatat poisyoniguk che kikwong'ee." 
Psalms119:28 Chootei saboondanyu amu arageneet; igimita ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:29 Istoena ooreetap lembech; ak igoono ng'atuutyeng'ung' eng' myeeindo. 
Psalms119:30 Ki alewen ooreetap imanda; ki ande tainnyu kirwoogutiguk. 
Psalms119:31 Kinamegei ak paornatosyeguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amegoono alilan." 
Psalms119:32 Alabati eng' ooreetap ng'atuutiguk, ye ibaroi muguleldanyu." 
Psalms119:33 Ineeta, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ooreetap ng'atuutiguk; ak asup agoi kagesunet." 
Psalms119:34 Koono kaguiyet, si kobiit ariip ng'atuutyeng'ung', si asup eng' muguleldanyu komugul." 
Psalms119:35 Koono abun ooreetap ng'atuutiguk; amu abaibaitune chooto. 
Psalms119:36 Tokyi muguleldanyu paornatosyeguk, ametokyi mageet ne ya." 
Psalms119:37 Iweech konyekyuk si ma keer che ma nyolu; ak isooba eng' ortinweguk. 
Psalms119:38 Igimiityi kiboityondeng'ung' ne iywein, ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:39 Istoena rosyinet ne aiywei; amu myachen kirwoogutiguk. 
Psalms119:40 Keero, kigoama emo agobo kaneetisyosyeguk; isooba eng' imandang'ung'." 
Psalms119:41 Ingobwanjo rireenosyeguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agot yetuneng'ung' ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:42 Anyoor anyun kiit ne awoljini ineendet ne rosyina; amu amang'u ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:43 Amerep ng'olyoondeng'ung' ne po iman eng' kutinnyu; amu ki amang'u kirwoogutiguk. 
Psalms119:44 Asubi ng'atuutiguk kotugul koigeny ak koigeny. 
Psalms119:45 Awendoti eng' katyagnatet; amu ki acheeng' kaneetisyosyeguk. 
Psalms119:46 Amwaitoi agine paornatosyeguk eng' taitap laitorinik, amalilani." 
Psalms119:47 Abaibaitu eng' ng'atuutiguk, amu achame chooto." 
Psalms119:48 Anamjini parak eunekyuk atokyini ng'atuutiguk, che achame; ak abwaatati kayomisutiguk." 
Psalms119:49 Ibwaat ng'olyoot ne ki iarorchi kiboityondeng'ung', amu ki igoono amang'." 
Psalms119:50 Niito ko kagaigaennyu eng' nyalildanyu, amu kigosooba ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:51 Ki kororecha miising' menotik, ago tomo amaste amete ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:52 Ki abwaat kirwoogutiguk che po keny, ak ki agaigaige, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms119:53 Ki anereech miising' kot, amu kiptengeginik che pagaktoi ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:54 Ki koek ng'atuutiguk tyenwogikyuk eng' kootap rutoitanyu. 
Psalms119:55 Ki abwaat kaineng'ung' kemoi, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki asup ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:56 Ki ityon kaberuroniito, amu ki ariip kaneetisyosyeguk." 
Psalms119:57 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kebebertanyu; ki amwa ale asubi ng'aleeguk. 
Psalms119:58 Ki ariirchi chamyeng'ung' eng' muguleldanyu komugul; rirena ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:59 Ki abwaat ortinwekyuk, ak ki atokyi keelyekyuk paornatosyeguk." 
Psalms119:60 Ki achokyi, ki ma agagei, asup ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:61 Ki koratarata poroonigap kiptengeginik; ago tomo autye ng'atuutyeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:62 Ang'eete kemoi kween amwaun kongoi amu kirwoogutiguk che po iman. 
Psalms119:63 Aa chorweetap icheek tugul che iywein, ak ne po icheeget che isubi kaneetisyosyeguk." 
Psalms119:64 Nyiitaat ng'wony rireeneng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ineeta ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:65 Ki iyachi ne myee kiboityondeng'ung', Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:66 Ineeta kirwooget ne myee ak naet; amu ki ayan ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:67 Ki abetote ye kitom kinyalila; ago nguno asubi ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:68 Ii myee, ak iyae ne myee; ineeta ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:69 Kogochop menotik lembechek agobo anee, ariibe kaneetisyosyeguk eng' muguleldanyu komugul." 
Psalms119:70 Katimogis mugulelwekwak eng' akwaindo; ago abaibaitune ng'atuutyeng'ung'," 
Psalms119:71 Myee eng' anee amu ki kinyalila; si kobiit aneetkei ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:72 Kaigai eng' anee ng'atuutyetap kuting'ung' kosiir eliphusyegap thahabu ak fedha. 
Psalms119:73 Ki yaa euneguk ak kogimita; koono kaguiyet, si kobiit aneetkei ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:74 Keera che iywein ak koboiboitu; amu ki amang'u ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:75 Angen, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ale po iman kirwoogutiguk, ak ki ibira eng' imandang'ung'." 
Psalms119:76 Asaain ale ingoek chamyeng'ung' ne tala ne igaigaa, ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung' eng' kiboityondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:77 Ingobwanjo rireenosyeguk che po chamyet, si asap; amu poiboiyennyu ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:78 Ingolilanso menotik; amu ki konyaliila puch, ago abwaatati kaneetisyosyeguk." 
Psalms119:79 Ingoweekyagei che iywein, si konai paornatosyeguk." 
Psalms119:80 Ingoek ne ititaat muguleldanyu eng' ng'atuutiguk; si ma lilan. 
Psalms119:81 Tanui saboondanyu amu machei yetuneng'ung'; ago amang'u ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:82 Kaimenitu konyekyuk agobo ng'olyoondeng'ung', ye amwae ale, “Igaigaa au?”" 
Psalms119:83 Amu kaige soteet ne ki kinde iyeto; ago ma utye ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:84 Egu ata peetuusyegap kiboityondeng'ung'? Irwookyini au che onota? 
Psalms119:85 Kigobal keriingonik menotik agobo anee, che ma isubi ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:86 Po iman ng'atuutiguk tugul; onota puch; toreto inyee! 
Psalms119:87 Ki neegit kowong'wa eng' ng'wony; ago ki ma abagaakte kaneetisyosyeguk. 
Psalms119:88 Isooba eng' chamyeng'ung' ne tala; si asup anyun paornateetap kuting'ung'. 
Psalms119:89 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tebee ng'olyoondeng'ung' kipsengwet koigeny." 
Psalms119:90 Yamu ibinwek tugul imandang'ung'; ki igimit inyee ng'wony, ak tebyei." 
Psalms119:91 Tebyei icheek agoi kora ko uu kirwoogutiguk; amu otwogiguk tuguuk tugul. 
Psalms119:92 Nda ki ma ek poiboiyennyu ng'atuutyeng'ung', ta ki abet eng' nyalildanyu." 
Psalms119:93 Ma koi autye kaneetisyosyeguk; amu ki isooba inyee eng' chooto. 
Psalms119:94 Aa neng'ung', sarwo anyun; amu ki acheeng' kaneetisyosyeguk." 
Psalms119:95 Ki igeno kiptengeginik kole kobara; ago aruchini paornatosyeguk. 
Psalms119:96 Ki ageer ole poochitu kagesunatetapkei tugul, ago paraa ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:97 Tya chamyet ne achame ng'atuutyeng'ung'! Nooto kabwaatennyu peetuut komugul. 
Psalms119:98 Ing'omita ng'atuutiguk asiir puunikyuk, amu mi kobooto kotugul." 
Psalms119:99 Atinye kaguiyet ne oo asiir kaneetikyuk tugul, amu kabwaatennyu paornatosyeguk." 
Psalms119:100 Aguitosi asiir poisyek, amu ki ariip kaneetisyosyeguk." 
Psalms119:101 Ki aistoe keelyekyuk ooreet age tugul ne ya, si kobiit asup ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:102 Tom amaste abagaakte kirwoogutiguk, amu ki ineeta inyee." 
Psalms119:103 Anyinyen ne tya ng'aleeguk ye achamchami; anyinyen kosiir kumyat eng' kutinnyu! 
Psalms119:104 Anyooru kaguiyet eng' kaneetisyosyeguk; nooto aweche ooreet age tugul ne po lembech. 
Psalms119:105 Taitap keelyekyuk ng'olyoondeng'ung', ak lapkeiyetap ooreennyu." 
Psalms119:106 Ki ayosye ak ki agimiit nooto, ale asup kirwoogutiguk che po iman." 
Psalms119:107 Kinyalila miising'; isooba, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:108 Asaain ale taach konunoigap kutinnyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ineeta kirwoogutiguk." 
Psalms119:109 Aiboti saboondanyu eng' eunnyu kotugul; ago ma utye ng'atuutyeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:110 Kagochop mesteet kiptengeginik agobo anee; ago ma maste abagaakte kaneetisyosyeguk. 
Psalms119:111 Koanam paornatosyeguk koek poroteet ne po koigeny; amu chooto poiboiyetap muguleldanyu. 
Psalms119:112 Ki atokyi muguleldanyu ale ayai ng'atuutiguk, koigeny, agoi koit kagesunet." 
Psalms119:113 Aweche icheek che po kabwaatutik aeng'; ago achame ng'atuutyeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:114 Ii ole aung'egei ak ko ii long'ennyu: amang'u ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:115 Oba eng' ole ami, okweek yaigap yaityo; si kobiit ariip ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms119:116 Tiia ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung', si kobiit asap; amegoono alilan agobo kamang'unennyu." 
Psalms119:117 Tiia, si ma ama kiy, ak atokyigei ng'atuutiguk kotugul." 
Psalms119:118 Ki iwal koek puch icheek tugul che istoegei ng'atuutiguk; amu lembech ng'aalseennywa. 
Psalms119:119 Iistoi ko uu pusagaryek kiptengeginik tugul che po ng'wony; achame anyun paornatosyeguk amu nooto. 
Psalms119:120 Potani poortanyu amu aiywein; ak aiywei kirwoogutiguk. 
Psalms119:121 Ki ayai kirwooget ak imanda; amebagaakyo usiikyuk. 
Psalms119:122 Egu ne tononjin kiboityondeng'ung' eng' ne myee; amat kousa menotik. 
Psalms119:123 Kaimenitu konyekyuk amu machei yetuneng'ung', ak ng'olyoondeng'ung' ne po iman." 
Psalms119:124 Yachi kiboityondeng'ung' ko uu rireeneng'ung', ak ineeta ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:125 Aa kiboityondeng'ung', koono kaguiyet; si anai paornatosyeguk." 
Psalms119:126 Kagoit peetuut ne kanyool kobois Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kagowal icheek ng'atuutyeng'ung' koek puch. 
Psalms119:127 Achame anyun ng'atuutiguk amu nooto kosiir thahabu, ee, kosiir thahabu che korooron." 
Psalms119:128 Eng' nooto anyun aiiti ale lititen kaneetisyosyeguk tugul agobo tuguuk tugul; ak aweche ooreet age tugul ne po lembech. 
Psalms119:129 Po kwong'eet paornatosyeguk; riibei anyun saboondanyu chooto amu nooto. 
Psalms119:130 Igoitoi lapkeiyet ng'ang'utyetap ng'aleeguk; igoochi kaguiyet che matinyei kiy. 
Psalms119:131 Ki aseng'eng'e, ak asyeny; amu ki atinye emosto agobo ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:132 Iweekyage ak irireena, ko uu ye ki cham iyachini icheeget che chamei kaineng'ung'." 
Psalms119:133 Igimiit tyegutikyuk eng' ng'olyoondeng'ung'; amat koboiywa tengek age tugul. 
Psalms119:134 Ityacha eng' sastaet ne po chii, si asup anyun kaneetisyosyeguk." 
Psalms119:135 Ikweng'e kiboityondeng'ung' togeng'ung'; ak ineeta ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:136 Isururunee peek che chaang' konyekyuk, amu ma isubi icheek ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:137 Ii po iman, inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak lititen kirwoogutiguk." 
Psalms119:138 Ki ing'at paornatosyeguk eng' imanda ak eng' lititindo ne oo. 
Psalms119:139 Ki kowong'wa kagiilennyu pogei, amu kigoutye puunikyuk ng'aleeguk." 
Psalms119:140 Tiliil miising' ng'olyoondeng'ung'; chamei kiboityondeng'ung' anyun amu nooto. 
Psalms119:141 Aa nyeraat, ak aa sasaat; ago ma utye kaneetisyosyeguk." 
Psalms119:142 Imandang'ung' ko imanda ne wendi agoi koigeny; ak imanda ng'atuutyeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:143 Kanama nyalilda ak pichiindo, ago poiboindanyu ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:144 Po iman paornatosyeguk agoi; koono kaguiyet si asap. 
Psalms119:145 Ki aguurse eng' muguleldanyu komugul; wolwo, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ariibe ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:146 Ki aguurin; sarwo anyun, si asup paornatosyeguk." 
Psalms119:147 Ki aguurin kotom koeech; ki amang'u ng'aleeguk. 
Psalms119:148 Asip agosu kota ko kemoi, si kobiit abwaat ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:149 Kas kutinnyu ko uu chamyeng'ung' ne tala; isooba, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu kirwoogutiguk." 
Psalms119:150 Karik icheek che isubi tengekto; ki kolooegitu eng' ng'atuutyeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:151 Ii neegit inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak po iman ng'atuutiguk tugul." 
Psalms119:152 Ki anai kobooch keny eng' paornatosyeguk, ale ki igimit kotebi icheek agoi." 
Psalms119:153 Ibwaat nyalildanyu, ak isarwo; amu ma utye ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:154 Ibesyeiwo ng'aleekyuk, ak ityaacha; isooba ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:155 Loo yetunet eng' kiptengeginik; amu ma cheeng'ei icheek ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:156 Eechen rireenosyeguk che po chamyet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; isooba ko uu kirwoogutiguk." 
Psalms119:157 Chaang' usiikyuk ak puunikyuk; ago tomo amaste eng' paornatosyeguk. 
Psalms119:158 Ki ageer che ng'aalsei, ak ki aaragen; amu ma isubi icheek ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:159 Ibwaat ole achamdoi kaneetisyosyeguk; isooba ko uu chamyeng'ung' ne tala, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms119:160 Po iman ng'aleeguk tugul ko kagiyomo; ak tebyei koigeny kirwoogeng'ung' age tugul ne po iman. 
Psalms119:161 Kigoonata puch pounik; ago iywei muguleldanyu ng'aleeguk. 
Psalms119:162 Abaibai eng' ng'olyoondeng'ung', ko uu ne nyooru tuguuk che luulei che chaang'." 
Psalms119:163 Aweche ak asase lembechek; ago achame ng'atuutyeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:164 Alasun konyil tisap eng' peetuut, amu kirwoogutiguk che po iman." 
Psalms119:165 Tinyei kaalyeet ne oo che chamei ng'atuutyeng'ung'; ama mi kiy ne inachi icheek. 
Psalms119:166 Ki amang'u yetuneng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki ayai ng'atuutiguk." 
Psalms119:167 Kigosup saboondanyu paornatosyeguk; ak achame miising' kot. 
Psalms119:168 Ki asup kaneetisyosyeguk ak paornatosyeguk; amu mi taing'ung' ortinwekyuk tugul. 
Psalms119:169 Ingoriikyi taing'ung' riirekyuk ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: koono kaguiyet ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:170 Ingonyo taing'ung' soomennyu; sarwo ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
Psalms119:171 Ingotwek kutinnyu komwa kalasunet; amu ineeta ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:172 Ingotyen ng'elyeptanyu agobo ng'olyoondeng'ung'; amu po iman ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms119:173 Ingochobok eung'ung' kotoreta; amu ki alewen kaneetisyosyeguk. 
Psalms119:174 Ki koama emosto agobo yetuneng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak poiboindanyu ng'atuutyeng'ung'." 
Psalms119:175 Ingosap saboondanyu, si kolasun; ak ingotoreta kirwoogutiguk." 
Psalms119:176 Ki abetote ko uu keechiiryet ne petoot; cheeng' kiboityondeng'ung'; amu ma utye ng'atuutiguk. 
Psalms120:1 Ki ariirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pichiindanyu, ak ki wolwo." 
Psalms120:2 Saru saboondanyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kutusweek che mwaei lembech, ak eng' ng'elyepta ne ng'aalsei." 
Psalms120:3 Kigoonin nee, anan kitesun nee, inyee, ng'elyepta ne ng'aalsei?" 
Psalms120:4 Kipchabonik che litotin che po che kiimeen kobooto nesek che po keetit ne kiguure Junipa. 
Psalms120:5 Pwo we, anee amu ki aegu ononio eng' Meshek, amu amenye kwenutap emaisyegap Kedar!" 
Psalms120:6 Ki komeng'iis saboondanyu keny kobooto ineendet ne wechei kaalyeet. 
Psalms120:7 Achame kaalyeet; ago ye ang'alaali, kochamei icheek pooryeet." 
Psalms121:1 Anyali tuloonook; punu ano toreteennyu? 
Psalms121:2 Punu toreteennyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki yai kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Psalms121:3 Ma chamdoi ineendet keeldong'ung' keisto; ma inuuchi ineendet ne riibin. 
Psalms121:4 Ogeero, ineendet ne riibei Israel koma inuuchi ama ruei." 
Psalms121:5 Riibindeng'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko urweng'ung' eng' eung'ung' ne po tai. 
Psalms121:6 Ma pirin asiista peet, ama pirin arawet kemoi." 
Psalms121:7 Riibin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' yaityet tugul; riibei saboondang'ung'. 
Psalms121:8 Riibin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye imandoi saang' ak ye inyone ko, kobooch nguno agoi koigeny." 
Psalms122:1 Ki abaibaitu ye kimwaiwo icheek kole, “Ongebe kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Psalms122:2 Tonondos keelyekyok eng' ormariichoguk, ee Jerusalem." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem, ne teegat ko uu nganaseet ne tuiyot." 
Psalms122:4 Ole togoste pororyosyek, pororyosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koek paornateet eng' Israel, si komwa kongoi agobo kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms122:5 Amu ki kinde olooto ng'echerogap laitornatet che po kirwooget, ng'echerogap laitornatet che po kootap Daudi." 
Psalms122:6 Osoomji kaalyeet Jerusalem: “Nyooru poroteet icheek che chamin.” 
Psalms122:7 Ingotebee kaalyeet irimoiguk, ak ingotebee poroteet kooriguk che eecheen." 
Psalms122:8 Amu tupchosyekyuk ak choronokyuk, amwae nguno ale, “Ingotebenen kaalyeet.”" 
Psalms122:9 Amu kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo acheeng'un myeeindo." 
Psalms123:1 Anyalin, ee inyee ne tebee kipsengwet." 
Psalms123:2 Ogeero, ko uu ye keerei otwogik eutap kiptaiyannywa, ko uu ye keerei chepto eutap chebyoset ne pou ineendet; ko uu nooto keerei konyekyok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, agoi korirenech." 
Psalms123:3 Rirenech, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, rirenech; amu kigonyiiech sasisyet miising'." 
Psalms123:4 Kigonyi saboonwekyok miising' chotisyetap icheeget che imuunyi, ak eng' sasisyetap menotik." 
Psalms124:1 Nda ki ma ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mi komostanyo, ingomwa Israel nguno kole" 
Psalms124:2 nda ki ma ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki mi komostanyo, ye king'eetyinech piik," 
Psalms124:3 ta ki koluguech kesaptosi, ye kilaldos nereegekwak agobo acheek;" 
Psalms124:4 kita imaluuchech peek, kita roote aineet saboonwekyok;" 
Psalms124:5 kita roote saboonwekyok peek che wasegei. 
Psalms124:6 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki ma igoitech kibutyi kelekwak." 
Psalms124:7 Chilildos saboonwekyok ko uu ye chilili toriityon eng' mesteetap kiplogotinik che parei toriitik; kagong'et mesteet, ak kagechililse." 
Psalms124:8 Miitei toretennyo kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki yai kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Psalms125:1 Uu icheek che imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Tulweetap Zion, ne ma kimuuchi keisto, ago tebyei koigeny." 
Psalms125:2 Ko uu ye kiyiem tuloonook Jerusalem, yiemei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto piikyik, kobooch nguno agoi koigeny." 
Psalms125:3 Amu ma laitorani kirokto ne po tengekto eng' ye mi che po iman; si ma iyogoochi che po iman, eunekwak tengekto." 
Psalms125:4 Yachi ne myee che myachen, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak icheek che lititen mugulelwekwak." 
Psalms125:5 Ago icheek che mastoi kosubi ortinwekwak che kunuuren, koonei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek kobooto yaigap tengekto. Ingotebee `kaalyeet Israel!" 
Psalms126:1 Ye kiweekta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kigeluul che po Zion, ko ki kiige che irwotitoi." 
Psalms126:2 Konyi anyun roryot kutusweekyok, ak ki nyi ng'elyebwekyok tyenwogik; komwa anyun pororyosyek kole, kogoyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che eecheen." 
Psalms126:3 Kogoyaiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che eecheen; che kiboiboitune. 
Psalms126:4 Iweech chechook che kigeluul, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ainoosyek che po murot tai." 
Psalms126:5 Che kolsei eng' peegap kong' ko kesei eng' poiboiyet. 
Psalms126:6 Agot ngo wendi koriiroti, koibei kesweek, koweeksei kogasanugei, koibu ratuutikyik che po peek." 
Psalms127:1 Ngot koma teech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koot, ko poisyei puch che teechei. Ngot koma riip Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseet, kogosu puch riibindet." 
Psalms127:2 Puch eng' okweek ye ong'eetosi kota ko karon miising', ak otebye keny si obendi oruitosi, ak oame amitwogik che onyaliljini: Igoochin inee anyun chamanennyi rwondo." 
Psalms127:3 Lagok ko poroteet ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak konunennyi iyoteetap moet. 
Psalms127:4 Ko uu kipchabonik eng' eutap ne kiim, ko uu nooto lagogap che ta ko neran." 
Psalms127:5 Paibai chii ne nyiitaat motyennyi. Ma nyooru kalilanet, ye ng'alaaldos ak puunikwak eng' ormariich." 
Psalms128:1 Paibai age tugul ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne wendote ortinwekyik." 
Psalms128:2 Amu iame poisyonigap euneguk; ibaibaitu ak italbisi. 
Psalms128:3 Igeitu osotyondeng'ung' keetit ne yiei ne po sabibuk, eng' koong'ung' oriit; igeitu lagoguk keetiik che mengeechen che po mseituni che yiemei meseng'ung'." 
Psalms128:4 Ogeero, kiberuuri ko uu nooto chiito ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms128:5 Iberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion. Ak igeere poroteetap Jerusalem peetuusyek tugul che po sabeeng'ung'. 
Psalms128:6 Ee, tuun igeere mochogoroniguk. Ingotebee kaalyeet Israel!" 
Psalms129:1 “Kigonyaliila icheek konyil che chaang' kobooch ko aa ming'in” Ingomwa Israel nguno kole," 
Psalms129:2 “Kigonyalila icheek konyil che chaang' kobooch ko aa ming'in, ago ki ma iterteera." 
Psalms129:3 Ki ibat patennyu kabotik; kigereer kererchosyek koeegitu.” 
Psalms129:4 Po iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kigong'eti poroonigap kiptengeginik. 
Psalms129:5 Ingolilanso ak koweekyigei let, icheek tugul che wechei Zion." 
Psalms129:6 Ingoigei icheek susweek che mi kooriik parak, che restos kotom koeegitu," 
Psalms129:7 che ma inyiiti eunnyi kesiindet, ama yamei koue chooto eunek tuwai, ineendet ne ratei ratuutigap peek." 
Psalms129:8 Ama mwaei che siirtoi kole, “Ingotebenok perurtap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Kiberuurok eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!”" 
Psalms130:1 Ki ariirchin eng' rirosyek, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms130:2 Kiptaiyat, kas kutinnyu! Ingoepchi iit iting'ung' kutitap soomutikyuk." 
Psalms130:3 Ngot iit inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tengekwogik, ko ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon, ee Kiptaiyat?" 
Psalms130:4 Ago miitei nyoetap kaat eng' inyee, si kobiit kiywein." 
Psalms130:5 Ageni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, igenisyei saboondanyu, ak amang'u ng'olyoondennyi." 
Psalms130:6 Igeni saboondanyu Kiptaiyat, kosiir riibiik che igeni egonet; ee, kosiir riibiik che igeni egonet." 
Psalms130:7 Ee Israel, imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu mi rireenet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak mi katyaget ne siirei eng' ineendet." 
Psalms130:8 Ak kityaachi ineendet Israel eng' tengekwogikyik tugul. 
Psalms131:1 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma meenei muguleldanyu; ama mi katorooretapkei eng' konyekyuk; ama yae tuguuk che eecheen. Ma alosyige tuguuk che eechen anan che kikwong'ee miising'." 
Psalms131:2 Ki abirge iman ak agoochi saboondanyu kosiis; ko uu lakweet ne kaluge kamet, uu saboondanyu lakweet ne kagiluge." 
Psalms131:3 Ee Israel, imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch nguno agoi koigeny." 
Psalms132:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ibwaat agobo Daudi ibwaat nyalilwogikyik tugul che ki nyoor;" 
Psalms132:2 Ko uu ye ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki iarorchi Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet ne po Jakobo, koleenji:" 
Psalms132:3 “Iman, ma wendi emait oriit ne po koonnyu, anan atogoste itogunnyu;" 
Psalms132:4 ma kere konyekyuk eng' rwondo, anan anuuch;" 
Psalms132:5 agoi acheeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor oldo, meng'ootetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet ne po Jakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Ogeero, kigegas agobo nooto eng' Ephratah; ki kinyoorchi keeweet ne mi timiin." 
Psalms132:7 Kibendi meng'otosyekyik; kigutunyi eng' ng'echereetap keelyekyik keel. 
Psalms132:8 Ng'eet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ui ole imuung'ee; inyee ak moingetap kimnateng'ung'." 
Psalms132:9 Ingolaach tisiiguk imanda; ak ingogaskei eng' kutit ne oo eng' poiboiyet cheguuk che tiliileen. 
Psalms132:10 Amewelel togeetap neng'ung' ne iilaat amu kiboityondeng'ung' Daudi. 
Psalms132:11 Ki iyasyechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Daudi eng' iman; ma weechegei let: Andoi age ne punu poortang'ung' kotebee ng'echereeng'ung' ne po pounatet. 
Psalms132:12 Ngot koriip lagoguk arorutyennyu ak pounatennyu ne tuun aneeti, kotebee anyun lagokwak ak icheek ng'echereeng'ung' ne po pounateet agoi koigeny." 
Psalms132:13 Amu ki kolewen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion; kimakyigei koek ole tebee. 
Psalms132:14 Yuto ko komosta ole amuung'e koigeny; atebee yuto; amu ki amach. 
Psalms132:15 Aberuuri miising' amitwogikyik; abae kibananookyik amitwogik kot kobiyong'so. 
Psalms132:16 Alaakyini tisiikyik ak icheek yetunet; ak kogaskei eng' kutit ne oo eng' poiboiyet chechiik che tiliileen. 
Psalms132:17 Ayae eng' olooto kuinetap Daudi kong'at; ki achop tait agobo nenyu ne iilat. 
Psalms132:18 Alaakyini puunikyik kalilanet; ago tuneni eng' ineendet naaryeennyi ne po pounateet. 
Psalms133:1 Ogeero, myee ne tya ak karaaran ne tya ye meng'indos che tupcho eng' yamdaet agenge!" 
Psalms133:2 Kergei ak mwaita ne karaaran miising' ne ki ile metit, ne kirootei agoi tamnet, agot tamnetap Aron: ne kirootei agoi kaatitap ngoroikyik." 
Psalms133:3 Uu rewootap Hermon, che choorchingei tuloonoogap Zion. Amu olooto ole king'ate Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaberuret, agot saboondap koigeny." 
Psalms134:1 Obwa, olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek kiboitinigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che tonondos kemoi eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms134:2 Otokyi eunekwok ye mi tiliilindo, ak olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms134:3 Ingoberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion; ineendet ne ki yai kipsengwet ak ng'wony. 
Psalms135:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Olasu kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; olasu ineendet, okweek kiboitinigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Psalms135:2 okweek che kotonondosi eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' seremusyegap kootap Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms135:3 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: otyenji kainennyi kalasunoik amu myee inee. 
Psalms135:4 Amu ki kolewenjigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo, ak Israel koek kinnyi ne nenyi iman." 
Psalms135:5 Amu angen ale oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak siirei Kiptaiyandennyo kamuktaik tugul. 
Psalms135:6 Ki koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiit age tugul ne chamei, eng' kipsengwet ak eng' ng'wony, eng' nyanjosyek ak rirosyek tugul." 
Psalms135:7 Igoochin kibungweret kotogosta kong'etee ole poochin ng'wony; yachin ropta kalyelosyek; imoong'u usoonet eng' konoraikyik. 
Psalms135:8 Ne ki par kiboretook che po Misiri, che po piik ak che kitwatei che kiyagi." 
Psalms135:9 Ki iyookto kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik koba kwenung'ung', ee Misiri, kobwonji Pharaoh ak otwogikyik tugul." 
Psalms135:10 Ne ki pir pororyosyek che chaang', ak ki par laitorinik che kiimeen:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, ak Og laitoryatap Bashan, ak laitornatosyek tugul che po Kanaan." 
Psalms135:12 Ak ki igoito emennywa koek poroteet, poroteetap piikyik Israel." 
Psalms135:13 Tebyei kaineng'ung' koigeny, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; tebyei kabwaateng'ung' eng' ibinwek tugul, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms135:14 Amu irwooksechin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik, ak koriiregei kiboitiinikyik." 
Psalms135:15 Kanamonigap pororyosyek ko po fedha ak thahabu. poisyetap eunegap piik. 
Psalms135:16 Tinyei kutusweek, ago ma twegu; tinyei koonyek, ago ma keertoi." 
Psalms135:17 Tinyei itiik, ago ma kastoi; ama mi kabuuset eng' kutusweekwak." 
Psalms135:18 Kergeitu icheeget che kiyaei, ak tuguuchooto; ee, age tugul ne imang'u icheek." 
Psalms135:19 Ee kootap Israel, olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Ee kootap Aron, olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms135:20 Ee kootap Lawi, olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Okweek che oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms135:21 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion, ineendet ne menyei Jerusalem. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms136:1 Ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi, amu myee ineendet; amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms136:2 Ee oweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne pou kamuktaik; amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:3 Ee oweekyi kongoi Kiptaiyatap kiptainik; amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:4 Ineendet ne yaei ineegei kwang'utik che eecheen; amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:5 Ineendet ne eng' kaguiyet ko ki yai kipsengwet, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:6 ineendet ne ki iito ng'wonyut eng' peek parak, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:7 ineedet ne ki yai lapkeiyosyek che eecheen, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:8 asiista ne pou eng' peetuut, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:9 arawek ak kecheik che pou eng' kemoi, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms136:10 Ineendet ne ki pir Misiri eng' taiywekwak, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:11 ak ki imut Israel komong' eng' kwenunnywa, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:12 eng' euut ne kiim ak eng' euut ne chuulaat, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:13 ineendet ne ki pcheune aeng' Araraita ne Piriir, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:14 ak ki igoochi Israel kobun kwenunnyi, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:15 ago ki toorchi Pharaoh ak lugosyekyik Araraita ne Piriir, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms136:16 Ineendet ne ki indochi piikyik kobun surkwen, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms136:17 Ineendet ne ki pir laitorinik che eecheen: amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny; 
Psalms136:18 ak ki par laitorinik che taagunotiin, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:19 Sihon laitoryatap Amorik, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:20 ak Og laitoryat Bashan, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:21 ak ki igoito emennywa koek poroteet, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:22 poroteetap kiboityondennyi Israel, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms136:23 Ne ki ibwaatech eng' nyeraatyennyo, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny;" 
Psalms136:24 ak ne ki ityaachech eng' puunikyok, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms136:25 Ineendet ne igoochin amitwogik tugul che po tuguuk tugul che saptos, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms136:26 Ee oweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet, amu tebyei rireenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms137:1 Eng' ngeguutap ainoosyegap Babilon, ko ki kitebee olooto ak ki kiriirtosi, ye kingi pwaati Zion." 
Psalms137:2 Eng' keetiik che po kereruusyegap emonooto ko ki kigartate ketubosyekyok. 
Psalms137:3 Eng' olooto icheeget che kiluulech ko ki magenech tyenwogik, ak icheeget che ki inyalilech ko ki magenech poiboiyet, koleen, “Otyenwech tyendo agenge eng' tyenwogigap Zion!”" 
Psalms137:4 Kimuktoi ano ketyen tyendap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emet ne ki onon? 
Psalms137:5 Ngot autyenen, ee Jerusalem, ko ingoek eunnyu ne po tai ne meat!" 
Psalms137:6 Ingonamgei ng'elyeptanyu ak kutit, ngot koma abwaatin, ngo ma achame Jerusalem kosiir poiboiyennyu ne siirtoot." 
Psalms137:7 Ibwaat, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kiit ne ki yai piigap Edom peetuut ye ki kiluule Jerusalem; che kileen, “Obut! Obut! Agot oldanyi ole tonone kooriik!”" 
Psalms137:8 Ee, cheptap Babilon, ne tuun kiwong'un! Paibai ineendet ne igeerun ko uu ye ki iyaiywech!" 
Psalms137:9 Paibai ineendet ne namei manyuruniguk ak kowiire rwandet! 
Psalms138:1 Agoonin kongoi eng' muguleldanyu komugul; atyenun kalasunoik eng' taitap kanamonik. 
Psalms138:2 Agutunyi atokyinige hekalung'ung' ne tiliil, ak agoochini kaineng'ung' kongoi amu chamyeng'ung' ne tala amu imandang'ung'; amu ki ieet ng'olyoondeng'ung' kosiir kaineng'ung' komugul." 
Psalms138:3 Ki iwolwoo eng' peetuut ne ki aguurin, ki igimita eng' kimnateet eng' saboondanyu." 
Psalms138:4 Koonin kongoi laitorinik tugul che po ng'wony, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki kogas ng'aleegap kuting'ung'." 
Psalms138:5 Tyeni icheek agobo ortinwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu oo toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms138:6 Agot nga toroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kogeerei ne nyeraat, ago ingen ineendet menotyot agot ngo mi ole loo." 
Psalms138:7 Agot ngabunoti kwenutap nyalilda, ko inyee ne iriiba; iitoi eung'ung' igirindoe nereegegap puunikyuk; ak sarwo eung'ung' ne po tai." 
Psalms138:8 Isuldaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che nyoljino; tebyei rireeneng'ung' koigeny, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amebagaakte poisyonigap euneguk." 
Psalms139:1 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki isyacha ak ki inaa." 
Psalms139:2 Ingen ye atebye ak ye ang'eete, ingen kabwaatutikyuk agot ngimi ole loo." 
Psalms139:3 Isyachi ooreennyu ak ole arue, ak ingen ortinwekyuk tugul." 
Psalms139:4 Amu ma mi ng'olyoo ng'elyeptannyu, keero, ingen inyee tugul, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms139:5 Ki iyiema tai ak let, ak ki igonoora eung'ung'." 
Psalms139:6 Po kwong'eet ne oo eng' anee, ng'omnateet ne uu nooto; toroor miising', ma muuchi aityi." 
Psalms139:7 Awendi ano aistoegei Kabuuseng'ung' ne Tiliil? Anan amwechini ano ole memi? 
Psalms139:8 Ngatogoste kipsengwet, imi olooto; agot ngaite itogunnyu eng' ye mi che ki kobek, keero, imi olooto." 
Psalms139:9 Ngaip kebebaigap karon, ak awe atebee tabanwegap nyanjet;" 
Psalms139:10 agot eng' olooto kondoiywa eung'ung', ak nama eung'ung' ne po tai." 
Psalms139:11 Ngot amwa ale, “Tucha mesundeito iman, ak ngale koek lapkeiyet ne yiema, kemout, ”" 
Psalms139:12 ko agot mesundeito, koma ung'enengei, ago iluu kemout ko uu peet; kergei mesundeito ak lapkeiyet eng' inyee." 
Psalms139:13 Amu inyee ne ki iyai saboondanyu; ki itucha eng' moetap kamennyu. 
Psalms139:14 Aweegun kongoi, amu ki kiyaa eng' ooreetap kaiyweisyet, ak eng' kwang'utyet. Kwang'utik poisyoniguk. ak ingen saboondanyu ng'olyoondonooto komyee." 
Psalms139:15 Ma ung'enenge poortanyu, ye ki kiyaa eng' ung'oot, ak ye ki kimimia eng' ng'omnateet eng' ng'wony oriit." 
Psalms139:16 Ki keer konyeguk poortanyu kotom kosulda, ki kisirchi bukuing'ung' kebeberwekyuk tugul, che ki kiyaei peetuut age tugul, ye kitom kobiit agot agenge eng' icheek." 
Psalms139:17 Korooron ne tya kabwaatutiguk che iting'ena, ee Kamuktaindet! Eechen ne tya icheek tugul ko kagiyomo!" 
Psalms139:18 Nda aiiti icheek, ko chaang' kosiir ng'aniek; ye agosu, kota ami kobooten." 
Psalms139:19 Iman, ibare kiptengeginik, ee Kamuktaindet: Oistoenage anyun, okweek piik che tumdoi korotiik." 
Psalms139:20 Amu mwaei icheek tengekto agobo inyee, ak mwaei kaineng'ung' puch puuniguk." 
Psalms139:21 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tos ma weche icheek che wechin? Ak ma nereekyini icheek che ng'eetyinin?" 
Psalms139:22 Aweche icheek konyi; aiiti icheek ale puunikyuk. 
Psalms139:23 Isyacha, ee Kamuktaindet, ak inai muguleldanyu; tyema, ak inai kabwaatutikyuk." 
Psalms139:24 Keer ngo mi oor age tugul ne po tengek eng' anee, ak indoiywa eng' ooreet ne po koigeny." 
Psalms140:1 Sarwo, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' chiito ne ya; riibo eng' chiito ne koroom;" 
Psalms140:2 che ibwaati yaitwogik eng' mugulelwekwak; iyomdoskei kotugul agobo lugeet. 
Psalms140:3 Ki kolit ng'elyebwekwak ko uu ereneet; miitei ng'wonetap erenook kutusweekwak. 
Psalms140:4 Riibo, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' eunegap kiptengekyot; riibo eng' chiito ne koroom ne pekyinot kotoorta." 
Psalms140:5 Kigouny menotik mesteet agobo anee, ak poroonik; kigoiito mesteet ne uu regereiywot eng' ooreet taban; ki koriich mestonok agobo anee." 
Psalms140:6 Ki aleenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Inyee ko ii Kamuktaindennyu.” Epchi iit soomutikyuk che punu kutinnyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Psalms140:7 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kiptaiyandennyu, kimnateetap yetunennyu, ki ituch metinnyu eng' peetuutap lugeet." 
Psalms140:8 Amegoochi kiptengeginik tuguuk che machei, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ametoret konyoor magennyi ne ya; si ma yaigei koeegitu." 
Psalms140:9 Ago ingotuch metowegap icheeget che yiema, yaityetap kutusweekwak." 
Psalms140:10 Ingobutyi icheek ng'etetyot! ingewiirchi icheek rirosyek, si mata kong'eetyo kogeny." 
Psalms140:11 Ma kigimiti chiito ne po ng'aleek che yaach eng' emet; cheeng'ei yaityet chiito ne koroom, si koterteer ineendet." 
Psalms140:12 Angen ale toreti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleegap ne kinyaliili, ak kiit ne nyoljin ineendet ne panani." 
Psalms140:13 Iman, igoochin kongoi kaineng'ung' piik che po imanda; menyei taing'ung' che lititen." 
Psalms141:1 Kaaguurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; chogu nyoonjo; epchi iit kutinnyu ye aguurin. 
Psalms141:2 Ingotogosta saaennyu ko uu nyamdutik eng' taing'ung'; ingoigei eunekyuk che anamjini parak korosyot ne po koskoleny. 
Psalms141:3 Nde riibindet kutinnyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; riip kurgeetap kutinnyu." 
Psalms141:4 Ametokyi muguleldanyu kiy age tugul ne ya, koyai poisyonigap tengekto kobooto piik che yaei tengekto; amechamwo aam tuguukwak che anyiny." 
Psalms141:5 Ingobira ne po iman, si koek nooto ne myee. Mechamji mwaita ne po kiptengeginik koiil metinnyu; amu ma metoi asa agirinda tengekwogikwak." 
Psalms141:6 Ye ki kitoorta kirwoogikwak kong'irtae rwandet, kogas anyun kole anyinyen ng'aleekyuk." 
Psalms141:7 Ko uu ye ibati chiito ng'wonyut ak kogereeri, ko uu nooto iseeroksei kawekyok eng' kutitap kererit." 
Psalms141:8 Amu inyalin konyekyuk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kiptaiyandennyu; amang'un inyee; amegoochi saboondanyu konyalil." 
Psalms141:9 Riibo si ma nama mesteet ne ki riich icheek agobo anee, ak mestonogap yaigap yaityo." 
Psalms141:10 Ingobutyi kiptengeginik mestonokwak, ye achilili." 
Psalms142:1 Ariirchini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kutinnyu; atwekyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aipchini soomennyu. 
Psalms142:2 Aroong'jini tainnyi riirekyuk; aboortoi eng' tainnyi nyalildanyu. 
Psalms142:3 Ye kingo tanui saboondanyu, inai ooreennyu. Kigouny icheek mesteet agobo anee eng' ooreet ne abune." 
Psalms142:4 Kusyi kong' eunnyu ne po tai, ak igeer; amu ma mi chii ne ingeno; ki kobetwa ole amwechini, ma mi chii ne riibei saboondanyu." 
Psalms142:5 Ariirchin inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki amwa ale, “Ii oldanyu ole amwechini, ii kebebertanyu eng' emetap che saptos.”" 
Psalms142:6 Epchi iit riirekyuk, amu kinyerata miising'; sarwo eng' usiikyuk, amu kiimeen kosiiro." 
Psalms142:7 Imoong'u saboondanyu eng' korgoreet, si aweekyi kongoi kaineng'ung'. Yiema che po iman komoswekyuk tugul, amu iyaiywo eng' aiyebindo." 
Psalms143:1 Kas saaennyu, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Epchi iit soomutikyuk, wolwo eng' imandang'ung' ak lititindang'ung'." 
Psalms143:2 Amerwookyi otwogindeng'ung'; amu ma mi chii ne sabei ne kiityin imanda eng' taing'ung'. 
Psalms143:3 Amu kigous puunyoot saboondanyu; kigokwer saboondanyu kobutyi ng'wony, kigo koono ameng'oot ole imen, ko uu che ki kobek keny." 
Psalms143:4 Kigo tanui amu saboondanyu eng' oriit; kaek muguleldanyu kipkuberet eng' oriit. 
Psalms143:5 Abwaatati peetuusyek che po keny; aruchinoti poisyoniguk tugul, aruchinoti poisyonigap euneguk." 
Psalms143:6 Atokyinin eunekyuk; amei melelda saboondanyu agobo inyee ko uu emet ne yaamaat. 
Psalms143:7 Chokyi wolwo, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ichuchui saboondanyu. Ameung'ena togeng'ung'; si ma ige icheek che choorchingei keriinget." 
Psalms143:8 Koono agas chamyeng'ung' ne tala karon; amu amang'un. Koono anai ooreet ne abune; amu atokyinin saboondanyu. 
Psalms143:9 Sarwo, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' puunikyuk; amwechinin iunya." 
Psalms143:10 Ineeta ayai mageng'ung'; amu inyee ko ii Kamuktaindennyu. Myee kabuuseng'ung'; ingondoiywa eng' emetap lititindo. 
Psalms143:11 Isooba, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu kaineng'ung'. Imoong'u saboondanyu eng' nyalilda amu imandang'ung'." 
Psalms143:12 Ak ing'eti puunikyuk eng' chamyeng'ung' ne tala, ak ing'em icheek tugul che inyalili saboondanyu; amu aa kiboityondeng'ung'." 
Psalms144:1 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rwandennyu, ne ineeti eunekyuk lugeet, ak koneeti morikyuk pooryeet." 
Psalms144:2 Ineendet chamyennyu ne tala ak irimennyu, teeksennyu ne kooi ak saruunindennyu; long'ennyu ak ineendet ne amang'u; ne igoochin piikyuk kogasa iit." 
Psalms144:3 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tos nee chii kot inai? Anan weeriitap chii, ne tos iit ile kiy?" 
Psalms144:4 Kergei chii ak kiy puch; uu peetuusyekyik merumbet ne siirtoi. 
Psalms144:5 Ing'uruuch kipsengwetisyeguk, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ichooruge! Twa tuloonook, si koiyenso!" 
Psalms144:6 Iyookte kalyeleet, ak iyeste icheek; mwokte kipchaboniguk, ak inyaliil icheek." 
Psalms144:7 Iyogou eung'ung' eng' parak; ityacha ak isarwo eng' peek che chaang', eng' eunegap toek;" 
Psalms144:8 che nyalili kutusweekwak tuguugap puch, ak eunekwak che po tai ko eunek che po lembech." 
Psalms144:9 Atyenun tyendo ne leel, ee Kamuktaindet, atyenun kalasunoik eng' kibugandet ne po inoik taman." 
Psalms144:10 Ineendet ne igoochin katerteerisyet laitorinik, ne saru Daudi kiboityondennyi." 
Psalms144:11 Ityacha eng' rotweet ne koroom, ak isarwo eng' eunegap toek, che ng'alaali kutusweekwak lembecheek, ak eunekwak che po tai ko eunek che po lembech." 
Psalms144:12 Ngo kergeit weeriikyok che ta ko neran ak keetiik che piitos; ak kogergeit tiibiikyok ak koigap luuita che ki kiwai ko uu che po kootap laitoryat. 
Psalms144:13 Ngo ek chogenikyok che nyiitaat tuguuk tugul che konorotiin, ngo iiyo keechiirekyok eliphuusyek ak tamanusyegap eliphuusyek eng' korotinwekyok;" 
Psalms144:14 ak ngo ek eikyok che kiimen ye laisei. Ma piitu ne iboogu, ama mi ondo, amat kobiit kateiyet eng' ortinwekyok che eecheen." 
Psalms144:15 Poiboen piik che ityin kaberuret ko uu nooto; poiboen piik che Kamuktaindennywa ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Psalms145:1 Alasun inyee, ee Kamuktaindennyu ak Laitoryannyu; ak alasu kaineng'ung' koigeny ak koigeny." 
Psalms145:2 Amwae peetuut age tugul ale iberuurot; ak alasu kaineng'ung' koigeny ak koigeny. 
Psalms145:3 Oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kanyool kilas miising'; ama isiagaksei etunatennyi." 
Psalms145:4 Ilasu poisyoniguk ibinda age agoi ibinda age, ak mwaitoi poisyoniguk che po kamuktaet." 
Psalms145:5 Abwaatati telunateet ne oo ne po teegistang'ung', ak ne po poisyoniguk che po kwong'eet." 
Psalms145:6 Mwaitoi piik agobo kamuktaetap poisyoniguk che kiywei; ak amwaitoi ooindang'ung'. 
Psalms145:7 Twegu icheek komwaei kabwaatetap myeeindong'ung' ne oo, ak tyeni icheek agobo imandang'ung'." 
Psalms145:8 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko ne po myeeindo ak ko nyiitaat rireenet; ma sip konereechi ak tinyei rireenet ne oo. 
Psalms145:9 Myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' piik tugul; ak pou rireenosyekyik che talaen poisyonikyik tugul. 
Psalms145:10 Weegun kongoi poisyoniguk tugul, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak iberuurin cheguuk che tiliileen." 
Psalms145:11 Ng'alaali icheek agobo toroornatetap laitornateng'ung', ak ng'alaale kimnateng'ung'," 
Psalms145:12 koboorchi weeriigap piik poisyonikyik che po kamuktaet, ak toroornatetap etunateet ne po laitornatennyi." 
Psalms145:13 Laitornateng'ung' ko laitornatet ne po koigeny; ak tebyei laitornateng'ung' eng' ibinwek tugul. 
Psalms145:14 Tiiei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tugul che ibutos, ak ing'eeti icheeget tugul che ing'uruuksei." 
Psalms145:15 Igenin konyegap piik tugul; ak igoochini amitwogikwak eng' peetuut ne nyolu. 
Psalms145:16 Ing'aanye eung'ung', ak igoochini age tugul ne sabei kiit ne machei kot kobiyo." 
Psalms145:17 Po iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ortinwekyik tugul, ak tala eng' poisyonikyik tugul." 
Psalms145:18 Neegitee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheeget tugul che kuurei ineendet, tugul che kuurei ineendet eng' iman." 
Psalms145:19 Isuldochin icheeget che iywei ineendet kiit ne machei icheek; kasei ineendet riirekwak, ak saru icheeget." 
Psalms145:20 Riibei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tugul che chamei ineendet; a, o ng'emei kiptengeginik." 
Psalms145:21 Ng'alaali kutinnyu agobo kalasunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ilasu piik tugul kainennyi ne tiliil koigeny ak koigeny. 
Psalms146:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee saboondanyu." 
Psalms146:2 Alasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kota asabe; atyenjini Kamuktaindennyu kalasunoik kotee asabe. 
Psalms146:3 Amat omang'u pounik, anan weeriitap chii, ne ma mi toreteet eng' ineendet." 
Psalms146:4 Mandoi kabusennyi, weekyingei ng'ung'unyekyik; petos kabwaatutikyik eng' peetuunooto." 
Psalms146:5 Paibai chii ne Kamuktaindetap Jakobo ko toreteennyi, ne mi kamuung'ennyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi," 
Psalms146:6 ne ki yai kipsengwet ak ng'wony, nyanjet, ak tugul che mi olooto; ne riibei imanda koigeny;" 
Psalms146:7 ne irwooksechinechin che kiusei: ne igoochin amitwogik che amei rubeet. Ityachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ratotiin; 
Psalms146:8 yaatei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyegap che koryotiin. Ing'eeti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ing'uruuksei; chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek che po iman. 
Psalms146:9 Riibei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor toek; tiiei ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget; ago igabui `inee ooreetap kiptengekyot. 
Psalms146:10 Laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny, laitorani Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' ibinwek tugul, ee Zion. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms147:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Myee ne tya ketyenji Kamuktaindennyo kalasunoik; amu karaaran, ak nyoljin tyendap kalasunet." 
Psalms147:2 Teechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jerusalem; iyumi ineendet che ki kioon che po Israel. 
Psalms147:3 Inyai che ilyotiin mugulelwekwak, ak koratei mookwak." 
Psalms147:4 Iiti kecheik ole tee; tochin icheek tugul kainaik. 
Psalms147:5 Oo Kiptaiyandennyo, ak tinyei kimnateet ne oo kosiir; ma kimuuchi ketet ng'omnatennyi." 
Psalms147:6 Tiiei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che iming'inegei; ago chooru kiptengeginik kobwa ng'wony. 
Psalms147:7 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto kagoitoetap kongoi; otyenji Kamuktaindennyo kalasunoik eng' ketubet. 
Psalms147:8 Tugee inee poolik kipsengwet, chopchin ropta ng'wony, ak ibiti susweek eng' tuloonook." 
Psalms147:9 Igoochin `inee amitwogik tyong'ik, ak chepkuginik che iteeitos." 
Psalms147:10 Ma paibai ineendet eng' kimnateetap paraisiit, ama paibai eng' labatindet;" 
Psalms147:11 ago paibai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' icheek che iywei ineendet, eng' icheeget che imang'u rireenennyi." 
Psalms147:12 Ilasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee Jerusalem! Ilasu Kamuktaindeng'ung', ee Zion!" 
Psalms147:13 Amu igimiti `inee temeleiywegap ormariichoguk; iberuuri lagoguk eng' kwenung'ung'. 
Psalms147:14 Yaei kaalyeet eng' kiwotosyeguk; inyiitin nganuuk che neryootiin kosiir. 
Psalms147:15 Iyookyin ng'wony ng'atuutyennyi; ak labati ng'olyoondennyi miising'. 
Psalms147:16 Koonu teluji ko uu koroorigap keechiirek; iseeroti chepkoset ko uu oreek. 
Psalms147:17 Iyooktoi peekyik ko uu koik ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taitap kaitityennyi? 
Psalms147:18 Iyooktoi ng'olyoondennyi, ak koyaei tuguuchooto kochootyo; yaei usoonennyi kous, ak koroot peek." 
Psalms147:19 Iboorchin Jakobo ng'olyoondennyi, iboorchin Israel ng'atuutikyik ak kirwoogutikyik." 
Psalms147:20 Ma yachin pororyet age tugul ko uu nooto; ama nai icheek kirwoogutikyik. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! 
Psalms148:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kipsengwet; olasu ineendet eng' komoswek che torooreen. 
Psalms148:2 Olasu ineendet, okweek malaikaisyekyik tugul; olasu ineendet, okweek lugosyekyik tugul." 
Psalms148:3 Olasu ineendet, okweek asiista ak arawet; olasu ineendet, okweek kecheik tugul che oo po lapkeiyet." 
Psalms148:4 Olasu ineendet, okweek kipsengwetisyegap kipsengwet, ak okweek peek che omi paragutap kipsengwet." 
Psalms148:5 Ingolas icheek kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki ng'at, ak ki yaogis." 
Psalms148:6 Kigogimiit `inee chooto kotebi koigeny ak koigeny; ki koyai ng'atuutyet ne ma igeesugei. 
Psalms148:7 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'wony, okweek maswetisyek ak rirosyek tugul." 
Psalms148:8 Olasu maat ak koiyat, teluji ak kibungweret; ak kipchurchuryet ye osuldochini ng'olyoondennyi." 
Psalms148:9 Olasu okweek tuloonook ak tuloonook che mengeechen; keetiik che iytos, ak taragonik tugul!" 
Psalms148:10 Tyong'ik ak tuuga tugul; tuguuk che ichuutegei ng'wony ak toriitik che tirirendos! 
Psalms148:11 Laitorinigap ng'wony ak pororyosyek tugul; pounik ak kirwoogik tugul che po ng'wony! 
Psalms148:12 Murenik ak tiibiik; poisyek ak lagok! 
Psalms148:13 Ingolas icheek kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kainennyi ineegei ne itoroorot: siirei toroornatennyi ng'wony ak kipsengwet. 
Psalms148:14 Ak ki kotoroor kuinetap piikyik, kalasunetap piikyik tugul che tiliileen; agot lagogap Israel, piik che neegitee ineendet. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Psalms149:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tyendo ne leel, ak kalasunennyi eng' tuiyetap che tiliileen." 
Psalms149:2 Ingobaibait Israel eng' yaindennyi; ingogaskei lagogap Zion eng' Laitoryandennywa. 
Psalms149:3 Ingolas kainennyi ye urerendos, ingotyenji ineendet kalasunoik eng' sugutit ne ming'in ak ketubet." 
Psalms149:4 Amu paibai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' piikyik; igororoni eng' yetunet che iming'inegei. 
Psalms149:5 Ingoboiboitu che tiliileen eng' telunateet; ingotyenso eng' poiboiyet eng' itogusyekwak. 
Psalms149:6 Ingotebee kutusweekwak kalasunoik che eecheen che po Kamuktaindet, ak ingotebee eunekwak rotwetap chok ne ng'atip komoswek tuwai;" 
Psalms149:7 si kobiit koyaakyi mugetuut pororyosyek, ak pireet ne pirei piik;" 
Psalms149:8 korat laitorinikwak eng' nyororosyek, ak korat eng' mugurek che po kariik chechwaak che taagunotiin," 
Psalms149:9 ak korwookyine kirwooget ne siraat. Tinyei teegisi chechiik tugul che tiliileen. Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! 
Psalms150:1 Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Olasu Kamuktaindet eng' oldanyi ne tiliil; olasu ineendet eng' yamunetap kimnateennyi. 
Psalms150:2 Olasu ineendet amu poisyonikyik che po kamuktaet; olasu ineendet ko uu ole tee etunatennyi ne telunoot miising'. 
Psalms150:3 Olasu ineendet eng' cheetap iryageet; olasu ineendet eng' kibugandet ak ketubet! 
Psalms150:4 Olasu ineendet eng' sugutit ne ming'in ak ureryet; olasu ineendet eng' kibugandinik che po inoik ak ndurerusyek. 
Psalms150:5 Olasu ineendet eng' sanisyegap sugunonik che kibirei che cheitos; olasu ineendet eng' sanisyegap sugunonik che cheitos miising'. 
Psalms150:6 Ingolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiy age tugul ne tinyei kabuuset! Olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! 
Proverbs1:1 Kalewenaigap Solomon weeriitap Daudi, laitoryatap Israel." 
Proverbs1:2 Kalewenaik ko koonu kaguiyet agobo utaatyet ak atebeet ne myee, koonu kaguiyet ne nin." 
Proverbs1:3 Ketaach kaneetisyet eng' atebeet ne myee, koek chii ne ititaat, imanda ak kirwooget ne nyolu." 
Proverbs1:4 Kigoochi ng'ulaatyet che perberen, kogoochi neran naet ak naet ne myee." 
Proverbs1:5 Si kobiit kogas chiito ne utaat, ak kotesak eng' kaneetetapkei; ak chiito ne tinyei kaguiyet konyoor kirwoogutik che po iman," 
Proverbs1:6 Koguiyo kalewenet ak kaarorennyi, koguiyo ng'aleegap piik che utaatiin ak ng'aleekwak che ung'ootiin." 
Proverbs1:7 Taunetap naet ko kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago sasei che perber utaatyet ak kaneetisyet. 
Proverbs1:8 Weeriinnyu, epchi iit kaneetisyetap kwandang'ung', amemete ng'atuutyetap kamenng'ung'." 
Proverbs1:9 Amu egu chooto naaryeetap myeeindo eng' meting'ung', ak koek sirimwek che mi kaating'ung'." 
Proverbs1:10 Weeriinnyu, ngo kaigain kiptengeginik, ko mecham." 
Proverbs1:11 Ngo mwa kole, “Nyoo keebe tugul, ongeribis keunygei si ketumde korotiik, ongeunykei kesapchi che ma tinyei leluut, agot ngo ma ting'enech ng'olyoo." 
Proverbs1:12 Ko uu Olemi Che ki kobek, ongelugui icheek kosaptos, kelugui kochamegei, ko uu che choorchingei Keriinget." 
Proverbs1:13 Kinyooru tuguuk tugul che po kamanuutyet ne oo; kinyiiti kooriikyok parunenik. 
Proverbs1:14 Ongenamge, si keyamde tuguukyok tugul.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Weeriinnyu, amobe ooreet agenge kobooto icheek; iste keeldong'ung' eng' ooreenywa." 
Proverbs1:16 Amu rwochin keelyekwak yaityet, ak choktoi kotumdoi korotiik." 
Proverbs1:17 Puch ye ki riichei mesteet, kogeerei toriityon age tugul." 
Proverbs1:18 Ribistos chuuto kotumdoi korotiikwak, unyegei kosapchin saboonwekwak." 
Proverbs1:19 Uu nooto ortinwegap age tugul ne kipkeiyat agobo kelunet; rebei saboonwegap piik. 
Proverbs1:20 Waachei miising' utaatyet eng' ooreet; ng'alaali eng' komoswek che paroen. 
Proverbs1:21 Kuursei eng' ole tuiyechin piik; eng' ormariichogap nganaseet ko mwaitoi ng'aleek: 
Proverbs1:22 “Ochame abusnateng'wong' kot kotyanit, okweek che oo abusatiin? Poiboitune chotiik chotisyennywa kot kotyanit, ak wechei che perber naet?" 
Proverbs1:23 Ogas oriip kateunennyu, ogeero, aroong'wok kabwaatutikyuk, ak ang'ang'wok ng'aleekyuk." 
Proverbs1:24 Amu ki aguurse, ago ki oeesye, ki aiite eunnyu, ago ma iit chii." 
Proverbs1:25 Ki osas kirwoogutikyuk tugul, ama ocham kateunennyu." 
Proverbs1:26 Arorye eng' peetuutap nyalildang'wong', achotisyei ye kanyo kaiyweisyeng'wong'," 
Proverbs1:27 ye kanyo kaiyweisyeng'wong' ko uu usoonet ne oo, ak ye kanyo nyalildang'wong' ko uu kipchurchuryet, ye kanyonjok pichiindo ak ng'wanindo." 
Proverbs1:28 Oguura anyun ago mawolu, ocheeng'a eng' kagiiletapkei ago monyorwo." 
Proverbs1:29 Amu ki owech naet, ama olewen oiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor;" 
Proverbs1:30 ama ocham kirwoogutikyuk, ki osas kateunaikyuk tugul," 
Proverbs1:31 amei anyun logoegap ortinwekwak, ak konyiak ng'aleekwak che yaacheen." 
Proverbs1:32 Amu parei icheek kachuchugetapkei ne po abusanik, ak ng'emei icheek poroteetap che perber." 
Proverbs1:33 Ago age tugul ne kasa kotebee chametapkei, ak imuunyi, ama iywei yaityet.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Weeriinnyu, ngitaach ng'aleekyuk, ak igonorchigei ng'atuutikyuk," 
Proverbs2:2 ngot iepchi iit utaatyet, ak itokyi muguleldang'ung' kaguiyet;" 
Proverbs2:3 ngot iguur naet, ak iwaach agobo kaguiyet;" 
Proverbs2:4 ngot icheeng' ko uu ye icheeng'e fedha, ak icheeng' ko uu ye icheeng'e konoraik che ung'ootiin," 
Proverbs2:5 iguitosi anyun kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak inyooru naet agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs2:6 Amu igoitoi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor utaatyet, mang'une kutinnyi naet ak kaguiyet." 
Proverbs2:7 Konorchin che po iman utaatyet ne ititaat, ineendet long'eetap icheek che pendote imanda." 
Proverbs2:8 Si kobiit koriip ortinwegap kirwooget, ak koriibei ortinwegap piikyik che tiliileen." 
Proverbs2:9 Iguiye anyun imanda ak kirwooget, ak ne nyolu, ak ooreet age tugul ne myee." 
Proverbs2:10 Amu chutei utaatyet muguleldang'ung', ak kobaibai naet saboondang'ung';" 
Proverbs2:11 Riibin ruchiinet, ak riibin kaguiyet:" 
Proverbs2:12 Si kosaruun eng' ooreetap chiito ne ya, ak eng' piik che mwaei tuguuk che imaasotin," 
Proverbs2:13 che laaktoi ortinwegap lititindo si kobendatee ortinwegap mesundeito," 
Proverbs2:14 che poiboitune koyai yaityet, ak koboiboitune mastaetap piik che yaacheen;" 
Proverbs2:15 che kunuuren ortinwekwak, ak komaasotin eng' ortinwekwak." 
Proverbs2:16 Si kosaruun eng' chepkugoniot, ak eng' kwondo ne chemwai kuut," 
Proverbs2:17 ne ki kometo chamaneet ne kinerchindos tuwai, ak kobistoe kayomisetap Kamuktaindennyi." 
Proverbs2:18 Choorchingei koonnyi meet, ak pendi ortinwekyik ye mi che ki kobek:" 
Proverbs2:19 Ma weeksei age tugul ne wendi oldanyi, ama itei ole mi ortinwegap saboondo." 
Proverbs2:20 Ara wendote anyun ortinwegap piik che myach, ak isup ortinwegap piik che po iman." 
Proverbs2:21 Amu menyei emet `piik che po iman, ak ng'etune olooto che ititaatiin." 
Proverbs2:22 Ago ki istoi piik che yaacheen eng' emet, ak kitutu eng' emet che yaei kaberberisyet." 
Proverbs3:1 Weeriinnyu, ameutyee kaneetisyennyu, ago ingoriip `muguleldang'ung' ng'atuutikyuk;" 
Proverbs3:2 amu tesun chooto chaang'indap peetuusyek, kenyiisyegap sabeet ak kaalyeet." 
Proverbs3:3 Amecham koistoenengei rireenet ak iman. Ratyi kaating'ung', sirchi muguleldang'ung'." 
Proverbs3:4 Si inyooru anyun chameet ak kaguiyet ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ak piik. 
Proverbs3:5 Imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' muguleldang'ung' tugul, ametiegei naeng'ung'." 
Proverbs3:6 Ng'aany ineendet eng' ortinweguk tugul, si kolitiitu ortinweguk." 
Proverbs3:7 Amendegei inyegei ile ii utaat; iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak iistoegei yaityo." 
Proverbs3:8 Egu niito anyun chametapkei ne po mugeng'ung', ak koek mwanik eng' koweguk." 
Proverbs3:9 Konyitee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuguk, ak eng' tongoanigap rurateng'ung' tugul;" 
Proverbs3:10 si konyi chogeniguk eng' aiyebindo, ak kong'irtagei divaik che leelach eng' ole ituisye." 
Proverbs3:11 Weeriinnyu, amesas katigonetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ameng'et eng' kateunennyi;" 
Proverbs3:12 amu iteechin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor age tugul ne chamei, ko uu ye iteechin kwanda weeriinnyi ne poiboitune." 
Proverbs3:13 Paibai chiito ne nyooru utaatyet, ak chiito ne nyooru kaguiyet." 
Proverbs3:14 Amu siirei chemung'arainateet ne po ng'omnateet ne po fedha, ak siirei keljinet ne kenyoorunee nooto thahabu che korooron." 
Proverbs3:15 Po kamanuutyet ne oo ineendet kosiir koiik che kiguure peninim, ak tuguuk tugul che imache koma mi che kiroge ng'omnateet." 
Proverbs3:16 Mi eunnyi ne po tai chaang'indap peetuusyek; komi eunnyi ne po kaataam mogornatosyek ak teegisto. 
Proverbs3:17 Po kagasetapkei ortinwekyik, ak kaalyeet ortinwekyik tugul." 
Proverbs3:18 Ineendet ko keetitap saboondo eng' icheek che namei, ak paibai age tugul ne namegei ak ineendet." 
Proverbs3:19 Ki lum `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony eng' utaatyet, ki igimit kipsengwet eng' kaguiyet." 
Proverbs3:20 Kipcheak rirosyek eng' naennyi, ak isaau poolik rewoot." 
Proverbs3:21 Weeriinnyu, amengoistoenengei chooto eng' taing'ung'; isup utaatyet ne ititaat ak ruchiinet." 
Proverbs3:22 Egu anyun chooto saboondo eng' muguleldang'ung', ak koek myeeindo eng' kaating'ung'." 
Proverbs3:23 Iwendote anyun oreng'ung' eng' chametapkei, ama riichin kiy." 
Proverbs3:24 Meiywei kiy ye irue; ye iru, koanyinyitu rwondang'ung'." 
Proverbs3:25 Amearageni eng' ne cheein, anan eng' ng'emisyetap kiptengeginik ye kait." 
Proverbs3:26 Amu egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamang'uneng'ung', ak koriibei ineendet keeldong'ung' ama ki nam." 
Proverbs3:27 Ameetee myeeindo che nyoljin kigoochi, ye itinye kimnateet ne iyae." 
Proverbs3:28 Ameleenji chiitap kokweng'ung', “Ui, si iweege, si agoonin mutai.” Ye itinye kiit ne machei." 
Proverbs3:29 Amechopchi yaityet chiitap kokweng'ung', amu menyei ole neegiteenen eng' chametapkei." 
Proverbs3:30 Amobeelgei ak chii puch, ngot koma yaun kiy ne ya." 
Proverbs3:31 Amat koamjin ng'etkong' chiito ne koroom, amelewen age tugul eng' ortinwekyik." 
Proverbs3:32 Amu wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ngelelyot, ago mi ung'ootikyik ak piigap iman." 
Proverbs3:33 Mi chubetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap kiptengekyot; ago iberuuri meng'ootetap piik che po iman. 
Proverbs3:34 Chotei ineendet iman chotiik, ago igoochin myeeindo che iming'inegei." 
Proverbs3:35 Punjin toroornatet piik che utaatiin, ago egu teweernateet etunatetap che perber." 
Proverbs4:1 Ogas werchu katigonetap kwanda, ak oep iit si kobiit onai kaguiyet." 
Proverbs4:2 Amu agoonok kaneetisyet ne myee, amobagaakte ng'atuutyennyu." 
Proverbs4:3 Amu ye ki aa ming'in eng' kootap abba, ki aa tala ak ki aa chamat eng' taitap kamennyu," 
Proverbs4:4 ko ki ineeta abba, koleenjo, “Ingotebee muguleldang'ung' ng'aleekyuk; riip ng'atuutikyuk, si isap." 
Proverbs4:5 Cheeng'jigei utaatyet, cheeng'jingei kaguiyet; ameutyee anan istoegei ng'aleekyuk che amwae." 
Proverbs4:6 Amemete, si koriibin; cham, si koriibin." 
Proverbs4:7 Taunetap utaatyet ko icheeng'jigei utaatyet; ee, kobooto tuguuk tugul che itinye, icheeng'jigei naet." 
Proverbs4:8 Itoroor, si kolanden; imutyinin teegisto ye onamge ak ineendet." 
Proverbs4:9 Indoi meting'ung' sonoegap myeeindo; koonin naaryeetap telunateet.” 
Proverbs4:10 Weeriinnyu, kas ak itaach tuguuk che amwae, si kochang'a kenyiisyegap sabeeng'ung'." 
Proverbs4:11 Ki aneetiin eng' ooreetap utaatyet; ki andoun eng' ortinwegap lititindo. 
Proverbs4:12 Ye iwendi koma igiichi kiy kakwautiguk; ak ngot ilabati, koma riichin kiy." 
Proverbs4:13 Nam miising' kaneetisyet; matichamji kwo; riip, amu ineendet ko saboondang'ung'." 
Proverbs4:14 Mechut ooreetap kiptengeginik, amewendotee ooreetap piik che yaacheen." 
Proverbs4:15 Istoegei nooto, mebun ole neegitee, iweeige eng' ole mi ak isiirte." 
Proverbs4:16 Amu ma inuuktos kobatee ko kagoyai yaityet; istoegei icheek kanuuget, agoi konach chiito age." 
Proverbs4:17 Amu amei amitwogigap yaityet, ak koeei divaigap koroomnateet." 
Proverbs4:18 Ago ooreetap che po iman ko uu lapkeiyet ne iluu, ne iluu ko tesoksei agoi peetuut ne ititaat." 
Proverbs4:19 Ooreetap kiptengeginik ko uu mesundeito; ma naei kiit ne riichei icheek. 
Proverbs4:20 Weeriinnyu, kas ng'aleekyuk; epchi iit ng'aleek che amwae." 
Proverbs4:21 Amat ingoistoegei taing'ung'; riip kotebee muguleldang'ung' oriit. 
Proverbs4:22 Amu saboondo eng' icheeget che nyooru, ak chametapkei ne po poorwekwak." 
Proverbs4:23 Riip muguleldang'ung' eng' kagiiletapkei tugul, amu yooto ko punu kong'igap peegap saboon." 
Proverbs4:24 Istoegei kutit ne ngelelyo, ak iistoegei kutit ne mwaei ng'aleek che po kamaaset." 
Proverbs4:25 Keer tai, ak ingogeer konyeguk tai." 
Proverbs4:26 Ruchi komyee ole punei keelyeguk, ak ingogimegitu ortinweguk tugul." 
Proverbs4:27 Amemaste iwe eutap tai anan ne po kaataam; istoe keeldong'ung' yaityet. 
Proverbs5:1 Weeriinnyu, kas utaatyennyu; epchi iit kaguiyennyu," 
Proverbs5:2 si kobiit iriip naet ne myee, si koriip `kuting'ung' naet." 
Proverbs5:3 Amu kutitap chepkugoniot kosaune kumyat, ak ng'aleekyik ko tangusen kosiir mwai;" 
Proverbs5:4 ago ng'waan kagesunennyi ko uu ng'wonet, ng'atip ko uu rotwetap chok ne ng'atiben komoswek tuwai." 
Proverbs5:5 Choorchingei keelyekyik meet; namegei kakwautikyik ak ye mi che ki kobek," 
Proverbs5:6 Ma nyooru ineendet ooreet ne litit ne po saboondo; ma tononiotiin ortinwekyik, ama naei." 
Proverbs5:7 Ogasa anyun, werchu, amoistoegei ng'aleek che amwae." 
Proverbs5:8 Iste oreng'ung' kolooit eng' korgonooto, ameriikyi kurgeetap koonnyi," 
Proverbs5:9 si megoochi teegistang'ung' piik alak, ak igoochi kenyisyeguk piik che kolgol;" 
Proverbs5:10 si ma nyoor kobaibaegei toek kimnateng'ung'; si ma tebee poisyoniguk che kiimeen kootap toondet; 
Proverbs5:11 si iriir let, ye kang'emak panyeeguk ak poortang'ung'," 
Proverbs5:12 ak imwa ile, “Tya weget ne ki awech kergong'yet, ak saset ne ki sas muguleldanyu kateunet!" 
Proverbs5:13 Ama agas iit kaneetikyuk, ama epchi iit piik che ki ineeta." 
Proverbs5:14 Nguno ko kaariikyi yaityet tugul eng' kwenutap tuiyet ak kayumetapkei.” 
Proverbs5:15 Ee peek che mi tereeng'ung', peek che rootei eng' keriingeng'ung'," 
Proverbs5:16 Tos kanyool koseergei kondametusyeguk po peek eng' olo tugul, ainoosyeguk po peek eng' ortinwek?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ingobunjin inyee inyegei, amat kobunji toek che mi kobooten." 
Proverbs5:18 Ingoberuurok kondametung'ung' po peek, ak paibaitune osotyotap ming'inateng'ung'," 
Proverbs5:19 uu kenyeleet ne karaaran ak sitwet ne tala. Ingoyamin kinaikyik kotugul, ak paibaitune chamyennyi kotugul." 
Proverbs5:20 Weeriinnyu, amu nee si ibaibaegei chepkugoniot, ak isuup tegetap chepkugoniot?" 
Proverbs5:21 Amu ortinwegap chii ko keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koriibei mitainik tugul che po chiichooto. 
Proverbs5:22 Namei `kiptengekyot yaitwogikyik, ak keratee ineendet poroonigap tengektanyi." 
Proverbs5:23 Meei ama tinyei atep ne myee, ak petei amu ooindap perberyennyi." 
Proverbs6:1 Weeriinnyu, ngot iegu ne itononjini chiitap kokweng'ung', ngot ko kooyosye onamge eunek ak kipsagarin," 
Proverbs6:2 ye kagoriichin anyun ng'aleek che imwae, kagoratin ng'aleek che imwae," 
Proverbs6:3 Yai anyun niito, weeriinnyu, si isaruge, amu kagonamin eutap chiitap kokweng'ung'; ui iming'ingei, ak igaigai chiitap kokweng'ung'." 
Proverbs6:4 Megoochi konyeguk koru, anan konuuch kamismiseng'ung' po kong'." 
Proverbs6:5 Sarugei ko uu ye sarugei kenyeleet eng' kiplogotyot, ko uu toriityon ne sarugei eng' eutap namindetap toriitik." 
Proverbs6:6 Ui ye mi pirechet, inyee ne ii choriren; ibwaat ortinwekyik si iegu ne utaat." 
Proverbs6:7 Ma tinyei kirwoogindet, anan ne iyagi, anan pounindet," 
Proverbs6:8 ago konorchingei amitwogik eng' kemei, ak koyumi amitwogikyik eng' kesiisyo." 
Proverbs6:9 Ee chorirenoni, irue kot kotyanit? Ing'eete au eng' rwondong'ung'?" 
Proverbs6:10 Rwondo kitigin, kanuuget kitigin, namet kitigin ne po eunek si kinuuch," 
Proverbs6:11 eng' let konyonjin pananda ko uu rebindet, ak konyo rartaet ko uu chiito ne tinyei kariik." 
Proverbs6:12 Wendoti chii ne ma tilei kiy, chii ne ya, koibooti ng'aleek che po kamaaset," 
Proverbs6:13 ng'wegisye konyekyik, ak kong'alaale keelyekyik, ng'alaale moriikyik." 
Proverbs6:14 Mi mastaet muguleldanyi, chobei yaityet kotugul, koolei toiyet." 
Proverbs6:15 Cheei anyun ineendet nyalildanyi; ng'emaksei eng' chokyinet ama mi kiy ne kinyae. 
Proverbs6:16 Miitei tuguuk lo che wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ee, tuguuk tisap che wechei ineendet:" 
Proverbs6:17 konyegap menoteet, ng'elyepta ne mwaei lembech, ak eunek che tumdoi korotiik che ma tinyei tengek," 
Proverbs6:18 muguleldo ne chobei kabwaatutik che yaach, keelyek che chepchep korwochin yaityet," 
Proverbs6:19 paoryat ne ma po iman ne mwaei lembech, ak ineendet ne koolei toiyet eng' kwenutap tupchosyek." 
Proverbs6:20 Weeriinnyu, riip kayomisutyetap kwandang'ung', amemete kaneetisyetap kamenng'ung'." 
Proverbs6:21 Ratyi chooto muguleldang'ung' kotugul, ak iratyi kaating'ung'." 
Proverbs6:22 Si ye iwendoti, kondoun; ye irue, koriibin, ak ye ing'eete, kong'alaalun." 
Proverbs6:23 Amu kayomisutyet ko tait, ak ng'atuutyet ko lapkeiyet, ak kereetap kong' ne po katigonet ko ooreetap saboondo." 
Proverbs6:24 Riibin eng' kwondo ne ya, ee riibin eng' chemwaigutnatetap chepkugoniot." 
Proverbs6:25 Amegase myat eng' muguleldang'ung' karaaranindanyi, amengoriigenen konyekyik." 
Proverbs6:26 Amu ibeeti chepkugoniot chiito agoi kong'etyi kererutyet, ak cheeng'oti chepkugoniot koriich saboondo ne karaaran." 
Proverbs6:27 Tos imuuchi chii konamji maat tegeennyi, ama lalyo ngoroikyik?" 
Proverbs6:28 Tos imuuchi chii kotyegaat ng'etetyot, ama lalyo keelyekyik?" 
Proverbs6:29 Uu nooto chiito ne ibegei ak osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi; age tugul ne twaei ineendet koma kibagaaktoi puch. 
Proverbs6:30 Masasei piik choriindet, ngo choorso si kobiyo ye amei rubeet," 
Proverbs6:31 Ago ngot kenyoor, kogeeri konyil tisap, igoitoi tuguuk tugul che po koonnyi." 
Proverbs6:32 Ma tinyei naet chiito ne ibegei ak kwony; ineendet ne yaei nooto kong'emei saboondanyi. 
Proverbs6:33 Nyooru mook ak teweernateet; ama ki istoi kalilanennyi. 
Proverbs6:34 Amu ng'etkonda nereeknatetap manong'otyo, ama riiree ye yaaktai mugetuut." 
Proverbs6:35 Ma mage kiy kiit ne kityage; ma kigoigoi, agot ngigoochi tuguuk che chaang' che po kagaigaet." 
Proverbs7:1 Weeriinnyu, riip ng'aleekyuk, ak igonorchigei kayomisutikyuk." 
Proverbs7:2 Riip kayomisutikyuk si isap; riip kaneetisyennyu ko uu ye iriibe laptetap kondang'ung'. 
Proverbs7:3 Ratyi moriiguk, sirchi muguleldang'ung'." 
Proverbs7:4 Ileenji utaatyet, “Ii chepkamennyu,” ak iguure naet chepkamennyu ne po ooreet." 
Proverbs7:5 Si kobiit koriibin eng' chepkugoniot, eng' kwony ne imasat ne chemwai kuut." 
Proverbs7:6 Amu ki aiitite eng' tirisyetap koonnyu eng' tirisyennyu ne po segengeisyek," 
Proverbs7:7 ak ki ageer eng' kwenutap che abusanik, ak ki anyit eng' kwenutap neranik, neran ne ma tinyei naet," 
Proverbs7:8 kobunei ooreet ole neegitee luuitap kwonyooto, ak ki isup ooreet ne wendi koonnyi," 
Proverbs7:9 ko karatarat, ko kaimen, eng' imenindap kemout ak mesundeito." 
Proverbs7:10 Ki nyo anyun kwony kotuiye ineendet, kolaachigei ko uu chepkugonik, ng'aaliindet." 
Proverbs7:11 Polin ak ko ngelelyo, ma tononi eng' koonnyi:" 
Proverbs7:12 mi ooreet ra, komi tuun komoswek che paraen, ak saptoi eng' ole pesiap oor." 
Proverbs7:13 Konam anyun ineendet ak kong'utut, ak komwachi ineendet eng' nyiganateet koleenji," 
Proverbs7:14 “Atinye korosegap kagoochinoigap kaalyeet, kaayaakte rani tuguuk che kiga arorte." 
Proverbs7:15 Kaanyo anyun atorogun, kaanyo acheeng'in eng' kagiiletapkei, ak kaanyoorun." 
Proverbs7:16 Kaaiite ngoroik che po lelesta eng' itogunnyu, kobooto kitambaok che simormor che po usiisyegap Misiri." 
Proverbs7:17 Kaande nyamdutik itogunnyu keetiik che kiguure ahalim ak kinamon. 
Proverbs7:18 Nyoo kibaibaige kot koeech; ngibaibaige eng' chamyet. 
Proverbs7:19 Amu ma mi kaa manong'otyonnyu, kawo panda ne loo." 
Proverbs7:20 Kaip loletap fedhaisyek ma itu kaa agoi eng' kwenutap arawet.” 
Proverbs7:21 Eng' ng'aleekyik che chaang' che tangus, koterteer ineendet ichuuti `ineendet chiichooto eng' ng'aleekyik che po kagaigaet." 
Proverbs7:22 Isubi anyun `ineendet kwonyooto eng' yooto, ko uu eito ne ki kwerye kwo eng'seet, anan ko uu mugurek che kitigone ne perber," 
Proverbs7:23 kot kotoor kipchabet koennyi kosore. Uu toriityon ne choktoi kowendi mesteet, ma naei kole parei saboondanyi." 
Proverbs7:24 Ara anyun, werchu, ogasa, ak oepchi iit ng'aleek che amwae." 
Proverbs7:25 Amengotokyigei muguleldang'ung' ortinwekyik, amebet isup ortinwekyik." 
Proverbs7:26 Amu ki koluul che chaang' che ki kiguoten; ak chaang' kot piik tugul che ki kobar ineendet. 
Proverbs7:27 Koonnyi ko ooreet ne wendi ye mi che ki kobek, ne choorchingei kooriigap meet." 
Proverbs8:1 Tos ma kuursei utaatyet, ak tos ma twegu kaguiyet?" 
Proverbs8:2 Tonone paragutap komoswek che torooreen ye neegit ooreet, ole tuiyechin ortinwek;" 
Proverbs8:3 ole neegitee ormariichok ole kibunei kebendi nganaseet, polei miising' eng' kurgotik che kibunei kebendi oriit koleen" 
Proverbs8:4 okweek, ee piik, aguurok, ak kuursennyu ko koityi piik tugul." 
Proverbs8:5 Okweek che oo abusotiin, oguiye ng'omnateet; ak okweek che oo perber, oegu che tinyei muguleldo ne po naet."
