Proverbs8:6 Ogas, amu amwae tuguuk che po telunateet; ak mwaei kutinnyu tuguuk che po iman." 
Proverbs8:7 Mwaei kutinnyu imanda, ak wechei kutinnyu tengekto." 
Proverbs8:8 Po imanda ng'aleek tugul che amwae; ma mi kiy ne imaasat anan ko ne po ngelelnateet. 
Proverbs8:9 Kasoksei tugul eng' ineendet ne iguitos, ak po iman eng' icheeget che nyooru naet." 
Proverbs8:10 Taach kotigonennyu ne kata fedha; ak itaach naet kosiir thahabu che korooron. 
Proverbs8:11 Amu karaaran utaatyet kosiir koik che kiguure peninim; ak ma kirogendoi ng'omnateet tuguuk tugul che kimachei. 
Proverbs8:12 Anee, utaatyet, ne ki ayai naet koek ole amenye, ak anyooru naet ak ruchiinet." 
Proverbs8:13 Kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kewech yaityo. Aweche menoteet, kaeetetapkei ak ooreet ne ya, ak kutit ne imaasat." 
Proverbs8:14 Nenyu kirwooget ak utaatyet ne ititaat. Atinye naet ak atinye kamuget. 
Proverbs8:15 Laitorani laitorinik amu anee, ak irwoochi pounik eng' imanda." 
Proverbs8:16 Pounisyei pounik amu anee, ak piik che taagunotiin ko irwoochi komyee." 
Proverbs8:17 Achame che chama; ak nyoorwo che cheeng'a eng' kagiiletapkei. 
Proverbs8:18 Atinye mogornatosyek ak teegisto, mogornatosyek che tebyei ak imanda." 
Proverbs8:19 Korooron logoekyuk kosiir thahabu, ee thahabu che tiliileen, ak siirei kelunetap tuguukyuk fedha che korooron." 
Proverbs8:20 Awendotee ooreetap imanda, asubi ortinwegap imanda." 
Proverbs8:21 Agoochini konyoor poroteet icheeget che chama, ak anyiit chogenikwak." 
Proverbs8:22 Ki ami kobooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch taunetap poisyennyi, kotom kobiit poisyonikyik che po keny." 
Proverbs8:23 Ki kiyaa abiit kobooch keny, kobooch taunet, kotom kobiit ng'wony." 
Proverbs8:24 Ki kisicha ye ki tomo kobiit rirosyek; ye ki tomo kobiit kondametusyek che rootune peek che chaang'. 
Proverbs8:25 Ye ki tomo kelumda tuloonook, ki kisicha ye ki tomo kobiit tuloonook che mengeechen," 
Proverbs8:26 Ye ki tomo koyai `ineendet ng'wony anan emotinwek, anan taunetap ng'ung'unyegap ng'wony." 
Proverbs8:27 Ki ami ye ki igimiti `ineendet kipsengwet, ye ki inde yiemutyet ole pooch rireet," 
Proverbs8:28 ye ki igimiti poolik eng' parak, ye kingo kimegitu kondametusyegap rireet," 
Proverbs8:29 ye ki inde nyanjet kiwotennyi, si ma siir peek ng'atuutyennyi. Ye ki ng'at lumeiywegap ng'wony," 
Proverbs8:30 ki kimi tuwai ko uu kiboityot ne ingen poisyet. Ak ki aboiboi ineendet peetuut age tugul, ki abaibai kotugul eng' tainnyi," 
Proverbs8:31 abaibaitune emennyi ne menyei piik, ak kimi poiboiyennyu eng' weeriigap piik." 
Proverbs8:32 “Ogasa anyun, werchu: amu iberuurotin icheek che riibei ortinwekyuk." 
Proverbs8:33 Ogas katigonet ak oegu che utaatiin, amoeesye." 
Proverbs8:34 Iberuurot chiito ne kasa, ne riipsei peetuut age tugul eng' kurgotikyuk, koogenisyei eng' tugatugigap kurgotikyuk." 
Proverbs8:35 Amu ineendet ne nyoorwo ko kanyoor saboondo, ak konyoor chameet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs8:36 Ago ineendet ne ma nyoorwo kong'emei saboondanyi; chamei meet tugul che wecho.” 
Proverbs9:1 Kigoteech utaatyet koonnyi, ki kowai tolochikyik tisap." 
Proverbs9:2 Kigoeny tuukyik ak ki koburuch divaikyik; Ki kochop amitwogik eng' mesennyi. 
Proverbs9:3 Ki koyookto tiibiikyik, kuursei eng' komoswek che torooreen miising' che po nganaseet koleen," 
Proverbs9:4 “Ingonyo yu age tugul ne abusat!” Mwachin chiito ne ma tinyei naet koleenjin," 
Proverbs9:5 “Nyoo, am amitwogikyuk, ak iee divaik che kaaburuch." 
Proverbs9:6 Omete abusnateet ak osapche, ak obendate ooreetap kaguiyet.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Nyooru teweernateet ineendet ne itigoni chotindet; nyooru tokisyet ne kerei kong' kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs9:8 Ameger kong' chotindet si ma wechin; kergong' chiito ne utaat si kochamin. 
Proverbs9:9 Ineet ne utaat si ko utaat miising'; ineet chiito ne po iman si kotesak eng' kaneetetapkei. 
Proverbs9:10 Kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko taunetap utaatyet; ak naet ne kinae Ineendet ne Tiliil ko kaguiyet. 
Proverbs9:11 Amu tesoksei peetuusyeguk eng' anee, ak kotesak kenyiisyegap sabeeng'ung'." 
Proverbs9:12 Ngot ko ii utaat, ko ii utaat ne neng'ung', ak ngot ichotisyei, igeseni inyegei." 
Proverbs9:13 Polin kwondo ne perber; abusat, ama naei kiy." 
Proverbs9:14 Tebee kurgeetap koonnyi, tebee ng'echereet eng' komoswek che torooreen che po nganaseet," 
Proverbs9:15 si koguur che siirtoi, che maguseigong' eng' ortinwekwak," 
Proverbs9:16 “Ingonyo yu age tugul ne abusat!” Ak mwachin ineendet ne ma tinyei naet koleenjin," 
Proverbs9:17 “Anyiny peek che kechorei, ak korooron amitwogik che keamei eng' ung'oot.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Ago ma naei kole mi olooto che ki kobek; kole, mi toekyik rirosyegap ye mi che ki kobek." 
Proverbs10:1 Chu kalewenaigap Solomon: Iboiboi weeriit ne utaat kwanda, ago inyalili weeriit ne perber kamet." 
Proverbs10:2 Ma mi keluno konoraigap yaityet, ago saru imanda eng' meet." 
Proverbs10:3 Ma chamjin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor saboondap ne po iman kotanui eng' rubeet, ago timdoi mageetap kiptengeginik." 
Proverbs10:4 Panani ne choriren, ago ibu mogornateet eutap ne igiiligei." 
Proverbs10:5 Ng'oom weeriit ne iyumi eng' kemei, ago ibu teweernateet weeriit ne ruei kegesisyei." 
Proverbs10:6 Tebee kaberuroik ne po iman, ago tuchei koroomnateet kutitap kiptengekyot." 
Proverbs10:7 Iberuurot kabwaatetap ne po iman, ago nunei kainetap kiptengeginik." 
Proverbs10:8 Taachei kayomisutik ne utaat eng' muguleldo, ago ibuti ne perber ne chaang' ng'aleek." 
Proverbs10:9 Ineendet ne wendote lititindo kowendote chametapkei, ago naoksei ineendet ne imaasi ortinwekyik." 
Proverbs10:10 Ibu arageneet ne ng'wegisye konda, ago ne kere kong' eng' nyiganateet koyaei kaalyeet." 
Proverbs10:11 Kondametutap saboon kutitap ne po iman, ago tuchei koroomnateet kutitap kiptengekyot." 
Proverbs10:12 Ing'eeti `suryet pooryosyek, ago tuchei `chamyet pistaosyek tugul." 
Proverbs10:13 Kinyoorchin kaguiyet kutitap chiito ne tinyei utaatyet, ago nyoljin kirokto patetap ineendet ne ma tinyei naet." 
Proverbs10:14 Konori piik che utaatiin naet, ago ng'emisyet ne neegit kutitap koseng'eng'it." 
Proverbs10:15 Mogornateetap mogoryot ko nganasennyi ne kiim, panandap kibananook ko ipchin ng'emisyet." 
Proverbs10:16 Poroteetap ne po iman ko tokyingei saboondo, ago melektap kiptengekyot ko tokyingei tengekto." 
Proverbs10:17 Miitei ooreetap saboondo ne riibei katigonet, ago mastoi chiito ne pagaktoi kereetap kong'." 
Proverbs10:18 Ineendet ne unyei weget kotinyei kutitap lembechek, ak ineendet ne mwaei ng'aleegap chemerereet ko perber." 
Proverbs10:19 Mabete pistoet ye mi ng'aleek che chaang', ago ng'oom ne siisei." 
Proverbs10:20 Uu fedhaisyek che korooron ng'elyeptap ne po iman, ago ma tilei kiy muguleldap kiptengekyot." 
Proverbs10:21 Paei piik che chaang' kutitap chiito ne po iman, ago pegu che perber amu ma tinyei naet." 
Proverbs10:22 Imogornoni `kaberuretap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama testoi riirek." 
Proverbs10:23 Yaet yaitwogik ko uu ureryet eng' koseng'eng'inik, ak uu nooto utaatyet eng' chiito ne tinyei kaguiyet." 
Proverbs10:24 Kiit ne iywei kiptengekyot ko nooto ne nyoonjin ineendet, ago kigoochin che po iman tuguuk che machei." 
Proverbs10:25 Ye siirto kipchurchuryet koma komi kiptengekyot, ago lumeiywot ne po koigeny chiito ne po iman." 
Proverbs10:26 Uu siki eng' kelek, ak uu iyeto eng' koonyek, uu nooto chiito ne choriren eng' icheek che iyooktoi ineendet." 
Proverbs10:27 Tesei peetuusyek kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago kitilei kenyiisyegap kiptengeginik kong'ering'itu." 
Proverbs10:28 Kagasetapkei kamang'unetap che po iman, ago lusei kamang'unetap kiptengeginik." 
Proverbs10:29 Irimet ne kiim ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ne po iman, ago ng'emisyet eng' yaigap yaityo." 
Proverbs10:30 Ma koi ki isto ne po iman, ago ma menyei kiptengeginik emet." 
Proverbs10:31 Mang'une utaatyet kutitap ne po iman, ago kitilei ng'elyeptap ne imaasisyei." 
Proverbs10:32 Ingen kutitap ne po iman tuguuk che taagaksei, ago mwaei kutusweegap kiptengeginik ng'aleek che po kamaaset." 
Proverbs11:1 Wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kerutyet ne ma po iman, ago chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kerutyet ne po iman." 
Proverbs11:2 Ye nyo menoteet, konyo agine kalilanet, ago mi utaatyet ak che iming'inegei." 
Proverbs11:3 Indochin che po iman kagesunatennywa pogei, ago kamaasetap che yaei kaberberisyet ko ng'emei icheek." 
Proverbs11:4 Ma tilei kiy mogornatosyek eng' peetuutap nereegek, ago saruunisyei imanda eng' meet." 
Proverbs11:5 Indochin ne ititaat imandanyi eng' ooreennyi, ago ibuti kiptengekyot eng' tengektanyi." 
Proverbs11:6 Saru che po iman imandanywa, ago kinamei che yaei kaberberisyet eng' ng'aalseennywa." 
Proverbs11:7 Ye mee chiito ne kiptengekyot, kobet kamang'unennyi, ak lusei kamang'unetap piik che po tengek." 
Proverbs11:8 Kisaru ne po iman komong' eng' nyalilda, ak nyoonjin `kiptengekyot nyalilaata." 
Proverbs11:9 Ng'emei eng' kutinnyi, chiito ne ma iywei Kamuktaindet, chiitap kokwennyi, Ago kisaru che po iman eng' naet." 
Proverbs11:10 Ye poor che po iman, ko paibaitu nganaseet; ak ye lusyo kiptengeginik, ko piitu kagasetapkei." 
Proverbs11:11 Kitoroori nganaseet eng' perurtap che po iman: ago igabui `kutusweegap kiptengeginik nganaseet. 
Proverbs11:12 Ma tinyei ng'omnateet ne sasei chiitap kokwennyi, ago siisei chiito ne tinyei naet." 
Proverbs11:13 Ng'aanyei ung'ootik ineendet ne chaamsoti, ago riibei ng'olyoot ineendet ne tinyei Kabuuset ne po iman." 
Proverbs11:14 Ibutos piik eng' ole ma mi kandoiset ne po ng'omnateet, ago mi saruunet eng' ole mi kirwoogik che chaang'." 
Proverbs11:15 Nyooru nyalilda ne tononjin too, ago ineendet ne wechei tononjinet kotebee chametapkei." 
Proverbs11:16 Nyooru teegisto kwondo ne myee, teptoi piik che igilegei mogornatosyek." 
Proverbs11:17 Chiito ne tinyei rireenetapkei koyachin ne myee saboondanyi, ago chiito ne kolgol konyalili poortanyi." 
Proverbs11:18 Nyooru kiptengekyot melektap ng'aalseet, ago ineendet ne koolei imanda kotinyei melekto ne po iman." 
Proverbs11:19 Ineendet ne kimitu eng' imanda ko sabei, ak ineendet ne isubi yaityet ko mee ineegei." 
Proverbs11:20 Wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheeget che imaasotin mugulelwek, paibai ineendet eng' che ititaatiin eng' ooreenywa." 
Proverbs11:21 Ma kimetoi iman chiito ne ya ama kibir, ago kisaru iyoteetap che po iman." 
Proverbs11:22 Kergei peteitap thahabu ne mi serutap tooreet, ak kwondo ne karaaran ne ma tinyei naet." 
Proverbs11:23 Magutigap che po iman ko myachen kityo; ago kamang'unetap kiptengeginik ko nereegek. 
Proverbs11:24 Mi ne igoitoi, ago tesoksei kosiir; ak komi ne etei miising' kosiir ne nyolu, ago ibu nooto pananda." 
Proverbs11:25 Nerei saboondap ne aiyeep, ak ne inagi chii peek kinagi agine." 
Proverbs11:26 Chubei `piik che etei peek, ago kiberuuri ne aldoi." 
Proverbs11:27 Ineendet ne cheeng'ei ne myee eng' kagiiletapkei, ko kacheeng' chameet, ago ineendet ne cheeng'ei yaityet, konyooru." 
Proverbs11:28 Ineendet ne imang'u mogornatosyekyik, kobuti, ago piitos che po iman ko uu sogoot ne tuon." 
Proverbs11:29 Ineendet ne inyalili koonnyi konyooru usoonet, ak koegu ne perber otwogindetap ne utaat." 
Proverbs11:30 Poisyonigap ne po iman ko keetitap saboondo; ago koroomnateet koolusi saboonwegap piik. 
Proverbs11:31 Ngot kigeerchin ne po iman eng' ng'wony, kotam nee anyun chiito ne ya ak ko kiptengekyot!" 
Proverbs12:1 Age tugul ne chamei atep ne myee kochamei naet, ago ineendet ne eesyoi kereetap kong' ko uu tyondo." 
Proverbs12:2 Nyooru chameet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne myee, ago igikyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne po chobutik che yaacheen." 
Proverbs12:3 Ma kimiitu chii eng' yaityo, amagoi kitut tigityotap che po iman." 
Proverbs12:4 Egu kwondo ne myee konditap manong'otyondennyi; ago kwondo ne ibu kalilanet ko uu nunateet eng' kawegap chiichooto. 
Proverbs12:5 Po iman kabwaatutigap che po imanda, ago ng'aalseet kirwoogutigap kiptengeginik." 
Proverbs12:6 Sapchin kotumda korotiik ng'aleegap kiptengeginik, ago saru icheek `ng'aleegap che po iman." 
Proverbs12:7 Kigabui kiptengeginik kot koma komi, ago tononi kootap che po iman." 
Proverbs12:8 Kilasu chii ko uu kiit ne tee ng'omnatennyi, ago kisasei ineendet ne tinyei muguleldo ne imaasat." 
Proverbs12:9 Kaigai ineendet ne kesasei ak kotinyei otwogindet, kosiir ineendet ne ichaugei ama tinyei amitwogik." 
Proverbs12:10 Riibei chiito ne po iman sabeetap kiyagikyik, ago kolgoleen rireenosyegap piik che yaach." 
Proverbs12:11 Nyooru amitwogik che chaang' chiito ne ibati korennyi, ago ineendet ne isubi tangoita koma tinyei naet." 
Proverbs12:12 Machei kiptengekyot mesteetap piik che yaach, ago yiei logoek tigityotap che po iman." 
Proverbs12:13 Mi mesteetap chiito ne ya pistoetap kutit, ago mang'une nyalilda chiito ne po iman." 
Proverbs12:14 Piyonyi chiito myeeindo eng' logoegap kutinnyi, ak kigeerchin chiito poisyonigap eunekyik." 
Proverbs12:15 Litit eng' ne perber ooreennyi ngo keerei, ago epchin iit kirwooget ineendet ne utaat." 
Proverbs12:16 Sip konaoksei nereegegap ne perber, ago unyei teweernateet chiito ne ng'oom." 
Proverbs12:17 Ineendet ne mwaei iman koboortoi imanda, ago iboortoi ng'aalseet paoryat ne ma po iman." 
Proverbs12:18 Ng'aleegap chii ne sartae ng'al ko uu rotwetap chok, ago ng'elyeptap ne utaat koibu chametapkei." 
Proverbs12:19 Ki kimiiti koigeny kutit ne po iman; ago po sait ne matya ng'elyepta ne mwaei lembech. 
Proverbs12:20 Mi ng'aalseet mugulelwegap che chobei yaityet, ago tinyei poiboiyet che mwaitoi kaalyeet." 
Proverbs12:21 Ma nyooru yaityet age tugul chiito ne po iman, ago nyiei yaityet kiptengeginik." 
Proverbs12:22 Wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutit ne mwaei lembech, ago paibai ineendet eng' che poisyee iman." 
Proverbs12:23 Unyei naet chiito ne ng'oom, ago mwaitoi mugulelwegap che perber perberyo." 
Proverbs12:24 Pounisyei eutap ne igiilegei, ago kibirchin chiito ne choriren kobois." 
Proverbs12:25 Ing'uruuksei muguleldap chiito amu nyigiisindo ne tinyei, ago iboiboi muguleloto ng'olyoot ne myee." 
Proverbs12:26 Chiitap iman ko kandoindetap chiitap kokwennyi, ago ibeeti kiptengeginik ooreenywa." 
Proverbs12:27 Mawatani chiito ne choriren kiit ne kanyoor eng' logeet, ago tinyei chiito ne igiilegei tuguuk che po kamanuutyet ne oo." 
Proverbs12:28 Mi saboondo ooreetap imanda, ama mi meet eng' ooreennyi." 
Proverbs13:1 Epchin iit weeriit ne utaat katigonetap kwandanyi, ago ma kasei kereetap kong' chotindet." 
Proverbs13:2 Amei chiito ne myee eng' logoegap kutinnyi, ago amei koroomnateet saboondo ne yaei kaberberisyet." 
Proverbs13:3 Riibei saboondanyi ne riibei kutinnyi, ago nyooru ng'emisyet ne yaatei kutinnyi miising'." 
Proverbs13:4 Tinyei mageet saboondap ne choriren, ak ma nyooru kiy, ago nerei saboondap ne igiilegei." 
Proverbs13:5 Wechei chiito ne po iman lembechek, ago samisitu chiito ne ya ak konyooru teweernateet." 
Proverbs13:6 Imanda koriibei ineendet ne litit eng' ooreet, ago igabui yaityet kiptengekyot." 
Proverbs13:7 Mi ne yaegei koek mogoryo, ago ma tinyei kiy, ak mi ne yaegei koek kibanania, ago tinyei mogornateet ne oo." 
Proverbs13:8 Kityage saboondap chii mogornatosyekyik, ago ma kasei kibananook kamuiset." 
Proverbs13:9 Iluu miising' lapkeiyetap che po iman, ago kimisi taitap kiptengeginik." 
Proverbs13:10 Ibu `menoteet pooryeet kityo, ago mi utaatyet kobooto icheek che ng'ategei." 
Proverbs13:11 Ichuchugaksei mogornateet ne ki kinyooru eng' menoteet, ago tesoksei che po chiito ne iyumi ko tutigin." 
Proverbs13:12 Myani muguleldo eng' kamang'unet ne igaegei, ago ye isulda ma konato koek keetitap saboondo." 
Proverbs13:13 Age tugul ne sasei ng'olyoot koipchingei ng'emisyet, ago kigoochin melekto chiito ne iywei kayomiset." 
Proverbs13:14 Kondametutap saboon kaneetutigap che utaatiin, imuktachin chii koistoegei mestonogap meet." 
Proverbs13:15 Ibu chameet naet ne myee, ago uui ooreetap kaberberik." 
Proverbs13:16 Poisyee naet chiito age tugul ne ng'oom: ago iseeri ne perber perberyo. 
Proverbs13:17 Ibu kaimutyet kayooktoindo ne ya, ago egu chametapkei tononjinindet ne kiyani." 
Proverbs13:18 Nyooru pananda ak teweernateet ineendet ne eesyoi katigonet, ago nyooru teegisto ineendet ne epchin iit kereetap kong'." 
Proverbs13:19 Anyiny eng' saboondo mageet ne isuldaat, ago wechei che perber ngo istoegei yaitwogik." 
Proverbs13:20 Obendate ak piik che utaatiin asi iegu ne utaat, ago nyooru nyalilda chiito ne pendoti ak che perber." 
Proverbs13:21 Isubi `yaityet kiptengeginik, ago kigeerchin che po iman myeeindo." 
Proverbs13:22 Pagaakyin `chiito ne myee tuguukyik mochogoronikyik, ak kigonorchin chiitap iman mogornateetap kiptengekyot." 
Proverbs13:23 Mi amitwogik che chaang' eng' kabatisyetap kibananook, ago mi ne keng'emei amu ma mi imanda." 
Proverbs13:24 Wechei weeriinnyi ne ma pirei, ago ineendet ne chamei weeriinnyi kotigoni ko uu ye nyolu." 
Proverbs13:25 Amei ne po iman kot kobiyo saboondanyi; ago ma nyooru kiptengeginik che yamei. 
Proverbs14:1 Teechei koonnyi kwondo age tugul ne utaat, ago putei ne perber eng' eunekyik." 
Proverbs14:2 Iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `ineendet ne wendote imanda, ago sasei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `ineendet ne imaasat eng' ortinwekyik." 
Proverbs14:3 Miitei kutitap ne perber kirokto ne po menoteet, ago riibei kutusweekwak che utaatiin." 
Proverbs14:4 Tiliil piut ole ma mi tuuga, ago ibu chaang'indap rurutik `kimnateetap eeik." 
Proverbs14:5 Ma mwaei lembech paoryat ne kiyani, ago mwaei lembech paoryat ne ma po iman." 
Proverbs14:6 Cheeng'ei chotindet utaatyet ago ma nyooru, ago nyumnyum naet eng' ineendet ne tinyei kaguiyet." 
Proverbs14:7 Ui ole mi chiito ne perber, amenyoorchini ineendet ng'olyootap naet." 
Proverbs14:8 Utaatyetap chiito ne ng'oom ko koguiyo ooreennyi, ago ng'aalseet perberindap che perber." 
Proverbs14:9 Chotei che perber ng'oogisto, ago mi myeeindo eng' kwenutap che po iman." 
Proverbs14:10 Ingen muguleldo ng'wanindanyi, ak ma tinyei toondet yamdao ak poiboiyennyi." 
Proverbs14:11 Kigabui kootap kiptengeginik, ago kiberuuri emaitap ne po iman." 
Proverbs14:12 Mi ooreet ne leen chiito litit, ago kagesunennyi ko ooreet ne tokyingei meet." 
Proverbs14:13 Riirei muguleldo agot ngo roryei, ak kagesunetap poiboiyet ko nyigiisindo." 
Proverbs14:14 Ineendet ne ichuchuchegei eng' imanda kobiyonyi ortinwekyik, ak che myach eng' muguleldo ko nyooru che nyoljin." 
Proverbs14:15 Ne abusat koyani ng'olyoo age tugul, ago ne ng'oom ko keerei komyee ole wendi." 
Proverbs14:16 Iyweisyei chiito ne utaat ak koistoegei yaityet, ago nereechi ne perber ak komeenei." 
Proverbs14:17 Ineendet ne sip konereechi koyaei tuguuk eng' perberyo, ak kiwechei chiito ne tinyei chobutik che yaacheen." 
Proverbs14:18 Perperyo ko poroteetap che abusotiin, ago ki laakyin che ng'oomen chepkuletap naet." 
Proverbs14:19 Ing'uruuksei che yaacheen eng' taitap che myachen, kong'uruuksei kiptengeginik eng' ormariichogap che po iman." 
Proverbs14:20 Kiwechei kibananiat, wechei agot chiitap kokwennyi, ago tinyei mogoryot choronok che chaang'." 
Proverbs14:21 Yaei tengekto chiito ne sasei chiitap kokwennyi, ago paibai ne riiree kibananook." 
Proverbs14:22 Tos ma yaei chalwok piik che chobei yaityet? Ago nyooru rireenet ak imanda che chobei myeeindo. 
Proverbs14:23 Tinyei kelunet poisyet age tugul, ago ibu pananda ng'aleek icheegei." 
Proverbs14:24 Chepkuletap che utaatiin ko mogornatosyekwak, ago perberindap che perber ko perberyo kityo." 
Proverbs14:25 Saru saboonwek paoryat ne po iman, ago ineendet ne mwaei lembech ko ng'wektoindet." 
Proverbs14:26 Mi kamang'unet ne kiim eng' kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak nyooru lagokyik ole mwechin." 
Proverbs14:27 Kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kondametutap peegap saboon, si keistoegei mestonogap meet." 
Proverbs14:28 Toroornatetap laitoryat ko chaang'indap piikyik, ago ng'emisyetap pounindet ko ng'ering'indap piik." 
Proverbs14:29 Tinyei kaguiyet ne oo ineendet ne masartae nereek, ago tesei perberyo ineendet ne sip konereechi." 
Proverbs14:30 Saboondap poorto muguleldo ne tinyei chametapkei, ago nunatetap kawek ng'etkonda." 
Proverbs14:31 Iteweeri Yaindennyi ne usei kibananiat, ago konyiti Yaindennyi `ineendet ne riiree ne ma tinyei kiy." 
Proverbs14:32 Ki wiirchin ng'wony kiptengekyot amu poisyonikyik che yaach, ago tinyei kamang'unet ne po iman eng' meennyi." 
Proverbs14:33 Tebee utaatyet muguleldap ineendet ne tinyei kaguiyet, ago king'aanyei che mi mugulelwegap che perber." 
Proverbs14:34 Itoroori imanda poror, ago iteweeri tengekto poror age tugul." 
Proverbs14:35 Chamei laitoryat otwogindet ne poisyei eng' ng'omnateet, ago nereekyik ko ityin ineendet ne ibu kalilanet." 
Proverbs15:1 Istoi waluunet ne tala nereegek, ago ing'eeti ng'olyoot ne ng'waan nereegek." 
Proverbs15:2 Mwaei ng'elyeptap ne utaat naet ne litit, ago rong'u kutusweegap che perber perberyo." 
Proverbs15:3 Miitei konyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komosta age tugul, kogeerei che yaacheen ak che myachen." 
Proverbs15:4 Keetitap saboondo ng'elyepta ne isoobisyei, ago ng'emei ngelelnateet saboondo." 
Proverbs15:5 Sasei ne perber katigonetap kwandanyi, ago nyooru ng'omnateet ineendet ne epchin iit kereetap kong'." 
Proverbs15:6 Miitei konoraik che chaang' kootap ne po iman, ago miitei nyalilda kelunaigap kiptengekyot." 
Proverbs15:7 Iyestoi naet kutusweegap che utaatyet, ago ma yaei ko uu nooto mugulelwegap che perber." 
Proverbs15:8 Wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywotap kiptengeginik, ago poiboenji saaetap che po iman." 
Proverbs15:9 Wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ooreetap kiptengekyot, ago chamei ne isubi imanda." 
Proverbs15:10 Mi kergong'yet ne ng'waan eng' ineendet ne metoi ooreet, ak meei ineendet ne wechei kereetap kong'." 
Proverbs15:11 Mi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye mi che ki kobek ak ng'emisyet, siirei ne tya anyun mugulelwegap piik!" 
Proverbs15:12 Ma chamei chotindet keger kong', ma wendi ole mi che utaatiin." 
Proverbs15:13 Igoochin muguleldo ne igasegei togeet kobaibait, ago tanui `ine eng' arageneetap muguleldo." 
Proverbs15:14 Cheeng'ei naet muguleldap ineendet ne tinyei kaguiyet, ago kutusweegap che perber ko paegei perberyo." 
Proverbs15:15 Yaacheen peetuusyek tugul che po che kinyaliili, ago muguleldo ne igasegei ko igoorto ne po kotugul." 
Proverbs15:16 Kaigai tuguuk che matya kobooto kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kosiir konoraik che chaang' kobooto nyalilda." 
Proverbs15:17 Kaigai keam ingweek eng' ole mi chamyet, kosiir eito ne akwai kobooto wegeet." 
Proverbs15:18 Ing'eeti chiito ne kipnereegia pooryeet, ago tisei pooryeet ineendet ne masartae nereek." 
Proverbs15:19 Uu ooreetap chiito ne choriren ng'ootweetap katook, ago paraitu ooreetap che po iman." 
Proverbs15:20 Iboiboi kwanda `weeriit ne utaat, ago sasei kamet chiito ne perber." 
Proverbs15:21 Perperyo ko poiboiyetap ne ma utaat, ago ilititi ortinwekyik chiito ne tinyei kaguiyet." 
Proverbs15:22 Ma isuldoi chobutik eng' ole ma mi kirwooget, ago ki kimiti chobutichooto eng' ole mi kirwoogik che chaang'." 
Proverbs15:23 Paibaitu chii eng' waluunetap kutinnyi, ago ng'olyoot ne kimwaei eng' sait ne nyolu, ko karaaran ne tya!" 
Proverbs15:24 Wendi parak ooreetap saboondo eng' ne utaat, si kobiit koistoegei ye mi che ki kobek, eng' ng'wony oriit." 
Proverbs15:25 Itutu `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap menotik, ago igimiti kiwotetap mosoget." 
Proverbs15:26 Chobutik che yaacheen ko tuguuk che kiwechei eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago tiliileen ng'aleek che iboiboi piich." 
Proverbs15:27 Inyalili koonnyi `ineendet ne kipkeiyat agobo kelunaik, ago sabei ineendet ne wechei asoya." 
Proverbs15:28 Ruchin muguleldap ne po iman kiit ne wolu, ago rong'u kutusweegap kiptengeginik tuguuk che yaacheen." 
Proverbs15:29 Looe `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kiptengeginik, ago kasei saautigap che po iman." 
Proverbs15:30 Iboiboi `lapkeiyetap koonyek muguleldo, igimiti kawek `ng'aleek che myach." 
Proverbs15:31 Itit ne kasei kereetap kong' ne po saboondo ko tebee kwenutap che utaatiin. 
Proverbs15:32 Ineendet ne eesyoi katigonet ko kasas saboondanyi, ago ineendet ne epchin iit kereetap kong' konyooru kaguiyet." 
Proverbs15:33 Katigonetap utaatyet ko kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak indoi kaming'inetapkei eng' teegisto. 
Proverbs16:1 Poisyetap chii kochop muguleldanyi, ago punu `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor waluunetap ng'elyepta." 
Proverbs16:2 Tiliileen ortinwek tugul che po chii ye keerei, ago keerei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugulelwek eng' karagendoet." 
Proverbs16:3 Igoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor `poisyoniguk kondochi, si kogimegitu kabwaatutiguk." 
Proverbs16:4 Ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk tugul ko uu ye kimakyin, ee agot che yaach ko ki yai agobo peetuut ne ya." 
Proverbs16:5 Kiit ne wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko muguleldo age tugul ne meenei, ne uu niito koma kimetoi ama kibir." 
Proverbs16:6 Ki undoi yaityet eng' rireenet ak iman, ak istoegei piik yaityet ye iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs16:7 Ye iboiboi `ortinwegap chii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kogoochin kochamyo ak puunikyik." 
Proverbs16:8 Kaigai tuguuk che matya kobooto imanda kosiir kelunaik che chaang' kobooto kertaetap kong'. 
Proverbs16:9 Chobei muguleldap chii ooreennyi, ago indochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kakwautikyik." 
Proverbs16:10 Punu kutitap laitoryat tiletap kirwooget ne po Kamuktaindet, malelei kutinnyi eng' kirwooget." 
Proverbs16:11 Po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kerutyet ne po iman ak tuguuk che kigerisye; koik tugul che mi lolet che kigerisye ko poisyennyi. 
Proverbs16:12 Kiit ne kiwechei, ko laitorinik koyai tengekto. Amu ki kimiti laitornatet eng' imanda." 
Proverbs16:13 Poiboiyetap laitorinik kutusweek che po iman, ak kochamei icheek chii ne mwaei iman." 
Proverbs16:14 Uu nereegegap laitoryat piik che kiyooktoi che po meet, ago tisei chiito ne utaat." 
Proverbs16:15 Mi saboondo lapkeiyetap togeetap laitoryat; ak uu chamennyi poldetap ropta ne po let. 
Proverbs16:16 Karaaran anyun ne tya kenyoor utaatyet kosiir thahabu! Kaigai kelewen kaguiyet kosiir fedha. 
Proverbs16:17 Ooreet ne oo ne po piik che po iman ko koistoegei yaityet; riibei saboondanyi ne riibei ooreennyi. 
Proverbs16:18 Indoe `menoteet ng'emisyet, ak indoe `kachaunetapkei kabutet." 
Proverbs16:19 Kaigai ngetepto kaming'inetapkei kobooto kibananook, kosiir kepchei parunenik ak menotik." 
Proverbs16:20 Nyooru myeeindo ne epchin iit ng'olyoot, ak paibai age tugul ne imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs16:21 Ineendet ne ng'oom eng' muguleldanyi keguure ne utaat, ak tesei kaneetetapkei anyinyindap kutit." 
Proverbs16:22 Utaatyet ko kondametutap peegap saboon eng' ineendet ne tinyei, ago perberyo katigonet ne kitigoni che perber." 
Proverbs16:23 Ineeti muguleldap ne utaat kutinnyi, ak kotesyin kaneetetapkei kutinnyi." 
Proverbs16:24 Uu kumyat ng'aleek che iboiboi piich, anyinyen eng' saboondo ak chametapkei ne po kawek." 
Proverbs16:25 Mi ooreet ne leen chiito litit, ago kagesunennyi ko ortinwegap meet." 
Proverbs16:26 Poisyechin chii mageetap poisyet; amu ichirchiri kutinnyi ineendet. 
Proverbs16:27 Chobei yaityet chiito ne ma tilei kiy, ak miitei kutinnyi kiit ne uu maat ne peelsei." 
Proverbs16:28 Iseeri pooryeet `chiito ne imaasat, ak ibestos chaamindet choronok che eecheen." 
Proverbs16:29 Iboiboi `chiito ne koroom chiitap kokwennyi, ak komut eng' ooreet ne ma myee." 
Proverbs16:30 Chobei tuguuk che imaasotin `chiito ne kerei konyekyik; ibu yaityet `ineendet ne susei kutinnyi. 
Proverbs16:31 Chepkuletap toroornatet kalwalek; pitune ooreetap imanda. 
Proverbs16:32 Kaigai ineendet ne ma sartae nereek kosiir ne kiim, ak kaigai ineendet ne pou muguleldanyi kosiir ne luulei nganaseet." 
Proverbs16:33 Ki wiirchin parbaryat ngoryeet, ago punu `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwooget tugul." 
Proverbs17:1 Kaigai kererutyet ne yaamaat kobooto kamuung'et, kosiir ko ne nyiitaat igoorto ak komi pooryeet." 
Proverbs17:2 Pou `otwogindet ne poisyee ng'omnateet weeriit ne ibu kalilanet, ak nyooru poroteet kobooto tupchosyek." 
Proverbs17:3 Po `tereet fedha che kitiliili, ak po `maat ne oo thahabu, ago Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne tyemei mugulelwek." 
Proverbs17:4 Epchin iit `chii ne ya kutusweegap kiptengeginik; epchin iit kiplembechwet ng'elyepta ne ng'aalsei. 
Proverbs17:5 Age tugul ne chotei kibananiat ko chotei Yaindennyi, ineendet ne poiboitu ko kanyoor alage nyalilda koma kimetoi ama kibir." 
Proverbs17:6 Chepkuletap poisyek `mochogoronikwak, ak toroornatetap lagok `kwanisyekwak." 
Proverbs17:7 Ma nyooljin ng'aleek che korooron abusanet, kotam nee anyun kutit ne mwaei lembech, eng' pounindet." 
Proverbs17:8 Uu koita ne po kamanuutyet ne oo kitap asoya eng' taitap ineendet ne tinyei; poorei eng' ui tugul ole tokyingei. 
Proverbs17:9 Cheeng'ei chamyet ineendet ne tuchei pistoet; ago ineendet ne ibooti ng'aleek ko ibestos choronok che eecheen. 
Proverbs17:10 Chutei `kereetap ong' ineendet ne tinyei kaguiyet kosiir pirutik pogol eng' ne perber. 
Proverbs17:11 Cheeng'ei chiito ne ya pistoet kityo; ago kiyookyin `ineendet chiito ne kolgol. 
Proverbs17:12 Kaigai ketuiyee magalaluut ne kagirebe aarekyik, kosiir ketuiyee ne perber eng' perberyennyi." 
Proverbs17:13 Age tugul ne yaaktoi yaityet eng' ne myee, koma istoegei yaityet koonnyi." 
Proverbs17:14 Uu taunetap pooryeet ye kiyatei peek; omete anyun pooryeet kotom kobiit polateet. 
Proverbs17:15 Ineendet ne iityin imanda kiptengekyot ak ineendet ne igikyin chiitap iman; chooto tuwai ko che wechei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Proverbs17:16 Lyon anyun si kotinyei ne perber kiit ne ale utaatyet, ngot koma tinyei naet?" 
Proverbs17:17 Tinyei chorweet chamyet kotugul, ak kisichei ne tupcho ak chii agobo nyalilda." 
Proverbs17:18 Ma tilei kiy keyai kayasyoet, si koek tononjinindet eng' taitap chiitap kokwennyi." 
Proverbs17:19 Chamei pistoet ne chamei pooryeet, ak ineendet ne itoroori kurgennyi kocheeng'ei ng'emisyet." 
Proverbs17:20 Ma nyooru kiy ne myee ineendet ne imaasat muguleldo; ak ibutyin yaityet ne tinyei ng'elyepta ne imaasat. 
Proverbs17:21 Ineendet ne sichei ne perber konyooru arageneet; ak ma tinyei poiboiyet kwandap ne abusat. 
Proverbs17:22 Kerichek che myach muguleldo ne igasegei, ago iyaami kawek `saboondo ne katanui." 
Proverbs17:23 Eng' ung'oot kotaachei kiptengekyot kitap asoya, si komaas ortinwegap kirwooget." 
Proverbs17:24 Mi utaatyet taitap ineendet ne tinyei naet, ago mi konyegap ne perber agoi ole poochin ng'wony." 
Proverbs17:25 Weeriit ne perber ko arageneet eng' kwandanyi, ak ng'wanindo eng' ineendet ne kisichei." 
Proverbs17:26 Ma myee kinde fain ne ma tinyei leluut, anan kebir che taagunotiin agobo imandanywa." 
Proverbs17:27 Tinyei naet ne ma iseeri ng'aleekyik, ak tinyei kaguiyet `ineendet ne tinyei mugulel ne po muitaet." 
Proverbs17:28 Agot ne perber ye siisei, kiiti keele utaat; ye ker kutinnyi, kiit keele ng'oom." 
Proverbs18:1 Ineendet ne itabaanegei, kocheeng'ei magennyi ineegei, ak konereekyin chiichooto ng'omnateet ne ititaat." 
Proverbs18:2 Ma mage kiy ne perber kaguiyet, ago paibaitune kabartaetap kabwaatutikyik kityo." 
Proverbs18:3 Ye nyo kiptengekyot, konyo agine sasisyet, ak pwoonei kora teweernateet ak chotisyet." 
Proverbs18:4 Uu peegap keriing' ne loo ng'aleegap chii, ibaibai ko uu peegap kereruut ne rootei utaatyet." 
Proverbs18:5 Ma myee ketiytiy kiptengekyot, anan kimaas ne po iman eng' kirwooget." 
Proverbs18:6 Chutei kutitap ne perber ole mi tiyet, ak kuurei kutinnyi pireet." 
Proverbs18:7 Ng'emisyetap ne perber kutinnyi, ak mesteetap saboondanyi kutinnyi." 
Proverbs18:8 Uu tuguuk che anyiny ng'aleegap chaamindet, ak pendi moet." 
Proverbs18:9 Ineendet agine ne choriren eng' poisyennyi ko tupcho ak ng'emindet. 
Proverbs18:10 Irimet ne kiim kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; mwechin ne po iman ak konyoor chametapkei. 
Proverbs18:11 Mogornateetap mogoryot ko nganasennyi ne kiim, ak uu irimeet ne kooi eng' kabwaatutikyik." 
Proverbs18:12 Menei muguleldap chii kotom konyoor ng'emisyet, ak indoe kaming'inetapkei teegisto." 
Proverbs18:13 Ineendet ne wolu koma epchi iit, ko perberyo ak teweernateet eng' ineendet." 
Proverbs18:14 Igimiiti saboondap chiito nyalulnatennyi; ago imuuchi ng'oo komuita eng' arageneet? 
Proverbs18:15 Nyooru naet muguleldap ne utaat; ak cheeng'ei naet `ititap ne ng'oom. 
Proverbs18:16 Cheeng'jin konunet chiito poroindo, ak komutyi ineendet taitap piik che eecheen." 
Proverbs18:17 Ne sip kong'alaali, keleen po iman; ago nyoonei chii age kochuulei ng'aleekyik." 
Proverbs18:18 Iwong'u `kabeletapkei parbaryat, ak ioitos che irwookyingei." 
Proverbs18:19 Uui kosiir nganaseet ne kiim keeweech tupchet ne ki kinach, ak uu tiiyasyek che uu chooto temeleiywegap nganaseet." 
Proverbs18:20 Piyonyi moetap chii logoegap kutinnyi; piyonyi ineendet iyoteetap kutinnyi. 
Proverbs18:21 Miitei kimnateetap ng'elyepta, meet ak saboondo; ak amei logoekyik icheek che chamei." 
Proverbs18:22 Nyooru kiit ne myee age tugul ne nyooru osotyot ne ituni, ak nyooru chameet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs18:23 Poisyee kibananiat kagaigaosyek; ago wolu mogoryot kong'emei. 
Proverbs18:24 Cheeng'jingei ng'emisyet ineendet ne cheeng'ei choronok che chaang', ago mi chorweet ne namegei ak chii kosiir ng'eetap kamet." 
Proverbs19:1 Kaigai kibananiat ne wendote imanda, kosiir ne imaasat eng' ng'aleekyik ak ko perber." 
Proverbs19:2 Ma myee pekyinet ne ma tinyei naet, ak yaei tengekto ineendet ne sartae pandanyi." 
Proverbs19:3 Ng'emegei chiito eng' perberyennyi, ak konereekyin `ine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' muguleldanyi." 
Proverbs19:4 Tesei choronok che chaang' `mogornateet; ago itabaanegei kibananiat `chorwennyi. 
Proverbs19:5 Ma kimetoi paoryatap lembech ama kibir; ak ma chilili ineendet ne mwaei lembechek. 
Proverbs19:6 Riirchin piik che chaang' myeeindap chiito ne tagunoot; ak chii age tugul ko chorweetap ineendet ne igoitoi konunoik. 
Proverbs19:7 Ngot ko wechei kibananiat `tupchosyekyik tugul, koistoegei anyun ne tya choronokyik! Nga isubi kogaigae icheek ng'aleek, koma nyooru." 
Proverbs19:8 Chamei saboondanyi ne nyooru utaatyet, nyooru myeeindo ineendet ne riibei kaguiyet." 
Proverbs19:9 Ma kimetoi paoryatap lembech ama kibir; ak lusei ineendet ne mwaei lembechek. 
Proverbs19:10 Ngot koma nyooljin `ne perber tuguugap talbisto, kotam nee anyun ngeele pou `otwogindet weeriigap laitoryat." 
Proverbs19:11 Ma sartae nereegek chiito ne ng'oom, ak egu toroornatennyi ye kasiirtoe pistoet." 
Proverbs19:12 Uu nereegegap laitoryat porisenetap ng'etuny; ago uu myeeindonyi rewoot ne mi susweek. 
Proverbs19:13 Weeriit ne perber ko nyalil eng' kwandanyi; ak polatetap osotyot ko uu peek che saitoi. 
Proverbs19:14 Koot ak mogornatosyegap chii ko poroteet ne punu kwanisyek; ago punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor osotyot ne ng'oom. 
Proverbs19:15 Igoochin chiito chorirnatet rwondo ne nyigiis, ak amei rubeet chiito ne choriren." 
Proverbs19:16 Riibei saboondanyi ne riibei ng'atuutik, ago meei ne ma riibei ortinwekyik." 
Proverbs19:17 Ineendet ne riiree kibananiat ko kabesendochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kiyaakyin ineendet kogeny eng' poisyennyi ne myee." 
Proverbs19:18 Kergong' weeriing'ung' kota komi kamang'unet; amat itil eng' muguleldang'ung' ile myee ngo mee. 
Proverbs19:19 Nyooru pireet chiito ne tinyei nereeknateet ne oo; amu ngot isaru ineendet, ko kanyooljin tuun isaru kogeny." 
Proverbs19:20 Epchi iit katigonet ak itaach kaneetisyet, si kobiit inyooru utaatyet eng' kagesuneng'ung'." 
Proverbs19:21 Mi chobutik che chaang' muguleldap chiito; ago tebyei katigonetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Proverbs19:22 Ki chamei chiito amu myeeindonyi; ak kaigai kibananiat kosiir kiplembechwet. 
Proverbs19:23 Kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko saboondo iman; ne nyitat kamung'etap yametapkei, ma nyoonjin yaityet." 
Proverbs19:24 Indoi eunnyi sanit chiito ne choriren, agot kimnateet ne indoe kutinnyi koma tinye." 
Proverbs19:25 Pir sasindet, si koneetkei ng'omnateet ne abusat; ak iger kong' ineendet ne tinyei kaguiyet, si koguiyo naet." 
Proverbs19:26 Ibu kalilanet ak teweernateet, weeriit ne iseeri tuguugap kwandanyi ak koon kamennyi." 
Proverbs19:27 Weeriinnyu, ngot ko me kas kaneetisyet, kobeetenen ng'aleegap ng'omnateet." 
Proverbs19:28 Chotei kirwooget paoryat ne ma tilei kiy; ak lugui yaityet kutusweegap kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs19:29 Kichopchin kirwoogutik chotiik, ak kichopchin pataigap che perber pirutik." 
Proverbs20:1 Chotindet divaik, poliindet maiyek. ak ma utaat age tugul ne petei eng' maiyek." 
Proverbs20:2 Uu porisenetap ng'etundo kamuisetap laitoryat; ineendet ne tachei laitoryat koyachin saboondanyi tengekto. 
Proverbs20:3 Teegisto eng' chii ngo istoegei pooryeet; ago polei age tugul ne perber. 
Proverbs20:4 Ma chamei kobatis ineendet ne choriren eng' peetuusyegap kabatisyet; soomsooti anyun kegesisyei, ama nyooru kiy." 
Proverbs20:5 Uu rireet kirwooget eng' muguleldap chiito, ago siilei chiito ne tinyei kaguiyet." 
Proverbs20:6 Iboortoi chii age tugul eng' piik che chaang' myeeindonyi; ago imuuchi ng'oo konyoor chiito ne kiyani? 
Proverbs20:7 Iberuurotin lagogap chiito ne po iman, ne wendote imandanyi." 
Proverbs20:8 Iseertoi yaitwogik tugul eng' konyekyik laitoryat ne tebee ng'echereetap kirwooget. 
Proverbs20:9 Ng'oo ne imuuchi komwa kole, “Kaatiliil muguleldanyu, aa tiliil, ma atinye tengek?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Ratilisyek che po ng'aalseet, ak tuguuk che kigerisye che po ng'aalseet; ko chooto tuguuk che wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs20:11 Naoksei lakweet eng' poisyonikyik, ngo tiliil poisyennyi anan ngo litit." 
Proverbs20:12 Ki yai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuwai, itit ne kigastoe ak konda ne kigeertoe." 
Proverbs20:13 Amecham rwondo, si meegu kibananiat; kosu, si ibiye." 
Proverbs20:14 Mwaei alindet kole, “Ma tilei kiy, ma tilei kiy,” ago ye kakwo, kochoigei." 
Proverbs20:15 Mi thahabu ak chaang'indap koik che po kamanuut; ago ng'aleegap naet ko koita ne po kamanuutyet ne oo. 
Proverbs20:16 Nam ngoryeetap ineendet ne tononjin toondet; ak onam ineendet koek kaarorunet ne tononjin toek. 
Proverbs20:17 Anyiny eng' chii amitwogigap lembeita, ago ne matya konyi kutinnyi koik." 
Proverbs20:18 Ki kimiiti chobutyet age tugul eng' katigonet; ak iyai lugeet, icheeng' utaatyet." 
Proverbs20:19 Ng'aanyei ung'ootik ne ibooti ng'aleek; amat onamge anyun ak ineendet ne iberberisyei. 
Proverbs20:20 Age tugul ne sasei kwan anan kamet, kimisi tainnyi eng' mesundeito ne oo miising'." 
Proverbs20:21 Poroteetap tuguuk che kindii ne piitu eng' chokyinet koma kiberuuri eng' let. 
Proverbs20:22 Amat imwa ile, “Ageeri yaityet.” Igen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kosaruun." 
Proverbs20:23 Wechei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ratilisyek che po lembech; ama myee kerutyetap lembech. 
Proverbs20:24 Indochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kakwautigap chii; imuktoi ano anyun chii koguiyo ooreennyi? 
Proverbs20:25 Mesteet eng' chii kosartae kole, “Tiliil,” ak ye kagoyai kayasyosyek, koteebat." 
Proverbs20:26 Iyestoi laitoryat ne utaat kiptengeginik, ak kotuei icheek eng' kiit ne kituisye." 
Proverbs20:27 Tait ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor saboondap chii, ne isyachi tuguugap ke." 
Proverbs20:28 Riibei `rireenet ak iman laitoryat, ak kogimiti rireenet ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet." 
Proverbs20:29 Toroornatetap murenik ko kimnateennywa, ak karaaranindap poisyek kalwalek." 
Proverbs20:30 Iundoi yaitwogik pirutik che ng'woneen, ak itiliili pirutik agoi kebeberwegap oriit." 
Proverbs21:1 Uu ainoosyek muguleldap laitoryat eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; imuti kotokyigei oldo tugul ole machei. 
Proverbs21:2 Leen chii po iman poisyonikyik tugul, ago keerei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugulelwek eng' karagendoet." 
Proverbs21:3 Keyaei iman ak kirwooget, ko taachaksei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosiir korosyot." 
Proverbs21:4 Koonyek che tinyei menoteet ak muguleldo ne meenei, agot taitap kiptengeginik ko tengekto kityo." 
Proverbs21:5 Tokyingei chaang'indo kityo kabwaatutigap che igiilegei; ago panani age tugul ne sartae. 
Proverbs21:6 Ye kinyooru konoraik eng' lembeita ko uu kibungweret ne ki wiirchin komosi ak komosi ak uu mesteetap meet. 
Proverbs21:7 Oone kiptengeginik koroomnatennywa, amu eesyoi ichek koyai ne myee." 
Proverbs21:8 Kunuur miising' ooreetap ineendet ne laei ng'oogisto, ago atebetap ne tiliil ko litit poisyennyi." 
Proverbs21:9 Kaigai kemeny taban eng' koot parak, kosiir kemeny koot ne oo ak kwondo ne poliin." 
Proverbs21:10 Machei yaityet saboondap chiito ne ya; ma nyooru chameet chiitap kokwennyi eng' tainnyi. 
Proverbs21:11 Ye kibir chotindet, konyooru utaatyet koseng'eng'; ak ye kineet ne utaat, kotaachei naet." 
Proverbs21:12 Ibwaati chiitap iman kootap kiptengekyot; ole kigabuitoi kiptengeginik eng' ng'emisyennywa. 
Proverbs21:13 Ineendet ne timei itiikyik ye riirei kibananiat, koriirei agine ago ma kasyin chii." 
Proverbs21:14 Imisi nereegek konunotyot ne ki koonu eng' ung'oot, ak imisi nereegek che ng'woneen asoya." 
Proverbs21:15 Poiboiyet eng' chiito ne po iman koyai kirwooget; ago kaimetapkei eng' yaigap tengekto. 
Proverbs21:16 Imuunyi eng' tuiyetap che ki kobek chiito ne mastoi eng' ooreetap kaguiyet. 
Proverbs21:17 Egu kibananiat chiito ne chamei ureryet, ma egu mogoryot ineendet ne chamei divaik ak mwanik." 
Proverbs21:18 Egu kiptengekyot ne kityage ne po iman; ak kogeeri kaberberindet che po iman. 
Proverbs21:19 Kaigai kemeny surkwen, kosiir kemeny ak kwondo ne polei ak konereechi." 
Proverbs21:20 Miitei konoraik che po kamanuutyet ne oo ak mwanik eng' meng'ootetap ne utaat, ago amei konoraikyik kobek chiito ne perber." 
Proverbs21:21 Ineendet ne isubi imanda ak chamyet, konyooru saboondo, imanda ak teegisto." 
Proverbs21:22 Laanyei chiito ne utaat nganaseetap che kiimeen, ak kobut kimnateetap kamang'unennyi." 
Proverbs21:23 Age tugul ne riibei kutinnyi ak ng'elyeptanyi koriibei saboondanyi si ma nyoor nyalilwogik. 
Proverbs21:24 Kiguure chotindet chiito ne meenei ak kochaugei, poisyei ineendet eng' kaeetetapkei ne po menoteet." 
Proverbs21:25 Parei chiito ne choriren magennyi; amu eesyoi eunekyik kobois. 
Proverbs21:26 Mi ne kasei myat eng' keiyandit peet komugul; ago igoitoi ne po iman ama etei. 
Proverbs21:27 Kiit ne kiwechei korosyotap kiptengeginik, kotam nee anyun ye ibu korosyondonooto kotinyei kabwaatutik che yaach." 
Proverbs21:28 Lusei paoryat ne po lembech, ago ng'alaali ng'aleek che tebyei keny chiito ne kasei." 
Proverbs21:29 Iuuiiti togeennyi chiito ne ya, ago chobei ortinwekyik chiito ne po iman." 
Proverbs21:30 Ma mi utaatyet, anan kaguiyet, anan kirwooget, ne kirindoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs21:31 Choboksei paraisiit agobo peetuutap lugeet, ago po katerteeret Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs22:1 Kaigai kelewen kainet ne myee kosiir mogornatosyek che chaang'; kaigai kelewen myeeindo ne po chamyet kosiir fedha ak thahabu. 
Proverbs22:2 Ni ne amdoi mogoreek ak kibananook: Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaindetap icheek tugul. 
Proverbs22:3 Keerei chiito ne ng'oom yaityet ak kounygei; ago siirtoi abusanik ak konyoor nyalilda. 
Proverbs22:4 Melektap kaming'inetapkei ak kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko mogornatosyek, teegisto ak saboondo." 
Proverbs22:5 Mi katook ak mestonok ooreetap chiito ne imaasat; looitune chooto ineendet ne riibei saboondanyi. 
Proverbs22:6 Ineet lakweet koosup ooreet ne nyolu kobun, ak ma pagaaktoi agot ye kagoosit." 
Proverbs22:7 Ko uu ye pou `mogoryot kibananook, ko otwogindetap chiito ne pesendoi, ne peseni." 
Proverbs22:8 Ineendet ne koolei tengekto kogesei nyalilda, ak petei kirokto ne po nereeknatennyi." 
Proverbs22:9 Kiberuuri chii ne aiyeep, amu igoochin amitwogikyik kibananiat." 
Proverbs22:10 Oon chotindet, si kobet polateet, ee, siisei pooryeet ak teweernateet." 
Proverbs22:11 Ineendet ne chamei tiliilindap muguleldo ak myeeindap kutinnyi ko egu anyun laitoryat chorwennyi. 
Proverbs22:12 Riibei konyegap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet ne tinyei naet, ago igabui ng'aleegap chiito ne kaberberindet." 
Proverbs22:13 Mwaei chiito ne choriren kole, “Mi ng'etundo saang'! Kibara eng' ooreet.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Keriinget ne loo kutitap chepkugoniot; ibutyin yooto ineendet ne nereekyin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Proverbs22:15 Ki kiratyi perberyo muguleldap lakweet; ago oonei kirokto ne po kergong'yet kolooit eng' ineendet. 
Proverbs22:16 Ineendet ne usei kibananiat si kotesak tuguukyik, ak kogoochin tuguuk mogoryot, koegu kibananiat." 
Proverbs22:17 Ep iit, si kobiit igas ng'aleegap piik che utaatiin, ak itokyi muguleldang'ung' naennyu." 
Proverbs22:18 Amu myee ngot iriip eng' oriing'ung', ngo kimegitu tugul eng' kuting'ung'." 
Proverbs22:19 Si kobiit imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kaaboorun rani chuuto, ee, kaaboorun." 
Proverbs22:20 Tos ma asirun tuguuk che korooron che po kirwoogutik ak naet. 
Proverbs22:21 Kogoonin inai imanitap ng'aleegap iman, si kobiit imuuch iwolji ng'aleegap iman icheek che koiyoogun?" 
Proverbs22:22 Amat irebe kibananiat amu panan, anan ius eng' ormariich ne kinyaliili." 
Proverbs22:23 Amu ng'alaaldochin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek, ak koluul saboonwegap icheek che luulei." 
Proverbs22:24 Amenam chorwandit ak chiito ne nereechi, amat obendate ak chiito ne tinyei nereegek," 
Proverbs22:25 si meneetkei ortinwekyik, ak inyooru mesteet ne po saboondang'ung'." 
Proverbs22:26 Amat iegu agenge eng' icheek che iyastos konamegei eunek, anan agenge eng' icheek che tononjin piik agobo pesenaik." 
Proverbs22:27 Ngot ko metinye che iyaaktoe, ko amu nee anyun si koibenen itogung'ung'?" 
Proverbs22:28 Ameiste kiwoteet ne po keny, ne kichobei kwanisyeguk." 
Proverbs22:29 Tos igeere chiito ne igiiljingei poisyennyi? Tononi ineendet eng' taitap laitorinik; ma tononi eng' taitap piik che ma taagunotiin. 
Proverbs23:1 Ye oamisye ak pounindet, komeutye ile omi ak ng'o." 
Proverbs23:2 Ngo ii kipkeiya, inde rotweet moktang'ung'." 
Proverbs23:3 Amat imach amitwogigap pounindet che anyiny; amu imuuch kaberberin amitwogichooto. 
Proverbs23:4 Ngot itinye utaatyet ne ititaat; komeimigei ile asi iegu mogoryo. 
Proverbs23:5 Ye iyaat konyeguk igeer, koma komi? Amu yachingei mogornateet kebebaik, tirireni ko uu kipsiichit kotokyingei parak." 
Proverbs23:6 Ameam amitwogigap ineendet ne tinyei kong' ne ya, amemach amitwogikyik che anyiny," 
Proverbs23:7 amu uu ineendet kabwaatutikyik. Leenjinin, “Amisye ak ieeise!” ago ma mi muguleldanyi kobooten." 
Proverbs23:8 Ing'ung'u kererutyet ne keam, ak kobetyo ng'aleeguk che anyiny." 
Proverbs23:9 Amat ing'alaal kogasei ne perber; amu sasei utaatyetap ng'aleeguk. 
Proverbs23:10 Ameiste kiwoteet ne po keny; anan irep mbareenigap che ma tinyei kwanisyek," 
Proverbs23:11 amu kiim katyagindennywa; tononjin icheek eng' ng'aleek kogirindoin. 
Proverbs23:12 Igoochi muguleldang'ung' kaneetisyet, ak igoochi itiiguk kogas ng'aleegap ng'omnateet." 
Proverbs23:13 Ameesye igerkong' lakweet, amu ma meei ngibir." 
Proverbs23:14 Piree kirokto, si isaru saboondanyi eng' ye mi che ki kobek." 
Proverbs23:15 Weeriinnyu, ngo utaat muguleldang'ung', ko paibai agine muguleldanyu." 
Proverbs23:16 Eng' iman koboiboitu muguleldanyu, ye kemwa tuguuk che po iman." 
Proverbs23:17 Amat koam ng'etkong' muguleldang'ung' agobo kiptengeginik, ago konyit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuut komugul." 
Proverbs23:18 Amu miitei iman melekto, ama ki istoi kamang'uneng'ung'." 
Proverbs23:19 Kas anyun, weeriinnyu, ak isich utaatyet, ak indochi muguleldang'ung' eng' ooreet." 
Proverbs23:20 Amotebi ak eeigap divaik, kobooto kipkeinik che amei panyeek." 
Proverbs23:21 Amu egu ponoonik kibogitinik ak kipkeinik, ak ilaakyin rwondo chiito mararenik." 
Proverbs23:22 Epchi iit kwandang'ung' ne kisichin, amesas komet ko kagoosit." 
Proverbs23:23 Al imanit, amealde, ee, al utaatyet, kaneetisyet ak kaguiyet." 
Proverbs23:24 Paibaitu miising' kwandap ne po iman, ak ineendet ne sichei lakweet ne utaat, kobaibaitune ineendet." 
Proverbs23:25 Ingogaskei kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung', ingobaibait kamenng'ung' ne kisichin." 
Proverbs23:26 Weeriinnyu, koono muguleldang'ung', ingobaibaitune konyeguk ortinwekyuk." 
Proverbs23:27 Amu keriinget ne loo chepkugoniot, keriinget ne mariich kwondo ne ma neng'ung'." 
Proverbs23:28 Ee saptoi ko uu rebindet, ak kotesei kaberberik eng' piik." 
Proverbs23:29 Ng'oo ne riirei koleen, Pwo! Ng'oo ne arageni? Ng'oo ne polei? Ng'oo ne ing'unyng'unyi? Ng'oo ne ki kiguoten puch? Ng'oo ne piriireen koonyek?" 
Proverbs23:30 Icheek che eei divaik agoi, icheek che cheeng'oti maiyek che purugotin." 
Proverbs23:31 Ameiit maiyek ye kagobiriritu, ye taagu itoondanyi eng' kigombet, ye rektoi komyee." 
Proverbs23:32 Eng' let kosus ko uu ereneet, ak kouut ko uu melmeldo." 
Proverbs23:33 Keerei konyeguk karusyek, ak komwa muguleldang'ung' tuguuk che imaasotin." 
Proverbs23:34 Ee, iigeitu ineendet ne rue nyanjet kween, anan ko uu ineendet ne rue toloitap moinget." 
Proverbs23:35 Ile, “Kagokwera, ago ma ama kiy, kagobira, ama agas. Agosu au, si acheeng'at kogeny?”" 
Proverbs24:1 Amat koamjin ng'etkong' piik che yaacheen, anan imach otebi ak icheek;" 
Proverbs24:2 amu ineetegei mugulwekwak usiisyet, ak mwaei kutusweekwak che yaacheen." 
Proverbs24:3 Kiteege koot utaatyet, ak ki kimite kaguiyet;" 
Proverbs24:4 ak eng' naet kinyiiti kooriik che po oriit che po koyooto eng' mogornatosyek tugul che po kamanuutyet ne oo ak ko myachen. 
Proverbs24:5 Kiim chiito ne utaat kosiir chii ne kiim; ak kiim chiito ne tinye naet kosiir ne tinye kimnateet; 
Proverbs24:6 amu iyae lugeeng'ung' eng' kandoet ne po utaatyet, ak piitu saruunet eng' chaang'indap kirwoogik." 
Proverbs24:7 Toroor utaatyet eng' ne perber; eng' kurgat koma yaatei kutinnyi. 
Proverbs24:8 Ineendet ne chobei koyai yaityet keguure ineendet chii ne ya. 
Proverbs24:9 Tengekto kabwaatutigap ne perber; ak wechei `piik chotindet. 
Proverbs24:10 Ngot itanui eng' peetuutap nyalilda ko ming'in kimnateng'ung'. 
Proverbs24:11 Saru icheek che kimuti koba meet, ak iet che kimachei kebar." 
Proverbs24:12 Ngot imwa ile, “Keero, ma ki nai niito!” Tos ma ibwaati niito ineendet ne keerei mugulelwek eng' karagendoet? Tos ma naei ng'olyoondoniito ineendet ne riibei saboondang'ung'? Ak tos ma igeerchin chii age tugul ko uu poisyennyi?" 
Proverbs24:13 Weeriinnyu, am kumyat, amu myach; kobooto masamek, amu anyiny ye ichamchami." 
Proverbs24:14 Inae anyun ile anyiny utaatyet eng' saboondang'ung'; ngot inyooru nooto, kobiitu anyun melekto, ama ki istoi kamang'uneng'ung'." 
Proverbs24:15 Amesapchi ko uu kiptengekyot meng'ootetap chiito ne po iman; ameluul ole imuung'ee ineendet; 
Proverbs24:16 Amu ibuti chiito ne po iman konyil tisap, ak kong'eet kogeny; ago igabui nyalilda kiptengeginik." 
Proverbs24:17 Amat ibaibaitu ye ibut punyondeng'ung', amat kogaskei muguleldang'ung' ye kagiwiirta ineendet," 
Proverbs24:18 si ma keer nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak konyit, ak koistoe ineendet nereegekyik." 
Proverbs24:19 Amengonyitin che yaei yaityo; anan koamjin ng'etkong' kiptengeginik; 
Proverbs24:20 amu ma nyooru melekto chiito ne ya; kimisi tait ne po kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs24:21 Weeriinnyu, konyit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak laitoryat, amonamge ak icheeget che walaksei;" 
Proverbs24:22 amu piitu nyalildanywa kochogu. Ak ng'oo ne ingen ng'emisyetap icheeget tuwai? 
Proverbs24:23 Chuuto ak icheek ko ng'aleegap che utaatiin. ma myee ketiytiy piik eng' kirwooget. 
Proverbs24:24 Ineendet ne mwachin kiptengekyot, koleenjin, “Ii po iman,” kochubei `piik ineendet, wechei pororyosyek ineendet." 
Proverbs24:25 Ago igasegei che kere kong' ineendet, ak nyoonjin icheek kaberuret ne myee." 
Proverbs24:26 Ng'ututisyei ineendet ne wolu ne po iman. 
Proverbs24:27 Chop poisyeng'ung' eng' ole po saang', chopchigei kiy age tugul eng' mbar; yeityo iteech koong'ung'." 
Proverbs24:28 Amat iegu paoryat igirinde chiitap kokweng'ung' puch, amat ing'aalse eng' kuting'ung'." 
Proverbs24:29 Amat imwa ile, “Ayachini ineendet ko uu ye kagoyaiywo; ageerchini chiichooto ko uu poisyennyi.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Ki abun mbareetap chiito ne choriren, ak ole neegitee mbareetap sabibuk ne po chiichooto ma tinyei naet;" 
Proverbs24:31 Ak keero, ki kobitye katook mbareet tugul; ak ki tuch siwek yooto tugul, ak ki kobutok inatunnyi ne po koik." 
Proverbs24:32 Ki ageer anyun ak abwaat miising'; ki ageer, ak ki anyooru kaneetisyet." 
Proverbs24:33 Rwondo kitigin, kanuuget kitigin, arung'et kitigin ne po eunek eng' rwondo," 
Proverbs24:34 konyonjin anyun panandang'ung' ko uu rebindet, ak konyonjin rubeet ko uu chiito ne tinyei kariik." 
Proverbs25:1 Kalewenaigap Solomon chuuto ak icheek, che kisirei piigap Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah." 
Proverbs25:2 Toroornatetap Kamuktaindet kouny kiy, ago toroornatetap laitorinik kocheeng' ng'olyoo age tugul." 
Proverbs25:3 Ko uu ye ma isiagaksei toroorindap kipsengwet, ak looindap ng'wony, ko uu nooto agine mugulelwegap laitorinik." 
Proverbs25:4 Kenende michikyigek eng' fedha, si kobiit tereet ne po katiliilindetap fedha." 
Proverbs25:5 Iste kiptengekyot eng' taitap laitoryat, si ki kimiit eng' imanda ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet." 
Proverbs25:6 Amelasuge eng' taitap laitoryat, anan itonon eng' komostap piik che eecheen." 
Proverbs25:7 Amu kaigai ngeleenjin, “Togosu,” kosiir kiming'inin eng' taitap pounindet, Kiit ne kaigeer eng' konyeguk." 
Proverbs25:8 Amat isip iyai pooryeet, si ma petun kiit ne iyae eng' let, ye kagoteweerin chiitap kokweng'ung'." 
Proverbs25:9 Orwooch ak chiitap kokweng'ung' ineegei, amat ing'aany ung'ootyetap chiito age;" 
Proverbs25:10 si ma iteweerin ineendet ne kasei, ak konamin teweernateng'ung'." 
Proverbs25:11 Ng'olyoot ne kemwaei eng' sait ne nyolu ko uu logoegap thahabu che mi kerebonigap fedha. 
Proverbs25:12 Uu munaiyetap itit ne po thahabu, ak lelestap thahabu che korooron, kotigonindet ne utaat ne kere kong' itit ne kase iit." 
Proverbs25:13 Uu kaitityetap teluji eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet, chiito ne kiyooktoi ne kiyani, eng' icheek che iyooktoi ineendet; amu igoigoi saboonwegap kiptainikyik." 
Proverbs25:14 Uu poolik ak usoonet ne ma tinyei ropta, ne ilasunegei konunoikyik eng' lembech." 
Proverbs25:15 Kigoigoi kirwoogindet eng' muitaet ne oo, ak iriei ng'elyepta ne tala kowet." 
Proverbs25:16 Ngot inyooru kumyat, iam che tee che yamin; si mebiye ak ing'ung'u." 
Proverbs25:17 Ametyech kootap chiitap kokweng'ung' kotugul; si ma ng'et agobo inyee ak kosasin. 
Proverbs25:18 Chiito ne paoryanjin chiitap kokwennyi eng' lembech ko kergei ak kiriswet, ak rotwetap chok, ak kipchabet ne ng'atip." 
Proverbs25:19 Uu keldet ne kigoil, ak keeldo ne ki kobunuk kamang'unet ne kimang'u chiito ne ma kiyani eng' peetuutap nyalilda." 
Proverbs25:20 Ineendet ne tyenjin tyenwogik muguleldo ne nyigiis ko uu chiito ne ireegu ngoryeet eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet, ak ko uu siki che kiroong'jin moet." 
Proverbs25:21 Ngo am rubeet punyondeng'ung', ibai; ak ngo am melel, inage koe;" 
Proverbs25:22 amu irurukyini ng'etetyot metinnyi, ak kogeerun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs25:23 Ibu ropta usoonetap murot kaataam, ibu ko uu nooto chemerereet nereegek." 
Proverbs25:24 Kaigai kemeny taban eng' koot parak, kosiir kemeny koot ne oo ak kwondo ne poliin." 
Proverbs25:25 Uu peek che kaitit eng' ne amei melel, logoiywek che myach che punu emet ne loo." 
Proverbs25:26 Uu kondap peek ne kanyi ng'atatyat anan kondametutap peek ne tururot chiito ne po iman ne igoochingei kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs25:27 Ma myee keam kumyat ne oo; anan kocheeng'jingei chii teegisto ne siirtoot. 
Proverbs25:28 Uu nganaseet ne kigebut, ne ma tinyei irimeet chiito ne ma riibegei." 
Proverbs26:1 Ko uu ye ma namegei teluji ak kemeut, ama namegei ropta ak peetuusyegap kesisyet, ko uu nooto, ma nyooljin teegisto chii ne perber." 
Proverbs26:2 Ko uu ye ma ombenoti puch chepkelembut, anan ko uu ye ma tirirenoti puch kibiswet, ko uu nooto, ma namei chii chubisyet ne po puch." 
Proverbs26:3 Ko uu ye po `kipchoritiit paraisiit, ak ko uu ye po `karnetap kutit sigiryet, ko uu nooto, po `kirokto chiito ne perber." 
Proverbs26:4 Amewolji ne perber ko uu perberyennyi, si meige ineendet aginye." 
Proverbs26:5 Wolji ne perber ko uu perberyennyi, si ma iitkei ineendet kole utaat eng' losennyi pogei." 
Proverbs26:6 Ineendet ne iyooktoe ng'olyoot chiito ne perber ko uu ye tilei keelyekyik anan koeei ng'emisyet. 
Proverbs26:7 Ko uu ye songinindos keelyegap ne ing'wali; ko uu nooto kalewenet eng' kutusweegap che perber. 
Proverbs26:8 Ineendet ne igoochin teegisto chiito ne perber, ko uu chiito ne indoi koita porowet ne ki wiirtoisye." 
Proverbs26:9 Uu kateet ne toorei eutap kibogityot, kalewenet eng' kutusweegap che perber." 
Proverbs26:10 Uu mwogindet ne iguoteni tugul, ineendet ne siirei ne perber anan che siirtoi, koboisyechi." 
Proverbs26:11 Uu seset ne weekyingei kang'undaikyik, ineendet ne perber ne ketyingei perberyennyi." 
Proverbs26:12 Tos igeere chiito ne iityingei kole utaat eng' losennyi pogei? Miitei kamang'unet eng' chiito ne perber kosiir ineendet. 
Proverbs26:13 Mwaei ne choriren kole, “Mi ng'etundo ooreet; mi ng'etundo ortinwek che paraen.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Ko uu ye weegegei kereiywotap kurgeet kariikyik che namei, ko uu nooto weechegei chiito ne choriren eng' itogunnyi." 
Proverbs26:15 Unyei keunnyi eng' taabeet chiito ne choriren; ng'etei ineendet si ma inde kutinnyi. 
Proverbs26:16 Iityingei chiito ne choriren kole ng'oom eng' losennyi pogei kosiir piik tisap che imuuchi kowol kiy. 
Proverbs26:17 Uu ne namei itigap seset, ineendet ne siirtoi, ak koiimgei eng' pooryeet ne ma nenyi." 
Proverbs26:18 Uu chiito ne amei iywek ne wiirtoi kegenganik, kipchabonik ak meet;" 
Proverbs26:19 chiito ne iberberi chiitap kokwennyi, ak kole, “Ka urereni?”" 
Proverbs26:20 Meei maat ye ma mi kweenik; ak siisei pooryeet eng' ole ma mi chaamindet. 
Proverbs26:21 Ko uu ye tesei `nesek ng'etetyot ak ko uu ye tesei `kweenik maat; ko uu nooto, tesei suryet `chiito ne poliin." 
Proverbs26:22 Uu amitwogik che anyiny ng'aleegap chaamindet, ak pendi ng'aleechooto moet oriit." 
Proverbs26:23 Uu tereetap meneet ne ki kiliige michikyigek che kigenendoe fedha, kutitap chemwai kuut kobooto muguleldo ne ya." 
Proverbs26:24 Iberberisyei eng' ng'aleekyik chiito ne wegisyei, ago konorchingei ng'aalseet;" 
Proverbs26:25 ye kamwa che myach, ko meyan ineendet; amu miitei muguleldanyi tuguuk tisabu che po wegeet." 
Proverbs26:26 Agot ngo tugegei wegeet eng' ng'aalseet, ko tuun keng'aanyei yaityennyi eng' taitap tuiyet." 
Proverbs26:27 Ibutyin keriinget age tugul ne palei keriinget; ak koweekyingei koita ineendet ne mildoi. 
Proverbs26:28 Wechei ng'elyepta ne mwaei lembech icheeget che kagoguoten; ak ibu ng'emisyet chiito ne chemwai kuut. 
Proverbs27:1 Amechaugei agobo mutai; amu mengen kiit ne piitu eng' peetuut age tugul. 
Proverbs27:2 Ingolasun age, amelasuge; ingolasun toondet, amelasuge." 
Proverbs27:3 Nyigiis koita, nyigiisen ng'aniek; ago siirei chooto tugul nereegegap ne perber." 
Proverbs27:4 Korom nereeknateet, koroomen miising' nereegek; ago ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taitap ng'etkonda?" 
Proverbs27:5 Kaigai kereetap kong' ne taagu kosiir chamyet ne kiunyei. 
Proverbs27:6 Po iman kaguotenetap chorweet; ago chaang' ng'ututosyegap puunyoot. 
Proverbs27:7 Wechei masamek chiito ne piyong'ot; ago anyiny kiy age tugul ne ng'waan eng' chiito ne amei rubo. 
Proverbs27:8 Uu toriityon ne ng'eete keswennyi koombenoti, chiito ne ng'eete oldanyi koombenot." 
Proverbs27:9 Iboiboi muguleldo mwanik ak nyamdutik; iboiboi ko uu nooto anyinyindap chorweetap chii ye toreti ineendet. 
Proverbs27:10 Amemete chorweng'ung', ak chorweetap kwandang'ung'; amewe kootap ng'eetap kamenng'ung' eng' peetuutap nyalildang'ung'. Kaigai chiitap kokweng'ung' ne neegit kosiir ng'eetap kamenng'ung' ne mi ole loo." 
Proverbs27:11 Weeriinnyu, egu utaat, ak ibaibai muguleldanyu, si amuuch awolji ineendet ne iteweera." 
Proverbs27:12 Keerei chiito ne ng'oom yaityet, ak kounygei; ago siirtoi abusanik, ak konyoor nyalilda." 
Proverbs27:13 Nam ngoryeetap ineendet ne tononjin toondet; ak inam ineendet koek kaarorunet ne tononjin toondet. 
Proverbs27:14 Ineendet ne iberuuri chorwennyi eng' kutit ne oo, kong'eetei karon miising', ki iti koek chubisyet kaberuronooto eng' ineendet." 
Proverbs27:15 Kergei ropta ne inesi eng' peetuutap ropta ak kwondo ne poliin. 
Proverbs27:16 Ineendet ne leen kirindoi kwonyooto, kogirindoi usoonet, ak komumute mwaita eunnyi ne po tai." 
Proverbs27:17 Litei karnet, karnet; litei ko uu nooto chii togeetap chorwennyi." 
Proverbs27:18 Age tugul ne riibei mogoywet koamei logoekyik, ak kitoroori ineendet ne riibei kiptaiyandennyi." 
Proverbs27:19 Ko uu ye keerei chii togeennyi eng' peek, ko uu nooto keerei muguleldap chii, ne po chiito age." 
Proverbs27:20 Ma koi piyo yemi piik che ki kobek ak ng'emisyet; ma koi piyo konyegap chii. 
Proverbs27:21 Kitiliili fedha eng' tereet, kitiliile thahabu `maat ne oo, ak kityeme chii kalasunennyi." 
Proverbs27:22 Agot ngitui chiito ne perber eng' kenut kobooto peek che kagitartaran, koma istoige perberyennyi kora." 
Proverbs27:23 Igiilgei si inai ole teptoi akwotisyegap keechiireguk, riip komyee akwotisyegap tuguuk." 
Proverbs27:24 Amu ma po koigeny mogornatosyek, ama tebyei naaryeetap pounateet eng' ibinwek tugul." 
Proverbs27:25 Ki ibei susweek che ki koyaamnyo, ak piitos susweek che ng'orng'or, ak kiyumi sogeek che po tuloonook." 
Proverbs27:26 Po ngoroiguk aaregap keechiir, ak ng'oroorek ko alyetap mbar;" 
Proverbs27:27 miitei cheegap ng'oroorek che yamei koek amitwogiguk, ak che po piigap koong'ung'; ak amitwogik che yamei tiibiiguk." 
Proverbs28:1 Mweei kiptengekyot ye maonei chii, ago nyigoonen che po iman ko uu ng'etundo." 
Proverbs28:2 Chaang'aitu pounigap emet amu pistoennyi, ago tebyei keny emonooto amu piik che tinyei kaguiyet ak naet." 
Proverbs28:3 Chiito ne ma tinyei kiy ne usei kibananook ko uu usoonetap ropta ne ng'emei amitwogik. 
Proverbs28:4 Ilasu piik che yaach icheeget che metoi ng'atuutik, ago porye pichooto yaacheen `icheeget che riibei ng'atuutik." 
Proverbs28:5 Ma iguitos piik che yaach kirwooget, ago iguitos tuguuk tugul icheeget che cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs28:6 Kaigai kibananiat ne wendotee imandanyi, kosiir ineendet ne imaasat eng' ortinwekyik, agot ngo mogoryo." 
Proverbs28:7 Weeriit ne utaat age tugul ko riibei ng'atuutik, ago iteweeri kwandanyi ineendet ne chorweetap kipkeinik." 
Proverbs28:8 Ineendet ne tesei tuguukyik eng' keljinet ne siirei ne nyolu, eng' tuguuk che tesoksei, koyumjin chooto ineendet ne riiree kibananook." 
Proverbs28:9 Kiwechei saaetap ineendet ne eesyoi kogas ng'atuutik. 
Proverbs28:10 Ibutyin keriingennyi age tugul ne imaasi che po iman kobun ooreet ne ya, ago poorei eng' tuguuk che myach, piik che ititaatiin." 
Proverbs28:11 Menee mogoryot utaaatyennyi, ago isyachi ineendet kibananiat ne tinyei kaguiyet." 
Proverbs28:12 Piitu toroornatet ne oo ye iterteerisyei che po iman, ago ye ng'eetyo kiptengeginik, kounygei piik." 
Proverbs28:13 Ma nyooru perurto ineendet ne unyei pistaosyekyik, ago nyooru rireenet age tugul ne ng'aanyei ak kometo." 
Proverbs28:14 Paibai chiito ne iyweisyei kotugul; ago ibutyin yaityet ineendet ne iuuiiti muguleldanyi. 
Proverbs28:15 Uu ng'etundo ne pooriseni ak magalaluut ne ombenoti, pounindet ne ya ne pou kibananook." 
Proverbs28:16 Usiindet ne oo agine pounindet ne ma tinyei kaguiyet; ago ineendet ne wechei kasetap myat kotesei peetuusyekyik. 
Proverbs28:17 Mwechin keriinget chiito ne mi paragunnyi korotiigap chii age; amat koraany chii ineendet. 
Proverbs28:18 Kisaru age tugul ne wendotee imanda, ago ibuti koma tyanit ineendet ne imaasat eng' ortinwekyik." 
Proverbs28:19 Nyooru amitwogik che chaang' chiito ne ibati korennyi; ago nyooru pananda ne oo ineendet ne isubi tangoita. 
Proverbs28:20 Nyooru perurwogik che chaang' chiito ne po iman, ago ma kimetoi ama kibir ineendet ne labatyin koek mogoryo." 
Proverbs28:21 Ma myee ketiytiy piik; anan kobistoe chii kole si konyoor kererutyet. 
Proverbs28:22 Labatyin mogornatosyek ineendet ne tinyei kong' ne ya, ama naei kole nyoonjin pananda." 
Proverbs28:23 Tuun nyooru chameet ineendet ne kere kong' chii kosiir ineendet ne chemwai kuut. 
Proverbs28:24 Ineendet ne chorei tuguugap kwan anan kamet ak komwa kole, “Ma pistoet niito,” ko chorweetap ng'emindet ineendet." 
Proverbs28:25 Ing'eeti pooryeet ineendet ne tinyei kasetap myat, ago nerei ineendet ne imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs28:26 Perber ineendet ne imang'ugei; ago kisaru age tugul ne wendotee utaatyet. 
Proverbs28:27 Ma rarchin kiy ineendet ne igoochin tuguuk kibananiat, ago nyooru chubisyosyek che chaang' ineendet ne unyei konyekyik." 
Proverbs28:28 Ye kang'eetyo piik che yaach, ko unyegei piik che po iman; ago ye kalusyo icheek, ko tesoksei che po iman." 
Proverbs29:1 Ineendet ne iuuiiti kaatinnyi, ko kageger kong' konyil che chaang', ko yaitu eng' chokyinet, ama mi kiy ne kinyae." 
Proverbs29:2 Ye pounisye che po iman ko poiboitu piik; ago tigendos piik ngo pounis chiito ne ya. 
Proverbs29:3 Iboiboi kwanda age tugul ne chamei utaatyet; ago iseerseeri tuguuk ineendet ne namegei ak chepkugonik. 
Proverbs29:4 Igimiiti emet laitoryat eng' kirwooknateet, ago igabui emet ineendet ne taachei tuguuk che ki koigoisye." 
Proverbs29:5 Chiito ne ilasu puch chiitap kokwennyi ko iitochin keelyekyik mesteet ne regereiywot. 
Proverbs29:6 Miitei mesteet pistoetap chiito ne ya; ago tyeni ak kobaibai chiito ne po iman. 
Proverbs29:7 Ibwaati chiito ne po iman ng'aleegap kibananook; ma tinyei kaguiyet kiptengekyot konai nooto. 
Proverbs29:8 Peelei nganaseet chotiik, ago kirindoi piik che utaatiin nereegek." 
Proverbs29:9 Ngot kotinyei kabeletapkei chiito ne utaat ak chiito ne perber, ngot konereechi anan ngo roryei, koma mi kamuung'et." 
Proverbs29:10 Wechei piik che tumdoi korotiik, chiito ne ititaat, ak cheeng'ei kobar chiito ne po iman." 
Proverbs29:11 Iboortoi chiito ne perber nereegekyik tugul, ago pou ak kosiisei eng' chooto, chiito ne utaat." 
Proverbs29:12 Ngot koepchi iit pounindet lembeita, koyaagitu otwogikyik tugul." 
Proverbs29:13 Tuitos kibagenge kibananiat ak usiindet: ikweng'jin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyegap icheek tuwai. 
Proverbs29:14 Ki kimiiti agoi koigeny laitornatetap laitoryat ne irwookyin kibananook eng' imanda. 
Proverbs29:15 Ibu kirokto ak kereetap kong' utaatyet, ago iteweeri kamet lakweet ne kigoochin koboigei." 
Proverbs29:16 Ye tesak kiptengeginik, ko tesoksei pistoet, ago keerei che po iman kabutennywa." 
Proverbs29:17 kergong' weeriing'ung', si kogoonin kamuung'et; si kobaibai saboondang'ung'." 
Proverbs29:18 Petyoti piik eng' ole ma mi ng'ang'utyet, ago paibai ineendet ne riibei ng'atuutyet." 
Proverbs29:19 Ma kitigonee ng'aleek otwogindet, amu nganda iguitos, koma kase iit." 
Proverbs29:20 Tos igeere chii ne sartae ng'aleekyik? Miitei kamang'unet eng' chiito ne perber kosiir ineendet. 
Proverbs29:21 Ineendet ne riibei komyee otwogindennyi kobooch kota ko lakwa kotun koegu weeriit eng' let. 
Proverbs29:22 Ing'eeti pooryeet kimnereekyat, ak ko nyiei pistoet chiito ne koroom." 
Proverbs29:23 Iming'ini chii `menatennyi, ago nyooru teegisto ineendet ne iming'inegei." 
Proverbs29:24 Wechei saboondanyi ineendet ne tinyei yamdaet ak choriindet; kasei chubisyet ama twegu. 
Proverbs29:25 Ibu mesteet kaiyweisyet ne kiywei chii, ago nyooru chametapkei age tugul ne imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs29:26 Cheeng'ei che chaang' myeeindo eng' pounindet, ago punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogetap chii." 
Proverbs29:27 Wechei che po iman ne ma po iman: wechei ne ya ne isubi iman. 
Proverbs30:1 Ng'aleegap Agur weeriitap Jake; maonateet. Ki leenji chiito Itiel, ee Itiel ak Ukal." 
Proverbs30:2 Auu tyony iman asiir chii tugul, ama tinyei kaguiyet ne po chii." 
Proverbs30:3 Ak tomo aneetkei utaatyet, ama nai Ineendet ne Tiliil." 
Proverbs30:4 Ng'oo ne ki togosta kipsengwet, ak kochoorgei? Ng'oo ne ki koyum usoonet eng' eunekyik? Ng'oo ne ki koratyi peek ngoryennyi? Ng'oo ne ki igimit tabanwek tugul che po ng'wony? Kiguure nee? Kiguure nee weeriinnyi, ngot ingen?" 
Proverbs30:5 Tiliil ng'olyootap age tugul ne po Kamuktaindet; inee ko long'eetap icheek che imang'u ineendet. 
Proverbs30:6 Ametesyi ng'olyoo ng'aleekyik, si ma kerin kong', ak iegu kiplembechwa." 
Proverbs30:7 Kasoomin tuguuk aeng'; amat ietena kotom amee: 
Proverbs30:8 Iste kolooegitu eng' anee, tangoita ak lembechek: amegoono pananda anan mogornatosyek; paena amitwogik che yama," 
Proverbs30:9 si ma piye ak aeesyen, ak ale, “Ng'oo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?” Anan si ma egu kibanania, ak achoorse, si ma mwa kainetap Kamuktaindennyu eng' tangoi." 
Proverbs30:10 Ametaam otwogindet eng' taitap kiptaiyandennyi, si ma chubin, ak konamin ng'oogisto." 
Proverbs30:11 Mi ibinda ne chubei kwanisyekwak, ama iberuuri kametisyekwak." 
Proverbs30:12 Miitei ibinda ne iitigei kole tiliil, ago tomo ki uun eng' simdanywa." 
Proverbs30:13 Miitei ibinda, ee, mi katorooretapkei ne tya eng' konyekwak! Sutotin irirenigap konyekwak." 
Proverbs30:14 Miitei ibinda che uu keleekwak rotoogap chok, ak ko uu keleekwak che po kipkermet, rotonik, si koame kibananook kogeskei eng' ng'wony, ak koges che ma tinyei kiy eng' piik." 
Proverbs30:15 Tinyei pinyinyet aarek aeng', che leen, “Koonech, koonech.” Mi tuguuk somogu che ma koi piyo, ee, miitei tuguuk ang'wanu che ma mwaei kole, “Kayamech”:" 
Proverbs30:16 chooto ko kererit, ak ne soon; emet ne ma piyonyi peek; ak maat ne ma mwaei kole, “Kagoyama.”" 
Proverbs30:17 Kondap chiito ne chotei kwandanyi, ama chamei kogas iit kamet, kobalu chepkuginik che po atebweet, kong'ato, ak koam aaregap kipsichinik." 
Proverbs30:18 Miitei tuguuk somogu che po kwong'eet ne oo eng' anee, mi ang'wanu che mangen:" 
Proverbs30:19 ole tirirendoi kipsiichit eng' soet, ole wetitoi ereneet eng' rwandet, ole wetitoi meeliit eng' nyanjet, ak ole teptoi mureno ak chepto." 
Proverbs30:20 Uu ni atebeetap kwondo ne tinyei ibeetapkei: amisyei ak kouus kutit, ak komwa kole, “Ma ayai kiy ne ya.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Potani ng'wony agobo tuguuk somok, tuguuk ang'wan che ma imuuchi komuitoochi:" 
Proverbs30:22 Chooto ko chu: otwogindet ne kaek laitoryat; Ak chiito ne abusat ye kagobiyo; 
Proverbs30:23 Ak kwondo ne kiwechei ye kagitun; Ak chepto ne otwogindet ne tuun punjin tuguugap kwondo ne pou ineendet. 
Proverbs30:24 Miitei tuguuk ang'wanu ng'wony che mengeechen, ak ko utaatiin miising':" 
Proverbs30:25 tyong'ik che ma kiimeen pirechik, ago iyumjigei amitwogikwak eng' kemei;" 
Proverbs30:26 tyong'ik che nyerootiin kenerok, ago teechei kooriikwak eng' rwandosyek;" 
Proverbs30:27 ma tinyei laitoryat chereng'enyinik, ago iboktoi tugul eng' kweanaik;" 
Proverbs30:28 ki muuchi kenamee cheringisyet euut, ago mi kooriigap laitorinik." 
Proverbs30:29 Miitei tuguuk somogu che pendoti komyee eng' pandanywa, ee, ang'wan che pendoti komye:" 
Proverbs30:30 ng'etundo, ne kiim kosiir tyong'ik tugul, ama mwee tyony age tugul;" 
Proverbs30:31 seset ne chepchep; ak kwesta agine; ak laitoryat ne ma kirindoi chii. 
Proverbs30:32 Ngot ko kaitoroorge eng' perberyo, anan ngot ko kaibwaat yaityo, iger kuting'ung'." 
Proverbs30:33 Amu nyoonei mwaita ye kisach cheego, pwoonei korotiik ngiiny serut, ko uu nooto ibu nereegek che kaging'eet pooryeet." 
Proverbs31:1 Ng'aleegap Laitoryat Lemuel; maonatet ne ki ineet kamet ineendet. 
Proverbs31:2 Nee, weeriinnyu? Ee, nee weeriitap moennyu? Ee, nee weeriitap kayasyoutikyuk?" 
Proverbs31:3 Amegoochi karusyek kimnateng'ung', amegoochi ortinweguk icheek che ng'emei laitorinik." 
Proverbs31:4 Ma nyooljin laitorinik, ee Lemuel, ma nyooljin divaik; ma nyooljin pounik koe maiyek," 
Proverbs31:5 si ye kagoee, koutye ng'atuutik, ak komaas kirwoogetap age tugul ne kinyaliili." 
Proverbs31:6 Inage maiyek ineendet ne machei kolus, ak inage divaik piik che tinyei ng'wanindo eng' saboonwekwak;" 
Proverbs31:7 ingoee ak koutye panandanyi, si mata kobwaat nyalildanyi." 
Proverbs31:8 Ng'alaal agobo ne namaat kuut, agobo tugul che kagilakta kotebi icheegei." 
Proverbs31:9 Ng'alaal, irwooch eng' imanda, ak irwooch agobo kibananook ak che ma tinyei kiy." 
Proverbs31:10 Ng'oo ne imuuchi konyoor kwondo ne nyolunot? Amu siirei miising' kamanuutyennyi, ne po koik che kiguure peninim." 
Proverbs31:11 Imang'u manong'otyondennyi ineendet, ma rarchin kiy ne nyooru." 
Proverbs31:12 Yachin ne myee osotyonnyi ineendet, ma yachin ne ya eng' peetuusyek tugul che po osotyondonooto." 
Proverbs31:13 Cheeng'ei osotyondonooto koroorigap keechiirek ak katanit, poisyei eng' chamyet." 
Proverbs31:14 Uu ineendet melisyegap che ibooti tuguuk che ki aldoi; amu ibu amitwogikyik eng' ole loo. 
Proverbs31:15 Ng'eetei kogeny kota ko kemoi, ak kobai piigap koonnyi. ak kogochi tiibiikyik poisyennywa." 
Proverbs31:16 Ibwaati agobo mbareet, ak koal; minei mbareetap sabibuk eng' keljinet ne konyoor." 
Proverbs31:17 Kermenegei kimnateet, ak kogimit eunekyik." 
Proverbs31:18 Keerei kole tinyei keljinet mung'arennyi; ma meei tainnyi kemoi. 
Proverbs31:19 Namei keetit ne kitae koroorik, ak konamei keetit ne kinabisye." 
Proverbs31:20 Aiyeep ineendet eng' kibananiat; ee, toreti ne ma tinyei kiy." 
Proverbs31:21 Ma iywei kole tos nyoor piikyik kaitityetap teluji; amu ilaachi piik tugul che po koonnyi ngoroik che piriireen. 
Proverbs31:22 Napchingei kitambaok che po lelesta; po ngoroikyik katanit ne karaaran ak ko po tuguuk che arusen ne piriir. 
Proverbs31:23 Naat manong'otyondennyi eng' ormariichok, ye tebyei ineendet ak poisyegap emet." 
Proverbs31:24 Nabei osotyondonooto ngoroigap katanit si koalda; igoochin chemung'arainik mosibisyek. 
Proverbs31:25 Kimnateet ak teegisto ko ngoroikyik, rorechin peetuusyek che pwoonei." 
Proverbs31:26 Twegu eng' utaatyet, mi kutinnyi kaneetisyetap talasyet." 
Proverbs31:27 Riibei komyee atebosyegap piigap koonnyi, ama amei che po chorirnatet." 
Proverbs31:28 Ng'eetos lagokyik ak koguuree ineendet ne iberuurot; ilasu kogeny manong'otyondennyi ineendet kole," 
Proverbs31:29 “Ki koyai ne nyolunot tiibiik che chaang', ago ii nyolunot kosiir chooto tugul.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Iberberisyei myeeindo, ak ko puch korooronindo, ago kilasu kwondo ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Proverbs31:31 Ogoochi logoegap eunekyik; ak ingolas poisyonikyik ineendet eng' ormariichok. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Chu ng'aleegap Amdoindet, nooto weeriitap Daudi, ne ki laitoryat eng' Jerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Mwaei Amdoindet kole, “Puch, ma tilei kiy, puch, ma tilei kiy, puch tugul.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Nee keljinet ne nyooru chiito, eng' poisyonikyik tugul che yaei eng' kurereetap asiista?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Siirtoi ibinda age ak nyoonei age, ago tebyei ng'wony koigeny." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Charu asiista ak kororokto; ak choktoi kowendi ole charunee. 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Usyin usoonet murot tai, ak koweek kwo murot kaataam, weechegei kotugul eng' ole punooti, ak koweeksei kogeny eng' ole pooch yiemutikyik." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Rootyin `ainoosyek tugul nyanja, ago manyiei nyanjet; ole rootyin ainoosyek, ko olooto ole weekyingei kogeny." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Koonu ng'etatet tuguuk tugul; ng'etatet ne ma imuuchi chii komwa. Ma piyonyi konda che keerei, amanyie itit, che kasei." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Nooto ne ki kobiit, ko nooto neta kobiitu; ak nooto ne ki keyai, ko nooto neta keyaei; ama mi kiy ne taugei eng' kurereetap asiista." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Tos mi kiy ne mwaei piik kole, “Keer, tos ma taugei ni?” Ki mi nooto kobooch keny, kotom kepiitu." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ma mi kabwaato agobo ibinwek che po tai; ama ibwaati ibinwek che po let che ta kobwanei, eng' chooto che ta kobiitu." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ki aa laitoryatap Israel eng' Jerusalem anee Amdoindet. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ki agiil muguleldanyu kocheeng' ak kosyach eng' utaatyet agobo tuguuk tugul che kiyaei eng' kurereetap kipsengwet. Ki igoochi Kamuktaindet weeriigap piik poisyet ne po nyalilda kotigone. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ki ageer poisyonik tugul che kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista; ak ogeero, puch tugul: Uu oneetap koristo." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Ma kimuuchi kilitit kiit ne kunuur; ama kimuuchi kiit ne ma mi. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ki amwachi muguleldanyu aleenji, “Keero, koanyooru utaatyet ne oo kosiir tugul che ki indounena eng' Jerusalem: ee, ki kogeer miising' muguleldanyu utaatyet ak naet.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ak ki agiil muguleldanyu konai ak koobeesyo utaatyet; konai iywek ak perberyo. Ago ki ageer kogeny ale kaimetapkei puch niito. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Amu mi arageneet ne oo utaatyet ne oo: ak tesei arageneet ineendet ne tesei ng'omnateet. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ki amwa eng' muguleldanyu ale, “Ara anyun, atyeme abaibaigei eng' poiboiyet: Abaibait eng' kiy ne myee.” Ago keero, ki ek puch niito agine." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ki amwa agobo roryot ale, Abusanateet ak agobo poiboiyet, ale, “Yaei nee?”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ki asyaach eng' muguleldanyu ole aboiboititoi poortanyu eng' divaik, kondoiywa muguleldanyu eng' utaatyet, ak ole anamdoi perberyo, kot amuuch ageer kiit ne nyoljin weeriigap piik koyai eng' kurereetap kipsengwet eng' peetuusyekwak tugul." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ki ayachigei poisyosyek che eecheen; ki ateekyigei kooriik; ki aminjige sabibuk; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 ki abatyige mbareenik ak achop ole kiuure, ak ki aminji yooto keetiik che po logoek alak tugul." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ki ayachigei tamboinik, si kobiit abise timiin ne ki kiminji keetiik." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ki aal otwogik che murenik ak che tiibiik, ak ki atinye otwogik che ki kisikyi koonnyu; ki atinye kogeny akwotisyek che chaang' che po tuuga ak che po keechiirek, kosiir tugul che ki indounena eng' Jerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ki ayumjige kogeny fedha ak thahabu, ak konoraik che korooron che po laitorinik ak che po emotinwek: ki alewenjigei tyeniik che murenik ak che kwonyiik ak poiboiyosyegap weeriigap piik, chebaigeinik che chaang'." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ki aa oo anyun ak ki atesage asiir tugul che ki indounena eng' Jerusalem; ak ki atepte utaatyennyu. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ak ki ma aeete konyekyuk kiy age tugul ne kimach: ma aeete muguleldanyu poiboiyet age tugul, amu ki paibait muguleldanyu eng' poisyennyu tugul; ak ki niito kebebertanyu eng' poisyennyu tugul." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ki ageer anyun poisyonik tugul che ki ayai, ak poisyet ne kiga abirtochigei ayai. Ogeero, puch tugul ak kaimetapkei ne po puch ak ki ma komi keluno eng' kurereetap asiista." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ki awelelgei anyun acheeng' utaatyet, ak iywek ak perberyo. Tos nee ne imuuchi koyai chiito ne isubu laitoryat? Kobatee nooto ne ki keyai." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ki ageer anyun ale siirei utaatyet perberyo, ko uu ye siirei lapkeiyet mesundeito." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Tinyei koonyek che keertoe ne utaat, ak wendoti ne perber eng' mesundeito. Agot eng' chooto ko ki ageer ale ityin kiit agenge icheek tugul." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ki ale anyun eng' muguleldanyu, “Ko uu ye ityin kioto ne perber, koityina agane, ak amu nee anyun si aek ne utaat kosiir? Ki amwa anyun eng' muguleldanyu ale, ‘puch niito agine.’ ”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Amu ma kibwaati ne utaat agoi, ko uu ye ma kibwaati ne perber; amu tuun kiutye tugul eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei. Meei ne utaat agine ko uu ne perber!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ki awech anyun sabeet amu ki koono ng'wanindo poisyet ne kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista. Amu puch tugul ak kaimetapkei ne po puch. 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ki awech poisyennyu tugul ne ki abirtochigei eng' kurereetap asiista. Amu eng' ne matiny, ametochini chiito ne isubwo." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ak ng'oo ne ingen ngo tuun egu chiito ne utaat anan ko ne perber? Nganda uu nooto, ko tuun pou poisyennyu tugul ne koabirtochigei ak ne abartae ng'omnateet eng' kurereetap asiista. Puch niito agine." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ki awelelgei anyun ak agoochi muguleldanyu koaragen amu poisyet tugul ne ki abirtochigei eng' kurereetap asiista. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Amu mi chiito ne yaei poisyennyi eng' ng'omnateet, kobooto naet, ak utaatyet; ago pagaakyin koek kebebertap chiito ne ma pirtochigei poisyet. Puch niito agine ak ko yaityet ne oo." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Nee ne nyooru chiito eng' pirtoennyi pogei tugul, ak kaimetapkei ne po muguleldanyi, ne pirtochingei eng' kurereetap asiista?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Amu po arageneet peetuusyekyik tugul, ak ko po ng'wanindo poisyennyi. Ee, ma imuunyi muguleldanyi kemoi. Puch niito agine." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ma mi kiit ne kaigai eng' chiito kosiir koamis ak koeeiso, ak kobaibae saboondanyi tuguuk che myach eng' pirtoennyi pogei. Ki ageer kogeny ale punu niito eutap Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Amu ng'oo ne imuuchi koamis, ng'oo ne imuuchi konyoor poiboiyet, kosiiro?"
