Ecclesiastes2:26 Amu igoochin Ineendet utaatyet ak naet, ak poiboiyet chiito ne iboiboi ineendet. Ago igoochin kiptengekyot poisyetap nyalilda asi kobiit koyum ak kotes, ak kogoochi ineendet ne iboiboi Kamuktaindet. Puch niito agine ak ko kaimetapkei ne po puch." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Mi kasartap kiy age tugul, ak mi peetuutap ng'olyoot age tugul eng' kururetap kipsengwet." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Peetuut ne kisige chii ak peetuut ne meei chii; peetuut ne kiminsei ak peetuut ne kitutu chooto kiga kimin; 
Ecclesiastes3:3 peetuut ne kibarisye ak peetuut ne kinyaise; peetuut ne kibutisyei, ak peetuut ne kiteekse;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 peetuut ne ki riirtos ak peetuut ne kiroritos; peetuut ne kiteitos ak peetuut ne kiurereni; 
Ecclesiastes3:5 peetuut ne ki wiirtoi koik ak peetuut ne kiyumi koik; peetuut ne kitoroochegei ak peetuut ne ma kitoroochegei; 
Ecclesiastes3:6 peetuut ne ki cheeng'sei ak peetuut ne kibeeti; peetuut ne kigonori ak peetuut ne kimetoi; 
Ecclesiastes3:7 peetuut ne kigereeri ak peetuut ne kinabisye; peetuut ne kisistos ak peetuut ne ki ng'alaaldos; 
Ecclesiastes3:8 peetuut ne ki chamisye ak peetuut ne kiwegisye; peetuut ne po lugeet ak peetuut ne po kaalyeet. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Nee keljinet ne nyooru ineendet ne poisyei eng' nooto pirtochingei? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ki ageer poisyet ne Ki kogoochi `Kamuktaindet weeriigap piik kotigone. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Ki koyai kiy age tugul kogararanit eng' peetuunnyi: ak ki inde mugulelwekwak kabwaatetap koigeny, ago nganda uu nooto, koma imuuch konai chiito poisyet ne ki koyai Kamuktaindet kobooch taunet agoi kagesunet." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Angen ale ma mi kiit ne myee eng' icheek kosiir koboiboitu, ak koyai ne myee kotee kosaptos." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ak kogeny konunetap Kamuktaindet konyaaljin chii age tugul koamis, koeeiso ak kobaibait eng' tuguuk che myach eng' pirtoennyi pogei tugul." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Angen ale, punjin koigeny kiy age tugul ne yaei Kamuktaindet. Ma kimuuchi ketesyi kiy anan keistoe kiy. Ki koyai Kamuktaindet, si koywei `piik ineendet." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 No miitei, ko ki kobiit; ak no ta kobiitu, ko ki kobiit; ak kocheeng'ei kogeny Kamuktaindet no ki kosiirto." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ki ageer anyun kogeny eng' kurereetap asiista ale mi yaityet kapkirwooget, ak komi yaityet ye mi imanda." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ki amwa eng' muguleldanyu ale, “Tuun irwookyin `Kamuktaindet piik che po iman ak che yaach. Amu mi peetuut ne po ng'olyoot age tugul, ak ne po poisyet age tugul.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ki amwa eng' muguleldanyu ale, po weeriigap piik ng'olyoondoni, si kobiit kotyem Kamuktaindet icheek, ak kogeergei icheeget kole uu tyong'ik." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Amu kiit ne nyooru weeriigap piik konyooru tyong'ik, nyooru kiit agenge tugul. Ko uu ye meei age, ko uu nooto, meei age agine; ee, tinyei tugul kabuuset agenge, ama tinyei chiito etunateet kosiir tyong'ik, amu puch tugul." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Pegu tugul ak kobendi komosta agenge. Po tugul ng'ung'unyek ak ketyingei tugul ng'ung'unyek. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ng'oo ne ingen ngo wendi saboondap chiito parak ak ngo wendi ng'wony oriit ne po tyondo? 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ki ageer anyun ale, ma mi kiy ne myee, kosiir kobaibait chiito eng' poisyonikyik. Amu nooto kebebertanyi. Amu ng'oo ne weechi kogeny ineendet kogeer tuguuk che piitu let?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ki aweege anyun ak ageer usiisyosyek tugul che kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista. Mi riiregap che ki kius, ama tinyei kagaigaindet, ak ki tinyei kimnateet usiikwak, ago ki ma kotinyei kagaigaindet." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ki alasu anyun che ki kobek kosiir che ta kosaptos; 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Ki aiit ale kaigai ineendet ne tomo kesich, ne tomo kogeer poisyet ne ya ne kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Yeityo ageer poisyet tugul ak poisyet age tugul ne po utaatyet, ale amei kimegei chii agobo chiitap kokwennyi. Puch niito agine ak ko kaimetapkei ne po puch." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Namjin ne perber eunekyik tegeet, eng' let kome eng' rubeet." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Kaigai kererutyet kobooto siisek, kosiir kererutik aeng' ak pirtoetapkei, ak kaimetapkei ne po puch." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ki aweege anyun ak ageer tangoita eng' kurereetap asiista: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mi age ne mi ineegei, ama tinyei ne rubei; ma tinyei weeriit anan ng'eetap kamet; nganda uu nooto, koma mi kagesunet ne po pirtoennyi pogei tugul, ama piyonyi konyekyik mogornatosyek. Leen, “Aboisyechini ng'oo ak arebee saboondanyu kiit ne myee?” Puch niito agine, poisyet ne po nyalilda." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kaigai aeng'u kosiir agenge, amu nyooru melekto ne myee eng' poisyennywa." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Amu ngo putyo, kong'eeti age chorwennyi: ago pwo eng' ineendet ne ibuti komi ineegei, ama mi age ne ing'eeti ineendet." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Kogeny, ngo ruiyo aeng'u kolalang'itu: ago nyoorundoi ano lalang'indo chiito agenge?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ak ngo terteer `chiito ineendet ne mi ineegei, komuuchi aeng'u kogirinda ineendet; ak ma sip kong'etei porowet ne kisoniot somok." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Kaigai nerana ne kibanania, ne utaat, kosiir laitoryat ne oos ne perber, ne ma naei kota kotaach kateunet." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Amu ki mang'une korgoreet konyo koek laitoryat; ee, ki kisichei ko panan eng' laitornatet." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ki ageer tugul che saptos che pendoti eng' kurereetap asiista, komi kobooto neraneet ne po aeng', ne ki tonon kogeer ineendet." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Ki ma komi kagesunetap piik tugul, agot ne po icheek tugul che ki pou. Ago ma poiboitune ineendet icheek che piitu let. Puch niito agine iman ak kaimetapkei ne po puch." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Riip keeldong'ung' ye iwendi kootap Kamuktaindet; amu kaigai keriikyi si kegas, kosiir koroseek che igoitoi piik che perber; amu ma naei icheek kole yaei yaityet." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Amat kosartae kuting'ung' ak amat kosartae muguleldang'ung' komwa kiy age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, amu mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kipsengwet ak imi ng'wony. Ingong'ering'itu anyun ng'aleeguk." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Amu nyoonei karwotitoet eng' poisyonik che chaang'; ak mwaei ne perber ng'aleek che chaang'. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ye iyasye, ko mat igaegei amu ma paibaitune ineendet che perberen. Igoite anyun ne keyasye." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kaigai amearorte, kosiir iarorte amegoite." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Amengogoochi kuting'ung' poortang'ung' koyai tengek anan imwa eng' taitap malaikaiyat ile, “Ki lelutyet.” Amu nee anyun si konereekyi Kamuktaindet kuting'ung' ak kong'em poisyonigap euneguk?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Amu puch ng'aleek che chaang' ak chaang'indap karwotitaosyek, ago iywei inyee Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ngot igeer kesastae kibananiat ak keistoi kirwooget ak imanda eng' koroomnateet eng' emet, ko mekwong'ee nooto. Amu keerei nooto ineendet ne toroor kosiir icheeget che torooreen, ak mi che torooreen kosiir icheek." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Po tugul keljinetap ng'wony. Poisyechin agine laitoryat tuguugap mbar. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ma piyonyi robiinik ne chamei robiinik; ama piyonyi tuguuk che tesoksei ineendet ne chamei chaang'indap tuguuk. Puch niito agine. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ye tesak tuguuk, ko tesak ak icheek che amei. Tos tinyei keljinet nee anyun chiitap ko po, kobatee kogeer kityo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Anyiny rwondap chiito ne poisyei, ngo am che ng'ering' anan che chaang'. Ago ma inuuktos mogoreek amu piyendanywa." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Mi yaityet ne ng'waan ne ki ageer eng' kurereetap asiista, nooto ko mogornatosyek che riibei chiitap ko po yeityo kong'em ineendet." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Petos mogornatosyechooto eng' poisyet ne ya; ak ngot ko ki kosich weeriit, koma mi kiy eunnyi." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Ko uu ye ki kisichei, kowendi puch kogeny ko uu ye kinyonei, ama ibei kiy ne po poisyennyi ne imuuchi kotita eng' eunnyi." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Niito agine ko yaityet ne ng'waan, amu ko uu ye kinyonei, ko tuun wendi ko uu nooto. Ak nee keljinet ne nyooru ineendet ne pirtogei puch?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Amisyei kogeny eng' peetuusyekyik tugul eng' mesundeito ak tinyei arageneet ne ng'waan ak myando ak nereegek. 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ogeero, kiit ne myee ne ki ageer ak ko nyolu, ko koamis chii ak koe, ak kobaibaitune tuguuk che myach eng' poisyennyi tugul ne yaei eng' kurereetap asiista, eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi che ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ineendet. Amu kebebertanyi niito." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ak chii age tugul agine ne ki igoochi Kamuktaindet mogornatosyek ak chaang'indap tuguuk, ak kogoochi kimnateet ne ame tuguuchooto, koip kebebertanyi, ak kobaibaitune poisyennyi; niito anyun ko konunetap Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Amu ma kobwaati miising' peetuusyegap sabeennyi; amu woljin `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' poiboindap muguleldanyi. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Mi yaityet ne ki ageer eng' kurereetap asiista, ak nyigiis nooto eng' piik miising':" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 chiito ne igoochin `Kamuktaindet mogornatosyek, chaang'indap tuguuk ak teegisto, kot ko marerchin kiy saboondanyi eng' tuguuk tugul che machei, ago ma igoochin Kamuktaindet kimnateet ne ame tuguuchooto, ago amei toondet. Puch niito ak ko myando ne ya." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ngot kosich chiito lagok pogol ak kosap kenyiisyek che chaang', si kochang'a peetuusyegap kenyiisyekyik, ago ma piyonyi saboondanyi kiit ne myee, ama tinyei ole kitupchin. Amwae ale kaigai ne ki kioos, kosiir ineendet:" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 amu nyoonei puch ak kowendi eng' mesundeito, ak kituchei kainennyi eng' mesundeito," 
Ecclesiastes6:5 ama keer asiista anan konai. Tinyei niito kamuung'et kosiir ni Kai. 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Agot ngo sap kenyiisyek eliphuut konyil aeng', ama paibaitune kiy ne myee, tos ma pendi tugul oldo agenge?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Po poisyet tugul ne po chiito kutinnyi, ago ma piyonyi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Amu tinyei keljinet nee chiito ne utaat kosiir ne perber? Anan tinyei nee chiito ne panan, ne ingen kowendot eng' taitap che saptos?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kaigai keereetap konda kosiir mageet ne ombenoti. Puch niito agine ak ko kaimetapkei ne po puch. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Kiy age tugul ne mi, ko kiga ketoochi kainennyi keny, ak konaat ole uu ng'aleegap chii. Amaimuuchi kotiiyo kiy ak ineendet ne kiim kosiir ineendet." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ng'aleek che chaang' kotesei tangoita, ma tesei chii." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ng'oo anyun ne ingen kiit ne myee agobo chii eng' sabeennyi, eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi ne po puch che poisye ko uu urwet? Ng'oo anyun ne imuuchi komwachi chiito tuguuk che piitu let eng' ineendet eng' kurereetap asiista?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Kaigai kainet ne myee kosiir mwanik che po kamanuutyet ne oo. Ak kaigai peetuutap meet kosiir peetuut ne kisichei chii. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kaigai keba koot ne kiteiye, kosiir keba koot ne mi igoorta. Amu nooto kagesunetap piik tugul, ak konori nooto eng' muguleldanyi chiito ne sabei." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kaigai arageneet kosiir roryot, amu kiboiboi muguleldo eng' arageneetap togeet." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mi mugulelwegap che utaatiin koot ne kiteiye, ago mi mugulelwegap che perber koot ne po poiboiyet." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kaigai kegas kereetap kong' ne po chiito ne utaat, kosiir kegas tyendap piik che perber." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Amu uu kateretap katook che mi maat ne mi tereet ne kotkotaat, roryotap chiito ne perber. Puch niito agine." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Igoochin iman sastaet chiito ne utaat koberberit; ak ng'emei `kiit ne kigoigoisye naet. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Kaigai kagesunetap kiy kosiir taunennyi; kaigai ne muitoi eng' muguleldonyi kosiir ne meenei. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Amesartae nereek eng' saboondang'ung', amu tebee nereegek tegetigap che perber." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ameteep ile, kilyon si ko korooronitu peetuusyek che po tai kosiir peetuusyechu? Amu ma iteep agobo niito eng' utaatyet." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Myee utaatyet ko uu ye myee poroteet. Ee, myee miising' eng' icheek che keerei asiista." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Amu riibei piich utaatyet ko uu riibseetap fedhaisyek. Ago telunatetap naet ko ni, riibei ng'omnateet saboondap chiito ne tinyei." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ibwaat poisyetap Kamuktaindet; tos ng'oo ne imuuchi kolitit kiit ne ki yai ineendet kogunuurit? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Paibaitu eng' peetuutap perurto, ak eng' peetuutap nyalilda ibwaat komyee. Ki iyai Kamuktaindet chooto kogergeit tuwai, si ma nai chiito kiit age tugul ne piitu let." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ki ageer chooto tugul eng' peetuusyekyuk che po puch. Mi chiito ne po iman ne meitoi imandanyi ak mi chiito ne ya ne sabei keny ak koyaei yaityennyi. 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ameegu ne tinyei imanda ne siirtoot, anan isich utaatyet miising'; amu nee si ing'emge?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ameegu ne ya miising' anan iegu ne perber. Amu nee si imee kotom koit peetuung'ung'? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Karaaran iguiye niito komyee, ameistoe eung'ung' ng'olyoondoni agine; amu ineendet ne iywei Kamuktaindet komang'une chooto tugul." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Utaatyet ko kimnateetap chiito ne utaat ne siirei pounik taman che mi nganaseet. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Iman, ma mi chii ne po iman eng' ng'wony, ne yaei ne myee ama yaei tengekto." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ameepchi iit kogeny ng'aleek tugul che kimwaei, si me kas kochubin otwogindeng'ung'." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Amu ingen agine muguleldang'ung' konyil che chaang' kole ki ichup aginye alak ko uu nooto. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ki ageer chuuto tugul eng' ng'omnateet ak ki ale, “Ang'omitu”, ago kilooena utaatyet." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Kiit ne mi, komi ye loo ak ki wo oriit miising'; ng'oo ne imuuchi konyoor?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ki aweege ak kimach muguleldanyu konai ak kosyach ak kocheeng', utaatyet ak ole teptoi tuguuk, ak konai kole yaityet ko perberyo, ak kole perberyo ko iywek." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ak anyooru kiit ne ng'waan kosiir meet, nooto kwony ne muguleldanyi ko mesteet ak regereywot ak ko uu eunekyik ratuut. Age tugul ne iboiboi Kamuktaindet kochililee kwonyooto, ago namei `kwonyooto kiptengekyot." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Ogeero, ki anyooru niito, mwaei Amdoindet, ki atuiye kiit age ak age si kobiit anai kieuu." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Ne ta kocheeng'ei saboondanyu, ago tomo anyooru. Ki anyooru chiito agenge eng' piik eliphuut, ago ma anyooru kwondo eng' chooto tugul." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Ogeero, ki anyooru niito kityo, ale, ki yai Kamuktaindet chiito kobunji iman; ago kigocheeng' icheek tuguuk che chaang' che taunen." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ng'oo ne kergei ak chiito ne utaat? Ak ng'oo ne ingen kaweegetap kiy? Igoochin ng'omnatetap chiito togeennyi kooluu, ak kowalak uuindap togeennyi." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Aboorun ale, riip ng'atuutyetap laitoryat ak ibwaat ile ki iyasye eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Amesip iwe eng' tainnyi; ameyai kiy ne ya kotugul. Amu yaei laitoryat kiy age tugul ne iboiboegei. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Amu tinyei kimnateet ng'olyootap laitoryat; ak ng'oo ne imuuchi koleenji ineendet, “Iyae nee?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ma naei kiy ne ya age tugul ne riibei ng'atuutyet, ak ibestos muguleldap chiito ne utaat peetuusyek ak kirwooget." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Amu mi peetuut ak kirwooget ne po ng'olyoot age tugul, amu oo nyalilda ne tinyei chiito eng' chooto." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Amu ma naei kiit ne piitu, amu tos ng'oo ne imuuchi komwachi ineendet ole piitundoi kioto?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Ma mi chii ne tinyei kimnateet eng' koriisto si kogirinda koriis; anan kotinyei kimnateet koboi peetuutap meet; ama mi undaet eng' lugonooto. Ama saru yaityet ineendet ne igoochingei yaityonooto. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ki ageer chuuto tugul, ki agiilji muguleldanyu poisyet age tugul ne kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista. Miitei peetuut ne tinyei chiito age kimnateet koboi age si kogoochinegei nyalilda." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ak ki ageer ketubei kiptengeginik, ak ki pa kererit. Ki pa eng' ole-tiliil piik che ki yai ne myee ak ki kiutye icheek eng' nganaseet. Puch niito agine." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Amu ma sip kirwookyin poisyet ne ya, konyooru anyun mugulelwegap piik mageet koyai yaityet." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Agot ngo yai kiptengekyot yaityet konyil pogol, ak kotesak peetuusyekyik, angen ui tugul ale, myeeitu eng' icheek che iywei Kamuktaindet, che iyweisyei ineendet eng' tainnyi." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Ago ma myeeitu eng' kiptengeginik, ama tesoksei peetuusyekyik che uu urwet, amu ma iyweisyei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Mi tangoita ne yaaksei eng' ng'wony; amu mi piik che po iman, che piityin kiy ko uu poisyonigap kiptengeginik; komi piik che yaach che piityin kiy ko uu poisyonigap che po iman. Ki amwa ale, tangoita niito agine." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ki alasu anyun poiboiyet, amu ma tinyei chii kiy ne myee eng' kurereetap asiista kobatee koam, koeei ak kobaibait. Amu tebyei nooto kobooto ineendet eng' poisyennyi, eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi, che ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' kurereetap asiista." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ye ki agiil muguleldanyu konai utaatyet ak ageer poisyet ne kiyaei eng' ng'wony, ko ki ageer ale mi ne ma inuuchi peet anan kemoi." 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Ki ageer anyun poisyonik tugul che po Kamuktaindet, ale ma imuuchi chii konai poisyet ne kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista. Amu agot ngo kiilgei chiito ne tai, kole kocheeng', koma nyooru; ee, agot ngo leen chiito ne utaat konai, koma imuuchi konyoor." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ki abwaat chooto tugul eng' muguleldanyu ak kianai ale miitei eutap Kamuktaindet kobooto piik che po iman ak che utaatiin eng' poisyonikwak: ngo chamyet anan wegeet, koma naei chiito nooto; mi tugul tainnywa." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Amu ityin piik tugul tuguuk tugul kogergeit. Ityin kiit agenge chii ne po iman ak kiptengekyot, ityin ne myee ak ne ya, chii ne tiliil ak ne ma tiliil, ityin ne igoitoi korosyot ak ne ma igoitoi korosyot. Ko uu kiit ne uu chiito ne myee, ko uu nooto kiptengekyot; uu ineendet ne iyastos, ineendet ne iywei kayasyoet." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Niito ko yaityet eng' tugul che kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista, mi kiit agenge ne ityin tugul: ee, nyiitaat mugulelwegap weeriigap piik, yaitwogik, ak mi iywek mugulelwekwak kotee kosaptos, ye ibata, koba ole mi che ki kobek." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Amu tinyei kamang'unet ineendet ne namegei ak tugul che saptos. Amu kaigai seset ne sabei kosiir ng'etundo ne kagome. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Amu ingen che saptos kole pegu. Ago ma naei kiy age tugul che ki kobek, ama kotinyei melekto age tugul kogeny, amu kigeutye icheek." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Ki kobet chamyennywa, wechenywa ak ng'et kondanywa, ama kotinyei kebeberta koigeny eng' kiy age tugul ne kiyaei eng' kurereetap asiista." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ui oldang'ung', am amitwogiguk eng' poiboiyet, ak iee divaiguk eng' muguleldo ne paibai, amu kagocham Kamuktaindet poisyoniguk." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ingoleelagitu ngoroiguk kotugul; ameng' korerchi mwaita meting'ung'. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Otebi eng' poiboiyet ak osotyot ne ichame, peetuusyek tugul che po sabeeng'ung' ne po puch, che kigoonin ineendet eng' kurereetap asiista, peetuusyeguk tugul che po puch: amu kebebertang'ung' nooto kotee isabe ak eng' poisyeng'ung' ne iyaei eng' kurereetap asiista." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kiit age tugul ne iyae eng' eung'ung', iyai eng' kimnateng'ung', amu ma mi poisyet anan chobutik anan naet anan utaatyet eng' kererit ne iwendi." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ki aweege ak ageer eng' kurereetap asiista, ale, ma po kabeletapkei che chepchep, ama po lugeet che kiimeen, ama po amitwogik che utaatiin, ama po mogornatosyek piigap naet, ama chamaatiin piik che utaatiin; ago ityin icheek tugul sainnywa ak peetuunywa." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Amu manai chiito agine peetuunnyi: uu njireenik che kinamei eng' regereiywot ne ya ak uu toriitik che kinamei eng' mesteet, kinamei ko uu nooto weeriigap piik eng' peetuut ne ya ne cheei icheek." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ki ageer kogeny utaatyet eng' kurereetap asiista ko uu ni ak ki ageer ale, oo." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Ki mi nganaseet ne ming'in ak ki mi piik che ng'ering' oriit. Ki nyo laitoryat ne oo kobookyi, kiyiem ak koteech irimosyek che eecheen komuut nganasanooto." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Ki kinyoorchi nganasanooto kibananiat ne utaat ak ki sar nganaseet eng' utotyennyi; ago ma mi chii ne ki ibwaat kibananiandanooto. 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ki ale anyun, “Myee utaatyet kosiir kimnateet.” Nganda uu nooto, kesasei utaatyet kibananiat, ama kigasei ng'aleekyik." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Kigasei ng'aleegap piik che utaatiin che kimwaei mutyo kosiir waagetap ne pou piik che perber. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Myee utaatyet kosiir kariik che po lugeet. Ago ng'emei kiptengekyot agenge myeinwek che chaang'. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ko uu ye puldos mwanik che anyiny che po ng'amotyot amu kalyang'ik che pekyin, ko ng'emei perberyo kitigin utaatyet ak teegisto." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mi muguleldap chiito ne utaat eunnyi ne po tai; ago mi muguleldap ne perber eunnyi ne po kaataam. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ye wendoti ne perber eng' ooreet, kobetyi `ng'omnateet ineendet ak koboorchinoti chiito age tugul kole perber ineendet." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ngot ityin nereegegap pounindet, ko metwagei eng' yetang'ung' ye kemi, amu tisei talasyet tengekwogik che eecheen." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Mi yaityet ne ki ageer eng' kurereetap asiista, ne uu lelutyet ne punu pounindet:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 kindoi perberyo komoswek che torooreen, ak tebyei mogoreek eng' ole po ng'wony." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ki ageer otwogik kolaanyei paraisisyek ak kobunei keelyek pounik ko uu otwogik eng' ng'wony. 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ineendet ne palei keriinget kobutyin yooto, ak age tugul ne putei ng'ootweet kosusei ereneet." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Iberchin koik chii age tugul ne waei, imuuchi kokwer kwendet ineendet ne petei." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ngo ng'utum aiywet, ama lit chii, ko kanyool kobirtogei ne ebei, ago myee utaatyet eng' kandochinet." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ngot kosusiis ereneet kotom kigaigai, koma ko tilei kiy kagaigaet." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Myachen ng'aleegap chiito ne utaat; ago luguegei kutitap chiito ne perber. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Perperyo taunetap ng'aleegap ne perber, ak kagesunetap ng'alaalennyi ko iywek che ng'emisyei." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Tesei kogeny ne perber ng'aleek. Ma naei chii kiit ne piitu; ak ng'oo ne mwachin ineendet tuguuk che piitu let eng' ineendet? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Poisyetap che perber kogoochin age tugul eng' icheeget kong'et, amu ma naei ineendet ole wetitoi nganaseet." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Pwo eng' inyee, ee emet, ye ta ko ming'in laitoryandeng'ung' ak ye amisyei pouniguk kota ko karon!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ibaibai inyee, ee emet, ye laitoryandeng'ung' ko weeriigap piik che taagunotiin ye amisyei pouniguk eng' sait ne nyolu, si kogimegitu, ama eng' pogitet!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Kabuisei paragutap koot amu chorirnatetap chiito; robonu koot amu chorirnatet. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Kiyaei igoorto agobo roryot, iboiboi divaik saboondo, ak imuuchi robiinik koyai tuguuk tugul." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Amesas laitoryat, agot eng' kabwaatutiguk; anan isas mogoryot eng' koong'ung' ne irue, amu imuuch koip toriit ng'olyoot, ak komuuch komwaita `che tinyei kebebaik ng'aleek." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Wiirchi amitwogiguk peek; amu tuun inyooru ko kagosiirto peetuusyek che chaang'. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Pchechii kebeberta piik tisap, ee agot piik sisiit; amu mengen yaityet ne piitu eng' ng'wony." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ngo nyi peek poolik, koroong'jigei ng'wony, ak ngo luulji keetit murot tai anan ko murot kaataam, ko komosta ne kaluulji, kotebee yooto." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ma kolsei ineendet ne riibei usoonet; ama kesei ineendet ne keerei poolik. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Ko uu ye mengen ooreetap usoonet anan ole nertoi kawegap lakweet eng' moetap ineendet ne managaat; uu nooto mengen poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne yaei tuguuk tugul. 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Koolse karon, amesiis koskoleny, amu mengen che rurtos, ngo ni anan ni anan ngo myagitu tuwai." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Anyiny iman lapkeiyet, ak kiit ne karaaran asiista kegeerei." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ngo sap chiito kenyiisyek che chaang', ko ingobaibait eng' chooto tugul. Ago ingobwaat ineendet peetuusyegap mesundeito, amu chaang'. Puch tugul che pwoonei." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Paibaitu murenoni, eng' peetuusyegap ming'inateng'ung', ak ingobaibain muguleldang'ung' eng' peetuusyegap ming'inateng'ung' ak isup ortinwegap muguleldang'ung' ko uu ye igeere. Ago nai ile, imutyinin `Kamuktaindet kirwooget amu tuguuchuuto tugul." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Iste anyun arageneet eng' muguleldang'ung', ak iste yaityet eng' poortang'ung'. Amu puch peetuusyegap ming'inateng'ung' ak che po nerateeng'ung'." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Ibwaat kogeny Yaindeng'ung' eng' peetuusyegap ming'inateng'ung', kotom koit peetuusyek che yaach ak koriik kenyiisyek che imwae ile, “Ma paibaitune chuuto,”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 kotom koimenit asiista anan lapkeiyet anan arawet, anan kecheik ak koweek poolik ye kagorobon;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 eng' peetuut ye tuun potanso riibiigap koot ak kong'uruugis che kiimeen ak kosiisyo che ng'aisei amu ng'ering' ak koimenitu che ititoi eng' tirisyok. 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Ye kageger kurgotik eng' ooreet, ye ma kegasei ng'aiset ak kong'eet chiito eng' kateetap toriityon ak koming'in tiibiik tugul che po tyenwogik." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Ye iywei chii kobun toroorinwek ak kobiit kamuiset eng' ooreet, ak koiyesyo taaptogap keetit ne kiguure almond ak konyigiisit talamwet ak kobet mageet. Amu wendi chiito koonnyi ne po koigeny ak kobendat che riiryoti eng' ortinwek;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 kotom kitaach porowetap fedha anan kotom ketui tereetap thahabu anan kotom koiye tereet eng' kondametut anan kotom koil tireet eng' ole kisiile peek," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 ak koweekyigei ng'ung'unyek ng'wony ko uu ye kinye, ak koweekyigei saboondo Kamuktaindet ne ki koonu." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Mwaei anyun Amdoindet kole: Puch tugul, ma tilei kiy! Puch tugul." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ago, amu ki utaat Amdoindet, kita koneeti piik naet; ko ki ibwaat, kocheeng' ak kotet kalewenaik che chaang'." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Ki cheeng' Amdoindet ng'aleek che taachaksei ak chooto che ki kisir eng' lititindo ng'aleek che po iman. 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Uu kiplitok ng'aleegap piik che utaatiin ak uu kipchumarisyek che ki kigiich komyee, ng'aleegap kaneetigap tuiyosyek, che ki kigon kobun mestowot agenge." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Kas anyun weeriinnyu kateunet. Ma mi ole igeesunegei sireetap bukuisyek che chaang'. Ak ng'etei poorto eng' somanutik che chaang'. 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ara nguno ko kagogasak tugul, ni anyun ko kagesunetap tuguuchu: Iywei Kamuktaindet ak iriip ng'atuutikyik, amu nyoljin chiito poisyoniito tugul." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Amu ipchin Kamuktaindet poisyet age tugul kapkirwooget, kobooto kiit age tugul ne ung'aat, ngo kiy ne myee anan ngo ne ya." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Tyendo ne siirei tugul, ne po Solomon." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ingong'ututena `ineendet kutinnyi, amu siirei chamyeng'ung' divaik." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Tinyei nyamdutyet ne myee mwaniguk, uu kaineng'ung' mwaita ne kirong'u, chamin anyun pergeinik amu nooto." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Imuta, ngechakte keebe tuwai. Kagomutwaa laitoryat anyo kooriikyik che po oriit. Kigasigei ak keboiboitu eng' inyee, kimwaitoi acheek chamyeng'ung' kosiir divaik. Chamin icheek eng' iman." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ee, tiibiigap Jerusalem, aa tuui ak ko atinye itoon, ko uu emaisyegap Kedar, ko uu angoogap emaisyegap Solomon." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ametang'ang'ja amu atuui, amu ki peela asiista. Ki nereekyo weeriigap kamennyu, ki indea aek riibindetap mbareenigap sabibuk. Ago ma ariip mbareennyu ne po sabibuk." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ee chamanennyu, mwaiwo anyun ole iyage akweetap keechiireguk, ole igoochine komuung'e ko katelel asiis? Amu nee si aigei chii ne tugoot met eng' ole neegitee akwotisyegap choronoguk?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ngo mengen, ee inyee ne ii karaaran isiir tiibiik tugul, ui isup ole kabun akweetap keechiirek, ak iyage aareguk che po ng'oroor eng' ole neegitee emaisyegap mestoweek." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ee chamanennyu, kaaragenden paraisiit ne kirgit ne po kariisyegap Pharaoh." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Korooron matong'oik kobooto lelestang'ung', ak kaating'ung' kobooto sonoek che korooron." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Kiyaun acheek tuguugap lele che po thahabu, kobooto tuguugap lelesta che po fedha." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ye ki tebyei laitoryat eng' itogunnyi, ko kas anyinyindap nyamdutik." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Uu chamanennyu loletap tuguuk che uu igomoik, ne ruee kwenutap kinaikyuk." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Uu chamanennyu temeet ne mi taaptogap piribirinik che mi mbareenigap sabibuk che po En-gedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Keero, ii karaaran miising' inyee chamanennyu; keero, itinye itoon; uu konyeguk che po cheptugenik." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Itinye itoon, chamanennyu, ee iboiboo iman! Uu susweek che nyaliileen itogunnyo;" 
SongOfSongs1:17 pambanigap koonnyo ko taragonik, ak kureiywekyok ko piribirinik." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Anee ko aa taapteetap Sharon, auu taapteetap atebwosyek." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ko uu ye uu taapteet ne mi kwenutap katook, ko uu nooto chamanennyu eng' tiibiik." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ko uu ye uu keetitap logoek eng' keetiigap timiin, ko uu nooto chamanennyu eng' murenik che neran. Ki atebee urwennyi eng' poiboiyet ne oo, ak ki anyiny logoiyandenyi ye ki achamchami." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Ki imutwaa anyo kootap igoorto, ak kiting'ena chamyet ne ma ung'aksei." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Igimiitena sabibuk che ki keyaam, igoigoena logoek, kabara chamyet." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Oiye, nda tiye metinnyu eunnyi ne po kaataam, ak komuureno eunnyi ne po tai!" 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ayosyewok, ee tiibiigap Jerusalem, eng' cheptirgichik ak kenyelok che kotoy, ale mat otwaa anan oong'et chamyet, agoi koit kasartanyi." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ogas, tuugeetap chamanennyu! Ogeero, nyoonei ineendet, kotorombenonu eng' tuloonook che eecheen, kotwalonu eng' tuloonook che mengeechen." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Uu chamanennyu kenyeleet anan aarwetap teweretyot. Ogeero, tononi ineendet tononee inaatunnyo komosin. Iitu ineendet eng' tirisyok, iboorugei eng' tirisyet ne regerat." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ki ng'alaal chamanennyu ak koleenjo ng'eet chamanennyu, chamanennyu ne karaaran, ak inyoo keebe." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Kagosiirto kaitityet, kagomoen, ak kakwo ropta." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Yestos taaptook eng' emet; kagoit peetuusyegap tyendo, kigasei tuugeetap cheptuget eng' emennyo." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Igoochin `mogoywet logoekyik che tuonen koruryo, ak yestos taaptogap keetiigap sabibuk, ng'uu ne nyamdut. Ng'eet, chamanennyu, ngeet ee, nenyu ne karaaran ak inyoo keebe." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Ee cheptugennyu, imi ole kibetak eng' rwandet, eng' ole ung'aat eng' ye kitogostoe. Ingageer togeng'ung', ngagas tuugeeng'ung'; amu anyiny tuugeeng'ung' ak ko karaaran togeng'ung'." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Namwech lelwek, lelwek che mengeechen, che ng'emei mbareenigap sabibuk; amu kayesyo taaptogap mbareenikyok che po sabibuk." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Nenyu chamanennyu ak aa nenyi. Iyagi keechiirekyik eng' ye mi taaptook. 
SongOfSongs2:17 Agoi kogaititit ak kobetyo uronok, Weege, chamanennyu, labat iige kenyeleet anan teweretyot eng' tuloonoogap Beter." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ki acheeng' kemoi arue, ineendet ne chamei saboondanyu; ki acheeng' ineendet, ago ma anyooru." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ki ale, “Ang'eete nguno ak awendotee nganaseet, eng' ortinwek ak eng' ortinwek che paraen; acheeng'e ineendet ne chamei saboondanyu. Ki acheeng', ago ma anyooru.”" 
SongOfSongs3:3 Ki nyoorwo riibiik che pendoti eng' nganaseet, Ki ateebee aleenji, “Tos ki ogeer ineendet ne chamei saboondanyu?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Kinga we ne matya ko kaasiirtoe icheek, anyooru ineendet ne chamei saboondanyu. Ki anam, ak ma achamji kwo, agoi amutu ineendet konyo kootap kamennyu, agoi koot ne po oriit ne po ineendet ne kisicha." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ayosyewok, ee tiibiigap Jerusalem, eng' cheptirgichik ak kenyelok che kotoy, ale, amat otwaa, anan oong'et chamyet, agoi koit kasartanyi." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Nee ni togosu eng' surkwen ko uu tolochigap iyeto, ne ng'uu nyamdutyet ne po tuguuk che uu igomoik ak tuguuk che nyamdut, ak pusaruk tugul che po chemung'araindet?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ogeero, kiit ne lyeldoe Solomon; yiemei kioto murenik tamanwogik lo che kiimeen, murenik che kiimeen che po Israel." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Tinyei tugul rotoogap chok, ak ko ng'oomen tugul eng' lugeet. Tinyei age tugul rotwennyi po chok eng' suennyi, amu kaiyweisyet ne po kemoi." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Kiyachigei Laitoryat Solomon ng'echereet ne kilyeldoe ne po keetiigap Lebanon. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Kiyae tolochikyik fedha, koyae patennyi thahabu, koyae ole kitebee tuguuk che arusen ne piriir, ki kitetee kwenunnyi chamyet, ne ki punu tiibiigap Jerusalem." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Omong'u, ee tiibiigap Zion, ak ogeer Laitoryat Solomon, kolaachi naaryeetap laitornatet ne ki ilaakyin kamennyi eng' peetuut ne ki itunisye, ee, eng' peetuutap poiboiyetap muguleldanyi." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Iman, itinye itoon chamanennyu; ii karaaran ne tya! Uu konyeguk che po cheptugenik che katuch kitambaet. Uu suumeeguk akweetap ng'oroorek, che ruitos eng' tegeiyatap tulweetap Gilead." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Uu keleguk akweetap keechiirek che kagetil koroorikwak, che punu ole kiuune; ne tinyei age tugul sarameek, ama mi agot agenge eng' icheek ne kimee aarwet." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Uu ng'esyemtang'ung' porowet ne piriir, ak ko karaaran kuting'ung' kot. Uu tagilgiliguk logoek che karuryo ne katuch kitambaeng'ung'." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Uu kaating'ung' teekseet ne kooi ne po Daudi ne ki kiteekyi kariigap lugeet, ole kigartate long'onik eliphuut, long'onik tugul che po murenigap lugeet." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Uu kinaiguk tuwai aarek aeng' che po chemnyogoset, che uu sarameegap kenyeleet, che agetee kwenutap taaptook." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Kotoom koeech ak kobetyo uronok, awendi tulweet ne mi tuguuk che uu igomoik, ak tulweet ne ming'in ne po tuguuk che nyamdut." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Ii karaaran kot, chamanennyu; ametinye tisya." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Murerennyu, nyoo keebe tuwai eng' Lebanon, keebe tuwai kemande eng' Lebanon. Chorugei eng' tulweet parak ne po Amana, eng' tulweet parak ne po Senir ak Hermon, eng' kebenonigap ng'etuunyik, eng' tuloonoogap cheplangok." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Kebaibait muguleldanyu, chepkamennyu, murerennyu; kecheer muguleldanyu eng' kondang'ung', eng' sirimdo agenge ne po kaating'ung'." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Karaaran ne tya chamyeng'ung', chepkamennyu, murerennyu! Siirei miising' chamyeng'ung' divaik, ak ng'uunetap mwaniguk ko siirei tuguuk tugul che ng'uu ne anyiny!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Ee murerennyu, saitoi ng'aleeguk ko uu kumyat. Mi ng'elyeptang'ung' kumyat ak cheego. Siiptap ngoroiguk ko uu siiptap Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Mbareet ne ng'ootaat chepkamennyu, murerennyu, kondap peek ne ng'ootaat kondametutap peek ne ki king'ooch." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Mbareetap logoek che piriireen keetiiguk, che tinyei logoek che korooron miising'; chooto che kiguure henna ak nard." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Nard ak safron, kalamus ak kinamon, kobooto keetiik tugul che po tuguuk che nyamdut; tuguuk che uu igomoik ak ahalot, kobooto tuguuk tugul che ng'uu ne anyiny miising'." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ii kondametutap peegap mbareenik, keriingetap peek che saptos, ak kereruusyek che rootei che punu Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Ng'eet, ee usoonetap murot kaataam, ak inyoo inyee usoonetap murot tai; ousyi mbareennyu, si kobiit komuuch kong'uu nyamdutikyik. Ingonyo chamanennyu mbareennyi, ak koam logoekyik che korooron miising'." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Kaanyo mbareennyu, chepkamennyu, murerennyu. Kaayum tuguukyuk che uu igomoik ak tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny. Kaamde masamekyuk kumyanyun, kaaee divaikyuk ak alu chekyuk. Oamisye, ee choronok, oeeise, ee oeeise miising' ee chamanikyuk." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ki anuuchi, ago kigasu muguleldanyu. Kutitap chamanennyu ne igongong'isyei, koleen, yaatwa, chepkamennyu, chamanennyu, cheptugennyu, nenyu ne libwoop. Amu nyiitaat metinnyu rewoot, ak nyiitaat sumeekyuk che iletotin, rewootap kemoi." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Kaareegu kotinnyu; ta alaaktoi ano kogeny? Kaaun keelyekyuk, ta andoitoi ano simdo kogeny?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Kiyogoune chamanennyu eunnyi konda ne mi kurgeet, ak ki igaskei muguleldanyu agobo ineendet." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ki ang'eet aleen ayaatyi chamanennyu, ki saitae eunekyuk tuguuk che uu igomoik, ki saitae morikyuk tuguuchooto uu igomoik che uu peek, eng' eunegap karnet ne ki kigee." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ki ayaatyi chamanennyu, ago kiwelelgei chamanennyu ak kwo. Kitanui saboondanyu ye kingo twekwa. Ki acheeng' ineendet, ago ma amuuch anyoor, ki aguur ineendet, ago ma wolwo." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Kinyoorwo riibiik che pendoti eng' nganaseet, kibira, ki iguotena, ki ibeno riibiigap irimoik ngoryennyu ne po parak." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Asoomok, ee tiibiigap Jerusalem, ale, ngot onyooru chamanennyu, omwachi ineendet oleenji, amyani agobo emostap chamyet." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Siirei eng' nee chamaneng'ung' chamaneet age, inyee ne ii karaaran isiir tiibiik tugul? Siirei eng' nee chamaneng'ung' chamaneet age, kot iyasyewech ko uu nooto?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Leel chamanennyu ago tilyal ne piriir, taagunet ineendet eng' eliphuusyek taman." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Uu metinnyi thahabu ne karaaran miising', kooen suumeekyik che iletotin, ak ko tuuen ko uu koroorigap chepkugit." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Uu konyekyik che po cheptugenik eng' ngeguusyegap kereruusyek; cheptugenik che leelach ko uu cheego, che tetotin komyee eng' kereruusyek." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Uu matong'oikyik mbareetap nyamdutik, uu mbareenigap ingweek che anyiny. Uu kutinnyi taaptook che piriireen, ne saitoe tuguuk che uu igomoik che uu peek." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Uu eunekyik peteinigap thahabu che ki kitetyi berulo. Uu poortanyi kelegap peeleek che ki kiliigee sapphire. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Uu keelyekyik tolochigap koik che leelach, che ki kitetyi kelongonigap thahabu ne karaaran. Uu itoondanyi Lebanon, karaaran ko uu taragonik." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Onyiny ng'aleekyik miising', ee, karaaran kot ineendet eng' kiy age tugul. Niito ko chamanennyu, niito ko chorwennyu, ee, tiibiigap Jerusalem." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Kawo ano chamaneng'ung', Ee inyee ne ii karaaran isiir tiibiik tugul? Kamasta kwo ano chamaneng'ung', si kobiit ketoretin kecheeng' ineendet?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Kachoorchigei chamanennyu mbareennyi, mbareenigap tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny, kwo koyaga akweennyi eng' mbareenik ak koyum taaptook." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Aa po chamanennyu ak ko nenyu chamanennyu. Iyagisyei eng' ole mi taaptook. 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ee chamanennyu, itinye itoon kot ko uu Tirzah, ii karaaran ko uu Jerusalem, ii ne imuisei ko uu lugeet ne tinyei songolik." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Keer oliin, amu kagotertera konyeguk. Uu suumeeguk akweetap ng'oroorek, che ruitos eng' tegeiyatap Gilead." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Uu keleguk akweetap keechiirek, che punu ole kiuune, ne tinyei age tugul sarameek, ama mi agot agenge eng' icheek ne kimee aarwet." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Uu ng'esyemtang'ung' logoek che piriireen ne katuch kitambaeng'ung'. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Miitei osotik tamanwogik lo che po laitoryat, ak chebaigeinik tamanwogik sisiit, kobooto pergeinik che ma iitoksei." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Agenge cheptugennyu, nenyu ne libwoop, ne ki kisich ineegei; chamat ineendet eng' kamet. Ki keer tiibiik ineendet ak koguure ne iberuurot, ee, ki ilas ineendet osotigap laitoryat ak chebaigeinik." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ng'oo ne tabendoi ko uu karoonet, ne karaaran ko uu arawet, ne iluu ko uu asiista, ne imuisei ko uu lugeet ne tinyei songolik?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ki achoorchigei mbareetap logoek che uu njuguk, si kobiit ageer keetiik che ing'atos che po atebweet, ageer ngo kayesyo keetiigap sabibuk, ak ageer ngo kayesyo logoek che piriireen." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Kingo tomo anai, komutwaa muguleldanyu, anyo kwenutap kariisyegap piikyuk che eecheen." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Weeguge, weeguge, ee Chepsulamindet. Weeguge, weeguge, si kegeerin. Kalya si omach ogeer Chepsulamindet, ko uu ye ogeere ureryetap kiplugotinik aeng'?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Korooron ne tya keelyeguk komi kweonik, ee cheptap pounindet! Uu kubesaiguk che muguleen koik che korooron, poisyetap musogindet ne ng'oom." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Uu mugeng'ung' taabeet ne mugul, ne ma rarchin divaik che purugotin. Uu moeng'ung' karurugutyetap nganuuk ne ki kiyieme taaptook." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Uu kinaiguk tuwai aarek aeng' che po chemnyogoset, uu sarameegap kenyeleet." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Uu kaating'ung' teekseet ne kooi ne po kelegap peeleek, Uu konyeguk tamboinik che mi Hesbon, ole neegitee ormariichetap Bat-rabim, Uu serung'ung' teekseet ne kooi ne po Lebanon ne tokyingei Damasko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Uu meting'ung' Karmel, ak arusen ne piriir suumeeguk, luulei `suumeekyik laitoryat." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Ii karaaran ne tya ak ko ii chamat, Ee chamaneet, ne iboiboisye!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Uu tononaniitong'ung'et tiiret, ak uu kinaiguk logoek." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ki amwa ale, “Alaanye tiiret, aname mooriikyik.” Ingoigei kinaiguk logoegap sabibuk, ak ingoigei ng'uunetap kabuseng'ung', logoek," 
SongOfSongs7:9 ak ingoigei kuting'ung' divaik che myachen miising', che rektoi komyee eng' chamanennyu, che punei paragutap kutinnyi ak kelekyik." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Aa po chamanennyu, ak tokyinagei magennyi." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Nyoo anyun chamanennyu, keebe mbar, ngemeng'oote nganasook che mengeechen." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngemusyi mbareenigap logoegap sabibuk, ngegeer ngo kagong'atyo keetiigap sabibuk ak koyesyo taaptokyik, ak ngo kogoyesyo taaptogap logoek che piriireen. Agoonin chamyennyu eng' olooto." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Ng'uu ne anyiny tuguuk che uu labotik, ak mi seremusyekyok logoek alak tugul che korooron, che leelach ak che po keny, che ki agonorun, ee chamanennyu." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Kita kaigai nda ki iuu weeriit ne kitupche, ne ki chuchun kinetap kamennyu! Nda anyoorchinin saang', ta ang'ututin; ama mi chii ne sasa." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ak amutin iwe kootap kamennyu, ne po ineendet ne ki ineeta, ak anagin divaik che ki kiburukto nyamdutik, che po peegap logoekyuk che piriireen." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Oiye, agase ta tiye metinnyu eunnyi ne po kaataam, ak komuureno eunnyi ne po tai!" 
SongOfSongs8:4 Asoomok, ee tiibiigap Jerusalem, ale, amat otwaa, anan oong'et chamyet, agoi koit kasartanyi." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ng'oo ni togosu eng' surkwen, ne tiegei chamanennyi? Ki ang'eetin eng' kelutap keetitap logoek. Ole ki ame moet kamenng'ung' komachei kosichin, kimi yooto koamei moet si kosichin." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Indea muguleldang'ung' ko uu ng'ookset, ko uu ng'ookset eng' eung'ung'. Amu kiim chamyet ko uu meet, korom ng'et konda ko uu kererit. Lalennyi ko uu laletap maat, liplibenet ne koroom miising'." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Ma imuuchi peek che chaang' kotis chamyet, ama imaluuchi maranosyek. Ngot kogoito chiito tuguukyik tugul che po koonnyi agobo chamyet, kesasei miising' kot." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Kitinyei chepto ne ming'in ne kitupche, ne tomo kogun kinet. Ki itoi nee cheptonyo ye tuun kait ye kibwanune koito?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ngot ko inaatut ineendet, keteechei paragunnyi irimeet ne po fedha. Ak ngot ko kereiywotap kurgeet, keng'ote ineendet pagoinigap taragonik." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Aa inaatut ak ko uu kinaikyuk teeksosyekyik che kooen. Ki aegu anyun eng' konyekyik ineendet ne ibu kaalyeet. 
SongOfSongs8:11 Ki tinyei Solomon mbareetap sabibuk eng' Baal-hamon. Ki imanakyi mbaranooto po sabibuk riibiik, kinyooljin chii tugul koip fedhaisyek eliphuut che po logoekyik." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Mbareennyu ne po sabibuk, ne nenyu, komi tainnyu. Inyee, ee Solomon, inyooru eliphunooto, ak nyooru pogol aeng' icheeget che riibei logoekyik." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Inyee ne imenye mbareenik, epchin iit choronok kuting'ung'; koono agas kutinooto." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Chaakte, chamanennyu, kergeitu ak kenyeleet anan aarwetap teweretyot eng' tuloonoogap tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny." 
Isaiah1:1 Ng'ang'utyet ne ki ityi Isaiah weeriitap Amos, ne ki keer agobo Judah ak Jerusalem, eng' peetuusyegap Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz ak Hezekiah, laitorinigap Judah." 
Isaiah1:1 Ng'ang'utyet ne ki ityi Isaiah weeriitap Amos, ne ki keer agobo Judah ak Jerusalem, eng' peetuusyegap Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz ak Hezekiah, laitorinigap Judah." 
Isaiah1:2 Ogas, ee kipsengwet! Oep iit, inyee ng'wony! Amu kagotwek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kole: Ki aguu ak ki aneet lagok, ago ki kongelelja." 
Isaiah1:3 Ingen eito chiitap ko po, ak kongen sigiryet piutap kiptaiyandennyi; ago ma naei Israel, ama ibwaati piikyuk." 
Isaiah1:4 Pwo! Pororyet ne yaei tengekto, piik che laei yaityet, iyoteetap yaigap yaityet, lagok che yaei ng'emisyet! Ki kometo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ki kogas Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, ki kotoiyegei kochuchuigei." 
Isaiah1:5 Amu nee si kota kebirok, kot obistoe miising' kosiir? Myani metit komugul, ki kotanui muguleldo komugul." 
Isaiah1:6 Ma mi ole sabei kobooch keldebesyet agoi metit; ago tinyei mook ak kaneerutik, ak mook che inenderi; ma kiuun, ama kirat, ama kinuur eng' mwaita." 
Isaiah1:7 Kigoguber emeng'wong', ki kebeel nganasookwok; ibookyin toek emeng'wong' ogeere, kogoguber, ko uu ne kogong'em toek." 
Isaiah1:8 Kigebagaakta cheptap Zion ko uu keryet eng' mbareetap sabibuk, ko uu keryet eng' mbareetap ingweek, ko uu nganaseet ne kiyiem puunik." 
Isaiah1:9 Nda ki ma pagaakwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ng'etunenik che ng'ering' miising', ta kiga kiwoongwech ko uu Sodom ak Gomorah." 
Isaiah1:10 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek pounigap Sodom! Oepchi iit ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindennyo, okweek piigap Gomorah!" 
Isaiah1:11 Tilei nee eng' anee chaang'indap tiseiywekwok? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Kigonyia kagoochinoik che po peelset che po mengichik, ak sunetigap tuuga che pootin; ama paibaitune korotiigap kiruugik, anan ko che po aaregap keechiir, anan ko che po kwesik." 
Isaiah1:12 Ye obwa tainnyu osaa, ko ng'oo ne kimagenak kiito, si otyechatyech seremusyekyuk?" 
Isaiah1:13 Amatata oibu kagoochinoik che ma tilei kiy; aweche nyamdutik che kibeelei. Ma amuuchi amuita agobo igoorwegap arawet ne kaleel ak sabato, ak kuursetap tuiyosyek - yaitwogichooto, kobooto tuiyetap kaming'inetapkei." 
Isaiah1:14 Wechei saboondanyu arawekwok che kaleel ak igoorwekwok che ki king'at. Inyalila tuguuchooto; kaang'et eng' laetap tuguuchooto. 
Isaiah1:15 Ye oiite eunekwok, aung'enok konyekyuk. Agot ye osaa eng' saautik che chaang', koma kase; nyiitaat eunekwok korotiik." 
Isaiah1:16 Ounge, otiliilgei; oiste yaityetap poisyonikwok eng' tainnyu; osisye, amatata oyai yaityet," 
Isaiah1:17 oneetkei oyai ne myee! Ocheeng' kirwooget, otoret che kisastoe, obesyechi ng'aleek ne ma tinyei sigiik, ong'alaaldochi mosoget." 
Isaiah1:18 “Obwa anyun, keng'alaal,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. “Agot ngo piriireen tengekwogikwok, koleelagitu ko uu pooldet ne leel; agot ngo piriireen miising', koigeitu koroorigap keechiirek." 
Isaiah1:19 Ngot ochame ak ogase iit, oame anyun akwaindap emet." 
Isaiah1:20 Ago ngot oeesye ak ongelelse, kebarenok rotwetap chok.” Amu kagomwa niito kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah1:21 Kaegundo ano chepkugoniot nganaseet ne ko po iman, ne kotinyei kirwooget ne po iman! Komenyei imanda nganasanooto, ago nguno komi rumiik." 
Isaiah1:22 Kigoigei silingisyeguk michikyigek che kigenendoe silingisyek, kigeburukto divaiguk peek." 
Isaiah1:23 Ngelelik pouniguk, ak ko choronogap chooriik. Chamei age tugul asoya, ak kosuboti tuguuk che kigeerchin. Ma ibesyechin ne ma tinyei sigiik, ama ki ipchin icheek ng'aleegap mosoget." 
Isaiah1:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet ne po Israel, kole haa, aroong'jini nereegekyuk icheek che wecho, ak ayooktochigei mugetuut eng' puunikyuk." 
Isaiah1:25 Atokyinin eunnyu, ak aunde simdang'ung', ak aiste murwoonindang'ung' tugul." 
Isaiah1:26 Aweegu kirwoogiguk ko uu eng' tai, ak aweegu kotigoniguk ko uu eng' tai. Ye ibata nooto keguurenen Nganaseetap Imanda, nganaseet ne kiyani." 
Isaiah1:27 Tuun kityaachi Zion eng' kirwooget, ak kityaache eng' imanda piikyik che sigu." 
Isaiah1:28 Ago tuun king'emei tuwai, pistoik ak kiptengeginik eng' peetuut agenge, ak tuun kigeesu che metoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah1:29 Amu ililandos icheek amu keetiik che ki omache, ak kiteweerak agobo mbareenik che ki olewen." 
Isaiah1:30 Amu oigeitu keetit ne yaamdos sogekyik, ak mbareet ne ma tinyei peek." 
Isaiah1:31 Ak koigei che kiimeen katanisyek che arurendos, ak koigei poisyennyi maat ne iteri; ak kolalyo tuwai, ama piitu ne imisi." 
Isaiah2:1 Ng'olyootap Isaiah weeriitap Amos, ne ki keer agobo Judah ak Jerusalem." 
Isaiah2:1 Ng'olyootap Isaiah weeriitap Amos, ne ki keer agobo Judah ak Jerusalem." 
Isaiah2:2 Kimitu eng' peetuusyek che po let, tulweetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tuloonook parak, ak kitoroori kosiir tuloonook che mengeechen; ak tuun pwaanjin olooto pororyosyek tugul." 
Isaiah2:3 Tuun itendenjin olooto piik che chaang' koleen, “Obwa, keebe ketogoste tulweetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi kootap Kamuktaindetap Jakobo; si koneetech ortinwekyik, si kebendatee ortinwekyik.” Amu mang'une ng'atuutik Zion, ak komang'une ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jerusalem." 
Isaiah2:4 Ak korwooksechin `ineendet pororyosyek, ak koger kong' piik che chaang'. Ak kotany rotonikwak po chok koek mogomboik che po tuuga, ak kotany ng'otwekwak koek chepkesok; si ma kobaregei pororyosyek, ama koneetegei lugeet kogeny." 
Isaiah2:5 Ee kootap Jakobo, obwa kebendatee lapkeiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah2:6 Amu ki ibagaakte piiguk, kootap Jakobo, amu kigonyi icheek pitonwegap kong'asiis, ak ki koek icheek chepsogeinik ko uu Philistiik, ak konamgei eunek koyasyechigei ak lagogap toek." 
Isaiah2:7 Nyiitaat emennywa kogeny fedha ak thahabu, ama mi ole igeesunegei konoraikwak. Nyiitaat emennywa kogeny paraisisyek, ama mi ole igeesunegei kariisyekwak." 
Isaiah2:8 Nyiitaat emennywa kogeny kanamonik; ilasu poisyonigap eunekwak, che kiyaei eunekwak." 
Isaiah2:9 Ing'uruuksei chiito ne nyeraat, ak kiming'ini chiito ne oo, ko uu nooto anyun amenyochi kaat icheek." 
Isaiah2:10 Chut rwandet, ak iung'egei temburyek, imwee kamuisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' toroornatetap etunatennyi." 
Isaiah2:11 Kinyeroti che ieetegei, ak kiming'ini menoteetap piik, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei ne tororitu eng' peetuunooto." 
Isaiah2:12 Amu tuun piitu peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, eng' icheek tugul che mendos ak che ieetigei; ak eng' icheek tugul che itoroorigei, ak kiming'ini tugul;" 
Isaiah2:13 eng' taragonik tugul che po Lebanon, che torooreen ak koeetigei, ak eng' keetiik tugul che po Bashan;" 
Isaiah2:14 ak eng' tuloonook tugul che kooen, ak eng' tuloonook tugul che kitororitu;" 
Isaiah2:15 ak eng' teekseet age tugul ne kooi, ak eng' irimeet age tugul ne ng'ootaat;" 
Isaiah2:16 eng' melisyek tugul che po Tarsis, ak eng' itoonwek tugul che ki chamei." 
Isaiah2:17 Kiming'ini kaeetetapkei ne po chiito, ak kinyeroti menoteetap piik; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei ne tororitu peetuunooto." 
Isaiah2:18 Ak igeesugei kanamonik. 
Isaiah2:19 Ak komwechi piik kebenonik che mi rwandosyek, ak keriingonik che mi ng'wony, komwee kamuisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' toroornatetap etunatennyi, ye kang'eet kotumdum ng'wonyuni eng' kimnateet." 
Isaiah2:20 Eng' peetuunooto ko laktoi chiito kanamonikyik che po fedha, kolaktoochi pung'ung'onik ak reresik ak kanamonikyik che po thahabu, che ki kiyachi ineendet si kosa," 
Isaiah2:21 si komwechi kebenonik, ak rwandosyek che kibetogis, komwee kamuisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' toroornatetap etunatennyi, ye kang'eet kotumdum ng'wonyuni eng' kimnateet." 
Isaiah2:22 Amomang'u chii, ne tinyei kabuuset. Amu tilei nee?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ogeer anyuno, istoi Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, eng' Jerusalem ak Judah, tiyeiywot ak tuguuk che kimang'u, kobooto amitwogik tugul ak peek tugul," 
Isaiah3:2 kobooto chiito ne kiim ak chiitap lugeet, kirwoogindet ak maotyot, chiito ne ng'oorsei ak poiyot," 
Isaiah3:3 kobooto kiptaiyatap piik konom, ak chiito ne konyitot, kirwoogindet, musogindet ne ng'oom ak chepsogeiyot ne ng'oom." 
Isaiah3:4 Agoochini lagok koek pounikwak, ak koboi icheek `manyurunik." 
Isaiah3:5 Ak tuun kiusei piik, usei `age age, ak kous age tugul chiitap kokwennyi. Sasei `lakwa poiyo, ak kosas `chiito ne nyeraat chiito ne konyitot." 
Isaiah3:6 Tuun namei `chii ng'eetap kamet eng' kootap kwandanyi, koleenji, “Ko uu ye itinye ngoroik, ii egu pounindennyo, ak kotebee ng'emisyoni eung'ung'!”" 
Isaiah3:7 Ago mwaei ineendet eng' peetuunooto kole, “Ma egu kanyaindet; amu ma mi koonnyu amitwogik anan ngoroik. Moeeta aek pounindetap piik.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Amu kogong'emak Jerusalem, ak kogobut Judah; amu ki ingelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'elyebwekwak ak eng' poisyonikwak, koesyoi kimni toroornatennyi." 
Isaiah3:9 Paoryanjin icheek togoochikwak; ak komwaitoi tengekwogikwak ko uu Sodom, ma unyei. Pwo eng' saboonwekwak! Amu kagoyaakyigei yaityet." 
Isaiah3:10 Omwachi ne po iman oleenji, myeeitu eng' ineendet, amu amei icheek logoegap poisyonikwak." 
Isaiah3:11 Pwo eng' kiptengekyot! Yaitu eng' ineendet; amu kigoochin melektap poisyonigap eunekyik. 
Isaiah3:12 Usei `lagok piikyuk, ak koboi `kwonyiik icheek. Ee piikyuk, koonin ichiliil piik che indoun, ak kong'em pandap ortinweguk." 
Isaiah3:13 Tononi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'alaaldowok, ak kotonon korwookyi piik." 
Isaiah3:14 Chutei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwooget, korwookyin poisyegap piikyik ak pounigap piikyik: koleenji, okweek che ki oam mbareetap sabibuk; mi kooriikwok parunenigap kibananook." 
Isaiah3:15 Lyon anyun, si osastoe piikyuk, ak otyech togoochigap kibananook? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah3:16 Ki mwa kogeny Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Amu menioti tiibiigap Zion, ak kobendoti ko chuulotin kaatwekwak, koberberisyote konyekwak, kobendi ak kokwaisoti, ak kocheiyoti keelyekwak," 
Isaiah3:17 piree anyun Kiptaiyat tiibiigap Zion pokpogenetap metowekwak, ak kong'aanyei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek koba aach ngor.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Istoi Kiptaiyat eng' peetuunooto karaaranindap mugurekwak, ak kwambelelik, ak kariik che po kaatit," 
Isaiah3:19 munaok, kariigap eunek ak ngoroik che kitugegei," 
Isaiah3:20 chepkuloik, sirimwek che po keelyek, angook che iuegei, sandugusyegap nyamdutik ak kariik che po itiik," 
Isaiah3:21 peteinik ak munaok che korooron che po serut," 
Isaiah3:22 ngoroik che korooron che po tuiyosyek, sumotik, angook che kitugegei, ratuutik," 
Isaiah3:23 kioinik, katanit ne karaaran, chepkuloik ak angook alak." 
Isaiah3:24 Ak tuun kigeeree nyamdutik che anyiny nunateet; ak kogeeree pireneet, rogoet; ak kogeeree suumeek che iletotin, poosto; ak kogeeree angeet ne karaaran, kuniet ne kigermenegei; ak kogeeree korooronindo, saremik." 
Isaiah3:25 Kibare mureniguk rotwetap chok, ak kebar piiguk che kiimeen eng' lugeet." 
Isaiah3:26 Ak koriiryo ormariichokyik ak koteiyo; ak koguber ak kotebee ng'wony. 
Isaiah4:1 Ak tuun namei kwonyiik tisabu muren agenge eng' peetuunooto, koleenji, “Ki ame amitwogikyok, ak kilaachi ngoroikyok; ago ngeguurtoenech kityo kaineng'ung'; istewech teweernatennyo.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Korooronitu ak kotorooritu eng' peetuunooto temetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ko telunotin ak ko korooron logoegap emet eng' icheek che kichililso eng' Israel." 
Isaiah4:3 Ak tuun kiguure ne itabaanat ineendet ne ki ng'et eng' Zion, ak Jerusalem, chiito age tugul ne ki kisir eng' che saptos eng' Jerusalem." 
Isaiah4:4 Ye tuun kagoundo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor simdap tiibiigap Zion, ak koundo korotiigap Jerusalem eng' kwenunnyi eng' kirwooget, ak eng' maat." 
Isaiah4:5 Yeityo koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pooldet ak iyeto eng' peet kouur meng'ooteet tugul ne po tulweetap Zion, ak maat ne liplibeni ak ne iluu kemoi; amu tuchei toroornatet komugul kiit ne kiuure." 
Isaiah4:6 Ak tuun piitu emait ne tuun kiuure peet eng' kiptoret, ak koek ole kimwechin ak ole kiung'egei eng' usoonet ne oo ak ropta." 
Isaiah5:1 Ngatyenji chamanennyu tyendo ne po chamyet agobo mbareennyi ne po sabibuk: Ki tinyei chamanennyu mbareetap sabibuk eng' tulweet ne ming'in ne akwai miising'. 
Isaiah5:2 Ki pal keriinget koyieme ak koisto koik eng' yooto, ak komiinji keetiik che korooron che po sabibuk, ak koteech teekseet ne kooi eng' kwenut, ak kobal kogeny ole kitue sabibuk eng' yooto. Kileen imuuchi koi sabibuk, ago ki ii sabibuk che po timiin." 
Isaiah5:3 Ara anyun, okweek che omenye Jerusalem, ak okweek piigap Judah, asaok ale orwookwo ak mbareennyu ne po sabibuk." 
Isaiah5:4 Nee ne kita ta keyaei ne siirei eng' mbareennyu ne po sabibuk, ne ma ayai? Amu nee anyun, ye kinga leen yiei sabibuk, koi sabibuk che yaacheen?" 
Isaiah5:5 “Ak nguno anyun amwaiwok kiit ne aitoi mbareennyu ne po sabibuk. Aistoi ng'otwennyi, si keam. Abute irimennyi, si ketyech." 
Isaiah5:6 Ametoi keng'em, si ma kesabori ama kesemberi; ago piitos katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich. Ang'ate kogeny poolik si mata korobonji.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Mbareetap sabibuk ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko kootap Israel, ak keetinnyi ne iboiboi ineendet ko piigap Judah. Ki igen kirwooget, ago ki keer tumdaetap korotiik; ki igen imanda, ago ki kas riirek." 
Isaiah5:8 Pwo eng' icheek che ituitos kooriik, ak kotesei mbareenik, kot koma komi poroindo, ak kemetok omeny okweegei eng' kwenutap emet!" 
Isaiah5:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, agase eng' itiikyuk kole: “Iman, kuberi kooriik che chaang', agot kooriik che eecheen che korooron, koma menyei chii." 
Isaiah5:10 Amu yiei ekaisyek tamanu che po mbareetap sabibuk, debeinik aeng', ak kooi kesweegap kiloinik pogol agenge, kiloinik taman.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Pwo eng' icheek che ng'eetos karon miising', kocheeng'at maiyek; che eeisei agoi kemoi kween, kot kobogityo miising'!" 
Isaiah5:12 Mi eng' igoorwekwak ketubet ak kibugandet, sugutit ne ming'in ak ndurerut, ak maiyek. Ago ma iiti icheek poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anan kobwaat poisyonigap eunekyik." 
Isaiah5:13 Kigeluul anyun piikyuk, amu kibetyi naet. Piikwak che konyitotiin ko parei rubeet, ak tuiyennywa ko parei melelda." 
Isaiah5:14 Nooto anyun, ki kobarait ye mi che ki kobek, ak kigoseng'eng' ne ma aechin ak kiy; choorchingei olooto che teegisootin che po Jerusalem ak chaang'indonywa, ak kogeny choorchingei olooto etunatennywa kobooto ineendet ne igasegei eng' kwenunnywa." 
Isaiah5:15 Kinyeroti chiito ne nyeraat, ak kiming'ini chiito ne oo, ak ki abuchi konyegap icheeget che ieetegei." 
Isaiah5:16 Ago itoroorot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' kirwoogetap imanda, ak Kamuktaindet ne Tiliil koboortoigei kole itabaanat eng' imanda." 
Isaiah5:17 Yeityo koagetyo aaregap kechir ko uu eng' ole cham koagete, ak koam toek ole ki kometo che akwaen." 
Isaiah5:18 Pwo eng' icheek che ichuutune ng'oogisto poroonik che po puch, ak kochuutu tengekto ko uu eng' rogoetap chepkichutit," 
Isaiah5:19 che mwaei kole, “Ingochaakta ineendet, kochokyi poisyennyi, si kobiit kegeer. Ingorik konyo kirwoogetap Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, si kobiit kenai!”" 
Isaiah5:20 Pwo eng' icheek che kuure `yaityet myeeindo, ak koguure `myeeindo yaityet, che igeere `mesundeito lapkeiyet, ak kogeere `lapkeiyet mesundeito; che igeere `ng'wanindo anyinyindo, ak kogeere `anyinyindo ng'wanindo!" 
Isaiah5:21 Pwo eng' icheek che indogei kole ki utaatiin, ak kogeerei koleen ng'ulaatiin!" 
Isaiah5:22 Pwo eng' icheek che koroomen koee divaik, ak murenik che kiimeen che puruchi maiyek." 
Isaiah5:23 Che iityin imanda kiptengekyot agobo asoya, ak korebe imanda chiito ne po iman!" 
Isaiah5:24 Nooto anyun, ko uu ye peelei liplibenetap maat mobeek, ak ko uu ye igeesu liplibenetap maat susweek che yamyotiin, ko uu nooto kergeitu tigitikwak ak nunateet, ak kotogosta taaptokwak ko uu temburyek; amu ki koeesyo ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak kosas ng'olyootap Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah5:25 Ki nereekyi kot anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik, ak ki iyogoito eunnyi kogirinda icheek, ak kobir, kibotanso tuloonook che mengeechen, ak ki ek muuswekwak pusagaryek eng' kwenutap ortinwek. Nganda uu nooto, koma istogei nereegekyik, ago ta kochuulat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah5:26 Ak konamji ineendet parak songolyet koboorchi pororyo ne loo, ak koititenji icheek kobwa eng' ole poochin ng'wony, ak kobwa korwou, kochogu." 
Isaiah5:27 Ma piitu eng' icheek ne ng'etei anan ko ne ibuti; ama mi ne inuuchi anan ne ruei; ama kitustusi pireneet ne rategei, ama ng'etei tapsinietap kweonikwak." 
Isaiah5:28 Ng'atiben kipchabonikwak, ak ko riigotin kwangokwak tugul; kirogendoi keelyegap paraisisyekwak koik che uueen, ak uu tirookwak kipchurchuryet." 
Isaiah5:29 Uu porisenennywa ne po ng'etundo, porisendos ko uu parnotigap ng'etuunyik; porisendos ak konam chooto kagonam, ak komut kochamegei, ama piitu chii ne saru." 
Isaiah5:30 Ak komororchi icheek eng' peetuunooto ko uu mororetap nyanjet. Ak ngo keer chii emet, ogeero, mi mesundeito ak pichiindo, ak koimenit lapkeiyet eng' polikyik." 
Isaiah6:1 Eng' kenyiit ne kimee Laitoryat Uzziah, ageer Kiptaiyat kotebee ng'echereetap laitornatet, kotoroor ak komi parak, ak ki nyi ngoryennyi Hekaluut." 
Isaiah6:2 Ki tonondos seraphik eng' paragunnyi; ki tinyei age tugul kebebaik lo: kituge aeng' togeennyi, kotuge aeng' keelyekyik, ak kitirirene aeng'." 
Isaiah6:3 Ak kitwekyi `age age koleenji: “Tiliil, tiliil, tiliil, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek; nyiitaat ng'wony komugul toroornatennyi.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Ki itumdumgei lumeiywegap tugatugigap kurgeet amu tuugeetap ineendet ne kitwek, ak ki nyi koot iyeto." 
Isaiah6:5 Ki ale anyun, “Pwo eng' anee! Kaawong'uge, amu aa chii ne tinyei kutit ne ng'waan, ak ki meng'iisyei ak piik che ng'woneen kutusweek; amu kaageer Laitoryat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Kitirirenjo anyun age eng' seraphik, kotinyei ng'etetyot eng' eunnyi, ne ki inemune kanameiywot eng' kaptisisyet." 
Isaiah6:7 Ak kitwae kutinnyu, ak kole, “Keero, kagotwa kuting'ung' niito; kageisto tengektong'ung', ak kagiundo ng'oogistong'ung'.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Ki agas kutitap Kiptaiyat koleen, “Ayookte ng'oo, ak ng'oo ne wendi agobo acheek?” Ki ale anyun, “Ami yu! Iyookto.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Ak ki le, ui, ak imwachi pichu ileenji ogase iman, ago moguitosi; ak ogeere iman, ago monae." 
Isaiah6:10 Yai mugulelwegap pichu konyigiisitu, ak kotimogis itiikwak, ak kogerogis konyekwak, si ma keertoe konyekwak, ama kastoe itiikwak, anan koguiyo eng' mugulelwekwak, ak kowalogis, ak kisoop." 
Isaiah6:11 Ki ateebee anyun, ale, “Ee Kiptaiyat, tyanitu?” Ak ki wol kole, “Agoi tuun koguber nganasook kot koma komi piik kooriik, ak koek emet kipkubere miising'" 
Isaiah6:12 ko kagouto `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik koba ole loo. Ak kochang'a emotinwek che kigemeto eng' emet. 
Isaiah6:13 Ak ngot kota komi kebeberta agenge eng' taman, keamei kogeny, keetit ne kiguure alayet anan keetit age ne uu tarakwet, che ng'etu musugikwak ye kageep.” Uu nooto musugyet, iyoteet ne tiliil ko tigitikyik." 
Isaiah7:1 Eng' peetuusyegap Ahaz weeriitap Jotham, weeriitap Uzziah, laitoryatap Judah, kotogosta Rezin laitoryatap Syria, ak Pekah weeriitap Remaliah, laitoryatap Israel koba koleen kobookyi Jerusalem; ago ma imuuch koterteer." 
Isaiah7:2 Ye kingo kas kootap Daudi keele kogonamgei Syria ak Ephraim ko ki potan muguleldo ne po Ahaz ak mugulelwegap piikyik ko uu ye itumdumi usoonet keetiigap timiin. 
Isaiah7:3 Ki mwachi anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Isaiah koleenji, ui anyun otuiye ak Ahaz, inyee ak Shear-jashup weeriing'ung', otuiyechi ole igeesunegei kererchetap tamboiyot ne po meto, ne mi ooreet ne oo ne po kooretap mwetindet," 
Isaiah7:4 ak ileenji ineendet, riipkei, ak isiis, ameiyweisye, anan kotanui muguleldang'ung', amu kegenganichu aeng' iyendos, amu nereegek che ng'woneen che po Rezin ak Syria, ak che po weeriitap Remaliah." 
Isaiah7:5 Amu kagochaamin Syria kobooto Ephraim ak weeriitap Remaliah, koleenjigei," 
Isaiah7:6 ongetogoste kebarge ak Judah, ak kinyalil ak keluuljige, si kinde nooto weeriitap Tabeel koek laitoryat," 
Isaiah7:7 kamwa ko uu ni Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kole ma tononi niito, ama yaaksei." 
Isaiah7:8 Amu metitap Syria ko Damasko, ak metitap Damasko ko Rezin. (Ye tomo kogeskei kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo ak muut, ko tonaksei Ephraim si ma ko pororyet.)" 
Isaiah7:9 Metitap Ephraim ko Samaria, ak metitap Samaria ko weeriitap Remaliah. Ngot ko moyan, koma koi ogimegitu." 
Isaiah7:10 Ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Ahaz kogeny koleenji," 
Isaiah7:11 “Soom Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' kaboorunet; soom agot ngo miitei rireet, anan ngot komi parak miising'.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Ago ki mwa Ahaz kole, “Ma soome, amatyeme Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Ak ki mwa Isaiah kole, “Ogas anyun, ee kootap Daudi! Tos kiit ne ming'in eng' okweek ogoochi piik kong'etyo, kot ogoochi Kamuktaindennyu kong'et agine?" 
Isaiah7:14 Koonok anyun Kiptaiyat ineendet kaboorunet; ogeero, manachi pergeiyat, ak kosich weeriit, ak koguuree kainennyi Immanuel." 
Isaiah7:15 Amei ineendet mwaitap cheego ak kumyat, ye kagonai koeesyo yaityet, ak kolewen ne myee." 
Isaiah7:16 Amu kotom konai lakweet koeesyo ne ya, ak kolewen ne myee, kemetoi emet ne iweche laitorinikyik tuwai." 
Isaiah7:17 Ibun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooto piiguk, ak kootap kwandang'ung', peetuusyek che tomo kobiit, kobooch peetuut ne ki istoegei `Ephraim Judah; nooto laitoryatap Assyria.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Ak eng' peetuunooto koititenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kalyang'ik che mi tabanwek che looen che po ainoosyegap Misiri, ak koititenji segemik che mi emetap Assyria." 
Isaiah7:19 Si kobwa, yeityo komuuny tugul eng' atebwosyek che ki koek surkwen, ak eng' ole ki kobetak eng' rwandosyek, ak eng' katok tugul, ak eng' ola tugul ole kiyagisye." 
Isaiah7:20 Inemu metit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto eng' rotweet ne ki alei, ne mi komoswegap aineet pitoniin, kobooto laitoryatap Assyria, inemu metit ak koroorigap keelyek, ak konem kogeny tamnet kogees." 
Isaiah7:21 Eng' peetuunooto, koyagi `chiito rooryat ak keechiirek aeng';" 
Isaiah7:22 tuun amei ineendet mwaitap cheego amu tuun koonu icheeget cheego che chaang', amu tuun amei age tugul ne kang'et eng' emet, mwaitap cheego ak kumyat." 
Isaiah7:23 Ak tuun piitu eng' peetuunooto katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich eng' komosta age tugul, eng' ole ki mi keetiigap sabibuk eliphuut agenge che yamegei kamanuutyennyi ak fedhaisyek eliphuut." 
Isaiah7:24 Wendi chiito olooto kotinyei kipchabonik ak kwanget, amu egu emonooto tugul katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich." 
Isaiah7:25 Moriikyini peetuunooto tuloonook tugul che mengeechen che ki kibat, amu oiywei katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich, ago egu ole kiyage tuuga, ak ole tyechei keechiirek." 
Isaiah8:1 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ipchigei kiit ne oo ne kisirei, ak isire kalamitap chiito, ‘Agobo Maer-salal-hasbas’; ”" 
Isaiah8:2 si kobiit acheeng'jige paorinik che kiyani, kosiir tuguuk che piitu, Uriah tisiindet, ak Zekariah weeriitap Jeberekia." 
Isaiah8:3 Ki awe anyun ye mi chebyoset ne maotyo; ak ki manach, ak kosich weeriit. Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun, “Tochi kainennyi Maer-salal-hasbas." 
Isaiah8:4 Amu kotom komuuch lakwanooto kotwek kole, ‘Abba’ anan ‘Eiyo,’ koluulei laitoryatap Assyria mogornatosyegap Damasko ak parunenigap Samaria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Ki ng'alaalwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny, kole," 
Isaiah8:6 “Amu ki eesyo pichu peegap Siloa che rootei mutyo, ak koboiboitune Rezin ak weeriitap Remaliah;" 
Isaiah8:7 ara anyun, ipchin Kiptaiyat icheek peegap aineet, che chaang' che kiimeen, nooto ko laitoryatap Assyria kobooto toroornatennyi tugul; ak kotogosyi ineendet ainoosyekyik tugul, ak kosiir ngeguusyekyik tugul;" 
Isaiah8:8 ak kobokto kwo Judah, ak koyom kosiir olooto, nyiei kot koit kaatit; ak konyiiei kaiitoetap kebebaikyik tebeesindap emeng'ung', ee Immanuel.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Owaach, ee pororyosyechu, si kobiit ketonatonak; ak oep iit, ee okweek tugul che oo po emotinwek che looen; ogermenge, si ketonatonak; ogermenge anyun, si ketonatonak." 
Isaiah8:10 Orwooch tugul, ago egu puch; omwa ng'olyoot, ama tononi, amu mi Kamuktaindet kobootech." 
Isaiah8:11 Amu ki ng'alaalwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto eng' euut ne kiim, ak kotigoono si ma wendate ortinwegap pichu, kole:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Amomwa ole, Chaamset, agobo tugul che mwaei pichu kole, chaamset; amoiywei kiit ne iywei icheeget, anan oaragen." 
Isaiah8:13 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ineegei ne ogonyiti; ak ingoek ineendet ne oiywei, ak koek ineendet ne koonok oiyweisye." 
Isaiah8:14 Ak koek ineendet ole-tiliil; ago egu koita ne inachi piich ak rwandet ne riichei piich eng' kooriik tuwai che po Israel, koek mesteet ak mesteet age ne teer eng' piik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Isaiah8:15 Kinachi che chaang' eng' olooto, ibutos ak koilyo, kiname mesteet ak kimut.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Rat anyun paornateet, ng'ooch ng'atuutik eng' kwenutap kasubikyuk." 
Isaiah8:17 Si agen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne unyei togeennyi si ma keer kootap Jakobo, ak amang'u ineendet." 
Isaiah8:18 Ogeero, anee ak lagok che ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko ki kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik eng' tugul, che punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ne menyei tulweetap Zion." 
Isaiah8:19 Ak ye mwaiwok kole, “Ocheeng'ate icheek che poisyee oik ak pooniik che twegu ko uu toriitik ak che nyeanyei ng'aleek.” Tos nyoljin kocheeng'at che ki kobek agobo che saptos? Tos ma nyooljin piik kocheeng' Kamuktaindennywa?" 
Isaiah8:20 Onamge ak ng'atuutik ak paornateet! Ngot koma ng'alaal icheek koosup ng'olyoondoniito, ko amu ma mi lapkeiyet eng' icheek." 
Isaiah8:21 Tuun siirtoe yooto, konyalildos ak koamei rubeet, ak ye tuun kaam rubeet, konereekso ak kosas laitoryannywa ak Kamuktaindennywa, ak konyal parak;" 
Isaiah8:22 ak kogeer ng'wony, ago ogeero, mi pichiindo ak mesundeito, mesundeito ne po ndara; ak keonji icheek mesundeito ne oo." 
Isaiah9:1 Ago ma mi mesundeito eng' emet ne ki tinyei pichiindo. Eng' peetuusyek che po tai, ko ki ipchi sasisyet emetap Zebulun ak emetap Naphtali, ago kiitoroor eng' peetuusyek che po let, ooreetap nyanjet, Jordan pitoniin, Galilaya ne po pororyosyek." 
Isaiah9:2 Piik che kibendote mesundeito ko kogogeer lapkeiyet ne oo; icheek che ki menyei emetap urwetap meet ko nguno kogoluuchi lapkeiyet. 
Isaiah9:3 Ki ites pororyet, ki ites poiboiyennywa; poiboitu icheek eng' taing'ung' ko uu poiboiyet ne po kesisyet, ko uu piik che poiboitu ye pchei parunenik." 
Isaiah9:4 Amu koiiri chogitap lautyennyi, ak kirokto ne po tigikyennyi, ak kirokto ne po usiindennyi, ko uu eng' peetuusyegap Midian." 
Isaiah9:5 Amu kibeelei kweonik tugul che po chiitap lugeet eng' wasetapkei, ak ngoroik che ki isegei korotiik, egu tugul che laldos." 
Isaiah9:6 Amu kagisikwech lakweet, kagigoonech weeriit; ak ting'ee ineendet pounateet tigikyennyi. Kiguure kainennyi: “Kotigonindet ne po Kwong'uut, Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet, Kwanda ne po Koigeny, Pounindetap Kaalyeet.”" 
Isaiah9:7 Pounatennyi ko tese tai agoi, ak kaalyeet koma mi ole igeesunegei Namei ng'echereet ne po laitornatetap Daudi ak laitornatennyi, si kogimit ak koboi eng' kirwooget ak imanda kobooch nguno agoi koigeny. Yaei kagiiletapkei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek niito." 
Isaiah9:8 Ki iyookyi `Kiptaiyat Jakobo ng'olyoot, ak kobutyi Israel." 
Isaiah9:9 Ak konai piik tugul, agot Ephraim ak che menyei Samaria, eng' menoteet ak eng' muguleldo ne ichaugei komwaei kole," 
Isaiah9:10 “Kagobutyo matubaruuk, ago kiteege koik che kiwaei; ki kiluul mogoonik, ago kigeere taragonik.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Ara anyun ing'eeti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor puunigap Rezin, kogirinda icheek, ak ko ki il puunikyik." 
Isaiah9:12 Ing'eeti piigap Syria eng' tai, ak Philistiik eng' let; ak koam Israel eng' kutit ne iseng'eng'at. Nganda uu nooto, koma istogei nereegekyik, ago ta ko chuulaat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah9:13 Nganda uu nooto koma weekyigei `piik ineendet ne kibir icheek, ama cheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah9:14 Tilei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor metit ak katutyet eng' Israel, ebei temetap sosyoot ak mutwot peetuunak." 
Isaiah9:15 Metit ko poiyot ne konyitot; ak katutyet ko maotyot ne ineeti lembechek. 
Isaiah9:16 Amu ibeeti pichu icheeget che indochin ak keng'emei icheek che kindochin. 
Isaiah9:17 Maboiboitu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' murenikwak, ama riiree chechwaak che ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoogikwak; amu ya age tugul ak ko yaindetap yaityet, ak komwaei kutit age tugul abusnateet. Nganda uu nooto, koma istogei nereegekyik, ago ta ko chuulaat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah9:18 Amu lalei yaityet ko uu maat, igeesu katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich: lalei eng' timiin ne oo, ak koiyen iyeto ne oo ne uu poolik che nyigiisen." 
Isaiah9:19 Ki kolal emet eng' nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kagoigei piik kweenik che kilaali; ma riiree chii ng'eetap kamet." 
Isaiah9:20 Wiriti age eng' komostap eutap tai, ak koamei rubeet; ak koam eng' komostap murot kaataam, ama piyang'dos icheek; amei chii age tugul panyeegap eunnyi." 
Isaiah9:21 Amei `Manasseh Ephraim, ak amei `Ephraim Manasseh; ak kogirindoi icheek tuwai Judah. Nganda uu nooto, koma istogei nereegekyik, ago ta ko chuulaat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah10:1 Pwo eng' icheek che ng'atei ng'atuutik che ma po iman, ak eng' icheek che sirei kamaaset," 
Isaiah10:2 kobeet ne nyalili eng' kirwooget, ak korebe imanit kibananogap piikyuk, si kobiit koek mosoogik parunenikwak, ak si kobiit koluul che ma tinyei sigiik!" 
Isaiah10:3 Oyae nee anyun eng' peetuut ne ityinok pireeng'wong', ak eng' ng'emisyet ne punu ole loo? Omwechini ng'oo kotoretook? Ak ondoi ano toroornateng'wong'?" 
Isaiah10:4 Ing'uruukyin icheek kimonjororinik, ak kobutyi ole ki kibarchi piik. Nganda uu nooto, koma istogei nereegekyik, ago ta ko chuulaat eunnyi kora. Menoteetap Assyria ak pirennyi" 
Isaiah10:5 Pwo eng' Assyria, kirokto ne po nereegekyuk, kirokto ne po ineendet ne mi nereegekyuk eunnyi!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ayooktoi kobargei ak pororyet ne ya, ak agoochini kobargei ak piik che anereekyini, si koluul ak koip parunenik, ak ketyech icheek ko uu ye kityechi ng'atateek eng' ooreet." 
Isaiah10:7 Ago ma ibwaati ko uu nooto, ama mi muguleldanyi ko uu nooto; ago machei muguleldanyi kong'emis, ak kowong' pororyosyek che chaang'." 
Isaiah10:8 Amu ki mwa kole, “Tos, ma laitorinik pounikyuk tugul?" 
Isaiah10:9 Tos, ma uu Kalno Karkemish? Tos, ma uu Hamath Arpad? Tos, ma uu Samaria Damasko?" 
Isaiah10:10 Ko uu ye kagonyoor eunnyu laitornatosyegap kanamonik, che siirei itoonwekwak che ki kiwai che po Jerusalem ak che po Samaria;" 
Isaiah10:11 tos mayachini Jerusalem ak kanamonikyik ko uu ye ki ayachi Samaria ak kanamonikyik?” 
Isaiah10:12 Nooto anyun ye tuun kagoyai Kiptaiyat poisyennyi komugul eng' tulweetap Zion ak eng' Jerusalem, abir anyun logoegap menoteetap muguleldo ne po laitoryatap Assyria, ak toroornatetap kachaunennyi pogei." 
Isaiah10:13 Amu ki komwa kole, “Ki ayai niito eng' kimnateetap eunnyu, ak eng' utaatyennyu, amu aguitosi; ki aiste kiwotosyegap pororyosyek, ak ki arebee konoraikwak, ak ki aming'in icheek che tebee ng'echerogap laitornatet, ko uu chiito ne nyigan." 
Isaiah10:14 Ko uu keswetap toriityon ne nyooru chii, ko ki konyoor eunnyu mogornatosyegap pororyosyek; ak ko uu ye iyumi chii mayaik che kigelakta, ki ayum ko uu nooto ng'wony komugul; ak ma piit ne kibirabirto kebepchet, anan ne kitwek, anan ne ki ite.”" 
Isaiah10:15 “Tos ichaugei aiywet eng' ineendet ne ebisye? Tos ieetegei musumeneet eng' ineendet ne tilisye? Ko uu nda itumdumi kirokto ne namei, anan nda namjin parak kirokto ineendet ne ma keetit!”" 
Isaiah10:16 Igoochin anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, piikyik che neryootiin kosagityo, ak tuun piitu liplibenet ne uu ne po maat ne lalei, ne kigeere toroornatennyi." 
Isaiah10:17 Ak koek maat lapkeiyetap Israel, ak koek nenyi Ne Tiliil liplibenetap maat, ak kobeel kowong' katookyik che rutei piich ak che toorei piich peetuunak." 
Isaiah10:18 Ak kobeel ineendet toroornatetap osnennyi, ak ne po mbareennyi ne rurei, kobooto saboondo ak poorto, ak koek ko uu ye tanui ineendet ne ibooti songolyet." 
Isaiah10:19 Ng'ering'itu keetiik che ng'etu che po osnennyi, kot komuuch koiit lakwa." 
Isaiah10:20 Eng' peetuunooto koma kotiegei kogeny che ki ng'et eng' Israel, ak icheek che kichililyo eng' kootap Jakobo, ineendet ne kibirei icheek; ago tiegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iman, Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah10:21 Weekyingei Kamuktaindet ne po kamuktaet, icheek che ki ng'et, agot icheek che ki ng'et che po Jakobo." 
Isaiah10:22 Agot nganda uu piiguk che po Israel ng'aniek che po nyanjet, koweeksei piik che ng'etu kityo eng' icheek. Kigeng'at kagesunet eng' icheek, ne ng'elyektoi eng' imanda." 
Isaiah10:23 Amu yaei Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kagesunet ne kigeng'at, eng' kwenutap ng'wony tugul." 
Isaiah10:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kole, “Ee piikyuk che menyei Zion, amoiywei Assyria; nganda pirin eng' kirokto, ak konamjin parak agobo inyee, ko uu piteetap Misiri." 
Isaiah10:25 Amu ta komi kitigin miising', si kosulda nereegek, nereegekyuk eng' ng'emisyennywa." 
Isaiah10:26 Ak kong'eetyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ineendet pireet, ko uu parisyetap Midianik eng' rwandetap Oreb. Tuun pou kiroktonyi nyanjet, ak konamji parak ko uu piteetap Misiri." 
Isaiah10:27 Ak eng' peetuunooto, koistoegei tigikyeng'ung' lautyennyi, ak koistoegei kaating'ung' choginnyi, ak keng'em chogit amu kaiilet.” Kagotogosta ineendet kwo eng' Rimmon," 
Isaiah10:28 kagoit Ayaat, kagosiir Migron, kagonoree tuguukyik Mikmas;" 
Isaiah10:29 kagoba kosiir ole kibunei, kagoru Geba; potani Ramah, kamwei Gibea ne po Saulo." 
Isaiah10:30 Waach miising', ee cheptap Galim! Ep iit, ee Laisha! Woljin ineendet, ee Anatoth!" 
Isaiah10:31 Kamwei Madmena, iyumigei piik che menyei Gebim si komwei." 
Isaiah10:32 Tonone Nob eng' peetuuni po rani, ing'wereri tulweetap cheptap Zion, tulweetap Jerusalem." 
Isaiah10:33 Ogeero, tuun ebei Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, mooriik eng' kamuiset; kiluulei che kooen, ak kinyeroti che ieetegei." 
Isaiah10:34 Ak koluule ineendet kariik timiin ne oo, ak koluul Lebanon ineendet ne kiim." 
Isaiah11:1 Mang'une `mornet ooreetap Jesse, ak kooi logoek `mornanooto pitunee tigitikyik." 
Isaiah11:2 Tebee ineendet `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, muguleldap utaatyet ak kaguiyet, muguleldap katigonet ak kimnateet, muguleldap naet ak kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah11:3 Mi poiboiyennyi kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amairwoochi ko uu ye keerei, ama kerei kong' ko uu ye kasei;" 
Isaiah11:4 ago irwooksechin kibananook eng' imanda, ak koger kong' che talaen che po ng'wony eng' imanda: ak kobir ng'wonyuni eng' kirokto ne po kutinnyi, ak kobare kiptengeginik kabusennyi." 
Isaiah11:5 Ak egu imanda pireneet ne rategei, ak koek kayaneet ne kiyani pireneet ne rategei." 
Isaiah11:6 Ak kotebi suiyot kobooto aarwetap keechiir, ak koruiyo cheplanget ak aarwetap ng'oroor, ak koruiyo moita ak ng'etundo parnotyot ak ne akwai, ak kokweri icheek `lakweet ne ming'in." 
Isaiah11:7 Ak koaget teta ak magalaluut, ruitos moekwak tugul; ak koam ng'etundo susweek ko uu teta." 
Isaiah11:8 Ak kourerene lakweet ne reryei keriingetap ndaret, ak konde lakweet ne kageluge eunnyi kebeneetap ereneet." 
Isaiah11:9 Ma itoi kiy chii anan kong'emis eng' tulweennyu tugul ne tiliil; amu nyiei ng'wony naetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ye nyiei peek nyanjet. 
Isaiah11:10 Cheeng'ei pororyosyek eng' peetuunooto tigityotap Jesse, ne tononi koegu songolyetap piik; ak egu toroornatet ole imuung'ee." 
Isaiah11:11 Eng' peetuunooto koyogoito Kiptaiyat eunnyi kogeny ne po aeng', kosar piikyik che tuun ng'etu, eng' Assyria, eng' Misiri, eng' Patros, eng' Kush, eng' Elam, eng' Sinar, eng' Hamath, ak eng' emotinwek che mi ngeguusyek." 
Isaiah11:12 Tuun lumdoi penderet agobo pororyosyek, ak koyum che ki kitimda che po Israel, ak koyum che kiyesta che po Judah eng' luukwek ang'wan che po ng'wony." 
Isaiah11:13 Ak koistogei ng'et kondap Ephraim kogeny, ak keisto icheek che inyalili Judah; ak ma amei ng'etkong' Ephraim agobo Judah, amainyalili `Judah Ephraim." 
Isaiah11:14 Ak kobookyi tigigoigap Philistiik eng' cherongo, ak koluul icheek tuwai piigap kong'asiis. Chuulei eunekwak kogirinda Edom ak Moab, ak kogas iit icheek lagogap Ammon." 
Isaiah11:15 Ak kong'em Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kowong' ng'elyeptap nyanjetap Misiri; ak kotwaitwai eunnyi kotokyi aineet eng' usoonennyi ne peelsei, ak kobir kobiitune ainoosyek tisabu, ak kogoochi piik kolanda kolaagoti kweonik." 
Isaiah11:16 Ak kobiit ooreet ne oo ne po piikyik che tuun ng'etu eng' Assyria, ko uu ye kimi agobo Israel eng' peetuut ne kitogosu komang'une emetap Misiri." 
Isaiah12:1 Eng' peetuunooto imwae ile, “Aweegun kongoi, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; agot nganda ki inereekyo, ko kageisto nereegeguk, ak igoigoa." 
Isaiah12:2 Ogeero, Kamuktaindet ko yetunennyu; amang'u, ama aiyweisyei, amu Kamuktaindet ko kimnateennyu ak ko tyendanyu; kagoek ineendet yetunennyu.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Tuun orame anyun peek eng' poiboiyet, eng' keriingonik che po yetunet."
