Isaiah12:4 Omwae eng' peetuunooto ole: “Oweekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kongoi, oguur kainennyi, omwaite poisyonikyik eng' pororyosyek, omwa ole kagotororit kainennyi." 
Isaiah12:5 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki koyai tuguuk che po telunateet; ingonaak niito eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Isaiah12:6 Owaach miising' ak otyense, inyee ne imenye Zion, amu oo Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel eng' kwenung'ung'.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Maotenet agobo Babilon, ne ki keer Isaiah weeriitap Amos." 
Isaiah13:1 Maotenet agobo Babilon, ne ki keer Isaiah weeriitap Amos." 
Isaiah13:2 Olumde penderet eng' tulweet ne churat, owaakyi, onde parak eunekwok ye ong'usei koba komoswek tuwai, si kobiit komandae ormariichogap piik che taagunotiin." 
Isaiah13:3 Koang'at piikyuk che itabaanatiin, koaguur piikyuk che nyigoonen agobo nereegekyuk, chechuuget che igasegei etunatennyu." 
Isaiah13:4 Kas polatetap tuiyet eng' tuloonook, ne uu ne po pororyet ne oo! Polatetap wasetapkei ne po laitornatosyek, che po pororyosyek che kaiyumgei! Iyumi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek lugeet agobo pooryeet." 
Isaiah13:5 Punu icheek emet ne loo, ole pooch tabandap kipsengwet, ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kariigap nereegekyik, si kobiit kong'em emet komugul." 
Isaiah13:6 Oteiye, amu kagoriik peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; nyoonei ko uu ng'emisyet ne punu Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Isaiah13:7 Nyaluldos anyun eunek tugul, ak kochoot muguleldap chii age tugul," 
Isaiah13:8 ak kotoptobenso. Namei icheek ng'waninwek ak aragenosyek; nyooru ng'wanindo ko uu kwondo ne amei moet. Ak kokwong'ee `age age; ak koigei togoochikwak togoochigap liplibenetap maat. 
Isaiah13:9 Ogeero, nyoonei peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne koroom, kobooto nereeknateet ak nereegek che ng'woneen, si kobiit koyai emet koguber, ak kong'em kiptengeginik kogees eng' yooto." 
Isaiah13:10 Amu kecheigap kipsengwet ak kecheikyik che iyumigei koma kogoonu lapkeiyennywa; imenitu asiista komachei kochor, ak ma kooluu arawet agine." 
Isaiah13:11 Ak abir ng'wony amu yaityennyi, ak abir kiptengeginik amu tengektonywa; ak awong'u menoteetap che mendos, ak anyeroti menoteetap che imuisei." 
Isaiah13:12 Ayae chiito koek ne ki cheeng'ei kosiir thahabu che korooron, chiito ne siirei thahabu che tiliileen che po Opir." 
Isaiah13:13 Ayae anyun kipsengwet kobotan, ak kitumdum ng'wony koistogei eng' komostanyi, eng' nereeknatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak eng' peetuutap nereegekyik che ng'woneen." 
Isaiah13:14 Ko uu kenyeleet ne ki oonei, anan ko uu keechiirek che ma iyumi chii, ko koweekyigei chii age tugul piikyik ak komwei chii age tugul kwo emennyi." 
Isaiah13:15 Kitoorei age tugul ne kinyooru, ak kibare rotwetap chok age tugul ne kinamei." 
Isaiah13:16 Kitonatoni lagokwak kogeerei; kiluulei kooriikwak, ak kesuup osotikwak." 
Isaiah13:17 Ogeero, ang'eeti Medik koba kobargei ak icheek, che ma iiti fedha kole kiy, ama poiboitune icheek thahabu." 
Isaiah13:18 Ak kotonaton kwangokwak murenik; ama tinyei riirge eng' che kisichei; ma riiree lagok. 
Isaiah13:19 Ak Babilon, ne ineendet ko toroornatetap laitornatosyek, ne karaaranindap menoteetap Kaldeik, koigeitu Sodom ak Gomorah ye ki igabui Kamuktaindet." 
Isaiah13:20 Ma komenyei piik kogeny, ama menyei chii kong'etee ibinda agoi ibinda; ama teechei Arabuuk emaisyek eng' olooto; amaiyagisye olooto mestoweek." 
Isaiah13:21 Ago tebee olooto tyong'ik che po surkwen; ak konyi kooriikwak tyong'ik che irigendos; menyei olooto tyong'igap songolik, ak kourerense olooto kwesik." 
Isaiah13:22 Ak koteiyo suik eng' irimoikwak, ak koteiyo lelwek eng' kooriikwak che korooron che po laitorinik. Kagoriik peetuunnyi, ama ketesei peetuusyekyik." 
Isaiah14:1 Amu riiree Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo, ak ta koleweni Israel, ak konde icheek emennywa; ak konamgei toondet ak icheek, ak konamgei ak kootap Jakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Ak komut pororyosyek icheek agoi oldanywa, ak kobunji kootap Israel pichooto eng' emetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koek otwogik ak tiibiik che otwogik. Ak koluul Israel icheek che kiga luul icheek; ak koboi usiikwak." 
Isaiah14:3 Ak imwa kalewenoni agobo laitoryatap Babilon eng' peetuut ne koonin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamuung'et eng' arageneng'ung', ak eng' nyalildang'ung', ak eng' otisyet ne uui ne ki kibirchin," 
Isaiah14:4 ile, haa, ki kowong'kei usiindet! Ki kowong'kei koroomnateet!" 
Isaiah14:5 Kigoiri Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirokta kiptengeginik, kirokto ne po pounik," 
Isaiah14:6 che kibir pororyosyek eng' nereegek eng' piretap kotugul, che kiboi pororyosyek eng' nereegek, eng' usiisyet ne ma kirinda chii." 
Isaiah14:7 Mi ng'wony komugul kamuung'et ak kaalyeet; tyendos icheek kogeny. 
Isaiah14:8 Ee, poiboitu piribirinik eng' inyee, ak taragonigap Lebanon, koleen, “Kobooch ngap iru, koma ebech chii.”" 
Isaiah14:9 Kagotumdumgei ye mi che ki kobek eng' oriit kotorogun ye inyone; ing'eetun piik che ki kobek, agot piik che eecheen che po ng'wony; kagong'eet eng' ng'echerokwak che po laitornatet laitorinik tugul che po pororyosyek." 
Isaiah14:10 Waluun tugul koleenjinin, “Tos keegu ne nyalulat ko uu acheek? Keige acheek?”" 
Isaiah14:11 Kagichoorta etunateng'ung' kwo ye mi che ki kobek, kobooto cheetap kibugandiniguk. Isyebe kuutik, ak kotuchin kuutik." 
Isaiah14:12 Ha-a, kaibut eng' kipsengwet, inyee, kecheiyatap peet, weeriitap karon! Ha-a, kagiebin ibut, inyee ne ki inyerat pororyosyek!" 
Isaiah14:13 Ki imwa eng' muguleldang'ung' ile, “Atogostoi kipsengwet, atoroori ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet kosiir kecheigap Kamuktaindet; atebee tulweetap tuiyet, eng' komoswek che looen che po murot kaataam." 
Isaiah14:14 Atogostoi asiir poolik; aigeitu Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'.” 
Isaiah14:15 Ago anyun, kichoortoin iwe ye mi che ki kobek, agoi komoswek che looen che po keriinget." 
Isaiah14:16 Injururin che keerin, kobwaatin kole: “Tos chiichito ne ki igoochi ng'wony kobotan, chiichito ne kiitumdum laitornatosyek," 
Isaiah14:17 ne ki yai ng'wony koek surkwen, ak koluul nganasookyik, ne ma ityaach kimonjororinikyik koba kooriikwak?”" 
Isaiah14:18 Ruitos laitorinik tugul che po pororyosyek eng' toroornatet, ruei age tugul eng' koonnyi." 
Isaiah14:19 Ago kagiwiirchin saang' eng' kerering'ung' ko uu temeet ne kiwechei, ko uu ngoroigap che ki kibar, che ki kitoore rotwetap chok, che rektoi agoi koigap keriinget; ko uu muusto ne kityechei." 
Isaiah14:20 Motuitosi kobooto icheek eng' tubeet, amu ki ing'em emeng'ung', ki ibar piiguk. Ma kemwaei koigeny iyoteetap piik che yaei yaityo." 
Isaiah14:21 Ochopchi lagokyik parisyet amu ng'oogistap kwanisyekwak; si mang'eetyo ak konam ng'wony kobunji, ak konyiit nganasook ng'wonyuni." 
Isaiah14:22 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Ang'eete agirinde icheek ak aiste eng' Babilon kainet ak icheek che ki ng'et, weeriit, ak weeriitap weeriit." 
Isaiah14:23 Ak agoochi komeny emonooto chepswererinik, ak tamboinigap peek. Ak abuge kabugoitap ng'emisyet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Ki koyoosyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kole, ko uu ye ki abwaat iman, ko yaaksei ko uu nooto; ak ko uu ye ki achop, kotebyei ko uu nooto," 
Isaiah14:25 ale atonatoni piigap Assyria eng' emennyu, ak atyech eng' tuloonookyuk; koistoegei eng' icheek choginnyi, ak koistoegei lautyennyi tigikyennywa." 
Isaiah14:26 Niito chobeet ne kigechop agobo ng'wony komugul; ak ni ko euut ne ki kichuulji pororyosyek tugul. 
Isaiah14:27 Amu Ki kochop Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ko tos ng'oo ne walei koek puch? Chuulaat eunnyi, tos ng'oo ne arunyi?" 
Isaiah14:28 Ki piit lautyoni eng' kenyiit ne kimee Laitoryat Ahaz. 
Isaiah14:29 Amebaibaitu, inyee tugul, ee Philistia, amu kagoil kirokto ne kibirin; amu mang'une tigityotap ndaret ereneet, ak egu iyotennyi ereneet ne tirireni, ne uu maat." 
Isaiah14:30 Ak koamis kiboretook che po kibananook, ak koruiyo eng' chametapkei che ma tinyei kiy; ak abare rubeet tigityondeng'ung', ak kebar cheguuk che ng'etu." 
Isaiah14:31 Itee, ee ormariichet; riir, ee nganaseet; kaichoot, ee Philistia, inyee tugul; amu mang'une iyeto murot kaataam, ama tononi chii ineegei eng' peetuusyekyik che ki king'at." 
Isaiah14:32 Kiwoljin nee anyun piik che kiyooktoi, che po pororyet? Kele, “Kagolumda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion, ak komwechi olooto piikyik che ki kius.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Maotenet agobo Moab. Amu king'emei Ar ne po Moab eng' kemout agenge, kiwong'; amu king'emei Kir ne po Moab eng' kemout agenge, kiwong'." 
Isaiah15:2 Katogosta Bayit, ak Dibon, kot koit komoswek che torooreen, koba koriir; riirchin `Moab Nebo, ak agobo Mediba. Mi pooswek metowekwak, ki ketil tamnet age tugul." 
Isaiah15:3 Kermenegei kuniok eng' ortinwekwak. Iteei age tugul ak koriirei miising', eng' kooriikwak parak ak eng' komoswekwak che paraen." 
Isaiah15:4 Riirei Hesbon ak Eleale, kigasei kutusweekwak eng' Jahas. Waaktos anyun murenigap Moab che ilaachi kariik; potani saboondanyi." 
Isaiah15:5 Riirei muguleldanyu amu Moab; mwechin Zoar piik che mweoti mwechin agoi Eglatselisiya. Amu togostoe Luhit koriiryoti; amu iteitos kateiyet ne po ng'emisyet eng' ooreet ne wendi Horonaim. 
Isaiah15:6 Amu teng'dos peegap Nimrim; amu kagoresyo susweek, ma kobitoos susweek che ng'orng'or, ma komi kiy age tugul ne tuon." 
Isaiah15:7 Ibei anyun chaang'indap tuguuk che ki konyoor, kobooto che ki kogonor, koba ole mi kereruut ne mi keetiik." 
Isaiah15:8 Amu ki koit riirek kiwotosyek tugul che po Moab; kiit kateiyennyi Eglaim, ak kiit kateiyennyi Beer-elim." 
Isaiah15:9 Amu nyiitaat korotiik peegap Dimon, amu ta aipchini alak Dimon, amutyini ng'etundo ineendet ne chililee Moab, ak che ng'etu eng' emet." 
Isaiah16:1 Okweri aaregap keechiir eng' Shelah ne tokyingei surkwen, che po pounindetap emet, koba tulweetap cheptap Zion." 
Isaiah16:2 Igeitu toriitik che ombenioti, ak keswetap ne ki kobutok, tiibiigap Moab eng' ole kilandoe eng' Arnon." 
Isaiah16:3 “Orwooch, otil kirwooget; yai urweng'ung' koigei kemoi kween eng' peet uny che kigetimda, ameng'wekte che ombenioti." 
Isaiah16:4 Ingomeny kobooten che kigetimda che po Moab, egu inyee ole ung'egei icheek komwee luulindet.” Ye kagoek puch rebindet, kagogeskei luulset, kagiwong' usiik eng' emet." 
Isaiah16:5 Ki kimiiti ng'echereetap laitornatet eng' rireenet, eng' emaitap Daudi ak tebee chiito ng'echeranooto eng' iman; korwooch ak kocheeng'ei kirwooget, ak ko chepchep koyai imanda." 
Isaiah16:6 Kigegas menoteetap Moab, keele, menot ineendet miising'; eng' kachaunennyi pogei, ak menatennyi, ak nereegekyik; puch lasennyi pogei." 
Isaiah16:7 Iteechin anyun Moab, iteei age tugul agobo Moab, Oteeie amu kagebirok miising', oriirchini magatinigap sabibuk che po Kir-hareset." 
Isaiah16:8 Amu restos mbareenigap Hesbon, ak keetiigap sabibuk che po Sibma; kigoiri keetiikyik che korooron kiptainigap pororyosyek, kiit Jaser ak ki ombeniot agoi surkwen, kiwakta mooriikyik ak kisiir nyanjet." 
Isaiah16:9 Arire anyun eng' riiregap Jaser agobo keetiigap sabibuk che po Sibma; aisenen peekyuk po kong', ee Hesbon ak Eleale; amu waagaatap poiboiyet eng' peetuutap logoeguk che po kemei ak che po kesisyeng'ung' ko kagobet." 
Isaiah16:10 Kageisto kagasetapkei ak poiboiyet eng' mbareet ne rurei; ak ma piitu tyenwogik eng' mbareenik che po sabibuk, ama kigasei tweguunetap poiboiyet; ma mi chii ne tyechei divaik eng' ole kituisye; kaawong'u polatetap kesisyet." 
Isaiah16:11 Morori anyun moennyu ko uu ketubetap Moab, ak morortos agutanikyuk ak icheek amu Kir-heres." 
Isaiah16:12 Ye kagoborgei Moab, ye kabirtogei eng' oli toroor, ak konyoor oldanyi ne tiliil si kobiit kosa, koma iterteerisyei." 
Isaiah16:13 Niito ng'olyoot ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Moab eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto. 
Isaiah16:14 Ago kagomwa nguno Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Kotom kogeskei kenyiisyek somogu, ko uu kenyiisyegap otwogindet ne kisirei, kesasei toroornatetap Moab, kobooto tuiyennyi tugul ne oo; ak kong'ering'itu miising' piik, ak ma kotilei kiy che ng'etu.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Maotenet agobo Damasko. Ogeero, kageisto Damasko, si mata koek nganaseet, ak egu karaatya." 
Isaiah17:2 Kigebagaakta nganasoogap Aroer; punjin akwotisyegap keechiirek che ruitos, ama mi chii ne imui." 
Isaiah17:3 Iwong'ugei kogeny irimeetap Ephraim, ak kowong'kei laitornatetap Damasko, che ki ng'et che po Syria ko kergeitu ak toroornatetap lagogap Israel, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah17:4 Nyerotitu toroornatetap Jakobo eng' peetuunooto, ak kosagit poortanyi." 
Isaiah17:5 Ak kergeitu ak ye iyumi peek kesiindet, ak kesei eunnyi peek, kergeitu ak ye kesei chiito peek eng' atebweetap Repaim." 
Isaiah17:6 Nganda uu nooto, kong'etu turoonik, ko uu ye kitumdumi mseituni, ak kong'etune logoek aeng' anan ko somok eng' temeet ne tabanu parak, ak kong'etune ang'wan anan ko muut eng' mooriik che ki iwakta kolooegitu che po keetit ne rurei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Isaiah17:7 Inyali peetuunooto chii Yaindennyi, ak kogeerei Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah17:8 Ama koiti kapkorosusyek kole kiy, poisyonigap eunekyik, anan koiit kole kiy kiit ne ki yai eng' moriikyik, anan keetiik che po ole kisaae, anan kanamonigap asiista." 
Isaiah17:9 Igeitu eng' peetuunooto nganasookyik che kiimeen komoswek che kigebagaakta eng' timiin, ak eng' tulweet parak, che kiga kebagaakta eng' taitap lagogap Israel, ak koek karaatya." 
Isaiah17:10 Amu kiutye Kamuktaindetap yetuneng'ung', ama ibwaat rwandetap kimnateng'ung'; igoole anyun keetiik che korooron, ak keetiik alak che teer;" 
Isaiah17:11 ing'ote eng' peetuutap kolseng'ung', ak igoochini koyesyo kesweguk karon; ago mwee kesisyet eng' peetuutap arageneet ak ne po nyalilda ne ng'waan." 
Isaiah17:12 Pwo! Polatetap piik che chaang', che morortos ko uu nyanjosyek! Pwo! Pororyosyek che rwaei ko uu rwaetap peek che kiimeen!" 
Isaiah17:13 Ruaei pororyosyek ko uu rwaetap peek che chaang', ago kerei kong' ineendet icheek, ak komwei kolooegitu. Ak keon ko uu meteteek che ibei usoonet eng' tuloonook, ak ko uu ye arureni temburyek eng' kipchurchuryet." 
Isaiah17:14 Ogeero, mi kamuiset koskoleny, ak kobetyo kotom koeech! Niito kebebertap icheek che luuleech, ak ko kebebertap icheek che rebenech." 
Isaiah18:1 Pwo! Emet ne tinyei kebebaik che cheitos, ne mi pitoniin eng' ainoosyegap Kush;" 
Isaiah18:2 ne iyooktoi piik che tononjin kobun nyanjet, eng' tuguuk che ki kiyae mutweek kobun peek parak, koleenji, “Oba okweek piik che kiyooktoi che chepcheben, agoi pororyet ne kooen piik ak ko ng'orng'oren, piik che imuisei kobooch taunennywa agoi, pororyet ne ikwaisei ak kotyegoti, ne pcheei ainoosyek emennywa!" 
Isaiah18:3 Okweek tugul che omenye ng'wony, ak okweek che omenye emet, ye kinamjin parak songolyet eng' tuloonook, ogeer! Ye kiguutei iryageet, oep iit!”" 
Isaiah18:4 Amu kamwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni koleenjo: “Asise, ak ageere eng' ole amenye, ko uu asiista ne ng'waan ne iluu miising', ko uu poldetap rewoot eng' kiptoretap peetuusyegap kesisyet.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Amu ye tomo kobiit kesisyet, ye kagobutyo taaptook, ak koek taaptook logoek che rurtos, kotile chepkeswet ole ing'atos, ak koep koisto mooriik che iwaktoi." 
Isaiah18:6 Kibagakyin icheek tugul toriitik che koroomen che po tuloonook, ak tyong'igap timiin. Ak koam toriitik che koroomen eng' kemei, ak koam tyong'ik tugul che po timiin eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet." 
Isaiah18:7 Ki ipchin eng' peetuunooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kagoochinet ne po piik che kooen ak ko ng'orng'oren, ak eng' piik che imuisei che neegit ak looen, pororyet ne kiim ak koterteerisyei, ne pcheei `ainoosyek emennywa, agoi tulweetap Zion, nooto komosta ne mi kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah19:1 Maotenet agobo Misiri. Ogeero, laanyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pooldet ne chepchep, ak nyoonei agoi Misiri. Ak kiitumdumgei kanamonigap Misiri eng' tainnyi, ak kochoot muguleldap Misiri eng' kwenunnyi." 
Isaiah19:2 Ak ang'eet Misiriik kobargei ak Misiriik, ak kobargei icheek, chii tugul ak tupchennyi, chii tugul ak chiitap kokwennyi, paregei nganaseet age ak age, ak kobargei laitornatet age ak age." 
Isaiah19:3 Ak tuun kiyaei koek puch kimnateet Misiri eng' kwenunnyi, ak ang'em kirwoogutikyik; ak koba kocheeng' kanamonik ak piik che abusisyei, ak che poisyee oik, ak pooniik." 
Isaiah19:4 Ak agoochi Misiriik kiptaiyat ne koroom koboi icheek; ak koboi icheek laitoryat ne koroom, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah19:5 Ak koteenyo peek eng' nyanjet, ak koteeny aineet ak koyaam." 
Isaiah19:6 Ak kobulyo ainoosyek, ak koteenyo ainoosyegap Misiri ak koyaamyo. Ak koresyo saosanik ak mutweek." 
Isaiah19:7 Ak koyaamyo morong'inik che mi aineetap aineet, che mi ngeguutap aineetap aineet, kobooto tugul che ki kimin eng' ole neegitee aineetap aineet, ak keip ak kobetyo ama kobiitu." 
Isaiah19:8 Tuun riirtos ramik che po njireenik, ak koteiyo icheek tugul che namei njireenik eng' aineetap aineet, ak kobetyi kimnateet icheek che wiirchin peek regereiywek che kiname njireenik." 
Isaiah19:9 Ililandos icheek che laei katanit ne karaaran, ak che taei ngoroik che leelach." 
Isaiah19:10 Ak koilyo tolochikyik kotonogis, ak koaragenso icheek tugul che ki kisir koyai poisyet." 
Isaiah19:11 Perberen miising' pounigap Zoan; kaabusak kirwoogetap kirwoogik che utaatiin miising' che po Pharaoh. Omwachindoi ano Pharaoh, oleenji, “Aa weeriitap che ng'oomen, weeriitap laitorinik che po keny”?" 
Isaiah19:12 Mi ano anyun piiguk che ng'oomen? Ingomwaun nguno ak koyai konaak kiit ne kogochop Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek agobo Misiri. 
Isaiah19:13 Kagoek che perber pounigap Zoan, ki kiberber pounigap Nop; che ki koitap luuita ne po pororyosyekyik kogogoochi Misiri komasta." 
Isaiah19:14 Kigoburukyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek muguleldap kamaaset eng' kwenunnyi; ak kogogoochi `icheek Misiri komasta eng' poisyennyi age tugul, ko uu ye terteryoti kibogityot kong'ung'u." 
Isaiah19:15 Ama komi poisyet age tugul agobo Misiri, ne imuuchi koyai metit anan katutyet, temetap sosyoot anan mutwot." 
Isaiah19:16 Eng' peetuunooto, ko kergeitu Misiri ak kwonyiik. Potani icheek ak koiyweisyei amu twaitwaetap eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ne twaitwai eng' paragunnyi." 
Isaiah19:17 Ak koek emetap Judah kamuiset eng' Misiri, ak iyweisyei age tugul ne kemwachin agobo nooto, amu chobetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ne ki chop kogirinda emonooto." 
Isaiah19:18 Tuun piitu eng' peetuunooto nganasook muutu eng' emetap Misiri che ng'alaali kutitap Kanaanik, ak koyasyechi kobunji che po iman eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek. Tuun kiguure age eng' chooto Nganaseetap ng'emisyet." 
Isaiah19:19 Tuun piitu eng' peetuunooto kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwenutap emetap Misiri, ak toloita ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi kiwotennyi." 
Isaiah19:20 Tuun egu nooto kaboorunet ak paornateet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' emetap Misiri. Tuun riirchin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu usiikwak, ak koyookyi icheek yetindet, kotoret, ak kosar icheek." 
Isaiah19:21 Ak konaak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Misiri, ak konai `Misiriik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto. Ilasune icheek koroseek ak kagoochinoik, ak koarorchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaarorunet, ak koyai kosulda." 
Isaiah19:22 Ak tuun pirei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Misiri, kobir ak kosoop; ak koweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kogasyi soomutikwak ak kosoop icheek." 
Isaiah19:23 Tuun piitu ooreet ne oo eng' peetuunooto ne ng'eetee Misiri agoi Assyria. Tuun pwoonei `piigap Assyria Misiri ak koba `Misiriik Assyria; ak kosa Misiriik kobooto piigap Assyria. 
Isaiah19:24 Egu ne po somok Israel eng' peetuunooto, kobooto Misiri ak Assyria, koek kaberuret eng' ng'wony." 
Isaiah19:25 Amu tuun iberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek icheek, koleen, iberuurotin piikyuk Misiri ak Assyria poisyetap eunekyuk, ak Israel porotennyu." 
Isaiah20:1 Eng' kenyiit ne ki wo Tartan Ashdod, ye ki iyookto Sorgon laitoryatap Assyria, kogiwo kobargei ak Ashdod, ak koluul;" 
Isaiah20:2 ki ng'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Isaiah weeriitap Amos, kole, “Ui ireegu kuniok che igermenegei, ak ireegu kweoniguk.” Ak ki yai ko uu nooto, kowendoot aach ngor ama tinyei kweonik." 
Isaiah20:2 ki ng'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Isaiah weeriitap Amos, kole, “Ui ireegu kuniok che igermenegei, ak ireegu kweoniguk.” Ak ki yai ko uu nooto, kowendoot aach ngor ama tinyei kweonik." 
Isaiah20:3 Yeityo komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye kogowendoot otwogindennyu Isaiah aach ngor ama tinyei kweonik kenyiisyek somok koek kaboorunet ak kwang'utyet eng' Misiri ak eng' Kush;" 
Isaiah20:4 ara imuti ko uu nooto laitoryatap Assyria luulenik che po Misiri ak luulenigap Kush, che mengech ak che oosen, komi aach ngor ama tinyei kweonik, kotaagu ngorook, ne kalilanetap Misiri." 
Isaiah20:5 Koaragenso ak kolilaanso icheek, amu ki imang'u Kush, ak kitoroornatennywa Misiri." 
Isaiah20:6 Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun mwaei che menyei emoni po ngeguut, kole, “Ogeero, kamang'unennyo niito, ne ki kimwechi agobo toreteet si kobiit kesarwech eng' laitoryatap Assyria! Ak acheek anyun, kechilildoi ano?”" 
Isaiah21:1 Maonateet agobo ong'ateet ne po nyanjet. Ko uu ye ibuksei kipchurchuryet ne punu murot tai, kobunu kapookyinindet ko uu nooto surkwen, punu emetap kamuiset." 
Isaiah21:2 Kagiboorwo ng'ang'utyet ne ng'waan; iberberisyei kaberberindet, ak kong'emisyei ng'emindet. Togoste, ee Elam, yiemisye ee Media! Kaawong'u tigenoikyik tugul." 
Isaiah21:3 Kanyi anyun arageneet suennyu; kanama ng'waninwek, ko uu ng'waninwegap kwondo ne machei kosigiis. Ama kot koma muuchi agasta, Aarageni kot koma muuchi ageerto." 
Isaiah21:4 Rukrugeni muguleldanyu, kagomua toptobenet; kawalak poiboiyennyu koek potanet." 
Isaiah21:5 Iitoi meset, indoi riibiik, amisyei, eeisei. Ong'eetyee, okweek pounik, oiil long'onik!" 
Isaiah21:6 Amu kamwaiwo Kiptaiyat kole: “Ui, inde riibindet; si komwae ineendet kiit ne keerei." 
Isaiah21:7 Ye keer lugeet, piik che ketei paraisisyek kobwanune aeng', che laanyei sigirok, che laanyei tambeesik, koep iit komyee eng' kagiiletapkei.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Yeityo kowaach ineendet ko uu ng'etundo kole, “Ee Kiptaiyat, atononi kotugul eng' teekseet ne kooi ne kiriipse peet, ak kindea ole ariipsee kemousyek tugul." 
Isaiah21:9 Keero, pwoonei piigap lugeet, piik che ketei paraisisyek che pwonune aeng'!” Ak ki wol ineendet kole, “Kagoluul Babilon, kagoluul! Kagoilyo itoonwek tugul che ki kiwai che po kanamonikyik koba ng'wony.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Ee inyee, kesisyennyu ak peek che po ole kituisye, kaamwaiwok che ki agas eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Isaiah21:11 Maonateet agobo Duma. Kuura age eng' Seir, kole, “Riibindoni, egu nee kemoi? Riibindoni, egu nee kemoi?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Mwaei riibindet kole, “Kagoeech, ak konyonei kogeny kemout. Ngot omache oteep, oteep; oweege, obwa.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Maonateet agobo Arabia. Omenye timiin eng' Arabia, ee okweek che rutoi che po Dedanik." 
Isaiah21:14 Oipchi peek icheek che amei melel; otorooktae amitwogik piik che kimweei, okweek piik che menyei emetap Tema." 
Isaiah21:15 Amu ki mwee icheek rotoogap chok, rotwetap chok ne kaging'us, kwanget ne kaging'i, ak eng' ng'wanindap lugeet." 
Isaiah21:16 Amu kagomwaiwo Kiptaiyat kole, “Kotom kogeskei kenyiit agenge, ko uu kenyiisyegap otwogindet ne kisirei, kowong'ugei toroornatet tugul ne po Kedar." 
Isaiah21:17 Ng'ering'itu anyun che ng'etu eng' mwogik ak murenik che kiimeen che po piigap Kedar.” Amu kagomwa niito Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Isaiah22:1 Maonateet agobo atebweetap ng'ang'utyet. Amin nee anyun, kot itogoste kooriik parak?" 
Isaiah22:2 Ee inyee ne nyiitaat polatosyegap piik, nganaseet ne nyiitaat wasetapkei ak nganaseet ne paibai! Ma kibare piiguk rotwetap chok, ama pegu eng' lugeet." 
Isaiah22:3 Kimwei kibagenge pouniguk, ki rat mwogik icheek. Ki kirat tugul che ki kinyoor eng' okweek, ki mweiso icheek kolooegitu." 
Isaiah22:4 Ki amwa anyun ale, welelgei amegeera, si ariir eng' ng'wanindo; matibirtegei ile igaigaa, amu luuleetap cheptap piikyuk." 
Isaiah22:5 Amu punu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek peetuutap nyalilda ni, ne po tyeget ak ne po kaimetapkei eng' atebweetap ng'ang'utyet, peetuutap putetap irimoik, ak riirek che ki riirchin tuloonook." 
Isaiah22:6 Ki ip Elam motyet, kobooto kariisyek che po lugeet ak piik che ketei paraisisyek; ak ki ng'aany Kir long'eet." 
Isaiah22:7 Ki nyi atebwosyeguk che myach kariisyek che po lugeet, ak kitetkei piik che ki laanyei paraisisyek eng' ormariichet." 
Isaiah22:8 Ak ki isto ineendet kiit ne kituchei Judah. Ki igeer inyee eng' peetuunooto kariigap lugeet eng' koot ne mi timiin. 
Isaiah22:9 Ki ogeer ole chaang' ole ki kobutogis eng' nganaseetap Daudi, ak oyum peegap tamboiyot ne mi ng'wony." 
Isaiah22:10 Ak oiit kooriigap Jerusalem, ak obut kooriik si kobiit ogimiit irimeet." 
Isaiah22:11 Ki obal keriingetap peek eng' kwenutap irimoik aeng', si korootyi peegap tamboiyot ne po keny. Ago ma ogeer ineendet ne kiyaei niito, amoiit ole kiy ineendet ne kiyaei niito keny." 
Isaiah22:12 Eng' peetuunooto ko ki kuurso Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, si kobiit oriirye ak oteiye, si ocheru metowek ak olaach kuniok." 
Isaiah22:13 Ak ogeero, poiboiyet ak kagasetapkei, eng'seetap keechiirek ak ne po tuuga, oame panyeek ak oee divaik. “Ongeamisye ak keeise, amu kibegu mutai.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Ki ng'aang'jigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek itiikyuk koleen: “Ma kitiliilok iman eng' yaityoni kot obegu,” mwaei Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah22:15 Kamwa ko uu ni Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kole ui ole mi ne riibei tuguuk, kap Sebna, ne pou koot, ak ileenji:" 
Isaiah22:16 Iyae nee eng' yu? Omi ak ng'oo yu, kot ibaljige kererit eng' olito? Ko uu ne paljingei kererit eng' ole po parak, ne paljingei ole menyei eng' rwandet!" 
Isaiah22:17 Keero, wiirtoin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet ko uu chiito ne kiim; ee, taain miising'." 
Isaiah22:18 Weleljiningei iman ak kowiirten iwe parak ko uu tagurgurwet eng' emet ne paraa; imechini olooto, ak tebee olooto kariisyegap lugeet che po toroornateng'ung', inyeendet teweernatetap kootap kiptaiyandeng'ung'." 
Isaiah22:19 Aoonin eng' poisyeng'ung', ak kong'usun inyoo ng'wony." 
Isaiah22:20 Ak aguur otwogindennyu Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah eng' peetuunooto," 
Isaiah22:21 alaakyi ineendet ngoryeeng'ung', ak agimiite ineendet pireneng'ung' ak agoochi ineendet pounateng'ung'. Egu ineendet kwandap piik che menyei Jerusalem ak ne po kootap Judah." 
Isaiah22:22 Andoi tigikyennyi yaateiwotap kootap Daudi; ak yaatei ineendet, ama mi chii ne kerei; ak kerei ineendet, ama mi chii ne yaatei." 
Isaiah22:23 Ak agiich ineendet ko uu kipchumaryat eng' ole kiim; ak koek ng'echereetap toroornatet eng' kootap kwandanyi. 
Isaiah22:24 Ak kolaakyi icheek ineendet toroornatet tugul ne po kootap kwandanyi, iyoteet ak lagok, tereet age tugul ne ming'in, kobooch tuguugap kigombok agoi chuboinik tugul." 
Isaiah22:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, ki istoi eng' peetuunooto kipchumaryat ne ki kagigiich eng' ole kiim; ak keep, ak koluul, ak keisto nyigiisindo ne ki tinyei; amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor niito." 
Isaiah23:1 Maonateet agobo Tyro. Oteiye okweek melisyegap Tarsis; amu kageng'em kot koma komi koot, anan ole kibunei kebendi oriit. Ki king'aang'ji icheek ng'olyoondoniito eng' emetap Kitim." 
Isaiah23:2 Osisye, okweek che omenye ole po ngeguut; ne ki ibun tuguuk chemung'arainigap Sidon, che kilong'une nyanjet." 
Isaiah23:3 Keljinennyi ko ki iyoteetap Sihor ne ki punu peek che chaang', nooto ko kesisyetap aineet; ak ki ye mi ole keyae mung'aaret ne po pororyosyek." 
Isaiah23:4 Ililan, ee Sidon, amu kagong'alaal nyanjet, irimeetap nyanjet kole: “Tom anyooru ng'wanindo anan asigisye, tomo abai murenik anan pergeinik.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Ye iit ng'aleek Misiri, konyooru icheek ng'wanindo ne oo miising' eng' ng'aleegap Tyro." 
Isaiah23:6 Olande Tarsis; oteiye, okweek che omenye ngeguut." 
Isaiah23:7 Tos nganaseng'wong' ni ne po poiboiyet, ne ki mi kobooch keny, ne ki imut keelyekyik kwo ole loo?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ng'oo ne ki chop ng'olyoondoniito agobo Tyro, ne ilaakyin piik kutonook, che chemung'arainikyik ko pounik, che aldaikyik ko piik che konyitotiin che po ng'wony?" 
Isaiah23:9 Ki kochop nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, si kobiit komurwon menoteet tugul ne po toroornatet, ak koteweer piik tugul che konyitotiin che po ng'wony." 
Isaiah23:10 Pun emeng'ung' ko uu aineet, ee cheptap Tarsis; ma itinye pireneet kogeny." 
Isaiah23:11 Kigotokyi eunnyi nyanjet, ki kotumdum pounatosyegap laitorinik. Kigon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'atuutyet agobo Kanaan, kole, keng'em irimoikyik." 
Isaiah23:12 Ki le ma iboiboitu inyee, ee ne ii pergeiyat, cheptap Sidon ne kiusei! Ng'eet, lande, ui Kitim; ago menyooru kamuung'et agot eng' olooto." 
Isaiah23:13 Ogeero, emetap Kaldeik; ma komi pichooto; Ki kochopchi Assyrianindet emonooto tyong'igap surkwen. Ki teech teeksosyekwak che kooen, kibut kooriikyik che po laitorinik, Ki kong'em." 
Isaiah23:14 Oteiye, okweek melisyegap Tarsis; amu kigeng'em irimeng'wong' kigees." 
Isaiah23:15 Tuun kiutye Tyro kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap eng' peetuusyechooto, ko uu peetuusyegap laitoryat agenge. Ago eng' kagesunetap kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap, koigei Tyro kiit ne uu tyendap chepkugoniot:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Nam ketubet, ak iwendote nganaseet, inyee chepkugoniot ne kigeutyenen! Tyen korur, tyen tyenwogik che chaang', si kibwaatin.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Ak ye ibata kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisabu, koityi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pireet Tyro, si koweek konyoor mung'arennyi, si koyai kugoinatennyi kobooto laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony eng' emet." 
Isaiah23:18 Ak koek mung'arennyi ak melektanyi tiliilindo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ma kigonori ama kibasei, amu punjin mung'arennyi icheek che menyei taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si koam kobiyong'so, ak kolaach ngoroik che po telunateet." 
Isaiah24:1 Ogeero, yaei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'wony koek ole ma mi kiy ak koek surkwen, ak kogabui, ak koseer piik che menyei olooto." 
Isaiah24:2 Ak kiit ne uu eng' piik, ko uu nooto eng' tisiindet; kiit ne uu eng' otwogindet, ko uu nooto eng' kiptaiyandennyi; kiit ne uu eng' otwogindet ne chepto, ko uu nooto eng' chebyoset ne pou ineendet; kiit ne uu eng' alindet, ko uu nooto eng' aldaindet; kiit ne uu eng' chiito ne pesendoi, ko uu nooto eng' pesenindet; kiit ne uu eng' ne ibei keljinet ne siirei, ko uu nooto eng' ne igoochin ineendet." 
Isaiah24:3 Ki yai emet koek ne ma tinyei kiy ak keng'em; amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito. 
Isaiah24:4 Arageni ng'wony ak kowong'kei, nyaluli ng'wony ak kowong'kei, nyalildos piik che mendos che po ng'wony." 
Isaiah24:5 Ki kimurwon ng'wony amu piik che menyei; amu ki kobistoe ng'atuutik, ki kowal kirwoogutik, ki kobut kayomiset ne po koigeny." 
Isaiah24:6 Ki koam anyun chubisyet ng'wony, ak ki konam ng'oogisto che menyei. Ki kibeel piik che menyei ng'wony, ak ki ng'et che ng'ering'." 
Isaiah24:7 Riirtos divaik che leelach, restos keetiigap sabibuk, tigendos tugul che igasegei." 
Isaiah24:8 Siisei kagasetapkei ne po sugutit ne ming'in, igeesugei polatetap icheeget che poiboi, siisei poiboiyetap ketubet." 
Isaiah24:9 Ma koeei divaik kotyendos; ng'woneegitu maiyek eng' icheeget che eei. 
Isaiah24:10 Kigebut nganaseet ne mi chemargeet; kigerei koot age tugul, si ma nyo chii ko." 
Isaiah24:11 Mi riirek ortinwek amu divaik; kagoimenit poiboiyet tugul, ki kobet poiboiyet eng' emet." 
Isaiah24:12 Ng'etu kubernateet eng' nganaseet, ak kebare ormariichet ng'emisyet." 
Isaiah24:13 Amu egu ko uu nooto eng' ng'wony ak eng' pororyosyek, ko uu ye kitumdumi mseituni, ko uu turisyetap sabibuk ye kagogeskei kesisyet." 
Isaiah24:14 Waaktos chuuto, tyendos miising' eng' poiboiyet; tyendos amu etunatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch cherongo." 
Isaiah24:15 Otoroor anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kong'asiis, otoroor kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, eng' ngeguusyegap nyanjet." 
Isaiah24:16 Kigegas tyenwogik che punu ole poochin ng'wony, koleen: po toroornatet Ineendet ne po imanda. Ago ki ale, asagiti, asagiti, pwo eng' anee! Ki koberberis kaberberik, ee, ki koberberis miising' kaberberik." 
Isaiah24:17 Kanyonjin kaiyweisyet ak keriinget ak mesteet, ee inyee ne imenye ng'wony." 
Isaiah24:18 Ineendet ne mwee polatetap kaiyweisyet kobutyi keriinget; ak ineendet ne togosune keriinget konamei mesteet. Amu yaatatin tirisyok eng' parak, ak potandos lumeiywegap ng'wony." 
Isaiah24:19 Ki kobutok ng'wony miising', ki kobetak ng'wony miising', kigo tumdumgei ng'wony miising'." 
Isaiah24:20 Terteryoti ng'wony ko uu chiito ne kabogit, ak keistoot kwo komosi ak komosi ko uu koot; ak konyigiisityi pistoennyi, ak kobut, ama kong'eetei kogeny." 
Isaiah24:21 Ak tuun pirei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto eng' parak lugeetap icheeget che torooreen, ak kobir laitorinigap ng'wony eng' ng'wony." 
Isaiah24:22 Kiyum icheek tugul, ko uu ye kiyumi kimonjororinik eng' keriinget, ak kegerchi korgoreet, ak ye kagobata peetuusyek che chaang', kebir." 
Isaiah24:23 Ak kotoptoben arawet, ak kolilaan asiista; amu laitorani Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' tulweetap Zion ak eng' Jerusalem, ak eng' taitap poisyekyik." 
Isaiah25:1 Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ii Kamuktaindennyu; atoroorin, alasu kaineng'ung'; amu ki iyai tuguuk che kikwong'ee, kirwoogutik che po keny, eng' kagesunatetapkei ak eng' imanit." 
Isaiah25:2 Amu ki iyai nganaseet koek karurugutyet; ki iyai nganaseet ne ng'ootaat koek karaatya. Ki iyai kootap laitoryat ne po toek koek ole ma mi nganaseet; ma koi ta keteech kogeny. 
Isaiah25:3 Konyitin anyun piik che kiimeen, iywein nganaseet ne po pororyosyek che imuisei." 
Isaiah25:4 Amu ki iegu irimeetap kibananiat, irimeetap ne ma tinyei kiy eng' pichiindanyi, ii ole kimwechin eng' usoonet ole kiuure eng' kiptoret. Ye igei usoonetap che imuisei, usoonet ne oo ne rusei inaat." 
Isaiah25:5 Iming'ini polatetap toek ko uu kiptoret eng' ole yaamaat; kinyeroti tyendap che imuisei ko uu kiptoret eng' tulugenet. 
Isaiah25:6 Eng' tulwooni ko tuun yachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek pororyosyek tugul, igoorto ne po tuguuk che akwaen ak divaik che ki kotebi keny, ne po tuguuk che akwaen che nyiitootiin mwanik, ne po divaik che korooron." 
Isaiah25:7 Tuun ng'emei ineendet eng' tulwooni kiit ne kituge piik tugul, ak angeet ne ki kituge pororyosyek tugul." 
Isaiah25:8 Ki kolugui ineendet meet koigeny. Tuun ibuchi Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peegap kong' eng' togoochik tugul; ak koisto teweernatetap piikyik eng' ng'wony komugul. Amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor niito. 
Isaiah25:9 Ak tuun kimwaei eng' peetuunooto keele, “Ogeero, niito ko Kamuktaindennyo; ki kigen ineendet, ak sarwech ineendet. Niito ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki kigen ineendet, kigasigei ak keboiboitu eng' yetunennyi.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Amu imuunyi eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tulwooni, ak ketyekyi ng'wony Moab eng' oldanyi, ko uu ye kityekyin ng'wony mobeek eng' peegap kapng'atat." 
Isaiah25:11 Agot ngo iitoochi eunekyik kwenunnywa, ko uu ye iitoi eunekyik ineendet ne pirei peek, kiming'ini menatennyi kobooto ng'aalsetap eunekyik." 
Isaiah25:12 Ak kagobut ole ng'ootaat ne po teekseet ne kooi, ne po irimoiguk, kagoluul, kagowiirtagei kwo ng'wony, ole miitei temburyek." 
Isaiah26:1 Tuun kityeni tyeni eng' emetap Judah eng' peetuunooto: Ki tinyei acheek nganaseet ne kiim; ng'atei ineendet yetunet koek inatusyek ak irimoik. 
Isaiah26:2 Oyat ormariichok, si kobiit kobun kwo oriit pororyet ne po iman, ne riibei imanit." 
Isaiah26:3 Iriibe ineendet kotebee kaalyeet ne ititaat, ineendet ne tienengei kabwautuikyik, amu imang'un." 
Isaiah26:4 Omang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koigeny, amu mi eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rwandet ne po koigeny." 
Isaiah26:5 Amu kigochoor ineendet icheek che menyei ole toroor, kigochoor nganaseet ne toroor. Iluuli ineendet nganaseet; iluuli agoi temburyek ng'ung'unyek." 
Isaiah26:6 Kityechei; tyechei kibananiat, ak ne ma tinyei kiy." 
Isaiah26:7 Litit ooreetap ineendet ne po iman; inyee ne ii litit, indochini ortinwegap chiito ne po iman." 
Isaiah26:8 Eng' ooreetap kirwoogutiguk; Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki kigenin, makyingei saboonwekyok kaineng'ung' ak kabwaateng'ung'." 
Isaiah26:9 Amachin eng' saboondanyu kemoi; acheeng'in eng' saboondanyu kotom koeech. Amu ye mi ng'wony kirwoogutiguk, koneetegei che menyei ng'wony imanda." 
Isaiah26:10 Agot nda kiboorchi chameet kiptengekyot, koma ineetigei imanda kora; yaei ineendet ne ma po iman eng' emetap imanda, ama keerei telunatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah26:11 Kasutok eung'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama keerei icheek. Ago keerei kagiileng'ung' pogei agobo piik ak kolilaanso. Ee, laldos puuniguk." 
Isaiah26:12 Inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ing'atwech kaalyeet amu inyee ne ki iyaiywech kogeny poisyonikyok tugul. 
Isaiah26:13 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ki koboiywech kiptainik alak; ago acheek kemwae kaineng'ung' inyee, inyegei." 
Isaiah26:14 Ki kobek icheek, ma kosaptos; ki kobek, ma kong'eetos. Ki inyonji anyun ak ing'em icheek, ak ki igoochi kolus kabwaatet age tugul agobo icheek." 
Isaiah26:15 Ki ites pororyet, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki ites pororyet kobarait; ii ne itoroorot; ki ites kobaraitu kiwotosyek tugul che po emet." 
Isaiah26:16 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki kobwonjin icheek eng' nyalilda, kisaain ye kiitigon icheek." 
Isaiah26:17 Ko uu kwondo ne tamono, ne kagoriik peetuusyek che chute ko, ye mi eng' ng'wanindo ak koriirei; ki kiuu nooto agacheek eng' taing'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah26:18 Ki kimonogotin, ki kimi ng'wanindo, uu keele, ki kisich usoonet kityo; Tom keyai saruunet age tugul eng' ng'wony; ama ibutyo piigap ng'wony." 
Isaiah26:19 Tuun saptos cheguuk che ki kobek; ng'eetos muuswekyuk. Ong'eetyee ak otyen, okweek che omenye ng'ung'unyek! Amu uu rewondeng'ung' rewootap ingweek, ak koonu ng'wony che ki kobek." 
Isaiah26:20 Obwa, piikyuk, mong'ji kooriguk oriit, ak ogerchigei ko. Ounyge ne matya, agoi kosiirto nereegek." 
Isaiah26:21 Amu mong'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' oldanyi si kobiit kobir che menyei ng'wony amu yaityennywa. Ng'aanyei ng'wony kogeny korotiikyik, ama kotuchei piikyik che ki kibar." 
Isaiah27:1 Tuun pirei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto eng' rotwennyi ne po chok ne koroom ak ko oo ak kogim, tyondo ne po peek ne uu ting'ong'et, ne ereneet ne chepchep, ak tyonyooto ne ereneet ne taategei; ak kobar maswetit ne mi nyanjet." 
Isaiah27:2 Eng' peetuunooto, “Otyenji anyun mbareetap sabibuk ne po divaik." 
Isaiah27:3 Anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ariibe; abisi kotugul, ariibe kemoi ak peet si ma ng'em chii." 
Isaiah27:4 Ma tinyei nereegek che ng'woneen. Kata myee nda koboryena katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich! Ta katyegoti icheek, ta kabeele tugul." 
Isaiah27:5 Anan konam ineendet kimnateennyu, si koyai kaalyeet kobooto; ee, ingoyai ineendet kaalyeet kobooto.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Kimitu Jakobo eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei; piitei Israel ak kong'at, ak konyiit ng'wony logoek." 
Isaiah27:7 Tos kabir ineendet ko uu ye kibir `icheek ineendet? Anan kagibar ineendet ko uu parisyetap icheek che ki par ineendet? 
Isaiah27:8 Ki oborye ak ineendet ne yamei, ye ki ioone; ki isto ineendet eng' usoonennyi ne ng'waan eng' peetuutap usoonetap kong'asiis." 
Isaiah27:9 Tuun kiuundoi anyun eng' niito yaityetap Jakobo, ak chuuto ko logoek tugul che ki istoe tengektanyi; ye kagoyai koik tugul che po kaptisisyet kogergeit ak taartaarik che ki kitui, kot koma kong'eetos kogeny keetiik che po ole kisaae ak itoonwegap asiista." 
Isaiah27:10 Amu mi ineegei nganaseet ne ng'ootaat, meng'ooteet ne kigeue ak kemeto, ne uu surkwen; agete yooto moita, ak koru yooto, ak koam mooriikyik." 
Isaiah27:11 Ye kagoresyo mooriikyik, koilyo; pwoonei kwonyiik ak kobeel. Amu pororyot ne ma tinyei kaguiyet; nooto anyun ma riiree icheek `ineendet ne kiyai, ama tiytiy icheek `ineendet ne kimimii." 
Isaiah27:12 Tuun pirei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto logoekyik korara, kobooch nyiietap Aineetap Yufrets agoi kererutap Misiri, ak kiyumak agenge agenge, ee okweek lagogap Israel." 
Isaiah27:13 Ak tuun kiguutei iryageet ne oo eng' peetuunooto; icheek che kinegit kolusyo eng' emetap Assyria kobooto che kigetimda eng' emetap Misiri ko tuun pwoonei kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tulweet ne tiliil eng' Jerusalem. 
Isaiah28:1 Pwo eng' chepkuletap menoteet ne po kibogitinigap Ephraim, ak eng' taapteet ne resei ne po karaaranindap laitornatennyi, ne mi metitap atebweet ne akwai ne po icheek che ki koterter divaik!" 
Isaiah28:2 Ogeero, tinyei `Kiptaiyat chiito age ne nyigan ak ko kiim; ko uu usoonetap roptap koik, usoonet ne ng'emisyei, ko uu usoonetap peek che kiimeen, che ing'irtogei, wiirchin ng'wony ko uu nooto eng' eunnyi." 
Isaiah28:3 Kityekyin ng'wony chepkuletap menoteet ne po kibogitinigap Ephraim; 
Isaiah28:4 kergeitu taapteet ne resei ne po karaaranindap toroornatennyi, ne miitei metitap atebweet ne akwai, kergeitu ak logoiyatap mogoywet ne sip korure ko tomo kobiit kemeut; ne ye keer chii koam anyun eng' yooto kota komi eunnyi." 
Isaiah28:5 Egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' peetuunooto naaryeet ne po toroornatet, ak kuutweetap telunateet, eng' piikyik che ng'etu;" 
Isaiah28:6 ak kondochi kirwoogik eng' kap kirwooget koyai imanda, ak koek kimnateetap riibiigap nganaseet." 
Isaiah28:7 Ago ki kochiliil chuuto ak icheek amu divaik, ak ki komaasta amu maiyek; ki kochiliil tisiindet ak maotyot amu maiyek, ki komaaluuch divaik icheek, ki komaasta amu maiyek; ichiliili eng' ng'ang'utyet, ibutos eng' kirwooget." 
Isaiah28:8 Amu kigonyi mesosyek tugul kang'ung'daik ak simwek, ma mi ole-tiliil." 
Isaiah28:9 “Ineeti ng'oo ineendet naet? Ak ng'oo ne igoochin koguiyo ng'aleek? Icheek che kigeluge, che kigeete kochuchun?" 
Isaiah28:10 Amu kineeti ng'atuutyet kegetyingei ng'atuutyet, ng'atuutyet eng' ng'atuutyet; kineeti kaneetisyet kegetyingei kaneetisyet, kaneetisyet eng' kaneetisyet; kitigin eng' oli, kitigin eng' olo.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Ago ng'alaaljin iman pichu eng' kutusweegap toek ak eng' kutit age; 
Isaiah28:12 che ki mwachi ineendet koleenji, “Kamuung'et niito, ogoochi kamuung'et ineendet ne ng'etat; ak kasoobet niito;” ago ma cham kogas." 
Isaiah28:13 Nooto anyun, egu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' icheek ng'atuutyet ne kineeti kegetyingei ng'atuutyet, ng'atuutyet eng' ng'atuutyet; kaneetisyet ne kineeti kegetyingei kaneetisyet, kaneetisyet eng' kaneetisyet; kitigin eng' oli, kitigin eng' olooto; si koba kobee patai kobutyo, ak koilyo, kenam eng' mesteet, ak kimut." 
Isaiah28:14 Ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor okweek piik saasiik, che obou pichu menyei Jerusalem." 
Isaiah28:15 Amu ki omwa ole, “Ki kiyomiske ak meet, ak ki kiyanjine ak ye mi meet; ye siirto pireet ne oo, koma ityinech; amu ki keyai lembechek koek ole kimwechini, ak ki kiung'egei lembeita;”" 
Isaiah28:16 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Ogeero, andoi Zion koita koek lumeiywot, koita ne kigetyem, koita ne po kamanuutyet ne oo ne po luuita, lumeiywot ne kiim; ma igirgiri ne iyani." 
Isaiah28:17 Ak ayai kirwooget koek kiit ne litit, ak ayai imanda koek porowet ne kilititisye. Ak kobukto koigap ropta ole mwechin ne po lembechek, ak komarane peek ole kiung'egei." 
Isaiah28:18 Yeityo kewal kayomiseng'wong' ne ki oyomiske ak meet koek puch, ama tononi kayanjineng'wong' ne ki oyanjine ak ye mi meet. Ye siirto pireet ne oo, ketyegatak anyun eng' yooto." 
Isaiah28:19 Ibok eng' peetuut age tugul ye siirtoi; amu siirtoi karonet age tugul peet ak kemoi; ak egu kamuiset kityo ye ogase ng'aleek. 
Isaiah28:20 Amu nwagitu itoogut kosiir ne imuuchi koiitoegei chiito; ak kotendenit kiit ne ketugegei kot kosiir ne yamei kotugegei chiito. 
Isaiah28:21 Amu ng'eetei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu eng' tulweetap Perasim, nereechi ko uu eng' atebweetap Gibeon; si kobiit koyai poisyennyi, poisyennyi ne teer, ak kogees poisyennyi, poisyennyi ne teer." 
Isaiah28:22 Nooto anyun, amat oegu saasiik, si ma kigiich ratuutikwok amu ki agas kagesunet ne kigeng'at, ne punu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Isaiah28:23 Oep iit, ogas kutinnyu; oep iit, ogas ng'aleekyuk." 
Isaiah28:24 Tos ibatisyei chiito ne ibatisyei kotugul si kogool? Tos ibati ak kobirei mogooroonik kotugul che po mbareennyi? 
Isaiah28:25 Ye kagobirok mbaranooto komyeeit, ko tos maletoi kesweegap ingweek ak kogool kamon, ak kogoolji nganuuk ortinwek, ak kogoolji baale ole ki kilewenji, ak peek alak che kiguure kusemet eng' tabanwekyik?" 
Isaiah28:26 Amu itigoni ineendet komyee, ak koneet Kamuktaindennyi." 
Isaiah28:27 Amu ma kibore kesweegap ingweek kiit ne ng'atip, ama kimildoe keldap chepkichutit kamon; ago kibiree kirokto keswechooto, ak kibiree keetit kamon." 
Isaiah28:28 King'oe nganuuk che kikwanyei; amu ma kiborei kotugul; agot ngo seer keldap chepkichutinnyi ak paraisisyekyik, ko mang'aei." 
Isaiah28:29 Punu niito agine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ne kikwong'ee kirwoogennyi, ak kogesunotkei eng' utaatyet." 
Isaiah29:1 Pwo eng' Jerusalem, Jerusalem, nganaseet ne ki menyei Daudi! Otes kenyiit eng' kenyiit; ingorubatkei igoorwek." 
Isaiah29:2 Ak aiim anyun Jerusalem, ak kobiit riirek ak kateiyet, ak koigeit ineendet eng' anee Ariel." 
Isaiah29:3 Amu amuutin komoswek tugul, ak ayiemenen teeksosyek che kooen, ak ateech irimoik si kebarge." 
Isaiah29:4 Ak kinyeratin, ak ing'alaal imi ng'ung'unyek, ak kinyerat ng'aleeguk komang'une temburyek; ak kogergeit tweguuneng'ung' ak chiito ne poisyee oik, ne mang'une ng'ung'unyek, ak ichaam ng'aleeguk eng' temburyek." 
Isaiah29:5 Ago kergeitu chaang'indap puuniguk ak ng'ung'unyek che pusbus, ak kogergeit chaang'indap che imuisei ak meteteek che arureni. Piitu, ee eng' cheiset," 
Isaiah29:6 nyoonjin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ineendet eng' tuleet, eng' potaneetap ng'wony ak polateet ne oo ak kipchurchuryet, kobooto usoonet ne oo, ak liplibenetap maat ne peelsei." 
Isaiah29:7 Ak kogergeit chaang'indap pororyosyek tugul che paregei ak Jerusalem, icheek tugul che paregei ak ineendet ak irimennyi, ak che inyalili ineendet, ak karwotitoet, ne ng'ang'utyet ne po kemoi." 
Isaiah29:8 Kergergeitu ak ye irwotitoi chiito ne amei rubeet, koleen amisyei; ago ye kosu, komi puch saboondanyi, anan korgergeit ak ye irwotitoi chiito ne amei melel, koleen eeisei; ago ye kosu, ko tanui, ak machei saboondanyi koee, uu nooto anyun chaang'indap pororyosyek tugul che paregei ak tulweetap Zion." 
Isaiah29:9 Ogenisye ak okwong'ye; oyai ko uu ye omache ak ogorie! Kabogityo, ago ma eng' divaik; terteryoti, ago ma eng' maiyek." 
Isaiah29:10 Amu kirong'jok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor rwondo ne nyigiis, ki kogeer konyekwok, okweek maotik, ak ki kotuch kandoikwok, chooto ko keerik." 
Isaiah29:11 Ak kagergeit eng' okweek ng'ang'utyet tugul ak ng'aleegap bukuit ne ki king'ooch, ne igoochin piik chiito ne ineetat, koleenji, “Asoomin ale, soman bukuini,” ak kole, “Ma muuchi, amu ki king'ooch.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Yeityo kigoochi chiito ne ma ineetat, keleenji, “Asoomin ale, soman bukuini,” ak kole, “Ma aa chii ne ineetat.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Ki le Kiptaiyat: Amu riikyino pichu kong'alaalwo, ak kogonyita eng' kutusweekwak, ago kigoisto mugulelwekwak kolooegitu eng' anee, ak kaiyweisyet ne iywea ko ng'atuutyet ne ki ineeti piik icheek;" 
Isaiah29:14 Ara anyun, ayae poisyet ne kitang'aang'jin eng' kwenutap pichu, poisyet ne kitang'aang'jin ak kekwong'ee. Ak kobet utaatyetap piikwak che utaatiin, ak keuny kaguiyetap piikwak che ng'oomen." 
Isaiah29:15 Pwo eng' icheek che cheeng'ei miising' koung'e Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogennywa, ak mi poisyonikwak mesundeito, ak mwaei koleen, “Ng'oo ne keerech? Ng'oo ne ingenech?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Ogabui tuguuk! Tos kiroge cheptereniot meneet? Imuuchi komwa kiit ne ki kiyaei agobo ineendet ne kiyaei, kole, “Ki ma koyaa,” anan komwa kiit ne ki kinamdos agobo ineendet ne ki inamdos, kole, “Ma tinyei ineendet kaguiyet”?" 
Isaiah29:17 Tos ma mi poroindo kitigin, si kewal Lebanon koek mbareet ne rurei kot, ak kiit mbareet ne rurei koek timiin?" 
Isaiah29:18 Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun kasei ng'aleegap bukuit piik che ma kastoi, ak kogeerto eng' mesundeito ne oo ak eng' ole imen konyegap che koryotiin." 
Isaiah29:19 Tesei kogeny poiboiyennywa eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, piik che iming'inegei, ak koboiboitune piik che ponoon, Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah29:20 Amu kiyaei ineendet ne imuisei koek puch, ak kosiis sasindet, ak keisto piik tugul che igeni yaityet;" 
Isaiah29:21 che igoochin piik kochalwogense ng'aleekwak, ak koriich mesteet agobo ineendet ne itigonisyei eng' ormariichet, ak komaas chiito ne po iman eng' kiit ne po puch." 
Isaiah29:22 Mwaei ko uu ni anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki ityaach Abraham, agobo kootap Jakobo, kole ma kolilani anyun Jakobo, ama koarageni kogeny." 
Isaiah29:23 Ago ye keer ineendet lagokyik, nooto ko poisyetap eunekyuk, che mi kwenunnyi, kotabaan kainennyu; itabaani Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Jakobo, ak koywei Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Isaiah29:24 Nyooru kaguiyet ak icheek icheeget che ichiliili eng' mugulel, ak koneetkei kaneetisyet icheek che ing'unyng'ung'dos." 
Isaiah30:1 Pwo eng' lagok che ngelel, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che tilei ng'aleek, ama eng' anee; ak che tuchegei, ama eng' kabuusennyu, si kobiit kotes tengekto eng' tengekto;" 
Isaiah30:2 che ng'eetos kochorchingei Misiri, ama teebena; che igimitegei kimnateetap Pharaoh, ak komong' urwetap Misiri." 
Isaiah30:3 Egu anyun kimnateetap Pharaoh kalilaneng'wong', ak koek kamang'unet ne omang'u urwetap Misiri, toiyeng'wong'." 
Isaiah30:4 Amu mi pounikyik Zoan, ak kagobwa tononjinikyik Hanes." 
Isaiah30:5 Ililandos tugul agobo piik che ma imuuchi konyoorunee kiy, che ma toreteet, anan ko kelunet, ago egu kalilanet ak chotisyet." 
Isaiah30:6 Maonateet agobo tyong'ik che po murot tai. Punei emetap nyalilda ak ng'wanindo, ole punu ng'etundo ne kotoy, ak ne kirgit, ereneet ak ereneet ne tirireni, ne uu maat, ibe mogornatosyekwak tigigoigap moegap sigirok, ak koibe konoraikwak ukwegap tambeesik, koipchin piik che ma nyoorunee kiy." 
Isaiah30:7 Amu puch toretetap Misiri, ma tilei kiy, ki aguure anyun ineendet Rahab ne tebyei kosiisei." 
Isaiah30:8 Ui anyun nguno, sirchi kiy ne kisire eng' tainnywa, ak isirchi bukuit, si kobunji peetuusyek che pwoonei koek paornateet ne po koigeny ak koigeny." 
Isaiah30:9 Amu icheeget ko piik che ngelel, lagok che po lembeita, lagok che ma chamei kogas ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor;" 
Isaiah30:10 che mwachin keerik koleenji, “Amogeer”; ak koleenji maotik, Amomaotenwech tuguuk che po iman, omwaiwech tuguuk che tangus, omaoten kaberberisyosyek," 
Isaiah30:11 oistegei eng' ooreet, omaste eng' ooreet, ogoochi Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel kosiis eng' tainnyo." 
Isaiah30:12 Mwaei anyun Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel ko uu ni, kole, Amu osase ng'olyoondoni, ak omang'u sastaet ak kamaaset, ak otiegei chooto;" 
Isaiah30:13 ko uu nooto anyun kergeitu tengegito eng' okweek ak ole kigong'eer ole neegit kobutok, ne kogotoorgei eng' inaatut ne kooi, ne luulei kochokyin." 
Isaiah30:14 Ak kotui ko uu ye kituei tereetap cheptereniot, ne tuatui koma riiree; kot koma kenyooru rokyet ne ki ibe maat eng' kapkoima, anan kerame peek eng' keriinget." 
Isaiah30:15 Amu komwa Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, kole, “Kisarwok ye oweege ak omuuny; egu kimnateeng'wong' siisek ak kamang'unet.” Ago ma ocham," 
Isaiah30:16 ak ki omwa ole, “Achicha! Ki mwee paraisisyek;” ko uu nooto omweei anyun; ak ki ole, “Kilaanye che chepchep;” chepchebitu anyun ak icheek che onok." 
Isaiah30:17 Mwee eliphuut agenge kereetap kong' ne po agenge; omwee ngo keraak kong' muutu, agoi kebagaaktak oige keetit ne kooi ne mi tulweet parak, oige penderet ne mi tulweet parak." 
Isaiah30:18 Igenok anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit koboorwok myeeindo, ak koek anyun ineendet ne itoroorot, si kobiit koriirenak. Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindetap kirwooget; iberuurotin tugul che igeni ineendet." 
Isaiah30:19 Amu menyei `piik Zion eng' Jerusalem, ma iriiree kogeny. Iboorun iman myeeindo ye kas riireguk; ye kas kowolun." 
Isaiah30:20 Nganda koonok Kiptaiyat amitwogigap nyalilda ak peegap usiisyet, koma keunyei Kanetindeng'ung' agoi, ago keerei konyeguk Kanetindeng'ung'." 
Isaiah30:21 Ak ye komaste obe eutap tai, anan ye komaste obe murot kaataam, ogas anyun ng'olyoot ne mi let eng' okweek, ne mwaei kole, “Ooreet ni, oba orani.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Ak omurwon kiit ne ki kiliige kanamoniguk che po fedha che ki kiwai, kobooto che ki kiliige kanamoniguk che po thahabu che ki kitany. Iwirtoi ko uu kiit ne mi simdo; ileenjini, “Istegei eng' yu!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Ak koyook ineendet ropta ne po kesweguk, si kobiit igolse; ak kogoonok amitwogik che punu ruroteetap emet, ak koneryo ak kochang'a. Tuun agete kiyagiik ole paraa eng' peetuunooto." 
Isaiah30:24 Amei eiik ak icheek ak moegap sigirok che ibatisyei, amitwogik che ki kichop ak kegonor koanyinyitu." 
Isaiah30:25 Ak kobiitu ainoosyek ak kereruusyek che mi peek eng' tulweet age tugul ne oo ne kooi, ak eng' tulweet age tugul ne ming'in ak ko toroor, eng' peetuutap parisyet ne oo, ye ibutos teeksosyek che kooen." 
Isaiah30:26 Kogeny, kogergeitu lapkeiyetap arawet ak ne po asiista, ak kotesak lapkeiyetap asiista konyil tisap, koigei lapkeiyetap peetuusyek tisap, eng' peetuut ne inyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor moogap piikyik, ak kosoop pirutigap kaguotenennywa." 
Isaiah30:27 Ogeero, punu kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole loo, lalei eng' nereegekyik, ak eng' iyeto ne oo ne togostoi; nyiitaat kutinnyi nyitatet, ak uu ng'elyeptanyi maat ne peelsei;" 
Isaiah30:28 ak uu kabusennyi kereruut ne mi peek che ing'irtogei, che itei kaatit, si kobiit kochuchugan pororyosyek eng' kipchuchugetap ng'emisyet, ak kirate kutusweegap piik karnet ne imaasi." 
Isaiah30:29 Onyooru tyendo ko uu eng' kemout ye kiyaei igoorto ne tiliil; ak kagasetapkei ne po muguleldo, ko uu ye ibei chiito ndurerut si kwo tulweetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi Rwandetap Israel." 
Isaiah30:30 Ak koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kutinnyi ne po toroornatet kogasak, ak koboor kochoru eunnyi, eng' nyitatetap nereeknatennyi ak liplibenetap maat ne peelsei, kobooto cheet ak usoonet ne oo ak koigap ropta." 
Isaiah30:31 Amu kitonatoni piigap Syria eng' tweguunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne pirei eng' kirokto." 
Isaiah30:32 Ak pireet age tugul ne ki king'at, ne pire Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, komi kobooto sugutisyek che mengech, ak ketubosyek. Ak koboryo kobooto icheek eng' lugoosyek che kitumdumi." 
Isaiah30:33 Amu kigechop Topet kobooch keny; ee, kigechopchi laitoryat; ki koyai kolooit kwo ng'wony ak kotebeesit: karurugutyennyi ko maat ak kweenik che chaang'; inaami kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne kergei ak koik che laldos, che isururu." 
Isaiah31:1 Pwo eng' icheek che choorchingei Misiri kocheeng'ei toreteet, ak kotiegei paraisisyek; ak komang'u kariisyek, amu chaang', ak komang'u piik che ketei paraisisyek amu kiimeen kot; ago ma inyali Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, ama cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor!" 
Isaiah31:2 Ago utaat ineendet agine ak ibu yaityet, ama walei ng'aleekyik; ago ng'eetei kogirindoi kootap yaigap yaityet, ak toretetap icheeget che yaei tengekto." 
Isaiah31:3 Ago piik Misiriik, ak ma Kamuktaindet; ak panyeek paraisisyekwak, ama kiy. Ye chuul Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyi, keriichei ineendet ne toretisyei, ak ibuti ne ketoreti, ak kobutos tuwai." 
Isaiah31:4 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye pooriseni ng'etundo ak ng'etundo ne parnotyot, agobo tyondo ne kagobar, agot ngeguur mestoweek che chaang' koawenji ineendet, koma arageni eng' waagannywa, anan koming'injigei polatennywa. Chorugei ko uu nooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek koyai pooryeet eng' tulweetap Zion ak eng' tulweennyi ne ming'in." 
Isaiah31:5 Ko uu ye tirirendos toriitik, ko uu nooto riibei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek Jerusalem; riibei ak kosaru, siirtoi kowendi koriibei." 
Isaiah31:6 Oweekyigei ineendet ne ki ongelelji miising', ee lagogap Israel." 
Isaiah31:7 Amu tuun wiirtoi chii age tugul eng' peetuunooto kanamonikyik che po fedha ak kanamonikyik che po thahabu, che kiyaiywok eunekwok koek tengekto." 
Isaiah31:8 “Ibuti anyun Assyrianindet eng' rotwetap chok, ma rotwetap chii; ak kobar ineendet rotwetap chok, ne ma po piik; ak komwee rotwetap chok, ak koek murenikyik otwogik." 
Isaiah31:9 Ak komwei rwandennyi amu kamuiset, ak kotoptobenso pounikyik amu songolyet ne kageer,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi maannyi Zion, ak komi maannyi ne oo Jerusalem." 
Isaiah32:1 Ogeero, laitorani laitoryat eng' imanda, ak kobounis pounik eng' kirwooget." 
Isaiah32:2 Egu chiito ole kiung'egei eng' usoonet, ak eng' usoonet ne oo; ko uu ainoosyegap peek eng' ole yaamaat, ko uu urwetap rwandet ne oo eng' emetap ng'etatet." 
Isaiah32:3 Ama kigerei konyegap icheeget che keertoi, ak kogasta itigap icheeget che kastoi." 
Isaiah32:4 Ak koguiyo naet ak icheek mugulelwegap icheeget che sartaisyei, ak kong'alaalso komyee ng'elyebwegap che uueen kutusweek." 
Isaiah32:5 Ma keguure kogeny chiito ne perber ne tagunoot, anan keguure rebindet ne aiyeep." 
Isaiah32:6 Amu ng'alaali ne perber kaberberisyet, ak koyai muguleldanyi tengekto, kochombilis, komwa ne ya agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kometo puch saboondo ne amei rubeet, ak koete koee ne amei melel." 
Isaiah32:7 Yaacheen tuguuk che po rebindet; chobei chobutik che yaacheen si kobare che talaen ng'aleek che po lembech, agot ye ng'alaali ne ma tinyei kiy ng'aleek che lititen." 
Isaiah32:8 Ago chobei ne tagunoot tuguuk che taagunotiin; ak tebyei eng' tuguuk che taagunotiin. 
Isaiah32:9 Ong'eetyee okweek kwonyiik che omuunyi, ogas kutinnyu; oepchi iit ng'aleekyuk okweek tiibiik che moriibegei." 
Isaiah32:10 Amu kinyalilok eng' peetuusyek alak ko kagosiirto kenyiit, okweek kwonyiik che moriibegei; amu petei ruroteetap sabibuk, ma piitu kesisyet." 
Isaiah32:11 Obotanse okweek kwonyiik che omuunyi; onyalilye, okweek che moriibegei; oreegu ngoroik, ak otebi aach ngor, ak ogermenegei kuniok." 
Isaiah32:12 Luchei tegetik koriirchin mbareenik che korooron, koriirchin keetiigap sabibuk che rurtos kot." 
Isaiah32:13 Piitos katook che toorei piich ak che rutei piich eng' emetap piikyuk; ee, eng' kooriik tugul che po poiboiyet eng' nganaseet ne paibai." 
Isaiah32:14 Amu kibagaaktoi kootap laitoryat; kiue nganaseet ne mi piik che chaang'; tulweet ak teekseet ne kooi ne kitabendoe, ko egu kebenonik koigeny ole poiboitune sigirok che po timiin, koek ole agete keechiirek;" 
Isaiah32:15 agoi keroong'wech Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' parak, ak koek surkwen mbareet ne rurei, ak kiroge mbareet ne rurei, timiin." 
Isaiah32:16 Tebee anyun kirwooget surkwen, ak kotebee imanda mbareet ne rurei." 
Isaiah32:17 Ak koek poisyetap imanda kaalyeet; ak kobiitune imanda kamuung'et ak kamang'unet koigeny. 
Isaiah32:18 Ak kotebee piikyuk meng'ootetap kaalyeet, eng' meng'otosyek che riibootin, ak eng' komoswek che kimuung'e ole siisaat." 
Isaiah32:19 Ago roboni koigap ropta kot koluul timiin; ak koluul nganaseet tugul. 
Isaiah32:20 Oberuurotin okweek che ogoole tabanwegap peek komugul, che iyooktoi keelyegap eito ak che po sigiryet." 
Isaiah33:1 Pwo eng' inyee ne ing'emisyei, ama king'emin; ak ne iberberisyei, ama iberberin icheek! Ye ma ing'emisyei, keng'emin, ak ye ma iberberisyei, koberberin icheek." 
Isaiah33:2 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, rirenech; ki kigenin. Egu kimnateennyo eunnyo karonet age tugul, ak iegu yetunennyo agine eng' peetuutap nyalilda." 
Isaiah33:3 Mweei piik ye kas polatetap wasetapkei; yestoi pororyosyek ye keng'eet. 
Isaiah33:4 Ak kiyumi parunenik ko uu ye iyumi kuutik; toroombenjin ko uu ye toroombeni chereng'enyinik. 
Isaiah33:5 Toroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu menyei parak, ki konyiit Zion kirwooget ak imanda." 
Isaiah33:6 Tuun piitu kimnateet eng' peetuusyeguk, ak ooindap yetunet, utaatyet, ak naet; kaiyweisyet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko konorwennyi." 
Isaiah33:7 Ogeero, waaktos eng' saang' piikwak che nyigoonen; riirtos miising' tononjinigap kaalyeet." 
Isaiah33:8 Kigelakta ortinwek che eecheen, ma korutoi kiprutoiyot. Ki kobut kayomisutik, Ki kogas nganasook, ma koiti chii." 
Isaiah33:9 Riirei emet ak konyaluli; ililani Lebanon ak koresei, uu Saron surkwen, ak poregei sok Bashan ak Karmel." 
Isaiah33:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole; “Kang'eet anyun nguno, aeetu nguno; atororitu nguno." 
Isaiah33:11 Omanachi meteteek, oiyie mobeek; kabuseng'wong' ko maat ne igeswok." 
Isaiah33:12 Kergeitu piik ak taartaarik che kibeelei, ko uu katok che kiluuli, che kibeelei eng' ma.”" 
Isaiah33:13 Ogas, okweek che oo looen, kiit ne kaayai; ak okweek che oo neegit, ong'aany kamugennyu." 
Isaiah33:14 Ki aragenso kiptengeginik che mi Zion; ki konam potanet che ma iywei Kamuktaindet. Mwaei icheek kole ng'oo eng' acheek ne imuuchi komeng'iis ak maat ne igeesu? Ng'oo eng' acheek ne imuuchi komeng'iis ak maat ne lalei koigeny? 
Isaiah33:15 Ineendet ne wendote imanda ak kong'alaali che lititen, ineendet ne sasei kelunetap sastaet, ne ma namei asoya, ne timei itiikyik si ma kas agobo korotiik, ak ne tuchei konyekyik si ma keer yaityet," 
Isaiah33:16 menyei ineendet ole toroor; oldanyi ole teegu ko irimoigap rwandosyek; kigoochin amitwogikyik, ma rarchin peekyik." 
Isaiah33:17 Keerei konyeguk karaaranindap laitoryat; keerei icheek emet ne kiuiitogei. 
Isaiah33:18 Ibwaati muguleldang'ung' agobo kamuiset: “Mi ano ineendet ne iitisyei, mi ano ineendet ne kerei karagendoetap aisuruut? Mi ano ineendet ne iiti teeksosyek che kooen?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Megeere piik che koroomen, piik che paroen mookwekwak che memuuchi iguiye, piik che ng'alaali kutit ne too ne memuuchi iguiye." 
Isaiah33:20 Keer Zion, nganaseetap igoorwekyok che ki king'at! Tuun keerei konyeguk Jerusalem, meng'ootetap kamuung'et, emait ne ma kiutoi, ne ma kitutu tigongenikyik agoi, ama ng'etos poroonikyik." 
Isaiah33:21 Ago tuun tebyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobootech eng' olooto eng' etunatennyi, ye mi ainoosyek che paroen ak kereruusyek, ole ma punei moingetap peek ne kekwerye eng' mugangok che kiwase peek, ama punei yooto meeliit ne karaaran." 
Isaiah33:22 Amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kirwoogindennyo, ne koonech ng'atuutik, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko laitoryandennyo; ineendet ne sarwech." 
Isaiah33:23 Kagitustus porooniguk; ma imuuch kogimit kelutap toloitap melinnywa, ma imuuch koiito angeetap meeliit. Kipcheak anyun parunenigap tuguuk che chaang' che ki kiluul; ki nam che ing'waldos parunenik." 
Isaiah33:24 Ak ma tuun mwaei ne meng'iisyei kole, “Amyani”; kinyochin kaat tengekwogigap piik che menyei olooto." 
Isaiah34:1 Oriigu okweek pororyosyek, si ogas; ak oep iit okweek piik! Ingogas emet, ak tuguuk che nyiitaat olooto; ng'wony ak tuguuk tugul che mang'une." 
Isaiah34:2 Amu tinyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyitatet agobo pororyosyek tugul, ak nereegek che laldos agobo lugosyekwak tugul; Ki kong'em icheek kogees, ki kogoito icheek kebar." 
Isaiah34:3 Ki wiirtoi piikwak che kigebar, ak puldos muuswekwak, ak kochootyo tuloonook amu korotiikwak." 
Isaiah34:4 Ak kochoot lugeet tugul ne po kipsengwet, ak kemaman kipsengwet ko uu kartasit. Ak kowandagei lugeennywa tugul, ko uu sogoot ne ibuti eng' keetitap sabibuk, ak ko uu sogoot ne ibuti eng' mogoywet." 
Isaiah34:5 Amu ki koee rotwennyu po chok eng' kipsengwet kot konyi, ogeero, choorchingei Edom, ak choorchingei piik che ki achup, kirwookyi." 
Isaiah34:6 Nyiitaat korotiik rotwetap chok ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kigo akwait eng' akwaindo, eng' korotiigap aaregap keechiir ak ng'oroorek, kobooto mwanigap soromok che po mengichik. Amu tinyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywot eng' Bosra, ak parisyet ne oo eng' emetap Edom." 
Isaiah34:7 Ak ki choorgei soenik kobooto icheek, kiruugik che mengeechen kobooto kiruugik che eecheen. Ak kobogite emennywa korotiik, ak ko akwaitu temburyekwak eng' akwaindo." 
Isaiah34:8 Amu peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po yaaktaetap mugetuut, kenyiitap kageeret ne po toiyetap Zion." 
Isaiah34:9 Ak kewal kereruusyekyik koek manget, ak kewal temburyekyik koek koik che laldos, ak koek emennyi manget ne lalei." 
Isaiah34:10 Ma kimisi kemoi anan peet; togostoi iyetanyi koigeny. Egu karaatya kobooch ibinda age agoi ibinda age; ma punei chii yooto koigeny ak koigeny. 
Isaiah34:11 Ago punjin chebo kibabaa ak chepswererit; ak komeny olooto sugurut ak chepkugit. Ak kochuul eng' paragunnyi porowetap toiyet, ak porowet ne po puch ne po kalititisyet." 
Isaiah34:12 Kuurei icheek piik che taagunotiin kobwa laitornatet, ago ma piitu chii eng' olooto; egu puch pounikyik tugul." 
Isaiah34:13 Ak kobitye katok kooriikyik che po laitorinik, ak kobitye siwek ak katook che rutei piich irimoikyik. Ak koek meng'ootetap lelwek, ak seremutap tyong'igap songolik." 
Isaiah34:14 Ak kotuiyo tyong'igap surkwen ak suik, ak kowaach kwesta kowaakyi chorwennyi; ee, tebee olooto sugurut ne po kemoi, ak kosikyigei ole imuung'ee." 
Isaiah34:15 Ak koteekyigei eng' olooto sugurut ne oo keswennyi, ak kolok, ak kogeeny, ak koyumji aarekyik urwennyi; ee, iyumjigei olooto keerosyek, age tugul ak koget." 
Isaiah34:16 Ocheeng' ak osoman eng' bukuitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ma petei agot agenge eng' chuuto, ma mi ne rartae koget. Amu kang'at kutinnyu, ak kagoyum icheek kabuusennyi." 
Isaiah34:17 Kigoseer parbareek agobo icheek, ak kigopchechi icheek eunnyi eng' porowet; punjin icheek agoi, menyei olooto kobooch ibinda age agoi ibinda age." 
Isaiah35:1 Ingogaskei surkwen ak melewet, ak kobaibait emet ne ong'ateet, ak koiye ko uu taapteet." 
Isaiah35:2 Yiei miising', ak kobaibait eng' poiboiyet ak eng' tyendo; kigoochin toroornatetap Lebanon, telunatetap Karmel ak Saron. Keerei icheek toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, telunatetap Kamuktaindennyo." 
Isaiah35:3 Ogimiit eunek che nyalulyotin, ogiil kutung'oik che ma kiimeen." 
Isaiah35:4 Oleenji icheek che aragendos, “Ogimegitu, amoiyweisye! Keero nyoonei anyun Kamuktaindeng'wong' ak yaaktaetap mugetuut, kobooto kageeretap Kamuktaindet; nyoonei kosarwok.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Ak koit koyatagis anyun konyegap che koryotiin, ak koyatagis itiik che timotin." 
Isaiah35:6 Yeityo kotoromben chiito ne ing'wali ko uu cheptirgichet, ak kotyen ng'elyeptap ne namaat kuut. Amu kuutu peek eng' surkwen, ak kobiit kereruusyek eng' surkwen." 
Isaiah35:7 Ak koek `ng'aniek che ilyeldos tamboiyot ak koek `emet ne yaamaat kong'igap peek. Ak eng' ole ki menyei lelwek, ko egu `susweek saoset ak mutweek." 
Isaiah35:8 Ak kobiit ooreet ne oo eng' olooto, ak kiguure oranooto Ooreetap Tiliilindo. Ma punei oranooto che ma tiliileen ama tyechei oranooto agot che perber." 
Isaiah35:9 Ma piitu ng'etundo eng' olooto, ama punei oranooto tyondo age tugul ne koroom, ma kinyoorchin olooto; ago punei olooto che ki kityaach." 
Isaiah35:10 Ak koweek piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki kityaach, ak kobwa Zion kotyenonu. Ak kotebee paragunnywa poiboiyetap koigeny, nyooru kagasetapkei ak poiboiyet, ak komwei arageneet ak tigenoik." 
Isaiah36:1 Ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak ang'wan ne po Laitoryat Hezekiah, kobookyi Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria, nganasook tugul che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah, ak konam." 
Isaiah36:2 Ak ki iyook `laitoryatap Assyria Rabsake eng' Lakish konyo Jerusalem kaplaitoryat Hezekiah, kobooto lugeet ne oo, ak kitonone ole neegitee kererchetap tamboiyot ne po meto eng' ooreet ne oo ne po kooretap mwetindet." 
Isaiah36:3 Yeityo konyo ole mi ineendet Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah, ne ki riibindetap tuguugap koot, kobooto Sebna siriindet, ak Joah weeriitap Asaph siriindetap tuguuk che piitu." 
Isaiah36:4 Ak ki leenji `Rabsake pichooto, Oleenji Hezekiah, Mwaei laitoryat ne oo, laitoryatap Assyria, kole, nee kamang'unani omang'u?" 
Isaiah36:5 Amwae ale, ng'aleek puch kirwoogutiguk ak kimnateng'ung' ne po lugeet: ng'oo anyun ne imang'u kot ingelelja?" 
Isaiah36:6 Keero, imang'u kirokto ne po tegandani kigeiri, nooto ko Misiri; ne ngot kotiegei chii, kotoorei eunnyi: uu nooto Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri eng' tugul che imang'u ineendet." 
Isaiah36:7 Ago ngot ileenjo, Kimang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo: ko tos ma ineendet ne chechiik komoswek che torooreen ak kapkorosusyek che ki koisto Hezekiah, ak koleenji Judah ak Jerusalem, Osae eng' taitap kaptisisyoni?" 
Isaiah36:8 Ara anyun, asoomin ale, igoochi kiit ne po kayasyoet kiptaiyandennyu laitoryatap Assyria, si agoonin paraisisyek eliphuusyek aeng', ngot imuuchi eng' komostang'ung', inde piik che laanyei." 
Isaiah36:9 Imuktoi ano anyun igirinde kiptaiyat agenge eng' otwogik che mengeechen che po kiptaiyandennyu, ak imang'u Misiri amu kariisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek?" 
Isaiah36:10 Ak tos katogosu kebarge ak emoni ang'em, ama mi kobooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Kimwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo, Togoste obargei ak emoni ak ing'em." 
Isaiah36:11 Komwachi anyun `Eliakim ak `Sebna ak Joah Rabsake koleenji, asoomin ale, ng'alaalji otwogiguk eng' kutitap Syria; amu kigase: mat ing'alaalwech eng' kutitap Yahudik, kogasei piik che mi irimeet parak." 
Isaiah36:12 Ago ki le Rabsake, Tos kaiyokwo kiptaiyandennyu anyo ye mi kiptaiyandeng'ung' ak oldang'ung', amwa ng'aleechu? Tos ma iyookwo awo ole mi piik che mi irimeet parak, si kobiit koam kobootok ng'atateekwak ak koee peekwak?" 
Isaiah36:13 Kotonon anyun Rabsake, ak kobol eng' kutit ne oo eng' ng'aleegap Yahudik kole, ogas okweek ng'aleegap laitoryat ne oo, laitoryatap Assyria." 
Isaiah36:14 Kole laitoryat, Among' koberberak Hezekiah; amu ma imuuchi kosarwok." 
Isaiah36:15 Amocham kong'atak Hezekiah omang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, sarwech iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma kigoochin nganasani eutap laitoryatap Assyria." 
Isaiah36:16 Amogas ng'aleegap Hezekiah: amu mwaei laitoryatap Assyria kole, Yai kaalyeet kobooto, ak omong'u obwanjo; ak ingoam chii age tugul eng' okweek sabibukyik, ak ingoam chii age tugul logoegap mogoonikyik, ak koee chii age tugul peegap keriingennyi:" 
Isaiah36:17 agoi anyo amutak obe emet ne kergei ak neng'wong', emet ne mi peek ak divaik, emet ne mi amitwogik ak mbareenigap sabibuk." 
Isaiah36:18 Oriipkei si ma igaigaak Hezekiah, koleenjok, Sarwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos kigosar age eng' kamuktaigap pororyosyek, emennyi eng' eutap laitoryatap Assyria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Mi ano kamuktaigap Hamath ak che po Arpad? Mi ano kamuktaigap Separbaim? Tos ki sar icheek `Samaria eng' eunnyu? 
Isaiah36:20 Ng'oo eng' kamuktaik tugul che po emotinwechu che ki kosar emennywa eng' eunnyu, kot kosar `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jerusalem eng' eunnyu?" 
Isaiah36:21 Ago ki siisyo, ma wolji agot ng'olyoo, amu kimwaei ng'atuutyetap laitoryat kole, “Amat owolji kiy.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Ki nyo anyun Eliakim weeriitap Hilkiah ne ki ne ki pou koot, ak Sebna siriindet, ak Joah weeriitap Asaph siriindetap tuguuk che piitu, kobwa ole mi Hezekiah ko kagogereer ngoroikwak, kobwa komwachi ng'aleegap Rabsake." 
Isaiah37:1 Ak kingo kas Laitoryat Hezekiah, kogereer ngoroikyik, ak kotugegei kuniok, ak kwo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah37:2 Ak koyookto Eliakim ne ki pou koot, ak Sebna siriindet, ak poisyegap tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaiah maotyot, weeriitap Amos." 
Isaiah37:2 Ak koyookto Eliakim ne ki pou koot, ak Sebna siriindet, ak poisyegap tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaiah maotyot, weeriitap Amos." 
Isaiah37:3 Ak ki leenji ineendet, Kamwa Hezekiah kole, peetuuni ko peetuutap nyalilda, ak kereetap kong', ak chubisyet: amu kait kesich lagok, ama mi kimnateet ne kesige." 
Isaiah37:4 Abeere imuuchi kogas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ng'aleegap Rabsake, ne kagoyok laitoryatap Assyria kiptaiyandennyi, konyo kochot kamuktaindet ne sabei, ak koger kong' ng'aleek che kagas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung': ara anyun saa agobo piik che ng'etunotiin." 
Isaiah37:5 Kobwa anyun otwogigap Laitoryat Hezekiah ole mi Isaiah. 
Isaiah37:6 Ak ki leenji Isaiah icheek, Omwachini kiptaiyandeng'wong' ko uu ni, oleenjini, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, meiywei ng'aleek che kegas, che kachubena otwogigap laitoryatap Assyria." 
Isaiah37:7 Keero, ayaei ineendet ko kas ng'aleegap piik, ak koweek kwo emennyi; ak agoite kebar eng' rotwetap chok eng' emennyi." 
Isaiah37:8 Koweek anyun Rabsake, ak koitita kobaregei laitoryatap Assyria ak Libna: amu kiga kas kole kikwa eng' Lakish." 
Isaiah37:9 Ak ki kas kemwaei agobo Tiraka laitoryatap Kush, keele, Kogonyo obargei. Ak kingo kas koyookto piik koba kap Hezekiah, koleenji," 
Isaiah37:10 omwachini Hezekiah, laitoryatap Judah, oleenjini, Amengoberberin Kamuktaindeng'ung' ne imang'u, koleenjin, Ma kigoitoi Jerusalem kwo eutap laitoryatap Assyria." 
Isaiah37:11 Keero, ki igas kiit ne ki yachi laitorinigap Assyria emotinwek tugul, eng' ng'emet ne king'em icheek kogees: kesaruun inyee?" 
Isaiah37:12 Tos ki sar icheek kamuktaigap pororyosyek, che ki par kwanisyekyuk, Gosan, ak Haran, ak Resep, ak lagogap Eden che ki mi Telasar?" 
Isaiah37:13 Mi ano laitoryatap Hamath, ak laitoryatap Arpad, ak laitoryatap nganaseetap Separbaim, ne po Hena, ak Iba?" 
Isaiah37:14 Ak ki nam Hezekiah parweet eng' eutap piik che kiga kiyok, ak kosoman: ak kitogosta Hezekiah kwo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koiito parwaanooto eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah37:15 Ak ki sa Hezekiah Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole," 
Isaiah37:16 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ne tebee kerubisyek, ii Kamuktaindet, inyee inyegei, ne po laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony; ki iyai kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Isaiah37:17 Ep iit, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak igeer; ak kas ng'aleek tugul che po Sennacherib, che kagoyok kochote Kamuktaindet ne sabei." 
Isaiah37:18 Iman, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki kobar laitorinigap Assyria, emotinwek tugul, ak emennywa," 
Isaiah37:19 ak ki kowiirchi ma kanamonikwak: amu ki ma ko kamuktaik, ago kiboisyetap eunegap piik, keetit ak koik; king'em anyun icheek tuguuchooto amu nooto." 
Isaiah37:20 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, sarwech eng' eunnyi, si konai laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony kole ii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee inyegei." 
Isaiah37:21 Koyookto anyun Isaiah weeriitap Amos chiito kwo kap Hezekiah, koleenji, kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, Ko uu ye kaisaa agobo Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria," 
Isaiah37:21 Koyookto anyun Isaiah weeriitap Amos chiito kwo kap Hezekiah, koleenji, kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, Ko uu ye kaisaa agobo Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria," 
Isaiah37:22 ni ng'olyoot ne kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo ineendet: Kasasin pergeiyat cheptap Zion, ak kororechin kochotin; kagolelech metinnyi cheptap Jerusalem eng' inyee." 
Isaiah37:23 Ak ng'oo ne ki ichot ak ichup? Ak ng'oo ne ki ibolji ak injurur? Nooto ko Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel. 
Isaiah37:24 Koichot Kiptaiyat eng' otwogiguk, ak koile, Anyoone kot aitu paragutap tuloonook kobooto chaang'indap kariisyekyuk, kot aitu oriit eng' Lebanon; ak aluul taragonikyik che kooen, ak piribirinikyik che korooron: ak achute komosta Ne Toroor Miising', timdap mbareennyi ne rurei." 
Isaiah37:25 Ki abal ak aee peek, ak ateeny ainoosyek tugul che po Misiri eng' keldebesaigap keelyekyuk." 
Isaiah37:26 Tom igas ole ki ayaite ko uu nooto keny, ak ayai eng' peetuusyek che po keny? Ara kaasulde nguno, si kobiit ibut nganasook che ng'ootaatiin koek karurugutik che ki king'em." 
Isaiah37:27 Ki ek anyun piik che ki menyei nganasochooto, che tinyei kimnateet ne ming'in, kimeiyo mugulelwekwak ak kokwong'yo; ki igei susweegap keeweet, ak koigei sogeek che ng'orng'or, ak koigei susweek che mi kooriik parak, ak ko uu mbareetap peek kotomo koeegitu." 
Isaiah37:28 Ago angen kabuureng'ung', ak mandaeng'ung', ak nyonuneng'ung' ne inyone ko, ak nereegeguk che koroomen agobo anee." 
Isaiah37:29 Amu nereegeguk che koroomen agobo anee, ak amu kogoit itiikyuk loseng'ung' pogei, andoi anyun kombet serung'ung', ak ande karnennyu kuting'ung', ak aweechin ibun ooreet ne kebunu." 
Isaiah37:30 Ak egu ni kaboorunet ne kiboorun: oame eng' kenyini che piitos icheegei, ak oam eng' kenyiitap aeng' che syegune chooto; ak eng' kenyiitap somok, ogol, ak oges, ak omin keetiigap sabibuk, ak oam logoekwak." 
Isaiah37:31 Ak piitos kogeny kobendi ng'wony tigitigap che ng'etu che chilildos che po kootap Judah, ak koiiyo logoek eng' parak." 
Isaiah37:32 Amu mandoi eng' Jerusalem che kang'et, ak chilildos eng' tulweetap Zion: yaei niito kagiiletapkei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah37:33 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo laitoryatap Assyria, kole, ma itu ineendet nganasani, ama mwogei yooto eng' kipchabet, ama nyoonei tainnyi kotinyei long'eet, ama wasyin ng'ung'unyek." 
Isaiah37:34 Weegegei ooreet ne kibunu, ama itu nganasani, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah37:35 Amu ariibe nganasani, asaru, agobo anee, ak agobo Daudi otwogindennyu." 
Isaiah37:36 Ak kimanda malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kobar piik eliphuusyek pogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak muut eng' nganaseetap piigap Assyria: ak kingo ng'eetyo piik karon, ogeero, kimuuswek tugul, che kogobek." 
Isaiah37:37 Kwo anyun Sennacherib laitoryatap Assyria, koweek ak kwo komeny Nineveh." 
Isaiah37:38 Ak ye kita kosaaei eng' kootap Nisrok kanamwennyi, kobar ineendet weeriikyik Adramelek ak Sareser eng' rotwetap chok: ak komwei koba emetap Ararat. Ak ki laitoran Esarhaddon weeriinnyi kogeer ineendet." 
Isaiah38:1 Kimyan Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto kot ko neegit kome. Ak ki nyo ole mi ineendet Isaiah maotyot weeriitap Amos, ak koleenji ineendet, “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, rarchi keet piigap koong'ung'; amu imee, mesabe.”" 
Isaiah38:1 Kimyan Hezekiah eng' peetuusyechooto kot ko neegit kome. Ak ki nyo ole mi ineendet Isaiah maotyot weeriitap Amos, ak koleenji ineendet, “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, rarchi keet piigap koong'ung'; amu imee, mesabe.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Kowelel anyun Hezekiah togeennyi kogeer inaat, ak kosa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Isaiah38:3 kole, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asaain ale, ibwaat ole ki atepte eng' imanda eng' taing'ung' ak eng' muguleldo ne ititaat, ak ki ayai ne myee eng' taing'ung'. Ak ki riir Hezekiah eng' ng'wanindo." 
Isaiah38:4 Konyonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Isaiah koleenji," 
Isaiah38:5 “Ui mwachi Hezekiah ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Daudi kwandang'ung' kole, kaagas saaeng'ung', kaageer peeguk po kong': keero, atesyini peetuusyeguk kenyiisyek taman ak muut." 
Isaiah38:6 Ak asaruun kobooto nganasani eng' eunegap laitoryatap Assyria: ak ariibe nganasani. 
Isaiah38:7 Ak egu ni kaboorunet eng' inyee ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, keele yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kii kagomwa:" 
Isaiah38:8 Keero, aweechi urwet ne po tilutik ne kagorekta kobooto asiista eng' kiit ne kirogendoe saisyek, ne po Ahaz, koweek kwo let tilutik taman. Kotogos anyun asiista tilutik taman eng' kioto kirogendoisye ne kagagorektae.”" 
Isaiah38:9 Chu ng'aleek che kisir Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah, ye kiga komyan kot kosap eng' myandanyi." 
Isaiah38:10 Ki amwa ale, eng' kwenutap peetuusyekyuk ko kanyool awo; achute kurgeetap kererit, eng' peetuusyekyuk che ng'etunotiin." 
Isaiah38:11 Ki amwa ale, ma ageere Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emetap piik che saptos. Ma ageere chiito kogeny kobooto che menyei ng'wony." 
Isaiah38:12 Kageisto meng'ootennyu, kageibena ko uu emait ne po mestowot. Ki amaman saboondanyu ko uu ye mamanisyei chiito ne nabisyei; istoa eng' keetit ne kinabisye; iigeswa kobooch peet agoi kemoi." 
Isaiah38:13 Ki asiis kot koeech; iirye kawekyuk tugul ko uu ng'etundo; iigeswa kobooch peet agoi kemoi. 
Isaiah38:14 Ki atwegu anyun ko uu kibiswet anan cheptalamyat, ki ariir ko uu cheptuget. Ki anyal parak kot koimenitu konyekyuk; ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anyalili, egu ne riiba." 
Isaiah38:15 Amwae nee anyun? Ki ng'alaalwo, ak ki koyai ineendet kosulda: Ki kobetena rwoon amu ng'wanindap saboondanyu." 
Isaiah38:16 Ee Kiptaiyat, saptos piik eng' tuguuchuuto, ak miitei saboondap saboondanyu tuguuchooto tugul. Inyaa anyun, ak igoono asap."
