Isaiah38:17 Keero, ki anyooru ng'wanindo ne oo agobo kalyennyu; ago ki isaru saboondanyu komang'une keriingetap ng'emisyet, amu ki iwiirte tengekwogikyuk koba let." 
Isaiah38:18 Amu ma imuuchi kererit kolasun, ma imuuchi meet kobwaatin. Ma imuuchi komong' imandang'ung' icheeget che choorchingei keriinget." 
Isaiah38:19 Ilasun che saptos, ee che saptos, ko uu ye alasun ra. Iboorchin `kwanisyek lagok imandang'ung'." 
Isaiah38:20 Choboot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kosarwo, kityeni anyun tyenwogikyuk eng' kibugandinigap inoik eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyo eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah38:21 Kiga komwa Isaiah kole, “Ingoip logoegap mogoonik che inurotin, ak konuge ole mi ondiryet, si kosap.”" 
Isaiah38:22 Kiga mwa Hezekiah kole, “Nee kaboorunet ne iboorwo kole atogostoi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Ki iyookyi eng' peetuusyechooto Merodak-baladan weeriitap Baladen laitoryatap Babilon paronok ak kagoochinet, Hezekiah: amu ki kas kole kiga komyan, ak kigosap." 
Isaiah39:2 Ak ki paibait Hezekiah agobo tuguuchooto, ak ki iboorchi icheek kootap tuguukyik che po kamanuutyet ne oo, fedha, ak thahabu, ak nyamdutik, ak mwanik che korooron miising', ak koot tugul ne po kariikyik, kobooto tuguukyik tugul che konorotiin: ma ng'et kiy eng' koonnyi, anan eng' pounatennyi, ne ma iboorchi Hezekiah pichooto." 
Isaiah39:3 Ki nyo anyun `maotyot Isaiah kaplaitoryat Hezekiah, ak koteebe koleenji, kale nee pichu? Kobunu ano kobwanei oling'ung'? Ak ki le Hezekiah, Kabwa olinnyu kobunu emet ne loo, emetap Babilon." 
Isaiah39:4 Koleenji anyun, Kageer nee eng' koong'ung'? Ak ki wol Hezekiah kole, kageer tuguuk tugul che mi koonnyu: ma mi kiy eng' konoraikyuk ne ma aboorchi icheek." 
Isaiah39:5 Koleenji anyun `Isaiah Hezekiah, Kas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah39:6 Keero, pwoonei peetuusyek che tuun ki ibei tuguuk tugul che mi koong'ung' koba Babilon, kobooto che ki konor kwanisyeguk agoi ra: ma mi kiy ne ng'etu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah39:7 Ak komuti alak eng' weeriiguk che mong'unenen, che isiche; ak koba koek icheek kiptainik eng' kootap laitoryatap Babilon." 
Isaiah39:8 Koleenji anyun Hezekiah Isaiah, Myee ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kemwa. Ki mwa kogeny kole, amu mi kaalyeet ak imanit eng' peetuusyekyuk." 
Isaiah40:1 Ogaigai, ogaigai piikyuk, mwaei Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Isaiah40:2 Ong'alaalji Jerusalem eng' kagaigaet, ak omwachi eng' kutit ne oo oleenji, kagogeskei poryennyi, kagenyochi kaat tengektanyi. Kagotaach eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pireet konyil aeng' agobo tengekwogikyik tugul." 
Isaiah40:3 Tuugeet ne kuursei koleen: “Ochopchi ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' surkwen, olitiityi ooreet ne oo Kamuktaindennyo eng' ong'ateet." 
Isaiah40:4 Tuun kiloong'u atebweet age tugul, ak tuun kiripribi tulweet age tugul ne oo ak ne ming'in. Tuun kilititi che kunuuren, ak kichabai komoswek che sing'ortot." 
Isaiah40:5 Ak tuun king'aanyei toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak keerei piik tugul niito; mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor niito.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Mwaei tuugeet kole, “Waach!” Ale, “Awaakyi nee?” Susweek poorwek tugul, ak uu taaptook che po keeweet karaaranindanywa tugul." 
Isaiah40:7 Restos susweek ak kobetos taaptook, amu usyin kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Susweek piik iman." 
Isaiah40:8 Restos susweek ak kobetos taaptook; ago tononi koigeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindennyo. 
Isaiah40:9 Togoste tulweet ne kooi ee Zion, inyee ne imwatoi logoiywek che myach; waach miising' eng' kimnateet ee Jerusalem, inyee ne imwachini logoiywek che myach; waach, ameiywei; mwachi nganasoogap Judah ileenji, ogeer, Kamuktaindeng'wong'!" 
Isaiah40:10 Ogeero, nyoonei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ineendet ne kiim, ak kobounisyei eunnyi agobo ineendet; mi melektanyi kobooto ineendet, ak mi yaaktaennyi tainnyi." 
Isaiah40:11 Paei keechiirekyik ko uu mestowot, iyumi eunnyi aaregap keechiir, ak komute tegeennyi, ak kondochi mutyo che aboen." 
Isaiah40:12 Ng'oo ne kiger peek kogeer ole tee eng' rubeitanyi, ak kokwa kipsengwet eng' moriikyik, ak konai ole tee temburyegap ng'wony eng' karagendoet, ak korogendo tuloonook eng' ratilisyek, kobooto tuloonook che mengeechen eng' kiit ne kirogendoisye?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ng'oo ne ki indochi Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anan ng'oo kaneetindennyi ne ki ineet ineendet?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ki ng'alaal ak ng'oo, ak ki ineet ng'oo ineendet, ak koneet ineendet eng' ooreetap kirwooget, ak koneet naet, ak koboorchi ineendet ooreetap kaguiyet?" 
Isaiah40:15 Ogeero, uu pororyosyek peek che kasaita konyil agenge eng' tereet, ak kiiti ko uu temburyek che tutigin che mi kiit ne kirogendoisye: ogeero, inemu ngeguusyek ko uu kiit ne ming'in miising'." 
Isaiah40:16 Ak mayamei kweenigap Lebanon kilaal, ama yamei tyong'igap olooto koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei." 
Isaiah40:17 Uu puch pororyosyek tugul eng' tainnyi; kiiti icheek keele uu puch eng' ineendet, ak tangoita." 
Isaiah40:18 Orogendoi ng'oo anyun Kamuktaindet? Anan nee kergeindo ne orogendoi ineendet? 
Isaiah40:19 Ichooti musogindet tuguuk si kobiit kowai kanamwet, ak koliige kitang'indetap thahabu kanamwonooto thahabu, ak kotang'ji sirimwegap fedha." 
Isaiah40:20 Chiito ne panan miising' agobo kagoochinet ne uu nooto, ne kinamjin parak, koleweni keetit ne manunei; cheeng'jingei musogindet ne ng'oom si kolumda kanamwet ne kiwaei, ne ma king'ei." 
Isaiah40:21 Tos tomo onai? Tos tomo ogas? Tos tomo kemwaiwok kobooch taunet? Tos tomo oguiye kobooch ngap kelumda lumeiywegap ng'wony? 
Isaiah40:22 Ineendet ko ne tebee ole pooch yiemutyetap ng'wony, ak uu che menyei olooto, talamik; ne iitoi kipsengwet ko uu angeet, ak koiito kipsengwetisyechooto ko uu emait ne ki menyei:" 
Isaiah40:23 ineendet ne yaei cheptap laitoryat koek puch, ak ne yaei kirwoogigap ng'wony koek tangoita." 
Isaiah40:24 Ki ma kemiine chooto, ee ki ma kegoolei chooto; ee ki ma nam ng'wony tigitikwak, si koguut ineendet icheek, ak koresyo, ak koip kipchurchuryet icheek ko uu mobeek." 
Isaiah40:25 Orogendoa ng'oo anyun, kot kegergeitu ak ineendet? Mwaei Ineendet ne Tiliil." 
Isaiah40:26 Onyal parak, ogeer ole ng'oo ne ki toi koyai chuuto, ne imutu lugeennywa kobee koitet: kuurei tugul eng' kainaikwak, eng' ooindap kamugennyi, ak kiim ineendet eng' kamuktaet, ma peet agot agenge." 
Isaiah40:27 Amu nee si ile inyee Jakobo, ak ing'alaali, ee Israel, ile, Ung'aat ooreennyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki kosiirto kirwoogennyu ama mage kiy Kamuktaindennyu?" 
Isaiah40:28 Tos tomo inai? Tos tomo igas? Manyaluli, ama ng'etei Kamuktaindet ne po koigeny, ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Yaindetap ng'wony komugul; ma isyachaksei naennyi." 
Isaiah40:29 Igoochin kimnateet ne nyaluli; ak tesyin kimnateet ineendet ne ma tinyei kamuget. 
Isaiah40:30 Nyaluldos ak kong'etos agot neranik, ak kobutyo murenik:" 
Isaiah40:31 ago nyooru kimnateet ne leel icheeget che igeni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; togostoi kotirirendos ko uu kipsichinik; rwaei, ama ng'etos; pendoti, ama nyaluldos." 
Isaiah41:1 Osisye eng' tainnyu, ee ngeguusyek; ingonyoor pororyosyek kimnateennywa ne leel: ingorik; yeityo kong'alaalso: ongeriigu tugul ye mi kirwooget." 
Isaiah41:2 Ng'oo ne ki ing'eet ineendet ne punu kong'asiis, ne kuurei eng' imanda konyo keelyekyik? Igoitoi pororyosyek eng' tainnyi, ak kogoochi ineendet koboi laitorinik; igoochin icheek koigei temburyek eng' rotwennyi po chok, ko uu meteteek che arureni, eng' taitap kwangennyi." 
Isaiah41:3 Oone, ak kosiirto eng' kaalyeet; agot eng' ooreet ne kitom kobunei." 
Isaiah41:4 Ng'oo ne ki kobois ak kogees, ne kuurei ibinwek kobooch taunet? Anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po tai, ak ne po let, aa ineendet." 
Isaiah41:5 Ki keer ngeguusyek, ak koywei; kibotanso komoswek tugul che po ng'wony: ki riik, kobwa." 
Isaiah41:6 Kitoret age tugul chiitap kokwennyi, ak koleenji tugul ng'eetap kamet, Nyiganitu." 
Isaiah41:7 Kogiil anyun musogindetap pagoinik kitang'indetap thahabu, ak ineendet ne ichabaisye kiriswet ko ki ili ineendet ne pirei karnet ne oo, komwachin agobo ole kituiye ngosyelait, koleenjin, Myee: yeityo ko ki ige kipchumarisyek, si ma king'ei." 
Isaiah41:8 Ago inyee Israel, otwogindennyu, Jakobo ne ki alewen, iyoteetap chorwennyu Abraham;" 
Isaiah41:9 inyee ne ki anamin kobooch ole poochin ng'wony, ak aguurin imang'une luukwekyik, ak aleenjin, ii otwogindennyu, ki alewenin ama atimdoin;" 
Isaiah41:10 ameiyweisye, amu ami kobooten; amearagen, amu aa Kamuktaindeng'ung': agimiitin; ee, atoretiin; ee, anamin eng' eunnyu ne po tai ne po imandanyu." 
Isaiah41:11 Keero, ililandos tugul che nereekyinin ak kotoptobenso: egu puch ak kobetyo." 
Isaiah41:12 Icheeng'e icheek, amenyooru, agot icheek che obaregei: egu puch che poryenen, ak kogergeit ak kiy puch." 
Isaiah41:13 Amu aname eung'ung' ne po tai, anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', aleenjinin, Meiywei; atoretiin." 
Isaiah41:14 Meiywei, inyee Jakobo, ne ii kutyet, ak okweek piigap Israel; atoretiin, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak katyagindeng'ung' ko Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah41:15 Keero, ayain iegu kiit ne leel ne ng'atip ne kiboorsee, ne tinyei kelek: ibore tuloonook, ak itui komengegitu, ak iyai tuloonook che mengech kogergeit ak meteteek." 
Isaiah41:16 Iruri, si koip usoonet, ak koyesta kipchurchuryet: ak ibaibaitu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ilasunegei Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah41:17 Cheeng'ei peek piik che ponoon ak che ma tinyei kiy, ago ma mi, ak koyaamei ng'elyepta amu melelda; awoljini, anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma metoi anee Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Isaiah41:18 Ayaate ainoosyek eng' komoswek che torooreen ole churat, ak ayaat kondametusyegap peek eng' kwenutap atebwosyek: ayae surkwen koek tamboiyot, ak emet ne yaamaat kobiitune kong'igap peek." 
Isaiah41:19 Amiine eng' surkwen taragonik, keetiigap chebitoik, momonik, ak che po mwanik; ak ande surkwen piribirinik, taragonik che sabuleen, ak taragonik che teer kobiityo tugul." 
Isaiah41:20 Si komuuch kogeer, ak konai, ak kobwaat, ak koguiyo kibagenge, kole ki yai eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor niito, ak ki toi koyai niito Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah41:21 Kale Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Omwa ng'aleekwok; kale Laitoryatap Jakobo, Oibu ng'aleekwok che kiimeen." 
Isaiah41:22 Ingoip icheek, ak komwaiwech kiit ne piitu: omwa tuguuk che po tai, kiit ne uu, si kobiit kibwaat, ak kenai kagesunennywa, anan oboorwech tuguuk che tuun pwoonei." 
Isaiah41:23 Omwa tuguuk che ta kobiitu, si kobiit kenai keele oo kamuktaik: ee, oyai ne myee, anan oyai ne ya, si kobiit ketoptobense, ak kegeer acheek tugul." 
Isaiah41:24 Ogeero, oo po puch, ak poisyeng'wong' ko po puch: kiwechei ineendet ne lewenok." 
Isaiah41:25 Koang'eet age ne punu murot kaataam, ak kagoit; punu ineendet ne kuure kainennyu ole chorunei asiista: ak nyoonjin pounik ko uu ye nyoonjin meneet, ak ko uu cheptereniot ne tyechei meneet." 
Isaiah41:26 Ng'oo ne ki komwa ng'olyoondoni kobooch taunet, si kobiit kenai? Ak ne kisip komwa, si kobiit kemwa keele, Po ineendet imanda? Ee, ma mi agot agenge ne mwaei, ee, ma mi agot agenge ne ibooru, ee, ma mi agot agenge ne kasei ng'aleekwok." 
Isaiah41:27 Amwachini korook Zion, aleenjini, Keero, keer icheek o; ak agoochini Jerusalem ineendet ne ibu logoiywek che myach." 
Isaiah41:28 Ak ye ageer, koma mi chii; ma mi kirwoogindet agot eng' kwenunnywa, ne ye ateebee icheek, komuuchi kowol ng'olyoo." 
Isaiah41:29 Ogeer tugul o, tangoita poisyonikwak ak ko puch: usoonet ak toiyet kanamonikwak che kitanyi." 
Isaiah42:1 Ogeero otwogindennyu, ne agimiiti, nenyu ne ki alewen ne poiboitune saboondanyu; kande ineendet saboondanyu; ipchin kirwoogetap iman pororyosyek." 
Isaiah42:2 Mabolei anan kowaach, anan kotwek kot kegas kutinnyi eng' ooreet." 
Isaiah42:3 Ma iriei tegat ne chisot, ama imisi ineendet kitambit ne iyeni: ibu kirwooget eng' iman." 
Isaiah42:4 Matanui ama nyogoritu, agoi konde ng'wony kirwooget; ak kogen `ngeguusyek ng'atuutyennyi." 
Isaiah42:5 Mwaei ko uu nooto Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki toi koyai kipsengwet ak koiito; ineendet ne kiito ng'wonyuni, ak che mang'une olooto; ineendet ne igoochin kabuuset piik che menyei ng'wony, ak kogoochi `kabuuset icheek che pendote." 
Isaiah42:6 Ki aguurin, anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' imanda, ak anam eung'ung' ak ariibin, ak agoonin iegu arorutyetap piik, iegu lapkeiyetap Pororyosyek;" 
Isaiah42:7 iyat koonyek che koryotiin, imoong'u kimonjororinik eng' korgoreet, imoong'u che tebee mesundeito." 
Isaiah42:8 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kainennyu nooto; amagoochini toroornatennyu chiito age, amagoochini kanamonik che kiwaei, kalasunennyu." 
Isaiah42:9 Ogeero, kagosulda tuguuk che po tai, ak amwaitoi tuguuk che leelach, amwaiwok kotomo kobiit." 
Isaiah42:10 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tyendo ne leel, otyen kalasunennyi kobooch tabandap ng'wony; okweek che ochoortoige nyanjet ak tugul che mi oriit, ngeguusyek ak piik che menyei olooto." 
Isaiah42:11 Ingotyenso surkwen ak nganasookyik, nganasook che mengeechen che menyei Kedar, ingotyenso piik che menyei Shelah, ingowaach eng' tuloonook parak." 
Isaiah42:12 Ingogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor toroornatet, ak komwaita kalasunennyi eng' ngeguusyek." 
Isaiah42:13 Mandoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu chiito ne kiim; ing'eeti nereegek ko uu chiitap lugeet; polei, ee waachei miising'; iboorchin puunikyik kamugennyi." 
Isaiah42:14 Ki asiis keny; kimayai kiy, ak aratkei: awaache anyun nguno ko uu kwondo ne machei kosigiis; asiiru ak asyenyi." 
Isaiah42:15 Ang'eme tuloonook ak tuloonook che mengeechen, ak ayaam sogekwak tugul; ak awal ainoosyek koek ngeguusyek, ak ateeny tamboinik." 
Isaiah42:16 Ak amutune kipkoratinik ooreet ne ma naei; andochini eng' ortinwek che ma naei: awale mesundeito koek lapkeiyet eng' tainnywa, ak alitit komoswek che kunuuren. Ayae tuguuchuuto, amabagaaktoi." 
Isaiah42:17 Kiweektoi icheek koba let, ak kolilaanso miising', che imang'u kanamonik che ki kiwai, che leenjin kanamonik che ki kitany, Oo kamuktaikyok." 
Isaiah42:18 Ogas okweek che oo ming'otin; ak ogosu, okweek kipkoratinik, si kobiit ogeerte." 
Isaiah42:19 Ng'oo ne koraat, kobatee otwogindennyu? Anan ng'oo ne miing'at ko uu kayooktoinnyu ne ayooktoi? Ng'oo ne koraat ko uu ineendet ne kiting'egei kaalyeet, ak ko koraat ko uu otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?" 
Isaiah42:20 Igeere tuguuk che chaang', ago meguitosi; yaatatin itiikyik, ago ma kasei." 
Isaiah42:21 Ki ibaibai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotoroor ng'atuutyet, ak koyai koek ne kigonyiti amu imandanyi." 
Isaiah42:22 Ago chu ko piik che ki kiluul, ak kerebe tuguukwak; ki kiname icheek tugul keriingonik, ak keung'e korgorosyek: ki koek che kiluulei, ama mi chii ne saru; ki koek che kiluule tuguuk, ama mi chii ne leen, Oweekte." 
Isaiah42:23 Ng'oo eng' okweek ne chamei koepchi iit niito? Ne chamei koep iit ak kogas agobo peetuusyek che pwoonei? 
Isaiah42:24 Ki igoito ng'oo Jakobo keluul, ak ki igoito ng'oo Israel kogoochi rebiik? Tos ma Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ineendet ne ki kiyachi acheek tengekto, ak ne ki ma cham icheek kobendatee ortinwekyik, ama kas iit ng'atuutyennyi." 
Isaiah42:25 Kiroong'ji anyun nereegekyik che koroomen, ak kimnateetap lugeet; ak koyieme maat ineendet, ago ma nai kora ak kobeel ineendet, ago ma chut muguleldanyi." 
Isaiah43:1 Ago mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiyain kole ee Jakobo, ak ineendet ne kimimiin, ee Israel: kole, meiywei, amu ki atyachin; ki aguurin eng' kaineng'ung', ii nenyu." 
Isaiah43:2 Ami kobooten ye ibune peek che chaang'; ak ye ibune ainoosyek, koma imaluuchin; ye ibune maat, koma peelin; ama imelin liplibenetap maat." 
Isaiah43:3 Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, Yetindeng'ung'; kaagoite Misiri koek ne kityagenen, kobooto Kush ak Seba." 
Isaiah43:4 Amu koiegu eng' anee ne achame miising', ak ne kigonyiti, ak ki achamin; agoitoi anyun piik agobo inyee, ak agoite piik agobo sabeeng'ung'." 
Isaiah43:5 Meiywei; amu ami kobooten: amutu iyoteng'ung' eng' kong'asiis, ayumin inyoo eng' cherongo;" 
Isaiah43:6 Amwachini murot kaataam, aleenjini, Koonu; ak amwachi murot tai aleenji, Ametuuch; omutu weeriikyuk kobun ole loo, ak omutu tiibiikyuk eng' ole poochin ng'wony;" 
Isaiah43:7 age tugul ne kimwaitoe kainennyu, ineendet ne ki atau ayai agobo toroornatennyu; ki amimii; ee, ki ayai." 
Isaiah43:8 Omutu piik che koryotiin che tinyei koonyek, ak omutu piik che ming'otin che tinyei itiik." 
Isaiah43:9 Ingoyumgei pororyosyek tugul, ak ingoyumgei piik: ng'oo eng' icheek ne imuuchi komwa ng'olyoondoniito, ak koboorwech tuguuk che po tai? Ingomut paorinikwak, si kobiit kiityi imanda: anan ingogas, ak komwa kole, po iman." 
Isaiah43:10 Oo paorinikyuk, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak otwogindennyu ne ki alewen; si kobiit onai ak oyana, ak oguiye ole aa ineendet; ma mi Kamuktaindet age ne kisip keyai eng' anee, ama kobiitu age eng' let." 
Isaiah43:11 Anee, ee, aneendet, aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ama mi yetindet age kobatena." 
Isaiah43:12 Ki amwaite, ak ki asaru, ak ki abarte, ama mi kamuktain ne teer eng' kwenung'wong': oo paorinikyuk anyun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak aa Kamuktaindet." 
Isaiah43:13 Ee, aa ineendet kobooch agoi, ama mi age ne imuuchi korep eng' eunnyu: aboisyei, ak ng'oo ne imuuchi koger?" 
Isaiah43:14 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, katyagindeng'wong', Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, ko uu ni, kole: Ki ayookte ng'olyoot kwo Babilon agobo okweek, ak achooru icheek tugul ko uu che mweoti, chooto po Kaldeik, eng' melisyek che poiboitune." 
Isaiah43:15 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, neng'wong' Ne Tiliil, Yaindetap Israel, Laitoryandeng'wong'." 
Isaiah43:16 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne yaei ooreet eng' nyanjet, ak ooreet eng' peek che kiimeen;" 
Isaiah43:17 ne imoong'u chepkichutit ak paraisiit kobooto lugeet ak kimnateet; ruitos tugul ng'wony, ama ng'eetos kogeny; kagobetyo, kagimis ko uu kitambit:" 
Isaiah43:18 Amat obwaat tuguuk che po tai, amat ogereerchi met tuguuk che po keny." 
Isaiah43:19 Ogeero, ayae kiit ne leel; piitu anyun nguno; tos monae? Ayae ooreet eng' surkwen, ak ainoosyek eng' surkwen." 
Isaiah43:20 Konyita tyong'igap timiin, lelwek ak tyong'igap songolik: amu agoonu peek eng' surkwen, ak ainoosyek eng' surkwen, si anaga piikyuk, chechuuk che ki alewen:" 
Isaiah43:21 piik che ki ayachigei, si kobiit kobarta kalasunennyu." 
Isaiah43:22 Ago ma iguura, ee Jakobo; ago ki ing'eet agobo anee, ee Israel." 
Isaiah43:23 Ma igetwo aareguk koek kagoochinoiguk che kibeelei; ama igonyitena tiseiyweguk. Ma abirchin iotisye kagoochinoik, ama aimeneen tuguuk che nyamdut." 
Isaiah43:24 Ma ialunena fedha tuguuk che uu mutweek che nyamdut, ama igoono abiyo eng' mwanigap tiseiyweguk: ago ki imena tengekwogiguk, ki igoono ang'et agobo yaitwogiguk." 
Isaiah43:25 Anee, ee aneendet ne aistoi pistaosyeguk, amu kainennyu; amabwaati tengekwogiguk." 
Isaiah43:26 Ibwaatwa; ngeng'alaal tuwai: tetu ng'aleeguk, si kobiit kiityin imanda." 
Isaiah43:27 Ki yai tengekto kwandang'ung' ne po tai, ak ki ingelelja ng'alaaliguk." 
Isaiah43:28 Amurwoni anyun pounik che po ole-tiliil, ak ayae Jakobo koek ne chuboot, ak ayae Israel koek ne kisasei." 
Isaiah44:1 Kas anyun nguno, ee otwogindennyu Jakobo; ak Israel ne ki alewen:" 
Isaiah44:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiyain, ne kimimiin eng' moet, ne toretin, kole, meiywei, ee otwogindennyu Jakobo; ak inyee Jesurun, ne ki alewen." 
Isaiah44:3 Amu aroong'jini peek ne amei melel, aroong'jini ainoosyek emet ne yaamaat: aroong'jini Kabuusennyu iyoteng'ung', ak aroong'jini perurtanyu lagoguk:" 
Isaiah44:4 ak kobiityo eng' ole mi susweek, ko uu keetiik che piitos eng' ole roote peek." 
Isaiah44:5 Mwaei age kole, aa po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak koguuregei age kainetap Jakobo; ak kosirchi age eunnyi kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak komwaitoegei kainetap Israel." 
Isaiah44:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Laitoryatap Israel, ak ko katyagindennyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kole, aa ne po tai ak ne po let; ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatena." 
Isaiah44:7 Ak ng'oo ne uu anee, ne kuurei, ak komwaita, ak kotetwa, kobooch ngap ande piigap keny? Ak ingomwa icheek tuguuk che pwoonei, ak che ta kosuldoi." 
Isaiah44:8 Amoiywei, anan oaragense: tos ma amwaun niito keny, aboorun? Oo paorinikyuk. Tos mi Kamuktaindet age kobatena? Ee, ma miitei Rwandet; mangen age." 
Isaiah44:9 Puch icheeget tugul che yaei kanamonik che kiwaei; ak ma tinyei keljinet tuguukwak che iboiboegei: ak ma keertoi paorinikwak, ama naei; si kolilaanso." 
Isaiah44:10 Ng'oo ne ki yai kamuktain, anan kotany kanamwet ne kiwaei, ne tinyei keljinet ne po puch?" 
Isaiah44:11 Ogeero, ililandos choronokyik tugul; ak po piik musogik: ingoyumgei tugul, ingotononso; iyweisyei, ililandos tugul." 
Isaiah44:12 Itanyi kitang'indet aiywet, ak koboisyee nesek, ak kotang'e kiriswet, ak koboisyee eunnyi ne kiim: ee, amei rubeet, ak petei kimnateennyi; ma eei peek, ak kotanui." 
Isaiah44:13 Iitoe musogindetap pagoinik porowet; ak komare kalamit; site rotonik, ak komare yiemutyet kariik che kimarse, ak kowai koigei itoondap chiito, ko uu karaaranindap chiito, si kobiit kotebee ko." 
Isaiah44:14 Iluuljingei taragonik, ak koip piribiryet ak keetit age, ak koriipchigei age eng' keetiigap timiin: minei tarakwet ne sabul, ak koner amu ropta." 
Isaiah44:15 Egu anyun keetoto ne ilaali chiito; ak ibei kweenikyik, ak kwo koyu; ee, ilaali, ak kobeele magatiinik: ee, yaei kamuktain, ak kosa; yaei koek kanamwet ne kiwaei, ak kogutung'ji." 
Isaiah44:16 Ilaali alak; amei alak panyeek: watani pendo, ak kobiyo: ee, yue maat, ak kole, haa, kalalang'itu, kaageer maat:" 
Isaiah44:17 ak koyae che ng'etu kamuktain, nooto kanamwennyi ne kiwaei: ibutyin ak kogutung'jin, ak kosaaei, kole, sarwo; amu ii kamuktaindennyu." 
Isaiah44:18 Ma ingen icheek, ama ibwaati: amu ki kogeer konyekwak, si ma keerto; ak koger mugulelwekwak, si ma iguiyo." 
Isaiah44:19 Ama mi ne ibwaati, ama mi naet anan kaguiyet ne mwaei kole, Kaabeel alak eng' ma: ee, kaabeele magatiinik nesekyik kogeny; kaawatane panyeek ak aam: ak tos ayai ne kang'et koek kiit ne kiwechei? Tos abutyini kiit ne kiyae keetit?" 
Isaiah44:20 Amei oreek: kagomaas ineendet muguleldo ne iberberat, kot koma imuuchi kosar saboondanyi, anan komwa kole, tos ma mi lembeita eunnyu ne po tai?" 
Isaiah44:21 Ibwaat tuguuchuuto, ee Jakobo, ak Israel; amu ii otwogindennyu: ki ayain; ii otwogindennyu: ee Israel, mautyenen." 
Isaiah44:22 Ki aiste pistaosyeguk, ko uu pooldet ne oo, ak ki aiste tengekwogiguk, ko uu pooldet: weekyage; amu ki atyachin." 
Isaiah44:23 Ee okweek kipsengwet, Otyense, amu ki yai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nooto; owaach okweek, komoswek che po oriit che po ng'wony; otyense, okweek tuloonook, ee timiin, ak keetit age tugul ne mi yooto: amu kagotyach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo, ak kotoroorgei eng' Israel." 
Isaiah44:24 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, katyagindeng'ung', ineendet ne kimimiin eng' moet, kole, aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne yaei tuguuk tugul; aneege ne aiitoi kipsengwet; ne aiitoi ng'wony; ng'oo ne mi kobooto?" 
Isaiah44:25 Ne walei tartetap kiplembechonik koek puch, ak kogoochin che ng'oorsei koiiywenso; ne weechi piik che utaatiin koba let, ak koyaei naennywa koek perberyo:" 
Isaiah44:26 ne igimiti ng'olyootap otwogindennyi, ak kosuldoi kirwoogetap chechiik che kiyooktoi; ne mwaei agobo Jerusalem kole, tuun ki menyei; ak komwaei agobo nganasoogap Judah kole, tuun kiteechei, ak ang'eet komoswekyik che ki koek karatwek:" 
Isaiah44:27 ne mwachin rireet koleenjin, Yaam, ak ateenyi ainoosyeguk:" 
Isaiah44:28 ne mwaei agobo Cyrus kole, ineendet ko mestowondennyu, ak koyaei ineendet tuguuk tugul che achame: mwaei kogeny agobo Jerusalem kole, tuun kiteechei, ak komwachin Hekaluut koleenjin, Tuun kilumei lumeiyweguk." 
Isaiah45:1 Mwachin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Cyrus, nenyi ne iilaat, ne aname eunnyi ne po tai, koterteer pororyosyek eng' tainnyi, ak atyach suenutigap laitorinik; si ayaat kurgotik eng' tainnyi, ama kigerei ormariichok, komwaei kole;" 
Isaiah45:2 Andoenen, ak alitit komoswek che kunuuren: atonatoni kereiywegap sugunonik che po kurgotik, ak atil temeleiywek che po kariik:" 
Isaiah45:3 ak agoonin konoraigap mesundeito, ak mogornatosyek che ung'ootiin che po komoswegap ung'oot, si kobiit inai ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki aguurin eng' kaineng'ung', Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Isaiah45:4 Ki aguurin eng' kaineng'ung' amu Jakobo otwogindennyu ak amu Israel nenyu ne ki alewen: kaataun kainet nganda tomo inaa. 
Isaiah45:5 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama mi age; ma mi Kamuktaindet age kobatena: agermenin, nganda tomo inaa:" 
Isaiah45:6 si kobiit konai icheek kobooch ko kachor asiis, ak kobooch cherongo, kole ma mi age kobatena: aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama mi age." 
Isaiah45:7 Ayae lapkeiyet, ak ayae mesundeito; ayae kaalyeet, ak ayae yaityet; aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne yaei tuguuchuuto tugul." 
Isaiah45:8 Osau, okweek kipsengwet, ak ingorong' poolik imanda: ingoyaatak emet, si kobiit koip poolik yetunet, ak ingogoochi imanda kobiityo tugul; anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ayae nooto." 
Isaiah45:9 Pwo eng' ineendet ne poortos ak Yaindennyi! Rokyet eng' rokyonigap ng'wony! Tos mwachin meneet ineendet ne kimimii, koleenjin, Iyae nee? Anan tos mwaei poisyeng'ung' kole, ma tinyei ineendet eunek?" 
Isaiah45:10 Pwo eng' ineendet ne leenjin kwandanyi, Iyie nee? Anan koteebe kwondo koleenji, amin moet agobo nee?" 
Isaiah45:11 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, ak ko Yaindennyi, kole, teebena agobo tuguuk che pwoonei; ong'ata agobo weeriikyuk, ak agobo poisyetap eunekyuk." 
Isaiah45:12 Ki ayae ng'wony, ak ki atau ayai chiito kotebee olooto: anee, ee, eunekyuk, che kiito kipsengwet, ak ki ang'at lugosyekwak tugul." 
Isaiah45:13 Ki ang'eet ineendet eng' imanda, ak alititi ortinwekyik tugul: ineendet ne teechei nganasennyu, ak kotyach piikyuk che ki kimut, ma eng' alet anan melekto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah45:14 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, nyonjinin poisyetap Misiri, kobooto tuguugap mung'areetap Kush, ak piigap Sabe, piik che kooen, ak punjinin; isubun; pwonjinin ko ratotiin; ak kobutyi keelyeguk, kosoomin, kole, Iman mi Kamuktaindet kobooten; ama mi age, ma mi Kamuktaindet age." 
Isaiah45:15 Iman, ii Kamuktaindet ne iunyegei, ee, Kamuktaindetap Israel, Yetindet." 
Isaiah45:16 Ililandos, ee, toptobendos icheek tugul; toitos tugul che yaei kanamonik." 
Isaiah45:17 Ago saru Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' yetunet ne po koigeny: molilandosi anan otoptobense koigeny ak koigeny. 
Isaiah45:18 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki toi koyai kipsengwet kole, Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne kimimii ng'wony ak koyai; ki igimit, ki ma yai koek puch, ki yai si kobiit kemeny: aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ama mi age." 
Isaiah45:19 Tom ang'alaal eng' ung'oot, eng' komostap emet ne po mesundeito; ma aleenji iyoteetap Jakobo, Ocheeng'a puch; amwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor imanda, amwae tuguuk che litit." 
Isaiah45:20 Oyumgei obwa; oriigu tugul, okweek che ki ochilile pororyosyek: ma tinyei naet icheek che ibei keetitap kanamwennywa ne ki kiwai, ak kosaaei kamuktain ne ma imuuchi kosar." 
Isaiah45:21 Omwaite, obarte; ee, ingorwoch tugul: ng'oo ne ki iboor ng'olyoondoniito kobooch keny? Ng'oo ne ki mwaita kobooch keny? Tos ma anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatena; Kamuktaindet ne po iman, ak ko yaindet; ma mi age kobatena." 
Isaiah45:22 Onyala, si kesorwok, okweek tabanwek tugul che po ng'wony: amu aa Kamuktaindet, ama mi age." 
Isaiah45:23 Ki ayosyechigei, kagomang'une ng'olyoot kutinnyu eng' imanda, ama weechegei, ale, kutung'jino kutundo age tugul, iyastos ng'elyepta age tugul." 
Isaiah45:24 Leenjino age, Mi eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineegei imanda ak kimnateet: pwaanjin `piik ineendet ak kolilaandos icheek tugul che ki nereekyi ineendet." 
Isaiah45:25 Ki ityin imanda iyoteet tugul ne po Israel eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kolasunegei." 
Isaiah46:1 Abuksei Bel, ing'uruuksei Nebo; lae `tyong'ik ak `tuuga kanamonikwak: kagiyai koek mileet tuguuk che ki oiboti, ko uu lautyet eng' tyong'ik che ng'etyotiin." 
Isaiah46:2 Ing'uruuksei ak ko abuksei tugul; amu ma imuuch kola lautyet, kiluulei icheeget." 
Isaiah46:3 Oepcha iit, ee kootap Jakobo, ak tugul che ng'etunotiin che po kootap Israel, che ki ageseni kobooch ko kagisich, che ki kigeseni kobooch komi moo:" 
Isaiah46:4 Aa ineendet agoi osindo, ak agesenook agoi osich kalwalek: ki ayae, ak ageseni, ee ageseni, ak asaru." 
Isaiah46:5 Orogendoa ng'oo, ak oaechinena ng'oo, ak oyaniena ng'oo si kobiit kegergeitu?" 
Isaiah46:6 Icheek che rong'u thahabu eng' lolet, ak kogere fedha ratilit, kosiirei kitang'indetap thahabu, ak koyae tuguuchooto kanamwet; ibutyin ng'wony icheek, ee, kutung'jin." 
Isaiah46:7 Ibe tigikyyet, laei, ak koteepto eng' oldanyi, ak kotonon; ma keisto eng' komostanyi: ee, riirchin age kioto, ama imuuch kowol, anan kosar ineendet eng' nyalildanyi." 
Isaiah46:8 Obwaat ni anyun, ak obartegei ole oo murenik: obwaatyige kogeny, ee okweek pistoichu." 
Isaiah46:9 Obwaat tuguuk che po tai che po keny; amu aa Kamuktaindet, ama mi age; aa Kamuktaindet, ama mi age ne kegerge;" 
Isaiah46:10 ne iboortoi kegesunet kobooch taunet, ak koboortoi kobooch peetuusyek che po keny, tuguuk che tomo koyaogis; kole, tononi kirwoogennyu, ak ayae tugul che achame:" 
Isaiah46:11 aguure toriityon ne amei panyeek eng' kong'asiis, aguure kirwoogindennyu kobun emet ne loo; ee, kaamwa, ak ayae kosulda; ki achop, ak ayai." 
Isaiah46:12 Oepcha iit, okweek che oo nyigoonen, che oo looen eng' imanda:" 
Isaiah46:13 Aibu imandanyu koriik, malooitu, ama igaegei yetunennyu: ak ande Zion yetunet agobo Israel ne toroornatennyu." 
Isaiah47:1 Choruge ak itebee temburyek, ee inyee ne ii chepto ne pergeiyat ne po Babilon; tebee ng'wony, ye ma mi ng'echereetap laitornatet, ee cheptap Kaldeik: amu ma keguurenen kogeny ne cheptalbisyo ak ko ng'arng'ar." 
Isaiah47:2 Nam koitap pai, ak ing'aa peek: ng'aany meting'ung', ireegu ngoryeeng'ung' ne kooi, ng'aany keeldo, ak ilandae ainoosyek." 
Isaiah47:3 King'aanyin itebi aach ngor, ee, taagu teweernateng'ung': ayaaktoi mugetuut, amataache chii age tugul." 
Isaiah47:4 Katyagindennyo, kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah47:5 Tebi eng' siisek, ak iwe mesundeito, ee cheptap Kaldeik: amu ma keguurenen kogeny Chebyosetap laitornatosyek." 
Isaiah47:6 Ki anereekyi piikyuk, ki amurwon poortannyu, ak ki ande icheek eung'ung': ma iriiree agot kitigin; ki igesenji che ki koosegitu choging'ung' ne nyigiis miising'." 
Isaiah47:7 Ak ki imwa ile, Aegu chebyoset agoi; kot ko mata inde tuguuchuuto muguleldang'ung', amata ibwaat kagesunennywa." 
Isaiah47:8 Kas niito anyun, inyee ne ichame ureryosyek, ne imeng'iisyei, ameiiti kiy, ne imwae eng' muguleldang'ung' ile, Aneendet, ama mi age kobatena; matebye ko uu kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot, ama pegunena lagok:" 
Isaiah47:9 ago cheein tuguuchuuto aeng' peetuunak, pegu lagok, ak kobiit mosoknateet: pwonjinin ko nyiitootiin, agot ngo chaang' orgoinatosyeguk, ak ko ng'iisyat ng'oorsosyeguk." 
Isaiah47:10 Amu ki imang'u sogornateng'ung'; ki ile, Ma mi chii ne keera; ki komaasin utaatyeng'ung' ak naeng'ung': ak ki imwa eng' muguleldang'ung' ile, Aneendet, ma mi age kobatena." 
Isaiah47:11 Nyonjinin anyun yaityet; memuuchi igirinde: ak ibutyinin pichiindo, memuuchi iiste: ak kochein ng'emisyet, ne mengen." 
Isaiah47:12 Tonon anyun nguno itinye ng'oorsosyek, kobooto chaang'indap orgoinatosyeguk, che ki ibirtochigei kobooch ko ii ming'in; ngo tos imuuchi inyoorunee kelunet, ngo tos imuuchi iterteerisye." 
Isaiah47:13 Ki ing'eet eng' chaang'indap kirwoogutiguk: ingotononso anyun ng'amotigap kecheik, ak keerigap kecheik, ng'amotigap arawet age tugul, kosaruun eng' tuguuk che pwonjinin." 
Isaiah47:14 Keero, igeitu mobeek; peelei maat; masarugei eng' kimnateetap maat ne lalei; ma egu nesek che kiyue, ama egu maat ne kitebee tainnyi." 
Isaiah47:15 Uu nooto anyun tuguuk che ki ibirtochigei: ombenoti icheek che kiyaei mung'aaret kobooten, kobooch ko ii ming'in, wendi age tugul komostanyi: ma piitu ne saruun." 
Isaiah48:1 Ogas ni anyun, okweek, ee kootap Jakobo, che kimwaitoenok kainetap Israel, che ki obiitune peegap Judah; che oyostosi eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak omwae Kamuktaindetap Israel, ago ma eng' iman, anan ko eng' imanda." 
Isaiah48:2 Amu mwaei kole ki po nganaseet ne tiliil, ak kotiegei Kamuktaindetap Israel: kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah48:3 Ki amwaite tuguuk che po tai kobooch keny; ee, ki mang'une kutinnyu, ak ki abarte: ki ayai achokyi, ak ki isulda." 
Isaiah48:4 Amu ki anai ale uin met, po karnet kaating'ung', po sugunwet togeng'ung';" 
Isaiah48:5 nooto anyun ki amwaun kobooch keny; ki asip aboorun ama isulda: si memwa ile, kiyaei kanamwennyu, ak king'atei kanamwennyu ne ki kiwai, ak kanamwennyu ne ki kitany, chooto che king'atei chuuto." 
Isaiah48:6 Ki igas niito; keer chuuto tugul o; ak okweek, ko tos momwaitoi? Kaaboorun tuguuk che leelach kobooch nguno, agot tuguuk che ung'ootiin, che tomo inai." 
Isaiah48:7 Kitau keyaei nguno, ma pooch keny; ak kitom igas agoi peetuuni; si memwa ile, Keero, ki angen." 
Isaiah48:8 Ee, kitom igas, ee kitom inai; ee kitom koyaatak iting'ung': amu ki angen ale iyae kaberberisyet ne oo, ak ki kiguurenen pistoindet kobooch imi moo." 
Isaiah48:9 Agoitoi nereegekyuk amu kainennyu, ak amuitoi agobo inyee amu kalasunennyu, si magesun." 
Isaiah48:10 Keero, kaatiliilin eng' maat, ago ma ko uu fedha; kaalewenin eng' maat ne oo ne po nyalilda." 
Isaiah48:11 Ayae amu kainennyu, amu kainennyu; amu kimurwonindoi ano kainennyu? Amagoochini age toroornatennyu." 
Isaiah48:12 Oepcha iit, ee Jakobo, ak Israel nenyu, ne ki aguur: aa ineendet; aa ne po tai, ak ko aa ne po let kogeny." 
Isaiah48:13 Ee, kilum eunnyu lumeiywotap ng'wony, ak kiito eunnyu ne po tai kipsengwet: ye aguur icheek, kotononso kibagenge." 
Isaiah48:14 Oyumgei, okweek tugul, si ogas; ng'oo eng' icheek ne ki komwaita tuguuchuuto? Kigocham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet: yaei eng' Babilon kiit ne chamei, ak kotebee eunnyi Kaldeik." 
Isaiah48:15 Anee, ee aneendet ne ki amwae; ee ki aguur ineendet: ki amutu, ak poorei ineendet eng' ooreennyi." 
Isaiah48:16 Oriikyo, ogas ni; tomo amwa kiy eng' ung'oot kobooch keny; ki ami kobooch agoi; kagoyookta anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak Kabuusennyi." 
Isaiah48:17 Mwaei ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, katyagindeng'ung', Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel: Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ne ineetin iboor, ne indoun eng' ooreet ne kanyool ibun." 
Isaiah48:18 Kita myee nda kigegas ng'atuutikyuk! Kita igeitu kalyeng'ung' aineet, ak koigei imandang'ung' peegap nyanjet che mildogei:" 
Isaiah48:19 Kita tenitu ng'aniek iyoteng'ung', ak koigei lagoguk che kisiche, chaang'indap ng'aniek: ki ma kota ki istoi kainennyi anan keng'em eng' tainnyu." 
Isaiah48:20 Omande eng' Babilon, omwei eng' Kaldea; obarte eng' cheetap tyendo, omwaite niito, omwa kogasak agoi ole pooch ng'wony: omwa ole, Kigotyach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo otwogindennyi." 
Isaiah48:21 Ma am melelda icheek ye ki kimuti kobun ong'atosyek: ki igoochi peek korootune rwandet konaga icheek: ki pet rwandet kogeny, ak kitumgei peek." 
Isaiah48:22 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ma mi kaalyeet eng' kiptengeginik." 
Isaiah49:1 Ogasa, ee ngeguusyek; ak oep iit, okweek pororyosyek che omi ole loo; kiguura Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch ami moo; ki mwa kainennyu kobooch ami moetap kamennyu:" 
Isaiah49:2 ak ki koyai kutinnyu koigei rotwetap chok ne ng'atip, kiung'ena urwetap eunnyi; ki koyaa aek irumet ne ki kisit, kigoung'ena motyennyi:" 
Isaiah49:3 ak ki leenjo, ii otwogindennyu; ee Israel, ne kitoroorena." 
Isaiah49:4 Ago ki amwa ale, Ki abirtegei puch, ki aboisyee kimnateennyu puch, ak eng' tangoita; ago iman, mi kirwoogennyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak mi yaaktaennyu eng' Kamuktaindennyu." 
Isaiah49:5 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kimimia kobooch ami moo aek otwogindennyi, si kobiit amutyi ineendet Jakobo kogeny, ak kiyumji Israel ineendet: (amu aa konyitot eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kagoek Kamuktaindennyu kimnateennyu:)" 
Isaiah49:6 ee, mwaei kole, kiy ne ming'in iegu otwogindennyu, si kobiit ing'eet pororyosyek che po Jakobo, ak iweech che ki kiriip che po Israel: agoonin kogeny iegu lapkeiyetap Pororyosyek, si kobiit iegu yetunennyu agoi ole poochin ng'wony." 
Isaiah49:7 Mwaei ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, katyagindetap Israel, ak ko Nenyi ne Tiliil, ineendet ne sasei piik, ineendet ne wechei pororyet, ne otwogindetap pounik: Tuun keerei laitorinik ak kong'eetyo; ak kogutung'so pounik; amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kiyani, Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, ne ki lewenin." 
Isaiah49:8 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ki awolun eng' peetuut ne chamaksei, ak ki atoretiin eng' peetuutap yetunet: ak ariibin, ak agoonin iegu arorutyetap piik, si ilang'u emet, si igoochi kobore porotosyek che ki mi puch;" 
Isaiah49:9 koleenjin icheek che ratotiin, Omande; ak koleenjin che mi mesundeito, Obartegei. Amisyoti eng' ortinwek, ak egu komoswek che torooreen ole churat, ole ki agete." 
Isaiah49:10 Ma kasei rubeet anan koam melelda; ama kobeelei icheek maat, anan kobir asiista: amu indochin icheek ineendet ne riiree, imuti kobun kong'igap peek." 
Isaiah49:11 Ak ayae tuloonookyuk tugul koek ooreet, ak kotororitu ortinwekyuk che eecheen." 
Isaiah49:12 Ogeero, punu chu ole loo: ak ogeero, punu chu murot kaataam ak cherongo; ak punu chu emetap Sinim." 
Isaiah49:13 Otyense, ee kipsengwet; ak oboiboitu, ee ng'wony; ak otyense, ee tuloonook; amu kagogaigai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik, ak koriiree piikyik che ki kinyalil." 
Isaiah49:14 Ago ki mwa Zion kole, ki kometa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kigoutyeno Kiptaiyat." 
Isaiah49:15 Tos imuuchi kwondo koutye lakweennyi ne chuchuni, kot koma riiree weeriit ne kisichei? Ee, imuuchi chuuto koutye, ago mautyenen." 
Isaiah49:16 Keero, ki asirchin rubeitap eunekyuk; mi tainnyu kotugul irimoiguk." 
Isaiah49:17 Igirgiri lagoguk; mandaenen ng'emiguk, che yain iguber." 
Isaiah49:18 Ing'eet met ak igeer komoswek tugul: iyumigei chuuto tugul, ak kobwonjin. Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye asabe, iman, ilaachi tuguuchooto tugul ko uu kiit ne po lelesta, ak igermenegei icheek, ko uu ye kermenigei murereet." 
Isaiah49:19 Amu mariigitu komosweguk che kigemeto, ak che ki koguber, ak emeng'ung' ne kigeng'em, iman mariigityin piik che menyei, ak kolooegitu icheek che kiluguin." 
Isaiah49:20 Tuun igase komwaei lagoguk che isiche, ko kagobek alak, koleen, mariich olito eng' anee: istowage si kobiit ameng'iis." 
Isaiah49:21 Yeityo imwa eng' muguleldang'ung' ileen, Kisikwa ng'oo chuuto, amu ki kobegunena lagokyuk, ak ami aneege, ak kigeluula, ak aombenoti? Ak ng'oo ne ki igu chuuto? Keero, ki kibagaakta aneege; kimi ano chuuto?" 
Isaiah49:22 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, atokyini eunnyu pororyosyek, ak aboorchi piik songolyennyu: si koganap weeriiguk, ak kimut tiibiiguk eng' tigigoikwak." 
Isaiah49:23 Ak koek laitorinik kwanisyeguk che iguin, ak koek osotigap laitorinik kametwogiguk che iguin: kutung'jinin icheek kot koit togoochikwak ng'wony, ak komel temburyek che mi keelyeguk; ak inai ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma ililandos icheek che igeno." 
Isaiah49:24 Tos kirebe ne kiim tuguuk che kiluul, anan kityaachi luulenik che ki kiluul eng' imanda?" 
Isaiah49:25 Ago mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, kirebe che kiimeen luulenikwak, ak kityaachi tugul che ki kiluulei, che po che imuisei: amu kibortosi ak ineendet ne poryenen, ak asaru lagoguk." 
Isaiah49:26 Ak abae icheek che usin poorwekwak; ak kobogityo eng' korotiikwak, ko uu ye pogiti chii eng' divaik che leelachen: si konai piik tugul kole, aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetindeng'ung', ak ko katyagindeng'ung', Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet ne po Jakobo." 
Isaiah50:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, mi ano parweetap pesyetap kamenng'ung', ne ki aoone ineendet? Anan ki aaldachok ng'oo ne yaacha? Ki kialdak amu yaitwogikwok, ak ki kioon kamenng'ung' amu pistaosyekwok." 
Isaiah50:2 Kilya si ma piit chii ye ki anyoone? Kinga kuurse koma piit chii ne wolu? Tos kigonwagit eunnyu kot koma imuuch kotyach? Anan ma tinyei kamuget ne asaruunee? Keero, ateenyi nyanjet eng' kergong'yennyu, ayae ainoosyek koek surkwen: poldos njireenikwak, ak kobek eng' melelda, amu ma mi peek." 
Isaiah50:3 Alaakyini kipsengwet tuindo, ak atuge kuniok." 
Isaiah50:4 Ki koono Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'elyepta ne po icheeget che ki kineet, si kobiit anai ole agimiititoi eng' ng'aleek ineendet ne ng'etat: ing'eetisyei karonet age tugul, ing'eeta si kobiit agas ko uu che ki kineet." 
Isaiah50:5 Ki koyaat Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor itinnyu, ak ki ma angelel, anan atuktoochi patai." 
Isaiah50:6 Ki agoochi kobir patennyu piriik, ak agoochi matang'wekyuk icheeget che kiitut suumeek: ma aung'e togeennyu teweernateet ak che sing'iljino." 
Isaiah50:7 Amu toreto Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma alilan anyun amu nooto: ki auuiit anyun togeennyu koigei rwandet ne uui, ak angen ale ma lilani." 
Isaiah50:8 Neegit ineendet ne iityina imanda; kibortosi ak ng'oo? Ngetononse tuwai: ng'oo punyondennyu? Ingonyo koriikyo. 
Isaiah50:9 Ogeero, toreto Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ng'oo ne igiikyino? Ogeero, osegitu icheek tugul ko uu ngoryeet; amei kiptorotyot." 
Isaiah50:10 Ng'oo eng' okweek ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne kase iit kutitap otwogindennyi? Ne wendote mesundeito, ama tinyei lapkeiyet, ingomang' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kotiegei Kamuktaindennyi." 
Isaiah50:11 Ogeero, okweek tugul che olaali maat, che ogermenegei kegenganik: obunote liplibenetap mang'wong', ak eng' kwenutap kegenganik che kaolaal. Onyooru niito kobunu eunnyu; oruitosi eng' arageneet." 
Isaiah51:1 Oepcha iit, okweek che osubi imanda, okweek che ocheeng'e Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ogeer rwandet ne ki kimoong'unenok eng' waet, ak ogeer keriinget ne ki kibalunenok." 
Isaiah51:2 Ogeer Abraham kwandang'wong', ak Sara ne kisichok: amu ki aguur ineendet ye kita komi ineegei, ak aberuur ineendet ak abaraa." 
Isaiah51:3 Amu kagogaigai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion: kagogaigai komoswekyik tugul che kigemeto, ak ki koyai ong'atennyi koigei Eden, ak koyai surkwenennyi koigei mbareetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kinyoorchin olooto poiboiyet ak kaagaasetapkei, kobooto kongoi ak tyenwogik che rurei komyee." 
Isaiah51:4 Ogasa, ee piikyuk; oepcha iit, ee, pororyennyu: amu mong'unena ng'atuutyet, ak ayai kirwoogennyu kotonon koek lapkeiyetap piik." 
Isaiah51:5 Neegit imandanyu, kamong' yetunennyu, ak korwookyi piik eunekyuk; igeno ngeguusyek, ak komang'u eunnyu." 
Isaiah51:6 Onyal kipsengwet, ak ogeer ng'wony: amu petos kipsengwet ko uu iyeto, ak ositu ng'wony ko uu ngoryeet, ak pegu ko uu nooto icheek che menyei olooto: ago punjin koigeny yetunennyu, ama kigeesu imandanyu." 
Isaiah51:7 Oepcha iit, okweek che ongen imanda, piik che mi ng'atuutyennyu mugulelwekwak: amoiywei chotisyetap piik, amoaragense amu churisyosyekwak." 
Isaiah51:8 Amu amei icheek kiptorotyot ko uu ngoryeet, ak koamei icheek kutyet ko uu koroorik: ago punjin koigeny imandanyu, ak kobunjiin ibinwek tugul yetunennyu." 
Isaiah51:9 Ng'eet, ng'eet, ilaach kimnateet, ee, eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ng'eet, ko uu peetuusyek che po keny, ibinwegap peetuusyek che po keny. Tos ma inyee ne kiitonaton Rahab, ne kiitoor maswetit?" 
Isaiah51:10 Tos ma inyee ne ki iteeny nyanjet, peegap rireet ne oo; ne ki iyai rireetap nyanjet koek ooreet ne landoe icheek che ki kityaach?" 
Isaiah51:11 Ak koweegegei che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che ki kityaach, ak kobwa Zion kotyenonu; ak tebee metowekwak poiboiyetap koigeny: nyooru kaagaasetapkei ak poiboiyet, ak komwei arageneet ak tigenet." 
Isaiah51:12 Anee, aneendet ne agoigook: ii ng'oo, kot iywei chiito ne meei, ak iywei weeriitap chii ne kiyaei koek suswot;" 
Isaiah51:13 ak ki iutye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Yaindeng'ung', ne kiito kipsengwet, ak kolumda lumeiywegap ng'wony; ak iyweisyei kotugul, peetuut komugul, amu koroomnatetap usiindet ye chobegei si kong'emis? Mi ano koroomnatetap usiindet?" 
Isaiah51:14 Kityaachi eng' chokyinet luulenik che ki kimut; ama meei, ama wendi keriinget, ama rarchin amitwogik." 
Isaiah51:15 Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ne awase nyanjet, si komoror mildaetapkei ne po peek: kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Isaiah51:16 Ak kiande ng'aleekyuk kuting'ung', ak ki atugenen urwetap eunnyu, si kobiit amin kipsengwet, ak alume lumeiywegap ng'wony, ak aleenji Zion, ii pororyennyu." 
Isaiah51:17 Ng'eet, ng'eet, tonon, ee Jerusalem, ne ki iee kigombetap nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' eunnyi; ki iee eng' kigombet ne oo, icholool, kigombet ne yaei piik koterteeryot." 
Isaiah51:18 Ma mi ne indochin ineendet eng' weeriik tugul che ki sich; ama mi ne namoti ineendet euut eng' weeriik tugul che ki igui. 
Isaiah51:19 Kagobutyin tuguuchuuto aeng'u; ng'oo anyun ne riirchinin? Kubernateet ak ng'emisyet, ak rubeet kobooto rotwetap chok; agoigoitoin ano anyun?" 
Isaiah51:20 Kagotanuiso weeriiguk, ruitos eng' tabanwegap ortinwek tugul, ko uu kenyeleet ne mi mesteet; nyiitootiin icheek nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kereetap kong' ne po Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Isaiah51:21 Kas anyun ni inyee ne kinyaliili, ak ko pogitot, ago ma eng' divaik:" 
Isaiah51:22 Mwaei Kiptaiyandeng'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ko Kamuktaindeng'ung', ne ng'alaaldochin piikyik, kole, ogeero, kaaip eng' eung'ung' kigombet ne po terteryotet, nooto ko kigombet ne oo ne po nereegekyuk che koroomen. Ma iee agoi." 
Isaiah51:23 Ak ande eutap icheeget che inyaliilin; che ki leenji saboondang'ung', “Ng'uruuge, si kobiit kesiirte: ak iite pateng'ung' koigei ng'wonyut, ak koigei ooreet, eng' icheek che siirtoi.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Ng'eet, ng'eet, ilaach kimnateng'ung', ee Zion; ilaach ngoroiguk che korooron, ee Jerusalem, nganaseet ne tiliil: amu kobooch nguno koma kobwanjinin che ma kimuratan ak che ma tiliileen." 
Isaiah52:2 Lelekte temburyek; ng'eet, tebi ng'wony, ee Jerusalem: ityaach ratuutik che mi kaating'ung', ee cheptap Zion ne kigeluul." 
Isaiah52:3 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ki kialdak puch; ak kityaachok ama eng' fedha." 
Isaiah52:4 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ki choortagei piikyuk eng' tai koba Misiri koek toek eng' olooto: ak ki inyaliil icheek Assyrianindet puch." 
Isaiah52:5 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ayae nee eng' yu, amu ki kimut piikyuk puch? Iteitos icheek che pou, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kichubei kainennyu kotugul, peetuut komugul." 
Isaiah52:6 Nae anyun piikyuk kainennyu: naei anyun eng' peetuunooto kole anee ne ang'alaali; ogeero, anee." 
Isaiah52:7 Korooron ne tya eng' tuloonook, keelyegap ineendet ne ibu logoiywek che myach, ne mwaitoi kaalyeet, ne ibu logoiywek che myach che po myeeindo, ne mwaitoi yetunet; ne mwachin Zion koleenjin, Laitorani Kamuktaindeng'ung'!" 
Isaiah52:8 Kutitap riibiguk! Waachei icheek, tyendos kibagenge; amu tuun keerei icheek togoch eng' togoch, ye weeksei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor konyonei Zion." 
Isaiah52:9 Oboiboitu, otyense tugul, okweek komoswek che kigemeto che po Jerusalem; amu kigogaigai `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik, ki kotyach Jerusalem." 
Isaiah52:10 Amu ki kobarta Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyi ne tiliil eng' taitap pororyosyek tugul; ak keerei tabanwek tugul che po ng'wony yetunetap Kamuktaindennyo. 
Isaiah52:11 Oba, oba, omande eng' olooto, amat otwaa kiy ne ma tiliil; omande eng' kwenunnyi; otiliiliitu, okweek che oibe tuguugap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah52:12 Amu momandoi eng' kagirgiret, anan omwei: amu indoenok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak letwok Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Isaiah52:13 Ogeero, poisyee otwogindennyu ng'omnateet, kieeti ak kitoroori, ak kotororit miising'." 
Isaiah52:14 Ko uu ye kikwong'enen che chaang', (ki king'em togeennyi kosiir ne po chii age tugul, ak ki king'em itoondanyi kosiir weeriigap piik,)" 
Isaiah52:15 ibisi anyun pororyosyek che chaang'; namei kuut laitorinik amu ineendet: amu tuun keerei tuguuk che kitom kemwachi icheek, ak koguiyo tuguuk che kitom kogas." 
Isaiah53:1 Ng'oo ne ki iyan ng'aleekyok? Ak ki king'aang'ji ng'oo eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? 
Isaiah53:2 Amu tuun eetu eng' tainnyi ko uu keetit ne ng'arng'ar, ak eetu ko uu tigityot eng' emet ne yaamaat: ma tinyei itoon anan korooronindo; ak ye kigeere ineendet koma mi korooronindo kot kecham." 
Isaiah53:3 Ki kisas, ak ki eesyo `piik ineendet; chiitap aragenosyek, ne ingen ng'wanindo: ak ki kisas ineendet ko uu chiito ne ung'e piik togoochikwak, ama kiit ineendet keele kiy." 
Isaiah53:4 Ki ip iman ng'waninwekyok, ak kigesen aragenosyekyok: ago ki kiit ineendet keele ki kibir, ki pir Kamuktaindet ak konyaliil." 
Isaiah53:5 Ago ki kitoor agobo pistaosyekyok, ki kiguoten agobo tengekwogikyok: kinyooru kalyennyo eng' pirennyi; ak kisoobenech pirutikyik." 
Isaiah53:6 Ki uu acheek tugul keechiirek che ki kobetyo; kigosup age tugul eng' acheek ooreennyi; ak kigonde `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet tengekwogikyok acheek tugul. 
Isaiah53:7 Ki kinyalil, ago ki iming'ingei, ma twek; ki igei ineendet aarwetap keechiir ne ki kweryei kwo ole kieng'e, ko uu keechiiryet ne siisei eng' taitap piik che tilei koroorikyik; ee, ma twek." 
Isaiah53:8 Ki kinam eng' suryet ak kirwookyi; ak ng'oo ne ibwaati eng' ibindanyi kole ki kiisto ineendet eng' emetap che saptos: Amu ki kibir agobo pistoetap piikyuk. 
Isaiah53:9 Ak ki yachi ineendet kererit kobooto kiptengegiinik, ago ki kitup eng' meennyi kobooto mogoreek; nganda ki ma yai koroomnateet age tugul, ama mang'une kutinnyi ng'aalseet age tugul." 
Isaiah53:10 Ago ki cham Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koguoten ineendet; ki igoochi arageneet; ye tuun iyai saboondanyi koek kagoochinet agobo tengekto, tuun keerei iyotennyi, tuun tesei peetuusyekyik, ak kotesak chametap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' eunnyi." 
Isaiah53:11 Tuun keerei che pitunee ng'wanindap saboondanyi, ak koyam; tuun iityin otwogindennyu ne po iman, imanda, piik che chaang', eng' naennyi: ak tuun ibei tengekwogikwak." 
Isaiah53:12 Apchechini anyun ineendet kebeberta kobooto piik che eecheen, ak kopchei parunenik kobooto piik che kiimeen; amu ki igoito saboondanyi agoi meet, ak ki kiitito pistoik: ago kigesen tengekwogigap piik che chaang', ak ki sa agobo pistoik." 
Isaiah54:1 Tyen, ee inyee ne ii soon, ne ma ii; tyen, ak iwaach, inyee ne ma inyooru ng'wanindo agobo sigisyet: amu chaang' lagogap ne mi ineegei kosiir lagogap osotyot, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah54:2 Ibaraa ye mi emaing'ung', ak ingoiito icheek angoogap meng'otosyeguk; ameetee; igoit porooniguk, ak igimit tigongeniguk." 
Isaiah54:3 Amu inaktoi komostap eutap tai ak ne po kaataam; ak konyaban iyoteng'ung' pororyosyek, ak kogoochi kemeny kogeny nganasook che kiga kelakta." 
Isaiah54:4 Meiywei, amu melilani; anan itoptoben; amu ma kiteweerin, amu iutye teweernatetap ming'inateng'ung', ama ibwaati chotisyetap mosoknateng'ung'." 
Isaiah54:5 Amu Yaindeng'ung' ko manong'otyondeng'ung'; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kainennyi ak Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel ko katyagindeng'ung'. Kiguure ineendet Kamuktaindetap ng'wony komugul. 
Isaiah54:6 Amu kigoguurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu osotyot ne kigebagaakta, ne ki kigoochi koaragen eng' muguleldanyi, osotyot neta ko ming'in, ye kagion, mwaei Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Isaiah54:7 Ki abagaakteen ne matya; ago ayumin eng' rireenet ne oo. 
Isaiah54:8 Ki aung'enen togeennyu ne matya eng' nereegek che ing'irtogei; ago ariirenen eng' talasyet ne po koigeny, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor katyagindeng'ung'." 
Isaiah54:9 Amu uu niito eng' anee peegap Noa: amu ko uu ye ki ayosye ale ma komarane emet peegap Noa kogeny, kayosye ko uu nooto ale ma nereekyinin kogeny, anan agerin kong'." 
Isaiah54:10 Amu istogei tuloonook ak kiutoi tuloonook che mengeechen; ago ma istoenengei talasyennyu, ama ki istoi kayomisennyu ne po kaalyeet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne rireenen." 
Isaiah54:11 Ee inyee ne kinyaliili, ne wiirtoi usoonet ne oo, ama kigaigain, keero, alumdoi koiguk eng' saleiywek che korooron, ak alume lumeiyweguk koik che kiguure sapire." 
Isaiah54:12 Ak ateege irimoiguk koik che piriireen, ak ayae ormariichoguk koik che kiguure bareqet, ak ayae tabanweguk tugul koik che korooron." 
Isaiah54:13 Ak ineeti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lagoguk tugul; ak koeet kaalyeetap lagoguk. 
Isaiah54:14 Ki kimiitin eng' imanda; ilooitu eng' nyalilda, amu meiyweisyei; ilooitu eng' kamuiset, amu mariikyinin." 
Isaiah54:15 Keero, ngot kong'eet chii pooryeet, koma punwa: ibuti age tugul ne ing'eetyinin pooryeet." 
Isaiah54:16 Keero, ki ayai kitang'indet ne kuutei maatap nesek, si kobiit karnet ne po poisyennyi, ak ki ayai ng'emindet si kong'emis." 
Isaiah54:17 Ma kiberuuri karnet age tugul ne kiyaei si kogirinden; ak igikyini ng'elyepta age tugul ne kirindoin eng' kirwooget. Niito poroteetap otwogigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak imandanywa ne punwa, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah55:1 Ee chii age tugul ne amei melel, obwonjin peek, kobooto ineendet ne ma tinyei fedha; obwa anyun, oal ak oam; ee, obwa, oal divaik ak cheego ama eng' fedha anan eng' alyet." 
Isaiah55:2 Amu nee si oboisyee fedha eng' tuguuk che ma amitwogik? Ak poisyeng'wong' agobo tuguuk che mobiyonyi? Oepcha iit miising', si oam che myach, ak ingoboiboitu saboonwekwok eng' che akwaen." 
Isaiah55:3 Oep iit, ak obwanjo, ogas, si kosapcho saboonwekwok: ak kiyomisyige ak okweek kayomiset ne po koigeny, nooto rireenosyek che po iman, che po Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Ogeero, ki agoite ineendet koek paoryat eng' pororyosyek, koek kandoindet, ak ko ng'atindet ne po pororyosyek." 
Isaiah55:5 Keero, iguure pororyet ne mengen, ak kolabatyin pororyet ne ki ma kongenin, amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ak amu Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel; amu ki kotoroorin." 
Isaiah55:6 Ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kota kimuuchi kenyoor, oguur kota ko neegit:" 
Isaiah55:7 ingometo kiptengekyot ooreennyi, ak ingometo ineendet ne ma po iman, kabwaatutikyik: ak ingoweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si koriiree; ak ingoweekyigei Kamuktaindennyo, amu nyochin kaat iman." 
Isaiah55:8 Amu ma chekwok kabwaatutikyuk, ama chechuuk ortinwekwok, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah55:9 Amu ko uu ye toroor kipsengwet kosiir ng'wony, ko uu nooto torooreen ortinwekyuk kosiir ortinwekwok, ak ko torooreen kabwaatutikyuk kosiir kabwaatutikwok." 
Isaiah55:10 Amu ko uu ye roboni ak kobuti teluji kobunu kipsengwet, ama weektagei olooto kogeny, ago ibisi ng'wony, ak kogoochi tuguuk kobiityo ak kong'atyo, ak kogoochi kesweek leetaindet, ak kogoochi amitwogik chiito ne amei;" 
Isaiah55:11 uu nooto ng'olyoondennyu ne mang'une kutinnyu: ma weekyinagei puch, ago yaei kosulda kiit ne amache, ak koboorei eng' kiit ne kiayooktochine." 
Isaiah55:12 Amu tuun omandoi eng' poiboiyet, ak kindoiywok eng' kaalyeet: tyendos eng' taing'wong' tuloonook ak tuloonook che mengeechen, ak koraprap eunekwak keetiik tugul che po timiin." 
Isaiah55:13 Piitei piribiryet kogeeri katok che toorei piich, ak kobiit momonyet kogeer katook che rutei piich: ak kibwaate kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koek kaboorunet ne po koigeny ne ma ki istoi." 
Isaiah56:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, osup kirwooget, ak oyai imanda: amu neegit konyo yetunennyu, ak neegit keng'aany imandanyu." 
Isaiah56:2 Iberuurot ne yaei chuuto, ak weeriitap chii ne namei chuuto miising' ne riibei sabato ama imurwoni, ne riibei eunnyi si ma yai yaityet age tugul." 
Isaiah56:3 Amechamji toondet ne ki konamgei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kong'alaal kole, Itabaanena `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik: amechamji sirorto komwa kole, keero, aa keetit ne yaamaat." 
Isaiah56:4 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni agobo sirorinik che riibei sabatosyekyuk, ak che leweni tuguuk che iboiboa, ak che namei miising' kayomisennyu:" 
Isaiah56:5 kole, agoochini icheek kabwaatet ak kainet eng' koonnyu ak eng' irimoikyuk, kosiir weeriik ak tiibiik; agoochini kainet ne po koigeny, ne ma ki istoi." 
Isaiah56:6 Amutu kogeny toek che namegei ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si koboisyechi ineendet ak kocham kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koek otwogikyik, age tugul ne riibei sabato ne ma imurwoni, ak konamei miising' arorutyennyu;" 
Isaiah56:7 amutu icheek kobwa tulweennyu ne tiliil, ak agoochi koboiboitu eng' koonnyu ne po saaet; kitaachei kagoochinoikwak che kibeelei ak tiseiywekwak, eng' kaptisisyennyu: amu kiguure koonnyu kootap saaet ne po pororyosyek tugul." 
Isaiah56:8 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne iyumi che kigetimda che po Israel, kole, ta ayumjini alak ineendet, che siirei chechiik che ki kiyum." 
Isaiah56:9 Obwa, oamisye, okweek tyong'ik tugul che po timiin, ee, okweek tyong'ik tugul che po timiin." 
Isaiah56:10 Koryotin riibiikyik, ma tinyei tugul naet; icheeget tugul ko sesenik che namotin kuut, ma imuuchi icheek kokwer; irotitoi, ruitos, chamei konuukso." 
Isaiah56:11 Ee, kipkein sesenik, ma piyong'dos agoi; ak chuuto ko mestoweek che ma iguitos kiy: ki komaasta tugul koosup ooreenywa, kigosup chii tugul keljinennyi, eng' komosta age tugul." 
Isaiah56:12 Mwaei kole, obwa, si aip divaik, si kee maiyek konyiiech; ak kergeitu peetuuni ak mutai; peetuut ne oo, ne siirtoot." 
Isaiah57:1 Pegu che po iman, ama iiti chii; ak kimuti piik che tinyei riirge, ama ibwaati chii kole, kimuti che po iman si ma keer yaityet ne nyoonei." 
Isaiah57:2 Mong'jin ole mi kaalyeet; imuunyi eng' itogusyekwak, age tugul ne wendoti eng' lititindanyi." 
Isaiah57:3 Ago oriigu okweek weeriigap chepsogeiyot, iyoteetap chiito ne yaei ibeetapkei ak chepkugoniot." 
Isaiah57:4 Ourerenjini ng'oo? Oseng'eng'jini ng'oo, ak ochuutyini ng'elyepta? Tos ma oo lagogap pistoet, iyoteetap kaberberisyet," 
Isaiah57:5 che olaali mageng'wong' eng' keetiik keel, eng' kelutap keetit age tugul ne tuon; okweek che obare lagok eng' atebwosyek, eng' ole kibetak eng' rwandosyek?" 
Isaiah57:6 Mi kebebertang'ung' koik che chaboen che po atebweet; chooto, chooto ko kebebertang'ung': ki iroong'ji icheek kagoochinet ne kieei, ki igoochi kagoochinet. Tos igoigoa tuguuchuuto?" 
Isaiah57:7 Kainde itogung'ung' tulweet ne ki wo parak ak ko kooi miising': ak ki iwe kogeny olooto igoite tiseiywek. 
Isaiah57:8 Ak ki itepte kiit ne po kabwaateng'ung' eng' ole po let eng' kereiywek ak tugatugik: amu ki ing'aang'jige age, ne ma anee, ak kiitogoste; ki ibaraa itogung'ung', ak iyai arorutyet kobooto icheek: ichame itogunnywa eng' ole ki igeerchi." 
Isaiah57:9 Ak ki iwe kaplaitoryat iibe mwanik, ak ites nyamdutiguk, ki iyookte piiguk che tononun koba ole loo, ak ki iteweergei agoi ye mi che ki kobek." 
Isaiah57:10 Ki ing'et amu koindap oreng'ung'; ago ki ma imwa ile, ma mi kamang'unet: ki inyooru kasoobetap kimnateng'ung'; ma itanui anyun." 
Isaiah57:11 Ak ki iywei ng'oo anyun ak itoptoben kot imwa lembech, ak ma ibwaata ama chut ng'olyoondoniito muguleldang'ung'? Ma asiis peetuusyek che chaang' ama iywea?" 
Isaiah57:12 Aboortoi imandang'ung'; ama kelun kiy eng' poisyoniguk. 
Isaiah57:13 Ingosaruun ye iriire, icheek che ki iyum, ago ibei usoonet icheek, ibei kabuuset icheek tugul: ago namei emet kobunji, ineendet ne imang'wa, ak koek tulweennyu ne tiliil porotennyi." 
Isaiah57:14 Ak mwaei ineendet kole, oyai, oyai, ochop ooreet, oiste kanagutyet eng' ooreetap piikyuk." 
Isaiah57:15 Amu mwaei ko uu ni ineendet ne mi parak ak ko toroor ne menyei koigeny, ne Tiliil kainennyi kole, amenye ole toroor ak ko tiliil, kobooto ineendet agine ne kigonyeratkei eng' muguleldo, ak koming'ingei, si kobiit kisoop muguleldap ne iming'inegei, ak kisoop mugulelwegap che inyeratigei." 
Isaiah57:16 Amu ma kibortosi agoi, ama kinereechi kotugul; amu katatanuisyo eng' tainnyu, agot saboonwek che ki ayai." 
Isaiah57:17 Amu ki anereech agobo tengektap kasennyi ne po myat, ak abir ineendet, ki auny togeennyu ak anereech: ak kites komaasak eng' ooreetap muguleldanyi." 
Isaiah57:18 Ki ageer ortinwekyik, ak asoobi ineendet: andochini kogeny, ak aweekyi ineendet kagaigaosyek kobooto piikyik che riirtos." 
Isaiah57:19 Ayae logoegap kutusweek: Kaalyeet, kaalyeet eng' ineendet ne mi ole loo ak ineendet ne mi ole neegit ak asoop icheek." 
Isaiah57:20 Ago uu kiptengeginik nyanjet ne wasegei; amu ma imuuchi komuuny, ak wiiru peekyik ng'atateek ak simdo." 
Isaiah57:21 Mwaei Kamuktaindennyu kole, ma mi kaalyeet eng' kiptengeginik." 
Isaiah58:1 Waach miising', amesiis, waach ko uu iryageet, ak imwachi piikyuk pistoennywa, ak imwachi kootap Jakobo tengekwogikwak." 
Isaiah58:2 Ago cheeng'a peetuut age tugul, ak chamei konai ortinwekyuk: ko uu pororyet ne ki yai imanda, ama meto kirwoogetap Kamuktaindennywa, teebena kirwoogutik che po iman, chamei koriikyi Kamuktaindet." 
Isaiah58:3 Mwaei icheek kole, amu nee si kirugutige, amegeere? Amu nee si kinyalil acheek saboonwekyok, amemage kiy? Ogeero, onyooru poiboiyeng'wong' eng' peetuutap karuguteng'wong' pogei, ak omage piik tugul che poisyewok tuguuk che siirtoot." 
Isaiah58:4 Ogeero, orugutige agobo pooryeet ak suryet, ak olugisye yaityet: morugutige eng' peetuuni si kegas kuting'wong' eng' ole po parak." 
Isaiah58:5 Tos nooto karugutetapkei ne ki alewen? Peetuut ne inyalili chii saboondanyi? Koabuch chii metinnyi ko uu mutwot, ak kosyep kuniok ak oreek? Tos oguure niito karugutetapkei, peetuut ne taachaksei eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?" 
Isaiah58:6 Tos ma karugutetapkei ni ne ki alewen: ale kityaach ratuutigap yaityet, kityaach anoogap chogit, ak keunda che kigetyekyi ng'wony, ak oiri chogit age tugul?" 
Isaiah58:7 Tos ma kebae amitwogiguk che amei rubeet, ak imutu kibananook che kigetimda, kobwa koong'ung'? Ye igeer ne mi aach ngor, ituch; ameung'egei piik che po oreng'ung'?" 
Isaiah58:8 Koluu anyun lapkeiyeng'ung' ko uu karonet, ak kobiit kasoobeng'ung' kochook: ak kondoenen imandang'ung' ak koletun toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah58:9 Yeityo anyun iguurse, ak kowolun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; iguure, ak kole, Ami yu. Ngot iiste chogit eng' kwenung'ung', kang'wererisyet, ak ng'alaalet ne ya;" 
Isaiah58:10 ak ngot iriiree che amei rubo, ak ibai kobiyo saboondo ne kinyaliili: kochor anyun lapkeiyeng'ung' eng' mesundeito, ak koigei peet kween mesundeitang'ung'." 
Isaiah58:11 Ak kondoun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul, ak kogoochi saboondang'ung' kobiyo eng' komoswek che yamyotiin, ak kogimit koweguk; ak iige mbareet ne kibisi, ak iige kereruut ne ma teenyei." 
Isaiah58:12 Ak koteech piiguk karotwek che po keny: ak ing'eet lumeiywegap ibinwek che chaang'; ak keguurenen, Teegindetap ole kibutok, Kaweegunindetap ortinwek che itebee." 
Isaiah58:13 Ngot iiste keeldong'ung' eng' peetuutap sabato, ameyai tuguuk che ichame eng' peetuunnyu ne tiliil; ak ile poiboiyet peetuutap sabato, ne tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne po teegisto; ak igonyit peetuunooto, amesup ortinweguk, anan icheeng' che ichame, anan imwa ng'aleeguk:" 
Isaiah58:14 ibaibaegei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak agoonin ilaany komoswek che torooreen che po ng'wony; ak abaenen poroteetap Jakobo kwandang'ung': amu kagomwa niito kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Isaiah59:1 Ogeero, ma nwach eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kot koma imuuch kosar; ama nyigiis itinnyi, kot koma imuuch kogas:" 
Isaiah59:2 ago ki kobesyenok tengekwogikwok Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak kigouny tengekwogikwok togeennyi, kot koma kochamei kogas." 
Isaiah59:3 Amu murwonen eunekwok eng' korotiik, ak ko murwonen morikwok eng' tengekto; kogomwa kutusweekwok lembechek, ng'alaali ng'elyebwekwok yaityet." 
Isaiah59:4 Ma mi agot agenge ne cheeng'ei imanda ne po kirwooget, ama mi ne ibei ng'aleek che po iman kapkirwook: imang'u icheek tangoita, ak komwaei lembechek; manachi yaityet, ak kooi tengekto." 
Isaiah59:5 Igenyi koigap ereneet, ak kola kootap kibroroktet: meei ne amei koikwak, ak mang'une ereneet koita ne kagitui." 
Isaiah59:6 Ma egu kooriigap kibroroginik ngoroik, ama tugegei poisyonikwak: poisyonikwak ko poisyonigap yaityet, ak komi eunekwak poisyetap koroomnateet." 
Isaiah59:7 Ruachin keelyekwak yaityet, ak kochoktoi kotumda korotiik che ma tinyei tengek: kabwaatutikwak ko kabwaatutigap tengekto; mi ortinwekwak kubernateet ak ng'emisyet." 
Isaiah59:8 Ma ingen icheek ooreetap kaalyeet; ama mi kirwooget eng' ortinwekwak: ki koyachigei ortinwek che kunuuren; ma ingen kaalyeet age tugul ne punei olooto. 
Isaiah59:9 Loo anyun kirwooget eng' acheek, ama nyoorwech imanda: kicheeng'e lapkeiyet, ago ogeero, mi mesundeito; kicheeng'e kakweng'et, ago kibendote mesundeito." 
Isaiah59:10 Kisapsabisyoti kecheeng'e inaatut ko uu kipkoratinik, ee, kisapsabisyoti ko uu che ma tinyei koonyek: kibutyoti peet kween ko uu ye karatarat; ki uu che ki kobek ye kimi kwenutap che neryootiin." 
Isaiah59:11 Kimorori tugul ko uu magalaluusyek, ak kitigendosi miising' ko uu cheptugenik: kicheeng'e kirwooget, ago ma mi; kicheeng'e yetunet, ago looenech." 
Isaiah59:12 Amu ki kotesagis pistaosyekyok eng' taing'ung', ak paoryanjinech tengekwogikyok: amu mi kobootech pistaosyekyok, ak kingen tengekwogikyok:" 
Isaiah59:13 ki kieesye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' pistoennyo, ak kigemaste ama kisup Kamuktaindennyo, keng'alaali ng'aleegap sastaet ak ngelelnateet, kichobe eng' mugulelwekyok ng'aleegap lembech, ak kemwae." 
Isaiah59:14 Ak kikwa let kirwooget, ak tononi imanda eng' ole loo: amu kagobutyi imanda ooreet, ak ma imuuchi komong' lititindo." 
Isaiah59:15 Ee, petoot imanda; ak ineendet ne pagaktoi yaityet koyaegei koek ne kiluulei. Ak ki keer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor niito, ak ma ibaibai ineendet amu ki ma komi kirwooget." 
Isaiah59:16 Ak ki keer kole ma mi chii age tugul, ak ki kwong' amu ki ma komi ne sachin age: ki ipchigei anyun yetunet eng' eunnyi; ak kiti imandanyi ineendet." 
Isaiah59:17 Ak ki ilaach imanda ko uu karnetap tegeet, ak chepkulet ne po yetunet eng' metinnyi; ak ki ilaach ngoroigap yaaktaetap mugetuut, ak ki ilaach kagiiletapkei ko uu sambut." 
Isaiah59:18 Yaakyin icheek ko uu poisyonikwak, nereegek che ng'woneen eng' puunikyik, yaaktaet eng' puunikyik; yaakyin ngeguusyek ko uu ye nyoljin." 
Isaiah59:19 Iywei anyun kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' cherongo, ak koywei toroornatennyi eng' ole charunee asiista: amu nyoonei ko uu aineet ne isururtoi, ne oonei kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah59:20 Ak konyo katyagindet Zion, ak konyonji icheek che po Jakobo che metoi pistoet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah59:21 Ni anyun kayomisennyu ne kiyomisyinige ak icheek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ma istoegei kuting'ung' Kabuusennyu ne miten ak ng'aleeguk che kiande kuting'ung', anan eng' kutitap iyoteng'ung', anan eng' kutusweegap mochogoroniguk, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooch nguno agoi koigeny." 
Isaiah60:1 Ng'eet, iluu; amu kagoit lapkeiyeng'ung', ak kagochorchin toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah60:2 Amu, keero, tuchei mesundeito ng'wony, ak kotuch mesundeito ne oo pororyosyek: ago chorchinin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotook toroornatennyi eng' inyee." 
Isaiah60:3 Ak kobwonji pororyosyek lapkeiyeng'ung', ak kobwonji laitorinik kaluunetap choruneng'ung'." 
Isaiah60:4 Ing'eet met ak igeer komoswek tugul: iyumigei icheek tugul, ak kobwonjin: punu weeriiguk ole loo, ak keganabu tiibiiguk." 
Isaiah60:5 Igeer anyun ak kikwenyin, ak kobotan muguleldang'ung' ak ki paraa; amu pwonjinin chaang'indap nyanjosyek, pwonjinin mogornatosyegap pororyosyek." 
Isaiah60:6 Tuchin chaang'indap tambeesik, kobooto moegap tambeesik che po Midian ak Ephah; punu tugul Sheba: ibu thahabu ak tuguuk che nyamdut, ak komwaita kalasunoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah60:7 Kiyumjinin akwotisyek tugul che po keechiiregap Kedar, koboisyeun mengichigap Nebaiot: pwoonei amu taachaksei eng' kaptisisyennyu, ak atoroori kootap toroornatennyu." 
Isaiah60:8 Ng'oo chu rwaei ko uu pooldet, ak kotirirendos cheptugenik eng' tirisyokwak?" 
Isaiah60:9 Igeno iman ngeguusyek, ak sip kogeno melisyek che po Tarsis, si kobiit komut weeriiguk eng' ole loo, koibu fedhaisyekwak ak thahabusyekwak, agobo kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ak agobo Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel, amu ki kotoroorin." 
Isaiah60:10 Ak koteech toek irimoiguk, ak koboisyeun laitorinikwak: amu ki abirin eng' nereegekyuk, ago ki ariirenen amu chamennyu." 
Isaiah60:11 Kiyatei kogeny ormariichoguk kotugul; ma kigerei peet anan kemoi; si koibun piik mogornatosyegap pororyosyek, kobooto laitorinikwak che kimutu." 
Isaiah60:12 Amu lusei pororyet ak pounateet ne ma poisyeun; ee, king'emei pororyosyechooto kobetyo." 
Isaiah60:13 Nyonjinin toroornatetap Lebanon, kobooto piribirinik, taragonik che sabuleen, ak taragonik che teer; si koyai konyool oldanyu ne tiliil, ak achop ole tebee keelyekyuk kogararanit." 
Isaiah60:14 Ak kobwonjin weeriigap icheeget che ki inyaliilin kong'uruugonu; ak kogutung'so eng' keldebesaigap keelyeguk icheek tugul che kisasin; ak koguurenen, Nganaseetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Zion ne po Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Isaiah60:15 Ak ko uu ye kiga kebagaakten, ak kewechin, kot ko ki ma kota komi chii ne kibunei kwenung'ung', ayain anyun iegu telunateet ne po koigeny, poiboiyetap ibinwek che chaang'." 
Isaiah60:16 Ichuchuni kogeny cheegap pororyosyek, ak irerye kinaigap laitorinik: si kobiit inai ile anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko aa yetindeng'ung', ak ko katyagindeng'ung', Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet ne po Jakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Aibu thahabu ageere sugunonik, ak aibu fedha ageere kariik, ak ageere sugunonik keetiik, ak ageere kariik koik: ak ayai kogeny kiptainiguk koek kaalyeet, ak ayai kayagiguk koek imanda." 
Isaiah60:18 Ma kegasei kogeny koroomnateet eng' emeng'ung', anan kobiit kubernateet ak ng'emisyet eng' kiwotosyeguk; ago tuun iguure irimoiguk Yetunet, ak iguure ormariichoguk Kalasunet." 
Isaiah60:19 Ma koegu asiista lapkeiyeng'ung' peet: ama kogoonin lapkeiyet kaluunetap arawet: ago egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lapkeiyeng'ung' ne po koigeny; ak koek Kamuktaindeng'ung' toroornateng'ung'. 
Isaiah60:20 Ma kororoktoi asiistang'ung', ama komeei araweng'ung': amu egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lapkeiyeng'ung' ne po koigeny, ak kogeskei peetuusyegap riireguk." 
Isaiah60:21 Ak koek che po imanda kogeny piiguk tugul, ak koek emet porotennywa koigeny; temeet ne ki amin, poisyetap eunekyuk, si kobiit kegonyita." 
Isaiah60:22 Egu ne ming'in eliphuut, ak koek ne ming'in pororyet ne kiim: achokyini nooto anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunnyi." 
Isaiah61:1 Mi kobooto Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne po Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ki ila Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si kobiit aamji logoiywek che myach che nyerootiin; ki koyookta anyaa che ilyotiin mugulelwek, si kobiit aamji luulenik katyaget, ak kityaach che ratotiin." 
Isaiah61:2 Si kobiit aamda kenyiit ne chamat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak peetuutap yaaktaetap mugetuut ne po Kamuktaindennyo; ak agaigai tugul che riirtos;" 
Isaiah61:3 si aaroorchi icheek che riirtos eng' Zion, kigoochi chepkulet ne karaaran kogeere oreek, ak mwaitap poiboiyet kogeere riirek, ak ngoryeetap kalasunet kogeere muguleldo ne nyalulat; si kobiit keguure keetiik che po imanda, che kimin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kegonyit." 
Isaiah61:4 Ak koteech kogeny karatwek che po keny, koteech kole kiga koguber eng' tai, ak koteech kogeny nganasook che kigemeto, ole kiga koguber eng' ibinwek che chaang'." 
Isaiah61:5 Ak kotononso toek koyaga akwotisyegap keechiirekwok, ak kobatwok mbareenik kipsagarek, ak koek riibiigap sabibukwok." 
Isaiah61:6 Ago kiguurenok tisiigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: kuurenok piik kiboitinigap Kamuktaindennyo: oame mogornatosyegap pororyosyek, ak olasunegei toroornatennywa." 
Isaiah61:7 Onyooru konyil aeng' agobo kalilaneng'wong'; ak koboiboitu eng' kebebertanywa kogeere toiyet: nyabani anyun icheek konyil aeng' eng' emennywa: punjin icheek poiboiyet ne po koigeny. 
Isaiah61:8 Amu achame anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwooget, aweche rebisyet kobooto tengekto; ak ayaakyini icheek eng' imanit, ak kiyomisyige ak icheek kayomiset ne po koigeny." 
Isaiah61:9 Ak konaak iyotennywa eng' pororyosyek, ak konaak lagokwak eng' piik: ak naei piik tugul icheek ye keer, kole, chu iyoteet ne ki koberuur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah61:10 Abaibaitu miising' eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, poiboitu saboondanyu miising' eng' Kamuktaindennyu; amu kagolaakwa ngoroigap yetunet, kagotugeno ngoryeet ne po imanda, ko uu ye lelesane sandet kiit ne indoi metit, ak ko uu ye lelesane murereet sonoekyik." 
Isaiah61:11 Amu ko uu ye ing'atos tuguuk eng' ng'wony, ak ko uu ye piitos tuguuk che ki kigoolji mbar; kobiti ko uu nooto Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor imanda ak kalasunet eng' taitap pororyosyek tugul." 
Isaiah62:1 Masise agobo Zion, amamuunyi agobo Jerusalem, agoi komanda imandanyi ko uu kaluunet, ak komanda yetunennyi ko uu tait ne lalei." 
Isaiah62:2 Ak kogeer pororyosyek imandang'ung', ak kogeer laitorinik tugul toroornateng'ung': ak keguurenen kainet ne leel, ne tuun kuurenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah62:3 Iegu kogeny naaryeetap korooronindo eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak iegu naaryeetap laitornatet eng' eutap Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Isaiah62:4 Ma keguurenen kogeny Ne Ki kimeto; ama keguure emeng'ung' kogeny Karaita: ago kiguurenen Hepsi-ba, ak keguure emeng'ung' Beula: amu paibaitunenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kitun emeng'ung'." 
Isaiah62:5 Amu ko uu ye ituni mureno pergeiyat, uu nooto tuun itunin weeriiguk: ak ko uu ye paibaitu sandet eng' murereet, ko uu nooto, tuun poiboitu Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' inyee." 
Isaiah62:6 Kande riibiik irimoiguk, ee Jerusalem; ma koi siisyo peet anan kemoi; amomuunyi okweek piik che obwaatyini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Isaiah62:7 amogoochini ineendet komuuny, agoi kogimit Jerusalem ak koyai koek kalasunet eng' ng'wony." 
Isaiah62:8 Ki koyosyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' eunnyi ne po tai, ak eng' eutap kimnateennyi, kole, iman, ma agoitoi peeguk koek amitwogigap puuniguk; ama koee toek divaiguk, che ki iyai:" 
Isaiah62:9 ago amei icheek che ki konori, ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak koee icheek che kiyumi, eng' seremusyegap oldanyu ne tiliil." 
Isaiah62:10 Omande, omandae ormariichok; ochop ooreetap piik; ochop, ochop ooreet ne oo; oiste koik; onamji parak songolyet agobo piik." 
Isaiah62:11 Ogeero, kagomwaita Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi tabandap ng'wony, kole, oleenji cheptap Zion, Keero, nyoonei yetuneng'ung'; keero, mi melektanyi kobooto ineendet ak mi yaaktaennyi tainnyi." 
Isaiah62:12 Ak koguure icheek, Piik che tiliileen, Che ki kotyach Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak keguurenen, Ne Ki kicheeng', Nganaseet ne ma kimeto." 
Isaiah63:1 Ng'oo ne punu Edom, ne tinyei ngoroik che ki kisal kobiriritu, eng' Bosra: ne tinyei ngoroik che po toroornatet, kowendi eng' ooindap kimnateennyi? Aneendet ne ang'alaali eng' imanda, ne atinye kamuget asar." 
Isaiah63:2 Amu nee si kobiriritu ngoroiguk, ak uu ngoroiguk che po ne tyechei sabibuk?" 
Isaiah63:3 Ki atyech aneege sabibuk eng' ole kitue; ak ki ma komi chii kobooto eng' pichooto; ee, ki atyech eng' nereegekyuk, atyechatyech eng' nereegekyuk che laldos; ak koisegei ngoroikyuk korotiikwak che saptos, ak ki amurwon ngoroikyuk tugul." 
Isaiah63:4 Amu kimi muguleldanyu peetuutap yaaktaetap mugetuut, ak kagoit kenyiitap chechuuk che kityaachi." 
Isaiah63:5 Ak ki ageerote, ama piit ne toretisyei; ak ki akwong' amu ma piit chii ne tiyei age: ki ibwa anyun eunnyu yetunet; ak kitiia nereegekyuk che ng'woneen." 
Isaiah63:6 Ak ki atyech piik eng' nereegekyuk, ak ki agoochi kobogityo eng' nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, ak ki atumji ng'wony korotiikwak che saptos." 
Isaiah63:7 Amwaitoi chamyet ne tala ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kalasunoigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu tugul che ki kogoonech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak myeeindo ne oo eng' kootap Israel, ne Ki kogoochi icheek ko uu rireenosyekyik, ak ko uu chaang'indap chamyennyi ne tala." 
Isaiah63:8 Amu ki mwa kole, piikyuk iman, lagok che ma yaei kaberberisyet: ki ek anyun yetindennywa." 
Isaiah63:9 Ki kinyalil ineendet eng' nyalilwogikwak tugul, ak ki sar icheek malaikaiyandennyi ne ki mi tainnyi: ki ityaach eng' chamyennyi ak rireenennyi; ak kigesen ak koganap peetuusyek tugul che po keny." 
Isaiah63:10 Ago ki ingelelso ak kogoochi arageneet Kabuusennyi ne Tiliil: ki kiwal anyun koek punyonnywa, ak kobargei ak icheek." 
Isaiah63:11 Ki ibwaat anyun peetuusyek che po keny, Musa, ak piikyik, kole, Mi ano ineendet ne ki imut icheek kolong'une nyanjet kobooto mestoweek che po akweennyi? Mi ano ineendet ne ki inde Kabuusennyi ne Tiliil kwenunnywa," 
Isaiah63:12 ne ki chuul eunnyi ne po toroornatet koba kobooto eutap tai ne po Musa, ne kipchei peek eng' tainnywa, si koyachigei kainet ne po koigeny," 
Isaiah63:13 ne ki indochi icheek kobun rireet, ko uu paraisiit eng' surkwen, si ma kinach?" 
Isaiah63:14 Ko uu ye choorchingei tuuga atebweet, kogoochi ko uu nooto `Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek komuuny: ki indochi anyun piiguk, si kobiit iyachigei kainet ne toroor." 
Isaiah63:15 Keer anyun ng'wony eng' kipsengwet, ak igeer eng' meng'ootetap tiliilindang'ung' ak ko po toroornateng'ung'. Mi ano kagiileng'ung' pogei ak poisyoniguk che po kamuktaet? Kaietena rireenetap muguleldang'ung' ak rireenosyeguk." 
Isaiah63:16 Amu ii kwandanyo, agot ngo ma ingenech Abraham, ama naech Israel; ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee ko ii kwandanyo; kaineng'ung' ko katyagindennyo kobooch keny." 
Isaiah63:17 Ee, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu nee si igoonech kemaste eng' ortinweguk, ak iuuit mugulelwekyok si ma kiywein? Weege amu otwogiguk, pororyosyegap poroteng'ung'." 
Isaiah63:18 Ki nyaban piiguk che tiliileen; ago ne matya kotyech puunikyok oldang'ung' ne tiliil. 
Isaiah63:19 Kageige piik che kitom ibou; ko uu icheeget che ma kimwaitae kaineng'ung'. 
Isaiah64:1 Kata myee ibet kipsengwet, ak ichooruge, si kobiit kobotanso tuloonook eng' taing'ung';" 
Isaiah64:2 ko uu ye peelei maat sigorik, ak ko uu ye iguuti maat peek: si kibarta kaineng'ung' konaak eng' puuniguk, si kobotanso pororyosyek eng' taing'ung'!" 
Isaiah64:3 Ye ki ngiyai tuguuk che po kamuiset che ki ma kicheeng', ki ichooruge, kibotanso tuloonook eng' taing'ung'." 
Isaiah64:4 Amu tomo kogas piik kobooch keny, anan koguiyo eng' itiik, anan kogeer eng' konyekwak Kamuktaindet age ne ma inyee, ne yaei poisyet agobo chiito ne igeni ineendet." 
Isaiah64:5 Otuitosi ak ineendet ne paibai ak koyaei imanda, icheeget che ibwaatin eng' ortinweguk: keero, ki inereech, ak ki kiyai tengekto: ki keyai chooto peetuusyek che chaang', ak tos kisarwech?" 
Isaiah64:6 Amu ki kiige tugul chii ne po simdo, ak uu imandanyo tugul ngoryeet ne murwoon: ak kirestosi acheek tugul ko uu sogoot; ak onech yaitwogikyok ko uu ye onsei usoonet." 
Isaiah64:7 Ama mi ne kuurei kaineng'ung', ne igiilegei si kobiit konamin: amu ki iung'enech togeng'ung', ak ki igeswech amu tengekwogikyok." 
Isaiah64:8 Nganda uu nooto, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee ko ii kwandanyo. Ki meneet ak inyee ko ii mimiindennyo; ki poisyonigap euneguk acheek tugul." 
Isaiah64:9 Amat inereech miising', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amat ibwaat tengekto agoi! Keero, keer komyee, kisaain, ki piiguk acheek tugul." 
Isaiah64:10 Ki koek ong'ateet nganasoguk che tiliileen, koek Zion surkwen, koek Jerusalem karaatya." 
Isaiah64:11 Kigebeel koonnyo ne tiliil ne karaaran, ole kilasunenen kwanisyekyok; Ki kong'emogis tuguukyok tugul che korooron." 
Isaiah64:12 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tos ta iranyegei eng' tuguuchooto? Tos isise, ak inyalilech miising'?" 
Isaiah65:1 Teeba piik che ki ma koteeba; kigonyoorwo icheek che ki ma cheeng'a: ki aleenji pororyet ne ki ma kemwaitae kainennyu, Ogeera, ogeera." 
Isaiah65:2 Ki aitoochi eunekyuk peet komugul piik che ingeleldos, che pendote ooreet ne ma karaaran, che pendote kabwaatutikwak;" 
Isaiah65:3 piik che tacha kimni kotugul, koeng'sei eng' mbareenik, ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' matubaruuk parak;" 
Isaiah65:4 che teebote kereeriisyek, ak komenyei komoswek che po ung'oot; che amei panyeegap toorook, ak mi tereenikwak suutegap tuguuk che kiwechei." 
Isaiah65:5 Che mwaei kole, tonon inyegei, ameriikyo, amu aa tiliil asiirin: chuuto ko iyeto eng' serunnyu, maat ne lalei peetuut komugul."
