Isaiah65:6 Ogeero, siraat eng' tainnyu: masise, ago ayaaktoi, ee ayaakyini andochini tegetikwak," 
Isaiah65:7 tengekwogikwok, kobooto tengekwogigap kwanisyekwok, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ki kobeel nyamdutik eng' tuloonook, ak kochuba eng' tuloonook che mengeechen: ageerchini anyun poisyonikwak che po tai, andochini tegetikwak." 
Isaiah65:8 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye kinyoorchin divaik che leelach logoek che irurugotin eng' temeet, ak kole age, Ameng'em, amu mi kaberuret tuguuchooto: ayae anyun ko uu nooto agobo otwogikyuk, si ma ng'em icheek tugul." 
Isaiah65:9 Ak amutu ne ki kiii eng' Jakobo, ak amutu eng' Judah nyabanindetap tuloonookyuk, ak kobunji yooto chechuuk che ki kilewen, ak komenyei yooto otwogikyuk." 
Isaiah65:10 Ak koek Saron piutap akwotisyegap keechiirek, ak koek atebweetap Akor ole ruiye akwotisyek, amu piikyuk che ki kocheeng'a." 
Isaiah65:11 Ago okweek che ometoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che outye tulweennyu ne tiliil, che ochobe meset agobo Kelunet, ak che onyiityini Kagesunet divaik che ki kiburuch:" 
Isaiah65:12 aityinok anyun rotwetap chok, ak ong'uruukyini tugul parisyet: amu kinga kuurse, koma kowolu; kinga ng'alaal, koma ogas; ago ki oyai yaityet eng' tainnyu, ak ki olewen ne ma paibaitune." 
Isaiah65:13 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, tuun amisyei otwogikyuk, ago amok rubeet: ogeero, tuun eeisei otwogikyuk, ago amok melel: ogeero, tuun paibaitu otwogikyuk, ago olilandosi:" 
Isaiah65:14 ogeero, tyendos otwogikyuk amu poiboiyetap mugulelwekwak, ago orirtosi eng' arageneetap muguleldo, oteitosi amu ng'wanindap muguleldo." 
Isaiah65:15 Ak omete kaineng'wong' koek chubisyet eng' chechuuk che ki alewen, ak kobarin Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak koguur otwogikyik eng' kainet age:" 
Isaiah65:16 si koek ne iberuuregei eng' ng'wony ne iberuuregei eng' Kamuktaindet ne po iman, ak koek ne iyastos eng' ng'wony ne iyastos eng' Kamuktaindet ne po iman; amu kigeutye nyalilwogik che po tai, amu kigeuny si ma ageere." 
Isaiah65:17 Ogeero, atau ayae kipsengwet che leelach ak ng'wonyut ne leel: ama kibwaati tuguuk che po tai, ama kochutei metit." 
Isaiah65:18 Ago ogaaskei ak oboiboitu agoi agobo kiit ne atau ayae: amu atau ayae Jerusalem koek ne kiboiboitune, ak koek piikyik poiboiyet." 
Isaiah65:19 Ak abaibaitune Jerusalem, abaibaitune piikyuk: ama kegasei ne riirei eng' nganasanooto, anan tuugeet ne po riirek." 
Isaiah65:20 Ma piitu eng' olooto kogeny lakweet ne po peetuusyek che ng'ering' anan poiyot ne ma ilil: amu meei lakweet ko po kenyiisyek pogol, ak kechubei kiptengekyot ne po kenyiisyek pogol." 
Isaiah65:21 Ak koteech kooriik, ak komeny; ak komiin sabibuk eng' mbareenik, ak koam logoekwak." 
Isaiah65:22 Ma teeksei icheek, si konyo komeny age; ama minsei icheek, si konyo koam age: amu igeitu peetuusyegap keetit peetuusyegap piikyuk, ak koboiboitune chechuuk che ki alewen, poisyonigap eunekwak." 
Isaiah65:23 Ma poisyei puch, ama ichin nyalil, amu icheeget ko iyoteetap che iberuurotin che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooto lagokwak." 
Isaiah65:24 Ak ye tomo koguurso, awolu; ak ye ta kong'alaali, agas." 
Isaiah65:25 Ageti suiyot ak aarwetap keechiir, ak koam ng'etundo susweek ko uu teta: ak koek ng'ung'unyek amitwogigap ereneet. Ma itoi kiy chii anan kong'emis eng' tulweennyu tugul ne tiliil, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah66:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, kipsengwet ko ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet, ak ng'wony ko ng'echereetap keelyekyuk: oteekwo koot ne uu nee? Ak komosta ano ole amuung'e?" 
Isaiah66:2 Amu kiyaei eunnyu tuguuchuuto tugul, ak ki piit anyun tuguuchuuto tugul, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago ageni ineendet ne panan ak konyerategei eng' muguleldo, ne potani amu ng'olyoondennyu." 
Isaiah66:3 Ineendet ne parei teta ko kergei ak ineendet ne parei chiito; ineendet ne igoitoi aarwetap keechiir koek tiseiywot, ko kergei ak ineendet ne iriei kaatitap seset; ineendet ne igoitoi kagoochinetap peek ko kergei ak ineendet ne igoitoi korotiigap toret; ineendet ne peelei tuguuk che nyamdut ko kergei ak ineendet ne iberuuri kanamwet: ee, ki kolewen ortinwekwak ak kochamei saboonwekwak tuguukwak che kiwechei;" 
Isaiah66:4 alewenjini anyun kaberberisyosyekwak, ak aipchi icheek kaiyweisyosyekwak; amu kinga kuurse, koma wol chii; ye kinga ng'alaal, koma kas icheek: ago ki yai tuguuk che yaach eng' tainnyu, ak kolewen tuguuk che ma abaibaitune." 
Isaiah66:5 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek che obotandosi amu ng'olyoondennyi: Ki komwa che otupche icheeget che wechok, che kitimdak agobo kainennyu, kole, ingitoroor Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit kegeer poiboiyeng'wong'; ago ililandos." 
Isaiah66:6 Waagaat ne po wasetapkei ne punu nganaseet, waagaat ne punu Hekaluut, kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne yaaktochin mugetuut puunikyik." 
Isaiah66:7 Ki sigis amanyoor ng'wanindo; ki sich weeriit kotom kogas ng'wanindo. 
Isaiah66:8 Ki kogas ng'oo ng'olyoot ne uu ni? Ki kogeer ng'oo tuguuk che uu chu? Tos kisichei emet eng' peetuut agenge? Tos kisichei pororyet eng' sait ne matya? Amu ki sich `Zion lagokyik, eng' sainooto ki nyoorunee ng'wanindo." 
Isaiah66:9 Tos aeete kesich lakweet ne kogoyam kesich? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos arate moet ne agoochini kooi? Mwaei Kamuktaindeng'ung'. 
Isaiah66:10 Oboiboitu okweek kobooto Jerusalem, ogaaskei kobooto ineendet, okweek tugul che ochame ineendet: oboiboitu eng' poiboiyet kobooto ineendet, okweek tugul che oriirchini:" 
Isaiah66:11 si kobiit ochuchun obiyong'se eng' kainaigap kagaigaosyekyik; si kobiit ochuchun tugul, ak oboiboitune chaang'indap toroornatennyi." 
Isaiah66:12 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ogeero, atesyini kaalyeet ko uu aineet, ak atesyi toroornatetap pororyosyek ko uu kereruut ne ing'irtogei, ak ochuchun; ki isyinok usia, ak ketinyok kigaigaak." 
Isaiah66:13 Agoigook ko uu ineendet ne igoigoi kamet; ak kigaigaak eng' Jerusalem. 
Isaiah66:14 Ak ogeero, ak koboiboitu mugulelwekwok, ak kong'atyo kawekwok ko uu susweek che ng'orng'or: ak konaak eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' otwogikyik, ak konereekyi puunikyik." 
Isaiah66:15 Amu ogeero, nyoonei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maat, ak koigei kariisyekyik che po lugeet kipchurchuryet; koyaakta nereegekyik eng' koroomnateet, ak koyaakta kerennyi po kong' eng' liplibenetap maat." 
Isaiah66:16 Amu irwooksechin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik tugul eng' maat ak eng' rotwennyi po chok: ak kochang'a che parei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Isaiah66:17 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, igesugei icheek tugul che ianyinyegei ak kotiliilegei si koba mbareenik, kosubotkei ak koamei panyeegap toorook, ak che kiwechei, ak mureek." 
Isaiah66:18 Amu angen poisyonikwak ak kabwaatutikwak: nyoonei peetuut, ye ayumi pororyosyek tugul ak kutusweek tugul; ak kobwa ak kogeer toroornatennyu." 
Isaiah66:19 Ak ande kaboorunet kwenunnywa, ak ayookte che chilildos eng' icheek koba pororyosyek, koba Tarsis, Pul ak Lud, che ng'iei kwanget, agoi Tubal ak Javan, agoi ngeguusyek che looen, che tomo kogas agobo kalasunennyu, anan kogeer toroornatennyu; ak komwaita toroornatennyu eng' pororyosyek." 
Isaiah66:20 Ak komut tupchosyekwok tugul komang'une pororyosyek tugul koek kagoochinet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobunu paraisisyek, ak kariisyek, ak chepkichutit, ak eng' nyumbusyek, ak tambeesik, kobwa tulweennyu ne tiliil Jerusalem, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye ibu lagogap Israel kagoochinennywa eng' tereet ne tiliil konyo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah66:21 Ak ande alak eng' icheek kogeny koek Tisiik ak Lawiik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah66:22 Amu ko uu ye tebee tainnyu kipsengwet che leelach ak ng'wonyut ne leel, che ta ayae, ko uu nooto tebyei iyoteng'wong' ak kaineng'wong' eng' tainnyu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah66:23 Ak tuun pwoonei piik tugul koloswa eng' tainnyu kobooch ye kaleel arawet agoi koleel age, ak kobooch sabato age agoi sabato age, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Isaiah66:24 Ak komanda koba kogeer muuswegap piik che ki ingelelja: amu ma pegu kutikwak, ama kimisi manywa; ak koek che wechei piik tugul." 
Jeremiah1:1 Chu ng'aleegap Jeremiah weeriitap Hilkiah, ne ki agenge eng' tisiik che ki mi Anatoth eng' emetap Benjamin." 
Jeremiah1:2 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet eng' peetuusyegap Josiah weeriitap Ammon laitoryatap Judah, eng' kenyiitap taman ak somok ne po laitornatennyi." 
Jeremiah1:3 Ki nyo kogeny eng' peetuusyegap Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah, ak agoi kogeskei kenyiitap taman ak agenge ne po Zedekiah weeriitap Josiah laitoryatap Judah, ye ki kiluul Jerusalem kimut eng' arawetap muut." 
Jeremiah1:4 Ki nyoonjo anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ye kitom amimiin eng' moet, ko ki angenin, kotom kesichin, ko ki atabaanin, ki andein iegu maotyot eng' pororyosyek.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Ki amwa anyun ale, “Ee, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Keero, anee koma muuchi ang'alaal, amu aa lakwa.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Ago ki leenjo `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Amele, Aa lakwa; amu iwendi ye mi piik alak tugul che ayooktochinin, ak imwae kiit age tugul ne ang'atiin.”" 
Jeremiah1:8 Meiywei icheek, amu ami kobooten ak asaruun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah1:9 Kochuul anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eunnyi ak kotiiny kutinnyu, ak koleenjo, “Kande nguno ng'aleekyuk kuting'ung'." 
Jeremiah1:10 Keero, kandein rani ibou pororyosyek ak pounatosyek, itutu ak ibut, ing'em ak igabui, iteech ak imiin.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo, “Jeremiah, igeere nee?” Ak ki awolu ale, “Ageere temeet ne po keetit ne kiguure almond.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Yeityo koleenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Kegeer komyee, amu ko uu ye sip koiyei taaptook keetitap almond kosiir keetiik alak, ariibe ng'olyoondennyu asi si ayai kosulda.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Ak ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po aeng', koleenjo, “Igeere nee?” Ak ki ale, “Ageere tereet ne wasegei ak tokyingei teronooto murot tai.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Yeityo koleenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Mang'une yaityet murot kaataam, konyonjin piik tugul che po emet.”" 
Jeremiah1:15 Keero, aguure ortinwek tugul che po pounatosyegap murot kaataam, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kobwa ak konde age tugul ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet ye kimandoe eng' ormariichogap Jerusalem, ak kotokyigei irimoikyik tugul ak kotokyigei nganasook tugul che po Judah." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ak amwa kirwoogutikyuk agirindae icheek, agobo yaityennywa tugul amu ki kometa, ki kobeelji nyamdutik kanamonik che teer, ak kolas poisyonigap eunekwak." 
Jeremiah1:17 Kermenge anyun, yetyo ing'eet ak imwachi icheek tuguuk tugul che ang'atiin. Ametoptoben amu icheek, si ma koonin itoptoben eng' tainnywa." 
Jeremiah1:18 Keero, kayain peetuuni iegu nganaseet ne riiboot, toloitap karnet, ak irimoigap sugunwet, si igirinde emet komugul, igirinde laitorinigap Judah ak pounikyik, tisiikyik ak piigap emet." 
Jeremiah1:19 Ibookyin icheek, ago ma iterteerin; amu ami kobooten, si asaruun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah2:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Ui, ititenji Jerusalem, ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ‘Abwaatin agobo myeeindap ming'inateng'ung', chamyetap katunisyeng'ung', ko uu ye ki isubwo eng' surkwen, eng' emet ne ki ma kegolei.’" 
Jeremiah2:3 Ki itabanat Israel agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tongoanigap ruratennyi. Tugul che amei ineendet kiityin ng'oogisto, nyoonjin yaityet icheek,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah2:4 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee kootap Jakobo, ak ortinwek tugul che po kootap Israel." 
Jeremiah2:5 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Nee kiit ne ma po iman ne kinyoorcha kwanisyekwok, kot kolooitena, ak koba kosubot kamuktaik che ma tilei kiy, ak kagoek icheek puch?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Ama teebegei icheek kole, ‘Mi ano Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki imutwech kemong'u eng' emetap Misiri, ne ki indoiywech kebun surkwen, kebun emet ne surkwen ak ne po keriingonik, kebun emetap kemeut ak imenindo ne oo, kebun emet ne ma punei chii, ole ma menyei chii?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ki amutwak obwa emet ne chaang' amitwogik, si kobiit oam logoekyik ak myeeindonyi; ago kingo it emonooto, ong'wanit emennyu, ak oyai porotennyu koek kiit ne kiwechei." 
Jeremiah2:8 Ma teep tisiik kole, mi ano Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?” Ma naa icheek che tinyei ng'atuutik. Ki ingelelja pounik ak icheek, ak ki maotensee maotik Baal, ak kobendatee tuguuk che ma ki nyoorunee kelunet." 
Jeremiah2:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ta arwookseiwok anyun, agot lagogap lagokwok arwooksechini." 
Jeremiah2:10 Oba olande ngeguusyegap Kitim ak ogeer, oyookte piik koba Kedar kooro komyee; kogeer ngo ki kobiit kiy ne uu noo." 
Jeremiah2:11 Tos ki kowal `pororyo kamuktaikyik, agot ngo ma kamuktain? Ago ki kowal piikyuk toroornatennywa agobo kiit ne ma koonu kelunet." 
Jeremiah2:12 Okwong'ye agobo niito, ee okweek kipsengwet, oaragense ak ogany koiyeak korotiik kot,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah2:13 Ki koyai piikyuk yaitwogik aeng': ki kometo anee ne aa kondametutap peek che saptos, ak kobaljigei keriingonik, keriingonik che ki koterogis, che ma imuuchi kotebee peek." 
Jeremiah2:14 Tos otwogin Israel? Tos ineendet ko otwogin ne ki kisikyi kaa? Amu nee anyun si keluul? 
Jeremiah2:15 Kigoborisenji `ng'etuunyik ineendet, ak komororso miising'. Kigong'em emennyi koek karaatya, ki kebeel nganasookyik, ak ma komenyei chii." 
Jeremiah2:16 Kogeny, chooto mi Nop ak Tapanes, ko ki kotui meting'ung' parak." 
Jeremiah2:17 Tos ki ma icheeng'jige niito, amu ki imete Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ye ki imutin eng' ooreet?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Tos nee anyun ne inyooru ye wendi Misiri, iee peegap Nail? Anan nee ne inyooru ye wendi Assyria, iee peegap Euprates?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Pirin yaityeng'ung', ak kogerin kong' mastaeng'ung'. Nai ak iguiye ile kiit ne ya ak ko ng'waan, eng' imete Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ametinye kaiyweisyet ne iywea, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Jeremiah2:20 Amu ki airii choging'ung' eng' peetuusyek che po keny, ak ang'etii anooguk ak ki imwa ile, “Maotin,” amu ki ing'uruuge eng' tulweet age tugul ne kooi ak eng' keetit age tugul ne tuon, iyae kugoinatet." 
Jeremiah2:21 Ago kiga amiinin inyee ko uu keetitap sabibuk ne lewenot, keswoot ne po iman. Kilya anyun si iwalage iegu keetit ne ya ne mangen?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Amu agot ngiunegei munyat, ak iboisyee sabunit ne oo, ko taagu kora yaityeng'ung' eng' tainnyu, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah2:23 Imuktoi ano anyun ile, “Ma aa murwoon, ma asup Baalik”? Keer oreng'ung' eng' atebweet, nai kiit ne kaiyai. Ii moitap tambeesyet ne chepchep ne isubi ortinwekyik," 
Jeremiah2:24 oloitigeet ne ingen surkwen, ne tabei koristo eng' magennyi. Ng'oo ne imuuchi koweekta eng' ye mi, eng' peetuusyekyik? Mang'etos icheek tugul che cheeng'ei ineendet. Nyooru `icheek ineendet eng' arawennyi." 
Jeremiah2:25 Amat kobetyi kweiyot keeldong'ung', anan koam melelda moktang'ung'. Ago ki imwa ile, ma tilei kiy kamang'unet. Amu ki acham toek ak asubi icheek." 
Jeremiah2:26 Ko uu ye ililani choriindet ko kaginyoor, ko uu nooto ililani kootap Israel. Ililoni icheeget, laitorinikwak ak pounikwak, tisiikwak ak maotikwak," 
Jeremiah2:27 che leenjin subenet, “Ii abba.” Ak koleenji koita, “Ki isicha.” Amu ki kotuktocha patai, ama tokyagei. Ago mwaei eng' peetuutap nyalildanywa kole “Ng'eet ak isarwech!”" 
Jeremiah2:28 Mi ano kanamonik, che ki iyachigei? Ingong'eetyo icheek, ngot komuuchi kosaruun eng' peetuusyegap nyalildang'ung'. Amu ko uu ole tee koitetap nganasoguk, ko uu nooto kanamoniguk, ee Judah." 
Jeremiah2:29 Amu nee si ogaigaa? Ki ongelelja okweek tugul, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah2:30 Ki abir lagokwok puch, ma cham icheeget katigonet. Kigobar rotweng'ung' po chok maotikwok, ko uu ng'etundo ne ng'emisyei." 
Jeremiah2:31 Ee ibini, ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Tos ki aegu emetap melewet ne oo eng' Israel? Amu nee anyun si komwa piikyuk kole, “Ki kityaachech, ma kebwane kogeny ole imi?”" 
Jeremiah2:32 Tos imuuchi chepto koutye tuguukyik che po lelesta? Anan koutye murereet ngoroikyik? Ago kigoutyeno piikyuk eng' peetuusyek che ma iitoksei? 
Jeremiah2:33 Ichoptoi ano oreng'ung' si icheeng' chamyet! Amu nee, si ko ki ineet, kwonyiik che yaacheen ortinweguk." 
Jeremiah2:34 Kogeny, ko miitei ngoroiguk, korotiigap kibananook che ma tinyei tengek. Ma inyoorchi icheek ole ki kobutok. Ago eng' chuuto tugul," 
Jeremiah2:35 imwae ile, “Ma tinyei tengek; kigoistoenagei iman nereegekyik.” Keero, arwoogun, amu imwae ile, “Tom ayai tengek.”" 
Jeremiah2:36 Amu nee si iombenote, iwalawali pandang'ung'? Kigoonin ililan agobo Misiri, ko uu ye ki kigoonin ililan agobo Assyria." 
Jeremiah2:37 Imandoe ineendet agine, inamoti meting'ung'. Amu ki koeesyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamang'unosyekwok, ak meboree chooto." 
Jeremiah3:1 Mwaei icheek kole, Ngot koon chii osotyonnyi, ak kobagaakta ineendet ak koek osotyotap chiito age, ko tos ta koweekyigei chiichooto kwonyooto kogeny? Tos ma imurwoni emet miising'? Ago ki iyai kugoinatet kobooto chamanik che chaang', ago tos oweekyage kogeny? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah3:2 Onyal parak ak ogeer tuloonook che churyotin. Tos mi ano komoswek che tomo oruiye tuwai? Ki igen icheek eng' ortinwek taban, ko uu Arabuindet eng' surkwen, ak ki imurwon emet eng' kugoinateng'ung' ak eng' sogornateng'ung'." 
Jeremiah3:3 Kigeger anyun ropta amu nooto, si mata kobiit ropta ne po let, ago itinye togeetap chepkugoniot ak ieesyoi ililan." 
Jeremiah3:4 Tos mechame iriircho kobooch nguno, ile, “Abba, ii kandoindetap ming'inatennyu?”" 
Jeremiah3:5 Tos nereechi ineendet agoi? Nereechi agoi kagesunet? Keero, ki ing'alaal ko uu ni, ak ki iyai tuguuk che yaacheen ak ki isup oreng'ung'." 
Jeremiah3:6 Kimwaiwo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyegap Josiah laitoryat koleenjo: “Tos ki igeer nooto ki yai Israel, ole kigogetyigei let, ole kitogosta tulweet age tugul ne kooi ak kwo kelutap keetit age tugul ne tuon, ak koyai kugoinatet eng' olooto?”" 
Jeremiah3:7 Ki abwaat anyun ale, kingo kagoyai tuguuchuuto tugul, ko weekyinagei ineendet. Ago ma week, chepkamennyi Judah kaberberindet ko ak ki keer niito." 
Jeremiah3:8 Ki aroo agobo ng'olyoondoniito, ye kingo kagoyai Israel ibeetapkei, kogiaoon ineendet ak agoochi parweetap peesyet, ago ma iyweis Judah chepkamennyi kaberberindet. Ago ki wo agine koyai kugoinatet." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ee iman, ki komurwon emet eng' kugoinatennyi ne po tangoi, ko uu ye ki ipkei ak koik ak subenik." 
Jeremiah3:10 Ak eng' chu tugul, ko chepkamennyi Judah kaberberindet, koma weekyagei eng' muguleldo komugul, ago eng' ng'aalseet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah3:11 Kimwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo ki ibartagei Israel ne kigogetyigei let kole po iman kosiir Judah kaberberindet. 
Jeremiah3:12 Ui, mwachi ng'aleechu komostap murot kaataam, ileenji, weege, inyee Israel ne ki iweekyigei let, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ma ageerok eng' nereegek. Amu atinye rireenet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Manereechi agoi." 
Jeremiah3:13 Ng'aany tengektong'ung' kityo; ile ki ingelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ak ki iseerchi toek ortinweguk eng' kelutap keetit age tugul ne tuon ak ma ogasa iit kutinnyu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah3:14 Oweege, okweek lagok che motinye kayaneet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Amu anee ko aa manong'otyot eng' okweek, amutu chii agenge agenge eng' nganaseet age tugul, ak piik aeng' che po ooreet agenge, ak amutak agoi Zion." 
Jeremiah3:15 Agoonok mestoweek che chamei muguleldanyu, che paok eng' naet ak kaguiyet." 
Jeremiah3:16 Ye tuun kaotesage ochaang'itu eng' emet, eng' peetuusyechooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma komwaei icheek kogeny kole, “Moingetap arorutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ama chutei metit, ama kobwaati icheek, ama kemage kiy; ama keyaei kogeny." 
Jeremiah3:17 Eng' peetuusyechooto, ko tuun kuuree `icheek Jerusalem ng'echeretap laitornatet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koyumjigei pororyosyek tugul, koyumjigei kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' Jerusalem. Ama kobendote uuindap mugulelwekwak che yaacheen." 
Jeremiah3:18 Eng' peetuusyechooto, ko tuun pendoti kootap Judah ak kootap Israel, tuun pwoonei tuwai komong' eng' emet ne po murot kaataam kobwa emet ne ki agoochi kwanisyekwok kobunji." 
Jeremiah3:19 Ago ki ale, “Imuktoi ano andein otebi ak lagok ak agoonin emet ne karaaran, poroteet ne myee ne po lugosyegap pororyosyek? Ki abwaati ale, oguureno ‘Abba’; ama omastoi ometa." 
Jeremiah3:20 Ago ko uu ye pagaktoi `osotyot manong'otyondennyi eng' kaberberisyet, ko uu nooto, ki oyaiywo kaberberisyet, ee kootap Israel,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah3:21 Kigasei waagaat eng' tuloonook che churyotin, riirek ak soomutigap piigap Israel; amu ki komaas ooreenywa, kigoutye Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa." 
Jeremiah3:22 Oweege, okweek lagok che ki ogetyigei let, si asoop kachuchugeng'wong' pogei. Ak owolu oleen, Kagibwonjin, amu ii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah3:23 Iman, kigeni puch toreteet ne punu tuloonook, nooto wasetapkei ne mi tuloonook. Iman eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo komi yetunetap Israel." 
Jeremiah3:24 Ago kiit ne po kalilanet ko kigoam poisyonigap kwanisyekyok kobooch ming'inatennyo, kobooto keechiirekwak, akwotisyekwak, weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak." 
Jeremiah3:25 Ongeruiye eng' kalilanennyo ak ingotuchech teweernatennyo. Amu kigeyachi tengekto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo, acheek ak kwanisyekyok kobooch ming'inatennyo agoi peetuuni; ak ma ki kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah4:1 “Ngot iweege, ee Israel, iweekyinage,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor “Ngot iiste tuguuguk che kiwechei eng' tainnyu, koma keistoin anyun," 
Jeremiah4:2 ak ngot iyasye ko uu ni ile, ‘Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor,’ eng' imanit, eng' kirwooget ak lititindo, konyooru kaberuret pororyosyek eng' aneendet ak kolasunenogei.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Amu mwachin `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Judah ak che po Jerusalem kole: “Obalu mbareeng'wong', amogol ole mi katook." 
Jeremiah4:4 Omuratange obunji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, omuratan mugulelwekwok, okweek piigap Judah ak che omenye Jerusalem, si ma mong' nereegekyuk che koroomen ko uu maat, ak kolalyo kot koma imuuchi chii komis, amu yaityetap poisyonikwok." 
Jeremiah4:5 Omwaite eng' Judah, ak obaraste eng' Jerusalem: oguut iryageet eng' emet! Owaach miising' ak omwa ole: Oyumgei, ak ongebe agoi nganasook che ng'ootaatiin!”" 
Jeremiah4:6 Onamji parak songolyet kotokyigei Zion, omwei osarugei, amogagei amu aibu yaityet eng' murot kaataam ak ng'emisyet ne oo." 
Jeremiah4:7 Kamong' ng'etundo eng' sondinnyi, ne ng'emindetap pororyosyek, kagomong' eng' oldanyi, si kobiit koyai emeng'ung' koguber, ak koek nganasoguk karaatya, ama komenyei chii." 
Jeremiah4:8 Ogermenegei anyun kuniok amu nooto, oriirye ak oteiye; amu nereegek che ng'woneen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko tomo koistoeneigei." 
Jeremiah4:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun mee mugulel laitoryat kobooto pounik; kwong'dos tisiik ak kotang'any maotik.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Ki amwa anyun ale, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Iman ki iberber miising' pichu ak Jerusalem, ileenji, “Onyooru kaalyeet; ago ityin rotwetap chok saboondo.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Tuun kimwachin pichu ak Jerusalem eng' peetuunooto keleenjin, usyin piikyuk usoonet ne po maat ne punu tuloonook che churyotin che po surkwen, ma ne sesisyei anan ko ne itiliilisyei," 
Jeremiah4:12 Nyonjino usoonet ne oo ne punu tuguuchuuto. Arwookyini anyun `agane icheek. 
Jeremiah4:13 Ogeero, togosu ineendet ko uu poolik, ak uu kipchurchuryet kariisyekyik che po lugeet. Chepchep paraisisyekyik kosiir kipsichinik. Pwo eng' acheek, amu kageng'emech!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Ee Jerusalem, iunde tengekto eng' muguleldang'ung', si kesaruun. Teben oriing'ung' kot kotyanit kabwaatutiguk che yaacheen?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Amu mwaitoi waagaat ne punu Dan, ak koboortoi yaityet eng' tuloonoogap Ephraim." 
Jeremiah4:16 Omwachi pororyosyek, obarastachi Jerusalem, oleenji, ibogu piik che ng'eete emet ne loo, ak imuui nganasoogap Judah." 
Jeremiah4:17 Ki koyiem icheek ko uu riibiik che riibei mbareet, amu ki kongelelja mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah4:18 Kagoibun oreng'ung' ak poisyoniguk tuguuchuuto, niito ko yaityeng'ung', amu ng'waan, amu itei muguleldang'ung'." 
Jeremiah4:19 Saboondanyu, saboondanyu! Atinye ng'wanindo eng' muguleldanyu oriit. Rukrugeni muguleldanyu. Ma muuchi asiis, amu kaigas, ee saboondanyu cheetap iryageet, nooto waagaatap lugeet." 
Jeremiah4:20 Kagosuup `ng'emisyet ng'emisyet, kagong'emak emet komugul. Kagechea keng'em emaisyekyuk, ak angookyuk eng' sainooto." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ageere songolyet, ak agase cheetap iryageet kot kotyanit!" 
Jeremiah4:22 Amu perber piikyuk, ak koma ingeno; lagok che uueen metowek icheek, che ma iguitos kiy. Chepchep koyai yaityet, ama ingen koyai ne myee." 
Jeremiah4:23 Ki ageer ng'wony, ak ki ma komi kiy ak ki ma kotinyei itoon; ki ageer kipsengwet ak ki ma kotinyei lapkeiyet." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ki ageer tuloonook, kibotandos ak ki iyongoi tuloonook tugul che mengeechen." 
Jeremiah4:25 Kinga keete, ko ki ma komi chii, agot toriitik tugul che po parak, ko kiga komweiso." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ki ageer, ak kiga koek surkwen mbareet ne kirurei, ak kiga kiluul nganasookyik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' taitap nereegekyik che ng'woneen." 
Jeremiah4:27 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, egu emet tugul karaita; ago magesu." 
Jeremiah4:28 Riirei emet amu niito, ak ko tuitu kipsengwet. Amu kaamwa ak kaachop, ak tomo awal kiit ne abwaati, amaweechigei let eng' ng'olyoondoniito." 
Jeremiah4:29 Mweei nganaseet komugul amu waagaatap piik che ketei paraisisyek ak piigap kwangok, chutei sondisyek ak kolaany rwandosyek. Ki metoi nganaseet age tugul, ama menyei chii olooto." 
Jeremiah4:30 Ak inyee, ne kigeng'emin, iyae nee? Amu nee si ilaachi ngoroik che piriireen? Amu nee si ilelesanegei tuguuk che po thahabu? Agot ngibaraae konyeguk saleiywek, ko puch korooronindo ne iyachinigei. Sasin chamaniguk, cheeng'ei saboondang'ung'." 
Jeremiah4:31 Amu ki agas waagaat ne uu ne po kwondo ne machei kosich taaitanyi, kutitap cheptap Zion ne isyenyi, ne iitoi eunekyik ak komwaei koleen, pwo eng' anee! Amu tanui saboondanyu eng' taitap rumiik." 
Jeremiah5:1 Orwaate ortinwegap Jerusalem si ogeer ak onai, ocheeng' eng' komoswekyik che paraen, ngot omuuchi onyooru chii agenge, ne yaei imanda ak ne cheeng'ei imanit, si ngot komi, anyochi kaat nganasanooto." 
Jeremiah5:2 Agot nga imurtoi icheek koleen, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor,” ko iyastos icheek eng' lembech." 
Jeremiah5:3 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tos ma keerei konyeguk imanit? Ki ibir icheek, ago ma aragenso, ki igeesu icheek, ago ki eesyo kotaach katigonet. Ki iuit icheek togoochikwak kosiir rwandet, ki eesyo koweekyingei." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ki abwaat anyun ale nyalulyotin iman pichuuto, perberen icheek; amu ma naei ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anan kirwoogetap Kamuktaindennywa." 
Jeremiah5:5 Awendi ye mi piik che eecheen, ak ang'alaalji icheek, amu ingen icheeget ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kirwoogetap Kamuktaindennywa. Ago kigoiri chu kabo tai chogit kibagenge ak kong'eti ratuutik." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ara anyun parei icheek `ng'etundo ne mang'une timiin, parei icheek suiyot ne po surkwen. Sapchin `cheplanget nganasookwak, kitonatoni age tugul ne mong'u eng' olooto, amu chaang' pistaosyekwak, ak ki kotesak kachuchugennywa pogei." 
Jeremiah5:7 Amuktoi ano anyoun kaat? Ki kometa lagoguk, ak ki koyosyo agobo kanamonik che ma kamuktaik. Kingo kaabai kobiyong'so, koyai ibeetapkei ak koyumjinotkei kooriigap chepkugonik." 
Jeremiah5:8 Kiu icheek paraisisyek che kagobiyong'so karon, ki itei age tugul eng' mageet agobo osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi." 
Jeremiah5:9 Tos manyone abire agobo tuguuchuuto? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak tos mayaaktochinigei mugetuut eng' pororyet ne uu ni? 
Jeremiah5:10 Otogoste irimoikyik ak ong'em, ago mong'em ogesu. Oiste mooriikyik, 2 amu ma po chooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah5:11 Ee, kootap Israel ak kootap Judah, koma kotinyei kayaneet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah5:12 Ki komwa lembechek agobo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, komwa kole, “Ma yae kiy ineendet, ma mi yaityet ne ityinech, ma koi kigeer rotwetap chok anan ko rubeet.”" 
Jeremiah5:13 Maotik koma kiy ago usoonet kityo, ama mi ng'olyoot eng' oriitinnywa. Ara anyun ingeyachi icheeget ko uu ye mwaei." 
Jeremiah5:14 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat ne po lugoosyek ko uu ni kole, “Amu mwaei pichu ng'olyoondoni, ayae ng'aleekyuk eng' kuting'ung' koek maat, ak koek pichu kweenik, si kobeel maata icheek." 
Jeremiah5:15 Ee kootap Israel, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amutwok pororyet ne punu ole loo, pororyet ne kiim, pororyet ne po keny miising', pororyet ne mongen kutinnyi, amoguitosi kiit ne mwaei." 
Jeremiah5:16 Motyennywa ko uu kererit ne yaataat, icheek tugul ko nyigoonigap lugeet che kiimeen." 
Jeremiah5:17 Amei `icheek peekwok ak amitwogikwok, amei kowong'u weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk; amei `icheek keechiireguk ak akwotisyeguk, amei keetiiguk che po sabibuk ak mogooniguk. Eng' rotwetap chok kobutei nganasook che ng'ootaatiin chooto imang'u.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 “Ago agot eng' peetuusyechooto, ko mageswok,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah5:19 Ak ye tuun teep piik kole, “Amu nee si koyaiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo tuguuchuuto tugul?” Ileenji anyun, “Ko uu ye ki ometa ak oot kanamonik che teer eng' emeng'wong', oote ko uu nooto toek eng' emet ne ma neng'wong'.”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Omwaite niito eng' kootap Jakobo, ak obarte eng' Judah ole:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Ogas ni anyun, ee okweek piik che perber ak che motinye kaguiyet, che otinye koonyek, amogeertoe, che otinye itiik, amogastoe." 
Jeremiah5:22 Amu nee asi moiywea? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu nee si mobotandosi eng' tainnyu? Tos ma anee ne ki ande ng'aniek koek kiwotetap nyanjet, eng' ng'atuutyet ne tebyei agoi ne ma imuuchi nyanjet kosiir? Nganda mildoegei peek miising', koma imuuchi kotil kiy, agot ngo moror, koma imuuchi kosiir." 
Jeremiah5:23 Ago tinyei pichu muguleldo ne po pistoet ak ngelelnateet, ki kobistoe ak koba." 
Jeremiah5:24 Ama mwaei eng' mugulelwekwak koleen, ongiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo, ne koonu ropta ne po tai ak ne po let eng' peetuusyekyik, ineendet ne riibwech wigisyek che ki king'at che po kesisyet." 
Jeremiah5:25 Ki kowal tengekwogikwok tuguuchuuto, ak ki koetenak tengekwogikwok myeeindo." 
Jeremiah5:26 Amu kinyoorchin piikyuk piik che yaacheen. Riipsei ko uu ye riipsei namigap toriitik, ak ko uu che richei mesteet si konamei piik." 
Jeremiah5:27 Ko uu kitonget ne nyiitaat toriitik, ko uu nooto nyiitootiin kooriikwak ng'aalseet. Ki eegitu ak koek anyun mogoreek amu nooto," 
Jeremiah5:28 ki koneryo miising' ak iluu. Siirtootin icheek eng' poisyonigap sogornateet; ma irwoochi si kobesyechi eng' imanit ne ma tinyei sigiik, ama irwooksechin komyee che ponondos." 
Jeremiah5:29 Tos manyone abire icheeget agobo tuguuchuuto? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tos mayaaktochinigei mugetuut eng' pororyet ne uu ni?" 
Jeremiah5:30 Kogobiit kiit ne po kwong'eet, ak ko ne samis kot eng' emet." 
Jeremiah5:31 Maoteni maotik lembeita, ak pou tisiik ko uu mageetap maotinwekwak, ak chamei piikyuk koteep ko uu nooto. Ago oyae nee anyun eng' kagesunetap tuguuchuuto?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Omwei osaruge, okweek lagogap Benjamin, omong'u eng' Jerusalem ak oguut iryageet eng' Tekoa; onamji parak kitap kaboorunet eng' Beth-hakerem. Amu itu yaityet eng' murot kaataam ak ng'emisyet ne oo." 
Jeremiah6:2 Agot nga karaaran ak ko ng'arng'ar cheptap Zion, ang'eme aistoi ineendet." 
Jeremiah6:3 Pwaanjin ineendet mestoweek ak keechiirekwak; teechei emaisyekwak koyieme ineendet, ak iyagisye age tugul komostanyi." 
Jeremiah6:4 Ochop lugeet si obargei ak ineendet; ong'eetyee, ongetogoste peet kween. Pwo eng' acheek! Amu kaimen, neegit kororokto asiista." 
Jeremiah6:5 Ong'eetyee, ongetogoste kemoi, keng'em kooriikyik che po laitorinik." 
Jeremiah6:6 Amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, Oluul, oep keetiik ak owasyi ng'ung'unyek Jerusalem, amu niito nganaseet ne kebirei, sastaet ineegei ne mi kwenunnyi." 
Jeremiah6:7 Ko uu ye kutune peek keriinget, ko kuutu ko uu nooto yaityennyi. Kigasei koroomnateet ak ng'emisyet eng' ineendet; mi tainnyu kotugul myando ak mook." 
Jeremiah6:8 Kas kergong', ee Jerusalem, si ma istoenegei saboondanyu; ak si ma yain iegu karaatya, nooto emet ne ma menyei chii." 
Jeremiah6:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole; “Ingeturot icheek che ng'etunotiin che po Israel komyee, ingeturot ko uu keetitap sabibuk. Ketyi eung'ung' kogeny kitongok, ko uu ineendet ne putei sabibuk.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ang'alaaljini ng'oo, ak abaoryanji, si kobiit kogasa? Ma kimuratan itiikwak, ara amaimuuchi koep iit. Kaek ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor teweernateet eng' icheek, ak ma poiboitune." 
Jeremiah6:11 Kanyiia anyun nereegek che ng'woneen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kaang'et araanye. Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, roong'ji nereegechooto lagok che mi ooreet, kobooto tuiyetap murenik; Amu kimuti manong'otyot ak osotyot ne ki koosit kobooto ne neegit koolil." 
Jeremiah6:12 Kiwolei kooriikwak kobunji piik alak, kobooto mbareenikwak ak osotikwak, amu achuuljini eunnyu piik che menyei emet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah6:13 Amu kobooch ne ming'in agoi ne oo eng' icheek, ko tinyei age tugul keyandiit, ak kobooch maotyot agoi tisiindet, ko yaei kaberberisyet age tugul." 
Jeremiah6:14 Kigonya ak kobir parak moogap piikyuk, koleenjin, “Kaalyeet, kaalyeet,” ye ma mi kaalyeet." 
Jeremiah6:15 Tos ki ililanso ye kingo yai tuguuk che kiwechei? Achicha, ma ililanso agot kitigin, ama walogis togoochikwak. Ibutos anyun kobooto icheeget che ibutos, tuun ki wiirtoi eng' peetuut ne anyoonjini icheek abire, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah6:16 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, otononie eng' ortinwek ak ogeerte, oteep ortinwek che po keny, ole mi ooreet ne myee, ak obendate nooto, si osich kamuung'et eng' saboonwekwok. Ago ki wol kole, “Ma kibendote ortinwechooto.”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ki ande riibiik koriibok ak ale, “Oepchi iit cheetap iryageet!” Ago ki le, “Ma kigase.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Ogas anyun, okweek pororyosyek, ak onai, ee okweek tuiyet, kiit ne mi kwenunnywa." 
Jeremiah6:19 Ogas okweek ng'wony, aipchini pichu yaityet, kosupkei ak logoegap kabwaatutikwak, amu ma epchi iit ng'aleekyuk, ak ki koeesyo ng'atuutikyuk." 
Jeremiah6:20 Tilei nee che nyamdut ngeibwa eng' Sheba, anan ko tuguuk che uu mutweek che nyamdut che ki ibune emet ne loo? Ma taachaksei kagoochinoikwok che po peelset, amachame tiseiywekwok." 
Jeremiah6:21 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole; “Andoi taitap pichu kanagutik, si konach kwanisyek kobooto weeriik, ak kolus chiitap kokwet kobooto chorwennyi.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Mwaei kora Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Punu piik emet ne mi murot kaataam; king'eeti pororyet ne oo ne punu komoswek che looen che po ng'wony." 
Jeremiah6:23 Tinyei kwanget ak ng'otit; ak koroomen, ama tinyei rireenet; morori cheennywa ko uu nyanjet, ak ketei paraisisyek; choboot age tugul ko uu chiito ne wendi lugeet, asi kobookyin, ee inyee cheptap Zion." 
Jeremiah6:24 Kigegas kalasunennywa, ak kanyalulso eunekyok. Kanamech pichiindo ak ng'waninwek, che uu che po kwondo ne machei kosigiis." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ma kimuuchi kemandee keebe mbar, anan kebendate eng' ooreet; amu mi rotwetap chok ne po puunyoot, ak kamuiset eng' komosta age tugul.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 Ee cheptap piikyuk, kermenegei kuniok, ak iburburegei oreek. Itee ko uu ye kitee agobo weeriit ne ki kisich ineegei, kateet ne ng'waan miising'; amu ng'emindet konyonjinech kocheeu." 
Jeremiah6:27 Koayain inyee Jeremiah iegu ole kitabendoe ak irimeet eng' kwenutap piikyuk; si kobiit inai ak ityem ooreenywa. 
Jeremiah6:28 Ngelelik icheek tugul che yaacheen, che pendi komosi ak komosi kochaamsoti, uueen icheeget ko uu sugunwet ak karnet, yaei tugul ng'emisyet." 
Jeremiah6:29 Kuutei kobanda miising'; laldos ngosyelaisyek, itiliilisyei puch; amu ma ki isto kiptengeginik." 
Jeremiah6:30 Kuuree icheek “Michikyigek che kigenendoe fedha,” amu ki koeesyo `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek." 
Jeremiah7:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji," 
Jeremiah7:2 tonone kurgeetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak imwaite eng' yooto ng'olyoondoni, ile, ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek tugul che oo po Judah, che omandoe ormariichochu obendi olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah7:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole: Olitit ortinwekwok ak poisyonikwok, si agoonok omeny yuto." 
Jeremiah7:4 Amomang'u ng'aleechu po lembech ak ole: “Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chuuto!”" 
Jeremiah7:5 Amu ngot olitit komyee ortinwekwok ak poisyonikwok, ak ngot orwooksechi komyee chii ak chiitap kokwennyi," 
Jeremiah7:6 ngot ko mosastoe toondet, ak ne ma tinyei sigiik, ak mosoget, amotumde korotiik che ma tinyei tengek eng' olito, anan osubote kamuktaik che teer ogoochinegei nyalilda," 
Jeremiah7:7 agoonok anyun omeny olito, emet ne ki agoochi kwanisyekwok kobooch keny agoi koigeny." 
Jeremiah7:8 Ago ogeero, omang'u okweek ng'aleegap lembech che ma imuuchi kogoonok kelunet age tugul." 
Jeremiah7:9 Tos nyolu ochoorsei, orumisyei, oyaei ibeetapkei, oyosye eng' lembech, obeelji nyamdutik Baal ak osubote kamuktaik che teer che mongen," 
Jeremiah7:10 yeityo obwa otonone tainnyu eng' koi, ne kimwaitoe kainennyu ak ole, “Kagesarwech,” si kobiit oyai tuguuchuuto tugul kiwechei?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Tos kaek kooi kemwaitoe kainennyu kebeneetap rebiik eng' taing'wong'? Onai ole anee, aneendet ne kaageer, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah7:12 Oba nguno oldanyu ne ki mi Shiloh, ole ki ande kainennyu eng' tai, si ogeer kiit ne ki ayachi amu tengekwogigap piikyuk Israel." 
Jeremiah7:13 Ara anyun, amu ki oyai poisyonichuuto tugul, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki ang'alaalwok, ang'eete karon miising' ak ang'alaali, ago ma ogas, ak ki aguurok, ago ma owolu," 
Jeremiah7:14 ayachini anyun koyooto, nooto kimwaitoe kainennyu, ne omang'u, kobooto komosta ne ki agoonok ak kwanisyekwok, ko uu ye ki ayachi Shiloh." 
Jeremiah7:15 Atimdak eng' tainnyu, ko uu ye ki atimde tupchosyekwok tugul, iyoteet komugul ne po Ephraim." 
Jeremiah7:16 Ara anyun inyee Jeremiah, ko mat isaa agobo pichu, agot iriirchi ko matiriirchi, mat isaachi anan isaa. Amu ma kasun." 
Jeremiah7:17 Tos megeere tuguuk che yaei eng' nganasoogap Judah ak eng' ortinwegap Jerusalem? 
Jeremiah7:18 Iyumi lagok kweenik, ilali maat kwanisyek, kokwonykwonyi magatiinik kwonyiik, si kobeelji osotyotap laitoryat ne po kipsengwet ak koroong'ji kagoochinoik che kieei, kamuktaik, si kobiit kotacha anereech." 
Jeremiah7:19 Tos tachei ng'oo pichooto konereech? Tos anee? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos matachegei icheegei, si kogoochigei kalilanet eng' togoochikwak?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole; Ogeero, kiroong'jin olito nereegekyuk ak nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, kiroong'jin piik, tuuga, keetiigap timiin ak eng' logoegap mbar; ak laldos, ama kimisi." 
Jeremiah7:21 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, otesyi kagoochinoikwok che kibeelei tiseiywek ak oam panyeek." 
Jeremiah7:22 Amu ki ma ang'alaalji kwanisyekwok anan ang'at icheek eng' peetuut ne ki amutu komang'une emetap Misiri, agobo kagoochinoik che kibeelei ak tiseiywek." 
Jeremiah7:23 Ago ki ang'at icheek agobo ng'olyoondoni aleenji, ogas kutinnyu, si aek Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak oegu piikyuk. Obendate ooreet tugul ne ang'atook, si kobiit komyeeit eng' okweek." 
Jeremiah7:24 Ago ma kas, ama ep iit, ago kibendatee kirwoogutikwak ak uuindap mugulelwekwak che yaacheen. Kituitui koba let, ma pa tai." 
Jeremiah7:25 Kobooch peetuut ne ki mong' kwanisyekwok eng' emetap Misiri agoi rani, ko ki ayookwok otwogikyuk tugul che maotik ang'eete kotugul karon ak ayoogu icheek." 
Jeremiah7:26 Ago ma kasa, ama ep iit, ago ki iuit kaatinnywa. Ki yai ne ya kosiir kwanisyekwak." 
Jeremiah7:27 Ara anyun mwachi icheek ng'aleechuuto tugul. Ago ma kasin. Iguure icheek kogeny, ago mawolun." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ileenjini icheek, niito pororyet ne ma epchi iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ama taach atep ne myee. Ki kobet imanda ak kigeisto eng' kutusweekwak." 
Jeremiah7:29 Ee Jerusalem, icheru suumeeguk anyun, ak iwiirte, rirate eng' tuloonook che churyotin, amu kaesyok ak ametook anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek ibini ko kogoono nereegek." 
Jeremiah7:30 Amu ki koyai lagogap Judah kiit ne ya eng' tainnyu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki konde tuguukwak che kiwechei koot ne kimwaitoe kainennyu ak komurwon." 
Jeremiah7:31 Kigoteech komoswek che torooreen che po Topet, ne mi atebweetap weeriitap Hinom, si kobeel weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak eng' maat; ne ki ma ang'at, ne ma kuura met." 
Jeremiah7:32 Keero, pwoonei anyun peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ma keguure yooto Topet, anan keguure weeriitap Hinom, ago kiguure Atebweetap Parisyet. Amu tuun tubisyei icheek eng' Topet, amu ma komi ole ketupchin." 
Jeremiah7:33 Ak koek muuswegap pichu amitwogigap toriitik che po parak, ak che po tyong'igap ng'wony. Ama piitu chii ne iyestoi." 
Jeremiah7:34 Agoochini anyun kosiis tuugeetap poiboiyet ak ne po kagasetapkei, ne po sandet ak ne po murereet, eng' nganasoogap Judah ak ortinwegap Jerusalem, amu egu emet karaatya." 
Jeremiah8:1 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ki ibu eng' peetuunooto kawegap laitorinigap Judah, kawegap pounikyik, che po tisiik, che po maotik ak che po che menyei Jerusalem, komang'une kereeriisyekwak." 
Jeremiah8:2 Kimaae eng' asiista ak eng' arawet ak eng' taitap tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet, che kiga kocham, che kiga koot, che kiga kosubot, che kiga kocheeng'at ak che kiga kolas. Ma kiyumi anan ketup, ago egu keturek eng' emet." 
Jeremiah8:3 Igaigai kolewen meet kosiir sabeet piik tugul che ng'etu, che ng'etune koiito ya, che ng'etu eng' komoswek tugul che ki aoonji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Jeremiah8:4 Imwachini kogeny ileenjini, “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Tos ibutos piik ama ng'eetos kogeny? Tos wo chii ama weeksei?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Amu nee anyun si kochuchuigei pichu po Jerusalem eng' kachuchuget ne po agoi? Namei miising' ng'aalseet, eesyoi koweek." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ki aep iit agas, ago ma ng'alaal icheek che po iman. Ma mi chii ne sigu eng' yaityennyi, kole, ‘Koyai nee? Isubi chii tugul ooreennyi, ko uu paraisiit ye labati kochutei lugeet." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ee, ingen kong'wonyot eng' soet peetuusyekyik; ak riibei cheptuget ak kibiswet ak cheptalamyat peetuusyekwak che pwonune, ago ma ingen piikyuk ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ ”" 
Jeremiah8:8 Omuktoi ano anyun omwa ole, “Ki utaatiin, ak oleen, ki tinyei ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ago, ogeere iman ole ki koyai ng'aalseet kalamitap kaberberisyet ne po Siriik." 
Jeremiah8:9 Ki teweeri piik che utaatiin, Aragendos ak kenamei icheek. Kigoesyo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ara anyun tinyei ng'omnateet ne uu nee?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Agoochini anyun piik alak osotikwak, ak agoochi mbareenikwak piik che namei kobunji, amu kobooch ne ming'in agoi ne oo, kotinyei age tugul kasetap myat, ak yaei age tugul kaberberisyet kobooch maotyot agoi tisiindet." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ak kigonya moogap piikyuk kobir parak, koleenjin, ‘Kaalyeet, kaalyeet,’ ye ma mi kaalyeet." 
Jeremiah8:12 Tos ki ililanso ye kingo yai tuguuk che kiwechei? Achicha, ma ililanso agot kitigin, ama walogis togoochikwak. Tuun ibutos anyun icheeget kobooto chooto ki ibutyo. Tuun ki wiirtoi icheek eng' peetuut ne kibirei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Jeremiah8:13 Ageesu icheek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ma ng'etu sabibuk eng' keetiik, ama ng'etu logoek eng' mogoonik ak koresyo sogeek, ak kobetyo eng' icheek tuguuk che kiga koochi." 
Jeremiah8:14 Amu nee si ketebi ak kesistosi? Oyumgei ak ongebe nganasook che riibootin, ak kesisye eng' olooto. Amu kagoonech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo kesisye, ak kogoonech peegap kipsegetetyet kee, amu kigeyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto." 
Jeremiah8:15 Ki kigen kaalyeet, ago ma nyo kiy ne myee, ki kigen peetuutap kasoobet, ak ki piit arageneet!" 
Jeremiah8:16 Kigasei eng' Dan waagaatap seruunegap paraisisyekyik. Potani emet komugul amu cheetap kateetap chechiik che kiimeen, amu kagobwa ak kagoam emet kobooto tuguuk tugul che kami, nganaseet kobooto che menyei oriit." 
Jeremiah8:17 Ogeer anyuno, ayoogu ndarok, erenook che ma kigoigoi kobwa kwenung'wong', si kosusak, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah8:18 Kata myee agaigaige si ma kase arageneet, tanui muguleldanyu." 
Jeremiah8:19 Ogas kutitap riiregap piikyuk eng' emet ne loo miising', tos ma mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion? Tos ma mi Laitoryatap nganasanooto olooto? Amu nee anyun si kotacha kot anereech eng' kanamonikwak che kiwaei, ak tuguuk che teer che po puch?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Kagosiirto kesisyet, kagogeskei kemeut, ago tomo kesarwech." 
Jeremiah8:21 Ki kiguotena amu kaguotenetap piikyuk. Aa tuui, ak kaakwong' miising'." 
Jeremiah8:22 Tos ma mi mwanik che ki inyaise Gilead? Tos ma mi chepkerichoon olooto? Amu nee anyun si ma sap cheptap piikyuk? 
Jeremiah9:1 Kata myee nda ka peei kityo metinnyu, ak ko kondametutap peegap kong' konyekyuk, si kobiit ariir peet ak kemoi agobo che ki kibar che po piikyuk!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Kata myee nda katinye eng' surkwen ole ruei kipruitoinik, si kobiit abagaakta piikyuk ak awechigei! Amu icheeget tugul koyaei ibeetapkei, ak ko tuiyetap piik che iberberisyei." 
Jeremiah9:3 Riichei ng'elyebwekwak ko uu ye riichei kwangokwak, agobo lembechek, ak kagogimegitu eng' emet, ago ma eng' imanit. Amu kong'eetyee yaityet koba yaityet, amaingeno, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah9:4 Ingoriibegei anyun chii tugul chiitap kokwennyi, amat imang'u tupchet age tugul. Amu tilei piich let tupchet age tugul, ak kochaamsoti chiito age tugul ne po kokwet." 
Jeremiah9:5 Iberberi age tugul chiitap kokwennyi, ama mwaei imanit. Ki konet ng'elyebwekwak komwa lembechek; ak kobirtogei koyai yaityet." 
Jeremiah9:6 Mi anyun meng'ooteng'ung' kwenutap kaberberisyet; eesyoi konaa amu kaberberisyet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah9:7 Ara anyun mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, abeele icheek kochootyo ak atyem; nee kiit age ne amuuchi ayai, agobo piikyuk?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Kipchabet ne parisyei ng'elyebwekwak; mwaei kaberberisyet koigeny. Ng'alaaljin chii chiitap kokwennyi eng' kaalyeet, ago sapchin eng' muguleldanyi." 
Jeremiah9:9 Tos manyone abire icheek agobo tuguuchu? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos mayaaktachinigei mugetuut eng' pororyet ne uu ni? 
Jeremiah9:10 Amu ariire ak atei agobo tuloonook, ak amosiseni agobo ole agete tuguuk eng' surkwen, amu kagolalyo, kot koma kobunei chii; ama komuuchi kogas piik kautetap tuuga; kogomwei toriitigap parak ak tyong'ik." 
Jeremiah9:11 Mwaei Kamuktaindet anyun kole, Ayaei Jerusalem koek karurugutigap karain, olooto menyei lelwek; ak ayai nganasoogap Judah koek karaatya, ole ma menyei chii." 
Jeremiah9:12 Ak ateebee aleen, Tos ng'oo chiito ne utaat ne imuuchi koguiyo niito? Ak ng'oo ineendet ne ki ng'alaalji kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit komwaita? Amu nee anyun si kong'emak emet ak kolal ko uu surkwen, kot koma kobunei chii?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Ak mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, amu ki kometo ng'atuutyennyu ne kiande tainnywa, ama kas iit kutinnyu, ama pendate chooto." 
Jeremiah9:14 Ago kibendatee uuindap mugulelwekwak ak koosup Baalik, che ki ineeti kwanisyekwak." 
Jeremiah9:15 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, “Abae pichuuto ng'wonet ak anage icheek peek che po kipsegetetyet koe." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ak ayestochi icheek pororyosyek, che ki ma nai icheek anan kwanisyekwak. Ayooktoi rotwetap chok koosup icheek, kot ageesu.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, “Obwaat ak oguur kwonyiik che riirtos, kobwa, ak oguur ak icheek kwonyiik che ng'oomen kobwa." 
Jeremiah9:18 Ingochok ak kooteeiyo agobo acheek, si kobiit koba peekyok po kong' ak korong'kei peek eng' konyekyok." 
Jeremiah9:19 Amu kigasei tuugeetap kateeiyet kobunu Zion, kole, kageng'emech ne tya! Kagetoptobense miising' amu kagebagaakte emet, amu kagobut icheek meng'otosyekyok." 
Jeremiah9:20 Ago ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek, ee kwonyichu, ak ingotaach itiikwok ng'olyootap kutinnyi, ak oneet tiibiikwok riirek, ak koneet chii tugul chiitap kokwennyi kateeiyet." 
Jeremiah9:21 Amu kagonyo meet tirisyokyok, kagochut kooriikyok che po laitorinik, si koges lagok eng' saang', ak koges neranik eng' ortinwek." 
Jeremiah9:22 Ng'alaal, ile, ‘Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Ibutos muuswek ko uu ng'atateegap tuuga eng' kewanin, ak koigei turoonik che yamei eutap kesiindet, ama piitu chii ne iyumi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, amat koloskei chiito ne utaat eng' ng'omnatennyi, anan koloskei chiito ne kiim amu kimnateennyi, amat koloskei mogoryot eng' mogornatosyekyik." 
Jeremiah9:24 Ago ingoloskei eng' ng'olyoondoni ineendet ne ilasugei, kole, ingeno ak konaa kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne poisyee chamyet ne tala, kirwooget ak imanda eng' ng'wony. Amu aboiboitune tuguuchuuto. Mmwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah9:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Pwoonei peetuusyek, che tuun abire tugul che ki kimuratan eng' kamuratanennywa ne ma kamuratanet, chooto abire ko:" 
Jeremiah9:26 Misiri, Judah, Edom, ak lagogap Ammon, kobooto Moab ak tugul che piori metowekwak, che menyei surkwen. Amu ma imuratanotiin pororyosyek tugul ama imuratanotiin mugulelwegap koot tugul ne po Israel.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Ogas ng'olyoot ne mwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee kootap Israel." 
Jeremiah10:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Amat oneetkei ortinwegap pororyosyek, amoaragense agobo kaboorunoigap kipsengwet; amu aragendos pororyosyek, agobo chooto." 
Jeremiah10:3 Amu tangoita pitonwegap piik, ebei age keetit eng' timiin, ak chobei komyee musogindet aiywet koboisyee aiywet." 
Jeremiah10:4 Ki lelesonjine fedha ak thahabu; ki igiige kipchumarisyek si ma twagei. 
Jeremiah10:5 Uu icheek tiiret ne kimue toriitik, che ma ng'alaaldos; kanyool keibot, amu ma imuuchi kobendat. Amoiywei icheek, amu ma imuuchi koyai kiy ne ya, amaimuuchi koyai kiy ne myee.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Ma mi ne ogerge, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ii oo, ak ko oo kaineng'ung' eng' kamuktaet." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ng'oo ne ma iywein, ee Laitoryatap pororyosyek? Nyoljinin toroornatet amu ma mi ne uu inyee eng' piik tugul che utaatiin che po pororyosyek, ak eng' pounatosyekwak tugul." 
Jeremiah10:8 Ago uu icheek tugul tyong'ik ak ko abusotiin kaneetisyet ne kineeti kanamonik, ko uu ye kineeti ketin." 
Jeremiah10:9 Miitei fedha che ki kitany kolebelitu che ki kiibune Tarsis, ak thahabu che punu Upas, nooto poisyetap musogindet ak po kitang'indetap thahabu; buluu ngoroikwak ak ko arusen ne piriir; poisyetap piik che ng'oomen chooto tugul." 
Jeremiah10:10 Ago Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po iman; ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne sabei, ak ko laitoryat ne po koigeny. Bbotani ng'wony amu nereegekyik, amaimuuchi komuita pororyosyek eng' nereegekyik." 
Jeremiah10:11 Mwachi anyun icheek ko uu ni ileenji, “Petos eng' ng'wony ak eng' kurereetap kipsengwet kamuktaik che ki ma koyaei kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Jeremiah10:12 Ki yai ng'wony eng' kamuktaennyi, ki igimit ng'wonyuni eng' utotyennyi, ak kiito kipsengwet eng' naennyi." 
Jeremiah10:13 Ye twek, kobiit wasetapkei ne po peek eng' kipsengwet, ak kogoochi kibungweret kotogosta eng' ole poochin ng'wony. Yachin ropta kalyelosyek, imoong'u usoonet eng' ole ki kigonoree." 
Jeremiah10:14 Kergeitu chiito age tugul ak tyondo ama tinyei naet. Ililani kitang'indet age tugul ne po thahabu eng' kanamwennyi ne ki kiwai. Amu lembeita kanamwennyi ne ki kitany, ama tinyei kabuset." 
Jeremiah10:15 Puch chooto, poisyetap ng'aalseet; petos eng' peetuut ne ityin pirennywa." 
Jeremiah10:16 Ma uu chuuto kebebertap Jakobo; amu po tai ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul. Israel ko pororyetap porotennyi: kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek.” 
Jeremiah10:17 Iyum eng' emet tuguuguk che po mung'aaret, ee inyee ne imenye irimeet." 
Jeremiah10:18 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Awirtoi piigap emoni peetuuni, ak anyaliil icheek, si kobiit kogas." 
Jeremiah10:19 Pwo eng' anee, amu ng'wanindanyu! Ng'waan kaguotenennyu. Ago ki amwa ale, “Aragenennyu iman niito, ak kanyool amuita.”" 
Jeremiah10:20 Kigeng'em emainnyu, ak kigeng'eti poroonikyuk tugul. Kigoba lagokyuk kometaa, Ama komi. Ma komi chii ne teekwo ak kondaiywo emainnyu angook." 
Jeremiah10:21 Amu kigoigei mestoweek tyong'ik, amata koteepse `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu nooro, ko mata konyoor anyun kaberuret, ak kagiyesta keechiirekwak tugul." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ogaso! Kigasei ng'aleek kobwanei, ak kirgirenet ne oo komang'une emetap murot kaataam, si kobiit koyai nganasoogap Judah koek karaatya, ole menyei lelwek." 
Jeremiah10:23 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, angen ale, ma po uu chii ortinwekyik; amaindochin chii kabwaatutikyik." 
Jeremiah10:24 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, itigoono, ago eng' kirwooget; ma eng' nereegeguk, si meyaa aek puch." 
Jeremiah10:25 Rong'ji nereegeguk che ng'woneen pororyosyek che ma ingenin, ak ortinwek che maguurei kaineng'ung'; amu kigoam Jakobo, ee, kigoam ineendet kogees ak Ki kong'em meng'ootennywa." 
Jeremiah11:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah koleenji," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Ogas ng'aleegap kayomisoni, yeityo ong'alaalji piigap Judah ak piik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah11:3 Mwachi icheek ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, chuboot chiito ne ma kasei ng'aleegap kayomisoni," 
Jeremiah11:4 ne ki ang'at kwanisyekwok eng' peetuut ne ki amutu icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri, komang'une maatap karnet ak aleenji, ‘Ogas iit kutinnyu ak oyai chooto, ko uu tugul che ang'atook, si oegu piikyuk anyun ak aegu Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Jeremiah11:5 Si kobiit agimiit kayasyoet ne ki ayosyechi kwanisyekwok, ale agoochini icheek emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo, ko uu rani.’ ” Ki awolu anyun, ale, “Amen, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Ki leenjo kogeny anyun `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, mwaite ng'aleechuuto tugul eng' nganasoogap Judah ak eng' ortinwegap Jerusalem, ileenji, ogas ng'aleegap arorutyoni ak oyai." 
Jeremiah11:7 Amu ki abaoryanji kwanisyekwok eng' kagiiletapkei, kobooch peetuut ne ki amutu icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri, agoi ra, ang'eete karon ak abaoryanjini, aleenjini, ogas iit kutinnyu." 
Jeremiah11:8 Ago ma kas iit, ama ep iit, ago kiwendot age tugul eng' uuindap muguleldanyi ne ya. Aipchini anyun icheek ng'aleek tugul che po kayomisoni, ne ki kang'at icheek koyai, ago ma yai." 
Jeremiah11:9 Kimwaiwo kogeny koleenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Miitei chaamset kwenutap piigap Judah ak eng' piik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah11:10 Ki koweekyigei tengekwogigap kwanisyekwak, che ki eesyo kogas ng'aleekyuk, ak ki isup kanamonik koot. Ki kobut kayomisennyu kootap Israel ak kootap Judah ne ki kayai kobooto kwanisyekwak." 
Jeremiah11:11 Ara amwae anyun anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ale, ogeero, aipchini icheek yaityet, ne ma imuuchi kochililee. Ririirchino, ago ma kasyini icheek." 
Jeremiah11:12 Eng' yooto anyun kobendi nganasoogap Judah ak piik che menyei Jerusalem, kobendi koriirchin kanamonik che igoochin nyamdutik. Ago ma saru icheek agot kitigin eng' peetuutap nyalildanywa kanamonichooto." 
Jeremiah11:13 Amu ko uu ole tee koitetap nganasoguk, ko uu nooto kanamoniguk, ee Judah. Ak ko uu ole tee koitetap ortinwegap Jerusalem, ko uu nooto ki olumde kapkorosusyegap kiit ne kililane, kapkorosusyek che kibeeljine Baal nyamdutik." 
Jeremiah11:14 Amesaa anyun agobo pichu, ameriir anan isaa agobo icheek. Amu ma agase icheek eng' peetuut ne riirchino amu nyalildanywa.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 Tinyei iman nee chamanennyu eng' koonnyu, amu ki koyai tengek? Tos saruun kayasyosyek ak panyeek che itabaanatiin kong'eetee yaityoni? Tos ye iyae tengek ibaibaitu." 
Jeremiah11:16 Kiguure Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaineng'ung', Emdit ne tuon, ne karaaran ak kotinyei logoek che myach. Ki ilaal maat eng' yooto eng' polatetap wasetapkei ne oo ak kagoilyo mooriikyik." 
Jeremiah11:17 Amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ne kiminin, yaityet agobo inyee, amu yaityetap kootap Israel ak ne po kootap Judah, che ki koyachigei kotacha anereech amu ki igoochi Baal nyamdutik." 
Jeremiah11:18 Ki koono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor naet agobo chaamsennywa ak ki anai. Ki iboorwo ineendet poisyonikwak. 
Jeremiah11:19 Ago ki auu aarwetap keechiir ne tala, ne ki kweryei kwo ole kieng'e; ak ki ma anai ale Ki kochop `icheek chobutik che yaacheen agobo anee, kole, ongeng'em keetit kobooto logoekyik, ak ongeiste ineendet eng' emetap che saptos, si mata kibwaat kainennyi kogeny." 
Jeremiah11:20 Ago, koono ageer yaaktaeng'ung' po mugetuut eng' icheek, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ne irwoochi eng' imanda, ne ityeme kabwaatutik ak muguleldo, amu kaang'ang'un ng'olyoondennyu." 
Jeremiah11:21 Nooto anyun amu nee si komwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo piigap Anatoth, che cheeng'ei saboondang'ung', kole, “Amat imaoten eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si ma ki parin acheek.”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, “Abire icheek. Pegu neranik eng' rotwetap chok, parei rubeet weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak," 
Jeremiah11:23 ama piitu che ng'etu eng' icheek. Amu aipchini yaityet piigap Anatoth, eng' kenyiit ne agikyini icheek abire.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Ii po iman, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ariirchinin, nga amache atebeenen agobo ng'olyoondoni: Amu nee anyun si kiberuur ooreetap kiptengeginik? Amu nee si komuunyi icheek tugul che yaei kaberberisyet?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Ki imin icheek, ak ki konam ng'wony tigitik; eegitu, ee, iytos logoek. Ii neegitee kutusweekwak, ago ii loo eng' mugulelwekwak." 
Jeremiah12:3 Ago ingeno, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Igeera ak ityeme muguleldanyu kotokyingei. Ichuutu kobwa ko uu keechiirek che kienyei, ye ibata itabaanji icheek peetuutap eng'seet." 
Jeremiah12:4 Iteei emet kot kotyanit, ak korestos sogegap emet komugul agoi au? Amu sogornatetap piik che menyei olooto, ko ki koges kei anyun ak ki kobek tyong'ik ak toriitik. Amu ki le icheek, “Ma keerei ineendet kagesunennyo.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 Ngot ko ki orwai ak piik che punei keelyek, ak kigogoonin ing'et, Ko tos imuktoi ano anyun obargei ak paraisisyek? Agot ngot itebye eng' chametapkei eng' emetap kaalyeet, iyae nee anyun ye kanyi peek Jordan miising'?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ki koyaun kaberberisyet tupchosyeguk ak kootap kwandang'ung'. Ki koriirchin miising'. Ameyan icheek, agot nda mwaun ng'aleek che korooron." 
Jeremiah12:7 Ki abagaakte koonnyu, ki amete porotennyu, ki agoochi chamaneetap saboondanyu kwo eunegap puunikyik." 
Jeremiah12:8 Kigoigei porotennyu eng' anee, ng'etundo ne miitei timiin. Ki kowaagena ak ki awech anyun amu nooto." 
Jeremiah12:9 Tos ma igei porotennyu eng' anee toriityon ne legee, ne parisyei? Ne kayiem ineendet toriitik che parisyei? Ara oba anyun ak oyum tyong'ik tugul che po timiin; ogetu kobwa koamis." 
Jeremiah12:10 Kigong'em mbareennyu ne po sabibuk mestoweek che chaang', ki kotyegat kebebertanyu, ki koyai kebebertanyu ne karaaran koek surkwen ne ma mi kiy." 
Jeremiah12:11 Ki koyai koek karaatya; riirchino, amu karaatya; ki keyai emet komugul koek karaatya, ak ma mi chii ne ibwaati emonooto." 
Jeremiah12:12 Katogosta piik che luulsei koba tuloonook tugul che churyotin eng' surkwen. Amu parisyei rotwetap chok ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch tabanda age ne po emet, agoi tabanda age. Ara ma mi chii ne tinyei kaalyeet." 
Jeremiah12:13 Ki kool `icheek nganuuk ak kagoges katook; kibirtogei ama kelji kiy. Ililandos icheek amu logoekwak, ak amu nereegek che ng'woneen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah12:14 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleechooto agobo piik tugul che kiptengeginik che po kokwennyu, che twaei poroteet ne ki agoochi piikyuk Israel konam kobunji, kole: “Ogeero, atutu icheek eng' emennywa ak atutu kootap Judah komong' eng' kwenunnywa.”" 
Jeremiah12:15 Ago ye kaatut icheek, aweechigei ak ariiree icheek. Ak amutu kogeny konyo age tugul porotennyi ak konyo age tugul emennyi." 
Jeremiah12:16 Ak ngot koneetkei ko ki iljigei ooreetap piikyuk, ak koyasyo eng' kainennyu kole, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak ko uu ye ki ineet piikyuk koyasyo eng' Baal, keteechei anyun icheek eng' kwenutap piikyuk." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ago ngot koma cham kogas, atutu pororyonooto. Atutu anyun ak ang'em,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah13:1 Kimwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ui, ak ialjige pireneetap angeet ne karaaran ak irategei, amat inde peek.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Ki aal anyun pireneet ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak arategei. 
Jeremiah13:3 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po aeng', koleenjo," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Nam pireneet ne kaial nooto kerategei ak ing'eet iwe Yufrets, yeityo iuny eng' yooto eng' keriinget ne mi rwandet.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Ara ki awe anyun, ak auny eng' ole neegitee Yufrets, ko uu ye king'ata Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah13:6 Kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang', komwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo, “Ng'eet, ui Yufrets ak inemu pireneet ne ki kang'atiin iuny eng' yooto.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Ara ki awe anyun Yufrets ak kinga pal, anemu pireneet eng' ole kigaung'e. Ago kiga kong'emak pirenooto, ki ma kota kotilei kiy." 
Jeremiah13:8 Yeityo konyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ang'eme menoteetap Judah ko uu niito kobooto menoteet ne oo ne po Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah13:10 Igeitu pirenoni ma kotilei kiy, pichu yaacheen, che eesyoi kogas ng'aleekyuk, che pendote uuindap mugulelwekwak, ak kosuboti kamuktaik che teer, si koot icheek ak kolas." 
Jeremiah13:11 Amu ko uu ye namegei pireneet ak suetap chii, ko uu nooto anyun kaagoochi koot komugul ne po Israel ak koot komugul ne po Judah kenamge, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit koek eng' anee pororyet, kainet, kalasunet ak teegisto. Ago ma cham kogas.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Mwachi anyun icheek ng'olyoondoni, ileenji, “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole, ‘Kinyiiti divaik tereet age tugul.’ Ago teebenen icheek kole, ‘Tos ma kingen keele kinyiiti divaik tereet age tugul?’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:13 Ileenji anyun icheek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, anyiiti pogitet piik tugul che menyei emoni, laitorinik che tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi, tisiik, maotik ak piik tugul che menyei Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ak atue chii age age, kwanisyek ak weeriik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ma riiree anan abagaakte anan koriira moo, kot ko magesu icheek." 
Jeremiah13:15 Ogas anyun, oep iit, amomenie. Amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah13:16 Ogonyit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', kotom koip mesundeito konyo, kotom kinach keelyekwok eng' tuloonoogap mesundeito. Ak ye ocheeng'e lapkeiyet, kowal koek urwetap meet ak koyai koek mesundeito ne oo." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ago ngot ko mogas ng'olyoondoniito, koriirei saboondanyu eng' ung'oot agobo menateng'wong', ak ariir miising', kot koba peegap kong', amu kageluul keechiiregap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah13:18 Mwachi laitoryat ak kametap laitoryat, ileenji, oming'inge, otebee ng'wony: ki kobutyo chepkuloikwok, chooto ko naaryeetap toroornateng'wong'." 
Jeremiah13:19 Kigeger nganasook che po murot tai, ama mi chii ne yaatei: ki kimut Judah tugul koek luulenik, ki kimut tugul koek luulenik." 
Jeremiah13:20 Ong'eet met ak ogeer icheek che punu murot kaataam. Mi ano keechiirek che ki kigoonin, keechiireguk che korooron?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Tos mwaei nee ye tuun inde ineendet choronoguk koboun, ak ko inyee ne ki ineeti icheek? Tos manamin ng'waninwek, ko uu kwondo ne machei kosigiis?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Ak ngot imwa eng' muguleldang'ung' ile, amu nee anyun si kobwanjo tuguuchuuto? Kageng'aany ngoroiguk amu ooindap tengektong'ung', ak kagonyoor kwariniguk ng'wanindo." 
Jeremiah13:23 Tos imuuchi kowal Ethiopiaindet iriryondennyi, anan kowal cheplanget simormorindanyi? Ngo uu nooto, omuuchi ak okweek oyai ne myee, che ki onaite oyae yaityet." 
Jeremiah13:24 Ayestoi anyun icheek, ko uu mobeek che ibei usoonetap surkwen." 
Jeremiah13:25 Kebebertang'ung' niito, kebeberta ne punwa ne ki kigerun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ki iutyeno ak imang'u lembechek." 
Jeremiah13:26 Ang'aanye anyun agane ngoroiguk kot koit metit, si kotook teweernateng'ung'." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ki ageer tuguuguk che kiwechei, ibeetapkei neng'ung' ak kateeng'ung' ne po mageet, tengektap kugoinateng'ung' eng' tuloonook che mi kewanin. Pwo eng' inyee, ee Jerusalem! Memache itiliiliitu, yaaksei niito kot kotyanit?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo kemeut. 
Jeremiah14:2 Ki mwa kole, itei Judah ak nyaluldos ormariichokyik, tebyei piikyik koteitos, ak kotogosta riiregap Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah14:3 Iyooktoi piikwak che taagunotiin kiboitiinikwak koba ole mi peek: pendi agoi keriingonik, ama nyooru peek. Weeksei kiboitiinik puch ak tereenikwak; kolililandos, kotoptobendos ak kogatuch metowekwak eng' arageneet." 
Jeremiah14:4 Ililandos che ibatisye ak kotuchei metowekwak, amu emet ne ki kobetak, ak amu ki ma kota komi ropta emet." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ee, yiei kenyeleet agine eng' kewanin, ak kobagaakta arwennyi, amu ma mi susweek." 
Jeremiah14:6 Tonondos ak icheek sigirogap timiin eng' tuloonook che churyotin, isyendos ko uu lelwek; imenitu konyekwak, amu ma komi kiy ne tuon." 
Jeremiah14:7 Nga paoryanjinech tengekwogikyok, iboisye ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu kaineng'ung'. Amu chaang' kachuchugosyekyok pogei, ak kigeyaun acheek tengek." 
Jeremiah14:8 Ee inyee kamang'unetap Israel, yetindennyi eng' peetuutap nyalilda, amu nee si iige toondet eng' emet, ak iige kiprutoiyot ne mastoi koruei kemout agenge?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Amu nee si iige chii ne kakwong', kalya iige chii ne kiim, ne ma imuuch kosaruunis? Ago inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, imi kwenunnyo ak kimwaitaenech kaineng'ung'; amemetech." 
Jeremiah14:10 Mwachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pichu kole; “Ki cham ko uu nooto koombenso; tomo koisto keelyekwak. Mataachei anyun anee icheek amu nooto. Ago abwaati aneendet tengektonywa, ak aityin pireet amu tengekwogikwak.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Ak kimwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo, “Amat isaa isomji pichu myeeindo." 
Jeremiah14:12 Agot ye irugutkei icheek, koma kase riirekwak, ak ye igoito kagoochinet ne kibeelei, kobooto kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin, ko mataache. Ago ageesu icheek eng' rotwetap chok, rubeet ak koroito.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Ago ki amwa anyun ale, ee, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Keero, mwachin maotik icheek, koleenji, “ ‘Maityinok rotwetap chok, amonyooru rubeet; ago agoonok kaalyeet ne po iman eng' olito.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Ago ki leenjo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, maoteni maotik lembechek eng' kainennyu. Ma ayookte icheek, ama ang'at icheek anan ang'alaalji. Maotenwok ng'ang'utyet ne po lembech, kobooto ng'oorset ak kiit ne po puch ak kaberberisyetap mugulelwekwak." 
Jeremiah14:15 Amu nooto anyun komwae Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni agobo maotik che maoteni eng' kainennyu; Nga ma ayookte icheek, komwae komwaei icheek koleen, ma piitu rotwetap chok anan rubeet eng' emoni. Kigeesu maotichooto eng' rotwetap chok ak rubeet." 
Jeremiah14:16 Ak kewiirchi ortinwek che po Jerusalem piik che ki maotenjin, amu rubeet ak rotwetap chok. Ama piitu chii ne tubei icheek, osotikwak, weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak. Amu aroong'jini icheeget yaityennywa." 
Jeremiah14:17 Mwachi icheek ng'olyoondoni ileenji, “Ingoba peekyuk po kong' kemoi ak peet, amat kosiisyo, amu kail ne pergeiyat, nooto piikyuk, eng' ilet ne oo ak eng' kaguotenet ne ng'waan miising'." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ngot ale awo mbar, ageere che ki kebare rotwetap chok! Ak ngot ale awo nganaseet, ageere ale miitei che nyaluldos amu rubeet! Amu pendoti eng' emet maotik ak tisiik ama tinyei naet.”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Tos ki ieesye Judah iman? Tos kigowech saboondang'ung' Zion? Amu nee si ibirech, ama mi kasoobet eng' acheek? Ki kigen kaalyeet, ago ma nyo kiy ne myee; ki kigen peetuutap kasoobet ak keero, ki piit arageneet!" 
Jeremiah14:20 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, king'aanye tengektonyo, ak yaityetap kwanisyekyok, amu kigeyaun tengekto." 
Jeremiah14:21 Amat iwechech amu kaineng'ung', ameteweer ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po toroornateng'ung'. Ibwaat, amat ibut kayomiset ne kigaiyomiswech." 
Jeremiah14:22 Tos mi eng' age tugul eng' kanamonik che ma tilei kiy che po pororyosyek, ne imuuchi kogoon ropta? Anan tos imuuchi kipsengwet kogoon ropta ne inesi? Tos ma inyeendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo? Ara anyun kimang'un inyee, amu inyee ne yae tuguuchuuto tugul." 
Jeremiah15:1 Yeityo koleenjo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agot nganda kiga tononso Musa ak Samuel eng' tainnyu, ko matokyingei kabwaatutikyuk pichu. Iste eng' tainnyu, koba." 
Jeremiah15:2 Ak ngo teebenen koleenjin, kibendi ano? Imwachi anyun ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Che po meet, kobendi meet, che po rotwetap chok, kobendi rotwetap chok, che po rubeet, kobendi rubeet, ak che po luuleet, kobendi luuleet." 
Jeremiah15:3 Ang'atyini icheek tuguuk ang'wan, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: rotwetap chok ne parisyei, sesenik che isongiririsyei, toriitigap parak ak tyong'igap ng'wony, si koamis ak kong'emis." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ak agoite icheek kewiirchi komosi ak komosi eng' pounatosyek tugul che po ng'wony, amu kiit ne ki yai Manasseh weeriitap Hezekiah ko laitoryatap Judah eng' Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah15:5 Amu ng'oo ne tos rireenen, ee Jerusalem? Anan ng'oo ne riirchinin? Anan ng'oo ne tos mosyok koteebenak chametapkei?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Ki oeesya, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki ochuchuige. Ara achuule anyun eunnyu atokyin, asi ang'emin, amu kaang'et eng' muitaet." 
Jeremiah15:7 Ki arur icheek eng' kiit ne kirurse, eng' ormariichogap emet, ki agoochi kobegune lagok ak ki ang'em piikyuk, amu tomo koweek eng' ortinwekwak." 
Jeremiah15:8 Atese mosoogikwak eng' anee kosiir ng'aniegap nyanjosyek. Amutyini icheek luulindet petkwen kobar kametap murenik. Agoochini koche ineendet tiritindo ak kamuisosyek. 
Jeremiah15:9 Nyaluli ineendet ne kigosich lagok tisap, meei; ak roroktoi asiistanyi kota ko peet; ililani ak kotoptoben. Agoitoi che ng'etu eng' icheek kobar rotwetap chok eng' taitap puunikwak, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah15:10 Pwo eng' anee, ee kamennyu, amu kisicha aek chii ne po pooryeet, ne ibeligei ak ng'wony komugul! Tom abesende si anyoor keljinet ne siirei, ak kotomo kobesendaiwo piik, si konyoor keljinet ne siirei; ago chubo age tugul eng' icheek." 
Jeremiah15:11 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, agimiitin iman agobo kiit ne myee. Eng' iman agoochini puunyoot kogaigain eng' peetuutap yaityet ak eng' peetuutap usiisyet." 
Jeremiah15:12 Tos imuuchi chii koiri karnet, karnet ak sugunwet ne punu murot kaataam?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Agoitoi tuguuguk ak konoraiguk keluul koma eng' alyet, amu tengekwogiguk tugul eng' kiwotosyeguk tugul." 
Jeremiah15:14 Agoonok obe ak puunikwok emet ne mongen. Amu kagolal maat ne lalenen eng' nereegekyuk. 
Jeremiah15:15 Ak ki amwa ale, Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ingen inyee: “Ibwaata, ak irutocha. Iyooktoiwo mugetuut eng' usiikyuk, ameistoena muitaeng'ung'. Nai ile ki anyooru chotisyet amu inyee." 
Jeremiah15:16 Kingo piit ng'aleeguk, aam, ak ki ek ng'aleeguk eng' anee poiboiyet ak kagasetapkei ne po muguleldanyu. Amu kimwaitoena kaineng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek." 
Jeremiah15:17 Ma ki tebi ak tuiyetap icheek che urerendos, anan abaibaitu; ki atebi aneege amu eung'ung'; amu ki inyiita nereegek." 
Jeremiah15:18 Amu nee si kobunji agoi ng'wanindanyu, ama inyaaksei moennyu ne ma kimuuchi kinya? Tos iegu eng' anee iman kereruut ne iberberisyei, ko uu peek che teng'dos?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Ara mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ngot iweekyogei, amutun kogeny, si kobiit itonon eng' tainnyu, ak ngot inemu kiit ne myee komong' eng' kiit ne ya, iigeitu kutinnyu. Iweekyiningei icheek, ago meweekyinigei icheek." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ayain eng' pichu iegu irimeet ne ng'ootaat ne po sugunwet; obargei ak icheek ago ma iterteerin, amu ami kobooten si asaruun ak atyachin, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah15:21 Asaruun eng' eutap kiptengeginik, ak atyachin eng' eutap che imuisei." 
Jeremiah16:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Metunisyei, amesiche weeriik anan tiibiik eng' olito." 
Jeremiah16:3 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo weeriik ak tiibiik che kisikyin olito, agobo kametisyekwak che sichei icheek, ak agobo kwanisyekwak che ki sich icheek eng' emoni kole:" 
Jeremiah16:4 ‘Pegu icheek eng' meet ne ng'waan; ma kiriirchin, ama kitubei. Igeitu ng'atateek eng' ng'wony ak ki pare rotwetap chok ak rubeet; si koek muuswekwak amitwogigap toriitigap parak ak tyong'igap ng'wony.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:5 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole amewe koot ne kiriirye, amewe itee, anan iriirchi icheek: amu ki aiste kalyennyu eng' pichu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nooto ko chamyennyu ne tala ak rireenennyu ne po chamyet." 
Jeremiah16:6 Pekyin emoni che eecheen ak che mengeechen: ma kitubei, ama iteitos piik agobo icheek, anan kotilgei, ama icheru metowekwak;" 
Jeremiah16:7 ama putuli piik magatiinik agobo icheek amu riirek, si kogaigai icheek amu piik che kabek; ama igoochin koe kigombetap kagaigaet agobo kwanisyekwak ak kametisyekwak." 
Jeremiah16:8 Amewe kootap igoorto, otebi ak icheek, oamisye ak oee." 
Jeremiah16:9 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole: Ogeero, agoochini kosiis eng' taing'wong', ak eng' peetuusyekwok, tuugeetap poiboiyet ak ne po kagasetapkei, ne po sandet ak ne po murereet, eng' olito." 
Jeremiah16:10 Ak ye tuun iboorchi pichu ng'aleechuuto tugul, ak koleenjin, Amu nee si komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yaityoni oo agobo acheek? Anan nee yaityennyo? Anan nee tengektonyo ne kigeyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo?" 
Jeremiah16:11 Ileenji anyun icheek, Amu ki kometa kwanisyekwok, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kosubot kanamonik che teer, ak koot ak kolas, ak kometaa, ama riip ng'atuutikyuk;" 
Jeremiah16:12 ak ki oyai yaityet kosiir kwanisyekwok; amu, ogeero, wendoti age tugul eng' okweek kosubi uuindap muguleldanyi ne ya, kot koma oepcha iit:" 
Jeremiah16:13 atimdok anyun omande eng' emoni obe emet ne tomo onai, okweeget anan kwanisyekwok; ak oot kamuktaik che teer eng' olooto peet ak kemoi; amu ma rireenok." 
Jeremiah16:14 Nooto anyun, ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ma kemwaei kogeny keele, Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki imut piigap Israel komang'une emetap Misiri;" 
Jeremiah16:15 ago, kileen, Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki imut piigap Israel eng' emetap murot kaataam, ak eng' emotinwek tugul che kiga koonji icheek: ak amutu icheek kogeny kobwa emennywa ne ki agoochi kwanisyekwak." 
Jeremiah16:16 Ogeero, ayooktoi keguur ramik che chaang' che po njireenik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si kobiit koram icheek; ak ye ibata ayookte keguur kiplogotinik che chaang', si kobiit kocheeng'at icheek eng' tulweet age tugul, ak eng' tulweet age tugul ne ming'in, ak eng' kebenonik." 
Jeremiah16:17 Amu ageere emotinwekwak tugul: ma ung'ootiin eng' tainnyu, ama ung'aat tengektonywa si ma keer." 
Jeremiah16:18 Ak ayaaktochini korook yaityennywa ak tengektonywa konyil aeng'; amu ki kong'wanit icheek emennyu eng' muuswegap tuguukwak che samis, ak kigonyiit porotennyu tuguukwak che kiwechei." 
Jeremiah16:19 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kimnateennyu, ak ko irimennyu, ak ole amwechini eng' peetuutap nyalildanyu, pwonjinin pororyosyek kobunu ole poochin ng'wony, ak komwa kole, ma nam kiy kwanisyekyok kobatee lembechek, tangoita ak tuguuk che ma tinyei kelunet." 
Jeremiah16:20 Tos yachingei chiito kanamonik, che ma kamuktaik?" 
Jeremiah16:21 Nooto anyun, ogeero, agoochini konai, agoochini konai eunnyu ak kamugennyu, konyil niito agenge; ak konai icheek kole kainennyu ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah17:1 Ki kisire lelutiktap Judah kalamitap karnet kobooto ng'atibindap koita ne ui; ki kimolji mugulelwekwak ak eng' kimnateet ne po kuinoigap kapkorosusyekwak; 
Jeremiah17:2 kota kobwaati lagokwak, kapkorosusyekwak, ak Aserik che mi ole mi keetiik che tuonen eng' tuloonook parak," 
Jeremiah17:3 ak eng' tulweennyu ne mi kewanin. Achandoi keip tuguuguk che po kamanuut ak konoraiguk tugul, ak komosweguk che torooreen, amu tengekto eng' kiwotosyeguk tugul." 
Jeremiah17:4 Ak ibagaaktoi aginye poroteng'ung' ne ki agoonin; ak agoonin ioot puuniguk eng' emet ne mengen: amu ki olaal maat eng' nereegekyuk, ne lalei koigeny." 
Jeremiah17:5 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Chuboot chii ne imang'u kipkosabei, ak kotiegei kipkosabei, ineendet ne istoegei muguleldanyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah17:6 Amu igeitu sondiit eng' surkwen, ama keerei ye piitu myeeindo; ago menyei komoswek che yamyotiin eng' surkwen, emetap muunyuk ole ma menyei chii." 
Jeremiah17:7 Iberuurot chiito ne imang'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ko ne kamang'unennyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah17:8 Amu igeitu ineendet keetit ne ki kiminji ole neegitee peek, ak kowaktoi tigitikyik eng' ole neegitee aineet, amaiyweisyei ye piitu kiptoret, ago tuonitu sogekyik; ama arageni eng' kenyiitap kemeut, ama metoi kooi logoek." 
Jeremiah17:9 Kaberberin muguleldo kosiir tuguuk tugul, ak ko ya miising': ng'oo ne imuuchi konai?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kasiagindetap muguleldo, atyeme kabwaatutik, si agoochi chii age tugul ko uu ortinwekyik, ak logoegap poisyonikyik." 
Jeremiah17:11 Ko uu taiywet ne igeenyi aarek che ma chechiik, uu nooto ne nyooru mogornatosyek ama eng' iman; petos kota kosabei ineendet, ak koek ineendet eng' kagesunennyi chiito ne perber." 
Jeremiah17:12 Uu kapkorosunnyo ng'echereetap toroornatet, ne ki kinde ole toroor kobooch taunet." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inyee ne ii kamang'unetap Israel, kiyaei kolililan icheek tugul che metoin; kisirchin ng'wony icheek che istoenagei, amu ki kometa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kondametutap peek che saptos." 
Jeremiah17:14 Isooba, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si asap; sarwo, si anyoor saruunet; amu ii kalasunennyu." 
Jeremiah17:15 Keero, mwaiwo icheek koleenjino, “Mi ano ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ingonyo nguno!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Ma achakte anee kot abagaakte asubin aek mestowot; ama amach peetuutap riirek. Ingen inyee kiit ne ki mang'une kutinnyu; kimi taing'ung'. 
Jeremiah17:17 Amat imua; ii ole amwechini eng' peetuutap yaityet. 
Jeremiah17:18 Ingolilanso che usa, ago megoono alilan; ingoaragenso icheek, ago megoono aaragen: ipchi icheek peetuutap yaityet, ak ing'eme icheek ng'emisyet konyil aeng'." 
Jeremiah17:19 Kimwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ui, itonone ormariichetap piik, ole mang'une laitorinigap Judah, ak komandoe, ak eng' ormariichok tugul che po Jerusalem;" 
Jeremiah17:20 ak ileenji icheek, Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek laitorinigap Judah, ak Judah komugul, ak piik tugul che menyei Jerusalem, che obendi oriit obune ormariichochuuto;" 
Jeremiah17:21 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Oriipkei, amoip laut age tugul eng' peetuutap sabato, anan oibu kobun ormariichogap Jerusalem;" 
Jeremiah17:22 anan oip lautik eng' kooriikwok eng' peetuutap sabato, amoyai poisyo age tugul: ago otabaan peetuutap sabato, ko uu ye ki ang'at kwanisyekwok;" 
Jeremiah17:23 ago ma kas, anan koep iit, ago ki iuit kaatwekwak, si ma kas, ak kotaach kaneetisyet."
