Jeremiah17:24 Ak ngot oepcha iit eng' kagiiletapkei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si moibu laut age tugul kobun ormariichogap nganasani eng' peetuutap sabato, ago otabaan peetuutap sabato, amoyai poisyo age tugul eng' peetuunooto;" 
Jeremiah17:25 pwoonei anyun oriit laitorinik ak pounik che tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi, kobunu ormariichogap nganasani, kolong'onu kariisyek ak paraisisyek, icheeget ak pounikwak, piigap Judah, ak piik che menyei Jerusalem: ak kemeny nganasani agoi." 
Jeremiah17:26 Ak kobwa kobunu nganasoogap Judah, ak komoswek che kiyiem Jerusalem, ak che punu emetap Benjamin, ak emet ne soi, ak che punu tuloonook, ak che punu murot tai, koibu kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak tiseiywek, ak kagoochinoigap peek che ng'ootiin, ak tuguuk che nyamdut, ak koibu korosegap kongoi, kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah17:27 Ago ngot ko mogasa iit otabaan peetuutap sabato, amoip laut age tugul ak obe oriit obun ormariichogap Jerusalem eng' peetuutap sabato; alaal anyun maat eng' ormariichokyik, si kobeel kooriigap laitoryat che po Jerusalem, ama kimisi." 
Jeremiah18:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji," 
Jeremiah18:2 ng'eet, choortegei agoi kootap cheptereniot, si agoonin igas ng'aleekyuk eng' olooto." 
Jeremiah18:3 Achoortegei anyun kootap cheptereniot, ak ogeero, kiyaei poisyennyi eng' tirook." 
Jeremiah18:4 Ak kingo ng'emak tereet ne kiga kiyae meneet, eng' eutap cheptereniot, koyae kogeny menonooto tereet age, ko uu ye kigeerei cheptereniondonooto kole myee." 
Jeremiah18:5 Ki nyoonjo anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Jeremiah18:6 Ee kootap Israel, tos ma muuchi ayaiywok ko uu ye kayai chepterenindoniito? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ogeero, ko uu ye mi meneet eutap cheptereniot, omi ak okweek eunnyu, ee kootap Israel." 
Jeremiah18:7 Eng' peetuut ne amwae agobo poror age tugul, ak agobo pounateet age tugul, ale atut, ak abut ak ang'em;" 
Jeremiah18:8 ngot kosik eng' yaityennywa pororyonooto kaamwa, awale kabwaatutukyuk eng' yaityet ne kitayachini icheek." 
Jeremiah18:9 Ak eng' peetuut ne amwae agobo poror age tugul, ak agobo pounateet age tugul, ale ateech ak amin pororyonooto;" 
Jeremiah18:10 ngot koyai yaityet eng' tainnyu, ama kas iit kutinnyu, awale anyun kabwaatutikyuk eng' myeeindo ne ki kamwa ale atorete icheek." 
Jeremiah18:11 Ara anyun, ui ng'alaalji piigap Judah, ak piik che menyei Jerusalem, ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, achobe yaityet agobo okweek ak achobe kiit ne aitook: ingoweigei age tugul eng' okweek, kometo ooreennyi ne ya, ak olitiit ortinwekwok ak poisyonikwok." 
Jeremiah18:12 Ago mwaei kole, ma tilei kiy kamang'unet: amu kibendote maguutikyok, ak koyai chii tugul eng' acheek ko uu uuindap muguleldanyi ne ya." 
Jeremiah18:13 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Oteebate pororyosyek, oleenji, ng'oo ne ki kogasei ng'aleek che uu chu; ki yai pergeiyatap Israel kiit ne samis miising'." 
Jeremiah18:14 Tos petei teluji ne po Lebanon eng' rwandetap kewanin? Anan tos teng'dos peek che kaitit che rootune ole loo? 
Jeremiah18:15 Amu kigoutyeno piikyuk, ki kobeelji nyamdutik tuguuk che ma tilei kiy; ak ki konach icheek eng' ortinwekwak, eng' ortinwek che po keny, si kobunoot ortinwek che mi taban, eng' ooreet ne ma ki yai;" 
Jeremiah18:16 si koyai emennywa koek kwong'eet, ak koek ne kireenyei kotugul; kwong'ee age tugul ne siirtoi eng' yooto, ak kolelechi metinnyi." 
Jeremiah18:17 Aseeri icheek eng' taitap puunyoot ko uu ye iseerisyei usoonetap kong'asiis; ageere pataikwak, ma keere togoochikwak, eng' peetuutap nyalildanywa." 
Jeremiah18:18 Ki mwa anyun kole, obwa kechop kiit ne kiitoi Jeremiah; amu ma petei ng'atuutyet eng' tisiindet, ama petei kirwooget eng' chiito ne utaat, ama petei ng'olyoot eng' maotyot. Obwa, kebire ng'elyepta, amat ongeepchi iit agot ng'olyoot agenge eng' ng'aleekyik." 
Jeremiah18:19 Kasa, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak iepchi iit riirekyuk." 
Jeremiah18:20 Tos kiyaaktoi yaityet eng' kiit ne myee? Amu kogobalji keriinget saboondanyu. Ibwaat ole ki atononde eng' taing'ung' ak ang'alaal che myach agobo icheek, si kobiit aisto nereegeguk che koroomen eng' icheek." 
Jeremiah18:21 Igoite anyun lagokwak, kobar rubeet, ak igoite icheek kobar rotwetap chok; ak ingobetyi lagok osotikwak, ak koek mosoogik; ak ingobar meet murenikwak, ak ingobar rotwetap chok neranikwak eng' lugeet." 
Jeremiah18:22 Ingogasak riirek eng' kooriikwak, ye ichee icheek imutyine lugeet: amu ki kobal keriinget kole konamena, ak kouny mestonok kole konam keelyekyuk." 
Jeremiah18:23 Ago, ingen inyee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kirwoogennywa ne irwoochi kole kobara; menyochi kaat tengektonywa, amebukte chalwoktanywa eng' taing'ung': ago ingeriich eng' taing'ung'; yachi ko uu nooto eng' peetuutap nereegeguk." 
Jeremiah19:1 Ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ui ak ial keregutap cheptereniot, ak imut alak eng' poisyek, ak alak eng' poisyegap tisiik;" 
Jeremiah19:2 ak obe agoi atebweetap weeriitap Hinom, ne miitei ye neegitee ole kibunei eng' ormariichetap rokyonik, ak imwaite eng' yooto ng'aleek che ta amwaun." 
Jeremiah19:3 Mwaa ile: Ogas okweek ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee laitorinigap Judah, ak piik che omenye Jerusalem; mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, ogeero, aipchini yaityet olito, ne ngo kas chii age tugul, kotildilyo itiikyik." 
Jeremiah19:4 Amu ki kometa icheek, ki koyai yuto koek ole ma kinaei, ak ki kobeelji eng' yuto, nyamdutik, kanamonik che teer, che ki ma kongen, icheeget ak kwanisyekwak ak laitorinigap Judah; ak kigonyiit olito korotiigap che ma tinyei tengek;" 
Jeremiah19:5 ak ki koteekyi Baal komoswek che torooreen, si kobeel weeriikwak, koek kagoochinoik che kibeelei, kogoochin Baal; kiit ne ki ma ang'at, anan amwa, anan konyoonjo met:" 
Jeremiah19:6 keero, pwoonei anyun peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ma keguure olito Topet, anan keguure Atebweetap weeriitap Hinom, ago kiguure Atebweetap Parisyet." 
Jeremiah19:7 Ak ayai koek puch kirwoogutigap Judah ak Jerusalem eng' olito; ak agoochini kebare rotwetap chok eng' taitap puunikwak, ak eng' eunegap icheeget che cheeng'ei saboonwekwak: ak agoite muuswekwak koek amitwogigap toriitik che po parak, ak che po tyong'igap ng'wony." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ak ayai nganasani koek kwong'eet ak ne kireenyei; kwong'ei age tugul ne siirtoi eng' yooto ak koreeny amu korotwek tugul che po olooto. 
Jeremiah19:9 Ak agoochi icheek koam panyeegap weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak, ak koam age tugul eng' icheek panyeegap chorwennyi, eng' yiemetap kabookyinet ak eng' pichiindo, ne inyaliile puunikwak icheek, ak che cheeng'ei saboonwekwak." 
Jeremiah19:10 Yeityo itui keregut eng' taitap piik che obendi tugul," 
Jeremiah19:11 ak ileenji icheek, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Atue ko uu nooto pichu ak nganasani, ko uu ye tuei chiito tereetap cheptereniot, ne ma kimuuchi keyai komyeeit kogeny: ak ketupchi icheek Topet, kot koma komi ole ketupchin." 
Jeremiah19:12 Ayachini ko uu nooto olito, kobooto piik che menyei olito, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kiyaei koigei Topet:" 
Jeremiah19:13 ak kogergeit kooriigap Jerusalem, ak kooriigap laitorinigap Judah, che ki king'wanit, ak komostap Topet, kooriik tuguuk che kibeelee icheek paragunnywa nyamdutik kobeeljine tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet, ak ki koroong'ji kagoochinoik che kieei, kanamonik che teer." 
Jeremiah19:14 Ki nyo anyun Jeremiah eng' Topet, ole kiga koyooktoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwo komaoten; ak ki tonon eng' seremutap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koleenji piik tugul:" 
Jeremiah19:15 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole, ogeero, aipchini nganasani ak nganasookyik tugul yaityet tugul ne koamwa agobo nganasaniito; amu ko iuit katwekwak, si ma kas ng'aleekyuk." 
Jeremiah20:1 Ki kas anyun Pasur weeriitap Imer tisiindet, ne ki pounindet ne oo eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, komaoteni Jeremiah agobo tuguuchuuto." 
Jeremiah20:2 Ki pir anyun Pasur maotyot Jeremiah, ak koratyi ineendet keetiik keelyekyik, eng' ormariichet ne po meto ne po Benjamin, ne ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah20:3 Ak ki ityaach Pasur Jeremiah komong' eng' keetichooto eng' peetuut ne po aeng'. Ki leenji anyun Jeremiah ineendet, Ma kuure Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kaineng'ung' Pasur, ago kaguurenen Mogor-misabip." 
Jeremiah20:4 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, keero, ayain iegu kamuiset ne imuege, ak ne imue choronoguk tugul: ak kobar icheek puunikwak eng' rotwetap chok, ak igeer nooto: ak agoite Judah tugul koba eutap laitoryatap Babilon, ak koluul icheek koba Babilon, ak kobare rotwetap chok." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ak agoite kogeny mogornatosyek tugul che po nganasani, ak kelunaikyik tugul, ak tuguukyik tugul che po kamanuutyet, ee konoraik tugul che po laitorinigap Judah, koba eunegap puunikwak, che luulei tuguuchooto, ak konam, ak koip koba Babilon." 
Jeremiah20:6 Ak inyee Pasur, keluulok kobooto piik tugul che menyei koong'ung'; ak iit Babilon, ak imechi olooto, ak ketupchin olooto, inyee ak choronoguk tugul, che ki imaotenji lembech." 
Jeremiah20:7 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki iberbera, ak ki aberberage: ii kiim isiira, ak ki iterteerisye: kaaegu ne kirorechin peetuut komugul, churochura age tugul." 
Jeremiah20:8 Amu kotugul ye ang'alaali, awaache; awaache ale, Koroomnateet ak luuleet: amu kagiyai ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koek chotisyet eng' anee, ak aegu ne kirorechin eng' peetuut komugul." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ak ngot amwa ale, Ma mwaei kiy agobo ineendet, anan ang'alaal eng' kainennyi, kobiit anyun eng' muguleldanyu ko uu maat ne lalei eng' kawekyuk, ak ang'et eng' muitaet, ak ma muuchi asiis." 
Jeremiah20:10 Amu koagas kateweerisyetap che chaang', kamuiset eng' komosta age tugul. Mwaei choronokyuk tugul che achame, che machei kotaama, kole, omwaite, si kemwaite ineendet; tamangap kigaigai, si kiterteer ineendet ak kiyaaktochinegei mugetuut." 
Jeremiah20:11 Ago mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto ko uu ineendet ne kiim ak komuisei: kinachi anyun usiikyuk, ama iterteerisyei: ililandos kot, amu ma yai eng' ng'omnateet, ak ma koi kiutye teweernatennywa ne po koigeny." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ago, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ne ityeme chii ne po iman, ne igeere kabwaatutik ak muguleldo, koono ageer ye iyaakyini mugetuut icheek; amu ki ang'ang'un ng'olyoondennyu." 
Jeremiah20:13 Otyenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, olasu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu kigosar saboondap ne ma tinyei kiy eng' eunegap yaigap yaityet." 
Jeremiah20:14 Ingochubok peetuut ne ki kisigena: amat kiberuur peetuut ne kisigena kamennyu. 
Jeremiah20:15 Ingochubok chiito ne ki ipchin logoiywek che myach kwandanyu, koleenjin, Kagesigun weeriit; ne ki ibaibai ineendet kot." 
Jeremiah20:16 Ak ingoigei chiichooto nganasook che ki kogabui Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama sik: ak ingogas riirek karon, ak waagaat peet kween;" 
Jeremiah20:17 amu ma para ami moo; si koek kamennyu kererinnyu, ak koeet moennyi kotugul." 
Jeremiah20:18 Amu nee anyun si among' eng' moo, si ageer pirtoetapkei ak arageneet, kot kogeskei peetuusyekyuk eng' kalilanet?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ki iyooktoi ineendet Laitoryat Zedekiah kwo kap Pasur weeriitap Malkija, ak Sepania weeriitap Maaseia tisiindet, koleenji," 
Jeremiah21:2 asoomin ale, teebwech eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ibookyinech Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon: tamangap koyaiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu poisyonikyik tugul che kikwong'ee, si kobiit kwo koistoeneigei." 
Jeremiah21:3 Ki mwachi anyun Jeremiah koleenji, omwachi Zedekiah ko uu ni oleenji:" 
Jeremiah21:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, ogeero, aweektoi kariigap lugeet che miitei eunekwok, che obaregei ak laitoryatap Babilon, ak Kaldeik che yiemok, eng' saang'utap irimoik, ak ayumji icheek kwenutap nganasani." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ak kebaregei ak okweek eng' euut ne chuulaat, euut ne kiim, eng' nereegek, ak eng' nereegek che ng'woneen, ak eng' nereegek che eecheen." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ak abir piik che menyei nganasani, chii ak tyony: pegu eng' koroito ne oo." 
Jeremiah21:7 Ak ye ibata, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asaru Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah, ak otwogikyik, ak piik, piik che ng'etu eng' nganasaniito, asaru eng' koroito, ak eng' rotwetap chok, ak eng' rubeet, agoite koba eutap Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, ak koba eunegap puunikwak, ak eunegap icheeget che cheeng'ei saboonwekwak: ak kobar icheek eng' rotwetap chok; ma pagaaktoi, ama riiree, ama rireegei." 
Jeremiah21:8 Ak ileenji pichu, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, kande taing'wong' ooreetap saboondo ak ooreetap meet." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ineendet ne tebee nganasani, kebarei eng' rotwetap chok ak eng' rubeet, ak eng' koroito: ago sabei ineendet ne mandoi, ak komut ineendet Kaldeik che yiemok, ak koek sabeennyi ne kiluulei." 
Jeremiah21:10 Amu kaatokyi togeennyu nganasani aipchi yaityet, ma agobo myeeindo, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kindoi eutap laitoryatap Babilon si kobeel." 
Jeremiah21:11 Ak okweek kootap laitoryatap Judah, ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah21:12 Ee kootap Daudi, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, oyai kirwooget karon, osaru ne ki kiluul komong' eng' eutap usiindet, si ma mong' nereegekyuk che koroomen ko uu maat, ak kolal kot koma mi ne imuuchi komis, amu yaityetap poisyonikwok." 
Jeremiah21:13 Keero, aboryenen, ee inyee ne imenye atebweet, ak ne menyei rwandet ne po warenget, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; okweek che omwae ole, Ng'oo ne choorugei kebarge? Anan ng'oo ne nyoonei ole ki menye?" 
Jeremiah21:14 Ak abirok ko uu logoegap poisyonikwok, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak anaam maat eng' osnennyi, ak kobeel tugul che miitei komoswekyik." 
Jeremiah22:1 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Choorchigei kootap laitoryatap Judah, ak imwa eng' olooto ng'olyoondoni," 
Jeremiah22:2 ile, Kas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee laitoryatap Judah, ne itebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi, inyee, ak otwogiguk, ak piiguk che pendi oriit kobunei ormariichochu." 
Jeremiah22:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Oyai okweek kirwooget ak imanda, ak osaru ne ki kiluul komong' eng' eutap usiindet: amat oyai ne ya, anan koroomnateet, oyachi toondet, anan ne ma tinyei sigiik, anan mosoget, amotumde korotiik che ma tinyei tengek, eng' olito." 
Jeremiah22:4 Amu ngot oyai iman kiito, kobendi oriit anyun kobunei ormariichogap kooi, laitorinik che tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi, kolaanyei kariisyek, ak paraisisyek, ineendet ak otwogikyik, ak piikyik." 
Jeremiah22:5 Ago ngot ko mogas iit ng'aleechuuto, ayosyechinigei anyun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ale, egu kooi karaatya." 
Jeremiah22:6 Amu mwaei ko uu ni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo kootap laitoryat ne po Judah kole, ii Gilead eng' anee, ak ko ii metitap Lebanon; ago ayain iman iegu surkwen, ak nganasook che ma ki menyei." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ak achop ng'emiik agobo inyee, chii tugul ak kariikyik: ak koluul icheek taragoniguk che korooron ak kowiirchi ma." 
Jeremiah22:8 Ak kosiirtoe pororyosyek che chaang' nganasani, ak koleenji chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi, Amu nee si koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni nganasani oo?" 
Jeremiah22:9 Kowol anyun kole, amu kimeto kayomisetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ak kolas kanamonik che teer, ak koot." 
Jeremiah22:10 Amoriirchi ne ki kome, anan ote agobo ineendet: ago orir miising' agobo ineendet ne mandoi; amu ma koweeksei ineendet kogeny, anan kogeer emennyi ne ki kisikyin." 
Jeremiah22:11 Amu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Shallum weeriitap Josiah laitoryatap Judah, ne ki laitoran kogeer Josiah kwandanyi, ne kimanda eng' olito, kole ma koweeksei kogeny;" 
Jeremiah22:12 ago mechin ole ki kiluulji, ak ma kogeerei emoni agoi." 
Jeremiah22:13 Pwo eng' ineendet ne teechei koonnyi koma eng' imanda, ne teechei kooriikyik che po oriit eng' sastaet; ne poisyee chiitap kokwennyi ama igoochin melekto, ama igoochin kiit ne yamegei ak poisyennyi;" 
Jeremiah22:14 ne mwaei kole, ateekyinige koot ne oo ak kooriik che paroen che po oriit, ak kondechigei tirisyok; ak ki kitetee taragonik, ak kesalee saleiywek che piriireen." 
Jeremiah22:15 Tos ilaitoran, amu igiiligei ibelisye eng' taragonik? Tos ki ma amis kwandang'ung' ak koeeiso, ak koyai kirwooget ak iman? Kimyeeit anyun eng' ineendet." 
Jeremiah22:16 Ki irwooksechi ne panan ak ne ma tinyei kiy; ki myeiit anyun. Tos ki ma konaena niito? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Jeremiah22:17 Ago matokyingei konyeguk ak muguleldang'ung' kiy age kobatee tuguugap ng'wen, ak tumdaetap korotiik che ma tinyei tengek, ak sastaet, ak koroomnateet, koyai chooto." 
Jeremiah22:18 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah, laitoryatap Judah, kole: Ma iteei chii agobo ineendet kole, pwo eng' weeriit ne kitupche anan pwo eng' chepto ne kitupche! Ma iteei chii agobo ineendet kole, “Pwo Kiptaiyat anan pwo eng' etunatennyi!”" 
Jeremiah22:19 Kitubei ko uu ye kitubei sigiryet, kichuuti ak kewiirta kosiir ormariichogap Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah22:20 Togoste Lebanon, ak iriir; ak iwaach eng' Bashan: ak iriir eng' Abarim; amu kagobar chamaniguk tugul." 
Jeremiah22:21 Ki ang'alaalun eng' peetuusyegap poroteng'ung'; ago ki imwa ile, “Ma kase.” Ki koek piteeng'ung' niito kobooch ming'inateng'ung', ile, megase iit kutinnyu." 
Jeremiah22:22 Paei usoonet mestoweguk tugul, ak keluul chamaniguk: ililan iman anyun ak itoptoben agobo yaityeng'ung' tugul." 
Jeremiah22:23 Ee inyee ne imenye Lebanon, ne iteeche kesweng'ung' eng' taragonik, iegu chii ne kiriirchin miising' ye kabwonjin ng'waninwek, ng'wanindo ne uu ne po kwondo ne machei kosigiis!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Ko uu ye asabe, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agot nganda ko waet ne po ng'ookset eng' eunnyu ne po tai Konia weeriitap Jehoiakim laitoryatap Judah, ang'usin ui tugul eng' olooto;" 
Jeremiah22:25 ak andein eunegap icheeget che cheeng'ei saboondang'ung', ak eunegap icheek che iywei, eutap Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, ak eutap Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah22:26 Ak atimden imande, kobooto kamenng'ung' ne kisichin, obe emet age, ne ki ma kesikyinok; ak obekyi olooto." 
Jeremiah22:27 Ago ma weekyingei emet ne machei saboonwekwak. 
Jeremiah22:28 Tos chiichito Konia ne tereet ne kisasei ne ki koyie? Tos ineendet ko tereet ne ma kiboiboitune? Amu nee anyun si ketimda icheeget, ineendet ak iyotennyi, ak king'eetoochi emet ne ma ingen?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Ee emoni, emoni, emoni, kas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah22:30 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, osir chiichi ole ma tinyei lakwa, chiito ne maborei eng' peetuusyekyik: amu maborei chii ne po iyotennyi, ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi, ak koboi kogeny eng' Judah." 
Jeremiah23:1 Pwo eng' mestoweek che ng'emei ak koyestoi keechiiregap akweennyu! Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Jeremiah23:2 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni, agobo mestoweek che paei piikyuk, kole, ki oiyeste akweennyu, ak oon, ama obe ogeer; ogeero, aitwok pireet ne po yaityetap poisyonikwok, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ak ayum che ki ng'et che po akweennyu komong' eng' emotinwek tugul ole kigaonji, ak amutu kogeny kobwa piusyekwak; ak koiiyo kotesagis." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ak ande mestoweek che iyagi: ama koiyweisyei kogeny, anan koaragenso, ama piitu chii ne rarchin kiy, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah23:5 Ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ang'eetyini Daudi Temet ne po iman, ak kolaitoran ko laitoryat, ak kobois eng' ng'omnateet, ak koyai kirwooget ak imanda eng' emet." 
Jeremiah23:6 Kisaru Judah eng' peetuusyekyik, ak komeng'iis Israel eng' chametapkei: ak ni kainennyi ne kemwaitoe, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko imandanyo." 
Jeremiah23:7 Nooto anyun, ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ma komwaei icheek kole, ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki imut piigap Israel komong' eng' emetap Misiri." 
Jeremiah23:8 Ago, mwaei kole, ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki imut iyoteetap kootap Israel komong' eng' emet ne po murot kaataam, ak eng' emotinwek tugul ole kigaonji icheek, ak komeny emennywa." 
Jeremiah23:9 Kagomea mugulel agobo maotik, irigisistos kawekyuk; auu chii ne kabogit, ak auu chii ne kagoterteer divaik; amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak amu ng'aleekyik che tiliileen." 
Jeremiah23:10 Amu nyiitaat emet piik che yaei ibeetapkei; amu riirei emet amu kayasyoet; ki koyaam ole agete akwotisyek eng' surkwen; ya pandanywa, ak ma po iman kimnateennywa." 
Jeremiah23:11 Amu murwoon maotyot ak tisiindet; ee, ki anyoorchi koonnyu yaityennywa, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah23:12 Egu anyun ooreenywa komoswek che chaboen eng' mesundeito: ki oonei kot kobutyo: amu aipchini yaityet, eng' kenyiit ne aityini pirennywa, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah23:13 Ak ki ageer perberyo eng' maotigap Samaria; ki maotene Baal, ak kogoochi piikyuk Israel kolel." 
Jeremiah23:14 Ki ageerchi maotigap Jerusalem ak icheek kiit ne samis miising'; yaei ibeetapkei, ak kobendote lembechek, ak kogimit eunegap yaigap yaityet, kot koma mi chii ne weeksei eng' yaityennyi: kaigei icheek tugul Sodom eng' anee, ak kaigei che menyei yooto, Gomorah." 
Jeremiah23:15 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek agobo maotik kole: Ogeero, abae icheek ng'wonet, ak agoochi peek koe: amu ki koyom emet tugul murwoonindap maotigap Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah23:16 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, amoepchi iit ng'aleegap maotik che maotenwok; ineetook tangoita: mwaei ng'ang'utyet ne punu mugulelwekwak, ama ne mang'une kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah23:17 Mwachin icheek kotugul piik che sasa, koleenjin, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, onyooru kaalyeet; ak komwachi chii age tugul ne wendote uuindap muguleldanyi, koleenjin, Manyonjinin yaityet age tugul." 
Jeremiah23:18 Amu ng'oo ne ki kotonon eng' kapkirwoogetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kot komuuch koguiyo ak kogas ng'olyoondennyi? Ng'oo ne ki epchi iit ng'olyoondennyu, ak kogas?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Ogeero, kagomong' kipchurchuryetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nooto nereegekyik che koroomen, ee, kipchurchuryet ne usei kot: kwerei metowegap kiptengeginik." 
Jeremiah23:20 Ma weeksei nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi koyai kogees, agoi koyai magutigap muguleldanyi kosulda: oguitosi ng'olyoondoniito komyee eng' peetuusyek che po let." 
Jeremiah23:21 Ki ma ayookte maotichuuto, ago ki rwai: ki ma ang'alaalji, ago ki maotenso." 
Jeremiah23:22 Ago nda kiga tononso eng' kapkirwoogennyu, ta ki igoochin piikyuk kogas ng'aleekyuk, ak ta kiweechi pichooto koweek eng' ooreenywa ne ya, ak eng' yaityetap poisyonikwak." 
Jeremiah23:23 Tos aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi ye neegit kityo, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ma aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi ole loo?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Tos imuuchi chii kounygei eng' komoswek che ung'ootiin, kot koma keer ineendet? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos ma anyii kipsengwet ak ng'wony? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah23:25 Ki agas kiit ne ki mwa maotik, che maoteni lembechek eng' kainennyu kole, koarwotyi, koarwotyi." 
Jeremiah23:26 Tebee kot kotyanit niito mugulelwegap maotik che maoteni lembechek, maotigap kaberberisyetap mugulelwekwak," 
Jeremiah23:27 che leen kogoochi piikyuk koutye kainennyu eng' karwotitaosyekwak che mwachin chii tugul chiitap kokwennyi, ko uu ye kiutye kwanisyekwak kainennyu amu Baal?" 
Jeremiah23:28 Ingomwa maotyot karwotitoet ne koirwotyi; ak ineendet ne tinyei ng'olyoondennyu komwa eng' imanda. Ting'egei nee meteteek ak nganuuk? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Jeremiah23:29 Tos ma uu ng'olyoondennyu maat? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ma uu kiriswet ne tonei rwandet? 
Jeremiah23:30 Nooto anyun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, agirindoi maotik, che kichor chii age tugul ng'aleekyuk kochore chiitap kokwennyi." 
Jeremiah23:31 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, agirindoi maotik, che poisyee ng'elyebwekwak, koleen, Kole ineendet." 
Jeremiah23:32 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, agirindoi icheek che maoteni karwotitaosyegap lembech, komwaita, ak kogoochi piikyuk kolel amu lembechekwak, ak eng' kachaunennywa pogei ne po puch: ago ma ayookte, anan ang'at icheek; ama toreti pichu agot kitigin, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah23:33 Ye teebenen pichu, anan ko maotyot, anan ko tisiindet, koleenjin, “Nee mileetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?” Imwachi anyun ileenji, “Okweek mileet! Atimdok,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah23:34 Ak abire maotyot, ak tisiindet, ak piik, che mwaei kole, “Mileetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor,” abire chiichooto ak koonnyi." 
Jeremiah23:35 Omwachi anyun okweek, chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi, ak komwachi chii age tugul ng'eetap kamet, koleenji, kawol nee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak kamwa nee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?" 
Jeremiah23:36 Ama omwae mileetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny: amu egu ng'olyootap chii age tugul lautyennyi; amu ki omaas ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne sabei, che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah23:37 Mwachi maotyot ko uu ni ileenji, “Tos kawolun nee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak kamwa nee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?”" 
Jeremiah23:38 Ago ngot omwa ole, “Nyigiisindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor;” mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu niito kole: “Amu omwae ng'olyoondoni,” ole, mileetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki ayoogu kemwaiwok keele, Amat ole, Mileetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor;" 
Jeremiah23:39 nooto anyun, ogeero, autyenok agoi, ak atimdok, kobooto nganaseet ne ki agoonok ak kwanisyekwok, obe eng' tainnyu:" 
Jeremiah23:40 ak aibwok chotisyet ne po agoi, ak kalilanet ne po kotugul, ne ma kiutye." 
Jeremiah24:1 Ki iboorwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kitongok aeng' che po logoegap mogoonik che ki kinde taitap Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kingo kagoluul Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, Jekoniah weeriitap Jehoiakim, laitoryatap Judah, kobooto pounigap Judah, kobooto musogik ak kitang'ik, kobunu Jerusalem, koba Babilon." 
Jeremiah24:2 Ki mi kitonget age logoegap mogoonik che korooron miising', ko uu tongoanigap mogoonik: ak kimi kitonget age logoek che yaacheen miising' che po mogoonik, che ki ma kimuuchi keam, kiyaachen miising'." 
Jeremiah24:3 Yeityo koleenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Igeere nee, Jeremiah? Ak ki ale, Logoegap mogoonik; logoek che myachen, che korooron miising', ak che yaacheen, ko yaacheen miising', che ma kimuuchi keam, yaacheen kot." 
Jeremiah24:4 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Jeremiah24:5 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Aitii anyun piik che ki kiluul che po Judah, kogergeit ak logoechu korooron po mogoonik, che ki ayookte koba eng' olito agoi emetap Kaldeik, si konyoor myeeindo." 
Jeremiah24:6 Amu ageere icheek si kotep eng' myeeindo, ak amutu kogeny kobwa emoni: ak ateech icheek, ak ma abute; amiine, ama atutu." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ak agoochi icheek muguleldo ne naena, kole, aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak koek piikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa: amu weekyinagei eng' mugulelwekwak tugul." 
Jeremiah24:8 Ak ko uu kiit ne uu logoechu yaacheen po mogoonik, che ma kimuuchi keam, amu yaacheen miising'; mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iman kole, ko uu nooto agoitoi Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah, ak pounikyik, ak che ng'etu che po Jerusalem, che ng'etu eng' emoni, ak icheek che menyei emetap Misiri:" 
Jeremiah24:9 agoitoi icheek koek che ki wiirchin komosi ak komosi eng' pounatosyek tugul che po ng'wony si konyoor taiyet; koek teweernateet, ak kalewenet, chotisyet ak sasisyet, eng' komoswek tugul ole aoonjini icheek." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ak ayookyi icheek rotwetap chok, rubeet, ak koroito, agoi kogeskei eng' emet ne ki agoochi icheek ak kwanisyekwak." 
Jeremiah25:1 Ki nyoonji ng'olyoot Jeremiah agobo piik tugul che po Judah eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan ne po Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah, laitoryatap Judah; kenyiit ne po tai nooto ne po Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon;" 
Jeremiah25:2 ne ki mwachi maotyot Jeremiah piik tugul che po Judah, kobooto piik tugul che menyei Jerusalem, koleenji:" 
Jeremiah25:3 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooch kenyiitap taman ak somok ne po Josiah weeriitap Ammon, laitoryatap Judah, agoi ra, kenyisyechu tiptem ak somok, ak ki amwaiwok, ang'eete karon miising' ak ang'alaalwok; ago ma ogas." 
Jeremiah25:4 Ak ki koyokwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor otwogikyik tugul che maotik, kong'eetei karon miising' ak koyogu icheek; ago ma ogas, anan oep iit, si kobiit ogas;" 
Jeremiah25:5 komwaei kole, ingoweek age tugul eng' okweek, kometo ooreennyi ne ya, ak eng' yaityetap poisyonikwok, ak omeny emet ne ki koonok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto kwanisyekwok, kobooch keny agoi koigeny;" 
Jeremiah25:6 amosubote kamuktaik che teer, oot ak olasu icheek, amotacha eng' poisyonigap eunekwok; si ma yaiywok ne ya." 
Jeremiah25:7 Ago ki ma ogasa kora, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; si kobiit otacha eng' poisyonigap eunekwok, si oipchinegei ng'wanindo." 
Jeremiah25:8 Kamwa anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Amu ma ogas ng'aleekyuk," 
Jeremiah25:9 ogeero, ayooktoi kenam piigap ortinwek tugul che po murot kaataam, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooto Nebukadresar, laitoryatap Babilon, otwogindennyu, ak amutu icheek kobookyi emoni, ak piik che menyei olito, ak pororyosyechu tugul che mi komoswechuuto; ak ang'em icheek, ageesu, ak ayai koek kwong'eet, ak ne kireenyei, ak karotwek peetuusyek tugul." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ak aistoe icheek anyun tuugeetap poiboiyet, ak ne po kaagaasetapkei, ne po sandet ak ne po murereet, kobooto cheetap koitap pai, ak lapkeiyetap tait." 
Jeremiah25:11 Ak koek karaatya emoni komugul, ak kwong'eet; ak koot pororyosyechu laitoryatap Babilon kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisap." 
Jeremiah25:12 Ak ye kagobata kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisabu, abir anyun laitoryatap Babilon, ak pororyonooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu yaityennywa, ak emetap Kaldeik; ak ayai koek karaatya agoi." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ak aipchi emonooto ng'aleekyuk tugul che ki amwa agobo olooto, tuguuk tugul che ki kisirchi bukuini, che ki komaoten Jeremiah agobo pororyosyek tugul." 
Jeremiah25:14 Amu yaei pororyosyek che chaang' ak laitorinik che eecheen icheek koek otwogikwak, koot icheek: ak ayaakyi icheek ko uu poisyonikwak, ko uu poisyonigap eunekwak." 
Jeremiah25:15 Amu kamwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole: Nam eng' eunnyu kigombetap divaik che po nereegechu ng'oomen, si igoochi pororyosyechu tugul che ayooktochini koe." 
Jeremiah25:16 Ak koeei, ak koterteeryot, koam iywek, amu rotwetap chok ne ayooktochini icheek." 
Jeremiah25:17 Ki anam anyun kigombet eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak agoochi pororyosyek tugul, che kiga koyooktocha Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koe:" 
Jeremiah25:18 chooto ko Jerusalem, ak nganasoogap Judah, ak laitorinikyik, ak pounikyik, si koyai icheek koek karaatya, kwong'eet, ne kireenyei, ak ne kisasei; ko uu eng' peetuuni;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri, ak otwogikyik, pounikyik, ak piikyik tugul;" 
Jeremiah25:20 kobooto piik tugul che kiburuchkei, ak laitorinik tugul che po emetap Us, laitorinik tugul che po emetap Philistiik, ak Askelon, Gaza, Ekron, ak che ki ng'et che po Ashdod;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom, Moab, ak lagogap Ammon;" 
Jeremiah25:22 ak laitorinik tugul che po Tyro, ak laitorinik tugul che po Sidon, ak laitorinik che po ngeguut ne mi nyanjet pitoniin;" 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan, Tema, ak Bus, ak icheek tugul che pioregei;" 
Jeremiah25:24 ak laitorinik tugul che po Arabia, ak laitorinik tugul che po piik che kiburuchkei che menyei surkwen;" 
Jeremiah25:25 ak laitorinik tugul che po Shimri, ak laitorinik tugul che po Elam, ak laitorinik tugul che po Medik;" 
Jeremiah25:26 ak laitorinik tugul che po murot kaataam, che looen ak che neegit, age tugul; ak pounatosyek tugul che po ng'wony, che mi ng'wony: ak eei laitoryatap Sesak ye kagoee icheek." 
Jeremiah25:27 Ak ileenji icheek, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Oee ak obogitye, ak ong'ung'u, ak obutye, ama ong'eetosi kogeny, amu rotwetap chok ne ayoogu konyo kwenung'wong'." 
Jeremiah25:28 Ak ngot koeesyo konam kigombet eng' eung'ung', ak koe, ileenji anyun, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Kanyool oee." 
Jeremiah25:29 Amu, ogeero, atau ayae yaityet eng' nganaseet ne kimwaitoe kainennyu, ko tos otebi ama kibirok iman? Mochilile pireet: amu aguurchini rotwetap chok piik tugul che menyei ng'wony, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Jeremiah25:30 Maotenji anyun eng' ng'aleechu tugul, ileenji, Pooriseni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' parak, ak kotwegu eng' meng'ootennyi ne tiliil; porisenjin miising' akweennyi; waachei ko uu che tyechei sabibuk, kowaakyi piik tugul che menyei ng'wony." 
Jeremiah25:31 Itei polateet ole poochin ng'wony; amu poortos Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak pororyosyek, irwooksechin `ineendet piik tugul; ak igoitoi kiptengeginik kebar eng' rotwetap chok, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah25:32 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, ogeero, Wendi yaityet kobunei pororyet age agoi pororyet age, ak king'eet kipchurchuryet ne oo eng' ole poochin ng'wony." 
Jeremiah25:33 Ak konyi emet eng' peetuunooto piik che parei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobooch tabanda age ne po ng'wony agoi tabanda age: ma mi chii ne iteei agobo icheek, ama kiyumi, ama kitubei; egu ng'atateek eng' emet." 
Jeremiah25:34 Oteiye, okweek mestoweek, ak oriirye; omildaegei oreek, okweek che oo eecheen eng' akweet; amu kagoit peetuusyek che ki parenok, ak atonatonak, ak obutye ko uu tereet ne ki chamei." 
Jeremiah25:35 Ama piitu ole mwechin mestoweek, anan ole chililjin che eecheen che po akweet." 
Jeremiah25:36 Kutitap riiregap mestoweek, ak kateetap che eecheen che po akweet! Amu ng'emei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole agete." 
Jeremiah25:37 Ak kosiisyo piusyek che po kaalyeet amu nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Jeremiah25:38 Ki kometo ole ung'egei, ko uu ng'etundo: amu ki koek emennywa ne kikwong'ee amu koroomnatetap rotwetap chok ne usiisyei, ak amu nereegekyik che koroomen." 
Jeremiah26:1 Ki pun ng'olyondoni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taunetap laitornatetap Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah, laitoryatap Judah, kole," 
Jeremiah26:2 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tonon eng' seremutap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ing'alaalji nganasook tugul che po Judah, che cham kobwanei kolasu eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, mwachi ng'aleek tugul che ang'atiin; imwachi; ametuuch ng'olyoo." 
Jeremiah26:3 Abeere imuuchi kogas, ak koweek chii age tugul eng' ooreennyi ne ya; si kobiit awal kabwaatutikyuk eng' yaityet ne kiga achop ale ayachini icheek amu yaityetap poisyonikwak." 
Jeremiah26:4 Ak ileenji icheek, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ngot ko mocham ogasa, obendate ng'atuutikyuk, che ki ande taing'wong'," 
Jeremiah26:5 ogas ng'aleegap otwogikyuk maotik, che ayookwok, ang'eete karon miising' ak ayookwok, ago ki ma ogas;" 
Jeremiah26:6 ayae anyun kooi koigei Shiloh, ak ayai nganasani koek ne sasei pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony." 
Jeremiah26:7 Ak kigasei tisiik ak maotik ak piik tugul komwaei Jeremiah ng'aleechuuto eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Jeremiah26:8 Ak kingo kagogees Jeremiah ng'alaalet tugul ne kiga ng'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komwachi piik tugul, konam anyun tisiik ak maotik ak piik tugul ineendet, koleenji, imee iman." 
Jeremiah26:9 Amu nee si imaoten eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ile, Igeitu koi Shiloh, ak koek karaatya nganasani, amaa komenyei chii? Ak ki iyumjigei piik tugul Jeremiah eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah26:10 Ak kingo kas pounigap Judah tuguuchuuto, kotogos eng' kootap laitoryat kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki tep ng'wony eng' ole kibunei eng' ormariichet ne leel ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah26:11 Yeityo komwachi tisiik ak maotik, pounik, ak piik tugul koleenji, Nyoljin meet chiichi; amu kogomaoten kiit ne ya agobo nganasani, ko uu ye koogas eng' itiikwok." 
Jeremiah26:12 Yeityo komwachi Jeremiah pounik tugul ak piik tugul koleenji, Ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amaoten kiit ne ya agobo kooi ak nganasani, amwa ng'aleek tugul che koogas." 
Jeremiah26:13 Nooto anyun, olitit ortinwekwok ak poisyonikwok, ak ogas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'; si kowal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik eng' yaityet ne kogomwa agobo okweek." 
Jeremiah26:14 Ago ogeero, ami anee eung'wong': oyaiywo ko uu ye ogeere ole myee ak ko po iman." 
Jeremiah26:15 Ago onai komyee ole, ngot obara, oipchinigei korotiik che ma tinyei tengek, kobooto nganasani, ak piik tugul che menyei olito: amu kagoyokwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iman anyo amwaiwok ng'aleechuuto tugul ogase." 
Jeremiah26:16 Yeityo komwachi pounik ak piik tugul tisiik ak maotik koleenji: Ma nyooljin meet chiichi; amu kagong'alaalwech eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo. 
Jeremiah26:17 Kong'eetyo anyun poisyek alak che po emet, ak komwachi tuiyet tugul ne po piik koleenji," 
Jeremiah26:18 Ki maoten Mikaia meng'iindetap Moresheth eng' peetuusyegap Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah; ak ki ng'alaalji piik tugul che po Judah koleenji, kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Kibati Zion ko uu ye kibati mbareet, ak koek Jerusalem karurugutik, ak koigei tulweetap koot komoswek che torooreen che po timiin." 
Jeremiah26:19 Tos kita kobar Hezekiah laitoryatap Judah ak Judah tugul ineendet? Tos ki ma iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kogaigai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kot kowal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik eng' yaityet ne kiga komwa agobo icheek? Ngot keyai ko uu nooto, ko kagiipchi saboonwekyok yaityet ne oo." 
Jeremiah26:20 Ak ki mi chiito age agine ne ki maoten eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet ko ki Uriah weeriitap Semaiah ne po Kiriath-Jearim; ak ki maoten kiit ne ya agobo nganasani ak emet, ko uu ng'aleek tugul che po Jeremiah." 
Jeremiah26:21 Ak ye kingo kas Laitoryat Jehoiakim, kobooto piikyik tugul che nyigoonen, ak pounik tugul, kogicheeng' laitoryat kobar ineendet; ago ye kingo kas Uriah, koywei ak komwei, kwo Misiri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Ak ki iyookto Laitoryat Jehoiakim piik koba Misiri, chooto ko Elnatan weeriitap Akbor, ak piik alak che ki mi kobooto ineendet, koba agoi Misiri;" 
Jeremiah26:23 ak ki imut Uriah eng' Misiri, komutyi Jehoiakim laitoryat, ne ki par ineendet eng' rotwetap chok, ak kowiirchi muustonyi kereeriisyegap piik che ma taagunotiin." 
Jeremiah26:24 Ago ki riip Aikam weeriitap Sapan Jeremiah, si ma kigoito ineendet kobar piik." 
Jeremiah27:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah ng'olyoondoni kobunu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taunetap laitornatetap Jeoikam weeriitap Josiah, laitoryatap Judah," 
Jeremiah27:2 koleenji, kamwaiwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, yachigei anook ak chogisyek, ak iratyi kaating'ung';" 
Jeremiah27:3 yeityo iyookyi laitoryatap Edom, ak laitoryatap Moab, ak laitoryatap lagogap Ammon, ak laitoryatap Tyro, ak laitoryatap Sidon, koip piik che kiyooktoi che pwoonei Jerusalem kap Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah:" 
Jeremiah27:4 ak iyomis icheek koba kapkiptainikwak koleenji kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Omwachini kiptainikwok ko uu ni oleenjini:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Ki ayai ng'wonyuni, chii ak tyony che miitei ng'wony, eng' kamuktaennyu ne oo ak eunnyu ne chuulaat; ak agoochi emoniito ineendet ne ageere ale nyolu agoochi." 
Jeremiah27:6 Kaagoochi anyun emotinwechuuto tugul Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon, otwogindennyu, kaagoochi ineendet tyong'igap timiin koot ineendet." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ak koot pororyosyek tugul ineendet ak weeriitnnyi, agoi koit peetuusyegap emennyi: ak koyae anyun pororyosyek che chaang' ak laitorinik che eecheen ineendet koek otwogindennywa." 
Jeremiah27:8 Ak tuun abire pororyet ak pounateet ne maotei Nebukadnezar niito laitoryatap Babilon, ak ne eesyoi konde kaatinnywa chogitap laitoryatap Babilon, abire pororyonooto rotwetap chok, ak rubeet, ak koroito, agoi ageesu icheek eng' eunnyi, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah27:9 Ago, amogas okweek maotikwok anan piikwok che ng'oorsei anan karwotitaosyekwok anan chepsogeinik anan pooniik, che ng'alaalwok koleenjinok, Moote laitoryatap Babilon:" 
Jeremiah27:10 amu maotenwok lembeita, si koistook olooegitu eng' emeng'wong'; kole si aoonak olusye." 
Jeremiah27:11 Ago pororyet ne kase iit laitoryatap Babilon, ak koot ineendet, abagaaktoi pororyonooto kong'et eng' emennywa, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kobat emonooto, ak komeny olooto." 
Jeremiah27:12 Ak ki ang'alaalji Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ko uu ng'aleechuuto tugul aleenji, Onde kaating'wong' chogitap laitoryatap Babilon, ak oot ineendet ak piikyik, si osapche." 
Jeremiah27:13 Amu nee si imee, inyee kobooto piiguk, eng' rotwetap chok, ak eng' rubeet, ak eng' koroito, ko uu ye kogomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo pororyet ne ma chamei koot laitoryatap Babilon?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Amogas ng'aleegap maotik che ng'alaalwok koleenjinok, Moote laitoryatap Babilon: amu maotenwok lembeita." 
Jeremiah27:15 Amu ma ayoogu icheek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago maoteni lembechek eng' kainennyu kole si aoonak, ak olusye, okweek ak maotik che maotenwok." 
Jeremiah27:16 Ki ang'alaalji tisiik ak icheek ak pichu tugul aleenji, Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amogas ng'aleegap maotikwok che maotenwok koleenjinok, Ogeero, neegit si keeweech kogeny tereenigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Babilon: amu maotenwok lembeita." 
Jeremiah27:17 Amogas pichooto; oot laitoryatap Babilon si osapche: amu nee anyun si koek karaita nganasani? 
Jeremiah27:18 Ago ngot ko maotik icheeget, ak ngot komi ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' icheek, ingosa anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, si ma ki ip tereenik che ki ng'et eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' kootap laitoryatap Judah, ak eng' Jerusalem, koba Babilon." 
Jeremiah27:19 Amu kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko uu ni agobo tolochik, ak nyanjet, ak ng'echerok che tebee tuguuk, ak che ng'etunotiin che po tereenik che ki ng'et eng' nganasani," 
Jeremiah27:20 che ki ma ip Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon, ye kiluulei Jekoniah weeriitap Jehoiakim, laitoryatap Judah, komut eng' Jerusalem kwo Babilon, ak piik tugul che taagunotiin che po Judah ak Jerusalem;" 
Jeremiah27:21 Ee, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, agobo tereenik che ki ng'et eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' kootap laitoryatap Judah ak eng' Jerusalem, kole," 
Jeremiah27:22 ki ibei koba Babilon, ak tebee olooto, agoi peetuut ne arutochini icheek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; aibu anyun aweegu kobwa olito." 
Jeremiah28:1 Ak eng' kenyinooto, eng' taunetap laitornatetap Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah, eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan, eng' arawetap muut, kong'alaalwo Hananiah weeriitap Ashur, maotyot, ne ki po Gibeon, eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' taitap tisiik ak piik tugul koleenjo," 
Jeremiah28:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel ko uu ni kole, kaairi chogitap laitoryatap Babilon." 
Jeremiah28:3 Kotom kogeskei kenyiisyek aeng', aibu kogeny kobwa olito tuguuk tugul che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che kiga ip Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon eng' olito koba Babilon:" 
Jeremiah28:4 ak amutu kogeny konyo olito Jekoniah weeriitap Jehoiakim laitoryatap Judah, kobooto luulenik tugul che ki kiluul che po Judah, che ki pa Babilon, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu airie chogitap laitoryatap Babilon." 
Jeremiah28:5 Ki mwachi anyun maotyot Jeremiah maotyot Hananiah eng' taitap tisiik ak eng' taitap piik tugul che kitonondos eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Jeremiah28:6 ak ki le maotyot Jeremiah, Amen: ingoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu nooto: ingoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'aleeguk kosulda che kaimaoten, koip kogeny tuguuk kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak komut tugul che ki kiluul, kobwa olito, kobunu Babilon." 
Jeremiah28:7 Ago kas anyun ng'olyoondoni amwae eng' taing'ung' ak eng' taitap piik tugul: 
Jeremiah28:8 Ki maoten maotik che po keny che ki indounena ak che ki indounenen agobo emotinwek che chaang', ak pounatosyek, agobo lugeet ak yaityet, ak koroito." 
Jeremiah28:9 Maotyot ne maoteni agobo kaalyeet, ye kagosulda ng'olyoondennyi, konaaksei maotyondonooto, keele, ki iyoogu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iman." 
Jeremiah28:10 Ki inem anyun maotyot Hananiah chogit ne ki mi kaatitap maotyot Jeremiah, ak koiri." 
Jeremiah28:11 Ak ki ng'alaal Hananiah eng' taitap piik tugul kole, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Airie ko uu nooto chogitap Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon eng' kaatitap pororyosyek tugul, kotom kogeskei kenyiisyek aeng'u. Ki wo anyun maotyot Jeremiah." 
Jeremiah28:12 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah, ye kingo kagoiri maotyot Hananiah chogit eng' kaatitap maotyot Jeremiah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah28:13 ui ak imwachi Hananiah ileenji, kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kaiiri chogisyegap keetiik; ago iyae chogisyegap kariik igeere chooto." 
Jeremiah28:14 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole: Kande chogitap karnet kaatwegap pororyosyechu tugul, si kobiit koot Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon; ak otei ineendet: ak kaagoochi ineendet tyong'igap timiin ak icheek." 
Jeremiah28:15 Yeityo komwachi maotyot Jeremiah maotyot Hananiah, koleenji, Kaso, Hananiah. Ma iyogun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago igoochini pichu komong' lembeita." 
Jeremiah28:16 Nooto anyun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole keero, aistoin eng' ng'wony: imee kenyini, amu kaimwa ngelelnateet ingelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah28:17 Kime anyun maotyot Hananiah eng' kenyinooto eng' arawetap tisap. 
Jeremiah29:1 Chu ng'aleegap parweet ne ki iyookto maotyot Jeremiah eng' Jerusalem, koyookyi poisyek che ki ng'et eng' che kiga kiluul, ak tisiik, ak maotik, ak piik tugul, che kiga luul Nebukadnezar eng' Jerusalem koba Babilon," 
Jeremiah29:2 (ye kingo kagoba eng' Jerusalem Laitoryat Jekoniah, ak kametap laitoryat, ak kiptainik, kobooto pounigap Judah ak Jerusalem, ak musogik, ak kitang'ik,)" 
Jeremiah29:3 ki ip Elasa weeriitap Sapan, ak Geramya weeriitap Hilkiah (che ki iyookto Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah koba Babilon kap Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon), koleenji," 
Jeremiah29:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, komwachin piik tugul che ki kiluul, che ki achamde keluul eng' Jerusalem koba Babilon:" 
Jeremiah29:5 kole, oteech kooriik, ak omeny; ak ogol mbareenik, ak oam logoekwak." 
Jeremiah29:6 Otunisye, si osich weeriik ak tiibiik; ak otunisyechi weeriikwok, ak ogoite tiibiikwok, si kosich weeriik ak tiibiik; ak otesage eng' olooto, among'ering'itu." 
Jeremiah29:7 Ak ocheeng'ji kaalyeet nganaseet ne ki achamde keluuljok, ak osaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo nganasanooto: amu onyooru kaalyeet eng' kaalyeetap nganasanooto." 
Jeremiah29:8 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole: Among' koberberak maotik che mi kwenung'wong', ak piikwok che ng'oorsei, anan oyan karwotitaosyekwok che orwotyini." 
Jeremiah29:9 Amu maotenwok lembeita eng' kainennyu: ma ayoogu icheek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah29:10 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ye ibata kenyiisyek tamanwogik tisabu omi Babilon, arutochok, ak asuldawok ng'olyoondennyu ne myee, amutwok obwa olito." 
Jeremiah29:11 Amu angen kabwaatutik che abwaati agobo okweek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kabwaatutigap kaalyeet, ma che po yaityet, si agoonok kamang'unet eng' peetuusyekwok che po let." 
Jeremiah29:12 Ak oguura, ak obe osaa, ak agasak." 
Jeremiah29:13 Ak ocheeng'a, ak onyoorwo, ye ocheeng'a eng' mugulelwekwok tugul." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ak onyoorwo, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak awal luuleng'wong', ak ayumak omang'une pororyosyek tugul, ak eng' komoswek tugul ole ki aoonjok, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak amutwak kogeny obwa olito ki agoitoenok." 
Jeremiah29:15 Amu ki omwa ole, Kigong'eetwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotik eng' Babilon." 
Jeremiah29:16 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni agobo laitoryat ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi, ak agobo piik tugul che menyei nganasani, tupchosyekwok che ma kiluul kobootok;" 
Jeremiah29:17 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ogeero, ayookyini icheek rotwetap chok, ak rubeet, ak koroito, ak ayai icheek koigei logoegap mogoonik che samis, che ma kimuuchi keam, amu yaacheen miising'." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ak asube icheek rotwetap chok, ak rubeet, ak koroito, ak agoite icheek kewiirchi komosi ak komosi eng' pounatosyek tugul che po ng'wony, si koek che chubootiin ak che kikwong'ee, che kireenyei ak che kiteweeri, eng' pororyosyek tugul che ki aoonji;" 
Jeremiah29:19 amu ma kas ng'aleekyuk, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ki ayooktochine icheek otwogikyuk maotik, ang'eete karon miising' ak ayookte icheek; ago ma ocham ogas, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah29:20 Ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek tugul che ki kiluul, che ki ayookte eng' Jerusalem koba Babilon." 
Jeremiah29:21 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, agobo Ahab weeriitap Kolaia, ak Zedekiah weeriitap Maaseia, che maotenwok lembeita eng' kainennyu, kole: Ogeero, andoi icheek eutap Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon; ak kobar icheek eng' taing'wong';" 
Jeremiah29:22 ak komwaei luulenik tugul che po Judah che mi Babilon, eng' chubisyet kole, ingoyain Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iige Zedekiah ak Ahab, che ki peel laitoryatap Babilon eng' ma;" 
Jeremiah29:23 amu ki koyai perberyo eng' Israel, ak koyai ibeetapkei ak osotigap piigap kokwennywa, ak ki komwa ng'aleek che po lembech eng' kainennyu, che ki ma ang'at icheek; ak ko aneendet ne angen, ak ko aa paoryat, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah29:24 Ak imwa agobo Semaiah Neelamindet, ile," 
Jeremiah29:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole, amu ki iyookyi piik tugul che mi Jerusalem paronok eng' kaineng'ung', ak iyookyi Zephaniah weeriitap Maaseia tisiindet, ak tisiik tugul, ileenji," 
Jeremiah29:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole, amu ki iyookyi piik tugul che mi Jerusalem paronok eng' kaineng'ung', ak iyookyi Zephaniah weeriitap Maaseia tisiindet, ak tisiik tugul, ileenji," 
Jeremiah29:26 Kaindein Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iegu tisiindet igeer tisiindet Jehoiada, si kobiit oegu pounik eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu chii age tugul ne kibiywet, ak koyaegei koek maotyo, iratyi keetiik keelyekyik, ak iratyi mugurek kaatinnyi." 
Jeremiah29:27 Ara anyun, amu nee si meger kong' Jeremiah ne po Anatoth ne yaegei koek maotyondeng'wong'," 
Jeremiah29:28 amu ko uu ye kagoyokwech ineendet ng'aleek eng' Babilon, koleenjech, Punjin peetuusyek che chaang' luuleng'wong': oteech kooriik ak omeny; ak ogol mbareenik, si oam logoekwak?" 
Jeremiah29:29 Ak kisomanji Zephaniah tisiindet parwaani, kogasei Jeremiah maotyot." 
Jeremiah29:29 Ak kisomanji Zephaniah tisiindet parwaani, kogasei Jeremiah maotyot." 
Jeremiah29:30 Konyonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah, koleenji" 
Jeremiah29:31 iyookyi ng'olyoot piik tugul che kigeluul, ileenji, kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Semaiah Neelamindet, kole: Amu ki komaotenwok Semaiah, ak ki ma ayoogu, ak kogogoonok omang'u lembeita;" 
Jeremiah29:32 nooto anyun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, abire Semaiah Neelamindet, ak iyotennyi; ma sichei chii ne menyei kobooto pichu, ama keerei myeeindo ne ayachini piikyuk, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu ki mwa ngelelnateet kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah30:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji" 
Jeremiah30:2 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole, sirchi bukuit ng'aleek tugul che koamwaun." 
Jeremiah30:3 Keero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che awale luuleetap piikyuk Israel ak Judah, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak agoochi icheek koweek kobwa emet ne ki agoochi kwanisyekwak, ak kobunji." 
Jeremiah30:4 Ak chu ng'aleek che ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel ak Judah. 
Jeremiah30:5 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kigegas tuugeet ne po potanet, ak ne po kaiyweisyet, ne ma po kaalyeet." 
Jeremiah30:6 Oteep anyun, si onai ngo tinyei mureno ng'wanindo ne po sigisyet: amu nee anyun si ageere muren age tugul konamei suennyi, ko uu kwondo ne machei kosigiis, ak kowalogis togoochik tugul eng' arageneet?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Pwo eng' peetuunooto, peetuut ne oo ne ma mi ne kergei: peetuutap nyalilda eng' Jakobo; nga kisaru eng' nyalilato." 
Jeremiah30:8 Ak tuun airie eng' peetuunooto choginnyi ne mi kaating'ung', mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak ang'etii anooguk; ama koyaei toek ineendet koek otwogindennywa." 
Jeremiah30:9 Ago otei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ak Daudi laitoryannywa, ne ang'eetyini icheek." 
Jeremiah30:10 Meiywei anyun, ee Jakobo otwogindennyu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ametoptoben, ee Israel: amu asaruun eng' ole loo, kobooto iyoteng'ung', komong' eng' emet ne kiga kiluulji; ak koweek Jakobo, ak kosiis, ak komuuny, ama komi chii ne imui ineendet." 
Jeremiah30:11 Amu ami kobooten, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si asaruun; amu ageesu pororyosyek tugul che kigayestochin, ago magesun inyee; ago atigoonenen kirwooget, amabagaaktoin ama kibirin." 
Jeremiah30:12 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ma inyaaksei kaguoteneng'ung', ak ko ng'waan moeng'ung'." 
Jeremiah30:13 Ma mi chii ne ng'alaaldaun, si kobiit kinyain: metinye kerichek che kinyaise." 
Jeremiah30:14 Kigoutyenen chamaniguk tugul: ma cheeng'in: amu kaaguotenin eng' kaguotenetap puunyoot eng' katigonetap ineendet ne koroom; amu ooindap yaityeng'ung', amu kitesagis tengekwogiguk." 
Jeremiah30:15 Amu nee si iriir eng' kaguoteneng'ung'? Ma inyaaksei ng'wanindang'ung'. Koayaun anyun tuguuchuuto, amu ooindap yaityeng'ung', ak amu kitesagis tengekwogiguk." 
Jeremiah30:16 Ki amei anyun icheek tugul che amin; kiluulei puuniguk tugul, wendi age tugul luuleet; ak kiluulei icheek tugul che luulin, ak agoitoi kebar icheek che cheeng'ei kobarin." 
Jeremiah30:17 Amu asaabin, ak anyaa mooguk, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kigoguurenen ne ki kitimda, kole Zion niito, ne ma mage kiy chii." 
Jeremiah30:18 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, awale kogeny luuleetap emaisyegap Jakobo, ak ariiree meng'otosyekyik; ak keteech nganaseet karaitanyi, ak kotebi kootap laitoryat ko uu yeginye." 
Jeremiah30:19 Ak komang'une olooto kongoi ak kutitap icheeget che igasegei: ak ates icheek, ama kong'ering'itu; atoroori kogeny icheek, ama konyeratitu." 
Jeremiah30:20 Ak koigei lagokwak atkinye tai, ak kogimit tuiyennywa eng' tainnyu, ak abir tugul che usei icheek." 
Jeremiah30:21 Ak kobiitune icheek pounindennywa, ak komang'une kwenunnywa kirwoogindennywa; ak agoochini ineendet koriik, konyo koriikyo; amu ng'oo ineendet ne tinyei nyiganateet koriikyo? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah30:22 Ak oegu piikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Jeremiah30:23 Ogeero, kagomong' kipchurchuryetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, nooto ko nereeknatennyi ne koroom, ee kipchurchuryet ne usei kot: kwerei metowegap kiptengeginik." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ma weeksei nereegek che ng'woneen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agoi koyai kogees, agoi koyai magutigap muguleldanyi kosulda: oguitosi ng'olyoondoniito eng' peetuusyek che po let." 
Jeremiah31:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, aegu eng' peetuusyechooto Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap ortinwek tugul che po Israel, ak koek piikyuk." 
Jeremiah31:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ki nyoor myeeindo eng' surkwen piik che ki ng'etune rotwetap chok; ye kingo cheeng'jingei `Israel kamuung'et." 
Jeremiah31:3 Kimong'jo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koloo, koleenjo, Ee, ki achamin eng' chamyet ne po koigeny; ak ki atestai achamin eng' konyit." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ateechin kogeny ak iteegoksei, ee pergeiyatap Israel! Kilelesonin kogeny ak kobooto sugutisyeguk che mengeechen, ak iwe iurerenote kobooto icheek che igasegei." 
Jeremiah31:5 Ak imin kogeny sabibuk eng' tuloonoogap Samaria; minsei minik, ak koam eng' poiboiyet logoechooto." 
Jeremiah31:6 Amu piitu peetuut ye ititendos riibiik eng' tuloonook che po Ephraim: kole, “Ong'eetyee, keebe Zion kootap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindennyo.”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Otyenji Jakobo eng' kaagaasetapkei, ak owaach agobo ne oo eng' pororyosyek; omwaite, olasu ole, Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, saru piiguk, che ki ng'et che po Israel." 
Jeremiah31:8 Keero, amutu icheek eng' emet ne po murot kaataam, ak ayum icheek eng' ole poochin ng'wony, kobooto ne koraat ak ne ing'wali, kobooto kwondo ne tamono, ak ineendet ne machei kosigiis: weeksei olito, ko tuiyet ne oo." 
Jeremiah31:9 Pwoonei koriiryonu, ak amutune saautik: agoochini kobendat eng' ole neegit ainoosyek, eng' ooreet ne litit eng' ole ma kinachi: amu aa kwanda eng' Israel, ak taaitanyu Ephraim." 
Jeremiah31:10 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee okweek pororyosyek, ak omwaite niito eng' ngeguusyek che looen, ole, ineendet ne ki iyeesta Israel, koyumi ak koriip, ko uu ye riibei mestowot akweennyi." 
Jeremiah31:11 Amu ki ityaach `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jakobo, ak kiweech eng' eutap ineendet ne kiim kosiir ineendet." 
Jeremiah31:12 Ak kobwa kotyen eng' ole toroor eng' Zion, ak koroot koba tugul ole mi myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ole mi peek, divaik, ak mwanik, ak ole mi aaregap keechiir ak moek, ak koigei saboonwekwak mbareet ne kibisi; ama koaragendos kogeny agot kitigin." 
Jeremiah31:13 Kobaibait anyun pergeiyat eng' ureryet, kobooto murenik ak poisyek ak icheek: amu awale riirekwak koek poiboiyet, ak agaigai icheek, ak agoochi koboiboitu kometo riirekwak." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ak abae akwaindo saboonwegap tisiik kobiyong'so, ak kobiyo piikyuk myeeindonyu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah31:15 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kigasei kutit eng' Ramah, kateeiyet ak riirek che ng'woneen, riirchin Rael lagokyik; eesyoi kigaigai agobo lagokyik, amu ma komi." 
Jeremiah31:16 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amat itee, anan iriir: amu mi melekto ne po poisyeng'ung', mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak pwoonei icheek kogeny eng' emetap puunyoot." 
Jeremiah31:17 Ak mi kamang'unet ne po peetuusyeguk che po let, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kobwa lagoguk kogeny kiwotennywa." 
Jeremiah31:18 Koagas iman koteechingei Ephraim, koleen, Ki itigoono, ak ki atigoonage: ko uu moita ne tomo konai chogit: welela, si awelelok; amu ii Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ki asigu iman ko ki awelelage; ak ki arabach kubestanyu ko kagineta: Ki alilan, ee ki atoptoben, amu ki aiboti teweernatetap ming'inatennyu." 
Jeremiah31:20 Tos weeriitnnyu ne achame, Ephraim? Tos ineendet ko lakweet ne kiboiboitune? Amu ye ang'alaali kotugul areenye ineendet, abwaati ineendet miising' kora: iima moennyu amu ineendet; ariiree ineendet iman, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah31:21 Lumjige kaboorunoik che po ooreet, yachigei keetiik che ibooru ooreet: tokyi muguleldang'ung' ooreet ne oo, nooto ooreet ne ki ibune: weege kogeny, ee pergeiyatap Israel, weekyigei nganasochuguk." 
Jeremiah31:22 Iombenoti kot kotyanit, ee inyee chepto ne iweechigei let? Amu ki kotoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koyai kiit ne leel eng' ng'wony; yiemei kwondo muren." 
Jeremiah31:23 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole: Ta komwaei kogeny icheek ng'aleechu eng' emetap Judah ak eng' nganasookyik, ye tuun aweech kogeny eng' ole ki kimut kole: Ingoberuurin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee meng'ootetap imanda, ee tulweetap tiliilindo." 
Jeremiah31:24 Ak komeny olooto Judah ak nganasookyik tugul; kobooto kabotik, ak icheek che iyagoti akwotisyegap keechiirek." 
Jeremiah31:25 Amu kaabai kobiyo saboondo ne ng'etat, ak kaanyiit saboondo age tugul ne arageni." 
Jeremiah31:26 Ki agosu anyun, ak ageer; ak ki anyiny rwondanyu." 
Jeremiah31:27 Ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che agooljini kootap Israel ak kootap Judah iyoteetap chii ak iyoteetap tyony." 
Jeremiah31:28 Ak ko uu ye ki ariip icheek si kobiit atut ak agabui ak ang'em, ak anyaliil, ariibe anyun icheek ko uu nooto si kobiit ateech ak amin, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ma komwaei eng' peetuusyechooto kole, ki koam kwanisyek sabibuk che mindilileen, ak kiliil kelegap lagok." 
Jeremiah31:30 Ago meei chii age tugul amu tengektanyi: ak kiliilei kelegap chiito age tugul ne amei sabibuk che mindilileen. 
Jeremiah31:31 Ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che kiyomisigei ak kootap Israel eng' kayomiset ne leel, ak kobooto kootap Judah;" 
Jeremiah31:32 ma ko uu kayomiset ne ki kiyomiske ak kwanisyekwak eng' peetuut ne ki anamanu icheek amutu komong' eng' emetap Misiri; kayomiset nootonyu ne king'em icheek, nganda ki aa manong'otyot eng' icheek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah31:33 Ago ni kayomiset ne kiyomisigei ak kootap Israel ye ibata peetuusyechooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; andoi ng'atuutyennyu oriitinnywa, ak asirchini mugulelwekwak: ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa, ak koek piikyuk." 
Jeremiah31:34 Ama koneeti kogeny chii age tugul chiitap kokwennyi, ama koneeti chii age tugul ng'eetap kamet, koleenjin, Nai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu tuun naa icheek tugul, kobooch ne ming'in eng' icheek agoi ne oo, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu anyochini kaat amu yaityennywa, ama abwaati tengektonywa kogeny." 
Jeremiah31:35 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne koonu asiista koek lapkeiyet peet, ak ng'atuutik che ki king'at agobo arawet ak kecheik si koek lapkeiyet kemoi, ne wasei nyanjet, kot komoror mildaennyi pogei; kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, mwaei kole:" 
Jeremiah31:36 Nda istoenagei ng'atuutichuuto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ta ma ko pororyet iyoteetap Israel kogeny eng' tainnyu agoi." 
Jeremiah31:37 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, nda kimuuchi kikwa kipsengwet, ak kisyach lumeiywegap ng'wony oriit, aiste anyun agine iyoteet tugul ne po Israel amu tuguuk tugul che ki koyai, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah31:38 Ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che tuun kiteekyine Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseet kobooch teekseet ne kooi ne po Hanael agoi ormariichetap luuita." 
Jeremiah31:39 Ak ta kikwae porowet kolititiit kotokyigei tulweet ne ming'in ne kiguure Gareb, ak kowelelgei kot koit Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Ak koek ne tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor atebweet komugul ne po muuswek, ak ne po oreek, ak mbareenik tugul che itei kererutap Kidron, agoi luuita ne po ormariichetap paraisiit ne tokyingei kong'asiis; ma kitutu, anan kebut kogeny agoi." 
Jeremiah32:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiitap taman ne po Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah, ne ki kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po Nebukadresar." 
Jeremiah32:2 Kiyiem anyun lugeetap laitoryatap Babilon Jerusalem eng' peetuusyechooto: ak kiga kigerchi maotyot Jeremiah seremutap riibiik, ne ki mi kootap laitoryatap Judah." 
Jeremiah32:3 Amu kiga koger ineendet Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah koleenji, amu nee si imaoten, ak ile, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, agoochini nganasani eutap laitoryatap Babilon, ak koluul;" 
Jeremiah32:4 ama chilili Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah eng' eutap Kaldeik, ago kindoi iman eutap laitoryatap Babilon, ak kong'alaal tuwai kimni, ak kogeergei togoch;" 
Jeremiah32:5 ak komut Zedekiah kwo Babilon, ak kotebee olooto agoi tuun aityi pireet ineendet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: agot ngo pargei ak Kaldeik, koma kiberuurok?" 
Jeremiah32:6 Ak imwa Jeremiah kole, ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo" 
Jeremiah32:7 Keero, nyoonjinin Hanamel weeriitap Shallum imameng'ung', koleenjinin, Aljige mbareennyu ne mi Anatoth: amu neng'ung' imanitap katyaget ial." 
Jeremiah32:8 Kinyonjo anyun Hanamel weeriitap imamennyu eng' seremutap riibiik ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koleenjo, Asoomin ale, al mbareennyu ne mi Anatoth, ne mi emetap Benjamin: amu neng'ung' imanitap poroteet, ak neng'ung' katyaget; aljige nooto. Ki anai anyun ale po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito." 
Jeremiah32:9 Ak ki aal mbaranooto ne ki mi Anatoth ne po Hanamel weeriitap imamennyu, ak ki agerchi ineendet fedhaisyek, chooto ko shekelisyek taman ak tisap che po fedha." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ak ki asir parweetap kayanjinet, ang'och, ak aguur paorinik, ak agerchi ineendet fedhaisyek eng' kiit ne kirogendoisye." 
Jeremiah32:11 Ki aip anyun parweetap kayanjinet ne po alyet, nooto ne ki king'ooch ko uu ng'atuutyet ak piteet, kobooto nooto ki yaataat." 
Jeremiah32:12 Ak ki agoochi anyun parwaanooto po kayanjinet ne po alyet Baruk weeriitap Neriah weeriitap Maseia, eng' taitap Hanamel weeriitap imamennyu, ak eng' taitap paorinik che ki sirchi kainaikwak parwaanooto po kayanjinet ne po alyet, eng' taitap Yahudik tugul che kitebyei eng' seremutap riibiik." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ak ki ang'at Baruk eng' tainnywa aleenji," 
Jeremiah32:14 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole, ip paronochu po kayanjinet, parwaani po kayanjinetap alyet, kobooto ne kaging'ooch, ak parwaani po kayanjinet ne yaataat, ak inde tereetap meneet; si kotebee peetuusyek che chaang'." 
Jeremiah32:15 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole: Ta kealei kogeny kooriik ak mbareenik ak mbareenigap sabibuk eng' emoni." 
Jeremiah32:16 Kingo kaagoochi Baruk weeriitap Neriah parweetap kayanjinet ne po alyet, asaa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor aleenji," 
Jeremiah32:17 Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Keero, ki iyai kipsengwet ak eng' kimnateng'ung' ne oo ak eng' eung'ung' ne chuulaat; ma mi kiy age tugul ne temeneen," 
Jeremiah32:18 inyee ne iriiree eliphuusyek, ak igeerchini tengekwogigap kwanisyek tegetigap lagokwak che isubi icheek: Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne oo, ne po kamuktaet, kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek;" 
Jeremiah32:19 ineendet ne oo eng' kirwooget, ak ko po kamuktaet eng' poisyet; ne keerei konyekyik ortinwek tugul che po weeriigap piik; si kogoochi age tugul ko uu ortinwekyik ak ko uu logoegap poisyonikyik;" 
Jeremiah32:20 ne ki inde kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik emetap Misiri, agoi rani, eng' Israel ak eng' piik alak; ak ki iyai kaineng'ung' konaak, ko uu ye uu rani;" 
Jeremiah32:21 ak ki imutu piiguk Israel komong' eng' emetap Misiri eng' kaboorunoik, ak kwang'utik, ak eng' euut ne kiim, ak eng' euut ne chuulaat, ak eng' kamuiset ne oo;" 
Jeremiah32:22 ak igoochi emoni, ne ki iyasyechi kwanisyekwak ile igoochini icheek, emet ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo;" 
Jeremiah32:23 ak ki pwa, konam kobunji; ago ma kas iit kuting'ung', ama isup ng'atuutiguk; ma yai kiy age tugul eng' chooto tugul ki ing'atyi icheek koyai: koigoochi anyun yaityoni tugul konyonji icheek." 
Jeremiah32:24 Ogeero karurugutigap ng'ung'unyek ole punu piik kobwanei koluulei nganasani; ak kagigoochi nganasani eutap Kaldeik che paregei ak nganasanooto, amu rotwetap chok, ak rubeet, ak koroito: ak kagosulda nooto ki imwa; ak keero, igeere nooto." 
Jeremiah32:25 Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki imwaiwo ileenjo, Aljige mbareet eng' fedha, ak iguur paorinik; nganda ki kigoochi nganasani eutap Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah32:26 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah32:27 keero, aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap piik tugul: tos mi kiy age tugul ne temena?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, agoochini nganasani eutap Kaldeik, ak eng' eutap Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, ak koluul:" 
Jeremiah32:29 ak kobwa Kaldeik che paregei ak nganasani, kobwa konaam nganasani, ak kobeel, kobooto kooriik, che ki igoitoe icheek nyamdutik che kibeelei, kogoochin Baal eng' paragutap koorichooto, ak koroong'jin kanamonik che teer, kagoochinoik che kieei, si kobiit kotacha anereech." 
Jeremiah32:30 Amu ki koyai piigap Israel ak lagogap Judah ne ya eng' tainnyu kobooch ming'inatennywa: amu ki kotacha piigap Israel anereech eng' poisyonigap eunekwak, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah32:31 Amu ki koek eng' anee nganasani tagisyetap nereeknatennyu ak ne po nereegekyuk che ng'woneen kobooch peetuut ne kiteechei icheek agoi rani; kot aiste eng' tainnyu," 
Jeremiah32:32 amu yaityet tugul ne po piigap Israel ak ne po lagogap Judah, che ki koyai kotagena anereech, icheek, laitorinikwak, pounikwak, tisiikwak, ak maotikwak, ak piigap Judah, ak piik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ak ki kotuktocha patai, ama keera: ak nganda ki aneet icheek, ang'eete karon miising' ak aneeti, koma epchi iit si kotaach kaneetisyet." 
Jeremiah32:34 Ago ki inde tuguukwak che kiwechei, koot ne kimwaitoe kainennyu, kong'wanit." 
Jeremiah32:35 Ak ki teech komoswek che torooreen che po Baal, che mi atebweetap weeriitap Hinom, si kogoito weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak kobun maat kogoochi Molek; ne ki ma ang'at, ama kuura met, ale si kobiit koyai kii kiwechei; ak kogoochi Judah koyai tengekto." 
Jeremiah32:36 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, agobo nganasani, ne omwae ole, Kagigoochi eutap laitoryatap Babilon eng' rotwetap chok, ak eng' rubeet, ak eng' koroito, kole," 
Jeremiah32:37 Ogeero, ayumi icheek komong' eng' emotinwek tugul che kigaonji icheek amu nereegekyuk, ak eng' nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, ak eng' nereegek che eecheen, ak amutu icheek kogeny kobwa olito, ak agoochi komeny eng' chametapkei." 
Jeremiah32:38 Ak koek piikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa:" 
Jeremiah32:39 ak agoochi icheek muguleldo agenge ak ooreet agenge, si komuuch koiywea koigeny; si konyoor myeeindo ak lagokwak che isubi icheek:" 
Jeremiah32:40 ak kiyomisigei ak icheek kayomiset ne po koigeny, ale matuktochini patai icheek ago ayachini ne myee; ak ande kaiyweisyennyu mugulelwekwak, si ma istoenagei." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ee, aboiboitune icheek ayachi ne myee, ak amin icheek eng' emoni iman eng' muguleldanyu komugul ak eng' saboondanyu komugul." 
Jeremiah32:42 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ko uu ye ki aipchi pichu yaityoni oo tugul, aipchini ko uu nooto myeeindo tugul ne ki arorchi icheek." 
Jeremiah32:43 Ak keal mbareenik eng' emoni, ole omwae ole, Kigoguber, ama mi chii anan tyony; ki kigoochi eutap Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah32:44 Alei piik mbareenik eng' fedhaisyek, ak kosiir paronogap kayanjinet, ak kong'ooch, ak koguur paorinik, eng' emetap Benjamin, ak eng' komoswek che mi ole neegitee Jerusalem, ak eng' nganasoogap Judah, ak eng' nganasook che mi emetap tuloonook, ak eng' nganasook che mi emet ne soi, ak eng' nganasook che mi murot tai: amu agoochini koweek eng' ole ki kiluulji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah33:1 Ki nyoonji kogeny ne po aeng' `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah, ye kita ko kerat eng' seremutap riibiik, koleenji," 
Jeremiah33:2 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne yaei nooto, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kimimii si kogimit; kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, mwaei kole:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Kuura, si awolun, ak aboorun tuguuk che eecheen, ak ko uueen, che mengen." 
Jeremiah33:4 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, agobo kooriigap nganasani, ak agobo kooriigap laitorinigap Judah, che kigebut koek che riibegei eng' taitap karurugutigap ng'ung'unyek, ak eng' rotwetap chok: mwaei kole:" 
Jeremiah33:5 Pwoonei kobaregei ak Kaldeik, ago kinyiiti muuswek, che ki abar eng' nereegekyuk ak eng' nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, ak icheek tugul che ki aung'e togeennyu tengekwogikwak eng' nganasani." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ogeero, anyaai ak asoobi, ak asoobi icheek; ak ang'aang'ji icheek chaang'indap kaalyeet ak imanda." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ak agoochi Judah ak Israel koweek eng' ole kiga kiluulji, ak ateech icheek ko uu eng' tai." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ak aun icheek eng' tengektonywa tugul, che ki koyaiywo; ak anyochi kaat amu tengekwogikwak tugul, che ki koyaiywo, ak che ki kongeleljinena." 
Jeremiah33:9 Ak koek nganasani eng' anee kainet ne kiboiboitune, koek kalasunet ak toroornatet, eng' taitap pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony, che kasei myeeindo tugul ne ayachini icheek, ak koiyweis ak kobotanso amu myeinooto tugul ak kaalyeet tugul ne agoochini nganasani." 
Jeremiah33:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ta kegasei kogeny eng' olito, ole omwae, ole, Karaatya, ama mi chii anan tyony, chooto ko nganasoogap Judah, ak ortinwegap Jerusalem, che ki koguber, ama mi chii, ama mi chii ne menyei, ama mi tyony," 
Jeremiah33:11 kigasei tuugeetap poiboiyet ak ne po kagasetapkei, ne po sandet ak ne po murereet, tuugeetap icheek che mwaei kole, oweekyi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, amu myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu tebyei koigeny rireenennyi: ak tuugeetap che igoitoi korosegap kongoi kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Amu agoochini koweek piigap emet che kigeluul, ko uu eng' tai, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah33:12 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ta kobiitu kogeny eng' olito ole karaatya, ama mi chii, ama mi tyony, ak eng' nganasookyik tugul, meng'ootetap mestoweek ak ole kerchin akwotisyek che po keechiirek." 
Jeremiah33:13 Punei kogeny akwotisyegap keechiirek taitap ineendet ne iiti eng' nganasook che po emetap tuloonook, ak eng' nganasoogap soi, ak eng' nganasook che po murot tai, ak eng' emet ne po Benjamin, ak eng' komoswek ole neegitee Jerusalem, ak eng' nganasoogap Judah, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah33:14 Ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ayae ng'olyoondonooto myee ne ki amwa agobo kootap Israel ak agobo kootap Judah." 
Jeremiah33:15 Agoochini kobityi Daudi Temetap imanda eng' peetuusyechooto ak eng' peetuunooto; ak korwooch kirwooget ak imanda eng' emet. 
Jeremiah33:16 Kisaru Judah eng' peetuusyechooto; ak komeng'iis Jerusalem eng' chametapkei; ak ni kainet ne kimwaitoe, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko imandanyo." 
Jeremiah33:17 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma koi petyi chii Daudi ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po kootap Israel; 
Jeremiah33:18 ama petyin chii tisiik Lawiik eng' tainnyu ne igoitoi kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak kobeel kagoochinoigap peek che ng'ootiin, ak kogoito tiseiywek kotugul." 
Jeremiah33:19 Ak ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah koleenji," 
Jeremiah33:20 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ndaomuuchi obut arorutyennyu ne po peet, ak arorutyennyu ne po kemoi, kot koma komi peetuut ak kemout eng' saisyekwak;" 
Jeremiah33:21 ta kimuuchi kebut agine kayomisennyu ne ki kiyomiske ak Daudi otwogindennyu, kot kobetyi weeriit ne laitorani eng' ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet; ak kayomisennyu ne ki ayai kobooto Lawiik tisiik, kiboitiinikyuk." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ko uu ye ma kimuuchi kiit tuguuk che po kipsengwet, ama kimuuchi keger ng'aniegap nyanjet; atese anyun iyoteetap Daudi otwogindennyu, ak Lawiik, che poisyeiwo." 
Jeremiah33:23 Ak ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah33:24 tos mebwaati kiit ne kagomwa pichu kole ki gotimda `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koorchooto aeng' che ki kolewen? Sasei icheek ko uu nooto piikyuk, si ma koegu kogeny pororyet eng' tainnywa." 
Jeremiah33:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ngot koma tononi arorutyennyu ne po peet ak ne po kemoi, ngot koma ande ng'atuutigap kipsengwet ak che po ng'wony;" 
Jeremiah33:26 atimdoi anyun agine iyoteetap Jakobo, ak ne po Daudi otwogindennyu, kot koma lewen iyotennyi koek pounik che pou iyoteetap Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo: amu agoochini koweek eng' ole ki kiluulji, ak ariiree icheek." 
Jeremiah34:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ki pargei Nebukadnezar laitoryatap Babilon, ak lugeennyi tugul, ak pounatosyek tugul che po ng'wony che ki mi pounatennyi, ak pororyosyek tugul kobaregei ak Jerusalem, ak nganasookyik tugul, koleenji:" 
Jeremiah34:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel kole ui ing'alaalji Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Keero, agoochini nganasani eutap laitoryatap Babilon, ak kobeel eng' maat:" 
Jeremiah34:3 amechililee eunnyi, ago kiluulin iman, ak kindein eunnyi, ak igeer laitoryatap Babilon togoch, ak ong'alaal tuwai kimni, ak iwe Babilon." 
Jeremiah34:4 Ago kas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah: mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo inyee kole, Memee eng' rotwetap chok;" 
Jeremiah34:5 imee eng' kaalyeet; ak peelun icheek ko uu nooto ko uu ye kigebeelji kwanisyeguk, laitorinik che po tai che ki indounenen; ak koriirchin, kole, “Pwo kiptaiyat! Amu kaamwa ng'olyoot,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah34:6 Yeityo komwachi maotyot Jeremiah Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ng'aleechooto tugul eng' Jerusalem," 
Jeremiah34:7 ye ki paregei lugeetap laitoryatap Babilon ak Jerusalem, ak kobargei ak nganasook tugul che po Judah che kigang'et, kobargei ak Lakish ak Aseka; amu chuuto kityo nganasook che ng'ootaatiin che po Judah che ki ng'et." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye kingo kagoyai Laitoryat Zedekiah arorutyet kobooto piik tugul che ki mi Jerusalem, kole, komwaita katyaget eng' icheek;" 
Jeremiah34:9 kole kotyach chii tugul otwogindennyi ne muren ak otwogindennyi ne tye, ngo Yahudyot ne muren anan ne tye, kotyach kwo; si ma piit age tugul eng' icheek ne otei age, nooto ko koot Yahudyot tupchennyi." 
Jeremiah34:10 Ak ki kas iit pounik tugul ak piik tugul che kiga yai arorutyonooto, kole ityaachi chii age tugul otwogindennyi, ne muren, ak kotyach chii age tugul otwogindennyi ne tye kwo, kole ma mi chii eng' icheek ne otei age kogeny; ki kas iit ng'olyoondonooto, ak kogoochi icheek koba:" 
Jeremiah34:11 ago eng' let, kowalak icheek, ak koweech kogeny otwogik ak otwogik che tiibiik, che kiga kotyach koba, ak komut icheek kogas iit koek otwogik, ak otwogik che tiibiik." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenji," 
Jeremiah34:13 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: ki kiyomiske ak kwanisyekwok eng' peetuut ne ki amutu icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri, komong' eng' kootap otwoknateet aleenji," 
Jeremiah34:14 Ye ibata kenyiisyek tisabu, kotyach chii age tugul eng' okweek tupchennyi ne Yahudyot, ne kigeal, ago ki kootin eng' kenyiisyek lo, ityaachi ineendet kwo: ago ki ma kasa kwanisyekwok, anan koepcha iit." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ak ki owalage anyun, ak kiga oyai kiit ne myee eng' tainnyu, omwaitoi katyaget eng' chii age tugul eng' chiitap kokwennyi; ak kiga oyai arorutyet eng' tainnyu eng' koot ne kimwaitoe kainennyu:" 
Jeremiah34:16 ago ki owalage ong'wanit kainennyu, ak koweech chii age tugul otwogindennyi, ak otwogindennyi ne tye, che koga otyach koba eng' poiboiyennywa, ak koomutu icheek kogas iit, koek otwogik ak otwogik che tiibiik, eng' okweek." 
Jeremiah34:17 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma oepcha iit, si omwaite katyaget, eng' chii age tugul eng' tupchennyi, ak eng' chii age tugul eng' chiitap kokwennyi: ogeero, amwaiwok katyaget, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne po rotwetap chok, ne po koroito, ak ne po rubeet; ak agoitook kewiirchok komosi ak komosi eng' pounatosyek tugul che po ng'wony." 
Jeremiah34:18 Ak agoitoi piik che ki kobistoe kayomisennyu, che ma yai ng'aleegap arorutyet ne kiga koyai eng' tainnyu, ye kipcheune aeng' moita ak kobun kwenutap kebeberwekyik;" 
Jeremiah34:19 pounigap Judah, ak pounigap Jerusalem, kiptainik, ak tisiik, ak piik tugul che po emet, che ki pun kwenutap kebeberwechooto po moita;" 
Jeremiah34:20 agoitoi icheek koba eutap puunikwak, ak koba eutap icheek che cheeng'ei saboonwekwak: ak koek muuswekwak amitwogigap toriitigap parak, ak che po tyong'igap ng'wony." 
Jeremiah34:21 Ak agoitoi Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ak pounikyik koba eutap puunikwak, ak koba eutap icheek che cheeng'ei saboonwekwak, ak eutap lugeetap laitoryatap Babilon, che ki pa eng' oli omi." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ogeero, ang'ate, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak aweekyi icheek nganasani; ak kobargei ak nganasani, ak koluul, ak kobeel: ak ayai nganasoogap Judah koek surkwen, ole ma komenyei chii."
