Jeremiah35:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuusyegap Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah, laitoryatap Judah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah35:2 ui kootap Rekabitik, ak ing'alaalji, ak imutu icheek kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi koot age eng' che po oriit, ak igoochi divaik koe." 
Jeremiah35:3 Ki amut anyun Jaasania weeriitap Jeremiah, weeriitap Habasinia, ak tupchosyekyik, ak weeriitkyik tugul, ak koot komugul ne po Rekabitik;" 
Jeremiah35:4 ki amutu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agoi koot ne po oriit ne po weeriigap Hanan weeriitap Igdalia, chiitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne kineegite koot ne po oriit ne po pounik, ne ki mi paragutap koot ne po oriit ne po Maaseia weeriitap Shallum, riibindetap kurgeet." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ak ki ande taabook che nyiitootiin divaik kobooto kigombok, taitap weeriigap kootap Rekabitik, ak ki aleenji icheek, Oee divaichu." 
Jeremiah35:6 Ago ki le, Ma kiee divaik: amu king'atech kwandanyo Jonadab weeriitap Regap, koleenjech, Moee divaik, okweek, anan weeriikwok agoi:" 
Jeremiah35:7 amoteeche koot, anan ogoolse, anan omin mbareetap sabibuk, anan otepte chooto: ago omenye emaisyek eng' peetuusyekwok tugul; si kobiit osapche eng' peetuusyek che chaang' eng' emet ne oo toek." 
Jeremiah35:8 Ak kigegas iit kutitap kwandanyo Jonadab weeriitap Regap ko uu tugul che king'atech, kole si ma kiee divaik eng' peetuusyekyok tugul, acheek, osotikyok, weeriitkyok, anan ko tiibiikyok;" 
Jeremiah35:9 anan keteekyigei kooriik che ki menye: ama ki tinyei mbareenigap sabibuk anan mbareenik anan kesweek: 
Jeremiah35:10 ago kigemeng'oote emaisyek, ak kigegas iit, ak keyai ko uu tugul che king'atech kwandanyo Jonadab." 
Jeremiah35:11 Ago ye ki nyo Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon emoni, ko ki kile, Obwa keebe Jerusalem amu kiyweei lugeetap Kaldeik ak lugeetap piigap Syria; kemeny anyun Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah35:12 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah35:13 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole: Ui ak imwachi piigap Judah ak piik che menyei Jerusalem, ileenji, Tos mochame otaach kaneetisyet oepchi iit ng'aleekyuk? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah35:14 Kagosulda ng'aleegap Jonadab weeriitap Regap, che ki ng'at weeriikyik koleenji amoee divaik, ak tomo koe icheek agoi peetuuni, amu kase iit ng'atuutyetap kwandanywa: ago ki ang'alaalwok, ang'eete karon miising' ak ang'alaali, ago ma oepcha iit." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ak ki ayookwok kogeny otwogikyuk tugul che maotik, ang'eete karon miising' ak ayoogu icheek, amwae ale, Oweege anyun chii age tugul eng' ooreennyi ne ya, ak olitit poisyonikwok, amosup kamuktaik che teer oot icheek, si omeny emet ne ki agoonok kobooto kwanisyekwok: ago ma oep iit, anan ogasa iit." 
Jeremiah35:16 Amu kagoyai weeriigap Jonadab weeriitap Regap ng'atuutyetap kwandanywa, ne ki ng'at icheek, ago ma kasa iit pichu;" 
Jeremiah35:17 mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Ogeero, aipchini Judah ak piik tugul che menyei Jerusalem, yaityet tugul ne ki amwa agobo icheek: amu ki ang'alaalji, ago ma kas; ago ki aguur icheek, ago ma wol." 
Jeremiah35:18 Ak ki mwachi Jeremiah kootap Rekabitik koleenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Amu ki ogas iit ng'atuutyetap kwandang'wong' Jonadab, ak oriip kaneetisyosyekyik tugul, ak oyai ko uu tugul che king'ataak;" 
Jeremiah35:19 mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Ma petyin chii Jonadab weeriitap Regap chiito ne tononi eng' tainnyu agoi." 
Jeremiah36:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah ng'olyoondoni ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiit ne po ang'wan ne po Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah, laitoryatap Judah, koleenji" 
Jeremiah36:2 nam bukuit ne mamanat, isirchi ng'aleek tugul che koamwaun agobo Israel, ak agobo Judah, ak agobo pororyosyek tugul, kobooch peetuut ne ki ang'alaalun, kobooch peetuusyegap Josiah, agoi peetuuni." 
Jeremiah36:3 Abeere tamangap kogas kootap Judah yaityet tugul ne kaatil ale ayachini icheek; si koweek chii tugul eng' icheek kometo ooreennyi ne ya, si anyochi kaat amu yaityennywa ak tengektonywa." 
Jeremiah36:4 Ki kuur anyun Jeremiah Baruk weeriitap Neriah; ak kisir Baruk ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kimwaei Jeremiah, che kiga komwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, kosirchi bukuit ne mamanat." 
Jeremiah36:5 Ak ki ng'at Jeremiah Baruk, koleenji aa kerat; ma muuchi awo kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Jeremiah36:6 ui anyun isoman bukuiniito, ne kaisirchi che kegasena, ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, soman kogasei piik eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap karugutetapkei, ak isoman kogeny kogasei piik tugul che po Judah che punu nganasookwak." 
Jeremiah36:7 Tamangap komwaita soomutikwak eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koweek chii age tugul kometo ooreennyi ne ya, amu eecheen nereegek kobooto nereegek che ng'woneen che ki komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo pichu." 
Jeremiah36:8 Ak ki yai Baruk weeriitap Neriah ko uu tugul che ki ng'at maotyot Jeremiah ineendet, kosoman eng' bukuit ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah36:9 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po muut ne po Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah, laitoryatap Judah, eng' arawetap sogool, komwaita piik tugul eng' Jerusalem, kobooto piik tugul che ki punu nganasoogap Judah kobwanei Jerusalem, karugutetapkei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah36:10 Kisoman anyun Baruk ng'aleegap Jeremiah che ki kisirchi bukuit, eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' koot ne po oriit ne po Gemaria weeriitap Sapan siriindet, eng' seremut ne po meto, eng' ole kimandoe ne po ormariichet ne leel ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kisooman kogasei piik tugul." 
Jeremiah36:11 Ak ye kingo kas Mikaia weeriitap Gemaria, weeriitap Sapan, ng'aleechooto tugul po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' bukuit," 
Jeremiah36:12 kochoortagei kwo kootap laitoryat, koot ne po oriit ne po siriindet; ak ki tebyei eng' olooto pounik tugul chooto ko: Elisama siriindet, Delaiah weeriitap Semaiah, Elnatan weeriitap Akbor, ak Gemaria weeriitap Sapan, ak Zedekiah weeriitap Hananiah, ak pounik tugul." 
Jeremiah36:13 Komwachi anyun Mikaia icheek ng'aleek tugul che kagas, ye kisomani Baruk bukuit kogasei piik." 
Jeremiah36:14 Koyookto anyun pounik tugul Jeudi weeriitap Netania, weeriitap Selemya, weeriitap Kusi, kwo ole mi Baruk, koleenji nam eng' eung'ung' bukuit ne kesomanjini piik kogas, ak inyoo. Konam anyun Baruk weeriitap Neriah eng' eunnyi bukuinooto, ak konyo ole mi pichooto." 
Jeremiah36:15 Ak ki leenji icheek ineendet, Tebi ng'wony anyun, ak isoman kegas. Kosoman anyun Baruk kogasei pichooto." 
Jeremiah36:16 Kingo kagogas ng'aleechooto tugul anyun, kogeerotkei eng' kaiyweisyet, ak koleenji Baruk, Kimwachini iman laitoryat ng'aleechuuto tugul." 
Jeremiah36:17 Yeityo koteebe icheek Baruk koleenji mwaiwech anyun ole ki itepte si isir ng'aleechuuto komwaei ineendet: 
Jeremiah36:18 Kowolji anyun Baruk icheek koleenji kimwaiwo ng'aleechuuto tugul, ak ki asirchi bukuit eng' wino." 
Jeremiah36:19 Yeityo komwachi pounik Baruk, koleenji, ui unygei, inyee ak Jeremiah; among' konai chii ole omi." 
Jeremiah36:20 Ki pa anyun kaplaitoryat eng' seremut; ago kiga konde bukuinooto koot ne po oriit ne po Elisama siriindet; ak ki mwachi laitoryat ng'aleechooto tugul kogas. 
Jeremiah36:21 Koyookto anyun laitoryat Jeudi kwo koip bukuit: ak ki inem eng' koot ne po oriit ne po Elisama siriindet. Ak kisooman Jeudi kogas laitoryat, ak kogas pounik tugul che kitonondos eng' ole neegitee laitoryat." 
Jeremiah36:22 Ki tebee laitoryat koot ne ki menyei eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet eng' arawetap sogool: ak kimi maat ne kilalei eng' kisigirit eng' tainnyi. 
Jeremiah36:23 Ak kingo kagosoman Jeudi kartasisyek somok anan ang'wan, kotil laitoryat eng' rotweet, ak kowiirchi maata kimi kisigirit, agoi kolal bukuit komugul kogeskei eng' maata." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ma iyweis, ama peet ngoroikwak, laitoryat, anan age eng' otwogikyik ne kigasei ng'aleechooto tugul." 
Jeremiah36:25 Ki igaigai anyun Elnatan ak Delaiah ak Gemaria laitoryat, si ma peel bukuit: ago ma kasyi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Ak ki ng'at laitoryat Jerameel weeriitap laitoryat, kobooto Seraiah weeriitap Asriel, ak Selemya weeriitap Abdeel, konam Baruk siriindet ak maotyot Jeremiah: ago kiuny `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek." 
Jeremiah36:27 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah, ko kagobeel laitoryat bukuit, ak ng'aleek che kisirei Baruk komwaei Jeremiah, koleenji" 
Jeremiah36:28 nam bukuit age kogeny, ak isirchi ng'aleechooto tugul po tai che ki mi bukuit ne po tai ne kibeelei Jehoiakim laitoryatap Judah." 
Jeremiah36:29 Ak imwa agobo Jehoiakim laitoryatap Judah ile, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ki ibeel bukuinooto, ile, Amu nee si isir, ile, Nyoonei laitoryatap Babilon iman kong'emei emoni, ak kowong' eng' olito chii ak tyony?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Jehoiakim laitoryatap Judah ko uu ni kole: Ma sichei chii ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Daudi: ak ki wiirtoi muustonyi peet kobir asiista, ak kotebee kaititindo kemoi." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ak abire ineendet ak iyotennyi, kobooto otwogikyik amu tengektonywa; ak aipchini icheek ak piik che menyei Jerusalem, kobooto piigap Judah, yaityet tugul ne ki amwa agobo icheek, ago ma kas." 
Jeremiah36:32 Ki nam anyun Jeremiah bukuit age ne mamanat, ak kogoochi Baruk siriindet, weeriitap Neriah; ne ki sirchi ng'aleek tugul che kimwaei Jeremiah che ki mi bukuit, ne kiga kobeel Jehoiakim laitoryat ne po Judah: ak ki kitesyi ng'aleek alak che chaang' che kergei ak chugiche." 
Jeremiah37:1 Ak ki laitoran Zedekiah weeriitap Josiah kogeer Konia weeriitap Jehoiakim ne ki ieet Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon koek laitoryat eng' emetap Judah. 
Jeremiah37:2 Ago ma kas ineendet, anan otwogikyik, anan piigap emet, ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kimwaei eng' maotyot Jeremiah." 
Jeremiah37:3 Ak ki iyookto Zedekiah laitoryat Jeukal weeriitap Selemya, ak Zephaniah weeriitap Maaseia tisiindet, koba kapmaotyot Jeremiah, koleenji saiywech anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah37:3 Ak ki iyookto Zedekiah laitoryat Jeukal weeriitap Selemya, ak Zephaniah weeriitap Maaseia tisiindet, koba kapmaotyot Jeremiah, koleenji saiywech anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah37:4 Kinyonei anyun Jeremiah oriit ak komandoi eng' kwenutap piik: amu kitom korat chii ineendet eng' korgoreet. 
Jeremiah37:5 Ak ki ibok lugeetap Pharaoh eng' Misiri: ak kingo kagogas Kaldeik che kiga koyiem Jerusalem ng'aleekwak, koba eng' Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah37:6 Yeityo konyonji ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Jeremiah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah37:7 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Omwachi ko uu ni laitoryatap Judah, ne kaiyokwok obwa oteepsena, oleenji: Keero, lugeetap Pharaoh, ne kanyo kotoretin, koweeksei kobendi Misiri emennywa." 
Jeremiah37:8 Ak kobwa Kaldeik kogeny, ak kobargei ak nganasani; ak koluul, ak kobeel." 
Jeremiah37:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amat oberberge, ole, Istoeneige iman Kaldeik: amu ma istogei." 
Jeremiah37:10 Amu nganda ki obar lugeet komugul ne po Kaldeik che kiboryenok, kot kong'et kityo piik che ki kiguoten eng' icheek, kota kong'eetei chii age tugul eng' emainnyi, ak kobeel nganasani." 
Jeremiah37:11 Ak kingo kagotogosta lugeetap Kaldeik koba eng' Jerusalem, amu ki iywei lugeetap Pharaoh," 
Jeremiah37:12 kwo anyun Jeremiah eng' Jerusalem agoi emetap Benjamin, kwo konam kebebertanyi eng' olooto, eng' kwenutap piik." 
Jeremiah37:13 Ak ye kimi ormariichetap Benjamin, ko ki mi agine yooto kiptaiyatap riibiik, ne ki kiguure Irija, weeriitap Selemya, weeriitap Hananiah; ak ki nam maotyot Jeremiah, koleenji iwendi onamegei ak Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah37:14 Kowolji anyun Jeremiah, koleenji lembech nooto; ma wendi kenamge ak Kaldeik; ago ma kasyi: konam anyun Irija Jeremiah, ak komutyi pounik." 
Jeremiah37:15 Ak ki nereekyi pounik Jeremiah, ak kobir, ak kotoorchi korgoreet eng' kootap Jonathan siriindet; amu kiga koyai yooto koek korgoreet." 
Jeremiah37:16 Kingo kagoit Jeremiah kootap keriinget, agoi kooriik che kigerchin piik, ak kingo kagotebee Jeremiah olooto peetuusyek che chaang';" 
Jeremiah37:17 koyookto anyun Zedekiah laitoryat kimut ineendet konyo: ak kiteepse laitoryat ineendet eng' ung'oot eng' koonnyi, koleenji tos mi ng'olyoot age tugul ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ak ki le Jeremiah, Miitei. Ki mwa kogeny kole kindein eutap laitoryatap Babilon." 
Jeremiah37:18 Ki mwachi kogeny Jeremiah Laitoryat Zedekiah koleenji, ki ayaun tengek nee, anan otwogiguk, anan pichu, kot otoorcha korgoreet?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Mi ano anyun nguno maotikwok che ki maotenwok, koleenjinok, Manyonjinin laitoryatap Babilon obargei, anan kobargei ak emoni?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Asaain anyun, ee kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, ale, kaswa soomennyu; asaain ale ameweekyo kootap Jonathan siriindet, si ma meechi olooto." 
Jeremiah37:21 Ki ng'at anyun Zedekiah laitoryat, ak ki kimut Jeremiah kwo seremutap riibiik, ak ki kigoochin magatyat eng' peetuut age tugul kobunu ooreetap piik che peelei magatiinik, agoi kogeskei magatiinik tugul eng' nganaseet. Ki tebi anyun Jeremiah ko uu nooto eng' seremutap riibiik." 
Jeremiah38:1 Ak ki kas Shepatiah weeriitap Matan ak Gedalia weeriitap Pasur, ak Jukal weeriitap Selemya, ak Pasur weeriitap Malkija, ng'aleek che ki mwachi Jeremiah piik tugul, koleenji" 
Jeremiah38:2 mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ineendet ne tebee nganasani, kebarei eng' rotwetap chok, ak eng' rubeet, ak eng' koroito: ago ineendet ne wendi kap Kaldeik kosabei ak koek sabeennyi ne kiluulei." 
Jeremiah38:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, kigoitoi iman nganasani kwo eutap lugeet ne po laitoryatap Babilon, ak koluul." 
Jeremiah38:4 Koleenji anyun pounik laitoryat, Kisoomin keele, myee kebar chiichi; amu igoochin eunegap murenigap lugeet che ng'etu eng' nganasani, konyalulyo, ak eunegap piik tugul, amu mwachin icheek ng'aleek che uu chooto: amu ma cheeng'ei chiichi chametapkei ne po pichu, ago cheeng'jin nyalilda." 
Jeremiah38:5 Ak ki le Zedekiah laitoryat, Ogeero, mi ineendet eunekwok: amu laitoryat koma chii ne imuuchi koyaiywok kiy ne ya." 
Jeremiah38:6 Konam anyun icheek Jeremiah, ak kotoorchi ineendet keriingetap Malkija weeriitap laitoryat, ne ki mi seremutap riibiik: ak kichoortae Jeremiah rogoonik. Ki ma komi peek keriingonooto, ago kimi ng'atateek: ak kirorokyi Jeremiah ng'atateek oriit." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kingo kas anyun Ebed-melek Ethiopiaindet, ne kisiror, ne ki mi kootap laitoryat, kole, kagitoorchi Jeremiah keriinget: ye ki ibuuri laitoryat eng' ormariichetap Benjamin;" 
Jeremiah38:8 komanda Ebed-melek eng' kootap laitoryat, ak komwachi laitoryat koleenji," 
Jeremiah38:9 kiptaiyandennyu laitoryat, kogoyai pichu yaityet eng' tuguuk tugul che kogoyachi maotyot Jeremiah, ne kogotoorchi keriinget; ak imuuchi kome eng' rubeet eng' ole mi: amu ma komi magatiinik eng' nganaseet." 
Jeremiah38:10 Ki ng'at anyun Laitoryat Ebed-melek Ethiopiaindet, koleenji imut eng' yu piik sosom, ak oganabu maotyot Jeremiah eng' keriinget, kotom kome." 
Jeremiah38:11 Komut anyun Ebed-melek piik, ak kwo kootap laitoryat ne mi kurereetap ole kigonoree tuguuk, ak ki inem surainik che ki koosegitu che kigelakta ak mararenik che ki koyaagitu, ak kochoortae rogoonik koba keriinget ole mi Jeremiah." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ak ki leenji Ebed-melek Ethiopiaindet, Jeremiah, Inde surainichu ki koosegitu che kigelakta, ak mararenichu ki koyaagitu kulgulweguk, ak inde rogoonik ak icheek. Ak ki yai Jeremiah ko uu nooto." 
Jeremiah38:13 Ki ichuut anyun Jeremiah eng' rogoonik, ak komut komong' eng' keriinget: ak ki tebee Jeremiah seremutap riibiik." 
Jeremiah38:14 Ki iyookto anyun Zedekiah laitoryat kimut maotyot Jeremiah, kwo ole mi ineendet agoi ole kimandoe ne po somok ne ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak ki mwachi laitoryat Jeremiah koleenji, amache ateebenen kiy; ameung'ena kiy." 
Jeremiah38:15 Komwachi anyun Jeremiah Zedekiah, koleenji, ngot amwaun kioto, kotos mebara iman? Ak ngot amwaun kiy ne toretin, ko megasa." 
Jeremiah38:16 Ki iyasyechi anyun Zedekiah laitoryat Jeremiah eng' ung'oot, koleenji, ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne kiyaiywech sabooniito, koma parin, amandein eutap pichu cheeng'ei saboondang'ung'." 
Jeremiah38:17 Ki leenji anyun Jeremiah Zedekiah, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po Israel, kole: Ngot igoochigei eunegap pounigap laitoryatap Babilon, isabe, ama kibeelei nganasani; ak isap kobooto koong'ung'." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ago ngot ko mewe indegei eunegap pounigap laitoryatap Babilon, kindoi anyun nganasani eutap Kaldeik, ak kobeel, amechilili eng' eunekwak." 
Jeremiah38:19 Ak ki leenji Zedekiah laitoryat Jeremiah, Aiywei Yahudik che ki konamgei ak Kaldeik, si ma indea eunekwak, ak kochota." 
Jeremiah38:20 Ago ki le Jeremiah, Ma igoitoin. Kasain ale, kas kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' chuuto amwaun: si kobiit komyeeit eng' inyee, ak kosap saboondang'ung'." 
Jeremiah38:21 Ago ngot ieesye iwe, ko ni ng'olyoot ne kagoboorwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Keero, kimuti kwonyiik tugul che ng'etu eng' kootap laitoryatap Judah koba konyoor pounigap laitoryatap Babilon, ak mwaei kwonyichooto kole, kagoberberin choronoguk che ingen, ak kagoterterin: kagorat anyun ng'atateek keelyeguk, kagoweigei let icheek." 
Jeremiah38:23 Ak komut osotiguk tugul komong' ak lagoguk komutyi Kaldeik: amechililee eunekwak, ago namin laitoryatap Babilon: ak igoite nganasani kebeel." 
Jeremiah38:24 Koleenji anyun Zedekiah Jeremiah, Amengonai chii ng'aleechu, si memeei." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ago ngot kogas pounik kole kageng'alaal tuwai, ak kobwonjin koleenjin, Mwaiwech nguno kiit ne kemwachi laitoryat; ameung'enech, si ma ki parin: ak imwaiwech kogeny kiit ne kamwaun laitoryat:" 
Jeremiah38:26 ileenji icheek anyun, Koaipchini laitoryat soomennyu, ale, si ma weekyo kootap Jonathan, si ma mee eng' olooto." 
Jeremiah38:27 Ki pwa anyun pounik tugul kap Jeremiah, ak koteebe ineendet: ak ki mwachi ko uu ng'aleechooto tugul che koga ng'at laitoryat. Kobagaakta anyun, mata kong'alaal ak ineendet; ago ma naak ng'olyoondonooto." 
Jeremiah38:28 Ki tebee anyun Jeremiah seremutap riibiik agoi peetuut ne ki kiluule Jerusalem. 
Jeremiah39:1 Ak kingo kageluul Jerusalem (eng' kenyiitap sogool ne po Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah, eng' arawetap taman, konyo Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon kobooto lugeennyi tugul kobookyi Jerusalem, ak koyiem;" 
Jeremiah39:2 ki kibut nganasanooto eng' kenyiitap taman ak agenge ne po Zedekiah, eng' arawet ne po ang'wan, eng' peetuutap sogool ne po arawanooto:)" 
Jeremiah39:3 kobwa anyun neganaset oriit pounik tugul che po laitoryatap Babilon, ak kotebee ormariichet ne po kween, chooto ko Nergal-sareser, Samgar-ne po, Sarsekim, Rap-saris, Nergal-saresar, Reb-mag, kobooto pounik tugul alak che ki ng'et che po laitoryatap Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:4 Ak kingo keer Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah ak murenik tugul che po lugeet, pichooto, komwei komanda eng' nganaseet kemoi, kobun ooreetap mbareetap laitoryat, eng' ormariichet ne ki mi kwenutap inatusyek aeng': ak kimandae ooreetap Arabah." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ago ki isup icheek lugeetap Kaldeik, ak ki namji Zedekiah warengetap Jeriko: ak kingo kagonam ineendet, komutyi Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon ne ki mi Ribla eng' emetap Hamath, ak ki irwookyi ineendet." 
Jeremiah39:6 Ki par anyun laitoryatap Babilon weeriigap Zedekiah eng' Ribla, kogeerei ineendet: ki par kogeny laitoryatap Babilon piik che taagunotiin tugul che po Judah." 
Jeremiah39:7 Ki par kogeny konyegap Zedekiah, ak korate mugurek si komut kwo Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:8 Ak ki peel Kaldeik kootap laitoryat, ak kooriigap piik, ak kobut irimoigap Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah39:9 Yeityo komut Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik, piik che kiga ng'et eng' nganaseet koba Babilon koek luulenik, kobooto piik che ki mwei eng' nganaseet konamgei ak ineendet, kobooto piik che kiga ng'et." 
Jeremiah39:10 Ago ki pagaakta Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik, alak che po piik che kibananook, che ki ma kotinyei kiy, eng' emetap Judah, ak kogoochi icheek mbareenigap sabibuk kobooto mbareenik eng' peetuunooto." 
Jeremiah39:11 Ki ng'at anyun Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik, agobo Jeremiah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah39:12 imut ineendet ak iriip komyee, ameyachi kiy ne ya; ago yachi ko uu ye mwaun ineendet." 
Jeremiah39:13 Ki iyookto anyun Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik, kobooto Nebusasban, Rab-saris, ak Nergal-saresar ak Rab-mag, ak kiptainik tugul che eecheen che po laitoryatap Babilon;" 
Jeremiah39:14 ki iyookto kimut Jeremiah komong' eng' seremutap riibiik, ak konde ineendet eutap Gedalia weeriitap Aikam, weeriitap Sapan, si kobiit komut ineendet kwo kaa: kimeng'iis anyun eng' kwenutap piik." 
Jeremiah39:15 Ki nyoonji anyun `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah, ye kigerat eng' seremutap riibiik, koleenji," 
Jeremiah39:16 ui, ak ing'alaalji Ebed-melek Ethiopiaindet, ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Keero, aipchini ng'aleekyuk nganasani agobo yaityet, ma agobo myeeindo; ak isuldoi eng' taing'ung' eng' peetuunooto." 
Jeremiah39:17 Ago asaruun eng' peetuunooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ama kigoochinin eunegap piik che iywei." 
Jeremiah39:18 Amu asaruun iman, ama kibarin eng' rotwetap chok, ago iluule sabeeng'ung' kobunjiin: amu ki imang'wa, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah40:1 Ki nyoonji Jeremiah `ng'olyoot ne ki punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye kingo kagotyach Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik kwo eng' Ramah, ye kiga komut ineendet ko rataat eng' nyororosyek kobooto luulenik tugul che po Jerusalem ak Judah, che kiga kiluul koba Babilon." 
Jeremiah40:2 Ki nam anyun kiptaiyatap riibiik Jeremiah, ak koleenji, ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' yaityoni agobo olito;" 
Jeremiah40:3 ak kagoip yaityonooto konyo, ak koyai ko uu ye ki mwa; amu ki oyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto, ama ogas iit kutinnyi, kagonyonjok anyun kiito." 
Jeremiah40:4 Keer anyuno, katyachin rani eng' nyororosyek che mi eung'ung'. Ngot igeer ile myee keebe tuwai Babilon, inyoo keebe, ak ariibin komyee; ago ngot igeere ile ya keebe tuwai Babilon, itebi: keero, mi emoni tugul taing'ung'; ole igeere ile myee ak konyaaljinin iwe, iwe yooto." 
Jeremiah40:5 Ak ye ki tomo koweek, kole weege anyun kap Gedalia weeriitap Aikam weeriitap Sapan, ne kigonde laitoryatap Babilon koek pounindet koba nganasoogap Judah, ak komeng'iis kobooto piik: anan iwe oldo age tugul ole igeere ile nyoljinin iwe. Ki igoochi anyun kiptaiyatap riibiik amitwogik ineendet ak kagoochinet ak kounda kwo." 
Jeremiah40:6 Ki wo anyun Jeremiah kap Gedalia weeriitap Aikam eng' Mispa, ak komeng'iis kobooto ineendet eng' kwenutap piik che kiga ng'et eng' emet." 
Jeremiah40:7 Ak kingo kas kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek che ki mi emotinwek, icheeget ak murenikwak, kole, kogonde laitoryatap Babilon Gedalia weeriitap Aikam koek pounindet eng' emet, ak kogonde eunnyi murenik, ak kwonyiik, ak lagok, ak piik alak che ki kibananook miising' eng' emet, che po icheek che ki ma kiluul koba Babilon;" 
Jeremiah40:8 kobwa anyun kap Gedalia eng' Mispa, icheeget ko, Ishmael weeriitap Netania, ak Johanan ak Jonathan weeriigap Karea, ak Seraiah weeriitap Tanumet, ak weeriigap Epai Netopatindet, ak Jesania weeriitap Maakatindet, icheeget kobooto murenikwak." 
Jeremiah40:9 Ak ki iyasyechi Gedalia weeriitap Aikam weeriitap Sapan pichooto ak murenikwak, koleenji, amoiywei oot Kaldeik: omeng'iisye eng' emet, ak oot laitoryatap Babilon, si komyeeit eng' okweek." 
Jeremiah40:10 Ago amenye anee Mispa, si kobiit atonone taitap Kaldeik, che pwonjinech: ago oyum okweek divaik, logoegap kemei, ak mwanik, ak onde tereenikwok, omeny nganasookwok che koonam." 
Jeremiah40:11 Ko uu nooto, kingo kas Yahudik tugul che ki mi Moab, ak che ki mi ak lagogap Ammon, ak che ki mi Edom, kobooto che ki mi emotinwek tugul, kole, ki kobagaach laitoryatap Babilon piik che ki ng'et eng' Judah, ak kole, ki konde Gedalia weeriitap Aikam weeriitap Sapan koboi icheek;" 
Jeremiah40:12 koweek anyun Yahudik tugul eng' komoswek tugul ole kiga ki oonji, ak ki pwa emetap Judah, ole mi Gedalia, eng' Mispa, ak ki iyum divaik ak logoek che chaang' che po kemei." 
Jeremiah40:13 Ki pwa kogeny Johanan weeriitap Karea, ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek che ki miitei emotinwek, kap Gedalia eng' Mispa," 
Jeremiah40:14 ak koleenji tos ingen ile ki iyook Baalis laitoryatap lagogap Ammon Ishmael weeriitap Netania kobarin? Ago ma iyan Gedalia weeriitap Aikam ng'aleekwak. 
Jeremiah40:15 Kong'alaalji anyun eng' ung'oot, Johanan weeriitap Karea Gedalia eng' Mispa, koleenji, kaigai, ichamwo awo abar Ishmael weeriitap Netania, ama naei chii: amu nee anyun si kobarin, si koyesta Yahudik tugul che ki koyumjingei, ak kobek che ki ng'et che po Judah?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Ago ki leenji Gedalia weeriitap Aikam Johanan weeriitap Karea, Ma myee iyai kiito: amu imwae lembech agobo Ishmael." 
Jeremiah41:1 Ki nyo anyun Ishmael weeriitap Netania weeriitap Elisama ne po iyoteetap kaplaitoryat, kobooto kiptaiyat age ne oo ne po laitoryat, ak piik taman che ki mi kobooto ineendet, eng' arawetap tisap, kap Gedalia weeriitap Aikam eng' Mispa; ak ki amis tugul eng' olooto eng' Mispa." 
Jeremiah41:2 Ki ng'et anyun Ishmael weeriitap Netania, ak pichooto taman ki mi kobooto ineendet ak koep Gedalia weeriitap Aikam weeriitap Sapan eng' rotwetap chok, ak kobar, ne kiga konde laitoryatap Babilon koek pounindetap emet." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ki par Ishmael kogeny Yahudik tugul che ki mi kobooto Gedalia eng' Mispa, kobooto Kaldeik che ki kinyoorchi olooto, chooto ko piigap lugeet." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng' ko kagobar ineendet Gedalia, ama nai chii," 
Jeremiah41:5 kobwa piik alage kobunu Shekem, Shiloh, ak Samaria, piik tamanwogik sisiit, che kiga konem tamnokwak ak kogereer ngoroikwak, ko kagotilgei, ak koibu kagoochinoik ak tuguuk che nyamdut eng' eunekwak, koibu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ak ki wo Ishmael weeriitap Netania eng' Mispa kotorookto icheek, koriiroti eng' ooreet kowendi: ak kingo kagotuiyo ak icheek koleenji, obwa kap Gedalia weeriitap Aikam." 
Jeremiah41:7 Ak kingo kagoit kwenutap nganaseet, kobar Ishmael weeriitap Netania pichooto, ak kowiirchi keriinget, ineendet ak murenik che ki mi ak ineendet." 
Jeremiah41:8 Ago ki piit piik tamanu eng' kwenunnywa che ki mwachi Ishmael koleenji, amebarech: amu ki tinyei tuguuk che ki kiuny eng' mbar, nganuuk, ak baale, ak mwanik, ak kumyat. Kobagaakta anyun, mata kobar icheek eng' kwenutap tupchosyekwak." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ki inyiit anyun Ishmael weeriitap Netania keriingonooto piik che kiga kebar, keriinget ne kiga kowiirchi Ishmael muuswek tugul che po piik che kiga kobar, ki wiirchi ole neegitee Gedalia (keriingonooto ko ne kibaalei laitoryat Asa amu ki iywei Baasha laitoryatap Israel)." 
Jeremiah41:10 Yeityo komut Ishmael piik tugul che ki ng'et eng' Mispa koek luulenik, agot tiibiigap laitoryat, kobooto piik tugul che ki ng'et eng' Mispa che kiga konde Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik eutap Gedalia weeriitap Aikam: ki imut Ishmael weeriitap Netania pichooto koek luulenik, ak koba kaplagogap Ammon." 
Jeremiah41:11 Ago ye kingo kas Johanan weeriitap Karea ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek che ki mi kobooto ineendet, yaityet tugul ne kiga koyai Ishmael weeriitap Netania," 
Jeremiah41:12 komut anyun piik tugul, koba kobargei ak Ishmael weeriitap Netania, ak kinyoorchi ineendet ole neegitee peek che chaang' che mi Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:13 Kingo keer anyun piik tugul che ki mi kobooto Ishmael Johanan weeriitap Karea, ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek, che ki mi kobooto ineendet, kogaskei anyun miising'." 
Jeremiah41:14 Kiwelelgei anyun piik tugul che kiga komut Ishmael eng' Mispa koek luulenik, koweek koba ole mi Johanan weeriitap Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Ago kichilil Ishmael weeriitap Netania eng' Johanan kobooto piikyik sisiit, ak koba kaplagogap Ammon." 
Jeremiah41:16 Komut anyun Johanan weeriitap Karea ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek che ki mi kobooto ineendet, piik tugul che ki ng'et eng' piik che kiga koweech ineendet eng' Ishmael weeriitap Netania, eng' Mispa, ye kingo kagobar Gedalia weeriitap Aikam, piigap lugeet, ak kwonyiik, ak lagok, ak kiptainik che kiga komut kogeny eng' Gibeon:" 
Jeremiah41:17 ak ki pa komeny Gerut Kimham, ne mi ole neegitee Bethlehem, si kobiit koba agoi Misiri," 
Jeremiah41:18 amu Kaldeik: amu ki iywei icheek, amu kiga kobar Ishmael weeriitap Netania, Gedalia weeriitap Aikam, ne ki inde laitoryatap Babilon koek pounindetap emet." 
Jeremiah42:1 Ki riik anyun kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek, ak Johanan weeriitap Karea, ak Jesania weeriitap Hosaia, ak piik tugul kong'etee ne ming'in agoi ne oo," 
Jeremiah42:2 ak koleenji maotyot Jeremiah, Kisoomin keele, kaswech soomennyo, ak saiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', acheek tugul che ki king'etu; amu ki king'etu piik che ng'ering' eng' piik che chaang', ko uu ye igeerech:" 
Jeremiah42:3 si kobiit koboorwech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' ooreet ne kanyool kebendatee, ak kiit ne kanyool keyai." 
Jeremiah42:4 Koleenji anyun `maotyot Jeremiah icheek, Kaagasak; ogeero, asaae Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' ko uu ng'aleekwok; ak kiit age tugul ne wolwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amwaiwok kioto; ma ung'enok kiy." 
Jeremiah42:5 Ki mwachi anyun `icheek Jeremiah koleenji, ingoek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paoryat ne po iman ak ko ne kiyani eng' kwenunnyo, ngot koma ki yai ko uu ng'olyoot age tugul ne kaiyogunenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' iibwech." 
Jeremiah42:6 Ngo ng'olyoo ne myee, anan ngo ne ya, kegase iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo, ne kiyooktochinin; si kobiit komyeeit eng' acheek, ye ki kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah42:7 Ak kingo pata peetuusyek tamanu, konyonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah." 
Jeremiah42:8 Ki kuur anyun ineendet Johanan weeriitap Karea, ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek che ki mi kobooto ineendet ak piik tugul kong'etee ne ming'in agoi ne oo," 
Jeremiah42:9 ak koleenji icheek, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel ne ki oyooktocha aip soomeng'wong' kwo tainnyi, kole:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Ngot kota omeny emoni, ateechok anyun, ama abutok, ak aminak, ama atutok: amu kaawal kabwaatutikyuk eng' yaityet ne koayaiywok." 
Jeremiah42:11 Amoiywei laitoryatap Babilon, ne oiywei; amoiywei ineendet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu ami kobootok, si asarwok, ak atyachak eng' eunnyi." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ak agoonok rireenet, si kobiit koriirenak ineendet ak kogoonok oweege obe emeng'wong'." 
Jeremiah42:13 Ago ngot omwa ole, Ma ki menye emoni; kot ko mogas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'," 
Jeremiah42:14 omwae oleen, Achicha; kibendi emetap Misiri, ole ma kigeere lugeet, ama kigase iryageet, ama amech rubeet; ak kemeny olooto:" 
Jeremiah42:15 ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee okweek che ki ong'etu che oo po Judah; mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole ngot ogiiljige otokyigei Misiri, ak obe otebee olooto;" 
Jeremiah42:16 konamak anyun eng' olooto, eng' emetap Misiri, rotwetap chok ne oiywei, ak kosubok rubeet ne oiywei koriichak eng' olooto eng' Misiri; ak obekyi olooto." 
Jeremiah42:17 Igeitu nooto eng' piik tugul che tokyingei Misiri kobendi kotebee olooto; pegu eng' rotwetap chok ak eng' rubeet, ak eng' koroito: ak ma mi agot agenge eng' icheek ne ng'etu anan ne chilili eng' yaityet ne aipchini." 
Jeremiah42:18 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole; Ko uu ye kigeroong'ji nereegekyuk ak nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, piik che menyei Jerusalem, keroong'jinok anyun ko uu nooto nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, ye obe Misiri: ak oegu che kichubei, ak che kikwong'ee ak che kisasei, ak che kichotei; ama ogeere olito kogeny." 
Jeremiah42:19 Kagong'alaal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek, ee okweek che ki ong'etu che oo po Judah, kole amobe Misiri: onai komyee ole kaabaoryanwok rani." 
Jeremiah42:20 Amu ki oyachi kaberberisyet saboonwekwok; amu ki oyookto awo ye mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ole, Saiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo; ak imwaiwech ko uu tugul che mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, si keyai:" 
Jeremiah42:21 ak kaamwaiwok ng'aleechooto rani; ago ma ogas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong' eng' kiy age tugul ne kogoyogunena amwaiwok. 
Jeremiah42:22 Onai anyun komyee ole, obegu eng' rotwetap chok, ak eng' rubeet, ak eng' koroito, eng' ole omache obe otebee." 
Jeremiah43:1 Ak ye kingo kagogees Jeremiah ng'alaalet ne ki ng'alaaljin piik tugul ng'aleek tugul che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, che kiga koyooktoe Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ineendet komwachi icheek ng'aleechooto tugul," 
Jeremiah43:2 komwa anyun Azariah weeriitap Hosaia, ak Johanan weeriitap Karea, ak piik tugul che meniotin, koleenji Jeremiah, “Imwae lembech. Ma iyogun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo inyoo imwa ile, ‘Mobendi Misiri otebee olooto’;" 
Jeremiah43:3 ago kaiberberin Baruk weeriitap Neriah si kogirindech, si kobiit kondeech eutap Kaldeik, si kobarech, ak komutech keebe Babilon keegu luulenik. ”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Ma kas iit anyun kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Johanan weeriitap Karea, ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek, ak piik tugul, si kobiit komeny emetap Judah." 
Jeremiah43:5 Ago ki imut Johanan weeriitap Karea ak kiptainik tugul che po lugoosyek piik tugul che ki ng'et che ki po Judah, che ki weeksei kobunu pororyosyek tugul ole kiga ki oonji, kobwa kotebee Judah;" 
Jeremiah43:6 murenik, ak kwonyiik, ak lagok ak tiibiigap laitoryat, ak chii age tugul ne kiga kobagaach Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik kobagakyi Gedalia weeriitap Aikam, weeriitap Sapan, ak maotyot Jeremiah, ak Baruk weeriitap Neriah;" 
Jeremiah43:7 ak kiit emetap Misiri; amu ki ma kas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak ki pwa agoi Tapanes. 
Jeremiah43:8 Yeityo konyonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jeremiah eng' Tapanes, koleenji," 
Jeremiah43:9 Nam koik che eecheen, ak iung'e matubaruuk oriit eng' ole kiyae matubaruuk, ne mi ole kibunei kebendi kootap Pharaoh eng' Tapanes, kogeerei piigap Judah;" 
Jeremiah43:10 ak ileenji icheek, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Ogeero, ayooktoi kimut Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, otwogindennyu, ak ande ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet paragutap koichu kaauny; ak koiitae paragutap koichooto emainnyi ne po laitornatet." 
Jeremiah43:11 Ak konyo kobar emetap Misiri; che po meet kobendi meet, ak che po luuleet, kobendi luuleet, ak che po rotwetap chok, kobendi rotwetap chok." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ak alaal maat eng' kooriigap kanamonigap Misiri; ak kobeel ineendet kanamonichooto, ak koip: ak kolaach emetap Misiri, ko uu ye ilaachi mestowot ngoryennyi; ak kwo eng' olooto eng' kaalyeet." 
Jeremiah43:13 Putei kogeny tolochigap Beth-shemesh, ne mi emetap Misiri; ak kobeel kooriigap kanamonigap Misiri." 
Jeremiah44:1 Ki nyoonji ng'olyoot Jeremiah agobo Yahudik tugul che ki menyei emetap Misiri, che ki menyei Migdok, ak Tapanes, ak Nop, ak emetap Patros, koleenji," 
Jeremiah44:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole: Ki ogeer yaityet tugul ne ki apchi Jerusalem, ak nganasook tugul che po Judah; ak ogeero, karatwek rani nganasochooto, ama mi chii ne menyei olooto;" 
Jeremiah44:3 amu yaityennywa ne ki koyai kotacha anereech, amu ki pa kobeel nyamdutik, koot kamuktaik che ki ma kongen, icheeget, anan okweek, anan kwanisyekwok." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ago ki ayookwok otwogikyuk tugul, che maotik, ang'eete karon miising' ak ayoogu, aleenjinok, “Amat oyai kiito samis ne aweche.”" 
Jeremiah44:5 Ago ma kas, anan koep iit si kobiit koweek kometo yaityennywa, si mata kobeelji nyamdutik kamuktaik che teer." 
Jeremiah44:6 Kirong'kei anyun nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, ak kong'waanityi nganasoogap Judah ak eng' ortinwek che po Jerusalem; ak ki koek karatwek ak kigoguber ko uu kiit ne uu peetuusyechu." 
Jeremiah44:7 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Amu nee si oyachi saboonwekwok yaityoni oo, si kobiit kigeesunenok muren ak kwony, lakwa ak ne reryei, komong' eng' Judah, si ma ng'etwok agot agenge;" 
Jeremiah44:8 amu otagena poisyonigap eunekwok, obeeljini nyamdutik kamuktaik eng' emetap Misiri, ole ki obe otebee; si kobiit kigeswok, ak oegu che kisasei ak che kichotei eng' pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Tos ki outye yaitwogigap kwanisyekwok, ak yaitwogigap laitorinigap Judah, ak yaitwogigap osotikwak, ak yaitwogikwok, ak yaitwogigap osotikwok, che ki yai eng' emetap Judah, ak eng' ortinwegap Jerusalem?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Ma iming'ingei agoi rani, anan koiyweis, anan kobendatee ng'atuutikyuk, anan kayomisutikyuk, che ki ande taing'wong', ak eng' taitap kwanisyekwok." 
Jeremiah44:11 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Ogeero, atokyinok togeennyu aibwok yaityet, agoi ageesu Judah tugul." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ak anam che ng'etu che po Judah, che kitokyigei emetap Misiri, koba kotebee olooto, ak kigeesu icheek tugul: ibutos eng' emetap Misiri; kigeesu icheek eng' rotwetap chok ak eng' rubeet; pegu icheek, kong'etee ne ming'in agoi ne oo, eng' rotwetap chok ak eng' rubeet: ak koek che kichubei, ak che kikwong'ee, ak che kisasei, ak che kichotei." 
Jeremiah44:13 Amu abire icheek che menyei emetap Misiri, ko uu ye ki abir Jerusalem, eng' rotwetap chok, ak eng' rubeet, ak eng' koroito;" 
Jeremiah44:14 kot koma chilil anan kong'et agot agenge eng' che kiga ng'et che po Judah, che ki pa emetap Misiri, kotebee olooto, kole koweek kobwa emetap Judah, emet ne machei kole koweekyigei koba komeny: amu ma piitu ne weechigei kobatee ne chilili." 
Jeremiah44:15 Ki wol anyun murenik tugul che ki ingen kole kibeeljin osotikwak nyamdutik kamuktaik che teer, ak kwonyiik tugul che kitonondos eng' ole neegit, che kituiyet ne oo, agot piik tugul che ki menyei emetap Misiri, eng' Patros, kowolji Jeremiah koleenji," 
Jeremiah44:16 Ma kigasun ng'olyoondonooto kemwaiwech eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Jeremiah44:17 Ago kiyae iman ng'olyoot age tugul ne kagemwa, keele kibeeljini nyamdutik laitoryatap kipsengwet, ne kwondo, ak keroong'jini ineendet kagoochinoik che kieei, ko uu ye ki keyai, acheek ak kwanisyekyok ak laitorinikyok, ak pounikyok, eng' nganasoogap Judah, ak eng' ortinwek che po Jerusalem: amu ki kitinye eng' peetuusyechooto amitwogik che chaang', ak ki kichamegei, ama ki keer yeityo." 
Jeremiah44:18 Ago kobooch ngap kebagaakte kebeelji nyamdutik laitoryatap kipsengwet ne kwondo, ak keroong'jini kagoochinoik che kieei, korarwech tuguuk tugul, ak kigeswech eng' rotwetap chok ak rubeet." 
Jeremiah44:19 Ak ye ki kibeeljini nyamdutik laitoryatap kipsengwet ne kwondo, ak keroong'jini kagoochinoik che kieei, tos ma kikwang'kwang'ji magatiinik che kilasune ineendet, ak keroong'ji kagoochinoik che kieei, koma pooto manong'otaikyok?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Ki mwachi anyun Jeremiah piik tugul, murenik, ak kwonyiik, agot piik tugul che kiga kowolji, koleenji," 
Jeremiah44:21 Tos ki ma ibwaat `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek ama chut metinnyi, nyamdutik che ki obeele eng' nganasoogap Judah, ak eng' ortinwek che po Jerusalem, okweek ak kwanisyekwok, laitorinikwok, ak pounikwok, ak piigap emet," 
Jeremiah44:22 kot ko mata komuuch Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komuita, amu yaityetap poisyonikwok, ak amu tuguuk che kiwechei che ki oyai? Ki ek anyun emeng'wong' ne kuberot, ak ne kikwong'ee, ak ne kisasei, ama menyei chii, ko uu ye uu rani." 
Jeremiah44:23 Amu ki obeel nyamdutik, ak amu ki oyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto, ama ogas iit kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anan obendate ng'atuutikyik, anan kayomisutikyik, anan paornatosyekyik; konyonjok anyun yaityoni ko uu ye uu rani." 
Jeremiah44:24 Ki mwachi kogeny `Jeremiah piik tugul, kobooto kwonyiik tugul, koleenji: Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek Judah tugul che omi emetap Misiri:" 
Jeremiah44:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole, ki omwa eng' kutusweekwok, okweek kobooto osotikwok, ak oyai kosulda, eng' eunekwok, oleen, Kiyae iman kaarorunosyek che ki kiaroru, kebeelji nyamdutik laitoryatap kipsengwet ne kwondo, ak keroong'ji kagoochinoik che kieei: ogimiit anyun kaarorunosyekwok, ak oyai kaarorunosyekwok." 
Jeremiah44:26 Ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek piigap Judah tugul che omenye emetap Misiri: Ogeero, koayosye eng' kainennyu ne oo, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ale, ma komwaei kainennyu chii age tugul ne po Judah eng' emet tugul ne po Misiri, kole, ko uu ye sabei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah44:27 Ogeero, ariibe icheek agobo yaityet, ma agobo ne myee: ak kigeesu murenik tugul che po Judah che mi emetap Misiri, eng' rotwetap chok ak eng' rubeet, agoi kogeskei." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ak koweigei icheek che chililee rotwetap chok komong' eng' emetap Misiri, kobwa Judah, che ng'ering'; ak konai tugul che ki kong'et che po Judah, che ki pa emetap Misiri koba kotebee olooto, kole ng'olyootap ng'oo ne isuldoi, nenyu anan nenywa." 
Jeremiah44:29 Ak ni kaboorunet eng' okweek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ale kabirok eng' olito, si onai ole isuldoi iman ng'aleekyuk koibwok yaityet:" 
Jeremiah44:30 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, andoi Pharaoh Hopra laitoryatap Misiri, eutap puunikyik, ak eutap icheeget che cheeng'ei saboondanyi; ko uu ye ki ande Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah, eutap Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, punyondennyi, ak ko ne ki cheeng'ei saboondanyi." 
Jeremiah45:1 Ki mwachi `maotyot Jeremiah Baruk weeriitap Neriah, ng'olyoot ye kisirchin bukuit ng'aleechu komwaei Jeremiah, eng' kenyiitap ang'wan ne po Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah laitoryatap Judah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah45:2 Mwaun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, inyee ee Baruk, ko uu ni kole:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Ki imwa ile, pwo eng' anee! Amu kagotesyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor arageneet ng'wanindanyu; kaang'et amu tigenoikyuk, amanyooru kamuung'et." 
Jeremiah45:4 Mwachi anyun ineendet ko uu ni, ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni kole: Keero, abute ne ki ateech, ak atutu ne ki amin; ak ayae niito eng' emet komugul." 
Jeremiah45:5 Ko tos, icheeng'jinigei inyee tuguuk che eecheen? Amecheeng': amu, keero, aipchini yaityet piik tugul, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ago agoonin saboondang'ung' koek luuleneng'ung' eng' komoswek tugul ole iwendi." 
Jeremiah46:1 Ki nyoonji maotyot Jeremiah ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo pororyosyek. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ng'aleegap Misiri: agobo lugeetap Pharaoh-neko laitoryatap Misiri, ne ki mi ole neegitee aineet Yufrets eng' Karkemish, ne ki par Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon eng' kenyiitap ang'wan ne po Jehoiakim weeriitap Josiah, laitoryatap Judah." 
Jeremiah46:3 Ochop long'onik che mengech ak che eecheen ak ooriikyi lugeet. 
Jeremiah46:4 Ochop paraisisyek ak olaany, okweek che olaanye paraisisyek, ak otononse ko kaolaach chepkuloikwak che po lugeet; osit ng'otwek, ak olaach ngoroigap lugeet." 
Jeremiah46:5 Amu nee si ageere ko uu nooto? Aragendos ak koweechegei let; kagetuatui piikwak che kiimeen, ak kagomwei kochaakta, ama kusegong': mi kamuiset komosta age tugul, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah46:6 Amat komwei ne chepchep, anan kochilil chiito ne nyigan; ki konachkei ak kobutyo eng' murot kaataam ne po ole neegitee aineetap Yufrets." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ng'oo ni ng'eetei ko uu aineet, ne wasegei peekyik ko uu ainoosyek?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ng'eetei Misiri ko uu aineet, ak wasegei peekyik ko uu ainoosyek: ak leen, Ang'eete ak atuch emet; ang'eme nganaseet ak piik che menyei olooto." 
Jeremiah46:9 Otogoste, okweek, paraisisyek; ak ochakte okweek, kariigap lugeet; ak ingoba piik che nyigoonen: Kush ak Put, che tinyei long'onik; ak Ludik, che tinyei kwangok ak kong'iei." 
Jeremiah46:10 Amu po peetuunooto Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, peetuutap yaaktaetap mugetuut, si koyaaktoochi ineendet mugetuut eng' puunikyik: ak koamis rotwetap chok ak kobiyo, ak koeei korotiikwak kobiyo: amu tinyei Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, tiseiywot eng' emetap murot kaataam ole neegitee aineetap Yufrets." 
Jeremiah46:11 Togoste Gilead ak iip mwanik che kinyaise, ee pergeiyandani, cheptap Misiri: iboisyee kerichek che chaang' puch; mesabe." 
Jeremiah46:12 Ki kogas pororyosyek agobo teweernateng'ung', ak kigonyi emoni riireguk: amu kagonach chiito ne nyigan ne nyigan, kagobutyo tuwai." 
Jeremiah46:13 Ni ng'olyoot ne ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Jeremiah, kole nyoonei Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon ak kobar emetap Misiri." 
Jeremiah46:14 Omwaite eng' Misiri, ak obarte eng' Migdol, ak obarte eng' Nop ak eng' Tapanes: oleenji, Otononse, ochopkei; amu kagoamis rotwetap chok eng' tabanweguk." 
Jeremiah46:15 Amu nee si kibukto cheguuk che kiimeen? Ma tononso, amu ki oon Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah46:16 Ki riich che chaang', ee, ki ibutyi age paragutap age: ak ki le, Ong'eetyee, ongebe kogeny oldap piikyok, agoi emet ne ki kisikyinech kemwee rotwetap chok ne usiisyei." 
Jeremiah46:17 Kiwookyo eng' olooto kole polateet kityo Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri; ki kobagakta kosiirto peetuut ne kiga kichop. 
Jeremiah46:18 Mwaei Laitoryat ne kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kole, Ko uu ye asabe, nyoonei iman ineendet ko uu Tabor eng' tuloonook, ak ko uu Karmel eng' ole neegitee nyanjet." 
Jeremiah46:19 Ee inyee chepto ne imenye Misiri, monorsechigei si iwe keluulin: amu egu Nop karaatya, ak kebeel, ama mi chii ne menyei." 
Jeremiah46:20 Rooryat ne karaaran miising' Misiri; ago kagonyo ng'emisyet ne punu murot kaataam, kagonyo." 
Jeremiah46:21 Uu kogeny piikyik che kesirei che mi kwenunnyi moek che neryootiin; amu kagoweigei let ak icheek, kagomwei tugul, ma tononso: amu kanyonji icheek peetuutap nyalildanywa, peetuut ne kibirei." 
Jeremiah46:22 Wendi kutinnyi ko uu ereneet; amu pendi ak lugeet, ak kobookyine ineendet aonok, ko uu piik che ebei keetiik." 
Jeremiah46:23 Iluuli osnennyi, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, agot ngo ma kimuuchi kisyach; amu chaang' kosiir chereng'enyinik, ama iitoksei." 
Jeremiah46:24 Kiteweeri cheptap Misiri; kindoi eutap piigap murot kaataam. 
Jeremiah46:25 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Ogeero, abire Ammon ne po No, ak Pharaoh, ak Misiri, kobooto kamuktaikyik, ak laitorinikyik; chooto ko Pharaoh ak icheeget che imang'u ineendet:" 
Jeremiah46:26 ak andoi icheek eutap icheeget che cheeng'ei saboonwekwak, ak eutap Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, ak eutap otwogikyik; ye ibata kemeny ko uu peetuusyek che po keny, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah46:27 Ago meiywei, ee Jakobo otwogindennyu, anan iaragen, ee Israel; amu, keero, asaruun eng' ole loo, ak asaru iyoteng'ung' eng' emet ne ki kiluulji; ak koweek Jakobo, ak komuuny ak kotebee kaalyeet, ama mi chii ne imui." 
Jeremiah46:28 Meiywei, ee Jakobo otwogindennyu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ami kobooten: amu ageesu pororyosyek tugul che kigaonjin, ago magesun; ago atigoonin eng' kirwooget, amabagaaktoin ama kibirin." 
Jeremiah47:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Jeremiah agobo Philistik, kotomo kobar Pharaoh Gaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, Tesoksei peek kobunu murot kaataam kot koek kereruut aineet ne chwaldoi, ak kochwalda emet ak tugul che mi olooto, nganaseet kobooto che menyei olooto: ak koriiryo murenik, ak kowaakyo piik tugul che menyei emet." 
Jeremiah47:3 Ye kas kirgirenetap keelyegap paraisisyegap piikyik che kiimeen, eng' rwaetap kariisyekyik che po lugeet, eng' cheetap keelyegap kariisyekyik, magusyin kong' kwanisyek lagokwak amu nyalulnatetap eunek;" 
Jeremiah47:4 amu peetuut ne nyoonei koluulei Philistik tugul, si koisto eng' Tyro ak Sidon toretindet age tugul ne ng'etu: amu luulei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Philistik, che ki ng'et che po ngeguutap Kaptor." 
Jeremiah47:5 Kanyonji Gaza poosto; kagiges Askelon, che ki ng'et che po atebweetap Mediterenian: iriire ak itei kot kotyanit?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Ee, inyee rotwetap chok ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tyanitu si tuun isiis? Weekyigei chogeng'ung'; imuuny, ak isiis." 
Jeremiah47:7 Imuktoi ano isiis, igeere ile ki kong'atin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ibar Askelon, ak ngeguutap nyanjet? Ki kong'at ko uu nooto." 
Jeremiah48:1 Ng'aleegap Moab: Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Pwo eng' Nebo! Amu kagoek karaatya; kagiteweer Kiriataim, kageluul: kagiteweer Miskap, kagebut." 
Jeremiah48:2 Ma komi kalasunetap Moab; Ki kochop yaityet eng' Hesbon agobo emonooto, ne mwaei koleen, Nyoo kigeesu si ma koegu pororyet kogeny. Agot inyee, ee Madmen, kigoonin isiis; onin rotwetap chok." 
Jeremiah48:3 Kutitap riirek ne punu Horonaim, luuleet ak ng'emisyet ne oo!" 
Jeremiah48:4 Kageng'em Moab; kagoriiryo lagokyik kot kegas. 
Jeremiah48:5 Amu togostoi ole kitogostoe ne po Luhit koriiryoti kotugul; amu ki kogas pichiindap riiregap ng'emisyet eng' ole kichoortoegei ne po Horonaim. 
Jeremiah48:6 Omwei, osaru saboonwekwok, ak oige sondiit eng' surkwen." 
Jeremiah48:7 Amu-i, kiluulin aginye, amu kaimang'u poisyoniguk ak konoraiguk: ak keluul Kemos, kobooto tisiikyik ak pounikyik." 
Jeremiah48:8 Ak nyoonjin luulindet nganaseet age tugul, ama mi nganaseet ne chilili; lusei kogeny atebweet, ak keng'emei warenget; ko uu ye kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah48:9 Igoochi Moab kebebaik, si kobiit kotiriren komwei: ak koek nganasookyik karatwek, ne ma mi chii ne menyei." 
Jeremiah48:10 Chuboot ineendet ne machuuljingei poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak chuboot ineendet ne etee rotwennyi po chok korotiik." 
Jeremiah48:11 Kigotebee Moab kaalyeet kobooch ming'inatennyi, ki kotepto kimnateennyi ko uu divaik che mi ak misigiikyik, che tomo kerong' eng' tereet age koba tereet age: ak tomo keluul: ta kotinyei anyun amu nooto anyinyindanyi, ak tomo kowalak ng'uunennyi." 
Jeremiah48:12 Ogeer anyuno, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che ayookyini ineendet piik che rong'u, ak koranda ineendet; ak korong' kogeskei eng' tereenikyik, ak kotui sotonikwak." 
Jeremiah48:13 Ak kolilaan Moab amu Kemos, ko uu ye ki ililan kootap Israel agobo Bethel, ne ki imang'u." 
Jeremiah48:14 Omuktoi ano omwa ole, ki murenik che nyigoonen, ak ko ki murenik che kiimeen eng' lugeet?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Kigong'emak Moab, ki kotogosta icheek nganasookyik, kigoba parisyet murenikyik che ki kilewen, mwaei Laitoryat, ne kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Jeremiah48:16 Kariikyi Moab nyalildanywa, ak chogu usiisyennyi." 
Jeremiah48:17 Oriirchi ineendet okweek tugul che omi ole neegitee ineendet, ak okweek tugul che ongen kainennyi; omwa ole, Katepto ano si koil kirokto ne kiim, kirokto ne karaaran!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Ee inyee chepto ne itebee Dibon, chooruge eng' toroornateng'ung', ak itebi eng' melelda; amu kagopookyin ng'emindetap Moab, kagong'em irimoiguk." 
Jeremiah48:19 Ee inyee ne imenye Aroer, tonon eng' ooreet taban, ak itoben: teebee ne mweei, ak chepto ne chilili; ileenji, kageyai nee?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Kagiteweer Moab; amu kagebut: owaach ak oriirye; omwaite eng' Arnon, ole, Kageng'em Moab." 
Jeremiah48:21 Ak kagonyonji kirwooget warenget; kanyonji Holon, Jasa, ak Mepaat;" 
Jeremiah48:22 ak Dibon, Nebo, ak Beth-diblataim;" 
Jeremiah48:23 ak Kiriataim, Beth-gamul, ak Beth-meon;" 
Jeremiah48:24 ak Keryot, Bosra, ak nganasook tugul che po emetap Moab, che looen ak che neegit." 
Jeremiah48:25 Kageisto kuinetap Moab, ak kagoil eunnyi, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah48:26 Ogoochi ineendet kobogit; amu ki kotoroorgei kogirinda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak mildoegei Moab kang'undaekyik, ak kerorechin." 
Jeremiah48:27 Tos ma ek Israel eng' inyee ne kirorechin? Tos ki kinyoor komi ak chooriik? Amu kotugul ye ing'alaali agobo ineendet, ilelechi metit." 
Jeremiah48:28 Ee okweek che omenye kebenonik; ak oige cheptuget ne teechei keswennyi eng' tabanwegap kurgeetap kebeneet. 
Jeremiah48:29 Kigegas menoteetap Moab, keele, menot miising'; kaetetapkei, ak menatennyi, ak kachaunennyi pogei, ak losennyi pogei." 
Jeremiah48:30 Angen nereegekyik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ale puch; ma yai kiy kachaunaikyik pogei." 
Jeremiah48:31 Awaache anyun agobo Moab; ee, ariirchini miising' Moab tugul: amu iteeitos icheek agobo piigap Kir-heres." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ariirchinin eng' riirek che siirei che po Jaser, ee keetitap sabibuk ne po Sibma: kagolandae nyanjet temeniguk, kiit nyanjetap Jaser: kagonam luuloindet logoeguk che po kemei, ak ole kitue sabibuk." 
Jeremiah48:33 Ak kageisto kagasetapkei ak poiboiyet, eng' mbareet ne rurei kot ak eng' emetap Moab; ak kaagoochi kogeskei divaik eng' ole kituisye: ma mi ne tyechei eng' waagaatap kagasetapkei; ma egu waagandanooto waagaatap kagasetapkei." 
Jeremiah48:34 Kagotwek icheek kobooch riiregap Hesbon agoi Eleale, kot koit Jahas, kobooch Zoar agoi Horonaim, agoi Eglat-Selesiya: amu teng'dos peegap Nimrim." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ageesu kogeny eng' Moab, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet ne igoitoi koroseek eng' ole toroor, ak ineendet ne peeljin nyamdutik kanamonikyik." 
Jeremiah48:36 Cheei anyun muguleldanyu agobo Moab ko uu ndurerusyek, ak kocheei muguleldanyu ko uu ndurerusyek agobo piigap Kir-heres: kagobetyo anyun chaang'indap tuguuk che kiga konyoor." 
Jeremiah48:37 Amu churat metit age tugul, ak kigetil tamnet age tugul: mi eunek tugul perutik che ki kitilei, ak kogermenegei kuniok." 
Jeremiah48:38 Mi kateiyasyek kooriik tugul parak che po Moab ak eng' komosta age tugul eng' ortinwekyik: amu ki atui Moab ko uu tereet ne ma kiboiboitune, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah48:39 Kitepto ano si koyie! Iteitoi ano icheek! Katepto ano si kotukta patai Moab eng' kalilanet! Egu anyun Moab ne kirorechin ak koek ne kwong'ee icheek tugul che mi tabanwekyik. 
Jeremiah48:40 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, tirireni ko uu kipsiichit, ak kouito kebebaikyik kotokyi Moab." 
Jeremiah48:41 Kageluul Keryot, ak kageche irimoikyik, ak koigei mugulelwegap piik che nyigoonen che po Moab, eng' peetuunooto, muguleldap kwondo ne tinyei ng'wanindo ye machei kosigiis." 
Jeremiah48:42 Ak keng'em Moab si ma koegu pororyet, amu ki kotoroorgei kogirinda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah48:43 Kabwonjin kaiyweisyet, ak keriinget, ak mesteet, ee inyee ne imenye Moab, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ibutyin keriinget, ne mwee kaiyweisyet; ak konam mesteet ne togosune keriinget: ak aipchini ineendet, nooto ko Moab, kenyiit ne aityini ineendet pireet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah48:45 Tonondos che mweei ama tinyei kimnateet eng' urwetap Hesbon: amu kamang'une maat Hesbon, ak kamang'une liplibenetap maat, Sihon, ak kagobeel luuitap Moab, ak metowekwak parak che po icheek che poldos." 
Jeremiah48:46 Pwo! Inyee, ee Moab! Kagogeskei piigap Kemos: amu kageluul weeriiguk, ak kageluul tiibiiguk." 
Jeremiah48:47 Ago aweechi kogeny luulenigap Moab eng' peetuusyek che po let, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tee nooto anyun kirwoogetap Moab." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ng'aleegap lagogap Ammon: Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos ma tinyei Israel weeriik? Ma tinyei ne namei tuguukyik? Amu nee anyun si konam Malkam Gad kobunji, ak komeny piikyik nganasookyik?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Ogeer anyuno, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne aibu waagaatap lugeet kegas agobo Rabbah ne po lagogap Ammon; ak koek karaatya ne irurugot, ak kebeel tiibiikyik: konam anyun Israel kobunji, icheek che kiga konam ineendet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah49:3 Waach, ee Hesbon, amu kageluul Ai; oriirye, okweek tiibiigap Rabbah, ogermenegei kuniok: oteiye, ak orwaate eng' ng'otonok; amu kiluulei Malkam, kobooto tisiikyik ak pounikyik." 
Jeremiah49:4 Amu nee anyun si itoroorge eng' atebwosyek, atebweng'ung' ne rootei, ee chepto ne ichuchuchegei let? Ne ki imang'u konoraikyik, ileen, Nyonjino ng'oo?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ogeero, aibun kaiyweisyet, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, eng' icheek tugul che mi tabanweguk; ak keonak, komanda chii age tugul, ama piitu chii ne iyumi ineendet ne ombenoti." 
Jeremiah49:6 Ago ye ibata aweegu kogeny che kigeluul che po lagogap Ammon, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah49:7 Ng'aleegap Edom: Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko uu ni, kole: Tos ma komi utaatyet eng' Teman? Tos ki kobet kirwooget eng' che ng'oomen? Tos ki kobek ng'omnatennywa?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Omwei, oweege, oung'egei ole ma taagu, ee okweek che omenye Dedan; amu aipchini ineendet nyalildap Esau, eng' peetuut ne aityini ineendet pireet." 
Jeremiah49:9 Ngot kobwonjin kayumigap sabibuk, ko tos ma pagaachi turoonigap sabibuk? Ngot kobwonjin chooriik kemoi, ko tos ma parisyei kot konyoor che yamei?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Ago ki ayai Esau koek ne ma tinyei kiy, ki ang'aany komoswekyik che po ung'oot, ama komuuchi kounygei: kigeng'em iyotennyi, ak tupchosyekyik, ak piigap kokwennyi, ama komi ineendet." 
Jeremiah49:11 Pagakte lagoguk che ma tinyei kwanisyek, si ariip kosapcho; ak ingomang'wa mosogiguk." 
Jeremiah49:12 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, eeisei iman che ki ma ko nenywa koeise kigombet; ak tos ii ne chilili si ma kibirin? Mechilili, kibirin, ago iee iman." 
Jeremiah49:13 Amu ki ayosyechigei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ale, Egu Bosra ne kikwong'ee; ne kichotei, ak karaatya, ak ne kisasei; ak koek nganasookyik tugul karatwek kotugul." 
Jeremiah49:14 Koagas ng'aleek che punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kagiyookto chiito kwo pororyosyek, koleenji, oyumgei, ak opookyi, ak ong'eetyee oyai lugeet." 
Jeremiah49:15 Amu, keero, ki ayain iegu ne ming'in eng' pororyosyek, ak iegu ne sasei piik." 
Jeremiah49:16 Ago ki koberberin menoteetap muguleldang'ung', amu kamuiseng'ung', ee inyee ne imenye ole kibetak eng' rwandet, ne iname walitap tulweet: nganda iteeche kesweng'ung' eng' parak ko uu kipsiichit, arorogun eng' olooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah49:17 Ak egu Edom ne kikwong'ee: kwong'ei age tugul ne siirtoi eng' yooto, ak koreeny korotwekyik tugul." 
Jeremiah49:18 Ko uu ye ki kigabui Sodom ak Gomorah ak nganasook che kineegite olooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma menyei chii olooto, ama tebee olooto lakwa ne po chii." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ogeero, togosu ineendet ko uu ng'etundo kobunu Jordan ko kanyi peek miising' kobargei ak meng'ooteet ne kiim: ago achee, aoone komwei ineendet; ak age tugul ne kileweni, agoochini koboi ineendet: amu ng'oo ne kegerge? Ak ng'oo ne ng'atwa peetuut? Ak ng'oo mestowot ne tononi eng' tainnyu?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ogas anyun kirwoogetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki koyachi Edom; ak chobutikyik che ki kochop agobo piik che menyei Teman: ichuuti icheek iman, che mengeechen che po akweetap keechiirek; yaei iman meng'ootennywa koek karaatya agobo icheek." 
Jeremiah49:21 Potani ng'wony amu cheetap kabutennywa; mi waagaat, ne kegasei cheennyi eng' Araraita ne Piriir." 
Jeremiah49:22 Ogeero, togosu ineendet ak kotirireni ko uu kipsiichit, ak kouito kebebaikyik kotokyi Bosra: ak koigei eng' peetuunooto mugulelwegap piik che nyigoonen che po Edom, muguleldap kwondo ne tinyei ng'wanindo ye machei kosigiis." 
Jeremiah49:23 Ng'aleegap Damasko. Kagolilan Hamath, ak Arpad; amu kogogas ng'aleek che yaach, kogotanuiso: mi arageneet nyanjet; ma imuuchi kosiis." 
Jeremiah49:24 Kogonyalul Damasko, kawelelgei komwei, kanam ineendet potanet: kanam ineendet pichiindo ak aragenosyek, ko uu kwondo ye machei kosigiis." 
Jeremiah49:25 Katepto ano si ma kimeto nganaseetap kalasunet, nganaseetap poiboiyennyu!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ibutos anyun neranikyik eng' ortinwekyik, ak kigoochin kosiisyo murenik tugul che po lugeet eng' peetuunooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ak anaam maat eng' irimeetap Damasko, ak kobeel kooriigap laitoryat, che po Ben-Hadad." 
Jeremiah49:28 Ng'aleegap Kedar ak che po pounatosyegap Hasor, che ki par Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon. Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ong'eetyee, otogoste Kedar, ak oluul lagogap kong'asiis." 
Jeremiah49:29 Luulei emaisyekwak ak akwotisyekwak che po keechiirek; ak koluul angookwak kobunji, ak tereenikwak tugul, ak tambeesikwak: ak kowaakyi, koleenji, mi kamuiset komosta age tugul." 
Jeremiah49:30 Omwei, oombenote oba ole loo, oung'egei ole ma taagu, ee okweek che omenye Hasor, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kairwooch Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon agobo okweek, ak kagobwaat ng'olyoot agobo okweek." 
Jeremiah49:31 Ong'eetyee, otogoste ole mi pororyet ne tinyei kaalyeet, ne meng'iisyei ama kereri met, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ne ma tinyei ormariichok anan temeleiywek, che menyei icheegei." 
Jeremiah49:32 Ak keluul tambeesikwak, ak koek parunenik tuukwak che chaang': ak aiyeste koba komoswek tugul icheeget che piori metowekwak; ak aibu nyalildanywa eng' komoswekwak, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah49:33 Ak koek Hasor ole menyei lelwek, ak koek karaatya koigeny: ma menyei chii olooto, ama tebee olooto lakwa ne po chii." 
Jeremiah49:34 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Jeremiah agobo Elam eng' taunetap laitornatetap Zedekiah laitoryatap Judah, koleenji," 
Jeremiah49:35 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Keero, airie kwangetap Elam, ne oo ne po kamugennywa." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ak aipchi Elam koriswek ang'wan che punu luukwek ang'wan che po kipsengwet, ak aiyeste icheek koba koriswechooto tugul; ama piitu pororyet ole ma itei che ki kioon che po Elam." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ak agoochi Elam koaragen eng' taitap puunikwak, ak eng' taitap icheeget che cheeng'ei saboonwekwak: ak aipchi icheek yaityet, nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ayookte rotwetap chok koosup icheek, kot ageesu:" 
Jeremiah49:38 ak alum ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet eng' Elam, ak ang'em eng' olooto laitoryat ak pounik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah49:39 Ago aweechi kogeny luulenigap Elam eng' peetuusyek che po let, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah50:1 Ni ng'olyoot ne ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotyot Jeremiah agobo Babilon, agobo emetap Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah50:2 Omwaite eng' pororyosyek ak obarte, ak onamji parak songolyet; obarte, amouny: ole, Kageluul Babilon, kagigoochi Bel kolilaan, kagoaragen Merodak; kagigoochi kanamonikyik kolilaanso, kagoaragenso kanamonikyik." 
Jeremiah50:3 Amu nyoonei pororyet eng' murot kaataam kobookyin, ne yaei emennyi koek karaatya, ama menyei chii olooto: kagomwei, kagoba tugul, chii ak tyony." 
Jeremiah50:4 Pwoonei eng' peetuusyechooto ak eng' peetuunooto, piigap Israel, icheeget ak lagogap Judah, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; pendi koriiryoti, ak kocheeng'oti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa." 
Jeremiah50:5 Teeboti agobo ole teptoi Zion kotokyigei olooto, koleen, Obwa, ak onamge ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kayomiset ne po koigeny ne ma kiutye." 
Jeremiah50:6 Uu piikyuk keechiirek che petyotiin: ki ibeet mestowekwak icheek, ki imaas eng' tuloonook: ki koombeniot kong'etee tulweet ne oo agoi ne ming'in, kigoutye oldanywa ole imuung'ee." 
Jeremiah50:7 Ki koam icheek piik tugul che kinyoor icheek: ak ki mwa puunikwak kole, ma kilel, amu ki koyachi icheek tengekto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, meng'ootetap imanda, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kamang'unetap kwanisyekwak." 
Jeremiah50:8 Omwei eng' Babilon, ak omande eng' emetap Kaldeik, ak oige kwesik eng' taitap akwotisyegap keechiirek." 
Jeremiah50:9 Amu, ogeero, ang'eeti tuiyetap pororyosyek che eecheen che punu emetap murot kaataam kobookyi Babilon: ak kotet lugeet kotokyigei emonooto; kiluulei eng' olooto: uu kipchabonikwak che po chiito ne nyigan, ne mwogindet; ma mi ne weeksei puch." 
Jeremiah50:10 Ak keluul Kaldea: piyang'dos tugul che luulei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah50:11 Amu ogasigei, amu oboiboi, ee okweek che opookyini porotennyu, amu ourerendosi ko uu rooryat ne tyechei peek, ak oteei ko uu paraisisyek che kiimeen;" 
Jeremiah50:12 ililani kamenng'ung' miising': toptoben ineendet ne kisichok: ogeero, egu ineendet ne letu eng' tugul che po pororyosyek, surkwen, emet ne yaamaat, ak surkwen." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ma ki menyei amu nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago egu karaatya miising': kwong'ei age tugul ne siirei ole neegitee Babilon, ak koreeny korotwekyik tugul." 
Jeremiah50:14 Otetkei eng' lugeet obar Babilon, eng' komoswek tugul, okweek tugul che oriiche kwanget; omwok, amotuuch kipchabonik: amu ki koyachi tengekto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah50:15 Owaage eng' komoswek tugul; kagochamdagei; kagoluulyo irimoikyik, kagoluulyo inatusyekyik: amu niito yaaktaetap mugetuut ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; oyaakyi mugetuut; ko uu ye ki yai, oyachi ineendet ko uu nooto." 
Jeremiah50:16 Oiste leetaindet eng' Babilon, ak ineendet ne kesisye chepkeswet eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet: wendi chii age tugul eng' icheek ye mi piikyik, ak komwechi chii age tugul emennyi, amu kaiyweisyetap rotwetap chok ne usiisyei." 
Jeremiah50:17 Uu Israel keechiirek che ki koiyesta; ki koon ng'etuunyik ineendet: kisip koam ineendet laitoryatap Assyria; ak eng' let koiri kawekyik Nebukadresar, niito laitoryatap Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:18 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kole: Ogeero, abire laitoryatap Babilon ak emennyi, ko uu ye ki abir laitoryatap Assyria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ak aweech Israel kogeny konyo ole agetye, ak koyagisye Karmel ak Bashan, ak kobiyo saboondanyi eng' tuloonoogap Ephraim ak eng' Gilead." 
Jeremiah50:20 Ki cheeng'ei tengektap Israel eng' peetuusyechooto ak eng' kenyisyechooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama kinyooru; ak ki cheeng'ei tengekwogigap Judah, ama kinyooru: amu anyochini kaat icheek che abagaaktoi kong'et." 
Jeremiah50:21 Togoste emetap Merataim, obargei, obargei ak nganasanooto, ak piik che menyei Pekod: par ak ing'em igeesu iyotennywa, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak iyai ko uu tugul che kaang'atiin." 
Jeremiah50:22 Miitei emet polatetap pooryeet, ak ne po ng'emisyet ne oo." 
Jeremiah50:23 Kibetita ano ak koildo ano kiriswetap ng'wony komugul! Ki egundo ano Babilon karaatya eng' pororyosyek! 
Jeremiah50:24 Kaariich mesteet agobo inyee, ak kageluulin kogeny, ee Babilon, ak ki ma inai: kogenyoorun, kogenamin kogeny, amu ki oborye ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah50:25 Kogoyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole konoree kariikyik che po lugeet, ak kogonem kariigap nereegekyik: amu tinyei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, poisyet ne yaei eng' emetap Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah50:26 Obwa obargei ak ineendet che obunu kiwotosyek che looen, oyat chogenikyik: oyum ineendet ko uu karurugutik ak ong'em ogesu: amat kong'et kiy nenyi." 
Jeremiah50:27 Obar kirugikyik tugul; ochoorte koba ole kieng'se: Pwo! Icheek! Amu kagoit peetuunywa, peetuut ne ityin icheek pireet." 
Jeremiah50:28 Kutitap icheek che mweei ak kochililyo komong' eng' emetap Babilon, si kobiit ki parta eng' Zion yaaktaetap mugetuut ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, yaaktaetap mugetuut ne po hekalunnyi." 
Jeremiah50:29 Kuur mwogik tugul kobargei ak Babilon, icheek tugul che riichei kwangok koyiem komoswekyik; amengochilil agot agenge eng' olooto: yaakyi mugetuut ko uu poisyonikyik; oyachi ko uu tugul che ki koyai: amu ki komenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki komenji Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ibutos anyun nerenikyik eng' ortinwekyik, ak kigoochin kosiisyo murenikyik tugul che po lugeet eng' peetuunooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah50:31 Keero, aboryenen, inyeendet ne ii menotyo, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek: amu kait peetuung'ung', peetuut ne aityinin pireet." 
Jeremiah50:32 Ak koriichkei kobut menotyot, ama mi chii ne ing'eeti ineendet: ak anaam maat eng' nganasookyik, ak kobeel tuguuk che miitei komoswekyik." 
Jeremiah50:33 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Kiusei piigap Israel kobooto lagogap Judah: ak kogiich piik tugul che kiluulei icheek; eesyoi kochunda icheek koba. 
Jeremiah50:34 Kiim katyagindennywa; kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek: ng'alaaldochin ineendet icheek komyee, si kobiit kogoochi kamuung'et ng'wony, ak koim piik che menyei Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:35 Mi rotwetap chok paragutap Kaldeik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' piik che menyei Babilon, ak eng' pounikyik, ak eng' piikyik che ng'oomen." 
Jeremiah50:36 Mi rotwetap chok paragutap piik che ichaugei, si koberberitu: mi rotwetap chok paragutap piikyik che nyigoonen, ak koaragenso icheek." 
Jeremiah50:37 Mi rotwetap chok paragutap paraisisyekwak, ak eng' kariisyekwak che po lugeet, ak eng' paragutap piik tugul che kiburuchkei che mi kobooto ineendet, ak koigei icheek kwonyiik: mi rotwetap chok paragutap konoraikyik, ak kerep chooto." 
Jeremiah50:38 Tebee kemeut paragutap ainoosyekyik, ak koteenyo: amu emoniito ko emetap kanamonik che ki kiwai, ak ki koyai kanamonikwak icheek koek kibion." 
Jeremiah50:39 Menyei anyun olooto tyong'igap surkwen kobooto suik, ak komeny tyong'igap songolik olooto: ama ki menyei olooto koigeny; ama ki menyei kobooch ibinda age agoi ibinda age." 
Jeremiah50:40 Ko uu ye kigabui Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Sodom ak Gomorah ak nganasook che kineegite olooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; uu nooto anyun ma menyei chii olooto, ama tebee olooto lakwa ne po chii." 
Jeremiah50:41 Ogeero, punu piik murot kaataam; kobooto pororyet ne oo, ak king'eeti laitorinik che chaang' che punu komoswek che looen che po ng'wony." 
Jeremiah50:42 Tinyei kwangok ak ng'otwek; kolgoleen, ama tinyei rireenet; morori ko uu nyanjet, ak ketei paraisisyek; choboot age tugul ko uu chiito ne wendi lugeet, kobookyinin, ee cheptap Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:43 Ki kogas laitoryatap Babilon kalasunennywa, ak nyaluldos eunekyik: kanam ineendet pichiindo, ak ng'wanindo ko uu ne po kwondo ne machei kosigiis." 
Jeremiah50:44 Ogeero, togosu ineendet ko uu ng'etundo kobunu Jordan ko kanyi peek miising' kobargei ak meng'ooteet ne kiim: ago achee aoone komwei ineendet: ak age tugul ne kileweni, agoochini koboi ineendet: amu ng'oo ne kegerge, ak ko ng'oo ne ng'atwa peetuut? Ak ko ng'oo mestowot ne tononi eng' tainnyu?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ogas anyun kirwoogetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki koyachi Babilon; ak chobutikyik che ki kochop agobo emetap Kaldeik: ichuuti icheek iman, agot che mengeechen che po akweetap keechiirek; yaei iman meng'ootennywa koek karaatya agobo icheek." 
Jeremiah50:46 Potani ng'wony eng' cheetap lugeet ne kiluule Babilon, ak kigasei waagennywa eng' pororyosyek." 
Jeremiah51:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ogeero, ang'eetyini Babilon kobooto piik che menyei Leb-kamai, usoonet ne ng'emisyei." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ak ayookyi Babilon toek che seesei; kowong' tugul che mi emennyi: amu paregei icheek ak ineendet eng' peetuutap nyalilda kobunu komoswek tugul. 
Jeremiah51:3 Amat koriich kwangennyi mwogindet, amat kong'eet kolaachi ngoryeetap lugeet: amoriree neranikyik; ong'em lugeennyi tugul ogesu." 
Jeremiah51:4 Ak kobutyo ko kagobek eng' emetap Kaldeik ko kagetoor eng' ortinwekyik. 
Jeremiah51:5 Amu ma kimetoi Israel, anan Judah, ma metoi icheek Kamuktaindennywa, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek; nganda nyiitaat emennywa ng'oogisto ne ki yachi Ineendet ne Tiliil ne po Israel." 
Jeremiah51:6 Omwei eng' Babilon, ingosar chii age tugul saboondanyi; amat ongobaraak tengektanyi: amu peetuutap yaaktaetap mugetuut ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; yaakyin ineendet mugetuut." 
Jeremiah51:7 Ki kigombetap thahabu Babilon eng' eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ki igoochi ng'wony komugul kobogit: ki koee pororyosyek divaikyik; amei anyun iywek pororyosyek amu nooto." 
Jeremiah51:8 Kagobut Babilon kochaakta, ak keng'em: oteeiye amu ineendet; oipchi mwanik che kinyae ng'wanindanyi, tamangap kosap ineendet." 
Jeremiah51:9 Kata kimache kisoop Babilon, ago ma sap: omete ineendet ak ongebe, kwo chii tugul emennyi: amu itei kipsengwet kirwoogennyi, ak kaginamji parak agoi koit kipsengwet." 
Jeremiah51:10 Kagomoong' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor imandanyo: obwa, kibarte eng' Zion poisyonigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah51:11 Olit kipchabonik; onam long'onik komyee: kagong'eet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugulelwegap laitorinigap Medik; amu chobennyi ko kogirinda Babilon, kong'em: amu yaaktaetap mugetuut ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, yaaktaetap mugetuut ne po hekalunnyi." 
Jeremiah51:12 Onamji parak songolyet, otokyi irimoigap Babilon, ogimiit riipseet, onde riibiik, ochop piik che sapchin: amu kagochop Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koyai kiit ne ki mwa agobo piik che menyei Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:13 Ee, inyee ne menyei peek che chaang', ne chaang' miising' konoraiguk, kait kagesuneng'ung' karagendoetap mageng'ung'." 
Jeremiah51:14 Kagoyosyechigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kole, anyiitin iman piik, che tee tinapchet; ak kowaagenen icheek." 
Jeremiah51:15 Ki yai ng'wony eng' kamuktaennyi, ki igimit ng'wonyuni eng' utotyennyi, ak kiito kipsengwet eng' naennyi:" 
Jeremiah51:16 ye twek, kobiit wasetapkei ne po peek eng' kipsengwet, ak kogoochi kibungweret kotogosta eng' ole poochin ng'wony: yachin ropta kalyelosyek, imoong'u usoonet eng' ole ki kigonoree." 
Jeremiah51:17 Kergeitu chiito age tugul ak tyondo ne ma tinyei naet; ililane kitang'indet age tugul ne po thahabu kanamwennyi ne ki kiwai: amu lembeita kanamwennyi ne ki kitany, ama tinyei kabuset." 
Jeremiah51:18 Puch chooto, poisyetap ng'aalseet: petos eng' peetuut ne ityin pirennywa." 
Jeremiah51:19 Ma uu chuuto kebebertap Jakobo; amu po tai ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul; ak Israel ko pororyetap porotennyi: kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek. 
Jeremiah51:20 Inyee ko ii aiywennyu ne po pooryeet, ak kariigap lugeet: ak atonatoni pororyosyek eng' inyee; ak abar pounatosyek eng' inyee;" 
Jeremiah51:21 ak atonatoni eng' inyee paraisiit kobooto chiito ne laanyei; 
Jeremiah51:22 ak atonatoni eng' inyee chepkichutitap lugeet kobooto chiito ne laanyei; ak atonatoni eng' inyee muren ak kwony; ak atonatoni eng' inyee poiyo ak neran; ak atonatoni eng' inyee muren ak kobogoryo; 
Jeremiah51:23 ak atonatoni eng' inyee mestowot ak akweennyi; ak atonatoni eng' inyee kabatindet kobooto eikyik che po chogit; ak atonatoni eng' inyee pounik ak kiptainik. 
Jeremiah51:24 Ak ayaakyini Babilon ak piik tugul che menyei Kaldea, yaityennywa tugul ne ki yai eng' Zion eng' taing'wong', mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah51:25 Keero, aboryenen, ee inyee tulweet ne ing'emisyei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne ng'emei ng'wony komugul: ak achuul eunnyu atokyin, ak amilden eng' rwandosyek, ak ayain iegu tulweet ne ki kolal." 
Jeremiah51:26 Ak ma ibei eng' inyee koita ne po luuita, anan koip koita ne po lumeiywek; ago iegu karaatya koigeny, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah51:27 Onamji parak songolyet eng' emet, oguut iryageet eng' pororyosyek, ochop pororyosyek kobargei ak ineendet, oguur pounatosyegap Ararat, ak che po Mini ak che po Ashkenas, kobargei ak ineendet: olewen kiptaiyat ne paregei ak ineendet; ogetu paraisisyek che uu tinapchet." 
Jeremiah51:28 Ochop pororyosyek kobargei ak ineendet, laitorinigap Medik, pounikyik, ak kiptainikyik tugul, kobooto emet tugul ne po pounatennyi." 
Jeremiah51:29 Ak kobotan emet ak komi eng' ng'wanindo: amu tonondos chobutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor che kichobei agobo Babilon, si kobiit koyai emetap Babilon koek karaatya, ole ma menyei chii." 
Jeremiah51:30 Ki kometo pooryeet murenigap Babilon che nyigoonen, tebyei eng' irimoikwak; ki kobek nyiganatennywa; kagoigei kwonyiik: kagobeel komoswekwak che menyei; kagoilyo temeleiywekyik." 
Jeremiah51:31 Labati chiito ne kiyooktoi koip paronok kosubi age ne ibei paronok, ak kosubi kayooktoin kayooktoindet age, si koboorchi laitoryatap Babilon koleenji, kagenam nganasennyi eng' komosta age tugul:" 
Jeremiah51:32 kagenam tabarwek, ak kagebeel morong'yot, ak kagoaragenso murenigap lugeet." 
Jeremiah51:33 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu ni kole: uu cheptap Babilon rwanyut ne kiboorsee eng' peetuut ne kityechei; tomo kitigin, si konyonji peetuutap kesisyet." 
Jeremiah51:34 Ki koama Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, ki kotuatua, ki koyaa aek tereet ne ma mi kiy, ki kolugua ko uu maswetit, kigonyiit moennyi tuguukyuk che anyiny; ki kotoorcha saang'." 
Jeremiah51:35 Mwaei chii ne menyei Zion kole, ingotebee paragutap Babilon koroomnateet ne ki kiyaiywo ak ne ki kiyachi piikyuk; ak komwaei Jerusalem kole, ingotebee paragutap piik che menyei Kaldea, korotiikyuk." 
Jeremiah51:36 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, keero, ang'alaaldoun, ayaaktoun mugetuut; ak ayaam nyanjennyi, ak agoochi koteeny kondametunnyi ne po peek." 
Jeremiah51:37 Ak koek Babilon karurugutik, ole menyei lelwek, ne kikwong'ee ak ne kireenyei, ne ma menyei chii." 
Jeremiah51:38 Porisendos ko uu ng'etuunyik che parnotik; morortos ko uu aaregap ng'etuunyik. 
Jeremiah51:39 Ye tinyei tawirenet icheek, ayachini igoortanywa, ak agoochi icheek kobogityo, si koboiboitu, ak koruiyo rwondo ne po agoi, ama kosu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah51:40 Amutu icheek ko uu aaregap keechiir che pendi ole kieng'see, ko uu mengichik kobooto kwesik." 
Jeremiah51:41 Haa, kageluul Sesak! Ak kagenam kalasunetap ng'wony komugul! Kagoek Babilon karaatya eng' pororyosyek!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Kagonyonji nyanjet Babilon: kagotuch ineendet chaang'indap mildaetapkei ne po peekyik. 
Jeremiah51:43 Kagoek nganasookyik karaatya, emet ne yaamaat ak ko surkwen, emet ne ma menyei chii ama punei olooto lakwa ne po chii." 
Jeremiah51:44 Arwookyini Bel eng' Babilon, ak among'u eng' kutinnyi kiit ne ki kolugui; ama korootei pororyosyek ko uu peek kobendi oldanyi kogeny: ee, luulei irimeetap Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:45 Omang'une piikyuk, kwenunnyi, ak osaruge chii tugul oistoegei nereegek che ng'woneen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah51:46 Among' kotanuiso mugulelwekwok, anan oiywei ng'aleegap piik che kigasei eng' emet; amu pwoonei ng'aleek eng' kenyiit age, ak ye ibata kobwa ng'aleechooto eng' kenyiit age, ak koroomnateet eng' emet, koboryo pounindet age ak pounindet age." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ogeero, pwoonei anyun peetuusyek che tuun arwookyini kanamonik che ki kiwai che po Babilon, ak kolilaan emonooto komugul; ak kobutyo eng' kwenunnyi piikyik tugul che ki kibar." 
Jeremiah51:48 Yeityo kotyen eng' poiboiyet kipsengwet ak ng'wony, ak tugul che mi olooto, agobo Babilon; amu pwoonei piik che luulei ineendet kobunu murot kaataam, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah51:49 Ko uu ye ki parei `Babilon Israel kobutyo, ko uu nooto ibutos eng' Babilon piik che tuun kibarei che po emet tugul." 
Jeremiah51:50 Oba okweek, che ki ochilile rotwetap chok, amotonon; obwaat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor omi ole loo, ak obwaat Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah51:51 Kililandosi, amu kigegas chotisyet; ki kotuch togoochikyok kalilanet; amu kagobwa toek komoswek che tiliileen che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah51:52 Ogeero, pwoonei anyun peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che karwookyini kanamonikyik che ki kiwai; ak kotigendos eng' emennyi tugul piik che ki kiguoten." 
Jeremiah51:53 Agot nda togosta Babilon agoi kipsengwet, ak agot nda ng'oot toroorindap kimnateennyi, ko ui tugul kobunnywa piik che luulei ineendet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jeremiah51:54 Waagaatap riirek ne punu Babilon, ak ne po ng'emisyet ne oo ne punu emetap Kaldeik!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Amu luulei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Babilon, ak kong'em kutit ne punu olooto; morortos peekwak che mildogei ko uu peek che chaang', kagemwa polatetap tweguunennywa:" 
Jeremiah51:56 amu kagonyonji ineendet luulindet, kagonyonji Babilon ak kagenam murenikyik che nyigoonen, kagetonaton kwangokwak: amu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet ne po yaaktaetap mugetuut, yaaktoi iman mugetuut."
