Jeremiah51:57 Ak agoochini kobogityo pounikyik ak murenikyik che ng'oomen, kobooto kirwoogikyik ak kiptainikyik, ak murenikyik che nyigoonen; ak koruiyo rwondo ne po agoi, ama kogosu, mwaei Laitoryat ne kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Jeremiah51:58 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Kigabui irimoik che tebeesen che po Babilon kigeesu, ak kebeel ormariichokyik che kooen; ak kobirtogei piik puch, ak kobirtogei pororyosyek amu maat; ak kong'eetyo." 
Jeremiah51:59 Ni ng'olyoot ne king'atyi maotyot Jeremiah Seraiah weeriitap Neriah, weeriitap Maseia, ye kibendi Babilon kobooto Zedekiah, laitoryatap Judah eng' kenyiitap ang'wan ne po laitornatennyi. Ki riibindet ne oo Seraiah eng' kootap laitoryat." 
Jeremiah51:60 Ak ki sirchi Jeremiah bukuit yaityet tugul ne tuun nyoonjin Babilon, ng'aleechuuto tugul che ki kisir agobo Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:61 Ak ki leenji Jeremiah Seraiah, Ye tuun iit Babilon, ko kanyool isoman ng'aleechuuto tugul," 
Jeremiah51:62 ak ile, Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki imwa agobo olito, ile iistoi, si ma meny chii age tugul olito, chii anan ko tyony, ago egu karaatya koigeny." 
Jeremiah51:63 Ak ye kaisoman bukuini igeesu, iratyi koita, ak iwiirchi aineetap Yufrets:" 
Jeremiah51:64 ak imwa ile, Imaluuchi anyun peek Babilon ko uu nooto, ama kong'eetei kogeny amu yaityet ne tuun aipchini; ak kong'etyo. Igesunegei yuto ng'aleegap Jeremiah." 
Jeremiah52:1 Ki po kenyiisyek tiptem ak agenge Zedekiah ye ki tau kolaitorani; ak ki laitoran kenyiisyek taman ak agenge eng' Jerusalem: ak kainetap kamennyi ko ki Hamutal cheptap Jeremiah ne po Libna. 
Jeremiah52:2 Ak ki yai yaityet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu tugul che kiga koyai Jehoiakim." 
Jeremiah52:3 Ak ki piitune tuguuchooto nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Jerusalem ak Judah kot kotimda icheek koba eng' tainnyi. Ak ki ingelelji Zedekiah laitoryatap Babilon. 
Jeremiah52:4 Ak eng' kenyiitap sogool ne po laitornatennyi, eng' arawetap taman, eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawanooto, konyo Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, ineendet ak lugeennyi tugul, kobookyi Jerusalem, ak koteech kotokyigei nganaseet; ak ki teech icheek irimoik koyiem." 
Jeremiah52:5 Koyiem anyun nganaseet agoi kenyiitap taman ak agenge ne po laitoryat Zedekiah. 
Jeremiah52:6 King'wanit rubeet eng' nganasanooto eng' arawetap ang'wan eng' peetuutap sogool ne po arawanooto, ne ki ma komi amitwogik che amei piik eng' emet." 
Jeremiah52:7 Kobut anyun piik irimeetap nganaseet ak ki mwei murenik tugul che po lugeet kemoi kobun ooreetap ormariichet ne ki mi kwenutap inatusyek aeng', ne ki mi ole neegitee seremutap laitoryat; (kigayiem Kaldeik nganaseet:) ak ki pun icheek ooreetap Arabah." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ago ki oon lugeetap Kaldeik laitoryat, ak ki nam Zedekiah eng' warengosyegap Jeriko; ak kiyesta lugeennyi tugul kometo ineendet." 
Jeremiah52:9 Komut anyun laitoryat, ak komut kwo ole mi laitoryatap Babilon eng' Ribla eng' emetap Hamath; ak ki irwookyi ineendet." 
Jeremiah52:10 Ak ki par laitoryatap Babilon weeriigap Zedekiah kogeerei ineendet: ki par kogeny pounik tugul che po Judah eng' Ribla. 
Jeremiah52:11 Ak ki par konyegap Zedekiah; ak korat laitoryatap Babilon ineendet eng' nyororosyek, ak komut ineendet kwo Babilon, ak kitoorchi ineendet korgoreet agoi peetuutap meennyi." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ak eng' arawetap muut, eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawanooto, ne ki kenyiitap taman ak sogool ne po Laitoryat Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, konyo Nebusaradan, kiptaiyatap riibiik, ne kitononi eng' taitap laitoryatap Babilon, agoi Jerusalem:" 
Jeremiah52:13 ak ki peel kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kootap laitoryat; ak kooriik tugul che po Jerusalem, koot age tugul ne oo, ko ki peel." 
Jeremiah52:14 Ak kibut lugeet tugul ne po Kaldeik ne ki mi kobooto kiptaiyatap riibiik, irimoik tugul che po Jerusalem, komoswek tugul." 
Jeremiah52:15 Yeityo komut koluul Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik piik che kibananook miising', ak piik che kiga ng'et eng' nganaseet, ak che kiga chililso, che ki igoochigei laitoryatap Babilon, ak piigap tuiyet che ki kong'et." 
Jeremiah52:16 Ago ki pagaakta Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik, piik che kibananook miising' eng' emet, koek riibiigap sabibuk ak koek semberik." 
Jeremiah52:17 Ak kitui Kaldeik tolochigap sugunonik che ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ng'echerok che ki tebee tuguuk ak nyanjet ne po sugunwet ne ki mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koip sugunonik tugul che po tuguuchooto koba Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ak ki ip tereenik, ak kechigosyek che eecheen, ak magasisyek che kitile ole lalei eng' taisyek, kobooto taabook ak kechigosyek, ak tereenik tugul che po sugunonik che kiboisyee." 
Jeremiah52:19 Ak kigombok, ak tuguuk che ki ibe maat, ak taabook, ak tereenik, ak keelyegap taisyek, ak kechigosyek, ak taabook; ak ki ip kiptaiyatap riibiik tuguuk che ki kiyae thahabu, ko thahabu, ak tuguuk che ki kiyae fedha, ko fedha." 
Jeremiah52:20 Tolochichooto, kobooto nyanjanooto agenge, ak itoonwek taman ak aeng' che po sugunonik che po kiruugik, che ki miitei kurereetap ng'echerok che kitebee, che kiga yachi Laitoryat Solomon kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ma naoksei nyigiisindap sugunonigap tuguuchuuto tugul." 
Jeremiah52:21 Ago eng' tolochik, kooindap tononetap agenge ko ki mitainik taman ak sisiit che po euut; ak ki mitainik taman ak aeng' che po euut nyigiisindap toloita nooto ngeyiem; ak ki morik ang'wan nyigiisindanyi ngikwa: ki kiyai kioto koek soiyet." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ak kimi metitap sugunwet paragunnyi; ak kooindap tononetap metoto ko ki mitainik muut che po euut, kobooto kariik che regerotiin, ak logoek che ki mi metoto komoswek tugul, che ki po tugul sugunonik: ak ki tinyei toloita ne po aeng' agine tuguuk che uu chooto, kobooto logoek." 
Jeremiah52:23 Ak kimi logoek tamanwogik sogoolu ak lo komoswekyik; kibogol agenge logoechooto tugul che ki mi karichooto regerotiin eng' komoswek tugul. 
Jeremiah52:24 Ak ki imut kiptaiyatap riibiik Seraiah tisiindet ne oo, ak Zephaniah tisiindet ne po aeng', ak riibiik somok che ki riibei kurgeet:" 
Jeremiah52:24 Ak ki imut kiptaiyatap riibiik Seraiah tisiindet ne oo, ak Zephaniah tisiindet ne po aeng', ak riibiik somok che ki riibei kurgeet:" 
Jeremiah52:25 Ak ki imut eng' nganaseet kiptaiyat ne ki pou lugeet: ak piik tisap eng' icheek che kigeerei togeetap laitoryat, che ki kinyoorchi nganaseet; ak siriindet ne po kiptaiyatap lugeet, ne ki iyumi piigap emet; ak piik tamanwogik lo che po emet che ki kinyoorchi nganaseet." 
Jeremiah52:26 Ak ki imut Nebusaradan kiptaiyatap riibiik pichooto, komutyi laitoryatap Babilon eng' Ribla." 
Jeremiah52:27 Ak kibir laitoryatap Babilon pichooto, ak kobar eng' Ribla, eng' emetap Hamath. Ki kimut anyun Judah keluul komanda eng' emennyi." 
Jeremiah52:28 Chu piik che ki imut Nebukadresar koluul: eng' kenyiitap tisap kogiluul Yahudik eliphuusyek somok ak tiptem ak somok: 
Jeremiah52:29 eng' kenyiitap taman ak sisiit ne po Nebukadresar komut koluul eng' Jerusalem piik pogolwogik sisiit ak sosom ak aeng'. 
Jeremiah52:30 Eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak somok ne po Nebukadresar komut Nubusaraden kiptaiyatap riibiik, piik pogolwogik tisap ak artam ak muut che po Yahudik: ki ek piik tugul eliphuusyek ang'wan ak pogol lo." 
Jeremiah52:31 Ak eng' kenyiitap sosom ak tisap kobooch ngeluul Jehoiakin laitoryatap Judah, eng' arawetap taman ak aeng', eng' peetuutap tiptem ak muut ne po arawanooto, kotyach Ebil-merodak laitoryatap Babilon eng' kenyiit ne po tai ne po laitornatennyi, Jehoiakin laitoryatap Judah, komong' eng' korgoreet;" 
Jeremiah52:32 ak ki ng'alaalji ineendet eng' rireenetapkei, ak konde ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet kotororit eng' che po laitorinik che ki mi Babilon kobooto ineendet." 
Jeremiah52:33 Ak ki wal ngoroikyik che po korgoreet, ak ki amis eng' tainnyi kotugul eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi." 
Jeremiah52:34 Ak ki igoochi laitoryatap Babilon ineendet kotugul kebebertanyi ne po amitwogik, ki igoochin peetuut age tugul kebeberta ne yamei eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi, agoi peetuutap meennyi." 
Lamentations1:1 Kalya si koguber nganaseet ne ki nyiitaat piik! Amu nee si kotebi ko uu kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot, nganaseet ne ki oo eng' pororyosyek! Ineendet ne ki cheptap laitoryat eng' emotinwek, ko kagoek anyun otwogindet." 
Lamentations1:2 Riirei miising' kemoi, ak korang'ugei peegap kong' eng' matang'wekyik. Ma mi agot agenge ne igoigoi ineendet eng' chamanikyik tugul. Ki koberber choronokyik tugul ineendet, ki koek puunikyik." 
Lamentations1:3 Ki kiluul Judah kwo nyalil, ak otwoknateet ne oo. Menyei nguno kwenutap pororyosyek ak ma sichei kamung'et. Kagonam ineendet `usiikyik tugul eng' ole pichiy." 
Lamentations1:4 Iteitos ortinwegap Zion, amu ma mi chii ne nyoonjin tuiyet ne ki king'at. Ki koek karaatya ormariichokyik tugul, tigendos tisiikyik. Kinyaliili pergeinikyik, ak kotinyei ineendet ng'wanindo." 
Lamentations1:5 Ki koek `usiikyik kandoik, ak koboor puunikyik. Kogonyaliil `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet amu chaang'indap pistaosyekyik. Kogimut lagokyik keluul eng' taitap puunyoot." 
Lamentations1:6 Kogoistoegei cheptap Zion toroornatennyi tugul; kogoigei pounikyik cheptirgichik che ma tinyei ole agetee. Kogomweiso icheek ama tinyei kimnateet eng' taitap chiito ne oonei. 
Lamentations1:7 Ibwaati Jerusalem peetuusyegap nyalilda ak pichiinwekyik. Ibwaati tuguukyik tugul che ki iboiboi ineendet kobooch peetuusyek che po keny. Ibwaati ye ki ibutyin piikyik eutap puunyoot, ama toret chii ineendet, Ki chot katerterikyik ineendet agobo kabutennyi." 
Lamentations1:8 Ki koyai Jerusalem tengekto ne ya miising'; kogoek anyun kiit ne murwoon amu nooto. Sasei ineendet tugul che ki konyiti ineendet, amu ki kogeer aach ngorinnyi. Ee, tigeni, ak koweechigei let." 
Lamentations1:9 Ki mi simdanyi ngoroikyik; ma ibwaat kagesunennyi ne po let. Katururgei anyun eng' kwong'eet; ma tinyei kagaigaindet: Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, keero nyalildanyu; amu kogotoroorgei puunyoot." 
Lamentations1:10 Kogoitoochi puunyoot eunnyi tuguukyik tugul che koboiboitune. Amu kagogeer kole kogochut pororyosyek oldanyi ne tiliil, che ki ing'at ile amat kochut icheek tuiyeng'ung'." 
Lamentations1:11 Tigendos piikyik tugul ye cheeng'ei amitwogik; ki kogoito tuguukwak che korooron si konyoorunee amitwogik che isoobi saboondo: Keero, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ibwaat; amu kaaegu ne kisasei." 
Lamentations1:12 Tos ma kiy eng' okweek, okweek tugul che osiirtoi? Ogeer ak obwaat ngo mi arageneet age tugul ne uu aragenennyu, ne ki kiyaiywo, ne ki inyalilena Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap nereegekyik che ng'woneen." 
Lamentations1:13 Ki iyook ineendet maat eng' parak koyookyi kawekyuk, ak ki iterteer maata koweek. Ki riich mesteet konam keelyekyuk, ki koweekyo let; ki koyaa aek panan ak atanui peet komugul." 
Lamentations1:14 Ki rat eunnyi chogitap pistaosyekyuk; ki konamgei tugul, ki koit kaatinnyu; ki koges kimnateennyu. Ki kondea Kiptaiyat eunekwak, ne ma amuuchi atonon agirinda." 
Lamentations1:15 Ki koyai `Kiptaiyat piik tugul che nyigoonen koek puch eng' kwenunnyu; ki koguurcho tuiyet ne ki king'at kole kotuatui neranikyuk. Ki kotyechatyech `Kiptaiyat pergeiyatap Judah ko uu ye kityechei ole kitue sabibuk. 
Lamentations1:16 Ariire anyun agobo tuguuchuuto; saitoi peegap kong' eng' konyekyuk; amu loo eng' anee kagaigaindet ne kata isoobi saboondanyu. Ki koek lagokyuk kibananook, amu ki koterteeris puunyoot." 
Lamentations1:17 Iitoi Zion eunekyik; ago ma mi chii ne igoigoi ineendet. Ki kong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Jakobo, kole egu puunikyik piik che menyei komoswekyik. Mi Jerusalem kwenunnywa ko uu kiit ne murwoon." 
Lamentations1:18 Po imanda Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ki angelelji ng'atuutyennyi. Asaok ale, ogas okweek pororyosyek tugul, ak ogeer aragenennyu. Kogimut pergeinikyuk ak neranikyuk koba koek luulenik." 
Lamentations1:19 Ki aguur chamanikyuk, ago ki iberbera. Ki pekyi nganaseet tisiikyuk ak poisyekyuk, Ye ki cheeng'jingei amitwogik kole kosoop saboonwekwak." 
Lamentations1:20 Keero, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ami pichiindo, anyalili moennyu kawalak muguleldanyu; amu kaangelel miising'. Rebisyei rotwetap chok eng' ole po saang', eng' ko oriit komi ne uu meet." 
Lamentations1:21 Ki kogas icheek ole atigendoi; ma mi chii ne igoigoa. Ki kogas puunikyuk tugul agobo nyalildanyu; poiboi icheek amu ki iyai ko uu nooto. Tuun iibu peetuut ne ki imwaite, si kegergeitu ak icheek." 
Lamentations1:22 Ingobwa taing'ung' yaitwogikwak tugul; ak iyachi icheek, ko uu ye ki iyaiywo agobo pistaosyekyuk tugul. Amu chaang' tigenoikyuk, ak tanui muguleldanyu." 
Lamentations2:1 Kalya si kotuge Kiptaiyat cheptap Zion pooldet eng' nereegekyik! Ki kotim karaaranindap Israel eng' kipsengwet konyo ng'wony, amata kobwaat ng'echereetap keelyekyik eng' peetuutap nereegekyik." 
Lamentations2:2 Kigong'em Kiptaiyat meng'otosyek tugul che po Jakobo ama riiree. Ki kobut eng' nereegekyik irimoigap cheptap Judah. Ki koturuur icheek kobwa ng'wony eng' kalilanet pounateet ak pounikyik. 
Lamentations2:3 Ki kotil kimnateetap Israel eng' nereegekyik che ng'woneen. Ki koweech eunnyi ne po tai konyo eng' taitap puunik. Ki kolal ineendet ko uu maat ne liplibeni eng' Jakobo, ne peelei komoswek tugul." 
Lamentations2:4 Ki koriich kwangennyi ko uu puunyoot, ki tonon kochuul eunnyi ne po tai ko uu puunyoot, ki kobar tugul che iboiboi koonyek; eng' emaitap cheptap Zion; ko ki koroong'ji nereegekyik che koroomen ko uu maat." 
Lamentations2:5 Ki igei Kiptaiyat puunyoot, Ki kong'em Israel; Ki kolugui kooriikyik tugul che po laitorinik, ki kobut irimoikyik. Ki kotesyi cheptap Judah riirek ak kateiyet." 
Lamentations2:6 Ki koisto emainnyi eng' koroomnateet ko uu mbareet, Ki kong'em oldanyi ole kituiyechin. Ki koisto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuiyet ne ki king'at ak sabato eng' Zion, ak eng' nyitatetap nereegekyik ko ki kogas laitoryat ak tisiindet." 
Lamentations2:7 Ki kotiimda Kiptaiyat kaptisisyennyi, ak ki kometo oldanyi ne tiliil. Ki konde eutap puunyoot irimoigap kooriikyik che po laitorinik. Ki kobolyo eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu eng' peetuutap tuiyet ne ki king'at." 
Lamentations2:8 Ki kochop Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'em irimeetap cheptap Zion; Ki kokwerto kiit ne kikwaise, tomo koaruny eunnyi eng' ng'emisyet: ki kogoochi irimeet ak tooteet kooteeiyo; ng'emaksei tuwai." 
Lamentations2:9 Isuwe kobendi ng'wony ormariichokyik; ki ng'em ak koiri temeleiywekyik. Mi laitoryandennyi ak pounikyik kwenutap pororyosyek ole ma mi ng'atuutyet; ma nyooru maotikyik ng'ang'utyet ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Lamentations2:10 Tebyei ng'wony poisyegap cheptap Zion, siistos; Ki koseerchi temburyek metowekwak ki kogermenegei kuniok. Pergeinigap Jerusalem ko kagoabuch metowekwak." 
Lamentations2:11 Ibwandos konyekyuk amu peegap kong', nyalili moennyu. Ki koroong'jigei ng'wony koitonyu, amu ng'emisyetap piikyuk; amu tanuitos lagok ak che reryei eng' ortinwegap nganaseet." 
Lamentations2:12 Riirchin kametwagikwak koleenjin, “Mi ano amitwogik ak divaik?” Ye katanuiso ko uu che kagiguoten eng' ortinwegap nganaseet, ye karoong'jigei saboonwekwak tegetigap kametwagikwak." 
Lamentations2:13 Abaoryanun aleen nee? Aragenen nee, ee cheptap Jerusalem? Aaechindosin ak nee, si kobiit agaigain, ee pergeiyat cheptap Zion? Amu oo ko uu nyanjet ole ki putok eng' inyee; ng'oo ne imuuchi konyain?" 
Lamentations2:14 Ki kogeer maotiguk ng'ang'utik agobo inyee che po tangoita ak perberyo; ak tomo kong'aany kotook tengektong'ung', si koweechin kogeny eng' ole ki kiluuljin, ago ki kogeer agobo inyee lautik che po puch ak ng'aleek che po kamaaset." 
Lamentations2:15 Icheek tugul che siirtoi ko iraprapchin eunek; reng'sei ak kolelechi metowekwak agobo cheptap Jerusalem, koleen: “Tos nganasaniito ne kiguure piik, ne ititaat eng' korooronindo, ne poiboiyetap ng'wony komugul?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Puuniguk tugul ko kagoyatyin kutusweekwak; reng'sei ak kosusei kelek; mwaei kole, “Ki kelugui ineendet! Iman, niito peetuut ne ki kicheeng'e; kagenyooru ak kagegeer!”" 
Lamentations2:17 Ki koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nooto ki kochop; kagoyai ng'olyoondennyi kosulda ko uu ye kiga ng'at eng' peetuusyek che po keny; kagowiirta kwo ng'wony ama riiree; kagogoochi puunyoot koboiboitunenen, ak kagotoroor kimnateetap puuniguk." 
Lamentations2:18 Ki riirchi `mugulelwekwak Kiptaiyat: ee irimeetap cheptap Zion! Ingotenden peegap kong' ko uu aineet peet ak kemoi! Amemuuny, amengosiis laptetap kondang'ung'!" 
Lamentations2:19 Ng'eet, waach kemoi eng' taunetap saisyegap kemoi! Rong'u muguleldang'ung' ko uu peek eng' taitap Kiptaiyat! Namji parak euneguk tokyi ineendet agobo saboonwegap lagoguk, che tanuitos eng' rubeet eng' tabandap ooreet age tugul." 
Lamentations2:20 Keero, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ibwaat, Tos ng'oo ne ki iyachi ko uu nooto? Tos amei kwonyiik iyotennywa, lagok che namei eng' eunekwak? Tos kibarchin tisiindet ak maotyot kaptisisyetap Kiptaiyat?" 
Lamentations2:21 Ruitos ng'wony murenik ak poisyek eng' ortinwek; kagebar pergeinikyuk ak neranikyuk eng' rotwetap chok; Ki ibar icheek eng' peetuutap nereegeguk, ki ibar ama iriiree." 
Lamentations2:22 Ki iguur puunikyuk eng' komosta age tugul, ko uu eng' peetuutap tuiyet ne ki king'at. Eng' peetuutap nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koma piit chii ne ki chilil anan ne ki ng'et. Icheeget che ki aname ak ariibe kobooch ko mengech ko ki koges punyondennyu." 
Lamentations3:1 Aa chiito ne ki ageer nyalilda eng' nereegek che po kirokto ne po Kamuktaindet. 
Lamentations3:2 Ki kondoiywo ak kogeno awendotee mesundeito ama lapkeiyet. 
Lamentations3:3 Iman kiitocha eunnyi, konyil ak konyil, peetuut komugul." 
Lamentations3:4 Ki koyai poortanyu ak iriryondennyu koosegitu; kigoiri kawekyuk. 
Lamentations3:5 Kigong'ota kogirindaa ak koyiemena ng'wanindo ak nyalilda. 
Lamentations3:6 Kigogoono atebee mesundeito, ko uu che ki kobek keny." 
Lamentations3:7 Kigong'ota kot koma amuuchi achilil; kigoganapcha nyororosyek che nyigiisen. 
Lamentations3:8 Ee, nga ariire ak aguursei agobo toreteet, kogerchin saang' saaennyu." 
Lamentations3:9 Kigong'ote ortinwekyuk koik che ki kiwai, kigogunuur ortinwekyuk." 
Lamentations3:10 Uu ineendet magalaluut ne sapchino, uu ng'etundo eng' komoswek che ung'ootiin." 
Lamentations3:11 Ki komaas ortinwekyuk ak kotonatona; ki koyaa aek chii ne mi ineegei. 
Lamentations3:12 Ki koriich kwangennyi ak kondea aek kiit ne kimwogei. 
Lamentations3:13 Ki komwogo kochut suennyu kipchabonigap motyennyi. 
Lamentations3:14 Ki aegu ne rorechin piik tugul; ak aegu tyendanywa peet komugul. 
Lamentations3:15 Kigonyiita ng'wanindo, kigogoono abogit ng'wonet." 
Lamentations3:16 Ki koirie kelekyuk kibargoinik, ki kotugeno oreek." 
Lamentations3:17 Ki iste saboondanyu kolooit eng' kaalyeet; ki autye ale poiboiyo ko nee. 
Lamentations3:18 Ara ki amwa ale kagolus kimnateennyu, kobooto tugul che kiga amang'u eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Lamentations3:19 Kabwaatetap nyalildanyu ak ombenateet, ng'wonet ak kipsegetetyet." 
Lamentations3:20 Ibwaati saboondanyu chooto kotugul, ak kong'uruuksei eng' oriitinnyu." 
Lamentations3:21 Ago abwaati niito, ak ko uu nooto atinye anyun kamang'unet ale:" 
Lamentations3:22 Ki rireenosyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kityo si ma kigeswech, amu mararu rireenosyekyik." 
Lamentations3:23 Leelachen rireenosyekyik karonet age tugul; oo imandang'ung'. 
Lamentations3:24 “Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kebebertanyu, amang'u ineendet anyun amu nooto.” Mwaei saboondanyu." 
Lamentations3:25 Myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' icheeget che igeni ineendet, eng' saboondo ne cheeng'ei ineendet." 
Lamentations3:26 Myee eng' chii komong' ak kogen eng' muitaet yetunetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Lamentations3:27 Myee eng' chii kogesen chogit eng' peetuusyegap ming'inatennyi. 
Lamentations3:28 Ingotep ineegei ak kosiis, amu kigesenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet." 
Lamentations3:29 Ingotoore kutinnyi temburyek; tamangap kobiit kamang'unet. 
Lamentations3:30 Ingogoochi matandanyi ineendet ne irabaachi; ak inginyiit ineendet chotisyet. 
Lamentations3:31 Amu ma timdoi Kiptaiyat agoi. 
Lamentations3:32 Agot nga kon arageneet, kota koriiree ko uu chaang'indap rireenosyekyik." 
Lamentations3:33 Amu ma kwetyin koibu nyalilda, anan kogoochi arageneet weeriigap piik." 
Lamentations3:34 Ye kityechatyechi kimonjororinik tugul che po ng'wony; 
Lamentations3:35 ye kimaase chii imaninnyi eng' taitap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'," 
Lamentations3:36 anan kibeet chii eng' imandanyi, tos ma keerei Kiptaiyat chooto?" 
Lamentations3:37 Ng'oo ineendet ne mwaei ak kosulda kioto, ng'oo ne ng'atei kioto ngo ma Kiptaiyat?" 
Lamentations3:38 Tos ma mang'une kutitap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' yaityet ak myeeindo? 
Lamentations3:39 Amu nee anyun si kong'unyng'uny chiito, chiito ne kagibir agobo tengekwogikyik?" 
Lamentations3:40 Ongisyach ak ketyem ortinwekyok, si keeweekyigei kogeny Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Lamentations3:41 Ongetokyi mugulelwekyok kobooto eunekyok Kamuktaindet ne mi kipsengwet. 
Lamentations3:42 Ki kibistoe ak ki kingelelse; ak tomo inyoiywech kaat. 
Lamentations3:43 Ki itugegei nereegek ak ioonatech; ki ibarisye ama iriiree. 
Lamentations3:44 Ki itugegei pooldet, si ma mang'une saautikyok kobwa ole imi." 
Lamentations3:45 Ki iyaech keige tugun che kibuktoi kelaktoi ak pusagaryek tugun che ma kiy eng' pororyosyek. 
Lamentations3:46 Ki koyatyech kutusweekwak puunikyok tugul. 
Lamentations3:47 Kabwanjech kaiyweisyet ak pichiindo, ng'emet ak ng'emisyet." 
Lamentations3:48 Rootei peekyuk po kong' ko uu ainoosyek, amu ng'emisyetap piikyuk." 
Lamentations3:49 Isururtoe peek konyekyuk che ma siisei, ama tinyei kamuung'et," 
Lamentations3:50 agoi kogeer Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kogeer eng' kipsengwet." 
Lamentations3:51 Iimi `konyekyuk saboondanyu eng' tuguuk che kiityi tiibiik tugul che po nganasennyu. 
Lamentations3:52 Kigoona icheek ko uu toriit, chooto ko puunikyuk che ki oona puch." 
Lamentations3:53 Ki koisto saboondanyu eng' keriinget, ak ki wiirena koik." 
Lamentations3:54 Rootei peek kosiirei metinnyu; ki aleen, “Kagigeswa.”" 
Lamentations3:55 Ki aguur kaineng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ami keriinget ne loo miising'." 
Lamentations3:56 Ki igas kutinnyu: “Ametiim itiiguk ye ariirchin agobo toreteet, ago koono kagaigaet!”" 
Lamentations3:57 Ki iriigu eng' peetuut ne ki aguurin: ki imwa ile, “Meiywei!”" 
Lamentations3:58 Ki itononji ng'aleegap muguleldanyu, ee Kiptaiyat; ki ityaach saboondanyu." 
Lamentations3:59 Ki igeer kanyalilenyu ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ibesyeiwo kirwoogennyu;" 
Lamentations3:60 Ki igeer yaaktaennywa tugul ne po mugetuut ak chobutikwak tugul che ki chop agobo anee. 
Lamentations3:61 Ki igas inyee chotisyennywa, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak chobutikwak tugul che ki chop agobo anee;" 
Lamentations3:62 Ki igas kutusweegap icheek che king'eetya ak kabwaatutikwak che ibwaati agobo anee peetuut komugul. 
Lamentations3:63 Ye tebyei ng'wony icheek ak ko ng'eetos, aa tyendanywa." 
Lamentations3:64 Iyaaktochini ng'wony icheek, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu poisyonigap eunekwak." 
Lamentations3:65 Igoochini mugulelwekwak kouegitu, igoochini icheek chubeng'ung'." 
Lamentations3:66 Ioonati icheek eng' nereegek, ak ing'em icheek koistoegei kurereetap kipsengwet ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Lamentations4:1 Kalya si komurwoniitu thahabu! Kalya si kowalagiis thahabu che tiliileen miising'! Kagirong' koigap ole-tiliil eng' tabandap ooreet age tugul. 
Lamentations4:2 Weeriigap Zion che po kamanuut ne oo ak ko uu thahabu che korooron, kalya si kiyanie icheek tereen, che poisyonigap eunegap cheptereniot!" 
Lamentations4:3 Agot lelwek kogoochin aarekwak kinet kochuchun, ago kagogolgolit piikyuk, ko uu tyong'igap songolik eng' surkwen." 
Lamentations4:4 Yaamjin ng'elyeptap lakweet ne reryei kutinnyi amu melelda; soomei lagok amitwogik, ama mi chii ne putyin." 
Lamentations4:5 Icheeget che paegei amitwogigap talbisto kemetoi eng' ortinwek; icheeget che kinerta kalaaksetap ngoroik che piriireen ko tebee kapng'atat. 
Lamentations4:6 Amu ki koeet piretap piikyuk kosiir kergong'yetap Sodom, ne ki king'em kigabui eng' sait ne matya, ama twa chii." 
Lamentations4:7 Ki tiliileen piikyik che taagunotiin kosiir teluji, ak ki leelachen kosiir cheego. Poorwekwak ko ki piriireen kosiir koik che kiguure peninim, ki sitatiin ko uu koita ne kiguure sapphire." 
Lamentations4:8 Ago eng' ra, ko tuuen togoochikwak kosiir nesek; ma kinyiti eng' ortinwek. Namegei irireenikwak ak kawekwak; ki koyaam kogoigei keetit ne yamaat." 
Lamentations4:9 Kaigaen icheeget che parei rotwetap chok kosiir icheeget che parei rupeet; che mandoi sabeet mutyo, amu ma nyoor amitwogigap mbar." 
Lamentations4:10 Ki konam kwonyiik che ki tinyei rireenet lagokwak koyo; ki ek chooto amitwogikwak eng' ng'emisyetap piikyuk. 
Lamentations4:11 Ki koyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nereegekyik che ng'woneen kosulda, ki korong' nereegekyik che koroomen; ak ki konaam maat eng' Zion, ne ki kobeel lumeiywekyik." 
Lamentations4:12 Ki ma koyani laitorinigap ng'wony, anan piik tugul che menyei ng'wony, kole imuuchi usiindet anan puunyoot kochut ormariichogap Jerusalem." 
Lamentations4:13 Ki piit ko uu niito amu tengekwogigap maotikyik, ak yaitwogigap tisiikyik, che kitumda korotiigap piik che po iman eng' kwenunnyi." 
Lamentations4:14 Ombenioti eng' ortinwek ko uu kipkoratinik, ki komurwanitu amu korotiik, kot koma ko kanyei chii kotiny ngoroikwak." 
Lamentations4:15 Ki wokyi piik koleenji, “Oistegei, murwonen! Oistegei, oistegei, amatotiny!” Ara ki ek che mweisoti ak ko ombeniot, ak ki leenjigei piigap pororyosyek, “Ma kotebyei olito kogeny.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Ki koseerseer `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet icheek; ma koiti `Inee icheek kogeny; ma koiti tisiik koek kiy, ama kotinyei konyit poisyek." 
Lamentations4:17 Kagong'etyo konyekyok kigeni toreteet ne ma kigeere; ki kigen eng' kagenisyet kowelelegei pororyet ne ka ma imuuchi kosar chii. 
Lamentations4:18 Ki cheeng' kakwautikyok, kot ko ki mata kimuuchi keebe eng' ortinwekyok. Kagesunennyo ko ki riik, peetuusyekyok ko ki kiiti amu ki kagoit let nenyo." 
Lamentations4:19 Che ki onatech ko ki chepcheben kosiir kipsichinigap parak, ki onatech eng' tuloonook, ki ripistos kogenech eng' surkwen." 
Lamentations4:20 Ineendet ne iilaat ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kabusetap saboonwekyok, ko ki namji keriingonikwak, ne ki kimwae acheek keleen, “Eng' urwetap kebebaikyik ko ki menyei kwenutap pororyosyek.”" 
Lamentations4:21 Paibaitu ak igaskei, ee cheptap Edom, ne imenye emetap Uz; amu agot aginye ko ityinin kigombet; ibogiti ak iputkei itebi aach ngor." 
Lamentations4:22 Piretap tengektong'ung', ee cheptap Zion ko kagosulda; ma komutin kogeny keluulin: ago tengektong'ung', ee cheptap Edom, ko iityin ineendet pireet, ng'aanyei tengekwogiguk kotook." 
Lamentations5:1 Ibwaat anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kiit ne kagoityech; keero, keer chotisyennyo!" 
Lamentations5:2 Ki kigoochi porotennyo kiprutoin, ki kigoochi kooriikyok piich che po emotinwo alak." 
Lamentations5:3 Ko keegu piich che ma tinyei sigiik ak che ma tinyei kwan. Kogoigei kametisyekyok mosoogik. 
Lamentations5:4 Si ke ee peekyok, ko agoi keal eng' robiinik; si kenyooru keetiikyok, ko agoi keal." 
Lamentations5:5 Ichegeet che onatech, ko ang'juto neegit konamech kaat; kigeng'etye ama ki tinyei kamuung'et." 
Lamentations5:6 Ki kigonugei kegoochi toretetap euut Misiri ak Assyria, asi kenyooru amitwogik che yamech." 
Lamentations5:7 Ki yai tengek kwanisyekyok ak ma komi; ang'ni anyun kigegesen tengekwogikwak. 
Lamentations5:8 Poiywech otwogik; ma mi chii ne sarwech kemang'une eunekwak. 
Lamentations5:9 Kindoii saboonwekyok ng'oiyondit si kobiit kenyooru amitwogik, amu rotwetap chok eng' surkwen." 
Lamentations5:10 Laldos irireenikyok ko uu ole kilaali amu rubeet ne lalei ne po iljet. 
Lamentations5:11 Ki inyaliil `murenik kwonyiik eng' Zion ak konyaliil pergeinik eng' nganasoogap Judah. 
Lamentations5:12 Ki igartaat pounik eng' eunekwak; ama nyoor teegisto poisyek. 
Lamentations5:13 Kang'etyo neranik koganopi koitap pai, ak terteiyoti lagok kolaei keetiik." 
Lamentations5:14 Poisyek che cham komi ormariichet koma komi, ak neranik koma kotyendos." 
Lamentations5:15 Ma komi poiboiyet mugulelwekyok; ki kowalak ureryennyo koek riirek. 
Lamentations5:16 Ki kobut kuutweet eng' metowekyok; pwo eng' acheek amu ki keyai tengek. 
Lamentations5:17 Amu nooto ko kagonyalulso mugulelwekyok; amu tuguuchuuto ka kagogoryo konyekyok. 
Lamentations5:18 Amu tulweetap Zion, ne ki koek karaatya; ko pendate lelwek olooto." 
Lamentations5:19 Ago inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ii laitorani koigeny; laitornateng'ung' kotononi ko po ibinda agoi ibinda age." 
Lamentations5:20 Amu nee anyun si iutyenech agoi? Amu nee si imeteech ne tee noo? 
Lamentations5:21 Waleech kewekyiingei, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, si keeweege; ileliit peetuusyekyok ko uu keny," 
Lamentations5:22 aiya ko ki ieesyech miising', ak iting'enech nereegek che ma iitoksei." 
Ezekiel1:1 Ki ageer ng'ang'utigap Kamuktaindet eng' kenyiitap sosom, eng' arawet ne po ang'wan, eng' peetuutap muut ne po arawanooto ye kingo yaatak kipsengwet ami kobooto luulenik eng' ye neegitee aineetap Kebar." 
Ezekiel1:2 Eng' peetuut ne po muut ne po arawet, ne ki kenyiitap muut kong'etee ngeluul laitoryat Jehoiakin," 
Ezekiel1:3 ko ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Ezekiel tisiindet, weeriitap Buzi, eng' emetap Kaldeik, eng' ye neegitee aineetap Kebar; ak kimi eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paragunnyi eng' olooto." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ogeero! Ki ageer usoonetap ropta ne oo komang'une murot kaataam; pooldet ne oo, kobooto kalyeleet ne oo ne kiyiem kakweng'seet ne kiim. Eng' kwenunnyi ko kitogu kiit ne uu itoondap taet, komang'une kwenutap maat." 
Ezekiel1:5 Ak ki mang'une kwenunnyi kergeindo ne po tuguuk ang'wan che saptos. Ki uu ni itoondanywa; ki tinyei itoonwek che uu che po chii. 
Ezekiel1:6 Ki tinyei age tugul togoochik ang'wan, ak ki tinyei age tugul eng' icheek kebebaik ang'wan." 
Ezekiel1:7 Ak ki chuulotin keelyekwak; ak ki uu keldebesaigap keelyekwak siyogap moita: ak ki ilildoi ko uu itoondap sugunwet ne sitaat. 
Ezekiel1:8 Ki tinyei eng' kebebaikwak oriit che po komoswekwak ang'wan eunek che uu che po chiito. Ki tinyei icheeget ang'wanu togoochikwak ak kebebaikwak ko uu ni: 
Ezekiel1:9 kiga namgei kebebaikwak; ki ma kogusegong' ye kibendi; kiwendi age tugul kogeerei tai. 
Ezekiel1:10 Kergeindap togoochikwak ko ki uu ni: ki tinyei age tugul eng' icheek ko ang'wan togeet ne uu ne po chiito, togeet ne uu ne po ng'etundo eng' komostap tai, togeet ne uu ne po eito eng' komostap kaataam, ak togeet ne uu ne po kipsiichit." 
Ezekiel1:11 Kibesyotin togoochikwak ak kebebaikwak eng' ole po parak; kiga namgei kebebaik aeng' eng' age tugul, ak kotuch kebebaik aeng' poorwekwak." 
Ezekiel1:12 Ki wo tai age tugul: ki pa icheek ole kamach muguleldo; ki ma kogusegong' ye kibendi. 
Ezekiel1:13 Kergeindap tuguuchooto saptos ko ki uu itoondanywa ng'etetyot, ko uu tagunetap kegenganik: kiwendate maata kwenutap tuguuchooto saptos: ak ki ikweng'sei miising' maata, ak ki mang'une kalyeleet maata." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ak ki rwaei tuguuchooto saptos ak koweechegei ko uu kakweng'eetap kalyeleet. 
Ezekiel1:15 Kingo ta ageere anyun tuguuchooto saptos, ogeero, ki tonone ng'wony tireet agenge eng' ye neegitee tuguuchooto saptos, kotinyei age tugul eng' togoochichooto ang'wan cheptirennyi." 
Ezekiel1:16 Ki uu itoondap tiroochooto kobooto poisyennywa, itoondap berulo: ak ki tinyei icheek tugul ko ang'wan kergeindo agenge: ak ki uu itoondanywa ak poisyennywa tireet ne mi kwenutap tireet age." 
Ezekiel1:17 Ye ki pendi kobunei komoswekwak ang'wan: ki ma kogusegong' ye ki pendi. 
Ezekiel1:18 Ki torooreen kariik che tyektoe tiroochooto ak ki imuisei; ak ki nyiitootiin koonyek komoswek tugul eng' kariikwak che tyektoe, che ki tinyei icheek tugul ko ang'wan." 
Ezekiel1:19 Ak ye kingo pa tuguuchooto saptos, koba tiroochooto ak icheek koboiyotyin: ak ki ngeganap tuguuchooto saptos eng' ng'wony, keganapta tiroochooto ak icheek." 
Ezekiel1:20 Ki pa ui tugul ole kamach kabuuset; kiwendi kabuuset olooto agine: ak ki kiganapta tiroochooto tuguuchooto; amu kimi kabuusetap kioto sabei, tirook." 
Ezekiel1:21 Kingo pa chuun, koba chu ak icheek; ak kingo tononso chuun, kotononso chu ak icheek; ak ki ngeganap chuun eng' ng'wony, keganapta tirook ak icheek: amu kimi kabuusetap kioto sabei tirook." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ak kimi paragutap metitap kioto sabei kergeindap sengwetyet, ne uu peek che kagau che imuisei, ne ki kiitoe paragutap metowekwak." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ak ki chuulotin kebebaikwak eng' kurereetap sengwetyet ko katokyigei `age age: ki tinyei age tugul kebebaik aeng' che tuchei komosi, ak ki tinyei age tugul kebebaik aeng' che tuchei komosin, che tuchei poorwekwak." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ak kingo pendi, agas kirgirenetap kebebaikwak ko uu cheetap peek che chaang', ko uu tweguunetap Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet, ko uu cheet ne imuuti, ne kergei ak cheetap lugeet: kingo tononso kochoor kebebaikwak kobwa ng'wony." 
Ezekiel1:25 Ak ki piit cheet eng' paragutap sengwetyet ne ki mi paragutap metowekwak: kingo tononso, kochoor kebebaikwak kobwa ng'wony." 
Ezekiel1:26 Ak kimi paragutap sengwetyet, ne ki mi paragutap metowekwak, kergeindo ne po ng'echereetap laitornatet, ne uu itoondanyi koita ne kiguure sapphire: ak kimi paragutap kergeindo ne po ng'echeranooto po laitornatet, kergeindo ne po itoondap chiito eng' paragunnyi." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ak ki ageer kiit ne uu itoondap taet, ko uu itoondo ne po maat eng' ole po oriit eng' komoswek tugul, kong'etee itoondap suennyi ak kwo parak; ak kong'etee itoondap suennyi ak kwo ng'wony, ko ki ageer itoondo ne po maat, ak kigayiem ineendet kakweng'et." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ko uu ole teptoi itoondap chepkuinobor eng' poolik eng' peetuutap ropta, ko ki uu nooto itoondap kakweng'et eng' komoswek tugul. Ki niito itoondap kergeindo ne po liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ak kinga keer, abut kot kotiiny togeet, ak ki agas kutitap ineendet ne ki ng'alaali." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ak kimwaiwo koleenjo, Ee, weeriitap chii, tonon, si ang'alaalun." 
Ezekiel2:2 Ak ye ki ng'alaalwo ineendet, konyoonjo anyun kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ak konama atonon; ak ki agas kong'alaalwo ineendet." 
Ezekiel2:3 Kimwaiwo koleenjo, Ee, weeriitap chii, kayookten iwe emetap piigap Israel, ye mi pororyosyek che ngelelik, che ki kongelelja; ki kongelelja icheek kobooto kwanisyekwak agoi peetuuni." 
Ezekiel2:4 Ak ma tinye kalilanet lagok ak ko uueen mugulelwekwak. Kayookten iwe ye mi pichooto, ak ileenji icheek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu niito." 
Ezekiel2:5 Agot ngo kas icheek anan koma kas, (amu icheeget ko koot ne ngelelyo,) ko tuun naei kole kimi maotyot kwenunnywa." 
Ezekiel2:6 Meiywei icheek anyun inyee, weeriitap chii, anan iywei ng'aleekwak. Meiywei agot ngo yiemin katook che rutei piich ak che toorei piich ak imenye kwenutap tagolik. Meiywei ng'aleekwak anan itoptoben eng' togoochikwak, agot nganda koot ne ngelelyot." 
Ezekiel2:7 Mwachi icheek ng'aleekyuk, agot ngo kas anan koma kas; amu ngelelik miising'." 
Ezekiel2:8 Ago kas inyee, ee weeriitap chii, kiit ne amwaun; amengelel ko uu koyooto ngelelyot; yaat kuting'ung' ak iam kiit ne agoonin." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ki ageer anyun, ak ogeero ki kiyogoiywa euut ne kinamei bukuit ne mamanat." 
Ezekiel2:10 Ki iito eng' tainnyu; ak ki kisir oriit ak saang'; ak kiga kisirchi yooto kateiyasyek, riirek ak nyalilwogik." 
Ezekiel3:1 Kimwaiwo koleenjo, “Ee, weeriitap chii, am ne kenyooru; am bukuini mamanat ak iwe ing'alaalji kootap Israel.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Ki ayaat anyun kutinnyu, ak ki koono aam bukuinooto." 
Ezekiel3:3 Yeityo koleenjo, Weeriitap chii, pai kobiyo moeng'ung' eng' bukuini kagoonin. Ki aam anyun; ak ki anyiny eng' kutinnyu ko uu kumyat." 
Ezekiel3:4 Ak ki leenjo, Weeriitap chii, ui kootap Israel ak imwachi icheek ng'aleekyuk." 
Ezekiel3:5 Amu ma kiyookten iwe ye mi piik che megase ng'aleekwak anan ko che po kutit ne uui, ago iwe kootap Israel." 
Ezekiel3:6 Ma kiyookten iwe pororyosyek che chaang' che po ng'aleek che teer anan ko che po kutit ne uui, che memuuchi igas ng'aleekwak. Iman, nda ko kayooktochin icheek, ko kota kasin." 
Ezekiel3:7 Ago ma kasin kootap Israel; amu ma machei icheek kogasa; amu uueen metowo ago uueen mugulelwok koot tugul ne po Israel. 
Ezekiel3:8 Keero, kaayai togeng'ung' kogirinda togoochikwak, ak kaauit turyetap togeng'ung' kogirinda turyetap togoochikwak." 
Ezekiel3:9 Kaayai turyetap togeng'ung' kouiit ko uu koita ne uui kosiir rwandet ne uui; ameiywei pichooto anan itoptoben eng' togoochikwak, agot nganda kot ne ngelelyot." 
Ezekiel3:10 Kimwaiwo ineendet kogeny koleenjo, Ee weeriitap chii, taach eng' muguleldang'ung' ak igas eng' itiiguk, ng'aleekyuk tugul che amwaun." 
Ezekiel3:11 Yeityo iwe ole mi che ki kiluul, agoi kaplagogap piiguk, ak ing'alaalji icheek, ileenji, “Mwaei ko uu ni Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor”; agot ngo kas anan ko ngo ma kas." 
Ezekiel3:12 Yeityo koganaba kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, ak agas cheetap kirgirenet ne oo eng' patennyu, kole, “Iberuurot toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kong'etee oldanyi.”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Ak ki agas cheet ne po kebebaigap tuguuchooto saptos ye kitiinyegei, ak kirgirenetap tirook che ki namgei tugul, nooto ko cheetap kirgirenet ne oo." 
Ezekiel3:14 Koganaba anyun kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, ak komuta oldo age; ak ki awe eng' ng'wanindo, eng' nereegegap saboondanyu, ak kichiila eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kimnateet." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ki anyoo ye mi icheek che ki kiluul eng' Tel-abib ye neegitee aineetap Kebar. Ki anyoo ak ki atebee olooto, peetuusyek tisap, akwong'e." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ak kingo kagogeskei peetuusyek tisabu, konyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo:" 
Ezekiel3:17 Ee weeriitap chii, kandein iegu riibindet eng' kootap Israel: kas anyun ng'olyoot ne amwae, ak iteechi icheek eng' ng'olyoondennyu." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ye amwachi kiptengekyot aleenji, Imee iman; ama iteechi ineendet, anan ing'alaal iteechi kiptengekyot kometo ooreennyi ne ya, si kobiit isaru saboondanyi; meei kiptengekyondonooto eng' tengektanyi; ago amagenen korotiikyik." 
Ezekiel3:19 Ago ngot iteechi kiptengekyot, ama week chiichooto kometo yaityennyi, anan kometo ooreennyi ne ya, komeei eng' tengektanyi; ago kaisaru saboondang'ung'." 
Ezekiel3:20 Kogeny, ngo masta chiito ne po iman, kometo imandanyi, ak koyai tengekto, ak ande kanagutyet tainnyi, komeei ineendet; ko amu ma iteechi, komeei anyun eng' tengektanyi, ama kibwaati poisyonikyik che po iman, che kiga koyai; ago amagenen korotiikyik." 
Ezekiel3:21 Ago ngot iteechi chiito ne po iman, si ma yai chiichooto po iman tengekto, ama yai tengekto, kosabei iman, amu ki kas kateunet; ak kaisaru saboondang'ung'." 
Ezekiel3:22 Ak kimi paragunnyu eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto; ak ki leenjo, Ng'eet, ui warenget, si ang'alaalun eng' olooto." 
Ezekiel3:23 Ki ang'eet anyun ak awe warenget: ak ogeero, ki tonon liilindo ne ki ageer eng' ye neegitee aineetap Kebar: ak ki abut kot kotiiny togeet ng'wony." 
Ezekiel3:24 Kichuta anyun kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, ak konama atonon; ak ki ng'alaalwo, koleenjo, Ui, kerchigei koong'ung'." 
Ezekiel3:25 Ago, keero, inyee weeriitap chii, ratenen pichooto poroonik, ak koratin eng' tuguuchooto si memande ole mi icheek:" 
Ezekiel3:26 ak ayae ng'eleptang'ung', kouiit eng' kuting'ung', si konamagen kuut, si ma itechini icheek: amu icheeget ko koot ne ngelelyot." 
Ezekiel3:27 Ak ye ang'alaalun ayaate kuting'ung', ak ileenji icheek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ingogas ineendet ne kasei; ak ingoesyo ineendet ne eesyoi: amu icheeget ko koot ne ngelelyot." 
Ezekiel4:1 Ee, inyee weeriitap chii, cheeng'jingei matabaryat, ak inde taing'ung' ak isir itoondap nganaseet, nooto Jerusalem:" 
Ezekiel4:2 ak iyiem, ak iteech irimoik iyieme, ak iwasyi ng'ung'unyek, ak iteech kooriik kotokyigei, ak inde komoswek tugul injinisyek che kibute nganaseet." 
Ezekiel4:3 Yeityo icheeng' taabeetap karnet, ak ilumde koek tooteetap karnet eng' kwenung'ung', ak nganaseet: ak itokyi togeng'ung' nganaseet, si kobiit keyiem, ak iyiem inyeendet, ak imuut ineendet. Egu niito kaboorunet eng' kootap Israel." 
Ezekiel4:4 Ak iru kogeny isyep komostap kaataam, ak inde tengektap kootap Israel paragunnyi: iibe tengektonywa ko uu koitetap peetuusyek che isyebe komosato." 
Ezekiel4:5 Amu ki ang'at kenyiisyegap tengektonywa koek eng' inyee koitetap peetuusyek, chooto ko peetuusyek pogol somok ak tamanwogik sogool: iibe anyun ko uu nooto tengektap kootap Israel." 
Ezekiel4:6 Ak kogeny, ye kaiyai chuuto kosulda, iru isyep komostap tai, ak iibe tengektap kootap Judah: peetuusyek artam, peetuut agenge ko po kenyiit agenge, kang'atiin anyun ko uu nooto." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ak itokyi togeng'ung' yiemetap Jerusalem, koma tugoot eung'ung'; ak imaotenji." 
Ezekiel4:8 Keero, aratenen poroonik, si meweege isyep komosta age, agoi igeesu peetuusyegap yiemeng'ung'." 
Ezekiel4:9 Ipchigei anyun kogeny nganuuk, ak baale, ak magandek, ak sogoryek, ak mosong'ik ak kusemet, ak inde tereet agenge, ak ichopchinegei amitwogik; ko uu koitetap peetuusyek che irue isyebe kebeber, chooto peetuusyek pogol somok ak tamanwogik sogool, iame tuguuchooto." 
Ezekiel4:10 Ak iame amitwogiguk che kigerei, shekelisyek tiptem eng' peetuut; iame chooto kotugul." 
Ezekiel4:11 Ak ee peek che kigerei, iee kigombok aeng' eng' peetuut." 
Ezekiel4:12 Iame ko uu magatiinik ak baale, ak ibeele ng'atateegap piik kogeerei icheek." 
Ezekiel4:13 Ak ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, amei ko uu nooto piigap Israel magatinikwak ko ng'woneen, eng' pororyosyek ole tuun aoonjini." 
Ezekiel4:14 Ki amwa anyun ale, “Ee, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Keero, tomo kimurwon saboondanyu; amu kobooch ko aa ming'in agoi nguno kotom aam kiy ne kameei ineegei, anan ne kabar tyong'in; ama chut kutinnyu panyeek che ng'woneen.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Yeityo koleenjo anyun, Keero, kaagoonin ng'atateegap tuuga igeere che po piik, ak ichobe magatiniguk chooto." 
Ezekiel4:16 Ki leenjo kogeny, Ee weeriitap chii, keero, atile amitwogik eng' Jerusalem kong'ering'itu: ak koamei icheek amitwogik che kigerei, che kendoi kot; ak eei peek che kigerei, ak eng' kwong'eet." 
Ezekiel4:17 Si kobiit korarchi amitwogik ak peek, ak kokwong'ee `age age, ak kochuchuiso eng' tengektonywa." 
Ezekiel5:1 Ee inyee, weeriitap chii, cheeng'jingei rotwetap chok ne ng'atip, ak iboisyee ko uu rotwetap chiito ne inemu metit, si icherunee meting'ung' ak tamneng'ung': yeityo inam kiit ne kirogendoisye, ak igere, si ipchee sumeechooto." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ak ibeel kebeberta agenge eng' somok eng' kwenutap nganaseet, ye kagosulda peetuusyegap yiemet; ak iip kebeberta age eng' somok ak irarate iep kotuiyo eng' rotwonooto po chok; ak iseerte kebeberta agenge eng' somok koip usoonet, ak ang'usu rotwetap chok asube icheek." 
Ezekiel5:3 Ak inam suumeek che ng'ering', ak iratyi ngoryeeng'ung'." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ak inemu alak eng' chuuto kogeny, ak iwiirchi ma, ak ibeel eng' ma; si komang'une maat sumeechooto ak kobeel koot tugul ne po Israel." 
Ezekiel5:5 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole niito ko Jerusalem: ki ande kwenutap pororyosyek, ak mi emotinwek komoswekyik." 
Ezekiel5:6 Ak ki kongelelji kirwoogutikyuk amu ki yai sogornateet kosiir pororyosyek alak, ak kongelelji ng'atuutikyuk kosiir emotinwek che mi komoswekyik tugul: amu ki koeesyo kirwoogutikyuk, ama pendate icheek ng'atuutikyuk." 
Ezekiel5:7 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu oo piik che wasegei kosiir pororyosyek che mi komoswekwok, ama obendate ng'atuutikyuk, ama oriip kirwoogutikyuk, ama osup ng'atuutigap pororyosyek che mi komoswekwok;" 
Ezekiel5:8 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ogeero, aboryenen agane; ak ayai kirwoogutik eng' kwenung'ung' eng' taitap pororyosyek." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ak ayai eng' inyee kiit ne tomo ayae, ak kiit ne ma tuun ayae ne uu nooto kogeny, amu tuguuguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel5:10 Amei anyun kwanisyek weeriik eng' kwenung'ung', ak koam weeriik kwanisyekwak; ak ayai kirwoogutik eng' inyee, ak aseer piik tugul che ng'etu eng' okweek, aseerchi usoonaik tugul." 
Ezekiel5:11 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye asabe aming'inin iman, amarirenen kondanyu, anan koriira moo, amu ki ing'wanit oldanyu ne tiliil eng' tuguuguk tugul che samisen, ak tuguuguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel5:12 Meei kebeberta agenge eng' somok eng' inyee eng' koroito, ak kigeesu icheek eng' rubeet eng' kwenung'ung'; ak kobek eng' rotwetap chok kebeberta agenge eng' somok, eng' komosweguk tugul; ak aseer kebeberta agenge eng' somok koba koriswek tugul, ak ang'usu rotwetap chok koosup icheek." 
Ezekiel5:13 Isuldoi anyun nereegekyuk ko uu nooto, ak anereekyini icheek eng' nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, kot koyama, si kigaigaa: si konai icheek kole anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki ang'alaal eng' kagiilennyu pogei, ye kaayai nereegekyuk che ng'woneen kosulda eng' icheek." 
Ezekiel5:14 Kogeny ayain iegu karaatya ak ne kiteweeri, eng' pororyosyek che mi komosweguk tugul, eng' taitap icheek tugul che siirtoi." 
Ezekiel5:15 Egu ko uu nooto anyun teweernateet ak sasisyet, kaneetisyet ak kwong'eet, eng' pororyosyek che mi komosweguk tugul, ye ayae kirwoogutik eng' inyee eng' nereegek, ak eng' nereegek che ng'woneen, ak eng' kereetap kong' ne ng'waan: kaamwa anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito:" 
Ezekiel5:16 ye amwoge icheek kipchabonik che yaacheen che po rubeet, che po ng'emisyet, che ayoogu kong'emak, ak ateswok rubeet, ak atile amitwogikwok." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ak ayookwok rubeet, ak tyong'ik che yaacheen, che parenen piik; ak kobun kwenung'ung' koroito ak korotiik; ak aibun rotwetap chok konyo paragung'ung': kaamwa anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito." 
Ezekiel6:1 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel6:2 Ee weeriitap chii, tokyi togeng'ung' tuloonoogap Israel, ak imaotenji," 
Ezekiel6:3 ileenji, ogas okweek tuloonoogap Israel, ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: mwachin Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuloonook che eecheen ak che mengeechen, kereruusyek ak atebwosyek: Ogeero, aibwok agane rotwetap chok, ak ang'em komoswekwok che torooreen." 
Ezekiel6:4 Ak koek karatwek kapkorosusyekwok, ak ketui kanamonikwok che po asiista: ak awirte piikwok che kigebar, eng' taitap kanamonikwok." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ak ande muuswegap piigap Israel taitap kanamonikwak; ak aseerchi kawekwok komoswek tugul che po kapkorosusyekwok. 
Ezekiel6:6 King'emei nganasook eng' meng'otosyekwok tugul, ak koek karatwek komoswek che torooreen; si kobiit keng'em kapkorosusyekwok ak keyai koek karatwek, ak ketui kanamonikwok kobetyo, ak keep kanamonikwok che po asiista, ak kigees poisyonikwok." 
Ezekiel6:7 Ak kobutyo eng' kwenung'wong' che tuun ki parei, si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel6:8 Ago atuuchi che ng'etu, si kobiit onyooru che chilildos eng' rotwetap chok eng' pororyosyek, ye kiseerak obe emotinwek." 
Ezekiel6:9 Ak kobwaata icheek che chilildos eng' okweek eng' pororyosyek ole tuun kimutyin koek luulenik, ko uu ye ki komea mugulel agobo kugoinatetap mugulelwekwak, che ki koistoenagei, ak agobo konyekwak, che ibotegei ak kanamonikwak: ak wechegei icheegei agobo yaitwogik che ki koyai eng' tuguukwak tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel6:10 Ak konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ma amwa puch ale ayachini icheek yaityoni. 
Ezekiel6:11 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Irabaach eng' eung'ung' ak ityech eng' keeldong'ung',” ak ile, pwo amu tuguuk tugul che kiwechei che po kootap Israel: amu parei icheek rotwetap chok, ak rubeet, ak koroito." 
Ezekiel6:12 Parei koroito ineendet ne mi ole loo; ak parei rotwetap chok ineendet ne neegit; ak parei rubeet ineendet ne ng'etu ne ki kigerchi nganaseet: ayae nereegekyuk che ng'woneen kosulda ko uu nooto eng' icheek. 
Ezekiel6:13 Ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye tuun mi piikwak che kigebar, kobooto kanamonikwak, che mi kapkorosusyekwak komoswekwak tugul eng' tulweet age tugul ne ming'in ne toroor, eng' walisyek tugul che po tuloonook, ak eng' kelutap keetit age tugul ne tuon, ak eng' kelutap keetit age tugul ne nyigiis, ole kibeeljine kanamonikwak tugul nyamdutik." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ak achuulji icheek eunnyu, ak ayai emet koguber ak koek karaatya, kobooch surkwen kotokyigei Dibla, eng' meng'otosyekwak tugul: si konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel7:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel7:2 Ee inyee, weeriitap chii, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komwachin emetap Israel, koleenjin, Kagesunet: kagonyonji kagesunet luukwek ang'wan che po emet." 
Ezekiel7:3 Kaityin anyun kagesunet, ak ayoogun nereegekyuk, ak arwoogun ko uu ortinweguk; ak aibun tuguuguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel7:4 Amarirenen kondanyu, ama riira moo: ago aibu ortinweguk, ak kotebee kwenung'ung' tuguuguk che po wegeet: si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel7:5 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Yaityet, yaityet kityo, keero, nyoonei." 
Ezekiel7:6 Kagonyo kagesunet, ng'eetyinin; keero, nyoonei." 
Ezekiel7:7 Kagonyonjin kagikyineng'ung', ee inyee ne imeng'iisyei eng' emet: kagoit peetuusyek, kagoriik peetuut; peetuutap wasetapkei eng' tuloonook, ma waagaat ne po poiboiyet." 
Ezekiel7:8 Karik anyun si aroong'jin nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, ak ayai kosulda nereegekyuk eng' inyee, ak arwoogun ko uu ortinweguk; ak aibun tuguuguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel7:9 Amarirenen kondanyu, ama riira moo: aibun ko uu ortinweguk, ak kotebee kwenung'ung' tuguuguk che po wegeet; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne abirisyei." 
Ezekiel7:10 Keer peetuut o, keero, nyoonei: kagonyo kagikyineng'ung'; kagoyesyo taaptogap kirokto, kagong'at menoteet." 
Ezekiel7:11 Kang'eet koroomnateet koek kirokto ne po tengekto; ma mi ne ng'etu eng' icheek, anan ne po chaang'indonywa, anan ne po mogornatennywa: ama piitu kateeiyet eng' kwenunnywa." 
Ezekiel7:12 Kagoit peetuusyek, riigu peetuut: amat kobaibait alindet, anan koaragen aldaindet: amu miitei nereegek eng' chaang'indonywa tugul." 
Ezekiel7:13 Amu ma weekyingei aldaindet kiit ne ki aldoi, agot ngo ta kosabei: amu po ng'ang'utyet tuiyet komugul, ma weechegei chii; ama igimitegei chii tengektap sabeennyi." 
Ezekiel7:14 Kagoguut iryageet, ak kagochop tuguuk tugul; ago ma mi ne wendi pooryeet: amu mi nereegekyuk chaang'indonywa tugul." 
Ezekiel7:15 Mi saang' rotwetap chok, komi oriit koroito, ak rubeet: ineendet ne mi mbar komeei eng' rotwetap chok; ak ineendet ne mi nganaseet, koamei rubeet ineendet ak koroito." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ago chilildos icheeget che chilildos, ak koigei eng' tuloonook cheptugenigap atebwosyek, riirtos tugul, riirei chii age tugul eng' tengektanyi." 
Ezekiel7:17 Nyaluldos eunek tugul, ak kochootyo kutung'oik tugul ko uu peek." 
Ezekiel7:18 Kermenegei kogeny kuniok, ak kotuch icheek kamuiset; ak kolilaanso tugul, ak konam icheek tugul pooswek." 
Ezekiel7:19 Wiirchin fedhaisyekwak ortinwek, ak koigei thahabusyekwak kiit ne murwoon; ma imuuchi kosar icheek fedhaisyekwak ak thahabusyekwak eng' peetuutap nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma piyong'dos saboonwekwak, anan konyi mootinwekwak: amu kagoek kanagutyetap tengektonywa." 
Ezekiel7:20 Kigainde etunateet karaaranindap lelestanyi: ago ki yai kanamonigap tuguukwak che kiwechei kobooto tuguukwak che samis eng' olooto: koayai anyun kioto koek kiit ne murwoon eng' icheek. 
Ezekiel7:21 Ak ande kioto eunegap toek koluul, ak ande eunegap kiptengeginigap ng'wony koluul; ak kong'wanit." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ak atuktoochi patai, ak kong'wanit oldanyu ne po ung'oot: ak kochut olooto rebiik, ak kong'wanit." 
Ezekiel7:23 Itaany sirimdo: amu kanyi emet kirwoogutigap korotiik, ak kanyi nganaseet koroomnateet." 
Ezekiel7:24 Amutu anyun piik che yaach miising' eng' pororyosyek, ak konam kooriikwak kobunji: ak ageesu kogeny menoteetap che kiimeen; ak king'wanit komoswekwak che tiliileen." 
Ezekiel7:25 Nyoonei ng'emisyet; ak kocheeng' icheek kaalyeet, ama piitu." 
Ezekiel7:26 Nyoonei pichiindo kosubu pichiindo, ak pwoonei ng'aleegap piik koosup ng'aleegap piik; ak kocheeng' ng'ang'utyetap maotyot; ago petei ng'atuutyet eng' tisiindet, ak kobet kirwooget eng' poisyek." 
Ezekiel7:27 Riirei laitoryat, ak kilaakyi pounindet pananda, ak kinyalil eunegap piigap emet; ayachini icheek ko uu ooreenywa, ak arwookyini ko uu ye nyoljin; si konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel8:1 Ki nyoonjo eutap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiit ne po lo, eng' arawetap lo, eng' peetuut ne po muut ne po arawanooto, ye ki atebye eng' koonnyu, ak kotebyei poisyegap Judah eng' tainnyu." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ageer anyun, ogeero, kergeindo ne uu itoondap maat; kong'etee itoondap suennyi ak kwo ng'wony, ko ki uu maat, ak kong'etee suennyi ak kwo parak, ko uu itoondap kakweng'et, ko uu itoondap taet." 
Ezekiel8:3 Ak ki iyogoi kiit ne uu euut, konam suumeekyuk ak kiganaba Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' kwenutap ng'wony ak kipsengwet, ak komutwaa eng' ng'ang'utigap Kamuktaindet anyo Jerusalem, agoi kurgeetap ormariichet ne po seremut ne po oriit ne tokyingei murot kaataam; ole ki mi ng'echereetap kanamwetap ng'etkonda, ne tagisyei kogoonu ng'etkonda." 
Ezekiel8:4 Ak ogeero, kimi olooto liilindap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel, ko uu itoondo ne ki ageer ami warenget." 
Ezekiel8:5 Ki leenjo anyun ineendet, Ee weeriitap chii, tooben anyun komostap murot kaataam. Atoben anyun komostap murot kaataam, ak ogeero, kimi kanamwonooto po ng'etkonda komostap murot kaataam ne po ormariichetap kaptisisyet eng' ole kimandoe." 
Ezekiel8:6 Ak ki leenjo ineendet, Ee weeriitap chii, igeere kiit ne yaei icheek? Chooto ko tuguuk che eecheen che kiwechei che yaei kootap Israel eng' yu, si awo alooit eng' oldanyu ne tiliil? Ago ta igeere kogeny tuguuk alak che eecheen che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel8:7 Ak ki imutwaa anyo kurgeetap seremut; ak kinga keer, ogeero, kimi konda tooteet." 
Ezekiel8:8 Yeityo koleenjo, Weeriitap chii, undur tooteet: ak kinga undur tootoonooto, ogeero, kimi kurgeet." 
Ezekiel8:9 Ak ki leenjo, Ui oriit, si igeer tuguuk che yaach che kiwechei che yaei icheek eng' olito." 
Ezekiel8:10 Ki awe anyun oriit, ak ageer, ak ogeero, kimi itoondap age tugul ne po tyong'ik che ichuutegei, ak tyong'ik che kiwechei, ak kanamonik tugul che po kootap Israel, che ki kisirchi itoonwekwak tooteet komoswekwak tugul." 
Ezekiel8:11 Ak kitononie taitap kanamonichooto piik tamanwogik tisap che po poisyegap Israel, ak kitonone kwenunnywa Jaasania weeriitap Sapan, kotinyei chii age tugul tereennyi eng' eunnyi, ne kibeelse; ak kitogosta iyeto ne po ng'uunetap nyamdutik." 
Ezekiel8:12 Ki leenjo anyun ineendet, Ee weeriitap chii, tos kaigeer kiit ne yaei poisyegap kootap Israel, eng' ole imen, komi chii age tugul kooriikyik che po oriit che po kanamonik? Amu leen icheek, Mageerech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki kometo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emoni." 
Ezekiel8:13 Ki leenjo kogeny, Ta igeere kogeny tuguuk alak che eecheen che kiwechei che yaei icheek." 
Ezekiel8:14 Yeityo komutwaa anyo kurgeetap ormariichet ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kitokyigei murot kaataam; ak ogeero, kimi kwonyiik eng' olooto che kitebyei koriirchin Tamus." 
Ezekiel8:15 Yeityo koleenjo, Kaigeer niito o, weeriitap chii? Ta igeere tuguuk alak che eecheen che kiwechei kosiir chuuto." 
Ezekiel8:16 Ak ki imutwaa seremut ne po oriit ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ogeero, kimi piik che neegit tiptem ak muut eng' kurgeetap Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kwenutap keterut ak kaptisisyet, che kaituktoochi patai Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotokyigei kong'asiis; ak ki sa asiista kotokyingei kong'asiis." 
Ezekiel8:17 Yeityo koleenjo, Kaigeer niito o, weeriitap chii? Tos kiy ne ming'in eng' kootap Judah ngo yai icheek eng' olito tuguuk che kiwechei? Amu kigonyiit emet koroomnateet, ak ki kowelelgei kogeny kotacha: ak keero, indoi temetap keetit seruunekwak." 
Ezekiel8:18 Ayae anyun agane eng' nereegek che ng'woneen: ma rireenen kondanyu, ama riira moo: agot nganda riircho eng' waagaat ne oo, koma kasyini." 
Ezekiel9:1 Yeityo komwaiwo eng' kutit ne oo, agase, koleenjo, Mwachji icheeget che riibei nganaseet koriik, kotinyei chii age tugul karnennyi ne parisye eng' eunnyi." 
Ezekiel9:2 Ak ogeero, ki pwa piik lo kobunu ooreetap ormariichet ne po meto, ne tokyingei murot kaataam, kotinyei chii age tugul karnennyi ne parisye; ak ki ilaachi chiito agenge eng' icheek ngoryeetap katanit, kotinyei age tugul laletap wino eng' suennyi. Ak ki pa oriit, ak kotononie ole neegitee kaptisisyetap sugunwet." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ak kitogosta liilindap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel eng' ole mi kerubindet, ole kitebee, kwo ole po tugatugigap koot: ak kitwekyi chiito ne ki ilaachi ngoryeetap katanit, ne ki tinyei laletap wino eng' suennyi." 
Ezekiel9:4 Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, Ui pun kwenutap nganaseet, kwenutap Jerusalem, ak ing'ooch turyosyegap togoochigap piik che tigendos ak koriirtos agobo tuguuk tugul che kiwechei che ki yai eng' kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel9:5 Ak ki mwachi alak agase, koleenji, oba obun nganaseet, osup ineendet, ak obarisyote amat koriiree konyekwok, anan koriiraak moo:" 
Ezekiel9:6 obar ogesu poiyo, muren, chepto, ak lagok che mengeechen, ak kwonyiik: ago amat ooriikyi chii age tugul ne ki king'ooch; ak otaune oldanyu ne tiliil. Kitaune anyun poisyek che ki mi taitap koot." 
Ezekiel9:7 Ak ki leenji icheek, Ong'wanit koot, ak onyiit seremusyek piik che kagebar: oba anyun. Ki pa anyun ak ki paris eng' nganaseet." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ak ye kita kobarisyoti, ak kigang'etu eng' yooto, abut kot kotiiny togeennyu ng'wony, ak ariir, ak amwa ale, ee, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Tos ibare piik tugul che ki ng'et che po Israel eng' nereegeguk che ng'woneen che roong'jingei Jerusalem?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Koleenjo anyun, Oo kot tengektap kootap Israel ak ne po Judah, kanyi emoni korotiik, ak kanyi nganasani kamaaset ne po kirwoogutik: amu mwaei kole ki kometo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emoni, ama keerei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel9:10 Ago ne uu anee, ko marire kondanyu, ama riira moo, ago aipchini ooreenywa metowekwak." 
Ezekiel9:11 Ak ogeero, kimwaita ng'olyoondonooto chiichooto ki ilaachi ngoryeetap katanit, ne ki tinyei laletap wino eng' suennyi, kole, kaayai ko uu ye kageng'ata." 
Ezekiel10:1 Ki ageer anyun, ak ogeero, ki took eng' sengwetyet, ne ki mi paragutap kerubik, kiit ne ki uu koitap sapphire, ne uu itoondap kergeindap ng'echereetap laitornatet." 
Ezekiel10:2 Ak ki mwachi chiito ne ki ilaachi ngoryeetap katanit, koleenji chut kwenutap tirook che wirwirendos eng' kurereetap kerubik, ak inyiit euneguk tuwai ng'etetyot ne mi kwenutap kerubik, ak iseerchi nganaseet. Ak ki wo ineendet oriit ageere." 
Ezekiel10:3 Ki tonondos anyun kerubik eng' komostap tai ne po koot, ye ki wendi chiichooto oriit; ak ki nyi pooldet seremut ne po oriit." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ak ki togosta liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kerubik, ak kotonone tugatugigap koot; ak ki nyi koot pooldet, ak ki nyi seremut kakweng'eetap liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel10:5 Ak ki kigasei kirgirenetap kebebaigap kerubik agoi seremut ne po saang', ko uu kutitap Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet ye ng'alaali." 
Ezekiel10:6 Ak ye kingo ng'at ineendet chiito ne ki ilaachi ngoryeetap katanit, koleenji, inemu maat eng' kwenutap tirook che wirwirendos eng' kwenutap kerubik. Ki wo oriit anyun ak kotonone ye neegit tireet." 
Ezekiel10:7 Ak ki iito kerubindet eunnyi eng' kwenutap kerubik kotokyi maat ne ki mi kwenutap kerubik ak konem, ak konde eunegap ineendet ne ki ilaachi ngoryeetap katanit, ne ki nam maata ak komanda." 
Ezekiel10:8 Ak ki took eng' kerubik ne uu eutap chiito eng' kurereetap kebebaikwak. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ak ki ageer, ogeero, tirook ang'wan che ki mi ole neegitee kerubik, ki neegitee tireet age kerubindet age, ko neegitee tireet age kerubindet age; ak ki uu itoondap tiroochooto, itoondap koita ne kiguure berulo." 
Ezekiel10:10 Ki tinyei kergeindo agenge icheek tugul ko ang'wan eng' itoondanywa, ko uu ye ki mi tireet kwenutap tireet age." 
Ezekiel10:11 Ye ki pendi, kobun komoswekwak ang'wan; ki ma kowelelegei kobendi, ago ki isubi komosta ne kagotokyigei ne tai ki ma kowelelegei ye ki pendi." 
Ezekiel10:12 Ak ki nyiitootiin koonyek komoswek tugul che po poorwekwak tugul, ak patoikwak, ak eunekwak, ak kebebaikwak, ak tirook, tiroochooto che ki tinyei kerubichooto ang'wanu." 
Ezekiel10:13 Ki kiguure tiroochooto agase, tirook che wirwirendos." 
Ezekiel10:14 Ak ki tinyei age tugul togoochik ang'wan: togeet ne po tai ko ki togeetap kerubindet, ak togeet ne po aeng' ko ki togeetap chiito, ak ne po somok ko ki togeetap ng'etundo, ak ne po ang'wan ko ki togeetap kipsiichit." 
Ezekiel10:15 Ak kitogosta kerubik: niito ko ki it ne sabei ne ki ageer eng' ye neegitee aineetap Kebar. 
Ezekiel10:16 Ak ye kingo pa kerubik, koba tiroochooto ak icheek koboiyotyin: ak kingo tirirenso kerubik kong'eetyo eng' ng'wony, koma istoegei tirook icheek." 
Ezekiel10:17 Kingo tononso icheek, kotononso chu ak icheek; ak kingo togosta, kotogosta chu ak icheek: amu ki mi kabuusetap kioto sabei kobooto icheek." 
Ezekiel10:18 Ak ki wo liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tugatugigap koot, ak kitonone paragutap kerubik." 
Ezekiel10:19 Ak kitirirenso kerubik, ak kotogosta eng' ng'wony ageere, ye kibendi, ak kimi tirook kobooto icheek; ak kitononso eng' kurgeet ne po ormariichetap kong'asiis ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kimi paragunnywa liilindap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Ezekiel10:20 Niito ko kioto sabei ne ki ageer eng' kurereetap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel eng' ole neegitee aineetap Kebar ak ki anai ale kerubichooto. 
Ezekiel10:21 Ki tinyei age tugul togoochik ang'wan ak ki tinyei age tugul kebebaik ang'wan; ak kimi kergeindap eunegap chiito kurereetap kebebaikwak. 
Ezekiel10:22 Ak ki kergei togoochikwak ak togoochik che ki ageer eng' ole neegitee aineetap Kebar, icheeget kobooto itoonwekwak; kibendi age tugul kogeerei tai." 
Ezekiel11:1 Kiganaba anyun Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak komutwaa anyo ormariichetap kong'asiis ne po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne tokyingei kong'asiis: ak ogeero, kimi kurgeetap ormariichet piik tiptemu ak muut; ak ki ageer eng' kwenunnywa Jaasania weeriitap Ashur, kobooto Pelatiah weeriitap Benaiah, pounigap piik." 
Ezekiel11:2 Ak ki leenjo ineendet, Ee, weeriitap chii, chuuto piik che chobei yaityet, ak korwoochi kirwooget ne ya eng' nganasani:" 
Ezekiel11:3 che leen, Tom koriik peetuusyek che keteege kooriik: tereet nganasani, ak kibanyeek." 
Ezekiel11:4 Maoten anyun agobo icheek, maoten, ee weeriitap chii." 
Ezekiel11:5 Ak ki nyoonjo Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koleenjo, Mwa ile, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ki omwa ko uu ni, ee kootap Israel; amu angen tuguuk che obwaati." 
Ezekiel11:6 Ki otes eng' nganasani piikwok che kibarei, ak ki onyiit ortinwekyik piik che ki kibar." 
Ezekiel11:7 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Panyeek piikwok che kigebar che ki onde kwenutap nganaseet, ak nganasani ko tereet: ago kimutwok omang'une kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel11:8 Ki oiywei rotwetap chok; ak aibwok rotwetap chok, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ak amutwok omang'une kwenunnyi, ak andeok eunegap toek, ak ayai kirwoogutik eng' kwenung'ung'." 
Ezekiel11:10 Obegu eng' rotwetap chok; arwookwok eng' kiwotetap Israel; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Ezekiel11:11 Ma egu nganasani tereeng'wong', amoegu panyeek eng' kwenunnyi; arwookwok eng' kiwotetap Israel;" 
Ezekiel11:12 ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu ma obendate ng'atuutikyuk, ama oyai kirwoogutikyuk, ago ki osup kirwoogutigap pororyosyek che mi komoswekwok." 
Ezekiel11:13 Ak kime Pelatiah weeriitap Benaiah ye ki amaoteni, ki abut anyun kot kotiiny togeennyu ng'wony, ak ariir eng' kutit ne oo, ale, ee, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Tos igeesu che ki ng'et che po Israel?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ki nyoonjo anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel11:15 Ee weeriitap chii, tupchosyeguk, che tupchosyeguk, piigap oreng'ung', kobooto koot komugul che po Israel, icheek tugul, chooto ko che ki komwachi piik che menyei Jerusalem, koleenji, oba ole loo eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki kigoonech emoni kobunjech:" 
Ezekiel11:16 mwaa anyun ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Nganda ki ayestochi icheek ole loo eng' pororyosyek, ak ki aseer icheek koyom emotinwek, kota aegu kora eng' icheek komosta ne tiliil eng' ne matya eng' emotinwek che ki koba." 
Ezekiel11:17 Mwaa anyun ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ayumok omang'une pororyosyek, ak ayumok omang'une emotinwek ole ki oyestoochi, ak agoonok emetap Israel." 
Ezekiel11:18 Ak koba olooto, ak koisto tuguuk tugul che samisen eng' olooto, kobooto tuguuk tugul che kiwechei, koistogei eng' olooto." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ak agoochi icheek muguleldo agenge, ak ande icheek sabeet ne leel; ak aiste muguleldap koita eng' poorwekwak, ak agoochi icheek muguleldo ne po panyeek:" 
Ezekiel11:20 si kobendatee ng'atuutikyuk, ak koriip kayomisutikyuk, ak koyai: ak koek icheek piikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa." 
Ezekiel11:21 Ago eng' icheeget che pendoti kosubi tuguukwak che samisen, ak tuguukwak che kiwechei, aipchini ortinwekwak metowekwak, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel11:22 Yeityo kotirirenso kerubik, ak kimi tirook kobooto icheek; ak kimi paragunnywa liilindap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ak kitogosta liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kwenutap nganaseet ak kwo kotonone tulweet ne mi komostap kong'asiis eng' nganaseet. 
Ezekiel11:24 Ak kiganaba Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak komutwaa eng' ng'ang'utyet eng' Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, anyo Kaldea, agoi ait ole mi icheek che ki kiluul. Ki togosta anyun eng' ole ki ami ng'ang'utyonooto kiga ageer." 
Ezekiel11:25 Ki amwachi anyun icheek che kiga keluul, tuguuk tugul che kiga koboorwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel12:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel12:2 Ee weeriitap chii, imenye kwenutap koot ne ngelelyot, che tinyei koonyek che keertoe, ama keerei kiy; che tinyei itiik che kastoe, ama kasei kiy; amu icheek ko koot ne ngelelyot." 
Ezekiel12:3 Ara anyun, inyee weeriitap chii, rat tuguuk agobo kautoet, ak iuu peet kogeerei icheek; ak iuu eng' komostang'ung' iwe komosta age kogeerei icheek: abeere imuuchi kobwaat, nganda icheek ko koot ne ngelelyot." 
Ezekiel12:4 Ak iibu tuguuguk komong' peet kogeerei icheek, ko uu tuguugap kautoet: ak iwe imande inyeendet koskoleny kogeerei icheek, ko uu ye pendi piik luuleet." 
Ezekiel12:5 Undur inaatut kogeerei icheek, ak iip tuguuguk kobun yooto." 
Ezekiel12:6 Iibe itiinye kaat, kogeerei icheek, ak iip komanda ko kagoimen; ituche togeng'ung', si megeer emet: amu kaandein iegu kaboorunet eng' kootap Israel." 
Ezekiel12:7 Ki ayai anyun ko uu nooto ko uu ye ki king'ata: ki aibu tuguukyuk kobwa saang' peet, ko uu tuguugap kautoet, ak ki aundur inaatut koskoleny, abalee eunnyu: ki aibu tuguukyuk kobwa saang' ko kagoimen, ak aip atiiny kaat kogeerei icheek." 
Ezekiel12:8 Ak ki nyoonjo karon ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel12:9 Ee weeriitap chii, tomo koteebenen kootap Israel, koot ngelelyot, koleenjin, Iyae nee?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Mwachi ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Po lautyoni pounindet eng' Jerusalem, kobooto koot komugul ne po Israel ole mi icheek." 
Ezekiel12:11 Mwa ile, Aa kaboorunet agobo okweek: ko uu ye ki ayai, keyachin icheek ko uu nooto: kiutoi, kiluulei." 
Ezekiel12:12 Ibei pounindet ne mi kwenunnywa, kotiinyi kaat, ko kagoimen, ak kwo: unduri icheek inaatut si kobiit kouutoe tuguukwak yooto: tuchei togeennyi, amu ma keerei ng'wony." 
Ezekiel12:13 Aiitochini mestennyu ineendet, ak konam mestennyu ineendet: ak amut ineendet kwo Babilon emetap Kaldeik: ago ma keerei emonooto, nganda mechin olooto." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ak aiyeste koba usoonet age tugul, piik tugul che miitei komoswekyik kotoret ineendet, ak lugosyekyik tugul; ak ang'usu rotwetap chok asube icheek." 
Ezekiel12:15 Ak konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ye aiyeste icheek eng' pororyosyek, ak aseer icheek koyom emotinwek." 
Ezekiel12:16 Ago atuuchi piik che ng'ering' eng' icheek kochililee rotwetap chok, ak rubeet, ak koroito; si kobiit kobarta tuguukwak tugul che kiwechei eng' pororyosyek ole tuun pendi; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel12:17 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel12:18 Ee weeriitap chii, am amitwogiguk eng' potanet, ak iee peeguk eng' karigisiset kobooto riibetapkei;" 
Ezekiel12:19 ak ileenji piigap emet, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo piik che menyei Jerusalem, ak che po emetap Israel kole: Kendoi amitwogikwak, ak koeei peekwak eng' kwong'eet, si koek karaatya emennyi eng' tuguuk tugul che mi, amu koroomnatetap piik tugul che menyei olooto." 
Ezekiel12:20 Ak king'emei nganasook che ki menyei, ak koguber emet; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel12:21 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel12:22 Ee weeriitap chii, nee kalewenoni otinye eng' emetap Israel, oleen, Kigogagei peetuusyek, ak koek puch ng'ang'utyet age tugul?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Mwachi anyun icheek ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni kole: Ageesu kalewenoni, si ma koboisyee kogeny koek kalewenet eng' Israel; ago mwachi ileenji, kagoriik peetuusyek, ak kasuldaetap ng'ang'utyet age tugul." 
Ezekiel12:24 Amu ma kobiitu kogeny ng'ang'utyet age tugul ne po puch anan ng'oorset ne kilasei eng' kootap Israel. 
Ezekiel12:25 Amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ang'alaali, ak kosulda ng'olyoot ne amwae; ma kigoitoi kogeny: amu amwae ng'olyoot, ak ageesu eng' peetuusyekwok, ee koot ne ii ngelelyot, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel12:26 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel12:27 Ee weeriitap chii, keero, leen kootap Israel, Ng'ang'utyet ne keerei ineendet ko po peetuusyek che chaang' che pwoonei, ak komaoteni ineendet agobo peetuusyek che ta ko looen." 
Ezekiel12:28 Mwachi anyun ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma kigoitoi kogeny ng'olyoondennyu age tugul, ago isuldoi ng'olyoot ne amwae, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel13:1 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel13:2 Ee weeriitap chii, maotenji igirinde maotigap Israel che maoteni, ak ileenji icheek che maoteni eng' mugulelwekwak icheegei, Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Ezekiel13:3 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwo! Maotik che perber, che isubi mugulelwekwak icheegei, ak ko tomo kogeer kiy!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Ee Israel, kigoigei maotiguk lelwek eng' ong'atosyek." 
Ezekiel13:5 Ma otogoste obe ole ki kobutok, ama ong'ot kootap Israel, si kobiit kotonon eng' pooryeet eng' peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel13:6 Ki kogeer icheek tangoita ak ng'oorset ne po lembech, che mwaei kole, kale Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ama iyookte Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak kogoochi piik komong' kole ki kimiti ng'olyoot." 
Ezekiel13:7 Tos ma ogeer ng'ang'utyet ne po puch, ama omwa ng'oorset ne po lembech, ye omwae ole, Kale Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ago ma amwa kiy?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki omwa eng' tangoita, ak ogeer lembech, ogeer anyun, aboryenok, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ak koborye eunnyu maotik che keerei tangoita, ak che ng'orei lembechek: matebee kapkirwoogetap piikyuk, ama kisirchin bukuit ole kisirchin kootap Israel, ama pendi emetap Israel; si onai ole aa Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel13:10 Ee, amu ki koberber piikyuk, koleenji, kaalyeet; ama mi kaalyeet; ak ye teech chiito inaatut, ogeero, male tartaarik che ma myachen:" 
Ezekiel13:11 mwachi icheek che malse taartaarichuuto ileenji, luulei: piitu ropta ne oo; ak koroobon koik che eecheen che po ropta; ak kobet usoonet ne oo inatunooto." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ogeero, ye luul inatunooto, ko tos ma kiteebenok keele, Mi ano malset ne ki komale inatuniito?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet kole: Abete inatuniito eng' usoonet ne oo eng' nereegekyuk che ng'woneen; ak kobiit ropta ne oo eng' nereegekyuk, ak koik che eecheen che po ropta eng' nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, si kobiit kogees." 
Ezekiel13:14 Abute anyun inaatut ne ki omale taartaarik che ma myachen, ak aluul kot kotook lumeiywekyik: ak kobut, ak kigeswok eng' kwenunnyi; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel13:15 Ayae anyun nereegekyuk che ng'woneen kosulda eng' inatunooto, kobooto icheek che kimale taartaarichooto; ak aleenjok, Ma komi inaatut, anan icheek che kimalei;" 
Ezekiel13:16 chooto ko maotigap Israel che maoteni agobo Jerusalem, ak kogeerei ng'ang'utigap kaalyeet agobo nganasanooto, ama miitei kaalyeet, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel13:17 Ee inyee weeriitap chii, iuuiit togeng'ung' igirinde tiibiigap piiguk, che maoteni eng' mugulelwekwak icheegei; ak imaoten agobo icheek," 
Ezekiel13:18 ak ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwo! Kwonyiik che nabei lolotinwegap ndaresik che po kutung'oik tugul che po eunek, ak konap angook che po metit, che yamei chii age tugul si kobiit koriige saboonwegap piik! Tos oriiche saboonwegap piikyuk, ak osaru saboonwegap piik kobunjook?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Ak ki ong'wanita eng' piikyuk agobo baale che po rubeito ak kererutigap magatiinik, si obar saboonwegap piik che ma nyoljin kobek, ak osaru saboonwegap piik che ma nyoljin kosapcho amu lembechekwok che omwachini piikyuk che chamei kogas lembechechooto." 
Ezekiel13:20 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, aweche lolotinwegap ndaresikwok, che oriige saboonwegap piik ko uu toriitik, ak agereeri tuguuchooto eng' eunekwok; ak atyach saboonwechooto po piik koba, saboonwechooto oriiche ko uu toriitik." 
Ezekiel13:21 Agereeri angookwok ak icheek, ak asaru piikyuk komong' eng' eunekwok, si ma kotebee eunekwok kogeny si keriichei; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel13:22 Amu ki ogoochi muguleldap chii ne po iman koaragen eng' lembechek, chiito ne ma agoochi koaragen; ak ogimiit eunegap kiptengekyot, si ma week kometo ooreennyi ne ya, ak kesar kosap:" 
Ezekiel13:23 ma ogeere anyun tangoita, anan ong'orse; ak asaru piikyuk komong' eng' eunekwok; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel14:1 Yeityo kobwanjo alak che po poisyegap Israel, ak kotep ng'wony eng' tainnyu." 
Ezekiel14:2 Ak konyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel14:3 Ee weeriitap chii, kigogonorchigei pichu kanamonikwak eng' mugulelwekwak, ak konde kanagutyetap tengektonywa tainnywa: tos teebena icheek ng'olyoo age tugul?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Ng'alaalji anyun icheek, ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni kole: Chii age tugul ne po kootap Israel ne konorchingei kanamonikyik eng' muguleldanyi, ak konde kanagutyetap tengektanyi tainnyi, ak konyo ole mi maotyot; awoljini anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tuguuchooto ko uu chaang'indap kanamonikyik;" 
Ezekiel14:5 si kobiit anam kootap Israel eng' mugulelwekwak icheeget, amu ki kotoiyenagei icheek tugul amu kanamonikwak." 
Ezekiel14:6 Mwachi anyun kootap Israel ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni kole: Oweege, ak owalage omete kanamonikwok; ak otuktoochi patai tuguukwok tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel14:7 Amu chii age tugul ne po kootap Israel, anan ne po toek ne tebee Israel, ne istoenagei, ak kogonorchigei kanamonikyik eng' muguleldanyi, ak konde kanagutyetap tengektanyi tainnyi, yeityo konyo ole mi maotyot koteepchigei ng'olyoot eng' anee; awoljini aneendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiichooto." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ak auuiit togeennyu aborye chiichooto, ak ayai ineendet koek ne kikwong'ee, koek kaboorunet ak kalewenet, ak aistoe ineendet eng' piikyuk; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel14:9 Ak ngot kiberber maotyot ak komwa ng'olyoo, ko anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kaberberi maotyondonooto, ak atokyi eunnyu, ak ang'em ineendet aiste eng' piikyuk Israel." 
Ezekiel14:10 Ak koip icheek tengektonywa: tengektap maotyot ko uu tengektap chiito ne cheeng'ei ineendet; 
Ezekiel14:11 si ma ta koombenot kogeny kootap Israel kometaa, anan kong'wanitkei kogeny eng' pistaosyekwak tugul; ago si koek piikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel14:12 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel14:13 Ee weeriitap chii, ye yaiywo emet tengekto eng' pistoet, ak atokyi eunnyu emonooto, ak atil amitwogikyik, ak ayookyi rubeet, ak abar chii ak tyony;" 
Ezekiel14:14 agot nganda mi pichu somogu, Noah, Daniel, ak Job emonooto, ko kota saru saboonwekwak icheegei eng' imandanywa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel14:14 agot nganda mi pichu somogu, Noah, Daniel, ak Job emonooto, ko kota saru saboonwekwak icheegei eng' imandanywa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel14:14 agot nganda mi pichu somogu, Noah, Daniel, ak Job emonooto, ko kota saru saboonwekwak icheegei eng' imandanywa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ngot agetu tyong'ik che yaacheen kobun emet, ak kong'em, kot koguber, ne ma komuuchi chii kobun amu tyong'ik;" 
Ezekiel14:16 ko agot nganda mi pichuuto somogu olooto, ko ko uu ye asabe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma saru icheek weeriik anan tiibiik; kisaru icheeget icheegei, ak koguber emet." 
Ezekiel14:17 Anan ngot aipchi rotwetap chok emonooto, ak ale, Ee rotwoni po chok, ui pun emet; si abar chii ak tyony;" 
Ezekiel14:18 ko agot nganda mi pichuuto somogu olooto, ko ko uu ye asabe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma saru icheek weeriik anan tiibiik, ago kisaru icheeget icheegei." 
Ezekiel14:19 Anan ngot ayookyi koroito emonooto, ak aroong'ji nereegekyuk che ng'woneen atumde korotiik, aiste chii ak tyony:" 
Ezekiel14:20 ko agot nganda mi Noah, Daniel, ak Job olooto, ko ko uu ye asabe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma saru icheek weeriit anan chepto; ago saru saboonwekwak kityo eng' imandanywa." 
Ezekiel14:20 ko agot nganda mi Noah, Daniel, ak Job olooto, ko ko uu ye asabe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma saru icheek weeriit anan chepto; ago saru saboonwekwak kityo eng' imandanywa." 
Ezekiel14:20 ko agot nganda mi Noah, Daniel, ak Job olooto, ko ko uu ye asabe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma saru icheek weeriit anan chepto; ago saru saboonwekwak kityo eng' imandanywa." 
Ezekiel14:21 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kotam nee anyun ye ayookyi Jerusalem kirwoogutikyuk ang'wan che ng'woneen; rotwetap chok, ak rubeet, ak tyong'ik che yaacheen, ak koroito, si kobar chii ak tyony?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Ago, ogeero, kituuchi piik che ng'etu che tuun kimuti, weeriik kobooto tiibiik: ogeero, mong'jinok, ak ogeer ortinwekwak ak poisyonikwak: ak kigaigaak agobo yaityet ne koaipchi Jerusalem, agobo tugul che koaipchi." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ak kogaigaak, ye ogeer ortinwekwak ak poisyonikwak: si kobiit onai ole ma ayai puch tuguuk tugul che koayai eng' olooto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel15:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel15:2 Ee weeriitap chii, siirei eng' nee keetitap sabibuk keetit age tugul, anan temetap keetitap sabibuk ne mi kwenutap keetiigap timiin?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Tos kiebei keetoto si kobiit keyae poisyo? Anan tos yae piik keetoto ireut si kigartate kiy age tugul? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ogeero, ki wiirchin ma koek kweenik: peelei maat tabanwek tuwai kobooto kwenut; tos tinyei keluno eng' poisyo age tugul?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ogeero, ye ki tomo keep, ko ki ma kotinyei poisyo: kotam nee anyun ye kagogas maat ye kagolal, tos ta kotinyei poisyo age tugul?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ko uu keetitap sabibuk ne mi kwenutap keetiigap timiin, ne ki ande ma koek kweenik, agoitoi ko uu nooto piik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ak auuiit togeennyu aborye icheek; mandoe maat, ago peelei maat icheek; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye auuiit togeennyu aborye icheek." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ak ayai emet koguber, amu ki kobistoe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel16:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel16:2 Ee weeriitap chii, iboorchi Jerusalem konai tuguukyik che kiwechei,"
