Ezekiel16:3 ak ileenji, mwachin Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jerusalem kole: Sigeng'ung', ak ole ki kisikyinin ko po emetap kanaanindet: ki kwandang'ung' Amorindet, ak ki kamenng'ung' Hitindet." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ki ma kotil mugeng'ung' eng' ole ki kisikyinin, eng' peetuut ne ki kisichin, ama kiuunin si itiliiliitu; ma ki ilenen muunyuk, ama kinamden ngor." 
Ezekiel16:5 Ma rireenen chii, koyaun kiy age tugul eng' tuguuchuuto, koriir moo; ago ki kiwiirchin timiin, amu ki kiwechin, eng' peetuut ne ki kisichin." 
Ezekiel16:6 Ak kinga siir ye ki imi, ageerin ikwarkwarane korotiguk, aleenjin, Agot nganda imi korotiguk, isap inyee; ee, ki aleenjin, Agot nganda imi korotiguk, isap inyee." 
Ezekiel16:7 Ki agoonin itesage ko uu ye ing'atos tuguugap mbar, ak ki itesage ieetu, ak ki igararanitu miising'; kigogun kinaiguk, ak kigogoeegitu suumeeguk; ago ki imi puch aach ngor." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ak kinga pun ye imi, ageerin, keero, peetuusyeguk ko ki po peetuusyegap chamyet; ak ki atugunen ngoryennyu ak atuch aach ngoryeeng'ung': ee, ki ayosyeun, ak ki koyomiske ak inyee, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki ibunjo." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ki aunin anyun; ee, ki aunde miising' korotiguk, ak ki aiiliin." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ki alaagun ngoroik che ki kinde lelesta, ak ki alaagun kweonigap mengichigap peek, ak ki auenen katanit ne karaaran, ak atugenen aririt." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ki alelesanunenen kogeny tuguuk che po lelesta, ak ki alaagun kariigap eunek ak sirimdo ne po kaating'ung'." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ak ki ande peteiyot serung'ung', ak ki ande munaok itiiguk, ak alaagun naaryeet ne karaaran." 
Ezekiel16:13 Ki kilelesonun anyun eng' thahabu ak fedha; ak ki po katanit ne karaaran ngoroiguk, ak aririt, ak ngoroik che ki kinde lelesta; ki iam peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul, ak kumyat, ak mwanik: ak ki igararanitu kot, ak ki kiberuurin kot inyooru atebeetap laitornatet." 
Ezekiel16:14 Ak ki yom pororyosyek kalasunetap karaaranindang'ung'; amu ki igeesunotkei karaaraninooto, amu eetunatennyu ne kiga alaagun, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel16:15 Ago kiitiegei karaaranindang'ung', ak iyai kugoinatet amu kalasuneng'ung', ak ki oipkei ak age tugul ne siirtoi; ki punji ineendet." 
Ezekiel16:16 Ak ki ip ngoroiguk ak iyachigei komoswek che torooreen che ki ilelesane saleiywek che teerchiin, ak iyae chooto kugoinatet: ma kobiitu tuguuk che uu chooto, ama ko yaaksei ko uu nooto." 
Ezekiel16:17 Ki ip kogeny sonoeguk che korooron che po thahabusyekyuk ak fedhaisyekyuk, che kiga agoonin ak iyachinegei itoonwegap murenik, ak oyai kugoinatet ak tuguuchooto;" 
Ezekiel16:18 ak ki ip ngoroiguk che ki kinde lelesta, ak ituge tuguuchooto, ak ki inde tainnywa mwanikyuk ak nyamdutikyuk che kibeelei." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ki inde tainnywa kogeny amitwogikyuk che ki agoonin, peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul, ak mwanik, ak kumyat, che ki abaenen, ki inde tainnywa koek nyamdutyet, ak ki tebi ko uu nooto; mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel16:20 Ki inam kogeny weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk, che ki isikwa, ak ieng'ji icheek si kobiit koam. Tos ki kiit ne ming'in kugoinatosyeguk," 
Ezekiel16:21 kot ibar lagokyuk ak igoite kobun maat igoochini icheek? 
Ezekiel16:22 Ama ibwaat eng' tuguuguk tugul che kiwechei, ak eng' kugoinatosyeguk, peetuusyegap ming'inateng'ung', ye ki imi puch aach ngor, ak ki ikwarkwarane korotiguk." 
Ezekiel16:23 Ak kingo pata yaitwogiguk tugul, (Pwo! Pwo! Inyee! Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor,)" 
Ezekiel16:24 iteekyigei ole tagunoot ak iyachigei ole kitororit eng' ooreet age tugul. 
Ezekiel16:25 Ki iteech oldang'ung' ole kitororit eng' tabandap ooreet age tugul, ak iyai karaaranindang'ung' koek kiit ne kiwechei, ak oipkei ak age tugul ne siirtoi, ak ites kugoinateng'ung'." 
Ezekiel16:26 Ki iyai kogeny kugoinatet kobooto Misiriik, piigap kokweng'ung', piigap poorto; ak ki ites kugoinateng'ung', itacha." 
Ezekiel16:27 Keer anyun, kaachuul eunnyu atokyin, ak atil amitwogiguk che po kotugul, ak agoiten koyaun kiy age tugul icheek che wechin, tiibiigap Philistiik, che ililandos amu ortinweguk che yaach." 
Ezekiel16:28 Ki iyai kogeny kugoinatet kobooto Asurik, amu ki ma koyamin kiy; ee ki iyai kugoinatet kobooto icheek, ago ma yamin kora." 
Ezekiel16:29 Ki ites kugoinateng'ung' eng' emetap Kanaan, agoi Kaldea; ago ma yamin kora." 
Ezekiel16:30 Nyalulat ne tya muguleldang'ung', mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu iyae tuguuchuuto tugul, poisyetap chepkugoniot ne pou piik;" 
Ezekiel16:31 amu iteeche oldang'ung' ole tagunoot, ak iyachigei oldang'ung' ole kitororit eng' ooreet age tugul; ama iige chepkugoniot, amu isase alisyet." 
Ezekiel16:32 Osotyot ne yaei ibeetapkei! Ne ibegei ak toek kometo manong'otyondennyi! 
Ezekiel16:33 Igoochin pichooto chepkugonik tugul asoya: ago igoochini inyeendet tuguuguk che po kagaigaet chamaniguk tugul, ak igaigae icheek tuguuchooto, si kobiit kobwonjin eng' komosta age tugul agobo kugoinatosyeguk." 
Ezekiel16:34 Ak oterchine ak kwonyiik alak eng' kugoinatosyeguk, amu ma mi chii ne suubin oipkei: ialisyei, ak amu ma ki alin, ii teer amu nooto." 
Ezekiel16:35 Kas anyun, ee chepkugoniondoni, ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Ezekiel16:36 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole amu ki kirong' simdang'ung', ak keng'aanyin kegeerin imi aach ngor eng' kugoinatosyeguk che ki iyai ak chamaniguk; ak amu kanamonik tugul che po tuguuguk che kiwechei, ak agobo korotiigap lagoguk che ki igoochi icheek;" 
Ezekiel16:37 nooto anyun, keero, ayumi chamaniguk tugul, che ki obaibaige, icheek tugul che koichame, ak icheek tugul che koiweche; ayumjinin icheek kobun komosta age tugul, ak ang'aang'ji icheek kogeerin imi aach ngor, si kobiit kogeer aach ngoryeeng'ung' tugul." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ak arwoogun, ko uu ye kirwookyin kwonyiik che putei kayosyetap katunisyet, ak che tumdoi korotiik; ak aibun korotiigap nereegek che ng'woneen ak ng'etkonda." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ak andein eunekwak, ak kobut oldang'ung' ne tagunoot, ak kobut oldinweguk che kitororitu; ak koreegunenen ngoroiguk, ak koip sonoeguk che korooron: ak kobagachin imi puch aach ngor." 
Ezekiel16:40 Ak komutun kogeny tuiyet kobookyin, ak kolagenen koik, ak kotoorin eng' rotonikwak po chok." 
Ezekiel16:41 Ak kobeel kooriguk, ak koyaun kirwoogutik eng' taitap kwonyiik che chaang'; ak aeetenen kugoinatet, ama ialisyei kogeny." 
Ezekiel16:42 Ageesu anyun nereegekyuk che ng'woneen eng' inyee, ak koistoenengei ng'etkondanyu, ak asiis, ma anereechi kogeny." 
Ezekiel16:43 Amu ma ibwaat peetuusyegap ming'inateng'ung', ago ki itacha eng' tuguuchuuto tugul; ko uu nooto, kaaweegu poisyoniguk kotebee paragung'ung', mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos ma iyai yaityoni itesyi tuguuguk tugul che kiwechei?" 
Ezekiel16:44 Keero, age tugul ne poisyee kalewenaik, koboisyee kalewenoni agobo inyee, koleen, Kiit ne uu kamet, ko uu nooto chepto." 
Ezekiel16:45 Ii cheptap kamet, ne wechei manong'otyondennyi ak lagokyik; ak ii chepto ne otupche ak chepkametwogiguk, che kiweche manong'otaikwak ak lagokwak: ki po kamenng'ung' Hitik, ko po kwandang'ung' Amorik." 
Ezekiel16:46 Chepkameng'ung' ne oo ko Samaria, ne menyei komostap eung'ung' ne po kaataam, ineendet ak tiibiikyik; ak chepkameng'ung' ne ming'in, ne menyei komostap eung'ung' ne po tai, ko Sodom ak tiibiikyik." 
Ezekiel16:47 Ago ma isup ortinwekwak, anan isup iyai tuguukwak che kiwechei; ago, nda ki kiit ne ming'in nooto, ko ki iyaitu inyee kosiir icheek eng' ortinweguk tugul." 
Ezekiel16:48 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ko uu ye asabe, tomo koyai Sodom chepkameng'ung', ineendet anan ko tiibiikyik, ko uu ye ki iyai inyee kobooto tiibiiguk." 
Ezekiel16:49 Keero, kimii tengektap chepkameng'ung' Sodom; ki tinyei ineendet ak tiibiikyik menoteet, piyeng'do, ak poroteetap talbisto; ama igimit eunegap kibananook ak che ma tinyei kiy." 
Ezekiel16:50 Ak kimendos icheek, ak koyaei kiit ne kiwechei eng' tainnyu: ki aiste anyun icheek ko uu ye ki ageer ale nyolu." 
Ezekiel16:51 Ama yai Samaria tengekwogik che siirei kebebertap tengekwogiguk; ago koites tuguuguk che kiwechei, kosiir icheek, ak koiityi imanda chepkametwogiguk eng' tuguuk tugul che kiwechei che koiyai." 
Ezekiel16:52 Ip inyee kobunjiin kalilaneng'ung' amu koirwookyi chepkametwogiguk; po imanda icheeget kosiirin amu tengekwogiguk che koiyai che kiwechei kosiir chooto koyai icheeget: ee, ii teweeroksei aginye, ak iip kalilaneng'ung', amu koiityi imanda chepkametwogiguk." 
Ezekiel16:53 Ak aweech kogeny icheek che kigeluul, che kigeluul che po Sodom kobooto tiibiikyik, ak che kigeluul che po Samaria, kobooto tiibiikyik, ak che kigeluul che po luuleniguk che mi kwenunnywa;" 
Ezekiel16:54 si kobiit iipchigei kalilaneng'ung', ak ililan amu tugul che koiyai, amu ii kagaigaindennywa." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ak koweekyigei chepkametiniguk, Sodom ak tiibiikyik, atebwennywa ne ki po tai, ak koweekyigei Samaria ak tiibiikyik atebeennywa ne ki po tai, ak iweekyigei inyee ak tiibiiguk, atebeeng'wong' ne ki po tai." 
Ezekiel16:56 Amu ki ma imwa kiy agobo chepkameng'ung' Sodom eng' peetuusyegap menateng'ung'; 
Ezekiel16:57 ye kitom keng'aany yaityeng'ung', ko uu eng' peetuusyegap chotisyetap tiibiigap Syria, ak ne po tugul che mi komoswekyik, tiibiigap Philistik, che sasin eng' komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel16:58 Koiip yaityeng'ung' ak tuguuguk che kiwechei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel16:59 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ayaun ko uu ye koiyai, ne koisas kayasyoet ibut kayomiset." 
Ezekiel16:60 Nganda uu nooto, abwaati kayomiset ne ki kiyomiske ak inyee eng' peetuusyegap ming'inateng'ung', ak agimiitun kayomiset ne po koigeny." 
Ezekiel16:61 Ibwaat anyun ortinweguk, ak ililan, ye itaache chepkametwogiguk, che eecheen ak che mengeechen: ak agoonin icheek koek tiibiiguk, ago ma eng' kayomisutyeng'ung'." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ak agimiit kayomisennyu kobooten; si inai ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: 
Ezekiel16:63 si kobiit ibwaat, ak itoptoben, ametwegu kogeny, amu kalilaneng'ung'; ye kanyoun kaat tuguuk tugul che ki iyai, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel17:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel17:2 Ee weeriitap chii, mwa tangochet, ak imwachi kalewenet kootap Israel;" 
Ezekiel17:3 ileenji mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole; Ki nyoonji Lebanon kipsiichit ne oo ne tinyei kebebaik che eecheen ak ko kooen, che nyiitaat koroorik che ki tinyei saleiywek che teer, ak koip walitap tarakwet:" 
Ezekiel17:4 ak ki ep temeet ne kitabanu parak ne ki namgei ak che ng'orng'oren, ak koip kwo emetap mung'aaret; ki inde nganaseetap chemung'arainik." 
Ezekiel17:5 Ki ip kogeny kesweek che po emonooto, ak kwo kogoolji ng'ung'unyek che akwaen; kilechi ole neegitee peek che chaang'; kimin ko uu koibeiyot." 
Ezekiel17:6 Ak ki piit ak koek keetitap sabibuk ne tebeesitu ne ma koitu, ne arung'jingei mooriikyik, ak komi tigitikyik kurerennyi: ki ek anyun keetitap sabibuk, ak kosich mooriik, ak kong'atyo." 
Ezekiel17:7 Ki mi kogeny kipsiichit age ne oo ne ki tinyei kebebaik che eecheen ak koroorik che chaang': ak ogeero, ki aruny keetito po sabibuk tigitikyik, kotokyi kipsichinooto, ak kowakta mooriikyik kotokyigei ineendet, eng' kererchosyek ole kiga kiminji, kole si kobise peek kipsichinooto." 
Ezekiel17:8 Kiga kiminji ng'ung'unyek che myachen eng' ole neegitee peek che chaang', si kobiit kowakta mooriik, si kobiit kooi logoek, si kobiit koek keetit ne karaaran ne po sabibuk." 
Ezekiel17:9 Mwa inyee ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos myeeitu? Tos ma ituti kipsichinooto tigitikyik, ak koep logoekyik, si kobiit kores, si kobiit koresyo sogekyik tugul che ng'orng'or; agot ngo ma mi kimnateet ne wo anan piik che chaang' che itutu?" 
Ezekiel17:10 Ee, ogeero, tos myeeitu ye kagemin? Tos maresei tugul, ye usyi usoonetap kong'asiis? Resei eng' kererchosyek ole kibiitee." 
Ezekiel17:11 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel17:12 Mwachi anyun koot ne ngelelyot, ileenji, Tos mongen ole teptoi tuguuchu? Mwachi icheek, ileenji, ogeero, kigonyo Jerusalem laitoryatap Babilon, ak koluul laitoryandennyi, ak pounikyik, ak komut icheek kobwa Babilon." 
Ezekiel17:13 Ak kiluul iyoteetap laitoryat ak koyomiskei kobooto ineendet: kibirchi kogeny ineendet eng' kayasyoet, ak komut piik che kiimeen che po emet" 
Ezekiel17:14 kole si kobiit konyeratit pounateet, si ma imuuch koeetkei, ago si kobiit kotonon ye riibei kayomisennyi." 
Ezekiel17:15 Ago ki ingelelji ineendet amu ki iyookto tononjinikyik koba Misiri, si kobiit kogoochi ineendet paraisisyek ak piik che chaang'. Tos kiberuuri? Tos chilil ineendet ne yaei tuguuk che uu chooto? Tos put kayomiset, ak kochilil?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ko uu ye asabe, meei ineendet iman eng' ole menyei laitoryat ne ki indoi ineendet koek laitoryat, ne ki sas kayosyennyi, ak kibut kayomisennyi, meei kobooto ineendet eng' Babilon." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ama tilei kiy eng' ineendet Pharaoh kobooto lugeennyi ne kiim, ak kweanet ne oo, eng' lugeet, ye irurugot ng'ung'unyek koek tuloonook ak koteech irimoik, si kobar piik che chaang'." 
Ezekiel17:18 Amu Ki kogas kayasyoet kobut arorutyet, ak ogeero, kigonde eunnyi ago ki koyai tuguuchooto tugul; ma chilili." 
Ezekiel17:19 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ko uu ye asabe, aipchini iman metinnyi kayosyennyu ne Ki kogas ak kayomisennyu ne ki kobut." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ak aiitochini mestennyu ineendet, ak konam mestennyu ineendet ak amut ineendet kwo Babilon, ak ager kong' ineendet eng' olooto amu ngelelnateet ne ki ingelelja." 
Ezekiel17:21 Ak kebare rotwetap chok piikyik tugul che kimweei eng' kweanaikyik tugul, ak kiseerat che ng'etu koba usoonet age tugul: si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne koamwa ng'olyoondoniito." 
Ezekiel17:22 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Aibe kogeny walitap tarakwet ne kooi ak amin; ak aep temeet ne ng'arng'ar, eng' mooriikyik che ng'orng'or che tabanu parak, ak aminji tulweet ne kooi ne tagunoot." 
Ezekiel17:23 Aminjini tulweet ne kooi ne po Israel: ak kowakta, ak kooi logoek, ak koek tarakwet ne myee: ak komeny kelunnyi toriitik alak tugul che tirirendos; menyei toriitichooto urwetap mooriikyik." 
Ezekiel17:24 Si konai keetiik tugul che po timiin kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki achooru keetit ne kooi, ak aeet keetit ne ming'in, ak ayaam keetit ne tuon, ak agoochi keetit ne yaamaat kotunen: kaamwa anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ayae." 
Ezekiel18:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel18:2 Obooru nee si oboisyee kalewenoni agobo emetap Israel, oleen, Ki koam kwanisyek sabibuk che mindilileen, ak kiliil kelegap lagok?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ko uu ye asabe, koma oboisyee kogeny kalewenaniito eng' Israel." 
Ezekiel18:4 Ogeero, chechuuk saboonwegap piik tugul; ko uu ye nenyu saboondap kwanda, ko nenyu agine saboondap weeriit: meei saboondap chiito ne yaei tengekto." 
Ezekiel18:5 Ago ngot ko po iman chii, ak koyai kiit ne po iman ak ne litit," 
Ezekiel18:6 ak tomo koamisye tuloonook, ama tokyi kanamonik che po kootap Israel, ama ing'wanit osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi, ama riikyi kwony eng' peetuusyekyik che po arawet;" 
Ezekiel18:7 ak tomo koyachi chii kiy ne ya, ago kogoweekta kiit ne ki kiname pesendo, koweekyi chiito ne ki kiname pesendo, koweekyi chiito ne kiyaachei, ama rebe chii kiy eng' koroomnateet, ak Ki kogoochi amitwogik chiito ne amei rubeet, ak kolaaksechi ne mi aach ngor;" 
Ezekiel18:8 ineendet ne tomo kogoito tuguuk si konyoorunee kelunet ne siirtoot, ama ibei che tesatiin, ne kigoistoe eunnyi tengekto, ne ki koyai kirwooget ne po iman eng' kwenutap piik," 
Ezekiel18:9 ne ki kowendote ng'atuutikyuk, ak koriip kirwoogutikyuk, si koyai iman, po iman chiichooto, sabei ineendet iman, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel18:10 Ngot kosich chiichooto weeriit ne rebindet, ne tumdoi korotiik, ak koyaei kiit age tugul eng' tuguuchuuto," 
Ezekiel18:11 ama yaei age eng' poisyonichuuto, ago kigoamisye tuloonook, ak ki kong'wanit osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi," 
Ezekiel18:12 ne ki koyachi ne ya kibananiat ak ne ma tinyei kiy, ne ki korebis eng' koroomnateet, ne tomo koweekta kiit ne ki kiname pesendo, ak ki kotokyi konyekyik kanamonik, ne ki koyai kiit ne kiwechei," 
Ezekiel18:13 ne ki kogoito tuguuk si konyoorunee kelunet ne siirtoot, ak koip che tesatiin: tos sap chiichooto iman? Ma sabei: ki koyai tuguuchuuto tugul kiwechei: meei iman; tebee ineendet korotiikyik." 
Ezekiel18:14 Ara anyun, ogeero, ngot kosich chiichooto weeriit, ne keerei tengekwogik tugul che po kwandanyi, che ki koyai, ak koywei, ama yai ko uu nooto," 
Ezekiel18:15 ne tomo koamisye tuloonook, anan kotokyi konyekyik kanamonigap kootap Israel, ne tomo kong'wanit osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi," 
Ezekiel18:16 ne tomo koyachi chii age tugul kiy ne ya, ne tomo koip kiy ne kiname pesendo, anan korebis eng' koroomnateet, ago Ki kogoochi amitwogikyik chiito ne amei rubeet, ak kolaaksechi ne mi aach ngor," 
Ezekiel18:17 ne kigoisto eunnyi si ma twa kibananiat, ne tomo kotaach kelunet ne siirtoot anan che tesatiin, ne ki koyai kirwoogutikyuk, ne ki kowendote ng'atuutikyuk; koma meei chiichooto amu ng'oogistap kwandanyi, sabei iman." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ago ne uu kwandanyi, amu kiusiis eng' kolgolyet, ak kerep tuguugap tupchennyi eng' koroomnateet, ak koyai ne ma myee eng' piikyik, ogeero, meei ineendet eng' tengektanyi." 
Ezekiel18:19 Ago omwae okweek ole, Amu nee anyun si ma nam weeriit ng'oogistap kwandanyi? Ye kagoyai weeriit kiit ne po iman ak ne litit, ak koriip ng'atuutikyuk, ak koyai, kosabei ineendet iman." 
Ezekiel18:20 Meei chiito ne yaei tengekto: ma namei weeriit ng'oogistap kwandanyi, ama namei kwanda ng'oogistap weeriinnyi; tebee chiito ne po iman imandanyi, ak kotebee kiptengekyot tengektanyi." 
Ezekiel18:21 Ago ngot koweek kiptengekyot kometo tengekwogikyik tugul che ki koyai, ak koriip ng'atuutikyuk tugul, ak koyai kiit ne po iman ak ne litit, kosabei iman, ma meei." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ma kiityin ineendet agot agenge eng' pistaosyekyik che ki koyai: sabei ineendet eng' imandanyi ne ki koyai. 
Ezekiel18:23 Tos abaibai eng' meetap kiptengekyot? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: tos ma abaibai ngo week kometo ooreennyi si kosap? 
Ezekiel18:24 Ago ye week ne po iman kometo imandanyi, ak koyai tengekto, ak koyai ko uu tuguuk tugul che kiwechei che yaei chiito ne ya, ko tos sap? Ma kibwaati agot agenge eng' poisyonikyik che po iman che ki koyai: meei amu kachililutyennyi ne ki koyai, ak amu tengektanyi ne ki koyai." 
Ezekiel18:25 Ago omwae ole, Ma po iman ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ogas anyuno, kootap Israel: tos ma po iman ooreennyu? Tos ma ortinwekwok che ma po iman?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Ye week chiito ne po iman kometo imandanyi, ak koyai tengekto, ak kome eng' tengegoto; meei anyun amu tengektanyi ne ki yai." 
Ezekiel18:27 Kogeny, ye week kiptengekyot kometo tengektanyi ne kiga koyai, ak koyai kiit ne po iman ak ne litit, kosaru saboondanyi kosap." 
Ezekiel18:28 Amu ruchin ak kometo pistaosyekyik tugul che ki koyai, kosabei iman, ma meei." 
Ezekiel18:29 Ago mwaei kootap Israel kole, ma po iman ooreetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ee kootap Israel, tos ma po iman ortinwekyuk? Tos ma ortinwekwok che ma po iman?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Arwookwok anyun, ee kootap Israel, chii age tugul ko uu ortinwekyik, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Oweege, ak owalage, omete pistaosyekwok tugul; si ma ek tengekto ng'emisyeng'wong'." 
Ezekiel18:31 Omete pistaosyekwok tugul che ki kogoonok obistoe; ak ochopchigei muguleldo ne leel ak sabeet ne leel: amu nee si obegu, ee kootap Israel?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Amu ma abaibai eng' meetap ineendet ne meei, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: owalage anyun, si osapche." 
Ezekiel19:1 Riir anyun agobo pounigap Israel," 
Ezekiel19:2 ak ile, Ki nee kamenng'ung'? Ki ng'etundo ne kotoy: kiribisi kobooto ng'etuunyik, kibaei aarekyik eng' kwenutap ng'etuunyik che neran." 
Ezekiel19:3 Ak kibai age eng' aarekyik; kot koeet koek ng'etundo ne neran: ak ki ineetkei logeet, ki am piich." 
Ezekiel19:4 Ki kas pororyosyek agobo ineendet: ak kiname keriingennywa: ak ki ichuutune kombook agoi emetap Misiri. 
Ezekiel19:5 Ak kingo keer kamet kole kigogenis ak ki kobet kamang'unennyi, konam anyun age eng' aarekyik, ak koyai ineendet koek ng'etundo ne neran." 
Ezekiel19:6 Ak kiwendote kwenutap ng'etuunyik ak ki ek ng'etundo ne neran: ak ki ineetkei logeet, ki am piich." 
Ezekiel19:7 Ak ki nai kooriikwak che po laitorinik, ak king'em nganasookwak; ak kiguber emet, ak tuguugap emonooto, amu tuugeetap porisenennyi." 
Ezekiel19:8 Ki ibookyi anyun pororyosyek eng' komoswek tugul kobunu emotinwek tugul: ak kiitoochi ineendet mestennywa, ak koname ineendet keriingennywa." 
Ezekiel19:9 Ak ki inde ineendet korgoreet, ko rataat eng' kombook, ak komutyi ineendet laitoryatap Babilon; ki imut ineendet konyo irimoik, si mata kogas chii kutinnyi eng' tuloonoogap Israel." 
Ezekiel19:10 Ki uu kamenng'ung' keetitap sabibuk eng' mbareetap sabibuk eng' korotiguk, ne ki kiminji ole neegitee peek che chaang'; kiyiei miising' ak ko nyiitaat mooriik amu peek che chaang'." 
Ezekiel19:11 Ak ki tinyei keetiik che kiimeen che po kirokweegap icheek che pounisyei, ak ki kieet kogoit eng' kwenutap mooriik che nyigiisen, ak ki took eng' koindonywa kobooto chaang'indap mooriikwak." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ago ki kitut eng' nereegek che ng'woneen, ki kiwiirta kwo ng'wony, ki yaamyo logoekyik eng' usoonetap kong'asiis: ki kiiri keetiikyik che kiimeen ak koresyo; kilalyo kogeskei eng' ma." 
Ezekiel19:13 Kogeminji anyun surkwen, eng' emet ne yaamaat ne ma mi peek." 
Ezekiel19:14 Ak kagomisok maat eng' keetiigap mooriikyik, kogobeel maat logoekyik, kot koma kotinyei keetit ne kiim ne egu kirokto ne po pounateet. Po niito riirek, ak egu riirek." 
Ezekiel20:1 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po tisap, eng' arawetap muut, peetuut ne po taman ne po arawanooto, kobwa poisyek alage che po Israel kobwa koteepse Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotep ng'wony eng' tainnyu." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel20:3 Weeriitap chii, ng'alaalji poisyegap Israel, ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, kaobwa oteepsena? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye asabe, koma chame oteepsena." 
Ezekiel20:4 Tos irwookyini icheek, ee weeriitap chii, tos irwookyini icheek? Iboorchi icheek konai tuguuk che kiwechei che po kwanisyekwak;" 
Ezekiel20:5 ak ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Eng' peetuut ne ki alewen Israel, ak ayogoochi eunnyu iyoteetap kootap Jakobo, ak aboorchigei icheek eng' emetap Misiri, ye ki ayogoochi eunnyu icheek aleenji, Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong';" 
Ezekiel20:6 ki ayogoochi eunnyu icheek eng' peetuunooto, amutu icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri kobwa emet ne ki amararchi icheek, ne nyiitaat cheego ak kumyat, ne toroornatetap emotinwek tugul:" 
Ezekiel20:7 ak ki amwachi icheek aleenji, Ingometo chii age tugul eng' okweek tuguuk che kiwechei che kochamei konyekyik, amat ong'wanitegei kanamonigap Misiri: aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Ezekiel20:8 Ago ki ingelelja, ma cham kogasa iit; ma meto chii age tugul eng' icheek tuguuk che kiwechei che ki chamei konyekwak, ama meto kanamonigap Misiri: amwa anyun ale, Aroong'jini icheek nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, si kobiit ayai nereegekyuk kosulda eng' icheek eng' emetap Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Ago ki aboisye amu kainennyu, si ma kimurwon kogeerei pororyosyek, che ki mi icheek kwenunnywa, pororyosyek che kigeerei aboorchinigei icheek, amutu komong' eng' emetap Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:10 Amutu anyun icheek komong' eng' emetap Misiri, amutu kobwa surkwen." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ak ki agoochi icheek ng'atuutikyuk, ak aboorchi kirwoogutikyuk, che ngo yai chii kosabei eng' chooto." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ki agoochi icheek kogeny sabatosyekyuk ak icheek, koek kaboorunet eng' kwenunnyu, anee ak icheek, si kobiit konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atabaani icheek." 
Ezekiel20:13 Ago ki ingelelja kootap Israel eng' surkwen: ma pendate ng'atuutikyuk, ak ki eesyo kirwoogutikyuk, che ngo yai chii kosabei eng' chooto; ki imurwon icheek miising' sabatosyekyuk: ki amwa anyun ale, aroong'jini icheek eng' surkwen nereegekyuk che ng'woneen si agees icheek." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ago ki aboisye anyun kainennyu, si ma kimurwon eng' taitap pororyosyek, che kigeeronu icheek amutu komong'." 
Ezekiel20:15 Kogeny, ki ang'werere icheek eunnyu eng' surkwen, ale mamuti icheek koba emet ne ki agoochi, ne nyiitaat cheego ak komi kumyat eng' chaang'indo, ne toroornatetap emotinwek tugul;" 
Ezekiel20:16 amu ki eesyo kirwoogutikyuk, ama pendate ng'atuutikyuk ak komurwon sabatosyekyuk: amu ki isubot mugulelwekwak kanamonikwak." 
Ezekiel20:17 Nganda uu nooto, kogiriree kondanyu icheek si ma ng'em, ama ageesu icheek eng' surkwen." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ak ki aleenji lagokwak eng' surkwen, Amobendate ng'atuutigap kwanisyekwok, anan osup kirwoogutikwak, anan ong'wanitegei kanamonikwak;" 
Ezekiel20:19 aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'; obendate ng'atuutikyuk, ak oriip kirwoogutikyuk ak oyai;" 
Ezekiel20:20 ak otabaan sabatosyekyuk; si koek kaboorunet eng' kwenunnyo, anee ak okweek, si kobiit onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Ezekiel20:21 Ago ki ingelelja ak icheek lagok; ma pendate ng'atuutikyuk anan koriip kirwoogutikyuk, koyai, che ngo yai chii kosabei eng' chooto; ki imurwon icheek sabatosyekyuk: amwa anyun ale aroong'jini icheek nereegekyuk che ng'woneen si kobiit ayai nereegekyuk kosulda eng' icheek eng' surkwen." 
Ezekiel20:22 Ago ki aiste eunnyu, ki aboisye amu kainennyu, si ma kimurwon eng' taitap pororyosyek, che kigeeronu icheek amutu komong'." 
Ezekiel20:23 Ak ki ang'werere icheek eunnyu eng' surkwen, si kobiit aseer icheek eng' pororyosyek, ak aiyeste icheek koyom emotinwek;" 
Ezekiel20:24 amu ma yai kirwoogutikyuk, ago ki eesyo ng'atuutikyuk, ak komurwon sabatosyekyuk, ak ki isuboti konyekwak kanamonigap kwanisyekwak." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ki agoochi anyun kogeny ng'atuutik che ki ma ko myachen, ak kirwoogutik che masabe;" 
Ezekiel20:26 ak ki amurwon icheek eng' konunoikwak icheegei, amu ki igoito lagok tugul che yaatei iyoteet kobun maat, si kobiit agoochi icheek kobononso, si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel20:27 Nooto anyun, ee weeriitap chii, ng'alaalji kootap Israel ileenji icheek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kigochuba kwanisyekwok kogeny eng' niito amu kachiliilutyet ne ki yaiywo." 
Ezekiel20:28 Amu ye kinga muutu icheek kobwa emet, ne ki aitoochi eunnyu agoochi, kogeer tulweet age tugul ne kooi, ak keetit age tugul ne nyigiis, ak ki igoito eng' olooto korosekwak, ak ki igoito eng' olooto kagoochinoikwak che po tagisyet, kibeelei kogeny nyamdutikwak, ak koroong'ji olooto kagoochinoikwak che kieei." 
Ezekiel20:29 Yeityo aleenji icheek, Po nee komosta ne toroor ole obendi? Ki kiguure anyun yooto Bama agoi rani." 
Ezekiel20:30 Mwachi anyun kootap Israel ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos omurwonige ko uu piteetap kwanisyekwok? Ak oyae kugoinatet osubi tuguukwak che kiwechei?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Ak ye ogoitoi kagoochinoikwok, ye ogoitoi weeriikwok kobun maat, ko tos ma omurwonegei kanamonikwok agoi rani? Ko tos oteepsena, okweek kootap Israel? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye asabe, koma achame oteepsena:" 
Ezekiel20:32 ak ma piitu agot kitigin nooto obwaati; amu omwae ole, “Kigergeitu ak pororyosyek, ak kergeitu ak ortinwegap emotinwek, keoot keetiik ak koik.”" 
Ezekiel20:33 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, iman, ko uu ye asabe, aegu laitoryat aboiywok eng' euut ne kiim, ak eng' euut ne chuulaat, ak eng' nereegek che ng'woneen che rong'ugei." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ak amutwok omong'u eng' pororyosyek, ak ayumak eng' euut ne kiim, ak eng' euut ne chuulaat, ak eng' nereegek che ng'woneen che rong'ugei, omang'une emotinwek ole ki kiseerchok;" 
Ezekiel20:35 ak amutwak obwa surkwen ne po pororyosyek, ak agerak kong' kimni eng' olooto." 
Ezekiel20:36 Ko uu ye ki agere kong' kwanisyekwok eng' surkwen ne po emetap Misiri, agerok kong' anyun ko uu nooto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ak amutak obun kurereetap kirokto, ak amutwak obwa ratuutyetap kayomisutyet." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ak atiliilok aiste ngelelik eng' kwenung'wong', ak icheek che ki ingelelja; amutu icheek komong' eng' emet ne kigaba kotebee, ago ma pendi emetap Israel: si kobiit onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel20:39 Ago eng' okweek, ee kootap Israel, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni kole: Ngot ko moepcha iit; obe anyun ak koot chii tugul kanamonikyik eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei ak icheek: ago ma omurwoni kainennyu ne tiliil kogeny eng' kagoochinoikwok, ak eng' kanamonikwok." 
Ezekiel20:40 Amu tuun ota koot komugul ne po Israel eng' tulweennyu ne tiliil, eng' tulweet ne kooi ne po Israel, ota icheek tugul eng' emet, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ataache icheek eng' olooto, ak amagenak eng' olooto kagoochinoikwok, ak tongoanigap kagoochinoikwok, kobooto tuguukwok tugul che tiliileen." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ataachok ko uu nyamdutyet ne anyiny, ye amutwok omang'une pororyosyek, ak ayumak omang'une emotinwek ole ki kiseerchok; ak aegu ne itabaanat eng' okweek kogeerei pororyosyek." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye amutwok obwa emetap Israel, emet ne ki aitoochi eunnyu ale agoochini kwanisyekwok." 
Ezekiel20:43 Ak obwaat eng' olooto ortinwekwok ak poisyonikwok tugul, che ki ong'wanitegei; ak osaske amu yaitwogikwok tugul che ki oyai." 
Ezekiel20:44 Ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye kaaboisye agobo okweek amu kainennyu, ma ko uu ortinwekwok che yaacheen, ama ko uu poisyonikwok che samis, ee okweek kootap Israel, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel20:45 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel20:46 Ee, weeriitap chii, tokyi togeng'ung' murot tai ak imwachi ng'aleeguk murot tai, ak imaotenji timdap emetap Negeb;" 
Ezekiel20:47 ak imwachi timdap murot tai, ileenji, kas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, anaami maat eng' kwenung'ung', ak kobeel keetit age tugul ne tuon, ak keetit age tugul ne yaamaat: ma kimisi liplibenetap maata, ak komel togoochik tugul kobooch murot tai agoi murot kaataam." 
Ezekiel20:48 Ak kogeer piik tugul kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kanaami maata: ma kimisi. 
Ezekiel20:49 Amwa anyun ale, ee, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Mwaei icheek agobo anee kole, tos ma ng'alaalindet ne po kalewenaik ineendet?" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel21:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, tokyi togeng'ung' Jerusalem, mwachi ng'aleek komoswek che tiliileen, ak imaotenji emetap Israel;" 
Ezekiel21:3 ak ileenji emetap Israel, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, aboryenen ak ang'usu rotwennyu po chok, ak aiste eng' inyee chiito ne po iman ak ne ya." 
Ezekiel21:4 Amu aistoi eng' inyee chiito ne po iman ak ne ya, ng'usugei anyun rotwennyu po chok kwo kobar piik tugul kobooch murot tai agoi murot kaataam:" 
Ezekiel21:5 si konai piik tugul kole, aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kang'usu rotwennyu po chok; ma kogetitagei kogeny." 
Ezekiel21:6 Tigen anyun, inyee weeriitap chii; tigen eng' iletap sueng'ung' ak eng' ng'wanindo kogeerei icheek." 
Ezekiel21:7 Ak ye teebenen, koleenjin, Amu nee si itigen? Ile anyun, Amu ng'aleek, amu nyoonei: ak kome muguleldo age tugul ak konyalulso eunek tugul, ak konyaluul sabeet age tugul, ak kochootyo kutung'oik tugul ko uu peek: ogeero, nyoonei, ak ko yaaksei, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel21:8 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel21:9 Ee, weeriitap chii, maoten, mwaa ile, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole; Mwa ile, Rotwetap chok, rotwetap chok, kagelit, ak kagesit kogeny:" 
Ezekiel21:10 kagelit si kobiit kobaris; kagesit si kobiit koigei kalyeleet: tos kiboiboitu anyun? Kirokto ne po weeriinnyu ne sasei keetit age tugul. 
Ezekiel21:11 Ak ki kigon si kobiit kesit, si kimuuch kenam: kilitei rotwetap chok, ee, kisitei, si kobiit kinde eutap parindet." 
Ezekiel21:12 Waach ak ite, ee, weeriitap chii: amu kagong'urur piikyuk, kobooto pounik tugul che po Israel: kagigoito icheek kobar rotwetap chok kobooto piikyuk: irabaach anyun kubestang'ung'." 
Ezekiel21:13 Amu mi tyemisyet; egu nee anyun ngot koma komi kirokto ne sasisyei? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Ezekiel21:14 Maoten anyun inyee weeriitap chii, ak irabaach euneguk; ak ingotesak rotwetap chok konyil aeng', ingotesak ne po somok, rotwetap chok ne po che ki kiguoten ne po meet: rotwetap chok ne po ineendet ne oo ne ki kiguoten ne po meet, ne kichut kooriikwak che po oriit." 
Ezekiel21:15 Koatokyi rotwetap chok ormariichokwak tugul, si komeiyo mugulelwekwak, ak kotesagis kanagutikwak: haa! Kogeyai koigei kalyeleet, kogelit si kobaris." 
Ezekiel21:16 Iyumge, ui komostap tai; chopkei, chopkei, ui komostap kaataam; oldo tugul ole ketokyi togeng'ung'." 
Ezekiel21:17 Arabachi eunekyuk, ak ageesu anyun nereegekyuk che ng'woneen: kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito." 
Ezekiel21:18 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel21:19 Ee, weeriitap chii, lewenjige kogeny ortinwek aeng', si kobiit konyo rotwetap chok ne po laitoryatap Babilon; punu chooto tuwai emet agenge; ak iaror komosta eng' sireet, iaror eng' tabandap ooreet ne wendi nganaseet." 
Ezekiel21:20 Lewen ooreet si kobiit koit rotwetap chok Rabbah ne po lagogap Ammon, ak koit Judah eng' Jerusalem ne ng'ootaat." 
Ezekiel21:21 Amu ki tonon laitoryatap Babilon eng' ole pesiap oor, eng' ole pesyechin ortinwek aeng'u, si kong'orso: kisaisach kipchabonik, ki sa kanamonik, kibir moet kogeer kooet." 
Ezekiel21:22 Ki mi eunnyi ne po tai ng'oorset agobo Jerusalem, si konde injinisyek che kibutisye, si koseng'eng'ji parisyet, ak kowaach miising', konde injinisyek taitap ormariichok, kowasyi ng'ung'unyek, koteech irimoik." 
Ezekiel21:23 Ak egu nooto eng' icheek ng'oorset ne po puch eng' tainnywa, eng' icheeget che ki koyasyechi kayasyosyek: ago ibwaatyin icheek yaityet, si kobiit kenam." 
Ezekiel21:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki ogoonu kibwaat yaityeng'wong', amu kigeng'aany pistaosyekwok kotook, kot kotook tengekwogikwok eng' poisyonikwok tugul; amu ki kibwaatak, kenamok anyun kityo." 
Ezekiel21:25 Ee inyee ne ya, ne ki kiguotenin ne po meet, pounindetap Israel, ne kagonyo peetuunnyi, eng' peetuusyegap yaityet ne po let;" 
Ezekiel21:26 mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Inemu chepkulet ak ireegu naaryeet: ma koigeitu niito kogeny: ieet nooto ming'in, ak iming'in nooto toroor." 
Ezekiel21:27 Agabui, agabui, agabui; ma kobiitu nooto kogeny, kot konyo ne nyoljin kobunji; si agoochi ineendet." 
Ezekiel21:28 Maoten inyee weeriitap chii, ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo lagogap Ammon, ak agobo teweernatennywa, kole; mwaa ile, Rotwetap chok, kaging'us rotwetap chok, kagesit agobo parisyet, si kobiit kobaris, si koigei kalyeleet:" 
Ezekiel21:29 kota kogeerchinin tangoita, kota kong'orei lembechek agobo inyee, si kondein kaatwegap kiptengeginik che ki kiguoten ne po meet, che kagonyo peetuunywa, eng' peetuusyegap yaityet ne po let." 
Ezekiel21:30 Ker rotwetap chok. Arwoogun eng' ole ki kiyaenen, eng' emet ne ki kisikyinin." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ak aroong'jin nereegekyuk; aguutyinin maatap nereegekyuk: ak andein eunegap piik che uu tyong'ik, che ng'oomen eng' ng'emisyet." 
Ezekiel21:32 Iegu kweenik che kilaali; kitumjin korotiguk kwenutap emet. Ma kibwaatin kogeny; amu kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito. 
Ezekiel22:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel22:2 Ee, inyee weeriitap chii, tos irwookyini, irwookyini nganaseet ne po korotiik? Iboorchi anyun konai tuguukyuk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel22:3 Ak imwa ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Nganaseet ne tumdoi korotiik eng' kwenunnyi, si kobiit konyo peetuunnyi, ne yachinegei kanamonik, kong'wanitegei!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Kanamin ng'oogisto amu korotiguk che kiitumde, ki king'wanitin eng' kanamoniguk che ki iyai; ak ki igoochi peetuusyeguk koriik, ak kaiit ye pooch kenyisyeguk. Ko uu nooto kaayain koteweerin pororyosyek, ak ne kichotei eng' emotinwek tugul." 
Ezekiel22:5 Chotin che neegit kobooto che looen, inyee ne ii murwoon ak ko nyiitaat wasetapkei." 
Ezekiel22:6 Ogeero, pounigap Israel, mi age tugul eng' kimnateennyi, eng' kwenung'ung', si kobiit kotumda korotiik." 
Ezekiel22:7 Ki kosas icheek eng' inyee kwanda ak kamet; kigonyalil icheek toek eng' kwenung'ung': ki koyachi ne ya eng' inyee ne ma tinyei sigiik ak mosoget. 
Ezekiel22:8 Ki isas tuguukyuk che tiliileen, ak imurwon sabatosyekyuk." 
Ezekiel22:9 Ki kotebee chaamik kwenung'ung' si kotumdoi korotiik: ak kigoamisye tuloonook eng' inyee: ki koyai yaityet eng' kwenung'ung'. 
Ezekiel22:10 Ki kong'aany eng' inyee kwanisyekwak kotebee aach ngor: kigosuup eng' kwenung'ung' kwondo ne ki itabaanat eng' peetuusyekyik che po arawet. 
Ezekiel22:11 Ak ki koyai age kiit ne kiwechei kobooto osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi, koyai age yaityet kong'wanit osotyotap weeriinnyi; ak kigosuup age chepkamet, cheptap kwandanyi, eng' inyee." 
Ezekiel22:12 Kigotaach icheek eng' inyee asoya si kotumda korotiik; ki ip kelunet ne siirtoot ak che tesatiin, ak ki inyooru poroteet eng' keiyandit amu ki isastae piigap kokweng'ung', ak ki iutyeno, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel22:13 Keer anyuno, ki arabach eunekyuk agobo keluneng'ung' ne ma po iman ne ki inyooru, ak eng' korotiguk che mi kwenung'ung'." 
Ezekiel22:14 Tos imuuchi komuita muguleldang'ung', anan kogimegitu euneguk, eng' peetuusyek che agerin kong'? Kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito, ak ayae." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ak aseerchin pororyosyek, ak ayestochin emotinwek; ak ageesu simdang'ung'." 
Ezekiel22:16 Ak imurwongei inyegei, eng' taitap pororyosyek; si kobiit inai ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel22:17 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel22:18 Ee, weeriitap chii, ki koek eng' anee kootap Israel michikyigek che kigenendoe fedha: ki koek icheek tugul sugunwet ak kibatit ak karnook ak ngosyelait, che mi maat ne oo; icheek ko michikyigek che kigenendoe fedha." 
Ezekiel22:19 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki oegu okweek tugul michikyigek che kigenendoe fedha, ogeero, ayumjinok Jerusalem." 
Ezekiel22:20 Ko uu ye kiyumjin maat ne oo fedha ak sugunwet ak karnook, ak ngosyelait ak kibatit, si kobiit keguut maat kobeel kochootyo; ayumok anyun ko uu nooto eng' nereegekyuk, ak eng' nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, ak andeok olooto, si ochootye." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ee, ayumok tugul, ak aguutak eng' maatap nereegekyuk, ak ochootye eng' maata." 
Ezekiel22:22 Ko uu ye chotoos fedha eng' maat ne oo, ochotosi ak okweek eng' maata; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kaarong'jok nereegekyuk che ng'woneen." 
Ezekiel22:23 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel22:24 Ee, weeriitap chii, ileenji emonooto, ii emet ne tomo ki anyiny, anan kerobonji eng' peetuutap nereegek." 
Ezekiel22:25 Miitei kwenunnyi chaamset ne po maotikyik, ne uu ng'etundo ne pooriseni kobarisyei: ki kobar saboonwek; ibei konoraik ak tuguuk che po kamanuutyet ne oo; ki kotes mosoogik eng' kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel22:26 Ki kobut tisiikyik ng'atuutyennyu, ak komurwon tuguukyuk che tiliileen: ma ibesyo che tiliileen ak che ma tiliileen, ama ineet piik koguiyo tuguuk che ma ianyinyotin ak che ianyinyotin, ak ki kotuch konyekwak si ma keer sabatosyekyuk, ak ki king'wanita eng' kwenunnywa." 
Ezekiel22:27 Kaigei pounikyik eng' kwenunnyi suik che parisyei; si kotumda korotiik, ak kong'em saboonwek, si kobiit konyoor poroteet ne ma po iman." 
Ezekiel22:28 Ak ki komalse maotikyik taartaarik che ma myachen, komalsechi icheek, kogeerei tangoita, ak kong'orchin icheek lembechek, koleenjin, Mwaei ko uu ni Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ma mwa kiy Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel22:29 Kigoboisye piigap emet sastaet, ak korebisyei; ee, kigoiim kibananook ak che ma tinyei kiy, ak Ki kogastae toondet eng' ooreet ne ya." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ki acheeng' anyun chii eng' kwenunnywa, si kotuur ng'ootweet, ak kotonon eng' tainnyu eng' ole kibutok, agobo emet, si ma ng'em emonooto: ago ma anyooru chii." 
Ezekiel22:31 Kaaroong'ji anyun nereegekyuk icheek amu nooto; kaagesu eng' maatap nereegekyuk: ki ande ortinwekwak metowekwak, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel23:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel23:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, kimi kwonyiik aeng' che ki tiibiigap chebyoset agenge." 
Ezekiel23:3 Ak ki yai icheek kugoinatosyek eng' Misiri; ki yai kugoinatosyek eng' ming'inatennywa: ki kichiil kinaikwak eng' olooto, ak ki kitui kutusweegap kinaikwak che po pergeinatennywa eng' olooto." 
Ezekiel23:4 Kainaikwak ko ki Oholah, ne oo, ak Oholibah, chepkamet: ak kibunjo, ak ki sich weeriik ak tiibiik. Ak ki uu ni kainaikwak, Samaria ko Oholah, ak Jerusalem ko Oholibah." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ak ki yai Oholah kugoinatet ye kita ko nenyu; ak ki cham miising' chamanikyik, chooto ko piigap Assyria, piigap kokwennyi," 
Ezekiel23:6 che ki ilaachi ngoroik che buluu, che ki kirwoogik ak pounik, murenik tugul che ki chamei, murenik che ketei paraisisyek." 
Ezekiel23:7 Ak ki yai kugoinatosyekyik kobooto icheek, murenik tugul che korooron miising' che po Assyria, ak age tugul ne ki chamei miising'. Ki ing'wanitegei kanamonikwak tugul." 
Ezekiel23:8 Ama meto kugoinatosyekyik kobooch peetuusyegap Misiri; amu kiruiyo kobooto ineendet kobooch ming'inatennyi, ak kitui kutusweegap kinaik che po pergeinatennyi: ak ki yai kugoinatennywa miising' kobooto ineendet." 
Ezekiel23:9 Ki ande anyun ineendet eunegap chamanikyik, kwo eunegap piigap Assyria, che ki chamei miising'." 
Ezekiel23:10 Ki ng'aany chuuto ineendet kotep aach ngor: ki imut weeriikyik ak tiibiikyik ak kobar kwonyooto eng' rotwetap chok: ki ek teweerya eng' kwonyiik; amu ki irwookyi ineendet. 
Ezekiel23:11 Ak kigeerei niito Oholibah chepkamet, ago king'emak ineendet miising' eng' chamennyi kosiir chepkamet, ak eng' kugoinatosyekyik che kichang'a kosiir che po chepkamet." 
Ezekiel23:12 Ki cham miising' piigap Assyria, che ki kirwoogik ak pounik, piigap kokwennyi, che ki ilaachigei miising', murenik che ketei paraisisyek, murenik tugul che ki chamei." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ak ki ageer ale ki king'wanit; ki isup tuwai ooreet agenge. 
Ezekiel23:14 Ak kites kugoinatosyekyik; amu ki keer itoonwegap piik che ki kisirchi inaat, itoonwegap Kaldeik che ki kisire saleiywek che piriireen," 
Ezekiel23:15 che kirategei mosibisyek, ak kotaae metowekwak ngoroik che ki kisal, ko pounik tugul, che tiny kegeer, che kergei ak Babilonik eng' Kaldea, emennywa ne ki kisikyin." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ak kingo keer icheek kocham, ak koyookyi piik koba Kaldea." 
Ezekiel23:17 Ak ki pwanji ineendet Babilonik eng' itoogutap chamyet, ak ki ing'wanit icheek ineendet eng' kugoinatennywa, ak ki imurwongei kobooto icheek, ak kitoiyo saboondanyi ak pichooto." 
Ezekiel23:18 Ki ng'aany anyun kugoinatosyekyik, ak kong'aanygei kotep aach ngor: koistoegei anyun saboondanyu ineendet, ko uu ye ki istoegei saboondanyu tupchennyi." 
Ezekiel23:19 Ago kites kugoinatosyekyik, kobwaati peetuusyegap ming'inatennyi, ye kingo yaei kugoinatet eng' emetap Misiri." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ak ki cham miising' chamanikyik, che ki uu poorwekwak poorwegap sigiroik, ak ki uu tuguuk che mang'une icheek, tuguugap paraisisyek." 
Ezekiel23:21 Ibwaat anyun yaityetap ming'inateng'ung', ye kingo tui Misiriik kutusweegap kinaiguk che po ming'inateng'ung'." 
Ezekiel23:22 Ara anyun, ee Oholibah, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, ang'eetyinin chamaniguk, che ki kotoiyegei saboondang'ung', ak amutu icheek kobwonjin eng' komosta age tugul;" 
Ezekiel23:23 Babilonik ak Kaldeik tugul, Pekod ak Soa ak Koa, kobooto piigap Assyria tugul: murenik che ki chamei, che ki kirwoogik ak pounik icheek tugul, pounik ak piik che taagunotiin, ki laanyei icheek tugul paraisisyek." 
Ezekiel23:24 Ak kobookyin kotinyei kariik, kariisyek che po lugeet ak kariisyek che lau tuguuk, ak tuiyet ne po pororyosyek: ibookyinin kotinyei long'onik che eecheen ak che mengeechen ak chepkuloigap lugeet eng' komoswek tugul: ak agoochi icheek kirwooget, si korwogun, ko uu kirwoogutikwak." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ak atokyin ng'etkondanyu, ak kogerin kong' icheek eng' nereegek che ng'woneen; tilei serung'ung' ak itiiguk; ak kebare rotwetap chok piiguk che ki ng'et: imuti icheek weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk; ak kobeel maat piiguk che ki ng'et." 
Ezekiel23:26 Ireegunenen kogeny ngoroik, ak koibenen tuguuguk che korooron." 
Ezekiel23:27 Ageesu yaityeng'ung' eng' inyee, ak kugoinateng'ung' ne ki ibu eng' emetap Misiri si mata inyaliil icheek, anan kota ibwaat Misiri kogeny." 
Ezekiel23:28 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, andein eutap icheek che iweche, andein eutap icheek che ki kotoiyegei saboondang'ung':" 
Ezekiel23:29 ak kogerin kong' eng' wegeet, ak korebenen poisyeng'ung' tugul, ak kobagachin itebee puch aach ngor: ak keng'aanyin itebi puch eng' kugoinatosyeguk, yaityeng'ung' kobooto kugoinatosyeguk." 
Ezekiel23:30 Kiyaun tuguuchuuto, amu ki iyai kugoinatet isuboti pororyosyek, ak amu ki imurwonegei kanamonikwak." 
Ezekiel23:31 Ki isup ooreetap chepkomet; nooto anyun andoi kigombennyi eung'ung'. 
Ezekiel23:32 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Iee kigombetap chepkomet, ne oo ak ko paraa: kirorechinin kereenyin ak kesasin; chaang' tuguugap kigombanooto." 
Ezekiel23:33 Kinyiitin pogitet ak arageneet, kobooto kigombetap kwong'eet, ak pananda, kobooto kigombetap chepkomet Samaria." 
Ezekiel23:34 Iee ichololi, ak inyei rokyonokyik, ak igereer kinaiguk; amu kamwae anee ng'olyoondoniito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel23:35 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki iutyeno, ak ituktocha patai, kesen anyun yaityeng'ung' agine ak kugoinatosyeguk." 
Ezekiel23:36 Kimwaiwo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogeny, koleenjo: Ee, weeriitap chii, tos irwookyini Oholah ak Oholibah? Iboorchi anyun icheek tuguukwak che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel23:37 Amu ki koyai ibeetapkei, ak komi korotiik eunekwak, ak ki koipkei kobooto kanamonikwak; ak Ki kogoochi icheek kogeny weeriikwak che kisikwa, ki igoito kobun maat si kobiit kebeel." 
Ezekiel23:38 Ki koyaiywo kogeny niito: ki kong'wanit oldanyu ne tiliil eng' peetuunooto, ak komurwon sabatosyekyuk." 
Ezekiel23:39 Amu ye kingo parchi lagokwak kanamonikwak, kobwa peetuunooto oldanyu ne tiliil komurwon; ak ogeero, ki yai nooto eng' koonnyu." 
Ezekiel23:40 Ak kogeny ki oguur piik eng' ole loo: che kiga kiyookyi, ak ogeero, ki pwa; ki iungei amu pichooto, ak isal konyeguk, ak ki ilelesonjinegei tuguugap lelesta;" 
Ezekiel23:41 ak ki itebee itoogut ne karaaran, ne ki mi tainnyi meset ne choboot, ne ki inde nyamdutikyuk che kibeelei ak mwanikyuk." 
Ezekiel23:42 Ak ki mi ak ineendet eng' yooto tuugeetap tuiyet ne kitalbisi: ak ki kimut eng' surkwen piik alak tugul kobooto kibogitinik; ak ki ilaakyi kariigap eunek icheek tuwai, ak ki ilaakyi chepkuloik che korooron." 
Ezekiel23:43 Ki amwa anyun agobo ineendet ne ki yai ibeetapkei kobooch keny, ale, Yaei anyun kugoinatosyek kobooto ineendet, ak ineendet kobooto icheek." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ak ki ipkei ak ineendet, ko uu ye ibegei ak chepkugoniot: ki ipkei anyun ko uu nooto kobooto Oholah ak Oholibah, kwonyiik che yaacheen." 
Ezekiel23:45 Tuun irwookyin piigap iman icheek, eng' kirwoogetap chepkugonik, ak eng' kirwoogetap kwonyiik che tumdoi korotiik; amu icheeget ko chepkugonik, ak komi korotiik eunekwak." 
Ezekiel23:46 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amutyini icheek tuiyet, ak agoite icheek kewiirchi komosi ak komosi ak keluul." 
Ezekiel23:47 Ak kolach tuiyet icheek eng' koik, ak kobar eng' rotonikwak che po chok; ak kobar weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak, ak kobeel kooriikwak." 
Ezekiel23:48 Aistoi anyun ko uu nooto yaityet eng' emet, si koek kateunet eng' kwonyiik tugul si ma kosubi yaityeng'wong'." 
Ezekiel23:49 Ak kogeerwok ko uu yaityeng'wong', ak ogesen tengekwogigap kanamonikwak: si onai ole aa Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel24:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kenyiitap sogool, eng' arawetap taman, eng' peetuut ne po taman ne po arawanooto, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel24:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, sir kainetap peetuut, ne po peetuunooto: ki ibookyi laitoryatap Babilon Jerusalem eng' peetuunooto." 
Ezekiel24:3 Ak imwachi kalewenet koot ne ngelelyot, ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole kotkot tereet, kotkot, ak roong'ji peek:" 
Ezekiel24:4 inde tuguuk che iyoi, kiy age tugul ne myee, kubesto, ak puita; inyiit kawek che myachen." 
Ezekiel24:5 Kwei keechiirek che myach eng' akweet, ak irurukyi ma kawek: ingowaskei miising'; ee, iyoe teronooto kawechooto." 
Ezekiel24:6 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwo! Nganaseet ne po korotiik, tereet ne tinyei kutu eng' ole po oriit, tereet ne tomo kobek kutuuk! Inemu agenge agenge; ma mi parbaryat ne kaibutyi teronooto." 
Ezekiel24:7 Amu mi korotiikyik kwenunnyi; ki inde rwandet ne ma mi kiy; ma tumji ng'wony, si ketuge temburyek;" 
Ezekiel24:8 si kobiit kong'eet nereegek che ng'woneen konyo koyaakta mugetuut, kaande korotiikyik rwandet parak si ma ki tuch." 
Ezekiel24:9 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwo! Nganaseet ne po korotiik! Atese kogeny karurugutyet koeet. 
Ezekiel24:10 Nde kweenik che chaang', ilaal maat ne oo, iyo panyeek komyee, ak ichop suuteek konyigiisitu, ak ingolalyo kawek." 
Ezekiel24:11 Yeityo igotkot teronooto komi puch eng' maata si kolal, ak kolal sugunwennyi si kochoot simdanyi ne mi oriit ak kobeel kutuukyik." 
Ezekiel24:12 Aiimigei puch eng' poisyet, kutukyik che chaang' koma istoegei; ama iwong'ugei kutukyik eng' ma." 
Ezekiel24:13 Agot ye ki atiliilin eng' yaityetap simdang'ung', ko ki ma itiliilage, ma kitiliilin kogeny eng' simdang'ung' kot ageesu nereegekyuk che ng'woneen eng' inyee." 
Ezekiel24:14 Kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito, isuldoi ak ayae nooto; ma weechigei let, amarira moo, amawale kabwaatutikyuk. Arwoogun icheek ko uu ortinweguk ak ko uu poisyoniguk, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel24:15 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel24:16 Ee, weeriitap chii, keero, aistoi eng' yooto ne iboiboi konyeguk: ago metei anan iriir, ama saitoi peeguk che po kong'." 
Ezekiel24:17 Tigen, ago ma miising'; ametechi che ki kobek, taae meting'ung' angeet, ak ilaach kweoniguk, ametuch kuting'ung', ameam amitwogigap piik." 
Ezekiel24:18 Ki ang'alaalji anyun piik karon; ak kime osotyondennyu koskoleny: ak ki ayai karon ko uu ye kiga king'ata. 
Ezekiel24:19 Ak ki leenjo piik, Tos memwaiwech kiit ne uu tuguuchu eng' acheek, kot iyai ko uu nooto?" 
Ezekiel24:20 Ki amwachi anyun aleenji, Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel24:21 Ng'alaalji kootap Israel, ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, amurwoni oldanyu ne tiliil, menoteetap kimnateeng'wong', ne iboiboi konyekwok, ne riiree saboonwekwok; ak kebare rotwetap chok weeriikwok ak tiibiikwok che ki obagaakte." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ak tuun oyae ko uu ye koayai: motuche kutusweekwok, anan oam amitwogigap piik." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ak komi metowekwok angook che otaae, ak komi kweonik keelyekwok; moteitosi anan oriirye; ago ochuichuitosi eng' tengekwogikwok, ak otigenjige." 
Ezekiel24:24 Egu anyun Ezekiel kaboorunet eng' okweek; oyae ko uu tugul che ki koyai ineendet: ye nyo niito, onai anyun ole aa Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel24:25 Ak inyee, ee, weeriitap chii, tos manyonjinin chiito eng' peetuut ye arebee icheek kimnateennywa, ak poiboiyetap toroornatennywa, ak ne iboiboi konyekwak, ak kioto ki inde mugulelwekwak, ak weeriikwak ak tiibiikwak," 
Ezekiel24:26 tos manyonjinin eng' peetuunooto chiichooto chilili, si kogoonin igas nooto eng' itiiguk?" 
Ezekiel24:27 Eng' peetuunooto, ing'alaaljini ineendet, ama konamageen kuut kogeny: iegu anyun kaboorunet eng' icheek; ak konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel25:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel25:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, tokyigei kaplagogap Ammon, ak imaoten agobo icheek:" 
Ezekiel25:3 ak ileenji lagogap Ammon, Ogas ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki imwa ile, Haa, agobo oldanyu ne tiliil, ye kiga kimurwon; ak agobo emetap Israel ye kiga kiyai kong'emak; ak agobo kootap Judah, ye ki kiluul:" 
Ezekiel25:4 keer anyun, agoochinin lagogap kong'asiis ibunji, ak koteekso icheek eng' kwenung'ung', ak koyai meng'otosyekwak eng' kwenung'ung'; amei logoeguk ak kolu cheguuk." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ak ayai Rabbah koek ole menyei tambeesik, ak ayai kaplagogap Ammon koek ole kiyage akwotisyegap keechiirek: si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel25:6 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki irabrap euneguk, ak itwaltwal, ak ibaibaitu eng' koroomnateet tugul ne mi saboondang'ung' agobo emetap Israel;" 
Ezekiel25:7 keer anyun, kaachuul eunnyu atokyin, ak agoochin pororyosyek koluulin; ak aisten eng' pororyosyek, ak agoonin ilus eng' emotinwek: ang'emin; si inai ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel25:8 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu mwaei Moab ak Seir, kole, ogeero, uu kootap Judah pororyosyek tugul:" 
Ezekiel25:9 keer anyuno, ayaate kiwotetap Moab kobooch nganasook, kobooch nganasookyik che mi kiwotosyekyik, toroornatetap emet, Beth-Jesimoth, Baal-meon ak Kiriataim," 
Ezekiel25:10 ayaatyini piigap kong'asiis, koba kobargei ak lagogap Ammon, ak agoochi icheek konam kobunji, si ma kibwaati lagogap Ammon kogeny eng' pororyosyek:" 
Ezekiel25:11 ak arwookyi Moab; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Ezekiel25:12 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki koyai ne ya Edom koyaaktochigei mugetuut eng' kootap Judah, ak ki koyai yaityet ne oo, koyaaktochigei mugetuut;" 
Ezekiel25:13 mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Achuule eunnyu atokyini Edom, ak aiste eng' olooto chii ak tyony: ak ayai koguber kobooch Teman; kibarei icheek eng' rotwetap chok agoi Dedan." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ak ayaakyi mugetuut Edom eng' eutap piik che miitei Israel, ak koyai eng' Edom ko uu nereegekyuk, ak eng' nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, si konai icheek yaaktaennyu ne po mugetuut, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel25:15 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu kagoyaakta mugetuut Philistiik, ak kagoyaaktochigei mugetuut eng' koroomnateet ne mi saboondo si kobiit kong'emis eng' puunyoondit ne po agoi;" 
Ezekiel25:16 mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, achuule eunnyu atokyi Philistiik, ak aiste Keretik, ak ang'em che ki ng'et che po ngeguut." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ak ayaakyi icheek mugetuut ne koroom, eng' kereetap kong' ne ng'waan; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye ayaakyini icheek mugetuut." 
Ezekiel26:1 Ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak agenge, eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawanooto, konyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel26:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, amu ki komwa Tyro agobo Jerusalem kole, haa, kogobutok ineendet ne ki kurgeetap pororyosyek; kagoweekyagei: kitesa anyun achang'ait, amu kagong'emak ineendet;" 
Ezekiel26:3 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, aboryenen, ee Tyro, ak agoochini pororyosyek che chaang' kobookyin, ko uu ye igoochin nyanjet peekyik komildagei." 
Ezekiel26:4 Ak kong'em irimoigap Tyro, ak kobut teeksosyekyik che kooen: ang'oing'oi ng'ung'unyekyik, ak ayai ineendet koek rwandet ne ma mi kiy." 
Ezekiel26:5 Egu nganasanooto ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njireenik, eng' kwenutap nyanjet; amu kamwae ng'olyoondoniito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak koek ne luulei pororyosyek." 
Ezekiel26:6 Ak kebare rotwetap chok tiibiikyik che mi emet: si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Ezekiel26:7 Amu mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, amuti Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon, ineendet laitoryatap laitorinik, kobookyi Tyro, kobunu murot kaataam, kobooto paraisisyek, ak kariisyekyik che po lugeet, ak piik che ketei paraisisyek, ak kweanet, ak piik che chaang'." 
Ezekiel26:8 Pare rotwetap chok tiibiiguk che mi emet: ak koteech irimoik kotokyin, ak koruruuch ng'ung'unyek kotokyin, ak konamji parak long'eet ne oo kotokyin." 
Ezekiel26:9 Ak konde injinisyek che kibutisye, taitap irimoiguk, ak kobute aonokyik teeksosyeguk che kooen." 
Ezekiel26:10 Tuchin temburyegap paraisisyekyik amu chaang'indonywa: itumdumegei irimoiguk amu kirgirenetap paraisisyek che laanyei piik, ak ne po kariisyek che lau tuguuk, ak ne po kariisyek che po lugeet, ye tuun punei ineendet ormariichoguk, ko uu piik che pendi nganaseet oriit kobunei ole ki kobutok." 
Ezekiel26:11 Tiechei ortinweguk tugul eng' siyoogap paraisisyekyik: parei piiguk eng' rotwetap chok, ak koluulyo tolochigap kimnateng'ung'." 
Ezekiel26:12 Ak koluul mogornatosyeguk, ak koluul tuguuguk che po mung'aaret: ak kobut irimoiguk, ak kong'em kooriguk che korooron: ak kowiirchi peek koiguk ak keetiiguk ak ng'ung'unyeguk." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ak ageesu cheetap tyenwogiguk; ama kegasei kogeny cheetap ketubosyeguk. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ak ayain iegu rwandet ne ma mi kiy: iegu ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njireenik; ma keteechin kogeny, amu kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel26:15 Mwachin Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Tyro kole: Tos ma potandos ngeguusyek amu cheetap kabuteng'ung', ye tigendos, che kiguoteni, ye ki parchi piik kwenung'ung'?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Kochoorgei anyun eng' ng'echerokwak che po laitornatet pounik tugul che po nyanjet, ak koreek ngoroikwak che tabanu parak, ak koreek ngoroikwak che ki kinde lelesta: ilaachi potanet; ak kotebee ng'wonyut, ak kobotanso sait age tugul ak kokwong'enen." 
Ezekiel26:17 Ak koriiryo agobo inyee, ak koleenjin, Katepto ano si keng'emin ne tee ni, inyee ne ki menyin piigap nyanjet, nganaseet ne ko tagunoot, ne ki kiim eng' nyanjet, ineendet ak piik che komenyei, ne koimui piik tugul che komenyei olooto!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Tuun potandos anyun ngeguusyek eng' peetuutap kabuteng'ung'; ee, aragendos ngeguusyek che mi nyanjet ye iistoige." 
Ezekiel26:19 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ye tuun ayain iegu nganaseet ne karaatya, ko uu nganasook che ma ki menyei; ye tuun atugenen nyanjet, ak kotubin peek che chaang';" 
Ezekiel26:20 achoorten anyun kobooto icheek che choorchingei keriinget, ole mi piik che po keny, ak agoonin imeny ng'wony oriit, eng' komoswek che ki koek surkwen kobooch keny, kobooto icheek che choorchingei keriinget, si ma ki menyin; ak ande toroornatet emetap piik che saptos:" 
Ezekiel26:21 ayain iegu kamuiset, ama ipiitu kogeny: agot nda kicheeng'in, koma koi kinyoorun kogeny, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel27:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel27:2 Ee inyee, weeriitap chii, riir agobo Tyro," 
Ezekiel27:3 ak ileenji Tyro, Ee inyee ne imenye ole kimandoe kebendi nyanjet, ne ii chemung'araindet ne po pororyosyek che po ngeguusyek che chaang', mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ee Tyro, ki imwa ile, Ageesunotkei eng' korooronindo." 
Ezekiel27:4 Mi kiwotosyeguk kwenutap nyanjosyek, ki koyai teegiguk karaaranindang'ung' koek ne ititaat." 
Ezekiel27:5 Ki koyai icheek pagoiniguk eng' piribirinik che punu Senir: ki koip taragonik eng' Lebanon si kobiit koyaun toloitap moinget. 
Ezekiel27:6 Ki koyai icheek mugangoguk che kiwase peek, keetiigap Bashan; kiyae seremusyeguk kelegap peeleek, che ki kiliige taragonik che teer che punu ngeguusyegap Kitim." 
Ezekiel27:7 Ki po katanit ne karaaran ne ki kinde lelesta, angeeng'ung' ne ki punu Misiri, si koek eng' inyee songolyet; ki buluu ak ko aruus ne piriir emaing'ung' ne ki punu ngeguusyegap Elisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 Ki kiboitiniguk che po moinget, piik che ki menyei Sidon ak Arbad: ee Tyro, ki menyin piiguk che ng'oomen che ki kwerye moinget." 
Ezekiel27:9 Kimenyin poisyegap Gebal kobooto piikyik che ng'oomen che kitimoti ole kaundur: kimi kwenung'ung' melisyek tugul che po nyanjet kobooto kiboitiinikwak si koyai mung'areng'ung'. 
Ezekiel27:10 Ki mi lugeng'ung' piigap Persia, ak che po Lud ak che po Put, mureniguk che po lugeet: ki kigartaat eng' inyee long'eet ak chepkulet; ki ibarta icheek karaaranindang'ung'." 
Ezekiel27:11 Ki mi piigap Abad kobooto lugeng'ung' irimoiguk parak komoswek tugul, ak kimi Gamadik teeksosyeguk che kooen: ki igartaat long'onikwak eng' irimoiguk eng' komoswek tugul; ki koyai karaaranindang'ung' koek ne ititaat." 
Ezekiel27:12 Ki chemung'araindeng'ung' Tarsis amu chaang'indap mogornatosyek alak tugul; kiyaei mung'aaret eng' fedha, karnook, kibatinik ak ngosyelaisyek, si konyoor tuguuguk." 
Ezekiel27:13 Ki chemung'arainiguk Javan, Tubal, ak Meshek: kiyae mung'aaret piik ak tuguugap sugunonik koale tuguuguk." 
Ezekiel27:14 Kiyae mung'aaret icheek che po kootap Togarmah paraisisyegap poisyet, ak paraisisyek che po lugeet, kobooto nyumbusyek si konyoor tuguuguk." 
Ezekiel27:15 Ki chemung'arainiguk piigap Dedan: ki ek ole ialdoisye ngeguusyek che chaang': ki alunenen tuguuguk kelegap peeleek ak keetiik che tuuen. 
Ezekiel27:16 Ki chemung'araindeng'ung' Syria, amu chaang'indap tuguugap musoknateng'ung': kiyae mung'aaret sumaragdoisyek, ak ngoroik che arusen ne piriir, ak ngoroik che ki kinde lelesta, ak katanit ne karaaran, ak tuguuk che piriireen che mi ngeguut, ak koik che piriireen si konyoor tuguuguk." 
Ezekiel27:17 Ki chemung'arainiguk Judah, ak emetap Israel: kiyae mung'aaret nganugap Minit, ak panag, kobooto kumyat, ak mwanik, ak mwanik che kinyaise, si konyoor tuguuguk." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ki chemung'araindeng'ung' Damasko amu chaang'indap tuguugap musoknateng'ung', amu chaang'indap mogornatosyek alak tugul; kobooto divaigap Helbon, ak koroorigap keechiirek che leelach." 
Ezekiel27:19 Kiyae mung'aaret Bedan ak Javan tuguuk che punu Usal: kibooto tuguuguk che po mung'aaret, kariik che kita kitanyi, kasia ak kalamus." 
Ezekiel27:20 Ki chemung'araindeng'ung' Dedan eng' ngoroik che kiitoi eng' paraisisyek. 
Ezekiel27:21 Ki chemung'arainiguk Arabia, ak pounik tugul che po Kedar; ki aldaun aaregap keechiir ak mengichik, ak ng'oroorek." 
Ezekiel27:22 Chemung'arainigap Sheba ak che po Raamah ko ki chemung'arainiguk: kiyae mung'aaret tuguuk che ng'uu ne anyiny kosiir tugul, ak koik tugul che po kamanuutyet ne oo, ak thahabu." 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran, Kane ak Eden, chemung'arainigap Sheba, Ashur ak Kilmad, ko ki chemung'arainiguk." 
Ezekiel27:24 Ki chemung'arainiguk chuuto eng' tuguuk che korooron, ngoroik che buluu ak che ki kinde lelesta, ak moingonik che korooron kot, che ki kirate poroonik, ak keyae taragonik, kibooto chooto tuguuguk che po mung'aaret." 
Ezekiel27:25 Ki ibei tuguuguk che po mung'aaret melisyegap Tarsis: ak ki itesage, ak itororitu miising' eng' kwenutap nyanjosyek." 
Ezekiel27:26 Ki komutun kiboitiniguk che po moinget inyoo peek che chaang': kiryebin usoonetap kong'asiis eng' kwenutap nyanjosyek. 
Ezekiel27:27 Ibutyin kwenutap nyanjosyek mogornatosyeguk, ak tuguuguk che po mung'aaret, mung'areng'ung', kiboitiniguk che po moinget, ak piiguk che kweryei moinget, piiguk che timoti ole kaundur, ak piik che ki konam mung'areng'ung', ak piiguk tugul che po lugeet, che mi kwenung'ung', kobooto kweaneng'ung' tugul che mi kwenung'ung', eng' peetuutap ng'emisyeng'ung'." 
Ezekiel27:28 Potandos kiwotosyek amu waagaatap piiguk che kweryei melisyek. 
Ezekiel27:29 Chorugei eng' melisyekwak piik tugul che wasei peek eng' mugangok, kobooto kiboitiinik, ak piik tugul che po nyanjet che kweryei melisyek, tonondos eng' ngeguut." 
Ezekiel27:30 Ak kowaach kot igas, ak koriiryo eng' ng'wanindo, ak kolakyin temburyek metowekwak, ak komildaegei oreek;" 
Ezekiel27:31 ak kocher metowekwak amu inyee, ak kogermenegei kuniok, ak koriiryo agobo inyee eng' ng'wanindo ne po saboondo, ak eng' riirek che ng'woneen." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ak koriirchin eng' kateiyennywa, ak koriirchin kole ng'oo ne uu Tyro, ne ki king'em kewiirchi kwenutap nyanjet?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ye kibun tuguuguk che po mung'aaret nyanjosyek, ki inyiit pororyosyek che chaang', ki igoochi laitorinigap ng'wony koek mogoreek eng' chaang'indap mogornatosyeguk." 
Ezekiel27:34 Eng' peetuut ne ki kiiriin eng' nyanjosyek eng' rirosyek, ki ibutyo tuguuguk che po mung'aaret eng' kwenung'ung', kobooto kweaneng'ung' tugul." 
Ezekiel27:35 Kwong'enen piik tugul che menyei ngeguusyek, ak koiyweis miising' laitorinikwak, taagu arageneet eng' togoochikwak." 
Ezekiel27:36 Renyin chemung'arainik che mi pororyosyek; ki iegu kamuiset ama ipiitu agoi. 
Ezekiel28:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel28:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, mwachi pounindetap Tyro, ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu kiitoroorge eng' muguleldang'ung', ak imwa ile, Aa kamuktain, atebee ng'echereetap Kamuktaindet, eng' kwenutap nyanjosyek; ago ii chiito, ma ii Kamuktaindet, agot nganda ki iyaige eng' muguleldang'ung' iige Kamuktaindet:" 
Ezekiel28:3 keero, ii ng'oom isiir Daniel; ma mi ung'ootyet ne imuuchi icheek koung'enen:" 
Ezekiel28:3 keero, ii ng'oom isiir Daniel; ma mi ung'ootyet ne imuuchi icheek koung'enen:" 
Ezekiel28:4 ki isikyigei mogornatosyek eng' utaatyeng'ung' ak naeng'ung', ak ki igonorchigei thahabu ak fedha eng' ole kigonoree konoraik:" 
Ezekiel28:5 ki ites mogornatosyeguk eng' utaatyeng'ung' ne oo ak eng' mung'areng'ung', ak kiitoroorgei eng' muguleldang'ung' amu mogornatosyeguk:" 
Ezekiel28:6 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki iyaige eng' muguleldang'ung' iige Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; 
Ezekiel28:7 keer anyun, amutyinin toek, piik che iywei pororyosyek, ak kong'us rotonikwak po chok agobo karaaranindap utaatyeng'ung', ak komurwon kakweng'eng'ung'." 
Ezekiel28:8 Ak kochoorten iwe keriinget; ak imeei eng' meosyegap che ki kibar, eng' kwenutap nyanjosyek." 
Ezekiel28:9 Tos ta imwae eng' taitap ineendet ne parin, ile, aa kamuktain? Ago ii chiito, ma ii kamuktain, imi eutap ineendet ne iguotenin." 
Ezekiel28:10 Imee eng' meosyegap che ma kimuratan eng' eutap toek: amu kaamwa ng'olyoondoniito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel28:11 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel28:12 Ee, weeriitap chii, riir agobo laitoryatap Tyro, ak ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ing'ochi karagendoet, kigonyiin utaatyet, ak ii ne ititaat eng' korooronindo." 
Ezekiel28:13 Ki imi Eden, mbareetap Kamuktaindet; ki itugegei koita age tugul ne po kamanuutyet, sardio, topasio, ak yaholom, berulo, soari, jasipi, sapphire, sumaragdo, ak bareqet, ak thahabu: ki miitei oriing'ung' poisyetap sugutisyeguk che mengeechen ak ndurerusyeguk; ki kichop chooto eng' peetuut ne ki kitau keyain." 
Ezekiel28:14 Kii kerubindet ne ki kiil ne ki iuurisyei: ak ki andein si itebee tulweet ne tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet; ki iwendote kwenutap koik che po maat. 
Ezekiel28:15 Ki igeesunotkei eng' ortinweguk kobooch peetuut ne ki kiyaenen, kot kenyoorchin yaityet." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ki inyiitin icheek koroomnateet eng' chaang'indap mung'areng'ung', ak ki iyai tengekto: ki atimden anyun ko uu ne murwoon, ichooruge eng' tulweetap Kamuktaindet; ak kaang'emin, ee kerubindet ne iuurisyei, imang'une koik che po maat." 
Ezekiel28:17 Ki itoroorge eng' muguleldang'ung' amu karaaranindang'ung', ki ing'em utaatyeng'ung' amu kakweng'eng'ung': kaawiirchin ng'wony kaandein taitap laitorinik, si kobiit kogeerin." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ki imurwon oldinweguk che tiliileen eng' chaang'indap tengekwogiguk, eng' yaityetap mung'areng'ung'; kaanemu anyun maat eng' kwenung'ung', ki kobeelin, ak awalin iegu oreek eng' ng'wony, eng' taitap icheek tugul che keerin." 
Ezekiel28:19 Kwong'enen icheek tugul che ingenin che mi pororyosyek: ki iegu kamuiset, ama ipiitu agoi." 
Ezekiel28:20 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel28:21 Ee, weeriitap chii, tokyi togeng'ung' Sidon, ak imaotenji," 
Ezekiel28:22 ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, aboryenen, ee Sidon; ak kitoroora eng' kwenung'ung': si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye karwookyi ineendet ak aegu ne itabaanat eng' ineendet." 
Ezekiel28:23 Amu ayookyini ineendet koroito ak korotiik eng' ortinwekyik; ak kobutyo eng' kwenunnyi icheek che kogiguoten, che kiguoteni eng' rotwetap chok eng' komosta age tugul; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel28:24 Eng' kootap Israel koma kobiitu kogeny eng' komoswekwak tugul che sasei icheek ko uu kateet ne rutei ak kotoorei piich, anan kateet ne ng'waan. Ak konai icheek kole aa Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel28:25 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ye tuun kaayum kootap Israel komang'une pororyosyek ole kiga kiyestoochi, ak aegu ne itabaanat eng' icheek eng' taitap pororyosyek, komeny anyun emennywa ne ki agoochi otwogindennyu Jakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Ak komeny olooto eng' chametapkei; ee teechei kooriik, ak komiin sabibuk, ak komeng'iis eng' chametapkei; ye tuun kaarwookyi icheek tugul che sasei icheek che mi komoswekwak tugul; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa." 
Ezekiel29:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiitap taman, eng' arawetap taman, eng' peetuutap taman ak aeng', ne po arawanooto, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel29:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, tokyi togeng'ung' Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri, ak imaotenji ineendet kobooto Misiri tugul:" 
Ezekiel29:3 ng'alaal, ak imwa ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole; Keero, aboryenen, inyee Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri, maswetit ne oo ne rue kwenutap ainoosyekyik, ne ki komwa kole, ainennyu ko nenyu aneege, ki ayachinigei." 
Ezekiel29:4 Ak andoi kombook tagilgiliguk, ak agoochi njireenigap ainoosyeguk konamgei ak periguk; ak amutun imong'u eng' kwenutap ainoosyeguk, kobooto njireenik tugul che po ainoosyeguk che ki namgei ak periguk." 
Ezekiel29:5 Abagaaktoin ko kagewiirchin surkwen, inyee kobooto njireenik tugul che po ainoosyeguk: ibutyini kewanin; ma kimugutosok anan kiyumak: kagoiten iegu amitwogigap tyong'igap ng'wony, ak che po toriitigap parak." 
Ezekiel29:6 Ak konai piik tugul che menyei Misiri kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki ek icheeget kirokto ne po tegat eng' kootap Israel." 
Ezekiel29:7 Kingo namin icheek euut, iiri, ak ibet tigigoikwak tugul: ye kingo tienengei, iil inyeendet, ak kiitumdum suenutikwak tugul." 
Ezekiel29:8 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, aibun rotwetap chok, ak abar eng' kwenung'ung' chii ak tyony." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ak koguber emetap Misiri ak koek karaita, si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu ki komwa kole, nenyu aineet, anee ne ki ayae." 
Ezekiel29:10 Keer anyun, aboryenen, kobooto ainoosyeguk, ak ayai emetap Misiri koek karaita ne ya ak koguber, kobooch teekseet ne kooi ne po Sebene agoi kiwotetap Kush." 
Ezekiel29:11 Ma punei chii olooto, ama punei tyony, ama ki menyei eng' kenyiisyek artam." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ak ayai emetap Misiri koguber eng' kwenutap emotinwek che kuberotin, ak koek nganasookyik karatwek kenyiisyek artam eng' kwenutap nganasook che karatwek: ak aseer Misiriik koba pororyosyek, ak aiyestochi emotinwek." 
Ezekiel29:13 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ayumi Misiriik komang'une pororyosyek ole kigaiyestoochi, ko kagobata kenyiisyek artamu;" 
Ezekiel29:14 ak amutu kogeny piigap Misiri che ki kiluul, ak aweekte koba emetap Patros, emet ne ki kisikyin ak komeng'iis eng' olooto koek pounateet ne nyeraat." 
Ezekiel29:15 Egu pounateet ne nyeraat eng' tugul; ama kotorooregei kogeny kosiir pororyosyek: ak aming'ini icheek, si ma kobou pororyosyek kogeny." 
Ezekiel29:16 Ama koegu kogeny ne kimang'u eng' kootap Israel, ne koonu kibwaat tengekto, ye kuskong' kogeer icheek: si konai kole aa Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel29:17 Ak eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak tisap eng' arawet ne po tai, eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawanooto, konyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel29:18 Ee, weeriitap chii, ki ng'at Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon lugeennyi koyai poisyet ne oo kobar Tyro: kichur metit age tugul, ak kosindit tigikyet age tugul: ago ma nyoor melekto, agot lugeennyi, eng' Tyro, amu poisyet ne ki yai agobo nganasanooto." 
Ezekiel29:19 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, agoochini Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon emetap Misiri; ak komut piikyik che chaang', ak koluul tuguukyik, ak koip tuguukyik che kiluulei; si koek chooto melektap lugeennyi." 
Ezekiel29:20 Kaagoochi ineendet emetap Misiri koek melektanyi amu poisyennyi, amu kiboisyeiwo, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel29:21 Abityini kootap Israel kuinet eng' peetuunooto, ak agoonin itwegu eng' kwenunnywa; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel30:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel30:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, maoten, ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni kole: Oteiye, pwo! Peetuunooto!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Amu kagoriik peetuunooto, kagoriik peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, peetuutap tulugenet; peetuusyegap pororyosyek." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ak konyonji rotwetap chok Misiri, ak koityi ng'wanindo Kush, ye ibutyo piik che kibarei eng' Misiri; ak komut piikyik che chaang', ak kebut lumeiywekyik." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kibare icheek rotwetap chok kobooto Kush, Put, Lud, ak piik tugul che kiburuchkei, kobooto Kush, kobooto piigap emet ne ki namgei ak icheeget." 
Ezekiel30:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ibutos ak icheek che tiye Misiri, ak kobut menoteetap kimnateennyi: kibare icheek rotwetap chok kobooch teekseet ne kooi ne po Sebene, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ak koek kibananook eng' kwenutap emotinwek che kibananook, ak kotebee nganasookyik kwenutap nganasook che ki koek karatwek." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ak konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye kaabeel Misiri, ak keng'em toretikyik tugul." 
Ezekiel30:9 Pendi eng' peetuunooto eng' tainnyu piik che kiyooktoi eng' melisyek koba komu Ethiopik che leen tebyei eng' kaalyeet; ak koityi icheek ng'wanindo, ko uu eng' peetuutap Misiri; ogeero, amu nyoonei peetuunooto." 
Ezekiel30:10 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ageesu tuiyetap Misiri, eng' eutap Nebukadresar laitoryatap Babilon." 
Ezekiel30:11 Kimutu ineendet ak piikyik kong'em emet, ineendet ne iywei pororyosyek; ak kong'us rotonikwak po chok kobar Misiri, ak konyiit muuswek emet." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ak ateenyi ainoosyek, ak aaldochi emonooto piik che yaacheen; ak ayai emet koguber, kobooto tugul che mi olooto, eng' eunegap toek: kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito." 
Ezekiel30:13 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ang'eme kanamonik ak icheek, ak ageesu itoonwegap tuguuk che ma tilei kiy, eng' Nop; ama kobiitu kogeny pounindet eng' emetap Misiri: ak ande kaiyweisyet emetap Misiri." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ak ayai Patros kobanan, ak abeel Zoan, ak arwookyi No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ak aroong'ji nereegekyuk che ng'woneen Sin, irimeetap Misiri; ak abar piik che chaang' che po No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ak abeel Misiri; nyooru ng'wanindo ne oo Sin, ak ketonaton No: ak konyoor Nop puunik peet." 
Ezekiel30:17 Kibare rotwetap chok murenigap Aben ak che po Pi-beset: ak keluul nganasochuuto. 
Ezekiel30:18 Imenitu peetuut agine eng' Teapnes, ye airii eng' olooto chogisyegap Misiri, ak kogeskei anyun menoteetap kimnateennyi: ago tuchei ineendet pooldet, ak keluul tiibiikyik." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ayae anyun ko uu nooto kirwoogutik eng' Misiri: si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Ezekiel30:20 Ak eng' kenyiitap taman ak agenge, eng' arawet ne po tai, eng' peetuutap tisap ne po arawanooto, konyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel30:21 Ee, weeriitap chii, kaairi eutap Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri: ak keero, ma ki rat kinde kerichek, kerate angeet, si kogimit komuuch konam rotwetap chok." 
Ezekiel30:22 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, aborye Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri ak airie eunekyik, che kiimeen, ak ne kiga keiri; ak agoochi rotwetap chok kobut eng' eunnyi." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ak aseer Misiriik koba pororyosyek, ak aiyestochi emotinwek." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ak agimiit eunegap laitoryatap Babilon, ak agoochi ineendet rotwennyu po chok: ago airie eunegap Pharaoh, ak kotigen eng' tainnyi eng' tigenoik che uu che po chiito ne kagiguoten ne po meet." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ak agimiit eunegap laitoryatap Babilon, ak kobutyo eunegap Pharaoh; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye agoochi rotwennyu po chok laitoryatap Babilon, si kong'werere emetap Misiri." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ak aseer Misiriik koba pororyosyek, ak aiyestochi emotinwek; si konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel31:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiit ne po taman ak agenge, eng' arawetap somok, eng' peetuutap tai ne po arawanooto, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel31:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, mwachi Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri ak piikyik che chaang' ng'olyoondoni ileenji: Ogerge ak ng'oo eng' etunateng'ung'?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Keero, kitarakwet Assyrianindet eng' Lebanon ne tinyei mooriik che korooron, kisamum, ak ko kooi; ak ki itei walinnyi poolik." 
Ezekiel31:4 Kibai peek ineendet, ki ibit rireet: ki root ainoosyekyik koba komoswek tugul eng' mbareennyi; ak kirootyi peekyik keetiik tugul che po mbareet." 
Ezekiel31:5 Kitororit anyun koindonyi kosiir keetiik tugul che po mbar; ak kitesagis mooriikyik, ak kogoeegitu mooriikyik amu peek che chaang', ye kingo ywaakta." 
Ezekiel31:6 Ki teech toriitik tugul kesonokwak eng' mooriigap keetoto, ak koiichi tyong'ik tugul che po emet kelutap keetoto, ak kiuure pororyosyek tugul che eecheen." 
Ezekiel31:7 Ki karaaran anyun eng' etunatennyi, eng' kooindap mooriikyik: amu kineegite tigitikyik peek che chaang'." 
Ezekiel31:8 Ma imuuch taragonik che ki mi mbareetap Kamuktaindet kouny ineendet: ki ma ko kergei piribirinik ak mooriikyik; ak ki ma ko kergei keetiik che uu kurinik ak mooriikyik; ak ki ma komi keetit age tugul eng' mbareetap Kamuktaindet ne kergei ak ineendet eng' karaaranindanyi. 
Ezekiel31:9 Ki ayai ineendet kogararanit eng' chaang'indap mooriikyik: kot koam ng'etkong' keetiik tugul che po Eden, che ki mi mbareetap Kamuktaindet." 
Ezekiel31:10 Kamwa anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu kiitoroorge eng' koindong'ung', ak ki itei walinnyi poolik, ak kitororit muguleldanyi amu koindonyi;" 
Ezekiel31:11 andoi ineendet eutap chiito ne kiim ne po pororyosyek; irwookyin iman: ki aoon amu yaityennyi. 
Ezekiel31:12 Kigoep ineendet toek che kiywei che po pororyosyek ak kometo: ki kobutyo mooriikyik eng' tuloonook ak eng' atebwosyek tugul, ak kigoilyo mooriikyik eng' kereruusyek tugul che po emet; ak ki koba pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony kobagaakta urwennyi, ak kometo ineendet." 
Ezekiel31:13 Menyei toriitik tugul karaitanyi, ak kotebee tyong'ik tugul che po timiin mooriikyik:" 
Ezekiel31:14 si mata kotoroorgei eng' koindonywa keet age tugul eng' keetiik tugul che mi ye neegitee peek, anan koboochit walisyekwak poolik, anan kotononso chechwaak che kiimeen eng' koindonywa, icheek tugul che eei peek: amu kagigoito tugul kobek, koba ng'wony oriit, eng' kwenutap piik, kobooto icheeget che choorchingei keriinget." 
Ezekiel31:15 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Eng' peetuut ne kichoorchigei ye mi che ki kobek ko ki ang'at riirek keriirchi ineendet: ki atuch rireet amu kiteenyo peek che chaang': ak ki ang'at Lebanon koriirchi ineendet, ak kitanuiso keetiik tugul che po timiin amu ineendet." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ki agoochi pororyosyek kobotanso amu cheetap kabutennyi, ye kinga timde ineendet kwo ye mi che ki kobek kobooto icheeget che choorchingei keriinget: ak ki igaigaigei keetiik tugul che po Eden, keetiik che korooron ak ko myachen miising' che po Lebanon, icheek tugul che eei peek, ki igaigaigei eng' ng'wony oriit."
