Ezekiel31:17 Ki choortagei chooto ak icheek koba ye mi che ki kobek kobooto ineendet, koba ole mi icheeget che ki kibare rotwetap chok; ee, chooto che ki eunnyi, che ki menyei urwennyi eng' kwenutap pororyosyek." 
Ezekiel31:18 Ogerge ak ng'oo anyun eng' toroornatet ak etunateet eng' kwenutap keetiigap Eden? Nganda uu nooto kechoortoin kobooto keetiigap Eden iwe ng'wony oriit: irue kwenutap che ma kimuratan, kobooto icheeget che ki kibare rotwetap chok. Niito ko Pharaoh ak piikyik che chaang', mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel32:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiit ne po taman ak aeng', eng' arawetap taman ak aeng', eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawanooto, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel32:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, riir agobo Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri, ak ileenji, Kiga kirogenen ng'etundo ne neran ne po pororyosyek: ago iuu maswetit eng' nyanjosyek; imong'u kobooto ainoosyeguk, ak iwase peek eng' keelyeguk, ak isamisi ainoosyekwak." 
Ezekiel32:3 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Aiitoi regereiywondennyu atugenen kobooto tuiyet ne po pororyosyek che chaang'; si komutunenen regereiywondennyu itogosu. 
Ezekiel32:4 Si ametochin emet, awirchinin kewanin, ak agoochi toriitik tugul che po parak kotebenen, ak agoochi tyong'ik che po ng'wony komugul kobiyong'enen." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ak ande poortang'ung' tuloonook parak, ak anyiit atebwosyek koindong'ung'." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ak abise korotiguk emet ne ibire peek, agoi tuloonook; ak inyi kereruusyek." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ak ye tuun ageesun atuch kipsengwet, ak ayae kecheikyik koimenitu; atuge pooldet asiista, ama kooluu arawet." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ayae lapkeiyosyek tugul che po kipsengwet che iluu miising' koimenitu eng' paragung'ung', ak ande mesundeito emeng'ung', mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel32:9 Agoochini mugulelwegap pororyosyek che chaang' konereekso, ye tuun aibun ng'emisyeng'ung' eng' kwenutap pororyosyek, konyo emotinwek che kitom inai." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ee, agoochini pororyosyek che chaang' kokwong'enen, ak koiyweis miising' laitorinikwak agobo inyee, ye tuun abarbar rotwennyu po chok eng' tainnywa; ak kobotanso eng' sait age tugul, kobotan chii tugul agobo saboondanyi, eng' peetuutap kabuteng'ung'." 
Ezekiel32:11 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Nyonjinin rotwetap chok ne po laitoryatap Babilon. 
Ezekiel32:12 Agoochini kobek piiguk che chaang' eng' rotoogap chok, che po piik che nyigoonen; icheek tugul ko che iywei pororyosyek: ak kong'em icheek menoteetap Misiri, ak kobek piikyik tugul che chaang'." 
Ezekiel32:13 Abare kogeny tyong'ikyik tugul che mi ole neegitee peek che chaang'; ama kotyechei peek che chaang'; ama kotyechei chii kogeny peechooto, anan kotyech tyong'ik." 
Ezekiel32:14 Atiliilii anyun peekwak, agoochini koroot ainoosyekwak ko uu mwanik, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ye tuun ayai emetap Misiri koguber ak koek karaatya, emet ne ma komi tuguuk che ki nyiitaat, ye abar tugul che menyei olooto, konai anyun kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel32:16 Chuuto ko riirek che tuun riirtos icheek; tuun riirtos tiibiigap pororyosyek eng' rirechooto: riirtos agobo Misiri, ak agobo piikyik tugul che chaang', mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel32:17 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiit ne po taman ak aeng', eng' peetuutap taman ak muut ne po arawanooto, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel32:18 Ee, weeriitap chii, riirchi piik che chaang' che po Misiri, ak itimde icheek, ineendet ak tiibiigap pororyosyek che taagunotiin, koba ng'wony oriit, kobooto icheek che choorchingei keriinget." 
Ezekiel32:19 Isiire ng'oo eng' korooronindo? Chortegei, ui iru kobooto che ma kimuratan." 
Ezekiel32:20 Ibutyin kwenutap che ki kebare rotwetap chok. Ki koitoi Misiri kebaree rotwetap chok; ichuut ineendet koistogei kobooto piikyik tugul che chaang'. 
Ezekiel32:21 Ng'alaaljin piik che kiimeen eng' che nyigoonen ineendet, eng' kwenutap ye mi che ki kobek, komi kobooto che toreti ineendet: kigochoortagei, siistos, agot che ma kimuratan, che ki kibare rotwetap chok." 
Ezekiel32:22 Mi Ashur olooto kobooto kweanennyi tugul; mi kereeriisyekyik komoswekyik tugul: che ki kibare rotwetap chok: 
Ezekiel32:23 che ki kinde kereeriisyekwak komoswek che po oriit che po keriinget, ak mi kweanennyi komoswek tugul che po kererinnyi: ki kibar tugul, ki kibare rotwetap chok, che ki yai kamuiset eng' emetap piik che saptos." 
Ezekiel32:24 Mi Elam olooto ak piikyik tugul che chaang' eng' komoswek tugul che po kererinnyi: ki kibar icheek tugul eng' rotwetap chok, che ki kochoortagei koma kimuratan, koba agoi ng'wony oriit, che ki yai kamuiset eng' emetap piik che saptos, ak ki kogesen kalilanennywa kobooto icheeget che choorchingei keriinget." 
Ezekiel32:25 Ki kochopchi ineendet itoogut eng' kwenutap che ki kibar, kobooto piikyik tugul che chaang'; mi kereeriisyekyik komoswekyik tugul: ki ma kimuratan icheek tugul, ki kibare rotwetap chok; amu kiyaak kamuisennywa eng' emetap piik che saptos, ak ki kogesen kalilanennywa kobooto icheeget che choorchingei keriinget: ki kinde ineendet kwenutap icheek che kigebar." 
Ezekiel32:26 Mi olooto Meshek, Tubal, ak piikyik tugul che chaang'; mi kereeriisyekyik komoswekyik tugul; ki ma kimuratan icheek tugul, ki kibare rotwetap chok; amu ki yai kamuisennywa eng' emetap piik che saptos." 
Ezekiel32:27 Ak maruitos kobooto piik che nyigoonen che ki pek che po che ma kimuratan, che kichoorchigei ye mi che ki kobek koibei kariikwak che po lugeet, ak kitiie metowekwak rotonikwak po chok, ak mi tengekwogikwak kawekwak; amu icheek ko ki kamuiset ne po piik che nyigoonen eng' emetap piik che saptos." 
Ezekiel32:28 Ago kitonatonin eng' kwenutap che ma kimuratan, ak oruitosi kobooto icheeget che ki kibare rotwetap chok." 
Ezekiel32:29 Mi Edom olooto, kobooto laitorinikyik ak pounikyik tugul, che ruitos eng' kimnateennywa kobooto icheek che ki kibare rotwetap chok: ruitos kobooto che ma kimuratan, ak icheeget che choorchingei keriinget." 
Ezekiel32:30 Mi olooto pounigap murot kaataam, icheek tugul, ak Sidonik tugul, che kichoortagei kobooto che ki kibar; ililandos icheek eng' kamuiset ne ki piitune kimnateennywa; ak ruitos ama kimuratan kobooto che ki kibare rotwetap chok, ak kogesen kalilanennywa kobooto icheek che choorchingei keriinget." 
Ezekiel32:31 Keerei Pharaoh icheek, ak kogaigaigei amu piikyik tugul che chaang' che ki kibare rotwetap chok; Pharaoh ak lugeennyi komugul, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel32:32 Amu kande kamuisennyi emetap piik che saptos: ak kinde ineendet kwenutap che ma kimuratan, kobooto icheek che ki kibare rotwetap chok, Pharaoh, kobooto piikyik tugul che chaang', mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel33:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel33:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, ng'alaalji lagogap piiguk, ileenji, ye aipchi emet rotwetap chok, ngot kolewen piigap emonooto chiito eng' kwenunnywa, ak konde koek riibindennywa:" 
Ezekiel33:3 ak ngo keer ineendet rotwetap chok konyonjin emonooto, koguut iryageet ak koteechi piik;" 
Ezekiel33:4 age tugul anyun ne kasei iryageet, ama iit kateunet, ngot konyo rotwetap chok ak kobar ineendet, kotebee korotiikyik metinnyi." 
Ezekiel33:5 Ki kas ineendet iryageet, ama iit kateunet, tebee anyun korotiikyik ineendet: amu nda kiga iit kateunet, ta kiga kosar saboondanyi." 
Ezekiel33:6 Ago ngot kogeer riibindet konyonei rotwetap chok, ama kuut iryageet, ama kiteechi piik, ak konyo rotwetap chok, ak kobar chii age tugul eng' kwenunnywa; kebare amu tengektanyi, ago amage korotiikyik eutap riibindet." 
Ezekiel33:7 Ee anyun, inyee, weeriitap chii, kaandein iegu riibindet eng' kootap Israel; kas anyun ng'olyoot ne amwae, ak iipchi icheek kateunennyu." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ye aleenji kiptengekyot, Ee, kiptengekyondoni, imee iman, ameteechi kiptengekyondonooto kometo ooreennyi; komeei kiptengekyondonooto amu tengektanyi, ago amage korotiikyik eung'ung'." 
Ezekiel33:9 Ago, ngot iteechi kiptengekyot agobo ooreennyi, si koweek kometo oranooto, ama meto ooreennyi, komeei ineendet amu tengektanyi, ago kaisaru saboondang'ung'." 
Ezekiel33:10 Ee inyee, weeriitap chii, mwachi kootap Israel ileenji, omwae ko uu ni ole: “Kanamech pistaosyekyok ak tengekwogikyok, ak kichuchui amu chooto; kimuktoi ano anyun kesapche?”" 
Ezekiel33:11 Mwachi icheek ileenji, ko uu ye asabe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koma paibaitune meetap kiptengekyot; ago abaibai ngo week kiptengekyot kometo ooreennyi, ak kosap: oweege, oweege, omete ortinwekwok che yaach; amu nee si obegu, ee kootap Israel?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Ee, inyee weeriitap chii, mwachi lagogap piiguk, ileenji, ma saru chiito ne po iman imanda eng' peetuutap pistoennyi; ago ma namei kiptengekyot tengekto eng' peetuut ne kaweek kometo tengektanyi: amaimuuchi kosap ineendet ne po iman eng' imandanyi eng' peetuut ne yaei tengekto." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ye aleenji ne po iman, isabe iman; ngot komong' imandanyi, yeityo koyai tengekto, koma kibwaati agot agenge eng' poisyonikyik che po imanda; ago meei amu tengektanyi ne ki yai." 
Ezekiel33:14 Kogeny, ye aleenji kiptengekyot, Imee iman; ngot koweek kometo tengektanyi; ak koyai kiit ne po iman ak ko litit;" 
Ezekiel33:15 ngot koweekta kiptengekyot kiit ne kiname pesendo, ak koweekta kogeny kiit ne kirebei, ak kowendote ng'atuutigap saboondo, amata koyai tengekto; kosabei iman ineendet, ma meei." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ma kiityin ineendet agot agenge eng' tengekwogikyik che ki koyai: ki koyai ineendet kiit ne po iman ak ko litit; sabei iman. 
Ezekiel33:17 Ago mwaei lagogap piiguk kole, ma po iman ooreetap Kiptaiyat: ago eng' icheek koma po iman ooreennywa." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ye week ne po iman kometo imandanyi, ak koyai tengekto, komeei eng' tengegoto." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ak ye week kiptengekyot kometo tengektanyi, ak koyai kiit ne po iman ak ko litit, kosabei ineendet eng' nooto." 
Ezekiel33:20 Ago omwae ole, Ma po iman ooreetap Kiptaiyat. Ee kootap Israel, arwookyini age tugul eng' okweek ko uu ortinwekyik." 
Ezekiel33:21 Ki nyoonjo chiito age ne kiga chilil komong' eng' Jerusalem, ki nyo eng' kenyiit ne po taman ak aeng', kobooch ngap keluulech, eng' arawetap taman, eng' peetuut ne po muut ne po arawanooto, koleenjo, Kagebar nganaseet." 
Ezekiel33:22 Ki mi anyun eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paragunnyu koskoleny, kotomo koit ineendet ne kichilili; ak kiga kogoono Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ang'alaal, ye kingo itu chiichooto karon ole ki ami, ak ki ang'alaal, ki mata konamaga kuut." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel33:24 Ee, weeriitap chii, mwaei icheek che menyei komoswek che karatwek eng' emetap Israel, kole, ki chiichak Abraham, ak ki punji emet: ago ki chaang' acheek; ki kigoonech emet kobunjech." 
Ezekiel33:25 Mwachi anyun icheek ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni kole: Oame panyeek kobooto korotiik, ak otokyini konyekwok kanamonikwok, ak otumdoi korotiik: tos oname emet kobunjook?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Otiegei rotonikwok po chok, oyae kiit ne kiwechei, ak ing'waniti age tugul eng' okweek osotyotap chiitap kokwennyi: tos oname emet kobunjook?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Mwachi anyun pichooto ko uu ni ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ko uu ye asabe, ki pare iman rotwetap chok icheek che mi komoswek che karatwek, ak agoochini koam tyong'ik ineendet ne mi kewanin, ak kobar koroito icheek che mi irimoik ak che mi kebenonik." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ak ayae emet koguber ak koek ne kikwong'ee, ak kogeskei menoteetap kimnateennyi; ak koek surkwen tuloonoogap Israel, kot koma kobunei chii." 
Ezekiel33:29 Yeityo konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye kaayai emet koguber ak koek ne kikwong'ee, amu tuguukwak tugul che kiwechei che ki koyai." 
Ezekiel33:30 Ee, inyee weeriitap chii, ng'alaali agobo inyee lagogap piiguk eng' ole neegitee irimoik, ak eng' kurgotigap kooriik, ak kong'alaaljin `age age, ng'alaaljin chii tugul tupchennyi, koleenjin, Asoomin ale, nyoo keebe kegas ng'olyoot ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel33:31 Ak kobwonjin ko uu ye pwoonei piik, ak kotep ng'wony eng' taing'ung' ko uu piikyuk, ak kogas icheek ng'aleeguk, ago ma yaei: amu iboortoi chamyet ne oo eng' ng'aleekwak, ago isubi mugulelwekwak kelunennywa." 
Ezekiel33:32 Keer anyuno, iuu eng' icheek tyendo ne karaaran miising', ne tinyei cheet ne anyiny, ne putindet: amu kasei icheek ng'aleeguk, ago ma yaei." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ak ye piit kioto, (keero, nyoonei,) konai anyun kole kimi maotyot kwenunnywa." 
Ezekiel34:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel34:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, maoten agobo mestowegap Israel, maoten, ak ileenji mestowechooto, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwo! Mestowegap Israel che paegei amitwogik icheegei! Tos ma nyooljin mestoweek kobai keechiirek?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Oame che akwaen, ak olaachi koroorigap keechiirek, oenye che akwaen; ago mobae keechiirek." 
Ezekiel34:4 Ma ogimiit che nyalulyotin, ama onyaa che myandos, ama orop ne kigoil, ama oweech kogeny ne kigeon, ama ocheeng' ne ki kobet: ago ki obou eng' kimnateet ak eng' koroomnateet." 
Ezekiel34:5 Kiyesta amu ki ma komi mestowot: ak ki ek amitwogigap tugul che po timiin, ak kiyesta." 
Ezekiel34:6 Ki ombenioti keechiirekyuk eng' tuloonook tugul, ak eng' tulweet age tugul ne kooi: ee, kiyesta keechiirekyuk koyom ng'wony tugul; ak ki ma komi chii ne ki cheeng'at anan kosubot icheek." 
Ezekiel34:7 Ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek mestoweek;" 
Ezekiel34:8 Ko uu ye asabe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu iman ko uu ye kigeluul keechiirekyuk, ak koek keechiirekyuk amitwogigap tyong'ik tugul che po timiin, amu ki ma komi mestowot, ama cheeng'at mestowekyuk keechiirekyuk, ago kibaegei mestoweek amitwogik icheegei, ama pai keechiirekyuk;" 
Ezekiel34:9 ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek mestoweek;" 
Ezekiel34:10 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, aborye mestoweek; ak amage eunekwak keechiirekyuk, ak aeete icheek kobai keechiirek; ama kobaegei mestoweek amitwogik kogeny; ak asaru keechiirekyuk eng' kutusweekwak, si ma ek amitwogikwak." 
Ezekiel34:11 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, anee, aneendet ne acheeng'oti keechiirekyuk, ak asuboti icheek." 
Ezekiel34:12 Ko uu ye cheeng'ei mestowot akweennyi eng' peetuut ne mi kwenutap keechiirekyik che ki kiiyesta, acheeng'e ko uu nooto keechiirekyuk; ak asaru icheek komong' eng' komoswek tugul ole kiga kiyestoochi eng' peetuutap poolik ak tulugenet ne imen." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ak amutu komong' eng' pororyosyek, ak ayumu eng' emotinwek, ak amutu kobwa emennywa; ak abai icheek eng' tuloonoogap Israel, eng' ole neegitee kereruusyek, ak eng' komoswek tugul che ki menyei eng' emonooto." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ayage icheek ole mi susweek che myach, ak kotebee piunywa tuloonoogap komoswek che torooreen che po Israel: ruitos eng' olooto eng' piut ne myee, ak koagete ole pitat eng' tuloonoogap Israel." 
Ezekiel34:15 Anee ne abae keechiirekyuk, ak agoochi koruiyo, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel34:16 Acheeng'e ne ki pet, ak amutu kogeny ne ki kioon, ak arop ne ki il, ak agimiit ne kimyani: ak abar ne neraat kobooto ne kiim: abae icheek kirwooget." 
Ezekiel34:17 Ago ee okweek, akweennyu, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, arwookyini artet eng' artet, kobooto mengichik ak kwesik." 
Ezekiel34:18 Tos kiit ne ming'in eng' okweek obaegei tuguuk che myach, yeityo otyekyi ng'wony che ki ng'at eng' ole oagete? Ak oee peek che tiliileen, yeityo oturur eng' keelyekwok che kang'et?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ago amei keechiirekyuk che ki otyech, ak koe che ki oturur eng' keelyekwok." 
Ezekiel34:20 Mwachin anyun Kiptaiyat `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek ko uu ni koleenji: Ogeero, arwookyini aneendet artet ne neraat eng' artet ne sagitat." 
Ezekiel34:21 Amu ki otoortaisye karaaswekwok ak tigigoikwok, ak otoore kuinoikwok tugul che ki myandos, kot oseer koba oldo tugul;" 
Ezekiel34:22 asaru anyun keechiirekyuk, ma koegu che kiluulei kogeny; ak arwookyi artet eng' artet." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ak ande mestowot agenge koyaga icheek, ak kobai icheek, nooto ko otwogindennyu Daudi; paei ineendet icheek, ak koek mestowonnywa." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ak aegu anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ak koek Daudi otwogindennyu, pounindet eng' kwenunnywa; kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ak kiyomiskei ak icheek eng' kayomiset ne po kaalyeet, ak ageesu tyong'ik che yaach eng' emet: ak komeny surkwen eng' chametapkei, ak koruiyo osnosyek." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ak ayai icheek koek kaberuret kobooto komoswek ole neegitee tulweennyu; ak ang'at ropta koroobon eng' peetuusyekyik; ak kobiit roptap kaberuret. 
Ezekiel34:27 Ak kooi logoek keetitap mbar, ak korur emet, ak kotebee chametapkei eng' emennywa; ak konai kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye tuun airii keetiigap choginnywa, ko kaasaru icheek komong' eng' eutap piik che ki yai icheek koek otwogikwak." 
Ezekiel34:28 Ama koegu kogeny che luulei pororyosyek, ama koamei tyony ne po ng'wony icheek; ago meng'iisyei eng' chametapkei, ama kobiitu chii ne imui." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ak achopchi icheek mbareet ne tagunoot, ama kobarei rubeet icheek eng' emet, ama koiboti kalilanet ne punu pororyosyek." 
Ezekiel34:30 Si konai kole ami anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa kobooto icheek, ak konai icheek kole kootap Israel ko piikyuk, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel34:31 Ak okweek, keechiirekyuk, che oo keechiiregap akweennyu, ko oo piik, ak aa Kamuktaindeng'wong', mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel35:1 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Ezekiel35:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, tokyi togeng'ung' tulweetap Seir, ak imaotenji," 
Ezekiel35:3 ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, aboryenen, ee tulweetap Seir, ak atokyinin eunnyu, ak ayain iguber ak iegu ne kikwong'ee." 
Ezekiel35:4 Abute nganasoguk, ak iegu karaatya; si inai ile aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel35:5 Amu itinye puunyoondit ne po kotugul, ak ki igoite piigap Israel kebar eng' kimnateetap rotwetap chok eng' peetuutap nyalildanywa, eng' peetuusyegap yaityet ne po let:" 
Ezekiel35:6 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye asabe, achopchinin korotiik, ak kosubun korotiik: amu ma iwech korotiik, kosubin anyun korotiik." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ayae anyun ko uu nooto tulweetap Seir koek ne kikwong'ee ak koguber; ak ageesu ineendet ne punei tulwoonooto, ak ineendet ne weegegei yooto." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ak anyiit tuloonookyik piikyik che kigebar: ak kobutyo icheek che kigebar eng' rotwetap chok eng' tuloonooguk ak eng' atebwosyeguk ak eng' kererusyeguk. 
Ezekiel35:9 Ayain iguber agoi, ama kemenyei nganasoguk: si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel35:10 Amu ki imwa ile, Egu chechuuk pororyosyechu aeng'u ak emotinwechu aeng' ak kenam kobunjech; ago ki mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor olooto:" 
Ezekiel35:11 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ko uu ye asabe, ayae ko uu nereegeguk, ak ko uu ng'etkondang'ung' ne ki ibooru iweche icheek; ak aboorugei eng' kwenunnywa, ye tuun arwoogun." 
Ezekiel35:12 Ak inai ile anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki agas chubisyosyeguk tugul che ki imwa agobo tuloonoogap Israel, ile, Kigeyai koguber, kigegoonech keam." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ak ki ochounenage eng' kutusweekwok, ak ki otes ng'aleekwok agobo anee: ki agas ng'olyoondonooto." 
Ezekiel35:14 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ye tuun paibait ng'wony komugul, ayain iguber." 
Ezekiel35:15 Ko uu ye ki ibaibaitune poroteetap kootap Israel, amu kiguber, ayaun ko uu nooto: iguberi, ee, inyee tulweetap Seir, ak Edom komugul, komosato tugul; si konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel36:1 Ee inyee, weeriitap chii, maotenji tuloonoogap Israel, ileenji ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek tuloonoogap Israel." 
Ezekiel36:2 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu ki komwa puunyoot agobo okweek, kole, haa! Ak kole kagobunjech komoswek che torooreen che po keny:" 
Ezekiel36:3 maoten anyun, ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu nganda ki koyaak icheek oegu ponoon, ak koluguak eng' komosta age tugul, si kobiit obunji pororyosyek che ng'etunotiin, ak kigochaamatak piik, ak komwaetaenak tuguuk che yaach:" 
Ezekiel36:4 ogas anyun ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek tuloonoogap Israel; Mwachin Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuloonook che eecheen ak che mengeechen, kobooto kereruusyek, ak atebwosyek ak komoswek che karatwek ak nganasook che kigemeto, che ki koek luulenik ak che rorechin pororyosyek che ng'etunotiin eng' komoswek tugul:" 
Ezekiel36:5 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ki amwa iman eng' maatap ng'etkondanyu agobo pororyosyek che ng'etunotiin, ak agobo Edom tugul, che kiityigei emennyu kole kobunji eng' poiboiyetap mugulelwekwak tugul, eng' koroomnatetap saboondo, si kogoito keluul:" 
Ezekiel36:6 maoten anyun agobo emetap Israel, ak ileenji tuloonook che eecheen ak che mengeechen, kobooto kereruusyek, ak atebwosyek, ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, ki amwa eng' ng'etkondanyu ak nereegekyuk che ng'woneen, amu ki ogesen kalilanetap pororyosyek." 
Ezekiel36:7 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ki achuul eunnyu, amwa ale, Ibei kalilanennywa pororyosyek che mi komoswekwok." 
Ezekiel36:8 Ago ing'atos mooriikwok, ee okweek tuloonoogap Israel; ak oiichi logoekwok piikyuk Israel; amu neegit kobwa." 
Ezekiel36:9 Amu, ogeero, ami komostang'wong', ak aweekyoge, si kibatak, kegolak:" 
Ezekiel36:10 ak ateswok piik, koot komugul ne po Israel, koot tugul: ak kemeny nganasook, ak keteech karatwek:" 
Ezekiel36:11 ak ateswok piik ak tyong'ik; ak kotesak ak koiiyo: ak kemenyok ko uu peetuusyekwok che po tai, ak ayaiywok ne myee kosiir eng' tai: si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ee, agoochini piik kobendatenak, chooto piikyuk Israel; ak konamin icheek ibunji ak iegu porotennywa, ama ibare lagokwak kogeny." 
Ezekiel36:13 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amu mwaiwok koleenjinok, ii amindetap piik, inyee emoni, ak ki iegu ne ibare pororyeng'ung';" 
Ezekiel36:14 ma iame anyun piik kogeny, ama ibare pororyeng'ung' kogeny, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor;" 
Ezekiel36:15 ama achamun igas kogeny kalilanetap pororyosyek, ama igeseni teweernatetap pororyosyek kogeny, ama inach pororyeng'ung' kogeny, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel36:16 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel36:17 Ee, weeriitap chii, ye ki menyei kootap Israel emennywa, ko ki ing'wanit emonooto eng' ortinwekwak ak eng' poisyonikwak: ki uu ortinwekwak eng' tainnyu simwegap kwondo eng' peetuusyekyik che po arawet." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ki aroong'ji anyun nereegekyuk che ng'woneen amu korotiik che kiga kotumji emet, ak kiga kong'wanit emonooto eng' kanamonikwak:" 
Ezekiel36:19 ak ki aseerchi icheek pororyosyek, ak ki kiyestoochi emotinwek: ki arwookyi icheek ko uu ortinwekwak ak ko uu poisyonikwak." 
Ezekiel36:20 Ak kingo it ye mi pororyosyek ole ki pa, ko ki imurwon kainennyu ne tiliil; amu ki mwa piik agobo icheek kole pichu ko piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki koba eng' emennyi." 
Ezekiel36:21 Ago ki ariiree kainennyu ne tiliil, ne ki komurwon kootap Israel eng' pororyosyek, ole ki pa." 
Ezekiel36:22 Mwachi anyun kootap Israel ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma yae niito agobo okweek ee kootap Israel, ago ayae agobo kainennyu ne tiliil, ne ki omurwon eng' pororyosyek che ki obe." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ak atabaan kainennyu ne oo ne ki kimurwon eng' kwenunnywa; si konai pororyosyek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye aegu ne kitabaanat eng' okweek eng' tainnywa." 
Ezekiel36:24 Amu amutwok omang'une pororyosyek, ak ayumak omong'u eng' emotinwek tugul, ak amutwak obwa emeng'wong'." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ak abisenok peek che tiliileen, si otiliiliitu: ak aundawok simdang'wong' tugul, ak kanamonikwok tugul." 
Ezekiel36:26 Agoonok kogeny muguleldo ne leel, ak andeok sabeet ne leel: ak aiste muguleldo ne uu koita eng' poorwekwok, ak agoonok muguleldo ne po panyeek." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ak andeok Kabuusennyu, ak agoonok obendate ng'atuutikyuk, ak oriip kirwoogutikyuk ak oyai." 
Ezekiel36:28 Ak omeny emet ne ki agoochi kwanisyekwok; ak oegu piikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ak asarwok eng' simwekwok tugul: ak aguur peek si ates, ama agoonok rubeet kogeny." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ak ates iyoteetap logoek, ak ruroteetap mbareet, si mata kochotak pororyosyek amu rubeet." 
Ezekiel36:31 Yeityo obwaat anyun ortinwekwok che yaach, ak poisyonikwok che ki ma ko myachen; ak osaske okweegei eng' taing'wong' amu tengekwogikwok ak amu tuguukwok che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel36:32 Ma yae niito amu okweek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ingonaak ng'olyoondoni eng' okweek: olilanse, ak otoptobense amu ortinwekwok, ee kootap Israel." 
Ezekiel36:33 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Agoochini kemeny nganasook kogeny, ak keteech karatwek, eng' peetuut ne aundawok tengekwogikwok tugul." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ak kibat emet ne kiga koguber agot nganda kiga koguber kogeerei tugul che kisiirtoi. 
Ezekiel36:35 Ak tuun mwaei kole, kaigei emoni kiga koguber, mbareetap Eden; ak kageng'ot ak kemeny nganasook che kiga koek karatwek, ak koguber, ak kong'emak." 
Ezekiel36:36 Konai anyun pororyosyek che ng'etunotiin eng' komoswekwok, kole, koateeche anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor komoswechuuto kiga kobutok, ak agool ole kiga koguber: kamwae anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ayae." 
Ezekiel36:37 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Teepsena anyun kootap Israel agobo niito, si kobiit ayachi; atesyini icheek piik kochang'a ko uu akweetap keechiirek." 
Ezekiel36:38 Ko uu akweetap keechiirek che egu tiseiywek, ko uu akweetap keechiiregap Jerusalem eng' peetuusyekyik che po igoorwek che ki king'at; kinyiiti ko uu nooto nganasook che kiga koek karatwek eng' tuiyosyegap piik: si konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel37:1 Ki mi paragunnyu eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki imuta eng' Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotua eng' kwenutap atebweet; ak ki nyiitaat kawek;" 
Ezekiel37:2 ak ki indoiywa abun komoswek tugul che po kawechooto: ak ogeero, kimi kawek che chaang' atebwonooto; ak ogeero, kiyamyotiin miising':" 
Ezekiel37:3 ak ki leenjo, Ee, weeriitap chii, tos, imuuchi kosapcho kowechu? Ak ki awolu ale, Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ingen inyee." 
Ezekiel37:4 Ak ki leenjo kogeny, Maotenji kowechu, ak ileenji, Ee, okweek kowechu yamyotiin, ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel37:5 Mwachin anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kowechu koleenjin: Ogeero, andeok kabuuset, si osapche." 
Ezekiel37:6 Andeok inoik ak alaakwok panyeek ak atugenok iriryot, yeityo andeok kabuuset, si osapche; si onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel37:7 Ki amaoten anyun ko uu ye ki king'ata: ak ye kita amaoteni, kobiit cheet, ak ogeero, ki piit kirgirenet, ak kinamatkei kawek, ak ki namgei kowet ak kowennyi." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ak ki ageer, ak ogeero, kiga konam inoik kawechooto, ak ki piit panyeek, ak kotuch iriryot panyechooto: ago ki ma komi kabuuset." 
Ezekiel37:9 Koleenjo anyun, Maotenji usoonet, maoten, ee, weeriitap chii, ak ileenji usoonet, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Nyoo eng' usoonaik ang'wan, ee kabuuset, ak ibuusyi chu kigebar, si kobiit kosapcho." 
Ezekiel37:10 Ki amaoten anyun ko uu ye king'ata ineendet, ak ki nyoonji icheek kabuuset, ak kisopcho, ak kotononso eng' keelyekwak, lugeet ne oo miising'." 
Ezekiel37:11 Yeityo, komwaiwo koleenjo, Ee, weeriitap chii, kowechu ko kootap Israel komugul: keero, leen icheek, Ki koyaamyo kawekyok, ak ki kobet kamang'unennyo; ki kigeswech." 
Ezekiel37:12 Maoten anyun, ak ileenji icheek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, ayaate kereeriisyekwok, ak among'wok eng' kereeriisyekwok, ee piikyuk; ak amutwok obwa emetap Israel." 
Ezekiel37:13 Ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye kaayat kereeriisyekwok, ak among'wok eng' kereeriisyekwok, ee piikyuk." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ak andeok Kabuusennyu, si osapche, ak andeok emeng'wong' si kobiit onai ole anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne kamwae ng'olyoondoniito, ak ayai, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel37:15 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel37:16 Ee, weeriitap chii, nam kirokto agenge, ak isir ile, Po Judah, ak ko po piigap Israel che mi tugul ak ineendet: yeityo inam kirokto age, ak isir ile, Po Joseph, kirokto ne po Ephraim, ak ne po koot komugul ne po Israel kobooto che mi tugul ak ineendet:" 
Ezekiel37:17 ak ituiyechigei kirokwechooto tuwai koek kirokto agenge, si kobiit koek agenge eng' eung'ung'." 
Ezekiel37:18 Ak ye tuun teebenen lagogap piiguk koleenjin, Tos meboorwech kiit ne ibooru inyee eng' ng'aleechuuto?" 
Ezekiel37:19 Ileenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, aname kirokto ne po Joseph, ne mi eutap Ephraim, kobooto ortinwegap Israel che mi tugul ak ineendet; ak atuiye icheek kobooto kirokto ne po Judah, ak ayae koek kirokto agenge, si koek agenge eng' eunnyu." 
Ezekiel37:20 Ak kotebee eung'ung' eng' tainnywa kirokweek che kesirei. 
Ezekiel37:21 Ak ileenji icheek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, amutu piigap Israel komong' eng' pororyosyek, ole ki koba, ak ayum icheek eng' komosta agenge tugul, ak amutu icheek kobwa emennywa." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ak ayai icheek koek pororyet agenge eng' emet, eng' tuloonoogap Israel: ak koek laitoryat agenge laitoryannywa eng' icheek tugul: ak ma koegu kogeny pororyosyek aeng', ama kepchei icheek kogeny koek pounatosyek aeng' agoi." 
Ezekiel37:23 Ama kong'wanitegei kanamonikwak kogeny, anan eng' tuguukwak che samis, anan agot agenge eng' pistaosyekwak: ago asaru icheek eng' oldinwekwak tugul che menyei: ole kiyae tengekto, ak atiliil icheek: egu anyun piikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa." 
Ezekiel37:24 Ak koek otwogindennyu Daudi laitoryannywa; ak konyoor icheek tugul mestowot agenge: ak kobendatee kirwoogutikyuk ak koriip ng'atuutikyuk ak koyai. 
Ezekiel37:25 Ak komeny emet ne ki agoochi Jakobo otwogindennyu, ole ki menyei kwanisyekwok; ak komeny olooto icheeget, kobooto lagokwak, ak lagogap lagokwak, agoi koigeny: ak koek Daudi otwogindennyu, pounindennywa koigeny." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ak kiyomiske ak icheek kogeny eng' kayomiset ne po kaalyeet: egu eng' icheek kayomiset ne wendi agoi koigeny: ak alumde icheek, ak ates, ande oldanyu ne tiliil kwenunnywa agoi koigeny." 
Ezekiel37:27 Tebyei agine emainnyu kobooto icheek; ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa, ak koek icheek piikyuk." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ak konai pororyosyek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne atabaani Israel, ye tuun tebee oldanyu ne tiliil kwenunnywa koigeny." 
Ezekiel38:1 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo," 
Ezekiel38:2 Ee, weeriitap chii, tokyi togeng'ung' Gog, ne po emetap Magog, pounindetap Rosh, Meshek, ak Tubal, ak imaoten agobo ineendet," 
Ezekiel38:3 ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, aboryenen, ee Gog, pouinindetap Rosh, Meshek, ak Tubal;" 
Ezekiel38:4 awelelin, ak ande kombook tagilgiliguk, ak amutun kobooto lugeeng'ung' tugul, paraisisyek ak piik che ketei paraisisyek, kolaachi tugul kariik tugul che po lugeet, lugeet ne oo ne tinyei long'onik che eecheen ak che mengeechen, kotinyei tugul rotoogap chok:" 
Ezekiel38:5 mi kobooto icheek Persia, Kush, ak Put; kotinyei tugul long'onik ak chepkuloik che po kariik:" 
Ezekiel38:6 kobooto Gomer ak lugosyekyik tugul; kobooto kootap Togarmah eng' tabanwek che looen che po murot kaataam, ak lugosyekyik tugul: pororyosyek che chaang' che mi kobooten." 
Ezekiel38:7 Choboge, ee chopkei, inyee kobooto lugosyeguk tugul che kaiyumjingei, ak iegu kandoindennywa." 
Ezekiel38:8 Kibwonjinin ko kagosiirto peetuusyek che chaang': iite eng' kenyiisyek che po let emet ne ki kiweegune rotwetap chok, ne ki kiweech eng' pororyosyek che chaang', eng' tuloonoogap Israel, ne kiga koguber peetuusyek che chaang': ago ki kiweech komong' eng' pororyosyek ak komeng'iis tugul eng' chametapkei." 
Ezekiel38:9 Ak itogosu, inyee ko uu usoonet, iige pooldet ne tuchei emet, inyee kobooto lugosyeguk tugul, komi pororyosyek che chaang' kobooten." 
Ezekiel38:10 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Pwonjinin kabwaatutik eng' peetuunooto, ak ibwaat chobutyet ne ya:" 
Ezekiel38:11 ak imwa ile, Atogostoi emetap nganasook che ma tinyei irimoik; awendi ole mi icheek che mi eng' kaalyeet, che meng'iisyei eng' chametapkei, meng'iisyei icheek tugul ama tinyei irimoik, ama tinyei temeleiywek anan ormariichok:" 
Ezekiel38:12 si kobiit aluul ak aip parunenik; si kobiit ibar komoswek che ki karatwek che ki menyei nguno, ak obargei ak piik che ki kiyum komang'une pororyosyek, che tinyei tuuga ak tuguuk, che menyei emet kween." 
Ezekiel38:13 Teebenen Sheba, ak Dedan, ak chemung'arainigap Tarsis, kobooto ng'etunikyik tugul che neranik, koleenjinin, Tos kenyo iluul? Tos kaiyum lugosyeguk si kobiit iip parunenik? Si kobiit iip fedha ak thahabu, ak ikweri tuuga ak iip tuguuk, iluul luuleet ne oo?" 
Ezekiel38:14 Maoten anyun, ee, weeriitap chii, ak ileenji Gog, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Eng' peetuut ye tuun kameng'iis piikyuk Israel eng' chametapkei, ko tos menae?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Ak inyoo eng' oldang'ung' eng' tabanwek che looen che po murot kaataam, komi pororyosyek che chaang' kobooten, kolaanyei tugul paraisisyek, piik che chaang', ak ko lugeet ne kiim:" 
Ezekiel38:16 ak obwa obargei ak piikyuk Israel, ko uu pooldet ne tuchei emet; amutun eng' peetuusyek che po let obwa obargei ak emennyu, si kobiit konaa pororyosyek, ye tuun aegu ne itabaanat eng' inyee, ee Gog, eng' tainnywa." 
Ezekiel38:17 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos inyee ne ki amwaite keny eng' otwogikyuk maotigap Israel, che ki maoteni eng' peetuusyechooto eng' kenyiisyek che chaang' kole tuun amutun inyoo obargei ak icheek?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ye tuun paregei Gog ak emetap Israel, eng' peetuusyechooto, kobiit nereegekyuk che ng'woneen che mang'une seruunekyuk." 
Ezekiel38:19 Amu kaamwa eng' ng'etkondanyu ak eng' maatap nereegekyuk, ale, Piitu iman potanet ne oo eng' peetuunooto eng' emetap Israel;" 
Ezekiel38:20 kot kobotanso eng' tainnyi njireenigap nyanjet, ak toriitik che po parak, ak tyong'igap timiin, ak tuguuk tugul che ichuutegei ng'wony, kobooto piik tugul che miitei ng'wony, ak kiluul tuloonook, ak kong'isyogen ole keigei, ak koluul irimeet age tugul." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ak aguur rotwetap chok kobargei ak ineendet agoi tuloonookyuk tugul, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: paregei chii tugul ak tupchennyi." 
Ezekiel38:22 Agere kong' ineendet eng' koroito ak korotiik; ak ayookyi ineendet kobooto lugosyekyik, ak piikyik che chaang' che mi kobooto ineendet, ropta ne oo ak koik che eecheen che po ropta, maat ak tuguuk che laldos." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ak atoroorge, ak atabaangei, ak abartegei eng' taitap pororyosyek che chaang'; si konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel39:1 Ee, inyee weeriitap chii, maoten agobo Gog, ak ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Keero, aboryenen inyee, ee Gog, pounindetap Rosh, Meshek, ak Tubal:" 
Ezekiel39:2 ak awelelin, ak areun, ak amutun itogosu eng' tabanwek che looen che po murot kaataam; ak amutun inyoo tuloonoogap Israel:" 
Ezekiel39:3 ak akwer kwangeng'ung' ne mi eung'ung' ne po kaataam, kobut, ak agoochi kobutyo kipchaboniguk, eng' eung'ung' ne po tai." 
Ezekiel39:4 Ibutyini tuloonoogap Israel, inyee ak lugosyeguk tugul, kobooto pororyosyek che mi kobooten: ak agoochin toriitik alak tugul che amei panyeek, kobooto tyong'igap timiin, koamin." 
Ezekiel39:5 Imeechini kewanin: amu kaamwa ng'olyoondoniito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ak ayookyi maat Magog, kobooto icheeget che meng'iisyei eng' chametapkei eng' ngeguusyek: si konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel39:7 Ak abarte kainennyu ne tiliil eng' piikyuk Israel; ama achamdoi kainennyu ne tiliil king'wanit kogeny: si konai pororyosyek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Ineendet ne Tiliil eng' Israel." 
Ezekiel39:8 Keero, nyoonei, ak kiyaei ko uu nooto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; niito peetuut ne ki amwae." 
Ezekiel39:9 Ak komanda icheek che menyei nganasoogap Israel, ak kolaale maat kariigap lugeet ak kobeel tuguuchooto, long'onik, ak long'onik che eecheen, kwangok, kipchabonik, ndirisyek, ak ng'otwek, ak kobeel karichooto eng' kenyiisyek tisap;" 
Ezekiel39:10 kot koma kobutei icheek kweenik anan koluul keet age tugul eng' osnosyek, amu tuun ilaale maat kariigap lugeet; ak koluul tuguugap piik che kiga koluulei icheek, ak korebe tuguuk piik che kiga korebe icheek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel39:11 Ak agoochini eng' peetuunooto Gog komosta ne kitupchin eng' Israel, atebweetap icheek che punei komostap kong'asiis ne po nyanjet: ak koger icheek che punei yooto: ak kotupchi olooto Gog ak piikyik che chaang' tugul: ak koguure yooto atebweetap Hamon-gog." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ak kotup kootap Israel icheek arawek tisap, si kobiit kotiliil emet." 
Ezekiel39:13 Ee, tubei piik tugul che po emet icheek; ak koek kiit ne tagunoot eng' icheek, eng' peetuut ne tuun kitoroora, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel39:14 Ak kotabaan piik kobunoot emet peetuusyek tugul, ak kotubot che kiga ng'et eng' emet, si kotiliil emet: cheeng'oti ye kagogeskei arawechooto tisabu." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ak ye punooti icheeget emet, ak kogeer chii age tugul kowa ne po chii, konde anyun kaboorunet yooto, agoi kotup piik che tubisyei eng' atebweetap Hamon-gog." 
Ezekiel39:16 Ak koek kogeny Hamona kainetap nganaseet. Ianyinyi emet ko uu nooto. 
Ezekiel39:17 Ee, weeriitap chii, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Mwachi toriitik alak tugul, ak tyony age tugul ne po timiin, ileenji oyumgei ak obwa; oyumgei eng' komosta age tugul si obwonji eng'sennyu ne aeng'wok, eng'seet ne oo eng' tuloonoogap Israel, si kobiit oam panyeek ak oee korotiik." 
Ezekiel39:18 Oam panyeegap che kiimeen, ak oee korotiigap pounigap ng'wony, che po mengichik, ak che po aaregap keechiir, ak che po ng'oroorek, ak che po kiruugik, tugul che akwaen che po Bashan." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ak koam mwanik kot obiyong'se, ak oee korotiik kot kobogitye, che po eng'sennyu ne kaaeng'wok." 
Ezekiel39:20 Ak obiyong'dosi eng' mesennyu eng' paraisisyek ak kariisyek che po lugeet, eng' piik che nyigoonen, kobooto piik tugul che po lugeet, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel39:21 Ak ande toroornatennyu kwenutap pororyosyek ak kogeer pororyosyek tugul kirwoogennyu ne kaayai, ak eunnyu ne ki agonoor icheek." 
Ezekiel39:22 Konai anyun kootap Israel kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, kobooch peetuunooto ak kwo tai." 
Ezekiel39:23 Ak konai pororyosyek kole ki kiluul kootap Israel amu tengektonywa; amu ki ingelelja, ak ki aung'e icheek togeennyu: ki ande anyun icheek eutap puunikwak, ak kobek icheek tugul eng' rotwetap chok." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ki ayachi icheek ko uu murwoonindanywa ak ko uu pistaosyekwak; ak ki aung'e icheek togeennyu. 
Ezekiel39:25 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Amutu kogeny che ki kiluul che po Jakobo, ak ariiree koot komugul ne po Israel; ak koama ng'etkong' agobo kainennyu ne tiliil." 
Ezekiel39:26 Ak kogesen kalilanennywa, kobooto pistaosyekwak tugul che ki yaiywo, ye tuun meny emennywa eng' chametapkei, ama piitu chii ne imui icheek;" 
Ezekiel39:27 ye tuun kaamutu icheek kogeny komong' eng' pororyosyek, ak ayumu icheek komong' eng' emotinwegap puunikwak, ak kitabaana eng' taitap pororyosyek che chaang'." 
Ezekiel39:28 Ak konai icheek kole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, amu ki agoite icheek keluul koba pororyosyek, ak koayumji icheek emennywa: ama abagakyini agot agenge olooto kogeny;" 
Ezekiel39:29 ama aung'e icheek togeennyu kogeny; amu kaaroong'ji Kabuusennyu kootap Israel, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel40:1 Ki mi paragunnyu eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' kenyiitap tiptem ak muut, kobooch ngap keluulech, eng' taunetap kenyiit, eng' peetuutap taman ne po arawet, eng' kenyiitap taman ak ang'wan kobooch ngap kebar nganaseet ak komutwaa anyo olooto eng' peetuunooto." 
Ezekiel40:2 Ki imutwaa eng' ng'ang'utigap Kamuktaindet anyo emetap Israel ak kondea tulweet ne kooi miising', ole kimi itoondap teekseetap nganaseet eng' murot tai." 
Ezekiel40:3 Ak ki imutwaa anyo yooto, ak ogeero, kimi yooto chii, ne ki uu itoondanyi itoondap sugunwet kotinyei porowetap katanit eng' eunnyi, ak tegat ne kikwaise; ak kitonone ormariichet." 
Ezekiel40:4 Ak ki leenjo chiichooto, Ee, weeriitap chii, keer eng' konyeguk, ak igas eng' itiiguk, ak inde muguleldang'ung' tuguuk tugul che ta aboorun; amu kagimutun inyoo olito si kobiit aboorun tuguuchuuto: tetyi kootap Yahudik tuguuk tugul che igeere." 
Ezekiel40:5 Ak ogeero, kimi inaatut ne kiyiem koot, ak kimi eutap chiichooto tegat ne kikwaise ne po mitainik lo che po euut eng' koindo, kakwautyet age tugul eng' chooto lo, ko kitesat tebeesindo agenge ne po euut: ki ikwa anyun tebeesindap inaatut, koek tegat agenge; ak ki ek kooindap tononennyi tegat agenge." 
Ezekiel40:6 Ki it anyun ormariichet ne tokyingei kong'asiis, ak kolaany kobun lang'eiywot, ak ki ikwa seremut ne po ormariichet, ki ek tegat agenge tebeesindo: ak ki ek seremunooto tegat agenge tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ak ki ek kooindap koot age tugul ne po oriit tegat agenge, ak ki tegat agenge tebeesindo; ak ki mitainik muut che po euut kobooch koot age agoi koot age; ak kitegat agenge seremut ne po oriit ne po ormariichet ne ki mi ole kibunei kebendi keterut ne po ormariichet ne tokyingei koot." 
Ezekiel40:8 Ki ikwa kogeny keterut ne po ormariichet ne tokyingei koot, koek tegat agenge." 
Ezekiel40:9 Yeityo kokwa keterut ne po ormariichet koek mitainik sisiit che po euut; ak ki ek tugatugikyik mitainik aeng' che po euut; ak kitokyingei keterut ne po ormariichet koot. 
Ezekiel40:10 Ak ki somok kooriik che ki mi komosi ak komosin che po ormariichet ne kitokyingei kong'asiis; ki aechin tugul ko somok: ak ki aechin tugatugigap komosi ak komosin. 
Ezekiel40:11 Ak ki ikwa tebeesindap ole kibunei eng' ormariichet, ki mitainik taman che po euut; ak ki ek kooindap ormariichet mitainik taman ak somok che po euut;" 
Ezekiel40:12 ak kimi tegeleiywot taitap koorichooto po oriit, ne po kakwautyet agenge ne po euut eng' komosi, ak tegeleiywot age ne po kakwautyet agenge ne po euut eng' komosin; ak ki mitainik lo che po euut koorichooto po oriit eng' komosi ak komosin." 
Ezekiel40:13 Ak ki ikwa ormariichet kobooch koot parak ne po koot age agoi koot parak ne po koot age, ki ek tebeesindo mitainik tiptem ak muut che po euut; kong'etee kurgeet age agoi kurgeet age." 
Ezekiel40:14 Ki ikwa keterut, ak ki ek mitainik tiptem che po euut; kibunei keterut kemong'jin seremut ne oo." 
Ezekiel40:15 Ki ek mitainik konom che po euut kobooch taitap ormariichet ne kibunei kebendi oriit agoi taitap keterut ne po oriit ne po ormariichet. 
Ezekiel40:16 Ak ki tinyei koorichooto po oriit tirisyok che regerotiin, kobooto tugatugikwak che ki mi ormariichanooto komosta age tugul, ak ki uu nooto eng' keterut: ak ki mi tirisyok komoswek tugul ole po oriit: ak ki mi itoonwegap tiironigap sosik eng' tugatukyet age tugul." 
Ezekiel40:17 Ki kimutwaa anyun anyo seremut ne ki mong'jin, ak ogeero, kimitoti kooriik che po oriit, ak ole ki kibunoti ole ki kimale koik, che ki kiyai koyiem seremut: ki mi kooriik sosomu olooto ki kimale koik." 
Ezekiel40:18 Ki mi komoswek che ki kimal ole neegitee ormariichok, che aechin ak kooindap ormariichok, chooto komoswek che tabanu ng'wony." 
Ezekiel40:19 Yeityo kokwa tebeesindo kobooch ormariichet ne tabanu ng'wony, agoi taitap seremut ne po oriit ole po saang', ki ek mitainik pogol che po euut eng' komostap kong'asiis ak eng' murot kaataam." 
Ezekiel40:20 Ak ki ikwa koindo ak tebeesindo ne po ormariichetap seremut ne ki mong'jin ne tokyingei murot kaataam. 
Ezekiel40:21 Ak kimi kooriikyik somogu che po oriit komosi ak komosin; ki aechin kakwautigap tugatugikyik kobooto che po keterunnyi, ak che po ormariichet ni kabo tai; ki kakwautik konom che po euut koindonywa ak kakwautik tiptem ak muut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:22 Ak ki aechin kakwautigap tirisyokyik, ak che po keterunnyi, kobooto che po itoonwekyik che po tiironigap sosik, ak che po ormariichet ne tokyingei kong'asiis; ak kitogostae lang'eiywot ne tinyei tuguuk tisap che kityegoti; ak kimi tainnywa keterunnyi." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ak kimi ormariichet ne kebunei kebendi seremut ne po oriit ne kitokyingei ormariichet ne po murot kaataam ak kimi ormariichet ne kitokyingei ormariichet ne po kong'asiis; ak ki ikwa kong'etee ormariichet age agoi ormariichet age, koek mitainik pogol che po euut." 
Ezekiel40:24 Ak ki imuta atokyigei murot tai, ak ogeero, kimi ormariichet ne tokyingei murot tai: ak ki ikwa tugatugikyik ak keterunnyi kogergeit ak mitainik chu kabo tai." 
Ezekiel40:25 Ak ki tinyei tirisyok ormariichanooto kobooto keterunnyi eng' komoswek tugul che uu tirisyochu kabo tai: ki mitainik konom che po euut koindo, ak ki mitainik tiptem ak muut che po euut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:26 Ak kimi lang'eiywot ne tinyei tuguuk tisap che kityegoti, ketogostoi, ak kimi keterut tainnywa: ak ki tinyei tugatugikyik itoonwegap tiironigap sosik komosi ak komosin." 
Ezekiel40:27 Ak kimi ormariichet ne kebunei kebendi seremut ne po oriit ne tokyingei murot tai: ak ki ikwa kong'etee ormariichet age agoi ormariichet age kotokyigei murot tai, koek mitainik pogol che po euut." 
Ezekiel40:28 Ki imutwaa anyun agoi seremut ne po oriit abune ormariichet ne po murot tai: ak ki ikwa ormariichet ne po murot tai ko uu mitainik chu kabo tai; 
Ezekiel40:29 kobooto kooriikyik che po oriit, ak tugatugikyik, ak keterunnyi, ko uu mitainik chu kabo tai: ak ki tinyei tirisyok ormariichanooto kobooto keterunnyi eng' komoswek tugul: ki mitainik konom che po euut koindo, ak ki mitainik tiptem ak muut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:30 Ak kimi keterut komoswek tugul, ne ki mitainik tiptem ak muut che po euut koindo, ak ki mitainik muut che po euut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:31 Ak kitokyingei keterunnyi seremut ne po saang'; ak kimi itoonwegap tiironigap sosik tugatugikyik: ak ki tinyei lang'eiywot tuguuk sisiit che kityegoti ketogostoi. 
Ezekiel40:32 Ak ki imutwaa anyo seremut ne po oriit ne tokyingei kong'asiis: ak ki ikwa ormariichet ko uu mitainik chu kabo tai; 
Ezekiel40:33 kobooto kooriikyik che po oriit, ak tugatugikyik, ak keterunnyi, ko uu mitainik chu kabo tai: ak ki tinyei tirisyok keterunnyi eng' komoswek tugul; ki mitainik konom che po euut koindo, ak ki mitainik tiptem ak muut che po euut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ak kitokyingei keterunnyi seremut ne sip kemong'jin; ak kimi itoonwegap tiironigap sosik tugatugikyik eng' komosi ak komosin: ak ki tinyei lang'eiywot tuguuk sisiit che kityegoti ketogostoi. 
Ezekiel40:35 Ak ki imutwaa anyo ormariichet ne po murot kaataam: ak ki ikwa ko uu mitainik chu kabo tai; 
Ezekiel40:36 kobooto kooriikyik che po oriit, ak tugatugikyik, ak keterunnyi; ak ki tinyei tirisyok eng' komoswek tugul: ki mitainik konom che po euut koindo ak ki mitainik tiptem ak muut che po euut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ak kitokyingei tugatugikyik seremut ne sip kemong'jin; ak ki tinyei tugatugichooto itoonwegap tiironigap sosik eng' komosi ak komosin, ak ki tinyei lang'eiywot tuguuk sisiit che kityegoti ketogostoi." 
Ezekiel40:38 Ak kimi koot ne po oriit kobooto kurgennyi ye neegitee tugatugigap ormariichok; ki kiuune yooto kagoochinet ne kibeelei. 
Ezekiel40:39 Ak kimi ye neegitee keterutap ormariichet, mesosyek aeng'u eng' komosi ak aeng' eng' komosin, che kieng'jin kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagoochinetap tengekto, ak kagoochinetap chalwokto." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ak kimi mesosyek aeng'u eng' komosta age eng' ole po saang' eng' ole kitogostoe kebendi ormariichet ne tokyingei murot kaataam; ak kimi mesosyek aeng'u komosta age che ki po keterut ne po ormariichet. 
Ezekiel40:41 Ki mi mesosyek ang'wanu komosi, komi mesosyek ang'wanu komosin, eng' ole neegitee ormariichet; mesosyek sisiit che ki kieng'jin tiseiywek." 
Ezekiel40:42 Ak kimi mesosyek ang'wanu, che po koik che ki kiwai, che po kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ko kakwautyet agenge ak kebeberta ne po euut, koindo, ak ki kakwautyet agenge ak kebeberta ne po euut, tebeesindo, ak ki kakwautyet agenge ne po euut, kooindap tononennyi: ki kigonoree mesosyechooto tuguuk che ki kieng'e kagoochinet ne kibeelei kobooto tiseiywot." 
Ezekiel40:43 Ak ki kiratyi kombook komoswek tugul, che koindonywa ko kite tebeesindap euut: ak kimi panyeegap kagoochinet mesosyek parak." 
Ezekiel40:44 Ak kimi saang'utap ormariichet ne po oriit kooriik che po oriit che po tyeniik eng' seremut ne po oriit, ne ki mi komostap ormariichet ne po murot kaataam; ak kitokyingei murot tai: kimi age komostap ormariichet ne po kong'asiis ne tokyingei murot kaataam." 
Ezekiel40:45 Ak kimwaiwo koleenjo, Po koiito tokyingei murot tai tisiik, che tononjin riipseetap koot." 
Ezekiel40:46 Ak po koot ne tokyingei murot kaataam tisiik che tononjin riipseetap kaptisisyet: chuuto ko weeriitap Zadok, che salu weeriitap Lawi, che riikyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koboisyechin ineendet." 
Ezekiel40:47 Ak ki ikwa seremut, koek mitainik pogol che po euut tebeesindo, ki aechin komoswek tugul ko ang'wan, ak kimi kaptisisyet taitap koot." 
Ezekiel40:48 Ki imutwaa anyun anyo keterutap koot, ak ki ikwa tugatukyet age tugul ne po keterut, ki ek mitainik muut che po euut komosi, koek mitainik muut che po euut komosin: ak ki ek tebeesindap ormariichet mitainik somok che po euut komosi koek mitainik somok komosin." 
Ezekiel40:49 Ki ek mitainik tiptem che po euut kooindap keterut, koek mitainik taman ak agenge che po euut tebeesindo; ak kimi tuguuk tamanu che ki kityegoti ketogosyin yooto: ak kimi tolochik ole neegitee tugatugik, kimi age komosi, komi age komosin." 
Ezekiel41:1 Yeityo komutwaa anyo Hekaluut, ak ki ikwa tugatugik, ki ek mitainik lo che po euut tebeesindo eng' komosi, koek mitainik lo che po euut eng' komosin, ne ki tebeesindap emait." 
Ezekiel41:2 Ak ki mitainik taman che po euut tebeesindap ole kibunei kebendi oriit; ak komoswegap ole kibunei kebendi oriit ko ki mitainik muut che po euut eng' komosi, ak mitainik muut che po euut eng' komosin: ak ki ikwa koindonyi, koek mitainik artam che po euut, koek tebeesindo mitainik tiptem che po euut." 
Ezekiel41:3 Ki wo anyun ineendet oriit, ak kokwa tugatukyet age tugul ne po ole kibunei kebendi oriit, ki ek mitainik aeng' che po euut: ak ki ek mitainik lo che po euut, ole kibunei kebendi oriit; ak ki ek mitainik tisap che po euut tebeesindap ole kibunei kebendi oriit." 
Ezekiel41:4 Ak ki ikwa koindonyi, koek mitainik tiptem che po euut, koek tebeesindo mitainik tiptem che po euut, eng' taitap koyooto: ak ki leenjo, Olito ole-tiliil Miising'." 
Ezekiel41:5 Yeityo kokwa inaatutap koot, koek mitainik lo che po euut; ak ki ek tebeesindap koot age tugul ne mi taban, mitainik ang'wan che po euut, che kimitoti oldo tugul eng' koot eng' komosta age tugul." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ak kimitoti kooriik che ki kiyap koba parak konyil somok, eng' paragutap koot age tugul ne ki mi inaat, ki ek sosom tugul ko katetatkei; ak kichut koorchooto po taban inatusyegap koot che po kooriik che mengeechen, che mi taban eng' komoswek tugul, si kobiit kotiegei, si ma tiegei inaatutap koot." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ak kitesagis koorchooto ki kiyap kobaraitu koba parak; ko uu ye kiyiem koot kotes koba parak; amu ye kiyiemei koot ko kitesak koba parak eng' komoswek tugul che po koot: kitesak anyun tebeesindap koot kwo parak; ki imuuchi chii kotogosta kong'etee koot ne tabanu ng'wony agoi koot ne tabanu parak kobunei koot ne po kween. 
Ezekiel41:8 Ki ageer kogeny ale tinyei koot ole sutot eng' komoswekyik: kiyamegei lumeiywek che po kooriik che mi inaat ak tegat ne po mitainik lo che po euut. 
Ezekiel41:9 Ki mitainik muut che po euut nyigiisindap inaatut ne po kooriik che mi inaat che tabanu saang'; ak ole kiga ng'et ko ki ye mi kooriik che po inaat che ki po koot. 
Ezekiel41:10 Ak ki mitainik tiptem che po euut tebeesindo ne po kwenutap koorchooto mengeechen, eng' komosta age tugul ne po koot." 
Ezekiel41:11 Ak kitokyingei kurgotigap koorchooto po kween ole kiga ng'et, kitokyingei kurgeet age murot kaataam, kotokyingei age murot tai: ak ki mitainik muut che po euut tebeesindap komosta ne kiga ng'et, eng' komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ak ki mitainik tamanwogik tisap che po euut tebeesindap koot ne kitokyindos ak komosta ne ki mi taban eng' komosta ne tokyingei cherongo; ak ki mitainik muut che po euut nyigiisindap inaatutap koot eng' komoswek tugul, ak ki mitainik tamanwogik sogool che po euut koindonyi." 
Ezekiel41:13 Kikwa anyun koot, koek mitainik pogol che po euut koindo; ak ki ek kooindap komosta ne ki mi taban, kobooto koot ak inatusyekyik, mitainik pogol che po euut;" 
Ezekiel41:14 ak ki ek mitainik pogol che po euut tebeesindap togeetap koot, kobooto che po komosta ne ki mi taban eng' komostap kong'asiis." 
Ezekiel41:15 Ak ki ikwa kooindap koot ne kitokyindos ak komosta ne ki mi taban, ne ki mi ole po patai, kobooto komoswekyik che ki kibendote che ki mi komosi ak komosin, koek mitainik pogol che po euut; kobooto Hekaluut ne po oriit, ak keterusyegap seremut;" 
Ezekiel41:16 kobooto tugatugik, ak tirisyok che regerotiin, ak komoswek che kibendote, che ki mi komoswek tugul che po kooriikyik che ki kiyap koba parak konyil somok, che tokyingei tugatukyet, che ki kiliige keetiik komoswek tugul, kobooch ng'wony agoi tirisyok; kiga kituch anyun tirisyochooto;" 
Ezekiel41:17 agoi kurgeet parak, agoi koot ne po oriit, ak ole po saang', ak kobun inaatut tugul komosta age tugul oriit ak saang', kobee kakwaet." 
Ezekiel41:18 Ki kiwai itoonwegap kerubik ak che po tiironigap sosik; ak kiga rubatkei tiironigap sosik ak kerubisyek; ak ki tinyei itoondo age tugul ne po kerubit togoochik aeng'; 
Ezekiel41:19 kitokyingei anyun togeet ne uu ne po chiito tiiret age, eng' komosta age, kotokyingei togeet ne uu ne po ng'etundo ne neran tiiret age eng' komosta age: ki kiyai ko uu nooto eng' komoswek tugul che po koot komugul." 
Ezekiel41:20 Kiga kiyai itoonwegap kerubisyek ak che po tiironigap sosik kong'etee ng'wony agoi paragutap kurgeet: ki uu nooto anyun inaatutap Hekaluut. 
Ezekiel41:21 Ki tinyei koryosyek ang'wan tugatugigap kurgeetap Hekaluut; ak ki uu togeetap ole-tiliil itoondap Hekaluut. 
Ezekiel41:22 Ki po keetiik kapkorosuut, ak ki po mitainik somok che po euut kooindap tononennyi, ko po mitainik aeng' che po euut koindonyi; ak ki po keetiik luukwekyik, kobooto koindonyi ak inatusyekyik: ak kimwaiwo koleenjo, Ni ko meset ne mi taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel41:23 Ak ki tinyei Hekaluut ak ole-tiliil kereiywek aeng' che po kurgotik. 
Ezekiel41:24 Ak ki tinyei kereiywot age tugul kebeberwek aeng', kebeberwek aeng' che arung'oksei; ki tinyei kereiywot agenge kebeberwek aeng', kotinyei kereiywot age kebeberwek aeng'." 
Ezekiel41:25 Ak ki kiwachi kereiywechooto po Hekaluut itoonwegap kerubisyek ak che po tiironigap sosik, ko uu che kiga kiwachi inatusyek; ak kimi pambanik che nyigiisen eng' keterut saang'." 
Ezekiel41:26 Ak ki mi tirisyok che regerotiin ak itoonwegap tiironigap sosik eng' komosi ak komosin, eng' komoswegap keterut: ki uu nooto koorchooto mengeechen che ki mi inaatutap koot, ak pambanik che nyigiisen." 
Ezekiel42:1 Ki imutwaa anyun anyo seremut ne sip kemong'jin, eng' ooreet ne tokyingei murot kaataam: ak ki imutwaa anyo koot ne ming'in ne kitokyingei komosta ne mi taban, ne ki mi taitap inaatut ole tokyingei murot kaataam." 
Ezekiel42:2 Ki mitainik pogol agenge che po euut kooindap kooriik che ki mi murot kaataam, ak ki mitainik konom tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel42:3 Ki mi komoswek aeng'u che ki kibendote che kiitoorchindos, che ki po kooriik che ki kiyap koba parak konyil somok, che kitokyingei mitainik tiptem che po euut che po seremut ne po oriit, ak che kitokyingei ole ki kimale koik che po seremut ne sip kemong'jin." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ak kimi taitap koorichooto ole ki kibunoti, ki mitainik taman che po euut tebeesindo ngeba oriit, ko po mitainik pogol agenge che po euut, koindo; ak kitokyingei kurgotikwak murot kaataam." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ki nwagen anyun kooriik che kitabanu parak; amu ki ibe poroindo komoswek che ki kibendote, kosiir kooriik che kitabanu ng'wony, ak che po kween, che ki mi koyooto." 
Ezekiel42:6 Amu kimitoti kooriik che ki kiyap koba parak, konyil somok, ak ki ma kotinyei tolochik che uu tolochigap seremusyek: kitenden anyun ne kitabanu parak kosiir ne kitabanu ng'wony ak ne po kween, kong'etee ng'wony." 
Ezekiel42:7 Ki mitainik konom kooindap tooteet ne kitabanu saang' ole neegitee koorchooto mengeechen, ne tokyingei seremut ne sip kemong'jin eng' taitap koorchooto mengeechen." 
Ezekiel42:8 Amu ki mitainik konom che po euut kooindap koorchooto kimi seremut ne sip kemong'jin: ak ogeero, ki mitainik pogol agenge che po euut che ki mi taitap Hekaluut." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ak kimi kurgeet eng' kurereetap koorchooto mengeechen, eng' komostap kong'asiis ye wendi chii koorchooto kobunei seremut ne sip kemong'jin." 
Ezekiel42:10 Ki mi kooriik che mengeechen tooteet oriit ne po seremut ne tokyingei kong'asiis, ne tokyindos ak komosta ne mi taban eng' taitap koot." 
Ezekiel42:11 Ak ki uu ooreet ne ki mi tainnywa kergeindap ooreet ne ki po kooriik che mengeechen che kitokyingei murot kaataam; ki aechin koindonywa ak tebeesindanywa: ak ki uu atebeennywa tugul ak kurgotikwak, ole kibunei kebendi saang'." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ak kimi kurgeet ne ki uu kurgotigap kooriik che mengeechen che kitokyingei murot tai, eng' ooreet meto, ooreet ne ki mi taitap tootoonooto, ne kitokyingei kong'asiis, ye wendi chii oriit." 
Ezekiel42:13 Ki leenjo anyun, Kooriik che mengeechen che mi murot kaataam ak che mi murot tai, che tokyindos ak komosato mi taban, chooto ko kooriik che tiliileen, ole ame tisiik che neegitee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che tiliileen miising': konoree olooto tuguuk che tiliileen miising', kobooto kagoochinoigap peek che ng'ootiin, ak kagoochinoigap tengekto, ak kagoochinoigap chalwokto; amu tiliil komosato." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ye pa tisiik oriit, koma mandoi eng' ole-tiliil kobendi seremut ne sip kemong'jin, ama konoree yooto ngoroikwak che kaboisyee; amu tiliileen ngoroichooto: yeityo kolaach ngoroik alak, si koriiktoi ole mi piik." 
Ezekiel42:15 Ak kingo kagogees kakwaetap koot ne po oriit, komutwaa amang'une ooreet ne po ormariichet ne tokyingei kong'asiis, ak kokwa komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel42:16 Ki ikwae tegat ne kikwaise komostap kong'asiis, koek tegandanooto pogol muut, ki ikwae tegandanooto komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel42:17 Ki ikwa komostap murot kaataam, koek tegandanooto pogol muut, ki ikwae tegandanooto komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel42:18 Ki ikwa komostap murot tai, koek tegandanooto pogol muut, ki ikwae tegandanooto." 
Ezekiel42:19 Kiwelelgei kotokyigei komostap cherongo, ak kokwae tegandanooto koek pogol muut, ki ikwae tegandanooto." 
Ezekiel42:20 Ki ikwa komoswek ang'wan: ki kiyieme inaatut, ne koindonyi ko ki mitainik pogol muut, ak tebeesindanyi ko ki mitainik pogol muut, si kobiit ko oiyo komosta ne tiliil ak komosta ne po piik." 
Ezekiel43:1 Ye ibata komutwaa anyo ormariichet, ormariichanooto tokyingei kong'asiis:" 
Ezekiel43:2 ogeero, ki mang'une ooreetap kong'asiis liilindap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel: ak ki uu tweguunennyi cheetap peek che chaang': ak ki iluu ng'wony eng' liilindanyi." 
Ezekiel43:3 Ak ki uu itoondap liilinooto ng'ang'utyet ne kigageer, ko uu ng'ang'utyet ne ki ageer ye ki anyoone ang'eme nganaseet; ak ki uu ng'ang'utichooto ng'ang'utyet ne ki ageer eng' ye neegitee aineetap Kebar: ak ki abut kot kotiiny togeet ng'wony." 
Ezekiel43:4 Ak ki nyo ko liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobun ooreetap ormariichet ne tokyingei kong'asiis. 
Ezekiel43:5 Ak kiganaba Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak komutwaa anyo seremut ne po oriit; ogeero, ki nyi liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koot." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ak ki agas kong'alaalwo chii eng' ko; ak ki tonon chii eng' ye ami. 
Ezekiel43:7 Ak ki leenjo, Ee, weeriitap chii, yuto ko ye mi ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet, ole tebee keelyekyuk, ole amenye koigeny eng' kwenutap piigap Israel: ama komurwoni kogeny kootap Israel kainennyu ne tiliil, icheeget anan ko laitorinikwak, eng' kugoinatennywa, ak eng' muuswegap laitorinikwak eng' komoswekwak che torooreen;" 
Ezekiel43:8 ye kingo nde tugatukyennywa koriikyi tugatukyennyu, ak konde tolochikwak koriikyi tolochikyuk, ak kimi tooteet ineegei ne ki ibestoseech, anee ak icheek; ak ki komurwon kainennyu ne tiliil eng' tuguukwak che kiwechei che ki yai: ki ageesu anyun icheek eng' nereegekyuk." 
Ezekiel43:9 Ingoisto anyun nguno kugoinatennywa ak muuswegap laitorinikwak, kolooitena, si ameny kwenunnywa koigeny." 
Ezekiel43:10 Ee, inyee weeriitap chii, iboorchi koiito kootap Israel, si kobiit kolilaanso amu tengekwogikwak: ak ingokwa icheek kiit ne uu." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ak ngot kolilaanso amu tuguuk tugul che ki koyai, iboorchi kiit ne uu koot, ak itoondanyi, ak ole kibunei kebendi saang', ak ole kibunei kebendi ko, kobooto ole uu tuguuk, ak etanutikyik tugul, ak ole teptoi tugul, ak ng'atuutikyik tugul, ak isir kogeerei: si kobiit koriip ole uu kiit komugul, kobooto etanutikyik tugul, ak koyai." 
Ezekiel43:12 Niito ko ng'atuutyetap koot: egu ne tiliil miising' eng' tulweet parak komoswek tugul ole pooch. Ogeero, niito ko ng'atuutyetap koot." 
Ezekiel43:13 Chu ko kakwautigap kaptisisyet eng' mitainik che po euut: (kakwautyet ko kakwautyet agenge ne po euut ak tebeesindap euut:) egu kelut kakwautyet agenge ne po euut, koek tebeesindo kakwautyet agenge ne po euut, ak ki ek mireiywondennyi ne ki kimire, ole po inchisyek sogool: egu niito anyun kelutap kaptisisyet." 
Ezekiel43:14 Ak egu mitainik aeng' che po euut kobooch ng'wony agoi tegeleiywot ne tabanu ng'wony, ak tebeesindo ko kakwautyet agenge ne po euut; ak egu mitainik ang'wan che po euut kobooch tegeleiywot ne nwach agoi tegeleiywot ne kooi, ak tebeesindo ko kakwautyet agenge ne po euut." 
Ezekiel43:15 Ak egu mitainik ang'wan che po euut kaptisisyet ole tabanu parak; ak kobooch ole kibeelse eng' kaptisisyet ak kwo parak, komiitei kuinoik ang'wanu." 
Ezekiel43:16 Ak egu kooindap ole kibeelse mitainik taman ak aeng' che po euut, ak mitainik taman ak aeng' eng' tebeesindo, ki aechin komoswekyik tugul ko ang'wan." 
Ezekiel43:17 Ak egu mitainik taman ak ang'wan che po euut, kooindap tegeleiywot, ak koek taman ak ang'wan tebeesindo agine eng' komoswekyik ang'wan; ak koek kebeberta kakwautyet ne po euut, mireiywot ne ki kimire; ak koek kakwautyet agenge ne po euut, kelunnyi, eng' komoswek tugul: ak kotokyigei kong'asiis lang'eiywondennyi." 
Ezekiel43:18 Ak ki leenjo, Ee, weeriitap chii, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni kole: Chu ko ng'atuutigap kaptisisyet eng' peetuut ne tuun kayai icheek, si kogoitoe kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak koisee korotiik." 
Ezekiel43:19 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, igoochini tisiik Lawiik che po iyoteetap Zadok, che riikyino si koboisyeiwo, kirgit ne parnotyot, koek kagoochinetap tengekto." 
Ezekiel43:20 Ak itaach korotiikyik, si iilee kuinoik ang'wan che po kaptisisyet ak luukwek ang'wan che po tegeleiywot, kobooto mireiywot eng' komoswek tugul: itiliili ko uu nooto ye iyachini kagaigaet." 
Ezekiel43:21 Ikwerye kogeny kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto, si kobeel eng' ole ki king'at eng' ko, eng' saang'utap ole-tiliil." 
Ezekiel43:22 Ak igoite eng' peetuut ne po aeng' kwesta ne libwoop koek kagoochinetap tengekto; yeityo koanyiny icheek kaptisisyet ko uu ye kagagoanyinye kirgit. 
Ezekiel43:23 Ye kaigeesu kaanyinyet, igoite kirgit ne parnotyot ne libwoop, kobooto mengit ne libwoop ne punu akweet." 
Ezekiel43:24 Ak igetu koriik taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koseerchi tisiik icheek muunyuk, yeityo kogoito icheek koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ichobe eng' peetuusyek tisap kwesta koek kagoochinetap tengekto: chobei kirgit ne parnotyot kogeny, kobooto mengit ne punu akweet, che libwoben tuwai." 
Ezekiel43:26 Yaei icheek kagaigaet agobo kaptisisyet eng' peetuusyek tisap koanyinyi; itabaani anyun ko uu nooto. 
Ezekiel43:27 Ak ye kagobata peetuusyechooto, kobeel anyun tisiik kagoochinoikwok che kibeelei, eng' kaptisisyet, kobooto kagoochinoikwok che po kaalyeet, eng' peetuutap sisiit ak kwo tai; si ataachak, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel44:1 Yeityo komutwaa aweek abun ooreetap ormariichet ne sip kemong'jin, ne po ole-tiliil, ne tokyingei kong'asiis; ak kigeraat ormariichanooto." 
Ezekiel44:2 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kigerei ormariichani, ma kiyatei, ama punei chii kowendi oriit, amu kagobun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, kowendi oriit; kigerei anyun amu nooto." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ago pounindet, kotebee olooto ko uu pounindet, si koam amitwogik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; wendi oriit kobunei ooreetap keterutap ormariichet, ak komandae oranooto." 
Ezekiel44:4 Yeityo komutwaa anyo ooreet ne po ormariichet ne po murot kaataam ne po taitap koot; ak ki ageer, ogeero, ki nyi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor liilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak ki abut, kot kotiiny togeet ng'wony." 
Ezekiel44:5 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee weeriitap chii, nam komyee, ak igeer eng' konyeguk, ak igase itiiguk tuguuk tugul che amwaun agobo etanutik tugul che po kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ng'atuutikyik tugul; ak inai komyee ole kibetitoi koot oriit, kobooto komosta age tugul ne kimandoe eng' ole-tiliil." 
Ezekiel44:6 Ak imwachi ngelelyot, kootap Israel, ileenji, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ee, okweek kootap Israel, tuguukwok tugul che kiwechei, ko ingoyamak," 
Ezekiel44:7 amu ki omutu kipsagarek, che ma kimuratan mugulelwek, ama kimuratan tuguuk tugul che saptos, kotebee oldanyu ole-tiliil, si komurwon, nooto koonnyu, ye kogoitoi amitwogikyuk, mwanik ak korotiik, ak ki kobut kayomisennyu, si kotesyi tuguukwok tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ama oriip ng'atuutyetap tuguukyuk che tiliileen: ago ki ondechigei okweegei riibiigap poisyennyu eng' oldanyu ne tiliil. 
Ezekiel44:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole ma wendi oldanyu ne tiliil toondet age tugul ne Pororyosyek che ma kimuratan muguleldo ak poorto, agot toondet age tugul ne mi kwenutap piigap Israel." 
Ezekiel44:10 Ago ibei tengektonywa Lawiik che ki koistoenagei kolooegitu, ye kingo petyo Israel, che ki koba kometaa koosup kanamonikwak." 
Ezekiel44:11 Ago egu icheek kiboitiinik eng' oldanyu ne tiliil, koriipsei eng' ormariichok che po koot, ak koboisyei eng' koot: enyei kagoochinet ne kibeelei ak tiseiywot agobo piik, ak kotononso eng' taitap piik koboisyechi." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ko uu ye kiboisyechin icheek piik eng' taitap kanamonikwak, ak koek kanagutyetap tengekto eng' kootap Israel; ki anamji parak anyun eunnyu atokyi icheek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ibei icheek tengektonywa." 
Ezekiel44:13 Ama riikyino, si koyaiywo poisyetap tisiindet, anan koriikyi tuguukyuk che tiliileen alak tugul, koriikyi tuguuk che tiliileen miising': ago ibei kalilanennywa, kobooto tuguukwak che kiwechei che ki koyai." 
Ezekiel44:14 Nganda uu nooto, ayae icheek koek riibiigap ng'atuutyetap koot, amu poisyennyi tugul, ak amu tuguuk tugul che kiyaei eng' oriit." 
Ezekiel44:15 Ago pwoonei koriikyino koboisyeiwo tisiik Lawiik, weeriitap Zadok, che ki riibei poisyetap oldanyu ne tiliil, ye kingo pa piigap Israel kometaa; si kotononso eng' tainnyu kogoono mwanik ak korotiik, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Ezekiel44:16 pendi oldanyu ne tiliil, ak koriikyi mesennyu, si koboisyeiwo, ak koriip ng'atuutyennyu." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ak ye pa oriit kobun ormariichogap seremut ne po oriit, kilaakyin ngoroik che po katanit; ama ilaachi icheek ngoroigap koroorigap keechiirek, ye poisyei eng' seremut ne po oriit, ak eng' ko." 
Ezekiel44:18 Ilaachi chepkuloigap katanit, ak kolaach sulwalisyek che po katanit; ma ilaachi kiy age tugul ne igoochin kong'etyi kaot." 
Ezekiel44:19 Ak ye mandoi kobendi seremut ne sip kemong'jin, seremut ne sip kemong'jin, agoi ole mi piik, koreegu anyun ngoroichooto kaboisyee, ak kogonor eng' kooriik che mengeechen che tiliileen, ak kolaach ngoroik alak, si ma itabaan piik eng' ngoroikwak." 
Ezekiel44:20 Ma icheru metowekwak, anan kobagaakta suumeekwak kogoeegitu; tilei kityo konwagitu." 
Ezekiel44:21 Ama eei tisiindet age tugul divaik ye wendi seremut ne po oriit. 
Ezekiel44:22 Ama ituni mosoogik, anan ne kigeon: ago ituni pergeinik che po iyoteetap kootap Israel, anan ko mosoget ne ki po tisiindet." 
Ezekiel44:23 Ak koneet piikyuk koobeesyo che tiliileen ak che ma tiliileen, ak koneet icheek koguiyo tuguuk che ma ianyinyotin ak che ianyinyotin." 
Ezekiel44:24 Ak korwookyi che ibeligei; korwookyi ko uu kirwoogutikyuk: ak koriip ng'atuutikyuk ak kaneetisyosyekyuk eng' igoorwekyuk tugul che ki king'at; ak kotabaan sabatosyekyuk. 
Ezekiel44:25 Ama riikyin muusto si ma ing'wanitkei: ago imuuchi kong'wanitkei amu kwanda anan kamet, anan weeriit, anan chepto, anan ng'eetap kamet, anan chepkamet ne ma kitun." 
Ezekiel44:26 Ak ye kagianyiny, kiityi peetuusyek tisap." 
Ezekiel44:27 Ak eng' peetuut ne wendi ole-tiliil, seremut ne po oriit, kwo kobois eng' ole-tiliil, kogoito kagoochinennyi ne po tengekto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel44:28 Ak konyoor poroteet; aa porotennywa: ak mogoochini icheek kiit ne namei kobunji eng' Israel; aa nenywa. 
Ezekiel44:29 Amei kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin, ak kagoochinetap tengekto, ak kagoochinetap chalwokto; ak nenywa kiit age tugul ne kitabaani eng' Israel." 
Ezekiel44:30 Ak punjin tisiik tongoanik tugul che po tai che po kiy age tugul, ak kagoochinet age tugul ne kinamjin parak ne po kiy age tugul, che po kagoochinoikwok tugul che kinamjin parak: ogoochini kogeny tisiindet magatinikwok che tuonen che po tai, si kogoochi perurto kotebee koong'ung'." 
Ezekiel44:31 Ma amei tisiik kiy age tugul ne kamee ineegei, anan ne kobarei tyong'ik, ngo toriit anan ngo tyony." 
Ezekiel45:1 Ak ye opchee emet eng' seretap parbareek koek poroteet, ogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet, kebeberta ne tiliil ne po emet: egu koindo tegat eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, ak koek tebeesindo eliphuusyek taman: egu emonooto ne tiliil eng' kiwotennyi tugul eng' komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel45:2 Punjin kebebertap emonooto komosta ne tiliil ne egu koindo pogol muut, koek tebeesindo pogol muut, aechin komoswek tugul ko ang'wan; ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisye, koegu mitainik konom che po euut komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel45:3 Ak eng' niito kaikwa, ikwa koindo koek eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, ak koek tebeesindo eliphuusyek taman: ak komi olooto ole-tiliil eng' ye Tiliil Miising'." 
Ezekiel45:4 Nooto ko kebeberta ne tiliil ne po kooret, punjin tisiik, kiboitinigap ole-tiliil, che riikyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koboisyechin; ak kobunji olooto kooriikwak, ak kobunji ole-tiliil komosta ne tiliil." 
Ezekiel45:5 Punjin Lawiik kiboitinigap koot, koindo ne po eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, ak tebeesindo ne po eliphuusyek taman, konamjigei kobunji, koek nganasook che menyei." 
Ezekiel45:6 Ak omarar komosta ne punjin nganaseet koek eliphuusyek muut tebeesindo, koek koindo eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, kotetkei ak kagoochinetap kebeberta ne tiliil: punjin koot komugul ne po Israel." 
Ezekiel45:7 Ak kobunji pounindet emet ne mi komosi ak komosi ne po kagoochinet ne tiliil ak ne po emet ne punjin nganaseet, eng' taitap kagoochinet ne tiliil, ak eng' taitap emet ne punjin nganaseet eng' ole tokyingei cherongo, ak eng' ole tokyingei kong'asiis. Ak aechin koindonyi ak age eng' kebeberwechooto, kobooch kiwoteet ne po cherongo agoi kiwoteet ne po kong'asiis." 
Ezekiel45:8 Punjin ineendet emonooto eng' Israel. Ama kousei kogeny pounikyuk piikyuk; ago igoochin emet kootap Israel kobee pororyosyekwak. 
Ezekiel45:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ingoyamak nooto, ee pounigap Israel: oiste koroomnateet ak ng'emisyet, ak oyai kirwooget ak imanda; oiste yaakset ne oyaache piikyuk eng' kimnateet, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel45:10 Oboisyee keruutik ak mitainik che po iman. 
Ezekiel45:11 Aechin epah ak debeisyek aeng', ak debeisyek aeng' che kanyi tuguuk ko kergei ak kebeberta agenge eng' taman che po homer, ak epah agenge ko kergei ak kebeberta agenge eng' taman ne po homer; egu homer kiit ne kigerisye kotugul." 
Ezekiel45:12 Ak yamei shekel agenge ak gerahisyek tiptem. Shekelisyek muut ko egu shekelisyek muut, shekelisyek taman ko egu shekelisyek taman, ak shekelisyek konom ko egu mina agenge." 
Ezekiel45:13 Ni ko kagoochinet ne ogoitoi; kebeberta agenge eng' lo ne po epah eng' homer ne po nganuuk, ak ogoite kebeberta agenge eng' lo ne po epah eng' homer ne po baale." 
Ezekiel45:14 Ak kebebertap mwaita ne ki king'at ne po debeisyek aeng' che po mwaita, koegu kebeberta agenge eng' taman ne po debeisyek aeng' che po Kor, chooto ko debeisyek tiptem, nooto ko homer agenge, amu debeisyek tiptem ko yamei homer:" 
Ezekiel45:15 kobooto aarwet agenge ne po akweetap keechiirek, ne ki leweni eng' pogol aeng', ne punu emet ne pitat ne po Israel; egu chuuto kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagoochinoigap kaalyeet, si kobiit koyai kagaigaet agobo icheek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel45:16 Igoitoi piik tugul che po emet kagoochinoni agobo pounindet eng' Israel. 
Ezekiel45:17 Ak koek poisyetap pounindet kagoochinoik che kibeelei, ak kagoochinoik che po peek che ng'ootiin, ak kagoochinoik che kieei eng' igoorwek, ak eng' ye kaleel arawet, ak eng' sabatoisyek, eng' igoorwek tugul che ki king'at che po kootap Israel: chobei ineendet kagoochinetap tengekto, ak kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin, ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagoochinoik che po kaalyeet, si koyai kagaigaet agobo kootap Israel." 
Ezekiel45:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Eng' arawet ne po tai, eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawanooto, igetu kirgit ne libwoop ne parnotyot, si ianyiny ole-tiliil." 
Ezekiel45:19 Ak konam tisiindet korotiigap kagoochinetap tengekto, ak konde tugatugigap koot, ak koilee luukwek ang'wan che po tegeleiywotap kaptisisyet, ak koilee tugatugigap seremut ne po oriit." 
Ezekiel45:20 Ak iyai ko uu nooto eng' peetuutap tisap ne po arawet agobo age tugul ne lelei, ak agobo ineendet ne abusat: oyae anyun ko uu nooto kagaigaet agobo koot." 
Ezekiel45:21 Eng' arawet ne po tai eng' peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ne po arawanooto, ochop paska, igoorto ne po peetuusyek tisap; ki amei magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ak chobei eng' peetuunooto pounindet kirgit ne po kagoochinetap tengekto, agobo kei ak agobo piik tugul che po emet." 
Ezekiel45:23 Ak kochopchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinet ne kibeelei eng' peetuusyek tisap che po igoorto, kiruugik tisap ak mengichik tisap che libwoben tugul, eng' peetuut age tugul ne po peetuusyechooto tisap; ak kwesta ne po kagoochinetap tengekto ne po peetuut age tugul." 
Ezekiel45:24 Chobei kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin kiloinik taman agobo kirgit age tugul, ak kiloinik taman agobo mengit age tugul, ak litainik somok che po mwanik agobo kiloinik taman age tugul che po peek che ng'ootiin." 
Ezekiel45:25 Yaei ineendet ko uu niito eng' arawetap tisap, eng' peetuutap taman ak muut ne po arawanooto, eng' peetuusyek tisap che po igoorto; yaei ko uu nooto eng' kagoochinetap tengekto, ak eng' kagoochinet ne kibeelei, ak eng' kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin ak eng' mwanik." 
Ezekiel46:1 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kigerei eng' peetuusyek lo che po poisyet ormariichet ne po seremut ne po oriit, ne tokyingei kong'asiis; ak kiyatei eng' peetuutap sabato, ak kiyatei eng' peetuut ne kaleel arawet." 
Ezekiel46:2 Ak kwo oriit pounindet kobunei ooreet ne po keterut ne po ormariichet ne po saang', ak kotonone ye neegitee tugatukyetap ormariichet, ak kochop tisiik kagoochinennyi ne kibeelei ak kagoochinoikyik che po kaalyeet, ak kosa eng' tugatugigap ormariichet; yeityo komanda: ago ma kigerei ormariichet agoi koimen." 
Ezekiel46:3 Ak kosa piigap emet eng' kurgeetap ormariichet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' sabatoisyek, ak eng' ye kaleel arawet." 
Ezekiel46:4 Ak kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne igoitoi pounindet kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuutap sabato, ko aarek lo che libwoben che po keechiir, kobooto mengit ne libwoop;" 
Ezekiel46:5 ak kobooto mengit age tugul ko ibu kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin litainik taman ak tisap ak kebeberyat, ak kobooto aaregap keechiirek age tugul ko koon ko uu ye imuuchi. Ak agobo kagoochinet age tugul ne po peek ko koon litainik somok che po mwanik." 
Ezekiel46:6 Ak eng' peetuut ne kaleel arawet kigoito kirgit ne libwoop ne parnotyot; ak aarek lo che po keechiir, ak mengit; libwoben tugul:" 
Ezekiel46:7 Ak agobo kirgit age tugul ak agobo mengit age tugul ko nyolu kochop ineendet litainik taman ak tisap ak kebeberyat che po kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin. Ak agobo che po aarek ko ingochop ko uu ye imuuchi, ak kobooto tugul kogoitoi kora mwaita litainik somok." 
Ezekiel46:8 Ak ye wendi pounindet oriit, kobunei ooreetap keterut ne po ormariichet, ak komanda kobun oranooto." 
Ezekiel46:9 Ago ye pwa piigap emet taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' igoorwek che ki king'at, ko ineendet ne wendi oriit kobunei ooreet ne po ormariichetap murot kaataam, kowendi kosaaei, komandoe ooreet ne po ormariichetap murot tai; ak ineendet ne wendi oriit kobunei ooreet ne po ormariichetap murot tai, komandoe ooreet ne po ormariichetap murot kaataam: maweegunegei ooreetap ormariichet ne kabunei kowendi oriit, ago wendi kochuuldos." 
Ezekiel46:10 Ak ye pendi oriit, kowendi pounindet kobooto icheek, ak ye mandoi, komandoi tugul." 
Ezekiel46:11 Ak eng' peetuusyegap igoorwek ak igoorwek che ki king'at, ko agobo kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin kogoito litainik taman ak tisap ak kebeberyat kobooto kirgit age tugul anan ko mengit. Ak agobo che po aaregap keechiir ko ingochop ko uu ye imuuchi, ak kobooto tugul kogoitoi kora mwaita litainik somok." 
Ezekiel46:12 Ak ye chobei pounindet kagoochinetap chamyet, kagoochinet ne kibeelei anan kagoochinoigap kaalyeet koek kagoochinetap chamyet ne igoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, keyatyin ormariichet ne tokyingei kong'asiis, ak kochop kagoochinennyi ne kibeelei kobooto kagoochinoikyik che po kaalyeet, ko uu ye yaei eng' peetuutap sabato: yeityo komanda; ak ye kagomanda, keger ormariichet." 
Ezekiel46:13 Ak ichobe aarwetap keechiir ne libwoop ne ma siirei kenyiit agenge koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor peetuut age tugul: ichobe nooto karonet age tugul. 
Ezekiel46:14 Ak ichop kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin kiloinik aeng' eng' karonet age tugul kobooto arwanooto po keechiir ak litaiyat agenge ne po mwaita si keburukto peek che ng'ootiin che tambululeen. Egu niito ng'atuutyet ne po agoi ne po kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotugul. 
Ezekiel46:15 Kichobei anyun ko uu nooto aarwetap keechiir, kobooto kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin, ak mwaita, karonet age tugul, koek kagoochinet ne kibeelei ne po kotugul." 
Ezekiel46:16 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ngot kogoochi pounindet kagoochinet age eng' weeriikyik, koegu nooto poroteetap weerooto, punjin weeriikyik; punjin icheeget amu porotennywa." 
Ezekiel46:17 Ago ngot kogoochi kebebertap porotennyi age eng' otwogikyik, kobunjin otwogindonooto agoi kenyiitap katyaget; si keeweekyi pounindet; ago punjin porotennyi weeriikyik." 
Ezekiel46:18 Ago ma ibei pounindet poroteetap piik, si korebe icheek tuguukwak; igoochin poroteet weeriikyik eng' tuguukyik: si ma kiseer piikyuk, kobagaakta chii age tugul tuguukyik." 
Ezekiel46:19 Ki imutwaa anyun abun ole kibunei kebendi oriit, ne ki mi tabandap ormariichet, anyo kooriik che tiliileen che po tisiik, che kitokyingei murot kaataam: ak ogeero, kimi komosta ole po patai ne kitokyingei cherongo."
