Ezekiel46:20 Ak ki leenjo, Olito ole iyoe tisiik kagoochinetap chalwokto ak kagoochinetap tengekto, ole watane kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin; si ma ip koba seremut ne sip kemong'jin, si koanyiny piik." 
Ezekiel46:21 Yeityo komutwaa anyun anyo seremut ne sip kemong'jin, ak komuta abun luukwek ang'wan che po seremut; ak ogeero, kimi seremut luuita age tugul ne po seremunooto." 
Ezekiel46:22 Ki mi seremusyek che mengeechen che ki king'ot eng' luukwechooto ang'wan che po seremut, che koindonywa ko ki mitainik artam che po euut, ak mitainik sosom che po euut tebeesindo: ki aechin seremusyechuuto ko ang'wan che ki mi luukwechooto." 
Ezekiel46:23 Ak ki kiteech inaatut koyiem seremusyechooto ang'wan, ak ki kichop ole kiyoise eng' kurereetap inatusyechooto komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel46:24 Ki leenjo anyun, Chuuto kooriik che kiyoise, ole iyoe kiboitinigap koot kagoochinoigap piik." 
Ezekiel47:1 Ak ki imutwaa aweek anyo kurgeetap koot; ak ogeero, ki mang'une peek kurereetap tugatugigap koot che kitokyingei kong'asiis, amu kitokyingei koot kong'asiis: ak ki mang'une peek kurere, eng' komostap tai ne po koot, eng' murot tai ne po kaptisisyet." 
Ezekiel47:2 Yeityo komutwaa among' abun ooreetap ormariichet ne tokyingei murot kaataam, ak komuta abun ooreet ne po saang' agoi ormariichet ne po saang', abun ooreetap ormariichet ne tokyingei kong'asiis; ak ogeero, kisururtogei peek eng' komostap tai." 
Ezekiel47:3 Ye ki wo chiito kotokyigei kong'asiis, kotinyei porowet, kokwa mitainik eliphuut agenge che po euut, ak king'ata abun peek, peek che kiitu kwarinik." 
Ezekiel47:4 Ki ikwa kogeny eliphuut agenge, ak kong'ata abun peek, peek che kiitu kutung'oik. Ki ikwa kogeny eliphuut agenge, ak kong'ata abun peek, peek che kiitu suet." 
Ezekiel47:5 Ye ibata, kokwa eliphuut agenge; ki ek aineet ne ma amuuch alandae: amu kitesak peek miising', peek che yamei kebir, aineet ne ma kimuuchi kelandae." 
Ezekiel47:6 Ak koleenjo, Ee, weeriitap chii, kaigeer niito? Yeityo komutwaa ak kong'ata aweek ngeguutap aineet." 
Ezekiel47:7 Ye kinga weege anyun, ogeero, kimi keetiik che chaang' miising' ngeguutap ainonooto komosi ak komosin." 
Ezekiel47:8 Ki leenjo anyun, Pendi peechu kotokyingei emet ne mi kong'asiis, ak kochoortagei koba Arabah, ak koba kotokyigei nyanjet; pendi nyanjet peechooto ki king'at komong'; ak ki anyiny peegap nyanjet." 
Ezekiel47:9 Ak kosap kiy age tugul ne sabei, ne uoti, eng' komosta age tugul ne punei ainoosyechooto; ak piitu njireenik che chaang' miising': amu kait olooto peechooto, ak ki anyiny peegap nyanjet, ak kosap kiy age tugul eng' ole itei aineet." 
Ezekiel47:10 Ak kotononse ngeguut ramiigap njireenik: ak koek ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njireenik kobooch En-gedi agoi En-eglaim; isubi njireenikwak kergeindonywa, ko uu njireenigap nyanjetap Mediterenian, che chaang' miising'." 
Ezekiel47:11 Ago ma ki anyinyi komoswekyik che mi ng'atateek, ak nyanjosyekyik; kibagaaktoi kobunji muunyuk." 
Ezekiel47:12 Ak kobiit keetit age tugul ne ki amei eng' ngeguutap ainonooto, eng' komosi ak komosin, ne marestos sogekyik, ama petos logoekyik: ago yiei logoek eng' arawet age tugul, amu mang'une peekyik ole-tiliil: ak koek amitwogik logoekyik, ak ki anyinyisye sogekyik." 
Ezekiel47:13 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Egu niito kiwoteet, ye opcheitoi emet koek poroteet, kobee ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po Israel: nyooru kebeberwek Joseph." 
Ezekiel47:14 Punjinok niito, kogergeit tugul; emet ne ki ayosye ale agoochini kwanisyekwok: ak kobunjook emoni koek poroteng'wong'." 
Ezekiel47:15 Ak egu niito kiwotetap emet: eng' komostap murot kaataam, kobooch nyanjetap Mediterenian, eng' ooreet ne wendi Hetlon, agoi ole kimandoe Sedad;" 
Ezekiel47:16 Hamath, Berota, ak Sibraim, ne mi kwenutap kiwotetap Damasko ak kiwotetap Hamath; Haser-hatikon, ne mi ole neegitee kiwotetap Hauran." 
Ezekiel47:17 Ak koek kiwoteet ne punu nyanjetap Mediterenian agoi Hasar-enon ne mi murot kaataam, ne po kiwotetap Damasko, kobooto kiwotetap Hamath ne mi murot kaataam. Egu niito komostap murot kaataam." 
Ezekiel47:18 Ak egu Jordan kiwotetap kong'asiis, kwenutap Hauran ak Damasko ak Gilead, ak emetap Israel; okwaa kobooch kiwotetap murot kaataam agoi nyanjet ne mi kong'asiis. Egu niito komostap kong'asiis." 
Ezekiel47:19 Egu kiwotetap komostap tai kobooch Tamar agoi peegap Meriboth-kadesh, agoi kererutap Misiri, agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian. Egu niito komostap murot tai." 
Ezekiel47:20 Egu kiwotetap cherongo nyanjetap Mediterenian, kobooch kiwotetap murot tai agoi ole kibunei kebendi Lebo-hamath. Egu niito komostap cherongo." 
Ezekiel47:21 Opchechinigei anyun emoniito kobee ortinwegap Israel. 
Ezekiel47:22 Opchei anyun eng' seretap parbareek koek poroteng'wong' kobooto toek che kitebee kwenung'wong', che sichei lagok eng' kwenung'wong'; ak koek icheek eng' okweek lagok che ki kisikyin kaa eng' kwenutap piigap Israel; nyooru poroteet kobootok eng' kwenutap ortinwegap Israel." 
Ezekiel47:23 Ak eng' ooreet age tugul ne katebee toondet, ogoochini porotennyi eng' olooto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel48:1 Chu anyun kainaigap ortinwek: kobooch tabandap murot kaataam, ole neegitee ooreet ne wendi Hetlon agoi ole kibunei kebendi Hamath, Hasar-enon ne mi kiwotetap Damasko, ne tokyingei murot kaataam, ne neegitee Hamath; nyooru kiwotosyekwak eng' kong'asiis ak cherongo; kebeberta agenge ne po Dan." 
Ezekiel48:2 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Dan kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Asher. 
Ezekiel48:3 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Asher, kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Naphtali." 
Ezekiel48:4 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Naphtali, kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Manasseh." 
Ezekiel48:5 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Manasseh kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Ephraim. 
Ezekiel48:6 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Ephraim kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Reuben. 
Ezekiel48:7 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Reuben, kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Judah." 
Ezekiel48:8 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Judah, kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo, koegu kagoochinet ne ogoitoi, tebeesindanyi ko tegat eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, ak kotenitu koindonyi agenge eng' kebeberwechooto, kobooch komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo: ak komi ole-tiliil kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel48:9 Egu kooindap kagoochinet ne ogoochini Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tegat eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, ak koek tebeesindo eliphuusyek taman." 
Ezekiel48:10 Ak punjin icheek, chooto ko tisiik, kagoochinet ne tiliil; egu koindo ne tokyingei murot kaataam, eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, ak koek tebeesindo, ne tokyingei cherongo, eliphuusyek taman, ak koek tebeesindo ne tokyingei kong'asiis, eliphuusyek taman, ak koek koindo ne tokyingei murot tai, eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut: ak komi ole-tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenunnywa." 
Ezekiel48:11 Punjin nooto tisiik che ki kitabaan eng' weeriitap Zadok, che ki riip ng'atuutikyuk; che ma po kometaa ye kingo meta piigap Israel ko uu ye ki pa Lawiik kometaa;" 
Ezekiel48:12 ak koek nooto eng' icheek kagoochinet ne punu kagoochinetap emet, kiit ne tiliil miising', eng' ole neegitee kiwotetap Lawiik." 
Ezekiel48:13 Ak nyooru Lawiik kiwoteet ne koindo ko eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, ak tebeesindo eliphuusyek taman, kotoorchin ak kiwotetap tisiik: egu koindo tugul eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut, ak tebeesindo eliphuusyek taman." 
Ezekiel48:14 Ama aldoi emonooto, anan kowale age, anan kogoochi toek tongoanigap emet, amu itabaanat emonooto eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel48:15 Ak koboisyee piik tugul emet ne kang'et, ne po kilomita taman ak aeng' ak kebeberyat eng' tebeesindo, ak kilomita aeng' ak kebeberyateng' koindo, kobunji emonooto nganaseet ak ole ki menyei, ak ole kiyagisye. Mi nganaseet kwenunnyi," 
Ezekiel48:16 ak chu ko kakwautikyik; egu komostap murot kaataam mitainik eliphuusyek aeng' pogol aeng' ak konom, ak egu komostap murot tai eliphuusyek aeng' pogol aeng' ak konom, ak egu komostap kong'asiis, eliphuusyek aeng' pogol aeng' ak konom, ak egu komostap cherongo eliphuusyek aeng' pogol aeng' ak konom." 
Ezekiel48:17 Ak tinyei nganaseet ole kiyagisye; egu ole tokyingei murot kaataam mitainik pogol agenge ak tiptem, ak egu ole tokyingei murot tai mitainik pogol agenge ak tiptem, ak egu ole tokyingei kong'asiis mitainik pogol agenge ak tiptem, ak egu ole tokyingei cherongo mitainik pogol agenge ak tiptem." 
Ezekiel48:18 Ak aechin kooindap ne ng'etu, ak kagoochinet ne tiliil, egu kilomita muut eng' kilomita aeng' ak kebeberyat kotokyingei kong'asiis, ak egu kilomita muut eng' kilomita aeng' ak kebeberyat kotokyigei cherongo: ak koaechin ak kagoochinet ne tiliil; ak koek ruratennyi amitwogigap icheek che poisyei eng' nganaseet." 
Ezekiel48:19 Ak kobat emonooto icheek che poisyei eng' nganaseet che punu ortinwek tugul che po Israel. 
Ezekiel48:20 Egu kagoochinet komugul kilomita taman ak aeng' ak kebeberyat eng' komoswek tugul ngo koindo, tebeesindo. Ogoitoi kagoochinet ne tiliil ne aechin komoswek tugul ko ang'wan, kobooto emet ne punjin nganaseet." 
Ezekiel48:21 Ak kobunji pounindet ne ng'etu, eng' komosi ak komosin ne po kagoochinet ne tiliil, ak ne po emet ne punjin nganaseet, eng' taitap eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut ne po kagoochinet ne tokyingei kiwotetap kong'asiis, ak ole tokyingei cherongo eng' taitap eliphuusyek tiptem ak muut ne tokyingei kiwotetap cherongo, koaechin ak kebeberwechooto, punjin emonooto pounindet: ak komi kwenunnyi kagoochinet ne tiliil ak ole-tiliil ne po koot." 
Ezekiel48:22 Punjin kogeny pounindet kobooch emetap Lawiik, ak kobooch emet ne punjin nganaseet, ne mi kwenutap emet ne po pounindet, eng' kwenutap kiwotetap Judah ak kiwotetap Benjamin." 
Ezekiel48:23 Ak eng' ortinwek che ng'etunotiin: kobooch komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Benjamin. 
Ezekiel48:24 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Benjamin, kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Simion." 
Ezekiel48:25 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Simion, kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Issakar." 
Ezekiel48:26 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Issakar kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Zebulun. 
Ezekiel48:27 Ak kobooch kebeberta ne po Zebulun, kong'etee komostap kong'asiis agoi komostap cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne po Gad." 
Ezekiel48:28 Ak kobooch kiwotetap Gad, eng' komosta ne tokyingei murot tai, koitei kiwoteet Tamar agoi peegap Meriboth-kadesh, agoi kererutap Misiri, agoi nyanjetap Mediterenian." 
Ezekiel48:29 Niito emet ne opchechini ortinwegap Israel eng' seretap parbareek koek porotennywa, ak chuuto ko kebeberwekwak che teerchiin, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Ezekiel48:30 Ak chu ko ole kimandoe eng' nganaseet; eng' komostap murot kaataam, koegu tegat eliphuusyek ang'wan ak pogol muut ngikwa:" 
Ezekiel48:31 Ak kimwaitoe ormariichogap nganaseet kainaigap ortinwegap Israel; tokyingei murot kaataam ormariichok somogu: ormariichetap Reuben, ko agenge, ormariichetap Judah, ko agenge, ormariichetap Lawi, ko agenge;" 
Ezekiel48:32 ak eng' komostap kong'asiis koegu tegat eliphuusyek ang'wan ak pogol muut; ak ormariichok somok: chooto ko ormariichetap Joseph, ko agenge, ormariichetap Benjamin, ko agenge, ormariichetap Dan, ko agenge." 
Ezekiel48:33 Ak eng' komostap murot tai koegu tegat eliphuusyek ang'wan ak pogol muut; ak ormariichok somok: ormariichetap Simion, ko agenge, ormariichetap Issakar, ko agenge, ormariichetap Zebulun, ko agenge;" 
Ezekiel48:34 eng' komostap cherongo, koegu tegat eliphuusyek ang'wan ak pogol muut, kobooto ormariichokwak somok; ormariichetap Gad, ko agenge, ormariichetap Asher, ko agenge, ormariichetap Naphtali, ko agenge." 
Ezekiel48:35 Egu tegat eliphuusyek taman ak sisiit komoswek tugul: ak keguure kainetap nganasanooto kobooch peetuunooto, Mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor olooto." 
Hosea1:1 Ni ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki nyoonji Hosea weeriitap Beri eng' peetuusyegap Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, ak Hezekiah che ki laitorinigap Judah, ak eng' peetuusyegap Jeroboam weeriitap Joash laitoryatap Israel." 
Hosea1:2 Ye kingo ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hosea eng' tai, koleenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Hosea, “Ui imutyigei chepkugoniot koek osotyong'ung', ak lagogap kugoinatet, amu yaei emet kugoinatet ne oo kometoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Hosea1:3 Ki wo anyun ak kotun Gomer cheptap Diblaim, ak ki manach ak kosikyi ineendet weeriit." 
Hosea1:4 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, “Kuuree kainennyi Jezreel amu ne matyanit ayaaktochini mugetuut kootap Jehu agobo korotigap Jezreel, ak ageesu pounatetap kootap Israel." 
Hosea1:5 Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun airie kwangetap Israel eng' atebweetap Jezreel.” 
Hosea1:6 Ak ki manach kogeny ak kosich chepto. Ak ki leenji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ineendet, “Kuuree kainennyi Lo-ruhama amu ma ariiree kootap Israel anan anyochi kaat eng' kiy age tugul." 
Hosea1:7 Ago ariiree kootap Judah ak agoochi katerteerisyet icheek kobun eutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa. Ma saruunee kwanget, anan rotwetap chok, anan lugeet, anan paraisisyek, anan piik che ketei paraisisyek.”" 
Hosea1:8 Kingo kagolugee Lo-ruhama, komanach kogeny ak kosich weeriit." 
Hosea1:9 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Kuuree kainennyi Lo-ami amu ma oo piikyuk, ama aegu Kamuktaindeng'wong'.”" 
Hosea1:10 Ago tenitu piigap Israel ng'aniegap nyanja che ma kimuuchi kirogendoe kiy anan kiit; ak eng' ole ki kimwachine icheeget keele, “Ma oo piikyuk”, ko tuun ki leenjin, “Oo weeriigap Kamuktaindet ne sabei.”" 
Hosea1:11 Iyumigei piigap Judah ak piigap Israel, ak kolewenjigei kandoindet agenge; ak paraitu ak konyoor keljiin eng' emonooto; amu egu peetuut ne oo peetuutap Jezreel." 
Hosea2:1 Omwachi ng'eetap kametwagikwok oleenji “Piikyuk,” ak omwachi chepkametwagikwok oleenji, “Che ki kiriiree.”" 
Hosea2:2 Oteechi kamenng'ung', oteechi amu ineendet koma ko osotyonnyu, ama aa manong'otyonnyi. Ingometo kugoinatosyekyik che mi togeennyi, ak ingometo ibeetapkei nooto mi tegeennyi." 
Hosea2:3 Ngo ma noo, aregunee ngoroikyik ak amete kotebi aach ngor ko uu peetuut ne ki kisichei, ak ayai ineendet koigeit surkwen, ak agoochi ineendet koigei emet ne yaamaat, ak abare melelda." 
Hosea2:4 Ma riiree lagokyik, amu icheeget ko lagogap kugoinatet." 
Hosea2:5 Amu ki yaei kamet kugoinatet; ki yai teweernateet ineendet ne ki manachi icheek. Amu ki mwa kole, asuboti chamanikyuk, che koono amitwogikyuk ak peekyuk, koroorikyuk che po keechiirek ak mabuteekyuk, mwanikyuk ak tuguuk che aee." 
Hosea2:6 Nooto anyun, ayiemee oreng'ung' katook, ak ang'oot ineendet, si ma nyoor ortinwekyik." 
Hosea2:7 Isubi chamanikyik ko uu kotugul, ago ma nyooru icheek; ak cheeng'ei icheek, ago ma nyooru. Yeityo anyun komwa kole, awendi ak aweekyigei manong'otyonnnyu ne po tai amu ki agaigai eng' peetuusyechooto kosiir nguno." 
Hosea2:8 Amu ma nai kole anee ne ki agoochini peek, ak divaik, ak mwanik, ak atesyi fedha ak thahabu che ki yae Baal." 
Hosea2:9 Aweechi anyun peekyuk eng' peetuusyegap kesisyet, ak aweech divaikyuk eng' kasarta ne karuryo, ak arebee koroorikyuk che po keechiirek ak mabuteekyuk, che kota tugegei." 
Hosea2:10 Ang'aanye teweernatennyi eng' taitap chamanikyik, ama piitu chii ne saru ineendet eng' eunnyu." 
Hosea2:11 Ageesu kogeny poiboiyennyi, igoorwekyik, peetuut ne kaleel arawet, sabatoisyekyik, ak tuiyosyekyik tugul che ki king'at." 
Hosea2:12 Ang'eme keetiikyik che po sabibuk ak mogoonikyik, che mwaei koleen, “Chu ko tuguuk che ki alena chamanikyuk.” Ayae tuguuchooto koek timiin, ak koam tyong'igap timiin." 
Hosea2:13 Aipchini ineendet pireet agobo peetuusyegap Baalik, ye kibeelji `ineendet icheek nyamdutik, ak kolelesanjinegei munaokyik ak tuguukyik che po lelesta, ak kwo kosubot chamanikyik, ak koutyeno, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Hosea2:14 Nooto anyun, ogeero, agaigai ineendet ak amut kwo surkwen, ak amwachi ng'aleek che agaigae." 
Hosea2:15 Ak agoochi ineendet mbareenikyik che po sabibuk eng' olooto, ak ayai atebweetap Akor koek kurgeetap kamang'unet. Iyanwa eng' olooto ko uu eng' peetuusyegap ming'inatennyi, ak ko uu eng' peetuut ne ki mong'u kotogosu eng' emetap Misiri." 
Hosea2:16 Iguureno eng' peetuunooto “Manong'otyonnyu,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma iguureno Baal." 
Hosea2:17 Amu aistoi kainaigap Baalik eng' kutinnyi ama kibwaati kogeny kainaikwak. 
Hosea2:18 Eng' peetuunooto ayae arorutyet agobo icheek kobooto tyong'igap timiin ak toriitigap parak, ak tuguuk che ichuutegei ng'wony. Ak airii kwanget ak rotwetap chok, ak aiste lugeet eng' emet, ak agoochi koruiyo eng' chametapkei." 
Hosea2:19 Ak atunin koigeny; ee, achobe atunin eng' imanda ak eng' kirwooget, ak eng' chamyet ne tala ak eng' rirenosyek." 
Hosea2:20 Achobe atunin eng' imanda; ak inai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Hosea2:21 Ak tuun awolu eng' peetuunooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Awoljini kipsengwetisyek, ak kowolji icheek ng'wony;" 
Hosea2:22 ak kowolji ng'wony peek, ak divaik, ak mwanik, si kowolji chooto Jezreel." 
Hosea2:23 Ak agoole ineendet eng' emet; ak ariiree ineendet ne ki ma ki riiree; ak aleenji icheek che ki ma ko piikyuk, “Oo piikyuk;” ak kole “Ii Kamuktaindennyu.”" 
Hosea3:1 Ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ui kogeny ak icham kwondo ne chamat eng' chorwennyi ak ko chepkugonio, ko uu ye chamei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piigap Israel agot nganda weekyingei kamuktaik, ak kochamei magatinigap sabibuk che yamyotiin.”" 
Hosea3:2 Ki aal anyun kwonyooto eng' fedhaisyek taman ak muut ak baale che po homer agenge ak nusu. 
Hosea3:3 Ak ki aleenji, “Itebye ko ii nenyu eng' peetuusyek che chaang'; meyae kugoinatet amat iegu osotyotap chii age tugul, ma yae ko uu nooto agane eng' inyee.”" 
Hosea3:4 Amu tebyei piigap Israel peetuusyek che chaang' ama tinyei laitoryat, ama tinyei pounindet, ama tinyei tiseiywot, ama tinyei toloita, ama tinyei ephod anan terapik." 
Hosea3:5 Ye ibata koweek piigap Israel ak kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ak Daudi laitoryandenywa; pwaanjin `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak myeeindonyi eng' kaiyweisyet eng' peetuusyek che po let. 
Hosea4:1 Ogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek piigap Israel; amu ting'ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoot piik che menyei emet. Ma miitei imanit anan rireenet, ak ma mi naet ne po Kamuktaindet eng' emet." 
Hosea4:2 Ma mi kiit age kobatee chubisyet, lembechek ak rumisyet, choorseet ak ibeetapkei, tesoksei ak isubegei rumisyet." 
Hosea4:3 Riirei anyun emet, ak nyaluli age tugul ne menyei olooto, kobooto tyong'igap timiin ak toriitigap parak, ee agot njireenigap nyanja ko pegu ak icheek." 
Hosea4:4 Ago amat kotiiyo chii eng' chooto, anan koger kong', amu uu `piiguk icheek che ibeligei ak tisiindet." 
Hosea4:5 Ibuti peet, ak obutosi kobooto maotyot kemoi, ak abar komet." 
Hosea4:6 Ki keng'em piikyuk amu ma tinyei naet; amu ki ieesye naet, aesyoin agane si ma iegu tisiindet eng' anee. Ak amu ki iutye ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindeng'ung', autye agane lagoguk." 
Hosea4:7 Ko uu ye kitesak, ko uu nooto kitesak koyaiywo tengekto; awale toroornatennywa koek teweernateet." 
Hosea4:8 Paegei icheek tengektap piikyuk, ak koboiboitune yaityennywa." 
Hosea4:9 Ak kiit ne uu eng' piik, ko uu nooto eng' tisiindet; ak abire icheek amu ortinwekwak, ak ayaakyi poisyonikwak." 
Hosea4:10 Amisyei, ama piyang'dos; yaei kugoinatet ama tesoksei; amu ki kometa anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kobegechi" 
Hosea4:11 kugoinatet. Divaik ak divaik che leelach, ko istoi kaguiyet." 
Hosea4:12 Soomei piikyuk kirwooget eng' keetiik, ak iboorchin icheek kiroktonywa. Amu ki imaas icheek `sabeetap kugoinatet, ak ki koba koyai kugoinatet, kometo Kamuktaindennywa." 
Hosea4:13 Enyei tiseiywek eng' tuloonook parak, ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng' tuloonook, eng' kelutap keetiik, keetiik alak che uu siliboik, ak keetiigap alayet, amu myee urwennywa. Nooto anyun yaei tiibiikwok kugoinatet, ak koyai murerenikwok ibeetapkei." 
Hosea4:14 Ma pirei tiibiikwok ye yaei kugoinatet, anan murerenikwok ye yaei ibeetapkei; amu mastoi icheeget kobooto che yaei kugoinatet, ak koenyei tiseiywek kobooto chepkugonik; ak kobutyo piik che ma iguitos." 
Hosea4:15 Agot ngiyae inyee Israel kugoinatet, ko mat koyai Judah. Amobwa Gilgal, anan otogoste Beth-aben, anan oyosye ole, “Ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Hosea4:16 Ko uu rooryat ne uui met, ko ki kongelel Israel; paei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor anyun icheek ko uu aarwetap keechiir eng' ole paraa." 
Hosea4:17 Ki konamgei Ephraim ak kanamonik; pagakte ineegei. 
Hosea4:18 Ki komindililitu tuguukwak che eei, yaei kugoinatet kotugul; chamei pounikyik teweernateet miising'." 
Hosea4:19 ki kotuch usoonet ineendet eng' kebebaikyik; ak ililandos amu tiseiywekwak. 
Hosea5:1 Ogas niito, ee okweek tisiik! Oep iit, okweek kootap Israel! Ogas komyee, ee kootap laitoryat, amu nyoonjinok kirwooget; amu ki oegu mesteet eng' Mispa, ak mesteet ne uu regereiywot ne kiitoi eng' Tabor." 
Hosea5:2 Ki kotes miising' `pistoik parisyet; ago agere kong' icheek tugul. 
Hosea5:3 Angen Ephraim, ama ung'aat Israel eng' anee. Amu koiyai kugoinatet inyee, ee, Ephraim, ki kong'wanit Israel." 
Hosea5:4 Poisyonikwak koma chamjin icheek koweekyigei Kamuktaindennywa amu tinyei sabeetap kugoinatet, ama ingen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Hosea5:5 Ak paoryani menoteetap Israel eng' tainnyi; ibutos anyun Israel ak Ephraim eng' tengektonywa; ibuti Judah agine kobooto icheek. 
Hosea5:6 Pendi icheek kobooto akwotisyekwak che po keechiirek ak che po tuuga kocheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago ma nyooru ineendet, kigoistoegei `ineendet icheek." 
Hosea5:7 Kigoberber `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kigosich lagok che kipsagarek. Amei `arawet ne kaleel icheek kobooto mbareenikwak. 
Hosea5:8 Oguut igoondit eng' Gibea, ak oguut iryageet eng' Ramah. Owaach eng' Beth-aben; keer ole po let eng' inyee, ee Benjamin." 
Hosea5:9 Egu karaatya Ephraim eng' peetuutap kereetap kong'; ki abooru eng' kwenutap pororyosyegap Israel kiit ne tuun piitu. 
Hosea5:10 Uu pounigap Judah piik che inaktoe kiwoteet. Aroong'jini icheek nereegekyuk ko uu peek. 
Hosea5:11 Kisastoe Ephraim, kityekyin ng'wony eng' kirwooget; amu ki chamei koosup ng'atuutyet." 
Hosea5:12 Auu anyun eng' Ephraim kiptorotyot, ak auu nunateet eng' kootap Judah." 
Hosea5:13 Kingo keer Ephraim myandanyi, ak kogeer Judah mookyik, ko ki wo anyun Ephraim Assyria, ak koyookto keguur laitoryat Jareb. Ago ma imuuchi kosoobok, amainyaiywok mookwok." 
Hosea5:14 Amu aigeitu ng'etundo eng' Ephraim, ak aigeitu ng'etundo ne neran eng' kootap Judah. Agereeri aneendet ak awe; amuti ama piitu chii ne saru." 
Hosea5:15 Aweekyinigei anyun oldanyu, agoi kong'aany chalwoktanywa ak kocheeng'a. Eng' nyalildanywa ko cheeng'a icheek eng' kagiiletapkei." 
Hosea6:1 “Obwa, keeweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu ki kogereerech ak konyaech; ki kobirech ak inyaech." 
Hosea6:2 Isoobech ye ibata peetuusyek aeng'u: ak kong'eeteech eng' peetuut ne po somok, ak kesapche eng' tainnyi." 
Hosea6:3 Ongenai anyun, ongetestai kenai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; mong'u iman ko uu ye eechei: ak nyoonjinech ko uu ropta, ko uu ropta ne po let ne ibisi ng'wony.”" 
Hosea6:4 Ee Ephraim, ayaun nee? Ee Judah, ayaun nee? Amu uu myeeindong'wong' pooldet ne po karon, ak ko uu rewoot ne sip kobetei." 
Hosea6:5 Ki awai anyun icheek eng' maotik; ki abare icheek ng'aleegap kutinnyu: ak uu kirwoogutiguk lapkeiyet ne mong'u. 
Hosea6:6 Amu amache rireenetapkei, ma mache tiseiywot; ak amache naet konai Kamuktaindet kosiir kagoochinoik che kibeelei." 
Hosea6:7 Ago ki kobistoe icheek kayomiset ko uu Adam: ki koberbera eng' olooto. 
Hosea6:8 Gilead ko nganaseetap icheek che yaei tengekto, ki kimurwon eng' korotiik." 
Hosea6:9 Ko uu ye sapchin lugosyegap rebiik chii, ko uu nooto kweanetap tisiik, parisyoti eng' ooreet ne tokyingei Shekem; ee, ki koyai yaityet." 
Hosea6:10 Ki ageer kiit ne samis eng' kootap Israel: mi kugoinatet, Ephraim: ki king'wanit Israel." 
Hosea6:11 Ee Judah, mi kogeny kesisyet ne kigeng'atun, ye tuun amutu kogeny piikyuk che kigeluul." 
Hosea7:1 Ye kata amache asoop Israel, kotook anyun tengektap Ephraim ak yaityetap Samaria; amu poisyee lembechek: ak kwo oriit choriindet, ak kong'emisyei lugeetap rebiik eng' saang'." 
Hosea7:2 Ama ibwaati eng' mugulelwekwak kole abwaati yaityennywa tugul: yiemei icheek anyun poisyonikwak; mi tainnyu chooto. 
Hosea7:3 Iboiboi laitoryat eng' yaityennywa, ak koboiboi pounik eng' lembechekwak." 
Hosea7:4 Icheek tugul ko piik che yaei ibeetapkei; uu kapkoima ole ilaali peelindetap magatiinik; ma iywokyin maat kobooch kityo kokwonykwonyi magatyat agoi koguut. 
Hosea7:5 Ki eeiso pounik kot kobogityo miising' eng' maiyek eng' peetuutap laitoryannyo; ki chuul eunnyi kobooto chotiik. 
Hosea7:6 Amu Ki kochop mugulelwekwak koigei kapkoima, kota kosaptoi icheek: ruei peelindetap magatiinik kemout komugul; lalei karon ko uu maat ne liplibeni." 
Hosea7:7 Peelei piich icheek tugul ko uu kapkoima ak koamei kirwoogikwak; ki kobutyo laitorinikwak tugul: ma mi eng' icheek ne kuura. 
Hosea7:8 Puruchigei Ephraim ak pororyosyek; Ephraim ko magatyat ne ma kiwechwech. 
Hosea7:9 Ki koam kipsagarek kimnateennyi ama naei, ee, mi kalwalek alage yu, komi alage yuun eng' ineendet ama naei." 
Hosea7:10 Ak paoryani menoteetap Israel eng' tainnyi: agot ngo uu nooto koma weekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, anan kocheeng' ineendet eng' chuuto tugul." 
Hosea7:11 Uu Ephraim cheptuget ne perber, ne ma tinyei kaguiyet: kuurei Misiri, pendi Assyria." 
Hosea7:12 Ye pa, aitoochi icheek mestennyu ne uu regereiywot; atururu ko uu toriitigap parak: atigooni ko uu ye ki kogas tuiyennywa." 
Hosea7:13 Pwo eng' icheek! Amu ki koombeniot kometaa: ingonyonji icheek ng'emisyet! Amu ki kongelelja: agot nganda amache atyach icheek, ko ki komwa kora lembechek agobo anee." 
Hosea7:14 Ama riircho eng' mugulelwekwak, ago iteitos eng' itogusyekwak: iyumigei agobo peek ak divaik; ingeleljino." 
Hosea7:15 Agot nganda ki aneet icheek ak agimiit eunekwak, kochobei yaityet agobo anee." 
Hosea7:16 Weektogei, ago ma weekyingei ineendet ne mi parak; uu kwanget ne itustusoot: kibarei pounikwak eng' rotwetap chok amu nereegegap ng'elyebwekwak: egu niito chotisyennywa eng' emetap Misiri." 
Hosea8:1 Kuut iryageet. Nyoonji kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu kipsiichit: amu ki kobistoe icheek kayomisennyu, ak kongelelji ng'atuutikyuk." 
Hosea8:2 Tuun riirchino kole, kamuktaindennyu, kingenin acheek Israel." 
Hosea8:3 Ki kometa Israel kiit ne ki myee: isubi puunyoot ineendet. 
Hosea8:4 Ki konde laitorinik, ago ma teebena; kigonde pounik ama anai: kiyachigei kanamonik eng' fedhaisyekwak ak eng' thahabusyekwak si kobiit keisto." 
Hosea8:5 Ki kometo moitang'ung', ee Samaria, kagolaany parak nereegekyuk agobo icheek: tyanitu si koek piik che ma tinyei tengek?" 
Hosea8:6 Amu ki punu niito Israel; kiyaei musogindet, ama Kamuktaindet: ee, kitonatoni moitap Samaria." 
Hosea8:7 Amu koolei usoonet, ak kesei kipchurchuryet: ma tinyei peek che tonondos; ma iitos itigap peek; ngot koiiyo, koamei kipsagarek kotarei." 
Hosea8:8 Ki kelugui Israel: mi icheek nguno kwenutap pororyosyek ko uu tereet ne ma kotilei kiy. 
Hosea8:9 Amu kitogosta koba Assyria, ko uu sigiryet ne po timiin ne mi ineegei: ki al Ephraim chamanik." 
Hosea8:10 Ee, agot nganda alei eng' pororyosyek, ayumi anyun icheek; ak kotoi kong'ering'itu amu nyigiisindap lautyet ne ki igoochi icheek `laitorinik ak pounik." 
Hosea8:11 Amu ki kotes Ephraim kapkorosusyek si koyae tengekto, ki koek kapkorosusyechooto tengek eng' ineendet." 
Hosea8:12 Agot nda asirchini ineendet ng'atuutikyuk eng' kaneetisyosyek eliphuusyek taman, kiiti chooto keele tugun che ma nootin." 
Hosea8:13 Ye enyei icheek tiseiywegap kagoochinoikyuk, kogoitoi panyeek ak koamei; ago mataachei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chooto: ibwaati anyun ineendet tengektonywa, ak koiityi pireet amu tengekwogikwak; weekyingei Misiri." 
Hosea8:14 Amu kigoutye Israel Yaindennyi, ak koteech kooriigap laitorinik; ak ki kotes Judah nganasook che ng'ootaatiin: ago ayookyini maat nganasookyik, ak kobeel irimoikyik." 
Hosea9:1 Amat ibaibaitu, ee Israel, ko uu ye poiboitu pororyosyek; amu ki iyaate kugoinatet imete Kamuktaindeng'ung', ak ki icham tuguuk che kigoigoisye eng' rwanyut age tugul." 
Hosea9:2 Mabaei icheek rwanyut ne kiboorsee ak ole kitue sabibuk, ak kobetyi ineendet divaik che leelach." 
Hosea9:3 Ma menyei icheek emetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago weekyingei Ephraim Misiri, ak koam amitwogik che ma tiliileen eng' Assyria." 
Hosea9:4 Ma roong'jin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoigap divaik, ama iboiboi ineendet: uu tiseiywekwak eng' icheek amitwogigap piik che riirtos; king'waniti icheek tugul che amei: po amitwogikwak magennywa; ma ki ibu kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Hosea9:5 Tos oyae nee eng' peetuutap tuiyet ne ki king'at, ak eng' peetuutap igoortap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?" 
Hosea9:6 Ogeero, kigoistoegei ng'emisyet, ago iyumi Misiri icheek, ak tubei Mempis icheek: punjin siwek tuguukwak che korooron che po fedha: mi katook emaisyekwak." 
Hosea9:7 Kagoit peetuusyek che kiitu pireet, kagoit peetuusyek che kiyaaktoisye; naei Israel nooto, “Perber maotyot, amei iywek chiito ne tinyei Kabuuset ne Tiliil” amu ooindap tengektong'ung', ko oo puunyoonding'ung'." 
Hosea9:8 Ki riibindet Ephraim kobooto Kamuktaindennyu: ago ne uu maotyot, komi mesteetap toriitik ortinwekyik tugul, ak komi puunyoondit kootap Kamuktaindennyi." 
Hosea9:9 Kigong'emgei miising', ko uu eng' peetuusyegap Gibea: ibwaati ineendet tengektonywa, iityin pireet amu tengekwogikwak." 
Hosea9:10 Ki ageer ale uu Israel sabibuk eng' surkwen; ki ageer kwanisyekwok ale uu tongoaniatap mogoywet eng' kenyinnyi ne po tai: ago ki pwanji Baal-peor, kotabaanjigei kioto samis, ak koek icheek kiit ne kiwechei ko uu kioto ki chamei icheek." 
Hosea9:11 Tirireni toroornatetap Ephraim ko uu toriityon: ma piitu sigisyet, ama mi ne chiioo, anan ne manachi." 
Hosea9:12 Agot nganda igui lagokwak, agoochini kobegune lagok, si ma ng'et chii. Ee, pwo iman eng' icheek, ye amete icheek!" 
Hosea9:13 Ki kimiinji Ephraim komosta ne karaaran ko uu ye ki ageer Tyro; ago imutyin Ephraim lagokyik parindet. 
Hosea9:14 Igoochi, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tos igoochini nee? Igoochi moet ne rorogu ak kinaik che yamyotiin." 
Hosea9:15 Mi yaityennywa tugul Gilgal; amu ki awech icheek eng' olooto: aoone icheek koba eng' koonnyu amu yaityetap poisyonikwak: ma achame kogeny; pistoik pounikwak tugul. 
Hosea9:16 Kogibir Ephraim, kogoyaam tigityonnywa, ma iyei logoek: ee, nganda iytos abare kora iyotennywa ne chamat." 
Hosea9:17 Oone Kamuktaindennyu icheek, amu ki ma kas iit ineendet: ak koek piik che ombenioti eng' pororyosyek." 
Hosea10:1 Israel ko keetitap sabibuk ne tuneni kot, ne yiei logoekyik: ki kotes ineendet kapkorosusyekyik ko uu ole tee chaang'indap logoekyik; ki koyai icheek tolochik che korooron ko uu ole tee karaaranindap emennyi." 
Hosea10:2 Pcheat muguleldanywa; tinyei ng'oogisto: putei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kapkorosusyekwak, ng'emei tolochikwak." 
Hosea10:3 Mwaei anyun icheek nguno kole ma ki tinyei laitoryat: amu ma kiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak imuuchi laitoryat koyaiywech nee? 
Hosea10:4 Mwaei icheek ng'aleek che po puch, iyastos eng' lembechek koyaei arorutik: piitei anyun kirwooget ko uu keetit ne ng'waan eng' mbareet ne ibatat." 
Hosea10:5 Iyweisyei miising' piik che menyei Samaria amu kanamonigap moegap Beth-aben: amu riirchin piigap emonooto olooto, kobooto tisiikyik che kiboiboitune kanamwonooto po moita amu toroornatennyi ne kiga koistoegei." 
Hosea10:6 Ki ibei moato kwo Assyria koek kagoochinet ne ki ipchin laitoryat Jareb: nyooru Ephraim teweernateet, ak ililanjin Israel kirwoogennyi ineegei." 
Hosea10:7 Ki istoi laitoryatap Samaria, ko uu ye ki istoi pugat eng' peek." 
Hosea10:8 King'emei kogeny komoswek che torooreen che po Aben, tengektap Israel: piitos katook che toorei piich ak che rutei piich eng' kapkorosusyekwak; ak koleenji icheek tuloonook, otuchech ak koleenji tuloonook che mengeechen, oluuljech." 
Hosea10:9 Ee Israel, ki iyai tengekto kobooch peetuusyegap Gibea: kitononso eng' olooto: si ma nam icheek pooryeet eng' Gibea ne paregei ak lagogap tengekto." 
Hosea10:10 Atigooni icheek ye kamach; ak koyumgei pororyosyek koborye, ye kagiratyi icheek pistaosyekwak aeng'." 
Hosea10:11 Ephraim ko rooryat ne ki kineet, ne chamei kobor peek; ago ki asiirte eng' kaatinnyi ne karaaran: aganapchini Ephraim chiito ne laanyei; ibatisyei Judah, pirei Jakobo tindinyekyik." 
Hosea10:12 Ogooljigei eng' imanda, oges eng' rireenet; obalu mbareeng'wong': amu kait peetuusyek che ki cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kot konyo ak korobonjok imanda." 
Hosea10:13 Ki obat yaityet, oges tengekto; ki oam logoegap lembechek: amu ki imang'u oreng'ung', eng' chaang'indap piiguk che nyigoonen." 
Hosea10:14 Piitu anyun wasetapkei eng' piiguk, ak keng'em irimoiguk tugul, ko uu ye king'em Salmon Bet-arbel eng' peetuutap pooryeet: ki kitonaton kamet kobooto lagokyik." 
Hosea10:15 Yaiywok anyun Bethel ko uu nooto amu yaityeng'wong' ne oo: kibarei laitoryatap Israel ko kairir emet. 
Hosea11:1 Ki achame Israel kota ko ming'in, ak ki aguur weeriinnyu komong' eng' Misiri." 
Hosea11:2 Kinga testai aguur icheek, ko testai koistoenagei; ki eng'ji Baalik, ak kobeelji nyamdutik kanamonik che ki kiwai." 
Hosea11:3 Ago ki anee ne ki aneet Ephraim kowendot; ki aganabate eng' eunekyuk; ago ki ma nai kole ki asoobi icheek. 
Hosea11:4 Ki achuutune icheek poroonigap chii, kobooto rogoonigap chamyet; ak ki auu eng' icheek icheeget che istoi chogit eng' tagilgilikwak, ak ki ande amitwogik tainnywa." 
Hosea11:5 Ma weekyingei ineendet emetap Misiri; ago egu `Assyrianindet laitoryandennyi, amu ki eesyo icheek koweigei." 
Hosea11:6 Ak kobutyi rotwetap chok nganasookyik, ak kogees temeleiywekyik, ak koam icheek, amu kirwoogutikwak." 
Hosea11:7 Kagobegechi piikyuk kochuchuigei kometaa: agot ngo kuurso icheek koguurchi icheek ineendet ne mi parak, koma piitu ne itoroori ineendet." 
Hosea11:8 Amuktoi ano ameteen, inyee Ephraim? Amuktoi ano asaruun, inyee Israel? Amuktoi ano ayain iige Adma? Amuktoi ano ayain iige Seboim? Kagowalak muguleldanyu, kagorira moo." 
Hosea11:9 Ma yae koroomnatetap nereegekyuk, ma weeksei ang'eme Ephraim: amu aa Kamuktaindet, ma aa chii; Ineendet ne Tiliil ne mi kwenung'ung': machute nganaseet." 
Hosea11:10 Pendoti icheek kosuboti Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne poriseni ko uu ng'etundo: amu poriseni ineendet, ak kobwa lagok kobotanionu kobunu cherongo." 
Hosea11:11 Pwoonei kobotanionu ko uu toriityon ne mang'une Misiri, ak ko uu cheptuget ne mang'une emetap Assyria: ak agoochi icheek komeny kooriikwak, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Hosea11:12 Yiemena Ephraim lembechek, koyiemena kootap Israel ng'aalseet: ago pounisyei Judah kora kobooto Kamuktaindet, ak koyanaat eng' Ineendet ne Tiliil." 
Hosea12:1 Paegei Ephraim usoonet, ak kosuboti usoonetap kong'asiis; tesei kotugul lembechek ak ng'emisyet; ak koyomisegei kobooto Assyria, ak keip mwanik koba Misiri." 
Hosea12:2 Ibeligei kogeny Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak Judah, ak kobir Jakobo ko uu ortinwekyik; yaakyin ineendet ko uu poisyonikyik." 
Hosea12:3 Ki nam kwaryatap ng'eetap kamet komi moo; ak ki tinyei kimnateet kobooto Kamuktaindet ko kagoeet: 
Hosea12:4 ee, ki tinyei kimnateet koterteer malaikaiyat, ak ki iterteer. Ki riir, ak kosa ineendet: kinyoorchi `ineendet Bethel, ak ki ng'alaalwech eng' olooto;" 
Hosea12:5 ineendet Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet ne po lugoosyek; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko kainennyi. 
Hosea12:6 Iweekyigei anyun Kamuktaindeng'ung': riip rireenet ak kirwooget, ak igen Kamuktaindeng'ung' kotugul." 
Hosea12:7 Chemung'araindet ineendet, mi eunnyi tuguugap lembech che kegerisye che po ng'aalseet: chamei kochiile piich." 
Hosea12:8 Ak ki mwa Ephraim kole iman, kaaegu mogoryot, kaanyooru mogornateet; ma tuun nyooru icheek yaityet ne kitengekto, eng' poisyonikyuk tugul." 
Hosea12:9 Ago aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobooch emetap Misiri; taagoonin kogeny imeny emaisyek, ko uu eng' peetuusyegap igoorto ne ki king'at." 
Hosea12:10 Ki ang'alaalji maotik, ak ki ates ng'ang'utik; ak ki aboisyee kalewenaik eng' poisyetap maotik." 
Hosea12:11 Tos mi tengek Gilead? Puch piikwak tugul; enyei kiruugik eng' Gilgal: kapkorosusyekwak ko uu koik che kagiruruuch eng' mbar ne ibatat. 
Hosea12:12 Ak kimwechi Jakobo emetap Aram, ak ki otis Israel agobo osotyot, ak ki iyagis si kobiit konyoor osotyot." 
Hosea12:13 Ak ki imoong' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Israel eng' emetap Misiri eng' maotyot, ak kiriiboot maotyot ineendet." 
Hosea12:14 Kitagis miising' Ephraim: nooto anyun tebee korotiikyik ineendet, ak koweekyi Kiptaiyandennyi ineendet teweernatennyi." 
Hosea13:1 Ye kingo ng'alaal Ephraim, kobiit potanet; kiitoroorgei eng' Israel: ago kime ye ki ingelel eng' Baal." 
Hosea13:2 Ak yaei nguno icheek tengekto kosiir, ak koyachinegei fedhaisyekwak kanamonik che kitanyi, ki yai kanamonik ko uu naennywa, po chooto tugul poisyetap kitang'ik: mwaei agobo tuguuchooto kole, ingong'utut moek piik che eng'sei." 
Hosea13:3 Kergeitu anyun ak poldetap karon, ak rewoot ne sip kobetei, ak ko uu meteteek che ibei kipchurchuryet eng' rwanyut ne kiboorsee, ak ko uu iyeto ne mandoe soiyet." 
Hosea13:4 Ago, aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung' kobooch emetap Misiri: amecheeng'jigei kamuktain ne teer, kobatena aneege, ama mi yetindet age kobatena." 
Hosea13:5 Ki ariibin teer eng' surkwen, eng' emetap kemeut ne oo." 
Hosea13:6 Kibiyong'so ko uu kiit ne ki uu ole ki agete; kibiyong'so, ak kiitoroorgei eng' mugulelwekwak: kigoutyeno anyun." 
Hosea13:7 Auu anyun eng' icheeget ng'etundo: asapchini eng' ooreet ko uu cheplanget: 
Hosea13:8 kituitosi ak icheek ko uu magalaluut ne kagibare aarekyik, ak agereer kwambelelyetap mugulelwekwak: ak ageesu icheek eng' yooto ko uu ng'etundo; tonatoni tyondap timiin icheek." 
Hosea13:9 Ng'emisyeng'ung' niito, ee Israel, amu igirindaa, igirindoi toretindeng'ung'." 
Hosea13:10 Mi ano anyun laitoryandeng'ung', si kobiit kosaruun eng' nganasoguk tugul? Ak mi ano kirwoogiguk, che ki imwa ile, Koono laitoryat ak pounik?" 
Hosea13:11 Ki agoonin laitoryat eng' nereegekyuk, ak ki aiste eng' nereegekyuk." 
Hosea13:12 Ratat yaityetap Ephraim, konorat tengektanyi." 
Hosea13:13 Pwaanjin ineendet aragenosyek che po kwondo ne machei kosigiis: ineendet ko weeriit ne ma ng'oom; amu kait peetuut ne ma nyoljin kota kotebee moo. 
Hosea13:14 Atyachi icheek komong' eng' kimnateet ne po kererit; asaru icheek eng' meet. Ee meet, mi ano korotweguk? Ee kererit, mi ano ng'emisyeng'ung'? Ma awale kabwaatutikyuk." 
Hosea13:15 Agot ngo nyoor perurto ineendet eng' kwenutap tupchosyekyik, konyonei usoonetap kong'asiis, togosu kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' surkwen, ak koteeny kondanyi ne po peek, ak koteeny kondametunnyi: luulei konorwetap tuguukyik tugul." 
Hosea13:16 Ibei Samaria ng'oogistonyi; amu ki kongelelji Kamuktaindennyi: ibutos eng' rotwetap chok; kitonatoni lagokwak, ak kegereer kwonyiikwak che tamonosyek." 
Hosea14:1 Ee Israel, weekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'; amu ki ibut eng' tengektong'ung'." 
Hosea14:2 Ip ng'aleek, ak iweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ileenji ineendet: Iste tengekwogik tugul, ak itaach che myach: kigoitoi anyun kagoochinetap kutusweekyok ne kata kigoitoi kiruugik." 
Hosea14:3 Ma sarwech Ashur; ma kilaanye paraisisyek: ama keleenjini kogeny poisyonigap eunekyok, Oo kamuktaikyok: amu nyoorunenen rireenet icheek che ma tinyei kwanisyek." 
Hosea14:4 Asoobi kachuchugeng'wong' pogei, achame icheek miising': amu kogoistoegei ineendet nereegekyuk." 
Hosea14:5 Aigeitu rewoot eng' Israel: yiei ineendet ko uu taapteet ne karaaran, ak kowakta tigitikyik ko uu Lebanon." 
Hosea14:6 Iwaktoi mooriikyik, ak koigei mseituni karaaranindanyi, ak koigei siiptanyi Lebanon." 
Hosea14:7 Weeksei icheeget che menyei urwennyi; saptos ko uu peek, ak koyiei ko uu keetitap sabibuk: igeitu ng'uunennyi ne po divaigap Lebanon." 
Hosea14:8 Tuun mwaei Ephraim kole, ta keting'egei nee kogeny ak kanamonik? Kaawolu, ak ageer ineendet: auu piribiret ne tuon; punwa logoeguk." 
Hosea14:9 Ng'oo ne ng'oom, si koguiyo tuguuchuuto? Ng'oo ne utaat, si konai tuguuchooto? Amu lititen ortinwegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak pendotee che po iman ortinwechooto; ago ibutyin olooto pistoik." 
Joel1:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joel weeriitap Pethuel kole," 
Joel1:2 Ogas ng'olyoondoni, okweek poisyek, oep iit, okweek tugul che omenye emet. Tos ki piit niito eng' peetuusyekwok, anan eng' peetuusyegap kwanisyekwok?" 
Joel1:3 Omwachi lagokwok agobo niito, ak ingomwachi lagokwok lagokwak, ak komwachi lagokwak ibinda age." 
Joel1:4 Ki am chereng'endet che kiituuch munene; ak ki am tinapchet che kiituuch chereng'endet; ak ki am masaek che kiituuch tinapchet. 
Joel1:5 Kimaini chu! Ong'eetyee ak oriirye; owaakye, okweek tugul kimain, amu kumik che anyiny che ki istoi eng' kutusweekwok." 
Joel1:6 Amu kagobookyi emennyu `pororyet pororyet ne oo ak ko kiim; kelekyik ko kelegap ng'etundo, tinyei kipkermet che po ng'etundo ne koget." 
Joel1:7 Kagong'em ketinnyu ne po sabibuk, ak kobach mogoywennyu; ki kobony ak kowiirta; kagoleelagitu mooriikyik." 
Joel1:8 Oteeiye ko uu pergeiyat ne iyuegei kuniet agobo manong'otyotap ming'inatennyi. 
Joel1:9 Kageisto kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin ak kagoochinet ne kieei eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Riirtos tisiik, kiboitinigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joel1:10 Kagong'emak mbareet, riirei emet; amu kageng'em peek, kagoyaamyo divaik che leelach, kagorarta mwanik." 
Joel1:11 Olilanse, ee okweek kabotik, oteiye, ee okweek saborigap keetiigap sabibuk, agobo nganuuk ak baale; amu kagong'emak kesisyet." 
Joel1:12 Kagoyaam keetitap sabibuk, ak kagores mogoywet. Kagoyaam keetitap logoek, kobooto tiiret agine, ak keetit age ne po logoek, ee kagoyaamyo keetiik tugul che po mbar; ee iman, kagores poiboiyet eng' weeriigap piik." 
Joel1:13 Ogermenegei kuniok ak oteeiye, okweek tisiik; owaach, okweek kiboitinigap kaptisisyet; obwa, osyep kuniok kemout komugul, okweek kiboitinigap Kamuktaindennyu! Ka kiet kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin ak kagoochinet ne kieei eng' kootap Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Joel1:14 Otabaan karugutetapkei, oguur tuiyet ne po kaming'inetapke. Oyum poisyek kobooto piik tugul che menyei emet kobwa kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ak oriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joel1:15 Pwo amu peetuunooto! Amu kagoriik peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak nyoonei ko uu ng'emisyet ne punu Ineendet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Joel1:16 Tos ma ki isto amitwogik kegeerei, ee, kobooto poiboiyet ak kagasetapkei eng' kootap Kamuktaindennyo?" 
Joel1:17 Nundos kesweek eng' ng'ung'unyekwak; kagong'emogis chogenik, kagebut chogenik; amu kagoyaamyo peek." 
Joel1:18 Tigendos tyong'ik ne tya! Kaiimgei akwotisyegap tuuga, amu ma mi ole agete; ee, nyalildos akwotisyegap keechiirek." 
Joel1:19 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ariirchinin; amu kagogees maat susweegap surkwen, ak kagolalyo keetiik tugul che po timiin." 
Joel1:20 Ee, isyeng'jinin tyong'igap timiin, amu kagoteenyo kereruusyek ak kagogees maat susweegap surkwen." 
Joel2:1 Oguut iryageet eng' Zion, ak owaach eng' tulweennyu ne tiliil! Ingobotanso piik tugul che menyei emet, amu nyoonei peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee kagoriik," 
Joel2:2 peetuutap mesundeito ak tuindo, peetuutap poolik ak mesundeito ne nyigiis. Ko uu ye machei koorir emet eng' tuloonook; kabwa lugeet ne oo ak ko kiim, ne ki tomo kobiitu ne uu nooto, ama kobiitu ne uu icheek kogeny, eng' kenyiisyegap ibinwek che chaang'." 
Joel2:3 Amisyei maat eng' tainnywa; ak lalei liplibenetap maat eng' let. Eng' tainnywa ko uu emet mbareetap Eden, ak kagoek surkwen kityo ole po let; ak ma piitu ne kachilile icheek." 
Joel2:4 Uu itoondanywa itoondap paraisisyek, ak korwaei ko uu piik che ketei paraisisyek." 
Joel2:5 Uu rwaennywa kirgirenetap kariisyegap lugeet rwaei eng' tuloonook parak, uu cheetap liplibenetap maat ne peelei mobeek, uu piik che kiimeen che tetegei eng' pooryeet." 
Joel2:6 Pichiityin pororyosyek eng' tainnywa, walaksei togoochigap piik tugul amu kaiyweisyet." 
Joel2:7 Ruaei ko uu che nyigoonen; laanyei irimeet ko uu piigap lugeet; wendi age tugul ooreennyi kotokyingei tai, pendi kibagenge." 
Joel2:8 Ama toortai `age age; wendi age tugul eng' ooreennyi: siarei kariik, ama mastoi." 
Joel2:9 Torombenjin nganaseet; rwaei eng' irimeet; laanyei kobendi kooriik oriit; chutei tirisyok ko uu chooriik. 
Joel2:10 Potani emet eng' tainnywa; potandos kipsengwet: imenitu asiista ak arawet, ama kooluu kecheik." 
Joel2:11 Ak kotwek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' taitap lugeennyi; amu oo kabuureitanyi; amu kiim ineendet ne yaei ng'olyoondennyi kosulda; amu oo peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak komuisei miising'; ng'oo ne imuuchi komuita? 
Joel2:12 Ago mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole oweekyage agot nguno eng' mugulelwekwok tugul, eng' karugutetapkei, ak eng' riirek, ak eng' kateeiyet:" 
Joel2:13 ak ogereer mugulelwekwok, amogereer ngoroikwok, ak oweekyigei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong': amu tinyei myeeindo ineendet ak ko nyiitaat rireenet, ma sip konereechi, ak tinyei rireenet ne oo, ak kowalei kabwaatutikyik eng' yaityet." 
Joel2:14 Ng'oo ne ingen ngo tos ma week ak kowal kabwaatutikyik, ak kobagaakta kaberuret eng' ole kabunei, amu kagoochinetap peek che ng'ootiin ak kagoochinet ne kieei ne kigoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'?" 
Joel2:15 Oguut iryageet eng' Zion, otabaan karugutetapkei, oguur tuiyet ne po kaming'inetapkei:" 
Joel2:16 oyum piik, oanyiny tuiyet, oyum poisyek, oyum lagok, kobooto che chuchuni: ingomong' sandet eng' koonnyi ne po oriit, ak ingomong' agine murereet eng' koonnyi." 
Joel2:17 Ingoriiryo tisiik, kiboitinigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' kwenutap keterut ak kaptisisyet, ak ingomwa kole, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, riiree piiguk, amegoochi poroteng'ung' kechot, kot koboi pororyosyek icheek: amu nee anyun si komwa pororyosyek kole, mi ano Kamuktaindennywa?" 
Joel2:18 Ki am ng'etkong' anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor amu emennyi, ak ki riiree piikyik." 
Joel2:19 Ak ki wolji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik koleenji, ogeero, ayookwok peek ak divaik ak mwanik, ak obiyong'se eng' chooto: amayaok kogeny oegu che kichotei eng' pororyosyek:" 
Joel2:20 ago aistoi kolooit eng' okweek lugeet ne punu murot kaataam, ak aoone kwo emet ne ong'ateet ak ko surkwen, pendi che indoi kotokyingei nyanjetap Mediterenian ne mi kong'asiis, kobendi che letu nyanjet ne mi cherongo; ak kobul, ak kong'u ne samis, amu kogoyai tuguuk che eecheen." 
Joel2:21 Ee emoni, ameiywei, igaskei ak ibaibaitu, amu kogoyai Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tuguuk che eecheen." 
Joel2:22 Amoiyweisye, okweek tyong'igap timiin, amu ta kobitoos susweek eng' surkwen, amu yiei keetit logoekyik, yiei komyee mogoywet ak keetitap sabibuk." 
Joel2:23 Ogaaskei anyun, okweek lagogap Zion, ak oboiboitu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong': amu koonok ropta ne po tai ko uu ye nyolu, ak koonu ropta korobonjok, ropta ne po tai ak ne po let, ko uu eng' tai." 
Joel2:24 Ak konyi peek rwanyusyek che kiboorsee, ak kong'irtagei divaik ak mwanik eng' ole itendenjin." 
Joel2:25 Ak ageerwok che po kenyiisyek che ki am chereng'endet, ak tinapchet, masaek, ak munene, lugeennyu ne oo ne ki ayoogu konyo kwenung'wong'." 
Joel2:26 Ak oam che chaang' ak obiyong'se, ak olasu kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ne kiyaiywok tuguuk che kikwong'ee: ak ma kolilaandos piikyuk kogeny." 
Joel2:27 Ak onai ole ami kwenutap Israel, ak onai ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', ama mi age: ak ma kolilaandos piikyuk kogeny." 
Joel2:28 Ak ye ibata chooto, ko tuun aroong'jini Kabuusennyu piik tugul; ak komaoten weeriikwok ak tiibiikwok, irwotyin poisyekwok karwotitaosyek, keerei murenikwok ng'ang'utik:" 
Joel2:29 ak aroong'jini kogeny Kabuusennyu otwogik che murenik ak tiibiik eng' peetuusyechooto. 
Joel2:30 Ak abarte kwang'utik eng' kipsengwet ak eng' ng'wony, korotiik ak maat ak tolochigap iyeto." 
Joel2:31 Ak koimenit asiista, ak koigei korotiik arawet, kotom koit peetuut ne oo ne imuisei ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Joel2:32 Ak tuun kisaru age tugul ne kuurei kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu tuun miitei che chilildos eng' tulweetap Zion ak Jerusalem, ko uu ye ki komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak tuun kuurei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor alak eng' icheek che ki ng'et." 
Joel3:1 Amu, ogeero, tuun ayumi pororyosyek tugul eng' peetuusyechooto, ak eng' peetuunooto, ye tuun aweech kogeny che kiga keluul che po Judah ak Jerusalem," 
Joel3:2 ak amut icheek koba atebweetap Jehoshaphat; ak arwookyi icheek eng' olooto amu piikyuk ak amu porotennyu Israel, che ki koseerchi pororyosyek, ak kopchei emennyu." 
Joel3:3 Ak kigoseer parbareek agobo piikyuk: ak ki kogoito ng'etet agobo chepkugoniot, ak ki alda chepto agobo divaik, si kobiit koe." 
Joel3:4 Ee Tyro, ak Sidon, ak komoswek tugul che po Philistia, otile nee eng' anee? Tos ogeerwo kiy ne po kageeret? Ak ngot ogeerwo, aweekwok kioto konyo meting'wong' eng' yooto, eng' chokyinet." 
Joel3:5 Amu ko uu ye ki oip fedhaisyekyuk ak thahabusyekyuk, ak oip tuguukyuk che korooron miising' koba hekalusyekwok;" 
Joel3:6 ki oalde kogeny lagogap Judah ak lagogap Jerusalem oaldochi weeriitap Yunanik, si kobiit omut kolooegitu eng' kiwotennywa:" 
Joel3:7 ogeero, ang'eeti icheek komong' eng' ole ki oaldochi, ak aweekwok konyo meting'wong' kioto ogeerunena;" 
Joel3:8 ak aalde weeriikwok ak tiibiikwok koba eutap lagogap Judah, ak koaldochi icheek piigap Sabe, pororyet ne loo: amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito." 
Joel3:9 Omwaite ng'olyoondoni eng' pororyosyek; ochop lugeet: oong'et piik che nyigoonen; ingorik murenik tugul che po lugeet, ingotogos." 
Joel3:10 Otany mogomboikwok che po tuuga koek rotoogap chok, ak otany chepkesokwok koek ng'otwek: ingomwa ne nyalulat, kole, aa kiim." 
Joel3:11 Ochogu, obwa, okweek pororyosyek tugul che omi komoswek tugul ak oyumgei: ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, igoochi cheguuk che nyigoonen kochoorgei kobwa yu." 
Joel3:12 Ingong'eetkei pororyosyek, ak kobwa atebweetap Jehoshaphat: amu atebye eng' olooto ak arwookyi pororyosyek tugul che mi komoswek tugul." 
Joel3:13 Ogese chepkeswet, amu kagoruryo: obwa, otyech; amu kagonyi ole kitue divaik, ing'irtogei eng' ole itendenjin, amu oo yaityennywa." 
Joel3:14 Piik che chaang', piik che chaang' che mi atebweet ne kitilee ng'aleek! Amu kagoriikyi peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' atebweet ne kitile ng'aleek." 
Joel3:15 Imenitu asiista ak arawet, ama kooluu kecheik," 
Joel3:16 ak pooriseni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion, ak kotwek eng' Jerusalem; ak potandos kipsengwet ak ng'wony: ago egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole mwechin piikyik, ak koek irimeet eng' piigap Israel." 
Joel3:17 Onai anyun ole aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong', amenye Zion tulweennyu ne tiliil: tiliiliitu anyun Jerusalem, ama kobunei toek kogeny." 
Joel3:18 Ak saune peetuunooto divaik che anyiny tuloonook, ak rootune cheego tuloonook che mengeechen, ak koroot peek che chaang' eng' kereruusyek tugul che po Judah; ak komong' kondametutap peek eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koobis atebweetap Shitim." 
Joel3:19 Kuberi Misiri, ak koek Edom surkwen ne kigoguber, amu koroomnateet ne ki kiyachi lagogap Judah, amu ki kotumda korotiik che ma tinyei tengek eng' emennywa." 
Joel3:20 Ago tebyei Judah koigeny, ak kotebyei Jerusalem eng' ibinwek tugul." 
Joel3:21 Ak aanyiny korotiikwak che tomo aanyiny: amu menyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion. 
Amos1:1 Ng'aleegap Amos, ne ki agenge eng' mestowegap Tekoa, ng'ang'uut ne ki keer agobo Israel eng' peetuusyegap Uzziah laitoryatap Judah, ak eng' peetuusyegap Jeroboam weeriitap Joash laitoryatap Israel, eng' kenyiisyek aeng' kotom kobotan emet." 
Amos1:2 Ki mwa kole, Pooriseni Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' Zion, ak kotwegu eng' Jerusalem; ak koriiryo ole iyagisye mestoweek, ak koyaam walitap Karmel." 
Amos1:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Damasko amu pistaosyekyik somok, ee agot ang'wan, amu kogobire Gilead tuguugap kariik che kibore peek." 
Amos1:4 Ara ayookyini maat kootap Hazael, ak kobeel irimosyegap laitoryat Ben-Hadad." 
Amos1:5 Ak airii temeleiywotap Damasko, ak abar ne menyei atebweetap Aben, kobooto ineendet ne namei kirokto ne po laitornatet ne punu kootap Eden. Ak keluul piigap Syria, koba Kir, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos1:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Gaza amu pistaosyekyik somok, ee agot ang'wan; amu ki imut piik tugul koek luulenik, si kogoito koba Edom." 
Amos1:7 Ara ayookyini maat irimeetap Gaza, ak kobeel irimosyekyik." 
Amos1:8 Aistoi ne menyei Ashdod, ak ineendet ne namei kirokto ne po Askelon; ak aweech eunnyu aborye Ekron, ak lustos che ki ng'et che po Philistiik, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos1:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Tyro amu pistaosyekyik somok, ee agot ang'wan; amu ki igoito piik tugul koba Edom, ama ibwaat kayomisutyet ne po che tupcho." 
Amos1:10 Ara ayookyini maat irimeetap Tyro, ak kobeel irimosyekyik." 
Amos1:11 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Edom, amu pistaosyekyik somok, ee agot ang'wan; amu ki onee tupchennyi rotwetap chok, ak ki isto rireenetapkei tugul. Ki nereechi miising' kotugul, ak kigonor nereegekyik koigeny." 
Amos1:12 Ara ayookyini maat Teman, ak kobeel irimosyegap Bosra." 
Amos1:13 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Maawechi pireet ne abire lagogap Ammon amu pistaosyekyik somok, ee agot ang'wan; amu kogogereer kwonyiik che tamonosyek che po Gilead, kole si kobiit kotes kiwotennywa." 
Amos1:14 Ara anaami maat eng' irimeetap Rabbah, ak kobeel irimosyekyik che po laitoryat, kobooto waagaat eng' peetuutap pooryeet, kobooto usoonet ne oo eng' peetuutap kipchurchuryet." 
Amos1:15 Ak keluul laitoryannywa, ineendet kobooto pounikyik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos2:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ma aweechi pireet ne abire Moab amu pistaosyekyik somok, ee agot ang'wan; amu ki peel kawegap laitoryatap Edom kot koek oreek." 
Amos2:2 Ayookyini anyun maat Moab ak kobeel irimosyegap Keryot; ak kome Moab eng' wasetapkei, waagaat ak cheetap iryageet." 
Amos2:3 Aistoi kirwoogindet eng' kwenunnyi, ak abar pounikyik tugul kobooto ineendet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos2:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: Amu pistaosyekyik somok, ee agot ang'wan, ko ma aweechi pireet ne abire Judah amu kogoesyo ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama riip kayomisutikyik. Kigogoochi icheek lembechek che ki isubi kong'etee kwanisyekwak komaasta." 
Amos2:5 Ara ayookyini maat Judah ak kobeel irimosyegap Jerusalem. 
Amos2:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: Amu pistaosyekyik somok, ee agot ang'wan, ko ma aweechi pireet ne abire Israel amu kigoaldae che po iman fedha, ak koaldae che ma tinyei kiy kweonik." 
Amos2:7 Ityorchin metowegap kibananook temburyegap ng'wony, ak komaas ortinwegap che talaen, ak koba kwanda ak weeriinnyi koipkei ak chepto agenge, si kong'waniit kainennyu ne tiliil." 
Amos2:8 Eng' ole neegitee kapkorosuut age tugul, koruiye `icheek ngoroik che kiname pesendo, ak koe divaik eng' kootap kamuktaindennywa, che ki kiibe piik che ki kirwookyin." 
Amos2:9 Ago ki abar Amorindet eng' tainnywa, ne ki aechin koindonyi ak taragonik, ak ki kiim ko uu keetiik che uueen; ak ki ang'em logoekyik eng' ole po parak, ak tigitikyik eng' ole po ng'wony." 
Amos2:10 Ki amutwak kogeny otogosu eng' emetap Misiri, ak andoiywok kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen, si kobiit onam emetap Amorik kobunjook." 
Amos2:11 Ki ande alak eng' weeriikwok koek maotik, ak ande alak eng' murenikwok koek Nasiritik. Tos ma uu nooto, ee okweek piigap Israel? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos2:12 Ago koigoochi Nasiritik divaik koe; ak ong'at maotik oleenji, “Amat omaoten.”" 
Amos2:13 Ogeero, agiichok eng' ole omi, ko uu ye chiilsei chepkichutit ne nyiitaat ratuutigap peek." 
Amos2:14 Ak kobetyi chepchebindo che mweei, ama igimiti che kiimeen kimnateennywa, ama sarugei ne nyigan." 
Amos2:15 Amaimuuchi kotonon ineendet ne namei kwanget, ma sarugei ineendet ne chepchep, ama sarugei ineendet ne laanyei paraisiit." 
Amos2:16 Ak komwei aach ngor eng' peetuunooto ineendet ne nyigan eng' che nyigoonen, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos3:1 Ogas ng'olyoondoni kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo okweek, ee piigap Israel, agobo koot komugul ne po Israel ne ki amutu kotogos eng' emetap Misiri:" 
Amos3:2 Okweegei kityo che angen eng' ortinwek tugul che po ng'wony. Nooto anyun aiitwok pireet amu tengekwogikwok tugul. 
Amos3:3 Tos pendat piik aeng'u ngot koma kasyindos? 
Amos3:4 Tos pooriseni ng'etundo eng' timiin ngo ma par tyondo? Tos pooriseni ng'etundo ne neran eng' kebenennyi ngot koma am kiy? 
Amos3:5 Tos ibutyin toriityon mesteet ne mi ng'wony eng' ole ma mi mesteet ne namei ineendet? Tos iwir mesteet ama twa kiy? 
Amos3:6 Tos kiguutei iryageet eng' nganaseet, ama iyweis piik? Tos nyoonjin yaityet nganaseet, ama iyookyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor?" 
Amos3:7 Iman ma yaei kiy Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kotom kong'aang'ji ung'ootyennyi otwogikyik maotik. 
Amos3:8 Kagoborisen ng'etundo, ng'oo ne ma iyweisyei? Kagong'alaal Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko ng'oo anyun ne ma maoteni?" 
Amos3:9 Omwaite eng' kooriigap laitoryat eng' Ashdod, ak eng' kooriigap laitoryat che mi emetap Misiri, ole, oyumjige tuloonoogap Samaria, ak ogeer ole tee wasetapkei ne oo ne mi olooto, ak ole tee sastaosyek che mi kwenunnyi." 
Amos3:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ma ingen icheek koyai ne myee, che konori koroomnateet ak rebisyet eng' kooriikwak che po laitoryat." 
Amos3:11 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Piitu puunyoot ne mi komoswek tugul eng' emet, ak korebenen kimnateng'ung', ak keng'em kooriguk che po laitoryat.”" 
Amos3:12 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ko uu ye saru mestowot keelyek aeng' anan motwet ne po itit eng' kutitap ng'etundo; kisaru anyun ko uu nooto piigap Israel che tebee Samaria eng' luuitap kiit ne kilyeldoe, ak eng' kiplusinik che po aririt che po itoogut." 
Amos3:13 Ogas okweek, ak obaoryanji kootap Jakobo, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek." 
Amos3:14 Eng' peetuut ne tuun aiityini pireet Israel amu pistaosyekyik, aiityini kogeny pireet kapkorosusyegap Bethel, ak keisto kuinoigap kapkorosuut, ak kobutyi ng'wony." 
Amos3:15 Ak abut kootap peetuusyegap kaitityet kobooto ne po peetuusyegap lalang'indo; ak keng'em kooriik che ki kiteege kelegap peeleek, ak kogeskei kooriik che eecheen, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos4:1 Ogas ng'olyoondoni, okweek tuugap Bashan, che miitei tulweetap Samaria, che sastoe kibananook, che tyekyin ng'wony che ma tinyei kiy, che leenjin kiptainikwak, “Oibu, kee!”" 
Amos4:2 Ki koyosyo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tiliilindanyi kole, “Ogeero, pwonjinok peetuusyek, che tuun imutenok kombook, ak komute chekwok che ng'etu kombook che kiname njireenik." 
Amos4:3 Ak omande obun komoswek che kibutok eng' irimeet, kotokyigei age tugul tainnyi; ak owiirchigei Harmon, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos4:4 Obwa Bethel, si ongelelse; obwa Gilgal, si otes pistoet; oibu tiseiywekwok karonet age tugul, ak kebeberwekwok che po taman eng' peetuut age tugul ne po somok;" 
Amos4:5 ak ogoite korosyotap kongoi ne po kiit ne kaginde mermereek, ak omwaite kagoochinoigap chamyet, ak obarte; amu ochame niito, ee piigap Israel, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos4:6 Ki agoonok agine iljet eng' nganasookwok tugul, rartaetap amitwogik eng' komoswekwok tugul, ago tomo oweekyage, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos4:7 Ak ki aeetenak kogeny ropta, ye ki tomo arawek somogu si koit kesisyet. Ki agoochi korobonji nganaseet age, ak aeete ropta nganaseet age. Kirobonji komosta ne ming'in, ak ki yaam komosta ne ma robonji." 
Amos4:8 Koombeniot anyun nganasook aeng'u anan ko somok koba nganaseet age si koe peek, ago ma yam; ago tomo oweekyage, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos4:9 Ki abirenok chelalityet ak uchatet, ki am munene mbareenikwok che chaang' ak mbareenikwok che po sabibuk, ak mogoonikwok ak mseitunikwok; ago tomo oweekyage, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos4:10 Ki ayookwok koroito ko uu ni ki po Misiri; ki abar murenikwok eng' rotwetap chok, ak ki akweri paraisisyekwok; ak ki ayai pulatetap nganaseng'wong' kotogos kot koit seruunekwok; ago tomo oweekyage, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos4:11 Ki ang'em ageesu alak eng' okweek, ko uu ye king'em Kamuktaindet Sodom ak Gomorah kogees, ak kio uu mecheita ne kaginemune maat; ago tomo oweekyage, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos4:12 Ayaun ko uu nooto anyun, ee Israel; ak amu ayaun anyun ko uu niito, choboge anyun otuiye ak Kamuktaindeng'ung', ee Israel.”" 
Amos4:13 Amu, keero, ineendet ne yaei tuloonook, koyaei usoonet, ak komwachin chii kabwaatennyi, ineendet ne yaei karonet koimenit, ak kotyechei komoswek che torooreen che po ng'wony; kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek." 
Amos5:1 Ogas ng'olyoondoni amwae eng' riirek agobo okweek, ee kootap Israel." 
Amos5:2 Kagobut, ma kong'eetei kogeny, pergeiyatap Israel; kagewiirta eng' emennyi, ma mi chii ne ing'eeti." 
Amos5:3 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Nganaseet ne kocham komandoe piik eliphuut kong'etyin pogolu, ak ne kocham komandoe piik pogolu kong'etyin tamanu.” Ng'etyin chooto tugul kootap Israel." 
Amos5:4 Amu mwachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kootap Israel kole: “Ocheeng'a si osapche! 
Amos5:5 Amocheeng' Bethel, anan obe Gilgal, amosiirte obe Beer-sheba. Amu kiluulei iman Gilgal, ak koek puch Bethel.”" 
Amos5:6 Ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor si osapche, si ma lal ko uu maat eng' kootap Joseph, ak kobeel Bethel kogees, ama piitu chii ne imisi." 
Amos5:7 Ee okweek che oweechi kirwooget koek ng'wonet, ak owiirchini ng'wony imanda!" 
Amos5:8 Ineendet ne yaei Koremerik ak Kapsomoguk, ak kowalei mesundeito ne nyigiis koek karonet, ak koyaei peetuut koek kemoi; ineendet ne kuurei peegap nyanjet, ak koroong'ji ng'wony; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kainennyi;" 
Amos5:9 ne ipchin che kiimeen ng'emisyet koche, si konyonji ng'emisyet irimeet." 
Amos5:10 Wechei icheek ineendet ne kerei kong' eng' ormariichet, ak kowechei icheek chiito ne mwaei che litit." 
Amos5:11 Amu ki otyechatyech kibananook, ak omage icheek peek eng' kimnateet. Ki oteech anyun kooriik eng' koik che ki kiwai, ago momenye koorchooto; ki omiin mbareenik che korooron che po sabibuk, ago moee divaikwak." 
Amos5:12 Amu angen ole tee chaang'indap pistaosyekwok ak ole tee ooindap tengekwogikwok; okweek che onyalili piik che po iman, che otaache tuguuk che po kagaigaet, ak omaasi che ma tinyei kiy eng' ormariichet si ma nyoor imandanywa." 
Amos5:13 Siisei anyun ne ng'oom eng' peetuusyek che uu chooto; amu yaacheen peetuusyechooto. 
Amos5:14 Ocheeng' che myach ak koma yaityet, si osapche; si kotep kobootok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, ko uu ye omwae." 
Amos5:15 Owech yaityet ak ocham che myach, ak ogimiit kirwooget eng' ormariichet; abeere imuuchi koriiree Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, che ki ng'et che po Joseph." 
Amos5:16 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, ineendet Kiptaiyat, kole, piitu kateeiyet eng' ortinwek tugul che paraen; ak komwa eng' ortinwek tugul kole, pwo! pwo! Ak koguur kabatindet konyo koriir, ak koguur che ingen koteiyo, koriiryo." 
Amos5:17 Ak kobiit riirek eng' mbareenik tugul che po sabibuk; amu abune kwenung'ung', mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos5:18 Pwo eng' okweek che omache peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor! Amu nee si omache peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Mesundeito peetuunooto, ma lapkeiyet;" 
Amos5:19 ko uu ye kamwee `chiito ng'etundo, ak kotuiye magalaluut; anan ko uu chii ne kawo ko ak kotiing'e eunnyi inaat, ak kosus ereneet ineendet." 
Amos5:20 Tos ma imenitu peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ama lapkeitu? Ee, imenitu miising' ama mi kaluunet." 
Amos5:21 Aweche, asase igoorwekwok, amabaibaitune tuiyosyekwok che po kaming'inetapkei." 
Amos5:22 Ee, agot ngo koono kagoochinoikwok che kibeelei ak kagoochinoikwok che po peek che ng'ootiin, ko mataache; ak kagoochinoikwok che po kaalyeet, che po che kiyagi che akwaen koma iiti." 
Amos5:23 Oistoena cheetap tyenwogikwok; amu ma mache agas anyinyindap kibugandinikwok. 
Amos5:24 Ago ingoroot kirwooget ko uu peek, ak ingoroot imanda ko uu aineet ne nyiitaat peek." 
Amos5:25 Ee kootap Israel, tos ki ma oibwa tiseiywek ak kagoochinoik eng' surkwen kenyiisyek artam?" 
Amos5:26 Ee, ki oeet Sakut laitoryandeng'wong', ak Kaiwan kanamonikwok, kecheiyatap kamuktaindeng'wong', che ki oyachigei." 
Amos5:27 Agoitook anyun keluulok, kimutak osiir Damasko, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek." 
Amos6:1 Pwo eng' icheek che mi kaalyeet eng' Zion, ak eng' icheek che kasei kole riibootin eng' tulweetap Samaria, piik che taagunotiin che po che eecheen eng' pororyosyek, che pwaanjin kootap Israel!" 
Amos6:2 Osiirte oba Kalne, ak ogeer; ak obe eng' olooto agoi Hamath ne oo; yeityo ochoorchigei Gath ne po Philistiik. Tos myachen icheek kosiir pounatosyechu? Anan tos oo kiwotennywa kosiir neng'wong'?" 
Amos6:3 Okweek che oistoi kolooit peetuut ne ya, ak oibu ng'echereetap koroomnateet koriik." 
Amos6:4 Pwo eng' icheek che ruitos eng' itogusyek che po kelegap peeleek, ak koiitogei eng' tuguukwak che kilyeldoe, che amei aaregap keechiir che po akweet, ak moek che mi piusyek;" 
Amos6:5 icheek che tyeni tyenwogik che po puch eng' cheetap kibugandet; che chopchingei tuguuk che po tyenwogik, ko uu Daudi;" 
Amos6:6 che eei divaik eng' pagulisyek, ak koiilegei mwanik che korooron; ago ma aragendos agobo nyalildap Joseph." 
Amos6:7 Egu anyun icheek che tai kondoe che kiluulei, ak kogeskei polateet ne po poiboiyetap icheek che iitoigei." 
Amos6:8 Ki koyosyechigei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ineendet Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, kole: “Aweche menoteetap Jakobo, ak aweche kooriikyik che po laitoryat. Asaru anyun nganaseet kobooto tugul che mi oriit.”" 
Amos6:9 Ak ngot kong'et piik tamanu eng' koot agenge, kobegu." 
Amos6:10 Ak ye sut chii `imamet, ne ineendet ne peelei muusto, si koip kawek komong' eng' ko, ak koleenji ineendet ne mi komoswek che po oriit che po koot, “Tos ta omi ak age?” Kowol anyun kole, “Achicha!” Kole anyun, “Siis! Amu ma ki chamwech kemwa kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Amos6:11 Amu, ogeero, ng'atei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kebut koot ne oo kong'emak, ak kebut koot ne ming'in kong'asiagan." 
Amos6:12 Tos rwaei paraisisyek eng' rwandet? Tos ibate `chii eik olooto? Ko owal kirwooget koek kiit ne ng'waan, ak owal logoek che po imanda koek ng'wonet." 
Amos6:13 Okweek che oboiboitune kiit ne po puch, che omwae ole, “Tos ma ki ip eng' kimnateennyo kuinoik kobunjech?”" 
Amos6:14 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindet ne po lugoosyek, kole, “Ee, kootap Israel, nai ni ile, ang'eeti pororyet si obargei, ak konyaliilak kobooch ole kibunei kebendi Lebo-hamath agoi kereruut ne po Arabah.”" 
Amos7:1 Ki iboorwo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: ogeero, ki yai ineendet chereng'enyinik ye kibiitoos tuguuk che po let; ogeero, ki tuguuk che po let che kibiitoos ye kingo kagobata ng'eetap susweek che po laitoryat." 
Amos7:2 Ak ye kingo kagoam susweek kogees eng' emet, ale anyun, “Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asaain ale, nyochi kaat. Tonondoi ano Jakobo? Ming'in inee miising'!”" 
Amos7:3 Ki wal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik agobo niito; kole “Ma piitu ko uu nooto,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos7:4 Ki iboorwo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: kiguur Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maat kobeelisye; ak ki peel rireet ne oo ak konam kobeel emet. 
Amos7:5 Yeityo amwa ale, “Ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asaain ale isiis! Tonondoi ano Jakobo? Ming'in inee miising'!”" 
Amos7:6 Ki wal Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kabwaatutikyik agobo niito; “Ma piitu niito agine,” mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos7:7 Ki iboorwo ineendet ko uu ni: ogeero, kitonone Kiptaiyat ole neegitee inaatut ne ki kilitite porowet, kotinyei eng' eunnyi porowet ne kilititisye." 
Amos7:8 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Amos, igeere nee?” Ak ki ale, “Ageere porowet ne kilititisye.” Ki le anyun Kiptaiyat, Keero, andoi porowet ne kilititisye kwenutap piikyuk Israel; ma abune kogeny ole mi icheek," 
Amos7:9 ak koguber komoswek che torooreen che po Isak, ak kebut oldinwek che tiliileen che po Israel; ak ang'eet abar kootap Jeroboam eng' rotwetap chok." 
Amos7:10 Ki iyookto anyun tisiindet Amasia ne po Bethel keguur Jeroboam laitoryatap Israel, keleenji, “Kogochaamin Amos eng' kwenutap kootap Israel; ma imuuchi emet komuita eng' ng'aleekyik tugul." 
Amos7:11 Amu mwaei Amos kole, ‘Kibarei Jeroboam eng' rotwetap chok, ak keluul iman Israel kimut eng' emennyi.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Ki leenji kogeny `Amasia Amos, “Ee inyee, keerindoni, ui mwechi emetap Judah, iamisye eng' olooto, ak imaoten eng' olooto:" 
Amos7:13 ago mat kota imaoten kogeny eng' Bethel, amu olooto ko oldo ne tiliil ne po laitoryat, ak ko kootap laitornatet.”" 
Amos7:14 Ki wolji anyun `Amos Amasia, koleenji, “Ma aa maotyot ak ma aa weeriitap maotyot. Anee ko aa mestowot ak aa saborindetap mogoonik." 
Amos7:15 Ki kuura Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ayagisyei, ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘Ui maotenji piikyuk Israel.’" 
Amos7:16 Kas anyun nguno ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Imwae inyee ile, ‘Amat imaotenji Israel agobo kiy ne ya, anan imwa ng'olyoo agobo kootap Isak.’" 
Amos7:17 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: ‘Egu osotyondeng'ung' chepkugoniot eng' nganaseet, ak kebare rotwetap chok weeriiguk ak tiibiiguk, ak kepchee porowet emeng'ung'; ak imee inyeendet eng' emet ne ng'waan, ak keluul iman Israel kimut eng' emennyi.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Ki iboorwo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni: Ki mi kitongetap logoek che po kemeut. 
Amos8:2 Ak ki leenjo, “Amos, igeere nee?” Ak ki aleenji, “Ageere kitongetap logoek che po kemeut.” Ki leenjo anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kanyonji kagesunet piikyuk Israel; ma abune kogeny ole mi icheek." 
Amos8:3 Ak koek tyenwogik che po Hekaluut kateiyosyek eng' peetuunooto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; chaang'itu muuswek; eng' siiseet ko wiirtoi muuswechooto eng' komosta age tugul." 
Amos8:4 Ogas ng'olyoondoni, ee okweek che osaasei che ma tinyei kiy, ak ong'emei owoong'u kibananook che po emet," 
Amos8:5 oleen, “Meei au arawet ne kaleel, si kobiit kealde peek? Ak igeesugei au sabato, si kobiit kimarte peek? Si keyai epah koming'init ak keyai shekel koeet, si keyai kaberberisyet eng' tuguuk che kirogendoisye che po ng'aalseet;" 
Amos8:6 kole si kobiit keale kibananook fedha, ak keale che ma tinyei kiy kweonik, ak kealde meteteegap peek.”" 
Amos8:7 Kogoyosyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' telunatetap Jakobo, kole, ma koi autye iman poisyonikwak, agot agenge." 
Amos8:8 Tos ma potani emet amu niito, ak koriir age tugul ne menyei olooto? Ee, ng'eetei komugul ko uu aineet; ak koiimgei ak koteeny kogeny, ko uu aineet ne po Misiri." 
Amos8:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Eng' peetuunooto, agoochini kororokto asiista peet kween, ak agoochini emet koimenit eng' peetuut ne churat." 
Amos8:10 Awale igoorwekwok koek riirek, ak awal tyenwogikwok tugul koek kateiyet; agoochini piik tugul kogermenegei kuniok, ak koam poosto chii tugul; ayae nooto koek che kiriirchin weeriit ne ki kiii ineegei, ak ayae kagesunennyi koek peetuut ne ng'waan.”" 
Amos8:11 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek che ayookyini emet rubeet, ma ne po amitwogik, anan ne po meleldap peek, ago rubeet ne po kasetap ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos8:12 Ak koombeniot kong'etee nyanjet age agoi nyanjet age, ak kong'etee murot kaataam agoi kong'asiis. Tuun rwaati kobendi komosi ak komosi kocheeng'oti ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama tuun nyooru." 
Amos8:13 Eng' peetuunooto ko tuun tanuitos pergeinik che korooron ak murenik, amu melelda." 
Amos8:14 Icheeget che iyastos eng' tengektap Samaria, kole, ‘Ee Dan, ko uu ye sabei kamuktaindeng'ung'’; ak, ‘Ko uu ye sabei ooreetap Beer-sheba’; ibutos chooto ak icheek, amagoi ng'eetyo kogeny.”" 
Amos9:1 Ki ageer Kiptaiyat kotonone ole neegitee kaptisisyet, ak ki le, kwer walisyegap tolochik kot kotumdumgei tugatugik, yeityo itonaton walisyechooto eng' metowegap piik tugul. Ak che ng'etu abare rotwetap chok, mamweei agot agenge eng' icheek, ama chilili agot agenge." 
Amos9:2 Agot ngo pal agoi ye mi che ki kobek, konemu eunnyu eng' olooto; agot ngo togosta kipsengwet, achooru eng' olooto." 
Amos9:3 Agot ngo ung'egei tulweetap Karmel parak, acheeng'e ak anemu eng' olooto; agot ngo ung'enagei eng' nyanjet oriit, ang'ate eng' olooto ereneet si kosus icheek." 
Amos9:4 Agot ngo luul puunikwak, ang'ate rotwetap chok eng' olooto, si kobar icheek; ak atokyigei icheek aipchi yaityet, ma ipchini kiit ne myee." 
Amos9:5 Amu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ko ineendet ne twaei emet si kochoot, ak koriiryo tugul che menyei olooto; ak ng'eetei emet komugul ko uu aineet; ak koteeny kogeny ko uu aineet ne po Misiri." 
Amos9:6 Ineendet ne teechei kooriikyik eng' kipsengwet, ne teechei yiemutyennyi eng' paragutap ng'wony; ineendet ne kuurei nyanjet ak koroong'ji ng'wony; Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kainennyi." 
Amos9:7 Tos mou lagogap Ethiopik eng' anee, ee piigap Israel? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Tos ma amutu Israel kotogos eng' emetap Misiri, ak amutu Philistiik eng' Kaptor, ak amutu piigap Syria eng' Kir?" 
Amos9:8 Keerei konyegap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pounateet ne tinyei tengekto, ak ang'em aiste eng' ng'wony; kobatee ma ng'eme ageesu kootap Jakobo, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Amos9:9 Amu, ogeero, ang'ate, ak aseisei kootap Israel eng' pororyosyek tugul, ko uu ye kiseisei peek eng' kiit ne kiseiseisye, ago ma ibutyin ng'wony paiywat agot ne ming'in." 
Amos9:10 Pegu eng' rotwetap chok kiptengeginik tugul che po piikyuk, che leen, “Ma ityinech yaityet anan konyoorwech.”" 
Amos9:11 Ang'eeti eng' peetuunooto emaitap Daudi ne ki kobut, ak agerate ole kibutok; ak atuuru karatwekyik, ak ateech koigei ne ki po peetuusyek che po keny." 
Amos9:12 Si kobiit konam `icheek piik che ki ng'et che po Edom, kobooto pororyosyek tugul che kimwaitoe kainennyu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne yaei ng'olyoondoniito." 
Amos9:13 Ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, che nyo kosiirtoe chiito ne ibatisyei kesiindet, ak kosiir chiito ne tyechei sabibuk kolindet; ak kosaune tuloonook divaik che anyiny, ak kochootyo tuloonook tugul che mengeechen." 
Amos9:14 Ak amutu kogeny piikyuk Israel che kiga keluul, ak koteech nganasook che kiga koek karatwek ak komeny olooto; ak komiin mbareenigap sabibuk ak koeei divaigap mbareenichooto; ak kobatis ak koam logoegap mbareenichooto." 
Amos9:15 Ak amin icheek eng' emennywa, ama kitutu kogeny eng' emennywa ne ki agoochi, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'." 
Obadiah1:1 Ng'ang'utyetap Obadiah. Mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni agobo Edom: Ki kegas ng'aleek che punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki kiyookto tononjinindet kwo ye mi pororyosyek, koleenji, ong'eetye! Ong'eetye kegirindee ineendet eng' lugeet." 
Obadiah1:2 Keero, tuun aming'inin eng' pororyosyek; tuun kisasin miising'." 
Obadiah1:3 Ki koberberin menoteetap muguleldang'ung', ee, inyee ne imenye ole kibetak eng' rwandet, ne toroor meng'ootennyi; ne mwaei eng' muguleldanyi kole, “Ng'oo ne tururwa?”" 
Obadiah1:4 Agot ngitiriren iwe parak miising' ko uu kipsiichit, agot ngiteech kesweng'ung' eng' ole mi kecheik, atururun eng' olooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Obadiah1:5 Ngot kobwonjin chooriik, ngot kobwonjin rebiik kemoi, kebarin ne tya anyun! Tos machoorsei kot konyoor che yamei? Ngot kobwonjin piik che putei sabibuk, ko tos ma pagaaktoi turoonik?" 
Obadiah1:6 Kisiaktoi ano tuguugap Esau! Kicheeng'doi ano konoraikyik che ung'ootiin! 
Obadiah1:7 Ki kong'aalin che ki onamegei tugul, ki koonin icheek agoi iit kiwoto; ki koterterin piik che ki oting'egei kaalyeet; riigenen mesteet `icheek che amei amitwogiguk, ma tinyei kaguiyet ineendet." 
Obadiah1:8 Eng' peetuunooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Ang'eme piik che utaatiin che po Edom, ak ang'em naet eng' tulweetap Esau?" 
Obadiah1:9 Ak toptobendos mureniguk che nyigoonen, ee Teman, si kobiit kebar chii age tugul eng' tulweetap Esau eng' parisyet." 
Obadiah1:10 Tuchin teweernateet amu koroomnateet ne ki iyachi ng'eetap kamenng'ung' Jakobo, ak kebarin ak keisten koigeny." 
Obadiah1:11 Eng' peetuut ne ki itononi eng' pitoniin, eng' peetuut ne ki ibe toek tuguukyik, ak kochut kipsagarek ormariichokyik, ak koseer parbareek agobo Jerusalem, ko ki iige inyee age eng' icheek." 
Obadiah1:12 Ago amat igeer peetuutap ng'eetap kamenng'ung' eng' peetuutap tiritindanyi, amebaibaitu eng' lagogap Judah eng' peetuutap ng'emisyennywa; anan ing'alaal eng' menoteet eng' peetuutap pichiindo." 
Obadiah1:13 Amechut ormariichetap piikyuk eng' peetuutap nyalildanywa; ee, amegeer usiisyennywa eng' peetuutap nyalildanywa, anan onam tuguukwak eng' peetuutap nyalildanywa." 
Obadiah1:14 Ametonone ole tuiyechin ortinwek, ile itilde piikyik che chilildos; amegoite piikyik che ng'etu eng' peetuutap pichiindo." 
Obadiah1:15 Amu kariikyi `peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyek tugul. Ko uu ye ki iyai, keyaun ko uu nooto; weekyingei meting'ung' poisyoniguk." 
Obadiah1:16 Amu ko uu ye ki oeisee eng' tulweennyu ne tiliil, eeisei ko uu nooto kotugul pororyosyek tugul, ee, eeisei ak koterteeryot, ak koigei tuguuk che ki ma komi." 
Obadiah1:17 Ago piitu che chilildos eng' tulweetap Zion, ak kotiliilit; ak konam kootap Jakobo tuguugap pichooto, kobunji." 
Obadiah1:18 Ak koek kootap Jakobo maat, ak koek kootap Joseph liplibenet, ak koek kootap Esau mobeek, ak kolalyo eng' kwenunnywa ak kobeel kogees, ama ng'etu chii eng' kootap Esau; amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ng'olyoondoniito." 
Obadiah1:19 Ak konam icheek che po murot tai tulweetap Esau kobunji; ak konam icheek che menyei emet ne soi ne po Philistiik; ak konam emetap Ephraim ak emetap Samaria kobunji, ak konam Benjamin emetap Gilead kobunji." 
Obadiah1:20 Ak konam che kiga keluul che po lugoniito po piigap Israel che mi kwenutap Kanaanik, namei icheek kot koit Sarepat; ak namei che kiga keluul che po Jerusalem che mi Separad, nganasook che mi murot tai." 
Obadiah1:21 Ak togosu `saruunik tulweetap Zion korwookyi tulweetap Esau; ak kobunji pounateet `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Jonah1:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jona weeriitap Amitai, koleenji," 
Jonah1:2 “Ng'eet, ui Nineveh, nganasanooto oo, ak ititenji; amu kagotogos yaityennywa tainnyu.”" 
Jonah1:3 Ago king'eet Jona koleen komwechi Tarsis komwee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki choortagei kwo Joppa ak konyoor meeliit ne wendi Tarsis. Ki igoito anyun tuguuk che yamegei ak panda ak kolaany meeliit kobooto alak kole koba tugul Tarsis, komwee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Jonah1:4 Ago ki iyookyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nyanjet usoonet ne oo, ak ki piit kipchurchuryet ne oo miising' eng' nyanjet, kot komach kobutok meeliit." 
Jonah1:5 Ki iyweis anyun kiboitinigap meeliit, ak koriirchi chii age tugul kamuktaindennyi. Ki wiirchi nyanjet tuguuk che ki mi moinget, kole kowisisiit. Ago kiga kwo Jona komoswek che po oriit miising' che po meeliit; ak ki ru, konuuch." 
Jonah1:6 Ki wo anyun kiptaiyatap moinget ole mi ineendet ak koleenji, “Ilyon inyee chiichi irue? Ng'eet, kuur Kamuktaindeng'ung', tamangap kobwaatech Kamuktaindet si ma kibegu.”" 
Jonah1:7 Ak ki leenjigei kiboitinigap moinget, “Nyoo, ak ongeseer parbareek, si kobiit kenai keele kanyonjech yaityoni amu ng'oo.” Ki iseer anyun parbareek, ak kobutyi `parbaryat Jona."
