Jonah1:8 Ki mwachi anyun ineendet koleenji, “Kisoomin keele mwaiwech, po ng'oo yaityoni kanyonjech. Nee poisyeng'ung'? Ak ibunu ano? Ano emeng'ung'? Ak ano pororyeng'ung'?”" 
Jonah1:9 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Aa Hebranindet, ak aiywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap kipsengwet, ne ki yai nyanjet ak emet.”" 
Jonah1:10 Ki iyweis anyun piik miising', ak koleenji ineendet, “Nee kiito koiyai?” Amu ki nai piik kole kamwee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kiga komwachi icheek." 
Jonah1:11 koteebee anyun pichooto ineendet koleenji, “Ki iten nee, si kosiis nyanjet?” Amu kitesak miising' wasetapkei ne po nyanjet." 
Jonah1:12 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Oganaba ak owiircha nyanjet; si kosiis nyanjet; amu angen ale kanyonjok usoononi oo miising' amu anee.”" 
Jonah1:13 Ago ki was `pichooto peek eng' kimnateet koleen kokweri meeliit koweek kwo ngeguut; ago ma imuuch, amu kitesak miising' wasetapkei ne po nyanjet kogirinda icheek." 
Jonah1:14 Ki riirchi anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji, “Kisoomin miising', ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kisoomin miising' keele, amengebegu agobo saboondap chiichi. Ameiityech korotiik che ma tinyei tengek; ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu kaiyai inyee ko uu ye kecham.”" 
Jonah1:15 Koganap anyun Jona ak kowiirchi nyanjet; ak kosiis anyun nyanjet eng' wasetapkei. 
Jonah1:16 Koiywei anyun pichooto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising', ak koeng'ji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywot ak koyasyo." 
Jonah1:17 Ak ki chop `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor njiryot ne oo si kobiit kolugui Jona; ak ki tebee `Jona moetap njiryot peetuusyek somok ak kemousyek somok. 
Jonah2:1 Ki sa anyun `Jona Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi komi `moetap njiryot," 
Jonah2:2 Ak ki le, “Eng' nyalildanyu ko ki aguur Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ki wolwo; ami ye mi che ki kobek ko ki aguurse, ak ki igas kutinnyu." 
Jonah2:3 Ki iwiircha rireet, eng' kwenutap nyanjosyek, ak ki yiema maraneet; peeguk tugul che mildogei ak che somotitogei ko kimaluucha." 
Jonah2:4 Ki amwa ale, ‘Kagewiirta si ma igeera; ak ta amuktoi ano kogeny ageer hekalung'ung' ne tiliil?’" 
Jonah2:5 Ki yiema peek, agoi saboondanyu; ki yiema rireet; ki rat metinnyu mutweek." 
Jonah2:6 Ki achoortegei agoi kelusyegap tuloonook; ki rata ng'wony kobooto temeleiywekyik agoi. Ago ki imutu kora saboondanyu komong' eng' keriinget, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu." 
Jonah2:7 Ye ki tanui saboondanyu, abwaat anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak ki it ole imi saaennyu, agoi hekalung'ung' ne tiliil." 
Jonah2:8 Icheek che isubi atebosyek che ma nyolu che po lembech, ko istoegei rireenennywa pogei." 
Jonah2:9 Ago kobooto mwaetap kongoi aeng'un tiseiywot; che ki aaroorun ayaagun. Po `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor yetunet!” 
Jonah2:10 Ak ki ng'alaalji `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor njiryot, ak ki ing'ung' Jona konyo emet." 
Jonah3:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jona ne po aeng', koleenji," 
Jonah3:2 “Ng'eet, ui Nineveh, nganasanooto oo, ak iamdachi ng'aleek che amwaun.”" 
Jonah3:3 Kong'eet anyun Jona kwo Nineveh, ko uu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki nganaseet ne oo miising' Nineveh, ooindonyi ko ki po panda ne po peetuusyek somok ngetil kwenut." 
Jonah3:4 Ak ki toi Jona kochut nganaseet eng' pandap peetuut agenge, ak kiititen kole, “Tomo peetuusyek artamu si keng'em Nineveh!”" 
Jonah3:5 Ak ki iyan `piigap Nineveh Kamuktaindet; ak ki mwaita karugutetapkei, ak ki ilaach kuniok, kobooch ne oo agoi ne ming'in." 
Jonah3:6 Ye kingo it ng'aleek kaplaitoryatap Nineveh, kong'eet eng' ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet, koreek ngoryennyi, kotugegei kuniok, ak kotebee oreek." 
Jonah3:7 Ak ki mwaita kibarasta eng' Nineveh komugul keele, “Eng' ng'atuutyetap laitoryat ak piikyik che taagunotiin. Mat kochamcham kiy chii anan tyony, anan akweetap tuuga, anan ko ne po keechiirek. Mat koamis, anan koe peek." 
Jonah3:8 Ago ingetuge icheek tugul kuniok, chii ak tyony, ak ingoriirchi Kamuktaindet eng' kimnateet. Ee, ingoweek chii tugul kometo ooreennyi ne ya, ak kometo koroomnateet ne mi eunekwak." 
Jonah3:9 Ng'oo ne ingen? Imuuch koweek Kamuktaindet ak kowal kabwaatutikyik, ak kometo nereegekyik che koroomen, si koma kibegu.”" 
Jonah3:10 Kingo keer Kamuktaindet poisyonikwak, kole kaweek icheek kometo ooreenywa ne ya; kowal Kamuktaindet kabwaatutikyik agobo yaityet ne ki kamwa kole yachin icheek; ak mata koyai." 
Jonah4:1 Ago ki ma ibaibai Jona ng'olyoondonooto agot kitigin, ak kinereech." 
Jonah4:2 Ki sa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Asaain, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tos ma ng'olyoondoniito ne ki kamwa ye kingo ta ami emennyu? Ki amwei anyun achakte awe Tarsis amu niito. Ki angen ale ii Kamuktaindet ne po myeeindo ak ne nyiitaat rireenet, ne ma sip konereechi ak kotinyei rireenet ne oo, ak iwale kabwaatutiguk agobo yaityet." 
Jonah4:3 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, asoomin miising' ale, istoena saboondanyu; amu kaigai eng' anee ame kosiir asap.”" 
Jonah4:4 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Tos iyae ne myee nginereech?”" 
Jonah4:5 Ki wo anyun Jona saang'utap nganaseet ak kotep ng'wony eng' komostap kong'asiis ne po nganaseet ak koteekyigei keryet eng' olooto, ak kotep ng'wony kouure, kot kogeer kiit ne piitu eng' nganaseet." 
Jonah4:6 Ak ki chop Kamuktaindet ne po Toroornatet silangwet, ak kogoochi kobiit kotuch Jona, si kobiit kouur ineendet ak kosar ineendet eng' kaiimennyi pogei. Ki paibaitune anyun Jona silangwanooto miising'." 
Jonah4:7 Ago kingo eech eng' peetuut ne po aeng', kochop Kamuktaindet kutyet, ak kisus silangwanooto, ak kires." 
Jonah4:8 Ak kingo chor asiista kochop Kamuktaindet usoonet ne punu kong'asiis ne imelisyei; ak ki peel asiista metitap Jona kot kotanui ak kisoomjigei kole kome. Ak ki le, “Kaigai eng' anee ame kosiir asap.”" 
Jonah4:9 Ki leenji `Kamuktaindet Jona, “Tos iyae ne myee nginereech agobo silangwet?” Ak ki le, “Kayai ne myee nganereechi, anereechi agot agoi meet.”" 
Jonah4:10 Ak ki le Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Keriree silangwet, ne koma iyae, ak koma ibiiti; ne kobiit kemout agenge, ak kong'emak kemout agenge." 
Jonah4:11 Tos ma nyoljino ariiree Nineveh, nganasanooto oo; ole mi piik che siirei eliphuusyek pogol ak tiptem che ma ibestos eunnywa ne po tai ak eunnywa ne po kaataam; ak komi kogeny tyong'ik che chaang'?”" 
Micah1:1 Ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki nyoonji Mikah meng'iindetap Moresheth eng' peetuusyegap Jotham, Ahaz, ak Hezekiah, laitorinigap Judah, ne ki keer agobo Samaria ak Jerusalem." 
Micah1:2 Ogas okweek pororyosyek, okweek tugul, oepchi iit, ee ng'wony, ak tugul che mi olooto: ak ingoek Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paoryat eng' okweek, Kiptaiyat ne mi hekalunnyi ne tiliil." 
Micah1:3 Amu, ogeero, mong'u Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' oldanyi, ak kochoorgei, ak kotyech komoswek che torooreen che po ng'wony." 
Micah1:4 Ak kochootyo tuloonook eng' keelyekyik, ak kobetogis atebwosyek, ko uu ye chotei temeniet ko kauchi maat, ko uu peek che kirandoi eng' ole keigei." 
Micah1:5 Piitu chuuto amu pistoetap Jakobo, ak amu tengekwogigap kootap Israel. Nee pistoetap Jakobo? Tos ma Samaria? Ak nee komoswek che torooreen che po Judah? Tos ma Jerusalem?" 
Micah1:6 Ayae anyun Samaria koek karurugutyetap emet, ak koigei ole kiminjin sabibuk: ak atumde koikyik koba atebweet, ak ang'aany lumeiywekyik." 
Micah1:7 Ak kebir ketuatui kanamonikyik tugul che ki kiwai, ak kebeel melekwekyik tugul, ak ang'em kanamonikyik tugul: amu ki iyumune chooto melektap kugoinatet, ak koweekyigei melektap kugoinatet." 
Micah1:8 Ateei ak awaache amu niito, awendi ko kagireegunena ngoroik ak ami aach ngor: ateei ko uu lelwek, ak ariire ko uu tyong'igap songolik." 
Micah1:9 Amu ma inyaaksei mookyik; amu kagonyo kot koit Judah; itei ormariichetap piikyuk, agoi Jerusalem." 
Micah1:10 Amat imwaite ng'olyoondoniito eng' Gath, amat iriir agot kitigin: ki amildaegei temburyek eng' Beth-le-Apra." 
Micah1:11 Osiirte, ee okweek piik che omenye Sapir, osiirte omi aach ngor ak kalilanet: tomo komong' chiito ne menyei Saanan; rebenok kateiyetap Beth-esel kinnyi ne tonone." 
Micah1:12 Amu igeni miising' chiito ne menyei Marot kole konyoor myeeindo: amu kachoorchigei yaityet ormariichetap Jerusalem kobunu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Micah1:13 Ratyi chepkichutitap lugeet paraisiit ne chepchep, ee inyee chiito ne imenye Lakish: kitaunindetap tengekto ineendet ne po cheptap Zion; amu ki kinyoorchin pistaosyegap Israel." 
Micah1:14 Igoochini anyun Moreset-gat kagoochinetap saisere: egu kooriigap Aksip kiit ne po ng'aalseet eng' laitorinigap Israel. 
Micah1:15 Ta amutun chiito ne nyoonei konamin ibunji, ee inyee ne imenye Maresha: itei toroornatetap Israel Adulam." 
Micah1:16 Ingochurin met, ak icheru meting'ung' agobo lagok che iboiboin: tes poostong'ung' si koigei ne po chepsengwet; amu kageluul icheek eng' ole imi." 
Micah2:1 Pwo eng' icheek che chobei tengekto ak kotilei eng' itogusyekwak ole yaitoi yaityet! Ye kagoeech koyaei, amu tinyei kimnateet koyai." 
Micah2:2 Kasei myat mbareenik, ak korep; kobooto kooriik, ak koip: ak kous chiito kobooto koonnyi, chiito kobooto tuguukyik." 
Micah2:3 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Ogeero, achobe yaityet agobo kooi, ne moistoe kaatwekwok anan obendate menoteet; amu yaacheen peetuusyechooto." 
Micah2:4 Mwaei eng' peetuunooto kalewenet agobo inyee, ak koriir eng' riirek che ng'woneen, kole, ka keng'emech kigeswech: walei kebebertap piikyuk: istoena kiito kot koit ano! Pchechin ngelelik mbareenikyok." 
Micah2:5 Menyooru anyun chiito ne wiirtoi porowet eng' parbaryat eng' tuiyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. 
Micah2:6 Mwaei icheek kole amomaoten. Ma maotenjin icheek chuuto: ma petos chotisyosyek. 
Micah2:7 Ee kootap Jakobo, tos kimwae keele, Tos rartaat Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Tos poisyonikyik chuuto? Tos ma yachin ng'aleekyuk ne myee ineendet ne wendote imanda?" 
Micah2:8 Ago kota koboryena piikyuk ko uu puunyoot: oreegune ngoryeet ne tabanu parak icheek che siirtoi eng' kaalyeet, ko uu piik che ma chamei lugeet." 
Micah2:9 Otimdoi kwonyiigap piikyuk koba eng' kooriikwak che korooron; orebe toroornatennyu lagokwak agoi. 
Micah2:10 Ong'eetyee, ak obe; amu ma olito ole omuung'e: amu murwoonindo ne ng'emisyei, ee, ng'emisyet ne ya kot." 
Micah2:11 Ngot komwa lembech chiito ne wendoti eng' usoonet ak lembechek, kole amaotenun agobo divaik ak maiyek; koegu ineendet maotyotap pichu." 
Micah2:12 Ee Jakobo, ayumok iman okweek tugul; ayumi iman che ki ng'et che po Israel; ayumi icheek ko uu keechiiregap Bosra: ko uu akweetap keechiirek eng' kwenutap ole agete, poldos kot amu chaang'indap piik." 
Micah2:13 Kagondoe putindet icheek: kagobutis ak koba agoi ormariichet, ak komandae yooto: kagondoe icheek laitoryannywa, ak komi tainnywa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Micah3:1 Ki amwa ale, Ogaso; asoomok okweek kandoigap Jakobo ak pounigap kootap Israel, tos manyoljok onai kirwooget?" 
Micah3:2 Che oweche myeeindo ak ochame yaityet; che onemu irirenikwak kobooto panyeekwak eng' kawekwak; 
Micah3:3 che amei kogeny panyeegap piikyuk; ak koenyei irirenikwak, ak koiri kawekwak: ee, tonatoni, ko uu che kindo tereet, ak ko uu panyeek che kiyoi eng' saburyet." 
Micah3:4 Ye ibata koriirchi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ago mawoljin: ee, ung'e togeennyi icheek eng' peetuusyechooto, ko uu ye ki yai yaityet eng' poisyonikwak." 
Micah3:5 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu ni agobo maotik che igoochin piikyuk ko leel; kowaaktos koleen, kaalyeet, ye tinyei icheek kiy ne amei, yeityo koyai lugeet koyachi che ma tinyei kiy ne indoi kuut." 
Micah3:6 Egu anyun kemout eng' okweek, si mogeer kiy; ak koimenit eng' okweek si mogeer ng'ang'uut; ak kororokto asiista eng' maotik, ak koimenit peetuut eng' icheek." 
Micah3:7 Ak kolilaanso keerik, ak kotoptobenso piik che ng'oorsei; ak kagonamgei kuut tugul, amu ma mi waluunet ne punu Kamuktaindet." 
Micah3:8 Ago kanyiia iman kimnateet eng' Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak eng' kirwooget, ak eng' kamuget, si kobiit amwachi Jakobo pistoennyi, ak amwachi Israel tengektanyi." 
Micah3:9 Asoomok anyun ale ogas niito, okweek kandoigap kootap Jakobo, ak pounigap kootap Israel, che oweche kirwooget, ak omaasi imanda tugul." 
Micah3:10 Teege Zion korotiik, ak koteege Jerusalem tengekto." 
Micah3:11 Irwoochi kandoik amu tuguuk che kigoigoisye ak ineetisyei tisiik amu melekto, ak kong'orsei maotikyik amu silingisyek: nganda uu nooto kotiegei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak koleen, Tos ma mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kwenunnyo? Ma mi yaityet ne nyoonjinech." 
Micah3:12 Kibati anyun Zion agobo okweek ko uu ye kibati mbareet, ak koek Jerusalem karurugutik, ak koigei tulweetap koot komoswek che torooreen che po timiin." 
Micah4:1 Ki kimiti eng' peetuusyek che po let tulweetap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' tuloonook parak, ak kitoroori kosiir tuloonook che mengeechen; ak kotendenji pororyosyek." 
Micah4:2 Ak pendi pororyosyek che chaang' ak komwa kole: “Obwa, ketogoste tulweetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak keebe kootap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Jakobo; si koneetech ortinwekyik, ak kebendatee ortinwekyik.” Amu mang'une ng'atuutik Zion, ak komang'une ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Jerusalem." 
Micah4:3 Ak korwooksechin pororyosyek che chaang', ak koger kong' pororyosyek che kiimeen che mi ole loo; ak kotany rotonikwak po chok koek mogomboik che po tuuga, ak kotany ng'otwekwak koek chepkesok si ma kobaregei pororyosyek, ama koneetegei lugeet kogeny." 
Micah4:4 Ago tebee chii tugul kelutap keetinnyi ne po sabibuk ak mogoywennyi, ama mi chii ne imui icheek, amu kagomwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ng'olyoondoniito." 
Micah4:5 Amu wendoti pororyet age tugul eng' kainetap kamuktaindennyi, ak kibendotee acheek kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyo koigeny ak koigeny." 
Micah4:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, ayumunoti eng' peetuunooto ineendet ne ing'wali kobooto ineendet ne kigeon, ak ineendet ne ki anyaliil;" 
Micah4:7 ak ayai ineendet ne ing'wali koek ne ng'etunot, ak ayai ineendet ne kigetimda kolooit koek pororyet ne kiim, ak koboi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek eng' tulweetap Zion kobooch yooto agoi koigeny." 
Micah4:8 Nyonjinin ng'olyoondoniito, ee inyee, teekseet ne kooi ne po akweetap keechiirek, tulweetap cheptap Zion; ee, nyoonei pounateng'ung' ni ki po tai, pounatetap cheptap Jerusalem." 
Micah4:9 Amu nee anyun si iwaach? Tos metinye laitoryat, tos ki kobet chiing'ung' ne po kapkirwook, kot konamin ng'waninwek che uu che po kwondo ne machei kosigiis?" 
Micah4:10 Ingonamin ng'wanindo, ak igimu, ee cheptap Zion, ko uu kwondo ne machei kosigiis: amu imandoi anyun nguno eng' nganaseet ak imeny mbar, ak iwe agoi Babilon; kisaruun eng' olooto; ityaachin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' olooto eng' eutap puuniguk." 
Micah4:11 Kagoyumjingei anyun pororyosyek che chaang' che leen, Ingong'wanit, ak ongetang'aang'ji Zion." 
Micah4:12 Ago ma naei kabwaatutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ama iguitos kirwoogennyi; amu ki koyum icheek ko uu ye kiyumjin ratuutigap peek rwanyut ne kiboorsee." 
Micah4:13 Ng'eet ak iboor, ee cheptap Zion, amu ayae kuineng'ung' koek karnet, ak ayae sioguk koek sugunwet; ak itonaton pororyosyek che chaang', ak itabaanji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kelunoikwak, ak itabaanji tuguukwak Kiptaiyat ne po ng'wony komugul." 
Micah5:1 Iyumge anyun, obee kweanaigap lugeet, ee cheptap kweanaigap lugeet; kogoyiemech: kwere kirokto matandap kirwoogindetap Israel." 
Micah5:2 Ago inyee, Bethlehem Ephratah, ne ii ming'in eng' kwenutap eliphuusyek che po Judah, mong'unenen age ne nyoonjino ne tuun egu pounindetap Israel; ne ki cham komong'u kobooch keny, kobooch koigeny." 
Micah5:3 Igoitoi anyun ineendet icheek kot koit peetuut ne sigisyei ineendet ne tinyei ng'wanindo: tuun weekyingei anyun che ki ng'et che po tupchosyekyik, piigap Israel." 
Micah5:4 Ak kotonon kobai akweennyi eng' kimnateetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' telunatetap kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyi: ak kotebi; amu eetu kobooch nguno agoi ole poochin ng'wony." 
Micah5:5 Egu chiichito kalyennyo ye tuun kait Assyrianindet emennyo, ak ye tuun katyech kooriikyok che po laitoryat, ko tuun king'eeti anyun mestoweek tisap ak piik sisiit che eecheen kobargei ak ineendet." 
Micah5:6 Ak kong'em emetap Assyria eng' rotwetap chok, ak kong'em emetap Nimrod eng' ole kibunei kebendi olooto; ak kosarwech ineendet eng' Assyrianindet ye tuun kait emennyo, ye tuun kanyo kotyech oriit eng' kiwotennyo." 
Micah5:7 Ak kotebee piik che ki ng'et che po Jakobo kwenutap pororyosyek che chaang' ko uu rewoot ne punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ropta ne inesyin susweek; ne ma igeni chii, anan kogany weeriigap piik." 
Micah5:8 Ak kotebee piik che ki ng'et che po Jakobo kwenutap pororyosyek, kwenutap pororyosyek che chaang', ko uu ye mi ng'etundo kwenutap tyong'ik che po timiin, ko uu ng'etundo ne neran eng' kwenutap akwotisyegap keechiirek: ne ye punei kween kotyegoti ak kotonatoni, ama mi chii ne saru." 
Micah5:9 Ingitoroor eung'ung' eng' paragutap puuniguk, ak ingeisto puuniguk tugul." 
Micah5:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole tuun abare eng' peetuunooto paraisisyeguk eng' kwenung'ung', ak ang'em karisyeguk che po lugeet:" 
Micah5:11 ak abar nganasoogap emeng'ung', ak abut irimoiguk tugul:" 
Micah5:12 ak aiste ponisosyek eng' eung'ung'; ama inyooru kogeny chepsogeinik: 
Micah5:13 ak aiste eng' kwenung'ung' kanamoniguk che ki kiwai ak tolochiguk; ak ma ilasu kogeny poisyonigap euneguk. 
Micah5:14 Ak atutu Aserik eng' kwenung'ung'; ak ang'em nganasoguk. 
Micah5:15 Ak ayaaktochi mugetuut eng' nereegek ak eng' nereegek che ng'woneen, pororyosyek che ki ma kas iit." 
Micah6:1 Ogas anyun okweek kiit ne mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: Ng'eet, ng'alaal kogasak eng' taitap tuloonook, ak ingogas tuloonook che mengeechen kuting'ung'." 
Micah6:2 Ogas, ee okweek tuloonook, ng'aleek che ting'enok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak okweek lumeiywek che kiimeen che po ng'wony; amu ting'ee `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piikyik ng'aleek, ak machei kong'alaal ak Israel." 
Micah6:3 Ki ayaiywok nee, ee okweek piikyuk? Ak ki aiimenak nee? Obaoryanwa." 
Micah6:4 Amu ki amutun itogosu imong'u eng' emetap Misiri, ak ki atyachin imang'une kootap otwoknateet; ak ki ayookte Musa, Aron, ak Miriam kondoun." 
Micah6:5 Ee piikyuk, obwaat ne ki soom Balak laitoryatap Moab, ak kiit ne ki wolji Balaam weeriitap Beor ineendet; obwaat kobooch Shitim agoi Gilgal, si kobiit onai poisyonigap iman che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Micah6:6 Aibu nee taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ang'uruuge eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Tos anyoo tainnyi aibu kagoochinoik che kibeelei kobooto moek che ma siirei kenyiit agenge?" 
Micah6:7 Tos paibaitune Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mengichik eliphuusyek, anan ainoosyek eliphuusyek taman che po mwanik? Tos agoite taaitanyu agobo pistoennyu, agoite iyoteetap poortanyu agobo tengektap saboondanyu?" 
Micah6:8 Ee inyee chii, kagoboorun ineendet kiit ne myee; ak nee ne magenen Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kobatee iyai imanda, ak icham rireenet, ak iwendote eng' kaming'inetapkei kobooto Kamuktaindeng'ung'?" 
Micah6:9 Kuurei kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nganaseet ak koywei ne utaat kaineng'ung': ogas kirokto, kobooto ineendet ne king'atei." 
Micah6:10 Tos ta komi konoraik che po yaityet eng' kootap kiptengekyot, ak kerutyet ne ichuchugat ne kiwechei?" 
Micah6:11 Tos atiliiliitu ngatinye tuguuk che kirogendoisye che po yaityet, kobooto lolet ne mi ratilisyegap ng'aalseet?" 
Micah6:12 Amu nyiitaat koroomnateet mogorekyik, ak kogomwa lembechek piik che menyei olooto, ak kong'aalsei ng'elyebwekwak." 
Micah6:13 Koabirin anyun aginye eng' mook ne oo, koayain iegu panan amu tengekwogiguk." 
Micah6:14 Iamisyei, amebiyonyi; ak kotebenen kalilaneng'ung': ak iuu, ago mesaru ne imuti; ak abare rotwetap chok ineendet ne imuti." 
Micah6:15 Igolsei, amegese; itue mseituni, ago meilegei mwanik; itue sabibuk, ago mee divaik." 
Micah6:16 Amu ki oriip ng'atuutigap Omri, ak poisyonik tugul che po kootap Ahab, ak obendate kirwoogutikwak: si kobiit ayain iegu panan, ak ayai piik che menyei olooto koek che kireenyei; ak oip chotisyetap piikyuk." 
Micah7:1 Pwo eng' anee! Amu aa uu yo kagiyum logoegap kemei, aa uu turoonik che po sabibuk, ma mi logoek che irurugotin che kimuuchi keam; machei saboondanyu tongoaniatap mogoywet." 
Micah7:2 Ki kobet chii ne iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' emet, ama mi agot agenge ne po iman eng' piik. Saptoi tugul kotumdoi korotiik, riichei chii age tugul mesteet agobo ng'eetap kamet." 
Micah7:3 Igiilegei eng' eunekwak koyai kiit ne ya; soomsei pounindet ak kirwoogindet komachei kiit ne kigoigoisye; ak mwaei chiito ne oo mageet ne ya ne po saboondanyi; chobei icheek ko uu nooto. 
Micah7:4 Ne myee eng' icheek ko uu kateet ne rutei piich: ne litit miising' eng' icheek ko ya kosiir ng'ootweetap katook: kagoit peetuutap riibiguk, peetuut ne kiityinin pireet; egu anyun kaiimennywa pogei." 
Micah7:5 Amomang'u chorweet, amotiegei kandoindet: riip kurgeetap kuting'ung' eng' ineendet ne ruei eng' tegeng'ung'." 
Micah7:6 Amu iteweeri weeriit kwanda, porye chepto kamet, porye osotyotap weeriit korgennyi ne po yugoi; puunigap chiito piikyik." 
Micah7:7 Ago amang'u anee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ageni Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap yetunennyu: kasa Kamuktaindennyu," 
Micah7:8 amebaibaitunena, ee punyondennyu: ye kabut, ang'eete kogeny; ye atebee mesundeito, koegu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor lapkeiyennyu." 
Micah7:9 Amuitoi eng' nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ki ayachi tengekto; agoi kong'alaal agobo ng'olyoondennyu, ak koyaiywo kirwooget: tuun imutwaa among' ole mi lapkeiyet, ak ageer imandanyi." 
Micah7:10 Yeityo kogeer anyun punyondennyu, ak kotuch `teweernateet ineendet ne ki leenjo, “Mi ano Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung'?” Abaoryani eng' konyekyuk agobo kabutennyi; ak ketyekyin ng'wony ko uu ng'atateek che mi ortinwek." 
Micah7:11 Peetuut ne kiteechei irimoiguk! Ki istoi kolooit ng'atuutyet eng' peetuunooto. 
Micah7:12 Pwonjinin icheek eng' peetuunooto, kobunu Assyria ak nganasoogap Misiri, ak kobooch Misiri agoi aineet, ak kobooch nyanjet agoi nyanjet, ak kobooch tulweet agoi tulweet." 
Micah7:13 Nganda uu nooto koegu emet karaatya amu icheek che menyei olooto, amu logoegap poisyonikwak." 
Micah7:14 Iyage piiguk eng' kiroktong'ung', akweetap poroteng'ung', che meng'iisyei icheegei, eng' timiin ne mi kwenutap Karmel: ingoagetyo eng' Bashan ak Gilead, ko uu peetuusyek che po keny." 
Micah7:15 Aboorchini ineendet tuguuk che kikwong'ee ko uu eng' peetuusyek che ki imong'u eng' emetap Misiri. 
Micah7:16 Keerei pororyosyek ak kolilaanso amu kimnateennywa tugul: kere eunekwak kutusweekwak, ak kotimogis itiikwak." 
Micah7:17 Melei ng'ung'unyek ko uu ereneet; mong'u kobotanionu eng' komoswekwak che ung'egei ko uu tuguuk che ichuutegei ng'wony: pwoonei eng' kaiyweisyet ole mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindennyo, ak koiyweis amu inyee." 
Micah7:18 Ng'oo Kamuktaindet ne uu inyee, ne nyochin kaat piik amu tengekto, ak kosiirtoe pistoetap piik che ki ng'et che po porotennyi? Mateptoi nereegekyik agoi, amu paibaitune rireenet." 
Micah7:19 Tuun weeksei kogeny ak korirenech; tuun istoiwech tengekwogikyok: tuun iwiirchini tugul rirosyegap nyanjet. 
Micah7:20 Iyachini Jakobo imanit, ak iyachi Abraham rireenet, che kigeyosyechi kwanisyekyok eng' peetuusyek che po keny." 
Nahum1:1 Maonateet agobo Nineveh. Kitabuut ne po ng'ang'utyetap Nahum Elkosindet. 
Nahum1:2 Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindet ne amei ng'etkong' ak koyaaktoi mugetuut; yaaktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugetuut ak tinyei nereek; yaakyin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor mugetuut puunikyik, ak kogonorchin puunikyik nereegek." 
Nahum1:3 Ma sip konereechi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, tinyei kimnateet ne oo ama pagaktoi kiptengekyot age tugul. Tinyei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ooreennyi eng' kipchurchuryet ak eng' usoonet ne oo, ak poolik ko temburyegap keelyekyik." 
Nahum1:4 Kere kong' nyanjet ak kogoochin koyaam, ak igoochin koteeny ainoosyek tugul; nyaluli Bashan ak Karmel, ak kores taapteetap Lebanon." 
Nahum1:5 Potandos tuloonook eng' tainnyi, ak kochootyo tuloonook che mengeechen; potani ng'wony eng' tainnyi, ee ng'wony ak tugul che menyei olooto." 
Nahum1:6 Ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon eng' taitap nereegekyik? Ak ng'oo ne imuuchi komuita eng' koroomnatetap nereegekyik? Kirong'u nereegekyik che ng'woneen ko uu maat, ak tonatoni `ineendet rwandosyek." 
Nahum1:7 Myee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, irimeet eng' peetuutap nyalilda; ak kongen icheeget che imang'u ineendet." 
Nahum1:8 Ak eng' maraneet ne oo, ko igeesu komosato, ak koon puunikyik koba mesundeito." 
Nahum1:9 Amu nee si otete ogirinde Kamuktaindet ne Toroor? Ineendet ne iwong'u; ma ng'eetei puunyo konyil. 
Nahum1:10 Nganda uu icheek katook che king'walgei, ak ko uu che pogitos eng' eeisennywa, kebeelei kogeskei ko uu mobeek che yamyotiin." 
Nahum1:11 Kamong'unenen age ne chobei yaityet koleen kogirindae Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, inee ne irwoochi yaityet." 
Nahum1:12 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: “Agot nganda kiimeen miising' ak ko chaang', kebarei ui tugul ak kobetyo. Agot nganda ki anyalilin, koma anyalilin kogeny." 
Nahum1:13 Airie choginnyi eng' kaating'ung', ak ang'etii ratuutiguk.”" 
Nahum1:14 Kagong'at Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo inyee kole, ma kibwaati kaineng'ung' kogeny amu ma kolalin ma. Aistoi komong' eng' kootap kamuktaiguk, kanamonik che ki kiwai ak che ki kitany. Abale kerering'ung'; amu ii sogoran." 
Nahum1:15 Ogeero! Mi tuloonook kelyegap ineendet ne ibu logoiywek che myach, inee ne mwaitoi kaalyeet. Riip igoorweguk, ee Judah, yai kaarortaosyeguk kosulda, amu ma kobookyinin kiptengekyot kogeny; ki parei ineendet ne matiny." 
Nahum2:1 Kagonyo taing'ung' ineendet ne tuisyei. Riip irimeet, riip ooreet! Kermenegei kimnateet, tes kimnateng'ung' koeet miising'." 
Nahum2:2 Weegu kogeny `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor telunatetap Jakobo, ko uu telunatetap Israel, nganda ki koluul icheek `luulenik, ak kong'em mooriigap keetiikwak che po sabibuk." 
Nahum2:3 Kigesal long'onigap piikyik che kiimeen kobiriritu, ilaachi piikyik che nyigoonen ngoroik che piriireen. Ilyeldos kariigap lugeet ko uu kariik eng' peetuutap chobennyi pogei, ak parbari ng'otwek miising'." 
Nahum2:4 Kirgirendos kariisyegap lugeet eng' ortinwek, rusotegei eng' ortinwek che paroen. Uu tagunatennywa tochisyek, rwaei ko uu kalyelyosyek." 
Nahum2:5 Kuurei `ineendet piikyik che po teegisto; ichaboitoi icheek kobendi, choktoi kobendi irimeet, ak kechop kiit ne tektoegei." 
Nahum2:6 Yaatatin kurgotigap ainoosyek, ak kochoot kootap laitoryat." 
Nahum2:7 Kageng'aany Huzzab, kagimut kolooit. Riirtos tiibiikyik eng' kutit ne uu ne po cheptugenik, ak korabachi tegetikwak." 
Nahum2:8 Ki koigei `Nineveh tamboiyotap peek ne kagobutok, che rootei peekyik kobendi; kuurse koleen, “Otononie! Otononie!” Ago ma mi ne kusegong'." 
Nahum2:9 Oip parunenigap fedha, oip parunenigap thahabu! Ma igeesugei tuguuk che konorotiin! Chaang'indap kiy age tugul ne karaaran!" 
Nahum2:10 Ma mi kiy, mi puch, ki koek karaatya! Chootei muguleldo, ak piregei kutung'oik, ak komi ng'wanindo suenutik tugul, walaksei togoochigap icheek tugul." 
Nahum2:11 Mi ano kebeneetap ng'etuunyik ng'etuunyik che neranik, ole wendote kirgitap ng'etuny ak ne kotoy, kobooto aarwetap ng'etundo, ama mi chii ne imui?" 
Nahum2:12 Kitonaton ng'etundo che yamei aarekyik, ak ki parchi ng'etuunyikyik che kotoen; ak konyiit kebenonikyik tyong'ik che kagobar, ak konyiit kebenonikyik panyeek che kagotonaton." 
Nahum2:13 Keero, aboryenen, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak abeel kariisyeguk che po lugeet eng' iyeto, ak kobar rotwetap chok ng'etunyiguk che neranik; ageesu eng' ng'wony tyong'iguk che ibare, ama kegasei kogeny kutitap piiguk che kiyooktoi." 
Nahum3:1 Pwo nganaseetap korotiik! Nyiitaat lembechek ak rebisyet, ma igeesugei rebisyet." 
Nahum3:2 Cheetap kipchoritiit ak kirgirenetap kariisyek; cheetap paraisisyek che toroombendos ak cheetap kariisyegap lugeet che rwaei! 
Nahum3:3 Piik che ketei paraisisyek, kalyeleetap rotwetap chok ak ng'otit ne liilei piich; ak chaang'indap che kagebar, karurugutyet ne oo ne po muuswek; ma igeesugei muuswek, riichei muuswekwak icheek!" 
Nahum3:4 Amu chaang'indap kugoinatosyek che po chepkugoniot ne karaaran, kwondo ne pou ponisyosyek, ne aldoi pororyosyek eng' kugoinatosyekyik, ak koaldoi piik eng' ponisyosyekyik." 
Nahum3:5 Keero, aboryenen, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak ang'aanye ngoroiguk kot koit metit; ak aboorchin pororyosyek imi aach ngor, ak aboorchi pounatosyek teweernateng'ung'." 
Nahum3:6 Awirenen tuguuk che samis che kiwechei, ak ayain iyaitu, ak andein iegu kiit ne kitang'aang'jin." 
Nahum3:7 Tuun mweenen tugul che keerin ak kole, “Kageng'em Nineveh! Ng'oo ne riirchin? Anyoorchini ano che igoigoin?”" 
Nahum3:8 Tos ii kaigai isiir No-amon, ne ki mi kwenutap ainoosyek, ne ki tinyei peek che kiyiem; ne ki irimennyi nyanjet, ne ki inatunnyi nyanjet?" 
Nahum3:9 Ki kimnatennyi Kush ak Misiri, ak ki ma kotinyei ole pooch; ki toretiguk Put ak piigap Libya." 
Nahum3:10 Ago ki kimut, ki kiluul, ki kitonaton kogeny lagokyik eng' tabanwegap ortinwek tugul; ak kiseer parbareek agobo piikyik che konyitotiin, ak kerate nyororosyek piikyik tugul che eecheen." 
Nahum3:11 Ibogiti aginye, iterteryoti; icheeng'e aginye irimeet amu puunyoot." 
Nahum3:12 Igeitu irimoiguk tugul mogoonik che tinyei logoekwak che tongoanik; ngitumdum kobutyin kutitap amindet. 
Nahum3:13 Keero, kiplugotiniguk; uu kwonyiik eng' kwenung'ung'. Kagiyatyi puuniguk ormariichogap emeng'ung', kagobeel maat temeleiyweguk." 
Nahum3:14 Ram peek che po peetuusyek che kiyiemenen, igimit irimoiguk: uui ole mi meneet, ak ityech ng'atatyat, ak igimit ole kibeelee matubaruuk." 
Nahum3:15 Igesun maat eng' olooto; parin rotwetap chok, igeesun ko uu tinapchet. Chaang'itu ko uu tinapchet, chaang'itu ko uu chereng'endet." 
Nahum3:16 Ki ites chemung'arainiguk kosiir kecheigap kipsengwet: Ng'emisyoti tinapchet, yeityo kotiriren kwo." 
Nahum3:17 Tee chereng'enyinik piiguk che ki kilaakyi naaryeet, uu talamik che chaang' kiptainiguk che po lugeet, che menyei ng'otonok eng' peetuutap kaitityet, ak komwei ye kachor asiista, ama ki nai ole kaba." 
Nahum3:18 Inuuktos mestoweguk, ee laitoryatap Assyria. Imuunyi piiguk che po teegisto. Kiyestoochi piiguk tuloonook, ama mi chii ne iyumi." 
Nahum3:19 Ma mi kiy ne isoobi moeng'ung'; ng'waan moeng'ung'. Tugul che kasei ng'aleek agobo inyee, ko iraprabi eunek agobo inyee. Amu ng'oo ne ki kochililee yaityeng'ung' ne ma igeesugei?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Maonateet ne ki keer maotyot Habakkuk. 
Habakkuk1:2 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, aguursei kot kotyanit, amegase? Anan ariirchinin aleen “Koroomnateet” ago mesaru." 
Habakkuk1:3 Amu nee si iboorwo tengekto, ak igoono ageer kamaaset? Mi tainnyu ng'emisyet ak poryeet; ak komi polateet ak kong'eetei suryeet." 
Habakkuk1:4 Ki kochoriren ng'atuutyet amu nooto; ama komi kirwooget ne kirwoochi. Yiemei kiptengekyot chiito ne po iman; kirwoochi anyun kirwooget kimaasi. 
Habakkuk1:5 Ogeer, okweek kwenutap pororyosyek, ak obwaat! Ak okwong'ye miising', amu ayae poisyet eng' peetuusyekwok, ne moyani agot ngemwaiwok." 
Habakkuk1:6 Amu, keero, ang'eeti Kaldeik, pororyet ne koroom ne choktoi; che punei kwenutap emet, si konam meng'otosyek che ma chechwaak kobunji." 
Habakkuk1:7 Imuisei icheek, ak kiywei: mang'une icheeget kirwoogennywa ak toroorindanywa." 
Habakkuk1:8 Chepcheben kogeny paraisisyekwak kosiir keteet, ak ko koroomen kosiir suik che po koskoleny; ak koboortogei piikwak che ketei paraisisyek: ee, punu pichooto ole loo; tirirendos ko uu kipsiichit ne choktoi kowendi koamisyei." 
Habakkuk1:9 Pwoonei tugul agobo koroomnateet; tokyin togoochikwak eng' kimnateet ko uu usoonetap kong'asiis; ak koyumi luulenik ko uu ng'aniek. 
Habakkuk1:10 Ee, chotei laitorinik, roryot pounik eng' ineendet: rorechin irimeet age tugul; amu iyumi temburyek, ak koip." 
Habakkuk1:11 Iwiktogei ko uu usoonet, ak kosiirto, ak konam ng'oogisto: ineendet ne kamuktaindennyi kimnateennyi." 
Habakkuk1:12 Tos, me po koigeny, inyee, ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu, Ineendet ne Tiliil ne nenyu? Ma kibegu. Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki ichopchi ineendet kirwooget; ak ee inyee rwandet, ki igimit ineendet si kobiit kitigon." 
Habakkuk1:13 Inyee ne itinye koonyek che tiliileen kot ko mechame igeer yaityet, amechame igeer kamaaset, amu nee anyun si igeere che yaei kaberberisyet, ak isise ye igeere kiptengekyot kolugui chiito ne po iman kosiir ineendet;" 
Habakkuk1:14 ak igoochini piik koigei njireenigap nyanjet, koigei tuguuk che ichuutegei, che ma tinyei pounindet?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Name icheek tugul kateet ne uu kombet, name icheek regereiywondennyi ne kiname njireenik, ak koyumji regereiywondennyi ne oo: paibaitu anyun ak kogaskei." 
Habakkuk1:16 Eng'jin anyun regereiywondennyi ne kiname njireenik, ak kobeeljin nyamdutik regereiywondennyi ne oo; amu nyoorunee chooto tuguukyik che myach, ak amitwogikyik che chaang'." 
Habakkuk1:17 Tos tumdoi anyun tuguuk che mi regereiywondennyi, ama pagaktoi ineendet kobar pororyosyek kotugul?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Atonone oldanyu ole ariipsee, ak atebee paragutap teekseet ne kooi, ak atabende si ageer kiit ne mwaiwo ineendet ak kiit ne awoljini agobo riirekyuk." 
Habakkuk2:2 Ak ki wolwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, koleenjo, sir ng'ang'utyet ak iyai kotook eng' tuguuk che kisirei, si kobiit komuuch kosoman chiito ne labati." 
Habakkuk2:3 Amu po ng'ang'utyet peetuusyek che ki king'at, ak kochoktoi kotokyingei kagesunet, ama mwaei lembech. Agot ngo kagei, igen inyee; amu nyoonei iman, ma igaegei." 
Habakkuk2:4 Ogeero, kagomen muguleldanyi, ma litit ineendet, ago sabei ne po imanda eng' kayanennyi." 
Habakkuk2:5 Ee, kaberberindet divaik, ak ko chiito ne ichaugei ne matebee kaa; ne ibaroi magennyi ko uu ye mi che ki kobek, ak uu meet ineendet ak ma piyonyi, ago iyumjigei pororyosyek tugul, ak kobasyigei piik tugul." 
Habakkuk2:6 Tos ma mwaei pichuuto tugul karagutyet agobo chiichito, ak komwaei kalewenet ne sasisyei agobo ineendet, ak komwaei kole, Pwo! Ineendet ne tesyingei che ma chechiik! Tyanitu? Ak Pwo! Ineendet ne ipchingei tuguuk che kiname pesendo!" 
Habakkuk2:7 Tos mang'eetos eng' chokyinet icheeget che susin, ak kogos che iimin, ak iegu parunenikwak?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Amu ki iluul pororyosyek che chaang', luulin aginye piik tugul che ng'etunotiin; amu korotiigap piik, ak amu koroomnateet ne ki kiyachi emet, ak nganaseet ak piik tugul che menyei olooto." 
Habakkuk2:9 Pwo ineendet ne taachei kelunet ne ya agobo koonnyi, si kobiit koteech keswennyi eng' ole toroor, si kobiit kesar eng' eutap yaityet!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Ki ichop teweernateet agobo koong'ung', ye kingi par che chaang', ak ki iyachi tengekto saboondang'ung'." 
Habakkuk2:11 Amu tuun waachei koita eng' inaatut, ak kowol pambaniat eng' keetiik." 
Habakkuk2:12 Pwo! Ineendet ne teege nganaseet korotiik, ak kogimite nganaseet tengekto!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Ogeero, tos ma punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole poisyechi piik maat ak koiimgei pororyosyek puch?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Amu nyiei ng'wony naetap toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ko uu ye nyiei peek nyanjet." 
Habakkuk2:15 Pwo! Ineendet ne igoochin chiitap kokwennyi maiyek, inyee ne itesyini ng'woneng'ung', ak igoochini kogeny kobogit, si kobiit igeer icheek komi aach ngor." 
Habakkuk2:16 Kanyiin teweernateet ne kata toroornatet: ee aginye, si iige ne ma kimuratan: kiweekyinin kigombetap eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotebee teweernateet ne samis toroornateng'ung'." 
Habakkuk2:17 Amu tuchin koroomnateet ne ki kiyachi Lebanon, kobooto parisyetap tyong'ik, ne ki igoochi icheek koiyweis; amu korotiigap piik, ak koroomnateet ne ki kiyachi emet, kobooto nganaseet ak piik tugul che menyei olooto." 
Habakkuk2:18 Tilei nee kanamwet ne ki kiwai, kot koyai musogindet; ak tilei nee kanamwet ne kitanyi, ak kaneetindetap lembechek, kot koomang' kitang'indet ne yaei, kot kotany kanamonik che ma twegu?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Pwo ineendet ne leenjin keetit, “Kosu!” Ak ne leenjin koita ne ma twegu, “Ng'eet!” Tos ineetisyei niito? Ogeero, ki kiliigee thahabu ak fedha, ama tinyei kabuset eng' kwenunnyi agot kitigin." 
Habakkuk2:20 Ago mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor hekalunnyi ne tiliil; ingosiis ng'wony komugul eng' tainnyi. 
Habakkuk3:1 Saaet ne ki sa maotyot Habakkuk, ko uu eng' Shigionoth." 
Habakkuk3:2 Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ki agas ng'aleeguk, aiyweisyei: Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ing'eet poisyeng'ung' eng' kasariitanyo; Yai kotook eng' kasarinyo; Ibwaat rireenet nginereechi." 
Habakkuk3:3 Ki nyo Kamuktaindet eng' Teman, ki nyo Ineendet ne Tiliil eng' tulweetap Paran. Ki tuch `toroornatennyi kipsengwet, ak ki nyi ng'wony kalasunennyi." 
Habakkuk3:4 Ki uu kakweng'ennyi lapkeiyet; Kimang'une eunnyi lapkeiyet ne uu ne po keelyegap asiista: Ak kimi yooto ole kiung'e kamuktaennyi. 
Habakkuk3:5 Ki indoe ineendet koroito, Ak ki mang'une keelyekyik kalyeleet ne uu maat." 
Habakkuk3:6 Ki tonon ak kokwa ng'wony; ki keer ak kotumdum pororyosyek: Ak ki iseerak tuloonook che po koigeny; ki ing'uruukso tuloonook che po koigeny; ki uu panwekyik peetuusyek che po keny. 
Habakkuk3:7 Ki ageer emaisyegap Kushan komi nyalilda: Kibotanso tuguuk che kioiye emet che po Midian. 
Habakkuk3:8 Tos ki nereekyi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ainoosyek? Tos ki nyo nereeknateng'ung' agobo ainoosyek, anan agobo nyanjet, kot ilaany paraisisyeguk, ak ilaany karisyeguk che po lugeet che po yetunet?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Ki kityaach kwangeng'ung'; Ki po iman ng'olyootap kayasyosyek ne ki kiyasyechi pororyosyek. Ki ibete emet ainoosyek. 
Habakkuk3:10 Ki iyweis tuloonook ye kigeerin; Kisiirto usoonetap nyanjet; Kitul rireet, ak konamji parak eunekyik." 
Habakkuk3:11 Kitononso asiista ak arawet eng' meng'ootennywa, eng' lapkeiyetap kipchaboniguk kobendi, eng' kaluunetap ng'oting'ung' ne ilyeli." 
Habakkuk3:12 Ki ibun emet inereegoti, eng' nereegek ko ki ityech pororyosyek." 
Habakkuk3:13 Ki imong'u agobo yetunetap piiguk, agobo yetunetap ne iilaat neng'ung'; Ki iguoten kandoindetap kootap kiptengeginik, ing'aanye lumeiywot agoi kaatit." 
Habakkuk3:14 Ki toore `kiplitokyik kandoindetap piikyik che po lugeet: Ki pwa ko uu kipchurchuryet kole koseera: Ki uu poiboindanywa che amei kibananook eng' ung'oot. 
Habakkuk3:15 Ki ityegee inyee nyanjet paraisisyeguk, peek che irurugotin che kiimeen." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ki agas, ak kitilgei moennyu, ki potan kutinnyu eng' cheonooto. Ki nunio kawekyuk ak ki abotan eng' ole ki ami: Ki agen eng' siisinetapkei agobo peetuutap nyalilda, ne nyoonei koityin piik che ki ibookyo." 
Habakkuk3:17 Amu ngot koma yiei mogoywet, Anan koma ruryo keetiigap sabibuk; Koek puch poisyetap mseituni, Ama piitu amitwogik eng' mbareenik; Ak kebar akwotisyegap keechiirek eng' piusyek, Ama komi akwotisyegap tuuga eng' piusyek:" 
Habakkuk3:18 Aboiboitu kora eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Aboiboitu eng' Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap yetunennyu." 
Habakkuk3:19 Kimnateennyu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kiptaiyandennyu, ak yaei keelyekyuk koigei che po cheptirgichet, Ak komutata eng' oldinwekyuk che torooreen. Po ne oo eng' putiik che po kibugandetap inoik." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zephaniah weeriitap Kusi, weeriitap Gedalia, weeriitap Amariah, weeriitap Hezekiah, eng' peetuusyegap Josiah weeriitap Ammon, laitoryatap Judah." 
Zephaniah1:2 Ageesu tuguuk tugul eng' ng'wony, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zephaniah1:3 Ageesu piik ak tyong'ik; ageesu toriitigap parak, ak njireenigap nyanjet, andachini kanagutik kiptengeginik; ak aiste piik eng' ng'wony, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zephaniah1:4 Aluukyini `eunnyu Judah, ak piik tugul che menyei Jerusalem; ak abar ng'etuunenigap Baal, kobooto kainetap Kemarik ak tisiik;" 
Zephaniah1:5 ak icheek che ilasu tuguuk tugul che po kipsengwet, eng' kooriik parak; kobooto icheeget che ilasu, che iyasyechin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koyastos eng' kainetap Malkam;" 
Zephaniah1:6 ak icheek che ki week kometo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; kobooto icheek che ma cheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, anan koteepse ineendet." 
Zephaniah1:7 Osisye eng' taitap Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu kagoriik peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: amu kagochop Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tiseiywot, kagoanyiny toekyik." 
Zephaniah1:8 Ak tuun abire eng' peetuutap tiseiywotap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, pounik, weeriitap laitoryat, kobooto icheek tugul che ilaachi ngoroigap toek." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ak abire eng' peetuunooto tugul che toroombenjin tugatuk, che inyiiti kootap kiptaiyannywa koroomnateet ak ng'aalseet." 
Zephaniah1:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole tuun piitu eng' peetuunooto waagaatap riirek ne punu ormariichetap njireenik, ak waagaat ne punu kebebertap nganaseet, kobooto cheet ne oo ne punu tuloonook che mengeechen." 
Zephaniah1:11 Owaach okweek piik che omenye Maktes, amu kabek chemung'arainik tugul: ak ki parei icheek tugul che ki tinyei fedhaisyek ng'iisyat." 
Zephaniah1:12 Ak asyaach Jerusalem eng' peetuusyechooto akweng'ate; ak abir piik che ki kotepto kimnateennywa ko uu divaik che mi ak misigiikyik, che mwaei eng' mugulelwekwak kole ma yaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne myee, ama yaei yaityet." 
Zephaniah1:13 Ak keluul mogornatennywa, ak koguber kooriikwak: ee, teechei kooriik, ago ma menyei; ak komiin mbareenigap sabibuk, ago ma eei divaikwak." 
Zephaniah1:14 Kariik peetuut ne oo ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, neegit ak kochogu miising', ak ko ng'waan tweguunet ne po peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; riirei eng' olooto nyiganeet eng' tuugeet ne oo." 
Zephaniah1:15 Egu peetuunooto peetuutap nereegek, peetuutap nyalilda ak ng'wanindo, peetuutap kubernateet ak ng'emisyet, peetuutap imeenindo ak mesundeito, peetuutap poolik ak imeenindo ne oo." 
Zephaniah1:16 Peetuutap iryageet ak waagaat, agobo nganasook che ng'ootaatiin, ak irimoik che torooreen." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ak aipchi piik pichiindo, kot kobendat ko uu piik che koryotiin, amu ki koyachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor tengekto: ak ketumda korotiikwak ko uu temburyek, ak keraanda poorwekwak ko uu ng'atateek." 
Zephaniah1:18 Ama imuuchi fedhaisyekwak anan thahabusyekwak kosar icheek eng' peetuutap nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago kibeelei emet komugul eng' maatap ng'etkondanyi: igeesu, ee, igeesu eng' kamuiset icheek tugul che menyei emet." 
Zephaniah2:1 Oyumgei, ee, oyumgei, ee pororyet ne ma tinyei kalilanet;" 
Zephaniah2:2 kotom kosulda ng'atuutyet, kotom kosiirto peetuut ko uu meteteek, kotom kobwanjok nereegek che koroomen che po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kotom konyonjok peetuutap nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zephaniah2:3 Ocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, okweek tugul che oo talaen, che oo po ng'wony, okweek che oyae kirwoogutikyik; ocheeng' imanda, ocheeng' talasyet: imuuch tuun kiunyok eng' peetuutap nereegegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zephaniah2:4 Tuun kiuee Gaza, ak koek karaatya Askelon; ki oonei Ashdod ko katelel asiis, ak kitutu Ekron." 
Zephaniah2:5 Pwo! Piik che menyei ngeguut, pororyetap Keretik! Poryenen ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee Kanaan, emetap Philistiik; ang'emin kot koma komi chii ne meng'iisyei." 
Zephaniah2:6 Ak koek ngeguusyek ole kiyagisye, ak ole mi kooriigap mestoweek kobooto piusyegap akwotisyegap keechiirek." 
Zephaniah2:7 Ak kobunji ngeguut piik che ki ng'et che po kootap Judah; iyage akwotisyekwak olooto: eng' kooriigap Askelon koskoleny; amu rutochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa, ak komut icheek kogeny eng' ole kiga kiluulji." 
Zephaniah2:8 Ki agas chotisyetap Moab, ak churisyosyegap lagogap Ammon, che kichote piikyuk, ak kochaunegei kiwotennywa." 
Zephaniah2:9 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Israel kole ko uu ye asabe, koigeitu Moab Sodom, ak koigei lagogap Ammon Gomorah, punjin siwek, ak keriingonigap muunyuk, ak koguber agoi: luulei piikyuk che ng'etu icheek, ak konam pororyennyu ne ki ng'et icheek koek porotennywa." 
Zephaniah2:10 Nyooru niito amu menatennywa, amu kigochot ak kochaunegei piigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Zephaniah2:11 Egu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamuiset eng' icheek; amu iteenyi `ineendet kamuktaik tugul che po ng'wony, ak kolas piik tugul ineendet, ilasu chii age tugul eng' oldanyi, kobooto ngeguusyek tugul che po pororyosyek." 
Zephaniah2:12 Okweek Ethiopik, parok rotwennyu po chok." 
Zephaniah2:13 Ak kochuul eunnyi kotokyi komostap kaataam, ak kong'em Assyria; ak koyai Nineveh koek karaatya, ak koyaam, ko uu surkwen." 
Zephaniah2:14 Ak koruiye akwotisyek kwenunnyi, tyong'ik tugul che po pororyosyek: ak kotebee chebo kibabaa ak chepswererit metowegap tolochikwak: tyendos eng' tirisyok: tebee kubernateet tugatugik: amu kigong'aany tuguuk che ki kituge taragonik." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ni nganaseet ne paibai ne ma iiti kiy, ne ki mwa eng' muguleldanyi kole anee kityo, ma mi age kobatena: kagoek karaatya ne tya, ole ruitos tyong'igap timiin! Reenyei ineendet age tugul ne siirtoi, ak kong'wereri." 
Zephaniah3:1 Pwo! Ineendet ne ngelelyot ne ki kong'wanit, nganaseet ne usiisyei!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Ki ma kas iit mwaet; kimataach katigonet; ki ma imang' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ki ma riikyi Kamuktaindennyi. 
Zephaniah3:3 Uu pounikyik che mi kwenunnyi ng'etunyik che porisendos, ak ko uu suigap koskoleny kirwoogikyik, che ma ituuchi kiy agoi koeech." 
Zephaniah3:4 Piik che tangusen ak koberberisyei maotikyik: ki komurwon tisiikyik ole-tiliil, Ki kong'em ng'atuutik." 
Zephaniah3:5 Po iman Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi kwenunnyi; ma yaei tengekto; iboortoi kirwoogennyi karonet age tugul, yaei kosulda; ago ma ililandos piik che ma po iman." 
Zephaniah3:6 Ki abar pororyosyek; Ki kong'emogis irimoikwak che torooreen; ki abut ortinwekwak kot koma kobunei chii: Ki kong'emogis nganasookwak kot koma komi chii, kot koma komi chii ne menyei." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ki amwa ale, iywea iman, itaache katigonet; si ma ki isto meng'ootennyi, ko uu tugul che ki ang'at agobo ineendet. Ne katanooto kotestai koyai koyagitu miising' poisyonikwak tugul." 
Zephaniah3:8 Ogeno anyun, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kot koit peetuut ne aipchini kirwooget. Ye katil ayum pororyosyek, ale atuiyo pounatosyek, si aroong'ji icheek nereegekyuk, nereegekyuk tugul che koroomen. Ne matiny ko tuun kibeelei ng'wony tugul eng' maatap ng'etkondanyu." 
Zephaniah3:9 Amu tuun aweekyini anyun piik eng' peetuunooto kutit ne myee, si koguur tugul kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak koboisyechi eng' mageet agenge." 
Zephaniah3:10 Tuun ibwo kagoochinennyu piikyuk che saa, cheptap piikyuk che ki koyesta, kobunu pitoniin eng' ainoosyegap Kush." 
Zephaniah3:11 Ma tuun ililani eng' peetuunooto amu poisyoniguk tugul che ki iyaiywo eng' pistoet. Tuun aistoi komong' eng' kwenung'ung' menotik ak che itoroorigei, si ma ichaugei kogeny eng' tulweennyu ne tiliil." 
Zephaniah3:12 Ago abagachi eng' kwenung'ung' piik che kinyaliili ak ko kibananook, ak komong' icheek kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zephaniah3:13 Ma koyaei tengekto piik che ki ng'et che po Israel, ama komwaei lembechek; ama kinyoorchin ng'olyoot ne po ng'aalseet kutusweekwak. Ago tuun amisyei ak koruiyo, ama piitu chii ne imui icheek." 
Zephaniah3:14 Tyen, ee cheptap Zion; waach, ee Israel! Igaskei ak ibaibaitu eng' muguleldang'ung' tugul, ee cheptap Jerusalem!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Kagoisto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kirwoogutiguk, ki koon punyondeng'ung'. Mi kwenung'ung' laitoryatap Israel, ineendet Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma iywei yaityet agoi." 
Zephaniah3:16 Kimwachin Jerusalem eng' peetuunooto keleenjin: “Meiywei, ee Zion, amat ingochorirenso euneguk." 
Zephaniah3:17 Mi kwenung'ung' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'ung', ineendet Kiplugotyot ne koonu katerteerisyet. Poiboitunenen eng' poiboiyet, siisei eng' chamyennyi. Poiboitunenen eng' tyendo," 
Zephaniah3:18 ko uu eng' peetuutap igoorto.” Ayumi icheek che aragendos agobo tuiyet ne po kaming'inetapkei, che ki chechuuk, che ki kas nyigiisindo eng' chotisyonooto." 
Zephaniah3:19 Keero, aborye eng' peetuusyechooto icheek tugul che inyaliilin. Ak asaru ineendet ne ing'wali, ak amutu ineendet ne ki kioon; ak awale kalilanennywa koek kalasunet ak konaak kainennywa eng' ng'wony tugul." 
Zephaniah3:20 Amutwok eng' peetuusyechooto, ak ayumak eng' peetuusyechooto: amu ayaok onaage ak olasunage eng' kwenutap pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony, ak tuun aweekwok poroteet ogeere, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Haggai1:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel pounindetap Judah, ak Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo, eng' maotyot Haggai eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' kolaitorani Darius, eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawet ne po lo, koleenji," 
Haggai1:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel pounindetap Judah, ak Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo, eng' maotyot Haggai eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' kolaitorani Darius, eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po arawet ne po lo, koleenji," 
Haggai1:2 “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Mwaei pichu kole tomo koit peetuusyek che nyoljinech kebwa, peetuusyek che kiteege kogeny kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Haggai1:3 Ki nyo anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotyot Haggai kole," 
Haggai1:4 “Tos myee omenye okweek kooriikwok che ki kitetee pagoinik ak kobutoot Hekaluunnyu?” 
Haggai1:5 Mwaei anyun Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, “Oriip atebosyekwok." 
Haggai1:6 Ki ogol che chaang', ago ogese che ng'ering'; oamisyei, ago mobiyong'dosi; oeeisei, ago manyiiok; olaachi ngoroik, ago ma mi ne lalang'; ak ineendet ne nyooru melekto kondai lolet ne undurot.”" 
Haggai1:7 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, “Oriip atebosyekwok." 
Haggai1:8 Otogoste tulweet ak oibu keetiik, ak oteech koot si abaibaitune nooto ak kiloswa,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Haggai1:9 “Ki ocheeng' che chaang', ak ogeero, ki piit che ng'ering'; ak kingo ibu kobwa kaa, agutute. Amu nee?” Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek. “Amu koonnyu ne putot, ago labati chii age tugul koboisyei agobo koonnyi." 
Haggai1:10 Ki kirat kipsengwet anyun amu okweek si ma kon rewoot, ama yiei emet logoekyik." 
Haggai1:11 Ak ki ang'at kobiit kemeut eng' emet ak eng' tuloonook, eng' peek ak eng' divaik, eng' mwanik ak eng' tuguuk che piitos eng' ng'wony, eng' piik ak eng' tuuga, ak eng' poisyonik tugul che po eunek.”" 
Haggai1:12 Ki kas iit anyun Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel, ak Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo kobooto piik tugul che ki ng'et; ki kas iit `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ak ng'aleegap maotyot Haggai, ko uu ye kiga koyook `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ineendet. Ki iywei anyun `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Haggai1:12 Ki kas iit anyun Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel, ak Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo kobooto piik tugul che ki ng'et; ki kas iit `icheek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ak ng'aleegap maotyot Haggai, ko uu ye kiga koyook `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa ineendet. Ki iywei anyun `piik Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Haggai1:13 Ki ng'alaal anyun Haggai, ne ki iyooktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, komwachi piik ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenji: Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole “Ami kobootok.”" 
Haggai1:14 Ki ichirchir Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldap Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel pounindetap Judah, kobooto muguleldap Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo, kobooto mugulelwekap piik tugul che ki ng'et. Ki pwa icheek kobois eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindennywa," 
Haggai1:14 Ki ichirchir Kamuktaindet ne Toroor muguleldap Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel pounindetap Judah, kobooto muguleldap Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo, kobooto mugulelwekap piik tugul che ki ng'et. Ki pwa icheek kobois eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindennywa," 
Haggai1:15 eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawetap lo, eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' ne po Laitoryat Darius." 
Haggai2:1 eng' peetuutap tiptem ak agenge ne po arawetap tisap, ko ki nyo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotyot Haggai, kole:" 
Haggai2:2 “Ng'alaalji Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel, pounindetap Judah, ak Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo, kobooto piik che ki ng'et, ileenji:" 
Haggai2:2 “Ng'alaalji Zerubabel weeriitap Shealtiel, pounindetap Judah, ak Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo, kobooto piik che ki ng'et, ileenji:" 
Haggai2:3 ‘Ng'oo eng' okweek ne ki ng'et ne ki keer kooi kotinyei toroornatennyi ne po tai? Ak ogeertoi ano nguno? Tos ma uu puch eng' konyekwok? 
Haggai2:4 Nyiganitu, ee Zerubabel,’ mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. ‘Nyiganitu, ee Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo. Onyiganitu okweek piik tugul che po emet,’ mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘ak oboisye; amu ami kobootok,’ mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Haggai2:4 Nyiganitu, ee Zerubabel,’ mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. ‘Nyiganitu, ee Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak tisiindet ne oo. Onyiganitu okweek piik tugul che po emet,’ mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ‘ak oboisye; amu ami kobootok,’ mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Haggai2:5 Niito ng'olyoot ne ki kiyomisyige ye ki obwane eng' Misiri, ak tebee kwenung'wong' Kabuusennyu ne Tiliil; amoiyweisye." 
Haggai2:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: ‘Eng' ne matya kota atumdumi kogeny konyil agenge kipsengwet ak ng'wony, nyanjet ak emet." 
Haggai2:7 Atumdumi pororyosyek tugul, ak kobwa tuguuk che chamei pororyosyek tugul, ak anyiit kooi toroornatet,’ mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Haggai2:8 ‘Chechuuk fedhaisyek, ak chechuuget thahabusyek ak icheek." 
Haggai2:9 Eetu toroornatet ne po let ne po kooi kosiir ne po tai, ak agoonu kaalyeet eng' yuto,’ ” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Haggai2:10 Eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawetap sogool, eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' ne po Darius ko ki nyo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotyot Haggai kole:" 
Haggai2:11 “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: oteebe tisiik agobo ng'atuutik, oleenji:" 
Haggai2:12 Ngot koibe chiito ngoryennyi panyeek che itabaanatiin, ak kotiiny ngoryonooto magatyat, anan sogoryek, anan divaik, anan mwanik, anan amit age tugul, ko tos tiliiliitu?” Ak ki wol tisiik kole, “Achicha.”" 
Haggai2:13 Yeityo komwa Haggai kole, “Ngot kotiiny chii age tugul ne ng'waan ne kitwa muusto, age eng' tuguuchuuto, ko tos ng'wanitu?” Ak ki wol tisiik kole, “Ng'wanitu.”" 
Haggai2:14 Kowol anyun Haggai kole, “Uu nooto pichu ak uu nooto pororyoni eng' tainnyu,” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, “Ak uu nooto poisyet age tugul ne po eunekwak; ng'waan kiit ne igoitoi eng' olooto.”" 
Haggai2:15 Ak asoomok anyun nguno, ale obwaat kobooch peetuuniito ak kwo tai, kobooch peetuut ne ki kinde koita agenge paragutap koita age eng' hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Haggai2:16 Ye kingwo chii kocheeng' karurugutyetap keruutik tiptem, konyooru ne po keruutik taman kityo. Kingwo ole kitaage divaik kole koip tereenik konom, ko ki mi tiptemu icheegei." 
Haggai2:17 Ki abirenok chelalityet ak uchatet ak koigap ropta eng' poisyonik tugul che po eunekwok; ago ma oweekyagei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Haggai2:18 Asoomok ale, obwaat, kobooch peetuuni ak kwo tai, kobooch peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawetap sogool, kobooch peetuut ne ki kilumee lumeiywotap Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, obwaat anyun." 
Haggai2:19 Tos ta komi peek choge? Ee, ma iiyo keetiigap sabibuk, anan mogoonik, anan keetiigap logoek alak, anan mseituni. Aberuurok anyun kobooch peetuuni." 
Haggai2:20 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Haggai ne po aeng', eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawetap sogool, kole:" 
Haggai2:21 “Ng'alaalji Zerubabel, pounindetap Judah, ileenji atumdumi kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Haggai2:22 Agabui ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po pounatosyek, ak ang'eme kimnateetap pounatosyegap pororyosyek. Agabui kariisyek che po lugeet kobooto che laanyei; ak kobutyo paraisisyek kobooto che laanyei, ki parei age tugul eng' rotwetap chok ne po tupchennyi." 
Haggai2:23 ‘Eng' peetuunooto, anamin ee Zerubabel otwogindennyu, weeriitap Shealtiel, ak ayain iige ng'ookset, amu ki alewenin,’ ” mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Zechariah1:1 Eng' arawetap sisiit eng' kenyiit ne po aeng' ne po laitornatetap Darius ko ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Zekariah weeriitap Berekiah weeriitap Ido, koleenji" 
Zechariah1:2 ki konereekyi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor miising' kwanisyekwok. 
Zechariah1:3 Mwachi anyun icheek ileenji, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Oweekyagei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, asi aweekyogei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Zechariah1:4 Amoigei kwanisyekwok, che kiga iteechi maotik che po tai, koleenji, “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, ‘Oweege anyun nguno omete ortinwekwok che yaach ak poisyonikwok che yaach.’ ” Ago ki ma kas icheek anan koepcha iit, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zechariah1:5 Kwanisyekwok, komi ano? Ang' maotik, tos saptos agoi?" 
Zechariah1:6 Ago tos ki ma ityi kwanisyekwok ng'aleekyuk ak ng'atuutikyuk che ki ang'at otwogikyuk maotik? Ak ki week icheek ak kole, “Ki koyaiywech Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko uu ye kiga ibwaat kole yaiywech ko uu ortinwekyok, ak ko uu poisyonikyok.”" 
Zechariah1:7 Eng' peetuutap tiptem ak ang'wan ne po arawetap taman ak agenge ne arawetap Sebat, eng' kenyiitap aeng' ne po Darius, ko ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot Zekariah weeriitap Berekiah, weeriitap Ido, koleenji:" 
Zechariah1:8 Ki anyooru keereet kemoi agobo chiito ne ki kweryei paraisiit ne piriir ak kotonone keetiigap momonik oriit; ak ki mi patennyi paraisisyek alage che piriireen, che puusyenen, ak che leelachen." 
Zechariah1:9 Ki ale anyun, “Ee kiptaiyandennyu, nee chu?” Ak ki leenjo malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo, “Ta aboorun kiit ne po chuuto.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Ki wol anyun chiito ne ki tonone kwenutap momonichooto kole, “Chuuto ko icheek che ki iyookto Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobunoot komoswek tugul che po ng'wony.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Ak ki wolji `icheek malaikayatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki tonone kwenutap momonichooto koleenji, “Ko kebunote komoswek tugul che po ng'wony, ak keero, tebyei ng'wony tugul kosiisei ak ko kalyandos.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Ki wol anyun malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ta ieesyoi kot kotyanit si iriiree Jerusalem, ak nganasoogap Judah, che ki inereekyi kenyisyechu tamanwogik tisap?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Ak ki wol Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'aleek che myach ak ko po kagaigaet kowolji malaikaiyandanooto ki ng'alaalwo. 
Zechariah1:14 Ki leenjo anyun malaikaiyandanooto ki ng'alaalwo: “Ititenji ileenji, Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole; ‘Ama ng'etkong' agobo Jerusalem ak agobo Zion eng' ng'etkonda ne oo." 
Zechariah1:15 Ak anereechi miising' agobo pororyosyek che kalyandos; amu ye kita anereechi kitigin, kotes icheeget yaityet." 
Zechariah1:16 Ko uu nooto mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole kaaweekyigei Jerusalem ariiree; ki teekyin koonnyu nganasanooto, ak kechuul porowet ne kikwaise eng' Jerusalem.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:17 Itechi kogeny ileenji, “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: ‘Kibaroi nganasookyuk eng' kaberuret; ak ta kogoigoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zion ak ta koleweni Jerusalem.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Ak ki ang'eet met ak ageer, ogeero, kuinoik ang'wan." 
Zechariah1:19 Ki ateebee malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo aleenji, “Nee chu?” Ak ki wolwo koleenjo, “Chu ko kuinoik che ki iyeesta Judah, Israel, ak Jerusalem.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Ak ki iboorwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kitong'ik ang'wan. 
Zechariah1:21 Ki ateep anyun ale, “Pwoonei chuuto koyaei nee?” Ak ki wol kole, “Chu ko kuinoik che ki iyeesta Judah, kot ko mata kobiit chii ne yotei met; ago kabwa chuuto si kobiit komu icheek, ak kotimda kuinoigap pororyosyek, che ki namji parak kuinennywa koborye emetap Judah koiyesta.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ki ang'eet met ak ageer, ogeero, chiito ne tinyei eng' eunnyi porowet ne kikwaise." 
Zechariah2:2 Yeityo ateebee aleenji, “Iwendi ano?” Ak ki leenjo, “Awendi akwai Jerusalem, si kobiit anai ole tee tebeesindanyi ak koindonyi.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Ki wo anyun malaikaiyandanooto ki ng'alaalwo, kwo kotuiyo ak malaikaiyat age ne kiganyonji ineendet," 
Zechariah2:4 ak koleenji ineendet, “Labat, ng'alaalji murenonin ileenji: Ki menyei Jerusalem ko uu ye ki menyei nganasook che mengeechen che ma tinyei irimoik, amu chaang'indap piik ak tuuga che mi." 
Zechariah2:5 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole, Aegu irimeet ne po maat eng' komoswek tugul, ak aegu toroornatet eng' kwenunnyi.”" 
Zechariah2:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole “Eiye, eiye! Omwei eng' emetap murot kaataam, amu ki aseerak ko uu usoonaik ang'wan che po kipsengwet." 
Zechariah2:7 Ee mwechi Zion, sarugei inyee, ne omeng'iisyei ak cheptap Babilon.”" 
Zechariah2:8 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ne kagoyookta ineendet agobo toroornatennyi, awo ye mi pororyosyek che kiluulok, kole “Ee iman, ineendet ne twook, ko katwa laptetap kondanyi." 
Zechariah2:9 Ogeero, ang'warii icheek, ak koek luulenigap otiikwak icheek.” Niito ne onae ole ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Zechariah2:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole “Tyen ak ibaibaitu, ee cheptap Zion; amu, keero, anyoone amenye kwenung'ung'." 
Zechariah2:11 Ak konamgei pororyosyek che chaang' ak Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto ak koek piikyuk; ak ameny kwenung'ung'.” Inae niito ile ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek anyo ole imi. 
Zechariah2:12 Ak konam Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Judah koek kebebertanyi eng' emet ne tiliil, ak kolewen kogeny Jerusalem." 
Zechariah2:13 Osisye, okweek piik tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; amu kagong'eet eng' meng'ootennyi ne tiliil." 
Zechariah3:1 Ak ki iboorwo `ineendet tisiindet ne oo nooto Joshua kotonone taitap malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotonone agine Setani komostap eunnyi ne po tai koek ne kirindoi." 
Zechariah3:1 Ak ki iboorwo `ineendet tisiindet ne oo nooto Joshua kotonone taitap malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kotonone agine Setani komostap eunnyi ne po tai koek ne kirindoi." 
Zechariah3:2 Ak ki leenji Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Setani, Ingogeerin kong' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ee Setani; ee, ingogerin kong' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki lewen Jerusalem: tos ma mecheita niito ne kaginemune ma?" 
Zechariah3:3 Ki ilaachi Joshua ngoroik che murwonen, ak ki tonon eng' taitap malaikaiyandanooto." 
Zechariah3:3 Ki ilaachi Joshua ngoroik che murwonen, ak ki tonon eng' taitap malaikaiyandanooto." 
Zechariah3:4 Ak ki wol ineendet koleenji icheek che kitonone tainnyi, Oreegune ineendet ngoroikyik che murwonen. Ak ki mwachi ineendet koleenji, Keero, kaistoenen tengektong'ung', ak alaagun ngoroik che korooron." 
Zechariah3:5 Ki ale anyun, Ingogerchine icheek ineendet metinnyi chepkulet ne tiliil. Ki ilaakyi anyun ineendet chepkulet ne tiliil, ak kolaakyi ngoroik; ak kitonone malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ole neegitee ineendet." 
Zechariah3:6 Ak kibaoryanji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua eng' kimnateet, koleenji," 
Zechariah3:6 Ak kibaoryanji `malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Joshua eng' kimnateet, koleenji," 
Zechariah3:7 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ngot iwendote ortinwekyuk, ak ngot iriip ng'atuutikyuk, irwooksechi anyun aginye koonnyu, ak iriip seremusyekyuk, ak ayaatun ole ibunoti eng' kwenutap chu tonondos eng' yuto." 
Zechariah3:8 Kas anyun nguno, ee Joshua tisiindet ne oo, inyee kobooto choronoguk che ibuuri eng' taing'ung'; amu kaboorunet pichooto: amu, keero, amutu otwogindennyu ne Temet." 
Zechariah3:8 Kas anyun nguno, ee Joshua tisiindet ne oo, inyee kobooto choronoguk che ibuuri eng' taing'ung'; amu kaboorunet pichooto: amu, keero, amutu otwogindennyu ne Temet." 
Zechariah3:9 Amu, ogeero, koita ne ki ande taitap Joshua; tinyei koita agenge koonyek tisap: ogeero, asirchini siruutik koyata eng' waet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak aiste tengektap emonooto eng' peetuunak." 
Zechariah3:9 Amu, ogeero, koita ne ki ande taitap Joshua; tinyei koita agenge koonyek tisap: ogeero, asirchini siruutik koyata eng' waet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak aiste tengektap emonooto eng' peetuunak." 
Zechariah3:10 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, kole tuun kuurei chii age tugul eng' okweek chiitap kokwennyi, eng' peetuunooto, konyo keel keetitap sabibuk, ak ne po mogoywet." 
Zechariah4:1 Ak ki nyo kogeny malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo, ak kong'eeta ko uu chiito ne king'eeti eng' rwondanyi." 
Zechariah4:2 Ak ki leenjo, Igeere nee? Ak ki ale, Kaageer, ak keero, keldap tait ne po thahabu tugul, kotinyei taabeennyi eng' paragunnyi, kobooto taisyek tisap che po keloto po tait; ki tinyei tait age tugul kirondoik tisap che mi paragunnyi:" 
Zechariah4:3 ak kimi mseituni aeng'u ye neegitee tainooto, kimi age komostap tai ne po taabeet, komi age komostanyi ne po kaataam." 
Zechariah4:4 Ak ki awolji malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo aleenji, Nee chu o kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Zechariah4:5 Kowol anyun malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo, koleenjo, Tos mengen kiit ne po tuguuchu? Ak ki ale, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, mangen." 
Zechariah4:6 Kowol koleenjo, “Ni ko ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mwachin Zerubabel koleenjin: Ma eng' kamuktaet, ama eng' kimnateet, ago eng' Kabuusennyu ne Tiliil, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Zechariah4:7 Ii ng'oo, ee tulwooni oo? Iegu warenget eng' taitap Zerubabel: ak inemu koita ne po parak kowaaktos koleen, Myeeindo, myeeindo, ingotebee paragunnyi.”" 
Zechariah4:8 Ki nyoonjo kogeny ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole 
Zechariah4:9 ki lumei Zerubabel lumeiywotap koi; ak ko eunekyik che igeesu kogeny; ak inai ile Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ne ki iyookwo anyo ole omi. 
Zechariah4:10 Amu ng'oo ne ki kosas peetuutap tuguuk che mengeechen? Amu tuun poiboitu icheek, ak kogeer kiit ne kilititisye eng' eutap Zerubabel. Komwaiwa malaikaiyat kole, “Tuguuchu tisap ko konyegap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; pendoti chooto eng' ng'wony komugul.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Ki ateebee anyun ineendet aleenji, “Nee emitichu aeng'u mi komostap tai ne po keldap tait ak komi komostanyi ne po kaataam?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Ak ki ateebee ne po aeng' aleenji ineendet, Po nee temenichu aeng'u che po mseituni, che mi ole neegitee kirondoik aeng' che po thahabu che rong'u mwanik?" 
Zechariah4:13 Ak ki wol koteebena kole mengen kiit ne po chuuto. Ak ki ale, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, mangen." 
Zechariah4:14 Koleenjo anyun, Chuuto ko weeriik aeng' che po mwanik, che tonone ole neegitee Kiptaiyat ne po ng'wony komugul." 
Zechariah5:1 Ki ang'eet met anyun kogeny ak ageerte, ak ogeero, kitabuut ne mamanat ne tirireni." 
Zechariah5:2 Ak kitep koleenjo, Igeere nee? Ak ki awolji aleenji, Ageere kitabuut ne mamanat ne tirireni; koindonyi ko mitainik tiptem che po euut, ak tebeesindanyi ko mitainik taman che po euut." 
Zechariah5:3 Kimwaiwo anyun koleenjo, Niito ko chubisyet ne wendi koyomu emet komugul: amu age tugul ne choorsei keistoi eng' komosi ko uu ye mwaei; ak age tugul ne iyastos keistoi eng' komosin ko uu ye mwaei kitabuunooto." 
Zechariah5:4 Ayooktoi kitabuunooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kochut kootap choriindet, ak kochut kootap chiito ne iyastos lembechek eng' kainennyu: ak kotebee kwenutap koonnyi, ak kogees koyooto kobooto keetiikyik ak koikyik." 
Zechariah5:5 Ki wo anyun malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo, ak koleenjo, Ing'et metit ak igeer kioto wendi." 
Zechariah5:6 Ak ki atep ale, Nee nooto? Ak ki leenjo niito ko kerebet ne wendi. Ki le kogeny, Ni ko kergeindonywa eng' emet tugul:" 
Zechariah5:7 ak ogeero, ki kinamji parak talendait ne po ngosyelait: ak kimi kwondo ne tebyei ng'wony eng' kerebet oriit." 
Zechariah5:8 Ak ki le, Niito ko Yaityet; ak ki wiirchi ineendet kerebet oriit: yeityo konde ngosyelait ne nyigiis kutitap kioto." 
Zechariah5:9 Ki ang'eet met anyun ak ogeero, ki ageer kwonyiik aeng' kobwanei tai ak ki mi usoonet kebebaikwak. Ki tinyei kebebaik che uu kebebaigap chebo kibabaa, ak ki namji parak kerebonooto eng' kwenutap ng'wony ak kipsengwet." 
Zechariah5:10 Ki aleenji anyun malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo, “Ibei kerebet kwo ano?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Ak ki leenjo, Kwo koteekyine koot eng' emetap Sinar: ak ye kagochobok, kinde yooto si kotebee koek oldanyi." 
Zechariah6:1 Ki ang'eet met kogeny, ak ogeero! Ki ageer kariisyek ang'wan che po lugeet kobwanei kobunu kwenutap tuloonook aeng'; ak ki po sugunwet tuloonoochooto." 
Zechariah6:2 Ki piriireen paraisisyek che po chepkichutit ne po tai, ak kituuen paraisisyegap chepkichutit ne po aeng';" 
Zechariah6:3 ak ki leelach paraisisyegap chepkichutit ne po somok; ak kibusyenen ak ko murwonen paraisisyegap chepkichutit ne po ang'wan. 
Zechariah6:4 Ki awolji ateebee anyun malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalwo aleenji nee chu o, kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Zechariah6:5 Ak ki wol malaikaiyat koleenjo chuuto ko usoonaik ang'wan che po kipsengwet che pendi eng' ole katonone eng' taitap Kiptaiyat ne po ng'wony komugul. 
Zechariah6:6 Wendi chepkichutit ne po paraisisyek che tuuen kotokyingei emet ne po murot kaataam; ak ki pa che leelachen koosup chooto, ak ki pa che pusyenen kotokyigei emet ne po murot tai." 
Zechariah6:7 Ak ki pa paraisisyek che murwonen, ak komach koba kobendatee ng'wony tugul: ak ki mwa kole oba eng' olito, obendate ng'wony tugul. Kibendat anyun eng' ng'wony tugul." 
Zechariah6:8 Ki kuuro anyun ak koleenjo, Keero, kagogaigai kabuusennyu icheek che kaba kotokyigei murot kaataam eng' emet ne po murot kaataam." 
Zechariah6:9 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor koleenjo," 
Zechariah6:10 Imut piik alak eng' che ki kiluul, che po Heldai, ak che po Tobija, ak che po Jedaiah; ak inyoo eng' peetuunooto, ak iwe agoi kootap Josiah weeriitap Zephaniah, ole kobunu icheek ye kingo punu Babilon." 
Zechariah6:10 Imut piik alak eng' che ki kiluul, che po Heldai, ak che po Tobija, ak che po Jedaiah; ak inyoo eng' peetuunooto, ak iwe agoi kootap Josiah weeriitap Zephaniah, ole kobunu icheek ye kingo punu Babilon." 
Zechariah6:11 Ee, ibe icheek fedha ak thahabu, ak iyae chepkuloik, yeityo igerchinee metitap tisiindet ne oo, Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak;" 
Zechariah6:11 Ee, ibe icheek fedha ak thahabu, ak iyae chepkuloik, yeityo igerchinee metitap tisiindet ne oo, Joshua weeriitap Jehosadak;" 
Zechariah6:12 ak imwachi ineendet ileenji mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ko uu ni kole keero, chiito ne kiguure kainennyi Temet; eetu eng' oldanyi, ak koteech Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor:" 
Zechariah6:13 ee, ineendet ne teechei Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak konam toroornatet, ak kotebee ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet, ak kobounis; ak koek tisiindet eng' ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet, ak kotebee kirwoogetap kaalyeet kwenunnywa icheek tuwai." 
Zechariah6:14 Ak kobunjin chepkuloichooto Helem, Tobija, Jedaiah, ak Hen weeriitap Zephaniah, koek kabwaatet eng' Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zechariah6:14 Ak kobunjin chepkuloichooto Helem, Tobija, Jedaiah, ak Hen weeriitap Zephaniah, koek kabwaatet eng' Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zechariah6:15 Ak kobwa icheek che mi ole loo ak koteech Hekaluutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak onai ole ki iyookwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek anyo ole omi. Ak isuldoi niito, ngot ogas iit eng' kagiiletapkei kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindeng'wong'." 
Zechariah7:1 Ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zekariah, eng' kenyiitap ang'wan ne po Laitoryat Darius, eng' peetuutap ang'wan ne po arawetap sogool, nooto ko Kisleb." 
Zechariah7:2 Kiga koyookto anyun icheek che po Bethel Sareser ak Regem-melek, kobooto piikwak, koba kosoom chameet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor," 
Zechariah7:3 ak kong'alaalji tisiigap kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ak maotik, koleenji, “Tos kanyaljo ariir eng' arawet ne po muut, atabaangei, ko uu ye ki ayai eng' kenyisyechu chaang' kot?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Ki nyoonjo anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek koleenjo," 
Zechariah7:5 ng'alaalji piik tugul che po emet ak tisiik, ileenji ye kingo rugutkei ak oriirye eng' arawetap muut ak ne po tisap, eng' kenyisyechooto tamanwogik tisap, ko tos ki orugutkei agobo anee, aneendet?" 
Zechariah7:6 Ak ye oame, ak ye oee, ko tos moamjinigei, ak oeechinigei?" 
Zechariah7:7 Tos manyoljok ogas ng'aleek che ki mwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' maotik che po tai, ye ki kimenyei Jerusalem, ak komi perurto, ak nganasookyik che mi komoswekyik tugul, ak ye ki kimenyei murot tai ak soito?" 
Zechariah7:8 Ak ki nyoonji `ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Zekariah koleenji," 
Zechariah7:9 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, oyai kirwooget ne po iman, ak oyachi tupchetap chii age tugul eng' okweek myeeindo ak rireenet:" 
Zechariah7:10 amous kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot, anan ne ma tinyei sigiik, anan ne too, anan ne panan; amat kobwaat chii age tugul eng' okweek yaityet eng' muguleldanyi agobo tupchennyi." 
Zechariah7:11 Ago ki eesyo kogas iit, ak kililich tigigoikwak, ak kotiim itiikwak si ma kas." 
Zechariah7:12 Ee, ki iuit mugulelwekwak koigei kibargoiyet, si ma kas ng'atuutyet, ak ng'aleek che kiga koyook Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' Kabuusennyi ne Tiliil eng' eunegap maotik che po tai: ki mong' anyun nereegek che eecheen kobunu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, amu nooto." 
Zechariah7:13 Ak ko uu ye kingo riirchi ineendet icheek ama kogas, ko uu nooto tuun riirtos icheek ama kase, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek;" 
Zechariah7:14 ago aiyestoi icheek eng' kipchurchuryet eng' pororyosyek tugul che ki tomo konai. Ki ek anyun emet karaatya eng' let, kot ko mata kobun chii yooto anan koweegegei: amu ki igoochi emet ne ki karaaran koguber." 
Zechariah8:1 Ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek koleenjo," 
Zechariah8:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Amo ng'etkong' agobo Zion, ng'etkonda ne oo, ak amo ng'etkong' agobo ineendet eng' nereegek che ng'woneen miising'." 
Zechariah8:3 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Kaaweekyigei Zion, ak ameny kwenutap Jerusalem: ak keguure Jerusalem ‘Nganaseet ne po iman’; ak keguure tulweetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ‘Tulweet ne tiliil.’" 
Zechariah8:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ta komenyei poisyek ak chebyosok ortinwegap Jerusalem kotinyei chii age tugul kiroktonyi amu osindo? 
Zechariah8:5 Ak konyi ortinwek che po nganaseet ng'etiik ak tiibiik che urerendos eng' ortinwechooto? 
Zechariah8:6 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ngot ko po kwong'eet eng' konyegap piik che ng'etu eng' pichu eng' peetuusyechooto, ko tos ma po kwong'eet agine eng' konyekyuk? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Zechariah8:7 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Ogeero, asaru piikyuk eng' emet ne po kong'asiis ak eng' emet ne po cherongo;" 
Zechariah8:8 ak amutu icheek ak komeny kwenutap Jerusalem. Ak koek `icheek piikyuk ak aegu Kamuktaindennywa, eng' imanit ak eng' imanda.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Ingogimegitu eunekwok, okweek che ogase ng'aleechu eng' peetuusyechu eng' maotik che ki mi eng' peetuut ne ki kiluumei lumeiywot ketau keteechei kogeny kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, nooto ko Hekaluut." 
Zechariah8:10 Amu kingo tomo koit peetuusyechooto ko ki ma konyooru chii melekto, ak ki ma keyaaktoi kiy agobo tyony. Ki ma komi kaalyeet eng' ineendet ne mandoi ak eng' ineendet ne nyoonei amu puunyoot; amu ki agoochi koboryo chii age tugul ak chiitap kokwennyi." 
Zechariah8:11 Ago nguno koma ayachini ichu ki ng'et ko uu eng' peetuusyek che po tai, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Zechariah8:12 Amu tuun piitu keswootap kaalyeet; tuun yiei keetitap sabibuk, ak koruryo tuguuk eng' emet, ak kogoon kipsengwet rewoot; ak agoochi piik che ki ng'et eng' pichu konam tuguuchu tugul koek porotennywa." 
Zechariah8:13 Ak ko uu ye ki oegu che chubootiin eng' pororyosyek, ee kootap Judah ak kootap Israel, asarwok anyun, si oegu kaberuret. Amoiywei, ago ingogimegitu eunekwok.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Amu mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Ko uu ye kigabwaat ayaiywok yaityet, ye ki katacha kwanisyekwok kot anereech, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak ki ma awal kabwaatutikyuk;" 
Zechariah8:15 kaabwaat anyun kogeny eng' peetuusyechuuto ayachi ne myee Jerusalem kobooto kootap Judah; amoiywei. 
Zechariah8:16 Chu tuguuk che tuun oyae: Ingomwachi chii age tugul eng' okweek chiitap kokwennyi imanit; oyai kirwooget ne po imanit ak kaalyeet eng' ormariichokwok. 
Zechariah8:17 Amat kobwaat chii age tugul eng' okweek yaityet eng' muguleldanyi agobo chiitap kokwennyi, amocham kayasyoet age tugul ne po lembech; amu aweche tuguuchuuto tugul, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Ak ki nyoonjo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek koleenjo," 
Zechariah8:19 “Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Egu eng' kootap Judah poiboiyet ak kaagaasetapkei, ak igoorwegap poiboiyet, karugutetapkei ne po arawetap ang'wan, ak ne po arawetap muut, ak ne po arawetap tisap, ak ne po arawetap taman; ocham anyun imanit ak kaalyeet.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: “Tuun pwoonei pororyosyek ak piik che menyei nganasook che chaang'; 
Zechariah8:21 ak koba piik che po nganaseet age nganaseet age koleenji, ‘Ongechakte keebe kesoom chameet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak kecheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek; awendi agane.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Ee, pwoonei piik che chaang' ak pororyosyek che kiimeen kocheeng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek eng' Jerusalem, ak kosoom chameet eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zechariah8:23 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole: Tuun namei piik tamanu eng' peetuusyechooto, che punu kutusweek tugul che po pororyosyek, ngoryeetap Yahudyot ak koleenji, ‘Kibendi tugul kobooten, amu kigegas keele mi Kamuktaindet kobootok.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Nyigiisindap ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo emetap Hadrak, ak egu Damasko ole tebee. Amu tokyingei `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik tugul, ak pororyosyek tugul che po Israel;" 
Zechariah9:2 kobooto Hamath agine ne mi kiwotennyi, Tyro ak Sidon, nga keeregei ko utaatiin miising'." 
Zechariah9:3 Ak kiteekyigei Tyro irimeet, ak ki iyum fedha ko uu temburyek, ak koyum thahabu che korooron ko uu ng'atateegap ortinwek." 
Zechariah9:4 Ogeero, oonei Kiptaiyat ineendet, ak kowiirchi kimnateennyi nyanjet; ak kebeel." 
Zechariah9:5 Keerei Askelon ak koiyweis; keerei Gaza agine, ak konyoor ng'wanindo ne oo; ak Ekron agine, amu ililani eng' kamang'unennyi. Ak kobet laitoryat eng' Gaza, ama kemenyei Askelon." 
Zechariah9:6 Ak komeny `chiito ne po sarbuch Ashdod, ak ageesu menoteetap Philistiik." 
Zechariah9:7 Ak aiste korotiikyik eng' kutinnyi, ak aiste tuguukyik che kiweechei eng' kelekyik; ak punjin `ineendet agine ne ng'etu Kamuktaindennyo; ak koigei poror eng' Judah, ak koigei `Ekron Jebusindet." 
Zechariah9:8 Ak ameng'iisye ayiem koonnyu si agirinda lugeet, si ma pun chii yooto anan koweegegei. Ama mi usiindet ne punei kwenunnywa agoi, amu kaageer nguno eng' konyekyuk." 
Zechariah9:9 Paibaitu miising', ee cheptap Zion! Waach, ee cheptap Jerusalem! Keero, nyoonjinin laitoryandeng'ung'; po iman ineendet ak kotinyei yetunet; iming'inegei ak kolong'onu sigiryet, moitap sigiryet ne kirgit." 
Zechariah9:10 Ak ang'em chepkichutitap lugeet eng' Ephraim, kobooto paraisiit eng' Jerusalem, ak kigees kwangetap pooryeet; ak komwachi pororyosyek kaalyeet; ak pochitu pounatennyi nyanjet age agoi nyanjet age, ak koboochit aineet agoi ole poochin ng'wony." 
Zechariah9:11 Ago eng' inyee, ko ki ayookte kimonjororiniguk eng' keriinget ne ma mi peek, amu korotiigap kayomiseng'ung'." 
Zechariah9:12 Oweekyigei irimeet, ee okweek kimonjororinik che otinye kamang'unet; agot rani amwae ale, ageerun konyil aeng'." 
Zechariah9:13 Amu ki ariikyigei Judah ko uu kwanget, ak ayai Ephraim koek kipchabonikyik. Ang'eeti weeriiguk, ee Zion, kobargei ak weeriiguk, ee Greece, ak ayain iige rotwetap chok ne po chiito ne nyigan."
