Zechariah9:14 Ak kotook Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' paragunnywa, ak kwo ne kipchabennyi ko uu kalyeleet; ak koguut Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor iryageet, ak kwo kobooto kipchurchurinik che po murot tai." 
Zechariah9:15 Ak koriip Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek icheek; ak kogees ak kotyekyi ng'wony koik che ki wiirtoe porowet; ak koeeiso ak kowaakyo ko uu che kae divaik, ak kinyiit ko uu taabook, ko uu luukwegap kaptisisyet." 
Zechariah9:16 Eng' peetuunooto, kosaru `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennywa icheek, ko uu akweetap keechiiregap piikyik; amu tuun kergeitu ak koik che po chepkulet, iluu icheek miising' eng' emennyi." 
Zechariah9:17 Amu oo ne tya myeeindonyi ak korooronindonyi! Igoochin `peek murenik koneryo, ak kogoochin `divaik che leelach tiibiik koneryo." 
Zechariah10:1 Osoom Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ropta eng' peetuusyek che po ropta ne po let, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne yaei kalyelosyek; si kogoochi icheek ropta ne inesi, ak kogoochi chii age tugul susweek eng' emet." 
Zechariah10:2 Amu ki komwa terapik tangoita, ak ki kogeer piik che ng'oorsei lembechek, ak ki komwa icheek karwotitaosyek che po lembech, igoigoisyei puch; pendoti ko uu keechiirek, kinyaliili amu ma tinyei mestowot." 
Zechariah10:3 Anereekyini mestoweek, ak abire kwesik: amu karutoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek akweennyi ne po keechiirek, kootap Judah, ak koyai icheek koigei paraisinnyi ne myee eng' pooryeet." 
Zechariah10:4 Mang'une `ineendet koita ne po luuita, mang'une `ineendet kipchumaryat, mang'une `ineendet kwangetap pooryeet, mang'une `ineendet age tugul ne usiisyei kibagenge." 
Zechariah10:5 Ak koigei piik che nyigoonen, che tyechei puunikwak eng' ng'atateegap ortinwek eng' pooryeet; ak kobargei, amu mi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kobooto icheek: ak kotoptobenso piik che ketei paraisisyek." 
Zechariah10:6 Ak agimiit kootap Judah, ak asaru kootap Joseph, ak amutu icheek kogeny, amu ariiree icheek; ak koigei ye ki ma amete icheek: amu aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kamuktaindennywa, ak agas icheek." 
Zechariah10:7 Ak koigei icheek che po Ephraim chiito ne nyigan, ak koboiboitu mugulelwekwak ko uu che kaei divaik: ee, keerei lagokwok nooto, ak koboiboitu; igasegei mugulelwekwak eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zechariah10:8 Aititenjini icheek, ak ayum, amu ki atyach icheek: ak kotesagis ko uu ye kiga kotesagis." 
Zechariah10:9 Ak agool icheek eng' kwenutap pororyosyek; ak kobwaata komi emotinwek che looen: ak komeng'iis kobooto lagokwak, ak koweigei." 
Zechariah10:10 Amutu icheek kogeny komang'une emetap Misiri, ak ayum icheek komong' eng' Assyria; ak amutu icheek kobwa emetap Gilead ak Lebanon; ama piitu ole yamei icheek." 
Zechariah10:11 Ak peek che mildogei eng' nyanjet, ak koteenyo rirosyek tugul che po aineet: ak kiming'in menoteetap Assyria, ak koistogei kirokto ne po Misiri." 
Zechariah10:12 Agimiiti icheek eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ak kobendatee kainennyi, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zechariah11:1 Yaat kurgotiguk, ee Lebanon, si kobeel maat taragoniguk." 
Zechariah11:2 Waach, ee piribiryoni, amu kagobut tarakwet, amu kageng'em che korooron: owaach, ee keetiigap Bason, amu kagoluul osneet ne kiim." 
Zechariah11:3 Kutitap mestoweek che waaktos! Amu kageng'em toroornatennywa; kutitap ng'etuunyik che neran che porisendos! Amu kageng'em menoteetap Jordan. 
Zechariah11:4 Kamwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu kole: “Iyage akweetap keechiirek che kienyei. 
Zechariah11:5 Icheek che alei ko enyei ak koba koma nyoor kergong'yet. Che aldoi komwaei koleen, ‘Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, amu ka aa egu mogoryo’; ak ma riiree mestowekwak icheek." 
Zechariah11:6 Amu ma ariiree kogeny piik che menyei emoni, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Agoitoi chii tugul kwo eutap chiitap kokwennyi ak agoite kwo eutap laitoryannyi: ak kobar emet, amasaru icheek eng' eunnywa.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Ki ayage anyun akweetap keechiirek che kienyei, keechiirek che nyerootiin iman. Ki aip anyun kirokweek aeng'; ki aguure age Myeeindo, aguure age Ratuutik; ak ki ayage akweet." 
Zechariah11:8 Ak ki ang'em mestoweek somok eng' arawet agenge; amu kigong'et saboondanyu agobo icheek, ak kowecho kogeny saboonwekwak." 
Zechariah11:9 Ki amwa anyun ale, maayagok: ingome ne meei; ak ingebar ne kibarei; ak ingoam age tugul eng' che kang'et panyeegap age." 
Zechariah11:10 Ak ki anam kiroktonyu Myeeindo, ak aep apcheune aeng', si kobiit abut kayomisennyu ne ki kiyomiskei kobooto pororyosyek tugul." 
Zechariah11:11 Ak kibutok eng' peetuunooto: ak ki nai anyun che nyerootiin che po akweetap keechiirek, che ki epcha iit, kole ki ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nooto." 
Zechariah11:12 Ak ki aleenji icheek, Ngot obwaat ole myee, ogoono melektanyu; ak ngo ma uu nooto, ko matogoono. Kogerwo anyun fedhaisyek sosom koek melektanyu." 
Zechariah11:13 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Wiirchi cheptereniot, nooto ko alyet ne myee ne kigamannywa. Ki aip anyun fedhaisyechooto sosom, ak awirchi cheptereniot eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Zechariah11:14 Yeityo aep apcheune aeng' kiroktonyu age, nooto Ratuutik, si kobiit ang'etii tupchondit ne ting'egei Judah ak Israel." 
Zechariah11:15 Ak ki leenjo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Nam kogeny tuguugap mestowot ne perber." 
Zechariah11:16 Amu, keero, ang'eeti mestowot eng' emoni, ne marutochin che kigeon, ama cheeng'ei che kiyesta, anan konya ne kigoil; ama paei ne chamegei, ago amei panyeegap che neryootiin, ak kobetabet siyookwak." 
Zechariah11:17 Pwo! Mestowot ne ma tilei kiy ne pagaktoi akweet! Ingooep rotwetap chok eunnyi ak kobol kondanyi ne po tai, ingoyaamei eunnyi ak kogor kondanyi ne po tai." 
Zechariah12:1 Nyigiisindap ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor agobo Israel. 
Zechariah12:2 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ne iitoi kipsengwet, ak kolumei lumeiywotap ng'wony, ak koyaei muguleldap chii eng' oriitap chiichooto, ko uu ni kole: Ogeero, ayae Jerusalem koek kigombet ne po terteryotet eng' piik tugul che mi komoswekyik tugul, egu ko uu nooto eng' Judah agine eng' peetuusyek che kiyiemei Jerusalem." 
Zechariah12:3 Ak ayae Jerusalem eng' peetuunooto koek koita ne nyigiis ne iimi piik tugul; nyooru perutik che chaang' icheek che kanabi koyato: ak koyumjigei ineendet pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony. 
Zechariah12:4 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto kole, agoochini paraisiit age tugul kokwong', ak abire iywek chiinyi ne laanyei: ak ayaat konyekyuk ageer kootap Judah, ak abire korateet paraisiit age tugul ne po pororyosyek." 
Zechariah12:5 Ak komwa pounigap Judah eng' mugulelwekwak kole, piik che menyei Jerusalem ko kimnateennyu eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, Kamuktaindennywa." 
Zechariah12:6 Ayae eng' peetuunooto pounigap Judah koigei rokyietap maat ne mi kweenik, ak koigei kegenget ne mi kwenutap ratuutigap peek; ak kogees piik tugul che mi komoswek tugul che mi eutap tai ak che mi murot kaataam: ak komeny Jerusalem kogeny komostanyi, nooto ko Jerusalem." 
Zechariah12:7 Sip kosaru Kamuktaindet ne Toroor emaisyegap Judah, si ma eet toroornatetap kootap Daudi ak toroornatetap piik che menyei Jerusalem, kosiir Judah." 
Zechariah12:8 Riibei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto piik che menyei Jerusalem; ak koigei ne nyalulat eng' icheek Daudi eng' peetuunooto; ak koigei kootap Daudi Kamuktaindet, ko uu malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne mi tainnywa." 
Zechariah12:9 Ak acheeng' abar eng' peetuunooto pororyosyek tugul che ibookyin Jerusalem. 
Zechariah12:10 Ak ande muguleldap myeeindo ak ne po saaet kootap Daudi, ak piik che menyei Jerusalem, ak konyala icheek che kitoora: ak kootee agobo ineendet ko uu ye iteei chii agobo weeriinnyi ne ki kiii inegeik ak konyo ng'wanindo agobo ineendet, ko uu ineendet ne mi eng' ng'wanindo agobo taaitanyi." 
Zechariah12:11 Piitu eng' peetuunooto kateeiyet ne oo eng' Jerusalem, ne uu kateeiyetap Hadadrimon eng' atebweetap Megidon." 
Zechariah12:12 Ak kootee emet, iteei ooreet age tugul ineegei; iteeitos che po kootap Daudi icheegei, ak kooteeiyo osotikwak icheegei; iteeitos che po kootap Nathan icheegei, ak kooteeiyo osotikwak icheegei;" 
Zechariah12:13 iteeitos che po kootap Lawi icheegei, ak kooteeiyo osotikwak icheegei; iteeitos che po kootap Shimei icheegei, ak kooteeiyo osotikwak icheegei;" 
Zechariah12:14 iteeitos ortinwek tugul che kang'et, iteei ooreet age tugul ineegei, ak kooteeiyo osotikwak icheegei." 
Zechariah13:1 Tuun kiyaatyin kootap Daudi ak piik che menyei Jerusalem, kondametutap peek eng' peetuunooto, amu tengekto ak murwoonindo." 
Zechariah13:2 Ak mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole tuun aistoi eng' peetuunooto kainaigap kanamonik eng' emet, ama kibwaati kogeny: ak aiste kogeny maotik ak tamirmiryet ne murwoon eng' emet." 
Zechariah13:3 Ak ngot ko tuun komaoten age tugul, koleenji anyun kwanda ak kamet che kisichei chiichooto, Mesabe; amu imwae lembechek eng' kainetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor: ak kotoor ineendet kwanda ak kamet che kisichei ineendet, ye kamaoten." 
Zechariah13:4 Ak tuun ililandos maotik eng' peetuunooto, ililani age tugul agobo ng'ang'utyennyi, ye kamaoten; ama kolaachi ngoryeet ne sabul si kobiit koberber piik:" 
Zechariah13:5 ago mwaei kole ma aa maotyot, aa kabatindet; amu ki kiyaa aek otwogindet kobooch ming'inatennyu." 
Zechariah13:6 Ak keteebe keleenji, Po nee perutichu mi euneguk? Kowol anyun kole po perutichu kaguotenet ne ki kiguotena eng' kootap choronokyuk." 
Zechariah13:7 Ng'eet, ee rotwetap chok, porye mestowondennyu, porye chiito ne ki mi tuwai, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek: pir mestowot, si koiyesta keechiirek; ak atokyi eunnyu che mengeechen." 
Zechariah13:8 Ki istoi, ak kobek eng' peetuunooto eng' emet komugul, kebeberwek aeng', mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ago kibagakyin olooto kebeberta agenge eng' somok." 
Zechariah13:9 Ak amut kebeberato po somok kobun maat, ak atiliil icheek ko uu ye kitiliili fedha ak atyem icheek ko uu ye kityemei thahabu: kuurei icheek kainennyu, ak agas icheek: amwae ale, Icheeget ko piikyuk; ak kole, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko Kamuktaindennyu." 
Zechariah14:1 Ogeero, nyoonei peetuutap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ye tuun kipcheei paruneniguk eng' kwenung'ung'." 
Zechariah14:2 Amu tuun ayumi pororyosyek tugul kobookyi Jerusalem kobargei; ak kenam nganaseet ak keluul kooriik, ak kesuup kwonyiik: ak kimut kebebertap nganaseet koek luulenik, ama ki parei piik che kang'et eng' nganaseet." 
Zechariah14:3 Yeityo kwo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, kwo kobargei ak pororyosyechooto, ko uu ye kiyaei pooryeet eng' peetuutap lugeet." 
Zechariah14:4 Ak tuun tononie keelyekyik eng' peetuunooto tulweetap mseituni, ne mi taitap Jerusalem eng' komostap kong'asiis, ak kobetak kwenutap tulweetap mseituni ole tokyingei kong'asiis ak cherongo, ak kobiit eng' yooto atebweet ne oo; ak kwo kebebertap tulwoonooto kotokyingei murot kaataam, ak kwo kebeberta age kotokyigei murot tai." 
Zechariah14:5 Ak omwei obun atebweetap tuloonookyuk; amu itei atebweetap tuloonoogap Asel: ee, omwei, ko uu ye ki omwei ye kibotani ng'wony eng' peetuusyegap Uzziah laitoryatap Judah: ak konyo Kamuktaindet ne Toroor Kamuktaindennyu, komi piik tugul che tiliileen kobooto ineendet." 
Zechariah14:6 Ak ma iluu lapkeiyet eng' peetuunooto amaimenitu: 
Zechariah14:7 ago peetuut agenge ne naat eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor; ma peet, ama kemoi: ago lapkeitu koskoleny." 
Zechariah14:8 Ak tuun mang'une peek che saptos Jerusalem eng' peetuunooto; pendi kebeberta age kotokyingei nyanjetap Mediterenian ne mi kong'asiis, kobendi kebeberta age kotokyingei nyanjet ne mi cherongo: pendi ko uu nooto eng' kemei ak iwot." 
Zechariah14:9 Ak koek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor laitoryatap ng'wony komugul: egu agenge Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto, ak koek agenge kainennyi." 
Zechariah14:10 Kiwolei emet tugul koigei Arabah, kobooch Geba agoi Rimon murot tai ne po Jerusalem; ak kieeti, ak komeny oldanyi, kobooch ormariichetap Benjamin, agoi komostap ormariichet ne po tai, agoi ormariichetap luuita, kobooch teekseet ne kooi ne po Hananel, agoi komoswegap laitoryat ole kitue sabibuk." 
Zechariah14:11 Ak komeny piik olooto, ama komi chubisyet kogeny; ago meng'iisyei Jerusalem eng' chametapkei." 
Zechariah14:12 Ak piitu koroitap ng'wony ne pire `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor piik tugul che ki pargei ak Jerusalem: nundos poorwekwak kota kotonondos, ak konunio konyekwak eng' kelongonikwak, ak konunio ng'elyebwekwak eng' kutusweekwak." 
Zechariah14:13 Punu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' peetuunooto wasetapkei ne oo, ne nyoonei kwenunnywa; ak konam age tugul eng' icheek eutap chiitap kokwennyi, ak kobargei ineendet ak chiitap kokwennyi." 
Zechariah14:14 Ak kobargei Judah agine ak Jerusalem; ak kiyomo mogornatosyek che po pororyosyek tugul, che mi komoswek tugul, thahabu, fedha, ak ngoroik, eng' chaang'indo ne oo." 
Zechariah14:15 Ak piitu ko uu nooto, koroito ne po paraisiit, ak ne po nyumbut, ak ne po tambeesyet, ak ne po sigiryet, ak ne po tyong'ik tugul che miitei meng'otosyechooto, ko uu koroiyooto." 
Zechariah14:16 Ak age tugul ne ng'etu eng' pororyosyek tugul che ki ibookyin Jerusalem, kotogostoi olooto eng' kenyiit age tugul, kolasu Laitoryat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ak koyai igoorto ne po keryosyek." 
Zechariah14:17 Ak age tugul ne po ortinwek tugul che po ng'wony ne ma togostoi Jerusalem kolasu Laitoryat, Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, koma nyooru chooto ropta." 
Zechariah14:18 Ak ngot koma togosta ooreetap kootap Misiri, amabwa, ko marobonjin ak icheek; piitu koroito ne pire Kamuktaindet ne Toroor pororyosyek che ma togosta koba koyai igoorto ne po keryosyek." 
Zechariah14:19 Egu niito piretap Misiri, ak piretap pororyosyek tugul che ma togosta koba igoorto ne po keryosyek." 
Zechariah14:20 Tuun kisirchin eng' peetuunooto cheptingiloogap paraisisyek kole, “Tiliil eng' Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.” Ak igeitu tereenik che mi kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor taabook che mi taitap kaptisisyet." 
Zechariah14:21 Ee, kitiliiljin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek tereet age tugul eng' Jerusalem ak eng' Judah; ak kobwa icheek tugul che eng'sei, koip tereenichooto ak koyoise: ama komiitei kogeny eng' peetuunooto chemung'araindet eng' kootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi1:1 Nyigiisindap ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne ki igoochi `Malaki Israel. 
Malachi1:2 Ki achamak, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago omwae ole, “Ki ichamenech nee?” Komwa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kole: Tos ki ma ko ng'eetap kametap `Jakobo Esau? Nga uu nooto ko ki acham Jakobo;" 
Malachi1:3 awech Esau, ak ayai emennyi ne po tuloonook koguber, ak agoochi porotennyi lelwek che po surkwen." 
Malachi1:4 Nga mwaei Edom kole ki kiterterech, ago kiweeksei ak keteech komoswek che ki koek karatwek, ko mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, “Tuun teechei icheek ago abute. Kuuree piik icheek emetap yaityet, piik che ating'ee nereegek koigeny”" 
Malachi1:5 Tuun ogeere ak omwa ole, “Ingotoroorok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kot kosiir kiwotetap Israel.”" 
Malachi1:6 Igoochin konyit weeriit kwandanyi, ak kogonyiti otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi. Ngot ko aa kwanda anyun, komi ano teegistanyu? Ak ngot ko aa kiptaiyat, komi ano kaiyweisyet ne kiywea? Mwaiwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek ee tisiik, che osase kainennyu. Omwae ole ki kisaste ano kaineng'ung'?" 
Malachi1:7 Ogoitoi magatiinik che murwonen eng' kaptisisyennyu ak omwae oleen, “Ki kimurwonden ano?” Ye omwae oleen sasaat meesetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Malachi1:8 Ye ogoitoi che koryotiin koek tiseiywek, ko tos ma yaityet nooto? Ak ye ogoitoi che ing'waldos ak che myandos, ko tos ma yaityet nooto? Ye igoochi anyun nooto pounindeng'ung' ko tos paibaitunenen? Anan tos taachin ye keerin? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi1:9 Asoomok anyun ale, osoom chametap Kamuktaindet si kobiit korirenech. Ye ogoonu chooto kobun eunekwok, ko tos taach age eng' okweek ye keer? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi1:10 Kaigai onde chii ne kerei kurgotik si molaal maat eng' kaptisisyennyu puch! Ma paibai eng' okweek agot kitigin, amataache kagoochinet ne punu eunekwok, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi1:11 Amu oo kainennyu eng' pororyosyek kobooch ole charunee asiis agoi ole roroktoe; ak kigoitoi eng' komosta age tugul nyamdutik che kibeelei agobo kainennyu, kobooto kagoochinet ne tiliil: amu oo kainennyu eng' pororyosyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi1:12 Ago ong'waniti ye omwae ole, Murwon meesetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ak ko sasootin logoekyik, agot amitwogikyik." 
Malachi1:13 Omwae kogeny ole, Ogeero, kaimetapkei ne tya! Ak ogututae seruunek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek. Ki oibu che ki koam tyondo, che ing'waldos ak che myandos; oibu chooto koek tiseiywek. Tos ataach chuuto kobun eunekwok? Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Malachi1:14 Ago chuboot kaberberindet, ne tinyei mengit eng' akweennyi, ak koarorto, yeityo koeng'ji Kiptaiyat kiit ne tinyei perutyet. Amu Aa Laitoryat ne oo, ak kiywei kainennyu eng' pororyosyek mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi2:1 Ee okweek tisiik, neng'wong' ng'atuutyoni." 
Malachi2:2 Ngot ko momache ogas, ak ngot ko momache ogonoree mugulelwekwok, si kobiit otoroor kainennyu, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, ayookwok anyun chubisyet, ak achup perurwogikwok. Ee, kaachup, amu mogonoree ng'atuutyonooto mugulelwek." 
Malachi2:3 Ogeero, ang'eme iyoteng'wong', ak alage ng'atateek togoochikwok, ng'atateegap kagoochinoikwok; ak keistok kobooto tuguuchooto." 
Malachi2:4 Ak onai ole ki ayookwok ng'atuutyoniito, si kotebi kayomisennyu kobooto Lawiik, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi2:5 Ki mi kayomisennyu ne po saboondo ak kaalyeet kobooto ineendet; ak ki agoochi tuguuchooto ineendet si kobiit koiyweis, koiywea, ak kogonyit kainennyu." 
Malachi2:6 Ki mi kutinnyi ng'atuutyetap imanit, ama ki nyoorchi kutinnyi kiit ne po lembech. Ki kibendate tuwai eng' kaalyeet ak eng' lititindo, ak koweech che chaang' kometo yaityo." 
Malachi2:7 Amu kanyool koriip kutitap tisiindet naet, ak kocheeng' piik ng'atuutyet eng' ng'aleekyik; amu ineendet ko chiito ne iyooktoi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi2:8 Ago ki omaste eng' ooreet; ki onach che chaang' eng' ng'atuutyet; ki ong'em kayomisetap Lawi, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi2:9 Ki ayaak anyun oegu che kisasei ak ko nyerootiin eng' taitap piik tugul, ko uu ye ki ma oriip ortinwekyuk, ago ki otiytiy piik eng' ng'atuutik." 
Malachi2:10 Tos ma ki tinyei acheek tugul kwanda agenge? Tos ma yaech Kamuktaindet agenge? Amu nee si koberber chii age tugul eng' acheek tupchennyi, kong'wanit kayomisetap kwanisyekyok?" 
Malachi2:11 Kigong'em Judah kayaneet, ye kingo yai kiit ne kiwechei eng' Israel ak eng' Jerusalem; amu ki kong'wanit tiliilindap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne chamei, ak kotun cheptap kamuktaik che teer." 
Malachi2:12 Igeesu Kamuktaindet ne Toroor chiito ne yachin ineendet kiito, ineendet ne kosu ak ineendet ne wolu. Ki istoe icheek emaisyegap Jakobo, kobooto ineendet ne igoitoi kagoochinet, kogoochin Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi2:13 Ak ni kiit age ne oyae kogeny, otumjini peegap kong' kaptisisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, eng' riirek ak kateeiyet, kot koma koiti kogeny kagoochinet, ama kotaachei eng' chamyet che ogoochini eng' eunekwok." 
Malachi2:14 Ago oteebe ole, “Amu nee si ma kotaachei?” Amu kogoek Kamuktaindet ne Toroor paoryat eng' kwenung'wong', inyee ak osotyotap ming'inateng'ung' ne ki iberber, nganda ineendet ko chamaneng'ung' ak ko osotyotap kayomisutyeng'ung'." 
Malachi2:15 Tos ki ma yaak Kamuktaindet okweek tuwai oegu poorto agenge ak oegu saboondo agenge? Amu nee si koek agenge? Ki cheeng'ei iyoteet ne iywei Kamuktaindet. Oriip anyun mugulelwekwok, amat koberber chii osotyotap ming'inatennyi." 
Malachi2:16 Amu aweche peesyet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, Kamuktaindetap Israel, ak ineendet ne tuge ngoryennyi sastaet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek. Oriip anyun mugulelwekwok, si moberberisye." 
Malachi2:17 Kooiim Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ng'aleekwok. Ago oteebe ole, “Ki kiime nee?” Amu omwae ole, Myee age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne yaei yaityet ak koboiboitune pichooto. Anan ye oteebe ole, “Mi ano Kamuktaindet ne po kirwoogetap imanda?”" 
Malachi3:1 Ogeero, ayoogu chiinyu, kayooktoin si kochop ooreet eng' tainnyu. Ak nyoonei matiny hekalunnyi `Kiptaiyat ne ocheeng'e. Nyoonei kayooktoin ne po arorutyet ne oboiboitune, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi3:2 Ago ng'oo ne imuuchi komuita eng' peetuutap nyonunennyi? Ak ng'oo ne tononi ye katook? Uu ineendet maat ne ki tiliilisye, ak ko uu sabunitap mwetiik;" 
Malachi3:3 ak kotep ng'wony ko uu kitong'iin ak ko uu katiliilindetap fedha. Itiliili `inee ooreetap Lawiik ak kotiliil icheek ko uu ye kitiliili thahabu ak fedha; si kogoochi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kagoochinoik eng' imanda. 
Malachi3:4 Si kochamak anyun kagoochinetap Judah ak ne po Jerusalem eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ko uu eng' peetuusyek ak eng' kenyiisyek che po keny. 
Malachi3:5 Ak arikyok eng' kirwooget, ak achepchebi agoon paornateet agobo inyee aegu, arwookyi icheek che ma iywea: pooniik, che ibegei, piik che iyastos eng' lembechek, icheek che sastoe otwogindet ne kisirei eng' melektanyi, che sastoe kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot ak ne ma tinyei sigiik, ak ne imaasi toondet, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi3:6 Aa Kamuktaindet ne Toroor, ma walaksei, ko uu nooto okweek, ee weeriigap Jakobo, koma kigeswok." 
Malachi3:7 Ki omaste kobooch peetuusyegap kwanisyekwok, omete kayomisutikyuk ama oriip. Oweekyage anyun, si aweekyogei, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek. Ago oteebe ole, “Kiweegundoige ano?”" 
Malachi3:8 Tos chorei chii Kamuktaindet? Ago ochoora. Ago oteebe ole, “Ki kichoorten ano?” Ki ochor kebeberwegap taman ak kagoochinoik." 
Malachi3:9 Kichubok eng' chubeet, amu ochoora, agot pororyoni komugul." 
Malachi3:10 Oibu kebeberwek tugul che po taman kobwa choge, si kobiit amitwogik eng' koonnyu, ak otyema anyun eng' nooto, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek, si ogeer ngo ma yaatwok tirisyogap kipsengwet ak aroong'wok perurto kot koma komi ole ondoi." 
Malachi3:11 Ak agerwok kong' ne amisyoti, si ma ng'em ruroteetap emeng'wong'; ama koosu keetiikwok che po sabibuk kotomo koit peetuusyek, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi3:12 Ak koguurenok pororyosyek tugul piik che poiboi, amu oegu emet ne ki chamei kot, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi3:13 Kigouegitu ng'aleekwok che ki omwaitaena, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ago oteebe ole nee ne ki kemwaitaenen?" 
Malachi3:14 Ki omwa ole, “Ma tilei kiy ngeot Kamuktaindet. Tos ki kogelwech nee ye ki ngeriip kayomisutikyik ak kebendatee taitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek keriiryoti?" 
Malachi3:15 Ak nguno keguure menotik piik che poiboi, ee, yaigap yaityo koma poorei kityo, ago ngo tyem Kamuktaindet ak kochilildos.”" 
Malachi3:16 Ki ng'alaaljigei anyun che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor. Ki ep iit Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kogas ak ki kisir eng' tainnyi bukuitap kabwaatet agobo icheek che iywei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ak kobwaati kainennyi. 
Malachi3:17 Ak mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, “Punjino icheek, eng' peetuut ne ayae icheek koek kinnyu ne nenyu aneege; ak ariiree icheek ko uu ye riiree chii weeriinnyi ne poisyechin." 
Malachi3:18 Yeityo oweege ak obesye chiito ne po iman ak kiptengekyot, obesye ineendet ne otei Kamuktaindet ak ne maotei.”" 
Malachi4:1 Mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek kole, “Ogeero, nyoonei peetuut ne lalei ko uu maat ne oo, ak igeitu mobeek menotik tugul, kobooto icheek tugul che yaei tengekto. Ak peelei icheek peetuut ne nyoonei kot ko ma ng'etyi tigityot anan ko mornet." 
Malachi4:2 Ago okweek che oiywei kainennyu kochorchinok asiista ne po imanda ne ting'ee kanyaiset kebebaikyik; ak omande, ourerenote ko uu moek che kagiyaat." 
Malachi4:3 Ak otyech kiptengeginik; amu egu oreek eng' keldebesaigap keelyekwok eng' peetuut ne ayae niito, mwaei Kamuktaindet ne Toroor ne po lugoosyek." 
Malachi4:4 “Obwaat Ng'atuutyetap otwogindennyu Musa ne ki ang'at eng' Horeb, agoochi ng'atuutik ak kirwoogutik agobo Israel komugul." 
Malachi4:5 “Ogeero, ayookwok maotyot Elijah kotom konyo peetuut ne oo, ne koroom ne po Kamuktaindet ne Toroor." 
Malachi4:6 Weechei `inee mugulelwegap kwanisyek kotokyigei lagokwak, ak koweech mugulelwegap lagok kotokyigei kwanisyekwak; si ma nyo abire ng'wonyuni chubisyet.”" 
Matthew1:5 Ki sich `Salmon Boaz eng' Rahab, kosich `Boaz Obed eng' Ruth, kosich `Obed Jesse," 
Matthew2:17 Ki isulda anyun eng' peetuunooto ne ki kamwa maotyot Jeremiah kole: 
Matthew3:3 Ni ineendet ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole, “Tuugeetap chii ne kuursei eng' surkwen, koleen: ‘Ochop ooreetap Kiptaiyat, olitiit ole punooti.’ ”" 
Matthew4:14 si kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole," 
Matthew8:17 si kobiit kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah, kole, “Ki nam ineendet nyalulnatennyo ak koip myanwekyok.”" 
Matthew12:17 si kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole," 
Matthew13:14 Isuldaat eng' icheek maonateetap Isaiah ne leen, ‘Eng' kaseet ko tuun ogase, ago moguitosi, ak eng' keeret ko tuun ogeere, ago mobestosi agot kitigin." 
Matthew15:7 Okweek chombilik! Ki maoten Isaiah komyee agobo okweek ye ki mwa kole," 
Matthew16:14 Kowol icheek kole, “Mwaei alak koleen Johana Kabatisanindet, koleen alage Elijah, ko alak koleen Jeremiah anan ko age eng' maotik.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Ye ogeer anyun kiit ne kiwechei ne po ng'emisyet kotonone ole-tiliil, ko uu ye ki mwa maotyot Daniel (ingoguiyo ineendet ne somani)," 
Matthew27:9 Ki isulda anyun ne ki kagimwa eng' maotyot Jeremiah keele, “Ki ip icheek fedhaisyek sosom, alyetap ineendet ne kiga kigaamanji, ne kigaaman piigap Israel," 
Mark1:2 Ko uu ye ki kisir eng' maotyot Isaiah keele, “Keero, ayooktoi kiboityonnyu kondoenen, ne chobei oreng'ung';" 
Mark7:6 Ki mwachi icheek koleenji, “Kisip komwa Isaiah iman agobo okweek chombilik, ko uu ye siraat kole, ‘Teecha pichu eng' kutusweekwak, ago looen mugulelwekwak eng' anee." 
Luke3:4 ko uu ye ki kisir eng' bukuitap ng'aleegap maotyot Isaiah, keele, “Kutitap chii ne ititeni eng' surkwen koleen, ‘Ochop ooreetap Kiptaiyat, olitiit ole punooti." 
Luke3:25 weeriitap Matatia, weeriitap Amos, weeriitap Nahum, weeriitap Esli, weeriitap Nagai," 
Luke3:25 weeriitap Matatia, weeriitap Amos, weeriitap Nahum, weeriitap Esli, weeriitap Nagai," 
Luke4:17 Ak ki kigoochi ineendet bukuit ne mamanat ne po maotyot Isaiah. Ak ki ng'aany bukuit, konyoor ole ki kisir keele," 
John1:23 Ki le, “Aa kutitap chii ne ititeni eng' surkwen, ‘Olitit ooreetap Kiptaiyat,’ ” ko uu ye ki mwa maotyot Isaiah." 
John12:38 Kiyaak niito si kobiit kosulda ng'olyootap maotyot Isaiah, ne ki mwa, kole, “Kiptaiyat, ki iyan ng'oo ng'aleekyok? Ak kigeng'aang'ji ng'oo eutap Kiptaiyat?”" 
John12:39 Ma imuuch anyun koyan amu ng'olyoondoniito, amu ki mwa Isaiah kogeny, kole," 
John12:41 Ki mwa tuguuchu Isaiah, amu ki keer toroornatennyi; ak ki ng'alaal agobo ineendet." 
Acts2:16 Achicha, niito ne kimwaei maotyot Joel kole," 
Acts7:45 Ne ki ip kwanisyekyok ak icheek eng' peetuusyekwak, kobooto Joshua, ye kinamei Pororyosyek, che ki oon Kamuktaindet eng' taitap kwanisyekyok. Ki mi yooto agoi peetuusyegap Daudi," 
Acts8:28 ak ki weeksei kaa anyun, kotebee chepkichutinnyi, ak kosomani bukuitap maotyot Isaiah." 
Acts8:30 Ak ki labat Philipu ak kogas ineendet kosomani bukuitap maotyot Isaiah, ak ki leenji, “Iguitosi kiit ne isomani?”" 
Acts28:25 Ak ye ki mata kogasyin icheegei, koba, ko kagomwa Paulo ng'olyoot agenge, kole, “Ki mwachi komyee Kabuuset ne Tiliil kwanisyekwok eng' maotyot Isaiah, kole," 
Romans9:25 Ko uu ye mwaei agine eng' Hosea kole, “Aguure icheek piikyuk, che ki ma ko ‘piikyuk’; ak aguure ineendet chamaneet, ne ki ma ko ‘chamaneet.’ ”" 
Romans9:27 Ak ki mwa Isaiah eng' kutit ne oo agobo Israel, kole, “Agot ngo koitetap piigap Israel ko tee ng'aniegap nyanjet, kesaru che ki ng'et;" 
Romans9:29 Ak, ko uu ye kiga sip komwa Isaiah kole, “Nda ki ma pagaakwech Kiptaiyatap Lugoosyek keswoot, ta kiga kegergeitu ak Sodom, ak ta kiga keyaech keige Gomorah.”" 
Romans10:16 Ago ki ma kas iit tugul logoiywek che myach. Amu mwaei Isaiah kole, “Kiptaiyat, ki koyan ng'oo ng'aleekyok?”" 
Romans10:20 Ak nyigan miising' Isaiah, ak mwaei kole, “Ki nyoorwo icheek che ki ma cheeng'a; ki ataagu eng' icheek che ma teeba.”" 
Romans15:12 Ak kogeny mwaei Isaiah kole, Tuun piitu tigityotap Jesse, Ak ineendet ne tuun ng'eetei koboi Pororyosyek; Kotun imang'u ineendet Pororyosyek." 
Hebrews4:8 Amu nda kiga kogoochi Joshua icheek kamuung'et, ta ki ma kota komwaei let agobo peetuut age." 
James5:11 Ogeero, kiguure che kimuita che poiboen: ki ogas agobo muitaetap Job, ak ki ogeer kiit ne ki yai Kiptaiyat eng' let, ole nyiitaat rireenet Kiptaiyat, ak koriiregei."
